Genesis1:1 Mu masooka Katonda yatonda eggulu n'ensi; 
Genesis1:2 mu nsi temwali kantu, nga njereere, n'enzikiza ng'ebisse ku ngulu ku ddubi n'empewo ya Katonda ng'ekunta ku mazzi." 
Genesis1:3 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Wabeerewo ekitangaala.” Ekitangaala ne kibaawo. 
Genesis1:4 Katonda n'alaba ng'ekitangaala kirungi. Katonda n'ayawula ekitangaala ku nzikiza. 
Genesis1:5 Ekitangaala n'akiyita misana, ate enzikiza n'agiyita kiro. Ne buwungeera, ne bukya; lwe lunaku olubereberye." 
Genesis1:6 Era Katonda n'agamba nti: “Wabeerewo olubaale wakati w'amazzi, lwawule amazzi aga waggulu ku mazzi aga wansi.”" 
Genesis1:7 Katonda n'akola olubaale, amazzi agaali wansi w'olubaale n'agaawula ku ago agaali waggulu w'olubaale; ne kiba bwe kityo." 
Genesis1:8 Olubaale Katonda n'aluyita ggulu. Ne buwungeera, ne bukya; lwe lunaku olwokubiri." 
Genesis1:9 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Amazzi agali wansi w'eggulu gakuŋŋaanire mu kifo kimu n'olukalu lulabike.” Ne kiba bwe kityo. 
Genesis1:10 Katonda olukalu n'aluyita nsi, ate ekkuŋŋaaniro ly'amazzi n'aliyita nnyanja. Katonda n'alaba nga kirungi." 
Genesis1:11 Katonda era n'agamba nti: “Ettaka limeze ebimera: omuddo oguleeta ensigo n'emiti egireeta ebibala ku nsi, nga gireeta ebibala omuli ensigo, buli gumu mu mbala yaagwo.” Ne kiba bwe kityo." 
Genesis1:12 Ettaka ne limeza ebimera: omuddo oguleeta ensigo ey'embala yaagwo, n'emiti egibala ebibala omuli ensigo mu mbala yaagyo. Katonda n'alaba nga kirungi." 
Genesis1:13 Ne buwungeera, ne bukya; lwe lunaku olwokusatu." 
Genesis1:14 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Mu lubaale lw'eggulu wabeerewo ebyaka, byawule emisana n'ekiro, bibeere obubonero okutegeererwa ebiseera by'obudde, ennaku n'emyaka," 
Genesis1:15 byakire mu lubaale lw'eggulu, bimulise ensi.” Ne kiba bwe kityo." 
Genesis1:16 Katonda yakola ebyaka ebinene bibiri: ekisingako obunene kifuge emisana, ate ekitono kifuge ekiro, ssaako emmunyeenye." 
Genesis1:17 Katonda n'abiteeka mu lubaale lw'eggulu byakire ensi 
Genesis1:18 bifuge emisana n'ekiro, byawule ekitangaala ku nzikiza. Katonda n'alaba nga kirungi." 
Genesis1:19 Ne buwungeera, ne bukya; lwe lunaku olwokuna." 
Genesis1:20 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Amazzi gabune ebitonde ebirimu obulamu, n'ebinyonyi bibuukire ku nsi mu lubaale lw'eggulu.”" 
Genesis1:21 Katonda yatonda agasota aganene n'ebiramu byonna ebibunye mu mazzi mu mbala yaabyo, na buli kinyonyi kya biwaawaatiro mu mbala yaakyo. Katonda n'alaba nga kirungi." 
Genesis1:22 Katonda n'abiwa omukisa n'agamba nti: “Muzaale, mwale, mujjule amazzi g'ennyanja, n'ebinyonyi byeyongere obungi ku nsi.”" 
Genesis1:23 Ne buwungeera, ne bukya; lwe lunaku olwookutaano." 
Genesis1:24 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Ettaka lireete ebiramu mu mbala yaabyo, ebisolo by'awaka, n'ebyewalula, n'ebisolo by'oku nsi mu mbala yaabyo.” Ne kiba bwe kityo." 
Genesis1:25 Katonda yakola ebisolo by'omu nsiko mu mbala yaabyo, n'ebisolo by'awaka mu mbala yaabyo na buli kyewalula ku ttaka mu mbala yaakyo. Katonda n'alaba nga kirungi." 
Genesis1:26 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Tukole omuntu mu kifaananyi kyaffe ne mu mbala yaffe, bafuge ebyennyanja mu nnyanja n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga, ebisolo by'awaka, ssaako n'ebisolo eby'omu nsiko byonna, na buli kyewalula ku ttaka.”" 
Genesis1:27 Katonda yatonda omuntu mu kifaananyi kye. Yamutonda mu kifaananyi kya Katonda; yabatonda omusajja n'omukazi. 
Genesis1:28 Katonda n'abawa omukisa, n'abagamba nti: “Muzaale, mwale, mujjuze ensi mugifuge, mufuge ebyennyanja mu nnyanja, n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga, n'ebiramu byonna ebyewalula ku ttaka.”" 
Genesis1:29 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Wuuno mbawadde omuddo gwonna oguleeta ensigo wonna ku nsi n'emiti gyonna egibala ebibala ebireeta ensigo, y'eneebanga emmere yammwe." 
Genesis1:30 N'ebisolo byonna eby'oku nsi n'ebinyonyi byonna eby'omu bbanga na buli kyewalula ku ttaka ekirina obulamu; mbiwadde buli kimera kyonna y'eba ebeera emmere.” Ne kiba bwe kityo. 
Genesis1:31 Katonda n'alaba byonna bye yali akoze nga wamma birungi nnyo. Ne buwungeera, ne bukya; lwe lunaku olwomukaaga." 
Genesis2:1 Bwe kityo eggulu n'ensi ne bimalirizibwa ne nnamunkukumbo waamu yenna. 
Genesis2:2 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu Katonda yali amalirizza omulimu gwe yali akola, ku lunaku olwomusanvu n'awummula omulimu gwe gwonna gwe yali akola." 
Genesis2:3 Katonda n'awa omukisa olunaku olwomusanvu, n'alutukuza, kubanga ku olwo yawummula omulimu gwe gwonna ogw'okutonda." 
Genesis2:4 Kino kye kifaayo ky'eggulu n'ensi lwe byatondebwa. Omukama Katonda lwe yakola ensi n'eggulu 
Genesis2:5 waali tewannabaawo kasaka konna ak'ettale ku nsi wadde ekimera kyonna eky'oku nsiko ekyali kitutunuse; anti Omukama Katonda yali tannatonnyesa nkuba ku nsi wadde okubaawo omuntu yenna ow'okulima ettaka," 
Genesis2:6 kyokka ensulo yavanga mu ttaka n'efukirira ku nsi ku ngulu kwonna. 
Genesis2:7 Awo Omukama Katonda n'abumba omuntu mu nfuufu ey'ettaka, n'afuuwa mu mivubo gy'ennyindo ye omukka ogw'obulamu. Omuntu n'afuuka omwoyo omulamu." 
Genesis2:8 Omukama Katonda n'asimba ennimiro mu Edeni ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba. Omwo mwe yassa omuntu gwe yali abumbye. 
Genesis2:9 Omukama Katonda mu ttaka n'amezaamu buli muti ogusanyusa okulaba nga guwooma n'okulya, mu nnimiro wakati nga mulimu omuti gw'obulamu n'omuti ogw'okumanya obulungi n'obubi." 
Genesis2:10 Omugga gwafulumanga mu Edeni okufukirira ennimiro, bwe gwavanga eyo ne gweyawulamu obugga buna." 
Genesis2:11 Erinnya ly'akasooka ye Pisoni, ke kaako aketooloola ensi yonna ey'e Kavila erimu zaabu." 
Genesis2:12 Zaabu w'omu nsi eyo mulungi; eyo osangayo budelliyo n'ejjinja oniki. 
Genesis2:13 Ate erinnya ly'akagga akookubiri ye Gikoni aketooloola ensi yonna ey'e Kuusi. 
Genesis2:14 Ate erinnya ly'akagga akookusatu ye Tiguri. Ako kalaga ebuvanjuba wa Assuri. Ko akagga akookuna ye Furaati. 
Genesis2:15 Omukama Katonda yaddira omusajja, n'amussa mu nnimiro y'e Edeni, agirime era agikuume." 
Genesis2:16 Omukama Katonda n'alagira omusajja nti: “Okulya ku muti gwonna ogw'omu nnimiro, ekyo osobola," 
Genesis2:17 naye omuti ogw'okumanya obulungi n'obubi togulyangako; anti olunaku lwonna lw'oligulyako, oli wa kufa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Omukama Katonda n'agamba nti: “Si kirungi muntu kubeera yekka; nzija kumukolera omuyambi amusaanira.” 
Genesis2:19 Omukama Katonda ng'amaze okubumba mu ttaka ebisolo byonna eby'omu nsiko n'ebinyonyi byonna eby'omu bbanga, yabireetera omusajja alabe ky'anaabiyita, buli kiramu kyonna nga bwe yakiyita lye lyafuuka erinnya lyakyo." 
Genesis2:20 Omusajja n'atuuma amannya ebisolo by'awaka byonna, n'ebinyonyi byonna eby'omu bbanga, n'ebisolo byonna eby'ettale; naye temwasangibwamu muyambi asaanira muntu." 
Genesis2:21 Omukama Katonda ne yeebasa omusajja otulo tungi. Bwe yali yeebase, ku mbiriizi ze n'aggyako lumu, mu kifo kyalwo n'ajjuzaawo omubiri;" 
Genesis2:22 Omukama Katonda n'azimba olubiriizi lwe yali aggye mu musajja n'akolamu omukazi, n'amuleetera omusajja." 
Genesis2:23 Omusajja n'agamba nti: “Kati lino lye ggumba ery'omu magumba gange, omubiri oguvudde mu mubiri gwange; ono anaayitibwanga ‘mukazi’ kubanga aggyiddwa mu musajja.”" 
Genesis2:24 Olw'okubeera ekyo omusajja kyaliva alirekanga kitaawe ne nnyina, ne yeegatta ku mukazi we; balifuuka omubiri gumu." 
Genesis2:25 Bombi, omusajja ne mukazi we, baali bwereere, naye nga tebakwataganirwa nsonyi." 
Genesis3:1 Omusota gwali mukupya okusinga ebiramu byonna eby'omu nsiko Omukama Katonda bye yali akoze. Gwagamba omukazi nti: “Ddala kituufu, Katonda yabagaana okulya ku buli muti ogw'omu nnimiro?”" 
Genesis3:2 Omukazi n'ayanukula omusota nti: “Tusobola okulya ebibala ku miti gy'omu nnimiro," 
Genesis3:3 wabula ku kibala ky'omuti, oguli mu makkati g'ennimiro, Katonda yatulagira nti: ‘Temukiryangako era temukikwatangako sikulwa nga mufa.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Omusota ne gugamba omukazi nti: “Temugenda kufa n'akatono. 
Genesis3:5 Ye Katonda amanyi nti: Olunaku lwonna lwe muliba mukiriddeko, amaaso gammwe gagenda kuzibuka, mugenda kubeera nga Katonda nga mumanyi ekirungi n'ekibi.”" 
Genesis3:6 Awo omukazi n'alaba ng'omuti gwali mulungi okulya, nga gusanyusa amaaso, era nga gwegombesa olw'amagezi ge guwa, n'atoola ku kibala kyagwo n'alya, n'awa ne bba gwe yali naye n'alya." 
Genesis3:7 Awo amaaso gaabwe bombi ne gazibuka. Ne bamanya nga bali bwereere, ne batunga ebikoola by'omukunyu, ne beekolera eby'okwebikkako." 
Genesis3:8 Omusajja ne mukazi we bwe baawulira enswagiro z'Omukama Katonda eyali abaalabaala mu nnimiro mu kawewo ak'akawungeezi, ne beekweka Omukama Katonda mu miti gy'ennimiro." 
Genesis3:9 Omukama Katonda n'ayita omusajja n'amubuuza nti: “Oli ludda wa?” 
Genesis3:10 Ko ye nti: “Mpulidde enswagiro zo mu nnimiro, ne ntya, kubanga mbadde bwereere, ne neekweka.”" 
Genesis3:11 N'amubuuza nti: “Ani akugambye nti oli bwereere? Olidde ku muti gwe nakugaana okulyako?” 
Genesis3:12 Omusajja n'ayanukula nti: “Omukazi gwe wampa abeere nange ye yampadde ekibala ekiva ku muti, ne ndya.”" 
Genesis3:13 Awo Omukama Katonda n'agamba omukazi nti: “Kiki kino ky'okoze?” Omukazi n'ayanukula nti: “Omusota gwannimbye, ne ndya.”" 
Genesis3:14 Omukama Katonda n'agamba omusota nti: “Kubanga okoze kino, ovumiriddwa mu bisolo byonna eby'awaka n'ebisolo byonna eby'omu nsiko. Oneewaluliranga ku lubuto lwo; onoolyanga nfuufu ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo." 
Genesis3:15 “Nzija kubakyawaganya, ggwe n'omukazi, ezzadde lyo n'ezzadde lye; lyo lirikubetenta omutwe, ate ggwe olibojja ekisinziiro kyalyo.”" 
Genesis3:16 N'agamba omukazi nti: “Nzija kwongera nnyo okulumwa, abaana bo onoobazaalanga mu bulumi, ojja kuyaayaaniranga musajja wo, ate ye anaakufuganga.”" 
Genesis3:17 Ye omusajja n'amugamba nti: “Kubanga wawulidde eddoboozi lya mukazi wo, n'olya ku muti gwe nakukomereza nti: ‘Togulyangako,’ “ettaka livumiriddwa olw'okubeera ggwe. Okuggyamu ky'olya onookuluusananga ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo." 
Genesis3:18 Linaakumereza maggwa na matovu, onoolyanga bimera bya ttale." 
Genesis3:19 Onoolyanga emmere ng'evudde mu ntuuyo zo, okutuusa lw'olidda mu ttaka, kubanga mwe waggyibwa, kubanga oli nfuufu, era mu nfuufu mw'olidda.”" 
Genesis3:20 Omusajja n'atuuma mukazi we Eva, kubanga ye yafuuka nnyina w'abalamu bonna." 
Genesis3:21 Omukama Katonda n'akolera omusajja ne mukazi we ebyambalo eby'amaliba n'abambaza. 
Genesis3:22 Omukama Katonda n'agamba nti: “Laba, omusajja wuuno afuuse ng'omu ku ffe mu kumanya obulungi n'obubi, kati sikulwa ng'agololera omukono gwe ku muti ogw'obulamu n'alyako n'aba mulamu emirembe gyonna.”" 
Genesis3:23 Omukama Katonda n'amugoba mu nnimiro y'e Edeni, alimenga ettaka mwe yaggyibwa." 
Genesis3:24 Katonda bwe yamala okugoba omusajja, ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, n'ateekayo bakerubi n'ekitala eky'omuliro nga kyetala, okukuuma ekkubo erigenda ku muti ogw'obulamu." 
Genesis4:1 Omusajja n'amanya Eva mukazi we; Eva n'afuna olubuto n'azaala Kayini, n'agamba nti: “Nfunye omusajja n'obuyambi bw'Omukama.”" 
Genesis4:2 N'ayongera n'azaala Abeli muganda wa Kayini. Abeli yali mulunzi wa ndiga, Kayini ye nga mulimi." 
Genesis4:3 Nga wayiseewo ebbanga, Kayini n'aleeta ebimu ku bibala eby'omu ttaka okuweereza Omukama." 
Genesis4:4 Ne Abeli naye n'aleeta ku biggulanda eby'omu kisibo kye ne ku masavu gaabyo. Omukama n'asanyukira Abeli n'ekitone kye. 
Genesis4:5 Naye Omukama teyasanyukira Kayini n'ekitone kye. Kayini n'asunguwala nnyo, n'anakuwala." 
Genesis4:6 Omukama n'agamba Kayini nti: “Lwaki osunguwadde? Lwaki onakuwadde? 
Genesis4:7 Bw'onooba okoze bulungi toosiimibwe? Naye kati okoze bubi; ekibi kyebakiridde ku mulyango, kyegomba okukwezza, naye ggwe wandikifuze.”" 
Genesis4:8 Olumu Kayini n'agamba Abeli muganda we nti: “Tugendeko mu nnimiro.” Baali bali eyo mu nnimiro, Kayini n'agwira Abeli muganda we n'amutta." 
Genesis4:9 Omukama n'abuuza Kayini nti: “Abeli muganda wo ali ludda wa?” Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Simanyi. Nze nkuuma muganda wange?” 
Genesis4:10 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Okoze ki? Omusaayi gwa muganda wo gulaajanidde gye ndi nga guyima mu ttaka. 
Genesis4:11 Kale nno ovumiriddwa, ogobeddwa ku ttaka eryayasamye ne limira omusaayi gwa muganda wo nga liguggya mu mikono gyo." 
Genesis4:12 Bw'onoolimanga, ettaka teriikubalizenga bibala byalyo; ku nsi onoobanga mubungeese.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kayini n'agamba Omukama nti: “Ekibonerezo kyange kinene, kimpitiridde." 
Genesis4:14 Wuuno olwa leero ongobye ku ttaka, nzija kukisibwa amaaso go, era ne mu nsi nnaabanga mubungeese era emmomboze. Buli alinsanga, alitta bussi.”" 
Genesis4:15 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Si bwe kijja okuba n'akatono; wabula, buli yenna alitta Kayini, aliwoolerwako eggwanga emirundi musanvu.” Omukama n'assa akabonero ku Kayini, buli yenna amusanga, aleme kumutta." 
Genesis4:16 Kayini n'ava mu maaso ga Katonda, n'asenga mu nsi Nodi ebuvanjuba wa Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kayini yamanya mukazi we, n'abeera olubuto, n'azaala Enoki. Yali azimba ekibuga, kwe kukituuma erinnya lya mutabani we Enoki." 
Genesis4:18 Enoki yazaala Yiradi ne Yiradi n'azaala Mekuyeeli, ne Mekuyeeli n'azaala Metusayeli ne Metusayeli n'azaala Lameki." 
Genesis4:19 Lameki n'awasa abakazi babiri: erinnya ly'asooka ye Ada, n'ery'omulala ye Zilla." 
Genesis4:20 Ada yazaala Yabali: ye kitaabwe w'abo abasula mu weema era abalunzi. 
Genesis4:21 Erinnya lya muganda we ye Yubali: ye kitaawe wa bonna abayimba ku nnanga n'abafuuwa endere. 
Genesis4:22 Ne Zilla n'azaala Tubali Kayini eyali omuweesi w'ebikozesebwa byonna eby'ekikomo n'ekyuma. Mwannyina Tubali Kayini nga ye Naama. 
Genesis4:23 Lameki n'agamba bakazi be nti: “Ada ne Zilla, muwulire eddoboozi lyange, bakazi ba Lameki, muwulirize ebigambo byange: Natta omusajja olw'ekiwundu kye yanteekako, omuvubuka olw'obuvune bwe yanzisaako." 
Genesis4:24 Oba ku Kayini okuwoolera eggwanga kwa mirundi musanvu ku Lameki kwa nsanvu emirundi musanvu.” 
Genesis4:25 Adamu n'addamu n'amanya mukazi we, n'azaala omwana mulenzi; yamutuuma Seti, ng'agamba nti: “Katonda anteereddewo ezzadde eddala mu kifo kya Abeli; kubanga Kayini yamutta.”" 
Genesis4:26 Ne Seti n'afuna omwana wa bulenzi, n'amutuuma Enosi. Mu bbanga eryo abantu we baatandikira okukoowoola erinnya ly'Omukama." 
Genesis5:1 Kino kye kitabo ky'ezzadde lya Adamu. Ku lunaku Omukama lwe yatonda omuntu, yamukola mu nfaanana ya Katonda." 
Genesis5:2 Yabatonda omusajja n'omukazi, n'abawa omukisa, n'abayita erinnya lyabwe muntu ku lunaku lwe baatondebwa." 
Genesis5:3 Adamu yali aweza emyaka kikumi mu asatu n'azaala omwana omulenzi, mu mbala ye, mu kifaananyi kye, n'amutuuma Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Adamu bwe yamala okuzaala Seti yawangaalayo emyaka emirala lunaana; yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:5 Gyonna awamu Adamu yawangaala emyaka lwenda mu asatu, n'afa." 
Genesis5:6 Seti yali aweza emyaka kikumi mu etaano n'azaala Enosi. 
Genesis5:7 Ne Seti bwe yamala okuzaala Enosi yawangaalayo emyaka emirala lunaana mu musanvu; yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:8 Gyonna awamu Seti yawangaala emyaka lwenda mu kkumi n'ebiri, n'afa." 
Genesis5:9 Enosi yali aweza emyaka kyenda n'azaala Kenani. 
Genesis5:10 Ate bwe yamala okuzaala Kenani yawangaalayo emyaka emirala lunaana mu kkumi n'ettaano; yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:11 Gyonna awamu Enosi yawangaala emyaka lwenda mu etaano, n'afa." 
Genesis5:12 Ne Kenani yali aweza emyaka nsanvu n'azaala Maalaleeli. 
Genesis5:13 Ate Kenani bwe yamala okuzaala Maalaleeli yawangaalayo emyaka emirala lunaana mu ana. Yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:14 Gyonna awamu Kenani yawangaala emyaka lwenda mu kkumi, n'afa." 
Genesis5:15 Maalaleeli yali aweza emyaka nkaaga mu etaano n'azaala Yaredi. 
Genesis5:16 Maalaleeli bwe yamala okuzaala Yaredi yawangaalayo emyaka emirala lunaana mu asatu; yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:17 Gyonna awamu Maalaleeli yawangaala emyaka lunaana mu kyenda mu etaano, n'afa." 
Genesis5:18 Ne Yaredi yali aweza emyaka kikumi mu nkaaga mu ebiri n'azaala Enoki. 
Genesis5:19 Yaredi bwe yamala okuzaala Enoki yawangaalayo emyaka emirala lunaana; yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:20 Gyonna awamu Yaredi yawangaala emyaka lwenda mu nkaaga mu ebiri, n'afa." 
Genesis5:21 Enoki yali aweza emyaka nkaaga mu etaano n'azaala Metusela 
Genesis5:22 Enoki ng'amaze okuzaala Metusela yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bisatu; yatambuliranga mu Katonda. Yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:23 Gyonna awamu Enoki yawangaala emyaka bikumi bisatu mu nkaaga mu etaano. 
Genesis5:24 Yatambuliranga mu Katonda, olumu n'aba nga takyaliwo, kubanga Katonda yamutwala." 
Genesis5:25 Metusela yali aweza emyaka kikumi mu kinaana mu musanvu n'azaala Lameki. 
Genesis5:26 Metusela bwe yamala okuzaala Lameki yawangaalayo emyaka emirala lusanvu mu kinaana mu ebiri; yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. 
Genesis5:27 Gyonna awamu Metusela yawangaala emyaka lwenda mu nkaaga mu mwenda, n'afa." 
Genesis5:28 Lameki yali aweza emyaka kikumi mu kinaana mu ebiri, n'azaala omwana mulenzi." 
Genesis5:29 Yamutuuma Nowa, ng'agamba nti: “Ono alitukubagiza olw'okukuluusana kwaffe n'okukabassana olw'ettaka Omukama lye yavumirira.”" 
Genesis5:30 Lameki bwe yamala okuzaala Nowa yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bitaano mu kyenda mu etaano, yazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala." 
Genesis5:31 Gyonna awamu Lameki yawangaala emyaka lusanvu mu nsanvu mu musanvu, n'afa." 
Genesis5:32 Nowa bwe yali nga wa myaka ebikumi bitaano n'azaala Seemu, Kaamu ne Yafesi." 
Genesis6:1 Abantu bwe baamala okwala ku nsi, nga bazadde n'abawala," 
Genesis6:2 batabani ba Katonda ne balaba bawala b'abantu nga babalagavu, ne beefunira mu bo abakazi okuva mu bonna be baalondanga." 
Genesis6:3 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Omwoyo gwange tegulisigala mu muntu mirembe gyonna, kubanga mubiri bubiri; ennaku ze ziriba myaka kikumi mu abiri.”" 
Genesis6:4 Mu biseera ebyo, era ne mu biseera ebyaddirira batabani ba Katonda okwewasiza bawala b'abantu ne babazaalira abaana, ku nsi kwaliko Banefili; be baabo abantu abazira abatutumufu ab'emirembe egy'edda." 
Genesis6:5 Omukama yalaba ng'obwonoonefu bw'omuntu bungi mu nsi, nga na buli kirowoozo kya mutima gwe kyewunzikidde ku kibi kyokka obudde bwonna," 
Genesis6:6 Omukama ne yeenenya olw'okukola omuntu mu nsi, n'anyolwa mu mutima," 
Genesis6:7 n'agamba nti: “Nzija kuzikiriza omuntu gwe natonda, mmusaanyewo ku nsi, ye n'ebisolo, n'ebyewalula, ssaako ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga; kubanga nnyoleddwa okulaba nga nabikola.”" 
Genesis6:8 Naye Nowa yasanga ekisa mu maaso g'Omukama. 
Genesis6:9 Kino kye kifaayo kya Nowa: Nowa yali musajja mutuukirivu nga taliiko musango mu bantu b'omulembe gwe; yatambuliranga mu Katonda. 
Genesis6:10 Yazaala abaana basatu ab'obulenzi: Seemu, Kaamu ne Yafesi." 
Genesis6:11 Ensi yali nnyonoonefu mu maaso ga Katonda, nga yonna ejjudde obukambwe." 
Genesis6:12 Katonda yalaba ng'ensi eyonoonese, kubanga buli muntu ku nsi yali mwonoonefu mu neeyisa ye." 
Genesis6:13 Katonda n'agamba Nowa nti: “Nsazeewo, enkomerero ya buli muntu etuuse, kubanga ensi ejjudde obukambwe olw'abantu, nze nno ŋŋenda kubazikiriza wamu n'ensi." 
Genesis6:14 Weekolere ekyombo mu muti ogw'envumbo; mu kyombo ojja kukolamu ebisenge obisiige envumbo munda ne kungulu. 
Genesis6:15 Bw'oti bw'onookikola: obuwanvu bw'ekyombo bubeeere emikono ebikumi bisatu, obugazi, emikono amakumi ataano, ate obusimba bwakyo, emikono amakumi asatu." 
Genesis6:16 Ekyombo kikolere akasolya akasukkulumye ku kyo omukono gumu. Ojja kuteeka omulyango mu mbiriizi zaakyo era okikolemu ebitindiro bisatu: ekisooka ekya wansi, ekyokubiri eky'omu makkati n'ekyokusatu ekya waggulu." 
Genesis6:17 “Nze ŋŋenda okuleeta amazzi g'omujjuzi ku nsi, nzite buli kintu ekiramu wansi w'eggulu, buli kyonna ekiri ku nsi kijja kusaanawo." 
Genesis6:18 Nzija kukola endagaano naawe, ggwe ojja kuyingira ekyombo, ggwe ne batabani bo, ne mukazi wo, ne bakaabaana bo bayingire naawe." 
Genesis6:19 Ate ku buli kiramu kyonna okuva mu buli nsolo, oggyangako bibiri n'obiyingiza mu kyombo, biramire omwo naawe, ekisajja n'ekikazi." 
Genesis6:20 Ne ku buli kika kya nnyonyi, ne ku buli kika kya nsolo, ne ku buli kika kya kyewalula ku ttaka: bibiri ku buli kika biyingire eyo gy'oli, biryoke birame." 
Genesis6:21 Ate ggwe weetwalire ku buli kika kya mmere ekiriibwa, weeterekere; y'eriba emmere yo nabyo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nowa n'akolera ddala byonna nga Katonda bwe yali abimulagidde. 
Genesis7:1 Omukama n'agamba Nowa nti: “Yingira ekyombo ggwe n'ennyumba yo yonna; kubanga nkulabye ng'oli mutuukirivu mu maaso gange mu zzadde lino. 
Genesis7:2 Mu nsolo zonna ennongoofu ggyamu musanvu musanvu, ensajja n'enkazi yaayo, ate mu nsolo ezitali nnongoofu bbiri bbiri, ensajja n'enkazi yaayo." 
Genesis7:3 Era ne ku binyonyi eby'omu bbanga, musanvu musanvu, ekisajja n'ekikazi okubikuuma nga biramu ku nsi yonna." 
Genesis7:4 Kubanga wanaayita ennaku musanvu ndyoke ntonnyese enkuba ku nsi okumala ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana; nzija kusaanyaawo ku nsi buli kyonna kye nakola.” 
Genesis7:5 Nowa n'akola byonna Omukama bye yali amulagidde. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa yali wa myaka lukaaga omujjuzi gw'amataba we gwabeererawo ku nsi. 
Genesis7:7 Nowa n'ayingira mu kyombo ne batabani be ne mukazi we ne bakaabatabani be nga bali naye, badduke omujjuzi." 
Genesis7:8 Ku bisolo ebirongoofu n'ebitali birongoofu ne ku binyonyi, ne ku buli kyewalula ku ttaka," 
Genesis7:9 bibiri bibiri ne biyingira eri Nowa mu kyombo, ekisajja n'ekikazi nga Katonda bwe yali alagidde Nowa." 
Genesis7:10 Ennaku omusanvu bwe zaayitawo, amazzi g'omujjuzi ne gajja ku nsi." 
Genesis7:11 Mu mwaka ogw'olukaaga ogw'obulamu bwa Nowa mu mwezi ogwokubiri, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'omusanvu olw'omwezi, ensulo zonna ez'eddubi ne zifumbukula, n'ebiyiriro by'eggulu ne bigguka;" 
Genesis7:12 enkuba n'eyiika ku nsi ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana. 
Genesis7:13 Ku lunaku olwo lwennyini Nowa n'ayingira mu kyombo ne Seemu, Kaamu, ne Yafesi batabani be, ko mukazi we ne bakaabatabani be abasatu." 
Genesis7:14 Bo na buli nsolo ya ttale mu luse lwayo, na buli nsolo ya waka mu luse lwayo, na buli kyewalula ku ttaka mu luse lwakyo, ebinyonyi byonna buli kimu mu luse lwakyo, ebyo byonna ebibuuka," 
Genesis7:15 byayingira eri Nowa bibiri bibiri, okuva mu buli kitonde ekirina obulamu." 
Genesis7:16 Ebyayingira, byali ekisajja n'ekikazi okuva mu buli kitonde nga Katonda bwe yali amulagidde. Awo Katonda n'amuggaliramu." 
Genesis7:17 Omujjuzi gwali ku nsi okumala ennaku amakumi ana, amazzi ne geeyongera obungi ne gasitula ekyombo ne kisituka ku ttaka." 
Genesis7:18 Amazzi ne galinnya, ne geeyongera nnyo obungi ku nsi ekyombo ne kiseeyeeyera ku mazzi." 
Genesis7:19 Amazzi ne galinnya nnyo ku nsi: ensozi zonna empanvu wansi w'eggulu wonna ne zibikkibwa. 
Genesis7:20 Amazzi ne gatumbiira emikono kkumi n'etaano ku ntikko z'ensozi ze gaabikka. 
Genesis7:21 Ebiramu byonna ne bisaanawo ebitambulira ku nsi: ebinyonyi, ebisolo eby'awaka, n'ebisolo byonna eby'ettale n'ebitonde byonna ebibunye ku nsi, n'abantu bonna." 
Genesis7:22 Buli kiramu kyonna ekissiza mu nnyindo, byonna ebyali ku lukalu, byafa." 
Genesis7:23 Yasaanyawo buli kitonde ku nsi, okuva ku muntu okutuuka ku magana ne ku byewalula n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga; n'abimalirawo ddala ku nsi. Naye Nowa ye yasigala, n'abaali naye mu kyombo." 
Genesis7:24 Amazzi ne gaalaala ku nsi okumala ennaku kikumi mu ataano. 
Genesis8:1 Awo Katonda n'ajjukira Nowa na buli kisolo eky'ettale n'ebisolo eby'awaka ebyali naye mu kyombo, Katonda n'aleeta empewo ku nsi amazzi ne gakendeera." 
Genesis8:2 Ensulo ez'eddubi n'ebiyiriro eby'eggulu ne biggalira, n'enkuba n'eziyizibwa okuva mu ggulu." 
Genesis8:3 Amazzi ne gaddirira, ne gagenda nga gakendeera. Ku nkomerero y'ennaku ekikumi mu ataano ne gatandika okukalira." 
Genesis8:4 Mu mwezi ogwomusanvu nga gwakamala ennaku kkumi na musanvu ekyombo ne kituula ku nsozi Ararati. 
Genesis8:5 Amazzi gaagendanga gakendeera okutuusa ku mwezi ogw'ekkumi; ku mwezi ogw'ekkumi, ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi, entikko z'ensozi ne zirabika." 
Genesis8:6 Bwe waayitawo ennaku amakumi ana, Nowa n'aggulawo eddirisa lye yali akoze mu kyombo," 
Genesis8:7 n'asindika nnamuŋŋoona; yagiranga n'afuluma n'adda, okutuusa amazzi ku nsi lwe gaakalira." 
Genesis8:8 N'asindika n'ejjiba alabe oba amazzi gakendedde ku nsi. 
Genesis8:9 Naye ejjiba teryazuula kifo we lisobola kugwa, ne likomawo gy'ali mu kyombo kubanga amazzi gaali gakyali wonna ku nsi. N'alikunuukiriza, n'alikwata, n'aliyingiza gy'ali mu kyombo." 
Genesis8:10 N'alindirirayo ennaku endala musanvu n'addamu okusindika ejjiba, nga liva mu kyombo." 
Genesis8:11 Ne likomawo gy'ali akawungeezi, mu kamwa kaalyo nga mulimu akatabi akabisi aka oliva. Nowa bw'atyo n'amanya nti amazzi gakendedde ku nsi." 
Genesis8:12 Sso era n'alindirirako ennaku endala musanvu; n'asindika ejjiba, naye siryaddamu kudda gye yali." 
Genesis8:13 Bwe kityo, mu mwaka ogw'olukaaga mu ogumu, mu mwezi ogusooka, ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi, amazzi ne gakalira ku nsi; Nowa n'aggulawo ekisaanikira ku kyombo, n'alaba nga ku nsi wonna wakalu." 
Genesis8:14 Mu mwezi ogwokubiri, ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu omusanvu, ensi n'ekalira ddala." 
Genesis8:15 Katonda n'agamba Nowa nti: 
Genesis8:16 “Fuluma ekyombo ggwe ne mukazi wo ne batabani bo ne bakaabaana bo. 
Genesis8:17 Ebiramu byonna ebiri naawe ku buli kitonde: ebinyonyi, ebisolo, na buli kyewalula ku ttaka, bifulumye wamu naawe, bibune ku nsi bizaale, byale ku nsi.”" 
Genesis8:18 Nowa n'afuluma ne batabani be, ne mukazi we ne bakaabaana be." 
Genesis8:19 Ebisolo byonna, n'ebyewalula, ebinyonyi byonna, n'ebitambula ku nsi, buli kimu mu kika kyakyo, ne bifuluma ekyombo." 
Genesis8:20 Nowa n'azimbira Omukama omwaliiro, n'addira ku buli kisolo kirongoofu, ne ku buli kinyonyi kirongoofu, n'atambira ekitambiro ekyokye ku mwaliiro." 
Genesis8:21 Omukama n'awunyirwa akawoowo akasanyusa. Omukama n'agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Sikyaddayo n'akatono kuvumirira ttaka olw'okubeera omuntu, kubanga endowooza y'omutima gw'omuntu okuva mu buvubuka bwe yeewunzikira ku kibi. Awo nno sikyaddamu kuzikiriza buli kiramu kyonna, nga bwe nkoze." 
Genesis8:22 “Ensi ng'ekyaliwo, okusiga n'okukungula, empewo n'ebbugumu, ekyeya n'obutiti, emisana n'ekiro tebiibulirengawo ddala.”" 
Genesis9:1 Katonda n'awa Nowa ne batabani be omukisa, n'ayogera gye bali nti: “Mwale, mweyongere, mujjuze ensi." 
Genesis9:2 Mujja kukuba entiisa mukankanye ebisolo byonna eby'oku nsi n'ebinyonyi byonna eby'omu bbanga, byonna ebitambula ku lukalu n'ebyennyanja byonna mu nnyanja; byonna biweereddwa mu mikono gyammwe." 
Genesis9:3 Buli ekitambula ekiramu y'eriba emmere yammwe, kye kimu ne ku bimera, byonna mbibawadde." 
Genesis9:4 Kyokka temulyanga ennyama erimu obulamu, kwe kugamba nti erimu omusaayi." 
Genesis9:5 Nzija kusabanga munyinnyonnyole ensonga olw'omusaayi gwammwe. Nzija kukisabanga ne ku buli nsolo. Buli muntu nzija kumubanjanga obulamu bwa muntu munne. 
Genesis9:6 “Buli yenna aliyiwa omusaayi gw'omuntu, n'ogugwe omuntu aliguyiwa; kubanga omuntu Katonda yamukola mu kifaananyi kye." 
Genesis9:7 Nammwe mwale, mweyongere obungi, mubune ku nsi, mweyongere ku yo.”" 
Genesis9:8 Katonda n'agamba Nowa ne batabani be abaali naye nti: 
Genesis9:9 “Kati ŋŋenda okukola endagaano yange nammwe, n'ezzadde lyammwe eriribaddirira" 
Genesis9:10 na buli kiramu kyonna ekiri nammwe: ebinyonyi, ebisolo by'awaka n'ebisolo byonna eby'oku nsi. Na buli kiramu kyonna ekifulumye mu kyombo, ne buli kiramu kyonna eky'ensi." 
Genesis9:11 Nzija kukola endagaano nammwe; ekiramu kyonna tekigenda kuddayo kusalwako mazzi ga mujjuzi, era teriddayo kubaawo mujjuzi gulisaanyaawo nsi.”" 
Genesis9:12 Era Katonda n'agamba nti: “Kano ke kabonero k'endagaano ey'olubeerera gye nkoze nammwe n'ebitonde byonna ebiri nammwe. 
Genesis9:13 Ŋŋenda kussa musoke wange mu bire y'aliba akabonero k'endagaano gye nkoze n'ensi. 
Genesis9:14 Bwe nnaaleetanga ebire ku nsi, musoke n'alabika mu bire," 
Genesis9:15 nnajjukiranga endagaano yange nammwe na buli kiramu kyonna; tewalibeerawo mazzi ga mujjuzi mulundi mulala okuzikiriza buli kiramu. 
Genesis9:16 Musoke bw'aliba mu bire, ndimulaba ne nzijukira endagaano ey'olubeerera, wakati wa Katonda na buli kiramu kyonna ekya buli kika ekiri ku nsi.”" 
Genesis9:17 Katonda n'agamba Nowa nti: “Kano ke kabonero k'endagaano gye nkoze wakati wange na buli kiramu kyonna ku nsi.” 
Genesis9:18 Batabani ba Nowa abaava naye mu kyombo be bano: Seemu, Kaamu ne Yafesi. Kaamu ono ye kitaawe wa Kanaani." 
Genesis9:19 Abasatu abo be batabani ba Nowa, mu abo mwe mwava abantu abali ku nsi yonna." 
Genesis9:20 Nowa, eyali omulimi, n'asooka okusimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu;" 
Genesis9:21 bwe yanywa ku vviini, n'atamiira, ne yeebaka mu weema ye nga teyeebisseeko." 
Genesis9:22 Kaamu kitaawe wa Kanaani bwe yalaba obwereere bwa kitaabwe, n'agenda, n'abuulira baganda be ababiri abaali ebweru." 
Genesis9:23 Bo Seemu ne Yafesi ne baddira olugoye, ne balussa ku bibegabega byabwe bombi, ne bajja kyennyumannyuma ne babikka ku kitaabwe, amaaso gaabwe nga bagatunuulizza eri, tebaalaba bwereere bwa kitaabwe." 
Genesis9:24 Nowa evviini bwe yamwamukako, n'amanya mutabani we asingayo obuto kye yali amukoze," 
Genesis9:25 n'agamba nti: “Kanaani avumiriddwa. Ku baganda be y'anaabanga omuddu asembayo.” 
Genesis9:26 Ate n'agamba nti: “Omukama agulumizibwe, Katonda wa Seemu, Kanaani abeere muddu we." 
Genesis9:27 Katonda agaziye Yafesi; asulenga mu weema za Seemu, ne Kanaani naye abeerenga muddu we.”" 
Genesis9:28 Omujjuzi bwe gwaggwa, Nowa n'awangaalayo emyaka emirala bikumi bisatu mu ataano." 
Genesis9:29 Ebbanga lyonna lye yamala ku nsi ne giba emyaka lwenda mu ataano, n'afa." 
Genesis10:1 Gano ge mazadde ga batabani ba Nowa, Seemu, Kaamu ne Yafesi: omujjuzi bwe gwaggwa baazaala batabani baabwe." 
Genesis10:2 Batabani ba Yafesi: Gomeri, Magogi, Madayi, Yavani, Tubali, Meseki ne Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Batabani ba Gomeri: Asukenazi, Rifati ne Togaruma." 
Genesis10:4 Batabani ba Yavani: Elisa, Tarusisi, Abakittimu n'Abadodani." 
Genesis10:5 Abantu b'oku nnyanja ne basaasaana mu bizinga okuva mu ndyo zino, buli omu n'olulimi lwe okusinziira ku bika byabwe ne mu mawanga gaabwe." 
Genesis10:6 Batabani ba Kaamu: Kuusi, Mizurayimu, Puti ne Kanaani." 
Genesis10:7 Batabani ba Kuusi: Seba, Kavila, Sabuta, Raama ne Sabuteka. Batabani ba Raama: Saba ne Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kuusi yazaala Nimurodi; eyafuuka omuzira owa maanyi mu nsi. 
Genesis10:9 Yali muyizzi wa maanyi mu maaso g'Omukama. We waava enjogera nti: “Nga Nimurodi omuyizzi ow'amaanyi mu maaso g'Omukama.” 
Genesis10:10 Ebitebe ebikulu eby'obwakabaka bwe byalinga Babeli, Ereki, Akkadi ne Kalune mu nsi y'e Sinari." 
Genesis10:11 Mu nsi eyo mwe mwasibuka Assuri n'azimba Nineve ne Rekoboti-Yiri ne Kola," 
Genesis10:12 ssaako Reseni mu makkati ga Nineve ne Kola; kino kibuga kinene. 
Genesis10:13 Mizurayimu yazaala Abaludi, Abaanami, Abalewabi, Abanafutuki," 
Genesis10:14 Abapaturusi, Abakasuluki (omwava Abafilisitiini) n'Abakafutori." 
Genesis10:15 Kanaani yazaala Sidoni, omuggulanda we, Keti," 
Genesis10:16 Abayebusi, Abaamori, Abagirugasi," 
Genesis10:17 Abakivi, Abaaruki, Abasini," 
Genesis10:18 Abaaruvadi, Abazemari n'Abakamati. Oluvannyuma, ebika by'Abakanaani ne bisaasaana." 
Genesis10:19 Ensalo z'Abakanaani zaavanga ku Sidoni, Gerari ne zeeyongerayo e Gaza ne zituuka e Sodoma n'e Gomorra ne Aduma ne Zeboyimu okutuuka e Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Be bo batabani ba Kaamu, mu ndyo, mu nnimi, mu nsi ne mu mawanga gaabwe." 
Genesis10:21 Seemu, muganda wa Yafesi omukulu, naye n'azaala omulenzi nga ye jjajja w'abazzukulu ba Eberi bonna." 
Genesis10:22 Batabani ba Seemu: Elamu, Assuri, Arupakusadi, Ludi ne Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Batabani ba Aramu: Wuzi, Kuli, Geteri ne Masi." 
Genesis10:24 Arupakusadi yazaala Sela, Sela n'azaala Eberi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberi yazaalirwa abaana ab'obulenzi babiri: omu ng'ayitibwa Pelegi kubanga mu budde bwe ensi we yagabanyizibwamu ebitundu; ne muganda we erinnya lye Yokutani. 
Genesis10:26 Yokutani yazaala Alumodadi, Selefu, Kazarumaveti, Yera," 
Genesis10:27 Adoramu, Wuzari, Dikula," 
Genesis10:28 Obali, Abimayeli, Saba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Kavila ne Yobabu. Bonna abo baana ba Yokutani." 
Genesis10:30 Baabeeranga mu kitundu okuva e Mesa, okutuuka e Sefari mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'ebuvanjuba." 
Genesis10:31 Bano be batabani ba Seemu ng'ogoberedde endyo zaabwe, n'ennimi zaabwe mu nsi zaabwe ne mu mawanga gaabwe." 
Genesis10:32 Gano ge mazadde g'abazzukulu ba Nowa mu mazadde gaabwe n'amawanga gaabwe. Mu bo mwe mwasibuka amawanga amalala ku nsi ng'omujjuzi guwedde. 
Genesis11:1 Ensi yonna yalina olulimi lumu n'ebigambo nga bye bimu. 
Genesis11:2 Bwe baali bava ebuvanjuba, ne basanga omuseetwe mu nsi y'e Sinari, ne basenga omwo." 
Genesis11:3 Ne bagambagana nti: “Abange, mugire tubumbe amataffaali tugookye n'omuliro.” Mu kifo ky'amayinja baddira mataffaali, ate mu kifo ky'obudongo beeyamba bbumba." 
Genesis11:4 Ne bagamba nti: “Abange, mujje twezimbire ekibuga n'omunaala entikko yaagwo ng'ekwata ku ggulu, twekolere tutyo erinnya tuleme kusaasaana mu nsi yonna.”" 
Genesis11:5 Awo Omukama n'aserengeta alabe ekibuga n'omunaala batabani b'abantu bye baali bazimba. 
Genesis11:6 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Baabano bakyali ggwanga limu n'olulimi balina lumu; eno ekyali ntandikwa yokka ey'ebyo bye banaakola; oluvannyuma tebajja kuzibuwalirwa kukola kyonna kye baliba baagadde. 
Genesis11:7 Abange, mujje tuserengeteyo olulimi lwabwe tulutabuletabule, buli omu aleme kutegeera lulimi lwa munne.”" 
Genesis11:8 Okuva awo Omukama n'abasaasaanya ku nsi yonna, ne balekera awo okuzimba ekibuga." 
Genesis11:9 Ekifo ekyo kyekyava kiyitibwa Babeli, kubanga awo Omukama we yatabulatabulira olulimi lw'ensi yonna. Wano Omukama we yabasaasaanyiza ku nsi yonna." 
Genesis11:10 Gano ge mazadde ga Seemu: Seemu yali aweza emyaka kikumi n'azaala Arupakusadi nga waakayita emyaka ebiri okuva ku mujjuzi. 
Genesis11:11 Seemu bwe yamala okuzaala Arupakusadi, yawangaalayo emyaka ebikumi bitaano; yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala." 
Genesis11:12 Arupakusadi yali aweza emyaka asatu mu etaano n'azaala Sela. 
Genesis11:13 Arupakusadi bwe yamala okuzaala Sela, yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bina mu esatu; yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala." 
Genesis11:14 Sela yali aweza emyaka asatu n'azaala Eberi. 
Genesis11:15 Sela bwe yamala okuzaala Eberi yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bina mu esatu; yaazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. 
Genesis11:16 Eberi yali aweza emyaka amakumi asatu mu ena n'azaala Pelegi. 
Genesis11:17 Eberi bwe yamala okuzaala Pelegi yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bina mu asatu; yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi yali aweza emyaka amakumi asatu n'azaala Rewu. 
Genesis11:19 Pelegi bwe yamala okuzaala Rewu, yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bibiri mu mwenda; yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala." 
Genesis11:20 Rewu yali aweza emyaka amakumi asatu mu ebiri n'azaala Serugi. 
Genesis11:21 Rewu bwe yamala okuzaala Serugi yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bibiri mu musanvu; yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. 
Genesis11:22 Serugi yali aweza emyaka amakumi asatu n'azaala Nakori. 
Genesis11:23 Serugi bwe yamala okuzaala Nakori yawangaalayo emyaka emirala ebikumi bibiri; yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. 
Genesis11:24 Nakori yali aweza emyaka abiri mu mwenda n'azaala Tera. 
Genesis11:25 Nakori bwe yamala okuzaala Tera yawangaalayo emyaka emirala kikumi mu kkumi na mwenda; yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. 
Genesis11:26 Tera yali aweza emyaka nsanvu n'azaala Aburaamu, Nakori ne Arani." 
Genesis11:27 Gano ge mazadde ga Tera: Tera yazaala Aburaamu, Nakori ne Arani. Ye Arani yazaala Loti;" 
Genesis11:28 Arani ye yasooka kitaawe Tera okufa. Yafiira mu nsi y'obuzaale bwabwe mu Wuru eky'Abakaludeya. 
Genesis11:29 Aburaamu ne Nakori baawasa abakazi; muka Aburaamu nga ye Sarayi, ate muka Nakori nga ye Miluka, muwala wa Arani. Arani ye yali kitaabwe wa Miluka ne Yisuka." 
Genesis11:30 Naye Sarayi yali mugumba, teyalina mwana." 
Genesis11:31 Tera n'addira Aburaamu mutabani we ne muzukkulu we Loti mutabani wa Arani, ne Sarayi muka mutabani we Aburaamu, ne bava bonna mu Wuru eky'Abakaludeya, bajje mu nsi y'e Kanaani. Bwe baatuuka e Karani, ne basenga eyo." 
Genesis11:32 Tera eyo n'awerezaayo emyaka ebikumi bibiri mu etaano n'afiira mu Karani. 
Genesis12:1 Katonda n'agamba Aburaamu nti: “Leka ensi yo, eŋŋanda zo n'ab'ennyumba ya kitaawo ogende mu nsi gye ndikulaga." 
Genesis12:2 Ndikukolamu eggwanga eddene era ndikuwa omukisa, ndyatiikiriza erinnya lyo, naawe olibeeranga mukisa." 
Genesis12:3 “Abakuwa omukisa ndibawa omukisa, abakuvumirira ndibavumirira; ate mu ggwe amawanga gonna ag'ensi galiweebwa omukisa.”" 
Genesis12:4 Awo Aburaamu n'avaayo ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde, ne Loti n'agenda naye. Aburaamu yali wa myaka nsanvu mu etaano we yaviira mu Karani." 
Genesis12:5 N'atwala mukazi we Sarayi ne Loti mutabani wa muganda we n'ebintu byabwe byonna bye baali bafunye e Karani, ne basitula bagende mu nsi y'e Kanaani, ne batuuka mu nsi y'e Kanaani." 
Genesis12:6 Aburaamu n'ayita mu nsi okutuuka mu kifo ky'e Sekemu, ku muvule omunene ogw'e More. Olwo Abakanaani be baalinga mu nsi." 
Genesis12:7 Omukama n'alabikira Aburaamu n'amugamba nti: “Ezzadde lyo ndiriwa ensi eno.” N'azimbira eyo Omukama eyamulabikira omwaliiro. 
Genesis12:8 N'ava eyo n'ayolekera ensozi n'agenda ebugwanjuba wa Beteli n'asimba eyo weema ye, Beteli ng'amuli bugwanjuba ate Ayi buvanjuba; era eyo n'azimbirayo Omukama omwaliiro, n'akoowoola erinnya ly'Omukama." 
Genesis12:9 Aburaamu n'asitula, n'agenda ng'atambula ng'ayolekedde Negevu." 
Genesis12:10 Olwatuuka, enjala n'egwa mu nsi. Aburaamu n'aserengeta mu Misiri, abeere eyo, kubanga enjala yali eyinze mu nsi." 
Genesis12:11 Yali anaatera okuyingira mu Misiri, n'agamba Sarayi mukazi we nti: “Mmanyi ng'oli mukazi mulungi mu ndabika;" 
Genesis12:12 Abamisiri bwe banaakulaba bajja kugamba nti: ‘Ono mukazi we.’ Olwo nze bajja kunzita ggwe bakulekewo. 
Genesis12:13 Kale nno, nkwegayiridde, ogamba nti oli mwannyinaze. Nze biŋŋendere bulungi olw'okubeera ggwe, obulamu bwange buwone olw'okubeera ggwe.”" 
Genesis12:14 Aburaamu bwe yatuuka mu Misiri, Abamisiri ne balaba omukazi nga mulungi nnyo." 
Genesis12:15 Abaami ba Faraawo bwe baalaba omukazi, ne bamumutendera; omukazi n'atwalibwa mu nnyumba ya Faraawo." 
Genesis12:16 Aburaamu n'ayisibwa bulungi olw'okubeera ye; n'afuna endiga, ente, abaddu n'abazaana, endogoyi ensajja n'enkazi, n'eŋŋamiya." 
Genesis12:17 Naye Omukama n'abonereza Faraawo n'ennyumba ye n'ebibonerezo eby'amaanyi olw'okubeera Sarayi muka Aburaamu. 
Genesis12:18 Faraawo n'ayita Aburaamu n'amugamba nti: “Kiki kino ky'onkoze? Lwaki tewantegeeza nti mukazi wo? 
Genesis12:19 Lwaki waŋŋamba nti: ‘Ono mwannyinaze?’ Nze namutwala ne mmufuula mukazi wange. Kale nno, mukazi wo wuuyo: mutwale, ogende.”" 
Genesis12:20 Faraawo n'alagira basajja be, ne bamuwereekereza, ko ne mukyala we n'ebibye byonna bye yalina." 
Genesis13:1 Aburaamu n'ayambuka okuva mu Misiri, ye yennyini ne mukazi we na byonna bye yalina, nga ne Loti ali naye, n'alaga e Negevu." 
Genesis13:2 Aburaamu yali mugagga nnyo, ng'alina ebisolo by'awaka, ffeeza ne zaabu." 
Genesis13:3 Yagendanga, ava wano adda wali, okuva e Negevu okutuuka mu kifo awaali eweema ye mu kusooka wakati wa Beteli ne Ayi," 
Genesis13:4 mu kifo awaali omwaliiro gwe yali asoose okukola; n'akoowoolera awo erinnya ly'Omukama. 
Genesis13:5 Ne Loti yennyini eyagendanga ne Aburaamu yalina endiga, ente, ebisolo by'awaka ne weema," 
Genesis13:6 naye ng'ekitundu tekibamala kubeeramu bombi. Ebintu byabwe byali bingi, nga tebasobola bulungi kubeeramu wamu." 
Genesis13:7 Olumu oluyombo lwabalukawo wakati w'abalunzi b'amagana ga Aburaamu n'abalunzi b'amagana ga Loti. Mu budde obwo Abakanaani n'Abaperizzi nga be babeera mu kitundu ekyo. 
Genesis13:8 Aburaamu kwe kugamba Loti nti: “Wattu nze naawe tuleme kuyomba, wadde abalunzi bange okuyomba n'abalunzi bo; anti tuli ba luganda." 
Genesis13:9 Ensi yonna tekuli awo mu maaso go? Twawukane: bw'onoolaga ku kkono, nze nnaakwata ddyo; ggwe bw'onoolondawo ogwa ddyo, nze nnaalaga ku gwa kkono.”" 
Genesis13:10 Loti bwe yayimusa amaaso n'alaba omuseetwe gwonna ogwa Yorudani, gwonna nga gufukiriddwa, nga guli ng'ennimiro y'Omukama, nga bw'olaba Misiri ng'ogenda e Zowari. Olwo Omukama yali tannazikiriza Sodoma ne Gomorra." 
Genesis13:11 Loti ne yeeronderawo omuseetwe ogwo gwonna ogw'oku Yorudani, n'asengukira ebuvanjuba. Ab'oluganda ne baawukana." 
Genesis13:12 Aburaamu n'abeera mu nsi Kanaani; ye Loti n'asenga mu bibuga by'omu museetwe gwa Yorudani, n'asimba weema kumpi ne Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Abantu b'e Sodoma baali babi, nga boonoonyi nnyo mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Genesis13:14 Loti bwe yamala okwawukana ne Aburaamu, Omukama n'agamba Aburaamu nti: “Yimusa amaaso go, sinziira wano w'oli, laba okuva wano w'oli otunule emambuka n'emaserengeta, ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba." 
Genesis13:15 Ensi eyo yonna gy'olaba nzija kugikuwa n'ezzadde lyo emirembe gyonna. 
Genesis13:16 Ezzadde lyo nzija kulyenkanya enfuufu y'ettaka: oba waliwo asobola okubala enfuufu y'ettaka, oyo y'alibala n'ezzadde lyo." 
Genesis13:17 Situka oyiteeyite mu nsi mu busimba ne mu bukiika kubanga ŋŋenda kugikuwa.” 
Genesis13:18 Awo Aburaamu n'asitula weema n'agenda n'asenga kumpi n'omuvule omunene ogwa Mamure ow'e Keburoni, eyo n'azimbirayo Omukama omwaliiro." 
Genesis14:1 Mu mirembe gya Amurafeli kabaka w'e Sinari, Ariyoki kabaka we Ellasari, Kedorulawomeri kabaka we Elamu, ne Tidali kabaka w'e Goyimu" 
Genesis14:2 baggulawo olutalo ku Bera kabaka w'e Sodoma, Birusa kabaka we Gomorra, Sinabu kabaka w'e Aduma, Semeberi kabaka we Zeboyimu, ssaako kabaka w'e Bela, kwe kugamba Zowari." 
Genesis14:3 Bonna abo abasembyeyo beekuŋŋaanya mu kiwonvu Siddimu, kati awali Ennyanja y'Omunnyo." 
Genesis14:4 Baali bamaze emyaka kkumi n'ebiri nga baweereza Kedorulawomeri, naye mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'esatu ne bajeema." 
Genesis14:5 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ena Kedorulawomeri ne bakabaka abaali naye ne batta Abarefayi mu Asuteroti Karunayimu, n'Abazuzi mu Amu, n'Abeemi mu museetwe gw'e Save Kiriyatayimu," 
Genesis14:6 n'Abaakori mu nsozi zaabwe Seyiri; ne babagoba ne babatuusiza ddala e Eli-Parani ku nsalo y'eddungu. 
Genesis14:7 Ne bakomawo ne bajja e Eni-Misupati, kwe kugamba e Kadesi. Ne bawangula ekitundu kyonna eky'Abaamaleki, gattako Abaamori, ab'omu Kazazoni-Tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Kabaka w'e Sodoma ne kabaka w'e Gomorra, ne kabaka we Aduma, ne kabaka w'e Zeboyimu, ssaako ne kabaka w'e Bela, ye Zowari, ne bavaayo, ne bataza eggye mu kiwonvu Siddimu" 
Genesis14:9 okulwanyisa Kedorulawomeri kabaka wa Elamu ne Tidali kabaka wa Goyimu ne Amurafeli kabaka w'e Sinari ne Ariyoki kabaka wa Ellasari; bakabaka bana nga balwanyisa bakabaka bataano. 
Genesis14:10 Ekiwonvu Siddimu kyalimu ebirombe bingi eby'ebbumba. Kabaka w'e Sodoma ne Gomorra ne badduka, ne bagwa omwo; abaali basigaddewo ne baddukira ku lusozi." 
Genesis14:11 Abawanguzi ne batwala byonna eby'e Sodoma ne Gomorra n'emmere yaabwe yonna, ne bagenda." 
Genesis14:12 Baawamba ne Loti, oyo mutabani wa muganda wa Aburaamu eyabeeranga e Sodoma, n'ebibye byonna, ne bagenda." 
Genesis14:13 Kaawonawo omu n'ajja, n'abuulira Aburaamu Omwebureeyi eyali abeera ku muvule omunene ogwa Mamure Omwamori, muganda wa Esukoli, era muganda wa Aneri; kubanga bano baali ba mukago ne Aburaamu." 
Genesis14:14 Aburaamu bwe yawulira nti Loti muganda we muwambe, n'ayungula abasajja be abatendeke n'ennyumba ye awamu ebikumi bisatu mu kkumi na munaana, n'awondera okutuuka e Daani." 
Genesis14:15 Ekiro ekyo basajja be n'abaawuzaamu balumbe. Abalabe n'abakuba, n'abawondera okutuuka e Koba, mu mambuka ga Damasiko;" 
Genesis14:16 n'akomyawo ebintu byonna, Loti muganda we, ebibye, abakazi n'abantu abalala." 
Genesis14:17 Aburaamu bwe yakomawo ng'amaze okuwangula Kedorulawomeri ne bakabaka abaali naye, kabaka w'e Sodoma n'ajja okumusisinkana mu kiwonvu ky'e Save, ekitegeeza Ekiwonvu kya Kabaka." 
Genesis14:18 Melekisedeki kabaka w'e Saalemu n'aggyayo omugaati n'evviini; yali kabona wa Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala. 
Genesis14:19 N'amuwa omukisa n'agamba nti: “Aburaamu aweebwe omukisa Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala Omutonzi w'eggulu n'ensi. 
Genesis14:20 Ne Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala atenderezebwe eyawaddeyo mu mikono gyo abalabe bo.” Aburaamu n'amuwa ekyekkumi ku byonna. 
Genesis14:21 Kabaka w'e Sodoma n'agamba Aburaamu nti: “Mpa abantu; ebintu weetwalire.” 
Genesis14:22 Naye Aburaamu n'ayanukula kabaka w'e Sodoma nti: “Ngoloredde omukono gwange eri Omukama Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala, Omutonzi w'eggulu n'ensi," 
Genesis14:23 siitwale kantu ku bibyo, wadde wuzi eti oba olukoba lw'engatto, oleme kugamba nti: ‘Nze nagaggawaza Aburaamu.’" 
Genesis14:24 Nze sijja kufuna kantu okuggyako ebyo abalenzi bye baalya, n'omugabo gw'abasajja abajja nange: Aneri, Esukoli ne Mamure. Abo bo bafune omugabo gwabwe.”" 
Genesis15:1 Oluvannyuma, Omukama n'alabikira Aburaamu n'amugamba nti: “Aburaamu, leka kutya. Nze ngabo yo, n'empeera yo eriba nnene nnyo.”" 
Genesis15:2 Aburaamu n'agamba nti: “Mukama Katonda, olimpa ki? Wuuno ŋŋenda nga sirese mwana, n'omusika w'ennyumba yange ye Eliyezeri ow'e Damasiko.”" 
Genesis15:3 Aburaamu n'ayongerako nti: “Wuuno tompadde zzadde, bw'atyo musajja wange y'anaaba omusika wange.”" 
Genesis15:4 Naye ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kimujjira nti: “Oyo si y'anaakusikira, wabula gwe weezaalidde yennyini ye w'okukusikira.”" 
Genesis15:5 Era n'amufulumya ebweru n'amugamba nti: “Tunuulira eggulu; kale bala emmunyeenye oba osobola.” N'amugamba nti: “Ezzadde lyo bwe liriba lityo.” 
Genesis15:6 Yakkiriza Omukama; Omukama n'akimubalira ng'obutuukirivu. 
Genesis15:7 Era Omukama n'agamba Aburaamu nti: “Nze Mukama eyakuggya mu Wuru eky'Abakaludeya nkuwe ensi eno ebeere yiyo.” 
Genesis15:8 Ye n'agamba nti: “Mukama Omuyinza, nnaamanyira ku ki nga nzija kugifuna?”" 
Genesis15:9 Omukama mu kwanukula n'agamba nti: “Nfunira ennyana ey'emyaka esatu, n'embuzi enduusi ey'emyaka esatu, n'endiga ennume ey'emyaka esatu, n'ejjiba n'enjiibwa.”" 
Genesis15:10 Ebyo byonna n'abimuleetera, n'abisalamu wabiri wabiri, n'abissaawo nga buli kiwayi kitunuulidde kinne waakyo; byo ebinyonyi teyabibajjulamu." 
Genesis15:11 Ennyonyi enkwakkuzi zakkanga ku nnyama, naye Aburaamu n'azigoba." 
Genesis15:12 Enjuba bwe yali egwa, Aburaamu otulo otungi ne tumukwata, enzikiza ekutte ey'entiisa n'emujjira." 
Genesis15:13 Ne wabaawo ayogera gy'ali nti: “Tegeerera ddala nti ezzadde lyo liribeera mu nsi eteri yaabwe, balibafuula baddu, balibabonyaabonya okumala emyaka ebikumi bina." 
Genesis15:14 Kyokka eggwanga lye baliweereza mu buddu nze ndirisalira omusango; oluvannyuma balivaayo nga balina ebintu bingi. 
Genesis15:15 Kyokka ggwe oligenda mu ddembe eri bajjajjaabo, n'oziikibwa ng'owangadde bulungi." 
Genesis15:16 Mu zzadde eryokuna lwe balikomawo wano; anti n'okutuusa kati obwonoonefu bw'Abaamori buliba tebunafundikira.” 
Genesis15:17 Enjuba bwe yagwa, obudde ne bukwatira ddala; awo ne wabaawo ekkoomi erinyooka n'ekitawuliro ky'omuliro ekibumbujja nga kiyita wakati w'ebiwayi." 
Genesis15:18 Ku olwo Omukama yakuba endagaano ne Aburaamu ng'agamba nti: “Ezzadde lyo ndiwa ensi eno okuva ku mugga gw'e Misiri okutuuka ku mugga omunene Furaati," 
Genesis15:19 Abakeni, Abakenizzi, Abakadumoni," 
Genesis15:20 Abakitti, Abaperizzi, ssaako Abarefayi," 
Genesis15:21 Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abagirugasi n'Abayebusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Sarayi mukazi wa Aburaamu yali tamuzaalidde baana, naye yalina omuzaana we Omumisiri erinnya lye Agari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarayi n'agamba bba nti: “Wuuno Omukama annyimye okuzaala; genda eri omuzaana wange, oboolyawo mu oyo mwe nnaafunira abaana.” Aburaamu n'akkiriza Sarayi kye yali amusabye." 
Genesis16:3 Sarayi yaddira Agari Omumisiri, omuzaana we, n'amuwa bba abeere mukazi we. Waali waakayita emyaka kkumi bukya Aburaamu asenga mu Kanaani." 
Genesis16:4 Aburaamu n'agenda gy'ali, Agari n'afuna olubuto. Bwe yamanya ng'ali lubuto, n'anyooma mugole we." 
Genesis16:5 Sarayi ne yeemulugunyiza Aburaamu nti: “Nvumibwa lwa kubeera ggwe; nze nassa omuzaana wange mu mikono gyo; kati wuuli alabye ali lubuto, annyooma. Omukama y'aba atusalirawo.”" 
Genesis16:6 Aburaamu n'amwanukula nti: “Anti muzaana wo, ali mu buyinza bwo; mukole nga bw'olaba.” Sarayi n'atulugunya Agari, Agari n'amudduka." 
Genesis16:7 Malayika w'Omukama n'asanga Agari okumpi n'oluzzi mu ddungu, ku luzzi oluli ku kkubo eriraga e Suru," 
Genesis16:8 n'amubuuza nti: “Agari, omuzaana wa Sarayi, ova wa? Ate ogenda wa?” Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Nziruka Sarayi mugole wange.”" 
Genesis16:9 Malayika w'Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Ddayo ewa mugole wo, omugondere.”" 
Genesis16:10 Era Malayika w'Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Ezzadde lyo nzija kuliwa lyale nnyo, nga terikyabalika olw'obungi bwalyo.”" 
Genesis16:11 Era malayika w'Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Kakaano oli lubuto; ojja kuzaala omwana mulenzi; ojja kumutuuma Yisimayeli, kubanga Omukama awulidde ennaku yo." 
Genesis16:12 Ono aliba musajja ndogoyi ya ttale; alirwanyisa buli omu, na bonna balimulwanyisa; obulamu bwe wa kulumbagananga baganda be bonna.”" 
Genesis16:13 Agari n'atuuma Omukama eyali ayogera naye: 'Oli-Katonda-Andaba', kubanga yagamba nti: “Kituufu, wano ndabiddewo omugongo gw'oyo andaba.”" 
Genesis16:14 Oluzzi olwo kyeruva luyitibwa Beeri Lakayiroyi. Luli wakati wa Kadesi ne Beredi. 
Genesis16:15 Agari yazaalira Aburaamu omwana ow'obulenzi, Aburaamu n'atuuma mutabani we Agari gwe yamuzaalira Yisimayeli." 
Genesis16:16 Aburaamu yali wa myaka kinaana mu mukaaga Agari okumuzaalira Yisimayeli. 
Genesis17:1 Aburaamu bwe yali aweza emyaka kyenda mu mwenda, Omukama n'amulabikira n'amugamba nti: “Nze Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu. Beera nange, era mu maaso gange tobaako musango." 
Genesis17:2 Nzija kukola endagaano yange naawe, nzija kukuwa oyale nnyo nnyo.”" 
Genesis17:3 Aburaamu n'agwa wansi ku maaso ge. 
Genesis17:4 Katonda n'amugamba nti: “Ye eno endagaano yange naawe: Olibeera kitaabwe w'amawanga mangi. 
Genesis17:5 Tokyaddayo kuyitibwa Aburaamu, wabula ojja kuyitibwanga Yiburayimu, kubanga nkufudde kitaawe w'amawanga amangi." 
Genesis17:6 Nzija kukuwa ozaale nnyo nnyo, amawanga galisibuka mu ggwe, era ne bakabaka mu ggwe mwe balisibuka." 
Genesis17:7 Nzija kukola endagaano yange naawe n'ezzadde lyo eririkuddirira amazadde gammwe gonna, ng'endagaano ey'olubeerera, mbeere Katonda wo ne Katonda w'ezzadde lyo eririkuddirira." 
Genesis17:8 Ggwe n'ezzadde eririkuddirira ndibawa ensi mw'okungulidde, ensi yonna ey'e Kanaani ebeere yammwe emirembe gyonna; nze ndibeera Katonda waabwe.”" 
Genesis17:9 Katonda n'agamba Yiburayimu nti: “Naawe okuumanga endagaano yange n'ezzadde lyo eririkuddirira mu mazadde n'amazadde. 
Genesis17:10 Eno ye ndagaano yange, gye mulikuuma wakati wange nammwe n'ezzadde lyo eririkuddirira: Mu mmwe buli musajja wa kutayirirwa." 
Genesis17:11 Mulitayiriranga emibiri gyammwe, ke kaliba akabonero k'endagaano wakati wange nammwe." 
Genesis17:12 Buli mwana wammwe omulenzi awezezza ennaku omunaana wa kutayirirwa; buli musajja yenna amazadde gammwe gonna, abeere wa waka, oba wamugula ku mugwira yenna, kwe kugamba atali wa mu zadde lyo." 
Genesis17:13 Owa waka ne gw'oguze bateekwanga okutayirirwa. Endagaano yange eno nga neeyamba emibiri gyammwe ndagaano ya lubeerera. 
Genesis17:14 Omusajja atali mukomole, oyo ataatayirirwa mu mubiri, ajja kukutulwanga ku bantu be; anaabanga amenye endagaano yange.”" 
Genesis17:15 Katonda n'agamba Yiburayimu nti: “Sarayi, mukazi wo, tokyamuyitanga Sarayi, wabula erinnya lye anaayitibwanga Saara." 
Genesis17:16 Nzija kumuwa omukisa, era nzija kukuwa omwana ow'obulenzi mu ye; nzija kumuwa omukisa, amawanga galisibuka mu ye; bakabaka b'amawanga balisibuka mu ye.”" 
Genesis17:17 Yiburayimu n'agwa wansi ku maaso ge, n'aseka muli munda nga yeebuuza nti: “Ow'emyaka ekikumi afune omwana ow'obulenzi? Ne Saara, ow'emyaka ekyenda alizaala?”" 
Genesis17:18 N'agamba Katonda nti: “Singa Yisimayeli omuwadde n'aba mulamu.” 
Genesis17:19 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Ky'ekyo, naye Saara mukazi wo ajja kukuzaalira omwana ow'obulenzi, olimuyita erinnya lye Yizaake. Nzija kunyweza endagaano yange naye, nga ye ndagaano ey'olubeerera n'ezzadde lye eririmuddirira." 
Genesis17:20 Ne by'ogambye ku Yisimayeli mbiwulidde. Naye ndimuwa omukisa, ndimuwa azaale, ayale nnyo nnyo; alizaala abalangira kkumi na babiri, ndimufuula eggwanga eddene." 
Genesis17:21 Yo endagaano yange nzija kuginyweza ne Yizaake Saara gw'alizaala mu mwaka ogujja mu bbanga nga lino.” 
Genesis17:22 Katonda bwe yamala okwogera ne Yiburayimu, n'agenda waggulu okuva awaali Yiburayimu." 
Genesis17:23 Ku lunaku olwo lwennyini, Yiburayimu n'addira Yisimayeli mutabani we ne bonna abaazaalirwa mu maka ge, ne bonna be yali aguze, kwe kugamba, abasajja bonna ab'omu nnyumba ye, n'abatayirira, nga Katonda bwe yali amulagidde." 
Genesis17:24 Yiburayimu okutayirirwa yali wa myaka kyenda mu mwenda; 
Genesis17:25 ne mutabani we Yisimayeli lwe yatayirirwa, yali wa myaka kkumi n'esatu." 
Genesis17:26 Yiburayimu ne mutabani we Yisimayeli baatayirirwa ku lunaku olwo lwennyini," 
Genesis17:27 n'abasajja bonna ab'omu nnyumba ye abaali bazaaliddwa omwo ne be yali aguze ku bagwira, bonna baatayirirwa wamu naye." 
Genesis18:1 Omukama yalabikira Yiburayimu okumpi n'omuvule omunene ogwa Mamure bwe yali ng'atudde mu mulyango gwa weema ye mu ttuntu ly'olunaku. 
Genesis18:2 Bwe yayimusa amaaso, n'alaba abasajja basatu nga bamuyimiridde kumpi. Bwe yabalaba, n'addukanako okugenda okubasisinkana ng'ava eno ku weema ye, n'avunnama ku ttaka," 
Genesis18:3 n'agamba nti: “Mukama wange, obanga nsanze ekisa mu maaso go, omuweereza wo tomuyitako buyisi." 
Genesis18:4 Leka baleeteyo ku tuzzi, munaabeko ku bigere era muwummuleko mu muti." 
Genesis18:5 Era ka ndeeteyo ku kagaati, muddemu ku ndasi, olwo kale mweyongereyo, manyanga kyemuvudde mukyama ew'omuweereza wammwe.” Bo ne bagamba nti: “Kola nga bw'oyogedde.”" 
Genesis18:6 Yiburayimu n'agenda bunnambiro eri Saara mu weema n'amugamba nti: “Yanguwa, goya seeya ssatu ez'obuwunga bw'eŋŋano, ovumbike n'obugaati.”" 
Genesis18:7 N'agenda mangu mu ggana n'aggyayo akayana akagonvu ennyama, akalungi, n'akawa omulenzi; n'omulenzi n'ayanguwa mangu okukateekateeka." 
Genesis18:8 Yiburayimu n'addira omuzigo n'amata n'akayana, ke yali afumbye, n'abibassa mu maaso, ye n'ayimirira kumpi awo ku bbali wansi w'omuti bo nga balya." 
Genesis18:9 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Mukazi wo Saara aluwa?” N'ayanukula nti: “Ali mu weema.” 
Genesis18:10 N'amugamba nti: “Mazima ndidda gy'oli mu mwaka ogujja mu bbanga nga lino. Olwo mukazi wo Saara aliba alina omwana wa bulenzi.” Saara yali awuliriza mu mulyango gwa weema eyali emabega wa Yiburayimu. 
Genesis18:11 Bombi Yiburayimu ne Saara baali bakadde nga bayise mu myaka, nga ne Saara ayise mu myaka egy'okuzaala." 
Genesis18:12 Saara n'aseka muli munda ng'agamba nti: “Nze aweddeyo nti: ate ne baze akaddiye, nkyaddayo okufuna essanyu?”" 
Genesis18:13 Omukama n'agamba Yiburayimu nti: “Lwaki Saara asese ng'agamba nti: ‘Nze akaddiye ati ndizaala omwana?’ 
Genesis18:14 Ku Mukama waliwo ekitasoboka? Ndikomawo gy'oli mu budde nga buno bwennyini, Saara aliba alina omwana wa bulenzi.”" 
Genesis18:15 Saara olw'okutya ne yeegaana nti: “Sinnaseka.” Oli n'amugamba nti: “Nedda, osese.”" 
Genesis18:16 Abasajja ne basituka okugenda, amaaso ne bagoolekeza Sodoma, ne Yiburayimu n'agenda nabo okubawerekerako." 
Genesis18:17 Omukama ne yeebuuza muli munda nti: “Oba Yiburayimu mmukise kye ŋŋenda okukola? 
Genesis18:18 Naye wuuno agenda kufuuka ggwanga ddene, ery'amaanyi, nga n'amawanga gonna ag'ensi galiweebwa omukisa mu ye." 
Genesis18:19 Anti namulonda alagire batabani be n'ennyumba ye erimuddirira, bakuume ekkubo ly'Omukama, bakole ebikolwa eby'obutuukirivu n'obutuufu, Omukama bw'atyo atuukirize eri Yiburayimu byonna bye yamusuubiza.”" 
Genesis18:20 Awo Omukama n'agamba nti: “Okukuba emiranga okw'e Sodoma ne Gomorra nga kweyongedde, n'ekibi kye nga kigezze nnyo." 
Genesis18:21 Ka nserengeteyo, ndabe oba omulanga gwakyo oguntuuseeko ddala kye kugamba bwe kityo bwe kiri; oba nedda, nzija kumanya.”" 
Genesis18:22 Abasajja ne bafunyamu okuva awo, ne boolekera Sodoma; kyokka ye Yiburayimu yasigala akyayimiridde mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Genesis18:23 Yiburayimu n'asembera n'abuuza nti: “Mu mazima omutuukirivu onoomusaanyaawo kumu n'omubi? 
Genesis18:24 Mu kibuga bwe munaabaamu amakumi ataano abatuufu, ddala onookisaanyaawo? Ekifo tookisonyiwe olw'abatuukirivu amakumi ataano abakirimu?" 
Genesis18:25 Kikafuuwe ggwe ekyo okukikola: okutta omutuukirivu wamu n'omubi; oyise kimu omutuukirivu n'omubi? Omulamuzi w'ensi yonna ayinza obutagoba bwenkanya? Kikafuuwe!” 
Genesis18:26 Omukama n'addamu nti: “E Sodoma mu kibuga bwe nnaasangamu amakumi ataano abatuukirivu, olw'okubeera abo, ekifo kyonna nzija kukitaliza.”" 
Genesis18:27 Yiburayimu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Ŋŋumye njogere eri Mukama wange newandibadde nga ndi nfuufu, ndi vvu." 
Genesis18:28 Kitya, bw'onoosanga nga ku makumi ataano kubuzeeko bataano abatuukirivu? Ekibuga onookizikiriza kubanga abataano babuzeeko?” N'agamba nti: “Bwe nnaasangayo amakumi ana mu abataano sijja kuzikiriza.”" 
Genesis18:29 Yiburayimu n'addamu okumusaba nti: “Oba oli awo eneesangibwayo makumi ana?” N'agamba nti: “Olw'okubeera amakumi ana ago, sijja kuzikiriza.”" 
Genesis18:30 Yiburayimu n'ayongera nti: “Nkwegayiridde Mukama wange tonsunguwalira bwe nnyongera okusaba. Kitya nga wasangiddwayo makumi asatu gokka?” N'ayanukula nti: “Bwe wanaasangibwayo amakumi asatu gokka, sijja kukolawo kantu.”" 
Genesis18:31 Yiburayimu n'addamu nate nti: “Ŋŋumye njogere eri Mukama wange. Bwe wanaasangibwayo amakumi abiri gokka?” N'amuddamu nti: “Olw'okubeera amakumi abiri, sijja kuzikiriza.”" 
Genesis18:32 Yiburayimu n'agamba nti: “Nkwegayiridde, Mukama wange tonsunguwalira bwe nnaayongerayo kiryose omulundi omulala gumu. Bwe banaasangibwayo ekkumi lyokka?” N'agamba nti: “Olw'okubeera ekkumi eryo, sijja kuzikiriza.”" 
Genesis18:33 Omukama bwe yamala okwogera ne Yiburayimu, n'agenda; ne Yiburayimu n'addayo ewaabwe." 
Genesis19:1 Akawungeezi bamalayika ababiri ne batuuka e Sodoma. Loti yali atudde ku wankaaki w'ekibuga. Bwe yabalaba, n'ayimuka n'agenda okubasisinkana, n'avunnama ku maaso ge ku ttaka." 
Genesis19:2 N'agamba nti: “Bakama bange, mbeegayiridde, mukyame ew'omuweereza wammwe, musule wano; munaabe ku bigere, awo enkya muyinza okukeera ne mwongera olugendo lwammwe.” Ne bagaana nti: “Nedda, ekiro tunaakimala mu mbuga y'ekibuga.”" 
Genesis19:3 N'abasindirira nnyo, ne bakyama ewuwe, ne bayingira mu nnyumba ye. N'abafumbira emmere; yafumba omugaati ogutazimbulukuse, ne balya." 
Genesis19:4 Baali tebannagenda kwebaka, abasajja ab'omu kibuga, abasajja ab'e Sodoma, okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukadde, abantu bonna okutuuka ku asembayo, ne bazinda ennyumba." 
Genesis19:5 Ne bayita Loti ne bamubuuza nti: “Abasajja abaayingidde ewuwo ekiro baluwa? Batufulumize eno twebake nabo.” 
Genesis19:6 Loti n'afuluma gye bali oluggi n'aluggalira ku mugongo, n'abasaba nti:" 
Genesis19:7 “Mbeegayiridde, baganda bange, temukola kya bugwenyufu ekyo." 
Genesis19:8 Nnina wano bawala bange babiri embeerera; ka mbabafulumize mubakole nga bwe mwagala, naye abasajja bano temubaako kye mubakola, kubanga bazze kwewogomako wano mu nnyumba yange.”" 
Genesis19:9 Bali ne bagamba nti: “Ddira muli! Omusajja ono eyajja obugwira kuno y'ayagala okutusalirawo? Kale nno ggwe tujja okubonyaabonya n'okusinga bano.” Ne basindirira nnyo Loti, ne basembera bamenye oluggi." 
Genesis19:10 Naye abasajja ne bakunuukiriza Loti ne bamuyingiza munda ne baggalawo oluggi; 
Genesis19:11 ate bali abaali ebweru ne babaziba amaaso okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu, eby'okuzuula omulyango ne babivaako." 
Genesis19:12 Abasajja ne bagamba Loti nti: “Wano olinawo omuntu yenna owuwo? Bakoddomi bo, batabani bo, bawala bo, oba omulala yenna owuwo ali mu kibuga? Muggye mu kifo kino," 
Genesis19:13 kubanga tugenda okukizikiriza, anti emiranga gyabwe eri Omukama egyemulugunyiza abalimu minene, kyavudde atusindika, tukizikirize.”" 
Genesis19:14 Loti n'afuluma, n'abuulira bakoddomi be abaali ab'okuwasa bawala be, n'agamba nti: “Mwanguwe, muve mu kifo kino, kubanga Omukama agenda okuzikiriza ekibuga.” Bo ne balowooza nti asaaga busaazi." 
Genesis19:15 Mmambya ng'asala bamalayika ne bamusindirira nti: “Situka, twala mukazi wo, ne bawala bo ababiri b'olina wano, sikulwa ng'osaanawo ng'ekibuga kibonerezebwa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Yali akyesisiggiriza, abasajja ne bamukwata omukono, n'omukono gwa mukazi we n'egya bawala be bombi ne babafulumya, ne babateeka ebweru w'ekibuga, kubanga Omukama yali abakwatiddwa ekisa." 
Genesis19:17 Olwabatuusa ebweru w'ekibuga, omu n'amugamba nti: “Dduka, owonye obulamu bwo. Totunula mabega wadde okuyimirira awalala wonna mu museetwe; ddukira mu lusozi, sikulwa ng'osaanawo.”" 
Genesis19:18 Loti ne yeegayirira nti: “Ssebo," 
Genesis19:19 singa nno omuweereza wo asanze ekisa mu maaso go, anti n'ekisa kyo ky'onkoledde kinene bw'owonyezza obulamu bwange, naye sisobola kuddukira mu nsozi; naaba sinnatuukayo ng'akabenje kansanga, nga nfa." 
Genesis19:20 Okumpi wano waliwo akabuga gye nsobola okuddukira, katono, ka nzirukire mu ako; si katono? Olwo nzija kulama.”" 
Genesis19:21 N'amuddamu nti: “Kale n'ekyo ky'osabye nkikukkirizza: sijja kuzikiriza kabuga k'oyogeddeko. 
Genesis19:22 Yanguwa owonere eyo, kubanga sijja kubaako kye nkola okutuusa ng'okatuuseemu.” Akabuga ako kyekaava kayitibwa Zowari." 
Genesis19:23 Loti okuyingira Zowari ng'enjuba evuddeyo ku nsi. 
Genesis19:24 Omukama n'atonnyesa ku Sodoma ne Gomorra ebibiriiti n'omuliro nga biva ew'Omukama mu ggulu," 
Genesis19:25 bw'atyo n'azikiriza ebibuga bino n'omuseetwe gwonna, abantu b'omu bibuga bonna, n'ebimera by'omu nsi eyo byonna." 
Genesis19:26 Naye muka Loti yatunula emabega, n'afuuka empagi y'omunnyo." 
Genesis19:27 Yiburayimu bwe yazuukuka ku makya, n'ajja ku kifo we yayimirira mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Genesis19:28 N'atunula wansi ku Sodoma ne Gomorra n'okusala omuseetwe, n'alaba omukka nga guttunka ku nsi eyo nga guli ng'omukka oguva mu kabiga." 
Genesis19:29 Katonda lwe yazikiriza ebibuga eby'omu museetwe, yajjukira Yiburayimu, n'aggya Loti mu kabenje bwe yazikiriza ebibuga Loti mwe yali." 
Genesis19:30 Loti n'ava e Zowari ne bawala be ababiri n'ayambuka n'asenga mu nsozi; yali atidde okusigala mu Zowari. N'akola amaka ge mu mpuku, ye ne bawala be ababiri." 
Genesis19:31 Olumu omuwala omukulu n'agamba muto we nti: “Kitaffe akaddiye, ate mu nsi temuli musajja n'omu eyandisobodde okutuwasa ng'empisa bw'eri mu nsi yonna." 
Genesis19:32 Jjangu tunywese kitaffe evviini twebake naye tukuume ezzadde nga tuyita mu kitaffe.” 
Genesis19:33 Ekiro ekyo ne batamiiza kitaabwe omwenge, omuwala omukulu n'ayingira ne yeebaka ne kitaawe. Loti teyawulira muwala we yeebakira ne we yazuukukira." 
Genesis19:34 Ne ku lunaku olwaddirira, omukulu n'agamba muto we nti: “Nze jjo ekiro neebaka ne kitange, ne mu kiro kino era tumunywese evviini, ggwe ojja kuyingira weebake naye, tukuume ezzadde nga tuyita mu kitaffe.”" 
Genesis19:35 N'ekiro ekyo era ne batamiiza kitaabwe omwenge, omuto n'ayingira okwebaka naye; ne ku olwo teyawulira muwala we we yeebakira ne we yazuukukira." 
Genesis19:36 Bwe batyo bawala ba Loti bombi ne baba embuto nga bazifunye ku kitaabwe. 
Genesis19:37 Omukulu n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi n'amutuuma Mowabu; ye kitaabwe w'Abamowabu abaliwo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Genesis19:38 N'omuto n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi n'amutuuma Benammi; ye kitaabwe w'Abammoni abaliwo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Genesis20:1 Yiburayimu n'ava eyo n'alaga mu nsi Negevu n'asenga wakati wa Kadesi ne Suru; n'abeerako ekiseera e Gerari. 
Genesis20:2 N'alimba ku mukazi we Saara nti: “Mwannyinaze.” Abimeleki kabaka w'e Gerari n'atumya Saara, n'amutwala." 
Genesis20:3 Kyokka Katonda n'alabula Abimeleki ekiro mu kirooto nti: “Ojja kufa olw'omukazi gwe waleese; kubanga muka musajja.” 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleki yali tannamusemberera. N'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, n'eggwanga ettuufu onoolitta?" 
Genesis20:5 Si ye yagambye nti: ‘Mwannyinaze’? Ne Saara yennyini si ye yaŋŋambye nti: ‘Mwannyinaze’? Kino nakikoze mu mutima mulungi n'emikono egitaliiko musango.” 
Genesis20:6 Omukama n'amuddamu mu kirooto nti: “Nange mmanyi nga wakikoze mu mutima mulungi, kyenvudde nkutaliza, oleme kwonoona gye ndi, kyenvudde sikuleka kumukwatako." 
Genesis20:7 Kale nno kati muddize bba, kubanga mulanzi. Ajja kukusabira, ojja kubeera mulamu. Bw'onoogaana okumumuddiza, awo oli wa kufa, ggwe n'ebibyo byonna.”" 
Genesis20:8 Ku makya bwe yagolokoka, Abimeleki n'ayita basajja be bonna n'ababuulira ebigambo ebyo byonna; ne batya nnyo." 
Genesis20:9 Abimeleki n'ayita Yiburayimu n'amugamba nti: “Kiki kye watukoze? Kibi ki kye nakukola kw'osinzidde okundeetera, nze n'obwakabaka bwange bwonna, ekibi ekyenkana wano? Ky'onkoze si kye wandisaanye okunkola.”" 
Genesis20:10 N'agamba Yiburayimu era nti: “Wagenderera ki okunkola kino?” 
Genesis20:11 Yiburayimu n'ayanukula nti: “Nalowooza nti: ‘Kya mazima mu kifo kino temuli kutya Katonda, bajja kunzita olw'okubeera mukazi wange.’" 
Genesis20:12 Sso era ku ludda olulala kituufu mwannyinaze, mwana wa kitange naye nga si wa nnyabo; namuwasa n'afuuka mukazi wange." 
Genesis20:13 Katonda bwe yanzigya mu nnyumba ya kitange n'ammunzabunza, ne ŋŋamba Saara nti: ‘Eky'ekisa ky'oyinza okunkolera kwe kunjogerako yonna gye tunaagendanga nti: Ono mwannyinaze.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleki n'addira endiga n'ente n'abiwa Yiburayimu, ko n'abaddu n'abazaana, ate n'amuddiza ne Saara mukazi we." 
Genesis20:15 N'agamba nti: “Ensi yange ekuli awo mu maaso, senga wonna w'osiima.”" 
Genesis20:16 Ate n'agamba Saara nti: “Mwannyoko mmuwadde ebitundu bya ffeeza lukumi; eno ye ngassi mu maaso g'abo bonna b'oli nabo ey'ensobi yange ku ggwe. Ggwe wejjeeredde.” 
Genesis20:17 Yiburayimu ne yeegayirira, Katonda n'awonya Abimeleki ne mukazi we n'abazaana be ne basobola okuddamu okuzaala," 
Genesis20:18 anti Omukama yali asibaze buli nda mu nnyumba ya Abimeleki olw'okubeera Saara muka Yiburayimu. 
Genesis21:1 Omukama n'agirira Saara ekisa, nga bwe yali agambye, n'akolera Saara kye yali amusuubizza;" 
Genesis21:2 n'afuna olubuto n'azaalira Yiburayimu omwana ow'obulenzi mu bukadde bwe, mu budde bwennyini Katonda bwe yali amulagaanyizza." 
Genesis21:3 Yiburayimu omwana ow'obulenzi Saara gwe yamuzaalira n'amutuuma Yizaake," 
Genesis21:4 n'amutayirira nga wa nnaku munaana nga Katonda bwe yali amulagidde. 
Genesis21:5 Yiburayimu yali aweza emyaka kikumi mutabani we Yizaake we yamuzaalirwa. 
Genesis21:6 Saara n'agamba nti: “Katonda ampadde ensonga ey'okuseka; buli yenna anaaba awulidde, anansekerako.”" 
Genesis21:7 Ate n'agamba nti: “Ani yandigambye Yiburayimu nti Saara alirera ku baana? Kyokka mmuzaalidde omutabani mu bukadde bwe.” 
Genesis21:8 Omwana n'akula n'ava ku mabeere. Ku lunaku lwe yaggyibwa ku mabeere, Yiburayimu yakola embaga makeke." 
Genesis21:9 Saara bwe yalaba mutabani wa Agari Omumisiri gwe yali azaalidde Yiburayimu ng'azannya ne Yizaake mutabani we, n'agamba Yiburayimu nti:" 
Genesis21:10 “Goba omuzaana ono ne mutabani we; kubanga omwana w'omuzaana taliba musika wamu na mutabani wange Yizaake.” 
Genesis21:11 Kino ne kinakuwaza nnyo Yiburayimu olw'okubeera mutabani we. 
Genesis21:12 Katonda n'agamba nti: “Tonakuwala olw'okubeera omwana n'omuzaana wo. Kyonna Saara ky'anaakugamba kiwulirize, kubanga mu Yizaake ezzadde lyo mwe linaafuniranga erinnya." 
Genesis21:13 Naye ne mutabani w'omuzaana wo ndimufuulamu eggwanga eddene, kubanga naye zzadde lyo.”" 
Genesis21:14 Yiburayimu bwe yazuukuka ku makya, n'akwata omugaati n'endyanga ejjudde amazzi n'abissa ku kibegabega kya Agari, n'amuwa omwana, n'amusiibula. Agari n'agenda ng'atangatanga mu ddungu ly'e Beeriseba." 
Genesis21:15 Amazzi bwe gaggwamu mu ndyanga, n'assa omwana mu kasaka," 
Genesis21:16 ne yeeyongerayo akabanga, ng'akasaale akalasiddwa we kakoma, n'atuula awo yekka ng'agamba nti: “Sirina galaba mwana ng'afa.” Omwana n'asitula eddoboozi n'akaaba." 
Genesis21:17 Katonda yawulira omwana ng'akaaba, malayika w'Omukama n'ayita Agari ng'ayima mu ggulu nti: “Agari obadde ki? Leka kutya, kubanga Katonda awulidde omwana ng'akaaba awo w'ali." 
Genesis21:18 Situka, situla omwana, mukwate ku mukono, kubanga nzija kumufuulamu eggwanga eddene.”" 
Genesis21:19 Katonda n'amuzibula amaaso, n'alaba oluzzi, n'ajjuza endyanga n'omulenzi n'amuwa n'anywa." 
Genesis21:20 Omukama yaba naye. N'akula, n'abeeranga mu ddungu, n'afuuka mulasi wa busaale." 
Genesis21:21 Bwe yali ng'ali mu ddungu lye Parani, nnyina n'amufunira omukazi okuva mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Genesis21:22 Mu budde obwo Abimeleki ne Fikoli omuduumizi w'eggye lye ne bagamba Yiburayimu nti: “Mu byonna by'okola Katonda ali naawe. 
Genesis21:23 Layira mu maaso ga Katonda nti tolinsalira nkwe nze n'ezzadde lyange, na yenna owange, era nti oligirira ekisa nze n'ensi gy'olimu ng'omugenyi, ekifaanana n'ekyo nze kye nkugiridde.”" 
Genesis21:24 Yiburayimu n'addamu nti: “Yee, ndayidde.”" 
Genesis21:25 Yiburayimu ne yeemulugunyiza Abimeleki olw'oluzzi abaweereza ba Abimeleki lwe baanyaga. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki n'addamu nti: “Simanyi yakola kino; Ggwe wennyini tokimbuulirangako, ate nze mbadde sikiwulirangako okutuusa ku lwa leero.”" 
Genesis21:27 Awo Yiburayimu n'addira endiga n'ente n'abiwa Abimeleki; bombi ne bakola endagaano. 
Genesis21:28 Yiburayimu n'assa obuliga musanvu wabbali okuva mu ggana. 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki n'amubuuza nti: “Ate buli obuliga omusanvu bw'oyawuddeko ebbali bwaki?” 
Genesis21:30 Ko ye nti: “Kkiriza obuliga omusanvu bwe nkuwa, bwe bujulizi obukakasa nti nze nasima oluzzi luno.”" 
Genesis21:31 Ekifo ekyo kwe kuyitibwa Beeriseba, kubanga awo bombi we baakolera ekirayiro." 
Genesis21:32 Bwe baamala okukola endagaano e Beeriseba, Abimeleki ne Fikoli, omuduumizi w'eggye lye, ne basitula ne baddayo mu nsi y'Abafilisitiini." 
Genesis21:33 Yiburayimu n'asimba omumyulira e Beeriseba, n'akoowoolerayo erinnya ly'Omukama Katonda Ssewannaku." 
Genesis21:34 N'amala ennaku nnyingi mu nsi y'Abafilisitiini. 
Genesis22:1 Awo oluvannyuma, Katonda n'ageza Yiburayimu, n'amuyita nti: “Yiburayimu.” Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Nzuuno.”" 
Genesis22:2 N'amugamba nti: “Ddira mutabani wo omu yekka gw'oyagala Yizaake, ogende mu nsi Moriya omuntambirire eyo ng'ekitambiro ekyokye, ku lumu mu nsozi lwe ndikulaga.”" 
Genesis22:3 Yiburayimu bwe yazuukuka ku makya, n'ategeka endogoyi ye; yatwala abalenzi be babiri ne Yizaake mutabani we, n'atema enku ez'ekitambiro ekyokye, n'asitula n'alaga Katonda gye yali amulagidde." 
Genesis22:4 Ku lunaku olwokusatu, bwe yasitula amaaso, n'alengera ekifo naye nga kikyesuddeko akabanga," 
Genesis22:5 n'agamba abalenzi be nti: “Musigale wano n'endogoyi, nze n'omwana ka tugendeko emitala eri; tujja kusinza ate oluvannyuma tudde gye muli.”" 
Genesis22:6 N'addira enku ez'ekitambiro ekyokye, n'azitikka Yizaake mutabani we; ye n'akwata mu ngalo omuliro n'ekiso. Ne bagenda bombi wamu." 
Genesis22:7 Yizaake n'ayita kitaawe Yiburayimu nti: “Taata.” Ye n'ayanukula nti “Wangi, mwana wange.” Ko ye nti: “Omuliro n'enku biibino, naye akaliga ak'ekitambiro ekyokye kaliwa?”" 
Genesis22:8 Yiburayimu n'agamba nti: “Mwana wange, Katonda y'anaalaba ekitambiro ekyokye.” Ne bagenda bombi wamu." 
Genesis22:9 Bwe baatuuka ku kifo Katonda kye yali amulaze, Yiburayimu n'azimba omwaliiro, n'aguteekako enku, n'asiba omwana we Yizaake, n'amuteeka ku mwaliiro ku nku waggulu," 
Genesis22:10 n'akununkiriza ekiso atte omwana we. 
Genesis22:11 Awo malayika w'Omukama n'amuyita ng'ayima mu ggulu nti: “Yiburayimu, Yiburayimu.” N'ayanukula nti: “Nzuuno.”" 
Genesis22:12 N'agamba nti: “Tokwata ku mwana. Tomukola kantu. Kati ntegedde ng'otya Katonda, tonnyimye mutabani wo, omwana wo omu yekka.”" 
Genesis22:13 Yiburayimu bwe yasitula amaaso ng'awo alabawo seddume w'endiga ng'amayembe gaayo gawambidde mu kasaka; n'agiddira n'agitambira ng'ekitambiro ekyokye mu kifo kya mutabani we. 
Genesis22:14 Ekifo ekyo n'akituuma 'Omukama y'Anaalaba'. N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero ye njogera nti: “Ku lusozi Omukama y'Anaalaba.” 
Genesis22:15 Malayika w'Omukama n'ayita Yiburayimu omulundi ogwokubiri ng'ayima mu ggulu n'amugamba nti: 
Genesis22:16 “Neerayidde nzennyini, Omukama y'agamba, kubanga okoze ekintu kino, n'otonnyima mutabani wo, omwana wo omu yekka," 
Genesis22:17 ddala nzija kukuwa omukisa, n'ezzadde lyo ndiriwa okwala okwenkana emmunyeenye z'eggulu, oba omusenyu oguli ku lubalama lw'ennyanja. Ezzadde lyo liryekomya ebibuga by'abalabe baalyo." 
Genesis22:18 Amawanga gonna ag'ensi mu zzadde lyo galiweebwa omukisa, kubanga ogondedde eddoboozi lyange.”" 
Genesis22:19 Yiburayimu n'addayo eri abalenzi be, ne basitula ne bagenda bonna wamu e Beeriseba; Yiburayimu n'abeera e Beeriseba." 
Genesis22:20 Oluvannyuma, Yiburayimu ne bamubuulira nti: “Ne Miluka azaalidde Nakori muganda wo abaana ab'obulenzi:" 
Genesis22:21 Wuzi, omuggulanda, ne Buuzi muganda we, ne Kemweli kitaawe wa Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 ne Kasedi, Kazo, Piludasi, Yidulafu, ne Betweli.”" 
Genesis22:23 Betweli yazaala Rebekka. Abo omunaana Miluka yabazaalira Nakori muganda wa Yiburayimu. 
Genesis22:24 Ate omukazi omusebeyi ayitibwa Rewuma, yazaala Teba, Gakamu, Takasi ne Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Saara yawangaala n'atuuka ku myaka kikumi mu abiri mu musanvu," 
Genesis23:2 n'afiira e Kiriyati-Aruba oba Keburoni, mu Kanaani. Yiburayimu n'agenda okukungubagira Saara n'okumukaabira." 
Genesis23:3 Yiburayimu yaleka wali omufu we, n'agenda agamba Abakitti nti:" 
Genesis23:4 “Ndi munnaggwanga era omugwira mu mmwe; mumpe akafo mu mmwe kabeere obutaka bwange obw'okuziikangamu, nziikewo omufu wange.”" 
Genesis23:5 Abakitti ne baanukula nti: 
Genesis23:6 “Ssebo, tuwulirize, oli mulangira omukulu mu ffe, weeroboze entaana esingira ddala obulungi mu zaffe zonna oziike omwo omufu wo; mpaawo anaakuziyiza kuziika mufu wo mu ntaana ye.”" 
Genesis23:7 Yiburayimu n'avunnamira bannansi b'ensi eyo, Abakitti," 
Genesis23:8 n'abagamba nti: “Oba munzikiriza nziike omufu wange, kale mumpulirize, munsabire Efuroni mutabani wa Zokari" 
Genesis23:9 ampe empuku ye e Makupela, eri ku nnimiro ye gy'ekoma, aginguze ku muwendo ogugigyamu, ebeere obutaka bwange mu mmwe obw'okuziikangamu.”" 
Genesis23:10 Efuroni Omukitti yali atudde awo mu Bakitti banne, n'amwanukula nga ne Bakitti banne abaali bazze ku mulyango gw'ekibuga kye bawulira, nti:" 
Genesis23:11 “Nedda, ssebo; mpuliriza, ennimiro ngikuwadde buwi, n'empuku erimu ngikuwadde buwi; mbikuwadde nga Bakitti bannange balaba; ziika omufu wo.”" 
Genesis23:12 Yiburayimu n'avunnamira bannansi b'ensi eyo," 
Genesis23:13 n'addamu Efuroni ab'eggwanga lye nga bawulira nti: “Nkwegayiridde, mpuliriza; nzija kukuwa ssente ez'ennimiro; zitwale, nsobole okuziikamu omufu wange.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni n'ayanukula Yiburayimu nti: 
Genesis23:15 “Ssebo, mpuliriza; ettaka ligyamu sekeri eza ffeeza ebikumi bina. Ekyo kye ki ku nze naawe? Ziika mufu wo.”" 
Genesis23:16 Yiburayimu n'ategereza Efuroni, n'apima ssente Efuroni ze yali asabye, nga Bakitti banne balaba, sekeri eza ffeeza ebikumi bina, ng'emiwendo bwe gyali mu basuubuzi." 
Genesis23:17 Ennimiro ya Efuroni eyali mu Makupela kumpi ne Mamure, yo yennyini n'empuku egirimu n'emiti gyamu gyonna, n'ensalo zaayo zonna ne bikakasibwa" 
Genesis23:18 nti bya Yiburayimu, Abakitti abaali bazze ku mulyango gw'ekibuga nga nabo balaba." 
Genesis23:19 Oluvannyuma Yiburayimu n'aziika mukazi we Saara mu mpuku y'omu nnimiro y'e Makupela, okumpi ne Mamure, oba Keburoni, mu Kanaani." 
Genesis23:20 Abakitti ne bakakasa nti ennimiro n'empuku eyalimu bya Yiburayimu, butaka bwe bwa kuziikangamu." 
Genesis24:1 Yiburayimu kati yali akaddiye, ng'ayise mu myaka, n'Omukama mu byonna ng'amuwadde omukisa." 
Genesis24:2 Yiburayimu n'agamba omuweereza asinga mu maka ge, omuwanika w'ebintu bye byonna, nti: “Teeka omukono gwo wansi w'ekisambi kyange" 
Genesis24:3 nkulayize Omukama Katonda w'eggulu era Katonda w'ensi, nti toofunire mutabani wange mukazi mu bawala Abakanaani mwe ndi," 
Genesis24:4 wabula nti oligenda mu nsi yange, ne mu ŋŋanda zange, eyo gy'olifunira mutabani wange Yizaake omukazi.”" 
Genesis24:5 Omuweereza n'ayanukula nti: “Omukazi bw'atalyagala kujja nange mu nsi eno, olwo mutabani wo si gwe nditeekwa okuzza mu nsi gye wava?”" 
Genesis24:6 Yiburayimu n'amugamba nti: “Wekkaanye, togezanga n'ozza eyo mutabani wange." 
Genesis24:7 Omukama Katonda w'eggulu, eyanzigya mu nnyumba ya kitange, ne mu nsi y'obuzaale bwange, eyaŋŋamba, n'alayira n'okulayira nti: ‘Ezzadde lyo ndiriwa ensi eno,’ yennyini alikukulembezaamu malayika we, n'ofunira eyo mutabani wange omukazi." 
Genesis24:8 Omukazi bw'atalyagala kujja naawe, oliba tokyasibwa kirayiro kyange, naye ye mutabani wange tomuzzangayo.”" 
Genesis24:9 Omuweereza n'assa omukono wansi w'ekisambi kya Yiburayimu mukama we, n'amulayirira ku kigambo ekyo." 
Genesis24:10 Omuweereza mu ŋŋamiya za mukama we n'aggyamu kkumi, ne ku bintu bye byonna n'atoolako ebisinga obulungi, n'asitula n'alaga mu Aramu Nakarayimu, n'agenda ku kibuga Nakori." 
Genesis24:11 N'awummuza eŋŋamiya, ebweru w'ekibuga okumpi n'oluzzi, obudde bwali buwungeera, awo abakazi abakima amazzi we bafulumira." 
Genesis24:12 Ne yeegayirira nti: “Ayi Mukama Katonda wa mukama wange Yiburayimu, nkwegayiridde, mpa mbeere n'omukisa olwa leero, girira ekisa mukama wange Yiburayimu." 
Genesis24:13 Nzuuno nnyimiridde okumpi n'oluzzi, abawala b'abatuuze b'omu kibuga kino bagenda okufuluma okukima amazzi." 
Genesis24:14 Omuwala gwe nnaagamba nti: ‘Ssa ensuwa yo nnyweko,’ amala ayanukula nti: ‘Nywa, n'eŋŋamiya zo nzija kuzisenera zinywe,’ abeere oyo gwe wategekera omuweereza wo Yizaake. Ku ekyo kwe nnaategeerera nti mukama wange omugiridde ekisa.”" 
Genesis24:15 Yali tannamalayo bigambo ebyo nga ku Rebekka ono, muwala wa Betweli, mutabani wa Miluka muka Nakori muganda wa Yiburayimu. Yali afuluma; yali yeetisse ensuwa ku kibegabega." 
Genesis24:16 Yali muwala mulungi mu ndabika, mbeerera, nga mpaawo musajja yali amumanye. N'aserengeta ku luzzi, n'ajjuza ensuwa, n'ayambuka." 
Genesis24:17 Awo omuweereza n'ayanguwa mangu okumusisinkana, n'amwegayirira nti: “Mpa nnyweko katono ku tuzzi tw'omu nsuwa yo.”" 
Genesis24:18 Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Nywa, ssebo.” Amangu ago n'assaako wansi ensuwa mu mikono gye, n'amuwa anywe." 
Genesis24:19 Bwe yamala okunywa, Rebekka n'amugamba nti: “N'eŋŋamiya zo nzija kuzisenera zinywe, okutuusa nga zonna zinywedde.”" 
Genesis24:20 N'ayiwa amazzi mu byesero, n'addayo mangu ku luzzi asene amazzi; eŋŋamiya zonna n'azisenera." 
Genesis24:21 Ye omuweereza yalinga amutunuulidde ng'asirise, ng'ayagala okumanya oba Omukama olugendo aluwadde okulama, oba nedda." 
Genesis24:22 Eŋŋamiya bwe zaamala okunywa, omusajja n'aggyayo empeta ey'omu nnyindo eya zaabu ezitowa beka emu, n'obukomo bubiri nga buzitowa sekeri za zaabu kkumi." 
Genesis24:23 n'amubuuza nti: “Oli muwala wa ani? Mbuulira, mu nnyumba ya kitaawo waliwo ekifo we tuyinza okusula?”" 
Genesis24:24 Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Ndi muwala wa Betweli mutabani wa Miluka gwe yazaalira Nakori.” 
Genesis24:25 Era n'amugamba nti: “Omuddo n'essubi tulina nkumu, era n'ekifo ky'okusulamu gye kiri.”" 
Genesis24:26 Omusajja n'avunnama n'asinza Omukama 
Genesis24:27 nga bw'agamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wa mukama wange Yiburayimu atenderezebwe, oyo ataggya kisa kye na bwesige bwe ku mukama wange, antereerezza olugendo n'antuusa mu nnyumba y'eŋŋanda za mukama wange.”" 
Genesis24:28 Omuwala n'ayanguwa n'agenda ewa nnyina, n'anyumya byonna ebibaddewo." 
Genesis24:29 Kati nno Rebekka yalina mwannyina erinnya lye Labani; ono n'afuluma mbiro n'alaga eri omusajja ku luzzi. 
Genesis24:30 Bwe yalaba empeta mu nnyindo n'obukomo ku mikono gya mwannyina, ng'amaze n'okuwulira byonna Rebekka by'anyumya nti: “Bino omusajja by'aŋŋambye,” n'agenda eri omusajja. Yali ayimiridde kumpi n'eŋŋamiya okumpi n'oluzzi." 
Genesis24:31 N'amugamba nti: “Jjangu, ggwe Omukama gw'awadde omukisa; lwaki osigala ebweru? Ntegese ennyumba n'ekifo ky'eŋŋamiya.”" 
Genesis24:32 Awo omusajja n'ayingira mu nnyumba, n'atikkula eŋŋamiya n'aziwa omuddo n'essubi, ate naye ne bamuwa amazzi anaabe ebigere, ye n'abasajja abaali bazze naye." 
Genesis24:33 Awo ne bamusoosootolera emmere, naye ye n'agamba nti: “Sijja kulya, okutuusa nga mmaze okwogera ebigambo byange.” N'ayanukula nti: “Yogera.”" 
Genesis24:34 Ko ye nti: “Ndi muweereza wa Yiburayimu;
