Exodus12:2 “Mu mmwe omwezi guno gwe gujja okusookanga mu mirala gyonna; omwezi omubereberye mu mwaka gwammwe. 
Exodus12:3 Mwogere eri ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli, mubagambe nti: ‘Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi guno, buli musajja addiranga akaliga ku lw'ennyumba za bajjajjaabe, kamu buli nnyumba:" 
Exodus12:4 Oba mu nnyumba abalimu batono nga tebamalaawo kaliga, yeegattanga ne muliraanwa we asinga okumuba okumpi, okusinziira ku bungi bw'abantu. Obunene bw'akaliga mulibugerera ku buli omu ky'asobola okulya." 
Exodus12:5 Akaliga kabanga kalume, ka mwaka gumu akataliiko kamogo; muyinza n'okulonda akabuzi." 
Exodus12:6 Mukakuumanga okutuusa ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi ogwo, olwo ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne bakatta akawungeezi." 
Exodus12:7 Baddiranga ku musaayi gwako ne bagussa ku myango gyombi, ogw'obusimba n'ogw'obukiika, eby'ennyumba eyo mwe bakaliiridde." 
Exodus12:8 Ekiro ekyo ennyama balyanga njokye ku muliro; bagiriirangako n'omugaati ogutazimbulukuse n'enva ezikaawa ez'ettale. 
Exodus12:9 Temulyangako katundu kaayo n'akamu nga kabisi oba nga kafumbe mu mazzi, wabula nga kookye ku muliro, omutwe n'ebigere n'ebyenda byonna." 
Exodus12:10 Temulekangawo kantu kutuusa nkeera. Oba waliwo ekisigaddewo mukyokyanga. 
Exodus12:11 Mukalyanga bwe muti: Mwesibanga ekimyu mu kiwato, nga n'engatto zammwe zibali mu bigere byammwe; mukalyanga emiggo gyammwe gibali mu ngalo. Mukalyanga mu bwangu, anti eno ye Pasika y'Omukama." 
Exodus12:12 Mu kiro ekyo kyennyini, ndiyita mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne nkuba ebiggulanda byonna mu nsi y'e Misiri: omuntu n'ensolo. Balubaale bonna ab'e Misiri ndibabonereza. Nze Mukama." 
Exodus12:13 Omusaayi guliba akabonero ku mmwe, bwe ndiraba omusaayi, nga mbayitako ne muwona ekibonerezo eky'okuzikiriza ku olwo lwe ndikuba ensi y'e Misiri." 
Exodus12:14 Olunaku luno munaalujjukiranga; mulukuzanga ng'embaga olw'Omukama, muli ba kulukuzanga amazadde gammwe gonna. Etteeka lino lya mirembe gyonna." 
Exodus12:15 “ ‘Okumala ennaku musanvu munaalyanga migaati egitazimbulukuse. Ku lunaku olusooka, mu nnyumba zammwe, muggyangamu ekizimbulukusa, kubanga buli yenna alya emigaati egizimbulukuse okuva ku lunaku olusooka okutuusa ku lunaku olwomusanvu wa kukutulwanga ku Yisirayeli." 
Exodus12:16 Ku lunaku olusooka kunaabangako olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu, era ne ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Ku nnaku ezo temukolerangako mulimu gwonna, okuggyako okutegeka emmere buli omu gy'anaalya. Ekyo kyokka kye muyinza okukola." 
Exodus12:17 Embaga ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse mugikuzanga, kubanga ku lunaku olwo lwennyini kwe ndiggyira ebibinja byammwe byonna mu nsi y'e Misiri. Olunaku olwo mulukuzanga amazadde gammwe gonna. Etteeka lino lya mirembe gyonna." 
Exodus12:18 Mu mwezi ogw'olubereberye, okuva ku kawungeezi ak'olunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya, okutuusa ku kawungeezi ak'olunaku olwabiri mu olumu, mulyanga migaati gitazimbulukuse." 
Exodus12:19 Mu nnaku ezo omusanvu, mu nnyumba zammwe, temusangibwangamu kizimbulukusa, kubanga buli alirya emigaati egizimbulukuse, alikutulwa ku kibiina kya Yisirayeli, ne bw'aliba omugwira wadde omuzaaliranwa." 
Exodus12:20 Temulyanga migaati gizimbulukuse; yonna gye mubeeranga mulyanga migaati gitazimbulukuse.’ ” 
Exodus12:21 Musa n'atumya abakulu bonna aba Yisirayeli, n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mulondobemu akaliga ku lwa buli maka gammwe, mutte akaliga ka Pasika." 
Exodus12:22 Muddire akaganda aka yissopo, mukannyike mu musaayi oguli mu kibya, musiige waggulu ku mwango ogw'obukiika ne ku gw'obusimba, erudda n'erudda; tewabangawo n'omu mu mmwe afuluma nnyumba mw'ali, okutuusa enkeera," 
Exodus12:23 kubanga Omukama ajja kuyita mu nsi ng'agenda akuba Abamisiri. Bw'anaalaba omusaayi ku mwango ogwa waggulu ne ku myango erudda n'erudda, ajja kuyita buyisi ku mulyango gw'ennyumba, tajja kuleka oli azikiriza kujja ku nnyumba yammwe kubakuba." 
Exodus12:24 Ekigambo kino mukikwatenga; tteeka ku ggwe n'abaana bo emirembe gyonna. 
Exodus12:25 Bwe muliyingira mu nsi Omukama gy'alibawa nga bwe yasuubiza, emikolo gino mugikolanga." 
Exodus12:26 N'abaana bammwe bwe bababuuzanga nti omukolo guno gulina makulu ki gye muli? 
Exodus12:27 Mubabuuliranga nti: ‘Kye kitambiro kya Pasika ku lw'Omukama, eyayita ku nnyumba z'Abayisirayeli mu Misiri, amale atte Abamisiri, n'ataliza ennyumba zaffe.’ ” Abantu ne bavunnama ne basinza." 
Exodus12:28 Abayisirayeli ne bagenda, ne bakola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa ne Aroni." 
Exodus12:29 Mu ttumbi, Omukama n'atta buli kiggulanda kyonna mu nsi y'e Misiri, okuva ku muggulanda wa Faraawo eyali atudde ku nnamulondo, okutuukira ddala ku w'omusibe mu kkomera na buli kiggulanda eky'ekisolo." 
Exodus12:30 Faraawo n'azuukuka ekiro n'abakungu be bonna, n'Abamisiri bonna, ne wabaawo ebiwoobe binene mu Misiri, kubanga tewaaliwo nnyumba mutaali afudde." 
Exodus12:31 Ekiro ekyo, Faraawo n'atumya Musa ne Aroni, n'agamba nti: “Musituke mmwe n'Abayisirayeli muve mu bantu bange; mugende musinze Omukama nga bwe mwali musabye." 
Exodus12:32 Mutwale n'ebisibo byammwe, n'amagana gammwe nga bwe mwali musabye. Mugende, nange munsabire omukisa.”" 
Exodus12:33 Abamisiri nabo ne bapikiriza abantu banguwe, bave mu nsi nga bagamba nti: “Sikulwa nga ffenna tufa.”" 
Exodus12:34 Awo abantu ne bagenda nga basitudde ku bibegabega byabwe obutta obutazimbulukusiddwa mu bibbo mwe babugoyera, nga babizingidde mu ngoye." 
Exodus12:35 Abayisirayeli era ne bakola nga Musa bwe yali abalagidde, ne basaba Abamisiri ebintu ebya ffeeza ne zaabu n'ebyambalo." 
Exodus12:36 Omukama yawa abantu omukisa mu maaso g'Abamisiri, ne babawa bye baabasaba, ne baaya bwe batyo Abamisiri." 
Exodus12:37 Abayisirayeli ne batambula okuva e Raamesesi ne balaga e Sukkoti, nga bawera obusiriivu mukaaga abaali ku bigere, abasajja bokka obutabala bakazi na baana." 
Exodus12:38 N'abantu abalala bangi ne bambuka nabo, ssaako amagana g'endiga n'ag'ente mangi nnyo." 
Exodus12:39 Ne bafumba obutta bwe baali baggye e Misiri, ne bakola obugaati obutazimbulukuse kubanga tebaalina kizimbulukusa, anti Abamisiri baabagobaganya nga tebasobola kulwa oba kwekolera ntanda n'emu." 
Exodus12:40 Mu Misiri Abayisirayeli baali bamazeemu ebbanga lya myaka ebikumi bina mu asatu. 
Exodus12:41 Era ku lunaku olwo lwennyini emyaka ebikumi ebina mu asatu lwe gyawererako, eggye lyonna ery'Omukama lwe lyava mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Exodus12:42 Ekiro kino Abayisirayeli ba kukimalangako nga batunula olw'okugulumiza Omukama kubanga yakimalako ng'atunula ng'abaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Awo nno Abayisirayeli bonna ba kukikuzanga nga batunula mu mazadde gonna agalijja. 
Exodus12:43 Omukama n'agamba Musa ne Aroni nti: “Lino lye tteeka lya Pasika: Tewabangawo mugwira agiryako. 
Exodus12:44 Naye omuddu yenna eyagulwa obugulibwa ne ssente, ayinza okwetabamu bw'aba nga mwamutayirira." 
Exodus12:45 Omusenze wadde omupakasi takkirizibwa kugiryako. 
Exodus12:46 Ya kuliirwa mu nnyumba emu yokka, awatali kufulumya bweru wa nnyumba ku nnyama yaayo. Temumenyangako ggumba na limu." 
Exodus12:47 Ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli ba kukolanga ekyo buli omu. 
Exodus12:48 Bwe wabangawo omugwira mu mmwe ate ng'ayagala okukuza Pasika ku lw'Omukama, buli musajja yenna ow'omu maka ge, ateekwa kubeera nga mutayirire olwo lw'ayinza okukkirizibwa ku mukolo, kubanga afuuse ng'omuzaaliranwa. Naye atali mutayirire, talyangako." 
Exodus12:49 Etteeka lye limu likwata abazaaliranwa n'abagwira abatuuze mu mmwe.” 
Exodus12:50 Abayisirayeli bonna ne bakola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa ne Aroni. 
Exodus12:51 Era ku lunaku olwo lwennyini Omukama n'aggya mu Misiri Abayisirayeli mu bibinja byabwe. 
Exodus13:1 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus13:2 “Mpongera buli kiggulanda kyonna, ekiggulanda ekya buli lubuto eky'Abayisirayeli: abeere muntu oba kisolo, kyange.”" 
Exodus13:3 Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mujjukirenga olunaku luno lwe mwaviirako mu Misiri, mu nnyumba y'obuddu, kubanga Omukama yabaggyayo n'obuyinza bungi. Temulyanga nno kintu kirimu kizimbulukusa." 
Exodus13:4 Olwa leero, mu mwezi gwa Abibu, lwe muvaayo." 
Exodus13:5 Bwe kityo nno Omukama bw'akutuusanga mu nsi y'Abakanaani, Abakitti, Abaamori, Abakivi, n'Abayebusi, ensi gye yalayirira bajjajjaabo nti aligikuwa, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, okuzanga omukolo guno mu mwezi guno." 
Exodus13:6 Olyanga omugaati ogutazimbulukuse okumala ennaku musanvu; ate ku lunaku olwomusanvu okolanga embaga olw'Omukama. 
Exodus13:7 Omugaati ogutazimbulukuse gwe gw'okulyanga ennaku ezo omusanvu. Tewali kirimu kizimbulukusa n'ekimu kirabikanga mu mmwe, wadde ekizimbulukusa mu kitundu kyammwe kyonna." 
Exodus13:8 “Era ku olwo onnyonnyolanga omwana wo nti: ‘Kubanga Omukama ekyo kye yankolera lwe nava mu nsi y'e Misiri.’ 
Exodus13:9 Omukolo guno guliba ng'akabonero k'osibye ku mukono gwo oba ng'ekijjukizo ky'osibye ku kyenyi, etteeka ly'Omukama ne litakuva ku mimwa olubeerera, kubanga Omukama yakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri n'omukono ogw'amaanyi." 
Exodus13:10 Otuukirizanga etteeka lino mu kadde kaalyo akalagiddwa ebiro n'ebiro. 
Exodus13:11 “Omukama bw'akutuusanga mu nsi y'Abakanaani nga bwe yakulayirira ggwe ne bajjajjaabo n'agikuwa," 
Exodus13:12 Omukama omwawulizanga buli ekiggulanda ky'olubuto ekya buli kisolo kyo eky'awaka. Na buli mwana gwa nsolo omuggulanda nga musajja gwa Mukama. 
Exodus13:13 Endogoyi eggula enda oginunuzangayo akaliga, bw'oba toginunudde otyo, ogimenyanga ensingo. Ku baana bo, buli muggulanda omulenzi, omununulanga." 
Exodus13:14 Omwana wo bw'akubuuzanga nti: ‘Kino kitegeeza ki?’ Omuddangamu nti: ‘Omukama yatuggya mu nsi y'obuddu n'obuyinza obungi. 
Exodus13:15 Faraawo bwe yagugubya omutima n'atatuleka kugenda, Omukama yatta ebiggulanda byonna eby'olubuto mu nsi y'e Misiri: omuntu n'ensolo. Kyenva ntambirira Omukama buli kisolo ekisajja ekiggulanda na buli muggulanda mu baana bange ne mbanunula." 
Exodus13:16 Omukolo guliba ng'akabonero k'osiba ku mukono oba ng'ekintu ky'osiba ku kyenyi kyo kikujjukize, kubanga Omukama yatuggya mu Misiri n'obuyinza bungi.’ ”" 
Exodus13:17 Faraawo bwe yaleka abantu okugenda, Katonda teyabakwasa kkubo liraga mu nsi y'Abafilisitiini, newandibadde nga lye lyali ery'okumpi, kubanga Katonda yalowooza nti: “Bwe banaalaba obulabi ku lutalo bayinza okukyusa ekirowoozo ne baddayo mu Misiri.”" 
Exodus13:18 Kyeyava abakwasa ekkubo ery'eddungu eryetooloola okutuuka ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa. Abayisirayeli baava mu Misiri nga bambalidde ddala ebyokulwanyisa. 
Exodus13:19 Musa amagumba ga Yozefu yagenda nago. Yozefu yali alayizza Abayisirayeli ekirayiro. Yali agambye nti: “Mazima Katonda agenda kubalambula. Amagumba gange mugatwalanga okuva wano.” 
Exodus13:20 Ne bava e Sukkoti ne basiisira e Etamu eri eddungu gye likoma. 
Exodus13:21 Emisana Omukama yabakulemberangamu mu mpagi y'ekire okubalaga ekkubo, ate ekiro mu mpagi ey'omuliro okubamulisa, basobole okutambula bubeere misana oba kiro." 
Exodus13:22 Empagi ey'ekire emisana n'empagi ey'omuliro ekiro teyaviirangawo ddala awo mu maaso g'abantu. 
Exodus14:1 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus14:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli badde emabega basiisire mu maaso ga Pi-Akiroti, wakati wa Migudoli n'ennyanja ng'otunuulidde Baali-Zefoni; mujja kussa olusiisira mu maaso g'ekifo ekyo ku nnyanja." 
Exodus14:3 Faraawo ajja kwogera ku Bayisirayeli nti: ‘Balabe babungeeta bubungeesi mu nsi, eddungu libaggalidde.’" 
Exodus14:4 Nzija kukakanyaza omutima gwa Faraawo abawondere, nzija kwefunira ekitiibwa mu Faraawo n'eggye lye. Abamisiri bajja kutegeera nti nze Mukama.” Abayisirayeli ne bakola batyo." 
Exodus14:5 Kabaka w'e Misiri bwe baamubuulira nti abantu badduse, Faraawo n'abakungu be ne bakyusa endowooza yaabwe ku bantu, ne bagamba nti: “Kiki kino kye tukoze? Tukkirizza abantu bano ne bagenda, ne baleka wano emirimu gyaffe?”" 
Exodus14:6 Awo Faraawo n'ategeka ekigaali kye, n'akuŋŋaanya abatabaazi be," 
Exodus14:7 n'atwala ebigaali lukaaga ebirondobe, n'ebigaali ebirala byonna mu Misiri, buli kimu nga kiriko abagabe basatu." 
Exodus14:8 Omukama n'akakanyaza omutima gwa Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri, n'awondera Abayisirayeli, sso nabo baali bavaayo n'amaanyi mangi." 
Exodus14:9 Abamisiri ne bawondera, ne babatuukako we baali basiisidde okuliraana ennyanja e Pi-Akiroti, emitala wa Baali-Zefoni: embalaasi n'ebigaali bya Faraawo byonna n'abeebagazi n'eggye lye lyonna." 
Exodus14:10 Faraawo bwe yasembera okumpi, Abayisirayeli okusitula amaaso, nga ku Bamisiri, babawondera; ne batya nnyo, ne balaajanira Omukama." 
Exodus14:11 Ne bagamba Musa nti: “Mu Misiri temwali ntaana kyewava otuleeta okufiira eno mu ddungu? Kiki kino kye watukola okutuggya mu Misiri? 
Exodus14:12 Kino si kye twakugamba e Misiri nti nno tuveeko, tuleke tukolere Abamisiri kubanga okubakolera kyandisingako, okusinga okufiira mu ddungu.”" 
Exodus14:13 Musa n'addamu abantu nti: “Temutya, mugume. Munaalaba Omukama ky'anaabakolera okubawonya; Abamisiri be mulabyeko olwa leero, temujja kuddayo kubalaba emirembe gyonna." 
Exodus14:14 Omukama ajja kubalwanirira. Mmwe mwesirikire.” 
Exodus14:15 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Lwaki ondaajanira? Gamba Abayisirayeli batambule. 
Exodus14:16 Ggwe situla omuggo gwo, gololera omukono gwo ku nnyanja, ogyawulemu, Abayisirayeli, basomoke ennyanja nga batambulira ku ttaka ekkalu." 
Exodus14:17 Nze ku lwange, nzija kukakanyaza omutima gw'Abamisiri babawondere. Bwe ntyo nzija kwefunira ekitiibwa ku Faraawo n'eggye lye lyonna, n'ebigaali bye, n'abeebagazi be." 
Exodus14:18 Bwe nnaamala okwefunira ekitiibwa ku Faraawo n'ebigaali bye n'eggye lye, Abamisiri banaayiga nga nze Mukama.”" 
Exodus14:19 Awo malayika w'Omukama eyali atambulira mu maaso g'eggye lya Yisirayeli, n'akyusa ekifo, n'adda ennyuma. Empagi y'ekire n'ekyusa ekifo ng'eva mu maaso ne yeesimba ennyuma waabwe." 
Exodus14:20 N'ejja wakati w'eggye ly'Abamisiri n'ery'Abayisirayeli. Ekire kyali kireeta enzikiza ku luuyi olumu naye ate nga kimulisa ekiro ku luuyi olulala. Ekiro ne kiyita ng'amagye tegasembereraganye. 
Exodus14:21 Musa n'agololera omukono gwe ku nnyanja, Omukama n'afuuwa eri ennyanja n'empewo ey'amaanyi ey'ebuvanjuba ekiro kyonna, ennyanja n'agifuula olukalu, amazzi ne geeyawulamu." 
Exodus14:22 Abayisirayeli ne batambulira ku ttaka ekkalu mu nnyanja wakati ng'amazzi gakoze ebisenge ku ddyo waabwe ne ku kkono. 
Exodus14:23 Abamisiri ne bawondera. Ne bayingira ennyanja: embalaasi za Faraawo zonna, ebigaali bye n'abeebagazi be." 
Exodus14:24 Ku kisisimuka eky'oku makya, Omukama n'atunula wansi ku ggye ly'Abamisiri ng'ayima mu mpagi y'omuliro ne mu kire, n'alireetamu okutabukatabuka." 
Exodus14:25 N'asibaganya nnamuziga z'ebigaali byabwe nga babigobya buwaze. Abamisiri ne baleekaana nti: “Leka tudduke Abayisirayeli, kubanga Omukama y'alwanyisa Abamisiri ku lwabwe.”" 
Exodus14:26 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Gololera omukono gwo ku nnyanja, amazzi gaddeyo, gabuutikire Abamisiri, ebigaali byabwe n'abeebagazi baabwe.”" 
Exodus14:27 Musa n'agololera omukono gwe ku nnyanja. Obudde nga bukya, ennyanja n'edda mu kifo kyayo. Abamisiri bwe baali badduka ne bagiyingirira butereevu; Omukama n'asulinka Abamisiri wakati mu nnyanja." 
Exodus14:28 Amazzi bwe gaakomawo, ne gabikka ebigaali n'abeebagazi b'eggye lya Faraawo lyonna eryali liwondedde Abayisirayeli mu nnyanja, ne wataba n'omu ku bo awonawo." 
Exodus14:29 Naye bo Abayisirayeli baali bayise mu nnyanja wakati ku ttaka ekkalu ng'amazzi gakoze ebisenge ku ddyo waabwe ne ku kkono. 
Exodus14:30 Ku olwo Omukama yawonya Yisirayeli mu mikono gy'Abamisiri: Yisirayeli n'alaba Abamisiri nga bafu ku lubalama lw'ennyanja. 
Exodus14:31 Yisirayeli yalaba ekikolwa ekikulu Omukama kye yali akoze Abamisiri; abantu ne batya Katonda, ne bakkiriza Omukama ne Musa omuweereza we." 
Exodus15:1 Awo Musa n'Abayisirayeli ne bayimbira Omukama oluyimba luno, ne bagamba nti: “Ka nnyimbire Omukama oluyimba, kubanga ddala assukkulumye; embalaasi n'omwebagazi abikasuse mu nnyanja." 
Exodus15:2 Omukama ge maanyi gange, lye ttendo lyange, anfuukidde obulokofu. Ye Katonda wange nzija kumutenda, Katonda wa Jjajjange nzija kumugulumiza" 
Exodus15:3 Omukama mutabaazi; erinnya lye ye Mukama. 
Exodus15:4 Ebigaali bya Faraawo n'eggye lye abikasuse mu nnyanja; abagabe be ab'oku bigaali batokomokedde mu Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa. 
Exodus15:5 Eddubi libaziise, basse ku ntobo y'ennyanja ng'ejjinja." 
Exodus15:6 Omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, ayi Mukama, gwa kitiibwa n'obuyinza; omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, ayi Mukama, guseseggudde omulabe." 
Exodus15:7 N'obusukkirivu bw'ekitiibwa kyo, abakuwakanya obalindizze wansi; wata obusungu bwo, ne bubakavvula ng'akasubi obusubi." 
Exodus15:8 Bwe wassa oti mu mivumbo gyo, amazzi ne geetuuma; amayengo geesimba ng'ekisenge, amazzi ag'omu ddubi ne geekuŋŋaanyiza mu makkati g'ennyanja." 
Exodus15:9 Omulabe n'agamba nti: ‘Nzija kuwondera, mpambe. Nzija kugabanya omunyago, omwoyo gwange kinaagutoowolola. Nzija kusowola ekitala kyange, omukono gwange gunaabazikiriza.’" 
Exodus15:10 Bwe wafuuwa n'ekikkowe kyo, ennyanja n'ebabikka; bakka ng'essasi mu mazzi ag'entiisa." 
Exodus15:11 Mukama, ani ali nga ggwe mu balubaale? Ani akufaanana mu kitiibwa ne mu butuukirivu, ow'entiisa, atendebwa, akola ebyamagero?" 
Exodus15:12 Wagolola ddyo wo ensi n'ebamira. 
Exodus15:13 Mu kisa kyo wakulembera abantu bo be wanunula; n'amaanyi go olibatwala eri ekisulo kyo ekitukuvu. 
Exodus15:14 Amawanga bwe gaawulira ne gakankana, Okulumwa ng'okw'okuzaala ne kukwata abatuuze b'omu Filisitiya." 
Exodus15:15 Olwo abaami b'omu Edomu ne batengera; ab'obuyinza mu Mowabu ne bakwatibwa ensisi; abantu b'e Kanaani ne batekemuka. 
Exodus15:16 Okutya n'ensisi bibakutte; olw'obuyinza bw'omukono gwo, bakalambadde ng'ejjinja, okutuusa abantu bo lwe banaayitawo; Mukama, okutuusa lwe banaayitawo, abantu bo bano be weefunira." 
Exodus15:17 Olibatwala n'obasimba ku lusozi olw'obusika bwo, ekifo kye wakolera ekisulo kyo, Mukama, ekifo kyo ekitukuvu; Mukama, emikono gyo kye gyanyweza." 
Exodus15:18 Omukama aliramula emirembe n'emirembe.” 
Exodus15:19 Eggye lya Faraawo bwe lyayingira ennyanja, n'ebigaali bye n'abeebagazi, Omukama n'azza ku bo amazzi g'ennyanja, sso ng'Abayisirayeli baatambulira ku ttaka kkalu mu makkati gaayo." 
Exodus15:20 Miriyamu omulanzi, mwannyina Aroni n'akwata akagoma, abakazi bonna ne bavaayo ne bamugoberera n'obugoma nga bazina." 
Exodus15:21 Miriyamu n'abakulemberamu ng'ayimba nti: “Muyimbire Omukama, kubanga ddala asukkulumye; embalaasi n'omwebagazi abikasuse mu nnyanja.”" 
Exodus15:22 Awo Musa n'akulembera Yisirayeli ng'amuggya mu Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa, ne balaga mu ddungu ly'e Suru. Ne batambulira ennaku ssatu mu ddungu, nga tebasanze tuzzi n'akatono." 
Exodus15:23 Ne batuuka e Mara, ne batasobola kunywa mazzi g'e Mara, gaali gakaawa. Ekifo ekyo kyekyava kituumibwa Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Abantu ne bemulugunyiza Musa, ne bagamba nti: “Tunaanywa ki?”" 
Exodus15:25 Musa n'awanjagira Omukama. Omukama n'amulaga ekitundu ky'omuti; Musa n'agusuula mu mazzi, amazzi ne gawooma. Eyo Omukama gye yabassizaako ekiragiro n'etteeka. Eyo gye yabassiza ku kigezo." 
Exodus15:26 N'agamba nti: “Ggwe wamma, bwe muliwulira n'obwegendereza eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wammwe, ne mukola ekituufu mu maaso ge, bwe mulissa omwoyo ku biragiro bye ne mukwata amateeka ge gonna, sigenda kubaleetera ndwadde ze naleetera Abamisiri, kubanga Nze Mukama akuwonya.”" 
Exodus15:27 Awo ne batuuka e Elimu nga waliwo enzizi kkumi na bbiri ez'amazzi, n'enkindu nsanvu, ne bakuba awo olusiisira okumpi n'amazzi." 
Exodus16:1 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kiva e Elimu, ne kituuka mu ddungu ery'e Sini, wakati wa Elimu ne Sinayi, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwokubiri bukya bava mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Exodus16:2 Mu ddungu ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kisooka okwemulugunyiza Musa ne Aroni. 
Exodus16:3 Abayisirayeli ne babagamba nti: “Singa nno omukono gw'Omukama gwatuttira mu nsi y'e Misiri gye twatuuliranga ku ntamu z'ennyama, ne tulya emmere ne tukkuta. Naye mmwe mwatuleeta mu ddungu muno ekibiina ky'abantu bano bonna okukissa enjala.”" 
Exodus16:4 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Nze nzija kubatonnyeseza emigaati nga giva mu ggulu. Buli lunaku abantu banaafulumanga ebweru ne bakuŋŋaanya emmere ebamala olunaku olwo. Ka mbageze ndabe oba batambulira mu tteeka lyange oba nedda. 
Exodus16:5 Ku lunaku olwomukaaga banaategekanga kye banaayingiza; kinaabanga kya mirundi ebiri ng'ogerera ku kye bakuŋŋaanya buli lunaku.” 
Exodus16:6 Musa ne Aroni ne bagamba ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli nti: “Akawungeezi, mujja kumanya ng'Omukama ye yabaggya mu Misiri." 
Exodus16:7 Ate ku makya munaalaba ekitiibwa ky'Omukama, kubanga awulidde okwemulugunya kwammwe. Naffe ffe baani be mwemulugunyiza!”" 
Exodus16:8 Musa n'agamba nti: “Akawungeezi, Omukama anaabawa ennyama ey'okulya, ate enkya anaabawa emigaati ne mukkuta, kubanga Omukama awulidde okwemulugunya kwammwe. Naffe ffe baani? Temwemulugunyiza ffe, mwemulugunyiza Mukama.”" 
Exodus16:9 Musa n'agamba Aroni nti: “Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli bagambe bw'oti nti: ‘Musembere mu maaso g'Omukama, kubanga awulidde okwemulugunya kwammwe.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Aroni bwe yali ng'ayogera n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli, ne bakyukira eddungu. Gye baakuba amaaso nga ku kitiibwa ky'Omukama, kirabise mu kire." 
Exodus16:11 Omukama n'alyoka ayogera ne Musa n'agamba nti: 
Exodus16:12 “Mpulidde okwemulugunya kw'Abayisirayeli. Bagambe bw'oti nti: ‘Akawungeezi, munaalya ennyama, ate ku makya munakkuta emigaati. Olwo munaamanya nti nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Akawungeezi entiitiri n'esituka n'ebikka olusiisira; ku nkya omusulo ne guwemberera okwetooloola olusiisira. 
Exodus16:14 Bwe gwakala, ne walabikawo mu ddungu obuntu obuli ng'obubooya obwekulungirivu ku ttaka, ate nga buli ng'obuweke bw'omuzira." 
Exodus16:15 Abayisirayeli bwe baalaba kino, ne bagambagana nti: “Kiki kino?” Kubanga baali tebakimanyi. Musa n'agamba nti: “Eyo ye mmere Omukama gy'abawadde okulya." 
Exodus16:16 Kino Omukama ky'alagidde: buli omu yeekuŋŋaanyize ekimumala okulya. Munaakuŋŋaanyanga komeri emu buli muntu okugerera ku bungi bw'abantu buli omu b'alina mu weema ye.” 
Exodus16:17 Abayisirayeli ne bakola batyo, ne bakuŋŋaanya abamu nnyingi abalala ntono." 
Exodus16:18 Bwe baapima mu komeri, eyakuŋŋaanya ennyingi teyamuyitirira, n'eyakuŋŋaanya entono teyajula; buli omu yali ng'akuŋŋaanyizza gye yali yeetaaga okulya." 
Exodus16:19 Musa n'abagamba nti: “Tewabangawo aterekako okutuusa enkeera.” 
Exodus16:20 Naye abantu abamu ne batawuliriza Musa, ne baterekako okutuusa enkeera. Yajjamu envunyu, n'ewunya ekivundu. Musa n'abasunguwalira." 
Exodus16:21 Baagikuŋŋaanyanga buli nkya okusinziira ku buli omu ky'alya; obudde bwe bwakaalaamanga, ng'eseebengerera." 
Exodus16:22 Ku lunaku lwomukaaga, baakuŋŋaanyanga emmere ya mirundi ebiri, komeri bbiri buli omu. Abakulembeze b'ebibiina bonna ne bajja okubuulira Musa." 
Exodus16:23 N'abagamba nti: “Kino Omukama ky'alagidde: Enkya lunaku lwa kuwummula, ye Sabbaato eyawuliddwa Omukama. Mufumbe gye mwagala okufumba, mutokose gye mwagala okutokosa, esigaddewo mugitereke okutuusa enkya.”" 
Exodus16:24 Ne bagitereka okutuusa enkeera nga Musa bwe yali abalagidde. Olwo emmere teyawunya, wadde okujjamu envunyu." 
Exodus16:25 Musa n'agamba nti: “Mugirye, olwa leero ye Sabbaato, lunaku lwa Mukama; temujja kusanga kantu wansi olwa leero." 
Exodus16:26 Mugikuŋŋaanyizanga mu nnaku mukaaga; naye ku lunaku olwomusanvu, Sabbaato ya Mukama; tewaaberenga kantu.”" 
Exodus16:27 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu, ne wabaawo abamu abaava mu lusiisira okugenda okugikuŋŋaanya, naye tebaasanga kantu." 
Exodus16:28 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Munaatuusa wa okugaana okukwata amateeka gange n'ebiragiro? 
Exodus16:29 Muwulire. Omukama yabassizaawo Sabbaato, kyava abawa emmere ya nnaku bbiri ku lwomukaaga. Ku lwomusanvu, buli omu mu mmwe asigalanga w'ali, tewabanga ava mu kifo kye.”" 
Exodus16:30 Bwe kityo nno ku lunaku olwomusanvu, abantu ne bawummula." 
Exodus16:31 Emmere eyo ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yagituuma Manu. Yali efaanana ng'ensigo za jjada; yali njeru, ate obuwoomi bwayo nga buli ng'amandaazi omuli omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Exodus16:32 Musa n'agamba nti: “Kino Omukama ky'alagidde: ‘Mugijjuze mu komeri, eterekerwe bazzukulu bammwe, basobole okulaba emmere gye mbaliisizza mu ddungu nga muggyibwa mu nsi y'e Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 Musa n'agamba Aroni nti: “Ddira ekibya okisseemu komeri nnamba eya manu, ogisse mu maaso g'Omukama, eterekerwe bazzukulu bammwe.”" 
Exodus16:34 Ng'Omukama bwe yalagira Musa, Aroni bw'atyo n'agissa mu maaso g'Endagaano eterekebwenga eyo." 
Exodus16:35 Abayisirayeli baalya manu okumala emyaka ana, okutuusa lwe baatuuka mu nsi ebeerekamu. Baalya manu okutuusa lwe baatuuka ku nsalo n'ensi y'e Kanaani." 
Exodus16:36 Komeri kye kitundu eky'ekkumi ekya efa. 
Exodus17:1 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kisitula okuva mu ddungu ly'e Sini, nga batambula ng'Omukama bwe yabalagiranga; ne basiisira e Refidimu kyokka awataali mazzi ga bantu kunywa." 
Exodus17:2 Ne bayombesa Musa, ne bagamba nti: “Tuwe amazzi tunywe.” Musa n'abaddamu nti: “Lwaki munnyombesa? Lwaki mugeza Omukama?”" 
Exodus17:3 Abantu nga babonaaboneddeyo ennyonta, ne beemulugunyiza Musa, ne bagamba nti: “Lwaki watuggya e Misiri, okutussiza kuno ennyonta ffe n'abaana baffe n'amagana gaffe?”" 
Exodus17:4 Musa n'awanjagira Omukama, n'agamba nti: “Abantu bano nnaabakolera ki? Mu bbanga ttono bajja kunkuba amayinja.”" 
Exodus17:5 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Ddira abamu ku bakulu ba Yisirayeli, ogende mu maaso g'abantu; kwata mu mukono gwo omuggo gwe wakubisa Kiyira, ogende." 
Exodus17:6 Nzija kuyimirira awo mu maaso go ku lwazi lw'e Korebu. Ojja kukuba olwazi, lujja kuvaamu amazzi, banywe.” Musa bwe yakola n'abakulu b'Abayisirayeli nga weebali." 
Exodus17:7 Ekifo n'akituuma Massa ne Meriba olw'okuyomba kw'Abayisirayeli n'olw'okugeza Omukama nga bagamba nti: “Omukama ali naffe, oba nedda?”" 
Exodus17:8 Abaamaleki ne bajja ne balumba Yisirayeli e Refidimu. 
Exodus17:9 Musa n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Weerondere abasajja; enkya ku makya, genda mukwatagane ne Amaleki. Mu budde obwo, nze nzija kuyimirira ku ntikko y'akasozi, n'omuggo gwa Katonda mu mukono gwange.”" 
Exodus17:10 Yoswa n'akola nga Musa bwe yamugamba n'agenda okukwatagana ne Amaleki; Musa ne Aroni ne Kuru bo ne balinnya ku ntikko y'akasozi. 
Exodus17:11 Musa bwe yawanikanga emikono, Yisirayeli ng'agoba; bwe yagissanga, olwo Amaleki nga y'agoba." 
Exodus17:12 Emikono gya Musa bwe gyatendewererwa ne baddira ejjinja, ne balissa wansi, n'alituulako. Aroni ne Kuru ne bawanirira emikono gye, omu ku luuyi olumu, omulala ku ludda olulala; emikono gye ne ginywera okutuusa enjuba okugwa." 
Exodus17:13 Yoswa n'agoba Amaleki n'eggye lye n'obwogi bw'ekitala. 
Exodus17:14 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Kino kiwandiike mu kitabo ng'ekijjukizo, ne Yoswa kimusse mu kutu nti: ‘Nzija kusangulirawo ddala wansi w'eggulu Abaamaleki kwe bandijjuukiriddwa.’ ”" 
Exodus17:15 Olwo Musa kwe kuzimba omwaliiro n'agutuuma Yawe Nissi. 
Exodus17:16 Kubanga yagamba nti: “Kwata bendera y'Omukama. Omukama wa kulwanyisa Amaleki mu mazadde n'amazadde.” 
Exodus18:1 Yeturo kabona w'e Midiyaani, mukoddomi wa Musa, n'awulira byonna Katonda bye yali akoledde Musa n'eggwanga lye Abayisirayeli, era ng'Omukama bwe yali aggye Yisirayeli mu Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Yeturo, mukoddomi wa Musa n'atwala Zippora muka Musa gwe yali alese," 
Exodus18:3 ne batabani be babiri; omu ng'ayitibwa Gerusomu, kubanga yagamba nti: “Ndi musenze mu nsi eteri y'ewaffe;”" 
Exodus18:4 erinnya ly'omulala nga ye Eliyezeri: ng'agamba nti “Katonda wa kitange ye muyambi wange ye yamponya ekitala kya Faraawo.” 
Exodus18:5 Yeturo mukoddomi wa Musa n'ajja eri Musa mu ddungu ne muka Musa n'abaana be, awaali olusiisira, ku lusozi lwa Katonda;" 
Exodus18:6 n'atuma eri Musa ng'agamba nti: “Nze Yeturo mukoddomi wo, nzija gy'oli: nzize ne mukazi wo ne batabani be bombi bali naye.”" 
Exodus18:7 Musa n'afuluma okusisinkana mukoddomi we, n'avunnama, n'amunywegera, ne balamusaganya ne bayingira mu weema." 
Exodus18:8 Musa n'anyumiza mukoddomi we byonna Omukama bye yali akoze Faraawo n'Abamisiri ku lwa Yisirayeli, n'ebizibu byonna ebyali bibatuukiridde mu kkubo, era ng'Omukama bwe yabawonya." 
Exodus18:9 Yeturo n'asanyukira ebirungi byonna Omukama bye yali akoledde Yisirayeli ng'amuwonya mu mikono gy'Abamisiri. 
Exodus18:10 N'agamba nti: “Omukama agulumizibwe eyabawonya ng'abaggya mu mikono gy'Abamisiri ne mu gya Faraawo, eyawonya abantu ng'abaggya mu mikono gy'Abamisiri." 
Exodus18:11 Kaakano mmanyi ng'Omukama mukulu okusinga balubaale bonna…” 
Exodus18:12 Yeturo mukoddomi wa Musa n'aweereza Katonda ekitambiro ekyokye n'ebyonziira, ne Aroni n'ajja n'abakulu b'Abayisirayeli ne batuula ku kijjulo mu maaso ga Katonda awamu ne mukoddomi wa Musa." 
Exodus18:13 Enkeera, Musa n'atuula ku ntebe ye okulamula abantu; ne bayimirira nga bamwetoolodde okuva enkya okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Exodus18:14 Mukoddomi wa Musa bwe yalaba byonna bye yakoleranga abantu, n'amubuuza nti: “Kiki kino ky'okolera abantu? Lwaki otuula wano wekka abantu ne bakwetooloola okuva ku makya okutuusa akawungeezi?”" 
Exodus18:15 Musa n'addamu mukoddomi we nti: “Abantu bajja gye ndi okwebuuza ku bya Katonda n'amateeka ge. 
Exodus18:16 Bwe babaako enkaayana, bajja gye ndi ne mbatawulula, ne mbayigiriza ebiragiro bya Katonda n'amateeka ge.”" 
Exodus18:17 Mukoddomi wa Musa n'amugamba nti: “Ky'okola si kirungi. 
Exodus18:18 Weekooyeza bwereere ggwe n'abantu abali naawe. Omulimu gukuyitiridde. Toyinza kugukola wekka. 
Exodus18:19 Kwata amagezi gange, ne Katonda abeere naawe. Ggwe beerawo mu kifo ky'abantu mu maaso ga Katonda, olyoke otuuseeyo ensonga zaabwe eri Katonda." 
Exodus18:20 Abantu booleke ebiragiro n'amateeka, obamanyise ekkubo lye bateekwa okukwata ne kye bateekwa okukola." 
Exodus18:21 Naye londa mu bantu bonna abasajja abamu, abeesobola, abatya Katonda, abeesigwa, ate abaakyawa enguzi, obafuule abakulembeze b'enkumi z'abantu, n'ebikumi, n'ataano n'amakumi." 
Exodus18:22 Abo be baba balamula abantu obudde bwonna; ensonga ennene ze baba bakuleetera; entono bo bazimale. Bw'onoogabanya bw'otyo omugugu gwo mu balala, banaakwetikkirako ne gukuwewukira." 
Exodus18:23 Bw'onookola otyo, n'otuusa ne Katonda ky'alagidde, ojja kusigala ng'oli mugumu, n'abantu bonna bano banaddangayo ewaabwe nga bamatidde.”" 
Exodus18:24 Musa n'akwata ebibuuliriro bya mukoddomi we n'akola byonna bye yali amugambye; 
Exodus18:25 n'alonda abasajja abeesobola okuva mu Yisirayeli yonna, n'abassaawo ng'abakulu ku bantu babe abagabe b'enkumi, n'ebikumi, n'ataano n'amakumi." 
Exodus18:26 Ne balamulanga abantu obudde bwonna; ensonga enzibu nga zo ze banjulira Musa, ate zonna entono nga bo bazimala." 
Exodus18:27 Awo Musa n'asiibula mukoddomi we, ye n'akwata ekkubo n'adda eka mu nsi yaboobwe." 
Exodus19:1 Ku lunaku Abayisirayeli kwe baawereza emyezi esatu bukya bava mu Misiri, ne batuuka mu ddungu Sinayi." 
Exodus19:2 Baava e Refidimu ne batuuka mu ddungu Sinayi ne basiisira mu ddungu omwo; eyo, mu maaso g'olusozi, Yisirayeli gye yasiisira." 
Exodus19:3 Awo Musa n'ayambuka eri Katonda, Omukama n'amuyita ng'ayima mu lusozi n'agamba nti: “Bino bigambe ennyumba ya Yakobo, buulira Abayisirayeli," 
Exodus19:4 nti: ‘Mmwe mwennyini mulabye bye nakola Abamisiri ne bwe nabasitulira ku biwaawaatiro by'empungu ne mbaleeta we ndi. 
Exodus19:5 Kale nno bwe munaawuliriza eddoboozi lyange, ne mukuuma endagaano yange, mmwe mu mawanga gonna munaabanga kkula lyange, newandibadde ng'ensi yonna yange." 
Exodus19:6 Gye ndi munaabanga bwakabaka obwa bakabona, eggwanga ettukuvu.’ Ebyo bye bigambo by'ojja okugamba Abayisirayeli.”" 
Exodus19:7 Musa n'agenda n'atumya abakulu b'abantu n'abanjulira ebyo byonna Omukama bye yali amulagidde. 
Exodus19:8 Abantu bonna ne baddiramu wamu nti: “Byonna Omukama by'agambye tunaabitusanga.” Musa n'azzaayo eri Omukama abantu bye baali baanukudde. 
Exodus19:9 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Nzija kujja gy'oli mu kire ekikwafu, abantu balyoke bawulire nga bwe njogera naawe basobole okukukkiriza bulijjo.” Ne Musa n'azzaayo eri Omukama abantu bye bagambye." 
Exodus19:10 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Genda eri abantu, obatukuze olwa leero n'enkya. Booze ebyambalo byabwe." 
Exodus19:11 Beetegekere olunaku olwokusatu, kubanga ku lunaku olwokusatu, Omukama ajja kukka ku lusozi Sinayi ng'abantu bonna balaba." 
Exodus19:12 Abantu bakomere okwetooloola olusozi, obagambe nti: ‘Mwegendereze obutalinnya ku lusozi, wadde okukoona ku nsalo zaalwo; buli akoona ku lusozi, awatali kubuusabuusa, wa kuttibwa." 
Exodus19:13 Tewabanga alukwatako, wa kukubibwa mayinja oba okukubwa akasaale, ne bwe kiribeera ekisolo oba omuntu, talirama. Eŋŋombe y'ejjembe ly'endiga ennume bw'erivuga n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, olwo nga bambuka ku lusozi.’ ”" 
Exodus19:14 Awo Musa n'akka wansi w'olusozi eri abantu; n'abatukuza ne booza ebyambalo byabwe. 
Exodus19:15 Musa n'abagamba nti: “Mwetegekere olunaku olwokusatu; temusemberera omukazi.” 
Exodus19:16 Bwe bwakya ku lunaku olwokusatu, ne wabaawo okubwatuka, okwa laddu n'ebimyanso, n'ekire ekikwafu ku lusozi; ko eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe ery'amaanyi ennyo; mu lusiisira abantu ne bajugumira." 
Exodus19:17 Musa n'afulumya abantu mu lusiisira okusisinkana Katonda; ne bayimirira wansi w'olusozi. 
Exodus19:18 Olusozi Sinayi lwonna lwali luttunka omukka, kubanga Omukama yali alukkiddeko mu muliro. Omukka nga guttunka kuli ng'omukka oguva mu kabiga. Olusozi lwonna ne lukankana nnyo." 
Exodus19:19 Eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe ne ligenda nga lyeyongera ne likanya nnyo. Musa n'ayogera, Katonda n'amuddiramu mu laddu." 
Exodus19:20 Omukama n'akka ku lusozi Sinayi ku ntikko y'olusozi; Omukama n'ayita Musa ayambuke ku ntikko y'olusozi; Musa n'ayambuka. 
Exodus19:21 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Kkirira olabule abantu, sikulwa nga bawaguza okujja ew'Omukama okulaba, ate abangi mu bo ne bafa." 
Exodus19:22 Newandibadde bakabona, abantu abasemberera Omukama, nabo bateekwa okwetukuza, sikulwa ng'abamalirako obusungu.”" 
Exodus19:23 Musa n'addamu Omukama nti: “Abantu tebayinza kujja ku lusozi lwa Sinayi, kubanga watulabula ggwe wennyini lwe wagamba nti: ‘Komera olusozi okwetooloola era olwawule nti lutukuvu.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Serengeta, ate oyambuke okomewo, oleeta ne Aroni. Naye tokkiriza kabona oba abantu okuwaguza okujja eri Omukama, sikulwa ng'abamalirako obusungu.”" 
Exodus19:25 Musa n'aserengeta eri abantu, n'abagamba." 
Exodus20:1 Katonda n'ayogera ebigambo bino byonna, n'agamba nti:" 
Exodus20:2 “Nze Mukama Katonda wo eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu nnyumba y'obuddu." 
Exodus20:3 “Tobanga na balubaale we ndi. 
Exodus20:4 “Teweekoleranga kifaananyi kyole oba enfaanana ey'ekintu kyonna ekiri mu ggulu waggulu, oba ekiri ku nsi wansi, oba mu mazzi ku ntobo y'ensi." 
Exodus20:5 “Tobivunnamiranga era tobiweerezanga. Kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wo, ndi Katonda ow'obuggya; mbonereza omusango gw'abazadde mu baana n'abazzukulu okutuusa ku zzadde eryokusatu n'eryokuna ery'abo abankyawa;" 
Exodus20:6 naye ngirira ekisa enkumi z'abo abanjagala era abakwata ebiragiro byange. 
Exodus20:7 “Tokozesanga linnya lya Mukama Katonda wo mu bitaliimu, kubanga Omukama talibala oyo akozesezza erinnya lye mu bitaliimu ng'atalina musango." 
Exodus20:8 “Ojjukiranga olunaku lwa Sabbaato n'olutukuza. 
Exodus20:9 Onookoleranga ennaku mukaaga n'okola emirimu gyo gyonna. 
Exodus20:10 Naye olunaku olwomusanvu ye Sabbaato ku lw'Omukama Katonda wo. Tokolanga mulimu ku olwo, ggwe, newandibadde nga mutabani wo, newandibadde muwala wo, newandibadde abaddu bo abasajja n'abakazi, newandibadde ebisolo byo, newandibadde omusenze ali naawe mu kibuga kyo." 
Exodus20:11 Kubanga Omukama yakola eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja n'ebyo byonna ebizirimu mu nnaku mukaaga, naye ku lunaku olwomusanvu n'awummula; Omukama kyeyava awa olunaku lwa Sabbaato omukisa n'alufuula lutukuvu." 
Exodus20:12 “Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa olyoke owangaale ku nsi Omukama Katonda gy'alikuwa. 
Exodus20:13 “Tottanga. 
Exodus20:14 “Toyendanga. 
Exodus20:15 “Tobbanga. 
Exodus20:16 “Towanga bujulizi bwa bulimba ku munno. 
Exodus20:17 “Teweegombanga nnyumba ya munno. Teweegombanga mukazi wa munno, oba omuddu we omusajja oba omukazi, oba ente ye, oba endogoyi ye, na buli kikye.”" 
Exodus20:18 Abantu bonna ne balaba okubwatuka, ebimyanso, eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe, n'olusozi nga luttunka erikka, ne batya ne bakankana ensisi, ne bayimirira wala." 
Exodus20:19 Ne bagamba Musa nti: “Ggwe oba oyogera naffe, tujja kuwuliriza; naye sso si Mukama y'aba ayogera naffe, sikulwa nga tufa.”" 
Exodus20:20 Musa n'addamu abantu nti: “Muleke kutya, kubanga Katonda azze kubageza, alabe oba munaamutyanga bulijjo, ekyo kibaleseeyo okwonoona.”" 
Exodus20:21 Abantu ne bayimirira wala; Musa n'asemberera enzikiza ekutte Katonda mwe yali. 
Exodus20:22 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Bw'oti bw'oba ogamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Mulabye bwe njogedde nammwe nga nnyima mu ggulu. 
Exodus20:23 Temukolanga balubaale ba ffeeza we ndi. Temwekoleranga balubaale ba zaabu. 
Exodus20:24 Munkoleranga omwaliiro ogw'ettaka kwe munantambiriranga ebitambiro byammwe ebyokye, n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu: endiga, embuzi zammwe n'ente. Mu buli kifo we najjuukiririzanga erinnya lyange, nnaajjanga gye muli ne mbawa omukisa." 
Exodus20:25 Bwe munkolera omwaliiro ogw'amayinja temuguzimbyanga mayinja mabajje, kubanga bwe mugussaako ekyuma nga mugukola, mugwonoona." 
Exodus20:26 Toyambukanga ku mwaliiro gwange ng'olinnyira ku madaala, sikulwa ng'ogukunamirako.’ ”" 
Exodus21:1 “Gano ge mateeka g'onoobateerawo: 
Exodus21:2 “Bw'ogula omuddu Omwebureeyi, anaaweererezanga emyaka mukaaga. Mu mwaka ogwomusanvu wa kuteebwanga, awatali kusasula kwonna." 
Exodus21:3 Oba yajja bw'omu, agendanga bw'omu. Kyokka bw'abanga omufumbo, mukazi we agendanga naye." 
Exodus21:4 Mukama we oba yamuwa omukazi n'amuzaalira abaana abalenzi n'abawala, omukazi n'abaana banaabanga ba mukama we; ye agendanga yekka." 
Exodus21:5 Naye omuddu bw'agambanga nti: ‘Njagala mukama wange ne mukazi wange n'abaana bange, sijja kuteebwa,’" 
Exodus21:6 awo mukama we amutwalanga eri Katonda 
Exodus21:7 Omuntu bw'atundanga muwala we ng'omuzaana, omuzaana eddembe lye teriimuddizibwenga nga bwe kiri ku baddu abasajja." 
Exodus21:8 Oba tasanyusa mukama we eyamwefunira, amuleke anunulibwe, kyokka tamuguzanga bagwira, kubanga amwefuulidde." 
Exodus21:9 Bw'ayagala mutabani we amuwase, amuyisanga ng'etteeka bwe ligamba ku baana abawala." 
Exodus21:10 Bw'afunanga omukazi omulala, takendeezanga ku mmere ya mubereberye, ku byambalo bye oba ku kusula naye." 
Exodus21:11 Singa amulyazaamanya mu bino ebisatu, omukazi ayinza okugenda mu ddembe, awatali kusasula ssente n'emu." 
Exodus21:12 “Buli yenna akuba omuntu n'amutta naddala mu bugenderevu, naye wa kuttibwanga." 
Exodus21:13 Oba tagenderedde, naye Katonda nga y'amuleka n'afiira mu mikono gye, nzija kubassizaawo ekifo gy'ayinza okuddukira." 
Exodus21:14 Naye singa omuntu alikolera munne obubi n'amutta mu bugenderevu, ne bw'abeeranga ku mwaliiro gwange, mumuggyangako n'attibwa." 
Exodus21:15 “Buli yenna akuba kitaawe oba nnyina anattibwanga. 
Exodus21:16 Buli abuza omuntu, oba amutunze, oba asangiddwa ng'akyamulina, wa kuttibwanga." 
Exodus21:17 Buli avumiriranga kitaawe oba nnyina, wa kuttibwanga." 
Exodus21:18 “Abantu bwe bayombanga, omu n'akuba munne ejjinja oba ekikonde, omuntu oyo n'atafa naye ne kimutuusa ku ndiri," 
Exodus21:19 eyakuba taavunaanibwenga, kasita oli asituka n'asobola okutambulatambulako ng'asimba akaggo. Kyokka ateekwa okumugatta, olw'okumulobera okukola, era wa kumulabirira okutuusa lw'awonera ddala." 
Exodus21:20 “Omuntu bw'akubanga omuddu we oba omuzaana we, n'amala afiira mu mikono gye, wa kubonerezebwanga." 
Exodus21:21 Naye singa omuddu abeera mulamu okumala olunaku lumu oba bbiri, taabonerezebwenga, kubanga omuddu wuwe yamugula." 
Exodus21:22 “Abantu bwe balwananga, bamala bakuba omukazi ali olubuto ne luvaamu, newandibadde nga tafunye buvune, omuntu akikoze ateekwa okusasula engassi nnyini mukazi gy'amusalidde; agiwangayo okusinziira ku nsala y'abalamuzi." 
Exodus21:23 Naye singa afuna obuvune obusingawo, olwo munaawangayo obulamu olw'obulamu," 
Exodus21:24 liiso olw'eriiso, linnyo olw'erinnyo, omukono olw'omukono, n'ekigere olw'ekigere," 
Exodus21:25 kwokebwa olw'okwokebwa, kiwundu olw'ekiwundu, n'omuggo olw'omuggo." 
Exodus21:26 “Omuntu bw'akuba eriiso ly'omuddu we oba ery'omuzaana we, n'alyonoona, ateekeddwa okumutanga, agatte bw'atyo eriiso lye." 
Exodus21:27 Bw'akuba erinnyo ly'omuddu we oba ery'omuzaana we, ateekeddwa okumutanga, agatte bw'atyo erinnyo lye." 
Exodus21:28 “Ente ennume bw'etomeranga omusajja oba omukazi n'afa, eneekubwanga amayinja; ennyama yaayo teeriibwenga, naye nnyiniyo taavunaanibwenga." 
Exodus21:29 Naye oba ente yali ntomezi mu kusooka, ate nga ne nnyiniyo yalabulibwa kyokka n'atagikuuma, olwo ente eyo bw'ettanga omusajja oba omukazi, yo eneekubwanga amayinja, ne nnyiniyo anattibwanga." 
Exodus21:30 Oba nga bamusalidde omutango, asasulanga buli kyonna ekimusaliddwa, alyoke anunule obulamu bwe." 
Exodus21:31 Singa etomera omulenzi oba omuwala, aliyisibwa ng'etteeka lino lyennyini bwe ligamba." 
Exodus21:32 “Singa etomera omuddu oba omuzaana, nnannyiniyo ateekwa okusasula mukama we sekeli amakumi asatu, n'ente eneekubwanga amayinja." 
Exodus21:33 “Omuntu bw'abikkula ekinnya oba bw'akisima n'atakibikkako, ente emala ekigwamu oba endogoyi," 
Exodus21:34 nnannyini kinnya aliwanga okufiirizibwa okwo; ssente aziwanga nnannyini nte, eri enfu n'eba yiye." 
Exodus21:35 Singa ente ennume ey'omuntu omu erumya ey'omulala n'egitta, banaatundanga ente ennamu ne bagabana ssente; n'eri ettiddwa banaagigabananga." 
Exodus21:36 Naye oba kimanyiddwa ng'ente eyo yali ntomezi mu kusooka, nnannyiniyo n'atagikuuma, ateekwa okuzzaawo ente mu kifo ky'ente ettiddwa, eri enfu n'eba yiye." 
Exodus21:37 “Omuntu bw'abbanga ente ennume oba endiga, n'agitta oba n'agitunda, ateekwanga okuliwa n'ente ttaano olw'ente emu, n'endiga nnya olw'endiga emu.”" 
Exodus22:1 Omubbi bw'asangibwa ng'amenya ennyumba, amala akubibwa n'afa, amusse taavunaanibwenga gwa kuyiwa musaayi." 
Exodus22:2 “Omubbi y'anaaliwanga. Oba talina kantu, atundibwanga okusasulira by'abbye. Naye kino bwe kibaawo ng'enjuba evuddeyo, amusse anaavunaanibwanga ogw'okuyiwa omusaayi; anaaliwanga." 
Exodus22:3 Ensolo gy'abbye bwe bamukwatanga nayo olubona nga nnamu, oba nte oba endogoyi oba endiga, asasulanga emirundi ebiri." 
Exodus22:4 “Omuntu bw'atwalanga ebisolo bye ku ttale oba mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu okulya, amala abireka okuliira mu nnimiro y'omulala, anaaliwanga ng'aggya ku kitundu ky'ennimiro ye oba emizabbibu gye ekisingira ddala obulungi." 
Exodus22:5 “Omuliro bwe gukwatanga ne gusaasaana ne gukoleeza obusaka bw'amaggwa ne guzikiriza eŋŋano entuume, oba etennakungulwa mu musiri, eyagukoleezezza anaawanga engassi." 
Exodus22:6 “Oli bw'abanga ateresezza omulala ssente oba ebintu, bimala bibbirwa mu nnyumba ye, singa omubbi asobola okukwatibwa, anaateekwanga okusasula emirundi ebiri;" 
Exodus22:7 singa omubbi takwatibwa, nnannyini nnyumba ateekwa okukakasa mu maaso ga Katonda nti teyakwata ku bintu bya munne." 
Exodus22:8 Mu buli nsonga edda ku misango gy'ente, endogoyi, endiga, ekyambalo, oba ekintu kyonna ekibuze omu ky'agamba nti: ‘Kino kyange,’ enkaayana zaabwe zinaaletebwanga mu maaso ga Katonda, Katonda gw'anaasingisanga omusango, anaasasulanga omulala emirundi ebiri." 
Exodus22:9 “Oba omuntu yasibira ewa munne endogoyi, ente, endiga oba ekisolo ekirala kyonna, kimala kifa oba ne kimenyeka, oba ne kitwalibwa awatali mujulirwa," 
Exodus22:10 ekirayiro ew'Omukama kye kinaasalangawo wakati w'enjuyi zombi oba ng'eyateresebwa yakwata ku kintu ky'omulala oba nedda. Nnannyinikyo anakkirizanga ekirayiro, n'oli taaliwenga kantu." 
Exodus22:11 Naye oba ng'ekisolo kyamubbibwako, ateekwa okuwa nnannyinikyo engassi." 
Exodus22:12 Naye oba ekisolo ensolo enkambwe ye yakirya ateekwa okuleeta ebitaaguju bubeere obujulizi; olwo tagenda kuliwa. 
Exodus22:13 “Omuntu bwe yeeyazika ekisolo ku mulala, ne kimenyeka oba ne kifa nga nnannyinikyo taliiwo, eyakyeyazika ateekwa okuliwa." 
Exodus22:14 Naye obanga nnannyinikyo abadde waali, ne kifa, eyeeyazika taaliwenga kantu. Nnannyinikyo bw'aba nga yali akipangisizza bupangisa, ssente ez'okukipangisa anaazifunanga." 
Exodus22:15 “Omuntu bw'asendasendanga omuwala embeerera atannayogerezebwa ne yeebaka naye, anaasalirwanga omutwalo n'amuwasa." 
Exodus22:16 Kitaawe bw'agaaniranga ddala okumumuwa, omusenzisenzi anaasasulanga omuwendo gwa ssente ogwenkana omutwalo oguwasa omuwala embeerera." 
Exodus22:17 “Omukazi omulogo, tomulekanga kulama." 
Exodus22:18 “Buli yenna akabawala n'ekisolo wa kuttibwanga. 
Exodus22:19 “Buli yenna atambirira balubaale n'atatambirira Mukama yekka, wa kuzikirizanga." 
Exodus22:20 “Tobonyaabonyanga mugwira wadde okumutulugunya, anti nammwe mwennyini mwaliko abagwira mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Exodus22:21 Tokoleranga bubi nnamwandu oba mulekwa. 
Exodus22:22 Bwe mulibakolera obubi, bamala bankubira omulanga, ŋŋenda kuguwulira." 
Exodus22:23 Obusungu bwange bugenda kwesera, mbatte n'ekitala; olwo abakazi bammwe balifuuka bannamwandu n'abaana bammwe, bamulekwa." 
Exodus22:24 “Singa wabaawo gw'owola ssente, omunaku mu bantu bange b'oli nabo, tomuwolanga ng'omuwozi wa ssente bw'akola, tomusabanga magoba." 
Exodus22:25 “Bw'otwalanga ekizibawo kya munno ng'omusingo, okimuddizanga ng'enjuba tennagwa." 
Exodus22:26 “Anti kye ky'okwebikka kyokka ky'alina, ekizibawo ky'abikkirira omubiri gwe; ate aneebaka mu ki? Bw'anankowoola, nzija kumuwulira, kubanga ndi musaasizi." 
Exodus22:27 “Tovumanga Katonda era toyogeranga bubi ku mufuzi w'abantu bo. 
Exodus22:28 “Tolwangawo kutona ku bingi by'okungudde ne by'osogodde. Onompanga omuggulanda mu baana bo. 
Exodus22:29 Onookolanga kye kimu ku nte zo ne ku ndiga zo. Ekiggulanda kisigalanga ne nnyina waakyo ennaku musanvu, ku lunaku olwomunaana ne mukimpa." 
Exodus22:30 “Mubeeranga bantu bange batukuvu. Ennyama y'ensolo etaaguliddwa ku ttale temugiryanga, mugisuuliranga mbwa.”" 
Exodus23:1 “Tosaasaanyanga bya bulimba: towagiranga mubi n'oba otyo omujulirwa ow'ettima. 
Exodus23:2 Tomalanga gagoberera kibiina mu kweyisa obubi, wadde ng'owa obujulizi mu mbuga abangi tebakusikirizanga kuzibira mazima." 
Exodus23:3 Ne bw'abanga munaku, teweekubiiranga gy'ali mu musango gwe." 
Exodus23:4 “Bw'osanganga ente oba endogoyi y'omulabe wo ng'etangatanga, ogizzangayo gy'ali." 
Exodus23:5 Bw'olabanga endogoyi y'akukyawa ng'egudde, omugugu gwayo gugiguddeko, eky'okugireka okyewalanga, ogendanga n'ogimuyambako." 
Exodus23:6 “Omwavu mu mmwe tomusalirizanga mu nsonga ze. 
Exodus23:7 Obulimba obwekuumiranga wala. Tottanga ataliiko musango oba omutuukirivu, kubanga nze sigenda kwejjeereza mubi." 
Exodus23:8 Tolyanga nguzi; kubanga enguzi eziba amaaso g'abalaba obulungi era egootaanya ensonga z'abatuukirivu. 
Exodus23:9 “Totulugunyanga mugwira. Nammwe mumanyi obulumi bw'omugwira, anti nammwe mwali bagwira mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Exodus23:10 “Okumala emyaka mukaaga osiganga ennimiro yo n'okungula ebibala byayo. 
Exodus23:11 Naye omwaka ogwomusanvu ogiwummuzanga, n'ogireka n'ezika, abaavu mu ggwanga lyo nabo balye; ekiribanga kisigaddemu ebisolo eby'ettale nabyo biryeko. Bw'otyo bw'okolanga n'ennimiro zo ez'emizabbibu n'ez'oliva." 
Exodus23:12 “Okoleranga ennaku mukaaga, ku lwomusanvu n'owummula, ente yo n'endogoyi nabyo biwummuleko, omwana w'omuzaana wo n'ow'omugwira nabo baweereko." 
Exodus23:13 “Byonna bye mbagambye, mubikwatenga. Temwatulanga erinnya lya lubaale; erinnya lye teriwulirwangako mu kamwa kammwe." 
Exodus23:14 “Buli mwaka munkulizanga embaga enkulu emirundi esatu. 
Exodus23:15 Embaga enkulu ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse ogikuzanga. Omalanga ennaku musanvu ng'olya migati egitazimbulukuse nga bwe nakikugamba mu kadde akalagiddwa mu mwezi gwa Abibu, kubanga mu mwezi guno lwe wava mu Misiri. Tewabanga alabika mu maaso gange ngalo nsa." 
Exodus23:16 Okuzanga n'Embaga ey'Amakungula g'ebibala ebisookera ddala ku ebyo bye wateganira ng'osiga mu nnimiro. Era n'Embaga ey'Okukuŋŋaanya ku nkomerero y'omwaka, lw'okuŋŋaanya bye wateganira mu nnimiro." 
Exodus23:17 Buli musajja yenna mu mmwe aneeyolekanga emirundi esatu mu mwaka ew'Omukama ow'Obuyinza. 
Exodus23:18 “Ekitambiro kyange eky'omusaayi totambirirangako kizimbulukusa, n'amasavu ag'oku mbaga yange tegasulangawo okutuusa enkeera." 
Exodus23:19 “Ebibala ebisooka ebisinga obulungi eby'ettaka lyo obitwalanga mu nnyumba y'Omukama Katonda wo. Tofumbiranga kabuzi mu mata ga nnyina waako. 
Exodus23:20 “Laba, nzija kutuma malayika mu maaso go, akukuume mu kkubo, akutuuse mu kifo kye nategeka." 
Exodus23:21 Omussangamu ekitiibwa; owulirizanga eddoboozi lye. Tomujeemeranga, kubanga emisango gyo tagenda kugikusonyiwa, anti alina mu ye erinnya lyange." 
Exodus23:22 Naye bw'olimuwulira obulungi n'okola buli kye ŋŋamba, abalabe bo nange ndiba mulabe waabwe, abakutulugunya nange ndibatulugunya." 
Exodus23:23 Malayika wange alikukulemberamu n'akuyingiza mu nsi y'Abaamori, Abakitti, Abaperizzi, Abakanaani, Abakivi, n'Abayebusi, be ndizikiriza." 
Exodus23:24 Tovunnamiranga balubaale baabwe, tobaweerezanga. Tokolanga nga bwe bakola, wabula balubaale obamerengulanga n'empagi zaabwe n'ozimenyawo." 
Exodus23:25 Muweerezenga Omukama Katonda wammwe, lwe ndiwa omukisa emmere yammwe n'amazzi; ndibamalamu endwadde." 
Exodus23:26 Mu nsi yo temuliba avaamu lubuto, wadde omugumba. Ndijjuza omuwendo gw'ennaku z'obulamu bwo." 
Exodus23:27 “Ndikukulembezaamu entiisa yange, abo bonna abajja okukulwanyisa ndibatabula n'abalabe bo bonna ne bakudduka." 
Exodus23:28 Ndikukulembezaamu ennumba ne zigoba Omukivi, Omukanaani n'Omukitti mu maaso go." 
Exodus23:29 Sijja kubagoba mu mwaka gumu gwokka, ensi ereme kukufuukira ddungu, n'ebisolo okubaalira." 
Exodus23:30 Nzija kugenda nga mbagoba mpolampola nga naawe bw'ogenda ozaala olye ensi. 
Exodus23:31 Ensalo zo nzija kuzissa: okuva ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa okutuuka ku nnyanja y'Abafilisitiini, n'okuva ku ddungu okutuuka ku Mugga; bannansi b'omwo nzija kubawaayo mu mikono gyammwe, nzija kubagobawo we muli." 
Exodus23:32 Tokolanga nabo endagaano, wadde okugikola ne balubaale baabwe." 
Exodus23:33 Tebabeeranga mu nsi yo, sikulwa nga bakuleetera okunjeemera. Bw'oliweereza balubaale baabwe, ddala baliba mutego gy'oli.”" 
Exodus24:1 Awo n'agamba Musa nti: “Yambuka eri Omukama, ggwe wennyini ne Aroni, Nadabu ne Abiwu n'abakulu ensanvu mu Yisirayeli, muvunname nga mwesuddeko akabanga." 
Exodus24:2 Musa yekka ye w'okusemberera Omukama; abalala tebasembera; n'abantu tebambuka naye.” 
Exodus24:3 Musa n'ajja n'abuulira abantu byonna Omukama by'agambye n'amateeka gonna; abantu bonna ne baanukula n'eddoboozi limu, ne bagamba nti: “Byonna Omukama by'atugambye tujja kubikola.”" 
Exodus24:4 Musa n'awandiika ebigambo by'Omukama byonna; ku makya bwe yazuukuka, n'azimba omwaliiro wansi w'olusozi; n'amayinja ageesimbye kkumi n'abiri ku lw'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri ebya Yisirayeli." 
Exodus24:5 Awo n'atuma abavubuka Abayisirayeli, ne baweereza ekitambiro ekyokye, ne batambirira n'Omukama ente ennume ng'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu." 
Exodus24:6 Musa n'addira ekyokubiri ky'omusaayi n'akissa mu lutiba, ekirala n'akimansira ku mwaliiro." 
Exodus24:7 N'addira Ekitabo ky'Endagaano n'akisomera abantu nga bawuliriza; ne bagamba nti: “Tujja kukola byonna Omukama by'alagidde; tunaawuliranga.” 
Exodus24:8 Awo Musa n'addira omusaayi n'agumansira abantu, n'agamba nti: “Guno gwe musaayi ogw'endagaano Omukama gy'akoze nammwe mu bigambo bino byonna.”" 
Exodus24:9 Musa n'ayambuka wamu ne Aroni, Nadabu ne Abiwu n'abakulu ensanvu mu Yisirayeli." 
Exodus24:10 Ne balaba Katonda wa Yisirayeli; wansi w'ebigere bye waaliwo ekyali ng'omwaliiro gw'amayinja saffiro, nga gutukula ng'eggulu lyennyini." 
Exodus24:11 Naye teyakola kabi konna bakungu b'Abayisirayeli. Baalaba Katonda, baalya ne banywa." 
Exodus24:12 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Yambuka ku lusozi gye ndi obeere eno, nkuwe empande z'amayinja, etteeka n'ebiragiro, bye mpandiise olw'okubayigiriza.”" 
Exodus24:13 Awo Musa n'asituka, ye n'omuyambi we Yoswa ne balinnya ku lusozi lwa Katonda." 
Exodus24:14 N'agamba abakulu nti: “Mutulindirire wano okutuusa lwe tunadda. Mulina Aroni ne Kuru, bali nammwe; oyo aliko ensonga yonna abatuukirire.”" 
Exodus24:15 Olwo Musa n'alinnya ku lusozi. Ekire ne kibikka olusozi. 
Exodus24:16 Ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kibeera ku lusozi lwa Sinayi; ekire ne kirubikkira ennaku mukaaga. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu Omukama n'ayita Musa ng'ayima mu kire. 
Exodus24:17 Ku Bayisirayeli ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kyafaanana ng'omuliro ogusenkenya ku ntikko y'olusozi. 
Exodus24:18 Musa ne yeevumba ekire, n'alinnya ku lusozi, n'abeera eyo ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana." 
Exodus25:1 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus25:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli bandeetere ekitone; ononfunira ekitone kino ku buli muntu omutima nga bwe gumusindika okukiwa. 
Exodus25:3 Kino kye kitone ky'onoobaggyako: zaabu ne ffeeza, ekikomo," 
Exodus25:4 engoye eza bbululu, eza kakobe n'entwakaavu n'engoye eza bafuta, ebyoya by'embuzi," 
Exodus25:5 amaliba g'endiga ennume amannyike amamyufu; amaliba amakunye n'emiti egy'obusaana; 
Exodus25:6 omuzigo ogw'omu ttawaaza, ebyakaloosa ebissibwa mu muzigo ogusiigibwa, n'obubaani obw'akawoowo;" 
Exodus25:7 n'amayinja oniki ag'okussa ku efodi ne ku kipaapi eky'oku kifuba. 
Exodus25:8 Bananzimbira ekifo ekitukuvu, nsule mu bo wakati." 
Exodus25:9 Nzija kukulaga ekifaananyi ky'Ekisulo n'ekifaananyi ky'ebintu byamu byonna ebinaakozesebwangamu; bikole nga bwe nnaaba mbikulaze. 
Exodus25:10 “Bankolere essanduuku mu muti ogw'akasaana: emikono ebiri n'ekitundu obuwanvu, omukono gumu obugazi, omukono gumu n'ekitundu obusimba." 
Exodus25:11 Ogisiiganga zaabu omwereere munda ne kungulu. Waggulu w'ekoma ossangawo omuge ogwa zaabu okugyetoolooza. 
Exodus25:12 Okolerangako empeta nnya ensaanuuse eza zaabu z'olissa ku nsonda ennya ez'essanduuku w'ewanirirwa, ku luuyi olumu ebeereyo empeta bbiri ne ku luuyi olulala bbiri." 
Exodus25:13 Olikola n'emisituliro egy'embaawo ez'akasaana n'ogibikkako zaabu. 
Exodus25:14 Ogiyisanga mu mpeta eziri mu nsonda z'essanduuku okusitula Essanduuku. 
Exodus25:15 Emisituliro gya kusigalanga mu mpeta za ssanduuku omwo, si gya kuggyangamu." 
Exodus25:16 Mu ssanduuku oteekangamu Endagaano gye ndikuwa. 
Exodus25:17 “Ojja kukola n'Entebe y'Obusaasizi, nga ya zaabu omwereere, emikono ebiri n'ekitundu obuwanvu ate omukono gumu n'ekitundu obugazi." 
Exodus25:18 Ku njuyi zombi ez'Entebe y'Obusaasizi okolerangayo bakerubi babiri aba zaabu omukubeekube. 
Exodus25:19 Kerubi omu abeere ku nkomerero y'oluuyi olumu n'omulala ku nkomerero y'oluuyi olulala olw'Entebe ey'Obusaasizi. 
Exodus25:20 Bakerubi baliba ebiwawaatiro byabwe babyanjululizza waggulu, nga babikkirira Entebe y'Obusaasizi n'ebiwaawaatiro byabwe; nga batunuuliraganye, ng'amaaso gaabwe gatunuulidde Entebe y'Obusaasizi." 
Exodus25:21 Entebe y'Obusaasizi ogisse ku ssanduuku ng'ekisaanikira. Munda mu ssanduuku mw'olissa Endagaano gye ndikuwa. 
Exodus25:22 Nzija kukusisinkananga awo nga nnyima ku Ntebe y'Obusaasizi, wakati wa bakerubi ababiri abali ku Ssanduuku y'Endagaano, nkubuulire byonna bye nnaakulagiranga ku lw'Abayisirayeli." 
Exodus25:23 “Ojja kukola emmeeza mu muti ogw'akasaana, emikono ebiri obuwanvu, omukono gumu obugazi, ate omukono gumu n'ekitundu obusimba." 
Exodus25:24 Ojja kugibikkako zaabu omwereere, ate ogisseeko omuge ogwa zaabu okugyetoolooza." 
Exodus25:25 Ojja kugissaako omugo gwa luta lumu obugazi, obitoneko omuge ogwa zaabu okugwetoolooza." 
Exodus25:26 Ojja kugikolerako empeta nnya eza zaabu ozisibe ku nsonda ennya awali amagulu ana; 
Exodus25:27 empeta zibeere kumpi n'omugo okugumya emisituliro okusitulirwa emmeeza. 
Exodus25:28 Ojja kukola emisituliro mu muti gw'akasaana ogibikke ne zaabu. Egyo gye ginaasitulanga emmeeza. 
Exodus25:29 Ojja kukolerako essowaani, ebijiiko, n'ensumbi, n'entiba zaayo ez'okufukanga ekitone eky'okuyiwa; okolanga bya zaabu omwereere." 
Exodus25:30 Ku mmeeza okwo ossangako Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa, gibeerenga mu maaso gange bulijjo." 
Exodus25:31 “Ojja kukola ekikondo ky'ettawaaza kya zaabu omwereere; kijja kubeera kya zaabu omukubeekube entobo n'ekikwatibwako. Ekikopo kyakwo, entwe n'ebimuli biteekwa okuba ekintu kimu nakyo." 
Exodus25:32 Amatabi mukaaga gateekwa okwawukana nga gava mu mabbali gaakyo: asatu ku luuyi olumu n'asatu ku luuyi olulala. 
Exodus25:33 Ettabi ebbereberye lya kubaako ebikopo bisatu ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'endoozi, buli kimu n'entwe n'ekimuli; n'ettabi eryokubiri lya kubaako nalyo ebikopo bisatu ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'endoozi, buli kimu n'entwe n'ekimuli, bwe kityo ne ku matabi omukaaga gonna agaawukana okuva ku kikondo ky'ettawaaza." 
Exodus25:34 Ekikondo ky'ettawaaza kyennyini kya kubaako ebikopo bina ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'endoozi, buli kimu n'entwe n'ekimuli." 
Exodus25:35 Bwe kityo entwe emu wansi w'amatabi abiri agasooka, agava ku kikondo; entwe wansi w'amatabi abiri agaddirira, entwe wansi w'amatabi asatu agaddirira. Kibeere bwe kityo ne ku matabi omukaaga agaawukana ku kikondo ky'ettawaaza." 
Exodus25:36 Entwe n'amatabi biteekwa kubeera kintu kimu n'ekikondo ky'ettawaaza, ate kyonna nga kikoleddwa mu kintu kimu mu zaabu omwereere omukubeekube." 
Exodus25:37 Era okolanga ettawaaza zaakyo musanvu mulamba n'oziwanika ziryoke zimulise mu maaso gaakyo. 
Exodus25:38 Magalo n'obusowaani bwayo okubeera ebisirinza biteekwa kubeera bya zaabu omwereere. 
Exodus25:39 Talenta emu eya zaabu omwereere y'ey'okukola ekikondo ky'ettawaaza n'ebikikozesebwako. 
Exodus25:40 Wekkaanye, obikolanga ng'ogoberera ekifaananyi ekikulagiddwa ku lusozi.”" 
Exodus26:1 “Era ojja kukola Ekisulo mu mitanda kkumi mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu: emitanda egirukiddwamu bakerubi, omulimu gw'omulusi." 
Exodus26:2 Obuwanvu bwa buli mutanda bunaaba bwa mikono abiri mu munaana, obugazi emikono ena: emitanda gyonna nga gya kipimo kimu." 
Exodus26:3 Emitanda etaano gya kutaba wamu, n'etaano emirala nagyo gitabwe wamu." 
Exodus26:4 Ossanga eŋŋango eza bbululu ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusembayo ku lubu olw'emitanda etaano olusooka; okolanga kye kimu ne ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusembayo ku lubu olwokubiri. 
Exodus26:5 Ossanga eŋŋango ataano ku mutanda omubereberye, n'eŋŋango endala ataano ku mukugiro gw'omutanda ogusembayo ku lubu olwokubiri, ng'ozituukanya ey'eno n'ey'eri." 
Exodus26:6 Okolanga ebikwaso amakumi ataano ebya zaabu, bye by'okutaba emitanda awamu: bwe kityo ekisulo kyonna kibeere wamu." 
Exodus26:7 “Okolanga emitanda mu byoya by'embuzi eginaakolanga eweema ku Kisulo; egyo okolanga kkumi na gumu. 
Exodus26:8 Obuwanvu bw'omutanda kinnagumu bwa kubeera emikono asatu, obugazi emikono ena; emitanda ekkumi n'ogumu gyakuba n'obunene bumu." 
Exodus26:9 Etaano ku mitanda gino ogitabanga wamu mu lubu lumu; egisigadde omukaaga ne giba mu lulala; ogwomukaaga ogufunyangamu wabiri mu maaso g'Eweema. 
Exodus26:10 Eŋŋango amakumi ataano ozikwasanga ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusembayo ku lubu olumu; bw'otyo era ne ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusemba ku lubu olwokubiri. 
Exodus26:11 Ojja kukola ebikwaso amakumi ataano eby'ekikomo, obisse mu ŋŋango; biryoke bisibe Weema awamu, kibeere kintu kimu ekigatte awamu." 
Exodus26:12 Nga bwe wafikka omutanda ogumu ogwa Weema, ekitundu ky'omutanda ogwo ogufikka kya kuleebeetera mabega ku Kisulo." 
Exodus26:13 Omukono ogufikka ku buli luuyi mu buwanvu bw'emitanda gya weema, gwa kuleebeetera mu mbiriizi z'Ekisulo gugibikke." 
Exodus26:14 “Weema yongera okugikolera ekibikkako eky'amaliba g'endiga ennume nga mannyike mu langi emmyufu, n'ekibikka ekirala eky'amaliba amakunye eky'okubikka ku kiri." 
Exodus26:15 “Ekisulo ojja kukikolera embaawo eza kaabusimba mu muti ogw'akasaana. 
Exodus26:16 Buli lubaawo lwa kubaako emikono kkumi obuwanvu ate omukono gumu n'ekitundu obugazi. 
Exodus26:17 Buli lubaawo luteekwa okussibwako emirumyo ebiri ebiri, bw'otyo bw'oba okola ku mbaawo zonna ez'Ekisulo." 
Exodus26:18 Ekisulo kikolere embaawo amakumi abiri ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta nga zitunuulidde emaserengeta. 
Exodus26:19 Ojja kuwoola entobo amakumi ana eza ffeeza ku lw'embaawo amakumi abiri; entobo bbiri wansi w'olubaawo olusooka olw'emirumyo gyazo ebiri, ne ku luddako entobo bbiri olw'emirumyo gy'azo ebiri." 
Exodus26:20 Emambuka ku luuyi olulala olw'ekisulo ejja kubeerayo embaawo amakumi abiri 
Exodus26:21 nga zinywezebwa entobo amakumi ana eza ffeeza, entobo bbiri wansi wa buli lubaawo." 
Exodus26:22 Emabega w'Ekisulo, ebugwanjuba, okolerangayo embaawo mukaaga." 
Exodus26:23 Ojja kukola embaawo bbiri mu nsonda emabega w'Ekisulo. 
Exodus26:24 Ezo ziteekwa kugattibwa bbiri okuva wansi okutuukira ddala waggulu ne zisibwa n'empeta embereberye; n'embaawo ebbiri ez'ensonda endala bwe ziba. 
Exodus26:25 Awo walibaawo embaawo munaana n'entobo zaazo eza ffeeza kkumi na mukaaga; entobo bbiri wansi w'olubaawo olubereberye n'endala bwe zityo. 
Exodus26:26 “Ojja kukola emikiikiro mu muti ogw'akasaana: etaano olw'embaawo ku luuyi olumu olw'Ekisulo," 
Exodus26:27 etaano olw'embaawo ez'oluuyi olulala olw'Ekisulo, ate emikiikiro etaano olw'embaawo ku luuyi olusembayo olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Exodus26:28 Omukiikiro ogwa wakati gwa kuyitamu wakati okuva ku nkomerero emu ey'embaawo okutuuka ku ndala. 
Exodus26:29 Embaawo za kubikkako zaabu, okolereko n'empeta eza zaabu omuliyita emikiikiro; n'emikiikiro gibikke zaabu." 
Exodus26:30 Ekisulo kisseewo ng'ogoberera entereeza yaakyo ekulagiddwa ku lusozi. 
Exodus26:31 “Ojja kukola olutimbe mu wuzi eza bbululu, eza kakobe n'entwakaavu ne mu lugoye bafuta olulange, omulusi atonemu bakerubi." 
Exodus26:32 Ojja kuluwanika ku bikondo bina eby'empagi eby'omuti ogw'akasaana ezibikkiddwa zaabu, n'amalobo aga zaabu, nga zisimbiddwa mu ntobo nnya eza ffeeza." 
Exodus26:33 Olutimbe oluwanikanga ku bikwaso. Emabega waalwo gy'oteekanga Essanduuku ey'Endagaano. Olutimbe lulibayamba okwawula Ekifo Ekitukuvu ku Watukuvu Ennyo. 
Exodus26:34 Entebe y'Obusaasizi ogissanga kungulu kw'Essanduuku y'Endagaano munda w'Awatukuvu Ennyo. 
Exodus26:35 Emmeeza ogissanga bweru wa lutimbe; ate ekikondo ky'ettawaaza okissanga ku luuyi lw'emaserengeta g'Ekisulo, okwolekera emmeeza; emmeeza yo ogissanga ku luuyi olw'emambuka." 
Exodus26:36 Ku mulyango gwa Weema okolerangako olutimbe oluluke mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu, mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange, omulimu gw'omudaliza omukugu." 
Exodus26:37 Olutimbe olukoleranga empagi ttaano ez'omuti ogw'akasaana nga zibikkiddwa zaabu, ko amalobo aga zaabu, nazo ozikoleranga entobo ttaano ez'ekikomo.”" 
Exodus27:1 “Ojja kukola omwaliiro mu muti ogw'akasaana, ng'enjuuyi zaagwo zenkanankana: emikono etaano obuwanvu, emikono etaano obugazi. Omwaliirio gwa kwenkanankana ku njuuyi zombi." 
Exodus27:2 Omwaliiro ojja kugukolerako amayembe ku nsonda zaagwo ennya, amayembe gaayo nga gali ddala kuli; ojja kugubikka n'ekikomo." 
Exodus27:3 Omwaliiro ojja kugukolerako entamu ez'okuyooleramu evvu ly'amasavu, okole n'ebitiiyo, ebibya ebyeyambisibwa mu kumansira amazzi, entoozo n'enzigyo ez'okutwalirako omuliro. Ebikozesebwa byonna eby'oku mwaliiro obikolanga mu kikomo." 
Exodus27:4 Ojja kugukolako ekitindiro nga kigombezeddwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, ate ku nsonda z'ekitindiro ennya osseeko empeta nnya ez'ekikomo." 
Exodus27:5 Ekitindiro ekyo okissanga munda w'omukiikiro gw'omwaliiro, wansi waagwo, mu makkati g'obugulumivu bw'omwaliiro." 
Exodus27:6 Era omwaliiro ogukoleranga emisituliro mu muti ogw'akasaana, ogibikkangako ekikomo" 
Exodus27:7 ogiyisanga mu mpeta, giryoke gibeere eruuyi n'eruuyi w'omwaliiro ng'esituliddwa." 
Exodus27:8 Omwaliiro ogukolanga mu mbaawo, nga mwereere munda; ogukolanga nga bw'olagiddwa ku lusozi." 
Exodus27:9 “Ojja kukola oluggya lw'Ekisulo. Ku ludda olw'emaserengeta, entimbe z'oluggya ziriba za lugoye olwa bafuta olulange, emikono kikumi obuwanvu ku luuyi olumu." 
Exodus27:10 Ebikondo byalwo amakumi abiri n'entobo zaabyo amakumi abiri nga za kikomo; n'amalobo g'ebikondo n'emikiikiro gyabyo nga bya ffeeza. 
Exodus27:11 Kye kimu, ne ku luuyi olw'emambuka wa kubeerayo entimbe nga za mikono kikumi obuwanvu n'ebikondo byazo amakumi abiri n'entobo zaabyo amakumi abiri nga za kikomo, n'amalobo g'ebikondo n'emikiikiro nga bya ffeeza." 
Exodus27:12 Okusukka obugazi bw'oluggya ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba, wa kubeerayo entimbe za mikono ataano, ebikondo byazo kkumi n'entobo zaabyo kkumi." 
Exodus27:13 Obugazi bw'oluggya, ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okwolekera enjuba gy'eva, wa kubeerayo emikono ataano." 
Exodus27:14 Ku luuyi olumu olw'omulyango, wa kubeerayo entimbe za mikono kkumi n'etaano, n'ebikondo byazo bisatu, n'entobo zaabyo ssatu." 
Exodus27:15 Ku luuyi olulala olw'omulyango wa kubeerayo entimbe za mikono kkumi n'etaano, n'ebikondo byazo bisatu, n'entobo zaabyo ssatu." 
Exodus27:16 Omulyango ogugenda mu luggya gwa kubeerako olutimbe lwa mikono amakumi abiri obugazi, nga lulukiddwa mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta olulange, omulimu gw'omudaliza; lwa kuwanikibwa ku bikondo ebina mu ntobo zaabyo nnya." 
Exodus27:17 Ebikondo byonna ebikomera oluggya bya kugattibwa n'emikiikiro egya ffeeza; amalobo g'ebikondo ga kubeera ga ffeeza, entobo zaabyo zo za kikomo." 
Exodus27:18 Oluggya lwa kubeerako emikono kikumi mu buwanvu, emikono amakumi ataano mu bugazi, n'emikono etaano mu busimba. Entimbe zonna za kukolebwa mu ngoye eza bafuta ennange n'entobo zaazo za kikomo." 
Exodus27:19 Byonna eby'okukozesa mu Kisulo, enkondo zaakyo zonna n'ez'oluggya, byonna biteekwa kubeera bya kikomo." 
Exodus27:20 “Ojja kulagira Abayisirayeli bakuleetere omuzigo omukamule ogwa oliva omwereere, gwe gw'ettawaaza okugikuuma ng'eyaka obutasalako." 
Exodus27:21 Aroni ne batabani be banaakuumanga ettawaaza eno ng'eyakira mu maaso g'Omukama, mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ebweru w'olutimbe oluli mu maaso g'Essanduuku y'Endagaano, okuva akawungeezi okutuusa ku makya. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera ku Bayisirayeli amazadde gaabwe gonna.”" 
Exodus28:1 “Gamba bakuleetere mu Bayisirayeli muganda wo Aroni ne batabani be bampeerezenga nga bakabona: Aroni, Nadabu, Abiwu, Eleyazari ne Yitamari." 
Exodus28:2 Aroni muganda wo ojja kumukolera ebyambalo ebitukuvu, byoleke ekitiibwa n'obukulu ddala." 
Exodus28:3 Ojja kulagira abakugu bonna abasobola, be nawa obusobozi, bakolere Aroni ebyambalo mu kutukuzibwa kwe ampeerezenga nga kabona." 
Exodus28:4 Bino bye byambalo bye bajja okukola: ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba, efodi, omunagiro, ekkanzu enduke, ettambaala n'omusipi, bibakolerwe babeere bakabona abampeereza." 
Exodus28:5 Bakozesanga zaabu n'ewuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta." 
Exodus28:6 “Bakolanga efodi eya zaabu ne mu wuzi eza bbululu, eza kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta olulange; omulimu gw'omulusi." 
Exodus28:7 Ejja kubeera n'ebiwuzi eby'oku bibegabega bibiri nga bitabiddwa wamu n'ebikugiro byayo byombi esobolenga okusibibwa. 
Exodus28:8 Ekimyu ky'efodi ekyagiriko kyali kintu kimu nayo mu nkola ye emu; nga kya zaabu n'ewuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu, mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange." 
Exodus28:9 Oddiranga amayinja abiri ag'oniki n'ogoolako amannya g'abatabani ba Yisirayeli. 
Exodus28:10 Mukaaga ku mannya gaabwe ga kubeera ku limu, n'agasigadde omukaaga ku ddala, nga baddiriŋŋana nga bwe bajja bazaalibwa." 
Exodus28:11 Amayinja gombi ogoolangako amannya g'abatabani ba Yisirayeli ng'omuwunzi w'amayinja ag'omuwendo bw'akola; olwo amayinja oganyigire mu mapeesa aga zaabu. 
Exodus28:12 Amayinja abiri ojja kugatunga ku biwuzi by'efodi eby'oku bibegabega ng'ekijjukizo kya batabani ba Yisirayeli. Aroni bw'atyo anaatwaliranga amannya gaabwe ku bibegabega bye byombi mu maaso g'Omukama ng'ekijjukizo. 
Exodus28:13 Ojja na kukola amapeesa aga zaabu 
Exodus28:14 n'emikuufu egya zaabu omwereere ebiri ogirangemu emiguwa, emikuufu egyo emirangemu emiguwa ogigatte ku mapeesa." 
Exodus28:15 “Ojja kukola ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba nga kyeyambisibwa mu kulamula; omulimu gw'omulusi. Kya kukolebwa ng'efodi bwe yakolebwa. Okikolanga mu zaabu n'ewuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange." 
Exodus28:16 Kya kubeera n'enjuyi bbiri ezenkanankana nga kifunyemu wabiri, oluta lumu mu buwanvu n'oluta mu bugazi." 
Exodus28:17 Ojja kussaamu ennyiriri nnya ez'amayinja. Ku lunyiriri olusooka kubeeko sarudiyo, topaziyo ne simaragido." 
Exodus28:18 Ku lunyiriri olwokubiri kubeeko karubunkulo, saffiro ne dayimondi." 
Exodus28:19 Ku lunyiriri olwokusatu kubeeko yasinto, akyate n'ametisito." 
Exodus28:20 Ku lunyiriri olwokuna kubeereko kirusolito, oniki ne berullo; gajja kunyigibwa mu mapeesa aga zaabu." 
Exodus28:21 Amayinja gano galiwo ku lw'amannya g'abatabani ba Yisirayeli, kkumi n'abiri ng'amannya gaabwe bwe gali, nga gooleddwako, nga ku buli limu kuliko erinnya limu ku lw'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri." 
Exodus28:22 Ekipaapi ky'oku kifuba ojja kukikolerako emikuufu emirange ng'emiguwa nga gya zaabu omwereere. 
Exodus28:23 Ekipaapi ky'oku kifuba ojja kukikolerako empeta bbiri eza zaabu ozisibire ku nsonda ebbiri ez'oku kipaapi eky'oku kifuba. 
Exodus28:24 Emikuufu egyo egya zaabu ogisibanga ku mpeta ebbiri ensibire ku nsonda z'ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba. 
Exodus28:25 Enkomerero ebbiri ez'emikuufu ebiri ozigatte ku mapeesa olwo olyoke ozigattire mu maaso ku biwuzi by'efodi. 
Exodus28:26 Ojja kukola empeta bbiri eza zaabu ozitungire ku nsonda bbiri eza wansi w'ekipaapi ky'oku kifuba, ku mukugiro ogw'omunda oguli ku efodi." 
Exodus28:27 Ojja kukolayo empeta bbiri eza zaabu, ozisibe ku biwuzi ebibiri eby'efodi, mu maaso gaayo wansi ddala kumpi n'eggemo lyayo, wagguluko w'ekimyu ky'efodi." 
Exodus28:28 Ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba ojja kukinyweza ng'oyisa wuzi eya bbululu mu mpeta zaakyo n'ez'efodi, ekipaapi ky'oku kifuba kituule waggulu w'ekimyu ky'efodi, ekipaapi eky'okukifuba nga tekyawukanye n'efodi." 
Exodus28:29 Bw'atyo Aroni ajja kutwaliranga ku kifuba kye amannya g'abatabani ba Yisirayeli, ku kipaapi eky'okulamula, bw'anaayingiranga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ng'ekijjukizo mu maaso g'Omukama bulijjo." 
Exodus28:30 Ku kipaapi ky'okulamula ayongerangako Wurimu ne Tummimu, Aroni asobole okubeeranga nabyo ku kifuba ng'agenze mu maaso g'Omukama. Bw'atyo Aroni bulijjo anaatwaliranga ku kifuba kye akabonero ak'okulamula Abayisirayeli." 
Exodus28:31 “Ojja kukola omunagiro gw'efodi nga gwonna gwa bbululu. 
Exodus28:32 Wakati nga waliwo ekituli omunaayitanga omutwe, ekituli nga kyetooloddwa omukugiro, omulimu gw'omulanzi, ng'obulago obw'ekizibawo eky'eddiba omunagiro guleme kutaggulukuka." 
Exodus28:33 Eggemo lyagwo olitonanga n'amakomamawanga ag'ewuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu, nga mutabikiddwamu obude obwa zaabu okugwetoolooza," 
Exodus28:34 nga bigenda bitobeka akade aka zaabu n'amakomamawanga, akade aka zaabu n'amakomamawanga okwetoolooza eggemo erya wansi ery'omunagiro." 
Exodus28:35 Aroni agwambalanga ng'akola emirimu emitongole, era okuvuga kw'obude kunaawulirwanga buli lw'anaayingiranga Ekifo Ekitukuvu mu maaso g'Omukama, oba ng'akivaamu; bw'atyo aleme kufa." 
Exodus28:36 “Ojja kukola ekimuli ekya zaabu omwereere okyoleko ebigambo bino nti: ‘Mutukuvu ku lw'Omukama.’ 
Exodus28:37 Okisse ku wuzi eya kakobe, okisibire ku ttambaala mu maaso gaalyo." 
Exodus28:38 Kinaabanga ku kyenyi kya Aroni ne yeetikka bw'atyo omusango gw'ebyonoono ebiri mu bintu ebitukuvu ebiwongebwa Abayisirayeli mu bitambiro byabwe byonna ebitukuvu. Kinaabanga ku kyenyi kye ebbanga lyonna, abafuule abakkirizibwa ew'Omukama." 
Exodus28:39 Ekkanzu ogirukanga mu lugoye olwa bafuta n'ettambaala mu lugoye olwa bafuta, n'omusipi ogukoleddwa omudaliza." 
Exodus28:40 “Batabani ba Aroni ojja kubakolera ekkanzu, omusipi n'amatambaala, balabike nga ba kitiibwa, bakulu." 
Exodus28:41 Bino olibyambaza Aroni muganda wo ne batabani be, n'olyoka obasiiga omuzigo, n'obawa obwakabona, n'obatukuza bampeerezenga mu bwakabona." 
Exodus28:42 Obakoleranga empale ez'engoye zibikke omubiri gwabwe omwereere okuva mu kiwato okutuuka ku kisambi. 
Exodus28:43 Aroni n'abaana be bazambalanga nga bagenda mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ne bwe babanga basemberera omwaliiro okuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, baleme kwereetera musango n'okufa. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera ku Aroni n'ezzadde lye eririmuddirira.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Guno gwe mukolo gw'olikola ng'obatukuza balyoke bampeereze nga bakabona. Oddiranga ente ennume ento n'endiga ennume bbiri ezitaliiko kamogo," 
Exodus29:2 N'okola emigaati egitazimbulukuse, kkeeki ezitazimbulukuse entabulemu omuzigo n'obugaati obw'oluwewere obutazimbulukuse obusiigeko omuzigo; obikolanga mu butta bw'eŋŋano obulungi;" 
Exodus29:3 ebyo obissanga mu kisero n'obiweerereza mu kisero, n'oweererezaako n'ente ennume ento n'endiga ennume bbiri." 
Exodus29:4 “Oleetanga Aroni ne batabani be ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, n'obanaaza n'amazzi." 
Exodus29:5 Awo n'oddira ebyambalo n'obyambaza Aroni: ekkanzu, omunagiro gw'efodi, efodi n'ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba, omusibangako efodi n'ewuzi y'efodi." 
Exodus29:6 N'ossa ettambaala ku mutwe gwe, ate ku ttambaala n'ossaako akabonero akatukuvu." 
Exodus29:7 Awo n'oddira omuzigo ogusiiga n'omufuka ku mutwe gwe bw'otyo omusiige. 
Exodus29:8 “Oluvannyuma oleetanga batabani be n'obambaza ekkanzu," 
Exodus29:9 n'obasiba emisipi mu biwato byabwe, n'obazingirira amatambaala ku mitwe gyabwe. Obwakabona bujja kubeera bwabwe mu tteeka lino ery'olubeerera. Bw'otyo bw'oliwa Aroni ne batabani be obwakabona." 
Exodus29:10 “Oleetanga ente ennume ento mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Aroni ne batabani be ne bagissaako emikono gyabwe ku mutwe. 
Exodus29:11 Ente ennume ento eyo ogittiranga mu maaso g'Omukama ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano," 
Exodus29:12 n'oddira ku musaayi gw'ente ennume ento eyo n'ogussa ku mayembe g'omwaliiro n'olunwe lwo. Omusaayi ogusigaddewo oguyiwanga wansi w'omwaliiro. 
Exodus29:13 Amasavu gonna agali ku byenda n'olububi lw'oku kibumba, ensigo ebbiri wamu n'amasavu agazibikkako obiddiranga n'obyokera ku mwaliiro." 
Exodus29:14 Naye ennyama y'ente ennume ento, eddiba lyayo n'obusa bwayo obyokeranga bweru wa lusiisira mu muliro, kubanga kino kitambiro lwa kibi." 
Exodus29:15 “Awo oddiranga emu ku ndiga ennume, Aroni n'abaana be ne bassa emikono ku mutwe gwayo," 
Exodus29:16 olwo n'ogitta, n'oddira omusaayi gwayo, n'ogumansira ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Exodus29:17 Oluvannyuma endiga ogitemaatemanga ebifi n'oyoza ebyenda n'ebigere n'obissa kungulu ku bifi ne ku mutwe gwayo. 
Exodus29:18 Olwo yonna n'ogyokera ku mwaliiro. Kye kiriba ekitambiro ekyokye olw'Omukama; akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Exodus29:19 “Ate oddiranga endiga ennume eyookubiri, Aroni ne batabani be ne bassa emikono ku mutwe gwayo," 
Exodus29:20 ogittanga, n'oddira ku musaayi gwayo n'ogussa ku kasammambiro k'okutu kwa Aroni okwa ddyo, ne ku busammambiro bw'amatu g'abaana be aga ddyo, ne ku kyalakisajja ow'emikono gyabwe egya ddyo, ne ku kigere ekisajja ku ddyo, olwo omusaayi n'ogumansira ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Exodus29:21 Oddiranga ku musaayi oguli ku mwaliiro ne ku muzigo ogusiiga n'ogumansira ku Aroni ne ku byambalo bye ne batabani be ne ku byambalo byabwe. Olwo ye aliba atukuziddwa n'ebyambalo bye, era ne batabani be, n'ebyambalo byabwe." 
Exodus29:22 “Oddiranga amasavu g'endiga ennume: ekikira, amasavu agabikka ebyenda, olububi lw'oku kibumba, ensigo ebbiri n'amasavu gaakwo agazibikka, ko ekisambi ekya ddyo, kubanga eno ye ndiga ennume ey'omu mukolo ogw'okuwa obwakabona," 
Exodus29:23 n'oggya mu kisero ky'emigaati egitazimbulukuse egiri mu kisero mu maaso g'Omukama, omugaati gumu ogw'oluwewere, kkeeki ekoleddwa n'omuzigo emu n'akagaati ak'oluwewere kamu," 
Exodus29:24 byonna ebyo n'obissa mu ngalo za Aroni n'eza batabani be, n'obiwuuba ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Exodus29:25 Awo obiggyanga mu mikono gyabwe n'obyokera ku mwaliiro kungulu kw'ekitambiro ekyokye, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Exodus29:26 “Otwalanga ekifuba ky'endiga y'omukolo ogw'okuwa Aroni obwakabona, n'okiweereza ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba eri Omukama; ogwo gwe guliba omugabo gwo." 
Exodus29:27 Otukuzanga ekifuba n'okugulu, ebyaweerezeddwa mu kitone eky'okuwuuba ebyateekeddwa ku bbali, eby'endiga ennume ey'omukolo ogw'okuwa Aroni ne batabani be obwakabona." 
Exodus29:28 Guno gwe gunaabanga omugabo gwa Aroni ne batabani be ogw'olubeerera okuva mu Bayisirayeli, okuva lwe kiri ekitundu ekyawulidwa Abayisirayeli ku bitambiro byabwe eby'okussa ekimu; kino kitone kya Mukama." 
Exodus29:29 “Ebyambalo bya Aroni ebitukuvu bya kuddiranga abaana be abamuddirira, basiigibwenga n'okuweebwa obwakabona nga babyambadde." 
Exodus29:30 Mu batabani be anaamusikiranga mu bwakabona anaabyambaliranga ennaku musanvu bw'anaayingiranga mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano okuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu.” 
Exodus29:31 “Oddiranga ennyama y'endiga ennume ey'omukolo ogw'okuwa obwakabona, n'ogifumbira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus29:32 Ennyama y'endiga eyo, n'emigaati egiri mu kisero Aroni ne batabani be ba kubiriiranga ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Exodus29:33 Balyanga ebyeyambisiddwa mu mukolo ogw'okuddaabiriza ku lwabwe mu kuweebwa obwakabona ne mu kutukuzibwa. Tewabangawo muntu wa bulijjo alyangako; anti bintu bitukuvu. 
Exodus29:34 Singa ennyama ey'ekitambiro eky'okuwa obwakabona, oba n'emigaati bisigalawo okutuusa enkeera, obyokyanga, si bya kuliibwa, bintu bitukuvu." 
Exodus29:35 Bw'otyo bw'onookola ku Aroni ne ku batabani be ng'otuusa ebiragiro byonna bye nkuwadde. Omukolo ogw'okuwa obwakabona gumalanga ennaku musanvu. 
Exodus29:36 “Buli lunaku onooweerezanga ente ennume ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi mu kuddaabiriza. Onooweerezanga bw'otyo ekitambiro eky'okuddaabiriza olw'ekibi, bw'otyo n'oggya ekibi ku mwaliiro, n'ogusiiga okugutukuza." 
Exodus29:37 Okumala ennaku musanvu omwaliiro onooguweererezanga ekitambiro eky'okuddaabiriza, olwo ogutukuze; bwe kityo gulifuuka mutukuvu, na buli ekigukomako kiriba kitukuvu." 
Exodus29:38 “Kino ky'ojja okuweerezanga ku mwaliiro buli lunaku bulijjo: obuliga bubiri obulume obw'omwaka ogumu. 
Exodus29:39 Akaliga akasooka okaweerezanga ku makya, akookubiri akawungeezi." 
Exodus29:40 Akaliga akasooka okaweererezangako ekyekkumi eky'efa ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obutabuddwamu ekyokuna kimu ekya yini ey'omuzigo ogukamuliddwa mu oliva; n'ekitone eky'okuyiwa, ekyokuna ekya yini ey'evviini." 
Exodus29:41 Akaliga akookubiri okaweerezanga akawungeezi; ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa bibeere nga bwe kiba ku makya; akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Exodus29:42 Ky'ekyo ekinaabanga ekitambiro ekyokye eky'olubeerera eky'amazadde go gonna agaliddirira, ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, mu maaso g'Omukama gye nnaakusisinkananga okwogera naawe." 
Exodus29:43 “Eyo gye nnaasisinkananga Abayisirayeli, n'ekifo kiritukuzibwa ekitiibwa kyange." 
Exodus29:44 Nditukuza Weema ey'Ensisinkano n'omwaliiro. Nditukuza Aroni ne batabani be, bampeereze nga bakabona." 
Exodus29:45 Nnaasulanga mu makkati g'Abayisirayeli, era nnaabeeranga Katonda waabwe." 
Exodus29:46 Bwe kityo, balimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda waabwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, nsule mu bo. Nze Mukama Katonda waabwe.”" 
Exodus30:1 “Ojja kukola omwaliiro okwokerwa obubaani. Ogukolanga mu muti ogw'akasaana. 
Exodus30:2 Gujja kubeera gwa mukono gumu obuwanvu, n'obugazi omukono gumu, nga gwenkanankana ku njuyi zonna, obusimba emikono ebiri; amayembe gaagwo nga gali ekintu kimu nagwo." 
Exodus30:3 Kungulu kwagwo, ne ku mabbali okwetooloola enjuyi zaagwo, n'amayembe gaagwo obibikkanga zaabu omwereere n'ossaako omuge ogwa zaabu okugwetoolooza." 
Exodus30:4 Ogussangako empeta bbiri eza zaabu wansi w'omuge ku njuyi zaagwo ebbiri ezitunuuliraganye, omwo mw'olissa emisituliro egyeyambisibwa mu kugusitula." 
Exodus30:5 Emisituliro ogikolanga mu muti ogw'akasaana, n'ogibikka ne zaabu." 
Exodus30:6 Omwaliiro ogussanga mu maaso g'olutimbe oluli mu maaso g'Essanduuku ey'Endagaano, mu maaso g'Entebe ey'Obusaasizi ebisse Endagaano, awo we nnaakusisinkananga." 
Exodus30:7 Okwo Aroni kw'alyokeranga obubaani obw'akawoowo buli nkya; bw'anaabanga alongoosa ettawaaza, ng'ayokerako obubaani." 
Exodus30:8 N'akawungeezi Aroni bw'anaabanga akoleeza ettawaaza, anaddangamu n'abwokya; obubaani bwa kwokebwanga mu maaso g'Omukama obutasalako amazadde gammwe gonna."
