Exodus30:9 Toweererezangako obubaani obutakkirizibwa, wadde ekitambiro ekyokye, oba ekitone eky'obuwunga, era togifukangako ekitone kyonna eky'okuyiwa." 
Exodus30:10 Aroni omukolo ogw'okuddaabiriza anaagukoleranga ku mayembe g'omwaliiro omulundi gumu buli mwaka nga yeeyamba omusaayi ogw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; omukolo ogw'okuddaabiriza anaagukolanga omulundi gumu mu mwaka, amazadde gammwe gonna. Omwaliiro guno gusukkulumye mu butukuvu olw'Omukama.”" 
Exodus30:11 Omukama yayogera ne Musa n'agamba nti: 
Exodus30:12 “Bw'obanga obala Abayisirayeli, ng'okola olukalala lwabwe, buli omu wa kusasulanga omutango olw'obulamu bwe, akabenje kaleme kubagwamu nga babalibwa." 
Exodus30:13 Buli yenna eyabalibwa n'ayingizibwa ku lukalala, asasulanga kyakubiri ekya sekeli, ng'obalidde ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu eweza gera amakumi abiri. Ekitundu kya sekeli kino kitone kya Mukama." 
Exodus30:14 Buli omu abalibwa, kwe kugamba nti awezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, anaawanga ekitone ky'Omukama." 
Exodus30:15 Omugagga si wa kuwa kusinga, n'omwavu si wa kukendeerezebwako ku kitundu kya sekeli, ekitonerwa Omukama, nga ssente ez'okununula obulamu bwammwe." 
Exodus30:16 Ssente zino ez'okununula onoozifunanga mu Bayisirayeli n'ozikozesa mu kuweereza okw'omu Weema y'Endagaano. Zinaaberanga ekijjukizo eri Abayisirayeli mu maaso g'Omukama, nga ssente ez'okununula obulamu bwammwe.”" 
Exodus30:17 Omukama yayogera ne Musa n'agamba nti: 
Exodus30:18 “Era ojja kukola ekinaabirwamu eky'ekikomo, n'ekikondo kyakyo eky'ekikomo, we w'okunaabira. Okissanga wakati wa Weema ey'Ensisinkano n'omwaliiro n'ossaamu n'amazzi." 
Exodus30:19 Omwo Aroni ne batabani be mwe banaanaabiranga engalo n'ebigere byabwe. 
Exodus30:20 Bwe banaabanga bagenda okuyingira mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, banaabanga mu mazzi baleme kufa; era bwe banaabanga basemberera omwaliiro olw'omulimu gwabwe, okuweereza Omukama ekitambiro ekyokye," 
Exodus30:21 banaabanga engalo n'ebigere byabwe; baleme kufa. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera; ku ye n'ezzadde lye amazadde gaabwe gonna.” 
Exodus30:22 Era Omukama yayogera ne Musa n'agamba nti: 
Exodus30:23 “Ddira ebyakaloosa ebirungi: ebya mirra ow'amazzi, bya sekeli ebikumi bitaano, ekitundu ekyokubiri eky'obuzito buno nga kya budalasiini ow'akawoowo, kwe kugamba nti sekeli ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, sekeli bibiri mu ataano eza kalifuuwa," 
Exodus30:24 sekeli bitaano ez'akasaana, ng'obalira ku sekeli ey'omu kitukuvu, ne yini ey'omuzigo gwa oliva." 
Exodus30:25 Ebyo obikolemu omuzigo omutukuvu ogusiiga, ebitabule obulungi, omulimu gw'omutabuzi w'ebyakaloosa. Ogwo gwe gujja okuba omuzigo omutukuvu." 
Exodus30:26 Guno gweyambise okusiiga Weema ey'Ensisinkano n'Essanduuku ey'Endagaano," 
Exodus30:27 emmeeza wamu na byonna n'ebigikozesebwako, ekikondo ky'ettawaaza na byonna n'ebikikozesebwako, omwaliiro gw'obubaani," 
Exodus30:28 omwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye wamu na byonna n'ebigukozesebwako, ekinaabirwamu wamu n'ekikondo kyakyo." 
Exodus30:29 Ebyo ojja kubitukuza; biriba bitukuvu ddala; na buli kyonna ekinaabikoonangako, kinaabeeranga kitukuvu." 
Exodus30:30 Era ojja kusiiga Aroni ne batabani be, obatukuze, bampeereze nga bakabona." 
Exodus30:31 Awo nno Abayisirayeli bagambe nti: ‘Omuzigo guno ogusiiga mutukuvu gye ndi mu mazadde gammwe gonna. 
Exodus30:32 Si gwa kufukibwa ku mubiri gwa muntu wa bulijjo, era temukolanga muzigo mulala gwonna guli ng'ogwo. Mutukuvu, era gunaabeeranga mutukuvu gye muli." 
Exodus30:33 Buli yenna anaatabulanga omuzigo nga guno oba n'agukozesa ku muntu owa bulijjo, anaakutulwanga ku bantu be.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: “Ddira ebyakaloosa ebirungi: sitakite, onika, galabano, ebyakawoowo akalungi n'obubaani obwereere, mu bipimo ebyenkanankana," 
Exodus30:35 obikolemu obubaani, omulimu gw'omutabuzi w'ebyakaloosa, nga bulungiddwamu omunnyo, temuli kantu konna, butukuvu;" 
Exodus30:36 obumu buse bubeere lufufugge obusse mu maaso g'Endagaano mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano we nnaakusisinkananga. Bunaabeeranga butukuvu gye muli; 
Exodus30:37 tewabangawo bubaani bulala bwe mweyambisa obuli nga buno; bunaabeeranga butukuvu gye muli olw'Omukama. 
Exodus30:38 Buli abwekoleranga ng'eky'akawoowo, anaaboolebwanga mu bantu be.”" 
Exodus31:1 Omukama yayogera ne Musa n'agamba nti: 
Exodus31:2 “Laba nnonze Bezaleli, mutabani wa Wuri, mutabani wa Kuru, ow'ekika kya Yuda;" 
Exodus31:3 mmujjuzza omwoyo gwa Katonda, amagezi, okutegeera n'okumanya buli bufundi," 
Exodus31:4 amagezi ag'okutetenkanya ebifaananyi, okukola ne zaabu ne ffeeza, n'ekikomo," 
Exodus31:5 mu kubajja amayinja n'okugategeka, okutereeza emiti n'okugyola, ne mu kukola buli mulimu gwonna ogw'obufundi." 
Exodus31:6 Era mmulondeddeko Oliyabu mutabani wa Akisamaki, ow'ekika kya Daani; ne bakakensa bonna mbawadde obukugu, balyoke batuukirize byonna bye nkulagidde:" 
Exodus31:7 Weema ey'Ensisinkano, Essanduuku ey'Endagaano, Entebe y'Obusaasizi egisaanikirako na byonna ebiri mu Weema;" 
Exodus31:8 emmeeza na byonna n'ebigikozesebwako, n'ekikondo ky'ettawaaza ekya zaabu omwereere na byonna ebikikozesebwako, omwaliiro gw'obubaani," 
Exodus31:9 omwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye na byonna n'ebigukozesebwako, ekinaabirwamu n'ekikondo kyakyo," 
Exodus31:10 ebyambalo ebiruke, ebyambalo ebitukuvu ebya Aroni kabona n'ebyambalo bya batabani be mwe bakolera emirimu gy'obwakabona," 
Exodus31:11 n'omuzigo ogw'okusiiga, n'obubaani obw'akawoowo obw'okukozesa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Byonna babikoleranga ddala nga bwe mbikulagidde.”" 
Exodus31:12 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus31:13 “Yogera eri Abayisirayeli, obagambe nti: ‘Muteekwa okukuumanga Sabbaato yange, kubanga Sabbaato ke kabonero wakati wange nammwe amazadde gammwe gonna; ke kanaalaganga nti Nze Mukama abatukuza." 
Exodus31:14 Awo nno muteekwa okukuumanga Sabbaato, kubanga ntukuvu gye muli. Omuntu agyonoona wa kuttibwanga. Buli yenna akola omulimu gwonna ku olwo, wa kukutulwanga okuva mu bantu be." 
Exodus31:15 Okukola kwa kubeerangawo mu nnaku mukaaga, naye olwomusanvu Sabbaato, lwa kuwummulira ddala, lwawuliddwa Omukama. Buli yenna akolanga omulimu ku lwa Sabbaato wa kuttibwanga.’" 
Exodus31:16 Abayisirayeli ba kukuumanga Sabbaato nga bagikuza amazadde gaabwe gonna. Eno ndagaano ya lubeerera. 
Exodus31:17 Wakati wange n'abaana ba Yisirayeli Sabbaato eneebeeranga kabonero ka lubeerera, anti Omukama yakola eggulu n'ensi mu nnaku mukaaga, naye ku lunaku olwomusanvu n'awummula, n'assa ekikkowe.”" 
Exodus31:18 Omukama bwe yamala okwogera ne Musa ku lusozi Sinayi, n'amuwa empande bbiri ez'Endagaano, empande ez'amayinja, ezaawandiikibwako n'olunwe lwa Katonda." 
Exodus32:1 Abantu bwe baalaba nga Musa aluddewo okukka okuva ku lusozi, ne bakuŋŋaanira awali Aroni, ne bamugamba nti: “Situka. Tukolere balubaale batukulembere, kubanga ono omusajja Musa, eyatuggya mu Misiri, tetumanyi ky'abadde.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aroni n'abaddamu nti: “Muggye empeta eza zaabu ku matu g'abakazi bammwe, batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe muzindeetere.”" 
Exodus32:3 Abantu bonna ne batungula empeta eza zaabu ezaali ku matu gaabwe ne bazireetera Aroni," 
Exodus32:4 n'azibaggyako, n'ekyuma ekyola n'azikolamu akayana akasaanuuse. Ne baleekaana nti: “Yisirayeli, Katonda wo wuuno, eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri.”" 
Exodus32:5 Aroni yalaba guli gutyo, n'azimba omwaliiro mu maaso gaako. N'alangirira nti: “Enkya enaaba mbaga olw'Omukama.”" 
Exodus32:6 Abantu ne bakeera ku lunaku olwaddirira, ne baweereza ebitambiro ebyokye, ne baleeta ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu; awo abantu bonna ne batuula wansi okulya n'okunywa, ne basituka okwesanyusa." 
Exodus32:7 Awo Omukama n'ayogera ne Musa n'agamba nti: “Genda, kkirira; anti abantu bo be waggya mu nsi y'e Misiri bakoze ekibi." 
Exodus32:8 Tebaludde kuva mu kkubo lye nabalagira; beekoledde akayana akasaanuuse ne bakasinza n'okukasinza, ne bakatambirira nga bwe bagamba nti: ‘Yisirayeli, ono ye Katonda wo, eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Omukama n'ayongera okugamba Musa nti: “Abantu bano mbalabye; bantu ba nsingo nkakanyavu. 
Exodus32:10 Kati ndeka, obusungu bwange bubeeserereko, mbawemmente; mu ggwe nnaakolamu eggwanga eddene.”" 
Exodus32:11 Naye Musa ne yeekuba ku Mukama Katonda we, n'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, lwaki obusungu bwo bweseredde ku bantu bo be waggya mu Misiri mu buyinza obunene n'omukono ogw'amaanyi?" 
Exodus32:12 Lwaki Abamisiri bandigambye nti: ‘Yabaggyayo na mutima mubi abawemmentere mu nsozi, abasaanyeewo ku nsi?’ Leka obusungu bwo obwesera. Weddemu ku kabi kano ku bantu bo." 
Exodus32:13 Jjukira Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yisirayeli abaweereza bo, ggwe wennyini be walayirira n'obasuubiza nti: ‘Bazzukulu bammwe ndibawa okwala ng'emmunyeenye ez'eggulu, n'ensi eno yonna gye nasuubiza nti ndigiwa abazzukulu bammwe, n'eba busika bwabwe emirembe gyonna.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Omukama ne yeddamu ku kabi ke yali agamba okukola abantu be. 
Exodus32:15 Musa n'akyusa, n'aserengeta olusozi, ng'akutte empande ebbiri ez'Endagaano, empande nga ziwandiikiddwako ku njuyi zombi mu maaso n'emabega." 
Exodus32:16 Empande zino gwali mulimu gwa Katonda, ebiwandiikiddwako nga Katonda y'abiwandiiseeko, nga byoleddwa ku mpande." 
Exodus32:17 Yoswa bwe yawulira oluyoogaano lw'abantu nga baleekaana, n'agamba Musa nti: “Waliyo enduulu y'olutalo mu lusiisira.”" 
Exodus32:18 Musa n'amuddamu nti: “Si ddoboozi lya buwanguzi, si ddoboozi lya kuwangulibwa; wabula ddoboozi lya kuyimba lye mpulira.”" 
Exodus32:19 Bwe yasemberera olusiisira, n'alaba akayana n'abazina, obusungu bwa Musa ne bwesera, n'akasuka wansi empande ze yali akutte, n'azaasiza wansi w'olusozi." 
Exodus32:20 N'akwata akayana ke baali bakoze n'akookya mu muliro, n'akasa ne kafuuka nfuufu, n'agimansa ku mazzi, n'aganywesa Abayisirayeli." 
Exodus32:21 Musa n'agamba Aroni nti: “Abantu bano bakukoze ki, okubaleetera ekibi ekinene ekyenkana wano?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni n'addamu nti: “Obusungu bwo buleme kwesera butyo, ssebo; naawe omanyi abantu bano bwe beewunzikira ku bubi." 
Exodus32:23 Baŋŋamba nti: ‘Tukolere lubaale atukulembere; ono omusajja Musa, eyatuggya mu Misiri tetumanyi ky'abadde.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ne mbagamba nti: ‘Ani alina zaabu amweggyeko?’ Ne bamumpa, ne mmusuula mu muliro ne muvaamu akayana kano.”" 
Exodus32:25 Musa bwe yalaba ng'abantu bataamuse, kubanga Aroni yali abalese okutaamuuka ne bafuuka kya kusekererwa mu balabe baabwe," 
Exodus32:26 n'ayimirira ku wankaaki w'olusiisira n'aleekaana nti: “Buli ali ku ludda lw'Omukama, ajje gye ndi.” Abaleevi bonna ne bamukuŋŋaanirako." 
Exodus32:27 N'abagamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli bw'ati bw'agambye: ‘Buli musajja ayambalire ekitala kye ku lukugunyu, mutalaage mu lusiisira mulyango ku mulyango buli omu ng'atta muganda we, mukwano gwe ne muliraanwa we.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Abaleevi ne batuukiriza ekiragiro kya Musa; mu bantu ne mufaamu abasajja ng'enkumi ssatu olunaku olwo. 
Exodus32:29 Musa n'agamba nti: “Leero mweyawulidde Omukama, kubanga buli omu awakanyizza mutabani we oba muganda we n'amutta, bw'atyo n'abawa omukisa olwa leero.”" 
Exodus32:30 Enkeera, Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mukoze ekibi kinene. Naye ka nnyambuke eri Omukama, ndabe oba nnaayinza okuddaabiriza olw'ekibi kyammwe.”" 
Exodus32:31 Musa n'adda eri Omukama, n'agamba nti: “Yii, abantu bano ekibi kye bakoze nga kinene! Beekoledde lubaale owa zaabu." 
Exodus32:32 Kkiriza okubasonyiwa ekibi kyabwe, bw'oba toobasonyiwe, nze nsazaamu mu kitabo kye wawandiika.”" 
Exodus32:33 Omukama n'addamu Musa nti: “Omuntu eyayonoona gye ndi gwe nnaasangula mu kitabo kyange. 
Exodus32:34 Kati ggwe genda okulembere abantu, obatwale mu kifo kye nnaakubuulira. Laba malayika wange anaakukulembera, naye ku lunaku olw'okubonereza, ndibabonereza olw'ekibi kyabwe.”" 
Exodus32:35 Omukama n'abonereza abantu olw'okubumba akayana Aroni ke yali akoze. 
Exodus33:1 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Vva mu kifo kino wamu n'abantu be waggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ogende mu nsi gye nalayirira Yiburayimu ne Yizaake ne Yakobo nti: ‘Ndigiwa ezzadde lyo.’" 
Exodus33:2 Nzija kusindika malayika akukulemberemu; ndigoba Abakanaani, Abaamori, Abakitti, Abaperizzi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Mugende mu nsi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki. Kyokka nze sijja kugenda nammwe. Muli bantu ba nsingo nkakanyavu, sikulwa nga mbawemmentera mu kkubo.”" 
Exodus33:4 Abantu bwe baawulira ebigambo bino ebigumu, ne badda mu kukaaba; era tewaali n'omu yayambala bya kwewoomya." 
Exodus33:5 Awo Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Muli bantu ba nsingo nkakanyavu. Mba kugenda nammwe, wadde akaseera obuseera, nandibawemmense. Kale mwambule eby'okwewoomya, nze nzija kulaba nga bwe nnaabakola.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Bwe batyo, okuva ku olwo ku lusozi Korebu, Abayisirayeli beeyambulamu eby'okwewoomya." 
Exodus33:7 Musa yaddiranga Weema n'agikomerera ebweru w'olusiisira, nga yeesudde okuva ku lusiisira, n'agiyita Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Buli yenna eyayagalanga okwebuuza ku Mukama, yafulumanga n'alaga eri Weema ey'Ensisinkano, wabweru w'olusiisira." 
Exodus33:8 Buli Musa lwe yafulumanga okulaga eri Weema, abantu bonna nga basituka, buli muntu ng'ayimirira mu mulyango gwa weema ye n'atunuulira Musa okutuusa lwe yayingiranga mu Weema." 
Exodus33:9 Buli Musa lwe yayingiranga mu Weema, empagi y'ekire yakkanga ne yeesimba ku mulyango gwa Weema, Omukama n'ayogera ne Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Abantu bonna bwe baalabanga empagi y'ekire nga yeesimbye ku mulyango gwa Weema, ne basituka, ne bavunnama, buli omu ku mulyango gwa weema ye." 
Exodus33:11 Omukama n'ayogeranga ne Musa maaso na maaso, ng'omuntu bw'ayogera ne mukwano gwe. Awo Musa n'addayo mu lusiisira; naye omuvubuka Yoswa eyali omuyambi we, mutabani wa Nuunu, ye teyavanga mu Weema." 
Exodus33:12 Musa n'agamba Omukama nti: “Wuuno kati oŋŋamba nti: ‘Tambuza abantu bano’, naye tombuulidde gw'onoosindika kugenda nange. Ggwe wennyini ogambye nti: ‘Nkumanyi erinnya, era osanze ekisa mu maaso gange.’" 
Exodus33:13 Kale nno obanga nsanze ekisa mu maaso go, nkwegayiridde ndaga amakubo go, ndyoke nnyongere okukutegeera n'okusanga ekisa mu maaso go. Jjukira nti eggwanga lino bantu bo ku bubwo.”" 
Exodus33:14 Omukama n'addamu nti: “Nze nzennyini nzija kugenda nammwe; era ndikuwa ekiwummulo.” 
Exodus33:15 Musa n'amuddamu nti: “Obanga togenda naffe ggwe wennyini, totuggya mu kifo kino." 
Exodus33:16 Banaamanya batya oba nti nze n'abantu bo twasanga ekisa mu maaso go bw'otojje naffe? Tunaayawulirwa ku ki, nze n'abantu bo, ku bantu bonna abali ku nsi?”" 
Exodus33:17 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Era nzija kukola ky'osabye, kubanga onsanyusizza, kubanga nkumanyi erinnya.” Musa ku lusozi" 
Exodus33:18 Musa n'agamba nti: “Nkwegayiridde, ndaga ekitiibwa kyo.”" 
Exodus33:19 N'ayanukula nti: “Nzija kuddira obulungi bwange bwonna buyite mu maaso go, era nzija kwatula mu maaso go erinnya lyange, Mukama. Gwe nnaagiriranga ekisa nnaamugiriranga ekisa, ne gwe nnaasaasiranga naye nnaamusaasiranga.”" 
Exodus33:20 Era n'agamba nti: “Kyokka toyinza kulaba maaso gange; kubanga omuntu tayinza kundaba n'aba mulamu.” 
Exodus33:21 Omukama n'amuddira nti: “Ekifo kiikino okumpi nange, ojja kuyimirira ku lwazi." 
Exodus33:22 Ekitiibwa kyange bwe kinaaba kiyitawo, nzija kukussa mu lwatika lw'olwazi, nkusiikirize n'ekibatu okutuusa nga mpiseewo," 
Exodus33:23 olwo ndyoke nzigyewo ekibatu kyange; onoolaba amabega gange, naye amaaso gange si ga kulabibwa.”" 
Exodus34:1 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Bajjayo empande bbiri ez'amayinja eziri nga ziri ezaasooka, nziwandiikeko ebigambo ebyali ku mpande ezaasooka ze wayasa." 
Exodus34:2 Weetegeke enkya, olinnye ku lusozi Sinayi nga mmambya asala, onneeyanjulirire eyo ku ntikko y'olusozi." 
Exodus34:3 Tewabaawo alinnya naawe; tewalabika omuntu n'omu ku lusozi, wadde endiga oba ente si za kuliira mu maaso ga lusozi luno.”" 
Exodus34:4 Musa n'abajja empande ez'amayinja bbiri eziri nga ziri ezaasooka. Bwe yagolokoka ku makya, n'alinnya olusozi Sinayi, ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde, ng'akutte empande ez'amayinja ebbiri." 
Exodus34:5 Omukama n'akkiririra mu kire. Musa n'ayimirira naye eyo, n'akoowoola erinnya lye, Mukama." 
Exodus34:6 Omukama n'ayita mu maaso ge, ng'alaamiriza nti: “Omukama, Omukama, Katonda ow'ekisa, omusaasizi, atasunguwala mangu, ajjudde ekisa n'obwesigwa," 
Exodus34:7 akuumira enkumi ekisa kye, asonyiwa ekyonoono, obujeemu, n'ekibi, sso nga taleka kya kubonereza nga tekibonerezeddwa, abonereza ekyonoono ky'abazadde abasajja mu batabani baabwe ne mu bazzukulu okutuuka ku zzadde eryokusatu n'eryokuna.”" 
Exodus34:8 Amangu ago Musa n'avunnama ku ttaka n'asinza. 
Exodus34:9 N'agamba nti: “Mukama, oba ddala nga nsanze ekisa mu maaso go, nkwegayiridde Mukama wange agende naffe. Newandibadde bantu ba nsingo nkakanyavu, tusonyiwe ebisobyo n'ebibi byaffe, otwebonanye ng'obusika bwo.”" 
Exodus34:10 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Laba nkola naawe endagaano. Mu maaso g'abantu bonna nzija kukola ebyewuunyisa bingi ebitakolebwanga mu nsi ndala oba mu ggwanga ddala. Abantu bonna mw'oli baliraba Omukama ky'akola, kubanga by'alikukolera biriba bya ntiisa." 
Exodus34:11 Kale kwata bye nkulagira olwa leero. Ŋŋenda kubagoberawo Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abakitti, Abaperizzi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Wekkaanye: tokolanga endagaano ne bannansi b'omu nsi eyo gy'ogenda okuyingiramu sikulwa nga babafuukira omutego mu makkati gammwe. 
Exodus34:13 Naye emyaliiro gyabwe mugimenyangawo, amayinja gaabwe agayimiridde mugaasaayasanga, n'empagi zaabwe eza Asera muzitemanga." 
Exodus34:14 Tovunnamiranga lubaale, kubanga Omukama wa buggya, erinnya lye ye Katonda ow'Obuggya." 
Exodus34:15 Tokolanga endagaano ne bannansi b'omu nsi eyo, sikulwa nga bwe bakola obwamalaaya ne balubaale baabwe ne babatambirira, babayita ne mugabana ku bitambiro byabwe." 
Exodus34:16 Sikulwa nga batabani bo obafunira abakazi mu bawala baabwe; bo bwe balimala okukola obwamalaaya ne balubaale baabwe, ne bakoza batabani bo obwamalaaya ne balubaale baabwe." 
Exodus34:17 “Tewekoleranga balubaale basaanuuse. 
Exodus34:18 “Okuzanga embaga ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse. Omalanga ennaku musanvu ng'olya migaati egitazimbulukuse, nga bwe nakulagira, mu budde obulagiddwa mu mwezi gw'Abibu, anti mu mwezi ogwo Abibu mwe waviira mu Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 “Buli kiggulanda ky'olubuto kyange: buli kyonna ekisajja mu nsolo zo ez'awaka ekiggulanda mu nte oba mu ndiga. 
Exodus34:20 Naye endogoyi eggula enda oginunuzangayo akaliga: bw'obanga tooginunule, ogimenyanga ensingo. Na buli mutabani wo omuggulanda omununulanga; tewabanga n'omu alabika mu maaso gange ngalo nsa." 
Exodus34:21 “Onookoleranga ennaku mukaaga, ku lunaku olwomusanvu n'owummula; oliwummula ne bwe buba budde bwa kulima oba bwa makungula." 
Exodus34:22 “Okuzanga Embaga eya Wiiki, n'Embaga y'Amakungula ag'ebibala ebibereberye eby'eŋŋano, n'Embaga y'Okukuŋŋaanya ku nkomerero y'omwaka." 
Exodus34:23 “Buli musajja yenna mu ggwe aneeyolekanga emirundi esatu mu mwaka mu maaso g'Omukama ow'Obuyinza, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Exodus34:24 “Anti bwe ndimala okukuggyirawo amawanga n'okugaziya ensalo zo, tewaliba yeegomba nsi yo ng'ogenze okweyoleka mu maaso g'Omukama emirundi esatu buli mwaka." 
Exodus34:25 “Ekitambiro kyange eky'omusaayi totambirirangako kizimbulukusa, n'ekitambiro ekiweerezebwa ku Mbaga ya Pasika tekisulangawo okutuusa enkeera." 
Exodus34:26 “Ebibala ebisooka ebisinga obulungi eby'ettaka lyo obitwalanga mu nnyumba y'Omukama Katonda wo. Tofumbiranga kabuzi mu mata ga nnyina waako.” 
Exodus34:27 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: “Wandiika ebigambo bino, kubanga nga bwe biri bwe nkoze Endagaano naawe ne Yisirayeli.”" 
Exodus34:28 Musa yasigala n'Omukama okumala ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana, nga talidde mugaati wadde okunywa otuzzi. N'awandiika ku mpande ebigambo by'Endagaano, Ebigambo Ekkumi." 
Exodus34:29 Musa bwe yaserengeta ng'ava ku lusozi Sinayi, yajja akutte mu ngalo ze, empande ebbiri ez'Endagaano; teyamanya ng'olususu lw'ekyenyi kye lwali lutangalijja oluvannyuma lw'okunyumya n'Omukama." 
Exodus34:30 Awo Aroni n'Abayisirayeli ne balaba nga Musa olususu lw'ekyenyi kye lutangalijja, ne batya okumusemberera." 
Exodus34:31 Naye Musa n'abayita, Aroni n'abakulembeze b'ekibiina bonna ne bakomawo gy'ali, n'ayogera gye bali." 
Exodus34:32 Oluvannyuma Abayisirayeli bonna ne basembera, n'abatuusaako ebiragiro byonna Omukama bye yali amuwadde ku lusozi Sinayi." 
Exodus34:33 Musa bwe yamala okwogera nabo, n'assa ekiremba ku maaso ge." 
Exodus34:34 Buli lwe yagendanga mu maaso g'Omukama okwogera naye, ng'abikkula ekiremba, okutuusa ate lwe yafulumanga. Ate bwe yafulumanga n'abuulira Abayisirayeli byonna bye yabanga alagiddwa." 
Exodus34:35 Abayisirayeli baalabanga amaaso ga Musa ng'olususu lw'ekyenyi kya Musa lutangalijja, ye n'addamu okubikka amaaso ge ekirembe okutuusa lwe yayingiranga okwogera n'Omukama." 
Exodus35:1 Awo Musa n'akuŋŋaanya ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli n'abagamba nti: “Bino bye bintu Omukama bye yalagira okukola. 
Exodus35:2 Okukola kwa kubangawo ennaku mukaaga, naye olwomusanvu lwa kubeeranga lutukuvu gye muli, Sabbaato ey'okuwummula okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa. Buli akolanga omulimu ku olwo wa kuttibwa." 
Exodus35:3 Temukumanga omuliro ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato mu maka gammwe.” 
Exodus35:4 Musa n'ayogera n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli, n'agamba nti: “Kino Omukama ky'alagidde nti:" 
Exodus35:5 Ku byammwe muggyeeko ekitone ky'Omukama. Buli ayagadde okuwa aleete ekitone ky'Omukama: zaabu, ffeeza n'ekikomo;" 
Exodus35:6 ewuzi eza bbululu, eza kakobe n'entwakaavu, ate n'olugoye olwa bafuta olulange era n'ebyoya by'embuzi," 
Exodus35:7 amaliba g'endiga ennume amannyike amamyufu, amaliba amakunye n'emiti egy'obusaana," 
Exodus35:8 omuzigo ogw'omu ttawaaza, n'ebyakaloosa ebissibwa mu muzigo ogusiigibwa n'obubaani obw'akawoowo;" 
Exodus35:9 amayinja oniki n'amayinja ag'okussa ku efodi ne ku kipaapi eky'oku kifuba. 
Exodus35:10 Abafundi bonna abasingira ddala obukugu mu mmwe bajje bakole byonna Omukama by'alagidde: 
Exodus35:11 Ekisulo, Weema yaakyo n'ekibikkako, ebikwaso byayo n'embaawo zaayo, emikiikiro gyayo n'empagi zaayo n'entobo zaayo," 
Exodus35:12 Essanduuku n'emisituliro gyayo, Entebe y'Obusaasizi n'olutimbe olusiikiriza;" 
Exodus35:13 emmeeza n'emisituliro gyayo na byonna ebigikozesebwamu, n'Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa;" 
Exodus35:14 ekikondo ky'ettawaaza n'ebikikozesebwako, ettawaaza zaakyo n'omuzigo ogw'ettawaaza;" 
Exodus35:15 omwaliiro ogw'obubaani n'emisituliro gyagwo, omuzigo ogusiiga, obubaani obw'akawoowo, n'olutimbe olw'oku mulyango gw'Ekisulo;" 
Exodus35:16 n'omwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye n'ekitindiro kyagwo eky'ekikomo, emisituliro gyagwo, ne byonna ebigukozesebwako; ekinaabirwamu n'ekikondo kyakyo;" 
Exodus35:17 entimbe z'oluggya; empagi zaalwo, entobo zaabyo, n'olutimbe olwa wankaaki w'oluggya," 
Exodus35:18 enkondo z'Ekisulo n'ez'oluggya, wamu n'emiguwa gyazo;" 
Exodus35:19 ebyambalo ebiruke eby'okuweereza mu Kitukuvu: ebyambalo ebitukuvu ebya Aroni kabona, n'ebyambalo bya batabani be nga bakola obwakabona.”" 
Exodus35:20 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kiva mu maaso ga Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Buli yenna omutima gwe gwasindika n'omwoyo gwe gwasindika okuwa n'ajja n'aleeta ekitone ky'Omukama kikole Weema ey'Ensisinkano n'emirimu gyayo gyonna, n'ebyambalo ebitukuvu." 
Exodus35:22 Bonna mu mutima abeeyagalidde bajja: abasajja n'abakazi, nga baleeta ebikwaso, empeta, amagemu, ebibira, eby'omuwendo ebya zaabu ebya buli ngeri, buli omu n'atonera Omukama zaabu ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba." 
Exodus35:23 Bonna abaalina ewuzi eza bbululu, eza kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta, ebyoya by'embuzi, amaliba g'endiga ennume amannyike amamyufu, amaliba amakunye, ne babireeta." 
Exodus35:24 Bonna abaali ab'okuwa ekitone ekya ffeeza n'ekikomo ne baleeta ekitone ky'Omukama. N'abo bonna abaali balina emiti egy'akasaana olwa buli mulimu ne bagireeta. 
Exodus35:25 Abakazi bonna abakugu ne balanga n'emikono gyabwe, ne baleeta bye baali balanze: ewuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta." 
Exodus35:26 Abakazi bonna, emitima gyabwe be gyasindika, ne balanga n'obukugu ebyoya by'embuzi." 
Exodus35:27 Abakulembeze ne baleeta amayinja oniki n'amayinja ag'okuteeka ku efodi ne ku kipaapi eky'oku kifuba," 
Exodus35:28 n'ebyakaloosa n'omuzigo ogw'omu ttawaaza, n'ogw'okukola omuzigo ogw'okusiiga n'ogw'okukola obubaani obw'akawoowo." 
Exodus35:29 Abasajja bonna n'abakazi Abayisirayeli omutima gwabwe be gwasindika okugabira omulimu gwonna Omukama gwe yali alagidde okukolebwa ng'ayita mu Musa, ne baleetera Omukama ekitone kyabwe ekyeyagalire." 
Exodus35:30 Musa n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Omukama alonze Bezaleli, mutabani wa Wuri, mutabani wa Kuru, ow'ekika kya Yuda," 
Exodus35:31 amujjuzza omwoyo gwa Katonda, n'amuwa amagezi, okutegeera n'okumanya buli bufundi," 
Exodus35:32 amagezi ag'okutetenkanya ebifaananyi, okukola ne zaabu ne ffeeza n'ekikomo," 
Exodus35:33 mu kubajja amayinja ag'okugategeka, okutereeza emiti n'okugyola, ne mu kukola buli mulimu gwonna ogw'obufundi." 
Exodus35:34 Ate ye ne Oliyabu mutabani wa Akisamaki ow'ekika kya Daani, abawadde ekirabo eky'okuyigiriza." 
Exodus35:35 Abajjuzza obukugu okutuukiriza emirimu gyonna egy'obufundi, ng'abalusi n'abadaliza mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta, era ng'abalanzi, abakola buli mulimu gwonna, era ng'abalusi." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezaleli ne Oliyabu n'abantu abalala abagezi Omukama be yali awadde amagezi, okutegeera n'okumanya emirimu gyonna egy'obufundi mu kuzimba Ekitukuvu ba kutuukiririza ddala byonna ebyetaagibwa mu kuzimba Ekitukuvu, ng'Omukama bw'alagidde." 
Exodus36:2 Musa n'alyoka atumya Bezaleli ne Oliyabu n'abantu bonna abakugu, Omukama be yali awadde obukugu, omutima gwabwe nga gubasindise, bajje bakole omulimu." 
Exodus36:3 Ne baggya ewa Musa ebitone byonna Abayisirayeli bye baali baleese olw'omulimu ogw'okuzimba Ekitukuvu. Abalala ne bongera okuleeta ebitone byabwe buli nkya. 
Exodus36:4 Abafundi abakugu abaali bakola omulimu gw'Ekitukuvu buli omu n'aleka omulimu gwe, ne bajja," 
Exodus36:5 ne bagamba Musa nti: “Abantu baleeta bingi okusinga ebyetaagibwa okukola omulimu Omukama gwe yalagira gukolebwe.” 
Exodus36:6 Awo Musa n'alagira ne balangirira mu lusiisira nti: “Tewaba n'omu, omusajja oba omukazi, ayongera kukola kantu konna olw'okutonera Ekitukuvu.” Abantu ne bayimirizibwa bwe batyo okwongera okuleeta," 
Exodus36:7 anti eby'okukozesa bye baalina byali bimala okumaliriza omulimu gwonna, n'okuyitirira nga biyitiridde." 
Exodus36:8 Abafundi bonna abasingira ddala obukugu mu bakozi be baakola Ekisulo. Yakikola n'emitanda kkumi egy'olugoye olwa bafuta olulange, n'ewuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu, egirukiddwamu bakerubi, omulimu gw'omulusi." 
Exodus36:9 Obuwanvu bwa buli mutanda bwali bwa mikono abiri mu munaana, obugazi emikono ena; emitanda gyonna nga gya kipimo kimu." 
Exodus36:10 N'ataba wamu emitanda etaano, gumu ku gunnaagwo, n'emitanda emirala etaano n'agitaba mu ngeri ye emu." 
Exodus36:11 Yassa eŋŋango eza bbululu ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusembayo ku lubu olw'emitanda etaano olusooka; yakola kye kimu ne ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusembayo ku lubu olwokubiri. 
Exodus36:12 Yassa eŋŋango ataano ku mutanda omubereberye, n'eŋŋango amakumi ataano ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogw'olubu olwokubiri; eŋŋango zituukanye ey'eno n'ey'eri." 
Exodus36:13 Yakola ebikwaso amakumi ataano ebya zaabu, n'agatta emitanda gumu ku gunnaagwo n'ebikwaso; bwe kityo Ekisulo ne kiba kintu kimu." 
Exodus36:14 Yakola emitanda mu byoya by'embuzi egyakola Weema ku Kisulo; egyo yakola kkumi na gumu. 
Exodus36:15 Obuwanvu bw'omutanda kinnagumu bwali emikono asatu, obugazi emikono ena; emitanda ekkumi n'ogumu gyalina obunene bumu." 
Exodus36:16 Etaano ku mitanda gino yagitaba wamu mu lubu lumu, egisigadde omukaaga ne giba mu lulala." 
Exodus36:17 Yakola eŋŋango amakumi ataano n'azikwasa ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusembayo ku lubu olumu. Bw'atyo era ne ku mukugiro ogw'omutanda ogusemba ku lubu olwokubiri. 
Exodus36:18 Yakola ebikwaso amakumi ataano eby'ekikomo, biryoke bisibe Weema awamu, kibeere kintu kimu." 
Exodus36:19 Weema yagikolera ekibikkako eky'amaliba g'endiga ennume nga mannyike mu langi emmyufu, n'ekibikka ekirala eky'amaliba amakunye ekyabikka ku kiri." 
Exodus36:20 Ekisulo yakikolera embaawo eza kaabusimba mu muti ogw'akasaana," 
Exodus36:21 Buli lubaawo lwaliko emikono kkumi obuwanvu, ate omukono gumu n'ekitundu obugazi." 
Exodus36:22 Buli lubaawo yalussaako emirumyo ebiri ebiri, bw'atyo bwe yakola ne ku mbaawo zonna ez'Ekisulo." 
Exodus36:23 Ekisulo yakikolera embaawo amakumi abiri ku luuyi lw'emaserengeta nga zitunuulidde emaserengeta. 
Exodus36:24 Yawoola entobo amakumi ana eza ffeeza ku lw'embaawo amakumi abiri; entobo bbiri wansi w'olubaawo olusooka olw'emirumyo gyazo ebiri, ne ku luddako entobo bbiri olw'emirumyo gyazo ebiri." 
Exodus36:25 Emambuka ku luuyi olulala olw'Ekisulo, yakolerayo embaawo amakumi abiri," 
Exodus36:26 ezanywezebwa entobo amakumi ana eza ffeeza, entobo bbiri wansi wa buli lubaawo." 
Exodus36:27 Emabega w'Ekisulo, ebugwanjuba yakolerayo embaawo mukaaga." 
Exodus36:28 Yakola embaawo bbiri mu nsonda emabega w'Ekisulo. 
Exodus36:29 Ezo zaagattibwa bbiri wamu okuva wansi okutuukira ddala waggulu ne zisibwa n'empeta embereberye; n'embaawo ebbiri ez'ensonda endala bbiri bwe yazikola. 
Exodus36:30 Olwo waaliwo embaawo munaana n'entobo zaazo eza ffeeza kkumi na mukaaga; entobo bbiri wansi wa buli lubaawo. 
Exodus36:31 Yakola emikiikiro egy'embaawo mu muti ogw'akasaana, etaano olw'embaawo ku luuyi olumu olw'Ekisulo," 
Exodus36:32 etaano olw'embaawo ku luuyi olulala olw'Ekisulo, ate emikiikiro etaano olw'embaawo ku luuyi olusembayo olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Exodus36:33 Yakola omukiikiro ogwa wakati, nga guyitamu wakati w'embaawo okuva ku nkomerero emu ey'embaawo okutuuka ku ndala." 
Exodus36:34 Embaawo yazibikkako zaabu, n'akolerako empeta eza zaabu omuyita emikiikiro, n'emikiikiro n'agibikkako zaabu." 
Exodus36:35 Yakola olutimbe mu wuzi eza bbululu, eza kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta olulange, omulimu gw'omulusi mwe yatona bakerubi." 
Exodus36:36 Yalukolera empagi nnya mu muti ogw'akasaana, n'abibikkako zaabu; n'amalobo aga zaabu, n'aziweeseza entobo nnya eza ffeeza." 
Exodus36:37 Ku mulyango gwa Weema yakolerako olutimbe oluluke mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu, mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange, omulimu gw'omudaliza omukugu;" 
Exodus36:38 n'empagi zaalwo ttaano, n'amalobo gaazo; emitwe gyazo n'emikiikiro n'abibikkako zaabu; entobo zaazo ettaano zaali za kikomo." 
Exodus37:1 Bezaleli yakola Essanduuku mu muti ogw'akasaana; emikono ebiri n'ekitundu obuwanvu, omukono gumu n'ekitundu obugazi, omukono gumu n'ekitundu obusimba." 
Exodus37:2 N'agibikkako zaabu omwereere, munda ne kungulu. Yagikolera omuge ogwa zaabu okugyetoolooza." 
Exodus37:3 Yaweesezaako empeta nnya eza zaabu, ze yassa ku nsonda ennya ez'essanduuku w'ewanirirwa; ku luuyi olumu ebeereyo empeta bbiri ne ku luuyi olulala empeta bbiri." 
Exodus37:4 Yakola n'emisituliro egy'embaawo ez'akasaana n'agibikkako zaabu. 
Exodus37:5 Emisituliro yagiyisa mu mpeta ezaali mu nsonda z'essanduuku okusitula Essanduuku. 
Exodus37:6 Yakola n'Entebe y'Obusaasizi, nga ya zaabu omwereere, emikono ebiri n'ekitundu obuwanvu, ate omukono gumu n'ekitundu obugazi." 
Exodus37:7 Eno n'eri w'Entebe y'Obusaasizi yakolerayo bakerubi mu zaabu omukubeekube; 
Exodus37:8 Yakola kerubi omu ku nkomerero y'oluuyi olumu n'omulala ku nkomerero y'oluuyi olulala olw'Entebe. 
Exodus37:9 Bakerubi baali ebiwaawatiro byabwe babyanjululizza waggulu, nga babikkirira Entebe y'Obusaasizi n'ebiwaawaatiro byabwe; nga batunuuliraganye, ng'amaaso gaabwe gatunuulidde Entebe y'Obusaasizi." 
Exodus37:10 Yakola emmeeza mu muti ogw'akasaana, emikono ebiri obuwanvu, omukono gumu obugazi, ate omukono gumu n'ekitundu obusimba." 
Exodus37:11 Yagibikkako zaabu omwereere, ate n'agissaako omuge ogwa zaabu okugyetoolooza." 
Exodus37:12 Yagikolera omugo gwa luta lumu obugazi, n'agitonako omuge ogwa zaabu okugwetoolooza." 
Exodus37:13 Yagisaanusiza empeta nnya eza zaabu, n'azisiba ku nsonda ennya awali amagulu ana;" 
Exodus37:14 empeta zaali kumpi n'omugo okugumya emisituliro okusitulirwa emmeeza. 
Exodus37:15 Yakola emisituliro mu muti ogw'akasaana, n'agibikkako zaabu okusitulanga emmeeza." 
Exodus37:16 Yakolerako essowaani, ebijiiko, n'ensumbi n'entiba zaayo ez'okufukanga ekitone eky'okuyiwa; yakola bya zaabu omwereere." 
Exodus37:17 Yakola ekikondo ky'ettawaaza kya zaabu omwereere; entobo n'ekikwatibwako byali bya zaabu omukubeekube. Ekikopo kyakwo, entwe n'ebimuli, byali ekintu kimu nakyo." 
Exodus37:18 Amatabi mukaaga gaayawukana nga gava mu mabbali gaakyo: asatu ku luuyi olumu, n'asatu ku luuyi olulala." 
Exodus37:19 Ettabi ebbereberye lyaliko ebikopo bisatu ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'endoozi, buli kimu n'entwe n'ekimuli; n'ettabi eryokubiri lyaliko nalyo ebikopo bisatu ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'endoozi buli kimu n'entwe n'ekimuli; bwe kityo ne ku matabi omukaaga gonna agaawukana okuva ku kikondo ky'ettawaaza." 
Exodus37:20 Ekikondo ky'ettawaaza kyennyini kyaliko ebikopo bina ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'endoozi, buli kimu n'entwe n'ekimuli." 
Exodus37:21 Waaliwo entwe emu wansi w'amatabi agasooka, agava ku kikondo; entwe wansi w'amatabi abiri agaddirira, entwe wansi w'amatabi asatu agaddirira. Kyali bwe kityo ne ku matabi omukaaga agakyawukanako." 
Exodus37:22 Entwe n'amatabi byali kintu kimu n'ekikondo ky'ettawaaza, ate kyonna nga kikoleddwa mu kintu kimu mu zaabu omwereere, omukubeekube." 
Exodus37:23 Era yakikolera ettawaaza musanvu, magalo n'obusowaani bwayo okubeera ebisirinza, byali bya zaabu omwereere." 
Exodus37:24 Okukola ekikondo ky'ettawaaza n'ebikikozesebwako, yakozesa talenta emu eya zaabu omwereere." 
Exodus37:25 Yakola omwaliiro gw'obubaani mu muti ogw'akasaana; gwali gwa mukono gumu obuwanvu n'obugazi omukono gumu, nga gwenkanankana ku njuyi zonna; obusimba emikono ebiri; amayembe gaagwo gaali ekintu kimu nagwo." 
Exodus37:26 Kungulu kwagwo, ne ku mabbali okwetooloola enjuyi zaagwo, n'amayembe gaagwo yabikkako zaabu omwereere n'assaako omuge ogwa zaabu omwereere okugwetoolooza." 
Exodus37:27 Yagussaako empeta bbiri eza zaabu wansi w'omuge gwayo ku njuyi zaagwo ebbiri ezitunuuliraganye, omwo mwe yassa emisituliro egyeyambisibwa mu kugusitula." 
Exodus37:28 Yakola emisituliro mu muti ogw'akasaana n'agibikka ne zaabu. 
Exodus37:29 Yakola omuzigo omutukuvu ogusiiga, n'obubaani obw'akawoowo; omulimu gw'omutabuzi w'ebyakaloosa." 
Exodus38:1 Yakola omwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye mu muti ogw'akasaana ng'enjuyi zaagwo zenkanankana: emikono etaano obuwanvu, emikono etaano obugazi; obusimba bwagwo emikono esatu." 
Exodus38:2 Ku nsonda zaagwo ennya yakolerako amayembe, amayembe gaayo nga gali ddala kuli; n'agibikka n'ekikomo." 
Exodus38:3 Yakola byonna ebikozesebwa ku mwaliiro: entamu, ebitiiyo, ebibya ebyeyambisibwa mu kumansira amazzi, entoozo, n'enzigyo. Ebikozesebwa byonna eby'oku mwaliiro yabikola mu kikomo." 
Exodus38:4 Omwaliiro yagukolera ekitindiro nga kigombezeddwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, wansi w'emikiikiro gyagwo, mu makkati g'obugulumivu bwagwo." 
Exodus38:5 Yaweesa empeta nnya, n'azinywereza ku nsonda ennya ez'ekitindiro ky'ekikomo omuyita emisituliro." 
Exodus38:6 Yakola emisituliro mu muti ogw'akasaana n'agibikkako ekikomo. 
Exodus38:7 Yagissa mu mpeta eziri mu mbiriizi z'omwaliiro okugusitula. N'akola omwaliiro gw'embaawo nga mwereere munda. 
Exodus38:8 Yakola ekinaabirwamu eky'ekikomo, n'ekikondo kyakyo eky'ekikomo ng'abiggya mu ndabirwamu z'abakazi abaweereza ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Exodus38:9 Yakola oluggya, ku ludda olw'emaserengeta. Entimbe z'oluggya zaali za lugoye olwa bafuta olulange emikono kikumi." 
Exodus38:10 Ebikondo byalwo n'entobo zaabyo amakumi abiri byali bya kikomo; amalobo g'ebikondo n'emikiikiro bya ffeeza. 
Exodus38:11 Ku luuyi olw'emambuka waaliyo entimbe nga za mikono kikumi obuwanvu, n'ebikondo byazo amakumi abiri n'entobo zaabyo amakumi abiri za kikomo, n'amalobo g'ebikondo n'emikiikiro nga bya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:12 Ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba waaliyo entimbe za mikono etaano, ebikondo byabyo kkumi n'entobo zaabyo kkumi, amalobo g'ebikondo n'emikiikiro nga bya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:13 Ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba, okwolekera enjuba gy'eva, waaliyo emikono ataano." 
Exodus38:14 Ku luuyi olumu olw'omulyango waaliyo entimbe za mikono kkumi n'etaano n'ebikondo byazo bisatu n'entobo zaabyo ssatu. 
Exodus38:15 Ku luuyi olulala olw'omulyango gw'oluggya waaliyo entimbe za mikono kkumi n'etaano n'ebikondo byazo bisatu n'entobo zaabyo ssatu. 
Exodus38:16 Entimbe zonna ezibugiriza oluggya zaali nkole mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange. 
Exodus38:17 Entobo z'ebikondo zaali za kikomo, amalobo n'emikiikiro gy'ebikondo nga bya ffeeza, emitwe gyabyo nga mibikkeko ffeeza era n'emikiikiro gy'ebikondo eby'oluggya nga gibikkiddwa ffeeza." 
Exodus38:18 Olutimbe olusiikiriza omulyango gw'oluggya lwali lulukiddwa mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu ne mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange; omulimu gw'omudaliza." 
Exodus38:19 Empagi zaalwo zaali nnya; entobo zaazo ennya zaali za kikomo. Amalobo gaazo nga ga ffeeza, emitwe gyazo nga mibikkeko ffeeza, emikiikiro gyazo nga gya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:20 Enkondo z'Ekisulo zonna n'ez'oluggya olwetooloddewo, zaali za kikomo." 
Exodus38:21 Eno ye mbalirira y'ebintu ebyakozesebwa ku Kisulo, kwe kugamba Ekisulo ky'Endagaano, embalirira Musa gye yalagira ekolebwe, Abaleevi gye baakola nga Yitamari mutabani wa Aroni kabona abalagirira." 
Exodus38:22 Bezaleli mutabani wa Wuri, mutabani wa Kuru, ow'ekika kya Yuda, yakola byonna Omukama bye yalagira Musa bikolebwe," 
Exodus38:23 ng'ayambibwako Oliyabu mutabani w'Akisamaki, ow'ekika kya Daani, omufundi, omulusi era omudaliza w'engoye mu wuzi eza bbululu, eza kakobe n'entwakaavu ne mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange." 
Exodus38:24 Obungi bwa zaabu eyakozesebwa ku mulimu gwonna ogw'Ekitukuvu, zaabu eyali aleeteddwa ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba, yali wa talenta abiri mu mwenda ne sekeli lusanvu mu asatu, ng'obalidde ku sekeli ey'Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus38:25 Ffeeza eyakuŋŋaanyizibwa oluvannyuma lw'okubala abantu yazitowa talenta kikumi ne sekeli lukumi mu lusanvu mu nsanvu mu ttaano, ng'obalidde ku sekeli y'Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus38:26 Buli muntu yawa beka emu, oba kitundu kya sekeli ng'obalidde ku sekeli y'omu Kitukuvu, okuva ku buli yenna aweza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo eyayingizibwa mu baabalibwa. Abaabalibwa baawera abasajja obusiriivu mukaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu bitaano mu ataano." 
Exodus38:27 Talenta kikumi eza ffeeza zaakola ku ntobo z'Ekitukuvu n'olutimbe; talenta kkumi zaagenda ku ntobo kikumi, kwe kugamba nti talenta emu ku buli ntobo." 
Exodus38:28 Sekeli lukumi mu lusanvu mu nsanvu mu ttaano ze yeeyamba okukola amalobo ku mpagi, n'okubikka entwe zaazo n'emikiikiro gyazo." 
Exodus38:29 Ekikomo ekyaleetebwa ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba kyaweza talenta nsanvu ne sekeli enkumi bbiri mu bina; 
Exodus38:30 ekyo kye yakozesa okukola entobo z'omulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, Omwaliiro gw'ekikomo n'ekitindiro kyagwo eky'ekikomo na byonna ebigendera ku mwaliiro;" 
Exodus38:31 entobo z'oluggya olwetooloddewo, omulyango gw'oluggya, enkondo zonna ez'Ekisulo n'enkondo zonna ez'oluggya olwetooloddewo." 
Exodus39:1 Baakola ebyambalo ebiruke olw'okuweereza mu kitukuvu mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu ne mu ngoye eza bafuta. Era Aroni baamukolera ebyambalo eby'omu Kitukuvu ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Yakolayo efodi nga ya zaabu, mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu n'olugoye olwa bafuta olulange." 
Exodus39:3 Zaabu baamukubaakubamu embaati ez'oluwewere, ne bazisalamu obulere obulungi okubulukira mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu era ne mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange, omulimu gw'omulusi omukugu." 
Exodus39:4 Efodi baagikolerako ebiwuzi bibiri eby'oku bibegabega nga bitabiddwa ku nsonda zaayo ebbiri. 
Exodus39:5 Ekimyu ky'efodi ekyagiriko kyali kintu kimu nayo mu nkola ye emu: kyali kya zaabu n'ewuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Baanyigira amayinja oniki mu mapeesa aga zaabu, nga gooleddwa ng'akabonero akoole, nga kuliko amannya ga batabani ba Yisirayeli," 
Exodus39:7 n'agassa ku biwuzi eby'oku bibegabega eby'efodi ng'ekijjukizo eri lw'Abayisirayeli ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Exodus39:8 Yakola ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba, omulimu gw'omulusi, okufaanana ng'efodi mu zaabu ne mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange." 
Exodus39:9 Kyali kyenkanankana ku njuyi zonna; ne bakifunyamu wabiri: oluta lumu mu buwanvu n'oluta lumu mu bugazi. 
Exodus39:10 Okwo baassaako ennyiriri z'amayinja nnya: olunyiriri olusooka kwaliko sarudiyo, topaziyo ne simaragido." 
Exodus39:11 Ku lunyiriri olwokubiri kwaliko karubunkulo, saffiro ne dayimondi." 
Exodus39:12 Ku lunyiriri olwokusatu kwaliko yasinto, akyate n'ametisito." 
Exodus39:13 Olunyiriri olwokuna kirusolito, oniki ne berullo. Gaali ganyigiddwa mu mapeesa aga zaabu." 
Exodus39:14 Amayinja gaali kkumi n'abiri ku lw'Abayisirayeli, amannya gaabwe nga gooleddwako, buli jjinja n'erinnya ku lw'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba baakikolera emikuufu egya zaabu omwereere emirange ng'emiguwa. 
Exodus39:16 Baakola amapeesa agali ng'ekimuli kya rooza abiri n'empeta bbiri eza zaabu, empeta ebbiri ne bazisibira ku nsonda ebbiri ez'oku kipaapi eky'oku kifuba." 
Exodus39:17 Emikuufu ebiri egya zaabu baagisiba ku mpeta ebbiri eziri ku nsonda z'ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba," 
Exodus39:18 enkomerero ebbiri ez'emikuufu ebiri yazigatta ku mapeesa, olwo ne bazigattira mu maaso ku biwuzi by'efodi." 
Exodus39:19 Baakola empeta bbiri eza zaabu ne bazigattira ku nsonda ebbiri eza wansi w'ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba, ku mukugiro ogw'omunda oguli ku efodi." 
Exodus39:20 Ne bakola empeta endala bbiri eza zaabu ne bazisiba wansi ku biwuzi ebibiri eby'efodi, mu maaso gaayo okuliraanira ddala eggemo lyayo, wagguluko w'ekimyu ky'efodi." 
Exodus39:21 Ne banyweza ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba nga bayisa wuzi eya bbululu mu mpeta zaakyo n'ez'efodi, ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba kiryoke kituule waggulu w'ekimyu ky'efodi, ekipaapi eky'okukifuba nga tekyawukanye n'efodi, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Awo n'akola omunagiro gw'efodi, nga gwonna gwa bbululu, omulimu gw'omulanzi." 
Exodus39:23 Waaliwo ekituli mu makkati g'omunagiro nga kiri ng'obulago obw'ekizibawo eky'eddiba, nga kyetooloddwa omukugiro omunagiro guleme kutaggulukuka." 
Exodus39:24 Eggemo ly'omunagiro wansi baalikolera amakomamawanga amalange mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu." 
Exodus39:25 Era baakola obude obwa zaabu omwereere, ne bagenda nga batobeka obude n'amakomamawanga okwetooloola eggemo lyonna ery'omunagiro:" 
Exodus39:26 bigenda bitobeka akade aka zaabu n'amakomamawanga, akade aka zaabu n'amakomamawanga, okwetoolooza eggemo ly'omunagiro ogw'okuweereza, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Baakolera Aroni ne batabani be ekkanzu mu ngoye eza bafuta, omulimu gw'omulanzi;" 
Exodus39:28 ekiremba eky'olugoye olwa bafuta, n'ettambaala era mu lugoye olwa bafuta, empale mu lugoye olwa bafuta olulange," 
Exodus39:29 n'omusipi mu lugoye olulange mu wuzi eza bbululu, kakobe n'entwakaavu, omulimu gw'omudaliza, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Baakola n'ekipande, ng'akabonero ak'obwawule nga kya zaabu omwereere, ne boolako akabonero ak'envumbo nti: 'Mutukuvu ku lw'Omukama'" 
Exodus39:31 ne bakissaako ewuzi engazi eya kakobe okukinywereza ku ttambaala waggulu, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagiridde Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Omulimu gwonna ogw'Ekisulo, Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ne guggwa bwe gutyo. Abayisirayeli baakolera ddala byonna ng'Omukama bwe yali alagiridde Musa." 
Exodus39:33 Ne baleeta Ekisulo eri Musa, Weema na byonna ebikozesebwamu: ebikwaso byayo, embaawo zaayo, emikiikiro gyayo, empagi zaayo n'entobo zaayo;" 
Exodus39:34 ekibikkako eky'amaliba g'endiga ennume amannyike amamyufu, ekibikka eky'amaliba amakunye, n'olutimbe olusiikiriza;" 
Exodus39:35 Essanduuku ey'Endagaano n'emisituliro gyayo, n'Entebe y'Obusaasizi," 
Exodus39:36 emmeeza na byonna ebigikozesebwamu, n'Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa;" 
Exodus39:37 Ekikondo eky'ettawaaza ekya zaabu omwereere n'olukalala lw'ettawaaza zaakyo na byonna ebizikozesebwako awamu n'omuzigo ogw'okukoleeza; 
Exodus39:38 omwaliiro ogwa zaabu, omuzigo ogusiiga, obubaani obw'akawoowo, olutimbe lw'oku mulyango gwa Weema;" 
Exodus39:39 omwaliiro ogw'ekikomo wamu n'ekitindiro kyagwo eky'ekikomo, emisituliro gyagwo na byonna ebigukozesebwako, ekinaabirwamu kyakyo n'ekikondo kyakyo;" 
Exodus39:40 entimbe z'oluggya, empagi zaalwo, entobo zaazo, n'olutimbe lwa wankaaki w'oluggya, emiguwa gyalwo, enkondo zaalwo na byonna ebikozesebwa mu kuweereza mu Kisulo kya Weema ey'Ensisinkano:" 
Exodus39:41 ebyambalo ebiruke eby'okuweereza mu Kitukuvu n'ebyambalo ebitukuvu ebya Aroni kabona n'ebyambalo bya batabani be nga bakola obwakabona. 
Exodus39:42 Abayisirayeli baali bakoledde ddala omulimu gwonna ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Musa n'akebera omulimu gwonna, n'alaba nga baali bagukoze ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagiridde. Awo Musa n'abawa omukisa." 
Exodus40:1 Omukama n'ayogera ne Musa, n'agamba nti:" 
Exodus40:2 “Ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogusooka osimbanga Ekisulo, Weema ey'Ensisinkano," 
Exodus40:3 oligissaamu Ssanduuku y'Endagaano, Ssanduuku n'ogisiikiriza n'olutimbe." 
Exodus40:4 Olissaamu emmeeza n'otegeka eby'okubeerako. Oliyingizaamu n'ekikondo ky'ettawaaza, n'ossaako ettawaaza zaakwo." 
Exodus40:5 Olissa omwaliiro ogw'obubaani ogwa zaabu mu maaso g'Essanduuku ey'Endagaano, n'ossaawo olutimbe ku mulyango gw'Ekisulo." 
Exodus40:6 Olissa omwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye mu maaso g'omulyango gw'Ekisulo, Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Exodus40:7 Olissa ekinaabirwamu wakati w'Eweema ey'Ensisinkano n'omwaliiro n'ossaamu amazzi. 
Exodus40:8 Olyetooloozaawo oluggya, n'ossa olutimbe ku mulyango gw'oluggya." 
Exodus40:9 Awo n'oddira omuzigo ogusiiga, n'osiiga Ekisulo na buli kintu kyonna ekikirimu. Olikitukuza bw'otyo n'ebikirimu byonna, kibeere kitukuvu." 
Exodus40:10 Olisiiga omwaliiro ogw'ekitambiro ekyokye na byonna ebigukozesebwako; olitukuza omwaliiro gubeere ogusingira ddala obutukuvu. 
Exodus40:11 Olisiiga ekinaabirwamu n'ekikondo kyakyo, n'okitukuza." 
Exodus40:12 Olireeta Aroni ne batabani be ku mulyango gwa Weema n'obanaaza n'amazzi. 
Exodus40:13 Olyambaza Aroni ebyambalo ebitukuvu, n'omusiiga era n'omutukuza ampeereze nga kabona." 
Exodus40:14 Ne batabani be olibaleeta, n'obambaza amakanzu." 
Exodus40:15 Olibasiiga nga bw'osiize kitaabwe, bampeereze nga bakabona. Okusiigibwa kwabwe kuno kulibawa obwakabona obw'olubeerera amazadde gaabwe gonna.”" 
Exodus40:16 Musa n'akolera ddala bw'atyo byonna ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagiridde. 
Exodus40:17 Ku lunaku olw'olubereberye olw'omwezi ogusooka mu mwaka ogwokubiri, Ekisulo ne kisimbibwa." 
Exodus40:18 Musa n'asimba Ekisulo, n'akitegekera entobo, n'asimba embaawo zaakyo, n'awanika emikiikiro gyakyo, n'asimba empagi zaakyo." 
Exodus40:19 N'ayanjululiza Weema ku Kisulo, Weema n'agissaako ekibikkako waggulu, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus40:20 Yaddira Endagaano n'agissa munda mu Ssanduuku, n'assa emisituliro ku Ssanduuku, n'assaako n'Entebe y'Obusaasizi ku ssanduku ku ngulu," 
Exodus40:21 n'aleeta Essanduuku mu Kisulo, n'awanika olutimbe olusiikiriza, n'asiikiriza bw'atyo Ssanduuku y'Endagaano, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus40:22 Yassa emmeeza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano ku ludda lw'emambuka g'Ekisulo, ebweru w'olutimbe," 
Exodus40:23 ku yo n'atereezaako Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa mu maaso g'Omukama, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagiridde Musa." 
Exodus40:24 Yassa ekikondo ky'ettawaaza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, okwolekera emmeeza, ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta olw'Ekisulo," 
Exodus40:25 n'awanika ettawaaza mu maaso g'Omukama, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagiridde Musa." 
Exodus40:26 Yassa omwaliiro ogwa zaabu mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano mu maaso g'olutimbe," 
Exodus40:27 n'agwokerako obubaani obw'akawoowo, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagiridde Musa." 
Exodus40:28 N'alyoka assa olutimbe ku mulyango gw'Ekisulo. 
Exodus40:29 Yassa omwaliiro ogw'ekitambiro ekyokye ku mulyango gw'Ekisulo, Weema ey'Ensisinkano, n'aweererezaako ekitambiro ekyokye n'ekitone eky'obuwunga, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Exodus40:30 Yassa ekinaabirwamu wakati wa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, n'omwaliiro n'assaamu amazzi ag'okunaaba," 
Exodus40:31 Musa ne Aroni ne batabani be ne banaabira omwo engalo n'ebigere byabwe," 
Exodus40:32 Buli lwe baayingiranga Weema ey'Ensisinkano oba okusemberera omwaliiro, nga banaaba ng'Omukama bwe yali alagiridde Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Awo Musa n'assaawo oluggya okwetooloola Ekisulo n'omwaliiro, n'awanika olutimbe mu mulyango gw'oluggya. Musa bw'atyo n'amaliriza omulimu." 
Exodus40:34 Ekire ne kibikka Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kijjuza Ekisulo." 
Exodus40:35 Musa yali tasobola kuyingira mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano olw'okubeera ekire ekyagibuutikira n'olw'okubeera ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ekyali kijjuzza Ekisulo. 
Exodus40:36 Mu ŋŋendo zaabwe zonna ekire buli lwe kyasitulanga okuva ku Kisulo, Abayisirayeli nga nabo basitula." 
Exodus40:37 Ekire bwe kitaasitukanga, baalindanga okutuusa olunaku lwe kyasitulanga." 
Exodus40:38 Kubanga ekire ky'Omukama kyawummulanga ku Kisulo emisana, omuliro ne gukyakiramu ekiro, mu maaso g'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yonna mu ŋŋendo zaabwe zonna." 
Leviticus1:1 Omukama yayita Musa n'ayogera naye ng'ayima mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano n'agamba nti: 
Leviticus1:2 “Yogera eri Abayisirayeli obagambe nti: “ ‘Bwe mubangamu mu mmwe aweereza Omukama ekitone, ekitone kyammwe bwe kibanga kivudde mu bisolo by'awaka, kivanga mu ggana oba mu kisibo." 
Leviticus1:3 “ ‘Ekitone ky'ekitambiro ekyokye bwe kibanga kivudde mu ggana, kibeeranga kya nnume ento eteriiko kamogo. Akireetanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisikano Omukama alyoke akisiime" 
Leviticus1:4 Assanga omukono ku mutwe gw'ekitone ky'ekitambiro ekyokye, kirisiimibwa ku lulwe, kiryoke kiweerezebwe okuddaabiriza ku lulwe." 
Leviticus1:5 Olwo ente ennume ento aggittiranga mu maaso g'Omukama, batabani ba Aroni, bakabona, ne baweereza omusaayi gwayo nga bagumansira ku mwaliiro oguli ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus1:6 Ekitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye akibaagangako eddiba n'akitemaatema ebifi. 
Leviticus1:7 Batabani ba Aroni, bakabona, ne bakuma omuliro mu mwaliiro, ne bassa enku ku muliro." 
Leviticus1:8 Olwo bakabona batabani ba Aroni bassanga ebitundu ebitemeddwatemeddwa, omutwe n'amasavu ku nku eziri ku mwaliiro." 
Leviticus1:9 Ebyenda n'amagulu abyozanga mu mazzi ate kabona n'abyokera mu mwaliiro okutuusa okusirikka. Kino kitambiro ekyokye, ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus1:10 “ ‘Obanga ekitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye kivudde mu kisibo, kwe kugamba nti mu ndiga oba mu mbuzi, aweerezanga kirume, ekitaliiko kamogo;" 
Leviticus1:11 akittiranga mu maaso g'Omukama ku luuyi lw'omwaliiro olutunuulidde emambuka. Batabani ba Aroni, bakabona, omusaayi gwakyo ne bagumansira ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus1:12 Anaakitemaatemanga ebifi, byo n'omutwe, n'amasavu, kabona n'abissa ku nku ezimaze okukoleezebwa ku mwaliiro." 
Leviticus1:13 Anaayozanga mu mazzi ebyenda n'amagulu, byonna kabona n'abyokera ku mwaliiro okutuusa okusirikka. Ekyo kitambiro ekyokye, ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus1:14 “ ‘Oba ekitone ky'ekitambiro ekyokye ky'aweerezza Omukama kivudde mu binyonyi, aweerezanga jjiba oba enjiibwa ento." 
Leviticus1:15 Kabona anaakireetanga ku mwaliiro n'akinyoola ensingo okukutulako omutwe, n'agwokera ku mwaliiro. Omusaayi gwakyo gukamulwangamu awo mu mbiriizi z'omwaliiro." 
Leviticus1:16 Ekisakiro n'ebyoya abikasukanga ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba bw'omwaliiro mu kifo evvu ly'amasavu we liyiibwa. 
Leviticus1:17 Akwatanga ebiwaawatiro byakyo ku buli luuyi n'akiryebulamu wabiri, naye ate nga takikutuddeemu. Olwo kabona anaakyokyanga ku nku ezikoleezeddwa ku mwaliiro. Ekyo kitambiro ekyokye, ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama.’ ”" 
Leviticus2:1 “ ‘Oli bw'aweerezanga Omukama ekitone eky'obuwunga, ky'aweereza atoolanga kya buwunga obw'eŋŋano obukuŋŋunte obulungi, n'ayiwako omuzigo n'assaako n'obubaani," 
Leviticus2:2 n'abuleetera batabani ba Aroni, bakabona. Kabona aggyangako olubatu lulamba olw'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte, ko omuzigo n'obubaani, byonna n'abyokera ku mwaliiro ng'ekitundu kyakyo eky'ekijjukizo, ekitone ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus2:3 Ekinaafikkangawo ku kitone eky'obuwunga, kinaabanga kya Aroni ne batabani be, ekitundu ekitukuvu ennyo ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus2:4 “ ‘Bw'oweerezanga ekitone eky'obutta obufumbiddwa mu kyoto, obutta bubanga bwa buwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi, nga bufumbiddwa nga bukkeeki obutazimbulukuse, nga mutabuddwaamu omuzigo; oba ng'obugaati obw'oluwewere, obutazimbulukuse, nga busiigiddwako omuzigo." 
Leviticus2:5 “ ‘Bwe kibanga ekitone eky'obutta obusiikire ku lusaniya nga ky'oweerezza, obuwunga bubeerenga bukuŋŋunte bulungi, omutabikiddwa omuzigo, obutazimbulukuse." 
Leviticus2:6 Omugaati ogwo ogumenyangamu obutundu, n'oyiwako omuzigo; ekyo kye kitone eky'obuwunga." 
Leviticus2:7 “ ‘Bw'obanga oweereza kitone kya butta obusiikiddwa ku luggyo, kibeerenga kya buwunga obukuŋŋunte omutabikiddwa omuzigo." 
Leviticus2:8 “ ‘Otwalanga ew'Omukama ekitone eky'obuwunga ekikoleddwa mu ebyo, n'okikwasa kabona, ye n'akiteeka ku mwaliiro." 
Leviticus2:9 Atoolanga ku kitone n'aggyako ekitundu kyakyo eky'ekijjukizo n'akyokera ku mwaliiro, ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus2:10 Kyonna ekiba kisigaddewo ku kitone eky'obuwunga, kya Aroni ne batabani be; ekitundu ekitukuvu ennyo eky'ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus2:11 “ ‘Buli kitone eky'obuwunga kye muweereza Omukama, temugoyerangamu kizimbulukusa, kubanga ekizimbulukusa oba omubisi gw'enjuki temubyokeranga mu kitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus2:12 Muyinza okubiweereza ng'ebibala ebisooka, naye olwo si bya kwokera ku mwaliiro okuweerezebwa ng'akawoowo akasanyusa." 
Leviticus2:13 Buli kitone kyo eky'obuwunga olungangamu omunnyo; tekibulangamu omunnyo ogw'endagaano ya Katonda wo; buli kitone kyo okirungangamu omunnyo. 
Leviticus2:14 “ ‘Bw'oweerezanga Omukama ekitone eky'obuwunga, eky'ebibala byo ebisooka, kivenga ku birimba ebisooka; empeke nga nsekule ezisiikiddwa ku muliro." 
Leviticus2:15 Kuno ogattangako omuzigo n'ossaako n'obubaani; kye kitone eky'obuwunga. 
Leviticus2:16 Olwo kabona anaayokyanga ekitundu kyakyo eky'ekijjukizo ekivudde ku mpeke ensekule ne ku muzigo n'abyokya wamu n'obubaani bwonna; kye kitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro.’ ” 
Leviticus3:1 “ ‘Oli bw'aweerezanga ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu, ng'ekitone kye kivudde mu ggana oba mu kisibo, kibeerenga kisajja oba kikazi, Omukama amuweerezanga ekyo ekitaliiko kamogo." 
Leviticus3:2 Omukono anaaguteekanga ku mutwe gw'ekitone kye, n'akittira ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Batabani ba Aroni, bakabona, bamansiranga omusaayi ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus3:3 Ku kitone eky'okussa ekimu aggyangako ekitundu ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro: amasavu agabikkiridde ebyenda, na buli kyonna ekisava ekiriko," 
Leviticus3:4 ensigo zombi ko amasavu gaakwo agazibikka eno nga mu ndira, n'akabubi k'oku kibumba; aggyangako amasavu ago nga bw'akola ku nsigo." 
Leviticus3:5 Bino byonna batabani ba Aroni babyokeranga ku mwaliiro kungulu ku kitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye ekiri ku nku ezikoledde, ng'ekitone ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus3:6 “ ‘Oba oli ekitone akiggye mu kisibo olw'ekitambiro eri Omukama eky'okussa ekimu, aleetanga kisajja oba kikazi, naye nga tekiriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus3:7 “ ‘Bw'aweerezanga endiga, agireetanga mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Leviticus3:8 Assanga omukono ku mutwe gw'ekitone kye, n'akittira mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Olwo batabani ba Aroni bamansiranga omusaayi ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus3:9 Ku kitone eky'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu aggyangako ekitundu eky'okwokya ng'ekitambiro eri Omukama: amasavu n'ekikira kyonna ky'asalidde okumpi n'omugongo, n'amasavu agabikkiridde ebyenda, na buli kyonna ekisava ekiriko," 
Leviticus3:10 ensigo zombi ko amasavu gaakwo agazibikka eno nga mu ndira, n'olububi lw'oku kibumba; aggyangako amasavu ago nga bw'akola ku nsigo." 
Leviticus3:11 Kabona abyokeranga ku mwaliiro ng'ekyokulya ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro. 
Leviticus3:12 “ ‘Oba mbuzi nduusi nga gy'aweerezza, agireetanga mu maaso g'Omukama," 
Leviticus3:13 n'assa omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Batabani ba Aroni, bakabona, bamansiranga omusaayi ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus3:14 Bino by'aliggyako ng'ekitundu ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro: amasavu agabikkiridde ebyenda, na buli kyonna ekisava ekiriko," 
Leviticus3:15 ensigo zombi ko amasavu gaakwo agazibikka eno nga mu ndira, n'olububi lw'oku kibumba; aggyangako amasavu ago nga bw'akola ku nsigo." 
Leviticus3:16 Kabona abyokeranga ku mwaliiro ng'ekyokulya, ekitone ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa. “ ‘Amasavu gonna ga Mukama." 
Leviticus3:17 Etteeka lino lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna, yonna gye bali: temulyanga masavu wadde omusaayi.’ ”" 
Leviticus4:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus4:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Oli bw'ayonoonanga mu butanwa, n'abaako ky'akola ku ebyo ebigaanibwa mu biragiro by'Omukama, anaakolanga ati:" 
Leviticus4:3 “ ‘Kabona omusiige bw'akolanga ekibi, n'aleetera atyo abantu okugwa mu musango, olw'ekibi kye ekyo ky'akoze, atoolanga mu ggana ente ennume ento etaliiko kamogo ng'ekitone eri Omukama olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus4:4 Atwalanga ente ennume ento ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano mu maaso g'Omukama, n'assa omukono ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira awo mu maaso g'Omukama," 
Leviticus4:5 Kabona omusiige asenanga ku musaayi gwayo n'aguyingiza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Leviticus4:6 Annyikanga engalo mu musaayi, n'agumansira emirundi musanvu mu maaso g'Omukama, mu maaso g'olutimbe lw'Ekitukuvu." 
Leviticus4:7 Kabona addiranga ogumu ku musaayi ogwo n'agussa ku mayembe g'omwaliiro ogw'obubaani mu maaso g'Omukama oguli mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Omusaayi omulala gwonna ogusigaddewo aguyiwanga awo wansi w'omwaliiro ogw'ekitambiro ekyokye oguli ku mulyango gwa Weema. 
Leviticus4:8 “ ‘Aggyangamu amasavu gonna ag'ente ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, agabikkiridde ebyenda na buli kyonna ekisava ekiriko," 
Leviticus4:9 ensigo zombi ko amasavu gaakwo agazibikka eno nga mu ndira, n'olububi lw'oku kibumba; aggyangako amasavu ago nga bw'akola ku nsigo," 
Leviticus4:10 mu ngeri ye emu ng'amasavu bwe gaggyibwa mu nte olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Byonna ebyo kabona anaabyokeranga ku mwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye. 
Leviticus4:11 Naye eddiba n'ennyama yonna, omutwe n'ebigere ko n'obusa," 
Leviticus4:12 kwe kugamba nti byonna ebisigaddewo ku nte ennume, abifulumyanga ebweru w'olusiisira, mu kifo ekirongoofu awayiibwa evvu ly'amasavu, n'abyokera ku nku n'omuliro; byokerwanga mu kifo awayiibwa evvu ly'amasavu." 
Leviticus4:13 “ ‘Ekibiina kya Yisirayeli kyonna bwe kikolanga ekibi, naye mu butanwa, nga kye bakola tebakitegedde, ne babaako bye bakola ku ebyo ebigaanibwa mu biragiro by'Omukama, banaabanga bazizza omusango." 
Leviticus4:14 Oluvannyuma bwe bategeera ekibi kyabwe, ekibiina kyonna wamu kinaaweerezanga olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, ente ennume ento; banaagireetanga mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Leviticus4:15 Olwo abakadde b'ekibiina, banaagissangako emikono ku mutwe mu maaso g'Omukama, ne bagittira mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Leviticus4:16 Awo Kabona omusiige, anaddiranga ku musaayi gwayo n'aguyingiza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano" 
Leviticus4:17 n'annyikamu olugalo, n'amansira mu maaso g'Omukama emirundi musanvu mu maaso g'olutimbe." 
Leviticus4:18 Era ku musaayi ogwo anaggyangako ogumu n'agussa ku mayembe g'omwaliiro oguli mu maaso g'Omukama mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Omusaayi ogusigaddewo aguyiwanga wansi awo ku mwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye oguli ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Leviticus4:19 Anaggyangamu amasavu gaamu gonna n'agookera ku mwaliiro. 
Leviticus4:20 Nga bwe yakola ku nnume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, bw'alikola ne ku nnume eno. Bw'atyo Kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'ekisobyo kyabwe, era olwo banaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus4:21 Olwo ente ennume yennyini agifulumyanga ebweru w'olusiisira n'agyokya nga bwe yakola ku nnume eyasoose. Kino kye kitambiro olw'ekibi ku lw'ekibiina. 
Leviticus4:22 “ ‘Omukulembeze bw'akolanga ekibi mu butanwa, n'abaako ky'akola ku ebyo ebigaanibwa mu biragiro by'Omukama, newandibadde ng'akikoze nga tamanyi, anaabanga azzizza omusango." 
Leviticus4:23 Bw'amanyisibwanga ekibi kye kye yakola, aleetanga embuzi ennume eteriiko kamogo ng'ekitone kye." 
Leviticus4:24 Assanga omukono ku mutwe gwayo n'agittira mu kifo awattirwa ekitone ky'ekitambiro ekyokye mu maaso g'Omukama; kino kitambiro olw'ekibi. 
Leviticus4:25 Olwo kabona addiranga ku musaayi gw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, n'aguteeka ku mayembe g'omwaliiro ogw'ekitambiro ekyokye n'olugalo lwe, ate ogusigaddewo n'aguyiwa awo wansi w'omwaliiro." 
Leviticus4:26 Amasavu go agookeranga kungulu ku mwaliiro, nga bw'akola ku kitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Bw'atyo Kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'ekibi ky'omukulembeze, era olwo anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus4:27 “ ‘Omu mu kibiina singa anaagwanga mu kibi mu butanwa, n'abaako ky'akola ku ebyo ebigaanibwa mu biragiro by'Omukama, anaabanga azzizza omusango." 
Leviticus4:28 Bw'anaamanyisibwanga ekibi kye, aleetanga mu maaso g'Omukama embuzi enduusi etaliiko kamogo ng'ekitambiro kye olw'ekibi kye kye yakola." 
Leviticus4:29 Ateekanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gw'ekitone ekinaaweerezebwa olw'ekibi, n'agittira mu kifo awattirwa ekitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye." 
Leviticus4:30 Olwo kabona anaddiranga ku musaayi gw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, n'aguteeka ku mayembe g'omwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye n'olugalo lwe, ate ogusigaddewo n'aguyiwa awo wansi w'omwaliiro." 
Leviticus4:31 Amasavu gonna agaggyangako, ng'amasavu bwe gaggyibwa ku kitone ky'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu, olwo kabona n'agookera ku mwaliiro ng'ekitambiro, ng'akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama. Bwatyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe, era olwo anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus4:32 “ ‘Bw'abanga aleese ndiga ng'ekitone olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi aleetanga akaliga kaluusi, akataliiko kamogo." 
Leviticus4:33 “ ‘Assanga omukono ku mutwe gwako n'akattira mu kifo ekitone ky'ekitambiro ekyokye we kittirwa. 
Leviticus4:34 Kabona addiranga ku musaayi gw'ekitone olw'ekibi, n'aguteeka ku mayembe g'omwaliiro ogwokerwako ebitone n'olugalo lwe, ate ogusigaddewo n'aguyiwa awo wansi w'omwaliiro." 
Leviticus4:35 Aggyangako amasavu gonna, nga bwe gaggyibwa ku kaliga k'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu, n'agookera ku kitone eky'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ku mwaliiro ng'ekitambiro ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe olw'ekibi kye kye yakola, era olwo anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus5:1 “ ‘Oli bw'ayonoonanga olw'obutoogera ng'abadde asabiddwa okuwa obujulizi ku kintu ky'alinako obujulizi, kye yalaba oba ky'amanyiiko, aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kye." 
Leviticus5:2 “ ‘Oli bw'abanga akutte ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu, nga kalannamye w'ekisolo eky'ettale ekitali kirongoofu, oba kalannamye w'ekisolo eky'awaka ekitali kirongoofu, oba kalannamye w'ekyewalula ekitali kirongoofu, naye n'atakimanya, yennyini taabenga mulongoofu, era anaabanga azzizza omusango;" 
Leviticus5:3 oba bw'aliba akutte ku bw'onoonefu bw'omuntu, kwe kugamba obutali bulongoofu ku muntu obuleetera munne obutaba mulongoofu, bubeere buno oba buli, yennyini n'atakimanya, amala akimanya oluvannyuma, anaabanga azzizza omusango." 
Leviticus5:4 “ ‘Omuntu bw'alayiranga okukola ekintu, ekirungi oba ekibi, mu ebyo abantu bye bamala galayira, naye nga takitegedde, oluvannyuma bw'akitegeeranga, anaabanga azzizza omusango." 
Leviticus5:5 “ ‘Oli bw'abanga azzizza omusango mu kimu ku ebyo, yeetondenga olw'ekibi ky'akoze." 
Leviticus5:6 Ng'omutango olw'ekibi ky'akoze, anaaweerezanga Omukama akaliga akaluusi, oba akabuzi akaluusi, k'aggye mu kisibo kye, kabeere ekitambiro olw'ekibi. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe." 
Leviticus5:7 “ ‘Bw'abanga akaliga takasobodde, aweerezanga Omukama amayiba abiri oba enjiibwa ento bbiri ng'omutango olw'ekibi kye. Akamu ka kitambiro olw'ekibi, ate akalala ka kitambiro ekyokye." 
Leviticus5:8 Abuleeteranga kabona; oyo asookanga kuweeerezaako kamu ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; akanyoolanga omutwe aguggye ku nsingo, kyokka nga tagukutuliddeeko ddala," 
Leviticus5:9 olwo n'addira ku musaayi gwako n'amansira ebisenge by'omwaliiro. Omusaayi ogufisseewo gwonna aguyiwanga awo wansi w'omwaliiro. Kino kitambiro olw'ekibi. 
Leviticus5:10 Olwo n'aweereza akalala ng'ekitambiro ekyokye okuddaabiriza olw'ekibi kye ng'etteeka bwe ligamba. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe olw'ekibi kye yakola, olwo anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus5:11 “ ‘Obanga taasobole kufuna mayiba abiri oba obuyiibwa obubiri, aweerezanga olw'ekibi kye ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa eky'obuwunga obw'eŋŋano olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. Tassangako muzigo, wadde obubaani, kubanga kino kitambiro lwa kibi." 
Leviticus5:12 Obuwunga abuleeteranga Kabona, ono n'atoolako olubatu lulamba, ng'ekitundu kyakyo eky'ekijjukizo, n'abwokera ku mwaliiro kungulu kw'ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro. Kino kitambiro lwa kibi." 
Leviticus5:13 Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe olw'ebibi bye bino by'aliba akoze, era olwo anaasonyiyibwanga. Ekitundu ekisigadde eky'ekitone kinaddiranga kabona nga bwe kiri ku kitone eky'obuwunga.’ ”" 
Leviticus5:14 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus5:15 “Omuntu bw'ayonoonanga n'akola ekibi mu butanwa mu bintu by'Omukama ebitukuvu, ng'omutango aweerezanga Omukama endiga ennume etaliiko kamogo okuva mu kisibo kye, omuwendo gwayo nga bw'ogubaliridde mu ffeeza ey'omu Kitukuvu. Kino kitambiro olw'omusango." 
Leviticus5:16 Ne kye yafiiriza ku bitukuvu akiriwanga, n'asukkirizaamu ekyokutaano kimu eky'ekyo kye yafiiriza, n'akiwa kabona, ono anaaweerezanga endiga ennume ng'ekitambiro olw'omusango okuddaabiriza olw'ekibi kye era olwo anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus5:17 “Omuntu bw'akolanga ekibi olw'obutamanya, n'abaako ky'akola ku ebyo ebigaanibwa mu biragiro by'Omukama, anaabanga azzizza omusango era aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kye." 
Leviticus5:18 Ng'omutango, anaaleeteranga kabona endiga ennume eteriiko kamogo okuva mu kisibo kye, omuwendo gwayo nga bw'ogubaliridde. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe olw'ebisobyo bye bye yagwamu mu butanwa, era olwo anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus5:19 Kino kitambiro olw'omusango, kubanga abadde n'omusango olw'okusobya ew'Omukama.”" 
Leviticus5:20 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus5:21 “Omuntu bw'akolanga ekibi, n'anyooma Omukama, ng'alimbalimba munne ku kintu ekyamusingirwa, oba ekintu ekyamuteresebwa, oba ekyabbibwa, oba n'amukumpanya," 
Leviticus5:22 obanga alonze ekintu, n'akyegaana, n'alayira mu bulimba, oba n'akola ekibi ekiri ng'ekyo abantu kye bamanyidde okukola," 
Leviticus5:23 anaabanga akoze ekibi, bw'atyo anaabanga azzizza omusango. Azzangayo byonna by'abanga abbye oba by'akumpanyizza ku munne, oba ebyamuteresebwa, oba bye yalonda," 
Leviticus5:24 oba bye yalayirirako eby'obulimba. Abizzangayo bulambalamba n'ayongerako n'ekyokutaano kyabyo, n'abiddiza nnyinibyo ku lunaku lw'aliweererezaako ekitambiro kye olw'omusango." 
Leviticus5:25 Ng'omutango anaaleetanga ewa kabona, kwe kugamba ew'Omukama, ekitambiro olw'omusango: endiga ennume etaliiko kamogo okuva mu kisibo kye, omuwendo gwayo nga bw'ogubaliridde." 
Leviticus5:26 Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe ew'Omukama; era olwo anaasonyiyibwanga ebyo byonna bye yakola ebyamuleetera okugwa mu musango.” 
Leviticus6:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus6:2 “Lagira Aroni ne batabani be nti: ‘Lino lye tteeka ly'ekitambiro ekyokye: kwe kugamba, ekitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye kisigalanga ku kyoto ky'oku mwaliiro ekiro kyonna okutuusa enkeera, n'omuliro gw'oku mwaliiro gusigalanga gumema ku mwaliiro." 
Leviticus6:3 “ ‘Kabona ayambalanga ekkanzu ey'olugoye, ne munda empale ey'olugoye, olwo n'addira evvu ly'amasavu ag'ekitambiro ekyokye, omuliro gwe gasiriizizza ku mwaliiro, n'alissa ku mabbali g'omwaliiro." 
Leviticus6:4 Yeeyambulanga ebyambalo ebyasoose, n'ayambala ebyambalo ebirala, evvu ly'amasavu n'alifulumya ebweru w'olusiisira mu kifo ekirongoofu." 
Leviticus6:5 Gwo omuliro gusigalanga gumema ku mwaliiro, teguzikiranga; kabona aguliikirizanga n'enku ku makya buli lunaku nga bw'assaako ekitambiro ekyokye, kungulu n'ayokerako amasavu g'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu." 
Leviticus6:6 Omuliro ogwo gumemanga ku mwaliiro obutasalako, teguzikiranga." 
Leviticus6:7 “ ‘Lino lye tteeka ly'ekitone eky'obuwunga: Batabani ba Aroni banaakireetanga mu maaso g'Omukama mu maaso g'omwaliiro: 
Leviticus6:8 Kabona anaatoolangako olubatu lw'obuwunga, n'ateekamu omuzigo n'obubaani, n'abwookera ku mwaliiro ng'ekitundu kyakyo eky'ekijjukizo, ng'akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus6:9 Obuwunga obusigadde Aroni ne batabani be babulyanga, naye nga temuli kizimbulukusa; buliirwanga mu kifo ekitukuvu mu luggya lwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Leviticus6:10 Tebufumbibwanga nga mulimu ekizimbulukusa, kubanga gwe mugabo gwabwe gwe mbawadde ku bimpongeddwa n'omuliro. Okufaanana ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'ekitambiro olw'omusango na kino kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus6:11 Ab'ezzadde lya Aroni abasajja bayinza okukiryako. Guno gwe mugabo gwabwe ogw'olubeerera ku biwongeddwa Omukama n'omuliro mu mazadde gaabwe gonna. Buli kyonna ekikikoonako kifuuka kitukuvu.’ ” 
Leviticus6:12 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus6:13 “Aroni ne batabani be bino bye baliweereza Omukama ku lunaku buli omu lw'alisiigibwa: baweerezanga ekyekkumi ekya efa eky'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi ng 'ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'olubeerera; ekitundu kiweerezebwa ku nkya, ekitundu ekirala kawungeezi." 
Leviticus6:14 Busiikibwanga mu lusaniya n'omuzigo. Obuleetanga nga bugoye bulungi, ekitone eky'obuwunga n'okisalaasalamu obutundu, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus6:15 Mutabani we alimusikira nga kabona omusiige y'abufumbanga. Ekitone kya kwokya kisirikke, kino gwe mugabo gw'Omukama ogw'olubeerera." 
Leviticus6:16 Buli kitone kya bakabona eky'obuwunga kya kwokyanga kisirikke; tekiriibwanga.” 
Leviticus6:17 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus6:18 “Gamba Aroni ne batabani be nti: ‘Lino lye tteeka ery'ekitambiro olw'ekibi: ekitone kya kuttirwanga mu maaso g'Omukama ebitone eby'ekitambiro ekyokye we bittirwa, anti kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus6:19 Kabona akiweereza akiryanga; kiriirwanga mu kifo kitukuvu, mu luggya lwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Leviticus6:20 Buli kyonna ekirikoona ku nnyama yaakyo kirifuuka kitukuvu. Omusaayi gwakyo bwe gumansukiranga ku kyambalo; ekyambalo kyolezebwanga mu kifo ekitukuvu. 
Leviticus6:21 Entamu ekitambiro mwe kifumbirwa eyasibwanga. Bwe kifumbirwanga mu ntamu ey'ekikomo, ekuutibwanga n'eyozebwa n'amazzi." 
Leviticus6:22 Buli wa bulenzi yenna ow'omu kika kya bakabona ayinza okukiryako. Kitambiro kitukuvu nnyo. 
Leviticus6:23 Naye ekitambiro kyonna olw'ebibi, omusaayi gwakyo oguyingiziddwa mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano okuddaabiriza eri mu kitukuvu, kyo tekiriibwanga, kyokebwanga ku muliro." 
Leviticus7:1 “ ‘Na lino lye tteeka ly'e kitambiro olw'omusango; ekitambiro ekitukuvu ennyo. 
Leviticus7:2 Ekitone olw'omusango kittirwanga mu kifo ebitone eby'ekitambiro ekyokye we bittirwa; omusaayi gwakyo ne gumansirwa omwaliiro okugwetoolooza. 
Leviticus7:3 Amasavu gonna gookebwanga, kwe kugamba nti: amasavu g'ekikira, amasavu agabikkirira ebyenda," 
Leviticus7:4 ensigo zombi, n'amasavu agaliko okuliraana endira, n'olububi lw'oku kibumba, nalwo olw'okuggyamu wamu n'ensigo." 
Leviticus7:5 Kabona abyokeranga Omukama ku mwaliiro ng'ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro. Kino kitambiro olw'omusango. 
Leviticus7:6 Ow'obulenzi yenna mu lubu lwa bakabona ayinza okukiryako, naye kiriirwanga mu kifo ekitukuvu, anti kitambiro kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus7:7 “ ‘Etteeka ly'ekitambiro olw'ekibi era lye tteeka ly'ekitambiro olw'omusango: byombi biddira kabona abeera abiweerezza olw'okuddaabiriza. 
Leviticus7:8 Kabona aweerereza omuntu ekitambiro ekyokye eddiba ly'ekitone liba lirye. 
Leviticus7:9 Era n'ekitone kyonna eky'obuwunga ekifumbibwa mu kyoto, oba ekisiikibwa ku lusaniya oba ku luggyo, kiriba kya kabona oyo abeera akiweerezza." 
Leviticus7:10 Na buli kitone kya buwunga, oba kirimu omuzigo oba kikalu, kya batabani ba Aroni nga bakigabana kyenkanyi." 
Leviticus7:11 “ ‘Lino lye tteeka ly'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu oli ky'ayinza okuweereza Omukama: 
Leviticus7:12 “ ‘Oba akiweerezza lwa kwebaza, wa kuweererezanga ku kitambiro eky'okwebaza bukkeeki obutazimbulukuse, nga mulimu omuzigo, oba emigaati egy'oluwewere egitazimbulukuse ng'agisiizeko omuzigo, ne bukabalagala obufumbe mu buwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi, obugoyeddwa obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo." 
Leviticus7:13 Ku kitambiro eky'okussa ekimu olw'okwebaza aweererezangako ekitone eky'obukkeeki obutazimbulukuse. 
Leviticus7:14 Ku buli kimu ajja kuggyangako ekitundu ng'ekitone eky'Omukama. Kinaabanga kya kabona anaabanga amansidde omusaayi gw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. 
Leviticus7:15 Ennyama y'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu olw'okwebaza eriibwanga ku lunaku olwo lwennyini lwe kiweerezeddwa; talekangawo kantu okutuusa enkeera. 
Leviticus7:16 “ ‘Ekitambiro bwe kiba eky'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ekyeyagalire, nakyo kiriirwangawo ku olwo; kyokka bwe wabangawo ekifisse, kikyayinza okuliibwa ne ku lunaku oluddirira." 
Leviticus7:17 Ennyama y'ekitambiro lunaku olwokusatu gye lusiŋŋaanangawo eyokebwanga bwokebwa. 
Leviticus7:18 Bwe wabangawo ennyama y'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu eriibwa ku lunaku olwokusatu, eyo tegenda kusiimibwa; agiweerezza teribaako ky'emugasa, kubanga eriba yeenyinyalwa, era agiryangako aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kye." 
Leviticus7:19 “ ‘Ennyama ekoonye ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu teriibwanga, eyokebwanga bwokebwa. Yo ennyama endala omuntu yenna omulongoofu ayinza okugirya." 
Leviticus7:20 “ ‘Kyokka omuntu atali mulongoofu bw'alyanga ku nnyama y'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu ekiweerezeddwa Omukama, akutulwanga ku bantu be." 
Leviticus7:21 N'oli bw'akwatanga ku muntu atali mulongoofu oba ekisolo ekitali kirongoofu, oba ekintu kyonna ekyenyinyalwa, ate n'alya ku nnyama ey'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu, akutulwanga ku bantu be.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:22 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus7:23 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Temulyanga masavu ga nte, ga ndiga oba ga mbuzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Amasavu g'ennyama ya kalannamye oba ag'ensolo etaaguliddwa ku ttale muyinza okugeyambanga mu ngeri endala yonna, naye temugalyanga." 
Leviticus7:25 Oli alyanga ku masavu g'ekitone ekinaawerezebwa Omukama mu kitambiro ekiwonge n'omuliro wa kukutulwanga ku bantu be. 
Leviticus7:26 “ ‘Yonna gye muli temulyanga omusaayi, gubeere gwa kinyonyi oba nsolo." 
Leviticus7:27 Buli yenna alirya omusaayi wa kukutulwanga ku bantu be.’ ” 
Leviticus7:28 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus7:29 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Aweereza Omukama ekitone eky'okussa ekimu, anaaweererezangako ekitundu ng'ekitambiro olw'Omukama." 
Leviticus7:30 Akireetanga yennyini mu mikono gye ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro. Wa kuleetanga amasavu n'ekifuba; ekifuba n'akiwuubira mu maaso g'Omukama ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba. 
Leviticus7:31 Kabona ayokeranga amasavu ku mwaliiro; kyo ekifuba kinaabanga kya Aroni ne batabani be. 
Leviticus7:32 Ekisambi ekya ddyo eky'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu okiwanga kabona ng'omugabo gwe. 
Leviticus7:33 Ekisambi ekya ddyo kye kinaabanga omugabo gwa mutabani wa Aroni anaabanga aweerezza omusaayi n'amasavu ag'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. 
Leviticus7:34 Ekifuba ekiwuubiddwa n'ekisambi ekya ddyo ekitoneddwa mbiggye ku bitone by'Abayisirayeli bye baleeta olw'ekitambiro kyabwe eky'okussa ekimu, ne mbiwa Aroni Kabona ne batabani be ng'omugabo gwabwe ogw'olubeerera okuva mu Bayisirayeli.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:35 Gwe guugwo omugabo ogwaweebwa Aroni kabona ne batabani be ku biwongerwa Omukama n'omuliro ku lunaku lwe yabasimbawo baweereze Omukama nga bakabona. 
Leviticus7:36 Ku lunaku lwe baasiigibwa omuzigo Omukama yalagira Abayisirayeli bagubawe ng'omugabo gwabwe ogw'olubeerera amazadde gaabwe gonna. 
Leviticus7:37 Ago ge mateeka g'ekitambiro ekyokye, n'ekitone eky'obuwunga, n'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, n'ekitambiro olw'omusango, n'ekitambiro eky'okuwa obwakabona, n'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu," 
Leviticus7:38 Omukama ge yawa Musa ku lusozi Sinayi ku lunaku lwe yagamba Abayisirayeli baweereze ebyabwe Omukama mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi. 
Leviticus8:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus8:2 “Leeta Aroni ne batabani be, ebyambalo n'omuzigo ogusiiga, ente ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, endiga bbiri ennume, n'ekisero ky'emigaati egitazimbulukuse," 
Leviticus8:3 okuŋŋaanye ekibiina kyonna ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano.” 
Leviticus8:4 Musa n'akola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde. Awo ekibiina kyonna ne kikuŋŋaanira ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Leviticus8:5 Musa n'agamba ekibiina nti: “Bino bye bigambo Omukama by'agambye bikolebwe:” 
Leviticus8:6 Awo Musa n'aleeta Aroni ne batabani be, n'abanaaza n'amazzi." 
Leviticus8:7 Aroni n'amwambaza ekkanzu, n'amusiba omusipi, n'amwambaza omunagiro, n'amussaako kungulu efodi, n'agimusibirako n'enywera n'ekimyu ky'efodi ekiruke n'obukugu," 
Leviticus8:8 olwo n'amwambika ekipaapi eky'oku kifuba, n'assa Wurimu ne Tummimu mu kipaapi eky'oku kifuba." 
Leviticus8:9 N'assa ettambaala ku mutwe gwe, eno mu maaso gaalyo n'assaako akapaapi aka zaabu okwoleddwa akabonero akatukuvu, ye ngule entukuvu, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Leviticus8:10 Ate n'addira omuzigo ogusiiga, n'asiiga Ekisulo na buli kyonna ekyamu, n'abitukuza." 
Leviticus8:11 Omuzigo ogumu n'agumansira ku mwaliiro emirundi musanvu, n'agusiiga, n'ebigukolako byonna, n'ekinaabirwamu ne kwe kituula; byonna n'abisiiga omuzigo okubitukuza." 
Leviticus8:12 Omuzigo omulala n'agufuka ku mutwe gwa Aroni, bw'atyo n'amusiiga omuzigo okumutukuza." 
Leviticus8:13 Ne batabani be n'abaleeta n'abambaza amakanzu, n'abasiba emisipi, n'abazingirira ebitambaala ku mitwe, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Leviticus8:14 Olwo n'aleeta ente ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, Aroni ne batabani be ne bagissaako emikono gyabwe ku mutwe." 
Leviticus8:15 Musa n'agitta, n'addira ku musaayi gwayo, n'olugalo lwe n'agusiiga ku mayembe g'omwaliiro okugutukuza." 
Leviticus8:16 Omusaayi ogwasigalawo n'aguyiwa wansi w'omwaliiro, n'agufuula mutukuvu ng'addaabiriza ku lwagwo. Musa n'addira amasavu agaali ku byenda, olububi lw'oku kibumba, n'ensigo zombi n'ebigenderako n'abyokera ku mwaliiro." 
Leviticus8:17 Ente ennume, eddiba lyayo, ennyama n'obusa n'abyokera ebweru w'olusiisira mu muliro, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Leviticus8:18 Yaleeta n'endiga ennume ey'ekitambiro ekyokye Aroni ne batabani be ne bagissaako emikono gyabwe ku mutwe. 
Leviticus8:19 Olwo Musa n'agitta, omusaayi n'agumansira ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus8:20 Endiga n'agitemaatema ebifi; ebyo, omutwe, ennyingo n'amasavu n'abyokya ku muliro." 
Leviticus8:21 N'ayoza n'amazzi ebyenda n'ebigere; olwo endiga yonna n'agyokera ku mwaliiro. Kyali ekitambiro ekyokye, akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Leviticus8:22 N'aleeta n'endiga ennume eyookubiri, ey'omukolo gw'okuwa obwakabona, Aroni ne batabani be ne bagissaako emikono ku mutwe." 
Leviticus8:23 Musa n'agitta, n'addira ku musaayi gwayo n'agussa ku kasammambiro k'okutu kwa Aroni okwa ddyo ne ku kyalakisajja ey'omukono ogwa ddyo, era ne ku kigere ekisajja ku ddyo." 
Leviticus8:24 N'azzaako batabani ba Aroni, n'addira ku musaayi ogw'akaliga akatambiddwa n'agussa ku kasammambiro k'okutu kwa buli omu, ne ku kyalakisajja ow'omukono gwe ogwa ddyo, ne ku kigere kye ekisajja ekya ddyo. Musa n'amansira omusaayi ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus8:25 N'addira amasavu, ekikira, amasavu gonna agabikka ebyenda, olububi olw'oku kibumba, ensigo zombi ko amasavu gaako, ssaako ekisambi ekya ddyo,"
