Leviticus8:26 ne mu kisero ky'emigaati egitazimbulukuse egyali mu maaso g'Omukama, n'aggyamu omugaati gumu ogutazimbulukuse, ne kkeeki enfumbe n'omuzigo, n'akagaati ak'oluwewere, n'abissa ku biri eby'amasavu n'ekisambi ekya ddyo," 
Leviticus8:27 byonna n'abissa mu ngalo za Aroni n'eza batabani be. N'abiwuubira mu maaso g'Omukama ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba. 
Leviticus8:28 Ate Musa n'abibaggya mu ngalo zaabwe n'abyokera ku mwaliiro kungulu ku kitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye ng'ekitone eky'okuwa obwakabona, akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus8:29 N'addira ekifuba, gwe mugabo gwa Musa ku ndiga ennume ey'omukolo ogw'okuwa obwakabona, n'akiwuubira Omukama ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Leviticus8:30 Naddira omuzigo ogusiiga n'omusaayi okuva ku mwaliiro, n'amansira ku Aroni n'ebyambalo bye ne ku batabani be ne ku byambalo byabwe. Bw'atyo n'atukuza Aroni n'ebyambalo bye, ne batabani be n'ebyambalo byabwe." 
Leviticus8:31 Olwo n'alagira Aroni ne batabani be nti: “Mufumbe ennyama awo ku mulyango gwa Weema era mugiriire awo, n'emigaati egy'ekitambiro eky'okuwa obwakabona egiri mu kisero mugirye nga bwe nalagira nti: ‘Aroni ne batabani be bagiryanga.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Kyonna ekinaafikka ku nnyama ne ku migaati mukyokye. 
Leviticus8:33 Temuvanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano okumala ennaku musanvu okutuusa ng'obudde obw'okubawa obwakabona buweddeko; okubawa obwakabona kunaamalanga ennaku musanvu. 
Leviticus8:34 Ekikoleddwa olwa leero Omukama ye yakiragira, kibeere okuddaabiriza ku lwammwe." 
Leviticus8:35 Musigale ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano emisana n'ekiro okumala ennaku musanvu nga mutuukiriza Omukama bye yakuutira, lwe mutaafe: kubanga ekyo kye kyandagirwa.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Aroni ne batabani be ne bakola byonna Omukama bye yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa. 
Leviticus9:1 Ku lunaku olwomunaana, Musa yayita Aroni ne batabani be n'abakadde ba Yisirayeli, n'agamba Aroni nti:" 
Leviticus9:2 “Ddira akayana k'ente, ak'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'endiga ennume ey'ekitambiro ekyokye, byombi nga tekuli kamogo, obireete mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Leviticus9:3 Abayisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Muddire embuzi ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'akayana n'akaliga, byombi nga bya mwaka gumu, ebitaliiko kamogo eby'ekitambiro ekyokye," 
Leviticus9:4 ko ente n'endiga ennume olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu, mubitambire mu maaso g'Omukama, wamu n'ekitone eky'obuwunga ekitabuddwamu omuzigo, kubanga olwa leero Omukama ajja kubalabikira.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Byonna Musa bye yabalagira ne babireeta mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Ekibiina kyonna ne kijja ne kiyimirira mu maaso g'Omukama. 
Leviticus9:6 Musa n'agamba nti: “Kino Omukama kye yalagidde mukole, ekitiibwa kye kiryoke kibalabikire.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Ate Musa n'agamba Aroni nti: “Sembera ku mwaliiro oweereze ekitambiro kyo olw'ekibi, n'ekitambiro ekyokye oddaabirize ku lulwo ne ku lw'abantu; weereza ekitambiro ky'ekibiina oddaabirize ku lwabwe ng'Omukama bwe yalagira.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Aroni n'asembera ku mwaliiro n'atta akayana ak'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ku lulwe. 
Leviticus9:9 Batabani be ne bamuleetera omusaayi gw'akayana, n'annyikamu olugalo n'akwata ku mayembe g'omwaliiro, ogwasigalamu n'aguyiwa wansi w'omwaliiro." 
Leviticus9:10 Amasavu n'ensigo n'olububi olw'oku kibumba ebyava ku kitambiro olw'ekibi n'abyokera ku mwaliiro, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Byo, ennyama n'eddiba, n'abyokera ebweru w'olusiisira." 
Leviticus9:12 N'atta ekitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye. Batabani be ne bamuleetera omusaayi gwakyo, n'agumansira ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus9:13 Ne bamuweereza ebifi by'ekitone eky'ekitambiro ekyokye awamu n'omutwe, byonna n'abyokera ku mwaliiro." 
Leviticus9:14 Ebyenda n'ebirenge n'abyoza n'amazzi n'abyokera ku kitambiro ekyokye ku mwaliiro. 
Leviticus9:15 Aroni n'aleeta ekitone ku lw'abantu; n'addira embuzi ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ebibi by'abantu n'agitta n'agiweereza ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi mu ngeri ye emu nga bwe yakola ku kisoose. 
Leviticus9:16 N'aleeta ekitone ky'ekitambiro ekyokye, nakyo n'akikola ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Leviticus9:17 Ate n'aleeta ekitone eky'obuwunga, n'aggyako olubatu lulamba n'alwokera ku mwaliiro ng'ayongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye eky'oku makya." 
Leviticus9:18 N'atambira ente n'endiga ennume ng'ekitambiro ky'abantu eky'okussa ekimu; batabani be ne bamuleetera omusaayi, n'agumansira ku mwaliiro okugwetoolooza." 
Leviticus9:19 Naye ebitundu eby'amasavu ku nte ne ku ndiga: ekikira, amasavu gennyini, ensigo n'ekibikka ku kibumba," 
Leviticus9:20 ne babissa ku bifuba Aroni n'abyokera ku mwaliiro. 
Leviticus9:21 Ebifuba n'ebisambi ebya ddyo Aroni n'abiwuuba mu maaso g'Omukama nga Musa bwe yali alagidde. 
Leviticus9:22 Aroni n'agololera emikono ku bantu n'abawa omukisa. Bwe yamala okuweereza ekitambiro olw'ekibi, ekitambiro ekyokye n'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu, n'akka." 
Leviticus9:23 Awo Musa ne Aroni ne bayingira mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Bwe baafuluma ne bawa abantu omukisa. Ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kirabikira abantu bonna. 
Leviticus9:24 Ekyabaawo, omuliro ne guva ew'Omukama, ne gusenkenya ekitambiro ekyokye n'amasavu ebyali ku mwaliiro. Ekibiina bwe kyakiraba, ne baleekaana n'essanyu, ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe." 
Leviticus10:1 Batabani ba Aroni, Nadabu ne Abiwu baddira ebyoterezo buli omu ne bassaamu omuliro, ne bagattako obubaani, ne baweereza mu maaso g'Omukama ekitambiro eky'omuliro ekitakkirizibwa, kye yali tabalagidde." 
Leviticus10:2 Omuliro ne guva ew'Omukama ne gubatta, ne bafiira awo mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Leviticus10:3 Musa n'agamba Aroni nti: “Kino Omukama kye yali ategeeza bwe yagamba nti: “ ‘Ndyoleka obutuukirivu bwange mu abo abansemberera, mu maaso g'abantu bonna ndiraga ekitiibwa kyange.’ ” Aroni yasirika busirisi." 
Leviticus10:4 Musa n'ayita Misayeli ne Eluzafani batabani ba Wuzziyeli kitaawe omuto owa Aroni, n'abagamba nti: “Mujje muggye baganda bammwe mu maaso g'Ekitukuvu mubatwale ebweru w'olusiisira.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Amangu ago ne bagenda ne babaggyawo, nga bakyali mu makanzu gaabwe, ne babafulumya ebweru nga Musa bwe yali alagidde." 
Leviticus10:6 Musa n'agamba Aroni ne batabani be, Eleyazari ne Yitamari nti: “Temusasamaza nviiri zammwe n'ebyambalo temubiyuza, sikulwa nga nammwe mufa, Omukama n'asunguwalira ekibiina kyonna. Bo baganda bammwe, ennyumba yonna eya Yisirayeli ka bakungubagire abo Omukama b'ayokezza omuliro." 
Leviticus10:7 Mmwe temuva ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, sikulwa nga mufa, kubanga omuzigo gw'Omukama ogwabasiize gukyabaliko.” Nabo ne bakola nga Musa bwe yabalagira." 
Leviticus10:8 Era Omukama n'agamba Aroni nti: 
Leviticus10:9 “Ggwe ne batabani bo nga munaayingira mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, temunywanga evviini oba ekitamiiza ekirala, sikulwa nga mufa; lino tteeka lya lubeerera amazadde gammwe gonna." 
Leviticus10:10 Mwawulanga ekitukuvu ku kitali kitukuvu, ekyonoonefu ku kirongoofu," 
Leviticus10:11 n'okuyigiriza Abayisirayeli amateeka Omukama ge yabawa ng'ayita mu Musa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Musa n'agamba Aroni ne batabani be abaali basigaddewo, Eleyazari ne Yitamari nti: “Muddire ekitone eky'obuwunga obw'ekitambiro ekyafisseewo ku kiri ekyawongeddwa Omukama n'omuliro, mukiriire awo okumpi n'omwaliiro nga temuli kizimbulukusa, kubanga kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus10:13 Mukiriire mu kifo ekitukuvu, kubanga gwe mugabo gwo ne batabani bo ku kitambiro ekyawongeddwa Omukama n'omuliro. Bwe ntyo bwe nalagirwa." 
Leviticus10:14 “Ekifuba ekiwuubibwa n'ekisambi ekya ddyo ekiwongebwa, ggwe ne batabani bo ne bawala bo, muyinza okubirya. Mubiriiranga mu kifo ekirongoofu, kubanga biggyiddwa ku kitambiro eky'okussa ekimu eky'Abayisirayeli, ne bikuterekerwa ggwe n'abaana bo ng'omugabo gwammwe." 
Leviticus10:15 Ekisambi ekiwongebwa, ekifuba ekiwuubibwa n'amasavu ag'okuweereza ku muliro bireetebwanga ne biwuubibwa mu maaso g'Omukama ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. Guno gwe mugabo gw'abaana bo ogw'olubeerera ng'Omukama bwe yalagira.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Musa bwe yabuuza ku kyabadde ku mbuzi ennume olw'ekibi, n'amanya nti yayokeddwa, n'anyiigira Eleyazari ne Yitamari batabani ba Aroni be yali asigazza, n'abuuza nti:" 
Leviticus10:17 “Lwaki ekitambiro olw'ekibi temwakiriiridde mu Kifo Ekitukuvu? Kintu kitukuvu nnyo. Kyabaweebwa, mwetikke bwe mutyo omusango gw'ebyonoono by'ekibiina kyonna, muddaabirize ku lwabwe eri Omukama." 
Leviticus10:18 Kubanga omusaayi gwakyo tegwayingizibwa mu Kitukuvu, mwali muteekwa okukiriira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, nga bwe nabalagira.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aroni n'ayanukula Musa nti: “Olwa leero baweerezza ku lwabwe ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'ekitambiro ekyokye mu maaso g'Omukama, naye ebiri nga bino byanzijidde. Mba kulya kitambiro olw'ekibi, Omukama yandisanyuse?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Musa bwe yawulira ekyo, n'amatira." 
Leviticus11:1 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Leviticus11:2 “Mugambe Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Zino ze nsolo ze muyinzanga okulya mu nsolo zonna ez'oku lukalu: 
Leviticus11:3 Buli nsolo eyawula ekiganja, ekinuulo nga kiryebulemu, ate ng'ezza obwenkulumu, eyo mugiryanga." 
Leviticus11:4 Naye zino temuziryanga okuva mu ezo ezizza obwenkulumu oba mu zaawula ekiganja: eŋŋamiya kubanga ezza obwenkulumu naye teyawula kiganja; eyo si nnongoofu gye muli; 
Leviticus11:5 omusu guzza obwenkulumu naye tegwawula kiganja; si mulongoofu gye muli; 
Leviticus11:6 akamyu, kubanga nako kazza obwenkulumu naye tekaawula kiganja, si kalongoofu gye muli;" 
Leviticus11:7 n'embizzi eyawula ekiganja, ekinuulo kiryebulemu, naye tezza bwenkulumu, si nnongoofu gye muli." 
Leviticus11:8 Temulyanga nnyama yaabyo wadde okukwata ku kalannamye waabyo kubanga si birongoofu gye muli. 
Leviticus11:9 “ ‘Ku byonna ebibeera mu mazzi ag'omu nnyanja oba mu migga, bino bye muyinza okulya: buli ekirina amayindu n'amagamba; ebyo muyinza okubirya." 
Leviticus11:10 Naye mu by'omu mazzi, mu migga oba mu nnyanja, ekitalina mayindu n'amagamba, mu ebyo ebifumbekedde mu mazzi, ne mu byonna ebisula mu mazzi, mubyenyinyalanga." 
Leviticus11:11 Ebyo byenyinyalwa; awo nno temubiryanga nnyama, ne kalannamye waabyo mumwenyinyalanga." 
Leviticus11:12 Byonna eby'omu mazzi ebitalina mayindu n'amagamba mubyenyinyalanga. 
Leviticus11:13 “ ‘Mu nnyonyi, zino muzeenyinyalanga, temuziryanga, zeenyinyalwa: empungu, ensega ne makwanzi;" 
Leviticus11:14 kamunye, buli kika kya ddiirawamu," 
Leviticus11:15 buli kika kya nnamuŋŋoona; 
Leviticus11:16 wonzi, olubugabuga, enkunga na buli kika kya kakubampanga;" 
Leviticus11:17 ekiwuugulu, olusoove n'ekkukufu," 
Leviticus11:18 ennunda, ekiwuugulu eky'amatu, eŋŋaaŋa," 
Leviticus11:19 enkonkonamasonko, buli kika kya ssekanyolya, ekkookootezi n'ekinyira." 
Leviticus11:20 “ ‘Ebiwuka byonna ebibuuka ebitambulira ku magulu ana, ebyo mubyenyinyalanga." 
Leviticus11:21 Naye bino muyinza okubirya mu ebyo ebiwuka ebibuuka nga birina amagulu ana: ebyo ebirina amagulu abiri amawanvu waggulu ku bigere byabyo okusobola okuccoppa ku ttaka; 
Leviticus11:22 ebyo muyinza okubirya, nga: buli kika kya nzige, buli kika kya jjenje, buli kika kya jjanzi na buli kika kya nseenene." 
Leviticus11:23 Ebirala mu bibuuka byonna nga birina amagulu ana gokka mubyenyinyalanga. 
Leviticus11:24 “ ‘Mugenda kweyonoona n'ebyo; alikwata ku kalannamye waabyo taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. 
Leviticus11:25 Buli yenna alirondawo kalannamye waabyo, ayozanga engoye ze, era alisigala si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:26 Buli nsolo yonna eyawula ekiganja, naye ng'ebitundu by'ekiganja tebyawukanidde ddala, oba nga tezza bwenkulumu, eyo si nnongoofu gye muli. Oli agikutteko taabenga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus11:27 Mu bisolo byonna eby'amagulu ana, ebitambuza ebibatu, si birongoofu gye muli; akwatanga ku kalannamye waabyo taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:28 Oli aggyawo kalannamye w'ebyo, ayozanga engoye ze, era taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi, kubanga ebyo byonna si birongoofu gye muli." 
Leviticus11:29 “ ‘Ku byewalula ku ttaka, na bino si birongoofu gye muli: eggunju, emmese, n'ebika byonna eby'eminya:" 
Leviticus11:30 ekkonkome, enswaswa, ebinya, omunya ne nnawolovu." 
Leviticus11:31 “ ‘Byonna ebyewalula ku ttaka si birongoofu gye muli; oli abikwatangako nga bifudde, abeera si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:32 Singa ekimu ku ebyo, nga kifu, kigwa ku kintu, ekintu ekyo tekibenga kirongoofu, kibeere kya muti, lugoye, ddiba oba kkutiya. Kinnyikibwanga mu mazzi, naye tekibenga kirongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi, oluvannyuma kiriba kirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:33 Naye bwe kigwa mu kintu eky'ebbumba, kyonna ekirimu tekibenga kirongoofu, nakyo mukyasanga bwasa." 
Leviticus11:34 Emmere ey'okulya bw'eba nga yatonnyeeko amazzi agavudde mu nsuwa eyo, teebenga nnongoofu; na buli kyakunywa ekivaamu tekiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:35 Na buli kintu ekitundu kya kalannamye kwe kiba kigudde tekibenga kirongoofu; bwe kaba akabiga oba entamu byasibwanga bwasibwa, si birongoofu; si birongoofu gye muli." 
Leviticus11:36 Oluzzi n'ekidiba omukuŋŋaanira amazzi bisigala birongoofu, naye akoona ku kalannamye waabyo taabenga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus11:37 Kalannamye w'ebyo singa abeera agudde ku nsigo ez'okusiga, zisigala nnongoofu." 
Leviticus11:38 Naye singa ekitundu kya kalannamye w'ebyo kizigwako, teziibenga nnongoofu gye muli." 
Leviticus11:39 “ ‘Ensolo gye mukkirizibwa okulya bw'efanga, oli amala akwata ku kalannamye waayo, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:40 Abanga alidde ku kalannamye waayo, ayozanga engoye ze, era taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. N'oyo anaabanga asituddewo kalannamye oyo ayozanga engoye ze, era taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi" 
Leviticus11:41 “ ‘Buli kyonna ekyewalula ku ttaka kyenyinyalwa; tekiriibwanga. 
Leviticus11:42 Buli kyonna ekyekululira ku kifuba, oba ku magulu ana, oba ku bugulu obungi, oba ekyewalula ku ttaka, temukiryanga kubanga kyenyinyalwa." 
Leviticus11:43 Temwejaajaamyanga na bino ebyewalula; mwewalanga okufuuka abatali balongoofu olw'ebyo, oba byo okubafuula abatali balongoofu." 
Leviticus11:44 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe; mwetukuze mubeere batukuvu, kubanga nange ndi mutukuvu. Temweyonoonanga olw'ekintu n'ekimu ekyewalula ku ttaka," 
Leviticus11:45 Nze Mukama eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mbeere Katonda wammwe. Awo nno mubeeranga batukuvu, kubanga nange ndi mutukuvu." 
Leviticus11:46 “ ‘Lino lye tteeka erifa ku bisolo ne ku binyonyi ne ku buli kiramu ekiri mu mazzi n'ebyewalula ku ttaka. 
Leviticus11:47 Mwawulanga ebirongoofu ku bitali birongoofu, ebiramu bye muyinza okulya ku ebyo ebizira okulya.’ ”" 
Leviticus12:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus12:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: “ ‘Omukazi bw'abanga olubuto n'azaala omwana mulenzi, anaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu, nga bw'aba mu biseera bye eby'omwezi." 
Leviticus12:3 Akaana ka kutayirirwanga ku lunaku olwomunaana. 
Leviticus12:4 Omukazi anaalindanga ennaku amakumi asatu mu ssatu okutukuzibwako omusaayi. Takwatanga ku kitukuvu na kimu, era tayingiranga mu kifo kitukuvu, okutuusa ennaku ez'okutukuzibwa kwe nga ziwedde." 
Leviticus12:5 “ ‘Bw'azaalanga omuwala, wa kumalanga ennaku kkumi na nnya nga si mulongoofu, nga bw'aba mu biseera bye eby'omwezi. Anaalindanga ennaku nkaaga mu mukaaga okutukuzibwako ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi." 
Leviticus12:6 “ ‘Ennaku z'okutukuzibwa kwe bwe ziggwangako olw'omulenzi oba olw'omuwala, atwaliranga kabona ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Omukama akaliga ak'omwaka ogumu akalume, olw'ekitambiro ekyokye, n'enjiibwa ento oba ejjiba, olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus12:7 Abiweerezanga mu maaso g'Omukama okuddaabiriza ku lulwe, olwo anaabanga atukuziddwako okukulukuta kw'omusaayi gwe. “ ‘Lino lye tteeka ku oli abeera azadde ow'obulenzi oba ow'obuwala." 
Leviticus12:8 Okugerera ku nfuna ye, bw'aba tasobola kuleeta kaliga, aleetanga amayiba abiri, oba obuyiibwa bubiri; akamu ka kitambiro ekyokye n'akalala ka kitambiro olw'ekibi. Olwo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe, olwo anaabanga mulongoofu.’ ”" 
Leviticus13:1 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Leviticus13:2 “Omuntu bw'afunanga ekizimba oba okubutukabutuka, oba ebbala essiiwuukirivu ku lususu lw'omubiri gwe, kiyinza okuba ekigenge ku lususu lw'omubiri gwe; atwalibwanga eri Aroni kabona, oba eri omulala yenna mu baana be bakabona." 
Leviticus13:3 Kabona akeberanga ebbwa eriri ku mubiri gwe, bw'asanganga obwoya obuli mu bbwa nga bweruse n'ebbwa nga lisimye mu lususu lw'omubiri, ekyo kigenge ku lususu lw'omubiri gwe; kabona ng'amaze okumukebera, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:4 Naye ebbala ku lususu lw'omubiri gwe bwe libanga nga si lyeru era nga terisimye mu lususu n'obwoya obulirimu nga tebweruse, kabona amukuumiranga bbali yekka okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:5 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu anaamukeberanga, bw'azuulanga ng'okweruukirira tekweyongedde era nga tekubunye ku lususu, ayongeranga okumukuumira ebbali yekka okumala ennaku endala musanvu." 
Leviticus13:6 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu, anaamukeberanga; ekiba bwe kiba nga kiddugazzaddugazza, era nga tekibunye ku lususu, alangiriranga nti mulongoofu, kubadde kubutuukirira kwokka. Oyo ayozanga engoye ze, olwo anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:7 “Ng'amaze okweraga ewa kabona alangirirwe nti mulongoofu, ate ebbala ne likomawo, ne libunira ddala ku lususu, addangamu okweraga ewa kabona;" 
Leviticus13:8 kabona anaamukeberanga; ebbala bwe libanga libunye ku lususu, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu; ekyo kigenge." 
Leviticus13:9 “Ekigenge bwe kibeeranga ku muntu, aleetebwanga ewa kabona." 
Leviticus13:10 Kabona anaamukeberanga, era ku lususu bwe kubeerangako ekizimba ekyeru, n'obwoya nga bweruukiridde, n'ennyamma ento ng'etandise okujja mu kizimba," 
Leviticus13:11 ekyo kigenge ekigundidde ekikutte ku lususu lw'omubiri gwe. Kabona anaamulangirirangawo nti mugenge. Teyeetaaga na kumukuumira bbali yekka kubanga ono kikakafu si mulongoofu. 
Leviticus13:12 “Ekigenge bwe kiriba kiyiye ku lususu, ne kibuna wonna ku lususu okuva ku mutwe okutuuka ku bigere, okutuusa wonna kabona w'asobola okulaba," 
Leviticus13:13 kabona anaamukeberanga. Bw'asanganga nti ekigenge kibunye wonna, alangiriranga omulwadde oyo nti mulongoofu. Kubanga yenna ayeruukiridde, oyo mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:14 Naye ng'ennyama ento ekyayongera okujja ku ye, oyo si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:15 Kabona bw'agirabanga, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Ennyama ento si kintu kirongoofu, n'omuntu mugenge." 
Leviticus13:16 Naye ennyama ento bw'etandika okweruukirira, agendanga eri kabona." 
Leviticus13:17 Kabona anaamukeberanga, ennyama ento bw'eneebanga efuuse njeru, omulwadde anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu, olwo anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:18 “Singa omuntu afuna ejjute ku lususu lwe, naye ne liwona," 
Leviticus13:19 ate mu kifo awabadde ejjute ne wajjawo ekizimba ekyeruukirivu oba ebbala erimyukirivu, oyo yeeraganga ewa kabona." 
Leviticus13:20 Kabona anaamukeberanga; singa ekizzeewo kiriba kisimye mu lususu n'obwoya obuliwo nga bweruse, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu, kubanga ekyo kigenge ekifulumye mu jjute." 
Leviticus13:21 “Naye kabona oluvannyuma lw'okumukebera, singa tewaabenga bwoya bweru mu kyo, nakyo nga tekisimye mu lususu n'okukendeera nga kikendedde, anaamukuumiranga bbali yekka okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:22 Bwe kyeyongeranga okubuna ku lususu, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Ekyo kigenge." 
Leviticus13:23 Ebbala bwe lisigalanga nga bwe libadde ne liteeyongera kubuna, eyo ebadde nkovu ya jjute; kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:24 “Omuntu bw'abangako ebbwa ery'omuliro ku lususu lwe, mu nnyama ento awookeddwa ne mujjamu ebbala erimyukirivu oba eryeru," 
Leviticus13:25 kabona anaakeberanga ebbala eryo. Obwoya bwe buba butukuuliridde nga n'ebbala lisimye mu lususu, kino kigenge ekifulumye mu bbwa ly'omuliro. Kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Kino kigenge." 
Leviticus13:26 Naye kabona bw'akeberanga, mu bbala ne muba nga temuli bwoya bweru, era nga terisimye mu lususu munda, era nga likendedde bukendeezi, anaamukuumiranga bbali yekka okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:27 Ku lwomusanvu anaamukeberanga; ebbwa bwe libanga ddala libunye ku lususu, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu; ekyo kigenge." 
Leviticus13:28 Naye oba ebbala lisigadde nga bwe lyali nga teribunye ku lususu, n'okukendeera nga likendedde, ekyo kizimba olw'omuliro. Kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu, kubanga eyo nkovu ya muliro yokka." 
Leviticus13:29 “Omusajja oba omukazi nga ku mutwe gwe oba ku kalevu ke kuzzeeko ebbwa," 
Leviticus13:30 kabona anaamukeberanga ebbwa. Bwe libanga lisimye mu lususu nga n'obwoya obulimu buseenyuuse ate nga bwa lumaggamagga, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Ekyo kikeke, kigenge kya mu mutwe oba ku kalevu." 
Leviticus13:31 Naye kabona bw'akeberanga ebbwa, ebbwa ne liba nga terisimye mu lususu n'obwoya obulimu nga si buddugavu, omulwadde anaamukuumiranga ebbali yekka okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:32 Ku lwomusanvu akeberanga ebbwa; ekikeke bwe kiba tekibunye, n'obwoya obulimu nga tebuseenyuuse, nga tekisimye mu lususu," 
Leviticus13:33 omuntu oyo amwebwanga yenna okuggyako awali ekirwadde, kabona n'ayongera okumukuumira ebbali yekka okumala ennaku endala musanvu." 
Leviticus13:34 Ku lwomusanvu akeberanga ekikeke, bwe kibanga tekibunye ku lususu, kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu. Omulwadde ayozanga engoye ze; olwo anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:35 Naye singa ekikeke kyeyongera okubuna ku lususu ng'amaze okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu," 
Leviticus13:36 kabona anaamukeberanga, bwe kibanga nga kibunye ku lususu, olwo teyetaaga na kunoonya bwoya buseenyuuse, kubanga ddala oyo si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:37 Naye ye nga bw'aba alabye, ebbwa bwe libanga terikyuseeko, nga n'obwoya obuddugavu buzzeemu okulimeramu, olwo ekikeke kiriba kiwonye, oyo mulongoofu, era kabona amulangiriranga nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:38 “Omusajja oba omukazi bw'afunanga amabalabala ameeru ku lususu lw'omubiri gwe," 
Leviticus13:39 kabona anaagakeberanga. Amabala bwe gabeeranga nga meeruukirivu, kino kikaata ekitali kya maanyi ekiyiye ku lususu lw'omubiri gwe; oyo mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:40 “Omusajja bw'akunyuukanga enviiri ku mutwe, ekyo kiwalaata kya mu mutwe, oyo mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:41 Enviiri bwe zimuggwanga mu bwenyi, era ekyo kiwalaata kya mu bwenyi, oyo mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:42 Naye mu kiwalaata eky'omu mutwe gwe, oba mu bwenyi bwe, bwe mujjangamu ebbwa eryeruukirivu oba erimyukirivu, ekyo kigenge ekifulumye mu kiwalaata eky'omu mutwe gwe oba mu kiwalaata eky'omu bwenyi bwe." 
Leviticus13:43 Kabona amukeberanga. Ebbwa bwe libanga lyeruukiridde oba nga limyuukiridde mu kiwalaata eky'omu mutwe gwe oba mu kiwalaata eky'omu bwenyi bwe ng'ekigenge eky'oku lususu lw'omubiri," 
Leviticus13:44 omuntu oyo mulwadde era si mulongoofu; kabona amulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu olw'ebbwa eriri ku mutwe gwe. 
Leviticus13:45 “Omuntu akubiddwa ekigenge, ayambalanga ebyambalo biyulifu, enviiri ku mutwe nga nsasamavu, ekirevu akibikkangako, ate agendanga aleekaana nti: ‘Si mulongoofu! Si mulongoofu!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Ebbanga lyonna ly'amala n'ekigenge, si mulongoofu. Abeeranga yekka, asulanga bweru w'olusiisira." 
Leviticus13:47 “Obukuku bwe bubeeranga mu lugoye olwa wuulu oba kitaani," 
Leviticus13:48 lubeere luluke oba lulange mu wuzi eza wuulu oba kitaani, oba ku ddiba oba ku kintu kyonna eky'eddiba," 
Leviticus13:49 ng'ebbala eryo ku lugoye, oba ku ddiba, oba ku kiruke oba ekirange, oba ekintu ekikole mu ddiba, lya kiragala oba limyuukirivu, ekyo kigenge kya bukuku. Ekintu kiragibwanga kabona." 
Leviticus13:50 Kabona akikeberanga obukuku, n'akikuumira ebbali kyokka okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:51 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu addangamu n'akikebera, bw'aliraba ng'obukuku bubunye ku lugoye, oba ku kiruke oba ekirange mu wuulu oba kitaani, oba ku ky'eddiba ekya buli ngeri, ekyo kigenge ekikwata; ekintu si kirongoofu." 
Leviticus13:52 Olugoye, oba ekiruke oba ekirange mu wuulu oba kitaani, oba ekintu kyonna eky'eddiba, ekisiigiddwa obulwadde, akyokyanga omuliro, kubanga ekigenge kikwata; ekintu si kirongoofu." 
Leviticus13:53 “Kabona oluvannyuma lw'okukikebera bw'asanganga obukuku tebubunye ku lugoye, ku kiruke, oba ku kirange, oba ku kintu eky'eddiba," 
Leviticus13:54 alagiranga ne booza ekyo ekyasiigibwa obulwadde; olwo ate n'akikuumira ebbali kyokka okumala ennaku musanvu. 
Leviticus13:55 Ekintu ekyafuna ekigenge bwe kimalanga okwozebwa, obukuku bwe bubanga busigadde nga bwe bwali, newandibadde nga tebubunye, kiriba si kirongoofu; okyokyanga omuliro; oba obukuku buli mu maaso oba mabega waakyo." 
Leviticus13:56 “Nga kimaze okwozebwa, kabona bw'akikeberanga, obukuku ne buba nga bukendedde, ekitundu ekyasiigibwa obulwadde akisalangamu mu lugoye, oba ku kintu eky'eddiba, oba mu kiruke, oba ekirange." 
Leviticus13:57 Obukuku bwe bweyongeranga okulabika ku lugoye, oba ku kiruke, oba ekirange, oba ku kintu kyonna eky'eddiba, awo kiriba kyongera okubuna; buli kirina obukuku kya kwokyanga omuliro." 
Leviticus13:58 Naye olugoye, oba ekiruke, oba ekirange, oba ekintu eky'eddiba ekya buli ngeri ndala yonna ekimaze okwozebwa, ne kiba nga tekikyalina bukuku, kyozebwanga ogwokubiri, olwo kinaabanga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus13:59 “Lino lye tteeka ly'ekigenge eky'obukuku ku lugoye olwa wuulu oba kitaani, ku kiruke oba ekirange, oba ku kintu kyonna eky'eddiba, erinaasinziirwangako okubirangirira oba birongoofu oba si birongoofu.”" 
Leviticus14:1 Era Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus14:2 “Lino lye tteeka ly'omukolo ogw'okutukuza omugenge ku lunaku lw'alitukuzibwa: Omugenge aleetebwanga ewa kabona. 
Leviticus14:3 Kabona agendanga ebweru w'olusiisira n'amukebera; bw'abanga awonye ekigenge kye," 
Leviticus14:4 kabona anaalagiranga ne baleeta, olw'ono ow'okutukuzibwa, ennyonyi bbiri ennamu ennongoofu, akati k'entolookyo, ewuzi entwakaavu ne yissopo." 
Leviticus14:5 Emu ku nnyonyi alagiranga n'ettirwa mu kibya eky'ebbumba mu mazzi ag'oku luzzi. 
Leviticus14:6 Addiranga ennyonyi endala ennamu, wamu n'akati k'entolookyo, n'olugoye olutwakaavu ko yissopo n'abinnyika mu musaayi gw'ennyonyi eyattiddwa ku mazzi ag'oku luzzi." 
Leviticus14:7 Omusaayi ogwo n'agumansira emirundi musanvu ku mugenge ow'okutukuza, n'amulangirira nti mulongoofu. Awo ennyonyi ennamu aligirekanga n'ebuuka n'eraga mu ttale." 
Leviticus14:8 Ow'okutukuza ayozanga engoye ze, n'amwa obwoya bwonna ku mubiri n'anaaba n'amazzi; awo anaabanga alongoose. Olwo aliyingira mu lusiisira, naye asigalanga bweru wa weema ye okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus14:9 Ku lwomusanvu amwanga enviiri ze, n'ekirevu n'ebisige, n'obwoya ku mubiri gwe gwonna. Engoye ze azoozanga n'anaaba n'omubiri, olwo anaabanga alongoose." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ku lunaku olwomunaana, aleetanga obuliga bubiri obulume obutaliiko kamogo n'akaliga akakazi ak'omwaka ogumu akataliiko kamogo, n'obuwunga obw'eŋŋano obukuŋŋunte obulungi obuweza ebyekkumi bisatu ebya efa ne logi emu ey'omuzigo." 
Leviticus14:11 Kabona anaamulangirira okuba omulongoofu amuleetanga na bino byonna n'amwanjula mu maaso g'Omukama ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Leviticus14:12 Awo kabona addiranga akaliga akalume akamu n'akaweereza ng'ekitambiro olw'omusango wamu ne logi y'omuzigo. Bino abiwuubanga mu maaso g'Omukama ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba. 
Leviticus14:13 Akaliga akattiranga mu kifo ekitukuvu we battira ebitone eby'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'eby'ekitambiro ekyokye. Nga bwe kiri ku kitambiro olw'ekibi, n'eby'ekitambiro olw'omusango biddira kabona, bintu bitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus14:14 Kabona addiranga ku musaayi gw'ekitambiro olw'omusango n'agusiiga ku kasammambiro k'okutu okwa ddyo we n'okw'oyo atukuzibwa, ne ku kyalakisajja owa ddyo we n'ekigere ekisajja ekya ddyo we." 
Leviticus14:15 Kabona addiranga ku logi y'omuzigo n'aguyiwa mu kibatu kye ekya kkono," 
Leviticus14:16 n'annyika olunwe lwe olwa ddyo mu muzigo oguli mu kibatu kye ekya kkono, n'amansira emirundi musanvu mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Leviticus14:17 Kabona addiranga omuzigo ogukyali mu kibatu n'agusiiga ku kasammambiro k'okutu okwa ddyo ne ku kyalakisajja owa ddyo we n'ekigere ekisajja ekya ddyo we, kungulu ku musaayi gw'ekitambiro olw'omusango." 
Leviticus14:18 Era ogukyafisseewo mu kibatu kabona aguyiwanga ku mutwe gw'oli atukuzibwa, bw'atyo anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Leviticus14:19 Kabona olwo atambiranga ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'addaabiriza ku lw'oyo atukuzibwako obutali bulongoofu. “Awo anattanga ekitone ky'ekitambiro ekyokye. 
Leviticus14:20 Kabona akiweerezanga ku mwaliiro wamu n'ekitone eky'obuwunga, n'addaabiriza ku lulwe, olwo anaabanga alongoose." 
Leviticus14:21 “Bw'aba nga mwavu ebyo nga taasobole kubifuna: aleetanga akaliga akalume ng'ekitambiro olw'omusango kawuubwe olw'okuddaabiriza ku lulwe, ko n'obuwunga obw'eŋŋano obukuŋŋunte obulungi obuweza ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa nga butabuddwamu omuzigo olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga, ko ne logi y'omuzigo," 
Leviticus14:22 ko amayiba abiri oba obuyiibwa obuto bubiri, bw'aliba asobodde okufuna, akamu ka kitambiro olw'ekibi ate akalala ka kitambiro ekyokye." 
Leviticus14:23 Abiweerezanga ku lunaku olwomunaana olw'okutukuzibwa kwe n'abikwasa kabona ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano mu maaso g'Omukama. 
Leviticus14:24 Kabona addiranga akaliga ak'ekitambiro olw'omusango ne logi y'omuzigo wamu n'abiwuuba mu maaso g'Omukama ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba. 
Leviticus14:25 Olwo n'atta akaliga ak'ekitambiro olw'omusango, n'addira ku musaayi gwako n'agusiiga ku kasammambiro k'okutu okwa ddyo okw'oli atukuzibwa ne ku kyalakisajja owa ddyo we, n'ekigere ekisajja ekya ddyo we." 
Leviticus14:26 Kabona afukanga ekitundu ky'omuzigo mu kibatu ekya kkono we," 
Leviticus14:27 n'amansira n'olunwe olwa ddyo we emirundi musanvu mu maaso g'Omukama. 
Leviticus14:28 Omuzigo ogukyali mu kibatu kye agusiiganga we yasiize omusaayi gw'ekitone eky'ekitambiro olw'omusango, kwe kugamba, ku kasammambiro k'okutu okwa ddyo okw'oli atukuzibwa, ku kyalakisajja owa ddyo we ne ku kigere ekisajja ekya ddyo we." 
Leviticus14:29 Omuzigo ogusigaddewo mu kibatu kabona aguyiwanga ku mutwe gw'atukuzibwa, addaabirize ku lulwe mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Leviticus14:30 Olwo atambiranga amayiba oba obuyiibwa, oli by'aliba asobodde okufuna," 
Leviticus14:31 akamu ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, ate akalala ng'ekitambiro ekyokye, awamu n'ekitone eky'obuwunga. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga mu maaso g'Omukama ku lw'oyo atukuzibwa." 
Leviticus14:32 “Eryo lye tteeka ery'oyo aliko ekigenge ayagala okutukuzibwa naye nga tasobola kufuna bitone olw'okutukuzibwa kwe.” 
Leviticus14:33 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Leviticus14:34 “Bwe muyingiranga mu nsi y'e Kanaani gye ndibawa ng'obutaka bwammwe, ne nkuba n'ekigenge eky'obukuku ennyumba ey'omu nsi eribaweebwa ng'obutaka bwammwe," 
Leviticus14:35 nnannyini nnyumba agendanga n'abuulira kabona nti: ‘Mu nnyumba yange ndabyemu ekifaanana okuba obukuku.’ 
Leviticus14:36 Kabona alagiranga ne bafulumya byonna ebiri mu nnyumba nga tannayingira kukebera bukuku, sikulwa nga byonna abirangirira nti si birongoofu; oluvannyuma ayingiranga, n'akebera ennyumba." 
Leviticus14:37 Akeberanga obukuku ku bisenge, bwe wabangayo awamogose obukuku nga mu ndabika yaawo wa kiragalalagala oba nga wamyuukirivu, ate nga wasse nnyo mu kisenge," 
Leviticus14:38 kabona afulumanga ennyumba, ng'atuuse ku mulyango n'agiggala okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus14:39 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu kabona akomangawo n'agikebera; bw'asanganga obukuku bubunye ku kisenge," 
Leviticus14:40 alagiranga n'amayinja agakwatiddwa ne gakoonebwamu, ne gasuulibwa ebweru w'ekibuga mu kifo ekitali kirongoofu." 
Leviticus14:41 Alagiranga ennyumba n'ekalakatibwa munda okugyetoolooza, omwiko ogukalakatiddwako ne gusuulibwa ebweru w'ekibuga mu kifo ekitali kirongoofu," 
Leviticus14:42 ne bazza amayinja amalala mu kifo kya gali agaggyibwamu, ne baddira omwiko omuggya ennyumba ne bagimaala." 
Leviticus14:43 “Obukuku bwe buddamu okuyiwa mu nnyumba oluvannyuma lw'amayinja okuggyibwamu, ebisenge okukalakatibwa, n'okumaalibwa," 
Leviticus14:44 kabona addangamu n'akebera ennyumba. Obukuku bwe buba bubunye mu nnyumba, ekyo kigenge ekikwata, ennyumba si nnongoofu." 
Leviticus14:45 Bagyabyanga, amayinja gaayo, embaawo n'omwiko eby'ennyumba eyo ne bitwalibwa ebweru w'ekibuga mu kifo ekitali kirongoofu." 
Leviticus14:46 “Ayingiranga mu nnyumba eyo ng'emaze okuggalibwa taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. 
Leviticus14:47 Ate oli anaabanga asuzeemu oba n'abaako ky'aliiriddemu, ayozanga engoye ze." 
Leviticus14:48 “Kabona bw'ayingiranga, obukuku ne buba nga tebubunye mu nnyumba oluvannyuma lw'ennyumba okumaalibwa, olwo alangiriranga nti nnongoofu, kubanga okukukula kugenze." 
Leviticus14:49 Okutukuza ennyumba, anaaleetanga ennyonyi bbiri, akati k'entolookyo, ewuzi entwakaavu ne yissopo." 
Leviticus14:50 Attanga emu ku nnyonyi mu kibya ky'ebbumba mu mazzi ag'oku luzzi. 
Leviticus14:51 Olwo n'addira akati k'entolookyo ne yissopo n'olugoye olutwakaavu n'ennyonyi ennamu n'abinnyika mu musaayi gw'ennyonyi etambiddwa ne mu mazzi ag'oku luzzi, n'amansira ennyumba emirundi musanvu." 
Leviticus14:52 Ennyumba anaagitukuzanga n'omusaayi gw'ennyonyi n'amazzi ag'oku luzzi n'ennyonyi ennamu, ssaako akati k'entolookyo ne yissopo n'ewuzi entwakaavu." 
Leviticus14:53 Olwo ennyonyi ennamu agiteeranga ku ttale ebweru w'ekibuga; bw'atyo anaddaabirizanga ku lw'ennyumba, olwo eneebanga nnongoofu.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Lino lye tteeka ku buli kigenge eky'oku mubiri, ekikeke," 
Leviticus14:55 obukuku ku ngoye, obukuku mu nnyumba," 
Leviticus14:56 ku kizimba, okubutukabutuka n'ebiba," 
Leviticus14:57 okusobola okumanya nti ekintu kirongoofu oba si kirongoofu. Lino lye tteeka ku bigenge ne ku bukuku. 
Leviticus15:1 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Leviticus15:2 “Mugambe Abayisirayeli nti: “ ‘Omusajja bw'abanga alina ekikulukuto ky'amazzi mu mubiri gwe, ekikulukuto kye si kirongoofu." 
Leviticus15:3 Ekikulukuto ky'amazzi bwe kiti bwe kinaaleetanga obutaba mulongoofu: “ ‘Ekikulukuto ky'amazzi kibeere nti kisalikako, oba nti kigira ne kizibikira, mu ngeri zombi ono si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:4 “ ‘Ekitanda kyonna alina ekikulukuto ky'amazzi mw'abanga yeebase kiriba si kirongoofu, na buli w'abanga atudde si walongoofu." 
Leviticus15:5 “ ‘Omuntu akwatanga ku kitanda kye, ayozanga engoye ze, n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:6 “ ‘Atuula alina ekikulukuto ky'amazzi w'abadde atudde, naye ayozanga engoye ze, n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:7 “ ‘Buli akwatanga ku muntu alina ekikulukuto ky'amazzi ayozanga ebyambalo bye naye n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. 
Leviticus15:8 “ ‘Omuntu alina ekikulukuto ky'amazzi bw'awandiranga omuntu omulongoofu amalusu, gwe bawandidde ayozanga ebyambalo bye n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:9 “ ‘Ekitebe kyonna kw'atuula nga yeebagadde ensolo nakyo kinabanga si kirongoofu. 
Leviticus15:10 “ ‘Buli yenna akwatanga ku kintu kw'aba atudde, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. Abanga akutte ku ebyo by'abadde atuddeko, ayozanga ebyambalo bye n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:11 “ ‘Buli yenna omusajja alina ekikulukuto ky'amazzi gw'akwatangako nga tamaze kunaaba ngalo na mazzi, ayozanga ebyambalo bye n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:12 “ ‘Ekintu eky'ebbumba ky'abanga akutteko, kyasibwanga bwasibwa. Bwe kiba eky'omuti, kyozebwanga n'amazzi." 
Leviticus15:13 “ ‘Ow'obulwadde obwo bw'awonanga ekikulukuto ky'amazzi, abalanga ennaku musanvu okutuusa ku kutukuzibwa kwe; awo ayozanga engoye ze n'anaaba omubiri gwonna mu mazzi ag'oku luzzi, olwo anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:14 Ku lunaku olwomunaana aleetanga amayiba abiri oba obuyiibwa obuto bubiri, n'ajja mu maaso g'Omukama ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisikano, n'abikwasa kabona." 
Leviticus15:15 Kabona abuweerezanga, akamu ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, ate akalala ng'ekitambiro ekyokye, bw'atyo anaddaabirizanga ku lulwe mu maaso g'Omukama olw’ ekikulukuto ky'amazzi ky'abadde nakyo." 
Leviticus15:16 “ ‘Omusajja bw'afulumyanga amazzi ag'ekisajja, anaabanga amazzi omubiri gwonna; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:17 Ekyambalo oba eddiba okuli amazzi ago byozebwanga; biriba si birongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. 
Leviticus15:18 “ ‘Omusajja bw'abanga yeebase n'omukazi n'afulumya amazzi ag'ekisajja, bombi banaanaabanga n'amazzi, era tebaabenga balongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:19 “ ‘Omukazi mu biseera bye eby'omwezi anaabalirwanga ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu. Buli yenna amukwatako taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. 
Leviticus15:20 “ ‘Na buli kyonna kw'agalamidde oba kw'atudde mu biseera bye eby'omwezi tekibenga kirongoofu. 
Leviticus15:21 “ ‘Akwatanga ku kitanda kye, ayozanga engoye ze n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:22 “ ‘Na buli yenna anaabanga akutte ku kintu ky'aba atuddeko ayozanga engoye ze n'anaaba n'amazzi; taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. 
Leviticus15:23 Na buli anaabanga akutte ku kintu omukazi oyo ky'aliba atuddeko oba ekiri ku kitanda kye, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:24 “ ‘Omusajja bwe yeebakanga naye ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'omwezi omusaayi gumala gumutuukako, omusajja oyo anaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu, n'ekitanda kyonna mw'alyebaka tekibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus15:25 “ ‘Omukazi alwa n'ekikulukuto ky'omusaayi ennaku ennyingi nga si mu biseera bya mwezi, oba okukulukuta ebiseera bye eby'omwezi bwe kusukkirizangamu, ebbanga lyonna ly'amala n'ekikulukuto taabenga mulongoofu kyenkana nga bwe yandibadde mu biseera ebya buli mwezi." 
Leviticus15:26 Ekitanda kwe yeebaka mu bbanga lino tekibenga kirongoofu nga bwe guba mu biseera bye eby'omwezi, na buli kyonna ky'atuulako tekibenga kirongoofu nga bwe guba mu biseera bye eby'omwezi." 
Leviticus15:27 Na buli alibanga amukutteko taabenga mulongoofu; ayozanga ebyambalo bye, naye yennyini n'anaaba amazzi, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:28 “ ‘Bw'amalanga okutukuzibwako ekikulukuto kye, abalanga ennaku musanvu, oluvannyuma anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:29 Ku lunaku olwomunaana aleetanga amayiba abiri oba obuyiibwa bubiri obuto n'abukwasa kabona ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Leviticus15:30 Kabona akamu akaweerezanga ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, akalala ng'ekitambiro ekyokye. Bw'atyo kabona bw'aliddaabirizanga ku lulwe mu maaso g'Omukama olw'obutaba mulongoofu obwava ku kikulukuto kye.’" 
Leviticus15:31 “Mwawulanga nno Abayisirayeli ku bibafuula abatali balongoofu, sikulwa nga bafa olw'obutaba balongoofu ne bajaajaamya ekisulo kyange ekiri mu bo." 
Leviticus15:32 Lino lye tteeka ku musajja alina ekikulukuto ky'amazzi, ku oyo atali mulongoofu olw'okufulumya amazzi ag'ekisajja," 
Leviticus15:33 ku mukazi mu biseera bye eby'omwezi, ku musajja afulumya amazzi oba omukazi akulukuta, era ne ku musajja eyeebaka n'omukazi atali mulongoofu.”" 
Leviticus16:1 Omukama yayogera ne Musa nga batabani ba Aroni ababiri bamaze okufa, lwe baasembera mu maaso g'Omukama ne battibwa," 
Leviticus16:2 n'amugamba nti: “Gamba Aroni muganda wo nti tamalanga gayingira akadde konna mu Watukuvu Ennyo emabega w'olutimbe mu maaso g'Entebe y'Obusaasizi, ebikka ku Ssanduuku, sikulwa ng'afa, kubanga ndabikira mu kire ku Ntebe ey'Obusaasizi." 
Leviticus16:3 Wabula bw'ati bw'ayingiranga Awatukuvu Ennyo: aleetanga ente ennume ento ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, n'endiga ennume olw'ekitambiro ekyokye." 
Leviticus16:4 Ayambalanga ekkanzu ey'olugoye, ne munda empale ey'olugoye, yeesibanga omusipi ogw'olugoye, n'azingirira ettambaala ku mutwe ery'olugoye; ebyo bye byambalo ebitukuvu; abyambalanga. Amalanga kunaaba na mazzi nga tannabyambala." 
Leviticus16:5 “Mu Bayisirayeli aggyangayo embuzi bbiri ennume olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, n'endiga ennume olw'ekitambiro ekyokye." 
Leviticus16:6 Aroni aweerezanga ente ennume ento ng'ekitambiro kye olw'ekibi, olw'okuddaabiriza ku lulwe ne ku lw'ennyumba ye." 
Leviticus16:7 Aleetanga mu maaso g'Omukama embuzi zombi ennume ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Leviticus16:8 Zombi azikubangako akalulu, akamu ku lw'Omukama, akalala ku lwa Azazeli." 
Leviticus16:9 Aroni addiranga embuzi akalulu gye kaguddeko ku lw'Omukama n'agiweereza olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. 
Leviticus16:10 Embuzi endala akalulu gye kaguddeko ng'eya Azazeli agireetanga mu maaso g'Omukama nga nnamu ku lw'okuddaabiriza ng'esindikibwa eri Azazeli mu ddungu. 
Leviticus16:11 “Aroni aweerezanga ente ennume ento ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi okuddaabiriza ku lulwe ne ku lw'ennyumba ye, ente ennume ento n'agitta ng'ekitambiro kye olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus16:12 Addiranga ekyoterezo ky'ajjuzizza amanda agengeredde g'aggye ku mwaliiro oguli mu maaso g'Omukama, n'embatu bbiri ez'obubaani obw'olufufugge, obuwunya akawoowo, n'abitwala emabega w'olutimbe." 
Leviticus16:13 Olwo n'ateeka obubaani ku manda mu maaso g'Omukama, omukka gwabwo ne gukola ekire ne kibikka Entebe y'Obusaasizi eri ku Ndagaano, bw'atyo n'atafa." 
Leviticus16:14 Addiranga ku musaayi gw'ente ennume ento n'amansira n'olugalo kungulu ku Ntebe y'Obusaasizi, ate n'amansira emirundi musanvu mu maaso gaayo." 
Leviticus16:15 “Olwo attanga embuzi ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ku lw'abantu. Ayingiranga Awatukuvu Ennyo n'omusaayi gwayo n'agukola kye kimu nga bwe yakoze ogw'ente ennume ento: agumansiranga ku Nnamulondo y'Obusaasizi ne mu maaso gaayo. 
Leviticus16:16 Anaddaabirizanga bw'atyo Awatukuvu Ennyo olw'obutali bulongoofu, emisango n'ebibi eby'Abayisirayeli ebirala byonna. Mu ngeri ye emu era bw'aliddaabirizanga Weema ey'Ensisinkano, esula mu makkati gaabwe, eyeetooloddwa obutali bulongoofu bwabwe." 
Leviticus16:17 Tewabangawo muntu n'omu abeera mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano nga kabona ayingira Awatukuvu Ennyo okuddaabiriza ku lulwe ne ku lw'ennyumba ye ne ku lw'ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli, okutuusa lw'afuluma." 
Leviticus16:18 Avangayo, n'alaga ku mwaliiro oguli mu maaso g'Omukama n'aguddaabiriza. Addiranga ku musaayi gw'ente ennume ento n'embuzi ennume n'agussa ku mayembe g'omwaliiro." 
Leviticus16:19 Anaamansiranga omwaliiro omusaayi n'olugalo lwe emirundi musanvu n'agitukuzaako obutali bulongoofu bw'Abayisirayeli. 
Leviticus16:20 “Bw'amalirizanga okuddaabiriza Awatukuvu Ennyo ne Weema ey'Ensisinkano ko n'omwaliiro, olwo asembezanga embuzi ennume nga nnamu." 
Leviticus16:21 Aroni agissangako emikono gye gyombi, n'ayatulirako ebyonoono byonna eby'Abayisirayeli, emisango gyabwe gyonna n'ebibi byabwe byonna, n'abissa ku mutwe gwayo, n'agisindika mu ddungu ng'agikwasa omuntu ategekeddwa okugitwalayo." 
Leviticus16:22 Embuzi eryetikka ebibi byabwe byonna n'ebitwala mu ddungu, eyagikulembedde n'agireka eyo mu ddungu." 
Leviticus16:23 “Olwo Aroni ayingiranga mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano n'aggyamu ebyambalo by'abaddemu ng'ayingira mu Watukuvu Ennyo, n'abireka eyo." 
Leviticus16:24 Anaabanga omubiri n'amazzi mu kifo ekitukuvu n'ayambala engoye ze eza bulijjo. Afulumanga n'aweereza ekitambiro ekyokye, ekikye n'eky'ekibiina, n'addaabiriza ku lulwe ne ku lw'abantu." 
Leviticus16:25 N'amasavu ag'ekitambiro olw'ekibi agookeranga ku mwaliiro. 
Leviticus16:26 “Oli eyatadde embuzi ennume eya Azazeli mu ddungu ayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'omubiri n'agunaaba n'amazzi, oluvannyuma n'alyoka ayingira mu lusiisira." 
Leviticus16:27 Ente ennume ento n'embuzi ennume eby'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, omusaayi gwabyo ogwayingiziddwa Awatukuvu Ennyo olw'okuddaabiriza, bifulumizibwanga ebweru w'olusiisira: amaliba, ennyama n'obusa ne byokebwa omuliro." 
Leviticus16:28 Oyo alibyokya ayozanga ebyambalo bye n'omubiri n'agunaaba n'amazzi; oluvannyuma anaayingiranga mu lusiisira. 
Leviticus16:29 “Lino lye tteeka lyammwe ery'olubeerera: “Mu mwezi ogwomusanvu nga gwakamala ennaku kkumi, musiibanga, temukolanga mulimu na gumu, abeere muzaaliranwa oba omugwira asula mu mmwe." 
Leviticus16:30 Kubanga olunaku olwo wanaabangawo okuddaabiriza ku lwammwe okubatukuza; mu maaso g'Omukama muliba balongoofu abataliiko kibi. 
Leviticus16:31 Eneebanga Sabbaato yammwe ya kuwummula; musiibanga. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera. 
Leviticus16:32 “Kabona eyasiigibwa omuzigo okusikira kitaawe nga kabona omukulu, y'akolanga emikolo egy'okuddaabiriza. Ayambalanga ebyambalo eby'engoye, ebyambalo ebitukuvu," 
Leviticus16:33 n'addaabiriza ku lw'Awatukuvu Ennyo, ku lwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano ne ku lw'omwaliiro, ku lwa bakabona ne ku lw'abantu bonna." 
Leviticus16:34 Lino tteeka lyammwe ery'olubeerera: Okuddaabiriza ku lw'ebibi by'Abayisirayeli kwa kukolebwanga omulundi gumu mu mwaka.” Ne bakola nga Katonda bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Leviticus17:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus17:2 “Gamba Aroni ne batabani be n'Abayisirayeli bonna nti: ‘Kino Omukama ky'alagidde: 
Leviticus17:3 “ ‘Omuntu yenna mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli anattanga ente oba endiga oba embuzi mu lusiisira oba ebweru waalwo," 
Leviticus17:4 nga tamaze kugireeta ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano okugiweereza Omukama mu Kisulo ky'Omukama, anaavunaanibwanga okuyiwa omusaayi; anaabanga ayiye omusaayi, n'olw'ekyo wa kukutulwanga ku bantu be." 
Leviticus17:5 Kino kinaabanga bwe kityo Abayisirayeli ebitambiro byabwe bye baweereza eyo mu byalo babireetenga ewa kabona, babiweereze Omukama ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, babiweereze Omukama ng'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu." 
Leviticus17:6 Kabona anaamansiranga omusaayi ku mwaliiro gw'Omukama oguli ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, n'amasavu n'agookera Omukama ng'akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus17:7 Tebaddangayo kutambirira bifaananyi bya mbuzi ebibakozesa obwamalaaya. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera gye bali mu mazadde gaabwe gonna.’ 
Leviticus17:8 “Era bagambe nti: ‘Omu ku b'omu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli oba omugwira asula mu bo anaaweerezanga ekitambiro ekyokye oba ekitone 
Leviticus17:9 nga takireese ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano kukiweereza Mukama, wa kukutulwanga ku bantu be." 
Leviticus17:10 “ ‘Buli wa mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli oba omugwira asula mu bo, bw'alyanga omusaayi, ndimwefuulira, era ndimukutula okuva mu bantu be." 
Leviticus17:11 Kubanga obulamu bw'ekintu buli mu musaayi; nze nagubawa musobole okuddaabiriza ku lwammwe ku mwaliiro; omusaayi gwe muwaayo ng'omutango ku lw'obulamu bwammwe. 
Leviticus17:12 Kyenva ŋŋamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Mu mmwe temubangamu n'omu alya omusaayi, newandibadde omugwira ali mu mmwe; tolyanga omusaayi.”" 
Leviticus17:13 “ ‘Buli Muyisirayeli oba omugwira asula mu bo, ng'ayigga, bw'akwasanga ensolo oba ennyonyi eriibwa, alekanga omusaayi gwayo gwonna ne gutiiriika, n'agubikkako ettaka," 
Leviticus17:14 kubanga obulamu bw'ekintu buli mu musaayi. Kyennava ŋŋamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Temulyanga musaayi gwa kintu kyonna, kubanga obulamu bw'ekintu buli mu musaayi. Buli yenna anaabanga agulidde wa kukutulwangako.”" 
Leviticus17:15 “ ‘Buli yenna alibanga alidde ennyama eya kalannamye oba etaaguddwa ebisolo eby'ettale, abeere muzaaliranwa oba omugwira, ayozanga ebyambalo bye n'anaaba n'amazzi: taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi; oluvannyuma anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus17:16 Bw'atalyoza byambalo bye wadde okunaaba omubiri, aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kye.’ ”" 
Leviticus18:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus18:2 “Yogera eri Abayisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe. 
Leviticus18:3 Temukolanga ng'ab'e Misiri gye mwabeeranga bwe baakolanga, era temukolanga ng'ab'omu Kanaani gye mbatwala bwe bakola. N'empisa zaabwe temuzigobereranga." 
Leviticus18:4 Mutuusanga ennamula yange n'amateeka gange. Mwekkaanye, mubigobereranga. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus18:5 Mukwatanga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange; oyo abituusa aliba mulamu olw'okubeera byo. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus18:6 “ ‘Tewabangawo omuntu asemberera ow'oluganda lwe okwebaka naye. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus18:7 “ ‘Toweebuulanga kitaawo nga weebaka ne nnyoko; oyo nnyoko, teweebakanga naye." 
Leviticus18:8 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne muka kitaawo. Ekyo kiweebuula kitaawo. 
Leviticus18:9 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne mwannyoko oba ne muwala wa kitaawo, oba mubbeere wo, abeere ng'azaalibwa awo awaka oba walala; teweebakanga naye." 
Leviticus18:10 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne muwala wa mutabani wo oba muwala wa muwala wo. Ekyo kikuweebuula. 
Leviticus18:11 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne muwala wa mukazi wa kitaawo gwe yamuzaalira, kubanga ddala oyo mwannyoko." 
Leviticus18:12 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne mwannyina kitaawo, kubanga ono wa luganda ne kitaawo." 
Leviticus18:13 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne muganda wa nnyoko, kubanga ono wa luganda ne nnyoko." 
Leviticus18:14 “ ‘Toweebuulanga kitaawo omuto nga weebaka ne mukazi we; tomusembereranga, kubanga ono nnyoko." 
Leviticus18:15 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne mukaamwana, kubanga ono muka mutabani wo; teweebakanga naye." 
Leviticus18:16 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne mulamu wo, kubanga kino kiweebuula muganda wo." 
Leviticus18:17 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne muwala w'omukazi gwe weebakako naye. Era teweebakanga ne muwala wa mutabani we oba muwala wa muwala we, kubanga bano ba luganda lwe. Buno bugwenyufu." 
Leviticus18:18 “ ‘Towasanga muganda wa mukazi wo, kumufuula muggya we, era teweebakanga naye nga mukazi wo akyali mulamu." 
Leviticus18:19 “ ‘Tosembereranga mukazi kwebaka naye ng'ali mu biseera eby'omwezi, w'atabeerera mulongoofu." 
Leviticus18:20 “ ‘Toyendanga ne muka munno, ne weeyonoona naye." 
Leviticus18:21 “ ‘Toddiranga n'omu ku baana bo n'omuwaayo awongerwe Moleki mu muliro, kubanga kigaanibwa okwonoona erinnya lya Katonda wo. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus18:22 “ ‘Teweebakanga n'omusajja nga bwe wandyebase n'omukazi; ekyo kyenyinyalwa. 
Leviticus18:23 “ ‘Tokabawalanga n'ekisolo, ne weeyonoona nakyo; n'omukazi teyeewanga ekisolo okukabawala nakyo; ekyo kya bugwagwa." 
Leviticus18:24 “ ‘Temweyonoonanga na bino byonna; amawanga gonna ge ŋŋenda okugoba mu maaso gammwe bwe gatyo bwe geeyonoona. 
Leviticus18:25 Ensi bw'etyo yajaajaamizibwa, ne ngibonereza olw'ekibi kyayo, n'ensi yennyini n'esesema bannansi baamwo." 
Leviticus18:26 Mmwe mukwatenga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange. Abe muzaaliranwa oba omugwira asula mu mmwe, takolanga n'ekimu ku byenyinyalwa bino." 
Leviticus18:27 Bino byonna bannansi abaabakulembera baabikola, ensi ne bagijaajaamya." 
Leviticus18:28 Mwekkaanye, nammwe bwe munagijaajaamya, ejja kubasesema nga bwe yasesema amawanga agaabasooka okubaayo." 
Leviticus18:29 Omuntu yenna anaabanga akoze ekimu ku byenyinyalwa bino, wa kukutulwanga ku bantu be." 
Leviticus18:30 Mukwatenga bye nakuutira, muleke kuyisa mpisa mbi abaabakulembera ze baayisa, muleme kweyonoona olw'okubeera byo. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
Leviticus19:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus19:2 “Yogera eri ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Mubeere batukuvu, kubanga nange Omukama Katonda wammwe ndi mutukuvu." 
Leviticus19:3 “ ‘Buli omu mu mmwe atyenga nnyina ne kitaawe. Sabbaato zange muzitukuzenga. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe. 
Leviticus19:4 “ ‘Temwekubiiranga ku bifaananyi bya balubaale, era temwekoleranga balubaale basaanuuse. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:5 “ ‘Bwe muweerezanga Omukama ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu, mukitambiranga mu ngeri esaanidde kiryoke kisiimibwe ku lwammwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Kiriibwanga ku lunaku lwe kitambirwanga ne ku lunaku oluddirira; buli kyonna ekiribanga kisigaddewo okutuusa ku lwokusatu, kyokebwanga bwokebwa." 
Leviticus19:7 Ekiririibwanga ng'olwokubiri luyise, kiriba kyenyinyalwa, tekirisiimibwa." 
Leviticus19:8 Alibanga akiridde aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kye, kubanga anaabanga ajaajaamizza ekitukuvu ky'Omukama era oyo akutulwanga ku bantu be." 
Leviticus19:9 “ ‘Bwe mukungulanga bye mubazizza, tokungulanga ddala kutuuka ku lubibiro lwa nnimiro yo; ebirimba ebigenda bisigalira tobikuŋŋaanyanga." 
Leviticus19:10 Ng'onoze mu nnimiro yo ey'emizabbibu togiddangamu gwa kubiri, n'ebirimba ebigenda bisigalira mu by'okungula tobikuŋŋaanyanga, obirekeranga abaavu n'abagwira. Nze Mukama Katonda wo." 
Leviticus19:11 “ ‘Tobbanga. Tolimbanga; buli omu takumpanyanga munne. 
Leviticus19:12 Tolayiranga linnya lyange bitaliimu n'ovuma erinnya lya Katonda wo. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:13 Tolyazaamaanyanga munno, tomunyaganga. Empeera y'omukozi tosigalanga nayo okutuusa enkeera." 
Leviticus19:14 Kiggala tomuvumanga, ne muzibe tomuteganga kintu kw'aneesittala, wabula otyanga Katonda wo. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:15 “ ‘Tobeeranga atali mwenkanya mu kulamula; teweekubiiranga wa mwavu n'omugagga tomutiisanga amaaso. Munno omulamulanga mu butuukirivu. 
Leviticus19:16 Togendanga ng'okonjera mu bantu bo; tossanga bulamu bwa munno mu kabi. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:17 Tokyawanga muganda wo mu mutima gwo. Munno omwatuliranga oleme kubeera na musango naye. 
Leviticus19:18 Towooleranga ggwanga oba okusibira bantu b'eggwanga lyo obusungu, wabula oyagalanga munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:19 “ ‘Mukwatenga amateeka gange. Tolekanga nsolo zo ezaawula ebika okulinnyiragana. Ennimiro yo togisigangamu nsigo bbiri ez'enjawulo. Toyambalanga kyambalo ekiruke mu ngoye ebbiri ezaawula ebika. 
Leviticus19:20 “ ‘Omusajja bwe yeebakanga n'omukazi nga muzaana ayogerezebwa, naye nga tannaba kununulibwa oba okuteebwa, anaabonerezebwanga, naye bombi si ba kuttibwa, kubanga omuzaana yali tannateebwa." 
Leviticus19:21 Naye omusajja aleetanga endiga ennume ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano aweereze Omukama ekitambiro olw'omusango. 
Leviticus19:22 Kabona yeeyambanga endiga eyo ey'ekitambiro olw'omusango n'addaabiriza ku lulwe mu maaso g'Omukama olw'ekibi ky'aliba akoze, era olwo ekibi kinaamusonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus19:23 “ ‘Bwe muyingiranga mu nsi ne musimba emiti egya buli ngeri egibala ebibala, ebisookera ddala bizira. Okumala emyaka esatu ng'omuti ogwo guzira, temugulyangako." 
Leviticus19:24 Mu mwaka ogwokuna buli kibala kyakwo kiribanga kitukuvu, ekiwongeddwa Omukama okumuwa ettendo." 
Leviticus19:25 Mu mwaka ogwokutaano muyinzanga okulya ku bibala byagyo, olwo amakungula gaabyo galibaddira. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:26 “ ‘Temulyanga nnyama ng'ekyalimu omusaayi. Temukolanga bya bulaguzi wadde okuloga. 
Leviticus19:27 “ ‘Temusalanga kigooli, era ekirevu temukikomoolereranga." 
Leviticus19:28 Nga mukungubaga temwesalaasalanga emibiri; temweyolangako bifaananyi ku lususu. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:29 “ ‘Togwagwawazanga muwala wo ng'omuwaayo mu bwamalaaya, sikulwa ng'ensi eyonooneka n'ejjula obugwenyufu." 
Leviticus19:30 “ ‘Sabbaato zange muzikuzanga: ekifo kyange ekitukuvu mukityenga. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:31 “ ‘Temwekubiiranga ku ndagu oba abasamirira emizimu, kubanga bagenda kuboonoona. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:32 “ ‘Awali ow'envi oyimiriranga; omukadde omussangamu ekitiibwa n'otya Katonda wo. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:33 “ ‘Omugwira bw'abeeranga naawe mu nsi, tomuyisanga bubi." 
Leviticus19:34 Wabula omugwira abeera nammwe omutwalanga ng'omuzaaliranwa; omwagalanga nga bwe weeyagala, anti nammwe mwali bagwira mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:35 “ ‘Tobeeranga atali mwenkanya mu kulamula ebipimo by'obuwanvu, obuzito n'obungi bw'ekintu." 
Leviticus19:36 Mweyambenga minzaani entuufu, amayinja amatuufu, efa entuufu ne yini entuufu. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 “ ‘Mukwatenga amateeka gange gonna n'ennamula yange yonna, era mubituuse. Nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Leviticus20:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus20:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: “ ‘Omu ku Bayisirayeli, oba ku bagwira abali mu Yisirayeli, bw'akwatanga omu ku baana be, n'amuwa Moleki, wa kuttibwanga; abantu ab'omu nsi bamussanga mayinja." 
Leviticus20:3 Nange ndimwefuulira ne mukutula okuva ku bantu be, kubanga yaddira omu ku baana be n'amuwa Moleki, bw'atyo n'avvoola ekitukuvu kyange, n'ayonoona n'erinnya lyange ettukuvu." 
Leviticus20:4 Abantu mu nsi bwe baliraba ng'omuntu ono awa Moleki omu ku baana be naye ne bakibikkirira, ne batamutta," 
Leviticus20:5 ŋŋenda kwefuulira omuntu oyo n'ekika kye; ye na bonna abassa ekimu naye ne bakola obwamalaaya ne Moleki, ndibakutula ku bantu baabwe." 
Leviticus20:6 “ ‘Omuntu alyekubira ku ndagu n'abasamirira emizimu, n'akola obwamalaaya na bino ng'abakkiririzaamu, ndimwefuulira ne mmukutula ku bantu be." 
Leviticus20:7 “ ‘Mwetukuze mubeere batukuvu, kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus20:8 “ ‘Mukwatanga amateeka gange era mugatuusanga. Nze Mukama abatukuza. 
Leviticus20:9 “ ‘Omuntu avumiriranga kitaawe ne nnyina, wa kuttibwanga; avumye kitaawe ne nnyina; omusaayi gwe gunaabeeranga ku mutwe gwe." 
Leviticus20:10 “ ‘Omuntu ayendanga ne muka bandi, n'akola eby'obukaba ne muka munne, bombi ayenze ne gwe bayenzeeko ba kuttibwanga." 
Leviticus20:11 “ ‘Omusajja eyeebakanga ne muka kitaawe, aliba aweebudde kitaawe, bombi omusajja n'omukazi ba kuttibwanga; omusaayi gwabwe gunaabeeranga ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Leviticus20:12 “ ‘Omusajja eyeebakanga ne mukaamwana, bombi ba kuttibwanga, kubanga bakoze kya bugwagwa; omusaayi gwabwe gunaabeeranga ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Leviticus20:13 “ ‘Omusajja eyeebakanga n'omusajja kyenkana nga bwe yandyebase n'omukazi, bombi bakoze ekyenyinyalwa, ba kuttibwanga; omusaayi gwabwe gunaabeeranga ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Leviticus20:14 “ ‘Omusajja awasanga omuwala ate n'akubirako ne nnyina w'omuwala abeera akoze kya bugwenyufu. Bonsatule babookyanga omuliro mu mmwe muleme kubeeramu bugwenyufu buno. 
Leviticus20:15 “ ‘Omuntu akabawalanga n'ekisolo wa kuttibwanga, n'ekisolo mukittanga." 
Leviticus20:16 “ ‘Omukazi asembereranga ekisolo kyonna okukabawala nakyo, mumuttanga era n'ekisolo kya kuttibwanga; omusaayi gwe gunaabeeranga ku mutwe gwe, era n'ekisolo nakyo bwe kityo." 
Leviticus20:17 “ ‘Omusajja awasanga mwannyina, kwe kugamba, muwala wa kitaawe oba wa nnyina, ne beebaka bombi, kiriba kya nsonyi; battirwanga mu maaso ga bantu baabwe, kubanga omusajja yeebase ne mwannyina; aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kye." 
Leviticus20:18 “ ‘Omusajja eyeebakanga n'omukazi mu biseera bye eby'omwezi, anaabanga abikkudde ensulo ye, n'omukazi anaabanga abikkudde ensulo y'omusaayi gwe; bombi ba kukutulwanga ku bantu baabwe." 
Leviticus20:19 “ ‘Teweebakanga ne nnyoko omuto oba ssengaawo; akola ekyo abeera aweebudde ab'oluganda lwe; bombi baneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kyabwe. 
Leviticus20:20 “ ‘Ayebakanga ne ssengaawe anaabanga aweebudde kitaawe omuto. Ye ne gwe yeebase naye balyetikkanga omusango gw'ekibi kyabwe; bombi balifa tebafunye baana. 
Leviticus20:21 “ ‘Oli awasanga muka muganda we anaabanga akoze kya bugwagwa era ng'aweebudde muganda we; tebaliba na baana. 
Leviticus20:22 “ ‘Mukwatenga amateeka gange gonna n'ennamula yange yonna; mubituusenga, ensi gye mugenda okuyingira, egenda okuba eyammwe, ereme kubasesema." 
Leviticus20:23 Temugobereranga mpisa z'amawanga ge ŋŋenda okugobawo mu maaso gammwe, kubanga byonna ebyo gaabikola, ne ngatamwa." 
Leviticus20:24 Naye mmwe nabagamba nti: “Mmwe mulitwala ensi yaabwe; ndigibawa ebeere yammwe, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki.” “ ‘Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaawula mu mawanga amalala." 
Leviticus20:25 Awo nno mwawulanga wakati w'ensolo ennongoofu n'eteri nnongoofu, n'ennyonyi eteri nnongoofu ku eyo ennongoofu. Temwejaajaamyanga na nsolo oba ekinyonyi oba ebyewalula ku ttaka, ebyo bye nabaawuliramu nti si birongoofu gye muli." 
Leviticus20:26 “ ‘Mubeeranga batukuvu gye ndi, kubanga nange Omukama ndi mutukuvu, ate nnabaawula mu mawanga amalala mubeere bange." 
Leviticus20:27 “ ‘Omukazi oba omusajja aliko omulaguzi, oba asamirira emizimu, wa kuttibwanga; wa kuttisanga mayinja; omusaayi gwabwe gunaabeeranga ku mitwe gyabwe.’ ”" 
Leviticus21:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: “Yogera eri bakabona batabani ba Aroni obagambe nti: ‘Kabona yeewalanga obutaba mulongoofu olw'omu ku bantu be afudde. 
Leviticus21:2 Wabula beppo ab'oluganda olw'okumpi, nga nnyina, kitaawe, mutabani we, muwala we, muganda we," 
Leviticus21:3 ne mwannyina atannafumbirwa kubanga ono akyali mu bulabirizi bwe. Ku lwa bano anaamalanga gaganya n'ataba mulongoofu. 
Leviticus21:4 Kabona teyeeereteranga bw'atyo butaba mulongoofu olw'okubeera omukulembeze mu bantu be, bw'atyo ne yeeyonoona." 
Leviticus21:5 “ ‘Bakabona tebamwanga mitwe gyabwe wadde okukomoolerera ebirevu byabwe; tebeesalaasalanga mibiri gyabwe. 
Leviticus21:6 Babeeranga batukuvu eri Katonda waabwe, era tebayonoonanga linnya lye, kubanga bawongera Omukama ebitambiro n'omuliro, ekyokulya kya Katonda waabwe; awo nno babeeranga batukuvu." 
Leviticus21:7 “ ‘Bakabona tebawasanga abakazi aboonoonefu bamalaaya oba abaagobwa ewa babbaabwe, kubanga bakabona batukuvu eri Katonda waabwe." 
Leviticus21:8 “ ‘Kabona omutwalanga nga mutukuvu kubanga aweereza ekyokulya kya Katonda wo. Mutwale nga mutukuvu kubanga nange Omukama abatukuza ndi mutukuvu. 
Leviticus21:9 “ ‘Muwala wa kabona bwe yeegwagwawazanga n'akola obwamalaaya, abeera ayonoonye erinnya lya kitaawe; ayokebwanga muliro." 
Leviticus21:10 “ ‘Kabona omukulu, oyo mu baganda be eyayiibwako omuzigo ogusiiga ku mutwe, n'aweebwa obwakabona, okwambala ebyambalo ebitukuvu, tasasamazanga nviiri ze; tayuzanga byambalo bye," 
Leviticus21:11 era tayingiranga n'akatono awali omulambo, era teyeereteranga obutaba mulongoofu, ne bwe kibanga ku lwa kitaawe wadde nnyina, aleme kwonooneka." 
Leviticus21:12 Era tavanga mu Kitukuvu kya Katonda, aleme kukijaajaamya, kubanga yatukuzibwa n'omuzigo gwa Katonda ogusiiga. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus21:13 “ ‘Awasanga omukazi mbeerera. 
Leviticus21:14 Tawasanga nnamwandu oba oyo eyagobebwa ewa bba, oba eyeegwagwawaza n'obwamalaaya. Wabula omuwala embeerera ow'omu kika kye gw'awasanga," 
Leviticus21:15 bw'atyo n'ataweebuula lulyo lwe, kubanga nze Mukama amutukuza.’ ”" 
Leviticus21:16 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus21:17 “Gamba Aroni nti: “ ‘Mu batabani bo, mu mazadde gaabwe gonna, aliko enkeka yonna tasemberanga okuweereza Katonda ekyokulya kye." 
Leviticus21:18 Kubanga buli yenna aliko enkeka taasemberenga: omuzibe w'amaaso, omulema, omusale w'ennyindo, omugongobavu," 
Leviticus21:19 omumenyefu w'ekigere oba omukono," 
Leviticus21:20 ow'ebbango, nnakalanga, ow'ensenke, alina olukuku, omubootongo, oba ow'enjagi ezaayatika." 
Leviticus21:21 Mu baana ba Aroni, buli aliko enkeka tasemberanga kuwongera Mukama bitone n'omuliro. Aliko enkeka, tasaanidde kusembera kuweereza Katonda we kyakulya." 
Leviticus21:22 “ ‘Ayinza okulya ku kyokulya ekitukuvu ennyo ekya Katonda ne ku mmere entukuvu," 
Leviticus21:23 naye olw'enkeka emuliko, tasemberanga awali olutimbe, wadde ku mwaliiro, n'ajaajaamya ekifo kyange ekitukuvu, kubanga nze Mukama abitukuza.’ ”" 
Leviticus21:24 Ebyo Musa yabigamba Aroni ne batabani be n'Abayisirayeli bonna. 
Leviticus22:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus22:2 “Gamba Aroni ne batabani be basse ekitiibwa mu bitukuvu Abayisirayeli bye bampongera, bwe batyo baleme kwonoona linnya lyange. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:3 “Bagambe nti: “ ‘Mu mazadde gammwe gonna omuntu yenna asemberanga nga si mulongoofu eri ebitukuvu Abayisirayeli bye bawongedde Omukama, anaakutulwanga mu maaso gange. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:4 “ ‘Ow'omu zzadde lya Aroni, nga mugenge, oba alina okukulukuta kw'amazzi, talyanga ku biwonge ebitukuvu, okutuusa ng'amaze okulongoosebwa. Bw'akwatanga ku kintu ekyonoonese olw'okukoona ku mulambo oba ku musajja afulumizza amazzi ag'ekisajja, taabenga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus22:5 Era taabenga mulongoofu bw'alikwata ku kyewalula ekimufuula atali mulongoofu oba ku muntu atali mulongoofu, obutali bulongoofu bwe bubeere bwa ki oba ki." 
Leviticus22:6 Akwatanga ku bintu ng'ebyo taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi, era talyenga ku biwonge ebitukuvu, okuggyako ng'amaze kunaaba mubiri n'amazzi." 
Leviticus22:7 Enjuba ng'emaze okugwa olwo anaabanga alongoose, olwo ayinza okulya ku biwonge ebitukuvu, kubanga ebyo mmere ye." 
Leviticus22:8 “ ‘Ennyama eya kalannamye n'ey'ebitaaguju tagiryanga, sikulwa ng'afuuka atali mulongoofu olwa ebyo. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:9 “ ‘Bakabona bakwatanga kye nakuutira baleme kubeera na musango, ne bafa olw'okukyonoona. Nze Mukama abatukuza." 
Leviticus22:10 “ ‘Omuntu owa bulijjo talyanga ku biwonge ebitukuvu, ne bw'abanga musenze wa kabona oba mupakasi we." 
Leviticus22:11 Naye kabona bw'abanga aguze omuddu ne ssente, oba ng'omuddu yazaalibwa awo mu maka ge, omuddu oyo ayinza okubiryako." 
Leviticus22:12 Muwala wa kabona afumbiddwa omusajja owa bulijjo, talyanga ku bitambiro ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus22:13 Muwala wa kabona bw'abanga nnamwandu oba omugobe ewa bba, nga talina baana, abeera ewa kitaawe nga bwe yali mu buvubuka bwe, ayinza okulya ku mmere ya kitaawe. Omulala yenna owa bulijjo takkirizibwa kulyako." 
Leviticus22:14 Oli bw'alyanga ku biwonge ebitukuvu nga tategedde, anaaliwanga olw'ekitukuvu ky'alidde n'agattangako ekyokutaano kyakyo, n'abiwa kabona." 
Leviticus22:15 Bakabona tebajaajaamyanga ebitukuvu Abayisirayeli bye bawongera Omukama 
Leviticus22:16 nga babakkiriza ne balya ku biwonge ebitukuvu ne beereetera omusango oguliko n'okuliwa. Nze Mukama abatukuza.’ ” 
Leviticus22:17 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus22:18 “Gamba Aroni ne batabani be n'Abayisirayeli bonna nti: “ ‘Singa omu ku mmwe, ow'omu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, oba omugwira asula mu Yisirayeli, abanga aweerezza ekitambiro ekyokye mu maaso g'Omukama olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ng'ekitambiro ekyeyagalire," 
Leviticus22:19 okusobola okusiimibwa ku lulwe, aleetanga kirume ekitaliiko kamogo okuva mu nte, endiga oba embuzi." 
Leviticus22:20 Temuweerezanga kyonna kiriko nkeka, kubanga tekijja kusiimibwa ku lwammwe." 
Leviticus22:21 “ ‘Oli anaabanga aweerezza Omukama ng'aggya mu ggana oba mu kisibo ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo oba ekitambiro ekyeyagalire, ekitambiro okusiimibwanga kibeeranga tekiriiko kamogo oba nkeka yonna." 
Leviticus22:22 Ekizibi ky'amaaso, ekimenyefu, ekisaleko, eky'amabwa, eky'olukuku, oba ekiriko awatanye, temukiweerezanga Mukama. Temukissanga ku mwaliiro ng'ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus22:23 Ku kitambiro ekyeyagalire okyayinza okuweereza ente ennume oba endiga eŋŋongobavu oba eyakonvuba; kyokka ey'engeri eyo tekkirizibwa mu kitambiro eky'okutuukiriza obweyamo. 
Leviticus22:24 Temuweerezanga Mukama kisolo kyonna ng'enjagi zaakyo zizimbye, oba nga zaabetentebwa, oba nga zayasibwa, oba nga zaggyibwamu, oba nga zaasalibwako; era mu nsi yammwe ekyo temukikolanga n'akamu." 
Leviticus22:25 Abagwira nga babireese temubikkirizanga ne mubiweereza ng'ekyokulya ekya Katonda wammwe. Tebigenda kusiimibwa ku lwammwe, kubanga byayonooneka, biriko enkeka.’ ”" 
Leviticus22:26 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus22:27 “Ente, endiga oba embuzi bw'ezaalibwanga, ebeeranga ne nnyina waayo okumala ennaku musanvu; okutandika n'olwomunaana enekkirizibwanga ng'ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus22:28 Ente oba endiga tettirwanga ku lunaku lumu n'omwana gwayo. 
Leviticus22:29 “Bwe mutambiriranga Omukama ekitambiro eky'okwebaza, mukitambiranga nga kisobola okusiimibwa ku lwammwe." 
Leviticus22:30 Kiriirwangawo ku olwo; temulekangawo kantu okutuusa enkeera. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus22:31 “Mukwatenga ebiragiro byange, mubituuse. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:32 Temwonoonanga linnya lyange ttukuvu, Abayisirayeli balyoke bategeere nga ndi mutukuvu. Nze Omukama abatukuza," 
Leviticus22:33 eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri mbeere Katonda wammwe. Nze Mukama.” 
Leviticus23:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:2 “Yogera eri Abayisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Zino ze mbaga z'Omukama eziragiddwa lwe munaayitanga enkuŋŋaana entukuvu. Ze zino embaga zange eziragiddwa: 
Leviticus23:3 “ ‘Mukolanga emirimu ennaku mukaaga, olwomusanvu Sabbaato ey'okuwummula n'olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu. Temukolanga mulimu gwonna yonna gye mubeeranga, Sabbaato lwa Mukama." 
Leviticus23:4 “ ‘Kale nno zino ze mbaga z'Omukama entukuvu eziragiddwa, lwe munaayitanga enkuŋŋaana entukuvu." 
Leviticus23:5 “ ‘Mu mwezi ogusooka, nga gwakamala ennaku kkumi na nnya, akawungeezi, ye mbaga ya Pasika y'Omukama" 
Leviticus23:6 Ate ku lw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwo, embaga y'Omukama ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse lw'etandika. Okumala ennaku musanvu munaalyanga migaati egitazimbulukuse." 
Leviticus23:7 Ku lunaku olusooka kunaabangako olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temulukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. 
Leviticus23:8 Wabula muweerezanga ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro okumala ennaku musanvu. Ku lwomusanvu mukolanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito.’ ” 
Leviticus23:9 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:10 “Yogera eri Abayisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Bwe muyingiranga mu nsi gye ndibawa, ne mukungula ku bibala byayo, omuganda gw'ebirimba by'eŋŋano bye musookanga okukungula muguleeteranga kabona." 
Leviticus23:11 Anaaguwuubanga mu maaso g'Omukama gulyoke gusiimibwe ku lwammwe. Kabona aguwuubanga ku lunaku oluddirira Sabbaato. 
Leviticus23:12 Ate ku olwo lwennyini lwe muwuuba omuganda gw'eŋŋano, mutambirirangako Omukama akaliga akalume ak'omwaka ogumu okutali kamogo ng'ekitambiro ekyokye." 
Leviticus23:13 Kuno muweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga obuweza ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa nga mutabuddwamu omuzigo, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa. Era ne muweererezaako n'ekitone kyakyo eky'evviini eweza ekyokuna ekya yini." 
Leviticus23:14 Omugaati n'empeke ensiike n'obuwunga obwakaseebwa eby'eŋŋano gye mukungudde, temubiryanga okutuusa ku lunaku olwo lwennyini lwe muweereza Katonda wammwe ebitone bino. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna yonna gye mulibeera." 
Leviticus23:15 “ ‘Okuva ku lunaku oluddirira Sabbaato lwe muweereza omuganda ogw'okuwuuba, mubalanga wiiki musanvu enzijuvu." 
Leviticus23:16 Mubalanga ennaku amakumi ataano okutuusa ku lunaku oluddirira Sabbaato eyoomusanvu ne muweereza Omukama ekitone ky'obuwunga bw'eŋŋano eyaakakungulwa. 
Leviticus23:17 Okuva eyo yonna gye muli muleetanga emigaati ebiri egigoyeddwa mu buwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obuweza ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa, omuli ekizimbulukusa, ku lw'ekitone eky'okuwuuba mu maaso g'Omukama eky'ebibala ebisooka eby'amakungula." 
Leviticus23:18 Ku migaati muweererezangako obuliga obulume musanvu obw'omwaka ogumu, obutaliiko kamogo, ente ennume ento emu n'endiga ennume bbiri. Biriweerezebwa Omukama ng'ekitambiro ekyokye, okwo ssaako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'ekitone eky'okuyiwa; ebitone ebiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Leviticus23:19 Muweererezangako n'embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, n'obuliga bubiri obw'omwaka ogumu olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu." 
Leviticus23:20 Kabona anaawuubanga mu maaso g'Omukama obuliga obubiri ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba, awamu n'emigaati egy'ebibala ebisooka. Bino biwonge bya Mukama bitukuvu bya kabona." 
Leviticus23:21 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwo lwennyini muyitanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna yonna gye mulibeera. 
Leviticus23:22 “ ‘Bwe mukungulanga ensi yammwe by'ebazizza, temukungulanga kutuukira ddala ku lubibiro lwa nnimiro, n'ebigenda bisigalira mu by'okungula temubikuŋŋaanyanga; obirekeranga baavu n'abagwira. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:23 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:24 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Olunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogwomusanvu lunaabanga lunaku lwammwe lwa kuwummula; mulukuzanga ng'ekijjukizo nga mukola olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu ko n'okufuuwa eŋŋombe. 
Leviticus23:25 Temukolanga mulimu gwonna muzito, naye muweerezanga ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:26 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:27 “Olunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, Lunaku lwa Kuddaabiriza; mubeeranga n'olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; musiibanga era ne muweereza ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus23:28 Ku lunaku olwo lwennyini temukolanga mulimu gwonna, kubanga Lunaku lwa Kuddaabiriza, wanaabangawo okuddaabiriza ku lwammwe mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus23:29 Omuntu yenna atalisiiba ku lunaku olwo lwennyini anaakutulwanga ku bantu be. 
Leviticus23:30 N'oyo akolanga omulimu gwonna ku lunaku olwo lwennyini ndimuzikiriza mu bantu be. 
Leviticus23:31 Temukolerangako mulimu gwonna. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna yonna gye mulibeera. 
Leviticus23:32 Luno olunaku Sabbaato ya kuwummula gye muli, musiibanga. Okutandika n'akawungeezi k'olunaku olwomwenda olw'omwezi, okutuusa akawungeezi akaddirira, mukuzanga Sabbaato yammwe.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:34 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu embaga y'Omukama ey'Ensiisira lw'etandika; ya kumalanga ennaku musanvu. 
Leviticus23:35 Olunaku olusooka lwa lukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temulukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. 
Leviticus23:36 Okumala ennaku musanvu munaawerezanga ebitone ebiwongere Omukama n'omuliro. Ku lunaku olwomunaana mubeeranga n'olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa, era ne muweereza ebitone ebiwongere Omukama n'omuliro; lwe lukuŋŋaana olufundikira. Temukolanga mulimu gwonna muzito." 
Leviticus23:37 “ ‘Ezo ze mbaga enkulu ez'Omukama eziragiddwa lwe muyitanga olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa, era muweerezanga ebitone ebiwongere Omukama n'omuliro: ekitambiro ekyokye, ebitone eby'obuwunga, ebitambiro n'ebitone eby'okuyiwa okusinziira ku lunaku n'ekitone kyalwo." 
Leviticus23:38 Zino ennaku zongereza ku lwa Sabbaato y'Omukama, ne ku bitambiro byammwe, ne ku bweyamo bwammwe ne ku bitone ebyeyagalire bye muweereza." 
Leviticus23:39 “ ‘Awo nno ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu nga mumaze okukungula ebibala byonna mu nsi, mumalanga ennaku musanvu nga mukuza embaga y'Omukama enkulu. Olunaku olusooka lwa kuwummula, n'olwomunaana lwa kuwummula." 
Leviticus23:40 Ku lunaku olusooka, mukwatanga ebibala by'omuti ebisinga obulungi, n'amatabi g'enkindu, n'amatabi agaggumizza ebikoola, n'ag'oku nzibaziba ne musanyukira mu maaso ga Katonda wammwe okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus23:41 Buli mwaka embaga eno mugikuzanga ku lw'Omukama okumala ennaku musanvu. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna. Embaga mugikuzanga mu mwezi ogwomusanvu. 
Leviticus23:42 Musulanga mu nsiisira okumala ennaku musanvu. Buli yenna omuzaaliranwa mu Yisirayeli asulanga mu nsiisira," 
Leviticus23:43 bazzukulu bammwe balyoke bamanye nti Abayisirayeli nabasuza mu nsiisira bwe nali mbaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’ ” 
Leviticus23:44 Musa n'alangirira eri Abayisirayeli embaga z'Omukama eziragiddwa. 
Leviticus24:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus24:2 “Lagira Abayisirayeli bakuleetere omuzigo omukamule ogw'oliva omwereere ku lw'ettawaaza, ebeere ng'eyaka obutasalako." 
Leviticus24:3 Ebweru w'olutimbe lw'Endagaano mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano Aroni anaalabiriranga ettawaaza okuva akawungeezi okutuusa ku makya mu maaso g'Omukama obutasalako. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna. 
Leviticus24:4 Ettawaaza mu maaso g'Omukama eri ku kikondo ekya zaabu omuyooyoote ya kulabirirwanga obutasalako. 
Leviticus24:5 “Oddiranga obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi n'ofumbamu bukkeeki kkumi na bubiri, buli kkeeki ng'etwala ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa." 
Leviticus24:6 Ogiteekanga ku mmeeza eya zaabu eri mu maaso g'Omukama mu nnyiriri bbiri, eruuyi mukaaga n'eruuyi mukaaga." 
Leviticus24:7 Ku buli lunyiriri ossangako obubaani obuse obulungi, nga bugenda n'emigaati, ng'ekitundu kyakyo eky'ekijjukizo, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Leviticus24:8 Buli lwa Sabbaato emigaati ginassibwanga mu maaso g'Omukama ku lw'Abayisirayeli ng'endagaano ey'olubeerera. 
Leviticus24:9 Giribanga gya Aroni ne batabani be; bagiriiranga mu kifo ekitukuvu kubanga gwe mugabo gwabwe omutukuvu ennyo ogw'olubeerera oguvudde ku bitone ebiwongere Omukama n'omuliro.” 
Leviticus24:10 Olwatuuka omusajja omu mutabani w'omukazi Omuyisirayeli n'omusajja Omumisiri n'agenda mu lusiisira lw'Abayisirayeli; oluyombo ne lubalukawo wakati we n'omusajja Omuyisirayeli. 
Leviticus24:11 Mutabani w'omukazi Omuyisirayeli n'avuma erinnya ly'Omukama, n'alivumirira. Ne bamuleeta ewa Musa; erinnya lya nnyina nga ye Selomiti, muwala wa Diburi, ow'ekika kya Daani." 
Leviticus24:12 Ne bamussa mu kkomera, okutuusa lwe banaamanya Omukama ky'ayagala kikolebwe." 
Leviticus24:13 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus24:14 “Oyo eyavumye Katonda mumufulumye ebweru w'olusiisira, bonna abaamuwulira basse emikono ku mutwe gwe, ekibiina kyonna kimukube amayinja." 
Leviticus24:15 Ogambe Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Omuntu alivumirira Katonda we, anaabanga n'omusango." 
Leviticus24:16 Anaavumanga erinnya ly'Omukama wa kuttibwanga, ekibiina kyonna kimussisanga mayinja; ne bw'abanga mugwira oba muzaaliranwa. Anaabanga avumye erinnya ly'Omukama wa kuttibwanga buttibwa." 
Leviticus24:17 “ ‘Attanga omuntu naye wa kuttibwanga. 
Leviticus24:18 “ ‘Oli bw'attanga ensolo ya munne, azzangawo endala; anti obulamu olw'obulamu." 
Leviticus24:19 “ ‘Oli bw'assanga ku munne obuvune, nga bw'aliba akoze naye bw'akolebwanga:" 
Leviticus24:20 Okumenya olw'okumenya, eriiso olw'eriiso, erinnyo olw'erinnyo; oli nga bw'alumizza munne, naye bwe bamulumyanga." 
Leviticus24:21 Oli bw'attanga ensolo, azzangawo endala, kyokka attanga omuntu, ye wa kuttibwanga." 
Leviticus24:22 Mubeeranga n'etteeka lye limu ku muzaaliranwa ne ku mugwira. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’ ” 
Leviticus24:23 Musa n'ayogera eri Abayisirayeli; eyali avumye Katonda ne bamufulumya mu lusiisira, ne bamukuba amayinja. Abayisirayeli ne bakola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Omukama yagamba Musa ku lusozi Sinayi nti: 
Leviticus25:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Bwe muyingiranga ensi gye ndibawa, ettaka liwummulanga ssabbatto ku lw'Omukama." 
Leviticus25:3 “ ‘Onoosiganga mu nnimiro yo okumala emyaka mukaaga; emyaka mukaaga onoosaliranga emizabbibu gyo n'onoga ebibala byakwo. 
Leviticus25:4 Naye omwaka ogwomusanvu Sabbaato, ettaka lya kuwummula; Sabbaato ey'okuwummula ku lw'Omukama. Tosiganga nnimiro yo, n'emizabbibu gyo togisaliranga." 
Leviticus25:5 Ebimererezi tobikungulanga, n'ebirimba eby'omu nnimiro yo ey'emizabbibu gy'otoosalira tobinoganga, kubanga mu ogwo omwaka ettaka lirina okuba n'omwaka ogw'okuwummula." 
Leviticus25:6 Ettaka bye libazanga mu mwaka ogwa Sabbaato kwe mulyanga, ggwe, omuddu wo n'omuzaana wo, omupakasi, abasenze bo, n'abalala bonna abasula ewuwo," 
Leviticus25:7 ssaako ensolo zo ez'awaka n'ensolo ez'ettale eziri mu nsi yo. Byonna ettaka bye liribaza bye biririibwanga. 
Leviticus25:8 “ ‘Obalanga sabbaato musanvu ez'emyaka, kwe kugamba, emyaka musanvu emirundi musanvu; gino gye myaka amakumi ana mu mwenda." 
Leviticus25:9 Mu mwezi ogwomusanvu, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, ku Lunaku olw'Okuddaabiriza mufuuwanga eŋŋombe wonna mu nsi." 
Leviticus25:10 Mutukuzanga omwaka ogw'amakumi ataano; mulangiriranga okuteebwa eri buli mutuuze waayo, guliba Mwaka gwa Kijaguzo gye muli. Muddanga buli omu ku butaka, era buli omu addangayo mu b'ekika kye." 
Leviticus25:11 Omwaka ogw'amakumi ataano gunaabanga Mwaka gwa Kijaguzo ku mmwe; temusiganga, wadde okukungula ebimererezi, n'emizabbibu egitaasalirwa temuginogangako," 
Leviticus25:12 kubanga kino kijaguzo kyammwe, mwaka gwammwe mutukuvu. Mulye ebyo byokka ennimiro bye zibaza." 
Leviticus25:13 “ ‘Mu mwaka ogwo ogw'Ekijaguzo buli omu mu mmwe addangayo ku butaka bwe. 
Leviticus25:14 Bw'oguzanga munno ettaka, oba n'olimugulako, temuseeragananga." 
Leviticus25:15 Ogulanga ku munno ettaka okusinziira ku bbanga eryakayitawo okuva ku Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo, ate naye anaakuguzanga okusinziira ku myaka egy'okukungula egibulayo." 
Leviticus25:16 Emyaka egisigaddeyo bwe giba emingi n'omuwendo guliba waggulu, bwe giriba emitono nagwo guliba wansi, kubanga ddala ky'akuguza gye mirundi gy'amakungula." 
Leviticus25:17 Temuseeragananga, naye otyanga Katonda wo. Nze Mukama Katonda wo." 
Leviticus25:18 “ ‘Mutuusenga amateeka gange, mukuumenga ennamula yange, lwe munaatuula entende mu nsi." 
Leviticus25:19 Olwo ettaka liribabaliza ebibala byalyo, ne mulya ne mukkuta, ne mutuula ntede mu nsi." 
Leviticus25:20 “ ‘Muyinza okubuuza nti: “Mu mwaka ogwomusanvu, bwe tuliba nga tetusiga na kukungula, tulirya ki?”" 
Leviticus25:21 Mu mwaka ogwomukaaga ndibawanga omukisa ettaka lyammwe ne lituusa amakungula ga myaka esatu.
