Leviticus25:22 Mulituuka okusiga mu mwaka ogwomunaana nga mukyalya ku bye mwabaza ebikadde, mulibirya okutuusa amakungula g'omu mwaka ogwomwenda bwe galituuka." 
Leviticus25:23 “ ‘Ettaka si lya kutunda kagenderere, kubanga lyange, nammwe muli bagwira, basenze busenze gye ndi." 
Leviticus25:24 Awo nno obutaka bwammwe, bwe mubutundanga mubeeranga n'engeri ey'okubununula." 
Leviticus25:25 Muganda wo bw'adoobanga n'atuuka okutunda ekitundu ky'obutaka bwe, ow'oluganda lwe ajjanga n'anunula muganda we ky'aliba atunze." 
Leviticus25:26 Bw'abanga tazudde akinunula, ye amala asobola okufuna ebimala okukinunula," 
Leviticus25:27 abaliriranga emyaka okuva lwe kyatundibwa okufuna omuwendo ogukigyamu; ezifikkangawo z'addizanga gwe yakiguza. Olwo anaayinzanga okudda mu butaka bwe. 
Leviticus25:28 Naye bw'alemererwanga okufuna engeri y'okumusasula, kye yatunda kinaasigalanga n'eyakigula okutuusa ku Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo. Eyakigula ateekwa okukiddizanga nnyinikyo mu Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo, olwo eyabanga nakyo mu kusooka ayinza okudda mu butaka bwe." 
Leviticus25:29 “ ‘Oli bw'atundanga ennyumba ye eri mu kibuga ekiriko bbugwe, anaayinzanga okuginunula mu bbanga ery'omwaka ogumu oluvannyuma lw'okugitunda. Mu bbanga eryo ayinza okuginunula." 
Leviticus25:30 Omwaka bwe guyitanga nga taginunudde, ennyumba eri mu kibuga ekiriko bbugwe eneefuukanga y'oyo eyagigula ne bazzukulu be ennaku zonna; si ya kununula newandibadde mu Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo." 
Leviticus25:31 Naye ennyumba mu bibuga okutali bbugwe abyetoolodde, za kuyisanga ng'ebyalo; ziriyinzanga okununulibwa, era mu Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo za kuzzibwangayo." 
Leviticus25:32 “ ‘Abaleevi bayinza okununula ennyumba zaabwe eziri mu bibuga byabwe eby'obutaka ebbanga lyonna. 
Leviticus25:33 Eby'Abaleevi byo biyinza okununulibwa, kwe kugamba, ennyumba ezaagulwa mu kibuga eky'obutaka, mu mwaka gw'Ekijaguzo biddiranga bannyinibyo, kubanga ennyumba z'omu bibuga by'Abaleevi butaka bwabwe mu Bayisirayeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Go amalundiro agali ku bibuga byabwe tegatundibwanga, buno butaka bwabwe obw'olubeerera." 
Leviticus25:35 “ ‘Muganda wo bw'adoobanga nga takyasobola kweyimirizaawo mu mmwe, muyambenga nga bwe wandiyambye omugwira oba omusenze, asobole okusigala mu mmwe." 
Leviticus25:36 Tomuwolanga na buliika, wabula tya Katonda wo, muganda wo asobole okusigala mu mmwe." 
Leviticus25:37 Ssente zo tozimuwolanga na buliika, wadde okumuguza emmere yo ng'onoonyaako amagoba." 
Leviticus25:38 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mbawe ensi y'e Kanaani, era mbeere Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus25:39 “ ‘Muganda wo bw'adoobanga n'atuuka n'okwetunda gy'oli, tomukozesanga ng'omuddu," 
Leviticus25:40 wabula ng'omupakasi oba omusenze. Akukoleranga okutuusa ku Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo. 
Leviticus25:41 Oluvannyuma alikuviira n'addayo, ye n'abaana be, mu baganda be ne ku butaka bwa bajjajjaabe." 
Leviticus25:42 Kubanga Abayisirayeli baddu bange, nze nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri; si ba kutundwanga nga baddu." 
Leviticus25:43 Tomufuzisanga bukambwe, wabula otyanga Katonda wo." 
Leviticus25:44 “ ‘Omuddu n'omuzaana obaggyanga mu mawanga agabeetoolodde: mu abo gye mugulanga omuddu n'omuzaana. 
Leviticus25:45 Muyinza era okubagula mu baana b'abasenze abali mu mmwe ne mu ŋŋanda zaabwe abazaaliddwa mu nsi yammwe ne bafuukira ddala bammwe ab'obwannannyini. 
Leviticus25:46 Muyinza n'okubalaamiranga abazzukulu bammwe ng'obusika bwabwe obw'obwannannyini, ne bafuuka baddu baabwe emirembe gyonna; naye bo baganda bammwe, Abayisirayeli, temubafuzisanga bukambwe." 
Leviticus25:47 “ ‘Omugwira oba omusenze asula mu mmwe bw'agaggawalanga, muganda wo adoobye amala yeetunda eri omugwira asula mu mmwe, oba ew'omulala ow'olulyo lwe," 
Leviticus25:48 ng'amaze okwetunda, ayinza okununulibwa. Omu mu b'oluganda lwe amununulanga." 
Leviticus25:49 Kitaawe omuto, kojjaawe, oba muganda we mu lulyo lwe ayinza okumununula, naye bw'aligaggawala, aliyinza okwenunula." 
Leviticus25:50 Babalagananga n'eyamugula okuva oli lwe yeetunda okutuusa ku mwaka gw'Ekijaguzo; ssente ez'okumununula zijja kugererwanga ku ezo ezisasulwa omupakasi mu bbanga ery'emyaka ono gy'amaze nga mugule. 
Leviticus25:51 Oba emyaka egikyabulayo okutuusa ku mwaka gw'Ekijaguzo mingi, asasulangayo ekitundu ekisinga obunene ekya ssente ezaamugula." 
Leviticus25:52 Oba mitono, abaliriranga n'asasula okununulibwa kwe okusinziira ku myaka gy'amukoledde." 
Leviticus25:53 Wa kubalibwa ng'omupakasi abadde asasulibwa buli mwaka. Olina okulaba ng'eyamugula tamufuzisanga bukambwe. 
Leviticus25:54 Bwe wabulangawo amununula mu buli ngeri yonna, era wa kuteebwanga, ye n'abaana be mu Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo." 
Leviticus25:55 Kubanga Abayisirayeli baddu bange; baddu bange be naggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’ ” 
Leviticus26:1 “ ‘Temwekoleranga bifaananyi bya balubaale ebyole, temusimbanga mpagi za mayinja, era mu nsi yammwe temussangamu bifaananyi bya balubaale bibajje mu mayinja kubisinza. Kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus26:2 Mutukuzanga Sabbaato zange, mussanga ekitiibwa mu kifo kyange ekitukuvu. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus26:3 “ ‘Bwe muligoberera amateeka gange ne mukwata ebiragiro byange, ne mubituusa," 
Leviticus26:4 ndibawanga enkuba mu budde bwayo, ettaka liribabaliza ensigo yaalyo n'emiti giribawanga ebibala byagyo." 
Leviticus26:5 Okuwuula ebikunguddwa kulituusanga ku kunoga emizabbibu, n'okunoga kulituusanga ku kusiga; muliryanga omugaati gwammwe ne mukkuta, ensi yammwe muligituulamu ntende." 
Leviticus26:6 “ ‘Ndiwa eddembe ensi yammwe; mulikkalira bulungi nga tewali abakanga. Ebisolo ebikambwe ndibigoba mu nsi, n'ekitala tekiriyitako mu nsi yammwe." 
Leviticus26:7 Muliwondera abalabe bammwe, ne bafa ekitala kyammwe awo mu maaso gammwe." 
Leviticus26:8 Abataano mu mmwe baliwondera ekikumi, n'ekikumi baliwondera omutwalo, abalabe bammwe ne bafa ekitala kyammwe awo mu maaso gammwe." 
Leviticus26:9 “ ‘Nzija kubassaako eriiso, mbawe muzaale, mwale; ndinyweza endagaano yange nammwe." 
Leviticus26:10 Muliba mukyalya ku byakungulwa mu mwaka oguyise, ne muwalirizibwa okuggyamu ebikadde mukolere ebiggya ekifo." 
Leviticus26:11 “ ‘Ekisulo kyange nzija kukissa mu makkati gammwe, omutima gwange tegulibeetamwa." 
Leviticus26:12 Nditambulanga mu mmwe, ndibeera Katonda wammwe, nammwe mulibeera bantu bange." 
Leviticus26:13 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe eyabaggya mu Misiri mukome okuweereza Abamisiri obuddu; nze namenya emiti gy'ekikoligo kyammwe, ne mutambula nga mwegolodde." 
Leviticus26:14 “ ‘Naye bwe mutalimpulira, ne mutakola byonna bye mbalagira," 
Leviticus26:15 bwe muligaya ennamula yange, bwe mulikyawa amateeka gange, bwe mutalituusa mpisa zange, bwe mutyo ne mumenya endagaano yange," 
Leviticus26:16 nange bino bye ndibakola: “ ‘Ndibaleetera ebikangabwa, endwadde ezikenenya, emisujja egiziba amaaso n'egyo egikonvubya; mulisigiranga bwereere ensigo, kubanga abalabe bammwe be balibirya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndibeefuulira, abalabe bammwe ne babalinnyako; abo ababakyawa be balibafuga; mulidduka nga mpaawo n'abagoba." 
Leviticus26:18 “ ‘Singa n'oluvannyuma temulimpulira, ndibabonereza okusingawo emirundi musanvu olw'ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:19 Ndimenya okwekuza kw'obuyinza bwammwe. Eggulu ndirifuula ng'ekyuma waggulu wammwe n'ettaka ne liba ng'ekikomo wansi wammwe. 
Leviticus26:20 Okutegana kwammwe kulibeeranga kwa bwereere, kubanga ettaka teriimezenga nsigo, n'emiti tegiibalenga bibala." 
Leviticus26:21 “ ‘Bwe mulinneefuulira okunnwanyisa nga temwagala kumpulira, ebibonerezo byammwe ndibikubisaamu emirundi musanvu ebibi byammwe nga bwe bigwanira." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndibasindikira ebisolo eby'oku nsiko; biribamalako abaana, ne bizikiriza amagana gammwe, nammwe biribakendeeza n'enguudo zammwe zirisigala nkalu." 
Leviticus26:23 “ ‘N'ekyo bwe kitalimala kubazza gye ndi, ne mwongera okunnwanyisa," 
Leviticus26:24 nange mwene ndibalwanyisa, ndibabonereza emirundi musanvu olw'ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:25 Ndibasindikira ekitala kiwoolere eggwanga olw'okumenya endagaano yange. Bwe muliddukira mu bibuga byammwe ndibayiwamu kawumpuli ne mbawaayo mu mikono gy'omulabe. 
Leviticus26:26 Ndisala ku kibasakirira emmere, olwo abakazi kkumi balifumbanga omugaati gwammwe mu kabiga kamu, buli omu ne bamugabira mu kipimo kye, muliryanga naye temulikkuta." 
Leviticus26:27 “ ‘Ne mu ebyo byonna bwe mutalimpulira, ne mwongera okunnwanyisa," 
Leviticus26:28 nange mu busungu bwange ndibalwanyisa, nze mwene ndibabonereza emirundi musanvu olw'ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:29 Mulirya ennyama ya batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe. 
Leviticus26:30 Ebiggwa byammwe ebigulumivu ndibizikiriza, n'emyaliiro kwe mwokera obubaani ndigimenyaamenya, emirambo gyammwe ndigituuma ku mirambo gy'ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale; omutima gwange gulibeetamwa." 
Leviticus26:31 Ebibuga byammwe ndibifuula matongo, ebifo byammwe ebitukuvu birifuuka bifulukwa, siriwunyiriza na kawoowo ka bitambiro byammwe akasanyusa." 
Leviticus26:32 Ensi yammwe nzija kugireka matongo n'abalabe bammwe abaagisengamu eribeewuniikiriza. 
Leviticus26:33 Mmwe nzija kubasaasaanya mu mawanga; ndisowola ekitala kyange ne mbagoba. Ensi yammwe erifuuka ddungu, n'ebibuga byammwe matongo." 
Leviticus26:34 Ensi eryeyagalira mu sabbaato zaayo ennaku z'erimala nga ddungu nga mmwe muli mu nsi y'abalabe bammwe; eriba mu kuwummula ng'esanyukira mu sabbaato zaayo. 
Leviticus26:35 Mu bbanga eryo w'eribeerera eddungu, eriba mu kuwummula, kw'etaafuna ku sabbaato zammwe bwe mwali mukyagirimu." 
Leviticus26:36 Ku mmwe abaliba basigaddewo, ndireetera emitima gyabwe okutekemuka mu nsi z'abalabe baabwe gye baliba, n'akakoola obukoola empewo k'efuuye kalibakanga ne badduka ng'abadduka ekitala; balidduka bwe bagwa newandibadde nga tewali abagoba." 
Leviticus26:37 Omu alyesittala ku munne, ne bagwaŋŋanako kyenkana ng'abadduka ekitala, sso nga mpaawo abagoba. Temulifuna gayimirira mu maaso g'abalabe bammwe;" 
Leviticus26:38 mulizikiririra mu mawanga, ensi y'abalabe bammwe eribabwebwena." 
Leviticus26:39 Era bwe walibaawo abakyasigaddewo, eyo gye bali mu nsi z'abalabe baabwe gye balikonvubira olw'ebibi byabwe, n'olw'ebibi bya bajjajjaabwe balikonvuba." 
Leviticus26:40 “ ‘Bwe balyatula ebibi byabwe n'ebya bajjajjaabwe, enkwe zaabwe n'okunnwanyisa," 
Leviticus26:41 nange ebyandeetera okubalwanyisa ne mbawaŋŋangusiza mu nsi y'abalabe baabwe, kale nno ng'omutima gwabwe ogutali mutayirire gwetoowazizza, ne basasula olw'ekibi kyabwe," 
Leviticus26:42 olwo ndijjukira endagaano yange gye nakola ne Yakobo, n'endagaano yange ne Yizaake, n'endagaano yange ne Yiburayimu, n'ensi ndigijjukira." 
Leviticus26:43 Ensi baligireka awo ttayo, kyokka erisanyukira mu sabbaato zaayo ebbanga ly'eribeerera awo nga tebaliimu. Bo balisasula olw'ebibi byabwe, kubanga ddala baasambajja ennamula yange n'amateeka gange ne bagakyawa." 
Leviticus26:44 “ ‘Newandibadde ebyo biri bityo, nga bali mu nsi y'abalabe baabwe, sigenda kubasuulira ddala na kubeetamwa kutuusa ku kubamalirawo ddala, ate ne mmenya bwe ntyo endagaano yange nabo. Nze Mukama Katonda waabwe." 
Leviticus26:45 Ndijjukira ku lwabwe endagaano yange gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe lwe nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri ng'amawanga galaba, ndyoke mbeere Katonda waabwe. Nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Leviticus26:46 Bino ge mateeka, ennamula n'ebiragiro Omukama bye yassaawo wakati we n'Abayisirayeli ku lusozi Sinayi ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Leviticus27:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus27:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Singa oli yeeyamanga okusinga abantu eri Omukama, olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo bwe n'ayagala okuwaayo omuwendo nga bw'ogubaliridde," 
Leviticus27:3 bw'abanga musajja wakati w'emyaka abiri n'enkaaga, mubalire ku sekeli eza ffeeza amakumi ataano ng'ogerera ku sekeli ekozesebwa mu Kitukuvu;" 
Leviticus27:4 bw'abanga omukazi, omubaliranga ku sekeli amakumi asatu;" 
Leviticus27:5 bw'abanga wakati w'emyaka etaano n'amakumi abiri, omusajja omuwendo gwe ogubaliranga ku sekeli makumi abiri, omukazi ku kkumi;" 
Leviticus27:6 bw'abanga wakati w'omwezi ogumu n'emyaka etaano, omulenzi omuwendo gwe ogubaliranga ku sekeli ttaano eza ffeeza, omuwala ku sekeli ssatu eza ffeeza;" 
Leviticus27:7 bw'abanga ow'emyaka enkaaga n'okusingawo, omusajja omuwendo gwe ogubaliranga ku sekeli eza ffeeza kkumi na ttaano, ate omukazi ku sekeli kkumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Eyeeyama bw'abanga omwavu ng'omuwendo ogubaliriddwa taasobole kuguwa, gwe yasingawo amutwaliranga kabona, ye omuwendo gwe anaagumubaliranga ng'asinziira ku eyeeyama ky'asobola okuwa." 
Leviticus27:9 “ ‘Singa ensolo gye yeeyama okuwa eyinza okutambirirwa Omukama, ensolo ng'eyo esingiddwa Omukama eba ntukuvu," 
Leviticus27:10 tayinza kugiwaanyisamu ndala, oba nnungi kugiwaanyisamu mbi; oba mbi kugiwaanyisamu nnungi. Bw'ewaanyisibwanga, eyasooka n'ezze mu kifo kyayo, zombi ziba ntukuvu." 
Leviticus27:11 Singa ensolo gye yeeyamye si nnongoofu, eteyinza kutambirirwa Mukama, anaabanga agisuubizza agireetanga awali kabona" 
Leviticus27:12 ye n'asalawo oba nnungi oba mbi; omuwendo gw'aligibalira nga gwe gwo. 
Leviticus27:13 Agireese bw'ayagalanga okuginunula, ku muwendo ogubadde gugibaliriddwamu ayongerangako ekyokutaano kyagwo." 
Leviticus27:14 “ ‘Omuntu bwe yeeyamanga okusingira ennyumba ye Omukama, kabona agipimanga n'alaba oba nnungi oba mbi: omuwendo gw'aligibalira, nga gwe gwo." 
Leviticus27:15 Oli eyeeyama ennyumba ye, bw'aba ayagadde okuginunula, ku muwendo ogubadde gubaliriddwa ayongerangako ekyokutaano kyagwo, olwo ennyumba eriddamu n'eba yiye." 
Leviticus27:16 “ ‘Oba ettaka ly'oku butaka bwe lye yeeyama okuwa Omukama, omuwendo gwalyo guligererwa ku bungi bw'ensigo ezisobola okusigibwamu; sekeli eza ffeeza amakumi ataano ku buli komeri emu ey'ensigo za sayiri." 
Leviticus27:17 “ ‘Oba yeeyama okuwa ennimiro ye mu Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo, omuwendo ogubaliriddwamu nga gwe gwo." 
Leviticus27:18 Oba we yeeyamira okuwa ennimiro ye ng'Omwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo guyise, kabona alimulamulira ssente ng'agerera ku bungi bw'emyaka egisigadde okutuusa ku Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo oguddako; omuwendo gwayo gulikendeerako." 
Leviticus27:19 “ ‘Oli eyeeyama okuwa ennimiro bw'ayagalanga okuginunula, ku ssente ezigibaliriddwamu ayongerangako ekyokutaano kyazo, olwo erimuddira n'eba yiye." 
Leviticus27:20 Bw'abanga taginunudde, oba nga yagitunza omulala, eneebanga tekyazzeeyo kununulibwa." 
Leviticus27:21 Ennimiro bw'eteebwanga mu Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo, eneebanga ntukuvu, ya Mukama, ng'ennimiro eyawongerwa Omukama; erifuuka nnimiro ya bakabona, butaka bwe." 
Leviticus27:22 “ ‘Singa oli yeeyama okuwa ennimiro naye nga yagula ngule, eteri ku butaka bwe," 
Leviticus27:23 kabona alibalirira omuwendo gwayo ng'asinziira ku bungi bw'emyaka egisigadde okutuusa ku Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo; oli eyeeyama omuwendo aguwanga ku olwo lwennyini ng'ekitukuvu ky'Omukama. 
Leviticus27:24 Mu Mwaka ogw'Ekijaguzo ennimiro eddiranga gwe yagigulako eyali nnyini butaka. 
Leviticus27:25 Buli muwendo gwa kubalirira nga gugererwa ku sekeli ekozesebwa mu Kitukuvu, eyenkana gera amakumi abiri ku buli sekeli." 
Leviticus27:26 “ ‘Ebiggulanda eby'ebisolo biba bya Mukama, tewali yeeyamanga kubisingira Mukama; ne bw'eba nte oba ndiga, ya Mukama." 
Leviticus27:27 Oba oli yeeyama kuwa nsolo, kyokka nga si nnongoofu, ayinza okuginunula ku muwendo nga bw'ogubaliridde, naye ng'ayongeddeko ekyokutaano eky'omuwendo gwayo. Bw'abanga tayagadde kuginunula, etundibwanga ku muwendo oguliba gugibaliriddwamu." 
Leviticus27:28 “ ‘Ekintu kyonna omuntu ky'amaze okuwongera Omukama ng'akiggya mu bibye, kibeere muntu, kisolo, oba ttaka, tekiitundibwenga era tekiinunulibwenga; ekintu ekiwongeddwa Omukama mu ngeri eyo kiba kitukuvu nnyo, kya Mukama." 
Leviticus27:29 Na buli muntu asaliddwa okuzikirizibwa taanunulibwenga, wabula wa kuttibwanga." 
Leviticus27:30 “ ‘Ekitundu kyonna ekyekkumi mu nsi, kibeere ky'ebyo ettaka bye libaza, oba eky'ebibala eby'emiti, kya Mukama, kintu kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus27:31 Oli bw'ayagalanga okununula ebyekkumi bye, ku muwendo gwabyo ayongerangamu ekyokutaano." 
Leviticus27:32 “ ‘Ebyekkumi byonna eby'eggana oba ekisibo, kwe kugamba buli nsolo ey'ekkumi eyita wansi w'omuggo gw'omusumba, biriba bitukuvu, bya Mukama." 
Leviticus27:33 Temwetaaga kulondamu nnungi oba mbi, wadde okuziwaanyisaamu. Bwe ziwaanyisibwamu, zombi ebaddewo n'ezze mu kifo kyayo zinaabanga ntukuvu, si za kununulibwangayo.’ ”" 
Leviticus27:34 Bino bye biragiro Omukama bye yalagira Musa mu lusozi Sinayi abigambe Abayisirayeli. 
Numbers1:1 Omukama yayogera ne Musa mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwokubiri, mu mwaka ogwokubiri bukya Bayisirayeli bava mu Misiri, n'amugamba nti:" 
Numbers1:2 “Mubale ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli mu masiga gaabwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, nga muwandiika amanya ga buli musajja kinnoomu." 
Numbers1:3 Ggwe ne Aroni mujja kubala nga mugoba ebibinja byabwe abo bonna mu Yisirayeli abasobola okutabaala, nga muva ku w'emyaka abiri n'okusingawo." 
Numbers1:4 Mu buli kika omukulu w'ennyumba ya bajjajjaabwe y'alikuyambako. 
Numbers1:5 “Gano ge mannya g'abanaabayambako: mu Rubeni, Elizuri mutabani wa Sedewuri;" 
Numbers1:6 mu Simewoni, Selumyeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi;" 
Numbers1:7 mu Yuda, Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadabu;" 
Numbers1:8 mu Yissakari, Netaneli, mutabani wa Zuwari;" 
Numbers1:9 mu Zebuluni, Eliyabu mutabani wa Keloni;" 
Numbers1:10 mu batabani ba Yozefu: mu Efurayimu, Elisama mutabani wa Ammiwudi; mu Manasse, Gamalyeli mutabani wa Pedaasuri;" 
Numbers1:11 mu Benyamiini, Abidani mutabani wa Gidewoni;" 
Numbers1:12 mu Daani, Akiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi;" 
Numbers1:13 mu Aseeri, Pagyeli mutabani wa Okurani;" 
Numbers1:14 mu Gaadi, Eliyasafu mutabani wa Deweli;" 
Numbers1:15 mu Nafutali, Akira mutabani wa Enani.”" 
Numbers1:16 Abo be bantu abakulu abaalondebwa okuva mu kibiina, abakulu b'ebika bya bajjajjaabwe, emitwe gy'enkumi za Yisirayeli." 
Numbers1:17 Musa ne Aroni ne batwala abasajja bano, amannya gaabwe agaali galondeddwa," 
Numbers1:18 ne bakuŋŋaanya abantu bonna ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogwokubiri. Abantu ne bawandiisa endyo zaabwe mu masiga gaabwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ate bo abasajja okuva ku w'emyaka abiri n'okusingawo amannya gaabwe ne gawadiikibwa buli omu kinnoomu" 
Numbers1:19 ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. Musa n'ababala bw'atyo mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi. 
Numbers1:20 Mu bazzukulu ba Rubeni omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe buli omu kinnoomu mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:21 Omuwendo gwabwe mu kika kya Rubeni gwali emitwalo ena mu kakaaga mu ebikumi bitaano. 
Numbers1:22 Mu bazzukulu ba Simewoni: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baabalibwa okusinziira ku muwendo gw'amannya gaabwe buli omu kinnoomu mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:23 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Simewoni baawera emitwalo etaano mu kenda mu ebikumi bisatu. 
Numbers1:24 Mu bazzukulu ba Gaadi: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:25 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Gaadi baawera emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga mu ataano. 
Numbers1:26 Mu bazzukulu ba Yuda: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:27 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Yuda baawera emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi nnya mu lukaaga. 
Numbers1:28 Mu bazzukulu ba Yissakari: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:29 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Yissakari baawera emitwalo etaano mu enkumi nnya mu bina. 
Numbers1:30 Mu bazzukulu ba Zebuluni: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:31 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Zebuluni baawera emitwalo etaano mu kasanvu mu ebikumi bina. 
Numbers1:32 Mu bazzukulu ba Yozefu: okuva mu bazzukulu ba Efurayimu: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:33 Abaabalibwa kika kya Efurayimu baawera emitwalo ena mu ebikumi bitaano. 
Numbers1:34 Mu bazzukulu ba Manasse: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:35 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Manasse baawera emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri. 
Numbers1:36 Mu bazzukulu ba Benyamiini: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:37 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya ba Benyamiini baawera emitwalo esatu mu enkumi ttaano mu bina. 
Numbers1:38 Mu bazzukulu ba Daani: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:39 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Daani baawera emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu. 
Numbers1:40 Mu bazzukulu ba Aseeri: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:41 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Aseeri baawera emitwalo ena mu lukumi mu bitaano. 
Numbers1:42 Mu bazzukulu ba Nafutali: Abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, abasobola okutabaala, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe mu masiga gaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:43 Abaabalibwa mu kika kya Nafutali baawera emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bina. 
Numbers1:44 Abo be baabalibwa, Musa ne Aroni be baabala, nga bayambibwako abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli ekkumi n'ababiri, buli omu ku lw'ennyumba ya bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers1:45 Abasajja bonna Abayisirayeli abaali basobola okugenda okutabaala abawezezza emyaka abiri n'okusingawo baabalibwa mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe. 
Numbers1:46 Bonna abaabalibwa baawera obusiriivu mukaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bitaano mu ataano. 
Numbers1:47 Abaleevi mu masiga ga bajjajjaabwe tebaabalibwa wamu na bali. 
Numbers1:48 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers1:49 “Ekika kya Leevi leka kukibala, era omuwendo gwabwe togugatta ku gwa Bayisirayeli," 
Numbers1:50 wabula bo basse ku kulabirira Ekisulo eky'Endagaano, byonna ebyamu na buli kyonna ekidda ku Kisulo. Bo bennyini be banaasitulanga Ekisulo na byonna ebyamu; be banaakirabiriranga, era bajja kusimbanga weema zaabwe okwetooloola Ekisulo." 
Numbers1:51 Ekisulo bwe kinaatuukanga okusitula, Abaleevi be banaakimenyanga; ate bwe kinaatuukanga okusimba, be banaakisimbanga. Omuntu owa bulijjo anaakisembereranga wa kuttibwanga." 
Numbers1:52 Abayisirayeli banaasiisiranga buli omu mu kibinja kye, ku bendera ye." 
Numbers1:53 Bo Abaleevi weema ba kuzisimba okwetooloola Ekisulo eky'Endagaano, obusungu buleme kugwira Bayisirayeli. Bo Abaleevi ba kulabiriranga Kisulo eky'Endagaano.”" 
Numbers1:54 Abayisirayeli ne bakola byonna ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Numbers2:1 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Numbers2:2 “Abayisirayeli banaasiisiranga nga beetoolodde Weema ey'Ensisinkano, kyokka nga bagyesuddeko akabanga, buli omu ku bendera ye n'akabonero k'ennyumba ya bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers2:3 “Abalisiisira ebuvanjuba: esookera ddala eri ebuvanjuba ebibinja bya Yuda gye bijja okusiisira ku bendera yaabwe. Omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Yuda ye Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadabu. 
Numbers2:4 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi nnya mu lukaaga. 
Numbers2:5 Ekika kya Yissakari kye kirisiisira okumuddirira; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Yissakari ye Netaneli mutabani wa Zuwari. 
Numbers2:6 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo etaano mu enkumi nnya mu bina. 
Numbers2:7 Ekika kya Zebuluni ne kiddako; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Zebuluni ye Eliyabu mutabani wa Keloni. 
Numbers2:8 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo etaano mu kasanvu mu bina. 
Numbers2:9 Abaabalibwa ab'olusiisira lwa Yuda mu bibinja byabwe bawera abantu akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo munaana mu kakaaga mu bina. Mu kutambula be banaakulemberangamu. 
Numbers2:10 “Mu maserengeta y'eriba olusiisira lw'ebibinja bya Rubeni ku bendera yaabwe. Omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Rubeni ye Elizuri mutabani wa Sedewuri. 
Numbers2:11 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo ena mu kakaaga mu bitaano. 
Numbers2:12 Ekika kya Simewoni kye kirisiisira okumuddirira; omukulu w'ab'ekika kya Simewoni ye Selumyeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi. 
Numbers2:13 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo etaano mu kenda mu bisatu. 
Numbers2:14 Ekika kya Gaadi ne kiddako; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Gaadi ye Eliyasafu mutabani wa Deweli. 
Numbers2:15 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga mu ataano. 
Numbers2:16 Abaabalibwa ab'olusiisira lwa Rubeni mu bibinja byabwe bawera abantu akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo etaano mu lukumi mu bina mu ataano. Mu kutambula be banaddangako mu kifo kya kubiri. 
Numbers2:17 “Awo Weema ey'Ensisinkano y'eneddangako mu kutambula era wamu n'olusiisira lw'Abaleevi eri mu makkati g'olusiisira. Nga bwe baddiriŋŋanye mu kusiisira era bwe banaddiriŋŋananga mu kutambula buli muntu mu kifo kye ku bendera ye. 
Numbers2:18 “Ebugwanjuba y'eriba olusiisira lw'ebibinja bya Efurayimu ku bendera ye; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Efurayimu ye Elisama mutabani wa Ammiwudi. 
Numbers2:19 Bonna awamu abali mu kibinja kye bawera emitwalo ena mu bitaano. 
Numbers2:20 Ekika kya Manasse kye kirisiisira okumuddirira; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Manasse ye Gamalyeli mutabani wa Pedaasuri. 
Numbers2:21 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri. 
Numbers2:22 Ekika kya Benyamiini ne kiddako; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Benyamiini ye Abidani mutabani wa Gidewoni. 
Numbers2:23 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo esatu mu enkumi ttaano mu bina. 
Numbers2:24 Abaabalibwa ab'olusiisira lwa Efurayimu mu bibinja byabwe bawera abantu akasiriivu kamu mu kanaana mu kikumi. Mu kutambula baliba mu kifo kya kusatu. 
Numbers2:25 “Emambuka y'eriba olusiisira lw'ebibinja bya Daani ku bendera ye. Omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Daani ye Akiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi. 
Numbers2:26 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu. 
Numbers2:27 Ekika kya Aseeri kye kirisiisira okumuddirira; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Aseeri ye Pagyeli mutabani wa Okurani. 
Numbers2:28 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo ena mu lukumi mu bitaano. 
Numbers2:29 Ekika kya Nafutali ne kiddako; omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Nafutali ye Akira mutabani wa Enani. 
Numbers2:30 Abaabalibwa abakola ekibinja kye bawera emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu bina. 
Numbers2:31 Abaabalibwa ab'olusiisira lwa Daani mu bibinja byabwe bawera abantu akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo etaano mu kasanvu mu lukaaga. Mu kutambula bano be baasembangayo okusitula; bonna ku bendera zaabwe.” 
Numbers2:32 Abo be Bayisirayeli abaabalibwa mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Abaabalibwa abaali mu lusiisira, mu bibinja byabwe, baawera obusiriivu mukaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu bitaano mu ataano." 
Numbers2:33 Abaleevi bo tebaabalibwa na Bayisirayeli balala, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Numbers2:34 Abayisirayeli ne bakola byonna ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa; ne basiisira buli omu ku bendera ye, era ne batambuliranga buli omu mu ssiga lye ne mu nnyumba ya bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers3:1 Gano ge mazadde ga Musa ne Aroni ku lunaku Omukama lwe yayogera ne Musa ku lusozi Sinayi: 
Numbers3:2 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Aroni: Omuggulanda ye Nadabu, ne kuddako Abiwu, Eleyazari ne Yitamari." 
Numbers3:3 Ago ge mannya ga batabani ba Aroni, bakabona abaasiigibwa omuzigo, emikono gyabwe ne gijjuzibwa baweereze nga bakabona." 
Numbers3:4 Bo Nadabu ne Abiwu baafa lwe baali baweereza ekitambiro mu maaso g'Omukama eky'omuliro ekitakkirizibwa eri mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi. Tebaaleka baana, bwe batyo Eleyazari ne Yitamari be bokka abaaweereza nga bakabona mu biseera bya Aroni kitaabwe." 
Numbers3:5 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers3:6 “Kunga ekika kya Leevi obaleete ewa Aroni kabona bamuweereze. 
Numbers3:7 Ba kukolanga emirimu ye n'ekibiina gye babatuma okukola mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano nga baweereza Ekisulo. 
Numbers3:8 Ba kukuuma eby'omu Weema ey'Ensisinkano nga bakola emirimu gy'Abayisirayeli nga baweereza Ekisulo. 
Numbers3:9 Abaleevi bakwase Aroni ne batabani be; be Bayisirayeli abamutoneddwa. 
Numbers3:10 Londa Aroni ne batabani be baweereze nga bakabona; omuntu owa bulijjo asemberangawo wa kuttibwanga.” 
Numbers3:11 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers3:12 “Laba, Abaleevi mbaggye mu Bayisirayeli ne mbazza mu kifo kya buli muggulanda w'olubuto mu Yisirayeli. Awo nno Abaleevi mbetwalidde, bange." 
Numbers3:13 Anti buli ekiggulanda kyange; okuva luli lwe natta abaggulanda bonna mu nsi y'e Misiri, buli kyonna ekisooka okuzaalibwa, ka abeere muntu oba kisolo, nabyeyawulira, byange. Nze Mukama.”" 
Numbers3:14 Omukama yagamba Musa mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi nti: 
Numbers3:15 “Bala abazzukulu ba Leevi mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe ne mu masiga gaabwe, buli musajja okuva ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo.”" 
Numbers3:16 Musa n'ababala ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde mu kigambo kye. 
Numbers3:17 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Leevi: Gerusoni ne Kewati ne Merari. 
Numbers3:18 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Gerusoni mu masiga gaabwe: Libuni ne Simeyi; 
Numbers3:19 ate batabani ba Kewati mu masiga gaabwe: Amuramu, Yizuwari, Keburoni Wuzziyeli;" 
Numbers3:20 batabani ba Merari mu masiga gaabwe: Makuli ne Musi. Ago ge masiga g'Abaleevi mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe. 
Numbers3:21 Mu Gerusoni mwavaamu ennyiriri olw'Abalibuni n'olw'Abasimeyi; ezo ze nnyiriri z'Abagerusoni. 
Numbers3:22 Omuwendo gw'abasajja bonna abaabalibwa, okuva ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo, gwali kasanvu mu bitaano." 
Numbers3:23 Ab'ennyiriri za Gerusoni baasiisiranga mmanju wa Kisulo ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba. 
Numbers3:24 Omukulu w'ennyumba z'Abagerusoni eza bajjajjabwe yali Eliyasafu mutabani wa Layeli. 
Numbers3:25 Omulimu gw'ab'ennyiriri z'Abagerusoni mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano gwali gwa kulabiriranga Kisulo, Weema, ekigibikkako, entimbe eziggala omulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano," 
Numbers3:26 entimbe eza bbugwe w'oluggya, entimbe z'oku mulyango gw'oluggya olwetooloola Ekisulo n'omwaliiro, n'emiguwa gyayo ku lw'emirimu gyayo gyonna." 
Numbers3:27 Mu Kewati mwavaamu ennyiriri olw'Abaamuramu, olw'Abayizuwari, olw'Abakeburoni n'olw'Abawuzziyeli; ezo ze nnyiriri z'Abakewati." 
Numbers3:28 Omuwendo gw'abasajja abaabalibwa, okuva ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo, gwali kanaana mu lukaaga. Omulimu gw'ab'ennyiriri z'Abakewati gwali gwa kulabiriranga Kifo Kitukuvu." 
Numbers3:29 Ab'ennyiriri za Kewati baasiisiranga ku ludda lw'Ekisulo olutunudde emaserengeta. 
Numbers3:30 Eyali omukulu w'ab'ennyiriri mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe mu ssiga ly'Abakewati nga ye Elizafani mutabani wa Wuzziyeli. 
Numbers3:31 Baalabiriranga Sanduuku, emmeeza, ekikondo ky'ettawaaza, emyaliiro gyonna, n'eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu bye bakozesa mu kuweereza, olutimbe, na buli kigendera ku mirimu gyabyo." 
Numbers3:32 Omukulu w'Abaleevi ow'oku ntikko yali Eleyazari mutabani wa Aroni kabona, nga ye mukulu wa bonna abassiddwa ku kulabirira Ekifo Ekitukuvu." 
Numbers3:33 Mu Merari mwavaamu ennyiriri olw'Abamakuli n'olw'Abamusi. 
Numbers3:34 Omuwendo gw'abasajja bonna abaabalibwa, okuva ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo, gwali kakaaga mu ebikumi bibiri." 
Numbers3:35 Eyali omukulu w'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe mu ssiga lya Merari nga ye Zuryeli mutabani wa Abikayili. Ab'ennyiriri za Merari baasiisiranga ku ludda lw'Ekisulo olutunudde emambuka. 
Numbers3:36 Omulimu gw'abazzukulu ba Merari gwali gwa kulabirira mbaawo za Kisulo, emikiikiro, empagi n'entobo mwe zisimbibwa n'ebibikolako, era na buli kigendera ku mirimu gyabyo," 
Numbers3:37 n'empagi z'oluggya olwetooloola Ekisulo, entobo zaazo, enkondo zaazo, ko n'emiguwa gyazo." 
Numbers3:38 Musa, Aroni ne batabani baali ba kusiisiranga ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba olw'Ekisulo, mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano ebuvanjuba. Be baalina ogw'okulabirira Ekifo Ekitukuvu ku lw'Abayisirayeli. Omuntu owa bulijjo asemberangawo nga wa kuttibwa." 
Numbers3:39 Abaleevi bonna abaabalibwa Musa be yabala ng'Omukama bwe yalagira, abasajja okuva ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo, baawera emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri." 
Numbers3:40 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Bala abaggulanda bonna abasajja ab'Abayisirayeli, okuva ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo, okole olukalala lw'amannya gaabwe." 
Numbers3:41 Mu kifo kya buli muggulanda w'Abayisirayeli ndeeteraamu Abaleevi, nze Mukama. Era ndeetera n'ebisolo byabwe mu kifo ky'ebiggulanda mu bisolo by'Abayisirayeli.”" 
Numbers3:42 Musa n'abala abaggulanda bonna ab'Abayisirayeli, ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde." 
Numbers3:43 Abasajja bonna abaabalibwa okusinziira ku muwendo gw'amannya gaabwe, ng'ovudde ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo, baawera emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri mu nsanvu mu basatu." 
Numbers3:44 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers3:45 “Twala Abaleevi mu kifo ky'abaggulanda bonna ab'Abayisirayeli, n'ebisolo byabwe mu kifo ky'ebiggulanda mu magana gaabwe; Abaleevi banaabeeranga bange. Nze Mukama." 
Numbers3:46 Okununula abaggulanda b'Abayisirayeli ebikumi ebibiri mu ensanvu mu abasatu abasuusuubye ku Baleevi," 
Numbers3:47 ku buli omu solooza sekeli ttaano ng'obalira mu sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu ezitowa gera abiri buli emu. 
Numbers3:48 Ssente oziwanga Aroni ne batabani be okununula Abayisirayeli ab'ensuusuuba.” 
Numbers3:49 Musa n'akuŋŋaanya ssente ez'okununula bali abaali basuusuubye ku banunuddwa Abaleevi. 
Numbers3:50 Ssente ze yaggyamu ku baggulanda b'Abayisirayeli zaawera sekeli lukumi mu bisatu mu nkaaga mu ttaano ng'obalidde ku sekeli y'omu Kitukuvu. 
Numbers3:51 Musa ssente ez'okununula yaziwa Aroni ne batabani be, ng'ekigambo ky'Omukama bwe kyali kiragidde." 
Numbers4:1 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Numbers4:2 “Bala abazzukulu ba Leevi bonna aba Kewati, mu masiga gaabwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers4:3 abasajja bonna abali wakati w'emyaka amakumi asatu n'ataano, abasobola okutabaala, baweereze mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers4:4 “Guno gwe mulimu gw'aba Kewati mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano: okulabirira ebintu ebitukuvu ennyo. 
Numbers4:5 Olusiisira bwe lutuukanga okusitula, Aroni ne batabani be bayingiranga ne bawanula olutimbe olusiikiriza ne balubikka ku Sanduuku y'Endagaano." 
Numbers4:6 Bongeranga ne bassaako ekibikkako eky'eddiba ekkunye, kungulu kwonna ne babikkako olugoye olwa kakobe, olwo ne bayisaamu emisituliro." 
Numbers4:7 “N'emmeeza ey'Emigaati egy'Okwolesebwa bagibikkanga olugoye olwa kakobe, ne bateekako essowaani, ebijiiko, ebibya, n'ensumbi ezeyambisibwa mu bitone eby'okuyiwa; naye Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa gyo gisigalangako." 
Numbers4:8 Kungulu banjululizangako olugoye olutwakaavu, ate nalwo ne balubikkako n'ekibikkako eky'eddiba ekkunye, olwo ne bayisaamu emisituliro." 
Numbers4:9 “Baddiranga olugoye olwa kakobe ne balubikka ekikondo ky'ettawaaza, ettawaaza, magalo zaakwo, ebiteekebwamu evvu, n'ejjaagi omubeera omuzigo ogw'okussa mu ttawaaza;" 
Numbers4:10 byonna ebyo bagenda kubizinga mu kibikkako eky'eddiba ekkunye, olwo ne babissa ku kisituliro." 
Numbers4:11 “Omwaliiro ogwa zaabu bagwanjululizangako olugoye olwa kakobe, kungulu ne babikkako ekibikkako eky'eddiba ekkunye, ne bayisaamu emisituliro." 
Numbers4:12 Byonna ebyeyambisibwa mu kuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu babizinganga mu lugoye olwa kakobe, kungulu ne babikkako ekibikkako eky'eddiba ekkunye, olwo ne babissa ku kisituliro." 
Numbers4:13 “Omwaliiro bagwerangako evvu ly'amasavu, ne bagwanjululizaako olugoye olumyufu;" 
Numbers4:14 ne bassa kuli kyonna ekyeyambisibwa ku mwaliiro: ensaniya okubeera omuliro, entoozo, ebitiiyo, ebikopo, n'ebibya ebyeyambisibwa mu kumansira, ne byonna ebyeyambisibwa ku mwaliiro. Banjululizangako ekibikkako eky'eddiba ekkunye, olwo ne bayisaamu emisituliro." 
Numbers4:15 “Aroni ne batabani be bwe bamalanga okuzingako ekitukuvu na byonna ebigenderako olusiisira nga lusitula, olwo aba Kewati nga bayingira basitule. Kyokka sibakwatanga ku bitukuvu ebyo, sikulwa nga bafa. Egyo gye mirimu gy'aba Kewati mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers4:16 Eleyazari, mutabani wa Aroni kabona, y'anaakuumanga omuzigo ogwakira mu ttawaaza, obubaani obw'akawoowo, obuwunga obw'ekitambiro ekya buli lunaku, n'omuzigo ogusiiga. Era y'anaavunaanyizibwanga ku Kisulo, ebyamu byonna, ebintu ebitukuvu ebikozesebwamu, na ku buli kyonna ekidda ku Kisulo.”" 
Numbers4:17 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Numbers4:18 “Mulabenga nti ekika n'ennyiriri z'Abakewati tebikutulibwa ku Baleevi bannaabwe. 
Numbers4:19 Kino kye muba mukola, balame, baleme kufa nga babadde basemberedde ebintu ebitukuvu ennyo: Aroni ne batabani be bayingiranga ne bakwasa buli omu ky'anaakola ne ky'anaasitula." 
Numbers4:20 Naye bo tebayingiranga kulaba n'akatono ku bitukuvu, sikulwa nga bafa.”" 
Numbers4:21 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Numbers4:22 “Bala Abaleevi bonna abazzukulu ba Gerusoni, mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe ne mu masiga gaabwe;" 
Numbers4:23 bala abasajja bonna abali wakati w'emyaka amakumi asatu n'ataano, abasobola okutabaala, baweereze mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers4:24 “Guno gwe mulimu gw'Abagerusoni, eby'okukola n'eby'okusitulanga:" 
Numbers4:25 ba kusitulanga entimbe z'Ekisulo, Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ekigibikka, n'ekibikkako ekisooka kungulu eky'eddiba ekkunye, olutimbe olw'oku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano," 
Numbers4:26 entimbe eza bbugwe w'oluggya olwetooloola Ekisulo n'omwaliiro, olutimbe olw'omu muzigo gwa wankaaki wa bbugwe, emiguwa, na byonna ebikola n'ebyeyambisibwa ku mirimu gyabyo. Abagerusoni be balivunaanyizibwa ku ebyo byonna." 
Numbers4:27 Aroni ne batabani be be banaalagiriranga Abagerusoni buli omu ky'anaakolanga ne ky'anaasitulanga. Ggwe onobategeezanga bye banaakolanga ne bye banaasitulanga. 
Numbers4:28 Egyo gye mirimu gy'ab'essiga ly'Abagerusoni mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Anaabalagiriranga ye Yitamari mutabani wa Aroni kabona. 
Numbers4:29 “Bala Abaleevi bonna aba Merari mu masiga gaabwe ne nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe; 
Numbers4:30 bala n'abasajja bonna abali wakati w'emyaka amakumi asatu n'ataano, abasobola okutabaala, baweereze mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers4:31 “Gino gye mirimu gyabwe nga bwe banaakolanga mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano: ba kusitulanga embaawo z'Ekisulo, emikiikiro, empagi n'entobo zaazo," 
Numbers4:32 era n'empagi za bbugwe w'oluggya olwetooloola Ekisulo n'omwaliiro, entobo zaazo, enkondo za Weema n'emiguwa gyako, ebikozesebwamu byonna, na buli kigendera ku mulimu gwazo. Buli muntu musalire by'anaasitulanga." 
Numbers4:33 Ogwo gwe mulimu gw'ab'essiga lya Merari mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Anaabalabiriranga ye Yitamari mutabani wa Aroni kabona.” 
Numbers4:34 Musa ne Aroni n'abakulu b'ekibiina baabala aba Kewati mu nnyiriri zaabwe ne nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe 
Numbers4:35 abali wakati w'emyaka amakumi asatu n'ataano, bonna abasobola okutabaala, ab'okuweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers4:36 Abaabalibwa mu nnyiriri zaabwe baawera enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu mu ataano. 
Numbers4:37 Abo be baabalibwa mu nnyiriri z'Abakewati abaweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano; abo Musa ne Aroni baababala ng'Omukama bwe yali ayogedde ng'ayita mu Musa. 
Numbers4:38 N'Abagerusoni baabalibwa mu nnyiriri zaabwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe 
Numbers4:39 abali wakati w'emyaka amakumi asatu n'ataano, bonna abasobola okutabaala, ab'okuweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers4:40 Abaabalibwa mu masiga gaabwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe baawera enkumi bbiri mu lukaaga mu amakumi asatu. 
Numbers4:41 N'ab'ennyiriri z'Abagerusoni baabalibwa, bonna abaweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano. Musa ne Aroni be baabala ng'Omukama bwe yali abagambye." 
Numbers4:42 N'ab'ennyiriri z'aba Merari baabalibwa mu nnyiriri zaabwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe 
Numbers4:43 abali wakati w'emyaka amakumi asatu n'ataano, bonna abasobola okutabaala, ab'okuweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers4:44 Abaabalibwa mu nnyiriri zaabwe baawera enkumi ssatu mu bibiri. 
Numbers4:45 Abo be baabalibwa mu nnyiriri z'aba Merari. Musa ne Aroni be baabala ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde ng'ayita mu Musa. 
Numbers4:46 Abo be baabalibwa, Musa, Aroni n'abakulembeze mu Yisirayeli be baabala, kwe kugamba Abaleevi bonna mu nnyiriri zaabwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers4:47 abali wakati w'emyaka amakumi asatu n'ataano abasobola okuweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano n'okwetikka emigugu. 
Numbers4:48 Abaabalibwa baawera kanaana mu ebikumi bitaano mu kinaana. 
Numbers4:49 Nga Omukama bwe yayogera ng'ayita mu Musa, buli omu yaweebwa omulimu gwe n'abuulirwa n'eby'okusitulanga. Bwe batyo bwe baabalibwa Musa ne Aroni ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Numbers5:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers5:2 “Lagira Abayisirayeli bagobe mu lusiisira buli mugenge yenna, n'alwadde obulwadde obw'okukulukuta amazzi, n'atali mulongoofu olw'okukwata ku mulambo." 
Numbers5:3 Abe musajja oba mukazi, mubagobe mu lusiisira baleme kulwonoona, nze mwene mwe nsula mu makkati galwo.”" 
Numbers5:4 Abayisirayeli ne bakola bwe batyo, ne babagobera ebweru w'olusiisira ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Numbers5:5 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers5:6 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Omusajja oba omukazi bw'agwanga mu kimu ku bibi abantu bye batera okugwamu, n'ataba mwesigwa eri Omukama, omuntu oyo anaabanga azzizza omusango." 
Numbers5:7 Ayatulanga ensobi ye, n'azza kyonna ekimubanjibwa ng'agasseeko n'ekyokutaano kyakyo, n'abiwa oyo gw'azzizzaako omusango." 
Numbers5:8 Bwe wataabengawo wa luganda lwe wa kumpi gw'abiwa okutanga olw'ensobi ye, omutango gw'aliwa gunaafuukanga gwa Mukama, aguwanga kabona. Aleeterangako endiga ennume ey'omutango eriweerezebwa olw'okuddaabiriza ku lulwe." 
Numbers5:9 Anti ebintu byonna ebitone Abayisirayeli bye baleeta ewa kabona biba bya kabona; 
Numbers5:10 omuntu ky'awonga kiba kikye, naye bw'akiwa kabona kiba kya kabona.’ ”" 
Numbers5:11 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers5:12 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Singa omukazi omufumbo awabanga n'amenya obwesigwa eri bba," 
Numbers5:13 omusajja omulala ne yeebaka naye, kyokka bba n'atakimanyaako, naye nga yeegwagwawaza mu nkiso, kubanga tewali bajulirwa, oba kubanga takwatiddwa lubona," 
Numbers5:14 naye bba olw'obuggya n'ajjirwa okubuusabuusa mu mukazi we, ate ddala nga yeegwagwawaza, ne bw'aba ateerera muteerere sso ng'omukazi tanneegwagwawaza," 
Numbers5:15 amuleetanga eri kabona. Aleetanga n'obuwunga obwa sayiri obuweza ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa ng'ekitone ku lwa mukazi we. Tayiwangako muzigo oba okussaako obubaani kubanga kino kitambiro olw'obuggya, kijjukizo ku lw'ensobi eyakolebwa." 
Numbers5:16 “ ‘Kabona amuleetanga n'amussa mu maaso g'Omukama; 
Numbers5:17 addiranga amazzi amatukuvu mu nsumbi, n'assaamu ku nfuufu evudde wansi mu Kisulo." 
Numbers5:18 Kabona ng'amaze okuteeka omukazi mu maaso g'Omukama, anaamusumululanga enviiri, n'assa mu mikono gye ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'ekijjukizo era ng'ekitambiro olw'obuggya; ye kabona asigalanga akutte amazzi agakaawa ag'ekikolimo." 
Numbers5:19 Olwo kabona amulayizanga ng'agamba nti: “Oba tewabanga musajja mulala yeebaka naawe, oba ggwe okuva ku balo, oba tobangako atali mulongoofu mu bbanga lino ng'ofumbiddwa balo, amazzi gano agakaawa ag'ekikolimo gakwejjeereze." 
Numbers5:20 Naye oba wava ku balo bw'otyo ne weegwagwawaza ng'omusajja omulala yeebaka naawe…” 
Numbers5:21 Wano kabona amugamba ebigambo eby'ekikolimo nti: “Omukama akuwe okukolimirwa n'okuvumirirwa mu bantu bo; ekisambi kyo kikenene n'olubuto lukwereege; 
Numbers5:22 amazzi gano ag'ekikolimo gakukkemu olubuto lukwereege n'ekisambi kikenene.” Omukazi ayanukulanga nti: “Amiina, amiina.”" 
Numbers5:23 “ ‘Ekikolimo ekyo kabona akiwandiikanga mu kitabo, ate n'akisiimuulira mu mazzi agakaawa." 
Numbers5:24 Amuwanga n'anywa amazzi agakaawa mw'atadde ekikolimo; amazzi ag'ekikolimo bwe galimukkamu galimukaayirira. 
Numbers5:25 Kabona aggyanga mu mukono gwe ekitone eky'obuwunga olw'obuggya n'akiwuuba mu maaso g'Omukama n'akiteeka ku mwaliiro. 
Numbers5:26 Kabona aggyangako olubatu ku kitone eky'obuwunga n'abwokera ku mwaliiro ng'ekitundu kyakyo eky'ekijjukizo, olwo amazzi agakaawa n'agawa omukazi aganywe." 
Numbers5:27 Bw'aliba nga yeegwagwawaza, nga teyali mwesigwa eri bba, bw'alinywa amazzi ag'ekikolimo ne gamukkamu gamukaayirire, olubuto lumwereege n'ekisambi kikenene. Alivumirirwa mu bantu be." 
Numbers5:28 Bw'aliba nga teyeegwagwawaza, nga taliiko kko, aliba yejjeeredde, alisobola n'okuzaala abaana." 
Numbers5:29 “ ‘Eryo lye tteeka ku buggya, omukazi ng'avudde ku bba ne yeegwagwawaza," 
Numbers5:30 oba olw'obuggya omusajja n'abuusabuusa mu mukazi we. Kabona wa kumuleetanga mu maaso g'Omukama n'amukolako byonna ebiragiddwa mu tteeka lino. 
Numbers5:31 Ye omusajja taabenga na musango gwonna olw'ensobi eyakolebwa, naye omukazi aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kye.’ ”" 
Numbers6:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers6:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Omusajja oba omukazi bw'ayagalanga okweyama, kwe kugamba, okukuba obweyamo obw'okweyawulira Omukama ng'omunazireewo," 
Numbers6:3 yeggyanga ku vviini ne ku buli kyonna ekitamiiza; era tanywanga nkaatu ya vviini oba enkaatu y'ekitamiiza kyonna. Tanywanga mubisi gwa mizabbibu oba okugirya, gibeere mibisi oba egy'omuwotokwa." 
Numbers6:4 Ebbanga lyonna ly'alimala nga munazireewo takombanga ku kyonna ekiyinza okuva mu mizabbibu, newandibadde obusigo oba obukuta bwagyo." 
Numbers6:5 Ebbanga lyonna ly'alimala mu bweyamo nga munazireewo, akamwano tekayitanga mu mutwe gwe. Okutuusa ng'obudde buweddeyo bwe yeeyawuliramu Omukama, anaabeeranga mutukuvu; enviiri z'oku mutwe gwe azirekanga ne zikula." 
Numbers6:6 Ebbanga lyonna nga yeeyawulidde Omukama, tasemberanga awali omufu." 
Numbers6:7 Ne bw'abeeranga nga kitaawe y'afudde, oba nnyina, oba muganda we, oba mwannyina, taganyanga n'ataba mulongoofu olw'okubeera bo, kubanga ku mutwe gwe akyalina akabonero nga bwe yeeyawulira Omukama." 
Numbers6:8 Ebbanga lyonna nga yeeyawudde, alibanga muwonge wa Mukama." 
Numbers6:9 “ ‘Singa omuntu afiira awo w'ali ekibwatukira, enviiri ze ze yawonga ziriba zoonoonese; azimwanga ku lunaku olwo lwennyini lwe yeetukuza, kwe kugamba olunaku olwomusanvu." 
Numbers6:10 Ku lunaku olwomunaana aleetanga ewa kabona amayiba abiri oba obuyiibwa bubiri awo ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Numbers6:11 Akamu kabona anaakaweerezanga ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, ate kalala ng'ekitambiro ekyokye, addaabirize ku lulwe, kubanga yakola ekibi okuba awali omufu. Ku olwo alitukuza omutwe gwe." 
Numbers6:12 Era alitukuza ennaku nga yeeyawulidde Omukama; aleetanga akaliga ak'omwaka ogumu akalume olw'ekitambiro eky'omusango. Naye ennaku ziri ezaakulembera ziriba zifudde, kubanga yayonoona okweyawula kwe." 
Numbers6:13 “ ‘Lino lye tteeka ku munazireewo ng'ennaku z'okweyawula kwe zibadde ziweddeko. Bamuleetanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano," 
Numbers6:14 n'awaayo ebitone ew'Omukama: akaliga akalume ak'omwaka ogumu akataliiko kamogo olw'ekitambiro ekyokye, akaliga akaluusi ak'omwaka ogumu akataliiko kamogo olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, endiga ennume etaliiko kamogo olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu," 
Numbers6:15 obuwunga olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga, n'eby'ekitone eky'okuyiwa, ekisero ky'emigaati egitazimbulukuse, bukkeeki obugoye mu buwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi nga butabuddwamu omuzigo, n'obugaati obw'oluwewere obusiigiddwa omuzigo." 
Numbers6:16 Kabona ebyo abireetanga mu maaso g'Omukama n'aweereza ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'ekitambiro ekyokye. 
Numbers6:17 Omunazireewo alireeta ekisero ky'emigaati egitazimbulukuse, ate kabona n'aweereza eri Omukama endiga ennume ng'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu awamu n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers6:18 Omunazireewo awo ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano w'amweranga enviiri ze yawonga; aziddiranga n'azissa ku muliro oguli wansi w'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. 
Numbers6:19 Ng'omunazireewo amaze okumwako enviiri ze yali awonze, kabona addiranga omukono omufumbe ogw'endiga ennume, n'aggya mu kisero kakeeki kamu akatazimbulukuse n'akagaati ak'oluwewere kamu akatazimbulukuse, n'abissa mu mukono gwe." 
Numbers6:20 Kabona abiwuubanga mu maaso g'Omukama ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba; bino bitukuvu, bya kabona wamu n'ekifuba kye yawuubye n'ekisambi ekyayawuliddwako. Ebyo nga biwedde, omunazireewo ayinza okunywa evviini." 
Numbers6:21 “ ‘Lino lye tteeka ku munazireewo eyeeyamye okwewa Omukama mu kweyawula kwe, nga tobaze birala by'asobola kukola. Obweyamo bw'abanga akoze, abutuukirizanga ng'etteeka ku banazireewo bwe ligamba.’ ”" 
Numbers6:22 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers6:23 “Gamba Aroni ne batabani be nti: ‘Abayisirayeli mubawanga bwe muti omukisa, mubagambanga nti:" 
Numbers6:24 “ ‘Omukama akuwe omukisa, akukuume;" 
Numbers6:25 “ ‘Omukama akwakize amaaso ge, akugirire ekisa;" 
Numbers6:26 “ ‘Omukama akukyukize amaaso ge, akuwe emirembe.’" 
Numbers6:27 “Bwe batyo banaakoowooleranga erinnya lyange ku Bayisirayeli, nange ne mbawa omukisa.”" 
Numbers7:1 Musa bwe yamaliriza Ekisulo n'akiyimirizaawo, yakisiiga omuzigo n'akitukuza n'ebyamu byonna. Yasiiga omuzigo n'atukuza omwaliiro n'ebigukozesebwako byonna." 
Numbers7:2 Ku olwo abakulu mu Yisirayeli, abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe n'emitwe gy'ebika by'abaali babaliddwa, baaleeta ebitone." 
Numbers7:3 Baatonera Omukama ebigaali mukaaga ebizimbiddwa, ko ente ezibisika kkumi na bbiri. Abakulu babiri baaleeta ekigaali kimu, ate buli omu yaleeta ente emu emu. Bano baabireeta mu maaso g'Ekisulo." 
Numbers7:4 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers7:5 “Bikkirize obibaggyeko, bikole ku mulimu gw'omu Weema ey'Ensisinkano; bikwase Abaleevi ng'ogerera ku mirimu gyabwe kye gibeetaagisa.”" 
Numbers7:6 Musa n'akwata ebigaali n'ente n'abiwa Abaleevi; 
Numbers7:7 ebigaali bibiri n'ente nnya yabiwa Abagerusoni ng'agerera ku mirimu gyabwe kye gibeetaagisa. 
Numbers7:8 Ebigaali ebirala ebina n'ente omunaana n'abiwa aba Merari ng'agerera ku mirimu gyabwe kye gibeetaagisa. Bano baali bakulirwa Yitamari mutabani wa Aroni kabona. 
Numbers7:9 Aba Kewati teyabawa bigaali na nte kubanga ebitukuvu bye baalinako obuvunaanyizibwa baali ba kubyetikkanga ku bibegabega byabwe. 
Numbers7:10 Abakulembeze baaleeta ebitone byabwe ku lw'okutukuza omwaliiro, ku lunaku lwe gwasiigibwa omuzigo, ne babireeta mu maaso g'omwaliiro." 
Numbers7:11 Omukama yali agambye Musa nti: “Abakulembeze baleete buli omu ku lunaku lwawufu ekitone olw'okutukuza omwaliiro.” 
Numbers7:12 Eyaleeta ekitone kye ku lunaku olusooka yali Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadabu, ow'omu kika kya Yuda, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:13 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:14 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:15 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:16 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:17 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Nakusoni mutabani w'Amminadabu kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:18 Ku lunaku olwokubiri Netaneli mutabani wa Zuwari, omukulu w'ekika kya Yissakari, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:19 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:20 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:21 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:22 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:23 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Netaneli mutabani wa Zuwari kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:24 Ku lunaku olwokusatu Eliyabu mutabani wa Keloni, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Zebuluni, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:25 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:26 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:27 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:28 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:29 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Eliyabu mutabani wa Keloni kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:30 Ku lunaku olwokuna Elizuri mutabani wa Sedewuri, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Rubeni, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:31 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:32 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:33 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:34 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:35 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Elizuri mutabani wa Sedewuri kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:36 Ku lunaku olwookutaano Selumyeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Simewoni, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:37 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:38 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:39 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:40 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:41 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Selumyeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:42 Ku lunaku olwomukaaga Eriyaasafu mutabani wa Deweli, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Gaadi, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:43 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:44 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:45 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:46 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:47 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Eriyaasafu mutabani wa Deweli kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:48 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu Elisama mutabani wa Ammiwudi, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Efurayimu, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:49 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:50 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:51 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:52 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:53 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Elisama mutabani w'Ammiwudi kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:54 Ku lunaku olwomunaana Gamalyeli mutabani wa Pedaasuri, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Manasse, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:55 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:56 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:57 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:58 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:59 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Gamalyeli mutabani wa Pedaasuri kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:60 Ku lunaku olwomwenda Abidani mutabani wa Gidewoni, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Benyamiini, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:61 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:62 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:63 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:64 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:65 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Abidani mutabani wa Gidewoni kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:66 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi Akiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Daani, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:67 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:68 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:69 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:70 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:71 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Akiyezeri mutabani w'Ammisaddayi kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:72 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'olumu Pagyeli mutabani wa Okurani, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Aseeri, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:73 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:74 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:75 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:76 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:77 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Pagyeli mutabani wa Okurani kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:78 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ebbiri Akira mutabani wa Enani, omukulu w'abazzukulu ba Nafutali, yaleeta ekitone kye." 
Numbers7:79 Ekitone kye kyalimu essowaani eya ffeeza ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, n'ekibya ekya ffeeza eky'okukozesa mu kumansira ekizitowa sekeli nsanvu, ku byombi ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo, olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga," 
Numbers7:80 ekijiiko ekya zaabu ekisena obubaani ekizitowa sekeli kkumi, nga kijjudde obubaani," 
Numbers7:81 ente ennume ento, endiga ennume emu, n'akaliga akalume kamu akawezezza omwaka, ku lw'ekitambiro ekyokye;" 
Numbers7:82 embuzi ennume emu olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; 
Numbers7:83 ente ennume bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'obuliga obulume butaano obuwezezza omwaka, olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Ebyo bye byali mu kitone kya Akira mutabani wa Enani kye yaleeta." 
Numbers7:84 Ebyo abakulu mu Yisirayeli bye baaleeta okutukuza omwaliiro ku lunaku lwe gwasiigibwa omuzigo: essowaani eza ffeeza kkumi na bbiri, ebibya ebya ffeeza eby'okukozesa mu kumansira kkumi na bibiri." 
Numbers7:85 Buli ssowaani yali ezitowa sekeli kikumi mu asatu, ate buli kibya eky'okukozesa mu kumansira nga kizitowa sekeli nsanvu; okukwatira awamu, ebya ffeeza nga bizitowa sekeli enkumi bbiri mu bina, ng'ogerera ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu;" 
Numbers7:86 ebijiiko ebisena obubaani ebya zaabu kkumi na bibiri, ebijjudde obubaani, buli kimu nga kizitowa sekeli kkumi, ng'ogeredde ku sekeli ey'omu Kitukuvu; okukwatira awamu ebijiiko ebya zaabu byazitowa sekeli kikumi mu abiri;" 
Numbers7:87 ebisolo byonna awamu olw'ekitone ekyokye zaali ente ennume kkumi na bbiri, endiga ennume kkumi na bbiri, obuliga obulume obw'omwaka ogumu kkumi na bubiri, wamu n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa; embuzi ennume kkumi na bbiri ez'ekitambiro olw'ekibi;" 
Numbers7:88 ebisolo byonna awamu olw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu byali ente ennume amakumi abiri mu nnya, endiga ennume nkaaga, embuzi ennume nkaaga, n'obuliga obulume obw'omwaka ogumu nkaaga. Bino bye bitone ebyaleetebwa okutukuza omwaliiro lwe gwasiigibwa omuzigo." 
Numbers7:89 Musa bwe yayingira mu Weema y'Endagaano ayogere naye, n'awulira eddoboozi eryogera nga liva wakati wa bakerubi ababiri ku Ntebe y'Obusaasizi eyali ku Sanduuku ey'Endagaano. N'ayogera naye." 
Numbers8:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers8:2 “Gamba Aroni nti: ‘Bw'oteekangayo ettawaaza, laba nti ettawaaza omusanvu zimulisa oludda olutunuulidde ekikondo ky'ettawaaza.’ ”" 
Numbers8:3 Ne Aroni bwe yakola: yateeka ettawaaza nga zitunuulidde mu maaso g'ekikondo ky'ettawaaza ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Numbers8:4 Ekikondo ky'ettawaaza kyali kikoleddwa bwe kiti: okuva ku ntobo yaakyo okutuusa ku bimuli byakyo kyali kikoleddwa mu zaabu omukubeekube. Musa yakola ekikondo ky'ettawaaza ng'agoberera entereeza Omukama gye yali amuwadde. 
Numbers8:5 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers8:6 “Ggya Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli obatukuze. 
Numbers8:7 Okubatukuza ojja kukola bw'oti: Bamansire amazzi agatukuza, obagambe bamwe buli kooya konna akabaliko, booze n'engoye zaabwe, olwo obatukuze." 
Numbers8:8 “Bagambe baleete ente ennume ento wamu n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo; ate naawe oleete ente ennume olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. 
Numbers8:9 Awo oleete Abaleevi mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano, okuŋŋaanye ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers8:10 Abaleevi baleete mu maaso g'Omukama Abayisirayeli babateekeko emikono. 
Numbers8:11 Aroni anaaweereza Abaleevi eri Omukama mu kitone eky'okuwuuba ekivudde mu Bayisirayeli, bwe batyo basaanire okukola omulimu gw'Omukama." 
Numbers8:12 N'Abaleevi banassa emikono gyabwe ku mitwe gy'ente zombi ennume ento, emu n'ogiweereza ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, endala ng'ekitambiro ekyokye oddaabirize ku lwabwe." 
Numbers8:13 Ojja kuyimiriza Abaleevi mu maaso ga Aroni ne batabani be, obaweereze Omukama mu kitone eky'okuwuuba," 
Numbers8:14 bw'otyo onooyawula Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli, babe bange," 
Numbers8:15 ng'omaze okubatukuza n'okubaweereza mu kitone eky'okuwuuba, banaayingira ne batandika okuweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers8:16 “Bano be bampeereddwa nga baggyibwa mu Bayisirayeli; mbeerondedde okudda mu kifo ky'abaggulanda ba buli lubuto ab'Abayisirayeli. 
Numbers8:17 Kubanga ebiggulanda byonna mu Yisirayeli ebisajja, mu bantu ne mu bisolo, byange. Ku luli lwe natta buli kiggulanda mu nsi y'e Misiri, nabyeyawulira bibeere byange." 
Numbers8:18 Mu kifo ky'abaggulanda bonna ab'Abayisirayeli, ntuttemu Abaleevi." 
Numbers8:19 Mbatonedde Aroni ne batabani be nga mbaggya mu Bayisirayeli bonna, balyoke bampeereze mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano ku lw'Abayisirayeli, baddaabirize ku lwabwe, akabi kaleme kugwira Bayisirayeli singa baba basemberedde Ekitukuvu.”" 
Numbers8:20 Musa ne Aroni n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli Abaleevi ne babakola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Numbers8:21 Abaleevi beetukuza, ne bayoza ebyambalo byabwe, olwo Aroni n'abaweereza eri Omukama mu kitone eky'okuwuuba, n'addaabiriza ku lwabwe okubatukuza." 
Numbers8:22 Oluvannyuma Abaleevi bajja ku mulimu gwabwe mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano nga balagirirwa Aroni ne batabani be. Abaleevi ne babakola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagiridde Musa. 
Numbers8:23 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers8:24 “Kino kikwata ku Baleevi: abasajja abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri mu etaano n'okweyongerayo, ba kujjanga baweereze mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers8:25 Bwe bawezanga emyaka amakumi ataano, bawummulanga okuweereza kwabwe, tebongeranga kukola." 
Numbers8:26 Bakyayinza okusigala nga bakyayamba ku bannaabwe mu bisanja byabwe mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, naye bo nga tebakyafuna bisanja. Bw'otyo bw'oba ogabira Abaleevi ebisanja byabwe.”" 
Numbers9:1 Mu mwezi ogusooka, mu mwaka ogwokubiri okuva lwe baava mu nsi y'e Misiri, Omukama yayogera ne Musa mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi n'amugamba nti:" 
Numbers9:2 “Abayisirayeli bakuze Pasika mu budde bwayo obulagiddwa. 
Numbers9:3 Bagikuze mu budde bwayo obulagiddwa: ku lw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi guno akawungeezi, nga bagoberera amateeka gaayo gonna n'emikolo gyayo gyonna.”" 
Numbers9:4 Musa n'alagira Abayisirayeli bakuze Pasika," 
Numbers9:5 nabo ne bagikuza mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi, akawungeezi. Baakola byonna ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Numbers9:6 Ne wabaawo abataali balongoofu olw'omuntu eyali afudde, nga tebasobola kukuza Pasika ku olwo, ne bajja eri Musa ne Aroni ku olwo" 
Numbers9:7 ne babagamba nti: “Tetuli balongoofu olw'omuntu eyafudde, lwaki tulyazaamaanyizibwa ne tutasobola kutambirira Mukama mu budde obulagiddwa wamu n'Abayisirayeli abalala?”" 
Numbers9:8 Musa n'abaanukula nti: “Mulindeeko, mmale okuwulira Omukama ky'agamba ku mmwe.”" 
Numbers9:9 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers9:10 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Omu mu mmwe oba mu bazzukulu bw'abanga nga si mulongoofu olw'omufu, oba ng'abadde wala ku lugendo, era akyasobola okukuza Pasika ku lw'Omukama." 
Numbers9:11 Ab'engeri eyo ba kugikuzanga mu mwezi ogwokubiri, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi, akawungeezi; balyanga akaliga n'emigaati egitazimbulukuse okuli n'enva z'ettale ezikaawa." 
Numbers9:12 Tebalekangawo kantu okutuusa enkeera, era akaliga tebakamenyangako ggumba na limu. Bwe bakuzanga Pasika, batuukirizanga amateeka gaayo gyonna." 
Numbers9:13 “ ‘Naye oli bw'abanga nga mulongoofu, era nga tali mu lugendo, n'amala tatukuza Pasika ku lw'Omukama, akutulwanga ku bantu be, kubanga teyaweereza Mukama kitambiro mu budde bwakyo obulagiddwa; omuntu oyo aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekibi kye." 
Numbers9:14 N'omugwira asula mu mmwe bw'ayagalanga okukuza Pasika, agobereranga amateeka gaayo n'emikolo gyayo. Mubanga n'etteeka limu, omuzaaliranwa n'omugwira.’ ”" 
Numbers9:15 Ku lunaku lwennyini Ekisulo, kwe kugamba Weema y'Endagaano, lwe kyasimbibwa, ekire kyakibikka. Okuva akawungeezi okutuusa ku makya ekire nga kiri ng'omuliro ku Kisulo." 
Numbers9:16 Bwe kyabanga kityo bulijjo: emisana ng'ekire kikibikka, ate ekiro nga kiba ng'omuliro." 
Numbers9:17 Ekire bwe kyasitukanga okuva ku Weema olwo n'Abayisirayeli nga basitula; ate we kyakkanga, nga nabo awo we basiisira." 
Numbers9:18 Omukama bwe yalagiranga, nga basitula; ate bwe yalagiranga, nga basiisira. Ebbanga lyonna ekire lye kyamalanga nga kiri ku Kisulo, nga basigala awo." 
Numbers9:19 Ekire bwe kyalwanga ku Kisulo, Abayisirayeli baakwatanga Omukama kye yabakuutira, tebaasitulanga kweyongerayo." 
Numbers9:20 Oluusi ekire kyamalanga ennaku ntono ku Kisulo; ng'Omukama bw'ayagadde, nga basiisira; ate ng'Omukama bw'ayagadde nga basitula." 
Numbers9:21 Ekire bwe kyabeerangawo akawungeezi okutuusa ku makya, kimala kisituka ku makya, nga nabo basitula; we kyasitukiranga, oba misana oba kiro, nabo we baasituliranga." 
Numbers9:22 Bwe kyamalangawo ennaku ebbiri oba omwezi, oba okusingawo, nga kiri ku Kisulo, Abayisirayeli nga basiisira awo ebbanga lyonna. Olwasitukanga, nga nabo basitula." 
Numbers9:23 Omukama bwe yalagiranga nga basiisira, ate bwe yalagiranga nga basitula. Baakwatanga Omukama kye yabakuutira ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers10:2 “Weekolere eŋŋombe bbiri mu ffeeza omukubeekube, z'oneeyambanga okuyita abantu bakuŋŋaane era n'okulagira olusiisira okusitula." 
Numbers10:3 Zombi bwe zifuuyibwanga, ekibiina kinaakuŋŋaaniranga w'oli ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers10:4 Bw'efuuyibwanga emu yokka, olwo abakulembeze, kwe kugamba abakulu b'ebika bya Yisirayeli, be banakuŋŋaaniranga w'oli." 
Numbers10:5 “Bw'ofuuwanga n'okuwenyaako, abaasiisira ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba nga basitula." 
Numbers10:6 Bw'ofuuwanga n'okuwenyaako emirundi ebiri, ab'emaserengeta nga basitula; enfuuwa y'eŋŋombe y'eriba akabonero akabawenyaako basitule." 
Numbers10:7 Okukuŋŋaanya obukuŋŋaanya abantu, eŋŋombe ozifuuwanga, naye nga si mu ddoboozi lya kuwenyaako." 
Numbers10:8 Batabani ba Aroni, bakabona, be banaafuuwanga eŋŋombe. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna." 
Numbers10:9 “Eyo mu nsi yammwe bwe mubanga mugenda ku lutalo okulumba abalabe ababalumbye, mufuuwanga eŋŋombe; olwo Omukama Katonda wammwe agenda kubajjukira, abawonye mu mikono gy'abalabe bammwe." 
Numbers10:10 Ne ku nnaku zammwe ez'okusanyuka, ku mbaga eziragiddwa, ne ku nnaku z'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, mufuuwanga eŋŋombe nga muweereza ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu, bwe kityo kiribeera ekijjukizo gye muli mu maaso ga Katonda wammwe. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Numbers10:11 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri, mu mwezi ogwokubiri, ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri olw'omwezi, ekire ne kisituka okuva ku Kisulo eky'Endagaano." 
Numbers10:12 N'Abayisirayeli ne basitula nga bali mu bibinja byabwe, ne bava mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi, ne bagenda nga bwe batambula. Ekire ne kiyimirira mu ddungu ly'e Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Olwo gwe mulundi ogwasooka okusitula, nga bakola ng'Omukama bwe yali abalagidde ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers10:14 Ebibinja by'olusiisira lw'abazzukulu ba Yuda ku bendera yaabwe be baasooka okusitula; baali baduumirwa Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadabu; 
Numbers10:15 Netaneli mutabani wa Zuwari nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Yissakari; 
Numbers10:16 ate Eliyabu mutabani wa Keloni nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Zebuluni. 
Numbers10:17 Ekisulo ne kitimbululwa; bazzukulu ba Gerusoni ne Merari ne basimbula nga bakyetisse. 
Numbers10:18 Ebibinja by'olusiisira lwa Rubeni ku bendera yaabwe be baddako okusitula; baali baduumirwa Elizuri mutabani wa Sedewuri; 
Numbers10:19 Selumyeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Simewoni; 
Numbers10:20 ate Eliyasafu mutabani wa Deweli nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'abazzukulu ba Gaadi. 
Numbers10:21 N'ab'olunyiriri lwa Kewati ne basitula nga beetisse ebintu ebitukuvu. Weema yali ya kusimba nga tebannatuuka. 
Numbers10:22 Ebibinja by'olusiisira lw'abazzukulu ba Efurayimu ku bendera yaabwe ne baddako; baali baduumirwa Elisama mutabani wa Ammiwudi; 
Numbers10:23 Gamalyeli mutabani wa Pedaasuri nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Manasse; 
Numbers10:24 ate Abidani mutabani wa Gidewoni nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Benyamiini. 
Numbers10:25 Abaasembayo n'ebendera yaabwe be b'ebibinja by'olusiisira lw'abazzukulu ba Daani, ng'eggye eriva ennyuma; baali baduumirwa Akiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi;" 
Numbers10:26 Pagyeli mutabani wa Okurani nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'abazzukulu ba Daani," 
Numbers10:27 ate Akira mutabani wa Enani nga y'ali ku kibinja ky'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Nafutali. 
Numbers10:28 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli bwe baddiriŋŋananga mu bibinja byabwe nga batambula. 
Numbers10:29 Musa yagamba Kobabu, mutabani wa Reweli Omumidiyaani, mukoddomi we nti: “Tugenda mu kifo Omukama kye yagamba nti: ‘Nzija kukibawa.’ Jjangu naffe, tujja kukuyisa bulungi, kubanga Omukama yasuubiza Yisirayeli ebirungi.”" 
Numbers10:30 Ye n'amwanukula nti: “Sijja kugenda naawe; nzija kudda mu nsi yaffe ne mu bantu bange.” 
Numbers10:31 Ko Musa nti: “Nkwegayiridde totuvaako; ggwe omanyi awasaanye okusiisira mu ddungu, ggwe onoobeera eriiso lyaffe." 
Numbers10:32 Bw'onojja naffe tujja kugabana ku birungi Omukama by'anaatuwa.” 
Numbers10:33 Ne bava ku lusozi lw'Omukama, ne batambulako olugendo lwa nnaku ssatu. Sanduuku y'Omukama ey'Endagaano yagendanga ebakulembedde mu nnaku ezo essatu okubazuulira ekifo aw'okuwummula." 
Numbers10:34 N'ekire ky'Omukama nga kibabeera awo waggulu emisana bwe baasitulanga. 
Numbers10:35 Sanduuku y'Endagaano bwe yasitulwanga, nga Musa agamba nti: “Situka, ayi Mukama, abalabe bo babune emiwabo, abakukyawa bakwetegule mangu.”" 
Numbers10:36 Bwe yabanga essibwa wansi, ng'agamba nti: Ayi Mukama, komawo eri akeesedde k'eggye lya Yisirayeli." 
Numbers11:1 Abantu ne batandika okwemulugunya olw'ebizibu ng'Omukama awulira. Omukama bwe yakiwulira, obusungu bwe ne bwesera, omuliro gw'Omukama ne gukoleera mu bo, ne gwokya ekitundu ky'olusiisira ekisembayo." 
Numbers11:2 Abantu bwe baaleekaana eri Musa, Musa ne yeegayirira Omukama, omuliro ne guzikira." 
Numbers11:3 Ekifo ekyo ne bakituuma Tabera, kubanga omuliro gw'Omukama gwakoleera mu bo." 
Numbers11:4 Abantu abamu abalalulalu mu bo ne batandika okwoya emmere endala; Abayisirayeli ne baddamu nate okukuba emiranga nga bagamba nti: “Ani anaatuwa ennyama tulye? 
Numbers11:5 Tujjukira ebyennyanja bye twaliiranga obwereere mu Misiri awatali na kusasula; tujjukira ensujju ne wujju, obutungulu, katungulu-ccumu n'ebika by'obutungulu ebirala." 
Numbers11:6 Twenyiyiddwa; amaaso gaffe mpaawo kirala kye galaba wabula manu.” 
Numbers11:7 Manu yali nga bw'olaba akasigo ka jjada oba ng'aka budelliyo. 
Numbers11:8 Abantu baagendanga bagikuŋŋaanya, ne bagisa ku lubengo, oba ne bagisekula mu kinu. Oluusi nga bagifumba mu ntamu, olulala nga bagifumba ng'obundaazi. Yawoomanga ng'omugaati omuli omuzigo." 
Numbers11:9 Ekiro omusulo bwe gwagwanga mu lusiisira, nga kugwirako ne manu." 
Numbers11:10 Musa n'awulira ng'abantu bakaaba, buli nnyumba ku mulyango gwa weema yaabwe. Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bwesera nnyo; Musa naye n'alaba ng'akabi kazze," 
Numbers11:11 n'agamba Omukama nti: “Lwaki omuweereza wo omulabya ennaku? Nakukola ki obutasanga kisa mu maaso go, n'onteekako omugugu gw'abantu bano bonna?" 
Numbers11:12 Nze naba olubuto lw'abantu bano bonna? Nze nabazaala olyoke oŋŋambe nti: ‘Mbakwatire mu mikono gyange ng'omujjanjabi bw'asitula akaana akawere,’ mbatwale mu nsi gye walayirira okuwa bajjajjaabwe?" 
Numbers11:13 Nzigye wa ennyama mpe abantu bano bonna? Tebata kunkaabirira: ‘Tuwe ennyama, tulye.’" 
Numbers11:14 Nze obw'omu siyinza kuwanirira bantu bano bonna; omugugu gumpitiriddeko obuzito. 
Numbers11:15 Oba bw'oti bw'onompisa, waakiri nzita kati; nkwegayiridde, obanga nsanze ekisa mu maaso go, tondeka kulaba bwe mbonaabona.”" 
Numbers11:16 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Nkuŋŋaanyiza abakadde nsanvu abasajja ng'obaggya mu bakadde ba Yisirayeli, ggwe b'omanyi nti bakulu mu bantu era abaami baabwe, obaleete ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, bayimirire awo wamu naawe." 
Numbers11:17 Nzija kukka, njogere naawe awo; nzija kutoola ku mwoyo gwo mbaweeko, bakwetikkireko ku mugugu gw'abantu, oleme kugwetikka wekka." 
Numbers11:18 N'abantu bagambe nti: ‘Mwetukuze mwetegekere olw'enkya, kubanga enkya mujja kulya ennyama; anti mpulidde nga mukaaba nti: “Ani anaatuwa ennyama tulye? Twali bulungi mu Misiri.” Omukama ajja kubawa ennyama, ate mujja kugirya." 
Numbers11:19 Mujja kugirya si lunaku lumu, wadde bbiri bubiri oba ttaano, wadde kkumi oba makumi abiri," 
Numbers11:20 wabula mwezi mulamba okutuusa lw'eneebafulumira mu nnyindo, ebatame n'okubatama, kubanga mwegaana Omukama ali mu mmwe, ne mukaaba mu maaso ge nti: “Lwaki ye twava mu Misiri?” ’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Musa n'addamu nti: “Abantu be nnimu, abasobola okuyimirira ku magulu gaabwe, bali obusiriivu mukaaga, ate ggwe ogamba nti: ‘Nzija kubawa balye ennyama mwezi mulamba.’" 
Numbers11:22 Endiga n'ente zonna nga zittiddwa zinaabamala okusobola okukkuta? Oba ebyennyanja byonna mu nnyanja nga bikwatiddwa binaabakkusa?” 
Numbers11:23 Omukama n'amwanukula nti: “Olowooza kino Omukama kimuli kizibu? Kale nno ojja kulaba obanga kye nsuubizza tekiituukirire.” 
Numbers11:24 Musa n'afuluma, n'abuulira abantu Omukama bye yali agambye. N'akuŋŋaanya abasajja nsanvu ng'abaggya mu bakadde mu Yisirayeli, n'abayimiriza awo ku Weema." 
Numbers11:25 Omukama n'akka mu kire n'ajja gy'ali, n'addira ku mwoyo ogwali mu Musa n'awaako abasajja abakadde ensanvu. Omwoyo bwe gwabakkaako, ne balanga, naye tebaayongera nate." 
Numbers11:26 Mu lusiisira waali wasigaddeyo abasajja babiri, omu ng'ayitibwa Eludadi ate omulala Medadi, nabo omwoyo gwabakkako. Nabo baali bamenyeddwa mu bakadde abaalondebwa, naye bo nga tebazze ku Weema; bo ne balanga nga basinziira mu lusiisira." 
Numbers11:27 Omuvubuka n'addukanako n'abuulira Musa, n'agamba nti: “Eludadi ne Medadi baabali balanga eri mu lusiisira.”" 
Numbers11:28 Awo Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu omuyambi wa Musa okuva mu buvubuka bwe, n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Mukama wange Musa, bayimirize.”" 
Numbers11:29 Ko Musa nti: “Okwatiddwa obuggya ku lwange; singa nno abantu b'Omukama bonna baali balanzi, ng'abawadde mwoyo we?”" 
Numbers11:30 Musa n'abakadde ba Yisirayeli ne baddayo mu lusiisira. 
Numbers11:31 Empewo n'efuluma ew'Omukama n'ereeta entiitiri okuva ku nnyanja n'ezigwa mu lusiisira. Zaabikkirira okwetooloola olusiisira ebbanga nga lya lugendo lwa lunaku lulamba ku buli luuyi, ate ng'okuva ku ttaka zeetuumye emikono ebiri obugulumivu." 
Numbers11:32 Olunaku olwo lwonna n'ekiro n'enkeera abantu ne bafuluma, ne bakuŋŋaanya entiitiri; eyakuŋŋaanya entono, yakuŋŋaanya komeri kkumi; ne bazaanika okwetooloola olusiisira." 
Numbers11:33 Naye ennyama yali ekyabali mu kamwa, nga bakyali mu kulya, tebannamalawo, obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku bantu, n'abakubamu ekibonerezo ekinene ennyo." 
Numbers11:34 Ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Kiburoti Attaava, kubanga eyo gye baaziika abantu abaali bayoyezza emmere endala." 
Numbers11:35 Ne bava e Kiburoti Attaava ne bagenda e Kazeroti, ne basigala eyo." 
Numbers12:1 Miriyamu ne Aroni ne bakolokota Musa olw'okubeera mukazi we Omukuusi, kubanga yali awasizza omukazi Omukuusi,"
