Numbers12:2 ne bagamba nti: “Omukama yayogerera mu Musa yekka? Teyayogera ng'ayita ne mu ffe?” Omukama n'akiwulira. 
Numbers12:3 Sso nno Musa yali musajja mwetoowaze, nga mwetoowaze nnyo okusinga abantu bonna abaali ku nsi." 
Numbers12:4 Amangu ago Omukama n'agamba Musa, Aroni ne Miriyamu nti: “Muveeyo mmwe mwensatule, mujje ku Weema ey'Ensisinkano.” Bonsatule ne bafuluma." 
Numbers12:5 Omukama n'akka mu mpagi ey'ekire, n'eyimirira ku mulyango gwa Weema, n'ayita Aroni ne Miriyamu. Bwe baayingira," 
Numbers12:6 n'abagamba nti: “Muwulire bye ŋŋamba: “Mu mmwe bwe mubaamu omulanzi w'Omukama, mmweraga mu kulabikirwa; njogera naye mu birooto." 
Numbers12:7 So si bwe kiri ku muweereza wange Musa, mwesigwa mu nnyumba yange yonna;" 
Numbers12:8 ye njogera naye maaso ku maaso, njogera naye kyere sso si mu ngero; Omukama amulabira ddala bw'afaanana. Lwaki nno temwatidde kukolokota muweereza wange Musa?”" 
Numbers12:9 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bubesererako, n'agenda." 
Numbers12:10 Ekire bwe kyava ku Weema, okutunula ku Miriyamu nga yenna apeeruuse ekigenge, mweru ng'omuzira. Aroni bwe yakebuka n'alaba ng'ekigenge kimubunye," 
Numbers12:11 n'agamba Musa nti: “Ssebo, nkwegayiridde, totussaako kibi kino, twakikozezza busiru." 
Numbers12:12 Ono tomuleka kufaanana nga kikulekule, ng'omwana afuluma mu nda ya nnyina ng'omubiri gwe mulyeko ekitundu.”" 
Numbers12:13 Musa n'aleekaana eri Omukama, n'agamba nti: “Ayi Katonda, nkwegayiridde, muwonye.”" 
Numbers12:14 Omukama n'amwanukula nti: “Singa kitaawe yamuwandulidde amalusu mu maaso, teyandimaze kiryose ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu? Mumumaze ennaku musanvu ng'ali bweru wa lusiisira, oluvannyuma akomezebwewo.”" 
Numbers12:15 Bw'atyo Miriyamu n'amala ennaku musanvu ng'ali bweru wa lusiisira; abantu ne batava mu kifo ekyo, okutuusa Miriyamu lwe yazzibwa." 
Numbers12:16 Abantu ne bava mu Kazeroti ne bagenda, ne basiisira mu ddungu Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers13:2 “Sindika abasajja bakette ensi y'e Kanaani gye ŋŋenda okuwa Abayisirayeli; mu buli kika kya bajjajjaabwe olondamu omu ku bakulu baabwe.” 
Numbers13:3 Musa n'akola Omukama kye yali amulagidde, n'ayima mu ddungu ly'e Parani n'asindika abasajja abakulu b'abantu;" 
Numbers13:4 gano ge mannya gaabwe: Eyava mu kika kya Rubeni ye Sammuwa mutabani wa Zakkuri; 
Numbers13:5 mu kika kya Simewoni, Safati mutabani wa Ori;" 
Numbers13:6 mu kika kya Yuda, Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne;" 
Numbers13:7 mu kika kya Yissakari, Yigali mutabani wa Yozefu;" 
Numbers13:8 mu kika kya Efurayimu, Ozeya mutabani wa Nuunu;" 
Numbers13:9 mu kika kya Benyamiini, Paluti mutabani wa Rafu;" 
Numbers13:10 mu kika kya Zebuluni, Gaddyeli mutabani wa Sodi;" 
Numbers13:11 mu kika kya Yozefu, kye kika kya Manasse, Gaddi mutabani wa Susi;" 
Numbers13:12 mu kika kya Daani, Ammyeli mutabani wa Gemalli;" 
Numbers13:13 mu kika kya Aseeri, Seturi mutabani wa Mikayeli;" 
Numbers13:14 mu kika kya Nafutali, Nakubi mutabani wa Vofusi;" 
Numbers13:15 mu kika kya Gaadi, Geweli mutabani wa Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Ago ge mannya g'abasajja Musa be yatuma okugenda okuketta ensi. Musa n'awa Ozeya mutabani wa Nuunu erinnya eddala erya Yoswa. 
Numbers13:17 Musa n'abasindika okuketta ensi Kanaani, n'abagamba nti: “Mwambuke nga muyita mu Negevu mutuukire ddala mu nsi ey'ensozi." 
Numbers13:18 Mwekkaanye ensi nga bw'eri, n'abantu abalimu oba ba maanyi oba banafu; oba batono oba bangi;" 
Numbers13:19 ensi yennyini mwe bali efaanana etya, nnungi oba mbi; ebibuga mwe basula bifaanana bitya, bya nsiisira oba bigo;" 
Numbers13:20 ettaka ggimu oba lya lunnyo; nsi ya miti oba malungu? Mubeere bagumu, mutuleeterangayo ku bibala by'ensi eyo.” Bwali budde bwa mizabbibu egisooka okwengera." 
Numbers13:21 Bwe baayambuka, ne bekkaanya ensi okuva ku ddungu ly'e Zini okutuuka e Lekobu ku kkubo eriraga e Kamati." 
Numbers13:22 Ne bayambukira mu Negevu, ne batuuka e Keburoni awaali Akimani, Sesayi ne Talumayi batabani ba Anaki. Keburoni yali yaakamala emyaka musanvu nga mukube Zowani, ekibuga ky'e Misiri, okukubibwa." 
Numbers13:23 Bwe baatuuka mu Kiwonvu kya Esukoli ne batema ettabi ly'omuzabbibu n'ekirimba kyakwo kimu, abasajja babiri ne balyetikka ku musituliro omu eno n'omulala eri. Era baanogako ku makomamawanga n'entontogolo z'emikunyu." 
Numbers13:24 Ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Ekiwonvu Esukoli, olw'okubeera ekirimba ky'emizabbibu kye baatemayo." 
Numbers13:25 Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku amakumi ana, abakessi baakomawo okuva mu kuketta ensi." 
Numbers13:26 Ne bajja eri Musa, Aroni n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli e Kadesi mu ddungu ly'e Parani. Ne bababuulira n'ekibiina kyonna ebintu nga bwe byagenda, ne babalaga ebibala by'omu nsi eyo." 
Numbers13:27 Musa ne bamugamba nti: “Twatuuka mu nsi gye mwatutuma, mu mazima ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki; bino bye bibala byayo." 
Numbers13:28 Naye abantu baayo ba maanyi, n'ebibuga biriko ebigo ebinene ennyo. Twalabayo abasibuka mu Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Abaamaleki be bali mu Negevu; Abakitti, Abayebusi n'Abaamori be bali mu nsozi, bo Abakanaani bali kumpi n'ennyanja era ne ku mugga Yorudani.”" 
Numbers13:30 Awo Kalebu n'akkakkanya abantu abaali beetoolodde Musa, n'abagamba nti: “Twambuke, tulye ensi, kubanga mu mazima tusobola okukikola.”" 
Numbers13:31 Naye abalala be yagenda nabo ne bagaana nti: “Tetusobola kulumba bantu bano, kubanga ba maanyi okutusinga.”" 
Numbers13:32 Ne bayogera bubi eri abantu ku nsi gye baali bakesse nga bagamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Ensi gye twaketta ebwebwena abagirimu; abantu be twalabayo ba kiwago; 
Numbers13:33 twalabayo n'Abanefili, bazzukulu ba Anaki, ab'olulyo lw'abawagguufu; ffe tweraba ng'enzige obuzige, era nabo bwe batyo bwe twabalabikira.”" 
Numbers14:1 Ekiro ekyo ekibiina kyonna ne kireekaana, abantu ne batema emiranga." 
Numbers14:2 Abayisirayeli bonna ne beemulugunyiza Musa ne Aroni nga bagamba nti: “Singa nno twafiira mu Misiri oba mu ddungu lino! 
Numbers14:3 Lwaki Omukama yatuleeta mu nsi eno tufe ekitala, bakazi baffe n'abaana batwalibwe ng'omunyago? Okuddayo mu Misiri tekisingako?”" 
Numbers14:4 Ne bagambagana nti: “Twerondemu omukulembeze, tweddireyo mu Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Musa ne Aroni bwe baawulira ekyo, ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe mu maaso g'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers14:6 Naye ye Yoswa, mutabani wa Nuunu ne Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, ababiri mu abo abaali bakesse ensi, ne bayuza ebyambalo byabwe," 
Numbers14:7 ne bagamba Abayisirayeli bonna abaali bakuŋŋaanye nti: “Ensi gye twetooloola ne tugyekkaanya, nnungi nnyo." 
Numbers14:8 Omukama bw'anaaba atusaasidde, ajja kutuyingiza mu nsi eyo, ajja kugituwa, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Numbers14:9 Naye muleke kujeemera Mukama, era eky'okutya abantu b'omu nsi eyo mukiveeko kubanga tuyinza okubamira obugobo. Tebakyalina buyambi na bumu; Omukama ali naffe; muleke kubatya.”" 
Numbers14:10 Naye ekibiina ne kyogera ku ky'okubakuba amayinja. Awo ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kirabika ku Weema ey'Ensisinkano mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli bonna. 
Numbers14:11 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Abantu bano banaatuusa wa okunnyooma? Banaatuusa wa obutanzikiriza nga mmaze n'okukola obubonero obwo bwonna bwe nakola mu maaso gaabwe? 
Numbers14:12 Ka mbasindikire kawumpuli, mbamalewo; ggwe gwe nzija okukolamu eggwanga eddene ery'amaanyi n'okusinga lino.”" 
Numbers14:13 Musa n'agamba Omukama nti: “Abamisiri, be waggya abantu bano mu makkati gaabwe n'amaanyi go, bajja kuwulira." 
Numbers14:14 Bajja kunyumizaako abantu b'omu nsi eno. Baawulira nti ggwe, Mukama, oli n'abantu bano, bakulaba maaso ku maaso, nti ekire kyo kibali awo bulijjo waggulu, nti obakulemberamu emisana ng'empagi ey'ekire, ate ekiro ng'empagi y'omuliro." 
Numbers14:15 Kale nno singa abantu bano onoobatta olumu, ab'amawanga abaawulira ebikwogerwako bajja kugamba nti:" 
Numbers14:16 ‘Omukama yalemwa okuyingiza abantu bano mu nsi gye yabalayirira, kyeyava abasanjagira mu ddungu.’" 
Numbers14:17 Kano ke kaseera amaanyi g'Omukama geeyoleke, nga bwe walayira n'ogamba nti:" 
Numbers14:18 ‘Omukama tasunguwala mangu, ajjudde ekisa, asonyiwa ekyonoono n'obujeemu, naye taleka kibi nga tekibonerezeddwa; abonereza abaana olw'ekibi ky'abazadde baabwe mu bazzukulu okutuusa ku zzadde eryokusatu n'eryokuna.’" 
Numbers14:19 Nkwegayiridde, sonyiwa ekibi ky'abantu bano ng'osinziira ku bukulu bw'ekisa kyo, nga bw'ozze obasaasira okuva lwe baava mu Misiri n'okutuusa kati.”" 
Numbers14:20 Omukama n'ayanukula nti: “Kale mbasonyiye olw'okusaba kwo. 
Numbers14:21 Kyokka, nze nga ndi mulamu, n'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama nga kijjuza ensi yonna," 
Numbers14:22 abantu bonna abaalaba ekitiibwa kyange n'obubonero bwe nakola mu Misiri ne mu ddungu, ne batawulira ddoboozi lyange, naye ne bangeza, emirundi kati kkumi," 
Numbers14:23 teri n'omu agenda kulaba nsi gye nalayirira bajjajjaabwe; ku abo abannyoomye, mpaawo n'omu aligitunulako." 
Numbers14:24 Naye kubanga omuweereza wange Kalebu, endowooza ye ndala, ampeereza n'omutima gwe gwonna, nzija kumutuusa mu nsi eyo gye yalambula, n'ezzadde lye ligenda kugisikira." 
Numbers14:25 Kubanga Abaamaleki n'Abakanaani bali mu biwonvu, enkya mukyuse, mwolekere eddungu, mubalaamirize nga muyita ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa.”" 
Numbers14:26 Omukama n'agamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Numbers14:27 “Ekibiina kino ekibi kinaatuusa wa okunneemulugunyiza? Mpulidde okwemulugunya kw'Abayisirayeli nga banneemulugunyiza. 
Numbers14:28 Kale nno bagambe nti: ‘Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama y'agamba, bye nnyini bye mpulidde nga mwogera, nange bye nzija kubakola:" 
Numbers14:29 Emirambo gyammwe gijja kugenda gigwa mu ddungu lino. Mwenna abaabalibwa okuva ku w'emyaka amakumi abiri n'okwambuka abanneemulugunyiza," 
Numbers14:30 mpaawo n'omu aliyingira mu nsi gye narayira okugibafuulira awaka wammwe, okuggyako Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu." 
Numbers14:31 Abaana bammwe be mwagambye nti baliwambibwa ng'omunyago, bo nno be ndiyingiza ne basanyukira mu nsi mmwe gye mwemansudde." 
Numbers14:32 Naye mmwe emirambo gyammwe gijja kugenda gigwa mu ddungu lino. 
Numbers14:33 Batabani bammwe bajja kubeera balunzi mu ddungu ebbanga lya myaka amakumi ana, nga babonaabona olw'obwamalaaya bwammwe, okutuusa ku mulambo gwammwe ogulisembayo okugwa mu ddungu." 
Numbers14:34 Emyaka amakumi ana gye mujja okumala nga mubonerezebwa olw'ebibi byammwe, nga buli lunaku ku nnaku ana ezaamalwa mu kuketta ensi lusasulibwa mwaka, bwe mutyo lwe mulimanya okumpakanya kiki kye kutegeeza." 
Numbers14:35 Nze Omukama, nze njogedde, bwe ntyo bwe nzija kukola ekibiina kino ekyonoonyi ekinneekobedde. Bajja kuggweerera mu ddungu lino; wano we balifiira.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Bwe batyo abasajja Musa be yali atumye okuketta ensi, abadda ate ne baleetera ekibiina kyonna okumwemulugunyiza, nga boogera bubi ku nsi," 
Numbers14:37 abantu bano abaayogera obubi ku nsi, baakubibwa wansi ne battibwa ekibonerezo mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Numbers14:38 Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu ne Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, mu bonna abaali bagenze okuketta ensi, be bokka abaawonawo." 
Numbers14:39 Musa n'abuulira ebigambo bino Abayisirayeli bonna, abantu ne bakaaba nnyo." 
Numbers14:40 Enkeera ku makya ne basituka, ne bagenda mu nsozi nga bwe bagamba nti: “Twonoonye. Twetegese okwambuka tulage eri ekifo Omukama kye yayogerako.”" 
Numbers14:41 Musa n'abagamba nti: “Lwaki muva ku kigambo ky'Omukama? Tebijja kubalamira. 
Numbers14:42 Temwambuka, anti Omukama tali nammwe; abalabe bammwe bajja kubakubirayo." 
Numbers14:43 Kubanga Abaamaleki n'Abakanaani abali eyo bajja kubasisinkana; kubanga mugaanyi okugondera Omukama, Omukama tajja kubeera nammwe, mujja kufa ekitala.”" 
Numbers14:44 Naye bo mu kwebambalika kwabwe, ne bambuka mu nsozi; yo Ssanduuku y'Endagaano yasigala mu lusiisira, ne Musa teyaseguka." 
Numbers14:45 Abaamaleki n'Abakanaani abaasulanga mu nsozi ne baserengeta ne balumba, ne bagenda nga babakuba okutuusiza ddala e Koruma." 
Numbers15:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers15:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Nga mutuuse mu nsi gye ndibawa, mwe munaabeeranga," 
Numbers15:3 bwe muweerezanga Omukama ebitone n'omuliro, okuva mu ggana oba mu kisibo, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama, ng'ekitambiro ekyokye, oba ng'ekitambiro eky'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ng'ekitambiro ekyeyagalire, oba ng'ekitambiro eky'embaga enkulu," 
Numbers15:4 buli abanga aweerezza ekitambiro Omukama amuweererezangako ekitone ky'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obuweza ekyekkumi ekya efa, nga mutabikiddwamu omuzigo oguweza ekyokuna ekya yini." 
Numbers15:5 “ ‘Ku buli kaliga olw'ekitambiro ekyokye oba ekitambiro ekirala otegekerangako evviini eweza ekyokuna ekya yini ng'ekitone eky'okuyiwa. 
Numbers15:6 Ku ndiga ennume otegekerangako obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obuweza ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa ng'ekitone eky'obuwunga, ng'obuwunga butabikiddwamu omuzigo oguweza kyakusatu ekya yini," 
Numbers15:7 n'oleeterako ekyokusatu ekya yini eky'evviini ng'ekitone eky'okuyiwa. Obiweereze ng'akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama. 
Numbers15:8 “ ‘Oba nte ennume gy'oweerezza Omukama ng'ekitambiro ekyokye oba ng'ekitambiro ekirala, olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ng'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu," 
Numbers15:9 ku nte ennume otegekerangako obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obuweza ebyekkumi bisatu ebya efa, nga mutabikiddwamu omuzigo oguweza kyakubiri ekya yini olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga." 
Numbers15:10 Oleeterangako n'evviini olw'ekitone eky'okuyiwa eweza ekyokubiri ekya yini, ebitone ebiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Numbers15:11 Bw'otyo bw'okolanga ku buli nte ennume, n'endiga ennume, ku buliga ne ku mbuzi." 
Numbers15:12 “ ‘Ku buli kimu ku bitambiro byonna bye munaaweerezanga, munaakolanga bwe mutyo." 
Numbers15:13 Buli muzaaliranwa yenna entereeza eyo gy'agobereranga ng'aweereza ekitambiro ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Numbers15:14 Mu mazadde gammwe gonna, omugwira yenna, oba omulala yenna abeera mu mmwe, bw'aweerezanga ekitambiro ekiwonge n'omuliro, ng'akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama, akolanga mu ngeri ye emu nga mmwe." 
Numbers15:15 Ekibiina kijja kubanga n'amateeka ge gamu, ku mmwe ne ku bagwira. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna. Mmwe n'abagwira mu maaso g'Omukama muliba be bamu." 
Numbers15:16 Amateeka n'emikolo biriba bye bimu eri mmwe n'eri abagwira abasula mu mmwe.’ ” 
Numbers15:17 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers15:18 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Nga mutuuse mu nsi gye mbatwala," 
Numbers15:19 bwe mulyanga ku migaati gy'omu nsi eyo, Omukama mumuweererezangako ekitone." 
Numbers15:20 Ku butta bwe musookanga okugoya oggyangako kakkeeki n'okaweereza ng'ekitone ekivudde mu gguuliro lyo. 
Numbers15:21 Mu mazadde gammwe gonna muweerezanga Omukama ekitone kino okuva ku butta obusooka okugoyebwa. 
Numbers15:22 “ ‘Ku biragiro ebyo Omukama by'agambye Musa, bwe mubeerangako bye mutatuusizza olw'obutanwa," 
Numbers15:23 ku ebyo Omukama bye yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa, okuva ku lunaku Omukama lwe yasooka okulagira ne gye bulijja mu mazadde gammwe gonna," 
Numbers15:24 ng'oli ataniddwa butanwa, nga n'abantu tebakirabye, ekibiina kyonna kiweerezanga ente ennume ento olw'ekitambiro ekyokye, ng'akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama, awamu, ng'etteeka bwe ligamba, n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa, era n'embuzi ennume olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi." 
Numbers15:25 Kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli, olwo kiribasonyiyibwanga, kubanga baatanwa butanwa, ate nga kati bawongedde Omukama ekitambiro n'omuliro olw'ensobi zaabwe, ne baweereza n'ekitambiro olw'ekibi." 
Numbers15:26 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli n'abagwira abali mu bo bagenda kusonyiyibwa, kubanga omusango gukwata bantu bonna olw'obutanwa bwabwe." 
Numbers15:27 “ ‘Oba omuntu omu yekka y'aliba akoze ekibi mu butanwa, oyo aweerezanga embuzi enduusi ey'omwaka ogumu olw'ekibi kye." 
Numbers15:28 Kabona aliddaabiriza ew'Omukama olw'omuntu oyo eyagwa mu nsobi mu butanwa, ng'okuddaabiriza kuwedde, alisonyiyibwa." 
Numbers15:29 Etteeka likwata bombi, omuzaaliranwa Omuyisirayeli n'omugwira, bwe baba bayonoonye mu butanwa." 
Numbers15:30 “ ‘Naye omuntu aliba ayonoonye ng'agenderedde, abeere munnansi oba mugwira, abeera avumye Katonda; omuntu oyo wa kukutulwanga ku bantu be." 
Numbers15:31 Kubanga yagaya ekigambo ky'Omukama, n'amenya ebiragiro bye, ky'anaavanga akutulwako; omuntu oyo anaabanga n'omusango.’ ”" 
Numbers15:32 Olwatuuka, Abayisirayeli baali bali mu ddungu, ne basanga omuntu atyaba enku ku lunaku olwa Sabbaato." 
Numbers15:33 Abaamusanga ng'atyaba enku ne bamuleeta eri Musa ne Aroni n'ekibiina kyonna," 
Numbers15:34 ne bamuggalira mu kaduukulu nga tebamanyi kya kumukolera. 
Numbers15:35 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Omuntu oyo wa kuttibwa; ekibiina kyonna kimukube amayinja ebweru w'olusiisira.” 
Numbers15:36 Ne bamufulumya ebweru, ne bamukuba amayinja; ne bamutta, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers15:38 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Mu mazadde gammwe gonna ku mikugiro gy'ebyambalo byamwe mutungirangako obututtwa, nga buli katuttwa mukatungira ku mukugiro n'ewuzi eza kakobe." 
Numbers15:39 Bwe munaatunulanga ku bututtwa bunaabajjukizanga ebiragiro by'Omukama byonna, ne mubikwatanga muleme kukola bwamalaaya nga mugoberera amaddu g'emitima gyammwe n'amaaso gammwe." 
Numbers15:40 Bwe mutyo mulijjukira okukwata ebiragiro byange byonna, ne mubeera batukuvu mu maaso ga Katonda wammwe." 
Numbers15:41 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mbeere Katonda wammwe. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
Numbers16:1 Kora muzzukulu wa Leevi, mutabani wa Yizuwari, mutabani wa Kewati, ng'ali ne bazzukulu ba Rubeni: Datani ne Abiramu, batabani ba Eliyabu, ne Oni mutabani wa Peleti, beekulumbaza" 
Numbers16:2 ne basitukira mu Musa wamu n'Abayisirayeli bibiri mu ataano, abaali abakulembeze mu kibiina, abakiise mu lukiiko era abantu ab'ekitiibwa." 
Numbers16:3 Bonna wamu ne balumba Musa ne Aroni nga bagamba nti: “Mweyitiriza! Kubanga n'ekibiina kyonna kitukuvu, ne mu bo Omukama mw'ali. Lwaki mwefuula abakulu ku kibiina ky'Omukama?”" 
Numbers16:4 Musa bwe yakiwulira, n'agwa wansi ku maaso ge," 
Numbers16:5 n'agamba Kora n'abagoberezi be bonna nti: “Enkya Omukama anaamanyisa oyo gw'ayita owuwe, oyo omutukuvu; gw'anaaba alonze anaamusembeza w'ali." 
Numbers16:6 Kora n'abagoberezi bo mwenna mukole kino: 
Numbers16:7 enkya muddire ebyoterezo mubisseemu omuliro n'obubaani mu maaso g'Omukama; yenna gw'anaaba alonze, oyo y'anaaba omutukuvu. Naye, bazzukulu ba Leevi, ekyo kimala!”" 
Numbers16:8 Musa n'agamba Kora nti: “Muwulire, bazzukulu ba Leevi." 
Numbers16:9 Mmwe tekibamalira Katonda wa Yisirayeli mmwe okubaawula mu kibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli, n'abayunga ku ye muweereze mu Kisulo ky'Omukama, muyimirire mu maaso g'abantu bonna nga muweereza mu kifo kyabwe?" 
Numbers16:10 Ggwe yakwesembereza ne baganda bo bonna bazzukulu ba Leevi, ate kati oyagala n'obwakabona kubwezza?" 
Numbers16:11 Ggwe n'abagoberezi bo Omukama gwe mujeemedde. Aroni ye ani okumwemulugunyaamu?” 
Numbers16:12 Musa n'atumya Datani ne Abiramu batabani ba Eliyabu, bo ne baanukula nti: “Tetujja kujja." 
Numbers16:13 Ggwe tekikumalira okulaba nga watuggya mu nsi eyali ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, otuttire mu ddungu; ate kati oyagala kudda ku ffe ofuge?" 
Numbers16:14 Kituufu, tewatuyingiza mu nsi mukulukuta migga gya mata na mubisi gwa njuki, wadde okutuwa eby'obusika byaffe: ebibanja n'ennimiro z'emizabbibu. Kati oyagala kulimbalimba bantu bano? Tetujja kujja.”" 
Numbers16:15 Musa n'asunguwala nnyo, n'agamba Omukama nti: “Ebitone byabwe tobitunuulira; tewali gwe nali nzigyeko wadde akalogoyi ke, tewabangawo gwe nali nkoze bubi.”" 
Numbers16:16 Musa n'agamba Kora nti: “Enkya ggwe n'abagoberezi bo bonna muyimirire mu maaso g'Omukama wamu ne Aroni. 
Numbers16:17 Buli omu addire ekyoterezo kye asseeko obubaani muweereze Omukama ebyoterezo bikumi bibiri mu ataano. Ggwe ne Aroni buli omu abeere n'ekyoterezo kye.” 
Numbers16:18 Buli omu n'akwata ekyoterezo kye, n'assaamu omuliro n'obubaani, ne bayimirira ne Musa ne Aroni ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers16:19 Kora bwe yamala okukuŋŋaanya ekibiina kye kyonna ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano okubawakanya, ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kirabikira ekibiina kyonna." 
Numbers16:20 Omukama n'agamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Numbers16:21 “Mweyawule ku kibiina kino kyonna, ŋŋenda kubasaanyaawo kaakati.”" 
Numbers16:22 Bo ne bagwa nga beevuunise ku maaso gaabwe, ne beegayirira nti: “Ayi Katonda, Katonda awa obulamu buli muntu, onoonyiigira ekibiina kyonna sso ng'akoze ekibi ali omu bw'ati?”" 
Numbers16:23 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers16:24 “Lagira abantu bonna beesege ekisulo kya Kora, Datani ne Abiramu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Musa n'asituka n'agenda eri Datani ne Abiramu, abakadde bonna aba Yisirayeli ne bamugoberera." 
Numbers16:26 N'agamba ekibiina nti: “Mwesege weema z'abasajja bano ababi; temukwata ku byabwe, sikulwa nga musaanyizibwawo wamu nabo olw'ebibi byabwe byonna.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ne bava awaali ekisulo kya Kora, Datani ne Abiramu baali bafulumye nga bayimiridde ku miryango gya weema zaabwe wamu ne bakazi baabwe ne batabani baabwe n'amabujje gaabwe." 
Numbers16:28 Musa n'agamba nti: “Kuno kwe munaategeerera nti Omukama ye yantuma nkole byonna bye mulaba, si ntegeka zange ku bwange:" 
Numbers16:29 abasajja bano bwe banaafa enfa eya bulijjo, ne babonerezebwa nga bwe kitera okugwa ku bantu abalala, olwo ng'Omukama si ye yantuma." 
Numbers16:30 Naye Omukama bw'anaakolawo ekintu ekiggya, ettaka ne lyasama ne libamira n'ebyabwe byonna, ne bakka emagombe nga balamu, munaategeera nti abantu bano baanyoomye Omukama.”" 
Numbers16:31 Aba yaakamala okwogera, ettaka ne lyeyasaamu awo we baali bayimiridde;" 
Numbers16:32 bwe lyayasama, ne libamira wamu n'ebyabwe byonna, n'abagoberezi ba Kora na byonna bye baali balina." 
Numbers16:33 Ne bakkirira emagombe nga balamu, ettaka ne libabikka, ne bazikirira, ne babulawo mu kibiina." 
Numbers16:34 Bwe baawulira emiranga gyabwe, Abayisirayeli abaali bayimiridde awo ne baddukawo nga baleekaana nti: “Ka oti, naffe ettaka ligenda kutumira!”" 
Numbers16:35 Omuliro ne guva ew'Omukama ne gusenkenya abasajja ebikumi ebibiri mu ataano abaali baweereza obubaani. 
Numbers17:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers17:2 “Lagira Eleyazari mutabani wa Aroni kabona aggye ebyoterezo ebiri mu muyonga, amanda agasaasaanyize walako, kubanga ebyoterezo bitukuvu," 
Numbers17:3 bye byoterezo eby'abasajja abaayonoona ne batunda obulamu bwabwe. Bikubeekube obikolemu embaati zibikkenga ku mwaliiro, kubanga baabiweerezza Mukama era bitukuvu. Bijja kusigala ng'akabonero Abayisirayeli kwe banaalabiranga.”" 
Numbers17:4 Eleyazari kabona n'atwala ebyoterezo eby'ekikomo, omuliro be gwasiriiza bye baali baweerezza, ne babikubaakubamu embaati ez'okubikka ku mwaliiro," 
Numbers17:5 ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde ng'ayita mu Musa. Abayisirayeli zinaabajjukizanga nti omuntu owa bulijjo atali muzzukulu wa Aroni takkirizibwa kuweereza Mukama bubaani, sikulwa nga naye abeera nga Kora n'abagoberezi be." 
Numbers17:6 Enkeera ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kyemulugunyiza Musa ne Aroni nga bagamba nti: “Mmwe mwasse abantu b'Omukama.” 
Numbers17:7 Ekibiina bwe kyali kikuŋŋaana okujeemera Musa ne Aroni, ne bakyukira eri Weema ey'Ensisinkano; ekire ne kigibikka, ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kirabika." 
Numbers17:8 Musa ne Aroni ne bajja mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Numbers17:9 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers17:10 “Muviire ekibiina kino, kubanga ŋŋenda kubazikiriza kaakati.” Ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe." 
Numbers17:11 Musa n'agamba Aroni nti: “Ggya omuliro ku mwaliiro ogusse mu kyoterezo, oteekeko n'obubaani, ogende mangu eri abantu, oddaabirize ku lwabwe; kubanga obusungu bw'Omukama busituse, ekibonerezo kitandise.”" 
Numbers17:12 Aroni naye bwe yakola; n'ayanguwako, n'agenda mu kibiina wakati, ekibonerezo kyali kitandise, n'aweereza obubaani, n'addaabiriza ku lw'abantu;" 
Numbers17:13 n'ayimirira wakati w'abafudde n'abalamu, ekibonerezo ne kikoma." 
Numbers17:14 Abattibwa ekibonerezo baali omutwalo gumu mu enkumi nnya mu lusanvu, nga totaddeeko abo abaali bazikiridde olwa Kora." 
Numbers17:15 Aroni n'addayo eri Musa ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano kubanga ekibonerezo kyali kikomye. 
Numbers17:16 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers17:17 “Yogera eri Abayisirayeli obaggyeko emiggo kkumi n'ebiri, omuggo gumu okuva ku buli mukulu wa nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Ku buli muggo owandiikeko erinnya lya nnyini gwo." 
Numbers17:18 Ku muggo gwa Leevi kw'oba owandiika erinnya lya Aroni, kubanga buli mukulu wa kika kya bajjajjaabwe wa kubeera n'omuggo gumu." 
Numbers17:19 Giteeke mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano mu maaso g'Endagaano we nkusisinkana. 
Numbers17:20 Mu abo gwe nnaaba nnonze, omuggo gwe gujja kutojjera; mu ngeri eyo nzija kweggyako okukwemulugunyiza kuno okutatadde okuva mu Bayisirayeli.”" 
Numbers17:21 Musa n'ayogera eri Abayisirayeli, abakulu baabwe mu buli nnyumba ya bajjajjaabwe n'amuwa omuggo; gye miggo kkumi n'ebiri, nga n'ogwa Aroni mwe guli," 
Numbers17:22 Musa n'agissa mu Weema y'Endagaano mu maaso g'Omukama. 
Numbers17:23 Enkeera bwe yakomawo mu Weema y'Endagaano, yasanga omuggo gwa Aroni, ogw'omu kika kya Leevi, nga gwasibuse, ne gutojjera, ne gumulisa n'okumulisa, ne gussaako ebibala eby'endoozi." 
Numbers17:24 Musa n'aggyayo emiggo gyonna mu maaso g'Omukama n'agireeta eri Abayisirayeli bonna; ne bagiraba, buli omu n'aggyawo omuggo gwe." 
Numbers17:25 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Omuggo gwa Aroni guzzeeyo mu maaso g'Endagaano gukuumirwe eyo, nga ke kabonero eri abajeemu. Kino kijja kukomya okunneemulugunyiza kwabwe, baleme kufa.”" 
Numbers17:26 Musa n'akola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde. 
Numbers17:27 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba Musa nti: “Tujja kufa! Tuggwaawo, tuggwaawo!" 
Numbers17:28 Buli yenna asembera eri Ekisulo ky'Omukama wa kufa. Tuli ba kufa ffenna?” 
Numbers18:1 Omukama yagamba Aroni nti: “Ggwe ne batabani bo, n'ennyumba ya kitaawo, mmwe muneetikkanga omusango gw'ebyonoono by'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu; naye ggwe ne batabani bo mwekka mmwe muneetikkanga omusango gw'ebyonoono by'omu mirimu gy'obwakabona." 
Numbers18:2 Oleetanga baganda bo ab'omu kika kya Leevi, ekika kya kitaawo, ne bakuyambako ng'oweereza mu Weema y'Endagaano." 
Numbers18:3 Abaleevi bakwatanga by'onoobanga obakuutidde, n'emirimu gyonna egy'omu Weema be banaagikolanga, kyokka nga tebasemberera bitukuvu eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu ne ku mwaliiro, sikulwa nga ggwe nabo mufa." 
Numbers18:4 Bajja kukwegattako bakole omulimu gw'okulabirira Weema ey'Ensisinkano, bakole emirimu gyonna egidda ku Weema; abantu aba bulijjo tebabasemberanga." 
Numbers18:5 Mujja kulabiriranga Ekifo Ekitukuvu n'omwaliiro Abayisirayeli baleme kusunguwalirwa nate. 
Numbers18:6 Nze naggya baganda bammwe Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli ne mbabawa ng'ekirabo, abantu abasingiddwa Omukama, baweerezenga mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers18:7 Kyokka ggwe ne batabani bo mwekka mmwe munaakolanga obwakabona ne ku byonna ebidda ku kuweereza ku mwaliiro, ne ku biri munda w'olutimbe. Omulimu gw'obwakabona ngubawa nga kirabo; omuntu owa bulijjo asemberanga okumpi n'Ekifo Ekitukuvu, wa kuttibwanga.”" 
Numbers18:8 Omukama yagamba Aroni nti: “Nze kennyini nkukwasizza ebitone byonna ebimpeerezebwa. Byonna ebitone ebitukuvu Abayisirayeli bye bampeereza mbikuwadde ggwe ne batabani bo ng'omugabo gwo, ekitundu kyo eky'olubeerera." 
Numbers18:9 Ojja kugabananga ku bitukuvu ennyo ebiggyiddwa ku biwonge n'omuliro. Buli kirabo kyonna ekitukuvu ennyo ekimpeerezebwa, ng'ekitone eky'obuwunga n'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'olw'omusango, kiddira ggwe ne batabani bo." 
Numbers18:10 Okiryanga ng'ekintu ekitukuvu; buli musajja ayinza okukiryako; okitwalanga nga kitukuvu. 
Numbers18:11 “Bino nabyo binaabanga bibyo: buli kinassibwanga ebbali ku birabo by'ebitone eby'okuwuuba eby'Abayisirayeli. Mbikuwadde ggwe ne batabani bo ne bawala bo, ng'omugabo gwammwe ogw'olubeerera. Buli mulongoofu mu nnyumba yo ayinza okulyangako." 
Numbers18:12 Omuzigo gw'oliva ogusingira ddala obulungi n'evviini n'eŋŋano byonna ebisingira ddala obulungi, bye baleetera Omukama ng'ebibala ebisooka mbikuwadde." 
Numbers18:13 Ebibala byonna eby'ettaka ebisooka bye baleetera Omukama, bibyo. Buli mulongoofu mu nnyumba yo ayinza okulyangako." 
Numbers18:14 Buli kyonna mu Yisirayeli ekiwongeddwa Omukama kiba kikyo. 
Numbers18:15 “Buli kiggulanda kyonna eky'olubuto mu bantu oba mu nsolo, kye basingira Omukama, kiba kikyo; kyokka omuggulanda omulenzi na buli kiggulanda ekisajja eky'ensolo eteri nnongoofu obinunulanga." 
Numbers18:16 Bw'okinunula nga kiwezezza omwezi gumu, onoowanga ssente z'omuwendo gwe wagibalirira ogwa sekeli eza ffeeza ttaano, ng'ogerera ku sekeli y'omu Kitukuvu ezitowa gera abiri." 
Numbers18:17 Naye ekiggulanda bwe kiba kya nte ennume, endiga oba embuzi, ebyo tebiinunulibwenga, kubanga bitukuvu. Omusaayi gwabyo ogumansiranga ku mwaliiro n'amasavu n'ogookya, ng'ekitambiro ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Numbers18:18 Ennyama yaabyo eyo eneebanga yiyo, era bwe kityo n'ekifuba eky'ekitone eky'okuwuuba, n'ekisambi ekya ddyo." 
Numbers18:19 Buli kitundu ekissibwa ebbali ku bitone ebitukuvu Abayisirayeli bye baweereza Omukama, mbikuwadde ggwe ne batabani bo ne bawala bo; kyammwe ng'omugabo gwammwe ogw'olubeerera, ndagaano ya munnyo mu maaso g'Omukama, ku ggwe n'ezzadde lyo emirembe gyonna.”" 
Numbers18:20 Omukama n'agamba Aroni nti: “Mu nsi yaabwe temulibeerako na busika, era temulibaako na mugabo mu bo. Nze mugabo gwo, nze busika bwo mu Bayisirayeli." 
Numbers18:21 Bazzukulu ba Leevi mbawadde ebyekkumi byonna ebya Yisirayeli, bye binaaba obusika bwabwe ng'empeera olw'okuweereza kwe bampeerezaamu mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers18:22 N'okuva kati Abayisirayeli tebaasembererenga Weema ey'Ensisinkano, sikulwa nga beetikka omusango gw'ekibi ne bafa." 
Numbers18:23 “Abaleevi bokka be b'okumpeereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, era be baneetikkanga omusango gw'ebyonoono mu yo. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera mu mazadde gammwe gonna. Mu Bayisirayeli si ba kubeerako kya busika kyonna kye bafuna," 
Numbers18:24 kubanga mbawadde ebyekkumi Abayisirayeli bye baweereza ew'Omukama ng'ekitone. Kyenvudde ŋŋamba ku bo nti: mu Bayisirayeli tebalibaako na kya busika kyonna kye bafuna.” 
Numbers18:25 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers18:26 “Gamba Abaleevi nti: ‘Bwe mufunanga ebyekkumi okuva ku Bayisirayeli, bye nabawa ng'obusika bwammwe, ate mutoolangako ekyekkumi ne mukiwa Omukama ng'ekitone." 
Numbers18:27 Ekitone kyammwe kiribabalirwa ng'eŋŋano gye muwaddeyo okuva mu gguuliro lyammwe n'ekipimo ekijjudde okuva mu ssogolero lyammwe. 
Numbers18:28 Bwe mutyo nammwe mulibaako ekitone kye muweereza Omukama okuva ku byekkumi bye mufuna okuva ku Bayisirayeli. Ekitone ky'Omukama ekiva ku byekkumi bino mukikwasanga Aroni kabona. 
Numbers18:29 Byonna bye muggya ku byekkumi ebibaweereddwa, mulondobangako ekitundu ekisingira ddala obulungi ng'ekitone ky'Omukama." 
Numbers18:30 “Bagambe nti: ‘Bwe munaaweerezanga ekitone ekisinga obulungi, ekyo kinaabalibwanga ng'ebibala ebivudde mu gguuliro lyammwe ne mu ssogolero lyammwe." 
Numbers18:31 Ekisigalawo mmwe n'ab'omu maka gammwe muyinza okukiriira wonna we mwagala, kubanga kino ye mpeera yammwe olw'okuweereza mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
Numbers18:32 Bwe munaaweerezanga ekitundu ekisinga obulungi, temuliba na musango; olwo ebitukuvu ebiweerezebwa Abayisirayeli muliba temubijaajaamizza, n'olw'ekyo temulifa.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Omukama yagamba Musa ne Aroni nti: 
Numbers19:2 “Eno ye ntereeza y'etteeka ly'Omukama gy'alagidde: Lagira Abayisirayeli baleete gy'oli ennyana eya kawemba etaliiko kamogo, etayambazibwanga ku kikoligo," 
Numbers19:3 ogiwe kabona Eleyazari; ya kutwalibwa ebweru w'olusiisira ettirwe mu maaso ge. 
Numbers19:4 Eleyazari kabona anannyika olunwe mu musaayi gwayo n'agumansira emirundi musanvu mu maaso g'omulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Numbers19:5 Ejja kwokerebwa awo mu maaso ge, byonna: eddiba, ennyama yaayo, omusaayi n'obusa; abyokyanga." 
Numbers19:6 Kabona anaaddira akati k'entolookyo, yissopo n'ewuzi entwakaavu n'abikasuka ku nte eyokebwa mu muliro." 
Numbers19:7 Oluvannyuma anaayoza ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba omubiri, olwo n'alyoka ayingira mu lusiisira; kyokka ajja kusigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Numbers19:8 N'oli anaagyokya, anaayoza ebyambalo bye n'anaaba n'omubiri n'amazzi, era naye ajja kusigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Numbers19:9 Omusajja, nga mulongoofu, anaakuŋŋaanya evvu ly'ente n'aliyiwa ebweru w'olusiisira mu kifo ekirongoofu. Ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli kikuumanga evvu eryo; lijja kweyambisibwanga mu mazzi ag'okutukuza; lya mukolo gwa kutukuzaako kibi." 
Numbers19:10 Anaatwala evvu ly'ente bw'anaamala okwoza ebyambalo bye, naye ajja kusigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera ku Bayisirayeli n'abagwira abali mu bo." 
Numbers19:11 “Buli akwatanga ku mulambo gw'omuntu, anaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:12 Ku lunaku olwokusatu n'olwomusanvu aneetukuzanga n'amazzi ago, olwo anaabanga mulongoofu. Bw'aba nga teyeetukuzza na mazzi ago ku lwokusatu ne ku lwomusanvu, anaasigalanga tali mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:13 Buli yenna akwatanga ku muntu omufu, n'ateetukuza, anaabanga ajaajaamizza Ekisulo ky'Omukama. Oyo akutulwanga ku bantu ba Yisirayeli, kubanga tamansiddwako mazzi gatukuza; taliba mulongoofu, era obutali bulongoofu bwe bulimusigalako." 
Numbers19:14 “Lino lye tteeka ku muntu afiiridde mu weema: bonna abayingiranga mu weema eyo, na bonna ababeerangamu, banaabanga si balongoofu okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Numbers19:15 Ekintu ekitalina kisaanikira, oba ekitasibiddwako ku mumwa, kinaabanga si kirongoofu." 
Numbers19:16 Omuntu ng'ali ebweru bw'anaakwatanga ku mulambo gw'omuntu attiddwa n'ekitala, oba afudde obufi, oba bw'akwatanga ku ggumba ly'omuntu, oba ku malaalo, anaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:17 “Okutukuza omuntu atali mulongoofu, otoolanga ku vvu ly'ekitambiro ekyokebwa olw'ekibi, n'olisssa mu nsumbi, n'ossaamu amazzi ag'oku luzzi." 
Numbers19:18 Mu mazzi ago omuntu, nga mulongoofu, annyikangamu yissopo n'amansira ku weema yonna na byonna ebirimu n'abantu ababangawo, ne ku oyo abanga akutte ku magumba g'omuntu, oba ku malaalo, oba ku muntu eyattibwa oba eyafa obufi." 
Numbers19:19 Omuntu omulongoofu amansiranga atali mulongoofu ku lwokusatu ne ku lwomusanvu; ku lwomusanvu n'amutukuza. Atukuzibwa anaabanga n'ayoza n'ebyambalo bye, akawungeezi anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:20 Omuntu atali mulongoofu bw'ataatukuzibwenga, wa kukutulwanga ku kibiina, kubanga aliba ajaajaamizza Ekisulo ky'Omukama, amazzi agatukuza tegamumansiddwako, awo nno si mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:21 Lino tteeka lya lubeerera gye bali. N'oyo yennyini amansidde amazzi agatukuza, ayozanga ebyambalo bye; na buli yenna akwatanga ku mazzi agatukuza, anaabanga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Numbers19:22 Atali mulongoofu kyonna ky'akwatako nakyo tekiibenga kirongoofu; n'akikwatako naye taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi.” 
Numbers20:1 Mu mwezi omubereberye Abayisirayeli n'ekibiina kyonna ne batuuka mu ddungu ly'e Zini, ne basigala e Kadesi. Miriyamu n'afiira eyo, n'aziikibwa eyo." 
Numbers20:2 Ekibiina bwe kyabulwa amazzi, ne bakuŋŋaana okulumba Musa ne Aroni" 
Numbers20:3 ne bayombesa Musa, ne bagamba nti: “Singa nno twafa ku luli baganda baffe lwe baafiira mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Numbers20:4 Lwaki waleeta ekibiina ky'Omukama mu ddungu, ffe n'ebisolo byaffe tufiire muno?" 
Numbers20:5 Lwaki watwambusa n'otuggya mu Misiri, n'otuleeta mu kifo kino eky'akabi, mw'otoyinza kusiga, omutadda na mikunyu na mizabbibu, wadde amakomamawanga? Temuli na mazzi ga kunywa!”" 
Numbers20:6 Musa ne Aroni, ne bava awali ekibiina, ne bajja ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe, ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kibalabikira." 
Numbers20:7 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers20:8 “Kwata omuggo, ggwe ne Aroni muganda wo mukuŋŋaanye ekibiina; mwogere eri olwazi awo mu maaso gaabwe, lwo lujja kufumbukula amazzi gaalwo. Mujja kuggya amazzi mu lwazi, abantu banywe n'ebisolo.”" 
Numbers20:9 Musa n'akwata omuggo, ogwali mu maaso g'Omukama, ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde." 
Numbers20:10 Musa ne Aroni ne bakuŋŋaanya abantu mu maaso g'olwazi, n'abagamba nti: “Muwulire, mmwe abajeemu; ffe tubaggyire amazzi mu lwazi luno?”" 
Numbers20:11 Musa bwe yasitula omukono n'akuba olwazi emirundi ebiri n'omuggo, amazzi nkumu ne gafumbukuka, abantu ne banywa n'ebisolo." 
Numbers20:12 Omukama n'agamba Musa ne Aroni nti: “Kubanga temwanneesize kimala, ne mutampa kitiibwa ng'omutukuvu mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli, abantu bano temujja kubayingiza mu nsi gye ndibawa.”" 
Numbers20:13 Ge gano amazzi g'e Meriba, Abayisirayeli gye baayombesa Omukama, naye n'abeeraga nga bw'ali omutukuvu mu bo." 
Numbers20:14 Musa n'atuma ababaka ewa kabaka wa Edomu ng'ayima e Kadesi bamugambe nti: “Muganda wo Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Omanyi ebizibu ebyatutuukirira," 
Numbers20:15 nga bajjajjaffe bwe baaserengeta mu Misiri, ne tubeera eyo ebbanga eggwanvu, Abamisiri ne batubonyaabonya nga bwe baakola bajjajjaffe;" 
Numbers20:16 naye bwe twawanjagira Omukama, n'atuwulira, n'atuma malayika eyatuggyayo mu Misiri. Kati tuutuno wano mu kibuga ky'e Kadesi, ekiri ku nkingi z'ensi yo." 
Numbers20:17 Tukwegayiridde tukkirize tukutulire mu nsi yo. Tetujja kuyita mu nnimiro oba mu mizabbibu, wadde okunywa amazzi mu nzizi zo; tujja kutambula nga tetukyamye ku ddyo oba ku kkono, nga tugoba oluguudo lwa kabaka lwokka, okutuusa lwe tunaakutula ensalo zo.’ ”" 
Numbers20:18 Naye Edomu n'amwanukula nti: “Tojja kukutulira wano, bw'onoogezaako, tujja kuvaayo n'ebitala nkulumbe.”" 
Numbers20:19 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba nti: “Nzija kugoberera kkubo ddene lyokka, singa nze n'amagana gange tunaanywa ku mazzi go, ŋŋenda kugasasulira. Nsaba kimu kyokka, nkutulire wano ku bigere.”" 
Numbers20:20 Edomu n'ayanukula nti: “Tookutulire wano.” Amangu ago n'afuluma okumulumba n'eggye eddene ate ery'amaanyi. 
Numbers20:21 Edomu bwe yamugaana okusalira mu nsi ye, ne Yisirayeli n'akyuka n'amuviira." 
Numbers20:22 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne basitula ne bava e Kadesi, ne batuuka ku lusozi Ori," 
Numbers20:23 Omukama n'ayogera ne Musa ne Aroni ku lusozi Ori oluliraanye Edomu, n'amugamba nti:" 
Numbers20:24 “Aroni ajja kufa yeegatte ku bantu be. Tajja kuyingira nsi gye nnaawa Abayisirayeli, kubanga mwembi mwajeemera ekiragiro kyange ku mazzi g'e Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Ddira Aroni ne Eleyazari mutabani we obambuse ku lusozi Ori. 
Numbers20:26 Aroni mwambulemu ebyambalo bye obyambaze Eleyazari mutabani we, kubanga Aroni ajja kufiira eyo yeegatte ku bantu be.”" 
Numbers20:27 Musa yakola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde, ne bayambuka olusozi Ori ng'ekibiina kyonna kiraba." 
Numbers20:28 Musa n'ayambulamu Aroni ebyambalo bye, n'abyambaza Eleyazari mutabani we. Aroni n'afiira eyo ku ntikko y'olusozi. Musa ne Eleyazari ne baserengeta wansi w'olusozi." 
Numbers20:29 Ekibiina kyonna bwe kyamanya nga Aroni afudde, ennyumba yonna eya Yisirayeli n'emukaabira okumala ennaku amakumi asatu." 
Numbers21:1 Kabaka Omukanaani ow'e Aradi, eyali abeera mu Negevu, bwe yawulira nti Yisirayeli yali ajja ng'agoba ekkubo erya Atarimu, n'amutabaala, n'amunyagamu n'abasibe." 
Numbers21:2 Yisirayeli ne yeetema ew'Omukama nti: “Bw'onompa abantu bano mu mikono gyange, ebibuga byabwe nzija kubizikiriza obutalekaamu kantu.”" 
Numbers21:3 Omukama n'awulira okwegayirira kwa Yisirayeli, n'amuwa Omukanaani. Yisirayeli n'abatta, ebibuga byabwe n'abisaanyizaawo ddala. Ekifo ekyo kwe kukituuma Koruma." 
Numbers21:4 Ne bava ku lusozi Ori, ne bakwata ekkubo eridda ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa, balyoke beetooloole ensi ya Edomu. Mu kkubo nga bakooye okugumiikiriza," 
Numbers21:5 ne beemulugunyiza Katonda ne Musa, ne bagamba nti: “Lwaki watuggya e Misiri tufiire mu ddungu? Tewali mugaati, temuli mazzi; n'akamere kano omutali kantu katutamye.”" 
Numbers21:6 Omukama kwe kusindika mu bantu emisota egy'obusagwa, ne gibojja abantu, bangi mu Yisirayeli ne bafa." 
Numbers21:7 Ne bajja eri Musa ne bagamba nti: “Twakoze ekibi, bwe twemulugunyirizza Omukama naawe; saba ew'Omukama, Omukama atuggyeko emisota.” Musa n'asabira abantu." 
Numbers21:8 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Kola omusota ogw'omuliro oguwanike ku mpagi, buli abojjeddwa bw'anaagutunulako ng'awona.”" 
Numbers21:9 Awo Musa n'akola omusota ogw'ekikomo, n'aguwanika ku mpagi. Oli bwe yabojjebwanga omusota, n'amala atunula ku musota ogw'ekikomo, ng'alama." 
Numbers21:10 Abayisirayeli ne bava awo ne basiisira e Oboti; 
Numbers21:11 ne bava e Oboti ne basiisira e Yiye-Abarimu, mu ddungu eritunuulidde Mowabu ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Numbers21:12 Ate ne bava eyo ne basiisira mu kiwonvu kya Zeredi; 
Numbers21:13 ne bava awo ne basiisira emitala wa Arunoni, mu ddungu eryeyongerayo okutuukira ddala mu nsi y'Abaamori; anti Arunoni ye nsalo y'e Mowabu, gwawula Mowabu ku Baamori." 
Numbers21:14 Mu Kitabo ky'Entabaalo z'Omukama kye bava bagamba nti: “…Wawebu mu Sufa, n'enkonko za Arunoni;" 
Numbers21:15 ebikko by'enkonko ebikkirira okutuuka Ari we kitudde, ne bigenda okutuuka ku nsalo ne Mowabu.”" 
Numbers21:16 Ne bava awo ne bagenda e Beeri. Lwe luzzi Omukama we yagambira Musa nti: “Kuŋŋaanya abantu, nzija kubawa amazzi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Olwo Yisirayeli lwe yayimba oluyimba nti: “Ayi Luzzi situka! Muluyimbe," 
Numbers21:18 oluzzi abalangira lwe baasima, abakungu b'abantu lwe baawuukuula, abakungu ne ddamula waabwe, n'emiggo gyabwe.” Ne bava mu ddungu ly'e Mattana." 
Numbers21:19 Okuva e Mattana baagenda Nakalyeli; ne bava e Nakalyeli ne bagenda e Bamoti; 
Numbers21:20 ne bava e Bamoti ne bagenda mu kiwonvu mu nsi y'e Mowabu, ku ntikko ya Pisuga etunudde wansi mu ddungu." 
Numbers21:21 Yisirayeli n'atuma ababaka eri Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori ng'agamba nti: 
Numbers21:22 “Nkwegayiridde, nzikiriza nsalire mu nsi yo; tetujja kukyamako mu nnimiro oba mu mizabbibu, wadde okunywa amazzi mu nzizi, wabula tujja kugoba kkubo lya kabaka lyokka, okutuusa lwe tunaakutula ensalo zo.”" 
Numbers21:23 Naye Sikoni n'atakkiriza Yisirayeli kuyita mu nsi ye. Yakunga eggye lye lyonna, n'agenda okulumba Yisirayeli mu ddungu. Bwe yatuuka e Yawazi n'ayambalagana ne Yisirayeli." 
Numbers21:24 Yisirayeli n'amusanjaga n'ekitala, ensi ye n'agitwala okuva ku Arunoni okutuuka ku Yabboki. Baakoma ku Bammoni, kubanga ensalo zaabwe kwaliko ekigo eky'amaanyi." 
Numbers21:25 Yisirayeli n'atwala ebibuga by'Abaamori byonna, n'abyezza nga mw'otwalidde ne Kesuboni n'ebyalo ebimwetoolodde." 
Numbers21:26 Kati nno Kesuboni kye kyali ekibuga kya Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori, eyalwanyisa eyali kabaka w'Abamowabu n'atwala ensi ye yonna gye yali afuga okutuukira ddala ku Arunoni." 
Numbers21:27 Abayiiya b'ebikwate kyebaava bagamba nti: “Mujje mu Kesuboni, kizimbibwe; kizzibwewo ekibuga kya Sikoni." 
Numbers21:28 Omuliro gwafubutuka mu Kesuboni, oluyiira lwava mu kibuga kya Sikoni, ne lulya Ari eky'Abamowabu, be bakungu b'oku ntikko za Arunoni." 
Numbers21:29 Zikusanze, Mowabu! Muzikiridde abantu b'e Cemosi! Batabani be abafudde banoonyi ba bubudamo, ne bawala be abawaddeyo mu busibe ewa Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori." 
Numbers21:30 Ffe twabasiguukulula, Kesuboni n'azikirira okutuuka e Diboni. Twakoleeza omuliro okutuukira ddala e Nofa, okutuuka ku nsalo za Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Bw'atyo Yisirayeli n'abeera mu nsi y'Abaamori. 
Numbers21:32 Musa ng'amaze okutuma ab'okuketta Yazeri, Abayisirayeli ne bawamba ebyalo ebyetooloddewo, ne bagobamu Abaamori abaalimu." 
Numbers21:33 Ne bakyuka, ne bambukira mu kkubo ery'e Basani, Ogi kabaka w'e Basani n'avaayo n'eggye lye lyonna, abasisinkane mu lutalo e Edureyi." 
Numbers21:34 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Tomutya, kubanga mmuwaddeyo mu mikono gyo n'eggye lye lyonna n'ensi ye. Mukole nga bwe wakola Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori eyabeeranga mu Kesuboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Ne bamukuba ne batta ne batabani be bonna n'eggye lye lyonna, tebaalekawo n'omu yawonawo; ensi ne bagitwala." 
Numbers22:1 Abayisirayeli ne batambula, ne basiisira mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu ku Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balaki mutabani wa Zippori bwe yalaba byonna Yisirayeli bye yali akoze Abaamori," 
Numbers22:3 Mowabu n'atya abantu, kubanga baali bangi nnyo. Mowabu n'atekemuka olw'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers22:4 Balaki n'agamba abakadde mu Midiyaani nti: “Ebbiina lino lijja kusenkenya byonna ebitwetoolodde wano, ng'ente bw'esenkenya omuddo gw'ettale.” Awo Balaki mutabani wa Zippori, ye yali kabaka wa Mowabu mu budde obwo," 
Numbers22:5 n'atuma ababaka ewa Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori mu Petori, ekiri ku Mugga mu nsi y'eggwanga lye, bamuyite, ng'agamba nti: “Abantu bali wano baavudde mu Misiri, babisse ku nsi wonna, basenze kumpi nange." 
Numbers22:6 Jjangu nno obavumirire, kubanga bampitiridde amaanyi, mpozzi lwe nnaasobola okubakuba ne mbagoba mu nsi yange. Mmanyi nti gw'owa omukisa abeera aguwereddwa, gw'ovumirira abeera avumiriddwa.”" 
Numbers22:7 Abakadde b'omu Mowabu ne bannaabwe ab'omu Midiyaani ne bagenda nga batutte eby'okuwa omulaguzi. Bwe baatuuka eri Balaamu ne bamugamba byonna Balaki bye yabatuma. 
Numbers22:8 Balaamu n'abagamba nti: “Musule wano; nzija kubabuulira kyonna Omukama ky'anaaba aŋŋambye.” Abakungu ba Mowabu ne basigala ne Balaamu. 
Numbers22:9 Katonda n'ajja gy'ali, n'amubuuza nti: “Baani abo abali ewuwo?”" 
Numbers22:10 Balaamu n'agamba Katonda nti: “Balaki mutabani wa Zippori kabaka w'Abamowabu antumidde," 
Numbers22:11 ng'agamba nti: ‘Abantu baabano abaava mu Misiri, babisse ku nsi wonna. Jjangu obanvumiririre, mpozzi lwe nnaasobola okubalwanyisa ne mbagoba.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Katonda n'agamba Balaamu nti: “Togenda nabo, n'abantu tobavumirira, kubanga baaweebwa omukisa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Balaamu bwe yazuukuka enkya, n'agamba abakungu ba Balaki nti: “Muddeeyo mu nsi yammwe, kubanga Omukama aŋŋaanyi okugenda nammwe.”" 
Numbers22:14 Abakungu b'e Mowabu ne baddayo ewa Balaki, ne bamugamba nti: “Balaamu agaanyi okujja naffe.”" 
Numbers22:15 Balaki n'atuma omulundi omulala abakungu abasingawo obungi n'ekitiibwa ku bali. 
Numbers22:16 Bwe bajja eri Balaamu, ne bamugamba nti: “Balaki mutabani wa Zippori agamba bw'ati: ‘Toganya na kimu kukuziyiza kujja gye ndi." 
Numbers22:17 Ebitiibwa nzija kukuwa bingi, na buli kyonna ky'onooba oŋŋambye, nzija kukikola. Jjangu onvumirire abantu bano.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Naye Balaamu n'ayanukula ababaka ba Balaki nti: “Balaki ne bw'aba wa kumpa lubiri lwe lwonna olujjudde ffeeza ne zaabu, siyinza kusukka ku kigambo kya Mukama Katonda wange, kibeere kinene oba kitono kitya." 
Numbers22:19 Mbasaba musule wano nga bannammwe bwe baakola, mmale okumanya ekirala Omukama ky'anaŋŋamba.”" 
Numbers22:20 Katonda n'ajja ekiro eri Balaamu, n'amugamba nti: “Oba abantu abo bazze kukuyita, situka ogende nabo, kyokka okola ekyo kyokka kye nnaaba nkugambye.”" 
Numbers22:21 Bwe yazuukuka ku makya, Balaamu n'asituka, n'atandiika endogoyi ye, n'agenda n'abakungu b'e Mowabu." 
Numbers22:22 Bwe yagenda, obusungu bwa Katonda ne bwesera; malayika w'Omukama n'ayimirira mu kkubo okumuziyiza. Balaamu yali yeebagadde endogoyi nga n'abaweereza be babiri bali naye." 
Numbers22:23 Endogoyi bwe yalaba malayika w'Omukama ng'ayimiridde mu kkubo, ng'alina n'ekitala ekisowole mu mukono gwe, n'eva mu kkubo n'egenda mu nnimiro. Balaamu n'agikuba ekomewo mu kkubo." 
Numbers22:24 Malayika w'Omukama n'ayimirira mu muwaatwa ogwali wakati w'ebisenge by'ennimiro z'emizabbibu, erudda n'erudda nga kisenge." 
Numbers22:25 Endogoyi bwe yalaba malayika ne yeekukuutiriza ku kisenge, n'enyigiriza ekigere kya Balaamu ku kisenge; Balaamu n'addamu okugikuba." 
Numbers22:26 Malayika w'Omukama ne yeeyongerayo mu maaso, n'ayimirira awafunda awatayinza kukyukirwa ku kkono oba ku ddyo." 
Numbers22:27 Endogoyi bwe yalaba malayika w'Omukama, n'egalamira awo wansi wa Balaamu. Obusungu bwa Balaamu ne bwesera, n'agikuba omuggo." 
Numbers22:28 Omukama n'aggula omumwa gw'endogoyi, n'eyogera nti: “Kiki kye nkukoze olyoke onkube? Laba guno gwa kusatu ng'onkuba.”" 
Numbers22:29 Balaamu n'ayanukula nti: “Kubanga onjooze. Mba na kitala mu ngalo kati, nandikusse.”" 
Numbers22:30 Endogoyi n'egamba nti: “Siri nsolo yo, gy'ozze weebagala bulijjo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero? Mmanyidde okukukola ekifaanana kiti?” Ye n'agamba nti: “Nedda.”" 
Numbers22:31 Amangu ago Omukama n'azibula amaaso ga Balaamu, n'alaba malayika w'Omukama ng'ayimiridde mu kkubo, n'ekitala ekisowole mu mukono gwe; n'avunnama n'asinza nga yeevuunise." 
Numbers22:32 Malayika w'Omukama n'amubuuza nti: “Lwaki endogoyi yo ogikubye, guno gwa kusatu? Nze nzize nkuziyize, kubanga olugendo luno terunsanyusizza." 
Numbers22:33 Endogoyi bw'endabye, kwe kunviira emirundi egyo esatu; teba kunviira, ggwe nandikusse, naye yo nandigirese.”" 
Numbers22:34 Balaamu n'agamba malayika w'Omukama nti: “Nnyonoonye; saategedde nti ggwe onneesimbye mu maaso mu kkubo okunziyiza; kale oba tokisiimye, ka nzireyo.”" 
Numbers22:35 Malayika w'Omukama n'agamba Balaamu nti: “Kale genda na bano, kyokka oyogera ebyo byokka bye nnaakugamba.” Balaamu n'agenda n'abakungu ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Balaki bwe yawulira nti Balaamu azze, n'agenda okumusisinkana e Ari mu Mowabu, ku nsalo ku mugga Arunoni, ensi ye w'ekoma." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki n'agamba Balaamu nti: “Saakutumidde ababaka okukuyita? Lwaki tewazze gye ndi? Olowooza sisobola kukuwa bitiibwa?” 
Numbers22:38 Ye n'amwanukula nti: “Kati nzuuno nzize. Olowooza nsobola okwogera buli kye njagadde? Njogera ekyo kyokka Omukama ky'atadde mu kamwa kange.” 
Numbers22:39 Awo Balaamu ne Balaki ne bagenda bombi e Kiriyati-Kuzoti. 
Numbers22:40 Balaki n'atta ente n'endiga, n'aweerezaako Balaamu n'abakungu abaali naye." 
Numbers22:41 Bwe bwakya, Balaki n'atwala Balaamu e Bamoti-Baali, ng'asinziira awo abantu n'abalengerako ekitundu." 
Numbers23:1 Balaamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Nzimbira wano emyaliiro musanvu, tegeka ente ennume musanvu n'endiga ennume ento musanvu.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balaki n'akola nga Balaamu bwe yagamba, bombi ne batambira ente ennume n'endiga ennume ku buli mwaliiro." 
Numbers23:3 Awo Balaamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Sigala wano ku bitone byo, nze ŋŋendeko ebbali, oboolyawo Omukama anansisinkana; ky'anaaba aŋŋambye, nzija kukikubuulira.” N'alaga ku kasozi akeereere." 
Numbers23:4 Katonda n'amusisinkana; Balaamu n'amugamba nti: “Ntegese emyaliiro musanvu, ku buli gumu ntambiriddeko ente ennume n'endiga ennume.”" 
Numbers23:5 Omukama n'assa ekigambo mu kamwa ke, n'amugamba nti: “Ddayo eri Balaki omugambe bino.”" 
Numbers23:6 N'addayo n'amusanga ng'ayimiridde awo ku bitone bye wamu n'abakungu ab'omu Mowabu bonna. 
Numbers23:7 Balaamu n'ayogera ekitontome kye nti: “Balaki yandeeta okuva e Arami kabaka w'Abamowabu yanzigya mu nsozi z'ebuvanjuba. ‘Jjangu,’ bwe yagamba, ‘okolimire Yakobo; jjangu ovumirire Yisirayeli.’" 
Numbers23:8 Nkolimira ntya Katonda gw'atakolimidde? Nvumirira ntya Katonda gw'atavumiridde? 
Numbers23:9 Mmulengera nga nnyima ku njazi ez'oku ntikko; mmulaba nga nnyima ku nsozi. Ndaba abantu abaawule, abateebalira mu baamawanga." 
Numbers23:10 Ani asobola okubala Yakobo omungi ng'enfuufu? Ani asobola okubala Yisirayeli omungi ng'ekire? Mpa nfe ng'abatuukirivu bwe bafa, n'eyange entuuko efaanane n'eyaabwe.”" 
Numbers23:11 Balaki n'agamba Balaamu nti: “Kiki ky'onkoze? Nakuyita kuvumirira balabe bange, ate wuuno ggwe obasabira busabizi mukisa!”" 
Numbers23:12 Ye n'amwanukula nti: “Olwo nneme kwogera Omukama ky'antadde mu kamwa kange?” 
Numbers23:13 Balaki n'agamba Balaamu nti: “Jjangu tugende mu kifo ekirala, gy'onoosinziira okubalaba, naye ojja kubalabako kitundu, si bonna; eyo gy'onooyima omunvumirire.”" 
Numbers23:14 Kwe kumutwala mu ttale lya Zofimu, ku ntikko y'olusozi Pisuga, n'azimba eyo emyaliiro musanvu, n'agitambiririrako buli gumu ente ennume n'endiga ennume." 
Numbers23:15 Balaamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Sigala wano ku bitambiro byo ebyokye, nze nga bwe mmusisinkana wali.”" 
Numbers23:16 Omukama n'asisinkana Balaamu, n'amussa ekigambo kye mu kamwa, n'amugamba nti: “Ddayo eri Balaki omugambe bino.”" 
Numbers23:17 N'addayo, n'amusanga ng'ayimiridde awo ku bitambiro bye ebyokye wamu n'abakungu ab'omu Mowabu. Balaki n'amugamba nti: “Omukama yayogedde ki?”" 
Numbers23:18 Ye n'ayogera ekitontome kye nti: “Balaki, situka owulire, mutabani wa Zippori, ntegera okutu." 
Numbers23:19 Katonda si muntu nti alimba, si mwana wa muntu nti akyusa ebirowoozo. Ayogera, mbu ate n'atakola? Agamba, mbu ate n'atatuukiriza?" 
Numbers23:20 Ekiragiro nfunye kya kusabira mukisa; awadde omukisa, sisobola kukikyusa." 
Numbers23:21 Mu Yakobo temulengerwamu bubi; mu Yisirayeli temulabikamu nnaku. Omukama Katonda we ali naye, mu ye bakuba emizira gya kabaka." 
Numbers23:22 Katonda yabaggya mu Misiri, amulwanirira n'amayembe ng'ag'embogo." 
Numbers23:23 Teri asobola kuloga Yakobo; teri asobola kugendera Yisirayeli ku ndagu. Abantu batuuse okwogera ku Yakobo ne Yisirayeli nti: ‘Mulabe Katonda ky'akoze!’ 
Numbers23:24 Baabo abantu basituse ng'empologoma enkazi, bayimuse ng'empologoma ensajja; tegalamira wabula ng'emaze okulya omuyiggo, n'okunywa omusaayi gwa by'eba esse.”" 
Numbers23:25 Balaki n'agamba Balaamu nti: “Tobavumirira nno, n'omukisa tobawa!”" 
Numbers23:26 Ko Balaamu nti: “Saakugambye nti nkola kyokka Omukama ky'aŋŋambye?” 
Numbers23:27 Balaki n'agamba Balaamu nti: “Jjangu, nkutwale mu kifo ekirala, oboolyawo Katonda anakkiriza n'oyima eyo okubanvumirira.”" 
Numbers23:28 Balaki n'atwala Balaamu ku ntikko y'olusozi Pewori, etunudde wansi mu ddungu." 
Numbers23:29 Balaamu n'agamba nti: “Nzimbira emyaliiro musanvu; era ntegekera ente ennume musanvu n'endiga ennume musanvu.” 
Numbers23:30 Balaki n'akola nga Balaamu bwe yali agambye; n'atambira ente ennume n'endiga ennume ku buli mwaliiro. 
Numbers24:1 Balaamu bwe yalaba ng'Omukama asiimye okuwa Yisirayeli omukisa, teyagenda ku ndagu nga bw'abadde akola, wabula yakyuka bukyusi n'atunuulira eddungu." 
Numbers24:2 Bwe yasitula amaaso, n'alaba Yisirayeli asiisidde, buli kika awaakyo, omwoyo gwa Katonda ne gumukkako," 
Numbers24:3 n'ayogera ekitontome kye nti: “Okulanga kwa Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori, okulanga kw'omusajja ow'eriiso ejjogi," 
Numbers24:4 okulanga kw'oyo awulira ebigambo bya Katonda, atunuulidde Omuyinza wa buli kantu by'amwolese, avunnama, n'amaaso ge agazibuse." 
Numbers24:5 “Weema zo nga nnungi, Yakobo, ebisulo byo, Yisirayeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Zeetadde ng'ebiwonvu, ng'ennimiro ku lubalama lw'omugga, ng'ebigagi Omukama bye yasimba, ng'entolookyo eziri okumpi n'amazzi." 
Numbers24:7 Amazzi galikulukuta nga gava mu nsuwa ze, n'empeke ye eriba mu mazzi mangi. Kabaka we alisukkuluma ku Agagi n'obwakabaka bwe buligulumizibwa." 
Numbers24:8 Katonda yamuggyayo mu Misiri, amutaasa n'amayembe ng'ag'embogo. Alikavvula amawanga agamuliko obulabe, amagumba gaabwe n'agabwebwena, n'abalasa n'obusaale bwe." 
Numbers24:9 Abwamye, yeebase ng'empologoma ensajja, ng'empologoma enkazi, anaamwaŋŋanga okumuzuukusa ani? Akuwa omukisa naye gumuweebwe; akuvumirira, naye avumirirwe.”" 
Numbers24:10 Obusungu bwa Balaki ne bweserera Balaamu, engalo n'azikubamu, n'agamba nti: “Nakuyita kuvumirira balabe bange, laba wuuno guno gwa kusatu ng'obawa mukisa!" 
Numbers24:11 Kati vva wano mangu odde ewammwe! Nali nteesezza okukufuula ow'ekitiibwa, naye Omukama akusubizza ebitiibwa ebyali bikutegekeddwa.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balaamu n'ayanukula Balaki nti: “Ababaka bo be watuma gye ndi saabagamba nti: 
Numbers24:13 ‘Balaki ne bw'anampa olubiri lwe olujjudde ffeeza ne zaabu, sisobola kukola kintu kyonna, kirungi oba kibi, ne nsukka ku ky'Omukama ky'aba alagidde, nteekwa kwogera byokka Omukama by'aba aŋŋambye?’" 
Numbers24:14 Kati nzuuno nzirayo eri abantu bange, naye ka nkubuulire abantu bano kye bajja okukola abantu bo gye bujja." 
Numbers24:15 Awo n'ayogera ekitontome kye nti: “Okulanga kwa Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori, okulanga kw'oyo ow'eriiso ejjogi," 
Numbers24:16 okulanga kw'oyo awulira ebigambo bya Katonda, amanyi eby'oyo Ali Waggulu Ddala atunuulidde Omuyinza wa buli kantu by'amwolese, avunnama, n'amaaso ge agazibuse:" 
Numbers24:17 Mmulaba, naye si kaakati; mmuwulira, naye tali kumpi. Emmunyeenye eyambuka okuva mu Yakobo, ddamula asituka mu Yisirayeli; alibetenta obwenyi bwa Mowabu n'obuwanga bwa bazzukulu ba Seti bonna." 
Numbers24:18 Edomu aliwangulwa, ne Seyiri, omulabe we, ajja kuwangulibwa; ye Yisirayeli alyeyongera maanyi." 
Numbers24:19 Aliva mu Yakobo n'azikiriza abaawonawo mu kibuga.” 
Numbers24:20 Balaamu bwe yalaba Amaleki, n'ayogera ekitontome kye nti: “Amaleki ye yasooka mu mawanga, kyokka naye oluvannyuma wa kuzikirira.”" 
Numbers24:21 Bwe yalaba Abakeni, n'ayogera ekitontome kye nti: “Ekifo kyo w'osula wagumu, n'ekisu kyo wakiwanga mu lwazi." 
Numbers24:22 Naye, Kayini, ekisulo kyo kirizikirizibwa; mu bbanga ttono Assuri alikutwala mu busibe.”" 
Numbers24:23 Era n'ayogera ekitontome kye nti: “O! Ani aliba omulamu Katonda lw'alikola kino? 
Numbers24:24 Amaato galijja nga gava ku mbalama za Kittimu; galikina ku Assuri ne Eberi; naye nago galizikirira.” 
Numbers24:25 Balaamu n'asituka n'addayo ewaabwe; ne Balaki n'akwata agage. 
Numbers25:1 Yisirayeli bwe yali akyali mu Sittimu, abasajja ne batandika okukola obwamalaaya ne bawala ba Mowabu." 
Numbers25:2 Abawala ne babayita bagende ku bitambiro bya balubaale baabwe. Abantu ne balya, ne basinza balubaale baabwe." 
Numbers25:3 Yisirayeli ne yeegatta ku Baali ow'e Pewori; obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli. 
Numbers25:4 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Ddira abakulembeze bonna ab'abantu bano obatte, obaanike mu maaso g'Omukama emisana ttuku, obusungu bw'Omukama obwesera bulyoke buve ku Yisirayeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Musa n'agamba Abalamuzi ba Yisirayeli nti: “Buli omu atte mu bantu be abo abeegasse ku Baali ow'e Pewori.” 
Numbers25:6 Awo mu maaso ga Musa, nga n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli balaba, nga bakyali mu kukungubaga awo ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisikano, omu ku Bayisirayeli n'ayingiza mu maka ge omukazi Omumidiyaani." 
Numbers25:7 Finekasi mutabani wa Eleyazari, mutabani wa Aroni kabona, bwe yakiraba, n'ava mu kibiina, n'abaka effumu mu mukono gwe," 
Numbers25:8 n'agoberera omusajja Omuyisirayeli mu kisenge munda, bombi n'abayisaamu effumu, mu musajja Omuyisirayeli ne mu lubuto lw'omukazi. Awo ekibonerezo ku Bayisirayeli ne kirekera awo." 
Numbers25:9 Naye abaali bamaze okuttibwa baali baweze abantu emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya. 
Numbers25:10 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers25:11 “Finekasi mutabani wa Eleyazari, mutabani wa Aroni kabona, aggye obusungu bwange ku Bayisirayeli, kubanga alaze nti alumirwa ekitiibwa kyange mu makkati gaabwe nga nze kennyini bwe nkirumirwa. Lwa kukirumirwa bwe ntyo kyennava sibasaanyaawo." 
Numbers25:12 Awo nno mugambe nti: ‘Nkoze naye endagaano ey'eddembe. 
Numbers25:13 Ye ne bazzukulu be endagaano y'obwakabona obw'olubeerera eneebanga yaabwe, kubanga yatakabanira ekitiibwa kya Katonda we, n'addaabiriza ku lw'Abayisirayeli.’ ”" 
Numbers25:14 Omusajja Omuyisirayeli eyattibwa awamu n'Omumidiyaani yali ayitibwa Zimuri, mutabani wa Salu, nga mukulu wa nnyumba y'Abasimewoni." 
Numbers25:15 Ye omukazi Omumidiyaani eyattibwa yali ayitibwa Kozubi, muwala wa Zuru omukulu w'ennyumba mu Bamidiyaani." 
Numbers25:16 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers25:17 “Muwalane Abamidiyaani mubatte," 
Numbers25:18 kubanga nabo beeyisizza ng'abalabe bammwe, ne babasuula mu nkwe zaabwe n'ensonga za Pewori era n'ezo eza Kozubi, mwannyinaabwe, muwala w'omukulu Omumidiyaani, eyattibwa ku lunaku olw'ekibonerezo lwe kyajja olw'ensonga za Pewori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Ekibonerezo ekyo bwe kyaggwa, Omukama n'agamba Musa ne Eleyazari mutabani wa Aroni kabona nti:" 
Numbers26:2 “Mubale omuwendo gw'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, okuva ku w'emyaka amakumi abiri n'okweyongerayo, bonna mu Yisirayeli abasobola okutabaala.”" 
Numbers26:3 Mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu ku Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko, Musa ne Eleyazari kabona ne boogera gye bali, nga bagamba" 
Numbers26:4 bonna abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okweyongerayo, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. Bano be Bayisirayeli abaava mu nsi y'e Misiri:" 
Numbers26:5 Bazzukulu ba Rubeni omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli mu masiga gaabwe: mu Kanoki, ab'essiga ly'Abakanoki; mu Pallu, ab'essiga ly'Abapallu;" 
Numbers26:6 mu Kezuroni, ab'essiga ly'Abakezuroni; ne mu Karumi, ab'essiga ly'Abakarumi." 
Numbers26:7 Ago ge masiga mu Rubeni. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo ena mu enkumi ssatu mu lusanvu mu asatu. 
Numbers26:8 Mutabani wa Pallu yali Eliyabu. 
Numbers26:9 Batabani ba Eliyabu baali: Nemweli, Datani ne Abiramu. Bano, Datani ne Abiramu, be bakulembeze b'abantu abaayombesa Musa ne Aroni; baali mu bagoberezi ba Kora lwe baayombesa Omukama." 
Numbers26:10 Ettaka lyayasama ne libamira wamu ne Kora, n'abagoberezi bangi ne bafa omuliro lwe gwayokya abasajja ebikumi ebibiri mu ataano; ne bafuuka kyakulabirako." 
Numbers26:11 Kyokka ezzadde lya Kora teryazikirira lyonna. 
Numbers26:12 Bazzukulu ba Simewoni mu masiga gaabwe: mu Namweli, ab'essiga ly'Abanamweli; mu Yamini, ab'essiga ly'Abayamini; mu Yakini, ab'essiga ly'Abayakini;" 
Numbers26:13 mu Zeraki, ab'essiga ly'Abazeraki; ne mu Sawuli, ab'essiga ly'Abasawuli." 
Numbers26:14 Ago ge masiga mu Basimewoni. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri. 
Numbers26:15 Bazzukulu ba Gaadi mu masiga gaabwe: mu Zefoni ab'essiga ly'Abazefoni; mu Kaggi, ab'essiga ly'Abakaggi; mu Suni, ab'essiga ly'Abasuni;" 
Numbers26:16 mu Ozuni, ab'essiga ly'Aboozuni; mu Eri, ab'essiga ly'Abeeri;" 
Numbers26:17 mu Arodi, ab'essiga ly'Abaarodi; ne mu Areli, ab'essiga ly'Abaareli." 
Numbers26:18 Ago ge masiga mu bazzukulu ba Gaadi. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo ena mu bitaano. 
Numbers26:19 Eri n'Onani baali batabani ba Yuda; bombi abaafiira mu nsi y'e Kanaani. 
Numbers26:20 Bazzukulu ba Yuda mu masiga gaabwe: mu Sela, ab'essiga ly'Abasela; mu Perezi, ab'essiga ly'Abaperezi; mu Zeraki, ab'essiga ly'Abazeraki." 
Numbers26:21 Bo batabani ba Perezi n'ennyiriri zaabwe baali: mu Kezuroni, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abakezuroni; ne mu Kamuli, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abakamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Ago ge masiga mu Yuda. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo musanvu mu kakaaga mu bitaano. 
Numbers26:23 Bazzukulu ba Yissakari mu masiga gaabwe: mu Tola, ab'essiga ly'Abatola; mu Puva, ab'essiga ly'Abapuva;" 
Numbers26:24 mu Yasubu, ab'essiga ly'Abayasubu; ne mu Simuroni, ab'essiga ly'Abasimuroni." 
Numbers26:25 Ago ge masiga mu Yissakari. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi nnya mu bisatu. 
Numbers26:26 Bazzukulu ba Zebuluni mu masiga gaabwe: mu Seredi, ab'essiga ly'Abaseredi; mu Eloni, ab'essiga ly'Abeeloni; ne mu Yakuleeli, ab'essiga ly'Abayakuleeli." 
Numbers26:27 Ago ge masiga g'Abazebuluni. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo mukaaga mu bitaano. 
Numbers26:28 Bazzukulu ba Yozefu mu bika byabwe, ekya Manasse n'ekya Efurayimu." 
Numbers26:29 Bazzukulu ba Manasse: mu Makiri, ab'essiga ly'Abamakiri; Makiri ye yazaala Gileyaadi. Mu Gileyaadi, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abagileyaadi." 
Numbers26:30 Aba Gileyaadi: mu Yezeri, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abayezeri; mu Keleki, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abakeleki;" 
Numbers26:31 mu Asuryeli, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abasuryeli; mu Sekemu, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abasekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 mu Semida, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abasemida; ne mu Keferi, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abakeferi." 
Numbers26:33 Zelofekadi mutabani wa Keferi teyalina baana ba bulenzi, yalina bawala bokka, gano ge mannya gaabwe: Makula, Nowa, Kogula, Miluka ne Tiruza." 
Numbers26:34 Ago ge masiga mu Manasse. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo etaano mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu. 
Numbers26:35 Bazzukulu ba Efurayimu mu masiga gaabwe: mu Sutelaki, ab'essiga ly'Abasutelaki; mu Bekeri, ab'essiga ly'Ababekeri; ne mu Takani, ab'essiga ly'Abatakani." 
Numbers26:36 Aba Sutelaki: mu Erani, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abeerani." 
Numbers26:37 Ezo ze ndyo mu bazzukulu ba Efurayimu, Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu bitaano. Abo be bazzukulu ba Yozefu mu bika byabwe." 
Numbers26:38 Bazzukulu ba Benyamiini mu masiga gaabwe: mu Bela, ab'essiga ly'Ababela; mu Asubeli, ab'essiga ly'Abaasubeli; mu Akiramu, ab'essiga ly'Abakiramu;" 
Numbers26:39 mu Sesufamu, ab'essiga ly'Abasesufamu; ne mu Kufamu, ab'essiga ly'Abakufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Batabani ba Bela baali Arudi ne Naamani; mu Arudi, olunyiriri lw'Abarudi; mu Naamani, olunyiriri lw'Abanaamani." 
Numbers26:41 Ezo ze ndyo mu bazzukulu ba Benyamiini. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga. 
Numbers26:42 Bazzukulu ba Daani mu ssiga lyabwe: mu Sukamu, ab'essiga ly'Abasukamu. Eryo lye ssiga mu Daani;" 
Numbers26:43 bonna baali ba ssiga ly'Abasukamu. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bina. 
Numbers26:44 Bazzukulu ba Aseeri mu masiga gaabwe: mu Yimuna, ab'essiga ly'Abayimuna; mu Yisuvi, ab'essiga ly'Abayisuvi; ne mu Beriya, ab'essiga ly'Ababeriya." 
Numbers26:45 Aba Beriya baali: mu Keberi, ab'olunyiriri lw'Abakeberi; ne mu Malukyeli ab'olunyiriri lw'Abamalukyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Aseeri yalina muwala we ayitibwa Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Ezo ze ndyo mu bazzukulu ba Aseeri. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu bina. 
Numbers26:48 Bazzukulu ba Nafutali mu masiga gaabwe: mu Yakuzeeli, ab'essiga ly'Abayakuzeeli; mu Guni, ab'essiga ly'Abaguni;" 
Numbers26:49 mu Yezeri, ab'essiga ly'Abayezeri; ne mu Sillemi, ab'essiga ly'Abasillemi." 
Numbers26:50 Ago ge masiga ga Nafutali. Abaabalibwa bonna baawera emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu ebikumi bina. 
Numbers26:51 Omuwendo gwonna ogw'Abayisirayeli abaabalibwa gwali obusiriivu mukaaga mu lukumi mu lusanvu mu asatu. 
Numbers26:52 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers26:53 “Ensi egabanyizibwemu mu bano ng'obusika bwabwe, okusinziira ku muwendo gw'amannya." 
Numbers26:54 Abangi bawe obusika bunene, abatono bawe obusika butono; obunene bw'obusika buli bamu bwe banaafuna bunasinziira ku muwendo gw'ababaliddwa." 
Numbers26:55 Ensi ya kugabibwa ku kalulu kokka. Bajja kusikira nga bagoberera amannya g'ebika bya bajjajjaabwe. 
Numbers26:56 Ate n'obusika nabwo bwa kugabanyiza ku kalulu wakati w'amasiga amanene n'amatono.” 
Numbers26:57 Bano be Baleevi abaabalibwa mu masiga gaabwe: mu Gerusoni, ab'essiga ly'Abagerusoni; mu Kewati, ab'essiga ly'Abakewati; ne mu Merari, ab'essiga ly'Abamerari." 
Numbers26:58 Zino ze nnyiriri z'Abaleevi: olunyiriri lwa Libuni, olunyiriri lwa Keburoni, olunyiriri lw'Abamakuli, olunyiriri lw'Abamuusi, n'olunyiriri lw'Abakora. Kewati yazaala Amuramu;" 
Numbers26:59 mukazi wa Amuramu nga ye Yokebedi, muwala wa Leevi eyamuzaalirwa mu Misiri. Yokebedi yazaalira Amuramu abaana ab'obulenzi Aroni ne Musa, ne Miriyamu mwannyinaabwe." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni yazaala Nadabu ne Abiwu, Eleyazari ne Yitamari." 
Numbers26:61 Nadabu ne Abiwu baafa lwe baaweereza mu maaso g'Omukama ekitambiro eky'omuliro ekitakkiriziddwa. 
Numbers26:62 Bonna abaabalibwa baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ssatu, abasajja okuva ku w'omwezi ogumu n'okweyongerayo. Tebaabalibwa na Bayisirayeli balala, kubanga baali tebafunye busika mu Bayisirayeli." 
Numbers26:63 Abo be baabalibwa Musa ne Eleyazari kabona lwe baabala Abayisirayeli mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu ku Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko. 
Numbers26:64 Mu abo temwali n'omu yali mu abo abaabalibwa Musa ne Aroni mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi," 
Numbers26:65 kubanga Omukama yali amaze okubagamba nti bonna baali ba kufiira mu ddungu; era tewaasigala n'omu ku abo, wabula Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu." 
Numbers27:1 Awo bawala ba Zelofekadi mutabani wa Keferi, mutabani wa Gileyaadi, mutabani wa Makiri, mutabani wa Manasse, ow'omu kika kya Manasse, eyali mutabani wa Yozefu, ne basembera. Abawala nga be ba Makula, Nowa, Kogula, Miluka ne Tiruza." 
Numbers27:2 Ne bayimirira mu maaso ga Musa ne Eleyazari kabona n'abaami n'ekibiina kyonna awo ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ne bagamba nti:" 
Numbers27:3 “Kitaffe yafiira mu ddungu; ye teyali mu bagoberezi ba Kora abeegatta okulwanyisa Omukama, wabula yafa lwa kibi kye; teyaleka baana ba bulenzi." 
Numbers27:4 Lwaki erinnya lye lyandyerabiddwa mu kika kye kubanga teyalina mwana wa bulenzi? Mutuwe naffe obutaka mu b'eŋŋanda za kitaffe.” 
Numbers27:5 Ensonga Musa n'agijuliza ew'Omukama. 
Numbers27:6 Omukama n'amugamba nti: 
Numbers27:7 “Bawala ba Zelofekadi basaba kituufu. Bawe obutaka mu b'eŋŋanda za kitaabwe, basikire obusika bwe, obusika bwa kitaabwe obuzze gye bali." 
Numbers27:8 Abayisirayeli bagambe bino: ‘Omuntu bw'afanga nga talese mwana wa bulenzi, obusika bwe obuddizanga muwala we;" 
Numbers27:9 bw'aba nga n'omuwala tamulina, obusika bwe obuwanga baganda be." 
Numbers27:10 Bw'atabeeranga na baganda be, obusika bwe obuwanga baganda ba kitaawe." 
Numbers27:11 Bw'aba kitaawe teyalina ba luganda lwe, obusika bwe obuwanga oyo amuli okumpi mu b'eŋŋanda ze; ye abusikire. Eno y'eneeba enkola ey'etteeka ku Bayisirayeli ng'Omukama bwe yalagira Musa.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Yambuka ku lusozi luno Abarimu olengere ensi gye ŋŋenda okuwa Abayisirayeli. 
Numbers27:13 Bw'onoomala okugiraba, naawe oneegatta ku bajjajjaabo nga Aroni muganda wo bwe yabeegattako," 
Numbers27:14 kubanga mwembi mwajeemera ekiragiro kyange luli mu ddungu ly'e Zini ekibiina lwe kyanjeemera, ne mutooleka mu maaso gaabwe bwe ndi omutuukirivu wali ku mazzi.” Ge gaago amazzi g'e Meriba mu ddungu ly'e Zini." 
Numbers27:15 Musa n'ayanukula nti: 
Numbers27:16 “Omukama Katonda assa obulamu mu buli muntu ayoleke omuntu anaakulembera ekibiina kino," 
Numbers27:17 abalambike mu bye bakola, abakulembere mu ntalo zaabwe, abantu b'Omukama baleme kubeera ng'endiga okutali musumba.”" 
Numbers27:18 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Ddira Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu, omusajja omuli Mwoyo omusseeko emikono." 
Numbers27:19 Muyimirize mu maaso ga Eleyazari kabona n'ekibiina kyonna, omutongoze nga bonna balaba," 
Numbers27:20 omugabanyize ku buyinza bwo, ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli balyoke bamuwulire." 
Numbers27:21 Anaayimiriranga mu maaso ga Eleyazari kabona, ono, ng'agoberera omukolo gwa Wurimu, ajja kwebuuzanga ew'Omukama ku lulwe ki ky'alina okukola. Bw'anaalagiranga ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli, nga kifuluma, bw'anaalagiranga, nga kiyingira.”" 
Numbers27:22 Musa n'akola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde. Yaddira Yoswa, n'amuyimiriza mu maaso ga Eleyazari kabona, n'ekibiina kyonna," 
Numbers27:23 n'amussaako emikono, n'amutongoza, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers28:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers28:2 “Yogera eri Abayisirayeli obawe ekiragiro kino nti: ‘Ekitambiro kyange, ekyokulya kyange ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akansanyusa, mukiweerezanga mu budde bwakyo.’" 
Numbers28:3 Bagambe nti: ‘Bino bye bitone ebiwonge n'omuliro bye munaawerezanga Omukama: “ ‘Buli lunaku muweerezanga obuliga bubiri obulume, obw'omwaka ogumu obutaliiko kamogo. Kino kye kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo." 
Numbers28:4 Akaliga akamu mukaweerezanga ku makya akookubiri akawungeezi. 
Numbers28:5 Muweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi obuweza ekyekkumi ekya efa, nga mutabuddwamu omuzigo ogukamuliddwa mu oliva oguweza ekyokuna ekya yini." 
Numbers28:6 Kye kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo nga bwe kyalagirwa ku lusozi Sinayi, akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Numbers28:7 Ku buli kaliga kunaagenderangako ekitone eky'okuyiwa eky'omwenge ekiweza ekyokuna ekya yini. Evviini ey'ekitone eky'okuyiwa mugiyiyiranga Omukama mu Kifo Ekitukuvu 
Numbers28:8 Akaliga akookubiri mukaweerezanga akawungeezi, nga bwe mwakoze ku makya, wamu n'ekitone eky'obuwunga ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa. Kino kye kitambiro ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Numbers28:9 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwa Sabbaato muweerezanga obuliga obulume bubiri obw'omwaka ogumu obutaliiko kamogo, ko n'ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa eby'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo, ng'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers28:10 Kino kye kitambiro kya Sabbaato ekyokye ku buli Sabbaato. Kino kyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa. 
Numbers28:11 “ ‘Ku lusooka mu mwezi muweerezanga Omukama ekitambiro ekyoke eky'ente ennume ento bbiri, endiga ennume emu, obuliga obulume musanvu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers28:12 Ku buli nte nnume ento muweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'ebyekkumi bisatu ebya efa ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo, ku buli ndiga ennume ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo;" 
Numbers28:13 ku buli kaliga akalume ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo. Kino kye kitambiro ekyokye, akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro." 
Numbers28:14 Ku buli nte nnume ento muweererezangako ekitone eky'okuyiwa eky'evviini eweza ekyokubiri ekya yini; ku buli ndiga ennume ekyokusatu ekya yini, ne ku buli kaliga akalume ekyokuna ekya yini. Ekyo kye kinaabanga ekitambiro ekyokye, ekya buli mwezi, ku buli lusooka omwezi omwaka gwonna." 
Numbers28:15 Kuweererezebwangako Omukama embuzi ennume ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. Kino kyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo wamu n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa. 
Numbers28:16 “ ‘Mu mwezi ogusooka, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi, lwe lwa Pasika y'Omukama," 
Numbers28:17 ate olw'ekkumi n'ettaano mbaga. Okumala ennaku musanvu emigaati egitazimbulukuse gye ginaaliibwanga. 
Numbers28:18 Ku lunaku olusooka kunaabangako olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. 
Numbers28:19 Muweererezangako ekitone ekiwongere Omukama n'omuliro, ekitambiro ekyokye eky'ente ennume ento bbiri, endiga ennume emu, obuliga obulume musanvu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo;" 
Numbers28:20 muweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo: ku buli nte nnume ento ebyekkumi bisatu ebya efa, ku buli ndiga nnume ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa;" 
Numbers28:21 ku buli kaliga, ku buli omusanvu, ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa." 
Numbers28:22 Muweererezangako embuzi ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, eddaabirize ku lwammwe." 
Numbers28:23 Kino kyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo eky'oku makya. 
Numbers28:24 “ ‘Muweerezanga bwe mutyo buli lunaku okumala ennaku musanvu ekyokulya ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama. Kino mukiweerezanga okwongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo ne ku kitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers28:25 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu mukolanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. 
Numbers28:26 “ ‘Ku lunaku olw'ebibala ebisookera ddala, bwe muweerezanga Omukama ebibala by'eŋŋano esooka, mu Wiiki enkulu, muyitanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temulukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito." 
Numbers28:27 Muweerezanga ekitambiro ekyokye eky'ente ennume ento bbiri, endiga ennume emu, n'obuliga obulume musanvu obw'omwaka ogumu gumu, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama." 
Numbers28:28 Ku buli nte nnume ento kubeerangako ekitone eky'obuwunga kya byakkumi bisatu ebya efa ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa muzigo; ku buli ndiga ennume ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa," 
Numbers28:29 ne ku buli kaliga, ku buli omusanvu, ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa." 
Numbers28:30 Muweererezangako embuzi ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, eddaabirize ku lwammwe." 
Numbers28:31 Mubiweerezanga okwongereza ku kitambiro ekya bulijjo ekyokye eky'oku makya n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga. Ensolo wetegerezanga ne ziba nga teziriiko kamogo. 
Numbers29:1 “ ‘Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogwomusanvu mukolanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temulukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. Lunaku lwammwe lwa kufuuwa ŋŋombe. 
Numbers29:2 Muweerezanga ekitambiro ekyokye, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama, eky'ente ennume ento emu, endiga ennume emu, n'obuliga obulume musanvu obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:3 Muweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo, ku buli nte nnume kugenderako ebyekkumi bisatu ebya efa; ku buli ndiga ennume ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa," 
Numbers29:4 ne ku buli kaliga, ku buli omusanvu, ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa." 
Numbers29:5 Muweererezangako embuzi ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, eddaabirize ku lwammwe." 
Numbers29:6 Mubiweerezanga okwongereza ku bitambiro ebyokye ebya buli mwezi n'ebyo ebya buli lunaku awamu n'ebitone eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa ng'etteeka bwe ligamba ku byo. Bye bitone ebiwongere Omukama n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa." 
Numbers29:7 “ ‘Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogwo ogwomusanvu, mukolanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu, era musiibanga; temukolerangako mulimu gwonna." 
Numbers29:8 Muweerezanga Omukama akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitambiro ekyokye eky'ente ennume ento emu, endiga ennume emu, n'obuliga obulume musanvu obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:9 Muweererezangako obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo ng'ekitone eky'obuwunga: ku buli nte ennume ebyekkumi bisatu ebya efa; ku buli ndiga nnume ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa," 
Numbers29:10 ne ku buli kaliga, ku buli omusanvu, ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa." 
Numbers29:11 Muweererezangako embuzi ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. Bino byongereza ku kitambiro olw'okuddaabiriza ate ne ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyabyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:12 “ ‘Era olunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, mukolanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. Mukuzanga embaga ku lw'Omukama okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Numbers29:13 Muweerezanga ekitambiro ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa Omukama, ekitambiro ekyokye eky'ente ennume ento kkumi na ssatu, endiga ennume bbiri, n'obuliga obulume obw'omwaka ogumu kkumi na buna, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:14 Muweererezangako n'obuwunga obukuŋŋunte obulungi omutabuddwa omuzigo ng'ekitone eky'obuwunga: ku buli nte ennume, ku ziri ekkumi n'essatu, ebyekkumi bisatu ebya efa; ku buli ndiga ennume, ku ziri ebbiri, ebyekkumi bibiri ebya efa," 
Numbers29:15 ne ku buli kaliga ku buli ekkumi n'obuna, ekyekkumi kimu ekya efa." 
Numbers29:16 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume emu ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. Bino byongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:17 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwokubiri, muweerezanga ente ennume kkumi na bbiri, endiga ennume bbiri, n'obuliga obulume kkumi na buna obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:18 Oweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa, ng'ebipimo bigererwa ku muwendo gw'ebisolo obungi ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Numbers29:19 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume emu ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ng'oyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:20 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwokusatu muweerezanga ente ennume kkumi n'emu, endiga ennume bbiri, n'obuliga obulume kkumi na buna obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:21 Oweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa, ng'ebipimo bigererwa ku muwendo gw'ebisolo obungi ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Numbers29:22 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume emu ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ng'oyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:23 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwokuna, muweerezanga ente ennume kkumi, endiga ennume bbiri, n'obuliga obulume kkumi na buna obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:24 Oweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa, ng'ebipimo bigererwa ku muwendo gw'ebisolo obungi ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Numbers29:25 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume emu ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ng'oyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:26 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwookutaano muweerezanga ente ennume mwenda, endiga ennume bbiri, n'obuliga obulume kkumi na buna obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:27 Oweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa, ng'ebipimo bigererwa ku bungi bw'ensolo ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Numbers29:28 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume emu ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ng'oyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa."
