Numbers29:29 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwomukaaga muweerezanga ente ennume munaana, endiga ennume bbiri, n'obuliga obulume kkumi na buna obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:30 Oweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa, ng'ebipimo bigererwa ku muwendo gw'ebisolo obungi ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Numbers29:31 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume emu ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ng'oyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:32 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwomusanvu muweerezanga ente ennume musanvu, endiga ennume bbiri, n'obuliga obulume kkumi na buna obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:33 Oweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'eky'okuyiwa, ng'ebipimo bigererwa ku muwendo gw'ebisolo obungi ng'etteeka bwe ligamba ku bwo." 
Numbers29:34 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume emu ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ng'oyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:35 “ ‘Ku lunaku olwomunaana mukolanga olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa; temukolerangako mulimu gwonna muzito. 
Numbers29:36 Muweerezanga Omukama ekitambiro ekiwonge n'omuliro, akawoowo akasanyusa, ekitambiro ekyokye eky'ente ennume emu, n'endiga ennume emu, n'obuliga obulume musanvu obw'omwaka ogumu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:37 Ku buli nte nnume, ku buli ndiga nnume, ne ku buli kaliga akalume, muweererezangako ekitone eky'obuwunga n'ekitone eky'okuyiwa, ng'ebipimo bigererwa ku muwendo gw'ebisolo obungi ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Numbers29:38 Oweererezangako embuzi ennume ey'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, ng'oyongereza ku kitambiro ekyokye ekya bulijjo, ko n'ekitone kyakyo eky'obuwunga era n'ekitone kyakyo eky'okuyiwa." 
Numbers29:39 “ ‘Ebyo mubiweerezanga Omukama ku mbaga zammwe eziragiddwa, kwe kugamba, ebitambiro byammwe ebyokye, ebitone eby'obuwunga, ebitone eby'okuyiwa, n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu, nga mugatta ku bweyamo bwammwe n'ebitambiro byammwe ebyeyagalire.’ ”" 
Numbers30:1 Musa n'abuulira Abayisirayeli byonna Omukama bye yali amulagidde. 
Numbers30:2 Musa yagamba abakulu b'ebika by'Abayisirayeli nti: “Kino kye kigambo Omukama ky'alagidde: 
Numbers30:3 ‘Omusajja bw'akolanga obweyamo ew'Omukama oba bw'alayiranga ne yeesiba, tamenyanga ky'agambye, wabula buli kye yayogera akituukirizanga." 
Numbers30:4 “ ‘Omukazi akyali omuto, akyasula mu nnyumba ya kitaawe, bw'akolanga obweyamo oba bwe yeesibanga," 
Numbers30:5 kitaawe bw'amanyanga ku bweyamo bwe oba ku kwesiba kwe yeesiba, n'atabaako ky'amugamba, obweyamo bwe bwonna n'okwesiba kwe yeesiba binaasigalanga bikyabalibwa." 
Numbers30:6 Naye kitaawe bw'akiwuliranga n'amugaanirawo, obweyamo bwe n'okwesiba kwe yeesiba binaabanga tebikyabalibwa, n'Omukama agenda kumusonyiwa, kubanga kitaawe yamugaana." 
Numbers30:7 “ ‘Bw'afumbirwanga ng'amaze okukola obweyamo, oba mu kumala googera yeetema ekintu ne yeesiba," 
Numbers30:8 bba bw'akiwuliranga, naye n'atabaako ky'amugamba, obweyamo bwe n'okwesiba kwe yeesiba binaasigalanga bikyabalibwa." 
Numbers30:9 Naye singa bba bw'akiwulira, asazaamu obweyamo bwe obwali bumusiba, oba okwetema kwe yamala gakola ne yeesiba, Omukama alimusonyiwa." 
Numbers30:10 “ ‘Obweyamo oba okwesiba kwonna ebikoleddwa nnamwandu oba omukazi eyagobebwa ewa bba, ku oyo binaasigalanga bikyabalibwa." 
Numbers30:11 “ ‘Omukazi ali ne bba bw'akolanga obweyamo oba bwe yeesibanga n'ekirayiro," 
Numbers30:12 bba n'akiwulirako, naye n'atabaako ky'amugamba, obweyamo bwe bwonna n'okwesiba kwonna kwe yeesiba binaasigalanga bikyabalibwa." 
Numbers30:13 Naye singa bba bw'abiwulirako, abisazaamu, buli bweyamo bwe na buli kwesiba kwe yeesiba binaabanga tebikyabalibwa; Omukama alimusonyiwa kubanga bba yabisazaamu." 
Numbers30:14 Bba ayinza okukkiriza oba okusazaamu obweyamo bwe oba okwesiba n'ekirayiro kwe yeesiba olw'okweresa. 
Numbers30:15 Bba bw'awuliranga, naye ennaku ne ziyita nga talina ky'amugambye, anaabanga akkiriza buli bweyamo bwe, na buli kwesiba kwe yeesiba binaasigalanga bikyabalibwa, kubanga bwe yakiwulirako talina kye yamugamba." 
Numbers30:16 Naye bw'abisazangamu nga wayiseewo ebbanga ng'abiwuliddeko, aneetikkanga omusango gw'ekyonoono kya mukazi we.’ ”" 
Numbers30:17 Gano ge mateeka Katonda ge yawa Musa agakwata ku musajja ne mukazi we, ne ku kitaawe w'omuwala ne muwala we omuto akyasula mu nnyumba ya kitaawe." 
Numbers31:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers31:2 “Woolera eggwanga ku Bamidiyaani olw'Abayisirayeli. ng'omaze, ojja kwegatta ku bajjajjaabo.”" 
Numbers31:3 Ne Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mwambaze abasajja mu mmwe bagende balwanyise Abamidiyaani musobole okutuukiriza Omukama ky'asabye eky'okuwoolera eggwanga ku Bamidiyaani. 
Numbers31:4 Buli kika mu Yisirayeli kirondeyo abasajja lukumi, mubasindike ku lutalo.”" 
Numbers31:5 Buli kika mu Yisirayeli ne mulondebwamu lukumi, gwe mutwalo mu enkumi bbiri abaayambala okugenda mu lutalo." 
Numbers31:6 Musa n'abasindika mu lutalo, abasajja lukumi okuva mu buli kika, wamu ne Finekasi mutabani wa Eleyazari kabona. Yatwala n'ebintu okuva mu Ekitukuvu, n'eŋŋombe ey'okufuuwa." 
Numbers31:7 Ne balwanyisa n'Abamidiyaani, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa, ne batta abasajja bonna," 
Numbers31:8 ne mu be batta mwalimu bakabaka ba Midiyaani: Evi, Rekemu, Zuru, Kuru ne Reba, bakabaka abataano Abamidiyaani. Ne Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori ne bamutta n'ekitala." 
Numbers31:9 Ne banyaga abakazi Abamidiyaani n'abaana baabwe n'amagana g'ente n'endiga, ne buli kintu ne bakyaya." 
Numbers31:10 Baayokya ebyalo byabwe n'ensiisira zaabwe mwe baasulanga. 
Numbers31:11 Ne batwala omunyago n'olwayo lwonna, omwali abantu, n'ebisolo." 
Numbers31:12 Abasibe, olwayo n'omunyago ne babireeta eri Musa ne Eleyazari kabona n'eri ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli mu lusiisira mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu okumpi ne Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Musa ne Eleyazari kabona n'abakulembeze bonna mu kibiina ne bafuluma okugenda okubasisinkana ebweru w'olusiisira. 
Numbers31:14 Musa n'anyiigira abagabe, abaaduumira enkumi n'ebikumi, abaali bavudde ku lutalo," 
Numbers31:15 n'ababuuza nti: “Mwalese abakazi bonna ne basigalawo? 
Numbers31:16 Si be baabo abaalimbalimba Abayisirayeli ne babawugula okuva ku Mukama n'amagezi ga Balaamu ge yabawa, ne babakoza ebyo ebyagwa e Pewori, ekibonerezo ne kigwira abantu b'Omukama?" 
Numbers31:17 Kale mutte abaana ab'obulenzi bonna. Mutte na buli mukazi eyali yeebase n'omusajja," 
Numbers31:18 kyokka mwesigalizaawo abawala bonna abateebakanga na basajja. 
Numbers31:19 Nammwe eyatta ku muntu oba eyakwata ku mufu, amale ennaku musanvu ng'ali bweru wa lusiisira; yeetukuze ku lunaku olwokusatu ne ku lwomusanvu, mmwe n'abasibe bammwe." 
Numbers31:20 Mutukuze ebyambalo byonna na buli kintu ekikole mu ddiba, mu byoya by'embuzi ne mu mbaawo.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleyazari kabona n'agamba abasajja abaali bagenze mu lutalo nti: “Eno y'enkola ey'etteeka Omukama gye yalagira Musa: 
Numbers31:22 Zaabu, ffeeza, ekikomo, ekyuma, essasi, ebbaati," 
Numbers31:23 buli kyonna ekiyinza okuyita mu muliro, bakiyise mu muliro kitukuzibwe, oluvannyuma era kyozebwe n'amazzi agatukuza, olwo kinaaba kirongoofu." 
Numbers31:24 Ku lwomusanvu mwoze engoye zammwe, olwo munaaba balongoofu, era olwo muliyinza okuyingira mu lusiisira.”" 
Numbers31:25 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers31:26 “Ggwe ne Eleyazari n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe mu kibiina mubale omunyago n'ebyawambibwa byonna, abantu n'ebisolo." 
Numbers31:27 Olwayo mulugabanyeemu wabiri wakati w'abo abaagenda ku lutalo n'ekibiina kyonna. 
Numbers31:28 N'Omukama omuggyireko empooza ku mugabo gw'abatabaazi, ng'omuggyirako kimu kimu ku buli bikumi bitaano eby'abantu, endogoyi, endiga n'embuzi." 
Numbers31:29 Empooza eno evudde ku kyokubiri kye bagabanye giwe Eleyazari ng'ekitone ky'Omukama. 
Numbers31:30 Ate ku kyokubiri ekiweereddwa Abayisirayeli, toolako kimu kimu ku buli makumi ataano ag'abantu, ente, endogoyi, endiga n'ebirala byonna, obiwe Abaleevi abalina obuvunaanyizibwa okulabirira Ekisulo ky'Omukama.”" 
Numbers31:31 Musa ne Eleyazari kabona ne bakola ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Olwayo olwasigalawo eggye lye lyali linyaze: endiga obusiriivu mukaaga mu emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi ttaano," 
Numbers31:33 ente emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi bbiri," 
Numbers31:34 endogoyi emitwalo mukaaga mu lukumi," 
Numbers31:35 n'abakazi abateebakanga na musajja emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri. 
Numbers31:36 Ekyokubiri ekyaweebwa abaali balwanye mu lutalo kyali endiga obusiriivu busatu mu emitwalo esatu mu kasanvu mu bitaano," 
Numbers31:37 okwo ne kuvaako empooza y'Omukama ya ndiga lukaaga mu nsanvu mu ttaano; 
Numbers31:38 ente zaali emitwalo esatu mu kakaaga, okwo nga kuvaako empooza y'Omukama ya nte nsanvu mu bbiri;" 
Numbers31:39 endogoyi zaali emitwalo esatu mu bitaano, okwo nga kuvaako empooza y'Omukama ya ndogoyi nkaaga mu emu;" 
Numbers31:40 abantu baali omutwalo gumu mu kakaaga, kuno nga kuvaako empooza y'Omukama ya bantu amakumi asatu mu babiri." 
Numbers31:41 Musa n'awa Eleyazari kabona ekitone ky'Omukama ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa. 
Numbers31:42 Ate ekyokubiri Musa kye yaggyirako Abayisirayeli, kye yali aggye ku mugabo gw'abasajja abaalwana," 
Numbers31:43 kwe kugamba nti ekyokubiri ku lw'ekibiina, kyalimu endiga obusiriivu busatu mu emitwalo esatu mu kasanvu mu ebikumi bitaano," 
Numbers31:44 ente emitwalo esatu mu kakaaga," 
Numbers31:45 endogoyi emitwalo esatu mu ebikumi bitaano 
Numbers31:46 n'abantu omutwalo gumu mu kakaaga. 
Numbers31:47 Musa yaggyako kimu ku buli makumi ataano ag'abantu n'ensolo, n'akiwa Abaleevi abaalina obuvunaanyizibwa okulabirira Ekisulo ky'Omukama, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Numbers31:48 Abagabe b'eggye abaaduumira enkumi n'ebikumi ne basembera eri Musa," 
Numbers31:49 ne bamugamba nti: “Abaweereza bo twabaze abatabaazi buli omu b'aduumira, tekwabuzeeko n'omu." 
Numbers31:50 Olw'okubeera ekyo, buli omu aweerezza Omukama ekitone ekya zaabu gwe twasobola okusanga: obukomo, obunyere, empeta, empeta z'oku matu n'ebibira, tuddaabirize ku lwaffe mu maaso g'Omukama.”" 
Numbers31:51 Musa ne Eleyazari kabona ne babaggyako zaabu, bye biweese byonna." 
Numbers31:52 Zaabu yenna ow'abagabe b'enkumi n'ebikumi Musa ne Eleyazari gwe baaweereza eri Omukama, ng'ekitone eky'okuwuuba, yali azitowa sekeli omutwalo gumu mu kakaaga mu lusanvu mu ataano." 
Numbers31:53 Buli mutabaazi yali yeenyagidde omunyago gwe. 
Numbers31:54 Musa ne Eleyazari ne baggya zaabu ku bagabe b'enkumi n'ab'ebikumi ne bamutwala mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano kibeere kijjukizo eri Abayisirayeli mu maaso g'Omukama. 
Numbers32:1 Bazzukulu ba Rubeni ne bazzukulu ba Gaadi baalina amagana manene nnyo; ne balaba ensi y'e Yakuzeeli ne Gileyaadi nga kifo kirungi ku magana. 
Numbers32:2 Bazzukulu ba Rubeni ne bazzukulu ba Gaadi kwe kujja eri Musa ne Eleyazari kabona n'abakulembeze b'ekibiina, ne babagamba nti:" 
Numbers32:3 “Ataroti, Diboni, Yazeri, Nimura, Kesuboni, Elewale, Sebamu, Nebo ne Bewoni," 
Numbers32:4 ensi Omukama gye yakuba mu maaso g'ekibiina kya Yisirayeli, kitundu kirungi ku magana, ate ffe abaweereza bo tulina amagana." 
Numbers32:5 Obanga tusanze ekisa mu maaso go, ensi eyo eweebwe abaweereza bo ebeere obutaka bwabwe; naye totusomosa Yorudani.”" 
Numbers32:6 Musa n'ayanukula abazzukulu ba Rubeni ne bazzukulu ba Gaadi nti: “Baganda bammwe bwe banaagenda okulwana mmwe munaasigala mutudde wano? 
Numbers32:7 Lwaki muterebula Abayisirayeli batye okusomoka okulaga mu nsi Omukama gye yabawa? 
Numbers32:8 Bajjajjammwe bwe baakola batyo, lwe nabatuma okuva e Kadesi-Baruneya okugenda okuketta ensi." 
Numbers32:9 Bwe baava mu Kiwonvu kya Esukoli, ne balaba ekitundu ekyo, naye ne baterebula buterebuzi emitima gy'Abayisirayeli, baleme kuyingira mu nsi Omukama gye yabawa." 
Numbers32:10 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bwesera ku olwo, n'alayira nti:" 
Numbers32:11 ‘Abantu bano abaayambuka nga bava mu Misiri, okuva ku w'emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, tebagenda kulaba nsi gye nalayira kuwa Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo, kubanga bagaanyi okungoberera n'omutima gwabwe gwonna," 
Numbers32:12 okuggyako Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne ow'omu ssiga ly'Abakenizzi ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu; abo baagoberera Omukama n'omutima gwonna.’ 
Numbers32:13 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli, n'amubungeeseza mu ddungu emyaka amakumi ana, okutuusa ng'ezzadde eryo lyonna liweddewo eryali likoze ekibi mu maaso ge." 
Numbers32:14 Kati muumuno, ezzadde ly'abantu aboonoonyi, muzze mu kifo kya bajjajjammwe obusungu bw'Omukama mubwongere okweserera ku Yisirayeli n'okusingawo." 
Numbers32:15 Bwe muva ku ky'okumugoberera, abantu bano ajja kubaleka mu ddungu omulundi omulala; mmwe munaaba mubaleetedde okuzikirira.”" 
Numbers32:16 Ne bamusemberera ne bamugamba nti: “Twagala tukolere wano ebisolo byaffe engo, era tuzimbire bakazi baffe n'abaana baffe ebibuga," 
Numbers32:17 ffe twetegese okubagalira ebyokulwanyisa tukulemberemu Abayisirayeli, okutuusa lwe tunaabayingiza mu bifo byabwe. Bakazi baffe n'abaana baffe bajja kusigala mu bibuga okuli ebigo ebinywevu okubataasa okulumbibwa bannansi." 
Numbers32:18 Tetugenda kukomawo mu mayumba gaffe okutuusa ng'Abayisirayeli bamaze okufuna obusika bwabwe; 
Numbers32:19 era tetujja kufuna busika mitala wa Yorudani, kubanga obusika obwaffe tubufunye eno ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani.”" 
Numbers32:20 Musa n'abagamba nti: “Bwe mulikola kye musuubizza, ne mubagalira ebyokulwanyisa eby'olutalo mu maaso g'Omukama," 
Numbers32:21 era mwenna bwe mulyebagalira ebyokulwanyisa ne musomoka Yorudani, okutuusa Omukama lw'aligobawo abalabe be mu maaso ge," 
Numbers32:22 ng'ensi yonna emaze okuwangulibwa mu maaso g'Omukama, olwo mulikomawo mu nsi eno, nga temuliiko kye muvunaanibwa mu maaso g'Omukama ne Yisirayeli, n'ensi eno eribeera yammwe ng'obutaka mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Numbers32:23 Naye kino bwe mutaakikole, munaaba mukoze ekibi ew'Omukama; era mutegeere nti ekibi kyammwe kiribasanga." 
Numbers32:24 Kale bakazi bammwe n'abaana bammwe mubazimbire ebibuga, n'ebisolo byammwe mubizimbire engo; naye kye mugambye, mukikolanga.”" 
Numbers32:25 Bazzukulu ba Gaadi ne bazzukulu ba Rubeni ne bakakasa Musa nti: “Abaweereza bo tujja kukola nga mukama waffe bw'olagidde. 
Numbers32:26 Abaana ne bakazi baffe, ente n'endiga zaffe, bijja kusigala wano mu bibuga bya Gileyaadi." 
Numbers32:27 Bo abaweereza bo bonna, buli musajja, ng'ayambaziddwa okugenda mu lutalo bajja kugenda ku lutalo mu maaso g'Omukama, nga ggwe, mukama waffe, bw'oyogedde.”" 
Numbers32:28 Awo Musa n'abawaako ekiragiro eri Eleyazari kabona ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu, n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe ez'Abayisirayeli nti:" 
Numbers32:29 “Bazzukulu ba Gaadi ne bazzukulu ba Rubeni bwe basomokanga Yorudani mu maaso g'Omukama buli muntu ng'ayambaziddwa okugenda mu lutalo, ensi bwe mumalanga okugiwangula, mubawanga Gileyaadi ng'obutaka bwabwe." 
Numbers32:30 Naye bwe basomokanga nga tebabagalidde bya kulwanyisa, ebyabwe balibifuna nammwe mu Kanaani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Bazzukulu ba Gaadi ne bazzukulu ba Rubeni ne baanukula nti: “Nga Omukama bw'agambye, n'abaweereza be bwe tunaakola." 
Numbers32:32 Ffennyini tujja kusomoka tugende mu nsi y'e Kanaani nga tubagalidde ebyokulwanyisa mu maaso g'Omukama; naye ebyaffe, obusika bwaffe, bijja kubeera eno emitala wa Yorudani.”" 
Numbers32:33 Musa n'addira obwakabaka bwa Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori n'obwakabaka bwa Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, ensi n'ebibuga byabwe ebyetooloddewo, n'abiwa abazzukulu ba Gaadi, bazzukulu ba Rubeni n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse mutabani wa Yozefu." 
Numbers32:34 Bazzukulu ba Gaadi ne bazimba Diboni, Ataroti-Aroweri," 
Numbers32:35 Aturoti-Sofani, Yazeri, Yogubewa," 
Numbers32:36 Beti-Nimura ne Beti-Karani, ebibuga okuli n'ebigo, ne bazimba n'engo olw'amagana gaabwe." 
Numbers32:37 Ab'ekika kya Rubeni ne bazimba Kesuboni, Elewale, Kiriyatayimu," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo ne Baali-Mewoni, naye ng'amannya bagafudde, ssaako Sibuma. Ebibuga bye bazimbye ne babituuma amannya." 
Numbers32:39 Ab'essiga lya Makiri mutabani wa Manasse ne bagenda mu nsi ya Gileyaadi ne bagiwamba ne bagobamu Abaamori abaalimu. 
Numbers32:40 Ensi ya Gileyaadi Musa n'agiwa ab'essiga lya Makiri mutabani wa Manasse, ne basenga omwo." 
Numbers32:41 Ate Yayiri, muzzukulu wa Manasse, n'agenda n'akwata ebyalo byakwo, n'abituuma Kavvoti-Yayiri." 
Numbers32:42 Ne Noba n'agenda n'awamba Kenati n'ebyalo byako, n'abituuma erinnya lye Noba." 
Numbers33:1 Zino ze ŋŋendo z'Abayisirayeli bwe baava mu Misiri mu bibinja byabwe nga bakulembeddwa Musa ne Aroni. 
Numbers33:2 Musa yagendanga awandiika buli lugendo lwabwe ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde. Zino ze ŋŋendo zaabwe mu nsenvula zaabwe: 
Numbers33:3 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogusooka, ku lunaku olwaddirira Pasika, Abayisirayeli baasitula ne bava e Raamesesi n'amaanyi mangi, awatali kutya, ng'Abamisiri bonna balaba." 
Numbers33:4 Mu kadde ako bo baali baziika abaggulanda baabwe Omukama be yali abasseemu, anti Omukama yali abonerezza balubaale baabwe." 
Numbers33:5 Abayisirayeli baava e Raamesesi ne basiisira e Sukkoti. 
Numbers33:6 Ne bava e Sukkoti ne basiisira e Etamu, ekiri ku ndeboolebo z'eddungu." 
Numbers33:7 Ne bava e Etamu ne bakuba akaddannyuma nga badda e Pi-Akiroti, ekitunuulidde Baali-Zefoni ne basiisira mu maaso ga Migudoli." 
Numbers33:8 Ne bava e Pi-Akiroti ne basomokera mu nnyanja wakati ne batuuka mu ddungu; ne batambula ennaku ssatu mu ddungu ly'e Etamu, ne basiisira e Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Ne bava e Mara ne bagenda e Elimu awaali enzizi kkumi na bbiri n'enkindu nsanvu; ne basiisira eyo. 
Numbers33:10 Ne bava e Elimu ne basiisira ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa. 
Numbers33:11 Ne bava ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa ne basiisira mu ddungu ly'e Zini. 
Numbers33:12 Ne bava mu ddungu ly'e Zini ne basiisira e Dofuka. 
Numbers33:13 Ne bava e Dofuka ne basiisira e Alusi. 
Numbers33:14 Ne bava e Alusi ne basiisira e Refidimu; awo abantu baabulwawo amazzi ag'okunywa. 
Numbers33:15 Ne bava e Refidimu ne basiisira mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi. 
Numbers33:16 Ne bava mu ddungu ly'e Sinayi ne basiisira e Kiburoti Attaava. 
Numbers33:17 Ne bava e Kiburoti Attaava ne basiisira e Kazeroti. 
Numbers33:18 Ne bava e Kazeroti ne basiisira e Rituma. 
Numbers33:19 Ne bava e Rituma ne basiisira e Rimmoni-Perezi. 
Numbers33:20 Ne bava e Rimmoni-Perezi ne basiisira e Libuna. 
Numbers33:21 Ne bava e Libuna ne basiisira e Rissa. 
Numbers33:22 Ne bava e Rissa ne basiisira e Keelata. 
Numbers33:23 Ne bava e Keelata ne basiisira ku lusozi Seferi. 
Numbers33:24 Ne bava ku lusozi Seferi ne basiisira e Karada. 
Numbers33:25 Ne bava e Karada ne basiisira e Makeeloti. 
Numbers33:26 Ne bava e Makeeloti ne basiisira e Takati. 
Numbers33:27 Ne bava e Takati ne basiisira e Tera. 
Numbers33:28 Ne bava e Tera ne basiisira e Mituka. 
Numbers33:29 Ne bava e Mituka ne basiisira e Kasumona. 
Numbers33:30 Ne bava e Kasumona ne basiisira e Moseroti. 
Numbers33:31 Ne bava e Moseroti ne basiisira e Bene-Yaakani; 
Numbers33:32 Ne bava e Bene-Yaakani, ne basiisira ku Kori-Aggidugadi." 
Numbers33:33 Ne bava e Kori-Aggidugadi ne basiisira e Yotubata. 
Numbers33:34 Ne bava e Yotubata ne basiisira e Aburona. 
Numbers33:35 Ne bava e Aburona ne basiisira e Eziyoni-Geberi. 
Numbers33:36 Ne bava e Eziyoni-Geberi, ne basiisira mu ddungu ly'e Zini, ye Kadesi." 
Numbers33:37 Ne bava e Kadesi ne basiisira ku lusozi Ori, ku nsalo z'ensi Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Ng'Omukama y'alagidde, kabona Aroni yayambuka ku lusozi Ori, n'afiira eyo, mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ana bukya Abayisirayeli bava mu Misiri, mu mwezi ogwokutaano, ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni yali aweza emyaka kikumi mu abiri mu esatu we yafiira ku lusozi Ori. 
Numbers33:40 Kabaka Aradi Omukanaani, eyali abeera mu Negevu, mu nsi y'e Kanaani, n'awulira nti Abayisirayeli bajja." 
Numbers33:41 Ne bava ku lusozi Ori ne basiisira e Zalumona. 
Numbers33:42 Ne bava e Zalumona, ne basiisira e Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Ne bava e Punoni ne basiisira e Oboti. 
Numbers33:44 Ne bava e Oboti ne basiisira e Yiye-Abarimu, ekiri mu nsi y'Abamowabu." 
Numbers33:45 Ne bava e Yiye-Abarimu, ne basiisira e Diboni-Gaadi." 
Numbers33:46 Ne bava e Diboni-Gaadi, ne basiisira e Alumoni-Dibulatayimu." 
Numbers33:47 Ne bava e Alumoni-Dibulatayimu ne basiisira mu nsozi z'e Abarimu okumpi ne Nebo. 
Numbers33:48 Ne bava mu nsozi z'e Abarimu ne basiisira mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu, ku Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Eyo gye baasiisira mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu ku Yorudani okuva e Beti-Yesimoti okutuuka e Yabeli-Sittimu. 
Numbers33:50 Omukama yagamba Musa mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu ku Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko nti: 
Numbers33:51 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Bwe musomokanga Yorudani ne muyingira mu nsi Kanaani," 
Numbers33:52 mugobangamu bonna bannansi mu maaso gammwe. Muzikirizanga ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale byonna ebibajje n'ebisaanuuse, era musaanyangawo ebifo byabwe ebigulumivu." 
Numbers33:53 Mwetwalire ensi mubeere omwo; ngibawadde mugitwale. 
Numbers33:54 Ensi mugigabanye mu bika byammwe ku kalulu; ekika ekinene mukiwanga obusika bunene, ate ekika ekitono mukiwanga obusika butono. Akalulu nga bwe kaliba kagudde ku muntu, n'obusika bwe bwe bulibeera. Ensi mugigabanye nga mugoberera ebika bya bajjajjammwe." 
Numbers33:55 Bwe mutaligobamu bannansi ba mu nsi eyo, abaliba basigaddemu balibabeerera ng'amalobo mu maaso gammwe, oba ng'amaggwa mu mbiriizi. Balibafuukira ba mutawaana;" 
Numbers33:56 awo mmwe ndibakola ekyo kye ndowooza okubakola.’ ” 
Numbers34:1 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers34:2 “Lagira Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Bwe muyingiranga mu nsi y'e Kanaani, ensi egenda okubaweebwa ng'obusika bwammwe, zino ze ziriba ensalo zaayo:" 
Numbers34:3 “ ‘Ensalo zammwe ku ludda olw'emaserengeta zinaabanga ddungu ly'e Zini eriri ku nsalo ne Edomu. Ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba ensalo zammwe zirisimbuka ku Nnyanja ey'Omunnyo," 
Numbers34:4 ne zisalira wansi w'akasozi k'e Akurabbimu ne zituuka ku Zini, awo ne ziserengeta mu Kadesi-Baruneya. Bwe ziva eyo ne ziraga e Kazari-Addari okutuuka ku Azumoni." 
Numbers34:5 Ensalo ziriweta okuva e Azumoni ne zidda ku Kiwonvu kya Misiri, ne zikoma ku nnyanja." 
Numbers34:6 “ ‘Ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, olubalama lw'Ennanyanja Ennene lwe lulibeera ensalo yammwe ebugwanjuba." 
Numbers34:7 “ ‘Ku ludda olw'emambuka, mulirambika ensalo zammwe okuva ku Nnyanja Ennene okutuuka ku lusozi Ori." 
Numbers34:8 Mulizirambika n'okuva ku lusozi Ori ne muzituusa ku Lebo Kamati. Ensalo ziriva eyo ne ziraga e Zedadi," 
Numbers34:9 zirigenda e Zifurona ne zikoma e Kazari-Anani. Ezo ze nsalo zammwe emambuka. 
Numbers34:10 “ ‘Olw'ensalo zammwe ebuvanjuba mulambike ensalo okuva e Kazari-Anani okutuuka Sefamu. 
Numbers34:11 Ensalo zammwe olwo ne zikkirira okuva e Sefamu ne ziraga e Ribula ebuvanjuba wa Ayini, ziserengete nga zigoba ekikko ky'ebuvanjuba ekya Kinnereti," 
Numbers34:12 ensalo olwo ne zikkirira nga zigoba Yorudani ne zikoma ku Nnyanja ey'Omunnyo. “ ‘Eyo y'eribeera ensi yammwe n'ensalo zaayo ku njuyi zonna.’ ” 
Numbers34:13 Musa n'alagira Abayisirayeli nti: “Ensi mugigabanyangamu ng'obusika bwammwe nga mugikubako akalulu, Omukama gye yalagira eweebwe ebika omwenda n'ekitundu," 
Numbers34:14 kubanga ab'ekika eky'abazzukulu ba Rubeni mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Gaadi mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse baafunye dda obusika bwabwe." 
Numbers34:15 Bino ebika ebibiri n'ekitundu byafunye dda obusika bwabyo ebuvanjuba, emitala wa Yeriko enjuba gy'eva.”" 
Numbers34:16 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers34:17 “Gano ge mannya g'abasajja abanaakugabanyiza mu nsi, be ba Eleyazari kabona ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu." 
Numbers34:18 Londa omukulu mu buli kika, akuyambeko mu kugabanyamu ensi." 
Numbers34:19 Gano ge mannya gaabwe: mu kika kya Yuda, omukulembeze ye Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne;" 
Numbers34:20 mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Simewoni, omukulembeze ye Semweli mutabani wa Ammiwudi;" 
Numbers34:21 mu kika kya Benyamiini, omukulembeze ye Elidadi mutabani wa Kisuloni;" 
Numbers34:22 mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Daani, omukulembeze ye Bukki mutabani wa Yoguli;" 
Numbers34:23 mu bazzukulu ba Yozefu; mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Manasse, omukulembeze ye Kanniyeli mutabani wa Efodi;" 
Numbers34:24 mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Efurayimu, omukulembeze ye Kemweli mutabani wa Sifutani;" 
Numbers34:25 mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Zebuluni, omukulembeze ye Elizafani mutabani wa Parunaki;" 
Numbers34:26 mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Yissakari, omukulembeze ye Palutyeli mutabani wa Azzani:" 
Numbers34:27 mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Aseeri, omukulembeze ye Akikudi mutabani wa Selomi;" 
Numbers34:28 mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Nafutali, omukulembeze ye Pedaweli mutabani wa Ammiwudi.”" 
Numbers34:29 Abo Omukama be yalagira bagabanyize Abayisirayeli obusika mu nsi Kanaani. 
Numbers35:1 Omukama yagamba Musa mu miseetwe gya Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko nti: 
Numbers35:2 “Lagira Abayisirayeli bawe Abaleevi ku busika bwe balifuna ebibuga omw'okubeera, babawe amalundiro okwetooloola ebibuga byabwe." 
Numbers35:3 Nabo babeere n'ebibuga babawe amalundiro aw'okulundira ente zaabwe, endiga n'ebisolo byabwe ebirala." 
Numbers35:4 Amalundiro gaabwe galiba mu kibangirizi kya mikono lukumi okwetooloola ekibuga ebweru wa bbugwe w'ebibuga bye mulibawa. 
Numbers35:5 Ebweru w'ekibuga mupimangayo emikono enkumi bbiri ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba, n'emaserengeta era emikono enkumi bbiri, n'ebugwanjuba, nayo emikono enkumi bbiri, n'emambuka era emikono enkumi bbiri, ekibuga nga kiri wakati. Ekibangirizi ekyo kyonna kyabwe ku lw'eddundiro ly'ekibuga." 
Numbers35:6 “Ku bibuga ebyo bye munaawa Abaleevi, mukaaga ku byo biriba bibuga bya bwewogomo, asse omuntu gy'aba addukira. Ate ku ebyo, mubaweeyo ebibuga ebirala amakumi ana mu bibiri." 
Numbers35:7 Awamu bye bibuga ana mu munaana bye munaawa Abaleevi, n'amalundiro gaakwo." 
Numbers35:8 Ebibuga bye munaggya ku butaka bw'Abayisirayeli binaagererwa ku busika buli kika bwe kirina; abalina obungi mubaggyangako bingi, abalina ebitono mubaggyangako bitono.”" 
Numbers35:9 Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers35:10 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Bwe musomokanga Yorudani ne muyingira mu nsi y'e Kanaani," 
Numbers35:11 mulondangayo ebibuga bibeere ebibuga byammwe eby'obuddukiro, aliko omuntu gw'asse mu butanwa gy'ayinza okuddukira." 
Numbers35:12 Biriba bibuga byammwe eby'obuddukiro oli gy'ayinza okuddukira awoolera eggwanga, avunaanibwa okutta alemenga kuttibwa nga tamaze kuleetebwa mu maaso ga kibiina n'awozesebwa." 
Numbers35:13 Ebibuga bino omukaaga bye munaawa biriba bibuga bya buddukiro. 
Numbers35:14 Ebisatu bisse emitala wa Yorudani, ate n'ebisatu mu nsi y'e Kanaani ng'ebibuga eby'obuddukiro." 
Numbers35:15 Ebibuga bino omukaaga kifo kya buddukiro ku buli mwana wa Yisirayeli, n'omugwira, oba omusenze asula mu mmwe, ng'abadde asse omuntu mu butanwa gy'anaddukiranga." 
Numbers35:16 “ ‘Oli bw'akubisanga omuntu ekyuma, gw'akubye n'afa, oyo mutemu, omutemu wa kuttibwanga." 
Numbers35:17 Oli ng'alina ejjinja mu ngalo eriyinza okutta, amala akuba omuntu n'afa, oyo mutemu; omutemu wa kuttibwanga." 
Numbers35:18 Oba alina omuggo mu ngalo oguyinza okutta, amala akuba omuntu n'afa, oyo mutemu; omutemu wa kuttibwanga." 
Numbers35:19 Awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi attanga omutemu; bw'amusanganga, amuttanga." 
Numbers35:20 Singa oli asindikanga munne n'ettima, oba n'amukasukira ekintu mu bugenderevu oli n'afa," 
Numbers35:21 oba olw'obukyayi amukuba ekikonde, oli n'afa, omuntu oyo wa kuttibwanga, kubanga mutemu; awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi bw'asanganga omutemu, amuttanga." 
Numbers35:22 “ ‘Singa amangu ago, nga si lwa bukyayi, oli asindika munne oba amukasukira ekintu mu bugenderevu," 
Numbers35:23 oba n'amuteera ejjinja eriyinza okutta, sso ng'abadde tamulabye, oli amala afa, kubanga teyali mulabe we era nga teyagenderera kumulumya," 
Numbers35:24 ekibiina kinaawulirizanga akubye n'oli awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi ne kiramula nga kigerera ku mateeka gano. 
Numbers35:25 Ekibiina kinaataasanga omutemu ku oli awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi, nga bamuzza mu kibuga eky'obuddukiro gye yali addukidde; asigalanga eyo okutuusa kabona omukulu, eyasiigibwa omuzigo omutukuvu lw'afa." 
Numbers35:26 Oli eyatta bwe kamutandanga n'afuluma ebweru w'ekibuga eky'obuddukiro mwe yaddukira," 
Numbers35:27 awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi amala amusanga eyo, ayinza okumutta n'atavunaanibwa gwa kuyiwa musaayi." 
Numbers35:28 Avunaanibwa ogw'okutta ateekwa okubeera mu kibuga omwo okutuusa nga kabona omukulu afudde. Okuggyako nga kabona omukulu amaze okufa, lw'asobola okuddayo ku butaka bwe." 
Numbers35:29 Eno ye nkola ey'etteeka enaagobererwanga mu mazadde gammwe gonna, na wonna gye munaabeeranga." 
Numbers35:30 “ ‘Asse omuntu attibwanga wamaze kubaawo kulumiriza kw'abajulirwa. Tewabangawo attibwa ng'alumiriziddwa omujulirwa omu yekka. 
Numbers35:31 Temukkirizanga mutango lwa bulamu bwa mutemu bw'aba ddala ng'aliko omusango ogumusaanyiza okufa; oyo wa kuttibwanga. 
Numbers35:32 Era temukkirizanga mutango olw'oyo addukidde mu kibuga eky'obuddukiro, mbu adde ku busika bwe nga kabona omukulu tannafa." 
Numbers35:33 Temujaajaamyanga nsi yammwe mwe muli. Okuyiwa omusaayi kujaajaamya ensi, ate ettaka terisobola kuddaabirizibwa olw'omusaayi gw'omuntu oguliyiseeko, okuggyako omusaayi gw'oyo yennyini eyayiwa omusaayi." 
Numbers35:34 Temujaajamyanga nsi mwe muli, nange mwe nsula; anti nze Mukama asula mu Bayisirayeli.’ ”" 
Numbers36:1 Abakulu b'ennyumba za bakitaabwe mu lunyiriri lwa Gileyaadi mutabani wa Makiri, mutabani wa Manasse, bazzukulu ba Yozefu, bajja eri Musa n'abakulembeze abakulu b'endyo mu Yisirayeli," 
Numbers36:2 ne bagamba nti: “Ssebo, mukama waffe, Omukama bwe yakulagira ensi ogisalemu obusika obugabire Abayisirayeli ku kalulu, bawala ba Zelofekadi muganda waffe wabawa obusika bwa kitaabwe." 
Numbers36:3 Singa tebalifumbirwa basajja okuva mu bika ebirala eby'Abayisirayeli, obusika bwabwe bugenda kuggyibwa ku busika bwa bajjajjaffe buddire obusika bw'ekika gye bafumbiddwa. Ekitundu ky'obusika bwaffe obwatuweebwa bwe kityo kigenda kutwalibwa." 
Numbers36:4 Omwaka gwa Bayisirayeli ogw'Ekijaguzo bwe gulituuka, bye baasikira bigenda kuddira ebika gye baafumbirwa, ekitegeeza nti ebyabwe bigenda kuggyiba ku busika bwa bajjajjaffe.”" 
Numbers36:5 Musa ng'agoberera Omukama bye yali agambye, n'alagira nti: “Ekika kya Bayozefu kyogedde kituufu," 
Numbers36:6 era lino lye tteeka Omukama ly'alangiridde ku bawala ba Zelofekadi: Basobola okufumbirwa yenna gwe baagala, kasita abeera nga wa mu kika kya bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers36:7 Teri busika mu Yisirayeli kuva mu kika kimu kudda mu kirala, kubanga Abayisirayeli ba kukuuma butiribiri obusika bwa bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers36:8 Abawala bonna abasikira obusika mu kika eky'Abayisirayeli, bajja kufumbirwanga basajja ba mu kika kya bajjajjaabwe, bwe kityo buli Muyisirayeli akuumenga obusika bw'ekika kya bajjajjaabe." 
Numbers36:9 Tewali bya busika kuva mu kika kimu kudda mu kirala; buli kika kya kukuuma obusika bwe kyasikira.” Bawala ba Zelofekadi ne bakola ng'Omukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers36:10 Bawala ba Zelofekadi ne bakola ng'Omukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers36:11 Bawala ba Zelofekadi: Makula, Tiruza, Kogula, Miluka ne Nowa, ne bafumbirwa batabani ba bakitaabwe abato." 
Numbers36:12 Baafumbirwa mu bazzukulu ba Manasse, mutabani wa Yozefu; obusika bwabwe ne busigala mu kika ne mu masiga ga bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers36:13 Bino bye biragiro n'amateeka Omukama bye yawa Abayisirayeli ng'abiyisa mu Musa mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu ku Yorudani emitala wa Yeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Bino bye bigambo Musa bye yagamba Yisirayeli yenna ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani mu ddungu, mu Araba emitala wa Sufu, wakati wa Parani ne Tofeli, Labani, Kezeroti ne Di-Zawabu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Okuva ku Korebu okutuuka e Kadesi-Baruneya ng'oyitidde ku lusozi Seyiri kitwala ennaku kkumi na lumu. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ana, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu, ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi, Musa n'abuulira Abayisirayeli byonna Omukama bye yali amulagidde gye bali." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Musa yali amaze okukubira e Edureyi Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori, eyali afuga mu Kesuboni, ne Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, eyali afuga mu Asutaroti." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Musa ng'ali emitala wa Yorudani mu nsi y'Abamowabu, yatandika okunnyonnyola etteeka lino, n'agamba nti:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Omukama Katonda waffe yayogera naffe ku Korebu, n'agamba nti: ‘Ebbanga lye mumaze ku lusozi luno limala;" 
Deuteronomy1:7 mukyuke, mweyongereyo mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'Abaamori, ne mu mawanga gonna agaliranyeewo mu Araba ne mu nsozi, mu Sefela ne mu Negevu, mutuukire ddala ne ku lubalama lw'ennyanja, muyingire mu nsi y'Abakanaani, ne mu Lebanoni okutuuka ku mugga Furaati." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Mulabe, ensi eyo ngibawadde; mugende, mutwale ensi eyo Omukama gye yalayira okuwa bajjajjammwe Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo, n'ezzadde lyabwe eriribaddirira.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Mu budde obwo nabagamba nti: ‘Mumpitiridde obuzito, sibayinza nzekka bw'omu;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Omukama Katonda wammwe abawadde okwala; kati muumwo muli bangi ng'emmunyeenye ku ggulu. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe abawe mwale, muwere nkumi na nkumi, abawe omukisa nga bwe yabagamba." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Naye obw'omu nnaayinza ntya okwetikka emitawaana, obuzito n'ennyombo zammwe?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Mumpe abasajja be mulonze mu bika byammwe, abagezi, abategeevu, abamanyirivu, mbateekewo ng'abaami mu mmwe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Mwannyanukula nti: ‘Ky'oyagala okukola kintu kirungi.’ 
Deuteronomy1:15 Awo ne nzigya mu bika byammwe abasajja abagezi, abamanyirivu, ne mbassaawo ng'abakulu bammwe, babe abagabe b'enkumi n'ebikumi, ataano n'amakumi, babe abakulu mu bika byammwe." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Mu budde obwo nalagira abalamuzi bammwe nti: ‘Muwulire ensonga za baganda bammwe, mubalamule mu bwenkanya, ensonga ne bwe ziba wakati w'abooluganda, oba owooluganda n'omugwira." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Temwekubiiranga nga mulamula; omutene mumuwulirizanga kye kimu n'omunene. Temutyanga muntu n'omu, kubanga alamula ye Katonda. Ensonga ebazibuwalidde, mugindeeteranga, ŋŋenda kugiwulira.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Mu budde obwo nabalagira byonna bye muteekeddwa okukola. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Nga Omukama bwe yali atulagidde, twava ku Korebu ne tukutula mu ddungu eryo lyonna eddene ate ery'entiisa lye mwalaba, ne tuyita mu kkubo ly'omu nsozi mu nsi y'Abaamori, ne tutuuka e Kadesi-Baruneya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ne mbagamba nti: ‘Muzze mu nsozi z'Abaamori, ensi Omukama Katonda waffe gy'atuwadde." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Kati ensi yiiyo Omukama Katonda wo gy'akuwadde; yambuka, ogitwale ng'Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabo bwe yakugamba. Totya, totekemuka.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Mmwe mwenna mwansemberera ne muŋŋamba nti: ‘Tutume abasajja basookeyo gye tugenda, bekkaanye ensi, bajje batubuulire entambula bw'eneeba, batubuulire n'ebifa ku bibuga gye tugenda.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ekirowoozo nakisiima, kwe kulonda mu mmwe abasajja kkumi na babiri, omu mu buli kika." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Ne bagenda ne bambuka mu nsi ey'ensozi, ne batuuka mu Kiwonvu kya Esukoli ne bakiketta." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Baddira ku bibala byayo ne babikkiriza gye twali, ne bagamba nti: ‘Ensi Omukama Katonda waffe gy'agenda okutuwa nnungi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Naye temwayagala kwambukayo; ne mujeemera ekiragiro ky'Omukama Katonda wammwe. 
Deuteronomy1:27 Mwemulugunyiza mu weema zammwe, ne mugamba nti: ‘Omukama yatukyawa, kyeyava atuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri atuweeyo mu mikono gy'Abaamori, batuzikirize." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Tulage wa? Baganda baffe batutekemudde emitima bwe bagambye nti: “Abantu bali bawagguufu, bawanvu okutusinga; ebibuga binene, bbugwe abyetoolodde akoma ku ggulu; twalabyeyo n'Abaanaki.” ’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Ne mbagamba nti: ‘Muleke kutya, temubatya." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Omukama Katonda abakulembedde, y'ajja okubalwanirira, nga bwe yakola ebyo byonna ku lwammwe mu Misiri nga nammwe mulaba." 
Deuteronomy1:31 Era ne mu ddungu naawe wennyini walaba Omukama Katonda wo bwe yakuyisa mu ddungu, ng'akusitudde ng'omuzadde omusajja bw'asitula omwana we, eyo yonna mu kkubo gye wayita, okutuusa lwe muzze mu kifo kino.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Newandibadde olw'ekyo, era temwakkiriza Mukama Katonda wammwe," 
Deuteronomy1:33 eyabakulembera mu ŋŋendo zammwe, ekiro mu muliro, emisana mu mpagi ey'ekire, ng'abanoonyeza ebifo aw'okusiisira n'okubalagirira ekkubo lye munaakwata." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Omukama bwe yawulira ebigambo byammwe, n'asunguwala, n'alayira nti:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Mu basajja ab'ezzadde lino ebbi temuli n'omu aliraba ku nsi ennungi gye nalayira okuwa bajjajjammwe," 
Deuteronomy1:36 okuggyako Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne. Oyo y'aligiraba; ye ndimuwa ensi gy'alinnyeeko ekigere kye, ndigiwa n'abaana be, kubanga yagoberera Omukama n'omutima gwe gwonna.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Nange Omukama yannyiigira olw'okubeera mmwe n'agamba nti: ‘Naawe toliyingirayo. 
Deuteronomy1:38 Naye Yoswa omuweereza wo, y'aliyingirayo. Oyo mugumye, kubanga y'alikulembera Yisirayeli okugyetwalira ng'obusika." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Abaana bammwe abato be mugambye nti ba kutwalibwa nga basibe, amabujje kati agataawula kirungi ku kibi, abo be baliyingira ensi ne bagitwala;" 
Deuteronomy1:40 naye mmwe, kati mukyuke, mugende mu ddungu, mukwate ekkubo ery'Ennyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Mwayanukula nti: ‘Twonoonye ew'Omukama; tujja kwambuka, tulwane, ng'Omukama Katonda waffe bw'atulagidde.’ Buli omu yeesiba ebyokulwanyisa bye nga mulowooza nti kyangu okwambuka mu nsozi." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Bagambe nti: “Temwambuka kugenda kulwana, kubanga sijja kugenda nammwe; abalabe bammwe bajja kubakubirayo” ’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Nabalabula, naye mmwe temwawuliriza, mwajeemera ekiragiro ky'Omukama. Mwetumiikiriza ne mwambuka mu nsozi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Abaamori abaasulanga mu nsozi ezo baavaayo ne babalumba, ne babagoba ng'enjuki bwe zikola, ne babakuba okubaggyira ddala e Seyiri okutuuka e Koruma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Bwe mwakomawo ne mukaabira mu maaso g'Omukama; teyassa mwoyo ku kukaaba kwammwe, teyabawuliriza." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Bwe mutyo ne musigala mu Kadesi ennaku nnyingi ebbanga eryo lyonna lye mwamalayo.” 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Ne tukyuka, ne tusitula nga twolekedde eddungu nga tukutte ekkubo ery'Ennyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa, ng'Omukama bwe yali aŋŋambye. Twamala obudde buwanvu nga twetooloola olusozi Seyiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Olusozi luno mulwetoolodde ekimala; kati mwolekere emambuka. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Abantu balagire obagambe nti: “Mujja kuyita mu nsi ya baganda bammwe, bazzukulu ba Ezawu, abali mu Seyiri, bagenda kubatya naye mubeere beegendereza nnyo." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Mwekkaanye, temubalumbagananga; mu nsi yaabwe sijja kubawaamu wadde ekigere ekimu kiti, kubanga olusozi Seyiri naluwa Ezawu lubeere lulwe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Emmere gye munaalya mugibagulangako na ffeeza, n'amazzi ge munaanywa mugabagulangako na ssente." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Omukama Katonda wo yakuwa omukisa mu byonna emikono gyo bye gikola; akulabiridde mu lugendo lwo ng'okutula eddungu lino eddene. Emyaka amakumi ana, Omukama Katonda wo ng'ali naawe era tewabulwa kantu.” ’" 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Ne tuyita mu baganda baffe, bazzukulu ba Ezawu, abali mu Seyiri, ne tuleka ekkubo lya Araba eriva engulu e Elati ne Eziyoni-Geberi, ne tukwata ekkubo ery'eddungu eriraga e Mowabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Totulugunya Bamowabu, era tobalumbagana, kubanga sijja kukuwa kantu ku nsi yaabwe, kubanga abazzukulu ba Loti nabawa Ari, y'eba ebeera ensi yaabwe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 [Abeemi be baasooka okubeera eyo. Baali bantu ba maanyi nga bangi, nga bawagguufu ng'Abaanaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Okufaanana ng'Abaanaki nabo baali Barefa, newandibadde Abamowabu baabayitanga Beemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Mu Seyiri mwasooka kubeeramu Bakori; mu kifo kyabwe mwaddamu bazzukulu ba Ezawu abaabagobamu ne babazikiriza, nga Yisirayeli bwe yakola mu nsi Omukama gye yabawa ebeere yaabwe.]" 
Deuteronomy2:13 ‘Musituke nno musomoke Ekiwonvu Zeredi.’ “Ne tusomoka omugga. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Okusomoka Ekiwonvu Zeredi nga wayise emyaka asatu mu munaana okuva lwe twava e Kadesi-Baruneya okutuusa ng'ezzadde lyonna ery'abatabaazi lifudde liwedde mu lusiisira, ng'Omukama bwe yali abalayiridde." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Omukono gw'Omukama gwabalinga bukiika okutuusa ng'abamaze mu lusiisira. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Abatabaazi bonna mu bantu nga bamaze okufa," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Olwa leero ojja kusala ensalo za Mowabu e Ari. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Bw'onootuuka mu Bammoni, tobatulugunya era tobalumbagana, kubanga sijja kukuwa ku nsi y'Abammoni, kubanga nagiwa baana ba Loti ebeere yaabwe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:20 [Ensi eyo nayo yali nsi y'Abarefa, abaabeerangamu, naye Abammoni nga babayita Bazamuzummi." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Baali bantu ba maanyi nga bangi; nga bawagguufu ng'Abaanaki. Abo Omukama yabazikiriza, n'awa Abammoni abaabagobamu ne basenga mu kifo kyabwe." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Omukama yabakolera nga bwe yali akoledde bazzukulu ba Ezawu ababeera e Seyiri; yabagobera Abakori n'abazikiriza. Baabagobamu ne badda mu kifo kyabwe n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ate Abavvi abaabeeranga mu byalo okutuuka e Gaza, Abakafutori abaali bavudde e Kafutori baabazikiriza, ne basenga mu bifo byabwe.]" 
Deuteronomy2:24 ‘Musituke. Mweyongereyo, musomoke omugga Arunoni. Laba, Sikoni kabaka w'e Kesuboni Omwamori mmuwadde mu mikono gyo, n'ensi ye. Mutandikireewo okugyezza; mumutabaale." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Olwa leero nzija kutandika okukuba encukwe mu mawanga gonna wansi w'eggulu, bakutye. Buli lwe banaakuwulirangako, nga bakankana, nga beenyoola olw'obulumi mu maaso go.’" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Natuma ababaka nga nsinziira mu ddungu ly'e Kademoti eri Sikoni kabaka w'e Kesuboni n'obubaka obw'emirembe nga ŋŋamba nti: 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Nzikiriza nsalire mu nsi yo; nzija kukwata kkubo ddene lyokka, sijja kukyama kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Emmere ey'okulya gitukuguze na ffeeza, n'amazzi ag'okunywa bwe gatyo; ekikulu nzikiriza nkutulire awo," 
Deuteronomy2:29 ng'abazzukulu ba Ezawu ababeera e Seyiri bwe bankola, ko n'Abamowabu abali mu Ari, okutuusa lwe nnaatuuka ku Yorudani, nsomoke, ndage mu nsi Omukama Katonda waffe gy'anaatuwa.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Naye Sikoni kabaka w'e Kesuboni yagaana okutuleka okuyitawo, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo yali agugubizza omutima gwe, alyoke amuweeyo mu mikono gyo, nga bwe yakikoze kati." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Omukama n'agamba nti: ‘Laba, ntandise okukuwa Sikoni n'ensi ye. Tandika okugiwangula ogitwale.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sikoni n'avaayo okukwatagana naffe ng'ali n'eggye lye lyonna, mu lutalo lw'e Yawazi." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Omukama Katonda waffe n'amutuwa, ne tumukuba ne batabani be n'eggye lye lyonna." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Mu budde obwo ebibuga bye byonna ne tubiwamba, ne tubizikiririza ddala byonna na buli muntu, abasajja, abakazi n'abato; tetwalekamu n'omu yawonawo," 
Deuteronomy2:35 naye ebisolo by'awaka n'ebintu bye twanyaga mu bibuga bye twawamba twabyetwalira. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Okuva ku Aroweri ekiri ku lubalama lw'omugga Arunoni, n'okuva ku kibuga ekiri mu kiwonvu, okutuuka e Gileyaadi, tewaali kibuga kyatusukkirira; byonna Omukama Katonda waffe yabituwa." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kyokka okusinziira ku ebyo byonna Omukama Katonda waffe bye yali atulagidde, temwalumba ku nsi y'Abammoni, n'eyo eri ku Kiwonvu Yabboki, n'eyeetoolodde ebibuga eby'omu nsozi." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Ne tukyuka, ne twambuka nga tukutte ekkubo eriraga mu Basani; Ogi kabaka w'e Basani n'avaayo n'eggye lye lyonna okutusisinkana mu lutalo e Edureyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Tomutya, kubanga mmuwaddeyo mu mikono gyo n'eggye lye lyonna n'ensi ye. Mukole nga bwe wakola Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori, eyabeeranga mu Kesuboni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Omukama Katonda waffe n'atuwa mu mikono gyaffe ne Ogi kabaka w'e Basani n'eggye lye lyonna; ne tubakuba bonna obutalekaawo n'omu yawonawo. 
Deuteronomy3:4 Mu budde obwo ebibuga bye byonna ne tubiwamba. Tewali kibuga kye tutaabawambako ku bibuga enkaaga, ensi yonna ey'e Arugobu, obwakabaka bwa Ogi mu Basani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ebibuga bino byonna byaliko bbugwe omuwanvu, enzigi n'emiyingo; era waaliyo n'obubuga bungi nnyo obutaaliko bbugwe." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Ne tubazikiririza ddala obutalekaawo nga bwe twali tukoze Sikoni kabaka w'e Kesuboni, ne tusaanyaawo abasajja, abakazi n'abaana abato abaali mu bibuga." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Naye ebisolo by'awaka n'ebintu ebyanyagibwa mu bibuga twabyetwalira. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Bwe tutyo mu budde obwo bakabaka ababiri ab'Abaamori, twabawambako ensi yaabwe emitala wa Yorudani, okuva ku Kiwonvu Arunoni okutuukira ddala ku lusozi Kerumoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 [Abasidoni olusozi Kerumoni baaluyitanga Siriyoni, ate Abaamori nga baluyita Seniri.]" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Twawamba ebibuga byonna ebyali mu museetwe, n'ensi yonna eya Gileyaadi ne Basani okutuukira ddala ku Saleka ne Edureyi, ebibuga by'obwakabaka bwa Ogi mu Basani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 [Ogi kabaka w'e Basani yekka ye yali akyasigaddewo ku Barefa. Ekitanda kye eky'ekyuma kyalina emikono mwenda mu buwanvu ate ena mu bugazi. Kikyaliyo e Rabba mu Bammoni.] 
Deuteronomy3:12 “N'eyo ensi ne tugitwala. Ebitundu ebyo ne mbiwa ab'ekika kya Rubeni n'ekya Gaadi okuva ku Aroweri, ekiri ku lubalama lw'Ekiwonvu Arunoni, n'ekitundu ky'ensozi za Gileyaadi n'ebibuga byamu." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ekitundu ekyasigalawo ekya Gileyaadi ne Basani yenna, obwakabaka bwa Ogi, nakiwa ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse. [Ensi yonna eya Arugobu ne Basani yenna byali bimanyiddwa nga nsi y'Abarefa.]" 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yayiri muzzukulu wa Manasse yafuna ensi ya Arugobu yonna okutuuka ku nsalo n'Abagessuri n'Abamaakati, n'atuuma Basani erinnya lye Kavvoti-Yayiri, era bwe kikyayitibwa n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Makiri ne mmuwa Gileyaadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 N'ab'ekika ekya Rubeni n'ekya Gaadi ne mbaawuliza ku nsi okuva e Gileyaadi okutuuka ku Kiwonvu Arunoni, n'okweyongerayo okutuuka ku Kiwonvu Yabboki ekikola ensalo n'Abammoni:" 
Deuteronomy3:17 Ensalo zaabwe okudda ebuvanjuba nga gwe mugga Yorudani okuviira ddala ku Kinnereti n'okukkira ddala okutuuka ku nnyanja ya Araba, Ennyanja y'Omunnyo, ne wansi w'enkonko za Pisuga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Mu budde obwo nabalagira ne mbagamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda wammwe abawadde ensi eno, mugitwale. Naye mwenna abasajja abeesobola nga mubagalidde ebyokulwanyisa, mukulemberemu baganda bammwe Abayisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Bo bakazi bammwe, abaana n'ebisolo byammwe, anti mmanyi nti mulina amagana mangi, bijja kusigala mu bibuga bye nabawa," 
Deuteronomy3:20 okutuusa Omukama lw'aliwa baganda bammwe ekiwummulo nga bw'akiwadde mmwe, nabo ne bafuna ensi Omukama Katonda wammwe gy'alibawa emitala wa Yorudani; olwo buli omu aliddayo mu kitundu kye kye namuwa.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Mu budde obwo ne Yoswa namulagira nti: ‘Amaaso go galabye Omukama Katonda wammwe by'akoze bakabaka bano ababiri; bw'alikola bw'atyo obwakabaka bwonna gy'oliraga ng'osomose. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Tobatya, kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe y'alirwana mu kifo kyammwe.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Mu budde obwo nawanjagira Omukama ne ŋŋamba nti: 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Ayi Mukama Omuyinza, otandise okwoleka omuweereza wo obukulu bwo n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi; kubanga lubaale ki mu ggulu ne mu nsi asobola okukola by'okola, n'okwegeranya ku by'amaanyi by'okola?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Mpa nange nsomoke, ndabe ku nsi eno ennungi ey'emitala wa Yorudani, n'ensi ey'ensozi ne Lebanoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Naye olw'okubeera mmwe Omukama n'ansunguwalira, teyampuliriza, yaŋŋamba bugambi nti: ‘Ekyo kimala. Toddayo n'oyogera nange ku kigambo ekyo." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Yambuka ku ntikko ye Pisuga oyiseeyise amaaso go ebugwanjuba, emambuka, emaserengeta n'ebuvanjuba; ensi girengerere awo anti tojja kusomoka Yorudani ono." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Tongoza Yoswa, mukalangule, omugumye, kubanga y'anaasomosa eggwanga lino, era y'alibagabira ensi gy'onoolaba.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Awo nno ne tusigala awo mu kiwonvu okumpi ne Beti-Pewori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Kale nno, Yisirayeli, wulira amateeka n'ebiragiro bye mbayigiriza, mubituuse mulyoke musobole okuyingira mu nsi mugitwale, ensi Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe gy'anaabawa." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Temugattanga kigambo ku bye mbagamba, era temuggyangako n'ekimu; wabula mukwatenga ebiragiro by'Omukama Katonda wammwe bye mbawa." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Mwalaba n'amaaso gammwe byonna Omukama bye yakola e Baali-Pewori; nga bwe yazikiriza mu mmwe bonna abaagobereranga Baali ow'e Pewori. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Sso mmwe abaanywerera ku Mukama Katonda wammwe, mwenna muli balamu leero." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Wuuno nabayigiriza amateeka n'ebiragiro, ng'Omukama Katonda wange bwe yandagira, mubituusanga mu nsi gye mugenda okutwala." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Mubikwatanga butiribiri era mubituusanga. Olwo lwe muliraga mu maaso g'amawanga amagezi gammwe n'okutegeera kwammwe. Bwe baliwulira amateeka ago gonna, balyewuunya nti: ‘Mulabe eggwanga ettutumufu lino, eggezi era eggwanga eritegeera!’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Kale ggwanga ki eddala ettutumufu, eririna balubaale abaliri okumpi ng'Omukama Katonda waffe bw'ali naffe buli lwe tumukoowoola?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ye ggwanga ki eddala ettutumufu, eririna amateeka n'ebiragiro ebituukirivu, ng'amateeka gano ge mbassa mu maaso gammwe leero bwe gali?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Weekuume wennyini era wegendereze nnyo oleme kwerabira bintu amaaso go bye galabye, oba n'obireka ne bikuva mu mutima gwo ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo. Obiyigirizanga abaana bo ne bazzukulu bo." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Jjukira olunaku lwe wayimirira mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo ku Korebu, Omukama lwe yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Kuŋŋaanyiza we ndi abantu, bawulire ebigambo byange, bayige okuntya obudde bwonna bwe banaamala mu nsi, babiyigirize n'abaana baabwe.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Mwasembera ne muyimirira wansi w'olusozi, olwabuubuukanga omuliro okutuuka ku ggulu, nga luliko ekire ekiddugavu n'enzikiza ekutte." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Omukama yayogera nammwe ng'ayima mu muliro wakati; ebigambo mwabiwulira kyokka temwalaba nfaanana ye, mwawulira ddoboozi lyokka." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Yabanjulira endagaano ye gye yalagira mugoberere, Ebigambo Ekkumi bye yawandiika ku mpande ebbiri ez'amayinja." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Mu budde obwo nange yandagira mbayigirize amateeka n'ebiragiro bye muteekwa okugoberera mu nsi gye mugenda okutwala. 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Mwekuume nnyo. Temwalaba nfaanana ye ku lunaku Omukama lwe yayogera nammwe ku Korebu ng'ayima wakati mu muliro," 
Deuteronomy4:16 muleme kwonooneka nga mwekolera ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebyole mu nfaanana ya buli kifaananyi, abeere musajja oba mukazi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 oba ekifaananyi eky'ekisolo kyonna ku nsi, oba eky'ekinyonyi kyonna ekibuuka mu bbanga," 
Deuteronomy4:18 oba eky'ebyewalula ku ttaka, oba eky'ebyennyanja ebiri wansi mu mazzi." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Bw'ositulanga amaaso eri eggulu n'olaba enjuba n'omwezi n'emmunyeenye, eggye lyonna ery'eggulu, tokemebwanga n'obivunnamira n'obisinza; ebyo byo Omukama Katonda wo yabirekera gali amawanga amalala gonna wansi w'eggulu." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Naye mmwe Omukama yabaggya mu kabiga k'essasa ly'e Misiri, obeere eggwanga lye, obusika bwe, nga bwe mumanyi bwe kiri kaakati." 
Deuteronomy4:21 “Omukama yansunguwalira olw'okubeera mmwe, n'alayira nti sijja kusomoka Yorudani na kuyingira mu nsi ennungi, Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa ebeere obusika bwo." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Nze ŋŋenda kufiira mu nsi eno; sijja kusomoka Yorudani, naye mmwe mujja kusomoka, ensi eyo amakula mugitwale." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Kyokka mwekkaanye, temwerabiranga endagaano y'Omukama Katonda wammwe gye yakuba nammwe, temwekoleranga bifaananyi bya balubaale byole mu nfaanana y'ebyo byonna Omukama Katonda wo bye yakugaana;" 
Deuteronomy4:24 kubanga Omukama Katonda wo muliro ogusenkenya, Katonda ow'obuggya." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Oluvannyuma ng'ozadde abaana n'abazzukulu, nga mumaze okulwa mu nsi, mumala mwonooneka nga mukola ekifaananyi kyonna ekyole mu nfaanana y'ekintu kyonna, ne mukola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, ne mumunyiiza," 
Deuteronomy4:26 olwa leero mpita eggulu n'ensi ng'abajulirwa bange mu maaso gammwe, nti ensi gye mugenda okutwala nga musomose Yorudani, temuligibeeramu bbanga ggwanvu, mugenda kuzikiririra ddala." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Omukama alibasaasaanya mu mawanga, era abaliwonawo eyo mu mawanga Omukama gy'alibatwala baliba batono." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Eyo muliweererezaayo balubaale abantu be beekoledde mu miti ne mu mayinja, abatasobola kulaba, kuwulira, kulya wadde okuwunyiriza." 
Deuteronomy4:29 “Naye nga muli eyo bw'olinoonya Omukama Katonda wo, ogenda kumuggukako; naye ng'omunoonyezza n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ennaku bw'erimala okukuyinga, bino byonna nga bimaze okukugwira, gye bujja, olidda eri Omukama Katonda wo n'owulira eddoboozi lye." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Kubanga Omukama Katonda wo, Katonda wa kisa; talikuvaamu, talikuzikiriza, era talyerabira ndagaano ne bajjajjaabo gye yabalayirira." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Tunula olabe mu nnaku ez'edda, edda nga tonnaba kubaawo, okuva Katonda lwe yatonda omuntu ku nsi; buuliriza okuva eggulu gye liva okutuuka gye likoma, olabe oba waali wabaddewo ekintu ekyenkana awo, oba kyali kiwuliddwako;" 
Deuteronomy4:33 oba waali wabaddewo eggwanga ne liwulira eddoboozi lya Katonda ayogera ng'ayima mu muliro wakati, nga ggwe bwe waliwulira, n'asigala nga mulamu!" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Oba waali wabaddewo lubaale agenda ne yeggyirayo eggwanga okuva mu ggwanga eddala nga yeeyamba ebigezo, n'obubonero, n'ebikuuno, n'entalo, n'omukono ogw'amaanyi, n'omukono omugolole, n'ebikolwa eby'entiisa, ng'ebyo Omukama Katonda wammwe bye yakola mu Misiri nga naawe olaba?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 “Bino byakwolekebwa, olyoke omanye nti Omukama yennyini ye Katonda, era tewali mulala okuggyako ye." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Yakuwa n'owulira eddoboozi lye nga liva mu ggulu akuyigirize; ku nsi n'akulaga omuliro gwe ogubumbujja, n'owulira ebigambo bye nga biva mu muliro wakati." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Lwa kubeera nga yayagala bajjajjaabo, n'alonda ezzadde lyabwe eribaddirira. Yakuggya mu Misiri nga yeeyoleka yennyini era n'amaanyi ge ag'ekitalo," 
Deuteronomy4:38 alyoke agobewo amawanga amanene agakusinga amaanyi, akuyingize mu nsi yaabwe, agikuwe ng'obusika bwo, nga bwe kiri kaakati." 
Deuteronomy4:39 “Manya nno olwa leero, era okikwate mu mutima gwo, nti Omukama yennyini ye Katonda waggulu eyo mu ggulu, ne wansi mu nsi; teriiyo mulala." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Kwata amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye bye nkuwa olwa leero, olyoke obeerenga bulungi n'abaana bo abalikuddirira, obeere mu nsi ebbanga ggwanvu, ensi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa emirembe gyonna.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Musa n'ayawula ebibuga bisatu ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani 
Deuteronomy4:42 abeeranga asse munne gy'anaddukiranga, singa abeera amusse mu butanwa nga tebwali bukyayi mu kusooka. Alisobolanga okuddukira mu bibuga ebyo n'awonya obulamu bwe." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Ebibuga nga ye Bezeri mu ddungu, ekiri mu nsi ey'omuseetwe, olw'ekika kya Rubeni; ne Ramoti mu Gileyaadi, olw'ekika kya Gaadi; ne Golani mu Basani, olw'ekika kya Manasse." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Lino lye tteeka Musa lye yawa Abayisirayeli; 
Deuteronomy4:45 bino ye njigiriza, amateeka n'ebiragiro bye yabuulira Abayisirayeli lwe baava e Misiri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 emitala wa Yorudani mu kiwonvu kya Beti-Pewori, mu nsi ya Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori eyabeeranga mu Kesuboni, Musa n'Abayisirayeli gwe baakuba bwe baali bava e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Baatwala ensi ye n'ensi ya Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, bakabaka abo ababiri ab'Abaamori abaali emitala ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani," 
Deuteronomy4:48 okuva ku Aroweri, ekiri ku lubalama lw'omugga Arunoni, okutuuka ku lusozi Siyoni, ye Kerumoni," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ne Araba yenna emitala ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani okutuuka ku nnyanja y'e Araba wansi w'enkonko za Pisuga. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Musa n'ayita Yisirayeli yenna, n'agamba nti: “Wulira, Yisirayeli, amateeka n'ebiragiro bye nnangirira mu matu gammwe olwa leero; mubiyige, mwetegeke okubituusanga." 
Deuteronomy5:2 “Omukama Katonda waffe yakola naffe endagaano ku Korebu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Endagaano teyagikola na bajjajjaffe, wabula naffe abalamu abaliwo kaakati." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Omukama yayogera nammwe ku lusozi maaso ku maaso ng'ayima mu makkati g'omuliro. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Mu budde obwo nze nali omutabaganya wakati w'Omukama nammwe, nga mbabuulira ebigambo bye, kubanga mwali mutya omuliro ne mutayambuka ku lusozi. Yagamba nti:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 “ ‘Nze Mukama Katonda wo, eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu nnyumba y'obuddu." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Tobanga na balubaale we ndi. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Teweekoleranga kifaananyi kyole mu nfaanana y'ekintu kyonna ekiri mu ggulu waggulu, oba ekiri ku nsi wansi, oba mu mazzi ku ntobo y'ensi." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Tobivunnamiranga era tobiweerezanga. Kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wo, ndi Katonda ow'obuggya, mbonereza omusango gw'abazadde mu baana n'abazzukulu okutuusa ku zzadde eryokusatu n'eryokuna ery'abo abankyawa." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Naye ngirira ekisa enkumi z'abo abanjagala era abakwata ebiragiro byange. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Tokozesanga linnya lya Mukama Katonda wo mu bitaliimu, kubanga Omukama talibala oyo akozesezza erinnya lye mu bitaliimu ng'atalina musango." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Okuzanga olunaku lwa Sabbaato n'olutukuza, ng'Omukama Katonda wo bwe yakulagira." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Onookoleranga ennaku mukaaga n'okola emirimu gyo gyonna. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Naye olunaku olwomusanvu ye Sabbaato ku lw'Omukama Katonda wo. Tokolanga mulimu ku olwo, ggwe, newandibadde mutabani wo, newandibadde muwala wo, newandibadde abaddu bo abasajja n'abakazi, oba ente yo, oba endogoyi yo na buli kisolo kyo, omugwira ali naawe mu kibuga kyo; omuddu wo n'omuzaana nabo bawummuleko nga ggwe bw'okola." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Jjukira nga naawe wali muddu mu Misiri, Omukama Katonda n'akuggyayo n'omukono ogw'amaanyi, n'omukono omugolole. Omukama Katonda wo kyeyava akulagira otukuzenga olunaku lwa Sabbaato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa, ng'Omukama Katonda wo bwe yakulagira, olyoke owangaale era obeere wa mukisa ku nsi, Omukama Katonda wo gy'alikuwa." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Tottanga. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Toyendanga. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Tobbanga. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘Towanga bujulizi bwa bulimba ku munno. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Teweegombanga mukazi wa munno; teweegombanga nnyumba ya munno, wadde ennimiro ye, oba omuddu we, oba omuzaana we, oba ente ye, oba endogoyi, na buli kikye.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Bino ebigambo Omukama bye yalangirira gye muli mu ddoboozi ekkalangufu nga mukuŋŋaanye ku lusozi, ng'ayima mu muliro wakati mu kire ne mu nzikiza ekutte; tewali kye yayongerako. Yabiwandiika ku mpande bbiri ez'amayinja, n'abimpa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Mmwe bwe mwawulira eddoboozi eriva mu nzikiza, n'olusozi nga lwaka omuliro, bakulu bammwe bonna mu bika n'abakadde bajja gye ndi," 
Deuteronomy5:24 ne mugamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda waffe atulaze obukulu bwe n'ekitiibwa kye, n'eddoboozi lye tuliwulidde mu makkati g'omuliro. Tukakasizza olwa leero nti Katonda asobola okwogera n'omuntu, omuntu n'alama." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Naye kati tufiira ki? Omuliro guno omungi gujja kutumalawo tufe bwe tunaayongera okuwulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda waffe. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Omuntu waawa eyali awulidde eddoboozi lya Katonda omulamu, ayogera ng'ayima mu muliro wakati, nga ffe bwe tuwulidde, n'alama?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Ekisinga, ggwe genda owulire byonna Omukama Katonda by'ayogera, oluvannyuma ggwe onootubuulira byonna Omukama Katonda waffe by'anaaba akugambye. Tujja kubiwuliriza era tujja kubituusanga.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Omukama yawulira bye mwali muŋŋamba, n'agamba nti: ‘Mpulidde abantu bano kye bakugamba; mu byonna bayogedde bulungi." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Singa nno bafuna omutima oguntya ne bakwatanga ebiragiro byange byonna bulijjo, balyoke babeere bulungi, bo n'abaana baabwe emirembe gyonna!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Genda obagambe nti: “Mweddireyo mu weema zammwe.” 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ggwe sigala wano nange, nkuwe ebiragiro, amateeka, n'ennamula by'onoobayigiriza, babituusenga mu nsi gye ndibawa bagitwale.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Awo nno mukwatenga Omukama Katonda wammwe bye yabalagira, mubituusenga, temuwunjukanga kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Mutambulirenga mu ebyo Omukama Katonda wammwe bye yabalagira, lwe munaalama, ne muba bulungi, ne muwangaala mu nsi gye mugenda okutwala." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Bino bye biragiro, amateeka n'ennamula Omukama Katonda wammwe bye yandagira mbibayigirize mubikwatenga mu nsi gye musomokera Yorudani mugitwale," 
Deuteronomy6:2 bwe mutyo mmwe n'abaana bammwe ne bazzukulu bammwe mutyenga Omukama Katonda wammwe ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwammwe, nga mukwata empisa n'ebiragiro byonna bye mbawa, mulyoke muwangaale." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Wulira, Yisirayeli, wekkaanye obituusenga, olyoke obeere bulungi, oyale nnyo mu nsi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, ng'Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabo bwe yakusuubiza." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Wulira, Yisirayeli: Omukama Katonda waffe yekka ye Mukama." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Oyagalanga Omukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna n'omwoyo gwo gwonna n'amaanyi go gonna. 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ebigambo bino bye nkulagira olwa leero, bibeerenga mu mutima gwo." 
Deuteronomy6:7 Obikuutiranga abaana bo, era obiddiŋŋananga ng'otudde mu nnyumba yo, ng'otambula mu kkubo, ng'ogenda okwebaka oba nga wa kazuukuka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Obisibanga ku mukono gwo ng'akabonero, era obisibanga mu kyenyi kyo;" 
Deuteronomy6:9 obiwandiikanga ku myango gy'ennyumba yo ne ku miryango gyo. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Omukama Katonda wo bw'akuyingizanga mu nsi gye yalayirira bajjajjaabo Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo, nti aligikuwa, ensi ey'ebibuga ebinene, ebirungi by'otaazimba," 
Deuteronomy6:11 ey'ennyumba ezijjudde obugagga bwonna bw'otajjuzaamu, enzizi z'otaasima, n'ennimiro z'emizabbibu n'oliva by'otaasimba, bw'oliba omaze okulya n'okkuta," 
Deuteronomy6:12 wekkaanye bulungi, teweerabiranga Omukama eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu nnyumba y'obuddu." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Otyanga Omukama Katonda wo, era yekka gw'oweerezanga, mu linnya lye mw'olayiriranga." 
Deuteronomy6:14 “Temugobereranga balubaale bagwira, balubaale b'amawanga agabeetoolodde." 
Deuteronomy6:15 Kubanga Omukama Katonda wo, oyo Katonda ali mu makkati gammwe, wa buggya, era obusungu bwe bulikwesererako akusangulewo ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Temukemanga Mukama Katonda wammwe nga bwe mwakola e Massa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mukuumirenga ddala ebiragiro by'Omukama, by'ayigiriza n'amateeka ge bye yakulagira." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Kolanga ekituufu era ekirungi mu maaso g'Omukama, olyoke obeere bulungi, oyingire otwale ensi ennungi Omukama gye yalayirira bajjajjaabo," 
Deuteronomy6:19 ng'akugoberawo abalabe bo. Bw'atyo Omukama bwe yasuubiza. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Gye bujja omwana wo bw'akubuuzanga nti: ‘Bino enjigiriza, amateeka n'ebiragiro Omukama Katonda waffe bye yabalagira bitegeeza ki?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 omuddangamu nti: ‘Twali baddu ba Faraawo mu nsi y'e Misiri, Omukama n'atuggyayo mu Misiri n'omukono ogw'amaanyi." 
Deuteronomy6:22 N'akola obubonero obwewuunyisa n'ebikuuno, ebinene ate eby'entiisa mu Misiri ng'abikola ku Faraawo n'ennyumba ye yonna mu maaso gaffe." 
Deuteronomy6:23 N'atuggyayo, atuleete mu nsi era agituwe, ensi gye yali alayiridde bajjajjaffe." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Omukama n'atulagira tukwatenga amateeka gano gonna, tutye Omukama Katonda waffe, tulyoke tubeere bulungi, era atukuume nga tuli balamu, nga bwe tuli kaakati." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Obutuukirivu bwaffe buliba mu kino: bwe tulikwata ne tutuusa ebiragiro bino byonna mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda waffe nga ye bwe yatulagira.’ 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Omukama Katonda wo bw'alimala okukuyingiza mu nsi gy'ogenda okutwala, ng'akugobeddewo amawanga amangi: Abakitti, Abagirugasi, Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizzi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi, amawanga omusanvu agakusinga obunene n'entiisa," 
Deuteronomy7:2 Omukama Katonda wo ng'amaze okugakuwa mu mikono gyo, ng'obakuba, obazikiririzanga ddala, tokolanga nabo ndagaano, era tobakwatirwanga kisa." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Temuwasaŋŋananga; bawala bo tobafumbizanga batabani baabwe, ne bawala baabwe tobawasizanga batabani bo," 
Deuteronomy7:4 kubanga bagenda kukyamya batabani bo, balekeyo okungoberera, baweereze balubaale abagwira, amangu ago obusungu bw'Omukama bugenda kubeesererako bubazikirize." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Wabula bino bye mubakolanga: emyaliiro gyabwe mugimenyangawo, amayinja ge baasimba mugaasaayasanga, empagi zaabwe eza Asera muzitemanga, n'ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale mubyokyanga." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Kubanga ku Mukama Katonda wo oli ggwanga lye ttukuvu. Ggwe Omukama Katonda wo yakulonda n'akwebonanya obeere eggwanga lye, ekkula lye, mu mawanga gonna agali ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Omukama yabaagala n'abalonda si kubanga nti mu mawanga gonna mmwe mwali musinga obunene, mu mazima mmwe mwali musinga obutono." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Naye kubanga Omukama yabaagala, n'olw'okukwata kye yalayirira bajjajjammwe, yabaggyayo n'omukono ogw'amaanyi, n'akununula mu nnyumba ey'obuddu, mu mikono gya Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Manya nti Omukama Katonda wo yennyini ye Katonda, Katonda omwesigwa, akuumira endagaano n'ekisa mu mazadde n'amazadde abamwagala n'abakwata ebiragiro bye." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Oyo yennyini amukyawa amuzikiriza, talonzalonza kusasula oyo yennyini amukyawa." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Kale nno kwata ebiragiro, amateeka n'ennamula bye nkulagira olwa leero obituusenga." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Amateeka gano bwe muligawulira, ne mugakwatanga, ne mugatuusa, n'Omukama Katonda wo alikukuumira endagaano n'ekisa bye yalayirira bajjajjammwe." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Agenda kukwagala akuwe omukisa, akuwe okwala. Aliwa omukisa ezzadde ly'olubuto lwo n'ebibala by'ettaka lyo: eŋŋano, evviini ensu, n'omuzigo; aliwa omukisa obuyana bw'ente zo n'obuliga bw'omu kisibo kyo, mu nsi gye yalayirira bajjajjaabo okugikuwa." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Oliweebwa omukisa mu mawanga gonna. Mu ggwe temuliba musajja atalina mwana na mukazi mugumba, ne mu bisolo byo temuliba kitazaala." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Omukama alikutaliza buli ndwadde; talikuleetera ndwadde za ntiisa ez'e Misiri ze walabako, wabula alizireetera abo bonna abakukyawa." 
Deuteronomy7:16 “Amawanga gonna Omukama Katonda g'aliwaayo mu mikono gyo, ogazikirizanga; togatunuulizanga ekisaasaazi, era toweerezanga balubaale baabwe, kubanga bagenda kubabeerera omutego." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Oyinza okugamba mu mutima gwo nti: ‘Amawanga gano ga maanyi okutusinga, tunaasobola tutya okugagobawo?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Leka kubatya, wabula jjukira Omukama Katonda wo bye yakola Faraawo ne Misiri yonna," 
Deuteronomy7:19 nga bwe yakuggyayo n'ebigezo ebinene amaaso go bye gaalaba, obubonero, ebikuuno, omukono ogw'amaanyi, n'omukono omugolole; n'amawanga gonna g'otya bw'anaagakola atyo." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Omukama Katonda wo alibasindikira ennumba okutuusa nga n'abo abasigalidde abaliba babeekwese bazikiridde. 
Deuteronomy7:21 “Tobatyanga, kubanga Omukama Katonda ali mu makkati gammwe, Katonda mukulu, wa ntiisa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Omukama Katonda wo amawanga gano ajja kugagobawo mpolampola. Tajja kubaleka mugazikirize mangu mutyo, ebisolo eby'ettale bireme kubeeyongerera bungi." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Naye Omukama Katonda agenda kubakuwa mu mikono gyo, abaleetemu okutabukatabuka kungi okutuusa bonna lwe balizikirira." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Bakabaka baabwe agenda kubakuwa mu mikono gyo, amannya gaabwe ogasangulewo wansi w'eggulu; tewaliba n'omu asobola kukuziyiza; olibasanyaawo." 
Deuteronomy7:25 “Ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale obyokyanga omuliro; teweegombanga ffeeza na zaabu abiriko, tomwetwaliranga, sikulwa ng'akufuukira omutego; kubanga Omukama Katonda wo ebyo abyenyinyala." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Toleetanga ekyenyinyalwa mu nnyumba yo, sikulwa nga naawe, okufaanana nga byo, osalirwa okuzikirizibwa. Obyetamirwanga ddala era n'obyenyinyala, kubanga bino bisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Wekkaanye, buli kiragiro kye nkulagira olwa leero okituusanga mulyoke mubeere balamu, mweyongere obungi era muyingire ensi mugitwale, ensi Omukama gye yalayirira bajjajjammwe." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Ojjukiranga olugendo lwonna Omukama Katonda wo lw'akuyisizzaamu mu ddungu emyaka gino amakumi ana, ng'agenderera okukutoowaza n'okukugeza, amanye ekyakuli ku mutima gwo, oba oli wa kukwatanga biragiro bye oba nedda." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Yakutoowaza n'akulumya enjala, ate n'akuliisa ne manu, ggwe ne bajjajjaabo gye mwali mutamanyi, alyoke akuyigirize nti omuntu taba mulamu lwa mugaati gwokka, naye n'olw'ekigambo kyonna ekifuluma mu kamwa k'Omukama." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Ebyambalo byo tebyayabirirako, n'ebigere byo tebyazimba mu myaka egyo amakumi ana." 
Deuteronomy8:5 “Kimanye nno mu mutima gwo nti ng'omuntu bw'agunjula omwana we, n'Omukama Katonda wo bwe yakugunjula." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Awo nno kwatanga ebiragiro by'Omukama Katonda wo, otambulirenga mu makubo ge, era omutyenga." 
Deuteronomy8:7 “Anti Omukama Katonda wo akutwala mu nsi ennungi, ensi ey'emigga n'ebidiba eby'amazzi, erina ensozi n'ebiwonvu omufubutuka ensulo z'amazzi," 
Deuteronomy8:8 ensi ey'eŋŋano, sayiri, emizabbibu, emikunyu, amakomamawanga, omuzigo gw'oliva n'omubisi gw'enjuki;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 ensi mwe mutalijula kantu, mw'oliriira omugaati gwo awatali kujula; ensi ey'amayinja ag'ekyuma n'ensozi omusimwa ekikomo." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Bw'omalanga okulya n'okkuta, otenderezanga Omukama Katonda wo olw'ensi amakula gye yakuwa." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Wekkaanye, teweerabiranga Omukama Katonda wo n'otofa ku biragiro bye, ennamula ye n'amateeka ge bye nkulagira olwa leero." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Oboolyawo bw'olimala okulya n'okkuta, n'ozimba amayumba amalungi n'ogasulamu," 
Deuteronomy8:13 amagana go n'ebisibo byo nga bigezze, ffeeza ne zaabu na byonna by'olina nga bikwalidde," 
Deuteronomy8:14 omutima gwo gwandiyinza okwewanika, ne weerabira Omukama Katonda wo eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu nnyumba y'obuddu;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 eyakukulembera mu ddungu eddene ery'entiisa, omwali emisota egy'obusagwa n'enjaba, ensi erakasidde omutaali tuzzi n'akatono; eyakuggyira amazzi mu lwazi olugumu;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 eyakuliisa manu mu ddungu bajjajjaabo gye bataamanya, n'akutoowaza ng'agenderera okukugeza, olyoke obeerenga bulungi oluvannyuma." 
Deuteronomy8:17 “Wandiyinza okwegamba mu mutima gwo nti: ‘Obuzira n'amaanyi g'emikono gyange bye binkoledde obugagga buno.’ 
Deuteronomy8:18 Wabula jjukira Omukama Katonda wo nti ye yakuwa amaanyi n'ofuna obugagga, ng'atuukiriza endagaano ye gye yalayirira bajjajjaabo, nga bwe kyeraga olwa leero." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Naye bw'olyerabira Omukama Katonda wo, n'ogoberera balubaale abagwira, n'obasinza, n'obavunnamira, nkukakasiza ddala olwa leero nti mulizikiririra ddala." 
Deuteronomy8:20 “Bwe muligaana okuwulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wammwe, nammwe mugenda kuzikirira ng'amawanga Omukama ge yazikiriza mu maaso gammwe." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Wulira, Yisirayeli, oli kumpi kusomoka Yorudani, oyingire, otwale amawanga agakusinga obunene n'amaanyi, ebibuga ebinene ebirina bbugwe akoma eyo ku ggulu," 
Deuteronomy9:2 abantu abanene abawagguufu, Abaanaki. Naawe obamanyi era n'enjogera wali ogiwuliddeko nti: ‘Abaanaki ani anaabaŋŋanga?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Kino kitegeere olwa leero nti Omukama Katonda wo akukulemberamu mu kusomoka, muliro ogugenda gusenkenya. Ajja kubamerengula, abafufuggaze mu maaso go, olyoke obagobe mangu obasaanyeewo, nga bwe yakugamba." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Omukama Katonda wo bw'amalanga okubakugoberawo, togambanga mu mutima gwo nti: ‘Omukama yandeeta ne ntwala ensi eno lwa kubeera butuukirivu bwange.’ Ekituufu kye kino, nti amawanga ago Omukama ajja kugakugoberawo kubanga mabi." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ogenda kutwala ensi zaabwe si lwa butuukirivu na bwesimbu bwa mutima gwo, wabula kubanga amawanga ago mabi. Omukama Katonda wo ajja kugagobawo mu maaso go, atuukirize ekigambo kye kye yalayirira bajjajjaabo: Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Kino kitegeere, nti Omukama Katonda wo okukuwa ensi eno ennungi ogitwale, tekivudde ku butuukirivu bwo, kubanga mmwe muli bantu ba nsingo nkakanyavu." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Jjukira, teweerabiranga lwe wasunguwaza Omukama Katonda wo mu ddungu; okuva ku lunaku luli lwe wava mu Misiri n'okutuukira ddala mu kifo kino, ojeemera Omukama." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Ne ku Korebu wasunguwaza Omukama, n'asunguwala kaabula kata akuzikirize," 
Deuteronomy9:9 luli lwe nayambuka olusozi nfuneyo empande z'amayinja, empande ez'endagaano Omukama gye yakola nammwe, ne nsigala eyo mu lusozi ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana, nga sirya mugaati, wadde okunywa amazzi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Omukama n'ampa empande bbiri ez'amayinja eziwandiikiddwa n'engalo ya Katonda. Ku zo kwaliko ebigambo byonna bye yayogera nammwe ku lusozi ng'ayima mu muliro wakati, ekibiina kyonna lwe kyakuŋŋaana." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ennaku bwe zaayita amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana, Omukama n'ampa empande bbiri ez'amayinja, empande ez'Endagaano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Vva wano mangu okkirire, kubanga abantu bo be waggya mu Misiri bakoze ekibi; bavudde mu kkubo lye nabalagira, bakoze ekifaananyi ekisaanuuse.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Omukama n'agamba nti: ‘Ndabye abantu bano, bantu ba nsingo nkakanyavu." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ndeka mbawemmente, erinnya lyabwe ndisangule wansi w'eggulu, mu ggwe mwe nnaakola eggwanga eribakira amaanyi n'obunene.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Ne nzikirira ne nva ku lusozi olwali lubuubuuka omuliro; nali nkutte mu mikono gyange empande ebbiri ez'Endagaano. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Bwe natunula nti: ne ndaba nga mukoze ekibi ew'Omukama Katonda wammwe, nga mwekoledde akayana akasaanuuse ak'okusinza. Mwali muvudde mangu ku kkubo ly'Omukama lye yali abalagidde." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Kwe kuddira empande zombi ne nzikasuka eri ne zaatikayatika obulere awo mu maaso gammwe. 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ne nziramu ne neeyala mu maaso g'Omukama ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana, nga sirya mmere wadde okunywa amazzi, olw'okubeera ebibi byamwe byonna; mwayonoona mu maaso g'Omukama, ne mumunyiiza." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Natya obusungu bw'Omukama n'obuswandi bwe, kubanga yali abanyiigidde n'okutuusa okubazikiriza. Ne ku mulundi ogwo Omukama yampulira." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Omukama yasunguwalira nnyo ne Aroni kumpi kumuzikiriza; ne Aroni naye ne mmusabira ku olwo. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Nakwata ekibi kyammwe kye mwali mukoze, kwe kugamba nti akayana, ne nkookya mu muliro, ne nkaseseggula, ne nkasaamu olusennyente okutuusa nga kafuuse enfuufu ey'olufufugge, ne ngiyiwa mu mugga ogwali gukulukuta nga guva mu lusozi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Era n'e Tabera, e Massa, n'e Kiburoti Attaava mwasunguwaza Omukama." 
Deuteronomy9:23 N'Omukama lwe yabasindika muve e Kadesi-Baruneya n'abagamba nti: ‘Mwambuke, mutwale ensi gye nabawa.’ Naye mwajeemera ekiragiro ky'Omukama Katonda wammwe; temwamukkiriza era temwamuwuliriza." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Bulijjo mujeemera Omukama, okuva lwe nasooka okubamanya." 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Neeyala wansi mu maaso g'Omukama ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana; neeyala wansi bwe ntyo kubanga Omukama yali agambye okubazikiriza. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ne nsaba ew'Omukama nti: ‘Omukama Katonda, tozikiriza bantu bo, obusika bwo, bwe wanunula n'obukulu bwo, be waggya mu Misiri n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Jjukira abaweereza bo Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo. Totunuulira bukalubo bwa bantu bano, obwonoonefu bwabwe n'ekibi," 
Deuteronomy9:28 sikulwa ng'ab'omu nsi gye watuggya bagamba nti: “Omukama yalemwa okubayingiza mu nsi gye yabasuubiza; kubanga yali abakyaye, kyeyava abaggyayo, abattire mu ddungu.”" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Naye bano bantu bo, busika bwo, be waggyayo n'amaanyi go amangi n'omukono gwo omugolole.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Mu budde obwo Omukama yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Bajjayo empande bbiri ez'amayinja eziri nga ziri ezaasooka, oyambuke gye ndi mu lusozi. Bajjayo n'essanduuku ey'omuti." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Nzija kuwandiika ku mpande ebigambo ebyali ku ziri ezaasooka ze wayasa, empande ozisse mu ssanduuku.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 Awo kwe kukola ssanduuku mu muti ogw'akasaana. Bwe namala okubajja empande ez'amayinja bbiri eziri nga ziri ezaasooka, ne nnyambuka olusozi nga nzirina mu mikono gyange." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Omukama n'awandiika ku mpande, nga bwe yali awandiise ku ziri, Ebigambo Ekkumi Omukama bye yali abagambye ku lusozi ng'ayima mu muliro wakati abantu nga bakuŋŋaanye; n'azimpa." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Bwe nakomawo nga nvudde ku lusozi, empande ne nzissa mu ssanduuku gye nali nkoze ng'Omukama bwe yandagira; kati ziri omwo." 
Deuteronomy10:6 “Abayisirayeli ne bava e Beeroti-Bene-Yakani ne balaga e Mosera. Eyo Aroni gye yafiira era n'aziikibwa; Eleyazari mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabona. 
Deuteronomy10:7 Bwe baava e Mosera ne balaga e Gudugoda; bwe baava eyo ne balaga e Yotubata mu nsi erimu obugga bw'amazzi obungi. 
Deuteronomy10:8 Mu budde obwo Omukama yayawula ekika kya Leevi kye kiba kyetikkanga Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama, era nga kye ky'okuyimiriranga mu maaso ge okuweereza, n'okuwa omukisa mu linnya lye, bye bakyakola n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Leevi kyeyava tafuna mugabo oba busika wamu na baganda be, kubanga Omukama yennyini bwe busika bwe, ng'Omukama Katonda wo bwe yabagamba." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Nze nasigala eyo ku lusozi ng'olubereberye ennaku amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana; ne ku mulundi ogwo Omukama yampuliriza, teyayagala kukuzikiriza." 
Deuteronomy10:11 N'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Situka, genda okulembere abantu bayingire batwale ensi gye nalayira okuwa bajjajjaabwe.’" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Kale nno, Yisirayeli, Omukama Katonda wo akusaba ki? Si kirala, wabula okumutya oyo Omukama Katonda wo, okutambulira mu makubo ge gonna, okumwagala, okumuweereza oyo Omukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna," 
Deuteronomy10:13 n'okukwatanga ebiragiro by'Omukama n'amateeka ge bye nkulagira olwa leero ku lw'obulungi bwo. 
Deuteronomy10:14 “Eggulu, n'eggulu erisukkiridde waggulu, ensi na byonna ebigirimu bya Mukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Naye Omukama yasiima bajjajjaabo n'abaagala; mmwe bazzukulu baabwe n'abalonda, n'abasukkulumya amawanga gonna, nga bwe kiri kaakati." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Kale nno mutayirire emitima gyammwe, temwongera kugugubya mitima gyammwe wadde okukakanyaza ensingo zammwe," 
Deuteronomy10:17 kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe ye Katonda wa balubaale, ye Mukama w'abakama, Katonda omukulu, wa buyinza, wa ntiisa, teyeekubiira era talya nguzi." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Awolereza mulekwa ne nnamwandu, ayagala omugwira n'amuwa ekyokulya n'ekyokwambala." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Nammwe nno mwagalenga abagwira, kubanga mwali bagwira mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Otyanga Omukama Katonda wo, n'omuweerezanga, onywereranga ku ye era mu linnya lye mw'olayiriranga." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Yennyini lye ttendo lyo, ye Katonda wo, eyakukolera ebinene n'eby'entiisa amaaso gammwe bye gaalaba." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Bajjajjaabo okuserengeta e Misiri baali abantu nsanvu, naye laba kati Omukama Katonda wo akuwadde okwala okwenkana emmunyeenye z'eggulu obungi." 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Yagalanga Omukama Katonda wo, kwatanga by'akuutira, amateeka ge, ennamula ye n'ebiragiro bye obudde bwonna." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Jjukira olwa leero nti si baana bammwe be baayita mu bino, si be baalaba Omukama Katonda wammwe bw'agunjula, obukulu bwe, omukono gwe ogw'amaanyi, n'omukono gwe omugolole;" 
Deuteronomy11:3 obubonero obwewuunyisa ne bye yakola kabaka Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri n'ensi ye yonna mu Misiri wakati; 
Deuteronomy11:4 ne bye yakola eggye lyonna ery'Abamisiri n'embalaasi zaalyo n'ebigaali byalyo, n'abakulukusizaako amazzi g'Ennyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa lwe baali babawondedde, Omukama amale abazikirize n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 nammwe bye yabakolera mu ddungu, okutuusa lwe mwatuuka mu kifo kino;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 ne bye yakola Datani ne Abiramu batabani ba Eliyabu, eyali mutabani wa Rubeni, ettaka lwe lyayasama ne libamira n'ab'omu nnyumba zaabwe, ne weema zaabwe, n'ebintu byabwe byonna, bye baalina, nga Yisirayeli yenna alaba." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Wabula gaali maaso gammwe agaalaba ebikuuno ebyo byonna Omukama bye yakola. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Mukwatenga ebiragiro byonna nze bye mbalagira olwa leero, mulyoke mufune amaanyi okusobola okuyingira n'okutwala ensi gye musomokera Yorudani mugitwale," 
Deuteronomy11:9 mulyoke muwangaalire mu nsi Omukama gye yalayirira okuwa bajjajjammwe n'ezzadde lyabwe, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki."
