Deuteronomy11:10 “Ensi gye mugenda okuyingira mugitwale, teri nga nsi y'e Misiri gye mwava, mwe wasiganga ensigo n'ogifukirira amazzi n'ekigere ng'afukirira akalimiro k'enva." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Naye ensi gye musomokera Yorudani mugitwale, ya nsozi na biwonvu, enywa enkuba eva mu ggulu." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Ye nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'alabirira; Omukama Katonda wo agissaako eriiso okuva ku masooka g'omwaka okutuusa ku nkomerero yaagwo. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Bwe muliba mukutte ebiragiro byange, bye mbalagira olwa leero: okwagala Omukama Katonda wammwe n'okumuweereza n'omutima gwammwe gwonna n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna," 
Deuteronomy11:14 ndiwa ettaka lyammwe enkuba mu myezi gyayo, eya Ddumbi ne Ttoggo, okuŋŋaanye eŋŋano yo, evviini yo ensu n'omuzigo gwo." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndiwa omuddo ku ttale olw'ebisolo byo, naawe olirya n'okkuta." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Mwekkaanye sikulwa ng'omutima gwammwe gusendebwasendebwa, ne muva ku Mukama, ne muweereza balubaale abagwira ne mubasinza," 
Deuteronomy11:17 olwo obusungu bw'Omukama bugenda kubeesererako; alisiba eggulu enkuba ereme kutonnya n'ettaka lireme kuleeta kibala kyalyo; amangu ago mulisaanawo ku nsi ennungi Omukama gy'agenda okubawa. 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Ebigambo byange bino mubiteeke mu mitima gyammwe ne mu myoyo gyammwe; mubisibanga ku mikono gyammwe ng'akabonero, mubisibirenga ne ku byenyi byammwe." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Mubiyigirizanga batabani bammwe; obyogeranga ng'obadde otudde mu nnyumba yo, ng'otambula mu kkubo, ng'ogenda okwebaka oba nga wa kazuukuka." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Obiwandiikanga ku myango gy'ennyumba yo ne ku miryango gyo," 
Deuteronomy11:21 ennaku zo n'eza batabani bo ziryoke zeyongere obungi mu nsi Omukama gye yalayira okuwa bajjajjaabo, ebbanga lyonna eggulu lye lirimala nga liri waggulu w'ensi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Bwe muliba mukuumye ebiragiro bino byonna nze bye mbalagira ne mubituusa: okwagala Omukama Katonda wammwe, okutambulira mu makubo ge gonna n'okumunywererako," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Omukama aligobawo amawanga ago gonna mu maaso gammwe; mugenda kutwala amawanga agabasinga obunene n'amaanyi. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Buli we mulirinnya ekigere walifuuka wammwe, okuva ku ddungu okutuuka e Lebanoni, okuva ku mugga Furaati okutuuka ku nnyanja ey'ebugwanjuba." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Tewaliba abaziyiza; Omukama Katonda wammwe nga bwe yabagamba, alibafuula ba ntiisa abakanga wonna mu nsi we muliraga." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Nzuuno olwa leero nzisa mu maaso gammwe omukisa n'ekikolimo. 
Deuteronomy11:27 Omukisa: bwe muliba muwulidde ebiragiro by'Omukama Katonda wammwe, nze bye mbalagira olwa leero;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 ekikolimo: bwe muliba temugondedde biragiro bya Mukama Katonda wammwe, ne muva mu kkubo, lye mbalaga olwa leero, ne mugoberera balubaale be mutamanyangako." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Omukama Katonda wo bw'alimala okukuyingiza mu nsi gy'ogenda okutwala, omukisa oguweeranga ku lusozi Gerizimu, ekikolimo okirangiriranga ku lusozi Ebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 [Ensozi zino, nga bwe mumanyi, ziri mitala wa Yorudani, ebugwanjuba ng'osaze ekkubo eriraga ebugwanjuba okumpi n'emivule gy'e More, mu nsi y'Abakanaani ababeera mu Araba okumpi ne Gilugali.]" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Mugenda okusomoka Yorudani, mutwale ensi Omukama Katonda wammwe gy'anaabawa. Nga mumaze okugitwala, nga mugibaddemu," 
Deuteronomy11:32 mwekkaanye, mutuusanga amateeka gonna n'ebiragiro bye nzisa mu maaso gammwe olwa leero.”" 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Gano ge mateeka n'ebiragiro bye muteekwanga okutuusa mu nsi Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe gy'agenda okukuwa ogitwale, ennaku zonna z'olimala mu nsi eyo." 
Deuteronomy12:2 “Muzikirizanga ebifo byonna amawanga ge mugenda okutwala we gasinziza balubaale baago, ku nsozi empanvu ne ku busozi, na buli wansi wa muti oguggumizza." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Mumenyangawo emyaliiro gyabwe, mwasaayasanga amayinja ge basimbye, empagi za Asera muzookyanga mu muliro, n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale bye basinza mubitemangawo, n'amannya gaabwe mugasangulangawo mu bifo ebyo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Omukama Katonda wammwe temumusinzanga mutyo. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Wabula munoonyanga ekifo Omukama Katonda wammwe ky'aliba alonze mu bika byonna, gy'alissa erinnya lye olw'ekisulo kye; eyo gye mugendanga." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Eyo gye muweererezanga ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitone byammwe; gye mutwalanga ebyekkumi, n'ebitone eby'emikono gyammwe, bye mweyamye n'ebyeyagalire, n'ebiggulanda okuva mu magana gammwe ne mu bisibo byammwe." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Eyo mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wammwe, mmwe n'ab'omu maka gammwe bonna, gye muliiranga ne musanyukira mu byonna emikono gyammwe bye gikola, kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe y'aliba abawadde omukisa." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Temukolanga nga bwe tukola kaakati, buli omu nga bw'alaba kigwanidde." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Mukola mutyo kubanga temunnatuuka n'okutuusa kati mu nsi yammwe ey'ekiwummulo, obusika bwammwe, Omukama Katonda wammwe gy'agenda okubawa." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Tewali kubuusabuusa mujja kusomoka Yorudani, mugenda okubeera mu nsi Omukama Katonda wammwe gy'agenda okubawa ng'obusika bwammwe, muweere ku balabe bonna ababeetoolodde, mutuule ntende." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Mujja kutwalanga mu kifo Omukama Katonda wammwe ky'aliba alonze, gy'alissa erinnya lye, ebyo byonna bye mbalagira: ebitambiro byammwe ebyokye n'ebitone, ebyekkumi, ebitone eby'emikono gyammwe, n'amakula gammwe ge muliba mweyamye okuwa Omukama." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Eyo gye musanyukiranga mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wammwe, mmwe ne batabani bammwe, bawala bammwe, abaddu n'abazaana bammwe, n'Abaleevi abali mu bibuga byammwe, anti bo tebalina mugabo oba busika bye baafuna mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy12:13 “Wekkaanye obutaweererezanga bitambiro byo ebyokye wonna w'oliba osanze. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Wabula mubiweererezenga awo wokka Omukama w'aliba alonze, mu kimu ku bika, era eyo gy'otuusizanga byonna bye nkulagira." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Bw'obanga oyagadde okuttayo ku nsolo zo olye, ottiranga wonna w'osanze, eyo mu bibuga byammwe, n'olya nga bw'oyagala, ng'omukisa gw'Omukama Katonda gw'akuwadde. Abalongoofu n'abatali balongoofu bonna bayinza okulyanga, nga bw'olya ennangaazi oba engabi." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Gwo omusaayi togulyanga, oyiwanga muyiwe ku ttaka ng'amazzi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 “Eyo mu bibuga byo toliirangayo ekyekkumi eky'eŋŋano, evviini ensu n'omuzigo ebisooka, era toliirangayo byonna ebiggulanda mu ggana ne mu kisibo kyo, n'ebitone by'oliba weeyamye okuwa, n'ebyeyagalire, n'ebitone by'emikono gyo." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Wabula mubiriiranga mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, mu kifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze, ggwe ne mutabani wo ne muwala wo, omuddu n'omuzaana wo, n'Omuleevi ali mu bibuga byo. Osanyukiranga mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo mu byonna emikono gyo bye gikola." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Wekkaanye, tolekereranga Muleevi ebbanga lyonna ly'olibeera mu nsi yo." 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Omukama Katonda wo bw'aligaziya ebitundu byo, nga bwe yakusuubiza, n'ogamba nti: ‘Njagala kulya ku nnyama,’ ng'oyoyezza okulya ku nnyama, olyanga ennyama nga bw'oyagala." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ekifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze okussaamu erinnya lye bwe kiriba ewala, oggyanga mu ggana lyo oba mu kisibo kyo n'otta, Omukama by'aliba akuwadde, nga bwe nakulagira, n'olya nga bw'oyagala eyo mu bibuga byo." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Mulyanga nga bwe mulya ennangaazi oba engabi; abalongoofu n'abatali balongoofu bonna bayinza okulya. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Gwo omusaayi togulyanga; kubanga omusaayi bwe bulamu; n'olw'ekyo tolyanga bulamu wamu na nnyama. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Omusaayi togulyanga, wabula oguyiwanga ku ttaka ng'amazzi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Togulyanga, olyoke obeerenga bulungi, ggwe n'abaana bo abalikuddirira, kubanga oliba okoze ekisanyusa mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Deuteronomy12:26 By'obanga owongedde Omukama, oba bye weetemye okumuwa, obireetanga mu kifo Omukama ky'aliba alonze." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Ennyama, n'omusaayi eby'ekitambiro kyo ekyokye obiweererezanga ku mwaliro gw'Omukama Katonda wo; omusaayi gw'ebitone byo guyiibwanga ku mwaliiro, ennyama yo oyinza okugirya." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Ofangayo okutuusa ebigambo byonna bye nkulagira, olyoke obeerenga bulungi n'abaana bo abalikuddirira, kubanga oliba okoze ekirungi era ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Omukama Katonda ajja kukumalirawo amawanga g'ogenda okulumba ogatwale. Bw'oliba omaze okugagobawo, ng'otebenkedde mu nsi yaabwe," 
Deuteronomy12:30 nga gamaze okuzikirizibwa mu maaso go, wekkaanye, tokemebwanga n'oyagala okumanya ku balubaale baabwe, ng'obuuzabuuza nti: ‘Gano amawanga gaaweerezanga gatya balubaale baago? Nange bwe nzija okukola.’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Tosinzanga otyo Mukama Katonda wo; kubanga byonna ebyenyinyalwa bye bakola nga basinza balubaale baabwe Omukama abikyawa; batuuka n'okwokya mu muliro batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe olwa balubaale baabwe. 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ebigambo byonna bye mbagambye mulabe nti mubituusanga; toyongerangako era tokendeezangako kantu n'akamu. 
Deuteronomy13:2 “Mu mmwe bwe musitukangamu omulanzi, oba omuloosi w'ebirooto n'akola akabonero oba ekyewuunyo," 
Deuteronomy13:3 akabonero oba ekyewuunyo ky'ayogedde ne kituukirira, n'akugamba nti: ‘Tugende tugoberere balubaale, tubaweereze,’ balubaale b'otomanyangako," 
Deuteronomy13:4 towulirizanga bigambo bya mulanzi oyo oba omuloosi, kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe abeera abageza bugeza, alabe oba mumwagala n'omutima gwammwe gwonna n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Omukama Katonda wammwe yekka gwe mubanga mugoberera, gwe mubanga mutya. Mukwatenga ebiragiro bye, muwulirizenga eddoboozi lye; oyo gwe mubanga muweereza, gwe mubanga munywererako." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Omulanzi oli, oba oyo omuloosi w'ebirooto, attibwanga, kubanga ayogera ebyo mujeemere Omukama Katonda wammwe eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, n'akununula mu nnyumba y'obuddu; akusendasenda kukuggya mu kkubo Omukama Katonda wo lye yakulagira. Ekibi kino mukiggyirangawo ddala mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy13:7 “Singa muganda wo, oba omwana wo, oba muwala wo, oba mukazi wo ow'omu mikono gyo, oba mukwano gwo bwe muli ekimu, akusendasenda mu nkiso nti: ‘Tugende tuweereze balubaale,’ balubaale b'otaamanya ggwe ne kitaawo," 
Deuteronomy13:8 balubaale ab'amawanga agakwetoolodde, ag'okumpi n'ag'ewala, okuva ku nsonda emu ey'ensi okutuuka ku ndala," 
Deuteronomy13:9 tomugonderanga era tomuwulirizanga. Tomusaasiranga, togezangako kumuwonya oba kumuzibira," 
Deuteronomy13:10 wabula ottanga mutte. Mu kumutta omukono gwo gwe gumusookangako n'oluvannyuma emikono gy'abantu bonna. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Omukubanga amayinja n'attibwa, kubanga yali akusendasenda kukuggya ku Mukama Katonda wo eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu nnyumba y'obuddu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Olwo Yisirayeli yenna aliwulira n'atya, ne wataddayo kubaawo mulala yenna mu ggwe akola ekibi ekifaanana kityo." 
Deuteronomy13:13 “Bw'owuliranga mu kibuga ekimu, ku ebyo Omukama Katonda wo by'alikuwa okubeeramu, nga bagamba nti:" 
Deuteronomy13:14 ‘Abantu empongabyoya basituse mu ggwe, ne basendasenda ab'omu kibuga kyabwe nga babagamba nti: “Tugende tuweereze balubaale,” ’ balubaale be mutamanyangako," 
Deuteronomy13:15 onoonyerezanga n'obuuliriza mu byonna; bw'ozuulanga nga kituufu, nti ekyogerwa kikakafu, ddala ekyenyinyalwa ekyo kyakolerwa mu ggwe," 
Deuteronomy13:16 ab'omu kibuga ekyo bonna obattanga bussi n'ekitala, n'okizikiriza, buli kirimu, abantu n'ebisolo byabwe." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Omunyago gwamu gwonna ogukuŋŋaanyizanga wakati mu mbuga y'ekibuga, awo ekibuga n'omunyago gwamwo n'obyokera wamu byonna n'omuliro ng'ekitambiro ekyokere Omukama Katonda wo. Ekibuga kya kusigala ntuumu ya mirembe gyonna era tekiriddamu kuzimbibwa." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Tewabanga ku kintu na kimu ku ebyo ebisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa kisangibwanga naawe, Omukama alyoke aleke obusungu bwe obwesera, akusaasire, akuwe okwala nga bwe yalayirira bajjajjaabo," 
Deuteronomy13:19 bw'oliba owulidde eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wo n'okwatanga ebiragiro bye byonna bye nkulagira olwa leero, n'okola ekituufu mu maaso ge." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Muli baana ba Mukama Katonda wammwe. Nga mukungubagira afudde temwesalaasalanga na kwemwa mu bwetikkiro," 
Deuteronomy14:2 kubanga muli bantu batukuvu ab'Omukama Katonda wo. Omukama yakulonda mu mawanga gonna agali ku nsi obeere ggwanga lye, ekkula lye”" 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Temulyanga kintu na kimu ekyenyinyalwa. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Bino bye bisolo bye muyinzanga okulya: ente, endiga, embuzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 engabi, ennangaazi, ensowe, embulabuzi, entamu, enteŋo, n'endiga ey'omu nsiko." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Muyinza okulya ensolo yonna eyawula ekiganja, ekinuulo nga kiryebulemu wabiri, ate ng'ezza obwenkulumu; eyo mugiryanga." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Naye zino temuziryanga okuva mw'ezo ezimenyerwa mu zizza obwenkulumu oba mu zaawula ekiganja, ez'ekinuulo ekiryebulemu: eŋŋamiya, akamyu n'omusu, kubanga zizza obwenkulumu naye tezaawula kiganja; ezo si nnongoofu gye muli." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Embizzi nayo si nnongoofu, kubanga eyawula ekiganja naye tezza bwenkulumu. Temulyanga nnyama yaabyo wadde okukwata ku kalannamye waabyo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Ku byonna ebibeera mu mazzi muyinza okulya ebyo ebirina amayindu n'amagamba. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Naye ebitalina mayindu na magamba temubiryanga; si birongoofu ku mmwe. 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Ennyonyi zonna ennongoofu muyinza okuzirya. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Zino zo temuziryanga: empungu, ensega, ne makwanzi," 
Deuteronomy14:13 kamunye, eddiirawamu na buli kika kya nsega nzirugavu," 
Deuteronomy14:14 buli kika kya nnamuŋŋoona," 
Deuteronomy14:15 wonzi, olubugabuga, enkunga, na buli kika kya kakubampanga," 
Deuteronomy14:16 ekiwuugulu, ekkufufu, ennunda," 
Deuteronomy14:17 ekiwuugulu eky'amatu, eŋŋaaŋa, olusoove," 
Deuteronomy14:18 enkonkonamasonko, buli kika kya ssekanyolya, ekkookootezi n'ekinyira." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ebiwuka byonna ebibuuka, ebirina ebiwaawaatiro, si birongoofu gye muli, temubiryanga." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Buli kyonna ekibuuka, nga kirongoofu, mukiryanga." 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Temulyanga nnyama ya kalannamye. Oyinza okugiwa omugwira ali eyo mu bibuga byammwe, oba okugimuguza. Naye mmwe muli bantu ba Mukama Katonda wo abatukuvu. Tofumbanga kabuzi mu mata ga nnyina waako." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Ku ebyo ensigo bye zaabaza ebiva mu nnimiro yo oggyangako ekyekkumi buli mwaka. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Ekyekkumi eky'eŋŋano, evviini ensu n'omuzigo, n'ebiggulanda by'omu ggana lyo ne mu kisibo kyo, obiriiranga mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, mu kifo ky'aliba alonze okussaamu erinnya lye; olyoke oyige okutya Omukama Katonda wo obudde bwonna." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Ekifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze okussaamu erinnya lye, bwe kiriba nga kikuli wala, ate nga ggwe Omukama akuwadde omukisa, naye nga tosobola kubitwalayo," 
Deuteronomy14:25 byonna obitundanga n'oggyamu ssente; ssente ozisibangako mu ngalo zo n'ozitwala mu kifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze," 
Deuteronomy14:26 n'ozigulamu buli kyonna ky'oliba oyagadde, ng'ente, endiga, evviini, omwenge, leero kyonna omutima gwo kye guliba gusiimye. Ekyo ggwe n'ab'omu nnyumba yo mulikiriira eyo mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, ne musanyuka." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Omuleevi gw'oli naye mu kibuga kyo tomwerabiranga, anti ye talina mugabo oba busika mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Mu mwaka ogwokusatu, ku byonna by'obanga obazizza mu mwaka ogwo, oggyangako ekyekkumi, n'okitereka mu bibuga byo," 
Deuteronomy14:29 bw'atyo Omuleevi atalina mugabo oba busika mu mmwe, n'omugwira, n'enfuuzi, ne nnamwandu, abali mu bibuga byo, nabo balye bakkute, Omukama Katonda wo alyoke akuwe omukisa mu mirimu gyonna egy'emikono gyo gy'okola." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Ku buli nkomerero ya myaka musanvu ojja kusonyiwanga amabanja. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Onookikolanga bw'oti: eyawola munne ajja kumusonyiwanga ky'amubanja; eky'okusaba munne oba muganda we amusasule ajja kukirekanga, kubanga Omukama alangiridde ekisonyiwo ky'amabanja." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Omugwira ye okyayinzanga okumubanja, naye ebbanja ly'obanja munnansi munno olisonyiwanga." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Mu mmwe temubangamu adooba, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo alikuwa omukisa mungi mu nsi gy'alikuwa ogitwale ng'obusika bwo," 
Deuteronomy15:5 kasita oliba ng'owulidde eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wo, n'otuusa ekiragiro kino kye nkulagira olwa leero." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Kubanga Omukama Katonda wo agenda kukuwa omukisa, nga bwe yasuubiza. Oliwola amawanga mangi, ate nga ggwe tewali gwe weewozeeko; olifuga amawanga mangi, ate ggwe nga tewali akufuga." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Bwe wabangawo omwavu mu baganda bo mu kimu ku bibuga byo ebiri mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa, bw'awammanga, tomukaluubiriranga, tokodowaliranga muganda wo mwavu;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 wabula obanga mwetegefu okumuyamba n'okumwazika buli ky'ajula. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Wekkaanye, ekirowoozo ekibi tekikujjanga mu mutima n'ogamba nti: ‘Anti omwaka ogwomusanvu ogw'ekisonyiwo ky'amabanja gunaatera okutuuka,’ olwo n'otunuuliza muganda wo omwavu eriiso ebbi, nga toyagala kumwazika ky'asabye; yandireekaana eri Omukama olw'okubeera ggwe n'obaako omusango." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Omuweesanga kisa, sso si n'omutima ogutaagaane; olw'okubeera ekyo Omukama Katonda wo alikuwa omukisa na byonna emikono gyo bye gikola." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Mu nsi abaavu bulijjo balibeeramu; kale nno kyenva nkulagira obeere mugabi eri muganda wo, eri omwavu, n'eri ali mu bwetaavu ali mu nsi yo." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Omwebureeyi munno, omusajja oba omukazi, bwe bamukuguzanga, n'amala emyaka mukaaga ng'akuweereza, mu mwaka ogwomusanvu, omutanga n'akuleka." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ng'omusiibula, tomulekanga kugenda ngalo nsa;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 omuwangayo okuva mu magana go, mu gguuliro lyo ne ku ssogolero lyo, Omukama Katonda wo nga naawe bw'aliba akuwadde." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Ojjukiranga nti naawe wali muddu e Misiri, Omukama Katonda wo n'akununulayo; kyenva nkulagira bwe ntyo olwa leero." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Bw'agamba nti: ‘Saagala kukuleka,’ kubanga ggwe n'amaka go abaagala, nga mumativu okubeera ewuwo," 
Deuteronomy15:17 oddiranga olukato, n'olumuyisa mu kutu kwe ne luyingira mu luggi; olwo nga wa kubeera muweereza wo ebbanga lyonna. N'omuzaana bw'omukolanga bw'otyo." 
Deuteronomy15:18 “Tokaluubirirwanga kumusiibula, kubanga singa ebadde mpeera ya kuwa mupakasi, eyiye olw'emyaka omukaaga gy'amaze ng'akuweereza, yandikubisizzaamu emirundi ebiri. Omukama Katonda wo agenda kukuwa omukisa mu mirimu gyo gyonna gy'okola." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Buli kiggulanda kyonna ekizaalibwa mu ggana lyo ne mu kisibo kyo, kasita kiba kirume, okisingiranga Omukama Katonda wo. Ente esooka okuzaalibwa togikozesanga mirimu, n'endiga esooka okuzaalibwa togimwangako byoya." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Buli mwaka, ggwe ng'oli n'ab'omu maka go, ogiriiranga mu maaso g'Omukama, mu kifo Omukama ky'aliba alonze." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Naye ekisolo bwe kibeerangako akamogo oba nga kirema, oba nga tekiraba, oba nga kiriko enkeka ey'amaanyi, tokitambiriranga Mukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Okiriiranga eyo mu bibuga byo. Abalongoofu n'abatali balongoofu bayinza okukiryako, nga bwe mwandiridde ennangaazi oba engabi." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Gwo omusaayi gwakyo togulyanga, oyiwanga muyiwe ku ttaka ng'amazzi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Okuzanga omwezi gwa Abibu, n'okuza Pasika y'Omukama Katonda wo, kubanga mu mwezi gwa Abibu Omukama Katonda wo lwe yakuggya mu Misiri ekiro." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Otambiranga Pasika y'Omukama Katonda wo ng'oggya mu ggana lyo ne mu kisibo kyo, mu kifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze ng'ekisulo ky'erinnya lye." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Toliirangako mugaati guzimbulukuse; okumala ennaku musanvu onoolyanga migaati egitazimbulukuse, omugaati gw'okubonaabona, kubanga mu Misiri wavaayo mu bwangu. Bw'otyo, ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo, ojjukirenga olunaku lwe wava mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Wonna mu nsi yo, okumala ennaku musanvu temulabikangamu kizimbulukusa. Ennyama etambirwanga akawungeezi k'olunaku olusooka, tesulangawo okutuusa enkeera." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Totambiranga Pasika mu buli kibuga kyo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba akuwadde," 
Deuteronomy16:6 wabula mu kifo kyokka Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze ng'ekisulo ky'erinnya lye. Eyo gy'otambiriranga Pasika akawungeezi enjuba ng'egwa, ku lunaku lw'ojjuukirirako okuva kwo mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Ogifumbiranga mu kifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze era mw'ogiriiranga; ku makya ositukanga n'odda mu weema zo. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Okumala ennaku musanvu onoolyanga migaati egitazimbulukuse; ku lwomusanvu oyitanga olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa olw'Omukama Katonda wo; tokolanga mulimu. 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Okuva ku lunaku lw'osooka okussa ekiwabyo ku ŋŋano ekyayimiridde, obalanga wiiki musanvu," 
Deuteronomy16:10 n'okuza embaga ya Wiiki olw'Omukama Katonda wo, ng'oweereza ekitambiro ekyeyagalire ng'ogerera ku Mukama Katonda wo nga bw'aliba akuwadde omukisa." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Osanyukiranga mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, ggwe, mutabani wo, muwala wo, omuddu wo, omuzaana wo, n'Omuleevi ali mu bibuga byo, omugwira, enfuuzi, ne nnamwandu abali ewuwo, mu kifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze ng'ekisulo ky'erinnya lye." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Ojjukiranga nga naawe wali muddu mu Misiri. Wekkaanye, amateeka gano ogatuusanga." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Bw'omalanga okukuŋŋaanya by'okungudde eby'egguuliro lyo n'essogolero lyo, okuzanga embaga y'Ensiisira okumala ennaku musanvu," 
Deuteronomy16:14 ng'olya embaga eno, ojaguzanga n'essanyu, ggwe, omwana wo, mutabani wo, omuddu wo, omuzaana wo, Omuleevi, omugwira, enfuuzi ne nnamwandu abali mu bibuga byo." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Omalanga ennaku musanvu ng'okuliza Omukama Katonda wo embaga eno mu kifo Omukama ky'aliba alonze, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo alikuwa omukisa mu bibala byo byonna ne mu mirimu gyonna egy'emikono gyo; oliba mu ssanyu jjereere." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Buli musajja yenna, aneeyolekanga emirundi esatu buli mwaka mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, mu kifo ky'aliba alonze, ku mbaga ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse, ku mbaga eya Wiiki, ne ku mbaga ey'Ensiisira. Tajjanga mu maaso g'Omukama engalo ensa," 
Deuteronomy16:17 wabula buli omu aleetanga ekirabo okugerera ku by'alina, ng'Omukama Katonda wo bw'aliba akuwadde omukisa." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Mu bibuga byo byonna Omukama Katonda wo by'aliba akuwadde, buli kika kyo okironderanga abalamuzi n'abaami; balamulanga abantu mu butuufu." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Tosalirizanga; teweekubiiranga; tolyanga nguzi, kubanga enguzi eziba amaaso g'abagezi, era egootaanya ensonga z'abatuukirivu." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Ogobanga butuufu, butuufu bwokka, olyoke obeere mulamu, otwale n'ensi Omukama Katonda wo gy'akuwa." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Teweesimbiranga mpagi za Asera oba omuti gwonna okumpi n'omwaliiro gw'Omukama Katonda wo gw'oliba omuzimbidde," 
Deuteronomy16:22 era tosimbanga mpagi ya jjinja. Omukama Katonda wo bino abikyawa. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Omukama Katonda wo tomutambiriranga ndiga oba nte eriko akamogo oba enkeka yonna, kubanga ekyo Omukama Katonda wo akyenyinyala." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Mu bibuga byo Omukama Katonda wo by'alikuwa bwe musangibwangamu omusajja oba omukazi, omu ku mmwe, akola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, ng'amenya endagaano ye," 
Deuteronomy17:3 n'asinza balubaale n'abavunnamira, oba n'avunnamira enjuba, omwezi oba eby'eggye ly'eggulu byonna nze bye ssaabalagira," 
Deuteronomy17:4 kino ne bakikubuulirako, okibuulirizangako bulungi ddala. Bwe kiba nga kituufu era nga kikakafu nti ekyenyinyalwa ekyo kyakolebwa mu Yisirayeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 omusajja oba omukazi eyakola ekibi ekyo omufulumyanga ebweru wa wankaaki n'omuttira eyo n'amayinja. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Omuntu okuttibwanga wateekwa okubaawo obujulizi bwa bantu b'ekibuga kyo babiri oba basatu obumulumiriza; mpaawo attibwanga ng'alumiriziddwa omujulirwa omu yekka. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Mu kumutta, omukono gw'amulumiriza gwe gumusookangako, olwo n'emikono gy'abalala. Ekibi kino muteekwa okukiggyirawo ddala mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Singa emisango egireetebwa mu mbuga zammwe mubeerangamu ogukulemeredde okulamula, ng'egy'okuyiwa omusaayi, okusoowagana, n'okulwanagana, ogitwalanga mu kifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'aliba alonze." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Gitwale ewa bakabona Abaleevi n'eri omulamuzi aliwo mu budde obwo; obeebuuzangako, bo balikusalirawo." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Okolanga nga bwe bakugambye nga bayima mu kifo ekyo Omukama kye yalonda. Wekkaanye, bye bakusabanga okukola obituukirizanga." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Bye babanga bakulagidde n'ensalawo yaabwe by'okolerangako; towunjukanga kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono n'ova ku bye bakugambye. 
Deuteronomy17:12 Bwe wabangawo eyeekuluntaza n'anyooma omulamuzi oba kabona aweereza Omukama Katonda wo mu budde obwo, omuntu oyo attibwanga buttibwa. Ekibi kino kirina okuggyibwawo mu Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Abantu bonna balikiwulira ne batya, tebaliddayo kwekuza." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Bw'oliyingira ensi Omukama Katonda wo gy'alikuwa, n'ogitwala, n'ogibeeramu, ekirowoozo kimala kikujjira nti: ‘Ka neeteerewo kabaka, ng'amawanga gonna aganneetoolodde bwe gamulina,’" 
Deuteronomy17:15 wekkaanye, oyo yekka Omukama Katonda wo gw'aliba akulondedde ng'amuggya mu baganda bo, gw'ofuulanga kabaka. Togezanga n'olonda omugwira, atali muganda wo, okuba kabaka wo." 
Deuteronomy17:16 “Kyokka teyeekuŋŋaanyizanga mbalaasi nkumu, era tazzanga bantu mu Misiri bamufunireyo endala okusingawo, kubanga Omukama yabagaana dda nti: ‘Temugezanga ne muddayo eyo.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Tawasanga bakazi bangi, omutima gwe guleme kuwubisibwa; era teyeekuŋŋaanyizanga butitimbe bwa ffeeza ne zaabu." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Bw'amalanga okutuula ku nnamulondo y'obwakabaka bwe, yeewandiikiranga etteeka lino mu kitabo okuva ku bakabona Abaleevi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Abeeranga nakyo, n'akisomanga ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe, alyoke ayige okutya Omukama Katonda we, n'okutuusa ebigambo by'etteeka lino n'ebiragiro byonna," 
Deuteronomy17:20 aleme kwekuliza ku baganda be, n'awunjuka ng'adda ku ddyo oba ku kkono n'ava ku tteeka. Olwo ye n'abaana be lwe baliwangaala nga balamula obwakabaka bwe mu Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Bakabona, be Baleevi, kwe kugamba ekika kyonna ekya Leevi, tebaligabana mugabo oba busika wamu na Yisirayeli. Baliryanga ku bitone by'Omukama ebimuweerezebwa n'omuliro; buno bwe buliba obusika bwabwe." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Tebaabenga na busika mu baganda baabwe; anti Omukama yennyini bwe busika bwabwe, nga bwe yabagamba." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Guno gwe mugabo oguddira bakabona okuva ku bantu abatambira ente ennume oba endiga: omukono, emba zombi n'ebyenda." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Onoobawanga n'ebibala byo ebisooka eby'eŋŋano, n'ebisooka ku vviini ensu n'omuzigo, n'ebyoya by'endiga zo eby'olumwa olusooka." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Anti Omukama Katonda wo ye ne batabani be yabaawula mu bika byo byonna, okuyimirira baweerezenga mu linnya ly'Omukama emirembe gyonna." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Omuleevi bw'ayagalanga okuva eyo gy'ali mu bibuga byo, agende abeere mu kifo Omukama ky'aliba alonze, kino ng'akikoze mu mwoyo mulungi," 
Deuteronomy18:7 akkirizibwa okuweereza mu linnya ly'Omukama Katonda we nga baganda be bonna Abaleevi abaweereza mu kifo ekyo mu maaso g'Omukama. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Wa kufunanga kyenkanyi ku mugabo gwe bagabana, newandibadde nga ye yafunayo dda ku kantu bwe yatunda bye yali ow'okusikira ku kitaawe." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Bw'oyingiranga mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa, toyiganga okuyisa empisa ezeenyinyalwa ez'amawanga ago." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Mu ggwe temubangamu awonga mutabani we oba muwala we mu muliro, oba akola eby'obulaguzi, omusawo w'emizimu, asoma obubonero, omulogo," 
Deuteronomy18:11 asindika ebitambo, eyeebuuza ku mmandwa, n'asamirira emizimu oba ayeebuuza ku bafu." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Anti ebyo byonna Omukama abyenyinyala; era lwa kubeera ebyo Omukama Katonda wo kyaliva abagoberawo amawanga ago. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Obeeranga mutuufu mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo nga toliiko musango. 
Deuteronomy18:14 “Amawanga ago ge mugenda okutwala, bawuliriza abalaguzi n'abalogo, naye ggwe Omukama Katonda wo takukkiriza kukola bw'otyo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Omukama Katonda wo alibasibusiza mu mmwe omulanzi ali nga nze okuva mu baganda bammwe; oyo omuwuliranga. 
Deuteronomy18:16 Kino kye wasaba Omukama Katonda wo ku Korebu, ekibiina lwe kyakuŋŋaana, omale ogambe nti: ‘Mpa obutaddamu kuwulira ddoboozi lya Mukama Katonda wange n'okulaba omuliro guno ogwaka guti, sikulwa nga nfa.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Byonna bye bayogedde birungi; 
Deuteronomy18:18 ku lwabwe nzija kusitusa omulanzi ali nga ggwe nga mmuggya mu baganda baabwe; nzija kussa ebigambo byange mu kamwa ke, alibagamba byonna bye ndiba mmulagidde." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Omuntu yenna ataliwulira bigambo byange by'alyogera mu linnya lyange ndimusaba annyonnyole. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Naye omulanzi alyetumiikiriza okwogera mu linnya lyange nze bye simutumye, oba alyogera mu linnya lya balubaale, attibwanga buttibwa." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Oyinza okwebuuza nti: “Mmanya ntya nti ekigambo ekyo Omukama si y'akyogedde?” 
Deuteronomy18:22 Omulanzi bw'anaalanganga mu linnya ly'Omukama, ky'alanze ne kitatuukirira, ng'omanya nti ekyo Omukama si ye yakyogera; omulanzi oyo yeetumiikiriza bwetumiikiriza; oyo tomutyanga.’" 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Omukama Katonda wo bw'alimala okuzikiriza amawanga agali mu nsi gy'agenda okukuwa ebeere eyiyo, nga naawe omaze okubagobawo n'obeera mu bibuga byabwe ne mu mayumba gaabwe," 
Deuteronomy19:2 weeyawulirangako ebibuga bisatu mu makkati g'ensi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa ogitwale. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Okolanga enguudo ezigendayo; ensi yo yonna Omukama gy'akuwa ng'obusika, n'ogisalamu ebitundu bisatu ebyenkanankana, oli asse omuntu gy'asobola okuddukira." 
Deuteronomy19:4 “Lino lye tteeka ku muntu asse munne bw'aba addukiddeyo okwewonya: Oli attanga munne mu butanwa nga tebwali bukyayi mu kusooka oba mu kugenderera," 
Deuteronomy19:5 okugeza, ng'oli agenze ne munne mu kibira okutema emiti, bw'awuuba embazzi, omutwe gw'embazzi ne guweekuka ku muyini ne gukuba munne n'afa, oyo addukiranga mu kimu ku bibuga ebyo, n'awona." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Kubanga oli awoolera olw'omusaayi, olw'essungu akyayinza okumuwondera, olw'olugendo okuba oluwanvu n'amukwata, n'amukuba n'afa sso nga taliiko musango gwa kutta, kubanga teyamutta mu bugenderevu oba lwa bukyayi mu kusooka." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Kale nno kyenva nkulagira mweyawulirewo ebibuga bisatu. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Omukama Katonda wo bw'alikugaziyiza ensalo zo, nga bwe yalayirira bajjajjaabo, n'akuwa ensi yonna gye yabasuubiza," 
Deuteronomy19:9 nga naawe okuumye bulungi etteeka lino lyonna lye nkulagira olwa leero: okwagala Omukama Katonda wo, n'okutambulira mu makubo ge obudde bwonna, oyongerangayo ebibuga ebirala bisatu, n'oyongereza ku biri ebisatu." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Olwo omusaayi ogutaliiko musango teguliyiibwa mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'alikuwa ng'obusika; oleme kuvunaanibwa gwa kuyiwa musaayi. 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Naye ng'omuntu akyaye munne, amala amwekwekerera, n'amukuba n'afa, oluvannyuma n'addukira mu kimu ku bibuga ebyo," 
Deuteronomy19:12 abakadde b'omu kibuga kye batumyanga ne bamukomyawo okuva mu kibuga, ne bamukwasa awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi afe." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Tomusaasiranga; okuyiwa omusaayi ogutaliiko musango kuteekwa okuggyirwawo ddala mu Yisirayeli, olyoke obeere bulungi." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Tosembezangayo ejjinja erisala ensalo y'ettaka ne muliraanwa wo bajjajjaabo lye balisimba mu busika bw'olifuna mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa ogitwale. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Omujulirwa omu tamala kusingisa muntu musango oba kibi ky'akoze, kibeere kya ngeri ki; ekigambo kikakasibwa n'obujulizi bwa bajulizi babiri oba basatu." 
Deuteronomy19:16 “Omujulirwa ow'ettima bwe yeesimbangawo okulumiriza omuntu omusango," 
Deuteronomy19:17 bombi alumiriza n'omuwawaabirwa bayimiriranga mu maaso g'Omukama awali bakabona n'abalamuzi ababangawo mu budde obwo. 
Deuteronomy19:18 Abalamuzi babuulirizanga ne bayitaayita mu nsonga zonna, omujulirwa bw'abanga omulimba, obujulizi bwe ku muganda we nga bwa bulimba," 
Deuteronomy19:19 mumukolanga nga bw'abadde ayagala okukola muganda we. Ekibi kino oteekwa okukiggyirawo ddala mu ggwe. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Abalala bwe baliwulira, bagenda kutya, tebaliddayo kukola bifaanana bityo mu ggwe." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Tomusaasiranga; obulamu olw'obulamu, eriiso olw'eriiso, erinnyo olw'erinnyo, omukono olw'omukono, ekigere olw'ekigere." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Bw'ogendanga ku lutalo okulwanyisa abalabe bo, n'olaba abeebagazi, ebigaali n'obunene bw'eggye ly'abalabe nga bingi okusinga ggwe by'olina, tobatyanga, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri aliba naawe." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Bw'obanga osemberedde olutalo, kabona ajjanga n'ayimirira n'ayogera eri eggye" 
Deuteronomy20:3 nti: ‘Wulira Yisirayeli; olwa leero mugenda okukwatagana n'abalabe bammwe; omutima gwammwe guleme kutekemuka, temutya, temukubwa ncukwe era temutiitiira olw'okubeera bo," 
Deuteronomy20:4 kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe y'agenda nammwe, ye mu kifo kyammwe y'ajja okulwana n'abalabe bammwe abawanguze.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Abakulu b'ebibinja balangiriranga eri eggye nti: ‘Waliwo n'omu eyazimba ennyumba empya atannagitukuza? Addeyo ewaabwe, sikulwa ng'afiira mu lutalo, ate omulala n'agitukuza." 
Deuteronomy20:6 “ ‘Waliwo n'omu eyasimba emizabbibu atannaba kugiryako? Addeyo ewaabwe, sikulwa ng'afiira mu lutalo, ate omuntu omulala n'agyeriira." 
Deuteronomy20:7 “ ‘Waliwo n'omu eyayogereza omukazi n'atamuwasa? Addeyo ewaabwe, sikulwa ng'afiira mu lutalo, ate omuntu omulala n'amuwasa.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Ebyo bwe biggwanga okwogera, abakulu b'ebibinja bagattangako nti: ‘Waliwo yenna atidde oba ow'omutima ogumutekemuse? Addeyo ewaabwe, sikulwa ng'aleetera baganda be okutekemuka mu mutima.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 “Abakulu b'ebibinja bwe bamalanga okwogera eri eggye, ne bassa abagabe ku bantu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Bw'ogendanga okulumba ekibuga, osookanga n'oweereza obubaka obw'emirembe." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Bwe bakkirizanga emirembe ne bakuggulirawo enzigi, abantu bonna abakirimu ba kussibwanga ku kasanvu bakuweerezenga." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Bwe bagaananga emirembe, ne bakuggulako olutalo, ekibuga okizingizanga." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Omukama Katonda wo bw'akikuwanga mu mikono gyo, buli musajja yenna akirimu omuttanga n'ekitala." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Bo abakazi n'abaana, ebisolo by'awaka n'ebirala ebiri mu kibuga, obyetwaliranga ng'omunyago gwo. Weeriiranga ku by'onyaze mu balabe bo, Omukama Katonda wo by'akuwadde." 
Deuteronomy20:15 “Bw'otyo bw'okolanga ebibuga ebikuli ewala ennyo, ebitali bibuga bya mawanga gano ag'okumpi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Naye mu bibuga Omukama Katonda wo by'agenda okukuwa tolekangamu ekintu kyonna ekissa omukka. 
Deuteronomy20:17 Bano mubawonganga okuzikirizibwa ne mbazikiririza ddala: Abakitti, Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizzi, Abakivi, n'Abayebusi, ng'Omukama Katonda wo bwe yakulagira." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Kubanga bagenda kubayigiriza okukola ebyenyinyalwa byonna bo bye bakola nga basinza balubaale baabwe, ne mukola mutyo ekibi eri Omukama Katonda wammwe." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Bw'omalanga ebbanga eggwanvu ng'ozingizza ekibuga okirwanyise okiwambe, emiti gyakyo togizikirizanga togissangako mbazzi ogiteme, kubanga okyasobola okulyako ebibala. Togitemanga. Abaffe, emiti egiri mu nnimiro nagyo bantu nti olyoke ogizinde?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Kyokka emiti gy'omanyi nti si gya bibala, oyinza okugitema n'ogyeyambisa mu by'okuzingiza ekibuga ekiba kibalwanyisa okutuusa lwe kigwa." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'alikuwa ogitwale bwe musangibwangamu eyo ku ttale omuntu attiddwa, eyamutta nga tamanyiddwa," 
Deuteronomy21:2 abakadde n'abalamuzi bo bafulumanga ne bapima ebbanga okuva awali omulambo okutuuka ku bibuga ebyetooloddewo. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Abakadde b'omu kibuga ekisinga okuba okumpi, baddiranga ennyana y'ente etasibwangako kikoligo, era etakozesebwanga ku mulimu," 
Deuteronomy21:4 ne batwala ennyana eyo mu kiwonvu awatalimwangako wadde okusigibwawo akantu, awali omugga ogutakalira, ne bamenyera eyo ennyana eyo ensingo." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Awo bakabona basemberanga, bazzukulu ba Leevi, Omukama Katonda wo be yalonda bamuweereze, bawe n'omukisa mu linnya lye n'okumala ensonga zonna ez'okusoowaagana n'okulwana." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Abakadde bonna ab'omu kibuga ekyo ekiri okumpi n'awali oli eyattibwa, banaabiranga engalo zaabwe ku nnyana gye bamenye ensigo mu kiwonvu," 
Deuteronomy21:7 ne boogerera waggulu nti: ‘Emikono gyaffe sigiyiwanga musaayi guno, n'amaaso gaffe sigaalaba kantu." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Mukama, kkiriza okuddaabiriza kw'abantu bo Yisirayeli be wanunula; omusaayi ogutaliiko musango togusiba ku bantu bo Yisirayeli.’ Olwo ogw'okuyiwa omusaayi gulibasonyiyibwa." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Bw'otyo bw'oneggyangako okuyiwa omusaayi ogutaliiko musango, kasita olikola ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Bw'ogendanga okulwanyisa abalabe bo, Omukama Katonda wo amala abakuwa mu mikono gyo, n'owambayo n'abasibe," 
Deuteronomy21:11 mu basibe omwo n'olabamu omukazi afaanana obulungi, n'omwagala, oyinza okumuwasa." 
Deuteronomy21:12 Bw'omuleetanga ewuwo, amwanga enviiri n'asala n'enjala," 
Deuteronomy21:13 n'ayambulamu ebyambalo bye eby'obusibe, n'atuula mu nnyumba yo okumala omwezi mulamba ng'akaabira kitaawe ne nnyina. Oluvannyuma oyinza okugenda gy'ali n'omuwasa n'afuuka mukazi wo." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Bw'abanga takyakusanyusa, omulekanga n'agenda gy'ayagala. Tomutundangamu ssente, era tomuyisanga ng'omuddu, kubanga wamutoowaza dda." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Omuntu bw'abeeranga n'abakazi ababiri omu nga muganzi omulala nga mukyawe, bombi bamala bamuzaalira abaana ab'obulenzi, ate ng'ow'omukyawe ye muggulanda," 
Deuteronomy21:16 bw'ayagalanga okubagabanyiza eby'obusika, omwana w'omuganzi tamuwanga eby'obuggulanda n'amukiza omuggulanda yennyini omwana w'omukyawe." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ow'omukyawe gw'akakasanga ku buggulanda, byonna by'alina amuwangako bya mirundi ebiri; anti oyo kye kibala ekisooka eky'amaanyi ge, obukulu bw'obuggulanda ye nnyinibyo." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Omuntu bw'abanga n'omwana ow'emputtu, omujeemu, atawulira kitaawe oba nnyina kye bamugamba, bwe bamubonereza nga tabawuliriza," 
Deuteronomy21:19 kitaawe ne nnyina bamuddiranga ne bamutwala eri abakadde b'ekibuga kye, ne bamussa ku mulyango gw'ekibuga kye." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Bagambanga abakadde b'ekibuga nti: ‘Omwana waffe ono wa mputtu, mujeemu, tatuwulira, musaasaanya era mutamiivu.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Awo abasajja ab'omu kibuga bamukubanga amayinja n'afa. Ekibi kino muteekwa okukiggyira ddala mu mmwe. Yisirayeli yenna aliwulira n'atya. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Omuntu bw'azzanga omusango ogumussisa, n'asalirwa ogw'okufa, n'attibwa n'awanikibwa ku muti," 
Deuteronomy21:23 omulambo gwe temugulekanga ne gusula ku muti; aziikibwanga ku lunaku olwo lwennyini, kubanga buli awanikibwa ku muti abeera kikolimo ewa Katonda. Tojaajamyanga nsi yo Omukama Katonda wo gye yakuwa ng'obusika." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Bw'olabanga ente ya muganda wo oba endiga ye ng'ebula, leka butafaayo; wabula laba nti ogizzaayo gy'ali." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Oba muganda wo tali kumpi, oba tomumanyi, ogitwalanga ewuwo, esigale eyo okutuusa muganda wo lw'alijja ng'aginoonya, awo n'ogimuddiza." 
Deuteronomy22:3 “Bw'otyo bw'okolanga ne ku ndogoyi, ne ku kyambalo na ku buli kyonna ekya muganda wo ekibanga kimubuzeeko; leka butakifaako." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Bw'osanganga endogoyi ya muganda wo oba ente ye ng'egudde mu kkubo, leka butagifaako; omuyambangako ne mugisitulawo." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Omukazi tayambalanga ebyambalo by'omusajja, n'omusajja ebyambalo by'omukazi; buli akola ekyo Omukama Katonda wo amwenyinyala." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Bw'osanganga ekisu ky'ennyonyi ku bbali w'ekkubo, oba ku ttaka, oba mu muti, ennyonyi enkulu ng'emaamidde ku bwana oba amagi, totwalanga enkulu n'obwana." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Enkulu gireke egende, obwana bwo oyinza okubwetwalira, olyoke obeere bulungi, owangaale ebbanga ggwanvu." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Bw'ozimbanga ennyumba empya, akasolya ko okakugiranga n'ekisenge, oleme kussisa ku nnyumba yo musango gwa kuyiwa musaayi, nga wabaddewo awanuse okuva ku kasolya." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Ennimiro yo ey'emizabbibu togisigangamu nsigo bbiri za njawulo, sikulwa nga ne by'osizeemu n'ebibala by'emizabbibu byombi obifiirwa mu kitukuvu." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Tolimisanga nte ng'ekaligiddwa wamu n'endogoyi. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Toyambalanga kyambalo kitobeke, ebyoya by'endiga nga biri wamu ne wuzi za kitaani." 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Weekoleranga ebituttwa ku munagiro gwo gwe weebikkirira ku nsonda zaagwo ennya. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Omusajja bw'awasanga omukazi, oluvannyuma lw'okwebaka naye n'amukyawa," 
Deuteronomy22:14 n'amuwaayiriza nga bw'amuweebuula nti: ‘Omukazi ono namuwasa, naye bwe namutuukirira, saamusangako kabonero ka bubeererevu,’" 
Deuteronomy22:15 kitaawe w'omuwala ne nnyina ne mwannyina batwaliranga abakadde b'ekibuga eri ku mulyango gw'ekibuga obubonero obulaga nga yali mubeererevu. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Kitaawe w'omuwala agambanga abakadde b'ekibuga nti: ‘Omwana wange namuwa omusajja ono abeere mukazi we, kati amukyaye." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Amuwaayiriza ng'agamba nti: “Muwala wo saamusangako kabonero ka bubeererevu.” Naye biibino ebikakasa obubeererevu bwa muwala wange.’ Banjuluzanga ekikubiro mu maaso g'abakadde. 
Deuteronomy22:18 Abakadde b'ekibuga ekyo bakwatanga omusajja ne bamuweweenyula. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Bamusaliranga engassi ya sekeli eza ffeeza kikumi, z'aliriwa kitaawe w'omuwala, kubanga omusajja ono yaweebuula muwala wa Yisirayeli. Amusigazanga nga mukazi we, era tamugobanga ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Oba ayogera kituufu, tewali kabonero ka bubeererevu," 
Deuteronomy22:21 omuwala bamutwalanga ku mulyango gw'ennyumba ya kitaawe, abasajja ab'omu kibuga kye ne bamukuba amayinja n'afa, kubanga yakola eky'obugwagwa mu Yisirayeli bwe yakola obwamalaaya mu nnyumba ya kitaawe. Oteekwa okuggyira ddala ekibi kino mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Omusajja bw'asangibwanga nga yeebase n'omukazi muka omusajja, bombi, omusajja eyeebase naye n'omukazi, battibwanga. Oteekwa okuggyirawo ddala ekibi kino mu Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Omusajja bw'asanganga eyo mu kibuga omuwala omubeererevu ayogerezebwa omusajja, amala yeebaka naye," 
Deuteronomy22:24 bombi mubafulumyanga ku wankaaki w'ekibuga ekyo ne mubakuba amayinja, ne bafa, kubanga omuwala teyaleekaanako, sso nga yali mu kibuga, n'omusajja, kubanga yatoowaza muka munne. Muteekwa okuggyirawo ddala ekibi kino mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Naye oba omusajja asanze eyo mu nsiko omuwala ayogerezebwa, amala amukwata ne yeebaka naye, yekka oyo y'afanga." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Omuwala temumukolanga kantu, kubanga takoze kibi kimugwaniza kufa; kino kifaanana ng'omusajja bw'afubutukira muganda we n'amutta," 
Deuteronomy22:27 n'omuwala ayogerezebwa yamusanga bw'omu ku ttale, yaleekaanako, naye tewaali amuwonya." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Omusajja bw'asanganga omuwala embeerera atannayogerezebwa, amala amukwata ne yeebaka naye, ne basangirizibwa," 
Deuteronomy22:29 omusajja wa kuliyiranga kitaawe w'omuwala sekeli za ffeeza amakumi ataano, Omuwala amuwasanga kubanga amutoowazizza; tamugobanga ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Omusajja tawasanga muka kitaawe; tanyoomoolanga obuliri bwa kitaawe. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Eyalaayibwa ng'enjagi zaatulisibwa oba nga zaasalibwako tajjanga mu lukuŋŋaana lw'Omukama. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Azaaliddwa mu nsonga, n'abaana be, n'okutuukira ddala ku bazzukulu ab'ezzadde ery'ekkumi tebayingiranga mu lukuŋŋaana lw'Omukama." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Omwammoni n'Omumowabu n'abaana baabwe, n'okutuukira ddala ku bazzukulu baabwe ab'ezzadde ery'ekkumi, tebayingiranga mu lukuŋŋaana lw'Omukama emirembe gyonna," 
Deuteronomy23:5 kubanga tebajja kubasisinkana na migaati na mazzi lwe mwava mu Misiri, era kubanga baagula Balaamu, mutabani wa Bewori ow'e Petori mu Aramu Nakarayimu akuvumirire." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Kyokka Omukama Katonda wo teyawuliriza Balaamu; okuvumirira kwe n'akufuula mukisa, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo yali akwagala." 
Deuteronomy23:7 Tobanoonyangako emirembe oba ebirungi bye balina ennaku zo zonna emirembe gyonna. 
Deuteronomy23:8 “Omwedomu tomwenyinyalanga, kubanga muganda wo. N'Omumisiri tomwenyinyalanga, kubanga wabeerayo ng'omugwira mu nsi ye." 
Deuteronomy23:9 Bazzukulu baabwe ab'ezzadde eryokuna bayinza okuyingira mu lukuŋŋaana lw'Omukama. 
Deuteronomy23:10 “Bw'osiisiranga okulumba abalabe bo, weewalanga buli kintu kibi." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Singa omu ku basajja bo abeera si mulongoofu olw'okwerooterera, afulumanga ebweru w'olusiisira; tagendanga munda mu lusiisira." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Bwe buwungeeranga anaabanga n'amazzi; enjuba bw'egwa n'alyoka akomawo mu lusiisira. 
Deuteronomy23:13 “Ebweru w'olusiisira oteekangayo ekifo gy'onoogendanga ng'oyagala okweyamba. 
Deuteronomy23:14 Obanga n'ekifumu eky'okweyambisa, ng'ogenze okufuluma, omalanga kusima kannya, bw'omala obubi bwo n'obuziikako ettaka." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Kubanga Omukama Katonda wo atambulatambula mu lusiisira lwo akukuume era akuwe abalabe bo; ensiisira zo zibeeranga ntukuvu aleme kutunula ku kintu kitajja n'akyukira eri, n'akulekerera." 
Deuteronomy23:16 “Omuddu bw'addukiranga ewuwo tomuwangayo eri mukama we. 
Deuteronomy23:17 Muleke abeere naawe wonna w'aliba alonze mu kimu ku bibuga byo, era tomunyigirizanga." 
Deuteronomy23:18 “Mu bawala ba Yisirayeli temubangamu malaaya wa mu kiggwa, era ne mu balenzi temubangamu malaaya wa mu kiggwa." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Toleetanga mu nnyumba y'Omukama Katonda wo kirabo kya malaaya omukazi oba mpeera ya malaaya omusajja okusasulira oli kye yeetema; byombi Omukama Katonda wo abyenyinyala. 
Deuteronomy23:20 “Bw'owolanga muganda wo tomusabanga magoba, ku ssente, ku mmere oba ku kintu ekirala kyonna ekireeta amagoba." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Omugwira oyinza okumusaba amagoba, naye muganda wo tomusabanga magoba; Omukama Katonda lw'anaakuwa omukisa mu byonna emikono gyo bye gikola mu nsi gy'ogenda okuyingiramu ogitwale." 
Deuteronomy23:22 “Ng'obaddeko kye weeyama ew'Omukama Katonda wo, tolwangawo kukituukiriza, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo agenda kukikubanja, n'oba n'omusango." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Bw'olekangayo okweyama, toliba na musango." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Naye ekibanga kifulumye mu kamwa ko okikolanga, kubanga wayogera ng'oggye mu ggwe wekka n'osuubiza Omukama Katonda wo n'akamwa ko kennyini." 
Deuteronomy23:25 “Ng'ogenze mu nnimiro ya munno ey'emizabbibu, lya emizabbibu nga bw'oyagala, kyokka totekangako mu kisero." 
Deuteronomy23:26 Bw'ogendanga mu nnimiro ya munno ey'eŋŋano, oyinza okunogako ku birimba n'engalo zo; naye tokwatanga kiwabyo n'osala eŋŋano ye eyimiridde." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Omusajja bw'awasanga omukazi, oluvannyuma n'asanga nga tamusanyusa, ng'amuzuddemu ekintu ekitajja, n'amuwandiikira ebbaluwa ey'obugobe, n'agimukwasa, n'amugoba mu maka ge," 
Deuteronomy24:2 omukazi bw'ava mu maka ge, n'agenda afumbirwa omusajja omulala," 
Deuteronomy24:3 n'oyo naye n'amukyawa, n'amuwa ebbaluwa ey'obugobe, n'amugoba mu maka ge, oba ye yennyini omusajja n'afa," 
Deuteronomy24:4 oli eyasooka okumuwasa tayinza kuddamu kumufuula mukazi we, kubanga omukazi oyo yagwagwawazibwa. Ekyo Omukama akyenyinyala. Ensi yo Omukama Katonda wo gy'abanga akuwadde ng'obusika togireeteranga kugwa mu kibi." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Omusajja bw'abanga yaakawasa, tasindikibwanga mu lutalo, era tassibwangako omulimu omulala gwonna, wabula alekebwanga n'abeera ewuwe omwaka mulamba ng'asanyusa mukazi we gw'awasizza." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Ng'omusingo olw'ebbanja oli ly'akulinako, tomuggyangako byombi, enso n'olubengo, ne bw'eba enso yokka, kubanga ebyo bwe bulamu bwe bwennyini bw'aba asinzeewo." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Singa omuntu asangibwa ng'awamba omu ku baganda be mu Bayisirayeli, n'amuyisa ng'omuddu, n'amutunda, eyawamba bw'akwatibwanga, attibwanga buttibwa. Oteekwa okuggyirawo ddala ekibi kino mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Ku bulwadde obw'ekigenge weegenderezanga era ofangayo nnyo n'okola nga bakabona Abaleevi bwe babanga bakugambye. Otuukirizanga n'obwegendereza bo bye nabalagira. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Jjukira Omukama Katonda wo kye yakola Miriyamu mu kkubo lwe wava e Misiri. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Bw'owolanga munno, libeere bbanja ki, toyingiranga nnyumba ye ggwe kweggyiramu musingo gwe," 
Deuteronomy24:11 wabula oyimiriranga wabweru, gw'owola ye n'akuleetera omusingo ebweru gy'oli." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Bw'abeeranga omwavu, togendanga okwebaka ng'omusingo gwe okyagulina;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 ogumuddizanga ng'enjuba egwa, yeebikke ekizibawo kye; alikusabira omukisa, n'ekikolwa kyo kiriba ng'obutuukirivu bwo mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Tokumpanyanga mupakasi wo mwavu oba ali mu bwetaavu, abeere muganda wo oba omugwira asula mu bibuga byo." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Naye buli lunaku ng'enjuba tennagwa omusasulanga empeera ye, kubanga munaku, omutima gwe gugirumirwa, sikulwa ng'akoowoola n'akuwaabira ew'Omukama n'oba n'omusango." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Bakitaabwe b'abaana si ba kuttibwanga olw'abaana baabwe, n'abaana si ba kuttibwanga olwa bakitaabwe; buli omu anaafanga lwa kibi kye." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Tosalirizanga mugwira na mulekwa; n'ekizibawo kya nnamwandu tokitwalanga nga musingo; 
Deuteronomy24:18 Jjukira nti wali muddu mu Misiri, Omukama Katonda wo n'akununulayo; kyenva nkulagira okolenga ekyo." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Bw'okesanga amakungulago mu nnimiro ne weerabirayo omuganda mu nnimiro, toguddukiranga; gulekere omugwira, mulekwa ne nnamwandu, Omukama Katonda wo alyoke akuwe omukisa mu byonna emikono gyo bye gikola." 
Deuteronomy24:20 “Bw'ogendanga okukuba oliva zo, toziddangamu gwa kubiri; ezisigalira zibeere za mugwira, mulekwa ne nnamwandu." 
Deuteronomy24:21 “Bw'onoganga emizabbibu mu nnimiro yo, togiyitangamu gwa kubiri, ebirimba ebisigalira bibeere bya mugwira, mulekwa ne nnamwandu." 
Deuteronomy24:22 “Jjukira nti naawe wali muddu mu Misiri; kyenva nno nkulagira okole ekyo. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Bwe wabangawo abasoowaganye, batuukirirenga abalamuzi, bo balisalawo ensonga; omutuufu ne bamwejjeereza, ate omusobya ne bamusingisa omusango." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Omusobya bw'abanga asaanira kukubibwa, omulamuzi amugalamizanga wansi n'amukubira awo mu maaso ge; obungi bw'embooko bwa kugererwa ku bunene bw'omusango gwe," 
Deuteronomy25:3 kyokka tomukubanga kusukka mbooko makumi ana. Bw'alikubwa okusinga ku ezo, muganda wo aliba anyoomeddwa mu maaso go." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Ente ewuula eŋŋano, togisibanga mumwa." 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Ab'oluganda bwe babanga bali wamu, omu ku bo n'afa nga talina mwana, nnamwandu w'omufu tafumbirwanga mulala w'ebweru, wabula muganda wa bba amuwasanga, atuukirize obuvunaanyizibwa bw'okuba mulamu we." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Omulenzi omukazi gw'asookanga okuzaala amuyitanga linnya lya muganda we omufu, erinnya ly'oli lireme kuzikirira mu Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Naye omusajja bw'abanga tayagala kutwala muka muganda we, omukazi agendanga mu bakadde ku wankaaki w'ekibuga, n'agamba nti: ‘Mulamu wange tayagala linnya lya muganda we lisigale mu Yisirayeli, nange agaanyi okumpasa okutuukiriza obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okuba mulamu wange.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Amangu ago abakadde bamutumyanga ne bamubuuza. Bw'agugubanga nti: ‘Saagala kumuwasa,’" 
Deuteronomy25:9 nnamwandu wa muganda we asemberanga gy'ali nga n'abakadde weebali, n'amwambulamu engatto mu kigere kye ekimu, n'amuwandira amalusu mu maaso nga bw'agamba nti: ‘Kino kye bakola omuntu atayagala kusibusa zzadde lya muganda we.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Mu Yisirayeli balimuyitanga ‘Nnyumba y'Omwambule Engatto’. 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Abasajja n'abasajja nga balwana, omukazi w'omu n'ayagala ataase bba mu mikono gy'amukuba, n'asoonookereza omukono gwe n'amubaka ebitundu bye eby'ekyama," 
Deuteronomy25:12 omukono gw'omukazi ogutemangako; tomukwatirwanga kisa. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Mu nsawo yo tobeerangamu na minzaani za buzito bwa njawulo, ennene n'entono." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Mu nnyumba yo temubangamu efa za njawulo, engazi n'entono." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Obeeranga ne minzaani epima ekituufu, eyeesigika; obeeranga n'efa epima ekituufu, eyeesigika, olyoke owangaale ebbanga ggwanvu mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Kubanga Omukama Katonda wo yeenyinyala yenna akola ebyo, buli yenna atali mwenkanya." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Jjukira Amaleki bye yakukola mu kkubo lwe wava mu Misiri: 
Deuteronomy25:18 nga bwe yakusisinkana mu kkubo, lwe wali oweddemu amaanyi ng'okooye, n'atta ab'omu ggye lyo bonna abaali bakoobedde; teyatya na ku Katonda." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Awo nno Omukama Katonda wo bw'akuwanga n'oweerako ku balabe bonna abakwetoolodde mu nsi gy'agenda okukuwa ogitwale ng'obusika, osangulirangawo ddala erinnya lya Amaleki wansi w'eggulu. Teweerabiranga!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Bw'oyingiranga mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'alikuwa ng'obusika, ng'omaze okugitwala n'ogibeeramu," 
Deuteronomy26:2 oddiranga ku bibala ebisooka eby'ebibala byonna eby'ettaka lyo by'obanga okungudde mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa, n'obissa mu kisero n'obitwala mu kifo Omukama Katonda wo ky'alibanga alonze ng'ekisulo ky'erinnya lye." 
Deuteronomy26:3 N'ogenda eri kabona abeerangawo mu budde obwo n'omugamba nti: ‘Olwa leero njatula mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo nti nnyingidde mu nsi gye yalayirira bajjajjaffe nti aligituwa.’ 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Kabona agenda kuggya ekisero mu mikono gyo akisse mu maaso g'omwaliiro gw'Omukama Katonda wo. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Olwo olyatula mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo nti: ‘Kitange yali Mwaramu, mubungeese; yakkirira mu Misiri, n'abantu batono, n'afuuka eggwanga ddene, ery'amaanyi, ery'abantu abangi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Abamisiri baatutulugunya ne batubonyaabonya nga batussaako emirimu emikakali. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Naye twakoowoola Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, n'awulira omulanga gwaffe, n'alaba obunaku bwaffe, okutegana kwaffe n'okunyigirizibwa." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Omukama n'atuggya mu Misiri n'omukono ogw'amaanyi, n'omukono omugolole, n'entiisa nnene n'obubonero n'ebikuuno." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Yatuyingiza mu kifo kino, n'atuwa ensi eno, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Nzuuno kati, Mukama, ndeeta ebisooka eby'ebibala by'ettaka bye wampa.’ “Ekisero okissanga awo mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo, oluvannyuma n'ovunnama mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Ojagulizanga mu birungi byonna Omukama Katonda wo by'aliba akuwadde, ggwe n'amaka go, n'Abaleevi, n'abagwira abali mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Bw'omalanga okuggyako ekyekkumi eky'ebibala byo byonna mu mwaka ogwokusatu, omwaka ogw'ekyekkumi, okiwanga Omuleevi, omugwira, mulekwa, ne nnamwandu, baliire eyo mu bibuga byo bakkute." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Olwo n'oyogera bw'oti mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo: ‘Ekitundu ekitukuvu nkiggye mu nnyumba yange ne nkiwa Omuleevi, omugwira, mulekwa ne nnamwandu okusinziira ku biragiro byo byonna nga bwe wandagira. Saava ku biragiro byo era saabyerabira." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Ku byo saalina kye nalyako nga ndi mu kukungubaga, mpaawo kye naggyako nga siri mulongoofu, saalina ku kyo na kimu kye nawa mufu. Nawulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wange, byonna ne mbituusanga nga bwe wandagira." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Yima mu ggulu, otunule wansi ku maka go amatukuvu, owe omukisa abantu bo Yisirayeli n'ensi gye watuwa nga bwe walayirira bajjajjaffe, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Olwa leero Omukama Katonda wo akulagidde ogoberere amateeka gano n'ebiragiro bye obituuse n'omutima gwo gwonna n'omwoyo gwo gwonna. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Naawe olwa leero olonze Omukama abeere Katonda wo, n'olagaanya okutambulira mu makubo ge, okukwata amateeka ge, ebiragiro bye n'ennamula ye, n'okumuwulira." 
Deuteronomy26:18 N'Omukama olwa leero akakasizza mubeere bantu be, ekkula lye, nga bwe yakugamba, era ng'oli wa kukwatanga ebiragiro bye byonna." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Ajja kukuyitimusa mu kitiibwa, mu ttutumu ne mu bukulu okusinga amawanga gonna ge yakola. Olibeera ggwanga ttukuvu eri Omukama Katonda wo, nga bwe yayogera.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Musa n'abakadde mu Yisirayeli baalagira abantu nti: “Mukwatenga ebiragiro byonna bye mbalagira olwa leero. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Bwe mulimala okusomoka Yorudani ne mutuuka mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa, osimbanga amayinja amanene, n'ogasiigako ennoni." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Owandiikangako ebigambo byonna eby'etteeka lino, ng'omaze okusomoka Yorudani, n'oyingira mu nsi Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukuwa, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, ng'Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabo bwe yakugamba." 
Deuteronomy27:4 “Bw'osomokanga Yorudani, osimbanga amayinja gano ku lusozi Ebali, nga bwe nkulagira olwa leero, ogasiiganga ennoni." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Ozimbirangayo Omukama Katonda wo omwaliiro, omwaliiro ogw'amayinja. Tokozesanga ekintu eky'ekyuma ku go." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Ozimbanga omwaliiro gw'Omukama Katonda wo n'amayinja amalamba; okwo n'oweererezaako Omukama Katonda wo ebitambiro ebyokye. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Oweererezangayo ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu, n'olya, n'ojaguliza eyo mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Owandiikanga ku mayinja ebigambo byonna eby'etteeka lino bulungi, nga bitangaavu.”" 
Deuteronomy27:9 Musa ne bakabona Abaleevi ne bagamba Yisirayeli yenna nti: “Yisirayeli, sirika era wulira: olwa leero Omukama akubaze ng'abantu b'Omukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Owuliranga eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wo n'otuusa ebiragiro n'amateeka bye nkulagira olwa leero.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Ku olwo era Musa n'alagira abantu nti: 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Bwe mumalanga okusomoka Yorudani, bano bayimiriranga ku lusozi Gerizimu okuwa abantu omukisa: ab'omu bika bya Simewoni, Leevi, Yuda, Yissakari, Yozefu ne Benyamiini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Na bano bayimiriranga ku lusozi Ebali okulangirira ebikolimo: ab'omu bika bya Rubeni, Gaadi, Aseeri ne Zebuluni, Daani ne Nafutali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Abaleevi balyogera eri buli Muyisirayeli mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Avumirirwe oyo akola ekifaananyi ekyole oba ekisaanuuse ekya lubaale, Omukama kye yeenyinyala, omulimu gw'emikono gy'omuwoozi oba omuweesi, n'akiwaŋŋamya mu nkiso. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.”" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Avumirirwe anyooma kitaawe ne nnyina. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Avumirirwe asembezangayo ejjinja ly'ensalo za muliraanwa we. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Avumirirwe awabya muzibe ku kkubo. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Avumirirwe asaliriza omugwira, mulekwa ne nnamwandu. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.”" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Avumirirwe eyeebaka ne muka kitaawe, kubanga anyoomodde obuliri bwa kitaawe. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.”" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Avumirirwe akabawala na buli kisolo kyonna. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Avumirirwe eyeebaka ne mwannyina, muwala wa kitaawe oba n'omubbeere we. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.”" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Avumirirwe eyeebaka n'azaala mukazi we. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Avumirirwe attanga munne mu nkiso. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Avumirirwe alyanga enguzi okutta omuntu ataliiko musango. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Avumirirwe oyo atanywerera ku bigambo bya tteeka lino, n'atabituusa. Abantu bonna baanukulanga nti: “Amiina.” ’ ”" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Bw'oliwuliriza eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wo, n'ofaayo okutuusa ebiragiro bye bye nkulagira olwa leero, Omukama Katonda agenda kukusukkulumya okire amawanga gonna agali ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Emikisa gino gyonna girikujjako ne gikuwerekera, kasita oliba ng'owulidde eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wo:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Oliweebwa omukisa mu kibuga, oliweebwa omukisa mu kyalo." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Ezzadde ly'olubuto lwo liriweebwa omukisa, n'ebibala by'ettaka lyo, n'ezzadde ly'ensolo zo: obuyana bw'amagana go n'obuliga bw'ebisibo byo." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Ekisero n'ekibbo kyo mw'ogoyera obutta biriweebwa omukisa. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Oliweebwa omukisa ng'oyingira; oliweebwa omukisa ng'ofuluma. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Abalabe bo abakusitukiramu Omukama alibakuwanga ne balinnyibwako awo mu maaso go; okukulumba balifulumanga mu kkubo limu, naye okukudduka balifulumiranga mu makubo musanvu." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Omukama aliwa omukisa amawanika go, na byonna emikono gyo bye gikola. Omukama Katonda wo alikuwa omukisa mu nsi gy'agenda okukuwa." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Omukama agenda kukufuula ggwanga lye ttukuvu, nga bwe yakulayirira, kasita olikwata ebiragiro by'Omukama Katonda wo, n'otambulira mu makubo ge." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Olwo amawanga gonna ag'omu nsi galiraba nti oyitibwa linnya lya Mukama, ne gakutya." 
Deuteronomy28:11 “Omukama agenda kukujjuza ebirungi byonna: ezzadde ly'olubuto lwo, ezzadde ly'ensolo zo, ebibala by'ettaka lyo, mu nsi Omukama gye yalayirira bajjajjaabo okukuwa." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Agenda kuggula eggulu, eggwanika ly'ebirungi bye, awe ettaka lyo enkuba mu budde bwayo, awe n'omukisa emirimu gyonna egy'emikono gyo. Onoowolanga amawanga mangi, naye ggwe nga tewali gwe weewolako." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Omukama agenda kukukulembezangamu, si kukukoobeza. Kasita oliwulira ebiragiro by'Omukama Katonda wo bye nkulagira olwa leero, n'obikwata, n'obituusa, olwo ggwe onookiranga, toosembenga." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Towunjukanga ku bigambo bye nkulagira olwa leero n'odda ku ddyo oba ku kkono, n'ogoberera balubaale abagwira, n'obasinza." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Bw'oliba towulirizza ddoboozi lya Mukama Katonda wo, n'otokwata na kutuusa biragiro bye byonna n'amateeka bye nkulagidde olwa leero, ebikolimo bino bigenda kukujjira bikugwire:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Olivumirirwa mu kibuga, olivumirirwa mu kyalo." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Ekisero n'ekibbo kyo mw'ogoyera obutta birivumirirwa. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Ezzadde ly'olubuto lwo lirivumirirwa, era n'ebibala by'ettaka lyo, n'obuyana bw'omu magana go, n'obuliga bw'omu bisibo byo." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Olivumirirwa ng'oyingira, olivumirirwa ng'ofuluma." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Omukama alikusindikira ebikolimo, okutabuka n'okuvumibwa mu mirimu gyonna egy'emikono gyo, okutuusa lw'alikusaanyaawo, okutuusa lw'alikuzikiriza amangu olw'ebikolwa byo ebibi bwe wamuvaako." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Olwo Omukama alikubonereza n'endwadde okutuusa lw'alikusaanyaawo ku nsi gy'ogenda okuyingira ogitwale. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Omukama alikubonereza n'endwadde ezikenenya, omusujja, ebizimba, olubabu lw'omusana, ekyeya, nnabbambula n'ebimera okugengewala ebirikubonyaabonya okutuusa lw'olizikirira." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Eggulu erikuli waggulu liriba lya kikomo, n'ettaka kw'olinnye liriba lya kyuma." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Enkuba y'omu nsi yo Omukama aligifuula nfuufu na lufufugge; eritonnya okuva ku ggulu okutuusa lw'olisaanawo. 
Deuteronomy28:25 Omukama alikuwaayo n'ofufuggazibwa mu maaso g'abalabe bo; olifulumira mu kkubo limu ng'obalumba, naye olikwata amakubo musanvu ng'obadduka; olifuuka ekyesisiwaza mu maaso g'obwakabaka bwonna obw'ensi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Omulambo gwo guliba mmere ya binyonyi byonna eby'omu bbanga n'ebisolo by'oku nsi; tewaliba abigobako. 
Deuteronomy28:27 “Omukama alikubonereza n'amayute g'e Misiri, ebizimba, olukuku, ne namusuna ebitalibaako abiwonya." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Omukama alikubonereza n'eddalu, n'okuziba amaaso, n'okuwunga." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Oliwammantanga mu ttuntu nga muzibe bw'awammanta mu nzikiza; amakubo go tegalikulamira. Jjo na luli olinyigirizibwa n'onyagibwa, naye tolifuna akudduukirira." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Oliyogereza omukazi, omulala ne yeebaka naye. Olizimba ennyumba n'otogisulamu. Olisimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu, naye ebibala byayo tolibirya nako." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Ente yo eribaagirwa awo ng'olaba, n'otogirya nako. Endogoyi yo erikunyagibwako ng'olaba, n'etekuddizibwa. Endiga zo ziriweebwa abalabe bo, ne wataba aziwonya." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Batabani bo ne bawala bo baliweebwa eggwanga eddala, amaaso ne gakuyimbaala ng'otunula olunaku lwonna obalindirira, ate nga mu mukono gwo temuli na twanyi." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Ebibala by'ettaka lyo na byonna bye wateganira abantu b'otomanyi bagenda kubirya; kimu kyokka ky'olifunayo: kunyigirizibwa na kubetentebwa ennaku zonna. 
Deuteronomy28:34 Oligwa eddalu olw'ebyo by'oliraba. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Omukama alikubonereza ne kookolo atawona ku maviivi ne ku magulu, wenna alikujjula okuva ku bigere byo okutuuka mu kawompo ko." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Ggwe ne kabaka wo gw'oliba weerondedde akufuge Omukama alibatwala mu ggwanga lye mutamanyangako. Oliweerereza eyo balubaale ab'ebiti, n'amayinja." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Olifuuka ekintu ekiwuniikiriza, eky'okunyumyako n'eky'okusekerera mu mawanga gonna Omukama gy'alikugobera." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Ensigo nkumu olizisuula mu ttaka n'okungulayo butono, kubanga enzige zigenda kuzirya." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Olisimba emizabbibu, naye toliginywako vviini, toliginogako bibala, kubanga envunyu zigenda kugirya." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Oliba n'emiti gy'oliva wonna mu nsi yo, naye omuzigo toligweyambisa, kubanga oliva zo zigenda kukunkumuka." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Olizaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala, naye tebaliba babo, kubanga bagenda kutwalibwa mu busibe." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Enzige zigenda kwezza emiti gyo gyonna, n'ebirime by'ensi yo." 
Deuteronomy28:43 Omugwira ali mu nsi yo, agenda kukuyitako ayitimuke, ate ggwe ogende ng'osereba." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Ye agenda kukuwolanga, naye ggwe nga tosobola kumuwola; aliba mu maaso, ggwe n'oba ennyuma." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Ebikolimo bino byonna bigenda kukugwira; birikuwondera ne bikukwata, okutuusa lw'olizikirira, kubanga tewawulira ddoboozi lya Mukama Katonda wo, tewakwatanga biragiro bye na mateeka ge bye yakulagira." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Biriba akabonero n'ekikuuno gy'oli ne mu zzadde lyo emirembe gyonna. 
Deuteronomy28:47 “Kubanga tewaweereza Mukama Katonda wo mu ssanyu n'omutima ogujaguza mu biseera we wabeerera obulungi," 
Deuteronomy28:48 awo nno oliweereza omulabe wo Omukama gw'alikusindikira, mu njala, mu nnyonta, mu kuyita obwereere, ne mu bwavu. Alikussa ekikoligo eky'ekyuma ku nsingo yo okutuusa lw'alikuzikiriza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 “Omukama alikuleetera eggwanga eriva ewala eyo ku nkuzi y'ensi, nga lijja ng'empungu ewuuma ng'ekkirira okukwakkula, eggwanga ly'otoyinza kutegeera lulimi lwalyo," 
Deuteronomy28:50 eggwanga eritunuza entiisa, eritassa kitiibwa mu mukadde, eritasaasira mwana muto." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Lirikavvula ezzadde ly'ebisolo byo, n'ebibala by'ettaka lyo, okutuusa lw'olizikirira. Teririkulekera ŋŋano, vviini nsu wadde omuzigo, obuyana mu magana go n'obuliga mu bisibo byo, okutuusa naawe ng'ozikiridde." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Lirikuzingiza mu bibuga byo byonna mu nsi yo, okutuusa bbugwe wo akoma eyo waggulu, aliko n'ebigo, gwe weesiga, lw'aligwa ku ttaka. Lirizingiza ebibuga mu nsi yonna Omukama Katonda wo gy'alikuwa." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Okukuzingiza kugenda kukuleetera obuyinike n'ennaku otuuke n'okulya ezzadde ly'olubuto lwo, ennyama y'abawala bo ne batabani bo Omukama Katonda wo b'aliba akuwadde." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Omusajja omugonvu ennyo era ow'eggonjebwa mu mmwe alikalalira muganda we, ne mukazi we ow'omu mikono gye, n'abaana be abaliba bakyasigaddewo," 
Deuteronomy28:55 nga tabagabirako na ku nnyama y'abaana be gy'aliba alya, kubanga takyalinawo kalala konna n'olw'obuyinike n'ennaku omulabe wo by'aliba akutaddemu olw'okuzinda ebibuga byo byonna." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Omukazi omugonvu era ow'eggonjebwa mu mmwe, olw'eggonjebwa n'obugonvu nga taganya na kigere kye kulinnya ku ttaka, alikalalira bba ow'omu mikono gye, ne mutabani we ne muwala we," 
Deuteronomy28:57 ekisungwa, n'abaana be b'azaala, kubanga alibaliira eyo mu nkiso olw'obuyinike n'ennaku omulabe wo by'aliba akutaddemu olw'okuzinda ebibuga byo." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Singa tolikwata n'otuusa ebigambo byonna ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino, n'ototya linnya lino ery'ekitiibwa era ery'entiisa, Omukama Katonda wo," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Omukama agenda kukusindikira ebibonerezo eby'entiisa, ebibonerezo ku zzadde lyo, ebibonerezo ebinene ebitakutuka, n'endwadde embi ezitatadde." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Alikuleetera endwadde zonna ez'e Misiri ze watya, ne zikwesibako." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Omukama era alikuleetera n'endwadde zonna n'obubenje ebitawandiikiddwa mu Kitabo ky'Etteeka kino okutuusa ng'ozikiridde. 
Deuteronomy28:62 Mmwe mu kusooka abaali benkana emmunyeenye z'eggulu obungi, kubanga tewawulira ddoboozi lya Mukama Katonda wo, mugenda kusigala batono." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Nga Omukama bwe kyamusanyusa okubawa okwala mu bingi n'abongera obungi, bw'atyo era bw'alisanyuka okubazikiriza n'okubeerawo, muggweremu ddala mu nsi mw'ogenda okuyingira ogitwale." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Omukama agenda kukusaasaanya mu mawanga gonna okuva ku nsonda emu ey'ensi okutuuka ku ndala, eyo gy'oliweerereza balubaale ab'ebiti n'amayinja, ggwe ne bajjajjaabo be mutamanyangako." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Ne mu mawanga ago tolifuna buweerero, n'ekigere kyo teriba na we kiwummulira. Eyo Omukama alikuweerayo omutima omweraliikirivu, amaaso agafuuyiriddwa olw'okulindirira, n'omutima oguterebuse." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Obulamu bwo bunaabanga ku bunkenke, ng'oli mu kutya ekiro n'emisana, nga tomanyi kinaakutuukirira." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ku makya ng'ogamba nti: ‘Singa nno buzibye,’ n'akawungeezi nti: ‘Singa nno bukedde,’ olw'okutya okuliba mu mutima gwo, n'olw'ebyo by'oliba olabye." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Omukama alikuzza mu Misiri mu maato mu kkubo lye nakusuubiza nti toliddamu kuliraba; eyo gye mulyetundira mu balabe bammwe mubeere baddu na bazaana baabwe, naye tewaliba abagula.”" 
Deuteronomy28:69 Bino bye bigambo by'endagaano Omukama gye yalagira Musa akole n'Abayisirayeli mu nsi y'e Mowabu, ng'oggyeeko eri gye yakola nabo ku Korebu." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Omukama n'ayita Yisirayeli yenna n'abagamba nti: “Amaaso gammwe gaalaba byonna Omukama bye yakola mu nsi y'e Misiri ku Faraawo ne ku baweereza be bonna ne ku nsi ye yonna. 
Deuteronomy29:2 N'amaaso gammwe mwalaba ebigezo ebinene, obubonero, n'ebikuuno ebinene." 
Deuteronomy29:3 N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero Omukama tannabawa mutima gutegeera, maaso galaba, na matu gawulira." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Emyaka amakumi ana gye mmaze nga mbayisa mu ddungu, ebyambalo byammwe tebyayabirirako n'engatto z'omu bigere byammwe tezaggweerera." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Temwalya mugaati, temwanywa vviini oba ekitamiiza. Nakikola mulyoke mutegeere nti nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Bwe mwatuuka mu kifo kino; Sikoni kabaka w'e Kesuboni n'ajja ne Ogi kabaka w'e Basani batulwanyise, naye twabawangula." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Twatwala ensi yaabwe ne tugiwa ab'ekika kya Rubeni n'ab'ekika kya Gaadi, n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse ebeere yaabwe." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Awo nno mukwatenga ebigambo by'endagaano eno, mubituuse, lwe muliba n'omukisa mu byonna bye mukola." 
Deuteronomy29:9 “Olwa leero mwenna muyimiridde mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wammwe: abafuzi, abaami, abakadde n'abakulu, buli musajja yenna mu Yisirayeli," 
Deuteronomy29:10 abaana bammwe, bakazi bammwe n'abagwira abali naawe mu lusiisira, okuva ku batyabi b'enku okutuuka ku abo abakukimira amazzi," 
Deuteronomy29:11 olyoke oyingire mu ndagaano y'Omukama Katonda wo, endagaano Omukama Katonda wo gy'agenda okukakasa naawe agisibe n'ekirayiro," 
Deuteronomy29:12 okukufuula eggwanga lye naye abeere Katonda wo, nga bwe yakugamba, era nga bwe yalayirira bajjajjaabo, Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Nkola endagaano eno n'okugikakasa n'ekirayiro si nammwe mwekka," 
Deuteronomy29:14 mmwe abali wano olwa leero mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda waffe, wabula era n'abo bonna abatali wano naffe olwa leero." 
Deuteronomy29:15 “Anti nammwe mumanyi nga bwe twabanga mu nsi y'e Misiri, n'engeri gye twayita mu mawanga wakati bwe mwabanga mugayitamu." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Mwalaba ebyenyinyalwa bye n'ebifaananyi bye ebya balubaale ebikole mu miti, amayinja, ffeeza, ne zaabu." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Mwegendereze mu mmwe muleme kubeeramu musajja oba mukazi, amaka oba ekika, omutima gwe ne guva ku Mukama Katonda waffe, n'agenda okusinza balubaale b'amawanga ago, mu mmwe ne mubaamu ekikolo ekizaala obutwa n'omususa." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Ow'engeri eyo bw'awuliranga ebigambo by'ekirayiro kino ne yeenyumiikiriza mu mutima gwe ng'agamba nti: ‘Nzija kubeera bulungi ne bwe nnaagoberera obukakanyavu bw'omutima gwange,’ ekyandiviiramu omwonoonyi okuzikirira wamu n'ataliiko musango," 
Deuteronomy29:19 Omukama tagenda kumusonyiwa. Obusungu n'obuggya bw'Omukama birimuttunkirako; ebikolimo byonna ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino bigenda kumujjira, n'erinnya lye Omukama agenda kulisangulawo wansi w'eggulu." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Omukama alimulondamu mu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli aboneebone, ng'ebikolimo by'omu ndagaano ebiwandiikiddwa mu Kitabo ky'Etteeka kino bwe bigamba." 
Deuteronomy29:21 “Abaana bammwe abalibaddirira mu mazadde agajja, n'abagwira abaliba bavudde mu nsi ez'ewala, baliraba ebibonoobono by'ensi eyo n'endwadde Omukama z'aliba agisindikidde:" 
Deuteronomy29:22 Ensi yonna eriba ddungu eryokeddwa, ya lunnyo, ebabuddwa ebibiriiti, omutasigiddwa kantu; terisobola kumeza wadde okukuza akaddo konna, ng'ezikiridde nga Sodoma, Gomorra, Aduma ne Zeboyimu, Omukama bye yazikiriza mu busungu bwe n'obuswandi." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Amawanga gonna gagenda kwebuuza nti: ‘Lwaki Omukama yakola ati ensi eno? Kwesera kwa busungu nnabaki buno obungi bwe buti?’ 
Deuteronomy29:24 Bagenda kwanukulwa nti: ‘Kubanga baayabulira endagaano y'Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe gye yakuba nabo, lwe yabaggya e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Ne basinza balubaale ne babavunnamira; balubaale be baali batamanyi, b'atabawanga." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Obusungu bw'Omukama kyebwava bweserera ku nsi eno, n'agireetera ebikolimo byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kino." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Yabasimbula mu nsi yaabwe ng'asunguwadde, ajjudde obuswandi, munyiivu, n'abasukkiza mu nsi endala, nga bwe kiri kaakati.’" 
Deuteronomy29:28 “Ebikisiddwa biba bya Mukama Katonda waffe, naye ebibikkulibwa biba byaffe n'abaana baffe emirembe gyonna, tulyoke tutuusenga ebigambo byonna eby'omu tteeka lino.”" 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ebyogeddwa bino byonna bwe birikutuukirira: omukisa n'ekikolimo bye ntadde mu maaso go, ne wejjusa muli mu mutima ng'oyima eyo mu mawanga Omukama Katonda wo gy'aliba akusaasaanyirizza," 
Deuteronomy30:2 n'okomawo gy'ali wamu n'abaana bo, n'ogondera n'omutima gwonna n'omwoyo gwonna ebiragiro bye, nga byonna bwe mbikulagidde olwa leero," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Omukama Katonda wo agenda kukomyawo abasibe bo, agenda kukusaasira, addemu okukukuŋŋaanya eyo yonna mu mawanga, gy'aliba akusaasaanyirizza." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Ne bw'oliba nga wagoberwa eyo ku nkingi z'eggulu, Omukama Katonda wo alikukuŋŋaanyaayo n'akukomyawo." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Alikuzza mu nsi eyali eya bajjajjaabo n'ogitwala. Alikuwa okwesiima n'okwala okusinga ne bajjajjaabo. 
Deuteronomy30:6 “Omukama Katonda wo alitayirira omutima gwo n'omutima gw'ezzadde lyo, olyoke oyagale Omukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna, obeere mulamu." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Ebikolimo byonna agenda kubikyusiza ku balabe bo, ne ku abo abakukyawa n'abakuyigganya." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Ggwe oliddamu n'owulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama, n'otuusa ebiragiro bye byonna bye nkulagira olwa leero." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Omukama Katonda wo agenda kukuwa obeere n'omukisa mu mirimu gy'emikono gyo gyonna, n'ezzadde ly'olubuto lwo, ezzadde ly'ebisolo byo, n'ebibala by'ettaka lyo. Omukama aliddamu n'akusanyukira, n'akuwa ebirungi byonna, nga bwe yasanyukira bajjajjaabo," 
Deuteronomy30:10 bw'oliwulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wo, n'okwata ebiragiro bye n'amateeka ge, ebiwandiikiddwa mu Kitabo ky'Etteeka kino, n'odda eri Omukama Katonda n'omutima gwo gwonna n'omwoyo gwo gwonna." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Ekiragiro kino kye nkulagira olwa leero, si kizibu, tekikuli wala." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Tekiri mu ggulu nti onoogamba nti: ‘Ani anaatwambukirayo mu ggulu akireete akituyigirize, tulyoke tukituusenga.’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Tekiri mitala wa nnyanja nti onoogamba nti: ‘Ani anaawunguka ennyanja akireete akituyigirize, tulyoke tukituusenga.’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Wabula ekigambo kikuli kumpi nnyo, kiri mu kamwa ko ne mu mutima gwo, osobole okukituusanga." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Laba, olwa leero nkuteeka mu maaso go obulamu n'okwesiima, okufa n'okubonaabona." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Kubanga nkulagira leero okwagala Omukama Katonda wo, okutambulira mu makubo ge, n'okukwatanga ebiragiro bye, amateeka ge n'ennamula ye. Olwo oliba mulamu; olyala, n'Omukama Katonda wo alikuwa omukisa mu nsi gy'ogenda okuyingiramu ogitwale." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Naye omutima gwo bwe guliralambala, n'ogaana okuwulira, n'otwalirizibwa, n'ovunnamira balubaale n'obasinza," 
Deuteronomy30:18 olwa leero nnangirira nti mazima mugenda kuzikirira; temulibandaala mu nsi gy'osomokera Yorudani oyingire ogitwale. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Leero mpita eggulu n'ensi bibalumirize, nti mbateereddewo obulamu n'okufa, omukisa n'ekikolimo. Kale nno londawo bulamu, ggwe n'ezzadde lyo mubeere balamu," 
Deuteronomy30:20 oyagale n'Omukama Katonda wo, owulire eddoboozi lye, omunywerereko. Kubanga Omukama bwe bulamu bwo era y'alikuwa okuwangaalira mu nsi gye nalayira okuwa bajjajjaabo Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Awo Musa n'agenda n'ayogera ebigambo bino eri Yisirayeli yenna nti: 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Kati ndi wa myaka kikumi mu abiri, sikyasobola kubakulembera, ate nga n'Omukama yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Togenda kusomoka Yorudani.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Omukama Katonda wo yennyini ajja kusomoka ng'akukulembeddemu. Agenda kuzikiriza amawanga ago mu maaso gammwe, ensi yaabwe mugitwale. Yoswa agenda kusomoka ng'akukulembeddemu, ng'Omukama bwe yayogera." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Omukama agenda kukola amawanga gano kye yakola Sikoni ne Ogi bakabaka b'Abaamori, bwe yabazikiriza wamu n'ensi yaabwe." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Nabo bw'aliba ababawadde, mubakole kye kimu, nga bwe nabalagira." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Mugume, munywere; temutya, temwekanga olw'okubeera bo, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo yennyini ye mugabe wo, atambula naawe, tagenda kukuleka, wadde okukwabulira.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Musa n'ayita Yoswa n'amugamba mu maaso ga Yisirayeli yenna nti: “Guma, nywera, anti ggwe ojja okuyingiza eggwanga lino mu nsi, Omukama gye yalayira okuwa bajjajjaabwe; ojja kugibagabira ku kalulu ebeere obusika bwabwe." 
Deuteronomy31:8 N'Omukama ajja kukukulemberamu era ajja kubeera naawe, tagenda kukuleka, wadde okukwabulira; leka kutya, totekemuka.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Musa n'awandiika etteeka lino, n'alikwasa bakabona, bazzukulu ba Leevi, abaatwalanga Essanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama, n'abakadde bonna aba Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Musa n'abalagira nti: “Ku nkomerero ya buli myaka musanvu, mu mwaka ogw'ekisonyiwo ky'amabanja, ku mbaga ey'Ensiisira," 
Deuteronomy31:11 bonna Abayisirayeli lwe bakuŋŋaana mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wo mu kifo ky'aliba alonze, osomanga ebigambo by'etteeka lino bonna nga bawulira." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Kuŋŋaanya buli muntu: abasajja, abakazi, abato, n'abagwira abasula mu bibuga byammwe, bawulire, bayige okutya Omukama Katonda wammwe, balyoke bakwatenga era batuusenga byonna ebigambibwa mu tteeka lino." 
Deuteronomy31:13 N'abaana baabwe kati abatannamanya, bawulire, bayige okutya Omukama Katonda wammwe ennaku zonna ze munaaba mu nsi gye musomokera Yorudani mugitwale.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Ennaku ez'okufa kwo ziri kumpi; yita Yoswa mujje mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano mmulage eky'okukola.” Musa ne Yoswa ne bagenda ne bayimirira ku Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
Deuteronomy31:15 Omukama n'alabikirayo mu mpagi ey'ekire, empagi n'eyimirira ku mulyango gwa Weema." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Omukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Wuuno ogenda okugalamira ne bajjajjaabo; mangu eggwanga lino ligenda kukola obwamalaaya ne balubaale mu nsi gye bagenda okuyingira. Bagenda kunjabulira bamenye endagaano gye nkubye nabo. 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ku olwo obusungu bwange bugenda kubeesererako, mbaabulire; ŋŋenda kubakisa amaaso gange, bagenda kuwemmentebwa. Obubenje n'ebizibu bigenda kubagwira, ku olwo bagambe n'okugamba nti: ‘Kituufu, Katonda tali nange, ggwe lwaki ennaku eno yonna ensanga?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Nze ŋŋenda kukisa amaaso gange ku olwo olw'okubeera obwonoonefu bwabwe bwonna bwe baakyukira eri balubaale abagwira.” 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Kale nno kati mwewandiikire oluyimba luno, oluyigirize Abayisirayeli, olubakwase bujjukizi, olubayimbise, lubalumirize." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Kubanga nga mmaze okuyingiza eggwanga eryo mu nsi gye nalayirira bajjajjaabwe, ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, bwe balimala okulya ne bakkuta ne bagejja, bagenda kukyukira eri balubaale, babasinze, nze banjabulire, bamenye endagaano yange."
