Deuteronomy31:21 Obubenje obungi n'ebizibu bwe birimala okubagwira, oluyimba olwo lugenda kubalumiriza, kubanga terugenda kwerabirwa abazzukulu baabwe. Na kati nga sinnaba kubayingiza, mmanyi bulungi bye bagenda okukola mu nsi gye nabalayirira.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Musa n'awandiika oluyimba luno ku olwo, n'aluyigiriza Abayisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Omukama n'alagira Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu nti: “Guma, nywera, kubanga ggwe ojja okuyingiza Abayisirayeli mu nsi gye nabalayirira; nange nzija kubeera naawe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Musa bwe yamala okuwandiika ebigambo byonna eby'etteeka lino mu kitabo okutuuka gye bikoma," 
Deuteronomy31:25 n'alagira Abaleevi abaatwalanga Essanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama nti: 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Muddire ekitabo kino eky'etteeka mukiteeke kumpi n'Essanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama Katonda wammwe, kiryoke kibeere eyo kinjulirenga gye bali." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Anti mmanyi bw'oli omujeemu, ow'ensingo enkakanyavu. Oba mwajeemera Omukama nga nkyali mulamu ndi nammwe, leero alirabisa nga mmaze okufa!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 “Mukuŋŋaanyize we ndi bonna abakulu b'ebika byammwe n'abaami bammwe, njogere ebigambo bino nga nabo bawulira, nkowoole eggulu n'ensi binjulire gye muli." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Kubanga mmanyi nti bwe nnaamala okufa mugenda kwonooneka, muve mu kkubo lye mbalagidde. Gye bujja obubenje bujja kubagwira kubanga muliba mwonoonye eri Omukama, ne mumunyiiza olw'ebyo emikono gyammwe bye giriba gikoze.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Musa n'atontoma ebigambo by'oluyimba luno okutuukira ddala gye lukoma ng'ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli kiwulira, nti:" 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Ggulu, wuliriza, nzija kwogera; nsi, wulira ebigambo by'akamwa kange." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Enjigiriza yange egwe ng'enkuba, ebigambo byange biwandagale ng'omusulo, ng'ekire ky'enkuba ku muddo ng'oluwandaggirize ku ssubi." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Kubanga nzija kukowoola erinnya ly'Omukama; muyimbe obukulu bwa Katonda waffe. 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Ye Lwazi. By'akola bituukiridde, kubanga amakubo ge gonna matuufu. Katonda omwesigwa, atakola bitaliimu bwenkanya, mutuufu, wa mazima." 
Deuteronomy32:5 “Beeyisizza bubi gy'ali, tebakyali baana be olw'okuswaluka, wabula ezzadde eryonoonefu, ekkuppya." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Bwe mutyo bwe musiima Omukama, Ggwe eggwanga essiru, omutali ggezi? Si ye kitaawo eyakutonda, Eyakukola, eyakussaawo?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 “Jjukira ebiseera eby'edda, lowooza ku mazadde agaayita; buuza kitaawo, ajja kukubuulira, bakulu bo, banaakugamba:" 
Deuteronomy32:8 Ali Waggulu Ddala bwe yagabira amawanga obusika, bwe yatemaatema mu baana ba Adamu, yassizaawo amawanga ensalo ng'Abayisirayeli bwe benkana." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Kubanga omugabo gw'Omukama be bantu be, Yakobo, bwe busika bwe yagabana." 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Yamusanga mu ddungu, mu malungu amakalu agawuuma, n'amusiikiriza, n'amulabirira, n'amukuuma ng'emmunye y'eriiso lye," 
Deuteronomy32:11 ng'empungu bw'ekuuma ekisu kyayo, ne yeetooloolera awali obwana bwayo, n'eyanjuluza empawa zaayo okububaka, n'ebutwalira ku biwaawaatiro byayo." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Omukama yekka ye yamukulembera tewaaliyo lubaale w'ebweru yenna yali naye. 
Deuteronomy32:13 Yamwebagaliza ku nsozi z'ensi, n'amuliisa ebibala by'ennimiro, n'amuyonsa omubisi gw'enjuki oguva mu lwazi, n'omuzigo oguva mu nsozi ez'embaalebaale," 
Deuteronomy32:14 n'omuzigo oguva mu ggana n'amata agava mu kisibo, ko n'amasavu ag'endiga ennume, n'embuzi ennume eze Basani ez'olulyo, n'empeke z'eŋŋano ezisinga obulungi. Wanywa evviini, omusaayi gw'emizabbibu." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Omwagalwa yagejja, n'aligita; ng'akkuse yagejja n'anyirira. Yaleka Katonda eyamukola n'anyooma Olwazi, Omulokozi we." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Baamukwasa obuggya ne balubaale baabwe abalala, ne bamunyiiza n'ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale ebyenyinyalwa." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Baatambirira misambwa, egitali Katonda, balubaale be baali batamanyi, abazze luno jjo, bajjajjaabwe be bataawanga kitiibwa." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Olwazi olwakuzaala waluleka ne weerabira Omukama eyakuzaala. 
Deuteronomy32:19 Omukama yalaba ne yeetamwa, kubanga batabani be ne bawala be bamunyiiza." 
Deuteronomy32:20 N'agamba nti: ‘Amaaso gange nzija kugabakweka ndabe enkomerero yaabwe bw'eneeba; kubanga zzadde bbambaavu, abaana omutali bwesigwa." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bankwasizza obuggya n'ebitali Katonda, ne bansunguwaza n'ebitaliimu byabwe bye basinza; nange nzija kubakwasisa obuggya ku ggwanga omutali, mbanyiize n'eggwanga essiru." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Obuswandi bwange bukoleezezza omuliro, ogwokya ne gutuuka n'ekkuzimu mu magombe; gusenkenya ensi na buli kirime kyayo, n'emisingi gy'ensozi gugiteekedde omuliro." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndibasindikira kabenje ku kabenje n'obusaale bwange mbubamalireko. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Ndibasindikira enjala n'ebakozza, n'omusujja ogukonvubya ne kawumpuli ddekabusa; ndibasindikira amannyo g'ebisolo ebikambwe, ko obusagwa bw'emisota egyekululira mu nfuufu." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ebweru ekitala kiribamalako abaana, mu nnyumba zaabwe eriba ntiisa nsa. Omulenzi avubuka n'omuwala embeerera, ebbujje wamu n'omusajja kinviivi balizikirira." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Nagamba nti: “Nzija kubasaasaanya, eky'okubajjukira nkiggyire ddala mu bantu,”" 
Deuteronomy32:27 naye natya abalabe okwewaana, sikulwa ng'abalabe baabwe tebakitegeera ne bagamba nti: “Ffe tuwangudde, Omukama si ye yakola bino byonna.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Anti bali ggwanga omutali ndowooza, temuli kutegeera." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Singa nno baali bagezi, banditegedde, bandimanye enkomerero yaabwe bw'eriba!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Omu awondera atya olukumi, oba ababiri ne baddusa omutwalo, okuggyako ng'olwazi lwabwe lubatunze, ng'Omukama abavuddemu?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 “ ‘Anti olwazi lwabwe teruli nga Lwazi lwaffe, abalabe baffe bennyini bakikkiriza." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Omuzabbibu gwabwe gusibuka ku muzabbibu gw'e Sodoma, gwa mu nnimiro z'e Gomorra; emizabbibu gyabwe gya busagwa, ebirimba byabwe bikaawa;" 
Deuteronomy32:33 evviini yaabwe, butwa bwa misota, obusagwa kattira obw'amasalambwa." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Ekyo sikikwese mu tterekero lyange sikisibidde mu mawanika gange? 
Deuteronomy32:35 Okuwoolera eggwanga kyange, nzija kusasula ng'obudde butuuse; mangu ekigere kyabwe kijja kuseerera. Olunaku lw'okuzikirira kwabwe lusembedde, enkomerero yaabwe ebajjira mangu.’" 
Deuteronomy32:36 “Omukama aliramula abantu be asaasire abaweereza be, bw'aliraba ng'amaanyi gabawedde nga tewali asigadde muddu oba mwana wa ddembe." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Aligamba nti: ‘Balubaale baabwe bali ludda wa, olwazi gye baddukira;" 
Deuteronomy32:38 balubaale abaalyanga amasavu g'ebitambiro byabwe, ne banywa evviini y'ebitone byabwe eby'okuyiwa? Basituke, bakuyambe! Bakuwe we weewogoma!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Mulabe nno nze Nzuuyo, teri Katonda mulala, wabula nze; nzita ne nzizaamu obulamu; nkuba, ate ne mponya; tewali ayinza kuwonya ali mu mikono gyange." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ngolodde omukono gwange ne ndayira nti: “Nze nga ndi mulamu emirembe gyonna," 
Deuteronomy32:41 bwe ndiwagala ekitala kyange ne kituuka n'okumyansa, omukono gwange gukikwata okulamula, ndiwoolera eggwanga ku balabe bange, ndyesasuliza ku abo abankyawa." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Obusaale bwange ndibutamiiza omusaayi, n'ekitala kyange kirikavvula ennyama: omusaayi gw'abattiddwa n'abasibe, emitwe gy'abagabe b'abalabe.”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “ ‘Amawanga, mujaguze n'abantu be, kubanga aliwoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi gw'abaweereza be aliwoolera eggwanga ku balabe be, aliddaabiriza ensi y'abantu be.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Musa yajja ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu n'atontoma ebigambo byonna eby'oluyimba luno ng'abantu bawulira. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Bwe yamaliriza okubuulira Yisirayeli yenna ebigambo ebyo byonna 
Deuteronomy32:46 n'abagamba nti: “Musse omutima ku bigambo byonna, bye nnangiridde ddala gye muli olwa leero, mulyoke mubiragire abaana bammwe bakwatenga era batuusenga ebigambo byonna eby'etteeka lino," 
Deuteronomy32:47 kubanga kino si kigambo bugambo omutali nsa, wabula bwe bulamu bwammwe. Olw'ekigambo kino mulisobola okuwangaalira mu nsi gye mugenda okuyingiramu mugitwale nga mumaze okusomoka Yorudani.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Ku lunaku olwo lwennyini Omukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Yambuka ku lusozi Abarimu, ku lusozi Nebo, oluli mu nsi y'Abamowabu, emitala wa Yeriko, olabe ensi Kanaani, ensi gye ŋŋenda okuwa Abayisirayeli ebeere obutaka." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Ku lusozi olwo lw'onoolinnya, gy'olifiira n'ogattibwa ku bantu bo, nga Aroni muganda wo bwe yafiira mu lusozi Ori n'agattibwa ku bantu be." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Kubanga temwali beesigwa gye ndi mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli ku mazzi g'e Meriba Kadesi, mu ddungu ly'e Zini, kubanga temwayoleka butuukirivu bwange mu Bayisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Awo nno ensi ojja kugirengerera wala; tojja kuyingira mu nsi gye ŋŋenda okuwa Abayisirayeli.” 
Deuteronomy33:1 Guno gwe mukisa Musa omuntu wa Katonda gwe yawa Abayisirayeli nga tannafa," 
Deuteronomy33:2 yagamba nti: “Omukama yajja ng'ava ku Sinayi, n'abaakira ng'ava ku Seyiri; yayakaayakana ng'ava ku lusozi Parani, n'asembera ng'ava e Meribuboti Kadesi, n'ajja gye bali okuva emaserengeta ng'akkirira enkonko." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Mazima oyagala abantu; bonna abatukuvu bo bakuli bati mu ngalo zo, bonna bavunnama ku bigere byo, ne bafuna enjigiriza okuva mu kigambo kyo." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Musa yatuwa etteeka, obusika bw'ekibiina kya Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Mu Mwagalwa mulimu kabaka, ng'abakungu mu ggwanga bakuŋŋaanye wamu n'ebika bya Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy33:6 “Rubeni abeewo, era tafanga, n'abantu be tebabanga batono.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ku Yuda yagamba kino nti: “Mukama, wulira eddoboozi lya Yuda, muleete eri abantu bo. Yeerwanako n'omukono gwe; mubeerere obuyambi ku balabe be.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ku Leevi yagamba nti: “Tummimu yo ne Wurimu bya musajja gwe weetukuliza, gwe wagereza e Massa, gwe wayomba naye ku mazzi e Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Eyagamba kitaawe ne nnyina nti: ‘Sibatya,’ baganda be ataabategeera, n'abaana be ataabafaako. Kubanga yakuuma ekigambo kyo, yalabirira endagaano yo." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Ayigiriza Yakobo ebiragiro byo, ne Yisirayeli etteeka lyo; Aweereza obubaani mu maaso go n'ebitambiro ebyokye ku mwaliiro gwo." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Mukama, wa omukisa obugagga bwe, siima omulimu gw'emikono gye. Kutula emigongo gy'abamusitukiddemu, n'abamukyawa baleme kusituka nate.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ku Benyamiini yagamba nti: “Omwagalwa w'Omukama asula mu ye mu ddembe, kubanga amutaasa olunaku lwonna; naye atudde wakati w'ebibegabega bye.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ku Yozefu, yagamba nti: “Ensi ye Omukama agiwe omukisa; n'omusulo gw'eggulu ogusinga obulungi, n'eddubi eryebase eyo wansi," 
Deuteronomy33:14 n'ebibala by'enjuba ebikira obulungi, n'eby'omwezi bye gubaza ebisukkirivu obulungi," 
Deuteronomy33:15 n'eby'ensozi ez'edda ebisooka mu bulungi, n'ebirungi ennyo eby'obusozi obwa ddi na ddi," 
Deuteronomy33:16 n'ebisukkirivu obulungi eby'ensi n'ebigijjuzizza. Omukisa gw'oyo asula mu kisaka ekibuubuuka omuliro gujje ku mutwe gwa Yozefu, ku kyenyi ky'omulangira mu baganda be." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Mu kitiibwa ali ng'ennume eggula enda, amayembe ge, mayembe ga mbogo, g'alikozesa n'atomera amawanga n'ago agaliba ku nkingi z'ensi. Egyo gye mitwalo gya Efurayimu, Ezo ze nkumi n'enkumi za Manasse.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ku Zebuluni yagamba nti: “Zebuluni, sanyuka mu ntabaalo, naawe Yissakari, mu weema zo." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Baliyita abantu ku lusozi ne batambirirayo ebitambiro eby'obutuukirivu. Baliyonka ku mwero gw'ennyanja n'obugagga obukweke mu musenyu.” 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ku Gaadi yagamba nti: “Aweebwe omukisa oyo agaziya Gaadi. Abwamiridde oyo ng'empologoma, ataagulako omukono n'omutwe." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Yeerondera ekitundu ekisinga obulungi, ekitundu ky'omufuzi kye kyamuterekerwa; yajja ku bukulembeze bw'abantu. Yakola obutuukirivu bw'Omukama; yatuusa ebibuuliriro bye eri Yisirayeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ku Daani yagamba nti: “Daani mwana gwa mpologoma; gusinziira ne gubuuka okuva mu Basani.” 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ku Nafutali yagamba nti: “Nafutali akkuse obuganzi ew'Omukama, ajjudde emikisa gye; alisikira obugwanjuba n'amaserengeta.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ku Aseeri yagamba nti: “Aseeri eyasingira ddala okuweebwa omukisa mu baana, asanyukirwe mu baganda be, ebigere bye abinaaze mu muzigo." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Eminyolo gyo giriba gya kyuma na kikomo, amaanyi go galyenkana n'obungi bw'ennaku zo." 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Teri ali nga Katonda w'Omwagalwa ayeebagala eggulu ajje akuyambe, mu bukulu bwe ajjira ku bire." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Katonda ow'edda n'edda bwe buddukiro bwo, akuwaniridde n'emikono gye egitaggwaawo. Aligobawo omulabe mu maaso go, Oyo agamba nti: ‘Zikiriza’." 
Deuteronomy33:28 “Yisirayeli alituula ntende, ensulo ya Yakobo etudde yokka, mu nsi ey'eŋŋano n'evviini, eyo eggulu gye litonnyesa omusulo." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Weesiimye, Yisirayeli! Ani akufaanana, ggwe eggwanga eryanunulibwa Omukama? Yennyini ye ngabo yo era omuyambi wo, oyo ekitala ky'obukulu bwo. Abalabe bo balyebwalabwala mu maaso go, ate ggwe olisambirira ebifo byabwe ebigulumivu.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Awo Musa n'ava mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu n'ayambuka ku lusozi Nebo, ku ntikko Pisuga, emitala wa Yeriko; Omukama n'amulaga ensi yonna okuva e Gileyaadi okutuuka ku Daani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 Nafutali yenna n'ensi ya Efurayimu ne Manasse n'ensi yonna eya Yuda okutuuka ku nnyanja ey'ebuvanjuba 
Deuteronomy34:3 ne Negevu n'ekitundu kyonna eky'omuseetwe gwa Yeriko, Ekibuga ky'Enkindu, okutuuka e Zowari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Eyo ye nsi gye nalayirira Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo bwe nagamba nti: ‘Nzija kugiwa ezzadde lyo.’ Nkulese n'ogirabako n'amaaso go, naye tojja kusomoka kugiyingira.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Musa omuweereza w'Omukama n'afiira eyo mu nsi y'e Mowabu, ng'Omukama bwe yali ayogedde." 
Deuteronomy34:6 N'aziikibwa mu kiwonvu mu nsi y'e Mowabu emitala wa Beti-Pewori; naye n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero tewali amanyi malaalo ge we gali. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa yafa aweza emyaka kikumi mu abiri; amaaso ge nga tegannafuma, n'amaanyi ge nga tegannamuggwa." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Abayisirayeli baakaabira Musa mu miseetwe gy'e Mowabu okumala ennaku asatu, olwo ennaku ez'okukaaba n'okukungubaga ne ziggwaako." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoswa, mutabani wa Nuunu, n'ajjuzibwa omwoyo gw'amagezi, kubanga Musa yamuteekako emikono gye; Abayisirayeli ne bamuwulira, ne bakola nga Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 N'okutuusa kati tewasitukangayo mulanzi mulala mu Yisirayeli ali nga Musa, Omukama gwe yamanya maaso ku maaso," 
Deuteronomy34:11 eyakola obubonero obwo obwewuunyisa n'ebikuuno Omukama bye yamulagira okukola mu nsi y'e Misiri, abikole ku Faraawo ne ku bakungu be, ne ku nsi yonna." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Teri yali alaze buyinza n'okukola ebikuuno ebinene okwenkana Musa bye yakola mu maaso ga Yisirayeli yenna. 
Joshua1:1 Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bwe yamala okufa, Omukama n'ayogera ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu, omuyambi wa Musa nti:" 
Joshua1:2 “Musa omuweereza wange afudde; situka kati, osomoke wano omugga Yorudani, ggwe n'abantu bano bonna, muyingire mu nsi gye ŋŋenda okubawa, abo Abayisirayeli." 
Joshua1:3 Buli kifo kye mulirinnyako ekigere kyammwe, ŋŋenda kukibawa nga bwe nasuubiza Musa." 
Joshua1:4 Eno yonna eneeba nsi yammwe: okuva ku ddungu ne Lebanoni, okutuukira ddala ku Mugga Omunene, Furaati; ensi eyo yonna ey'Abakitti okutuuka ku Nnyanja Ennene ebugwanjuba." 
Joshua1:5 Ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo tewaliba n'omu alisobola kukuziyiza. Ndiba naawe nga bwe nali ne Musa; sirikulekerera, sirikwabulira." 
Joshua1:6 “Beera wa maanyi, guma, kubanga ggwe ojja okukulembera abantu bano obayingize basikire ensi gye nalayirira bajjajjaabwe nti ŋŋenda kugibawa." 
Joshua1:7 Nkusaba kimu: beera wa maanyi, guma nnyo. Okwatanga era otuusanga etteeka lyonna Musa omuweereza wange lye yakulagira; towunjukanga kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono n'olivaako, olwo olibeera n'omukisa yonna gy'oligenda." 
Joshua1:8 Ekitabo ky'Etteeka kino tekikuvanga mu kamwa, wabula okyebuulirirangako emisana n'ekiro, olyoke okwatenga era otuusenga byonna ebyawandiikibwamu. Olwo amakubo go galikulamira, oliba n'omukisa." 
Joshua1:9 Sikulagidde nti: ‘Guma, nywera?’ Kale nno totya, totekemuka, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo aliba naawe yonna gy'onoogendanga”" 
Joshua1:10 Awo Yoswa n'alagira abaami b'abantu nti: 
Joshua1:11 “Mugende muyiteeyite mu lusiisira, mugambe abantu nti: ‘Mutegeke entanda, kubanga nga wayise ennaku ssatu mujja kusomoka Yorudani wano, muyingire, mutwale ensi Omukama Katonda wammwe gy'agenda okubawa ebeere yammwe.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Yoswa yagamba ab'ekika kya Rubeni, ekya Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse nti:" 
Joshua1:13 “Mujjukire Musa omuweereza w'Omukama kye yabagamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda wammwe abawadde ekiwummulo n'ensi eno.’ 
Joshua1:14 Bakazi bammwe n'abaana bammwe bayinza okusigala, ko n'ensolo zammwe, mu nsi Musa gye yabawa ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani, naye mmwe mwenna abatabaazi nga mubagalidde ebyokulwanyisa, musomoke nga mukulembeddemu baganda bammwe, mubayambeko," 
Joshua1:15 okutuusa Omukama lw'aliwa baganda bammwe ekiwummulo, nga nammwe bwe yakibawa, okutuusa nga batutte ensi Omukama Katonda wammwe gy'agenda okubawa. Olwo nno mulidda mu nsi gye mwatwala era mwe munaabeeranga, Musa omuweereza w'Omukama gye yabawa ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, emitala wa Yorudani.”" 
Joshua1:16 Ne baanukula Yoswa nti: “Byonna by'otulagidde, tunaabikola, na yonna gy'onootusindika, tujja kugendayo;" 
Joshua1:17 nga bwe twagonderanga Musa mu byonna, naawe bwe tunaakugondera. N'Omukama Katonda wo abeere naawe nga bwe yali ne Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Buli yenna aliwakanya ky'ogamba, n'atagondera by'omulagidde, wa kuttibwanga. Tukusaba kimu: beera wa maanyi, guma.”" 
Joshua2:1 Awo Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu n'asindika abakessi babiri mu kyama nga bava e Sittimu, n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mukette ensi, n'ekibuga Yeriko.” Ne bagenda, ne bayingira mu nnyumba ya malaaya ayitibwa Rakabu; ne basula omwo." 
Joshua2:2 Amawulire ne gatuuka ku kabaka wa Yeriko nti: “Waliwo abasajja okuva mu Bayisirayeli abaayingidde wano ekiro okuketta ensi.” 
Joshua2:3 Awo kabaka wa Yeriko n'atumira Rakabu, n'amugamba nti: “Fulumya abasajja abazze gy'oli ne bayingira mu nnyumba yo, kubanga bakessi, bazze kuketta nsi yonna.”" 
Joshua2:4 Naye omukazi n'addira abasajja n'abakweka; n'addamu nti: “Kituufu, abasajja bazze gye ndi; nabadde simanyi gye bavudde." 
Joshua2:5 Wankaaki w'ekibuga yabadde ali kumpi okuggalwawo akawungeezi, abasajja ne bafuluma, simanyi gye baalaze. Mubawondere mangu, muyinza okubakwata.”" 
Joshua2:6 Naye yali abalinnyisizza waggulu ku nyumba, ng'abakwese mu bisubi bya kitaani bye yali ayanise eyo." 
Joshua2:7 Abasajja ne babawondera nga bakutte ekkubo ery'oku misomoko gya Yorudani. Abaawondera bwe baafuluma, wankaaki n'aggalwa." 
Joshua2:8 Abaali beekwese baba tebanneebaka, omukazi n'alinnya waggulu gye baali," 
Joshua2:9 n'agamba nti: “Mmanyi Omukama abawadde ensi eno. Mutukubye entiisa; era bonna abali mu nsi eno batekemuse olw'okubeera mmwe. 
Joshua2:10 Twawulira ng'Omukama bwe yakaliza Ennyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa ku lwammwe lwe mwava e Misiri, ne bye mwakola bakabaka ababiri Abaamori, emitala wa Yorudani, Sikoni ne Ogi be mwazikiriza obutalekaawo kantu." 
Joshua2:11 Bwe twawulira kino, n'emitima gyaffe ne gitutekemuka, buli omu n'aggwaamu amaanyi olw'okubeera mmwe, kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe ye Katonda mu ggulu waggulu ne mu nsi wansi." 
Joshua2:12 Kale nno mundayirire mu linnya ly'Omukama nti nga nze bwe mbagiridde ekisa, nammwe bwe munaagirira ekisa ennyumba ya kitange; mumpe n'akabonero okukakasa" 
Joshua2:13 nga mugenda kutaliza kitange ne mmange, bannyinaze ne baganda bange, n'ebyabwe byonna bye balina, ate nga mulituwonya okufa.”" 
Joshua2:14 Abasajja ne bamuddamu nti: “Tusinzeewo obulamu bwaffe ku lulwo. Kasita tooyogere kye tukola, nga Omukama atuwadde ensi eno, tulikugirira ekisa era tulikuyisa na bwesigwa.”" 
Joshua2:15 Rakabu n'abakkiriza wansi n'omuguwa ng'abayisa mu ddirisa, kubanga ennyumba ye mwe yali asula yali yeeyunze ku bbugwe w'ekibuga." 
Joshua2:16 N'abagamba nti: “Mukwate kkubo lya mu nsozi, ababawondera baleme kubasisinkana. Mwekweke eyo ennaku ssatu, okutuusa ababawondera lwe banadda, olwo mulyoke mugende.”" 
Joshua2:17 Abasajja ne baddamu nti: “Ffe ku lwaffe tetugenda kusibibwa kirayiro kino ky'otulayizza 
Joshua2:18 wabula, nga lwe tuliyingira ensi, omuguwa guno omutwakaavu oliba ogusibye mu ddirisa mw'otuyisizza okutuserengesa; era nga ne kitaawo, nnyoko, bannyoko n'ab'oluganda lwo bonna nabo ng'obakuŋŋaanyirizza mu nnyumba yo." 
Joshua2:19 Aliba afulumye mu nnyumba yo n'agenda mu luguudo n'akwatibwa, omusaayi gwe guliba ku mutwe gwe; ffe tetugenda kunenyezebwa. Naye bwe walibaawo akwatibwako ku abo abalibeera naawe mu nyumba, omusaayi gwe gulibeera ku mitwe gyaffe." 
Joshua2:20 Kyokka bw'onooyogera kye tukola, tunaaba tetukyasibwa ndagaano gy'otulayizza.”" 
Joshua2:21 Ye n'addamu nti: “Kale kibeere nga bwe mugambye.” N'abasiibula, ne bagenda; n'asiba omuguwa omutwakaavu mu ddirisa." 
Joshua2:22 Ne batambula, ne bagenda mu nsozi, ne babeera eyo ennaku ssatu, okutuusa abaabawondera lwe baakomawo, nga babanoonyezza wonna mu kkubo ne batabalaba." 
Joshua2:23 Abasajja ababiri ne baddayo ne bakkirira olusozi, ne basomoka Yorudani ne bajja eri Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu, ne bamubuulira byonna ebyabatuukako." 
Joshua2:24 Ne bagamba nti: “Omukama atadde ensi eyo yonna mu mikono gyaffe; abatuuze baamu bonna batekemuse olw'okubeera ffe.” 
Joshua3:1 Mu matulutulu, Yoswa bwe yazuukuka, ye n'Abayisirayeli bonna ne basitula, ne bava e Sittimu, ne batuuka ku Yorudani ne basula awo nga tebannasomoka." 
Joshua3:2 Nga wayise ennaku ssatu, abaami ne bayitaayita mu lusiisira," 
Joshua3:3 nga balangirira eri abantu nti: “Bwe mulaba Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama Katonda wammwe ne bakabona Abaleevi nga bagisitudde, nammwe olwo nga muva mu bifo byammwe, nga mugigoberera," 
Joshua3:4 mulyoke mumanye ekkubo ery'okukwata, kubanga n'okutuusa kati temuliyitangamu. Wakati wammwe n'Essanduuku wabeerewo ebbanga nga lya mikono enkumi bbiri; mwekkaanye: temugeza ne mugisemberera.”" 
Joshua3:5 Yoswa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mwetukuze, kubanga enkya Omukama ajja kukola ebyewuunyisa mu mmwe.”" 
Joshua3:6 Oluvannyuma Yoswa n'agamba bakabona nti: “Musitule Ssanduuku y'Endagaano musomoke nga mukulembeddemu abantu.” Ne basitula Ssanduuku y'Endagaano, ne bakulemberamu abantu." 
Joshua3:7 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Ntandise n'olwa leero luno okukugulumiza mu maaso ga Yisirayeli yenna, bamanye nti nga bwe nabeeranga ne Musa, bwe ndi naawe." 
Joshua3:8 Kati lagira bakabona abeetisse Ssanduuku y'Endagaano nti: ‘Bwe mutuuka ku lubalama lw'amazzi ga Yorudani, nga muyimirira mu Yorudani.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Awo Yoswa n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Musembere wano, muwulire ebigambo by'Omukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Joshua3:10 N'ayongera nti: “Ku kino kwe munaamanyira nga Katonda omulamu ali mu makkati gammwe, nti ddala agenda kubagoberawo mu maaso gammwe Abakanaani, Abakitti, Abakivi, Abaperizzi, Abagirugasi, Abaamori n'Abayebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama w'ensi yonna ejja kubasookayo mu Yorudani. 
Joshua3:12 Mutegeke abasajja kkumi na babiri mu bika bya Yisirayeli, omu mu buli kika." 
Joshua3:13 Bakabona abatwala Ssanduuku y'Omukama, Omukama w'ensi yonna, olunaalinnya ekigere mu mazzi ga Yorudani, amazzi agakulukuta okuva engulu gajja kusalwako, geetuume ng'entuumu”" 
Joshua3:14 Awo abantu ne basimbula weema zaabwe basomoke Yorudani; bakabona abaali beetisse Ssanduuku y'Endagaano nga bakulembeddemu. 
Joshua3:15 Bakabona abasitudde Ssanduuku bwe baatuuka ku Yorudani, olwalinnya amala g'ebigere byabwe bati ku lubalama lw'amazzi, [Yorudani guba gwaladde ku lubalama lwagwo lwonna mu budde bwonna obw'amakungula]," 
Joshua3:16 amazzi ag'engulu ne galekeraawo okukulukuta, ne geetuuma ng'entuumu wala nnyo awali ekibuga Adamu ekiri okumpi ne Zaretani; naye go amazzi ag'emmanga agakkirira mu nnyanja ya Araba, kwe kugamba nti Ennyanja ey'Omunnyo, ne gasalirwako ddala. Abantu ne basomoka nga boolekedde Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Bakabona abaali beetisse Ssanduuku y'Endagaano ey'Omukama, ne bayimirira ku ttaka nga kkalu mu makkati ga Yorudani, okutuusa ng'abantu bonna bamaze okukutula Yorudani ku ttaka ekkalu." 
Joshua4:1 Abantu bonna bwe baamala okusomoka Yorudani, Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti:" 
Joshua4:2 “Mulonde abasajja kkumi na babiri mu bantu, omu mu buli kika," 
Joshua4:3 obalagire mu makkati ga Yorudani, wennyini bakabona we bayimiridde, baggyewo amayinja kkumi n'abiri, mugende nago, mugateeke mu kifo we munaasula ekiro kino.”" 
Joshua4:4 Awo Yoswa n'ayita abasajja kkumi na babiri be yali amaze okulondobamu mu Bayisirayeli, omu mu buli kika," 
Joshua4:5 n'abagamba nti: “Mukulembereemu Essanduuku y'Omukama Katonda wammwe mu makkati ga Yorudani. Buli omu yeetikke ejjinja limu ku kibegabega, ng'ebika bya Yisirayeli bwe byenkana," 
Joshua4:6 gabe akabonero mu mmwe. Gye bujja singa abaana bammwe bababuuzanga nti: ‘Amayinja gano gategeeza ki?’ 
Joshua4:7 Mubaddangamu nti: ‘Engezi ya Yorudani yakutulibwako mu maaso g'Essanduuku y'Endaagano y'Omukama. Amazzi ga Yorudani gaasalwako Ssanduuku y'Omukama bwe yali ng'esomoka; amayinja gano kijjukizo eri Abayisirayeli emirembe gyonna.’ ” 
Joshua4:8 Abayisirayeli ne bakola nga Yoswa bwe yabalagira. Ne baggya amayinja kkumi n'abiri mu makkati ga Yorudani, okwenkanankana omuwendo gw'ebika bya Yisirayeli, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Yoswa, ne bagatwala okutuuka mu kifo we baasula, ne bagassa awo." 
Joshua4:9 Ne Yoswa n'asimba amayinja kkumi n'abiri mu makkati ga Yorudani mu kifo bakabona abaali batwala Ssanduuku y'Endagaano we baali bayimiridde; gakyaliyo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Joshua4:10 Bakabona abaali batwala Ssanduuku baasigalira ddala mu makkati ga Yorudani okutuusa nga byonna Omukama bye yagamba omuweereza we Yoswa abantu babituukirizza, era nga Musa bwe yali alagidde Yoswa. N'abantu ne banguwa, ne basomoka." 
Joshua4:11 Bonna bwe baamala okusomoka, Essanduuku y'Omukama ne bakabona ne basomoka ng'abantu bonna balaba." 
Joshua4:12 Bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse nga babagalidde ebyokulwanyisa baasomoka nga bakulembeddemu Abayisirayeli, nga Musa bwe yali abalagidde." 
Joshua4:13 Baali abatabaazi emitwalo ng'ena, nga babagalidde ebyokulwanyisa, abaasomoka mu maaso g'Omukama okugenda okulwana mu lusenyi lwa Yeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Ku olwo Omukama yagulumiza Yoswa mu maaso ga Yisirayeli yenna, bamutye nga bwe baali batidde Musa ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe." 
Joshua4:15 Awo Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: 
Joshua4:16 “Lagira bakabona abeetisse Ssanduuku y'Endagaano bave mu Yorudani, bambuke.”" 
Joshua4:17 Yoswa n'alagira bakabona nti: “Muve mu Yorudani, mwambuke.”" 
Joshua4:18 Bwe baayambuka nga beetisse Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama, bakabona olwassa bati ekigere ku lukalu, amazzi ne gadda mu kifo kyago, ne gakulukuta nga mu masooka, nga gaaladde ku mbalama zaago zonna." 
Joshua4:19 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi omubereberye abantu ne basitula okuva ku Yorudani, ne bambuka, ne basiisira e Gilugali, ku njegooyego za Yeriko ebuvanjuba." 
Joshua4:20 Amayinja ekkumi n'abiri ge baali baggye mu Yorudani, Yoswa n'agasimba e Gilugali," 
Joshua4:21 n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Eyo gye bujja abaana bammwe bwe babuuzanga bajjajjaabwe nti: ‘Amayinja gano gaaki?’ 
Joshua4:22 Mutegeezanga abaana bammwe nti: ‘Yisirayeli yasomoka Yorudani ku ttaka ekkalu.’ 
Joshua4:23 Kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe yakaliza amazzi ga Yorudani mu maaso gammwe, okutuusa lwe mwasomoka, nga bwe yakola luli ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa, gye yakaliza mu maaso gaffe okutuusa nga tusomose." 
Joshua4:24 Olwo abantu bonna mu nsi balyoke bategeere nti omukono gw'Omukama gwa maanyi, nammwe mulyoke mutye Omukama Katonda wammwe obudde bwonna.”" 
Joshua5:1 Bakabaka bonna ab'Abaamori ebugwanjuba wa Yorudani, ne bakabaka bonna ab'Abakanaani abaali ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja Ennene, bwe baawulira ng'Omukama yakaza amazzi ga Yorudani mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli okutuusa lwe baamala okugusomoka, emitima ne gibatekemuka, ne babulwa n'otwanyi olw'Abayisirayeli." 
Joshua5:2 Mu budde obwo Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Kola obwambe mu mayinja, oddemu okutayirira Abayisirayeli.”" 
Joshua5:3 Yoswa n'akola obwambe mu mayinja n'atayirira Abayisirayeli ku Kasozi k'Obuliba. 
Joshua5:4 Eno ye nsonga okwava Yoswa okubatayirira: Abantu bonna abaali bavudde mu Misiri, abasajja abatabaazi bonna, baali bafiiridde mu ddungu mu lugendo lwabwe olwabaggya mu Misiri." 
Joshua5:5 Bonna abaali bavudde mu Misiri baali batayirire; naye abo abaazaalirwa mu ddungu tebaali. 
Joshua5:6 Anti Abayisirayeli baabungeetera mu ddungu, emyaka amakumi ana, okutuusa abasajja bonna abaali abatabaazi nga bafudde, kubanga baali tebagondedde ddoboozi lya Mukama. Omukama yali alayidde nti talibaleka kulaba nsi gye yali alayiridde bajjajjaabwe okugituwa, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Joshua5:7 Ab'ekika kya bano be yazza mu kifo kya bajjajjaabwe; be bo Yoswa be yatayirira. Tebaali batayirire, kubanga tewaali abatayirira mu ŋŋendo." 
Joshua5:8 Abantu bonna nga bamaze okutayirirwa, baasigala awo mu lusiisira, okutuusa nga bawonye." 
Joshua5:9 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Olwa leero mbaggyeeko ensonyi z'e Misiri.” Olwo ekifo ekyo kwe kuyitibwa Gilugali n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Joshua5:10 Abayisirayeli ne basigala mu Gilugali, ne bakuliza awo Pasika akawungeezi ku lw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi, mu lusenyi lwa Yeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Ku lunaku olwaddirira Pasika, ku lunaku olwo lwennyini, baalya ku bibala by'omu nsi eyo: emigaati egitazimbulukuse n'empeke ensiike." 
Joshua5:12 Enkeera nga bamaze okulya ku bibala by'ensi eyo, manu n'ekoma; Abayisirayeli tebaddayo kufuna manu, wabula mu mwaka ogwo baalya bibala bya mu nsi y'e Kanaani." 
Joshua5:13 Yoswa yali ali kumpi ne Yeriko, bwe yasitula amaaso n'alaba omusajja ng'amuyimiridde awo mu maaso, ng'akutte ekitala ekisowole mu mukono gwe. Yoswa n'agenda gy'ali n'amubuuza nti: “Oli waffe nandiki oli wa balabe baffe?”" 
Joshua5:14 N'addamu nti: “Siriiko luuyi; kati nzize ng'omuduumizi w'eggye ly'Omukama.” Yoswa n'agwa wansi ku maaso ge ku ttaka, n'amuvunnamira, n'amubuuza nti: “Biki Mukama wange by'agamba omuweereza we?”" 
Joshua5:15 Omuduumizi w'eggye ly'Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Naanula engatto mu bigere, kubanga ekifo w'oyimiridde kitukuvu.” Yoswa n'akola ekimulagiddwa." 
Joshua6:1 Yeriko kyali kikomeddwa ggulugulu olw'Abayisirayeli, nga tewali afuluma oba ayingira." 
Joshua6:2 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Kati Yeriko ne kabaka waakyo n'abatabaazi bonna mbawadde mu mikono gyo. 
Joshua6:3 Mwetooloole ekibuga omulundi gumu buli lunaku n'abatabaazi bonna ababagalidde ebyokulwanyisa; ekyo mukikolere ennaku mukaaga. 
Joshua6:4 Ddira bakabona musanvu bakwate eŋŋombe musanvu ez'amayembe g'endiga ennume mu maaso g'Essanduuku ey'Endagaano. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu mwetooloole ekibuga emirundi musanvu, bakabona nga bafuuwa eŋŋombe." 
Joshua6:5 Bwe muliwulira eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe, olwo abantu bonna ne balyoka baleekaanira waggulu n'amaanyi. Bbugwe w'ekibuga agenda kuyeguukulukuka, abantu beeyiwe butereevu mu kibuga.”" 
Joshua6:6 Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu n'ayita bakabona n'abagamba nti: “Musitule Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama, ate muddire bakabona musanvu bagikulemberemu nga bakutte eŋŋombe musanvu ez'amayembe g'endiga ennume.”" 
Joshua6:7 N'agamba abantu nti: “Mutandike okutambula, mwetooloole ekibuga; abasajja ababagalidde ebyokulwanyisa bakulemberemu Essanduuku y'Omukama.”" 
Joshua6:8 Yoswa bwe yamala okwogera eri abantu, bakabona musanvu ne batandika okutambula nga bwe bafuuwa eŋŋombe, Essanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama ng'ebagoberera." 
Joshua6:9 Eggye eribagalidde ebyokulwanyisa ne likulemberamu bakabona abafuuwa eŋŋombe, ate eggye eriva ennyuma nga ligoberera, zo eŋŋombe nga zivuga." 
Joshua6:10 Yoswa yali awadde abantu ekiragiro nti: “Temukuba enduulu oba okufulumya ku ddoboozi, wadde okwogera, okutuusa olunaku lwe ndibagamba okuleekaana; olwo nga muleekaana.”" 
Joshua6:11 Essanduuku y'Omukama n'agyetoolooza ekibuga olwetoolooza lumu; ate ne badda mu lusiisira ne basula omwo. 
Joshua6:12 Yoswa yazuukuka ku maliiri; bakabona ne basitula Ssanduuku y'Omukama. 
Joshua6:13 Bakabona musanvu ne bakwata eŋŋombe musanvu ez'amayembe g'endiga ennume, ne batandika okutambula mu maaso g'Essanduuku y'Omukama nga bafuuwa eŋŋombe, eggye eribagalidde ebyokulwanyisa nga likulembeddemu, ate eggye eriva ennyuma nga ligoberera Ssanduuku y'Omukama, zo eŋŋombe nga zivuga." 
Joshua6:14 Ne beetooloola ekibuga omulundi gumu ku lunaku olwokubiri, ne badda mu lusiisira; ne bakola batyo ennaku mukaaga." 
Joshua6:15 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu baasitula mmambya ng'asala, ne beetooloola mu ngeri ye emu emirundi musanvu; olwo lwokka lwe beetooloola ekibuga emirundi omusanvu." 
Joshua6:16 Ku mulundi ogwomusanvu, bakabona bwe baafuuwa eŋŋombe, Yoswa n'agamba abantu nti: “Muleekaane, kubanga Omukama abawadde ekibuga." 
Joshua6:17 Kino ekibuga na byonna ebikirimu bisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa ku lw'Omukama. Malaaya Rakabu yekka y'aba awonawo ne bonna abali naye mu nyumba, kubanga yakweka abakessi be twasindika." 
Joshua6:18 Naye mmwe mwewale ebisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa, sikulwa nga nammwe mwereetera ekikolimo, n'ensiisira zonna eza Yisirayeli ne zivumirirwa, ne zizikirira." 
Joshua6:19 Yenna zaabu ne ffeeza, na buli kintu eky'ekikomo n'eky'ekyuma biwongeddwa Omukama; bya kutereka mu nkuluze y'Omukama.”" 
Joshua6:20 Eŋŋombe bwe zaafuuyibwa, abantu bonna ne baleekaana; abantu bwe baawulira okuvuga kw'eŋŋombe, ne baleekaanira waggulu; bbugwe n'ayeguukulukuka; buli omu n'ayingira butereevu, ne bawamba ekibuga." 
Joshua6:21 Baazikiriza buli kyalimu, okuva ku musajja okutuuka ku mukazi, okuva ku muwere okutuuka ku mukadde, ssaako ente, endiga, n'endogoyi; ne babitta n'obwogi bw'ekitala." 
Joshua6:22 Yoswa n'agamba abasajja ababiri abaali bakesse ensi nti: “Mugende mu nnyumba ya malaaya muggyemu omukazi n'ababe bonna nga bwe mwamukakasa mu kirayiro.” 
Joshua6:23 Abavubuka abaaketta ne bayingira, ne baggyamu Rakabu ne kitaawe, nnyina, bannyina n'abantu be bonna. Ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna ne babassa mu kifo ebweru w'olusiisira lwa Yisirayeli." 
Joshua6:24 Ne bookya ekibuga n'ebyakirimu byonna, okuggyako ffeeza ne zaabu n'ebintu eby'ekikomo n'ekyuma; byo baabissa mu nkuluze y'ennyumba y'Omukama." 
Joshua6:25 Naye Yoswa yataliza malaaya Rakabu, ennyumba ya kitaawe n'abantu be bonna, kubanga yakweka abakessi Yoswa be yali atumye okuketta Yeriko; Rakabu n'asenga mu Yisirayeli n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Joshua6:26 Mu budde obwo Yoswa n'alayira ng'agamba nti: “Avumirirwe mu maaso g'Omukama aliddamu n'azimba ekibuga Yeriko. “Aliba awaddeyo muggulanda we bw'alibanga emisingi gyakyo, oba mutabani we asembayo bw'alisimba emiryango gyakyo.”" 
Joshua6:27 Omukama yali ne Yoswa, era ettutumu lye ne lisaasaana wonna mu nsi." 
Joshua7:1 Naye Abayisirayeli tebaali beesigwa ku bisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa, ne beetwalira ku bisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa. Akani mutabani wa Karumi, mutabani wa Zabudi, mutabani wa Zeraki, ow'ekika kya Yuda, yatwala ku bikolimire; obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Bayisirayeli." 
Joshua7:2 Yoswa yatuma abasajja okuva e Yeriko bagende e Ayi ekiri okumpi ne Beti-Aveni ebuvanjuba wa Beteli, n'abagamba nti: “Mwambuke, mukette ensi” Nabo ne bagenda, ne baketta Ayi." 
Joshua7:3 Bwe badda eri Yoswa ne bamugamba nti: “Tekyetaagisa bantu bonna kwambuka; abasajja ng'enkumi bbiri oba ssatu bagende, bawambe Ayi. Leka kukooyeza bwereere bantu, kubanga abantu batono abaliyo.”" 
Joshua7:4 Abasajja abatabaazi ng'enkumi ssatu mu bantu ne bambuka ku Ayi, naye ne badduka abasajja b'e Ayi." 
Joshua7:5 Abo baabattamu abantu ng'asatu mu mukaaga, ne babawondera okubaggya ku wankaaki okutuuka e Sebarimu; mu kukkirira ensozi ne bagenda nga babakuba. Abantu emitima gyabwe ne gibatekemuka ne giba ng'amazzi obuzzi." 
Joshua7:6 Yoswa n'ayuza ebyambalo bye n'agwa wansi ku maaso ge okutuuka ku ttaka mu maaso g'Essanduuku y'Omukama, n'abeera awo okutuusa akawungeezi. N'abakadde bonna aba Yisirayeli ne bakola nga bwe yakola, bonna ne beeyiira enfuufu ku mitwe." 
Joshua7:7 Yoswa n'agamba nti: “Aa! Mukama Katonda, lwaki abantu bano wabasomosa omugga Yorudani okuwaayo mu mikono gy'Abaamori okutuzikiriza? Singa kyatumalira okusigala emitala wa Yorudani!" 
Joshua7:8 Ayi Mukama, ŋŋambe ki nga ndaba Yisirayeli abalabe adduka badduke?" 
Joshua7:9 Abakanaani n'abatuuze b'omu nsi bonna bajja kukiwulira; bajja kwegatta batuzingize, basaanyeewo erinnya lyaffe ku nsi. Kiki ky'onookolera erinnya lyo ekkulu?”" 
Joshua7:10 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Yimirira. Lwaki weeyaze wansi ku maaso go ku ttaka? 
Joshua7:11 Yisirayeli akoze ekibi; ayonoonye Endagaano yange gye nali mbalagidde bagikuumenga. Baatutte ku bisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa; babbye ne balimba, ne babiteeka mu migugu gyabwe." 
Joshua7:12 N'olw'ekyo Abayisirayeli tebasobola kutalira balabe baabwe, badduka badduke, kubanga basaliddwa okuzikirizibwa. Sikyazzeemu kubeera nammwe, okuggyako nga musaanyizzaawo ebyasalirwa okuzikirizibwa ebiri mu mmwe." 
Joshua7:13 Situka, tukuza abantu, obagambe nti: ‘Mwetukuze okwetegekera olw'enkya, kubanga Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agambye nti: “Yisirayeli, mu makkati go mulimu ebyasalirwa okuzikirizibwa; tojja kusobola kutalira balabe bo, okutuusa nga mubyeggyeeko.” ’" 
Joshua7:14 “Awo nno enkya mujja kwesowolayo buli kika kinna kimu; ab'ekika Omukama ky'anaaba alonzeemu n'akalulu, bajja kwesowolayo ssiga kinna limu. Ab'essiga Omukama ly'anaaba alonzeemu n'akalulu bajja kwesowolayo nnyumba kinneemu; ate n'ab'omu nnyumba Omukama gy'anaaba alonzeemu n'akalulu, bajja kwesowolayo kinnoomu." 
Joshua7:15 Oyo anaakwatibwa n'ekintu ekyasalirwa okuzikirizibwa, ajja kwokebwa omuliro wamu n'ebibye byonna, kubanga ayonoonye endagaano y'Omukama n'akola eky'obugwagwa mu Yisirayeli.”" 
Joshua7:16 Yoswa n'asituka mu matulutulu, n'asembeza Yisirayeli, buli kika kinna kimu; akalulu ne kalondamu Yuda." 
Joshua7:17 Bwe yasembeza amasiga ga Yuda akalulu ne kalondamu essiga lya Zeraki. Bwe yasembeza essiga lya Zeraki nnyumba kinneemu, akalulu ne kalondamu ennyumba ya Zabudi." 
Joshua7:18 Bwe yasembeza ennyumba ya Zabudi, ne bavaayo buli musajja kinnoomu, akalulu ne kalondamu Akani mutabani wa Karumi, mutabani wa Zabudi, mutabani wa Zeraki ow'ekika kya Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Awo Yoswa n'agamba Akani nti: “Mwana wange, wa ekitiibwa Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, era muwe ettendo; mbuulira kye wakoze, tonkisa.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akani n'ayanukula Yoswa nti: “Kituufu, nasobya eri Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli; bino bye nakola:" 
Joshua7:21 mu munyago nalabamu omunagiro omulungi ogwakolerwa e Sinari, sekeli ebikumi bibiri eza ffeeza, n'ekitole kya zaabu ekizitowa sekeli amakumi ataano, ne mbyegomba, ne mbitwala. Nabikweka mu ttaka wansi munda wa weema yange, ffeeza nga y'ali wansi.”" 
Joshua7:22 Yoswa n'atuma ababaka, ne bagenda bunnambiro mu weema ya Akani, ne basanga byonna nga bikwekeddwa mu kifo kyennyini, ne ffeeza ng'ali wansi waabyo." 
Joshua7:23 Baabiggyayo mu weema ne babireeta eri Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli bonna, ne babyanjululiza mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Joshua7:24 Awo Yoswa n'atwala Akani mutabani wa Zeraki wamu ne ffeeza, omunagiro, n'ekitole kya zaabu, wamu n'abaana be ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala, n'ente, endogoyi, endiga ne weema yennyini, na buli kantu ke yalina. Yisirayeli yenna n'agenda naye, ne babatwala mu Kiwonvu kya Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Yoswa n'agamba nti: “Lwaki otuleetedde entaanya eno? Olwa leero naawe Omukama k'agikuleetere.” Awo Yisirayeli yenna n'amukuba amayinja, ate nga bonna bamaze okubakuba amayinja, ne babookya mu muliro." 
Joshua7:26 Ne bamukuŋŋaanyizaako entuumu nnene ey'amayinja, ekyaliwo na buli kati; Omukama n'aleka obusungu bwe obwesera. Ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Ekiwonvu Akori n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Joshua8:1 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Leka kutya, totekemuka. Twala eggye lyo lyonna, situka olumbe ekibuga Ayi. Kabaka waayo mmuwadde mu mikono gyo, n'abantu, ekibuga n'ensi ye." 
Joshua8:2 Ayi ne kabaka waakyo bya kukola nga bwe wakola Yeriko ne kabaka waakyo, wabula nti muyinza okwetwalira ku munyago ne ku bisolo by'awaka. Mubeekwekerere emabega w'ekibuga.”" 
Joshua8:3 Yoswa n'asituka wamu n'eggye lyonna okulumba Ayi; yalonda enkumi ssatu ez'abasajja abazira n'abasindika ekiro. 
Joshua8:4 Yabalagira nti: “Mubeekwekerere aweesiifu emabega w'ekibuga, naye temukyesamba nnyo; mwenna mubeere bulindaala." 
Joshua8:5 Olwo nze n'abatabaazi bonna be ndi nabo, tujja kulumba ekibuga. Bwe banaafuluma okutulumba nga luli, nga tubadduka." 
Joshua8:6 Bajja kutuwondera okutuusa nga bonna tubatwalirizza ne baleka ekibuga, kubanga bajja kulowooza nti. ‘Batudduse nga bwe baakola luli.’ Ffe bwe tunaaba tubadduka," 
Joshua8:7 olwo nga nammwe musituka gye mwekwese, nga mukwata ekibuga. Omukama Katonda wammwe ajja kukibawa mu mikono gyammwe." 
Joshua8:8 Bwe mumalanga okuwamba ekibuga, nga mukiteekera omuliro. Mukolanga ng'Omukama bw'agambye. Mwekkaanye, nze mbalagidde.”" 
Joshua8:9 Yoswa n'abasindika, ne balaga mu kifo ekyesiifu, ne balindira wakati wa Beteli ne Ayi, ebugwanjuba wa Ayi. Ye Yoswa ekiro yakimala n'abantu." 
Joshua8:10 Ku makya n'asituka, n'akunga abantu; ye n'abakadde ba Yisirayeli nga bakulembeddemu, n'ayambuka e Ayi." 
Joshua8:11 Ye n'eggye lyonna eryali naye ne bambuka, ne basemberera ekibuga, ne bayimirira emitala w'ekibuga, ne basiisira mu mambuka ga Ayi, ng'ekiwonvu kibaawudde ku kibuga." 
Joshua8:12 Yoswa yali alonze abasajja enkumi nga ttaano ng'abakwese mu makkati ga Beteli ne Ayi, ebugwanjuba w'ekibuga ekyo kyennyini." 
Joshua8:13 Abantu ne basimba olusiisira lwabwe emambuka w'ekibuga, ne bateeka eggye eryekwese ebugwanjuba bw'ekibuga. Yoswa n'agenda ekiro ekyo mu kiwonvu wakati." 
Joshua8:14 Kabaka w'e Ayi bwe yalaba ekyo, n'ayanguwa ku makya, n'afuluma wamu n'abantu be bonna ab'omu kibuga okusisinkana Yisirayeli mu lutalo mu kifo ekitunuulidde Araba; naye teyamanya nti bamwekwekeredde emabega w'ekibuga." 
Joshua8:15 Ye Yoswa ne Yisirayeli yenna ne beefuula ng'ababadduka, ne badduka nga boolekedde eddungu." 
Joshua8:16 Abantu bonna abaali mu Ayi ne bakungibwa babawondere. Ne bawondera Yoswa, bonna ne batwalirizibwa okuva mu kibuga." 
Joshua8:17 Tewaasigala musajja n'omu mu Ayi ne mu Beteli ataawondera Yisirayeli. Baaleka ekibuga kiggule ne bagoba Yisirayeli. 
Joshua8:18 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Gololera ku Ayi akajogolo akali mu mukono gwo, kubanga ŋŋenda kukuwa Ayi mu mikono gyo.” Yoswa n'agololera akajogolo ku Ayi." 
Joshua8:19 Olwali okugolola omukono, abasajja abaali beekwese ne basituka, ne bafubutuka amangu ago okuva gye baali, ne bayingira ekibuga, ne bakikwata, amangu ago ne bakiteekera omuliro." 
Joshua8:20 Abantu b'e Ayi bwe baakebuka; okwetegereza nga balaba omukka gw'ekibuga guttunka gwambuka ku ggulu. Tebaalina na wa kuddukira batoloke, kubanga be baali bawondera, abaali babadduka nga balaga mu ddungu, baakyuka ne balumba ababawondera." 
Joshua8:21 Anti Yoswa ne Yisirayeli yenna bwe baalaba ng'ekibuga kimaze okuwambibwa, n'omukka mu kibuga nga guttunka, ne bakyuka ne balumba abasajja b'e Ayi." 
Joshua8:22 Ate n'abaali ku gw'okwekwekerera, ne bafuluma mu kibuga okubalumba; ne bataayizibwa mu makkati, nga Yisirayeli ali ku njuyi zombi. Yisirayeli n'abakuba okutuusa nga tewali asigaddewo yawonawo oba eyasumattuka." 
Joshua8:23 Naye kabaka w'e Ayi ne bamuwamba nga mulamu, ne bamutwalira Yoswa." 
Joshua8:24 Yisirayeli bwe yamala okutta bonna ab'e Ayi abaali ku ttale ne mu ddungu, gye baali babagobedde okutuusa nga bonna basaanyiziddwaawo n'obwogi bw'ekitala, Abayisirayeli ne badda e Ayi, ne batta bonna abaali mu kibuga." 
Joshua8:25 Omuwendo gw'abo abattibwa ku olwo, bonna abasajja n'abakazi, baawera omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri; bonna nga bantu ba mu kibuga Ayi." 
Joshua8:26 Yoswa teyassa mukono gwe yali agolodde waggulu ng'akutte akajogolo, okutuusa abatuuze b'omu Ayi bonna nga bamaze okuttibwa." 
Joshua8:27 Naye Yisirayeli yeetwalirako ku bisolo by'awaka ne ku munyago ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Yoswa. 
Joshua8:28 Yoswa ekibuga yakyokya, n'akifuulira ddala ntuumu ya mirembe gyonna, amatongo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Joshua8:29 Ye kabaka w'e Ayi yamuwanika ku muti n'amuleka okwo okutuusa akawungeezi. Enjuba bwe yali egwa Yoswa n'alagira bawanule omulambo gwe bagusuule mu muzigo gw'omulyango gw'ekibuga. Ne bagutuumako entuumu y'amayinja, ekyaliwo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Joshua8:30 Awo Yoswa, n'azimbira Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli omwaliiro ku lusozi Ebali," 
Joshua8:31 nga Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Abayisirayeli ne kiwandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Etteeka lya Musa nti omwaliiro gubanga gwa mayinja amalamba, agatakoonwangako kintu kya kyuma. Okwo kwe baaweerereza Omukama ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu." 
Joshua8:32 Eyo Yoswa, mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli, gye yawandiikira ku mayinja Etteeka Musa lye yali awandiise" 
Joshua8:33 Yisirayeli yenna, omugwira n'omuzaaliranwa, abakadde, abaami n'abalamuzi baali bayimiridde erudda n'erudda w'Essanduuku, nga batunuulidde bakabona Abaleevi abaali basitudde Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama. Ekitundu ekimu eky'abantu kyali ku lusozi Gerizimu, ate ekirala ku lusozi Ebali, nga Musa omuweereza w'Omukama okuva mu masooka bwe yali alagidde bibeere ng'abantu ba Yisirayeli bagenda okufuna omukisa." 
Joshua8:34 Oluvannyuma Yoswa n'asoma ebigambo by'Etteeka byonna, omukisa n'ekikolimo, nga bwe byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Etteeka." 
Joshua8:35 Ku ebyo Musa bye yalagira tekwali ky'ataasomera Yisirayeli yenna ng'akuŋŋaanye; omwo mwe mwali abakazi, abaana, n'abagwira abaabeeranga mu bo." 
Joshua9:1 Olwawulira ebyo, bakabaka bonna abaalinga emitala wa Yorudani, abaalinga mu nsi ey'ensozi, mu Sefela, bonna ab'oku lubalama lw'Ennyanja Ennene okutuuka ku Lebanoni, Abakitti, Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizzi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi," 
Joshua9:2 ne beekuŋŋaanya wamu okulwanyisa Yoswa ne Yisirayeli. 
Joshua9:3 Naye ab'omu Gibewoni bwe baawulira byonna Yoswa bye yali akoze Yeriko ne Ayi," 
Joshua9:4 nabo ne bakola akakodyo: baagenda ne beesibirira entanda, ne bassa ku ndogoyi ensawo enkadde, n'endyanga ez'evviini nazo nga nkadde, nga ngyabirivu era ntungirire;" 
Joshua9:5 nga bambadde engatto za birakalaka mu bigere n'engoye enkadde; n'emigaati gy'entanda yaabwe nga mikalu, gikukudde." 
Joshua9:6 Ne bajja eri Yoswa mu lusiisira e Gilugali, ne bamugamba n'Abayisirayeli bonna nti: “Tuva mu nsi ya wala; mukole naffe endagaano.”" 
Joshua9:7 Abasajja ba Yisirayeli ne baanukula Abakivi nti: “Oba oli awo muva kumpi naffe; tukola tutya nammwe endagaano?” 
Joshua9:8 Ne baanukula Yoswa nti: “Tuli baweereza bo.” Yoswa n'ababuuza nti: “Mmwe baani? Muva wa?” 
Joshua9:9 Ne baanukula nti: “Abaweereza bo bavudde mu nsi ya wala nnyo olw'ettutumu ly'erinnya ly'Omukama Katonda wo. Twawulirako n'ebyo bye yakola mu Misiri," 
Joshua9:10 ne bye yakola bakabaka ababiri Abaamori emitala wa Yorudani, Sikoni kabaka wa Kesuboni ne Ogi kabaka wa Basani eyabeeranga mu Asutaroti." 
Joshua9:11 Awo abakadde n'abantu bonna mu nsi yaffe ne batugamba nti: ‘Mwesibirire entanda, mugende mubasisinkane; mubagambe nti: “Tuli baweereza bammwe; mukole naffe endagaano.” ’" 
Joshua9:12 Emigaati gyaffe gino we twagisibirako nga tuva eka okujja gye muli gyali gikyabuguma, naye kati mikalu, gikukudde." 
Joshua9:13 Zino endyanga z'evviini zaali mpya we twazijjuliza, ziizino kati zaabiridde; ebyambalo byaffe n'engatto byonna biggweeredde biweddewo olw'obuwanvu bw'olugendo.”" 
Joshua9:14 Abakulembeze ne bagabana ku ntanda gye baabawa, naye tebeebuuza ku Mukama." 
Joshua9:15 Yoswa n'akola nabo endagaano y'emirembe okubaleka nga balamu; n'abakulembeze b'ekibiina ne bakakasa endagaano eyo nga balayira. 
Joshua9:16 Nga wayise ennaku ssatu zokka okuva ku ndagaano lwe yakolebwa, ne bawulira nti ba ku muliraano; babeera kumpi nabo." 
Joshua9:17 Abayisirayeli ne basitula, ku lunaku olwokusatu ne batuuka ku bibuga byabwe bino: Gibewoni, Kefira, Beeroti ne Kiriyati-Yewarimu." 
Joshua9:18 Naye Abayisirayeli tebaabalumba, kubanga abakulembeze b'ekibiina baali babalayiridde mu linnya ly'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli. Ekibiina kyonna ne kyemulugunyiza abakulembeze." 
Joshua9:19 Abakulembeze bonna ne baanukula nti: “Twabakakasa ne tulayira mu linnya ly'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, awo nno tetuyinza kubakwatako." 
Joshua9:20 Naye kino kye tujja okukola: tujja kubaleka nga balamu, tuleme kwewakulira busungu olw'okumenya ekirayiro kye twabalayirira.”" 
Joshua9:21 Ne bongerako nti: “Ka basigalewo nga balamu, naye babeerenga baasi ba nku na bakimi ba mazzi eri ekibiina kyonna.” Ne bakola ng'abakulembeze bwe baagamba." 
Joshua9:22 Yoswa n'atumya Abagibewoni n'abagamba nti: “Lwaki mwatulimbalimba nga mugamba nti: ‘Tubeera wala nnyo okuva we muli,’ sso nga mubeera kumpi naffe?" 
Joshua9:23 Kale nno muvumiriddwa; mu mmwe temulibulamu muddu ayasiza nku n'akimira mazzi nnyumba ya Mukama Katonda wange.” 
Joshua9:24 Ne baanukula nti: “Ffe abaweereza bo baatubuulira nti Omukama Katonda wo yalagira Musa omuweereza we okubawa ensi eno yonna n'okusaanyaawo mu maaso go abatuuze baamu bonna. Twatiiririra nnyo obulamu bwaffe olw'okubeera mmwe, kyetwava tukola tutyo." 
Joshua9:25 Kale nno tuli mu mikono gyo; tukole ky'olowooza nga kye kirungi ate ekituufu.” 
Joshua9:26 Bw'atyo Yoswa n'abawonya mu mikono gy'Abayisirayeli, ne batabatta." 
Joshua9:27 Ku olwo n'alagira Abagibewoni babe baasi ba nku na bakimi ba mazzi mu kibiina n'eri omwaliiro gw'Omukama mu kifo Omukama ky'aliba alonze. Bwe batyo bwe bali n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Joshua10:1 Kati nno Adoni-Zedeki kabaka wa Yeruzaalemu yawulira nti Yoswa yawamba Ayi n'akizikiriza kyonna, n'akola ekibuga ne kabaka waakyo nga bwe yakola Yeriko ne kabaka waakyo; nti era ab'e Gibewoni baakola endagaano ey'emirembe ne Yisirayeli, era nga kati bali wamu nabo." 
Joshua10:2 Ne batya nnyo, kubanga Gibewoni kyali kibuga kikulu, nga kye kimu ku bibuga eby'obwakabaka. Kyali kinene okusinga Ayi, nga n'abasajja baamwo batabaazi." 
Joshua10:3 Awo Adoni-Zedeki kabaka wa Yeruzaalemu kwe kutumira Owamu kabaka wa Keburoni, Piramu kabaka wa Yarumuti, Yafiya kabaka wa Lakisi ne Debiri kabaka wa Eguloni." 
Joshua10:4 N'abagamba nti: “Mwambuke eno gye ndi, munnyambe tulwanyise Gibewoni, kubanga yakola endagaano ey'emirembe ne Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli.”" 
Joshua10:5 Bakabaka abataano Abaamori ne bakuŋŋaana: kabaka wa Yeruzaalemu, kabaka wa Keburoni, kabaka wa Yarumuti, kabaka wa Lakisi, ne kabaka wa Eguloni; ne bagenda n'amagye gaabwe, ne basiisira okumpi ne Gibewoni, ne bakirumba." 
Joshua10:6 Ab'e Gibewoni ne batumira Yoswa eyali akyali mu lusiisira e Gilugali, ne bamugamba nti: “Toyabulira baweereza bo; jjangu mangu eno otudduukirire; tuyambe, kubanga bakabaka bonna ababeera mu nsozi beegasse okutulwanyisa.”" 
Joshua10:7 Yoswa n'ayambuka ng'ava e Gilugali, ye n'abasajja be bonna abalwanyi n'abatabaazi be bonna abazira." 
Joshua10:8 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Tobatya, kubanga mbakuwadde mu mikono gyo; tewali n'omu ku bo anaasobola kukugumira.”" 
Joshua10:9 Yoswa n'ava e Gilugali; oluvannyuma lw'okumala ekiro kyonna ng'atambula, n'abazinduukiriza." 
Joshua10:10 Omukama n'abaleetamu okutabukatabuka bwe baalaba Yisirayeli. Yisirayeli n'abakuba bubi e Gibewoni; n'abawondera mu kkubo eryambukira e Beti-Koroni, n'agenda ng'abasa okutuuka e Makkeda." 
Joshua10:11 Ate baba bakkirira akaserengeto k'e Beti-Koroni, nga badduka Abayisirayeli, Omukama n'abakuba amayinja amanene ag'omuzira agaava mu ggulu okubatuusiza ddala e Azeka. Abaafa amayinja g'omuzira ne baba bangi okusinga abo abattibwa ekitala ky'Abayisirayeli." 
Joshua10:12 Awo Yoswa, mu maaso ga Yisirayeli, n'ayogera n'Omukama ku lunaku olwo lwennyini Omukama lwe yagabulirako Abaamori mu mikono gy'Abayisirayeli, n'agamba nti: “Ggwe Enjuba, teweenyeenya waggulu ku Gibewoni, naawe omwezi, ku kiwonvu kye Ayijaloni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Enjuba teyeenyeenya, n'omwezi ne guyimirira okutuusa ng'abantu beesasulizza ku balabe baabwe. Kino tekyawandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Yasari? Enjuba yayimirira mu makkati g'eggulu n'eteyanguwa kugwa, kyenkana olunaku lulamba." 
Joshua10:14 Tewabangawo lunaku lwenkana ng'olwo, era terulibaawo, Omukama lwe yagondera eddoboozi ly'omuntu; kubanga Omukama yali alwanirira Yisirayeli." 
Joshua10:15 Awo Yoswa n'adda mu lusiisira e Gilugali, wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna." 
Joshua10:16 Bakabaka abataano baali badduse nga beekukumye mu mpuku y'e Makkeda. 
Joshua10:17 Ne babuulira Yoswa nti: “Bakabaka abataano baasangiddwa nga beekukumye mu mpuku e Makkeda.” 
Joshua10:18 Yoswa n'alagira nti: “Muyiringisize agayinja ku mulyango gw'empuku, musseeyo abasajja bakuume nga waggale." 
Joshua10:19 Mmwe temuyimirira: muwondere abalabe, muve ennyuma nga mubatta; temubaganya kuyingira mu bibuga byabwe, kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe ababawadde mu mikono gyammwe.”" 
Joshua10:20 Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli nga bamaze okukuba abalabe bubi nnyo kumpi obutalekaawo n'omu, abaagenda basigalira nga baddukidde mu bibuga byabwe okuli ebigo," 
Joshua10:21 eggye lyonna ne lidda eri Yoswa mu lusiisira e Makkeda, nga balamu, tebaliiko kabi; tewali yagezaako nate kugamba kantu ku Yisirayeli." 
Joshua10:22 Yoswa n'alagira nti: “Muzibukule omulyango gw'empuku, muggyemu bakabaka abataano mubandeetere.”" 
Joshua10:23 Ne bakola batyo; ne bamuggyirayo bakabaka abataano mu mpuku ne babamuleetera: kabaka wa Yeruzaalemu, kabaka wa Keburoni, kabaka wa Yarumuti, kabaka wa Lakisi ne kabaka wa Eguloni." 
Joshua10:24 Bwe baatuusa bakabaka awali Yoswa, n'atumya abasajja Abayisirayeli bonna, n'agamba abagabe b'abatabaazi abaali naye nti: “Mujje wano, musse ebigere byammwe ku nsingo za bakabaka bano.” Ne basembera, ne bassa ebigere byabwe ku nsingo zaabwe." 
Joshua10:25 N'abagamba nti: “Temutya, temutekemuka, mugume, munywere, kubanga eno ye ngeri Omukama gy'anaayisangamu abalabe bammwe be mulwanyisa.”" 
Joshua10:26 Awo Yoswa n'abakuba, n'abatta, n'abawanika ku miti etaano; ne balengejjera okwo okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Joshua10:27 Enjuba bwe yali egwa Yoswa n'alagira babawanule ku miti; ne babawanula ne babasuula mu mpuku mwe baali beekwese, ne bassaako agayinja aganene; gakyaliko n'okutuusa ku lunaku luno lwennyini." 
Joshua10:28 Ku olwo Yoswa n'awamba Makkeda. Kabaka waakyo na bonna abaalimu n'abatta n'ekitala; n'atta buli kiramu kyonna ekyalimu. Teyaleka na kimu kyasigalawo. Kabaka wa Makkeda n'amukola nga bwe yakola kabaka wa Yeriko. 
Joshua10:29 Yoswa, n'ava mu Makkeda wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna, n'alaga e Libuna, n'akirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:30 Nakyo Omukama n'akiwaayo mu mikono gya Yisirayeli wamu ne kabaka waakyo; Yisirayeli n'atta buli kiramu kyonna ekyalimu; mu kyo teyalekamu na kimu kyasigalawo. Kabaka wa Libuna n'amukola nga bwe yakola kabaka wa Yeriko. 
Joshua10:31 Yoswa n'ava e Libuna wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna, n'alaga e Lakisi, n'akizinda, n'akirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:32 Omukama n'awa Lakisi mu mikono gya Yisirayeli, ne Yisirayeli n'akiwamba ku lunaku olwaddirira, n'atta buli kiramu kyonna ekyalimu n'ekitala, nga bwe yali akoze e Libuna." 
Joshua10:33 Mu kaseera ke kamu Oramu kabaka wa Gezeri yali azze okuyamba Lakisi; naye Yoswa n'amukuba n'abantu be bonna okutuusa nga tewasigaddewo n'omu. 
Joshua10:34 Yoswa n'ava e Lakisi wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna, n'alaga e Eguloni, n'akizinda, n'akirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:35 Yakiwangula ku lunaku olwo lwennyini; bonna abaali mu kibuga n'abatta n'ekitala, nga bwe yali akoze Lakisi." 
Joshua10:36 Yoswa yava e Eguloni wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna n'alaga e Keburoni, ne bakirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:37 Ekibuga n'akiwamba; n'akuba n'ekitala ekibuga, kabaka waakyo, ebyalo byakyo byonna na buli muntu; teyalekawo n'omu yawonawo. Nga bwe yakola Eguloni, bwe yakola ne Keburoni; kyonna baakizikiriza na buli ekyalimu." 
Joshua10:38 Yoswa yakomawo wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna, n'adda e Debiri, n'akirwanyisa," 
Joshua10:39 Ekibuga baakiwamba, ne kabaka waakyo n'ebyalo byakyo byonna ne babikuba n'ekitala; ne batta buli kiramu kyonna ekyalimu; teyalekamu n'omu yawonawo. Nga bwe yakola Keburoni ne Libuna ne bakabaka baabyo, era bwe yakola ne Debiri ne kabaka waakyo." 
Joshua10:40 Bw'atyo Yoswa n'awangula ensi yonna: ekitundu eky'ensozi, Negevu, Sefela n'ensi ensozi gye ziserengeta, ne bakabaka baamu. Teyalekamu n'omu yawonawo, wabula buli ekissa kyonna yakizikiriza, ng'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli bwe yali alagidde." 
Joshua10:41 Yawangula bonna, okuva ku Kadesi-Baruneya okutuuka e Gaza, n'okuva mu nsi yonna ey'e Goseni okutuukira ddala e Gibewoni." 
Joshua10:42 Yoswa yawamba Bakabaka bano bonna n'ensi zaabwe mu lutalo lumu, kubanga Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli ye yali alwanirira Yisirayeli." 
Joshua10:43 Yoswa, wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna, n'adda mu lusiisira e Gilugali." 
Joshua11:1 Yabini, kabaka wa Kazori bwe yawulira ebyo, n'atumira Yobabu kabaka wa Madoni, ne kabaka wa Simuroni, ne kabaka wa Akusafu," 
Joshua11:2 n'eri bakabaka b'emambuka mu nsozi, ne mu Araba emaserengeta ga Kinnereti, ne mu Sefela, ne mu Nafoti-Dori ebugwanjuba," 
Joshua11:3 n'eri Abakanaani ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba, Abaamori, Abakitti, Abaperizzi, Abayebusi mu nsi y'ensozi, n'Abakivi abaabeeranga wansi w'olusozi Kerumoni mu nsi y'e Mizupa." 
Joshua11:4 Ne basitula bonna, amagye gaabwe gonna n'embalaasi wamu n'ebigaali bingi nnyo, ng'abatabaazi bangi, butabalika ng'omusenyu ogw'oku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Joshua11:5 Bakabaka abo bonna ne bakuŋŋaana ne basiisira wamu ku mazzi g'e Meromu, balwanyise Yisirayeli." 
Joshua11:6 Awo Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Tobatya, kubanga enkya mu budde nga buno, abo bonna nzija kubassa mu maaso ga Yisirayeli nga bamaze okuttibwa; embalaasi zaabwe ojja kuzisala enteega, n'ebigaali obyokye omuliro.”" 
Joshua11:7 Yoswa n'agenda ku mazzi ga Meromu, wamu n'eggye lyonna, n'abazinduukiriza." 
Joshua11:8 Omukama n'abawaayo mu mikono gya Yisirayeli. Baabakuba, ne babawondera okubatuusa e Sidoni Omunene n'e Misurefoti-Mayimu ne mu Kiwonvu ky'e Mizupa ebugwanjuba; yabakubira ddala okutuusa nga tewali n'omu asigaddewo." 
Joshua11:9 Yoswa yakola ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde: embalaasi zaabwe n'azisala enteega, n'ebigaali n'abyokya." 
Joshua11:10 Mu budde obwo Yoswa n'awamba Kazori, ne kabaka waakyo n'amutta n'ekitala; Kazori kye kyali ekibuga ekikulu eky'eŋŋoma zino zonna." 
Joshua11:11 Yatta bonna abaabeerangamu okubasaanyizaawo ddala. Buli kirimu akassa kyonna yakizikiriza, n'ekibuga n'akyokya omuliro." 
Joshua11:12 Yoswa n'awamba ebibuga byonna ebya bakabaka ebyetooloddewo ne bakabaka baabyo n'abawangula, n'abisaanyaawo nga Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bwe yali alagidde." 
Joshua11:13 Naye Yisirayeli teyayokya bibuga byali ku ntuumu; kimu kyokka, Kazori, Yoswa kye yazikiriza n'omuliro." 
Joshua11:14 Bye baanyaga mu bibuga bino n'ebisolo by'awaka Abayisirayeli baabyetwalira, naye bo abantu baabatta bonna, obutatalizaawo n'omu; buli alimu akassa baamutta." 
Joshua11:15 Omukama kye yali alagidde omuweereza we Musa, ne Musa kye yalagira Yoswa, Yoswa kye yakola; teyalekayo wadde akagambo kati ku ebyo Omukama bye yali alagidde Musa." 
Joshua11:16 Bw'atyo Yoswa n'awamba ensi yonna: ensi ey'ensozi, ne Negevu yenna, n'ensi yonna eya Goseni, Sefela, Araba, ensozi za Yisirayeli n'emiseetwe ensozi gye zisembera." 
Joshua11:17 Okuva ku lusozi Kalaki, olugenda lugulumira okweyunga ku Seyiri, okutuuka ku Baali-Gaadi mu Kiwonvu kya Lebanoni wansi w'Olusozi Kerumoni. Bakabaka baabwe bonna yabakwata, n'abakuba n'abatta." 
Joshua11:18 Yoswa yamala ebbanga ggwanvu ng'alwanyisa bakabaka abo. 
Joshua11:19 Tewali kibuga kyakola ndagaano na Bayisirayeli okuggyako Abakivi abaabeeranga mu Gibewoni; abalala bonna Yisirayeli yabakwata mu ntalo. 
Joshua11:20 Kubanga Omukama ye yagugubya emitima gyabwe balwanyise Yisirayeli, balyoke bazikirizibwe ddala, baleme kusaasirwa n'akatono, basaanyizibwewo, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Mu budde obwo Yoswa n'agenda n'atta Abaanaki mu nsozi z'e Keburoni, mu Debiri, mu Anabu, mu nsozi za Yuda ne mu nsozi zonna eza Yisirayeli. Yoswa bonna n'abazikiriza n'ebibuga byabwe." 
Joshua11:22 Mu Baanaki teyalekawo n'omu mu nsi ya Yisirayeli, okuggyako abaali mu bibuga Gaza, Gati ne Asudodi be baawonawo." 
Joshua11:23 Yoswa n'awamba ensi yonna ng'Omukama bwe yali agambye Musa, n'agiwa Yisirayeli ng'obusika bwabwe ng'agoberera ebika byabwe n'ebitundu byabwe. Awo ensi n'eweerako ku ntalo." 
Joshua12:1 Bano be bakabaka Abayisirayeli be baawangula n'ensi zaabwe ne bazitwala, ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani, okuva ku kiwonvu kya Arunoni okutuuka ku lusozi Kerumoni, n'ekitundu kyonna ebuvanjuba wa Araba:" 
Joshua12:2 Sikoni, kabaka w'Abaamori eyabeeranga e Kesuboni, yafuganga okuva ku Aroweri, ekiri ku lubalama lw'omugga Arunoni, n'amakkati g'Ekiwonvu Arunoni, n'ekyokubiri kya Gileyaadi okukoma ku mugga Yabboki, Abammoni kwe bakoma." 
Joshua12:3 Ne mu Araba ebuvanjuba, okutuuka ku nnyanja y'e Kinnereti, ebugwanjuba, okutuuka ku nnyanja eya Araba, ye Nnyanja ey'Omunnyo, ebuvanjuba, okutuuka e Beti-Yesimoti, emaserengeta wansi w'enkonko za Pisuga." 
Joshua12:4 Ensi ya Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, omu ku Barefa abaali bakyasigaddewo, eyabeeranga mu Asutaroti ne mu Edureyi, yali:" 
Joshua12:5 olusozi lwonna olwa Kerumoni, Saleka, ensi yonna eya Basani okutuuka ku nsalo n'Abagessuri ne Abamaakati, n'ekyokubiri kya Gileyaadi, okutuuka ku nsalo ne Sikoni, kabaka wa Kesuboni." 
Joshua12:6 Bano Musa omuweereza w'Omukama n'Abayisirayeli baabawangula, ensi yaabwe Musa n'agiwa ab'ekika kya Rubeni ne Gaadi, n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse ebeere yaabwe." 
Joshua12:7 Bano be bakabaka b'ensi Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli ze baawangula ebugwanjuba wa Yorudani, okuva ku Baali-Gaadi mu Kiwonvu kya Lebanoni okutuuka ku lusozi Kalaki olugenda lugulumira okweyunga ku Seyiri. Ensi zaabwe Yoswa yazigabira ebika bya Yisirayeli mu bitundu byabwe." 
Joshua12:8 Kye kitundu kino: mu nsozi, mu Sefela, mu Araba, mu kitundu eky'enkonko z'ensozi, mu ddungu ne mu Negevu, omwali Abakitti, Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizzi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi. Be bano:" 
Joshua12:9 Kabaka wa Yeriko omu; kabaka wa Ayi, okumpi ne Beteli omu;" 
Joshua12:10 kabaka wa Yeruzaalemu omu; kabaka wa Keburoni omu; 
Joshua12:11 kabaka wa Yarumuti omu; kabaka wa Lakisi omu; 
Joshua12:12 kabaka wa Eguloni omu; kabaka wa Gezeri omu; 
Joshua12:13 kabaka wa Debiri omu; kabaka wa Gederi omu; 
Joshua12:14 kabaka wa Koruma omu; kabaka wa Aradi omu; 
Joshua12:15 kabaka wa Libuna omu; kabaka wa Adullamu omu; 
Joshua12:16 kabaka wa Makkeda omu; kabaka wa Beteli omu; 
Joshua12:17 kabaka wa Tappuwa omu; kabaka wa Keferi omu; 
Joshua12:18 kabaka wa Afeki omu; kabaka wa Lasaroni omu; 
Joshua12:19 kabaka wa Madoni omu; kabaka wa Kazori omu; 
Joshua12:20 kabaka wa Simuroni-Meroni omu; kabaka wa Akusafu omu; 
Joshua12:21 kabaka wa Taanaki omu; kabaka wa Megiddo omu; 
Joshua12:22 kabaka wa Kedesi omu; kabaka wa Yokunewamu mu Karumeli omu; 
Joshua12:23 kabaka wa Dori mu Nafati-Dori omu; kabaka wa Goyimu mu Gilugali omu; 
Joshua12:24 kabaka wa Tiruza omu. Bonna awamu, bakabaka asatu mu omu." 
Joshua13:1 Yoswa bwe yali akaddiye ng'ayise mu myaka, Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Okaddiye, era oyise mu myaka, sso ate ensi ekyali nnene nnyo etennawambibwa." 
Joshua13:2 Eno ye nsi ekyasigalidde: ensi yonna ey'Abafilisitiini n'ey'Abagessuri yonna," 
Joshua13:3 okuva ku mugga Sikori ebuvanjuba wa Misiri, okutuuka ku nsalo ya Ekuroni emambuka, ensi ebalibwa ng'ey'Abakanaani ey'abafuzi abataano Abafilisitiini, e Gaza, Asudodi, Esukeroni, Gati, ne Ekuroni; Abavvi bali emaserengeta." 
Joshua13:4 Ensi yonna ey'Abakanaani okuva ku Ara eky'Abasidoni, okutuuka ku Afeki, ne ku nsi y'Abaamori," 
Joshua13:5 n'ensi y'Abagebali wamu n'ensi yonna eya Lebanoni ebuvanjuba, okuva ku Baali-Gaadi, wansi w'olusozi Kerumoni okutuuka ku Lebo-Kamati." 
Joshua13:6 “Bonna abatuuze b'omu nsozi okuva ku Lebanoni okutuuka ku Misurefoti-Mayimu, kwe kugamba abatuuze bonna Abasidoni, abo nze nzija kubagobawo mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli. Ggwe ensi gigabanyizeemu Abayisirayeli ku kalulu ng'obusika nga bwe nakulagira." 
Joshua13:7 Kale nno gigabanyizeemu ebika omwenda n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse ng'obusika.” 
Joshua13:8 Ebika ekya Rubeni ne Gaadi wamu n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse baali bafunye obusika okuva ku Musa, nga Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bwe yali abubawadde ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani:" 
Joshua13:9 okuva ku Aroweri, ekiri ku lubalama lw'Ekiwonvu Arunoni, okuva ku kibuga ekiri mu makkati g'ekiwonvu n'otwaliramu n'emiseetwe gyonna egy'e Medeba okutuusa e Diboni," 
Joshua13:10 n'ebibuga byonna ebya Sikoni kabaka w'Abaamori, eyafugiranga e Kesuboni, okutuuka ku nsalo y'Abammoni," 
Joshua13:11 ssaako Gileyaadi n'ensi y'Abagessuri n'Abamaakati, n'olusozi Kerumoni lwonna, ne Basani yenna okutuuka e Saleka," 
Joshua13:12 kwe kugamba obwakabaka bwonna obwa Ogi mu Basani, eyafugiranga mu Asutaroti ne Edureyi, eyali akyasigaddewo mu Barefa abasembayo. Musa yabakuba n'abawamba." 
Joshua13:13 Naye Abayisirayeli tebaazikiriza Bagessuri n'Abamaakati. N'olw'ekyo Abagessuri n'Abamaakati bakyali n'Abayisirayeli n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Joshua13:14 Kyokka ekika kya Leevi teyakiwa busika; wabula ebitambiro by'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli ebiweerezebwa n'omuliro, bwe busika bwabwe, nga bwe yali abagambye." 
Joshua13:15 Musa yawa ekika kya Rubeni ng'agoberera amasiga gaabwe, ensi eno:" 
Joshua13:16 baava ku Aroweri ku lubalama lw'Ekiwonvu Arunoni, ku kibuga ekiri mu makkati g'ekiwonvu, n'omuseetwe gwonna okutuuka e Medeba," 
Joshua13:17 n'okweyongerayo okutuuka e Kesuboni n'ebibuga byakwo eby'oku museetwe, omuli Diboni, Bamoti-Baali, ne Beti-Baali-Mewoni;" 
Joshua13:18 Yawazi, Kedemoti ne Mefaati;" 
Joshua13:19 Kariyatayimu, Sibuma ne Zereti-Sakari ku lusozi olw'omu kiwonvu," 
Joshua13:20 Beti-Pewori, enkonko za Pisuga ne Beti-Yesimoti," 
Joshua13:21 ebibuga byonna eby'omu museetwe n'obwakabaka bwonna obwa Sikoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, eyali afugira e Kesuboni. Musa yali amuwangudde n'abaami abaali bafuga Midiyaani: Evi ne Rekemu Zuru, Kuru, ne Reba, abaami ba Sikoni abaabeeranga mu nsi eyo." 
Joshua13:22 Okwongereza ku balala Abayisirayeli be baali basanjaze, mwe mwali ne Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori, omulaguzi." 
Joshua13:23 Ensi y'ab'ekika kya Rubeni ng'ekoma ku mugga Yorudani. Ekyo kye kitundu ab'ekika kya Rubeni kye baafuna mu masiga gaabwe, ebibuga n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua13:24 Musa yawa ekika kya Gaadi, be bazzukulu ba Gaadi, ng'agoberera amasiga gaabwe," 
Joshua13:25 ne bafuna ekitundu ky'e Yazeri n'ebibuga byonna ebya Gileyaadi, n'ekyokubiri ky'ensi y'Abammoni, okutuukira ddala ku Aroweri ekiriraanye Rabba," 
Joshua13:26 ate n'okuva e Kesuboni okutuuka e Ramati-Mizupa ne Betonimu, era n'okuva e Makanayimu okutuukira ddala ku nsi y'e Debiri." 
Joshua13:27 Mu kiwonvu baafuna Beti-Aramu, Beti-Nimura, ne Sukkoti ne Zafoni, ekitundu ekisigadde eky'obwakabaka bwa Sikoni, kabaka wa Kesuboni. Kino kye kitundu eky'ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani, ekigoba Yorudani okutuukira ddala ku nsonda eya wansi w'ennyanja ya Kinnereti." 
Joshua13:28 Ekyo kye kitundu bazzukulu ba Gaadi kye baafuna mu masiga gaabwe, ebibuga n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua13:29 Musa yali awadde ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse, kwe kugamba ekyokubiri ky'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Manasse, omugabo ng'agoberera amasiga gaabwe," 
Joshua13:30 ne bafuna ekitundu okuva e Makanayimu, Basani yenna, obwali obwakabaka bwa Ogi, kabaka wa Basani, ebyalo byonna ebya Yayiri ebiri mu Basani; byonna awamu bye bibuga nkaaga." 
Joshua13:31 Ekyokubiri ekya Gileyaadi, Asutaroti ne Edureyi, ebyali ebibuga by'obwakabaka bwa Ogi mu Basani, byaweebwa ekyokubiri ky'ab'essiga lya Makiri, mutabani wa Manasse, ng'agoberera amasiga gaabwe." 
Joshua13:32 Obwo bwe busika Musa bwe yali agerese mu nsenyi za Mowabu, emitala wa Yorudani ebuvanjuba wa Yeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Naye ekika kya Leevi Musa teyakiwa busika, kubanga Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli yennyini bwe busika bwabwe, nga bwe yali abagambye." 
Joshua14:1 Bino bye bitundu Abayisirayeli bye baafuna ng'obusika mu nsi y'e Kanaani, ebyabaweebwa Eleyazari kabona ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu n'abakulu b'amasiga mu bika bya Yisirayeli." 
Joshua14:2 Obusika bwabwe baabugabira ebika omwenda n'ekitundu ku kalulu, nga Omukama bwe yali alagidde ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Joshua14:3 Ebika ebibiri n'ekitundu Musa yali amaze okubiwa obusika bwabyo emitala wa Yorudani; naye Abaleevi bo yali tabawadde busika mu bannaabwe. 
Joshua14:4 Bazzukulu ba Yozefu bo baali bakoze ebika bibiri: Manasse ne Efurayimu. Abaleevi tebaafuna mugabo mu nsi, wabula ebibuga mwe banaabeera n'ebitundu ebiriraanyeewo balundiremu ensolo zaabwe n'amagana." 
Joshua14:5 Nga Omukama bwe yali alagidde Musa, n'Abayisirayeli bwe baakola, ne bagabanya mu nsi." 
Joshua14:6 Bazzukulu ba Yuda bajja eri Yoswa e Gilugali, Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne Omukenizzi n'amugamba nti: “Omanyi Omukama kye yagamba Musa omuntu wa Katonda e Kadesi-Baruneya ku ggwe nange." 
Joshua14:7 Nali wa myaka amakumi ana egy'obukulu, Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bwe yantuma okuva e Kadesi-Baruneya okuketta ensi. Namubuulira ebintu nga bwe nabiraba," 
Joshua14:8 naye baganda bange abaagenda nange ne batekemula emitima gy'abantu. Nze ku lwange nagoberera Omukama Katonda wange n'omutima gwange gwonna. 
Joshua14:9 Ku olwo Musa yeeyama nti: ‘Ensi ekigere kyo kwe kirinnye eriba yiyo ggwe n'abaana bo emirembe gyonna, kubanga wagoberera Omukama Katonda wange n'omutima gwo gwonna.’" 
Joshua14:10 Nzuuno n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero Omukama ankuumye nga nkyali mulamu, nga bwe yansuubiza. Emyaka giri ana mu etaano kasookedde Omukama agamba Musa kigambo ekyo. Olwo Yisirayeli yali akyabungeetera mu ddungu; kati ndi wa myaka kinaana mu etaano egy'obukulu." 
Joshua14:11 Na kati nkyali wa maanyi nga luli Musa lwe yansindika okuketta; nkyalina amaanyi agatabaala, ag'okugenda n'okudda, nga bwe nagalina na luli." 
Joshua14:12 Kale nno mpa ensi eno ey'ensozi Omukama gye yansuubiza luli. Naawe wawulira nti eriyo Abaanaki, nti n'ebibuga byabwe binene okuli n'ebigo. Omukama ng'annyambye nzija kubagobawo, nga bwe yagamba.”" 
Joshua14:13 Yoswa n'asabira Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne omukisa, n'amuwa Keburoni ng'obusika bwe." 
Joshua14:14 Era okuva olwo Keburoni kyasigalira ddala nga kya Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne Omukenizzi n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero, kubanga yagoberera Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'omutima gwe gwonna." 
Joshua14:15 Keburoni edda kyayitibwanga Kiriyati-Aruba, nga bakibbudde mu Aruba, eyali omusajja omwatiikirivu ennyo mu Baanaki. Awo ensi n'eweerako ku ntalo." 
Joshua15:1 Ekitundu bazzukulu ba Yuda kye baagabana mu masiga gaabwe nga kisimba ku nsi ya Edomu ne ku ddungu Zini ng'otunuulidde emaserengeta ddala eri emaserengeta. 
Joshua15:2 Ensalo zaabwe emaserengeta nga ziva ku kyondo eky'emaserengeta ku Nnyanja ey'Omunnyo," 
Joshua15:3 ne zigendera ddala okuyita wansi w'akasozi ke Akurabbimu, ne zeeyongerayo e Zini, ne zambuka okutuuka mu maserengeta ga Kadesi-Baruneya, ziizo ne ziyita ku Kezuroni, ate ne zambuka e Addari, ne ziweta okudda e Karuka;" 
Joshua15:4 olwo ne zisala okulaga e Azumoni, ne zigwa ku Kiwonvu Misiri, ne zikoma ku Nnyanja Ennene. Ezo ze nsalo zaabwe emaserengeta." 
Joshua15:5 Ensalo ebuvanjuba ye Nnyanja ey'Omunnyo okutuuka ku Yorudani w'ayiira mu nnyanja. Ensalo ez'emambuka zitandikira ku kyondo ky'Ennyanja Yorudani w'ayiira mu nnyanja," 
Joshua15:6 ne zambuka ku Beti-Kogula, ne ziyita butereevu mu mambuka ga Beti-Araba, ne zambuka ku jjinja lya Bowani mutabani wa Rubeni;" 
Joshua15:7 ne zambuka e Debiri okuva mu Kiwonvu Akori, ne zidda emambuka e Gilugali, ekitunuulidde akasozi k'e Adummimu akali mu maserengeta g'omugga. Awo ensalo ne ziraga ku Meeni-Semesi ne zikoma ku Eni-Rogeli." 
Joshua15:8 Awo ne zambuka nga zigoba Ekiwonvu Beni-Yinnomu, ku buserengeto obw'emambuka obw'ekibuga ky'Abayebusi, oba Yeruzaalemu. Bwe ziva awo ne zambuka ku ntikko y'olusozi ebuvanjuba bw'Ekiwonvu Yinnomu emambuka ddala ekiwonvu Refayimu we kikoma." 
Joshua15:9 Ne ziweta okuva ku ntikko y'olusozi ne ziraga ku luzzi lw'Ensulo z'e Nefutowa. Ne zijja bwe zityo okutuuka ku bibuga by'olusozi Efuroni, ne ziweta okulaga e Baala oba Kiriyati-Yewarimu." 
Joshua15:10 Okuva ku Baala zetooloola ku luuyi lw'ebugwanjuba okutuuka ku lusozi Seyiri, ne zikutula nga zigoba akaserengeto k'olusozi Yewarimu, oludda lw'emambuka, e Kesaloni, ne zikkirira e Beti-Semesi, awo ne ziraga e Timuna." 
Joshua15:11 Ne zigendera ddala ku buserengeto bwa Ekuroni obw'emambuka, awo ne ziweta okulaga e Sikkeroni, ne ziyita kumpi n'olusozi Baala, ne zigguka e Yabuneeli, ne zikoma ku Nnyanja Ennene." 
Joshua15:12 Olubalama lw'Ennyanja Ennene ebugwanjuba ye nsalo. Ezo ze nsalo okwetooloola abazzukulu ba Yuda mu masiga gaabwe. 
Joshua15:13 Yoswa ng'agoberera Omukama bye yali amulagidde, yaddira ekitundu ekimu eky'abazzukulu ba Yuda, kye kibuga Kiriyati-Aruba, oba Keburoni, n'akiwa Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne. Aruba ye yali kitaawe wa Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebu n'agobamu Abaanaki abasatu abaalimu: Sesayi, Akimani ne Talumayi, bazzukulu ba Anaki." 
Joshua15:15 Eyo gye yava n'agenda alumba abantu ababeeranga Debiri. Debiri okusooka kyayitibwanga Kiriyati-Seferi. 
Joshua15:16 Kalebu n'agamba nti: “Omusajja anaalumba n'awamba Kiriyati-Seferi, nnaamuwa muwala wange Akusa abeere mukazi we.”" 
Joshua15:17 Otunyeli, mutabani wa Kenazi, muganda wa Kalebu, n'akiwamba. Kalebu n'amuwa muwala we Akusa abeere mukazi we." 
Joshua15:18 Olumu Akusa bwe yajja ewa Otunyeli, bba n'amupikiriza asabe kitaawe ekibanja. Bwe yabuuka ku ndogoyi, Kalebu n'amubuuza nti: “Oyagala nkukolere ki?”" 
Joshua15:19 Omuwala n'amuddamu nti: “Ngirira ekisa. Nga bwe wampa ettaka mu Negevu, mpeerako n'enzizi z'amazzi.” Bw'atyo Kalebu n'amuwa enzizi ez'engulu n'ez'emmanga." 
Joshua15:20 Buno bwe busika bw'ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Yuda mu masiga gaabwe. 
Joshua15:21 Ebibuga by'ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Yuda ebisembera ddala emaserengeta okwolekera ensalo ne Edomu mu Negevu byali: Kabuzeeli, Ederi ne Yaguri;" 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona ne Adada;" 
Joshua15:23 Kedesi, Kazori ne Yitunani;" 
Joshua15:24 Zifu, Telemu ne Bewaloti;" 
Joshua15:25 Kazori-Kadata, Kiriyoti-Kezuroni, era ekiyitibwa Kazori," 
Joshua15:26 Amamu, Sema ne Molada;" 
Joshua15:27 Kazari-Gadda, Kesumoni, ne Beti-Peleti;" 
Joshua15:28 Kazari-Suwali, Beeriseba, ne Biziyotiya;" 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Yiyimu ne Ezemu;" 
Joshua15:30 Elutoladi, Kesili, ne Koruma;" 
Joshua15:31 Zikulagi, Madumanna ne Sanusanna;" 
Joshua15:32 Lebawoti, Silukimu, Ayini ne Rimmoni; byonna wamu, ebibuga amakumi abiri mu mwenda, ko n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:33 Mu Sefela: Asutawoli, Zora ne Asuna;" 
Joshua15:34 Zanowa, Eni-Gannimu, Tappuwa ne Enamu;" 
Joshua15:35 Yarumuti, Adullamu, Soko ne Azeka;" 
Joshua15:36 Saarayimu, Aditayimu, Gedera ne Gedero-Tayimu; bye bibuga kkumi na bina, n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:37 Zenani, Kadasa, ne Migudali-Gaadi;" 
Joshua15:38 Dilewani, Mizupa ne Yokuteeli;" 
Joshua15:39 Lakisi, Bozukati ne Eguloni;" 
Joshua15:40 Kabboni, Lakumasi ne Kitulisi;" 
Joshua15:41 Gederoti, Beti-Dagoni, Naama ne Makkeda; bye bibuga kkumi na mukaaga n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:42 Libuna Eteri ne Asani; 
Joshua15:43 Yefuta, Asuna ne Nezibu;" 
Joshua15:44 Keyila, Akuzibu ne Maresa; bye bibuga mwenda n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:45 Ekuroni, ebibuga byakyo n'ebyalo byakyo." 
Joshua15:46 Okuva ku Ekuroni okudda ebugwanjuba, byonna ebiriraanye Asudodi n'ebyalo byabyo;" 
Joshua15:47 Asudodi, ebibuga byakyo n'ebyalo byakyo, Gaza, ebibuga byakyo n'ebyalo byakyo, okutuuka ku Kiwonvu Misiri ne ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja Ennene." 
Joshua15:48 Mu nsozi: Samiri, Yattiri ne Soko;" 
Joshua15:49 Danna ne Kiriyati-Sanna, era ekiyitibwa Debiri," 
Joshua15:50 Anabu, Asutemo ne Animu;" 
Joshua15:51 Goseni, Koloni ne Gilo; bye bibuga kkumi na kimu n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:52 Arabu, Duma ne Esani;" 
Joshua15:53 Yanimu, Beti-Tappuwa ne Afeka;" 
Joshua15:54 Kamuta, Kiriyati-Aruba oba Keburoni, ne Ziwori; bye bibuga mwenda awamu n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:55 Mawoni, Karumeli, Zifu ne Yutta;" 
Joshua15:56 Yezureeli, Yokudewamu ne Zanowa;" 
Joshua15:57 Kayini, Gibewa ne Timuna; bye bibuga kkumi n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:58 Kalukuli, Beti-Zuru ne Gedori;" 
Joshua15:59 Maarati, Beti-Anoti ne Elutekoni; bye bibuga mukaaga n'ebyalo byabyo; era ne Tekowa, Efurata, kati nga ye Beteleemu, ne Pewori, Etami, Kuloni, Tatami, Soresi, Karemu, Gallimu, Beteri ne Manaka; bye bibuga kkumi na kimu n'ebyalo byakyo." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriyati-Baali, oba Kiriyati-Yewarimu, ne Rabba; bye bibuga bibiri n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua15:61 Mu ddungu: Beti-Araba, Middini ne Sekaka;" 
Joshua15:62 Nibusani n'Ekibuga ky'Omunnyo ne Engedi; bye bibuga mukaaga n'ebyalo byabyo. 
Joshua15:63 Kyokka bazzukulu ba Yuda tebaasobola kugobawo Bayebusi ababeeranga mu Yeruzaalemu. N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero Abayebusi mwebali mu Yeruzaalemu ne bazzukulu ba Yuda. 
Joshua16:1 Bazzukulu ba Yozefu, omugabo gwabwe akalulu gwe kaabawa, kye kitundu okuva ku Yorudani ebuvanjuba w'omugga, e Yeriko, ne kyambuka okuyita mu ddungu, ne kituuka mu nsi y'e Beteli." 
Joshua16:2 Kiva e Beteli, oba Luzi, ne kisalira mu nsi y'Abaaruki mu Ataroti," 
Joshua16:3 ne kiserengeta ebugwanjuba mu nsi y'Abayafuleti okutuukira ddala mu kitundu kya Beti-Koroni ekya wansi, bwe kityo okutuuka e Gezeri, ne kikoma ku nnyanja." 
Joshua16:4 Obwo bwe busika bw'abazzukulu ba Yozefu: Manasse ne Efurayimu bwe baafuna. 
Joshua16:5 Bazzukulu ba Efurayimu, mu masiga gaabwe kino kye kitundu ekyabwe: Ensalo z'obusika bwabwe zaavanga Ataroti-Addari ebuvanjuba ne zigenda e Beti-Koroni eky'engulu," 
Joshua16:6 ne zigendera ddala okutuuka ku nnyanja. Ate ne ziva e Mikumetati emambuka, ne ziweta nga zidda ebuvanjuba e Taanati-Silo, ne zisala okutuuka e Yanowa ebuvanjuba." 
Joshua16:7 Ne ziva e Yanowa ne zikkirira e Ataroti ne Naara, ne zikwata ku Yeriko, ne zigguka ku Yorudani." 
Joshua16:8 Bwe ziva e Tappuwa ensalo ne zisala ne ziraga ebugwanjuba ku Kiwonvu Kana, ne zikoma ku nnyanja. Obwo bwe busika ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Efurayimu bwe baafuna mu masiga gaabwe." 
Joshua16:9 Kwaliko era n'ebibuga n'ebyalo byabyo ebyayawulirwa bazzukulu ba Efurayimu mu busika bw'abazzukulu ba Manasse. 
Joshua16:10 Ab'ekika kya Efurayimu tebaagobawo Bakanaani abaabeeranga e Gezeri. Abakanaani abo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero babeera wamu n'abaana be Efurayimu, naye nga bassibwa ku mirimu gy'akasanvu." 
Joshua17:1 Guno gwe mugabo gw'ekika kya Manasse, omuggulanda wa Yozefu, oba ogwa Makiri, omuggulanda wa Manasse. Makiri ye yali kitaabwe w'abaasenga mu Gileyaadi. Baali baweereddwa Gileyaadi ne Basani, kubanga ab'essiga lya Makiri baali basajja batabaazi." 
Joshua17:2 Bazzukulu ba Manasse abalala nabo baafuna kuno mu masiga gaabwe. Be bazzukulu ba Abiyezeri, aba Keleki, aba Asuryeli aba Sekemu, aba Keferi n'aba Semida. Abo be bazzukulu abalenzi aba Manasse, mutabani wa Yozefu, mu masiga gaabwe." 
Joshua17:3 Ye Zelofekadi mutabani wa Keferi, mutabani wa Gileyaadi, mutabani wa Makiri, mutabani wa Manasse, teyalina baana ba bulenzi, yalina bawala beereere, nga be ba Makula, Nowa, Kogula, Miluka ne Tiruza." 
Joshua17:4 Bajja eri Eleyazari kabona ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu n'eri abakulembeze, ne bagamba nti: “Omukama yalagira Musa okutuwa obusika mu bannyinaffe.” Yoswa n'abawa ekitundu ekyabwe mu baganda bakitaabwe ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde." 
Joshua17:5 Manasse yafuna ebibanja kkumi, nga tobaze Gileyaadi ne Basani eri emitala wa Yorudani." 
Joshua17:6 Bwe batyo bawala ba Manasse ne bafuna obusika mu batabani be. Ensi ya Gileyaadi yali y'abazzukulu ba Manasse abaali basigaddewo. 
Joshua17:7 Ensalo za Manasse nga ziva Aseeri ne ziraga e Mikumetati ebuvanjuba wa Sekemu, ne ziserengeta mu bantu ababeeranga e Eni-Tappuwa;" 
Joshua17:8 Ensi ya Tappuwa yali ya Manasse, naye ekibuga Tappuwa ku nsalo kyali ky'abazzukulu ba Efurayimu." 
Joshua17:9 Ensalo ne ziserengeta ku Kiwonvu Kana. Waalingayo ebibuga bya Efurayimu mu bibuga bya Manasse, naye ensalo za Manasse nga lwe lubalama lw'omugga olw'emambuka ne zikoma ku nnyanja." 
Joshua17:10 Ku ludda olw'emaserengeta nga wa Efurayimu, ate olw'emambuka nga wa Manasse. Kwe kugamba nti ekitundu kya Manasse nga kikoona ku nnyanja, emambuka ng'eriyo Aseeri, ate ebuvanjuba nga kisalagana ne Yissakari."
