Joshua17:11 Mu Yissakari ne mu Aseeri, Manasse yalinamu ebibuga: Beti-Sani n'obubuga bwakyo, Yibulewamu n'obubuga bwakyo, abatuuze b'omu Dori n'obubuga bwakyo, abatuuze b'omu Eni-Dori n'obubuga bwakyo, abatuuze b'omu Taanaki n'obubuga bwakyo, abatuuze b'omu Megiddo n'obubuga bwakyo, n'ekyokusatu ekya Nafati." 
Joshua17:12 Bazzukulu ba Manasse tebaasobola kuwangula bibuga bino, kubanga Abakanaani baayagala okusigala mu kitundu kino." 
Joshua17:13 Naye Abayisirayeli bwe beeyongera amaanyi, ne bassa Abakanaani ku kasanvu, naye era tebaabagobaamu kubamalamu." 
Joshua17:14 Bazzukulu ba Yozefu ne bagamba Yoswa nti: “Lwaki ompadde omugabo gumu n'ekitundu kimu okuba obusika, sso ng'abantu bange bangi, sso nga n'Omukama n'okutuusa kati abadde akyampadde omukisa mungi?”" 
Joshua17:15 Yoswa n'abaddamu nti: “Obanga abantu bo bangi bwe batyo, ate nga n'ensozi za Efurayimu nfunda ku ggwe, yambuka mu kibira weeyerulire ekitundu mu nsi y'Abaperizzi n'Abarefa.”" 
Joshua17:16 Bazzukulu ba Yozefu ne bamuddamu nti: “Ensi ey'ensozi tetumala, ate Abakanaani bonna abali mu nsenyi, balina ebigaali eby'ekyuma, abo abali mu Beti-Sani ne mu bubuga bwakyo, n'abo abali mu lusenyi lwa Yezureeli.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yoswa n'agamba ennyumba ya Yozefu, ye Efurayimu ne Manasse nti: “Muli ggwanga ddene ery'amaanyi ennyo; temujja kufuna mugabo gumu gwokka;" 
Joshua17:18 n'ensi ey'ensozi ejja kubeera yiyo. Gyerule ogituusize ddala gy'ekoma, kubanga Abakanaani newandibadde nga balina ebigaali eby'ekyuma ate nga ba maanyi, ojja kusobola okubagobamu.”" 
Joshua18:1 Abayisirayeli bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira e Silo, ne bassaayo Weema ey'Ensisinkano; ensi yonna baali bamaze okugiwangula." 
Joshua18:2 Kyokka waali wasigadde ebika musanvu eby'Abayisirayeli ebyali bitannafuna busika bwabyo. 
Joshua18:3 Yoswa n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Munaalinda kutuusa wa okutandika okwezza ensi Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe gye yabawa? 
Joshua18:4 Mulonde abasajja basatu basatu mu buli kika, mbasindike, bagende batalaage ensi, bawandiike ebifa ku nsi okusinziira ku busika nga bwe bunaagenda, oluvannyuma badde gye ndi." 
Joshua18:5 Ensi mugyawulemu ebitundu musanvu. Yuda ajja kusigala mu kitundu kye emaserengeta, ate ennyumba ya Yozefu mu kitundu kye emambuka." 
Joshua18:6 Ng'ensi mumaze okugisalamu ebitundu musanvu, muwandiike ebibifaako, mubindetere wano; olwo mbakubire akalulu mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda waffe." 
Joshua18:7 Bo abaleevi tebalina mugabo mu mmwe, kubanga emirimu gy'obwakabona bw'Omukama bwe busika bwabwe. Ye Gaadi ne Rubeni n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse baafuna dda obusika bwabwe emitala wa Yorudani ebuvanjuba, Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bwe yabawa.”" 
Joshua18:8 Abasajja bwe baali bagenda okutalaaga ensi, Yoswa n'alagira abaali bagenda okugiyiga nti: “Mugende muyiteeyite mu nsi, mugiyige, muwandiike bye mulabye, mudde gye ndi wano; nzija kubakubira akalulu mu maaso g'Omukama e Silo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Abasajja ne bagenda, ne batalaaga ensi, kibuga ku kibuga, mu bitundu musanvu, ne bawandiika ebifa ku nsi mu kitabo, ne bakomawo ewa Yoswa mu lusiisira e Silo." 
Joshua18:10 Yoswa n'abakubira akalulu mu maaso g'Omukama e Silo, ensi n'agigabanyizaamu Abayisirayeli ng'agoberera ebika byabwe n'ekitundu kya buli omu." 
Joshua18:11 Akalulu akaasooka kaayokya ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Benyamiini mu masiga gaabwe. Ekitundu eky'omugabo gwabwe kyali wakati w'abazzukulu ba Yuda ne bazzukulu ba Yozefu. 
Joshua18:12 Ensalo zaabwe, emambuka, zisimbuka ku Yorudani, ne zambuka ku Yeriko ku buserengeto bw'olusozi, ne zambuka ebugwanjuba mu nsi ey'ensozi, ne zikoma mu ddungu ery'e Beti-Aveni." 
Joshua18:13 Bwe ziva eyo ne zisala okudda ku kaserengeto k'e Luzi, oba Beteli, ne zikkirira e Ataroti-Addari ku lusozi oluli mu maserengeta ga Beti-Koroni ekya wansi." 
Joshua18:14 Okuva ku kasozi akali mu maserengeta ga Beti-Koroni ekya wansi, ensalo ziweta ne ziserengeta ebugwanjuba ne ziggukira e Kiriyati-Baali, oba Kiriyati-Yewarimu, ekibuga ky'abazzukulu ba Yuda. Olwo lwe ludda olw'ebugwanjuba." 
Joshua18:15 Ku ludda olw'emaserengeta ensalo zitandikira Kiriyati-Yewarimu ebugwanjuba, ne zigendera ddala ku nsulo z'Amazzi g'e Nefutowa," 
Joshua18:16 ne ziserengeta wansi w'olusozi gye lukoma okutunuulira Ekiwonvu Beni-Yinnomu mu mambuka g'Ekiwonvu Refayimu, ne zikkirira mu Kiwonvu Yinnomu, ne zigoba akaserengeto k'ekibuga ky'Abayebusi ak'emaserengeta, ne zigwa e Eni-Rogeli." 
Joshua18:17 Ate awo ne ziweta okwambuka, ne ziraga e Eni-Semesi, ne zigendera dda e Geliloti ekitunuulidde akasozi k'e Adummimu. Awo ne zikkirira ku Jjinja lya Bowani, eyali mutabani wa Rubeni." 
Joshua18:18 Ne zisala okulaga ku kaserengeto akatunuulidde Araba ak'emambuka, ne zikkirira mu Araba." 
Joshua18:19 Ate olwo ne zisala okudda ku kasozi ka Beti-Kogula emambuka, ne ziggukira ku kyondo eky'engulu eky'Ennyanja ey'Omunnyo Yorudani we gukoma emmanga." 
Joshua18:20 Mu buvanjuba, Yorudani ye nsalo. Ezo ze nsalo z'ekitundu ky'abazzukulu ba Benyamiini ku njuyi zonna, obusika bwabwe mu masiga gabwe." 
Joshua18:21 Ekika kya Benyamiini mu masiga gaabwe baalina ebibuga bino: Yeriko, Beti-Kogula ne Emeki-Kezizi;" 
Joshua18:22 Beti-Araba, Zemarayimu ne Beteli;" 
Joshua18:23 Avvimu, Para ne Ofura;" 
Joshua18:24 Kefari-Ammoni, Ofuni ne Geba; bye bibuga kkumi na bibiri n'ebyalo byabyo;" 
Joshua18:25 Ate ne Gibewoni, Rama ne Beeroti;" 
Joshua18:26 Mizupa, Kefira ne Moza;" 
Joshua18:27 Rekemu, Yirupeeli ne Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Elefu, Yebusi, oba Yeruzaalemu, Gibewa ne Kiriyati; bye bibuga kkumi na bina n'ebyalo byabyo. Obwo bwe busika bw'abazzukulu ba Benyamiini mu masiga gaabwe." 
Joshua19:1 Akalulu akookubiri kaayokya ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Simewoni mu masiga gaabwe; obusika bwabwe bwagwa mu makkati g'ekitundu ky'abazzukulu ba Yuda; 
Joshua19:2 Bwalimu Beeriseba, oba Seba, ne Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 Kazari-Suwali, Bala ne Ezemu;" 
Joshua19:4 Elutoladi, Betuli ne Koruma;" 
Joshua19:5 Zikulagi, Beti-Marukaboti ne Kazari-Susa;" 
Joshua19:6 Beti-Lebawoti ne Sarukeni; bye bibuga kkumi na bisatu n'ebyalo byabyo. 
Joshua19:7 Era ne Ayini, Rimmoni, Eteri ne Asani; bye bibuga bina n'ebyalo byabyo," 
Joshua19:8 n'ebyalo byonna ebyetoolodde ebibuga bino okutuukira ddala ku Baalati-Beeri, oba Rama mu Negevu. Obwo bwe bwali obusika bw'ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Simewoni mu masiga gaabwe." 
Joshua19:9 Obusika bw'abazzukulu ba Simewoni bwaggyibwa ku kitundu ky'abazzukulu ba Yuda, kubanga ekyabwe kyali kinene okusinga kye beetaaga. Awo nno obusika bw'abazzukulu ba Simewoni kwe kubeera mu makkati g'obusika bw'abazzukulu ba Yuda." 
Joshua19:10 Akalulu akookusatu kaayokya abazzukulu ba Zebuluni mu masiga gaabwe. Ensalo zaabwe nga zituukira ddala e Saridi. 
Joshua19:11 Ne zambuka ebugwanjuba okutuuka e Marala, ne zikwata ku Dabbeseti, ne zeyongerayo okutuuka ku kiwonvu ekiri mu maaso ga Yokunewamu." 
Joshua19:12 Ate ne zidda ebuvanjuba mu bitundu by'e Kisuloti-Tabori nga ziva e Saridi, ne zigenda e Daberati, ne zambuka e Yafiya." 
Joshua19:13 Bwe ziva eyo, ne zeeyongerayo ebuvanjuba okutuuka e Gita-Keferi Ne Eti-Kazini, ne zigguka e Rimmoni, olwo ne ziweta nga zidda e Newa." 
Joshua19:14 Ne ziwetera emambuka wa Kanatoni, ne zikoma mu kiwonvu ky'e Yefutakeli." 
Joshua19:15 Ebibuga ye Kattati, Nawalali, Simuroni, Yidala ne Beteleemu; bye bibuga kkumi na bibiri n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:16 Obwo bwe busika bw'abazzukulu ba Zebuluni mu masiga gaabwe, omwali ebibuga ebyo n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:17 Akalulu akookuna kaayokya abazzukulu ba Yissakari mu masiga gaabwe. 
Joshua19:18 Ekitundu ky'obusika bwabwe mwalimu ebibuga: Yezureeli, Kesulloti, ne Sunemu;" 
Joshua19:19 Kafarayimu, Siwoni ne Anakarati;" 
Joshua19:20 Rabbiti, Kisiwoni ne Ebezi;" 
Joshua19:21 Remeti, Eni-Gannimu, Eni-Kadda ne Beti-Pazzezi." 
Joshua19:22 Ensalo nga zikwata ku Tabori ne Sakazuma ne Beti-Semesi, ne zikoma ku Yorudani; bye bibuga kkumi na mukaaga n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:23 Obwo bwe busika bw'ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Yissakari mu masiga gaabwe, omwali ebibuga ebyo n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:24 Akalulu akookutaano kaayokya abazzukulu ba Aseeri mu masiga gaabwe. 
Joshua19:25 Ekitundu kyabwe mwalimu ebibuga: Kelukati, Kali, Beteni ne Akusafu;" 
Joshua19:26 Allammeleki, Amadi ne Misali. Mu bugwanjuba ensalo nga zikwata ku Karumeli ne ku Sikori-Libunati," 
Joshua19:27 ate ne zidda enjuba gy'eva okwolekera Beti-Dagoni, ne zikoma ku Zebuluni n'Ekiwonvu Yefutakeli, ne zambuka e Beti-Emeki ne Neyeli, ne ziyita ku kkono wa Kabuli." 
Joshua19:28 Ne zigenda e Eburoni, Rekobu, Kammoni, Kana okutuuka e Sidoni Omukulu." 
Joshua19:29 Ne zidda e Rama, ne zigenda ku kibuga ekya bbugwe ekya Tiiro, ne zidda e Kosa, ne ziggukira ku nnyanja mu kitundu ky'e Akuzibu," 
Joshua19:30 Wumma, Afeki ne Rekobu; bye bibuga abiri mu bibiri n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:31 Obwo bwe busika bw'abazzukulu ba Aseeri mu masiga gaabwe, omwali ebibuga ebyo n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:32 Akalulu akoomukaga kaayokya abazzukulu ba Nafutali, ku lw'abazzukulu ba Nafutali, mu masiga gaabwe." 
Joshua19:33 Ensalo zaabwe zitandikira Kelefu, ziizo ku muvule gw'omu Zaanannimu, ne ziyita e Adami-Nekebu, ne Yabuneeli, okutuka e Lakkumu ne zikoma ku Yorudani." 
Joshua19:34 Ate ne zidda ebugwanjuba okwolekera Azunoti-Tabori, ne zisinziira eyo okudda e Kukoki, ne zituuka ku Zebuluni emaserengeta, ne ku Aseeri ebugwanjuba, ne ku Yuda ku Yorudani ebuvanjuba." 
Joshua19:35 Ebibuga ebiriko bbugwe byali: Ziddimu, Zeri, Kamati, Rakkati ne Kinnereti;" 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama ne Kazori;" 
Joshua19:37 Kedesi, Edureyi ne Eni-Kazori;" 
Joshua19:38 Yironi, Migudali, Eli-Koremu, Beti-Anati ne Beti-Semesi; bye bibuga kkumi na mwenda n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:39 Obwo bwe busika bw'ab'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Nafutali mu masiga gaabwe, omwali ebibuga ebyo n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:40 Akalulu akoomusanvu kaayokya abazzukulu ba Daani mu masiga gaabwe. 
Joshua19:41 Mu kitundu ky'obusika bwabwe mwalimu: Zora, Esutawoli, ne Yiri-Semesi;" 
Joshua19:42 Saalabbini, Ayijaloni ne Yitula;" 
Joshua19:43 Eloni, Timuna, ne Ekuroni;" 
Joshua19:44 Eluteke, Gibbetoni ne Balaati;" 
Joshua19:45 Yudi, Bene-Beraki ne Gati-Rimmoni;" 
Joshua19:46 Me-Yarukoni, Rakkoni n'ekitundu ekitunuulidde Yoppa." 
Joshua19:47 Bazzukulu ba Daani beesanga ng'ekitundu kyabwe tekibamala, kwe kwambuka ne balumba Lesemu, ne bakikwata, ne bakikuba n'ekitala, ne bakyezza. Baakisengamu, ne bakiyita Lesemu-Daani, nga basinziira ku jjajjaabwe Daani." 
Joshua19:48 Obwo bwe busika bw'ekika ky'abazzukulu ba Daani mu masiga gaabwe, omwali ebibuga ebyo n'ebyalo byabyo." 
Joshua19:49 Abayisirayeli bwe baamala okugabanyaamu ensi mu bitundutundu ku kalulu, ne bawa Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu obusika mu bo." 
Joshua19:50 Nga Omukama bwe yali alagidde, baamuwa ekibuga kye yali asabye, Timunati-Sera, mu nsozi za Efurayimu. Yakizimba, n'abeera omwo." 
Joshua19:51 Ebyo bye bitundu Eleyazari kabona, Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu, n'abakulu b'ebika by'Abayisirayeli bye baagereka ku kalulu nga bali e Silo mu maaso g'Omukama, ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano, ne bamaliriza batyo okugabanyaamu ensi." 
Joshua20:1 Omukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: 
Joshua20:2 ‘Musseewo ebibuga eby'obuddukiro bye nabalagira nga mpita mu Musa," 
Joshua20:3 buli yenna asse omuntu mu butanwa nga tagenderedde gy'anaasanganga obuddukiro ku awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi. 
Joshua20:4 Bw'addukiranga mu kimu ku bibuga ebyo, ayimiriranga ku muzigo gw'omulyango gw'ekibuga n'asooka yennyonnyolako eri abakadde b'ekibuga ekyo. Olwo balimukkiriza n'ayingira mu kibuga, ne bamuwa w'anaabeeranga." 
Joshua20:5 Awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi bw'awonderanga eyatta, tebamuwangayo mu mikono gye, kubanga teyagenderera kutta munne; tekyava mu bukyayi mu kusooka." 
Joshua20:6 Omuntu eyatta, ateekwa okusigala mu kibuga ekyo okutuusa ng'awozeseddwa mu maaso g'ekibiina, n'okutuusa nga kabona omukulu eyaliwo mu budde obwo amaze okufa. Olwo eyatta omuntu alisobola okuddayo mu maka ge, mu kibuga kye kye yali adduseemu.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Awo kwe kwawula ebibuga: Kedesi mu Galilaaya, mu nsozi za Nafutali, Sekemu, mu nsozi za Efurayimu, ne Kiriyati-Aruba, oba Keburoni, mu nsozi za Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Emitala wa Yorudani ne ebuvanjuba wa Yeriko baalonda Bezeri, ekiri mu ddungu, ku museetwe, mu kika kya Rubeni, Ramoti mu Gileyaadi, mu kika kya Gaadi, ne Golani mu Basani, mu kika kya Manasse." 
Joshua20:9 Bino bye bibuga ebyayawulirwa Abayisirayeli bonna, n'abagwira abaalinga mu bo, buli yabanga asse omuntu mu butanwa mwe yaddukiranga asobole okuwona awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi, okutuusa ng'amaze okuwozesebwa ekibiina." 
Joshua21:1 Awo abakulu b'omu masiga g'Abaleevi ne bajja eri Eleyazari kabona, Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu n'eri abakulu b'amasiga mu bika byonna eby'Abayisirayeli," 
Joshua21:2 e Silo eky'omu Kanaani, ne babagamba nti: “Omukama yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa, mutuwe ebibuga mwe tunaabeeranga, n'amalundiro gaakyo olw'amagana gaffe.”" 
Joshua21:3 Awo Abayisirayeli, ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde, ne baddira ku busika bwabwe ne bawaako Abaleevi, ebibuga n'amalundiro gaabyo." 
Joshua21:4 Akalulu akasooka kaayokya essiga lya Kewati mu nnyumba zaabwe. Abaleevi abasibuka mu Aroni kabona baaweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bisatu okuva mu bika ekya Yuda, ekya Simewoni n'ekya Benyamiini." 
Joshua21:5 Abasigadde ab'essiga lya Kewati akalulu kaabawa ebibuga kkumi okuva mu bika ekya Efurayimu, ekya Daani, n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse." 
Joshua21:6 Ab'essiga lya Gerusoni akalulu kaabawa ebibuga kkumi ba bisatu okuva mu kika ekya Yissakari, ekya Aseeri, ekya Nafutali, n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse mu Basani." 
Joshua21:7 N'ab'essiga lya Merari mu nnyumba zaabwe, baafuna ebibuga kkumi na bibiri okuva mu bika ekya Rubeni, ekya Gaadi n'ekya Zebuluni." 
Joshua21:8 Ebibuga bino ko n'amalundiro gaabyo, Abayisirayeli bye baawa Abaleevi ku kalulu ng'Omukama bwe yali alagidde ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Ab'omu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Yuda n'eky'abazzukulu ba Simewoni baawaayo ebibuga bino eby'amannya gano," 
Joshua21:10 anti bazzukulu ba Aroni mu ssiga lya Kewati ery'abazzukulu ba Leevi, akalulu be kaasooka okwokya," 
Joshua21:11 baabawa Kiriyati-Aruba oba Keburoni, mu nsozi za Yuda, ko n'amalundiro agakyetoolodde. Aruba ye yali kitaawe wa Anaki." 
Joshua21:12 Lyo ettale n'ebyalo ebyetoolodde ekibuga baali babiwadde Kalebu, mutabani wa Yefunne ng'obusika bwe." 
Joshua21:13 Ne bawa abazzukulu ba Aroni bakabona Keburoni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ekibuga eky'obuddukiro eri abeera asse omuntu, era ne Libuna ko n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:14 Yattiri n'amalundiro gaakyo, Esutemowa n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:15 Koloni n'amalundiro gaakyo, Dabiri n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:16 Ayini n'amalundiro gaakyo, Yutta n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Beti-Semesi n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga mwenda ebyaggyibwa mu bika bino ebibiri." 
Joshua21:17 Mu kika kya Benyamiini baabawaayo Gibewoni n'amalundiro gaakyo, Geba n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:18 Anatoti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Alumoni n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bina." 
Joshua21:19 Ebibuga by'abazzukulu ba Aroni bakabona ne biba kkumi na bisatu, ko n'amalundiro gaabyo." 
Joshua21:20 Ab'essiga lya Kewati abaafikkawo, ab'omu masiga g'Abaleevi, baaweebwa ebibuga bino okuva mu kika kya Efurayimu:" 
Joshua21:21 mu nsozi za Efurayimu: Sekemu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ekibuga eky'obuddukiro eri abeera asse omuntu, Gezeri n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:22 Kibuzayimu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Beti-Koroni n'amalundiro gaakyo; by'ebibuga bina." 
Joshua21:23 Ne mu kika kya Daani baafunayo: Eruteke n'amalundiro gaakyo, Gibbetoni n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:24 Ayijaloni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Gati-Rimmoni n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bina." 
Joshua21:25 Mu kyokubiri eky'ekika kya Manasse baafunayo: Taanaki n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Gati-Rimmoni n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bibiri." 
Joshua21:26 Ebibuga bino byonna ekkumi n'amalundiro gaabyo byaweebwa ab'essiga lya Kewati mu mayumba gaabwe. 
Joshua21:27 N'ab'essiga lya Gerusoni, okuva mu masiga g'Abaleevi, baafuna mu kyokubiri eky'ekika kya Manasse ebibuga: Golani n'amalundiro gaakyo, ekibuga eky'obuddukiro eri abeera asse omuntu, eky'omu Basani, ne Be-Esutera n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bibiri." 
Joshua21:28 Okuva mu kika kya Yissakari baafuna: Kisiyoni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Daberati n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:29 Yarumuti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Eni-Gannimu n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bina." 
Joshua21:30 Okuva mu kika kya Aseeri baafuna: Misali n'amalundiro gaakyo, Abudoni n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:31 Kelukati n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Rekobu n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bina." 
Joshua21:32 Okuva mu kika kya Nafutali baafuna: Kedesi n'amalundiro gaakyo, ekibuga eky'obuddukiro eky'omu Galilaaya, Kammoti-Dori n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Karutani n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bisatu." 
Joshua21:33 Ebibuga byonna eby'essiga lya Gerusoni mu nnyumba zaabwe byali kkumi na bisatu, ko n'amalundiro gaabyo." 
Joshua21:34 Ab'omu ssiga lya Merari, Abaleevi abaali basigalidde, baafuna okuva mu kika kya Zebuluni ebibuga: Yokunewamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, Karuta n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:35 Dimuna n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Nakalali n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bina n'amalundiro gaabyo." 
Joshua21:36 Okuva mu kika kya Rubeni baafuna ebibuga: Bezeri n'amalundiro gaakyo, Yawazi n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:37 Kademoti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Mefaati n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bina n'amalundiro gaabyo." 
Joshua21:38 Okuva mu kika kya Gaadi baafuna ebibuga: Ramoti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ekibuga eky'obuddukiro eri abeera asse omuntu, eky'omu Gileyaadi, Makanayimu n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
Joshua21:39 Kesuboni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Yazeri n'amalundiro gaakyo; bye bibuga bina." 
Joshua21:40 Ebibuga byonna ebyaweebwa ab'essiga lya Merari, be Baleevi mu masiga gaabwe abaali basigalidde, biwera kkumi na bibiri." 
Joshua21:41 Ebibuga by'Abaleevi byonna wamu ebyali mu bitundu by'Abayisirayeli, byawerera ddala amakumi ana mu munaana, ko n'amalundiro gaabyo." 
Joshua21:42 Buli kibuga ku bino kyalina amalundiro agakyetoolodde; byonna ebibuga bino byali bwe bityo. 
Joshua21:43 Bw'atyo Omukama n'awa Yisirayeli ensi yonna gye yali alayidde okuwa bajjajjaabwe; ne bagitwala ne babeera omwo. 
Joshua21:44 Omukama yabawa obuweerero ku njuyi zonna, nga bwe yali alayiridde bajjajjaabwe; tewali mulabe n'omu yabagumira; bonna abalabe baabwe yababawa mu mikono gyabwe." 
Joshua21:45 Tewali kyonna kirungi Omukama kye yasuubiza nnyumba ya Yisirayeli kyagwa butaka; naye byonna byatuukirira. 
Joshua22:1 Awo Yoswa n'ayita Abarubeni, Abagaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse," 
Joshua22:2 n'abagamba nti: “Mwatuukiriza n'obwesigwa byonna Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bye yabalagira, era buli lwe nabalagiranga, mwaŋŋonderanga." 
Joshua22:3 Ebbanga libadde ggwanvu, naye n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero temwabuliranga baganda bammwe; mutuukirizza Omukama Katonda wammwe kye yabakuutira." 
Joshua22:4 Kale nno, ng'Omukama Katonda wammwe bw'amaze okuwa baganda bammwe ekiwummulo nga bwe yabasuubiza, mweddireyo mu weema zammwe, mu nsi y'obutaka bwammwe Musa omuweereza w'Omukama gye yabawa emitala wa Yorudani." 
Joshua22:5 Naye mwekkaanye nnyo okutuusanga ekiragiro n'etteeka Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bye yabawa: okwagalanga Omukama Katonda wammwe, okutambuliranga mu makubo ge gonna, okukwatanga ebiragiro bye, okumunywererako, n'okumuweerezanga n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna.”" 
Joshua22:6 Yoswa n'abawa omukisa n'abasiibula, ne badda eka mu weema zaabwe." 
Joshua22:7 Ekyokubiri eky'ekika kya Manasse Musa yali akiwadde ekitundu kyakyo mu Basani; ekyokubiri ekirala eky'ekika Yoswa n'akikubira akalulu, ne bafuna mu baganda baabwe emitala wa Yorudani, ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba. Bwe yali abasiibula baddeyo mu weema zaabwe, yabawa omukisa," 
Joshua22:8 n'abagamba nti: “Muddeeyo mu weema zammwe n'entuumu y'obugagga bwammwe, n'amagana gammwe amanene ennyo, ffeeza, zaabu ekikomo, ekyuma, n'ebyambalo ebingi ennyo. Kw'ebyo bye mwanyaga ku balabe bammwe, mwawulizangako baganda bammwe.”" 
Joshua22:9 Bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse, ne baawukana n'Abayisirayeli e Silo, ekiri mu Kanaani, ne baddayo, bayingire mu Gileyaadi, ensi y'obutaka bwabwe bwe baali bafunye ng'Omukama bwe yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Bwe baatuuka e Geliloti, mu Kanaani, okumpi ne Yorudani, bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse ne bazimba okumpi ne Yorudani omwaliiro omugulumivu mu ndabika yaagwo." 
Joshua22:11 Abayisirayeli bwe baawulira nti bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse bazimbye omwaliiro e Geliloti, ku nsalo ne Kanaani, ku mugga Yorudani, naye ku ludda lwabwe olw'omugga," 
Joshua22:12 ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli ne kikuŋŋaanira e Silo, bagende babatabaale." 
Joshua22:13 Abayisirayeli ne batumira bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse Finekasi, mutabani wa Eleyazari kabona," 
Joshua22:14 ng'ali n'abaami kkumi, omu omu ku lwa buli kika kya Yisirayeli, abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abo ku lw'ebika bya Yisirayeli." 
Joshua22:15 Bajja eri bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse, mu nsi ya Gileyaadi, ne babagamba nti:" 
Joshua22:16 “Ekibiina ky'Omukama kyonna kino kye kyebuuza: ‘Bulyake nnabaki buno ne mumenya obwesigwa eri Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ne muva ku Mukama olwa leero nga mwezimbira omwaliiro, okumujeemera kaakati?" 
Joshua22:17 Ekibi ky'e Pewori tekyatumalira, ekyo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero kye tutetukuzangako, newandibadde nga kyo ekibonerezo kyagwira ekibiina ky'Omukama?" 
Joshua22:18 Kati muumwo muva ku Mukama! Singa munaajeemera Omukama olwa leero, enkya Omukama ajja kusunguwalira ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli." 
Joshua22:19 Obanga ensi y'obutaka bwammwe nnyonoonefu, musomoke, mujje eno mu nsi y'obutaka bw'Omukama omuli Ekisulo kye, tugabane eyo; naye muleke kujeemera Mukama, naffe okutujeemera, nga muzimba omwaliiro omulala ogutali mwaliiro gwa Mukama Katonda waffe." 
Joshua22:20 Akani mutabani wa Zeraki bw'ataali mwesigwa eri ebyali bisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa, obusungu tebwajjira kibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli? Si ye yekka eyafa olw'okubeera ekibi kye.’ ”" 
Joshua22:21 Bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse ne baanukula abakulu b'ebika bya Yisirayeli nti:" 
Joshua22:22 “Katonda Omukulu! Omukama! Katonda Omukulu! Omukama! Amanyi, ne Yisirayeli naye amanye; oba kino tukikoze mu bujeemu oba butawulira Mukama, temutusonyiwa olwa leero." 
Joshua22:23 Oba twezimbidde omwaliiro kuva ku Mukama, tuguweererezeeko ebitambiro ebyokye, n'ebitone eby'obuwunga n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu, Omukama yennyini atuvunaane." 
Joshua22:24 Ffe twakikoze lwa kutya nti olumu abaana bammwe bagenda kugamba abaffe nti: ‘Ate mmwe Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli mumwagaza ki? 
Joshua22:25 Mmwe bazzukulu ba Rubeni n'aba Gaadi, Omukama yassaawo ensalo wakati waffe nammwe, gwe mugga Yorudani. Awo nno mu Mukama temulinaamu mugabo.’ Bwe guba gutyo, abaana bammwe bagenda kuggya abaana baffe ku kutya Omukama." 
Joshua22:26 “Kyetwava tugamba nti: ‘Mugire twezimbire omwaliiro, naye nga si gwa bitambiro ebyokye oba ebitone;’" 
Joshua22:27 wabula gubeere obujulizi wakati waffe nammwe n'eri amazadde gaffe agalituddirira, nti tuli ba kusinzanga Omukama n'ebitambiro ebyokye, ebitone n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu. Olwo gye bujja abaana bammwe baleme kugamba baana baffe nti: ‘Temulina mugabo mu Mukama.’" 
Joshua22:28 Ne tugamba nti: ‘Bwe baliba ekyo bakitugambye oba nga bakigambye abaana baffe, tulibaanukula nti: “Mulabe ekifaananyi ky'omwaliiro gw'Omukama bajjajjaffe gwe baakola, nga si gwa kwokerako bitone oba okutambirirako, wabula ogw'okutujuliranga gye muli.” ’" 
Joshua22:29 Kikafuuwe, ffe okujeemera Omukama ne tumuvaako nga tuzimba omwaliiro ogw'ebitambiro ebyokye, ebitone eby'obuwunga n'ebitone, ogutali guli ogw'Omukama Katonda waffe, oguli mu maaso g'Ekisulo kye.”" 
Joshua22:30 Finekasi kabona n'abakulu b'ebika by'Abayisirayeli bwe baawulira bazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'aba Manasse bye baayogera, ne basanyuka." 
Joshua22:31 Finekasi mutabani we Eleyazari kabona, n'agamba abazzukulu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'aba Manasse nti: “Kati tumanyi nti Omukama ali naffe, kubanga temwonoonye eri Mukama ne kye mukoze; muwonyezza Abayisirayeli mu mukono gw'Omukama.”" 
Joshua22:32 Awo Finekasi, mutabani wa Eleyazari kabona, n'abakulembeze ne baleka bazzukulu ba Rubeni n'aba Gaadi mu Gileyaadi ne baddayo mu nsi y'e Kanaani eri Abayisirayeli, ne babategeeza bwe bibadde." 
Joshua22:33 Abayisirayeli bye baawulira ne bibasanyusa, ne batendereza Katonda; era tebaddayo kwogera ku kugenda kutabaala n'okuzikiriza ensi ab'ekika kya Rubeni ne Gaadi mwe baabeeranga." 
Joshua22:34 Bazzukulu ba Rubeni n'aba Gaadi omwaliiro gwe baazimba ne bagutuuma 'Mujulirwa mu ffe nti Omukama ye Katonda'. 
Joshua23:1 Nga wayise ebbanga ggwanvu ng'Omukama amaze okuwa Yisirayeli akalembereza ku balabe baabwe bonna ababeetoolodde, nga ne Yoswa akaddiye, ayise mu myaka," 
Joshua23:2 Yoswa n'ayita Yisirayeli yenna, abakadde baabwe, abakulembeze baabwe, abalamuzi baabwe, n'abaami baabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Nze nkaddiye, mpise mu myaka." 
Joshua23:3 Mmwe mmwennyini mwerabiddeko n'amaaso gammwe byonna Omukama Katonda wammwe by'akoze amawanga gano gonna ku lwammwe; Omukama Katonda wammwe yennyini y'abadde abalwanirira. 
Joshua23:4 Mujjukire, nkubye akalulu ne mbagabanyizaamu ng'obusika bw'ebika byammwe amawanga gonna agabadde gakyasigalidde, ge mawanga ge nawangula okuva ku Yorudani okutuuka ku Nnyanja Ennene ebugwanjuba." 
Joshua23:5 Omukama Katonda wammwe yennyini y'alibabagoberawo; alibasindiikiriza mu maaso gammwe, mmwe ne mutwala ensi yaabwe, ng'Omukama Katonda wammwe bwe yabasuubiza." 
Joshua23:6 “Mubanga bagumu nnyo; mukwatenga era mutuusenga byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Etteeka lya Musa nga temuwunjukanga n'akatono kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono. 
Joshua23:7 Temwetabanga na mawanga agaasigalira mu mmwe; temukowoolanga mannya ga balubaale baabwe oba okulayiranga mu mannya gaabwe; temubaweerezanga era temubavunnamiranga," 
Joshua23:8 wabula munywerere ku Mukama Katonda wammwe nga bwe mubadde mukola n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Joshua23:9 Omukama abagobeddewo amawanga amanene ate ag'amaanyi; n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero tewannabaawo asobola kubagumira. 
Joshua23:10 Omu ati mu mmwe yagoba abalabe lukumi. Kubanga Omukama Katonda wammwe yennyini y'abalwanirira nga bwe yali asuubizza. 
Joshua23:11 Mwekkaanye nnyo mmwe mmwennyini okwagalanga Omukama Katonda wammwe. 
Joshua23:12 “Ke mulyekyusa ne mwegatta ku b'amawanga abaasigalira mu mmwe abaawonawo, ne muwasaŋŋana nabo, ne mukolagana nabo," 
Joshua23:13 mutegeererewo nti Omukama Katonda wammwe talibagoberawo mawanga gano, wabula galifuuka bitimba na nkwaso na buswanyu ku migongo gyammwe, na maggwa mu maaso gammwe, okutuusa nga muwedde mu nsi ennungi bw'eti Omukama Katonda wammwe gye yabawa." 
Joshua23:14 “Olwa leero nzuuno nkuttte ekkubo ensi yonna ly'ekwata; Mumanyi n'omutima gwammwe gwonna nti byonna ebirungi Omukama bye yatusuubiza mpaawo kitatuukiridde. Buli kye yagamba kituukiridde, tewali kigudde butaka." 
Joshua23:15 Mu ngeri ye emu nga buli kirungi kyonna Omukama kye yasuubiza bwe kyatuukirira, era bw'atyo Omukama bw'alibaleetera buli kabi konna ke yabawerera, okutuusa ng'abazikirizza mu nsi eno ennungi Omukama Katonda wammwe gye yabawa." 
Joshua23:16 Bwe mulisobya endagaano y'Omukama Katonda wammwe, gye yabalagira, ne muweereza balubaale abagwira, ne mubavunnamira, obusungu bw'Omukama bugenda kubeesererako, era mulizikirira mangu okuggwa mu nsi eno ennungi gye yabawa.”" 
Joshua24:1 Yoswa n'akuŋŋaanya ebika bya Yisirayeli byonna e Sekemu, n'ayita abakadde n'abakulembeze, abalamuzi n'abaami ba Yisirayeli, ne beeyanjula mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Joshua24:2 Awo n'ayogera eri abantu bonna nti: “Kino ky'agamba Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli: ‘Edda ennyo bajjajjammwe, nga Tera kitaawe wa Yiburayimu, ne Nakori, baabeeranga mitala w'omugga; baaweerezanga balubaale." 
Joshua24:3 Naye ne nzigya kitammwe Yiburayimu mu nsi y'emitala w'omugga, ne mmuleeta, ne mmuyisa mu nsi yonna eya Kanaani, ne mmuwa ezzadde ddene. Namuwa Yizaake," 
Joshua24:4 Yizaake ne mmuwa Yakobo ne Ezawu. Ezawu namuwa ensozi za Seyiri azitwale. Ye Yakobo n'abaana be ne bakkirira e Misiri. 
Joshua24:5 “ ‘Ne ntuma Musa ne Aroni, ne mbonereza Abamisiri ne bye nakolayo; oluvannyuma ne mbaggyayo." 
Joshua24:6 Bwe naggya bajjajjammwe mu Misiri, ne mujja ku nnyanja; Abamisiri ne bawondera bajjajjammwe n'ebigaali n'abeebagazi okutuuka ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa." 
Joshua24:7 Ne bakowoola Omukama abayambe; n'aleeta enzikiza wakati wammwe n'Abamisiri, n'akomyawo ennyanja n'ababuutikira. Mwalabirako ddala n'amaaso gammwe bye nakola Abamisiri. Oluvannyuma mwabeera mu ddungu ebbanga ggwanvu." 
Joshua24:8 Ne mbaleeta mu nsi y'Abaamori abaabeeranga emitala wa Yorudani. Baabalwanyisa, naye ne mbabawa mu mikono gyammwe, ne mbazikiriza mu maaso gammwe, ensi yaabwe ne mugitwala." 
Joshua24:9 Balaki mutabani wa Zippori, kabaka wa Mowabu, bwe yasituka okulwanyisa Yisirayeli, yatumya Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori ajje abavumirire." 
Joshua24:10 Naye saawuliriza Balaamu, wabula ate yabasabira mikisa ku mikisa, ne mbawonya mu mikono gye." 
Joshua24:11 “ ‘Ne musomoka Yorudani ne mujja e Yeriko; abatuuze b'omu kibuga ekyo ne babalwanyisa, n'Abaamori, Abaperizzi, Abakanaani, Abakitti, Abagirugasi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi; era bonna ne mbawaayo mu mikono gyammwe." 
Joshua24:12 Nasindika ennumba ne zibakulemberamu, ne zigenda nga zibagobawo mu maaso gammwe. Ne zigoba ne bakabaka Abaamori bombi; si na kitala kyo, wadde akasaale ko." 
Joshua24:13 Ne mbawa ensi gye mutaateganira, n'ebibuga bye mutaazimba, mwe musula; n'ennimiro z'emizabbibu n'ez'oliva ze mutaasimba, mwe mulya.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Kale nno mutyenga Omukama era mumuweerezenga mu bwesimbu ne mu mazima. Mwessamule balubaale bajjajjammwe be baaweerezanga emitala w'omugga ne mu Misiri, muweerezenga Mukama." 
Joshua24:15 Naye obanga okuweereza Omukama tekibasanyusa, olwa leero mweronderewo gwe mwagala okuweereza, oba balubaale bajjajjammwe be baaweerezanga emitala w'omugga, oba balubaale b'Abaamori bannannyini nsi gye mulimu. Naye nze n'ennyumba yange tujja kuweerezanga Mukama.”" 
Joshua24:16 Abantu ne baanukula nti: “Kikafuuwe, ffe okwabulira Omukama ne tuweereza balubaale abagwira." 
Joshua24:17 Kubanga yali Mukama Katonda waffe eyatuggya, ffe ne bajjajjaffe, mu nsi y'e Misiri, ennyumba y'obuddu, eyakola obubonero obwo obw'amaanyi nga naffe tulaba. Yatukuuma mu lugendo lwonna ne mu mawanga gonna ge twayitamu." 
Joshua24:18 Ye Omukama n'atugoberawo amawanga gonna, omwali n'Abaamori abaabeeranga mu nsi. Naffe tujja kuweereza Mukama, kubanga ye Katonda waffe.”" 
Joshua24:19 Yoswa n'agamba abantu nti: “Temujja kusobola kuweeereza Mukama, kubanga ye Katonda mutuukirivu, Katonda ow'obuggya; tagenda kubasonyiwa nsobi zammwe na bibi byammwe." 
Joshua24:20 Bwe kalibatanda ne muleka Omukama, ne muweereza balubaale abagwira, agenda kwekyusa ababonyeebonye, abasaanyeewo, sso ng'amaze okubakolera ebirungi.”" 
Joshua24:21 Naye abantu ne bagamba Yoswa nti: “Nedda! Tujja kuweerezanga Mukama.” 
Joshua24:22 Yoswa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mmwe mwennyini muli bajulirwa b'ebigambo byammwe nga mulonze kuweerezanga Mukama.” Ne baddamu nti: “Tuli bajulirwa.” 
Joshua24:23 N'abagamba nti: “Kale nno mweggyemu balubaale abagwira be mulina mu mmwe; emitima gyammwe mugiwunzikire eri Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli.” 
Joshua24:24 Abantu ne baanukula Yoswa nti: “Tujja kuweerezanga Mukama Katonda waffe, era tujja kumuwuliranga.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ku olwo Yoswa n'akolera abantu endagaano awo e Sekemu; n'abassizaawo amateeka n'ebiragiro. 
Joshua24:26 Ebintu bino n'abiwandiika mu Kitabo ky'Etteeka lya Katonda. Awo n'addira ejjinja eddene n'alitereeza wansi w'omuvule ogwali okumpi n'ekifo ky'Omukama ekitukuvu. 
Joshua24:27 N'agamba abantu bonna nti: “Mulabe ejjinja lino. Ligenda kutulumiriza ffe; liwulidde ebigambo byonna eby'Omukama by'atugambye. Liribalumiriza bwe mulyegaana Omukama Katonda wammwe.” 
Joshua24:28 Awo n'asiibula abantu, badde buli omu ku busika bwe." 
Joshua24:29 Oluvannyuma, Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu omuweereza w'Omukama, n'afa: yali wa myaka kikumi mu kkumi egy'obukulu." 
Joshua24:30 Ne bamuziika ku busika bwe e Timunati-Sera, obuli mu nsozi za Efurayimu, mu mambuka g'olusozi Gaasi." 
Joshua24:31 Yisirayeli yaweereza Omukama ebbanga lyonna Yoswa ng'akyali mulamu, ne mu biseera by'abakadde abaasigalawo nga Yoswa amaze okufa, abaamanya byonna Omukama bye yali akoledde Yisirayeli." 
Joshua24:32 N'amagumba ga Yozefu Abayisirayeli ge baali baggye e Misiri, ne gaziikibwa e Sekemu, mu butaka bwa Yakobo bwe yali aguze ku Kamori kitaawe wa Sekemu ebitundu bya ffeeza kikumi. Bwe bwafuuka obusika bw'abazzukulu ba Yozefu." 
Joshua24:33 Ne Eleyazari mutabani wa Aroni n'afa, n'aziikibwa e Gibewa, ekibuga ekyali kiweereddwa mutabani we Finekasi, mu nsozi za Efurayimu." 
Judges1:1 Nga Yoswa amaze okufa, Abayisirayeli ne babuuza Omukama nti: “Ani mu ffe anaasooka okutwambukirayo alumbe Abakanaani abalwanyise?”" 
Judges1:2 Omukama n'addamu nti: “Yuda y'ajja okugenda. Ensi ngiwaddeyo mu mikono gye.” 
Judges1:3 Awo ab'ekika kya Yuda ne basaba baganda baabwe ab'ekika kya Simewoni nti: “Mujje tugende mu kitundu ekyatuweebwa tulwanyise Abakanaani, naffe tulibalwanirako ku kitundu kyammwe.” Ab'ekika kya Simewoni ne bagenda nabo." 
Judges1:4 Yuda bwe yalumba, Omukama n'amuwa Abakanaani n'Abaperizzi mu mikono gyabwe, ne babattamu abasajja omutwalo gumu e Bezeki." 
Judges1:5 Ne basanga Adoni-Bezeki e Bezeki ne bamulwanyisa, ne bawangulira ddala Abakanaani n'Abaperizzi." 
Judges1:6 Adoni-Bezeki n'adduka, naye ne bamugoba ne bamukwata, ne bamutemako kyalakisajja n'ebigere ebisajja." 
Judges1:7 Adoni-Bezeki n'agamba nti: “Bakabaka nsanvu abaali batemeddwako kyalakisajja n'ebigere ebisajja baalondalondanga obukunkumuka wansi w'emmeeza yange; nange Omukama ankoze kye nabakola.” Ne bamuleeta mu Yeruzaalemu n'afiira eyo. 
Judges1:8 Abantu ba Yuda ne balumba ekibuga Yeruzaalemu. Ne bakikuba n'obwogi bw'ekitala, ne bakiwamba, ne bakiteekera omuliro." 
Judges1:9 Oluvannyuma abantu ba Yuda ne bakkirira okulwanyisa Abakanaani abaabeeranga mu nsi ey'ensozi, ne mu Negevu ne mu Sefela." 
Judges1:10 Yuda n'alumba Abakanaani ababeeranga mu Keburoni, mu kusooka ekyayitibwanga Kiriyati-Aruba, ne bawangula Sesayi, Akimani ne Talumayi." 
Judges1:11 Ne bava awo ne balumba abaabeeranga e Debiri. Debiri okusooka kyayitibwanga Kiriyati-Seferi. 
Judges1:12 Kalebu n'agamba nti: “Omusajja anaawangula n'awamba Kiriyati-Seferi, nnaamuwa muwala wange Akusa abeere mukazi we.”" 
Judges1:13 Otunyeli, mutabani wa Kenazi, muganda wa Kalebu, mutoowe, n'akiwamba. Kalebu n'amuwa muwala we Akusa abeere mukazi we." 
Judges1:14 Olumu Akusa bwe yajja ewa Otunyeli, Otunyeli n'amupikiriza asabe kitaawe ekibanja. Bwe yabuuka ku ndogoyi, Kalebu n'amubuuza nti: “Oyagala nkukolere ki?”" 
Judges1:15 Omuwala n'amuddamu nti: “Ngirira ekisa. Nga bwe wampa ettaka mu Negevu, mpeerako n'enzizi z'amazzi.” Bw'atyo Kalebu n'amuwa enzizi ez'engulu n'ez'emmanga." 
Judges1:16 Abazzukulu ba mukoddomi wa Musa Omukeni, baava mu Kibuga ky'Enkindu n'abantu ba Yuda ne bambuka mu ddungu lya Yuda mu Negevu, mu bitundu by'e Aradi, ne basenga eyo mu bantu baayo." 
Judges1:17 Ate ab'ekika kya Yuda ne bagenda ne baganda baabwe ab'ekika kya Simewoni ne balumba Abakanaani ababeeranga mu Zefati, ne bakizikiririza ddala, era kwe kukiwa n'erinnya Koruma." 
Judges1:18 Abasajja ba Yuda era ne bawamba Gaza n'ebitundu byakyo, Asukeloni n'ebitundu byakyo ne Ekuroni n'ebitundu byakyo." 
Judges1:19 Omukama yali n'abasajja ba Yuda. Baawamba ensi ey'ensozi, kyokka mu nsenyi tebaasobola kugobamu batuuze baamu, kubanga baalina ebigaali eby'ebyuma." 
Judges1:20 Kalebu ne bamuwa Keburoni, nga Musa bwe yali agambye; yagobamu Abaanaki abasatu." 
Judges1:21 Naye Ababenyamiini tebaasobola kugoba mu Yeruzaalemu Bayebusi abaakibeerangamu, bwe batyo Abayebusi bakyali n'abantu ba Benyamiini mu Yeruzaalemu n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Judges1:22 Ab'ennyumba ya Yozefu ne balumba Beteli; Omukama yali nabo. 
Judges1:23 Baasindika abakessi e Beteli, mu kusooka ekibuga ekyo kyayitibwanga Luzi." 
Judges1:24 Abakessi ne balaba omusajja eyali ava mu kibuga ne bamugamba nti: “Tulage we tuyinza okuyingirira mu kibuga, ggwe tujja kukugirira ekisa.”" 
Judges1:25 N'abalagawo, ekibuga kyonna ne bakikuba n'ekitala, kyokka ye omusajja ne bamutaliza ko n'amaka ge." 
Judges1:26 Omusajja n'asengukira mu nsi y'Abakitti, n'azimbayo ekibuga, n'akituuma Luzi, erinnya lye kikyayitibwa n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Judges1:27 Kyokka Manasse teyasobola kugobawo baali babeera mu Beti-Sewani n'ebibuga byakyo, mu Taanaki n'ebibuga byakyo, mu Dori n'ebibuga byakyo, mu Yibulewamu n'ebibuga byakyo ne mu Megiddo n'ebibuga byakyo, kubanga Abakanaani baamalirira okusigala mu nsi eyo." 
Judges1:28 Naye Yisirayeli bwe yeeyongera amaanyi n'assa Abakanaani ku kasanvu; naye eky'okubagobamu teyakisobola. 
Judges1:29 Ne Efurayimu teyasobola kugoba Bakanaani mu Gezeri, bwe batyo Abakanaani bakyabeera wamu nabo mu Gezeri." 
Judges1:30 Ne Zebuluni teyasobola kugobawo baali babeera mu Kituroni, oba abantu b'e Nawalali, wabula Abakanaani baasigala mu bo, kyokka nga bakola emirimu gy'akasanvu." 
Judges1:31 Aseeri naye teyasobola kugobawo abaabeeranga mu Akko, mu Sidoni, mu Akulabu, mu Akuzibu, mu Afeki ne mu Rekobu;" 
Judges1:32 bwe batyo Abaaseeri ne babeera mu Bakanaani abaabeeranga mu nsi eyo kubanga tebaabagobaamu. 
Judges1:33 Nafutali naye teyasobola kugobawo baali babeera mu Beti-Semesi ne mu Beti-Anati, naye n'asenga mu Bakanaani abaabeeranga mu nsi eyo. Bo abaabeeranga mu Beti-Semesi ne mu Beti-Anati baabakoleranga emirimu gy'akasanvu." 
Judges1:34 Bo Abaamori baagobera Abadaani mu nsozi, tebaabaganya kukka mu nsenyi." 
Judges1:35 Era Abaamori baamalirira okusigala mu Lusozi Eresi, mu Ayijaloni ne mu Saalubimu. Kyokka ennyumba ya Yozefu bwe yeeyongera amaanyi, ne babassa ku kasanvu." 
Judges1:36 Ensalo z'Abaamori zaavanga ku kasozi k'e Akurabbimu ne zituuka e Sela ate ne zeeyongerayo. 
Judges2:1 Malayika w'Omukama yava e Gilugali n'ayambuka e Bokimu, n'agamba nti: “Nabaggya mu Misiri, ne mbaleeta mu nsi gye nalayira okuwa bajjajjammwe. Nagamba nti: ‘Sigenda kumenya ndagaano yange nammwe emirembe gyonna," 
Judges2:2 nammwe temukolanga endagaano n'abantu b'ensi eno, naye mumenyangawo emyaliiro gyabwe.’ Naye mmwe temwampulira. Kiki ekyabakozesa ekyo?" 
Judges2:3 Nange nno mbagamba nti sijja kubabagoberawo. Bajja kubakaluubiririza obulamu ne balubaale baabwe babafuukire omutego.” 
Judges2:4 Malayika w'Omukama bwe yamala okwogera bino byonna eri Abayisirayeli bonna, bo ne bakuba ebiwoobe." 
Judges2:5 Ekifo ne bakituuma Bokimu, ne baweererezaawo Omukama ebitambiro." 
Judges2:6 Yoswa bwe yamala okusiibula abantu, Abayisirayeli ne badda buli omu mu busika bwe, ensi bagitwale." 
Judges2:7 Abantu baaweerezanga Omukama ebbanga lyonna Yoswa ng'akyali mulamu, ne mu biseera by'abakadde abaawangaala okumusinga, abaamanya byonna Omukama bye yali akoledde Yisirayeli." 
Judges2:8 Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu, omuweereza w'Omukama, yafa nga wa myaka kikumi mu kkumi egy'obukulu." 
Judges2:9 Baamuziika mu busika bwe e Timunati-Eresi, mu nsozi za Efurayimu, mu mambuka g'olusozi Gaasi." 
Judges2:10 Ezzadde eryo lyonna nga limaze okugattibwa ku bajjajja baalyo, ne wasitukawo ezzadde eritaamanya ku Mukama ne bye yali akoledde Yisirayeli." 
Judges2:11 Abayisirayeli ne bakola bubi mu maaso g'Omukama, ne baweereza Babaali." 
Judges2:12 Baayabulira Omukama, Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe eyabaggya mu Misiri, ne bagoberera balubaale ab'amawanga agabetoolodde, ne babavunnamira, ne banyiiza Omukama." 
Judges2:13 Baayabulira Omukama ne baweereza Baali ne Baasutoreti. 
Judges2:14 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli, n'abawaayo mu mikono gy'abanyazi ne babanyagulula, ne mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe ababeetoolodde nga tebakyasobola kubagumira." 
Judges2:15 Yisirayeli buli lwe yagendanga okulwana, ng'Omukama abalemesa bawangulwe, nga bwe yali ayogedde era nga ne bwe yali alayidde okubakola; ne balaba nnyo ennaku." 
Judges2:16 Olwo Omukama n'asitusa abalanzi abaabaggyanga mu mikono gy'abaabanyaganga. 
Judges2:17 Naye tebaawuliriza balamuzi baabwe, wabula ate badda mu kukola bwamalaaya ne balubaale n'okubavunnamira. Obuwulize eri ebiragiro by'Omukama bajjajjaabwe bwe baalaga, bo baabusuula mangu; tebaakola nga bajjajjaabwe." 
Judges2:18 Omukama bwe yabateekerangawo omulamuzi, nga Omukama abeera n'omulamuzi n'abanunula mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe mu bbanga lye yamalanga ng'alamula. Anti Omukama yabakwatirwanga ekisa ng'alabye bwe basinda ennaku olw'abaabayigganyanga n'abaabanyigirizanga." 
Judges2:19 Naye omulamuzi bwe yafanga, nga baddayo mu nsobi, nga bakola bubi n'okusinga bajjajjaabwe mu ngeri gye baagobererangamu balubaale n'okubavunnamira. Ne bagaana okuleka empisa zaabwe embi n'obukakanyavu bwabwe." 
Judges2:20 Awo obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli, n'agamba nti: “Kubanga eggwanga lino limenye endagaano gye nateekerawo bajjajjaabwe, ne batampulira," 
Judges2:21 sikyagobyewo mu maaso gaabwe mawanga Yoswa ge yafa tagobyewo," 
Judges2:22 ngeyambise okugeza Yisirayeli, ndabe oba banaakwata amakubo g'Omukama, bagagoberere nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baakola, oba nedda.”" 
Judges2:23 Omukama yali alese amawanga ago ne gasigalira; teyagagobaawo mangu era teyagawaayo mu mikono gya Yoswa. 
Judges3:1 Gano ge mawanga Omukama ge yalekawo okugagezesa Abayisirayeli abaali batabaddeeko mu ntalo z'omu Kanaani; 
Judges3:2 kino yakikola amazadde g'Abayisirayeli abaali batafunye bumanyirivu mu ntalo ezaasooka agayigirize okulwana: 
Judges3:3 abafuzi abataano ab'Abafilisitiini, Abakanaani bonna, Abasidoni n'Abakivi ababeeranga mu nsozi za Lebanoni okuva ku lusozi Baali-Kerumoni okutuuka ku Lebo-Kamati." 
Judges3:4 Gaali ga kugezesa Yisirayeli okulaba oba banaawulira ebiragiro Omukama bye yali awadde bajjajjaabwe ng'ayita mu Musa. 
Judges3:5 Abayisirayeli baabeera wamu n'Abakanaani, Abakitti, Abaamori, Abaperizzi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi." 
Judges3:6 Baawasa bawala baabwe, n'abaabwe ne babafumbiza batabani baabwe, ne baweereza ne balubaale baabwe." 
Judges3:7 Abayisirayeli baakola bubi mu maaso g'Omukama; beerabira Omukama Katonda waabwe ne baweereza Babaali ne Baasera. 
Judges3:8 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli, n'abawaayo mu mikono gya Kasani-Risatayimu, kabaka wa Aramu Nakarayimu. Abayisirayeli ne baweereza buddu Kusani-Risatayimu emyaka munaana." 
Judges3:9 Naye Abayisirayeli ne bawanjagira Omukama, Omukama n'ateerawo Abayisirayeli omununuzi eyabanunula, Otunyeli mutabani wa Kenazi, muto wa Kalebu." 
Judges3:10 Omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gumujjako, n'alamula Yisirayeli. Otunyeli bwe yagenda okutabaala, Omukama n'amuwa Kusani-Risatayimu kabaka wa Aramu mu mikono gye, n'amuwangula." 
Judges3:11 Awo ensi n'eweerako okumala emyaka amakumi ana. Otunyeli mutabani wa Kenazi n'afa. 
Judges3:12 Abayisirayeli ne baddamu okweyisa obubi mu maaso g'Omukama. Omukama kwe kuwaayo Yisirayeli mu buyinza bwa Eguloni kabaka wa Mowabu olw'okweyisa obubi mu maaso ge. 
Judges3:13 Eguloni yagatta eggye n'Abammoni ne Amaleki, n'alumba Yisirayeli n'awamba Ekibuga ky'Enkindu." 
Judges3:14 Abayisirayeli ne baweereza buddu Eguloni kabaka wa Mowabu okumala emyaka kkumi na munaana. 
Judges3:15 Abayisirayeli ne bawanjagira Omukama, n'abawa omununuzi, Ewudi mutabani wa Gera Omubenyamiini. Yali wa nkonokono. Abayisirayeli ne bamutuma ewa Eguloni abatwalireyo ekirabo kyabwe." 
Judges3:16 Ewudi ne yeeweeseza empiima ng'esala ku njuyi zombi, nga ya mukono gumu obuwanvu, n'agyesiba ku kisambi ekya ddyo mu ngoye ze." 
Judges3:17 N'atuusa ekirabo ewa kabaka Eguloni owa Mowabu. Eguloni yali yagejja nnyo. 
Judges3:18 Ewudi bwe yamala okwanjula ekirabo n'asiibula abasajja abaakyetikka. 
Judges3:19 Naye ye bwe yatuuka ku bifaananyi bya balubaale eby'amayinja, okumpi ne Gilugali, n'afunyamu, n'agamba kabaka nti: “Nnina obubaka bwo, ssebo kabaka, bwa kyama.” Awo kabaka n'alagira nti: “Musirike!” Abaweereza be bonna ne bamuviira." 
Judges3:20 Ewudi n'asembera we yali. Yali yekka ng'atudde mu kisenge ekya waggulu mu nnyumba ye mw'awummulira. Ewudi n'amugamba nti: “Nnina obubaka bwo obuvudde ewa Katonda.” Kabaka n'asituka ku ntebe ye. 
Judges3:21 Awo Ewudi n'agolola omukono gwe ogwa kkono, n'asowolayo empiima ku kisambi kye ekya kkono n'agimusogga mu lubuto." 
Judges3:22 Empiima n'eggweera mu lubuto n'ekiti kyayo kyonna n'efulumira mu mugongo. Amasavu gaagibikkira yonna mu lubuto kubanga teyagisikaamu. 
Judges3:23 Ye Ewudi n'agenda ebweru ku kifugi, n'aggala enzigi z'ekisenge ekya waggulu, n'azisiba." 
Judges3:24 Ng'amaze okugenda, abaweereza ne badda, ne basanga ng'enzigi z'omu kisenge ekya waggulu nsibe. Ne bagamba nti: “Ndowooza yeewunguddeko munda mu nnyumba ye ey'okuwummuliramu.”" 
Judges3:25 Nga balinze akabanga okutuusa nga basobeddwa, bwe baalaba taggulawo nzigi za kisenge waggulu, ne bakwata ekisumuluzo ne baggulawo. Gye baakuba amaaso, nga ku mukama waabwe, agudde awo ku ttaka, mufu." 
Judges3:26 Baali bakyalinze, Ewudi n'adduka, n'ayitira ku bifaananyi eby'amayinja, n'addukira e Seyira." 
Judges3:27 Bwe yatuuka eyo n'afuuwa eŋŋombe mu nsozi za Efurayimu, Abayisirayeli ne bakkirira naye okuva mu nsozi, ye ng'abakulembedde." 
Judges3:28 N'abagamba nti “Mungoberere, kubanga Omukama awaddeyo mu mikono gyammwe Mowabu omulabe wammwe.” Ne bakkirira naye, ne bawamba emisomoko gya Yorudani awasomokerwa okulaga mu Mowabu, nga tebakyaganya muntu n'omu kusomoka." 
Judges3:29 Mu budde obwo ne bakuba Abamowabu ng'omutwalo mulamba, abasajja nno ab'amaanyi ate abeesobola; mu bonna tewaali yasumattuka." 
Judges3:30 Ku olwo Yisirayeli n'atoowaza Mowabu, ensi n'eweerako okumala emyaka kinaana." 
Judges3:31 Ewudi yaddirirwa Samugari, mutabani wa Anati, eyakuba Abafilisitiini lukaaga n'omuwunda ogugoba ente. Naye yanunula Yisirayeli." 
Judges4:1 Ewudi ng'amaze okufa, Abayisirayeli baddamu okweyisa obubi mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Judges4:2 Omukama n'abawaayo mu mikono gya Yabini kabaka wa Kanaani eyafugiranga e Kazori. Omuduumizi w'eggye lye nga ye Sisera eyabeeranga e Karoseti-Aggoyimu. 
Judges4:3 Abasajja ba Yisirayeli ne balaajanira Omukama, kubanga Eguloni yalina ebigaali eby'ekyuma lwenda ate ng'abatulugunyizza n'amaanyi okumala emyaka amakumi abiri." 
Judges4:4 Mu budde obwo omukazi omulanzi, Debora, muka Lappidoti, ye yali akulembera Yisirayeli." 
Judges4:5 Yatuulanga wansi w'Olukindu lwa Debora, wakati wa Rama ne Beteli mu nsozi za Efurayimu. Awo abantu we bajjanga okubasalirawo ensonga zaabwe." 
Judges4:6 Yatumya Baraki mutabani wa Abinowamu ow'e Kedesi mu Nafutali, n'amugamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli si yalagidde? Genda okunge abasajja lukumi okuva mu bantu ba Nafutali ne mu bantu ba Zebuluni ogende nabo ku lusozi Tabori." 
Judges4:7 Nze nzija kuseemyaseemya Sisera omuduumizi w'eggye lya Yabini ajje ku Kiwonvu Kisoni n'ebigaali bye n'abatabaazi be, mmuweeyo mu mikono gyo.”" 
Judges4:8 Baraki n'amuddamu nti: “Bw'ogenda nange, nnaagenda; bw'otogenda nange, nange sijja kugenda.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora n'amuddamu nti: “Kale nzija kugenda naawe; naye manya nti ku lutalo luno lw'ogendako anaafuna ettendo taabe ggwe, kubanga omukazi Omukama gw'anaawa okuwangula Sisera.” Debora n'asitula n'agenda ne Baraki e Kedesi." 
Judges4:10 Baraki n'akunga Zebuluni ne Nafutali e Kedesi, abasajja omutwalo gumu ne bamugoberera, ne Debora n'agenda naye." 
Judges4:11 Kati nno Keberi Omukeni yali ayawukanye ku banne bwe bava mu Kayini, ne ku bazzukulu ba Kobabu mukoddomi wa Musa, ng'asimbye weema ye ku muti omunene ogw'e Zaanannimu ekiri mu Kedesi." 
Judges4:12 Bwe baabuulira Sisera nti Baraki mutabani wa Abinowamu ayambuse ku lusozi Tabori," 
Judges4:13 n'akuŋŋaanya ebigaali bye byonna olwenda eby'ekyuma, n'abantu be bonna okuva e Karoseti-Aggoyimu bagende ku Kiwonvu Kisoni." 
Judges4:14 Debora awo n'agamba Baraki nti: “Situka olumbe, kubanga olwa leero Omukama lw'akuwadde Sisera mu mikono gyo. Omukama si y'akukulembeddemu?” Baraki n'akkirira okuva ku lusozi Tabori n'abasajja omutwalo gumu nga bamugoberera." 
Judges4:15 Baraki bwe yalumba, Omukama n'atta n'obwogi bw'ekitala Sisera, eggye lye lyonna n'ebigaali bye byonna. Sisera n'abuuka ku kigaali kye n'addukira ku bigere." 
Judges4:16 Baraki n'agoba ebigaali n'eggye okutuukira ddala e Karoseti-Aggoyimu. Eggye lya Sisera lyonna ne littibwa n'ekitala; tewaali yawonawo. 
Judges4:17 Sisera n'addukira ku bigere n'agenda ku weema ya Yayeli muka Keberi Omukeni, kubanga Yabini kabaka w'e Kazori baali bategeeragana bulungi ne Keberi Omukeni." 
Judges4:18 Yayeli n'afuluma okusisinkana Sisera, n'amugamba nti: “Kyama Mukama wange, kyama ewange, totya.” N'ayingira mu weema ye, Yayeli n'amubikkako olugoye." 
Judges4:19 N'agamba Yayeli nti: “Mpaayo ku tuzzi, ennyonta ennuma.” Yayeli n'asumulula endyanga y'amata n'amuwa n'anywa, n'addamu okumubikkako." 
Judges4:20 Sisera n'amugamba nti: “Yimirira awo mu mulyango gwa weema, bwe wajjawo abuuza nti: ‘Muno mulimu omuntu?’ mugambe nti: ‘Nedda.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Naye Yayeli muka Keberi n'akwata enkondo ya weema, n'abaka n'ennyondo, n'asooba n'agenda we yali nga yeebase olw'obukoowu, n'amukomerera enkondo mu luba n'emuyitamu n'egukka mu ttaka, n'afa." 
Judges4:22 Baraki naye n'atuuka ng'anoonya Sisera. Yayeli n'afuluma okumusisinkana, n'amugamba nti: “Jjangu nkulage omuntu gw'onoonya.” N'ayingira naye. Gye yakuba amaaso, nga ku Sisera agalamidde awo mufu, ng'enkondo ya weema emuyise mu luba." 
Judges4:23 Ku olwo Katonda n'atoowaza Yabini kabaka wa Kanaani mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli. Abayisirayeli ne beeyongeranga okunyigiriza n'amaanyi Yabini kabaka wa 
Judges4:24 Kanaani okutuusa lwe baasaanyaawo Yabini kabaka wa Kanaani. 
Judges5:1 Ku olwo Debora ne Baraki mutabani wa Abinowamu ne bayimba oluyimba luno nti: 
Judges5:2 “Abagabe bwe beesowolayo mu Yisirayeli, abantu bwe beewaayo kyeyagalire, mutendereze Omukama." 
Judges5:3 “Muwulire, bakabaka, mutege amatu, mmwe abakungu; nze, nzija kuyimbira Omukama, nnaamutendereza mu nnyimba Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Judges5:4 Mukama, bwe wajja ng'ova mu Seyiri, bwe wasimbula ekigere okuva mu nsi y'e Edomu, ensi yakankana, n'eggulu ne litonnya, n'ebire ne bitonnya amazzi." 
Judges5:5 “Ensozi ne zikankana mu maaso g'Omukama, Omukama ono ow'oku Sinayi, mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Judges5:6 “Mu budde bwa Samugari mutabani wa Anati, mu budde bwa Yayeli, amakubo nga makalu; abatambuze nga bakwata bukubo busaliikiriza." 
Judges5:7 “Abatuuze mu byalo baggwaamu; ddala baggwaamu mu Yisirayeli, okutuusa lwe nasituka, nze Debora, okutuusa lwe nasituka, omuzadde mu Yisirayeli." 
Judges5:8 “Bwe baalonda balubaale abaggya, olutalo ne lubajjira ku mulyango gw'ekibuga. Naye ani yalaba ku ngabo oba effumu mu mitwalo ena egya Yisirayeli?" 
Judges5:9 “Omutima gwange guli n'abafuga Yisirayeli, guli n'abo abeewaayo kyeyagalire; mutendereze Omukama." 
Judges5:10 “Mmwe abeebagadde endogoyi enjeru, nammwe abatudde ku biwempe byammwe, nammwe abali ku bigere, muwulirize:" 
Judges5:11 amaloboozi g'abalasi b'obusaale abatudde ku kyesero; batontoma ebikolwa by'Omukama ebituukirivu, ebikolwa by'abafuga Yisirayeli eby'obutuukirivu. “Olwo eggye ly'Omukama ne likkirira ku miryango gy'ekibuga." 
Judges5:12 “Situka, situka, Debora; situka, situka, yimba oluyimba! Situka, Baraki, owambe abasibe bo, mutabani wa Abinowamu!" 
Judges5:13 “Abaasigalawo ne bakkirira eri abakungu; abatabaazi b'Omukama ne bakkirira gye ndi ng'abazira. 
Judges5:14 “Baava mu Efurayimu ne bakkirira mu kiwonvu; Benyamiini ng'akuva mabega n'abantu bo. Abagabe baava mu Makiri ne bakkirira, ne mu Zebuluni abo abakutte omuggo gw'obuduumizi." 
Judges5:15 “Abalangira ba Yissakari baali ne Debora, ye Yissakari yali ne Baraki, n'amukkiriza mu kiwonvu. “Mu kika kya Rubeni mwalimu okwerowooza nnyo." 
Judges5:16 Lwaki ggwe wasigala mu bisibo, okuwuliriza abafuuyira amagana emirere? Mu kika kya Rubeni mwalimu okwerowooza ennyo." 
Judges5:17 “Gileyaadi yasigala mitala wa Yorudani. Ate Daani, lwaki yasigala ku byombo? Aseeri yasigala ku lubalama nga yeewummulidde mu myalo gye." 
Judges5:18 “Abantu ba Zebuluni baawaayo obulamu bwabwe, ne Nafutali bwe yakola, gy'ali waggulu ku nsozi z'ensi." 
Judges5:19 “Bakabaka ne bajja, ne balwana; bakabaka b'e Kanaani baalwanira e Taanaki ku Mazzi g'e Megiddo, naye tebaatwala munyago gwa ffeeza." 
Judges5:20 “Zaalwana emmunyeenye nga ziyima mu ggulu, Zaayima mu mukumbo gwazo ne zirwanyisa Sisera." 
Judges5:21 “Engezi y'e Kisoni yabakuluggusa; engezi ey'edda, engezi y'e Kisoni. Simbula ekigere, mwoyo gwange. Guma!" 
Judges5:22 “Olwo ebiganja by'embalaasi ne bikuba omusinde, nga bwe zigenda ziguluka, bwe ziguluka embalaasi ze ez'amaanyi." 
Judges5:23 “Malayika w'Omukama n'agamba: ‘Vumirira Merozi, vumirira ne ssekuvumirira abakisulamu, kubanga tebajja kuyamba Mukama, kuyamba Mukama kulwanyisa ba maanyi.’" 
Judges5:24 “Yayeli, oli nnamukisa mu bakazi bonna; muka Keberi Omukeni, oli nnamukisa mu bakazi bonna abasula mu weema." 
Judges5:25 “Yasaba mazzi, n'amuwa mata; Yamuwa bbongo mu kibya ky'abakungu." 
Judges5:26 “Omukono gwe gwakunuukiriza enkondo, omukono gwe ogwa ddyo ne gubaka ennyondo y'abafundi; yakuba Sisera n'amubetenta omutwe, n'amwasa oluba, n'aluwummula." 
Judges5:27 “Yakka ku bigere bye n'agwa awo, yakka, n'agalamira; yakka ku bigere bye n'agwa awo; we yakka we yagwa, nga mufu." 
Judges5:28 “Ayima mu ddirisa n'atunula wansi; Nnyina Sisera n'ayisa mu katimba n'aleekaana: ‘Lwaki ekigaali kye kiruddeyo? Lwaki emisinde gy'ekigaali kye gikeereye?’ 
Judges5:29 “N'amuddamu asinga obugezi mu bambejja be, ate naye nga bwe yeddamu:" 
Judges5:30 ‘Kati tebakuŋŋaanya na kugabana munyago? Buli mutabaazi omwandu gwe: omuwala omu oba babiri; omunyago gwa Sisera ze ngoye eza langi entobeke, ogwange: kitambaala ekya langi entobeke, oba bibiri olw'obulago bwange.’" 
Judges5:31 “Mukama, bonna abalabe bo bazikirire! Naye abo abakwagala babeere ng'enjuba bw'evaayo n'amaanyi gaayo gonna.” Awo ensi n'eweerako okumala emyaka amakumi ana." 
Judges6:1 Abayisirayeli baakola bubi mu maaso g'Omukama, n'abawaayo mu mikono gy'Abamidiyaani okumala emyaka musanvu." 
Judges6:2 Midiyaani bwe yabanyigiriza ennyo, ne beekolera obwekwekero mu nsozi, empuku n'obufo obwesiifu." 
Judges6:3 Yisirayeli bwe yamalanga okusiga, Abamidiyaani n'Abaamaleki n'abalala abantu ab'ebuvanjuba nga babalumba." 
Judges6:4 Baasiisira mu bo ne boonoona ebirime by'ensi okutuukira ddala e Gaza, nga tebalekaawo kaliibwa n'akamu mu Yisirayeli, si ndiga, si nte, si ndogoyi;" 
Judges6:5 kubanga bajjanga n'amagana gaabwe, ne weema zaabwe, nga bakutte ng'enzige, akeesedde k'abantu n'eŋŋamiya; baazindanga ensi okugizikiriza." 
Judges6:6 Yisirayeli n'adooba nnyo olwa Midiyaani; Abayisirayeli ne balaajanira Omukama. 
Judges6:7 Abayisirayeli bwe baalaajanira Omukama olwa Midiyaani," 
Judges6:8 Omukama n'abatumira omusajja omulanzi eyabagamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba nti: ‘Nze nabaggya mu Misiri, ne mbaggya mu nnyumba y'obuddu," 
Judges6:9 nabawonya mu mikono gya Misiri n'egy'abo bonna abaababonyaabonyanga; nabagobawo mu maaso gammwe, ne mbawa ensi yaabwe." 
Judges6:10 Nabagamba nti: “Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe; temusinzanga balubaale b'Abaamori bannannyini nsi mwe muli.” Naye mwagaana okuwulira eddoboozi lyange.’ ” 
Judges6:11 Malayika w'Omukama n'ajja, n'atuula mu muvule ogwali e Ofura, ogwa Yowasi ow'omu nyumba ya Abiyezeri. Mutabani we Gidewoni yali awuula ŋŋano mu ssogolero ly'evviini, atere agikweke Abamidiyaani." 
Judges6:12 Malayika w'Omukama n'amulabikira, n'amugamba nti: “Omukama ali naawe, ggwe omutabaazi omuzira!”" 
Judges6:13 Gidewoni n'amuddamu nti: “Naye, ssebo, oba Omukama ali naffe, lwaki bino byonna bitugwiridde? Ebyewuunyisa bye byonna biruwa bajjajjaffe bye baatunyumizaako, ne bagamba nti: ‘Omukama si ye yatuggya mu Misiri?’ Naye kati Omukama atwabulidde, atuwaddeyo mu mikono gy'Abamidiyaani.”" 
Judges6:14 Omukama n'akyukira gy'ali n'amugamba nti: “Genda n'amaanyi g'olina ago owonye Yisirayeli mu mikono gya Midiyaani. Si nze nkutumye?” 
Judges6:15 Gidewoni n'amwanukula nti: “Mukama, Yisirayeli nnaamulokola ntya? Ennyumba mwe nva y'esembayo mu Manasse; nange nze nsembayo mu maka ga kitange.”" 
Judges6:16 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Nzija kubeera naawe. Ojja kuwangula Abamidiyaani ng'awangula omuntu omu.” 
Judges6:17 Gidewoni n'amuddamu nti: “Obanga nsanze ekisa mu maaso go, mpa akabonero akakakasa nti ggwe oyogera nange." 
Judges6:18 Tova wano okutuusa lwe nnadda gy'oli nkuleetere ekitambiro, nkikuweereze.” Ye n'amuddamu nti: “Nzija kulindirira okutuusa lw'onodda.”" 
Judges6:19 Gidewoni n'ayingira, n'afumba akabuzi, n'addira n'efa y'eŋŋano n'afumba emigaati egitazimbulukuse. Ennyama n'agissa mu kisero, omucuuzi n'agussa mu katamu, byonna n'abitwala n'abimuweereza wansi w'omuvule." 
Judges6:20 Malayika wa Katonda n'amugamba nti: “Ddira ennyama n'emigaati egitazimbulukuse obisse ku jjinja liri, n'omucuuzi ogufuke kuli.” Bwe yakola." 
Judges6:21 Malayika w'Omukama n'agolola omuggo gwe gwe yali akutte mu ngalo, n'akoona n'akasongezo ku nnyama n'emigaati egitazimbuluse. Omuliro ne guva mu lwazi ne gusenkenya ennyama n'emigaati egitazimbulukuse. Malayika w'Omukama n'abula." 
Judges6:22 Gidewoni bwe yalaba nti abadde malayika wa Mukama, n'agamba nti: “Nga ndabye! Kubanga ndabye malayika w'Omukama maaso ku maaso.”" 
Judges6:23 Naye Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Emirembe gibeere naawe! Totya, tojja kufa!”" 
Judges6:24 Gidewoni awo n'azimbirawo Omukama omwaliiro, n'agutuuma 'Omukama Ddembe'. N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero gukyali mu Ofura eky'abazzukulu ba Abiyezeri." 
Judges6:25 Ekiro ekyo, Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Kwata ente ya kitaawo ennume, enkulu obulungi, eweza emyaka omusanvu. Menyawo omwaliiro gwa Baali kitaawo gwe yamuzimbira, n'empagi eriraanye omwaliiro ogitemewo." 
Judges6:26 Zimbira Omukama Katonda awo ku lwazi olwo omwaliiro, oddire ente ennume enkulu obulungi ogiweereze ku ntuumu y'enku z'empagi gye watemye, ng'ekitambiro ekyokye.”" 
Judges6:27 Gidewoni n'alonda abasajja kkumi mu baweereza be, n'akola ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde. Yalondawo kubikola kiro, si misana, olw'okutya ennyumba ya kitaawe n'abasajja b'ekibuga ekyo." 
Judges6:28 Abasajja b'ekibuga ekyo bwe baazuukuka ku makya, ne kibabuukako okulaba ng'omwaliiro gwa Baali gwamenyeddwa n'empagi ya Asera eyali eguliraanye ng'etemeddwa, ate ng'ente ennume enkulu obulungi eweerezeddwa ng'ekitambiro ekyokye ku mwaliro ogwakazimbwawo." 
Judges6:29 Ne beebuuza nti: “Ani akoze kino?” Bwe baabuuliriza ne babagamba nti: “Gidewoni mutabani wa Yowasi ye yakoze bino byonna.” 
Judges6:30 Ne bagamba Yowasi nti: “Mutabani wo muleete; asaanira kufa, kubanga yamenyeewo omwaliiro gwa Baali n'atema n'empagi ya Asera ebadde eriranyeewo.”" 
Judges6:31 Yowasi n'abaddamu bonna abaali bamwebunguludde nti: “Mwagala kulwanirira Baali? Mwagala kumuwonya? Anaalwanirira Baali we bunaakeerera anaaba attiddwa. Oba Baali lubaale, ajja kwerwanako nga waliwo amenya omwaliiro gwe.”" 
Judges6:32 Okuva ku olwo Gidewoni ne bamutuuma Yerubbaali, nga bagamba nti: “Ka Baali amulwanyise, kubanga yamenyawo omwaliiro gwe.”" 
Judges6:33 Olumu Abamidiyaani bonna n'Abaamaleki n'abantu ab'ebuvanjuba, beekuŋŋaanya ne basomoka Yorudani, ne basiisira mu kiwonvu kya Yezureeli." 
Judges6:34 Naye omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gujja ku Gidewoni, n'afuuwa eŋŋombe, n'akunga Abiyezeri amugoberere." 
Judges6:35 Era yatuma ababaka wonna mu Manasse n'abakunga bamugoberere; naye n'amugoberera; n'atuma n'ababaka abalala mu Aseeri, Zebuluni, Nafutali; nabo ne bajja okumusisinkana." 
Judges6:36 Gidewoni n'agamba Katonda nti: “Oba onoonunula Yisirayeli n'omukono gwange nga bwe wagamba," 
Judges6:37 laba, nzija kussa eddiba ly'endiga mu gguuliro. Omusulo bwe gunaaba ku ddiba kwokka, ettaka okwetooloola nga kkalu, nnaamanya ng'onoowonya Yisirayeli n'omukono gwange nga bwe wagamba.”" 
Judges6:38 Era bwe kyaba. Bwe yazuukuka, eddiba, n'alikamulamu omusulo ekikopo kiramba." 
Judges6:39 N'ayongera n'agamba Katonda nti: “Toleka busungu bwo kunneesererako; nzikiriza nziremu nkusabe, ku mulundi guno ngezeeko omulundi omulala gumu gwokka n'eddiba. Ku luno, eddiba lyokka lye liba libeera ekkalu, ettaka lyo litobe omusulo.”" 
Judges6:40 Katonda n'akola atyo ekiro ekyo nga bwe yali asabye; eddiba lyokka lye lyali ekkalu, naye nga ku ttaka awalala wonna wabisse omusulo." 
Judges7:1 Ku makya Yerubbaali (ye Gidewoni) bwe yazuukuka, n'abantu bonna abaali naye, n'asiisira kumpi ne Eni-Karodi; lwo olusiisira lwa Midiyaani nga lubali mu kiwonvu, kumpi n'olusozi More." 
Judges7:2 Omukama n'agamba Gidewoni nti: “Abantu bo bayitiridde obungi nze okubawa Midiyaani mu mikono gyabwe, sikulwa nga Yisirayeli anneewaanirako nti: ‘Maanyi gange ge gannunudde.’" 
Judges7:3 Kale nno langirira nga bonna bawulira nti: ‘Atidde n'eyeekanzeemu addeyo, ave ku lusozi Gileyaadi.’ ” Abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri ne badda eka, ne wasigalawo omutwalo gumu gwokka." 
Judges7:4 Omukama n'agamba Gidewoni nti: “Era abantu bakyali bangi. Batwale ku mugga, eyo gye nzija okubalondoberamu. Bwe nnaagamba nti: ‘Ono agende naawe,’ oyo anaagenda; bwe nnaagamba nti: ‘Oyo tagenda naawe,’ tajja kugenda.”" 
Judges7:5 Awo Gidewoni abantu n'abakkiriza ku mugga; Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Abanaakomba obukombi amazzi ng'embwa basse ku luuyi olumu, ate abo abanaafukamira ne banywa basse ku luuyi olulala.”" 
Judges7:6 Abaakomba amazzi ng'ekibatu kigatuusa mu kamwa, baali abasajja ebikumi bisatu; abantu bonna abalala baanywa bafukamidde." 
Judges7:7 Omukama n'agamba Gidewoni nti: “N'abasajja ebikumi ebisatu abakombye obukombi amazzi nzija kukununula, nkuwe Abamidiyaani mu mikono gyo. Abalala bonna buli omu addeyo ewuwe.”" 
Judges7:8 Gidewoni n'asigazaawo abasajja bikumi bisatu bokka, ne batwala emmere n'eŋŋombe ebibadde ebya bali; abalala bonna n'abalagira baddeyo mu weema zaabwe. Olusiisira lwa Midiyaani lwamuli awo wammanga mu kiwonvu." 
Judges7:9 Ekiro ekyo kyennyini Omukama n'agamba Gidewoni nti: “Situka, serengeta olumbe olusiisira, kubanga nduwadde mu mikono gyo. 1" 
Judges7:10 Bw'oba otidde okulumba, kkirira n'omuweereza wo Pura." 
Judges7:11 Bw'onoowulira bye boogera, ojja kuguma olumbe olusiisira.” N'aserengeta n'omuweereza we Pura ku njegooyego z'olusiisira awaali abakuumi abalwetoolodde." 
Judges7:12 Abamidiyaani n'Abaamaleki n'abantu ab'ebuvanjuba baali bagumbye awo mu kiwonvu nga bali ng'enzige obungi; eŋŋamiya zaabwe nazo nga butabala, obungi nga ziri ng'omusenyu ku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Judges7:13 Gidewoni we yatuukira nga waliwo eyali anyumiza munne ekirooto nti: “Naloose ekirooto; nalabye omugaati gwa sayiri nga guyiringita, ne gukka mu lusiisira lw'Abamidiyaani. Bwe gwatuuse ku weema, ne gugikoona, n'egwa ne yeevuunika n'esaanawo.”" 
Judges7:14 Munne kwe kuddamu nti: “Ekyo si kirala, wabula kitala kya Gidewoni, mutabani wa Yowasi Omuyisirayeli. Katonda awaddeyo Midiyaani n'ensiisira yonna mu mikono gye.”" 
Judges7:15 Gidewoni bwe yawulira ekirooto n'endootolola yaakyo, n'asinza, n'addayo mu lusiisira lwa Yisirayeli n'agamba nti: “Musituke, kubanga Omukama awaddeyo olusiisira lwa Midiyaani mu mikono gyammwe.”" 
Judges7:16 Abasajja ebikumi ebisatu n'abagabanyaamu ebibinja bisatu, n'abawa eŋŋombe n'ensuwa enkalu nga zirimu ebitawuliro by'omuliro." 
Judges7:17 N'abagamba nti: “Mutunule, kye mulaba nkola, nammwe kye muba mukola. Bwe nnaatuuka ku njegooyego z'olusiisira, kye nnaakola, nammwe kye munaakola." 
Judges7:18 Bwe nnaafuuwa eŋŋombe era n'abo abali nange, nammwe eyo yonna okwetooloola olusiisira mufuuwe eŋŋombe nga bwe muleekaanira kumu nti: ‘Ku lwa Katonda ne Gidewoni!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Gidewoni n'abasajja ebikumi ebisatu abaali naye ne batuuka ku njegooyego z'olusiisira ekisisimuka ekya wakati nga kitandika, ng'abakuumi kye bajje bakyusibwe. Ne bafuuwa eŋŋombe n'okwasa ensuwa ze baali bakutte." 
Judges7:20 Ebibinja ebisatu ne bifuuwa eŋŋombe, ne baasa n'ensuwa, ne bakwata ebitawuliro ne kkono, mu ddyo nga bakutte eŋŋombe ez'okufuuwa. Ne baleekaana nti: “Ekitala ku lwa Mukama ne Gidewoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Buli omu yasigala mu kifo kye okwetooloola olusiisira lw'abalabe. Bonna abaali mu lusiisira ne baduma nga bwe baleekaana, ne badduka." 
Judges7:22 Abasajja ebikumi ebisatu bwe baafuuwa eŋŋombe, Omukama n'aleeta okutabuka mu lusiisira; buli omu n'akyukira munne n'ekitala, ne badduka nga bwe baleekaana. Ne badduka okutuuka e Beti-Sitta ng'alaga e Zereda okutuukira ddala ku nsalo ya Abeli-Mekola e Tabbati." 
Judges7:23 Abasajja Abayisirayeli ne bayitibwa okuva mu Nafutali, Aseeri ne Manasse yenna, ne bawondera Midiyaani." 
Judges7:24 Gidewoni n'atuma ababaka wonna mu nsozi za Efurayimu ng'agamba nti: “Mukkirire, mulumbe Midiyaani mubawambeko enzizi okutuuka e Beti-Bera ko ne Yorudani.” N'akoowoola abasajja bonna aba Efurayimu, ne babawambako enzizi okutuuka e Beti-Bera ko ne Yorudani." 
Judges7:25 Ne bawamba abakungu babiri ab'omu Midiyaani, Orebi ne Zeebi. Orebi ne bamuttira ku Jjinja lya Orebi; Zeebi ne bamuttira ku ssogolero lya Zeebi. Ne bawondera Midiyaani, ne batwalira Gidewoni emitala wa Yorudani gye yali emitwe ogwa Orebi n'ogwa Zeebi." 
Judges8:1 Abasajja aba Efurayimu ne banenya Gidewoni nti: “Watukola ki kino, n'ototuyita ng'ogenda okulwanyisa Midiyaani?” Ne bamuyombesa n'amaanyi." 
Judges8:2 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Nkoze ki nno okulabira ku mmwe kye mwakola? Emizabbibu Efurayimu gy'anoze tegisinga egya Abiyezeri gy'akungudde? 
Judges8:3 Abakungu ba Midiyaani, Orebi ne Zeebi, Katonda abawaddeyo mu mikono gyammwe; nze nkoze ki ng'okigeraageranyizza n'ekyammwe?” Bwe yayogera ebyo, obusungu bwe baamulinako ne bukkakkana." 
Judges8:4 Gidewoni bwe yatuuka ku Yorudani, n'amusomoka wamu n'abasajja ebikumi ebisatu, naye ng'okuwondera abadduka kubakooyezza." 
Judges8:5 N'asaba abasajja b'e Sukkoti nti: “Mbeegayiridde, abantu be ndi nabo mubawe ku migaati egy'oluwewere, kubanga bakooye, ate nkyawondera Zeba ne Zalumunna bakabaka ba Midiyaani.”" 
Judges8:6 Abakungu b'omu Sukkoti ne baanukula nti: “Emikono gya Zeba ne Zalumunna gikuli mu ngalo tulyoke tuwe eggye lyo emigaati?” 
Judges8:7 Gidewoni n'abagamba nti: “Kale, Katonda bw'anampa Zeba ne Zalumunna ne mbakwata, emibiri gyammwe nzija kugitaagulataagula n'amaggwa ag'omu ddungu ne kirobo.”" 
Judges8:8 Bwe yava eyo n'ayambuka e Penuweli, abaayo n'abagamba kye kimu, nabo ne bamwanukula ng'abasajja be Sukkoti bwe baali baanukudde." 
Judges8:9 Kwe kugamba abasajja b'e Penuweli nti: “Bwe nkomawo n'obuwanguzi, omunaala guno nzija kugumenyawo.”" 
Judges8:10 Zeba ne Zalumunna baali bawummuddeko mu Karukori n'eggye lyabwe lyonna, abasajja ng'omutwalo gumu mu enkumi ttaano, abaali basigaddewo ku ggye ly'abantu b'ebuvanjuba; abasajja omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri abakwasi b'ebitala baali battiddwa." 
Judges8:11 Gidewoni yayambukira mu kkubo ly'abalunzi ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba wa Noba ne Yogubewa n'azinduukiriza eggye nga teririndiridde. 
Judges8:12 Zeba ne Zalumunna ne badduka; Gidewoni n'abagoba, bakabaka bombi aba Midiyaani, Zeba ne Zalumunna, n'abawamba; eggye lyonna ne libuna emiwabo." 
Judges8:13 Gidewoni mutabani wa Yowasi n'akomawo ng'ava mu lutalo, n'ayitira ku kasozi k'e Eresi." 
Judges8:14 Yakwata omuvubuka omu ow'omu basajja b'e Sukkoti n'abaako by'amubuuza. Omuvubuka n'amuwandiikira amannya g'abasajja nsanvu mu musanvu abakungu era abakadde b'ekibuga Sukkoti. 
Judges8:15 N'ajja eri abasajja b'e Sukkoti n'abagamba nti: “Zeba ne Zalumunna baabano be mwankiinira nga mugamba nti: ‘Omaze okuwamba Zeba ne Zalumunna tulyoke tuwe emigaati abasajja bo abakooye?’ ” 
Judges8:16 N'akwata abakadde b'omu kibuga, n'ataagulataagula abasajja b'e Sukkoti n'amaggwa g'omu ddungu ne kirobo." 
Judges8:17 Yamenyawo era omunaala gw'e Penuweli abasajja b'omu kibuga n'abatta. 
Judges8:18 N'abuuza Zeba ne Zalumunna nti: “Abantu be mwattira e Tabori baali ba ngeri ki?” Ne baddamu nti: “Baali bakufaanana; buli omu ku bo ng'ali nga mutabani wa kabaka.” 
Judges8:19 N'abagamba nti: “Baali baganda bange, baana ba nnyabo. Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, singa mwabaleka, nange sandibasse.”" 
Judges8:20 N'alagira Yeteri mutabani we omuggulanda nti: “Situka, obatte.” Naye omulenzi teyasowola kitala kubanga yali atya; yali akyali mwana bwana." 
Judges8:21 Zeba ne Zalumunna ne bamugamba nti: “Jjangu, ggwe otwettire wennyini, anti ng'omusajja bw'ali, n'amaanyi ge.” Gidewoni n'asituka n'atta Zeba ne Zalumunna, n'atwala n'obulege obuweese ng'omwezi obwalinga mu bulago bw'eŋŋamiya zaabwe." 
Judges8:22 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba Gidewoni nti: “Tufuge ggwe, mutabani wo, ne muzzukulu wo, kubanga otuwonyezza mu mikono gya Midiyaani.”" 
Judges8:23 Gidewoni n'abaddamu nti: “Sijja kubafuga, ne mutabani wange tajja kubafuga, wabula Mukama y'anaabafuga.”" 
Judges8:24 Gidewoni n'abagamba era nti: “Kimu kyokka kye mbasaba: buli omu annondere mu munyago gwe empeta.” Engeri gye baali Abayisimayeli, baali bamanyidde okwambala empeta eza zaabu." 
Judges8:25 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Tujja kuziwa.” Ne baaliira olugoye, buli omu n'asuulako empeta okuva mu munyago gwe." 
Judges8:26 Empeta ze yasaba ne ziweza sekeli eza zaabu lukumi mu lusanvu, nga togasseeko bulege obuweese ng'omwezi, n'empeta ez'oku matu, n'eminagiro gya bakabaka b'e Midiyaani gye bambala, era nga tobaliddeeko mikuufu egy'omu bulago bw'eŋŋamiya." 
Judges8:27 Gidewoni n'akolamu efodi n'agiteeka mu kibuga kye e Ofura; Yisirayeli yenna n'akola obwamalaaya nayo eyo; efodi n'efuukira Gidewoni n'amaka ge gonna omutego. 
Judges8:28 Midiyaani n'atoowazibwa mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli; tebaasobola kuddayo kwejugumula; ensi n'eweerako okumala emyaka ana ebbanga lyonna Gidewoni lye yamala ng'akyali mulamu. 
Judges8:29 Yerubbaali mutabani wa Yowasi n'adda ewaabwe abeere eyo. 
Judges8:30 Gidewoni yalina abaana be kennyini nsanvu, kubanga yalina abakazi bangi." 
Judges8:31 Mukazi we eyabeeranga e Sekemu naye yamuzaalira omwana n'amutuuma Abimeleki. 
Judges8:32 Gidewoni mutabani wa Yowasi n'afa ng'akaddiyidde ddala, n'aziikibwa ku kiggya kya kitaawe Yowasi e Ofura ekya bazzukulu ba Abiyezeri." 
Judges8:33 Gidewoni olwamala luti okufa, Abayisirayeli ne baddamu okukola obwamalaaya ne Babaali. Beeteerawo Baali-Beriti nga lubaale waabwe," 
Judges8:34 nga tebakyajjukira Mukama Katonda waabwe eyali abawonyezza mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe abaabali ku njuyi zonna. 
Judges8:35 Era tebaagirira kisa nnyumba ya Yerubbaali, oba Gidewoni, olw'ebirungi byonna bye yali akoledde Yisirayeli." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mutabani wa Yerubbaali n'agenda mu baganda ba nnyina e Sekemu, n'abagamba, ko n'ab'ekika kya nnyina bonna, nti:" 
Judges9:2 “Mubuuze abantu bonna ab'e Sekemu nti: ‘Kiruwa kye musinga okwagala, bazzukulu ba Yerubbaali bonna ensanvu okubafuga oba omu okubafuga?’ Mujjukire nti nze ndi musaayi gwammwe ddala.”" 
Judges9:3 Bakojjaabe ne bamwogerako eri abantu bonna ab'e Sekemu, omutima gwabwe ne gwewunzikira ku Abimeleki, nga bagamba nti: “Muganda waffe.”" 
Judges9:4 Ne bamuwa sekeli za ffeeza nsanvu okuva mu kiggwa kya Baali-Beriti; Abimeleki n'azeyamba okugulirira abasajja endalagge, ne bamugobereranga." 
Judges9:5 N'ajja mu nnyumba ya kitaawe e Ofura n'atta baganda be ensanvu, batabani ba Yerubbaali, ku jjinja limu. Naye Yotamu, mutabani wa Yerubbaali asinga obuto, n'awonawo kubanga yeekweka." 
Judges9:6 Abatuuze b'omu Sekemu bonna n'ab'e Beti-Millo ne bakuŋŋaana, ne bagenda bassa Abimeleki ku bwakabaka, ku muvule ogwabeeranga e Sekemu." 
Judges9:7 Bwe baakibuulira Yotamu, n'agenda ayimirira ku ntikko y'olusozi Gerizimu, n'ayogerera waggulu gye bali nti: “Mumpulirize mmwe abantu b'omu Sekemu, ne Katonda alyoke abawulirize." 
Judges9:8 “Olumu emiti gyagenda gisiige omuzigo kabaka anaagifuga; ne gigamba omuti gwa oliva nti: ‘Tufuge.’ 
Judges9:9 Omuti gwa oliva ne gugiddamu nti: ‘Ndeke eri omuzigo gwange, oguweesa ekitiibwa balubaale n'abantu, ŋŋende nkulire emiti?’" 
Judges9:10 “Emiti ne gigamba omukunyu nti: ‘Jjangu ggwe otufuge.’ 
Judges9:11 Omukunyu ne gugiddamu nti: ‘Ndeke eri obuwoomi bwange n'ebibala byange ebiwooma, ŋŋende nkulire emiti?’" 
Judges9:12 “Emiti ne gigamba omuzabbibu nti: ‘Jjangu ggwe otufuge.’ 
Judges9:13 Omuzabbibu ne gugiddamu nti: ‘Ndeke eri evviini yange ecamula balubaale n'abantu, ŋŋende nkulire emiti?’" 
Judges9:14 “Emiti gyonna ne gigamba omukula nti: ‘Jjangu ggwe, otufuge.’" 
Judges9:15 Omukula ne guddamu emiti nti: ‘Oba mu mazima munansiiga omuzigo ne nfuuka kabaka wammwe, mujje mweggame mu kisiikirize kyange. Oba si ekyo, omuliro gujja kuva mu mukula guwemmente entolookyo za Lebanoni.’" 
Judges9:16 “Bwe muba nga Abimeleki mwamufuula kabaka wammwe nga mugoba nsonga era mu bwesimbu, nga mwakolera bulungi Yerubbaali n'ennyumba ye ne mumuyisa ng'ebikolwa bye bwe bisaanidde," 
Judges9:17 oyo kitange eyabalwanirira, n'ayaŋŋanga obubenje abawonye mu mikono gya Midiyaani," 
Judges9:18 naye mmwe kati ennyumba ye gye mujeemedde ne mutta batabani be ensanvu ku jjinja limu, ne muddira Abimeleki, mutabani w'omuzaana obuzaana, ne mumufuula kabaka w'abantu b'e Sekemu mbu kubanga muganda wammwe," 
Judges9:19 kale, obanga ekyo mukikoze nga mugoba nsonga era mu bwesimbu eri Yerubbaali n'ennyumba ye olwa leero, mwesiimire mu Abimeleki, naye yeesiimire mu mmwe." 
Judges9:20 Naye obanga si bwe mukoze, omuliro guve mu Abimeleki gusaanyeewo ab'omu Sekemu ne mu Beti-Millo, n'omuliro guve mu bantu b'e Sekemu ne mu Beti-Millo gusaanyeewo Abimeleki.”" 
Judges9:21 Yotamu n'adduka n'agenda e Beera n'abeeranga eyo olw'okutya Abimeleki muganda we. 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki nga yaakafugira Yisirayeli emyaka esatu," 
Judges9:23 Katonda n'aleetawo omwoyo omubi wakati wa Abimeleki n'abantu b'omu Sekemu, ne bamukolera enkwe," 
Judges9:24 ekibi kye baakola okutta abaana ensanvu aba Yerubbaali, n'okuyiwa omusaayi gwabwe biddire Abimeleki muganda waabwe eyabatta n'abantu b'e Sekemu abaamuyambako okutta baganda be." 
Judges9:25 Olw'okumulemesa, abantu b'e Sekemu bassa ku ntikko z'ensozi abanyazi abaanyaganga buli eyayitanga mu kkubo eryo. Abimeleki kino n'akimanyaako." 
Judges9:26 Olumu Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi yajja ne baganda be, n'agenda e Sekemu, ab'omu Sekemu ne bamwagala." 
Judges9:27 Ne bagenda mu nnimiro, ne banoga emizabbibu, ne bagisogola, ne bakola ekinyumu, ne bayingira mu kiggwa kya lubaale waabwe, ne balya ne banywa nga bwe bavumirira Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi n'aleekaana nti: “Abimeleki kye ki? Ne Sekemu ye ani ffe okumuweereza? Si mutabani wa Yerubbaali, ne Zebuli si mukungu we? Muweereze abasajja ba Kamori, kitaawe wa Sekemu. Lwaki twandiweerezza Abimeleki?" 
Judges9:29 Singa nno abantu bano baali mu mikono gyange, nandiggyeewo Abimeleki. Nandisoomozezza Abimeleki nti: ‘Weza eggye lyo weesowoleyo.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Zebuli eyali omukulu w'ekibuga bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo ebya Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi, obusungu bwe ne bwesera." 
Judges9:31 N'atumira Abimeleki ababaka mu mankwetu, n'amugamba nti: “Gaali, mutabani wa Ebedi ne baganda be bazze e Sekemu ne batabangula ekibuga kikukyawe." 
Judges9:32 Jjangu ekiro n'eggye lyo, weekweke mu nnimiro." 
Judges9:33 Ku makya, ng'enjuba yaakavaayo, zinda ekibuga. Gaali n'abantu be bw'anaafuluma okulumba, mukole ky'osobola.”" 
Judges9:34 Abimeleki n'asitula n'eggye lyonna ekiro, ne beekweka okumpi ne Sekemu mu bibinja bina." 
Judges9:35 Kati nno Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi bwe yali afulumye, ng'ayimiridde ku muzigo gw'omulyango gw'ekibuga, Abimeleki we yasitukira wamu n'eggye lye okuva gye baali beekwese." 
Judges9:36 Gaali bwe yalaba abantu, n'agamba Zebuli nti: “Laba, abantu bakkirira nga bava waggulu ku nsozi.” Ye n'amwanukula nti: “Olaba ebisiikirize by'ensozi n'obiyita abantu.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaali n'addamu n'agamba nti: “Abasajja baabo baserengeta nga bava mu makkati g'ensi, ate ekibinja ekimu kijja kigoba ekkubo ly'omuvule gw'omulaguzi.”" 
Judges9:38 Zebuli n'amugamba nti: “Aluwa, si ggwe wagambye nti: ‘Abimeleki ye ani oyo gwe tuweereza?’ Abo si be bantu b'obadde ogaya? Kale nno balumbe obalwanyise.”" 
Judges9:39 Gaali n'afuluma n'abantu b'e Sekemu, n'alwana ne Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleki n'amugoba, Gaali n'abadduka. Bangi ne battibwa okutuukira ddala ku muzigo gw'omulyango gw'ekibuga." 
Judges9:41 Abimeleki n'addayo e Aruma; Zebuli n'agoba Gaali ne baganda be, n'atabaganya kubeera mu Sekemu." 
Judges9:42 Enkeera, abantu ne bafulumako ebweru mu nnimiro; Abimeleki n'akimanyaako." 
Judges9:43 N'addira eggye lye n'aligabanyaamu ebibinja bisatu, ne babeekwekerera mu nnimiro. Yalaba abantu bava mu kibuga, n'asituka n'abalumba." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleki n'ebibinja ebyali naye, n'azinda n'ateega ku muzigo gw'omulyango gw'ekibuga. Ebibinja ebibiri byo ne birumba abaali bagenze mu nnimiro ne babatta." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki n'alwanyisa ekibuga ekyo olunaku olwo lwonna, n'akikwata. Yatta bonna abaakirimu, nakyo n'akisaanyaawo, n'akimansaako omunnyo." 
Judges9:46 Abaali bali mu kigo ky'e Sekemu bwe baawulira, ne bayingira mu mpuku y'ekiggwa kya Eli-Beriti." 
Judges9:47 Abimeleki bwe baamutegeeza nti abantu b'omu kigo ky'e Sekemu beekuŋŋaanyizza," 
Judges9:48 n'alinnya ku lusozi Zalumoni n'abantu be bonna, n'akwata embazzi, n'atema ettabi ly'omuti, n'alisitula n'alissa ku kibegabega, n'agamba abaali naye nti: “Kye mulabye nkola, nammwe mukikole mangu.”" 
Judges9:49 Abantu amangu ago ne batema amatabi ku miti, ne bagoberera Abimeleki, ne bagatuuma ku mpuku, ne bagiteekera omuliro; abantu bonna ab'omu kigo ky'e Sekemu, abantu nga lukumi, abasajja n'abakazi, nabo ne bafa." 
Judges9:50 Ate Abimeleki n'agenda e Tebezi, n'akizingiza, oluvannyuma n'akiwamba." 
Judges9:51 Mu kibuga mwalimu ekigo; abantu bonna ab'omu kibuga, abasajja n'abakazi, ne baddukira omwo, ne beesibiramu, ne balinnya waggulu ku munaala." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki n'ajja ku munaala, n'agulumba, n'asembera ku mulyango ng'ayagala okuguteekera omuliro." 
Judges9:53 Naye omukazi omu n'ayima waggulu, n'akasuka enso, ne yekkata ku mutwe gwa Abimeleki n'emubetenta akawanga." 
Judges9:54 N'ayita mangu omuvubuka amusitulira eby'okulwanyisa bye n'amugamba nti: “Sowola ekitala kyo onzite, sikulwa nga bagamba nti: ‘Omukazi ye yamutta.’ ” Omuvubuka n'amufumita, n'afa." 
Judges9:55 Abantu bonna ab'omu Yisirayeli bwe baalaba nga Abimeleki afudde, buli omu n'addayo ewuwe." 
Judges9:56 Katonda bwe yaweera bw'atyo ekibi Abimeleki kye yakola ku kitaawe ng'atta baganda be ensanvu; 
Judges9:57 era yaweera n'ekibi ab'e Sekemu kye baali bakoze; ekikolimo kya Yotamu, mutabani wa Yerubbaali ne kituukirira ku bo." 
Judges10:1 Abimeleki ng'avuddewo, ne wasitukawo Tola okuwonya Yisirayeli. Yali musajja wa mu Yissakari, mutabani wa Puwa, mutabani wa Dodo. Yabeeranga Samiri mu nsozi za Efurayimu." 
Judges10:2 Yalamula Yisirayeli okumala emyaka abiri mu esatu; n'afa, n'aziikibwa e Samiri." 
Judges10:3 Ng'avuddewo, waasitukawo Yayiri Omugileyaadi. Yalamula Yisirayeli okumala emyaka abiri mu ebiri." 
Judges10:4 Yalina batabani be makumi asatu abeebagalanga endogoyi amakumi asatu. Baalina ebibuga amakumi asatu mu Gileyaadi, n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero ebiyitibwa Kavvoti-Yayiri." 
Judges10:5 Yayiri n'afa n'aziikibwa e Kamoni. 
Judges10:6 Abayisirayeli ne baddamu okweyisa obubi mu maaso g'Omukama, ne baweereza Babaali ne Baasutoreti, ne balubaale b'omu Aramu ne Sidoni, ne balubaale b'omu Mowabu, n'ab'Abammoni n'ab'Abafilisitiini; ne bava ku Mukama nga tebakyamusinza." 
Judges10:7 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli, n'abawaayo mu mikono gy'Abafilisitiini n'egy'Abammoni," 
Judges10:8 abaababetenta ne babamerengula omwaka ogwo. Ate ne banyigiriza Abayisirayeli abaali emitala wa Yorudani mu nsi y'Abaamori mu Gileyaadi okumala emyaka kkumi na munaana. 
Judges10:9 N'Abammoni ne basomoka Yorudani balwanyise Yuda ne Benyamiini n'ennyumba ya Efurayimu. Yisirayeli n'alaba nnyo ennaku. 
Judges10:10 Abayisirayeli ne balaajanira Omukama, ne bagamba nti: “Twayonoona gy'oli, kubanga twaleka Katonda waffe ne tuweereza Babaali.”" 
Judges10:11 Omukama n'abaddamu nti: “Abamisiri, Abaamori, Abammoni, Abafilisitiini," 
Judges10:12 Abasidoni, Abaamaleki, n'Abamawoni bwe baabalabya ennaku ne mulaajanira gye ndi, saabasikaayo mu mikono gyabwe?"
