Judges10:13 Naye era mwandekawo, ne musinza balubaale. Nange nno sijja kuddayo kubawonya." 
Judges10:14 Mugende, mulaajanire balubaale be mwerondedde, babadduukirire mu biseera byammwe eby'ennaku.”" 
Judges10:15 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba Omukama nti: “Twayonoona. Tuyise nga ggwe bw'oyagala; naye olwa leero, tukwegayiridde tuwonye.”" 
Judges10:16 Olwo ne basuula eri ebifaananyi byonna ebya balubaale abagwira, ne baweereza Omukama. N'Omukama naye nga takyasobola kugumiikiriza nnaku ya Yisirayeli." 
Judges10:17 Abammoni ne beekuŋŋaanya mu Gileyaadi ne basiisira. Abayisirayeli nabo ne beekuŋŋaanya ne basiisira e Mizupa. 
Judges10:18 Abakulembeze mu Gileyaadi ne bagambagana nti: “Oyo anaasooka okulwanyisa Abammoni, oyo y'anaabeera omufuzi w'abantu b'omu Gileyaadi.”" 
Judges11:1 Yefuta Omugileyaadi yali musajja muzira, kitaawe nga ye Gileyaadi. Nnyina yali mukazi malaaya." 
Judges11:2 Mukazi wa Gileyaadi yennyini naye yamuzaalira abaana ab'obulenzi. Bo bwe baakula ne bagoba Yefuta, nga bagamba nti: “Tojja kugabana ku busika mu nnyumba ya kitaffe, kubanga oli mwana wa mukazi mulala.”" 
Judges11:3 Yafuta n'adduka baganda be, n'agenda abeera mu nsi y'e Tovu. Abasajja endalagge ne bamukuŋŋaanirako, ne bagendanga naye okwaya." 
Judges11:4 Ebbanga nga liyiseewo, Abammoni ne balwanyisa Yisirayeli." 
Judges11:5 Abakadde b'omu Gileyaadi ne bagenda okuzza Yefuta okuva mu nsi y'e Tovu. 
Judges11:6 Ne bagamba Yefuta nti: “Jjangu, obeere omugabe waffe, lwe tunaasobola Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Yefuta n'ayanukula abakadde b'omu Gileyaadi nti: “Si mwankyawa ne mungoba mu nnyumba ya kitange? Lwaki kati nga mugudde mu bizibu mujja gye ndi?” 
Judges11:8 Abakadde b'omu Gileyaadi ne bagamba Yefuta nti: “Ekyo kye kituleese gy'oli; jjangu naffe olwanyise Abammoni; olifuuka mukulembeze waffe, n'abo bonna ab'omu Gileyaadi.”" 
Judges11:9 Ne Yefuta n'agamba abakadde b'omu Gileyaadi nti: “Oba mumpita mbalwanirire mu lutalo n'Abammoni, Omukama amala abampa mu mikono gyange, ndibafuga?”" 
Judges11:10 Abakadde b'omu Gileyaadi ne baanukula Yefuta nti: “Omukama ye mujulirwa waffe; tujja kukola nga bw'ogambye.” 
Judges11:11 Yefuta n'agenda wamu n'abakadde b'omu Gileyaadi; abantu ne bamufuula omukulembeze waabwe era omugabe waabwe. Yefuta n'addamu mu maaso g'Omukama e Mizupa obukalu bwonna bwe yali ataddewo. 
Judges11:12 Yefuta n'atuma ababaka eri kabaka w'Abammoni nti: “Kiki kye nakukola olyoke ojje okulumba ensi yange?” 
Judges11:13 Kabaka w'Abammoni n'ayanukula ababaka ba Yefuta nti: “Kubanga Yisirayeli bwe yava e Misiri, yanyaga ensi yange, okuva ku Arunoni okutuuka ku Yabboki ne ku Yorudani. Kale nno ginzirize mu ddembe.”" 
Judges11:14 Yefuta n'addamu okutuma ababaka ewa kabaka w'Abammoni 
Judges11:15 ne bamugamba nti: “Bino Yefuta by'agamba: ‘Yisirayeli teyatwala nsi y'e Mowabu, wadde ey'Abammoni." 
Judges11:16 Naye bwe yava e Misiri, yayita mu ddungu ery'Ennyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa, n'ajja e Kadesi." 
Judges11:17 Awo Yisirayeli n'atuma ababaka eri kabaka wa Edomu ng'asaba nti: “Nzikiriza nkutulire mu nsi yo.” Naye kabaka wa Edomu teyawuliriza. N'atuma n'ewa kabaka w'e Mowabu; naye era teyamuganya. Awo Yisirayeli kwe kusigala mu Kadesi. 
Judges11:18 Yisirayeli n'ayita mu ddungu, n'abalaamiriza ensi ya Edomu n'ensi y'e Mowabu, n'ayitira ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba obw'ensi y'e Mowabu, n'asiisira emitala wa Arunoni. Teyayingira mu nsi y'e Mowabu, kubanga Arunoni ye yali ensalo y'e Mowabu." 
Judges11:19 Yisirayeli yatuma ababaka eri Sikoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, eyafugiranga e Kesuboni nti: “Ndeka, mpite mu nsi yo, ndage mu kifo kyange.”" 
Judges11:20 Kyokka Sikoni teyeesiga Yisirayeli kuyita mu nsi ye; wabula yakuŋŋaanya abantu be bonna n'asiisira e Yawazi, n'alwanyisa Yisirayeli." 
Judges11:21 Omukama n'awaayo Sikoni n'eggye lye lyonna mu mikono gya Yisirayeli. Yisirayeli n'abawangula, ne yezza ensi ye yonna ey'Abaamori ababeera mu kitundu ekyo." 
Judges11:22 Bezza ensi yonna ey'Abaamori okuva ku Arunoni okutuuka ku Yabboki, n'okuva mu ddungu okutuuka ku Yorudani." 
Judges11:23 Oba nno Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli amaze okugoberawo abantu be Yisirayeli Abaamori, kati ggwe olina buyinza ki okwagala okugyezza?" 
Judges11:24 Ggwe lubaale wo Cemosi bw'abaako ky'akuwadde otwale, tokitwala? Naffe bwe tutyo Omukama Katonda waffe bye yatugoberawo tutwale, twabitwala." 
Judges11:25 Ggwe osinga Baraki, mutabani wa Zippori, kabaka w'e Mowabu? Yali ayombyeko ne Yisirayeli wadde okumulumba?" 
Judges11:26 Yisirayeli bwe yasenga mu Kesuboni n'ebibuga byakyo, ne mu Aroweri n'ebibuga byakyo, ne mu bibuga byonna ebiri ku Arunoni okumala emyaka ebisatu, mu budde obwo lwaki tewagezaako kubyezza?" 
Judges11:27 Awo nno si nze nkukola akabi, wabula ggwe onkola akabi ng'onnangirirako entalo. Omukama omulamuzi atusalirewo ekituufu wakati w'Abayisirayeli n'Abammoni.’ ”" 
Judges11:28 Naye kabaka w'Abammoni teyassaayo mwoyo ku bigambo Yefuta bye yamugamba. 
Judges11:29 Omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gukka ku Yefuta, n'ayita mu Gileyaadi ne mu Manasse, n'akutulira e Mizupa ekya Gileyaadi, gye yava n'alumba Abammoni." 
Judges11:30 Yefuta n'alayira ew'Omukama nti: “Bw'onompa Abammoni ne mbawangula," 
Judges11:31 kyonna ekinaasooka okufuluma mu nnyumba yange okunsisinkana nga nkomawo n'obuwanguzi nga nva eri Abammoni, nzija kukiweereza Omukama ng'ekitambiro ekyokye.”" 
Judges11:32 Yefuta n'akutula, n'alumba Abammoni, Katonda n'amuwa n'abawangula." 
Judges11:33 Yabakuba okuva ku Aroweri okutuukira ddala ng'ojja e Minniti, bye bibuga amakumi abiri; ate n'okutuukira ddala e Abeli-Keramimu; yabakuba bubi nnyo. Abammoni ne batoowazibwa mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli." 
Judges11:34 Yefuta bwe yali akomawo ewaabwe e Mizupa, laba, muwala we n'ajja okumusisinkana nga bw'azinira ku bugoma. Omwana yalina ono yekka, teyalina baana balala ba bulenzi wadde ab'obuwala." 
Judges11:35 Bwe yamulaba, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye n'agamba nti: “O, Mwana wange onzise! Ondeetedde emitawaana! Naye nalagaanya Omukama, sikyayinza kukola bulala.”" 
Judges11:36 Omuwala n'amwanukula nti: “Taata, oba walagaanya Omukama, nkola nga bwe wasuubiza, anti Omukama akuyambye n'owoolera eggwanga ku balabe bo Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:37 N'agamba kitaawe nti: “Kino kyokka kye nkusaba, ky'oba ompa. Ndeka emyezi ebiri, ŋŋende mmungeete mu nsozi, nkaabire obubeererevu bwange, nze ne bannange.”" 
Judges11:38 N'amwanukula nti: “Genda.” N'amuleka emyezi ebiri, n'agenda ne banne eyo mu nsozi, ne bakaabira obubeererevu bwe." 
Judges11:39 Emyezi ebiri bwe gyaggwaako n'akomawo eri kitaawe, n'amukola nga bwe yali yeeyamye. Yali akyali mbeerera. Ne kifuuka mpisa mu Yisirayeli" 
Judges11:40 buli mwaka abawala ba Yisirayeli okujjukira muwala wa Yefuta Omugileyaadi nga bamukaabira okumala ennaku nnya. 
Judges12:1 Abantu b'omu Efurayimu ne bakunga eggye, ne basomoka ne balaga e Zafoni, ne bagamba Yefuta nti: “Lwaki wagenda okulwanyisa Abammoni n'ototuyita kugenda naawe? Tugenda kukwokera mu nnyumba yo.”" 
Judges12:2 Yefuta n'abagamba nti: “Nze n'abantu bange tubadde ku mbiranye nnyo n'Abammoni; nabalaajanira, naye temwajja kumponya mu mikono gyabwe." 
Judges12:3 Nalaba temunnyamba, ne ntunda omwoyo, ne nsomoka okulumba Abammoni; ekirungi Omukama n'annyamba ne mbawangula. Kati lwaki muzze okunnwanyisa?”" 
Judges12:4 Awo Yefuta n'ayita abasajja bonna ab'omu Gileyaadi n'alwanyisa Efurayimu. Abasajja b'omu Gileyaadi ne bakuba Abeefurayimu, kubanga Abeefurayimu baali babagambye nti: “Mmwe Abagileyaadi muli mmomboze mu Efurayimu ne Manasse; mwadduka kuva mu Efurayimu.”" 
Judges12:5 Abagileyaadi ne bakwata emisomoko gy'oku Yorudani egisomosa mu Efurayimu. Oli mu bakaawonawo mu Efurayimu bwe yagambanga nti: “Ka nsomoke,” ng'abasajja b'omu Gileyaadi bamubuuza nti: “Oli Mwefurayimu?” Bwe yagaananga nti “Nedda,”" 
Judges12:6 nga bamugamba nti: “Kale gamba nti: ‘Shibboleti,’ ” ye ng'agamba nti: “Sibboleti,” kubanga yali tasobola kukyatula bulungi; nga bamukwata nga bamuttira awo wennyini ku misomoko gy'oku Yorudani. Mu budde obwo emitwalo ena mu enkumi bbiri be baafa mu Efurayimu." 
Judges12:7 Yefuta Omugileyaadi yalamula Yisirayeli emyaka mukaaga; Yefuta Omugileyaadi n'afa, n'aziikibwa mu kibuga Gileyaadi." 
Judges12:8 Ng'avuddewo, Yibuzani ow'omu Beteleemu n'alamula Yisirayeli." 
Judges12:9 Yalina batabani be amakumi asatu ne bawala be amakumi asatu. Yafumbiza bawala be ebweru w'ekika kye, ne batabani be n'abawasiza abakazi ng'abaggya mu bika ebirala. Yalamula Yisirayeli okumala emyaka musanvu." 
Judges12:10 Yibuzani n'afa n'aziikibwa e Beteleemu. 
Judges12:11 Ng'avuddewo, Eloni Omuzebuluni n'alamula Yisirayeli okumala emyaka kkumi." 
Judges12:12 Eloni Omuzebuluni n'afa n'aziikibwa mu Ayijaloni eky'omu Zebuluni. 
Judges12:13 Ng'avuddewo Abudoni mutabani wa Yileli ow'omu Piratoni n'alamula Yisirayeli. 
Judges12:14 Yalina abaana abalenzi amakumi ana n'abazzukulu amakumi asatu, nga beebagala endogoyi nsanvu. Yalamula Yisirayeli emyaka munaana." 
Judges12:15 Abudoni mutabani wa Yileli n'afa n'aziikibwa e Piratoni mu Efurayimu, mu nsozi z'Abaamaleki." 
Judges13:1 Abayisirayeli ne baddamu okweyisa obubi mu maaso g'Omukama; Omukama n'abawaayo mu mikono gy'Abafilisitiini okumala emyaka ana. 
Judges13:2 Waaliwo omusajja omu ow'omu Zora, ow'omu kika ky'Abadaani, erinnya lye nga ye Manowa. Yalina omukazi nga mugumba, nga talina mwana." 
Judges13:3 Malayika w'Omukama n'alabikira omukazi oyo n'amugamba nti: “Kati oli mugumba, tolina mwana; naye ojja kufuna olubuto, ozaale omwana wa bulenzi." 
Judges13:4 Weegendereze, tonywanga evviini oba ekitamiiza ekirala, era tolyanga kintu kitali kirongoofu;" 
Judges13:5 kubanga ojja kufuna olubuto ozaale omwana mulenzi. Akamwano tekamuyitanga mu mutwe, kubanga aliba mwana munazireewo wa Katonda okuva mu lubuto lwa nnyina; oyo y'aliwonya Yisirayeli mu mikono gw'Abafilisitiini.”" 
Judges13:6 Omukazi n'agenda eri bba n'amugamba nti: “Omuntu wa Katonda yazze gye ndi, enfaanana ye ng'ali nga malayika w'Omukama, ng'atiisa nnyo. Saamubuuzizza gye yavudde, naye teyambuulidde linnya lye." 
Judges13:7 Naye yaŋŋambye nti: ‘Ojja kufuna olubuto ozaale omwana mulenzi. Wekkaanye, tonywanga evviini oba ekitamiiza ekirala; tolyanga ekitali kirongoofu, kubanga omwana alibeera munazireewo wa Katonda, okuva lw'aligwa mu lubuto okutuusa ku lunaku lw'alifa.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Manowa n'awanjagira Omukama nti: “Ayi Mukama, nkwegayiridde, kkiriza omuntu wa Katonda gwe watumye akomewo gye tuli atubuulire kye tunaakolera omwana anaazaalibwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Katonda n'awuliriza okwegayirira kwa Manowa; malayika wa Katonda n'akomawo eri omukazi ng'ali mu nnimiro. Bbaawe Manowa teyali naye. 
Judges13:10 N'adduka mangu n'abuulira bba nti: “Omusajja eyajja luli gye ndi, andabikidde.”" 
Judges13:11 Manowa n'asituka n'agoberera mukazi we. Bwe yatuuka awali omusajja n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe wayogedde ne mukazi wange?” N'addamu nti: “Ye nze.” 
Judges13:12 Manowa n'amugamba nti: “Ebigambo byo bwe binaatuukirira, omwana asaanye ayisenga atya era anaakolanga ki?”" 
Judges13:13 Malayika w'Omukama n'agamba Manowa nti: “Omukazi yeetangire ku ebyo byonna bye namugambye. 
Judges13:14 Talyanga kintu kyonna ekiva ku mizabbibu, tanywanga evviini oba ekitamiiza; talyanga ekitali kirongoofu. Ebyo byonna bye namugambye, abituukirizanga.”" 
Judges13:15 Manowa n'agamba Malayika w'Omukama nti: “Nkwegayiridde, ogira osigala naffe, tukuttire akabuzi.”" 
Judges13:16 Malayika w'Omukama n'ayanukula nti: “Ne bwe munansigaza wano, sijja kulya migaati gyo; naye oba oyagala okukola ekitambiro ekyokye, kiweereze Mukama.” Manowa yali tamanyi nti yali Malayika wa Mukama." 
Judges13:17 Manowa n'abuuza malayika w'Omukama nti: “Erinnya lyo ggwe ani, ebigambo bwe binaatuukirira tulyoke tukusseemu ekitiibwa?”" 
Judges13:18 Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Lwaki obuuza erinnya lyange eryewuunyisa?” 
Judges13:19 Manowa n'akwata akabuzi, n'ekitone eky'obuwunga, n'abissa ku lwazi, n'abiweereza Omukama oyo akola ebyewuunyisa. Manowa ne mukazi we ne batunula balabe." 
Judges13:20 Omuliro bwe gwava ku mwaliiro ne gwambuka mu ggulu, Malayika w'Omukama naye n'alinnyira muli. Manowa ne mukazi we bwe baakiraba, ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe ku ttaka." 
Judges13:21 Malayika w'Omukama teyaddamu kulabikira Manowa ne mukazi we. Amangu ago Manowa n'amanya nti yali malayika wa Mukama. 
Judges13:22 N'agamba mukazi we nti: “Tujja kufa, kubanga tulabye Katonda.”" 
Judges13:23 Mukazi we n'amwanukula nti: “Singa Omukama yayagadde kututta, teyandikkirizza kitambiro ekyokye n'ekitone eky'obuwunga ebivudde mu ngalo zaffe; teyanditulaze ku bino byonna; teyanditutegeezezza na bino.”" 
Judges13:24 Omukazi n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi, n'amutuuma Samusoni. Omwana n'akula, Omukama n'amuwa omukisa." 
Judges13:25 Omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gutandika okumuwujja mu Makane-Daani, wakati wa Zora ne Esutawoli." 
Judges14:1 Samusoni n'akkirira e Timuna, n'alabayo omukazi mu bawala b'Abafilisitiini." 
Judges14:2 Bwe yadda eka n'abuulira kitaawe ne nnyina nti: “E Timuna nalabyeyo omukazi mu bawala b'Abafilisitiini; kati mumumpasize.” 
Judges14:3 Kitaawe ne nnyina ne bamugamba nti: “Kyova oyagala okuwasa omukazi mu Bafilisitiini abatali batayirire, mu ŋŋanda zo ne mu ggwanga lyo lyonna temuli mukazi?” Naye Samusoni n'agamba kitaawe nti: “Mumunfunire, kubanga ansanyusa.”" 
Judges14:4 Kitaawe ne nnyina baali tebamanyi nti ekyo kivudde wa Katonda, ng'anoonya kakisa akole ku Bafilisitiini, kubanga mu budde obwo Abafilisitiini be baali bafuga Yisirayeli." 
Judges14:5 Samusoni n'agenda ne kitaawe ne nnyina e Timuna. Bwe baatuuka ku nnimiro z'emizabbibu ez'e Timuna, omwana gw'empologoma ne gumulumba nga bwe guwuluguma." 
Judges14:6 Omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gumujjako, n'abaka empologoma n'engalo ensa, n'agiryebulamu ng'alyebulamu akabuzi akato. Naye kye yakola teyakibuulira ku kitaawe na nnyina." 
Judges14:7 N'aserengeta n'anyumya n'omukazi. Samusoni n'amusiima. 
Judges14:8 Nga wayise ennaku, Samusoni bwe yali addayo okumuwasa, n'akyama, alabe omulambo gw'empologoma. Ekyamuzimuukiriza nga mu mpologoma mulimu enjuki, n'omubisi gwazo." 
Judges14:9 N'agusokoolamu n'engalo n'agenda ng'alya. Bwe yatuuka eri kitaawe ne nnyina, n'abawaako, nabo ne balya; kyokka teyababuulira nti omubisi agusokodde mu mulambo gwa mpologoma." 
Judges14:10 Kitaawe n'agenda omukazi gye yali, Samusoni n'akolerayo embaga, nga bwe yali empisa abavubuka okukola batyo." 
Judges14:11 Abantu bwe baamulaba, ne bamuleetera banne amakumi asatu babeere naye." 
Judges14:12 Samusoni n'abagamba nti: “Ka mbaweeyo ekikoco. Bwe munaakitta mu nnaku zino omusanvu ez'embaga, nzija kubawa ekkanzu amakumi asatu, n'emiteeko gy'engoye amakumi asatu." 
Judges14:13 Naye bwe kinaabalema okutta, mujja kumpa engoye empeweevu amakumi asatu n'emiteeko gy'ebyambalo amakumi asatu.” Ne bamugamba nti: “Kale yogera ekikoco kyo tukiwulire.”" 
Judges14:14 N'abagamba nti: “Mu mulyi, mwavaamu ekyokulya; Mu wa maanyi, mwavaamu ekiwoomerera.” Ne batasobola kukitta mu nnaku ssatu." 
Judges14:15 Ku lunaku olwokuna ne bagamba muka Samusoni nti: “Musendesende akubuulire amakulu g'ekikoco, oba si ekyo tujja kukwokya wamu n'ennyumba ya kitaawo. Mwatuyise ku mbaga kutwaya bwaya?”" 
Judges14:16 Muka Samusoni n'amukaabirira nga bw'agamba nti: “Onkyaye, tonjagala; kale wawadde abantu bange ekikoco, naye nze ogaanye okukimbuulira.” Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Kitange ne mmange we sibabuuliridde, ggwe gwe nnaakibuulira?”" 
Judges14:17 Ennaku zonna omusanvu ez'embaga n'azimala ng'akaaba. Kyaddaaki, ku lunaku olwomusanvu n'amubuulira, kubanga yali amwetayiridde. Amangu ago omukazi n'abuulira abantu be." 
Judges14:18 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu, enjuba nga tennagwa abantu b'omu kibuga, ne bamugamba nti: “Kiki ekisinga omubisi gw'enjuki okuwoomerera? Ate kiki ekisinga empologoma amaanyi?” N'abagamba nti: “Singa temwalimisizza nnyana yange, temwandisse kikoco kyange.”" 
Judges14:19 Omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gumujjako, n'aseerengeta e Asukeloni, n'attayo abasajja amakumi asatu, n'abambulamu ebyambalo amakumi asatu n'abiwa abasse ekikoco; n'addayo ewa kitaawe ng'obusungu bwe bwesera." 
Judges14:20 Mukazi wa Samusoni ne bamufumbiza mukwano gwe eyali omubugiriza ku embaga ye. 
Judges15:1 Bwe waayitawo akabanga, ng'obudde obw'okukungula eŋŋano butuuse, Samusoni n'akyalira mukazi we, n'amuleetera akabuzi. N'agamba nti: “Njagala kugenda wa mukyala wange mu kisenge kye.” Naye kitaawe w'omukazi n'atamuganya." 
Judges15:2 N'amugamba nti: “Nalowooza nti wamukyawa, kyennava mmuwa mukwano gwo. Naye muto we si y'amusinga obulungi? Gw'oba otwala mu kifo ky'oli.”" 
Judges15:3 Samusoni n'amugamba nti: “Ku mulundi guno siriiko musango Abafilisitiini bwe mbakola akabi; nzija kubabonereza.” 
Judges15:4 Awo Samusoni kwe kugenda, n'akwata ebibe ebikumi bisatu, n'abisiba bibiri bibiri emikira, n'addira emimuli buli gumu n'agusiba wakati w'emikira ebiri." 
Judges15:5 Emimuli n'agikoleeza omuliro, ebibe n'abigobera mu makungula g'Abafilisitiini, n'ayokya eŋŋano eyali ekunguddwa n'eyali ekyayimiridde, n'emizabbibu n'oliva." 
Judges15:6 Abafilisitiini bwe baabuuza nti: “Ani akoze kino?” Ne babagamba nti: “Samusoni, mukoddomi w'omusajja w'e Timuna, kubanga omusajja yaddira mukazi we n'amufumbiza mukwano gwe.” Abafilisitiini ne bagenda, ne bookya omukazi ne kitaawe." 
Judges15:7 Samusoni n'abagamba nti: “Mugidde mukole n'ekyo, sijja kuwummula nga sinnawoolera ggwanga.”" 
Judges15:8 N'abakuba bubi nnyo, n'abattamu bangi. N'aserengeta n'abeeranga mu mpampagama y'olwazi lw'e Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Awo Abafilisitiini ne bambuka, ne basiisira mu nsi ya Yuda, eggye lyabwe ne libuna wonna mu Leki." 
Judges15:10 Abantu b'omu Yuda ne babuuza nti: “Lwaki muzze okutulumba?” Ne babaanukula nti: “Tuzze kusiba Samusoni, tumukole nga bwe yatukola.”" 
Judges15:11 Abasajja enkumi ssatu okuva mu Yuda ne baserengeta ku mpampagama y'olwazi lw'e Etamu, ne bagamba Samusoni nti: “Tomanyi nti Abafilisitiini be batufuga? Kiki kino ky'otukoze?” Ye n'abagamba nti: “Nabakola nga nze bwe bankola.”" 
Judges15:12 Ne bagamba nti: “Tuzze kukusiba, tukuweeyo mu mikono gy'Abafilisitiini.” Samusoni n'ayanukula nti: “Mulayire nga mmwe mwennyini temunzite.”" 
Judges15:13 Ne bamugamba nti: “Tukukakasa tetujja kukutta, wabula tujja kukusiba busibi miguwa tukuweeyo ng'oli mulamu.” Ne bamusibisa emiguwa ebiri emiggya, ne bamuggyayo mu lwazi." 
Judges15:14 Bwe baatuuka mu Leki, Abafilisitiini ne bajja okumusisinkana nga baleekaana. Omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gumujjako, emiguwa egyali gimusibye ne gita ng'egy'obugoogwa obwokeddwa omuliro, n'ebyali bisibye emikono gye ne bita." 
Judges15:15 N'abaka akaba k'endogoyi akabisi, n'akassisa abasajja lukumi." 
Judges15:16 Samusoni n'agamba nti: “N'akaba k'endogoyi, nabafuula ntuumu; n'akaba k'endogoyi natta lukumi.”" 
Judges15:17 Bwe yamala okwogera, akaba n'akakasuka eri; ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Ramati-Leki." 
Judges15:18 Ennyonta n'emuluma nnyo; n'akoowoola Omukama nti: “Ggwe otadde mu mikono gy'omuweereza wo obuwanguzi obw'amaanyi, kati nfe ennyonta, ngwe mu mikono gy'abatali batayirire?”" 
Judges15:19 Katonda n'aggulawo ekinnya mu Leki, amazzi ne gafumbukuka. N'anywa, amaanyi ge ne gadda, n'addamu ensa. Oluzzi olwo kyeruva luyitibwa Eni-Akkore. Lukyaliyo mu Leki n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Judges15:20 Samusoni yalamula Yisirayeli emyaka amakumi abiri mu budde bw'Abafilisitiini. 
Judges16:1 Olumu Samusoni yagenda e Gaza, n'alabayo omukazi malaaya, n'ayingira ewuwe." 
Judges16:2 Ab'e Gaza bwe baababuulira nti: “Samusoni ali wano,” ne beebungulula ekibuga, ne bamwebakirira ekiro kyonna ku mulyango gw'ekibuga. Ekiro kyonna tebaanyeenya, nga bagamba nti: “Tujja kumutta nga mmambya asala.”" 
Judges16:3 Naye Samusoni yeebaka kutuusa nga mu ttumbi. Bwe yazuukuka mu ttumbi, n'akwata enzigi zombi eza wankaaki w'ekibuga n'emyango gyombi n'abiwangulamu ko n'omuyingo, n'abissa ku kibegabega, n'abitwala ku ntikko y'olusozi olutunuulidde Keburoni." 
Judges16:4 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, n'ayagala omukazi eyabeeranga mu kiwonvu ky'e Soreki, erinnya lye nga ye Delila." 
Judges16:5 Abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini ne bajja ne bagamba nti: “Musendesende akubuulire amaanyi agenkana awo we gamuva, n'engeri gye tuyinza okumusiba, ne tumugonza. Bw'onookikola, buli omu ku ffe anaakuwa sekeli eza feeza lukumi.”" 
Judges16:6 Delila n'agamba Samusoni nti: “Nkwegayiridde, mbuulira amaanyi agenkana awo we gakuva, n'engeri oli gy'asobola okukusibamu n'akugonza.”" 
Judges16:7 Samusoni n'amwanukula nti: “Bwe bansibisa enkoba musanvu empya, ez'eddiba eritannakala, ng'amaanyi ganzigwamu, nga mbeera ng'abantu abalala.”" 
Judges16:8 Abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini ne baleetera omukazi enkoba empya musanvu ze yali agambye, n'azimusiba." 
Judges16:9 Bo baali beekwese mu kisenge mw'asula. N'aleekaana nti: “Samusoni, Abafilisitiini bakuliko.” Samusoni n'akutula enkoba kyenkana nga wuzi bw'ekutuka ng'omuliro gugikombyeko. Amaanyi we gamuva ne watamanyika." 
Judges16:10 Delila n'agamba Samusoni nti: “Wayagadde kunguumaaza; oŋŋamba bya bulimba. Naye leero mbuulira kye bateekwa okukusibya.” 
Judges16:11 N'amwanukula nti: “Singa bansiba ne bannyweza n'emiguwa emipya, egiteeyambisibwangako, olwo amaanyi nga ganzigwamu; nga mba ng'abantu abalala bonna.”" 
Judges16:12 Delila n'addira emiguwa emipya n'agimusiba. Abasajja baali beekwese mu kisenge. N'aleekaana nti: “Samusoni, Abafilisitiini bakuliko.” N'akutula emiguwa egyali gimusibye emikono ng'akutula wuzi obuwuzi." 
Judges16:13 Era Delila n'agamba Samusoni nti: “N'okutuusa kati okyangumaaza; oŋŋamba bya bulimba. Ntegeeza kye bateekwa okukusibya.” Samusoni n'amwanukula nti: “Singa oddira emivumbo omusanvu egy'enviiri z'oku mutwe gwange n'ogirangamu ebiwuzi, n'ozisibira ku nkondo n'ebikwanso eby'omutunzi, olwo ng'amaanyi ganzigwamu: ndiba ng'abantu abalala bonna.”" 
Judges16:14 Awo n'amwebasa otulo, emivumbo omusanvu egy'enviiri z'omutwe gwe n'agirangamu ebiwuzi, n'agisiba n'ebikwaso by'omutunzi. N'alekaana nti: “Samusoni, Abafilisitiini bakuliko.” Samusoni n'awawamuka, n'akuula enkondo n'enkwanso eby'omutunzi, ne bijja n'ebiwuzi by'enviiri." 
Judges16:15 Delila n'amugamba nti: “Ogambira ki nti: ‘Nkwagala’, sso ng'omutima gwo tegundiiko? Kati emirundi esatu ng'ongumaaza; ogaanyi okumbuulira amaanyi agenkana awo we gakuva.”" 
Judges16:16 Yamwetayirira atyo nga bw'amuteeteza buli lunaku okutuusa omutima gwe lwe gwetamwa n'ajulirira n'okufa. 
Judges16:17 Kwe kumubuulira byonna nti: “Akamwano tekayitanga ku mutwe gwange, kubanga ndi munazireewo wa Katonda okuva mu lubuto lwa nnyabo. Singa omutwe gwange gumwebwa, amaanyi nga ganzigwamu, nga mba ng'abantu abalala bonna.”" 
Judges16:18 Delila bwe yalaba ng'amubuulidde byonna, n'atumira abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini nti: “Mukomeewo, kubanga kati ammaliddeyo byonna.” Ne bajja nga baleese ne ffeeza." 
Judges16:19 N'amwebasa ku maviivi ge, n'ayita omusajja n'amwako emivumbo omusanvu egy'enviiri ze, n'amumala amaanyi. Amaanyi ge ne gamuggwaamu." 
Judges16:20 Delila n'alekaana nti: “Samusoni, Abafilisitiini bakuliko.” N'awawamuka; yali alowooza nti: “Nzija kudduka nga bwe mbadde nkola, nzija kwesumattula.” Yali tamanyi nti Omukama yali amuvuddeko." 
Judges16:21 Abafilisitiini ne bamukwata amangu ago, ne bamutungulamu amaaso, ne bamutwala e Gaza. Ne bamusiba enjegere bbiri ez'ekikomo, n'akolanga ku lubengo olusa obuwunga mu kkomera." 
Judges16:22 Enviiri z'oku mutwe gwe ne zitandika nate okumera oluvannyuma lw'okumwebwa. 
Judges16:23 Abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini ne bakuŋŋaana okutambirira lubaale waabwe Dagoni, ne bakola embaga; ne bagamba nti: “Katonda waffe awadde mu mikono gyaffe Samusoni, omulabe waffe.”" 
Judges16:24 N'abantu bwe baamulaba, ne batendereza lubaale waabwe nga baleekaana nti: “Lubaale waffe awaddeyo omulabe waffe mu mikono gyaffe; oyo eyaleka amatongo ensi yaffe, eyaweza omuwendo gw'abafu baffe.”" 
Judges16:25 Bwe baacamuka, ne bagamba nti: “Muyite Samusoni atuzannyiremu.” Ne bayita Samusoni mu kkomera n'abazannyiramu. Baali bamuyimirizza wakati w'empagi bbiri." 
Judges16:26 Samusoni kwe kugamba omuweereza eyali amukutte omukono nti: “Nteeka we nsobolera okukwata ku mpagi eziwaniridde ennyumba, neesigameko.”" 
Judges16:27 Ennyumba yali ejjudde abasajja n'abakazi, n'abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini bonna; ate ku kasolya nga wayimiriddeyo abasajja n'abakazi ng'enkumi ssatu nga batunuulira Samusoni bw'azannya." 
Judges16:28 Samusoni n'akoowoola Omukama nti: “Ayi Mukama Omuyinza, nzijukira. Nkwegayiridde waakiri ku lwa leero nziriza amaanyi, ayi Katonda, mpoolere eggwanga ku Bafilisitiini olw'amaaso gange gombi.”" 
Judges16:29 Samusoni n'akwata empagi zombi ez'omu makkati ennyumba kwe yali enyweredde, ne yeenyweza kuli, emu n'agissaako ogwa ddyo endala ogwa kkono." 
Judges16:30 Samusoni n'agamba nti: “Ka nfe wamu n'Abafilisitiini.” N'asindika empagi zombi n'amaanyi ge gonna; ennyumba n'egwa ku bafuzi bonna ne ku bantu bonna abaalimu. Mu kufa n'atta bangi n'okusinga be yali asse nga mulamu. 
Judges16:31 Baganda be n'ennyumba ya kitaawe yonna ne baserengeta, ne bamuggyayo, ne bamuleeta ne bamuziika wakati wa Zora ne Esutawoli, mu ntaana ya kitaawe Manowa. Yali alamulidde Yisirayeli emyaka amakumi abiri." 
Judges17:1 Mu nsozi za Efurayimu waaliyo omusajja erinnya lye Mika. 
Judges17:2 Olumu yagamba nnyina nti: “Sekeli za ffeeza olukumi mu ekikumi ezaakuggyibwako, olumu ne mpulira ng'okolima olw'okubeera zo, nze nazitwala era nzirina kaakati.” Nnyina n'amwanukula nti: “Mwana wange, Katonda akuwe omukisa.”" 
Judges17:3 N'aziddiza nnyina; nnyina n'agamba nti: “Ffeeza wange nali ndayidde okumusingira Omukama, mutabani wange n'amunzigya mu ngalo zange amukolemu ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekyole n'ekifaananyi ekisaanuuse. Kale nno kati mmukuwadde.”" 
Judges17:4 Mika n'addiza nnyina sekeli za ffeeza lukumi mu kikumi; nnyina n'atoolako sekeli ebikumi bibiri, n'azitwalira omufukusi wa zaabu, n'akolamu ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekyole n'ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekisaanuuse. Ne babiteeka mu nnyumba ya Mika." 
Judges17:5 Omusajja ono Mika yalina essabo; yakola efodi ne bulubaale obw'awaka, omu ku batabani be n'amufuula kabona we." 
Judges17:6 Mu nnaku ezo mu Yisirayeli temwali kabaka, wabula buli omu kye yatwalanga okuba ekituufu nga ky'akola." 
Judges17:7 Waaliyo omuvubuka Omuleevi eyava e Beteleemu ekya Yuda, ng'abeera mu kika kya Yuda ng'omusenze." 
Judges17:8 Yava e Beteleemu, n'agenda ng'anoonya ow'okubeera. Ng'atambula atyo n'ajja ku nnyumba ya Mika mu nsozi za Efurayimu." 
Judges17:9 Mika n'amubuuza nti: “Ova wa?” Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Ndi Muleevi; nva Beteleemu ekya Yuda; nnoonya kifo wa kubeera.” 
Judges17:10 Mika n'amugamba nti: “Sigala nange obeere kitange era kabona wange; buli mwaka nzija kukuwanga sekeli za ffeeza kkumi, n'ebyambalo, n'ebyokulya.”" 
Judges17:11 Omuleevi n'akkiriza, n'asigala ew'omuntu oyo, n'amuyisiza ddala ng'omu ku batabani be." 
Judges17:12 Mika n'afuula Omuleevi kabona, n'asulanga mu nnyumba ye." 
Judges17:13 Mika n'agamba nti: “Omukama anampisa bulungi, Omuleevi amaze n'afuuka kabona wange.”" 
Judges18:1 Mu nnaku ezo mu Yisirayeli temwali kabaka; ekika ky'Abadaani ne kyenoonyeza we kinaasenga, babeere eyo, kubanga n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero kyali tekinnafuna busika mu bika bya Yisirayeli." 
Judges18:2 Abadaani kwe kuyungula abasajja abeesobola bataano okwenkana amasiga gaabwe ataano mu kika kyabwe, okuva e Zora ne Esutawoli, ne babatuma bakette ensi bagyekkaanye bulungi. Ne babalagira nti: “Mugende, mwetegereze ensi.” Bo ne bajja mu nsozi za Efurayimu, ne batuuka ku nnyumba ya Mika, ne basula awo." 
Judges18:3 Bwe baali bali kumpi n'ennyumba ya Mika, ne bawulira eddoboozi ly'omuvubuka Omuleevi, ne bakyama ne bamubuuza nti: “Ani eyakuleeta wano? Wano okolawo ki? Lwaki oli wano?”" 
Judges18:4 Ye n'ababuulira bino na biri Mika bye yali amukoledde. N'abagamba nti: “Ampa omusaala era ndi kabona we.” 
Judges18:5 Ne bamugamba nti: “Weebuuze eri Katonda tumanye oba olugendo lwaffe lunaalama.” 
Judges18:6 Kabona n'abaddamu nti: “Mugende mirembe; olugendo lwammwe lwe muliko luliko obulabirizi bw'Omukama.” 
Judges18:7 Abasajja abataano ne bagenda, ne bajja e Layisi, ne balaba abantu baayo nga beetuulidde entende, era nga bw'eri empisa y'Abasidoni, nga tebaliiko kibeeraliikiriza, bali mirembe. Engeri ensi yaabwe gye yali erina buli kintu, baali bagagga. Kyokka baali walako n'Abasidoni, ate nga tebalina nkolagana na bantu balala." 
Judges18:8 Ne badda eri baganda baabwe mu Zora ne mu Esutawoli. Baganda baabwe ne bababuuza nti: “Ebintu byagenda bitya?” 
Judges18:9 Ne baddamu nti: “Musituke, tugende tubalumbe, anti ensi twagirabye; nnungi nnyo. Temubeeko kye mukolawo? Temulonzalonza kugendayo ne mugyezza." 
Judges18:10 Bwe munaatuukayo mujja kusanga abantu abatebenkevu, ensi engazi Katonda gy'abawadde, ensi etejula kantu.”" 
Judges18:11 Awo abasajja lukaaga okuva mu kika ky'Abadaani, abeesibye ebyokulwanyisa, ne basitula okuva e Zora ne Esutawoli." 
Judges18:12 Ne bagenda, ne basiisira e Kiriyati-Yewarimu ekya Yuda. Ekifo kino, ekiri ebugwanjuba wa Kiriyati-Yewarimu, kyekiva kiyitibwa Makane-Daani. Bwe kiyitibwa n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Judges18:13 Nga bavudde wano, ne bakutula ne balaga mu nsozi za Efurayimu, ne batuuka ku nnyumba ya Mika." 
Judges18:14 Abasajja abataano abaagenda okuketta ensi y'e Layisi ne bagamba baganda baabwe nti: “Mumanyi nga mu nnyumba muno mulimu efodi, bulubaale bw'awaka, ekifaanaanyi ekyole n'ekifaananyi ekisaanuuse? Kati musalewo eky'okukola.”" 
Judges18:15 Ne bakyama ne bagenda ku nnyumba y'omuvubuka Omuleevi, ewa Mika, ne bamulamusa." 
Judges18:16 Abasajja olukaaga mu Badaani abaali beesibye ebyokulwanyisa baasigala bayimiridde ku muzigo gw'omulyango. 
Judges18:17 Bali abasajja abataano abaagenda okuketta ensi, ne bayingira mu nnyumba, ne batwala ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekyole, efodi, bulubaale bw'awaka n'ekifaananyi eky'ekyuma ekisaanuuse. Kabona ye yasigala ayimiridde ku muzigo gw'omulyango n'abasajja olukaaga abeesibye ebyokulwanyisa." 
Judges18:18 Abasajja bwe baayingira mu nnyumba ya Mika, ne batwala ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekyole, efodi, bulubaale bw'awaka, n'ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekisaanuuse. Kabona n'abagamba nti: “Mukola ki?”" 
Judges18:19 Ne bamwanukula nti: “Sirika; toyogera kantu, era jjangu naffe, ggwe oba obeera kitaffe era kabona. Ekisinga obulungi kiruwa, kubeera kabona wa nnyumba emu oba wa kika kiramba mu Yisirayeli?”" 
Judges18:20 Kabona kino ne kimusanyusa n'atwala efodi, bulubaale obw'awaka, n'ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekyole n'agenda nabo." 
Judges18:21 Ne bakyuka ne bagenda, nga mu maaso gaabwe bakulembezzaamu abakazi n'abaana baabwe, amagana gaabwe n'ebintu byabwe." 
Judges18:22 Nga basenvuddeko akabanga okuva ewa Mika, abasajja abaali mu mayumba okumpi n'ewa Mika ne beekuŋŋaanya, ne batuuka Abadaani." 
Judges18:23 Ne bakowoola Abadaani okuva emabega waabwe; bano ne bakebuka, ne bagamba Mika nti: “Mutawaana ki ogubakowooza?”" 
Judges18:24 N'abaanukula nti: “Mututte balubaale bange be neekolera ne kabona ne mwetambulira. Nze nsigazza ki? Mumbuuza mutya ate nti: ‘Mutawaana ki?’ ” 
Judges18:25 Abadaani ne bamugamba nti: “Toddamu n'otugambako, sikulwa ng'abasajja abakambwe bakuyiikira n'ozikirira, ggwe n'ennyumba yo.”" 
Judges18:26 Abadaani ne badda mu lugendo lwabwe ne beetambulira. Mika yalaba bamuyitiridde amaanyi, ne yeddirayo ewuwe." 
Judges18:27 Abadaani ne batwala Mika bye yakola ne kabona we, ne bajja e Layisi eri abantu abeetuulidde entende, abataliiko kye beeraliikirira, ne babatta n'obwogi bw'ebitala, n'ekibuga ne bakyokya," 
Judges18:28 Tewaali abadduukirira kubanga baali wala ne Sidoni, ate nga tebalina nkolagana na bantu balala. Ekibuga kyali mu kiwonvu kumpi ne Beti-Rekobu; Abadaani ne bakizimba buggya, ne basenga omwo." 
Judges18:29 Ne bakituuma Daani, nga bakibbula mu jjajjaabwe Daani eyazaalirwa Yisirayeli; mu kusooka kyayitibwanga Layisi." 
Judges18:30 Abadaani ne beeteekerayo ekifaananyi kya lubaale ekyole; Yonatani, mutabani wa Gerusomu mutabani wa Musa ne bazzukulu be be baabanga bakabona ba Badaani okutuusa ensi lwe yatwalibwa mu busibe." 
Judges18:31 N'ekifaananyi kya Mika ekya lubaale ekyole kye yali akoze baakisigaza ebbanga lyonna ennyumba ya Katonda lye yamala mu Silo. 
Judges19:1 Mu nnaku ezo mu Yisirayeli temwali kabaka. Waaliwo omusajja Omuleevi, ng'abeera eyo mu masosso g'ensozi za Efurayimu; n'awasa omukazi omuzaana gwe yaggya e Beteleemu ekya Yuda." 
Judges19:2 Naye omuzaana yakola obwamalaaya n'amulekawo. Yanoba n'addayo ewa kitaawe e Beteleemu n'abeerayo emyezi ena. 
Judges19:3 Olumu bba yamugoberera ng'ayagala amuwooyewooye akomewo. Yagenda n'omuweereza we n'obulogoyi bubiri. Omuwala n'amutwala mu nnyumba ya kitaawe; mukoddomi we n'amwaniriza n'essanyu. 
Judges19:4 Mukoddomi we, kitaawe w'omuwala, n'amusibaasiba, naye n'asigala naye. N'asigala ennaku ssatu ewa mukoddomi we, nga balya, banywa bonna; n'asula eyo." 
Judges19:5 Ku lunaku olwokuna, bwe baazuukuka ku makya, n'ategeka okugenda; kitaawe w'omukazi n'agamba mukoddomi we nti: “Wezzeemu ku ndasi n'akatundu k'omugaati olyoke ogende.”" 
Judges19:6 Ne batuula bombi, ne balya ne banywa. Kitaawe w'omuwala n'agamba mukoddomi we nti: “Kkiriza, sula osanyukemu.”" 
Judges19:7 Naye bwe yasituka okugenda, kitaawe w'omukazi n'amusindirira, bw'atyo n'asula." 
Judges19:8 Ku makya ku lunaku olwookutaano bwe yasituka okugenda, kitaawe w'omuwala n'amugamba nti: “Nkwegayiridde, gira wezzeemu ku ndasi; Linda okutuusa akawungeezi.” Bombi ne balya wamu." 
Judges19:9 Omusajja bwe yasituka agende n'omuzaana we n'omuweereza we, era mukoddomi we, kitaawe w'omuwala, n'amugamba nti: “Kati laba obudde bugenda kuwungeera, musule; sula osanyukemu, munaasitula enkya ku makya ne mugenda, n'odda mu weema yo.”" 
Judges19:10 Naye omusajja n'atasiima kya kusula; n'asitula, n'agenda ng'ayolekedde Yebusi, kwe kugamba Yeruzaalemu; yali n'endogoyi ze bbiri ezeetisse n'omuzaana we." 
Judges19:11 Ne batuuka e Yebusi; olunaku nga lweyezeewo nnyo, omuweereza n'agamba mukama we nti: “Nkwegayiridde, gira, tukyame mu kibuga ky'Abayebusi kino tusule eyo.”" 
Judges19:12 Mukama we n'amwanukula nti: “Tetujja kukyama mu kibuga ky'abagwira, ekitali ky'Abayisirayeli. Tuyite buyisi tulage e Gibewa.”" 
Judges19:13 Era n'agamba omuweereza we nti: “Tuluubirire okutuuka ku kimu ku bifo ebyo, tusule e Gibewa oba Rama.”" 
Judges19:14 Ne bongera olugendo lwabwe mu maaso; enjuba yagwa basemberedde Gibewa eky'omu Benyamiini. 
Judges19:15 Ne bakyama eyo gye baba basula. Ne bagenda, ne batuula mu mbuga y'ekibuga; kyokka ne wabulawo abatwala okubasuza." 
Judges19:16 Akawungeezi ne wajjawo omukadde eyali ava mu nnimiro ye okukola: naye yali azaalibwa mu nsozi za Efurayimu, naye nga yasenga mu Gibewa. Ab'omu kitundu bo baali Babenyamiini." 
Judges19:17 Omukadde bwe yasitula amaaso, n'alaba omuntu omutambuze mu mbuga y'ekibuga, n'amugamba nti: “Ate ogenda wa? Ova wa?”" 
Judges19:18 N'amwanukula nti: “Tuvudde Beteleemu ekya Yuda, tugenda eyo mu masosso g'e Efurayimu gye mbeera. Eyo gye nava ne ŋŋenda e Beteleemu mu Yuda, kati ŋŋenda ku kiggwa ky'Omukama; tewali n'omu atututte kutusuza." 
Judges19:19 Tulina omuddo n'essubi eby'endogoyi zaffe; tulina omugaati n'evviini ebyaffe abaweereza bo, nze omuzaana wo n'omulenzi gwe tuli naye. Byonna bye twetaaga tubirina; tetujula kantu.”" 
Judges19:20 Omukadde n'amwanukula nti: “Mirembe. Byonna bye weetaaga mbirina; nkusaba kimu, tosula mu mbuga.”" 
Judges19:21 N'amuyingiza mu nnyumba ye; endogoyi n'aziwa emmere yaazo; nabo ne banaaba ku bigere, oluvannyuma ne balya, ne banywa." 
Judges19:22 Baali bakyali mu kusanyuka, abasajja b'omu kibuga ekyo abagwagwa, ne bajja ne beetooloola ennyumba, ne bakuba enzigi nga baleekaana, nga bwe bagamba nnannyinimu nti: “Fulumya omusajja eyayingidde omumwo twebake naye.”" 
Judges19:23 Nnannyinimu n'afuluma gye bali n'abagamba nti: “Nedda, bannange, muleme kukola kibi ekyo; kubanga omusajja ono mugenyi wange; mbeegayiridde muleke kukola kya bugwagwa kityo." 
Judges19:24 Mulabe, nnina wano muwala wange embeerera n'omuzaana w'omusajja ono; ka abo be mba nfulumya; muyinza okubeeyambisa n'okubakolako byonna bye mwagala; kyokka mbeegayiridde, omusajja ono temumukolako kya bugwagwa kityo.”" 
Judges19:25 Naye abasajja nga tebamuwuliriza. Omusajja kwe kukwata omuzaana we n'amufulumya gye bali, bo ne bamusobyako n'okumujolonga ekiro kyonna; mmambya ng'asala ne bamuta." 
Judges19:26 Nga bukedde omukazi n'akomawo ku nnyumba ya bba mwe yali, n'agwa awo ku mulyango, n'asigala awo okutuusa ng'enjuba evuddeyo." 
Judges19:27 Ku makya omusajja n'azuukuka, n'aggulawo oluggi, n'afuluma ayongere olugendo lwe. Gye yakuba amaaso, nga ku mukazi omuzaana we, agudde mu mulyango, emikono gigudde ku mwango." 
Judges19:28 N'amugamba nti: “Situka, tutambule.” Teyayanukula kantu. Awo n'amussa ku ndogoyi ye, n'adda ewaabwe." 
Judges19:29 Bwe yatuuka awaka, n'addira akambe, omuzaana we n'amusalaasalamu kitundu ku kitundu ebitundu kkumi na bibiri, n'abiweereza wonna mu Yisirayeli." 
Judges19:30 Buli eyakirabanga ng'agamba nti: “Ekifaanana kiti tekirabwangako era tekikolwangako bukya bajjajjaffe bambuka kuva mu Misiri n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. Mukyekkaanye, musale amagezi, mutubuulire eky'okukola.”" 
Judges20:1 Abayisirayeli bonna, okuva e Daani okutuuka e Beeriseba ko ne mu Gileyaadi, ne bavaayo kyenkana ng'omuntu omu, ne beekuŋŋaanya mu maaso g'Omukama e Mizupa." 
Judges20:2 Abakulembeze b'ebika byonna eby'abantu bonna aba Yisirayeli ne beetaba mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abantu ba Katonda; baali obusiriivu buna obw'abatabaazi ab'ebigere abakwasi b'ebitala. 
Judges20:3 Ababenyamiini ne bawulira nti Abayisirayeli bambuse e Mizupa. Bo Abayisirayeli ne babuuza nti: “Ekibi kino kyakolebwa kitya?” 
Judges20:4 Omusajja Omuleevi, bba w'omukazi eyatemulibwa, n'ayanukula nti: “Najja mu Gibewa ekya Benyamiini nga ndi n'omuzaana wange nsule eyo." 
Judges20:5 Abasajja ab'omu kibuga ne bannumba, ekiro ne beebungulula ennyumba mwe nali nga baagala okunzita, era n'omuzaana wange ne bamugwagwawaza, oluvannyuma n'afa." 
Judges20:6 Nakwata omuzaana wange ne mmusalaasalamu ebitundu, ne mbiweereza wonna mu busika bwa Yisirayeli, kubanga baakola ekibi kino, ekikolwa eky'obugwagwa, mu Yisirayeli." 
Judges20:7 Kati mwenna Abayisirayeli, muwe ebirowoozo byammwe n'ennamula yammwe.”" 
Judges20:8 Abantu bonna ne bayimirira ng'omuntu omu ne bagamba nti: “Tetujja kudda mu weema zaffe, tetujja kudda mu nnyumba zaffe, mpaawo n'omu mu ffe," 
Judges20:9 wabula kino kye tujja okukola Gibewa: tujja kumulumba nga twesigama ku kalulu: 
Judges20:10 Tujja kulonda abasajja kkumi mu buli kikumi mu buli kika kya Yisirayeli, ate mu buli lukumi kikumi, ne mu buli mutwalo lukumi; bano baleetere eggye emmere nga lituuse e Gibewa mu Benyamiini lisobole okuwoolera eggwanga olw'okubeera eby'obugwagwa byonna bye baakola mu Yisirayeli.”" 
Judges20:11 Abasajja bonna mu Yisirayeli ne bakuŋŋaana ng'omuntu omu okulumba ekibuga. 
Judges20:12 Ebika bya Yisirayeli ne bituma ababaka wonna mu kika kya Benyamiini, ne bababuuza nti: “Kibi ki kino ekyakolebwa mu mmwe?" 
Judges20:13 Muleete abantu abo abagwagwa ab'omu Gibewa tubatte, Yisirayeli tuginaazeeko ekibi kino.” Naye Ababenyamiini tebaawuliriza baganda baabwe Abayisirayeli." 
Judges20:14 Olwo Ababenyamiini ne bava mu bibuga byonna ne bakuŋŋaanira e Gibewa okulwanyisa Abayisirayeli. 
Judges20:15 Ku olwo Ababenyamiini ne bakunga mu bibuga abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu kakaaga abakwasi b'ebitala, nga tobaze olusanvu abalondobe mu batuuze b'omu Gibewa." 
Judges20:16 Mu bantu abo bonna mwalimu abasajja lusanvu abalondobe, ab'enkonokono, nga bwe baweereza oluviiri envuumuulo y'ejjinja, terubalema kuteeba." 
Judges20:17 Ne Yisirayeli, ng'oggyeeko Ababenyamiini, yakunga emitwalo amakumi ana abakwata ebitala, bonna nga basajja batabaazi." 
Judges20:18 Abayisirayeli bajja mu Beteli ne beebuuza ku Katonda, ne bagamba nti: “Ani mu ffe anaasooka okwambuka okulwanyisa Ababenyamiini?” Omukama n'abaanukula nti: “Yuda y'anaasooka okwambuka.”" 
Judges20:19 Ku makya Abayisirayeli ne basiisira emitala wa Gibewa. 
Judges20:20 Ne bagenda okulumba Ababenyamiini; abasajja ba Yisirayeli ne bataza eggye okulumba Gibewa. 
Judges20:21 Ku olwo Ababenyamiini ne bava mu Gibewa, ne batta mu ddwaniro abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu Bayisirayeli." 
Judges20:22 Naye Abayisirayeli ne baguma, ne baddamu okutaza eggye mu bifo byabwe bye baalimu ku lukulembedde." 
Judges20:23 Abayisirayeli ne bambuka ne bakaabira mu maaso g'Omukama okutuusa akawungeezi; ne bamwebuuzaako, ne bamugamba nti: “Tuddemu okulumba Ababenyamiini baganda baffe?” Omukama n'abaanukula nti: “Mubalumbe.”" 
Judges20:24 Enkeera Abayisirayeli ne basemberera Ababenyamiini. 
Judges20:25 Ababenyamiini ne bava mu Gibewa okubasisinkana, ne batta mu Bayisirayeli abasajja omutwalo gumu mu kanaana; bonna baali batabaazi abakwasi b'ebitala." 
Judges20:26 Olwo Abayisirayeli n'abantu bonna ne bajja e Beteli, ne bakaabira mu maaso g'Omukama. Ne basiiba olunaku lwonna okutuusa akawungeezi, ne baweereza Omukama ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu." 
Judges20:27 Abayisirayeli ne beebuuza ku Mukama. Mu budde obwo Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama yali ebeera eyo; 
Judges20:28 Finekasi mutabani wa Eleyazari mutabani wa Aroni ye yaweerezanga mu maaso gaayo. Ne beebuuza nti: “Tuddemu okulumba Ababenyamiini baganda baffe?” Omukama n'abagamba nti: “Mulumbe, kubanga enkya nzija kubabawa mu mikono gyammwe.”" 
Judges20:29 Abayisirayeli ne bazingiza ekibuga Gibewa okukyetooloola. 
Judges20:30 Ku lunaku olwokusatu ne balumba Ababenyamiini, ne bataza eggye okulumba Gibewa mu bifo bye baalimu ku mirundi egyasooka." 
Judges20:31 N'Ababenyamiini ne bavaayo okubasisinkana, ne batwalirizibwa okuleka ekibuga emabega; ne basooka okutta mu Bayisirayeli nga bwe baakola ku mirundi egyasooka; abantu bangi abaafiira ku makubo, eriraga e Beteli n'eriraga e Gibewa, n'abandi ku ttale; baawera abasajja amakumi asatu okuva mu Yisirayeli." 
Judges20:32 Ababenyamiini baali balowooza nti: “Tubagobye nga bwe gwali mu kusooka,” nga n'Abayisirayeli bagamba nti: “Mugire tukube akaddannyuma tubaggye mu kibuga bajje eno mu nguudo.”" 
Judges20:33 Bonna abasajja ba Yisirayeli ne basituka mu bifo byabwe ne bagenda balindira e Baali-Tamari. Awo Abayisirayeli abaali beekwese ne bafubutukayo mu bifo byabwe, ne balumba ebugwanjuba wa Gibewa." 
Judges20:34 Abasajja mutwalo mulamba abalondobe mu Yisirayeli yenna ne bajja balumba Gibewa, olutalo ne lunyiinyittira. Ababenyamiini tebaamanya kabi kabatuukiridde." 
Judges20:35 Omukama n'abatta mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli. Ku olwo Yisirayeli n'atta emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano mu kikumi mu Benyamiini, abaali abasajja abambalira ebitala." 
Judges20:36 Ababenyamiini ne balaba nga bagobeddwa. Abayisirayeli baasooka kudduka Benyamiini, kubanga baali beesiga bali be baali balese beekwekeredde Gibewa." 
Judges20:37 Abaali beekwese baafubutuka ne bayingira Gibewa, ne basaasaana wonna mu kibuga, kyonna ne bakitta n'ekitala." 
Judges20:38 Abasajja ba Yisirayeli baali bagambye abaakola ogw'okwekwekerera nti bwe banaanyoosa omukka okuva mu kibuga," 
Judges20:39 olwo abasajja ba Yisirayeli nga bakomawo mu ddwaniro. Ababenyamiini baali basoose okukuba Abayisirayeli, nga basse ng'amakumi asatu, ne balowooza nti: “Tubagobye nga bwe gwali mu lutalo olwasooka.”" 
Judges20:40 Naye omukka mu kibuga bwe gwasooka okunyooka, Ababenyamiini ne bakebuka, ne balaba ng'ekibuga kittunka, omukka nga gwambuka ku ggulu." 
Judges20:41 Abayisirayeli ne babakyukira; Ababenyamiini ne batengera, kubanga baalaba ng'akabi kabatuukiridde." 
Judges20:42 Ababenyamiini ne badduka abasajja ba Yisirayeli nga badda mu ddungu, naye era olutalo ne lubagobererayo, anti Abayisirayeli abaava mu bibuga baabasangayo ne babakubirayo." 
Judges20:43 Baazingiza Ababenyamiini ne babamerako obutabaweeza, ne babalinnyirira okutuusiza ddala kumpi ne Gibewa ebuvanjuba." 
Judges20:44 Mu Benyamiini ne muttibwamu abasajja omutwalo gumu mu kanaana, bonna baali basajja abeesobola." 
Judges20:45 Abaasigalawo bwe baali badduka nga badda mu ddungu okulaga ku lwazi lw'e Rimmoni, Abayisirayeli ne babattiramu eyo ku makubo enkumi ttaano. Ne bongera okubagoba obutabaweeza okutuukira ddala e Gidomu, ne babattamu abalala enkumi bbiri." 
Judges20:46 Bonna abaafa ku olwo mu Benyamiini baawera emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano, abasajja abambalira ebitala, bonna abaali abasajja abeesobola." 
Judges20:47 Naye abasajja lukaaga ne baddukira mu ddungu ku lwazi lw'e Rimmoni, ne babeera eyo okumala emyezi ena." 
Judges20:48 Abayisirayeli ne bakyukira Ababenyamiini, ne batta n'ekitala abasajja bonna mu bibuga, n'ebisolo, na buli kintu kye baasangirizanga; buli kibuga kye baatuukangako nga bakiteekera omuliro." 
Judges21:1 Abayisirayeli baali balayidde e Mizupa nti: “Mu ffe tewaba awa Mubenyamiini muwala we abeere mukazi we.” 
Judges21:2 Abantu ne bajja e Beteli ne batuula mu maaso ga Katonda okutuusa akawungeezi; ne basitula amaloboozi gaabwe ne bakaaba nnyo nga bagamba nti: 
Judges21:3 “Ayi Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, lwaki kino kiguddewo mu bantu bo olwa leero, ekika ekimu mu Yisirayeli ne kisalibwako?”" 
Judges21:4 Enkeera, mu matulutulu ne bazimba omwaliiro ne baweererezaako ebitambiro ebyokye n'eby'okussa ekimu." 
Judges21:5 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba nti: “Ani mu bika bya Yisirayeli byonna atazze mu lukuŋŋaana wa Mukama?” Baali balayidde nti: “Buli yenna atajje mu lukuŋŋaana wa Mukama mu Mizupa wa kuttibwa.” 
Judges21:6 Abayisirayeli ne banyolwa olwa baganda baabwe ab'omu Benyamiini, ne bagamba nti: “Olwa leero ekika kimu kisaliddwako ku Yisirayeli." 
Judges21:7 Tukole tutya abasigaddewo okubafunira abakazi, anti twalayira dda ffenna ew'Omukama nti tetugenda kubafumbiza bawala baffe.”" 
Judges21:8 Awo ne bagamba nti: “Mu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli, ani atazze mu lukuŋŋaana wa Mukama mu Mizupa?” Ne bazuula nga mu lusiisira tewaali n'omu yali azze mu lukuŋŋaana okuva mu Yabesi-Gileyaadi," 
Judges21:9 kubanga bwe baabala abantu, tebaasangamu n'omu yali avudde Yabesi-Gileyaadi." 
Judges21:10 Ekibiina ne kituma abasajja abeesobola omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri, ne babalagira nti: “Mugende mutte n'ekitala abatuuze b'omu Yabesi-Gileyaadi, n'abakazi n'abaana." 
Judges21:11 Kino kye muba mukola: Mutte kiisi musajja na buli mukazi atakyali mbeerera.” 
Judges21:12 Basanga mu batuuze b'omu Yabesi-Gileyaadi abawala embeerera ebikumi bina, abaali bateebakanga na musajja, ne babaleeta mu lusiisira e Silo mu Kanaani." 
Judges21:13 Ekibiina kyonna ne kituma ababaka, ne boogera eri Ababenyamiini abaali ku lwazi lw'e Rimmoni, ne babatuusaako obubaka obw'okutabagana." 
Judges21:14 Ababenyamiini ne bajja mu budde obwo, ne baweebwa bawala b'e Yabesi-Gileyaadi abaali bataliziddwawo; naye baali tebabamala bonna." 
Judges21:15 Abantu ne banyolwa olwa Benyamiini, kubanga Omukama yali ayawudde mu bika bya Yisirayeli." 
Judges21:16 Abakadde b'ekibiina ne bagamba nti: “Abakazi bonna mu Benyamiini bamaze ne battibwa, tuggye wa abakazi okuwa abasajja abasigaddewo?”" 
Judges21:17 Ne bagamba nti: “Abaawonawo mu Benyamiini balina okufuna abasika, ekika ekimu kireme kusaanawo mu Yisirayeli." 
Judges21:18 Bawala baffe tetuyinza kubabawa olw'ekirayiro kye twakola nti: ‘Avumirirwe oyo aliwa Benyamiini omukazi.’ ” 
Judges21:19 Ne bagamba nti: “Laba, mu Silo eriyo olunaku olukulu olw'Omukama olwa buli mwaka; Silo ekiri mu mambuka ga Beteli mu buvanjuba bw'oluguudo oluva e Beteli okulaga e Sekemu mu maserengeta g'ekibuga Lebona.”" 
Judges21:20 Awo ne balagira Ababenyamiini nti: “Mugende mwekweke mu mizabbibu. 
Judges21:21 Mutunule; bawala b'e Silo bwe bavaayo okwetaba mu mazina, nga mufubutuka mu mizabbibu, buli omu nga yeenyagiramu omukazi mu bawala ba Silo, nga muddayo mu nsi ya Benyamiini." 
Judges21:22 Bakitaabwe ne bannyinaabwe bwe banajja gye tuli okutuyombesa, tunaabagamba nti: ‘Mutusaasire, nabo mumale gabasonyiwa, kubanga tetwabafunira bakazi mu lutalo, nammwe temwazza musango kubanga bawala bammwe temubabawadde buwi.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Ababenyamiini ne bakola kye baabalagira; buli omu mu Babenyamiini n'agenda ne yeenyagirayo omukazi mu bawala abaali bazina. Ne badda ku busika bwabwe, ne bazimba ebibuga, ne babisengamu." 
Judges21:24 N'Abayisirayeli ne bava eyo mu budde obwo, ne baddayo buli omu mu kika kye ne mu ssiga lye ne ku busika bwe." 
Judges21:25 Mu nnaku ezo mu Yisirayeli temwali kabaka, wabula buli omu kye yatwalanga okuba ekituufu nga ky'akola." 
Ruth1:1 Mu nnaku abalamuzi we baali bafugira, enjala yagwa mu nsi. Omusajja n'ava e Beteleemu ekya Yuda, ng'ali ne mukazi we n'abaana be babiri, n'agenda agire ng'abeera mu nsi y'e Mowabu." 
Ruth1:2 Erinnya lye nga ye Elimeleki, ate mukazi we nga ye Nawomi; amannya g'abatabani be ababiri nga be ba Makuloni ne Kiliyoni; baali basibuka Efurata mu Beteleemu ekya Yuda. Baagenda mu nsi y'e Mowabu ne babeera eyo." 
Ruth1:3 Olwali olwo Elimeleki bba wa Nawomi n'afa, ye n'asigala ne batabani be ababiri;" 
Ruth1:4 abalenzi ne bawasa abakazi Abamowabu, omu ng'ayitibwa Orupa, ate omulala Ruusi; ne babeera eyo emyaka nga kkumi." 
Ruth1:5 Ate bombi Makuloni ne Kiliyoni ne bafa, Nawomi n'asigala ng'afiiriddwa bba ne batabani be bombi." 
Ruth1:6 Bwe yawulira nti Omukama adduukiridde abantu be, n'abawa emmere, kwe kusituka ave mu nsi y'e Mowabu adde ku butaka ne bakaabaana bombi." 
Ruth1:7 N'asitula ne bakaabaana bombi, n'ava mu nsi gye yali abeera, ne yessa mu kkubo erimuzza mu nsi ya Yuda." 
Ruth1:8 Nawomi n'agamba bakaabaana be ababiri nti: “Muddeeyo buli omu ewa nnyina. Omukama abagirire ekisa, nga nammwe bwe mwakigirira nze n'abagenzi." 
Ruth1:9 Omukama abawe, mufune okuwummula buli omu mu maka ga bba.” N'abanywegera. Bo ne batema emiranga ne bakaaba," 
Ruth1:10 ne bagamba nti: “Tujja kugenda naawe mu bantu bo.” 
Ruth1:11 Naye Nawomi n'abaanukula nti: “Bawala bange, mweddire ewammwe. Lwaki mugenda nange? Nkyalina abaana mu lubuto abalisobola okufuuka babbammwe?" 
Ruth1:12 Mweddire ewammwe, bawala bange; mugende, nze neekaddiyidde, sikyasobola kufumbirwa. Ne bwe nandigambye nti wakyaliyo essuubi, n'ekiro kino ne nfumbirwa ne nzaala abalenzi," 
Ruth1:13 mwandirinze okutuusa nga bakuze? Mwandigize muleka okufumbirwa olw'okubeera bo? Nedda, bawala bange; nnyolwa nnyo okusinga mmwe, kubanga omukono gw'Omukama gwavaayo okunkuba.”" 
Ruth1:14 Ne batema emiranga, ne baddamu buto okukaaba. Orupa n'anywegera nnyazaala we, naye ye Ruusi n'amulemerako." 
Ruth1:15 Nawomi n'amugamba nti: “Laba muganda wo wuuli azzeeyo mu bantu be n'eri balubaale be, ddayo naye.”" 
Ruth1:16 Ruusi n'ayanukula nti: “Tonkaka kukuleka, oba kuva ku kya kukugoberera, “kubanga yonna gy'onoogenda nange gye nnaagenda; w'onoosulanga nange we nnaasulanga. Abantu bo be baliba abantu bange; Katonda wo y'aliba Katonda wange." 
Ruth1:17 Gy'olifiira, nange gye ndifiira; eyo nange gye balinziika. Omukama ankole bw'atyo, ate ddala asinze nawo, singa si lumbe lwe lulitwawukanya.”" 
Ruth1:18 Nawomi bwe yalaba nga Ruusi amaliridde okugenda naye, n'alekera awo okumuwakanya." 
Ruth1:19 Awo bombi ne bagenda, ne batuuka e Beteleemu. Bwe baayingira ekibuga, ekibuga kyonna ne kisasamala olw'okubeera bo. Abakazi ne bagamba nti: “Ono si ye Nawomi.”" 
Ruth1:20 N'abagamba nti: “Temumpita Nawomi, wabula Mara, kubanga Omuyinza wa buli kantu obulamu bwange yabujjuza ennyiike." 
Ruth1:21 “Nagenda ndi mujjuvu, Omukama ankomezzaawo nga ndi mwereere. Mumpitira ki Nawomi, nze Omukama gwe yabonyaabonya, Omuyinza wa buli kantu gwe yalabya ennaku?”" 
Ruth1:22 Bw'atyo Nawomi n'ajja ne Ruusi Omumowabu, mukaamwana, ng'adda okuva mu nsi y'e Mowabu. Baatuuka e Beteleemu ng'amakungula ga sayiri gatandika." 
Ruth2:1 Nawomi yalina mulamu we, omusajja omugagga, ow'omu kika kya Elimeleki, erinnya lye nga ye Bowazi." 
Ruth2:2 Ruusi Omumowabu n'agamba nnyazaala we nti: “Nsaba kugenda mu nnimiro nnonderere ebirimba ebigenda bifikkira, mu buwufu bw'oyo gwe nnaasangako ekisa mu maaso ge.” Nawomi n'amwanukula nti: “Genda, muwala.”" 
Ruth2:3 N'agenda, n'alonderera ebirimba abakesa mwe baabanga bayise. Kazzi ennimiro gye yeesangamu nga nnyiniyo ye Bowazi ow'omu kika kya Elimeleki." 
Ruth2:4 Ate mu kadde ako Bowazi naye n'atuuka ng'ava e Beteleemu, n'alamusa abakesa nti: “Omukama abeere nammwe.” Nabo ne bamwanukula nti: “Omukama akuwe omukisa.”" 
Ruth2:5 Bowazi n'abuuza nnampala w'abakesa nti: “Omuwala ono w'ani?” 
Ruth2:6 Nnampala n'addamu nti: “Oyo ye muwala Omumowabu; yajja ne Nawomi nga bava mu nsi y'e Mowabu. 
Ruth2:7 Yasabye nti: ‘Munzikirize nnonderere, nkuŋŋaanye mu binywa nga ngoberera abakesa mwe baba bayise.’ Yazze era obwedda akola okuva ku makya n'okutuusa kati, nga tawumuddeemu n'akatono.”" 
Ruth2:8 Awo Bowazi n'agamba Ruusi nti: “Muwala, wulira; togenda kulonderera mu nnimiro ndala, tova na mu kifo kino, wabula sigala kumpi wano ne bawala bange." 
Ruth2:9 Laba we bakungula, naawe ogende ng'obagoberera. Ŋŋambye abalenzi wabulewo akusobeza; ennyonta bw'ekuluma, genda ku nsumbi onywe ku mazzi abalenzi ge baakimye.”" 
Ruth2:10 Ruusi n'agwa nga yeevuunise ku maaso ge, n'avunnama ku ttaka, n'amugamba nti: “Kinviiridde ku ki nze okusanga ekisa mu maaso go n'onfaako, nze omukazi omugwira?”" 
Ruth2:11 Bowazi n'amuddamu nti: “Bambuulira byonna bye wakolera nnyazaala wo okuva lwe wafiirwa balo, nga bwe waleka kitaawo ne nnyoko n'ensi yo mw'ozaalibwa n'ojja mu bantu be wali tomanyi mu kusooka." 
Ruth2:12 Omukama akuweere olwa kino ky'okoze, ofune n'empeera enzijuvu ew'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli gy'ozze, nnyini biwaawaatiro mw'oddukidde.”" 
Ruth2:13 Ne Ruusi n'agamba nti: “Mukama wange, singa nno nnyongedde okusanga ekisa mu maaso go! Onkubagizza, n'oŋŋumya newandibadde nga sisaanira na kubeera omu ku bawala bo abakuweereza.”" 
Ruth2:14 Obudde obw'okulya bwe bwatuuka, Bowazi n'amugamba nti: “Jjangu wano, funa ku kagaati, okoze ne mu nkaatu.” Ruusi n'atuula awo ku lusegere lw'abakesa, n'amuweereza empeke ensiike, n'alya, n'akkuta n'alemwa n'okulemwa." 
Ruth2:15 Bwe yasituka alonderere ebirimba, Bowazi n'alagira abalenzi be nti: “Ne bw'akuŋŋaanya mu binywa, temumusobeza." 
Ruth2:16 Ne ku miganda musowoleemu ebirimba mubisuule awo alonderonde, temumukaabukira.”" 
Ruth2:17 Ruusi n'alonderera mu nnimiro okutuusa akawungeezi. Bye yakuŋŋaanya n'abiwuula; sayiri gwe yaggyamu n'aweza ng'efa nnamba. 
Ruth2:18 N'abitwala, n'addayo mu kibuga; nnyazaala we n'alaba bye yali akuŋŋaanyizza, era n'aggyayo n'amuwa ku mmere eyali efisseewo ng'amaze okukkuta." 
Ruth2:19 Nnyazaala we n'amugamba nti: “Leero wakuŋŋaanyizza wa? Wakoledde wa? Aweebwe omukisa oyo eyakufuddeko.” N'abuulira nnyazaala we ew'oyo gye yakoledde, n'amugamba nti: “Erinnya ly'omusajja gwe nkoze naye ye Bowazi.”" 
Ruth2:20 Ko Nawomi nti: “Omukama amuwe omukisa, oyo ataggya kisa kye ku balamu n'abafu.” Ate n'amugamba nti: “Oyo wa luganda lwaffe; ali mu abo abalina obuvunaanyizibwa okutununula.”" 
Ruth2:21 Ko Ruusi Omumowabu nti: “Yandagidde na kino nti: ‘Sigala n'abakozi bange, okutuusa bye bankungulira byonna nga biweddewo.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Nawomi n'agamba Ruusi mukaamwana we nti: “Muwala, ekyo kye kisinga obulungi gy'oli singa onoosigala kumpi ne bawala be, kubanga mu nnimiro y'omulala okyayinza okusobezebwa.”" 
Ruth2:23 Bw'atyo Ruusi n'asigala ne bawala ba Bowazi okulonderera okutuusa eŋŋano ne sayiri byonna nga bimaze okukungulibwa; kyokka yabeeranga wa nnyazaala we. 
Ruth3:1 Olumu Nawomi, nnyazaala we, n'amugamba nti: “Muwala, olowooza sandikuzuulidde we wandibadde owummulira n'oba bulungi?" 
Ruth3:2 Ne Bowazi nnyini bawala b'obadde nabo mu nnimiro, si wa luganda lwaffe? Ate laba ekiro kino yennyini ajja kubeera ng'awewa sayiri mu gguuliro lye." 
Ruth3:3 Awo nno, naaba, weekube obuwoowo, oyambale engoye zo ennungi, oserengete mu gguuliro; naye tomweraga okutuusa ng'amaze okulya n'okunywa." 
Ruth3:4 Bw'anaaba agenze okwebaka, wekkaanye ekifo we yeebase; oluvannyuma ojja kugenda obikkule ebigere bye, weebake, ye anaakubuulira eky'okukola.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ruusi n'addamu nti: “Kyonna ky'onooba ondagidde, nzija kukikola.”" 
Ruth3:6 N'aserengeta mu gguuliro, n'akola byonna nnyazaala we bye yali amulagidde." 
Ruth3:7 Bowazi bwe yamala okulya n'okunywa, ng'acamuseemu, n'agenda yeebaka eri egguuliro gye likoma kumpi n'entuumu z'emiganda. Ruusi n'asooba mpola n'amubikkula ebigere, ne yeebaka awo." 
Ruth3:8 Mu ttumbi wakati Bowazi ekintu ne kimusisimula, n'asituka, n'alaba omukazi nga yeebase eri ku bigere bye." 
Ruth3:9 N'amubuuza nti: “Ggwe ani?” Ko ye nti: “Nze Ruusi omuzaana wo. Bikka omuzaana wo n'omunagiro gwo kubanga ggwe oteekwa okunnunula.” 
Ruth3:10 Ko Bowazi nti: “Muwala, Omukama akuwe omukisa; ekisa n'obwesigwa bwo kati bisinze n'ebyasooka, kubanga tozze mu kunoonya bavubuka, abaavu oba abagagga." 
Ruth3:11 Leka nno kutya, muwala; kyonna ky'onoogamba nzija kukikukolera; anti abantu bonna ab'omu kibuga kyange bakumanyi bw'oli omukazi ow'ekitiibwa." 
Ruth3:12 Sigaanyi, nze nteekeddwa okukununula, naye waliyo ow'oluganda obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okukununula gwe bugwako ennyo okusinga nze." 
Ruth3:13 Sigala ekiro kino; nga bukedde, bw'anaayagala okukununula, kale anaakununula; bw'anaaba tayagadde, Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, tewali kubuusabuusa, nze nnaakununula. Weebake okutuusa enkya.”" 
Ruth3:14 Ruusi ne yeebaka awo ku bigere bye okutuusa enkeera; naye yazuukuka bukyali ng'abantu tebannasobola kwawula ono ku oli. Bowazi n'agamba nti: “Wekkaanye! Tewabaawo amanya nti omukazi yazzeeko wano mu gguuliro.” 
Ruth3:15 N'agamba era nti: “Ndeetera omunagiro gwe weebikkiridde, ogwanjuluze.” Bwe yagwanjuluza, Bowazi n'ayiwamu ebipimo mukaaga ebya sayiri, n'abimutikka. N'addayo mu kibuga." 
Ruth3:16 Ruusi bwe yatuuka eri nnyazaala we, Nawomi n'amubuuza nti: “Muwala, bikugendedde bitya?” Ruusi n'amunyumiza byonna oli bye yali amukoledde," 
Ruth3:17 n'ayongerako nti: “Yampadde n'ebipimo mukaaga ebya sayiri ng'agamba nti: ‘Saagala odde wa nnyazaala wo ngalo nsa.’ ” 
Ruth3:18 Nawomi n'agamba nti: “Muwala, lindako okutuusa ng'otegedde gye bikkidde, kubanga mmanyi omuntu oyo tajja kuweera okutuusa ng'ebintu abigonjodde olwa leero.”" 
Ruth4:1 Awo Bowazi n'ayambuka ku mulyango gw'ekibuga, n'atuula awo. Aba akyali awo ow'oluganda omu eyalina obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okununula n'atuuka, n'amugamba nti: “Kyamako otuule wano;” n'akyama, n'atuula." 
Ruth4:2 Bowazi n'aleeta kkumi ku bakadde b'omu kibuga n'abagamba nti: “Mutuule wano;” nabo ne batuula. 
Ruth4:3 Awo n'agamba eyalina obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okununula nti: “Nawomi eyakomawo okuva mu nsi y'e Mowabu, atunda ekitundu ky'ettaka lya muganda waffe Elimeleki." 
Ruth4:4 Njagadde nkikugambe, okiwulire, nkuwe n'ekirowoozo oligule mu maaso ga bonna abatudde wano, n'ag'abakadde, abakulu mu bantu bange. Bw'oba obuvunaanyizibwa onoobutwala n'olinunula, kikole; bw'obanga toolinunule, mbuulira mmanye. Anti tewali wa luganda mulala alina kukola ekyo okuggyako ggwe, ate nze nkuddirira.” Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Nzija kulinunula.”" 
Ruth4:5 Bowazi kwe kumugamba nti: “Lw'ogula ettaka n'oliggya ku Nawomi ne Ruusi Omumowabu, ne nnamwandu w'omufu oteekwa okumutwalirako, osigazeewo erinnya ly'omufu n'obusika bwe.”" 
Ruth4:6 Eyalina obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okununula n'agamba nti: “Sijja kulinunula, kubanga bwe nkikola, nzija kugootaanya eby'obusika by'omu nnyumba yange. Ggwe linunule, nze sijja kusobola.”" 
Ruth4:7 Kati nno edda mu Yisirayeli waalingayo empisa nti mu kununula ne mu kuwaanyisaganya ebintu, oli okukakasa nti ekikye akiviiriddemu ddala, yanaanulanga engatto ye n'agiwa munne; mu Yisirayeli bwe baajuliranga batyo." 
Ruth4:8 Eyalina obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okununula bw'atyo naye yagamba Bowazi nti: “Lyegulire;” n'anaanula engatto ye mu kigere. 
Ruth4:9 Bowazi n'alangirira eri abakadde n'abantu bonna nti: “Olwa leero mmwe mubaddewo ng'abajulirwa, byonna ebibadde ebya Elimeleki ne Kiliyoni ne Makuloni kati mbiguze ku Nawomi," 
Ruth4:10 ne Ruusi Omumowabu, mukazi wa Makuloni, naye mmututte abeere mukazi wange, nsigazeewo erinnya ly'omufu n'obusika bwe busigalewo, erinnya lye lireme kuggweekerera mu baganda be ne mu kibuga kye. Kale nno mmwe bajulirwa b'ekigambo kino.”" 
Ruth4:11 Abantu bonna abaali ku mulyango n'abakadde ne baanukula nti: “Tuli bajulirwa. Omukazi ono agenda okuyingira mu nnyumba yo, Omukama amukolere nga bwe yakolera Rakeli ne Leya, bombi abaazimba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli. “ ‘Beera muzira mu Efurata, era erinnya lyo limanyike mu Beteleemu.’" 
Ruth4:12 “Mu mwana Omukama gw'aliba akuwadde mu muwala ono, ennyumba yo ebeere ng'ennyumba ya Perezi, Tamari gwe yazaalira Yuda.”" 
Ruth4:13 Bw'atyo Bowazi n'atwala Ruusi, n'afuuka mukazi we. Bowazi yajja gy'ali, Omukama n'amuwa n'aba olubuto, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi." 
Ruth4:14 Abakazi ne bagamba Nawomi nti: “Omukama agulumizibwe, olwa leero ataakulese kubulwa wa kukununula; erinnya lye litenderezebwe wonna mu Yisirayeli." 
Ruth4:15 Omwana alizza buto obulamu bwo, alikulabirira ne mu bukadde bwo, kubanga mukaamwana wo oyo akwagala, akusingira n'abaana ab'obulenzi omusanvu, y'amuzadde.”" 
Ruth4:16 Nawomi n'addira omwana n'amussa ku mubiri gwe, n'aba mukuza we." 
Ruth4:17 Abakazi ab'oku muliraano ne bamuwa erinnya, ne bagamba nti: “Nawomi afunye omwana ow'obulenzi.” N'atuumibwa Obedi; ye oyo kitaawe wa Yesse azaala Dawudi." 
Ruth4:18 Lino lye zzadde lya Perezi: Perezi yazaala Kezuroni; 
Ruth4:19 Kezuroni n'azaala Ramu; Ramu n'azaala Amminadabu; 
Ruth4:20 Amminadabu n'azaala Nakusoni; Nakusoni n'azaala Salumoni; 
Ruth4:21 Salumoni n'azaala Bowazi: Bowazi n'azaala Obedi; 
Ruth4:22 Obedi n'azaala Yesse, ate Yesse n'azaala Dawudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Waaliwo omusajja omu ow'e Ramatayimu-Zofimu, mu nsozi za Efurayimu, erinnya lye nga ye Elukana, mutabani wa Yerokamu, mutabani wa Eliwu, mutabani wa Toku, mutabani wa Zufi, Omwefurayimu." 
1Samuel1:2 Yalina abakazi babiri; omu nga ye Anna, owookubiri nga ye Peninna. Peninna yalina abaana, ye Anna nga talina." 
1Samuel1:3 Omusajja ono, buli mwaka yavanga mu kibuga kye n'ayambuka, asinze n'okutambirira Omukama w'Amagye mu Silo. Eyo waaliyo bakabona b'Omukama babiri, Kofuni ne Finekasi, bombi nga batabani ba Eli." 
1Samuel1:4 Olunaku bwe lwatuukanga Elukana okutambira, ng'awa Peninna mukazi we n'abaana be bonna abalenzi n'abawala emigabo gyabwe." 
1Samuel1:5 Anna yamuwanga omugabo gwa mirundi ebiri kubanga yali muganzi; kyokka Omukama yali tamuwadde kuzaala. 
1Samuel1:6 Naye muggya we yamusosonkerezanga amukalaze kubanga Omukama yali tamuwadde kuzaala. 
1Samuel1:7 Kino nga kibaawo buli mwaka; Anna buli lwe yatuukanga okwambuka mu Nnyumba y'Omukama, ng'amunyiiza bw'atyo; Anna n'akaabanga n'emmere n'emulema okulya." 
1Samuel1:8 Bba Elukana n'amugamba nti: “Anna, okaabira ki? Lwaki tolya mmere? Lwaki omutima gwo gukwennyise? Nze sikusingira baana ekkumi ab'obulenzi?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Olumu bwe baamala okulya n'okunywa mu Silo, Anna n'asituka. Eli kabona yali atudde ku ntebe awo ku miryango gy'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
1Samuel1:10 Anna yali anyolwa mu mutima, n'asaba ew'Omukama ng'akaaba nnyo." 
1Samuel1:11 Ne yeeyama ew'Omukama ng'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama w'Amagye, bw'oliba olabye n'otunuulira okubonaabona kw'omuzaana wo, n'ojjukira omuzaana wo, n'otomwerabira, n'omala omuwa omwana ow'obulenzi, ŋŋenda kumuwa Omukama ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe; akamwano tekaliyita mu mutwe gwe.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Bwe yali yeegayirira Omukama, Eli nga yekkaanya akamwa ke." 
1Samuel1:13 Anna yali ayogera mu mutima gwe, emimwa gye gyokka nga gye gyenyeenya, naye ng'eddoboozi lye teriwulikika. Eli n'alowooza nti atamidde." 
1Samuel1:14 Eli kwe kumugamba nti: “Oneetamiiza kutuusa wa? Gira evviini ekuliko ekwamukeko.” 
1Samuel1:15 Anna n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Si ky'ekyo, ssebo, wabula mukazi wattu nkabiriddwa mu mwoyo. Sinywedde vviini oba ekitamiiza ekirala kyonna, wabula omutima gwange gwe mbikkulidde Omukama." 
1Samuel1:16 Omuzaana wo tomuyita mukazi mutamiivu; obwedda neegayirira wano n'okutuusa kati olw'obulumi bwange n'ennaku ebingi.” 
1Samuel1:17 Awo Eli n'amugamba nti: “Genda mu ddembe, ne Katonda wa Yisirayeli akuwe ky'omusabye.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Ye n'amugamba nti: “Singa nno omuzaana wo asanze ekisa mu maaso go!” Omukazi n'agenda amakubo ge; n'alya ku mmere, era amaaso ge tegaddayo kulaga nnaku." 
1Samuel1:19 Bwe baazuukuka ku makya, ne basinza mu maaso g'Omukama, oluvannyuma ne baddayo ewaabwe mu Rama. Elukana ne yeebaka ne mukazi we Anna; Omukama n'amujjukira." 
1Samuel1:20 Ennaku bwe zeetooloola Anna n'aba olubuto, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi, n'amutuuma Samweli, ng'agamba nti: “Kubanga namusaba Omukama.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Elukana bwe yayambuka n'ennyumba ye yonna atambirire Omukama ekitambiro ekya buli mwaka, n'okutuukiriza obweyamo," 
1Samuel1:22 Anna teyayambuka; naye n'agamba bba nti: “Omwana bw'aliva ku mabeere, ndimutwala ne mmwanjula mu maaso g'Omukama, asigalire ddala eyo ebbanga lyonna.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Bba Elukana n'amugamba nti: “Kola nga bw'osiimye; sigala okutuusa omwana lw'onoomuggya ku mabeere; nsaba kimu kyokka, Omukama atuukirize ekigambo kye.” Omukazi n'asigala awaka, n'ayonsa omwana we okutuusa lwe yamuggya ku mabeere." 
1Samuel1:24 Omwana olwava ku mabeere, Anna n'ayambuka naye e Silo; yatwala ente ennume ya myaka esatu n'efa ssatu ez'obuwunga, n'endyanga y'evviini; n'amuleeta mu Nnyumba y'Omukama mu Silo. Omwana yali akyali muto." 
1Samuel1:25 Bwe baamala okutta ente ennume, omwana ne bamuleeta ewa Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Anna n'agamba Eli nti: “Ssebo, mazima ggwe ng'oli mulamu, nze mukazi oli eyayimirira mu maaso go wano nga nsaba ew'Omukama." 
1Samuel1:27 Nali nsaba mwana ono; Omukama yampa kye namusaba. 
1Samuel1:28 Nange kyenvudde mmuwa Omukama; ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe aweereddwa ew'Omukama.” Ne basinziza Omukama mu kifo ekyo. 
1Samuel2:1 Anna ne yeegayirira, n'agamba nti: “Omutima gwange gujaguliza mu Mukama, N'obwanga bwange bugulumiziddwa mu Mukama wange; akamwa kange keewaanira ku balabe bange, kubanga neenyumiriza mu bulokozi bwo." 
1Samuel2:2 “Teri mutuukirivu ali nga Mukama, teri na mulala okuggyako ggwe; era teri Lwazi luli nga Katonda waffe." 
1Samuel2:3 “Muleke kubeera awo nga mwegulumiza ebitaggwa, n'akamwa kammwe okwogera eby'olunkulu; kubanga Katonda ye Mukama ow'amagezi, ye y'apima obuzito bw'ebikolwa." 
1Samuel2:4 “Emisaale gy'abazira gimenyese; abaali abanafu bakindikiddwa amaanyi. 
1Samuel2:5 Ababadde abakkufu kati bazze ku kusaka, naye abayala tebakyalumwa njala. Omugumba azadde musanvu, naye eyali aweza abaana asigalidde awo." 
1Samuel2:6 “Omukama y'awa okufa n'awa n'obulamu, atwala emagombe, ate n'aggyayo." 
1Samuel2:7 Omukama ayavuwaza, ate n'agaggawaza, atoowaza ate n'agulumiza." 
1Samuel2:8 Omwavu amusitula n'amuggya mu kkukuuzi, omunkuseere n'amuggya ku lubungo; abatuuza wamu n'abakungu, n'abawa okusikira entebe ey'ekitiibwa. Anti emisingi gy'ensi gya Mukama, ku gyo kwe yabanga enkulungo y'ensi." 
1Samuel2:9 “Alikuuma ebigere by'abatuukirivu be, ababi balibasirisiza eyo mu nzikiza; kubanga omuntu tawangula lwa maanyi ge." 
1Samuel2:10 Omukama alimerengula abamuwakanya, aliyima mu ggulu n'ababwatukira nga laddu; Omukama aliramula enkingi z'ensi. Aliwa kabaka we obuyinza; aligulumiza amaanyi g'omusiige we.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Elukana n'addayo ewaabwe e Rama. Ye omwana yaweerezanga mu maaso g'Omukama, mu maaso ga Eli kabona." 
1Samuel2:12 Batabani ba Eli baali bantu mpongabyoya, nga tebafa ku Mukama." 
1Samuel2:13 Bakabona baalina empisa gye baayisangamu abantu, ng'oli bwe yabanga aweereza ekitambiro, ng'omuweereza wa kabona ajja akutte entoozo ey'ennimi essatu, awo ng'ennyama etandise okutokota," 
1Samuel2:14 ng'agisogga mu kikalango, oba mu bbiga, oba mu nsaka, oba mu ntamu; kyonna entoozo kye yasitulangamu nga kabona akitwala. Bwe baakolanga batyo Abayisirayeli bonna abajjanga e Silo." 
1Samuel2:15 N'amasavu gaabanga teganaggya ng'omuweereza wa kabona ajja, ng'agamba atambira nti: “Mpa ennyama ngyokere kabona; tajja kukkiriza nnyama yo nfumbe, wabula embisi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Atambira bwe yagambanga nti: “Waakiri olwa leero leka amasavu gamale okwokebwako ku muliro, olyoke otwale kyonna ky'onooba oyagadde,” ye ng'ayanukula nti: “N'akatono! Gampe kaakati, oba si ekyo nzija kutooza maanyi.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Ekibi ky'abavubuka ne kiba kinene nnyo mu maaso g'Omukama, kubanga baanyomoolanga ebyaweerezebwanga Omukama." 
1Samuel2:18 Samweli ye yaweerezanga mu maaso g'Omukama; kaali kalenzi akaayambalanga efodi eya kitaani. 
1Samuel2:19 Buli mwaka nnyina yamutungirangayo akakanzu, n'akamuleetera bwe bajjanga ne bba okuweereza ekitambiro ekya buli mwaka." 
1Samuel2:20 Eli yawanga omukisa Elukana ne mukazi we, n'abagamba nti: “Omukama akuwe abaana mu mukazi ono, badde mu kifo ky'ono gwe yasaba ate n'amuddiza Omukama.” Olwo ne bagenda ewaabwe." 
1Samuel2:21 Omukama yali wa kisa eri Anna, n'afunanga embuto, n'azaala abaana ab'obulenzi basatu n'ab'obuwala babiri. Ye omwana Samweli n'akulira mu maaso g'Omukama." 
1Samuel2:22 Eli yali mukadde nnyo; n'awulira byonna batabani be bye baali bakola Yisirayeli yenna, nga bwe beebakanga n'abakazi abaaweerezanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano." 
1Samuel2:23 Kwe kubagamba nti: “Lwaki mukola ebintu ebifaanana bityo, ebikolwa byammwe ebibi bye mpulira mu bantu bonna?" 
1Samuel2:24 Nedda, baana bange; bye mpulira ebigenda byogerwa mu bantu b'Omukama si birungi." 
1Samuel2:25 Omuntu bw'asobya ku muntu munne, Katonda akyayinza okumuwolereza; naye bw'asobya eri Omukama, ani alimuwolereza?” Naye bo batabani be tebaawuliriza ddoboozi lya kitaabwe, kubanga Omukama yali ayagala abatte." 
1Samuel2:26 Ye omwana Samweli n'agenda ng'asuumuka nga bwe yeeyongera okuganja mu maaso g'Omukama n'ag'abantu. 
1Samuel2:27 Ne wabaawo omuntu wa Katonda eyajja eri Eli n'amugamba nti: “Bino by'agamba Omukama nti: ‘Ennyumba ya kitaawo bwe yali mu Misiri nga mufugibwa Faraawo, saabeeraga bulungi?" 
1Samuel2:28 Kitaawo namulonda mu bika bya Yisirayeli byonna abeere kabona wange, ayambukenga ku mwaliiro gwange, anyookeze obubaani, ayambalenga n'efodi mu maaso gange. Ennyumba ya kitaawo nagiwa byonna ebiva ku bitone ebiwongebwa Abayisirayeli n'omuliro." 
1Samuel2:29 Lwaki munyooma ekitambiro kyange n'ebitone byange bye nalagira olw'Ekisulo kyange? Lwaki batabani bo b'ossizzaamu ekitiibwa okusinga nze nga mwegezzeza ku bitundu bisinga obulungi ebya buli biweerezebwa abantu bange Yisirayeli?’ 
1Samuel2:30 Kale nno Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Mazima nali nsuubizza nti ennyumba yo n'ennyumba ya kitaawo za kumpeereza mu maaso gange emirembe gyonna.’ Kale nno Omukama agamba nti: ‘Kikafuuwe, si nze! Wabula aliba ampadde ekitiibwa oyo nange ndikimuwa; aliba angayizza, nange ndimugaya." 
1Samuel2:31 Ennaku zijja lwe nnaakendeeza ku maanyi go ne ku maanyi g'ennyumba ya kitaawo, mu nnyumba yo ne mubulamu atuuka ku bukadde." 
1Samuel2:32 Oliraba ennaku mu kisulo kyange, sso nga wonna mu Yisirayeli bali mu kwesiima; mu nnyumba yo mulibulamu atuuka ku bukadde." 
1Samuel2:33 Kyokka ku mwaliiro gwange sijja kuggyirawo ddala buli muntu ava mu ggwe, amaaso go ndyoke ngazibye amaziga, nkulabye ennaku, naye bangi ab'ezzadde ly'ennyumba yo bonna banaafanga bavubuka." 
1Samuel2:34 “ ‘Kino ekinaagwira batabani bo ababiri Kofuni ne Finekasi kaliba kabonero gy'oli; bombi bajja kufa ku lunaku lumu. 
1Samuel2:35 Nzija kwesitusizaawo kabona omwesigwa, aligendera ku kye nteesa ne ku kye njagala. Ndimuzimbira ennyumba eŋŋumu, era aliweereza mu maaso g'omusiige wange ennaku zonna." 
1Samuel2:36 Buli yenna aliba akyasigaddewo mu nnyumba yo alijja n'avunnama mu maaso ge olw'akasente n'akatundu k'omugaati ogw'oluwewere ng'awanjaga nti: “Nkwegayiridde, mpaayo ku kalimu k'obwakabona nsobole okufunayo akookulya.” ’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Omulenzi Samweli yaweerezanga Omukama mu maaso ga Eli. Mu nnaku ezo Omukama okwogera nga kya bbalirirwe, nga n'okulabikirwa tekutera kugwawo." 
1Samuel3:2 Lwali lumu, Eli yali yeebase mu kifo kye, amaaso ge nga gasoose okufuma; yali takyasobola kulaba." 
1Samuel3:3 Ettawaaza y'Omukama yali tennazikira, ne Samweli yali yeebase mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama awaali Ssanduuku y'Endagaano." 
1Samuel3:4 Omukama n'ayita Samweli; Samweli n'ayitaba nti: “Nzuuno.” 
1Samuel3:5 N'adduka n'alaga eri Eli, n'agamba nti: “Nzuuno, kubanga ompise.” Eli n'agamba nti: “Sinnayita; ddayo weebake.” N'agenda, ne yeebaka." 
1Samuel3:6 Era Omukama n'addamu okuyita Samweli. Samweli n'azuukuka, n'alaga eri Eli, n'agamba nti: “Nzuuno, kubanga ompise.” Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Mwana wange, sinnayita. Ddayo weebake.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Samweli yali tannamanya Mukama, n'ekigambo ky'Omukama nga tekinnamubikkulirwa." 
1Samuel3:8 Omukama n'ayita Samweli ogwokusatu; ye n'azuukuka, n'alaga eri Eli" 
1Samuel3:9 n'agamba nti: “Nzuuno, kubanga ompise.” Awo Eli n'amanya ng'Omukama ye yali ayita omulenzi. N'agamba Samweli nti: “Genda weebake. Bw'addamu okukuyita, mugambe nti: ‘Yogera, ayi Mukama, kubanga omuweereza wo awulira.’ ” Samweli n'agenda, ne yeebaka mu kifo kye." 
1Samuel3:10 Omukama n'ajja, n'ayimirira awo, n'ayita nga bwe yayita mu kusooka nti: “Samweli, Samweli.” Samweli n'agamba nti: “Yogera, kubanga omuweereza wo awulira.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Omukama n'agamba Samweli nti: “Nzuuno ŋŋenda okukola ekigambo mu Yisirayeli, buli yenna anaaba akiwuliddeko amatu ganaamuwaawaala." 
1Samuel3:12 Ku olwo nzija kukola Eli byonna bye nayogera ku nnyumba ye okuva ku kisooka okutuuka ku kisembayo. 
1Samuel3:13 Anti namubuulira dda nti ennyumba ye nzija kugisalira omusango emirembe gyonna olw'ebitatuuka bye yamanyaako; kubanga abaana be baakola ebibaweebuula, n'atabakomako." 
1Samuel3:14 Awo nno nalayirira ennyumba ya Eli nti ebitambiro n'ebitone tebiriddaabiriza musango gwa nnyumba ye emirembe gyonna.” 
1Samuel3:15 Samweli ne yeebaka okutuusa enkeera; n'aggulawo emiryango gy'Ennyumba y'Omukama. Samweli yali atya okutegeeza Eli ku kulabikirwa. 
1Samuel3:16 Eli n'ayita Samweli nti: “Samweli mwana wange,” ye n'ayitaba nti: “Nzuuno.”" 
1Samuel3:17 N'amubuuza nti: “Kigambo ki kye yakugambye? Nkwegayiridde, tonkisa. Omukama akukole bw'atyo, ate asinze nawo, singa ononkisa ekigambo kyonna ku bye yakugambye.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Samweli n'amutegeeza byonna, n'atamukisa. Eli n'ayanukula nti: “Ye Mukama. Akole nga bw'ayagadde.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Samweli n'asuumuka; n'Omukama yabeeranga ne Samweli, era ku bigambo bye byonna tekwali kyagwa butaka." 
1Samuel3:20 Yisirayeli yenna, okuva e Daani okutuuka e Beeriseba, n'amanya nti Samweli akakasiddwa ng'omulanzi w'Omukama." 
1Samuel3:21 Omukama n'ayongera okulabikiranga e Silo, kubanga Omukama yeeyolekanga Samweli mu Silo, ng'ayita mu kigambo kye." 
1Samuel4:1 Ekigambo kya Samweli ne kituuka wonna mu Yisirayeli. Mu nnaku ezo, Abayisirayeli baagenda okulwanyisa Abafilisitiini. Ne basiisira e Ebeni Azeri n'Abafilisitiini e Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisitiini ne batala okulwanyisa Yisirayeli; olutalo ne lunyiinyittira; Yisirayeli n'awangulwa. Abafilisitiini ne babattamu abasajja ng'enkumi nnya mu ddwaniro. 
1Samuel4:3 Abantu ne bakomawo mu lusiisira, abakadde ba Yisirayeli ne babuuza nti: “Omukama lwaki olwa leero atulese ne tuwangulibwa mu maaso g'Abafilisitiini? Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama tugiggye e Silo tugireete eno, tugende nayo etuwonye mu mikono gy'abalabe baffe.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Abantu ne batuma e Silo ne baggyayo Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama w'Amagye awaŋŋamye wakati mu bakerubi; batabani ba Eli ababiri Kofuni ne Finekasi ne bagendera ku Ssanduuku y'Endagaano ya Katonda. 
1Samuel4:5 Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama bwe yatuuka mu lusiisira, Yisirayeli yenna n'aleekaana n'eddoboozi ddene, ettaka ne liduduma." 
1Samuel4:6 Abafilisitiini ne bawulira eddoboozi ly'enduulu, ne bagamba nti: “Eddoboozi lya nduulu nnabaki zino ez'amaanyi mu lusiisira lw'Abeebureeyi?” Bwe baamanya nti Ssanduuku y'Omukama ezze mu lusiisira," 
1Samuel4:7 Abafilisitiini ne batya, ne bagamba nti: “Katonda azze mu lusiisira.” Ne bakaaba nga bagamba nti:" 
1Samuel4:8 “Zitusanze! Kino n'okutuusa kati tekibangawo. Zitusanze! Ani anaatuwonya mu mikono gya balubaale ab'amaanyi? Bano be balubaale abaakuba Misiri ebibonoobono ebya buli kika mu ddungu. 
1Samuel4:9 Abafilisitiini, mugume, mubeere basajja, sinnakindi mufuuka abaddu b'Abeebureeyi nga bo bwe babadde abaddu bammwe. Mubeere basajja, mulwane.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Abafilisitiini ne balwana, Yisirayeli n'awangulwa, buli omu n'adduka ng'adda mu weema ye. Baakubibwa bubi nnyo; mu Yisirayeli ne mufaamu abalwanira ku bigere emitwalo esatu." 
1Samuel4:11 Ssanduuku ya Katonda n'ewambibwa, ne batabani ba Eli ababiri, Kofuni ne Finekasi, ne bafa." 
1Samuel4:12 Ku olwo, omusajja Omubenyamiini n'adduka okuva mu ddwaniro n'ajja e Silo, engoye ze nga ziyuliseyulise n'enfuufu emuli mu mutwe." 
1Samuel4:13 Bwe yajja, Eli yali atudde ku katebe kumpi n'omulyango ng'alindirira, kubanga omutima gwe gwali gweraliikirira Ssanduuku y'Omukama. Omusajja bwe yayingira ekibuga, n'akibuulira; ekibuga kyonna ne kireekaana." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli n'awulira oluyoogaano, n'agamba nti: “Luyoogaano ki olwo oluvuga lutyo?” Omusajja n'ayanguwako n'abuulira Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli yali wa myaka kyenda mu munaana egy'obukulu, amaaso nga gafumye; yali tasobola kulaba." 
1Samuel4:16 N'agamba Eli nti: “Naakava mu ddwaniro, nziruseeyo lwa leero.” Ye n'amubuuza nti: “Bigenze bitya, mwana wange?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Eyali aleese amawulire n'ayanukula nti: “Yisirayeli adduse Abafilisitiini; abantu bangi batokomose, mu bo nga mwe muli ne batabani bo ababiri; Kofuni ne Finekasi bafudde, n'Essanduuku ya Katonda enyagiddwa.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Oli olwayogera ku Ssanduuku ya Katonda, Eli n'aneguka ku katebe n'agwa bugazi enkoto okumpi n'omulyango, ensingo n'emenyeka, n'afa, kubanga yali musajja mukadde ate nga munene. Yali amaze emyaka amakumi ana ng'alamula Yisirayeli." 
1Samuel4:19 Mukaamwana we, muka Finekasi, yali lubuto ng'anaatera okuzaala. Olwawulira nga Ssanduuku ya Katonda ewambiddwa, nga ne ssezaala we ne bba bafudde, n'afunirawo ebisa, n'azaala, naye obulumi bw'okuzaala ne bumuyitirirako." 
1Samuel4:20 Bwe yali afa, abaali bamuzaalisa ne bamugamba nti: “Leka kutya; ozadde mulenzi.” Naye ye teyabaanukula, teyafaayo." 
1Samuel4:21 Omwana n'amutuuma Yikabodi, ng'agamba nti: “Ekitiibwa kivudde mu Yisirayeli,” anti Ssanduuku ya Katonda yali ewambiddwa, ate nga ne ssezaala we ne bba bafudde." 
1Samuel4:22 N'agamba nti: “Ekitiibwa kivudde mu Yisirayeli, kubanga Ssanduuku ya Katonda ewambiddwa.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Abafilisitiini bwe baawamba Ssanduuku ya Katonda, ne bagiggya e Ebeni Azeri ne bagitwala e Asudodi." 
1Samuel5:2 Ne bagiyingiza mu kiggwa kya Dagoni, ne bagiteeka mu mbiriizi za Dagoni." 
1Samuel5:3 Enkeera ab'e Asudodi bwe baazuukuka, kyababuukako okulaba nga Dagoni yali agudde ku ttaka ku maaso ge mu maaso g'Essanduuku y'Omukama; ne baddira Dagoni ne bamuzza mu kifo kye." 
1Samuel5:4 Era enkeera, bwe baazuukuka, laba era baasanga Dagoni ng'agudde ku ttaka ku maaso ge mu maaso g'Essanduuku y'Omukama. Omutwe gwa Dagoni n'ebibatu byombi nga bikutuseeko, biri awo ku mwango, Dagoni ng'asigadde kiwuduwudu." 
1Samuel5:5 Olw'okubeera ekyo, bakabona ba Dagoni, na bonna abayingira mu kiggwa kye e Asudodi, tebalinnya ku mwango, n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
1Samuel5:6 Omukono gw'Omukama ne gunyigiriza n'amaanyi ab'omu Asudodi n'ebitundu byakyo; n'abaleetera ebintu byabwe okwonooneka, n'abakuba ebizimba." 
1Samuel5:7 Abasajja b'e Asudodi bwe baalaba nga biri bityo, ne bagamba nti: “Ssanduuku ya Katonda w'Abayisirayeli tejja kusigala mwaffe, kubanga omukono gwe gutunyigiriza, gunyigiriza ne Dagoni lubaale waffe.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Kwe kutuma ne bakuŋŋaanya abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini bonna, ne babagamba nti: “Ssanduuku ya Katonda wa Yisirayeli tugikolere ki?” Ne baanukula nti: “Ssanduuku ya Katonda wa Yisirayeli etwalibwe e Gati.” Ne batwala Ssanduuku ya Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
1Samuel5:9 Bwe baagituusaayo, Omukama ne yeefuulira ekibuga, n'akireetamu akasattiro kanene nnyo; abantu bonna abakulu n'abato n'abaleetera ebizimba." 
1Samuel5:10 Ssanduuku ya Katonda ne bagiiweereza e Ekuroni. Ssanduuku ya Katonda bwe yajja mu Ekuroni, abaayo ne baleekaana nti: “Batuleetedde Ssanduuku ya Katonda wa Yisirayeli etutte, ffe n'abantu baffe.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Awo kwe kutuma ne bakuŋŋaanya abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini bonna ne bagamba nti: “Muleke Ssanduuku ya Katonda wa Yisirayeli eddeyo mu kifo kyayo, ereme kututta, ffe n'abantu baffe.” Kubanga mu kibuga wonna mwalimu akasattiro olw'okutya okufa; Katonda yali abanyigiriza nnyo eyo." 
1Samuel5:12 Abaali batafudde ne bafuna ebizimba; okuwanjaga mu kibuga ne kwambuka eri eggulu. 
1Samuel6:1 Ssanduuku y'Omukama ng'emaze mu nsi y'Abafilisitiini emyezi musanvu,"
