2Kings10:30 Naye Omukama n'agamba Yewu nti: “Kubanga okoze bulungi n'otuukiriza ekituufu mu maaso gange, n'okola ennyumba ya Akabu byonna bye mbadde nteesa okugikola, abaana bo bajja kutuula ku nnamulondo ya Yisirayeli okutuusa ku zzadde eryokuna.”" 
2Kings10:31 Kyoka Yewu teyeekuuma kutuukiriza tteeka lya Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli na mutima gwe gwonna, kubanga teyava ku bibi bya Yerobowamu bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu." 
2Kings10:32 Mu nnaku ezo Omukama n'asooka okutema ku Yisirayeli. Kazayeli n'abawangula mu bitundu byabwe byonna," 
2Kings10:33 ebuvanjuba wa Yorudani mu bitundu byonna ebya Gileyaadi, kwe kugamba, ebya Gaadi, Rubeni ne Manasse, okuva ku Aroweri ekiri mu Kiwonvu Arunoni, Gileyaadi ne Basani." 
2Kings10:34 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yewu na byonna bye yakola, obuzira bwe, byonna byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings10:35 Yewu n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, ne bamuziika mu Samariya; mutabani wa Yowakazi n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings10:36 Ebbanga Yewu lye yamala ku bwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli mu Samariya gyali emyaka amakumi abiri mu munaana. 
2Kings11:1 Ataliya, nnyina wa Akaziya, yalaba mutabani we afudde, n'asituka asaanyeewo ezzadde lya kabaka lyonna." 
2Kings11:2 Naye Yoseba muwala wa kabaka Yoramu, mwannyina wa Akaziya, yakwata Yowasi mutabani wa Akaziya n'amubbayo mu baana ba kabaka abaali bagenda okuttibwa. Yamussa mu kisenge ekisulwamu wamu n'omujjanjabi we, ne bamukweka Ataliya. Bw'atyo n'atattibwa." 
2Kings11:3 Yabeeranga omwo mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama mu kyama wamu n'omujjanjabi we okumala emyaka mukaaga, eno Ataliya ng'afuga ensi." 
2Kings11:4 Mu mwaka ogwomusanvu Yoyada n'atumya abagabe b'ekikumi Abakari n'abakuumi, n'abayingiza gy'ali mu kiggwa ky'Omukama. Yakola nabo endagaano, n'abalayiza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'alyoka abalaga mutabani wa kabaka." 
2Kings11:5 N'abalagira n'agamba nti: “Kino kye muteekwa okukola: Ekyokusatu kyammwe mmwe abakuuma ku Sabbaato muli ba kukuuma olubiri lwa kabaka. 
2Kings11:6 Ekyokusatu ekirala kya kubeera ku mulyango Suuru, ate ekyokusatu ekisembayo kya kubeera ku mulyango oguli emmanju w'abakuumi, nga mukuuma Ekiggwa mu mpalo." 
2Kings11:7 Ebibinja byammwe ebibiri ebyandibadde bimala oluwalo lwabyo ku sabbaato eyo bijja kusigala nga bikuuma Ekiggwa ky'Omukama olw'okubeera kabaka. 
2Kings11:8 Mujja kwebungulula kabaka nga buli omu akutte ebyokulwanyisa bye. Buli omu agezaako okutuukirira ennyiriri zammwe wa kutta; mujja kubeera ne kabaka buli w'anaalaga.” 
2Kings11:9 Abagabe b'ekikumi ne bakola byonna nga Yoyada kabona bwe yali abalagidde; buli omu n'atwala basajja be, abaali batandika oluwalo lwabwe ku Sabbaato wamu n'abo abaali bamaliriza olwabwe ku olwo, ne bajja ewa Yoyada kabona." 
2Kings11:10 Abagabe b'ebikumi n'abawa amafumu n'engabo ebyabanga ebya kabaka Dawudi ebyabanga mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama. 
2Kings11:11 Abakuumi, buli omu ng'akutte ebyokulwanyisa bye, ne beesimba nga beebunguludde kabaka okuva ku ludda olw'emaserengeta olw'Ekiggwa okutuuka ku ludda olw'emambuka nga beebunguludde omwaliiro n'Ekiggwa." 
2Kings11:12 N'afulumya mutabani wa kabaka, n'amutikkira engule, n'amuwa n'ekitabo ky'Endagaano, ne bamulangirira ku bwakabaka, ne baamusiiga omuzigo, abantu ne bakuba mu ngalo, ne bayoogaana nti: “Kabaka awangaale!”" 
2Kings11:13 Ataliya bwe yawulira oluyoogaano lw'abakuumi n'abantu, n'agenda gye bali ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Kings11:14 Laba, nga ku kabaka ono ayimiridde kumpi n'empagi, ng'empisa bwe yabanga, abagabe n'abantu nga bamuyimiridde awo ko n'abafuuwa amakondeere, abantu bonna ab'omu ggwanga nga basanyuka, bafuuwa amakondeere. Ataliya n'ayuza ebyambalo bye, n'aleekaana nti: “ Luno lukwe! Luno lukwe!”" 
2Kings11:15 Yoyada kabona n'alagira abagabe b'ekikumi, n'abagamba nti: “Mumufulumye mumuggye mu nnyiriri; buli yenna anaamugoberera mumutte n'ekitala.” Anti kabona yali agambye nti: “Tattirwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama.”" 
2Kings11:16 Ne bamukwata ng'atuuse ku wankaaki w'Omulyango gw'Embalaasi ogw'olubiri; awo we yattirwa. 
2Kings11:17 Yoyada n'akola endagaano n'Omukama ne kabaka n'abantu nti banaabeeranga bantu ba Mukama. Era yakola endagaano n'abantu ne kabaka. 
2Kings11:18 Abantu bonna ab'omu ggwanga ne bayiikira ekiggwa kya Baali, ne bakiyiwa ku ttaka; baamenyaamenya obulere emyaliiro n'ebifaananyi bye, ne Mattani kabona wa Baali ne bamuttira mu maaso g'emyaliiro. Kabona n'assa abakuumi ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama," 
2Kings11:19 n'atwala abagabe b'ebikumi, Abakari, abakuumi n'abantu bonna ab'omu ggwanga ne baggyayo kabaka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, ne bamutwala mu lubiri nga bayitira mu mulyango gw'abakuumi. Kabaka n'atuula ku nnamulondo ya bakabaka." 
2Kings11:20 Abantu bonna mu ggwanga ne basanyuka; ekibuga ne kitebenkera, kubanga Ataliya yali amaze okuttibwa n'ekitala mu lubiri lwa kabaka." 
2Kings12:1 Yowasi yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka musanvu. 
2Kings12:2 Mu mwaka ogwomusanvu ogwa Yewu Yowasi mwe yaliira obwakabaka; yafugira emyaka amakumi ana mu Yeruzaalemu. Nnyina ye yali Zibiya, ng'ava Beeriseba." 
2Kings12:3 Yowasi yakola kituufu mu maaso g'Omukama ennaku zonna, kubanga kabona Yoyada yalinga amuyigiriza." 
2Kings12:4 Kyokka ebifo ebigulumivu tebyaggibwawo; abantu baasigala batambirira ku bifo ebigulumivu n'okunyookerezaayo obubaani. 
2Kings12:5 Yowasi n'agamba bakabona nti: “Mukuŋŋaanye ssente zonna eziva mu birabo ebitukuvu ebireetebwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, ssente eziva mu misolo, eziweebwa okutuukiriza obweyamo n'ezo ezitonwa kyeyagalire mu Kiggwa." 
2Kings12:6 Buli kabona azifune ku bamanyi be, azikozese okuddaabiriza ennyaafa ku Kiggwa buli we ziba zisangiddwa.”" 
2Kings12:7 Naye nno okutuukira ddala ku mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri mu esatu ogwa kabaka Yowasi bakabona baali tebaddaabirizanga nnyaafa ku Kiggwa. 
2Kings12:8 Kabaka Yowasi kwe kuyita Yoyada kabona omukulu ne bakabona abalala n'ababuuza nti: “Lwaki temuddaabiriza nnyaafa ku Kiggwa? Temuddayo nno kutwala ssente z'abamanyi bammwe; muziweeyo ku gw'okuddaabiriza ennyaafa ku Kiggwa.” 
2Kings12:9 Bakabona ne bakkiriza obutaddayo kuggya ssente ku bantu era n'obutaba na buvunaanyizibwa obw'okuddaabiriza ennyaafa ku Kiggwa. 
2Kings12:10 Yoyada n'addira essanduuku emu n'agisalamu ekituli kungulu n'agissa kumpi n'omwaliiro ku ludda olwa ddyo ng'oyingira mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama. Bakabona abakuumi b'oku mulyango baasuulanga mu ssanduku omwo ssente zonna ezaaleetebwanga mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama. 
2Kings12:11 Bwe baalabanga ssente ziweze nnyingi mu ssanduuku, omuwandiisi wa kabaka ne kabona omukulu nga bajja babala ssente ezaalinga zireeteddwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, nga bazisiba mu nsawo." 
2Kings12:12 Bwe baamalanga okubalirira, nga baziwaayo eri baffundi abaabanga bakwasiddwa omulimu ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama. Bano baazisasulanga ababazzi n'abakomozi b'amayinja abaakolanga ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama," 
2Kings12:13 n'abakomozi b'amayinja, n'abaagaasanga, balyoke bagule emiti n'amayinja gasimibwe olw'okuddaabiriza ennyaafa ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'okusasula byonna ebyali byetaagibwa ku kuddaabiriza Ekiggwa." 
2Kings12:14 Kyokka ekinaabirwamu ekya ffeeza eky'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, makansi, ebibya eby'okumansira amazzi, amakondeere n'ebintu ebirala byonna ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza byali tebikolebwa nga baggya ku ssente ezaaleetebwanga mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Kings12:15 Zonna zaweebwanga baffundi, bo ne bazikozesa okuddaabiriza Ekiggwa." 
2Kings12:16 Abaaweebwanga ssente okusasula abakozi tebaabasabanga kulaga nkozesa yaazo, kubanga baakolanga na bwesigwa." 
2Kings12:17 Ssente ezaavanga mu bitone eby'ekitambiro olw'omusango ne mu byonzira olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi tezaaweerezebwanga mu Kiggwa kya Mukama, kubanga zaabeeranga za bakabona." 
2Kings12:18 Mu budde obwo Kazayeli kabaka wa Aramu n'ajja okulumba Gati, n'akiwamba; ate n'akyusa okulumba Yeruzaalemu." 
2Kings12:19 Yowasi kabaka wa Yuda kwe kuggyayo ebintu byonna ebitukuvu bajjajjaabe Yosafati, Yoramu, ne Akaziya, bakabaka ba Yuda, bye baali basinzeeyo, naye yennyini bye yali asinzeeyo, ne zaabu yenna eyasangibwa mu nkuluze y'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama ne mu lubiri lwa kabaka, n'abiweereza Kazayeli kabaka wa Aramu; Kazayeli kwe kusimbula n'ava ku Yeruzaalemu." 
2Kings12:20 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yowasi na byonna bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings12:21 Abakungu be beekoba ne bamuttira e Beti-Millo ng'oserengeta e Silla. 
2Kings12:22 Abakungu be Yozabadi mutabani wa Simewati ne Yozabadi mutabani wa Someri baamukuba n'afa, n'aziikibwa wamu ne bajjajjaabe mu Kibuga kya Dawudi. Amaziya mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwa kabaka." 
2Kings13:1 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri mu esatu ogwa Yowasi mutabani wa Akaziya kabaka wa Yuda, Yowakazi mutabani wa Yewu yafuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Samariya; yafugira emyaka kkumi na musanvu." 
2Kings13:2 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama ng'agoberera ebibi bya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu; naye yennyini teyakireka. 
2Kings13:3 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli, n'abawaayo mu mikono gya Kazayeli, kabaka wa Aramu ne mu mikono gya Beni-Adadi mutabani wa Kazayeli." 
2Kings13:4 Yowakazi n'awanjagira Omukama abasaasire, Omukama n'amuwulira, kubanga yalaba engeri kabaka wa Aramu gye yali anyigirizaamu Yisirayeli," 
2Kings13:5 Omukama n'awa Yisirayeli omununuzi, ne bawona effugabbi lya Aramu, abantu ba Yisirayeli ne baddamu okusula mu weema zaabwe nga bwe baakolanga mu kusooka." 
2Kings13:6 Sso era tebaava mu bibi bya nnyumba ya Yerobowamu bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu; baabyongera mu maaso; anti n'empagi ya Asera yasigala yeesimbye mu Samariya. 
2Kings13:7 Yowakazi yasigala kumpi talina ggye, wabula ng'alinawo abeebagazi amakumi ataano, ebigaali kkumi n'abatabaazi ab'ebigere omutwalo gumu; kabaka wa Aramu yali abasse, ng'abasedde ng'enfuufu y'omu gguuliro." 
2Kings13:8 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yowakazi, byonna bye yakola, n'obuzira bwe, byonna byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings13:9 Yowakazi n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, ne bamuziika mu Samariya; Yowasi mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings13:10 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu omusanvu ogwa Yowasi kabaka wa Yuda, Yowasi mutabani wa Yowakazi n'afuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Samariya; yafugira emyaka kkumi na mukaaga." 
2Kings13:11 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama; teyeewala bibi byonna ebya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu; yayongera kubitambuliramu. 
2Kings13:12 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yowasi na byonna bye yakola, obuzira bwe, n'entalo ze ng'alwanyisa Amaziya kabaka wa Yuda, byonna byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings13:13 Yowasi n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe; Yerobowamu n'atuula ku nnamulondo ye. Yowasi yaziikibwa mu Samariya wamu ne bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. 
2Kings13:14 Elisa yalwala obulwadde obwamuviiramu n'okufa. Yowasi kabaka wa Yisirayeli n'agendayo okumulabako, n'amukaabira nga bw'agamba nti: “Kitange! Kitange! Ebigaali n'abeebagazi ba Yisirayeli!”" 
2Kings13:15 Elisa n'amugamba nti: “Leeta omutego n'obusaale.” N'amuleetera omutego n'obusaale. 
2Kings13:16 Elisa n'agamba kabaka wa Yisirayeli nti: “Teeka omukono gwo ku mutego.” N'ateekako omukono gwe; Elisa n'assa emikono gye ku mikono gya kabaka. 
2Kings13:17 N'amugamba nti: “Ggula eddirisa ery'ebuvanjuba.” N'aliggula. Elisa n'amulagira nti: “Lasa akasaale.” N'alasa. Elisa n'agamba nti: “Busaale bwa buwanguzi bw'Omukama, obusaale obuliwangula Aramu. Aramu ojja kumuwangula omusaanyeewo e Afeki.”" 
2Kings13:18 N'agamba nti: “Kwata obusaale.” N'abukwata. Elisa n'ayongera okumugamba nti: “Kuba akasaale ku ttaka.” Yakuba emirundi esatu, n'alekera awo." 
2Kings13:19 Omuntu wa Katonda n'amusunguwalira, n'agamba nti: “Wandikubye emirundi etaano oba mukaaga, olwo Aramu wandimuwangudde okutuusa okumumalirawo ddala; naye kati ojja kumugoba emirundi esatu gyokka.”" 
2Kings13:20 Awo Elisa n'afa, ne bamuziika. Abanyazi baateranga okuva mu Mowabu ne bajja mu nsi ku buli ntandikwa ya mwaka." 
2Kings13:21 Olumu Abayisirayeli baali baziika omuntu, gye baakuba amaaso nga ku kikwanga ky'abanyazi. Ne bakasuka omulambo mu ntaana ya Elisa ne badduka. Omulambo olwakoona ku magumba ga Elisa, omuntu n'addamu obulamu n'ayimirira ku bigere bye." 
2Kings13:22 Kazayeli kabaka wa Aramu yabonyaabonya Yisirayeli ennaku zonna eza Yowakazi. 
2Kings13:23 Naye Omukama n'abajuna, n'abasaasira, n'abasuulira omwoyo olw'okubeera endagaano ye gye yakola ne Yibrayimu Yizaake ne Yakobo; n'okutuusa kati tannayagala kubazikiririza na kubasuulira ddala eri." 
2Kings13:24 Kazayeli kabaka wa Aramu n'afa, Beni-Adadi mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings13:25 Naye Yowasi mutabani wa Yowakazi n'akwata ebibuga ku Beni-Adadi mutabani wa Kazayeli, bye yali awambye ku kitaawe lwe yamutabaala. Yowasi yamuwangula emirundi esatu n'anunulayo ebibuga bya Yisirayeli." 
2Kings14:1 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogwa Yowasi mutabani wa Yowakazi kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Amaziya mutabani wa Yowasi kabaka wa Yuda n'afuuka kabaka." 
2Kings14:2 We yafuukira kabaka nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu etaano; yafugira emyaka amakumi abiri mu mwenda mu Yeruzaalemu. Nnyina yali ayitibwa Yowaddini, ng'asibuka Yeruzaalemu." 
2Kings14:3 Yakola ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama, naye si nga kitaawe Dawudi. Ku buli kintu yakola nga kitaawe Yowasi bwe yali akoze." 
2Kings14:4 Kyokka ebifo ebigulumivu tebyaggyibwawo; abantu baali bakyatambira n'okunyookeza obubaani mu bifo ebigulumivu. 
2Kings14:5 Obwakabaka bwe bwamala okunywera mu mikono gye, n'atta mu bakungu be abo abaali basse kabaka kitaawe;" 
2Kings14:6 kyokka batabani b'abatemu teyabatta, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Etteeka lya Musa, Omukama w'aweerera ekiragiro nti: “Bakitaabwe ba baana si ba kuttibwanga olw'abaana baabwe, n'abaana si ba kuttibwanga olwa bakitaabwe; buli omu anaafanga lwa kibi kye.”" 
2Kings14:7 Ye yakuba Abeedomu omutwalo gumu mu Kiwonvu ky'Omunnyo, n'awamba Sera mu lutalo olwo, n'akituuma Yokuteeli n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
2Kings14:8 Awo Amaziya n'atuma ababaka ewa Yowasi mutabani wa Yowakazi, mutabani wa Yewu kabaka wa Yisirayeli, ng'agamba nti: “Jjangu tugasimbagane.”" 
2Kings14:9 Yowasi kabaka wa Yisirayeli n'atuma ewa Amaziya kabaka wa Yuda ng'agamba nti: “Ettovu ly'oku Lebanoni lyatuma eri entolookyo y'oku Lebanoni ne ligamba nti: ‘Muwala wo muwe mutabani wange abeere mukazi we.’ Ne wabaawo ekisolo eky'ettale ekyayitawo ne kirinnyirira ettovu. 
2Kings14:10 Kituufu wawangula Edomu, omutima gwo kwe kwetumbula. Weetende, naye weesigalire mu nnyumba yo. Lwaki weewakulira emitawaana, ogwe ne Yuda naye agwe?”" 
2Kings14:11 Naye Amaziya teyawuliriza, bw'atyo Yowasi kabaka wa Yisirayeli n'akola olulumba. Ye ne Amaziya kabaka wa Yuda ne bambalaganira e Beti-Semesi ekya Yuda," 
2Kings14:12 Yuda n'afufuggazibwa Yisirayeli, ne badduka buli omu n'adda mu weema ye." 
2Kings14:13 Yowasi kabaka wa Yisirayeli n'awamba Amaziya kabaka wa Yuda mutabani wa Yowasi, mutabani wa Akaziya, e Beti-Semesi, n'amuleeta mu Yeruzaalemu. N'amenya bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu okuva ku Mulyango Efurayimu okutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Ensonda, obuwanvu bwa mikono ebikumi bina." 
2Kings14:14 N'atwala zaabu yenna ne ffeeza n'ebintu byonna ebyasangibwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama ne mu nkuluze ya kabaka n'abawambe, n'addayo mu Samariya." 
2Kings14:15 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yowasi, bye yakola, obuzira bwe, n'eby'olutalo lwe ne Amaziya kabaka wa Yuda, byonna byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings14:16 Yowasi n'agalamira wamu ne bajjajjaabe n'aziikibwa mu Samariya awamu ne bakabaka ba Yisirayeli, Yerobowamu mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings14:17 Yowasi mutabani wa Yowakazi kabaka wa Yisirayeli bwe yamala okufa, Amaziya mutabani wa Yowasi kabaka wa Yuda yawangaalayo emyaka kkumi n'etaano." 
2Kings14:18 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Amaziya byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings14:19 Mu Yeruzaalemu baamukolera olukwe, ye n'addukira e Lakisi; naye baasindika abasajja ne bamuwondera, ne bamuttira eyo." 
2Kings14:20 Yakomezebwawo ku mbalaasi, n'aziikibwa mu Yeruzaalemu wamu ne bajjajjaabe mu Kibuga kya Dawudi." 
2Kings14:21 Abantu bonna aba Yuda ne baddira Azariya, eyali ow'emyaka ekkumi n'omukaaga, ne bamussa ku nnamulondo, asikire Amaziya kitaawe." 
2Kings14:22 Ye oyo eyazimba Elati n'akiddiza Yuda, kabaka ng'amaze okugalamira ne bajjajjaabe." 
2Kings14:23 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'etaano ogwa Amaziya mutabani wa Yowasi kabaka wa Yuda, Yerobowamu mutabani wa Yowasi kabaka wa Yisirayeli n'afuuka kabaka mu Samariya; yafugira emyaka amakumi ana mu gumu." 
2Kings14:24 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama; teyava ku bibi byonna ebya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu. 
2Kings14:25 Ye yazzaawo ensalo za Yisirayeli okuva ku Lebo-Kamati okutuuka ku nnyanja ya Araba ng'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli bwe yali ayogedde ng'ayita mu muweereza we Yona omulanzi mutabani w'Amittayi eyali asibuka e Gati-Keferi. 
2Kings14:26 Omukama yalaba nga buli omu mu Yisirayeli, omuddu n'omwana ow'eddembe, ng'adooba nnyo, sso nga tewali ayamba." 
2Kings14:27 Kubanga Omukama yali tayogeranga nti erinnya lya Yisirayeli alirisangulawo wansi w'eggulu, yabanunula ng'ayita mu Yerobowamu mutabani wa Yowasi." 
2Kings14:28 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yerobowamu na byonna bye yakola, n'obuzira bwe mu kutabaala, nga bwe yalwana okuzza ku Yuda ne Yisirayeli Damasiko ne Kamati ebyalinga ebya Yuda, byonna byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings14:29 Yerobowamu n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe bakabaka ba Yisirayeli; Zakariya mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
2Kings15:1 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri mu omusanvu ogwa Yerobowamu kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Azariya mutabani wa Amaziya, kabaka wa Yuda, n'afuuka kabaka." 
2Kings15:2 We yafuukira kabaka nga wa myaka kkumi na mukaaga; yafugira emyaka amakumi ataano mu ebiri mu Yeruzaalemu. Nnyina yali ayitibwa Yekoliya, ng'asibuka mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Kings15:3 Yakola ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama nga kitaawe Amaziya bwe yakola. 
2Kings15:4 Kyokka ebifo ebigulumivu tebyaggyibwawo, abantu baasigala batambiririra n'okunyookeza obubaani mu bifo ebigulumivu" 
2Kings15:5 Omukama yabonereza kabaka n'ekigenge ekyamusigalako okutuusa ku kufa; yasulanga mu nnyumba njawufu yekka. Yotamu mutabani wa kabaka ye yafuganga olubiri, era ye yalamulanga n'abantu b'omu nsi." 
2Kings15:6 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Azariya ne byonna bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings15:7 Azariya n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, ne bamuziika wamu nabo mu Kibuga kya Dawudi; Yotamu mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings15:8 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu omunaana ogwa Azariya kabaka wa Yuda, Zakariya mutabani wa Yerobowamu n'afuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Samariya; yafugira emyezi mukaaga." 
2Kings15:9 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama, nga bajjajjaabe bwe baali bakoze; teyava mu bibi bya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu." 
2Kings15:10 Sallumu mutabani wa Yabesi yamwekobera, n'amulumba n'amuttira e Yibulewamu, n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings15:11 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Zakariya byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. 
2Kings15:12 Bwe kityo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kituukirira kye yagamba Yewu nti: “Abaana bo bajja kutuula ku nnamulondo ya Yisirayeli okutuusa ku zzadde eryokuna.” 
2Kings15:13 Sallumu mutabani wa Yabesi yafuuka kabaka mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu omwenda ogwa Wuzziya kabaka wa Yuda; yafugira omwezi gumu mu Samariya. 
2Kings15:14 Menakemu mutabani wa Gaadi yava e Tiruza n'agenda e Samariya n'alumba Sallumu mutabani wa Yabesi mu Samariya n'amutta, n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings15:15 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Sallumu n'olukwe lwe yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. 
2Kings15:16 Oluvannyuma Menakemu yava e Tiruza n'alumba Tifusa, na bonna abaakirimu n'ebitundu byakyo byonna ebikyetoolodde, kubanga baagaana okumuggulirawo emiryango gy'ekibuga. Abakazi bonna abaali embuto abaalimu n'ababaaga." 
2Kings15:17 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu omwenda ogwa Azariya kabaka wa Yuda, Menakemu mutabani wa Gaadi yafuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli; yafugira emyaka kkumi mu Samariya." 
2Kings15:18 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama; ebbanga lyonna lye yafugira teyava mu bibi bya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu. 
2Kings15:19 Mu nnaku ezo Pulu kabaka wa Assuri yazinda ensi; Menakemu n'awa Pulu talenta za ffeeza lukumi amuwe obuwagizi era amuyambe okumunywereza obwakabaka mu mikono gye. 
2Kings15:20 Menakemu ssente yaziggya mu Yisirayeli; buli mugagga ng'awa sekeli za ffeeza amakumi ataano ziweebwe kabaka wa Assuri. Kabaka wa Assuri n'aseguukulukuka; teyasigala mu nsi. 
2Kings15:21 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Menakemu ne byonna bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. 
2Kings15:22 Menakemu n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe; Pekakiya mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
2Kings15:23 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ana ogwa Azariya kabaka wa Yuda, Pekakiya, mutabani wa Menakemu n'afuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Samariya; yafugira emyaka ebiri." 
2Kings15:24 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama, teyava mu bibi bya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu." 
2Kings15:25 Peka mutabani wa Remaliya, omu ku bagabe be ab'oku bigaali abakulu, yamwekobera. Yagenda n'abasajja amakumi ataano Abagileyaadi, n'amuttira mu Samariya mu munaala gw'olubiri lwa kabaka, n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings15:26 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Pekakiya ne byonna bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. 
2Kings15:27 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ataano mu ebiri ogw'Azariya kabaka wa Yuda Peka mutabani wa Remaliya n'afuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Samariya; yafugira emyaka amakumi abiri. 
2Kings15:28 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama; teyava mu bibi bya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu. 
2Kings15:29 Mu budde bwa Peka kabaka wa Yisirayeli Tigulati-Pileeseri kabaka wa Assuri yalumba n'awamba Yiyoni, Abeli-Beti-Maaka, Yanowa, Kedesi, Kazori, Gileyaadi, Galilaaya yonna n'ensi ya Nafutali, abantu bonna n'abawaŋŋangusiza mu Assuri." 
2Kings15:30 Ozeya mutabani wa Ela ne yeekobera Peka mutabani wa Remaliya; yamulumba, n'amutta n'amusikira ku bwakabaka mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri ogwa Yotamu mutabani wa Wuzziya." 
2Kings15:31 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Peka ne byonna bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. 
2Kings15:32 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogwa Peka mutabani wa Remaliya kabaka wa Yisirayeli Yotamu mutabani wa Wuzziya kabaka wa Yuda n'afuuka kabaka. 
2Kings15:33 Yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka abiri mu etaano. Yafugira emyaka kkumi na mukaaga mu Yeruzaalemu. Nnyina ye yali Yerusa, muwala wa Zadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Yakola ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama nga Wuzziya kitaawe bwe yakola. 
2Kings15:35 Kyokka ebifo ebigulumivu tebyaggyibwawo, abantu ne bongera okutambira n'okunyookeza obubaani mu bifo ebigulumivu. Yotamu ye yazimba Omulyango ogwa Waggulu ogw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Kings15:36 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yotamu na byonna bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings15:37 Mu budde obwo Omukama yatandika okusindika mu Yuda Rezini kabaka wa Aramu ne Peka mutabani wa Remaliya okulwanyisa Yisirayeli. 
2Kings15:38 Yotamu n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, n'aziikibwa wamu nabo mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, ekibuga kya kitaawe; mutabani we Akazi n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings16:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omusanvu ogwa Peka mutabani wa Remaliya, Akazi mutabani wa Yotamu kabaka wa Yuda n'afuuka kabaka," 
2Kings16:2 Akazi yatandika okufuga nga wa myaka amakumi abiri; yafugira mu Yeruzaalemu emyaka kkumi na mukaaga. Teyakola kituufu mu maaso ga Mukama Katondawe nga Dawudi jjajjaawe bwe yakola," 
2Kings16:3 wabula yagoberera amakubo ga bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. Era yawonga ne mutabani we mu muliro, n'akola ebyenyinyalwa eby'amawanga Omukama ge yali agobeddewo abantu ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings16:4 Yatambiranga n'okunyookeza obubaani mu bifo ebigulumivu ne ku busozi na buli wansi wa muti oguggumizza. 
2Kings16:5 Olwo Rezini kabaka wa Aramu ne Peka mutabani wa Remaliya kabaka wa Yisirayeli baayambuka okutabaala Yeruzaalemu, ne bazinda Akazi, naye tebaasobola kumuwangula." 
2Kings16:6 Mu budde obwo kabaka wa Edomu n'anunula Elati n'akiddiza Edomu. Yagobamu Abayudaaya, Abeedomu ne basenga mu Elati, ne babeera omwo n'okutuusa olunaku lwa leero." 
2Kings16:7 Akazi n'atuma ababaka ewa Tigulati-Pileeseri kabaka wa Assuri, bamugambe nti: “Nze ndi muweereza wo, mutabani wo. Jjangu eno, omponye mu mikono gya kabaka wa Aramu ne mu gya kabaka wa Yisirayeli abannumbye.”" 
2Kings16:8 Akazi n'akuŋŋaanya ffeeza ne zaabu eyasangibwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama ne mu nkuluze z'olubiri lwa kabaka, n'amuweereza kabaka wa Assuri ng'ebirabo." 
2Kings16:9 Ne kabaka wa Assuri n'akkiriza, era n'alumba Damasiko, n'akiwamba. Abatuuze baamu n'abawaŋŋangusiza e Kiri, ne Rezini n'amutta." 
2Kings16:10 Olwo kabaka Akazi n'agenda okusisinkana Tigulati-Pileeseri kabaka wa Assuri mu Damasiko. Akazi bwe yalaba omwaliiro ogwali mu Damasiko n'aweereza ewa Wuriya kabona ekifaananyi n'entereeza yonna ey'enzimba yaagwo. 
2Kings16:11 Wuriya kabona n'azimba omwaliiro ng'agoberera entereeza yonna kabaka Akazi gye yali aweerezza ng'ayima e Damasiko, n'amaliriza nga kabaka Akazi tannadda okuva e Damasiko." 
2Kings16:12 Kabaka bwe yava e Damasiko n'alaba omwaliiro, n'asembera gye guli n'aweererezaako ebitambiro." 
2Kings16:13 Yaweereza ebitambiro bye ebyokye n'ebitone bye eby'obuwunga; yayiwa ekitone eky'okuyiwa, n'amansira ku mwaliiro omusaayi gw'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu." 
2Kings16:14 Omwaliiro ogw'ekikomo ogwali mu maaso g'Omukama yaguggya mu maaso g'Ekiggwa, kwe kugamba, okuva wakati w'omwaliiro omuggya n'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, n'agussa ku luuyi lw'omwaliiro omuggya olw'emambuka." 
2Kings16:15 Era kabaka Akazi n'alagira Wuriya kabona nti: “Ku mwaliiro omunene kw'oba oweererezanga ekitambiro ekyokye eky'oku makya n'ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'akawungeezi, ekitambiro kya kabaka ekyokye n'ekitone kye eky'obuwunga, ebitambiro ebyokye eby'abantu bonna mu ggwanga, n'ebitone byabwe eby'obuwunga n'eby'okuyiwa. Mansira ku mwaliiro gwonna omusaayi gwonna ogw'ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitone. Gwo omwaliiro ogw'ekikomo nnaagweyambanga okwebuuza.”" 
2Kings16:16 Wuriya kabona n'akola byonna nga kabaka Akazi bwe yali abiragidde. 
2Kings16:17 Kabaka Akazi yaggya ku butandaalo enzizi, era n'ebinaabirwamu n'abiggyako. Ennyanja ey'ekikomo yagiggya ku nte ez'ekikomo ezaali zigiwanirira n'agissa awaaliriddwa amayinja." 
2Kings16:18 Olw'okubeera kabaka wa Assuri yaggyawo ekidaala kya sabbaato ekyali kizimbiddwa ku Kiggwa n'ekkubo lya kabaka w'ayingirira eryali ebweru w'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. 
2Kings16:19 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Akazi ne bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings16:20 Akazi n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, n'aziikibwa wamu nabo mu Kibuga kya Dawudi; mutabani we Kezekiya n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi ogwa Akazi kabaka wa Yuda, Ozeya mutabani wa Ela yafuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Samariya; yafugira emyaka mwenda." 
2Kings17:2 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama, naye teyenkana bakabaka ba Yisirayeli abaali bamukulembedde." 
2Kings17:3 Salumaneeseri kabaka wa Assuri yajja okulumba Ozeya; Ozeya n'afuuka muweereza we, n'amusasulanga n'omusolo." 
2Kings17:4 Naye kabaka wa Assuri n'azuula nga Ozeya wa nkwe, kubanga yali atumye ababaka ewa So Kabaka w'e Misiri, ate nga takyawa na musolo kabaka wa Assuri nga bwe yali amanyidde okukola buli mwaka. Kwe kumukwata n'amusiba mu kkomera." 
2Kings17:5 Kabaka wa Assuri yazinda ensi yonna, n'agenda e Samariya n'akizingiza okumala emyaka esatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mu mwaka ogwomwenda ogwa Ozeya, kabaka wa Assuri n'awamba Samariya; abantu ba Yisirayeli n'abawaŋŋangusiriza mu Assuri. Yabateeka mu Kala, ku Kabori, eky'omugga gw'e Gozani, ne mu bibuga by'Abamedi." 
2Kings17:7 Kino kyagwawo kubanga abantu ba Yisirayeli baayonoona ew'Omukama Katonda waabwe eyali abaggye mu nsi y'e Misiri mu mikono gya Faraawo kabaka w'Abamisiri. Baasinza balubaale," 
2Kings17:8 ne bakoppa empisa z'amawanga Omukama be yali agobyewo mu maaso g'abantu ba Yisirayeli, n'empisa za bakabaka baabwe ze baayisaangamu." 
2Kings17:9 Mu nkiso baakola ebintu ebitali bituufu ku Mukama Katonda waabwe. Beezimbira ebifo ebigulumivu mu bibuga byabwe okuva ku munaala gw'abakuumi okutuuka ku kibuga okuli ekigo. 
2Kings17:10 Baasimba empagi emponge, n'empagi za Asera ku buli kasozi akawanvu na buli wansi wa muti oguggumizza." 
2Kings17:11 Baanyookezanga obubaani ku buli kifo kigulumivu ng'ab'amawanga Omukama be yali agobyewo mu maaso gaabwe bwe baali bakola. Baakola ebibi ebyanyiiza Omukama. 
2Kings17:12 Baasinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale Omukama bye yali abaweereddeko ekiragiro nti: “Ekyo temukikolanga.” 
2Kings17:13 Omukama yali alabulidde ddala Yisirayeli ne Yuda ng'ayita mu balanzi bonna ne mu balabi bonna nti: “Mukomeewo, muve mu makubo gammwe amabi, mukwate ebiragiro byange n'amateeka gange, nga bwe biri mu Tteeka lyonna lye nalagira bajjajjammwe baliwulire, era lye natuma gye muli nga mpita mu baweereza bange abalanzi.”" 
2Kings17:14 Bo tebaawulira, wabula baakakanyaza ensingo zaabwe nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baakola abaagaana okwesiga Omukama Katonda waabwe." 
2Kings17:15 Baasambajja amateeka n'endagaano gye yakola ne bajjajjaabwe, n'okulabula kwe yabalabulangamu. Baagoberera ebifaananyi bya balubaale omutali kantu nabo ne baggwaamu ensa. Baagoberera ab'amawanga ababeetoolodde, newandibadde nga Omukama yali abagambye nti: “Temukola nga bwe bakola;” naye bo ne bakola Omukama bye yali abagaanyi okukola." 
2Kings17:16 Baaleka ebiragiro byonna eby'Omukama Katonda waabwe, ne beekolera ebifaananyi bibiri eby'obuyana obusaanuuse n'empagi za Asera. Baavunnamira eggye ly'emmunyeenye z'eggulu, ne basinza Baali." 
2Kings17:17 Baawonga mu muliro batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe; baakolanga eby'obulaguzi n'eby'obulogo, ne beetunda mu kukola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama, bwe batyo ne bamunyiiza." 
2Kings17:18 Omukama n'asunguwalira nnyo Yisirayeli, n'abaggyawo mu maaso ge; tewaasigalawo n'omu, mpozzi ekika kya Yuda kyokka." 
2Kings17:19 Kyokka ne Yuda yennyini teyakwata biragiro bya Mukama Katonda we; baagoberera empisa za Yisirayeli ze yayisanga. 
2Kings17:20 Omukama n'asuula eri eggwanga lya Yisirayeli lyonna, n'ababonyaabonya, n'abawaayo mu mikono gy'abanyazi, okutuusa lwe yabaggyawo mu maaso ge." 
2Kings17:21 Luli Yisirayeli lwe yeekutula ku nnyumba ya Dawudi, ne bafuula Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati kabaka waabwe, Yerobowamu yaggya Yisirayeli ku Mukama n'abaleetera okugwa mu kibi ekinene." 
2Kings17:22 abantu ba Yisirayeli baagugubira mu bibi bya Yerobowamu; byonna tebaabireka. 
2Kings17:23 Okutuusa Omukama lwe yaggyawo Yisirayeli mu maaso ge, nga bwe yali ayogedde ng'ayita mu baweereza be bonna abalanzi. Bw'atyo Yisirayeli n'agenda mu buwaŋŋanguse okuva mu nsi ye, n'atwalibwa mu Assuri, gy'ali n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
2Kings17:24 Kabaka wa Assuri n'aggya abantu mu Babiloni, Kuta, Avva, Kamati ne mu Sefaruvayimu, n'abasenza mu bibuga bya Samariya mu kifo ky'abantu ba Yisirayeli, ne bezza ebibuga bya Samariya, ne babeera mu bibuga byabwe." 
2Kings17:25 We baasookera okubeerayo baali tebasinza Mukama, Omukama n'abasindikira empologoma, ne zibattamu abamu." 
2Kings17:26 Kabaka wa Assuri ne bamubuulira nti: “Ab'amawanga be wasengula n'obatwala mu bibuga bya Samariya, tebamanyi mpisa za lubaale wa nsi eyo. Yabasindikira empologoma, ziiziri zibatta, kubanga tebamanyi mpisa za lubaale wa nsi eyo.”" 
2Kings17:27 Kabaka wa Assuri n'alagira nti: “Mutwaleeyo omu ku bakabona be mwasiba okuva mu Samariya agende abeere nabo, abayigirize okusinza lubaale w'ensi eyo.”" 
2Kings17:28 Omu ku bakabona abaggyibwa mu Samariya n'addayo n'abeeranga e Beteli, n'abayigirizanga okusinza Omukama." 
2Kings17:29 Naye era buli ggwanga lyakola lubaale waalyo, ne babateeka mu biggwa Abasamariya bye baali bakoze ku bifo ebigulumivu mu bibuga mwe baabeeranga." 
2Kings17:30 Abantu b'e Babiloni baakola Sukkoti-Benoti, ab'e Kuta baakola Nerugali, abaava e Kamati baakola Asima," 
2Kings17:31 Abavvi baakola Nibukazi ne Tarutaki, n'abaali bavudde e Sefaruvayimu baayokeranga Adurameleki ne Anammeleki balubaale b'e Sefaruvayimu abaana baabwe mu muliro." 
2Kings17:32 Omukama naye baamusinzanga, era beerondangamu bakabona okumala gava wano na wali mu bantu baabwe ab'okuweerezanga mu biggwa ku bifo ebigulumivu." 
2Kings17:33 Eno baasinzanga Omukama, eri nga bwe baweereza ne balubaale baabwe nga bagoberera empisa z'amawanga gye baali baggyiddwa okuleetebwa." 
2Kings17:34 Empisa ezo ez'edda bakyazigoberera n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero; tebatya Mukama yadde okutuukiriza empisa ze, ennamula ye, etteeka n'ebiragiro Omukama bye yawa abazzukulu ba Yakobo, gwe yatuuma Yisirayeli." 
2Kings17:35 Bwe yakola nabo endagaano, yabalagira nti: “Temusinzanga balubaale, temubavunnamiranga, temubaweerezanga, temubatambiriranga," 
2Kings17:36 wabula musinzanga Mukama yekka eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri n'amaanyi amangi n'omukono omugolole; oyo gwe muba musinzanga, gwe muba mutambiriranga." 
2Kings17:37 Amateeka, ennamula, enkola n'ebiragiro bye yabawandiikira mubikwatenga butiribiri ennaku zonna; temusinzanga balubaale." 
2Kings17:38 Temwerabiranga endagaano gye nakuba nammwe, era temusinzanga balubaale," 
2Kings17:39 wabula musinzenga Omukama Katonda wammwe, oyo y'alibaggya mu mikono gy'abalabe bammwe bonna.”" 
2Kings17:40 Era bo tebaawulira, bakyeyisa ng'empisa zaabwe ez'edda." 
2Kings17:41 Ab'amawanga bano bwe baabanga basinza Omukama, eno ate nga bwe basinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale. N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero abaana baabwe n'abazzukulu bakyakola nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baakolanga." 
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka ogwokusatu ogwa Ozeya mutabani wa Ela kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Kezekiya mutabani wa Akazi kabaka wa Yuda n'afuuka kabaka." 
2Kings18:2 Yali wa myaka amakumi abiri mu etaano we yafuukira kabaka; yafugira emyaka abiri mu mwenda mu Yeruzaalemu. Nnyina ye yali Abi, muwala wa Zakariya." 
2Kings18:3 Yakola ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama nga jjajjaawe Dawudi bwe yali akoze. 
2Kings18:4 Yamalawo ebifo ebigulumivu, n'ayasaayasa amayinja amawonge, n'atemawo empagi za Asera. N'ayasaayasa omusota ogw'ekikomo Musa gwe yali akoze; n'okutuusa olwo abantu ba Yisirayeli baali bakyagunyookeza obubaani; gwayitibwanga Nekusutani." 
2Kings18:5 Kezekiya yeesiga Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli. Oyo bwe yavaawo tewaali mulala amufaanana mu bakabaka ba Yuda bonna, mu baamusooka ne mu baamuddirira." 
2Kings18:6 Yanywerera ku Mukama era teyava ku bisinde bye; yatuusa ebiragiro Katonda bye yali alagidde Musa. 
2Kings18:7 Omukama yali naye; yalinanga omukisa mu byonna bye yassangako engalo. Yajeemera kabaka wa Assuri n'atamuweereza. 
2Kings18:8 Yawangula Abafilisitiini, n'abasindiikiriza okutuuka e Gaza, ekitundu kyabwe n'akireka matongo okuva ku munaala ogw'abakuumi okutuuka ku kibuga okuli ekigo." 
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka ogwokuna ogwa kabaka Kezekiya, gwe gwali omwaka ogwomusanvu ogwa Ozeya mutabani wa Ela kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Salumaneeseri kabaka wa Assuri n'alumba Samariya n'akizinda." 
2Kings18:10 Oluvannyuma lw'emyaka esatu n'akiwamba; gwe mwaka ogwomukaaga ogwa Kezekiya, kwe kugamba nti gwe gwomwenda ogwa Ozeya kabaka wa Yisirayeli; Samariya ne kiwambibwa." 
2Kings18:11 Kabaka wa Assuri n'awaŋŋangusiriza abantu ba Yisirayeli mu Assuri, n'abateeka mu Kala ne Kabori, eky'omugga Gozani, ne mu bibuga by'Abamedi," 
2Kings18:12 Kino kyagwaawo kubanga tebaawulira Mukama Katonda waabwe, ne batyoboola endagaano ye - byonna Musa omuweereza w'Omukama bye yali alagidde. Tebaawuliriza biragiro era tebaabissa mu nkola." 
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ena ogwa kabaka Kezekiya, Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assuri yalumba ebibuga byonna ebya Yuda okuli n'ebigo, n'abiwamba." 
2Kings18:14 Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda n'atuma ababaka ewa kabaka wa Assuri e Lakisi, n'agamba nti: “Nnyonoonye; nviira; kyonna ky'onooba onsalidde nnaakigumiikiriza.” Kabaka wa Assuri n'asalira Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda talenta eza ffeeza ebikumi bisatu, ne talenta za zaabu amakumi asatu." 
2Kings18:15 Kezekiya n'awaayo ffeeza yenna eyasangibwawo mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama ne mu nkuluze y'olubiri lwa kabaka. 
2Kings18:16 Mu budde obwo Kezekiya yakalakatako zaabu yenna gwe yali asiize ku nzigi ne ku myango eby'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, n'amuwa kabaka wa Assuri." 
2Kings18:17 Kabaka wa Assuri yasindika okuva e Lakisi omuduumizi ow'oku ntikko, omukulu w'abalaawo n'omusenero omukulu nga bali n'eggye ddene, n'abatuma ewa Kezekiya mu Yeruzaalemu. Bajja e Yeruzaalemu ne bayimirira okumpi n'olusalosalo lw'amazzi olw'Ekidiba eky'Engulu ekiri ku kkubo eriraga ku Nnimiro y'Omwozi." 
2Kings18:18 Ne bayita kabaka; Eliyakimu mutabani wa Kilukiya katikkiro w'olubiri, Sebuna omuwandiisi ne Yowa akuuma ebyafaayo, mutabani wa Asafu, ne bafuluma okubasisinkana." 
2Kings18:19 Omusenero omukulu n'abagamba nti: “Mugambe Kezekiya nti: Kabaka omukulu, kabaka wa Assuri kino ky'agamba: ‘Weesiga ki ekyo ekikuyinula?" 
2Kings18:20 Obukodyo n'amaanyi eby'okulwana by'olowooza nti obirina, ebyo bigambo bugambo bya ku mumwa. Weesiga ani okuguma n'onjeemera?" 
2Kings18:21 Laba kati mbu weesiga Misiri, oyo omuggo ogw'olumuli olusasambuse, olusala omukono gw'omuntu ne lumufumita singa alwesigamako. Ne Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri bw'ali ku bonna abamwesiga." 
2Kings18:22 Bwe munaagamba nti: “Twesiga Mukama Katonda waffe,” si ye oyo Kezekiya gwe yaggyirawo ebifo ebigulumivu n'emyaliiro gye, n'alagira Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu nti: “Ku mwaliiro guno kwe munaasinzizanga mu Yeruzaalemu”?" 
2Kings18:23 Kale nno genda osingewo ne mukama wange kabaka wa Assuri. Nzija kukuwa embalaasi enkumi bbiri singa ggwe oneezuulira abanaazeebagala. 
2Kings18:24 Osobola otya okuwangula yadde omugabe asingayo obutene mu baweereza ba mukama wange abasembayo, newandibadde nga weeyinula Misiri olw'ebigaali n'abeebagazi?" 
2Kings18:25 Olowooza nze okujja mu kifo kino nkisaanyeewo, Omukama tamaze kuŋŋamba? Omukama yennyini y'aŋŋambye nnumbe ensi eno ngisaanyeewo.’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Eliyakimu mutabani wa Kilukiya, Sebuna ne Yowa ne bagamba omusenero omukulu nti: “Tukwegayiridde, yogera n'abaweereza bo mu Lwarami, kasita tulutegeera; toyogera naffe mu Luyudaaya ng'abantu abali ku bbugwe bawulira.”" 
2Kings18:27 Omusenero omukulu n'abaanukula nti: “Olowooza mukama wange yantumye njogere ebigambo bino eri mukama wo n'eri ggwe wekka? Teyantumye n'eri abasajja abatudde waggulu ku bbugwe, okufaanana nga ggwe aboolekedde okulya obubi bwabwe n'okunywa omusulo gwabwe?”" 
2Kings18:28 Omusenero omukulu n'ayimirira, n'aleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene mu Luyudaaya n'agamba nti: “Muwulire ebigambo bya kabaka omukulu, kabaka wa Assuri." 
2Kings18:29 Kabaka kino ky'agamba: ‘Kezekiya aleme kubawubisa; tasobola kubawonya mu mukono gwange. 
2Kings18:30 Aleme na kubakkirizisa kwesiga Mukama ng'agamba nti: “Omukama mazima anaatuwonya; n'ekibuga kino tekijja kuweebwayo mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri.” 
2Kings18:31 Muleke kuwuliriza Kezekiya.’ Kabaka wa Assuri kino ky'agamba: ‘Mukkaanye, muveeyo mujje gye ndi; olwo buli omu ajja kulya ku muzabbibu gwe ne ku mukunyu gwe, anywe amazzi ng'agaggya mu luzzi lwe," 
2Kings18:32 okutuusa lwe najja ne mbaggyawo ne mbatwala mu nsi efaanana n'eyammwe; ensi ey'eŋŋano n'evviini; ensi ey'emigaati n'ennimiro z'emizabbibu; ensi ey'omuzigo gwa oliva n'omubisi gw'enjuki; mulondeewo obulamu, olwo temuufe. Muleke kuwuliriza Kezekiya oyo abalimbalimba ng'agamba nti: “Omukama anaatulokola.”" 
2Kings18:33 Waali wabaddewo lubaale w'eggwanga lino oba liri eyali awonyezza abantu be mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri? 
2Kings18:34 Balubaale b'e Kamati ne Arupadi bali ludda wa? Balubaale b'e Sefaruvayimu, Ena ne Yivva bali ludda wa? Balubaale b'omu Samariya bali ludda wa? Samariya baakiwonya mu mikono gyange?" 
2Kings18:35 Baluwa balubaale b'ensi eno abaali baggye ensi yaabwe mu mikono gyange? Olwo nno n'Omukama lw'anaggya Yeruzaalemu mu mikono gyange?’ ” 
2Kings18:36 Naye abantu ne basirika busirisi, tebaayanukula kantu, kubanga kabaka yali abalagidde nti: “Temumunyega.”" 
2Kings18:37 Eliyakimu mutabani wa Kilukiya katikkiro w'olubiri, Sebuna omuwandiisi ne Yowa akuuma ebyafaayo, mutabani wa Asafu, ne bagenda ewa Kezekiya ng'ebyambalo babiyuzizza, ne bamubuulira omusenero omukulu by'agambye." 
2Kings19:1 Kabaka Kezekiya olwabiwulira, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye, n'ayambala ekikutiya n'ayingira mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Kings19:2 N'asindika ewa Yisaaya omulanzi mutabani wa Amozi, Eliyakimu katikkiro w'olubiri ne Sebuna omuwandiisi na bonna abakulembera mu bakabona, nga bambadde ebikutiya." 
2Kings19:3 Ne bamugamba nti: “Kezekiya kino ky'agamba: ‘Luno olunaku lwa buyinike, lwa kugugumbulwa, lwa nsonyi ng'abaana abatuuse ku kuzaalibwa naye nga temuli twanyi tubazaala." 
2Kings19:4 Oboolyawo Omukama Katonda wo awulidde ebigambo byonna eby'omusenero omukulu, mukama we kabaka wa Assuri gw'atumye okuvuma Katonda omulamu. Oboolyawo ng'Omukama Katonda wo anaabonereza ebigambo by'awulidde. Kale nno sabira kaawonawo akyasigaddewo.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Abaweereza ba kabaka Kezekiya bwe bajja ewa Yisaaya," 
2Kings19:6 Yisaaya n'abagamba nti: “Kino kye munaagamba mukama wammwe: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Leka kutya bigambo by'owulidde, ebyo obulenzi bwa kabaka wa Assuri bye bunvumye." 
2Kings19:7 Laba, nzija kumussaamu omwoyo, nti olunaawulira olugambo, ng'addayo mu nsi ye, eyo gye nnaamukubira n'ekitala.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Omusenero omukulu n'addayo, kubanga yali awulidde nga kabaka wa Assuri yali avuddeyo mu Lakisi; yasanga kabaka wa Assuri alumbye Libuna." 
2Kings19:9 Sennakeribu yali awulidde nti: “Tiruwaka kabaka w'e Kuusi asitudde, ajja okukutabaala,” n'addamu n'asindika ababaka ewa Kezekiya ng'abagambye nti:" 
2Kings19:10 “Bino mubigambe Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda nti: ‘Katonda wo gwe weesiga takuyinula ng'ogamba nti: “Yeruzaalemu tekiweebwe mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri.” 
2Kings19:11 Ggwe wennyini weewulirira bakabaka ba Assuri bye baakola ensi zonna, nga bwe baazisaanyaawo. Ggwe onoowona?" 
2Kings19:12 Balubaale b'amawanga bajjajjange ge baaleka amatongo baasobola okubawonya? Nga Gozani, Karani, ne Rezefi, n'abantu ba Edeni abaali mu Teli Assari?" 
2Kings19:13 Kabaka w'e Kamati ali ludda wa? Ate ow'e Arupadi, ne kabaka w'ekibuga Sefaruvayimu, owa Ena n'ow'e Yivva?’ ”" 
2Kings19:14 Kezekiya n'aggya ebbaluwa eyo mu mikono gy'ababaka, n'agisoma, n'ayambuka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'agyanjululiza mu maaso g'Omukama." 
2Kings19:15 Kezekiya ne yeegayirira mu maaso g'Omukama ng'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli awaŋŋamye wakati mu bakerubi, wekka ggwe Katonda afuga obwakabaka bwonna ku nsi. Ggwe wakola eggulu n'ensi." 
2Kings19:16 Tega okutu kwo, ayi Mukama, owulire; zibula amaaso, ayi Mukama, olabe; wulira ebigambo byonna ebya Sennakeribu by'aweerezza okuvuma Katonda omulamu." 
2Kings19:17 Kituufu, ayi Mukama, bakabaka ba Assuri baazikiriza amawanga n'ensi zaabwe." 
2Kings19:18 Balubaale baabwe baabasuula mu muliro ne babengeya, kubanga anti tebaali balubaale, wabula biti na mayinja, abantu obuntu bye baakola n'emikono gyabwe." 
2Kings19:19 Naye nno, ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, tulokole mu mikono gye, buli bwakabaka bwonna obw'ensi bumanye nti wekka, ayi Mukama, ggwe Katonda.”" 
2Kings19:20 Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi n'aweereza Kezekiya obubaka ng'agamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Essaala gy'osabye gye ndi ku lwa Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assuri ngiwulidde.’ 
2Kings19:21 Kino kye kigambo Omukama ky'amwogeddeko: “ ‘Embeerera muwala wa Siyoni akugaye n'akusekerera; muwala wa Yeruzaalemu anyeenya mutwe emabega wo. 
2Kings19:22 Ani gw'ojooze? Ani gw'ovumye? Ani gw'owogganidde? Ani gw'okimbye? Ye Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli. 
2Kings19:23 Oyise mu baweereza bo n'ovuma Omukama. N'ogamba nti: “N'enkumuliitu y'ebigaali byange mpalampye entikko z'ensozi, mu masosso ga Lebanoni. Natema entolookyo zaakwo empagguufu, ne sipulaasi waakwo omulungi. Nakyesonseka okutuuka gye kikoma, eyo ekibira gye kibisse." 
2Kings19:24 Nasima enzizi ne nnywa amazzi ag'omu nsi engwira; n'ebigere byange ne nkaza emigga gyonna egy'e Misiri.” 
2Kings19:25 “ ‘Towuliranga nti nakitegeka kuva dda? Obwedda n'obwedda nga nkitegeka. Kati nkituukirizza: Nti ojja kuzikiriza ebibuga okuli ebigo bifuuke ntuumu za mayinja. 
2Kings19:26 Ababibeeramu obuyinza bubawedde; batekemuse, baswadde. Bafuuse ng'omuddo gw'ettale, ng'omuddo ogwakamera, ng'essubi ly'oku kasolya, erikala nga terinnakula." 
2Kings19:27 Mmanyi bw'otuula, bw'ogenda ne bw'odda." 
2Kings19:28 Olw'okubeera obusungu bw'onninako, nga n'okwekuza kwo kutuuse mu matu gange, kale nno nzija kussa empeta mu nnyindo zo n'eddobo mu kamwa ko, nkuddizzeeyo mu kkubo mwe wafuluma ng'ojja.’" 
2Kings19:29 “Kati ggwe, Kezekiya, kano ke kabonero kw'onoolabira: “Mu mwaka guno ojja kulya ebyemeza byokka; mu mwaka ogwokubiri olye ebimererezi. Naye mu gwokusatu musige, mukungule, musimbe emizabbibu, mulye ebibala byakwo." 
2Kings19:30 Kaawonawo asumattuse mu nnyumba ya Yuda alisimba emirandira wansi, n'assaako ebibala waggulu." 
2Kings19:31 Kubanga mu Yeruzaalemu mulivaamu abalisigalawo, ne ku lusozi Siyoni bakaawonawo abasumattuse. Okutakabana kw'Omukama kwe kulikola ekyo." 
2Kings19:32 “Kale nno Omukama kino ky'ayogera ku kabaka wa Assuri: “ ‘Tajja kuyingira kibuga kino, yadde okukirasaamu akasaale. Talikisemberera ng'akutte engabo, yadde okukituumako embibiro." 
2Kings19:33 Mu kkubo eryamuleeta mw'aliddirayo; ekibuga kino talikiyingira;’ bw'agambye Omukama," 
2Kings19:34 ‘nzija kutaasa ekibuga kino nkiwonye ku lwange ne ku lwa Dawudi omuweereza wange.’ ” 
2Kings19:35 Mu kiro ekyo kyennyini, malayika w'Omukama yagenda mu lusiisira lw'Abassuri n'attamu abasajja akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo munaana mu enkumi ttaano. Abantu bwe baazuukuka ku makya, bonna nga mirambo, bafu!" 
2Kings19:36 Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assuri n'amenya olusiisira, n'agenda. Yaddayo mu Nineve, n'abeera eyo." 
2Kings19:37 Olumu bwe yali ng'asinza mu kiggwa kya Nisuroki lubaale we, batabani be Adurameleki ne Sareezeri, ne bamutta n'ekitala, ne baddukira mu nsi y'e Ararati; Esari-Kaddoni mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings20:1 Mu nnaku ezo Kezekiya yalwala, n'ajula okufa. Yisaaya omulanzi, mutabani wa Amozi n'ajja gy'ali n'amugamba nti: “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Tereeza eby'ennyumba yo kubanga ojja kufa, tojja kulama.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 Kezekiya n'akyukira eri ekisenge ne yeegayirira Omukama nti: 
2Kings20:3 “Nkwegayiridde, ayi Mukama, jjukira nga bwe natambulira mu maaso go mu butuufu n'omutima ogukwemalizza, nga nkola ekyo kyokka ekikusanyusa.” Kezekiya n'akaaba nnyo." 
2Kings20:4 Yisaaya yali tannamalako luggya, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja gy'ali nga kigamba nti:" 
2Kings20:5 “Ddayo ogambe Kezekiya omukulembeze w'abantu bange nti: ‘Kino ky'agamba Omukama Katonda wa jjajjaawo Dawudi: Mpulidde essaala yo, ndabye n'amaziga go; kale nno nzija kukuwonya. Ku lunaku olwokusatu ojja kwambuka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Kings20:6 Ku bulamu bwo nzija kwongerako emyaka kkumi n'etaano. Ggwe n'ekibuga kino nzija kubawonya mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri. Nzija kutaasa ekibuga kino ku lwange ne ku lwa Dawudi omuweereza wange.’ ” 
2Kings20:7 Yisaaya n'agamba nti: “Muleete ekitole ky'entontogolo z'omukunyu empotose.” Bwe baakireeta, ne bakissa ku bbwa lye, n'awona." 
2Kings20:8 Kezekiya yali abuuzizza Yisaaya nti: “Kabonero ki kwe nnaalabira ne nkakasa nti Omukama anamponya, nti ne ku lunaku olwokusatu ndyambuka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama?”" 
2Kings20:9 Yisaaya yamugamba nti: “Kano ke kanaaba akabonero kw'onookakasiza nti Omukama anaatuusa ky'asuubizza. Oyagala ekisiikirize kigende mu maaso amadaala kkumi nandiki kidde emabega amadaala kkumi?” 
2Kings20:10 Kezekiya n'agamba nti: “Kyangu ekisiikirize okugenda mu maaso amadaala kkumi; ekyo si kye kiba kibaawo, wabula njagala kidde emabega amadaala kkumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Yisaaya n'akoowoola Omukama; Omukama n'azza emabega ekisiikirize amadaala kkumi ge kyali kiserengese ku madaala ga Akazi. 
2Kings20:12 Mu budde obwo Merodaki-Balaadani mutabani wa Balaadani kabaka w'e Babiloni yaweereza ebbaluwa n'ekirabo ewa Kezekiya, kubanga yali awulidde nti Kezekiya mulwadde." 
2Kings20:13 Kezekiya yayaniriza ababaka, n'abalaga byonna ebyali mu nnyumba ye ey'enkuluze: ffeeza, zaabu, ebirungo, emizigo egy'akaloosa, ennyumba y'ebyokulwanyisa, ne byonna ebyasangibwa mu nkuluze ye. Tewali na kimu mu lubiri lwe oba wonna mu bwakabaka bwe Kezekiya ky'ataabalaga." 
2Kings20:14 Yisaaya omulanzi n'ajja ewa kabaka Kezekiya n'amubuuza nti: “Abasajja abo bagambye ki, ye bavudde wa okujja gy'oli?” Kezekiya n'amuddamu nti: “Bavudde mu nsi ya wala, bavudde Babiloni.”" 
2Kings20:15 Yisaaya n'amubuuza nti: “Balabye ki mu lubiri lwo?” Kezekiya n'amuddamu nti: “Byonna ebiri mu lubiri lwange babirabye; mu nkuluze yange mpaamu kye sibalaze.” 
2Kings20:16 Yisaaya kwe kugamba Kezekiya nti: “Wulira Omukama ky'agamba: 
2Kings20:17 ‘Kale nno ennaku zijja kutuuka, byonna ebiri mu lubiri lwo n'ebyo bajjajjaabo bye baatereka n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero bitwalibwe e Babiloni; tewalisigalawo kantu,’ Omukama y'agamba." 
2Kings20:18 ‘N'abamu ku zzadde lyo, bennyini abafuluma mu ggwe, be weezaalidde, balitwalibwa ne bafuuka abalaawo mu lubiri lwa kabaka w'e Babiloni.’ ”" 
2Kings20:19 Kezekiya n'agamba Yisaaya nti: “Ekigambo ky'Omukama ky'oyogedde kirungi.” Anti muli yali agamba nti: “Mu budde bwange teririba ddembe na butebenkevu?” 
2Kings20:20 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Kezekiya, obuzira bwe, ne bwe yakola, ekidiba n'olusalosalo olutwala amazzi mu kibuga, ebyo byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda." 
2Kings20:21 Kezekiya n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe; Manasse mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
2Kings21:1 Manasse yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka kkumi n'ebiri; yafugira mu Yeruzaalemu emyaka amakumi ataano mu etaano. Nnyina ye yali Kefuziba. 
2Kings21:2 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama, ng'okukola ebyenyinyalwa by'amawanga Omukama ge yali agobyewo mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli." 
2Kings21:3 Yaddamu n'azimba ebifo ebigulumivu Kezekiya kitaawe bye yali asaanyizzaawo; yassaawo emyaliiro gya Baali, n'akola empagi ya Asera nga Akabu kabaka w'abantu ba Yisirayeli bwe yali akoze. Yavunnamira eggye lyonna ery'emmunyeenye z'eggulu, n'alisinza." 
2Kings21:4 Yazimba emyaliiro mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama Omukama kye yali ayogeddeko nti: “Erinnya lyange nzija kulissa mu Yeruzaalemu.” 
2Kings21:5 Yazimbira eggye lyonna ery'emmunyeenye z'eggulu emyaliiro mu mpya bbiri ez'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. 
2Kings21:6 Yawonga mutabani we mu muliro; yakolanga eby'obulogo n'okusamira; yasamiranga n'okwebuuza ku mizimu. Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama n'amunyiiza. 
2Kings21:7 Yaddira ekifaananyi kya Asera kye yali akoze n'akissa mu Kiggwa, Omukama kye yayogerako ng'agamba Dawudi ne Solomoni mutabani we nti: “Mu Kiggwa muno ne mu Yeruzaalemu, ekibuga kye nalonda mu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli, mwe ndissa erinnya lyange emirembe gyonna," 
2Kings21:8 era siriganya kigere kya Yisirayeli kuddamu kuwaba n'ava mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjaabwe, singa balikwata byonna bye nabalagira, ne batuusa etteeka lyonna omuweereza wange Musa lye yabalagira.”" 
2Kings21:9 Naye bo tebaawulira; Manasse yabawubisa ne bayonoona n'okusinga amawanga Omukama ge yazikiriza mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli. 
2Kings21:10 Era Omukama n'agamba ng'ayita mu baweereza be abalanzi nti: 
2Kings21:11 “Manasse kabaka wa Yuda akoze ebyenyinyalwa; ayonoonye n'okukira Abaamori abaamukulembera bye baakola, aleetedde ne Yuda okugwa mu kibi n'ebifaananyi bye ebya balubaale." 
2Kings21:12 Olw'ekyo Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Ŋŋenda kuleetera Yeruzaalemu ne Yuda akabi, buli yenna alikawulirako amatu ge galimuwaawaala." 
2Kings21:13 Era nzija kukuba olukoba olupima ku Yeruzaalemu n'olukoba olupima lwe nakuba ku Samariya, era mmupime n'akaliiso akaapimwa ku nnyumba ya Akabu; nzija kusiimuulawo Yeruzaalemu ng'oli bw'asiimuula ekibya, n'akisiimuula n'akikyusa ne kungulu." 
2Kings21:14 Nzija kwabulira abakyasigaddewo ab'obusika bwange, mbaweeyo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe. Balifuuka kya kwenyagira n'okwaya eri abalabe baabwe," 
2Kings21:15 kubanga baakola ekibi mu maaso gange, ne bannyiiza okuva luli bajjajjaabwe lwe baava mu Misiri n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero.’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 N'ekirala Manasse yayiwa nnyo omusaayi ogutaliiko musango okutuusa Yeruzaalemu lwe kyajjula ne kibooga okuva ku nsonda emu okutuuka ku ndala, nga tobaze bibi bye yaleetera Yuda okugwamu, n'akola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama." 
2Kings21:17 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Manasse, bye yakola, n'ekibi kye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda." 
2Kings21:18 Manasse n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, n'aziikibwa mu nnimiro y'olubiri lwe, mu nnimiro ya Wuzza; Amoni mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu ebiri; yafugira emyaka ebiri mu Yeruzaalemu. Nnyina ye yali Mesullemeti muwala wa Karuzi ow'e Yotuba. 
2Kings21:20 Naye yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama nga kitaawe Manasse bwe yakola. 
2Kings21:21 Yatambulira mu makubo gonna aga kitaawe, yaweereza ebifaananyi bya balubaale kitaawe bye yali aweereza, n'abivunnamira." 
2Kings21:22 Yava ku Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabe, n'atatambulira mu kkubo lya Mukama." 
2Kings21:23 Abakungu ba Amoni ne bamwekobera, ne battira kabaka mu lubiri lwe." 
2Kings21:24 Bannansi ne batta bonna abeekobera kabaka Amoni; mu kifo kye ne bassaawo Yosiya mutabani we amusikire. 
2Kings21:25 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Amoni bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings21:26 Baamuziika mu ntaana ye mu nnimiro ya Wuzza, mutabani we Yosiya n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka munaana; mu Yeruzaalemu yafugiramu emyaka amakumi asatu mu gumu. Nnyina ye yali Yedida muwala wa Adaaya ow'e Bozukati. 
2Kings22:2 Yakola ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama, n'atambulira mu makubo gonna aga Dawudi jjajjaawe; teyawunjukako kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono." 
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana ogw'obwakabaka bwe, Kabaka Yosiya yatuma Safani omuwandiisi mutabani wa Azaliya, mutabani wa Mesullamu, ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'amugamba nti:" 
2Kings22:4 “Genda ewa Kilukiya kabona omukulu omugambe asaanuuse ffeeza eyaleetebwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, abakuumi b'oku mulyango gwe basolooza ku bantu," 
2Kings22:5 akwasibwe baffundi b'omulimu abaali bakola mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, bo basasule abo abaddaabiriza ennyaafa ku Kiggwa:" 
2Kings22:6 ababazzi, n'abazimbi n'abakomozi b'amayinja, era bagule emiti n'amayinja amayole olw'okuddaabiriza Ekiggwa." 
2Kings22:7 Tebajja kubuuzibwa nkozesa ya ffeeza abakwasiddwa, kubanga bakola na bwesigwa.”" 
2Kings22:8 Kilukiya kabona omukulu n'agamba Safani omuwandiisi nti: “Nzudde Ekitabo ky'Etteeka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama.” Kilukiya ekitabo n'akiwa Safani, n'akisoma." 
2Kings22:9 Safani omuwandiisi n'agenda ewa kabaka n'amutegeeza nti: “Abaweereza bo basaanuusizza ffeeza eyazuulibwa mu Kiggwa ne bamukwasa abakozi bannampala b'omulimu mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama.” 
2Kings22:10 Safani omuwandiisi n'ategeeza kabaka nti: “Kilukiya kabona yampadde ekitabo.” Safani n'akisoma mu maaso ga kabaka. 
2Kings22:11 Kabaka bwe yawulira ebigambo by'Ekitabo ky'Etteeka, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye." 
2Kings22:12 N'alagira Kilukiya kabona, Akikamu mutabani wa Safani, Akubori mutabani wa Mikaaya, Safani omuwandiisi ne Asaaya omuweereza wa kabaka, n'abagamba nti:" 
2Kings22:13 “Mugende mwebuuze ku Mukama ku lwange, ku lw'abantu ne ku Yuda yenna ku bigambo by'ekitabo ekyo ekyazuuliddwa, kubanga obusungu bw'Omukama bungi obutwesereddeko, kubanga bajjajjaffe tebaawulira bigambo bya kitabo kino, tebaakola nga byonna bwe byatuwandiikirwamu.”" 
2Kings22:14 Kilukiya kabona, Akikamu, Akubori, Safani ne Asaaya ne bagenda ewa Kuluda omulanzi omukazi, muka Sallumu mutabani wa Tikuva mutabani wa Karukasi, eyali akuuma ebyambalo. Yali asula mu Yeruzaalemu mu Gombolola ey'Okubiri. Ne bamwanjulira ensonga zaabwe." 
2Kings22:15 N'abaddamu nti: “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Mugambe omusajja abasindise gye ndi nti: 
2Kings22:16 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ŋŋenda kuzikiriza ekifo kino na bonna abakirimu ng'ebigambo byonna eby'ekitabo kabaka wa Yuda by'asomyeko bwe bigamba. 
2Kings22:17 Kubanga nze banvaako ne banyookeza balubaale obubaani, ne bannyiiza n'ebifaananyi byabwe byonna ebya balubaale emikono gyabwe bye gyakola; obusungu bwange bujja kweserera ku kifo kino era tewaliba abuzikiriza.” ’" 
2Kings22:18 Kabaka wa Yuda eyabasindise okwebuuza ku Mukama mumugambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba ku bigambo by'Ekitabo bye wawulidde: 
2Kings22:19 “Kubanga omutima gwo gutengedde ne weetoowaliza Omukama ng'owulidde bye nayogeredde ekifo kino n'abakisulamu, nti bajja kufuuka matongo era ekikolimo, n'oyuza ebyambalo byo n'okaaba mu maaso gange, nange nkuwulidde,” ’ Omukama bw'agamba." 
2Kings22:20 ‘Kale nzija kukugatta ku bajjajjaabo, oliziikibwa mu ddembe, amaaso go tegaliraba kabenje ke nnaaleetera kifo kino.’ ” Ne bazzaayo ewa kabaka kye yali agambye." 
2Kings23:1 Kabaka n'atumya abakadde bonna mu Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu ne bakuŋŋaanira w'ali. 
2Kings23:2 N'ayambuka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama wamu n'abasajja bonna aba Yuda, abantu bonna ab'omu Yeruzaalemu, bakabona, abalanzi n'abantu bonna okuva kw'asooka okutuuka kw'asembayo, n'asoma bonna nga bawulira ebigambo byonna eby'Ekitabo ky'Endagaano ekyali kizuuliddwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Kings23:3 Kabaka n'ayimirira ku mpagi, n'addamu endagaano mu maaso g'Omukama: okugoberera Omukama, okukwatanga ebiragiro bye, by'ayigiriza n'amateeka ge n'omutima gwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwe gwonna, bw'atyo n'akakasa buto ebigambo by'Endagaano eyo ebyali biwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino. Abantu bonna ne beeyama okukuuma endagaano eyo." 
2Kings23:4 Kabaka n'alagira Kilukiya kabona omukulu, bakabona ab'eddaala eryokubiri n'abakuumi b'oku mulyango bakasuke ebweru w'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama ebintu byonna ebyali bikoleddwa olwa Baali, Asera n'eggye ly'emmunyeenye z'eggulu. Yabyokera ebweru wa Yeruzaalemu mu nnimiro ezaali mu Kiwonvu Kiduroni, evvu lyabyo n'alitwala e Beteli." 
2Kings23:5 Yazikiriza bakabona bakabaka ba Yuda be baali bataddeyo okunyookezanga obubaani mu bifo ebigulumivu mu bibuga bya Yuda n'ebyetoolodde Yeruzaalemu, n'abo abaanyookezanga Baali obubaani, enjuba, omwezi, ebibinja by'emmunyeenye, n'eggye lyonna ery'emmunyeenye z'eggulu." 
2Kings23:6 Yaggya empagi ya Asera mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama n'etwalibwa ebweru wa Yeruzaalemu mu Kiwonvu Kiduroni n'agyokera eyo. Yagyasaayasa n'agifuula vvu, n'alimansa ku malaalo aga lukale." 
2Kings23:7 Yamenyawo ebigango bya bamalaaya abasajja ab'omu biggwa ebyali mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, abakazi mwe baalukiranga engoye za Asera." 
2Kings23:8 Yakuŋŋaanya bakabona bonna mu bibuga bya Yuda; ebifo ebigulumivu bakabona kwe baanyookerezanga obubaani n'abijaajaamya, okuva e Geba okutuuka e Beriseba; yazikiriza ebifo ebigulumivu ku miryango, ebyali ku muzigo gw'Omulyango gwa Yoswa, omukulu w'ekibuga, ku kkono wa wankaaki w'ekibuga." 
2Kings23:9 Kyokka bakabona b'ebifo ebigulumivu tebaaweerezanga ku mwaliiro gwa Mukama mu Yeruzaalemu, naye baalyanga ku migaati egitazimbulukuse ne bakabona bannaabwe." 
2Kings23:10 Yajaajaamya ne Tofeti, ekiri mu kiwonvu Beni-Yinnomu wabulewo awongera Moleki mutabani we oba muwala we mu muliro." 
2Kings23:11 Yaggya mu maaso g'Ekiggwa embalaasi bakabaka ba Yuda ze baali bawongedde enjuba. Zalinga awo mu luggya kumpi n'ekisenge ky'omukungu eyayitibwanga Natani-Meleki. Yayokya n'ebigaali ebyali biwongeddwa enjuba. 
2Kings23:12 Yamenyawo emyaliiro bakabaka ba Yuda gye baali bakoze ku kasolya mu kisenge ekya waggulu ekya Akazi, n'emyaliiro Manasse gye yali akoze mu mpya ebbiri ez'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. Yaziggyayo n'azaasaayasa, obulere n'abukasuka mu Kiwonvu Kiduroni." 
2Kings23:13 Kabaka yayonoona ebifo ebigulumivu ebyali ebugwanjuba wa Yeruzaalemu mu maserengeta g'Olusozi olw'Okuzikirira Solomoni kabaka wa Yisirayeli bye yali azimbidde Asutoreti, ekyenyinyalwa ky'Abasidoni, n'eky'ab'e Cemosi, n'eky'ab'e Mowabu, ne Moleki ekyenyinyalwa ky'Abammoni." 
2Kings23:14 Yaseseggula amayinja amawonge, n'atema empagi za Asera, ebifo byabyo n'abijjuzaamu amagumba g'abafu." 
2Kings23:15 N'omwaliiro ogwali mu Beteli n'ekifo ekigulumivu Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yakola bye yaleetera Yisirayeli okugwamu, omwaliiro ogwo n'ekifo ekigulumivu yabizikiriza. Yazimbulula amayinja gaakyo, n'agasaasaanya, n'agafuula lusennyente, n'empagi ya Asera n'agimenyawo." 
2Kings23:16 Yosiya bwe yeebunguluza amaaso, n'alaba amalaalo agaali ku lusozi, n'alagira ne baggyamu amagumba, n'agookera ku mwaliiro ogujaajaamiziddwa, ng'Omukama bwe yayogera luli omuntu wa Katonda lwe yayatulira Yerobowamu bwe yali ayimiridde ku mwaliiro ku lunaku olukulu. Bwe yasitula amaaso, Yosiya n'alaba amalaalo g'omuntu wa Katonda eyali alanze ebintu bino." 
2Kings23:17 N'abuuza nti: “Ago malaalo gaani ge ndaba?” Ab'omu kibuga ekyo ne bamugamba nti: “Ge malaalo g'omuntu wa Katonda eyava mu Yuda n'alanga ebigambo ku mwaliiro gw'e Beteli ggwe wennyini gw'obikozeeko.” 
2Kings23:18 N'agamba nti: “Mumuleke; tewabaawo akwata ku magumba ge.” Amagumba ge ne bagataliza ko n'amagumba g'omulanzi eyali avudde mu Samariya. 
2Kings23:19 Era n'ebiggwa byonna ku bifo ebigulumivu ebyali mu bibuga bya Samariya bakabaka ba Yisirayeli bye baali bakoze - ekyanyiiza Omukama - Yosiya yabijaajaamya, nga bwe yali akoze eby'omu Beteli." 
2Kings23:20 Bakabona bonna ab'oku bifo ebigulumivu yabatambira ku myaliiro, n'ayokerako amagumba g'abantu. Olwo n'akyusa n'adda e Yeruzaalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Kabaka n'alagira abantu bonna nti: “Mukuze Pasika ku lw'Omukama Katonda wammwe nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Endagaano.” 
2Kings23:22 Okukuza Pasika mu ngeri ng'eno kwali tekubangawo okuva mu budde obw'abalamuzi abaalamula Yisirayeli ne mu biseera byonna ebya bakabaka ba Yisirayeli ne Yuda. 
2Kings23:23 Ku mulundi guno, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana ogwa kabaka Yosiya, Pasika eno n'ekuzibwa ku lw'Omukama mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Kings23:24 Era n'abasamize, emmandwa, bulubaale bw'awaka, ebifaananyi bya balubaale n'ebirala byonna ebyenyinyalwa ebyali mu nsi ya Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu Yosiya yabiggyawo, atuukirize ebigambo by'Etteeka ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kabona Kilukiya kye yasanga mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Kings23:25 Mu bakabaka abaamukulembera temwalimu kabaka amufaanana, eyadda ew'Omukama n'omutima gwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwe gwonna, n'amaanyi ge gonna, mu mutima gwennyini ogw'Etteeka lyonna erya Musa. Ne mu bakabaka abaamuddirira tasangikanga." 
2Kings23:26 Naye era Omukama teyaleka busungu bwe obukambwe obwesera obwali bweserera ku Yuda, olw'okubeera okunyiiga Manasse kwe yali amunyiizizzaamu." 
2Kings23:27 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Ne Yuda nzija kumuggyawo mu maaso gange nga bwe naggyawo Yisirayeli; nzija kuboola Yeruzaalemu ekibuga kino kye neerondera n'Ekiggwa kino kye nayogerako nti: ‘Erinnya lyange liribeeranga omwo.’ ” 
2Kings23:28 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yosiya ne byonna bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings23:29 Mu budde bwe Faraawo Neko kabaka w'e Misiri yayambuka okugenda ku Mugga Furaati ayambe kabaka wa Assuri. Kabaka Yosiya n'agenda okumusisinkana. Naye Neko bwe yamulaba, Neko n'amuttira e Megiddo." 
2Kings23:30 Abaweereza be ne baggya omulambo gwe e Megiddo ne baguleetera ku kigaali e Yeruzaalemu ne bamuziika mu ntaana ye. Bannansi ne baddira Yowakazi mutabani wa Yosiya ne bamusiiga omuzigo, ne bamusikiza kitaawe ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings23:31 Yowakazi yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu esatu; yafugira emyezi esatu mu Yeruzaalemu. Nnyina ye yali Kamutali muwala wa Yeremiya ow'e Libuna. 
2Kings23:32 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama nga bajjajjaabe bwe baali bakoze. 
2Kings23:33 Faraawo Neko yamusibira e Ribula ekiri mu nsi y'e Kamati aleme kufuga mu Yeruzaalemu. N'abinika Yuda omusolo gwa talenta za ffeeza kikumi, ne talenta emu eya zaabu." 
2Kings23:34 Faraawo Neko yasikiza Eliyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya ku bwakabaka mu kifo kya kitaawe Yosiya, erinnya lye n'alikyusa n'amutuuma Yoyakimu. Yaddira Yowakazi n'amutwala mu Misiri gye yafiira." 
2Kings23:35 Yoyakimu yawanga Faraawo ffeeza ne zaabu. Okusobola okusasula ffeeza nga Faraawo bwe yasaba, Yoyakimu ensi yagibinika omusolo, n'akakanga abantu okuwa ffeeza ne zaabu nga bwe baagerekerwanga." 
2Kings23:36 Yoyakimu yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu etaano; yafugira emyaka kkumi na gumu mu Yeruzaalemu. Erinnya lya nnyina nga ye Zebida muwala wa Pedaaya ow'e Ruma. 
2Kings23:37 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama nga bajjajjaabe bonna bwe baali bakoze. 
2Kings24:1 Mu biseera bya Yoyakimu Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni yakola olulumba. Yoyakimu n'afuuka muweereza we okumala emyaka esatu; oluvannyuma yeekyusa n'amujeemera. 
2Kings24:2 Omukama n'amusindikira ebikwanga ebyaya eby'Abakaludeya, eby'Abaaramu, eby'Abamowabu, n'eby'Abammoni bizikirize Yuda ng'ekigambo ky'Omukama bwe kyali kye yali ayogedde ng'ayita mu baweereza be abalanzi." 
2Kings24:3 Ebintu bino byagwira Yuda olw'obusungu bw'Omukama eyayagala Yuda amuggye mu maaso ge olw'ebibi bya Manasse byonna bye yakola," 
2Kings24:4 n'olw'omusaayi ogutaliiko musango gwe yayiwa, kubanga yajjuza Yeruzaalemu n'omusaayi gw'abataliiko musango; Omukama nga tasobola kusaasira." 
2Kings24:5 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yoyakimu ne bye yakola byonna byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yuda. 
2Kings24:6 Yoyakimu n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe; Yoyakini mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
2Kings24:7 Kabaka wa Misiri teyaddayo kuva mu nsi ye kulumba, anti kabaka w'e Babiloni yali atutte ebitundu bye byonna, okuva ku Kiwonvu Misiri okutuuka ku mugga Furaati." 
2Kings24:8 Yoyakini yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka kkumi na munaana; yafugira emyezi esatu mu Yeruzaalemu. Erinnya lya nnyina nga ye Nekusuta muwala wa Elunatani ow'e Yeruzaalemu. 
2Kings24:9 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama ng'akola byonna kitaawe bye yali akoze. 
2Kings24:10 Mu budde obwo abagabe ba Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni ne balumba Yeruzaalemu, ekibuga ne bakizinda." 
2Kings24:11 Ne Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni n'ajja ku kibuga, abagabe be ne bakizinda." 
2Kings24:12 Yoyakini kabaka wa Yuda n'afuluma n'ajja ewa kabaka w'e Babiloni, ye yennyini, nnyina, abaweereza be, abakungu be n'abalaawo be ne beewaayo mu mikono gye. Kabaka w'e Babiloni n'amukwata mu mwaka ogwomunaana ogw'obwakabaka bwe." 
2Kings24:13 Nebukadunezzari yatwala amakula gonna ag'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'ag'olubiri lwa kabaka, n'ayasaayasa ebintu byonna ebya zaabu Solomoni kabaka wa Yisirayeli bye yali akoze mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama ng'Omukama bwe yali agambye." 
2Kings24:14 Yatwala Yeruzaalemu yenna mu buwaŋŋanguse: abakungu bonna, abatabaazi bonna, be basajja nga mutwalo mulamba, na buli mukugu mu mirimu gy'emikono n'okuweesa; tewaali kyalekebwa mu ggwanga wabula abantu abasinga obwavu mu ggwanga bokka." 
2Kings24:15 Ne Yoyakini yamuwaŋŋangusiriza e Babiloni, wamu ne nnyina kabaka, bakazi be, abakungu be, n'abatuuze abakulu mu ggwanga; bonna n'abaggya e Yeruzaalemu n'abatwala mu Babiloni." 
2Kings24:16 Kabaka w'e Babiloni era yawaŋŋangusiza e Babiloni abasajja bonna abeesobola, abasajja kasanvu, n'abakugu mu mirimu gy'emikono n'okuweesa lukumi." 
2Kings24:17 Mu kifo kya Yoyakini n'assaawo Mattaniya kitaawe omuto abeere kabaka, n'amutuuma Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka abiri mu gumu; mu Yeruzaalemu yafugiramu emyaka kkumi na gumu. Nnyina ye yali Kamutali muwala wa Yeremiya ow'e Libuna. 
2Kings24:19 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama nga Yoyakimu bwe yakola. 
2Kings24:20 Bino byonna byagwira Yeruzaalemu ne Yuda olw'obusungu bwa Katonda, obwamuleetera okubagoba mu maaso ge. Kati nno Zedekiya yagenda n'ajeemera kabaka w'e Babiloni." 
2Kings25:1 Awo mu mwaka ogwomwenda ogw'obwakabaka bwe, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni yalumba Yeruzaalemu n'eggye lye lyonna. N'asiisira ebweru wakyo ne bazimba ekikomera okukyetooloola." 
2Kings25:2 Ekibuga ne bakizingiza okutuusa mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu ogw'obwakabaka bwa Zedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Ku lwomwenda olw'omwezi ogwokuna enjala mu kibuga n'ekanya, abantu mu nsi nga tebakyalina kaakulya." 
2Kings25:4 Bbugwe w'ekibuga ne bamubomola, abasajja bonna abatabaazi ne batoloka mu kibuga ekiro nga bayitira mu muzigo oguli wakati w'ebisenge ebibiri ng'olaga ku nnimiro ya kabaka, newandibadde nga Abakaludeya baali bakitaayizza. Ne bakwata ekkubo eriraga mu Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Eggye ly'Abakaludeya ne liwondera kabaka ne limukwatira mu lusenyi lwa Yeriko, eggye lye lyonna ne limwabulira, ne libuna emiwabo." 
2Kings25:6 Kabaka ne bamuwamba, ne bamutwala ewa kabaka w'e Babiloni e Ribula, n'amusalira omusango." 
2Kings25:7 Batabani ba Zedekiya ne babattira awo mu maaso ge. Amaaso ga Zedekiya n'agatungulamu, n'amusiba n'enjegere ez'ekikomo, n'amutwala e Babiloni." 
2Kings25:8 Mu mwezi ogwokutaano, ku lunaku olwomusanvu, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omwenda ogwa Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka w'e Babiloni yajja e Yeruzaalemu." 
2Kings25:9 N'ayokya Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'olubiri lwa kabaka n'ennyumba zonna mu Yeruzaalemu; buli kizimbe ekyegasa n'akyokya omuliro. 
2Kings25:10 Eggye lyonna ery'Abakaludeya eryali n'omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka ne limenyawo bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu ku njuyi zonna. 
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka n'atwala abantu abalala abaali bakyasigadde mu kibuga, n'abaali beegasse ku kabaka w'e Babiloni, n'abantu abalala bonna aba bulijjo." 
2Kings25:12 Naye omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka yalekamu abasinga obwavu mu ggwanga ng'abakozi mu mizabbibu n'ennimiro. 
2Kings25:13 Abakaludeya baamenya empagi ez'ekikomo ezaali mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, obutandaalo n'Ennyanja ey'ekikomo ebyali mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'ekikomo kyabyo kyonna ne bakitwala mu Babiloni." 
2Kings25:14 Baatwala n'entamu, ebitiiyo, makansi, ebijiiko n'ebintu byonna eby'ekikomo ebyeyambisibwanga mu kuweereza." 
2Kings25:15 Omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka era yatwala ebyoterezo n'ebibya eby'okumansira, byonna ebyali ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza." 
2Kings25:16 Ekikomo ekyava mu mpagi ebbiri, Ennyanja n'obutandaalo Solomoni bye yali akoledde e Kiggwa ky'Omukama, ekikomo ekyava mu bintu bino byonna, kyalema empima." 
2Kings25:17 Empagi emu ng'eriko emikono kkumi na munaana mu buwanvu, ate enkata ey'ekikomo ku ntwe y'empagi emu nga ya mikono etaano obuwanvu; yali etoneddwa n'akatimba n'amakomamawanga okwetooloola entwe nga byonna bya kikomo; n'empagi eyookubiri ko n'akatimba kaakwo byali bikoleddwa mu ngeri yeemu." 
2Kings25:18 Omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka yatwala Seraaya kabona omukulu, Zefaniya kabona owookubiri n'abakuumi b'oku mulyango abasatu." 
2Kings25:19 Okuva mu kibuga yatwalamu omugabe omu eyali omukulu w'abatabaazi, abasajja bataano mikwano gya kabaka be yasangiriza mu kibuga, n'omuwandiisi w'omukulu w'eggye eyawandiisanga abayingira eggye ly'eggwanga, n'abasajja nkaaga ab'eggye ly'eggwanga abaali basangiddwa mu kibuga." 
2Kings25:20 Bonna abo Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka yabatwala ewa kabaka w'e Babiloni mu Ribula. 
2Kings25:21 Kabaka w'e Babiloni n'abakuba n'abattira mu Ribula mu nsi y'e Kamati. Bw'atyo Yuda n'aggyibwa mu nsi ye n'agenda mu buwaŋŋanguse. 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni yassa Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu mutabani wa Safani afuge abantu abaalekebwa mu nsi ya Yuda. 
2Kings25:23 Abagabe bonna ab'eggye bwe baawulira nga kabaka w'e Babiloni ataddewo Gedaliya ng'omufuzi, bonna n'abasajja baabwe abali nabo ne bajja ewa Gedaliya mu Mizupa; baali Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya, Yokanani mutabani wa Kareya, Seraaya mutabani wa Tanukumeti Omunetofa, ne Yaazaniya Omumaaka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya n'abalayirira, bo n'abantu baabwe bwe baali, nti: “Temutya bakungu ba Bakaludeya; mukkalire mu nsi, muweereze kabaka w'e Babiloni, olwo mugenda kubeera bulungi.”" 
2Kings25:25 Olumu mu mwezi ogwomusanvu Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya, mutabani wa Elisama, asibuka mu kabaka, yajja n'abasajja kkumi, ne bakuba Gedaliya n'afa, ne batta n'Abayudaaya n'Abakaludeya abaali naye mu Mizupa." 
2Kings25:26 Olwo abantu bonna, okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu n'abagabe b'eggye ne baddukira mu Misiri olw'okutya Abakaludeya." 
2Kings25:27 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu omusanvu ogw'okuwaŋŋangusibwa kwa Yoyakini kabaka wa Yuda, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, ku lunaku olwabiri mu olumu, Evili-Merodaki kabaka w'e Babiloni, mu mwaka mwe yafuukira kabaka, yakwatirwa ekisa Yoyakini kabaka wa Yuda n'amusumulula mu kkomera." 
2Kings25:28 Yayogeranga naye bulungi; n'amuwa entebe ey'ekitiibwa eyali esukkulumye ku ntebe za bakabaka banne abaali naye mu Babiloni. 
2Kings25:29 Yoyakini n'akyusa ebyambalo by'obusibe, era yaliiranga bulijjo ku mmeeza ya kabaka ebbanga lyonna ery'obulamu bwe." 
2Kings25:30 Ku kulabirirwa, yaweebwanga ensako ye bulijjo okuva ewa kabaka buli lunaku ebbanga lyonna ery'obulamu bwe." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seti, Enosi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Maalaleeli, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoki, Metusela ne Lameki, Nowa." 
1Chronicles1:4 Batabani ba Nowa: Seemu, Kaamu ne Yafesi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Batabani ba Yafesi: Gomeri, Magogi, Madayi, Yavani, Tubali, Meseki ne Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Batabani ba Gomeri: Asukenazi, Rifati, ne Togaruma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Batabani ba Yavani: Elisa, Tarusisi, Abakittimu n'Abarodani." 
1Chronicles1:8 Batabani ba Kaamu: Kuusi, Mizurayimu, Puti ne Kanaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Batabani ba Kuusi: Seba, Kavila, Sabuta, Raama ne Sabuteka. Batabani ba Raama: Saba ne Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuusi yazaala Nimurodi eyafuuka omuzira owa maanyi mu nsi. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizurayimu yazaala Abaludi, Abaanami, Abalewabi, Abanafutuki," 
1Chronicles1:12 Abapaturusi, Abakasuluki (omwava Abafilisitiini) n'Abakafutori." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaani yazaala Sidoni omuggulanda we, Abakitti, Kesi," 
1Chronicles1:14 Abayebusi, Abaamori, Abagirugasi," 
1Chronicles1:15 Abakivi, Abaaruki, Abasini," 
1Chronicles1:16 Abaaruvadi, Abazemari n'Abakamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Batabani ba Seemu: Elamu, Assuri, Arupakusadi, Ludi ne Aramu. Batabani ba Aramu: Wuzi, Kuli, Geteri ne Meseki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arupakusadi yazaala Sela, Sela n'azaala Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yazaalirwa abaana ab'obulenzi babiri: omu ng'ayitibwa Pelegi kubanga mu budde bwe ensi we yagabanyizibwamu ebitundu; ne muganda we erinnya lye Yokutani. 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokutani yazaala Alumodadi, Selefu, Kazarumaveti, Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Adoramu, Wuzari, Dikula," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali, Abimayeli, Saba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Kavila ne Yobabu. Bonna abo baana ba Yokutani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Seemu, Arupakusadi, Sela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Rewu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nakori, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 ne Aburaamu oba Yiburayimu. 
1Chronicles1:28 Batabani ba Yiburayimu: Yizaake ne Yisimayeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Lino lye zzadde lyabwe: Nebayoti omuggulanda wa Yisimayeli, Edari, Adubeeli, Mibusamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misuma, Duma, Massa, Kadadi, Teema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafisi ne Kedema. Bano be baali batabani ba Yisimayeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abaana abaazaalirwa Ketura, omusebeyi wa Yiburayimu: yazaala Zimurani, Yokutani, Medani, Midiyaani, Yisubaki ne Suwa. Batabani ba Yokutani: Saba ne Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Batabani ba Midiyaani: Efa, Eferi, Kanoki, Abida ne Eludawa. Bonna abo bazzukulu ba Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Yiburayimu yazaala Yizaake. Batabani ba Yizaake: Ezawu ne Yisirayeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Batabani ba Ezawu: Elifazi, Reweli, Yewusi, Yalamu ne Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Batabani ba Elifazi: Teemani, Omari, Zefo, Gatamu, Kenazi, Timuna ne Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Batabani ba Reweli: Nakati, Zeraki, Samma ne Mizza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Batabani ba Seyiri: Lotani, Sobali, Zibewoni, Ana, Disoni, Ezeri ne Disani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Batabani ba Lotani: Kori ne Omamu; mwannyina Lotani nga ye Timuna. 
1Chronicles1:40 Batabani ba Sobali: Aluvani, Manakati, Ebali, Sefo ne Onamu. Batabani ba Zibewoni: Aya ne Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mutabani wa Ana: Disoni. Batabani ba Disoni: Kamurani, Esubani, Yiturani ne Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Batabani ba Ezeri: Biluwani, Zaavani ne Yaakani. Batabani ba Disoni: Wuzi ne Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Bano be bakabaka abaafuga mu Edomu nga bakabaka ba Abayisirayeli tebannafuga: 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela mutabani wa Bewori; ekibuga kye nga kiyitibwa Dinuwaba. Bela bwe yafa, Yobabu mutabani wa Zeraki ow'e Bozura n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu bwe yafa Kusamu ow'omu nsi y'Abateemani n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
1Chronicles1:46 Kusamu bwe yafa Adadi mutabani wa Bedadi, yawangula Midiyaani mu nsi y'e Mowabu, n'amusikira ku bwakabaka; ekibuga kye nga kiyitibwa Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Adadi bwe yafa Samula ow'e Masureka n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula bwe yafa Sawulo ow'e Rekoboti ku mugga n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
1Chronicles1:49 Sawulo bwe yafa Baali-Kanaani mutabani wa Akubori n'amusikira ku bwakabaka. 
1Chronicles1:50 Baali-Kanaani bwe yafa, Adadi n'amusikira ku bwakabaka; ekibuga kye nga kiyitibwa Pawu; mukazi we ng'ayitibwa Meetabeli muwala wa Maturedi, muwala wa Me-Zawabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Kadadi naye n'afa. Abaami ba Edomu baali: Omwami Timuna, omwami Aluva, omwami Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 omwami Olibama, omwami Ela, omwami Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 omwami Kenazi, omwami Temani, omwami Mibuzari," 
1Chronicles1:54 omwami Magudyeli n'omwami Yiramu. Bano be baali abaami ba Edomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Bano be batabani ba Yisirayeli: Rubeni, Simewoni, Leevi, Yuda, Yissakari, Zebuluni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Daani, Yozefu, Benyamiini, Nafutali, Gaadi ne Aseeri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Batabani ba Yuda: Eri, Onani ne Sela. Bano abasatu baamuzaalirwa Bati-Suwa, omukazi Omukanaani. Naye Eri, omuggulanda wa Yuda yali mwonoonyi mu maaso g'Omukama, Omukama n'amutta." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamari, mukaamwana wa Yuda, yamuzaalira Perezi ne Zeraki. Awamu Yuda yalina batabani be bataano." 
1Chronicles2:5 Batabani ba Perezi: Kezuroni ne Kamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Batabani ba Zeraki: Zimuri, Etani, Emani, Kalukoli ne Dara. Bonna awamu bataano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mutabani wa Karumi: Akari, eyaleetera Yisirayeli omutawaana ng'amenya ekiragiro ku bintu ebyali bisaliddwa okuzikirizibwa." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mutabani wa Atani: Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Batabani ba Kezuroni abaamuzaalirwa baali Yerakumeeli, Ramu ne Kelubayi." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu yazaala Amminadabu; Amminadabu n'azaala Nakusoni omulangira w'abantu ba Yuda. 
1Chronicles2:11 Nakusoni yazaala Saluma; Saluma yazaala Bowazi; 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowazi yazaala Obedi; Obedi yazaala Yesse; 
1Chronicles2:13 Yesse yazaala Eliyabu omuggulanda we, owookubiri ye Abinadabu, owookusatu ye Simewa," 
1Chronicles2:14 owookuna ye Netaneli, owookutaano Raddayi;" 
1Chronicles2:15 owoomukaga ye Ozemu, n'owoomusanvu ye Dawudi." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bannyinaabwe baali: Zeruya ne Abigayili. Batabani ba Zeruya: Abisayi, Yowabu ne Asaweli; baali basatu." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayili yazaala Amasa; kitaawe wa Amasa ye yali Yeteri Omuyisimayeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mutabani wa Kezuroni mukazi we yamuzaalira abaana Azuba ko ne Yeriyoti. Batabani be be: Yeseri, Sobabu ne Arudoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba bwe yafa, Kalebu n'awasa Efurati eyamuzaalira Kuru." 
1Chronicles2:20 Kuru yazaala Wuri; Wuri yazaala Bezaleli. 
1Chronicles2:21 Oluvannyumako Kezuroni yawasa muwala wa Makiri kitaawe wa Gileyaadi. Yamuwasa alina emyaka nkaaga, n'amuzaalira Segubi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubi yazaala Yayiri, eyafuganga ebibuga abiri mu bisatu mu nsi y'e Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Naye Gessuru ne Aramu baawamba ebibuga bya Yayiri, Kenati n'obubuga bwakyo; bye bibuga nkaaga. Abo be baali ezzadde lya Makiri kitaawe wa Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Kezuroni ng'amaze okufa Kalebu yawasa Efurata, eyali muka kitaawe Kezuroni, n'amuzaalira Asukuru kitaawe wa Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Batabani ba Yerakumeeli omuggulanda wa Kezuroni: Ramu omuggulanda we, Buna, Oreni, Ozemu ne Akiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerakumeeli yalinayo omukazi omulala eyayitibwanga Atara; ye yali nnyina Onamu. 
1Chronicles2:27 Batabani ba Ramu omuggulanda wa Yerakumeeli: Maazi, Yamini ne Ekeri."
