1Chronicles2:28 Batabani ba Onamu: Sammayi ne Yada; batabani ba Sammayi: Nadabu ne Abisuru. 
1Chronicles2:29 Muka Abisuru yali ayitibwa Abiwayili, era yamuzaalira Akubani ne Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Batabani ba Nadabu: Seledi ne Appayimu; Seledi yafa talina baana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mutabani wa Appayimu yali Yisi; mutabani wa Yisi: Sesani, mutabani wa Sesani: Akulayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Batabani ba Yada muganda wa Sammayi: Yeteri ne Yonatani. Yeteri yafa tazadde baana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Batabani ba Yonatani: Peleti ne Zaza. Abo lye zzadde lya Yerakumeeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesani teyalina baana ba bulenzi, wabula ba buwala bokka. Yalina omuddu Omumisiri ayitibwa Yaruka." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sesani omuddu we Yaruka yamuwa muwala we abeere mukazi we. Omuwala n'amuzaalira Attayi. 
1Chronicles2:36 Attayi yazaala Natani; Natani yazaala Zabadi; 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi yazaala Efulali; Efulali yazaala Obedi; 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi yazaala Yewu; Yewu yazaala Azariya; 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya yazaala Kelezi; Kelezi yazaala Eleyasa; 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa yazaala Sisumayi; Sisumayi yazaala Sallumu; 
1Chronicles2:41 Sallumu yazaala Yekamiya; Yekemiya yazaala Elisama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Batabani ba Kalebu muganda wa Yerakumeeli: Mesa omuggulanda we, ye yazaala Zifu, ne mutabani we Maresa eyazaala Keburoni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Batabani ba Keburoni: Kora, Tappuwa, Rekemu ne Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema yazaala Rakamu eyazaala Yorukewamu. Rekemu ye yazaala Sammayi. 
1Chronicles2:45 Mutabani wa Sammayi: Mawoni; Mawoni yazaala Beti-Zuru. 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa omukazi wa Kalebu omulala yazaala Karani, Moza ne Gazezi. Karani yazaala Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Batabani ba Yawudayi: Regemu, Yotamu, Gesani, Peleti, Efa ne Saafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, omukazi wa Kalebu omulala, yazaala Seberi ne Tirukana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Yazaala ne Saafi kitaawe wa Madumanna, Seva kitaawe wa Makubena, ne Gibewa, ne muwala wa Kalebu Akusa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Abo lye zzadde lya Kalebu. Bano be baali batabani ba Kuru omuggulanda wa Efurata: Sobali kitaawe wa Kiriyati-Yewarimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Saluma kitaawe wa Beteleemu, ne Karefu kitaawe wa Beti-Gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Batabani ba Sobali kitaawe wa Kiriyati-Yewarimu baali: Aroye, ekyokubiri ky'essiga lya Bamanakati." 
1Chronicles2:53 N'amasiga ga Kiriyati-Yewarimu gaali: Abayituri, Abaputi, Abasuma, ne Misurayi. Mu bano mwe mwava Abazora n'Abeesutawoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Batabani ba Saluma: Beteleemu, abantu b'e Netofa, Aturoti-Beti-Yowabu, ekyokubiri ky'essiga lya Bamanakati, n'Abazora," 
1Chronicles2:55 n'amasiga g'abawandiisi abaabeeranga e Yaabezi: Abatira, Abasimewa n'Abasuka; bano be Bakeni abaava mu Kamati kitaawe w'ennyumba ya Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bano be batabani ba Dawudi abaamuzaalirwa mu Keburoni: Omuggulanda ye Amunoni owa Akinowamu ow'e Yezureeli; owookubiri ye Danyeli owa Abigayili ow'e Karumeli; 
1Chronicles3:2 owookusatu Abusalomu mutabani wa Maaka, muwala wa Talumayi kabaka w'e Gessuru; owookuna Adoniya mutabani wa Kaggiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 owookutaano Sefatiya azaalibwa Abitali; owoomukaga Yiturewamu azaalibwa mukazi we Egula. 
1Chronicles3:4 Bano omukaaga baazaalirwa Dawudi mu Keburoni gye yafugira nga kabaka emyaka musanvu n'emyezi mukaaga. Dawudi yafugira mu Yeruzaalemu emyaka asatu mu esatu; 
1Chronicles3:5 bano be baamuzaalirwa mu Yeruzaalemu: Simewa, Sobabu, Natani, ne Solomoni; be bana abazaalibwa Batuseba muwala wa Ammyeli;" 
1Chronicles3:6 Yibukari, Elisama, Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama, Eliyada ne Elifeleti; gwe mwenda." 
1Chronicles3:9 Bano bonna be batabani ba Dawudi, nga totaddeeko baana b'abasebeyi be. Tamari ye yali mwannyinaabwe." 
1Chronicles3:10 Mutabani wa Solomoni yali Rekobowamu, Abiya mutabani we, Asa mutabani we, Yosafati mutabani we," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yoramu mutabani we, Akaziya mutabani we, Yowasi mutabani we," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amaziya mutabani we, Azariya mutabani we, Yotamu mutabani we," 
1Chronicles3:13 Akazi mutabani we, Kezekiya mutabani we, Manasse mutabani we," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni mutabani we, Yosiya mutabani we." 
1Chronicles3:15 Batabani ba Yosiya: Omuggulanda Yokanani; owookubiri Yoyakimu; owookusatu Zedekiya, n'owookuna Sallumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Abaasikira Yoyakimu: Yoyakini mutabani we ne Zedekiya mutabani we. 
1Chronicles3:17 Batabani ba Yoyakini omusibe: Seyalutyeli mutabani we," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malukiramu, Pedaaya, Senazzari, Yekamiya, Osama ne Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Batabani ba Pedaaya: Zerubabbeli ne Simeyi. Batabani ba Zerubabbeli: Mesullamu, Ananiya ne mwannyinaabwe Selomiti." 
1Chronicles3:20 N'abataano abalala: Kasuba, Oweli, Berekiya, Kasadiya, Yusabu-Kesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Batabani ba Ananiya: Pelatiya, Yesaaya ne batabani ba Refaaya, n'aba Arunani, n'aba Obadiya, n'aba Sekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Mutabani wa Sekaniya: Semaaya. Batabani ba Semaaya: Kattusi, Yigali, Bariya, Newariya ne Safati; gwe mukaaga." 
1Chronicles3:23 Batabani ba Newariya: Eliyowenayi, Kizukiya ne Azurikamu; be basatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Batabani ba Eliyowenayi: Odaviya, Eliyasibu, Pelaaya, Akkubu, Yokanani, Delaaya ne Anani; gwe musanvu." 
1Chronicles4:1 Batabani ba Yuda: Perezi, Kezuroni, Karumi, Kuru ne Sobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reyaaya mutabani wa Sobali yazaala Yakati; Yakati yazaala Akumayi ne Lawadi. Aggo ge masiga g'Abazora. 
1Chronicles4:3 Bano be batabani ba Etamu: Yezureeli, Yisuma ne Yidubasi; mwannyinaabwe yali ayitibwa Azzeleluponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuweli ye yali kitaawe wa Gedori, Ezeri kitaawe wa Kuusa. Bano be batabani ba Kuru omuggulanda wa Efurata kitaawe wa Beteleemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Asukuru kitaawe wa Tekowa yalina abakazi babiri: Kela ne Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara yamuzaalira Akuzzamu, Keferi, Teemini ne Kaakasutari. Abo be batabani ba Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Batabani ba Kela: Zereti, Zokari ne Etunani," 
1Chronicles4:8 ne Kozi eyazaala Anubu ne Kazzobeba, n'ab'essiga lya Akarukeli mutabani wa Karumi." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabezi yali wa kitiibwa okukira baganda be. Nnyina yamutuuma Yabezi ng'agamba nti: “Mmuzadde mu bulumi.” 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabezi yakowoola Katonda wa Yisirayeli nti: “Ayi, nkwegayiridde mpa omukisa! Gaziya ensi yange. Omukono gwo gumbeereko; ntaasa obubenje, omponye okulumwa.” Katonda n'amuwa kye yasaba." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubi muganda wa Suka yazaala Mekiri eyazaala Esutoni. 
1Chronicles4:12 Esutoni yazaala Beti-Rafa ne Pasewa. Tekinna yali kitaawe wa Yiri-Nakasi. Bano be basajja b'e Rekabu. 
1Chronicles4:13 Batabani ba Kenazi: Otunyeli ne Seraaya. Batabani ba Otunyeli: Katati ne Mewonotayi. 
1Chronicles4:14 Mewonotayi yazaala Ofura; Seraaya yazaala Yowabu kitaawe wa Ge-Karasimu kubanga baali bakugu mu mirimu gy'emikono. 
1Chronicles4:15 Batabani ba Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne: Yiru, Ela ne Naami. Mutabani wa Ela: Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Batabani ba Yalleleli: Zifu, Zifa, Tiriya ne Asareeli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Batabani ba Ezura: Yeteri, Meredi, Eferi ne Yaloni. Yazaala Miriyamu, Sammayi ne Yisuba kitaawe wa Esutemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mukazi we Omuyudaaya yazaala Yaredi kitaawe wa Gedori, Keberi kitaawe wa Soko, Yekutyeli kitaawe wa Zanowa. Bano be batabani ba Bitiya muwala wa Faraawo eyali afumbiddwa Meredi." 
1Chronicles4:19 Batabani ba muka Odiya mwannyina Nakamu: kitaawe wa Keyila Omugaruma, ne Esutemowa Omumaakati." 
1Chronicles4:20 Batabani ba Simoni: Amunoni, Rinna, Beni-Kanaani ne Tiloni. Batabani ba Yisi: Zoketi ne Beni-Zoketi." 
1Chronicles4:21 Batabani ba Sela mutabani wa Yuda: Eri kitaawe wa Leka; Laada kitaawe wa Maresa, n'amasiga g'abalusi b'obufumbo ab'e Beti-Asubewa." 
1Chronicles4:22 Yokimu n'abasajja b'e Kozeba, ne Yowasi, ne Sarafu eyafuga mu Mowabu, ne Yasubi-Lekemu (Bino bivudde mu biwandiiko eby'edda)." 
1Chronicles4:23 Baalinga babumbi nga babeera ne kabaka e Netayimu ne Gedera ku mirimu gye. 
1Chronicles4:24 Batabani ba Simewoni: Nemweli, Yamini, Yaribu, Zeraki ne Sawulo." 
1Chronicles4:25 Sallumu mutabani we, Mibusamu mutabani we, ne Misuma mutabani we." 
1Chronicles4:26 Batabani ba Misuma: Kammweli mutabani we, Zakkuri mutabani we, ne Simeyi mutabani we." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simeyi yalina abaana abalenzi kkumi na mukaaga n'abawala mukaaga, naye baganda be tebaalina baana bangi, bwe kityo ekika kyonna kyali tekyaze nga bwe gwali ku bazzukulu ba Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Babeeranga mu Beriseba, Molada, Kazari-Suwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biluwa, Ezemu, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betweli, Koruma, Zikulagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beti-Marukaboti, Kazari-Susimu, Beti-Biri ne Saarayimu. Bino bye byali ebibuga byabwe okutuusa ku bwakabaka bwa Dawudi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ebibuga byabwe era byali Etamu, Ayini, Rimmoni, Tokeni, Asani; bye bibuga bitaano." 
1Chronicles4:33 Kwaliko n'ebyalo ebyetoolodde ebibuga bino okutuukira ddala e Baalati. Eyo gye baabeeranga. Baakuumanga enkalala z'endyo zaabwe. 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobabu, Yamuleki, Yosa mutabani wa Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoweli, Yewu mutabani wa Yosibiya, mutabani wa Seraaya, mutabani wa Asiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 Eliyowenayi, Yaakoba, Yesokaaya, Asaaya, Adyeli, Yesimyeli, Benaaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziza mutabani wa Sifi, mutabani wa Alloni, mutabani wa Yedaaya, mutabani wa Simuri, mutabani wa Semaaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Bano amannya gaabwe agawandiikiddwa ku lukalala olwo be baali abakulu b'amasiga gaabwe. Ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe zaayala mu bungi. 
1Chronicles4:39 Nga banoonya ebifo amagana gaabwe mwe ganaaliira, baagendera ddala n'okutuuka ku ndeboolebo za Gedori, n'okudda ebuvanjuba bw'ekiwonvu." 
1Chronicles4:40 Bagguka ku ttale eggimu, eddungi ennyo, aweetadde, awasiriikirivu. Abamu ku Bakaami baali babaddeko wano." 
1Chronicles4:41 Abo amannya gaabwe agawandiikiddwa bajja mu mirembe gya Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda. Baalumba weema z'Abakaami n'Abamewuni abaali basangiddwayo ne babasaanyizaawo ddala n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero, ne basenga bali we baali, kubanga eyo waaliyo amalundiro olw'amagana gaabwe." 
1Chronicles4:42 Abamu ku Basimewoni, abasajja ebikumi bina, nga bakulembeddwamu Pelatiya, Newariya, Refaaya ne Wuzziyeli, batabani ba Yisi, baazinda ensozi za Seyiri." 
1Chronicles4:43 Batta Abamaleki abaali basigaddewo ku baali badduse, bo ne basenga eyo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
1Chronicles5:1 Batabani ba Rubeni omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli - oyo ye yali omuggulanda we. Naye bwe yagwagwawaza ekitanda kya kitaawe, obukulu obw'obuggulanda ne buweebwa bazzukulu ba Yozefu mutabani wa Yisirayeli; awo nno takyabalibwa ng'omuggulanda." 
1Chronicles5:2 Newandibadde Yuda kwo okuba yali muzira okukira baganda be, era nga mu ssiga lye omukulu mw'asibuka, kyokka obukulu bw'obuggulanda bwali bwa Yozefu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Batabani ba Rubeni omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli: Kanoki, Pallu, Kezuroni ne Karumi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Batabani ba Yoweli: Semaaya mutabani we, Gogi mutabani we, Simeyi mutabani we," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika mutabani we, Reyaaya mutabani we, Baali mutabani we" 
1Chronicles5:6 ne Beera mutabani we Tigulati-Piluneseri kabaka wa Assuri gwe yasiba n'amutwala; ye yali owaakasolya mu kika kya Rubeni. 
1Chronicles5:7 Baganda be mu masiga gaabwe, nga babaliddwa mu ndyo zaabwe: omukulu Yeyeli ne Zakariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 ne Bela mutabani wa Azazi, mutabani wa Sema, mutabani wa Yoweli. Baali basenze mu Aroweri okutuuka ku Nebo ne Baali-Mewoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ate ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba baabeeranga mu kitundu okutuuka w'oyingirira mu ddungu, eno gye likwatira ku mugga Furaati; kubanga amagana gaabwe gaali gayaze mu nsi ya Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mu mirembe gya Sawulo baalwana n'Abawaguri ne babalinnyako n'amaanyi gaabwe, ne babeera mu weema zaabwe mu kitundu ekyo kyonna ekitunuulidde obuvanjuba bwa Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Abantu ba Gaadi baali babaliraanye mu kitundu kyabwe gye baabeeranga, mu Basani n'okutuuka e Saleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoweli ye yali owaakasolya, Safani ye wookubiri, ne Yanayi ne Safati mu Basani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Baganda baabwe mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe: Mikayeli, Mesullamu, Seba, Yorayi, Yakani, Ziya ne Eberi; gwe musanvu." 
1Chronicles5:14 Abo be batabani ba Abikayili mutabani wa Kuri, mutabani wa Yarowa mutabani wa Gileyaadi, mutabani wa Mikayeli, mutabani wa Yesisayi, mutabani wa Yakudo, mutabani wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Aki, mutabani wa Abudyeli mutabani wa Guni omukulu w'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles5:16 Baabeeranga mu Gileyaadi, mu Basani ne mu byalo byayo, ne mu malundiro wonna mu Saroni okutuuka ku nsalo zaabwe." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bano bonna bassibwa ku nkalala z'endyo, mu mirembe gya Yotamu kabaka wa Yuda ne mu mirembe gya Yerobowamu kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Abantu ba Rubeni, abantu ba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse baalina abasajja emitwalo ena mu enkumi nnya mu lusanvu mu nkaaga abeesobola, omwali abakwata engabo, ab'ebitala, abalasa obusaale n'abatendeke mu by'entalo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Baatabaala Abaaguri ne Yeturi, Nafisi ne Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Baayambibwa mu kulwanyisa Abaaguri, Katonda n'awaayo Abawaguri mu mikono gyabwe na bonna abaali babalwanirako, kubanga baalaajanira Katonda nga balwana. Yawulira okwegayirira kwabwe kubanga baamwesiga." 
1Chronicles5:21 Baatwala amagana gaabwe: eŋŋamiya emitwalo etaano, endiga obusiriivu bubiri mu emitwalo etaano, n'endogoyi enkumi bbiri. Bakwata n'abasibe kasiriivu kamu." 
1Chronicles5:22 Bangi battibwa, kubanga olutalo lwali lwa Mukama. Badda mu bitundu bali mwe babadde okutuuka ku kuwaŋŋangusibwa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ab'omu kitundu eky'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse baali bangi; baalya ensi okuva ku Basani okutuuka ku Baali-Kerumoni, kwe kugamba Seniri oba Kerumoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Bano be baakuliranga ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe: Eferi, Yisi, Eliyeli, Azuryeli, Yeremiya, Odaviya, ne Yakudyeli; abasajja abatabaazi, abazira, ab'amannya, abakulembeze mu ndyo zaabwe." 
1Chronicles5:25 Naye tebaali beesigwa eri Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe, ne bakola obwamalaaya ne balubaale b'abantu b'ensi eyo, Katonda be yali azikirizza mu maaso gaabwe." 
1Chronicles5:26 Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'asiikuula omwoyo gwa Pulu kabaka wa Assuri, kwe kugamba omwoyo gwa Tigulati-Piluneseri kabaka wa Assuri, n'awaŋŋangusa Rubeni ne Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse, n'abatwala e Kala, Kabori, Ara ne ku mugga Gozani, gye bakyali n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
1Chronicles5:27 Batabani ba Leevi: Gerusoni, Kewati ne Merari." 
1Chronicles5:28 Batabani ba Kewati: Amuramu, Yizuwari, Keburoni ne Wuzziyeli." 
1Chronicles5:29 Abaana ba Amuramu: Aroni, Musa ne Miriyamu. Batabani ba Aroni: Nadabu, Abiwu, Eleyazari ne Yitamari." 
1Chronicles5:30 Eleyazari yazaala Finekasi, Finekasi yazaala Abisuwa;" 
1Chronicles5:31 Abisuwa yazaala Bukki; Bukki yazaala Wuzzi; 
1Chronicles5:32 Wuzzi yazaala Zerakiya; Zerakiya yazaala Meraayoti; 
1Chronicles5:33 Meraayoti yazaala Amariya; Amariya yazaala Akitubu; 
1Chronicles5:34 Akitubu yazaala Zadoki; Zadoki yazaala Akimaazi; 
1Chronicles5:35 Akimaazi yazaala Azariya; Azariya yazaala Yokanani; 
1Chronicles5:36 Yokanani yazaala Azariya. Oyo ye yaweerezanga nga kabona mu Kiggwa Solomoni kye yazimba mu Yeruzaalemu. 
1Chronicles5:37 Azariya yazaala Amariya; Amariya yazaala Akitubu; 
1Chronicles5:38 Akitubu yazaala Zadoki; Zadoki yazaala Sallumu. 
1Chronicles5:39 Sallumu yazaala Kilukiya; Kilukiya yazaala Azariya; 
1Chronicles5:40 Azariya yazaala Seraaya; Seraaya yazaala Yozadaki; 
1Chronicles5:41 Yozadaki yatwalibwa mu busibe Omukama lwe yawaŋŋangusa Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu nga yeeyamba Nebukadunezzari. 
1Chronicles6:1 Batabani ba Leevi: Gerusomu, Kewati ne Merari;" 
1Chronicles6:2 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Gerusomu: Libuni ne Simeyi. 
1Chronicles6:3 Batabani ba Kewati: Amuramu, Yizuwari, Keburoni ne Wuzziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:4 Batabani ba Merari: Makuli ne Musi. Gano ge masiga g'Abaleevi okusinziira ku bajjajjaabwe: 
1Chronicles6:5 Aba Gerusomu: Libuni mutabani we, Yakati mutabani we, Zimma mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:6 Yowa mutabani we, Yiddo mutabani we, Zeraki mutabani we ne Yewaterayi mutabani we." 
1Chronicles6:7 Batabani ba Kewati: Amminadabu mutabani we, Kora mutabani we, Assiri mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:8 Elukana mutabani we, Abiyasafu mutabani we, Assiri mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:9 Takati mutabani we, Wuriyeli mutabani we, Wuzziya mutabani we, Sawulo mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:10 Batabani ba Elukana: Amasayi, Akimoti," 
1Chronicles6:11 ne Elukana, Zofayi mutabani we, Nakati mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:12 Eliyabu mutabani we, Yerokamu mutabani we, Elukana mutabani we ne Samweli mutabani we." 
1Chronicles6:13 Batabani ba Samweli: Yoweli omuggulanda ne Abiya owookubiri. 
1Chronicles6:14 Batabani ba Merari: Makuli mutabani we, Libuni mutabani we, Simeyi mutabani we, Wuzza mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:15 Simewa mutabani we, Kaggiya mutabani we, ne Asaaya mutabani we." 
1Chronicles6:16 Bano be basajja Dawudi be yalonda okukulembera okuyimba mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama nga Ssanduuku emaze okuwummuzibwa mu Kiggwa. 
1Chronicles6:17 Be baakolanga ku by'okuyimba mu maaso g'Ekisulo, Weema ey'Ensisinkano, okutuusa nga Solomoni azimbye Ekiggwa ky'Omukama mu Yeruzaalemu. Baaweerezanga ng'emirimu gyabwe n'etteeka bwe ligamba ku gyo." 
1Chronicles6:18 Bano be basajja abaweerezanga wamu be batabani baabwe: Okuva mu ssiga kya Kewati: Emani omuyimbi mutabani wa Yoweli, mutabani wa Semweli;" 
1Chronicles6:19 mutabani wa Elukana, mutabani wa Yerokamu, mutabani wa Eliyeli, mutabani wa Towa," 
1Chronicles6:20 mutabani we Zuufu, mutabani wa Elukana, mutabani wa Makati, mutabani wa Amasayi," 
1Chronicles6:21 mutabani wa Elukana, mutabani wa Yoweli, mutabani wa Azariya, mutabani wa Zefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:22 mutabani wa Takati, mutabani wa Assiri, mutabani wa Ebiyasafu, mutabani wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:23 mutabani wa Yizuwari, mutabani wa Kewati, mutabani wa Leevi, mutabani wa Yisirayeli;" 
1Chronicles6:24 ne muganda we Asafu eyamuyimiriranga ku ddyo, Asafu mutabani wa Berekiya, mutabani we Simewa," 
1Chronicles6:25 mutabani wa Mikayeli, mutabani wa Baaseeya, mutabani wa Malukiya," 
1Chronicles6:26 mutabani wa Atuni, mutabani wa Zeraki, mutabani wa Adaaya," 
1Chronicles6:27 mutabani wa Etani, mutabani wa Zimma, mutabani wa Simeyi," 
1Chronicles6:28 mutabani wa Yakati, mutabani wa Gerusomu, mutabani wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ne batabani ba Merari, be baganda be ab'omu ssiga lya Merari abaamuyimiriranga ku kkono: Etani mutabani wa Kisi, mutabani wa Abudi, mutabani wa Malluki," 
1Chronicles6:30 mutabani wa Kasabiya, mutabani wa Amaziya, mutabani wa Kilukiya," 
1Chronicles6:31 mutabani wa Amuzi, mutabani wa Bbani, mutabani wa Semeri," 
1Chronicles6:32 mutabani wa Makuli, mutabani wa Musi, mutabani wa Merari, mutabani wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:33 Baganda baabwe Abaleevi baatumibwanga emirimu gyonna egy'omu Kisulo ky'Omukama. 
1Chronicles6:34 Ye Aroni ne batabani be baaweerezanga ebitambiro ku mwaliiro gw'ebitambiro ebyokye n'okunyookeza obubaani ku mwaliro gw'obubaani mu mirimu gyonna egy'Awatukuvu Ennyo, nga baddaabiriza olwa Yisirayeli, nga bagoberera byonna Musa omuweereza wa Katonda nga bwe yali alagidde." 
1Chronicles6:35 Bano be batabani ba Aroni: Eleyazari mutabani we, Finekasi mutabani we, Abisuwa mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:36 Bukki mutabani we, Wuzzi mutabani we, Zerakiya mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:37 Meraayoti mutabani we, Amariya mutabani we, Akitubu mutabani we," 
1Chronicles6:38 Zadoki mutabani we, Akimaazi mutabani we." 
1Chronicles6:39 Bino bye bifo gye baasenga eby'ensiisira zaabwe ebyabaweebwa ku kalulu ng'ebitundu byabwe. Byasooka kuweebwa bazzukulu ba Aroni mu ssiga ly'Abakewati kubanga bo akalulu be kaayokya. 
1Chronicles6:40 Baabawa Keburoni mu nsi ya Yuda n'amalundiro agetooloddewo. 
1Chronicles6:41 Byo ebibanja by'ekibuga n'ebyalo ebikyetoolodde byaweebwa Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne. 
1Chronicles6:42 Bo bazzukulu ba Aroni baabawa Keburoni, ekibuga eky'obuddukiro, ne Libuna n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Yattiri, ne Esutemowa n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:43 Kileni n'amalundiro gaakyo, Debiri n'amalundiro gaakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:44 Asani n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Beti-Semesi n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:45 Mu kika kya Benyamiini baaweebwayo Geba n'amalundiro gaakyo, Alemeti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Anatoti n'amalundiro gaakyo; ebibuga byonna wamu kkumi na bisatu amasiga gaabwe bye gaafuna." 
1Chronicles6:46 Bazzukulu ba Kewati abalala mu nnyiriri zaabwe baaweebwa ebibuga kkumi okuva mu kyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse. 
1Chronicles6:47 Batabani ba Gerusomu mu nnyiriri zaabwe baafuna ebibuga kkumi na bisatu okuva mu bika ekya Yissakari, ekya Aseeri, ekya Nafutali n'ekya Manasse mu Basani." 
1Chronicles6:48 Bazzukulu ba Merari mu nnyiriri zaabwe baafuna ebibuga kkumi na bibiri okuva mu bika ekya Rubeni, ekya Gaadi n'ekya Zebuluni." 
1Chronicles6:49 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli baawa Abaleevi ebibuga ebyo n'amalundiro gaabyo. 
1Chronicles6:50 Baabawa ku kalulu ebibuga ebyo bye baatuuma amannya gaabyo okuva mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Yuda ne mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Simewoni ne mu kika ky'abazzukulu ba Benyamiini. 
1Chronicles6:51 Abamu mu nnyiriri z'abazzukulu ba Kewati baafuna ng'ebitundu byabwe ebibuga okuva mu kika kya Efurayimu. 
1Chronicles6:52 Baabawa ebibuga eby'obuddukiro: Sekemu n'amalundiro gaakyo mu nsozi za Efurayimu, Gezeri n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:53 Yokumewamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, Beti-Koroni n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:54 Ayiyaloni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Gati-Rimmoni n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:55 Mu kitundu ekyokubiri ekya Manasse Aneri n'amalundiro gaakyo ne Bilewamu n'amalundiro gaakyo byaweebwa abo abaali bafisse mu nnyiriri z'abazzukulu ba Kewati. 
1Chronicles6:56 Bazzukulu ba Gerusomu mu nnyiriri zaabwe baaweebwa okuva mu kyokubiri eky'ekika kya Manasse: Golani mu Basani n'amalundiro gaakyo ne Asutaroti n'amalundiro gaakyo. 
1Chronicles6:57 Okuva mu kika kya Yissakari baaweebwa: Kedesi n'amalundiro gaakyo, Daberati n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:58 Ramoti n'amalundiro gaakyo ne Anemu n'amalundiro gaakyo. 
1Chronicles6:59 Mu kika kya Aseeri: Masali n'amalundiro gaakyo ne Abudoni n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:60 Kukoki n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Rekobu n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:61 Okuva mu kika kya Nafutali: Kedesi mu Galilaaya n'amalundiro gaakyo, Kammoni n'amalundiro gaakyo ne Kiriyatayimu n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:62 Bazzukulu ba Merari abaafikka baabawa okuva mu kika kya Zebuluni: Rimmoni n'amalundiro gaakyo, Tabori n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:63 N'emitala wa Yorudani okuva mu kika kya Rubeni, ebuvanjuba wa Yeriko, baaweebwa: Bezeri mu ddungu n'amalundiro gaakyo, Yawazi n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:64 Kedemoti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Mefaati n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:65 Okuva mu kika kya Gaadi baaweebwa: Ramoti mu Gileyaadi n'amalundiro gaakyo, Makanayimu n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:66 Kesuboni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Yazeri n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Batabani ba Yissakari: Tola. Puwa, Yasubu ne Simuroni; be bana." 
1Chronicles7:2 Batabani ba Tola: Wuzzi, Refaaya, Yeriyeli, Yakumayi, Yibusamu, Semweli, abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Mu biseera bya Dawudi, bazzukulu ba Tola baalina mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe abasajja abatabaazi abaali bawera emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu lukaaga." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mutabani wa Wuzzi yali Yizurakiya. Batabani ba Yizurakiya: Mikayeli, Obadiya, Yoweli, Yissiya; bonna abataano baali baami." 
1Chronicles7:4 Enkalala z'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe ziraga nti mu bo mwalimu abasajja abatuuse okutabaala emitwalo esatu mu kakaaga, kubanga baalina abakazi bangi n'abaana bangi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Abeŋŋanda zaabwe okuva mu masiga gonna aga Yissakari, abasajja abatabaazi abaali ku nkalala z'endyo zaabwe, baali bawera emitwalo munaana mu kasanvu." 
1Chronicles7:6 Batabani ba Benyamiini: Bela, Bekeri, Yediyayeli; be basatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Batabani ba Bela: Ezuboni, Wuzzi, Wuzziyeli, Yerimoti ne Yiri; baali bakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, bonna wamu bataano. Enkalala zaabwe ziraga abatabaazi emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu asatu mu bana." 
1Chronicles7:8 Batabani ba Bekeri: Zemira, Yowasi, Eliyezeri, Eliyowenayi, Omuri, Yeremoti, Abiya, Anatoti ne Alemeti; bano bonna baana ba Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Enkalala z'endyo zaabwe zawandiika abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe n'abatabaazi emitwalo ebiri mu bibiri. 
1Chronicles7:10 Mutabani wa Yediyayeli: Biluwani. Batabani ba Biluwani: Yewusi, Benyamiini, Ewudi, Kenaana, Zeetani, Tarusisi, Akisakari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Abo bonna abazzukulu ba Yediyayeli baali bakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abasajja abatabaazi omutwalo gumu mu kasanvu mu bibiri." 
1Chronicles7:12 Abasuppi n'Abakuppi baasibuka mu Yiri; Abakusi baava mu Akeri. 
1Chronicles7:13 Batabani ba Nafutali: Yakuziyeli, Guni, Yezeri, Sallumu. Bano baali bazaaliddwa Biluwa." 
1Chronicles7:14 Batabani ba Manasse: Asuryeli, mukazi we Omwaramu gwe yamuzaalira; yazaala ne Makiri kitaawe wa Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri yawasa omukazi okuva mu Bakuppi n'Abasuppi. Mwannyina yali ayitibwa Maaka. Mutabani we omu omulala yatuumibwa Zelofekadi. Zelofekadi yazaala abaana ab'obuwala babiri. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka muka Makiri yazaala omwana omulenzi n'amutuuma Peresi. Muganda we yatuumibwa Seresi; batabani b'ono baali Wulamu ne Rakemu. 
1Chronicles7:17 Mutabani wa Wulamu: Bedani. Abo be baali bazzukulu ba Gileyaadi mutabani wa Makiri, mutabani wa Manasse." 
1Chronicles7:18 Mwannyina Kammoleketi yazaala Yisuwodi, Abiyezeri ne Makula." 
1Chronicles7:19 Batabani ba Semida: Akiyani, Sekemu, Likuki ne Aniyamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Batabani ba Efurayimu: Sutelaki, Beredi mutabani we, Takati mutabani we, Eleyada mutabani we, Takati mutabani we," 
1Chronicles7:21 Zabadi mutabani we, ne Sutelaki mutabani we. Ezeri ne Eleyadi battibwa abasajja b'e Gati bwe baali bagenzeeyo okunyaga ente zaabwe." 
1Chronicles7:22 Kitaabwe Efurayimu yabakaabira ebbanga ggwanvu, abeŋŋanda ze ne bajja okumukubagiza." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ne yeebaka ne mukazi we, mukazi we n'aba olubuto, n'azaala omwana ow'obulenzi. Efurayimu n'amutuuma Beriya, kubanga mu maka mwali muguddemu eky'ennaku." 
1Chronicles7:24 Muwala we yali Seera, eyazimba Beti-Koroni ow'emmanga ne Beti-Koroni ow'engulu, ne Wuzzeni-Seera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa yali mutabani we, Resefu mutabani we, Telaki mutabani we, Takani mutabani we," 
1Chronicles7:26 Laadani mutabani we, Ammiwudi mutabani we, Elisama mutabani we," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuunu mutabani we, ne Yoswa mutabani we." 
1Chronicles7:28 Obutaka bwabwe n'obusenze bwabwe byali Beteli n'ebyalo byakyo; ate ebuvanjuba Naarani, ebugwanjuba Gezeri n'ebyalo byakyo, Sekemu n'ebyalo byakyo, okutuuka e Ayya n'ebyalo byakyo." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ku nsalo y'ekika kya Manasse nga bw'egenda ye waali Beti-Seyani n'ebyalo byakyo, Taanaki n'ebyalo byakyo, Megiddo n'ebyalo byakyo, ne Dori n'ebyalo byakyo. Bazzukulu ba Yozefu mutabani wa Yisirayeli baasulanga mu bibuga bino." 
1Chronicles7:30 Batabani ba Aseeri: Yimuna, Yisuva, Yisuvi, Beriya. Mwannyinaabwe yali Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Batabani ba Beriya: Keberi ne Malukyeli, ono ye yali kitaawe wa Biruzayiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Keberi ye yali kitaawe wa Yafuleti, Someri, Kotamu ne Suwa mwannyinaabwe." 
1Chronicles7:33 Batabani ba Yafuleti: Pasaki, Bimuwali, Asuvati; bano be batabani ba Yafuleti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Batabani ba Someri: Aki, Rokuga, Kubba ne Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Batabani ba Elemu muganda we: Zofa, Yimuna, Selesi ne Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Batabani ba Zofa: Suwa, Karuneferi, Suwali, Beeri, Yimura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri, Kodi, Samma, Silusa, Yitura ne Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Batabani ba Yeteri: Yefunne, Pisupa ne Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Batabani ba Wulla: Ara, Kanniyeli ne Riziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bano bonna baali bazzukulu ba Aseeri: abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abasajja abalondobe, abatabaazi abazira n'abaami abatutumufu. Abasajja abatabaazi enkalala z'endyo zaabwe be zaalaga baali bawera emitwalo ebiri mu kakaaga." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamiini yazaala Bela omuggulanda we, Asubeli owookubiri, Akara owookusatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noka owookuna ne Rafa owookutaano. 
1Chronicles8:3 Bano be batabani ba Bela: Addari, Gera, Abiwudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisuwa, Naamani, Akowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Sefufani ne Kuramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Bano be batabani ba Ekudi: be baali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ez'abo abaabeeranga mu Geba, abawaŋŋangusirizibwa e Manakati:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, Akiya, Gera, eyabawaŋŋangusa era eyazaala Wuzza ne Akikudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Sakarayimu yazaala abaana mu nsi y'e Mowabu ng'amaze okugoba bakazi be Kusimu ne Baara. 
1Chronicles8:9 Mu mukazi we Kodesi yazaala Yobabu, Zibiya, Mesa, Malukamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yewuzi, Sakiya ne Miruma. Abo be batabani be; baali bakulu ba nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles8:11 Mu Kusimu yazaala Abitubu ne Elupaali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Batabani ba Elupaali: Eberi, Misamu, Semedi (Semedi yazimba Ono ne Lodi n'ebyalo byakyo)," 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya ne Sema, abaali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe ez'abo ababeeranga mu Ayiyaloni; baagobamu abatuuze b'omu Gati;" 
1Chronicles8:14 ne Akiyo, Sasaki ne Yeremoti." 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadiya, Aradi, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikayeli, Yisupa ne Yoka, baali batabani ba Beriya." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadiya, Mesullamu, Kiziki, Keberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Yisumerayi, Yizuliya ne Yobabu baali batabani ba Elupaali." 
1Chronicles8:19 Yakimu, Zikuri, Zabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Eliyenayi, Zilletayi, Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaaya, Baraaya ne Simurati baali batabani ba Simeyi." 
1Chronicles8:22 Yisupani, Eberi, Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abudoni, Zikuri, Kanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Ananiya, Elamu, Anutotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Yifudeeya ne Penuweli baali batabani ba Sasaki. 
1Chronicles8:26 Samuserayi, Sekariya, Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaaresiya, Eliya ne Zikuri baali batabani ba Yerokamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Abo bonna baali bakulu ba nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, baami, nga bwe baali ku nkalala z'endyo zaabwe; baabeeranga mu Yeruzaalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeyeli kitaawe wa Gibewoni yabeeranga Gibewoni. Mukazi we ye yali Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Batabani be: Abudoni omuggulanda we, Zuru, Kisi, Baali, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Akiyo, Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 ne Mikuloti. Mikuloti yazaala Simewa. Nabo baabeeranga ne baganda baabwe mu Yeruzaalemu mu ddembo. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri yazaala Kisi; Kisi yazaala Sawulo; Sawulo yazaala Yonatani, Maluki-Suwa, Abinadabu ne Esubaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mutabani wa Yonatani: Meribaali; Meribaali yazaala Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Batabani ba Mika: Pitoni, Meleki, Tareya ne Akazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Akazi yazaala Yowadda; Yowadda yazaala Alemeti, Azumaveti ne Zimuri. Zimuri yazaala Moza;" 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza yazaala Bineya, Rafa mutabani we, Eleyasa mutabani we, ne Azeli mutabani we." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeli yalina abaana mukaaga, gano ge mannya gaabwe: Azurikamu, Bokeru, Yisimayeli, Sewariya, Obadiya ne Kanani. Abo bonna be batabani ba Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Batabani ba muganda we Eseki: Wulamu omuggulanda we, Yewusi amuddako ne Elifeleti owookusatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Batabani ba Wulamu baali batabaazi bazira, nga bamanyi bulungi okulasa akasaale. Baalina abaana bangi n'abazzukulu, bonna awamu kikumi mu ataano. Abo bonna be Babenyamiini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Yisirayeli yenna yali muwandiike ku nkalala z'endyo mu kitabo kya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. Kati nno abantu ba Yuda baawaŋŋangusirizibwa mu Babiloni olw'obutaba beesigwa. 
1Chronicles9:2 Abaasooka okudda mu butaka bwabwe mu bibuga byabwe baali Bayisirayeli aba bulijjo, bakabona, Abaleevi n'abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa." 
1Chronicles9:3 Abaaberanga mu Yeruzaalemu okuva mu bantu ba Yuda, aba Benyamiini, aba Efurayimu n'aba Manasse baali:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Wutayi mutabani wa Ammiwudi, mutabani wa Omuri, mutabani wa Yimuri, mutabani wa Bbaani, asibuka mu Perezi mutabani wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Mu b'essiga lya Sela: Asaaya omuggulanda ne batabani be. 
1Chronicles9:6 Mu batabani ba Zeraki: Yeweli, n'ab'oluganda lwabwe abawera lukaaga mu kyenda." 
1Chronicles9:7 Mu Babenyamiini: Sallu mutabani wa Mesullamu, mutabani wa Odaviya, mutabani wa Kassenuwa," 
1Chronicles9:8 Yibuneeya mutabani wa Yerokamu, Ela mutabani wa Wuzzi, mutabani wa Mikuri, Mesullamu mutabani wa Sefatiya, mutabani wa Reweli, mutabani wa Yibuniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Ab'oluganda lwabwe nga bwe bawandiikiddwa ku nkalala z'endyo zaabwe baali lwenda mu ataano mu mukaaga. Bano bonna baali bakulu ba nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe. 
1Chronicles9:10 Mu bakabona: Yedaaya, Yowaribu ne Yakini." 
1Chronicles9:11 Azariya mutabani wa Kilukiya, mutabani wa Mesullamu, mutabani wa Zadoki, mutabani wa Meraayoti, mutabani wa Akitubu, omukulu eyali avuunaanyizibwa ku Kiggwa kya Katonda;" 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaaya mutabani wa Yerokamu, mutabani wa Pasukuru, mutabani wa Malukiya, ne Maasayi mutabani wa Adyeli, mutabani wa Yakuzera, mutabani wa Mesullamu, mutabani wa Mesillemiti, mutabani wa Yimmeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Ab'oluganda lwabwe abaali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe baali lukumi mu lusanvu mu nkaaga. Baalina obukugu mu kuweereza mu Kiggwa kya Katonda. 
1Chronicles9:14 Mu Baleevi: Semaaya mutabani wa Kassubi, mutabani wa Azurikamu, mutabani wa Kasabiya, ava mu ssiga lya Merari." 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakubakkari, Keresi, Galali, Mattaniya mutabani wa Mika, mutabani wa Zikuri, mutabani wa Asafu," 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadiya mutabani wa Semaaya, mutabani wa Galali, mutabani wa Yedutuni, Berekiya mutabani wa Asa, mutabani wa Elukana. Baabeeranga mu byalo by'essiga lya Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Abaggazi: Sallumu, Akkubu, Talumoni, Akimani, ne baganda baabwe; Sallumu ye yali omukulu waabwe;" 
1Chronicles9:18 yassibwa ku Wankaaki wa Kabaka ebuvanjuba, gy'ali n'okutuusa kati. Bano be baali abaggazi b'ensiisira z'abazzukulu ba Leevi:" 
1Chronicles9:19 Sallumu mutabani wa Kore, mutabani wa Abiyasafu, mutabani wa Kora, ne banne abakuumi b'oku mulyango bwe bava mu ssiga lyabwe erya Kora, be baakuumanga emiryango gya Weema nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baakuumanga omulyango gw'Olusiisira lw'Omukama." 
1Chronicles9:20 Mu kusooka Finekasi mutabani wa Eleyazari ye yali omukulu w'abaggazi, n'Omukama yali naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakariya mutabani wa Meselemiya ye yali omuggazi ku muzigo gw'omulyango gwa Weema ey'Ensisinkano. 
1Chronicles9:22 Bano bonna abaalonderwa ogw'okuggala emiryango baali ebikumi bibiri mu kkumi na babiri. Baali ku nkalala z'endyo zaabwe mu byalo byabwe. Dawudi ne Samweli omulabi be baabassa buli omu ku kisanja kye. 
1Chronicles9:23 Bo n'abaana baabwe baali ku gwa kukuuma miryango gy'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, ennyumba eya Weema." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abaggazi baali ku njuyi zonna ennya, kwe kugamba nti ebuvanjuba, ebugwanjuba, emambuka n'emaserengeta." 
1Chronicles9:25 Baganda baabwe baavanga mu byalo byabwe ne bajja ne bamala ennaku musanvu nga bakola nabo. 
1Chronicles9:26 Naye bo abaggazi abakulu abana Abaleevi be baalinanga obuvunaanyizibwa ku bisenge ne ku nkuluze eby'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. 
1Chronicles9:27 Baasulanga beetoolodde Ekiggwa ky'Omukama kubanga ogw'okukikuuma gwalinga gwabwe. Baalinanga ogw'okukuuma ekisumuluzo n'okuggulawo Ekiggwa buli makya. 
1Chronicles9:28 Mu abo mwe mwavanga abakola ku bintu ebikozesebwa mu kuweereza; baabalanga omuwendo gwabyo nga bireeteddwa oba nga biggyibwawo. 
1Chronicles9:29 Era mu bo mwe mwali abaakwasibwa eky'okulabirira eby'okutimba byonna ebitukuvu, n'ebirala byonna eby'Ekifo Ekitukuvu, n'obuwunga, evviini, omuzigo, obubaani n'ebyakaloosa." 
1Chronicles9:30 Bakabona abamu baakolanga ku by'okutabula omuzigo n'ebyakaloosa. 
1Chronicles9:31 Omuleevi omu ayitibwa Mattitiya, omuggulanda wa Sallumu ow'omu ssiga ly'Abakora, yakwasibwa omulimu omutongole ogw'okufumbanga emigaati egy'empewere." 
1Chronicles9:32 Baganda baabwe abalala mu ssiga lya Kewati baali ku gwa kutegeka buli sabbaato Emigaati egy'Okwolesebwa. 
1Chronicles9:33 Abayimbi abakulu mu nnyumba z'Abaleevi eza bajjajjaabwe, abaabeeranga mu kigango ky'omu Kiggwa tebaaliko mirimu mirala kubanga baalina okuweerezanga emisana n'ekiro." 
1Chronicles9:34 Abo be baali abakulu b'ennyumba z'Abaleevi eza bajjajjaabwe, abakulembeze nga bwe baali mu nkalala z'endyo zaabwe; baabeeranga Yeruzaalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeyeli kitaawe wa Gibewoni yabeeranga Gibewoni. Mukazi we ye yali Maaka. 
1Chronicles9:36 Batabani be: Abudoni omuggulanda we, Zuru, Kisi, Baali, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Akiyo, Zakariya ne Mikuloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikuloti yazaala Semeyamu. Nabo babeeranga ne baganda baabwe mu Yeruzaalemu. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri yazaala Kisi, Kisi yazaala Sawulo, Sawulo yazaala Yonatani, Maluki-Suwa, Abinadabu ne Esubaali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mutabani wa Yonatani: Meribaali. Meribaali yazaala Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Batabani ba Mika: Pitoni, Meleki, Takureya ne Akazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akazi yazaala Yaara, Yaara n'azaala Alemeti, Azumaveti ne Zimuri. Zimuri yazaala Moza;" 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza yazaala Bineya, Refaaya mutabani we, Eleyasa mutabani we, ne Azeli mutabani we." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli yalina abaana mukaaga; gano ge mannya gaabwe: Azurikamu, Bokeru, Yisimayeli, Sewariya, Obadiya ne Kanani. Bano be batabani ba Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Abafilisitiini baalumba Yisirayeli, Abayisirayeli ne badduka Abafilisitiini, ne battibwa ku lusozi Gilubowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilisitiini ne bagoba Sawulo ne batabani be emisinde, ne batta Yonatani, Abinadabu ne Maluki-Suwa batabani ba Sawulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Olutalo ne lunyiinyittira awaali Sawulo; abalasi b'obusaale ne bamuggukako ne bamussaako obuvune; 
1Chronicles10:4 Sawulo kwe kugamba omwetissi w'ebyokulwanyisa bye nti: “Sowola ekitala kyo okimpiseemu, sikulwa nga bano abatali batayirire bajja ne banjolonga.” Naye omwetissi w'ebyokulwanyisa n'agaana, kubanga yali atidde nnyo. Sawulo kwe kubaka ekitala kye n'akyesuulako." 
1Chronicles10:5 Omwetissi we ow'ebyokulwanyisa bye bwe yalaba nga Sawulo afudde, naye ne yeesuula ku kitala kye n'afa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Sawulo n'afa, ko ne batabani be abasatu, n'ennyumba ye yonna; ne bafa lumu." 
1Chronicles10:7 Abasajja Abayisirayeli bonna abaali mu kiwonvu, bwe baalaba ng'eggye lidduse, nga ne Sawulo ne batabani be bafudde, ne baabulira ebibuga byabwe, ne badduka, Abafilisitiini ne bajja ne babisulamu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Enkeera Abafilisitiini bwe bajja okwambula abattiddwa, ne basanga Sawulo ne batabani be nga bagaŋŋalamye ku lusozi Gilubowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ne bamwambula ne batwala omutwe gwe n'ebyokulwanyisa bye. Ne batuma ababaka wonna mu nsi y'Abafilisitiini balangirire okwetooloola wonna amawulire eri ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale n'abantu. 
1Chronicles10:10 Ebyokulwanyisa bye ne babiteeka mu kiggwa kya balubaale baabwe, ate omutwe gwe ne baguwanika mu kiggwa kya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Abantu baabwe ab'omu Yabesi-Gileyaadi bwe baawulira byonna Abafilisitiini bye baali bakoze Sawulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 basajja baabwe abazira ne bajja ne baggyayo omulambo gwa Sawulo n'emirambo gya batabani be, ne bagireeta e Yabesi, ne baziika amagumba gaabwe wansi w'omuvule ogwali mu Yabesi. Ne basiibira ennaku musanvu." 
1Chronicles10:13 Sawulo yafa bw'atyo kubanga teyali mwesigwa; teyeesiga Mukama, era n'Omukama bye yamugamba teyabituukirizanga; yassaako n'okwebuuzanga amagezi ku mizimu;" 
1Chronicles10:14 teyeebuuzanga ku Mukama. Omukama naye kyeyava amutta, obwakabaka bwe n'abuwa Dawudi mutabani wa Yesse." 
1Chronicles11:1 Yisirayeli yenna n'akuŋŋaanira awali Dawudi mu Keburoni, n'agamba nti: “Tuutuno tuli ba magumba go na nnyama yo." 
1Chronicles11:2 Mu kusooka Sawulo bwe yali akyali kabaka, ggwe wali omukulembeze wa Yisirayeli mu ntabaalo zaabwe, kubanga Omukama Katonda wo yakugamba nti: ‘Ggwe onoolunda abantu bange Yisirayeli, ggwe onooba omukulembeze w'abantu bange Yisirayeli.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Abakadde bonna aba Yisirayeli bwe bajja ewa kabaka Dawudi mu Keburoni, Dawudi n'akola nabo endagaano mu maaso g'Omukama, ne bamusiiga omuzigo abeere kabaka wa Yisirayeli ng'Omukama bwe yali agambye ng'ayita mu Samweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dawudi yagenda ne Yisirayeli yenna okulumba Yeruzaalemu, ye Yebusi. Abayebusi be baabeeranga mu nsi eyo." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abaali mu Yebusi ne bagamba Dawudi nti: “Tojja kuyingira wano.” Naye Dawudi n'awamba ekigo kya Siyoni, kye Kibuga kya Dawudi," 
1Chronicles11:6 Dawudi yali agambye nti: “Anaasooka okukuba Omuyebusi, y'anaafuuka omuduumizi era omwami.” Yowabu mutabani wa Zeruya ye yasooka okulumba, bw'atyo n'afuuka omuduumizi w'eggye." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dawudi ekisulo kye n'akissa mu kigo, bwe kityo ne kiyitibwa 'Kibuga kya Dawudi'." 
1Chronicles11:8 Yazimba n'ekibuga okukyetooloola okuva ku Millo okutuuka ku bbugwe waakyo. Ye Yowabu n'addaabiriza ebitundu ebisigaddewo eby'ekibuga. 
1Chronicles11:9 Dawudi n'agenda nga yeeyongera okunywera, n'Omukama w'Amagye ng'ali naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Bano be baali abakulu b'abasajja ba Dawudi abazira, bano ne Yisirayeli yenna abaawagira Dawudi okufuuka kabaka n'okunyweza obwakabaka bwe ng'Omukama bwe yali ayogedde ku Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Luno lwe lukalala lw'abasajja ba Dawudi abazira: Yasobewamu ow'omu ssiga lya Kakumoni omukulu w'amakumi Asatu. Ono yagalulira effumu lye abasajja ebikumi bisatu, n'abatta mu lulumba lumu." 
1Chronicles11:12 Amuddako Eleyazari mutabani wa Dodo Omwakoki eyabalirwanga mu bazira Abasatu. 
1Chronicles11:13 Oyo yali ne Dawudi mu Pasi-Dammini Abafilisitiini lwe baakuŋŋaanira mu kifo ekyo okulwana. Ennimiro y'omu kitundu ekyo yali ejjudde sayiri. Amagye ne gadduka Abafilisitiini. 
1Chronicles11:14 Naye bano ne bagumira mu nnimiro wakati ne bagitaasa, ne bakuba Abafilisitiini. Omukama n'abanunula n'obuwanguzi obw'amaanyi." 
1Chronicles11:15 Basatu ku bagabe Asatu baaserengeta awali Dawudi ku lwazi gye yali mu mpuku ya Adullamu, olusiisira lw'Abafilisitiini nga luli mu kiwonvu ky'e Refayimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Olwo Dawudi yali mu bwekwekero, yo enkambi y'Abafilisitiini yali Beteleemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dawudi n'ayagala okunywa amazzi, n'agamba nti: “Singa waliwo andeetera ku mazzi ag'omu kidiba ekiri okumpi n'omulyango gw'e Beteleemu!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 N'evaayo abasajja Abasatu, ne bawaguza olusiisira lw'Abafilisitiini, ne bagenda basena amazzi mu kidiba ky'e Beteleemu ekyali okumpi n'omulyango, ne bagaleetera Dawudi. Naye n'agaana okuganywa, wabula n'agayiwa awo mu maaso g'Omukama," 
1Chronicles11:19 n'agamba nti: “Kikafuuwe, Katonda wange, nze okukola kino; nze okunywa omusaayi gw'abantu bano, kubanga baatunze omwoyo okundeetera amazzi gano.” Bw'atyo n'atayagala kuganywa. Abazira Abasatu ebyo bye baakola." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisayi muganda wa Yowabu ye yali omukulu w'amakumi Asatu. Yagalulira effumu lye abasajja ebikumi bisatu n'abatta; ne yeekolera erinnya mu Asatu," 
1Chronicles11:21 Mu makumi Asatu ng'alinamu ekitiibwa kya mirundi ebiri, era nga y'abakulira, naye teyatuuka bali Abasatu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaaya mutabani wa Yoyada yali musajja muzira eyakola ebingi; yali ava Kabuzeeli. Oyo yatta abasajja abazira babiri ab'e Mowabu. Era ku lunaku olw'omuzira yakkirira mu bunnya bw'oluzzi n'atta empologoma. 
1Chronicles11:23 Era yatta omusajja Omumisiri, eyali awerako emikono etaano obuwanvu. Omusajja yalina effumu mu mukono gwe eryenkana omuggo okulangirwa engoye; Benaaya naye yaserengeta gy'ali n'omuggo. Effumu n'alisika ku Mumisiri ate lyennyini n'alimussisa." 
1Chronicles11:24 Benaaya, mutabani wa Yoyada, ebyo bye yakola; naye abalirwa mu Basatu abazira." 
1Chronicles11:25 Yassibwamu ekitiibwa okusinga Asatu; naye era teyatuuka bali Abasatu. Dawudi yamufuula mutwe gwa bakuumi be. 
1Chronicles11:26 Abazira baali: Esaweli muganda wa Yowabu, Elukanani mutabani wa Dodo ow'e Beteleemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Sammoti ow'e Karori, Kelezi Omupeloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Yira mutabani wa Yikkesi ow'e Tekowa, Abiyezeri ow'e Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibbekayi Omukusa, Yilayi Omwakoki," 
1Chronicles11:30 Mawarayi ow'e Netofa, Keledi mutabani wa Baana ow'e Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Yitayi mutabani wa Ribayi ow'e Gibewa ekya Benyamiini, Benaaya ow'e Piratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Kurayi ava mu Nakale-Gaasi, Abiyeli ow'e Beti-Aruba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azumaveti ow'e Bakarumi, Eliyakuba ow'e Saaluboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 batabani ba Asemu ow'e Gizoni, Yonatani mutabani wa Sage Omwarari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Akiyamu mutabani wa Sakari Omwarari, Elifali mutabani wa Wuru," 
1Chronicles11:36 Keferi Omumekera, Akiya Omupeloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Kezuro ow'e Karumeli, Naarayi mutabani wa Ezubayi," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoweli muganda wa Natani, Mibukari mutabani wa Aguri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki Omwammoni, Nakarayi Omubeeroti, omwetissi w'ebyokulwanyisa bya Yowabu mutabani wa Zeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Yira Omuyituri, Garebu Omuyituri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Wuriya Omukitti, Zabadi mutabani wa Akulayi" 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mutabani wa Siza owa Rubeni era eyali owaakasolya k'ekika kya Rubeni era Amakumi Asatu nga gali naye," 
1Chronicles11:43 Kanani mutabani wa Maaka, Yosafati Omumituni," 
1Chronicles11:44 Wuzziya ow'e Asuteroti, Sama ne Yeyeli batabani ba Kotamu ow'e Aroweri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediyayeli mutabani wa Simuri, Yoka muganda we Omutizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliyeli Omumakavi, Yeribayi ne Yosaviya batabani ba Elunaamu, Yituma Omumowabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliyeli, Obedi ne Yaasiyeli ow'e Mezoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Bano be basajja abajja eri Dawudi e Zikulagi, bwe yali ng'agobeddwa mu maaso ga Sawulo mutabani wa Kisi; be batabaazi abazira abamuyamba mu ntalo." 
1Chronicles12:2 Baali balasi ba busale, nga basobola okulasa obusaale oba okukasuka envuumuulo n'emikono gyombi, ogwa ddyo oba ogwa kkono. Mu b'oluganda lwa Sawulo, Ababenyamiini:" 
1Chronicles12:3 Akiyezeri omukulu waabwe, ne Yowasi bombi batabani ba Semaya, ab'e Gibewa; Yeziyeli ne Peleti batabani ba Azumaveti, Beraka, ne Yewu aba Anatoti;" 
1Chronicles12:4 Yisumaaya ow'e Gibewoni, eyali omusajja omutabaazi, abalirwa mu makumi Asatu, era omukulu w'amakumi Asatu;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Yeremiya, Yakaziyeli, Yokanani, ne Yozabadi ab'e Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Eluzayi, Yerimoti, Beyaliya, Semariya ne Sefatiya Abakarufi;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Elukana, Yissiya, Azareli, Yowezeri, ne Yasobewamu ab'omu ssiga lya Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:8 Yowela ne Zebadiya batabani ba Yerokamu ab'e Gedori. 
1Chronicles12:9 Mu Gaadi mwavaamu abadduka ne beegatta ku Dawudi gye yali mu kigo kye mu ddungu. Baali basajja batabaazi, abazira, abeetegefu okutabaala, nga bakwata engabo n'effumu; mu ntunula nga bali ng'empologoma, nga bawenyuka ng'ennangaazi mu nsozi." 
1Chronicles12:10 Ezeri mukulu waabwe, Obadiya owookubiri, Eliyabu owookusatu," 
1Chronicles12:11 Misumanna owookuna, Yeremiya owookutaano;" 
1Chronicles12:12 Attayi owoomukaga, Eliyeli owoomusanvu," 
1Chronicles12:13 Yokanani owoomunaana, Eluzabadi owoomwenda," 
1Chronicles12:14 Yeremiya ow'ekkumi ne Makubannayi ow'ekkumi n'omu. 
1Chronicles12:15 Bazzukulu ba Gaadi bano baali bagabe mu ggye, ng'asinga obutene alwanyisa abatabaazi kikumi, ate ng'asinga obunene alwanyisa abatabaazi lukumi." 
1Chronicles12:16 Be baabo abaasomoka Yorudani mu mwezi omubereberye omugga we gutera okwalaalira ku mbalama zaagwo, ne babunya emiwabo abaabeeranga mu biwonvu ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba." 
1Chronicles12:17 Mu bantu ba Benyamiini ne mu bantu ba Yuda waavaayo abasajja ne bajja ewa Dawudi mu kigo gye yali. 
1Chronicles12:18 Dawudi yafuluma okubasisinkana n'abagamba nti: “Oba muzze gye ndi lwa mirembe, munnyambe, nsemba eky'okunneyungako, naye oba muzze kukettera balabe bange, sso nga nze siriiko musango, Katonda wa bajjajjaffe alabe asalewo.”" 
1Chronicles12:19 Mwoyo n'akka ku Amasayi omukulu mu makumi Asatu n'agamba nti: “Tuli babo, ayi Dawudi! Tuli naawe, mutabani wa Yesse! Emirembe, emirembe gibeere naawe; abakuyamba babeere n'emirembe; kubanga Katonda wo akuyamba.” Dawudi n'abaaniriza, n'abawa okukulira ebikwanga bye." 
1Chronicles12:20 N'abamu mu Manasse badduka ne beegatta ku Dawudi lwe yagenda n'Abafilisitiini okulwanyisa Sawulo. Kyokka tebaayamba Bafilisitiini kubanga abafuzi b'Abafilisitiini bwe beeteesaamu, ne bamugoba nga bagamba nti: “Kaamala n'asala n'adda ewa mukama we Sawulo, tunaaba emitwe gyaffe tugitunzeeyo.”" 
1Chronicles12:21 Bwe yagenda e Zikulagi, abasajja bano ab'omu Manasse ne badda gy'ali: Aduna, Yozabadi, Yediyayeli, Mikayeli, Yozabadi, Eliwu ne Zilletayi, abaali abagabe b'enkumi mu Manasse." 
1Chronicles12:22 Abo ne bayamba Dawudi okulwanyisa ebikwanga ebyabalumbanga, kubanga bonna baali basajja batabaazi; bafuuka bagabe mu ggye." 
1Chronicles12:23 Era buli lunaku abantu bajjanga ewa Dawudi, eggye lye ne ligenda nga ligejja, ne lifuuka ddene lya maanyi." 
1Chronicles12:24 Guno gwe muwendo ogw'abatabaazi abaalina ebyokulwanyisa abeegatta ku Dawudi e Keburoni, bakyuse obwakabaka bwa Sawulo babuzze ku ye nga Omukama bwe yali agambye." 
1Chronicles12:25 Mu bantu ba Yuda: abakwata engabo n'effumu kakaaga mu lunaana, abasajja abambalidde okulwana." 
1Chronicles12:26 Mu Basimewoni: kasanvu mu kikumi, abasajja abatabaazi." 
1Chronicles12:27 Mu bazzukulu ba Leevi: enkumi nnya mu lukaaga. 
1Chronicles12:28 Ne Yoyada omukulu w'essiga lya Aroni; n'aleeterako abalala enkumi ssatu mu lusanvu," 
1Chronicles12:29 ne Zadoki omuvubuka omutabaazi omuzira, wamu n'abagabe abiri mu babiri okuva mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabe." 
1Chronicles12:30 Mu bantu ba Benyamiini, baganda ba Sawulo: enkumi ssatu; mu bo abasinga obungi n'okutuusa kati baali bakyagoberera ennyumba ya Sawulo." 
1Chronicles12:31 Mu bantu ba Efurayimu: emitwalo ebiri mu lunaana, abasajja abatabaazi, ab'erinnya mu ndyo zaabwe." 
1Chronicles12:32 Mu kyokubiri eky'ekika kya Manasse, omutwalo gumu mu kanaana, buli omu ng'ayitiddwa linnya ku linnya, ne basindikibwa bajje bafuule Dawudi kabaka." 
1Chronicles12:33 Mu bantu ba Yissakari, abasajja abalabalaba, abalengera amangu Yisirayeli ky'ateekwa okukola, nga bawera abaami ebikumi bibiri, nga bali n'ab'eŋŋanda zaabwe be bakulira." 
1Chronicles12:34 Mu bantu ba Zebuluni: emitwalo etaano, abasajja abamanyirivu mu kutabaala n'okuweza buli kyakulwanyisa, abajja bayambe Dawudi n'omutima gwonna." 
1Chronicles12:35 Mu bantu ba Nafutali: abagabe lukumi nga bali n'abatabaazi emitwalo esatu mu kasanvu abakutte engabo n'amafumu. 
1Chronicles12:36 Mu Badaani: emitwalo ebiri mu kanaana mu lukaaga, abasajja abeetegese okulwana." 
1Chronicles12:37 Mu bantu ba Aseeri: emitwalo ena, abasajja abamanyirivu mu by'entalo, abeetegese okulwana." 
1Chronicles12:38 Emitala wa Yorudani mu bantu ba Rubeni, aba Gaadi n'ekyokubiri ky'ekika kya Manasse: akasiriivu kamu mu obukumi bubiri ababagalidde buli kya kulwanyisa kyonna." 
1Chronicles12:39 Abasajja abo bonna baali basajja batabaazi, abeetegese okutabaala. Bajja e Keburoni n'omutima ogumaliridde okufuula Dawudi kabaka wa Yisirayeli yenna. N'abalala bonna abasigaddeyo mu Yisirayeli baalina ekigendererwa kimu eky'okuddira Dawudi abeere kabaka." 
1Chronicles12:40 Baamala ennaku ssatu nga bali ne Dawudi nga balya n'okunywa; anti ab'eŋŋanda zaabwe baali babaleetedde ebyokulya. 
1Chronicles12:41 Era n'abo ababaliraanye, okutuuka eyo ku Yissakari, Zebuluni ne Nafutali, baabaleeteranga emmere ku ndogoyi, eŋŋamiya, ennyumbu n'ente. Obutta bw'eŋŋano, ebitole by'entontogolo z'emikunyu empotose, emizabbibu emiwotose, evviini, omuzigo, ente n'endiga byonna byali mu bungi, anti mu Yisirayeli kwali kusanyuka." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dawudi yakuba olukiiko wamu n'abagabe be abaduumira enkumi n'ebikumi n'abakulu bonna. 
1Chronicles13:2 N'agamba ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli nti: “Bwe kuba nga kwe kusiima kwammwe, era nga kwe kwagala kwa Mukama Katonda waffe, tutume eri baganda baffe abalala mu bitundu wonna ebya Yisirayeli n'eri bakabona n'Abaleevi be bali nabo mu bibuga ne mu malundiro gaabwe, tusabe batwegatteko," 
1Chronicles13:3 tukomyewo Ssanduuku ya Katonda waffe mu ffe, anti mu budde bwa Sawulo twagigayaalirira.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Ekibiina kyonna ne kikkiriza, anti ekirowoozo kyali kituufu eri abantu bonna." 
1Chronicles13:5 Bw'atyo Dawudi n'akuŋŋaanya Yisirayeli yenna okuva ku Mugga Sikori ogwa Misiri okutuuka ku Lebo-Kamati, baggye Ssanduuku ya Katonda e Kiriyati-Yewarimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dawudi n'ayambuka e Baali ng'ali ne Yisirayeli yenna, e Kiriyati-Yewarimu ekiri mu Yuda, baggyeyo Ssanduuku ya Katonda eyitibwa erinnya 'Omukama awaŋŋamye wakati mu bakerubi'." 
1Chronicles13:7 Baggya Ssanduuku ya Katonda mu nnyumba ya Abinadabu ne bagissa ku kigaali ekipya. Wuzza ne Akiyo be baali bagoba ekigaali. 
1Chronicles13:8 Dawudi ne Yisirayeli yenna baali bazinira mu maaso ga Katonda n'amaanyi gaabwe gonna, nga bayimba ku nnanga, endongo, entongooli, obugoma, ensaazo, n'amakondeere." 
1Chronicles13:9 Bwe baatuuka ku gguuliro lya Kidoni, Wuzza n'agolola omukono gwe okuwanirira Ssanduuku, kubanga ente zasirittukamu." 
1Chronicles13:10 Obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku Wuzza n'amukuba, kubanga yagololera omukono gwe eri Essanduuku. N'afiira awo mu maaso g'Omukama." 
1Chronicles13:11 Dawudi n'anyiiga kubanga Omukama yamalira obusungu bwe ku Wuzza; ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Perezi-Wuzza n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
1Chronicles13:12 Dawudi n'atya Katonda ku olwo, n'agamba nti: “Nsobola ntya okuyingiza ewange Ssanduuku ya Katonda?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Olw'ensonga eyo Ssanduuku teyagikyamya wuwe, mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, wabula n'agitwala ku nnyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Omugitti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ssanduuku ya Katonda n'emala mu nnyumba ya Obedi-Edomu, mu nnyumba ye, emyezi esatu; Omukama n'awa omukisa ennyumba ye na byonna bye yalina." 
1Chronicles14:1 Kiramu kabaka w'e Tiiro n'atuma ababaka ewa Dawudi ng'aweerezza emiti gy'entolookyo, n'abakugu mu kukomola amayinja, n'ababazzi, bazimbire Dawudi olubiri." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dawudi n'ategeera ng'Omukama amukakasizza ku bwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli, era ng'atutumudde obwakabaka bwe ku lw'abantu be Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dawudi yawasaayo abakazi abalala mu Yeruzaalemu. Dawudi yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. 
1Chronicles14:4 Gano ge mannya g'abo ababe abaamuzaalirwa e Yeruzaalemu: Sammuwa, Sobabu, Natani ne Solomoni;" 
1Chronicles14:5 Yibukari, Elisuwa ne Elupeleti;" 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama Beeliyada ne Elifeleti. 
1Chronicles14:8 Abafilisitiini bwe baawulira nti Dawudi bamusiize abeere kabaka wa Yisirayeli yenna, ne bambuka bonna bamunoonye. Dawudi bwe yawulira, n'avaayo abasisinkane." 
1Chronicles14:9 Abafilisitiini bwe bajja, ne balumba mu kiwonvu ky'e Refayimu." 
1Chronicles14:10 Dawudi ne yeebuuza ku Mukama nti: “Nnyambuke eri Abafilisitiini? Onoobampa mu mikono gyange?” Omukama n'agamba nti: “Yambuka, kubanga nzija kukuwa Abafilisitiini mu mikono gyo.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Dawudi ne basajja be n'ajja mu Baali-Perazimu n'abakubira eyo, n'agamba nti: “Ng'amazzi bwe gawaguza, n'Omukama bw'awaguzza mu balabe bange n'omukono gwange.” Ekifo ekyo kwe kuyitibwa Baali-Perazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilisitiini baalekayo ebifaananyi bya balubaale baabwe, Dawudi n'alagira ne byokebwa mu muliro." 
1Chronicles14:13 Abafilisitiini era ne baddamu okulumba mu kiwonvu. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dawudi n'addamu okwebuuza ku Mukama, ye n'amwanukula nti: “Toyambuka, wabula beetooloole obalumbire mu maaso g'emiti gya balusaamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Bw'onoowulira ebigere waggulu mu miti gya balusaamu, awo ng'ovaayo okulumba, kubanga Omukama ajja kubeera ng'akukulembeddemu okukuba eggye ly'Abafilisitiini.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Dawudi n'akola ng'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde, n'akuba eggye ly'Abafilisitiini okubaggya e Gibewoni okutuuka e Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Ettutumu lya Dawudi ne libuna mu buli nsi; Omukama n'aleetera amawanga okutya ennyo Dawudi. 
1Chronicles15:1 Dawudi bwe yamala okwezimbira amayumba mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, Ssanduuku ya Katonda n'agitegekera ekifo, n'agisimbira weema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Awo Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Ssanduuku y'Omukama si ya kwetikkibwanga buli asanga, wabula Baleevi bokka Omukama be yalonda okugitwala n'okumuweereza emirembe gyonna.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Dawudi n'akuŋŋaanya Yisirayeli yenna mu Yeruzaalemu, okuleeta Ssanduuku y'Omukama mu kifo kyayo kye yali agitegekedde." 
1Chronicles15:4 Yayitirako bazzukulu ba Aroni n'Abaleevi bano: 
1Chronicles15:5 mu bazzukulu ba Kewati: Wuriyeli, omukulu waabwe, ne baganda be kikumi mu abiri;" 
1Chronicles15:6 mu bazzukulu ba Merari: Asaaya, omukulu waabwe, ne baganda be kikumi mu asatu;" 
1Chronicles15:7 mu bazzukulu ba Gerusoni: Yoweli, omukulu waabwe, ne baganda be kikumi mu asatu;" 
1Chronicles15:8 mu bazzukulu ba Elizafani: Semaaya, omukulu waabwe, ne baganda be ebikumi bibiri;" 
1Chronicles15:9 mu bazzukulu ba Keburoni: Eliyeli, omukulu waabwe, ne baganda be kinaana;" 
1Chronicles15:10 ne mu bazzukulu ba Wuzziyeli: Amminadabu, omukulu waabwe, ne baganda be kikumi mu kkumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Awo Dawudi n'ayita Zadoki ne Abiyatari bakabona, n'Abaleevi: Wuriyeli, Asaaya, Yoweli, Semaaya, Eliyeli ne Amminadabu," 
1Chronicles15:12 n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mukulira ennyumba z'Abaleevi eza bajjajjaabwe; mwetukuze wamu ne baganda bammwe, Ssanduuku y'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli mugireete mu kifo kye ngitegekedde." 
1Chronicles15:13 Kubanga mmwe Abaleevi temwagiggyayo mu kusooka, Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kyeyava atusitukiramu, kubanga tetwamwebuuzaako ku ngeri gye twali tuteekwa okukikolamu.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Awo bakabona n'Abaleevi ne beetukuza baleete Ssanduuku y'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli. 
1Chronicles15:15 Bazzukulu ba Leevi ne baleeta Ssanduuku ya Katonda ng'emisituliro bagitadde ku bibegabega nga Musa bwe yali alagidde ng'aggya ku kigambo ky'Omukama. 
1Chronicles15:16 Dawudi yasaba abakulu b'Abaleevi mu baganda baabwe balondemu abayimbi bayimbire ku bivuga: entongooli, ennanga n'ensaazo, nga bakooloobya n'essanyu." 
1Chronicles15:17 Abaleevi ne balonda: Emani mutabani wa Yoweli; ne mu baganda be: Asafu mutabani wa Berekiya; okuva mu baganda baabwe ab'omu bazzukulu b'Abamerari: Etani mutabani wa Kusaaya. 
1Chronicles15:18 Baabalonderako ne baganda baabwe ababaddirira: Zakariya mutabani wa Yaaziyeli, Semiramoti, Yekiyeli, Wunni, Eliyabu, Benaaya, Maaseeya, Mattitiya, Elifeleku, Mikuneeya, era ne Obedi-Edomu ne Yeyeli abaggazi." 
1Chronicles15:19 Abayimbi Emani, Asafu ne Etani be baali ab'okukuba ensaazo ez'ekikomo;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Zakariya, Aziyeli, Semiramoti, Yekiyeli, Wunni, Eliyabu, Maaseeya, Benaaya ba ntongooli endeegere ku Alamoti." 
1Chronicles15:21 Mattitiya, Elifeleku, Mikuneeya, Obedi-Edomu, Yeyeli, Azaziya ba nnanga endeegere ku seminiti." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya omukulu w'Abaleevi abayimbi ye yalabiriranga eby'okuyimba kubanga yali muyimbi mukugu. 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya ne Elukana baali baggazi ba Ssanduuku. 
1Chronicles15:24 Bakabona Sebaniya, Yosafati, Netaneli, Amasayi, Zakariya Benaaya ne Eliyezeri baali bakufuuwa makondeere mu maaso g'Essanduuku ya Katonda; Obedi-Edomu ne Yekiya bo baali baggazi ba Ssanduuku." 
1Chronicles15:25 Awo Dawudi, abakadde mu Yisirayeli n'abagabe b'ebibinja ne bagenda okuggyayo Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama, okugiggya mu nnyumba ya Obedi-Edomu mu ssanyu." 
1Chronicles15:26 Kubanga Katonda yayamba Abaleevi abaali batwala Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama, ne batambira ente ennume musanvu n'endiga ennume musanvu." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dawudi yali ayambadde ekkanzu ey'obufumbo, n'Abaleevi bonna abaali batwala Ssanduuku, n'abayimbi ne Kenaniya eyali akulira eby'okuyimba, bonna nga bambadde nga ye. Dawudi yali ayambadde efodi ey'olugoye." 
1Chronicles15:28 Yisirayeli yenna n'aleeta Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama n'obuluulu n'amaloboozi ag'eŋŋombe, amakondeere, ensaazo, n'okuvuga kw'entongooli n'ennanga." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama bwe yali eyingira mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, Mikali, muwala wa Sawulo, n'atunula wansi ng'ayima mu ddirisa n'alaba kabaka Dawudi nga yeebuukiza, azina, n'amunyooma mu mutima gwe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Baaleeta Ssanduuku ya Katonda ne bagissa munda mu weema Dawudi gye yali agisimbidde, ne baweereza mu maaso ga Katonda ebitambiro ebyokye n'eby'okussa ekimu." 
1Chronicles16:2 Dawudi bwe yamala okuweereza ebitambiro ebyokye n'eby'okussa ekimu, n'awa abantu omukisa mu linnya ly'Omukama." 
1Chronicles16:3 Awo buli omu mu Yisirayeli, omusajja n'omukazi, n'amuwa omugaati ogw'oluwewere n'ekitole ky'empirivuma, n'ekitole ky'emizabbibu emiwotose. Emirimu gy'Abaleevi mu maaso g'Essanduuku" 
1Chronicles16:4 Yalonda abamu ku Baleevi baweerezenga mu maaso g'Omukama, era bagulumizenga n'okutendereza Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ye yali abakulira, owookubiri Zakariya, ssaako Yeyeli, Semiramoti, Yekiyeli, Mattitiya, Eliyabu, Benaaya, Obedi-Edomu ne Yeyeli. Be baali ab'okusuna entongooli n'ennanga, Asafu nga wa kukuba nsaazo." 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaaya ne Yakaziyeli bakabona nga ba kufuuwanga amakondeere obudde bwonna mu maaso ga Ssanduuku y'Endagaano ya Katonda. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ku olwo Dawudi n'awa omulundi ogusooka Asafu ne baganda be oluyimba luno olugulumiza Omukama: 
1Chronicles16:8 “Mwebaze Omukama, mukoowoole erinnya lye; bye yakola mubimanyise mu mawanga." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mumuyimbire, mumuyimbire ettendo, munyumye ku byewuunyisa bye byonna." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mutendereze erinnya lye ettukuvu, emitima gy'abanoonya Omukama gisanyuke." 
1Chronicles16:11 Munoonye Omukama, munoonye amaanyi ge; munoonye bulijjo amaaso ge." 
1Chronicles16:12 Mujjukire ebyewuunyisa bye yakola, ebikuuno bye n'ennamula y'akamwa ke." 
1Chronicles16:13 Ayi ezzadde lya Yisirayeli omuweereza we, mmwe bazzukulu ba Yakobo abalondemu be!" 
1Chronicles16:14 “Yennyini ye Mukama Katonda waffe; ennamula ye eri wonna mu nsi. 
1Chronicles16:15 Mujjukire endagaano ye emirembe gyonna, ekigambo kye yalagira okutuusa ku mazadde olukumi;" 
1Chronicles16:16 endagaano gye yakola ne Yiburayimu, ekirayiro kye yalayirira Yizaake." 
1Chronicles16:17 Ku Yakobo n'akimuteerawo ng'etteeka, ku Yisirayeli ng'endagaano ey'olubeerera," 
1Chronicles16:18 nti: ‘Ggwe ndikuwa ensi Kanaani ng'omugabo gw'obusika bwo.’ 
1Chronicles16:19 “Bwe baali bakyali batono ddala, mpa we bazira, ate abasenze obusenze;" 
1Chronicles16:20 baabunganga nga bava mu ggwanga lino bagenda mu liri, bava mu bwakabaka buno bagenda mu buli." 
1Chronicles16:21 Naye teyaganya n'omu kubanyigiriza; olw'okubeera bo yakoma ku bakabaka nti: 
1Chronicles16:22 ‘Temukwata ku basiige bange, abalanzi bange temubakola kabi.’" 
1Chronicles16:23 “Ensi yonna, muyimbire Omukama, mulangirire obulokozi bwe buli olukedde." 
1Chronicles16:24 Mubuulire mu mawanga ekitiibwa kye, mu bantu bonna ebyewuunyisa by'akola." 
1Chronicles16:25 Kubanga Omukama mukulu, atenderezebwa nnyo; wa ntiisa okusinga balubaale bonna." 
1Chronicles16:26 Anti balubaale b'amawanga bifaananyi, Omukama ye yakola eggulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ekitiibwa n'obukulu bimukulemberamu; obuyinza n'essanyu biri mu kifo kye. 
1Chronicles16:28 “Muwe Omukama, mmwe ebika by'abantu, muwe Omukama ekitiibwa n'obuyinza." 
1Chronicles16:29 Muwe Omukama ekitiibwa ky'erinnya lye, muleete ekitambiro, mujje mu maaso ge. Musinze Omukama mu kwakayakana kw'obutukuvu bwe." 
1Chronicles16:30 Ayi ensi yonna, mukankane mu maaso ge. Ensi yabangibwawo nga nnywevu, terinyeenyezebwa." 
1Chronicles16:31 “Eggulu lijaganye n'ensi esanyuke. Bagambe mu mawanga nti: ‘Katonda wo afuga!’ 
1Chronicles16:32 Ennyanja ewulugume ne byonna ebijjuddemu; ettale lisagambize na byonna ebiririmu. 
1Chronicles16:33 Olwo emiti gy'omu kibira gyonna giriyoogaana n'essanyu mu maaso g'Omukama kubanga ajja, kubanga ajja okulamula ensi." 
1Chronicles16:34 “Mwebaze Omukama kubanga mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles16:35 Mukoowoole nti: ‘Tulokole, ayi Katonda, Mulokozi waffe, tukuŋŋaanye, tuggyeeyo mu mawanga, tulyoke tugulumize erinnya lyo ettukuvu, twetendere mu ttendo lyo.’" 
1Chronicles16:36 Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli atenderezebwe emirembe n'emirembe.” Abantu bonna ne bagamba nti: “Amiina, Omukama atenderezebwe.”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Dawudi yaleka Asafu ne baganda be mu maaso g'Essanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama baweerezenga ebbanga lyonna mu maaso g'Essanduuku okusinziira ku mikolo egyabangawo buli lunaku. 
1Chronicles16:38 Yaleka ne Obedi-Edomu ne baganda be enkaaga mu omunaana baweerezenga nabo. Yedutuni mutabani wa Obedi-Edomu ne Kosa baali ba kukola gwa buggazi. 
1Chronicles16:39 Yaleka Zadoki kabona ne baganda be bakabona mu maaso g'Ekisulo ky'Omukama ekyali mu kifo ekigulumivu mu Gibewoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 baweerezenga obutasalako Omukama ebitambiro ebyokye ku mwaliiro gw'ebitambiro ebyokye, ku makya n'akawungeezi, nga bagoberera ebyawandiikibwa mu tteeka ly'Omukama lye yawa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Ku abo yagattako Emani ne Yedutuni, n'abalala abalondemu linnya ku linnya, bagulumize Omukama “kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Emani ne Yedutuni omulimu gwabwe kwali kufuuwanga makondeere n'okukuba ensaazo n'ebivuga ebigendera ku nnyimba entukuvu. Batabani ba Yedutuni bo baali ba kukola gwa buggazi. 
1Chronicles16:43 Abantu bonna ne baddayo buli omu mu nnyumba ye, ne Dawudi n'addayo awe amaka ge omukisa. Omukama alagaanya Dawudi" 
1Chronicles17:1 Kabaka bwe yamala okukkalira mu lubiri lwe, n'agamba Natani omulanzi nti: “Laba nze nsula mu nnyumba ya miti gya ntolookyo, sso nga yo Ssanduuku y'Omukama ebeera mu weema buweema.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani n'agamba kabaka nti: “Buli kyonna ekikuli ku mutima, genda okikole, kubanga Omukama ali naawe.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Naye ekiro ekyo kyennyini, ekigambo kya Katonda ne kijjira Natani nti:" 
1Chronicles17:4 “Genda ogambe omuweereza wange Dawudi nti: ‘Kino ky'agamba Omukama: Si ggwe onoozimbira nze ennyumba ey'okusulamu. 
1Chronicles17:5 Sisulanga mu nnyumba okuva ku lunaku lwe naggya Abayisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero; mbadde nva mu weema eno ne nzira mu eri, ne mu kisulo kino ne nzira mu kiri." 
1Chronicles17:6 Mu bifo byonna mwe nayita n'Abayisirayeli bonna, nali njogedde n'omu ku balamuzi ba Yisirayeli be nalagira balunde abantu bange Yisirayeli, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Lwaki temwanzimbira nnyumba ya ntolookyo?” ’" 
1Chronicles17:7 Kale nno gamba omuweereza wange Dawudi nti: ‘Kino ky'agamba Omukama w'Amagye: Nakuggya mu malundiro, mu kulunda ndiga, olyoke obeere omukulembeze w'abantu bange Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Yonna gy'oyise mbadde naawe, ne nkusalako abalabe bo bonna mu maaso go. Kati erinnya lyo nzija kulifuula tutumufu okwenkana ery'abo abatutumufu mu nsi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Nzija kukolera abantu bange Yisirayeli ekifo, mbasse omwo, babeerenga omwo, nga tebakyaddayo kutawaanyizibwa. Ababi tebaliddayo kubabonyaabonya nga bwe baakola mu masooka," 
1Chronicles17:10 era nga bwe babadde bakola okuva mu nnaku lwe nassaawo abalamuzi ku bantu bange Yisirayeli. Nzija kufufuggaza abalabe bo bonna. Nkutegeeza nti: Omukama ajja kukuzimbira ennyumba. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ennaku zo bwe ziriba zituuse, n'ogenda obeere ne bajjajjaabo, ndisitusaawo ezzadde lyo eririkusikira, omu ku batabani bo; ndinyweza obwakabaka bwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Oyo y'alinzimbira ennyumba, era ndinyweza nnamulondo y'obwakabaka bwe emirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndiba kitaawe, naye alibeera mwana wange; sigenda kumuggyako kisa kyange nga bwe nakiggya ku oyo eyakukulembera." 
1Chronicles17:14 Nzija kumussa ku nnyumba yange n'obwakabaka bwange ennaku zonna, ne nnamulondo yo eribeera nnywevu emirembe gyonna.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Natani ebigambo n'abibuulira Dawudi nga bino byonna bwe byali bimugambiddwa, nga bino byonna bwe byali bimubikkuliddwa." 
1Chronicles17:16 Dawudi n'ayingira, n'atuula mu maaso g'Omukama, n'agamba nti: “Nze ani, ayi Mukama Katonda, n'ennyumba yange kye ki, okulaba ng'ontuusizza wano?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ayi Katonda, olabye nga kino ekikyali ekitono, n'oyogera ne ku nnyumba y'omuweereza wo gye bujja. Ontutte nga nze mu lubu asingayo ekitiibwa mu bantu bonna, ayi Mukama Katonda!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Dawudi akyalinayo ki ekirala ky'anaakugamba olw'okugulumiza omuweereza wo? Anti omuweereza wo omumanyi. 
1Chronicles17:19 Ayi Mukama, ku lw'omuweereza wo, ng'ogoberera omutima gwo, okoze ekintu kino kyonna ekikulu ate n'omanyisa na byonna ebikulu." 
1Chronicles17:20 Teri akufaanana, ayi Mukama. Teri na Katonda mulala, okuggyako ggwe, mu byonna bye twawulira n'amatu gaffe." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ggwanga liruwa eriri ng'abantu bo Yisirayeli: eggwanga lyokka mu nsi Katonda waalyo lye yagenda anunule babe abantu be, wessizeewo erinnya, okole ebinene, eby'entiisa, ng'ogobawo amawanga mu maaso g'abantu bo be weenunulira mu Misiri?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Weeteerawo bw'otyo abantu bo Yisirayeli, babe bantu bo emirembe gyonna; ate naawe, Mukama, n'ofuuka Katonda waabwe." 
1Chronicles17:23 Awo nno, ayi Mukama, ekigambo ky'oyogedde ku muweereza wo ne ku nnyumba ye kinyweze emirembe gyonna; kola nga bw'osuubizza," 
1Chronicles17:24 Kiryoke kinywere, olwo n'erinnya lyo lirigulumizibwa emirembe gyonna, n'abantu baligamba nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye ye Katonda wa Yisirayeli, Katonda ku lwa Yisirayeli’ n'ennyumba y'omuweereza wo Dawudi erinywera mu maaso go." 
1Chronicles17:25 Anti, Katonda wange, kino okibikkulidde omuweereza wo nti olimuzimbira ennyumba, omuweereza wo kyavudde azuula amaanyi okwegayirira mu maaso go." 
1Chronicles17:26 Kale nno, ayi Mukama, ggwe oli Katonda. Osuubizza n'omuweereza wo ebirungi bino." 
1Chronicles17:27 Kale nno okkirizza okuwa omukisa ennyumba y'omuweereza wo, bulijjo ebeere mu maaso go, kubanga ggwe, ayi Mukama, ogiwadde omukisa, bw'etyo eriweebwa omukisa emirembe gyonna.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Oluvannyuma, Dawudi yawangula Abafilisitiini n'abafufuggaliza ddala. N'aggya mu mikono gy'Abafilisitiini Gati n'ebyalo ebikyetoolodde." 
1Chronicles18:2 Yawangula Mowabu, Abamowabu ne bafuuka baweereza ba Dawudi ne bawa n'omusolo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dawudi yalwanyisa ne Adadeezeri kabaka w'e Zoba, okutuuka e Kamati, lwe yali agenze okuzza mu mikono gye ensi y'oku mugga Furaati." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dawudi n'amuwambako ebigaali lukumi n'abeebagazi kasanvu, n'abatabaazi ab'ebigere emitwalo ebiri. Dawudi embalaasi zonna yazisala enteega, n'alekawo kikumi kyokka ez'ebigaali." 
1Chronicles18:5 Abaaramu b'e Damasiko bajja okudduukirira Adadeezeri kabaka w'e Zoba, Dawudi n'atta mu Baaramu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri." 
1Chronicles18:6 Dawudi yassa enkambi z'abatabaazi mu Aramu ekya Damasiko; Abaaramu ne bafuuka baweereza be, ne bawa n'omusolo. Omukama yawanguzanga Dawudi yonna gye yagendanga." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dawudi yatwala engabo eza zaabu ezaalinga n'abagabe ba Adadeezeri, n'azireeta mu Yeruzaalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Era Dawudi kabaka n'aggya ekikomo kingi nnyo mu Tibukati ne mu Kuni, ebibuga bya Adadeezeri, Solomoni kye yeeyamba okukola Ennyanja ey'ekikomo, empagi n'ebikozesebwa ebirala eby'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles18:9 Towu kabaka w'e Kamati bwe yawulira nti Dawudi afufuggazza eggye lyonna erya Adadeezeri kabaka w'e Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 n'atuma mutabani we Adoramu ewa kabaka Dawudi, amulamuseeko era amukulise okulwanyisa Adadeezeri n'amuwangula, kubanga Adadeezeri yalinga alwanagana ne Towu. Adoramu n'atwala ebintu byonna ebya ffeeza, ebya zaabu n'eby'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles18:11 Nabyo kabaka Dawudi n'abisingira Omukama, okufaanana ne ffeeza ne zaabu bye yali aggye mu mawanga gonna: Edomu ne Mowabu, Abammoni, Abafilisitiini ne Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Ne Abisayi mutabani wa Zeruya yatta Abeedomu omutwalo gumu mu kanaana mu kiwonvu ky'Omunnyu. 
1Chronicles18:13 Yassa enkambi z'abatabaazi wonna mu Edomu, Abeedomu bonna ne bafuuka baweereza ba Dawudi. Omukama yawanguzanga Dawudi yonna gye yagendanga." 
1Chronicles18:14 Dawudi n'afuga Yisirayeli yonna; era Dawudi yakoleranga abantu be bonna ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yowabu mutabani wa Zeruya nga y'aduumira eggye; Yosafati mutabani wa Akiludi nga y'akuuma ebyafaayo; 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoki mutabani wa Akitubu ne Akimeleki mutabani wa Abiyatari nga be bakabona; Savusa nga ye muwandiisi; 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaaya mutabani wa Yoyada nga y'alabirira Abakereti n'Abapeleti; bo batabani ba Dawudi nga bakungu ku lusegere lwa kabaka. 
1Chronicles19:1 Oluvannyuma, Nakasi kabaka w'Abammoni n'afa; mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
1Chronicles19:2 Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Nzija kugirira ekisa Kanuni mutabani wa Nakasi kubanga kitaawe yangirira ekisa.” Awo Dawudi n'atumayo abaweereza be bamutuusize okukubagiza olw'okufiirwa kitaawe. Naye abaweereza ba Dawudi bwe bajja ewa Kanuni mu nsi y'Abammoni okumukubagiza," 
1Chronicles19:3 abakungu b'Abammoni ne bagamba Kanuni nti: “Olowooza Dawudi akutumidde ab'okukukubagiza lwa kussaamu kitaawo kitiibwa, nandiki Dawudi abaweereza abasindise gy'oli bekkaanye era bazikirize n'ensi bagikette?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Kanuni n'addira abaweereza ba Dawudi, buli omu n'amumwako ekirevu, n'engoye zaabwe n'azisalako ebitundu okukoma mu makkati ku butuuliro, n'abagoba bagende." 
1Chronicles19:5 Abantu ne bagenda ewa Dawudi, ne bamubuulira ebigudde ku baweereza be; Dawudi n'asindika ababaka ab'okubasisinkana; baali batoowaziddwa nnyo. Dawudi n'abalagira nti: “Musigale mu Yeriko, okutuusa ebirevu byammwe nga bimeze, awo mulyoke mukomewo.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Abammoni bwe baalaba nga beekyayisizza ewa Dawudi, Kanuni n'Abammoni ne baweereza talenta lukumi eza ffeeza okupangisa ebigaali n'abeebagazi okuva e Aramu Nakarayimu, Aramu-Maaka n'e Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ne bapangisa ebigaali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri, wamu ne kabaka w'e Maaka n'eggye lye lyonna. N'ajja n'asiisira kumpi ne Medeba. Abammoni bo ne bakunga abatabaazi okuva wonna mu bibuga byabwe, ne bajja mu lutalo." 
1Chronicles19:8 Dawudi bwe yakiwulira, n'asindika Yowabu n'eggye lyonna ery'abasajja ab'amaanyi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Abammoni ne bavaayo, ne bataza eggye mu maaso ga wankaaki w'ekibuga kyabwe. Bo bakabaka abajja okulwana ne basigala ku ttale bokka." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yowabu bwe yalaba nga beetegese okumulwanyisa nga bafuluma mu maaso n'emabega, n'alonda mu bonna abatabaazi abalondobe mu Yisirayeli, n'abategeka okulumba Abaaramu;" 
1Chronicles19:11 ekitundu ky'abantu ekyasigalawo n'akiwa Abisayi muganda we n'abategeka okulumba Abammoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 Yowabu n'agamba nti: “Abaaramu bwe banansinza amaanyi, ononziruukirira; n'Abammoni bwe banaakusinza amaanyi, nnaakudduukirira." 
1Chronicles19:13 Beera muzira; tulwane na buzira okutaasa abantu baffe n'ebibuga bya Katonda waffe; Omukama anaakola ekisaanye mu maaso ge.” 
1Chronicles19:14 Awo Yowabu n'eggye lye yali nalyo ne balumba okulwanyisa Abaaramu, Abaaramu ne babadduka." 
1Chronicles19:15 Abammoni bwe baalaba ng'Abaaramu badduse, nabo ne badduka Abisayi muganda we, ne bayingira mu kibuga. Awo Yowabu n'akomawo e Yeruzaalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Abaaramu bwe baalaba nga bakubiddwa Yisirayeli, ne baweereza ababaka ne bakuŋŋaanya Abaaramu okuva emitala w'Omugga, Sofaki omuduumizi w'eggye lya Adadeezeri ng'abakulembedde." 
1Chronicles19:17 Bwe baakibuulira Dawudi, n'akuŋŋaanya Yisirayeli yenna, n'asomoka Yorudani, n'ajja gye bali, n'abatambaala. Dawudi n'ataza eggye okusisinkana Abaaramu, nabo ne bamulwanyisa." 
1Chronicles19:18 Naye Abaaramu ne badduka Abayisirayeli. Dawudi n'atta mu Baaramu abatabaazi b'oku bigaali lusanvu, n'abatabaazi baabwe ab'ebigere emitwalo ena. N'atta ne Sofaki omuduumizi w'eggye lyabwe." 
1Chronicles19:19 Bakabaka bonna abaali abaweereza ba Adadeezeri bwe baalaba nga bakubiddwa Yisirayeli, ne bateeseganya n'Abayisirayeli, ne bafuuka baweereza baabwe. Abaaramu tebeegomba kuddayo kuyamba Bammoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ku ntandikwa y'omwaka, obudde bakabaka mwe batera okugendera mu ntalo, Yowabu yatwala eggye, n'afufuggaza ensi y'Abammoni, n'ajja n'azinda Rabba. Naye Dawudi yasigala mu Yeruzaalemu. Yowabu ekibuga n'akikuba n'akifuula matongo." 
1Chronicles20:2 Dawudi n'aggya ku mutwe gwa kabaka waabwe engule. Yazuula nti engule yali ezitowa talenta eya zaabu nnamba, ng'etoneddwako amayinja ag'omuwendo. Ne bagissa ku mutwe gwa Dawudi. Era Dawudi n'anyagulula ekibuga, n'atwala omunyago munene nnyo." 
1Chronicles20:3 Abantu abaalimu yabaggyamu n'abasalira ogw'okukola n'emisumeeni, n'ensuuluulu ez'ebyuma n'embazzi. Bw'atyo bwe yakola ne ku bibuga byonna eby'Abammoni. Olwo Dawudi n'akomawo mu Yeruzaalemu n'eggye lyonna." 
1Chronicles20:4 Oluvannyuma lwa bino, waabalukawo olutalo n'Abafilisitiini e Gezeri. Ku olwo Sibbekayi Omukusa n'atta Sippayi ow'omu lulyo lw'Abarefa. Abafilisitiini ne bafufuggazibwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Era waaliwo olutalo n'Abafilisitiini, Elukanani mutabani wa Yayiri n'atta Lakumi muganda wa Goliyati Omugitti, eyalina olunyago lw'effumu lye olwenkana omuti okulangirwa engoye." 
1Chronicles20:6 Era waaliwo olutalo mu Gati, omwali omusajja omuwagguufu, eyalina engalo mukaaga ku buli kibatu n'obugere mukaaga ku buli kigere; byonna wamu amakumi abiri mu bina. N'oyo naye yali asibuka mu Rafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Bwe yajoogereza Yisirayeli, naye Yonatani mutabani wa Simewa, muganda wa Dawudi, n'amutta." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abasajja abo baali basibuka mu Rafa mu Gati. Baafiira mu mikono gya Dawudi n'egy'abasajja be. 
1Chronicles21:1 Sitaani yasitukira mu Yisirayeli n'asindika Dawudi okubala abantu ba Yisirayeli. 
1Chronicles21:2 Dawudi n'agamba Yowabu n'abagabe b'eggye bonna nti: “Mugende mubale Abayisirayeli okuva e Beeriseba okutuuka ku Daani, mukomeewo mmanye omuwendo gwabwe bwe gwenkana”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Yowabu n'agamba kabaka nti: “Omukama Katonda wo ku muwendo gw'abantu nga bwe guli kati agwongereko emirundi kikumi. Naye mukama wange kabaka, bano bonna si baweereza ba mukama wange? Mu kintu kino kiki ky'ogenderedde? Lwaki wandyagadde okuleetera Yisirayeli omusango?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Naye kabaka kye yagamba kye kyasinza ekya Yowabu amaanyi; bw'atyo Yowabu n'agenda n'ayitaayita mu Yisirayeli yenna, n'akomawo mu Yeruzaalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Yowabu n'awa Dawudi omuwendo gw'abantu: mu Yisirayeli yenna mwalimu abasajja akakadde kamu mu akasiriivu kamu abakwasi b'ekitala; ne mu Yuda yalina akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo musanvu abasobola okukwata ekitala. 
1Chronicles21:6 Naye Yowabu teyabala ba mu bika bya Leevi ne Benyamiini, kubanga Yowabu ekiragiro kya kabaka yakyenyinyala." 
1Chronicles21:7 Era ekiragiro kino kyali kibi mu maaso ga Katonda, bw'atyo n'abonereza Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Olwo Dawudi n'agamba Omukama nti: “Nnyonoonye nnyo olwa kino kye nkoze. Nkwegayiridde, ggyawo ekibi ky'omuweereza wo, kubanga kye nkoze kya busiru nnyo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Omukama n'agamba Gaadi omulabi wa Dawudi nti: 
1Chronicles21:10 “Genda ogambe Dawudi nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Nkuwadde bisatu olondeko kimu ku ebyo kye mba nkukola’ ” 
1Chronicles21:11 Gaadi n'ajja ewa Dawudi, n'agamba nti: “Londako ky'oyagala:" 
1Chronicles21:12 Enjala egwe okumala emyaka esatu? Oba emyezi esatu egy'okusaanyizibwawo mu maaso g'abalabe bo, n'ekitala ky'abalabe bo nga kikukinyeeko? Oba ennaku ssatu ez'ekitala ky'Omukama, ze nnaku eza kawumpuli mu nsi nga malayika agenda avunjaga buli kitundu kyonna ekya Yisirayeli? Kale weerowooze, olondeko kye nnaddiza oli antumye.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dawudi n'agamba Gaadi nti: “Ndiko ennaku nnyingi; naye ekisinga obulungi ka ngwe mu mikono gy'Omukama, kasita ekisa kye kingi nnyo, naye tondeka kugwa mu mikono gya bantu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Awo Omukama n'asindika kawumpuli ku Yisirayeli; mu Yisirayeli ne mufaamu abasajja emitwalo musanvu. 
1Chronicles21:15 Katonda n'atuma malayika we azikirize Yeruzaalemu, naye malayika aba atandika okukizikiriza, Omukama n'alaba ne yeddamu ku kabi ako, n'agamba malayika eyali atta abantu nti: “Kimala! Kaakati ssa omukono gwo.” Malayika w'Omukama yali ayimiridde kumpi n'egguuliro lya Orunani Omuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dawudi bwe yayimusa amaaso, n'alaba malayika ng'ayimiridde wakati w'eggulu n'ensi, ng'alina mu ngalo ekitala ekisowole nga kigololeddwa ku Yeruzaalemu. Awo Dawudi n'abakadde ne bambala ebikutiya, ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dawudi n'agamba Omukama nti: “Si nze nalagira okubala abantu? Nze nakola ekibi, nze nayonoona; bano endiga obuliga baakola ki? Nkwegayiridde, Mukama Katonda wange, omukono gwo gukyukire nze n'ennyumba ya kitange, naye toleka kawumpuli ono kusigala ku bantu bo.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Malayika w'Omukama n'agamba Gaadi alagire Dawudi azimbire Omukama omwaliiro mu gguuliro lya Orunani Omuyebusi.
