1Chronicles21:19 Dawudi n'ayambuka ng'agondera ekigambo Gaadi kye yali amugambye mu linnya ly'Omukama. 
1Chronicles21:20 Orunani yali awewa ŋŋano, bwe yakyuka, n'alaba malayika, batabani be abana abaali naye ne beekweka." 
1Chronicles21:21 Dawudi n'ajja ewa Orunani; Orunani bwe yatunula n'alaba Dawudi, amangu ago n'aleka egguuliro n'avunnamira Dawudi ng'amaaso ge agatuusizza ku ttaka." 
1Chronicles21:22 Dawudi n'amugamba nti: “Mpa ekifo ky'egguuliro lyo nzimbirewo Omukama omwaliiro kawumpuli agudde mu bantu akome. Nzija kukusasula omuwendo gwonna oguligyamu.” 
1Chronicles21:23 Naye Orunani n'agamba Dawudi nti: “Litwale; mukama wange kabaka, okole nga bw'onooba osiimye. Laba nzija kukuwa ente y'ekitambiro ekyokye, ebiggo ebiwuula olw'enku, n'eŋŋano olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga; bino byonna nzija kubiwa.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Kabaka Dawudi n'addamu Orunani nti: “Nedda, nzija kusasula omuwendo gwonna kubanga sijja kuweereza Mukama kikyo, oba okumwokera ekitambiro ekyokye nga sirina kye mpaddeyo.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Bw'atyo Dawudi n'asasula Orunani olw'ekifo sekeli eza zaabu lukaaga. 
1Chronicles21:26 Dawudi n'azimbirayo Omukama omwaliiro, n'aweereza ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu. N'akoowoola erinnya ly'Omukama; Omukama n'amwanukula n'omuliro ogwava mu ggulu ku mwaliiro gw'ekitambiro ekyokye." 
1Chronicles21:27 Awo Omukama n'alagira malayika, n'azza ekitala kye mu kiraato." 
1Chronicles21:28 Mu kadde ako Dawudi bwe yalaba ng'Omukama amuwulidde, mu gguuliro lya Orunani Omuyebusi n'atambirirayo ebitambiro." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ekisulo ky'Omukama Musa kye yali akoledde mu ddungu n'omwaliiro gw'ebitambiro ebyokye mu budde obwo byali mu kifo ekigulumivu mu Gibewoni. 
1Chronicles21:30 Dawudi teyaguma kugenda kwebuuza eyo ku Katonda, kubanga yali atidde ekitala kya malayika w'Omukama." 
1Chronicles22:1 Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Kino Kiggwa kya Mukama Katonda, guno mwaliiro gwa kitambiro ekyokye olwa Yisirayeli.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Dawudi yalagira bonna abataali bannansi ba mu Yisirayeli bakungibwe, n'alonda mu abo ab'okwasa amayinja bagabajje, Ekiggwa kya Katonda kizimbibwe." 
1Chronicles22:3 Dawudi era n'ategeka ekyuma kingi okukola emisumaali gy'enzigi z'emiryango n'ebyokuyungisa; ekikomo kyali tekiteeberezeka buzito. 
1Chronicles22:4 N'endoddo z'entolookyo zaali teziteeberekeka bungi, kubanga Abasidoni n'ab'e Tiiro baali baleetedde Dawudi endoddo nnyingi." 
1Chronicles22:5 Kubanga Dawudi yali agambye nti: “Solomoni mutabani wange mwana muto, tannakakata; sso ng'ennyumba egenda okuzimbirwa Omukama esaanye okuba nga ya ttendo, ya linnya n'ekitiibwa mu mawanga gonna. Awo nno nzija kutegeka eby'okugikola.” Bwe kityo, nga tannafa, Dawudi n'ategeka byonna ebyetaagiibwa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Awo n'ayita mutabani we Solomoni, n'amulagira azimbire Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli ennyumba." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dawudi n'agamba Solomoni nti: “Mwana wange, nayagala dda okuzimbira erinnya ly'Omukama Katonda wange ennyumba," 
1Chronicles22:8 naye ekigambo ky'Omukama kino ne kintuukako nti: ‘Wayiwa omusaayi mungi n'entalo walwana nnyingi; tojja kusobola kunzimbira nnyumba nga wayiwa omusaayi ku nsi mu maaso gange. 
1Chronicles22:9 Naye omwana alikuzaalirwa, aliba musajja wa mirembe; ndimuwa obuweerero ku balabe be ku njuyi zonna; aliyitibwa Solomoni. Mu Yisirayeli ndimuwaamu emirembe n'obutebenkevu ebbanga lye lyonna." 
1Chronicles22:10 Oyo y'alizimbira erinnya lyange ennyumba; aliba mwana wange, nange ndiba kitaawe. Ndinyweza nnamulondo y'obwakabaka bwe ku Yisirayeli emirembe gyonna.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Kale nno, mwana wange, Omukama abeere naawe; akuwe ebintu bikulamire osobole okuzimbira Omukama Katonda wo ennyumba, nga ye yennyini bwe yakwogerako." 
1Chronicles22:12 Kyokka Omukama akuwe obwegendereza n'okutegeera bw'aliba akutadde ku kufuga Yisirayeli, osobole okukuuma etteeka ly'Omukama Katonda wo." 
1Chronicles22:13 Bw'otyo ebintu birikulamira, kasita olikuuma amateeka n'ebiragiro Omukama bye yawa Musa ku Yisirayeli. Guma, nywera, totya, totekemuka." 
1Chronicles22:14 Mpise mu bugubi okutegeka ebyetaagibwa ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama: talenta za zaabu akasiriivu kamu, n'eza ffeeza akakadde kalamba; kyo ekikomo n'ekyuma tekuli kipimo olw'obungi; ko n'emiti n'amayinja. Naawe okwo kw'onooyongereza." 
1Chronicles22:15 Olina abafundi nkumu abatabalika bungi: abaasa n'abakomozi b'amayinja, ababazzi n'abakugu mu buli kika kya mulimu" 
1Chronicles22:16 ogw'okukola ne zaabu, ffeeza, ekikomo, n'ekyuma. Situka, otandike omulimu; Omukama abeere naawe.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Dawudi n'alagira n'abaami bonna mu Yisirayeli bayambe Solomoni mutabani we. 
1Chronicles22:18 N'abagamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wammwe tali nammwe? Tabawadde obuweerero ku njuyi zonna bannansi b'ensi ng'abawaayo mu mikono gyange, ensi n'egondera Omukama n'abantu be?" 
1Chronicles22:19 Emitima n'emyoyo gyammwe nno mugisse ku kunoonya Omukama Katonda wammwe. Musitukireemu muzimbe ekiggwa ky'Omukama Katonda wammwe, musobole okuyingiza Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama na byonna ebikozesebwa ebyawongerwa Katonda mu kiggwa ekinaazimbirwa erinnya ly'Omukama.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Dawudi bwe yakaddiwa, ng'agundidde mu myaka, n'afuula mutabani we Solomoni kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Yakuŋŋaanya abakungu bonna mu Yisirayeli ne bakabona n'Abaleevi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Abaleevi abaali bawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu n'okusingawo ne babalibwa kinnoomu; baawera abasajja emitwalo esatu mu kanaana. 
1Chronicles23:4 Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Ku abo emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya ba kuluŋŋamyanga omulimu ogw'okuweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, ate kakaaga ba kubeera baami na balamuzi;" 
1Chronicles23:5 enkumi nnya ba kubeera baggazi, n'abalala enkumi nnya ba kuyimbiranga Mukama ku bivuga bye nakola okuyimbirako.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Dawudi n'abagabanya mu bitundu by'abatabani ba Leevi, kwe kugamba nti: Gerusoni, Kewati ne Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Batabani ba Gerusoni: Laadani ne Semeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Batabani ba Laadani: Yekiyeli omukulu waabwe, Zetamu ne Yoweli; be basatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Batabani ba Simeyi: Selomiti, Kaziyeli ne Arani; be basatu; abo be bakulu b'ennyumba za Laadani eza bajjaajjaabe." 
1Chronicles23:10 Batabani ba Simeyi: Yakati, Zina, Yewusi ne Beriya; abo be batabani ba Simeyi, bali bana." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yakati ye yasooka, Ziza wa kubiri; bo Yewusi ne Beriya tebaalina batabani bangi, kye baava batwalibwa ng'ennyumba emu." 
1Chronicles23:12 Batabani ba Kewati: Amuramu, Yizuwari, Keburoni ne Wuzziyeli; be bana." 
1Chronicles23:13 Batabani ba Amuramu: Aroni ne Musa. Aroni, ye n'ezzadde lye, baayawulibwako emirembe gyonna baweerezenga ebitukuvu ennyo, batambirenga ebitambiro mu maaso g'Omukama, bamuweerezenga, era bawenga n'omukisa mu linnya lye ennaku zonna." 
1Chronicles23:14 Bo batabani ba Musa omusajja wa Katonda baabalirwa mu kika kya Leevi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Batabani ba Musa: Gerusomu ne Eliyezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Batabani ba Gerusomu: Subayeli, y'asooka." 
1Chronicles23:17 Batabani ba Eliyezeri: Rekabiya, y'asooka; Eliyezeri teyalina baana ba bulenzi balala, naye bo batabani ba Rekabiya baali bangi ekiyitiridde." 
1Chronicles23:18 Batabani ba Yizuwari: Selomiti, y'asooka." 
1Chronicles23:19 Batabani ba Keburoni: Yeriya y'asooka, Amariya wa kubiri, Yakaziyeli wa kusatu, Yekamewamu wa kuna." 
1Chronicles23:20 Batabani ba Wuzziyeli: Mika y'asooka, Yissiya wa kubiri." 
1Chronicles23:21 Batabani ba Merari: Makuli ne Musi. Batabani ba Makuli: Eleyazari ne Kisi; 
1Chronicles23:22 kyokka Eleyazari yafa nga talina baana ba bulenzi wabula ba buwala; Batabani ba Kisi, bannyinaabwe, ne babawasa." 
1Chronicles23:23 Batabani ba Musi: Makuli, Ederi ne Yeremoti; be basatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Abo be bazzukulu ba Leevi mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abaawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, buli omu okuva ku w'emyaka amakumi abiri n'okwambuka abaalina emirimu gy'okuweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
1Chronicles23:25 Dawudi yali agambye nti: “Omukama awadde abantu be Yisirayeli ekiwummulo, naye yennyini azze asule mu Yeruzaalemu emirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles23:26 Awo nno Abaleevi tebakyetaaga kusitula Kisulo oba ebintu ebirala byonna ebidda ku mulimu gwakyo. 
1Chronicles23:27 Okusinziira ku biragiro bya Dawudi ebyasembera ddala, bazzukulu ba Leevi bonna okuva ku w'emyaka abiri n'okusingawo, baabalibwa." 
1Chronicles23:28 Omulimu gw'Abaleevi gwa kuyamba ku batabani ba Aroni mu kuweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama: okulabirira empya, ebigango, okuyonja buli kintu ekitukuvu, n'okukola emirimu emirala gyonna mu Kiggwa kya Katonda." 
1Chronicles23:29 Ba kukolanga ku Migaati gy'Okwolesebwa, ku buwunga obw'ekitone eky'obuwunga, ku bugaati obw'oluwewere obutazimbulukuse, ku kufumba n'okugoya, ne ku bipimo byonna eby'obungi n'obunene." 
1Chronicles23:30 Ku makya ba kwebazanga era bagulumize Omukama, n'akawungeezi bakole kye kimu." 
1Chronicles23:31 Ate buli ku kuweereza Omukama ebitambiro ebyokye ku Sabbaato, ku mbaga y'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ne ku mbaga enkulu eziragiddwa, ba kuweerezanga awatali kuyosaamu nga bagoberera omuwendo gwabwe ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
1Chronicles23:32 Bwe babanga baweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, balabiriranga Weema ey'Ensisinkano, Ekifo Ekitukuvu ne baganda baabwe batabani ba Aroni.”" 
1Chronicles24:1 Batabani ba Aroni baagabanyizibwamu bwe bati: Batabani ba Aroni: Nadabu, Abiwu, Eleyazari ne Yitamari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadabu ne Abiwu be baasooka kitaabwe okufa; tebaalina baana; Eleyazari ne Yitamari ne bakola nga bakabona. 
1Chronicles24:3 Dawudi n'abagabanyaamu ng'ayambibwako Zadoki omu ku batabani ba Eleyazari ne Akimeleki omu ku batabani ba Yitamari mu bisanja byabwe eby'okuweereza. 
1Chronicles24:4 Mu bazzukulu ba Eleyazari mwasangibwamu abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe bangi okusinga abaasangibwa mu bazzukulu ba Yitamari; Olwo aba Eleyazari ne bayawulwamu ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe kkumi na mukaaga, n'aba Yitamari ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe munaana." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ebisanja byabwe byaweebwa ku kalulu awatali kyekubiira, kubanga wombi mu batabani ba Eleyazari ne mu ba Yitamari mwavaamu abaweereza b'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, n'abaweereza mu maaso g'Omukama." 
1Chronicles24:6 Semaaya omuwandiisi, mutabani wa Netaneli Omuleevi, yawandiika amannya gaabwe mu maaso ga kabaka n'ag'abakungu ne Zadoki kabona ne Akimeleki mutabani wa Abiyatari, n'ag'abakulu b'ennyumba za bakabona n'ez'Abaleevi eza bajjajjaabwe, ng'ennyumba emu eya bajjajjaabwe bw'eba eya Eleyazari, eddako eba ya Yitamari." 
1Chronicles24:7 Akalulu kaasooka kugwa ku Yowaribu, akookubiri ku Yedaaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 akookusatu ku Karimu, akookuna ku Seworimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 akookutaano ku Malukiya, akoomukaga ku Miiyamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 akoomusanvu ku Akkozi, akoomunaana ku Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 akoomwenda ku Yeswa, ak'ekkumi ku Sekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 ak'ekkumi n'akamu ku Eliyasibu, ak'ekkumi n'obubiri ku Yakimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 ak'ekkumi n'obusatu ku Kuppa, ak'ekkumi n'obuna ku Yesebewabu," 
1Chronicles24:14 ak'ekkumi n'obutaano ku Biluga, ak'ekkumi n'omukaaga ku Yimmeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 ak'ekkumi n'omusanvu ku Keziri, ak'ekkumi n'omunaana ku Appizzezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 ak'ekkumi n'omwenda ku Petakiya, ak'amakumi abiri ku Yekezukeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 ak'amakumi abiri mu akamu ku Yakini, ak'amakumi abiri mu obubiri ku Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 ak'amakumi abiri mu obusatu ku Delaaya, ak'amakumi abiri mu obuna ku Maaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Bino bye bisanja byabwe eby'emirimu lwe baayingira mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, nga bagoberera entereeza eyabaweebwa Aroni jjajjaabwe ng'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli bwe yali amulagidde." 
1Chronicles24:20 Bo bazzukulu ba Leevi abaali basigaddewo: Mu batabani ba Amuramu: Subayeli; mu batabani ba Subayeli: Yekudeeya; 
1Chronicles24:21 mu batabani ba Rekabiya: omukulu Yissiya; 
1Chronicles24:22 mu Bayizuwari: Selomiti; mu batabani ba Selomiti: Yakati; 
1Chronicles24:23 mu batabani ba Keburoni: Yeriya y'asooka, Amariya wa kubiri, Yakaziyeli wa kusatu, Yekamewamu wa kuna;" 
1Chronicles24:24 mu batabani ba Wuzziyeli: Mika; mu batabani ba Mika: Samuri; 
1Chronicles24:25 muganda wa Mika: Yissiya; mu batabani ba Yissiya: Zakariya; 
1Chronicles24:26 mu batabani ba Merari: Makuli ne Musi; mu batabani ba Yaaziya: Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Batabani ba Merari: mu Yaaziya: Beno, Sokamu, Zakkuri, Yiburi;" 
1Chronicles24:28 mu Makuli: mutabani Eleyazari ataalina baana; 
1Chronicles24:29 mu Kisi: mutabani wa Kisi: Yerakumeeli. 
1Chronicles24:30 Batabani ba Musi: Makuli, Ederi ne Yerimoti. Beebo bazzukulu ba Leevi mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles24:31 Nabo baakuba akalulu nga baganda baabwe bazzukulu ba Aroni bwe baakola mu maaso ga Dawudi kabaka ne Zadoki ne Akimeleki n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bakabona n'ez'Abaleevi eza bajjajjaabwe. Abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe ne bato baabwe bonna baakuba akalulu kyenkanyi. 
1Chronicles25:1 Dawudi n'abagabe mu ggye ne balondako batabani ba Asafu ne Emani ne Yedutuni bakole omulimu gw'obulanzi nga balangira ku nnanga, ku ntongoli ne ku nsaazo. Luno lwe lukalala lw'abaweereza abaakolanga omulimu ogwo:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Mu batabani ba Asafu: Zakkuri, Yozefu, Netaniya ne Asareela. Batabani ba Asafu baali batwalibwa Asafu eyalanganga ng'atwalibwa kabaka." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ye Yedutuni mu batabani be: Gedaliya, Zeri, Yesaaya, Kasabiya ne Mattitiya; gwe mukaaga, nga kitaabwe Yedutuni y'abatwala eyalangiranga ku nnanga ng'agulumiza n'okutendereza Omukama." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ye Emani mu batabani be: Bukkiya, Mattaniya, Wuzziyeli, Subayeli ne Yerimoti, Ananiya, Kanani, Eliyata, Giddaluti ne Romamuti-Ezeri, Yosubekasa, Malloti, Otiri ne Makaziyoti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Bano bonna batabani ba Emani omulabi wa kabaka, nga Katonda bwe yasuubiza, agulumize Katonda n'eŋŋombe. Katonda yawa Emani abaana ab'obulenzi kkumi na bana, n'ab'obuwala basatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Bano bonna kitaabwe ye yali abatwala mu kuyimba mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama; baali bagabanyiziddwa mu nsaazo, mu nnanga ku lw'emirimu gy'Ekiggwa kya Katonda. Asafu, Yedutuni ne Emani kabaka ye yali abatwala." 
1Chronicles25:7 Baayigirizibwa okuyimba ennyimba z'Omukama ne bakuguka awamu ne baganda baabwe; baali bawera ebikumi bibiri mu kinaana mu munaana. 
1Chronicles25:8 Akalulu ak'okutwala ebisanja byabwe baakakuba kyenkanyi: omukulu n'omuto, omuyigiriza n'omuyigirizwa." 
1Chronicles25:9 Akalulu kaasookera ku Yozefu, eyali Omwasafu; akookubiri ku Gedaliya, baganda be ne batabani be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 akookusatu ku Zakkuri, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 akookuna ku Yizuri, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 akookutaano ku Netaniya, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 akoomukaga ku Bukkiya, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 akoomusanvu ku Yesarela, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:15 akoomunaana ku Yesaaya, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 akoomwenda ku Mattaniya, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:17 ak'ekkumi ku Simeyi, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 ak'ekkumi n'akamu ku Azareli, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 ak'ekkumi n'obubiri ku Kasabiya, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 ak'ekkumi n'obusatu ku Subayeli batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri; 
1Chronicles25:21 ak'ekkumi n'obuna ku Mattitiya, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 ak'ekkumi n'obutaano ku Yerimoti, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:23 ak'ekkumi n'omukaaga ku Ananiya, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 ak'ekkumi n'omusanvu: ku Yosubekasa, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 ak'ekkumi n'omunaana ku Kanani, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 ak'ekkumi n'omwenda ku Malloti, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:27 ak'amakumi abiri ku Eliyata, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 ak'amakumi abiri mu akamu ku Otiri, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 ak'amakumi abiri mu obubiri ku Giddaluti, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:30 ak'amakumi abiri mu obusatu ku Makaziyoti, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri," 
1Chronicles25:31 n'ak'amakumi abiri mu obuna ku Romamuti-Ezeri, batabani be ne baganda be: kkumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:1 Ebisanja by'abaggazi: Mu ssiga lya Kora: Meselemiya mutabani wa Kore omu ku batabani ba Asafu. 
1Chronicles26:2 Batabani ba Meselemiya: Zakariya omuggulanda, Yediyayeli owookubiri, Zebadiya owookusatu, Yatuniyeli owookuna," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elamu owookutaano, Yokanani owoomukaga, Eliyowenayi owoomusanvu." 
1Chronicles26:4 Batabani ba Obedi-Edomu: Semaaya omuggulanda, Yozabadi owookubiri, Yowa owookusatu, Sakari owookuna, Netaneli owookutaano," 
1Chronicles26:5 Ammiyeli owoomukaga, Yissakari owoomusanvu, Pewulletayi owoomunaana. Anti Katonda yali amuwadde omukisa." 
1Chronicles26:6 Semaaya mutabani we yazaala abaana; be baali abakulu mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, baali basajja batabaazi." 
1Chronicles26:7 Batabani ba Semaaya: Otuni, Refayeli, Obedi ne Eluzabadi; baganda ba Eliwu ne Semakiya baali basajja abeesobola." 
1Chronicles26:8 Abo baava mu bazzukulu ba Obedi-Edomu. Bo ne batabani baabwe ne baganda baabwe baali basajja abeesobola, nga basobola okuweereza. Abasibuka mu Obedi-Edomu baali nkaaga mu babiri." 
1Chronicles26:9 Meselemiya yalina batabani be baganda be, nabo nga balina obusobozi; awamu baali kkumi na munaana." 
1Chronicles26:10 Batabani ba Kosa ow'omu ssiga lya Merari: Simuri omukulembeze – si ye yali omuggulanda, naye kitaawe yamussaayo ng'omukulembeze." 
1Chronicles26:11 Kilukiya owookubiri, Tebaliya owookusatu, ne Zakariya owookuna. Batabani ba Kosa ko baganda be bonna awamu baali kkumi na basatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Ebisanja by'abaggazi ebyo abakulu abaabikulemberanga be baabigereranga emirimu gyabyo egy'okuweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama nga baganda baabwe nabo bwe baali bakoze. 
1Chronicles26:13 Baakuba akalulu ku lwa buli mulyango, bonna abato n'abakulu, nga bagoberera ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles26:14 Akalulu ku mulyango gw'ebuvanjuba kaagwa ku Selemiya. Akalulu kaakubwa ku mutabani we Zakariya omubuulirizi omwesigwa ennyo, ne kamuwa omulyango gw'emambuka." 
1Chronicles26:15 Akalulu ku mulyango gw'emaserengeta kaagwa ku Obedi-Edomu; ate akalulu ku ggwanika ne kagwa ku batabani be. 
1Chronicles26:16 Akalulu ku mulyango gw'ebugwanjuba ne ku mulyango Salleketi, oguli ku luguudo olwambuka, kaagwa ku Suppimu ne Kosa. Enkuuma y'abakuumi yategekebwa eti:" 
1Chronicles26:17 Oludda olw'ebuvanjuba: Abaleevi mukaaga buli lunaku; oludda olw'emambuka: bana buli lunaku; oludda olw'emaserengeta: bana buli lunaku; ku ggwanika: babiri babiri; 
1Chronicles26:18 ku luggya olw'ebugwanjuba: bana ku kkubo, ate babiri ku luggya lwennyini." 
1Chronicles26:19 Eyo ye ngabanyaamu y'abaggazi, bazzukulu ba Kora ne Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Abaleevi bannaabwe abalala baali ku nkuluze z'Ekiggwa kya Katonda, n'enkuluze z'ebintu ebiwongeddwa." 
1Chronicles26:21 Abazzukulu ba Laadani ab'omu ssiga lya Gerusoni, abaali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajja ba Laadani ow'omu ssiga lya Gerusoni baali: Yekiyeli," 
1Chronicles26:22 batabani ba Yekiyeli, Zetamu ne Yoweli muganda we; be baali ku nkuluze z'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
1Chronicles26:23 Mu bazzukulu ba Amuramu, Yizuwari, Keburoni ne Wuzziyeli:" 
1Chronicles26:24 Subayeli ow'omu ssiga lya Gerusomu mutabani wa Musa ye yali omuwanika omukulu ow'enkuluze. 
1Chronicles26:25 Baganda be mu Eliyezeri: Rekabiya mutabani we, Yesaaya mutabani we, Yoramu mutabani we, Zikuri mutabani we, ne Selomiti mutabani we." 
1Chronicles26:26 Selomiti ne baganda be be baakuliranga enkuluze y'ebintu ebitoneddwa Dawudi kabaka bye yawongera Ekiggwa, era n'ebyawongebwa abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abagabe b'enkumi n'ab'ebikumi n'abagabe b'eggye abalala." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ebimu ku munyago ogwavanga mu ntabaalo baali babiwonzeeyo olw'okunyiriza Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. 
1Chronicles26:28 Ne byonna ebyaweebwayo Samweli omulabi, ne Sawulo mutabani wa Kisi, ne Abuneri mutabani wa Neri, ne Yowabu mutabani wa Zeruya, n'ebirala byonna ebyali biwongeddwayo, byalinga mu mikono gya Selomiti ne baganda be." 
1Chronicles26:29 Mu ba Yizuwari: Kenaniya ne batabani be baaweebwa mirimu gy'ebweru w'Ekiggwa, nga baami na balamuzi mu Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles26:30 Mu bazzukulu ba Keburoni: Kasabiya ne baganda be, awamu abasajja lukumi mu lusanvu abeesobola, be baalabiriranga emirimu gy'Omukama gyonna n'egya kabaka ebugwanjuba wa Yorudani." 
1Chronicles26:31 Mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe eza Keburoni Yeriya ye yali omukulu waabwe okusinziira ku bitabo by'endyo za bajjajjaabwe. Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ana ogw'obwakabaka bwa Dawudi okubuuliriza kwakolebwa mu bitabo, abasajja abatabaazi ne basangibwa mu Yazeri mu Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Yeriya yalina baganda be abasajja abeesobola enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu abaakuliranga ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe; kabaka Dawudi yabawa obuvunaanyizibwa ku Barubbeni, Abagaadi n'ekyokubiri kya Bamanasse, mu ebyo ebidda ku mirimu gya Katonda ne ku nsonga za kabaka." 
1Chronicles27:1 Luno lwe lukalala lw'Abayisirayeli abaali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abagabe b'enkumi, abagabe b'ebikumi, n'abakungu abaaweerezanga kabaka ku bidda ku bibinja bya magye nga biri mu mpalo zaabyo eza buli mwezi omwaka gwonna. Buli kibinja kyalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:2 Eyali avunaanyizibwa ku kibinja ekisooka, mu mwezi ogusooka yali Yasobewamu, mutabani wa Zabudiyeli. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:3 Yali ava mu bazzukulu ba Perezi; ye yakuliranga bonna abagabe mu ggye abaalinga ku luwalo mu mwezi ogusooka. 
1Chronicles27:4 Eyavunaanyizibwanga ekibinja ky'omwezi ogwokubiri yali Dodayi Omwakoki. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya. 
1Chronicles27:5 Omugabe owookusatu mu mwezi ogwokusatu yali Benaaya mutabani wa Yoyada kabona. Ye yali omukulu w'ekibinja kye; kyalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya. 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaaya oyo yali muzira ng'abalirwa mu makumi Asatu, era nga ye mukulu w'amakumi Asatu; ekibinja kye mutabani we Ammizabadi ye yali akikulira." 
1Chronicles27:7 Owookuna, mu mwezi ogwokuna, ye Asaweli muganda wa Yowabu; Zabadiya mutabani we ye yamuddirira. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:8 Owookutaano, mu mwezi ogwokutaano, omugabe w'ekibinja nga ye Samukuti Omuyizuraki. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:9 Owoomukaga mu mwezi ogwomukaaga Yira mutabani wa Yikkesi ow'e Tekowa. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya. 
1Chronicles27:10 Owoomusanvu, mu mwezi ogwomusanvu, ye Kelezi ow'e Peleti ow'omu bazzukulu ba Efurayimu. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:11 Owoomunaana, mu mwezi ogwomunaana, ye Sibbekayi Omukusa mu Bayizuraki. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:12 Owoomwenda, mu mwezi ogwomwenda, Abiyezeri ow'e Anatoti, Omubenyamiini. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:13 Ow'ekkumi, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi, ye Mawarayi ow'e Netofa Omuyizuraki. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:14 Ow'ekkumi n'omu mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu ye Benaaya ow'e Piratoni Omwefurayimu. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya. 
1Chronicles27:15 Ow'ekkumi n'ababiri, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, nga ye Keludayi ow'e Netofa muzzukulu wa Otunyeli. Mu kibinja kye mwalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya." 
1Chronicles27:16 Abakulu b'ebika bya Yisirayeli: Ku lwa Rubeni: Eliyezeri mutabani wa Zikuri. Ku lwa Basimewoni: Sefatiya mutabani wa Maaka. 
1Chronicles27:17 Ku lwa Leevi: Kasabiya mutabani wa Kemweli. Ku Aroni: Zadoki. 
1Chronicles27:18 Ku lwa Yuda: Eliwu, omu ku baganda ba Dawudi. Ku lwa Yissakari: Omuri mutabani wa Mikayeli." 
1Chronicles27:19 Ku lwa Zebuluni: Yisumaaya mutabani wa Obadiya. Ku lwa Nafutali: Yeremoti mutabani wa Azuryeli. 
1Chronicles27:20 Ku lwa bazzukulu ba Efurayimu: Ozeya mutabani wa Azaziya. Ku lw'ekitundu ekyokubiri ekya Manasse: Yoweli mutabani wa Pedaaya. 
1Chronicles27:21 Ku lw'ekyokubiri ekya Manasse mu Gileyaadi: Yiddo mutabani wa Zakariya. Ku lwa Benyamiini: Yaasiyeli mutabani wa Abuneri. 
1Chronicles27:22 Ku lwa Daani: Ezareli mutabani wa Yerokamu. Abo be baali abakulu b'ebika bya Yisirayeli. 
1Chronicles27:23 Dawudi teyabala ba myaka makumi abiri oba abatannagiweza, kubanga Omukama yali asuubizza okwaza Yisirayeli okwenkana emmunyeenye z'eggulu." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu mutabani wa Zeruya yali asoose okubala, naye teyamaliriza, kubanga Yisirayeli yasunguwalirwa olw'ekyo, omuwendo kyeguva gutaweebwa mu kitabo ky'ebyafaayo bya kabaka Dawudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Eyakuliranga amawanika ga kabaka ye Azumaveti mutabani wa Adyeli. Go amawanika agaalinga eyo ebbali w'ekibuga, mu bibuga, mu byalo ne mu minaala, Yonatani mutabani wa Wuzziya ye yagakuliranga." 
1Chronicles27:26 Abakozi ab'omu byalo abaalimanga mu nnimiro Ezuri mutabani wa Kelubi nga y'abakulira. 
1Chronicles27:27 Nnampala w'abaalimanga mu mizabbibu yali Simeyi ow'e Raama. Zabudi ow'e Sefamu ye yali avunaanyizibwa ku bikungulwa mu nnimiro z'emizabbibu olw'amatogero g'evviini. 
1Chronicles27:28 Baali-Kanaani ow'e Gederi ye yali avunaanyizibwa ku nnimiro z'oliva n'ez'emikunyu ezaalinga mu Sefela. Yowasi nga y'avunaanyizibwa ku materekero g'omuzigo. 
1Chronicles27:29 Siturayi ow'e Saroni nga y'avunaanyizibwa ku magana agaalundirwanga mu Saroni. Safati mutabani wa Kadulayi nga y'avunaanyizibwa ku nte ezaali mu biwonvu. 
1Chronicles27:30 Obili Omuyisimayeli nga y'avunaanyizibwa ku ŋŋamiya. Yekudeeya Omumeronoti nga y'avunaanyizibwa ku ndogoyi. 
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi Omwaguri nga y'avunaanyizibwa ku ndiga. Bonna abo be baali abaweereza abavunaanyizibwa ku bintu bya kabaka Dawudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatani kitaawe omuto owa Dawudi yali mubuulirizi, omusajja omugezi era omuwandiisi. Oyo ne Yekiyeli mutabani wa Kakumoni be balabiriranga batabani ba kabaka;" 
1Chronicles27:33 Akitofeli yabanga mubuulirizi wa kabaka; Kusayi Omwaruki yali munywanyi wa kabaka; 
1Chronicles27:34 Akitofeli yasikirwa Yoyada mutabani wa Benaaya, ne Abiyatari. Yowabu ye yali omuduumizi w'eggye lya kabaka." 
1Chronicles28:1 Awo Dawudi n'akunga abakungu bonna mu Yisirayeli bakuŋŋaanire mu Yeruzaalemu: abakulu b'ebika, abakulu b'ebibinja ebyaweerezanga kabaka, abagabe b'enkumi, abagabe b'ebikumi, abaakuliranga ebintu n'amagana ga kabaka n'aga batabani be, abakungu b'omu lubiri, abatabaazi abazira n'abantu abalina obusobozi obw'enjawulo." 
1Chronicles28:2 Kabaka n'ayimirira ku magulu ge n'agamba nti: “Baganda bange era abantu bange, mumpulirize: Neegomba okuzimba ennyumba y'Essanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama mw'eneewummulira, gwe muziziko gw'ebigere bya Katonda waffe, n'enzimba ne ngitereeza." 
1Chronicles28:3 Kyokka Omukama yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Tojja kuzimbira linnya lyange nnyumba, kubanga oli musajja mutabaazi, wayiwa omusaayi.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Naye Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli yannonda mu nnyumba yonna eya kitange mbeere kabaka wa Yisirayeli emirembe gyonna. Yalonda Yuda abeere omukulembeze, ate mu nnyumba ya Yuda yalondamu nnyumba ya kitange, ate mu batabani ba kitange yalondamu nze, nga kwe kusiima kwe, mbeere kabaka wa Yisirayeli yenna." 
1Chronicles28:5 Ne mu baana bange – ate bo ddala Omukama yampa bangi - yalondamu mutabani wange Solomoni, ye y'aba atuula ku nnamulondo y'obwakabaka bw'Omukama ku Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Solomoni, mutabani wo y'alizimba ennyumba yange, n'empya zange, kubanga mmulonze abeere mwana wange, nange nzija kubeera kitaawe." 
1Chronicles28:7 Obwakabaka bwe ndibunyweza emirembe gyonna, bw'aliba anyweredde ku kukola bye ndagira n'ennamula yange nga bw'akyakola kaakati.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 Kale nno kati mu maaso ga Yisirayeli n'ag'ekibiina ky'Omukama kyonna, nga Katonda waffe awulira, mbakuutira: mukwatenga era mugobererenga ebiragiro byonna eby'Omukama Katonda wammwe, lwe munaatwala ensi eno ennungi ne mugirekera ne batabani bammwe abalibaddirira ng'obusika bwabwe emirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Ggwe nno Solomoni mwana wange, manya Katonda wa kitaawo, muweereze n'omutima ogwemalizza n'omwoyo ogwagala, kubanga Omukama awenja emitima gyonna, era amanyi n'ebirowoozo byonna eby'emitima. Bw'oliba omunoonyezza, alikuwa n'omuzuula; naye bw'oliba omuvuddeko alikukasuka eri emirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles28:10 Kale nno kati laba Omukama bw'akulonze, ozimbe ennyumba y'Ekitukuvu; nywera, otandike omulimu.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Dawudi n'ategeeza mutabani we Solomoni ekifaananyi ky'ekisasi ky'Ekiggwa n'ebigango byakyo, amaterekero gaakyo, ebisenge byayo ebya waggulu, ebisenge eby'omunda n'ekisenge ky'Entebe y'Obusaasizi." 
1Chronicles28:12 Yamuwa ebifaananyi byonna Mwoyo bye yali amuwadde eby'enzimba y'empya z'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'ebisenge okwetooloola, eby'enkuluze y'Ekiggwa kya Katonda, n'eby'enkuluze z'ebintu byonna ebisingirwa Ekiggwa." 
1Chronicles28:13 Yamulaga engabanya ya bakabona n'Abaleevi n'omulimu gwonna ogw'okuweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, ne ku byonna ebyeyambisibwa mu kuweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
1Chronicles28:14 Yagereka obuzito bwa zaabu obwa buli kikozesebwa ekya zaabu mu kuweereza mu mikolo egitali gimu, n'obuzito bwa ffeeza owa buli kintu ekikozesebwa ekya ffeeza mu mikolo egitali gimu:" 
1Chronicles28:15 obuzito bwa zaabu ku lw'ebikondo by'ettawaaza ebya zaabu n'ettawaaza zaakwo, obuzito bwa ffeeza ku lw'ebikondo ebya ffeeza n'ettawaaza zaakwo okusinziira ku mulimu gwa buli ttawaaza;" 
1Chronicles28:16 era ne zaabu wa buli mmeeza ey'Emigaati egy'Okwolesebwa; obuzito bwa ffeeza ow'emmeeza endala eza ffeeza; 
1Chronicles28:17 obuzito bwa zaabu omwereere ku lw'entoozo, ebibya ebimansira n'ensumbi; obuzito bwa zaabu ku lwa buli bibya ebya zaabu, n'obuzito ne ffeeza olwa buli bibya bya ffeeza;" 
1Chronicles28:18 n'obuzito bwa zaabu omwereere ku lw'omwaliiro ogw'obubaani. Yamuwa ekifaananyi ky'ekigaali n'obuzito bwa zaabu waakwo ne ku lwa bakerubi abanjululizza ebiwaawatiro ku Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama okugibikka. 
1Chronicles28:19 Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Bino byonna Omukama yabimbikkulira mu buwandiike, n'anteekako omukono gwe ntegeere bulungi ebifaananyi byabyo byonna.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Era Dawudi n'agamba Solomoni mutabani we nti: “Guma, nywera. Omulimu gukole, totya, totekemuka, kubanga Mukama wange Katonda wange ali naawe; talikulekerera oba okukwabulira, okutuusa ng'omulimu gwonna ogw'ennyumba y'Omukama guwedde." 
1Chronicles28:21 Engabanya yiiyo eya bakabona n'Abaleevi ku lw'omulimu gwonna ogukwatagana n'Ekiggwa kya Katonda, na buli yenna omukugu mu buli mulimu aliba ayagadde okukuyamba; abakungu nabo n'abantu bonna balikola ky'olagira nga baagala.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Awo Dawudi n'ayogera eri ekibiina kyonna nti: “Mutabani wange Solomoni Katonda gwe yalonda akyali muto, tannakakata; omulimu gwe munene, anti olubiri luno terutegekerwa muntu naye Mukama Katonda." 
1Chronicles29:2 Neeyamba byonna bye nnina ne ntegeka eby'okuzimbisa Ekiggwa kya Katonda wange: zaabu ow'okugendera ku bya zaabu, ffeeza ow'okugenda ku bya ffeeza, ekikomo eky'okukola eby'ekikomo, ekyuma eky'okukola eby'ekyuma, emiti ku lw'ebikolwa mu miti, amayinja oniki ag'okujjuzaamu, obuggyo obwa langi entobeke, amayinja gonna ag'omuwendo ne maabo." 
1Chronicles29:3 Okwongereza ku bino, olw'okwagala ennyo Ekiggwa kya Katonda wange, mpaddeyo ku bimu ku makula gange aga zaabu ne ffeeza bizimbe ekiggwa kya Katonda, nga tobaze byonna bye ntegese olw'ennyumba y'Ekitukuvu:" 
1Chronicles29:4 talenta enkumi ssatu ku zaabu ow'e Ofiri, ne ffeeza omuyooyoote talenta kasanvu, ow'okumaala ku bisenge by'ebizimbe," 
1Chronicles29:5 ku lwa byonna ebyetaagisa zaabu ne ku lwa byonna ebyetaagisa ffeeza, eby'omulimu gwonna baffundi gwe banaakola. Ani yeewaddeyo kyeyagalire okwewongera Omukama olwa leero?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abakulu b'ebika bya Yisirayeli, abagabe b'enkumi, abagabe b'ebikumi, n'abakungu abassibwa ku mirimu gya kabaka ne bawaayo kyeyagalire." 
1Chronicles29:7 Ku mulimu gw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda baawaayo zaabu wa talenta nkumi ttaano, n'omutwalo gwa dariki gumu ogwa zaabu, ffeeza wa talenta omutwalo gumu, ekikomo kya talenta omutwalo gumu mu kanaana, n'ekyuma kya talenta emitwalo kkumi." 
1Chronicles29:8 Buli yenna eyalina amayinja ag'omuwendo yagawaayo mu nkuluze y'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, ne gakwasibwa Yakiyeli Omugerusoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Abantu ne basanyuka olw'okulaba abakulembeze baabwe nga bwe bawaayo kyeyagalire, kubanga ebyo baali babiweerezza Omukama kyeyagalire, n'omutima ogwemalizza; ne kabaka Dawudi yennyini n'asanyuka bya kitalo." 
1Chronicles29:10 Dawudi n'agulumiza Omukama mu maaso g'abantu bonna, n'agamba nti: “Ogulumizibwe, Ayi Katonda wa kitaffe Yisirayeli, emirembe n'emirembe." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ayi Mukama, obukulu bubwo n'obuyinza, ekitiibwa, ettendo n'okutangalijja, anti byonna mu ggulu ne mu nsi bibyo. Obwakabaka bubwo, ayi Mukama, byonna obisooloobyeko ng'omutwe." 
1Chronicles29:12 Obugagga n'ekitiibwa bisibuka mu ggwe, ggwe ofuga byonna. Mu mikono gyo mwe muli amaanyi n'obuzira, gye giwa bonna obukulu n'amaanyi." 
1Chronicles29:13 Kale nno, ayi Katonda waffe, tukwebaza, tutenda erinnya lyo ery'ekitiibwa." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Nze ani, n'abantu bange be baani, okusobola okukuwa kyeyagalire bwe tuti? Byonna biva gy'oli, tukuwadde ebivudde mu mikono gyo." 
1Chronicles29:15 Mu maaso go tuli bagwira, basenze nga bajjajjaffe bonna bwe baali; ennaku zaffe ku nsi ziringa kisiikirize, omutali ssuubi." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, ebintu bino byonna akafukunya bye tutegese okuzimbira erinnya lyo ettukuvu ekiggwa, byonna biva mu mikono gyo era byonna bibyo." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ayi Katonda wange, mmanyi nti ggwe owenja emitima, era osanyukira obutuufu; nange nno nkuweerezza bino byonna kyeyagalire n'omutima omuluŋŋamu. Ntunuulidde n'essanyu abantu bo bonna abali wano nga bakuwa kyeyagalire." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ayi Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjaffe Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yisirayeli, okwagala kuno kukuume mu mitima gyabwe emirembe gyonna, n'emitima gyabwe giwe okusigala nga gikugondera." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ne mutabani wange Solomoni muwe omutima ogwemalizza ku kukwatanga ebiragiro byo, empisa n'amateeka go; byonna abikole, azimbe olubiri lwe ntegekedde bino.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Awo Dawudi n'agamba abaali bakuŋŋaanye nti: “Mugulumize Omukama Katonda wammwe.” Bonna ne bagulumiza Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe; ne bakutama wansi, ne bavunnamira Katonda ne kabaka." 
1Chronicles29:21 Enkeera ne batambirira Omukama ebitambiro, ne bamuweereza ebitambiro ebyokye ku lwa Yisirayeli yenna: ente ennume lukumi, endiga lukumi, obuliga lukumi, wamu n'ebitone eby'okuyiwa, n'ebyonziira mu bungi." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ku olwo ne balya ne banywa mu maaso g'Omukama mu ssanyu eringi. Solomoni mutabani wa Dawudi ne bamufuula kabaka ogwokubiri, ne bamusiiga omuzigo mu maaso g'Omukama abeere omukulembeze ne Zadoki abeere kabona omukulu." 
1Chronicles29:23 Solomoni n'atuula ku nnamulondo y'Omukama abeere kabaka mu kifo kya Dawudi kitaawe. Ebintu byamulamira ne Yisirayeli yenna n'amuwulira. 
1Chronicles29:24 Abagabe bonna, n'abasajja abatabaazi ne batabani ba Dawudi bonna ne bamusuubiza obuwulize." 
1Chronicles29:25 Bw'atyo Omukama n'asukkulumya Solomoni mu maaso ga Yisirayeli yenna, n'amufuula kabaka ow'ekitiibwa ekingi, nga tewali kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu baamukulembera yali afunye kyenkana awo." 
1Chronicles29:26 Dawudi mutabani wa Yesse yali kabaka ku Yisirayeli yenna. 
1Chronicles29:27 Yafuga Yisirayeli okumala emyaka amakumi ana: mu Keburoni yafugiramu emyaka musanvu, ate mu Yeruzaalemu amakumi asatu mu esatu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Yafiira ku bukadde obulungi, ng'agundidde mu myaka, n'obugagga n'ekitiibwa; Solomoni mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwa kabaka." 
1Chronicles29:29 Eby'obulamu bwa Dawudi kabaka, bye yakola mu kusooka okutuusa ku nkomerero, byawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'ebyafaayo ekya Samweli omulabi, ne mu kitabo ky'ebyafaayo ekya Natani omulanzi, ne mu kitabo ky'ebyafaayo ekya Gaadi omulabi," 
1Chronicles29:30 mw'osanga eby'obwakabaka bwe byonna n'obuzira bwe, n'ebyamutuukirira, ne ku Yisirayeli ne ku bwakabaka bw'ensi zonna endala." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomoni, mutabani wa Dawudi n'anywera ku bwakabaka bwe kubanga Omukama Katonda yali naye, era n'amusukkulumya nnyo." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomoni n'ayogera eri Yisirayeli yonna: eri abagabe b'enkumi, abagabe b'ebikumi, abalamuzi, abakungu ba Yisirayeli yonna n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
2Chronicles1:3 Solomoni n'ekibiina kyonna ne bagenda ku ekifo ekigulumivu mu Gibewoni, awaali Weema ya Katonda ey'Ensisinkano Musa omuweereza wa Katonda gye yakolera mu ddungu." 
2Chronicles1:4 Yo Ssanduuku y'Omukama, Dawudi yali agiggye e Kiriyati-Yewarimu ng'agitadde mu kifo kye yali amaze okugitegekera, ng'agisimbidde weema mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Gwo omwaliiro ogw'ekikomo, Bezaleli mutabani wa Wuri mutabani wa Kuru gwe yali akoze, gwali Gibewoni mu maaso g'Ekisulo ky'Omukama; eyo Solomoni n'ekibiina kyonna gye beebuuliza ku Mukama." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomoni n'ayambuka awaali omwaliiro gw'ekikomo mu maaso g'Omukama mu Weema ey'Ensisinkano, n'aweererezaako ebitambiro lukumi ebyokye." 
2Chronicles1:7 Mu kiro ekyo Katonda n'alabikira Solomoni n'amugamba nti: “Saba kyonna ky'oyagala nkuwe.” 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni n'agamba Katonda nti: “Ggwe wakwatirwa nnyo kitange Dawudi ekisa, nange n'onfuula kabaka mu kifo kye." 
2Chronicles1:9 Kale nno, ayi Mukama Katonda, kye wasuubiza kitange Dawudi kituukirire, anti ggwe onfudde kabaka nfuge abantu bo abatabalika bungi ng'enfuufu y'oku nsi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Mpa nno amagezi n'okutegeera, nsobole okubakulembera, anti ggwe ani asobola okulamula obulungi eggwanga lyo lino ekkulu liti?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Katonda n'agamba Solomoni nti: “Kubanga kino omutima gwo kye gwegombye, n'otosaba bugagga na bintu na kitiibwa yadde okufa kw'abalabe bo, oba okuwangaala ebbanga eggwanvu, wabula n'osaba magezi na kutegeera osobole okulamula abantu bange be nkutaddeko obeere kabaka waalyo," 
2Chronicles1:12 amagezi n'okutegeera bijja kukuweebwa. Nzija kukuweerako obugagga, ebintu n'ekitiibwa, nga tewali n'omu mu bakabaka abaakukulembera yali nabyo, yadde mu balikuddirira aliba nabyo.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Solomoni n'ava mu kifo ekigulumivu mu Gibewoni n'agenda e Yeruzaalemu mu maaso ga Weema ey'Ensisinkano, n'afuga Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomoni yakuŋŋaanya ebigaali n'embalaasi; yalina ebigaali lukumi mu ebikumi bina, n'embalaasi omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri bye yakuumiranga mu bibuga by'ebigaali, n'ebimu ng'ali nabyo mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Kabaka yafuula ffeeza mu Yeruzaalemu okuba ekintu ekya bulijjo ng'amayinja; n'emiti gy'entolookyo nga gya mwero nga bw'olaba emikunyu gy'omu Sefela. 
2Chronicles1:16 Embalaasi za Solomoni zaalagirizibwanga mu Misiri ne mu Kuwe; abasuubuzi ba kabaka baazisuubulanga mu Kuwe. 
2Chronicles1:17 Mu Misiri ekigaali baakigulangayo ku sekeli za ffeeza lukaaga, ate embalaasi ku sekeli kikumi mu ataano. Era baaziragiririzangayo bakabaka bonna ab'Abakitti n'Abaaramu." 
2Chronicles1:18 Solomoni yalangirira okuzimbira erinnya ly'Omukama ekiggwa naye yennyini okwezimbira olubiri. 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomoni yakunga abasajja emitwalo musanvu abeetissi, n'emitwalo munaana ab'okwasa amayinja mu nsozi, ne bannampala enkumi ssatu mu lukaaga ab'okubabeerako." 
2Chronicles2:2 Solomoni n'aweereza obubaka buno eri Kuramu kabaka w'e Tiiro nti: “Mpeereza endoddo z'entolookyo nga bwe wakola kitange Dawudi n'omuweereza emiti gy'entolookyo yeezimbire olubiri mw'anaasula. 
2Chronicles2:3 Nange ŋŋenda kuzimbira erinnya ly'Omukama Katonda wange ekiggwa, ngimuwongere, munyookezebwengamu obubaani obuwunya akawoowo mu maaso ge, muteekebwengamu Emigaati egy'Okwolesebwa egy'olubeerera, muweererezebwengamu ebitambiro ebyokye eby'oku nkya n'akawungeezi, ne ku Sabbaato, ku mbaga z'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ne ku mbaga enkulu ez'Omukama Katonda wange eziragiddwa. Kino kiragiro kya lubeerera ku Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles2:4 Ekiggwa kye njagala okuzimba kikulu, kubanga Katonda waffe mukulu okukira balubaale bonna." 
2Chronicles2:5 Naye ani asobola amuzimbira ekiggwa, oyo eggulu na liri eggulu erisukkulumidde ddala gwe bitamala kugyamu? Nze ani okumuzimbira ennyumba, wabula mpozzi okunyookeza obubaani mu maaso ge?" 
2Chronicles2:6 Kale nno mpeereza omusajja omukugu, amanyi obulungi ebidda ku zaabu, ku ffeeza, ebikomo, n'ekyuma, ne ku ngoye eza kakobe, emmyufu n'eza bbululu, amanyi n'okwola ebifaananyi, ajje akole eno mu Yuda n'e Yeruzaalemu wamu ne baffundi abakugu kitange Dawudi be yaleka ategese." 
2Chronicles2:7 Mpeereza endoddo z'entolookyo, eza sipulaasi n'ez'entoogo okuva mu Lebanoni. Mmanyi nga basajja bo bamanyi okutema emiti mu Lebanoni; basajja bange bajja kukola n'ababo," 
2Chronicles2:8 bantegekere emiti mingi, kubanga ekiggwa kye neegomba okuzimba kijja kubeera kinene, nga kya kitiibwa." 
2Chronicles2:9 Abakozi bo abanaatema emiti nzija kubawa eŋŋano kori emitwalo ebiri, sayiri kori emitwalo ebiri, evviini bati emitwalo ebiri, n'omuzigo gw'oliva bati emitwalo ebiri.”" 
2Chronicles2:10 Kuramu kabaka w'e Tiiro n'awandiikira Solomoni, n'amugamba nti: “Kubanga Omukama yayagala abantu be kyeyava akuwa obeere kabaka waabwe.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Kuramu n'ayongerako nti: “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agulumizibwe, eyakola eggulu n'ensi, eyawa Dawudi omwana omugezi, amanyi, ategeera era omukalabakalaba azimbire Omukama ennyumba, naye yeezimbire olubiri." 
2Chronicles2:12 Nkuweerezza Kuramu-Abi, omusajja omugezi, omukugu era omukalabakalaba," 
2Chronicles2:13 mutabani w'omukazi mu bawala ba Daani, ye kitaawe yali ava mu Tiiro. Mukugu mu bya zaabu, ebya ffeeza, eby'ekikomo, eby'ekyuma, eby'amayinja n'eby'emiti; era mukugu mu by'engoye eza kakobe, eza bbululu, emmyufu, n'engoye ez'obufumbo. Mukugu mu mirimu gyonna egy'okwola; asobola n'okutetenkanya buli kya kuyiiya kyonna. Ajja kukola n'abakozi bo era n'abakozi ba mukama wange Dawudi, kitaawo." 
2Chronicles2:14 Eŋŋano, sayiri, omuzigo, n'evviini mukama wange by'asuubizza, abiweereze abaweereza be." 
2Chronicles2:15 Naffe tujja kutema emiti mu Lebanoni gyonna gy'onooba weetaaze, tugiseeyeeyeze ku kibaya ku nnyanja, gigobe e Yoppa; ggwe onoogiggya awo ogitwale e Yeruzaalemu.”" 
2Chronicles2:16 Solomoni n'abala abantu abagwira abaali mu Yisirayeli bukya mitwe gibalibwa mu budde bwa kitaawe Dawudi; baawera akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo ataano mu enkumi ssatu mu lukaaga. 
2Chronicles2:17 N'aggyamu emitwalo musanvu abeetissi, n'emitwalo munaana ab'okwasa amayinja mu nsozi, ne bannampala enkumi ssatu mu lukaaga ab'okulabirira abakola." 
2Chronicles3:1 Solomoni n'atandika okuzimba Ekiggwa ky'Omukama mu Yeruzaalemu ku lusozi Moriya kitaawe Dawudi kwe yali alabikiddwa, mu kifo Dawudi kye yali ategese, ku gguuliro lya Orunani Omuyebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Yatandika okuzimba mu mwaka ogwokuna ogw'obwakabaka bwe nga guyiseeko emyezi ebiri. 
2Chronicles3:3 Bino bye bipimo Solomoni bye yassaawo okwabangibwa ekiggwa kya Katonda: emikono nkaaga mu buwanvu, ate mu bugazi emikono amakumi abiri (nga yeeyamba ebipimo ebikadde)." 
2Chronicles3:4 Ekisasi mu maaso, ekyagenderanga ddala ng'ennyumba bw'egenda mu bugazi, nga kya mikono amakumi abiri; bwo obusimba nga kya mikono kikumi mu abiri. Munda yamaalamu zaabu omwereere." 
2Chronicles3:5 Ebisenge by'Eddiiro yabibembekako embaawo eza sipulaasi, n'azibikka ne zaabu omulungi okulyetoolooza; yatonako ebifaananyi eby'enkindu n'eby'enjegere ezigenda zeeyunga." 
2Chronicles3:6 Ekiggwa yakitona n'amayinja ag'omuwendo ne zaabu w'e Paruvayimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Empagi, emyango, ebisenge n'enzigi eby'Ekiggwa yabibikka ne zaabu; ku bisenge n'ayolako bakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:8 Yakola Ekifo ky'Awatukuvu Ennyo: ng'obuwanvu kyenkana n'obugazi bw'Ekiggwa, kwe kugamba, emikono amakumi abiri obuwanvu n'emikono amakumi abiri obukiika. Ebisenge by'akyo n'abimaalako ne zaabu omulungi, nga wa talenta lukaaga." 
2Chronicles3:9 Emisumaali egya zaabu gyazitowa sekeli amakumi ataano. N'ebisenge ebya waggulu yabibikka zaabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Mu Kifo ky'Awatukuvu Ennyo yakoleramu bakerubi babiri mu bifaananyi ebibajje, n'abisiiga zaabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Ebiwaawaatiro by'omukerubi omu nga byeyanjuluzza nga biwerako emikono amakumi abiri. Ekiwaawaatiro ky'omukerubi omu nga kiriko emikono etaano, nga kikwata ku kisenge ky'Ekiggwa; ekiwaawaatiro ekirala nga kuliko emikono etaano, nga kikwata ku kiwaawaatiro ky'omukerubi owookubiri." 
2Chronicles3:12 Era n'ekiwaawaatiro ky'omukerubi owookubiri nga kiriko emikono etaano, nga kikwata ku kisenge ekirala eky'Ekiggwa, n'ekiwaawaatiro kye ekirala nga kiriko emikono etaano, nga kikwata ku kiwaawaatiro ky'omukerubi eyasoose." 
2Chronicles3:13 Ebiwaawaatiro by'abakerubi bombi byali byanjuluze, nga kuwerako emikono amakumi abiri; bo baali bayimiridde ku magulu gaabwe, nga batunuulidde Eddiiro." 
2Chronicles3:14 Yakola olutimbe mu wuzi eza langi eya bbululu, kakobe n'emmyufu mu lugoye olw'obufumbo, n'alukiramu bakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Mu maaso g'Ekiggwa yassaayo empagi bbiri nga za mikono asatu mu etaano obuwanvu. Zaaliko enkata ku ntwe zaazo buli emu nga ya bugulumivu bwa mikono etaano. 
2Chronicles3:16 Mu Kisenge eky'Omunda yakoleramu enjegere ezigenda zeeyunga, n'azizingira ku ntwe z'empagi; n'amakomamawanga kikumi ge yagenda atobeka ku njegere." 
2Chronicles3:17 Empagi yazisimba mu maaso g'Ekiggwa, emu ku mukono ogwa ddyo n'endala ku mukono ogwa kkono; ey'oku mukono ogwa ddyo yagituuma Yakini, ate ey'oku mukono ogwa kkono n'agituuma Bowazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Kuramu yakola omwaliiro gw'ekikomo gwa mikono amakumi abiri obuwanvu, emikono amakumi abiri obugazi, n'emikono kkumi obusimba." 
2Chronicles4:2 Yaweesa Ennyanja mu kyuma ekisaanuuse, nga neekulungirivu; okuva ku mugo okutuuka ku mugo nga ya mikono kkumi obugazi. Obugulumivu nga ya mikono etaano; okugyetoolooza olukoba olupima nga luba lwa mikono asatu obuwanvu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ate wansi w'omugo Ennyanja yali esibiddwako ebifaananyi by'ente ennume kkumi buli mukono okwetooloola wonna. Ente zaali ziweeseddwa mu nnyiriri bbiri, nga zonna n'Ennyanja biri ekintu kimu." 
2Chronicles4:4 Ennyanja yali etuuziddwa ku nte ennume kkumi na bbiri, essatu nga zitunudde mambuka, essatu buvanjuba, essatu maserengeta, n'essatu bugwanjuba. Ennyanja okwo kwe yali etudde, ng'ebyensuti byazo bitunuulidde entobo y'Ennyanja." 
2Chronicles4:5 Omubiri gw'Ennyanja nga gwenkana obugazi bw'ekibatu; omugo gwayo nga guli ng'omugo gw'ekikopo, era nga guli ng'omugo gw'ekimuli ky'eddanga ekyanyizza. Yali egendamu bati z'amazzi enkumi ssatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Yakolayo ebinaabirwamu kkumi eby'okwolezaamu; ebitaano n'abissa ku ddyo n'ebitaano ku kkono, bye byali eby'okwolezangamu byonna ebyabanga eby'okuweereza mu kitambiro ekyokye; bakabona bo baali ba kunaabiranga mu Nnyanja." 
2Chronicles4:7 Yakolayo n'ebikondo by'ettawaaza kkumi ng'etteeka bwe lyali ligamba ku byo, n'abissa mu Kiggwa: bitaano ku ddyo, bitaano ku kkono." 
2Chronicles4:8 Yakola emmeeza kkumi n'azissa mu Kiggwa, ettaano ku ddyo n'ettaano endala ku kkono. Era yakola ne ebibya eby'okumansira kikumi ebya zaabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Yakola n'oluggya lwa bakabona, n'oluggya olunene n'emiryango gy'oluggya, emiryango n'agibikka n'ekikomo." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ennyanja yagissa ku ludda olw'emaserengeta, ebuvanjuba, wammangako." 
2Chronicles4:11 Kuramu yakola ensuwa, ebitiiyo, n'ebibya ebimansira. Kuramu bw'atyo n'amaliriza omulimu gwonna ogwa kabaka Solomoni mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama:" 
2Chronicles4:12 empagi bbiri, enkata ezaakula ng'ebibya, ku ntwe z'empagi ebbiri; obutimba obubiri obutimbiddwa ku nkata ebbiri ezaakula ng'ebibya ezaali ku ntwe z'empagi;" 
2Chronicles4:13 ennyiriri bbiri ez'amakomamawanga ku buli katimba akatimbiddwa ku nkata ezaakula ng'ebibya ezaali ku ntwe z'empagi; 
2Chronicles4:14 obutandaalo n'ebinaabirwamu byakwo; 
2Chronicles4:15 Ennyanja n'ente ennume ekkumi n'ebbiri wansi waayo; 
2Chronicles4:16 ensuwa, ebitiiyo, n'entoozo. Ebintu byonna Kuramu-Abi bye yakolera kabaka Solomoni olw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama yabikola mu kikomo ekizigule." 
2Chronicles4:17 Kabaka yabikozeseza mu butiba obw'ebbumba mu lusenyi lwa Yorudani, wakati wa Sukkoti ne Zareda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Solomoni ebintu byonna bye yakozesa byali bingi nnyo; obuzito bw'ekikomo tebwamanyika. 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomoni yakola byonna eby'okukozesa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama: Omwaliiro ogwa zaabu; emmeeza eya zaabu okw'okuteekebwa Emigaati egy'Okwolesebwa; 
2Chronicles4:20 ebikondo by'ettawaaza mu zaabu atatabuddwamu kirala, n'ettawaaza zaabyo, zaakire mu maaso g'Awatukuvu Ennyo ng'etteeka bwe ligamba;" 
2Chronicles4:21 ebimuli, ettawaaza ne magalo byonna nga bikole mu zaabu omugumu;" 
2Chronicles4:22 makansi, ebibya eby'okumansira, ebijiiko n'ebyoterezo, nga bya zaabu atatabuddwamu kirala; enzigi ensiige zaabu ez'Ekiggwa: enzigi ez'omunda ez'Awatukuvu Ennyo n'enzigi ez'Eddiiro nga nazo za zaabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Omulimu gwonna Solomoni gwe yali akola ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama bwe gwamalirizibwa, n'ayingiza ebintu bya kitaawe Dawudi: ffeeza, zaabu n'eby'okuwoomesa, n'abissa mu nkuluze y'Ekiggwa kya Katonda." 
2Chronicles5:2 Awo Solomoni n'atumya abakadde bonna mu Yisirayeli bajje gy'ali mu Yeruzaalemu, n'abakulu b'ebika bonna, n'abakulu b'ennyumba z'Abayisirayeli eza bajjajjaabwe, baggye Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama mu Siyoni, kwe kugamba nti mu Kibuga kya Dawudi." 
2Chronicles5:3 Abasajja bonna aba Yisirayeli ne bakuŋŋaanira awali kabaka Solomoni ku mbaga enkulu mu mwezi ogwomusanvu. 
2Chronicles5:4 Abakadde mu Yisirayeli bonna nga bamaze okutuuka, bakabona ne basitula Ssanduuku." 
2Chronicles5:5 Ne bambusa Ssanduuku y'Omukama ne Weema ey'Ensisinkano, na byonna eby'okukozesa ebitukuvu, ebyabeeranga mu Weema; byonna bakabona n'Abaleevi ne babyambusa." 
2Chronicles5:6 Ye kabaka Solomoni n'ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli abaali bakuŋŋaanidde w'ali, baali naye mu maaso g'Essanduuku nga batambira endiga n'ente; tezaabalibwa kubanga zaayitirira obungi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Bakabona ne bayingiza Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama mu kifo kyayo mu Kisenge eky'Omunda eky'omu Kiggwa, Awatukuvu Ennyo, ne bagissa wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro bya bakerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Bakerubi baali bayanjululizza ebiwaawaatiro ku kifo ky'Essanduuku, nga babikka Ssanduuku n'emisituliro gyayo." 
2Chronicles5:9 Emisituliro gyali miwanvu, nga gisobola okulabika ebweru okuva ku Ssanduuku, naye nga tegirabika ng'oyimye ebweru w'Ekifo Ekitukuvu. Gikyaliyo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mu Ssanduuku temwalimu kirala wabula ebipande ebibiri eby'amayinja Musa bye yateeramu ku Korebu, Omukama gye yakolera endagaano n'Abayisirayeli bwe baali baakava mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Bakabona ne bafuluma Ekifo Ekitukuvu, Bakabona bonna abaalimu baali beetukuzizza, nga tebafudde na ku bibinja byabwe," 
2Chronicles5:12 Abaleevi abayimbi bonna: Asafu, Emani ne Yedutuni, batabani baabwe ne baganda baabwe, nga bambadde engoye ez'obufumbo, bakutte ensaazo, entongooli n'ennanga, ne bayimirira ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba olw'omwaliiro, bakabona kikumi mu abiri nga bali nabo bafuuwa amakondeere." 
2Chronicles5:13 Bonna wamu, ab'amakondeere n'abayimbi ne basaakaanyiza wamu, mu ddoboozi limu, okutendereza n'okwebaza Omukama. Nga bawerekerwako amakondeere, ensaazo na buli kivuga kyonna ne basitulira wamu amaloboozi okutendereza Omukama nga bayimba nti: “Mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” Ekire ne kijjula Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Chronicles5:14 Bakabona nga tebakyasobola kuyimirira kuweereza olw'okubeera ekire, anti ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kyali kijjuzizza Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Chronicles6:1 Awo Solomoni n'agamba nti: “Omukama agambye okusula mu kire ekikwafu. 
2Chronicles6:2 Mazima, nkuzimbidde ennyumba amakula, ekifo w'onoosula emirembe gyonna.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli bwe kyali kiyimiridde awo, Kabaka n'akyuka n'awa omukisa ekibiina." 
2Chronicles6:4 N'agamba nti: “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agulumizibwe, atuukirizza n'emikono gye bye yasuubiza n'akamwa ke Dawudi kitange. Anti yagamba nti:" 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Okuva lwe naggya abantu bange Yisirayeli mu Misiri, sirondanga kibuga mu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli muzimbibwemu ekiggwa, erinnya lyange libeerenga omwo, era sirondanga muntu abeere omukulembeze w'abantu bange Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles6:6 Wabula nnonze Yeruzaalemu erinnya lyange libeerenga omwo, era nnonze Dawudi afugenga abantu bange Yisirayeli.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 Kitange Dawudi yayagala okuzimbira erinnya ly'Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli ekiggwa," 
2Chronicles6:8 naye Omukama n'agamba kitange Dawudi nti: ‘Wayagala okuzimbira erinnya lyange ekiggwa, wakola bulungi okulowooza bw'otyo." 
2Chronicles6:9 Kyokka si ggwe onoozimba ekiggwa, wabula mutabani wo, asibuka mu ggwe; oyo yalizimbira erinnya lyange ekiggwa.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 Omukama akakasizza kye yayogera. Nasikira kitange Dawudi era kati ntudde ku nnamulondo ya Yisirayeli ng'Omukama bwe yayogera, nzimbidde n'erinnya ly'Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli ekiggwa." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ntaddemu Ssanduuku omuli Endagaano y'Omukama gye yakola n'Abayisirayeli.” 
2Chronicles6:12 Awo Solomoni n'ayimirira mu maaso g'omwaliiro gw'Omukama mu maaso g'ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli, n'agololera emikono gye waggulu." 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomoni yali akoze ekituuti eky'ekikomo nga kya buwanvu bwa mikono etaano, obugazi bwa mikono etaano n'obusimba bwa mikono etaano, ng'akisimbye mu makkati g'oluggya olw'ebweru. Yalinnya ku kituuti n'afukamira mu maaso g'ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli n'agololera emikono gye waggulu," 
2Chronicles6:14 n'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, mu ggulu ne ku nsi teri Katonda akufaanana, ggwe akuumira endagaano n'ekisa kyo abaweereza bo abatambula mu maaso go n'omutima gwabwe gwonna." 
2Chronicles6:15 Wakuuma bye wagamba omuweereza wo kitange Dawudi; wabisuubiza n'akamwa ko, n'obituukiriza n'emikono gyo olwa leero." 
2Chronicles6:16 Kale nno, ayi Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kuumira omuweereza wo kitange Dawudi bye wamusuubiza bwe wagamba nti: ‘Tolibulwa musajja alituula ku nnamulondo ya Yisirayeli mu maaso gange, singa abaana bo baneegenderezanga mu makubo gaabwe ne batambuliranga mu etteeka lyange nga ggwe bw'okoze.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Kale nno, Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, leka bye wasuubiza omuweereza wo Dawudi bituukirire." 
2Chronicles6:18 Naye ddala Katonda anaasula ku nsi n'abantu? Oba kale eggulu na liri eggulu erisukkulumidde ddala tebikumala kugyamu, leero alabisa ekiggwa kino kye nzimbye." 
2Chronicles6:19 Kyokka tunuulira essaala y'omuweereza wo n'okuwanjaga kwe, ayi Mukama Katonda wange. Wulira omulanga n'essaala y'omuweereza wo by'aweerezza nga yeegayirira mu maaso go." 
2Chronicles6:20 Amaaso go gabeere ku Kiggwa kino ekiro n'emisana, ekifo mwe wagamba okussa erinnya lyo, owulire essaala omuweereza wo gy'asabira mu kifo kino." 
2Chronicles6:21 “Wulira okuwanjaga kw'omuweereza wo n'abantu bo Yisirayeli bwe beegayirira mu kifo kino. Wulira, ng'oyima mu ggulu, ekifo mw'osula, ng'owulidde, saasira." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Omuntu bw'alisobya eri munne, n'aba ng'alina okulayira, n'ajja n'alayira mu maaso g'omwaliiro gwo mu Kiggwa kino," 
2Chronicles6:23 ng'oyima mu ggulu owuliranga, n'obaako ky'okola. Olamulanga wakati w'abaweereza bo n'osingisa omubi omusango, n'omuwa ekibonerezo olw'ensobi ye; n'ossa ekisobyo kye ku mutwe gwe; omutuukirivu n'omwejjeerezza, n'aweerwa okusinziira ku butuukirivu bwe." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Abantu bo Yisirayeli bwe bagobebwanga abalabe baabwe kubanga baakola ekibi gy'oli, bamala badda gy'oli, ne beetondera erinnya lyo, ne basaba n'okuwanjaga mu maso go mu Kiggwa kino," 
2Chronicles6:25 ng'oyima mu ggulu owuliranga, n'osonyiwa ekibi ky'abantu bo Yisirayeli, n'obazzaayo mu nsi gye wawa bo ne bajjajjaabwe." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Eggulu bwe liggalibwanga, enkuba n'etetonnya kubanga abantu bo basobezza gy'oli, abantu bamala basabira mu kifo kino ne beetondera erinnya lyo, ne bava ku bibi byabwe olw'obuyinike bw'obataddemu," 
2Chronicles6:27 ng'oyima mu ggulu owuliranga, n'osonyiwa ebibi by'abaweereza bo n'eby'abantu bo Yisirayeli. Oboolekanga ekkubo eddungi mwe baba batambulira; otonnyesanga enkuba ku nsi yo gye wawa abantu bo ng'obusika." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Enjala bw'egwanga mu nsi, oba kawumpuli, oba nnabbambula, oba ebimera okugengewala, oba enzige, oba amayanzi, oba omulabe waabwe n'abazingiza mu kimu ku bibuga byabwe, oba ekibonoobono ekya buli ngeri, oba ekirwadde kyonna," 
2Chronicles6:29 ne wabaawo essaala yonna oba okuwanjaga kwonna okuva mu omu ku bantu bo Yisirayeli, nga buli muntu ategedde obuyinike n'obulumi by'alimu, n'agololera emikono gye eri Ekiggwa," 
2Chronicles6:30 owuliranga ng'oyima mu ggulu, ekifo mw'osula. Osonyiwanga era buli omu n'omuyisa nga bwasaanidde, kubanga ggwe omanyi buli mutima - anti ggwe wekka ggwe omanyi emitima gy'abantu -" 
2Chronicles6:31 olwo bakutyenga era batambulirenga mu makubo go ennaku zonna ze balibeera mu nsi gye wawa bajjajjaffe. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Newandibadde omugwira, atali wa mu bantu bo Yisirayeli, avudde mu nsi ewala olw'okubeera erinnya lyo n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi n'omukono gwo omugolole, bw'abanga azze n'asabira mu Kiggwa kino" 
2Chronicles6:33 owuliranga ng'oyima mu ggulu, ekifo mw'osula, n'okola kyonna omugwira ky'akusaba, abantu bonna mu nsi balyoke bamanye erinnya lyo, bakutye ng'abantu bo Yisirayeli bwe bakola, bakakase nti ennyumba eno gye nzimbye eyitibwa linnya lyo." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Abantu bo bwe bagendanga okutabaala abalabe baabwe, yonna gy'oliba obatumye, bamala beegayirira nga bakoowoola eri ekibuga kye weerondera n'Ekiggwa kye nzimbidde erinnya lyo," 
2Chronicles6:35 ng'oyima mu ggulu owuliranga essaala yaabwe n'okuwanjaga kwabwe n'okola ku nsonga zaabwe. 
2Chronicles6:36 “Bwe babanga basobezza gy'oli - anti tewali muntu atayonoona - n'obasunguwalira, n'obawaayo eri omulabe waabwe, abaabawamba, ne babatwala mu busibe mu nsi ey'ewala oba okumpi," 
2Chronicles6:37 nga bali eyo mu kifo gye basibiddwa, bamala beddamu muli mu mutima, ne beenenya ne bakuwanjagira eyo mu nsi gye baasibirwa nti: ‘Twayonoona, twasobya, twakola bubi,’" 
2Chronicles6:38 bamala badda gy'oli n'omutima gwabwe gwonna n'omwoyo gwabwe gwonna, eyo mu nsi eyo mu nsi abalabe baabwe gye baabatwala mu busibe, bamala bakwegayirira nga batunuulidde ensi gye wawa bajjajjaabwe, n'ekibuga kye walonda, n'Ekiggwa kye nzimbidde erinnya lyo," 
2Chronicles6:39 ng'oyima mu ggulu, ekifo mw'osula, owuliranga essaala zaabwe n'okuwanjaga kwabwe n'okola ku nsonga zaabwe. Osaasiranga abantu bo abaasobya gy'oli." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Kale nno, Katonda wange, nkwegayiridde, amaaso go gazibulirwe essaala y'omu kifo kino n'amatu go gagiwulirize." 
2Chronicles6:41 “Kale nno, Mukama Katonda situka, genda mu kifo kyo w'onoowummulira, ggwe n'Essanduuku y'amaanyi go. Bakabona bo, ayi Mukama Katonda, baambale obulokofu; n'abatuukirivu bo basanyukire mu bulungi." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ayi Mukama Katonda, togobaganya maaso ga musiige wo; jjukira omukwano gwa Dawudi omuweereza wo.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Solomoni bwe yamala okwegayirira, omuliro ne guva mu ggulu, ne gusenkenya ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitone, ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kijjuza Ekiggwa." 
2Chronicles7:2 Bakabona nga tebakyasobola kuyingira Kiggwa kya Mukama, kubanga ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kyali kikijjuzizza." 
2Chronicles7:3 Abayisirayeli bonna bwe baalaba omuliro nga gukka, n'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ku Kiggwa, ne bagwa nga beevuunise ku ttaka ku mwaliiro ogw'amayinja, ne basinza, ne batendereza Omukama nga bagamba nti: “Mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Awo kabaka wamu ne Yisirayeli yenna ne baweereza ebitambiro mu maaso g'Omukama. 
2Chronicles7:5 Kabaka Solomoni yaweereza ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu: ente emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri, n'endiga n'embuzi kasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo ebiri. Kabaka n'Abayisirayeli bonna ne batukuza Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Chronicles7:6 Bakabona ne bayimirira mu bifo byabwe, n'Abaleevi nabo bwe batyo, nga bakutte ebivuga by'Omukama kabaka Dawudi bye yali akoze okugulumiza Omukama buli Dawudi lwe yaweererezanga ettendo ku bivuga ebyo nti: “kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” Mu maaso gaabwe waali wayimiriddewo bakabona nga bafuuwa amakondeere; ne Yisirayeli yenna yali ayimiridde." 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomoni yatukuza ekitundu ky'oluggya eky'omu makkati mu maaso g'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, n'aweerereza awo ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitone eby'obuwunga, n'amasavu g'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu, kubanga omwaliiro ogw'ekikomo ogwali mu maaso g'Omukama gwe yali akoze gwali tegyako bitambiro ebyokye n'ebitone eby'obuwunga n'ebitundu eby'amasavu." 
2Chronicles7:8 Mu budde obwo Solomoni n'amala ennaku musanvu ng'akuza embaga enkulu, nga ne Yisirayeli yenna ali naye, ekibiina ekinene ennyo omwali abaava ku Lebo-Kamati okutuuka ku Kiwonvu Misiri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ku lunaku olwomunaana baakola olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa, kubanga baali bamaze ennaku omusanvu nga batukuza omwaliiro n'embaga enkulu ne bagikuliza ennaku endala musanvu." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu essatu olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, n'asiibula abantu, ne bagenda buli omu mu maka ge nga basanyufu, emitima gijaganya, olw'ebirungi Omukama bye yali akoledde Dawudi, Solomoni ne Yisirayeli abantu be." 
2Chronicles7:11 Solomoni bwe yamaliriza okuzimba Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'olubiri lwa kabaka, nga buli kimu kye yali ayagadde okukola ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama ne ku lubiri lwe kimulamidde," 
2Chronicles7:12 Omukama n'alabikira Solomoni ekiro, n'amugamba nti: “Mpulidde essaala yo era neerondedde ekifo kino kibeere ennyumba y'ebitambiro." 
2Chronicles7:13 Bwe ndiggalanga eggulu enkuba n'etetonnya, oba ne mpa ekiragiro enzige ne zirya ensi, oba ne nsindika kawumpuli mu bantu bange," 
2Chronicles7:14 abantu bange abo abaatuumibwa erinnya lyange bamala beetoowaza, ne banneegayirira, ne banoonya amaaso gange, ne bava mu makubo gaabwe amabi, olwo ndiyima mu ggulu ne mpulira, ndibasonyiwa ebibi byabwe, ne mponya ensi yaabwe." 
2Chronicles7:15 Olwo amaaso gange galizibulirwa essaala y'omu kifo kino n'amatu gange ne gagiwuliriza. 
2Chronicles7:16 Kale nnonze ne neetukuliza ekifo kino erinnya lyange we liba libeera emirembe gyonna; amaaso gange n'omutima gwange biribeera awo bulijjo. 
2Chronicles7:17 “Naawe bw'oliba otambulidde mu maaso gange, nga Dawudi kitaawo bwe yakola, n'okola byonna bye nkulagira, n'okwatanga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange," 
2Chronicles7:18 nnamulondo y'obwakabaka bwo nzija kugitebenkeza ku Yisirayeli, nga bwe nalagaanya Dawudi kitaawo nti: ‘Tolibulwa musajja alituula ku nnamulondo ya Yisirayeli.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Naye mmwe bwe mulikuba amabega, ne mwabulira amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange bye mbateereddewo, ne mumala mugenda ne muweereza balubaale, ne mubasinza," 
2Chronicles7:20 Yisirayeli ŋŋenda kumusimbula mu nsi gye nabawa, n'ekiggwa kye natukuliza erinnya lyange ndikikasuka kinve mu maaso. Ekiggwa ŋŋenda kukifuula lufumo, kifuuke eky'okusekerera mu mawanga gonna." 
2Chronicles7:21 Newandibadde Ekiggwa kino kya kitiibwa, buli yenna aliba ayise wano kirimuwuniikiriza n'abuuza nti: ‘Lwaki Omukama yakola ati ensi eno n'Ekiggwa?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Balimwanukula nti: ‘Kubanga baaleka Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe eyaggya bajjajjaabwe mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne bagoberera balubaale, ne babasinza, ne babaweereza, kyeyava abaleetera akabi kano konna.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Oluvannyuma lw'emyaka amakumi abiri, Solomoni mwe yazimbira Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'olubiri lwe," 
2Chronicles8:2 Solomoni n'azimba buto ebibuga Kuramu bye yali amuwadde, n'abisenzaamu Abayisirayeli." 
2Chronicles8:3 Awo Solomoni n'agenda e Kamati-Zoba n'akiwamba. 
2Chronicles8:4 Yazimba ne Tadumori mu ddungu n'ebibuga byonna eby'amawanika bye yazimba e Kamati. 
2Chronicles8:5 Yazimba ne Beti-Koroni ow'Engulu ne Beti-Koroni ow'Emmanga, n'abifuula bibuga okuli ebigo nga kuliko ebisenge, enzigi n'emiyingo," 
2Chronicles8:6 ne Baalati, ebibuga bye byonna eby'amawanika ga Solomoni, ebibuga by'ebigaali bye, ebibuga by'embalaasi ze, na buli kyonna kye yayagala okuzimba mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu Lebanoni ne wonna mu nsi gye yafuganga." 
2Chronicles8:7 Abantu bonna abaasigalawo ku Bakitti, Abaamori Abaperizzi, Abakivi n'Abayebusi, kwe kugamba abantu abataali Bayisirayeli," 
2Chronicles8:8 ezzadde lyabwe eryali likyasigaddewo, abo Abayisirayeli be bataazikiriza, Solomoni yabassa ku kasanvu n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
2Chronicles8:9 Naye Solomoni teyafuula Bayisirayeli baddu be, wabula Abayisirayeli baabeeranga batabaazi mu ggye, bagabe be, baduumizi ba bigaali bye na beebagazi be." 
2Chronicles8:10 Era bano baabeeranga bakulu ku baakolanga obwannampala ku mirimu gya Solomoni. Abasajja baali ebikumi bibiri mu ataano abaakolanga obwannampala ku bantu. 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomoni yaggya muwala wa Faraawo mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, n'amutwala mu lubiri lwe yali amuzimbidde; anti kabaka yagamba nti: “Mukazi wange tajja kusula mu nnyumba ya Dawudi Kabaka wa Yisirayeli, kubanga ebifo ebyo Ssanduuku y'Omukama w'eyingidde bitukuvu.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Awo Solomoni n'aweereza Omukama ebitambiro ebyokye ku mwaliiro gw'Omukama gwe yali amuzimbidde awo mu kisasi," 
2Chronicles8:13 nga agoberera amateeka aga bulijjo ku bitambiro ebyokye nga Musa bwe yalagira: eby'oku Sabbaato, ku mbaga z'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ne ku mbaga enkulu eziragiddwa emirundi esatu mu mwaka: Embaga y'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse, Embaga ya Wiiki n'Embaga y'Ensiisira." 
2Chronicles8:14 Ng'ekiragiro kya kitaawe Dawudi bwe kyali kigamba, yatondawo ebisanja bya bakabona era n'eby'Abaleevi ab'okukulembera mu mikolo egy'okutendereza era ab'okuyambanga ku bakabona okusinziira ku byetaago by'emirimu gya buli lunaku. Yalonda n'abaggazi mu bisanja byabwe ku lwa buli mulyango, anti bw'atyo Dawudi omuntu wa Katonda bwe yali alagidde." 
2Chronicles8:15 Byonna kabaka bye yalagira ku bakabona n'Abaleevi ne ku nkuluze mpaawo kye baawunjukako. 
2Chronicles8:16 Bwe gutyo omulimu gwa Solomoni ne guggwa, gwe yatandika lwe yasimba omusingi gw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama okutuusa ku lunaku lwe kyaggyibwako engalo." 
2Chronicles8:17 Awo Solomoni n'alaga e Eziyoni-Geberi n'e Elati ku lubalama lw'ennyanja mu nsi ya Edomu. 
2Chronicles8:18 Kuramu n'atuma abaweereza be ne bamuleetera amaato nga gagobwa abalunnyanja abamanyi ennyanja. Bano ne bagenda wamu n'abaweereza ba Solomoni, ne balaga mu Ofiri ne baggyayo zaabu wa talenta ebikumi bina mu ataano, ne bamuleetera kabaka Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Nnaabakyala ow'e Saba bwe yawulira ettutumu lya Solomoni, n'ajja e Yeruzaalemu okumugeza n'ebibuuzo ebizibu. Yajja n'entwala nnene nnyo: eŋŋamiya ezeetisse ebirungo, ne zaabu butitimbe, n'amayinja ag'omuwendo, n'ajja ewa Solomoni, n'amugamba byonna ebyamuli ku mutima." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni n'amuddamu ebibuuzo bye byonna; tewaaliwo kyakaluubirira kabaka kumunnyonnyola. 
2Chronicles9:3 Nnaabakyala w'e Saba bwe yalaba amagezi ga Solomoni gonna, olubiri lwe yali azimbye," 
2Chronicles9:4 emmere ey'oku mmeeza ye, entuula y'abakungu be, entereera y'abasumaami be n'ebyambalo byabwe, abasenero n'ebyambalo byabwe, n'ebitambiro ebyokye bye yaweerezanga mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'awuniikirira," 
2Chronicles9:5 n'agamba kabaka nti: “Bye nawulira mu nsi yange ku by'okola ne ku magezi go byali bya mazima. 
2Chronicles9:6 Saasooka kukkiriza okutuusa nze kennyini lwe nzize ne neerabirako n'amaaso gange. Mazima ebyambuulirwa tebituuka na kyakubiri kya bwatiikirivu bw'amagezi go. Osuukkiridde ne kye nali mpulidde. 
2Chronicles9:7 Abantu bo nga beesiimye! Abaweereza bo abakuli awo mu maaso bulijjo nga bawulira amagezi go nga beesiimye! 
2Chronicles9:8 Omukama Katonda wo agulumizibwe oyo eyakusiima n'akuteeka ku nnamulondo obeere kabaka ofuge mu linnya ly'Omukama Katonda wo. Kubanga Katonda yayagala Yisirayeli emirembe gyonna, kyeyava akussaawo obeere kabaka, okole ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 N'awa kabaka zaabu aweza talenta kikumi mu abiri, n'ebirungo bingi nnyo, n'amayinja ag'omuwendo; tewabangawo birungo kwenkana ebyo nnaabakyala w'e Saba bye yawa kabaka Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:10 Abasajja ba Kuramu n'abasajja ba Solomoni baaleetanga zaabu okuva e Ofiri; baaleetanga n'emiti egy'entoogo, n'amayinja ag'omuwendo." 
2Chronicles9:11 Yakozesa emiti egy'entoogo okukola amadaala g'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'olubiri lwa kabaka, era n'abajjamu ennanga n'entongooli eby'abayimbi. Emiti gy'entoogo egiri ng'egyo gyali tegirabwangako mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Kabaka Solomoni n'awa nnaabakyala w'e Saba byonna bye yayagala ne bye yamusaba; yamuwa n'ebisinga ebyo nnaabakyala bye yamutonera. N'afunyamu n'adda mu nsi ye wamu n'abaweereza be. 
2Chronicles9:13 Zaabu eyaleeterwanga Solomoni buli mwaka ng'aweza obuzito bwa talenta lukaaga mu nkaaga mu mukaaga," 
2Chronicles9:14 ng'oggyeeko eyavanga mu basuubuzi n'eyo abasuubuzi gwe baaleetanga. Bakabaka b'omu Arabiya n'abaamasaza mu nsi nabo baaleeteranga Solomoni zaabu. 
2Chronicles9:15 Era kabaka Solomoni yakola engabo ebikumi bibiri mu zaabu omukubeekube; beka lukaaga eza zaabu ze zaagenda ku ngabo emu. 
2Chronicles9:16 Yakola engabo entonotono ebikumi bisatu eza zaabu omukubeekube; beka ebikumi bisatu ze zaagenda ku ngabo emu. Kabaka yabissa mu Lubiri lw'Ekibira kya Lebanoni. 
2Chronicles9:17 Era kabaka yakola nnamulondo ennene mu masanga, n'agibikka zaabu omwereere." 
2Chronicles9:18 Nnamulondo yalina amadaala mukaaga; yali eyungiddwako akatebe k'ebigere aka zaabu; erudda n'erudda wa buli mukono gwayo ng'eriyo ebifaananyi by'empologoma; bbiri zaali ziyimiridde mu mbiriizi z'emikono. 
2Chronicles9:19 N'empologoma kkumi na bbiri zaali ziyimiridde ku madaala, mukaaga ku buli ludda. Teri bwakabaka bulala bwali bukoleddwa kintu kifaanana kiti." 
2Chronicles9:20 Na byonna kabaka Solomoni mwe yanyweranga byalinga bya zaabu; ebikozesebwa byonna mu Lubiri lw'Ekibira kya Lebanoni byali bya zaabu omusengejje. Tewaali kikole mu ffeeza, kubanga mu budde bwa Solomoni teyabalibwanga ng'eky'omuwendo." 
2Chronicles9:21 Anti Kabaka yalina empingu eyagendanga e Tarusisi ng'egobwa abaweereza ba Kuramu, buli myaka esatu yakomangawo ng'ereese zaabu, ffeeza, amasanga, enkobe n'amazike." 
2Chronicles9:22 Solomoni yali mututumufu okusinga bakabaka bonna ab'ensi mu bugagga ne mu magezi. 
2Chronicles9:23 Bakabaka bonna ab'ensi baanoonyanga okulaba ku Solomoni, bawulire amagezi Katonda ge yali atadde mu mutima gwe." 
2Chronicles9:24 Buli mwaka, buli eyajjanga yamuleeteranga ebirabo: ebibya ebya ffeeza n'ebya zaabu, ebyambalo, ebyokulwanyisa, ebirungo, embalaasi n'ennyumbu." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomoni yalina ebisibo enkumi nnya olw'embalaasi n'ebigaali; yalina embalaasi omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri ze yakuumiranga mu bibuga by'ebigaali, n'ezimu ng'ali nazo mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles9:26 Yafuganga bakabaka bonna okuva ku Mugga okutuuka ku nsi y'Abafilisitiini ne ku nsalo ya Misiri. 
2Chronicles9:27 Kabaka yafuula ffeeza mu Yeruzaalemu okuba ekintu ekya bulijjo ng'amayinja; n'emiti gy'entolookyo nga gya mwero nga bw'olaba emikunyu gy'omu Sefela. 
2Chronicles9:28 Embalaasi za Solomoni zaalagirizibwanga mu Misiri ne mu nsi endala zonna. 
2Chronicles9:29 Ebyafaayo ebirala ku Solomoni, okuva ku ntandikwa okutuuka gye bikoma, byawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'ebyafaayo ekya Natani omulanzi, eky'obulanzi bwa Akiya omulanzi w'e Silo, n'eky'okulabikirwa kwa Yiddo omulabi ku bifa ku Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoni yafuga Yisirayeli yenna mu Yeruzaalemu okumala emyaka amakumi ana. 
2Chronicles9:31 Olwo Solomoni n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, n'aziikibwa mu Kibuga kya kitaawe Dawudi; Rekobowamu mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rekobowamu yagenda e Sekemu, anti eyo Yisirayeli yenna gye yali akuŋŋaanidde bamufuule kabaka." 
2Chronicles10:2 Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati - yali mu buwaŋŋanguse mu Misiri ng'adduse Solomoni - bwe yawulira amawulire ago, n'ava mu Misiri n'akomawo." 
2Chronicles10:3 Ne bamutumyayo. Yerobowamu n'ajja ne Yisirayeli yenna ewa Rekobowamu, ne bamugamba nti:" 
2Chronicles10:4 “Kitaawo yatussaako ekikoligo ekizito; kale nno ggwe kendeeza ku kasanvu ka kitaawo akakakali ne ku kikoligo ekizito bye yatussaako, olwo tujja kukuweereza.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mudde gye ndi mu nnaku ssatu.” Abantu ne bagenda. 
2Chronicles10:6 Kabaka Rekobowamu n'ateesa n'abakadde abaaweerezanga Solomoni kitaawe ng'akyali mulamu, n'agamba nti: “Mumpa magezi ki bwe nnaayanukula abantu bano?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ne bamugamba nti: “Olwa leero bw'onooba ow'ekisa ku bantu bano, n'obasanyusa, n'obaddamu bulungi, baliba baweereza bo ennaku zonna.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Naye Rekobowamu n'asambajja amagezi abakadde ge baali bamuwadde, n'agenda yeebuuza ku bavubuka bwe baakula, abaali bamuweereza," 
2Chronicles10:9 n'abagamba nti: “Mumpa magezi ki bwe tunaayanukula abantu bano abaŋŋamba nti: ‘Kendeeza ku kikoligo kitaawo kye yatuteekako?’ ” 
2Chronicles10:10 Abavubuka abaakula naye, ne bamugamba nti: “Abantu bano abakugamba nti: ‘Kitaawo yatussaako ekikoligo ekizito, ggwe kendeeza ku kikoligo kyaffe,’ ggwe bagambe nti: ‘Kannaswi kange kanene okusinga ekiwato kya kitange." 
2Chronicles10:11 Kale nno kitange yabassaako ekikoligo ekizito, nze ekikoligo kyammwe ŋŋenda na kukyongerako obuzito. Kitange yababonerezanga na buswanyu, nze nzija kubabonerezanga na njaba.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Yerobowamu n'abantu bonna ne badda ewa Rekobowamu ku lunaku olwokusatu nga kabaka bwe yali abagambye nti: “Mudde gye ndi mu nnaku ssatu.” 
2Chronicles10:13 Kabaka Rekobowamu abantu n'abazzaamu lukaali. Yalekerera amagezi abakadde ge baali bamuwadde," 
2Chronicles10:14 n'abagamba ng'abavubuka bwe baali bamuwadde amagezi nti: “Kitange yazitoya ekikoligo kyammwe, nze nno nzija kukizitoya n'okusingawo; kitange yabakubisanga buswanyu, naye nze nzija kubakubisa njaba.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Kabaka bw'atyo teyawuliriza bantu, kubanga yali ntegeka ya Mukama, atuukirize ekigambo kye kye yali agambye Yerobowamu mutabani wa Nebati ng'ayita mu Akiya ow'e Silo." 
2Chronicles10:16 Yisirayeli yenna bwe yalaba nga kabaka agaanyi okubawulira, ne bamwanukula ne bagamba nti: “Tulina mugabo ki mu Dawudi, yadde busika ki mu mutabani wa Yesse? Yisirayeli, weddire mu weema yo, naawe Dawudi, weerabiririre ennyumba yo.” Abayisirayeli bonna ne beddirayo mu weema zaabwe." 
2Chronicles10:17 Naye Abayisirayeli abaabeeranga mu bibuga bya Yuda, Rekobowamu ye yabafuganga." 
2Chronicles10:18 Kabaka Rekobowamu n'atuma Adoramu, eyakuliranga akasanvu; kyokka Abayisirayeli bonna ne bamukuba amayinja n'afa. Kabaka Rekobowamu n'ayanguwa mangu, n'alinnya ekigaali, n'addukira mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Bw'atyo Yisirayeli n'ajeemera ennyumba ya Dawudi n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
2Chronicles11:1 Rekobowamu bwe yajja e Yeruzaalemu n'akuŋŋaanya ennyumba yonna eya Yuda, n'ekika kya Benyamiini, abasajja abatabaazi abalondobe akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo munaana, agende alwanyise ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, obwakabaka abukomyewo ewa Rekobowamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Naye ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Semaaya omuntu wa Katonda nti: 
2Chronicles11:3 “Gamba Rekobowamu mutabani wa Solomoni kabaka wa Yuda, ne Yisirayeli yenna mu Yuda, Benyamiini, n'abantu abalala bonna nti:" 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Omukama bwati bw'agamba: Temugenda kulwanyisa baganda bammwe abantu ba Yisirayeli; buli musajja addeyo ewuwe, kubanga kino nze nkikoze.’ ” Baawulira ekigambo ky'Omukama ne baddayo, ne bava ku by'okulumba Yerobowamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rekobowamu yabeeranga mu Yeruzaalemu; yazimba ebibuga okuli ebigo mu Yuda okwerinda. 
2Chronicles11:6 Yazimba Beteleemu, Etamu, Tekowa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Beti-Zuru, Soko, Adullamu" 
2Chronicles11:8 Gasi, Maresa, Zifu," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adorayimu, Lakisi, Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zora, Ayijaloni ne Keburoni. Bino byali bibuga okuli ebigo mu Yuda ne mu Benyamiini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Yanyweza ebigo ebyo, n'abissaamu abagabe, n'abiwa n'amawanika g'emmere, omuzigo gw'oliva n'evviini." 
2Chronicles11:12 Ne mu buli kibuga yassaamu engabo n'amafumu, n'abifuula by'amaanyi nnyo. Awo Yuda ne Benyamiini ne biba bibye." 
2Chronicles11:13 Bakabona n'Abaleevi wonna mu Yisirayeli bajja gy'ali okuva mu bitundu gye baali ne bamwegattako. 
2Chronicles11:14 Abaleevi baaleka n'amalundiro gaabwe n'obutaka bwabwe ne basengukira mu Yuda e Yeruzaalemu, kubanga Yerobowamu ne batabani be baabagaana okukola nga bakabona b'Omukama." 
2Chronicles11:15 Ye ne yessizaawo bakabona ku lw'ebifo ebigulumivu ne ku lw'ebifaananyi by'embuzi n'obuyana bye yali akoze. 
2Chronicles11:16 Bonna mu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli abaali beemalizza ku kunoonya Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli baabagoberera ne bajja mu Yeruzaalemu okuweereza ebitambiro Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe." 
2Chronicles11:17 Bano baayongera amaanyi mu bwakabaka bwa Yuda, ne banyweza Rekobowamu mutabani wa Solomoni okumala emyaka esatu, kubanga mu bbanga eryo baatambuliranga mu makubo ga Dawudi ne Solomoni." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rekobowamu yawasa omukazi, Makalati muwala wa Yerimoti eyali mutabani wa Dawudi, ne Abiwayili muwala wa Eliyabu mutabani wa Yesse." 
2Chronicles11:19 Makalati yamuzaalira batabani be: Yewusi, Semariya ne Zaamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Oluvannyuma lw'oyo yawasa Maaka muwala wa Abusalomu. Oyo yamuzaalira Abiya, Attayi, Ziza ne Selomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rekobowamu yaganza Maaka muwala wa Abusalomu okusinga bakazi be abalala bonna n'abasebeyi be. Yalina abakazi kkumi na munaana n'abasebeyi nkaaga. Yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi makumi abiri mu munaana, n'ab'obuwala nkaaga." 
2Chronicles11:22 Rekobowamu yalonda Abiya mutabani wa Maaka abeere omukulu mu baganda be, nga gw'ayagala okusikiza obwakabaka." 
2Chronicles11:23 Yasala amagezi batabani be n'abasaasaanya mu bitundu byonna ebya Yuda ne Benyamiini mu bibuga okuli ebigo, n'abawa emmere nnyingi n'abawasiza abakazi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Obwakabaka bwa Rekobowamu bwe bwamala okunywera, ng'afunye amaanyi, n'aleka etteeka ly'Omukama, ne Yisirayeli yenna n'agoberera." 
2Chronicles12:2 Mu mwaka ogwokutaano ogw'obwakabaka bwa Rekobowamu, Sisaki kabaka w'e Misiri yalumba Yeruzaalemu, kubanga tebaali beesigwa eri Omukama." 
2Chronicles12:3 Yalumba n'ebigaali lukumi mu bibiri, abeebagazi emitwalo mukaaga, n'abatabaazi butabalika okuva mu Balibiya, Abasukki n'Abakuusi." 
2Chronicles12:4 Yawamba ebibuga okuli ebigo ebigumu mu Yuda, n'ajja okutuukira ddala e Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Semaaya omulanzi n'ajja eri Rekobowamu n'abakungu ba Yuda abaali bakuŋŋaanidde mu Yeruzaalemu nga badduse Sisaki, n'abagamba nti: “Omukama agamba bino: ‘Mmwe mwanjabulira, nange mbalese mu mikono gya Sisaki.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Abakungu mu Yisirayeli ne kabaka ne beetoowaza, ne bagamba nti: “Omukama mutuukirivu.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Omukama bwe yalaba beetoowazizza ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Semaaya nti: “Kubanga beetoowazizza, sijja kubasaanyaawo, nzija kubawa mangu obuwonero, obusungu bwange tebujja kumalirwa ku Yeruzaalemu nga buyita mu mukono gwa Sisaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kyokka bajja kumuweereza, bamanye enjawulo eri mu kuweereza nze ne mu kuweereza bakabaka b'ensi endala.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Sisaki kabaka wa Misiri bwe yalumba Yeruzaalemu, n'atwala amakula g'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'amakula ga kabaka, na byonna omwali n'engabo eza zaabu Solomoni ze yali akoze." 
2Chronicles12:10 Mu kifo kyazo kabaka Rekobowamu n'akola engabo ez'ekikomo, n'azikwasa abaduumira abakuumi abaakuumanga mu maaso g'olubiri lwa kabaka." 
2Chronicles12:11 Kabaka bwe yabanga agenda mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, abakuumi bajjanga ne baambalira engabo; oluvannyuma baazizzangayo mu buzigo bw'abakuumi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Naye kubanga yeetoowaza, obusungu bwa Katonda ne bulekeraawo okumuwondera n'ataasanyizibwawo ddala; kituufu mu Yuda mwalimu ebirungi." 
2Chronicles12:13 Rekobowamu yagundiira mu Yeruzaalemu, n'ayongera okufuga.
