2Chronicles32:26 Oluvannyuma yejjusa olw'omutima gwe okwewanika, n'abantu ab'omu Yeruzaalemu ne beetoowaza. Olw'okubeera ekyo, obusungu bw'Omukama tebwabagwira mu budde bwa Kezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Kezekiya yali mugagga nga wa kitiibwa nnyo; yeezimbira amawanika olw'eby'obugagga bwe: ffeeza, zaabu, amayinja ag'omuwendo, eby'akaloosa, engabo, na buli ngeri ya bintu bya muwendo." 
2Chronicles32:28 Yazimba amaterekero olw'envujjo ku ŋŋano, evviini ensu, n'omuzigo; yakola n'ebiraalo by'ente n'engo omukuumirwa amagana." 
2Chronicles32:29 Yazimba n'ebyalo, n'ayongera ku bisibo n'amagana butabala, kubanga Omukama yali amuwadde eby'obugagga bingi nnyo." 
2Chronicles32:30 Kezekiya ye yaziba engulu akagga Gikoni gye kafubutukira, amazzi n'agayisa mu mukutu n'agalaza ebugwanjuba bw'Ekibuga kya Dawudi. Byonna bye yakola byamulamira." 
2Chronicles32:31 Kyokka abafuzi b'e Babiloni bwe baamutumira ababaka okumubuuza ku ky'ekyewuunyo ekyali kibaddewo mu nsi, Katonda n'asooka amuleka, amugeze, amanye byonna ebyamuli mu mutima." 
2Chronicles32:32 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Kezekiya ne bye yakola, omukwano gwe eri Omukama byawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Okulabikirwa kwa Yisaaya omulanzi mutabani wa Amozi, ne mu Kitabo kya Bakabaka ba Yuda ne Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Kezekiya n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, ne bamuziika awo ku kasozi akambuka ku biggya by'abazzukulu ba Dawudi; Yuda yenna n'abantu b'omu Yeruzaalemu bonna baamukungubagira. Manasse mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manasse yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka kkumi n'ebiri; yafugira mu Yeruzaalemu emyaka amakumi ataano mu etaano. 
2Chronicles33:2 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama, ng'okukola ebyenyinyalwa by'amawanga Omukama ge yali agobyewo mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:3 Yaddamu n'azimba ebifo ebigulumivu Kezekiya kitaawe bye yali asaanyizzaawo; yassaawo emyaliiro gya Baali, n'akola empagi ya Asera. Yavunnamira eggye lyonna ery'emmunyeenye z'eggulu, n'alisinza." 
2Chronicles33:4 Yazimba emyaliiro mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama Omukama kye yali ayogeddeko nti: “Erinnya lyange liribeera mu Yeruzaalemu emirembe gyonna.” 
2Chronicles33:5 Yazimbira eggye lyonna ery'emmunyeenye z'eggulu emyaliiro mu mpya bbiri ez'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. 
2Chronicles33:6 Yawonga batabani be mu muliro mu Kiwonvu Beni-Yinnomu; yakolanga eby'obulogo n'okusamira; yasamiranga n'okwebuuza ku mizimu. Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama n'amunyiiza. 
2Chronicles33:7 Yaddira ekifaananyi kya lubaale kye yali awoze n'akissa mu Kiggwa, Omukama kye yayogerako ng'agamba Dawudi ne Solomoni mutabani we nti: “Mu Kiggwa muno ne mu Yeruzaalemu, ekibuga kye nalonda mu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli, mwe ndissa erinnya lyange emirembe gyonna," 
2Chronicles33:8 era siriganya kigere kya Yisirayeli kuddamu kuleka nsi gye nassizaawo bajjajjaabwe, singa balikwata byonna bye nabayigiriza ebikwata ku mateeka, ebiragiro n'ennamula bye nawa nga mpita mu Musa.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Naye Manasse yawubisa Yuda n'abantu b'omu Yeruzaalemu ne boonoona n'okusinga amawanga Omukama ge yazikiriza mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli. 
2Chronicles33:10 Omukama yakoma ku Manasse n'abantu be naye tebaawuliriza. 
2Chronicles33:11 Kyeyava abayimbulirako abagabe b'eggye lya kabaka wa Assuri; baawamba Manasse n'amalobo, ne bamusiba enjegere z'ekikomo, ne bamutwala e Babiloni." 
2Chronicles33:12 Bwe yali mu buyinike, yeeyuna ekisa ky'Omukama Katonda we, ne yeetoowaza nnyo mu maaso ga Katonda wa bajjajjaabe." 
2Chronicles33:13 Bwe yasaba ew'Omukama, Omukama n'awulira okuwanjaga kwe, n'amuzza e Yeruzaalemu mu bwakabaka bwe; Manasse n'ategeera nti Omukama ye Katonda." 
2Chronicles33:14 Oluvannyuma yazimba bbugwe ow'ebweru w'Ekibuga kya Dawudi, ebugwanjuba bw'akagga Gikoni mu kiwonvu, okutuukira ddala ku Mulyango gw'Ebyennyanja; yamwetoolooza akasozi Ofeli era n'amwongerako nnyo obugulumivu. Yassa abagabe b'eggye mu bibuga bya Yuda byonna okuli ebigo." 
2Chronicles33:15 Yaggyawo balubaale abagwira, n'aggya mu Kiggwa kya Katonda ekifaananyi kya lubaale, n'emyaliiro gye yali akoze ku lusozi lw'Ekiggwa ne mu Yeruzaalemu, byonna n'abisuula ebweru w'ekibuga." 
2Chronicles33:16 Yazzaawo omwaliiro gw'Omukama n'atambirirako ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu n'eby'okwebaza, n'alagira Yuda aweerezenga Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 Naye abantu baayongera okutambiriranga ku bifo ebigulumivu, kyokka nga batambirirayo Mukama Katonda waabwe." 
2Chronicles33:18 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Manasse, n'essaala ye ewa Katonda we, n'ebigambo abalabi bye baamugambanga mu linnya ly'Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, byawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:19 Essaala ye n'okuwulirwa, ebibi bye byonna, okwonooneka kwe, ebifo mwe yazimba ebifo ebigulumivu ne mwe yasimba empagi za Asera n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale nga tannaba kwenenya, byawandiikibwa mu bitabo bya Kozayi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manasse n'agalamira ne bajjajjaabe, ne bamuziika mu lubiri lwe. Mutabani we Amoni n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu ebiri; yafugira emyaka ebiri mu Yeruzaalemu. 
2Chronicles33:22 Naye yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama nga kitaawe Manasse bwe yakola. Amoni yaweereza n'okutambirira ebifaananyi bya balubaale byonna Manasse bye yali aweereza. 
2Chronicles33:23 Naye teyeetoowaliza Mukama nga kitaawe bwe yakola; Amoni yayongera bwongezi bunene bwa musango gwe. 
2Chronicles33:24 Abakungu ba Amoni ne bamwekobera, ne bamuttira mu lubiri lwe." 
2Chronicles33:25 Bannansi ne batta bonna abeekobera kabaka Amoni; mu kifo kye ne bassaawo Yosiya mutabani we amusikire. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka munaana; mu Yeruzaalemu yafugiramu emyaka amakumi asatu mu gumu. 
2Chronicles34:2 Yakola ekituufu mu maaso g'Omukama, n'atambulira mu makubo ga Dawudi jjajjaawe; teyawunjukako kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono." 
2Chronicles34:3 Mu mwaka ogwomunaana ogw'obwakabaka bwe, ng'akyali muvubuka muto, yatandika okunoonya Katonda wa jjajjaawe Dawudi. Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri yatandika okugogola mu Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu ebifo ebigulumivu, empagi za Asera, ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebibajje n'ebisaanuuse." 
2Chronicles34:4 Yalagira emyaliiro gya Baali ne bagizikiriza; emyaliiro gy'obubaani gye baali bazimbyeko yagimenyaamenya; empagi za Asera n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebibumbe n'ebisaanuuse yabimenyaamenya n'abimansamansa ku malaalo gaabo abaali babitambirira. 
2Chronicles34:5 Yayokya amagumba ga bakabona abaatambiriranga ku myaliiro gyabwe; bw'atyo n'agogola Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu. 
2Chronicles34:6 Era ne mu bibuga bya Manasse, Efurayimu, Simewoni n'okutuuka ku Nafutali, ne mu byalo ebibyetoolodde," 
2Chronicles34:7 yamenyawo emyaliiro n'empagi za Asera, n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale n'abisekula n'abifuula vvu; emyaliiro gy'obubaani n'agitemaatema wonna mu Yisirayeli, olwo n'adda mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Awo mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana ogw'obwakabaka bwe, olw'okugogola ensi n'Ekiggwa, yatuma Safani mutabani wa Azaliya, Maaseeya omukulu w'ekibuga, ne Yowa akuuma ebyafaayo, mutabani wa Yowakazi, baddaabirize Ekiggwa ky'Omukama Katonda we." 
2Chronicles34:9 Ne bajja ewa Kilukiya kabona omukulu, ne bamuwa ssente ezaali zireeteddwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama Abaleevi abakuumi b'oku mulyango ze baakuŋŋaanya mu Manasse, Efurayimu n'awalala wonna mu Yisirayeli, mu Yuda wonna, mu Benyamiini ne mu b'omu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ne babikwasa bannampala abaakuliranga omulimu gw'okulongoosa Ekiggwa ky'Omukama; bano ne baziwa abakozi b'omulimu abaali bakola mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama okuddaabiriza n'okuzzaawo Ekiggwa. 
2Chronicles34:11 Era baawanga ssente ababazzi n'abazimbi, bagule amayinja amayole n'emiti egy'emirabba n'eŋŋanzikizo eby'amayumba bakabaka ba Yuda ge baaleka ne gagwa." 
2Chronicles34:12 Baffundi omulimu baagukola n'omutima gwabwe gwonna. Bannampala abaalabiriranga omulimu baali: Yakati, Obadiya, Abaleevi ab'omu ssiga lya Merari, Zakariya ne Mesullamu, ow'omu ssiga lya Kewati. Abaleevi bonna, nga bakugu mu kukuba ebivuga," 
2Chronicles34:13 be baalabiriranga abeetissi n'okulambikanga abakozi aba buli mulimu. Abaleevi abamu baalinga bawandiisi, bakuumi ba bitabo oba baggazi." 
2Chronicles34:14 Bwe baali baggya ssente ezaali zireeteddwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, Kilukiya kabona n'agwikiriza Ekitabo ky'Etteeka ly'Omukama eryaweebwa nga liyita mu Musa" 
2Chronicles34:15 Kilukiya n'agamba Safani omuwandiisi nti: “Nzudde Ekitabo ky'Etteeka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama.” Ekitabo Kilukiya n'akiwa Safani. 
2Chronicles34:16 Safani ekitabo n'akireeta ewa kabaka, n'amutegeeza nti: “Abaweereza bo bakola byonna nga bwe wabatuma." 
2Chronicles34:17 Ssente ezibadde mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama baziwaddeyo ne bazikwasa bannampala ne baffundi.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Safani omuwandiisi n'ategeeza kabaka nti: “Kilukiya kabona yampadde ekitabo.” Safani n'akisoma mu maaso ga kabaka. 
2Chronicles34:19 Kabaka bwe yawulira ebigambo by'Ekitabo ky'Etteeka, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye." 
2Chronicles34:20 N'alagira Kilukiya kabona, Akikamu mutabani wa Safani, Abudoni mutabani wa Mika, Safani omuwandiisi ne Asaaya omuweereza wa kabaka, n'abagamba nti:" 
2Chronicles34:21 “Mugende mwebuuze ku Mukama ku lwange, ku lw'abalala bonna mu Yisirayeli ne mu Yuda yenna ku bigambo by'ekitabo ekyo ekyazuuliddwa, kubanga obusungu bw'Omukama bungi obutwesereddeko, kubanga bajjajjaffe tebaawulira kigambo kya Mukama; tebaakola nga byonna bwe byawandiikibwa mu kitabo kino.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Kilukiya n'abo kabaka be yali amusindise nabo ne bagenda ewa Kuluda omulanzi omukazi, muka Sallumu mutabani wa Tokuwati mutabani wa Kasura, eyali akuuma ebyambalo. Yali asula mu Yeruzaalemu mu Gombolola ey'Okubiri. Ne bamwanjulira ensonga zaabwe," 
2Chronicles34:23 n'abaddamu nti: “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Mugambe omusajja abasindise gye ndi nti:" 
2Chronicles34:24 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ŋŋenda kuzikiriza ekifo kino na bonna abakirimu ng'ebikolimo byonna ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo ekisomeddwa mu maaso ga kabaka wa Yuda. 
2Chronicles34:25 Kubanga nze banvaako ne banyookeza balubaale obubaani, ne bannyiiza na byonna emikono gyabwe bye gyakola; obusungu bwange bujja kweserera ku kifo kino era tewaliba abuzikiriza.” ’" 
2Chronicles34:26 Kabaka wa Yuda eyabasindise okwebuuza ku Mukama mumugambe nti: Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba ku bigambo by'Ekitabo bye wawulidde:" 
2Chronicles34:27 ‘Kubanga omutima gwo gutengedde ne weetoowaliza Omukama ng'owulidde bye nayogeredde ekifo kino n'abakisulamu, n'oyuza ebyambalo byo, ne weetoowaza, n'okaaba mu maaso gange, nange nkuwulidde,’ Omukama bw'agamba." 
2Chronicles34:28 ‘Kale nzija kukugatta ku bajjajjaabo, oliziikibwa mu ddembe, amaaso go tegaliraba kabenje ke nnaaleetera kifo kino n'abo abakisulamu.’ ” Ne bazzaayo ewa kabaka kye yali agambye." 
2Chronicles34:29 Kabaka n'atumya n'akuŋŋaanya abakadde bonna mu Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu. 
2Chronicles34:30 N'ayambuka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama wamu n'abasajja bonna ab'omu Yuda, abantu bonna ab'omu Yeruzaalemu, bakabona, Abaleevi n'abantu bonna okuva kw'asooka okutuuka kw'asembayo, n'asoma bonna nga bawulira ebigambo byonna eby'Ekitabo ky'Endagaano ekyali kizuuliddwa mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
2Chronicles34:31 Kabaka n'ayimirira ku mpagi ye, n'addamu endagaano mu maaso g'Omukama: okugoberera Omukama, okukwatanga ebiragiro bye, empisa ze n'amateeka ge n'omutima gwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwe gwonna, n'okutuukiriza ebigambo by'Endagaano eyo ebyali biwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
2Chronicles34:32 N'alagaanyisa bonna abaali mu Yeruzaalemu ne Benyamiini. Ab'omu Yeruzaalemu ne bakolanga ng'endagaano ya Katonda, Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe bw'egamba." 
2Chronicles34:33 Yosiya n'aggya ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebyenyinyalwa byonna mu nsi y'Abayisirayeli wonna; bonna abaali mu Yisirayeli n'abalagaanyisa okuweereza Omukama Katonda waabwe. Mu budde bwe bwonna nga mulamu tebaava ku Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe. 
2Chronicles35:1 Yosiya yakuza Pasika y'Omukama mu Yeruzaalemu. Akaliga ka Pasika kattibwa ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi ogusooka. 
2Chronicles35:2 N'assa bakabona mu mirimu gyabwe n'abagumya mu kuweereza kwabwe mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama. 
2Chronicles35:3 Abaleevi abaayigirizanga Yisirayeli yenna, ate nga bawongeddwa Omukama, n'abagamba nti: “Musse Ssanduuku entukuvu mu Kiggwa Solomoni mutabani wa Dawudi kabaka wa Yisirayeli kye yazimba. Si ya kuddamu kutwalirwa ku bibegabega byammwe. Kati muweereze Omukama Katonda wammwe n'abantu ba Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mwetegeke mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe ne mu bisanja byammwe, nga Dawudi kabaka wa Yisirayeli bwe yabitereeza era ne Solomoni mutabani we." 
2Chronicles35:5 Muweereze mu kitukuvu nga buli kibinja ky'Abaleevi kiriko ennyumba za bajjajja eza bannammwe, abantu aba bulijjo, be kikiikiridde." 
2Chronicles35:6 Mutte obuliga bwa Pasika, mwetukuze, era mubuteeketeeke olwa baganda bammwe, nga mukola ng'Omukama bwe yagamba ng'ayita mu Musa.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Yosiya abantu bonna abaaliwo yabawa obuliga n'embuzi emitwalo esatu ng'ebitone bya Pasika, n'ente enkumi ssatu, byonna ebyo nga kabaka abitodde mu bibye." 
2Chronicles35:8 N'abakungu be baatonera abantu kyeyagalire, bakabona n'Abaleevi. Kilukiya, Zakariya ne Yekiyeli, abakulu b'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, baawa bakabona, ku lw'ebitone bya Pasika, endiga enkumi bbiri mu lukaaga, n'ente ebikumi bisatu." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniya ne baganda be Semaaya ne Netaneli, Kasabiya, Yeyeli ne Yozabadi, abakulu b'Abaleevi, baawa Abaleevi abalala ebitone bya Pasika endiga enkumi ttaano n'ente ebikumi bitaano." 
2Chronicles35:10 Omukolo gwategekebwa, bakabona ne bayimirira mu bifo byabwe, n'Abaleevi mu bisanja byabwe, nga kabaka bwe yali alagidde." 
2Chronicles35:11 Obuliga bwa Pasika ne buttibwa; bakabona ne bamansira omusaayi gwe baabakwasanga, Abaleevi bo nga babaagako ebisolo amaliba." 
2Chronicles35:12 Ne bayawulako ebitone eby'ebitambiro ebyokye, ne babiwa abantu mu bibinja by'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe babitambirire Omukama, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Musa. Ne ku nte era bwe baakola." 
2Chronicles35:13 Ebitone bya Pasika bayokya byokye ku muliro ng'etteeka bwe ligamba; ebitone ebirala ebitukuvu ne babifumba mu ntamu, mu nsaka ne mu nsaniya, ne babitwalira bunnambiro abantu bonna." 
2Chronicles35:14 Oluvannyuma bo ne beetegekera eyaabwe ne bakabona, kubanga bakabona, batabani ba Aroni, baali ku gwa kuweereza bitambiro byokye n'amasavu okutuusa ekiro. Abaleevi okwetegekera eyaabwe n'eya bakabona batabani ba Aroni kyebaava bakikola oluvannyuma." 
2Chronicles35:15 Abayimbi ab'olunyiriri lw'Abaasafu baali mu kifo kyabwe ekyalagirwa Dawudi, Asafu, Emani ne Yedutuni omulabi wa kabaka. Abaggazi baali ku miryango gyonna, tebaaseguka kuva ku mulimu gwabwe, kubanga baganda baabwe Abaleevi baabakolera entegeka." 
2Chronicles35:16 Bwe gutyo omukolo gw'Omukama gwonna gwategekebwa bulungi okukuza Pasika, n'okutambira ebitone by'ebitambiro ebyokye ku mwaliiro gw'Omukama nga kabaka Yosiya bwe yali alagidde." 
2Chronicles35:17 Abayisirayeli abaaliwo baakuza Pasika ku olwo, ne bakuza n'Embaga y'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse okumala ennaku musanvu." 
2Chronicles35:18 Okukuza Pasika mu ngeri eno kwali tekubangawo okuva mu biseera bya Samweli omulanzi. Ne mu bakabaka bonna aba Yisirayeli tewaali yakuza Pasika nga Yosiya bwe yakola wamu ne bakabona, Abaleevi, Yuda yenna, abaava mu Yisirayeli n'ab'omu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Pasika eno yakuzibwa mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana ogw'obwakabaka bwa Yosiya. 
2Chronicles35:20 Yosiya bwe yamala okuddaabiriza Ekiggwa, Neko kabaka w'e Misiri n'ayambuka okutabaala mu Karucemisi ku Mugga Furaati; Yosiya n'agenda okumusisinkana." 
2Chronicles35:21 Naye Neko n'amutumira ababaka n'amugamba nti: “Onfaako ki ggwe, kabaka wa Yuda? Si ggwe nnumbye kaakati, wabula ennyumba ennwanyisa. Katonda andagidde ŋŋende bunnambiro. Leka kuziyiza Katonda ali nange, sikulwa ng'akusanyaawo.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Naye Yosiya teyamuleka, wabula yeefuusa okumulwanyisa, n'atagondera bw'atyo bigambo bya Neko ebyava mu kamwa ka Katonda. N'agenda okumulwanyisa mu museetwe gw'e Megiddo." 
2Chronicles35:23 Ab'obusaale ne balasa kabaka Yosiya, n'agamba abagabe be nti: “Munzigye mu ddwaniro kubanga nfumitiddwa bubi nnyo.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Abaweereza be ne bamuggya ku kigaali ne bamussa mu kigaali kye ekirala ne bamutwala e Yeruzaalemu, n'afa, n'aziikibwa mu biggya bya bajjajjaabe; Yuda yenna ne Yeruzaalemu ne bamukaabira." 
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremiya n'afumba ennyimba ezikungubagira Yosiya; n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero abayimbi abasajja n'abakazi bakyakungubagira Yosiya mu nnyimba ezo. Zaafuuka nga tteeka mu Yisirayeli; zaawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Ennyimba z'Okukungubaga. 
2Chronicles35:26 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yosiya, omukwano gwe eri Omukama ebyali nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Tteeka ly'Omukama," 
2Chronicles35:27 byonna bye yakola, okuva ku ntandikwa okutuuka gye bikoma, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli ne Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Bannansi ne baddira Yowakazi mutabani wa Yosiya ne bamusiiga omuzigo, ne bamusikiza kitaawe ku bwakabaka." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yowakazi yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu esatu; yafugira emyezi esatu mu Yeruzaalemu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Kabaka wa Misiri yamuggya ku ntebe mu Yeruzaalemu, ensi n'agisalira engassi ya talenta za ffeeza kikumi, ne talenta emu eya zaabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Kabaka wa Misiri yafuula Eliyakimu, muganda wa Yowakazi, kabaka wa Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu, erinnya lye n'alikyusa n'amutuuma Yoyakimu. Yaddira Yowakazi muganda wa Eliyakimu n'amutwala mu Misiri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yoyakimu yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu etaano; yafugira emyaka kkumi na gumu mu Yeruzaalemu. Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda we. 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni yamulumba n'amusiba n'enjegere z'ekikomo, n'amutwala e Babiloni." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadunezzari n'atwala n'ebimu ku bintu by'omu Kiggwa ky'Omukama n'abissa mu kiggwa kye mu Babiloni. 
2Chronicles36:8 Ebirala mu bifaayo bya Yoyakimu, ebyenyinyalwa bye yakola, n'ebirala ebyamuzuulibwako byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli n'aba Yuda. Yoyakini mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yoyakini yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka kkumi na munaana; yafugira emyezi esatu mu Yeruzaalemu. Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama. 
2Chronicles36:10 Ku ntandikwa y'omwaka, kabaka Nebukadunezzari yamutumya n'amutwala e Babiloni, wamu n'ebintu eby'omuwendo kuva mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama. N'assaawo Zedekiya kitaawe omuto abeere kabaka wa Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka abiri mu gumu; mu Yeruzaalemu yafugiramu emyaka kkumi na gumu. 
2Chronicles36:12 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama Katonda we; teyeetoowaliza Yeremiya omulanzi eyayogeranga by'aggye mu kamwa ka Katonda. 
2Chronicles36:13 Yajeemera ne kabaka Nebukadunezzari, eyali amulayizza mu Katonda. Yakakanyaza ensigo ye, n'agugubya omutima gwe, n'agaana okudda eri Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Era n'abakulu bonna aba bakabona n'abantu baayongera bwongezi kumenya bwesigwa nga bagoberera empisa ezeenyinyalwa ez'amawanga, ne bajaajaamya Ekiggwa ky'Omukama kye yali yeetukulizza mu Yeruzaalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe yabatumiranga buli olukedde ng'ayita mu babaka, kubanga yali akwatirwa ekisa abantu be n'ekisulo kye." 
2Chronicles36:16 Naye bo ababaka ba Katonda baabaziimuula, ne banyooma ekigambo kye, ne bakinagga abalanzi be, okutuusa obusungu bw'Omukama lwe bwatumbukira ku bantu be, era tewaali kuwonyezebwa." 
2Chronicles36:17 Omukama n'abaleetera kabaka w'Abakaludeya n'atta abavubuka baabwe n'ekitala mu Kiggwa kyabwe; teyasaasira muvubuka mulenzi na muwala, yadde omukulu newandibadde omukadde; bonna Katonda yabawaayo mu mikono gya Nebukadunezzari." 
2Chronicles36:18 Byonna ebyeyambisibwa mu Kiggwa kya Katonda yabitwala e Babiloni, ebinene n'ebitono, n'eby'omuwendo eby'Ekiggwa, ebya kabaka n'eby'abakungu be." 
2Chronicles36:19 Baateekera omuliro Ekiggwa kya Katonda, ne bamenya ne bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu; baayokya embiri zonna, na buli kya muwendo kyonna ekyaliyo ne bakizikiriza." 
2Chronicles36:20 Abaasumattuka ekitala Nebukadunezzari yabatwala e Babiloni ne bafuuka baweereza be na ba batabani be okutuusa kabaka wa Buperusi lwe yajja mu buyinza," 
2Chronicles36:21 okutuukiriza Omukama kye yayogera mu kamwa ka Yeremiya nti: “Okutuusa ng'ensi ejagulizza mu Sabbaato zaayo, ejja kusigala ng'ewummudde ebbanga lyonna w'eneebeerera ng'eyabuliddwa, okutuusa ng'emyaka nsanvu giyiseewo.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 Mu mwaka ogusooka ogwa Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi, okutuukiriza ekigambo ky'Omukama kye yali ayogedde ng'ayita mu Yeremiya, Omukama yasindika mu mutima gwa Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi, n'ayisa ekirangiriro mu bwakabaka bwe bwonna, n'akiteeka mu buwandiike ng'agamba nti:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Kino Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi ky'agamba: ‘Omukama Katonda w'eggulu ampadde obwakabaka bwonna obw'omu nsi; andagidde okumuzimbira ekiggwa mu Yeruzaalemu eky'omu Yuda. Buli yenna ow'omu ggwanga lye ali mu mmwe, Omukama Katonda we abeere naye; oyo ayambuke.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Mu mwaka ogusooka ogwa Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi, okutuukiriza ekigambo ky'Omukama kye yali ayogedde ng'ayita mu Yeremiya, Omukama yasindika mu mutima gwa Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi, n'ayisa ekirangiriro mu bwakabaka bwe bwonna, n'akiteeka mu buwandiike ng'agamba nti:" 
Ezra1:2 “Kino Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi ky'agamba: ‘Omukama Katonda w'eggulu ampadde obwakabaka bwonna obw'omu nsi; andagidde okumuzimbira ekiggwa mu Yeruzaalemu eky'omu Yuda. 
Ezra1:3 Buli yenna ow'omu ggwanga lye ali mu mmwe, Omukama Katonda we abeere naye; oyo ayambuke mu Yeruzaalemu mu Yuda, azimbe ekiggwa ky'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, Katonda ali mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra1:4 Buli yenna eyasigalawo, eyo yonna gy'ali, ayambibwe abantu b'omu kifo gy'ali, nga bamuwa ffeeza, zaabu, ebintu, amagana ne bye banaaba batonye kyeyagalire olw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu.’ ”" 
Ezra1:5 Abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe mu Yuda ne Benyamiini, bakabona n'Abaleevi, na buli yenna Katonda gwe yasindika mu mutima, baasitukiramu ne bayambuka, bazimbe Ekiggwa ky'Omukama mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra1:6 Ab'oku miriraano gyabwe bonna ne babadduukirira n'ebyokukozesa ebya ffeeza, ebya zaabu, ebintu ebirala, amagana, n'ebirabo ebirala eby'omuwendo nga tobaze bye baatonanga kyeyagalire." 
Ezra1:7 Ne kabaka Kuuro n'aggyayo ebintu by'omu Kiggwa ky'Omukama Nebukadunezzari bye yali aggye e Yeruzaalemu n'abiteeka mu kiggwa kya lubaale we. 
Ezra1:8 Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi yatuma Mituredati omuwanika n'abiggyayo, n'abibalira Sesubazzari omufuzi wa Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Guno gwe muwendo gwabyo: ebibya ebya zaabu amakumi asatu; ebibya ebya ffeeza lukumi; obwambe amakumi abiri mu mwenda; ebikompe ebya zaabu amakumi asatu; 
Ezra1:10 ebikompe ebya ffeeza ebikumi bina mu kkumi, n'ebintu ebirala lukumi." 
Ezra1:11 Byonna ebintu ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza byali enkumi ttaano mu ebikumi bina. Byonna Sesubazzari n'abitwala wamu n'abo abaali bambuka nga bava mu buwaŋŋanguse, bwe baali bava e Babiloni nga baddayo e Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra2:1 Bano be bantu ab'omu ttwale abaayambuka nga bava mu busibe bw'abawaŋŋangusibwa, Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni be yali atutte mu busibe mu Babiloni, ne bakomawo mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu Yuda, buli omu n'adda mu kibuga kye;" 
Ezra2:2 bajja ne Zerubabbeli, Yeswa, Nekemiya, Seraaya, Reelaaya, Morudekayi, Bilusani, Misupari, Biguvayi, Rekumu ne Baana. Omuwendo gw'abasajja b'eggwanga lya Yisirayeli:" 
Ezra2:3 bazzukulu ba Parosi, enkumi bbiri mu kikumi mu nsanvu mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:4 bazzukulu ba Sefatiya, ebikumi bisatu mu nsanvu mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:5 bazzukulu ba Ara, lusanvu mu nsanvu mu bataano;" 
Ezra2:6 bazzukulu ba Pakati-Mowabu, be bazzukulu ba Yeswa ne Yowabu, enkumi bbiri mu lunaana mu kkumi na babiri;" 
Ezra2:7 bazzukulu ba Elamu, lukumi mu bibiri mu ataano mu bana;" 
Ezra2:8 bazzukulu ba Zattu, lwenda mu ana mu bataano;" 
Ezra2:9 bazzukulu ba Zakkayi, lusanvu mu nkaaga;" 
Ezra2:10 bazzukulu ba Bani, lukaaga mu ana mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:11 bazzukulu ba Bebayi, lukaaga mu abiri mu basatu;" 
Ezra2:12 bazzukulu ba Azugadi, lukumi mu bibiri mu abiri mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:13 bazzukulu ba Adonikamu, lukaaga mu nkaaga mu mukaaga;" 
Ezra2:14 bazzukulu ba Biguvayi, enkumi bbiri mu ataano mu mukaaga;" 
Ezra2:15 bazzukulu ba Adini, bina mu ataano mu bana;" 
Ezra2:16 bazzukulu ba Ateri, abasibuka mu Kezekiya, kyenda mu munaana;" 
Ezra2:17 bazzukulu ba Bezayi, bisatu mu abiri mu basatu;" 
Ezra2:18 bazzukulu ba Yora, kikumi mu kkumi na babiri;" 
Ezra2:19 bazzukulu ba Kasumi, bikumi bibiri mu abiri mu basatu;" 
Ezra2:20 bazzukulu ba Gibbari, kyenda mu bataano;" 
Ezra2:21 abasajja b'e Beteleemu, kikumi mu abiri mu basatu;" 
Ezra2:22 abasajja b'e Netofa, makumi ataano mu mukaaga;" 
Ezra2:23 abasajja b'e Anatoti, kikumi mu abiri mu munaana;" 
Ezra2:24 abasajja b'e Azumaveti, amakumi ana mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:25 abasajja b'e Kiriyati-Yewarimu, Kafira ne Beeroti, lusanvu mu ana mu basatu;" 
Ezra2:26 abasajja b'e Rama ne Geba, lukaaga mu abiri mu omu;" 
Ezra2:27 abasajja b'e Mikumasi, kikumi mu abiri mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:28 abasajja b'e Beteli ne Ayi, ebikumi bibiri mu abiri mu basatu;" 
Ezra2:29 abasajja b'e Nebo, amakumi ataano mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:30 bazzukulu ba Magubisi, kikumi mu ataano mu basatu;" 
Ezra2:31 abasajja b'e Elamu ekirala, lukumi mu bibiri mu ataano mu bana;" 
Ezra2:32 bazzukulu ba Karimu, bikumi bisatu mu abiri;" 
Ezra2:33 abasajja b'e Lodi, Kadidi ne Ono, lusanvu mu abiri mu bataano," 
Ezra2:34 abasajja b'e Yeriko, ebikumi bisatu mu ana mu bataano;" 
Ezra2:35 bazzukulu ba Seena, enkumi ssatu mu lukaaga mu asatu." 
Ezra2:36 Bakabona: bazzukulu ba Yedaaya, okuva mu nnyumba ya Yeswa, lwenda mu nsanvu mu basatu:" 
Ezra2:37 bazzukulu ba Yimmeri, lukumi mu ataano mu babiri;" 
Ezra2:38 bazzukulu ba Pasukuru, lukumi mu bibiri mu ana mu musanvu;" 
Ezra2:39 bazzukulu ba Karimu, lukumi mu kkumi na musanvu." 
Ezra2:40 Abaleevi: bazzukulu ba Yeswa ne Kadumyeli, ab'omu nnyumba ya Odaviya, nsanvu mu bana." 
Ezra2:41 Abayimbi: bazzukulu ba Asafu, kikumi mu abiri mu munaana." 
Ezra2:42 Abaggazi: bazzukulu ba Sallumu, Ateri, Talumoni, Akkubu, Katita ne Sobayi, bonna wamu kikumi mu asatu mu mwenda." 
Ezra2:43 Abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa: bazzukulu ba Zika, bazzukulu ba Kasufa, bazzukulu ba Tabbawoti," 
Ezra2:44 bazzukulu ba Kerosi, bazzukulu ba Siyaya, bazzukulu ba Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 bazzukulu ba Lebana, bazzukulu ba Kagaba, bazzukulu ba Akkubu," 
Ezra2:46 bazzukulu ba Kagabi, bazzukulu ba Salumayi, bazzukulu ba Kanani," 
Ezra2:47 bazzukulu ba Giddeli, bazzukulu ba Gakari, bazzukulu ba Reyaaya," 
Ezra2:48 bazzukulu ba Rezini, bazzukulu ba Nekoda, bazzukulu ba Gazzamu," 
Ezra2:49 bazzukulu ba Wuzza, bazzukulu ba Pasewa, bazzukulu ba Besayi," 
Ezra2:50 bazzukulu ba Asuna, bazzukulu ba Mewunimu, bazzukulu ba Nefussimu," 
Ezra2:51 bazzukulu ba Bakubuku, bazzukulu ba Kakufa, bazzukulu ba Karukuri," 
Ezra2:52 bazzukulu ba Bazuluti, bazzukulu ba Mekida, bazzukulu ba Karusa," 
Ezra2:53 bazzukulu ba Barukosi, bazzukulu ba Sisera, bazzukulu ba Temaki," 
Ezra2:54 bazzukulu ba Neziya, bazzukulu ba Katifa." 
Ezra2:55 Bazzukulu b'abaweereza ba Solomoni: bazzukulu ba Sotayi, bazzukulu ba Assofereti, bazzukulu ba Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 bazzukulu ba Yaala, bazzukulu ba Darukoni, bazzukulu ba Giddeli," 
Ezra2:57 bazzukulu ba Sefatiya, bazzukulu ba Kattili, bazzukulu ba Pokereti-Kazzebayimu, bazzukulu ba Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa ne bazzukulu b'abagalagala ba Solomoni, bonna nga bawera ebikumi bisatu mu kyenda mu babiri." 
Ezra2:59 Bano be badda nga bava mu bibuga Teli-Melaki, Teli-Karusa, Kerubi, Addoni ne Yimmeri, naye nga tebasobola kutegeeza oba ennyumba ya bajjajjaabwe n'olulyo nga bya mu Yisirayeli:" 
Ezra2:60 bazzukulu ba Delaaya, bazzukulu ba Tobiya, bazzukulu ba Nekoda, lukaaga mu ataano mu babiri." 
Ezra2:61 Ate mu ba bakabona: bazzukulu ba Kobaaya, bazzukulu ba Akkozi, bazzukulu ba Baruzillayi, eyawasa mu bawala ba Baruzillayi Omugileyaadi n'ayitibwa erinnya eryo." 
Ezra2:62 Bano baanoonya obuwandiike bw'olulyo lwabwe ne batabuzuula, ne bagobebwa mu bakabona olw'obutaba balongoofu." 
Ezra2:63 Owessaza n'abagaana okulyanga ku bintu ebitukuvu ennyo, okutuusa nga wazzeewo kabona aweereza ne Wurimu ne Tummimu." 
Ezra2:64 Ekibiina kyonna baawera abantu emitwalo ena mu enkumi bbiri mu bisatu mu nkaaga," 
Ezra2:65 ng'oggyeeko abaddu baabwe n'abazaana baabwe kasanvu mu bisatu mu asatu mu musanvu; ssaako abayimbi baabwe abasajja n'abakazi ebikumi bibiri. 
Ezra2:66 Baalina embalaasi lusanvu mu asatu mu mukaaga, ennyumbu ebikumi bibiri mu ana mu ttaano," 
Ezra2:67 eŋŋamiya ebikumi bina mu asatu mu ttaano, n'endogoyi kakaaga mu lusanvu mu abiri." 
Ezra2:68 Abakulu b'endyo abamu bwe baatuuka ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama mu Yeruzaalemu, ne batona kyeyagalire eby'okuzimba Ekiggwa kya Katonda mu kifo kyakyo." 
Ezra2:69 Mu ggwanika ly'omulimu baawaamu nga bwe basobola: durakuma emitwalo mukaaga mu lukumi eza zaabu, mina enkumi ttaano eza ffeeza, n'ekkanzu za bakabona kikumi." 
Ezra2:70 Bakabona n'Abaleevi baasulanga mu bibuga byabwe, wamu n'abantu abamu, n'abayimbi, abaggazi n'abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa; Abayisirayeli abalala bonna baasenga mu bibuga byabwe." 
Ezra3:1 Omwezi ogwomusanvu bwe gwatuuka, Abayisirayeli nga bamaze okusenga mu bibuga byabwe, abantu ne bakuŋŋaana mu Yeruzaalemu ng'omuntu omu." 
Ezra3:2 Yeswa mutabani wa Yozadaki ne bakabona banne, ne Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli ne baganda be bonna, ne bazimba omwaliiro gwa Katonda wa Yisirayeli, baweererezeeko ebitambiro ebyokye, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Tteeka lya Musa omuntu wa Katonda." 
Ezra3:3 Newandibadde baalimu okutya abantu be baalimu mu nsi, baazimba omwaliiro ku musingi gwagwo, ne baweererezaako Omukama ekitambiro ekyokye, eky'oku makya n'akawungeezi." 
Ezra3:4 Nga bagoberera entereeza eyawandiikibwa, baakuza Embaga y'Ensiisira, nga baweereza ebitambiro ebyokye buli lunaku okwenkana n'omuwendo gwabyo buli lunaku ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Ezra3:5 Era baaweereza n'ebitambiro ebyokye ebya bulijjo, n'eby'embaga y'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'ebitambiro by'embaga enkulu eziragiddwa Omukama, n'ebitambiro byonna ebyeyagalire ebyaweerezebwanga Omukama." 
Ezra3:6 Okuva ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu baatandika okuweereza Omukama ebitambiro ebyokye, newandibadde nga Ekiggwa kya Katonda kyali tekinnabangibwa." 
Ezra3:7 Baawa ssente abakomozi b'amayinja n'ababazzi, ne bawa emmere, eby'okunywa n'omuzigo abantu b'e Sidoni n'e Tiiro, baleete emiti gy'entolookyo okuva mu Lebanoni, bagiseeyeyeze ku nnyanja okutuuka e Yoppa, nga Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi bwe yali abakkirizza." 
Ezra3:8 Mu mwezi ogwokubiri ogw'omwaka ogwokubiri bukya batuuka wali Kiggwa kya Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu, Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli, Yeswa mutabani wa Yozadaki ne baganda baabwe abaali basigaddewo ku baganda baabwe bakabona n'Abaleevi, na bonna abaali bavudde mu busibe ne badda e Yeruzaalemu, ne batandika okuzimba Ekiggwa kya Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu. Bassaawo Abaleevi, okuva ku myaka amakumi abiri n'okwambuka, balabirire omulimu gw'okuzimba Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Ezra3:9 Yeswa ne batabani be ne baganda be, Kadumyeli ne batabani be, ne bazzukulu ba Yuda, ne batabani ba Kenadadi ne batabani baabwe ne baganda baabwe, be Baleevi, baasitukiramu ne bakola ng'omuntu omu okulabirira abo abaakolanga omulimu ku Kiggwa kya Katonda." 
Ezra3:10 Abazimbi bwe baamala okubanga omusingi gw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, bakabona nga bambadde ebyambalo byabwe, nga bakutte n'amakondeere, n'Abaleevi, batabani ba Asafu nga bakutte ensaazo, ne bayimirira mu bifo byabwe batendereze Katonda nga Dawudi kabaka wa Yisirayeli bwe yalagira." 
Ezra3:11 Ne bayimba nga batendereza n'okwebaza Omukama nti: “Mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye ku Yisirayeli kya mirembe gyonna.” Abantu bonna ne baleekaana nnyo nga batenda Omukama, kubanga omusingi gw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama gubangiddwa." 
Ezra3:12 Naye abangi ennyo mu bakabona abakadde, ne mu Baleevi n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abaali balabiddeko ddala n'amaaso gaabwe Ekiggwa ekyasooka, ne bakuba ebiwoobe nga balaba omusingi gw'Ekiggwa kino gubangibwa, kyokka era bangi ne baleekaana olw'essanyu." 
Ezra3:13 Tewali yali asobola kwawula ddoboozi lya kuleekaana okw'essanyu ku ddoboozi ly'okukaaba kubanga abantu baali baleekaana nnyo; n'oluyoogaano lwatuuka wala. 
Ezra4:1 Abalabe ba Yuda ne Benyamiini bwe baawulira nti abawaŋŋangusibwa bazimbira Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli ekiggwa," 
Ezra4:2 ne basemberera Zerubabbeli n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ne babagamba nti: “Tuzimbe wamu nammwe, kubanga naffe tuli nga mmwe, tunoonya Katonda wammwe; tubadde tumutambirira okuva mu budde bwa Esari-Kaddoni kabaka wa Assuri, eyatuleeta wano.”" 
Ezra4:3 Naye Zerubabbeli, Yeswa n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe eza Yisirayeli ne babagamba nti: “Si buvunaanyizibwa bwammwe okuzimbira Katonda waffe ekiggwa wamu naffe, wabula ffe ffekka ffe tunaazimbira Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, nga Kuuro kabaka wa Buperusi bwe yatulagira.”" 
Ezra4:4 Ekyaddirira abantu ab'omu nsi ne batandika okuterebula abantu ba Yuda, ne babatawaanya mu kuzimba." 
Ezra4:5 Baaguliriranga abakiise mu nkiiko babalyolyome, babasobeze mu ntegeka zaabwe ebbanga lyonna nga Kuuro ye kabaka wa Buperusi n'okutuuka ku bufuzi bwa Dariyo kabaka wa Buperusi." 
Ezra4:6 Mu budde bwa Akasuwero nga yaakasooka okufuga, ne bawandiika nga bavunaana abantu b'omu Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra4:7 Mu budde bwa Arutakesasuta, Bisulamu, Mituredati, Tabeeli n'abalala bwe baakolanga baawandiikira Arutakesasuta kabaka wa Buperusi; ebbaluwa yali mu mpandiika ya Kyarami n'olulimi Lwarami." 
Ezra4:8 Rekumu munnamateeka omukulu ne Simusayi omuwandiisi baawandiika ebbaluwa ewawaabira Yeruzaalemu ewa kabaka Arutakesasuta ng'esoma bw'eti ___ 
Ezra4:9 Abaawandiika: Rekumu munnamateeka omukulu, Simusayi omuwandiisi, ne bannaabwe abalala abalamuzi n'abaami okuva mu Tulipoli, Buperusi, Ereci, Babiloni, Susa, kwe kugamba nti Abeelami," 
Ezra4:10 n'abalala mu mawanga oweekitiibwa Osunappari omututumufu be yawaŋŋangusa n'abassa mu bibuga bya Samariya ne mu bitundu ebirala Emitala w'Omugga __ 
Ezra4:11 Ebbaluwa gye baamuweereza yali efaanana bw'eti: “Ya kabaka Arutakesasuta, okuva mu baweereza bo abali Emitala w'Omugga:" 
Ezra4:12 tukutegeeza, ssebo Kabaka, nti Abayudaaya abajja eno mu ffe nga bava ewuwo, baatuuka mu Yeruzaalemu, era kati bali ku kuzimba ekibuga kino ekijeemu; bamaliriza bbugwe waakyo, era baddaabiriza n'omusingi." 
Ezra4:13 Ssebo kabaka, twagala omanye nti singa ekibuga ekyo kizimbibwa, n'ebbugwe waakyo n'amalirizibwa, bajja kulekera awo okuwa omusolo omugereke, n'ogw'ekikungo n'empooza, oluvannyuma kabaka ajja kufiirizibwa." 
Ezra4:14 Kubanga tulina obuvunaanyizibwa mu lubiri, tetwagala kulaba nga kabaka asoomoozebwa, kyetuvudde tuwandiika ne tubuulira kabaka," 
Ezra4:15 onoonyereze mu biwandiiko by'ebyafaayo bya bakitaabo. Ojja kuzuula mu biwandiiko ebyo nti ekibuga kino kibuga kijeemu, kiwakula ennyombo ku bakabaka n'ebitundu bye bafuga; obwedda n'obwedda kibuga kikozi kya bujagalalo. Eyo ye nsonga kyekyava kizikirizibwa." 
Ezra4:16 Tukubuulira, ssebo kabaka, nti ekibuga ekyo bwe kizimbibwa ne bbugwe n'amalirizibwa, tojja kusigaza kantu Emitala w'Omugga.”" 
Ezra4:17 Kabaka n'aweereza okuddamu nti: “Ya Rekumu munnamateeka omukulu, Simusayi omuwandiisi ne bannaabwe abalala abali mu Samariya ne mu kitundu ky'Emitala w'Omugga. Mirembe." 
Ezra4:18 Ebbaluwa gye mumpandiikidde ngifunye, era ekyusiddwa n'esomebwa mu maaso gange." 
Ezra4:19 Nayisizza ekirangiriro ne banoonyereza, ne basanga ng'ekibuga ekyo okuva ddi kijeemera bakabaka, kisitukamu obujagalalo n'okutabangula abantu." 
Ezra4:20 Yeruzaalemu yafugibwako bakabaka ab'amaanyi, abaafuganga ensi eyo yonna eri Emitala w'Omugga, nga basasulwa omusolo omugereke n'ogw'ekikungo n'empooza." 
Ezra4:21 Muyise mangu ekirangiriro abantu abo bayimirize okuzimba; baleme kwongera kuzimba kibuga ekyo okutuuka nga waliwo ekirangiriro kye mpisizza. 
Ezra4:22 Mwekkaanye, ensobi eno temugigayaalirira. Lwaki akabi kano kandyeyongedde ne kagootaanya obwakabaka?”" 
Ezra4:23 Ekiwandiiko ky'ebbaluwa ya kabaka Arutakesasuta olwasomerwa Rekumu munnamateeka omukulu, ne Simusayi omuwandiisi ne bannaabwe ne bagenda bunnambiro eri Abayudaaya mu Yeruzaalemu ne babakaka n'amaanyi okuyimiriza okuzimba." 
Ezra4:24 Bwe gutyo omulimu gw'okuzimba Ekiggwa kya Katonda ne guyimirira; gwayimirira okutuusa mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogw'obwakabaka bwa Dariyo kabaka wa Buperusi. 
Ezra5:1 Awo Aggayi omulanzi ne Zakariya omulanzi, mutabani wa Yiddo, ne balanga eri Abayudaaya abaali mu Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu, mu linnya lya Katonda wa Yisirayeli eyabaliko." 
Ezra5:2 Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli ne Yeswa mutabani wa Yozadaki ne batandika okuzimba Ekiggwa kya Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu; abalanzi ba Katonda baali nabo nga babayamba. 
Ezra5:3 Mu budde obwo Tattenayi eyali owessaza Emitala w'Omugga n'ajja gye bali ne Setari-Bozenayi ne bannaabwe ne bababuuza nti: “Ani yabakkiriza okuzimba ekiggwa kino n'okumaliriza omusekese guno?” 
Ezra5:4 Ne bababuuza era nti: “Amannya galuwa ag'abasajja abazimba ekizimbe kino?” 
Ezra5:5 Naye eriiso lya Katonda waabwe lyali ku bakadde b'Abayudaaya, sibaabayimiriza okutuusa ng'ekiwandiiko kimaze okugenda ewa Dariyo nga n'ebbaluwa ye emaze okufunibwa." 
Ezra5:6 Eno ye bbaluwa owessaza Tattenayi mu kitundu ky'Emitala w'Omugga, Setari-Bozenayi ne banne abaami b'Emitala w'Omugga, gye baaweereza ewa kabaka Dariyo." 
Ezra5:7 Obubaka bwe baamuweereza bwali buwandiikiddwa bwe buti: “Eri kabaka Dariyo. Mu byonna mirembe. 
Ezra5:8 Ssebo kabaka, tukutegeeza nti twagenda mu ssaza lya Yuda, eri Ekiggwa kya Katonda Omukulu. Bakizimba n'amayinja amanene, ne mu bisenge bakookeddemu emiti. Omulimu gukolebwa na bwegendereza era gulamidde abaguluŋŋamya." 
Ezra5:9 Twabuuza abakadde abo, ne tubagamba nti: ‘Ani yabakkiriza okuzimba ekiggwa kino n'okumaliriza omusekese guno?’" 
Ezra5:10 Twababuuza n'amannya gaabwe, tulyoke tuwandiike amannya g'abasajja ababakulira olw'okukumanyisa." 
Ezra5:11 “Baatuddamu bwe bati: ‘Ffe tuli baweereza ba Katonda w'eggulu n'ensi; tuzimba buto ekiggwa ekyali kizimbiddwa wano emyaka mingi egiyiseewo, kabaka wa Yisirayeli omukulu kye yali azimbye n'akimaliriza." 
Ezra5:12 Naye bajjajjaffe baanyiiza Katonda w'eggulu, n'abawaayo mu mikono gya Nebukadunezzari Omukaludeya, kabaka w'e Babiloni, eyazikiriza ekiggwa kino, abantu baayo n'abawaŋŋangusiriza mu Babiloni." 
Ezra5:13 Naye mu mwaka ogusooka ogwa Kuuro kabaka w'e Babiloni, kabaka Kuuro yayisa ekirangiriro Ekiggwa kya Katonda kino kizimbibwe." 
Ezra5:14 Yaggya ne mu kiggwa ky'e Babiloni ebintu ebya zaabu ne ffeeza Nebukadunezzari bye yali aggye mu Kiggwa e Yeruzaalemu n'abireeta mu kiggwa ky'e Babiloni. Kabaka Kuuro yabikwasa omusajja gwe bayita Sesubazzari, gwe yali awadde obwessaza," 
Ezra5:15 n'amugamba nti: “Ebintu bino bitwale, genda obiteeke mu Kiggwa ekiri mu Yeruzaalemu, n'Ekiggwa kya Katonda kizimbibwe mu kifo kyakyo.”" 
Ezra5:16 Bw'atyo Sesubazzari ono n'ajja n'azimba omusingi gw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu; n'okuva olwo n'okutuusa kati kizimbibwa, tekinnaba kuggwa.’" 
Ezra5:17 “Kale nno oba kabaka alaba nga kirungi, bakebere mu nnyumba y'enkuluze ya kabaka eri mu Babiloni, alabe oba Kuuro kabaka yali ayisizza ekirangiriro okuzimba Ekiggwa kya Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu, olwo kabaka atubuulire ky'asazeewo ku kigambo kino.”" 
Ezra6:1 Awo kabaka Dariyo n'ayisa ekirangiriro, ne banoonya mu tterekero ly'ebiwandiiko mu nkuluze eyali mu Babiloni." 
Ezra6:2 Ne basanga omuzingo mu kigo ky'e Ekubatana, mu ssaza ly'e Mediya; kwali kuwandiikiddwako bino:" 
Ezra6:3 “ Eky'okujjukira: “Mu mwaka ogusooka ogwa kabaka Kuuro, kabaka Kuuro yayisa ekirangiriro ku Kiggwa kya Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Ekiggwa kizimbibwe, ng'ekifo eky'okuweererezangamu ebitambiro, n'emisingi gyakyo gizimbibwe. Kya kubeera kya mikono nkaaga obugulumivu, n'obugazi emikono nkaaga;" 
Ezra6:4 kya mbu z'amayinja amanene ssatu n'olubu lumu olw'emiti; ssente ez'okukozesa zijja kusasulibwa nkuluze ya kabaka. 
Ezra6:5 N'ebintu by'omu Kiggwa kya Katonda ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza Nebukadunezzari bye yali aggye mu Kiggwa e Yeruzaalemu n'abireeta mu Babiloni bizibbweyo, bigende mu kifo kyabyo mu Kiggwa mu Yeruzaalemu, biteekebwe mu Kiggwa kya Katonda.’" 
Ezra6:6 “Kale nno, Tattenayi owessaza mu kitundu ekiri Emitala w'Omugga, Setari-Bozenayi nammwe bannaabwe abaami mu ssaza Emitala w'Omugga, mwesambe ekifo ekyo." 
Ezra6:7 Temweyingiza mu bya kuzimba Kiggwa kya Katonda ekyo. Muleke atwala Abayudaaya n'abakadde b'Abayudaaya bazimbe Ekiggwa kya Katonda ekyo mu kifo kyakyo. 
Ezra6:8 Era wano ndagidde bye muteekwa okukolera abakadde b'Abayudaaya abo nga bazimba Ekiggwa kya Katonda ekyo: Ssente abasajja abo ze banaakozesa zijja zonna kusasulibwa nkuluze ya kabaka, ku musolo oguweebwa mu kitundu ky'Emitala w'Omugga, omulimu guleme kuyimirira." 
Ezra6:9 Nga wabaddewo ekyetaagibwa, ng'ente ennume, endiga ennume n'obuliga obulume olw'okuweereza ebitambiro ebyokye Katonda w'eggulu, obanga bakabona abali mu Yeruzaalemu beetaaze eŋŋano, omunnyo, evviini n'omuzigo, bibaweebwe buli lunaku awatali kwekwasa kirala," 
Ezra6:10 basobole okuweereza Katonda w'eggulu ebitambiro ebisanyusa, era kabaka n'abaana be babasabire babe balamu." 
Ezra6:11 Era nnangiridde nti omuntu yenna aliba akyusizza ekiragiro kino, mu nnyumba ye musowolwangamu omuti n'agukomererwako, ate ennyumba ye eyabizibwanga n'efuuka ffumbiko." 
Ezra6:12 Katonda oyo, eyaddira erinnya lye ne lisula omwo, amenyewo kabaka oba omuntu alyetantala okukyusa ekirangiriro kino oba okusanyaawo Ekiggwa kya Katonda ekyo mu Yeruzaalemu. Nze Dariyo nze nnangiridde kino; njagala kituukirizibwe n'obwegendereza.”" 
Ezra6:13 Tattenayi owessaza Emitala w'Omugga, Setari-Bozenayi ne bannaabwe ne batuukiriza n'obwegendereza ekirangiriro kya kabaka Dariyo kye yali ayisizza." 
Ezra6:14 Bwe kityo abakadde mu Bayudaaya ogw'okuzimba ne gubalamira, nga bwe bawagirwa n'okulanga kwa Aggayi omulanzi ne Zakariya mutabani wa Yiddo. Baamaliriza okuzimba, nga Katonda wa Yisirayeli bwe yali alagidde, n'ebirangiriro bya Kuuro, Dariyo ne Arutakesasuta bakabaka ba Buperusi bwe byali bigambye." 
Ezra6:15 Ekiggwa kya Katonda kyamalirizibwa ku lunaku olwokusatu olw'omwezi Adari, mu mwaka ogwomunaana ogw'obufuzi bwa kabaka Dariyo." 
Ezra6:16 Abayisirayeli, kwe kugamba, bakabona, Abaleevi n'abantu abalala abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse, ne batukuza Ekiggwa kya Katonda ekyo mu ssanyu." 
Ezra6:17 Olw'okutukuza Ekiggwa kya Katonda ekyo, baaleeta ente ennume kikumi, endiga ennume ebikumi bibiri, obuliga obulume ebikumi bina, n'embuzi ennume kkumi na bbiri, okwenkana n'ebika bya Yisirayeli, olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ku lwa Yisirayeli yenna." 
Ezra6:18 Bakabona ne babassa mu biti byabwe n'Abaleevi mu bisanja byabwe mu kuweereza Omukama mu Yeruzaalemu, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi omubereberye abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse ne bakuza Pasika. 
Ezra6:20 Bakabona n'Abaleevi beetukuza; bonna nga balongoofu. Abaleevi ne batta akaliga ka Pasika olw'abaali bavudde mu buwaŋŋanguse, ku lwa baganda baabwe bakabona ne ku lwabwe bennyini." 
Ezra6:21 Abayisirayeli abaali bavudde mu buwaŋŋanguse ne bakalya, era wamu n'abo bonna abaali beewaze empisa embi ez'ab'amawanga abaali mu nsi n'abo ababeetoolodde, nga baagala okunoonya Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Ezra6:22 Baakuza Embaga y'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse okumala ennaku musanvu nga basanyufu, kubanga Omukama yali abasanyusizza bwe yakyusiza gye bali omutima gwa kabaka wa Assuri n'abayamba mu mulimu gw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Ezra7:1 Oluvannyuma, mu biseera bya Arutakesasuta kabaka wa Buperusi, Ezira mutabani wa Seraaya, mutabani wa Azariya, mutabani wa Kilukiya," 
Ezra7:2 mutabani wa Sallumu, mutabani wa Zadoki, mutabani wa Akitubu," 
Ezra7:3 mutabani wa Amariya, mutabani wa Azariya, mutabani wa Meraayoti," 
Ezra7:4 mutabani wa Zerakiya, mutabani wa Wuzzi, mutabani wa Bukki," 
Ezra7:5 mutabani wa Abisuwa, mutabani wa Finekasi, mutabani wa Eleyazari, mutabani wa Aroni kabona omukulu," 
Ezra7:6 Ezira oyo, yayambuka okuva e Babiloni. Yali muwandiisi, omukugu mu Tteeka lya Musa Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli lye yawa. Kabaka yamuwa buli kyonna kye yasaba, kubanga omukono gw'Omukama Katonda we gwamuliko." 
Ezra7:7 Abamu mu Bayisirayeli, nga mwe muli ne bakabona, Abaleevi, abayimbi, abaggazi n'abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa, baayambuka e Yeruzaalemu mu mwaka ogwomusanvu ogwa kabaka Arutakesasuta." 
Ezra7:8 Ezira yajja mu Yeruzaalemu mu mwezi ogwokutaano, mu mwaka ogwomusanvu ogwa kabaka." 
Ezra7:9 Yasitula okuva e Babiloni ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi omubereberye, n'atuuka mu Yeruzaalemu ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogwokutaano, kubanga omukono omulungi ogwa Katonda we gwamuliko." 
Ezra7:10 Ezira yali yassaako omwoyo ku kuyiga Etteeka ly'Omukama, ku kulituukiriza, ne ku kuyigiriza amateeka n'ebiragiro mu Yisirayeli." 
Ezra7:11 Ebbaluwa yali efaanana bw'eti kabaka Arutakesasuta gye yawa Ezira kabona, omuwandiisi era omukugu ku bikwata ku mateeka g'Omukama n'ebiragiro bye eri Yisirayeli:" 
Ezra7:12 “Arutakesasuta kabaka wa bakabaka, eri Ezira kabona, omuwandiisi w'Etteeka lya Katonda w'eggulu. Nkulamusizza." 
Ezra7:13 “Mpisizza ekirangiriro nti: mu bwakabaka bwange buli yenna ow'omu bantu ba Yisirayeli, nga mwe muli ne bakabona n'Abaleevi, ayagala okugenda naawe mu Yeruzaalemu, agende." 
Ezra7:14 Otumiddwa kabaka n'ab'olukiiko lwe omusanvu ogende onoonyereze mu Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu Etteeka lya Katonda wo eryo ly'olina nga bwe ligamba. 
Ezra7:15 Ojja kutwala ffeeza ne zaabu kabaka n'ab'olukiiko lwe gwe batonedde kyeyagalire Katonda wa Yisirayeli, alina ekisulo kye mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra7:16 Okwo kw'onoogatta ffeeza yenna ne zaabu gw'onooba osobodde okufuna mu ssaza lyonna ery'e Babiloni, n'ebinaatonebwa kyeyagalire abantu ne bakabona olw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda waabwe mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra7:17 Weeyambise ssente ezo n'obwegendereza ogule ente ennume, endiga ennume, n'obuliga obulume, n'ebitone eby'obuwunga n'eby'okuyiwa, obiweerereze ku mwaliiro gw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda wammwe ekiri mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Ggwe ne baganda bo muyinza okukozesa nga bwe mulaba ffeeza ne zaabu ebifisseewo, nga muluŋŋamizibwa Katonda wammwe ky'ayagala." 
Ezra7:19 “Ebintu byonna ebikuweebwa olw'okuweereza mu Kiggwa kya Katonda wo bituuse mu maaso ga Katonda mu Yeruzaalemu. 
Ezra7:20 N'ebirala byonna by'olina okugula, ebineetaagibwanga mu Kiggwa kya Katonda, okyayinza okubisasuliranga ng'oggya mu nkuluze ya kabaka." 
Ezra7:21 Era nze kabaka Arutakesasuta nnangiridde nti abawanika abali Emitala w'Omugga, buli kyonna Ezira kabona, omuwandiisi w'etteeka lya Katonda w'eggulu, ky'abasabanga, muteekwanga okukimuwa," 
Ezra7:22 okutuusa ku talenta kikumi eza ffeeza, kori kikumi ez'eŋŋano, bati kikumi ez'evviini, bati kikumi ez'omuzigo; gwo omunnyo teguliiko kkomo lyawandiikibwa." 
Ezra7:23 Kyonna Katonda w'eggulu ky'alangiridde, kikolebwenga n'obwegendereza ku lw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda w'eggulu. Ggwe lwaki obusungu bwandijjidde eŋŋoma ya kabaka n'eya batabani be?" 
Ezra7:24 Naye mumanye nti temulina buyinza kuweesa musolo mugereke oba gwa kikungo n'empooza bakabona, Abaleevi, abayimbi, abaggazi, abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa, n'abakozi abalala mu Kiggwa kya Katonda." 
Ezra7:25 “Ate ggwe, Ezira, ng'ogoberera amagezi ga Katonda wo g'olina, ssaawo abalamuzi n'abakubirizi, balamule abantu bonna abali Emitala w'Omugga, kwe kugamba nti abo abamanyi Etteeka lya Katonda wo. Abatalimanyi mubayigirize." 
Ezra7:26 Buli yenna atatuukiriza Tteeka lya Katonda wo na tteeka lya kabaka ateekwa okusalirwa ekibonerezo kya kufa, oba kya kugobebwa, oba kya kubowebwako bibye, oba kya kusibirwa mu kkomera.”" 
Ezra7:27 Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaffe agulumizibwe, eyatadde mu mutima gwa kabaka eky'okugulumiza mu ngeri eno Ekiggwa ky'Omukama ekiri mu Yeruzaalemu," 
Ezra7:28 era eyandeetedde okugirirwa ekisa kabaka, ab'olukiiko be n'abakungu be ab'obuyinza. Kubanga omukono gwa Katonda wange gwandiko, naguma ne nkuŋŋaanya abakulembeze mu Yisirayeli bagende nange." 
Ezra8:1 Bano be bakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe n'amazadde gaabwe, abo abaayambuka nange okuva mu Babiloni mu biseera bya kabaka Arutakesasuta:" 
Ezra8:2 Mu batabani ba Finekasi, Gerusomu; mu batabani ba Yitamari, Danyeli; mu bazzukulu ba Dawudi, Kattusi," 
Ezra8:3 mutabani wa Sekaniya; mu bazzukulu ba Parosi, Zakariya, awamu naye abasajja abaawandiikibwa kikumi mu ataano;" 
Ezra8:4 mu bazzukulu ba Pakati-Mowabu, Eliyowenayi, mutabani wa Zerakiya, wamu naye abasajja ebikumi bibiri;" 
Ezra8:5 mu bazzukulu ba Sekaniya, mutabani wa Yakaziyeli, awamu naye abasajja ebikumi bisatu;" 
Ezra8:6 mu bazzukulu ba Adini, Ebedi mutabani wa Yonatani, awamu naye abasajja amakumi ataano;" 
Ezra8:7 mu bazzukulu ba Elamu, Yesaaya mutabani wa Ataliya, awamu naye abasajja nsanvu;" 
Ezra8:8 mu bazzukulu ba Sefatiya, Zebediya mutabani wa Mikayeli, awamu naye abasajja kinaana;" 
Ezra8:9 mu bazzukulu ba Yowabu, Obadiya mutabani wa Yekiyeli, awamu naye abasajja ebikumi bibiri mu kkumi na munaana;" 
Ezra8:10 mu bazzukulu ba Selomiti mutabani wa Yosifiya, awamu naye abasajja kikumi mu nkaaga;" 
Ezra8:11 Mu bazzukulu ba Bebayi, Zakariya mutabani wa Bebayi, awamu naye abasajja amakumi abiri mu munaana;" 
Ezra8:12 mu bazzukulu ba Azugadi, Yokanani mutabani wa Kakkatani, awamu naye abasajja kikumi mu kkumi;" 
Ezra8:13 mu bazzukulu ba Adonikamu, abajja oluvannyuma, gano ge mannya gaabwe: Elifeleti, Yeweli, ne Semaaya, awamu naye abasajja nkaaga;" 
Ezra8:14 mu bazzukulu ba Biguvayi, Wutayi mutabani wa Zakkuri, awamu naye abasajja nsanvu." 
Ezra8:15 Nabakuŋŋaanyiza ku mukutu oguyiwa ku Awava, ne tusiisira awo ennaku ssatu. Natunula mu bantu ne mu bakabona naye saasangamu bazzukulu ba Leevi." 
Ezra8:16 Kwe kutumya Eliyezeri, Ariyeli, Semaaya, Elunatani, Yaribu, Elunatani, Natani, Zakariya, Mesullamu abaali abakulembeze, ne Yowaribu ne Elunatani abasajja abakalabakalaba," 
Ezra8:17 ne mbasindika ewa Yiddo, omukulu mu kifo ky'e Kasifiya, nga mbagambye bagambe Yiddo ne baganda be, abakola ogw'obuweereza bw'Ekiggwa, abawe batuleetere abanaaweereza mu Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe." 
Ezra8:18 Kubanga omukono gwa Katonda waffe gwatuliko, ne batuleetera omusajja omugezi ennyo, omu ku bazzukulu ba Makuli mutabani wa Leevi, mutabani wa Yisirayeli; ye Serebiya, wamu ne bazzukulu be ne baganda be, abasajja kkumi na munaana;" 
Ezra8:19 ne Kasabiya awamu naye Yesaaya, omu ku bazzukulu ba Merari, ne bazzukulu be ne baganda be, abasajja amakumi abiri." 
Ezra8:20 Baleeterako n'abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa, abo Dawudi n'abakungu be be baali batonzeewo okuyamba ku Baleevi; baali ebikumi bibiri mu abiri. Bonna ne bawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe." 
Ezra8:21 Eyo ku mugga Awava nalangiririrayo ekisiibo, twetoowaze mu maaso ga Katonda waffe, tumusabe atuwe, ffe, abaana baffe n'ebyaffe byonna, olugendo olulungi." 
Ezra8:22 Zo ensonyi zankwata ne sisaba kabaka bakuumi na beebagazi ku mbalaasi ab'okututaasa abalabe mu kkubo, kubanga twali tugambye kabaka nti: “Omukono gwa Katonda waffe omulungi guli ku bonna abamunoonya abakuume, naye obuyinza n'obusungu bwe bijjira abo bonna abamuvaako.”" 
Ezra8:23 Twasiiba ne twegayirira Katonda waffe ku nsonga eno; Omukama n'awulira okwegayirira kwaffe. 
Ezra8:24 Mu bakulu ba bakabona ne njawulako kkumi na babiri, wamu ne Serebiya, Kasabiya, n'abalala kkumi okuva mu baganda baabwe," 
Ezra8:25 ne mbapimira ffeeza, zaabu n'ebintu kabaka, ab'olukiiko lwe, abakungu be, n'Abayisirayeli bonna abaaliwo, bye baali batonedde Ekiggwa kya Katonda waffe." 
Ezra8:26 Nabapimira mu mikono gyabwe ffeeza wa talenta lukaaga mu ataano, n'ebintu ebya ffeeza ebizitowa talenta kikumi; zaabu wa talenta kikumi," 
Ezra8:27 ebikompe ebya zaabu makumi abiri nga bivaamu dariki eza zaabu lukumi, n'ebibya eby'ekikomo ebimasamasa obulungi ennyo bibiri, eby'omuwendo nga zaabu." 
Ezra8:28 Ne mbagamba nti: “Mmwe muwongeddwa Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, era nga n'ebintu bino bwe biwongeddwa. Ffeeza ne zaabu bitoneddwa kyeyagalire Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjaffe." 
Ezra8:29 Mubirabirire, mubikuume okutuusa lwe munaabipimira mu bisenge by'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama mu maaso g'abakulu ba bakabona, Abaleevi n'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe eza Yisirayeli mu Yeruzaalemu.”" 
Ezra8:30 Bakabona n'Abaleevi ne batwala ffeeza ne zaabu n'ebintu ebyali bibapimiddwa, babituuse e Yeruzaalemu mu Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe." 
Ezra8:31 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ebbiri olw'omwezi omubereberye, ne tusitula okuva ku mugga Awava, tugende e Yeruzaalemu. Omukono gwa Katonda waffe gwatuliko, gwatuwonya abalabe n'abanyazi mu kkubo." 
Ezra8:32 Ne tutuuka mu Yeruzaalemu, ne tuwummulako awo ennaku ssatu." 
Ezra8:33 Ku lunaku olwokuna ffeeza, zaabu n'ebintu ebitukuvu ne tubipima mu Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe; twabikwasa Meremoti mutabani wa Wuriya kabona, yali ne Eleyazari mutabani wa Finekasi; abaali nabo ye Yozabadi mutabani wa Yeswa ne Nowadiya mutabani wa Binnuyi Omuleevi." 
Ezra8:34 Buli kintu kyabalibwa omuwendo gwakyo n'obuzito bwakyo; obuzito bwonna awamu ne buwandiikibwa ku olwo. 
Ezra8:35 Abawaŋŋangusibwa, abaali baakadda okuva mu busibe, ne baweereza Katonda wa Yisirayeli ebitambiro ebyokye: ente ennume kkumi na bbiri ku lwa Yisirayeli yenna, endiga ennume kyenda mu mukaaga, obuliga obulume nsanvu mu musanvu, embuzi ennume kkumi na bbiri ez'ekitambiro olw'ekibi. Byonna byaweerezebwa Omukama ng'ekitambiro ekyokye." 
Ezra8:36 Baatuusa n'ebiragiro bya kabaka eri abakungu be: abafuzi b'amatwale n'abaamasaza abafuga Emitala w'Omugga, bano ne bayamba abantu n'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Ezra9:1 Oluvannyuma, abakulembeze bajja gye ndi nga bagamba nti: “Abantu ba Yisirayeli, nga mwe muli ne bakabona n'Abaleevi, balemeddwa okwewala abantu b'ensi n'empisa zaabwe ezeenyinyalwa: Abakanaani, Abakitti, Abaperizzi, Abayebusi, Abammoni, Abamowabu, Abamisiri n'Abaamori." 
Ezra9:2 Bawasizza abamu ku bawala baabwe ne babawasiza ne batabani baabwe, ne batabika olulyo olutukuvu n'abantu b'ensi zino. Abakulembeze n'abakungu be bakulembedde mu kusobya kuno.”" 
Ezra9:3 Bwe nawulira ekigambo ekyo, ne njuza ekkanzu yange n'omunagiro gwange, ne nkuunyuula ekirevu kyange n'enviiri ku mutwe gwange, ne ntuula awo nga mpuniikiridde." 
Ezra9:4 Bonna abatya olw'ebigambo bya Katonda wa Yisirayeli ne bakuŋŋaanira we ndi olw'okusobya kw'ababadde mu buwaŋŋanguse. Natuula awo nga mpuniikiridde okutuusa ku kitambiro eky'akawungeezi. 
Ezra9:5 Mu kutambira okw'akawungeezi nasituka ne nva mu buyinike bwange; mu kkanzu yange n'omunagiro gwange ebiyulifu, ne nfukamira ku maviivi gange, ne ngololera emikono gyange Omukama Katonda wange," 
Ezra9:6 ne neegayirira nti: “Ayi Katonda wange, nswadde, n'ensonyi zinkwata okukusitulira amaaso gange, kubanga ebyonoono byaffe byetuumye ne bisukka n'emitwe gyaffe, n'omusango gwaffe munene gukwata eyo ku ggulu." 
Ezra9:7 Okuva mu budde bwa bajjajjaffe n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero, omusango gwaffe gubadde munene. Olw'okubeera ebibi byaffe kyetwava tuweebwayo, ffe, bakabaka baffe ne bakabona baffe, mu mikono gya bakabaka b'ensi endala n'eri ekitala, mu busibe, mu kunyagibwa ne mu kuswala nga ne bwe kiri kati." 
Ezra9:8 Wuuno kati mu kabanga kano ekisa tukisanze ew'Omukama Katonda waffe, n'atulekerawo abaasigalawo, n'atuteerawo ekisulo ekinywevu mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, bw'atyo Katonda waffe n'amulisa amaaso gaffe, n'atuwa akalembereza mu buddu bwaffe," 
Ezra9:9 yadde tuli baddu, ne mu buddu bwaffe Katonda waffe teyatulekerera, naye yatugirira ekisa kye ekitagooka mu maaso ga bakabaka ba Buperusi, n'atuzzaamu obulamu, tuzimbe Ekiggwa kya Katonda waffe, ebifulukwa byakyo biddaabirizibwe, n'atuwa obwewogomo mu Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezra9:10 “Nga bwe biri biti, Katonda waffe, tugambe ki? Anti ebiragiro byo twabivaako," 
Ezra9:11 bye wawa ng'oyita mu baweereza bo abalanzi, ng'ogamba nti: ‘Ensi mmwe gye mugenda okuyingira efuuke eyammwe, nsi eyajaajaamizibwa obugwagwa bw'abantu baamu; olw'empisa zaabwe ezeenyinyalwa baagijjuza obugwagwa bwabwe okuva gy'eva okutuuka gy'ekoma." 
Ezra9:12 Awo nno bawala bammwe temubafumbizanga batabani baabwe, ne bawala baabwe temubawasizanga batabani bammwe. Temunoonyanga omulundi n'ogumu kubeera nabo mu ddembe, yadde okweyagalira mu mikisa gyabwe, lwe muliba ab'amaanyi ne mweliira ebirungi by'omu nsi eyo, ne mubirekera batabani bammwe ng'obusika obw'emirembe gyonna.’" 
Ezra9:13 “Bino byonna byatutuukako olw'ebikolwa byaffe ebibi, n'olw'omusango gwaffe omunene; naye ggwe, Katonda waffe, watubonereza kitono okugerera ku bibi byaffe kye byali bigwanira, n'otuleka ne tusigalawo, nga bwe tuli kaakati." 
Ezra9:14 Era tunaddamu okumenya ebiragiro byo, ne tuwasaŋŋana n'abantu bano ab'empisa ezeenyinyalwa? Olwo tolisinzaawo okutusunguwalira, n'otusaanyaawo nga toleseewo n'asigalawo, kaawonawo?" 
Ezra9:15 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, oli mutuukirivu, kubanga tusigaddewo nga bakaawonawo nga bwe kiri olwa leero. Tuutuno, tuli mu maaso go n'emisango gyaffe; olw'okubeera gyo tetuguma na kuyimirira mu maaso go.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ezira bwe yali yeegayirira, nga yeetonda eno bw'akaaba, nga yeeyaze wansi mu maaso g'Ekiggwa kya Katonda, ekibiina kinene eky'abasajja, abakazi n'abaana Abayisirayeli ne kikuŋŋaanira w'ali; nabo ne bakaaba nnyo." 
Ezra10:2 Sekaniya mutabani wa Yekiyeli asibuka mu baana ba Elamu, n'ayanukula Ezira nti: “Twasobya ewa Katonda waffe bwe twawasa abakazi abagwira mu bantu b'ensi eno. Newandibadde bwe guli, era Yisirayeli akyalimu ku ssuubi." 
Ezra10:3 Ka tukole endagaano n'Omukama Katonda waffe, abakazi bonna tubagobe wamu n'abaana baabwe, okusinziira ku nteesa yo, mukama wange, n'ey'abo abatya ebiragiro by'Omukama Katonda waffe. Tukole ng'Etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Ezra10:4 Situkiramu. Kola omulimu gwo; tuli naawe, guma, kikole.”" 
Ezra10:5 Ezira n'asituka, n'alayiza abakulu ba bakabona, Abaleevi ne Yisirayeli yenna okukola ekyali kyanjuddwa. Ne balayira." 
Ezra10:6 Ezira n'ava mu maaso g'Ekiggwa kya Katonda n'agenda mu kisenge ewa Yokanani mutabani wa Eliyasibu, n'asula eyo nga takombye ku mmere yadde okunywa ku tuzzi, kubanga yali akyanyolwa olw'ekyonoono ky'abaali bavudde mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Ezra10:7 Ekirangiriro ne kiyita wonna mu Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu eri abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse bonna okukuŋŋaanira mu Yeruzaalemu. 
Ezra10:8 Buli yandiremereddwa okutuusa mu nnaku ssatu, abafuzi n'abakadde baali bateesezza nti ebintu bye byonna biboowebwe, naye yennyini aggyibwe mu kibiina ky'abo abawaŋŋangusibwa." 
Ezra10:9 Mu nnaku ssatu abasajja bonna aba Yuda n'ab'ekika kya Benyamiini baali bamaze okukuŋŋaanira mu Yeruzaalemu. Mu mwezi ogwomwenda, ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri olw'omwezi, abantu bonna ne batuula mu luggya lw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda; baali bakankana olw'ensonga eyo n'olw'enkuba." 
Ezra10:10 Ezira kabona n'asituka n'abagamba nti: “Mwasobya, mwawasa abakazi abagwira, ne mwongereza ku misango gya Yisirayeli." 
Ezra10:11 Kale nno muwe ettendo Omukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe, mukole ky'ayagala. Mweyawule ku bantu b'ensi eno ne ku bakazi bammwe abagwira.”" 
Ezra10:12 Ekibiina kyonna ne kyanukula n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Ddala, nga bw'ogambye bwe tunaakola." 
Ezra10:13 Naye kubanga abantu bangi, n'ebiseera bya nkuba, tetusobola kusigala bweru. Ate guno si gwe mulimu ogw'olunaku olumu oba ebbiri, anti twasobya nnyo mu nsonga eno." 
Ezra10:14 Ka abakulembeze baffe bakiikirire ekibiina. Olwo abantu okuva mu bibuga byaffe abaawasa abakazi abagwira, bajje mu kiseera ekiweereddwa, nga kujjirako abakadde n'abalamuzi aba buli kibuga, okutuusa obusungu bwa Katonda waffe obwesera olw'ekibi kino lwe bunaakyukira eri ne butuvaako.”" 
Ezra10:15 Yonatani mutabani wa Asaweli ne Yakuzeeya mutabani wa Tikuva, be bokka abaakiwakanya, mpozzi ne Mesullamu, Sabbetayi n'Abaleevi abaabawagira." 
Ezra10:16 Abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse ne bakola batyo. Ezira kabona n'alonda abasajja abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, omu omu okuva mu buli lunyiriri, ng'agoberera erinnya lya buli omu. Ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi, ne batuula okwekenneenya ensonga." 
Ezra10:17 Ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi, ne bamaliriza okukola ku basajja bonna abaali bawasizza abakazi abagwira." 
Ezra10:18 Mu baana ba bakabona abaasangibwamu nga bawasizza abakazi abagwira baali: mu bazzukulu ba Yeswa bazzukulu wa Yozadaki ne baganda be: Maaseeya, Eliyezeri, Yaribu ne Gedaliya." 
Ezra10:19 Bonna beeyama okugoba bakazi baabwe, ate n'okuleeta endiga ennume okuva mu magana ey'ekitambiro eky'omusango olw'emisango gyabwe." 
Ezra10:20 Mu bazzukulu ba Yimmeri: Kanani ne Zebadiya; 
Ezra10:21 mu bazzukulu ba Karimu: Maaseeya, Eliya, Semaaya, Yekiyeli ne Wuzziya;" 
Ezra10:22 mu bazzukulu ba Pasukuru: Eliyowenayi, Maaseeya, Yisimayeli, Netaneli, Yozabadi ne Eleyasa." 
Ezra10:23 Mu Baleevi: Yozabadi, Simeyi, Kelaaya oba Kelita, Petakiya, Yuda ne Eliyezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Mu bayimbi: Eliyasibu; mu baggazi: Sallumu, Telemu ne Wuri." 
Ezra10:25 Mu Bayisirayeli abalala: mu bazzukulu ba Parosi: Ramiya, Yizziya, Malukiya, Miyamini, Eleyazari, Malukiya ne Benaaya;" 
Ezra10:26 mu bazzukulu ba Elamu: Mattaniya, Zakariya, Yekiyeli, Abudi, Yeremoti, ne Eliya;" 
Ezra10:27 mu bazzukulu ba Zattu: Eliyowenayi, Eliyasibu, Mattaniya, Yeremoti, Zabadi ne Aziza;" 
Ezra10:28 mu bazzukulu ba Bebayi: Yokanani, Ananiya, Zabbayi, Atulayi;" 
Ezra10:29 mu bazzukulu ba Bani: Mesullamu, Malluki, Adaaya, Yasubu, Seyali ne Yeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Mu bazzukulu ba Pakati-Mowabu: Aduna, Kelali, Benaaya, Maaseeya, Mattaniya, Bazaleli, Binnuyi ne Manasse;" 
Ezra10:31 mu bazzukulu ba Karimu: Eliyezeri, Yissiya, Malukiya, Semaaya, Simewoni," 
Ezra10:32 Benyamiini, Malluki ne Semariya;" 
Ezra10:33 mu bazzukulu ba Kasumi: Mattenayi, Mattatta, Zabadi, Elifeleti, Yeremayi, Manasse, Simeyi;" 
Ezra10:34 mu bazzukulu ba Bani: Maadayi, Amuramu, Wuyeli," 
Ezra10:35 Benaaya, Bedeeya, Keluwi," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniya, Meremoti, Eliyasibu," 
Ezra10:37 Mattaniya, Mattenayi ne Yaasu;" 
Ezra10:38 mu bazzukulu ba Binnuyi: Simeyi," 
Ezra10:39 Selemiya, Natani, Adaaya," 
Ezra10:40 Makunadebayi, Sasayi, Sarayi," 
Ezra10:41 Azareli, Selemiya, Semariya," 
Ezra10:42 Sallumu, Amariya, ne Yozefu;" 
Ezra10:43 mu bazzukulu ba Nebo: Yeyeli, Mattitiya, Zabadi, Zebina, Yaddayi, Yoweli ne Benaaya." 
Ezra10:44 Bano bonna baali bawasizza abakazi abagwira, era abamu baali bazadde n'abaana mu bakazi bano." 
Nehemiah1:1 Ebigambo bya Nekemiya mutabani wa Kakaliya. Mu mwezi Kisulevi, omwaka ogw'amakumi abiri, bwe nali mu kigo ky'e Susa," 
Nehemiah1:2 Kanani omu ku baganda bange n'ajja ng'ava mu Yuda, yali n'abasajja abamu; ne mbabuuza ebifa ku basajja okuva mu Yuda bakaawonawo abaali basumattuse obuwaŋŋanguse, ne ku Yeruzaalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Ne baŋŋamba nti: “Bakaawonawo abaasumattuka obuwaŋŋanguse abaddayo mu kitundu ky'eyo, bali mu kabi kanene na mu buswavu, ne bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu yamenyebwa, n'emiryango gyaggya omuliro.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Bwe nawulira ebigambo ebifaanana bityo, natuula ne nkaaba. Namala ennaku nga nkungubaga; nasiibanga ne nsaba mu maaso ga Katonda w'eggulu." 
Nehemiah1:5 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Katonda w'eggulu, nkwegayiridde, Katonda omukulu, ow'entiisa, akuumira endagaano n'ekisa abakwagala n'abakwata ebiragiro byo," 
Nehemiah1:6 okutu kwo kuwulirize n'amaaso go gazibukire essaala y'omuweereza wo eyeegayirira mu maaso go emisana n'ekiro nga nsabira abaweereza bo Abayisirayeli. Neetonda olw'ensobi z'Abayisirayeli, nange n'ab'ennyumba ya kitange ze twakusobya." 
Nehemiah1:7 Twakola bubi nnyo gy'oli; tetwakwata biragiro, amateeka n'ennamula bye walagira Musa omuweereza wo." 
Nehemiah1:8 “Jjukira ebigambo bye walagira Musa omuweereza wo, n'ogamba nti: ‘Bwe muliba mweyisizza bubi, ŋŋenda kubasaasaanya mu mawanga;" 
Nehemiah1:9 naye bwe muliba mukomyewo gye ndi ne mukwata ebiragiro byange ne mubissa mu nkola, abawaŋŋangusibwa bo ne bwe baliba ewala eggulu gye likoma, ndibakuŋŋaanyaayo eyo ne mbakomyawo mu kifo kye nalonda kibeere ekisulo ky'erinnya lyange.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 Abo bennyini baweereza bo era bantu bo, be wanunula n'obuyinza obungi, n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi." 
Nehemiah1:11 Ayi Mukama, okutu kwo kuwulirize essaala y'omuwereza wo n'okw'abaweereza bo abeegomba okuwa erinnya lyo ekitiibwa; omuweereza wo muwe ebintu bimulamire olwa leero, omuwe omusajja ono amusangeko ekisa.” Nze nali omusenero wa kabaka." 
Nehemiah2:1 Mu mwezi ogwa Nisani, mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri ogwa kabaka Arutakesasuta, evviini n'ereeterwa kabaka, ne nkwata evviini ne ngimuwa. Nali sibangako munakuwavu mu maaso ge." 
Nehemiah2:2 Kabaka kwe kumbuuza nti: “Lwaki oli munakuwavu, ate nga toli mulwadde? Ekyo si kirala wabula nnaku ekuli ku mutima.” Ne ntya nnyo," 
Nehemiah2:3 naye ne ŋŋamba kabaka nti: “Kabaka awangaale emirembe gyonna! Lwaki sandinakuwadde ng'ekibuga ky'ebiggya bya bajjajjange kati matongo, n'emiryango gyakyo gyasaanyizibwawo omuliro?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Kabaka n'ambuuza nti: “Osaba ki kati?” Ne nsaba Katonda w'eggulu," 
Nehemiah2:5 ne ŋŋamba kabaka nti: “Bwe kubeera nga kwe kusiima kwa kabaka, ng'omuweereza wo asanze ekisa mu maaso go, ntuma mu kibuga kya Yuda eri ebiggya bya bajjajjange, nkizimbe.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Kabaka, ne nnaabakyala yali amutudde awo, n'ambuuza nti: “Olugendo lunaakutwalira bbanga ki, ate olidda ddi?” Kabaka n'akkiriza okunsindika, nange ne mutegeeza ebbanga." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ne ŋŋamba kabaka nti: “Bwe kubeera nga kwe kusiima kwa kabaka, mpeebwe ebbaluwa nzitwalire abaamasaza Emitala w'Omugga, banzikirize okuyitawo, okutuusa lwe ndituuka mu Yuda." 
Nehemiah2:8 Era nfune ebbaluwa okuva ewa Asafu akuuma ekibira kya Kabaka, ampe emiti, nsobole okuteeka emyango ku miryango gy'omunaala gw'Ekiggwa, ku lwa bbugwe w'ekibuga ne ku lw'ennyumba mwe ndisula.” Kabaka n'ampa, kubanga omukono gwa Katonda omulungi gwandiko." 
Nehemiah2:9 Ne nzija eri abaamasaza Emitala w'Omugga, ne mbawa ebbaluwa kabaka gye yawandiika. Kabaka yali ansindise awamu n'abakulu mu ggye n'abeebagazi." 
Nehemiah2:10 Naye Sanuballati Omukoroni ne Tobiya omukungu Omwammoni ne banakuwala bya kitalo okulaba nga waliwo omuntu azze okukolerera obulungi bw'Abayisirayeli. 
Nehemiah2:11 Ne nzija e Yeruzaalemu; nga mmazeeyo ennaku ssatu," 
Nehemiah2:12 ne nsituka mu kiro n'abasajja abatono be nali nabo. Saaliko gwe mbuulira Katonda wange kye yali antadde mu mutima nkikole mu Yeruzaalemu; saalina kisolo kirala kyonna, wabula ensolo kwe nali neebagadde." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ekiro ekyo ne nfuluma nga mpita mu Mulyango ogw'Ekiwonvu, nzuuyo ku Luzzi lwa Ssessota, okutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Olubungo; nali nekkaanya bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu eyali amenyeddwa, n'emiryango gyakyo egyali gisaanyiziddwawo omuliro." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ne neeyongerayo okulaga ku Mulyango gw'Oluzzi ne ku Kidiba kya Kabaka, naye ensolo kwe nali ntudde tewaali kifo w'egya kuyitira." 
Nehemiah2:15 Bwe ntyo ne nnyambuka ekiwonvu mu nzikiza, ne nekkaanya bbugwe; oluvannyuma ne nkomawo ne nyingira nga mpita mu Mulyango gw'Ekiwonvu." 
Nehemiah2:16 Abaami baali tebamanyi gye ndaze yadde kye nkola, kubanga nali sinnabuulirako Bayudaaya, yadde bakabona, abakungu, abafuzi n'abalala bonna abaali ab'okukola omulimu." 
Nehemiah2:17 Ne mbagamba nti: “Mumanyi ennaku gye tulimu, kubanga Yeruzaalemu matongo n'emiryango gyakyo omuliro gwagyokya; mujje tuzimbe bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu, tukome okuswala.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Ne mbategeeza ng'omukono gwa Katonda omulungi bwe gwandiko, n'ebyo kabaka bye yali aŋŋambye. Ne bagamba nti: “Tusitukiremu tuzimbe.” Ne beekemba okukola omulimu omulungi." 
Nehemiah2:19 Naye Sanuballati Omukoroni, Tobiya omukungu Omwammoni ne Gesemu Omuwarabu bwe baawulira, ne batusekerera, ne batugaya, ne bagamba nti: “Kiki kino kye mukola? Mujeemera kabaka?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Ne mbaanukula nga mbagamba nti: “Katonda w'eggulu ajja kutuwa birame; ffe tuli baweereza be, tujja kuzimba. Naye mmwe Yeruzaalemu temukirinaako mugabo, buyinza yadde ekijjukizo.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Eliyasibu kabona omukulu ne banne bakabona ne bessa ku kuzimba Omulyango gw'Endiga, ne bagutukuza, ne bassaamu emyango, ne bawangamu enzigi, ppata n'ebisiba, okutuuka ku Munaala gw'Ekikumi, ne bagutukuza, n'okutuuka ku munaala Kananeli." 
Nehemiah3:2 Awamuddirira abasajja b'e Yeriko ne baddaabirizaawo; awabaddirira Zakkuri mutabani wa Yimuri n'addaabirizaawo. 
Nehemiah3:3 Batabani ba Asseena ne bazimba Omulyango gw'Ebyennyanja; bassaamu emyango, ne bawangamu enzigi, ppata n'emiyingo gyagwo." 
Nehemiah3:4 Awabaddirira Meremoti mutabani wa Wuriya mutabani wa Akkozi n'addaabirizaawo. Awamuddirira Mesullamu mutabani wa Berekiya mutabani wa Mesezabeli n'addaabirizaawo; awamuddirira Zadoki mutabani wa Baana n'addaabirizaawo. 
Nehemiah3:5 Awamuddirira ab'e Tekowa ne baddaabirizaawo; bo abakungu baabwe tebeenyigira mu mulimu gwa Mukama waabwe. 
Nehemiah3:6 Yoyada mutabani wa Pasewa ne Mesullamu mutabani wa Besodeeya ne baddaabiriza Omulyango Omukadde, ne bassaamu emyango, ne bawangamu enzigi, ppata n'emiyingo gyagwo." 
Nehemiah3:7 Awabaddirira Melatiya ow'e Gibewoni ne Yadoni Omumeronoti, abasajja b'e Gibewoni n'e Mizupa abaali batwalibwa owessaza Emitala w'Omugga, ne baddaabirizaawo." 
Nehemiah3:8 Awabaddirira Wuzziyeli mutabani wa Karuwaaya, ow'omu bafukusi ba zaabu n'addaabirizaawo; awamuddirira Ananiya omutabuzi w'obuwoowo n'addaabirizaawo. Ne bagumya Yeruzaalemu okutuuka ku Bbugwe Omugazi." 
Nehemiah3:9 Awamuddirira Refaaya mutabani wa Kuru, omwami w'eggombolola y'ekyokubiri kya Yeruzaalemu n'addaabirizaawo." 
Nehemiah3:10 Awamuddirira Yedaaya mutabani wa Karumafu n'addaabirizaawo, kye kitundu ekyali kitunudde mu nnyumba ye; awamuddirira Kattusi mutabani wa Kasabuneeya n'addaabirizaawo." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malukiya mutabani wa Karimu ne Kassubi mutabani wa Pakati-Mowabu ne baddaabiriza ekitundu ekirala n'Omunaala gw'Obubiga. 
Nehemiah3:12 Awabaddirira Sallumu mutabani wa Kallokesi omwami w'eggombolola y'ekyokubiri kya Yeruzaalemu, ne bawala be, ne baddaabirizaawo." 
Nehemiah3:13 Kanuni n'ab'e Zanowa baddaabiriza Omulyango gw'Ekiwonvu; baaguzimba ne bawangamu enzigi, ppata n'emiyingo gyagwo, ne baddaabiriza n'emikono lukumi egya bbugwe okutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Olubungo." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malukiya mutabani wa Rekabu, omwami ow'eggombolola y'e Beti-Kakkeremu yazimba Omulyango gw'Olubungo, n'awangamu enzigi, ppata n'emiyingo gyagwo." 
Nehemiah3:15 Sallumu mutabani wa Koli-Koze, omwami w'eggombolola y'e Mizupa n'addaabiriza Omulyango gw'Oluzzi; yaguzimba n'agusereka, n'awangamu enzigi, ppata n'emiyingo gyagwo. Era yaddaabiriza n'ekisenge ky'Ekidiba kya Sela, okumpi n'ennimiro ya kabaka n'okutuukira ddala ku madaala, agaserengeta ng'ova mu Kibuga kya Dawudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Awamuddirira Nekemiya mutabani wa Azubuku, omwami w'eggombolola y'ekyokubiri ky'e Beti-Zuru yaddaabirizaawo okutuuka mu maaso g'Amasiro ga Dawudi, n'okutuuka ku kidiba ekisime, ne ku nnyumba y'Abazira." 
Nehemiah3:17 Awamuddirira, Abaleevi, nga bakulemberwa Rekumu mutabani wa Bani, baddaabirizaawo. Awabaddirira Kasabiya, omwami w'eggombolola y'ekyokubiri kya Keyila, yaddaabirizaawo ku lw'eggombolola ye." 
Nehemiah3:18 Awamuddirira, bannansi bannaabwe nga bakulemberwa Bavvayi mutabani wa Kenadadi, omwami w'eggombolola y'ekyokubiri kya Keyila, baddaabirizaawo." 
Nehemiah3:19 Awabaddirira Ezeri mutabani wa Yeswa afuga Mizupa yaddaabirizaawo, kye kitundu ekirala okuva mu maaso g'awambukirwa ku tterekero ly'ebyokulwanyisa okutuuka ku Nsonda." 
Nehemiah3:20 Awamuddirira Baruku mutabani wa Zabbayi yaddaabirizaawo n'obunyiikivu; kye kitundu ekirala okuva ku Nsonda okutuuka ku mulyango gw'ennyumba ya Eliyasibu kabona omukulu. 
Nehemiah3:21 Awamuddirira, Meremoti mutabani wa Wuriya mutabani wa Akkozi yaddaabirizaawo; kye kitundu ekyokubiri okuva ku mulyango gw'ennyumba ya Eliyasibu okutuuka ku nnyumba ya Eliyasibu w'ekoma." 
Nehemiah3:22 Awamuddirira, bakabona ab'omu miseetwe baddaabirizaawo." 
Nehemiah3:23 Awabaddirira, Benyamiini ne Kassubi baddaabiriza ekitundu ekitunudde mu nnyumba yaabwe; awabaddirira, Azariya mutabani wa Maaseeya, mutabani wa Ananiya, yaddaabiriza okumpi n'ennyumba ye." 
Nehemiah3:24 Awamuddirira, Binnuyi mutabani wa Kenadadi yaddaabiriza ekitundu ekirala, okuva ku nnyumba ya Azariya okutuuka ku nsonda ne ku ntabiro." 
Nehemiah3:25 Awamuddirira, Palali mutabani wa Wuzzayi yakola awatunudde mu nsonda ne mu Munaala ogusoolooba ku Lubiri olw'Engulu oluliraanye oluggya lw'Abakuumi. Awamuddirira, Padaaya mutabani wa Parosi" 
Nehemiah3:26 n'abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa abaasulanga ku kasozi Ofeli baddaabirizaawo okutuuka awatunudde ku Mulyango gw'Amazzi okwolekera ebuvanjuba n'Omunaala ogusooloobye. 
Nehemiah3:27 Awabaddirira, ab'e Tekowa baddaabiriza ekitundu ekirala, okuva ku Munaala ogusooloobye okutuuka ku Kisenge kya Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Bakabona baddaabiriza waggulu w'Omulyango gw'Embalaasi, buli omu ng'addaabiriza mu maaso g'ennyumba ye." 
Nehemiah3:29 Awabaddirira, Zadoki mutabani wa Yimmeri yaddaabiriza mu maaso g'ennyumba ye; awamuddirira Semaaya mutabani wa Sekaniya, omuggazi w'Omulyango gw'Ebuvanjuba yaddaabirizaawo." 
Nehemiah3:30 Awamuddirira, Ananiya mutabani wa Selemiya ne Kanuni mutabani wa Zalafu owoomukaga baddaabiriza ekitundu ekirala. Awabaddirira, Mesullamu mutabani wa Berekiya yaddaabiriza mu maaso g'omuzigo gwe." 
Nehemiah3:31 Awamuddirira, Malukiya, ow'omu bafukusi ba zaabu, yaddaabiriza okutuuka ku nnyumba y'abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa n'ey'abasuubuzi mu maaso g'Omulyango gw'Abakebezi okutuuka ku kisenge ekya waggulu eky'Ensonda." 
Nehemiah3:32 Abasuubuzi n'abafukusi ba zaabu baddaabiriza wakati w'ekisenge ekya waggulu eky'Ensonda n'Omulyango gw'Endiga. 
Nehemiah3:33 Sanuballati bwe yawulira nti tuzimba bbugwe, n'asunguwala, n'atwaka nnyo, n'avuma Abayudaaya." 
Nehemiah3:34 N'ayogera mu maaso ga banne n'abakungu b'e Samariya nti: “Abayudaaya bano abayengetufu bakola ki? Banazzaawo bbugwe? Balitambira ebitambiro? Banaamala mu lunaku lumu? Balisobola okuzza obulamu mu mayinja okuva mu ntuumu y'amafunfugu, ago agaafuuka ebisiriiza?”" 
Nehemiah3:35 Ne Tobiya ow'e Ammoni, eyamuli ku lusegere, n'ayongereza okwo nti: “Singa ekyo kye bazimba ekibe kimala kikirinnyako, kimenya n'ekisenge kyabwe eky'amayinja.”" 
Nehemiah3:36 Ayi Katonda waffe, wulira, kubanga tujoogebwa! Ebivumo byabwe gira bibaddire ku mitwe gyabwe; baleke bafuuke munyago mu nsi y'obusibe." 
Nehemiah3:37 Ekibi kyabwe tokibikkako; ekibi kyabwe tokisangula mu maaso go, kubanga bavumye abazimba." 
Nehemiah3:38 Bwe tutyo ne twongera okuzimba bbugwe, era mangu n'atuuka mu makkati, kubanga abantu baakola n'omutima gwabwe gwonna." 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanuballati, Tobiya, Abawarabu, Abammoni n'ab'e Asudodi bwe baawulira ng'okuddaabiriza bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu kugenda mu maaso, ng'amabanga gagenda gazibwa, ne basunguwala nnyo." 
Nehemiah4:2 Bonna ne beekoba bajje balwanyise Yeruzaalemu, bakireetemu okutabukatabuka." 
Nehemiah4:3 Ne tusaba ewa Katonda waffe, ne tussaawo omukuumi emisana n'ekiro okubeekuuma." 
Nehemiah4:4 Ate bo abantu ba Yuda baalinga bagamba nti: “Omwetissi amaanyi gamuwedde; amafunfugu mangi; tetujja kusobola kuzimba bbugwe.” 
Nehemiah4:5 N'abalabe baffe ne bagamba nti: “Baliba tebannamanya na kutulaba, ffe nga tubaguddemu, nga tubatta, omulimu nga tugukomya awo.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Abayudaaya abaali basula okumpi nabo ne bajja batugamba emirundi kkumi miramba nti: “Bajja kuva mu bifo wonna gye babeera batulumbe.” 
Nehemiah4:7 Nze kwe kuteeka abasajja abamu wansi ku bbugwe mu bifo ebyereere, nga mbatereezezza mu ndyo zaabwe, nga balina ebitala byabwe, amafumu gaabwe n'obusaale bwabwe." 
Nehemiah4:8 Bwe nekkaanya, ne nsituka, ne ŋŋamba abakungu, abalamuzi n'abantu abalala bonna nti: “Muleke kubatya. Mujjukire Omukama omukulu, ow'entiisa, mulwanirire baganda bammwe, batabani bammwe, bawala bammwe, bakazi bammwe n'ennyumba zammwe.”" 
Nehemiah4:9 Abalabe baffe ne bamanya nga tutegeezeddwako, ne Katonda ng'agootaanyizza entegeka zaabwe, ffe ne tudda ku kigo, buli omu ku mulimu gwe." 
Nehemiah4:10 Okuva ku olwo, ekitundu ekyokubiri eky'abakozi bange ne basigala ku mulimu, ate ekyokubiri ekirala nga bakutte amafumu, engabo, obusaale n'ebizibawo. Abakulembeze bonna ne baba mabega w'abantu bonna aba Yuda" 
Nehemiah4:11 abaali bazimba ekigo. Abaakolanga ogw'obwetissi omulimu baagukozesanga omukono ogumu, omulala nga gukutte ekyokulwanyisa." 
Nehemiah4:12 Abazimbi nabo baazimbanga buli omu ng'alina ekitala ku lukugunyu. Kyokka ye eyafuuwanga eŋŋombe yasigalanga we ndi. 
Nehemiah4:13 Ne ŋŋamba abakungu, abalamuzi n'abantu abalala bonna nti: “Omulimu munene ate mugazi, ku bbugwe buli omu asuulaganye ne munne;" 
Nehemiah4:14 ekifo we munaawulira eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe, mwenna mudduke mulage eyo. Katonda waffe ajja kutulwanirira.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Ne twongera bwe tutyo omulimu mu maaso; ekyokubiri kyaffe nga bakutte amafumu okuva ku mmambya ng'asala okutuusa emmunyeenye okuvaayo. 
Nehemiah4:16 Mu budde obwo nagamba abantu nti: “Buli omu asule n'omuweereza we mu Yeruzaalemu; ekiro batukolere ogw'okukuuma, emisana bakole.”" 
Nehemiah4:17 Nze, baganda bange, basajja bange n'abakuumi bange nga tetweyambula; buli omu ng'abeera n'ekyokulwanyisa kye mu mukono gwe." 
Nehemiah5:1 Ne wabaawo okwemulugunya kunene okuva mu bantu ne mu bakazi baabwe ku Bayudaaya bannaabwe. 
Nehemiah5:2 Waaliwo abaagambanga nti: “Ffe wamu ne batabani baffe ne bawala baffe tuli bangi; okubaako ke tulya tubeere balamu, tulina okufuna eŋŋano.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Abalala baagambanga nti: “Ennimiro zaffe, emizabbibu n'ennyumba zaffe twabisingayo tufune eŋŋano mu biseera eby'enjala.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Abandi bo nga bagamba nti: “Twewola ssente tusobole okusasula empooza ya kabaka ku nnimiro zaffe n'emizabbibu gyaffe. 
Nehemiah5:5 Newandibadde tuli ba mubiri gumu na musaayi gumu ne baganda baffe, ng'abaana baffe kye kimu n'abaabwe, naye batabani baffe ne bawala baffe tulina kubasingayo mu buddu. Bawala baffe abamu baatundibwa dda mu buddu, tetulina kye tuyinza kukola, kubanga ennimiro zaffe n'emizabbibu balala be babirina.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Bwe nawulira okwemulugunya kwabwe n'ensonga zino ne nsunguwala nnyo. 
Nehemiah5:7 Nazeefumiitirizaako mu mutima gwange, ne nvunaana abakungu n'abalamuzi. Nabagamba nti: “Mwenna buli omu mwaliika baganda bammwe ekiyitiridde.” Ne nkuŋŋaanya olukiiko lunene okubavunaana." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Tukoze kyonna kye tusobola, tununudde baganda baffe Abayudaaya abaali batundiddwa mu mawanga; ate kati mmwe mutunda baganda bammwe ate bo babatuguze?” Ne basirika, kubanga tebaalina kya kwogera." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ne mbagamba nti: “Kye mwakola si kirungi. Tekyandisinze ne mutambulira mu kutya Katonda waffe, abalabe baffe ab'amawanga baleme kutunyooma?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Nze, baganda bange, n'abaweereza bange twabawola ssente n'eŋŋano; tukomye eky'okuliika kino." 
Nehemiah5:11 Olwa leero mubaddize ennimiro zaabwe, emizabbibu, ennimiro z'oliva, amayumba gaabwe n'amagoba ge mubaliika, kye kyekikumi ku ŋŋano, evviini ensu n'omuzigo bye mubasaba.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Ne baddamu nti: “Tujja kubizzaayo, era tetujja kwongera kubasaba kantu; tujja kukola tutyo nga bw'ogambye.” Ne mpita bakabona, ne ndayiza abakulembeze n'abakungu bakole nga bwe basuubizizza." 
Nehemiah5:13 Era ne nkunkumula ekikondoolo kyange nga bwe ŋŋamba nti: “Katonda akunkumule ennyumba na buli kikye okuva ku buli muntu ataatuukirize kigambo kino; akunkumulibwe bw'atyo asigale mulangasa.” Ekibiina kyonna ne kiddamu nti: “Amiina!” Ne batendereza Katonda. Abantu ne bakola nga bwe baali basuubizizza. 
Nehemiah5:14 Ate n'okuva ku lunaku kabaka lwe yannonda mbeere owessaza mu Yuda __ okuva mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri okutuusa mu gw'amakumi asatu mu ebiri ogwa kabaka Arutakesasuta, gye myaka kkumi n'ebiri __ nze ne baganda bange tetwalya ku mmere eyandibadde omugabo gw'owessaza." 
Nehemiah5:15 Bo abaamasaza abankulembera bassa ekikoligo ekizito ku bantu, anti buli lunaku baggyanga ku bantu sekeli amakumi ana eza ffeeza nga kw'otadde evviini n'emmere; n'abaami baabwe baanyigirizanga abantu. Nze saakola ntyo olw'okutya Katonda." 
Nehemiah5:16 Nze neefunyirira ku kuddaabiriza bbugwe. Basajja bange baakuŋŋaaniranga ku mulimu, ffe tetwagula nnimiro n'emu." 
Nehemiah5:17 Era Abayudaaya, abakungu n'abasajja kikumi mu ataano baalyanga ku mmeeza yange, ssaako n'abaavanga mu b'amawanga agatwetoolodde."
