Nehemiah5:18 Buli lunaku banzitiranga ente nnamba, endiga mukaaga n'enkoko nga ziizo. Buli nnaku kkumi baaleetanga evviini nnyingi eya buli kika. Newandibadde gwali bwe gutyo, saasabanga mmere eyandibadde omugabo gwange ng'owessaza, kubanga ebibinikiddwa byandizitoweredde abantu." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ayi Katonda wange, nzijukira n'ekisa, olw'ebyo byonna bye nkoledde abantu bano." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanuballati, Tobiya, Gesemu Omuwarabu n'abalabe baffe abalala bwe baawulira nga bbugwe mmuzimbye, nga tewakyali mabanga gatabunidde, newandibadde nga n'okutuusa mu kadde ako nali sinnassaamu nzigi mu miryango," 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanuballati ne Gesemu ne bansindikira obubaka buno nti: “Jjangu, tusisinkane mu kyalo ekimu mu museetwe gwa Ono.” Baali bansalira lukwe kunkolako bulabe," 
Nehemiah6:3 nange ne mbatumira ababaka nga ŋŋamba nti: “Ndi ku mulimu munene, sisobola kuserengeta eyo. Lwaki omulimu guyimirira nga nze nserengese eyo gye muli?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Ne bantumira emirundi ena nga bayogera batyo, nange nga mbaanukula mu ngeri ye emu." 
Nehemiah6:5 Sanuballati n'antumira omulundi ogwokutaano; ku luno yatuma omuweereza we ng'alina mu ngalo ebbaluwa etaali nsibe, omwali muwandiikiddwa bino:" 
Nehemiah6:6 “Eŋŋambo zigenda ziyitaayita mu mawanga, ne Gasumu akikakasa, nti ggwe n'Abayudaaya mutegeka okujeema, kyova ozimba bbugwe; era ng'eŋŋambo bwe zigamba, oyagala kwefuula kabaka waabwe;" 
Nehemiah6:7 era otaddewo n'abalanzi balangirire mu Yeruzaalemu ku ggwe nti: ‘Mu Yuda mulimu kabaka.’ Eŋŋambo zino zijja kutuuka kabaka; kale nno jjangu, tusalire wamu amagezi.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Ne mmutumira nga mmuddamu ku ebyo nti: “Si bwe kiri nga ggwe bw'oyogera; ebyo obifumbiridde mu mutima gwo.” 
Nehemiah6:9 Anti bonna baali batutiisatiisa nga balowooza nti: “Emikono gyabwe gijja kulagaya mu kukola omulimu, tegujja kumalirizibwa.” Mukama, nnyongeraamu amaanyi mu mikono gyange." 
Nehemiah6:10 Olumu bwe nayingira mu nnyumba ya Semaaya mutabani wa Delaaya mutabani wa Meetabeli, eyali assiddwako ekkomo, n'agamba nti: “Tusisinkane mu Kiggwa kya Katonda, munda mu Kitukuvu, tusibe emiryango gy'Ekiggwa, kubanga bajja bakutte; ekiro bajja kujja bakutte.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Omusajja ali nga nze naye adduka? Omusajja ali nga nze yandiyingidde Ekiggwa okwewonya? Sijja kuyingira.” 
Nehemiah6:12 Ne ntegeera nti Katonda si ye yali amutumye, wabula yali alanga bubi ku nze, kubanga Tobiya ne Sanuballati baali bamuguliridde." 
Nehemiah6:13 Yali aguliriddwa antiisetiise, nkole ekyo, bwe ntyo ngwe mu kibi, bansiige ekko, bayime okwo okunvunaana." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ayi Katonda wange, jjukira Tobiya ne Sanuballati olw'ebikolwa byabwe bino, n'omulanzi omukazi Nowadiya, n'abalanzi abalala abantiisatiisa." 
Nehemiah6:15 Bbugwe yamalirizibwa ku lunaku olwabiri mu ettano olw'omwezi Eluli, mu nnaku amakumi ataano mu bbiri." 
Nehemiah6:16 Abalabe baffe bonna bwe baawulira, n'amawanga gonna agatwetoolodde bwe gaalaba, ne batoowazibwa, kubanga baamanya nti omulimu guno Katonda y'agukoze." 
Nehemiah6:17 Era mu budde obwo abakungu Abayudaaya baaweerezanga ebbaluwa nkumu eri Tobiya, n'eziva ewa Tobiya nga tezita kubatuukako." 
Nehemiah6:18 Kubanga bangi mu Yuda baali beekobye naye, kubanga yali mukoddomi wa Sekaniya mutabani wa Ara, ne mutabani wa Yokanani eyali awasizza Mesullamu muwala wa Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Tebaatanga kutendereza bikolwa bye ebirungi we ndi, ate bye njogedde nga babimubuulira; Tobiya n'asindikanga ebbaluwa antiisetiise." 
Nehemiah7:1 Bbugwe bwe yamala okuzimbibwa, ne mpangamu enzigi, ne nnonda abaggazi, abayimbi n'Abaleevi," 
Nehemiah7:2 Kanani muganda wange gwe nassaamu alabirire Yeruzaalemu wamu ne Ananiya omugabe alabirira ekigo, kubanga yali musajja mwesimbu, ng'atya Katonda okusinga abantu abalala bonna." 
Nehemiah7:3 Nabagamba nti: “Emiryango gya Yeruzaalemu tegiggulwanga okutuusa ng'akasana kamaze okukaalaama, ate giggalwe n'okusibibwa ng'enjuba etandika okugwa. Mulonde mu batuuze b'omu Yeruzaalemu abakuumi, abamu mubasse we banaakuuma, abalala bakuumire mu maaso g'ennyumba zaabwe.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Ekibuga kyali kigazi nga kinene, naye nga mulimu abantu batono, n'ennyumba nga sizinnazimbibwa." 
Nehemiah7:5 Katonda n'ateeka mu mutima gwange eky'okukuŋŋaanya abakungu, abakulembeze n'abantu aba bulijjo, mbabale nga ngoba endyo zaabwe. Nagwikiriza ekitabo ky'endyo zaabo abaasooka okudda. Bano be nasanga bawandiikiddwamu:" 
Nehemiah7:6 “Bano be bantu ab'omu ttwale abaayambuka nga bava mu busibe bw'abawaŋŋangusibwa, Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni be yali atutte mu busibe mu Babiloni, ne bakomawo mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu Yuda, buli omu n'adda mu kibuga kye;" 
Nehemiah7:7 bajja ne Zerubabbeli, Yeswa, Nekemiya, Azariya, Raamiya, Nakamani, Morudekayi, Bilusani, Misupereti, Biguvayi, Nekumu ne Baana. “Omuwendo gw'abasajja b'eggwanga lya Yisirayeli:" 
Nehemiah7:8 abaana ba Parosi, enkumi bbiri mu kikumi mu nsanvu mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:9 batabani ba Sefatiya, ebikumi bisatu mu nsanvu mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:10 bazzukulu ba Ara, lukaaga mu ataano mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:11 bazzukulu ba Pakati-Mowabu, be bazzukulu ba Yeswa ne Yowabu, enkumi bbiri mu lunaana mu kkumi na munaana;" 
Nehemiah7:12 bazzukulu ba Elamu, lukumi mu bibiri mu ataano mu bana;" 
Nehemiah7:13 bazzukulu ba Zattu, lunaana mu ana mu bataano;" 
Nehemiah7:14 bazzukulu ba Zakkayi, lusanvu mu nkaaga;" 
Nehemiah7:15 bazzukulu ba Binnuyi, lukaaga mu ana mu munaana;" 
Nehemiah7:16 bazzukulu ba Bebayi, lukaaga mu abiri mu munaana;" 
Nehemiah7:17 bazzukulu ba Azugadi, enkumi bbiri mu bisatu mu abiri mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:18 bazzukulu ba Adonikamu, lukaaga mu nkaaga mu musanvu;" 
Nehemiah7:19 bazzukulu ba Biguvayi, enkumi bbiri mu nkaaga mu musanvu;" 
Nehemiah7:20 bazzukulu ba Adini, lukaaga mu ataano mu bataano;" 
Nehemiah7:21 bazzukulu ba Ateri, abasibuka mu Kezekiya, kyenda mu munaana;" 
Nehemiah7:22 bazzukulu ba Kasumi, bisatu mu abiri mu munaana;" 
Nehemiah7:23 bazzukulu ba Bezayi, bisatu mu abiri mu bana;" 
Nehemiah7:24 bazzukulu ba Karifu, kikumi mu kkumi na babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:25 bazzukulu ba Gibewoni, kyenda mu bataano;" 
Nehemiah7:26 abasajja b'e Beteleemu ne Netofa, kikumi mu kinaana mu munaana;" 
Nehemiah7:27 abasajja b'e Anatoti, kikumi mu abiri mu munaana;" 
Nehemiah7:28 abasajja b'e Beti-Azumaveti, amakumi ana mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:29 abasajja b'e Kiriyati-Yewarimu, Kafira ne Beeroti, lusanvu mu ana mu basatu;" 
Nehemiah7:30 abasajja b'e Rama ne Geba, lukaaga mu abiri mu omu;" 
Nehemiah7:31 abasajja b'e Mikumasi, kikumi mu abiri mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:32 abasajja b'e Beteli ne Ayi, kikumi mu abiri mu basatu;" 
Nehemiah7:33 abasajja b'e Nebo ekirala, amakumi ataano mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:34 abasajja b'e Elamu ekirala, lukumi mu bibiri mu ataano mu bana;" 
Nehemiah7:35 bazzukulu ba Karimu, bikumi bisatu mu abiri;" 
Nehemiah7:36 abasajja b'e Yeriko, ebikumi bisatu mu ana mu bataano;" 
Nehemiah7:37 abasajja b'e Lodi, Kadidi ne Ono, lusanvu mu abiri mu omu;" 
Nehemiah7:38 bazzukulu ba Sena, enkumi ssatu mu lwenda mu asatu." 
Nehemiah7:39 “Bakabona: bazzukulu ba Yedaaya, okuva mu nnyumba ya Yeswa, lwenda mu nsanvu mu basatu:" 
Nehemiah7:40 bazzukulu ba Yimmeri, lukumi mu ataano mu babiri;" 
Nehemiah7:41 bazzukulu ba Pasukuru, lukumi mu bibiri mu ana mu musanvu;" 
Nehemiah7:42 bazzukulu ba Karimu, lukumi mu kkumi na musanvu." 
Nehemiah7:43 “Abaleevi: bazzukulu ba Yeswa ne Kadumiyeli, ab'omu nnyumba ya Odaviya, nsanvu mu bana." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abayimbi: bazzukulu ba Asafu, kikumi mu ana mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:45 “Abaggazi: bazzukulu ba Sallumu, Ateri, Talumoni, Akkubu, Katita ne Sobayi, bonna wamu kikumi mu asatu mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:46 “Abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa: bazzukulu ba Zika, bazzukulu ba Kasufa, bazzukulu ba Tabbawoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 bazzukulu ba Kerosi, bazzukulu ba Siya, bazzukulu ba Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 bazzukulu ba Lebana, bazzukulu ba Kagaba, bazzukulu ba Salumayi," 
Nehemiah7:49 bazzukulu ba Kanani, bazzukulu ba Giddeli, bazzukulu ba Gakari," 
Nehemiah7:50 bazzukulu ba Reyaaya, bazzukulu ba Rezini, bazzukulu ba Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 bazzukulu ba Gazzamu, bazzukulu ba Wuzza, bazzukulu ba Pasewa," 
Nehemiah7:52 bazzukulu ba Besayi, bazzukulu ba Mewunimu, bazzukulu ba Nefussimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 bazzukulu ba Bakubuku, bazzukulu ba Kakufa, bazzukulu ba Karukuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 bazzukulu ba Bazuluti, bazzukulu ba Mekida, bazzukulu ba Karusa," 
Nehemiah7:55 bazzukulu ba Barukosi, bazzukulu ba Sisera, bazzukulu ba Temaki," 
Nehemiah7:56 bazzukulu ba Neziya, bazzukulu ba Katifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 “Bazzukulu b'abaweereza ba Solomoni: bazzukulu ba Sotayi, bazzukulu ba Sofereti, bazzukulu ba Peruda," 
Nehemiah7:58 bazzukulu ba Yaala, bazzukulu ba Darukoni, bazzukulu ba Giddeli," 
Nehemiah7:59 bazzukulu ba Sefatiya, bazzukulu ba Kattili, bazzukulu ba Pokereti-Kazzebayimu, bazzukulu ba Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 “Abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa ne bazzukulu b'abaweereza ba Solomoni, bonna nga bawera ebikumi bisatu mu kyenda mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:61 “Bano be badda nga bava mu bibuga Teli-Melaki, Teli-Karusa, Kerubi, Addoni ne Yimmeri, naye nga tebasobola kutegeeza oba ennyumba ya bajjajjaabwe n'olulyo nga bya mu Yisirayeli:" 
Nehemiah7:62 bazzukulu ba Delaaya, bazzukulu ba Tobiya, bazzukulu ba Nekoda, lukaaga mu ana mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ate mu ba bakabona: bazzukulu ba Kobaaya, bazzukulu ba Akkozi, bazzukulu ba Baruzillayi, eyawasa mu bawala ba Baruzillayi Omugileyaadi n'ayitibwa erinnya eryo." 
Nehemiah7:64 Bano baanoonya obuwandiike bw'olulyo lwabwe ne batabuzuula, ne bagobebwa mu bakabona olw'obutaba balongoofu." 
Nehemiah7:65 Owessaza n'abagaana okulyanga ku bintu ebitukuvu ennyo, okutuusa nga wazzeewo kabona aweereza ne Wurimu ne Tummimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 “Ekibiina kyonna baawera abantu emitwalo ena mu enkumi bbiri mu bisatu mu nkaaga," 
Nehemiah7:67 ng'oggyeeko abaddu n'abazaana kasanvu mu bisatu mu asatu mu musanvu; ssaako abayimbi abasajja n'abakazi ebikumi bibiri mu ana mu bataano. 
Nehemiah7:68 Baalina embalaasi lusanvu mu asatu mu mukaaga, ennyumbu ebikumi bibiri mu ana mu ttaano," 
Nehemiah7:69 eŋŋamiya ebikumi bina mu asatu mu ttaano, n'endogoyi kakaaga mu lusanvu mu abiri." 
Nehemiah7:70 “Abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe abamu balina kye baawaayo ku mulimu. Owessaza yawa mu ggwanika durakuma lukumi eza zaabu, ebikompe amakumi ataano n'ekkanzu za bakabona ebikumi bitaano mu asatu." 
Nehemiah7:71 Ate abantu abalala bonna ne bawa durakuma emitwalo ebiri eza zaabu, mina enkumi bbiri eza ffeeza n'ekkanzu za bakabona nkaaga mu musanvu.”" 
Nehemiah7:72 Bakabona n'Abaleevi wamu n'abantu abamu, abayimbi, abaggazi, abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa, n'Abayisirayeli abalala bonna baasenga mu bibuga byabwe. Omwezi ogwomusanvu okutuuka, nga Abayisirayeli bamaze okusenga mu bibuga byabwe." 
Nehemiah8:1 Abantu bonna ne bakuŋŋaana ng'omuntu omu mu mbuga eri mu maaso g'Omulyango gw'Amazzi, ne bagamba Ezira omuwandiisi aleete ekitabo ky'Etteeka lya Musa, Omukama lye yali ateekedde Yisirayeli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu Ezira kabona n'aleeta Etteeka mu maaso g'ekibiina omwali abasajja, abakazi n'abalala bonna abaali basobola okutegeera." 
Nehemiah8:3 N'akisomamu awo mu luggya olutunudde mu Mulyango gw'Amazzi, okuva ku makya okutuusa mu ttuntu, mu maaso g'abasajja, abakazi, n'abo abaali basobola okutegeera; abantu bonna ne bawuliriza bulungi ekitabo ky'Etteeka." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezira omuwandiisi n'ayimirira ku kadaala ak'emiti ke baali bakoledde omukolo. Ku ddyo we waali wayimiriddewo Mattitiya, Sema, Anaaya, Wuriya, Kilukiya ne Maaseeya, ate ku gwa kkono ng'eriyo Pedaaya, Misayeli, Malukiya, Kasumi, Kasubaddana, Zakariya ne Mesullamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezira n'abikkula ekitabo abantu bonna nga bamulaba bulungi, anti yali asooloobye ku bantu bonna; bwe yakibikkula, abantu bonna ne bayimirira." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezira n'agulumiza Omukama Katonda omukulu; abantu bonna ne baanukula nti: “Amiina, amiina,” nga basitulira waggulu emikono gyabwe. Ne bavunnama, ne basinza Katonda amaaso gaabwe nga gatuuse ku ttaka." 
Nehemiah8:7 Bo Abaleevi: Yeswa, Bani, Serebiya, Yamini Akkubu, Sabbetayi, Odiya, Maaseeya, Kelita, Azariya, Yozabadi, Kanani ne Pelaaya baali bannyonnyola abantu Etteeka; bo abantu baali bayimiridde mu bifo byabwe." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ne basoma mu kitabo ky'Etteeka lya Katonda nga bwe bakyusa n'okunnyonnyola amakulu abantu basobole okutegeera ebisomebwa. 
Nehemiah8:9 Nekemiya owessaza, Ezira kabona era omuwandiisi n'Abaleevi abaali bayigiriza abantu ne bagamba abantu bonna nti: “Olunaku luno lutukuvu ku lw'Omukama Katonda waffe. Muleke kunakuwala yadde okukaaba.” Anti abantu bonna baali mu maziga nga bawuliriza ebigambo by'Etteeka." 
Nehemiah8:10 N'abagamba nti: “Mugende, mulye ebyassava munywe otwenge otuwooma, mugabireko ne ku abo abatalina kye beetegekeddewo, kubanga lunaku lutukuvu ku lwa Mukama waffe. Muleke kunakuwala, anti essanyu ly'Omukama ge maanyi gammwe.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Abaleevi ne basirisa abantu bonna nga bagamba nti: “Mwenna mwesirikire, kubanga luno lunaku lutukuvu, muleke kunakuwala.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Abantu bonna ne bagenda okulya n'okunywa n'okugabako ku mmere, ne basanyuka ebitatendeka, kubanga baali bategedde ebigambo bye baali babategeezezza." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ate ku lunaku olwokubiri abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe ez'abantu bonna, bakabona n'Abaleevi ne bakuŋŋaanira awali Ezira omuwandiisi beetegereze ebigambo by'Etteeka." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ne bazuula nga kyawandiikibwa mu Tteeka Omukama lye yateeka ng'ayita mu Musa nti: “Abayisirayeli ba kusulanga mu nsiisira mu mbaga ey'omwezi ogwomusanvu," 
Nehemiah8:15 era nga ba kulangiriranga n'okumanyisa wonna mu bibuga byabwe byonna ne mu Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Mufulume, mugende mu nsozi muleete amatabi g'oliva ensimbe n'ez'ettale, aga jjambula, ag'enkindu, n'ag'emiti egiggumizza, muzimbe ensiisira nga bwe kyawandiikibwa.’ ”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Abantu ne bafuluma ne baleeta amatabi, ne beekolera ensiisira, buli omu ku kasolya ke, mu mpya zaabwe, mu luggya lw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda, ne mu mbuga y'Omulyango gw'Amazzi ne mu mbuga y'Omulyango gwa Efurayimu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ekibiina kyonna eky'abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse baakola ensiisira ne basula omwo. Anti Abayisirayeli ekyo baali tebakikolanga okuva mu budde bwa Yoswa mutabani wa Nuunu okutuusa ku olwo; essanyu lyali lingi nnyo. 
Nehemiah8:18 Ezira yasomanga mu kitabo ky'Etteeka lya Katonda buli lunaku okuva ku lunaku olusooka okutuusa ku lunaku olusembayo. Embaga baamala ennaku musanvu nga bagikuza, ate ku lwomunaana ne wabaawo olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa ng'etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya olw'omwezi ogwo Abayisirayeli baakuŋŋaana ne basiiba, nga bambadde ebikutiya, nga beeyiiridde n'enfuufu." 
Nehemiah9:2 Ab'endyo za Yisirayeli baali beeyawudde ku b'amawanga bonna; baayimirira ne bayatula ensobi zaabwe n'ebyonoono bya bajjajjaabwe. 
Nehemiah9:3 Buli omu ng'ayimiridde mu kifo kye, baasoma mu kitabo ky'Etteeka ly'Omukama Katonda waabwe okumala ekitundu ekyokuna eky'olunaku, ate ekitundu ekyokuna ekirala ne bakimala nga beenenya ensobi n'okusinza Omukama Katonda waabwe." 
Nehemiah9:4 Abaleevi Yeswa, Bani, Kadumiyeli, Sebaniya, Bunni, Serebiya, Bani ne Kenani baayimirira ku kadaala ne balaajanira Omukama Katonda waabwe mu ddoboozi eddene." 
Nehemiah9:5 Abaleevi, Yeswa, Kadumiyeli, Bani, Kesabuneeya, Serebiya, Odiya, Sebaniya ne Petakiya ne bagamba nti: “Musituke, mugulumize Omukama Katonda wammwe, aliwo okuva ddi n'okutuusa ddi.” Ne baddamu nti: “Erinnya lyo ery'ekitiibwa ligulumizibwe; lisukkulumizibwe okusinga amatendo gonna n'okugulumizibwa.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Awo Ezira n'agamba nti: “Wekka ggwe Mukama; watonda eggulu, n'eggulu erisukkulumye ddala, ne nnamunkukumbo waakwo, ensi na byonna ebigiriko, amayanja na byonna ebigalimu. Byonna obiwa obulamu, ne nnamunkukumbo w'eggulu akusinza." 
Nehemiah9:7 “Ye ggwe Omukama Katonda, eyalonda Aburaamu; wamuggya mu Wuru eky'Abakaludeya, n'omutuuma Yiburayimu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Wasanga omutima gwe mwesigwa mu maaso go, n'okola naye endagaano, ng'oli wa kuwa ezzadde lye ensi y'Abakanaani, Abakitti n'Abaamori, Abaperizzi, Abayebusi n'Abagirugasi. Watuukiriza ebigambo byo, kubanga oli mutuukirivu." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Walaba okubonaabona kwa bajjajjaffe mu Misiri; watunuulira okwaziirana kwabwe ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa. 
Nehemiah9:10 Wakolera Faraawo obubonero n'ebyamagero, n'eri abakungu be bonna n'abantu bonna ab'ensi eyo; kubanga wamanya bwe beekuzanga, ne weekolera erinnya erikyaliwo na kati." 
Nehemiah9:11 Ennyanja wagyabuluzaamu mu maaso gaabwe, ne basomokera ku ttaka ekkalu; naye abaabawondera wabasulinka mu ddubi, ng'ejjinja mu mazzi amangi." 
Nehemiah9:12 Emisana wabakulemberanga n'empagi ey'ekire ate ekiro n'empagi ey'omuliro, okubamulisiza ekkubo mwe banaayita." 
Nehemiah9:13 “Wakka ne ku lusozi Sinayi, n'oyogera nabo ng'oyima mu ggulu; wabawa ennamula ennuŋŋamu, enkola entuufu, amateeka n'ebiragiro ebirungi." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wabamanyisa Sabbaato yo entukuvu, n'obateekera ebiragiro, enkola n'Etteeka, ng'oyita mu Musa omuweereza wo." 
Nehemiah9:15 “Nga bayala, wabawa omugaati oguva mu ggulu, nga bayonta, wabaggyira amazzi mu lwazi; n'obagamba bayingire ensi bagirye, gye walayira nti oligibawa." 
Nehemiah9:16 “Naye bo bajjajjaffe beekuza ne bakakanyaza ensingo zaabwe, tebaawulira mateeka go." 
Nehemiah9:17 Baagaana okuwulira, tebajjukira byewuunyisa bye wali obakoledde. Baakakanyaza ensingo zaabwe ne bakyusa ebirowoozo byabwe, baddeyo mu buddu bwabwe mu Misiri. Naye kubanga oli Katonda addiramu, omusaasizi, ow'ekisa, atasunguwala mangu, ajjudde okwagala, tewabalekerera." 
Nehemiah9:18 “Ne bwe beekolera akayana akasaanuuse, ne bagamba nti: ‘Ono ye Katonda wo, eyakuggyayo mu Misiri,’ ne bwe baavuma Katonda ebivumo ebinene," 
Nehemiah9:19 naye ggwe, mu kisa kyo ekingi, tewabaabulira mu ddungu. Empagi ey'ekire teyabavaako, okubalaga ekkubo emisana; n'empagi ey'omuliro ekiro okubamulisiza ekkubo mwe banaayita." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wawa Mwoyo wo omulungi abayigirize, tewaggya manu mu kamwa kaabwe, n'obawa n'amazzi okuloga ennyonta yaabwe." 
Nehemiah9:21 Emyaka ana ng'obagabirira mu ddungu, ne batabaako kye bajula; ebyambalo byabwe tebyabayulikako, n'ebigere byabwe tebyazimba." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Wabawa obwakabaka n'amawanga, n'obibassizaawo ng'ensalo. Baatwala ensi ya Sikoni kabaka w'e Kesuboni, n'ensi ya Ogi kabaka w'e Basani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Abaana baabwe n'obayaza ng'emmunyeenye z'eggulu; n'obaleeta mu nsi, gye wasuubiza bajjajjaabwe, nti baligiyingira ne bagirya." 
Nehemiah9:24 Abaana baabwe bajja ne balya ensi; mu maaso gaabwe n'otoowaza Abakanaani abaabeerangamu, bo ne bakabaka baabwe n'abantu b'omu nsi, n'obabawa mu mikono gyabwe babakole nga bwe baagala." 
Nehemiah9:25 Ne bawamba ebibuga okuli ebigo n'ensi engimu; ne beefunira ennyumba ezijjude buli kirungi, enzizi abalala ze baasima, n'enkumu y'emizabbibu, oliva, n'emiti egy'ebibala. Baalya, ne bakkuta, ne bagejja, ne basanyukira mu bulungi bwo obw'ekitalo." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Kyokka tebaakuwulira, ne bakujeemera; etteeka lyo ne balikuba amabega; abalanzi bo ne babatta, abaabakubirizanga, babakomyewo gy'oli; ne bavuma Katonda ebitayogerekeka." 
Nehemiah9:27 Kwe kubawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe, ne bababonyaabonya. Naye nga bali mu buyinike baakoowoola gy'oli; ng'oyima mu ggulu wabawulira, mu kisa kyo ekinene n'obawa abanunuzi, abaabawonya mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe." 
Nehemiah9:28 Naye olwabanga okuweerako ne baddamu okukola ebikyamu mu maaso go; era n'obawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe, ne babafuga. Nate ne bakuwanjagiranga, n'owulira ng'oyima mu ggulu, mu kisa kyo n'obanunula emirundi n'emirundi." 
Nehemiah9:29 Wabalabulanga badde ku Tteeka lyo; bbo baayongera kwekuza ne batawulira biragiro byo, ne boonoona eri ennamula yo, sso ng'omuntu abituusa aliba mulamu olw'okubeera byo; ne bakukuba amabega nga bakola emputtu, ne bakakanyaza ensingo ne batakuwuliriza." 
Nehemiah9:30 N'obagumiikiriza emyaka nkumu, n'obabuulirira ne Mwoyo wo, ng'oyita mu balanzi bo, naye ne batawulira; kwe kubawaayo mu mikono gy'abantu b'ensi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Naye mu kisa kyo ekingi ennyo tewabazikiririza ddala, era tewabalekerera; kubanga oli Katonda wa kisa, musaasizi." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Kale nno, ayi Katonda waffe, omukulu, omuzira, ow'entiisa, akuuma endagaano n'ekisa, togayaalirira bizibu bino byonna bitutuukiridde ffe ne bakabaka baffe n'abaami baffe, bakabona baffe n'abalanzi baffe, bajjajjaffe n'abantu bo bonna, okuva mu budde bwa bakabaka ba Assuri n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Nehemiah9:33 Mu byonna ebyatugwira, wali mutuufu; kubanga wakola mu butuukirivu, naye ffe tweyisa bubi." 
Nehemiah9:34 Bakabaka baffe n'abaami baffe, bakabona baffe ne bajjajjaffe tebaatuusa tteeka lyo; tebaawuliriza biragiro byo na njigiriza bye wabawa;" 
Nehemiah9:35 Ne bwe baali mu bwakabaka bwabwe, wakati mu birungi enfaafa bye wabakolera, mu nsi engazi, engimu, gye wabawa, tebaakuweereza, tebaaleka makubo gaabwe mabi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Laba tuutuno tuli baddu leero, mu nsi gye wawa bajjajjaffe, balye ebibala byamu n'ebirungi byayo, laba, mwe tuli ng'abaddu!" 
Nehemiah9:37 Olw'ebibi byaffe, omwero gwayo guddira bakabaka be watussaako, bafuga emibiri gyaffe n'ebisolo byaffe nga bwe baagala, tuli mu buyinike bunene.”" 
Nehemiah10:1 Olw'ensonga eno tukola endagaano ennywevu, ne tugissa mu buwandiike, n'abakulembeze baffe, Abaleevi ne bakabona baffe bagenda kugissaako emikono." 
Nehemiah10:2 Abassaako emikono be: Nekemiya owessaza, mutabani wa Kakaliya, Zedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 Seraaya, Azariya, Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Pasukuru, Amariya, Malukiya," 
Nehemiah10:5 Kattusi, Sebaniya, Malluki," 
Nehemiah10:6 Karimu, Meremoti, Obadiya," 
Nehemiah10:7 Danyeli, Ginnetoni, Baruku," 
Nehemiah10:8 Mesullamu, Abiya, Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:9 Maaziya, Bilugayi ne Semaaya; abo baali bakabona." 
Nehemiah10:10 Abaleevi: Yeswa mutabani wa Azaniya, Binnuyi okuva mu bazzukulu ba Kenadadi, Kadumiyeli," 
Nehemiah10:11 ne bannaabwe Sebaniya, Odiya, Kelita, Pelaaya, Kanani," 
Nehemiah10:12 Mika, Rekobu, Kasabiya," 
Nehemiah10:13 Zakkuri, Serebiya, Sebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:14 Odiya, Bani ne Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:15 Abakulembeze b'abantu: Parosi, Pakati-Mowabu, Elamu, Zattu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:16 Bunni, Azugadi, Bebayi," 
Nehemiah10:17 Adoniya, Biguvayi, Adini," 
Nehemiah10:18 Ateri, Kezekiya, Azzuru," 
Nehemiah10:19 Odiya, Kasumi, Bezayi," 
Nehemiah10:20 Karifu, Anatoti, Nebayi," 
Nehemiah10:21 Magupiyasi, Mesullamu, Keziri," 
Nehemiah10:22 Mesezabeli, Zadoki, Yadduwa," 
Nehemiah10:23 Pelatiya, Kanani, Anaaya," 
Nehemiah10:24 Ozeya, Ananiya, Kassubi," 
Nehemiah10:25 Kallokesi, Piluka, Sobeki," 
Nehemiah10:26 Rekumu, Kasabuna, Maaseeya," 
Nehemiah10:27 Akiya, Kanani, Anani," 
Nehemiah10:28 Malluki, Karimu ne Baana." 
Nehemiah10:29 “Abantu, abalala, kwe kugamba nti bakabona, Abaleevi abaggazi n'abayimbi, abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa, n'abo bonna abeeyawula mu bantu b'omu nsi ezo olw'Etteeka lya Katonda, wamu ne bakazi baabwe, batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe, na bonna abasobola okutegeera," 
Nehemiah10:30 ka beegatte ku baganda baabwe abakungu, nga beesiba n'ekikolimo oba n'ekirayiro nti ba kutambulira mu Tteeka lya Katonda lye yawa ng'ayita mu Musa omuweereza wa Katonda, nga ba kukwata n'okutuusa ebiragiro by'Omukama Katonda waffe byonna, ennamula ye n'amateeka ge." 
Nehemiah10:31 Era nti tetujja kufumbiza bawala baffe bantu ba mu nsi, n'abawala baabwe tetujja kubawasiza batabani baffe." 
Nehemiah10:32 “Abantu b'omu nsi bwe banaaleetanga ku Sabbaato eby'okutunda n'emmere yonna batunde, tetujja kubibagulangako ku Sabbaato ne ku nnaku entukuvu; omwaka ogwomusanvu tujja kuguwummulanga, na buli bbanja tulisonyiwe." 
Nehemiah10:33 Twetema okutuukiriza ebiragiro: buli mwaka okuwangayo ekyokusatu ekya sekeli ku mulimu gw'Ekiggwa kya Katonda waffe: 
Nehemiah10:34 ku lw'Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa, ku lw'ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'etteeka, ku lw'ebitambiro ebyokye ebya buli lunaku, ku lw'ekitambiro ky'oku Sabbaato eky'etteeka, ku mbaga y'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ku mbaga enkulu eziragiddwa, ku lw'ekitambiro ekitukuvu, ku lw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi okuddaabiriza olwa Yisirayeli, ne ku lwa buli kidda ku Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe." 
Nehemiah10:35 “Ffe, bakabona, Abaleevi n'abantu abalala bonna tukubye obululu okuwa buli nnyumba ya bajjajjaabwe ekiseera mu mwaka w'eneereeteranga enku ez'okukozesanga ku mwaliiro gwa Katonda waffe, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Tteeka." 
Nehemiah10:36 Tujja kuleetanga buli mwaka mu Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe amakungula agasooka ag'ettaka lyaffe, n'ebibala ebisooka ebya buli muti oguleeta ebibala." 
Nehemiah10:37 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Tteeka, tujja kuleetanga mu Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe, eri bakabona abaweerezaamu, abaggulanda baffe mu baana baffe, na buli kiggulanda mu nte, endiga n'embuzi zaffe." 
Nehemiah10:38 Tujja kuleetanga mu mawanika g'Ekiggwa kya Katonda waffe, eri bakabona, ebisooka eby'obutta bwaffe, n'ebitone byaffe, ne ku bibala eby'emiti, ne ku vviini gye twakasogola, ne ku muzigo gw'oliva. Tujja kuwanga Abaleevi ekyekkumi ku birime byaffe, anti Abaleevi be bakuŋŋaanya ekyekkumi mu bibuga byonna gye tukolera." 
Nehemiah10:39 Kabona asibuka mu Aroni ajja kubeeranga n'Abaleevi ng'Abaleevi bakuŋŋaanya ekyekkumi. N'Abaleevi ba kuleetanga ekyekkumi mu Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe bakisse mu materekero g'enkuluze. 
Nehemiah10:40 Abayisirayeli ne bazzukulu ba Leevi, ebitone eby'ebisooka eby'eŋŋano, evviini ensu n'omuzigo, banaabitwalanga mu mawanika awaterekebwa ebintu by'omu Kitukuvu, bakabona, abaweereza, abaggazi n'abayimbi gye babeera. Tetujja kusuulirira Kiggwa kya Katonda waffe.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Abakulembeze b'abantu baasenga mu Yeruzaalemu; abantu abasigaddewo ne bakuba akalulu, mu buli kkumi muveemu omu ajje asenge mu Yeruzaalemu, ekibuga ekitukuvu, abalala omwenda basigale mu bibuga byabwe." 
Nehemiah11:2 Abantu ne basiima abo bonna abeeronderawo okusenga mu Yeruzaalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Bano be bakulembeze b'ebitundu abaasenga mu Yeruzaalemu n'abo abaasenga mu bibuga bya Yuda. Bo abamu ku Bayisirayeli, bakabona, Abaleevi, abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa n'ab'abaweereza ba Solomoni baasulanga buli omu mu butaka bwe, mu bibuga byabwe." 
Nehemiah11:4 Mu Yeruzaalemu mwasulangamu ku bamu ku bantu ba Yuda ne ku bamu ku bantu ba Benyamiini. Ab'omu bantu ba Yuda: Ataaya, mutabani wa Wuzziya, mutabani wa Zakariya, mutabani wa Amariya, mutabani wa Sefatiya, mutabani wa Maalaleeli ava mu lulyo lwa Perezi," 
Nehemiah11:5 Maaseeya, mutabani wa Baruku, mutabani wa Koli-Koze, mutabani wa Kazaaya, mutabani wa Adaaya, mutabani wa Yowaribu, mutabani wa Zakariya asibuka mu Sela." 
Nehemiah11:6 Bonna abasibuka mu Perezi abaasulanga mu Yeruzaalemu nga bawera abasajja abeesobola ebikumi bina mu nkaaga mu munaana. 
Nehemiah11:7 Ab'omu bantu ba Benyamiini: Sallu mutabani wa Mesullamu, mutabani wa Yowedi, mutabani wa Pedaaya, mutabani wa Kolaaya mutabani wa Maaseeya, mutabani wa Yitiyeli, mutabani wa Yesaaya," 
Nehemiah11:8 n'abaamugoberera: Gabbayi, Sallayi, abasajja lwenda mu abiri mu munaana;" 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweli mutabani wa Zikuri, eyali omwami abakulira, ne Yuda mutabani wa Kassenuwa eyali omukulu w'Eggombolola ey'Okubiri ey'ekibuga." 
Nehemiah11:10 Mu bakabona: Yedaaya mutabani wa Yowaribu, Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraaya mutabani wa Kilukiya, mutabani wa Mesullamu, mutabani wa Zadoki, mutabani wa Meraayoti, mutabani wa Akitubu eyali omukulu w'Ekiggwa kya Katonda;" 
Nehemiah11:12 ne banne bwe baakolanga emirimu gy'omu Kiggwa, abasajja lunaana mu abiri mu babiri; Adaaya mutabani wa Yerokamu, mutabani wa Pelaliya, mutabani wa Amuzi, mutabani wa Zakariya, mutabani wa Pasukuru, mutabani wa Malukiya," 
Nehemiah11:13 ne banne abaali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, abasajja ebikumi bibiri mu ana mu babiri; Amasusayi mutabani wa Azareli, mutabani wa Akuzayi, mutabani wa Mesillemoti, mutabani wa Yimmeri," 
Nehemiah11:14 ne banne abasajja abatabaazi abazira kikumi mu abiri mu munaana. Omwami waabwe omukulu yali Zabudiyeli mutabani wa Kaggedolimu. 
Nehemiah11:15 Okuva mu Baleevi: Semaaya mutabani wa Kassubi, mutabani wa Azurikamu, mutabani wa Kasabiya, mutabani wa Bunni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 Sabbetayi ne Yozabadi abamu ku bakulu b'Abaleevi abaalabiriranga emirimu gy'ebweru w'Ekiggwa kya Katonda; 
Nehemiah11:17 Mattaniya, mutabani wa Mika, mutabani wa Zabudi, mutabani wa Asafu eyakuliranga eby'entendereza n'okwegayirira; Bakubukiya amuddirira mu banne; ne Abuda mutabani wa Sammuwa, mutabani wa Galali, mutabani wa Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abaleevi mu kibuga ekitukuvu nga bawera bonna awamu ebikumi bibiri mu kinaana mu bana. 
Nehemiah11:19 Abaggazi: Akkubu, Talumoni ne bannaabwe bwe baakuumanga emiryango, abasajja kikumi mu nsanvu mu babiri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Abayisirayeli abalala wamu ne bakabona n'Abaleevi baabeeranga mu bibuga bya Yuda, buli omu ku butaka bwe." 
Nehemiah11:21 Abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa baabeeranga ku kasozi Ofeli; Zika ne Gisupa be baakuliranga abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa. 
Nehemiah11:22 Omukulu w'Abaleevi mu Yeruzaalemu yali Wuzzi, mutabani wa Bani, mutabani wa Kasabiya, mutabani wa Mattaniya, mutabani wa Mika, omu ku basibuka mu Asafu abaaweerezanga mu Kiggwa kya Katonda ng'abayimbi." 
Nehemiah11:23 Kabaka ye yabawanga ebiragiro, era n'awa n'abayimbi entereeza y'emirimu gyabwe egya buli lunaku." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petakiya mutabani wa Mesezabeli okuva mu basibuka mu Zeraki, mutabani wa Yuda, ye yalinga omubaka wa kabaka eyakolanga ku nsonga zonna ezikwata ku bantu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ne mu byalo okumpi n'ebibanja byabwe. Abamu ku bantu ba Yuda baasenga mu Kiriyati-Aruba n'ebibuga byakyo, Diboni n'ebibuga byakyo, Yekabuzeeli n'ebyalo byakyo," 
Nehemiah11:26 mu Yeswa, Molada, Beti-Peleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 Kazari-Suwali, Beeriseba n'ebibuga byakyo," 
Nehemiah11:28 Zikulagi, Mekona n'ebibuga byakyo," 
Nehemiah11:29 Eni-Rimmoni, Zora, Yarumuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanowa, Adullamu n'ebyalo byakyo, Lakisi n'ennimiro zaakyo ne Azeka n'ebibuga byakyo. Bwe batyo baasenga okuva e Beeriseba okutuuka mu Kiwonvu kya Yinnomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ab'ekika kya Benyamiini ab'e Geba baasenga mu Mikumasi, Ayya, Beteli n'ebibuga byakyo," 
Nehemiah11:32 mu Anatoti, Nobu, Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 Kazori, Rama, Gittayimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 Kadidi, Zeboyimu, Neballati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lodi, Ono ne mu Kiwonvu ky'Abafundi." 
Nehemiah11:36 Ebibinja ebimu eby'Abaleevi ab'omu Yuda baasenga mu Benyamiini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Bano be bakabona n'Abaleevi abadda awamu ne Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli ne Yeswa: Seraaya, Yeremiya, Ezira," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amariya, Malluki, Kattusi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekaniya, Rekumu, Meremoti," 
Nehemiah12:4 Yiddo, Ginnetoni, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamini, Maadiya, Biluga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaaya, Yowaribu, Yedaaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Sallu, Amoki, Kilukiya ne Yedaaya. Bano baakuliranga bakabona ne baganda baabwe mu budde bwa Yeswa." 
Nehemiah12:8 Abaleevi baali: Yeswa, Binnuyi, Kadumiyeli, Serebiya, Yuda, Mattaniya, ye ne banne bwe bavunaanyizibwanga ku by'ennyimba ez'okutendereza." 
Nehemiah12:9 Baganda baabwe Bakubukiya ne Wunni baabayimiriranga awo mu maaso nga baweereza. 
Nehemiah12:10 Ye Yeswa yazaala Yoyakimu, Yoyakimu n'azaala Eliyasibu, Eliyasibu n'azaala Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada n'azaala Yonatani, Yonatani n'azaala Yadduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Mu budde bwa Yoyakimu bakabona abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe: eya Seraaya, Meraaya; olwa Yeremiya, Ananiya;" 
Nehemiah12:13 olwa Ezira, Mesullamu; olwa Amariya Yokanani;" 
Nehemiah12:14 olwa Malluki, Yonatani; olwa Sebaniya, Yozefu;" 
Nehemiah12:15 olwa Karimu, Aduna; olwa Meremoti, Kelukayi;" 
Nehemiah12:16 olwa Yiddo, Zakariya; olwa Ginnetoni, Mesullamu;" 
Nehemiah12:17 olwa Abiya, Zikuri; olwa Miniyamini n'olwa Mowadiya ne Pilutayi;" 
Nehemiah12:18 olwa Biluga, Sammuwa; olwa Semaaya, Yonatani;" 
Nehemiah12:19 olwa Yowaribu, Mattenayi; olwa Yedaaya, Wuzzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 olwa Sallu, Kallayi; olwa Amoki, Eberi;" 
Nehemiah12:21 olwa Kilukiya, Kasabiya; olwa Yedaaya, Netaneli." 
Nehemiah12:22 Abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe ez'Abaleevi n'eza bakabona mu budde bwa Eliyasibu, Yoyada, Yokanani ne Yadduwa baawandiikibwa okutuusa mu biseera bya Dariyo owa Buperusi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Bazzukulu ba Leevi abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe baawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo okutuusa mu budde bwa Yokanani mutabani wa Eliyasibu. 
Nehemiah12:24 Abakulu b'Abaleevi baali: Kasabiya, Sarebiya, Yeswa mutabani wa Kadumiyeli ne baganda baabwe; baayimiriranga mu maaso gaabwe mu kutendereza n'okwebaza, ng'oludda olumu luwaanyisaganya n'olulala, nga Dawudi omuntu wa Katonda bwe yaleka alagidde." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mattaniya, Bakubukiya, Obadiya Mesullamu, Talumoni ne Akkubu baali baggazi era nga be bakuuma amawanika agaalinga ku miryango." 
Nehemiah12:26 Bano baaliwo mu budde bwa Yoyakimu, mutabani wa Yeswa, mutabani wa Yozadaki, ne mu budde bwa Nekemiya owessaza ne Ezira kabona era omuwandiisi." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ku kutukuza bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu baanoonya Abaleevi yonna gye baali, ne babaleeta mu Yeruzaalemu batukuze mu ssanyu ne mu nnyimba ez'okwebaza, nga bayimbira ku nsaazo, entongooli n'ennanga." 
Nehemiah12:28 Abayimbi nabo baakungwa okuva mu bitundu ebyetoolodde Yeruzaalemu ne mu byalo by'abantu b'e Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 n'okuva mu Beti-Gilugali, ne mu bitundu by'e Geba ne Azumaveti, kubanga abayimbi baali beezimbidde ebyalo okwetooloola Yeruzaalemu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Bakabona n'Abaleevi beetukuza, ne batukuza n'abantu, emiryango ne bbugwe." 
Nehemiah12:31 Abakungu ba Yuda nabalinnyisa waggulu ku bbugwe, ne nteekawo ebibiina bibiri ebinene eby'abayimbi abatendereza. Ekibinja ekimu kyali kya kukulemberamu waggulu ku bbugwe nga kidda ku ludda olwa ddyo eri Omulyango gw'Olubungo." 
Nehemiah12:32 Osaaya n'ekitundu ekyokubiri eky'abakulembeze ba Yuda ne babagoberera; 
Nehemiah12:33 wamu ne Azariya, Ezira, Mesullamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, Benyamiini, Semaaya ne Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah12:35 ne ku bamu ku bakabona ab'amakondeere ne Zakariya mutabani wa Yonatani, mutabani wa Semaaya, mutabani wa Mattaniya, mutabani wa Mikaaya, mutabani wa Zakkuri, mutabani wa Asafu;" 
Nehemiah12:36 ne baganda be: Semaaya, Azareli, Milalayi, Gilalayi, Maayi, Netaneli, Yuda ne Kanani nga bali n'ebivuga bya Dawudi omuntu wa Katonda, Ezira omuwandiisi ng'abakulembeddemu." 
Nehemiah12:37 Ku Mulyango gw'Oluzzi baagendera ddala ne bambuka amadaala g'Ekibuga kya Dawudi, ne balinnya ku bbugwe, ne bayita waggulu ku nnyumba ya Dawudi, ne bagguka ku Mulyango gw'Amazzi ebuvanjuba." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ate ekibiina ky'abayimbi abatendereza ekyokubiri kyakumba kidda ku luuyi olulala. Nakigoberera nga nvaako emabega n'ekyokubiri eky'abantu nga tuyita waggulu ku bbugwe ne ku Munaala ogw'Obubiga okutuuka ku Bbugwe Omugazi," 
Nehemiah12:39 ne waggulu w'Omulyango gwa Efurayimu, okutuuka ku Mulyango Omukadde, ku Mulyango gw'Ebyennyanja, ku Munaala gwa Kananeli, ku Munaala gw'Ekikumi n'okutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Endiga; ne bayimirira ku Mulyango gw'Abakuumi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Ebibiina byombi eby'abayimbi abatendereza ne biyimirira mu bifo byabyo mu Kiggwa kya Katonda; era nange n'ekitundu ekyokubiri eky'abakulembeze," 
Nehemiah12:41 wamu ne bakabona Eliyakimu, Maaseeya, Miniyamini, Mikaaya, Eleyowenayi, Zakariya ne Ananiya n'amakondeere gaabwe," 
Nehemiah12:42 wamu ne Maaseeya, Semeeya, Eleyazari, Wuzzi, Yokanani, Malukiya, Elamu ne Ezeri. Abayimbi ne bayimba bulungi nga bakulemberwamu Yezurakiya." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ku olwo ne baweereza ebitambiro bingi, ne bajaguza, kubanga Katonda yali abawadde essanyu lingi. Abakazi n'abaana nabo ne basanyuka. Okusanyuka mu Yeruzaalemu nga kusobola n'okuwulirwa ewala." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ku olwo baateeka abasajja ku mawanika g'ebitone, ebibala ebisooka n'ekyekkumi bakuŋŋaanyizeemu ebitundu ebiva mu nnimiro z'ebibuga Etteeka bye liragira biweebwenga bakabona n'Abaleevi; kubanga Yuda yali asanyukidde bakabona n'Abaleevi abaali baweereza." 
Nehemiah12:45 Baakolanga omulimu gw'okuweereza Katonda waabwe n'ogw'okutukuza, era nga n'abayimbi n'abaggazi bwe baakolanga, nga Dawudi ne Solomoni mutabani we bwe baaleka bakuutidde." 
Nehemiah12:46 Anti edda mu budde bwa Dawudi n'obwa Asafu waaliwo abakulembeze olw'ebibiina by'abayimbi n'olw'ennyimba ez'ettendo n'ez'okwebaza Katonda. 
Nehemiah12:47 Awo nno mu budde bwa Zerubabbeli n'obwa Nekemiya Yisirayeli yenna yawanga emigabo abayimbi n'abaggazi buli lunaku. Era baayawulangako omugabo omutukuvu ogw'Abaleevi, ate n'Abaleevi ne baawulangako omugabo omutukuvu ku lw'ab'ezzadde lya Aroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Ku lunaku Ekitabo kya Musa lwe kyasomerwa abantu, baazuula nga kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ekyo nti: “Tewabanga Mwammoni oba Mumowabu ayingiranga omulundi n'ogumu mu lukuŋŋaana lwa Katonda," 
Nehemiah13:2 kubanga tebajja kusisinkana Bayisirayeli na migaati Na mazzi, era baagula Balaamu abavumirire, kyokka Katonda waffe ebikolimo n'abifuula mukisa.”" 
Nehemiah13:3 Bwe baawulira Etteeka, ne baawula mu Yisirayeli bonna ab'endyo engwira." 
Nehemiah13:4 Kyokka mu kusooka, Eliyasibu kabona, ye yali akulira amaterekero g'Ekiggwa kya Katonda waffe, nga wa luganda lwa kumpi ne Tobiya;" 
Nehemiah13:5 yali amukoledde etterekero eddene, mu kusooka omwaterekebwanga ebitone eby'obuwunga, obubaani, ebikozesebwa ebirala, n'ekyekkumi eky'eŋŋano, evviini ensu n'omuzigo ebyabanga omugabo gw'Abaleevi, abayimbi n'abaggazi, n'ebyatonerwanga bakabona." 
Nehemiah13:6 Bino byonna okubeerawo, nze nali siri mu Yeruzaalemu, kubanga mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu ebiri ogwa Arutakesasuta kabaka w'e Babiloni, nagenda ewa kabaka. Nga wayise ennaku, ne nsaba nve ewa kabaka," 
Nehemiah13:7 ne nkomawo mu Yeruzaalemu. Wano we namanyira ekibi Eliyasibu kye yali akoze, bwe yawa Tobiya ekisenge mu kigango ky'Ekiggwa kya Katonda." 
Nehemiah13:8 Kino tekyansanyusiza ddala, kwe kuddira ebintu bya Tobiya byonna ne mbikasuka ebweru okuva mu kisenge." 
Nehemiah13:9 Nalagira ekisenge bakirongoose, olwo ne nzizaamu ebikozesebwa mu Kiggwa kya Katonda, ebitone eby'obuwunga n'obubaani eby'okuweereza." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ne mmanya nti emigabo gy'Abaleevi tegyaleetebwa, nga n'Abaleevi n'abayimbi abaali baweereza buli omu yali yeddiddeyo ku butaka bwe." 
Nehemiah13:11 Nanenya abakulembeze, ne mbabuuza nti: “Lwaki Ekiggwa kya Katonda kyagayaalirirwa?” Ne mbakuŋŋaanyaayo ne mbassa mu bifo byabwe." 
Nehemiah13:12 Yuda yenna n'aleeta ekyekkumi eky'eŋŋano, evviini ensu n'omuzigo mu materekero." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ne nzisa Selemiya kabona, Zadoki omuwandiisi n'Omuleevi omu Pedaaya ku kulabirira amaterekero, ne nnonda Kanani mutabani wa Zakkuri, mutabani wa Mattaniya abayambeko, kubanga baalabika nga beesigwa. Ne bakwasibwa ogw'okugabiranga baganda baabwe." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ayi Katonda wange, nzijukira olw'okubeera kino; tosangulawo bya kisa bye nakolera Ekiggwa kya Katonda wange n'okuweereza kwamu." 
Nehemiah13:15 Mu nnaku ezo nalaba abasajja mu Yuda abasogola ku Sabbaato, n'abasomba eŋŋano nga batikka ku ndogoyi, era n'evviini, ebirimba by'emizabbibu, entontogolo z'emikunyu n'entwala yonna, ne babireeta mu Yeruzaalemu ku Sabbaato. Nabalabula obutatundanga mmere ku olwo." 
Nehemiah13:16 Abasajja okuva e Tiiro abaasulanga mu Yeruzaalemu, baaleetanga ebyennyanja n'ebyamaguzi ebya buli kika ne babiguza abantu ba Yuda ku Sabbaato mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Nehemiah13:17 Ne nnenya abakungu ab'omu Yuda, ne mbagamba nti: “Kiki kino kye mukola okwonoona muti Sabbaato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Bino bajjajjammwe si bye baakola, Katonda waffe n'alyoka atuleetera akabi kano konna, ne ku kibuga kino? Ate mmwe mwongera kusiikuulira Yisirayeli busungu nga mwonoona Sabbaato?”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Obudde bwe bwakwatanga enzikiza ku miryango gya Yeruzaalemu nga Sabbaato tennaluma, nga ndagira nga baggalawo enzigi, era nga mbalagira baleme kuggulawo okutuusa nga Sabbaato emaze okuyita. Abamu ku basajja bange nabassa ku miryango, wabulewo omugugu oguleetebwamu ku Sabbaato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Omulundi gumu oba ebiri abasuubuzi n'abatunzi baasula bweru wa Yeruzaalemu n'eby'amaguzi byabwe byonna. 
Nehemiah13:21 Ne mbalabula, ne mbagamba nti: “Lwaki musula awo ku bbugwe? Bwe munaddamu okukikola, nzija kubakolako.” Okuva ku olwo tebaddayo kujja ku Sabbaato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Awo ne ŋŋamba Abaleevi beetukuze, bagende bakuume emiryango, Sabbaato ekuumibwe nga ntukuvu. N'olwa kino, ayi Katonda wange, nzijukira, onsaasire ng'oggya ku kisa kyo ekingi." 
Nehemiah13:23 Era mu nnaku ezo nalaba Abayudaaya abaali bawasizza abakazi ab'omu Asudodi, Ammoni ne Mowabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Kyakubiri eky'abaana baabwe baali boogera lulimi lwa Asudodi, oba olulimi lw'abantu bano oba bali, nga tebamanyi kwogera Luyudaaya." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ne mbanenya, ne mbavumirira. Abamu mu bo ne mbakuba, ne mbakuunyuulako enviiri, ne mbalayiza mu linnya lya Katonda nti: “Temufumbizanga bawala bammwe batabani baabwe, yadde okuwasiza batabani bammwe bawala baabwe, oba mmwe okubawasa." 
Nehemiah13:26 Si bya ngeri eno ebyaleetera Solomoni kabaka wa Yisirayeli okwonoona? Mazima, mu mawanga mangi tewabanga kabaka amufaanana; yayagalibwa Katonda we, Katonda n'amuteekawo afuge Yisirayeli yenna; naye ye mwene abakazi abagwira baamuleetera okugwa mu kibi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Mwagala tuwulirize mmwe, tugwe mu nsobi ennene eyo yonna, twonoone eri Katonda waffe nga tuwasa abakazi abagwira?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Omu mu baana ba Yoyada, mutabani wa Eliyasibu kabona omukulu, yali mukoddomi wa Sanuballati Omukoroni; namugoba w'endi." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ayi Katonda wange, bajjukirenga bano olw'okujaajaamya obwakabona n'endagaano ey'obwakabona n'Obuleevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Nabatukuzaako buli kigwira kyonna, ne nzizaawo buto ebisanja bya bakabona n'eby'Abaleevi, buli omu mu mulimu gwe," 
Nehemiah13:31 ne ntereeza endeeta y'enku mu kiseera we ziteekwa okuleeterwa, era bwe ntyo ne ku bibala ebisooka. Nzijukira, ayi Katonda wange, olw'obulungi." 
Job1:1 Mu nsi Wuzi waaliyo omusajja, erinnya lye Yobu; omusajja ono yali taliiko musango, nga mutuufu, atya Katonda era nga yeewala ekibi." 
Job1:2 Yalina abaana abalenzi musanvu, n'abawala basatu." 
Job1:3 Yalina endiga kasanvu, eŋŋamiya enkumi ssatu, emigogo gy'ente ezirima ebikumi bitaano, endogoyi ebikumi bitaano n'omwandu gw'abaweereza munene nnyo; ye yali asinga ekitiibwa mu bantu bonna ab'ebuvanjuba." 
Job1:4 Batabani be baagendanga balya embaga mu maka gaabwe mu mpalo; baayitanga bannyinaabwe abasatu bajje balye n'okunywa wamu nabo. 
Job1:5 Ennaku ez'embaga bwe zaggwangako, Yobu yatumyangayo batukuzibwe; enkeera mu matulutulu ng'atambira ku lwa buli kinnoomu ekitambiro ekyokye, kubanga yalowoozanga nti: “Sikulwa ng'abaana bange baakoze ekibi, ne bavuma Katonda mu mitima gyabwe.” Bw'atyo Yobu bwe yakolanga ennaku zonna." 
Job1:6 Olumu, abaana ba Katonda bajja okweyanjula ew'Omukama, ne Sitaani n'abajjiramu." 
Job1:7 Omukama n'abuuza Sitaani nti: “Ova wa?” Sitaani n'ayanukula nti: “Nva kubaalabaala mu nsi, mbadde ngiyitaayitamu.”" 
Job1:8 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Wekkaanyizza omuweereza wange Yobu? Teri amufaanana mu nsi, omusajja ataliiko musango, omwesimbu, atya Katonda era eyeewala ekibi.”" 
Job1:9 Sitaani n'addamu nti: “Olowooza Yobu atiira bwereere Katonda? 
Job1:10 Tewamwetoolooza olukomera, ye n'ennyumba ye n'ebintu bye byonna? Wawa omukisa emikono gye bye gyakola, eby'obugagga bye ne byeyongera mu nsi." 
Job1:11 Kale gezaako ogolole omukono gwo okwate ku byonna by'alina, oliraba takuvumiridde.”" 
Job1:12 Omukama n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Kale byonna by'alina biri mu buyinza bwo, kyokka ye tomukola kabi.” Sitaani n'ava mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Job1:13 Olwatuuka, batabani ba Yobu ne bawala be baali balya nga bwe banywa omwenge mu nnyumba ya muganda waabwe omukulu," 
Job1:14 omubaka n'ajja eri Yobu n'amugamba nti: “Ente zibadde zirima, nga n'endogoyi ziriira awo kumpi nazo," 
Job1:15 Abasaba ne bazigwira, ne bazitwala, n'abaweereza ne babatta n'ekitala, nze nzekka nze mponyeewo nzije nkubuulire.”" 
Job1:16 Oyo aba akyayogera, omubaka omulala n'ajja, n'agamba nti: “Omuliro gwa Katonda gwavudde mu ggulu ne gwokya endiga ne gusenkenya n'abaweereza, nze nzekka nze mponyeewo nzije nkubuulire.”" 
Job1:17 N'oyo aba akyayogera, omubaka omulala n'ajja, n'agamba nti: “Abakaludeya baakoze ebibinja bisatu, ne bayiikira eŋŋamiya ne bazitwala n'abaweereza ne babatta n'ekitala, nze nzekka nze mponyeewo nzije nkubuulire.”" 
Job1:18 Era n'oyo aba akyayogera, omubaka omulala n'ajja, n'agamba nti: “Batabani bo ne bawala bo baabadde balya nga banywa omwenge mu nnyumba ya muganda waabwe omukulu," 
Job1:19 amangu ago kibuyaga ow'amaanyi n'afuluma ku ludda lw'eddungu n'ayuuguumya ensonda ennya ez'ennyumba, n'ebagwira ne bafa, nze nzekka nze mponyeewo nzije nkubuulire.”" 
Job1:20 Awo Yobu n'asituka, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye, n'amwa omutwe, n'agwa wansi ku ttaka, n'asinza," 
Job1:21 n'agamba nti: “Nava mu lubuto lwa nnyabo nga ndi bwereere, era ndiddayo bwereere. Omukama yawa, Omukama aggyeewo; erinnya ly'Omukama ligulumizibwe.”" 
Job1:22 Mu bino byonna Yobu teyayonoona era teyavunaana Katonda. 
Job2:1 Ku lunaku olulala abaana ba Katonda bwe bajja okweyanjula ew'Omukama, ne Sitaani n'abajjiramu naye yeeyanjule gy'ali." 
Job2:2 Omukama n'abuuza Sitaani nti: “Ova wa?” Sitaani n'ayanukula nti: “Nva kubaalabaala mu nsi, mbadde ngiyitaayitamu.”" 
Job2:3 Omukama n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Wekkaanyizza omuweereza wange Yobu? Teri amufaanana mu nsi, omusajja ataliiko musango, omwesimbu, atya Katonda era eyeewala ekibi. Akyagumidde mu bulungi bwe, newandibadde nga wanfukuutirira mmuzikirize awatali nsonga.”" 
Job2:4 Sitaani n'amwanukula nti: “Lususu ku lususu! Byonna omuntu by'alina alibiwaayo olw'obulamu bwe. 
Job2:5 Naye golola omukono gwo okwate ku nnyama ye ne ku magumba ge, olwo ajja kukuvumirira.”" 
Job2:6 Awo Omukama n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Kale, wuuyo akuli mu buyinza; kyokka taliza obulamu bwe.”" 
Job2:7 Sitaani n'ava awali Omukama, n'alwaza Yobu n'amabwa amabi ennyo, okuva ku bigere okutuuka mu kawompo." 
Job2:8 Yobu n'atuula mu vvu, n'akwata oluggyo ne yeetakuzanga olwo." 
Job2:9 Mukazi we n'amugamba nti: “Era nno okyagumidde mu bulungi bwo? Vuma Katonda ofe.” 
Job2:10 Yobu n'amugamba nti: “Oyogedde ng'omukazi omusiru bw'ayogera. Oba twafuna ebirungi okuva ewa Katonda, tekisaanye n'okukkiriza ebibi?” Mu bino byonna Yobu teyakola kibi mu bye yayogera." 
Job2:11 Mikwano gya Yobu abasatu bwe baawulira eby'akabi byonna ebimugwiridde, buli omu n'ajja okuva ewuwe: Elifazi ow'e Teemani, Biludadi ow'e Suki, ne Zofari ow'e Naame. Baali balagaanye bagendere wamu okumukubagiza n'okumusaasira." 
Job2:12 Bwe baamulengera nga bakyaliko wala, ne batamutegeera, ne bakaaba, ne bayuza ebyambalo byabwe, ne beeyiira enfuufu mu mutwe." 
Job2:13 Ne batuula naye awo ku ttaka okumala ennaku musanvu n'ebiro musanvu nga tewali amunyeze kagambo, anti baalaba obulumi bw'alimu nga bungi nnyo." 
Job3:1 Oluvannyuma, Yobu n'ayasamya akamwa ke n'avumirira olunaku lwe yazaalibwako," 
Job3:2 n'agamba nti: 
Job3:3 “Olunaku lwe nazaalibwako luzikirire, n'ekiro lwe baagamba nti: ‘Omulenzi agudde mu lubuto.’" 
Job3:4 Olunaku olwo lufuuke nzikiza. Katonda talufangako ng'ayima mu ggulu, n'ekitangaala tekirumulisanga." 
Job3:5 Kazigizigi n'enzikiza ekutte birwezze, ekire kirubikke, ne kazigizigi w'emisana alufuule lwa ntiisa." 
Job3:6 Ekiro ekyo enzikiza enkunivu ekyefuge; tekibalirwanga mu nnaku za mwaka, yadde okujja mu nnaku z'omwezi." 
Job3:7 Ekiro ekyo kibeere kigumba, mubulemu okuleekaana okw'essanyu." 
Job3:8 “Abavumirira ennaku baluvumirire, abo abeetegese okuzuukusa goonya." 
Job3:9 Emmunyeenye zaalwo ez'oku makya zizikire, lulindirire bwereere obudde okukya, luleme kulaba ku bisige bya mmambya," 
Job3:10 kubanga sirwaggalira mulyango gwa lubuto mwe nali, amaaso gange lugakise akabi." 
Job3:11 “Lwaki saafa nga nzaalibwa? Lwaki saafa nga nfuluma mu lubuto? 
Job3:12 Lwaki waaliwo amaviivi okundera, oba amabeere okunnyonsa?" 
Job3:13 Singa kati ngalamidde mu ddembe; nandibadde neebase, mpumudde," 
Job3:14 wamu ne bakabaka n'abawi b'amagezi mu nsi, abeezimbira amasiro;" 
Job3:15 oba wamu n'abaami abaalina zaabu, abajjuzizza ennyumba zaabwe ne ffeeza." 
Job3:16 Oba lwaki saabulawo ng'olubuto oluvuddemu, oba ng'obwana obutaalaba kitangaala?" 
Job3:17 Eyo ababi gye bakomeza okutawaanya; eyo abaweddemu endasi gye bawummulira. 
Job3:18 Abasibe awamu gye bafunira ku mirembe, nga tebakyawulira kwasira kwa muduumizi." 
Job3:19 Abatene n'abeebitiibwa bali eyo, omuddu gy'ateewuluziddwa ku mukama we." 
Job3:20 “Lwaki eyennyise mu mutima aweebwa ekitangaala, n'obulamu buweebwa oyo anyoleddwa," 
Job3:21 n'abalindirira okufa okutatuuka, abakunoonya n'okusinga abanoonya obugagga obusimire," 
Job3:22 abasanyuka ne bajaguza bwe basanga entaana? 
Job3:23 Lwaki ekitangaala kiweebwa omusajja ow'amakubo amakusike, Katonda gw'azingizza ku buli ludda?" 
Job3:24 Bwe ŋŋenda okulya ekinzijira kusinda, okuwoloma kwange kukulukuta nga mazzi." 
Job3:25 Kubanga kye ntya, kye kinzijidde; kye mbadde neekeka kye kingwiridde." 
Job3:26 Sirina mirembe, yadde obuweerero; siwummula, wabula emitawaana gye gijja.”" 
Job4:1 Elifazi ow'e Temani n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job4:2 “Singa oli aneetambaala okwogera naawe, onookaluubirirwa? Naye ani akyasobola okwekuuma obutayogera?" 
Job4:3 Lowooza bwe wayigiriza abangi, n'emikono egiragaya nga bwe wagigumya." 
Job4:4 Ebigambo byo byanyweza abanafuye, wagumya entegetege be zifambye." 
Job4:5 Naye kati ekizibu bwe kikujjidde, okaluubiriddwa; bwe kikwezinzeeko, otidde." 
Job4:6 Okutya kwo Katonda wo si kwe kwandikubeeredde obwesige bwo, n'amakubo go amalungi essuubi lyo?" 
Job4:7 Jjukira: ani ataliiko musango eyali azikiridde? Wa abatuufu gye baali bamaliddwawo? 
Job4:8 Nze nga bwe ndabye: abo abeeyisa obubi, abo abasiga akabi, ke bakungula." 
Job4:9 Katonda bw'assa omukka, nga bazikirira; olufuuwa obuswandi bwe, nga basaanawo." 
Job4:10 Empologoma ensajja ewuluguma, n'enkazi ekaaba, amannyo g'obuwologoma obuto ne gamenyekamenyeka." 
Job4:11 Empologoma yazikirira, kubanga teyalina ky'erya, n'obwana bw'empologoma ne bubuna emiwabo." 
Job4:12 “Ekigambo kya ndeeterwa mu bubba, okutu kwange kwawulira nga kyogerwa mu kaama." 
Job4:13 Mu kutaataaganya kw'ebirooto mu kiro, otulo otungi we tukwatira abantu," 
Job4:14 okutya kwankwata ne njugumira, amagumba gange gonna ne gakankana." 
Job4:15 Omwoyo gwayita mu maaso gange, obwoya ku mubiri gwange ne bujagalala." 
Job4:16 Gwayimirira awo, naye saasobola kutegeera nfaanana yaagwo; gwandabikira mu maaso gange, ne mpulira akaloboozi akasiiya nti:" 
Job4:17 ‘Omuntu obuntu ayinza okusinga Katonda mu butuukirivu? Omuntu ayinza okuba omutukuvu okusinga Eyamukola?’ 
Job4:18 Oba Katonda teyeesiga baweereza be, ne mu bamalayika be ng'asangamu ensobi," 
Job4:19 leero alabisa bano, abasula mu nnyumba ez'ebbumba, emisingi gyazo agisimbye mu nfuufu, ababetenteka amangu n'okusinga ennyenje!" 
Job4:20 Okuva enkya okutuusa akawungeezi babetentebwa, bazikirira ennaku zonna nga tewali n'ategedde." 
Job4:21 Weema zaabwe tezibaweekuddwako, ne bafa nga tebaliimu na ggezi?”" 
Job5:1 “Koowoola, oba onoolabayo akwanukula. Mutuukirivu ani gy'onaddukira?" 
Job5:2 Kituufu, okunyiiga kutta omusiru, n'obuggya butta omubuyabuya." 
Job5:3 Nze kennyini neerabirako ng'omusiru amerawo, naye amangu ago ennyumba ye nagivumirira." 
Job5:4 Batabani be bali wala n'okuwonyezebwa; balirinnyirirwa mu mulyango, tewaliba abataasa." 
Job5:5 Abayala bamuliira amakungula ge, bennyini baganoga okuva mu maggwa; abayonta balookeralookera obugagga bwe." 
Job5:6 Kubanga obutaba mutuufu tekiva mu nfuufu, n'obwonoonefu tebuva mu ttaka." 
Job5:7 Wabula omuntu azaalibwa kutawaanya, kyenkana ng'ensasi z'omuliro bwe zambuka waggulu." 
Job5:8 “Singa mbadde ggwe, nandijulidde ewa Katonda, ewa Katonda gye nandiyanjudde ensonga zange." 
Job5:9 Akola ebinene ebiteefumiitirizika, n'ebyewuunyisa ebitabalika." 
Job5:10 Awa enkuba mu nsi, n'asindika amazzi ku ngulu ku ttale." 
Job5:11 Abatene abambusa waggulu, abadaagana n'abalinnyisa awali obulokofu." 
Job5:12 Agootaanya entegeka z'abakupya, emikono gyabwe gireme kubaako kye gituukiriza." 
Job5:13 Akwatira abagezi mu bukujjukujju bwabwe, obukodyo bw'abakabakaba n'abusukkiza wansi." 
Job5:14 Ekizikiza bakisisinkana misana, mu ttuntu bawammanta ng'ekiro." 
Job5:15 Abaavu abawonya ekitala ky'omu kamwa kaabwe, abawonya mu mikono gy'ab'amaanyi." 
Job5:16 Abanaku bafuna essuubi, obwonoonefu ne buggala akamwa kaabwo." 
Job5:17 “Omuntu oyo yeesiimye Katonda gw'akomako; togayanga kugolola kwa Muyinza wa buli kantu. 
Job5:18 Kubanga afumita, naye era asiba ekiwundu; aleeta obuvune, naye era emikono gye gye giwonya." 
Job5:19 Alikuwonya mu bubenje mukaaga, mu bubenje musanvu akabi tekalikutuukako:" 
Job5:20 Mu njala alikuwanulayo mu kufa, ne mu lutalo alikuwonya amaanyi g'ekitala." 
Job5:21 Oliwonyezebwa obuswanyu bw'olulimi, okwaya bwe kulijja, tolitya." 
Job5:22 Olisekerera okwaya n'enjala, tolitya na bisolo bya mu nsiko." 
Job5:23 Olikuba endagaano n'amayinja mu nnimiro, n'ebisolo mu nsiko biriba mu ddembe naawe." 
Job5:24 Olimanya nti weema yo eri mu ddembe; bw'olibala eby'omu kisulo kyo, tolisanga kibulamu." 
Job5:25 Olimanya nti ezzadde lyo liriba ddene, ne bazzukulu bo bangi ng'omuddo gw'oku ttaka." 
Job5:26 Oliyingira entaana ng'okyewulira amaanyi go gonna, ng'entuumu z'eŋŋano ezikuŋŋaanyizibwa mu budde bwayo." 
Job5:27 “Kino tukyekkaanyizza, era kituufu; kiwulire okitwale.”" 
Job6:1 Naye Yobu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job6:2 “Singa nno obulumi bwange bupimibwa, n'ennaku yange yonna ne bagissa ku minzaani!" 
Job6:3 Yandizitoye okusinga omusenyu gw'ennyanja, tekyewuunyisa bwe mmala googera." 
Job6:4 Kubanga obusaale bw'Omuyinza wa buli kantu bundaaliddemu, omwoyo gwange gunuuna obusagwa bwagwo, n'entiisa ya Katonda esitukiddemu okunnwanyisa." 
Job6:5 Endogoyi y'ettale ekaaba ng'efunye omuddo, n'ente eŋooŋa ng'eri ku ssubi erya?" 
Job6:6 Emmere etewooma eriibwa omutali munnyo, oba mulimu kiwooma ki mu kinyama ky'eggi?" 
Job6:7 Saayagala kubikwatako, naye mu bulwadde bwange ye mmere yange." 
Job6:8 Singa nno nfunye kye nsaba, Katonda n'ampa kye neegomba!" 
Job6:9 Singa nno Katonda akkiriza n'ammerengula, n'asumulula omukono gwe n'anzita!" 
Job6:10 Kino kyandisigadde kinkubagiza, essanyu lyange mu bulumi obutasalikako, nti saagaana bigambo by'Oyo Omutuukirivu." 
Job6:11 Amaanyi nnina galiwa nsobole okugumiikiriza? Ye ngoba ki ndyoke neewalirize? 
Job6:12 Amaanyi agange ga jjinja, nandiki ennyama eyange ya kikomo?" 
Job6:13 Nkyalinamu otwanyi okweyamba, kati ng'okuwonyezebwa kwagobwa we ndi?" 
Job6:14 “Aterebuse yandiragiddwa mikwano gye omukwano, ne bw'aba alekedde awo okutya Omuyinza wa buli kantu." 
Job6:15 Naye baganda bange bannimbye ng'ensalosalo z'emigga; ng'emigga egyalaala: 
Job6:16 giddugala olw'okukwata kw'omuzira, oba ne gibooga olw'omuzira okusaanuuka." 
Job6:17 Naye mu budde obw'ekyeya gikalira; mu bbugumu gibulawo mu bifo byagyo. 
Job6:18 Ebibinja by'abasuubuzi byakyama okuva mu makubo gaabyo, ne byambuka mu ddungu, ne bizikiririra eyo." 
Job6:19 Ebibinja by'abasuubuzi okuva e Teema binoonya amazzi, Abatambuze b'e Saba banoonya n'essuubi." 
Job6:20 Baasoberwa kubanga baali bazze basuubira; baatuukawo, naye kyababuukako." 
Job6:21 Bwe mutyo nammwe temunnyambye, bwe mulabye ekikanga, ne mutya." 
Job6:22 Nali ŋŋambye nti: ‘Mumpeeyo ku kantu, munsasulire okuva ku byammwe;" 
Job6:23 mumponye mu mikono gy'omulabe, munnunule mu buyinza bw'omukambwe’?" 
Job6:24 “Munjigirize, nzija kusirika; mummanyise we situusizza." 
Job6:25 Ebigambo by'amazima nga bikaawa! Naye okugolola kwammwe kugolodde ki? 
Job6:26 Mwagala okugolola bye njogedde, ebigambo by'omuterebufu mubifuule mpewo?" 
Job6:27 Musobola n'okukuba akalulu ku mulekwa, ne mukwano gwammwe okumuwaayo." 
Job6:28 Kale nno, mukkirize muntunuulire. Mulowooza nandibalimbye?" 
Job6:29 Mweddemu, obwonoonefu buleme kubaawo. Mwerowooze nate, bwo obutuukirivu bwange bukyaliwo." 
Job6:30 Ku lulimi lwange kuliko bubi? Akamwa kange tekategeera bubi? 
Job7:1 “Obulamu bw'omuntu ku nsi si kukabassana; ennaku ze teziri ng'ez'omupakasi? 
Job7:2 Ng'omuddu eyeesunga ekisiikirize, ng'omupakasi alindirira empeera ye," 
Job7:3 nange emyezi gyange egyampeebwa temwali kantu, ebiro bye nafuna bijjudde kutegana." 
Job7:4 Bwe ngalamira, ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Nnaazuukuka ddi?’ Ekiro kiyita mpola, nkulungutana okutuusa ku maliiri." 
Job7:5 Omubiri gwange gubikkiddwa envunyu n'ebikalappwa, olususu lwabiseyabise, luvunze." 
Job7:6 Ennaku zange ziwuluttuse n'okusinga ekidondi ky'omutunzi, ziweddeko awatali ssuubi." 
Job7:7 Jjukira nti obulamu bwange mukka bukka, eriiso lyange terikyaddamu nate kulaba ssanyu." 
Job7:8 Eriiso erindaba kati terikyaddamu nate kundaba; mulinnoonya, naye nga sikyaliwo." 
Job7:9 Ng'ekire bwe kiggwaawo ne kiyita, n'akkirira emagombe bw'atyo bw'ali, talidda." 
Job7:10 Taliddamu kudda mu nnyumba ye, ekifo kye tekiriddayo kumumanya." 
Job7:11 “Nange nno sijja kukoma ku kamwa kange, nzija kwogera mu kunyolwa kw'omutima gwange, nzija kwemulugunya mu nnyiike y'omwoyo gwange." 
Job7:12 Ndi nnyanja, yadde ssessota, olyoke onteekeko abakuumi?" 
Job7:13 Bwe ŋŋamba nti ekitanda kyange kinankubagiza, n'obuliri bwange bunakkakkanya okwemulugunya kwange," 
Job7:14 era onkanga n'ebirooto, ontiisa n'ebimbonekera." 
Job7:15 Kyenva nnondawo okutugumbulwa, ne nsiima okufa okusinga guno omubiri gwange." 
Job7:16 Neekyaye, sikyalamye mirembe gyonna; ndeka, ennaku zange temuli kantu." 
Job7:17 Omuntu kye ki gw'ogulumiza otyo, gw'oteekako otyo omutima gwo," 
Job7:18 gw'olambula ku buli maliiri, n'omugeza buli kabanga?" 
Job7:19 Onootuusa wa okuntunuulira, n'ondeka ne mmira ku ddusu?" 
Job7:20 Oba nasobya, kiki kye nakukola, ggwe omukuumi w'abantu? Lwaki onsimbyeko olukongoolo? Nkuzitooweredde?" 
Job7:21 Lwaki tonzigyako kibi kyange, n'osaasira ensobi yange? Kubanga mangu nzija kugalamira mu nfuufu; ononnoonya, naye nnaaba sikyaliwo.”" 
Job8:1 Biludadi ow'e Suki n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job8:2 “Onootuusa wa okwogera ebifaanana bityo? Ebigambo by'akamwa ko mpewo ey'amaanyi. 
Job8:3 Katonda atyoboola obutuufu? Yadde Omuyinza wa buli kantu atyoboola obwenkanya? 
Job8:4 Abaana bo bwe baakola ekibi gy'ali, yabawaayo mu buyinza bw'emisango gyabwe." 
Job8:5 Bw'onoonoonya Katonda n'obwegendereza, bw'oneegayirira Omuyinza wa buli kantu," 
Job8:6 bw'onooba omutukuvu, omutuufu, amangu ago ajja kukulabirira, ekisulo kyo ajja kukizzaawo nga bwe kikugwanira." 
Job8:7 Amasooka go gaali matono, naye ennaku zo ez'oluvannyuma ziriyitimuka nnyo." 
Job8:8 “Buuza ezzadde eryakulembera, wekkaanye bajjajjaabwe bye baayiga." 
Job8:9 Ffe tuli ba jjo wano, tetulina kye tumanyi, n'ennaku ze tumala ku nsi kisiikirize busiikirize." 
Job8:10 Abo tebalikuyigiriza, tebalikugamba? Tebalyogera ebibali ku mutima?" 
Job8:11 Ekitoogo kiwanvuyira awatali lutobazzi? Olusa lukulira awatali mazzi? 
Job8:12 Bwe biba bitojjera, nga tebisaliddwa, bye bisooka emiddo gyonna okukala." 
Job8:13 Bwe lityo n'ekkubo lya bonna abeerabira Katonda; okusuubira kw'aboonoonyi bwe kuzaama. 
Job8:14 By'asuubiriramu biwero buwero, obwesige bwe bwenkana wuzi ya nnabbubi." 
Job8:15 Bw'alyesigama ennyumba ye, erigwa bugwi; alyekwata kuli naye teriyimirirawo." 
Job8:16 Ali ng'omuti omufukirire n'amazzi mu musana, gusuuliza emirandira gyagwo wonna mu nnimiro." 
Job8:17 Gugombeza emirandira gyagwo mu ntuumu y'amayinja; gwenoonyeza ekifo mu mayinja. 
Job8:18 Naye bw'agusigula mu kifo kyagwo, kigwegaana nti: ‘Sikulabangako.’" 
Job8:19 Ddala obulamu bwagwo bwe butyo bwe buggwaawo, emirala mu ttaka ne gisibukawo." 
Job8:20 Kituufu Katonda teyeemansula ataliiko musango, era tanyweza mukono gwa mubi." 
Job8:21 Olumu alijjuza akamwa ko n'enseko, emimwa gyo aligijjuza okujaguza." 
Job8:22 Abakukyawa alibambaza okuswala, n'eweema y'ababi terisigalawo.”" 
Job9:1 Yobu n'ayanukula, n'agamba nti: b" 
Job9:2 “Mazima mmanyi nti kino kituukirivu, naye omuntu asobola atya okuba omutuufu mu maaso ga Katonda?" 
Job9:3 Bw'alyagala okuwerennemba naye, talisobola kumwanukula n'ogumu ku mirundi olukumi." 
Job9:4 Mugezi mu mutima, muzira mu maanyi; ani yali amwesimbyemu, n'asigala mirembe?" 
Job9:5 Asengula ensozi, ne zitamanya, n'azimegga eri mu buswandi bwe." 
Job9:6 Anyeenya ensi mu kifo kyayo, empagi zaayo n'azikankanya." 
Job9:7 Agamba enjuba, n'eteyaka, emmunyeenye n'azissaako envumbo." 
Job9:8 Ayabamba eggulu obw'omu ati, n'atambulira ku mayengo g'ennyanja." 
Job9:9 Yakola emmunyeenye Ddubu ne Oriyoni n'Emmunyeenye Omusanvu, n'ebibinja ebirala emaserengeta." 
Job9:10 Akola ebinene ebiteefumiitirizika, n'ebyewuunyisa ebitabalika." 
Job9:11 Bw'ampitako, sirimulaba; bw'ayitawo, sirimumanya." 
Job9:12 Bw'akwakkula, ani anaamuziyiza? Ani anaamubuuza nti: ‘Okola ki?’" 
Job9:13 Katonda takomera busungu bwe, n'abayambi ba Rakabu baavunnama wansi we." 
Job9:14 “Nze ani nange amwesimbamu, nnaalondoba ntya ebigambo eby'okwogera naye?" 
Job9:15 Ne bwe sandibadde na musango, era sandyanukudde, omulamuzi wange nandimuwanjagidde buwanjagizi." 
Job9:16 Ne bwe nandimuyise n'ayitaba, sikkiriza nti yandimpulirizza." 
Job9:17 Yandimmerengudde ne kibuyaga, ebiwundu byange n'abyongera obungi awatali nsonga." 
Job9:18 Tandeka kussa ku mukka; anzijjuzza okukaayirirwa. 
Job9:19 Bwe gaba maanyi, w'amaanyi. Bwe buba bwenkanya, ani anaamutumya?" 
Job9:20 Ne bwe sandibadde na musango, akamwa kange kandigunsalidde; mba butabaako kinvunaanibwa, kandigunsinzizza." 
Job9:21 Siriiko musango, naye seefaako; obulamu bwange sibulabamu kantu." 
Job9:22 Byonna kye kimu; kyenva ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ataliiko musango n'omubi bombi abazikiriza.’ 
Job9:23 Akabenje bwe kattirawo amangu, asekerera okutekemuka kw'abataliiko musango." 
Job9:24 Ensi bw'egwa mu mikono gy'ababi, abalamuzi baayo abasiba kantuntunu. Oba si ye, kale ye ani oyo?" 
Job9:25 Ennaku zange ziwenyuka okukira omuddusi, zifuumuuka nga tezirabye ku ssanyu." 
Job9:26 Ziyitawo nga ziseeyeeya ng'amaato ag'emmuli, ng'empungu egwira omuyiggo gwayo." 
Job9:27 Singa ŋŋamba nti: ‘Nzija kwerabira ebinnuma, nzija kukyusa ku maaso, nsanyukeko,’" 
Job9:28 mba nkyatya ennaku yange yonna, nga mmanyi nti tojja kunzigyako musango." 
Job9:29 Oba gwansinga dda, nteganira ki omutali nsa?" 
Job9:30 Ne bwe nnaanaaba n'omuzira, emikono ne ngitukuza ne ssabbuuni," 
Job9:31 wandinnyinyise mu kirombe, n'ebyambalo byange ne bintamwa." 
Job9:32 Si muntu nga nze nti nandimwanukudde, nti twandisisinkanye mu mbuga." 
Job9:33 Singa nno wabaddewo atuwozesa ffembi, n'atussaako ffembi emikono gye," 
Job9:34 n'anzigyako omuggo gwe, okutiisa kwe ne kulekera awo okunkanga." 
Job9:35 Olwo nandyogedde nga simutya; naye kati nga bwendi agakikola sigalina. 
Job10:1 “Neetamiddwa obulamu bwange; n'olw'ekyo ka mpe ebbeetu okwemulugunya kwange, ka njogere nga nzigya mu kunyolwa kw'omu mutima gwange." 
Job10:2 Nzija kugamba Katonda nti: ‘Tonsalira musango; ntegeeza ky'onvunaana. 
Job10:3 Okunyigiriza kikuyamba, n'okanyuga eri omulimu gw'emikono gyo, n'oseka busesi ku biteeso by'ababi?" 
Job10:4 Amaaso g'olina ga mubiri? Olaba ng'omuntu bw'alaba? 
Job10:5 Ennaku zo ziri ng'ez'omuntu, n'emyaka gyo giri ng'egigye," 
Job10:6 kyova owenja ensobi zange, n'onoonyereza ekibi kyange," 
Job10:7 sso ng'omanyi siriiko musango era nga mpaawo ayinza kunnunula mu mikono gyo? 
Job10:8 Emikono gyo gye gyammumba, gye gyankola, kati oneefuula n'onsanyaawo?" 
Job10:9 Jjukira nti wammumba ng'ebbumba, kati ate oyagala onzizeeyo mu nfuufu?" 
Job10:10 Tewanfukumula ng'amata, n'onkwasa wamu nga bbongo," 
Job10:11 n'onnyambaza olususu n'ennyama, n'onduka n'amagumba n'ebinywa?" 
Job10:12 Wampa obulamu, n'ondaga ekisa, mu bulabirizi bwo okuuma omwoyo gwange." 
Job10:13 Naye kino wakikisa mu mutima gwo, mmanyi nti okirina mu mwoyo gwo:" 
Job10:14 Nti bwe mba nkoze ekibi, ontunuulira; toganya kibi kyange kusigala nga tekibonerezeddwa." 
Job10:15 Bwe mba omusobya, zinsanze! Ne bwe sandibadde na musango, sandiyimusizza mutwe gwange, Kubanga nzijudde ensonyi, nebbise mu nnaku zange." 
Job10:16 Bwe neewanika, onjigga ng'omwana gw'empologoma, n'oyoleka amaanyi go ageewuunyisa ku nze." 
Job10:17 Oleeta abajulirwa abaggya bannumirize, n'oyongera okunsunguwalira; n'onsindikira amagye go, limu ku ddala." 
Job10:18 Wanzigyira ki mu lubuto? Singa nno nafa nga tennaba liiso lindaba! 
Job10:19 Singa nno saabererawo ddala, oba singa olwava mu lubuto ne ntwalibwa mu ntaana!" 
Job10:20 Obunaku buti obw'obulamu bwange tebuweddeeko? Kyukira eri, nfuneko ku kalembereza ak'essanyu," 
Job10:21 nga sinnagenda gye batadda, mu nsi y'ekizikiza n'ekisiikirize eky'olumbe," 
Job10:22 ensi ey'ekizikiza ekikutte be zigizigi, ey'ekisiikirize ky'olumbe n'obutabangufu, ekitangaala gye kyaka naye ne kiba ng'ekizikiza.’ ”" 
Job11:1 Zofari ow'e Naame n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job11:2 “Ebigambo bino byonna binaasigala tebyanukuddwa, omwogezi wa bino yejjeerere?" 
Job11:3 Ebigambo byo eby'olusaago byandisirisizza abantu, tewali anaakugambako ng'ovumye?" 
Job11:4 Anti ogambye nti: ‘Bye njigiriza tekuli bbala, era ndi mutukuvu mu maaso go.’" 
Job11:5 Singa nno Katonda yennyini y'ayogedde, n'akwolekeza emimwa gye," 
Job11:6 n'akubikkulira ebyama by'amagezi, kubanga amagezi gaba ga ngeri bbiri. Manya nti Katonda akusabye kitono okulabira ku bibi byo kye bigwanira." 
Job11:7 Oyinza okwefaananyiriza ebyama bya Katonda, n'okupima n'otuuka Omuyinza wa buli kantu gy'akoma?" 
Job11:8 Watumbiivu okuyisa n'eggulu, onookola otya? Wakka ne wayisa n'emagombe, onoomanya ki?" 
Job11:9 Wasinga n'ensi obuwanvu, n'ennyanja obugazi." 
Job11:10 Bw'ajja n'akussa mu kkomera, n'atuuza olukiiko, ani anaamuwakanya?" 
Job11:11 Y'amanyi abantu abalimbalimba. Bw'alaba ekibi, teyekkaanya?" 
Job11:12 Kyokka omuntu omutali kantu tasobola kugeziwala ng'omwana gw'endogoyi ey'ettale bwe gutazaalibwa nga muntu. 
Job11:13 “Naye omutima gwo bw'ogussa mu nteeko, n'oyanjala gy'ali emikono gyo," 
Job11:14 obwonoonefu obuli mu mikono gyo n'obweggyako n'otokkiriza bubi kusula mu weema yo," 
Job11:15 olwo amaaso go oligayimusa awatali nsonyi, oliba munywevu, togenda kutya." 
Job11:16 Olyerabira ennaku yo, oligijjukira ng'amazzi agaakuluggusse ne gagenda." 
Job11:17 Obulamu bwo buliba butangaavu n'okusinga ettuntu, n'enzikiza erifuuka ng'obudde obukedde." 
Job11:18 Oliba mugumu, kubanga walibaawo essuubi, oliba mu ddembe, olyebaka mirembe." 
Job11:19 Oliwummula, awatali akutiisa, bangi balinoonya amaaso go." 
Job11:20 Naye amaaso g'ababi galiyimbaala, n'obuddukiro bulibesamba; essuubi lyabwe liriba mu kussa mukka muvannyuma.”" 
Job12:1 Yobu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job12:2 “Awatali kubuusabuusa mmwe bantu abo, n'amagezi galifa nammwe." 
Job12:3 Naye nange nnina okutegeera nga mmwe; siri mutene kubasinga. Ebyo byonna ani atabimanyi? 
Job12:4 Nsekererwa mu bannange, nze eyakoowoola Katonda n'ampulira, nsekererwa newandibadde nga ndi mutuukirivu, siriiko musango." 
Job12:5 Abeetuulidde entende banyooma ennaku, ng'etuukirira abo ebigere byabwe be biseerera." 
Job12:6 Weema z'abanyazi ziri mirembe n'ez'abasoomooza Katonda ziri wagumu, abo abatwalira Katonda mu ngalo zaabwe." 
Job12:7 “Kale buuza ebisolo bijja kukuyigiriza, oba ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga, bijja kukutegeeza." 
Job12:8 Oba yogera n'ensi, ejja kukuyigiriza; oba leka ebyennyanja mu nnyanja bikubuulire." 
Job12:9 Mu ebyo byonna kiki ekitamanyi ng'omukono gw'Omukama gwe gwakola kino? 
Job12:10 Mu mikono gye mwe muli obulamu bwa buli kiramu, n'omwoyo gwa buli muntu." 
Job12:11 Okutu tekulamula bigambo, ng'olulimi bwe lwawula obuwoomi bw'emmere?" 
Job12:12 “Amagezi tegasangibwa mu bakadde, n'okuwangaala tekuleeta kutegeera?" 
Job12:13 “Amagezi n'obuyinza biri naye; okubuulira n'okutegeera bibye. 
Job12:14 Bw'ayabya, mpaawo addamu kuzimba; gw'assa mu nkomyo tasobola kuggulirwa." 
Job12:15 Bw'azibikira amazzi, nga gakalira; bw'agata, gamalawo ensi." 
Job12:16 Amaanyi n'amagezi biri naye; bombi babe: alimba n'alimbibwa. 
Job12:17 Abawi b'amagezi abatwala bambuddwa, abalamuzi n'abawugulaza." 
Job12:18 Asumulula ekimyu kya bakabaka, ebiwato byabwe n'abisibamu omusipi;" 
Job12:19 bakabona abatwala bambuddwa, ab'obuyinza abaagundiira n'abalinnimula ku ttaka." 
Job12:20 Aziba emimwa gy'abeesigwa, n'aggyawo ennamula y'abakadde." 
Job12:21 Abakungu abayiwako okugayibwa, ab'amaanyi n'addiriza ekimyu kyabwe." 
Job12:22 Ayolesa ebyekwese eyo wansi mu nzikiza, ekisiikirize ky'olumbe n'akissa mu kitangaala." 
Job12:23 Amawanga agafuula ga maanyi, ate n'agazikiriza; agaziya amawanga, ate n'agasaasaanya." 
Job12:24 Abakulira amawanga ababuguyaza, n'ababungiza mu ddungu eteri makubo." 
Job12:25 Baliwammanta mu nzikiza awatali kitangaala, n'abatagaza ng'abatamiivu.”" 
Job13:1 “Bino byonna wuuno amaaso gange gaabiraba, n'okutu kwange kwabiwulira, ne kubitegeera." 
Job13:2 Bye mumanyi nange bye mmanyi, siri mutene kubasinga." 
Job13:3 Naye njagala njogere n'Omuyinza wa buli kantu, neegomba mpoze ne Katonda." 
Job13:4 Naye mmwe muli balimbalimba, mwenna muli basawo abatagasa." 
Job13:5 Singa nno mwenna musirise! Ekyo kyandibabeeredde kya magezi. 
Job13:6 Kale muwulire empoza yange; muwulirize okwerwanako kw'emimwa gyange. 
Job13:7 Munaayogera ebikyamu ku lwa Katonda? Mwogere ebitatuuse ku lulwe? 
Job13:8 Muneekubiira gy'ali? Munaawoza mu kifo kye? 
Job13:9 Aba kubekkaanya, byandibagendedde mirembe? Munaamulimba nga bwe mulimba abantu?" 
Job13:10 Yennyini ajja kubagugumbula, bwe mugeza okwekubiira mu kyama." 
Job13:11 Ekitiibwa kye tekibatiisa? Entiisa ye tebakwata? 
Job13:12 Ebirowoozo byammwe, ngero za vvu; okwewozaako kwammwe kwewozaako kwa bbumba." 
Job13:13 “Musirikeeko nange njogereko; kale buli kyagala kinzijire. 
Job13:14 Lwaki neesobeza kennyini, obulamu bwange ne mbussa mu kabenje?" 
Job13:15 Ne bw'ananzita, era nzija kusuubira mu ye; kyokka nzija kuwoza amakubo gaange mu maaso ge." 
Job13:16 Anti kino kyandindokola, kubanga omwonoonyi tasobola kujja mu maaso ge." 
Job13:17 Muwulire kye ŋŋamba, ne bye nnyinyonnyola biyingire mu matu gammwe." 
Job13:18 Kale ntegese empoza yange, mmanyi nti nzija kwejjeerera." 
Job13:19 Aluwa oyo anaawoza nange? Kale olwo nzija kusirika nzigwewo. 
Job13:20 “Bibiri by'oba onkolera, olwo sijja kukwekweka:" 
Job13:21 Nzigyako omukono gwo; entiisa yo ekome okunkuba encukwe. 
Job13:22 Mpita, nzija kukwanukula; oba ka njogere, ggwe oyanukule." 
Job13:23 Ebitatuuse n'ebibi byange byenkana wa? Njoleka emisango gyange ne bye nnyonoonamu. 
Job13:24 Lwaki okweka amaaso go, n'ompisa ng'omulabe wo?" 
Job13:25 Ekikoola empewo ky'efuuwa okiyisa na bukambwe? Akasubi akakalu onookalondoola? 
Job13:26 Ompandiikako ebintu ebikambwe, n'onsibako ebibi by'omu buvubuka bwange." 
Job13:27 Ebigere byange obitadde mu masamba, obukubo bwange bwonna obukesse ng'olamba ebigere byange." 
Job13:28 Omuntu aggweerera ng'ekintu ekivundu, ng'ekyambalo ekiriiriddwa ennyenje." 
Job14:1 “Omuntu azaalibwa omukazi wa kabanga bubanga ate ajjudde nnaku. 
Job14:2 Ayanya mangu ng'ekimuli, ate n'akala; adduka nga kisiikirize, tabandaala." 
Job14:3 Oyo gw'ogamba okutunuuliza amaaso go, omuleete, muwoze naye?" 
Job14:4 Ani asobola okuggya ekitukuvu mu kitali kitukuvu? Teri n'omu! 
Job14:5 Ennaku z'omuntu zaakakasibwa dda, n'omuwendo gw'emyezi gy'alimala wagugera dda; wateesa dda w'akoma, talisukkawo." 
Job14:6 Muggyeko amaaso go, muleke yekka, okutuusa lw'anaamalako ennaku ze ng'omupakasi." 
Job14:7 “Waakiri n'omuti gulina ku ssuubi, bwe gutemebwa, guddamu ne guloka, obusibukira bwagwo tebuliggwaako." 
Job14:8 Emirandira gyagwo gikyayinza okuvundira mu ttaka, n'ekikolo kyagwo ne kifiira mu ttaka," 
Job14:9 naye oluwunyiriza luti ku mazzi, nga gumeruka, nga gutandika kutojjera ng'omuti omuto." 
Job14:10 Naye omuntu bw'afa, ng'ayenjebuka; bw'assa omukka omuvannyuma, nga takyaliwo." 
Job14:11 Ng'amazzi bwe gaggwa mu nnyanja, n'omugga bwe muggwa amazzi ne gukalira," 
Job14:12 n'omuntu bw'ali; bwe yeebaka, tazuukuka; okutuusa eggulu lwe liriggwaawo, talitunula, talizuukuka mu tulo twe." 
Job14:13 “Singa nno onkwese emagombe, n'ombikkira eyo okutuusa obusungu bwo nga buyise, n'onteerawo obudde n'onzijukira!" 
Job14:14 Omufu bw'afa, aliddamu n'aba omulamu? Ennaku zonna ez'okufaabiina kwange, nzija kulindirira okutuusa lwe nnazzibwa obuggya." 
Job14:15 Bw'olimpita, ŋŋenda kwanukula; oliyaayaanira omulimu gw'emikono gyo." 
Job14:16 Olibala enta z'ebigere byange, toliddayo kussa mwoyo ku bibi byange." 
Job14:17 Emisango gyange girissibwako envumbo mu nsawo, ebibi byange olibibikkako." 
Job14:18 “Ng'olusozi bwe lugwa, ne luggweekerera; ng'ejjinja bwe lisiguukululwa mu kifo kyalyo," 
Job14:19 n'amazzi bwe gaseeteeza amayinja, ne mukoka nga bw'akuluggusa ettaka, essuubi ly'omuntu bw'olimalawo." 
Job14:20 Omukinako lumu nga lwe lumala, oyo ng'agenze; ofuula amaaso ge n'omugobera eri." 
Job14:21 Oba abaana be bagulumizibwa, takimanyi; oba tebaweebwa kitiibwa, era takitegeera." 
Job14:22 Awulira bulumi bwa mubiri gwe bwokka; takaabira mulala, wabula ye yekka.”" 
Job15:1 Elifazi ow'e Temani n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job15:2 “Omugezi yandyanukuzza magezi gatyo agali ng'empewo, oba n'ajjuza olubuto lwe n'empewo ey'ebuvanjuba?" 
Job15:3 Mu kuwakana yandireese ebigambo ebitalina kye bisobola, n'emboozi ezitaganyula?" 
Job15:4 Sso ggwe oggyawo obutuukirivu, n'olemesa okusinza mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Job15:5 Obwonoonefu bwo buyigiriza akamwa ko, n'olondawo olulimi olw'abakupya." 
Job15:6 Akamwa ko kennyini kakusalira omusango, si kange; emimwa gyo gye gikulumiriza." 
Job15:7 “Mu bantu ggwe osoose okuzaalibwa? Wajja ku nsi nga n'obusozi tebunnabaawo? 
Job15:8 Wali owulirizza mu lukiiko lwa Katonda? Olowooza ggwe mugezi wekka? 
Job15:9 Kiki ky'omanyi, ffe kye tutamanyi? Magezi ki g'olina ffe ge tutalina?" 
Job15:10 Ab'envi n'abakadde batusemba, abakadde n'okukira kitaawo." 
Job15:11 Ebikubagizo bya Katonda tebikumalira, ebyo ebigambo ebigonvu ebikugambibwa?" 
Job15:12 Lwaki omutima gwo gukuleetera okwewanika? Lwaki amaaso go gatemereza," 
Job15:13 n'okyusiza Katonda obusungu bwo, n'ofumbukula mu kamwa ko ebigambo ebyenkana awo?" 
Job15:14 Omuntu ye ani asobola obutabaako bbala, oyo azaalibwa omukazi ayinza okuba omutuufu?" 
Job15:15 Oba Katonda teyeesiga batuukirivu be, oba n'eggulu, mu maaso ge si ttukuvu," 
Job15:16 leero nno alabisa omuntu ayeenyinyalwa, omwonoonefu, anywa empisa embi ng'anywa amazzi!" 
Job15:17 “Mpuliriza, nzija kukunnyonnyola, ka nkunyumize kye nalaba," 
Job15:18 abagezi kye bakakasa, tebaalekayo kye bajja ku bajjajjaabwe," 
Job15:19 bokka abo be baaweebwa ensi, tewaali mugwira yabayitamu." 
Job15:20 Omubi ennaku zonna ennaku emukalanga, n'omukambwe emyaka gy'anaamala gyamukwekebwa." 
Job15:21 Amaloboozi agatiisa ge gavuga mu matu ge; byonna nga biri mulaala abajambula we bamulumbira. 
Job15:22 Talina ssuubi kudduka kizikiza, anti ng'ekitala kyamutegekerwa." 
Job15:23 Abungeeta, ky'ali, mmere ya nsega; amanyi ng'olunaku olw'enzikiza lutuuse." 
Job15:24 Obuyinike n'ennaku bimwesisiwaza; bimukinyeeko nga kabaka ataze okulumba," 
Job15:25 kubanga yagolola omukono alwanyise Katonda, ne yeewaga okulwanyisa Omuyinza wa buli kantu," 
Job15:26 yadduka n'ejjoogo agende amulumbe, ng'akutte engabo ennene ate eŋŋumu." 
Job15:27 Newandibadde yenna mugevvu mu maaso, ng'alebezza n'endira," 
Job15:28 alisula mu bibuga ebifuuse amatongo, mu nnyumba omutasula muntu, ezimogoka okufuukamu entuumu z'amayinja." 
Job15:29 Taligaggawala, n'ebintu bye tebiribeerera; by'alina tebirisimba mirandira mu ttaka." 
Job15:30 Taliwona mu nzikiza, omuliro guliyokya obusibukira bwe; alikunguzzibwa eri n'omukka gw'akamwa ke." 
Job15:31 Aleme kwerimba nga yeesiga ebitaliimu, kubanga taliggyamu kantu." 
Job15:32 Olunaku lwe luliba terunnatuuka n'afuna empeera ye, ettabi lye teririddamu kuddugaza." 
Job15:33 Aliba ng'omuzabbibu omusaleko ebirimba ebitannayengera, ng'oliva ekunkumula ekimuli kyayo." 
Job15:34 Ekinywi ky'aboonoonyi mpaamu kavaamu, n'omuliro gulisenkenya weema z'abalya enguzi." 
Job15:35 Olubuto baafuna lwa kulabya nnaku, era bazaala bubi; embuto zaabwe zizaala nkwe nsa.”" 
Job16:1 Yobu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job16:2 “Ebiri ng'ebyo mbiwulidde emirundi mingi. Mwenna muli bakubagiza babi. 
Job16:3 Ebigambo byo ebikunta ng'empewo tebiggwaayo? Ggwe kiki ekikutinkuula okwogera ebitakutuka? 
Job16:4 Nange mbadde nsobola okwogera nga mmwe, singa mmwe mubadde mu kifo kyange; nandyogedde bingi ku mmwe, ne mbanyeenyeza n'omutwe." 
Job16:5 Naye n'akamwa kange nandibagumizza, emimwa gyange gyandibakubagizza ne mutoowolokoka." 
Job16:6 Naye ne bwe nnaayogera, era obulumi bwange sibuweere; ne bwe nnaasirika, tebujja kugenda." 
Job16:7 “Kyokka kati Katonda ankooyezza. Mikwano gyange gyonna ogirese ttayo. 
Job16:8 Ondizze; ampaayiriza afuuse ampaako obujulizi, yeesimbyewo okunnumiriza, ampaayiriza mu maaso gange." 
Job16:9 Obusungu bwe bunjuzaamu, bunjigga; annumidde n'obujiji; Omulabe wange antunuuliza amaaso makambwe." 
Job16:10 Abantu baasamya akamwa kaabwe okunsekerera, bankuba empi nga banjolonga, ne beekoba okunnwanyisa." 
Job16:11 Katonda ampaddeyo mu mikono gy'abeeyisa obubi; n'ankasuka mu buyinza bw'ababi. 
Job16:12 Nali mirembe, n'ajja ansesseggula; yankwata ebikya n'ambetenta. Nze gw'afudde ow'okulondoola." 
Job16:13 Obusaale bwe bunneetoolodde, awatali kusaasira afumise olubuto lwange, endulwe yange n'eyiika ku ttaka." 
Job16:14 Annumba muddiriŋŋanwa; anfubutukira ng'omutabaazi. 
Job16:15 “Omubiri gwange ngutungiddeko ekikutiya, obwanga bwange mbuziise mu ttaka." 
Job16:16 Amaaso gammyuse olw'okukaaba, n'ekisiikirize ky'olumbe kibisse ebikowe byange." 
Job16:17 Naye sso emikono gyange tegikolanga kabi, essaala zange zibadde ntukuvu." 
Job16:18 “Ayi nsi, tobikka musaayi gwange, n'omulanga gwange guleke gubulweko obuwummuliro." 
Job16:19 Na kati omujulirwa wange ali mu ggulu, ampolereza ali waggulu eyo." 
Job16:20 Nze n'omuwolereza wange tuli ba mukwano; eriiso lyange likulukusiza amaziga eri Katonda. 
Job16:21 Awolereza abantu eri Katonda, ng'omuntu bw'awolereza mikwano gye." 
Job16:22 Emyaka gijja kuyita mitono, nkwate ekkubo gye sigenda kudda." 
Job17:1 “Omukka gwange gukendedde; ennaku zange zisaliddwako, ekinsigalidde, ntaana." 
Job17:2 Mazima wonna neebunguluddwa abansekerera; amaaso gange gasula gatunuulidde obukyayi bwabwe. 
Job17:3 Omusingo gwange gusse kumpi naawe. Ate ani omulala ananneeyimirira? 
Job17:4 Omutima gwabwe waguggalira baleme kutegeera, awo nno tolibaganya kuwangula." 
Job17:5 Omuntu bw'aliroopa banywanyi be yeegabanire ebintu, amaaso g'abaana be galiyimbaala." 
Job17:6 “Yanteekawo ng'ekyokwogerwako eri buli muntu, omuntu gwe bafujjira amalusu mu maaso." 
Job17:7 Amaaso gange gafumye olw'ennaku; ebitundu byange eby'omubiri biggweekerera ng'ekisiikirize. 
Job17:8 Abatuufu bawuniikirira olwa kino, abataliiko musango basiikuddwa okulwanyisa aboonoonyi." 
Job17:9 Naye abatuukirivu balisigala mu makubo gaabwe; ab'emikono emirongoofu balyeyongera amaanyi. 
Job17:10 “Kale nno, mmwe mwenna mukomeewo, mujje; sijja kusangamu mugezi n'omu mu mmwe." 
Job17:11 Ennaku zange ziyise, ebirowoozo byange bisaasaanye, n'ebyo omutima gwange bye gwegomba." 
Job17:12 Abo ekiro baakifuula misana; nga bukyali nzikiza ne bagamba nti: ‘Omusana gusembedde’. 
Job17:13 Oba essuubi lyange ge magombe okuba amaka gange, oba njala obuliri bwange mu nzikiza," 
Job17:14 oba entaana ngiyita nti: ‘Ggwe taata!’, n'envunyu nti: ‘Ggwe maama, ggwe mwannyinaze!’" 
Job17:15 Olwo essuubi lindi ludda wa? Ani anandabira essanyu lyange? 
Job17:16 Byonna binaaserengeta ku miryango gy'emagombe, tunakkirira wamu mu nfuufu?”" 
Job18:1 Biludadi ow'e Suki n'ayanukula, n'agamba nti:" 
Job18:2 “Munaatuusa wa okuwakana? Mubeereemu amagezi, tulyoke twogere." 
Job18:3 Lwaki otulaba ng'ente obute, mu maaso go ne tuba ng'abasiru?" 
Job18:4 Ggwe mu busungu bwo eyeeyuzaayuza obulere, ensi esigale ttayo olw'okubeera ggwe, oba enjazi zisiguukululwe we zibadde?" 
Job18:5 Ettaala y'ababi bagizikizza, omumuli gwe tegukyayaka." 
Job18:6 Ekitangaala mu weema ye kifuuse nzikiza, n'ettawaaza emuli mu mbiriizi ezikidde." 
Job18:7 Amaanyi g'omusinde gwe gakugiddwa; by'ateesezza yennyini bye bimusudde. 
Job18:8 Ebigere bye bimusudde mu kitimba, avuyira mu butiba bwakyo." 
Job18:9 Ekitimba kikutte ekisinziiro kye, omutego gumunywezezza." 
Job18:10 Empuluttulizo emukwekeddwa mu ttaka, n'omutego gumukiikiddwa mu kkubo." 
Job18:11 Entiisa emukuba ensisi ku njuyi zonna, emukanga buli w'alinnya ekigere." 
Job18:12 Akabi kamwoya, okuzikirira kulindiridde okugwa kwe." 
Job18:13 Omubiri gwe guliiriddwako ebitundu, omuggulanda w'olumbe amalawo ebitundu by'omubiri gwe." 
Job18:14 Obwesigwa buggyiddwa mu weema ye; omukulubbya omutwale eri kabaka w'entiisa.
