Job18:15 Asula mu weema etekyali yiye, ebibiriiti ebyokya bimansiddwa ku kisulo kye." 
Job18:16 Wansi emirandira gye gikaze waggulu amatabi ge gawotoka. 
Job18:17 Okumujjukira kuggweekeredde mu nsi, takyalina linnya wonna ku nsi." 
Job18:18 Aggyiddwa mu kitangaala n'asindikibwa mu nzikiza, n'agobebwa ku nkulungo y'ensi." 
Job18:19 Talina baana yadde abazzukulu; talina asigaddewo mu nsi mwe yabeeranga. 
Job18:20 Ab'ebugwanjuba bawuniikiridde okulaba ekimutuuseeko; ab'ebuvanjuba bakwatiddwa ensisi. 
Job18:21 Ebyo bye bigwira ekisulo ky'omubi, n'ekifo ky'oyo atamanyi Katonda.”" 
Job19:1 Yobu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job19:2 “Munaatuusa wa okunnyiikaaza, n'okunseseggula n'ebigambo?" 
Job19:3 Guno gwa kkumi nga munkolokota, temukwatibwa nsonyi kungigganya." 
Job19:4 Oba ddala nawubwa, ensobi yange esigala mutawaana gwange." 
Job19:5 “Bwe mwagala okulaga bwe munsinga, ne mweyamba obunaku bwange okunvunaana," 
Job19:6 mumanye nti Katonda annyigirizza, annyambise ekitimba kye." 
Job19:7 “Ne bwe ndeekaana nti: ‘Nnyigiriziddwa,’ siddibwamu; ne bwe mpanjaga, tewali annejjeereza." 
Job19:8 Atadde emisanvu mu kkubo lyange, siyinza kuyitawo; akakubo kange akabuutikidde enzikiza." 
Job19:9 Annyambudde ekitiibwa kyange, engule aginzigye ku mutwe." 
Job19:10 Antaaguddetaagudde ku njuyi zonna, nzigwawo, essuubi lyange alisimbudde ng'asimbula omuti." 
Job19:11 Obuswandi bwe bunneesererako, ambala ng'omu ku balabe be." 
Job19:12 Amagye ge gataze n'amaanyi, gakutte ekkubo lyago okunnumba, weema yange gagizinze okugyetooloola." 
Job19:13 “Baganda bange abangobyeko, n'abamanyi banjawukanyeeko." 
Job19:14 Abeŋŋanda bandeseewo, ne mikwano gyange banneerabidde." 
Job19:15 Abagenyiwadde ewange n'abazaana bampisa ng'ow'ebweru; mu maaso gaabwe nninga omugwira. 
Job19:16 Omuweereza wange bwe mmuyita, tannyanukula, nnina kumwegayirira na kamwa kange." 
Job19:17 Omukka gwe nzisa mukazi wange agwenyinyala, abaana ba nnyabo mbawunyirira." 
Job19:18 N'obwana obulenzi bungaya, bwe nsituka nga bunjooga." 
Job19:19 Mikwano gyange enfiirabulago banneetamwa; be njagala banneefuulidde. 
Job19:20 Ennyama yange n'olususu bikwatidde ku magumba gange, nnyama ya kibuno yokka gye nsigazza." 
Job19:21 “Munsaasire, munsaasire, mmwe mikwano gyange, kubanga omukono gw'Omukama gunkubye." 
Job19:22 Lwaki munjigganya nga Katonda? Temukkuta nnyama yange? 
Job19:23 “Singa nno ebigambo byange biwandiikibwa, singa nno bissiddwa mu kitabo," 
Job19:24 oba ne byolebwa n'ekyuma ku lubaati, oba ne byolebwa ku lwazi emirembe gyonna!" 
Job19:25 Mmanyi nti Omununuzi wange mulamu, mu luvannyuma aliyimirira ku nfuufu." 
Job19:26 Newandibadde ng'olususu luno lumaze okwonooneka, awatali mubiri gwange, ndiraba Katonda;" 
Job19:27 ndimulaba nze nzennyini, n'amaaso gange ndimwerolera, si mulala wabula nze. Omutima gwange nga guyaayaana mu nze munda!" 
Job19:28 “Bwe mugamba nti: ‘Tumuyigganye tutya? Anti ensibuko y'emitawaana gye eri mu ye,’" 
Job19:29 mwennyini mwanditidde ekitala, kubanga obusungu bubonereza na kitala; olwo mulimanya nti eriyo okulamula.”" 
Job20:1 Naye Zofari ow'e Naame n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job20:2 “Ebirowoozo byange bitabanguse ne bimpaliriza okwanukula, kubanga ntawaanyiziddwa." 
Job20:3 Mpulidde by'onvunaana ebimpeebuula, omutima gwange ne gunsindika nnyanukule." 
Job20:4 “Kino okimanyi okuva mu masooka, okuva omuntu lwe yateekebwa ku nsi," 
Job20:5 nti okujaguza kw'ababi kwa kabanga bubanga, essanyu ly'abeeyisa obubi limala kaseera buseera." 
Job20:6 Okwekuza kwe ne bwe kulituuka ku ggulu, omutwe gwe ne gukoona ku bire," 
Job20:7 alizikirira emirembe gyonna okufaanana obubi bwe; abaamulaba balibuuza nti: ‘Aluwa?’ 
Job20:8 Abulawo ng'ekirooto, talidddamu kuzuuka; agobeddwawo ng'okulabikirwa kw'ekiro." 
Job20:9 Eriiso erimulabye, teririmulaba nate, n'ekifo kye tekiriddayo kumutunuulira." 
Job20:10 Abaana be baliriyira abaavu; emikono gye girizzaayo bye yalina. 
Job20:11 Amaanyi g'obuvubuka bwe agaali mu magumba ge galyebaka naye mu nfuufu. 
Job20:12 “Newandibadde ekibi kituŋŋununa mu kamwa ke, ng'akikweka wansi w'olulimi lwe," 
Job20:13 newandibadde nga tasobola kukkiriza n'akireka, wabula akikisiza mu kamwa ke," 
Job20:14 naye emmere ye erimukaayirira mu lubuto, erifuuka busagwa bwa ssalambwa munda mu ye." 
Job20:15 Alyegoga obugagga bwe yamirungusa, Katonda olubuto lwe alirubusesemya." 
Job20:16 Alinuuna obusagwa bw'amasalambwa, olulimi lw'enswera lulimutta." 
Job20:17 Taliraba ku bugga bukulukuta muzigo, n'obwala bw'engezi y'omubisi gw'enjuki n'amata." 
Job20:18 Bye yatuuyanira alibizzaayo nga taliddeeko; amagoba g'aggye mu by'atunze taligeesiimiramu. 
Job20:19 Kubanga yatulugunya abaavu n'abaleka ttayo; yanyaga amayumba g'ataazimba. 
Job20:20 “Mazima taliweerako mu kwoya kwe; tasobola kwewonya na bugagga bwe. 
Job20:21 Tasigazizza kantu ka kulya; awo nno emikisa gye tegiribeerera. 
Job20:22 Ne mu bugagga obungi mw'ali, ennaku zirimusanga, bwonna obulumi bw'okubonaabona bulimugwira." 
Job20:23 Ng'amaze okujjuza olubuto lwe, Katonda alita obusungu bwe ne bumwesererako, n'amuyiriba emiggo gye." 
Job20:24 Alidduka ebyokulwanyisa eby'ekyuma, naye akasaale ak'ekikomo ne kamufumita." 
Job20:25 Akasaale kasozze ne kafulumira mu mugongo gwe, n'olulimi lwako olumyansa luyise mu kibumba kye; entiisa emujjudde." 
Job20:26 Enzikiza ekutte erindiridde obugagga bwe; omuliro ogutawujjiddwa gulimusenkenya, gulisenkenya buli ekisigalidde mu weema ye." 
Job20:27 Eggulu liryoleka okusobya kwe, n'ettaka lirimusitukiramu." 
Job20:28 Omujjuzo gulikuluggusa ennyumba ye, amataba ku lunaku lw'obuswandi bwa Katonda." 
Job20:29 Ogwo gwe mugabo Katonda gw'aliwa ababi, obusika Katonda bw'abategekedde.”" 
Job21:1 Ne Yobu n'ayanukula, n'agamba nti:" 
Job21:2 “Mbeegayiridde, muwulire bye ŋŋamba; ekyo kye kiba kibeera ekikubagizo kye mumpa." 
Job21:3 Muŋŋumiikirize nga njogera, bwe nnaamala okwogera, munansekerera." 
Job21:4 Okwemulugunya kwange nkwolekezza muntu? Lwaki sandigumiikirizza? 
Job21:5 Muntunuulire, mwewuunye, mukwate ku mimwa gyammwe." 
Job21:6 Bwe nkirowoozaako nkubwa encukwe; omubiri gwange gwesisiwadde. 
Job21:7 Lwaki ababi basigalawo nga balamu, ne bakaddiwa, ne beeyongera amaanyi?" 
Job21:8 Ezzadde lyabwe bali awo balirabako; bazzukulu baabwe bali mu maaso gaabwe. 
Job21:9 Amaka gaabwe gali mu ddembe, matebenkevu, omuggo gwa Katonda tegubaliiko." 
Job21:10 Sseddume zaabwe teziremerera kuzaalisa, n'ente zaabwe zizaala, tezisowola." 
Job21:11 Abaana baabwe babaggyayo ng'eggana; amabujje gaabwe geebuusa. 
Job21:12 Bayimbira ku bugoma n'ennanga; basanyukira ku maloboozi g'endere. 
Job21:13 Obulamu bwabwe babumala mu kusanyuka; bakkirira emagombe mu ddembe. 
Job21:14 Kyokka bagamba Katonda nti: ‘Tuviire! Tetwagala kumanya makubo go. 
Job21:15 Omuyinza wa buli kantu ye ani tulyoke tumuweereze? Bwe tumwegayirira kituganyula?’ 
Job21:16 Naye emikisa gyabwe tegiri mu buyinza bwabwe, kyenva neesambira ddala ebiteeso by'ababi." 
Job21:17 “Ettawaaza y'ababi emirundi emeka gy'ezikira? Emirundi emeka ng'akacwano kabajjira, okuzikirira kw'abagabanyizaako mu busungu bwe?" 
Job21:18 Emirundi emeka gye bali ng'ebisusunku mu mpewo, ng'ebirerya ebikuŋŋunsibwa omuyaga?" 
Job21:19 ‘Ekibonerezo ky'omuntu Katonda akiterekera abaana be’, amwebonerereze yennyini akitegeere." 
Job21:20 Amaaso geerabireko okuzikirira kwe, anywe ku busungu bw'Omuyinza wa buli kantu." 
Job21:21 Kiki ky'akyalabirira mu nnyumba ye gy'alese emabega, ng'emyezi egyamusalirwa giweddeko?" 
Job21:22 “Waliwo aliyigiriza Katonda amagezi, oyo alamula abeebitiibwa?" 
Job21:23 Omu afa nga yenna w'amaanyi, ali bulungi, ali mirembe," 
Job21:24 enda ye ng'ejjudde amasavu, amagumba ge nga gafumbekedde obusomyo;" 
Job21:25 n'omulala n'afa ng'omwoyo gwe gulimu ennyiike, nga teyeeyagalanga nako." 
Job21:26 So bombi balyebaka wamu mu nfuufu, envunyu ne zibabikka." 
Job21:27 “Mmanyi bulungi bye mulowooza, bye muteesa okunnumika." 
Job21:28 Anti mugamba nti: ‘Ennyumba ya naggagga eruwa, weema ababi mwe baasulanga?’" 
Job21:29 Temwabuuza buli muyise agenda? Temwafaayo ku bye bagamba: 
Job21:30 nti omubi awonyezebwa olunaku olw'akacwano, nti atalizibwa ku lunaku olw'obusungu?" 
Job21:31 Ani alimwatulira ku neeyisa ye? Ani alimusasula olw'ebyo by'akola? 
Job21:32 Atwalibwa mu ntaana, amalaalo ge ne gasigala nga gakuumibwa." 
Job21:33 Ettaka ly'omu kiwonvu limuwoomera; buli muntu yenna amugoberera, n'ebbinja ddene eryamusookayo." 
Job21:34 “Awo nno muyinza mutya okunkubagiza n'omutali nsa? Bye mwanukudde si kirala wabula bulimba busa.” 
Job22:1 Naye Elifazi ow'e Temani n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job22:2 “Omuntu ayinza okugasa Katonda, n'omutegeevu ayinza okubaako ky'amuyambamu?" 
Job22:3 Ne bw'oliba omutuukirivu, ekyo Omuyinza wa buli kantu kimugasa ki? Amakubo go ne bwe gaba gatuukiridde, anaagasirwamu ki?" 
Job22:4 “Lwa bulungi bwo kyava akuvunaana, n'akuwaabira emisango?" 
Job22:5 Obwonoonefu bwo tebuyitiridde, n'ebyonoono byo nga tebiggwaayo?" 
Job22:6 Baganda bo wabasaliranga emisingo awatali nsonga, abantu n'obambula engoye zaabwe, n'obaleka bwereere." 
Job22:7 Akooye tewamuwa mazzi, n'omuyala n'omumma emmere." 
Job22:8 Wali musajja ow'amaanyi alina ettaka, omusajja assibwamu ekitiibwa, nga kwe wasenga." 
Job22:9 Bannamwandu wabagoba ngalo nsa, bamulekwa n'obamala amaanyi." 
Job22:10 Ebitimba kyebivudde bikwetooloola, entiisa ey'embagirawo kyevudde ekukankanya;" 
Job22:11 kyova tolaba kubanga enzikiza nnyingi, n'omujjuzo kyeguvudde gukubbika." 
Job22:12 “Katonda tasukkulumye okwenkana eggulu? Tunuulira emmunyeenye gye zeewanise, kumpi ki?" 
Job22:13 Ate n'ogamba nti: ‘Katonda amanyi ki? Alamula ng'ayita mu nzikiza eyo enkwafu? 
Job22:14 Ebire ebikwafu bimubisse, tasobola kutulaba; atambulira ku nkulungo y'eggulu.’" 
Job22:15 Oyagala osigaleyo mu kkubo ekkadde abantu ababi lye baakwatanga," 
Job22:16 abasikulwawo ng'akadde kaabwe tekannatuuka, emisingi gyabwe ne gyerebwawo emigga?" 
Job22:17 Baagambanga Katonda nti: ‘Tuviire! Omuyinza wa buli kantu anaatukola ki?’ 
Job22:18 Sso nga yajjuza ennyumba zaabwe ebirungi! kyenva neesambira ddala ebiteeso by'ababi. 
Job22:19 “Abatuukirivu baalaba bwe bazikirira, ne basanyuka; abataliiko musango baabasekerera nti:" 
Job22:20 ‘Abalabe baffe bazikiriridde ddala, n'omuliro guwemmense obugagga bwabwe.’" 
Job22:21 “Mugondere nno, lw'onooba naye mu ddembe; ebirungi lwe binaakujjira." 
Job22:22 Kwata okuyigiriza okuva mu kamwa ke, ebigambo bye bisse mu mutima gwo." 
Job22:23 Bw'olidda eri Omuyinza wa buli kantu, olizzibwawo; empisa embi bw'olizisindiikiriza ewala ne weema yo," 
Job22:24 n'okasuka eri mu nfuufu ejjinja lyo erya zaabu, ne zaabu wo owa Ofiri mu njazi z'omu biwonko," 
Job22:25 olwo Omuyinza wa buli kantu y'aliba zaabu wo, ffeeza wo ow'oku ntikko." 
Job22:26 Olwo olisanyukira mu Muyinza wa buli kantu, olisitulira Katonda amaaso go." 
Job22:27 Olimuwanjagira n'akuwuliriza; olituusa bye wasuubiza. 
Job22:28 Oliteesa ekintu ne kituukirira; n'ekitangaala kiryakira ku makubo go. 
Job22:29 Kubanga atoowazibwa omugamba nti: ‘Situka,’ ate ow'amaaso ameetoowaze, oyo amulokola." 
Job22:30 N'alina omusango amuwonya; aliwonyezebwa ku lw'obutukuvu bw'emikono gyo.” 
Job23:1 Yobu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job23:2 “Na kati okwemulugunya kwange kulimu ennyiike; omukono gwe gunzitooweredde mu kusinda kwange. 
Job23:3 Singa nno ntegedde aw'okumuzuula; singa nno nsobodde okutuuka awali ekisulo kye," 
Job23:4 nandimwanjulidde ensonga zange, nandijjuzza akamwa kange ne bye nvunaana." 
Job23:5 Nandirabye bye yandinnyanukudde; nanditegedde by'aŋŋamba. 
Job23:6 Naye, yandimpakanyizza n'amaanyi mangi? Nedda, teyandintaddeko misango." 
Job23:7 Eyo omutuufu yandiyanze ensonga gy'ali; nandiwonyezeddwa omulamuzi wange emirembe gyonna. 
Job23:8 “Bwe ŋŋenda ebuvanjuba, tabaayo; bwe ŋŋenda ebugwanjuba, simusanga." 
Job23:9 Bwe nnyambuka gy'akolera, simulaba, bwe nkyukira emaserengeta, simulaba." 
Job23:10 Sso ye amanyi ekkubo lye nkwata; bw'aliba angezezza, ndivaayo nga nninga zaabu." 
Job23:11 Ekigere kyange kyanywerera mu bisinde bye; neekuumidde mu kkubo lye, awatali kuwunjukako." 
Job23:12 Saava ku biragiro bya mimwa gye; ebigambo by'akamwa ke nabikuumira mu nda yange. 
Job23:13 “Anti ye ali bw'omu, ani anaamwesimbamu? Ky'ayagala ky'akola." 
Job23:14 Atuukiriza byonna bye yanteesaako, n'ebirala nkumu ebiri ng'ebyo by'akyaterese." 
Job23:15 Kyenva nkankana mu maaso ge; bwe ndowooza ku bino, mpulira okumutya." 
Job23:16 Katonda omutima gwange yagutekemula, Omuyinza wa buli kantu yankanga." 
Job23:17 Naye enzikiza teyambuutikira; amaaso gange ekibululu tekyagabikka. 
Job24:1 “Lwaki Omuyinza wa buli kantu teyasalawo budde? Lwaki abamumanyi tebamanyi nnaku ze? 
Job24:2 Abamu ebituuti by'ettaka babiseeseetula, banyaga amagana ne bagalunda." 
Job24:3 Batwala endogoyi ya mulekwa, ente ya nnamwandu ne bagitwala ng'omusingo." 
Job24:4 Abaavu babasindiikiriza okuva mu kkubo, bawaliriza abanaku b'omu ggwanga okwekweka." 
Job24:5 Ng'endogoyi z'ettale mu ddungu, abaavu bafuluma okukola emirimu gyabwe, nga banoonya ekyokulya, olukoola lwe luwa abaana baabwe emmere." 
Job24:6 Basala essubi mu nnimiro, ne banoga mu mizabbibu gy'ababi." 
Job24:7 Basula bwereere, tebalina ngoye; tebalina kya kwebikka mu mpewo." 
Job24:8 Batotobadde enkuba y'omu nsozi, beerippa ku njazi olw'okubula obwewogomo." 
Job24:9 Kamulekwa bakasikako ku mabeere; akaana k'omunaku bakatwala ng'omusingo. 
Job24:10 Tebalina ngoye, batambula bwereere; basomba emiganda naye basigala bayala." 
Job24:11 Bakamula omuzigo wakati mu oliva; basamba ekitaliri mu mizabbibu naye basigala bayonta. 
Job24:12 Okusinda kw'abafa kusituse mu kibuga; emyoyo gy'abafumitiddwa giwanjaga. Naye essaala yaabwe Katonda tagitegera kutu. 
Job24:13 “Abo be bajeemera ekitangaala, abatamanyi makubo gaakyo; abatanywerera mu bisinde byakyo." 
Job24:14 Olunaku bwe luziba, ye omutemu ng'agolokoka, n'atta omunaku, omwavu; mu kiro asoonooka ng'omubbi." 
Job24:15 Eriiso ly'omwenzi lyezira kawungeezi; agamba nti: ‘Teri anandaba,’ amaaso agakuuma mabikke." 
Job24:16 Mu nzikiza basima amayumba, emisana ne beggalira; tebaagala kulaba ku kitangaala." 
Job24:17 Ku bo enzikiza ekutte bwe budde okukya; entiisa y'ekisiikirize ky'olumbe ye mukwano gwabwe. 
Job24:18 “Awewuka ku ngulu ku mazzi; omugabo gwe ku nsi muvumirire, tewali alaga eri mizabbibu gye." 
Job24:19 Ng'ebbugumu n'ekyeya bwe bimalawo amazzi g'omuzira, n'amagombe bwe gamalawo abo abakola ebibi." 
Job24:20 Enda ya nnyina emwerabira, envunyu n'emunuuna; takyajjukirwa, ddala empisa embi zasaayasibwa ng'oluku." 
Job24:21 Ayisa bubi omugumba n'atalina mwana, ne nnamwandu tamulaga kisa." 
Job24:22 Naye Katonda asikambulawo ab'amaanyi n'obuyinza bwe; yandibeerawo, naye obulamu bwe tebwesiguza." 
Job24:23 Abawa aweesiifu we babeera, ne kibagumya, naye amaaso ge gatunuulidde amakubo gaabwe." 
Job24:24 Bagulumizibwa akaseera, mangu ne babulawo, batoowazibwa ne bakuŋŋaanyizibwa ng'abalala bonna; basalwako ng'ebirimba by'eŋŋano." 
Job24:25 “Oba si bwe kiri, ani asobola okunnumiriza obulimba, n'ajungulula ebigambo byange?”" 
Job25:1 Ne Biludadi ow'e Suki n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job25:2 “Obuyinza n'entiisa bibye; ateeka emirembe waggulu mu ggulu. 
Job25:3 Amagye ge gabalika? Ani ekitangaala kye gwe kitaaviirayo? 
Job25:4 Omuntu abeera atya omutuukirivu mu maaso ga Katonda? Oyo azaalibwa omukazi aba atya omutukuvu? 
Job25:5 Obanga n'omwezi tegwakaayakana, n'emmunyeenye nga si ntukuvu mu maaso ge," 
Job25:6 leero alabisa obutene bw'omuntu envunyu obuvunyu, omwana w'omuntu akasiriŋŋanyi obusiriŋŋanyi!”" 
Job26:1 Ne Yobu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job26:2 “Olwo omulebevu omuyambye otya? Omukono omunafu oguwonyezza otya? 
Job26:3 Magezi galuwa g'osalidde atalina magezi? Magezi ga ttendo ki g'oyolesezza? 
Job26:4 Ani akuyigirizza okwogera ebigambo bino? Mwoyo gw'ani ogwogeredde mu kamwa ko? 
Job26:5 “Emizimu gisindira wansi eyo mu mazzi, n'abo bonna abagasulamu." 
Job26:6 Amagombe gaasamye mu maaso ge; entaana si mbikkeko. 
Job26:7 Abamba amambuka mu bwengula, n'ensi n'agiwanika mu bbanga ejjereere." 
Job26:8 Asiba amazzi mu bire bye, naye ebire tebyabika olw'obuzito bwago." 
Job26:9 Abikka amaaso g'entebe ye, n'ayanjululizaako ebire bye." 
Job26:10 Akuba enkingi ku mazzi kungulu, n'ateekawo ekkomo wakati w'ekitangaala n'enzikiza." 
Job26:11 Empagi z'eggulu zijugumira; olw'okuboggola kwe ziwuniikiridde. 
Job26:12 Olw'amaanyi ge yasiikuula ennyanja; n'obukugu bwe yatemaatema Rakabu. 
Job26:13 N'omukka gwe yaleetera eggulu okuteeka; omukono gwe gwafumita ssessota eyali yeemulula. 
Job26:14 Tegereza, bino by'ebitono ku bikolwa by'amakubo ge. Nga bye tuwulira ku ye kagambo ka kyama! Ani alisobola okutegeera okubwatuka kw'obuyinza bwe?”" 
Job27:1 Era Yobu n'atoolera n'olugero lwe, n'agamba nti:" 
Job27:2 “Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, eyanzigyako eddembe lyange, Omuyinza wa buli kantu eyaleeta ennyiike mu mwoyo gwange," 
Job27:3 ebbanga lyonna nga nkyalimu obulamu, n'omukka gwa Katonda nga gukyandi mu nvumbo," 
Job27:4 emimwa gyange tegigenda kwatula bubi, yadde olulimi lwange okwogera eby'obulimba." 
Job27:5 Kikafuuwe nze okukkiriza nti mmwe batuufu; okutuusa okufa sigenda kuva ku bulungi bwange. 
Job27:6 Obutuukirivu bwange kwe nnyweredde era sigenda kubuta, emmeeme yange tegenda kunvunaana obulamu bwange bwonna." 
Job27:7 “Ansitukiddemu abeere ng'omubi; abampalana babe ng'abatali batuufu. 
Job27:8 Omwonoonyi bw'asalwako, aba akyasuubira ki, nga Katonda amuggyeko obulamu bwe?" 
Job27:9 Katonda agenda kuwulira omulanga gwe ennaku bw'eriba emugwiridde? 
Job27:10 Yadde alisanyukira mu Muyinza wa buli kantu? Alikoowoola Katonda obudde bwonna? 
Job27:11 “Nzija kubayigiriza ku buyinza bwa Katonda; Ebiri n'Omuyinza wa buli kantu sijja kubikisa. 
Job27:12 Byonna nammwe mwennyini mubyerabiddeko. Kale lwaki mwogera ebitaliimu? 
Job27:13 “Guno gwe mugabo gw'omubi okuva ewa Katonda, abakambwe kye basikira ew'Omuyinza wa buli kantu:" 
Job27:14 abaana be ne bwe balyala batya, balifa kitala; ne bazzukulu be tebalikkuta mmere." 
Job27:15 Ababe abalisigalawo kawumpuli alibaziika, ne bannamwandu baabwe tebalibakaabira." 
Job27:16 Ne bw'alituuma ffeeza omungi okwenkana enfuufu, n'ebyambalo okwenkana entuumu y'obudongo," 
Job27:17 by'ategese batuukirivu be balibyambala, ne ffeeza abataliiko musango be balimwegabanira." 
Job27:18 Ennyumba gy'azimba eri ng'ey'ennyenje, eri ng'ekikaabugo omukuumi ky'assaawo." 
Job27:19 Yeebaka nga mugagga, naye gwe gusemba; bw'azibula amaaso ge, nga tewakyali kantu." 
Job27:20 Entiisa emukwatirizza ng'omujjuzo; omuyaga gumwerawo ekiro. 
Job27:21 Empewo y'ebuvanjuba emutwala, ng'oyo agenze; emukunguzza okuva mu kifo kye." 
Job27:22 Emufuuwa awatali kusaasira, ng'agezaako okudduka amaanyi gaayo." 
Job27:23 Emukwasa n'emikono gyayo, emufuuwa okuva mu kifo kye." 
Job28:1 “Ffeeza alina ekirombe, ne zaabu alina ekifo w'afukutirwa." 
Job28:2 Ekyuma kiyiikuulwa mu ttaka, n'ekikomo kisaanuusibwa okuva mu mayinja." 
Job28:3 Omuntu enzikiza agissaako ekkomo; anoonya mu bunyomero eyo ewala, azuule amatale mu kazigizigi ne mu kizikiza ekikutte." 
Job28:4 Asima obuya ewala n'abantu gye basula, mu bifo ebigere gye byerabira; aleebeeta n'ayuuga ewala eyo okuva ku bantu." 
Job28:5 Ettaka omuva emmere, eyo wansi lyafuulibwa ng'omuliro." 
Job28:6 Enjazi zaalyo muvaamu saffiro, n'enfuufu yaalyo erimu obuyinja obwa zaabu." 
Job28:7 Teri nnyonyi nkwakkuzi emanyi kkubo lituusaayo; n'eriiso lya kamunye teririrabanga. 
Job28:8 Ensolo ezeekuza teziririnnyangako kigere, yadde empologoma okweyisaayo." 
Job28:9 Omuntu assa omukono gwe ku mbaalebaale, n'abikkula emirandira gy'ensozi." 
Job28:10 Asima emikutu mu njazi; eriiso lye liraba eby'obugagga byamu byonna. 
Job28:11 Anoonyereza ku ntobo y'emigga, ebyekwese n'abissa mu kitangaala." 
Job28:12 “Amagezi kale gasangibwa wa? N'okutegeera kubeera wa? 
Job28:13 Omuntu tamanyi muwendo gwagwo, tegasangibwa mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Job28:14 Eddubi ligamba nti: ‘Tegali mu nze.’ N'ennyanja eyogera nti: ‘Tegali nange.’ 
Job28:15 Tegagulibwa na zaabu omuwewule, n'omuwendo gwagwo tegupimibwa mu ffeeza." 
Job28:16 Tegaligulwa na zaabu w'e Ofiri yadde n'oniki ow'ebbeeyi ne saffiro. 
Job28:17 Zaabu omukuŋŋunte oba amayinja ag'omuwendo tebigeegeranyaako, tegawaanyisibwa na bibya bya zaabu." 
Job28:18 Amasonko n'ebirawuli tebirina we bijjira, omuwendo gwago gusingira wala ogw'amalulu." 
Job28:19 Topaziyo ow'omu Kuusi tageegeranyaako, Tegagulibwa na zaabu muwawule." 
Job28:20 “Olwo kale amagezi gava wa? N'okutegeera kubeera wa? 
Job28:21 Gaakwekebwa amaaso n'ebiramu byonna, gaakisibwa n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga." 
Job28:22 Entaana n'Olumbe bigamba nti: ‘Twagawulirako mu ŋŋambo n'amatu gaffe.’ 
Job28:23 Katonda y'amanyi ekkubo erigatuukako; yekka y'amanyi gye gabeera. 
Job28:24 Anti ye enkingi z'ensi aziraba; alaba na byonna ebiri wansi w'eggulu. 
Job28:25 Bwe yawa empewo amaanyi gaayo, n'amazzi n'agapimira ebigero byago," 
Job28:26 Bwe yassizaawo enkuba etteeka, n'atemera n'omuyaga ekkubo," 
Job28:27 yagatunuulira, n'agapima; yageetegereza, n'agekkaanya," 
Job28:28 n'agamba omuntu nti: ‘Okutya Omukama, ge magezi; n'okwewala ekibi kwe kutegeera.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Era Yobu n'atoolera n'olugero lwe, n'agamba nti:" 
Job29:2 “Singa mbadde nga mu myezi egyayita, ennaku ziri Katonda lwe yankuumanga." 
Job29:3 Ettawaaza ye lwe yayakanga awo ku mutwe gwange, mu nzikiza nga ntambulira ku kitangaala kye." 
Job29:4 Ennaku ezo lwe nali mu buvubuka bwange, Omukwano gwa Katonda we gwabeereranga ku weema yange," 
Job29:5 Omuyinza wa buli kantu lwe yali akyali nange, nga n'abaana bange banneebunguludde," 
Job29:6 ebigere byange lwe byanaabanga mu mata, n'enjazi nga zinfumbukulira emyala gy'omuzigo." 
Job29:7 “Lwe nagendanga ku mulyango gw'ekibuga, ne ntuula mu mbuga y'ekibuga," 
Job29:8 abavubuka okundaba, nga bampa ekyanya, n'abakadde nga basituka ne bayimirira." 
Job29:9 Abaami nga balekera awo okwogera, engalo ne bassa ku mimwa gyabwe." 
Job29:10 Amaloboozi g'abeebitiibwa ne gakkakkana, ennimi zaabwe ne zikwatira ku bibuno." 
Job29:11 Okutu okwampuliranga nga kunneesiimisa, n'eriiso eryandabanga nga linsemba." 
Job29:12 Kubanga nalokola abaavu abaawanjaganga okuyambibwa, n'enfuuzi etaliiko agijuna." 
Job29:13 Omukisa gw'eyali ng'azikirira gwajjanga ku nze, n'omutima gwa nnamwandu naguleetera okujaganya." 
Job29:14 Obutuukirivu nabwesiba ng'ekyambalo, ennamula entuufu ye yali omunagiro gwange n'ettambaala." 
Job29:15 Nze nali eriiso lya muzibe, ekigere ky'omulema." 
Job29:16 Nali kitaawe w'abaavu, nekkaanyanga ensonga z'omugwira." 
Job29:17 Amagego g'ababi nagamenyaamenya, gwe gaali gakutte ne mmubaggya mu mannyo." 
Job29:18 “Nalowooza nti: ‘Ndifiira mu kayumba kange; ng'ennaku zange nnyingi okwenkana omusenyu. 
Job29:19 Emirandira gyange girituuka ku mazzi, ne ssuulwe w'ekiro alisigalanga ku matabi gange." 
Job29:20 Ekitiibwa kyange kiriddanga buto bulijjo, n'omutego gwange gulibanga muggya mu mukono gwange.’" 
Job29:21 “Abantu bampulirizanga, ne bannindirira, nga balinda mu kasirise amagezi gange." 
Job29:22 Nga mmaze okwogera tebaddangamu kwogera; ebigambo byange byabatonnyangako ng'enkuba. 
Job29:23 Bannindanga ng'abalinda enkuba, emimwa gyabwe ne ginywa ng'abanywa enkuba ya Ttoggo," 
Job29:24 Bwe nabasekeranga, nga tebakikkiriza, n'ekitangaala ky'amaaso gange nga kibayitirirako." 
Job29:25 Nze nabasalirangawo, nga ntuula ng'omwami; natuulanga nga kabaka eyetoolooddwa eggye lye; nabeeranga ng'omukubagiza w'abanaku.”" 
Job30:1 “Baabo kati bansekerera, abato ku nze, bakitaabwe be sagwanyizanga kuteeka wamu na mbwa za ggana lyange." 
Job30:2 Amaanyi g'emikono gyabwe gyaŋŋanyula ki, kati abo abatakyalimu mbavu." 
Job30:3 Nga bakabiriddwa olw'obwavu n'enjala, baabunganga mu ddungu ekiro, mu nkoola ne mu malungu," 
Job30:4 nga banoga ebikoola by'omunnyo okuva mu bisaka; emmere yaabwe nga gy'emirandira gy'oluvuuvu. 
Job30:5 Baagobebwanga mu bantu, nga babakubira enduulu ng'ababbi." 
Job30:6 Baasulanga mu biwonvu by'emigga ebikalu, ne mu mpuku mu ttaka ne mu mpampagama z'enjazi." 
Job30:7 Baawologgomeranga eyo mu bisaka, nga beezinze wamu mu matovu." 
Job30:8 Abantu bano abasiru, abatalina na mannya, abaagobwa mu nsi." 
Job30:9 “Kati wuuno banjeeya mu nnyimba, nfuuse ekintu eky'okunyumyako." 
Job30:10 Banneenyinyala, ne banneewala, tebatya na kumpandira malusu mu maaso." 
Job30:11 Kati nga Katonda asumuludde omutego gwange n'ambonyaabonya, bakasuse eddobo mu kamwa kange." 
Job30:12 Ku ddyo wasituseewo eggye, bategera ebigere byange omutego; banneetoolozza ebikomera banzikirize." 
Job30:13 Bakutulakutula mu makubo gange; basobola okunsaanyaawo awatali n'abayambye. 
Job30:14 Bajja nga bayita mu awabomole mu bisenge, bayiringita nga bayita mu bifulukwa." 
Job30:15 Entiisa embuutikidde nzenna, ekitiibwa kyange kigobeddwa eri ng'empewo ky'efuuye, obulamu bwange bubuzeewo ng'ekire." 
Job30:16 “Kale nno obulamu bwange bugenda, ennaku ez'okubonaabona zintuukiridde." 
Job30:17 Ekiro kinfumita okuyita mu magumba, obulumi bummeketa obutaweerako." 
Job30:18 Mu maanyi ge akwata ekyambalo kyange; ammyumyula ng'obulago bw'ekyambalo kyange. 
Job30:19 Ansudde mu bitoomi, kati nfaanana nga vvu na nfuufu." 
Job30:20 “Nkuwajagira naye ggwe toddamu; nnyimirira, naye ggwe tonfaako." 
Job30:21 Onkyukidde na bukambwe; onjigganya n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi. 
Job30:22 Onsitudde n'ongobera mu mbuyaga; ommerengulidde mu kikuŋŋunta. 
Job30:23 Mmanyi ojja kuntuusa ku kufa, mu kifo ekyategekerwa buli mulamu." 
Job30:24 “Kituufu tewaali asuulira mukono ali mu kifulukwa, bw'aba awanjaga mu buyinike bwe." 
Job30:25 Saakaabira ng'oyo ali mu kabi? Sakabirirwanga mu mwoyo gwange olw'omwavu? 
Job30:26 Naye bwe nasuubira ebirungi, bibi bye byajja; nalindirira ekitangaala, nzikiza ye yajja." 
Job30:27 Munda munneefumba awatali kuweera; ennaku ez'okubonaabona zinzijiridde. 
Job30:28 Nzirugadde amaaso, naye si lwa musana; nnyimirira mu kibiina ne mpanjaga." 
Job30:29 Nfuuse muganda wa bibe; mukwano gwa biwuugulu. 
Job30:30 Olususu lunzirugadde ne lubambuka; amagumba gange gookya olw'omusujja. 
Job30:31 Ennanga yange efuuse ya kukungubaga, n'endere yange, maloboozi g'abakaaba.”" 
Job31:1 “Nakuba endagaano n'amaaso gange, obutatunuulira mbeerera." 
Job31:2 Omugabo gwange gwe guluwa ewa Katonda waggulu eyo, busika ki ew'Omuyinza wa buli kantu waggulu eyo?" 
Job31:3 Si kuzikirira kw'ababi, na kacwano eri abo abeeyisa obubi?" 
Job31:4 Teyekkaanya makubo gange, n'abala n'enta zonna ez'ebigere byange?" 
Job31:5 “Oba natambulira mu bulimba, oba nalandukira eby'obukumpanya," 
Job31:6 ampime mu minzaani entuufu, Katonda ajja kulaba bwe siriiko musango." 
Job31:7 “Oba ebigere byange byawubako ku kkubo, oba omutima gwange gwatwalirizibwa amaaso gange, oba amabala gaakwata emikono gyange," 
Job31:8 abalabe bange balye bye nasiga, n'ebirime byange bikuulibwe." 
Job31:9 “Oba omutima gwange gwali guseemezeddwa omukazi, oba naliimisa ku mulyango gwa munnange," 
Job31:10 kale mukazi wange aseerere omusajja omulala, n'abasajja abalala beebake naye." 
Job31:11 Anti ekyo kyandibadde kya nsonyi, omusango ogwanditwaliddwa mu mbuga;" 
Job31:12 omuliro ogukavvula okutuusa ku kuzikirira, ogwandisimbudde buli kye nnina." 
Job31:13 “Oba nagaana okuwulira omuddu wange n'omuzaana nga banninako ensonga," 
Job31:14 ndikola ntya nga Katonda asituse okunnamula, ndimwanukula ki bwe ndisabibwa okuwoza?" 
Job31:15 Eyankola mu lubuto si ye yakola na bali? Si ye omu eyatubumba ffembi mu mbuto za bannyaffe? 
Job31:16 “Oba abaavu saabawa kye baali baagala, oba naleka amaaso ga nnamwandu ne gamuyimbaala," 
Job31:17 oba nalya akagaati kange mu nkiso, ne sigabanyizaako nfuuzi," 
Job31:18 naye ng'okuva mu buvubuka bwange namugunjula nga kitaawe, n'okuva mu lubuto lwa nnyabo namulambika," 
Job31:19 oba nalaba afa olw'obutaba na kyakwambala, oba omwavu atalina kya kwebikka," 
Job31:20 omutima gwe ne gutansabira mukisa, olw'okumubugumya n'ebyoya by'endiga zange," 
Job31:21 oba nagololera omukono gwange ku nfuuzi, nga ndaba ku mulyango endiyo obuyambi," 
Job31:22 omukono gwange guweekuke ku kibegabega, gumenyekeko mu nnyungiro." 
Job31:23 Kubanga okuzikirira okuva ewa Katonda kwantiisa; olw'okutya ekitiibwa kye ebyo saabikola. 
Job31:24 “Obanga mu zaabu mwe nassa essuubi lyange, oba nagamba zaabu omuwawule nti: ‘Ggwe bwesige bwange,’" 
Job31:25 oba nasanyukira obugagga bwange obungi, ebirungi emikono gyange bye gyafuna," 
Job31:26 oba nalaba enjuba bw'etangalijja, n'omwezi bwe guseeyeeya mu kitiibwa kyagwo," 
Job31:27 omutima gwange ne gulimbibwalimbibwa, omukono gwange ne gubinywegera," 
Job31:28 na bino ebibi byanditwaliddwa mu mbuga, kubanga Katonda ali waggulu mmwegaanyi." 
Job31:29 “Oba nasanyukira ennaku y'omulabe wange, ne njaganya kubanga akabi kamujjidde __" 
Job31:30 saaleka kamwa kange kwonoona, bwe sadda awo kuvumirira bulamu bwe __" 
Job31:31 oba abasajja b'omu weema yange tebagamba nti: ‘Ani atalidde kukkuta ku nnyama ye?’ 
Job31:32 naye tewali muyise yasula bweru, kubanga omulyango gwange gwaggulirwanga buli mutambuze" 
Job31:33 oba nakweka ekibi kyange ng'omuntu bw'akola, nga nkweka omusango gwange mu mutima gwange," 
Job31:34 oba bwe nalaba obunene bw'ekibiina, n'entya okugayibwa ab'ekika, wabula ne nsirika busirisi, ne sibuuka mulyango kufuluma" 
Job31:35 (Singa nalina nno ampuliriza? Ako ke kabonero kange. Omuyinza wa buli kantu annyanukule. Annumiriza asse empaaba ye mu buwandiike. 
Job31:36 Nandigyambalidde ku kibegabega kyange, nandigyetisse ng'engule." 
Job31:37 Nandimunnyonnyodde buli kigere kye nsimbula; nandimusemberedde ng'oweekitiibwa) __ 
Job31:38 oba ettaka lyange lireekaana nga linvunaana, ng'empangi zaalyo zonna zikaaba," 
Job31:39 oba bye libaza nabirya nga sisasudde, ne nnyiikaaza omutima gwa nnannyini lyo," 
Job31:40 mu kifo ky'eŋŋano amatovu ge gaba gamerawo, oba omuddo mu kifo kya sayiri.” Ebigambo bya Yobu biweddeyo." 
Job32:1 Abasajja abo abasatu ne balekera awo okwanukula Yobu, kubanga ye yeerabanga nti mutuukirivu." 
Job32:2 Obusungu bwa Eliwu mutabani wa Barakeli Omubuzi asibuka mu Ramu, ne bweserera ku Yobu; obusungu bwe bwesera kubanga yeeyitanga mutuufu mu kifo kya Katonda." 
Job32:3 Obusungu bwe bweserera ne ku mikwano gye abasatu kubanga tebaazuula bya kwanukula Yobu, sso nga bamuvunaana." 
Job32:4 Eliwu yalindako okwogera ne Yobu kubanga bali be baali bamusinga obukulu. 
Job32:5 Naye Eliwu bwe yalaba nga bali abasatu tebakyalina kya kwanukula, obusungu bwe ne bwesera." 
Job32:6 Eliwu mutabani wa Barakeli Omubuzi n'ayanukula, n'agamba nti: “Ndi muto mu buzaale, mmwe muli bakulu; kyenvudde ntya ne siguma kubagamba kye mmanyi." 
Job32:7 Nalowooza nti: ‘Obukulu bunaayogera, abayise mu myaka banaayigiriza amagezi.’" 
Job32:8 Naye omwoyo mu muntu, mukka gwa Muyinza wa buli kantu ogumuwa okutegeera." 
Job32:9 Ab'emyaka emingi bokka si be bagezi; si bakadde bokka be bategeera ekituufu. 
Job32:10 Awo we ŋŋambira nti: ‘Mumpulirize: nange ka mbabuulire bye mmanyi.’ 
Job32:11 “Kale laba, nalindiridde nga mwogera; nawulirizza eby'amagezi bye mwogera, buli omu nga bw'alonda ebigambo ebituufu." 
Job32:12 Nabagoberedde bulungi, tewali mu mmwe alaze bukyamu bwa Yobu, mu mmwe temuli ayanukudde bigambo bye." 
Job32:13 Temugamba nti: ‘Tuzudde amagezi: Katonda y'aba amusinga, si muntu.’" 
Job32:14 Naye tannanjolekeza bigambo bye; nze sijja kumuwakanyiza ku bigambo byammwe. 
Job32:15 “Batidde, tebakyalina kye boogera; eby'okwogera bibabuze." 
Job32:16 Era nninde kati nga basirise, nga bayimiridde awo nga tebamanyi kya kuddamu?" 
Job32:17 Nange nzija kwogera; nange nzija kubabuulira bye mmanyi. 
Job32:18 Kubanga nzijudde ebigambo, n'omwoyo mu nze gumpaliriza." 
Job32:19 Munda nninga omwenge omusaanikire ogutuyidde, nninga endyanga empya ezibula okwabika." 
Job32:20 Nzija kwogera, nzikkakkane; nzija kwasamya emimwa gyange, nnyanukule." 
Job32:21 Sijja kwekubiira ludda, wadde okubaako ne gwe mpaanawaana," 
Job32:22 Kubanga singa nali muwaanyiwaanyi, Eyankola yandinkwakkuddewo.”" 
Job33:1 “Kale nno, Yobu, wuliriza ebigambo byange, ssa omwoyo ku byonna bye njogera." 
Job33:2 Laba, njasamizza akamwa kange; olulimi lwange lwogera mu kamwa kange." 
Job33:3 Ebigambo byange biva mu mutima muluŋŋamu, n'emimwa gyange gyogerera ddala kye mmanyi." 
Job33:4 Omwoyo gwa Katonda gwankola omukka gw'Omuyinza wa buli kantu gwanfuula omulamu. 
Job33:5 Nnyanukula oba osobola; neetegekera, weesimbewo." 
Job33:6 Mu maaso ga Katonda ndi nga naawe bw'oli; nange naggyibwa mu bbumba bubumba. 
Job33:7 Okuntya kireme kukukanga, n'omugugu gwange guleme kukuzitoowerera." 
Job33:8 “Wayogeredde mu matu gange, n'eddoboozi ly'ebigambo byo naliwulidde nti:" 
Job33:9 ‘Ndi mutukuvu, sirina kibi; siriiko bbala, siriiko musango;" 
Job33:10 Naye Katonda yansangamu ky'anvunaana; andaba ng'omulabe we; 
Job33:11 ebigere byange abisibye mu masamba; obukubo bwange bwonna abutunuulidde.’ 
Job33:12 “Ka nkubuulire, awo w'otobeeredde mutuufu, kubanga Katonda mukulu okusinga omuntu." 
Job33:13 Lwaki oyomba naye kubanga ebigambo byonna tabyanukudde? 
Job33:14 Kubanga Katonda ayogera lumu, mpozzi n'ogwokubiri, newandibadde ng'omuntu takiraba." 
Job33:15 Mu kirooto ne mu kubonekerwa kw'ekiro, otulo otungi we tukwatira abantu, nga beebase mu bitanda byabwe," 
Job33:16 olwo n'aggula amatu g'abantu, n'abatiisa n'okubalabula," 
Job33:17 alyoke aggye omuntu ku by'akola; amuggyemu n'okwekuza," 
Job33:18 amuwonye entaana, n'obulamu bwe buleme kuzikirira na kitala." 
Job33:19 Era omuntu ayinza okubonerezebwa mu bulumi mu kitanda, nga buli kaseera amagumba ge gamukubagana." 
Job33:20 Omubiri gwe emmere n'egufuukira ekyenyinyalwa; omwoyo gwe ne gwetamwa ebyokulya bye gwayoyanga. 
Job33:21 Omubiri gwe ne gukogga, nga tegukyalabika; amagumba agaali gatalabika, nga kati gayiseemu." 
Job33:22 Omwoyo gwe ne gusemberera entaana, n'obulamu bwe eri ababaka b'olumbe." 
Job33:23 “Singa ewuwe waliyo malayika, omutabaganya, omu mu lukumi, abuulire omuntu ekituufu," 
Job33:24 anaamusaasira n'agamba nti: ‘Muwonye okukkirira mu ntaana; mmufunidde omutango’," 
Job33:25 Omubiri gwe gwandizze buto, n'addayo nga bwe yabanga mu buvubuka." 
Job33:26 Awanjagira Katonda, n'amusanyukira, alaba amaaso ge, n'ajaguza, n'addiza omuntu obutuukirivu bwe." 
Job33:27 Ayimbira abantu n'agamba nti: ‘Nakola ekibi, obutuufu nabusobya, naye saafuna kiŋŋwanira." 
Job33:28 Yawonya omwoyo gwange guleme kugenda mu ntaana; obulamu bwange bujja kulaba ekitangaala.’ 
Job33:29 “Ebyo byonna Katonda abikola omuntu emirundi ebiri, n'esatu;" 
Job33:30 Okuwonya omwoyo obutagwa mu ntaana, amwakize n'ekitangaala eky'obulamu." 
Job33:31 “Wekkaanye, Yobu, mpuliriza; sirika, nze njogere." 
Job33:32 Oba olina eky'okwogera, nnyanukula. Yogera, anti njagala kukwejjeereza." 
Job33:33 Oba tolina, wuliriza nze; sirika, nzija kukuyigiriza amagezi.”" 
Job34:1 Eliwu n'ayongera, n'agamba nti:" 
Job34:2 “Abagezi muwulirize ebigambo byange; mumpulirize mmwe abaayiga. 
Job34:3 Kubanga okutu kwe kugeza ebigambo, ng'olulimi bwe luwulira obuwoomi bw'emmere." 
Job34:4 Ffennyini tweramulire tulabe ekituufu, tunoonyereze wamu tuzuule ekirungi." 
Job34:5 “Yobu agamba nti: ‘Ndi mutuufu, naye Katonda aggyeewo obutuufu bwange." 
Job34:6 Newandibadde ndi mutuufu, bagamba nnimba; awatali musango akasaale kanfumise ekiwundu ekitawona.’" 
Job34:7 Muntu ani ali nga Yobu, anywa okusekererwa ng'anywa amazzi;" 
Job34:8 asiba ekinywi n'aboonoonyi; n'ayita n'abantu abeeyisa obubi? 
Job34:9 Anti yagamba nti: ‘Omuntu tekimugasa ne bw'agezaako okusanyusa Katonda.’ 
Job34:10 “Kale nno mumpulirize mmwe ab'omutima ogutegeera: Kikafuuwe Katonda okweyisa obubi, Omuyinza wa buli kantu okubeera atali mwenkanya." 
Job34:11 Aweera omuntu okusinziira ku ky'akoze; amuleka ne kimutuukirira nga bwe yeeyisa. 
Job34:12 Mazima ddala Katonda takola bubi, Omuyinza wa buli kantu tatyoboola bwenkanya." 
Job34:13 Ani yamukwasa ensi ye? Ani yassaawo ensi yonna? 
Job34:14 Singa aba ayagadde mu mutima gwe, omwoyo gwe n'omukka abisika ne bidda gy'ali," 
Job34:15 abantu bonna bandifudde lumu, omuntu yandizzeeyo mu nfuufu." 
Job34:16 “Kale nno oba olimu akategeera, wulira kino; wuliriza bye ŋŋamba." 
Job34:17 Kale atayagala butuufu asobola okufuga obwakabaka? Omutuukirivu era Omuyinza olimusingisa omusango? 
Job34:18 Si ye yagamba bakabaka nti: ‘Temulina kye mugasa.’ N'abakungu nti ‘Muli babi’? 
Job34:19 Ateekubiira wa mukungu; atattira ku liiso mugagga n'asaliriza omwavu, kubanga bonna mulimu gwa mikono gye." 
Job34:20 Bafa mangu, ate mu ttumbi; abantu bakubwa encukwe, ne babulawo; ab'amaanyi baggyibwawo awatali na mukono guyambyeko." 
Job34:21 Anti amaaso ge agasimbye ku makubo g'abantu; yekkaanya buli nta za bigere byabwe. 
Job34:22 Mpaawo kizikiza yadde ekisiikirize ky'olumbe abeeyisa obubi gye basobola okwekweka. 
Job34:23 Katonda teyeetaaga kuteerawo muntu kadde, ajje gy'ali alamulibwe." 
Job34:24 Amerengula ab'obuyinza awatali na kubuuliriza, n'assaawo abalala mu kifo kyabwe." 
Job34:25 Anti ye amanyidde ddala bye bakola, abayirimula wansi ekiro, n'ababetenta." 
Job34:26 Abakuba olw'empisa zaabwe embi mu kifo abantu we babalabira. 
Job34:27 Kubanga baamwawukanako; tebassa mwoyo ku makubo ge gonna. 
Job34:28 Baleetera emiranga gy'omwavu okwambuka gy'ali, n'awulira emiranga gy'abanaku." 
Job34:29 Singa asirika busirisi, anaamuvunaana? Bw'akweka amaaso ge, ani anaamulaba? So nga ye omu akuuma eggwanga n'abantu," 
Job34:30 ababi baleme kufuga, baleme kutega bantu mitego." 
Job34:31 “Singa omuntu agamba Katonda nti: ‘Nayonoona; sikyaddamu kukola bubi. 
Job34:32 Kye siraba kinjigirize; oba nayonoona, ekyo sikyaddamu kukikola.’" 
Job34:33 Alikuweera olw'okubeera ebigambo byo bw'ogaana okwenenya? Ggwe onoolondawo, si nze; ggwe yogera ky'omanyi." 
Job34:34 Abantu abategeevu mumbuulire; abantu abagezi abampuliriza, mugambe nti:" 
Job34:35 ‘Yobu tayogezza butegeevu, n'ebigambo bye mubulamu amagezi.’" 
Job34:36 Singa nno Yobu agezebwa okutuusa ku ntikko, olw'okwanukula ng'abantu ababi!" 
Job34:37 Kubanga ku bibi bye ayongerako obujeemu; engalo azikubamu mu makkati gaffe, n'ayongera obungi ebigambo bye ebivuma Katonda.”" 
Job35:1 Eliwu n'ayongera, n'agamba nti:" 
Job35:2 “Ggwe olaba ng'endowooza yo ntuufu, ggwe okugamba nti: ‘Mu maaso ga Katonda ndi mutuufu’?" 
Job35:3 Era ogamba nti: ‘Nfunamu ki? Ngasirwamu ki bwe soonoona?’ 
Job35:4 “Kale nze nzija kukuddamu, nnyanukulireko ne banno abali naawe." 
Job35:5 Lalama eri eggulu olabe, tunuulira ebire ebitumbidde waggulu wo." 
Job35:6 Bw'okola ekibi, kimukolako ki? Emisango gyo ne bweginaayongerwa obungi, omukosa wa?" 
Job35:7 Ye bwe weeyisa ng'omutuukirivu, kiki ky'oba omuwadde? Kiki ky'afuna mu mukono gwo?" 
Job35:8 Empisa zo embi zikosa muntu afaanana nga ggwe, n'obutuukirivu bwo buyamba bantu buntu." 
Job35:9 “Bawanjaga olw'obungi bw'okunyigirizibwa; basaba obuyambi bateewuluzibwe mu mikono gy'ab'amaanyi. 
Job35:10 Naye mpaawo agamba nti: ‘Katonda Eyankola ali ludda wa, awa ennyimba mu kiro," 
Job35:11 atuyigiriza okusinga bw'akola ku bisolo by'omu nsi, n'atufuula bagezi okusinga ebinyonyi by'omu bbanga?’" 
Job35:12 Baleekaana eyo, naye tabaddamu olw'okwekuza kw'ababi." 
Job35:13 Ddala bya busa, Katonda tabawulira; Omuyinza wa buli kantu tatunula nayo." 
Job35:14 Oli na bubi okusinga, bw'ogamba nti tomulaba, omusango gwo guli mu maaso ge, olina kumulindirira;" 
Job35:15 na kati nti: ‘Obusungu bwe tebubonereza, era tafaayo n'akatono ku mwonoonyi.’" 
Job35:16 Awo nno Yobu ayasamiza bwereere akamwa ke; ayongera bungi ebigambo omutali magezi.” 
Job36:1 Eliwu n'ayongera n'agamba nti: 
Job36:2 “Ŋŋumiikirizaako katono, nzija kukunnyonnyola, nkyalinayo bye njogera ku lwa Katonda." 
Job36:3 Amagezi gange ngaggya wala; Eyankola y'ampa obutuukirivu bwange. 
Job36:4 Kikakafu ebigambo byange temuli bulimba; ow'amagezi amatuufu gw'oli naye kati. 
Job36:5 “Katonda wa buyinza; naye tanyooma; wa maanyi, wa buyinza ne mu mutima." 
Job36:6 Ababi tabaleka kulama; sso abeegose abakuumira ebyabwe eby'obwebange. 
Job36:7 Amaaso ge tagaggya ku mutuukirivu; abassa ku nnamulondo wamu ne bakabaka, n'abagulumiza ennaku zonna." 
Job36:8 Naye bwe basibibwa empingu, ne baliggyibwa emiguwa gy'okubonaabona," 
Job36:9 abalaga bye baakola n'emisango gyabwe, nti baayonoona olw'okwekuza kwabwe." 
Job36:10 Aggula amatu gaabwe, abalabule, n'abalagira bave mu bubi." 
Job36:11 Bwe bawulira ne bamuweereza, ennaku zaabwe ezisigadde balizimala bulungi, n'emyaka gyabwe mu kusanyuka." 
Job36:12 Naye bwe batawulira, balifa ekitala, ne bafiira mu butategeera." 
Job36:13 Aboonoonyi tebaggwaako ssungu ku mutima, ne bw'abasiba amasamba tebaliwanjaga kuyambibwa." 
Job36:14 Bafiira mu buvubuka, mu bamalaaya abasajja ab'omu biggwa." 
Job36:15 Sso ababonaabona abawonya ennaku yaabwe, ayogera nabo mu bunaku bwabwe." 
Job36:16 “Akuwooyawooya akuggye mu mannyo g'obulemu, akutwale awagazi awatali kwenyiga, ku mwaliiro okuli ebyokulya ebya ssava." 
Job36:17 Naye kati olamulibwa ng'omubi; okulamulibwa n'omusango bikukwatirizza. 
Job36:18 Wegenderezanga oli n'atakuguya na bugagga; enguzi ennyingi tekuwugulanga. 
Job36:19 Okuwanjaga kwo kulikuggya mu bizibu, oba okufuba n'amaanyi gonna?" 
Job36:20 Teweesunganga kiro, olyoke oggye abantu mu mayumba gaabwe." 
Job36:21 Wegendereze obutawugukira mu kukola bubi, ky'oyagala n'okusinga okubonaabona." 
Job36:22 “Laba, Katonda musuffu mu buyinza bwe; Muyigiriza, ani amwenkana?" 
Job36:23 Ani amulaga amakubo ge, oba okumugamba nti: ‘Okoze bubi’?" 
Job36:24 Jjukira okutendereza omulimu gwe, abantu gwe bagulumiza mu nnyimba." 
Job36:25 Abantu bonna bagulaba ne beewuunya; abantu bagulengerera wala. 
Job36:26 Katonda nga mukulu, asukkiridde amagezi gaffe! Omuwendo gw'emyaka gye teguteeberezeka." 
Job36:27 Amatondo g'amazzi agambusa waggulu, n'agatonnyesa ng'enkuba okuva mu bire;" 
Job36:28 ebire ne biyiwa amazzi gaabyo, enkuba n'etonnyera abantu enkumu." 
Job36:29 Ddala ddala ani amanyi bw'abamba ebire? Bw'abwatuka ng'ayima mu weema ye? 
Job36:30 Laba bwe yeebunguluza yennyini n'ekitangaala kye, n'abikka entobo y'ennyanja." 
Job36:31 N'ebyo bw'alamula amawanga, n'awa emmere mu bungi." 
Job36:32 Emikono gyombi agijjuza ekimyanso, n'akiragira kikube ku ntono." 
Job36:33 Enjota emulangirira, bw'aba ajja mu busungu bwe okulamula aboonoonyi." 
Job37:1 “Ekyo kyakanga omutima gwange ne gubuuka mu kifo kyagwo. 
Job37:2 Wulira, wulira okubwatuka kw'eddoboozi lye, kuwuluguma okuva mu kamwa ke." 
Job37:3 Ata ekimyanso kye wansi w'eggulu lyonna, ekitangaala kye n'akisindika okutuuka ku nsonda z'ensi." 
Job37:4 Okuwuluguma kwe ne kugoberera; n'abwatuka n'eddoboozi ly'ekitiibwa kye. Ng'eddoboozi lye limaze okuwulirwa, teri kimuziyiza." 
Job37:5 Katonda abwatuka n'eddoboozi lye mu ngeri eyeewuunyisa; akola ebinene bye tutategeera. 
Job37:6 Alagira omuzira nti: ‘Gwa ku nsi,’ n'enkuba nti: ‘Tonnya okanye.’" 
Job37:7 Assa akabonero mu mukono gwa buli muntu, abantu bonna bamanye by'akola." 
Job37:8 Ebisolo byekukuma, ne byewogoma mu nfo zaabyo." 
Job37:9 Omuyaga ne gufubutuka gye gusula, obunnyogovu ne buva mu mpewo y'emambuka." 
Job37:10 Omukka gwa Katonda gukwasa omuzira, amazzi ageetadde ne gafuuka ekitole." 
Job37:11 Ebire abijjuza amazzi, ekimyanso kye ne kisasaanya ebire." 
Job37:12 Bigenda ne bidda nga bw'ateesa; byetooloola wonna ku nkulungo y'ensi, nga bikola nga bw'alagira." 
Job37:13 Ayinza okubireeta olw'ekibonerezo, oba olw'ensi ye, oba olw'ekisa kye." 
Job37:14 “Yobu, wuliriza kino; yimirira wekkaanye ebyewuunyisa bya Katonda." 
Job37:15 Omanyi Katonda lw'alagira ebire, n'abigamba ne bireeta ekimyanso?" 
Job37:16 Omanyi engeri gye bitengejjera waggulu, ebyewuunyisa by'oli Kalimagezi?" 
Job37:17 Ggwe eyeewogoma mu ngoye zo, ng'ensi esiriikiridde mu mpewo ey'emaserengeta," 
Job37:18 obamba naye olubaale, olugumu ng'ebbumba ery'ekikomo?" 
Job37:19 “Tubuulire kye tuba tumugamba; ffe tetumanyi kutetenkanya bigambo olw'enzikiza. 
Job37:20 Yandigambiddwa nti nnaayogera? Omuntu yandigambye amiribwe? 
Job37:21 Sso kati omuntu tatunula mu kitangaala, nga kyaka mu bire, ng'empewo efuuwa, n'ebigobawo." 
Job37:22 Mu mambuka wava okutangalijja ng'okwa zaabu; awali Katonda weetooloddwa entiisa ey'ekitalo. 
Job37:23 Tetuyinza kutuuka Muyinza wa buli kantu; asukkulumye obukulu n'ennamula, mu butuukirivu bwe obungi tayinza kunyigiriza." 
Job37:24 Abantu kyebava bamutya, anti teyeeguya abo abeerowooza nti ba mutima mugezi.”" 
Job38:1 Omukama n'ayima mu kibuyaga ow'amaanyi n'ayanukula Yobu nti: 
Job38:2 “Ani oyo abuzaabuza enjigiriza yange, ng'ayogera ebigambo omutali magezi?" 
Job38:3 Weekindikire mu kiwato ng'omusajja, nzija kukubuuza, ojja kunnyanukula." 
Job38:4 “Bwe nali mmangawo ensi wali ludda wa? Mbuulira, oba olina ky'omanyi." 
Job38:5 Ani yagipima? Nkakasa omanyi. Ani yagikubako olukoba olupima? 
Job38:6 Emisingi gyayo ginyweredde ku ki? Ani yassaawo ejjinja ly'omu nsonda," 
Job38:7 eno emmunyeenye ez'omu makya nga ziyimbira wamu, n'abaana ba Katonda bonna nga bakuba emizira?" 
Job38:8 Ani yaggalira ennyanja n'enzigi, lwe yafubutuka ng'eva mu lubuto," 
Job38:9 lwe naddira ebire ne mbigyambaza, ne ngizingirira mu nzikiza ekutte," 
Job38:10 lwe nagissizaawo ekkomo, ne mpangamu enzigi n'emiyingo gyazo," 
Job38:11 lwe nagamba nti: ‘Wano ojja kutuukawo, naye tosukkawo; wano amayengo go agakulumbadde we ganaakomanga’?" 
Job38:12 “Mu budde bwo ggwe walagira amaliiri, oba ggwe wawa mmambya ekifo kye," 
Job38:13 nti anaakwatanga ku nsonda z'ensi, n'awujja ababi ne bakunkumukako?" 
Job38:14 Ensi efuukafuuka ng'ekitoomi ekiri mu katiba; ennyikibwa mu ddagala ng'ekyambalo. 
Job38:15 Ababi balimmibwa ekitangaala kyabwe, n'emikono gyabwe gye bagolodde girimenyebwa." 
Job38:16 “Wali otuuse ensulo z'ennyanja gye ziri, wali oyiseeko mu ddubi eyo ekkuzimu?" 
Job38:17 Wali ogguliddwa emiryango gy'olumbe? Wali olabye emiryango gy'ekisiikirize ky'olumbe? 
Job38:18 Wali wekkaanyizza obwagaagavu bw'ensi? Ntegeeza, oba bino obimanyi byonna." 
Job38:19 “Liruwa ekkubo erigenda ku kisulo ky'ekitangaala, n'enzikiza ebeera wa," 
Job38:20 olyoke obitwale buli kimu gye kisula? Omanyi amakubo agatwala ku nnyumba zaabyo? 
Job38:21 Kituufu omanyi, anti wali ozaaliddwa, n'omuwendo gw'ennaku z'omaze munene." 
Job38:22 Wali oyingidde amawanika ga sserugi, yadde okulaba amaterekero g'amayinja g'omuzira," 
Job38:23 bye nterekera obudde obw'akabenje, ennaku ez'obulwa n'ez'olutalo?" 
Job38:24 Liruwa ekkubo erituusa ekitangaala gye kikasukirwa, n'empewo y'ebuvanjuba gy'esaasaanyizibwa okubuna nsi?" 
Job38:25 Ani yassaawo emyala gy'ebire by'enkuba, n'atemera n'omuyaga ekkubo," 
Job38:26 bitonnye ku nsi awatali muntu, mu ddungu, eteri n'omu abeerayo," 
Job38:27 bivubirize amalungu n'enkoola, bimezeemu omuddo?" 
Job38:28 Enkuba erina kitaawe waayo? Kitaawe w'obutondo bw'omusulo ye ani? 
Job38:29 Embajjo z'omuzira zaava mu lubuto lw'ani, n'obubooya bw'omuzira obuva mu ggulu ani abuzaala," 
Job38:30 amazzi lwe gakaluba ng'ejjinja, kungulu kw'eddubi ne kukwata?" 
Job38:31 “Osobola okuyunga enjegere z'Emmunyeenye Omusanvu? Yadde okusumulula emiguwa gya Oriyoni? 
Job38:32 Oyinza okuggyayo ebibinja by'emmunyeenye mu budde bwazo? N'oleeta n'emmunyeenye Ddubu n'obwana bwazo? 
Job38:33 Omanyi amateeka agafuga eggulu, osobola okugassa mu buwandiike bwago ku nsi?" 
Job38:34 “Osobola okuleekaana eri ebire, wenna amazzi agabijjudde gakubuutikire?" 
Job38:35 Osindika ebimyanso ne bigenda, ne bidda ne bikugamba nti: ‘Tuutuno’?" 
Job38:36 Ani yassa munda muli amagezi? Ani yawa omwoyo okutegeera? 
Job38:37 “Ani alina amagezi agabala ebire? Ensumbi z'amazzi ag'eggulu ani ayinza okuzibundula," 
Job38:38 enfuufu lw'eguma n'efuuka ekitole, n'amafufungu g'ettaka ne ganywerera wamu?" 
Job38:39 “Empologoma ggwe ogiyiggira ekyokulya, ggwe otta enjala y'obwana bw'empologoma," 
Job38:40 nga bubwamye mu nfo yaabwo, oba nga buteegedde mu kasaka?" 
Job38:41 Ani ategekera nnamuŋŋoona ky'alya, obwana bwe lwe buwanjagira Katonda, lwe butangatanga olw'obutaba na kye bulya?”" 
Job39:1 “Omanyi obudde embuzi z'omu nsozi we zizaalira, yadde wali olabye empeewo nga zizaala?" 
Job39:2 Wabala emyezi gye zimala nga ziri ggwako? Wamanya obudde we zizaalira? 
Job39:3 Zifukamira ne zisuula obwana bwazo, olwo ng'obulumi bw'okuzaala buwedde." 
Job39:4 Abaana baazo bagejja ne bakula mu nsiko, ne bagenda, tebadda gye ziri." 
Job39:5 “Ani ata endogoyi ey'ettale? Ani asumulula emiguwa gyayo," 
Job39:6 n'agiwa amalungu ng'amaka gaayo, n'ensenyu ez'omunnyo ng'ekisulo kyayo?" 
Job39:7 Esekerera oluyoogaano lw'omu kibuga; tewulira kuleekaana kwa mwebagazi. 
Job39:8 Erambula ensozi okulaba amalundiro gaayo, n'enoonyereza byonna ebikyali ebibisi." 
Job39:9 “Embogo bw'eryagala ekuweereze, erisula awo ku mmanvu yo?" 
Job39:10 Embogo oligisiba amatandiiko ku mpangi? Erikabala ng'ekugoberera? 
Job39:11 Olyesiga amaanyi gaayo amangi n'ogirekera emirimu gyo emizito? 
Job39:12 Ogyesiga nti erikuleetera ensigo yo, nti erikusombera eby'egguuliro lyo?" 
Job39:13 “Maaya ekuba ebiwaawaatiro byayo n'essanyu, naye tebijja ku biwaawaatiro n'ebyoya bya ssekanyolya." 
Job39:14 Ebiika amagi ge ku ttaka, n'egaleka ne gabugumira mu musenyu," 
Job39:15 ne yeerabira nti ekigere kiyinza okugalinnya, oba ekisolo eky'ettale okugabetenta." 
Job39:16 Ekambuwalira abaana be ng'abatali babe, tefaayo nti oba yazaalira bwereere," 
Job39:17 kubanga Katonda teyagiwa magezi, teyagigabanyiza kukutegeera." 
Job39:18 Naye akadde bwe katuuka, n'esitula waggulu ebiwaawaatiro, esekerera embalaasi n'omwebagazi." 
Job39:19 “Ggwe owa embalaasi amaanyi g'erina, oba oyambaza ensingo yaayo n'egginirizi?" 
Job39:20 Ggwe ogiwa okudduka n'ebuuka ng'enzige, n'ekuba entiisa n'okukaaba kwayo okwamalala?" 
Job39:21 Esamba ettaka mu kisenyi n'esanyuka, n'evaayo n'amaanyi okwevumba olutalo." 
Job39:22 Egaya okutiisibwa, tetekemuka; tedduka kitala." 
Job39:23 Ensawo y'obusaale ekubaganira mu mbiriizi, n'okumyansa kw'effumu n'akajogolo." 
Job39:24 Mu kubuguumirira ng'ekaaye, efuuwa enfuufu, tetereera ng'ewulidde eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe." 
Job39:25 Eŋŋombe oluvuga, n'egamba nti: ‘Ky'ekyo.’ Ekkalalume ly'olutalo eriwulirira wala, n'amaloboozi g'abagabe, n'okukuba enduulu." 
Job39:26 “Akakubampanga magezi go ge gakabuusa, ne kata ebiwaawaatiro byako nga kalaga emaserengeta?" 
Job39:27 Empungu ggwe ogiragira okutumbiira, n'ewanika ekisu kyayo waggulu ewala?" 
Job39:28 Ebeera mu njazi, n'esula eyo ekiro; ebbanga ery'olwazi ky'ekigo kyayo." 
Job39:29 Eyima eyo n'eketta ekyokulya, amaaso gaayo gakirabira wala." 
Job39:30 Obwana bwayo bunywa musaayi, awali ekittiddwa nayo w'ebeera.”" 
Job40:1 Omukama n'agamba Yobu nti: 
Job40:2 “Oyo awoza n'Omuyinza wa buli kantu anaamugolola? Oyo avunaana Katonda amwanukule.” 
Job40:3 Yobu n'ayanukula Omukama nti: 
Job40:4 “Ndi muyabayaba, nkwanukule ki? Omukono gwange ngutadde ku kamwa kange." 
Job40:5 Nayogedde lumu, sijja kuddamu; n'ogwokubiri, naye sijja kwongera mulala.”" 
Job40:6 Omukama n'ayanukula Yobu ng'ayima mu kibuyaga nti: 
Job40:7 “Weekindikire mu kiwato ng'omusajja. Nzija kukubuuza, ojja kunnyanukula." 
Job40:8 “Ennamula yange ogisambajja, nze gw'osalidde omusango, ggwe obeere mutuufu." 
Job40:9 Olina omukono ng'ogwa Katonda? N'eddoboozi lyo oyinza okubwatuka nga ye? 
Job40:10 Awo nno weewoomye n'ekitiibwa n'obukulu, yambala ettendo n'okusukkuluma." 
Job40:11 Ta obuswandi bw'obusungu bwo, kyukira buli eyeekuza yenna omutoowaze." 
Job40:12 Kyukira buli eyeekuza yenna omusse wansi, ababi babetentere wansi we bali." 
Job40:13 Baziike bonna wamu mu nfuufu; bazingeko ekigoye obaggalire mu ntaana; 
Job40:14 olwo nzija kukkiriza, nti ddyo wo asobola okukuwonya." 
Job40:15 “Tunuulira envubu gye nakola awamu naawe, erya muddo nga nte." 
Job40:16 Ng'erina amaanyi mu kiwato kyayo, n'obuyinza mu myala gy'olubuto lwayo!" 
Job40:17 Omukira gwayo gwewuuba ng'omuti gw'entolookyo; ebinywa by'ekisambi kyayo byetippye. 
Job40:18 Amagumba gaayo gali ng'emidumu gy'ekikomo, emikono gyayo giri ng'emitayimbwa egy'ekyuma." 
Job40:19 Y'esooka mu ebyo Katonda bye yakola, naye eyagikola agirumba n'ekitala kye." 
Job40:20 Ensozi zigiwa emiti gyazo; ebisolo byonna eby'ettale bizannyira awo. 
Job40:21 Yeebaka wansi w'ebisaka bya kirobo ku mugga, ne yeekweka mu biwuuwa ne mu bisaalu." 
Job40:22 Ebisaka bya kirobo bigikweka n'ekisiikirize kyabyo, n'enzibaziba zigyebunguludde." 
Job40:23 Omugga ne bwe gutumbiira, tekankana; Yorudani ne bw'agikuba ejjengo ku mumwa, esigala nteefu." 
Job40:24 Ani aligikwata mu maaso gaayo, oba alifumita ennyindo zaayo n'omuguma?" 
Job40:25 “Osobola okukwasa goonya n'eddobo, oba okusiba olulimi lwe n'omuguwa?" 
Job40:26 Osobola okuyisa eddobo mu nnyindo ze, oba okufumita oluba lwe n'olumuli?" 
Job40:27 Aliddiŋŋana okukuwanjagira, oba alyogera naawe ebigonvu?" 
Job40:28 Yadde alikola naawe endagaano, omufuule omuweereza wo ebbanga lyonna?" 
Job40:29 Oyinza okumuzannyisa ng'azannyisa ekinyonyi, oba okumusibira ku muguwa olwa buwala bwo?" 
Job40:30 Abasuubuzi balimulamuzaako, oba abanoonya eby'amaguzi balimugabana?" 
Job40:31 Eddiba lye oyinza okulijjuza obusaale, oba omutwe gwe okugujjuza emiya?" 
Job40:32 Muteekeko omukono gwo; olwo olijjukira ensiitaano, toliddamu nate.”" 
Job41:1 “Essuubi ly'okumunyweza lirigwa butaka; oli okumutunulako n'aggwa amaanyi. 
Job41:2 Tewali anaamwaŋŋanga kumusitulawo. Ani aguma okumuyimirira mu maaso? 
Job41:3 Ani ammanja nti mmusasule? Buli kiri wansi w'eggulu kyange. 
Job41:4 “Siisirike kwogera ku bitundu bye, ku maanyi ge ne ku bulungi bw'enkula ye." 
Job41:5 Ani asobola okususumbulako ekizibawo kye eky'okungulu, oba n'ayuza mu mbu ebbiri ez'ekikakampa ky'oku kifuba?" 
Job41:6 Ani aliggula emiryango gy'akamwa ke, akeebunguluddwa wonna entiisa y'amannyo ge?" 
Job41:7 Omugongo gwe gubembekeddwako engabo; ziyungiddwa gulugulu n'envumbo ey'ejjinja. 
Job41:8 Buli emu enywezeddwa ku ginnaayo, n'omukka sigulina kaagaanya we guyita." 
Job41:9 Buli emu enyweredde ku ndala; zikwatidde ddala awatali kuta. 
Job41:10 Okwasimula kwe kumyansa ekitangaala, amaaso ge gali ng'ebikowe bya mmambya." 
Job41:11 Akamwa ke muvaamu ebitawuliro; muwandukamu ensasi z'omuliro. 
Job41:12 Omukka gufubutuka mu nvumbo ze, ng'ogw'entamu etokota ku mimuli." 
Job41:13 Omukka gwe gukoleeza amanda, omuliro guwanduka mu kamwa ke." 
Job41:14 Amaanyi gamusula mu nsingo; entiisa emukulembeddemu. 
Job41:15 Ebiseera by'omubiri gwe bituggiddwa wamu, binywevu, tebinyeenya." 
Job41:16 Ekifuba kye kikaluba ng'ejjinja, kigumu okwenkana olubengo." 
Job41:17 Bw'asituka, abazira bakankana; bw'akuba amazzi, ne beesega." 
Job41:18 Ekitala bwe kimufumita tekiriyimiriramu, yadde effumu, akasaale, newandibadde akajogolo." 
Job41:19 Anti ekyuma akiraba nga bisasiro, n'ekikomo, ng'ekiti ekivunze." 
Job41:20 Akasaale tekamuleetera kudduka; envuumuulo ku ye eri ng'akasubi. 
Job41:21 Embuukuuli ku ye kasubi busubi; akajogolo akeesooza asekerera kasekerere. 
Job41:22 Olubuto lwe wansi nzigyo ensongovu, aleka omukululo mu ttosi ng'ogw'empuuzo." 
Job41:23 Eddubi alitokosa ng'entamu, ennyanja n'agituukuumya ng'ensaka y'akaloosa." 
Job41:24 W'ayita aleka akubye engezi etangalijja, oli n'alowooza nti eddubi liriko envi." 
Job41:25 Ku nsi tekuli amwenkanya buyinza, kitonde ekitalina kye kitya." 
Job41:26 Buli kyepanka kyonna akinyooma; ye kabaka w'ebisolo byonna ebyekuza.” 
Job42:1 Yobu n'ayanukula Omukama, n'agamba nti:" 
Job42:2 “Mmanyi ng'osobola byonna; ky'otegeka tekiyinza kukotoggerwa. 
Job42:3 ‘Ani oyo atalaba, abuzaabuza ebigambo byange?’ Ggwe wamma nayogedde ku bye simanyi; ebyewuunyisa ebinsukkiridde, bye simanyi." 
Job42:4 ‘Wuliriza, nzija kwogera; Nzija kukubuuza, ojja kunnyanukula.’" 
Job42:5 Okutu kwange kubadde kuwulira buwulizi, naye kati amaaso gange gakwerabiddeko." 
Job42:6 Kale nno nneemenye, era nneetonda mu nfuufu ne mu vvu.”" 
Job42:7 Omukama bwe yamala okugamba Yobu ebigambo bino, n'agamba Elifazi ow'e Temani nti: “Obusungu bwange bukweserereddeko, ku ggwe ne ku banno ababiri, kubanga temunjogeddeeko bituufu ng'omuweereza wange Yobu bw'akoze." 
Job42:8 Kale nno muddire ente ennume ento musanvu n'endiga ennume musanvu, mugende eri omuweereza wange Yobu, muweereze ekitambiro ku lwammwe; omuweereza wange Yobu anaabasabira. Nzija kuwulira okwegayirira kwe ne sibayisa nga nsinziira ku busiru bwammwe; temunjogeddeeko bituufu ng'omuweereza wange Yobu bw'akoze.”" 
Job42:9 Awo Elifazi ow'e Temani, Biludadi ow'e Suki ne Zofari ow'e Naame ne bagenda, ne bakola nga Omukama bwe yabagamba; Katonda n'akkiriza okwegayirira kwa Yobu." 
Job42:10 Yobu bwe yali asabira mikwano gye, Omukama n'akyusa embeera ye. Eby'obugagga bya Yobu bye yalina Omukama n'abimuddizaawo emirundi ebiri." 
Job42:11 Baganda be bonna, bannyina na bonna abaamumanya mu kusooka ne bajja gy'ali; ne balya naye mu nnyumba ye, ne bamusaasira, ne bamukubagiza olw'ebizibu byonna Omukama bye yali amuleetedde; buli omu n'amuwaayo kesita emu, n'empeta eya zaabu." 
Job42:12 Omukama n'awa Yobu ebirungi bingi mu bulamu obw'oluvannyuma okusinga bye yali amuwadde okuva lwe yasooka. Yafuna endiga omutwalo gumu mu enkumi nnya, eŋŋamiya kakaaga; emigongo gy'ente ezirima lukumi n'endogoyi lukumi." 
Job42:13 Yafuna n'abaana abalenzi musanvu, ko abawala basatu;" 
Job42:14 omuwala asooka yamutuuma Yemima, owookubiri Keziya, n'owookusatu Kereni-Appuki." 
Job42:15 Mu nsi eyo yonna tewabangayo bakazi babalagavu nga bawala ba Yobu. Kitaabwe yabagabanyiza ne ku by'obusika wamu ne bannyinaabwe. 
Job42:16 Oluvannyuma nga byonna biwedde, Yobu n'awangaalayo emyaka kikumi mu ana, n'alaba abaana be n'abaana b'abaana okutuusa ku zzadde eryokuna." 
Job42:17 Yobu n'afa nga mukadde, ng'agundidde mu myaka." 
Psalms1:1 Yeesiimye omuntu atatambulira ku bibuuliriro by'ababi, atayimirira mu kkubo ly'aboonoonyi, n'atatuula mu nkiiko z'abanyoomi." 
Psalms1:2 Wabula essanyu lye limuli mu tteeka lya Mukama; yeebuulirira ku tteeka lye emisana n'ekiro. 
Psalms1:3 Ali ng'omuti ogwasimbibwa okumpi n'emyala egy'amazzi, ogussaako ebibala byagwo mu budde bwagwo, n'ebikoola byagwo ebitawotookerera; buli ky'akola kigenda bulungi." 
Psalms1:4 Si bwe batyo ababi! Wabula bali ng'enfuufu empewo gy'ekuŋŋunsiza eri. 
Psalms1:5 N'olw'ekyo ababi tebaliyimirirawo mu kulamulibwa, newandibadde aboonoonyi mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abatuukirivu." 
Psalms1:6 Kubanga Omukama amanyi ekkubo ly'abatuukirivu; naye ekkubo ly'ababi lirizikirira. 
Psalms2:1 Lwaki ab'amawanga beejuumuula, n'abantu bakola enkwe omutali nsa?" 
Psalms2:2 Bakabaka b'ensi batala, n'abafuzi bakuŋŋaana, okulwanyisa Omukama n'Omusiige we." 
Psalms2:3 “Tukutule amasamba gaabwe; tukasuke eri enjegere zaabwe.” 
Psalms2:4 Oyo awaŋŋamye mu ggulu yeesekera; Omukama abasekerera. 
Psalms2:5 Awo n'ababoggolera mu busungu bwe, mu buswandi bwe n'abakanga nti:" 
Psalms2:6 “Ntaddewo kabaka wange ku Siyoni, olusozi lwange olutukuvu.”" 
Psalms2:7 Nzija kumanyisa ekirangiriro ky'Omukama: Yaŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe oli Mwana wange, olwa leero nkuzadde." 
Psalms2:8 Nsaba, nzija kukuwa amawanga bubeere busika bwo; n'enkingi z'ensi zibeere butaka bwo." 
Psalms2:9 Olibabetenta ne ddamula ow'ekyuma; n'obaasaayasa ng'ekibya ky'omubumbi.” 
Psalms2:10 Kale nno, mmwe bakabaka, mugeziwale; mulabuke, mmwe abafuzi b'ensi." 
Psalms2:11 Muweereze Omukama n'okutya; mweyale ku bigere bye nga mukankana. 
Psalms2:12 Sikulwa ng'asunguwala ne musaanyizibwawo mu kkubo lyammwe; kubanga obusungu bwe butumbuka mangu. Beesiimye bonna abaddukira gy'ali. 
Psalms3:1 Zabbuli ya Dawudi ng'adduka mutabani we Abusalomu. 
Psalms3:2 Ayi Mukama, abalabe bange nga bangi! Nga bangi abansitukiramu!" 
Psalms3:3 Bangi banjogerako nti: “Mu Katonda talinaayo buwonero.” 
Psalms3:4 Naye ggwe oli ngabo embugiriza, ayi Mukama; ekitiibwa kyange, ggwe ampa ne neesimba." 
Psalms3:5 Bwe nsitulira eri Omukama omulanga gwange, ampulira ng'ayima ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Psalms3:6 Nze ngalamira ne neebaka; nzuukuka nate, kubanga Omukama ampanirira." 
Psalms3:7 Sijja kutya nkumi za bantu abasituse okunnwanyisa ku njuyi zonna. 
Psalms3:8 Situka, ayi Mukama! Mponya, Katonda wange! Kubanga abalabe bange bonna wabakuba ku nsolobotto; wamenya amannyo g'ababi." 
Psalms3:9 Ew'Omukama y'eva obulokofu. Omukisa gwo gubeere ku bantu bo. 
Psalms4:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya bivuga eby'enkoba. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms4:2 Bwe nkoowoola gy'oli, mpulira, ayi Katonda w'obutuukirivu bwange; mpa ntoowolokokeko mu nnaku zange; nsaasira, owulire essaala yange." 
Psalms4:3 Bantu mmwe, munaatuusa wa okuswaza ekitiibwa kyange? Munaatuusa wa okwagala ebitaliimu n'okunoonya obulimba?" 
Psalms4:4 Mumanye nti Omukama abalungi yabeeyawuliza; Omukama bwe ndimukoowoola, agenda kumpulira." 
Psalms4:5 Musunguwale, kyokka temukola ekibi; nga muli mu bitanda byammwe mukebere emitima gyammwe, musiriikirire." 
Psalms4:6 Mutambire ebitambiro eby'obutuufu, ate musuubire mu Mukama." 
Psalms4:7 Bangi babuuza nti: “Ani alitulaga ekirungi?” Leka ekitangaala ky'amaaso go kitwakire. 
Psalms4:8 Wassa mu mutima gwange essanyu eringi okusinga n'ery'ababaza eŋŋano n'evviini ne bibaalira. 
Psalms4:9 Nzija kugalamira era neebake mu ddembe, kubanga wekka, ayi Mukama, ggwe ompummuza emirembe." 
Psalms5:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya ndere. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms5:2 Ebigambo byange bitegere okutu, ayi Mukama; wuliriza okukema kwange." 
Psalms5:3 Wuliriza eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange, ayi Kabaka wange, ayi Katonda wange, kubanga mpeereza essaala yange gy'oli." 
Psalms5:4 Ku makya owulira eddoboozi lyange, nga bukedde nnyanjula ebyetaago byange ne nnindirira." 
Psalms5:5 Toli Katonda asanyukira okuyisa obubi; omubi tasobola kubeera naawe. 
Psalms5:6 Abeekuza tebayinza kuyimirira mu maaso go; okyawa bonna abakola obubi. 
Psalms5:7 Ozikiriza aboogera eby'obulimba; abantu abayiwa omusaayi n'ab'enkwe Omukama abeenyinyala. 
Psalms5:8 Naye nze, olw'ekisa kyo ekingi, ndiyingira mu Nnyumba yo; ndivunnamira Ekiggwa kyo ekitukuvu nga nkussaamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms5:9 Ayi Mukama, nkulembera mu butuukirivu bwo olw'abalabe bange, ekkubo lyo liruŋŋamye mu maaso gange." 
Psalms5:10 Mu kamwa kaabwe temuli mazima; omutima gwabwe gujjudde kuzikiriza, omumiro gwabwe ntaana eyasamye; n'olulimi lwabwe luseemyaseemya." 
Psalms5:11 Gubasalire, ayi Katonda, enkwe zaabwe zibasuule; olw'emisango gyabwe emingi, bagobe, kubanga baakujeemera." 
Psalms5:12 Naye bonna abaddukira gy'oli basanyuke, bajaganye emirembe gyonna. Babikkirire n'obukuumi bwo; abo abaagala erinnya lyo bajagulize mu ggwe." 
Psalms5:13 Kubanga ggwe, ayi Mukama, omutuukirivu omuwa omukisa, omubugiriza n'ekisa kyo ng'engabo." 
Psalms6:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya bivuga eby'enkoba. Ku lutamba olwomunaana. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms6:2 Ayi Mukama, leka kunvunaana mu busungu bwo, wadde okunkomako mu buswandi bwo." 
Psalms6:3 Nsaasira, ayi Mukama, kubanga ndi muyongobevu; mponya, ayi Mukama, kubanga amagumba gange gameketa;" 
Psalms6:4 n'omwoyo gwange gutabanguse nnyo; naye ddala, Mukama, kutuusa wa…?" 
Psalms6:5 Komawo, ayi Mukama, omponye; ndokola olw'ekisa kyo." 
Psalms6:6 Anti mu bafu teri akujjukira; emagombe ani alikutenda? 
Psalms6:7 Nnyenjebuse olw'okuwoloma; ekiro kyonna ntotobaza ekitanda kyange olw'okukaaba, obuliri bwange mbujonjobaza n'amaziga." 
Psalms6:8 Amaaso gange gakutte ekifu olw'ennaku, gakooye olw'okubeera abalabe bange bonna." 
Psalms6:9 Munsegulire, mmwe mwenna abakola obubi, kubanga Omukama awulidde eddoboozi ly'okukaaba kwange." 
Psalms6:10 Omukama awulidde okuwanjaga kwange; Omukama akkirizza essaala yange. 
Psalms6:11 Abalabe bange bonna ensonyi zibakwate, batye nnyo; baddeyo nga baswaliddewo amangu ago." 
Psalms7:1 Okukungubaga kwa Dawudi kwe yayimbira Omukama olwa Kuusi Omubenyamiini. 
Psalms7:2 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, nzirukidde gy'oli; ntaasa bonna abanjigganya, omponye." 
Psalms7:3 Kubanga bandintaagula ng'empologoma, ne banjuzaayuza awatali n'adduukirira." 
Psalms7:4 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, oba ekyo nakikola, oba mu mikono gyange mulimu obutabeera mwenkanya," 
Psalms7:5 Oba nakola mukwano gwange ekibi, oba omulabe wange namunyaga awatali nsonga," 
Psalms7:6 kale omulabe ampondere ankwate; obulamu bwange abulinnyirire ku ttaka, n'ekitiibwa kyange akiziike mu nfuufu." 
Psalms7:7 Situka, ayi Mukama, mu busungu bwo; situka olwanyise obuswandi bw'abalabe bange. Zuukuka, ayi Katonda wange, owe ennamula." 
Psalms7:8 Olukuŋŋaana lw'abantu lukwebungulule; ng'oyima waggulu lukubirize. 
Psalms7:9 Omukama alamula amawanga; nnamula, ayi Mukama, ng'osinziira ku butuukirivu bwange, ng'osinziira ku bulungi bwange, ayi Ali Waggulu Ddala." 
Psalms7:10 Komya obwonoonefu bw'ababi; abatuukirivu bawe banywere, ayi Katonda omutuukirivu, ggwe awenja emitima n'emmeeme." 
Psalms7:11 Engabo yange ye Mukama Ali Waggulu Ddala, oyo alokola ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu." 
Psalms7:12 Katonda mulamuzi mutuukirivu; Katonda asunguwala buli kanaku. 
Psalms7:13 Bw'ateenenya, ajja kuwagala ekitala kye, ajja kubwama aleege akasaale ke." 
Psalms7:14 Ategese ebissi eby'akabenje; ategese obusaale bwe okuli ebitawuliro. 
Psalms7:15 Mulabe, olubuto afuna lwa bugwenyufu, enda n'aba na ya bulwa, n'azaala bulimba." 
Psalms7:16 Asima obuya, n'abuwuukuula, ate n'agwa mu bunnya yennyini bw'asimye." 
Psalms7:17 Effujjo ly'akola lirimuddira ku mutwe gwe; emitawaana gye girikka mu kawompo ke. 
Psalms7:18 Nze nzija kutenda Omukama olw'obutuukirivu bwe, nzija kuyimba erinnya ly'Omukama Ali Waggulu Ddala." 
Psalms8:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga Gittiti. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms8:2 Ayi Mukama, Mukama waffe, erinnya lyo nga lya kitiibwa mu nsi yonna! Wassa ekitiibwa kyo waggulu okusukka n'eggulu." 
Psalms8:3 Mu kamwa k'abawere n'abayonka mwe wategeka amaanyi olw'okubeera abalabe bo, osirise omulabe n'awoolera eggwanga." 
Psalms8:4 Bwe ndaba eggulu lyo, omulimu gw'engalo zo, omwezi n'emmunyeenye bye wawangawo," 
Psalms8:5 omuntu ye ani gw'ojjukira, oba omwana w'omuntu ye ani gw'ossaako omwoyo?" 
Psalms8:6 Wamubuzaako katono okuba nga bamalayika; wamutikkira ekitiibwa n'ettendo. 
Psalms8:7 Wamuwa obuyinza ku ebyo emikono gyo bye gyakola; buli kintu wakissa wansi w'ebigere bye: 
Psalms8:8 endiga n'ente we zifa zenkana, n'ebisolo eby'ettale;" 
Psalms8:9 ebinyonyi by'omu bbanga, ebyennyanja mu nnyanja na buli kyonna ekyekuukuubiza mu bisinde by'ennyanja." 
Psalms8:10 Ayi Mukama, Mukama waffe, erinnya lyo nga lya kitiibwa mu nsi yonna!" 
Psalms9:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Muti Labbeni'. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms9:2 Nnaakutenda, ayi Mukama, n'omutima gwange gwonna; nzija kuttottola ebyewuunyisa byo byonna." 
Psalms9:3 Nnaasanyuka ne nkujagulizaamu; nzija kuyimba nga ntenda erinnya lyo, ayi Ali Waggulu Ddala." 
Psalms9:4 Abalabe bange bwe bazze emabega, beesitadde ne bazikirira mu maaso go." 
Psalms9:5 Kubanga osazeewo ng'ogoba empaaba yange n'ensonga zange, otudde mu ntebe, ggwe alamuza obutuukirivu." 
Psalms9:6 Oboggoledde amawanga, n'ozikiriza ababi; erinnya lyabwe n'olisangulirawo ddala emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms9:7 Abalabe basaanyeewo, ne bafuuka matongo ag'emirembe gyonna; osiguukuludde ebibuga byabwe, ne kwe bandijjuukiriddwa kizikiridde." 
Psalms9:8 Ye Omukama alifuga emirembe gyonna, nnamulondo ye yagissaawo okulamula." 
Psalms9:9 Aliramula ensi mu butuukirivu; amawanga ogasalirawo mu bwenkanya. 
Psalms9:10 Omukama bwe buddukiro bw'anyigiriziddwa; ekigo ekinywevu mu budde obw'akacwano. 
Psalms9:11 Abamanyi erinnya lyo balikwesiga; ggwe, ayi Mukama, tolekereranga bakunoonya." 
Psalms9:12 Muyimbire Omukama amatendo, oyo awaŋŋamye mu Siyoni, mulangirire mu mawanga ebyo by'akoze." 
Psalms9:13 Kubanga oyo awoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi ajjukira; teyeerabira mulanga gwa baavu. 
Psalms9:14 Nsaasira, ayi Mukama; laba abankyaye bwe bambonyaabonya, ggwe onsitula okuva ku miryango gy'olumbe." 
Psalms9:15 Olwo nnangirire amatendo go gonna mu miryango gy'omuwala wa Siyoni, njaganyize mu bulokozi bwo." 
Psalms9:16 Amawanga gaagwa mu buya bwe gaakola, ebigere byabwe bikwatidde mu kitimba kye baali bakwese." 
Psalms9:17 Omukama yeeyolese n'alamula; ababi bagudde mu mitego gy'ebyo bennyini bye baakola. Yiggayoni. 
Psalms9:18 Ababi bazzeeyo emagombe, amawanga gonna ageerabira Katonda." 
Psalms9:19 Naye omwavu tagenda kwerabirwa bulijjo, essuubi ly'abanaku teririzikirira emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms9:20 Situka, ayi Mukama, tokkiriza omuntu obuntu okukajjala; gira amawanga galamulibwe mu maaso go." 
Psalms9:21 Bakube encukwe, ayi Mukama; leka amawanga gamanye bwe bali abantu obuntu." 
Psalms10:1 Mukama, lwaki weesudde? Lwaki weekweka mu budde obw'akacwano?" 
Psalms10:2 Mu kwekuza kwabwe ababi bacoccanya abanaku; Bakwatiddwa mu nkwe zaabwe ze bakoze. 
Psalms10:3 Omubi yeetendera mu maddu g'omutima gwe; yeesiimisa ow'omululu, avuma Omukama." 
Psalms10:4 Omubi talaba Mukama; mu kwekuza kwe omwonoonyi tafaayo, mu kulowooza kwe Katonda taliiyo." 
Psalms10:5 Amakubo ge manywevu obudde bwonna; mwekuza, n'ennamula yo emuli wala; abalabe be bonna abagaya bugayi." 
Psalms10:6 Alowooza mu mutima gwe nti: “Tewali kirinnyeenya; mu mazadde n'amazadde tewaliba kimbonyaabonya.” 
Psalms10:7 Akamwa ke kajjudde bikolimo, bulimba na kunyigiriza; wansi w'olulimi lwe waliyo mitawaana na bugwenyufu." 
Psalms10:8 Ateegera kumpi n'ebyalo, n'aliimisa ow'okukwata, ataliiko musango n'amuttira mu nkiso." 
Psalms10:9 Ateega ng'empologoma mu bukukumo bwayo; ateegerera akwakkule ataliiko bw'ali; akwakkula omunaku n'amuwalaawalira mu kitimba kye. 
Psalms10:10 Baakutte babetentebwa ne bagwa; abanaku bagwa wansi olw'amaanyi ge. 
Psalms10:11 Agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Katonda yeerabidde; abisse ku maaso ge, talaba n'akatono.”" 
Psalms10:12 Ayi Mukama Katonda, situka, golola omukono gwo; leka kwerabira munaku." 
Psalms10:13 Lwaki omubi okugaya Katonda, mu mutima gwe n'agamba nti: “Talibuuliriza.”" 
Psalms10:14 Naye ggwe, Katonda, olaba okubonaabona n'ennaku, olyoke obisse mu mikono gyo; omunaku yeewaddeyo gy'oli, ggwe ajuna mulekwa." 
Psalms10:15 Menya omukono gw'omubi n'ogw'omwonoonyi; noonyereza emisango gyabwe okutuusa nga tokyazuulayo mulala. 
Psalms10:16 Omukama ye kabaka emirembe n'emirembe; amawanga gazikirira okuva ku nsi ye. 
Psalms10:17 Ayi Mukama, owuliriza ebyetaago by'abanaku; ogumya emitima gyabwe, n'obategera okutu kwo," 
Psalms10:18 owolereze enfuuzi n'anyigirizibwa, omuntu eyava mu ttaka obutaka aleme kwongera kutiisatiisa." 
Psalms11:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya Dawudi. Nzirukidde mu Mukama; lwaki nno muŋŋamba nti: “Ddukira ku lusozi ng'akanyonyi. 
Psalms11:2 Anti laba ababi baleeze emisaale gyabwe; akasaale kaabwe bakatadde ku kaguwa mu nzikiza balase ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu. 
Psalms11:3 Emisingi bwe ginaamenyebwawo, omutuukirivu anaakola ki?”" 
Psalms11:4 Omukama ali mu Kiggwa kye ekitukuvu; Omukama awaŋŋamye ku nnamulondo ye mu ggulu. Amaaso ge gatunuulira, emmunye ze zekkaanya abaana b'abantu." 
Psalms11:5 Omukama yekkaanya omutuukirivu; naye omwoyo gwe gukyawa ababi n'abo abaagala obukambwe. 
Psalms11:6 Ababi alibayiwako amanda n'olunyata lw'ebibiriiti; empewo ebabula y'eriba omugabo gw'ekikompe kyabwe. 
Psalms11:7 Kubanga Omukama mutuukirivu, ayagala eby'obutuukirivu; abaluŋŋamu baliraba amaaso ge." 
Psalms12:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ku lutamba olwomunaana. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms12:2 Yamba, ayi Mukama, anti abatuufu baweddewo; abeesigwa babuze mu baana b'abantu." 
Psalms12:3 Buli muntu alimba munne; boogeza mimwa gya nkwe na mitima gya nkulubbirye. 
Psalms12:4 Omukama azikirize emimwa gyonna eginyumiikiriza, ennimi ezoogera ebigambo eby'okwewaana," 
Psalms12:5 eby'abo abagamba nti: “Ennimi zaffe zirituwanguza; emimwa gyaffe tuli nagyo, kale ate ani mukama waffe?”" 
Psalms12:6 “Olw'okubonaabona kw'abatene n'okwaziirana kw'abaavu, kati ka nsituke,” Omukama bw'agamba, “nzija kubataasa oyo abavuma.”" 
Psalms12:7 Ebigambo by'Omukama bigambo bitukuvu, ffeeza omuyooyoote mu kabiga ak'ebbumba, atukuziddwa emirundi musanvu." 
Psalms12:8 Ggwe, ayi Mukama, tutalize; tukuume, otutaase abantu abo bulijjo." 
Psalms12:9 Ababi basajjalaata ku njuyi zonna; obugwagwa bwe bugulumizibwa mu baana b'abantu. 
Psalms13:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms13:2 Kutuusa wa, ayi Mukama? Onneerabiridde ddala? Onootuusa wa okunkweka amaaso go?" 
Psalms13:3 Nnaatuusa wa okwenyoola n'ebirowoozo mu mwoyo gwange, okuba n'ennyiike mu mutima olunaku lwonna? Omulabe wange anaatuusa wa okunneewanikako?" 
Psalms13:4 Ntunuulira, onziremu, ayi Mukama, Katonda wange. Tangaaza amaaso gange, nneme kwebaka tulo twa lumbe," 
Psalms13:5 omulabe wange aleme kugamba nti: “Mmuwangudde.” Abandi obubi baleme kujaganya olw'okuba ngudde. 
Psalms13:6 Sso nze neesiga ekisa kyo; omutima gwange gujaguliza mu bulokozi bwo; nzija kuyimbira Omukama kubanga ankoledde ebirungi. 
Psalms14:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya Dawudi. Omusiru agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Katonda taliiwo.” Boonoonefu, n'ebikolwa byabwe byenyinyalwa; tewali akola kirungi." 
Psalms14:2 Omukama ayima mu ggulu, n'atunula wansi ku baana b'abantu, alabe oba mulimu ategeera, anoonya Katonda." 
Psalms14:3 Bonna bawabye, bonna wamu bayonoonese; mpaawo akola kirungi, newandibadde omu ati." 
Psalms14:4 Abakola obubi tebaliyiga, abo abakavvula abantu bange, ng'abalya omugaati, abatawanjagira Mukama?" 
Psalms14:5 Baabo, batidde ebitatiika, kubanga Katonda ali n'ezzadde ly'abatuukirivu." 
Psalms14:6 Mukotoggera ebiteeso by'omunaku, naye Omukama bwe buddukiro bwe." 
Psalms14:7 Singa nno Yisirayeli afunye obulokofu okuva mu Siyoni. Omukama bw'alizza abantu be okuva mu busibe, Yakobo alisagambiza ne Yisirayeli alisanyuka." 
Psalms15:1 Zabbuli ya Dawudi. Ayi Mukama, ani alibeera mu weema yo? Ani alisula ku lusozi lwo olutukuvu?" 
Psalms15:2 Atambula nga taliiko musango, n'akola ekituufu; ayogera amazima ng'agaggya mu mutima;" 
Psalms15:3 atawaayiriza na lulimi lwe; atakolera munne bubi, n'ataweebuula muliraanwa we;" 
Psalms15:4 oyo anyooma akola ebyambyone, naye n'assa ekitiibwa mu batya Omukama; akuuma ekirayiro kye ne bwe kiba kimufiiriza;" 
Psalms15:5 ssente ze ataziwola na buliika, n'atalya nguzi okusaliriza ataliiko musango. Akola ebyo, talinyeenyezebwa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms16:1 Mikutamu ya Dawudi. Ayi Katonda, nkuuma, kubanga nzirukidde gy'oli." 
Psalms16:2 Ŋŋamba Omukama nti: “Ggwe Mukama wange; w'otoli, mpaawo kirungi kye mba nakyo.”" 
Psalms16:3 Abo abatuukirivu abali mu nsi, be bantu abatiibwa be nsanyukiramu." 
Psalms16:4 Abagoberera balubaale beeyongera nnaku; siriweereza bitambiro byabwe bya kuyiwa eby'omusaayi, n'emimwa gyange sirigyatuza mannya gaabwe." 
Psalms16:5 Omukama gwe mugabo gwange n'ekikompe kyange, ggwe onkuumira ekitundu kyange mu ddembe." 
Psalms16:6 Eminyololo gingudde walungi; wamma obusika bwange busanyusa. 
Psalms16:7 Nzija kugulumiza Omukama ampa amagezi, nandibadde mu kiro omutima gwange gumbuulirira." 
Psalms16:8 Omukama mmussa awo mu maaso gange bulijjo; kubanga andi ku ddyo, sirinyeenyezebwa." 
Psalms16:9 Omutima gwange kyeguva gusanyuka n'omwoyo gwange ne gujaguza, n'omubiri gwange guliwummula mu ddembe." 
Psalms16:10 Kubanga omwoyo gwange toliguleka magombe; yadde okuleka omutuukirivu wo okulaba obunnya. 
Psalms16:11 Olimmanyisa ekkubo ly'obulamu, essanyu erijjuvu ku maaso go, n'okwesiima ku ddyo wo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms17:1 Okwegayirira kwa Dawudi. Ayi Mukama, wulira ensonga yange entuufu, wuliriza omulanga gwange, tegera amatu essaala yange, okuva ku mimwa egitaliiko bulimba." 
Psalms17:2 Ggwe oba osala omusango gwange, amaaso go galabe ekituufu." 
Psalms17:3 Ne bw'owenja omutima gwange, n'ogwekkaanya mu kiro, ne bw'ongeza, tojja kusangamu kabi; nateesa obutaleka kamwa kange kusobya." 
Psalms17:4 Ebyo ebintu abantu bye bakola, nze, olw'okubeera ebigambo by'akamwa ko, neewala amakubo g'abakola eby'obukambwe." 
Psalms17:5 Ebigere byange binyweredde mu bukubo bwo; ebigere byange tebiseeredde. 
Psalms17:6 Ayi Katonda, nkukoowoola, nziraamu. Mpunzikira eno okutu, wulira okuwanjaga kwange." 
Psalms17:7 Yoleka ebikuuno by'ekisa kyo, ggwe ataasa n'omukono gwo ogwa ddyo abo abaddukira gy'oli okubawonya ababasitukiddemu." 
Psalms17:8 Nkuuma ng'emmunye y'eriiso lyo; nkweka mu kisiikirize ky'ebiwaawaatiro byo," 
Psalms17:9 omponye ababi abannumba, abalabe bange aba kabi abanneebunguludde." 
Psalms17:10 Bazibiikiriza emitima gyabwe emikakanyavu; n'akamwa kaabwe koogeza lwetumbu. 
Psalms17:11 Bannondodde, banneebunguludde; bakalirizza amaaso gaabwe, bammegge ku ttaka." 
Psalms17:12 Bali ng'empologoma eyoya omuyiggo, oba ng'omwana gw'empologoma ogubwamye mu bukukumo." 
Psalms17:13 Situka, ayi Mukama, basisinkane, obamegge, n'ekitala kyo obulamu bwange buwonye ababi." 
Psalms17:14 Ayi Mukama, bamponye abo n'omukono gwo, abantu abo empeera yaabwe eri mu nsi muno; olubuto lwabwe lufumbekere ebyo bye wabaterekera, abaana baabwe bakkute, bafissizeewo bingi amabujje gaabwe." 
Psalms17:15 Sso nze mu butuukirivu mwe ndirabira amaaso go; bwe ndizuukuka, ndimatira okulaba enfaanana yo." 
Psalms18:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya Dawudi Omuweereza w'Omukama eyayimbira Omukama oluyimba luno ku lunaku Omukama lwe yamuwonya mu mikono gy'abalabe be bonna ne mu mikono gya Sawulo. 
Psalms18:2 Yagamba nti: “Nkwagala, ayi Mukama, amaanyi gange." 
Psalms18:3 Omukama lwe lwazi lwange, ekigo kyange, omulokozi wange; Katonda wange lwe lwazi lwange, mwe nzirukira; engabo yange, amaanyi g'obulokofu bwange, bbugwe wange." 
Psalms18:4 Nkoowoola Omukama asaanye okutendebwa, mponyezeddwa abalabe bange." 
Psalms18:5 “Emiguwa gy'olumbe gyandippa; engezi z'ababi zambikka; 
Psalms18:6 emiguwa gy'emagombe gyanneezingirira, emitego gy'okufa gyali ginnindiridde." 
Psalms18:7 Mu nnaku yange nakoowoola Omukama, nawanjagira Katonda wange. Yayima mu Kiggwa kye, n'awulira eddoboozi lyange; okuwanjaga kwange gy'ali ne kutuuka ku matu ge." 
Psalms18:8 “Ensi yayuuga n'ekankana, emisingi gy'ensozi ne giyuuguuma, ne gikubagana kubanga yali asunguwadde." 
Psalms18:9 Omukka gwattunka okuva mu nnyindo ze, n'omuliro ogusenkenya ne guva mu kamwa ke, n'amanda gawamatukamu nga gaaka." 
Psalms18:10 Yaggula eggulu n'akkirira, ekire ekikutte kiri wansi w'ebigere." 
Psalms18:11 “Yeebagala ku bakerubi n'abuuka, n'aseeyeeyera ku biwaawaatiro by'empewo." 
Psalms18:12 Enzikiza yagifuula ekyebikkwa kye n'ensiisira ye okumwetooloola; n'asiikirizibwa amazzi amakwafu, ebire ebikutte." 
Psalms18:13 Mu kitangaala ekiri w'abeera muvaamu ebire, wamu n'omuzira n'enjota." 
Psalms18:14 “Omukama yabwatuka mu ggulu; Ali Waggulu Ddala n'ata eddoboozi lye. 
Psalms18:15 “Yalasa obusaale bwe n'ababunya emiwabo, n'okubwatuka kwa laddu okw'amaanyi n'abasaanyaawo." 
Psalms18:16 “Ebiwonvu by'ennyanja ne byeyerula, emisingi gy'enkulungo y'ensi ne girabika, bwe waboggola, Mukama, omukka gw'omu mivumbo gyo bwe gwafuuwa." 
Psalms18:17 “Yayima waggulu n'ambaka, n'ansikayo mu mazzi amangi." 
Psalms18:18 Yamponya omulabe wange ow'amaanyi, abo abaali bankyaye, abampitiridde amaanyi." 
Psalms18:19 “Bannumba ku lunaku olw'obuyinike bwange, naye Omukama ye yali obuyambi bwange." 
Psalms18:20 Yanzigyayo n'antwala mu kyererezi; yamponya, kubanga anneesiimiramu." 
Psalms18:21 “Omukama yampeera ng'agerera ku butuukirivu bwange; yanziriza ng'agerera ku butukuvu bw'emikono gyange. 
Psalms18:22 Kubanga nakuuma amakubo g'Omukama, saakola bubi kuva ku Katonda wange." 
Psalms18:23 Kubanga ebiragiro bye byonna bindi wano mu maaso; saawunjuka ku mateeka ge. 
Psalms18:24 Mu maaso ge saaliko musango; neekuuma nze okukola ekibi. 
Psalms18:25 N'Omukama yanziriza ng'agerera ku butuukirivu bwange, ng'asinziira ku butukuvu bw'emikono gyange mu maaso ge." 
Psalms18:26 “Ku mutuufu weeraga bw'oli omutuufu; ku ataliiko musango weeraga bw'otoliiko musango. 
Psalms18:27 Ku mutukuvu weeraga bw'oli omutukuvu; ku mwonoonefu weeraga bw'oli omukalabakalaba. 
Psalms18:28 Olokola abatene, naye otoowaza abo ab'amaaso ageekuza." 
Psalms18:29 Ayi Mukama, ettawaaza yange ggwe ogikuuma ng'eyaka; Omukama atangaaza enzikiza yange." 
Psalms18:30 Nga ndi naawe, n'eggye ndirumba, Nga ndi ne Katonda wange mpalampa ne bbugwe." 
Psalms18:31 “Katonda ono, ekkubo lye temuli bbala. Ekigambo ky'Omukama kitukuze na muliro; Ye ngabo ya bonna abaddukira gy'ali." 
Psalms18:32 “Kubanga ani Katonda, wabula Omukama? Ani Lwazi, wabula Katonda waffe?" 
Psalms18:33 Ye Katonda ankindikidde amaanyi, ekkubo lyange alittaanyizza ddala." 
Psalms18:34 Ebigere byange yabifaananya eby'empeewo, n'annyimiriza awagulumivu." 
Psalms18:35 Yayigiriza emikono gyange okutabaala, emikono gyange giweta omusaale ogw'ekikomo." 
Psalms18:36 “Wampa engabo y'obuwanguzi bwo; ddyo wo ampanirira; obukkakamu bwo bunfuula ow'ekitiibwa. 
Psalms18:37 Enta zange ez'ebigere wazigaziya, obukongovvule bwange buleme kukoowa."
