Psalms18:38 Nawondera abalabe bange ne mbakwata; saakyuka nga sinnabazikiriza. 
Psalms18:39 Nabakuba, tebaasobola kusituka; bangwa awo ku bigere." 
Psalms18:40 “Wankindikira obuzira nsobole olutalo, abansitukiramu wabafeebeza ku bigere byange." 
Psalms18:41 Abalabe bange wabakyusa ne banziruka; abankyawa ne mbazikiriza. 
Psalms18:42 Baalekaana, ne wabula abalokola; baawanjagira Omukama, kyokka teyabaddamu." 
Psalms18:43 Nabamerengula ng'enfuufu efuuyibwa empewo, ne mbafukumula eri ng'ebitoomi by'omu kkubo." 
Psalms18:44 “Wamponya ennyombo z'abantu bange, wanzisaawo ng'omutwe gwa mawanga; abantu be nali simanyi bampeereza." 
Psalms18:45 Oluwulira luti ne baŋŋondera, abagwira babundaala we ndi;" 
Psalms18:46 Abagwira batekemuka, ne bava mu bigo byabwe nga bakankana." 
Psalms18:47 “Omukama mulamu, atenderezebwe Olwazi lwange. Agulumizibwe Katonda, Omulokozi wange." 
Psalms18:48 Ye Katonda awoolera eggwanga ku lwange, assa amawanga wansi wange;" 
Psalms18:49 wamponya abalabe bange. Wangulumiza ku bansitukiramu, wamponya abantu abakambwe." 
Psalms18:50 Kyendiva nkugulumiza mu mawanga, ayi Mukama; ndiyimbira erinnya lyo ettendo." 
Psalms18:51 Awa kabaka we obuwanguzi obw'amaanyi; agirira ekisa omusiige we, Dawudi n'ezzadde lye emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms19:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms19:2 Eggulu lirombojja ekitiibwa kya Katonda n'olubaale lulangirira emirimu gy'emikono gye. 
Psalms19:3 Buli lunaku bifukumula ebigambo, na buli kiro biwa okumanya." 
Psalms19:4 Tewali kwogera, tewali kigambo; eddoboozi lyabyo teriwulirwa." 
Psalms19:5 Kyokka eddoboozi lyabyo lituuka mu nsi yonna, n'ebigambo byabyo ku nkingi z'ensi." 
Psalms19:6 Eyo gye yateekera enjuba weema, eri ng'omugole omusajja avaayo mu kisenge kye, ng'omuddusi asanyukira okudduka ekitundu kye." 
Psalms19:7 Efuluma eri eggulu gye likoma, ne yeetooloola okutuukira ddala ku nsonda y'eggulu endala; mpaawo kiwona bbugumu lyayo." 
Psalms19:8 Etteeka ly'Omukama ttuufu, lizzaamu omwoyo amaanyi; enjigiriza y'Omukama yeesigika, eyigiriza abatene amagezi." 
Psalms19:9 Ebiyigirizibwa Omukama bituukirivu, bisanyula omutima, ekiragiro ky'Omukama kitangaavu, kimulisa amaaso." 
Psalms19:10 Okutya Omukama kutukuvu, kusigalawo emirembe gyonna; amateeka g'Omukama ga mazima, gonna wamu matuufu." 
Psalms19:11 Bya muwendo n'okusinga zaabu, yadde zaabu omukuŋŋunte. Biwoomerera n'okusinga omubisi gw'enjuki, n'okusinga omubisi gw'ekisassalala." 
Psalms19:12 Bino omuweereza wo bimuyigiriza; okubikwata kya mugaso munene. 
Psalms19:13 Ani asobola okutegeera ensobi ze? Nsonyiwa ensobi zange enkusike. 
Psalms19:14 Omuweereza wo mutangire aleme kugwa mu kwekuza; kuleme kunfuga. Olwo ndiba siriiko kisobyo, ga siriiko musango munene." 
Psalms19:15 Ebigambo by'akamwa kange biwoomere amaaso go, ebirowoozo by'omutima gwange bikusanyuse, ayi Mukama, Olwazi lwange, Omununuzi wange." 
Psalms20:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms20:2 Omukama akwanukule mu budde obw'obuyinike; erinnya lya Katonda wa Yakobo likutaase. 
Psalms20:3 Akusindikire obuyambi obuva mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, akuwanirire ng'ayima mu Siyoni." 
Psalms20:4 Ajjukire ebitambiro byo byonna, akkirize ebitambiro byo ebyokye." 
Psalms20:5 Akuwe omutima gwo bye gwegomba, era atuukirize buli ky'oteesa." 
Psalms20:6 Tulisagambiza n'essanyu ng'owangudde; tulisitula bendera mu linnya lya Katonda waffe. Omukama akuwe byonna by'omusaba. 
Psalms20:7 Kati mmanyi ng'Omukama ajja kuwonya omusiige we, amwanukula ng'ayima mu ggulu lye ettukuvu, n'amaanyi ag'obuwanguzi aga ddyo we." 
Psalms20:8 Abamu beewaanira mu bigaali n'abalala mu mbalaasi, naye ffe tukowoola linnya lya Mukama Katonda waffe." 
Psalms20:9 Bali baneguse ne bagwa, naye ffe tusituse ne tuyimiriza maanyi." 
Psalms20:10 Ayi Mukama, wonya kabaka; twanukule nga tukukoowodde." 
Psalms21:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms21:2 Ayi Mukama, kabaka asanyukira mu maanyi go. Nga musanyufu nnyo olw'obuwanguzi bw'owa!" 
Psalms21:3 Omuwadde omutima gwe kye gwegomba, tomummye mimwa gye kye gisabye." 
Psalms21:4 Anti wamusisinkana n'emikisa egy'ekitalo, n'omussa ku mutwe engule eya zaabu omusa." 
Psalms21:5 Yakusaba obulamu, n'obumuwa, obuwanvu bw'ennaku emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms21:6 Ekitiibwa kye kingi olw'obuyambi bwo; wamugemulira ettendo n'ekitiibwa. 
Psalms21:7 Ddala wamuwa omukisa ogw'emirembe gyonna, n'omusanyusa n'essanyu ly'amaaso go." 
Psalms21:8 Kituufu, kabaka obwesige bwe buli mu Mukama, n'olw'ekisa ky'Ali Waggulu Ddala talinyeenyezebwa." 
Psalms21:9 Omukono gwo gulituuka ku balabe bo bonna; omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gulikwata abo abakukyawa. 
Psalms21:10 Lw'olyoleka amaaso go, olibakasuka mu kabiga akanyooka; Mu busungu bwe Omukama alibamira, n'omuliro gulibasenkenya." 
Psalms21:11 Ezzadde lyabwe olirizikiriza ku nsi; olulyo lwabwe n'olumalawo mu baana b'abantu. 
Psalms21:12 Ne bwe bateesa okukola ekibi, ne bakola enkwe, tebalisobola," 
Psalms21:13 kubanga olibafuumuula emisinde, bw'olibaleegamu omusaale gwo." 
Psalms21:14 Ayi Mukama, yitimuka mu maanyi go; tuliyimba ennyimba ne tutendereza obuzira bwo." 
Psalms22:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Empeewo y'oku Mmambya'. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms22:2 Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki onjabulidde? Lwaki weesambye eky'okumponya? Lwaki weesuubye ebigambo by'okukungubaga kwange?" 
Psalms22:3 Katonda wange, obw'emisana nkowoola, naye toddamu, n'ekiro sirisiriikiriramu." 
Psalms22:4 Naye ggwe oli mutuukirivu, owaŋŋamye ku matendo ga Yisirayeli." 
Psalms22:5 Mu ggwe bajjajjaffe mwe bassa obwesige bwabwe; baasuubira n'obawonya. 
Psalms22:6 Baakuwanjagira, ne banunulibwa; baasuubira mu ggwe, tebaaswala." 
Psalms22:7 Naye nze ndi nvunyu, siri muntu; njoogebwa abantu, ngayibwa ekibiina." 
Psalms22:8 Bonna abandaba bansekerera; bansongamu emimwa, ne bannyeenyeza omutwe:" 
Psalms22:9 “Mbu yeesiga Omukama; kale nno amulokole; amuwonye, anti amwesiimiramu.”" 
Psalms22:10 Naye ggwe wanzigya mu lubuto, wankuuma bwe nali nkyali ku mabeere ga nnyabo." 
Psalms22:11 Olwava mu lubuto ne nsuulirwa ggwe; okuva mu lubuto lwa nnyabo ggwe Katonda wange. 
Psalms22:12 Tonneesuuba, kubanga akabi kasembedde, tewali wa kunnyamba." 
Psalms22:13 Seddume ennyingi zinneetoolodde, Zisseddume z'e Basani zinneebunguludde." 
Psalms22:14 Zinjasamizza emimwa gyazo; empologoma etaagula omuyiggo gwayo. 
Psalms22:15 Njiyiddwa ng'amazzi, n'amagumba gange gonna gasowose; omutima gwange gufuuse ng'envumbo, guntekemuse munda." 
Psalms22:16 Amaanyi gange gakaze ng'oluggyo, n'olulimi lunkwatidde ku kibuno; ontuuzizza mu nfuufu y'olumbe." 
Psalms22:17 Embwa zinneebunguludde, ekibondo ky'ababi kinzingizza, emikono gyange n'ebigere byange babiwumuggudde," 
Psalms22:18 n'amagumba gange gonna nsobola okugabala; abantu batunuulira ne beerolera. 
Psalms22:19 Ebyambalo byange baabigabana, olugoye lwange ne balukubako akalulu." 
Psalms22:20 Ggwe nno, ayi Mukama toyimirira wala; ayi maanyi gange, yanguwa okunnyamba." 
Psalms22:21 Omwoyo gwange guwonye ekitala, n'obulamu bwange buno bwokka buggye mu mikono gy'embwa." 
Psalms22:22 Mponya mu kamwa k'empologoma nze omutene, mponya amayembe g'embogo." 
Psalms22:23 Ndirangirira erinnya lyo mu baganda bange; ndikutendereza mu kibiina wakati: 
Psalms22:24 “Abatya Omukama, mumutendereze. Mwenna ezzadde lya Yakobo, mumugulumize, mumutye, mwenna ezzadde lya Yisirayeli." 
Psalms22:25 Anti teyanyooma, yadde okwenyinyala obunaku bw'omunkuseere; amaaso ge teyagamukweka, bwe yamuwanjagira, yamuwulira." 
Psalms22:26 Ewuwo y'eva ettendo lyange mu lukuŋŋaana olukulu; bye neetema nzija kubituukiriza mu maaso g'abamutya bonna. 
Psalms22:27 Abaavu balirya ne bakkuta; abo abanoonya Omukama balimutenda. Emitima gyammwe gibeerewo emirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms22:28 Enkingi zonna ez'ensi zirijjukira ne zidda eri Omukama, ebika byonna eby'amawanga biryeyala mu maaso ge." 
Psalms22:29 Kubanga obufuzi bwa Mukama; ye y'afuga amawanga. 
Psalms22:30 Bonna abagalamidde mu ttaka yekka gwe balivunnamira, bonna abakkirira mu nfuufu, balikuba amavi mu maaso ge, abo abatakyasobola kwebeezaawo nga balamu." 
Psalms22:31 Abazzukulu baliweereza Omukama, balinyumya ku Mukama eri ezzadde erijja." 
Psalms22:32 Balirangirira obutuufu bwe eri abantu kati abatannazaalibwa, nti ye yakikola." 
Psalms23:1 Zabbuli ya Dawudi. Omukama ye musumba wange, siijulenga kantu." 
Psalms23:2 Ampummuliza mu malundiro amalungi, antwala ku mazzi amateefu." 
Psalms23:3 Omwoyo gwange aguzzaamu endasi; ampisa mu bukubo obutuukirivu olw'okubeera erinnya lye. 
Psalms23:4 Ne bwe nnaatambulira mu kiwonvu ekikutte enzikiza, sitya kabi, kubanga ggwe oli nange; omuggo gwo n'oluga binkubagiza." 
Psalms23:5 Ontegekera olujjuliro mu maaso g'abalabe bange; omutwe gwange ogusiiga omuzigo, ekikompe kyange kibooga." 
Psalms23:6 Ddala obulungi n'ekisa biringoberera ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwange; nnaasulanga mu nnyumba y'Omukama, emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms24:1 Ya Dawudi. Zabbuli. Ensi ya Mukama na byonna ebigijjuza enkulungo y'ensi na bonna abagisulamu. 
Psalms24:2 Anti ye yagibanga ku mayanja, n'aginyweza ku migga." 
Psalms24:3 Ani alyambuka ku lusozi lw'Omukama, ani aliyimirira mu kifo kye ekitukuvu?" 
Psalms24:4 Ow'emikono egitaliiko musango n'ow'omutima omutukuvu, atateeka mwoyo gwe ku bifaananyi bya balubaale, n'atalayira ng'alimba." 
Psalms24:5 Ono alifuna omukisa ew'Omukama, n'okwejjeerera okuva ewa Katonda Mulokozi we." 
Psalms24:6 Ly'eryo ezzadde ly'abamunoonya, ery'abanoonya amaaso go, ayi Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Emiryango, musitule obubuno bwammwe; muggulwewo, mmwe enzigi ez'edda, Kabaka ow'ekitiibwa ayingire." 
Psalms24:8 Kabaka ono ow'ekitiibwa ye ani? Ye Mukama ow'amaanyi, omuzira, Omukama omuzira mu lutalo." 
Psalms24:9 Emiryango, musitule obubuno bwammwe, nammwe enzigi ez'edda, muggulwewo, Kabaka ow'ekitiibwa ayingire." 
Psalms24:10 Kabaka ono ow'ekitiibwa ye ani? Omukama w'Amagye, yennyini ye Kabaka ow'ekitiibwa." 
Psalms25:1 Ya Dawudi. Gy'oli, ayi Mukama, gye nsitulidde omwoyo gwange," 
Psalms25:2 Katonda wange, ggwe gwe neesiga, tondeka kuswala; toleka balabe bange kunninnyako." 
Psalms25:3 Anti bonna abasuubira mu ggwe tebaliswala; naye abo abadyeka awatali nsonga baliswala. 
Psalms25:4 Ayi Mukama, ndaga amakubo go; obukubo bwo bunjigirize." 
Psalms25:5 Nambika mu mazima go, onjigirize, kubanga ggwe Katonda Omulokozi wange; mu ggwe mwe nsuubira olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms25:6 Ayi Mukama, jjukira okusaasira kwo n'ekisa kyo, anti byaliwo okuva ddi na ddi." 
Psalms25:7 Tojjukira bibi bya mu buvubuka bwange n'emisango gyange; nzijukira ng'ekisa kyo bwe kiri, olw'okubeera obulungi bwo, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms25:8 Omukama mulungi era muluŋŋamu, olw'okubeera ekyo aboonoonyi alibayigiriza ekkubo." 
Psalms25:9 Abeetoowaze abalambika mu butuufu, n'ayigiriza abeetoowaze amakubo ge." 
Psalms25:10 Amakubo g'Omukama kisa na bwesigwa eri abo abakuuma endagaano ye n'ebiragiro bye. 
Psalms25:11 Olw'okubeera erinnya lyo, ayi Mukama, ononsonyiwa omusango gwange newandibadde nga munene." 
Psalms25:12 Omuntu atya Omukama y'aluwa? Alimuyigiriza ekkubo ly'aba alondawo. 
Psalms25:13 Omwoyo gwe gulisulanga mu ddembe, n'ezzade lye lirirya ensi." 
Psalms25:14 Omukama wa mukwano eri abo abamutya; abamanyisa n'endagaano ye. 
Psalms25:15 Amaaso gange bulijjo gali ku Mukama, kubanga ye yekka aliggya ebigere byange mu mutego." 
Psalms25:16 Kyukira gye ndi era nsaasira, anti ndi bw'omu ate munaku." 
Psalms25:17 Teewuluzaako ku nnaku y'omutima gwange, nzigya mu binnyiga." 
Psalms25:18 Laba okubonaabona kwange n'ennaku yange, nsonyiwa ebibi byange byonna." 
Psalms25:19 Laba abalabe bange bwe bali abangi! Laba bwe bankyaye n'obukambwe! 
Psalms25:20 Kuuma obulamu bwange, era mponya; tondeka kuswazibwa, kubanga nzirukidde gy'oli." 
Psalms25:21 Nze obutabaako musango n'okuyisa obulungi bintaase, kubanga nsuubira mu ggwe." 
Psalms25:22 Ayi Katonda, nunula Yisirayeli mu bibanyiga byonna." 
Psalms26:1 Ya Dawudi. Nejjeereza, ayi Mukama, kubanga natambulira mu bulungi, neesiga Omukama awatali kusagaasagana." 
Psalms26:2 Neekebejja, ayi Mukama, n'okungeza ngeza; kebera omutima gwange n'omwoyo gwange." 
Psalms26:3 Anti ekisa kyo kindi awo mu maaso bulijjo, era ntambulira bulijjo mu mazima go." 
Psalms26:4 Situula na bantu balimbalimba; siyita na bakuusa. 
Psalms26:5 Nkyawa enkuŋŋaana z'abakola obubi, ababi situula nabo." 
Psalms26:6 Nnaaba engalo zange nga siriiko musango, ne neetooloola omwaliiro gwo, ayi Mukama;" 
Psalms26:7 Nnyimbira waggulu ettendo lyo, ne nnyumya ebyewuunyisa byo byonna." 
Psalms26:8 Ayi Mukama, njagala ennyumba yo mw'osula; ekifo ekitiibwa kyo mwe kisula." 
Psalms26:9 Tombalira mu boonoonyi, wadde obulamu bwange mu bw'abo abayiwa omusaayi," 
Psalms26:10 mu mikono gyabwe omuli ebyambyone, n'emikono gyabwe egya ddyo egijjudde enguzi." 
Psalms26:11 Naye nze ntambulidde mu bulungi, nnunula era onsaasire." 
Psalms26:12 Ekigere kyange kiyimiridde mu kkubo esseeteevu; mu lukuŋŋaana olunene, ndigulumiza Omukama." 
Psalms27:1 Ya Dawudi. Omukama kye kitangaala kyange n'obulokofu bwange, ani gwe nnaatya? Omukama kye kigo ky'obulamu bwange, ani anankanga?" 
Psalms27:2 Ababi bwe bannumba, okunzita, abalabe bange n'abampalana, basinzittuka ne bagwa." 
Psalms27:3 Eggye ne bwe lisiisira okunzingiza, omutima gwange tegutya; olutalo ne bwe lulibalukawo okunnwanyisa, era ne ku olwo ndiba mugumu." 
Psalms27:4 Kimu kyokka kye nsaba ew'Omukama, nnoonya kino: nsule mu nnyumba y'Omukama ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwange, neerolerenga obulungi bw'Omukama, neebuuzenga mu Kiggwa kye." 
Psalms27:5 Kubanga alinkweka mu weema ye ku lunaku olw'akabi; alinkisa mu bwewogomo bw'ensiisira ye, alimpanika waggulu ku lwazi." 
Psalms27:6 Na kati omutwe gwange ngusooloobya ku balabe bange abanneetoolodde. Ku weema ye nzija kutambiririrayo ebitambiro mu mizira egy'essanyu; Nzija kuyimba, nkooloobeze Omukama ettendo." 
Psalms27:7 Wuliriza, ayi Mukama, eddoboozi lyange bwe nkulaajanira; nsaasira, era onziremu!" 
Psalms27:8 Omutima gwange gwagamba ku ggwe nti: “Munoonye amaaso ge.” Amaaso go, ayi Mukama, ge nnoonya." 
Psalms27:9 Tonkweka maaso go; omuweereza wo tomugobaganya mu busungu bwo. Ggwe buyambi bwange, tonsuula; tonsindiikiriza eri, ayi Katonda, Mulokozi wange." 
Psalms27:10 Kitange ne mmange ne bwe banjabulira, ye Omukama anneetwalira." 
Psalms27:11 Njigiriza ekkubo lyo, ayi Mukama; nkulembera mu kakubo akagolokofu, olw'okubeera abannyigiriza." 
Psalms27:12 Tompaayo ng'abambonyaabonya bwe beegomba, kubanga abajulirwa ab'obulimba bansitukiddemu, bassa mukka gwa bukambwe." 
Psalms27:13 Nkyakkiriza nga ndiraba ebirungi by'Omukama, mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Psalms27:14 Lindirira Omukama, nywera, guma omutima; lindirira Omukama." 
Psalms28:1 Ya Dawudi. Ayi Mukama, nkoowoola gy'oli; Olwazi lwange, tonzibira kutu kwo, kubanga bw'ononsiriikirira, nzija kufaanana ng'abaserengeta mu bunnya." 
Psalms28:2 Wulira eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange nga nkulaajanira, nga nsitulira emikono eri Awatukuvu, mu Kitukuvu kyo." 
Psalms28:3 Tompalaawalira kumu n'ababi, awamu n'abo abakola obubi, aboogeza eddembe ne bannaabwe, sso nga baterese bukyayi mu mutima gwabwe." 
Psalms28:4 Baweere ng'ebikolwa byabwe bwe biri, ng'ogerera ku bikolwa byabwe ebibi. Basasule ng'emikono gyabwe bwe gyakola; baddize nga bwe baakola." 
Psalms28:5 Kubanga tebaafa ku Mukama byakola, na ku mulimu gw'emikono gye, alibamenyawo, talibazimba buggya." 
Psalms28:6 Omukama agulumizibwe, kubanga awulidde eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange;" 
Psalms28:7 Omukama ge maanyi gange, engabo yange; omutima gwange gwamwesiga, ne nnyambibwa; Omutima gwange gujaguza; Nzija kumwebaza n'oluyimba lwange." 
Psalms28:8 Omukama ge maanyi g'abantu be; kye kigo ky'obulokofu bw'omusiige we. 
Psalms28:9 Lokola abantu bo, wa omukisa obusika bwo; balunde, era obawanirire emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms29:1 Zabbuli ya Dawudi. Muwe Omukama, ayi abaana ba Katonda, muwe Omukama ekitiibwa n'obuyinza." 
Psalms29:2 Muwe Omukama ekitiibwa ky'erinnya lye; musinze Omukama mu kutangalijja kw'obutukuvu bwe. 
Psalms29:3 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama liri ku mazzi; Katonda ow'ekitiibwa abwatuka, Omukama ku mazzi amangi." 
Psalms29:4 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama lya maanyi, eddoboozi ly'Omukama lya kitiibwa" 
Psalms29:5 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama lyasaayasa entolookyo; Omukama ayasaayasa entolookyo za Lebanoni. 
Psalms29:6 Abuusabuusa Lebanoni ng'akayana, ne Siriyoni ng'omwana gw'embogo." 
Psalms29:7 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama liwandula ennimi z'omuliro. 
Psalms29:8 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama likankanya eddungu; Omukama akankanya eddungu ly'e Kadesi. 
Psalms29:9 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama lizingazinga emivule; liwaatuza amabira. Mu Kiggwa kye bonna basaakaanya nti: “Ekitiibwa!” 
Psalms29:10 Omukama awaŋŋamye ku mujjuzi; Omukama awaŋŋamye nga kabaka emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms29:11 Omukama awa abantu be amaanyi; Omukama awa omukisa abantu be mu ddembe. 
Psalms30:1 Zabbuli. Oluyimba ku lunaku olukulu olw'okutukuza Ekiggwa. Ya Dawudi. 
Psalms30:2 Ndikugulumiza, ayi Mukama, kubanga wanzibulula, tewaleka balabe bange kunneeyagalirako." 
Psalms30:3 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, nakuwanjagira, naawe n'omponya." 
Psalms30:4 Ayi Mukama, wanzigya emagombe; wamponya okukkirira mu bunnya." 
Psalms30:5 Muyimbire Omukama amatendo, mmwe abatuukirivu be; mugulumize erinnya lye." 
Psalms30:6 Kubanga obusungu bwe bumala akabanga katono, naye okwagala kwe kwa bulamu bwonna. Bwe buziba, ebiwoobe biyinza okusigala ekiro kyonna, naye essanyu lidda ku maliiri." 
Psalms30:7 Bwe nali emirembe, nagamba nti: “Tewali kirinnyeenya emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms30:8 Ayi Mukama, mu kusiima kwo, wannyweza ng'olusozi olw'amaanyi, naye bwe wakisa amaaso go, ne ntekemuka." 
Psalms30:9 Nakoowoola gy'oli, ayi Mukama; nalaajanira Omukama:" 
Psalms30:10 “Magoba ki agaliva mu kuzikirira kwange, mu kukkirira mu bunnya? Kazzi nfuufu y'erikutenda, y'erirangirira obwesigwa bwo?" 
Psalms30:11 Wulira, ayi Mukama, nsaasira; Mukama beera muyambi wange.”" 
Psalms30:12 Okukungubaga kwange wakufuula amazina; wansumulula ekikutiya kyange n'onnyambaza essanyu," 
Psalms30:13 omutima gwange gulyoke gukuyimbire amatendo obutasirika. Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, ndikutenda emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms31:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms31:2 Ayi Mukama, nzirukidde gy'oli; tondekanga kuswala mirembe gyonna; mu butuukirivu bwo ndokola." 
Psalms31:3 Wunzikira gye ndi okutu kwo; yanguwa onnyambe; mbeerera lwazi lwa buddukiro, ekigo ekinywevu okumponya." 
Psalms31:4 Kubanga ggwe lwazi lwange, ekigo kyange; olw'okubeera erinnya lyo, nkulembera onnambike." 
Psalms31:5 Mponya ekitimba kye banteze, kubanga ggwe buddukiro bwange." 
Psalms31:6 Mu mikono gyo mwe ntadde omwoyo gwange; Nnunula, ayi Mukama, Katonda omwesigwa." 
Psalms31:7 Nkyawa abo abasinza ebitaliimu omutava kantu; nze neesiga Mukama. 
Psalms31:8 Ndijaganya ne nsanyukira mu kisa kyo, kubanga walaba obunaku bwange, wamanya okunyolwa kw'omwoyo gwange." 
Psalms31:9 Tewampaayo mu mikono gya mulabe, wabula ebigere byange wabiyimiriza mu kyererezi." 
Psalms31:10 Nsaasira, ayi Mukama, kubanga ndi mu buyinike; amaaso gakutte ekifu olw'ennaku, omwoyo gwange n'olubuto lwange." 
Psalms31:11 Obulamu bwange buggwereredde olw'ennaku, n'emyaka gyange olw'okusinda. Amaanyi gange gakendedde olw'obunaku, n'amagumba gange ganafuye." 
Psalms31:12 Nfuukidde ddala ekyokwejoogera eri abalabe bange, ekyeneena eri baliraanwa bange, entiisa eri mikwano gyange; abandaba mu mbuga banziruka." 
Psalms31:13 Nabaggwa ku mutima, ne banneerabira ng'eyafa; nfuuse ng'ekibya ekyatifu." 
Psalms31:14 Mpulira bangi boogera obwama: “Ntiisa ku njuyi zonna;” bakuŋŋaana ne banneekobera, bateesa okuggyawo obulamu bwange." 
Psalms31:15 Naye nze neesiga ggwe, ayi Mukama; ŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe Katonda wange.”" 
Psalms31:16 Obudde bwange bwonna buli mu mikono gyo; mponya mu mikono gy'abalabe bange, n'egy'abo abanjigganya." 
Psalms31:17 Amaaso gaakize eri omuweereza wo; mu kisa kyo ndokola. 
Psalms31:18 Ayi Mukama, tondeka kuswala, kubanga nkukoowoodde; bo ababi baswale basirikire emagombe." 
Psalms31:19 Emimwa egy'obulimba gibunire, egyogeza olunkulu, okwekuza n'obunyoomi ku mutuukirivu." 
Psalms31:20 Ekisa kyo nga kingi, ayi Mukama, kye waterekera abakutya, ky'ogirira mu maaso g'abantu abo abaddukira gy'oli." 
Psalms31:21 Obakweka mu bwewogomo bw'amaaso go, okuva awali enkwe z'abantu; obaddusiza mu nsiisira yo, okuva awali ennimi ezikaayana." 
Psalms31:22 Omukama agulumizibwe, kubanga yangirira ekisa ekyewuunyisa, bwe nali mu kibuga okuli ekigo." 
Psalms31:23 Mu kutya kwange ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nsaliddwa ku maaso go.” Naye wawulira eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange nga nkulaajanira. 
Psalms31:24 Mwagale Omukama, mwenna abatuukirivu be. Omukama akuuma abeesigwa, naye abeekuza abasasulira ddala mu bujjuvu." 
Psalms31:25 Munywere, mugume emitima, mwenna abasuubira mu Mukama." 
Psalms32:1 Ya Dawudi. Masukili. Yeesiimye ow'omusango ogusonyiyiddwa, ow'ekibi ekikisiddwa." 
Psalms32:2 Yeesiimye oyo Omukama gw'atavunaana kibi kye, ow'omutima omutali bukuusa." 
Psalms32:3 Bwe nasirikanga amagumba gange nga gaggweerera, olw'okukungubaganga olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms32:4 Anti omukono gwo gwannyigirizanga emisana n'ekiro; amaanyi gange ne gakalira ng'agookeddwa ebbugumu ly'ekyeya. 
Psalms32:5 Ekibi kyange nakikwatulira; ekyonoono kyange saakikisa. Nagamba nti: “Nzija kwatulira Omukama omusango gwange.” Naawe wansoyiwa omusango gw'ekibi kyange. 
Psalms32:6 Buli mutuufu yenna kyaliva yeegayirira gy'oli, mu budde obw'obuyinike; amazzi enkuyanja bwe galifumbukuka, tegalimutuukako." 
Psalms32:7 Ggwe buddukiro bwange, olimponya obuyinike, n'ombugaanya okujaganya olw'okulokolebwa." 
Psalms32:8 Ndikubuulira ne nkuyigiriza ekkubo ly'oba okwata; ndikubuulirira ne nkussaako amaaso gange. 
Psalms32:9 Temubeera nga mbalaasi na nnyumbu, ezitalina magezi; zifugibwa na malobo na nkoba, we bitali tezirikusemberera." 
Psalms32:10 Ebiwoobe by'ababi byo bingi, naye asuubira mu Mukama ekisa kye kimubugiriza." 
Psalms32:11 Musanyukire mu Mukama, era mujaguze mmwe abatuukirivu, mujaganye, mwenna ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu." 
Psalms33:1 Muyimbire Omukama n'essanyu, mmwe abatuufu; kisaanye abatuukirivu okumutendereza." 
Psalms33:2 Mugulumize Omukama n'ennanga, mumuyimbire ku ntongooli ey'enkoba ekkumi." 
Psalms33:3 Mumuyimbire oluyimba oluggya; muyimbe n'obukugu mu mizira egy'essanyu. 
Psalms33:4 Kubanga ekigambo ky'Omukama kituufu, mwesigwa mu mirimu gye gyonna." 
Psalms33:5 Ayagala obutuukirivu n'obutuufu; ensi ejjudde ekisa ky'Omukama. 
Psalms33:6 Eggulu lyakolebwa na kigambo kya Katonda, ne nnamunkukumbo w'eggulu yakolebwa n'omukka gw'akamwa ke." 
Psalms33:7 Akuŋŋaanya amazzi g'ennyanja kyenkana nga mu lutiba; eddubi alissa mu materekero. 
Psalms33:8 Ensi yonna etye Omukama; bonna abali ku nsi bamusseemu ekitiibwa. 
Psalms33:9 Anti yayogera, ne bibaawo; yalagira, ne biyimirirawo." 
Psalms33:10 Omukama asaabulula entegeka z'amawanga, afulula enteesa z'abantu." 
Psalms33:11 Naye entegeka z'Omukama zisigalawo emirembe gyonna, ebirowoozo by'omutima gwe bya mazadde n'amazadde." 
Psalms33:12 Lyesiimye eggwanga eririna Katonda nga ye Mukama; abantu be yeerondera ng'obusika. 
Psalms33:13 Omukama ayima mu ggulu n'atunuulira, n'alaba abaana b'abantu bonna;" 
Psalms33:14 Ayima mu kisulo kye n'atunuulira bonna abasula mu nsi; 
Psalms33:15 oyo eyakola emitima gyabwe kinnoomu, era eyekkaanya buli kye bakola." 
Psalms33:16 Kabaka tawona lwa bunene bwa ggye lye, n'omutabaazi nnamige lwa bungi bw'amaanyi ge." 
Psalms33:17 Embalaasi bwe kubanga kuwonya, temuli kantu; n'amaanyi gaayo amangi gatyo tesobola kununula." 
Psalms33:18 Go amaaso g'Omukama gali ku bamutya; ku abo abeesiga ekisa kye," 
Psalms33:19 awonye obulamu bwabwe okufa, abayise mu njala nga balamu." 
Psalms33:20 Omwoyo gwaffe gulindirira Omukama, ye muyambi waffe, engabo yaffe." 
Psalms33:21 Kubanga mu ye omutima gwaffe mwe gusanyukira; mu linnya lye ettukuvu mwe tusuubirira. 
Psalms33:22 Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo ekitakoma kitubeereko, nga bwe tusuubira mu ggwe." 
Psalms34:1 Ya Dawudi, lwe yeefuula omulalu mu maaso ga Abimeleki, oli n'amugoba n'agenda." 
Psalms34:2 Nnaatenderezanga Omukama obudde bwonna, ettendo lye mu kamwa kange bulijjo." 
Psalms34:3 Omwoyo gwange gwenyumiriza mu Mukama; abeetoowaze bawulire, basanyuke." 
Psalms34:4 Mugulumize wamu nange Omukama, tusukkulumize wamu erinnya lye." 
Psalms34:5 Nanoonya Omukama, n'anziramu; n'amponya byonna bye nali ntya." 
Psalms34:6 Mumutunuulire mutangalijje, olwo amaaso gammwe tegagenda kuswala." 
Psalms34:7 Omunaku yalaajana, Omukama n'awulira, n'amulokola mu buyinike bwe bwonna." 
Psalms34:8 Malayika w'Omukama yakuba ensiisira ye okwetooloola abamutya n'abawonya. 
Psalms34:9 Mulegeeko mulabe Omukama bw'ali omulungi, omuntu amwesiga yeesiimye." 
Psalms34:10 Mutye Omukama, mmwe abatuukirivu be; abamutya, tebajula kantu." 
Psalms34:11 Empologoma zandibulwa akantu n'enjala n'eziruma, naye abanoonya Omukama tebalibulwa kirungi." 
Psalms34:12 Abaana, mujje mumpulire, nzija kubayigiriza okutya Omukama." 
Psalms34:13 Muntu ani ayagala obulamu, eyeegomba okuwangaala, yeeyagalire mu birungi?" 
Psalms34:14 Olulimi lwo lutangire obwonoonefu; n'emimwa gyo ebigambo eby'obulimba; 
Psalms34:15 Weewale okuyisa obubi, kola obulungi, noonya eddembe era oligoberere." 
Psalms34:16 Amaaso g'Omukama gatunuulira abatuukirivu, n'amatu ge gawuliriza okuwanjaga kwabwe." 
Psalms34:17 Amaaso g'Omukama agavulumulira ababi, okuggya ku nsi ekyo kwe bandijjuukiriddwa." 
Psalms34:18 Abatuufu bwe bawanjaga, Omukama abawulira; n'abawonya mu buyinike bwabwe bwonna." 
Psalms34:19 Abamenyese mu mutima Omukama ababeera kumpi; alokola ab'omwoyo ogubetentese. 
Psalms34:20 Omutuukirivu yandiba na bingi ebimuluma, naye Omukama byonna abimuwonya." 
Psalms34:21 Akuuma amagumba ge gonna, tekulimenyekako na limu." 
Psalms34:22 Obwonoonefu bulizikiriza omwonoonyi, n'abakyawa omutuufu balisalirwa omusango." 
Psalms34:23 Omukama anunula obulamu bw'abaweereza be; tewali addukira gy'ali alisalirwa musango. 
Psalms35:1 Ya Dawudi. Ayi Mukama, vunaana abanvunaana, lwanyisa abannwanyisa." 
Psalms35:2 Kwata empaala n'engabo entono, situka onziruukirire." 
Psalms35:3 Weza ekitala n'akajogolo, olwanyise abanjigganya. Gamba omwoyo gwange nti: “Nze bulokofu bwo.”" 
Psalms35:4 Baswale, ensonyi zibakwate, abo abanoonya obulamu bwange; bazzibweyo ennyuma nga baswavu, abo abategeka okunzikiriza." 
Psalms35:5 Babe ng'ebisusunku mu mpewo, nga malayika w'Omukama abasindiikiriza." 
Psalms35:6 Ekkubo lyabwe lijjule enzikiza n'obuseerezi nga malayika w'Omukama abagoba. 
Psalms35:7 Kubanga bankweka ekitimba kyabwe awatali nsonga, obulamu bwange baabusimira obuya awatali nsonga." 
Psalms35:8 Akabenje kabagwikirize; ekitimba kye bankwese kibakwate; bagwe mu buya bwabwe bazikirire. 
Psalms35:9 Olwo ndijaguliza mu Mukama, ndisanyuka olw'okundokola." 
Psalms35:10 Amagumba gange gonna galigamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, ani akufaanana?” Ggwe awonya omunaku mu mikono gy'abamusinga amaanyi, omunaku n'omwavu mu mikono gy'ababanyaga." 
Psalms35:11 Abajulirwa ab'ettima baasituka, bambuuzanga ku bye nali simanyiiko kantu." 
Psalms35:12 Ekirungi baakinsasulamu na kibi; bandeka ttayo. 
Psalms35:13 Sso bwe baali balwadde, nayambala ekikutiya, ne neebonereza nga nsiiba. Neegayiriranga nga nkotese omutwe ku lubuto lwange." 
Psalms35:14 Nagendanga nkaaba, kyenkana ng'alirira ow'omukwano oba ow'oluganda; nakotekanga omutwe olw'ennaku, kyenkana ng'alirira nnyabo." 
Psalms35:15 Naye bwe nasirittuka, baasanyuka busanyusi, bankuŋŋaanirako ne bankuba nga sikirindiridde, ne bampaayiriza awatali kusalako." 
Psalms35:16 Bansekereranga mu ngeri embi, ne bannumira obugigi." 
Psalms35:17 Ayi Mukama, onootuusa wa okutunula obutunuzi? Ntaasa obukambwe bwabwe, n'obulamu bwange buno bwokka buwonye empologoma." 
Psalms35:18 Ndikugulumiza mu lukuŋŋaana olukulu, ndikutenda mu kafukunya k'abantu." 
Psalms35:19 Abalabe bange baleme kunneeyagalirako awatali nsonga; abankyayira obwereere baleme kutta ku liiso. 
Psalms35:20 Anti teboogeza ddembe, wabula bafumbirira eby'okuvunaana abo abatebenkedde mu nsi." 
Psalms35:21 Banjasamiza akamwa kaabwe; bagamba nti: “K'olabe, k'olabe! Twerabiddeko n'agaffe!”" 
Psalms35:22 Naawe okirabye, ayi Mukama, leka kusirika; ayi Mukama, leka kunneesuuba." 
Psalms35:23 Weegugumule, situka ompolereze olw'ensonga zange, Katonda wange, Mukama wange." 
Psalms35:24 Nnamula ng'ogerera ku butuukirivu bwo, ayi Mukama Katonda wange, era tobaleka kunneeyagalirako." 
Psalms35:25 Tobaleka kugamba mu mitima gyabwe nti: “Otyo! Ky'ekyo kye twegombanga,” oba okugamba nti: “Tumukavvudde.”" 
Psalms35:26 Baswale, bakwatibwe ensonyi bonna, abo abasanyukira ennaku zange; ensonyi zibabune, banyoomebwe abo abanneewulirirako." 
Psalms35:27 Abasanyukira mu kwejjeerera kwange baleekaane olw'essanyu, bajaganye; bulijjo bagambe nti: “Omukama atenderezebwe, eyeeyagalira mu ssanyu ly'omuweereza we.”" 
Psalms35:28 Olulimi lwange lulirangirira obutuukirivu bwo; n'ettendo lyo olunaku lwonna. 
Psalms36:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya Dawudi, omuweereza w'Omukama." 
Psalms36:2 Ekibi kifukuutirira omubi mu mutima gwe; talinaamu kutya Katonda mu maaso ge. 
Psalms36:3 Kubanga yeerimba yennyini, n'atasobola kumanya kibi kye na kukikyawa." 
Psalms36:4 Ebigambo by'akamwa ke kuseemyaseemya na bulimba; akomye okuba omugezi n'okukola ekirungi. 
Psalms36:5 Ng'ali ku kitanda kye alowoolereza bubi; yessa mu kkubo ebbi, tazira kibi." 
Psalms36:6 Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo kituuka ku ggulu; obwesigwa bwo bukwata ku bire." 
Psalms36:7 Obutuukirivu bwo buli ng'ensozi za Katonda; amateeka go ng'eddubi ery'amaanyi; Ayi Mukama, okuuma abantu n'ebisolo." 
Psalms36:8 Ayi Katonda, ekisa kyo nga kya muwendo! Abaana b'abantu baddukira mu kittuluze ky'ebiwaawatiro byo." 
Psalms36:9 Beeriira ku mwero gw'omu nnyumba yo; obanywesa ku ngezi y'amasanyu go. 
Psalms36:10 Anti ewuwo y'eri ensulo y'obulamu; mu kitangaala kyo mwe tulabira ekitangaala. 
Psalms36:11 Yongera okugirira ekisa kyo abakumanyi, n'obutuukirivu bwo eri ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu." 
Psalms36:12 Ekigere ky'abeekuza kireme kunninnyako, n'omukono gw'omubi guleme kungobawo." 
Psalms36:13 Laba abakola obubi bwe bagudde, bameggeddwa, tebakyayinza na kusituka." 
Psalms37:1 Ya Dawudi. Leka kusuukiira olw'okubeera aboonoonyi; tokwatirwa buggya abakola obubi," 
Psalms37:2 kubanga bakala mangu ng'omuddo, baggwaawo mangu ng'ebikoola by'ebimera." 
Psalms37:3 Suubira mu Mukama, era yisa bulungi, olwo oliraala mu nsi n'oliira mu malundiro ag'eddembe." 
Psalms37:4 Sanyukira mu Mukama, alikuwa omutima gwo bye gwegomba." 
Psalms37:5 Omukama mukwase ekkubo lyo, mwesige, alikola." 
Psalms37:6 Obutuukirivu bwo alibwakaayakanya nga mmambya, n'obuluŋŋamu bwo ng'enjuba y'omu ttuntu." 
Psalms37:7 Sirikira mu Mukama, era suubira mu ye; tosuukiira olw'oyo amakubo ge gwe galamidde, omuntu oyo ayiiya okukola obubi." 
Psalms37:8 Lekera awo obusungu n'obuswandi busse eri; tosuukiira, kino kitwaliriza mu bugwenyufu." 
Psalms37:9 Anti abakola obubi balizikirizibwa, naye abasuubira mu Mukama balirya ensi." 
Psalms37:10 Kabanga katono ng'omubi takyaliwo olimumagamaga mu kifo kye, talibaawo." 
Psalms37:11 Naye abateefu balirya ensi; balisanyusibwa ensera y'eddembe. 
Psalms37:12 Omubi yeekobera omutuukirivu; n'amulumira obujiji. 
Psalms37:13 Omukama amusekerera, kubanga amanyi nti olunaku lwe lujja." 
Psalms37:14 Ababi basowola ekitala, ne baleega omutego gwabwe ogw'akasaale, batandaggire omwavu n'omunaku, batirimbule abatambulira mu kkubo edduŋŋamu." 
Psalms37:15 Naye ekitala kirisoya emitima gyabwe gyennyini, n'omusaale gwabwe gulimenyeka." 
Psalms37:16 Akatono omutuukirivu k'alina kakira obugagga entuumu obw'ababi. 
Psalms37:17 Anti emikono gy'ababi girimenyebwa, naye Omukama awanirira abatuukirivu." 
Psalms37:18 Omukama amanyi ebbanga abataliiko musango lye bamala; obusika bwabwe bulibeerawo emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms37:19 Mu budde obw'akacwano tebaliswala; ne mu nnaku ez'enjala balikkutanga. 
Psalms37:20 Naye ababi balizikirira; abalabe b'Omukama balibulawo ng'obulungi bw'ennimiro, balibulawo ng'omukka." 
Psalms37:21 Omubi yeewola, naye tasasula, naye omutuukirivu wa kisa, agaba;" 
Psalms37:22 abo b'aliba awadde omukisa, balirya ensi; naye b'aliba avumiridde, balizikirira." 
Psalms37:23 Omukama asanyukira amakubo g'omuntu gwe yanyweza ebigere bye; 
Psalms37:24 Ne bw'asirittuka, taligwa, kubanga Omukama awanirira omukono gwe." 
Psalms37:25 Nali muvubuka, kati nkaddiye, naye sirabanga mutuukirivu ng'ayabuliddwa, yadde ezzadde lye nga lisabiriza omugaati." 
Psalms37:26 Bulijjo wa kisa era awolerawo, era ezzadde lye lirifuna omukisa." 
Psalms37:27 Weewale ekibi, kola ekirungi, olwo olibeerawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms37:28 Kubanga Omukama ayagala obutuukirivu, talekerera batuukirivu be. Balitaasibwa emirembe gyonna, Abatali batuukirivu balizikirira emirembe gyonna naye ezzadde ly'ababi lirikutulwako." 
Psalms37:29 Abatuukirivu balirya ensi ne bagibeerako emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms37:30 Akamwa k'omutuukirivu koogera bya magezi, n'olulimi lwe lwogera kituufu." 
Psalms37:31 Etteeka lya Katonda mweriri mu mutima gwe; ebigere bye tebiseerera. 
Psalms37:32 Omubi yeekwekerera omutuukirivu, ng'anoonya okumutta." 
Psalms37:33 Naye Omukama talimuleka mu mikono gye, oba okusingibwa omusango ng'alamulibwa." 
Psalms37:34 Lindirira Omukama, kwata amakubo ge, alikugulumiza n'olya ensi; ababi nga bakutulwako, olikyerabirako." 
Psalms37:35 Nalaba omuntu omubi, omukambwe, ng'aginnyimuka ng'entolookyo ya Lebanoni." 
Psalms37:36 Bwe nayitawo, nga takyaliwo; namumagamaga, naye nga takyazuuka." 
Psalms37:37 Tunuulira ataliiko musango, wekkaanye omutuufu; omuntu ow'emirembe alina obulamu mu maaso." 
Psalms37:38 Naye ababi bonna balizikirizibwa; obulamu bwabwe obw'omu maaso bulikutulwako. 
Psalms37:39 Obulokofu bw'abatuukirivu buva wa Mukama; ekigo kyabwe eky'obuddukiro mu budde obw'obuyinike. 
Psalms37:40 Omukama abayamba n'abawonya; abanunula mu babi n'abawonya, kubanga baddukira gy'ali." 
Psalms38:1 Zabbuli ya Dawudi. Ku kitambiro eky'okujjukira. 
Psalms38:2 Ayi Mukama, leka kunvunaana mu busungu bwo; tommonereza mu kunyiiga kwo." 
Psalms38:3 Anti nsoggeddwa obusaale bwo, n'omukono gwo gunnyigiriza wansi." 
Psalms38:4 Mu mubiri gwange temukyandi kalamu olw'okunyiiga kwo; mu magumba gange temukyandi ddembe olw'ekibi kyange. 
Psalms38:5 Anti emisango gyange gimpitiriddeko; giri ng'omugugu oguyitiridde obuzito. 
Psalms38:6 Ebiwundu byange biwunya, bisajjuse olw'obusiru n'obwonoonefu bwange." 
Psalms38:7 Nkutaamiridde, neegose nzenna; olunaku lwonna ntambula ndaagana." 
Psalms38:8 Endira yonna ejjudde okubabuukirira; mu mubiri gwange temukyandi kalamu n'akatono. 
Psalms38:9 Nnyongobedde, mbetenteddwa nnyo, mpoloma olw'okunyolwa kw'omutima gwange." 
Psalms38:10 Ayi Mukama, bye neegomba byonna biri mu maaso go; okusinda kwange tekukukwekeddwa." 
Psalms38:11 Omutima gumpakuka, n'amaanyi gampweddemu; ekitangaala kizaamye mu maaso gange." 
Psalms38:12 Mikwano gyange ne bannange banneewala olw'ebiwundu byange; baliraanwa bange bayimiridde wala. 
Psalms38:13 Awo abanoonya obulamu bwange batega emitego gyabwe, abanoonya okunkola obubi boogera ku kuzikirira kwange; obudde bwonna bali mu kusala nkwe." 
Psalms38:14 Nfuuse nga kiggala atawulira, nga kasiru atayasamya kamwa." 
Psalms38:15 Nfuuse ng'omuntu atawulira, ow'akamwa akatakyayanukula." 
Psalms38:16 Anti, ayi Mukama, ggwe nnindirira, ononnyanukula, ayi Mukama, Katonda wange." 
Psalms38:17 Anti ŋŋamba nti: “Baleme kunneekulisizaako; ng'ebigere byange biseeredde, baleme kunneewaanirako.”" 
Psalms38:18 Anti nze ndi kumpi n'okugwa n'obulumi bwange ndi nabwo bulijjo. 
Psalms38:19 Nzija kwatula omusango gwange, ekibi kyange kinneeraliikiriza." 
Psalms38:20 Abalabe bange awatali nsonga ba maanyi ate banywevu, abankyayira obwereere bangi." 
Psalms38:21 Ekirungi bakinsasulamu na kibi, bampaayiriza kubanga ngoberera ekirungi." 
Psalms38:22 Ayi Mukama, tonjabulira; ayi Katonda wange, tonneesuuba." 
Psalms38:23 Yanguwa okunnyamba, ayi Mukama, Omulokozi wange." 
Psalms39:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya Yedutuni. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms39:2 Nagamba nti: “Nzija kukuuma amakubo gange olulimi lwange ndutangire ekibi; akamwa kange nzija kukassaako ekkufulu ebbanga lyonna omubi ng'ali awo mu maaso gange.” 
Psalms39:3 Nabunirira ddala ne nsirika, saayogera, naye saaganyulwa kantu, wabula ennaku yange yeeyongera kubijja." 
Psalms39:4 Omutima gwange ne gunjakirira munda, bwe nalowoozanga, omuliro ne gutumbuka, ne ndeka olulimi lwange ne lwogera nti:" 
Psalms39:5 “Ayi Mukama, mmanyisa enkomerero yange, n'ekipimo ky'ennaku zange, ntegeere nga bwendi omuyabayaba.”" 
Psalms39:6 Wuuno ennaku zange wazigerera ku luta, ebbanga ly'obulamu bwange temuli kantu mu maaso go, mazima buli muntu mukka bukka." 
Psalms39:7 Omuntu ayita ng'ekisiikirize, atawaana mu bingi naye nga mpaamu kantu; atuuma obugagga naye nga tamanyi alibufuna." 
Psalms39:8 Kale kati kiki kye nninda, ayi Mukama? Essuubi lyange liri mu ggwe." 
Psalms39:9 Mponya emisango gyange gyonna; tondeka kujolongebwa musiru. 
Psalms39:10 Nasirika, saayasamya kamwa kange, kubanga kino ggwe wakikola." 
Psalms39:11 Nzigyako ekibonerezo kyo; obukambwe bw'omukono gwo bummaze amaanyi. 
Psalms39:12 Omuntu omukomako olw'ensobi ze n'omubonereza, obugagga bwe obumalawo ng'ennyenje. Mazima buli muntu mukka bukka." 
Psalms39:13 Ayi Mukama, wulira essaala yange; wuliriza okuwanjaga kwange, n'amaziga gange togazibira matu; anti ewuwo ndiyo ng'omugwira, omusenze nga bajjajjange bonna bwe baali." 
Psalms39:14 Nzigyako amaaso ndyoke nsanyukeko nga sinnagenda, nga sikyaliwo." 
Psalms40:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa Dawudi. Zabbuli. 
Psalms40:2 Nalinda ne nnindirira Omukama; yakyukira gye ndi n'awulira okuwanjaga kwange. 
Psalms40:3 Yansikayo mu bunnya obw'ebitoomi, mu ttosi n'akateebe; yateeka ebigere byange ku lwazi, n'agumya entambula yange." 
Psalms40:4 Yassa oluyimba oluggya mu kamwa kange, ettendo ku Katonda waffe. Bangi baliraba ne batya ne bassa obwesige mu Mukama." 
Psalms40:5 Omuntu oyo yeesiimye ayeesiga Omukama, n'atakyukira eri beekuza, abawunjukira eri obulimba." 
Psalms40:6 Bingi, ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, ebyewuunyisa bye wakola; by'otutegekera nga bya kitalo; tewali akufaanana! Singa njagala kubyogera na kubinyumyako, byandibadde bingi okubittottola." 
Psalms40:7 Ebitambiro n'ebitone tewabyagala; kyokka amatu gange wagaggula; ekitambiro ekyokye n'ekitambiro olw'ekibi tewabisaba. 
Psalms40:8 Nze kwe kugamba nti: “Nzuuno, nzize; mu muzingo gw'ekitabo kyampandiikibwako;" 
Psalms40:9 neegomba okukola ky'oyagala, ayi Katonda wange; etteeka lyo liri munda mu mutima gwange.”" 
Psalms40:10 Nalangirira obutuukirivu bwo mu lukuŋŋaana olukulu; emimwa gyange sigitangira, ayi Mukama, nga bw'okimanyi." 
Psalms40:11 Obutuukirivu bwo sibukisa mu mutima gwange; njogera ku bwesigwa bwo n'okulokola kwo. Olukuŋŋaana olunene sirukweka kisa kyo na mazima go. 
Psalms40:12 Tonnyima kisa kyo, ayi Mukama; ekisa kyo n'amazima go binkuumenga bulijjo." 
Psalms40:13 Kubanga obubenje obutabalika bunneebunguludde; ebyonoono byange binsinzizza amaanyi, sikyalaba; bingi n'okusinga enviiri z'oku mutwe gwange, n'omutima gumpweddemu." 
Psalms40:14 Ayi Mukama, nsanyukira ondokole; ayi Mukama, yanguwa okunnyamba." 
Psalms40:15 Baswale, ensonyi zibakwate, bonna abanoonya okusaanyaawo obulamu bwange; bazzibweyo ennyuma nga baswavu, abo abeegomba okuzikirira kwange." 
Psalms40:16 Bawuniikirire olw'okuswaluka, abo abagamba nti: “K'olabe, k'olabe!”" 
Psalms40:17 Naye bajaguze, bakusanyukiremu abo bonna abakunoonya; bagambe bulijjo nti: “Omukama agulumizibwe,” bonna abo abeegomba obulokofu bwo." 
Psalms40:18 Naye nze ndi mwavu, munaku, kyokka Omukama anzisaako omwoyo. Ggwe buyambi bwange era omulokozi wange; ayi Katonda, leka kulwa." 
Psalms41:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms41:2 Yeesiimye ategeera omunaku, Omukama alimuwonya ku lunaku olw'akabi." 
Psalms41:3 Omukama alimukuuma n'amutaliza nga mulamu, alimwesiimya ku nsi; talimuwaayo eri balabe be nga bwe baagala." 
Psalms41:4 Omukama alimuwanirira ng'ali ku ndiri; alimuwonya byonna ebimuluma mu bulwadde bwe. 
Psalms41:5 Nagamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, nsaasira; mponya kubanga nakusobya.”" 
Psalms41:6 Abalabe bange banjogerako bubi nti: “Alifa ddi, n'erinnya lye ne lizikirira?”" 
Psalms41:7 Oli bw'ajja okundaba, ayogera mutali nsa; omutima gwe eno nga bwe gukuŋŋaanya eby'ensumattu; bw'afuluma n'abisaasaanya wonna." 
Psalms41:8 Abankyawa bonna wamu banjogerangako obwama, bandowoozaako ebisinga obubi nti:" 
Psalms41:9 “Ekirwadde ekibi kimukutte; w'agalamidde taasitukewo.” 
Psalms41:10 Ne mukwano gwange yennyini gwe nali neesiga, eyalya ku mugaati gwange, anneefuulidde." 
Psalms41:11 Ggwe nno, ayi Mukama, nsaasira; nnyimusaawo ndyoke mbasasule." 
Psalms41:12 Okwo kwe nnaategeerera ng'onzisaako omwoyo, nti omulabe wange takyankubye lube." 
Psalms41:13 Olw'obulungi bwange ompanirira, n'onzisa mu maaso go emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms41:14 Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, atenderezebwe; emirembe gyonna. Amiina, amiina." 
Psalms42:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Masukili. Ya batabani ba Kora. 
Psalms42:2 Ng'ennangaazi bw'erookeralookera emyala egy'amazzi n'omwoyo gwange bwe gukuyaayaanira, ayi Katonda." 
Psalms42:3 Omwoyo gwange ennyonta ya Katonda eguluma, Katonda omulamu. Nnaagenda ddi ne ndaba amaaso ga Katonda?" 
Psalms42:4 Amaziga gange ngalya bumere emisana n'ekiro, nga banteeteza olunaku lwonna nti: “Katonda wo aluwa?”" 
Psalms42:5 Kino nkijjukira lwe njogera buli kindi ku mutima: Nasimbanga ennyiriri wamu n'ekibiina ne nkulemberamu okugenda mu nnyumba ya Katonda, mu maloboozi ag'okujaguza n'okutenda, ebbiina nga lijaguza, likuza embaga." 
Psalms42:6 Mwoyo gwange, lwaki wennyise? Lwaki opakuka munda yange? Suubira mu Katonda, kubanga naddamu okumugulumiza; obulokofu bwange," 
Psalms42:7 Katonda wange. Omwoyo gwange gunnennyise muli munda; kyenva nkujjukira okuva mu nsi ya Yorudani, n'ensi za Kerumoni, n'okuva ku lusozi Mizari." 
Psalms42:8 Eddubi liyita eddubi mu kuyira kw'ebiyiriro byo; amayengo n'amasingiisira ganjiikira. 
Psalms42:9 Emisana Katonda alangirira ekisa kye, ekiro nnyimba oluyimba lwe, essaala eri Katonda w'obulamu bwange." 
Psalms42:10 Ŋŋamba Katonda olwazi lwange nti: “Lwaki onneerabidde? Lwaki ŋŋenda ndaagana, ng'omulabe annyigiriza?”" 
Psalms42:11 Amagumba gange gameketa okufa, abalabe bange bwe bankijjanya, nga banteeteza olunaku lwonna nti: “Katonda wo aluwa?”" 
Psalms42:12 Mwoyo gwange, lwaki wennyise? Lwaki opakuka munda yange? Suubira mu Katonda, kubanga naddamu okumugulumiza; oyo obulokofu bwange, Katonda wange." 
Psalms43:1 Ayi Katonda, nejjeereza; wolereza ensonga zange eri eggwanga ekkaafiiri. Mponya omuntu ow'enkwe, omubi." 
Psalms43:2 Ggwe Katonda, ekigo kyange. Lwaki wansambajja? Lwaki ŋŋenda ndaagana, ng'omulabe annyigiriza?" 
Psalms43:3 Sindika ekitangaala kyo n'amazima go, bino ka binnambike; ka bintuuse mu lusozi lwo olutukuvu ne mu kisulo kyo." 
Psalms43:4 Olwo ntuuke ku mwaliiro gwa Katonda; eri Katonda, essanyu lyange n'okujaganya kwange. Ndikutenda ku nnanga, ayi Katonda, Katonda wange." 
Psalms43:5 Mwoyo gwange, lwaki wennyise? Lwaki opakuka munda yange? Suubira mu Katonda, kubanga naddamu okumugulumiza; oyo obulokofu bwange, Katonda wange." 
Psalms44:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa batabani ba Kora. Masukili. 
Psalms44:2 Ayi Katonda, twawulira n'amatu gaffe; bajjajja baatunyumiza bye wakola mu budde bwabwe, mu nnaku ez'edda." 
Psalms44:3 N'omukono gwo wagobawo abaamawanga, bo n'obasimbawo; wabetenta amawanga, bo n'obawa okwegaziya." 
Psalms44:4 Ensi tebaagirya na kitala kyabwe, n'omukono gwabwe si gwe gwabawanguza; wabula yali ddyo wo, omukono gwo, n'ekitangaala ky'amaaso go, kubanga wabasanyukira." 
Psalms44:5 Ggwe Kabaka wange, Katonda wange, ggwe otegekera Yakobo obuwanguzi." 
Psalms44:6 Olw'okubeera ggwe twazzaayo abalabe baffe ennyuma, era mu linnya lyo twasambirira abaali batusitukiddemu." 
Psalms44:7 Sisuubirira mu mutego gwange ogw'akasaale, ekitala kyange tekindeetera buwanguzi." 
Psalms44:8 Wabula ggwe otuwa okuwangula abalabe baffe, n'oswaza abo abatukyawa." 
Psalms44:9 Mu Katonda mwe twetendera olunaku lwonna; n'erinnya lyo tulirigulumizanga emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms44:10 Naye kati watwemansula n'otuswaza; tokyagenda na magye gaffe kutabaala. 
Psalms44:11 Watukubya akaddannyuma mu maaso g'abalabe baffe, n'abatukyawa ne batunyaga." 
Psalms44:12 Watuwaayo ne tuliibwa ng'endiga, n'otusaasaanya mu mawanga." 
Psalms44:13 Abantu bo baabatunda awatali ggoba; bwe wabatunda, tewabaako ky'ofunamu." 
Psalms44:14 Otufudde eky'okuyeeya eri baliraanwa baffe; eky'okujooga n'okunyooma eri abatwetoolodde. 
Psalms44:15 Otufudde mboozi mu b'amawanga; abantu batunyeenyeza mitwe. 
Psalms44:16 Ensonyi zange zindi awo mu maaso bulijjo, amaaso gange gabikkiddwa obuswavu;" 
Psalms44:17 olw'eddoboozi ly'abanjeeya n'abanvuma; olw'okutunuuliranga omulabe n'awoolera eggwanga. 
Psalms44:18 Bino byonna byatugwira sso twali tetukwerabidde, yadde okuba abalimba eri endagaano yo." 
Psalms44:19 N'omutima gwaffe gwali siguddanga nnyuma, n'ebigere byaffe tebivanga mu bukubo bwo." 
Psalms44:20 Naye watubetentera mu nfo y'ebibe, n'otubikka n'enzikiza ekutte." 
Psalms44:21 Obanga twali twerabidde erinnya lya Katonda waffe, oba ne tusitulira emikono gyaffe eri balubaale ab'ebweru," 
Psalms44:22 ebyo Katonda teyandibizudde, nga bw'amanyi ebyama by'omutima?" 
Psalms44:23 Naye olw'okubeera ggwe tuli mu kuttibwa ebbanga lyonna; tuyisibwa ng'endiga ez'okutta. 
Psalms44:24 Zuukuka, ayi Mukama! Lwaki weebaka? Weegugumule; leka kutwemansula butaddirira." 
Psalms44:25 Lwaki okweka amaaso go, ne weerabira ennaku zaffe n'okunyigirizibwa?" 
Psalms44:26 Omwoyo gwaffe gutoowaziddwa mu nfuufu; emibiri gyaffe gikwatidde ku ttaka. 
Psalms44:27 Situka, otuyambe; tununule ku lw'ekisa kyo." 
Psalms45:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Amalanga'. Lwa batabani ba Kora. Masukili. Luyimba lwa mukwano. 
Psalms45:2 Omutima gwange gubooze ekirowoozo ekirungi nga ntontomera kabaka ekitontome kyange; olulimi lwange kkalaamu ya muwandiisi omukugu. 
Psalms45:3 Ggwe osinga obubalagavu mu baana b'abantu; ekisa kyasiigibwa ku mimwa gyo, kubanga Katonda yakuwa omukisa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms45:4 Ayi omuzira, siba ekitala kyo ku lukugunyu; yambala ekitiibwa kyo n'obukulu bwo." 
Psalms45:5 Mu kitiibwa kyo eky'obuwanguzi weebagale, ku lw'amazima, obukkakkamu n'obutuukirivu; leka omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gulage eby'entiisa." 
Psalms45:6 Obusaale bwo obwogi busoye mu mitima gy'abalabe ba kabaka; amawanga geeyale wansi w'ebigere byo. 
Psalms45:7 Nnamulondo yo, ayi Katonda, ya mirembe na mirembe; ddamula w'obwakabaka bwo ddamula wa butuukirivu." 
Psalms45:8 Oyagala obutuukirivu n'okyawa obubi, Katonda nno, Katonda wo, kyeyava akusiiga omuzigo ogw'essanyu ng'akukiza banno." 
Psalms45:9 Ebyambalo byo byonna biwunya akawoowo ka mirra, ekigaji ne kassiya; ebivuga eby'enkoba okuva mu mbiri ez'amasanga bikusanyusa." 
Psalms45:10 Bawala ba bakabaka be bamu ku bakyala bo ababiitwa, nnaabakyala akuli ku ddyo mu zaabu ow'e Ofiri." 
Psalms45:11 Muwala, wulira, laba era tega okutu kwo: weerabire abantu bo n'ennyumba ya kitaawo." 
Psalms45:12 Kabaka ayanaamiridde olw'obubalagavu bwo; muvunnamire kubanga ye mukama wo. 
Psalms45:13 Muwala wa Tiiro azze n'ebirabo, abagagga mu ggwanga balikuvujjirira." 
Psalms45:14 Muwala wa kabaka wa kitiibwa eyo gyali munda, emivuluya gye mutobekeddwamu zaabu." 
Psalms45:15 Aleetebwa ewa kabaka ng'ayambadde engoye eza langi entobeke; abawala embeerera ze mperekeze, babaleeta gy'oli;" 
Psalms45:16 Baleetebwa n'essanyu n'okujaganya; babayingiza mu lubiri lwa kabaka. 
Psalms45:17 Batabani bo balidda mu kifo kya bajjajjaabo; olibafuula baami mu nsi yonna. 
Psalms45:18 Ndijjukizanga erinnya lyo mu mazadde gonna; Amawanga kyegaliva gakugulumiza emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms46:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa batabani ba Kora. Lugenda nga Alamoti. Luyimba. 
Psalms46:2 Katonda bwe buddukiro bwaffe n'amaanyi gaffe; bulijjo omuyambi atabulawo mu bizibu. 
Psalms46:3 Kyetuva tutatya, ensi ne bw'eyuuguuma n'ensozi ne zigwa mu nnyanja wakati." 
Psalms46:4 Amazzi gaayo ne bwe gayira ne gafuukuuka, n'ensozi ne ziyuuguuma olw'okwevujjuula kwago." 
Psalms46:5 Waliyo omugga n'emyala gyagwo ebisanyusa ekibuga kya Katonda, ekifo ekitukuvu ekisulo ky'Ali Waggulu Ddala." 
Psalms46:6 Katonda akiri mu makkati, tekirinyeenya; Katonda akiyamba mu matulutulu." 
Psalms46:7 Amawanga gasambattuse, obwakabaka buyuuguuma, alya mu ttama, ensi n'emerenguka." 
Psalms46:8 Omukama w'Amagye ali naffe; Katonda wa Yakobo kye kigo kyaffe. 
Psalms46:9 Mujje mulabe Omukama by'akola, eby'amaanyi by'akoze mu nsi." 
Psalms46:10 Akomya entalo okutuuka ku nkingi z'ensi. Amenya emitego gy'obusaale, ennyago n'azibwatula; engabo n'azookya omuliro." 
Psalms46:11 “Musirike, mumanye nga nze Katonda; ndigulumizibwa mu mawanga, ndigulumizibwa mu nsi.”" 
Psalms46:12 Omukama w'Amagye ali naffe; Katonda wa Yakobo kye kigo kyaffe. 
Psalms47:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa batabani ba Kora. Zabbuli. 
Psalms47:2 Amawanga mwenna, mukube mu ngalo; mukubire emizira Katonda mu maloboozi ag'essanyu;" 
Psalms47:3 Omukama Ali Waggulu Ddala nga wa ntiisa, Kabaka mukulu ku nsi yonna!" 
Psalms47:4 Abantu abatuwangulira; amawanga n'agassa wansi w'ebigere byaffe. 
Psalms47:5 Yatulondera obusika bwaffe, ekitiibwa kya Yakobo gwe yayagala." 
Psalms47:6 Katonda ayambuse mu mizira egy'essanyu, Omukama, mu ddoboozi ery'eŋŋombe." 
Psalms47:7 Muyimbire Katonda ennyimba, muyimbe ennyimba; muyimbire kabaka waffe ennyimba, muyimbe ennyimba." 
Psalms47:8 Kubanga Katonda ye kabaka w'ensi yonna; mumuyimbire oluyimba olw'ettendo. 
Psalms47:9 Katonda afuga amawanga; Katonda atudde ku nnamulondo ye entukuvu. 
Psalms47:10 Abakungu b'amawanga bakuŋŋaana ng'abantu ba Katonda wa Yiburayimu; kubanga abafuzi b'ensi ba Katonda; asukkulumye waggulu ddala. 
Psalms48:1 Luyimba. Zabbuli ya batabani ba Kora. 
Psalms48:2 Omukama mukulu, asaanidde nnyo okutendebwa mu kibuga kya Katonda waffe, ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Psalms48:3 Lulungi mu bugulumivu bwalwo, lye ssanyu ly'ensi yonna; olusozi Siyoni entikko za Zafoni, kye kibuga kya Katonda omukulu." 
Psalms48:4 Katonda ali mu bigo bye; yeeraze nga bwali bbugwe we. 
Psalms48:5 Laba, bakabaka beekuŋŋaanya, ne balumba bonna wamu." 
Psalms48:6 Olwalaba luti ne bawuniikirira, ne batya, ne badduka." 
Psalms48:7 Eyo ensisi n'ebakwatirayo, okulumwa ng'okw'omukazi azaala." 
Psalms48:8 N'empewo y'ebuvanjuba watokomola amaato g'e Tarusisi. 
Psalms48:9 Nga bwe twawulira, bwe tutyo bwe twalaba, mu kibuga ky'Omukama w'Amagye, mu kibuga kya Katonda waffe; Katonda akinywezaawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms48:10 Tujjukira, ayi Katonda, ekisa kyo, munda mu Kiggwa kyo." 
Psalms48:11 Ng'erinnya lyo bwe liri, ayi Katonda, n'ettendo lyo bwe lityo, lituuka ku nkingi z'ensi. Omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gujjudde obutuukirivu." 
Psalms48:12 Olusozi Siyoni lusanyuke; ebyalo bya Yuda bijaganye olw'okubeera ennamula yo. 
Psalms48:13 Muyiteeyite wonna mu Siyoni, mukyetooloole, mubale eminaala gyakyo," 
Psalms48:14 mwekkaanye bbugwe waakyo, mwetegereze embiri zaakyo, mulyoke munyumize ezzadde erijja nti:" 
Psalms48:15 “Ono ye Katonda, Katonda waffe emirembe n'emirembe; y'alitukulembera okutuusa okufa.”" 
Psalms49:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa batabani ba Kora. Zabbuli 
Psalms49:2 Amawanga mwenna, muwulire bino; mubitegere amatu mwenna abali mu nsi," 
Psalms49:3 abatene n'abanene, nammwe abagagga n'abaavu." 
Psalms49:4 Akamwa kange kanaayogera amagezi; ebinaayogerwa omutima gwange binaawa okutegeera. 
Psalms49:5 Okutu kwange nzija kukutegera olugero; n'ekikoco kyange nzija kukittira ku nnanga. 
Psalms49:6 Lwaki nanditidde mu nnaku ez'akabi, ng'obwonoonefu bw'abanjigganya bunneebunguludde," 
Psalms49:7 abo abeesiga amaanyi gaabwe; abeetendera mu butitimbe bw'obugagga bwabwe? 
Psalms49:8 Gano ge mazima, omuntu tasobola kwenunula, oba okuwa Katonda omutango gwe." 
Psalms49:9 Omuwendo ogw'okununula obulamu bwe guyitiridde, mpaawo lwe gulimala," 
Psalms49:10 asobole okulama emirembe gyonna, aleme kulaba mu ntaana." 
Psalms49:11 Aliraba nti abagezi bafa; omusiru n'omugwagwa nabo nti basaanawo, obugagga bwabwe ne babulekera abalala." 
Psalms49:12 Entaana ze ziriba ennyumba zaabwe emirembe gyonna, ebisulo byabwe emirembe gyonna, newandibadde ng'ensi baazituuma amannya gaabwe." 
Psalms49:13 Anti omuntu, si ka bugagga bwe, talisigalawo; afaanana ng'ebisolo ebizikirira." 
Psalms49:14 Lino lye kkubo ly'abessaamu obwesige, era ye nkomerero y'abasanyukira mu bye boogera." 
Psalms49:15 Ba kuggweera magombe ng'endiga, olumbe lulibeerundira; balikkirira butereevu emagombe, enfaanana yaabwe erivunda, amagombe ge galiba ekisulo kyabwe." 
Psalms49:16 Naye Katonda aliwonya omwoyo gwange, nkakasa alinnunula mu mikono gy'amagombe." 
Psalms49:17 Totyanga ng'olaba omuntu agaggawala, ng'ekitiibwa ky'amaka ge kyeyongera." 
Psalms49:18 Anti bw'alifa, taliba na kyagenda nakyo, n'ekitiibwa kye tekirikkirira naye." 
Psalms49:19 Newandibadde ng'akyali mulamu yeeyitanga wa mukisa, nti: “Balikutendereza kubanga byakugendera bulungi,”" 
Psalms49:20 alyegatta ku zzadde lya bajjajjaabe abataliraba ku kitangaala. 
Psalms49:21 Omuntu mu bugagga bw'ataba mugezi, abeera ng'ebisolo ebizikirira." 
Psalms50:1 Zabbuli ya Asafu Omuyinza, Katonda, Omukama ayogera, n'ayita ensi okuva enjuba gy'eva okutuuka gy'egenda." 
Psalms50:2 Mu Siyoni, ekiwunde obulungi, Katonda mw'amyansiza." 
Psalms50:3 Katonda waffe ajja, tajja kusirika; omuliro gugenda gusenkenya mu maaso ge, omuyaga gukunta nnyo okumwetooloola wonna." 
Psalms50:4 Ayita eggulu waggulu, n'ensi, alyoke alamule abantu be:" 
Psalms50:5 “Mukuŋŋaanyize w'endi abatuukirivu bange, abaakola nange endagaano mu kitambiro.”" 
Psalms50:6 N'eggulu lirangirira obutuukirivu bwe, kubanga Katonda yennyini ye mulamuzi." 
Psalms50:7 “Wulira, bantu bange, nzija kwogera; Yisirayeli, nzija kukulumiriza; ye nze Katonda, Katonda wo." 
Psalms50:8 Sikuvunaana gwa bitambiro byo, oba gwa bitambiro byo ebyokye, kubanga ebyo bindi awo mu maaso bulijjo." 
Psalms50:9 Sijja kuggya buyana mu nnyumba yo, yadde embuzi ennume mu magana go." 
Psalms50:10 Ndaba ebisolo byonna mu bibira byange, n'ente zange eziri ku nkumi n'enkumi z'ensozi." 
Psalms50:11 Mmanyi nti buli nnyonyi ya mu nsozi, n'ebisolo eby'ettale byange." 
Psalms50:12 Singa enjala y'ebadde ennuma, sandikugambye, kubanga ensi yange na byonna ebigijjuzizza." 
Psalms50:13 Kazzi ndya nnyama ya nte nnume, oba nnywa musaayi gwa mbuzi nnume?" 
Psalms50:14 Tambirira Katonda ekitambiro eky'okwebaza; tuukiriza bye wasuubiza oyo Ali Waggulu Ddala. 
Psalms50:15 Nkoowoola ku lunaku olw'obuyinike; ndikuwonya naawe n'onzisaamu ekitiibwa.” 
Psalms50:16 Naye omubi Katonda amugamba nti: “Lwaki wandyogedde amateeka gange, n'obutaggya ndagaano yange ku mimwa?" 
Psalms50:17 Ggwe akyawa enjigiriza, n'ebigambo byange abikuba enkoto." 
Psalms50:18 Bw'olaba omubbi ng'omusanyukira; abenzi ng'ogatta nabo ekinywi. 
Psalms50:19 Akamwa ko okakozesa okwonoona, n'olulimi lwo n'olweyamba okulimba." 
Psalms50:20 Bw'otuula awo muganda wo n'omuwaayiriza, omwana wa nnyoko n'omulimirira." 
Psalms50:21 Bino obikola, nze nsirike? Olowooza nti tufaanana? Ka nkulumirize, nkwatulire mu maaso go." 
Psalms50:22 “Bino mubitegeere mmwe abeerabidde Katonda, sikulwa nga mbayuzaayuza ne wabula ow'okuwonya." 
Psalms50:23 Oli atambira ekitambiro eky'okwebaza, ampeesa ekitiibwa; n'oyo ali mu kkubo edduŋŋamu ndimwoleka obulokozi bwa Katonda.”" 
Psalms51:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms51:2 Natani omulanzi lwe yagenda gy'ali nga Dawudi amaze okusobya ku Batuseba. 
Psalms51:3 Nsaasira, ayi Katonda, ng'ekisa kyo bwe kiri, olw'okusaasira kwo okungi, sangulawo emisango gyange." 
Psalms51:4 Nnaalizaako ddala ekyonoono kyange, era ontukuzeeko ekibi kyange." 
Psalms51:5 Anti emisango gyange ngimanyi, ekibi kyange kindi awo mu maaso bulijjo." 
Psalms51:6 Ggwe wekka, ggwe nasobya, ekibi mu maaso go kye nakola; obeere mutuufu mu bigambo byo, muluŋŋamu mu nnamula yo." 
Psalms51:7 Kituufu, nazaalibwa ndi mu kibi; nnyabo yanfuna mu nda nga ndi mwonoonyi." 
Psalms51:8 Kituufu, oyagala wa mutima gwa mazima; mu mutima munda onjigiriza amagezi." 
Psalms51:9 Ntukuza ne yissopo, olwo nzija kulongooka; nnaaza, olwo nzija kutukula okusinga omuzira." 
Psalms51:10 Mpa mpulire essanyu n'okujaguza; amagumba ge wabetenta gawe gajaguze. 
Psalms51:11 Amaaso go gakweke ebibi byange; sangulawo ebyonoono byange byonna. 
Psalms51:12 Ntondaamu omutima omutukuvu, ayi Katonda, ozze buto mu nze omwoyo omunywevu." 
Psalms51:13 Tongoba kuva mu maaso go, tonzigyako Mwoyo wo omutuukirivu." 
Psalms51:14 Nziriza essanyu ery'obulokozi bwo, mpanirira n'omwoyo ogwewaayo." 
Psalms51:15 Olwo ndiyigiriza ababi amakubo go, n'abasobya balikomawo gy'oli." 
Psalms51:16 Mponya omusango gw'okuyiwa omusaayi, ayi Katonda, Katonda Omulokozi wange, olulimi lwange lulirangirira obutuufu bwo." 
Psalms51:17 Ayi Mukama, yasamya emimwa gyange, akamwa kange kalirangirira ettendo lyo." 
Psalms51:18 Anti ekitambiro tokyagala, mba kuleeta kitambiro ekyokye tewandikisiimye." 
Psalms51:19 Ekitambiro ekisanyusa Katonda gwe mwoyo ogumenyese; omutima ogwemenye, ogwenenyezza, ayi Katonda, toligugaya." 
Psalms51:20 Mu kusiima kwo, ayi Mukama, Siyoni muwe abeere bulungi; zzaawo bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu," 
Psalms51:21 olwo onoosanyukira ebitambiro ebituufu, ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitambiro ebyokeddwa ne bisirikka; olwo ente ennume ziriweerezebwa ku mwaliiro gwo." 
Psalms52:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Masukili ya Dawudi. 
Psalms52:2 Dowegi ow'e Edomu lwe yagenda ewa Sawulo n'amuloopera nti: “Dawudi ayingidde mu nnyumba ya Akimeleki.” 
Psalms52:3 Lwaki weetendera mu bugwenyufu, ggwe ow'amaanyi, n'okola obubi olunaku lwonna?" 
Psalms52:4 Buli kabanga oteekateeka nkwe, olulimi lukuli ng'akamwano akoogi; ggwe omulimba." 
Psalms52:5 Oyagala obubi okusinga ekisa; obulimba okusinga okwogera ekituufu. 
Psalms52:6 Oyagala mboozi zisojja, ggwe olulimi olulimba." 
Psalms52:7 Naye Katonda oluvannyuma alikuzikiriza emirembe gyonna; alikusigulawo, alikukwakkula mu weema yo, alikusimbula ku nsi y'abalamu." 
Psalms52:8 Abatuukirivu baliraba ne batya; balimusekerera nti: 
Psalms52:9 “Wuuyo, omuntu ataafuula Katonda buddukiro bwe, wabula ne yeesiga entuumu y'obugagga bwe; eyafuuka ow'amaanyi ng'ayita mu kuzikiriza.”" 
Psalms52:10 Naye nze ndi ng'omuti gw'oliva oguggumizza, oguli mu nnyumba ya Katonda, neesiga kisa kya Katonda leero n'emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms52:11 Ndikugulumiza emirembe gyonna olwa bye wakola; mu maaso g'abatuukirivu bo, nsuubira mu linnya lyo kubanga ddungi." 
Psalms53:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga Makalati. Masukili ya Dawudi. 
Psalms53:2 Omusiru agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Katonda taliiwo.” Boonoonefu, n'ebikolwa byabwe byenyinyalwa; tewali akola kirungi." 
Psalms53:3 Katonda ayima mu ggulu n'atunula wansi ku baana b'abantu, alabe oba mulimu ategeera, anoonya Katonda." 
Psalms53:4 Bonna bawabye, bonna wamu boonoonese; tewali akola kirungi, newandibadde omu ati." 
Psalms53:5 Abakola obubi tebaliyiga, abo abakavvula abantu bange ng'abalya omugaati, abatawanjagira Katonda?" 
Psalms53:6 Baabo, batidde ebitatiika, awatali na kitiisa. Kubanga Katonda yasaasaanya amagumba g'abaali bakuzinze; Katonda yabaswaza, kubanga yabanyooma." 
Psalms53:7 Singa nno Yisirayeli afunye obulokofu okuva mu Siyoni. Katonda bw'alizza abantu be okuva mu busibe, Yakobo alisagambiza ne Yisirayeli alisanyuka." 
Psalms54:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Na bivuga bya nkoba. Masukili ya Dawudi. 
Psalms54:2 Ab'e Zifu lwe bajja ewa Sawulo ne bamugamba nti: “Wuuno Dawudi yeekwese waffe.” 
Psalms54:3 Ayi Katonda, n'erinnya lyo ndokola; n'amaanyi go, nejjeereza." 
Psalms54:4 Ayi Katonda, wulira essaala yange; wulira ebigambo by'akamwa kange obitegere okutu." 
Psalms54:5 Anti abeekuza bansitukiddemu; abantu abakambwe banoonya obulamu bwange; abo Katonda abatamulabamu ka buntu. 
Psalms54:6 Naye Katonda ye muyambi wange, Omukama y'awanirira obulamu bwange." 
Psalms54:7 Leka akabi kaddire abo abampalana; mu bwesigwa bwo bazikirize. 
Psalms54:8 Nzija kukutambirira ekitambiro ekyeyagalire; nzija kugulumiza erinnya lyo, ayi Mukama, kubanga ddungi." 
Psalms54:9 Kubanga omponyezza mu buli kabi, n'eriiso lyange lirabye abalabe bange bwe bawanguddwa." 
Psalms55:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Na bivuga eby'enkoba. Masukili ya Dawudi. 
Psalms55:2 Ayi Katonda essaala yange gitegere okutu, okuwanjaga kwange tokugaya." 
Psalms55:3 Mpuliriza onziremu; ebirowoozo byange bintawaanya, nsobeddwa," 
Psalms55:4 olw'okuleekaana kw'omulabe n'okubonyaabonyezebwa omubi; Kubanga bandeetera nnaku, ne banjigganya mu busungu bwabwe." 
Psalms55:5 Omutima gwange gunyolwa muli mu nze; entiisa y'okufa engwiridde. 
Psalms55:6 Okutya n'okujugumira binzijidde, entiisa embuutikidde." 
Psalms55:7 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Singa nalina biwaawaatiro ng'enjiibwa, nandibuuse ne ŋŋenda ne mba mu ddembe." 
Psalms55:8 Nandiddukidde ewala, ne nsigala mu ddungu." 
Psalms55:9 Nandyanguye okwezuulira we neewogoma kikuŋŋunta n'omuyaga.” 
Psalms55:10 Tabulatabula, ayi Mukama, sobeza ennimi zaabwe; anti ndaba bukambwe na nnyombo mu kibuga." 
Psalms55:11 Emisana n'ekiro beetooloola waggulu ku bbugwe waakyo, effutwa n'obulwa bye biri mu kibuga wakati;" 
Psalms55:12 mu mbuga zaakyo mulimu kuzikiriza, ku nguudo zaakyo tekuggwa kunyigiriza na bulyake." 
Psalms55:13 Singa omulabe y'anvumye, nandikigumiikirizza, singa oyo ankyawa y'ansitukiddemu, nandimwekwese." 
Psalms55:14 Naye ate ye ggwe, bwe twenkana, munnange, mukwano gwange." 
Psalms55:15 Bwe tweyagaliranga mu kinywi kyaffe, bwe twatambulanga awamu okugenda mu nnyumba ya Katonda." 
Psalms55:16 Olumbe lubagwire kibwatukira, bakkirire mu magombe nga balamu, kubanga obwonoonefu buli mu bo, mu bisulo byabwe ne mu mitima gyabwe." 
Psalms55:17 Naye nze nkoowoola Katonda, Omukama n'andokola." 
Psalms55:18 Akawungeezi, ku makya ne mu ttuntu, ndaajana olw'ennaku, n'awulira eddoboozi lyange." 
Psalms55:19 Annunula mu abo abankijjanya nga situusiddwako kabi, newandibadde nga bangi abandi obubi." 
Psalms55:20 Ayi Katonda wulira, obatoowaze, ggwe awaŋŋamye okuva ddi na ddi, kubanga tebakyusaako n'okutya tebatya Katonda." 
Psalms55:21 Buli omu alumbagana munne; atyoboola endagaano ye. 
Psalms55:22 Akamwa ke kagonvu okukira omuzigo, naye mu mutima gwe ntalo nsa; ebigambo bye biweweevu okukira amafuta, sso nga bye biso ebisowole." 
Psalms55:23 Ebikweraliikiriza byonna bikasukire Omukama, ajja kukuwanirira, emirembe gyonna talireka mutuukirivu kusagaasagana." 
Psalms55:24 Naawe, ggwe Katonda, olibasuula mu bunnya obw'okuzikirira; abo abayiwa omusaayi n'abakambwe tebaliwangaala kusukka buvubuka bwabwe. Naye nze nsuubira mu ggwe." 
Psalms56:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Ejjiba ku Mivule egy'ewala'. Ya Dawudi. Mikutamu. Abafilisitiini ab'e Gati lwe baali bamukutte. 
Psalms56:2 Nsaasira ayi Katonda, abantu banjigganya; olunaku lwonna bannwanyisa, bannyigiriza." 
Psalms56:3 Abalabe bange banjigganya olunaku lwonna; bangi abannwanyisa mu kwekuza kwabwe. 
Psalms56:4 Bwe mba ntidde, nsuubira mu ggwe." 
Psalms56:5 Mu Katonda, oyo kigambo kye kye ntenda, mu Katonda mwe ntadde essuubi lyange, sitya. Omuntu obuntu ayinza kunkola ki?" 
Psalms56:6 Olunaku lwonna bafuulafuula ebigambo byange; ebirowoozo byabwe byonna biri ku kunkolera bubi. 
Psalms56:7 Beekoba, baliimisa, ne bekkaanya buli kigere kye nsimbula, nga beesunga okunzita." 
Psalms56:8 Tobaleka mulundi na gumu kukusumattuka, mu busungu bwo lindiggula amawanga, ayi Katonda." 
Psalms56:9 Ggwe walondoola okubungeeta kwange: Amaziga gange tewagatereka mu nsawo yo? Si malambe ku kitabo kyo? 
Psalms56:10 Olwo abalabe bange balidda ennyuma lwe ndikukoowoola; kino nkimanyi: Katonda ali ku ludda lwange. 
Psalms56:11 Mu Katonda mwe ntendera ekigambo kye; mu Mukama mwe ntendera ekigambo kye. 
Psalms56:12 Mu Katonda mwe nteeka essuubi lyange, omuntu obuntu ayinza kunkola ki?" 
Psalms56:13 Nakuba obweyamo gy'oli, ayi Katonda, nzija kukutambirira ekitambiro eky'okukwebaza." 
Psalms56:14 Kubanga obulamu bwange wabuwonya okufa n'ebigere byange okusirittuka, ntambulirenga mu maaso ga Katonda, mu kitangaala ky'abalamu." 
Psalms57:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Tozikiriza'. Lwa Dawudi. Mikutamu. Lwe yadduka Sawulo mu mpuku. 
Psalms57:2 Nsaasira, ayi Mukama, nsaasira, kubanga gy'oli gye nzirukira; nzija kuddukira mu kisiikirize ky'ebiwaawaatiro byo okutuusa ng'akabi kayise." 
Psalms57:3 Nkoowoola Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala, eri Katonda atuukiriza by'antegekera." 
Psalms57:4 Asindika ng'ayima mu ggulu, n'andokola, akangavvula abanjigganya; Katonda asindika ekisa kye n'obwesigwa." 
Psalms57:5 Ngalamidde mu mpologoma wakati; ezikavvula abaana b'abantu; amannyo gaazo, mafumu na busaale; ennimi zaazo bitala ebyogi." 
Psalms57:6 Ayi Katonda, osukkulumizibwe n'okuyisa eggulu. Ekitiibwa kyo kibeere ku nsi yonna." 
Psalms57:7 Ebigere byange baabitega ekitimba; omwoyo gwange gwegose. Baasima obuya mu kkubo lyange, ate bo ne babugwamu." 
Psalms57:8 Omutima gwange munywevu, ayi Katonda, omutima gwange munywevu. Ndiyimba, ne nkooloobya ettendo." 
Psalms57:9 Zuukuka, mwoyo gwange, zuukuka, ntongooli n'ennanga. Nzija kuzuukusa amaliiri." 
Psalms57:10 Ayi Mukama, ndikutenda mu bantu; ndikuyimba mu mawanga." 
Psalms57:11 Kubanga ekisa kyo kinene, kikoma eyo ku ggulu; obwesigwa bwo butuuka eyo ku bire." 
Psalms57:12 Ayi Katonda, osukkulumizibwe n'okuyisa eggulu. Ekitiibwa kyo kibeere ku nsi yonna." 
Psalms58:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Tozikiriza'. Ya Dawudi. Mikutamu. 
Psalms58:2 Mmwe ab'obuyinza, ddala musala mu bwenkanya? Abaana b'abantu mubalamula mu butuufu?" 
Psalms58:3 Nedda, mu mutima mulowooza kukola bubi, mu nsi emikono gyammwe gibunyizzaamu bya bukambwe." 
Psalms58:4 Ababi baawaba kuviira ddala ku kuzaalibwa, ababi baawaba kuviira ddala mu lubuto, boogera bya bulimba." 
Psalms58:5 Obusagwa bwabwe buli nga bwa musota, buli ng'obusagwa bw'essalambwa erizibiikiriza amatu gaalyo," 
Psalms58:6 eritawulira ddoboozi ly'abaligulika, ery'omulogo omukugu mu kuloga." 
Psalms58:7 Ayi Katonda, amannyo gaabwe gamenyeremenyere mu kamwa; amagego g'empologoma gawangulemu, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms58:8 Babulewo ng'amazzi bwe gakulukuta ne gagenda; bakale ng'omuddo ogusambiriddwa. 
Psalms58:9 Babulewo ng'ekkovu bwe likereketa ne liggweerera, babe ng'olubuto oluvuddemu, olutaalaba ku njuba." 
Psalms58:10 Empewo ey'akazimu ebakuŋŋunse mbagirawo nga bw'ekola enkenene n'amatovu. 
Psalms58:11 Abatuukirivu balisanyuka nga balaba eggwanga liwooleddwa, bwe balinaaza ebigere byabwe mu musaayi gw'ababi." 
Psalms58:12 Olwo abantu baligamba nti: “Wamma empeera y'omutuukirivu gy'eri; wamma Katonda gy'ali, alamula ku nsi.”" 
Psalms59:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga “Tozikiriza.” Lwa Dawudi. Mikutamu. Sawulo lwe yasindika abasajja bazinde ennyumba ya Dawudi bamutte. 
Psalms59:2 Ayi Katonda, mponya abalabe bange; ntaasa abansitukiddemu." 
Psalms59:3 Mponya abakola obubi; ntaasa abantu abayiwa omusaayi. 
Psalms59:4 Anti laba, baabo banteeze, abasajja abakambwe banneekobedde awatali musango, oba ekibi, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms59:5 Sirina kibi kye nkoze, naye beetegese okunnumba. Situka, nziruukirira; laba!" 
Psalms59:6 Ayi Mukama Katonda w'Amagye, ggwe Katonda wa Yisirayeli; weegugumule, obonereze amawanga gonna, tokwasa kisa ab'enkwe, ababi." 
Psalms59:7 Bakomawo akawungeezi nga bawuluguma ng'embwa, ne bagoma mu kibuga." 
Psalms59:8 Laba bye bafukumula mu kamwa kaabwe; ebitala bye biva mu kamwa kaabwe, ne bagamba nti: “Waliwo awulira?”" 
Psalms59:9 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, obasekerera; amawanga ago gonna oganyooma." 
Psalms59:10 Ayi Maanyi gange, nkulindirira; ggwe, ayi Katonda, ggwe kigo kyange," 
Psalms59:11 Katonda anjagala. Katonda alinkulemberamu, Katonda alimpa ne neeyagalira ku balabe bange." 
Psalms59:12 Naye tobatta, sikulwa ng'abantu bange beerabira; mu maanyi go babungeese; basasire wansi, ayi Mukama, engabo yaffe." 
Psalms59:13 Olw'ekibi ky'akamwa kaabwe, olw'ebigambo by'emimwa gyabwe, bakwatirwe mu kwekuza kwabwe, olw'okuvumirira n'obulimba bye boogera." 
Psalms59:14 Mu busungu bwo bamaleewo, bamaleewo okutuusa nga tewali asigaddewo; olwo balimanya nti: Katonda afuga mu Yakobo n'okutuuka ku nkingi z'ensi." 
Psalms59:15 Bakomawo akawungeezi nga bawuluguma ng'embwa, ne bagoma mu kibuga." 
Psalms59:16 Bayitaayita nga banoonya ebyokulya; bwe batakkuta, ne batolooma." 
Psalms59:17 Naye nze nzija kuyimba amaanyi go, ku makya nditendereza ekisa kyo, kubanga ggwe kigo kyange, obuddukiro bwange ku lunaku olw'obuyinike." 
Psalms59:18 Maanyi gange, nnyimba ettendo lyo, ggwe, ayi Katonda, ggwe kigo kyange, Katonda wange omwagalwa." 
Psalms60:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Susani Eduti' Mikutamu ya Dawudi. Lugenderera kuyigiriza. 
Psalms60:2 Lwe yalwanyisa Aramu Nakarayimu ne Aramu-Zoba, ne Yowabu lwe yadda amale agobe Edomu mu Kiwonvu ky'Omunnyo, n'atta abasajja omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri." 
Psalms60:3 Ayi Katonda, watwesammula, n'otwabyamu; wasunguwala; tuzzeewo." 
Psalms60:4 Wayuuguumya ensi n'ogyabuluzaamu; ddaabiriza enjatika zaayo, kubanga yiino enyegenya." 
Psalms60:5 Abantu bo wabalabisa ebizibu; mwatunywesa evviini eyatuzunza emitwe. 
Psalms60:6 Naye abakutya wabateerawo ebendera, baddukire eyo okwewonya omutego gw'akasaale." 
Psalms60:7 Baganzi bo balyoke balokolebwe, tuwonye n'omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, otuwulire." 
Psalms60:8 Katonda yayogera ng'ayima mu Kitukuvu kye nti: “Ndijaganya, Sekemu ndimugabanyaamu, n'Ekiwonvu Sukkoti ndikipima." 
Psalms60:9 Gileyaadi wange, ne Manasse wange; Efurayimu ye nkufiira y'omutwe gwange; Yuda ye ddamula wange." 
Psalms60:10 Mowabu lwe luleeba mwe nnaabira; ku Edomu kwe nkasuka engatto zange; ku Filisitiya, ndikuba emizira.”" 
Psalms60:11 Ani anantwala mu kibuga okuli ekigo? Ani anantuusa mu Edomu? 
Psalms60:12 Si ggwe, Katonda eyatwessammula, ayi Katonda, atakyagenda na magye gaffe?" 
Psalms60:13 Tuyambeko okulwanyisa omulabe, kubanga obuyambi bw'omuntu temuli nsa." 
Psalms60:14 Katonda ng'ali naffe, tunaakola na buzira; ajja kulinnyirira abalabe baffe." 
Psalms61:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Na bivuga bya nkoba. Ya Dawudi. 
Psalms61:2 Ayi Katonda, wuliriza omulanga gwange, ssa omwoyo ku ssaala yange." 
Psalms61:3 Nkukoowoola nga nnyima ku nkuzi y'ensi, eno omutima nga gunnyenjebuse. Nsitula, nteeka ku lwazi olunsiga obuwanvu." 
Psalms61:4 Kubanga ggwe buddukiro bwange, omunaala ogw'amaanyi okulwanyisa omulabe." 
Psalms61:5 Nnaabeeranga mu weema yo emirembe gyonna, ne neewogoma mu kisiikirize ky'ebiwaawaatiro byo." 
Psalms61:6 Anti ggwe wawulira obweyamo bwange, ayi Katonda; wampa obusika bw'abatya erinnya lyo." 
Psalms61:7 Ennaku za kabaka zongereko obuwanvu, emyaka gye gimale amazadde mangi." 
Psalms61:8 Atuule ku nnamulondo emirembe gyonna mu maaso ga Katonda; lagira ekisa n'obwesigwa bimukuume. 
Psalms61:9 Awo ndiyimbiranga erinnya lyo ettendo bulijjo, ne ntuukiriza obweyamo bwange buli lunaku." 
Psalms62:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya Yedutuni. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms62:2 Omwoyo gwange guwummulira mu Katonda mwokka, ewuwe anti y'enviira obulokofu." 
Psalms62:3 Yekka lwe lwazi lwange, bwe bulokofu bwange; kye kigo kyange, sirinyeenyezebwa n'akatono." 
Psalms62:4 Munaatuusa wa okusitukira mu muntu? Mwenna mumusuule wansi ng'ekisenge ekibunduukiridde, nga bbugwe anyeenya?" 
Psalms62:5 Baasalawo kimu: bamuwanule mu kifo kye ekya waggulu; mu bulimba mwe basanyukira. N'akamwa kaabwe baagaliza birungi, sso nga mu mitima gyabwe bavumirira." 
Psalms62:6 Ayi mwoyo gwange, wummulira mu Katonda mwokka, kubanga mu ye mwe muva essuubi lyange." 
Psalms62:7 Yekka lwe lwazi lwange, bwe bulokofu bwange; kye kigo kyange, sirinyeenyezebwa." 
Psalms62:8 Obulokofu bwange n'ekitiibwa bindi mu Katonda, olwazi lwange olw'amaanyi, obuddukiro bwange ye Katonda." 
Psalms62:9 Ayi abantu, musuubire mu ye obudde bwonna; mwogere byonna ebibali ku mutima; kubanga Katonda bwe buddukiro bwaffe." 
Psalms62:10 Abaana ba Adamu mukka bukka; abaana b'abantu baguya buguya. Mu minzaani bawewuka buwewusi; bonna wamu mukka bukka. 
Psalms62:11 Muleke kwesiga kuliika, oba okusuubirira mu kunyaga; obugagga ne bwe bweyongera, tobumalirangako mutima." 
Psalms62:12 Katonda yayogera ekintu kimu, ebintu bibiri bye nawulira: nti Katonda ye nnyinibuyinza," 
Psalms62:13 era nti: ayi Mukama, oli wa kisa, nti buli omu olimuddiza okwenkana n'omulimu gwe." 
Psalms63:1 Zabbuli ya Dawudi. Lwe yali mu ddungu lya Yuda. 
Psalms63:2 Ayi Katonda, ggwe Katonda wange, nkunoonya butaweera; omwoyo gwange gukulumirwa ennyonta, omubiri gwange gukuyaayaanira, mu nsi enkalu, eyongobedde, omutali mazzi." 
Psalms63:3 Bwe ntyo nakulaba mu kitukuvu, ne ndaba amaanyi go n'ekitiibwa kyo." 
Psalms63:4 Kubanga ekisa kyo kirungi okusinga obulamu, emimwa gyange girikutendereza." 
Psalms63:5 Ndikugulumiza obulamu bwange bwonna; mu linnya lyo ndisitula emikono gyange. 
Psalms63:6 Omwoyo gwange gulikkuta kyenkana ng'ogulidde ennyama ensava, n'akamwa kange kalikutenda n'emimwa egijaganya." 
Psalms63:7 Nga ndi ku kitanda kyange nkujjukira; neebuulirira ggwe ekiro kyonna. 
Psalms63:8 Kubanga ggwe buyambi bwange; njaguliza mu kisiikirize ky'ebiwaawaatiro byo. 
Psalms63:9 Omwoyo gwange gunyweredde ku ggwe, ddyo wo ampanirira." 
Psalms63:10 Naye abo abanoonya obulamu bwange balizikirira; balikkirira ekkuzimu eyo mu ttaka. 
Psalms63:11 Baliweebwayo mu buyinza bw'ekitala; balifuuka migabo gya bibe. 
Psalms63:12 Ye kabaka alijaguliza mu Katonda; yenna alayira mu ye alimutendereza; kubanga akamwa k'abalimba kaliggalibwa. 
Psalms64:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms64:2 Ayi Katonda, wulira eddoboozi lyange nga neemulugunya; taasa obulamu bwange entiisa y'omulabe." 
Psalms64:3 Ntaasa enkwe z'ababi, n'effujjo ly'abakola obubi," 
Psalms64:4 Abawagala ennimi zaabwe ng'ebitala; abalasa ng'obusaale bwabwe ebigambo ebibalagala. 
Psalms64:5 Balasa mu nkiso ataliiko musango; bamufumita mangu awatali kye beekengera. 
Psalms64:6 Bagumyaŋŋana mu nkwe zaabwe embi; basalaasala ag'okutega emitego mu nkiso nga bagamba nti: “Ani anaatulaba?” 
Psalms64:7 Bateesa kukola bubi, ne bagamba nti: “Tutegese olukwe olutuufu.” Ddala emmeeme y'omuntu n'omutima gwe tebyefumiitirizika." 
Psalms64:8 Naye Katonda ajja kubakuba obusaale, mangu bajja kukubibwa." 
Psalms64:9 Ennimi zaabwe zennyini zijja kubazikiriza; bonna abalibalaba balibanyeenyeza mutwe. 
Psalms64:10 Buli muntu alikubwa encukwe; balirangirira Katonda by'akola, balyefumiitiriza emirimu gye." 
Psalms64:11 Abatuukirivu basanyukire mu Mukama, baddukire gy'ali, na bonna ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu bamujagulizeemu." 
Psalms65:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. Luyimba 
Psalms65:2 Ettendo likugwanira mu Siyoni, ayi Katonda, n'obweyamo gy'oli bujja kutuukirizibwa." 
Psalms65:3 Ayi ggwe awulira essaala zaffe, gy'oli buli muntu gy'addukira." 
Psalms65:4 Ebisobyo byaffe bwe byatuyitirirako, wabitusonyiwa." 
Psalms65:5 Yeesiimye gw'olonda n'omusembeza, asule mu mbuga zo. Tulikkuta ebirungi by'omu nnyumba yo, eby'omu Kiggwa kyo ekitukuvu." 
Psalms65:6 Otwanukula n'eby'entiisa by'obutuukirivu bwo, ayi Katonda, Omulokozi waffe, essuubi ly'enkingi z'ensi yonna n'ennyanja ez'ewala." 
Psalms65:7 Ggwe eyabangawo ensozi n'amaanyi go, nga weekindikidde obuyinza," 
Psalms65:8 Ggwe asirisa okuwuluguma kw'ennyanja, okuwuluguma kw'amayengo gaayo, n'okwegugunga kw'amawanga." 
Psalms65:9 Abo abasula ku nkingi ez'ewala batya ebikuuno byo; oleetera okujaganya obuvanjuba n'obugwanjuba. 
Psalms65:10 Olambula ettaka n'olifukirira; oliwa obugimu bwa kitalo. Omwala gwa Katonda gujjudde amazzi, liwe ensi eŋŋano; anti bw'oti bwe walitegeka." 
Psalms65:11 Ofukirira empangi zaalyo, n'okuba amafunfugu gaalyo; oligonza n'oluwandaggirize, n'owa omukisa bye limeza." 
Psalms65:12 Omwaka oguwoomesa n'ebirungi byo; obukubo bw'ebigaali byo butonnyolokoka omwero. 
Psalms65:13 Amalundiro g'omu nkoola gatonnyolokoka, n'obusozi bwekindikidde essanyu." 
Psalms65:14 Amalundiro gabukaddemu endiga; n'ebiwonvu bibikkiddwa eŋŋano; bireekaana n'essanyu, wamma ne biyimba." 
Psalms66:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Luyimba. Zabbuli. Ensi yonna, mukubire Katonda emizira n'essanyu," 
Psalms66:2 muyimbe ettendo ly'erinnya lye, mumuyimbire ettendo ery'ekitiibwa." 
Psalms66:3 Mugambe Katonda nti: “By'okola nga bitiisa! Olw'obungi bw'obuyinza bwo abalabe bo babundaala w'oli. 
Psalms66:4 Ensi yonna ekuvunnamira; bakuyimbira, bayimbira erinnya lyo.”" 
Psalms66:5 Mujje mulabe Katonda by'akola; nga bya ntiisa by'akolera abaana b'abantu! 
Psalms66:6 Ennyanja yagifuula ettaka ekkalu, ne basomoka omugga ku bigere; wamma, mujje tujagulize mu ye." 
Psalms66:7 Emirembe gyonna afuga n'obuyinza bwe, amaaso ge gekkaanya amawanga; abajeemu tebamwewanikako." 
Psalms66:8 Amawanga, mugulumize Katonda waffe, muwulize eddoboozi ly'ettendo lye." 
Psalms66:9 Atukuumye nga tuli balamu, n'ataleka bigere byaffe kuseerera." 
Psalms66:10 Ayi Katonda, watugeza; watutukuza n'omuliro nga ffeeza bw'atukuzibwa." 
Psalms66:11 Watutwala mu kitimba, n'ossa omugugu ku mugongo gwaffe;" 
Psalms66:12 waleka abantu ne batutambulira ku mitwe; twayita mu muliro ne mu mazzi, naye watutuusa mu kifo eky'omwero." 
Psalms66:13 Nnaayingira mu nnyumba yo n'ebitambiro ebyokye, nzija kutuukiriza kye neetema gy'oli;" 
Psalms66:14 ebyo emimwa gyange bye gyeyama, akamwa kange bye kaasuubiza nga ndi mu nnaku." 
Psalms66:15 Nzija kukuweereza ebitambiro ebyokye eby'ensolo ensava, n'ebitone eby'endiga ennume; nnaakutambirira ente ennume n'embuzi ennume." 
Psalms66:16 Mujje, muwulire mwenna abatya Katonda; nzija kubanyumiza ebinene bye yankolera." 
Psalms66:17 Nalaajana gy'ali n'akamwa kange; ettondo lyali ku lulimi lwange. 
Psalms66:18 Singa nali nsanyukidde obwonoonefu mu mutima gwange, Omukama teyandimpulirizza." 
Psalms66:19 Naye Katonda awulirizza; ategerezza eddoboozi ly'essaala yange. 
Psalms66:20 Katonda agulumizibwe ateemansula ssaala yange, atanzigyako kisa kye." 
Psalms67:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Na bivuga bya nkoba. Zabbuli. Luyimba. 
Psalms67:2 Katonda atusaasire, atuwe omukisa, atwakize amaaso ge." 
Psalms67:3 Amakubo go gamanyibwe mu nsi, n'obulokozi bwo mu mawanga wonna." 
Psalms67:4 Amawanga gakugulumize, ayi Katonda; amawanga gonna gakugulumize." 
Psalms67:5 Amawanga gajaganye era gayimbe n'essanyu, kubanga olamula abantu mu bwenkanya, n'amawanga mu nsi n'ogalambika." 
Psalms67:6 Amawanga gakugulumize, ayi Katonda; amawanga gonna gakugulumize." 
Psalms67:7 Ettaka lireese ebibala byalyo; Katonda atuwe omukisa, Katonda waffe." 
Psalms67:8 Katonda atuwe omukisa; enkingi z'ensi zonna zimutye. 
Psalms68:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa Dawudi. Zabbuli. Luyimba. 
Psalms68:2 Katonda asituke, abalabe be babunyisibwe emiwabo, abamukyawa bamwetegule." 
Psalms68:3 Ng'omukka bwe gusaasaana, naawe bw'oba obasaasaanya; ng'envumbo bw'esaanuuka ku muliro, n'ababi bwe baba bazikirira mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Psalms68:4 Bo abatuukirivu basanyuke, bajaganye mu maaso ga Katonda, bajaguze mu ssanyu." 
Psalms68:5 Muyimbire Katonda, mutendereze erinnya lye; mumukolere ekkubo oyo atambulira ku bire; erinnya lye ye Mukama, mujaganyize mu maaso ge." 
Psalms68:6 Kitaawe wa bamulekwa, ataasa bannamwandu, ye Katonda mu kisulo kye ekitukuvu." 
Psalms68:7 Abalekeddwa ettayo Katonda abategekera ennyumba aw'okusula; abasibe abaggyayo nga bayimba; naye abajeemu basula mu nsi eyakalangulwa. 
Psalms68:8 Ayi Katonda, wavaayo ng'okulembedde abantu bo; bwe weekaaliisa mu ddungu," 
Psalms68:9 ensi yayuuguuma n'eggulu ne litonnyesa enkuba, mu maaso ga Katonda w'oku Sinayi, mu maso ga Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms68:10 Ayi Katonda, watonnyesa enkuba ey'omwero; wazza amaanyi mu busika bwo obuyongobedde." 
Psalms68:11 Eggye lyo lyagisengamu, ayi Katonda, waggya ku birungi byo n'olabirira omwavu." 
Psalms68:12 Omukama yawa ekigambo, ekibinja kyali kinene eky'abaatuusa obubaka:" 
Psalms68:13 Kabaka n'amagye badduka ne babulawo; abakazi awaka ne bagabana omunyago. 
Psalms68:14 Newandibadde nga babeera mu bisibo bya ndiga, ebiwaawaatiro by'enjiibwa bisiigiddwa ffeeza, n'ebyoya byayo bisiigiddwa zaabu owa kiragala." 
Psalms68:15 Omuyinza wa buli kantu bwe yabunya bakabaka emiwabo, omuzira gwagwa ku Zalumoni." 
Psalms68:16 Olusozi Basani lusozi lwa kitiibwa; Olusozi Basani lusozi lwa busozisozi. 
Psalms68:17 Ayi olusozi olw'obusozisozi, lwaki otunuulira n'obuggya olusozi Katonda kwe yalonda okusula, Omukama w'anaabeera emirembe gyonna?" 
Psalms68:18 Ebigaali bya Katonda mitwalo na mitwalo, nkumi na nkumi; Omukama yava ku Sinayi n'ajja mu kifo kye ekitukuvu." 
Psalms68:19 Bwe wayambuka waggulu, wagenda n'abasibe, wafuna ebirabo okuva mu bantu, newandibadde okuva mu bajeemu, bw'otyo, ayi Mukama Katonda, osobole okusula eyo."
