Psalms68:20 Omukama agulumizibwe buli olukedde, oyo atuwanirira, Katonda obulokofu bwaffe." 
Psalms68:21 Katonda waffe ye Katonda alokola; Omukama Katonda y'aggya mu kufa. 
Psalms68:22 Mazima Katonda alibetenta emitwe gy'abalabe be, engule ey'enviiri ey'abo abatambulira mu nsobi zaabwe." 
Psalms68:23 Omukama agamba nti: “Ndikukomyawo okuva e Basani; ndikukomyawo okuva ku ntobo y'ennyanja," 
Psalms68:24 mulyoke munnyike ebigere byammwe mu musaayi gw'abalabe, n'ennimi z'embwa zammwe zeefunire omugabo gwabwe.”" 
Psalms68:25 Basoose okulaba ennyiriri z'amayingira go, ayi Katonda, amayingira mu kitukuvu aga Katonda wange, Kabaka wange." 
Psalms68:26 Abayimbi bakulembeddemu, abatongooli bakoobedde; mu makkati abawala abakuba obugoma." 
Psalms68:27 Mutendereze Katonda mu lukuŋŋaana olukulu; mutendereze Omukama mu zzadde lya Yisirayeli. 
Psalms68:28 Benyamiini wuuyo, omuto abakulembeddemu; kiikyo ekibinja ky'abakungu ba Yuda, era baabo abalangira ba Zebuluni ne Nafutali." 
Psalms68:29 Ayi Katonda, yoleka amaanyi go, nyweza kino, ayi Mukama, ky'otukoledde." 
Psalms68:30 Olw'okubeera Ekiggwa kyo ekiri mu Yeruzaalemu, bakabaka balireeta ebirabo gy'oli." 
Psalms68:31 Koma ku kisolo ky'omu bitoogo, eggana ly'ente ennume mu buyana bw'eggwanga. Sambirira abo abalulunkanira emisolo gya ffeeza, bunya emiwabo amawanga agasanyukira entalo." 
Psalms68:32 Abakungu bave mu Misiri, ne Kuusi egololere emikono gyayo eri Katonda." 
Psalms68:33 Obwakabaka bw'ensi, muyimbire Katonda, Muyimbire Omukama ettendo," 
Psalms68:34 oyo atambulira ku ggulu erya ddi na ddi, abwatuka n'eddoboozi ery'ekitiibwa." 
Psalms68:35 Mwatule obuyinza bwa Katonda, ekitiibwa kye ekiri ku Yisirayeli, amaanyi ge agali mu bire." 
Psalms68:36 Katonda wa ntiisa mu Kitukuvu kye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli; yennyini awa abantu be amaanyi n'obuzira. Katonda agulumizibwe." 
Psalms69:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Amalanga'. Ya Dawudi 
Psalms69:2 Mponya, ayi Katonda, kubanga amazzi gantuuse mu bulago;" 
Psalms69:3 Ntubidde mu lutobazzi, mu kateebe awatali we nsimba kigere; amazzi ngatuuse mu ddubi, n'engezi embisse." 
Psalms69:4 Nkooye okulaajana, n'emimiro ginkaze. Amaaso gange gayimbadde nga nnindirira Katonda wange." 
Psalms69:5 Bangi n'okusinga enviiri z'omutwe gwange abo abankyayira obwereere; ba maanyi abaagala okunzikiriza, abo abalabe ab'obulimba. Olwo nzizeeyo bye saanyaga?" 
Psalms69:6 Ayi Katonda, ggwe omanyi obusiru bwange; emisango gyange tegikukwekeddwa." 
Psalms69:7 Abasuubira mu ggwe baleme kuswala olw'okubeera nze, ayi Mukama, Katonda w'Amagye; abakunoonya baleme kuswala olw'okubeera nze, ayi Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms69:8 Anti olw'okubeera ggwe nagumira okuvumibwa; ensonyi zibisse amaaso gange. 
Psalms69:9 Nfuuse mugwira mu baganda bange; munnaggwanga eri abaana ba nnyabo. 
Psalms69:10 Anti okutakabanira ennyumba yo kwandyamu omwoyo, n'ebivumo by'abakuvuma byagwa ku nze." 
Psalms69:11 Bwe nkaaba n'okusiiba, ekyo ne kinvumisa." 
Psalms69:12 Bwe nnyambala ekikutiya, ne nfuuka eky'okwogerako." 
Psalms69:13 Abatuula ku mulyango banjerega; nfuuse lujeejeemo lw'abanywi b'omwenge. 
Psalms69:14 Naye ewuwo gye nsaba, ayi Mukama, mu kadde ak'okugirira ekisa. Mpulira ng'ogerera ku bungi bw'okusaasira kwo, ayi Katonda; ng'ogerera ku bwesigwa bw'obulokozi bwo." 
Psalms69:15 Nsikaayo mu kateebe, tondeka kubbira; mponya abankyawa; mponya amazzi g'omu ddubi." 
Psalms69:16 Toleka mujjuzo kunsaanyaawo, n'eddubi lireme kummira, n'obunnya buleme kunsaanikirira muli." 
Psalms69:17 Nziraamu, ayi Mukama, olw'obulungi bw'okwagala kwo; nkyukiza amaaso go olw'obungi bw'ekisa kyo." 
Psalms69:18 Amaaso go togakweka muweereza wo, kubanga mbonaabona, yanguwa okunnyanukula." 
Psalms69:19 Sembera gy'endi omponye; nnunula olw'abalabe bange. 
Psalms69:20 Omanyi nga bwe nvumibwa, bwe nswadde, ne bwe nnyoomeddwa; bonna abambonyaabonya bali mu maaso go." 
Psalms69:21 Okuvumibwa kwammenya omutima, ne nzigwamu; nalinda okusaasirwa, ne wabula n'okumu, anankubagiza, ne sisanga n'omu." 
Psalms69:22 Mu mmere yange bassaamu endulwe, okunzita ennyonta bampa nkaatu." 
Psalms69:23 Olujjuliro lwabwe oluli mu maaso gaabwe lubafuukire ekitimba; n'embaga zaabwe ez'okussa ekimu zibafuukire omutego. 
Psalms69:24 Amaaso gaabwe gajjeko ekifu, baleme kulaba, n'emigongo gyabwe gibenduke ennaku zonna." 
Psalms69:25 Bamalireko obuswandi bwo; obusungu bwo obwesera bubakwate. 
Psalms69:26 Ekisulo kyabwe kifuuke matongo; weema zaabwe wabulewo azisulamu. 
Psalms69:27 Kubanga bayigganya oyo gwe wakuba, bayimbirira obulumi bw'oyo gwe wafumita." 
Psalms69:28 Bavunaane musango ku musango, baleme kugabana butuukirivu bwo." 
Psalms69:29 Basangulwe mu kitabo ky'abalamu, baleme kuwandiikibwa wamu na batuukirivu." 
Psalms69:30 Naye nze ndi munaku, nnumizibwa, kulokola kwo, ayi Katonda, kwe kubeera kuntaasa." 
Psalms69:31 Nditenda erinnya lya Katonda mu luyimba, ndimugulumiza mu ttendo." 
Psalms69:32 Kino kirisanyula Katonda n'okusinga zisseddume, okusinga ente ennume ez'amayembe n'ebinuulo." 
Psalms69:33 Mmwe abatalina bwe muli, musanyuke; munoonye Omukama, emitima gyammwe gibeere miramu." 
Psalms69:34 Kubanga Omukama awulira abanaku, tagaya bantu be basibe." 
Psalms69:35 Eggulu n'ensi bimutende, amayanja na buli kyonna ekyekuukuubiza muli." 
Psalms69:36 Kubanga Katonda alinunula Siyoni, alizimba buto ebibuga bya Yuda. Olwo abantu balisengamu ne babitwala;" 
Psalms69:37 ezzadde ly'abaweereza be lirimusikira, n'abaagala erinnya lye balimubeeramu." 
Psalms70:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa Dawudi. Olw'okujjukiza. 
Psalms70:2 Ayi Mukama, jjangu onjune; ayi Mukama, yanguwa okunnyamba." 
Psalms70:3 Baswale, ensonyi zibakwate, abo abanoonya obulamu bwange; bazzibweyo ennyuma nga baswavu, bonna abeegomba okuzikirira kwange." 
Psalms70:4 Baddeyo ennyuma olw'okuswaluka, abo abagamba nti: “K'olabe, k'olabe!”" 
Psalms70:5 Naye bajaguze, bakusanyukiremu abo bonna abakunoonya; bagambe bulijjo nti: “Katonda agulumizibwe,” bonna abo abeegomba obulokofu bwo." 
Psalms70:6 Naye nze ndi mwavu, munaku; jjangu mangu gye ndi, ayi Katonda, Ggwe buyambi bwange era omulokozi wange; ayi Mukama, leka kulwa." 
Psalms71:1 Ayi Mukama, nzirukidde gy'oli; tondekanga kuswala mirembe gyonna;" 
Psalms71:2 mu butuukirivu bwo mponya, ndokola. Wunzikira gye ndi okutu kwo ondokole." 
Psalms71:3 Mbeerera lwazi lwa buddukiro, ekigo ekinywevu bulijjo; walagira okumponya, anti ggwe lwazi lwange, ekigo kyange." 
Psalms71:4 Ayi Katonda wange, nsika mu mikono gy'omubi, mu kikonde ky'ow'ettima omukambwe." 
Psalms71:5 Kubanga, ayi Mukama, ggwe ssuubi lyange, obwesige bwange, ayi Mukama, okuva mu buvubuka bwange." 
Psalms71:6 Okuva lwe nazaalibwa, nnyweredde ku ggwe; okuva mu nda ya nnyabo, ggwe onkuuma; bulijjo nnaakutenderezanga." 
Psalms71:7 Bangi mbafuukidde ekikuuno, naye ggwe buddukiro bwange obunywevu." 
Psalms71:8 Akamwa kange kajjudde ettendo lyo, olunaku lwonna kayimba ekitiibwa kyo." 
Psalms71:9 Tonsuulirira mu kaseera ak'obukadde; tonjabulira kati ng'amaanyi gampwedde. 
Psalms71:10 Anti abalabe bange banjogerako; abaliimisa obulamu bwange banneekobera wamu; 
Psalms71:11 bagamba nti: “Katonda amwabulidde, mumuwondere, mumukwate, kubanga tewakyali amutaasa.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ayi Katonda, tonneesuuba; ayi Katonda wange, yanguwa okunnyamba." 
Psalms71:13 Baswale, baggwemu ensa, abalwanyisa omwoyo gwange; abanoonya okunkola obubi babikkibwe ebivumo n'obuswavu." 
Psalms71:14 Naye nze bulijjo nzija kusuubiranga; buli lunaku naddiŋŋananga ettendo lyo. 
Psalms71:15 Akamwa kange kalirangirira obutuukirivu bwo, olunaku lwonna obulokozi bwo, anti n'okumanya simanyi we bwenkana." 
Psalms71:16 Ndijja ne nnangirira ebikuuno byo, ayi Katonda Omuyinza; ndijjukira obutuukirivu bwo, ate obubwo wekka." 
Psalms71:17 Ayi Katonda, wanjigiriza okuva mu buvubuka bwange, n'okutuusa kati ndojja ebyewuunyisa byo." 
Psalms71:18 Na kati mu bukadde, nga mbunye envi, ayi Katonda, tonjabuliranga, ngira ntendera ezzadde lino ebikuuno byo, n'abalijja bonna, obuyinza bwo." 
Psalms71:19 Obutuukirivu bwo, ayi Katonda butuuka ku ggulu; wakola ebinene, ayi Katonda, ani akwegezaako?" 
Psalms71:20 Newandibadde ng'ondabizza ennaku, ennyingi ate enkakali, kyokka oluvannyuma olimpa obulamu nate, nate olinzigyayo eyo ekkuzimu mu ttaka." 
Psalms71:21 Olinnyongera obukulu, n'onkubagiza nate." 
Psalms71:22 Nange ndikugulumiza ku ntongooli olw'obwesigwa bwo, ayi Katonda, ndikuyimbira ku nnanga, ayi Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms71:23 Emimwa gyange girijaganya bwe ndiba nkuyimbira, nze gwe wanunula." 
Psalms71:24 Olunaku lwonna olulimi lwange lulimanyisa obutuukirivu bwo; kubanga abanoonya okunzikiriza baswadde, batoowaziddwa." 
Psalms72:1 Ya Solomoni. Ayi Katonda, kabaka muwe ennamula yo, n'obutuukirivu bwo buwe mutabani wa kabaka," 
Psalms72:2 alamule abantu bo mu butuukirivu n'abanaku bo mu bwenkanya. 
Psalms72:3 Ensozi zireetere eggwanga eddembe, n'obusozi ebibala by'obutuukirivu." 
Psalms72:4 Ataase abanaku mu ggwanga, adduukirire abaana b'omwavu, era afufuggaze abayigganya." 
Psalms72:5 Awangaale ng'enjuba, era ng'omwezi mu mazadde n'amazadde." 
Psalms72:6 Abe ng'enkuba etonnya ku muddo, ng'oluwandaggirize olufukirira ettaka." 
Psalms72:7 Mu budde bwe obutuukirivu bwanye, n'eddembe libeere lingi; okutuusa omwezi okuzaama." 
Psalms72:8 Afuge okuva ku nnyanja okutuuka ku nnyanja; n'okuva ku Mugga okutuuka ku nkingi z'ensi. 
Psalms72:9 Amawanga g'omu ddungu gamuvunnamire, abalabe be bakombe enfuufu." 
Psalms72:10 Bakabaka b'e Tarusisi n'ab'omu bizinga bamuwe omusolo; bakabaka b'e Saba n'ab'e Seba bamuleetere ebirabo. 
Psalms72:11 Ne bakabaka bonna bamuvunnamire; amawanga gonna gamuweereze. 
Psalms72:12 Kubanga awonya omwavu awanjaga, n'omunaku ataliiko muyambi." 
Psalms72:13 Kubanga asaasira omunafu n'awooba, awonya n'obulamu bw'adaagana." 
Psalms72:14 Abataasa okunyigirizibwa n'ettemu, n'omusaayi gwabwe gwa muwendo mu maaso ge." 
Psalms72:15 Awangaale, ne zaabu ow'e Seba amuweebwe; bamusabirenga bulijjo, bamutenderezenga olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms72:16 Eŋŋano ebeere ya kyengera mu nsi, eyuugira ku ntikko z'ensozi. Ekibala kye kibeere nga Lebanoni; abantu mu kibuga baanye ng'omuddo ku ttaka." 
Psalms72:17 Erinnya lye libeerewo emirembe gyonna; liwangaale ng'enjuba; mu ye amawanga gonna mwe gaba gaweerwa omukisa; gamwesiimisenga. 
Psalms72:18 Agulumizibwe Katonda, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, yekka oyo akola ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms72:19 N'erinnya lye ery'ekitiibwa ligulumizibwe emirembe gyonna; ensi yonna ejjule ekitiibwa kye. Amiina. Amiina. 
Psalms72:20 Essaala za Dawudi mutabani wa Yesse zikoma wano. 
Psalms73:1 Zabbuli ya Asafu Kituufu, Katonda nga mulungi eri abalungi; eri ab'omutima omulongoofu!" 
Psalms73:2 Naye nze ebigere byange kaabula kata biseerere; entambula yange kaabula kata ewuguke. 
Psalms73:3 Kubanga abeekuza bankwasanga obuggya, nga ndaba ababi bibagendera bulungi." 
Psalms73:4 Mpaawo kibaluma; emibiri gyabwe miramu, minyirivu." 
Psalms73:5 Tebafuna ku bikabassanya bantu; ennaku tezibasanga ng'abantu abalala. 
Psalms73:6 Awo nno okwekuza bakwambadde ng'olutembe, n'obukambwe babwebisse ng'ekyambalo." 
Psalms73:7 Amaaso gaabwe gatunguseeyo olw'amasavu, mu mitima gyabwe mufumbukukamu busiru." 
Psalms73:8 Basekerera ne boogera n'effutwa; mu kwekuza kwabwe boogera bitiisatiisa. 
Psalms73:9 Babambira eggulu n'akamwa kaabwe, n'olulimi lwabwe lufeffetta mu nsi." 
Psalms73:10 Awo nno ab'ekinywi kyabwe bajja gye bali, ne banywa amazzi mu bungi." 
Psalms73:11 Beegambira nti: “Katonda anaamanya atya? Ali Waggulu Ddala amanyi?” 
Psalms73:12 Ababi bwe batyo bwe bali; bulijjo bali mirembe, beeyongera mu bugagga." 
Psalms73:13 Ddala, nateganira busa okukuuma omutima gwange nga mutukuvu, n'okunaaba engalo zange olw'obutabaako musango?" 
Psalms73:14 Olunaku lwonna mbonyaabonyezebwa; buli makya mbonerezebwa. 
Psalms73:15 Singa nali ŋŋambye nti: “Ka njogere bwe ntyo,” nandibadde ndiddemu olukwe ezzadde ly'abaana bo." 
Psalms73:16 Bwe nagezaako kino okukyefumiitiriza, kyankaluubirira," 
Psalms73:17 okutuusa lwe nayingira mu kitukuvu kya Katonda, olwo ne ntegeera enkomerero yaabwe." 
Psalms73:18 Kituufu, wabateeka awaseerera; wabasulinka mu matongo." 
Psalms73:19 Nga bazikiridde mangu; basaanyiziddwaawo ddala entiisa! 
Psalms73:20 Ng'oli bw'asisimuka n'akisiibula ng'ekirooto, Mukama, ng'ozuukuse, gaya bye beefaanaanyiriza." 
Psalms73:21 Omutima gwange bwe gwanyolwa, n'emmeeme yange n'esoggwa," 
Psalms73:22 nabulwa amagezi nga sitegeera, nali ng'ekisolo mu maaso go." 
Psalms73:23 Sso nze bulijjo ndi naawe; onkutte ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo. 
Psalms73:24 Onnambika n'ebibuuliriro byo, kyaddaaki olintuusa mu kitiibwa." 
Psalms73:25 Ng'oggyeeko ggwe, mu ggulu endiyo ani? Nga ndi naawe, ku nsi sseegombako kirala." 
Psalms73:26 Omubiri gwange n'omutima byandiggwaamu endasi, naye Katonda lwe lwazi lw'omutima gwange, ggwe mugabo gwange emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms73:27 Kyekyo, abakwesamba balizikirira; ozikiriza bonna abatali beesigwa gy'oli." 
Psalms73:28 Kyokka nze, kirungi okunywerera ku Katonda; Omukama Katonda namufuula obuddukiro bwange; ndirombojja byonna by'okola." 
Psalms74:1 Masukili ya Asafu Ayi Katonda, lwaki watwesammulira ddala obutaddira? Lwaki obusungu bwo buttunkira ku ndiga z'eddundiro lyo?" 
Psalms74:2 Jjukira ekibiina kyo kye weefunira okuva ddi na ddi, abantu be wanunula ng'obusika bwo, olusozi Siyoni kw'osula." 
Psalms74:3 Tambula oyite mu matongo g'ennaku zonna; byonna omulabe bye yayonoona mu Kitukuvu. 
Psalms74:4 Abakukyawa baakaga mu makkati g'ekibiina kyo; bendera zaabwe baazisimbayo ng'obubonero. 
Psalms74:5 Baafaanana ng'abantu abawuumya embazzi ku miryango egy'engulu, mu kibira ekiziyivu." 
Psalms74:6 Emyango gyakyo emiwunde bagitemye n'ensinjo n'ennyondo. 
Psalms74:7 Ekitukuvu kyo bakyokezza omuliro; ekisulo ky'erinnya lyo bakijaajaamizza okutuukira ddala ku ttaka. 
Psalms74:8 Baagambanga mu mutima gwabwe nti: “Tubazikiririze ddala bonna.” Baayokya wonna mu nsi buli kifo awaasinzibwanga Katonda. 
Psalms74:9 Obubonero bwaffe tetukyabulaba; tewakyali mulanzi; ne mu ffe temuli amanyi ddi lwe binaakoma. 
Psalms74:10 Ayi Katonda, omuwalanye anaatuusa wa okujolonga? Omulabe wa kuvuma linnya lyo mirembe gyonna?" 
Psalms74:11 Lwaki oggyawo omukono gwo? Lwaki ddyo wo omufunyira mu kikondoolo kyo? 
Psalms74:12 Sso, ayi Katonda, ggwe kabaka wange okuva ddi na ddi; aleeta obulokofu mu nsi wonna." 
Psalms74:13 Ggwe n'obuyinza bwo wayabuluzaamu ennyanja; wabetentera omutwe gwa ssessota mu mazzi. 
Psalms74:14 Ggwe wabetenta emitwe gya Goonya, n'omuwa ebisolo by'omu ddungu bimulye." 
Psalms74:15 Ggwe wazibukula ensulo n'emigga; ggwe wakaza emigga bulijjo egikulukuta. 
Psalms74:16 Olunaku lulwo n'ekiro kikyo; ggwe wassaawo omwezi n'enjuba. 
Psalms74:17 Ggwe wabanga enkingi zonna ez'ensi; ekyeya n'obutiti ggwe wabikola. 
Psalms74:18 Jjukira omulabe nga bwe yajolonga, ayi Mukama; eggwanga eritategeera nga bwe lyavuma erinnya lyo." 
Psalms74:19 Emyoyo gy'enjiibwa yo togigabulira gasolo; obulamu bw'abanaku bo leka kubwerabira nnaku zonna. 
Psalms74:20 Endagaano yo gifeeko, kubanga obulikonda bwonna obw'ensi bufuuse nfo za bukambwe." 
Psalms74:21 Anyigiriziddwa tomuleka kudda ng'aswadde; abaavu n'abawamma batende erinnya lyo. 
Psalms74:22 Situka, ayi Katonda, weetaase; jjukira okuvumibwa omusiru kw'akuvumamu olunaku lwonna; atategeera kw'akuvumamu buli kanaku." 
Psalms74:23 Leka kwerabira maloboozi g'abalabe bo; oluyoogaano lw'abakusitukiramu olugenda lukaalaama. 
Psalms75:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Tozikiriza'. Zabbuli ya Asafu. Luyimba. 
Psalms75:2 Tukugulumiza, ayi Katonda, tukugulumiza; tutendereza erinnya lyo; abantu balombojja ebyewuunyisa byo." 
Psalms75:3 Ogamba nti: “Bwe ndissaawo akabanga, ndiramula mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms75:4 Ensi ne bw'eneeyuuguuma n'abagirimu bonna, nze nnyweza empagi zaayo." 
Psalms75:5 “Ŋŋamba abeewaana nti: ‘Muleke kwewaana,’ n'ababi nti: ‘Muleke kwewaga maanyi." 
Psalms75:6 Muleke kubina waggulu bwanga bwammwe; muleke kwogeza lunkulu.’ ” 
Psalms75:7 Anti newandibadde ebuvanjuba yadde ebugwanjuba; wadde mu ddungu, teri agulumiza." 
Psalms75:8 Katonda yekka ye mulamuzi; ono amutoowaza, oli n'amugulumiza." 
Psalms75:9 Mu mukono gw'Omukama mulimu ekikompe; kijjudde evviini ebimba, ejjudde ebirungo. Akifuka, ababi bonna ku nsi ne bakinywa; bakinywa okutuukira ddala ku bbonda." 
Psalms75:10 Naye nze ndijaguza emirembe gyonna, ndiyimbira Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms75:11 Okwewaana kw'ababi kwonna ndikukomya; naye amaanyi g'omutuukirivu galigulumizibwa. 
Psalms76:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ku bivuga eby'enkoba. Zabbuli ya Asafu. Luyimba. 
Psalms76:2 Katonda amanyiddwa mu Yuda; erinnya lye kkulu mu Yisirayeli. 
Psalms76:3 Ensiisira ye eri mu Saalemu; ekisulo kye kiri mu Siyoni. 
Psalms76:4 Eyo gye yamenyera obusaale obumasamasa; engabo, ekitala n'olutalo." 
Psalms76:5 Otemagana, weewuunyisa ng'oli ku nsozi ez'omuyiggo." 
Psalms76:6 Abazira mu mutima baayaayibwa, ne bagalamira okwebaka; bonna enkwantangabo tebaasobola kweyamba mikono gyabwe." 
Psalms76:7 Bwe waboggola, ayi Katonda wa Yakobo, omugoba n'embalaasi byasannyalala." 
Psalms76:8 Oli wa ntiisa ggwe. Ani aligumira w'oli ng'osunguwadde? 
Psalms76:9 Wayima mu ggulu n'owa ensala yo: ensi n'etya n'esiriikirira," 
Psalms76:10 Katonda bwe yasituka okulamula, alokole abanaku bonna ab'ensi." 
Psalms76:11 Kituufu nti obusungu bw'omuntu bukutendereza, n'obusungu bwo obusigalidde weekuuma." 
Psalms76:12 Mweteme eri Omukama Katonda wammwe, ate bye mwetemye mubituukirize; bonna abamwebunguludde baleetere ebirabo oyo atiibwa," 
Psalms76:13 eri oyo amenyaamenya omwoyo gw'abakulembeze, akuba entiisa bakabaka b'ensi." 
Psalms77:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga Yedutuni. Lwa Asafu. Zabbuli. 
Psalms77:2 Naleekaana ewa Katonda; naleekaana ewa Katonda ampulire. 
Psalms77:3 Ku lunaku lw'obuyinike nanoonya Omukama; ekiro emikono gyange nagigolola awatali kuweera, n'omwoyo gwange gwagaana okukubagizibwa." 
Psalms77:4 Nga bwe nzijukira Katonda, ne nsinda; bwe ndowoolereza, omwoyo gwange ne guyenjebuka." 
Psalms77:5 Amaaso gange nga togaganya kuwujjaalako; ntabanguse omutima, sikyasobola na kwogera." 
Psalms77:6 Nalowoolereza ku nnaku ez'edda; najjukira emyaka egyayita. 
Psalms77:7 Ekiro nawulira oluyimba mu mutima gwange, neefumiitiriza, omutima gwange ne gwebuuza:" 
Psalms77:8 “Omukama alitwemansulira ddala butaddirira; taliddayo kutusanyukira? 
Psalms77:9 Ekisa kye kikomye emirembe gyonna? Ekisuubizo kye kyafiira ddala amazadde gonna? 
Psalms77:10 Abaffe, Katonda yeerabidde okusaasira? Nandiki mu busungu aggalidde ekisa kye?”" 
Psalms77:11 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Eno ye nnaku yange; Ddyo w'Ali Waggulu Ddala akyuse?” 
Psalms77:12 Ndijjukira ebikolwa by'Omukama, Yee! Ndijjukira ebyamagero bye wakola edda luli." 
Psalms77:13 Ndyebuulirira ku mirimu gyo gyonna, ne neefumiitiriza ku bikolwa byo eby'amaanyi." 
Psalms77:14 Amakubo go, ayi Katonda, matukuvu. Lubaale ani omukulu nga Katonda waffe?" 
Psalms77:15 Ggwe Katonda akola ebyamagero; walaga amaanyi go mu mawanga. 
Psalms77:16 Wanunula abantu bo n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi, bazzukulu ba Yakobo ne Yozefu." 
Psalms77:17 Amazzi gaakulaba, ayi Katonda, amazzi gaakulaba, ne geenyoola mu bulumi; n'eddubi ne lisiikuuka." 
Psalms77:18 Ebire ne bifukumula amazzi, eggulu ne lita okubwatuka, obusaale bwo ne buyitiŋŋana ku njuyi zonna." 
Psalms77:19 Eddoboozi ly'okubwatuka kwo lyawulirwa mu mpewo ey'akazimu, ebimyanso byo ne byakaayakanya ensi, ensi n'eyuuguuma, n'ekankana." 
Psalms77:20 Ekkubo lyo walikuba mu nnyanja, akakubo ko kaayita mu mazzi amangi, newandibadde ng'ekisinde kyo tekyalabika." 
Psalms77:21 Eggwanga lyo walikulemberamu ng'eggana n'omukono gwa Musa ne Aroni. 
Psalms78:1 Masukili ya Asafu. Ayi bantu bange, muwulirize bye njigiriza; mutegere amatu ebigambo by'akamwa kange." 
Psalms78:2 Nzija kwasamya akamwa kange mu ngero; nzija kufukumula ebyama eby'emirembe egy'edda. 
Psalms78:3 Bye twawulira era bye twamanya, bajjajjaffe bye baatunyumiza." 
Psalms78:4 Tetujja kubikisa baana baabwe; tulinyumiza ezzadde eririddako, ebikolwa by'Omukama eby'ettendo n'amaanyi ge, n'ebyewuunyisa bye yakola." 
Psalms78:5 Mu Yakobo yassaamu ekiragiro, mu Yisirayeli yatongozaamu etteeka: bye yalagira bajjajjaffe, babimanyise abaana baabwe," 
Psalms78:6 ezzadde eririddirira libimanye, n'abaana abatannazaalibwa, ate nabo babuulire abaana baabwe." 
Psalms78:7 Olwo obwesige bwabwe babusse mu Katonda, baleme kwerabira Katonda bye yakola, ebiragiro bye babituukirizenga." 
Psalms78:8 Baleme kubeera nga bajjajjaabwe: ezzadde ery'emputtu, ejjeemu, ezzadde eritalina mutima munywevu, wadde omwoyo ogugumira ku Katonda." 
Psalms78:9 Abantu ba Efurayimu, abalasi b'obusaale, abaafunyamu ne badduka ku lunaku olw'okutabaala," 
Psalms78:10 tebaakuuma ndagaano ya Katonda, ne bagaana okutambulira ku tteeka lye." 
Psalms78:11 Beerabira bye yakola, ebyewuunyisa bye yali aboolese." 
Psalms78:12 Yakola ebyamagero mu maaso ga bajjajjaabwe mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu museetwe gw'e Zowani." 
Psalms78:13 Yayabuluzaamu ennyanja n'abasomosa; amazzi n'agatuuma nga manywevu ng'ekisenge. 
Psalms78:14 Emisana yabakulemberanga n'ekire, ekiro kyonna n'ekitangaala eky'omuliro." 
Psalms78:15 Yayasa enjazi mu ddungu, n'abanywesa amazzi okwenkana ennyanja obungi." 
Psalms78:16 Yafumbukula engezi mu jjinja, amazzi n'agakulukusa ng'emigga." 
Psalms78:17 Naye bo ne bongera okusobya gy'ali, mu ddungu ne bajeemera oyo Ali Waggulu Ddala." 
Psalms78:18 Ne bakema Katonda mu mitima gyabwe, nga beesabira emmere gye baayoyanga." 
Psalms78:19 Katonda baamusoomooza, ne bagamba nti: “Katonda asobola okutegeka olujjuliro mu ddungu?" 
Psalms78:20 Naye bwe yakuba olwazi, amazzi ne gafumbukuka, amazzi ne gakulukuta, naye abantu be anaasobola okubalabira omugaati, yadde okubafunira ennyama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Omukama bwe yakiwulira, n'asunguwala, oluyiira ne lukoleerera Yakobo, n'obusungu bwe ne bweserera ku Yisirayeli," 
Psalms78:22 kubanga tebakkiriza mu Katonda, oba okwesiga okununula kwe." 
Psalms78:23 Naye ye n'alagira ekire waggulu awo, n'aggulawo ensulo z'eggulu," 
Psalms78:24 n'atonnyesa manu balye, n'abawa eŋŋano ey'omu ggulu." 
Psalms78:25 Abantu ne balya omugaati gw'abamalayika; yabasindikira ebyokulya ne bijeeba n'okujeeba. 
Psalms78:26 Yata empewo y'ebugwanjuba okuva mu ggulu, n'aleeta n'amaanyi g'empewo ey'emaserengeta," 
Psalms78:27 Ku bo ennyama n'agitonnyesa ng'enfuufu: ennyonyi z'ebiwaawaatiro ennyingi ng'omusenyu gw'oku nnyanja. 
Psalms78:28 Yaziragira ne zigwa mu lusiisira lwabwe, okwetooloola ebisulo byabwe." 
Psalms78:29 Ne balya, ne bakutta nnyo, kubanga yabawa kye baayoyanga." 
Psalms78:30 Naye okwoya baali tebannakuviirako ddala, nga ne gye balidde ekyabali mu kamwa," 
Psalms78:31 obusungu bwa Katonda ne bubeesererako; n'atta abasajja abaggumivu mu bo, n'akuba abasinga okwegombesa mu Yisirayeli." 
Psalms78:32 Mu ebyo byonna era ne bayongera kwonoona; newandibadde olw'ebyewuunyisa bye, tebaamukkiriza." 
Psalms78:33 Bw'atyo ennaku zaabwe yaleka ne ziyita nga temuli kantu, n'emyaka gyabwe mu bikangabwa." 
Psalms78:34 Bwe yabanga abatta, ng'olwo bamunoonya; beenenyanga ne baddira ddala gy'ali." 
Psalms78:35 Ne bajjukira nti Katonda lwe lwazi lwabwe, nti Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala ye mununuzi waabwe." 
Psalms78:36 Kyokka ate ne bamunyumiikiriza n'akamwa kaabwe, ne bamulimba n'olulimi lwabwe." 
Psalms78:37 Emitima gyabwe tegyali myesimbu gy'ali; tebaali beesigwa eri ndagaano ye. 
Psalms78:38 Kyokka yali musaasizi, n'abasaasira ebyonoono byabwe n'atabazikiriza. Mirundi mingi n'afuga obusungu bwe, n'atakoleeza buswandi bwe bwonna." 
Psalms78:39 Yajjukiranga nti bambi bantu buntu, ekikkowe ekigenda naye ne kitadda." 
Psalms78:40 Mirundi emeka gye baamujeemera mu ddungu, ne bamunakuwaza mu lukoola?" 
Psalms78:41 Emirundi n'emirundi bassa Katonda ku kigezo, ne banyiiza Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms78:42 Tebajjukira buyinza bwe: olunaku lwe yabanunula mu mikono gy'omulabe waabwe," 
Psalms78:43 lwe yakola ebikuuno bye mu Misiri, n'ebyewuunyisa bye mu museetwe gw'e Zowani," 
Psalms78:44 emigga gyabwe n'agifuula omusaayi, nga tebasobola kunywa mu myala gyabwe." 
Psalms78:45 Yabasindikira omuzindo gw'enswera ne zibaluma n'ebikere ne bibazikiriza. 
Psalms78:46 Ebimera byabwe n'abiwa amayanzi; ebibala byabwe n'abiwa enzige. 
Psalms78:47 Emizabbibu gyabwe yagyonoona n'omuzira ogw'amayinja n'emikunyu gyabwe n'agitta n'obutiti. 
Psalms78:48 Ebisolo byabwe n'abigabulira omuzira; n'amagana gaabwe n'agawa eri laddu. 
Psalms78:49 Yabasindikira obusungu bwe obwesera, obuswandi, obunyiivu n'ennaku, kye kibinja kya bamalayika abazikiriza." 
Psalms78:50 Obusungu bwe yabusendera ekkubo; teyabataliza kufa, wabula obulamu bwabwe yabuwaayo eri kawumpuli." 
Psalms78:51 Yatta buli muggulanda yenna mu Misiri; ezzadde erisooka ery'amaanyi gaabwe mu weema za Kaamu. 
Psalms78:52 N'afulumya abantu be ng'eggana; n'abakulemberamu ng'endiga okubayisa mu ddungu. 
Psalms78:53 N'abatwala mu ddembe, tebaalimu kutya; naye abalabe baabwe ennyanja n'ebasaanyaawo." 
Psalms78:54 Yabatuusa mu nsi ye entukuvu; ku lusozi lwe yeefunira ne ddyo we. 
Psalms78:55 Yagobawo amawanga mu maaso gaabwe, n'abagabanyizaamu ku kalulu obusika bwabwe; ebika bya Yisirayeli n'abisenza mu weema zaabyo." 
Psalms78:56 Naye era baakema Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala, ne bamujeemera, tebaakwata mateeka ge." 
Psalms78:57 Beekyusa ne basuula obwesigwa okufaanana nga bajjajjabwe, nga tebakyesigika ng'omutego gw'akasaale omukyamu." 
Psalms78:58 Bamunyiiza n'ebifo byabwe ebigulumivu; baasiikuula obuggya bwe olw'ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebyole. 
Psalms78:59 Katonda bwe yawulira, n'asunguwala nnyo, Yisirayeli n'amwemansulira ddala." 
Psalms78:60 Yayabulira ekisulo kye e Silo, weema gye yali asimbye mu bantu." 
Psalms78:61 Obuyinza bwe n'abuwaayo mu busibe, n'ekitiibwa kye, mu mikono gy'omulabe." 
Psalms78:62 Abantu be n'abawaayo eri ekitala, n'anyiigira obusika bwe." 
Psalms78:63 Omuliro gwasenkenya abavubuka baabwe; ne bawala baabwe embeerera tebaawulira ku nnyimba za mbaga; 
Psalms78:64 bakabona baabwe ne bafa ekitala, ne bannamwandu baabwe tebaalira." 
Psalms78:65 Olwo Omukama n'asisimuka kyenkana ng'ava mu tulo, ng'omusajja awawamuka mu ttamiiro ly'omwenge." 
Psalms78:66 Abalabe baabwe n'abakubya akaddannyuma; n'abaswaza n'oluswala olw'emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms78:67 Ne yeemansula weema ya Yozefu, n'ekika kya Efurayimu teyakironda;" 
Psalms78:68 wabula yalonda ekika kya Yuda, olusozi Siyoni lwe yayagala." 
Psalms78:69 N'azimba ekitukuvu kye ng'eggulu ettumbiivu, ng'ensi gye yabangawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms78:70 Yalonda Dawudi omuweereza we, n'amuggya mu kisibo ky'endiga." 
Psalms78:71 Yamuggya ku kulunda eziyonsa, n'amuleeta, ajje alunde Yakobo abantu be ne Yisirayeli obusika bwe." 
Psalms78:72 Yabalunda mu bulungi obw'omutima gwe, n'abalabirira n'obukugu bw'emikono gye." 
Psalms79:1 Zabbuli ya Asafu Ayi Katonda, amawanga gazinze obusika bwo, gajaajaamizza Ekiggwa kyo ekitukuvu; Yeruzaalemu gakirese kifulukwa." 
Psalms79:2 Emirambo gy'abaweereza bo baagiwa ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga bigirye, n'ennyama y'abatuukirivu bo ebisolo by'oku lukalu." 
Psalms79:3 Omusaayi baaguyiwa ng'amazzi okwetooloola Yeruzaalemu; tewaali aziika. 
Psalms79:4 Tufuuse ekyensonyi mu baliraanwa baffe; enseko n'eky'okunyooma eri abatwetoolodde. 
Psalms79:5 Ayi Mukama, kutuusa wa? Onoonyiiga mirembe gyonna? Obuggya bwo bunaayaka nga muliro?" 
Psalms79:6 Obusungu bwo bumalire ku mawanga agatakukkiriza, ne ku bwakabaka obutakoowoola linnya lyo," 
Psalms79:7 kubanga baavunjaga Yakobo, n'ekisulo kye ne bakizikiriza." 
Psalms79:8 Totusibaako misango gya bajjajjaffe; okusaasira kwo kwanguwe okututuuka, kubanga tunakuwaziddwa nnyo." 
Psalms79:9 Tuyambe ayi Katonda w'obulokofu bwaffe, olw'ekitiibwa ky'erinnya lyo; tuwonye era tusonyiwe ebibi byaffe olw'erinnya lyo." 
Psalms79:10 Lwaki amawanga gandigambye nti: “Katonda waabwe aluwa?” Okuwoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi gw'abaweereza bo ogwayiyibwa kumanyike mu mawanga mu maaso gaffe. 
Psalms79:11 Okusinda kw'abasibe kukutuuke; n'obukulu bw'omukono gwo, taasa abasaliddwa ogw'okufa." 
Psalms79:12 Baliraanwa baffe obaddize emirundi musanvu mu kikondoolo kyabwe okujolonga kwe bakujolongamu, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms79:13 Olwo abantu bo, endiga z'omu ddundiro lyo, tulikugulumiza emirembe gyonna; mu mazadde n'amazadde tulirangirira ettendo lyo." 
Psalms80:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Sosanimu Eduti'. Lwa Asafu. Zabbuli. 
Psalms80:2 Ayi Musumba wa Yisirayeli, tegereza; ggwe afulumya Yozefu ng'eggana, awaŋŋamye wakati mu bakerubi, tangalijja" 
Psalms80:3 mu maaso ga Efurayimu, Benyamiini ne Manasse. Kakamula obuyinza bwo, ojje otulokole." 
Psalms80:4 Ayi Katonda, tuzzeewo, twakize amaaso go tulokolebwe." 
Psalms80:5 Ayi Mukama Katonda w'Amagye, obusungu bwo bunaatuusa wa okuttunkira essaala y'abantu bo?" 
Psalms80:6 Obaliisizza omugaati gw'amaziga; obanywesezza ensuwa n'ensuwa z'amaziga. 
Psalms80:7 Watufuula eky'okusekerera mu baliraanwa baffe; abalabe baffe batukudaalira. 
Psalms80:8 Ayi Katonda w'Amagye, tuzzeewo, twakize amaaso go tulokolebwe." 
Psalms80:9 Waleeta omuzabbibu okuva mu Misiri; wagobawo amawanga n'ogusimba. 
Psalms80:10 Wagwerulirawo ekifo; gwasimba emirandira ne gujjuza ensi. 
Psalms80:11 Ensozi zaabikkibwa ekisiikirize kyagwo, n'amatabi gaagwo ne gabikka entolookyo ez'ekitiibwa." 
Psalms80:12 Gwayagaagaza amatabi gaagwo okutuuka ku Nnyanja, n'emirandira gyagwo okutuuka ku Mugga." 
Psalms80:13 Lwaki wamenyawo olukomera lwagwo, bonna abayita mu kkubo ne beenogera?" 
Psalms80:14 Engiri y'omu kibira yaguzikiriza, n'ebisolo eby'ettale ne bigulya." 
Psalms80:15 Ayi Katonda w'Amagye, kyuka; tunula ng'oyima mu ggulu olabe, lambula omuzabbibu guno," 
Psalms80:16 ekikolo ddyo wo kye yasimba, omwana wo gwe weekuliza." 
Psalms80:17 Baagwokya n'omuliro, baagutema, abo bazikirire n'olukomako lw'amaaso go." 
Psalms80:18 Omukono gwo gubeere ku musajja ali ku ddyo wo; ku mwana w'omuntu gwe weekuliza. 
Psalms80:19 Olwo tetugenda kukuvaako nate. Tuzzeemu obulamu, tulikoowoola erinnya lyo." 
Psalms80:20 Ayi Katonda w'Amagye, tuzzeewo, twakize amaaso go tulokolebwe." 
Psalms81:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga Gittiti. Lwa Asafu. 
Psalms81:2 Mujagulize Katonda amaanyi gaffe; mukubire emizira Katonda wa Yakobo. 
Psalms81:3 Muyimbe ennyimba ezinyuma, mukube obugoma, ennanga ey'eggono n'entongooli." 
Psalms81:4 Mufuuwe eŋŋombe ku Kuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'omwezi nga gwa ggabogabo, ku lunaku lwaffe olukulu." 
Psalms81:5 Kubanga kino kiragiro eri Yisirayeli; tteeka lya Katonda wa Yakobo. 
Psalms81:6 Yakiteerawo Yozefu ng'etteeka, lwe yali ava mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nawulira olulimi lwe nali simanyi:" 
Psalms81:7 “Nabatikkula omugugu ku bibegaabega byabwe, emikono gyabwe nagiteewuluzaako ekisero." 
Psalms81:8 ‘Mu nnaku wampanjagira ne nkuwonya; nakwanukulira mu kire eky'enjota; nakugeza ku mazzi g'e Meriba. 
Psalms81:9 Muwulire, bantu bange, nzija kubalabula: Yisirayeli, singa nno ompulirizza." 
Psalms81:10 Mu ggwe tebeerangayo lubaale w'ebweru, era tovunnamiranga lubaale mugwira." 
Psalms81:11 Nze Mukama Katonda wo eyakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Yasamya akamwa ko, nzija kukajjuza." 
Psalms81:12 Naye abantu bange tebaawulira ddoboozi lyange; Yisirayeli teyaŋŋondera.’ 
Psalms81:13 Kyennava mbawaayo mu bukakanyavu bw'omutima gwabwe, batambule nga bwe beeteeba." 
Psalms81:14 Singa nno abantu bange bampuliriza, Yisirayeli n'atambulira mu makubo gange!" 
Psalms81:15 Amangu n'embiro nandinyigirizza abalabe baabwe, n'omukono gwange nandiguzizza ku babali obubi." 
Psalms81:16 Abakyawa Omukama bandibundadde mu maaso ge, n'ekibonerezo kyabwe kyandibaddewo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms81:17 Naye ggwe nandikuliisizza n'eŋŋano esinga obulungi; nandikukkusizza n'omubisi gw'enjuki ogw'omu lwazi.” 
Psalms82:1 Zabbuli ya Asafu. Katonda akubiriza olukiiko olutukuvu, awa ensala ye mu 'bakatonda' wakati:" 
Psalms82:2 “Munaatuusa wa okulamula nga temuli benkanya ne mwekubiira eri ababi? 
Psalms82:3 Mutaase anyigiriziddwa n'omunafu; musalire mu bwenkanya omwavu n'omunaku. 
Psalms82:4 Mununule anyigiriziddwa n'adooba; mubawonye omukono gw'omubi.” 
Psalms82:5 “Tebalina magezi era tebategeera, batambulira mu nzikiza; emisingi gyonna egy'ensi ginyeenyezeddwa." 
Psalms82:6 Nagamba nti: ‘Muli bakatonda, mwenna muli baana b'Ali Waggulu Ddala.’" 
Psalms82:7 Kyokka mulifa ng'abantu, muligwa nga buli mufuzi yenna.”" 
Psalms82:8 Situka, ayi Katonda, lamula ensi, kubanga amawanga gonna busika bwo." 
Psalms83:1 Luyimba. Zabbuli ya Asafu. 
Psalms83:2 Ayi Katonda, tosirika busirisi, tobeera awo bubeezi, tobondeera, ayi Katonda." 
Psalms83:3 Anti laba abalabe bo bagugumuse, n'abakukyawa basituse." 
Psalms83:4 Beekobaana okukolera bantu bo enkwe; bateesa okukolera obubi abo be weekisiza. 
Psalms83:5 Bagamba nti: “Mujje, tubazikirize ng'eggwanga, erinnya lya Yisirayeli lireme kuddayo kujjukirwa.”" 
Psalms83:6 Yee! Bonna enkwe bazikolera wamu; beekobaanye okukulwanyisa. 
Psalms83:7 Weema za Edomu n'Abayisimayeli, Mowabu ne bazzukulu ba Aguri;" 
Psalms83:8 Gebali, Ammoni ne Amaleki, Filisitiya n'abantu b'e Tiiro." 
Psalms83:9 N'Abassuri babeegasseeko bawagire bazzukulu ba Loti. 
Psalms83:10 Bakole ng'ab'e Midiyaani, nga bwe wakola Sisera ne Yabini mu Kiwonvu Kisoni," 
Psalms83:11 abaazikiririra e Endori, ne bafuuka ng'obusa ku ttaka." 
Psalms83:12 Abakungu baabwe nabo bafaananye nga Korebu ne Zeebi; abagabe baabwe bonna, nga Zeba ne Zalumunna," 
Psalms83:13 abaagamba nti: “Twezze amalundiro ga Katonda.” 
Psalms83:14 Ayi Katonda wange, bafuule ng'ebikoola ebikalu, ng'essubi mu kibuyaga." 
Psalms83:15 Ng'omuliro bwe guvunjaga ebibira, n'omumuli bwe gukoleeza ensozi," 
Psalms83:16 naawe bw'oba obayigganya n'omuyaga gwo, batiise ne kikuŋŋunta wo." 
Psalms83:17 Amaaso gaabwe gabikke n'obuswavu, abantu balyoke banoonye erinnya lyo, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms83:18 Bakwatibwe ensonyi, batye emirembe gyonna, bazikirize mu baswavu." 
Psalms83:19 Bamanye nti ggwe, nnannyini linnya Omukama, nti ggwe wekka ggwe osukkulumye ku nsi." 
Psalms84:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga Gittiti. Lwa batabani ba Kora. Zabbuli. 
Psalms84:2 Ekisulo kyo nga kyagalibwa, ayi Mukama w'Amagye." 
Psalms84:3 Omwoyo gwange guyaayaana ne guzirika olw'empya z'Omukama; omutima gwange n'omubiri gwange bijaguliza mu Katonda omulamu. 
Psalms84:4 Enkazaluggya nayo yeezuulira enju, n'akataayi nako ekisu we kassa obwana bwako, kumpi n'Omwaliiro gwo, ayi Mukama w'Amagye; Kabaka wange era Katonda wange." 
Psalms84:5 Beesiimye abasula mu nnyumba yo; bulijjo bayimba ettendo lyo. 
Psalms84:6 Beesiimye abantu abasanga amaanyi gaabwe mu ggwe, emitima gyabwe abagitadde ku makubo go." 
Psalms84:7 Bwe baba bayita mu kiwonvu ky'emiti gya balusaamu, bakifuula kifo kya nsulo; enkuba ya Ddumbi ekijjuza ebitaba." 
Psalms84:8 Batambula beyongera maanyi ku maanyi; okutuusa nga buli omu alabise mu maaso ga Katonda mu Siyoni. 
Psalms84:9 Ayi Mukama Katonda w'Amagye, wulira essaala yange, tega okutu ayi Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:10 Ayi Katonda tunuulira engabo yaffe; kyukiza amaaso eri omusiige wo. 
Psalms84:11 Mazima olunaku olumu luti mu mpya zo, lusinga endala olukumi awalala; Waakiri okubeera omuggazi ku nnyumba ya Katonda, okusinga okusula mu weema z'ababi." 
Psalms84:12 Anti Omukama Katonda ye njuba, ye ngabo; Omukama y'awa okuganja n'ekitiibwa; tamma birungi abo abatambulira mu bulungi." 
Psalms84:13 Ayi Mukama w'Amagye, yeesiimye omuntu akwesiga." 
Psalms85:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa batabani ba Kora. Zabbuli. 
Psalms85:2 Wagirira ekisa, ayi Mukama, ensi yo; wakomyawo abasibe ba Yakobo." 
Psalms85:3 Wasonyiwa ebyonoono by'abantu bo; ebibi byabwe byonna wabibikkako. 
Psalms85:4 Wakyukiza eri obuswandi bwo bwonna; waleka obusungu bwo obwesera. 
Psalms85:5 Tuzzeewo, ayi Katonda Mulokozi waffe; ssa ebbali okunyiiga kwo kw'otunyiigiddemu." 
Psalms85:6 Olitusunguwalira mirembe gyonna? Obusungu bwo olibutuusa ku mazadde gonna? 
Psalms85:7 Tootuzzeemu bulamu nate abantu bo ne bakusanyukiramu? 
Psalms85:8 Ayi Mukama, tugirire ekisa, era otulokole." 
Psalms85:9 Nzija kuwuliriza Omukama Katonda ky'agamba; asuubiza ddembe abantu be n'abatuukirivu be, n'eri abo abadda gy'ali mu mazima." 
Psalms85:10 Mazima, obulokozi bwe buli kumpi n'abamutya; ekitiibwa kye kiriba mu nsi yaffe." 
Psalms85:11 Ekisa n'obwesigwa birisisinkana, obutuukirivu n'eddembe birinywegeragana." 
Psalms85:12 Obwesigwa busituka mu nsi, n'obutuukirivu buyima mu ggulu ne butunula wansi." 
Psalms85:13 Kituufu, Omukama aligaba ebirungi, n'ensi yaffe erireeta ekibala kyayo." 
Psalms85:14 Obutuukirivu bulimukulemberamu, ne butegekera ebigere bye ekkubo." 
Psalms86:1 Essaala. Ya Dawudi. Tega okutu, ayi Mukama, nnyanukula, anti ndi munaku, ndi mwavu." 
Psalms86:2 Kuuma omwoyo gwange kubanga ndi mutuufu; ayi Katonda wange, lokola omuweereza wo, obwesige bwe buli mu ggwe." 
Psalms86:3 Nsaasira, ayi Mukama, kubanga nkukoowoola olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms86:4 Sanyusa omwoyo gw'omuweereza wo, kubanga gy'oli, ayi Mukama, gye nsitulidde omwoyo gwange." 
Psalms86:5 Anti ggwe, ayi Mukama, oli mulungi, era osaasira; ojjudde ekisa eri bonna abakukoowoola." 
Psalms86:6 Wuliriza, ayi Mukama, essaala yange; tegereza eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange." 
Psalms86:7 Ku lunaku nga ndi mu buyinike, ndikukoowoola, kubanga olimpulira." 
Psalms86:8 Teri akwenkana mu balubaale, ayi Mukama, era teri mulimu gufaanana mulimu gwo." 
Psalms86:9 Amawanga gonna ge wakola, galijja ne gakusinza ggwe, ayi Mukama, era galibbiramu erinnya lyo." 
Psalms86:10 Kubanga oli wa kitalo, okola ebyewuunyisa, ggwe wekka ggwe Katonda." 
Psalms86:11 Njigiriza, ayi Mukama, ekkubo lyo, nange nditambulira mu mazima go; kumaakuma omutima gwange, gutye erinnya lyo." 
Psalms86:12 Ndikugulumiza, ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, n'omutima gwange gwonna, ndibbiramu erinnya lyo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms86:13 Kubanga okwagala kw'onjagalamu kusuffu; omwoyo gwange waguggya emagombe ekkuzimu. 
Psalms86:14 Ayi Katonda, abeekuza bannumbye, n'ekibinja ky'abakambwe kinoonya omwoyo gwange, naawe tebakufa nako." 
Psalms86:15 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, oli Katonda ow'ekisa, omusaasizi, tosunguwala mangu, ojjudde ekisa n'obwesigwa." 
Psalms86:16 Kyukira gye ndi onsaasire; amaanyi go gawe omuweereza wo, era dduukirira omwana w'omuzaana wo." 
Psalms86:17 Mpa akabonero akalaga obulungi, abankyawa balabe, baswale, olw'okubeera ggwe, ayi Mukama, onnyambye n'onkubagiza." 
Psalms87:1 Lwa batabani ba Kora. Zabbuli. Luyimba. Emisingi gyakyo wagissa ku lusozi olutukuvu. 
Psalms87:2 Omukama ayagala emiryango gya Siyoni okusinga ebisulo byonna ebya Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Ebikwogerwako bya kitiibwa, ayi kibuga kya Katonda." 
Psalms87:4 “Ndibalira Rakabu ne Babiloni mu bammanyi; era Filisitiya ne Tiiro wamu ne Kuusi ndigamba nti: ‘Bano bazaalibwa omwo.’ ” 
Psalms87:5 Ne Siyoni balimwogerako nti: “Ono n'oli bazaalibwa omwo; Ali Waggulu Ddala yennyini ye yakinywezaawo.” 
Psalms87:6 Omukama aliwandiika mu kitabo ky'amawanga: “Ono azaalibwa omwo.” 
Psalms87:7 Bayimba nga bakooloobya nti: “Ensulo zange zonna ziri mu ggwe.” 
Psalms88:1 Luyimba. Zabbuli ya batabani ba Kora. Eri omuyimbisa. Lugenda nga 'Makalati'. Lwa kuyimba. Masukili ya Emani Omwezira. 
Psalms88:2 Ayi Mukama, Katonda w'obulokofu bwange, emisana n'ekiro ndaajana mu maaso go." 
Psalms88:3 Essaala yange etuuke gy'oli; omulanga gwange gutegere okutu. 
Psalms88:4 Anti omwoyo gwange gujjudde ennaku, n'obulamu bwange busemberedde amagombe." 
Psalms88:5 Mbaliddwa mu b'okuserengeta mu bunnya; ndi ng'omuntu ataliimu twanyi. 
Psalms88:6 Ekiriri kyange kiri mu bafu; ndi ng'abattiddwa, abeebase mu ntaana, b'otokyajjukira n'akatono, abasalise ku mukono gwo." 
Psalms88:7 Ontadde mu bunnya obuwanvu, mu nzikiza, ekkuzimu." 
Psalms88:8 Obusungu bwo bunzitooweredde, ombutikidde n'amayengo go gonna." 
Psalms88:9 Bannange bonna obanzigyeko, onfudde ekyenyinyalwa gye bali; nzigaliddwa, sisobola kufuluma." 
Psalms88:10 Amaaso gange gafumye olw'ennaku, nkulaajanira buli lunaku, ayi Mukama; emikono gyange ngyanjadde mu maaso go." 
Psalms88:11 Abafu b'okolera ebyamagero byo? Kozzi abafu be balisituka ne bakutenda? 
Psalms88:12 Mu ntaana waliwo alinyumizaayo ekisa kyo, n'obwesigwa bwo mu bazikirira?" 
Psalms88:13 Ebyamagero byo bimanyibwa bali mu nzikiza? N'obutuukirivu bwo mu nsi y'abeerabiddwa? 
Psalms88:14 Nze, ayi Mukama, nkuwanjagira; ku makya essaala yange ejja gy'oli." 
Psalms88:15 Lwaki, ayi Mukama, onneemansula, onkisa amaaso go?" 
Psalms88:16 Okuva mu buvubuka ndi munaku, nsuliridde kufa. Okutiisa kwo kunzitooweredde, nnyenjebuse." 
Psalms88:17 Obusungu bwo bwansaabala, n'okutiisa kwo kunsaanyizzaawo." 
Psalms88:18 Olunaku lwonna byanneetooloola ng'amazzi, nzenna ne bimmira." 
Psalms88:19 Abanjagala ne mikwano gyange wabanzigyako; enzikiza, ye munnange." 
Psalms89:1 Masukili ya Etani Omwezira. 
Psalms89:2 Ekisa ky'Omukama ndikiyimba emirembe gyonna; mu mazadde n'amazadde ndirangirira mu kamwa kange obwesigwa bwo. 
Psalms89:3 Anti ekisa kyo kyateekebwawo emirembe n'emirembe; obwesigwa bwo wabunyweza ng'eggulu. 
Psalms89:4 Wagamba nti: “Nkubye endagaano ne gwe neerondedde, ndayiridde Dawudi omuweereza wange." 
Psalms89:5 Nzija kunyweza ezzadde lyo emirembe gyonna; nnamulondo yo nzija kugizimba mu mazadde n'amazadde.” 
Psalms89:6 Ayi Mukama, eggulu lirigulumiza ebyamagero byo n'obwesigwa bwo, mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abatuukirivu." 
Psalms89:7 Kale, mu bire ani eyenkana Omukama? Ani mu baana ba Katonda afaanana Omukama?" 
Psalms89:8 Katonda wa ntiisa mu lukiiko lw'abatuukirivu, akuba encukwe okukira bonna abamwebunguludde." 
Psalms89:9 Ayi Mukama Katonda w'Amagye, ani ali nga ggwe? Oli wa buyinza, ayi Mukama, n'obwesigwa bwo bukwetoolodde." 
Psalms89:10 Ofuga ennyanja esuukidde; okkakkanya amayengo gaayo nga gatumbidde. 
Psalms89:11 Walinnyirira Rakabu okwenkana abattiddwa; abalabe bo n'obabunya emiwabo n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi. 
Psalms89:12 Eggulu liryo n'ensi yiyo; wassaawo enkulungo y'ensi na byonna ebigijjuzizza. 
Psalms89:13 Watonda amambuka n'amaserengeta; Tabori ne Kerumoni zisanyukira mu linnya lyo. 
Psalms89:14 Olina omukono ogw'amaanyi; omukono gwo gwa buyinza, ddyo wo asukkulumye." 
Psalms89:15 Obutuukirivu n'obutuufu gwe musingi gwa nnamulondo yo; ekisa n'obwesigwa bikukulemberamu. 
Psalms89:16 Beesiimye abantu abamanyi okujaguza, abo abatambulira, ayi Mukama, mu kitangaala ky'amaaso go." 
Psalms89:17 Basanyukira mu linnya lyo olunaku lwonna; bagulumiza obutuukirivu bwo. 
Psalms89:18 Anti ggwe ttendo ly'amaanyi gaabwe, olw'okubeera ekisa kyo amaanyi gaffe galiyitimuka." 
Psalms89:19 Anti engabo yaffe ya Mukama, ne kabaka waffe wa Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms89:20 Wayogera olwo ng'olabise, eri Omutuufu wo n'ogamba nti: “Omuzira mmugemulidde amaanyi, ngulumizza omuvubuka gwe nnonze mu bantu." 
Psalms89:21 Nzudde Dawudi omuweereza wange; mmusiize omuzigo gwange omutukuvu; 
Psalms89:22 Omukono gwange gulimubeerako bulijjo; omukono gwange gulimugumyanga. 
Psalms89:23 Omulabe tajja kumulumba, n'omubi talimunyigiriza." 
Psalms89:24 Abalabe be ŋŋenda kubabetenta mu maaso ge, n'abamukyawa ŋŋenda kubaseseggula." 
Psalms89:25 Obwesigwa bwange n'ekisa birimubeerako, era mu linnya lyange obuyinza bwe buliyitimuka." 
Psalms89:26 Omukono gwe nzija kugussa ku nnyanja, ddyo we, ku migga." 
Psalms89:27 Yennyini alimpita nti: ‘Ggwe Kitange, Katonda wange, Olwazi lwange, Omununuzi wange.’" 
Psalms89:28 Era nange nzija kumufuula muggulanda, ow'ekitiibwa okukira bakabaka bonna ab'ensi." 
Psalms89:29 Emirembe gyonna ndimukuumira ekisa kyange, n'endagaano yange naye teribaako gy'edda." 
Psalms89:30 Ezzadde lye ndirinywezaawo emirembe gyonna, ne nnamulondo ye ndigiwangaaza ng'eggulu." 
Psalms89:31 Abaana be bwe balimenya etteeka lyange, ne batagoberera biragiro byange," 
Psalms89:32 bwe balityoboola amateeka gange, bamala batakwata biragiro byange," 
Psalms89:33 omusango gwabwe ndigubonereza n'omuggo, n'ekyonoono kyabwe n'obuswanyu." 
Psalms89:34 Kyokka ekisa kyange sirikimuggyako, era siriba mulimba mu bwesigwa bwange." 
Psalms89:35 Sirityoboola ndagaano yange, yadde okujjulula emimwa gyange kye gyayogera." 
Psalms89:36 Ndayidde lumu obutuukirivu bwange; Dawudi sigenda kumulimba: 
Psalms89:37 ezzadde lye lya kusigalawo mirembe gyonna, ne nnamulondo ye mu maaso gange eriwangaala ng'enjuba." 
Psalms89:38 Eriba nnywevu ng'omwezi emirembe gyonna, omujulirwa ku ggulu atagooka.”" 
Psalms89:39 Naye ate kati weemansudde, okasuse eri, n'Omusiige wo omusunguwalidde." 
Psalms89:40 Endagaano n'omuweereza wo ogyabulidde, n'engule ye ogijaajaamizza mu nfuufu." 
Psalms89:41 Ebisenge bye byonna obyabuluzza; ebigo bye byonna obizikirizza. 
Psalms89:42 Abayise bonna olese ne bamunyaga; afuuse eky'okusekerera mu baliraanwa be. 
Psalms89:43 Ddyo w'abalabe be omusukkulumizza, abalabe bonna obajjuzizza essanyu." 
Psalms89:44 Obwogi bw'ekitala kye wabutunuza mabega; mu kulwana tewamuwanirira. 
Psalms89:45 Ekitiibwa kye kyonna okikomezza, ne nnamulondo ye ogikasuse eri ku ttaka." 
Psalms89:46 Obudde bwe obw'obuvubuka obusazeeko; omubisse ensonyi. 
Psalms89:47 Kutuusa wa, ayi Mukama? Oneekweka butavaayo? Obusungu bwo bunaabumbujja ng'omuliro kutuusa wa?" 
Psalms89:48 Jjukira obulamu bwange bwe buli obumpi, ne bwe watonda abantu bonna nga mpaamu kantu." 
Psalms89:49 Aliba ani alibeerawo n'atalaba ku lumbe, n'awonya omwoyo gwe mu mukono gw'amagombe?" 
Psalms89:50 Ayi Mukama, ekisa eky'edda luli kizze wa, ekyo kye walayirira Dawudi mu bwesigwa bwo?" 
Psalms89:51 Ayi Mukama, jjukira okujoogebwa kw'omuweereza wo, ne bwe nnumwa mu mutima olw'ebivumo by'amawanga," 
Psalms89:52 abalabe bo bye banvumamu, ayi Mukama, kwe bajoozeemu Omusiige wo mu buli ky'ayiseemu." 
Psalms89:53 Omukama agulumizibwe emirembe gyonna. Amiina, amiina." 
Psalms90:1 Essaala. Ya Musa musajja wa Katonda. Ayi Mukama, ggwe obadde obuddukiro bwaffe okuva ddi na ddi." 
Psalms90:2 Nga n'ensozi tezinnazaalibwa, enkulungo y'ensi nga tennakolebwa, yadde amawanga, okuva ddi n'okutuusa ddi ggwe w'oli, ayi Katonda." 
Psalms90:3 Abantu obazza mu nfuufu n'ogamba nti: “Muddeeyo, mmwe abaana b'abantu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Anti mu maaso go emyaka olukumi giri ng'olunaku olwa jjo olwakayita, oba ng'ekisisimuka eky'omu kiro." 
Psalms90:5 Abantu obeerawo, bali ng'ekirooto, oba ng'omuddo ogwanya ku makya;" 
Psalms90:6 ku makya gumulisa ne gudda buto, naye akawungeezi okutuuka nga guwotose, gukaze." 
Psalms90:7 Tumaliddwawo obusungu bwo; obuswandi bwo bututekemudde. 
Psalms90:8 Ebyonoono byaffe obitadde mu maaso go, n'ensobi zaffe enkise ozaanise mu maaso go." 
Psalms90:9 Anti ennaku zaffe zonna ziyise otusunguwalidde; emyaka gyaffe twagimala ng'ekikkowe obukkowe. 
Psalms90:10 Emyaka gyaffe gyonna wamu giwera nsanvu, mpozzi kinaana ku ba maanyi; ate emingi ku gyo gijjudde mitawaana na nnaku; giyita mangu, nga tubuzeewo." 
Psalms90:11 Ani amanyi amaanyi g'obusungu bwo? Anti obusungu bwo bwenkana n'ekitiibwa ekikusaanira. 
Psalms90:12 Tuyigirize okubalirira ennaku zaffe obulungi, tufune omutima ogw'amagezi." 
Psalms90:13 Weddemu, ayi Mukama, kutuusa wa? Abaweereza bo bakwatirwe ekisa." 
Psalms90:14 Ku makya tukkuse mangu n'ekisa kyo, tujaguze, tusanyuke ennaku zaffe zonna." 
Psalms90:15 Tuwe tusanyuke okwenkana ennaku ziri lwe watubonereza, okwenkana n'emyaka gye twalaba ennaku." 
Psalms90:16 Abaweereza bo balagibwe by'okola, n'abaana baabwe balagibwe ekitiibwa kyo." 
Psalms90:17 Ekisa ky'Omukama Katonda waffe kitubeereko; tunywereze omulimu gw'emikono gyaffe, nyweza omulimu gw'emikono gyaffe." 
Psalms91:1 Asula mu buddukiro bw'Ali Waggulu Ddala, abeera mu kisiikirize ky'Omuyinza wa buli kantu," 
Psalms91:2 agamba Omukama nti: “Ye bwe buddukiro bwange, amaanyi gange, Katonda wange, gwe neesiga.”" 
Psalms91:3 Kubanga alikuwonya ekitimba ky'abayizzi ne kawumpuli ddekabusa. 
Psalms91:4 Alikubikka n'ebiwaawaatiro bye, oliddukira wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro bye; obwesigwa bwe yeeriba engabo yo n'ekizibawo." 
Psalms91:5 Tolitya kyekango kya kiro, n'akasaale akasooza emisana," 
Psalms91:6 kawumpuli ayitaayita mu nzikiza, n'akabenje akaaya mu ttuntu." 
Psalms91:7 Olukumi lulikugwa erudda, n'akakumi ku gwa ddyo gwo, naye ggwe tekalikusemberera." 
Psalms91:8 Ggwe olyerolera n'amaaso go, oliraba ababi bwe babonerezebwa." 
Psalms91:9 Kubanga Omukama bwe buddukiro bwo, Ali Waggulu Ddala gwe wafuula ekisulo kyo," 
Psalms91:10 akabi tekalikujjira, n'akabenje tekalisemberera weema yo." 
Psalms91:11 Kubanga yalagira bamalayika be ku ggwe bakukuume buli wonna w'oyita. 
Psalms91:12 Balikutwalira mu mikono gyabwe, oleme kukoona kigere kyo ku jjinja." 
Psalms91:13 Olitambulira ku mpologoma n'essalambwa; olirinnyirira empologoma ne ssessota. 
Psalms91:14 “Kubanga yannywererako, ndimuwonya, ndimutaasa, kubanga yategeera erinnya lyange." 
Psalms91:15 Alinkoowoola, ne mmuwulira, ndiba naye mu buyinike; ndimuwonya ne mmuwa ekitiibwa." 
Psalms91:16 Ennaku ze ndiziwanvuya ne mumatiza, ndimwoleka obulokozi bwange.”" 
Psalms92:1 Zabbuli. Luyimba lwa Sabbaato. 
Psalms92:2 Kirungi okugulumiza Omukama, n'okuyimbira erinnya lyo, ayi Ali Waggulu Ddala," 
Psalms92:3 okulangirira ku makya ekisa kyo n'obwesigwa bwo ekiro," 
Psalms92:4 ku ndongo ey'enkoba ekkumi ne ku ntongooli, n'oluyimba olw'oku nnanga." 
Psalms92:5 Kubanga onsanyusa ne by'okola, ayi Mukama; njaguza olw'ebyo emikono gyo bye gikola." 
Psalms92:6 By'okola nga binene, ayi Mukama, ebirowoozo byo nga bya magezi nnyo!" 
Psalms92:7 Omuntu atalina magezi, tamanya, n'omusiru bino tabitegeera:" 
Psalms92:8 nti ababi ne bwe balyanya ng'omuddo, n'abakola obubi bonna ne bwe balitinta, era balizikirira emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms92:9 Sso ggwe, ayi Mukama, osukkulumye emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms92:10 Bo abalabe bo, ayi Mukama, bo abalabe bo balizikirira; bonna abayisa obubi balibuna emiwabo." 
Psalms92:11 Ogulumizza obwanga bwange okwenkana obw'embogo; onjiiridde nzenna omuzigo. 
Psalms92:12 Eriiso lyange lyeroledde abalabe bange bwe bagwa, n'okutu kwange kwewuliridde okusimbulizibwa kw'ababi abankyawa." 
Psalms92:13 Omutuukirivu alyanya ng'olukindu, alikula ng'entolookyo z'oku Lebanoni." 
Psalms92:14 Ke baasimbibwa mu nnyumba y'Omukama, balyanyiza mu mpya za Katonda waffe." 
Psalms92:15 Ne mu bukadde, baliba bakyabala, nga bajjudde obulamu n'amakoola." 
Psalms92:16 Balyoke balangirire ng'Omukama bwali omutuufu; olwazi lwange, mu ye temuli bugwenyufu." 
Psalms93:1 Omukama alamula, ayambadde ekitiibwa; Omukama ayambadde ekitibwa, yeekembye obuyinza; enkulungo y'ensi nnywevu, tesobola kunyeenyezebwa." 
Psalms93:2 Entebe yo nnywevu okuva ddi na ddi, okuva emirembe gyonna ggwe w'oli." 
Psalms93:3 Amataba gasitudde, ayi Mukama, amataba gasitudde eddoboozi lyago; amataba gasitudde okuwuluguma kw'amayengo gaago." 
Psalms93:4 Naye mu maanyi, asinga eddoboozi ly'amasingiisira; asinga amayengo g'ennyanja; Omukama waggulu eyo w'amaanyi." 
Psalms93:5 Amateeka go manywevu gulugulu; obutuukirivu bwo buwoomya Ekiggwa kyo gye buva ne gye bugenda, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms94:1 Ayi Mukama Katonda, awoolera eggwanga, Katonda awoolera eggwanga, laga ekitangaala kyo." 
Psalms94:2 Situka, ayi Omulamuzi w'ensi; abeekuza basasule ekibasaanidde." 
Psalms94:3 Ababi banaatuusa wa, ayi Mukama, abakola ebibi banaatuusa wa okusagambiza?" 
Psalms94:4 Bafukumula bigambo bya lunkulu; abakola ebyambyone beewaana bwewaanyi. 
Psalms94:5 Balirinnyirira abantu bo, ayi Mukama, banyigiriza obusika bwo." 
Psalms94:6 Batugumbula nnamwandu n'omuyise, ne batta ne mulekwa." 
Psalms94:7 Ne bagamba nti: “Omukama talaba, Katonda wa Yakobo tassaayo mwoyo.”" 
Psalms94:8 Mmwe abasiru mu bantu, mutegeere; mmwe abatategeera, muligeziwala ddi?" 
Psalms94:9 Eyasimbawo amatu tawulira? Yadde eyawanga eriiso talaba? 
Psalms94:10 Agunjula amawanga tabonereza? Ayigiriza abantu abulwa amagezi? 
Psalms94:11 Omukama amanyi ebirowoozo by'omuntu, nti temuli kantu." 
Psalms94:12 Omuntu oyo yeesiimye gw'ogunjula, ayi Mukama, gw'oyigiriza n'etteeka lyo," 
Psalms94:13 mukenderezeeko ku nnaku ze ez'akabenje, okutuusa omubi lw'alisimirwa obunnya." 
Psalms94:14 Anti Omukama talisuulirira bantu be; talyabulira busika bwe. 
Psalms94:15 Anti ennamula eriddamu okugoberera obutuukirivu, na bonna ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu baligigoberera." 
Psalms94:16 Ani anaasituka annwanyisize abayisa obubi? Ani anaayimirira annwanyisize abakola ebyambyone? 
Psalms94:17 Omukama taba kunnyamba, mu bbanga ttono nandibadde mu kifo ky'akasiriikiriro." 
Psalms94:18 Bwe nagamba nti: “Ekigere kyange kiseeredde,” ekisa kyo, ayi Mukama, nga kimpanirira." 
Psalms94:19 Okweraliikirira bwe kweyongera mu mutima gwange, ggwe okunkubagiza kisanyula omutima gwange." 
Psalms94:20 Abalamuzi ababi bayinza okuba mikwano gyo, abo abaleeta okubonaabona nga bagootaanya etteeka?" 
Psalms94:21 Beekuŋŋaanya wamu ne beekobera omutuukirivu, ne basalira ogw'okufa atazzanga musango." 
Psalms94:22 Omukama y'afuuse ekigo kyange; Katonda wange afuuse olwazi lw'obuddukiro bwange. 
Psalms94:23 Alibasasula olw'okweyisa obubi; alibazikiriza olw'obwonoonefu bwabwe; Omukama Katonda waffe alibazikiriza. 
Psalms95:1 Mujje tuyimbire Omukama mu ssanyu; tukubire emizira Olwazi lw'obulokofu bwaffe. 
Psalms95:2 Tujje mu maaso ge nga twebaza; tumukubire emizira mu maloboozi n'ennyimba. 
Psalms95:3 Kubanga Omukama ye Katonda omukulu; kabaka omukulu asukkulumye balubaale bonna. 
Psalms95:4 Mu mukono gwe mwe muli ekkuzimu ly'ensi n'entikko z'ensozi nazo zize. 
Psalms95:5 Ennyanja yiye, anti ye yagikola, n'olukalu emikono gye gye gyalukola." 
Psalms95:6 Mujje tusinze, tweyale; tukubire amavi Omukama eyatukola," 
Psalms95:7 anti yennyini ye Katonda waffe, naffe ffe ggwanga ly'omu ddundiro lye, endiga z'omukono gwe. Olwa leero singa muwulira eddoboozi lye;" 
Psalms95:8 muleke kugugubya mitima gyammwe ng'e Meriba, nga luli e Massa mu ddungu," 
Psalms95:9 bajjajjammwe gye bankemera ne bangeza, sso baali balabye bye nakola." 
Psalms95:10 Neetamwa eggwanga eryo okumala emyaka amakumi ana. Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Bano bantu ba mutima ogwawaba; tebamanyi makubo gange.” 
Psalms95:11 Kyennava ndayira mu busungu bwange nti: “Tebaliyingira n'akamu mu kiwummulo kyange.” 
Psalms96:1 Muyimbire Omukama oluyimba oluggya; muyimbire Omukama, mmwe ensi yonna." 
Psalms96:2 Muyimbire Omukama, mutendereze erinnya lye; mulangirire obulokozi bwe buli olukedde." 
Psalms96:3 Mubuulire mu mawanga ekitiibwa kye, mu bantu bonna, ebyewuunyisa bye." 
Psalms96:4 Kubanga Omukama mukulu, atenderezebwa nnyo, wa ntiisa okusinga balubaale bonna." 
Psalms96:5 Anti balubaale b'amawanga bifaananyi, ye Omukama yakola eggulu." 
Psalms96:6 Ekitiibwa n'obukulu bimukulemberamu, obuyinza n'ettendo biri mu kitukuvu kye." 
Psalms96:7 Muwe Omukama, mmwe ebika by'abantu, muwe Omukama ekitiibwa n'obuyinza" 
Psalms96:8 muwe Omukama ekitiibwa ky'erinnya lye; muleete ekitambiro, mujje mu mpya ze." 
Psalms96:9 Musinze Omukama mu kwakaayakana kw'obutukuvu bwe. Ayi ensi yonna, mukankane mu maaso ge." 
Psalms96:10 Mwogere mu mawanga nti: “Omukama alamula.” Ensi yabangibwawo nga nnywevu, terinyeenyezebwa; aliramula amawanga mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms96:11 Eggulu lijaganye n'ensi esanyuke; ennyanja ewulugume na byonna ebigijjuddemu; 
Psalms96:12 ettale lisagambize na byonna ebiririmu. Olwo emiti gy'omu kibira gyonna giriyoogaana n'essanyu 
Psalms96:13 mu maaso g'Omukama, kubanga ajja, kubanga ajja okulamula ensi; alifuga ensi mu butuukirivu, n'abantu, mu bwesigwa bwe." 
Psalms97:1 Omukama afuga, ensi ejaguze; ebizinga byonna bisanyuke." 
Psalms97:2 Ebire n'enzikiza ekutte bimwebunguludde, obutuukirivu n'obutuufu gwe musingi gwa nnamulondo ye." 
Psalms97:3 Omuliro gwe gumukulemberamu, ne gwokya abalabe be ku njuyi zonna." 
Psalms97:4 Ebimyanso bye bimulisa ensi; enkulungo y'ensi etunuulira n'ekankana. 
Psalms97:5 Ensozi zisaanuuka ng'envumbo mu maaso g'Omukama, mu maaso g'Omukama w'ensi yonna." 
Psalms97:6 Eggulu lirangirira obutuukirivu bwe, n'amawanga gonna galaba ekitiibwa kye." 
Psalms97:7 Bonna abasinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebyole baswadde; abo abeewaanira mu bitaliimu; mwenna bamalayika be, mumusinze." 
Psalms97:8 Siyoni awulira n'asanyuka, n'ebibuga bya Yuda ne bijaguza olw'okubeera ennamula yo, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms97:9 Kubanga ggwe, ayi Mukama, osukkulumye ku nsi yonna; osukkulumye nnyo n'okusinga balubaale bonna." 
Psalms97:10 Mukyawe ekibi mmwe abaagala Omukama, kubanga akuuma emyoyo gy'abatuukirivu be, n'abalokola mu mikono gy'ababi." 
Psalms97:11 Ekitangaala kiviirayo abatuukirivu, n'essanyu eri ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu." 
Psalms97:12 Abatuukirivu, musanyukire mu Mukama, mutendereze erinnya lye." 
Psalms98:1 Zabbuli. Muyimbire Omukama oluyimba oluggya, kubanga akoze ebyewuunyisa; ddyo we n'omukono gwe omutukuvu bimuwanguzza." 
Psalms98:2 Omukama amanyisizza obulokozi bwe, alaze obutuufu bwe eri amawanga." 
Psalms98:3 Ajjukidde ekisa kye, n'obwesigwa bwe eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli; enkingi zonna ez'ensi zirabye obulokozi bwa Katonda." 
Psalms98:4 Ayi ensi yonna, mukubire Omukama emizira, musaakaanye ennyimba, mutendereze." 
Psalms98:5 Muyimbire omukama ku nnanga, ku nnanga n'amaloboozi amanyuvu," 
Psalms98:6 n'amakondeere n'amaloboozi g'eŋŋombe; mukube emizira mu maaso g'Omukama Kabaka. 
Psalms98:7 Ennyanja ewulugume na byonna ebigijjuddemu, ensi na bonna abagisulamu." 
Psalms98:8 Emigga gikube mu ngalo, n'ensozi zisaakaanyize wamu olw'essanyu," 
Psalms98:9 mu maaso g'Omukama kubanga azze; azze okulamula ensi; ajja kulamula ensi mu butuukirivu, n'abantu be mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms99:1 Omukama afuga, amawanga gakankane; awaŋŋamye wakati mu bakerubi, ensi eyuuguume." 
Psalms99:2 Omukama mukulu mu Siyoni; asukkulumye ku bantu bonna. 
Psalms99:3 Bagulumize erinnya lyo ekkulu era ery'entiisa; Ye mutuukirivu. 
Psalms99:4 Kabaka wa buyinza, ayagala etteeka; ggwe wassaawo obwenkanya, wassaawo obutuufu n'obutuukirivu mu Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Mugulumize Omukama Katonda waffe, mweyale ku muziziko gw'ebigere bye. Ye mutuukirivu." 
Psalms99:6 Musa ne Aroni bamenyerwa mu bakabona be, ne Samweli, mu abo abaakoowoola erinnya lye; baakoowoola Omukama, naye n'abaanukula." 
Psalms99:7 Yayogera nabo mu mpagi y'ekire; baakwata ebiragiro bye, n'etteeka lye yabawa." 
Psalms99:8 Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, wabaanukula, Wali Katonda waabwe asonyiwa, naye era awoolera eggwanga olw'ensobi zaabwe." 
Psalms99:9 Mugulumize Omukama Katonda waffe, mweyale awali olusozi lwe olutukuvu, kubanga Omukama Katonda waffe mutuukirivu." 
Psalms100:1 Zabbuli. Ya kwebaza. 
Psalms100:2 Ensi zonna, mukubire Omukama emizira, muweereze Omukama nga mujaganya, muyingire gy'ali nga mujaguza." 
Psalms100:3 Mumanye ng'Omukama ye Katonda, yennyini ye yatukola, tuli babe, ggwanga lye, endiga z'eddundiro lye." 
Psalms100:4 Muyingire mu miryango gye nga mwebaza, mu mpya ze nga mutendereza; mumwebaze, mugulumize erinnya lye." 
Psalms100:5 Anti Omukama mulungi, n'ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna; obwesigwa bwe bubeerawo amazadde gonna." 
Psalms101:1 Lwa Dawudi. Zabbuli. Nzija kuyimba ekisa n'obwesigwa, ayi Mukama, nzija kukuyimbira." 
Psalms101:2 Nzija kwegendereza ntambulire mu makubo agataliiko musango; olijja ddi gye ndi? Nditambula n'omutima ogutaliiko musango mu nnyumba yange. 
Psalms101:3 Sirissa mu maaso gange kintu kitagwana; ndikyawa ebikolwa by'abasobya, era tebalinneesibako." 
Psalms101:4 Abantu ab'emitima emyonoonefu banambeeranga wala, siryekwanya na kibi." 
Psalms101:5 Ageya munne mu nkiso ndimuzikiriza, omwepansi n'eyeekulumbaza siribagumiikiriza." 
Psalms101:6 Amaaso gange galiba ku beesigwa mu nsi, batuule nange; ow'amakubo agataliiko musango, oyo y'alimpeereza." 
Psalms101:7 Omulimba talisula mu nnyumba yange; atayogera bituufu talinnyimirira mu maaso. 
Psalms101:8 Buli makya nzija kukutulangako ababi bonna ku nsi, mmale mu kibuga ky'Omukama bonna abakola ebitali bituufu." 
Psalms102:1 Essaala. Y'abonaabona ayenjebuse, ennaku ye yonna ng'agissa mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Psalms102:2 Ayi Mukama, wulira essaala yange, n'okuwanjanga kwange kukutuukeko." 
Psalms102:3 Tonkweka maaso go, kati nga ndi mu buyinike; kyukiza gye ndi okutu kwo, bwe nkukoowoola yanguwa okumpulira." 
Psalms102:4 Anti ennaku zange zifuumuuka nga mukka; n'amagumba gange gookya ng'akabiga. 
Psalms102:5 Ndi mukubeekube, mpotose ng'omuddo; neerabira n'okulya emmere yange." 
Psalms102:6 Olw'okusinda omwanguka, amagumba gankwatidde ku lususu." 
Psalms102:7 Ndi ng'ekiwuugulu mu ddungu; nfuuse ng'ekiwuugulu mu matongo. 
Psalms102:8 Neebaka naye otulo tetujja; ndi ng'ekinyonyi ssekinnoomu ku kasolya. 
Psalms102:9 Abalabe bange bansojja olunaku lwonna, abo abansekerera beeyamba erinnya lyange okuvumirira." 
Psalms102:10 Evvu ndirya bumere, amaziga ngatabula wamu ne bye nnywa." 
Psalms102:11 Olw'obusungu bwo obungi, onsitudde n'onnindiggula eri." 
Psalms102:12 Ennaku zange zifuuse ng'ekisiikirize eky'akawungeezi; ŋŋenda nkala ng'omuddo. 
Psalms102:13 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, owaŋŋamye emirembe gyonna, bulijjo w'oli era ojjukirwa mu mazadde n'amazadde." 
Psalms102:14 Ojja kusituka oddiremu Siyoni, kubanga obudde butuuse omusaasire, obudde butuuse." 
Psalms102:15 Anti abaweereza bo amayinja ge bagaagala; n'amafunfugu ge gabakwasa ekisaasaazi. 
Psalms102:16 Ab'amawanga balissaamu erinnya lyo ekitiibwa, ne bakabaka bonna ab'ensi balitya ekitiibwa kyo." 
Psalms102:17 Kubanga Omukama alizimba Siyoni, n'alabika mu kitiibwa kye." 
Psalms102:18 Aliwuliriza okuwanjaga kw'abanaku, talinyooma ssaala yaabwe." 
Psalms102:19 Bino biwandiikirwe ezzadde eririddako, ezzadde eritannatondebwa liryoke ligulumize Omukama:" 
Psalms102:20 “Omukama yayima waggulu mu kitukuvu kye n'atunula wansi, yayima mu ggulu n'atunula ku nsi," 
Psalms102:21 awulire okusinda kw'abasibe, asumulule abasaliddwa ogw'okufa." 
Psalms102:22 Erinnya ly'Omukama lirangirirwe mu Siyoni, n'ettendo lye mu Yeruzaalemu," 
Psalms102:23 abantu bwe balikuŋŋaana awamu, era n'obwakabaka, okuweereza Omukama.”" 
Psalms102:24 Amaanyi gange agakomezza mu kkubo; ennaku z'obulamu bwange azisazeeko. 
Psalms102:25 Ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Katonda wange, Tontwalira mu makkati ga nnaku zange; emyaka egigyo gimala mazadde na mazadde." 
Psalms102:26 Mu masookera ddala wabangawo ensi n'eggulu mulimu gwa mikono gyo. 
Psalms102:27 Ebyo birizikirira, naye ggwe osigalawo; byonna biriggweerera ng'ekyambalo; obikyusa ng'ekyambalo ne bifuuka." 
Psalms102:28 Naye ggwe osigala ggwe omu, n'emyaka gyo tegiriiko kkomo." 
Psalms102:29 Abaana abaweereza balitebenkera, n'ezzadde lyabwe lirinywera mu maaso go.”" 
Psalms103:1 Ya Dawudi. Ayi mwoyo gwange, gulumiza Omukama, na buli kindimu, tendereza erinnya lye ettukuvu." 
Psalms103:2 Ayi mwoyo gwange, gulumiza Omukama, leka kwerabira byonna ebirungi bye yakukolera." 
Psalms103:3 Asonyiwa ensobi zo zonna, awonya endwadde zo zonna." 
Psalms103:4 Anunula obulamu bwo mu bunnya; akutikkira engule ey'ekisa n'obusaasizi. 
Psalms103:5 Akukkusa n'ebirungi nga bwe weegomba, obuvubuka bwo ne budda buto ng'obw'empungu." 
Psalms103:6 Omukama akola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu; n'ennamula eri bonna abanyigirizibwa. 
Psalms103:7 Amakubo ge yagategeeza Musa, n'ebikolwa bye Abayisirayeli." 
Psalms103:8 Omukama ayagala era musaasizi, tasunguwala mangu, ajjudde ekisa," 
Psalms103:9 tavunaana lutaggwa, tasiba busungu mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms103:10 Tatuyisa nga bwe kisaanidde bibi byaffe, tatusasula ng'agerera ku nsobi zaffe." 
Psalms103:11 Anti eggulu nga bwe lyewanise waggulu ku nsi, n'ekisa kye bwe kyenkana obungi ku abo abamutya." 
Psalms103:12 Ng'obuvanjuba bwe bwesuubye obugwanjuba, n'emisango gyaffe bw'agissa ewala ne we tuli." 
Psalms103:13 Nga kitaawe w'abaana bw'asaasira, n'Omukama bw'asaasira atyo abamutya." 
Psalms103:14 Anti yennyini amanyi bwe twakolebwa, ajjukira nga tuli nfuufu." 
Psalms103:15 Ennaku omuntu z'amala ziri nga muddo, ayanya ng'ekimuli eky'ettale;" 
Psalms103:16 empewo olukifuuwako, nga tekikyaliwo, n'ekifo kyakyo nga tekikyakijjukira." 
Psalms103:17 Naye okuva ddi n'okutuusa ddi ekisa ky'Omukama kiri ku bamutya, n'obutuukirivu bwe ku baana b'abaana," 
Psalms103:18 ne ku abo abakuuma endagaano ye, ne bajjukira okutuukiriza ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms103:19 Omukama entebe ye yagissa mu ggulu, n'obwakabaka bwe bufuga wonna." 
Psalms103:20 Bamalayika be, mugulumize Omukama, mmwe bannamige abazira, abatuukiriza by'alagira, abawulira ekigambo kye." 
Psalms103:21 Amagye ge mwenna, mugulumize Omukama, mmwe abaweereza be abakola ky'ayagala." 
Psalms103:22 Mugulumize Omukama, emirimu gye mwenna, yonna eyo gy'afuga. Ayi mwoyo gwange, gulumiza Omukama!" 
Psalms104:1 Ayi mwoyo gwange, gulumiza Omukama! Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, ng'oli mukulu nnyo! Oyambadde ekitiibwa n'obukulu." 
Psalms104:2 Ekitangaala okyambadde ng'omunagiro; eggulu olibambye ng'olutimbe; 
Psalms104:3 olubiri lwo olwa waggulu oluzimba ku mazzi; ebire obifuula kigaali kyo, otambulira ku biwaawaatiro by'empewo." 
Psalms104:4 Empewo ogifuula babaka bo, n'ennimi z'omuliro baweereza bo." 
Psalms104:5 Wawanga ensi ku bikondo byayo; terinyeenyezebwa emirembe n'emirembe. 
Psalms104:6 Wagibikka ennyanja ng'ekyambalo; amazzi gaagulumira okusinga ensozi. 
Psalms104:7 Bwe waboggola, ne gadduka; eddoboozi lyo bwe lyabwatuka, ne gabulawo." 
Psalms104:8 Gaalinnya ensozi ne gakkirira ebiwonvu okwolekera ekifo kye wagateerawo. 
Psalms104:9 Wagateekerawo ekkomo lye gatasukka; tegaliddayo kubuutikira nsi. 
Psalms104:10 Ogira emigga ne gifumbukula mu biwonvu; gikulukutira mu makkati g'ensozi. 
Psalms104:11 Buli kisolo eky'ettale kwe kinywa, endogoyi z'ettale ne zetta ennyonta." 
Psalms104:12 Ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga bikuba awo kumpi ekisulo kyabyo; biyimbira eyo mu matabi. 
Psalms104:13 Oyima mu lubiri lwo waggulu n'ofukirira ensi; ensi ekkuse ebibala by'emirimu gyo. 
Psalms104:14 Ebisolo obimereza omuddo, n'ebimera biyambe omuntu; asobole okuggya emmere mu ttaka," 
Psalms104:15 n'evviini esanyusa omutima gw'omuntu; n'omuzigo ogunyiriza amaaso ge, n'omugaati oguzza endasi mu mutima gwe." 
Psalms104:16 Emiti gy'Omukama gifukiriddwa bulungi, entolookyo z'oku Lebanoni ze yasimba." 
Psalms104:17 Omwo ebinyonyi mwe bizimba ebisu; ssekanyolya ekisu kye kiri mu matabi ga sipulaasi. 
Psalms104:18 Ensozi empanvu za nsirabo; enjazi bwe buddukiro bwa buwakayima. 
Psalms104:19 Yakola omwezi okulamba obudde, n'enjuba emanyi w'egwira." 
Psalms104:20 Oleeta enzikiza, ekiro ne kimerawo, olwo ebisolo byonna eby'ettale ne bigoma." 
Psalms104:21 Empologoma ento ziwuluguma olw'omuyiggo; zeenoonyeza ewa Katonda emmere. 
Psalms104:22 Enjuba bw'evaayo, nga ziddayo, nga zeebaka mu nfo zaazo." 
Psalms104:23 Olwo omuntu n'afuluma okugenda ku mirimu gye, okukola omulimu gwe okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Psalms104:24 Ayi Mukama, bye wakola nga bingi bulala! Byonna wabikoza magezi; ensi ejjudde ebitonde byo." 
Psalms104:25 Tunuulira ennyanja. Ekutte eyo n'eyo, evulula ebitonde butabala, ebisolo ebitono n'ebinene." 
Psalms104:26 Okwo amaato kwe gatawukira; ne Goonya gwe wakola azannyire omwo. 
Psalms104:27 Bino byonna birindirira ggwe, obiwe kye birya ng'obudde bwabyo butuuse." 
Psalms104:28 Bw'obiwa, nga bigikuŋŋaanya; bw'ofunyulula ekikonde kyo, ne bikkuta ebirungi." 
Psalms104:29 Bw'okweka amaaso go, nga bitekemuka; bw'omalamu omukka gwabyo, nga bitondoka, nga biddayo mu nfuufu yaabyo." 
Psalms104:30 Bw'osindika Mwoyo wo, nga bitondebwa, enfaanana y'ensi n'ogizza buto." 
Psalms104:31 Ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kibeerewo emirembe gyonna; Omukama asanyukire mu bye yakola. 
Psalms104:32 Atunuulira ensi n'ekankana, akwata ku nsozi ne zittunka omukka." 
Psalms104:33 Ndiyimbira Omukama obulamu bwange bwonna; ndiyimbira Katonda wange ettendo ebbanga lyonna nga nkyaliwo. 
Psalms104:34 Emboozi yange nno emusanyuse; nze ndisanyukira mu Mukama. 
Psalms104:35 Aboonoonyi baggweewo ku nsi, n'ababi babulewo. Ayi Mwoyo gwange, gulumiza Omukama! Alleluuya!" 
Psalms105:1 Mwebaze Omukama, mukoowoole erinnya lye; bye yakola mubimanyise mu mawanga." 
Psalms105:2 Mumuyimbire, mumuyimbire ettendo; munyumye ku byewuunyisa bye byonna." 
Psalms105:3 Mutendereze erinnya lye ettukuvu, emitima gy'abanoonya Omukama gisanyuke." 
Psalms105:4 Munoonye Omukama, munoonye amaanyi ge, munoonye bulijjo amaaso ge." 
Psalms105:5 Mujjukire ebyewuunyisa bye yakola, ebikuuno bye, n'ennamula y'akamwa ke." 
Psalms105:6 Ayi ezzadde lya Yiburayimu omuweereza we, ayi bazzukulu ba Yakobo abalondemu be!" 
Psalms105:7 Yennyini ye Mukama, Katonda waffe; ennamula ye eri wonna mu nsi." 
Psalms105:8 Ajjukira endagaano ye emirembe gyonna, ekigambo kye yalagira okutuusa ku mazadde olukumi," 
Psalms105:9 endagaano gye yakola ne Yiburayimu, ekirayiro kye yalayirira Yizaake." 
Psalms105:10 Ku Yakobo n'akimuteerawo ng'etteeka, ku Yisirayeli ng'endagaano ey'olubeerera," 
Psalms105:11 nti: “Ggwe ndikuwa ensi Kanaani, ng'omugabo gw'obusika bwo.”" 
Psalms105:12 Bwe baali bakyali batono ddala, mpa we bazira, ate abasenze obusenze," 
Psalms105:13 baabunganga nga bava mu ggwanga lino bagenda mu liri; bava mu bwakabaka buno bagenda mu buli," 
Psalms105:14 naye teyaganya n'omu kubanyigiriza, olw'okubeera bo yakoma ku bakabaka nti:" 
Psalms105:15 “Temukwata ku basiige bange, abalanzi bange temubakola kabi.”" 
Psalms105:16 Yayita enjala okujja mu nsi, n'aggyawo buli kandibasakiridde emmere." 
Psalms105:17 Yasindika omusajja okubasookayo, Yozefu yali atundiddwa mu buddu." 
Psalms105:18 Ebigere bye baabirunguulira mu nvuba; ensingo ye n'eyambikibwa ekikoligo ky'ekyuma," 
Psalms105:19 okutuusa nga kye yali agambye kituukiridde, ng'ekigambo ky'Omukama kiraze bw'ataliiko musango." 
Psalms105:20 Kabaka n'atumayo, n'amusumulula, omufuzi w'amawanga n'amuta." 
Psalms105:21 Yamufuula omukulu w'ennyumba ye, akulira ebibye byonna." 
Psalms105:22 Agunjule abakungu be nga ye bw'alaba, n'abakadde abayigirize amagezi." 
Psalms105:23 Awo Yisirayeli n'ayingira mu nsi y'e Misiri; Yakobo n'asengukira mu nsi y'e Kaamu. 
Psalms105:24 N'awa abantu be ne bazaala nnyo, ne baba bangi okusinga abalabe baabwe." 
Psalms105:25 N'akyusa emitima gyabwe, bakyawe abantu be, beekobere abaweereza be." 
Psalms105:26 Awo kwe kutuma Musa omuweereza we, ne Aroni gwe yali alonze." 
Psalms105:27 Baakola mu bo obubonero bwe, ebikuuno mu nsi y'e Kaamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yasindika enzikiza ensi n'agikwasa kazigizigi; naye era baawaganyalira ekigambo kye. 
Psalms105:29 Amazzi gaabwe n'agafuula omusaayi, ebyennyanja byabwe n'abitta." 
Psalms105:30 Ensi yaabwe n'ebuna wonna ebikere, ne bituuka ne munda mu lubiri lwa kabaka." 
Psalms105:31 Yalagira, ne wajja omuzindo gw'enswera n'ensiri mu nsi yaabwe yonna." 
Psalms105:32 Mu kifo ky'enkuba, yabakuba omuzira; eggulu ne limyansa wonna mu nsi yaabwe." 
Psalms105:33 Yakuba emizabbibu n'emikunyu gyabwe; n'azikiriza emiti wonna mu nsi yaabwe. 
Psalms105:34 Yalagira, enzige ne zijja, n'amayanzi agatabalika bungi." 
Psalms105:35 Byasennya buli kimera kyonna mu nsi yaabwe; ne birya ebirime mu nnimiro zaabwe. 
Psalms105:36 Yatta buli muggulanda yenna mu nsi yaabwe, ezzadde erisooka ery'amaanyi gaabwe gonna." 
Psalms105:37 Olwo n'abaggyayo nga bakwatiranye ffeeza ne zaabu, ne mu bika byabwe temwali muyongobevu." 
Psalms105:38 Misiri yasanyuka bwe baagenda, kubanga entiisa yaabwe yali ebakutte." 
Psalms105:39 N'abunyaawo ekire okubabikkirira, n'omuliro okumulisa ekiro." 
Psalms105:40 Baasaba n'abaleetera entiitiri, n'abakkusa n'omugaati ogw'omu ggulu." 
Psalms105:41 Yaggula olwazi, amazzi ne gafumbukuka, ne gakulukuta ng'omugga mu ddungu." 
Psalms105:42 Anti ng'ajjukira ekisuubizo kye ekitukuvu, kye yali agambye Yiburayimu omuweereza we." 
Psalms105:43 Yaggyayo abantu be mu ssanyu, abalondemu be, wakati mu kujaganya." 
Psalms105:44 N'abawa ensi z'amawanga ne basikira abantu bye baateganira," 
Psalms105:45 balyoke bakwate ebiragiro bye, batuuse n'amateeka ge. Alleluuya." 
Psalms106:1 Alleluuya. Mutendereze Omukama, kubanga mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms106:2 Ani alittottola eby'amaanyi Omukama bye yakola, alitontoma amatendo ge gonna?" 
Psalms106:3 Beesiimye abakwata etteeka, abakola ebikolwa eby'obutuukirivu buli kabanga." 
Psalms106:4 Nzijukira, ayi Mukama, bw'oba olaga ekisa kyo abantu bo; nnyamba lw'olibalokola." 
Psalms106:5 Ndabe ebirungi by'abalondemu bo, nsanyukire wamu n'abantu bo, ntenderereze wamu n'obusika bwo." 
Psalms106:6 Twayonoona nga bajjajjaffe bwe baakola; twasobya, twakola bubi." 
Psalms106:7 Bajjajjaffe mu Misiri tebaategeera byewuunyisa bye wakola, tebajjukira bungi bwa kisa kyo; baanyiiza Ali Waggulu Ddala ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa." 
Psalms106:8 Naye ye n'abawonya olw'okubeera erinnya lye, amanyise bw'atyo obuyinza bwe." 
Psalms106:9 N'aboggolera Ennyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa, n'ekala yonna; n'abayisa mu ddubi ng'abayita mu ddungu." 
Psalms106:10 N'abawonya emikono gy'ababakyaye, yabalokola mu mikono gy'omulabe." 
Psalms106:11 Amazzi ne gabuutikira abababonyaabonya, ne watawonawo n'omu." 
Psalms106:12 Olwo ne bakkiriza ebigambo bye, ne bayimba ettendo lye." 
Psalms106:13 Ate tebaalwa, ne beerabira bye yakola, tebaalindirira na ntegeka ze." 
Psalms106:14 Mu ddungu ne bayoya ebitayoyeka, ne bageza Katonda mu lukoola." 
Psalms106:15 Yabawa bye baasaba, naye n'abasindikira ekirwadde ekikenenya." 
Psalms106:16 Mu lusiisira baakwatirwa Musa obuggya, ne Aroni omutukuze w'Omukama." 
Psalms106:17 Ettaka ne lyasama, ne limira Datani; ne libuutikira ekibinja kya Abiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Omuliro ne gutumbuka mu kibinja kyabwe, ennimi z'omuliro ne zookya ababi." 
Psalms106:19 Ku Korebu baakola akayana, ne basinza ekifaananyi kye baafukuta mu kyuma." 
Psalms106:20 Ne bawaanyisa ekitiibwa kya Katonda, ne bakiwa ekifaanaanyi ky'ente erya omuddo." 
Psalms106:21 Beerabira Katonda eyabalokola, eyali akoze ebinene mu Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 ebyewuunyisa mu nsi y'e Kaamu, n'eby'entiisa ku Nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa." 
Psalms106:23 Kwe kugamba nti ajja kubazikiriza, taba kubeera Musa mulonde we, eyayimirira mu maaso ge n'obuzira, awugule obusungu bwe, aleme kubazikiriza." 
Psalms106:24 Baanyooma ensi eyeegombebwa; tebakkiriza kigambo kye. 
Psalms106:25 Ne beemulugunyiza mu weema zaabwe; tebaagondera ddoboozi lya Mukama. 
Psalms106:26 N'alayira nga bw'ajja okubattira mu ddungu," 
Psalms106:27 asaasaanye ezzadde lyabwe mu b'amawanga, abasaasaanye wonna mu nsi." 
Psalms106:28 Beegatta ku Baali ow'e Pewori, ne balya ebyonziira bya balubaale abafu." 
Psalms106:29 Ne bamunyiiza n'ebikolwa byabwe ebibi, kawumpuli n'abalukawo mu bo." 
Psalms106:30 Naye Finekasi n'asituka n'awa ennamula ye, kawumpuli n'akoma." 
Psalms106:31 Ekyo kyamusiimisa ne kimubalirwa ng'obutuukirivu mu mazadde n'amazadde emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms106:32 Era baamunyiiriza ku mazzi g'e Meriba, Musa ne bimujjira bubi olw'okubeera bo;" 
Psalms106:33 kubanga baanyiiza omwoyo gwe, n'ayogera eby'ensumattu n'emimwa gye." 
Psalms106:34 Tebaazikiriza b'amawanga Omukama nga bwe yali abalagidde," 
Psalms106:35 wabula beetabika n'ab'amawanga, ne bakoppa empisa zaabwe." 
Psalms106:36 Baasinza ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale; ne bibafuukira omutego. 
Psalms106:37 Batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe ne babatambirira emisambwa. 
Psalms106:38 Bwe batyo ne bayiwa omusaayi ogutaliiko musango, omusaayi gwa batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe be baawongeranga ebifaananyi bya Kanaani ebya balubaale. Ensi n'ejaajaamizibwa olw'omusaayi." 
Psalms106:39 Beeyonoona n'ebikolwa byabwe, ne bakola obwamalaaya mu ebyo bye baakolanga." 
Psalms106:40 Bwe butyo obusungu bw'Omukama ne bweserera ku bantu be, ne yeetamwa obusika bwe." 
Psalms106:41 N'abawaayo mu mikono gy'ab'amawanga, ababakyaye ne babafuga." 
Psalms106:42 Abalabe baabwe baabalabya ennaku, ne bassibwa mu buyinza bwabwe." 
Psalms106:43 Mirundi mingi yabanunulanga, naye bo baasigala bajeemu mu bye baateesanga, ne baggweekerera mu bwonoonyi bwabwe." 
Psalms106:44 Yalaba okubonaabona kwabwe, ng'amaze okuwulira okulaajana kwabwe;" 
Psalms106:45 n'ajjukira endagaano ye ku lwabwe, n'akkakkana olw'okubeera ekisa kye ekingi." 
Psalms106:46 N'abaleetera okusaasirwa abo bonna abaabatwala mu busibe. 
Psalms106:47 Tulokole, ayi Mukama Katonda waffe; tukuŋŋaanye, tuggyeeyo mu mawanga, tulyoke tugulumize erinnya lyo ettukuvu, twetendere mu ttendo lyo." 
Psalms106:48 Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli atenderezebwe emirembe n'emirembe; abantu bonna bagambe nti: “Amiina!” Alleluuya! 
Psalms107:1 Mwebaze Omukama, kubanga mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms107:2 Omukama be yanunula bwe batyo bwe baba bagamba, be yanunula mu mikono gy'omulabe," 
Psalms107:3 ne be yakuŋŋaanya okuva mu nsi, ng'abaggya ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba, emambuka n'emaserengeta." 
Psalms107:4 Abamu baabungeetera mu ddungu, mu nkoola; tebaasanga kkubo libatuusa mu kibuga kya kusengamu." 
Psalms107:5 Baalumwa enjala n'ennyonta, ne bayenjebuka." 
Psalms107:6 Ne balaajanira Omukama mu buyinike bwabwe, n'abawonya mu nnaku zaabwe." 
Psalms107:7 N'abatwalira mu kkubo eggolokofu, eri ekibuga mwe banaasenga." 
Psalms107:8 Bagulumize Omukama olw'ekisa kye ekingi, n'olw'ebyewuunyisa by'akolera abaana b'abantu." 
Psalms107:9 Kubanga omuyonta yamuvubiriza, n'omuyala n'amukkusa ebirungi." 
Psalms107:10 Abalala baatuula mu kazigizigi ne mu nzikiza ekutte, nga basibe abali mu kunyolwa ne mu njegere ez'ebyuma," 
Psalms107:11 kubanga baali bajeemedde Katonda bye yayogera, nga bagaye Ali Waggulu Ddala kye yateesa." 
Psalms107:12 Kwe kutoowaza omutima gwabwe n'okukuluusana; baasinzittuka, naye ne wabula adduukirira." 
Psalms107:13 Ne balaajanira Omukama mu buyinike bwabwe, n'abawonya mu nnaku zaabwe." 
Psalms107:14 N'abaggyayo mu kazigizigi, mu nzikiza ekutte; enjegere zaabwe n'azikutula." 
Psalms107:15 Bagulumize Omukama olw'ekisa kye ekingi, n'olw'ebyewuunyisa by'akolera abaana b'abantu." 
Psalms107:16 Kubanga yamenya enzigi ez'ekikomo, n'emiyingo egy'ebyuma n'agikutulamu." 
Psalms107:17 Abandi baasiriwala olw'amakubo gaabwe amajeemu, ne babonaabona olw'ebisobyo byabwe." 
Psalms107:18 Omwoyo gwabwe ne gutamwa buli mmere; ne batuuka ne ku mugo gw'entaana. 
Psalms107:19 Ne balaajanira Omukama mu buyinike bwabwe, n'abawonya mu nnaku zaabwe." 
Psalms107:20 Yatuma ekigambo kye n'abawonya, n'abakwakkulayo mu ntaana zaabwe." 
Psalms107:21 Bagulumize Omukama olw'ekisa kye ekingi n'olw'ebyewuunyisa by'akolera abaana b'abantu. 
Psalms107:22 Bamutambirire ekitambiro eky'okumwebaza, banyumye n'essanyu bye yakola." 
Psalms107:23 Ate abamu baasaabala ku nnyanja mu maato, baali basuubuzi ku mayanja amanene." 
Psalms107:24 Baalaba Omukama by'akola, n'ebyewuunyisa bye mu buziba." 
Psalms107:25 Yayogera bwogezi, n'agugumula omuyaga, ne gusitula amayengo." 
Psalms107:26 Gaatumbiira okutuuka ku ggulu, ne gakka okutuuka ku ntobo, emitima gyabwe ne gitekemuka olw'akabenje." 
Psalms107:27 Baataga ne bazunga ng'abatamidde, n'amagezi ne gabaggwaamu." 
Psalms107:28 Ne balaajanira Omukama mu buyinike bwabwe, n'abaggya mu nnaku zaabwe." 
Psalms107:29 Yakkakkanya omuyaga ne gufuuka mulaala; amayengo g'ennyanja ne gateeka. 
Psalms107:30 Ne basanyuka okulaba nga gakkakkanye, n'abagobya ku mwalo gwe baali baagala." 
Psalms107:31 Bagulumize Omukama olw'ekisa kye ekingi, n'olw'ebyewuunyisa by'akolera abaana b'abantu." 
Psalms107:32 Era bamugulumize mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abantu; bamutende ne mu lukiiko lw'abakadde. 
Psalms107:33 Emigga yagifuula eddungu, emyala gy'amazzi n'agifuula ettaka erirakasidde." 
Psalms107:34 Ensi engimu n'agifuula olunnyo, olw'obwonoonefu bw'abantu abaalimu." 
Psalms107:35 Eddungu yalifuula ekuŋŋaaniro ly'amazzi, ensi enkalu n'agifuula emyala gy'amazzi." 
Psalms107:36 Eyo gye yassa abayala babeere, ne bakubayo ekibuga mwe basobola okusenga." 
Psalms107:37 Ne basimba ennimiro, ne basimba emizabbibu, ne batuusa amakungula mangi." 
Psalms107:38 Yabawa omukisa, ne baala nnyo, n'amagana gaabwe teyagaganya kukendeera." 
Psalms107:39 Naye ate baakendeera ne batoowazibwa olw'okunyigirizibwa, endasano n'ennaku." 
Psalms107:40 Oyo asonyiwaza abakungu, yagenda ng'ababungeeseza mu ddungu eteri kkubo." 
Psalms107:41 Kyokka abanaku yabataasa mu kubonaabona kwabwe, amaka gaabwe n'agaaza ng'amagana." 
Psalms107:42 Abalungi baalaba ne basanyuka; obwonoonefu ne bubuniza akamwa kaabwo. 
Psalms107:43 Oyo omugezi yekkaanye bino yeefumiitirize ekisa ky'Omukama ekingi. 
Psalms108:1 Oluyimba. Zabbuli ya Dawudi. 
Psalms108:2 Omutima gwange munywevu, ayi Katonda, ndiyimba, ne nkooloobya ettendo n'ekitiibwa kyange kyonna." 
Psalms108:3 Zuukuka, ntongooli n'ennanga. Nzija kuzuukusa amaliiri." 
Psalms108:4 Ayi Omuyinza, ndikutenda mu bantu; ndikuyimba mu mawanga." 
Psalms108:5 Kubanga ekisa kyo kinene, kisukka n'eggulu; obwesigwa bwo butuuka eyo ku bire." 
Psalms108:6 Ayi Katonda, osukkulumizibwe n'okuyisa eggulu. Ekitiibwa kyo kibeere ku nsi yonna."
