Psalms108:7 Baganzi bo balyoke balokolebwe, tuwonye n'omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, otuwulire." 
Psalms108:8 Katonda yayogera ng'ayima mu Kitukuvu kye nti: “Ndijaganya, Sekemu ndimugabanyaamu, n'Ekiwonvu Sukkoti ndikipima." 
Psalms108:9 Gileyaadi wange, ne Manasse wange; Efurayimu ye nkufiira y'omutwe gwange; Yuda ye ddamula wange." 
Psalms108:10 Mowabu lwe luleeba mwe nnaabira; ku Edomu kwe nkasuka engatto zange; ku Filisitiya, ndikuba emizira.”" 
Psalms108:11 Ani anantwala mu kibuga okuli ekigo? Ani anantuusa mu Edomu? 
Psalms108:12 Si ggwe, Katonda eyatwessammula, ayi Katonda, atakyagenda na magye gaffe?" 
Psalms108:13 Tuyambeko okulwanyisa omulabe, kubanga obuyambi bw'omuntu temuli nsa." 
Psalms108:14 Katonda ng'ali naffe, tunaakola na buzira; ajja kulinnyirira abalabe baffe." 
Psalms109:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Ya Dawudi. Zabbuli. Ayi Katonda, ettendo lyange, tosirika," 
Psalms109:2 kubanga omubi n'omulimba baasamizza akamwa kaabwe okunnumba; banjogerako n'olulimi olulebula," 
Psalms109:3 Banneebunguluzza nzenna ebigambo eby'obukyayi; bannumba awatali nsonga. 
Psalms109:4 Okunsiima olw'okubaagala banvunaana buvunaanyi; naye nze nakanya ssaala. 
Psalms109:5 Ekirungi bakinsasulamu na kibi; olw'okubaagala, bansiima na bukyayi." 
Psalms109:6 Bagamba nti: “Teekawo omuntu omubi amulumirize; ku ddyo we wayimirirewo amuvunaana. 
Psalms109:7 Bw'awozesebwa, afulume nga gumusinze; essaala ye efuukemu omusango." 
Psalms109:8 Ennaku ze zibeere ntono; omulimu gwe omulala agutwale. 
Psalms109:9 Abaana be bafuuke bamulekwa, ne mukazi we afuuke nnamwandu." 
Psalms109:10 Abaana be bafuuke babungeese, basabirizi; bagobebwe mu nnyumba zaabwe ezifuuse ebifulukwa." 
Psalms109:11 Omuwozi abowe ebibye byonna, ab'ebweru boonoone byonna bye yateganira." 
Psalms109:12 Wabulewo amwoleka ekisa, yadde asaasira obwana bwe." 
Psalms109:13 Ezzadde lye likutulweko; erinnya lye lisangulibwewo mu zzadde eriddirira," 
Psalms109:14 ebyonoono bya bajjajjaabe bijjukirwe mu maaso g'Omukama, n'ekibi kya nnyina kireme kusangulibwawo." 
Psalms109:15 Ensobi zaabwe zisigale bulijjo mu maaso g'Omukama, asangulirewo ddala ekyo kwe bandijjuukiriddwa ku nsi." 
Psalms109:16 “Kubanga teyalowooza ku kugirira kisa, wabula okuyigganya omunaku n'omunkuseere, n'okwagala okutta akabiriddwa mu mutima." 
Psalms109:17 Yayagalanga okuvumirira, ebikolimo nno bimugwire; omukisa teyagwagala, kale nno gumwesambe." 
Psalms109:18 Yayambala ekikolimo ng'olugoye, kale nno kimuyingire munda ng'amazzi, ne mu magumba, ng'omuzigo." 
Psalms109:19 Kimubeerere ng'ekyambalo kye yeezingiridde, ng'omusipi gwe yeesiba bulijjo.”" 
Psalms109:20 Abanvunaana, eyo y'eba ebeera empeera okuva ew'Omukama, ey'abo abanjogerera ebibi." 
Psalms109:21 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama Omuyinza, nkwata na kisa olw'okubeera erinnya lyo, mponya olw'okubeera ekisa kyo ekirungi." 
Psalms109:22 Anti nze ndi munaku, mwolo, ne munda omutima gwange gufumitiddwa." 
Psalms109:23 Nseebengerera ng'ekisiikirize eky'olweggulo; nkunkumuddwa ng'enzige. 
Psalms109:24 Amaviivi gankubagana olw'okusiiba, n'omubiri gunnyaaluse olw'okubulwa amasavu." 
Psalms109:25 Nabafuukira ekyokwejoogera; bwe bandaba, ne bannyeenyeza omutwe." 
Psalms109:26 Nnyamba, ayi Mukama Katonda wange; ndokola ng'ekisa kyo bwe kiri." 
Psalms109:27 Bategeere ng'ogwo mukono gwo, nga ggwe, ayi Mukama, bino ggwe obikoze." 
Psalms109:28 Bo ka bavumirire, nga ggwe owa mukisa; abansitukiramu baswale, ye omuweereza wo asanyuke." 
Psalms109:29 Abanvunaana bambale okuswala; ensonyi zaabwe zibabikke ng'omunagiro. 
Psalms109:30 Nditendereza nnyo Omukama n'akamwa kange, ndimutendera wakati mu bangi." 
Psalms109:31 Kubanga ayimirira omunaku ku ddyo, amuwonye ababi abalamula obulamu bwe." 
Psalms110:1 Lwa Dawudi. Zabbuli. Omukama yagamba Mukama wange nti: “Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, okutuusa abalabe bo lwe ndibafuula akatebe k'ebigere byo.”" 
Psalms110:2 Omukama alisinziira mu Siyoni n'abunya ddamula w'obuyinza bwo; n'agamba nti: “Fuga mu balabe bo wakati.” 
Psalms110:3 Obukungu bubwo okuviira ddala ku lunaku lw'amaanyi go, ng'olabise mu kwakaayakana okutukuvu; nakuzaala nga ne mmambya tannasala, nga ssuulwe w'oku maliiri." 
Psalms110:4 Omukama yalayira, era tagenda kwejjusa: “Ggwe oli kabona emirembe gyonna mu lubu lwa Melekisedeki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Omukama akuli ku ddyo; alibetenta bakabaka ku lunaku lw'obusungu bwe. 
Psalms110:6 Aliramula amawanga, emirambo n'agituuma entuumu; alifufuggaza abafuzi wonna mu nsi." 
Psalms110:7 Alinywa ku ngezi y'akagga ku kkubo, n'olw'ekyo aliyitimuka." 
Psalms111:1 Alleluuya! Nnaatendereza Omukama n'omutima gwange gwonna, mu lukiiko lw'abatuufu ne mu lukuŋŋaana." 
Psalms111:2 Omukama by'akola bikulu, byebuulirirwa bonna ababyagala." 
Psalms111:3 By'akola bya kitiibwa era bikulu, obutuukirivu bwe busigalawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms111:4 Ebyewuunyisa bye yabissizaawo ekijjukizo, Omukama musaasizi era wa kisa." 
Psalms111:5 Abamutya abawa emmere, emirembe gyonna ajjukira endagaano ye." 
Psalms111:6 Yalaga abantu amaanyi g'ebikolwa bye, ng'abawa obusika bw'amawanga." 
Psalms111:7 Emirimu gy'emikono gye gya mazima era mituufu; ebiragiro bye byonna byesigibwa. 
Psalms111:8 Binywevu emirembe n'emirembe; byakolebwa mu mazima na mu bwesimbu. 
Psalms111:9 Abantu be yabaaweereza okununulibwa; yakakasa endagaano ye emirembe gyonna. Erinnya lye ttukuvu era lya ntiisa. 
Psalms111:10 Mu kutya Omukama amagezi mwe gasookera, bonna abakikola baba n'omutima ogutegeera. Ettendo lye lisigalawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms112:1 Alleluuya! Omuntu atya Omukama, yeesiimye, oyo asanyukira ennyo ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms112:2 Ezzadde lye liriba lya buyinza mu nsi; olulyo lw'ezzadde edduŋŋamu lulifuna omukisa. 
Psalms112:3 Ekitiibwa n'obugagga biri mu nnyumba ye, obutuukirivu bwe busigalawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms112:4 Ne mu nzikiza ekitangaala kyakira abaluŋŋamu; kyakira omusaasizi, ow'ekisa n'omutuukirivu." 
Psalms112:5 Ebirungi bijjira oyo asaasira n'awolerawo, ebibye abiddukanya mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms112:6 Kubanga talinyeenyezebwa ebbanga lyonna, omutuukirivu alijjukirwa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms112:7 Talitya mawulire mabi; omutima gwe munywevu, asuubira mu Mukama." 
Psalms112:8 Omutima gwe guli mu ddembe, talitya, okutuusa lw'aliwangula abalabe be." 
Psalms112:9 Yamansa n'agabira abaavu; obutuukirivu bwe busigalawo emirembe gyonna. Aligulumizibwa mu kitiibwa. 
Psalms112:10 Omubi aliraba n'anyiikaala; aliruma obugigi n'akonvuba; okwegomba kw'aboonoonyi temuliva kantu. 
Psalms113:1 Alleluuya! Abaweereza b'Omukama, mutendereze, mutendereze erinnya ly'Omukama." 
Psalms113:2 Erinnya ly'Omukama litenderezebwe kaakano n'emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms113:3 Okuva enjuba lw'evaayo okutuusa lw'egwa, erinnya ly'Omukama litenderezebwe." 
Psalms113:4 Omukama asukkulumye amawanga gonna, ekitiibwa kye kiyisa n'eggulu." 
Psalms113:5 Ani eyenkana Omukama Katonda waffe asula waggulu eyo," 
Psalms113:6 akutama n'atunuulira mu ggulu ne mu nsi? 
Psalms113:7 Omunaku amusitulayo mu nfuufu; omwavu amusitulayo mu lubungo," 
Psalms113:8 n'amuteeka wamu n'abakungu, abakungu b'abantu be." 
Psalms113:9 Omugumba amuwa awaka aw'okusula, n'amufuula nnakazadde omusanyufu. Alleluuya!" 
Psalms114:1 Yisirayeli lwe yava mu Misiri, ennyumba ya Yakobo lwe yava mu boogera ennimi engwira," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda yafuuka ekitukuvu kye, Yisirayeli, matwale ge." 
Psalms114:3 Ennyanja yatunuulira n'edduka, Yorudani n'akuba akaddannyuma." 
Psalms114:4 Ensozi zeebukiza ng'endiga ennume, n'obusozi, ng'obuliga obuto." 
Psalms114:5 Owange nnyanja, kiki, lwaki wadduka? Yorudani, lwaki wakuba akaddannyuma?" 
Psalms114:6 Nammwe ensozi, kiki mwebuukiza ng'endiga ennume, n'obusozi, ng'obuliga obuto?" 
Psalms114:7 Nsi, kankana mu maaso g'Omukama, mu maaso ga Katonda wa Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 afuula olwazi ekkuŋŋaaniro ly'amazzi, n'ejjinja, ensulo z'amazzi." 
Psalms115:1 Si ffe, ayi Mukama, si ffe, wabula erinnya lyo ly'oba owa ekitiibwa olw'okubeera ekisa kyo n'obwesigwa bwo." 
Psalms115:2 Lwaki abataliimu ddiini bagamba nti: “Katonda waabwe aluwa?” 
Psalms115:3 Sso nga Katonda waffe ali mu ggulu; byonna by'ayagala abikola. 
Psalms115:4 Ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale ffeeza bufeeza na zaabu, byakolebwa mikono gya bantu buntu." 
Psalms115:5 Emimwa birina, naye tebyogera; amaaso birina, naye tebiraba." 
Psalms115:6 Amatu birina, naye tebiwulira; ennyindo birina, naye tebiwunyiriza." 
Psalms115:7 Emikono birina, naye tebiwammanta; ebigere birina, naye tebitambula, ne mu mimiro gyabyo temuva ddoboozi." 
Psalms115:8 Ababikola balibifaanana, na bonna ababyesiga." 
Psalms115:9 Ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, suubira mu Mukama; ye muyambi waabwe era engabo yaabwe." 
Psalms115:10 Nnyumba ya Aroni, suubira mu Mukama; ye muyambi waabwe era engabo yaabwe." 
Psalms115:11 Abatya Omukama, musuubire mu Mukama; ye muyambi waabwe era engabo yaabwe." 
Psalms115:12 Omukama atujjukira era alituwa omukisa; aliwa omukisa ennyumba ya Yisirayeli; aliwa omukisa ennyumba ya Aroni. 
Psalms115:13 Aliwa omukisa bonna abeesiga Omukama, abatene n'abanene;" 
Psalms115:14 Omukama abawe okwala, mmwe n'abaana bammwe." 
Psalms115:15 Mufune omukisa okuva ew'Omukama, eyakola eggulu n'ensi." 
Psalms115:16 Eggulu erisukkiridde ddala lya Mukama, naye ensi yagiwa abaana b'abantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abafu si be bakutenda, ayi Mukama, yadde bonna abakkirira emagombe," 
Psalms115:18 naye ffe tugulumiza Omukama, kati n'emirembe gyonna. Alleluuya!" 
Psalms116:1 Omukama mmwagala kubanga yawuliriza eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange. 
Psalms116:2 Kubanga yantegera okutu, nnaamukoowoolanga ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwange." 
Psalms116:3 Emiguwa gy'olumbe gyanzingirira, obulumi bw'emagombe bwankwata; najjirwa ennaku n'okunyolwa." 
Psalms116:4 Ne nkoowoola erinnya ly'Omukama nti: “Ayi Mukama, wonya obulamu bwange.”" 
Psalms116:5 Omukama musaasizi era mutuukirivu; Katonda waffe wa kisa. 
Psalms116:6 Omukama akuuma abatene; bwe natoowazibwa, yandokola." 
Psalms116:7 Ayi mwoyo gwange, weddire mu nteeko, kubanga Omukama yakukolera ebirungi." 
Psalms116:8 Kubanga owonyezza omwoyo gwange okufa, n'amaaso gange amaziga, n'ebigere byange okwesittala," 
Psalms116:9 nditambulira mu maaso g'Omukama, mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Psalms116:10 Nakkiriza kyennava ŋŋamba nti: “Ndabye nnyo!” 
Psalms116:11 Mu kutya ne ŋŋamba nti: “Buli muntu mulimba!” 
Psalms116:12 Nnaddiza ki Omukama, olwa byonna bye yampa?" 
Psalms116:13 Nzija kusitula ekikompe ky'obulokofu, nkoowoole erinnya ly'Omukama." 
Psalms116:14 Bye neetemye ew'Omukama nzija kubituusa mu maaso g'abantu be bonna. 
Psalms116:15 Kwa muwendo mu maaso g'Omukama okufa kw'abatuukirivu be. 
Psalms116:16 Ayi Mukama, nze ndi muweereza wo ddala, nze ndi muweereza wo, mwana wa muzaana wo; ggwe wakutula enjegere zange." 
Psalms116:17 Nzija kukutambirira ekitambiro eky'okukwebaza, nkoowoole erinnya ly'Omukama." 
Psalms116:18 Bye neetema ew'Omukama nzija kubituusa, mu maaso g'abantu be bonna." 
Psalms116:19 Mu mpya z'ennyumba y'Omukama, mu ggwe Yeruzaalemu wakati. Alleluuya!" 
Psalms117:1 Amawanga mwenna, mutendereze Omukama, nammwe abantu mwenna, mumugulumize." 
Psalms117:2 Kubanga ekisa kye gye tuli kinywevu, n'obwesigwa bw'Omukama busigalawo emirembe gyonna. Alleluuya!" 
Psalms118:1 Mutendereze Omukama kubanga mulungi, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms118:2 Yisirayeli agambe nti: “Ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms118:3 Ennyumba ya Aroni egambe nti: “Ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms118:4 Abatya Omukama bagambe nti: “Ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms118:5 Mu nnaku nakoowoola Omukama, Omukama yampulira, n'ansumulula." 
Psalms118:6 Omukama ali nange, ye muyambi wange, sijja kutya; omuntu obuntu anankola ki?" 
Psalms118:7 Omukama ali nange, ye muyambi wange, nange nzija kwewaanira ku bankyawa." 
Psalms118:8 Okweyuna Omukama kirungi okusinga okwesiga omuntu. 
Psalms118:9 Okweyuna Omukama kirungi okusinga okwesiga abakungu. 
Psalms118:10 Amawanga gonna gantaayiza, naye mu linnya ly'Omukama, nagasalako." 
Psalms118:11 Bantaayiza ku njuyi zonna, naye mu linnya ly'Omukama nabasalako." 
Psalms118:12 Bantaayiza ng'enjuki, ne baaka ng'omuliro mu maggwa, naye mu linnya ly'Omukama nabasalako." 
Psalms118:13 Bansindika n'amaanyi, kumpi ngwe, naye Omukama n'annyamba." 
Psalms118:14 Omukama ge maanyi gange, lye ttendo lyange, afuuse obulokofu bwange." 
Psalms118:15 Eddoboozi ly'okujaganya n'ery'obulokofu liri mu weema z'abatuukirivu: 
Psalms118:16 “Ddyo w'Omukama akoze eby'amaanyi, ddyo w'Omukama asituse waggulu, ddyo w'Omukama akozezza maanyi.”" 
Psalms118:17 Sijja kufa, nzija kulama, ndirojja ebikolwa by'Omukama." 
Psalms118:18 Omukama yambonereza n'amaanyi, naye teyampaayo kufa." 
Psalms118:19 Munzigulirewo emiryango gy'obutuukirivu, nzija kuyingira ngulumize Omukama." 
Psalms118:20 Guno gwe mulyango gw'Omukama abatuukirivu mwe baliyita okuyingira. 
Psalms118:21 Nzija kukwebaza kubanga onnyanukudde, n'onfuukira Omulokozi." 
Psalms118:22 Ejjinja lye baagaana, lye lyafuuka lukulwe mu nsonda." 
Psalms118:23 Ekyo Omukama ye yakikola, kya kyewuunyo mu maaso gaffe." 
Psalms118:24 Luno lwe lunaku Omukama lw'akoze, tulujagulizeemu, tulusanyukiremu." 
Psalms118:25 Ayi Mukama, ndokola; ayi Mukama, leka bigende bulungi." 
Psalms118:26 Wa mukisa oyo ajja mu linnya ly'Omukama. Tubawa omukisa nga tuyima mu nnyumba y'Omukama. 
Psalms118:27 Omukama ye Katonda; atwakizza ekitangaala. Muteeketeeke embaga n'amatabi agajjudde amakoola, okutuukira ddala ku mayembe g'omwaliiro." 
Psalms118:28 Ggwe Katonda wange, nkwebaza, ggwe Katonda wange, nkutenda." 
Psalms118:29 Mwebaze Omukama, kubanga mulungi, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:1 Beesiimye ab'amakubo agataliiko musango, abatambulira mu tteeka ly'Omukama." 
Psalms119:2 Beesiimye abakuuma by'ayigiriza, abamunoonya n'omutima gwonna;" 
Psalms119:3 abo abatakola bubi, abatambulira mu makubo ge." 
Psalms119:4 Wassaawo ebiragiro byo bikuumirwe ddala. 
Psalms119:5 Singa nno amakubo gange manywevu mu kukwata amateeka go. 
Psalms119:6 Olwo siriswala bwe ndiba nekkaanyizza ebiragiro byo byonna. 
Psalms119:7 Ndikugulumiza n'omutima omuluŋŋamu, bwe ndiba njize amateeka go amatuukirivu." 
Psalms119:8 Amateeka go ndigakwata, tonjabuliranga n'akatono." 
Psalms119:9 Omuvubuka alikuuma atya ekkubo lye nga ttukuvu? Ng'akwata ekigambo kyo. 
Psalms119:10 Nkunoonya n'omutima gwange gwonna, tondeka kuwunjuka ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:11 Ekigambo kyo nakikweka mu mutima gwange, nneme kukola kibi." 
Psalms119:12 Ogulumizibwe, ayi Mukama; njigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:13 Mu mimwa gyange mbala amateeka gonna agava mu kamwa ko. 
Psalms119:14 Nsanyukira mu by'ayigiriza kyenkana ng'oli bw'asanyukira mu bugagga obungi. 
Psalms119:15 Ndyebuulirira ku biragiro byo; ndyekkaanya amakubo go. 
Psalms119:16 Nsanyukira mu mateeka go, siryerabira kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:17 Nkolera bulungi nze omuweereza wo, mbeere mulamu; ndikwata ekigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:18 Zibula amaaso gange, nekkaanye ebyewuunyisa eby'etteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:19 Nze mu nsi ndi mugenyi, tonkweka biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:20 Okuyaayaanira ebirangiriro byo obudde bwonna kundyamu omwoyo. 
Psalms119:21 Wakoma ku beekuza, abo abavumirire, abawunjuka ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:22 Nzigyaako okuvumibwa n'okugayibwa, kubanga ntuusa by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:23 Abakungu ne bwe batuula ne banjogerako obubi, ye omuweereza wo alyebuulirira ku tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:24 Anti by'oyigiriza lye ssanyu lyange, byo be babuulirizi bange." 
Psalms119:25 Omwoyo gwange gwebase mu nfuufu, nziriza obulamu ng'osinziira ku kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:26 Nakubuulira amakubo gange, n'ompulira, njigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:27 Mpa okutegeera ebiragiro byo kye biyigiriza, olwo ndyebuulirira ebyewuunyisa byo." 
Psalms119:28 Omwoyo gwange guyenjebuse olw'ennaku, nzizaamu amaanyi ng'osinziira ku kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:29 Amakubo ag'obulimba gakuumire wala nange; ngirira ekisa olw'etteeka lyo. 
Psalms119:30 Nalondawo ekkubo ery'amazima; nange neeroboza ennamula yo. 
Psalms119:31 Nnyweredde ku by'oyigiriza, ayi Mukama; tondeka kuswazibwa." 
Psalms119:32 Nzirukira mu kkubo ly'ebiragiro byo, kubanga wawa eddembe omutima gwange." 
Psalms119:33 Njigiriza, ayi Mukama, ekkubo ly'amateeka go; nzija kulikwata okutuusa ku nkomerero." 
Psalms119:34 Mpa okutegeera, nzija kukwata etteeka lyo, nzija kulikwata n'omutima gwange gwonna." 
Psalms119:35 Nnambika mu kkubo ly'ebiragiro byo, kubanga mu lyo mwe muli essanyu lyange." 
Psalms119:36 Omutima gwange guwunzikire ku by'oyigiriza, sso si eri omululu gw'okufuna." 
Psalms119:37 Amaaso gange gaggye ku bintu ebitagasa; mpa mbeere mulamu mu kkubo lyo. 
Psalms119:38 Omuweereza wo mukakase kye wasuubiza, alyoke akutye." 
Psalms119:39 Nzigyiraawo ekivumo kye ntya, kubanga amateeka go malungi." 
Psalms119:40 Nga njaayaanira ebiragiro byo. Mu butuukirivu bwo mpa mbeere mulamu. 
Psalms119:41 Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo kintuukeko, n'obulokozi bwo nga bwe wasuubiza," 
Psalms119:42 olwo ndibaako kye nnyanukula abansojja, kubanga nsuubira mu bigambo byo." 
Psalms119:43 Ekigambo ky'amazima tokinzigyanga n'akatono mu kamwa, kubanga mu mateeka go mwe ntadde essuubi lyange." 
Psalms119:44 Bulijjo nnaakwatanga etteeka lyo, emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:45 Nnaatambulanga nga neetaaya, kubanga nnoonyereza ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:46 Mu maaso ga bakabaka ndyogera ku by'oyigiriza, sigenda kukwatibwa nsonyi." 
Psalms119:47 Kubanga nsanyukira mu biragiro byo; kubanga mbyagala. 
Psalms119:48 Ndisitula emikono gyange eri ebiragiro byo bye njagala; ndyebuulirira ku tteeka lyo. 
Psalms119:49 Jjukira ekigambo kye wagamba omuweereza wo, mwe wamuweera essuubi." 
Psalms119:50 Ekinkubagiza mu kutoowazibwa kwange kye kino: nti ebisuubizo byo binzizaamu obulamu. 
Psalms119:51 Abeekuza banvuma okuyitiriza, naye nze siwunjuka ku tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:52 Nzijukira ennamula yo, ayi Mukama, eya ddi na ddi, ne nkubagizibwa." 
Psalms119:53 Obusungu bunkwata olw'abakola obubi, abo abaleka etteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:54 Eteeka lyo lwe luyimba lwe nnyimba, mu nnyumba gye nalamagira." 
Psalms119:55 Ayi Mukama, ekiro nzijukira erinnya lyo, era ndikwata etteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:56 Eyo ye mpisa yange: ntuusa ebiragiro byo. 
Psalms119:57 Omukama gwe mugabo gwange; nasuubiza okukwata ebigambo byo. 
Psalms119:58 Nnoonya amaaso go n'omutima gwange gwonna, nsaasira nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:59 Nalowoolereza amakubo gange, ebigere byange ne mbizza ku by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:60 Nnyanguwa, sijja kulwa mu kukwata ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:61 Newandibadde ng'emiguwa gy'ababi ginzingirira, naye seerabira tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:62 Mu ttumbi nsituka okukugulumiza ku lw'ebiragiro byo ebituukirivu. 
Psalms119:63 Ndi mukwano gwa bonna abakutya, n'abakwata ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:64 Ayi Mukama, ensi ejjudde ekisa kyo; njigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:65 Ayi Mukama, omuweereza wo wamukolera bulungi, nga bwe wagamba." 
Psalms119:66 Njigiriza ennamula entuufu n'amagezi, kubanga ebiragiro byo mbyesiga." 
Psalms119:67 Nali sinnatoowazibwa, nagwa mu nsobi, naye kati bye wagamba mbikuuma." 
Psalms119:68 Oli mulungi ne by'okola birungi, njigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:69 Newandibadde ng'abeekuza bampaayirizza, naye nze ntuusa ebiragiro byo n'omutima gwonna." 
Psalms119:70 Emitima gyabwe gigubye, naye nze nsanyukira mu tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:71 Kirungi, wamma, nti natoowazibwa, njige amateeka go." 
Psalms119:72 Etteeka ly'akamwa ko ddungi gy'endi n'okusinga enkumi za zaabu ne ffeeza. 
Psalms119:73 Emikono gyo gyankola ne gimmumba, mpa okutegeera njige ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:74 Abakutya bandabe basanyuke, kubanga nasuubira mu kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:75 Mmanyi, ayi Mukama, ng'amateeka go matuukirivu, nga wantoowaza mu mazima." 
Psalms119:76 Ekisa kyo kinkubagize, nga bwe wasuubiza omuweereza wo." 
Psalms119:77 Okusaasira kwo kuntuukeko, mbeere mulamu, kubanga etteeka lyo lye ssanyu lyange." 
Psalms119:78 Abeekuza baswale olw'okumbonyaabonyeza obwereere, naye nze ndyebuulirira ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:79 Abakutya bakyukire gye ndi, abo abategeera by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:80 Omutima gwange gubuleko omusango ku tteeka lyo, nneme kuswala." 
Psalms119:81 Omwoyo gwange guzirikira obulokozi bwo; nsuubira mu kigambo kyo. 
Psalms119:82 Amaaso gange gayimbadde olw'okulindirira ebisuubizo byo, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Olinkubagiza ddi?”" 
Psalms119:83 Laba nfuuse ng'endyanga ezeetuzze olw'omukka, naye amateeka go sigeerabira." 
Psalms119:84 Omuweereza wo anaalindirira kutuusa wa? Abanjigganya oligubasalira ddi? 
Psalms119:85 Abeekuza bansimira obunnya, abo abatagoberera tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:86 Ebiragiro byo byonna byesigika, nnyamba, banjigganyiza bwereere." 
Psalms119:87 Kata bansangulewo ku nsi, naye nze saava ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:88 Olw'okusaasira kwo nkuuma nga ndi mulamu, nsobole okutuusa akamwa ko bye kayigiriza." 
Psalms119:89 Emirembe gyonna, ayi Mukama, ekigambo kyo kyassibwawo mu ggulu." 
Psalms119:90 Obwesigwa bwo bubeerawo mu mazadde n'amazadde, wassaawo ensi n'esigalirawo ddala." 
Psalms119:91 Bisigalawo obudde bwonna nga bwe wasalawo, kubanga ebintu byonna biweereza ggwe." 
Psalms119:92 Etteeka lyo teriba kubeera ssanyu lyange, singa naggwaawo dda mu kutoowazibwa kwange." 
Psalms119:93 Emirembe gyonna siryerabira biragiro byo, kubanga mu byo mwe wampeera obulamu." 
Psalms119:94 Ndi wuwo, ndokola, kubanga nanoonya ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:95 Ababi bannindirira okunzikiriza, naye nze neefumiitiriza by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:96 Buli ekituukiridde nakirabako enkomerero, naye ebiragiro byo tebiriiko kkomo n'akatono." 
Psalms119:97 Ayi Mukama, nga njagala etteeka lyo, ndyebuulirirako olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms119:98 Ebiragiro byo byanfuula mugezi okukira abalabe bange, kubanga emirembe gyonna biri nange." 
Psalms119:99 Ndi mugezi n'okukira abanjigiriza, kubanga neebuulirira by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:100 Ntegeera n'okusinga abakadde, kubanga ntuusa ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:101 Natangira ebigere byange mu buli kkubo bbi, nkwate ekigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:102 Sivanga ku nnamula yo, kubanga ggwe wanjigiriza." 
Psalms119:103 Ebigambo byo nga biwoomera olulimi lwange, biwoomera akamwa kange n'okusinga omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Psalms119:104 Nafuna okutegeera okuva mu biragiro byo, kyennava nkyawa buli kkubo lya bulimba." 
Psalms119:105 Ekigambo kyo ye ttawaaza y'ebigere byange, kye kitangaala mu kkubo lyange." 
Psalms119:106 Ndayidde era nkakasa okukuuma amateeka go amatuukirivu. 
Psalms119:107 Ayi Mukama, mbonyeebonye nnyo, nzizaamu obulamu ng'osinziira ku kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:108 Ayi Mukama, kkiriza ettendo ly'akamwa kange lye neesiimidde, njigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:109 Bulijjo obulamu bwange buli mu kabi, naye seerabira tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:110 Aboonoonyi banteze ekitimba, naye siwunjuse ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:111 By'oyigiriza bwe busika bwange emirembe gyonna; lye ssanyu ly'omutima gwange. 
Psalms119:112 Omutima gwange ngumalizza ku kutuusa amateeka go, emirembe gyonna okutuusa ku nkomerero." 
Psalms119:113 Nkyawa ab'enkulu ebbiri, kyokka njagala etteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:114 Ggwe buddukiro bwange, engabo yange, nsuubira mu kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:115 Ababi, munsegulire, nkwate ebiragiro bya Katonda wange." 
Psalms119:116 Mpanirira nga bwe wasuubiza, nnaaba mulamu; tonswaza mu kusuubira kwange." 
Psalms119:117 Mpanirira, olwo nzija kulokoka; bulijjo nzija kufanga ku tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:118 Onyooma bonna abayawukana ku tteeka lyo, kubanga obukujjukujju bwabwe bwa bulimba." 
Psalms119:119 Ababi bonna ku nsi obeerawo ng'ebisejja, nze kyenva njagala by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:120 Omubiri gunkankana olw'okukutya, n'amateeka go ngatya." 
Psalms119:121 Nakola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu; tondeka mu mikono gy'abambonyaabonya. 
Psalms119:122 Kuuma obulungi bw'omuweereza wo, abeekuza baleme kunnyigiriza." 
Psalms119:123 Amaaso gange gayimbadde nga nnindirira obulokozi bwo, nga nninda ebisuubizo by'obutuukirivu bwo." 
Psalms119:124 Omuweereza wo mukolere ng'ekisa kyo bwe kiri, onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:125 Nze ndi muweereza wo, mpa okutegeera, mmanye by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:126 Ayi Mukama, buno bwe budde okole, kubanga baayonoona etteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:127 Kyenva njagala ebiragiro byo okukira zaabu, okukira zaabu omukuŋŋunte." 
Psalms119:128 Kyenva ntwala ebiragiro byo byonna nga biruŋŋamu; nkyawa buli kkubo lya bulimba. 
Psalms119:129 By'oyigiriza byewuunyisa, kyenva mbituusa." 
Psalms119:130 Okulangirira ekigambo kyo kutangaaza; abatene kubawa okutegeera. 
Psalms119:131 Njasamya akamwa kange ne ndookalooka, nga njaayaanira ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:132 Kyukira gye ndi onsaasire, nga bw'oyisa abaagala erinnya lyo." 
Psalms119:133 Ebigere byange birambike nga bwe wagamba, wabulewo obwonoonefu obunneefuga." 
Psalms119:134 Nnunula mu kubonyaabonyezebwa abantu, nkwate ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:135 Omuweereza wo mwakize amaaso go, njigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:136 Amaaso gange gattulukuka emyala gy'amaziga, kubanga tebakwata tteeka lyo." 
Psalms119:137 Ayi Mukama, oli mutuukirivu, n'amateeka go maluŋŋamu." 
Psalms119:138 By'oyigiriza wabissaawo mu butuukirivu, byesigikira ddala." 
Psalms119:139 Muli okwagala kundyamu omwoyo, kubanga abalabe bange beerabira ebigambo byo." 
Psalms119:140 Ebisuubizo byo byagezebwa ddala, omuweereza wo abyagala." 
Psalms119:141 Newandibadde nga ndi muto, ngayibwa, ebiragiro byo sibyerabira." 
Psalms119:142 Obutuukirivu bwo, butuukirivu bwa mirembe gyonna, n'etteeka lyo lya mazima." 
Psalms119:143 Obuyinike n'ennaku byanzijira, naye ebiragiro byo lye ssanyu lyange." 
Psalms119:144 By'oyigiriza bituukirivu emirembe gyonna; Mpa okutegeera, mbeere mulamu." 
Psalms119:145 Nkowoola n'omutima gwonna, ayi Mukama, nnyanukula, nzija kutuusa amateeka go." 
Psalms119:146 Njaziirana gy'oli, mponya, nzija kukwata by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:147 Nkeera mu matulutulu ne mpanjaga, nsuubira mu kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:148 Amaaso gange gatunula ebisisimuka byonna eby'ekiro, neebuulirire ku bisuubizo byo." 
Psalms119:149 Wulira eddoboozi lyange, ayi Mukama, olw'ekisa kyo; mpa obulamu ng'osinziira ku butuufu bwo." 
Psalms119:150 Abannondoola n'enkwe embi bajja basembera, kyokka etteeka lyo baliri wala." 
Psalms119:151 Naye ggwe oli kumpi, ayi Mukama, n'ebiragiro byo byonna bya mazima." 
Psalms119:152 Ebbanga liweze nga mmanyi okusinziira ku by'oyigiriza nti wabiteekawo emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms119:153 Laba ennaku zange, omponye, kubanga etteeka lyo siryerabidde." 
Psalms119:154 Wolereza ensonga zange onnunule; mpa obulamu nga bwe wasuubiza. 
Psalms119:155 Ababi obulokofu bubali wala, kubanga tebanoonya mateeka go." 
Psalms119:156 Ekisa kyo kingi, ayi Mukama, mpa obulamu ng'osinziira ku butuufu bwo." 
Psalms119:157 Bangi abanjigganya n'abalabe bange, kyokka saawunjuka ku by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:158 Abayisa obubi mbatunuulira ne mbeetamwa, kubanga tebakuuma bye wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:159 Laba, ayi Mukama, nga bwe njagala ebiragiro byo, mpa obulamu olw'ekisa kyo." 
Psalms119:160 Buli kigambo kyo kyonna kya mazima, buli tteeka lyo ettuukirivu lya mirembe na mirembe." 
Psalms119:161 Abafuzi banjigganya awatali nsonga, naye omutima gwange gutya ebigambo byo." 
Psalms119:162 Nsanyukira ebisuubizo byo, ne mba ng'agwikirizza eby'obugagga enkumu." 
Psalms119:163 Nkyawa era neenyinyala obulimba, kyokka etteeka lyo ndyagala." 
Psalms119:164 Nkutenda emirundi musanvu mu lunaku olw'ennamula yo entuukirivu. 
Psalms119:165 Abaagala etteeka lyo baba n'eddembe ddene, tebaba na we beesittala." 
Psalms119:166 Nnindirira obulokozi bwo, ayi Mukama, era nkola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:167 Omwoyo gwange gukwata by'oyigiriza, kubanga mbyagala nnyo." 
Psalms119:168 Nkwata amateeka go ne by'oyigiriza, kubanga amakubo gange gonna gali mu maaso go." 
Psalms119:169 Omulanga gwange gukutuuke, ayi Mukama; mpa okutegeera nga bwe wagamba." 
Psalms119:170 Okuwanjaga kwange kutuuke gy'oli; mponya nga bwe wasuubiza. 
Psalms119:171 Emimwa gyange girifukumula ettendo lyo, kubanga onjigirizza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:172 Olulimi lwange luyimba ekigambo kyo, kubanga ebiragiro byo byonna bituufu." 
Psalms119:173 Omukono gwo gubeewo okunnyamba, kubanga nalondawo ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:174 Njaayaanira obulokofu bwo, ayi Mukama; etteeka lyo lye ssanyu lyange." 
Psalms119:175 Mpa mbeere mulamu nkutendenga, ne by'olagira bimpanirire." 
Psalms119:176 Mbuze ng'endiga ewabye; noonya omuweereza wo, kubanga ebiragiro byo sibyerabira." 
Psalms120:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Bw'emba mu nnaku, ndaajanira Omukama, n'annyanukula." 
Psalms120:2 Ayi Mukama, mponya emimwa emirimba, n'ennimi ez'enkwe." 
Psalms120:3 Omukama alikuweera ki, ggwe olulimi olw'enkwe? Kiki ddala ky'alikukolera?" 
Psalms120:4 Mpozzi obusaale obwogi obw'omutabaazi, n'amanda ag'oluvunvu agengeredde." 
Psalms120:5 Ndabye nze okuba nti nsula mu Meseki, nti nsula mu weema za Kedari." 
Psalms120:6 Ebbanga ntutte ggwanvu mu abo abakyawa eddembe. 
Psalms120:7 Nze ndi wa mirembe, naye bwe njogera, bo baagala ntalo." 
Psalms121:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Amaaso gange ngasitula ne ntunuulira ensozi. Obuyambi buva wa? 
Psalms121:2 Obuyambi buva wa Mukama, eyakola eggulu n'ensi." 
Psalms121:3 Talireka kigere kyo kuseerera; oyo akukuuma tagenda kusumagira. 
Psalms121:4 Kikakase, talisumagira, yadde okwebaka, oyo omukuumi wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms121:5 Omukama ye mukuumi wo; Omukama kye kisiikirize kyo, era akuli ku ddyo." 
Psalms121:6 Emisana enjuba terikukola kabi, yadde omwezi, ekiro." 
Psalms121:7 Omukama alikukuuma mu buli kabi; alikuuma obulamu bwo. 
Psalms121:8 Omukama alikuuma amagenda go n'amadda, leero n'emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms122:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Lwa Dawudi Nasanyuka bwe baŋŋamba nti: “Tugende mu nnyumba y'Omukama.” 
Psalms122:2 Ebigere byaffe byayimiridde dda ku miryango gyo, Yeruzaalemu." 
Psalms122:3 Yeruzaalemu eyazimbibwa ng'ekibuga, ekyekutte awamu." 
Psalms122:4 Eyo ebika gye byambuka, ebika by'Omukama, ng'etteeka bwe lyaweebwa Yisirayeli, okugulumiza erinnya ly'Omukama." 
Psalms122:5 Eyo ye waateekebwa entebe z'obulamuzi, entebe z'ennyumba ya Dawudi." 
Psalms122:6 Musabire Yeruzaalemu emirembe, “Abakwagala babeere mirembe." 
Psalms122:7 Mu bbugwe wo mubeeremu emirembe, ne mu minaala gyo kibeere mulaala.”" 
Psalms122:8 Olw'okubeera baganda bange ne bannange, ndigamba nti: “Emirembe gibeere mu ggwe!”" 
Psalms122:9 Ku lw'ennyumba y'Omukama Katonda waffe, ndikunoonyeza emikisa." 
Psalms123:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Nsitulidde gy'oli amaaso gange, eri ggwe awaŋŋamye mu ggulu." 
Psalms123:2 Ng'amaaso g'abaweereza bwe gasimbye ku mikono gya mukama waabwe, ng'amaaso g'omuzaana bwe gasimbye ku mikono gya mugole we, n'amaaso gaffe bwe gatyo bwe gakutunuulidde, ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, okutuusa lw'onootukwatirwa ekisa." 
Psalms123:3 Tusaasire, ayi Mukama, tusaasire, kubanga twetamiddwa okugayibwa." 
Psalms123:4 Omwoyo gwaffe gwetamiddwa nnyo, okusekererwa abeewanika, n'okugayibwa abeekuza." 
Psalms124:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Lwa Dawudi. Singa Omukama teyali naffe- Yisirayeli bw'agamba- 
Psalms124:2 singa Omukama teyali naffe, abantu lwe baatusitukiramu," 
Psalms124:3 mazima banditumize tuli balamu; obusungu bwabwe lwe bwatwesererako," 
Psalms124:4 mazima amazzi ganditumize, engezi yanditubisse." 
Psalms124:5 Amazzi agaswakidde ganditukulukusizza. 
Psalms124:6 Agulumizibwe Omukama ataatuwaayo mu mannyo gaabwe kutukavvula. 
Psalms124:7 Obulamu bwaffe bwasumattuka ng'ekinyonyi okuva mu kitimba ky'abayizzi. Omutego gwamenyeka, naffe ne tutoloka." 
Psalms124:8 Obuyambi bwaffe buli mu linnya lya Mukama, eyakola eggulu n'ensi." 
Psalms125:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Abeesiga Omukama, bali ng'olusozi Siyoni; olutalinyeenyezebwa, lunywevu emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms125:2 Ng'ensozi bwe zeetoolodde Yeruzaalemu, n'Omukama bwe yeebunguludde abantu be, leero n'emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms125:3 Ddamula w'ababi talibandaala ku nsi y'abatuukirivu, sikulwa ng'abatuufu bakunuukiriza emikono gyabwe eri ekibi." 
Psalms125:4 Ayi Mukama, abalungi bakolere bulungi, abo ab'omutima omuluŋŋamu." 
Psalms125:5 Naye abo abawunjukira mu makubo gaabwe ageenyooleza, Omukama alibaggyirawo kumu n'abakola obubi. Eddembe libeere ku Yisirayeli!" 
Psalms126:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Omukama bwe yali akomyawo abasibe mu Siyoni, twali ng'abaloota." 
Psalms126:2 Akamwa kaffe kajjula enseko, n'olulimi lwaffe okujaganya. Olwo mu b'amawanga ne bagamba nti: “Omukama abakoledde eby'ekitalo.”" 
Psalms126:3 Ddala Omukama atukoledde eby'ekitalo, tujjudde essanyu." 
Psalms126:4 Komyawo, ayi Mukama, abasibe baffe, ng'engezi mu Negevu." 
Psalms126:5 Abasiga mu maziga, balikungula mu kujaganya." 
Psalms126:6 Abagenda nga bakaaba, nga batwala ensigo ey'okusiga, balikomawo mu kujaganya, nga baleeta emiganda gyabwe." 
Psalms127:1 Oluyimba lw'amambuka. Lwa Solomoni. Wabula ng'Omukama y'azimbye ennyumba, abagizimba bateganira busa; wabula ng'Omukama y'akuumye ekibuga, omukuumi atunuulirira busa." 
Psalms127:2 Bya busa mmwe okuzuukuka nga bukyali ne mwebaka nga buyise, nga mukuluusanira omugaati ogw'okulya, kubanga b'ayagala abagabira bakyebase." 
Psalms127:3 Abaana, busika buva wa Mukama, mpeera ya bibala bya lubuto." 
Psalms127:4 Ng'obusaale mu mukono gw'omutabaazi, n'abaana ab'obuvubuka bwe bali." 
Psalms127:5 Omusajja oyo yeesiimye ow'ensawo ejjudde obusaale, taliswala bw'alyaŋŋanga abalabe be ku mulyango." 
Psalms128:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Yeesiimye atya Omukama, atambulira mu makubo ge." 
Psalms128:2 Olirya ku bibala by'emikono gyo; weesiimye, birikugendera bulungi." 
Psalms128:3 Mukazi wo aliba ng'omuzabbibu ogubala, munda mu nnyumba yo; abaana bo, ng'obulokolerwa bwa oliva okwetooloola olujjuliro lwo." 
Psalms128:4 Bw'atyo bw'alina omukisa omuntu atya Omukama. 
Psalms128:5 Omukama akuwe omukisa ng'ayima mu Siyoni, olabe ku birungi bya Yeruzaalemu, ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo," 
Psalms128:6 olabe ne ku baana b'abaana bo. Eddembe libeere ku Yisirayeli! 
Psalms129:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. “Bambonyaabonya nnyo okuva obuvubuka bwange,” bw'atyo Yisirayeli bw'aba agamba," 
Psalms129:2 “bambonyaabonya nnyo okuva obuvubuka bwange, naye tebampangula." 
Psalms129:3 Abalimi bannima ku mabega, ne bakola empangi zaabwe mpanvu." 
Psalms129:4 Kyokka Omukama mutuukirivu, yakutula emiguwa gy'ababi.”" 
Psalms129:5 Bonna abakyawa Siyoni, baswale, badde ennyuma." 
Psalms129:6 Babeere ng'omuddo gw'oku busolya ogukala nga tegunnakula; 
Psalms129:7 agukungula kw'ataweza na lubatu, n'agukuŋŋaanya emiganda kw'ataweza na kikondoolo." 
Psalms129:8 Abayise baleme kubagamba nti: “Omukisa gw'Omukama gubabeereko! Tubaagaliza omukisa mu linnya ly'Omukama!” 
Psalms130:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Nnyima ekkuzimu ne mpanjagira gy'oli, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms130:2 Ayi Mukama, wulira eddoboozi lyange; amatu go gawulirize eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange." 
Psalms130:3 Oba kujjukira bibi, ayi Mukama, ayi Mukama, ani yandigumiddewo?" 
Psalms130:4 Naye ewuwo eriyo okusaasira, kyova otiibwa." 
Psalms130:5 Nnindirira Omukama; omwoyo gwange gulindirira, nsuubira mu kigambo kye." 
Psalms130:6 Omwoyo gwange gulindirira Omukama okukira abakuumi bwe balindirira mmambya; okukira abakuumi bwe basuubira mmambya. 
Psalms130:7 Yisirayeli, suubira mu Mukama, kubanga ekisa kiri na Mukama, ewuwe eriyo okununula okw'omwero." 
Psalms130:8 Era yennyini y'alinunula Yisirayeli, mu bibi byabwe byonna." 
Psalms131:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Lwa Dawudi. Ayi Mukama, omutima gwange tegwekuza, n'amaaso gange tegakuumiira; sigoba bintu binene oba byewuunyisa ebimpitiriddeko." 
Psalms131:2 Naye omwoyo gwange nagukkakkanya ne nguteesa ng'avudde ku mabeere bw'aba ne nnyina; ng'avudde ku mabeere n'omwoyo gwange bwe guli gutyo mu nze. 
Psalms131:3 Ayi Yisirayeli, suubira mu Mukama, leero n'emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms132:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Ayi Mukama, jjukira Dawudi, n'ebizibu bye yasanga." 
Psalms132:2 Yalayirira Omukama, ne yeeyama ewa Katonda Omuyinza wa Yakobo nti:" 
Psalms132:3 “Siriyingira mu weema yange, mu nnyumba yange, wadde okuwalampa ku buliri bw'oku kitanda kyange;" 
Psalms132:4 siriganya maaso gange kulaba ku tulo, n'ebisige byange kuwujjaalako," 
Psalms132:5 okutuusa lwe ndizuulira Omukama ekifo, Omuyinza owa Yakobo, ekisulo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Twakiwulirako mu Efurata, ne tukisanga mu miseetwe gy'e Yari." 
Psalms132:7 Tuyingire mu kisulo kye, tweyale ku muziziko gw'ebigere bye." 
Psalms132:8 Ayi Mukama, situka, ojje mu buwummuliro bwo, ggwe n'Essanduuku y'amaanyi go." 
Psalms132:9 Bakabona bo bambale obutuukirivu, n'abatuukirivu bo bajaganye." 
Psalms132:10 Olw'okubeera Dawudi omuweereza wo, togobaganya maaso ga musiige wo." 
Psalms132:11 Omukama yalayirira Dawudi, ekirayiro kyatalimenyawo nti: “Omwana yennyini gwe weezaalidde, gwe nditeeka ku nnamulondo yo." 
Psalms132:12 Abaana bo bwe baliba bakuumye endagaano yange n'ebiragiro bye mbayigiriza, n'abaana baabwe bennyini balituula ku nnamulondo yo emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Psalms132:13 Anti Omukama yalonda Siyoni, yamusiima abeere ekitebe kye nti:" 
Psalms132:14 “Buno bwe buwummuliro bwange emirembe gyonna; wano we nnaasulanga, kubanga nsiimyewo." 
Psalms132:15 Nzija kumuweera n'ebyokulya eby'omwero; abaavu be mbakkuse n'emmere. 
Psalms132:16 Bakabona be ndibambaza obulokofu, n'abatuukirivu be balijaganya ebitayogerekeka." 
Psalms132:17 Ndisibusiza wano Dawudi obuyinza, nditegekera omusiige wange omumuli." 
Psalms132:18 Abalabe be ndibambaza ensonyi, naye ku mutwe gwe engule ye eritemagana.”" 
Psalms133:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Lwa Dawudi. Nga kirungi, ate nga kisanyusa ab'oluganda okusula awamu!" 
Psalms133:2 Kuli ng'omuzigo ogw'omuwendo mu mutwe, ogukulukutira mu kirevu, mu kirevu kya Aroni, ogukulukutira mu bbona ly'ekyambalo kye." 
Psalms133:3 Kuli ng'omusulo gw'oku Kerumoni nga gugwa ku lusozi Siyoni; Eyo Omukama gye yagemulira omukisa n'obulamu emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms134:1 Oluyimba olw'amambuka. Abange, mugulumize Omukama mwenna abaweereza b'Omukama, mmwe abaweereza mu nnyumba y'Omukama ekiro kyonna." 
Psalms134:2 Musitulire emikono gyammwe eri Ekitukuvu, mutendereze Omukama." 
Psalms134:3 Omukama eyakola eggulu n'ensi akuwe omukisa ng'ayima mu Siyoni. 
Psalms135:1 Alleluuya. Mutende erinnya ly'Omukama, mutendereze mmwe abaweereza b'Omukama." 
Psalms135:2 Abaweereza mu nnyumba y'Omukama, mu mpya z'ennyumba ya Katonda waffe." 
Psalms135:3 Mutende Omukama, kubanga Omukama mulungi; muyimbire erinnya lye ettendo kubanga lisanyusa." 
Psalms135:4 Anti Omukama yeeroboza Yakobo, ne Yisirayeli okuba ekkula lye." 
Psalms135:5 Kino kye mmanyi, nti Omukama mukulu, Katonda waffe akira balubaale bonna." 
Psalms135:6 Omukama byonna by'ayagala abikola mu ggulu ne mu nsi, mu nnyanja ne mu ddubi yonna." 
Psalms135:7 Ebire abiggya mu nkuzi y'ensi, akola ebimyanso aggyemu enkuba, ne kibuyaga n'amusumulula mu materekero ge." 
Psalms135:8 Eyakuba ebiggulanda mu Misiri, mu bantu ne mu bisolo." 
Psalms135:9 Yakola obubonero n'ebyewuunyisa mu ggwe, Misiri, ku Faraawo ne ku baweereza be bonna." 
Psalms135:10 Eyakuba amawanga enkumu, n'atta bakabaka ab'amaanyi:" 
Psalms135:11 Sikoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, ne Ogi, kabaka w'e Basani, ne bakabaka bonna ab'e Kanaani." 
Psalms135:12 Ensi yaabwe n'agigaba bubeere busika, busika eri Yisirayeli, abantu be." 
Psalms135:13 Ayi Mukama, erinnya lyo libeerawo emirembe gyonna, ayi Mukama, ojjukirwa mu mazadde n'amazadde." 
Psalms135:14 Anti Omukama aliworereza abantu be, alisaasira abaweereza be." 
Psalms135:15 Ebifaananyi by'amawanga ebya balubaale ffeeza bufeeza na zaabu, byakolwa mikono gya bantu buntu." 
Psalms135:16 Emimwa birina, naye tebyogera; amaaso birina, naye tebiraba." 
Psalms135:17 Amatu birina, naye tebiwulira; ne mu kamwa kaabyo temuva mukka." 
Psalms135:18 Ababikola balibifaanana, na bonna ababyesiga." 
Psalms135:19 Mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, mugulumize Omukama; mmwe nnyumba ya Aroni, mugulumize Omukama." 
Psalms135:20 Mmwe nnyumba ya Leevi, mugulumize Omukama; abatya Omukama, mugulumize Omukama." 
Psalms135:21 Omukama agulumizibwe okuva mu Siyoni, oyo asula mu Yeruzaalemu. Alleluuya!" 
Psalms136:1 Mwebaze Omukama, kubanga mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:2 Mwebaze Katonda wa balubaale, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:3 Mwebaze Omukama w'abakama, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:4 Eyakola ebyewuunyisa eby'ekitalo obw'omu ati, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:5 Eyakola eggulu n'obukugu, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:6 Eyayanjuluza ensi ku mazzi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:7 Eyakola ebyaka ebinene, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:8 Enjuba efuge emisana, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:9 Omwezi n'emmunyeenye bifuge ekiro, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:10 Eyatta abaggulanda ba Misiri, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:11 N'aggyayo Yisirayeli mu bo wakati, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:12 N'omukono ogw'amaanyi, n'omukono omugolole, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:13 Eyayawulamu awabiri Ennyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:14 N'asomosa Yisirayeli ng'amuyisa mu yo wakati, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:15 Eyayiwa Faraawo n'eggye lye mu Nnyanja y'Ebiwuuwa, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:16 Eyayisa abantu be mu ddungu, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:17 Eyakuba bakabaka ab'amaanyi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:18 N'atta bakabaka ab'obuyinza, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:19 Sikoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:20 Ne Ogi, kabaka w'e Basani, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:21 Ensi ye n'agigaba ng'obusika, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:22 Ng'obusika ku Yisirayeli omuwereza we, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:23 Eyatujjukira mu kutoowazibwa kwaffe, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:24 N'atununula ku balabe baffe, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:25 Awa emmere buli kitonde, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:26 Mugulumize Katonda w'eggulu, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms137:1 Ku migga gy'e Babiloni gye twatuulanga ne tulira bwe twajjukiranga Siyoni. 
Psalms137:2 Ku nzibaziba z'omu nsi eyo, kwe twawanikanga ennanga zaffe." 
Psalms137:3 Anti eyo abaatutwala mu busibe gye baatusabiranga ennyimba; abaatulabya ennaku gye baatugambiranga tuyimbe n'essanyu nti: “Mutuyimbire mu nnyimba za Siyoni.” 
Psalms137:4 Tuyimba tutya ennyimba z'Omukama mu nsi engwira? 
Psalms137:5 Obanga nkwerabidde, ayi Yeruzaalemu, omukono gwange ogwa ddyo gukale." 
Psalms137:6 Olulimi lunkwatire ku kibuno obanga sikujjukira, obanga Yeruzaalemu, si ggwe nkiza buli ssanyu lyange lyonna." 
Psalms137:7 Ayi Mukama, jjukira abantu ba Edomu ku lunaku Yeruzaalemu lwe yagwa. Baagambanga nti: “Mukimenyewo, mukimenyewo, okutuukira ddala ku myaliiro gyakyo.”" 
Psalms137:8 Ayi muwala wa Babiloni, omuzikiriza, yeesiimye alikuweera olw'ebyo bye watukola;" 
Psalms137:9 yeesiimye aliddira amabujje go n'agaseseggula ku njazi. 
Psalms138:1 Lwa Dawudi. Nkwebaza, ayi Mukama, n'omutima gwange gwonna, nnaakuyimbira ettendo mu maaso g'abamalayika." 
Psalms138:2 Ndyeyala ntunuulidde Ekiggwa kyo ekitukuvu, ne ngulumiza erinnya lyo, olw'okubeera ekisa kyo n'obwesigwa bwo, kubanga wagulumiza ekigambo kyo n'erinnya lyo okusinga byonna." 
Psalms138:3 Ku lunaku lwe nakukoowoola, wannyanukula; wayongera amaanyi mu mwoyo gwange." 
Psalms138:4 Ayi Mukama, bakabaka b'ensi bonna bakugulumize, kubanga bawulidde ebigambo by'akamwa ko." 
Psalms138:5 Bayimbe amakubo g'Omukama, kubanga ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kinene." 
Psalms138:6 Wadde Omukama ayitiridde, kyokka afa ku mutene; naye omwekuza amulengerera wala." 
Psalms138:7 Bwe mba ntambulira mu kabi, okuuma obulamu bwange; ogololera omukono gwo ku busungu bw'abalabe bange; n'omukono gwo ogwa ddyo n'ondokola." 
Psalms138:8 Omukama, alinsasulira ebyange. Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo kya mirembe gyonna; tonyooma mirimu gya mikono gyo." 
Psalms139:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Lwa Dawudi. Zabbuli. Ayi Mukama, onneekebejja era ommanyi." 
Psalms139:2 Ommanyi bwe ntuula ne bwe nsituka; ebirowoozo byange obikengera wala. 
Psalms139:3 Onneetegereza bwe ntambula ne bwe mpummula; amakubo gange gonna ogatunuulira. 
Psalms139:4 Ekigambo kiba tekinnanzija na ku lulimi, ggwe, ayi Mukama, nga wakitegedde dda." 
Psalms139:5 Onneetoolodde mu maaso n'emabega; ontaddeko omukono gwo. 
Psalms139:6 Engeri gy'ommanyiimu enneewuunyisa; mpitirivu, sigitegeera." 
Psalms139:7 Ndage wa okudduka omwoyo gwo? Nzirukire wa okudduka amaaso go? 
Psalms139:8 Bwe nninnya mu ggulu, gy'oli; bwe ngalamira emagombe, nayo gy'oli." 
Psalms139:9 Ne bwe mbuukira ku biwaawaatiro bya mmambya, nsule ennyanja gy'ekoma," 
Psalms139:10 n'eyo omukono gwo gulinkulembera, ddyo wo alinnyweza." 
Psalms139:11 Ne bwe ŋŋamba nti: “Kiryose enzikiza enkweke, n'ekitangaala kifuuke kizikiza okunneebungulula,”" 
Psalms139:12 n'enzikiza yennyini teriba nkwafu w'oli; ekiro kiritangaala nga misana, kubanga ku ggwe enzikiza eba nga kitangaala." 
Psalms139:13 Anti ggwe watonda ebindimu byonna, wanduka wamu mu lubuto lwa nnyabo." 
Psalms139:14 Nkutendereza, kubanga ndi wa kitalo era neewuunyisa; emirimu gyo gyewuunyisa; ekyo nkimanyi bulungi." 
Psalms139:15 Amagumba gange tegaakukwekebwa, bwe nali nkolebwa eyo mu nkuzi, nga ndukibwa wamu ekkuzimu eyo mu nsi." 
Psalms139:16 Amaaso go gandaba nga nkyakolebwa bukolebwa, era n'ennaku zange zonna mpandiike mu kitabo kyo; zaategekebwa dda nga n'olumu luti terunnabaawo." 
Psalms139:17 Ayi Katonda, ebirowoozo byo nga bya muwendo gye ndi; byonna wamu nga bingi bulala!" 
Psalms139:18 Mba wa kubibala, bisinga n'omusenyu obungi; bwe nzuukuka, era mba nkyali naawe." 
Psalms139:19 Ayi Katonda, singa nno otta ababi. Munviire, mmwe abantu abayiwa omusaayi," 
Psalms139:20 abo abakwogerako obubi, ne bakwewanikako awatali nsonga." 
Psalms139:21 Ayi Mukama, sikyawa abakukyawa? Saatamwa abo abakusitukiramu?" 
Psalms139:22 Mbakyawa ne nkomekkereza, nga bwe bandibadde abalabe bange." 
Psalms139:23 Mpenja, ayi Katonda, omanye omutima gwange, ngeza, otegeere engeri zange." 
Psalms139:24 Laba oba ekkubo lye nkutte bbi, onzize mu kkubo ery'emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms140:1 Eri omuyimbisa. Zabbuli. Ya Dawudi. 
Psalms140:2 Ayi Mukama, mponya abantu ababi, ntaasa abantu abakambwe," 
Psalms140:3 abalowoolereza eby'akabi mu mitima gyabwe; buli lunaku basitula ntalo. 
Psalms140:4 Ennimi zaabwe bazisongola ng'ez'omusota, obusagwa bw'essalambwa buli wansi w'emimwa gyabwe." 
Psalms140:5 Ntaasa, ayi Mukama, omukono gw'omubi; mponya abantu abakambwe, abalowooza okutega ebigere byange." 
Psalms140:6 Abeekuza bankwese ekitimba bataayizza emiguwa gy'olutuula lwabwe; ne gye mpita batezeeyo emitego. 
Psalms140:7 Ŋŋamba Omukama nti: “Ggwe Katonda wange,” ayi Mukama, wuliriza eddoboozi ly'okuwanjaga kwange." 
Psalms140:8 Ayi Mukama Omuyinza, amaanyi g'okulokoka kwange, eyambikkirira omutwe ku lunaku olw'olutalo," 
Psalms140:9 ababi tobawa bye beegomba, ayi Mukama; entegeka zaabwe tozireka kutuukirira." 
Psalms140:10 Abenneetoolodde basituse; obwonoonefu bw'emimwa gyabwe bubabikke. 
Psalms140:11 Amanda ag'omuliro gabayiikire; bagwe mu ntubiro, baleme kugivaamu." 
Psalms140:12 Omuntu ow'olulimi olukonjera aleme kunywerawo mu nsi, n'omuntu omukambwe obubenje bumuyigganye okumusaanyaawo." 
Psalms140:13 Mmanyi nti Omukama alwanirira omunaku, awolereza ensonga z'abaavu." 
Psalms140:14 Mu mazima abatuukirivu baligulumizanga erinnya lyo, abaluŋŋamu balibeeranga mu maaso go." 
Psalms141:1 Zabbuli. Ya Dawudi. Ayi Mukama, nkoowoola gy'oli, nzirukirira mangu. Wuliriza eddoboozi lyange bwe nkukoowoola." 
Psalms141:2 Essaala yange eyambuke mu maso go ng'obubaani, Bwe nsitula emikono gyange, kibeere ng'ekitambiro eky'akawungeezi." 
Psalms141:3 Ayi Mukama, akamwa kange kasseeko omukuumi; nkuumira emiryango gy'emimwa gyange." 
Psalms141:4 Omutima gwange toguleka kwewunzikira ku kibi, okwetaba mu bikolwa ebibi eby'abakozi b'ebyambyone; tondeka kulya ku bijjulo byabwe." 
Psalms141:5 Ka omutuukirivu ambonereze na kisa, ankomeko, naye omuzigo gw'oli akola ekibi tegulisiiga mutwe gwange; kubanga bwe mba nsaba, nnwanyisa bulijjo obwonoonefu bwabwe." 
Psalms141:6 Abafuzi baabwe nga bamaze okusulinkibwa ku njazi, olwo balimanya nti ebigambo byange byalinga birungi." 
Psalms141:7 Ng'amafunfugu g'ettaka bwe gasaasaanyizibwa ku ttaka, n'amagumba gaabwe bwe galisansibwa gatyo ku mimwa gy'amagombe." 
Psalms141:8 Naye ayi Mukama Omuyinza, amaaso gange gali ku ggwe; ewuwo gye nzirukira, tondeka kufa." 
Psalms141:9 Mponya mu bitimba bye banteze, ne mu mitego gy'abakola obubi." 
Psalms141:10 Ababi bagwire wamu mu bitimba byabwe, naye nze mpitewo mu ddembe." 
Psalms142:1 Masikili ya Dawudi; lwe yali mu mpuku. Ssaala. 
Psalms142:2 Nkoowoola Omukama mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka, mpanjagira Omukama mu ddoboozi essitufu." 
Psalms142:3 Nnyanjula okwemulugunya kwange mu maaso ge, ne ntegeeza ennaku yange mu maaso ge." 
Psalms142:4 Ng'omutima gunnyenjebuse, ggwe omanyi ekkubo lyange. Mu kkubo mwe mpita, mwe bankwekedde ebitimba." 
Psalms142:5 Nkyukidde ku ddyo ndabe, naye teri n'omu anfaako. Sirina buddukiro, mpaawo afa ku bulamu bwange." 
Psalms142:6 Mpanjaga gy'oli, ayi Mukama; ŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe buddukiro bwange, omugabo gwange, mu nsi y'abalamu.”" 
Psalms142:7 Wuliriza omulanga gwange, kubanga nakuwaziddwa nnyo. Mponya abanjigganya, kubanga bampitiridde amaanyi." 
Psalms142:8 Ggya obulamu bwange mu kkomera, ndyoke ngulumize erinnya lyo; olwo abatuukirivu balinneebungulula kubanga oliba onkoledde ebirungi." 
Psalms143:1 Zabbuli ya Dawudi. Ayi Mukama, wulira essaala yange, wuliriza okuwanjaga kwange, olw'obwesigwa n'olw'obutuukirivu bwo nnyanukula." 
Psalms143:2 Omuweereza wo tomuyita kumuwozesa, kubanga teri mulamu aba mutuukirivu mu maaso go." 
Psalms143:3 Anti omulabe ayigganya obulamu bwange, ambetentera ku ttaka, ansuza mu nzikiza ng'abafu abaafa edda." 
Psalms143:4 N'omutima gunnyenjebuse, omutima gwange munda guwuniikiridde." 
Psalms143:5 Nzijukira ennaku ez'edda; neebuulirira byonna bye wakola, neefumiitiriza emikono gyo bye gyakola." 
Psalms143:6 Ngololera gy'oli emikono gyange; nkulumirwa ennyonta ng'ettaka ekkalu. 
Psalms143:7 Ayi Mukama, yanguwa okunnyanukula, anti omwoyo gumpweddemu; leka kunkweka maaso go, sikulwa nga mbeera ng'abo abakkirira mu bunnya." 
Psalms143:8 Ku makya mpa okuwulira ekisa kyo, kubanga nsuubira mu ggwe; ndaga ekkubo mwe mba ntambulira, kubanga gy'oli gye nsitulidde omwoyo gwange." 
Psalms143:9 Ayi Mukama, mponya abalabe bange, mu ggwe mwe neekwese." 
Psalms143:10 Njigiriza okukola ky'oyagala, kubanga ggwe Katonda wange. Mwoyo wo omulungi ankulembere mu nsi ey'omuseetwe." 
Psalms143:11 Olw'okubeera erinnya lyo, ayi Mukama, nkuuma nga ndi mulamu, mu butuukirivu bwo omwoyo gwange guggye mu nnaku." 
Psalms143:12 Olw'ekisa kyo sirisa abalabe bange, zikiriza bonna abampalana; kubanga nze ndi muweereza wo." 
Psalms144:1 Lwa Dawudi. Agulumizibwe Omukama olwazi lwange, emikono gyange agitendeka okutabaala, n'engalo zange azitendekera olutalo." 
Psalms144:2 Ye lwe lwazi lwange, ekigo kyange, bbugwe wange, Omulokozi wange, engabo yange, obuddukiro bwange, aŋŋondeza abantu bange." 
Psalms144:3 Ayi Mukama, omuntu ye ani gw'ossaako omwoyo, omwana w'omuntu ye ani kyova omufaako otyo?" 
Psalms144:4 Omuntu, mpaamu kantu; ennaku ze ziri ng'ekisiikirize ekiyita." 
Psalms144:5 Ayi Mukama, ssa eggulu lyo okkirire; kwata ku nsozi zittunke omukka." 
Psalms144:6 Myansa laddu obabunye emiwabo; lasa obusaale bwo obasimbulewo. 
Psalms144:7 Golola omukono gwo ng'oyima mu ggulu, omponye, onsikeyo mu mazzi amangi, mu mikono gy'ab'amawanga," 
Psalms144:8 ab'akamwa akoogera eby'obulimba, ne ddyo waabwe, ddyo ow'enkwe." 
Psalms144:9 Ayi Katonda, nzija kukuyimbira oluyimba oluggya, nzija kukuyimbira ku ntongooli y'enkoba ekkumi." 
Psalms144:10 Ggwe awa bakabaka obuwanguzi, ggwe awonyezza Dawudi omuweereza wo ekitala ky'ekibi." 
Psalms144:11 Nzigyayo era mponya mu mikono gy'ab'amawanga, ab'akamwa akoogera eby'obulimba, ne ddyo waabwe, ddyo ow'enkwe." 
Psalms144:12 Abaana baffe babe ng'ebimera ebyakula obulungi okuva mu buvubuka bwabyo; bawala baffe babe ng'empagi ez'omu nsonda, ezaawundibwa okuwoomya Ekiggwa." 
Psalms144:13 Amawanika gaffe gajjule, gabooge buli mmere yonna; endiga zaffe zibeere mu nkumi, ne ku malundiro gaffe zibeere mu bukumi;" 
Psalms144:14 Ente zaffe zibeere nzito n'amawako; wabulewo okwabya ebigo, okutwala mu busibe n'okukuba ebiwoobe ku nguudo zaffe." 
Psalms144:15 Beesiimye abantu abafuna ebyo, beesiimye abantu Omukama nga ye Katonda waabwe." 
Psalms145:1 Ettendo. Lwa Dawudi. Ndikugulumiza Katonda wange, Kabaka; nditendereza erinnya lyo emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms145:2 Ndikutenda buli olukedde, ndigulumiza erinnya lyo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms145:3 Omukama mukulu ddala, asaanidde nnyo okutendebwa, obukulu bwe tebwefumiitirizika." 
Psalms145:4 Ezzadde liritendera linnaalyo by'okola; balirangirira ebikolwa byo eby'amaanyi. 
Psalms145:5 Balyogera ku kitiibwa ekinene eky'obukulu bwo, ndyebuulirira ebyewuunyisa byo." 
Psalms145:6 Balyogera ku maanyi g'ebitiisa by'okola, ndittottola obukulu bwo." 
Psalms145:7 Balirombojja obulungi bwo obungi, ne batendereza n'essanyu obutuukirivu bwo." 
Psalms145:8 Omukama ayagala era musaasizi; tasunguwala mangu, ajjudde ekisa." 
Psalms145:9 Omukama mulungi eri bonna, wa kisa eri byonna bye yakola." 
Psalms145:10 Ayi Mukama, ebitonde byo byonna bikutenda, n'abatuukirivu bo bonna balikutendereza." 
Psalms145:11 Balyogera ku kitiibwa ky'obwakabaka bwo, ne ku buyinza bwo," 
Psalms145:12 bamanyise abaana b'abantu eby'obuyinza by'okola, n'ekitiibwa ky'obwakabaka bwo obw'ettendo." 
Psalms145:13 Obwakabaka bwo, bwakabaka bwa mirembe gyonna, n'obufuzi bwo busigalawo mu mazadde n'amazadde. Omukama mwesigwa mu bigambo bye byonna, wa kisa eri byonna bye yakola." 
Psalms145:14 Omukama awanirira bonna abagwa; akutaamulula bonna abeegose. 
Psalms145:15 Amaaso ga buli kintu gali ku ggwe, obiwe kye birya ng'obudde butuuse." 
Psalms145:16 Oyanjuluza ekibatu kyo, n'okkusa buli kiramu nga bw'oyagala." 
Psalms145:17 Omukama mutuukirivu mu makubo ge gonna, era mwesigwa mu mirimu gye gyonna." 
Psalms145:18 Omukama, abamukoowoola bonna abali kumpi; bonna abamukoowoolera ddala mu mazima." 
Psalms145:19 Abamutya, kye baagala alikikola; awulira okuwanjaga kwabwe n'abawonya." 
Psalms145:20 Omukama akuuma bonna abamwagala, naye abakola obubi bonna alibazikiriza." 
Psalms145:21 Akamwa kange kalyogera ettendo ly'Omukama; buli kiramu kigulumize erinnya lye ettukuvu, emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms146:1 Alleluuya! Mwoyo gwange, tendereza Omukama." 
Psalms146:2 Omukama ndimutenderezanga obulamu bwange bwonna, ebbanga lyonna nga ndi mulamu, ndiyimbiranga Katonda wange ettendo." 
Psalms146:3 Muleke kwesiga bakungu, abantu obuntu omutava bulokofu;" 
Psalms146:4 omwoyo bwe gubavaamu, nga badda mu ttaka, ku olwo byonna bye baatetenkanyanga lwe bizikirira." 
Psalms146:5 Yeesiimye oyo Katonda wa Yakobo gw'ayamba, asuubira mu Mukama Katonda we," 
Psalms146:6 eyakola eggulu n'ensi, ennyanja na byonna ebizirimu; Omukama mwesigwa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms146:7 Awolereza abanyigiriziddwa, abayala n'abawa emmere. Omukama asumulula abasibe;" 
Psalms146:8 Omukama azibula amaaso ga bamuzibe; Omukama akutaamulula abeegose; Omukama ayagala abatuukirivu. 
Psalms146:9 Omukama akuuma abagwira; awanirira enfuuzi ne nnamwandu, naye ekkubo ly'ababi aligootaanya." 
Psalms146:10 Omukama aliramula emirembe gyonna, Katonda wo, ayi Siyoni, mu mazadde n'amazadde. Alleluuya!" 
Psalms147:1 Alleluuya! Nga kirungi okuyimbira Katonda waffe; nga kisanyusa okumusitulira ettendo! 
Psalms147:2 Omukama azimba buggya Yeruzaalemu; akuŋŋaanya abasaasaanye ba Yisirayeli. 
Psalms147:3 Awonya abamenyese omutima, n'asiba ebiwundu byabwe." 
Psalms147:4 Abala akeesedde k'emmunyeenye, n'aziyita buli emu erinnya." 
Psalms147:5 Mukama waffe mukulu, wa maanyi, wa buyinza; okutegeera kwe tekuliiko kigero." 
Psalms147:6 Omukama awanirira abanafu, naye ababi abalinnimula ku ttaka." 
Psalms147:7 Muyimbire Omukama nga mumwebaza, mumuyimbire Katonda waffe ku nnanga." 
Psalms147:8 Abikka eggulu n'ebire, n'awa ensi enkuba, n'ameza omuddo ku nsozi." 
Psalms147:9 Awa ebisolo emmere yaabyo, n'obwana bwa nnamuŋŋoona bwe buleekaana." 
Psalms147:10 Essanyu lye terimuli mu maanyi ga mbalaasi, wadde mu kuwenyuka kw'omuntu," 
Psalms147:11 wabula Omukama asanyukira mu abo abamutya, abasuubira mu kisa kye. (147)" 
Psalms147:12 Yeruzaalemu, tendereza Omukama; Siyoni, tendereza Katonda wo." 
Psalms147:13 Kubanga yanyweza emiyingo gy'enzigi zo, n'aweera mu ggwe abaana bo omukisa." 
Psalms147:14 Ensalo zo yaziwa eddembe, n'akukkusa n'eŋŋano esinga obulungi." 
Psalms147:15 Asindika obubaka bwe mu nsi; ekigambo kye kidduka mangu. 
Psalms147:16 Abunya wonna omuzira ng'ebyoya by'endiga, obubooya bw'omuzira n'abuwandagaza ng'evvu." 
Psalms147:17 Akasuka amayinja ge ag'omuzira ng'obukunkumuka; ani asobola okugumira obutiti bwe? 
Psalms147:18 Asindika ekigambo kye ne bisaanuuka, afuuwa empewo ye amazzi ne gakulukuta." 
Psalms147:19 Yabuulira Yakobo ekigambo kye, ne Yisirayeli, amateeka n'ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms147:20 Mpaawo ggwanga ddala lyonna lye yakolera atyo; ebiragiro bye teyabibamanyisa. Alleluuya! 
Psalms148:1 Alleluuya. Mutendereze Omukama nga muyima mu ggulu, mutendereze Omukama waggulu eyo." 
Psalms148:2 Mwenna bamalayika be, mumutendereze; amagye ge mwenna, mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:3 Enjuba n'omwezi, mumutendereze; emmunyeenye zonna ezaaka, mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:4 Obwengula bw'eggulu, mumutendereze, n'amazzi gonna waggulu w'eggulu." 
Psalms148:5 Bitende erinnya ly'Omukama, kubanga ye yalagira ne bitondebwa." 
Psalms148:6 Yabissaawo bibeerewo emirembe n'emirembe; yabiwa ekiragiro ekitaliggwaawo. 
Psalms148:7 Mutende Omukama nga muyima ku nsi, ssessota w'omu nnyanja naawe eddubi wenna," 
Psalms148:8 laddu n'omuzira, sserugi n'olume, n'empewo eya kikuŋŋunta ekola ky'agambye," 
Psalms148:9 ensozi n'obusozi, emiti egy'ebibala n'entolookyo zonna," 
Psalms148:10 ebisolo eby'ettale n'ente zonna, ebyewalula n'ebinyonyi ebibuuka," 
Psalms148:11 bakabaka b'ensi n'amawanga gonna, abakungu n'abalamuzi bonna ab'ensi," 
Psalms148:12 abavubuka abalenzi n'abawala, abakadde n'abato." 
Psalms148:13 Batendereze erinnya ly'Omukama, kubanga erinnya lye lye lyokka erisukkulumye; ekitiibwa kye kisukkirivu okukira ensi n'eggulu." 
Psalms148:14 Yasitusiza abantu be amaanyi, ettendo ly'abatuukirivu be bonna, ly'Abayisirayeli, abantu abamuli ku lusegere. Alleluuya." 
Psalms149:1 Alleluuya. Muyimbire Omukama oluyimba oluggya, ettendo lye livuge mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abatuukirivu." 
Psalms149:2 Yisirayeli asanyukire ayamukola, abantu ba Siyoni bajaganyize mu kabaka waabwe." 
Psalms149:3 Batendereze erinnya lye nga bazina, bamuyimbire n'obugoma n'ennanga." 
Psalms149:4 Kubanga Omukama asanyukira mu bantu be, abanaku abagulumiza n'obuwanguzi." 
Psalms149:5 Abatuukirivu bajaganye mu kitiibwa, basanyukire mu bitanda byabwe." 
Psalms149:6 Ettendo lya Katonda libeere mu kamwa kaabwe, n'ekitala ekyogi ku njuyi zombi kibadde mu mikono gyabwe," 
Psalms149:7 bagende bawoolere eggwanga ku bantu, babonereze amawanga;" 
Psalms149:8 basibe bakabaka baabwe mu masamba, n'abakungu baabwe empingu ez'ebyuma," 
Psalms149:9 batuukirize batyo ekibonerezo ekyabasalirwa. Ekyo kye kitiibwa ky'abatuukirivu be bonna. Alleluuya! 
Psalms150:1 Alleluuya! Mutendereze Omukama mu Kitukuvu kye; mumutendereze mu lubaale lwe olw'amaanyi. 
Psalms150:2 Mumutendereze olw'ebikolwa by'amaanyi ge; mumutendereze olw'obungi bw'obukulu bwe. 
Psalms150:3 Mumutendereze nga mufuuwa eŋŋombe, mumutendereze n'entongooli n'ennanga." 
Psalms150:4 Mumutendereze n'obugoma n'amazina, mumutendereze n'enkoba envuzi n'endere." 
Psalms150:5 Mumutendereze n'ensaazo ezisaala, mumutendereze n'ensaazo ezivuga." 
Psalms150:6 Buli kiramu kyonna kitendereze Omukama. Alleluuya! 
Proverbs1:1 Engero za Solomoni, mutabani wa Dawudi, Kabaka wa Yisirayeli:" 
Proverbs1:2 Olw'okuyigiriza amagezi n'obugunjufu, okutegeera ebigambo n'obutegeevu," 
Proverbs1:3 okufuna okugunjulwa, okumanya, obutuukirivu, obutuufu n'obuluŋŋamu;" 
Proverbs1:4 okuyigiriza abato obwegendereza, n'abavubuka okumanya n'ennamula entuufu;" 
Proverbs1:5 Ow'amagezi aziwulire, yeeyongere okumanya, n'omutegeevu afune ebibuuliriro," 
Proverbs1:6 okutegeera enfumo n'engero, ebigambo by'abagezi ko n'ebikoco." 
Proverbs1:7 Okutya Omukama amagezi mwe gasookera, naye abasiru amagezi n'okugunjulwa bagaya bigaye." 
Proverbs1:8 Wulira, mwana wange, eŋŋunjula ya kitaawo, etteeka lya nnyoko tolibuukangako;" 
Proverbs1:9 kubanga biriba ng'engule ewoomya omutwe gwo, ng'ebibira mu bulago bwo." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wange, aboonoonyi bwe bakusikirizanga, tobagonderanga." 
Proverbs1:11 Bwe bakugambanga nti: “Jjangu naffe, twekwekerere okuyiwa omusaayi; tuliimise ataliiko musango awatali nsonga" 
Proverbs1:12 tubamire ng'amagombe nga balamu, nga balamba ng'abo abakkirira mu bunnya;" 
Proverbs1:13 tujja kwefunira eby'omuwendo byonna, amayumba gaffe tugajjuze omunyago;" 
Proverbs1:14 tuwagire, ffenna awamu tunaagatta ensawo,”" 
Proverbs1:15 mwana wange, totambulanga nabo; ekigere kyo kitangire obukubo bwabwe;" 
Proverbs1:16 kubanga ebigere byabwe biddukira mangu eri ekibi, banguyira eky'okuyiwa omusaayi." 
Proverbs1:17 Akatimba okakasukira bwereere bwe ziba ng'ennyonyi ziraba ziti. 
Proverbs1:18 Bo bennyini omusaayi gwabwe gwe baba beekwekeredde, obulamu bwabwe bwe baba baliimisa." 
Proverbs1:19 Bwe gatyo amakubo g'omulyazaamaanyi bwe gaba, obulyazaamaanyi buzikiriza nnyinibwo." 
Proverbs1:20 Amagezi galangirira ebweru, gateera eddoboozi lyago mu nguudo;" 
Proverbs1:21 galeekaanira mu masaŋŋanzira, mu mizigo gy'emiryango gy'ekibuga googera nti:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Ababuyabuya munaatuusa wa okwagala obubuyabuya? Abasekerera, munaatuusa wa okusanyukira okusekerera, n'abasiru okukyawa amagezi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Singa mufudde ku kukomako kwe mbakomyeko, nandibafukumulidde ebindi ku mutima, nandibamanyisizza ebirowoozo byange." 
Proverbs1:24 Naye kubanga nkoowodde, ne mugaana, ne ngolola omukono gwange, ne wabula ategereza;" 
Proverbs1:25 ne mugaya okubuulirira kwange, ne bye mbakomyeko, temubitutte," 
Proverbs1:26 nange nno kyendiva nseka nga muzikirira, ne nkudaala nga muli mu kacwano;" 
Proverbs1:27 Okuzikirira kwammwe kulibajjira ng'omuyaga akabenje ne kabavunjaga nga kikuŋŋunta, n'ennaku n'obulemu ne bibajjira." 
Proverbs1:28 “Olwo balinkoowoola, naye sigenda kubaanukula; balinnoonya, naye tebagenda kunzuula." 
Proverbs1:29 Kubanga baakyawa okumanya, tebaalondawo kutya Mukama." 
Proverbs1:30 Kubanga tebaatwala bibuuliriro byange, byonna bye nabakomako baabinyooma," 
Proverbs1:31 balirya ku bibala by'ekkubo lyabwe, balikkuta enkwe zaabwe." 
Proverbs1:32 Kubanga obulalambavu bw'ababuyabuya bwennyini bwe bulibatta, n'okweyibaala kw'abasiru kugenda kubazikiriza." 
Proverbs1:33 Naye ampulira alituula ntende, aliba mu ddembe, awatali kabi k'atya.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wange, bw'onokkiriza ebigambo byange, n'ebiragiro byange n'obitereka mu mutima gwo," 
Proverbs2:2 okutu kwo n'okutega kuwulirize amagezi, n'omutima gwo n'oguwunzikira eri okutegeera," 
Proverbs2:3 bw'onoolaajaniranga obugezi, n'okoowooleranga okutegeera," 
Proverbs2:4 amagezi n'oganoonya nga ssente, n'ogawuukuula ng'awuukuula amakula amakusike," 
Proverbs2:5 olwo olitegeera okutya Omukama, oligguka ku kutegeera Katonda." 
Proverbs2:6 Kubanga Omukama y'agaba amagezi, mu kamwa ke mwe muva okutegeera n'okumanya." 
Proverbs2:7 Abatuufu abaterekedde amagezi; ye ngabo y'abo abatambulira mu bulungi," 
Proverbs2:8 ng'akuuma amakubo g'abatuufu, alabirira amakubo g'abatuukirivu." 
Proverbs2:9 Olwo olitegeera obutuukirivu, obutuufu n'obuluŋŋamu, na buli kkubo ddungi." 
Proverbs2:10 Kubanga amagezi galikujja mu mutima, n'okumanya kulisanyusa omwoyo gwo." 
Proverbs2:11 Obulabufu bulikukuuma, n'okutegeera kulikulabirira," 
Proverbs2:12 n'owonyezebwa ekkubo ebbi, abantu ab'enjogera emmambaavu:" 
Proverbs2:13 abalekerera obukubo obuluŋŋamu, ne bakwata amakubo ag'enzikiza;" 
Proverbs2:14 abasanyukira mu kukola obubi, ne basagambiriza mu bubambaavu bw'ekibi;" 
Proverbs2:15 ab'amakubo amabi, n'entambula enkyamu." 
Proverbs2:16 Galikuwonya omukazi omwenzi, n'omukazi malaaya ayogera ebiseemyaseemya," 
Proverbs2:17 aleka eri munne gwe yafuna mu buvubuka bwe, ne yeerabira endagaano ya Katonda we." 
Proverbs2:18 Ennyumba ye etwala mu lumbe, n'obukubo bwe butwala mu mizimu." 
Proverbs2:19 Bonna abayingira gy'ali, tebadda; tebalisanga kkubo lya bulamu." 
Proverbs2:20 Bw'otyo olitambulira mu kkubo ly'abalungi n'okuuma obukubo bw'abatuukirivu. 
Proverbs2:21 Anti abaluŋŋamu balisenga mu nsi, abatambulira mu bulungi be baligisigalamu." 
Proverbs2:22 Naye ababi balikutulwa ku nsi, n'abayisa obubi baligiggyibwako." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wange, teweerabira bye nkuyigiriza, ebiragiro byange bikwate mu mutima gwo." 
Proverbs3:2 Biryongera ku nnaku zo n'emyaka gy'obulamu bwo, ne bikuwa eddembe." 
Proverbs3:3 Okusaasira n'amazima tebikubulangako; bisibire ddala mu bulago bwo, biwandiike ku bipande by'omutima gwo." 
Proverbs3:4 Lw'onoosanga ekisa n'erinnya eddungi, mu maaso ga Katonda n'abantu." 
Proverbs3:5 Weesige Omukama n'omutima gwo gwonna, teweemaliranga ku kumanya kwo kwokka." 
Proverbs3:6 Mu makubo go gonna mulowoozengako, aliruŋŋamya obukubo bwo." 
Proverbs3:7 Teweemanyanga magezi; tya Katonda, weewale ekibi." 
Proverbs3:8 Kino kireetera omubiri gwo obulamu, n'amagumba go ne kigawa okuvubirizibwa." 
Proverbs3:9 Wa Omukama ekitiibwa ng'otoola ku bintu byo; ng'omuwa ku bibala ebisooka eby'ebyo byonna by'obazizza. 
Proverbs3:10 Olwo amawanika go galijjula eŋŋano, n'amasogolero go ne gajjula evviini ne gabooga." 
Proverbs3:11 Togayanga ŋŋunjula ya Mukama, by'aba akukomyeko tobinyoomanga." 
Proverbs3:12 Kubanga Omukama akoma ku gw'ayagala, nga kitaawe w'omwana bw'akola omwana we gw'ayagala." 
Proverbs3:13 Omuntu agguse ku magezi, yeesiimye, eyeefunidde okutegeera." 
Proverbs3:14 Amagoba agalimu gakira agali mu ffeeza, ekigavaamu kikira ekiri mu zaabu omuyooyoote." 
Proverbs3:15 Ga muwendo okukira amakula gonna, tewali kye weegomba kya muwendo kigenkana." 
Proverbs3:16 Okuwangaala gakulina mu ddyo waago, ate mu kkono, obugagga n'ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs3:17 Amakubo gaago, makubo gasanyusa, n'obukubokubo bwago bwonna bwa ddembe." 
Proverbs3:18 Abagakutte gabafuukira muti gwa bulamu; beesiimye abagalina mu ngalo zaabwe. 
Proverbs3:19 Omukama ensi yagibangawo na magezi, n'eggulu yalinywezaayo na kutegeera." 
Proverbs3:20 N'amagezi ge yagabanyaamu obuziba, n'ebire ne bitonnyesa omusulo." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wange, kwata ebibuuliriro, goba obwegendereza; ebyo tebikuvanga ku maaso;" 
Proverbs3:22 omwoyo gwo birigubeerera bulamu, n'eby'okuwoomya obulago bwo." 
Proverbs3:23 Olwo oligendanga mu ddembe, ekigere kyo tekigenda kwesittala." 
Proverbs3:24 Bw'oliba weebase, togenda kutya; bw'oligalamira, otulo tugenda kukunyumira." 
Proverbs3:25 Leka kutya kyekango kya mbagirawo, na kuzikirira kw'ababi nga kubadde kuzze." 
Proverbs3:26 Kubanga Omukama alikuwa okuguma; alikuuma ekigere kyo kireme kukwatibwa mutego. 
Proverbs3:27 Tommanga kirungi oyo gwe kiteekwa okukolerwa, bw'obanga osobola okukikola." 
Proverbs3:28 Munno tomugambanga nti: “Genda, onodda; ndikuwa jjo,” sso ng'okirina." 
Proverbs3:29 Teweekoberanga munno kumukolera bubi, sso ng'atuula naawe ntende." 
Proverbs3:30 Toyombanga na muntu watali nsonga, nga talina ky'akukoze." 
Proverbs3:31 Omuntu omukambwe takukwasanga buggya; tokwatanga na limu ku makubo ge," 
Proverbs3:32 kubanga Omukama yeenyinyala omuntu ayisa obubi; abayisa obulungi gye mikwano gye. 
Proverbs3:33 Omukama avumirira ennyumba y'omubi, naye amaka g'abatuukirivu gafuna omukisa." 
Proverbs3:34 Abanyooma naye abanyooma; kyokka abeetoowaze alibagirira ekisa. 
Proverbs3:35 Abagezi balisikira ekitiibwa; naye abasiru balifuna kuswazibwa. 
Proverbs4:1 Baana bange, muwulire okubuulirira kwa kitammwe, mutegereze, mufune okutegeera." 
Proverbs4:2 Kubanga nzija kubawa okumanya okwa nnamaddala; temubuukanga ku bye njigiriza. 
Proverbs4:3 Bwe nali omwana, mu nnyumba ya kitange, nga nkyali muto, nga nzekka nze mwana wa nnyabo," 
Proverbs4:4 kitange yanjigiriza, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebigambo byange obinywezanga n'omutima gwo gwonna; okwatanga bye nkulagira, lw'olirama." 
Proverbs4:5 Weefunire amagezi, weefunire okutegeera; teweerabiranga bigambo byange, era tobibuukangako." 
Proverbs4:6 Tovanga ku magezi, gagenda kukukuuma, ogaagalanga, gagenda kukulabirira." 
Proverbs4:7 Amagezi gasooka gati: weefunire amagezi; waayo byonna by'olina weefunire okutegeera. 
Proverbs4:8 Gasuusuute, galikusukkulumya; gawambaatire, galikutuusa ku kitiibwa." 
Proverbs4:9 Omutwe gwo galigussaako engule ennungi, galikussaako omuge ogw'ekitiibwa.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Wulira, mwana wange, kkiriza bye ŋŋamba, emyaka gy'obulamu gyeyongere obungi." 
Proverbs4:11 Nkulaze ekkubo ery'amagezi ne nkuluŋŋamya mu makubo amaluŋŋamu. 
Proverbs4:12 Bw'olitambula, ebigere byo tebirisikattira, ne bw'olidduka emisinde, togenda kwesittala." 
Proverbs4:13 Nywerera ku by'oyigirizibwa, tobita; bikwate, kubanga byo bwe bulamu bwo." 
Proverbs4:14 Toyisanga bigere byo mu bukubo bw'ababi; totambuliranga mu kkubo ly'aboonoonyi. 
Proverbs4:15 Oliddukanga, tolisalanga; lidde ebbali, okwate gago." 
Proverbs4:16 Kubanga tebeebaka wabula nga bamaze kukolawo kabi, babulwa otulo okutuusa nga waliwo gwe basudde." 
Proverbs4:17 Okukola obubi ye mmere gye balya; obukambwe gwe mwenge gwe banywa. 
Proverbs4:18 Naye ekkubo ly'abatuukirivu liri ng'ekitangaala kya mmambya: kigenda kikanya okwaka okutuusa mu ttuntu. 
Proverbs4:19 Lyo ekkubo ly'ababi, nzikiza ekutte, tebamanyi na kwe beesittala." 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wange, tegereza bye ŋŋamba; bye njogera, bitegere amatu." 
Proverbs4:21 Tebikuvanga ku maaso; bikwate munda mu mutima gwo. 
Proverbs4:22 Abizuula, bimufuukira bulamu; biwonya omubiri gwe gwonna." 
Proverbs4:23 Omutima gwo gukuumire ddala butiribiri, mu gwo mwe muva obulamu." 
Proverbs4:24 Weegobeeko akamwa akoogera ebikyamu, weewalire ddala emimwa egirebula." 
Proverbs4:25 Tunulanga butereevu mu maaso; amaaso go gasimbenga mulambika. 
Proverbs4:26 Wekkaanye akakubo k'ebigere byo, kwata amakubo ago gokka amaluŋŋamu." 
Proverbs4:27 Totaganga kudda ku ddyo oba ku kkono; ekigere kyo okiggyanga awali ekibi. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wange, tegereza magezi gange; okutegeera kwange kutegere amatu," 
Proverbs5:2 olyoke weekuume mu bulabufu, n'emimwa gyo gikuume okumanya." 
Proverbs5:3 Emimwa gy'omukazi omwenzi gitonnyolokoka mubisi gwa njuki, by'ayogera binyirira okusinga omuzigo;" 
Proverbs5:4 naye oluvannyuma akaawa ng'omususa, asala ng'ekiso ekyogi ku njuyi zombi." 
Proverbs5:5 Ebigere bye biserengeta mu lumbe; ebigere bye bikutte ly'emagombe. 
Proverbs5:6 Takuuma kakubo ka bulamu, amakubo ge geenyoleza, ate ye tamanyi." 
Proverbs5:7 Kale nno, baana bange, mumpulire, ebigambo by'akamwa kange temubivaako." 
Proverbs5:8 Omuyitanga wala, tosembereranga mulyango gwa nnyumba ye," 
Proverbs5:9 sikulwa ng'ekitiibwa kyo okigabulira abalala, n'emyaka gyo n'ogiwa omukambwe." 
Proverbs5:10 Sikulwa ng'ab'ebweru beeriira bye wateganira, bye wafaabiinira ne bidda mu nnyumba y'omulala." 
Proverbs5:11 Ku nkomerero n'osinda, emifumbi n'omubiri nga biggweekeredde," 
Proverbs5:12 n'ogamba nti: “Bye banjigiriza lwaki nabikyawa, lwaki omutima gwange tegwasiima kunenyezebwa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Saawuliriza ddoboozi ly'abayigisa bange, n'abanjigiriza saabategera matu." 
Proverbs5:14 Kati ntuuse okuzikirira, wakati ng'ekibiina kikuŋŋaanye.”" 
Proverbs5:15 Amazzi ganywenga mu kidiba kyo, amazzi agakulukuta ag'omu luzzi lwo." 
Proverbs5:16 Enzizi zo za ndyaladde ebweru, za ndikoze emyala gy'amazzi mu nguudo?" 
Proverbs5:17 Enzizi zo zeemalize wekka, si za kugabana na b'ebweru." 
Proverbs5:18 Oluzzi lwo lubeere lwa mukisa; sanyukira mu mukazi w'omu buvubuka bwo: 
Proverbs5:19 akasirabo akaganzi, akaweewo akagonvu. Ka amabeere ge gakumatizenga bulijjo, okwagala kwe kukutamiizenga." 
Proverbs5:20 Mwana wange, lwaki wanditamidde omukazi malaaya, n'ogwa mu kifuba ky'atali wuwo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Kubanga amakubo g'omuntu Omukama agatunuulira; yekkaanya obukubo bwe bwonna. 
Proverbs5:22 Omubi, ebyambyone by'akola birimutega, emiguwa gy'ebibi bye girimumyumyula." 
Proverbs5:23 Kyaliva afa, kubanga teyeefuganga; awabye olw'obusiru bwe obungi." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wange, bwe weeyimiriranga munno, obanga owaddeyo akakalu olw'omugwira," 
Proverbs6:2 nga by'oyogedde bikusibye, ebigambo byo byennyini nga bikukwasizza mu mutego," 
Proverbs6:3 kale nno, mwana wange, okolanga oti okwewonya, anti kati oli mu buyinza bwa munno: Genda, yanguwako, omupeekereze ekisonyiwo;" 
Proverbs6:4 tokkiriza maaso go kulaba ku tulo, yadde ebikowe byo okuwujjaalako n'akatono." 
Proverbs6:5 Weewonye ng'ennangaazi, nga bwe yeggya mu mikono gy'omuyizzi, oba ng'ekinyonyi mu mikono gy'omutezi." 
Proverbs6:6 Genda eri enkuyege, ggwe omugayaavu, wekkaanye bw'ekola, naawe oyige amagezi." 
Proverbs6:7 Terina aduumira, nnampala oba omwami," 
Proverbs6:8 naye mu kyeya, yeetegekera emmere, mu bw'amakungula ekuŋŋaanya ky'erirya." 
Proverbs6:9 Oneebakiriza kutuusa wa ggwe omugayaavu? Onoozuukuka ddi mu tulo two? 
Proverbs6:10 Weebakamu katono, obba ku tulo, ozinga mikono owummulemu," 
Proverbs6:11 olwo obwavu bujja kukujjira ng'emmomboze, n'okuwamma, ng'omusabiriza." 
Proverbs6:12 Nnantaganyula, omuntu omutali nsa, agenda ayita n'akamwa akoogera ebikyamu;" 
Proverbs6:13 atta ku liiso, abagulizaako n'ebigere bye n'awenyaako n'engalo;" 
Proverbs6:14 ateekateeka nkwe mu mutima gwe omubambaavu, buli kadde asiikuula nnyombo." 
Proverbs6:15 Oyo okuzikirira kwe kulimugwira mbagirawo; mu kabanga katono alisaanawo; tewaliba kuwona. 
Proverbs6:16 Waliwo ebintu mukaaga Omukama bye yakyawa, musanvu omwoyo gwe bye gwetamwa:" 
Proverbs6:17 Amaaso ag'amalala, olulimi olulimba, emikono egiyiwa omusaayi ogutaliiko musango," 
Proverbs6:18 omutima ogulowoolereza entegeka embi, n'ebigere ebyanguyira eri ekibi," 
Proverbs6:19 omujulirwa omulimba afukumula eby'obulimba, n'oyo aleeta ennyombo mu b'oluganda." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wange, kwata ebiragiro bya kitaawo, etteeka lya nnyoko tolibuukangako." 
Proverbs6:21 Bulijjo obisibanga mu mutima gwo, bisibe mu bulago bwo." 
Proverbs6:22 Bw'onootambulanga, binaakulambikanga; bw'oneebakanga, binaakukuumanga; bw'onoosisimukanga, binaanyumyanga naawe." 
Proverbs6:23 Kubanga ebiragiro bino ttawaaza, etteeka lino kitangaala, n'okukukomako oli yeefuge, lye kkubo ly'obulamu." 
Proverbs6:24 Bino bya kukuwonya omukazi omugwenyufu, n'akamwa akagonvu ak'omukazi malaaya." 
Proverbs6:25 Obulungi bwe tebukwasanga mutima gwo maddu; entunula ye tekumalangamu mwoyo. 
Proverbs6:26 Ebbeeyi y'omukazi malaaya guba mugaati gumu guti ogw'oluwewere; mukoomusajja omuwendo gw'obulamu bwonna gw'atwala. 
Proverbs6:27 Omuntu ayinza okusenera omuliro mu kikondoolo kye engoye ze ne zitaggya? 
Proverbs6:28 Oba okutambulira ku manda, ebigere bye ne bitasiriira?" 
Proverbs6:29 Bw'atyo n'ayingira eri muka munne bw'abeera; teri amukwatako atalibonerezebwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu tebanyooma omubbi, enjala olw'okumuluma bw'abba atte enjala ye?" 
Proverbs6:31 Bw'akwatibwa, agatta mirundi musanvu, na byonna by'alina awaka n'abiwaayo." 
Proverbs6:32 Omwenzi si muntu mulabufu; akikola aba yeezikirizza yekka. 
Proverbs6:33 Yeesombera miggo na kusekererwa, obuswavu bwe tebulisangulwawo," 
Proverbs6:34 kubanga obuggya bukoleeza obusungu bwa bba; lw'aliwoolera eggwanga taliba na kisa. 
Proverbs6:35 Talikkiriza kuliyirirwa; enguzi ne bw'eriba nnene etya, talikkiriza." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wange, kwata ebigambo byange; ebiragiro byange biterekenga mu nda yo." 
Proverbs7:2 Kwata bye nkulagira, oliba mulamu; bye nkuyigiriza bikuume ng'emmunye y'eriiso lyo." 
Proverbs7:3 Bisibe ku ngalo zo; biwandiike ku kipande ky'omutima gwo. 
Proverbs7:4 Gamba amagezi nti: “Oli mwannyinaze,” n'okutegeera kuyite munywanyi wo," 
Proverbs7:5 bikukuume ku mukazi omwenzi, ku mukazi malaaya ayogera ebiseemyaseemya." 
Proverbs7:6 Anti nayima mu ddirisa ly'ennyumba yange, ne ntunula ebweru wansi nga mpisa mu kadirisa," 
Proverbs7:7 ne ndaba mu bantu ababuyabuya; nekkaanya mu balenzi omuvubuka atategeera," 
Proverbs7:8 ng'akkirira mu luguudo okumpi n'ensonda, n'alaga ku nnyumba y'omukazi," 
Proverbs7:9 akawungeezi nga bugenda buziba, awo ng'enzikiza ey'ekiro ekwata." 
Proverbs7:10 Awo omukazi n'avaawo okumusisinkana; ayambadde nga malaaya, n'enkwe mu mutima gwe." 
Proverbs7:11 Omukazi oyo ayasiikana, taweera, ebigere bye tebinywera mu nyumba," 
Proverbs7:12 wuuno mu nguudo, wuuli mu mbuga, aliimisa mu buli kalikonda." 
Proverbs7:13 Yabaka omulenzi, n'amunywegera; n'amugamba ng'akaze amaaso nti:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Nnina ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu eka, olwa leero lwe nnaatuukiriza kye neetema." 
Proverbs7:15 Kwe kujja okukusisinkana, nkunoonye; nzuuno nkugguseeko." 
Proverbs7:16 Ekitanda kyange nkibisse n'amagodooli; nkibisse n'engoye eza langi eza bafuta ez'omu Misiri. 
Proverbs7:17 Nkifuuyidde ebyakaloosa ebya mirra, ebigaji ne budalasiini." 
Proverbs7:18 Jjangu tunywe omusera gw'omukwano okutuusa ku makya; twesanyuse n'okwagala. 
Proverbs7:19 Anti baze tali ka, yagenze lugendo lwa wala." 
Proverbs7:20 Yatutte n'ensawo ya ssente; alikomawo ng'omwezi gwa ggabogabo.” 
Proverbs7:21 N'amuwugula n'ebigambo bingi ebisendasenda; n'amusikiriza n'okuseemyaseemya kw'emimwa gye. 
Proverbs7:22 Amangu ago n'amugoberera ng'ente gye batwala okutta, ng'engabi egwa mu kitimba," 
Proverbs7:23 okutuusa akasaale lwe kagifumita mu kibumba; oba ng'ekinyonyi ekyanguyira ekitimba, n'atamanya nti obulamu bwe abutunze." 
Proverbs7:24 Kale nno, baana bange, mumpulirize; mutegereze ebigambo by'akamwa kange." 
Proverbs7:25 Tokkiriza mutima gwo kuwunjukira mu makubo ge; oba okuwabira mu bukubo bwe. 
Proverbs7:26 Kubanga bangi b'akwasizza n'abatta; oyo b'asse, bbiina ddene." 
Proverbs7:27 Ennyumba ye lye kkubo ly'emagombe, likkiririra ddala eyo mu nnyumba z'olumbe." 
Proverbs8:1 Amagezi tegakoowoola? N'okutegeera tekusitudde eddoboozi? 
Proverbs8:2 Ku ntikko y'obusozi ku kkubo, mu masaŋŋanzira we gayimirira," 
Proverbs8:3 ku miryango egiyingira mu kibuga, ku wankaaki we galeekaanira nti:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Mmwe abasajja, mbakoowoola; Mpita mmwe abaana b'abantu." 
Proverbs8:5 Mmwe ababuyabuya muyige obwegendereza; abasiru mufune okutegeera. 
Proverbs8:6 Muwulirize, kubanga bye ŋŋenda okwogerako bikulu; nzija kwasamya akamwa, njogere ebituufu." 
Proverbs8:7 Akamwa kange koogera mazima; emimwa gyange gyekanasa obugwenyufu. 
Proverbs8:8 Ebigambo by'akamwa kange byonna bituufu; mpaamu kikyamu, mpaamu kibi." 
Proverbs8:9 Ku bategeera, byonna biruŋŋamu, ku bamanyi, biba bituufu." 
Proverbs8:10 Mulondeewo enjigiriza yange okusinga ffeeza; okumanya, okusinga zaabu omulondobe." 
Proverbs8:11 Anti amagezi ga muwendo okukira amakula gonna; tewali kye weegomba kya muwendo kigenkana. 
Proverbs8:12 “Nze Amagezi nsula wamu n'okutegeera, nze nnannyini kumanya n'obulabufu." 
Proverbs8:13 Okutya Omukama kwe kukyawa ekibi; nkyawa okwekuza, olunkulu, empisa embi n'akamwa akabambaavu." 
Proverbs8:14 Nze nnannyini kubuulirira n'obwegendereza; nnina okutegeera n'obuyinza. 
Proverbs8:15 Olw'okubeera nze, bakabaka bafuga, n'abakungu balagira ekituufu." 
Proverbs8:16 Olw'okubeera nze, abaami bafuga, n'abakungu abalamula wonna mu nsi." 
Proverbs8:17 “Abanjagala nange mbaagala, abannoonya, bansanga." 
Proverbs8:18 Obugagga n'ekitiibwa biri nange, obugagga obutagooka n'okuba obulungi." 
Proverbs8:19 Ebibala byange bisinga zaabu omukuŋŋunte; bye ndeeta bikira ffeeza omulondobe. 
Proverbs8:20 Ntambulira mu kkubo ery'obutuukirivu; mu bukubo obw'ennamula entuufu," 
Proverbs8:21 nga ngaggawaza abo abanjagala; amawanika gaabwe ne ngajjuza. 
Proverbs8:22 “Omukama yanzaala mu masooka g'emirimu gye; ekibereberye mu bye yatonda eby'edda. 
Proverbs8:23 Yanteekawo okuva edda lyonna, mu kusooka, ku matandika g'ensi." 
Proverbs8:24 Obuziba bwonna nga tebunnabaawo, nze nga nazaalibwa dda, n'ensulo ezijjudde amazzi nga tezinnasooka;" 
Proverbs8:25 ensozi nga tezinnatereera we ziri; nze nasooka obusozi okuzaalibwa; 
Proverbs8:26 nga tannakola nsi na ttale lyayo, yadde enfuufu eyasooka ey'oku nsi."
