Proverbs8:27 Naliwo lwe yabangawo olubaale; ne lwe yassaawo enkingi z'eggulu ku nnyanja," 
Proverbs8:28 lwe yawagika ebire waggulu awo, ne lwe yanyweza ensulo z'ennyanga;" 
Proverbs8:29 lwe yabibira ennyanja, amazzi galeme kubuuka kkomo lyago, ne lwe yalamba emyaliiro gy'ensi." 
Proverbs8:30 Nali ffundi ku lusegere lwe; nali ssanyu lye buli lunaku, nga neeyagalira awo mu maaso ge obudde bwonna," 
Proverbs8:31 nga neeyagalira wonna mu nsi; nga nsanyukira mu baana b'abantu. 
Proverbs8:32 “Kale nno kati, baana bange, mumpulire; beesiimye abakwata amakubo gange." 
Proverbs8:33 Muwulire enjigiriza yange mubeere bagezi; temugigaya. 
Proverbs8:34 Yeesiimye ampulira, ankuumirira ku nzigi zange buli lunaku, annindirira ku miryango gyange." 
Proverbs8:35 Anti ansanga, aba asanze obulamu, alisanga okuganja ew'Omukama." 
Proverbs8:36 Naye ansubwa alyekolera bubi; bonna abankyawa baagala kufa.” 
Proverbs9:1 Amagezi geezimbira ennyumba, gasimbye empagi musanvu." 
Proverbs9:2 Gasse ensolo, gatabudde omwenge, gategese n'olujjuliro lwago." 
Proverbs9:3 Gatumye abazaana baago, bakowoole nga bayima ku butemyo bw'ekibuga." 
Proverbs9:4 “Buli mubuyabuya akyame,” bwe gagamba abo abatalina nnamula ntuufu," 
Proverbs9:5 “mujje mweriire emmere yange, munywe n'omwenge gwe mbatabulidde." 
Proverbs9:6 Muleke obubuyabuya bwammwe lwe munaalama, mutambulire mu makubo g'okutegeera.”" 
Proverbs9:7 “Agolola omunyoomi, yeewakulira kuvumibwa; akomako omubi, yessaako ebbala." 
Proverbs9:8 “Omunyoomi, tomukomangako, sikulwa ng'akukyawa. Omugezi mukomeko, ajja kukwagala." 
Proverbs9:9 Yigiriza omugezi, ajja kweyongeza amagezi; gunjula omutuukirivu, ajja kwongera okuyiga." 
Proverbs9:10 Okutya Omukama amagezi mwe gasookera; Okumanya oyo Omutuukirivu bwe butegeevu. 
Proverbs9:11 Olw'okubeera nze, ennaku zo ziryeyongera obungi, n'emyaka giryongerwa ku bulamu bwo." 
Proverbs9:12 Bw'oliba omugezi, amagezi go galikugeziwaza; bw'oliba omunyoomi, oliboonaaboona wekka.”" 
Proverbs9:13 Omukazi omusiru ayasiikana; temuli mpisa, talina ky'amanyi." 
Proverbs9:14 Atuula mu maaso g'ennyumba ye, ku katebe, ku katemyo k'ekibuga," 
Proverbs9:15 alyoke ayite abayitawo, abeetambulira amakubo gaabwe." 
Proverbs9:16 “Buli mubuyabuya akyame,” bw'atyo bw'agamba abo abatalina nnamula ntuufu," 
Proverbs9:17 “amazzi amabbe gawooma; emmere endiire mu nkiso esanyusa.” 
Proverbs9:18 Baabuwe, tebamanyi nti eyo eriyo mizimu, nti abagenyi be bali ku ntobo y'emagombe." 
Proverbs10:1 Engero za Solomoni: Omwana omugezi asanyusa kitaawe, naye omwana omusiru ye nnaku ya nnyina." 
Proverbs10:2 Obugagga obufune obubi tebugasa kantu, naye obutuukirivu buwonya mu kufa." 
Proverbs10:3 Omukama taleka mutuukirivu kulumwa njala, kyokka agootaanya okwegomba kw'ababi." 
Proverbs10:4 Emikono eminafu gireeta bwavu, naye emikono gy'abanyikiivu gireeta bugagga." 
Proverbs10:5 Akuŋŋaanya mu kyeya, mwana mugezi, naye eyeebaka obwebasi mu kusambula, akuba ensonyi." 
Proverbs10:6 Emikisa giba ku mutwe gw'omutuukirivu, naye akamwa k'ababi kabikka bukambwe." 
Proverbs10:7 Okujjukira abatuukirivu kya mukisa, naye erinnya ly'ababi livunda buvunzi." 
Proverbs10:8 Ow'omutima omugezi agondera ebibuuliriro, naye omusiru nakamwantette alizikirira." 
Proverbs10:9 Omwesimbu mu mpisa atambula mirembe, naye oyo ow'amakubo amakyamu talirwa kumanyika." 
Proverbs10:10 Atta ku liiso, aleeta nnaku, naye aguma n'akomako aleeta mirembe." 
Proverbs10:11 Akamwa k'omutuukirivu y'ensulo y'obulamu, naye akamwa k'ababi kabikka bukambwe." 
Proverbs10:12 Okukyawa kusiikuula nnyombo, naye okwagala kubikkako ebisobyo byonna." 
Proverbs10:13 Ku mimwa gy'omutegeevu kwe kusangibwa amagezi, naye akaggo ka butuuliro bw'oyo ateegendereza." 
Proverbs10:14 Abagezi batereka okumanya; naye akamwa k'omusiru kasembeza kuzikirira. 
Proverbs10:15 Obugagga bw'omugagga kye kigo kye, naye obwavu bw'abanaku kwe kuzikirira kwabwe." 
Proverbs10:16 Empeera y'abatuukirivu ebaleetera bulamu, naye amagoba g'ababi gabatwala mu kibi." 
Proverbs10:17 Awulira ebimuyigirizibwa aba akutte kkubo lya bulamu, naye atafa ku bye bamunenyaamu, awaba." 
Proverbs10:18 Abikkirira ku bukyayi aba n'emimwa egirimba; agenda awaayiriza aba musiru. 
Proverbs10:19 Ebigambo bwe biyinga temubula nsobi; atangira emimwa gye aba mwegendereza. 
Proverbs10:20 Olulimi lw'omutuukirivu, ffeeza mulondobe; naye omutima gw'ababi temuli kantu." 
Proverbs10:21 Emimwa gy'omutuukirivu giriisa bangi, naye abasiru bafa lwa bwavu bwa mutima." 
Proverbs10:22 Omukisa gw'Omukama guleeta bugagga; tayongerezaako nnaku. 
Proverbs10:23 Omusiru asanyukira mu kukola bubi, naye omutegeevu essanyu limuli mu magezi." 
Proverbs10:24 Omubi kye yeekengera kye kirimugwira; ye omutuukirivu kye yeegomba kirimuweebwa. 
Proverbs10:25 Omuyaga oluyita guti, ababi nga tebakyaliwo, naye abatuukirivu olubeerera banywevu." 
Proverbs10:26 Ng'enkaatu ku mannyo, n'omukka ku maaso, n'omugayaavu bw'ali ku bamutumye." 
Proverbs10:27 Okutya Omukama kiwanvuya ku bulamu, naye emyaka gy'ababi girisalwako." 
Proverbs10:28 Essuubi ly'abatuukirivu, ssanyu ssa, naye okwesunga kw'ababi temuba kantu." 
Proverbs10:29 Ekkubo ly'Omukama kye kigo ky'abatuukirivu naye abakola obubi, kwe kuzikirira kwabwe." 
Proverbs10:30 Abatuukirivu tebalisigulibwawo n'akamu, n'ababi tebalisigala mu nsi." 
Proverbs10:31 Akamwa k'omutuukirivu kavaamu magezi; naye olulimi olubambaavu lulisalwako. 
Proverbs10:32 Emimwa gy'omutuukirivu gimanyi ekisanyusa, naye akamwa k'ababi kabuulire bubambaavu." 
Proverbs11:1 Omukama yeenyinyala minzaani ey'obulimba, naye ekipimo ekituufu lye ssanyu lye." 
Proverbs11:2 Okwekuza bwe kujja, nga n'okuswala kuzze, naye amagezi gajja na bwetoowaze." 
Proverbs11:3 Abatuufu obulungi bwabwe bubalambika, naye ababi battibwa nkwe zaabwe." 
Proverbs11:4 Mu kadde ak'obusungu obugagga tebulina kye bugasa; naye obutuukirivu buwonya okufa. 
Proverbs11:5 Obutuukirivu bw'abataliiko musango bulambika ekkubo lyabwe; naye ababi obugwenyufu bwabwe bwe bubasuula. 
Proverbs11:6 Obutuukirivu bw'abaluŋŋamu bubawonya, naye ababi obulyake bwabwe bubatega." 
Proverbs11:7 Omubi bw'afa, essuubi lye lyonna nga lizikiridde; ekibadde kirindiriddwa mu bugagga kifa togge." 
Proverbs11:8 Omutuukirivu awonyezebwa obuzibu, ate mu kifo kye ne bugwira omubi." 
Proverbs11:9 Ataliimu ddiini attattana munne n'akamwa ke, naye abatuukirivu balyewonya olw'okumanya." 
Proverbs11:10 Abatuukirivu bwe bibagendera obulungi, ekibuga kyesunako; ababi bwe bazikirira, ziba nduulu za ssanyu." 
Proverbs11:11 Olw'omukisa gw'abatuufu ekibuga kibbuka, naye akamwa k'ababi kakinnyika." 
Proverbs11:12 Agaya mukwano gwe abulamu obwegendereza, naye omutegeevu akuuma olulimi lwe." 
Proverbs11:13 Ow'olugambo abikkula ebyama, naye omwesigwa abikuuma." 
Proverbs11:14 Bwe wabula ebibuuliriro, eggwanga lifa; naye olw'ababuulirizi abangi wabaayo obuwanguzi." 
Proverbs11:15 Ayeeyimirira omugwira kalimujjuutuka, kyokka akyawa obukalu aliba bulungi." 
Proverbs11:16 Omukazi omusaasizi alissibwamu ekitiibwa, naye abasajja abakambwe balifuna bugagga bwokka." 
Proverbs11:17 Omuntu ow'ekisa aganyulwa, naye omukambwe yeebonyaabonya yekka." 
Proverbs11:18 Omubi amagoba g'afuna mpaamu kantu, naye asiga obutuukirivu empeera tagisubwa." 
Proverbs11:19 Omutuukirivu mu mazima atuuka ku bulamu; agoberera obwonoonefu yetta yekka. 
Proverbs11:20 Omukama yeenyinyala emitima emibi, naye abo ab'amakubo agataliiko musango lye ssanyu lye." 
Proverbs11:21 Kino kikakase, omubi talisigalira awo nga tabonerezeddwa, naye bo abatuukirivu balirokolebwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Ng'empeta ya zaabu mu nnyindo y'embizzi, n'omukazi omubalagavu atalina ndowooza bw'atyo bw'ali." 
Proverbs11:23 Okwegomba kw'abatuukirivu kuvaamu birungi bisa, naye okwesunga kw'ababi, busungu busa." 
Proverbs11:24 Omu agaba nga bw'ayagala, naye ne yeeyongera bugagga; omulala aganiriza, naye n'ayongera kwavuwala." 
Proverbs11:25 Omugabi alifuna bingi, n'oyo avubiriza abalala alivubirizibwa." 
Proverbs11:26 Abantu bavumirira akweka eŋŋano, naye omukisa gunajjanga ku oyo agitunda." 
Proverbs11:27 Anoonya ekirungi obutaddirira aba anoonya kuganja; naye agoberera obwonoonefu, ebibi birimujjira." 
Proverbs11:28 Eyeesiga obugagga bwe aligwa; naye abatuukirivu batinta ng'ebikoola ebito. 
Proverbs11:29 Oli atabangula amaka ge, alisikira mpewo; omusiru alifuuka muweereza wa mugezi." 
Proverbs11:30 Ekibala ky'obutuukirivu gwe muti gw'obulamu, naye omugezi y'oyo awangula emitima." 
Proverbs11:31 Oba omutuukirivu asasulibwa ku nsi, leero alabisa omubi n'omwonoonyi?" 
Proverbs12:1 Ayagala okulambikibwa aba ayagadde magezi, naye oli akyawa okunenyezebwa, musiru." 
Proverbs12:2 Omulungi aganja ew'Omukama, naye omugobyagobya Omukama amusalira omusango." 
Proverbs12:3 Omuntu teyenywezaawo lwa bugwenyufu bwe, n'omutuukirivu tagenda kusimbulibwawo." 
Proverbs12:4 Omukazi ow'empisa aba ngule ya bba, naye akola ebiswaza aba kivundu mu magumba ge." 
Proverbs12:5 Entegeka z'abatuukirivu ziba nnuŋŋamu; ebiteeso by'ababi birimbalimba. 
Proverbs12:6 Ebigambo by'ababi byebakirira kuyiwa musaayi, naye akamwa k'abatuufu kawonya abatuufu." 
Proverbs12:7 Ababi bwe bameggebwa, nga n'okukoma bakoma, naye ennyumba y'abatuukirivu erisigalawo." 
Proverbs12:8 Omuntu atendebwa okugerera ku magezi ge, naye ow'omutima omwonoonefu anyoomebwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Ofunda n'omukopi naye ng'alina omuweereza, okusinga omwepansi atalina na ky'alya." 
Proverbs12:10 Omutuukirivu afaayo ku bulamu bw'ensolo ze, naye ekisa ky'ababi kibeera bukambwe." 
Proverbs12:11 Eyeerimira ettaka lye alikkuta emmere, naye adda mu bitaliimu talowooza." 
Proverbs12:12 Ababi bye beegomba biba bibi, naye ekikolo ky'abatuukirivu kisigala kinywevu." 
Proverbs12:13 Omubi, ebisobyo by'emimwa gye bimutega, naye omutuukirivu awona akabi." 
Proverbs12:14 Omuntu alikkuta ebirungi olw'ebibala by'akamwa ke, n'omulimu gw'emikono gye gulimuweera empeera." 
Proverbs12:15 Ekkubo ly'omubi ku ye liba ttuufu, naye omutegeevu awuliriza ebibuuliriro." 
Proverbs12:16 Omusiru alagirawo obusungu, naye omugezi ekivumo akinyooma." 
Proverbs12:17 Ayogera ky'amanyi ajulira mu mazima, naye omujulirwa omulimba afukumula bya bulimba." 
Proverbs12:18 Ebigambo ebimale googerwa bifumita ng'ekitala, naye olulimi lw'abagezi luleeta bulamu." 
Proverbs12:19 Omumwa ogw'amazima gulisigala ennaku zonna, naye olulimi olulimba lwa kaseera buseera." 
Proverbs12:20 Mu mitima gy'abategeka akabi mubaamu nkwe, naye mu gy'abaleeta emirembe, ssanyu." 
Proverbs12:21 Akabi tekaligwira batuukirivu, naye ababi balifuna omusera gw'emitawaana." 
Proverbs12:22 Emimwa egirimba Omukama agyenyinyala, naye abakola amazima lye ssanyu lye." 
Proverbs12:23 Omuntu omutegeevu akisa amagezi ge; naye omutima gw'abasiru gufubutula busiru. 
Proverbs12:24 Omukono gw'abanyiikivu gulifuga, naye abagayaavu balissibwa ku kasanvu." 
Proverbs12:25 Okweraliikirira mu mutima gw'omuntu kimukooya, naye ekigambo ekirungi kimuzzaamu amaanyi." 
Proverbs12:26 Omutuukirivu alambika munne, naye ekkubo ly'ababi libawabya" 
Proverbs12:27 Omugayaavu agayaalirira omuyiggo gwe, naye obugagga amatendo bulibeera bwa munyiikivu." 
Proverbs12:28 Mu kkubo ly'obutuukirivu mwe muli obulamu, naye ekkubo ly'abajeemu litwala mu kufa." 
Proverbs13:1 Omwana omugezi awuliriza okulambikibwa kwa kitaawe, naye omunyoomi tafa ku kukomwako." 
Proverbs13:2 Ku bibala by'akamwa ke omuntu kw'alya ebirungi, naye omutima gw'ababi gunoonya bukambwe." 
Proverbs13:3 Akuuma akamwa ke aba akuumye bulamu bwe; naye atekkaanya mu njogera yeezikiriza. 
Proverbs13:4 Omugayaavu ayaayaana, naye talina ky'afuna, sso ng'omutima gw'omunyiikivu gulikkuta." 
Proverbs13:5 Omutuukirivu yeenyinyala ebigambo by'obulimba, naye omubi aleeta nsonyi na kuswala." 
Proverbs13:6 Obutuukirivu bukuuma akwata ekkubo eddungi; naye obugwenyufu buzikiriza omwonoonyi. 
Proverbs13:7 Eriyo ayeeyisa ng'omugagga, sso nga talina kantu, n'ebaayo ayeeyisa ng'omwavu, sso ng'alina bingi." 
Proverbs13:8 Obugagga bw'omuntu bwandinunula obulamu bwe, naye omwavu tawuliriza kukomwako." 
Proverbs13:9 Ekitangaala ky'abatuukirivu kyaka na bukalangufu, naye akatawaaza k'ababi kazimeera." 
Proverbs13:10 Okwekuza kuleeta kimu, nnyombo, naye amagezi gasangwa mu bagoberera okubuulirirwa." 
Proverbs13:11 Obugagga obw'omujjirano buggwaawo mangu, naye akuŋŋaanya empolampola abuweza." 
Proverbs13:12 Essuubi eddagaalaganye lirumya omwoyo, naye okwegomba okutuukiridde, muti gwa bulamu." 
Proverbs13:13 Anyooma ebibuuliriro kalimujjuutuka, naye oli atya ekiragiro aliweebwa empeera" 
Proverbs13:14 Enjigiriza y'omugezi nsulo ya bulamu, okuwonya omuntu emitego gy'olumbe." 
Proverbs13:15 Okutegeera obulungi kuleeta okuganja, naye ekkubo ly'atali mwesigwa lyakubazikiriza." 
Proverbs13:16 Omwegendereza buli kimu akikoza butegeevu, naye omusiru ayanjala obusiru bwe." 
Proverbs13:17 Omubaka omubi aligwa mu kabi, naye omutume omwesigwa aleeta kuwona." 
Proverbs13:18 Agaana okulambikibwa agwirwa bwavu na nsonyi, naye afaayo ku kunenyezebwa assibwamu ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Ekyegombebwa bwe kituukirira, kiwoomera omwoyo, naye abasiru beenyinyala okwewala ekibi." 
Proverbs13:20 Atambula n'abagezi naye aba mugezi, naye munne w'abasiru alibonaabona." 
Proverbs13:21 Ennaku erondoola aboonoonyi, naye abatuukirivu basasulwa kweyagala." 
Proverbs13:22 Omuntu omulungi alekera obusika bazzukulu be, naye ebintu by'omwonoonyi biterekerwa mutuukirivu." 
Proverbs13:23 Enkabala y'omwavu yandibala emmere ennyingi, naye ennamula omutali bwenkanya egisaanyaawo." 
Proverbs13:24 Asaasira omuggo, akyawa omwana we, naye amwagala afaayo okumukangavvula." 
Proverbs13:25 Abatuukirivu balya ne bakkuta, naye olubuto lw'omubi lusigala lukyayagala." 
Proverbs14:1 Amagezi gazimba ennyumba yaago, naye obusiru bugyabya n'emikono gyabwo." 
Proverbs14:2 Atambulira mu buluŋŋamu atya Omukama, naye atambulira mu makubo amakyamu amunyooma." 
Proverbs14:3 Akamwa k'omusiru kamuleetera kaggo ku butuuliro, naye emimwa gy'abagezi gibataasa." 
Proverbs14:4 Bwe wataba nte, emmanvu eba nkalu; amakungula amangi gava mu nte ya maanyi." 
Proverbs14:5 Omujulirwa omwesigwa talimba, naye omujulirwa omulimba afukumula bya bulimba." 
Proverbs14:6 Omunyoomi bw'anoonya amagezi tagasanga, naye okumanya kwanguyira omutegeevu." 
Proverbs14:7 Weewale omusiru, kubanga tolisanga magezi ku mimwa gye." 
Proverbs14:8 Amagezi g'omwegendereza kwe kumanya amakubo ge, naye obusiru bw'abasiru buwubisa." 
Proverbs14:9 Ababi basekerera okuddaabiriza olw'ekibi, naye mu batuufu, ssanyu ssa." 
Proverbs14:10 Omutima gumanyi ennyiike yaagwo, n'ow'ebweru tasobola kwetabika mu ssanyu lyagwo." 
Proverbs14:11 Ennyumba y'ababi erizikirizibwa, naye weema z'abatuufu ziritinta." 
Proverbs14:12 Waliwo ekkubo omuntu ly'ayita eddungi, naye ku nkomerero yalyo makubo ga lumbe." 
Proverbs14:13 Nandibadde mu nseko omutima gwandilumwa, eribadde essanyu ne lifuuka nnaku." 
Proverbs14:14 Omubi alijjula ebibala by'amakubo ge, n'omulungi naye alisiimibwa olw'agage." 
Proverbs14:15 Omubuyabuya akkiriza buli kimu; naye omwegendereza yekkaanya ekigere ky'asitula. 
Proverbs14:16 Omuntu omugezi atya n'adduka ekibi, naye omusiru yeesunguusula, amala googera." 
Proverbs14:17 Ow'akasunguyira akola eby'obusiru, naye omwegendereza akwata mpola." 
Proverbs14:18 Ababuyabuya basikira busiru, naye abeegendereza engule bafuna ya kumanya." 
Proverbs14:19 Abakola obubi balyeyala mu maaso g'abalungi, n'ababi ku miryango gy'abatuukirivu." 
Proverbs14:20 Omwavu ne muliraanwa we amukyawa, naye abagagga balina emikwano mingi." 
Proverbs14:21 Anyooma munne akola kibi; naye asaasira adooba yeesiimye. 
Proverbs14:22 Abalowoolereza okukola obubi baba tebawabye? Naye abessa ku kukola obulungi beefunira ekisa n'obwesigwa. 
Proverbs14:23 Okukola ennyo muvaamu amagoba, naye okwogera obwogezi kuleeta bbula." 
Proverbs14:24 Obugagga bw'abagezi ye ngule yaabwe, naye obusiru gwe muge gw'abasiru." 
Proverbs14:25 Omujulirwa ow'amazima awonya obulamu, naye omujulirwa afukumula obulimba wa nkwe." 
Proverbs14:26 Mu kutya Omukama mwe muli ekigo ekinywevu; bwe buddukiro bw'abaana be. 
Proverbs14:27 Okutya Omukama ye nsulo y'obulamu, okuwonya omuntu emitego gy'olumbe." 
Proverbs14:28 Obungi bw'abantu kye kitiibwa kya kabaka, naye obutono bw'abatwalibwa kwe kuzikirira kw'omufuzi." 
Proverbs14:29 Omugumiikiriza aba n'okutegeera kungi, naye ow'akasunguyira busiru bw'agulumiza." 
Proverbs14:30 Omutima omukakkamu bwe bulamu bw'omubiri, naye obuggya buvunza amagumba." 
Proverbs14:31 Ajooga omwavu, avuma Oyo Ayamukola, naye asaasira omunaku assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs14:32 Omubi obugwenyufu bwe bwe bumusuula, naye omutuukirivu asanga obuddukiro mu bulungi bwe." 
Proverbs14:33 Amagezi gabukala mu mutima mutegeevu, naye tegamanyiddwa mu mutima gw'abasiru." 
Proverbs14:34 Obutuukirivu butumbula eggwanga, naye ekibi kisonyiwaza abantu." 
Proverbs14:35 Essanyu lya kabaka liri mu muweereza mugezi, naye obusungu bwe bujjira oyo akola ebiswaza." 
Proverbs15:1 Ennyanukula eŋŋonvu emenya obunyiivu, naye ebigambo ebikalubo bisiikuula obusungu." 
Proverbs15:2 Olulimi lw'abagezi lukenenuka kumanya, naye akamwa k'abasiru kafumbukula busiru." 
Proverbs15:3 Amaaso g'Omukama gali buli wantu, gatunuulira ababi n'abalungi." 
Proverbs15:4 Olulimi olugonvu luba muti gwa bulamu, naye obwonoonefu mu lwo bumenya omwoyo." 
Proverbs15:5 Omusiru anyooma okubuulirira kwa kitaawe, naye assa omwoyo ku kubuulirirwa, oyo mulabufu." 
Proverbs15:6 Mu nnyumba y'omutuukirivu obugagga bufumbekera, naye omubi by'afuna bisanga kacwano." 
Proverbs15:7 Emimwa gy'abagezi gibunya wonna okumanya, naye omutima gw'ababi si bwe gutyo." 
Proverbs15:8 Omukama yeenyinyala ebitambiro by'ababi, naye essaala y'omutuufu lye ssanyu lye." 
Proverbs15:9 Omukama yeenyinyala amakubo g'ababi, naye ayagala abo abagoberera obutuukirivu." 
Proverbs15:10 Ekibonerezo kinene eri oyo ava mu kkubo ly'obulamu; atayagala kunenyezebwa alifa. 
Proverbs15:11 Amagombe n'entaana Omukama bimuli awo; leero alabisa emitima gy'abaana b'abantu! 
Proverbs15:12 Omunyoomi tayagala amunenya, n'eri abagezi tagendayo." 
Proverbs15:13 Omutima omusanyufu guleeta essanyu ku maaso, naye omutima omunakuwavu gunyiikaaza omwoyo." 
Proverbs15:14 Omutima gw'omutegeevu gunoonya okumanya, naye akamwa k'abasiru, emmere yaako busiru." 
Proverbs15:15 Ennaku z'omunaku zonna mbi, naye omutima omusanyufu guba mu mbaga buli kaseera." 
Proverbs15:16 Ofunda n'ebitono ng'otya Omukama, okusinga obugagga obungi omuli okutengeetera." 
Proverbs15:17 Ofunda n'ekijjulo eky'enva obuva awali omukwano, okusinga eky'ente ensavuwaze ekiriko obukyayi." 
Proverbs15:18 Ow'akasunguyira asiikuula ndasano, sso omugumiikiriza akkakkanya ennyombo." 
Proverbs15:19 Ekkubo ly'omugayaavu mulimu emisanvu egy'amaggwa, naye ery'omutuufu kkubo ddambulukufu." 
Proverbs15:20 Omwana omugezi asanyusa kitaawe, naye omusiru anyooma nnyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Obusiru busanyusa ataliimu ndowooza, naye omutegeevu alambika entambula ye." 
Proverbs15:22 Awataba kwebuuza ebirowoozo bitaabuukana, naye awali ababuulirizi abangi biruŋŋama." 
Proverbs15:23 Ennyanukula entuufu esanyusa omuntu, n'ekigambo ekyogerere mu kadde kaakyo nga kirungi!" 
Proverbs15:24 Ekkubo ly'omugezi lyambusa waggulu mu bulamu, aleme kukkirira magombe." 
Proverbs15:25 Omukama ayabya ennyumba z'abeekuza, naye ensalo za nnamwandu taziganya kusigulwawo." 
Proverbs15:26 Ebirowoozo by'ababi Omukama abyenyinyala, sso ebyo eby'abatukuvu bimusanyusa." 
Proverbs15:27 Alulunkana okufuna amagoba amaka ge agasuula mu kabi, naye akyawa enguzi aliba mulamu." 
Proverbs15:28 Omutima gw'omutuukirivu gwebuulirira kye gunaayanukula, naye akamwa k'ababi kafumbukula bibi." 
Proverbs15:29 Omukama ababi abeesamba, naye awulira essaala y'abatuukirivu." 
Proverbs15:30 Obusanyufu ku maaso kisanyusa omutima, n'obubaka obulungi buzza amaanyi mu magumba." 
Proverbs15:31 Ow'okutu okutegereza okunenya okuzimba alisulanga ntende mu bagezi. 
Proverbs15:32 Agaana okukomwako aba yeenyoomye yekka, naye afa ku kulabulibwa afuna okutegeera." 
Proverbs15:33 Okutya Omukama kuyigiriza amagezi, n'obwetoowaze bwe bukulembera ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs16:1 Enteekateeka y'omutima ya muntu, kyokka olulimi kye lwanukula kiva wa Mukama." 
Proverbs16:2 Amakubo g'omuntu ku lulwe alaba nga malungi, kyokka Omukama y'apima omwoyo." 
Proverbs16:3 Byonna by'okola bikwase Omukama, olwo n'entegeka zo zijja kulama." 
Proverbs16:4 Omukama buli kintu yakikola ng'aliko ky'agenderera; n'omubi yamutondera olunaku olw'akabenje. 
Proverbs16:5 Omukama yeenyinyala bonna abeekuza mu mutima; kino kikakase: tebayinza butabonerezebwa. 
Proverbs16:6 Ekisa n'obwesigwa biddaabiriza olw'ekibi; mu kutya Omukama omuntu mwe yeewalira ekibi. 
Proverbs16:7 Amakubo g'omuntu bwe gasanyusa Omukama, n'abalabe be amuwa ne babeera naye mu ddembe." 
Proverbs16:8 Waakiri okubeera n'ebitono naye mu butuukirivu, okusinga okufuna ebingi ebitavudde mu bwenkanya." 
Proverbs16:9 Mu mutima gwe omuntu atetenkanya amakubo ge, naye Omukama y'aluŋŋamya ebigere bye." 
Proverbs16:10 Emimwa gya kabaka giwa bubaka; akamwa ke tekandikoze nsobi mu kusala musango. 
Proverbs16:11 Amayinja ne minzaani ebituufu bya Mukama; ebipimo byonna mu nsawo y'abikola. 
Proverbs16:12 Bakabaka beenyinyala okukola obubi, kubanga nnamulondo essibwawo mu butuukirivu." 
Proverbs16:13 Essanyu lya kabaka gy'emimwa emyesimbu; ayagala oyo ayogera bintu bituukirivu. 
Proverbs16:14 Obusungu bwa kabaka, mubaka wa lumbe, naye omugezi abukkakkanya." 
Proverbs16:15 Kabaka bw'asanyuka, obwo bulamu; okuganja gy'ali kiba ng'ekire ky'enkuba mu Ttoggo." 
Proverbs16:16 Okufuna amagezi nga kikirira wala okufuna zaabu; okuba n'okutegeera kyegombebwa okusinga okuba ne ffeeza. 
Proverbs16:17 Ekkubo ly'abatuufu lyewala ekibi; akuuma ekkubo lye aba akuumye obulamu bwe. 
Proverbs16:18 Okwekuza kwe kukulembera okuzikirira, n'omwoyo omwepansi gwe gukulembera okugwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Waakiri okuba omwavu mu banaku, okusinga okugabana omunyago n'abeekuza." 
Proverbs16:20 Awuliriza ebimuyigirizibwa yeeyagala, n'eyeesiga Omukama yeesiimye." 
Proverbs16:21 Alina omutima omugezi bamuyita mutegeevu, n'obuwoomi bw'enjogera bwongera ku kusikiriza." 
Proverbs16:22 Alina amagezi alina luzzi lwa bulamu, naye obusiru buleetera basiru kibonerezo." 
Proverbs16:23 Omutima gw'omugezi guluŋŋamya akamwa ke, ne gwongera emimwa gye obwogezi." 
Proverbs16:24 Ebigambo ebisanyusa, kisassalala kya mubisi gwa njuki; biwoomera omwoyo, bwe bulamu bw'amagumba." 
Proverbs16:25 Waliwo ekkubo omuntu ly'ayita eddungi, naye ku nkomerero yalyo makubo ga lumbe." 
Proverbs16:26 Omwoyo gw'omukozi gwe gumuteganira, kubanga akamwa ke ke kamuwaliriza." 
Proverbs16:27 Omuntu endalagge alowoolereza bulabe, ne by'ayogera biri ng'omuliro ogusiiyiika." 
Proverbs16:28 Omuntu omubambaavu asiikuula nnyombo; ow'olugambo ayawukanya ab'omukwano. 
Proverbs16:29 Omuntu omukambwe alimbalimba munne, n'amukwasa ekkubo eritali ddungi." 
Proverbs16:30 Atta ku liiso aba ategeka bya bubambaavu, n'oyo aluma emimwa aba anoonya kukola kabi." 
Proverbs16:31 Envi, ngule ya kitiibwa, etukiibwako abo ab'empisa entuukirivu." 
Proverbs16:32 Omuntu omukkakkamu akira nalukalala; amanyi okwefuga akira awangula ekibuga. 
Proverbs16:33 Akalulu bakakasuka mu kikondoolo, naye okusalawo kwonna kwa Mukama." 
Proverbs17:1 Ofunda n'akagaati akakalu ng'oli mu ddembe, okukira ennyumba omuli embaga n'okutotoogana." 
Proverbs17:2 Omuddu omulabalaba alifuga omwana w'aboowo omubi; aligabana obusika ng'omu ku b'oluganda. 
Proverbs17:3 Ogutamu gwa ffeeza, n'akabiga ka zaabu, naye Omukama y'ageza emitima." 
Proverbs17:4 Omubi ategereza emimwa emibi bye gyogera; n'omulimba awuliriza olulimi olw'ettima. 
Proverbs17:5 Akudaalira omwavu, avuma Oyo Eyamukola, asanyukira akabi, taliwona kibonerezo." 
Proverbs17:6 Abazzukulu y'engule y'abakadde, n'abazadde kye kitiibwa ky'abaana baabwe." 
Proverbs17:7 Ebigambo ebirungi tebisaanira musiru, naye ekisinga obutajja bye bigambo by'obulimba okuva mu mukungu." 
Proverbs17:8 Enguzi eri nga jjembe ku oyo agiwa; buli w'adda aba wa mukisa. 
Proverbs17:9 Abikka ku nsobi aleeta kwagalana, naye ayeeyereza ekigambo, akyawaganya ab'omukwano." 
Proverbs17:10 Omuntumulamu okukomwako kumutuuka wala, okusinga enga ekikumi bwe zikola omusiru." 
Proverbs17:11 Omuntu omubi anoonya nnyombo, omubaka omukambwe kyaliva amutumirwa." 
Proverbs17:12 Okusisinkana eddubu erinyagiddwako abaana baalyo, kyandisinga okusisinkana omusiru mu busiru bwe." 
Proverbs17:13 Akolera obubi amukoledde obulungi, mu nnyumba ye temuliggwa bubenje." 
Proverbs17:14 Okutanula oluyombo kiri nga kuta bbibiro ly'amazzi, olwetegulanga terunnatandika." 
Proverbs17:15 Okweggyereza alina omusango n'okugusingisa atagulina, byombi Omukama tabyagalira ddala." 
Proverbs17:16 Omusiru, ssente ez'okugula amagezi zaalina mu ngalo, zimugasa ki nga talina na mutima gwa kugafuna?" 
Proverbs17:17 Mukwano gwo aba munno ebbanga lyonna; muganda wo akuzaalirwa lwa buyinike. 
Proverbs17:18 Omubuyabuya awaayo engassi, n'awaayo omusingo okweyimirira munne." 
Proverbs17:19 Ayagala ebisobyo, anoonya nnyombo; agulumiza omulyango gwe, anoonya kuzikirira." 
Proverbs17:20 Ow'omutima omwonoonefu tasanga kirungi, n'ow'olulimi olukupya agwa mu kabi." 
Proverbs17:21 Azaala omusiru yeezaalira nnaku; kitaawe w'omusiru tamanya ssanyu gye liddira. 
Proverbs17:22 Omutima omusanyufu ddagala lyennyini, naye omutima ogwennyise gukaza amagumba." 
Proverbs17:23 Omubi akkiriza enguzi okuva mu kikondoolo, agootaanye ensala y'omusango." 
Proverbs17:24 Omuntu omutegeevu amaaso ge agasimba ku magezi, naye ag'omubuyabuya agatunuza eri ku nkingi z'ensi." 
Proverbs17:25 Omwana omusiru aba nnaku nsa eri kitaawe, era buyinike eri nnyina." 
Proverbs17:26 Okutanza omutuukirivu si kirungi, n'okuweweenyula abakungu si kituufu." 
Proverbs17:27 Omuntu atangira olulimi lwe aba mugezi; n'omutegeevu aba mukkakkamu mu njogera. 
Proverbs17:28 N'omusiru bw'asirika, bamuyita mugezi; bw'atangira emimwa gye, bamuyita mutegeevu." 
Proverbs18:1 Eyeewagudde anoonya kya kwesanyusa; buli kibuuliriro akinyooma. 
Proverbs18:2 Omusiru tayagala kutegeera, wabula afa ku kulaga ky'alowooza." 
Proverbs18:3 Obugwenyufu bwe bujja nga n'okunyoomebwa kuzze; n'obuswavu bujja n'okuweebuuka. 
Proverbs18:4 Ebigambo ebiva mu kamwa k'omuntu, mazzi mawanvu; ensulo y'amagezi, mugga gwa ttumbiizi." 
Proverbs18:5 Okuzibira omubi si kirungi, oba okulamula n'ofiiriza omutuukirivu." 
Proverbs18:6 Emimwa gy'omusiru gimusuula mu nnyombo, n'akamwa kamuleetera kukubibwa." 
Proverbs18:7 Akamwa k'omusiru kwe kuzikirira kwe; n'emimwa gye gwe mutego ogutta obulamu bwe. 
Proverbs18:8 Ebigambo by'ow'olugambo, nnoga ewooma, bikkiririra ddala munda mu lubuto." 
Proverbs18:9 Omuntu agayaala okukola wa mukago n'oli azikiriza. 
Proverbs18:10 Erinnya ly'Omukama, munaala gwa maanyi; omutuukirivu addukira omwo, akuumibwa." 
Proverbs18:11 Obugagga bw'omugagga kye kigo kye; abwefaanaanyiriza ng'ekisenge ekimukuuma. 
Proverbs18:12 Okuzikirira nga tekunnatuuka, omutima gw'omuntu gwegulumiza; sso nno obwetoowaze bwe bukulembera ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Ayanukula nga tannawulira, obwo buba busiru bwe na kuswala." 
Proverbs18:14 Omutima gw'omuntu gumugumya mu bulwadde, naye omutima ogwennyise ani ayinza okugugumira?" 
Proverbs18:15 Omutima gw'omutegeevu gufuna okumanya, n'okutu kw'abagezi kunoonya okumanya." 
Proverbs18:16 Ekirabo ky'omuntu kimutemera ekkubo; kimutuusa ne mu bakungu. 
Proverbs18:17 Asooka okuwoza gw'oyita omutuufu, okutuusa omulala lw'ajja n'amulumiriza." 
Proverbs18:18 Akalulu ke kasalawo enkaayana; katawulula bakirimaanyi. 
Proverbs18:19 Ow'oluganda anyiiziddwa, muzibu okusinga ekibuga ekinywevu, n'empaka ziri ng'omuyingo ku kigo." 
Proverbs18:20 Olubuto lw'omuntu lukkuta bibala bya kamwa ke; emimwa gye bye gireeta bye bimukkusa. 
Proverbs18:21 Okufa n'obulamu biri mu buyinza bwa lulimi; abalwagala balya ku bibala ebiruvaamu. 
Proverbs18:22 Azuula omukazi aba azudde kirungi; asanga okuganja ew'Omukama. 
Proverbs18:23 Omwavu awanjaga, naye omugagga ayanukuza bboggo." 
Proverbs18:24 Emikwano egimu gyanditwala mu kuzikirira, sso wabaawo ow'omukwano anywera okukira ow'oluganda." 
Proverbs19:1 Ofunda n'omwavu atambulira mu bulungi bwe, n'otoba na musiru ow'emimwa egyogera ebikyamu." 
Proverbs19:2 Si kirungi kubeera na bujjumbize awatali magezi; yadde okwanguyirira ate n'obulwa ekkubo. 
Proverbs19:3 Obusiru bw'omuntu bwe butta ekkubo lye, ate omutima gwe ne gunyiigira Omukama." 
Proverbs19:4 Obugagga bwongera emikwano, naye omwavu mikwano gye gimwabulira." 
Proverbs19:5 Omujulirwa ow'obulimba taliwona kibonerezo; n'oyo afukumula eby'obulimba taligendera awo. 
Proverbs19:6 Bangi beesaanyiriza ewa nnagagga; buli omu aba mukwano gw'oyo agaba. 
Proverbs19:7 Omwavu, ne baganda be bonna bamukyawa, ne mikwano gye bamwesamba. Ababembereza n'ebigambo, naye tebalabikako." 
Proverbs19:8 Ayagala amagezi aba ayagadde bulamu bwe, n'alina okutegeera aligguka ku birungi." 
Proverbs19:9 Omujulirwa omulimba taliwona kibonerezo; n'oyo afukumula eby'obulimba alizikirira. 
Proverbs19:10 Omusiru tagwana kwesiima; ekisingawo n'obubi ye muddu okufuga abakungu. 
Proverbs19:11 Obuntubulamu buwa omuntu okugumiikiriza; okubikka ku bisobyo kimuweesa ekitiibwa. 
Proverbs19:12 Obusungu bwa kabaka buli ng'okuwuluguma kw'empologoma, naye okuganja ewuwe kuli nga ssuulwe ku muddo." 
Proverbs19:13 Omwana omusiru, kwe kuzikirira kwa kitaawe, n'omukazi omuyombi, kutonnya kwa nnyumba okutaggwa." 
Proverbs19:14 Ennyumba n'obugagga bisikirwa ku bazadde, naye omukazi omwegendereza ava wa Mukama." 
Proverbs19:15 Obugayaavu buleeta otulo tungi; ataliiko ky'akola tawona njala. 
Proverbs19:16 Akwata ekiragiro aba akuumye bulamu bwe, naye agayaalirira ekkubo lye, alifa." 
Proverbs19:17 Asaasira omwavu aba awoze Mukama; alimusasula olw'ekyo ky'akoze. 
Proverbs19:18 Kangavvula omwana wo, kubanga kino kiwa essuubi; tewessanga ku kya kumutta." 
Proverbs19:19 Omuntu ow'obusungu obungi alisasula n'ekibonerezo, ne bw'omuwonya era olidda omuwonye." 
Proverbs19:20 Wuliriza ekibuuliriro, kkiriza okuluŋŋamizibwa, oluvannyuma oliba omugezi." 
Proverbs19:21 Bingi omutima gw'omuntu bye gutetenkanya, naye Omukama ky'ateesa kye kiribaawo." 
Proverbs19:22 Abantu kye beegomba mu muntu, kisa; ofunda n'omwavu n'otoba na mulimba." 
Proverbs19:23 Okutya Omukama kiwa obulamu: amutya alisulanga ntende, awatali kabi kamutawaanya." 
Proverbs19:24 Omunafu omukono agukweka mu kibya, tasobola na kuguzza eri kamwa ke." 
Proverbs19:25 Weweenyula omunyoomi, olwo ababuyabuya bajja kuyiga obwegendereza; koma ku mutegeevu, ajja kweyongera mu kumanya." 
Proverbs19:26 Anyaga kitaawe n'agoba nnyina, aba mwana asonyiwaza n'okuweebuula." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wange, koma okuwulira ebikuyigirizibwa, oliwaba mu by'amagezi ebikugambibwa." 
Proverbs19:28 Omujulirwa omubi anyooma ennamula ey'obwenkanya; omumwa gw'ababi gumira bugobo obugwenyufu. 
Proverbs19:29 Enzo, z'abo abanyoomi, n'okuweweenyula obutuuliro kw'abo abasiru." 
Proverbs20:1 Omwenge guleeta okunyooma, n'ebitamiiza bireeta ennyombo; buli gwe biwabya taliba mugezi." 
Proverbs20:2 Obusungu bwa kabaka buli ng'okuwuluguma kw'empologoma, amusosonkereza okunyiiga yetta yekka." 
Proverbs20:3 Kya kitiibwa omuntu okwewala ennyombo, naye buli musiru yeetaba mu kulasana." 
Proverbs20:4 Omugayaavu tasambula mu budde; mu makungula alinoonya, naye talibaako ky'azuula." 
Proverbs20:5 Ebigendererwa by'omutima gw'omuntu mazzi mawanvu, naye omutegeevu abisenayo." 
Proverbs20:6 Bangi abeebalira mu b'ekisa; naye omuntu omwesigwa ddala ani anaamuzuula? 
Proverbs20:7 Omutuukirivu atambulira mu bulungi bwe; abaana be abalimuddirira beesiimye. 
Proverbs20:8 Kabaka atudde ku ntebe y'obulamuzi, awewera eri buli kibi n'amaaso ge." 
Proverbs20:9 Ani ayinza okugamba nti: “Nnongoosezza omutima gwange? Ntukudde, sikyaliko kibi?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Obuzito n'ebipimo ebitatuukana, byombi Omukama abyenyinyala." 
Proverbs20:11 Mu by'akola omwana mw'alabirwa oba ebikolwa bye birungi, bituufu." 
Proverbs20:12 Okutu okuwulira n'eriiso eriraba, byombi Omukama ye yabikola." 
Proverbs20:13 Leka kwagala tulo, sikulwa ng'oyavuwala; eriiso kaza, olwo oliba n'emmere nnyingi." 
Proverbs20:14 “Ekyo kibi; ekyo kibi!” omuguzi bw'agamba; naye bw'agenda, nga yeewaana." 
Proverbs20:15 Zaabu gy'ali n'amayinja g'omuwendo nkuyanja, naye emimwa egyogera n'obutegeevu, jjinja lya kkula." 
Proverbs20:16 Ekyambalo ky'omuntu kitwale, ky'asinzeeyo okweyimirira omuyise; kitwale ng'omusingo bwe yeeyimirira omugwira." 
Proverbs20:17 Omuntu awoomerwa omugaati omubbirire, naye oluvannyuma akamwa ke kajjula enkokoto." 
Proverbs20:18 Enteekateeka zo zikole nga bwe weebuuza; olutalo lutabaale ng'obuuliriddwa bulungi. 
Proverbs20:19 Ow'olugambo abikkula ebyama, teweetabikanga na njogeziyogezi." 
Proverbs20:20 Avumirira kitaawe oba nnyina ettawaaza ye baligizikiza mu nzikiza wakati. 
Proverbs20:21 Obusika obwanguyire okufuna mu kusooka, oluvannyuma tebuliba na mukisa." 
Proverbs20:22 Togambanga nti: “Nzija kukukola nga bwe wankoze.” Lindirira Omukama; ajja kukudduukirira. 
Proverbs20:23 Omukama yeenyinyala obuzito obutatuukana; minzaani ebbirira si nnungi mu maaso ge. 
Proverbs20:24 Omukama y'alambika entambula y'omuntu; awo nno omuntu asobola atya okutegeera amakubo ge? 
Proverbs20:25 Okumala gawongayo kintu kubeera kwesuula mu mutego, ate oluvannyuma oli n'adda ku bweyamo bwe." 
Proverbs20:26 Kabaka ow'amagezi awewera eri ababi, abavugirako namuziga ey'enso." 
Proverbs20:27 Omwoyo gw'omuntu ye ttawaaza y'Omukama; egenda yeekenneenya munda muli. 
Proverbs20:28 Okusaasira n'amazima biwonya kabaka, nnamulondo ye ewanirirwa butuukirivu." 
Proverbs20:29 Amaanyi g'abavubuka lye ttendo lyabwe; envi kye kitiibwa ky'abakadde. 
Proverbs20:30 Obuswanyu n'ebinuubule binaabulawo ebibi; embooko zitukuza okutuukira ddala munda. 
Proverbs21:1 Ng'omwala gw'amazzi, n'omutima gwa kabaka bwe guli mu mikono gy'Omukama, agulaza gy'aba ayagadde." 
Proverbs21:2 Amakubo gonna ag'omuntu ku ye gaba maluŋŋamu; kyokka Omukama y'apima emitima. 
Proverbs21:3 Okukola ebikolwa eby'obutuukirivu n'obutuufu kisanyusa Omukama okukira ebitambiro. 
Proverbs21:4 Amaaso ameepansi n'omutima omwekuza, ttawaaza ya bugwenyufu, kibi." 
Proverbs21:5 Enteekateeka z'omunyiikivu, kituufu, zituusa ku magoba, n'okwanguyiriza, kikakafu, kuvaamu bbula." 
Proverbs21:6 Obugagga obufune n'olulimi olulimba, mukka ogufuumuuka era mitego gya lumbe." 
Proverbs21:7 Ababi, obukambwe bwabwe bulibamalawo, kubanga baagaana okukola ebituufu." 
Proverbs21:8 Ekkubo ly'azzizza omusango lyenyooleza, wabula empisa z'omutuufu nnuŋŋamu." 
Proverbs21:9 Waakiri okusulanga waggulu mu kalikonda ka kasolya, okusinga okugatta ennyumba n'omukazi omuyombi." 
Proverbs21:10 Omwoyo gw'omubi guyaayaanira ekibi; munne tamusangako kisa ku maaso ge. 
Proverbs21:11 Omunyoomi bw'atanzibwa, ababuyabuya bafuna amagezi; omugezi bw'ayigirizibwa, yeeyongera okumanya." 
Proverbs21:12 Omutuukirivu yekkaanya ennyumba y'omubi; ababi abalaza mu kuzikirira. 
Proverbs21:13 Azibiikiriza amatu eri omulanga gw'omwavu, bw'alikuba omulanga naye taliyanukulwa." 
Proverbs21:14 Ekirabo ekyeweere mu nkiso kikkakkanya obusungu; n'enguzi enkweke mu kikondoolo eweweeza obusungu obw'ettumbiizi. 
Proverbs21:15 Obwenkanya bwe bugobererwa, kisanyusa omutuukirivu, naye kireetera aboonoonyi okutekemuka." 
Proverbs21:16 Awaba n'ava mu kkubo ly'okutegeera, aliwummulira mu kinywi ky'emizimu." 
Proverbs21:17 Ayagala amasanyu aliba mu kuwamma; ayagala omwenge n'ebyassava taligaggawala. 
Proverbs21:18 Omubi gwe mutango gw'abatuukirivu, n'abatali batuufu gwe musingo ogw'abaluŋŋamu." 
Proverbs21:19 Waakiri okubeera eyo mu ddungu, okusinga okubeera n'omukazi omuyombi ow'obusungu." 
Proverbs21:20 Mu nnyumba y'omugezi musigalamu eby'obugagga amakula bingi, naye omusiru alya buli ky'alina." 
Proverbs21:21 Oyo agoberera obutuukirivu n'ekisa agguka ku bulamu n'ekitiibwa. 
Proverbs21:22 Omugezi awalampa ekibuga ky'ab'amaanyi, n'amenyawo ekigo kye babadde beesiga." 
Proverbs21:23 Atangira emimwa gye n'olulimi lwe yeewonya emitawaana mingi. 
Proverbs21:24 Omwekuza era omwepansi bamuyita 'Munyoomi'; ebintu abikoza lwetumbu na kwekuza. 
Proverbs21:25 Okwegomba kw'omugayaavu kwe kulimutta, kubanga emikono gye gigaana okukola." 
Proverbs21:26 Olunaku lwonna yeegomba kino na kiri; ye omutuukirivu awa nga tasikattira. 
Proverbs21:27 Ebitambiro by'omubi byenyinyalwa; alabisa nno ng'abireese n'ekigendererwa ekikyamu. 
Proverbs21:28 Ajulira eby'obulimba alizikirira, naye ebigambo by'omuntu awuliriza birisigalawo." 
Proverbs21:29 Omubi yeekaza, naye omuntu omwesimbu yekkaanya amakubo ge." 
Proverbs21:30 Teri magezi, kutegeera na bibuuliriro bisobola kusinza Mukama maanyi." 
Proverbs21:31 Embalaasi etegekerwa lunaku lwa lutalo, naye obuwanguzi buli mu Mukama." 
Proverbs22:1 Erinnya eddungi lyegombesa okukira obugagga enkumu, n'obuganzi bukira zaabu oba ffeeza." 
Proverbs22:2 Omugagga n'omwavu bafaanana; bonna Omukama ye yabakola. 
Proverbs22:3 Omuntu omwegendereza alaba akabi ne yeewogoma, naye omubuyabuya agenda bugenzi, ne yettattana." 
Proverbs22:4 Empeera y'obwetoowaze n'okutya Omukama, bugagga, kitiibwa na bulamu." 
Proverbs22:5 Amaggwa n'ebitimba bijjudde ekkubo ly'omubi; akuuma omwoyo gwe agabeera wala. 
Proverbs22:6 Omwana mugunjule mu kkubo erimusaanira, ng'akuze talirivaako." 
Proverbs22:7 Omugagga akajjala ku baavu; eyeewola muddu wa muwozi. 
Proverbs22:8 Asiga obubi akungula nnaku, n'omuggo gw'obusungu bwe gulisaanyizibwawo." 
Proverbs22:9 Omuntu omugabi aliba n'omukisa, kubanga emmere ye agirya wamu n'omwavu." 
Proverbs22:10 Bw'ogoba omunyoomi, n'endasano nga zigenda; emisango n'ebivumo nga biwedde." 
Proverbs22:11 Oli ayagala omutima omutukuvu, oyo ow'emimwa egisikiriza, kabaka aliba mukwano gwe." 
Proverbs22:12 Amaaso g'Omukama gakuuma okutegeera, naye atabula ebigambo by'omubi." 
Proverbs22:13 Omunafu awoza: “Ebweru eriyo empologoma,” oba nti: “Nzija kuttirwa mu luguudo.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Omumwa gw'omukazi omwenzi, bunnya buwanvu; oyo Omukama gw'asunguwalidde alibugwamu." 
Proverbs22:15 Obusiru buba buzaale mu mwana, naye akaggo k'okugunjula kalibugobera wala ne w'ali." 
Proverbs22:16 Onyigiriza omwavu? Ajja kweyongera bwavu; Owa omugagga? Ajja kwavuwala. 
Proverbs22:17 Wunzika okutu kwo owulire ebigambo by'abagezi; omutima gwo guteeke ku bye njigiriza. 
Proverbs22:18 Kubanga kisanyusa bw'olibikuuma mu mutima gwo, nga biri bulindaala ku mimwa gyo." 
Proverbs22:19 Okusobola okwesiganga Omukama, olwa leero mbikuyigirizza, naawe wennyini." 
Proverbs22:20 Nkuwandiikidde engero amakumi asatu, eziwa okubuulirira n'okutegeera," 
Proverbs22:21 zikuyigirize ebigambo eby'amazima era ebituufu, osobole okwanukula mu butuufu oli eyakutuma." 
Proverbs22:22 Tonyuunyuntanga mwavu lwa bwavu bwe, n'omuseege tomulinnyiriranga ku mulyango." 
Proverbs22:23 Kubanga Omukama awolereza ensonga zaabwe; alinyagulula abo abanyagulula. 
Proverbs22:24 Tokwananga wa kasunguyira; ow'ekkayu toyitanga naye. 
Proverbs22:25 Sikulwa ng'olabira ku ye, ne weesuula mu mitego." 
Proverbs22:26 Tobalirwanga mu beeyimirira, oba mu bassizaawo amabanja akabega." 
Proverbs22:27 Bw'olibulwa agabisasula, ekitanda kyo kirikuboyebwako." 
Proverbs22:28 Tojjululanga ebituuti eby'edda bajjajjaabo bye baasimba. 
Proverbs22:29 Olaba omuntu omumanyirivu ku mulimu gwe? Aliweereza bakabaka, si kikye okuweereza abantu abatategeerekeka." 
Proverbs23:1 Bw'otuulanga ku lujjuliro n'omukungu, wekkaanye bulungi ebiri awo mu maaso go." 
Proverbs23:2 Teeka akambe ku mumiro gwo, oba oli muntu muluvu." 
Proverbs23:3 Tolulunkanira mmere ye ya kawoowo, kubanga eyo mmere ya bulimba." 
Proverbs23:4 Teweekooyanga ng'onoonya obugagga; baamu amagezi weefuge. 
Proverbs23:5 Situla amaaso otunuulire obugagga, buliba tebukyaliwo; kubanga bumera ebiwaawaatiro ne bubuuka ng'empungu nga bulaga waggulu." 
Proverbs23:6 Tolyanga mmere ya muntu muganiriza, tolulunkaniranga mmere ye ya kawoowo," 
Proverbs23:7 kubanga ye muntu aba abalirira buli kaseera. Eno akugamba nti: “Lya, nywa,” sso ng'emmeeme tekuliiko." 
Proverbs23:8 Onoosesema akatundu ke waakamira; ebigambo byo ebirungi birikufa busa. 
Proverbs23:9 Toyogereranga mu matu g'abasiru; bagenda kugaya amagezi g'ebigambo byo. 
Proverbs23:10 Tojjululanga bituuti eby'edda; toyingiriranga ttaka lya bamulekwa. 
Proverbs23:11 Kubanga omununuzi waabwe wa maanyi; agenda kuwoza naawe ku lwabwe. 
Proverbs23:12 Ssaako omwoyo ku kuyigirizibwa, n'amatu go gasse ku bigambo omuli okumanya." 
Proverbs23:13 Tolekanga kukoma ku mwana; bw'omukuba n'akaggo tagenda kufa. 
Proverbs23:14 Mubonereze n'akaggo, omuwonye amagombe." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wange, omutima gwo bwe guliba omutegeevu; nange omutima gwange gulisanyuka;" 
Proverbs23:16 nzenna muli ndisagambiza, emimwa gyo bwe giryogera ebigambo ebituufu." 
Proverbs23:17 Mu mutima aboonoonyi tebakusaalizanga, wabula buli lunaku lumirwa okutya Omukama." 
Proverbs23:18 Kubanga essuubi mu maaso gyeriri, ate essuubi lyo teriribaako alikomya." 
Proverbs23:19 Wulira, mwana wange, obeere mugezi, kuumira omutima gwo mu kkubo ettuufu." 
Proverbs23:20 Teweegattanga n'abo abeekamirira omwenge; oba mu abo abaluvuubanira ennyama. 
Proverbs23:21 Kubanga abatamiivu n'abaluvu baavuwala, anti okubongoota kwambaza omuntu obuziina." 
Proverbs23:22 Owuliranga kitaawo eyakuzaala; tonyoomanga nnyoko ng'akaddiye. 
Proverbs23:23 Amazima ogagulanga, naye togatundanga; funa amagezi, okumanya n'okutegeera." 
Proverbs23:24 Kitaawe w'omwana omutuukirivu aba musanyufu ddala; azaala omwana omugezi amwesiimiramu. 
Proverbs23:25 Kitaawo ne nnyoko basanyuke; omukazi eyakuzaala asanyuke. 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wange, mpa omutima gwo, amaaso go gasimbe ku makubo gange." 
Proverbs23:27 Omukazi omwenzi, bunnya bwa nnyanga; omukazi malaaya, buya bufunda." 
Proverbs23:28 Mazima aliimisa nga bw'olaba omutemu, ababi ayongera bangi mu bantu." 
Proverbs23:29 Ani alaba ennaku? Ani ali mu buyinike? Ani ataggwa nnyombo? Ani ataggwa kwemulugunya? Ani awulubalidde obwereere? Ani amaaso gwe gamyuse? 
Proverbs23:30 Be bo abeetalirira omwenge, abagenda bayigga emyenge emitabule." 
Proverbs23:31 Totunuulira mwenge nga gumyuse, nga gutemagana bulungi mu kikopo, nga guttulukuka bulungi." 
Proverbs23:32 Oluvannyuma guluma ng'omusota, gubojja ng'embalasaasa." 
Proverbs23:33 Amaaso go galiraba eby'engeri, n'omutima gwo gulyogera ebigambo ebibambaavu." 
Proverbs23:34 Oliba ng'eyeebase wakati ku nnyanja; ng'eyeebase waggulu ku mulongooti. 
Proverbs23:35 Oligamba: “Bankubye, sirumiddwamu; bamputtudde, siwuliddeemu kantu; nnaazuukuka ddi, nziremu ngunoonye buto?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Abantu ababi tebakukwasanga nsaalwa; teweegombanga kubeera nabo," 
Proverbs24:2 kubanga mu mutima balowoolereza bukambwe; emimwa gyabwe gyogera bya kukola kabi. 
Proverbs24:3 Ennyumba ezimbwa na magezi, n'enywezebwa na kutegeera." 
Proverbs24:4 N'okumanya amaterekero gaamu gajjuzibwa n'eby'obugagga amakula, ebisanyusa." 
Proverbs24:5 Omugezi aba wa maanyi okusinga kirimaanyi, n'omutegeevu, okusinga binywera," 
Proverbs24:6 kubanga okutabaala kyetaagisa ebibuuliriro, n'okuwangula, abawi b'amagezi abangi." 
Proverbs24:7 Amagezi omusiru gamusukkiridde; ku miryango gy'ekibuga tayasamya kamwa ke. 
Proverbs24:8 Eyeetegeka okukolera obubi, bamuyita kalittima." 
Proverbs24:9 Omusiru by'alowooza okukola biba kibi; omunyoomi abantu bamwenyinyala. 
Proverbs24:10 Bw'oterebuka mu kaseera ak'akabenje, amaanyi ng'oba na matono ddala." 
Proverbs24:11 Owonyanga abatwalibwa okuttibwa; tangiranga abakungujja okusanjagibwa. 
Proverbs24:12 Bw'onoogamba nti: “Kino tetwakimanyaako,” oyo ageza emitima talikiwulira? Oyo akuuma obulamu bwo takimanyi? Omuntu talimuweera ng'agerera ku bikolwa bye?" 
Proverbs24:13 Olyanga omubisi gw'enjuki, mwana wange, kubanga mulungi, n'ekisassalala kikuwoomera." 
Proverbs24:14 Manya nti n'amagezi bwe gawoomera omwoyo gwo; bw'ogaggukako, olwo wabaawo essuubi, ate essuubi lyo teriba alikomya." 
Proverbs24:15 Toteeganga nnyumba ya mutuukirivu ng'omubi bw'akola; leka kwaya buwummuliro bwe. 
Proverbs24:16 Omutuukirivu ne bw'agwa emirundi omusanvu, asitukawo, naye ababi akabenje kabasuula." 
Proverbs24:17 Omulabe wo bw'agwanga, tosanyukanga; bw'asinzittukanga, tolekanga mutima gwo kujaguza." 
Proverbs24:18 Sikulwa ng'Omukama akiraba n'asanyuka, n'alekera awo okumusunguwalira." 
Proverbs24:19 Omuntu omubi takweraliikirizanga; ababi tebakukwasanga nsaalwa. 
Proverbs24:20 Kubanga omuntu omubi talina ssuubi; akatawaaza k'ababi kalifuuyibwa. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wange, tya Omukama ne kabaka; teweetabikanga na bajeemu." 
Proverbs24:22 Kubanga bajja kuzikiriza mangu; ani amanyi abo bombi akabenje ke basobola okuleeta? 
Proverbs24:23 Na bino bigambo by'abagezi: Okubaamu kyekubiira ng'olamula, si kirungi." 
Proverbs24:24 Agamba omubi nti: “Toliiko musango,” abantu balimuvumirira n'amawanga ne gamutamwa." 
Proverbs24:25 Naye abo abaligumusalira, biribagendera bulungi; omukisa omulungi gulibakkako." 
Proverbs24:26 Ayanukula mu butuufu, aba ng'anywegedde ku mimwa." 
Proverbs24:27 Sooka okole egy'ebweru, otegeke ennimiro yo, olwo olyoke ozimbe ennyumba yo." 
Proverbs24:28 Tolumirizanga munno watali nsonga, era tolimbanga na mimwa gyo." 
Proverbs24:29 Togambanga nti: “Nzija kumukola nga bwe yankoze; Nzija kuwoolera eggwanga ku muntu oyo olw'ebikolwa bye.” 
Proverbs24:30 Nayita ku nnimiro y'omugayaavu, mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu ey'omuntu atategeera." 
Proverbs24:31 Yonna yali etuubye amaggwa; wansi ng'emeze kamyu ne bbugwe ow'amayinja ng'ayiise. 
Proverbs24:32 Natunula nti: ne ndowoolereza; nalaba, ne mbaako kye nayiga:" 
Proverbs24:33 Weebakamu katono, obba ku tulo, ozinga mikono owummulemu," 
Proverbs24:34 olwo obwavu bujja kukujjira ng'emmomboze, n'okuwamma, ng'omusabiriza." 
Proverbs25:1 Na zino nazo ngero za Solomoni; abasajja ba Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda be baaziwandiika: 
Proverbs25:2 Okukisa ekigambo kitiibwa kya Katonda; ate okukiwenja, kitiibwa kya bakabaka." 
Proverbs25:3 Eggulu nga bwe lyewanise waggulu n'ensi nga bw'ekka eyo ekkuzimu, n'emitima gya bakabaka bwe giteefumiitirizika." 
Proverbs25:4 Ffeeza muggyeeko essengere, olwo nga muvaamu omufukusi wa ffeeza ky'anaakolamu ekibya." 
Proverbs25:5 Ggya akola obubi mu maaso ga kabaka, entebe ye erinywera olw'obutuukirivu." 
Proverbs25:6 Teweejaakanga mu maaso ga kabaka, oba okweteeka abakungu we babeera." 
Proverbs25:7 Ekisinga ye kwe kukugamba nti: “Yambuka wano,” n'ototoowazibwa mu maaso ga mukungu." 
Proverbs25:8 Amaaso go kye galabyeko tokireetanga mangu mu mbuga, kale oluvannyuma olikola otya nga munno akuswazizza?" 
Proverbs25:9 Woza ensonga zo ne munno, kyokka tobikkulanga kyama kya mulala." 
Proverbs25:10 Sikulwa ng'akiwulira n'akuvunaana; erinnya ebbi ly'olifuna teririkuvaako. 
Proverbs25:11 Ekigambo ekyogerere we kigwanira, kiri ng'amapeera aga zaabu agatobekeddwamu aga ffeeza;" 
Proverbs25:12 Ng'empeta eya zaabu ey'oku matu oba ng'omukuufu ogwa zaabu omulungi, n'omugezi abuulirira awuliriza bw'aba." 
Proverbs25:13 Ng'obunnyogovu bw'omuzira mu budde obw'amakungula, n'omubaka omwesigwa bw'aba ku aba amutumye; azzaamu otwanyi omwoyo gwa mukama we." 
Proverbs25:14 Ng'ebire n'empewo omutali nkuba, n'eyeewaanawaana olw'ebirabo by'atawa bw'aba." 
Proverbs25:15 Mu kugumiikiriza omukungu asendebwasendebwa; olulimi olugonvu lwasa amagumba. 
Proverbs25:16 Bw'ogwikiriza omubisi gw'enjuki, lyako ogukumala, sikulwa ng'oguyitiriza n'ogusesema." 
Proverbs25:17 Ewa munno, leka kuseregganirayo, sikulwa ng'akwetamwa n'akukyawa." 
Proverbs25:18 Embuukuuli, ekitala, akasaale akoogi, ye muntu awa obujulizi obw'obulimba ku munne." 
Proverbs25:19 Erinnyo erivunze, okugulu okulema, ye muntu ateesigwa okumwesiga mu budde obw'akabi." 
Proverbs25:20 Ayimbira ennyimba omutima omunakuwavu, abeera ng'oli aggyamu ekkooti ye mu butiti, obanga ayiwa enkaatu mu luvu." 
Proverbs25:21 Omulabe wo nga muyala, muwe ekyokulya, nga muyonta, muwe ekyokunywa." 
Proverbs25:22 Olwo olituumira ku mutwe gwe amanda agengeredde, n'Omukama alikuweera." 
Proverbs25:23 Ng'embuyaga y'emambuka bw'ereeta enkuba; n'olulimi olugeyi bwe luleeta amaaso ageekapye. 
Proverbs25:24 Waakiri okusulanga waggulu mu kalikonda ka kasolya, okusinga okugatta ennyumba n'omukazi omuyombi." 
Proverbs25:25 Ng'amazzi amannyogovu ku muntu alakasidde, n'amawulire amalungi agava mu nsi ey'ewala bwe gabeera." 
Proverbs25:26 Ng'oluzzi olusiikuuliddwa, oba ensulo eyonoonese, n'omutuukirivu alekera omubi bw'aba." 
Proverbs25:27 Si kirungi kunuuna mubisi gwa njuki mungi, yadde okunoonya ekitiibwa kino na kiri." 
Proverbs25:28 Ng'ekibuga ekyabiziddwa, okutakyali bbugwe, n'omuntu atamanyi kwefuga bw'aba." 
Proverbs26:1 Ng'omuzira bwe gutasaana mu kyeya, n'enkuba mu budde obw'amakungula, ekitiibwa bwe kityo bwe kitasaanira musiru." 
Proverbs26:2 Ng'enkazaluggya bw'ebuukabuuka n'akataayi bwe keetawula, n'ekikolimo ekitalina nsonga bwe kibulwa gwe kikkako." 
Proverbs26:3 Akaswanyu ka mbalaasi n'olukoba lwa ndogoyi, n'omuggo gwa butuuliro bwa musiru." 
Proverbs26:4 Omusiru tomuddangamu ng'ogerera ku busiru bwe, sikulwa nga naawe omufaanana obusiru." 
Proverbs26:5 Omusiru omuddangamu ng'ogerera ku busiru bwe, sikulwa ng'alowooza nti mugezi." 
Proverbs26:6 Kubeera kwetemako kigere oba kunywa bulabe oli okutuma obubaka omuntu gw'amanyi nti musiru. 
Proverbs26:7 Ng'okugulu kw'omulema okutakyagasa, n'olugero bwe lutyo mu kamwa k'omusiru." 
Proverbs26:8 Ng'oli azingira ejjinja mu nvuumuulo, n'okuwa omusiru ekitiibwa bwe kuba." 
Proverbs26:9 Ng'akati k'amaggwa mu mukono gw'omutamiivu bwe kaba, n'olugero mu kamwa k'abasiru bwe luba." 
Proverbs26:10 Ng'omulasi w'obusaale amala galasa gw'asanze, n'apangisa omusiru gw'amaze gasanga bw'aba." 
Proverbs26:11 Ng'embwa edda ku by'esesemye, n'omusiru bw'ali, adda mu busiru bwe." 
Proverbs26:12 Olabye omuntu eyeerowooza okuba omugezi? Omusiru yandisuubirayo akantu, naye si oyo." 
Proverbs26:13 Omunafu awoza: “Ku kkubo kuliko empologoma; empologoma eri mu luggya!” 
Proverbs26:14 Ng'oluggi bwe lwewuubira ku ppata zaalwo, n'omunafu bwe yeekyusa mu buliri bwe." 
Proverbs26:15 Omunafu omukono agukweka mu kibya, tasobola na kuguzza eri kamwa ke." 
Proverbs26:16 Omunafu yeeraba nti mugezi okusinga abantu omusanvu abaanukula n'obwegendereza. 
Proverbs26:17 Ng'omuntu alwana n'embwa ng'agikutte matu, n'omuyise eyeeyingiza mu nnyombo ezitali zize bw'aba." 
Proverbs26:18 Ng'omulalu akasuka ebitawuliro, n'obusaale obw'akabenje," 
Proverbs26:19 bw'atyo bw'ali n'omuntu alimba munne ate n'awoza: “Mbadde nsaaga busaazi.” 
Proverbs26:20 Awatali nku, omuliro guzikira; bwe wataba wa lugambo, oluyombo lukkakkana." 
Proverbs26:21 Ng'ebisirinza ku manda, n'enku ku muliro, n'omuntu omuyombi bw'akoleeza atyo ennyombo." 
Proverbs26:22 Ebigambo by'ow'olugambo, nnoga ewooma, bikkiririra ddala munda mu lubuto." 
Proverbs26:23 Nga ffeeza atangalijjira ku kibya ky'ebbumba, n'emimwa emigonvu egibisse omutima omubi bwe giba." 
Proverbs26:24 Omukyayi abuzaabuza n'emimwa gye, naye nga munda mu mutima aterese bulimba busa." 
Proverbs26:25 Bw'ayogera nga yeegonza tomwesiga, kubanga mu mutima gwe mulimu ebyenyinyalwa musanvu." 
Proverbs26:26 Omuntu yandikisa obukyayi bwe mu bukujjukujju, naye mu kuteesa mwe bweyerulira." 
Proverbs26:27 Asima obunnya alibugwamu; ayiringisa ejjinja lirimuyiringitirako. 
Proverbs26:28 Olulimi olulimba lukyawa be lulumya, n'akamwa akanyumiikiriza kazaala kuzikirira." 
Proverbs27:1 Teweewaaniranga mu bya nkya, kubanga olunaku bye lunaaleeta tobimanyi." 
Proverbs27:2 Leka omulala akutende, sso si kamwa ko; omuntu omulala, sso si mimwa gyo." 
Proverbs27:3 Ejjinja liba zzito, n'omusenyu guzitowa, naye byombi ekibisinga ye musiru okukusunguwaza." 
Proverbs27:4 Obusungu bukambwe n'obuswandi busaanyaawo, Ani ayinza okugumira obuggya?" 
Proverbs27:5 Waakiri okunenyezebwa mu lwatu, okusinga okwagalirwa muli." 
Proverbs27:6 Ebiwundu akwagala by'akussaako biba bya mazima, naye okunywegera kw'akukyaye kubeera kwa bulimba." 
Proverbs27:7 Omukkufu yeetamwa n'ekisassalala ky'enjuki, naye ku muyala n'ebikaawa biwoomerera." 
Proverbs27:8 Ng'ekinyonyi ekibula okuva mu kisu, n'abula okuva mu maka ge bw'aba." 
Proverbs27:9 Omuzigo n'akabaani bisanyusa omutima; n'obulungi bw'ow'omukwano buva mu kubuulirirwa kwesimbu. 
Proverbs27:10 Mukwano gwo ne mukwano gwa kitaawo tobaabuliranga; ku lunaku ng'ogudde mu kacwano, teweeyunanga wa muganda wo; omuliraano ogw'okumpi gukira oluganda olw'ewala." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wange, beera mugezi, osanyuse omutima gwange, ndyoke mbeeko bye nnyanukula anvuma." 
Proverbs27:12 Omuntu omwegendereza alaba akabi ne yeewogoma, naye omubuyabuya agenda bugenzi, ne yettattana." 
Proverbs27:13 Ekyambalo ky'omuntu kitwale, ky'asinzeeyo okweyimirira omuyise; kitwale ng'omusingo bwe yeeyimirira omugwira." 
Proverbs27:14 Alamusa munne ku makya n'eddoboozi ery'olwatu, alitwalibwa ng'akolimye." 
Proverbs27:15 Akasolya akatatadde kutonnya mu bw'enkuba n'omukazi omuyombi bifaanagana; 
Proverbs27:16 okumuziyiza oba ng'aziyiza empewo; oba ng'oli afunyira omuzigo mu kikonde kye. 
Proverbs27:17 Ekyuma kiwagalibwa kyuma, n'omuntu y'awagala munne." 
Proverbs27:18 Alabirira omukunyu aligulyako ebibala, n'akuuma mukama we aliweebwa ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Ng'amaaso bwe geeraba mu mazzi, n'omutima gw'omuntu bwe gulaga ky'ali." 
Proverbs27:20 Ng'amagombe n'okuzikirira bwe bitakkuta, n'amaaso g'omuntu bwe gatamatira." 
Proverbs27:21 Ogutamu gwa ffeeza, n'akabiga ka zaabu, n'omuntu agezebwa na kuwaanibwa." 
Proverbs27:22 Omusiru ne bw'omusekula mu kinu, n'omusekula ng'eŋŋano n'omusekuzo, tolimwawukanya na busiru bwe." 
Proverbs27:23 Manya bulungi amagana go nga bwe gali, n'ebisibo byo obyekebejje;" 
Proverbs27:24 kubanga obugagga tebuba bwa lubeerera, n'engule tebeerawo mazadde na mazadde." 
Proverbs27:25 Essubi bwe liyoolwamu, omuddo omuggya nga gumera, n'omuddo ku nsozi nga gakuŋŋaanyizibwa," 
Proverbs27:26 olwo obwana bw'endiga bulikuwa ekyokwambala, n'embuzi ennume zirikuwa ezigula obutaka;" 
Proverbs27:27 oliba n'amata g'embuzi agamala okukuliisa n'amaka go, n'okuliisa bawala bo abakuweereza." 
Proverbs28:1 Omubi adduka nga tewali n'amugoba, naye omutuukirivu aba muzira ng'empologoma." 
Proverbs28:2 Ensi bw'eba mu bujeemu, eba n'abafuzi bangi; naye omutegeevu alimu okumanya azzaawo obutebenkevu." 
Proverbs28:3 Omwavu anyigiriza abaavu, ali nga nnamuttikwa w'enkuba atalekaawo mmere." 
Proverbs28:4 Abaabulira etteeka bawaanawaana ababi, naye abalikwata babalwanyisa." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu ababi tebategeera butuufu; naye abanoonya Omukama babutegeera mu bujjuvu. 
Proverbs28:6 Waakiri omwavu atambulira mu bulungi bwe, okusinga omugagga ow'amakubo amabi." 
Proverbs28:7 Akwata etteeka, oyo mwana mugezi; naye ayita n'abaluvu aswaza kitaawe." 
Proverbs28:8 Ow'ebintu gwe byalira olw'okuliika n'okuseera, akuŋŋaanyiza mulala alijuna abaavu." 
Proverbs28:9 Akyusiza eri okutu aleme kuwulira tteeka, okwegayirira kwe kwenyinyalwa." 
Proverbs28:10 Alaza abatuufu mu kkubo ebbi, yennyini aligwa mu bunnya bwe, naye abataliiko musango balifuna omusera gw'obusika." 
Proverbs28:11 Omugagga yandyeraba ng'omugezi, naye omwavu omwegendereza amwekkaanya." 
Proverbs28:12 Abatuukirivu bwe bawangula, wabaawo okusanyuka kunene, naye ababi bwe bajja mu buyinza, abantu nga beekweka." 
Proverbs28:13 Abikkirira ebisobyo bye, tafuna mukisa, naye azeenenya n'azireka, alisaasirwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Yeesiimye omuntu bulijjo atya Katonda, naye agugubya omutima gwe agwa mu kabi." 
Proverbs28:15 Ng'empologoma ewuluguma oba eddubu erirumwa enjala, ye mufuzi omubi atwala abantu abanaku." 
Proverbs28:16 Omukulembeze abulamu okutegeera atulugunya nnyo, naye akyawa obulyake alyongera ku nnaku z'obulamu bwe." 
Proverbs28:17 Avunaanibwa okuyiwa omusaayi gw'omulala, aliba mudduse obulamu bwe bwonna; wabulewo amuyamba." 
Proverbs28:18 Atambulira mu bulungi aliwona, naye akwata amakubo amakyamu aligwa mangu." 
Proverbs28:19 Eyeerimira ettaka lye alikkuta emmere, naye adda mu bitaliimu alikkuta obwavu." 
Proverbs28:20 Omuntu omwesigwa alifa emikisa obungi, naye awaalirira okugaggawala amangu taliwona kibonerezo." 
Proverbs28:21 Okugwa olubege si kirungi, naye olw'akatundu k'omugaati kati omuntu asobya." 
Proverbs28:22 Omuganiriza awaalirira obugagga, n'atamanya nti obwavu bujja kumugwira." 
Proverbs28:23 Akomako munne, oluvannyuma alizuula obuganzi okukira ow'akalimi akaseemyaseemya." 
Proverbs28:24 Abba kitaawe ne nnyina n'awoza nti: “Si musango,” wa mukwano n'omutemu." 
Proverbs28:25 Ow'omululu asiikuula nnyombo; naye eyeesiga Omukama aliba n'omukisa. 
Proverbs28:26 Eyessa obwesige mu ye yekka, musiru, naye atambulira mu magezi aliwona." 
Proverbs28:27 Agabira abaavu talijula kantu, naye abazibira amaaso alifuna ebikolimo bingi." 
Proverbs28:28 Ababi bwe bajja mu buyinza, abantu nga beekweka, naye bwe bazikirira, abatuukirivu nga baala." 
Proverbs29:1 Gwe bakomako emirundi egiwera n'akakanyaza ensingo, mangu ajja kuzikirizibwa, tewaliba kuwona." 
Proverbs29:2 Abatuukirivu bwe beeyongera, abantu basanyuka, naye ababi bwe bafuga, abantu basinda." 
Proverbs29:3 Buli ayagala amagezi asanyusa kitaawe, naye ayita ne bamalaaya, aduubuuda ebibye." 
Proverbs29:4 Kabaka ensi aginyweza mu bwenkanya, naye alulunkanira okuvujjirirwa agizikiriza." 
Proverbs29:5 Oli aseemyaseemya munne, aba atega bigere bye kitimba." 
Proverbs29:6 Omubi ebisobyo bye bimutega, naye omutuukirivu asagambiza n'asanyuka." 
Proverbs29:7 Omutuukirivu amanyi ensonga z'abanaku, naye omubi ekyo takifaako." 
Proverbs29:8 Abanyoomi basasamaza ekibuga; naye abagezi bakkakkanya obusungu. 
Proverbs29:9 Omugezi bw'awoza n'omusiru, omusiru yeenyiiza n'okwesesa; tewaba mirembe." 
Proverbs29:10 Abantu abayiwa omusaayi bakyawa omutuufu; ababi banoonya obulamu bwe. 
Proverbs29:11 Omusiru bw'anyiiga, yeemalamu, naye omugezi yeefuga." 
Proverbs29:12 Omufuzi awuliriza eŋŋambo abaami be bonna bafuuka babi. 
Proverbs29:13 Omwavu n'omuntu anyigiriza bafaanana: Omukama y'atangaaza amaaso ga bombi. 
Proverbs29:14 Kabaka asalira abaavu emisango mu bwenkanya nnamulondo ye erinywera emirembe gyonna. 
Proverbs29:15 Omuggo n'okunenya bireeta amagezi, naye omwana atagambwako aswaza nnyina." 
Proverbs29:16 Ababi bwe beeyongera, emisango gyeyongera; kyokka abatuukirivu baliraba bwe basiguukulukuka." 
Proverbs29:17 Omwana wo mugolole, alikuwa emirembe; aliwa ebicepere omutima gwo." 
Proverbs29:18 Bwe wataba bulanzi abantu balaluka, naye beesiimye abakwata ebiragiro." 
Proverbs29:19 Omuweereza tagololwa na bigambo bugambo; ne bw'akitegeera, takifaako." 
Proverbs29:20 Walaba omuntu amala gafubutuka mu kwogera? Omusiru yandisuubirayo akantu, naye si oyo." 
Proverbs29:21 Atibula omuddu we okuva mu buvubuka, omuddu oyo alimujeemera oluvannyuma." 
Proverbs29:22 Ow'akasunguyira asiikuula nnyombo; atalwa kusunguwala akola ebisobyo bingi. 
Proverbs29:23 Amalala g'omuntu gamutuusa ku kutoowazibwa; naye eyeetoowaza alyefunira ekitiibwa. 
Proverbs29:24 Eyeetaba n'ababbi yeekolera kukyayibwa; awulira bye bamuvumirira naye tayogera kantu. 
Proverbs29:25 Okutya omuntu guba mutego, naye eyeesiga Omukama akuumibwa." 
Proverbs29:26 Bangi banoonya okukiika ew'omufuzi, naye ew'Omukama y'eva eddembe lya buli omu." 
Proverbs29:27 Abatuukirivu beenyinyala ababi, n'ababi beenyinyala ab'amakubo amaluŋŋamu." 
Proverbs30:1 Ebigambo bya Aguri mutabani wa Yake ow'e Massa. Omusajja ono yagamba Yitiyeli, Yitiyeli ne Wukali nti:" 
Proverbs30:2 Mu bantu bonna nze sirina kye mmanyi; okutegeera okw'obuntu nze sikulina. 
Proverbs30:3 Saayiga magezi, n'Oyo Omutuukirivu simumanyi." 
Proverbs30:4 Ani yali ayambuse mu ggulu n'akka? Ani yali akuŋŋaanyizza empewo n'agikwatira mu kikonde? Ani yali azingidde amazzi mu munagiro gwe? Ani yali ataddewo enkingi z'ensi? Erinnya lye ye ani, n'erya mutabani we, bw'oba omanyi?" 
Proverbs30:5 Buli kigambo kya Katonda, kikakafu; yennyini ye ngabo y'abantu abaddukira gy'ali." 
Proverbs30:6 Ebigambo bye tobikubirangako kirala, sikulwa ng'akuvunaana n'akulaga bw'oli omulimba." 
Proverbs30:7 Bino bibiri bye nkusaba, tobinnyima nga sinnafa:" 
Proverbs30:8 Tonsembereza bukuusa na bigambo bya bulimba; tompa bwavu yadde obugagga; mpa kyokka, emmere emmala," 
Proverbs30:9 sikulwa nga mu kuyagaayagana nkwegaana; ne mpoza: “Ate Omukama ye ani?” Oba ate njavuwala, ne nziba, ne nvuma erinnya lya Katonda wange." 
Proverbs30:10 Towaayirizanga muweereza wa mukama we, sikulwa ng'akuvumirira n'obonerezebwa." 
Proverbs30:11 Waliyo nno abavumirira bajjajjaabwe, n'abatasabira mukisa bannyaabwe." 
Proverbs30:12 Waliyo nno abeemanyi obutukuvu, sso ng'obujama tebubanaazibwangako." 
Proverbs30:13 Waliyo nno ab'amaaso ameekuza; abatunuza obunyoomi. 
Proverbs30:14 Waliyo abo amannyo gaabwe nga bitala; amagego gaabwe, bwambe, okukavvula abaavu babamale ku nsi, n'abanaku babamale mu bantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Ekinoso kirina bawala baakyo babiri: bigamba “Mpa, mpa.” Waliwo bisatu ebitakkuta; bina ebitalikugamba nti: “Kimala”:" 
Proverbs30:16 Amagombe, olubuto olugumba, ettaka eritakkuta mazzi n'omuliro ogutaligamba nti: “Kimala.”" 
Proverbs30:17 Eriiso erinyooma omuzadde omusajja, n'eritafa ku kuyamba muzadde mukazi, binnamuŋŋoona by'omu kiwonvu biriritungulamu, obwana bw'ensega ne bulirya." 
Proverbs30:18 Waliwo bisatu ebinneewuunyisa, bina bye sitegeerera ddala:" 
Proverbs30:19 Ekkubo ly'empungu mu bbanga; ekkubo ly'omusota ku lwazi; ekkubo ly'eryato ku nnyanja wakati; n'ekkubo ly'omusajja ali n'omuwala. 
Proverbs30:20 Omukazi omwenzi akola bw'ati: Alya, bw'amala ne yeesiimuula emimwa, ng'agamba nti: “Tewali bubi bwe nkoze.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Bisatu bino bye binyeenya ensi; bina by'eteyinza kugumiikiriza: 
Proverbs30:22 Omuddu bw'afuuka kabaka; omusiru akkuse emmere; 
Proverbs30:23 omukazi omukyawe ate n'afumbirwa, n'omuzaana bw'adda mu kifo kya mugole we." 
Proverbs30:24 Ku nsi kuliko ebitonde bina ebitono, sso mu bugezi bye bisinga:" 
Proverbs30:25 Enkuyege, eggwanga eritalina maanyi, naye mu kyeya zeeterekera emmere;" 
Proverbs30:26 buwakayima, buntu bukateyamba, naye bukola ebisulo byabwo mu njazi;" 
Proverbs30:27 enzige, tezirina kabaka, naye zonna zisenguka ng'eggye eritaze okulwana;" 
Proverbs30:28 omunya, osobola okugukwata n'engalo, naye gusangibwa ne mu mbiri za bakabaka." 
Proverbs30:29 Bisatu bino ebyeyisa ekikungu: bina ebitambuza ekikungu: 
Proverbs30:30 Empologoma esinga ebisolo byonna amaanyi, mpaawo ky'esanga n'edda ennyuma;" 
Proverbs30:31 enkoko empanga egaaga, sseddume w'embuzi ne kabaka ali n'eggye lye." 
Proverbs30:32 Obanga mu busiru weekuza, omala weddamu, ddira omukono gwo okwate ku mumwa." 
Proverbs30:33 Ng'okusunda amata bwe kuggyamu omuzigo, ng'okukaka ennyindo bwe kugireeta omusaayi, n'okusiikuula obusungu bwe kuleeta ennyombo." 
Proverbs31:1 Ebigambo bya Lemweli kabaka w'e Massa nnyina bye yamuyigiriza: 
Proverbs31:2 Kiki, mutabani? Kiki, mwana w'enda yange? Kiki, mwana w'obweyamo bwange?" 
Proverbs31:3 Amaanyi go gonna togamaliranga ku bakazi; endasi zo ku abo abazikiriza ne bakabaka. 
Proverbs31:4 Sikigwanira bakabaka, ggwe Lemweli; si kya bakabaka okunywa omwenge; si kya bakungu okwagala ebitamiiza;" 
Proverbs31:5 sikulwa nga banywa ne beerabira etteeka kye liragira, ne bakyusakyusa ensonga z'abanaku." 
Proverbs31:6 Muwe omwenge omuntu anaatera okufa; muwe omwenge ow'omutima ogulimu ennyiike. 
Proverbs31:7 Muleke banywe, beerabire ennaku, nga tebakyajjukira bulumi bwabwe n'akamu." 
Proverbs31:8 Yogeranga ku lw'abatasobola kweyogerera, ne ku lw'ensonga za bonna abaavu." 
Proverbs31:9 Yasamya akamwa ko olamule mu butuufu; lwanirira omunaku n'oyo ali mu bwetaavu. 
Proverbs31:10 Omukazi omuzira anaamusanga ye ani? Wa muwendo okukira amakula gonna. 
Proverbs31:11 Bba amwesiga n'omutima gwe gwonna, talina kya muwendo ky'ajulirira." 
Proverbs31:12 Aleetera bba birungi, si bibi, ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe." 
Proverbs31:13 Yeenoonyeza wuulu n'obugoogwa n'aluka n'emikono emimanyirivu. 
Proverbs31:14 Ali ng'amaato amasuubuzi, asomba emmere ye ng'agiggya wala." 
Proverbs31:15 Azuukuka nga bukyakutte, n'awa ab'omu maka ge emmere, n'agabira bazaana be emirimu." 
Proverbs31:16 Yekkaanya ennimiro n'agigula; aggya ku bye yafuna n'emikono gye n'asimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu. 
Proverbs31:17 Yeesiba n'anywera akole n'amaanyi, n'emikono gye mikakafu ku mulimu." 
Proverbs31:18 Amanyi nga by'asuubula bya ttunzi; ekiro ettawaaza ye tezikira. 
Proverbs31:19 Omukono gwe agussa ku katanta, emikono gye ne gikwata akati akalanga ewuzi." 
Proverbs31:20 Ayaniriza abaavu; n'agabira abali mu bwetaavu. 
Proverbs31:21 Mu budde obw'omuzira teyeeraliikirira ba mu nnyumba ye, kubanga bonna ab'omu maka ge bambala ne baggumira." 
Proverbs31:22 Aluka ebibikka ebitanda bye; ayambala engoye mpeweevu eza kakobe. 
Proverbs31:23 Bba wa kitiibwa ku miryango gy'ekibuga bw'atuula wakati mu bakungu b'omu ggwanga. 
Proverbs31:24 Aluka engoye empeweevu n'azitunda, abasuubuzi n'abaguza enneebaggyo." 
Proverbs31:25 Ayambadde amaanyi n'ekitiibwa; ennaku eziri mu maaso azisekerera busekerezi. 
Proverbs31:26 Ayogeza magezi; ebibuuliriro eby'ekisa bye biri ku lulimi lwe. 
Proverbs31:27 Alabirira enneeyisa y'ab'omu maka ge; emmere talya ya bwereere. 
Proverbs31:28 Abaana be basituka ne bamutenda emikisa, ne bba naye n'amutenda nti:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Abakazi bangi abakola eby'ettendo, naye ggwe bonna obasinga.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Obuganzi bulimbalimba, n'obubalagavu temuli nsa; omukazi atya Omukama yekka y'atendebwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mumuwe empeera y'emikono gye bye gikoze, n'emirimu gye gimuweese ekitiibwa ku miryango gy'ekibuga." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ebigambo bya Koweleti, mutabani wa Dawudi kabaka mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Temuli kantu, temuli kantu, Koweleti bw'agamba; temuli yadde akantu, byonna temuli kantu!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Magoba ki omuntu g'aggya mu kutegana kwe kwonna kw'ateganamu wansi w'enjuba? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Amazadde gagenda, amazadde ne gajja, naye ensi yo esigalawo emirembe gyonna." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Enjuba evaayo, enjuba n'egwa, n'eddayo mangu mu kifo kyayo." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Empewo efuuwa ng'eraga emaserengeta, n'ekyusa ng'edda emambuka; empewo egenda yeetooloola nga bwedda mu kisinde kyayo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Emigga gyonna gikulukutira mu nnyanja, naye ennyanja tejjula; mu kifo emigga gye gisibuka, eyo gye gidda nate." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ebintu byonna bikooya, omuntu tayinza kubittottola. Eriiso terikkuta kulaba, n'okutu tekujjula kuwulira." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Ekyaliwo kiriddamu okubaawo, n'ekyakolebwa kiriddamu okukolebwa; wansi w'enjuba teri kiggya," 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Waliwo oli ky'ayinza okwogerako nti: “Kino kiggya?” Kyaliwo dda mu mirembe giri, kyaliwo nga tetunnabaawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ebyasooka tebijjukirwa, naye n'ebyo ebiribeerawo gye bujja, nabyo tebirijjukirwa abo abalijja." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nze Koweleti nali kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Yeruzaalemu; 
Ecclesiastes1:13 neefubirira okunoonya n'okwekenneenya n'amagezi byonna ebikolebwa wansi w'eggulu. Omugugu Katonda gwe yabinika abaana b'abantu bakole, nga muzibu!" 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndabye ebikolwa byonna ebikolebwa wansi w'enjuba; naye byonna temuli kantu, kugoba mpewo buwewo." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ekyewese tekisoboka kugololwa, n'ekibulawo tekisoboka kubalibwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nagamba mu mutima gwange nti: “Wuuno neeyongedde ne ntutumuka mu magezi okusinga bonna abankulembera okufuga mu Yeruzaalemu; ndabye bingi eby'amagezi n'okumanya.” 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Awo kwe kwefubirira ku ky'okumanya amagezi era ne ku ky'okumanya obulalulalu n'obutamanya. Kyokka nategeera nti yadde na bino, kugoba mpewo buwewo." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Kubanga ku magezi amangi kujjirako obuyinike nkumu, n'okumanya gye kweyongera, n'ennaku gy'ekoma." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nagamba mu mutima gwange nti: “Jjangu, nzija kukugeza n'amasanyu, nzuule ekirungi kye gawa.” Ne mu kino temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ku nseko nagamba nti: “Bulalulalu,” ate ku ssanyu nti: “Kigasa ki?”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Nalowooza ku ky'okusanyusa obulamu bwange n'omwenge, ne ku ky'okuwambaatira obutamanya, gwo omutima gwange nga gukyankulembera n'amagezi. Nayagala ndabe kiki ekigasa abaana b'abantu okukola wansi w'enjuba mu nnaku entono ez'obulamu bwabwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ne mbakana n'eby'okukola: neezimbira ennyumba, ne nsimba emizabbibu." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Neesimbira ennimiro n'obulimiro obw'ebimuli, ne nsimbamu emiti egy'ebibala ebya buli kika." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Neekolera ebidiba eby'amazzi nfukirire ennimiro y'emiti egyali gigenda gyanya. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Nalina abaddu n'abazaana, n'abaddu abamu banzaalirwa mu maka gange; nalina amagana g'ente n'ebisibo by'endiga n'embuzi ebinene okusinga bonna abankulembera mu Yeruzaalemu bye baalina." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Era neekuŋŋaanyiza ffeeza, zaabu n'obugagga bwa bakabaka n'abaamasaza; nafuna abayimbi abasajja n'abakazi, na buli kisanyusa omutima gw'omuntu, anti gwe mwandu gw'abakazi." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ne ntutumuka, ne nsinga bonna abankulembera mu Yeruzaalemu; go amagezi gange gaasigala nange." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Na byonna amaaso gange bye geegombanga nga sibigagaana, n'omutima gwange saagumma ssanyu na limu. Omutima gwange gwasanyukira byonna bye nakola, era guno gwe gwali omugabo gwe naggya mu bye nakola." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Naye bwe nakyukira eri byonna emikono gyange bye gyali gikoze n'okutegana kwe nali nteganyeeemu okubaako kye nkola, byonna temwali kantu, kwali kugoba mpewo buwewo; mpaawo magoba wansi w'enjuba." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Awo ne nzira ku kwekkaanya amagezi, obulalulalu n'obutamanya. Anti omuntu alisikira kabaka alikola ki? Si kye baakola edda?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Nalaba nti amagezi gasinga obutamanya, kyenkana ng'ekitangaala bwe kisinga enzikiza." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Omugezi amaaso ge gali ku mutwe gwe, naye omusiru atambulira mu nzikiza. Nayiga nti byombi enkomerero ye emu ebituukirira." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ne ŋŋamba mu mutima gwange nti: “Ekigwira omusiru nange kye kiringwira; ngasirwamu ki okubeera omugezi?” Ne njogera mu mutima gwange nti: “Na bino temuli kantu.” 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Kubanga omugezi okufaanana n'omusiru talijjukirwa emirembe gyonna; manyanga gye bulijja bombi nga beerabirwa dda. Omusiru afa, n'omugezi afa kyenkana." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Obulamu kyennava mbukyawa, kubanga ebikolebwa wansi w'enjuba ndaba bibi. Byonna temuli kantu, kugoba mpewo buwewo." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nakyawa okutegana kwange kwe nateganamu wansi w'enjuba kubanga nalaba nga ndibirekera oyo alinziririra. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ani amanyi oba aliba mugezi oba musiru? Oyo y'alifuga emirimu gyange gyonna egyanteganya wansi w'enjuba kwe namalira amagezi gange. Na kino temuli kantu. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Awo omutima gwange ne guterebuka mu bye nali nteganyeemu wansi w'enjuba. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kubanga omuntu ategana n'akola n'amagezi, n'okumanya n'obukugu, naye omugabo gwe n'agulekera omulala ataabikolerera; na kino nakyo temuli kantu, kya nnaku nnyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Omuntu mugaso ki gw'aggya mu byonna by'ateganamu wansi w'enjuba n'omutima gwe bye gwefubirira. 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Obudde bwe bwonna nnaku nsa, n'emirimu gye kusobezebwa kwereere; n'ekiro kyonna omutima gwe teguwummula; na kino nakyo temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Teri kirungi omuntu kye yandikoze kyandisinze kulya, kunywa n'okusanyukira mu kutegana kwe. Ndaba na kino kiva mu mikono gya Katonda," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 kubanga awatali Katonda ani yandiridde, ani yandisanyuse?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Omuntu omulungi mu maaso ga Katonda, amuwa amagezi, okumanya, n'essanyu, naye omwonoonyi amuwa mugugu gwa kukuŋŋaanya na kutuuma alyoke awe oli eyasanyusa Katonda. Na kino temuli kantu, kugoba mpewo buwewo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Buli kintu kirina akaseera kaakyo, na buli kikolebwa wansi w'eggulu kirina obudde bwakyo:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Obudde obw'okuzaalibwa n'obudde obw'okufa, obudde obw'okusimba, n'obudde obw'okukuula ekyasimbibwa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 obudde obw'okutta n'obudde obw'okuwonya, obudde obw'okuzimbulula n'obudde obw'okuzimba;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 obudde obw'okukaaba n'obudde obw'okuseka, obudde obw'okukungubaga n'obudde obw'okuzina;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 obudde obw'okusaasaanya amayinja n'obudde obw'okugakuŋŋaanya, obudde obw'okuwambaatira, n'obudde obw'okuleka okuwambaatira;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 obudde obw'okunoonya, n'obudde obw'okufiirwa ebintu, obudde obw'okukuuma n'obudde obw'okusuula eri;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 obudde obw'okuyuza n'obudde obw'okutunga, obudde obw'okusirika n'obudde obw'okwogera;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 obudde obw'okwagala n'obudde obw'okukyawa, obudde obw'olutalo n'obudde obw'eddembe." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Omuntu magoba ki g'aggya mu kutegana kwe? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nalaba omugugu Katonda gwe yabinika abaana b'abantu beetikke. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Yakola bulungi ebintu byonna nga bituukana n'obudde bwabyo; yassa mu mutima gw'omuntu okutegeera obudde obutaliiko kkomo, naye era abantu tebasobola kwefumiitiriza ne bakomekkereza omulimu Katonda gwe yakola okuva ku ntandikwa okutuuka ku nkomerero." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Mmanyi nti teri kirungi kisinga kusanyuka na kukola bulungi mu bulamu bw'omuntu. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Anti buli muntu yandiridde, n'anywa n'amatira ebirungi ebiva mu kutegana kwe; kino kitone kya Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Nayiga nti byonna Katonda bye yakola bisigalawo emirembe gyonna; tewali kya kwongerako, yadde eky'okumogolako; Katonda ye yabikola balyoke bamusseemu ekitiibwa." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ekiriwo kyaliwo dda, ate ekiribeerawo kyabaawo dda; Katonda azzaawo ekyayita." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Nayongera okulaba wansi w'enjuba: mu kifo ky'obutuufu waaliwo bugwenyufu, mu kifo ky'obutuukirivu waaliwo bugwenyufu." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Nagamba mu mutima gwange nti: “Omutuukirivu n'omubi Katonda alibalamula, kubanga buli kintu kirina obudde, na buli kikolebwa kirina ebbanga lyakyo.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Era nagamba mu mutima gwange ku baana b'abantu nti: “Katonda ageza abantu abalage nti bafaanagana n'ebisolo. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Kubanga ebigwira abaana b'abantu n'ebigwira ebisolo bye bimu; ng'ekimu bwe kifa, n'ekirala bwe kifa; byonna omwoyo gwe gumu: omuntu talina ky'asinza ku bisolo. Byonna temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 “Byonna biraga mu kifo kimu: byonna byaggyibwa mu nfuufu, era mu nfuufu byonna mwe bidda." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ani amanyi oba omwoyo gw'abaana b'omuntu gwambuka waggulu, ate omwoyo gw'ebisolo nga guserengeta wansi mu ttaka?”" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Nakitegeera nti tewali kirungi kisinga muntu kusanyukira mu ky'akoze; kubanga ekyo gwe mugabo gwe, kubanga ani alimuleeta okulaba ebiribaawo ye ng'avuddewo?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Nakyuka ne ndaba okunyigiriza okukolebwa wansi w'enjuba; amaziga g'abanyigiriziddwa, nga mpaawo akubagiza; eryanyi liri n'abanyigiriza, tewali akubagiza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ne neesiimisa abafu abaamala edda okufa, nti ba mukisa okusinga abo abakyali abalamu." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Naye akyasinza na bano bombi omukisa y'oyo atannazaalibwa, atannalaba ku bikolwa bibi ebikolebwa wansi w'enjuba." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ne ndaba nti emirimu n'amagoba g'okutegana biva mu kukwatiraganirwa buggya. Ne mu kino era temuli kantu, kugoba mpewo buwewo." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Omusiru azinga emikono gye, ne yeegoogombya." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Olubatu mu ddembe lukira embatu zombi ez'okutegana n'okugoba empewo obuwewo. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Era nazuula n'ekirala wansi w'enjuba omutali kantu: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Waaliwo omusajja ng'ali bwannamunigina, talina mwana yadde muganda we. Yali tata kutegana, naye amaaso ge nga tegakkuta bya bugagga bye. Awo nno ntawaanira ani? Lwaki neesubya ebirungi? Ne mu kino nakyo temuli kantu, kutegana okukwasa ennaku." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ababiri basinga omu kubanga bafuna empeera nnungi mu kutegana kwabwe. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Omu bw'aba agudde, omulala amusitulawo. Ali obw'omu alabye. Bw'agwa, tewaba amusitulawo." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Era, ababiri bwe beebaka awamu, omu abugumya munne. Ali omu abuguma atya?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Omuntu yandikina kw'ali obw'omu, naye abali ababiri bandimulwanyisa. Omuguwa ogw'emiko esatu tegumala gakutulibwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Omulenzi omwavu, omugezi asinga kabaka omukadde ate nga musiru, atakyawuliriza kulabulibwa," 
Ecclesiastes4:14 omulenzi ne bw'aba yava mu kkomera okujja ku nnamulondo, obanga yazaalibwa musabirizi mu bwakabaka bwe obwo." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nalaba abalamu bonna abatambula wansi w'enjuba, nga bagoberera omuvubuka oli eyadda mu kifo kya kabaka." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Omuwendo gw'abantu bonna gwali tegukoma, ogw'abo bonna abaabakulemberamu. Naye abaddawo oluvannyuma tebaamusanyukira. Na kino temuli kantu, kugoba mpewo buwewo." 
Ecclesiastes4:17 Kuuma ekigere kyo bw'oyingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda. Sembera mu buwulize okusinga okuweereza ebitambiro by'abasiru, abo abatamanyi nti bakola kibi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Toyanguyirizanga kwogera; mu mutima gwo toyanguyirizanga kwogera kigambo mu maaso ga Katonda. Katonda ali mu ggulu, ate ggwe oli ku nsi, awo nno ebigambo byo bibeere bitono." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Kubanga ebirooto bijja lwa kweraliikirira kungi, n'okwogera okw'ekisiru kuva mu kwogera bingi." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Bw'obaako kye weeyamye eri Katonda tolwangawo kukituukiriza. Tosanyukiranga mu basiru; kye weeyamye kituukirize. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Obuteeyama kantu kisinga okweyama ate n'ototuukiriza. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Toganya kamwa ko kukuleetera kukola kibi, era teweemulugunya mu maaso ga mubaka nti: “Yali nsobi.” Lwaki oleetera Katonda okunyiigira ebigambo byo, n'oyonoona emirimu gy'emikono gyo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Awaba ebirooto ebingi, wabaawo ebitaliimu kantu n'ebigambo ntoko. Ggwe tya Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Bw'olaba eyo mu bitundu ng'abanaku banyigirizibwa, ng'obwenkanya n'obwannannyini bityoboolebwa, ekyo tokyewuunyanga. Kubanga omukungu omukulu alondoolwa amusingako, ate ne waggulu wa bano bombi eriyo ababasinga." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Amagoba agava mu nsi bagagabana; kabaka y'atwala eby'omu nnimiro. 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ayagala ssente, talikkuta ssente, n'ayagala obugagga talikkuta magoba. Na kino nakyo temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Awali ebintu ebingi, n'ababirya baba bangi; olwo nnannyini byo bimugasa ki, mpozzi okubitunulako obutunuzi?" 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Otulo tw'omukozi tuwooma, ne bw'alya akatono ne bw'alya ekingi; naye omwero gw'omugagga tegumuganya kwebaka." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Waliwo ekirwadde ekibi kye nalaba wansi w'enjuba: obugagga obutuume obw'obulabe eri nnannyinibwo. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Bwazikirira olw'entaanya emu; ate yalina omwana omu, naye teyalina kantu mu mikono gye." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Bwereere nga bwe yafuluma mu lubuto lwa nnyina, era omuntu bw'aligenda. Talina ky'alitwala ku bye yateganira ky'aliyinza kugenda nakyo mu ngalo." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Kino kirwadde kibi okugenda nga bwe yajja; magoba ki gaafuna okuteganira empewo? 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Amala ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe ng'aliira mu nzikiza, ng'ali mu kusoberwa, buyinike na busungu." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Nze ndaba nga kirungi era kye kituufu oli okulya, okunywa n'okusanyukira mu kutegana kwe kwe yateganamu wansi w'enjuba, mu nnaku entono ez'obulamu bwe Katonda ze yamuwa; anti ogwo gwe mugabo gwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Buli muntu Katonda gw'awa obugagga n'ebintu, n'amusobozesa okubyeyagaliramu, n'amukkiriza n'okusanyukira mu biva mu kutegana kwe, ekyo nno kirabo kya Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Emirundi mingi talirowooza ku bumpi bwa nnaku ze, kubanga Katonda aliba amutwalirizza n'essanyu ly'omutima gwe." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Waliyo n'ekibi ekirala kye nalaba wansi w'enjuba, ate nakyo nga kizitoowerera abantu:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Omuntu Katonda gw'awa obugagga, ebintu n'ekitiibwa, ng'omutima gwe tegukyajula mu bye gwegomba, ate Katonda n'atamuwa kubyeliira, bo abalala ne babirya, kino temuli kantu; kirwadde kibi!" 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Oli ne bwe yandizadde abaana ekikumi, n'awangaala emyaka mingi, ne bwe yandiwangadde kutuusa wa, naye nga teyeeyagalidde kimala mu bugagga bwe, n'ataziikibwa na bulungi, ku oyo nze ŋŋamba nti olubuto oluvuddemu lumusinga." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Anti omwana yajjira bwereere, n'alaga mu nzikiza, n'erinnya lye lizingiddwazingiddwa mu nzikiza." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Newandibadde teyalaba ku njuba yadde okugimanya, naye awummudde okusinga oli," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 oyo ne bwe yaliwangadde emyaka lukumi n'alukubisaamu n'emirundi ebiri naye n'ateeyagalira mu bugagga bwe. Bonna tebagenda mu kifo kimu? 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Byonna omuntu by'ateganira bidda eri kamwa ke, okwegomba kwe tekulikkuta." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Omugezi kiki ky'asinga omusiru? N'omwavu afunamu ki amanyi okweyisa obulungi mu maaso g'abalamu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Amaaso kye galaba kirungi okusinga okwegomba bye kulondoola; na kino temuli kantu, kugoba mpewo buwewo."
