Ecclesiastes6:10 Buli kyonna ekiriwo kyatuumibwa dda erinnya, na buli muntu ky'ali kimanyiddwa, nti tayinza kuwerennemba n'oli amusinga amaanyi." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ebigambo gye bikomya obungi n'obutabaamu kantu. Awo nno omuntu aggyamu ki? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ani amanyi ekirungi eri omuntu mu bulamu, mu nnaku entono omutali na mugaso, z'amalako ng'ekisiikirize? Yadde ani asobola okumumanyisa ekiribaawo wansi w'enjuba nga ye takyaliwo?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Erinnya eddungi lisinga omuzigo ogw'omuwendo, n'olunaku olw'okufa lusinga olw'okuzaalibwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kirungi okugenda gye bakungubaga okusinga okugenda gye bali mu mbaga, kubanga eno nkomerero ya bonna; omulamu ekyo akirowoolereze mu mutima." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Ennaku zisinga enseko, kubanga omutima gusanyusibwa ennaku ku maaso." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Omutima gw'abagezi guba mu nnyumba ya kukungubaga, naye omutima gw'abasiru, mu nnyumba ya ssanyu." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Ekisinga obulungi kuwuliriza okukomako kw'omugezi, okusinga okuwulira ennyimba z'abasiru." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ng'okutuliikirira kw'amaggwa agaaka wansi w'entamu, n'enseko z'omusiru bwe ziba; na kino nakyo temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Okutulugunya omugezi kumufuula musiru, n'enguzi eyonoona omutima." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Enkomerero y'omulimu nnungi okukira amasooka gaagwo, obugumiikiriza bulungi okukira okwewanika." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Togugumukanga mangu mu mwoyo, kubanga omusiru obusungu bumusula ku kifuba." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Togambanga nti: “Lwaki emirembe egy'edda gyali mirungi okusinga egya leero?” kubanga ekyo okukibuuza tekiva mu magezi. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Amagezi n'obusika birungi; bigasa abalaba enjuba. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ng'amagezi bwe gataasa, ne ssente bw'etaasa, naye amagoba agali mu kumanya ge gano: nti amagezi, agalina, gamuwa obulamu." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Wekkaanye emirimu gya Katonda; ani asobola okugolola ye kye yakola nga kyewese? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Mu biseera ebirungi beera musanyufu, ate mu lunaku olubi wekkaanye: Katonda y'akola luno na luli, omuntu aleme kuzuula na kimu ku birimuddirira." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Mu bulamu bwange buno omutali mugaso, byonna nabiraba: omutuukirivu azikiririra mu butuukirivu bwe, n'omubi awangaalira mu bugwenyufu bwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Leka kuyitiriza mu kubeera mutuukirivu, oba omugezi okusukkiriza. Lwaki wetta wekka?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Toyitiriza kubeera mubi, era toba musiru; lwaki ofa ng'akaseera ko tekannatuuka?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kirungi okunyweza ekimu, ate n'ekirala n'otokiggyako mukono, kubanga atya Katonda mu byombi yeekuuma." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Amagezi gagumya omugezi okusinga ekkumi abafuga ekibuga. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Mpaawo muntu mutuukirivu mu nsi akola kirungi n'atakola kibi. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Tossa mutima gwo ku buli kyogerwa, sikulwa ng'owulira omuweereza wo ng'akuvumirira." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Kubanga naawe muli omanyi nti mirundi mingi naawe ovumirira abalala. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Bino byonna nabigeza mu magezi, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nzija kufuuka mugezi,” naye byandi wala." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ekyaliwo kiri wala, wansi ekkuzimu; ani anaakizuula?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Omutima gwange naguzza ku kuyiga, okwekenneenya n'okunoonya amagezi n'obutetenkanya, n'okutegeera obusiru obuli mu kukola obubi, n'obulalulalu obuli mu butamanya." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nasanga ng'omukazi oyo akaawa okusinga olumbe, omutima gwe nga mutego na kitimba, n'emikono gye nga masamba. Asanyusa Katonda amusumattuka, naye omwonoonyi amukwasa." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Koweleti agamba nti: “Kino kye nazuula: nga ngatta kimu ku kimu ndyoke ntuuke ku ntetenkanya y'ebintu," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 bye nkyanoonya, naye bye sinnasanga. Omusajja omulungi mu lukumi namusanga, naye omukazi omulungi okusinga abalala sinnamusanga." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Kino kyokka kye nasanga: Katonda omuntu yamukola mutuufu, naye abantu beetadde mu butetenkanya bungi.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Aluwa ali ng'omugezi? Y'ani amanyi okunnyonnyola ebintu? Amagezi g'omuntu gacamula amaaso ge, ne gakkakkanya okwetippa kw'entunula ye." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kwata ebiragiro bya kabaka, olw'okubeera bye weeyama eri Katonda," 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Toyanguwanga kuva mu maaso ge, era tolemeranga mu nsonga nkyamu, kubanga kyonna ky'aliba ayagadde alikikola;" 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kubanga ekigambo kye kirina obuyinza, era mpaawo asobola kumugamba nti: “Kiki ekyo ky'okola?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Akwata ekiragiro kye, talibaako kabi kamutuukako; omutima omugezi gutegeera obudde obutuufu n'entambula y'ebintu." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Buli kintu kirina obudde bwakyo n'engeri zaakyo, newandibadde ng'ennaku y'omuntu emuzitoowerera." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Engeri omuntu gy'atamanyi biri mu maaso, ani ayinza okumubuulira ebirijja?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Teri muntu alina buyinza ku mukka gwa bulamu na kugutangira, yadde okubeera n'obuyinza ku lunaku olw'okufa kwe; era nga mu lutalo bwe wataba kuddirizaamu, n'obugwenyufu bwe butagenda kuta abo ababwewadde." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Bino byonna nabiraba bwe nekkaanya ebikolwa byonna ebikolebwa wansi w'enjuba, mu budde omuntu mw'afugira omuntu okumulabya ennaku." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Era nalaba ababi nga baziikiddwa; baateranga okuyingira n'okufuluma mu kifo ekitukuvu, ne batenderezebwa mu kibuga olw'ebyo bye baakolanga. Ne mu kino temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ebikolwa ebibi bwe bitalamulibwa mangu, emitima gy'abaana b'abantu gijjula ebirowoozo by'okukola obubi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Newandibadde omwonoonyi akola ekibi emirundi kikumi, era ne yeeyongera okuwangaala, naye mmanyi nti abatya Katonda biribagendera bulungi, abo abamussaamu ekitiibwa mu maaso ge." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Kubanga omubi tatya Katonda, tebirimugendera bulungi, n'ennaku ze teziriwanvuuyirira nga kisiikirize." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Waliwo ekitaliimu ekigwawo ku nsi: abatuukirivu abagwirwa ekyandigwiridde ababi, n'ababi abafuna ekyandifuniddwa abatuukirivu. Na kino nakyo ŋŋamba nti temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kyenva mpagira eky'okusanyuka, kubanga omuntu talina kirungi wansi w'enjuba, mpozzi okulya, okunywa n'okwesanyusa; anti kino ky'anaggya mu kutegana kwe mu bbanga ery'obulamu bwe Katonda lye yamuwa wansi w'enjuba." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Bwe nassaako omwoyo njige amagezi, ntegeere n'okufaabiina kw'omuntu mu nsi, anti emisana n'ekiro amaaso go tegalaba tulo," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ne ndaba byonna Katonda bye yakola. Teri asobola kutegeera bikolebwa wansi w'enjuba. Omuntu ne bw'alitegana atya okubyefumiitiriza, talibitegeera. Omugezi ne bw'alyetenda okubimanya, talibiggukamu." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Byonna bino nabikubaganyaako mu mutima gwange, ne ntegeera nti abatuukirivu, abagezi n'emirimu gyabwe biri mu mikono gya Katonda. Naye omuntu tamanyidde ddala oba kwagala oba bukyayi; byonna mu maaso gaabwe temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Bonna enkomerero ye emu: omutuukirivu n'omubi, omulungi n'omubi, omulongoofu n'atali mulongoofu, atambira ebitambiro n'atatambira; nga bwe kiri ku mulungi, bwe kiri ne ku mubi; nga bwe kiri ku alayira, bwe kiri ne ku atalayira." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Kino kye kibi mu byonna ebiri wansi w'enjuba: okulaba nga bonna ekibalindiridde kye kimu; emitima gy'abaana b'abantu gijjudde bwonoonefu, ne mu mitima gyabwe mulimu obulalulalu ebbanga lyonna nga balamu, ate oluvannyuma ne beegatta ku baafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Oli akyali n'abalamu akyalina essuubi; anti embwa ennamu nnungi okukira empologoma enfu. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Kubanga abalamu bamanyi nti ba kufa, naye abafu tebalina kirala kye bamanyi; tebakyalinayo na mpeera ndala, kubanga n'eby'okubajjukira byaggwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Okwagala kwabwe, obukyayi n'obuggya bwabwe byonna byabulawo dda; tebikyalina na mugabo mu ebyo ebikolebwa wansi w'enjuba." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Genda weriire emmere yo mu ssanyu, wenywere n'omwenge gwo n'omutima omusanyufu, kubanga Katonda yasanyukira dda by'okola." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Obudde bwonna ebyambalo byo bibeere nga byeru, n'omuzigo guleme kuggwa ku mutwe gwo." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Weeyagale n'omukazi gw'oyagala, ennaku zo zonna ez'obulamu buno omutali kantu obwakuweebwa wansi w'enjuba, obudde bwonna omutava kaganyula. Anti ekyo gwe mugabo gwo mu bulamu bwo ne mu kutegana kw'oteganamu wansi w'enjuba." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kyonna omukono gwo kye gugwikiriza okukola, kikole n'amaanyi go gonna, kubanga mu magombe gy'ogenda teriba kukola, kutetenkanya, yadde okuyiga oba amagezi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Nalaba ekirala wansi w'enjuba: embiro teziwangulibwa asinga kuwenyuka, newandibadde olutalo, asinga buzira; n'emmere tejjira bagezi, wadde obugagga abategeevu, oba obuganzi abayivu, wabula buli omu asanga akadde n'akakisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ate era omuntu tamanyi nkomerero ye; wabula ng'ebyennyanja ekiragala ekibi bwe kibikwata, nga n'ennyonyi bwe zikwatibwa ekitimba, n'abantu bwe bategwa batyo obudde obubi obubazinduukiriza." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Era nalaba ekintu eky'amagezi wansi w'enjuba kye nasanga nga kikulu: 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Waaliwo ekibuga ekitono, nga mulimu abantu batono, kabaka ow'amaanyi n'akirumba, n'akitaayiza, n'akituumako embibiro ennene okukyetoolooza." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kati nno mu kibuga ekyo mwalimu omusajja omunaku, naye nga mugezi, eyawonya ekibuga n'amagezi ge. Naye tewali akyajjukira musajja oyo omunaku." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Amagezi malungi okusinga amaanyi, newandibadde ng'amagezi g'omunaku gagayibwa n'ebigambo bye tebiwulirwa.”" 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ebigambo by'abagezi ebikkakkamu biwulirwa okusinga okuleekaana kw'afuga mu basiru. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Amagezi malungi okusinga ebissi eby'omu ntalo, naye omwonoonyi omu afiiriza ebirungi nfaafa." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ensowera enfu ereetera omuzigo okucuuma, n'obutamanya obutono buti buzitowa okusinga amagezi n'ekitiibwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Omutima gw'omugezi gumuwunzikira ku ddyo, naye omutima gw'omusiru gumuwunzikira ku kkono." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Omusiru bw'atambula mu kkubo tabaamu ka buntu, yeeraga bonna bw'ali omusiru." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Obusungu bw'omufuzi bwe bukuyimukirangamu, tovanga mu kifo kyo; obuteefu bukkakkanya ensobi ennene." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Waliwo ekibi ekirala kye nalaba wansi w'enjuba, ensobi etera okugwibwamu abalina obuyinza." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Abasiru bassibwa mu bifo ebya waggulu, ate abagagga ne bassibwa mu bya wansi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nalaba abaddu nga beebagadde ku mbalaasi, bo abakungu nga batambulira ku ttaka ng'abaddu." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Asima obunnya, alibugwamu, n'oli ayiwa ekisenge, omusota gulimubojja." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ayasa amayinja galimuteekako obuvune n'ayasa enku zandimutuusaako akabi. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Embazzi bw'ekoŋŋontera ng'obwogi tebukyasala, omulimu gweyongera, naye obukugu buleeta magoba." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Omusota bwe gubojja nga tegunagulikibwa, omugulisi taggyamu magoba." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Ebigambo by'akamwa k'omugezi bimureetera obuganzi, naye emimwa gy'omusiru gimwettira." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Mu kusooka, ebigambo by'akamwa ke biba butamanya; mu kumaliriza, emimwa gye gyogera bugwagwa obw'ekiralulalu;" 
Ecclesiastes10:14 ye omusiru akanya bigambo. Teri amanyi kirijja, ani asobola okutegeeza omuntu ekirimuddirira?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Okutegana kw'omusiru kumukooya, atamanyi na kkubo limutuusa ku kibuga." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Zikusanze ggwe ensi erina kabaka akyali omulenzi, erina n'abakungu abakeera okulya." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Weesiimye, ggwe ensi erina kabaka ow'olulyo olulangira, erina abakungu abalya mu budde obw'okulya, lwa kwezzaamu ndasi naye si lwa ttamiiro." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Olw'obunafu obusolya bukka; olw'obugayaavu bw'emikono ennyumba etonnya. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Embaga zikolebwa kuwa ku nseko, n'omwenge gucamula obulamu, naye ssente y'efuga byonna." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Tovumiriranga kabaka, yadde mu birowoozo byo, tovumiriranga mugagga, yadde eyo mu kisenge kyo; kubanga ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga byanditwala ebigambo byo, ekirina ebiwaawatiro ky'andiroopa by'oyogedde." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Omugaati gwo gukasuke ku mazzi, kubanga nga wayise ennaku nnyingi oligusanga nate." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ekitundu kigabire omusanvu oba omunaana, kubanga tomanyi kabi kaligwa mu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ebire bwe bijjula amazzi, biyiwa enkuba ku nsi; omuti bwe gugwira emaserengeta oba emambuka we gugudde, we gusigala." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Eyekkaanya empewo, tasiga, n'eyeetegereza ebire, talikungula." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nga bw'otomanyi mpewo bw'efuuwa, n'engeri omuntu gy'akula mu lubuto, bw'otyo era bw'otomanyi mirimu gya Katonda, eyakola buli kintu." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Ku nkya siga ensigo zo, n'akawungeezi toleka mikono gyo kulagaya, kubanga tomanyi kiriraka, kino oba kiri; obanga byombi birivaamu bulungi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Ekitangaala kiwoomerera, n'okulaba enjuba kisanyusa amaaso." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Gyonna emyaka omuntu gy'aliba awangadde, kirungi agyeyagaliremu gyonna. Naye kisaanye ajjukire obudde obwa kazigizigi, kubanga nabwo buliba bunene; buli kijja kyonna temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Kale mulenzi, sanyuka mu buto bwo, n'omutima gwo gusanyuse mu nnaku z'obuvubuka bwo. Tambula ng'omutima gwo bwe gukugamba n'amaaso go nga bwe gakulambika; kyokka manya nti Katonda alikulamula olwa bino byonna." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Omutima gwo guggyemu okweraliikirira n'omubiri gwo gugobeeko ebigulumya, kubanga obuvubuka n'obusuumufu temuli kantu." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Jjukira Omutonzi wo mu nnaku z'obuvubuka bwo, ng'ennaku ez'obuyinike tezinnajja, nga n'emyaka teginnatuuka w'oligambira nti: “Tebinsanyusa!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Ng'enjuba, ekitangaala, omwezi n'emmunyeenye tebinnazaama, n'ebire nga tebinadda oluvannyuma lw'enkuba;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 ku lunaku abakuumi b'ennyumba lwe balijugumira, n'abasajja abazira ne babenduka; abakazi abasa eŋŋano lwe balikoma okusa kubanga batono, n'abalabira mu bumooli ng'amaaso gabafumye;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 emiryango gy'amakubo lwe giriggalwa, n'eddoboozi ly'olubengo olusa eŋŋano nga ligwekeredde; abantu lwe balizuukuka ku kukaaba kw'ennyonyi, ne bawala b'oluyimba nga basirise;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 abantu lwe balitya obusozi, n'obubenje mu kkubo; emiti gy'endoozi nga gyanyizza, n'enzige nga zibwegedde, n'eppiripiri ng'atulise; olwo omuntu ng'agenda mu nnyumba ye ey'emirembe gyonna, abakungubazi nga beetala mu nguudo;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 ng'ekifundikwa ekya ffeeza tekinnakutulwa, n'ekibya ekya zaabu nga tekinnayasibwa, n'ensumbi nga tennayatikira mugga, ne nnamuziga nga tennamenyekera ku luzzi," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 n'enfuufu nga tennadda ku ttaka kwe yava, n'omwoyo nga tegunnadda eri Katonda eyaguwa." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Temuli kantu, temuli kantu, Koweleti bw'agamba, byonna temuli kantu!" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ng'oggyeeko eky'okubeera omugezi, Koweleti yayigiriza abantu okumanya; yatetenkanya ng'anoonyereza, n'atereeza engero nnyingi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Koweleti yanoonyereza okuzuula ebigambo ebisanyusa, n'awandiika ebigambo ebituufu eby'amazima." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ebigambo by'abagezi biba ng'ekikato, ne bye baayogera ebikuŋŋaanyiziddwa, ebyaweebwa omusumba omu, biri ng'enninga enkomerere." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Weegendereze, mwana wange, singa byongerwako; okuwandiika ebitabo ebingi si kwa kukoma, n'okunoonyereza okuyitiridde kukooya omubiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Emboozi k'ekome wano; byonna bimaze okuwulirwa. Tya Katonda, kwata ebiragiro bye, kubanga kino kya buli muntu." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Kubanga buli kikolwa Katonda alikiramula, nga mw'otwalidde n'ebyo ebikwekeddwa, bibeere birungi oba bibi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Oluyimba Ssemayimba olwa Solomoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Singa nno annywegedde n'okunywegera kw'akamwa ke! Kubanga okwagala kwo kulungi n'okusinga evviini. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Emizigo gyo nga gijjudde obuloosa! Erinnya lyo liri ng'omuzigo oguyiiyiddwa; abawalajjana kyebava bakwagala. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Nsika, nkugoberere, tudduke; kabaka annyingizza mu bisenge bye. Ka tusagambize, tusanyukire mu ggwe; tujja kugulumiza okwagala kwo okutusingira n'evviini; batuufu abo abakwagala." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ndi muddugavu, kyokka ndi mubalagavu, mmwe bawala ba Yeruzaalemu, nga weema z'e Kedari, ng'entimbe za Solomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Tontunuulira otyo olw'obuddugavu bwange, kubanga enjuba yanzirugaza. Batabani ba nnyabo bannyiigira, ne bampa gwa kukuuma mizabbibu, naye omuzabbibu ogwange nagugayaalirira." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndagirira, ayi omwoyo gwange gwe gwagala, gy'oliisiza endiga zo, ne gy'oziwummuliza mu ttuntu, nneme kutangatanga kumpi n'amagana ga mikwano gyo." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Oba tomanyi, ayi nalulungi mu bakazi, fuluma ogoberere ebisinde by'amagana, olundire obubuzi bwo obuluusi okumpi ne weema z'abalunzi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ayi kabiite wange, onfaananira embalaasi enkazi mu bigaali bya Faraawo," 
SongOfSongs1:10 Amatama go ganyume olw'empeta z'oku matu, n'ensingo yo olw'ebibira by'amayinja ag'omuwendo." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tunaakukolera empeta ez'oku matu eza zaabu, wamu n'enkwanzi eza ffeeza." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Kabaka bwe yali agalaamiridde ku mmeeza ye, kalifuuwa wange n'ata akawoowo ke." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Muganzi wange ambeerera ng'akasawo ka mirra akasula wakati w'amabeere gange. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Muganzi wange ambeerera ng'ekirimba kya kinna okuva mu mizabbibu gy'e Engedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ng'oli mulungi kabiite wange! Oli mulungi wamma! Amaaso go, jjiba." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Naawe muganzi wange, ng'oli mulungi! Mazima osikiriza. Ekitanda kyaffe kiringa akasaawe k'omuddo." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Emirabba gy'ennyumba yaffe gya ntolookyo, eŋŋanzikizo za sipulaasi." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Nze rooza ey'e Saroni, era eddanga ery'omu biwonvu." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ng'eddanga mu matovu, ne kabiite wange bw'ali mu bawalajjana." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ng'eppeera mu miti gy'omu kibira, ne muganzi wange bw'ali mu basajja banne. Ntudde mu kisiikirize kye nga ndi musanyufu; ekibala kye kiwoomera akamwa kange." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Annyingizza mu kisenge ky'embaga, okwagala ye bendera gy'ampaniseeko." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Munzizeemu otwanyi n'emizabbibu emiwotose; munvubirize n'amapeera, kubanga ndwadde okwagala." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Kkono we wansi w'omutwe gwange, ddyo we ampambaatidde." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Bawala ba Yeruzaalemu, mbalayiza n'ennangaazi n'obusirabo obw'ettale: temutaataaganya yadde okuzuukusa omwagalwa, okutuusa w'anaayagalira." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Mpulira eddoboozi ly'omwagalwa wange. Laba wuuyo ajja. Yeebuukiza ku nsozi, acoppacoppa ku busozi." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Omwagala ali ng'ennangaazi, oba akaweewo. Wuuyo, ayimiridde emabega w'ekisenge kyaffe, alengera mu madirisa, alingiriza mu bumooli." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Omwagala ayogera n'aŋŋamba nti: “Situka, muganzi wange, omulungi wange ojje." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Laba, obw'empewo buyise, enkuba ekedde, egenze." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ebimuli birabise ku nsi, obudde obw'okuyimba butuuse; eddoboozi ly'ejjiba liwulikise mu nsi yaffe." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Emikunyu gitaddeko entontogolo ezisooka, n'emizabbibu egimulisa gitadde akawoowo kaagyo. Situka, ojje, omwagalwa; mulungi wange, gira ojje.”" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Ejjiba lyange, mu mpampagama z'enjazi, mu mikwesese gy'omu nsozi, njoleka amaaso go; leka mpulire ku ddoboozi lyo; kubanga eddoboozi lyo ppoomerevu n'amaaso go mabalagavu." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mutukwatire ebibe, ebibe ebito ebyonoona emizabbibu, kubanga emizabbibu gyaffe gimulisa." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Omwagalwa wange, nange ndi wuwe; alundira amagana ge mu malanga." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Okutuusa ng'olunaku lweyezeewo, n'ebisiikirize nga bibuzeewo, komawo, omwagalwa; faanana ng'ennangaazi, oba akaweewo ku nsozi za Beteri." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ekiro kyonna mu kitanda kyange; nanoonya oyo omutima gwange gwe gwagala, namunoonya naye samuzuula." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Nzija kusituka neetooloole ekibuga mu nguudo ne mu mbuga zaakyo; nzija kunoonya oyo omutima gwange gwe gwagala. Namunoonya naye samuzuula 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abakuumi bansanga nga balawuna mu kibuga. “Mwandabidde ku oyo omutima gwange gwe gwagala?” 
SongOfSongs3:4 Nali naakabayisa nti: ne nzuula omutima gwange gwe gwagala. Namunyweza, saamuta kugenda, okutuusa lwe namuyingiza mu nnyumba ya nnyabo, mu maka g'oyo eyanfuna mu lubuto." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Bawala ba Yeruzaalemu, mbalayiza n'ennangaazi n'obusirabo obw'ettale: temutaataaganya yadde okuzuukusa omwagalwa, okutuusa w'anaayagalira." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Kiki ekyo eri mu ddungu ekyambuka, kiri ng'empagi y'omukka, ekubiddwa akawoowo ka mirra n'obubaani, n'effufugge ly'abatunzi erya buli kika kya kaloosa?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Entebe ya Solomoni yiiyo; ewerekerwako abasajja abatabaazi nkaaga, okuva mu bazira ba Yisirayeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Bonna bambadde ebitala; bonna bakugu mu kutabaala, buli omu n'ekitala ku lukugunyu beetegekedde ebyekango by'ekiro." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Kabaka Solomoni yeekolera akadyeri, yakakola mu miti gy'e Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Empagi zaako yakola za ffeeza, manvuuli yaako ya zaabu, entebe yaako ya biwempe bya kakobe; munda mwaliriddwa bawala ba Yeruzaalemu n'omutima ogwagala." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Mufulume bawala ba Siyoni, mulabe kabaka Solomoni ayambadde engule, eyo nnyina gye yamutikkira ku lunaku lw'embaga ye, ku lunaku lw'essanyu ly'omutima gwe." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ng'oli mulungi, kabiite wange! Oli mulungi wamma! amaaso go mu katimba ko, jjiba. Enviiri zo ziri ng'eggana ly'embuzi nga zikkirira olusozi lwa Gileyaadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amannyo go gali ng'eggana ly'endiga ezaakamwebwa, nga zambuka okuva okunaaba; buli emu ezaala nnongo, mu zo temuli efiisa mwana." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Emimwa gyo giri ng'enfuvu entwakaavu, n'akamwa ko kawoomerevu; amatama go mu katimba ko gali ng'ebiwayi by'ekkomamawanga." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ensingo yo, eri ng'omunaala gwa Dawudi, ogwazimbibwa n'embu z'amayinja, engabo lukumi ziwanikiddwa omwo, zonna engabo z'abazira." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabeere go abiri gali ng'obuweewo obubiri, ng'obwana bw'ennangaazi obulongo, obuliira mu malanga." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Okutuusa ng'olunaku lweyezeewo, n'ebisiikirize nga bibuzeewo, nzija kugenda ku lusozi lwa mirra eri akasozi k'obubaani." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Wenna oli mulungi, mukwano gwange; ku ggwe tekuli bbala." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Leka Lebanoni, tugende, mugole wange, leka Lebanoni tugende. Kkirira okuva ku katemyo ka Amana, ku ntikko ya Seniri ne Kerumoni, okuva mu nfo z'empologoma, okuva mu nsozi z'engo." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Omutima gwange ogunyaze, mwannyinaze, mugole wange; omutima gwange ogunyaze n'eriiso ly'onsuulizza olumu luti, n'ekkula eriri ku lutembe lwo." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Ng'okwagala kwo kusanyusa, mwannyinaze, omugole wange; ng'okwagala kwo kulungi n'okukira evviini, n'akawoowo ka kalifuuwa wo nga kakira wala byonna ebyakaloosa." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Emimwa gyo, mugole wange, gitonnyolokoka mubisi gwa njuki; omubisi gw'enjuki n'amata biri wansi w'olulimi lwo. Akawoowo k'ebyambalo byo kali ng'akawoowo ka Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mwannyinaze, mugole wange, oli nnimiro nsibeko olukomera, oluzzi olukomere, ensulo enzimbire." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Emiti gyo kalimiro k'amakomamawanga, n'ebibala amakula; kinna ne narudo;" 
SongOfSongs4:14 narudo n'amalanga, ebisenke ne budalasiini, n'emiti gyonna egy'obubaani, ko mirra n'ebigaji, na buli kya kawoowo kyonna." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Oli nsulo mu nnimiro, luzzi lwa mazzi amalamu, emyala egikulukuta okuva ku Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Situka, ggwe empewo y'emambuka; jjangu, ggwe empewo y'emaserengeta, fuuwa ku nnimiro yange, akawoowo kaayo kasaasaane mu nsi. Muganzi wange ajje mu nnimiro ye alye ku bibala byayo amakula." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Nzize mu nnimiro yange, mwannyinaze, omugole wange, nkungudde mirra yange n'obuwoowo bwange; ndidde ekisassalala n'omubisi; nywedde evviini n'amata gange. Mulye, mikwano, munywe; munywe mwekkye, mmwe abaagalana." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Neebaka, naye omutima gwange nga gutunula. Wulira muganzi wange akonkona: “Nzigulirawo, mwannyinaze, muganzi wange, ejjiba lyange, omulungi ggero. Omutwe gwange gujjudde omusulo, n'emivumbo gy'enviiri zange, ssuulwe w'ekiro.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Neeyambudde dda omunagiro gwange, ate nziremu nnyambale? Nanaabye dda ebigere byange, ate nziremu mbiddugaze?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Muganzi wange yayisa omukono mu kituli ky'omunyolo, n'ankubaganya amameeme." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ne nsituka nzigulirewo muganzi wange; emikono gyange ne gitonnyolokosa mirra n'engalo ne zikulukusa mirra ku musa gw'omunyolo. 
SongOfSongs5:6 Naggulirawo muganzi wange, naye muganzi wange yali agenze ng'abuzeewo. Omutima ne gunzirika, kubanga yali agenze. Nanoonya, naye saamuzuula, Nakowoola, naye teyannyanukula." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abakuumi bansanga nga balawuna mu kibuga; bankuba ne bampulubaza, ne bantwalako omunagiro gwange, abakuumi ba bbugwe abo." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ayi bawala ba Yeruzaalemu, mbalayiza, bwe muzuula muganzi wange, munaamugamba ki? Mumugambe nti: “Ndwadde okwagala.”" 
SongOfSongs5:9 Omwagalwa wo asinza ki abaagalwa abalala, ayi gwe nalulungi mu bakazi bonna? Omwagalwa wo asinza ki abaagalwa abalala, olyoke otulayize bw'otyo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Muganzi wange atemagana ate mumyufu, asooloobye ku nkumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Omutwe gwe, zaabu omukuŋŋunte okuzaama, emivumbo gy'enviiri ze gya mayengo, middugavu nga nnamuŋŋoona." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaaso ge gali ng'amayiba ku mwala gw'amazzi, aganaaziddwa n'amata, masengeke ng'amayinja ag'omuwendo." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Amatama ge gali ng'akalimiro k'ebyakaloosa, akawunya akawoowo. Emimwa gye, malanga, gitonnyolokoka mirra." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Emikono gye giri nga zaabu omukulungule, omusengekeddwa amayinja g'e Tarusisi. Olubuto lwe lwakolebwa mu ssanga okubikkiddwa n'obuyinja bwa saffiro." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amagulu ge, mpagi za maabo, ensimbe mu ntobo eza zaabu omukuŋŋunte. Endabika ye eri nga Lebanoni, mulondobe ng'entolookyo." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Akamwa ke kawoomerevu, yenna mulungi ggero. Bw'atyo bw'ali muganzi wange, ye oyo mukwano gwange, mmwe bawala ba Yeruzaalemu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Muganzi wo agenze wa, ayi nalulungi mu bakazi bonna? Muganzi wo yakutte liri wa, tumukunoonyezeeko?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Muganzi wange akkiridde mu nnimiro ye, mu kalimiro k'ebyakaloosa, alundire mu nnimiro, akuŋŋaanye amalanga." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Muganzi wange ndi wuwe, naye wange, oyo alundira mu malanga." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Oli mubalagavu, kabiite wange, oli nga Tiruza, oli mulungi nga Yeruzaalemu, otiisa ng'eggye eritaze." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Nzigyako amaaso go, kubanga gantengeza. Enviiri zo ziri ng'eggana ly'embuzi nga zikkirira okuva e Gileyaadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amannyo go gali ng'eggana ly'endiga nga zambuka okuva okunaaba, buli emu ezaala nnongo, mu zo temuli efiisa mwana." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Amatama go mu katimba, gali ng'ebiwayi by'ekkomamawanga." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Bakaakabaka bandiba nkaaga, abasebeyi kinaana, n'abawala embeerera sibabalika," 
SongOfSongs6:9 naye ejjiba lyange, omulungi ggero, teri amufaanana; omwana omu yekka owa nnyina, omuganzi ew'oyo eyamuzaala. Abawala baamulaba ne bamutenda omukisa; bakaakabaka n'abasebeyi ne bamutendereza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ani ono avaayo nga mmambya, omubalagavu ng'omwezi atangalijja ng'enjuba atiisa ng'eggye eritaze?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Naserengeta mu nnimiro y'ebinyeebwa, ndabe ebibaze mu biwonvu, ndabe oba emizabbibu gitojjedde, n'amakomamawanga nga gamulisizza." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Nali sinnekkaanya, ebirowoozo byange ne binsikambulayo, ne binteeka mu bigaali by'abantu bange." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Komawo, komawo, ayi muwala w'e Sulammi; komawo, komawo, tukutunuulire. Lwaki mutunuulira omuwala w'e Sulammi, ng'azina wakati w'ennyiriri ebbiri ez'abayimbi?" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ebigere byo nga biwoomera mu ngatto, ayi muwala w'omukungu! Ebiseera ku kisambi kyo biri ng'amagemu, agaakolebwa omuweesi omukugu." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Ekkundi lyo liri ng'olutiba olwawundibwa obulungi, omutabula vviini ntabule. Olubuto lwo luli ng'entuumu y'eŋŋano ebugiriziddwa ebimuli by'amalanga." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Amabeere go abiri gali ng'obuweewo obubiri, ng'obwana bw'ennangaazi obulongo." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ensingo yo eri ng'omunaala ogw'essanga; amaaso go gali ng'ebidiba by'e Kesuboni ku mulyango Baati-Rabbimu. Ennyindo yo eri ng'omunaala gwa Lebanoni ogutunuulidde Damasiko. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Omutwe gwo gukutereddeko nga Karumeli, n'enviiri z'omutwe gwo za kakobe omukwafu; emivumbo gyagyo gisikiriza kabaka." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ng'oli mulungi, ng'osanyusa, ayi omwagalwa, essanyu lyange!" 
SongOfSongs7:8 Oli musoobolokofu ng'olukindu; amabeere go gali ng'ebirimba byakwo. 
SongOfSongs7:9 Nagamba nti: “Nzija kuwalampa olukindu, nkwate ku mpirivuma zaalwo.” Amabeere go gabeere ng'ebirimba by'emizabbibu, n'akawoowo k'omukka gwo, ng'amapeera, n'akamwako, ng'evviini ennungi obulala." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Evviini ekkirire eri omwagalwa wange; ekkirire mpola mu mimwa ne ku mannyo. 
SongOfSongs7:11 Kati muganzi wange, ndi wuwe, nze gw'ayaayaanira." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Jjangu, muganzi wange, tulage mu nnimiro, tusule mu byalo." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ku makya tukeere mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu, tulabe oba emizabbibu gitojjedde, oba ebimuli byagyo bisansudde, oba amakomamawanga gamulisizza; eyo gye nnaakuweera okwagala kwange." 
SongOfSongs7:14 Nakati avaako akawoowo; ebibala byonna ebirungi biri ku miryango gyaffe, ebiggya n'ebikadde, bye nakuterekera, ayi muganzi wange." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Singa nno wali mwannyinaze, eyayonka amabeere ga nnyabo. Bwe nandikusanze wabweru nandikunywegedde nga tewali n'omu ansunga." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nandikukutte ne nkutwala mu nnyumba ya nnyabo; eyo eyanjigiriza. Nandikuwadde evviini ey'akawoowo onywe, omubisi gw'amakomamawanga gange." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Kkono we wansi w'omutwe gwange, ddyo we ampambaatidde." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Bawala ba Yeruzaalemu, mbalayiza: temutaataaganya yadde okuzuukusa omwagalwa, okutuusa w'anaayagalira." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ani oyo ayambuka ng'ava mu ddungu nga yeesigamye muganzi we? Wansi w'omupeera we nakusisimulira; awo nnyoko we yakufunira munda, awo eyakuzaala we yalumirwa olubuto lwo." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Nnyambala ng'akabonero ku mutima gwo, ng'akabonero ku mukono gwo; kubanga okwagala kwa maanyi ng'olumbe; obuggya tebuddirira okufaanana amagombe. Okwaka kwakwo, kwaka kwa muliro, kwaka kwa muliro ogubengeya." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amazzi amangi tegalizikiza kwagala n'emigga tegirikubuutikira; omuntu ne bw'aliwaayo byonna by'alina awaka, afune okwagala, alinyoomebwa bunyoomwebwa." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tulina mwannyinaffe omuto, tannasuna mabeere. Kiki kye tunaakolera mwannyinaffe lw'aliba atuuse okwogerezebwa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Bw'aba kisenge, tujja kukizimbako eminaala egya ffeeza; bw'aba omulyango, tujja kuguwagika n'embaawo ez'entolookyo." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndi kisenge amabeere gange gali nga minaala; bwe ntyo bwe nfuuse mu maaso ge, ndi ng'aleeta emirembe." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomoni yalina ennimiro mu Baali-Amoni; yagikwasa abakuumi: buli omu aleete sekeli za ffeeza lukumi olw'ebibala byamu. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Ennnimiro yange ey'emizabbibu yange ku bwange; sekeli lukumi ziizo, Solomoni, n'ebikumi bibiri ez'abakuuma ebibala byamu." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Ayi asula mu nnimiro, bannange bakutegereza; leka mpulire ku ddoboozi lyo." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Muganzi wange, dduka; faanana ng'ennangaazi, oba ng'akaweewo akato, ku nsozi ezijjudde obuwoowo." 
Isaiah1:1 Okulabikirwa kwa Yisaaya, mutabani wa Amozi, ku Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu, mu budde bwa Wuzziya, Yotamu ne Kezekiya, bakabaka ba Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Ggwe ggulu, wulira! Ggwe nsi, tega okutu! kubanga Omukama agambye nti: “Nayola abaana ne mbakuza, naye banjeemedde." 
Isaiah1:3 Ente etegeera nnyiniyo, n'endogoyi emmanvu ya mukama waayo, naye Yisirayeli tamanyi; abantu bange tebaategeera kantu.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Mmwe eggwanga eryonoonyi, abantu abeebinise emisango, ezzadde ly'abakozi b'ebibi, abaana ababi. Baabulidde Omukama; banyoomye Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, bamukubye amabega." 
Isaiah1:5 Lwaki mwandyongedde okukubibwa, kubanga mulemedde mu bujeemu? Omutwe gwo gwonna biwundu, n'omutima muyongobevu;" 
Isaiah1:6 okuva mu mala g'ebigere okutuuka mu kawompo, tewali walamu; wabula ebiwundu, ebinuubule, n'amabwa amaggya; si binyige, si bisibeko ddagala, si biweweeze na kazigo." 
Isaiah1:7 Ensi yammwe matongo, ebibuga byammwe byokeddwa; ensi yammwe abagwira bagirya mulaba, erekeddwa busa ng'omulabe gy'azikirizza." 
Isaiah1:8 Muwala wa Siyoni asigadde awo ng'ekittuluze mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu, ng'akasiisira k'omukuumi mu nnimiro ya wujju, ng'ekibuga ekizingiziddwa." 
Isaiah1:9 Singa Omukama w'Amagye teyatulekerawo baawonawo, twandibadde nga Sodoma, twandifuuse nga Gomorra." 
Isaiah1:10 Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama, mmwe abafuzi ba Sodoma; mutegereze etteeka lya Katonda waffe, mmwe abantu b'e Gomorra:" 
Isaiah1:11 “Enkumuliitu y'ebitambiro byammwe bye biki ku nze?” Omukama bw'agamba. “Ebitambiro byammwe ebyokye nfunye ebimmala, eby'endiga n'ensolo ensava; omusaayi gw'ente, ogw'endiga n'ogw'embuzi ennume tebikyansanyusa." 
Isaiah1:12 Bwe mujja okulabika mu maaso gange, ani yabibasaba, okujja okulinnyirira empya zange?" 
Isaiah1:13 Mukome okwo okuleeta ebitone byammwe omutali nsa. Obubaani bwammwe mbwenyinyala. Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, Sabbaato n'enkuŋŋaana zammwe; sisobola kugumiikiriza lukuŋŋaana lukulu lugattise bwonoonyi." 
Isaiah1:14 Embaga zammwe enkulu ez'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi n'endala eziragiddwa omwoyo gwange gwazikyayira ddala, zinfuukidde omugugu, nkooye okuzeetikka." 
Isaiah1:15 Bwe munaagololeranga gye ndi emikono gyammwe, njanga kuggyawo amaaso; ne bwe munaasabanga ebingi, sijjanga kuwuliriza; emikono gyammwe gijjudde omusaayi." 
Isaiah1:16 Munaabe, mwerongoose, muggye obugwenyufu bwammwe mu maaso gange; mulekere awo okukola ebibi;" 
Isaiah1:17 muyige okukola obulungi; munoonye obutuufu, muyambe anyigiriziddwa; mutaase bamulekwa, musale ensonga za bannamwandu." 
Isaiah1:18 “Kale nno mujje tuteese,” Omukama bw'agamba, “Newandibadde ng'ebibi byammwe bitwakaavu, bijja kweruka ng'omuzira; ne bwe binaaba bimyufu ng'omusaayi, bijja kufuuka ng'ebyoya by'endiga." 
Isaiah1:19 Singa munakkiriza ne mugonda, mulirya ku birungi by'ensi;" 
Isaiah1:20 naye bwe munaawaganyala ne mujeema, ekitala kijja kubawemmenta; kubanga akamwa k'Omukama koogedde.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Laba ekibuga ekyesigwa bwe kifuuse malaaya! Edda kyali kijjudde obutuukirivu, obutuukirivu nga busula mu kyo, kati kijjudde batemu." 
Isaiah1:22 Ffeeza wo afuuse masengere, evviini yo esaabulukuse amazzi." 
Isaiah1:23 Abakungu bo bafuuse bajeemu, bafuuse mikwano gya babbi; bonna balulunkanira nguzi, banoonya kusasulibwa; tebataasa bamulekwa, n'ensonga za nnamwandu tezibatuuka." 
Isaiah1:24 Awo nno, Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, Omuyinza wa Yisirayeli, agamba nti: “Nzija kwemala eggoga ku balabe bange, ekiruyi nzija kukimalira ku bankyaye;" 
Isaiah1:25 Nzija kukulwanyisa n'omukono gwange, nzija kukusaanuusaako amasengere, nkutukuzeeko ekko lyonna." 
Isaiah1:26 Abalamuzi bo nzija kubazzaawo nga bwe gwali mu kusooka, n'ababuulirizi bo nga bwe gwali luli. Olwo ojja kuyitibwa Kibuga ky'Obutuukirivu, Kibuga Ekyesigwa." 
Isaiah1:27 Siyoni alinunulibwa butuukirivu, era n'abo mu kyo abaliba beenenyezza balinunulibwa obutuukirivu." 
Isaiah1:28 Naye abajeemu n'aboonoonyi balizikirizibwa wamu, n'abo abesammula Omukama balisaanawo." 
Isaiah1:29 Mazima mulikwatibwa ensonyi olw'emivule gyammwe gye mweyagalirangamu; era muliswala olw'ennimiro ze mweroboza. 
Isaiah1:30 Kubanga muliba ng'emivule egiwotose ebikoola, era ng'akalimiro omutali mazzi." 
Isaiah1:31 Omuntu ow'amaanyi alifuuka ng'enfuuzi, by'akola biriba ng'olusasi lw'omuliro, byonna biryakira wamu, ate tewaliba abizikiriza.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Bino Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi bye yalaba ku Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu: 
Isaiah2:2 Gye bujja, olusozi lw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama lulissibwawo nga lutikko mu nsozi, lulisukkulumizibwa ku busozi, amawanga gonna galikuluggukira gye luli." 
Isaiah2:3 Abantu bangi balijja, ne bagamba nti: “Mujje twambuke ku lusozi lw'Omukama, eri Ekiggwa kya Katonda wa Yakobo, atuyigirize amakubo ge, tutambulire mu bukubo bwe.” Kubanga etteeka liriva mu Siyoni, n'ekigambo ky'Omukama kiriva mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Isaiah2:4 Aliramula wakati w'amawanga, alisalirawo abantu bangi; ebitala byabwe balibiweesaamu enkumbi, n'amafumu gaabwe baligaweesaamu ebiwabyo. Eggwanga teririgalulira ggwanga linnaalyo kitala, era tebaliddayo kuyiga bya ntalo." 
Isaiah2:5 Ggwe nnyumba ya Yakobo, jjangu, gira tutambulire mu kitangaala ky'Omukama." 
Isaiah2:6 Oyabulidde abantu bo, ennyumba ya Yakobo, kubanga ensi ejjudde abalaguzi abava e Buvanjuba, n'abakola eby'endagu nga Abafilisitiini; bakwatagana mu ngalo n'abagwira." 
Isaiah2:7 Ensi yaabwe ejjudde ffeeza ne zaabu; obugagga bwabwe tebuliiko kkomo. Ensi yaabwe ejjudde embalaasi, ebigaali byabwe tebiriiko kkomo." 
Isaiah2:8 Ensi yaabwe ejjudde ebifaananyi bya balubaale; bavunnamira bo bennyini bye bakoze n'emikono gyabwe. 
Isaiah2:9 Omuntu atoowaziddwa, afeebezeddwa; tobasonyiwa." 
Isaiah2:10 Yingira mu lwazi, weekukume mu nfuufu, weekweke entiisa y'Omukama n'ekitiibwa ky'obukulu bwe." 
Isaiah2:11 Amaaso g'omuntu ow'olunkulu galissibwa wansi, n'okwekuza kw'omuntu kulitoowazibwa, ku olwo Omukama yekka y'aligulumizibwa." 
Isaiah2:12 Omukama w'Amagye ategekedde olunaku lwe buli yenna ayeekuluntaza na buli yenna ayeekuza; balitoowazibwa," 
Isaiah2:13 buli ntolookyo zonna ez'omu Lebanoni empanvu, ennangaavu, n'emivule gyonna egy'omu Basani," 
Isaiah2:14 ensozi entumbiivu n'obusozi obuwanvu," 
Isaiah2:15 buli munaala omuwanvu na buli kigo ekigumu," 
Isaiah2:16 buli lyato ly'e Tarusisi na buli kyombo kirungi. 
Isaiah2:17 Okwewanika kw'omuntu kulissibwa wansi, n'okwekuza kw'abantu kulitoowazibwa; ku olwo Omukama yekka y'aligulumizibwa," 
Isaiah2:18 n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale biribulirawo ddala. 
Isaiah2:19 Abantu baliddukira mu mpuku z'omu njazi, ne mu binnya by'omu ttaka okwekweka entiisa y'Omukama n'ekitiibwa ky'obukulu bwe, lw'alisituka okukankanya ensi." 
Isaiah2:20 Ku olwo abantu baliddira ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale ebya ffeeza ne zaabu bye beekolera okusinza, ne babikasukira emmese n'ebinyira," 
Isaiah2:21 ne beefubitika mu mpampagama z'enjazi ne mu miwaatwa gy'amayinja, okwekweka entiisa y'Omukama n'ekitiibwa ky'obukulu bwe lw'alisituka okukankanya ensi." 
Isaiah2:22 Muve ku muntu, atalina kirala wabula omukka ogumuva mu nnyindo. Ku bubwe agasa ki?" 
Isaiah3:1 Wuuno Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, agenda kuggya ku Yeruzaalemu ne Yuda buli nsako na buli buyambi: ensako y'emmere n'obuyambi bw'amazzi," 
Isaiah3:2 omuntu omuzira n'omutabaazi, omulamuzi n'omulanzi, omulaguzi n'omukadde," 
Isaiah3:3 omuduumizi w'ataano n'ow'eddaala erya waggulu, omubuulirizi, ffundi omukugu n'omusawo." 
Isaiah3:4 Abalenzi obulenzi be ndifuula abakungu mu bo, ate amabujje ge ganaabafuganga." 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu, omu alibonyaabonya munne, omusajja musajja munne, ne muliraanwa muliraanwa we; abaana baliyimukira mu bakulu, n'abakopi mu beebitiibwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Omuntu alikwata omu ku baganda be mu nnyumba ya kitaawe, n'agamba nti: “Ggwe olina omunagiro, ggwe beera omukulembeze waffe, fuga ebifulukwa bino.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Ku olwo oli alireekaana nti: “Nze siri musibi wa biwundu; omwange temuli kyakulya yadde ekyokwambala; muleke kunfuula mukulembeze wa bantu.” 
Isaiah3:8 Kubanga Yeruzaalemu atagadde, ne Yuda agudde, anti ebigambo byabwe n'ebikolwa byabwe birumba Omukama, bityoboola ekitiibwa kye." 
Isaiah3:9 Entunula yaabwe ebasalira omusango; ekibi kyabwe bakiraalaasa nga Sodoma, tebakibikkirira nako. Zibasanze! Kubanga beereetedde bennyini akabi." 
Isaiah3:10 Mugambe abatuukirivu nti: “Biribagendera bulungi.” Kubanga balirya ku bibala by'ebikolwa byabwe. 
Isaiah3:11 Omubi zimusanze! Kubanga akabi kamutuukiridde; anti ajja kuyisibwanga ng'emikono gye bwe gyakola. 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bange amabujje gababonyaabonya; abakazi babafuga. Wattu bantu bange, abakulembeze bammwe babawabizza; batabula ekkubo lye mwandikutte." 
Isaiah3:13 Omukama ayimuse okuwozesa, asituse okulamula abantu." 
Isaiah3:14 Omukama awozesa abakadde n'abakulembeze b'abantu be nti: “Mmwe mwonoonye ennimiro yange ey'emizabbibu; bye mwabba ku banaku biri mu mayumba gammwe. 
Isaiah3:15 Mugenderera ki okubetenta abantu bange, ne mumerengula amaaso g'abanaku?” Omukama Katonda w'Amagye y'ayogera." 
Isaiah3:16 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Kubanga bawala ba Siyoni beewanise, batambula banudde ensingo, batemyako n'amaaso gaabwe, batambula beerinnyako, n'obunyere ku magulu obugenda buvuga," 
Isaiah3:17 Omukama ajja kulumisa bawala ba Siyoni ebiguuna; ajja kubameza ebiwalaata mu bwetikkiro.” 
Isaiah3:18 Ku olwo Omukama alibaggyako eby'okwewoomya: obunyere, emige gy'oku mutwe, emidaali, n'obulege obuweese mu kifaananyi ky'omwezi;" 
Isaiah3:19 empeta ez'oku matu, obukomo, n'ebitambaala;" 
Isaiah3:20 kadaali, amagemo, enneebagyo n'obucupa bw'obuwoowo n'ensiriba;" 
Isaiah3:21 empeta ez'oku ngalo n'ez'omu nnyindo," 
Isaiah3:22 emivuluya, eminagiro n'ensawo ez'omu ngalo;" 
Isaiah3:23 ebyambalo eby'obutimba, n'ebyambalo eby'engoye eza bafuta, enkufiira ne leesu." 
Isaiah3:24 Mu kifo ky'eby'akaloosa walibaawo kivundu, mu kifo ky'emisipi, miguwa; mu kifo ky'enviiri enjoojole, kiwalaata; mu kifo ky'ebyambalo eby'ekitiibwa, bikutiya; mu kifo ky'obubalagavu mu maaso, njokyo." 
Isaiah3:25 Babbammwe balifa bitala, ne basajja bammwe abatabaazi baligwa mu lutalo." 
Isaiah3:26 Emiryango gye girikuba ebiwoobe ne gikungubaga; ng'asigadde ttayo, alituula ku ttaka." 
Isaiah4:1 Ku olwo abakazi musanvu balikwata omusajja omu, ne bagamba nti: “Tujja kweriisanga, era tuneeyambazanga; kyokka ka tuyitibwenga erinnya lyo, tuggyeeko obuswavu bwaffe.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Ku olwo ettabi ly'Omukama liriba ddungi nga lya kitiibwa, n'ekibala ky'ensi kye kiriba ettendo ly'abo abaliba bawonyeewo mu Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Abaliba basigadde mu Siyoni, abaasigala mu Yeruzaalemu, baliyitibwa batuukirivu, bonna abaawandiikibwa mu Yeruzaalemu nti balamu." 
Isaiah4:4 Omukama agenda kunaazaawo obujama bw'abawala ba Siyoni; alyozaawo omusaayi gwa Yeruzaalemu nga yeeyamba omwoyo ogw'obulamuzi, n'omwoyo ogw'omuliro." 
Isaiah4:5 Olwo Omukama alitondawo awo wonna ku lusozi Siyoni, ne ku abo bonna abaliba bakuŋŋaaniddewo, ekire emisana, ate ekiro omukka n'okwakaayakana kw'omuliro ogwaka. Bonna ekitiibwa kiribabikkirira." 
Isaiah4:6 Kye kiriba ekittuluze okubasiikiriza ebbugumu emisana, era obuddukiro n'obwewogomo okubawonya kibuyaga n'enkuba." 
Isaiah5:1 Ka nnyimbire mwagalwa wange oluyimba lw'ow'omukwano olukwata ku nnimiro ye: “Omwagalwa wange yalina ennimiro y'emizabbibu ku lusozi olugimu. 
Isaiah5:2 Yagikabala n'agirondamu amayinja, n'asimbamu emizabbibu egy'embala. Yagizimbamu omunaala wakati, n'agisimiramu essogolero, n'alindirira ebale emizabbibu emirungi, naye yabala mizabbibu egikambagga." 
Isaiah5:3 “Kale nno mmwe abali mu Yeruzaalemu, nammwe abali mu Yuda, mutusalirewo, nze n'ennimiro yange." 
Isaiah5:4 Ennimiro yange nandigikoledde ki ekirala kye saakola? Nali ngisuubira kubala mizabbibu mirungi, lwaki yabala mizabbibu gikambagga gyokka?" 
Isaiah5:5 Kale nno ka mbabuulire kye nnaakolera ennimiro yange: Nzija kugiggyako olukomera eyonoonebwe; nzija kugimenyako bbugwe erinnyirirwe. 
Isaiah5:6 Nzija kugizisa, nga tesalirwa yadde okulimibwamu, emeze enkandwa n'amaggwa; nzija na kulagira ebire bireme kutonnyesaamu nkuba.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Ennimiro y'Omukama w'Amagye ey'emizabbibu ye nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, abantu ba Yuda bwe bulime bwe obumusanyusa; yasuubira butuufu, wuuno mulimu kuyiwa musaayi; yasuubira butuukirivu, wuuno mulimu miranga." 
Isaiah5:8 Zibasanze abo abayunga ennyumba ku ginnaayo, abagatta ennimiro ku ndala okutuusiza ddala nga tewakyaliwo bbanga. Ne mwefunza ensi mwekka." 
Isaiah5:9 Omukama w'Amagye kino kye yalayira nga mpulira nti: “Mazima ennyumba nnyingi zirisigala matongo, ennene n'ennungi ziribula asulamu." 
Isaiah5:10 Yiika ekkumi ez'ennimiro y'emizabbibu zirivaamu bbati emu yokka ey'evviini; ne komeri ey'ensigo erivaamu efa emu yokka.” 
Isaiah5:11 Zibasanze abakeera ku makya ne bagenda okunoonya omwenge, ne babeera eyo okutuusa obudde okuziba, okutuusa ng'evviini ebakoleezezzaamu omuliro." 
Isaiah5:12 Balina ennanga n'entongooli ku binyumu byabwe, era n'obugoma, endere n'evviini; naye tebafa ku Mukama by'akola, yadde okwekkaanya emikono gye bye gikola." 
Isaiah5:13 Abantu bange nno kyebaliva bawaŋŋangusibwa, kubanga tebategeera; abantu baabwe ab'ekitiibwa balifa enjala, n'enkumu mu bo balikala olw'ennyonta." 
Isaiah5:14 Olw'ekyo amagombe gaggulawo omumiro gwago, ne gaasamya akamwa kaago awatali kuddirira; abakungu ba Yeruzaalemu n'enkumu y'abantu balikkirira omwo wamu n'abaakyo ababeera mu ndasano n'ebinyumu." 
Isaiah5:15 Omuntu alifeebezebwa, obw'omuntu bulitoowazibwa, amaaso g'abeekuza gagenda kussibwa wansi." 
Isaiah5:16 Kyokka Omukama w'Amagye aligulumizibwa mu nnamula ye; Katonda omutukuvu aliraga bwali omutukuvu mu butuukirivu bwe. 
Isaiah5:17 Olwo endiga zirirya ng'eziriira mu malundiro gaazo; obuliga n'obubuzi buliriira mu by'abagagga ebifuuse amatongo. 
Isaiah5:18 Zibasanze abo abaleetera ebibi ku nkoba z'obulimba, n'obwonoonefu ku miguwa gy'ebigaali," 
Isaiah5:19 n'abasoomooza nti: “Katonda ayanguwe. Ky'akola, akikole mangu, tukirabe. Zisembere, entegeka z'Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli zituuke, naffe tuzimanye!”" 
Isaiah5:20 Zibasanze abo ekibi abakiyita ekirungi, n'ekirungi ekibi; n'abassaawo ekizikiza mu kifo ky'ekitangaala, n'ekitangaala mu kifo ky'ekizikiza; abassa ekikaawa mu kifo ky'ekiwoomerera, n'ekiwoomerera mu kifo ky'ekikaawa!" 
Isaiah5:21 Zibasanze abo abeetwala ng'abagezi, abeeyita abategeevu mu ndaba yaabwe!" 
Isaiah5:22 Zibasanze abo abazira mu kunywa evviini, bakafulu mu kusiwa emyenge," 
Isaiah5:23 kubanga olw'enguzi, abasonyiwa alina omusango, ataliiko musango ne bamumma okwejjeerera." 
Isaiah5:24 N'olw'ekyo nno ng'olulimi lw'omuliro bwe lulya essubi, era ng'ebisusunku bwe biggweerera mu nnimi z'omuliro, n'ekikolo kyabwe bwe kirivunda kityo, n'ekimuli kyabwe bwe kirifumuuka ng'enfuufu; kubanga bagaya etteeka ly'Omukama w'Amagye, ne banyooma ekigambo ky'Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Bwe kityo obusungu bw'Omukama bweseredde ku bantu be; abagololeddeko omukono gwe n'abakuba. Ensozi zikankana, n'emirambo gy'abafu giri ng'obusa mu nguudo. Era olwa kino obusungu bwe tebunnaggwerayo ddala, era n'omukono gwe gukyagoloddwa." 
Isaiah5:26 Awanikidde eggwanga eriri ewala akabonero, alifuuyidde oluwa okuva ku nsonda y'ensi; liiryo lijjira ku mbiro, ku misinde." 
Isaiah5:27 Mu bo temuli aggwaamu maanyi yadde ayenjebuka; temuli asumagira yadde ayeebaka; tewali musipi gwa mu kiwato guddiridde, na lukoba lwa ngatto lukutuse." 
Isaiah5:28 Obusaale bwabwe bwogi, emitego gyabwe gyonna miwete, ebinuulo by'embalaasi zaabwe biri nga lwazi, ne nnamuziga z'ebigaali byabwe ziri ng'embuyaga." 
Isaiah5:29 Okuwuluguma kwabyo kuli ng'okw'empologoma; biwuluguma ng'obwana bw'empologoma; buvuuma nga bugwira omunyago gwabwo, ne bugutwala, tewali agubuwonya." 
Isaiah5:30 Ku olwo balivuumirako ng'ennyanja bw'evuuma; oli bw'alitunula ku nsi, aliraba nzikiza na nnaku; n'ekitangaala kiriddugazibwa ekire kyalwo." 
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka kabaka Wuzziya mwe yafiira, nalaba Omukama ng'atudde ku nnamulondo ey'ekitiibwa, ng'eri waggulu ngulumivu; emivuluya gye nga gijjuzizza Ekiggwa." 
Isaiah6:2 Baserafi nga bamuyimiridde waggulu, buli omu ng'alina ebiwaawaatiro mukaaga: ebibiri nga bimubisse amaaso, ebibiri nga bibikkiridde ebigere bye, ate ebibiri nga by'abuusisa." 
Isaiah6:3 Baali bagambagana nga baleekaana nti: “Mutuukirivu, Mutuukirivu, Mutuukirivu, Omukama w'Amagye; ensi yonna ejjudde ekitiibwa kye.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Olw'eddoboozi ly'abo abaali bayita, emisingi gy'emyango ne gikankana, Ekiggwa ne kijjula omukka." 
Isaiah6:5 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Zinsanze, obwange bukomye! Anti nze ndi muntu wa mimwa egitali mirongoofu, ate ndi mu bantu ab'emimwa egitali mirongoofu, naye amaaso gange galabye Kabaka, Omukama w'Amagye!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Awo omu ku Baserafi n'abuuka n'ajja gye ndi ng'alina mu ngalo eryanda eryaka lye yali aggye ne magalo ku mwaliiro," 
Isaiah6:7 n'alikoonyesa ku mimwa gyange, n'agamba nti: “Olabye? Kino kikutte ku mimwa gyo, omusango gwo gunaabuddwako, n'ekibi kyo kisonyiyiddwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Awo ne mpulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama ng'agamba nti: “Ntume ani? Ani anaatugenderayo?” 
Isaiah6:9 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nzuuno. Tuma nze.” N'agamba nti: “Genda ogambe abantu abo nti: “ ‘Okuwulira muwulira, naye temutegeera; okulaba mulaba, naye temwetegereza." 
Isaiah6:10 Kalubya omutima gw'abantu bano, amatu gaabwe gazitoye, n'amaaso gaabwe gazibuwaliddwa okuwulira, sikulwa nga balaba n'amaaso gaabwe, ne bawulira n'amatu gaabwe, ne bategeera n'emitima gyabwe, ne badda ne bawonyezebwa.’ ”" 
Isaiah6:11 Ne nziramu nti: “Kutuusa wa, ayi Mukama?” N'anziramu nti: “Okutuusa ng'ebibuga bifuuse matongo, nga tewakyali abisulamu, nga n'amayumba tegakyalimu muntu, n'ensi ng'esigalidde ddala ttayo, evunjagiddwa;" 
Isaiah6:12 okutuusa ng'Omukama abantu abatutte ewala, ng'ensi yonna eyabuliddwa." 
Isaiah6:13 Mu nsi ne bwe mulisigalamu ekyekkumi kimu eky'abantu, egenda kuddamu eyokebwe; kyokka ng'omuvule oba omumyulira bwe bireka ekikolo nga bitemeddwawo, n'ensigo entukuvu yeeriba ekikolo mu nsi.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Mu mirembe gya kabaka Akazi, mutabani wa Yotamu, mutabani wa Wuzziya kabaka wa Yuda, Rezini kabaka wa Aramu ne Peka mutabani wa Remaliya, kabaka wa Yisirayeli, ne bambuka okuzinda Yeruzaalemu, naye tebaasobola kukiwangula." 
Isaiah7:2 Ne babuulira Ennyumba ya Dawudi nti: “Aramu yeekobaanye ne Efurayimu.” Omutima gwe n'egy'abantu be ne gitengera ng'emiti gy'ekibira bwe giba nga giyuguumiziddwa kibuyaga. 
Isaiah7:3 Omukama n'agamba Yisaaya nti: “Genda, ggwe ne mutabani wo Seyari-Yasubu, osisinkane Akazi ku lusalosalo oluleeta amazzi mu Kidiba ky'Emambuka gye lukoma, mu kkubo eriraga ku Nnimiro y'Omwozi," 
Isaiah7:4 omugambe nti: ‘Laba eno! Kkakkana, leka kutya; omutima gwo guleke kutengera olw'obukuggu buno obubiri obw'enku obunyooka, yadde olw'okwesera kw'obusungu bwa Rezini n'obwa mutabani wa Remaliya," 
Isaiah7:5 kubanga Aramu, Efurayimu ne mutabani wa Remaliya bakwekobedde, nga bagamba nti:" 
Isaiah7:6 “Tulumbe Yuda, tumutiise, tumwabuluzeemu, tumugabane; tuddire mutabani wa Tabeeli, tumufuule kabaka waayo.”" 
Isaiah7:7 Omukama Katonda agamba bw'ati: “ ‘Tekijja kuyinzika, tekijja kubaawo." 
Isaiah7:8 Kubanga omutwe gwa Aramu ye Damasiko, ate omutwe gwa Damasiko ye Rezini. Ka wayite emyaka nkaaga mu etaano, Efurayimu aliba asesegguddwa nga takyali ggwanga." 
Isaiah7:9 Omutwe gwa Efurayimu ye Samariya, omutwe gwa Samariya ye mutabani wa Remaliya. Bwe mutaasigale nga muli bagumu, temugenda kunywera n'olumu.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Omukama n'ayogera ne Akazi nate, n'agamba nti:" 
Isaiah7:11 “Weesabire eri Omukama Katonda wo akabonero, oba kuva wansi ekkuzimu, oba waggulu mu ggulu eyo.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Naye Akazi n'agamba nti: “Sijja kusaba, sijja kukema Mukama.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Awo Yisaaya n'agamba nti: “Kale nno wulira, ggwe Ennyumba ya Dawudi; tekikumalira kukooya bantu, kyova okooya ne Katonda wange?" 
Isaiah7:14 Olw'ekyo nno Omukama yennyini y'alibawa akabonero: Laba, omuwala embeerera anaaba olubuto n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi; alimutuuma Yimmanweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Aliryanga muzigo na mubisi gwa njuki bw'aliba afunye amagezi ag'okwesammula ekibi n'okulondawo ekirungi. 
Isaiah7:16 Naye omwana aliba tannamanya kwesammula kibi na kulondawo kirungi, ensi omuli bakabaka ababiri abakutiisa eriba efuuse matongo." 
Isaiah7:17 Katonda alikuleetera, ggwe n'abantu bo n'amaka ga kitaawo, ekiseera ekitabangawo kasookedde Efurayimu ayawukana ku Yuda, kabaka wa Assuri." 
Isaiah7:18 “Ku olwo, Omukama alifuuyira oluwa ensiri okuva ku migga gy'ewala mu Misiri, n'enjuki okuva mu nsi ya Assuri." 
Isaiah7:19 Zirijja ne zikkalira mu nkonko empanvu ne mu mpampagama z'enjazi, ne mu bisaka by'amaggwa na ku buli awasenebwa amazzi." 
Isaiah7:20 “Ku olwo Omukama aliddira akamwano akeeyazikiddwa emitala w'Omugga, ne kabaka wa Assuri, n'amwa emitwe gyammwe, n'amwa n'obwoya obw'oku magulu, n'abaggyako n'ekirevu." 
Isaiah7:21 Ku olwo omuntu alisigaza ennyana y'ente n'endiga bbiri; 
Isaiah7:22 olw'obungi bw'amata amangi ge zinaawanga, ajjanga kulya muzigo; na buli muntu aliba asigadde mu nsi anaalyanga muzigo na mubisi gwa njuki." 
Isaiah7:23 “Ku olwo buli awaabanga emizabbibu olukumi egiweramu sekeli lukumi, walibaawo nkandwa na maggwa byokka." 
Isaiah7:24 Abantu baligendangayo na busaale na mitego kubanga ensi eriba emezezza wonna enkandwa n'amaggwa. 
Isaiah7:25 N'ensozi ezaali zirimiddwa n'enkumbi temuligendayo olw'okutya enkandwa n'amaggwa; birifuuka bifo ente gye ziteerwa n'endiga gye zirinnyirira.” 
Isaiah8:1 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kwata omuzingo omunene owandiikeko n'ekkalamu eya bulijjo nti: Maweri-Salali-Kasi-Bazi. 
Isaiah8:2 Era nzija kweyitira n'abajulirwa bange abeesigwa: Wuriya kabona ne Zakariya mutabani wa Yeberekiya.” 
Isaiah8:3 Ne ŋŋenda eri omukazi omulanzi, n'aba olubuto n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi. Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mutuume erinnya Maweri-Salali-Kasi-Bazi," 
Isaiah8:4 kubanga omwana aliba tannayiga kukowoola nti: ‘Taata’ oba ‘Maama’, obugagga bwa Damasiko n'omunyago gwa Samariya biriba bitwaliddwa kabaka wa Assuri.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Omukama era n'ayongera n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Isaiah8:6 “Kubanga abantu bano bagaanyi amazzi ga Silowa agakulukuta n'eddembe, ne bakankanira mu maaso ga Rezini n'aga mutabani wa Remaliya," 
Isaiah8:7 Omukama ajja kubasindikira amazzi g'Omugga ag'amaanyi, ag'ettumbiizi, ye kabaka wa Assuri n'ekitiibwa kye kyonna; galyalaala wonna mu myala gyagwo, gabooge ne ku mbalama zaagwo zonna." 
Isaiah8:8 Galikulukutira mu Yuda, gaalaale, gakutule mu nsi, gatumbiire okutuukira ddala mu bulago; ate ebikono byagwo biryanjaala ne bibikka ensi yonna, ggwe Yimmanweli.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Muleekaane, mmwe abantu, naye mutekemuke. Muwulire, mmwe ensi ez'ewala; mwesibe, naye mutekemuke. Mwesibe, naye mutekemuke." 
Isaiah8:10 Musale amagezi, kyokka galifululwa, muwe ebirowoozo, naye tebirikola, kubanga Katonda ali naffe." 
Isaiah8:11 Omukama yaŋŋamba bw'ati ng'antaddeko omukono gwe ogw'amaanyi, n'ampabula nneme kugoberera kkubo ly'abantu bano. Yagamba nti:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Temukiyita lukwe buli kyonna abantu bano kye bayita olukwe; temutya kye batya, temwesisiwala.”" 
Isaiah8:13 Wabula Omukama w'Amagye, oyo gwe mutwalanga ng'omutuukirivu, oyo gwe mubanga mutya, oyo y'abanga abeesisiwaza." 
Isaiah8:14 Alifuuka kitukuvu; naye ku lw'ennyumba zombi eza Yisirayeli aliba olwazi olubeesittaza ne bagwa; ate ku batuuze b'omu Yeruzaalemu alibeera kitimba na mutego. 
Isaiah8:15 Era bangi balisirittuka; baligwa ne bamenyeka, bagenda kutegebwa, bakwasibwe." 
Isaiah8:16 Obujulizi busibire ddala, n'etteeka linywereze ddala mu mitima gy'abayigirizwa bange." 
Isaiah8:17 Nzija kulindirira Omukama akisizza amaaso ge ennyumba ya Yakobo, nzija kusuubira mu ye." 
Isaiah8:18 Nzuuno n'abaana bange Katonda be yampa; tuli bubonero na byewuunyo mu Yisirayeli ebiva eri Katonda w'Amagye, asula ku lusozi Siyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Era bwe bakugambanga nti: “Weebuuze ku ndagu ne ku balanzi aboogera obwama n'okumuumuunya,” ggwe wamma abantu tebasaanye okwebuuza ku lubaale waabwe? Naye lwaki ensonga z'abalamu zeebuuzibwa ku bafu?" 
Isaiah8:20 Ku tteeka ne ku bujulizi! Bye boogera bwe biba tebyesigamiziddwa ku bino, tebaliraba ku kitangaala kya mmambya." 
Isaiah8:21 Balibungeetera mu nsi, nga bayala, nga badooba; enjala ng'ebalumye, baliswakiira, baliralamya emitwe gyabwe ne bavuma kabaka waabwe ne Katonda waabwe." 
Isaiah8:22 Ate bwe baligikoteka ku ttaka, baliraba buyinike na nzikiza byokka, era ne kazigizigi ow'entiisa; balikanyugibwa mu nzikiza ekutte." 
Isaiah8:23 Kyokka taliba na kazigizigi oyo abadde mu kunyolwa. Mu budde obwayita yatoowaza ensi ya Zebuluni n'ensi ya Nafutali, naye gye bujja aligulumiza Ekkubo ly'oku Nnyanja, emitala wa Yorudani, Galilaaya ey'Amawanga." 
Isaiah9:1 Abantu ababadde batambulira mu kizikiza, balabye ekitangaala ekinene; abo ababadde mu nsi ey'ekisiikirize eky'olumbe, ekitangaala kibaakidde." 
Isaiah9:2 Eggwanga oliwadde okwala, oyongedde essanyu lyabwe; okwesiima kwabwe kweyongedde, basanyukira mu maaso go ng'abali mu ssanyu ly'amakungula, ng'abasajja bwe basanyuka nga bagabana omunyago." 
Isaiah9:3 Anti ekikoligo ky'omugugu gwe, omuggo ogubabadde ku kibegabega, omuggo gw'abamubonyaabonya, abimenyeewo nga bwe gwali mu budde bw'Abamidiyani." 
Isaiah9:4 Kubanga buli kigatto ky'eyatabaala mu lutalo, na buli kyambalo ekyakulungibwa mu musaayi, bya kwokebwa ng'enku mu muliro." 
Isaiah9:5 Kubanga omwana atuzaaliddwa, omwana ow'obulenzi atuweereddwa; obufuzi bumuli ku kibegabega; erinnya lye, balimuyita: Omubuulirizi Eyeewuunyisa, Katonda ow'Obuyinza, Omuzadde Ataggwaawo, Omulangira Kiwamirembe." 
Isaiah9:6 Okugaziwa kw'obwakabaka bwe n'eddembe lye tebiriiko makoma; aliramula ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi ne ku bwakabaka bwe, okubunyweza n'okubuwanirira mu bulungi ne mu butuukirivu, okuva ku olwo n'okutuusa emirembe gyonna. Okwagala kw'Omukama w'Amagye kwe kulikola kino." 
Isaiah9:7 Omukama aweerezza ekigambo ku Yakobo; kijja kugwa ku Yisirayeli; 
Isaiah9:8 era abantu bonna banaakitegeera, Efurayimu n'abatuuze b'omu Samariya, mu kwekuza kwabwe abagamba n'omutima omwekuluntazi nti:" 
Isaiah9:9 “Amataffaali gagudde, naye ffe tujja kuzimbisa mayinja mabajje; emikunyu gitemeddwa, tunaagiwanyisaamu n'entolookyo.”" 
Isaiah9:10 Naye Omukama asitusizzaawo ku bo abalabe ba Rezini, asiikudde abamukyawa;" 
Isaiah9:11 Abaaramu okuva ebuvanjuba n'Abafilisitiini ebugwanjuba, bakavvudde Abayisirayeli nga baasamizza akamwa. Olw'ebyo byonna obusungu bwe tebunnaggwa, n'omukono gwe gukyagoloddwa." 
Isaiah9:12 Naye era abantu tebakomyewo eri oyo abakubye, yadde okunoonya Omukama w'Amagye." 
Isaiah9:13 Omukama ky'avudde atemako Yisirayeli omutwe n'omukira; byombi, ettabi ly'olukindu n'olumuli ku lunaku lumu;" 
Isaiah9:14 abakulembeze n'abeebitiibwa gwe mutwe, ate abalanzi abayigiriza eby'obulimba gwe mukira." 
Isaiah9:15 Abaakulemberanga abantu bano baabawabya, n'abo abaakulemberwanga baamiribwa." 
Isaiah9:16 N'Omukama kyaliva tasanyukira mu bavubuka baabwe, era tagenda kusaasira bamulekwa na bannamwandu baabwe, kubanga abantu bonna temuli ddiini, babi, era na buli kamwa koogera bya busiru. Olw'ebyo byonna obusungu bwe tebunnaggwa, n'omukono gwe gukyagoloddwa." 
Isaiah9:17 Bwo obwonenefu bubuubuuka nga muliro, bwokya enkandwa n'amaggwa, bukoleeza obusaka bw'omu kibira, bwambuka mu bbanga nga bweranga ng'omukka." 
Isaiah9:18 Ensi ekoledde omuliro olw'obusungu bw'Omukama w'Amagye; abantu bafuuse enku eziriikiriza omuliro; omuntu taliddiramu muganda we. 
Isaiah9:19 Ku gwa ddyo bagajambula, sso basigala bayala; ku kkono bakavvula, sso ate tebakkuta; buli omu alya nnyama ya munne." 
Isaiah9:20 Manasse alirya Efurayimu, ne Efurayimu alirya Manasse; ate bombi ne beefuukira Yuda. Olw'ebyo byonna obusungu bwe tebunnaggwa, n'omukono gwe gukyagoloddwa." 
Isaiah10:1 Zibasanze abateeka amateeka amabi, n'abo abafulumya ebiwandiiko ebinyigiriza;" 
Isaiah10:2 abaavu ne babamma ennamula entuufu, abanaku mu bantu bange ne babaggyako eddembe lyabwe, bannamwandu ne babafuula omunyago gwabwe, ne bamulekwa ne babanyagulula." 
Isaiah10:3 Mulikola mutya ku lunaku lw'ekibonerezo, okuzikirira lwe kuliva ewala? Muliddukira w'ani abayambe, obugagga bwammwe mulibuleka wa?" 
Isaiah10:4 Tewaliba kirala, wabula okusitama mu basibe, oba okugwa mu battiddwa. Olw'ebyo byonna obusungu bwe tebunnaggwa, n'omukono gwe gukyagoloddwa." 
Isaiah10:5 Assuri zimusanze, embuukuuli y'obukambwe bwange, mu ngalo ze akutte omuggo gw'obusungu bwange!" 
Isaiah10:6 Mmusindise okulwanyisa eggwanga omutali ddiini; mmutumye okulwanyisa abantu abannyiizizza, akole ogw'okwaya, yeekuŋŋaanyize omunyago, n'okubalinnyirira ng'ebitoomi by'omu nguudo." 
Isaiah10:7 Naye kino si ky'agenderera, n'omutima gwe kino si kye gulowooza; ky'ayagala kwe kuzikiriza, kwe kusaanyaawo amawanga ate nga si matono." 
Isaiah10:8 Agamba nti: “Abagabe bange bonna si bakabaka? 
Isaiah10:9 Kalune tali nga Kerucemisi? Kamati tali nga Arupadi? Samariya tali nga Damasiko? 
Isaiah10:10 Ng'omukono gwange bwe gutuuse ku bwakabaka obulina balubaale, abalina ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebibajje, ebisinga n'eby'omu Yeruzaalemu ne Samariya," 
Isaiah10:11 siikole kye kimu ku Yeruzaalemu n'ebifaananyi byakyo ebya balubaale, nga bwe nakola ku Samariya n'ebifaananyi byakyo ebya balubaale?”" 
Isaiah10:12 Omukama bw'alimala okumaliriza omulimu gwe gwonna ku lusozi Siyoni ne mu Yeruzaalemu, olwo alibonereza kabaka wa Assuri olw'ebikolwa by'okwekuza kw'omutima gwe awamu n'entunula ey'olunkulu mu maaso ge." 
Isaiah10:13 Kubanga agamba nti: “Ekyo nkikoze n'amaanyi g'emikono gyange, n'amagezi gange, kubanga ntegeera. Nzijuludde ensalo z'amawanga, obugagga bwabwe mbunyaze; nga kirimaanyi, nfufuggazza abawaŋŋamye ku nnamulondo." 
Isaiah10:14 Omukono gwange gukutte obugagga bw'amawanga ng'agwikirizza ekisu; ng'amagi agalekeddwa awo bwe gakuŋŋaanyizibwa, nange ensi yonna bwe ngikuŋŋaanyizza ntyo; tewabadde apaapaaza biwaawaatiro, ayasamya kamwa yadde akkokkoleza.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Embazzi eyinza okwewanika ku oyo agiwuuba, yadde omusumeeni okwewaanira ku oyo agusazisa? Kyandibadde ng'embuukuuli okuwuuba oyo agisitudde, oba ng'omuggo okugalula oyo atali muti." 
Isaiah10:16 Olw'ekyo nno Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, agenda kusindikira abatabaazi be abaggumivu endwadde ezikonvubya; ate wansi w'ekitiibwa kye walyaka omuliro ng'okwaka kw'omuliro." 
Isaiah10:17 Ekitangaala kya Yisirayeli kirifuuka omuliro, n'Omutuukirivu waabwe n'afuuka olulimi lw'omuliro; gulikoleera ne gwokya amaggwa ge n'enkandwa ku lunaku lumu." 
Isaiah10:18 Alizikiriza ettendo ly'ekibira kye n'ettaka eggimu, omubiri n'omwoyo, ng'omulwadde bw'agenda akogga." 
Isaiah10:19 Emiti egirisigalawo giriba mitono, nga n'omwana omuto asobola okugibala." 
Isaiah10:20 Ku olwo abaliba basigaddewo mu Yisirayeli ne bakaawonawo ba Yakobo, tebaliddayo kwesiga oyo eyabakuba, wabula bajjanga kwesiga Mukama mu mazima, Oyo Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Abaliba basigaddewo balikomawo, abaliba basigaddewo mu nnyumba ya Yakobo, balidda eri Katonda ow'Amaanyi." 
Isaiah10:22 Yisirayeli, abantu bo ne bwe baliba ng'omusenyu gw'oku nnyanja, abaliba basigaddewo be balidda. Okumalirizibwa okulangiriddwa, obutuukirivu bulibooga." 
Isaiah10:23 Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, wa kutuukiriza ekirangiriro kino ku nsi yonna." 
Isaiah10:24 Olw'okubeera ekyo, Omukama Katonda w'Amagye agamba nti: “Bantu bange, mmwe abali mu Siyoni, muleke kutya Bassuri; bajja kubakubisa mbuukuuli, babagalulire omuggo nga Abamisiri bwe baakola," 
Isaiah10:25 naye mu kabanga katono ddala obusungu bwange bujja kukoma, ate nkyusize obuswandi ku bo okubazikiriza.”" 
Isaiah10:26 Era Omukama w'Amagye alibayisaako obuswanyu, nga bwe yakuba Midiyaani ku Lwazi lwa Nnamuŋŋoona; aligalulira omuggo gwe ku nnyanja nga bwe yakola mu Misiri." 
Isaiah10:27 Ku olwo omugugu guliggyibwa ku bibegabega byammwe, n'ekikoligo kyabwe ku nsingo yammwe; ekikoligo kyabwe kirimenyebwa ku bibegabega byammwe." 
Isaiah10:28 Atuuse e Ayati, ayise mu Miguroni; engugu ye agiterese e Mikumasi." 
Isaiah10:29 Basomose omukutu, ne bagamba nti: “Tunaasula Geba;” Rama atekemuse, Gibeya ekya Sawulo kidduse." 
Isaiah10:30 Muwala wa Gallimu, kuba enduulu! Ggwe Layisa, tegereza! Muddemu Anatoti." 
Isaiah10:31 Madumena adduse, ab'omu Gebimu beekukumye." 
Isaiah10:32 Ku luno ajja kuwummulira Nobu; ajja kufunya ekikonde kye ku lusozi lwa muwala wa Siyoni, ku kasozi ka Yeruzaalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Anti laba Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, aliwawaagulako amatabi n'amaanyi ag'entiisa, emiti emiwanvu gijja kutemebwa, emirangavvu giriyimpayizibwa." 
Isaiah10:34 Alitema n'embazzi ebisaka by'ekibira; Lebanoni aligwa mu maaso g'Owaamaanyi. 
Isaiah11:1 Akasibukira kalitutunuka ku kikolo kya Yesse, ettabi liribala okuva ku mirandira gye." 
Isaiah11:2 Mwoyo w'Omukama alikkalira ku ye: Mwoyo ow'amagezi n'okutegeera, Mwoyo omubuulirizi n'ow'amaanyi, Mwoyo w'okumanya n'ow'okutya Omukama." 
Isaiah11:3 N'essanyu lye liriba mu kutya Mukama. Taliramula ng'aggya ku by'alabye n'amaaso obuuso, talisala nsonga ng'asinziira ku by'awulizza amatu obutu;" 
Isaiah11:4 wabula abanaku alibalamula mu butuukirivu, alisalanga mu bwenkanya ensonga z'abateefu ku nsi, ensi aligikubisa muggo gwa kamwa ke, n'ababi alibassisa mukka gwa mimwa gye." 
Isaiah11:5 Obutuukirivu bwe buliba ekimyu mu makendegere ge, ate obwesigwa bwe buliba omusipi mu kiwato kye." 
Isaiah11:6 Omusege gulisulanga n'akaliga, n'engo n'egalamira awo n'akabuzi, ate akayana n'empologoma biririiranga wamu; omwana omuto nga y'abikulemberamu." 
Isaiah11:7 Ente n'eddubu binaaliiranga wamu; obwana bwazo buneebakanga wamu, n'empologoma eneeryanga ssubi ng'ente." 
Isaiah11:8 Omwana ayonka alizannyira ku kinnya ky'enswera; ebbujje lirissa omukono mu nfo y'essalambwa. 
Isaiah11:9 Tebirikola kabi, tebiritta ku lusozi lwange lwonna olutukuvu, kubanga ensi eriba ejjudde okutegeera Omukama ng'amazzi bwe gabikka ennyanja." 
Isaiah11:10 Ku lunaku olwo ekikolo kya Yesse kiriyimirirawo ng'ebendera eri abantu; amawanga galimunoonya; era ekisulo kye kiriba kya kitiibwa. 
Isaiah11:11 Ku lunaku olwo, Omukama aliddamu okugolola omukono gwe, okwefunira abasigaddewo ku bantu be, abaliba basigaddewo mu Assuri, mu Misiri, mu Paturosi, mu Kuusi, mu Elamu, mu Sinari, ne mu bizinga by'ennyanja." 
Isaiah11:12 Alisitulira amawanga bendera, n'akuŋŋaanya abaliba basaasaanye mu Yisirayeli; alikunga abantu ba Yuda abaliba babunye emiwabo ng'abaggya mu nsonda ennya ez'ensi." 
Isaiah11:13 Olwo obuggya bwa Efurayimu bulikoma, n'abalabe ba Yuda balikutulwako; Efurayimu taliddayo kukwatirwa Yuda buggya, ne Yuda taliddayo kuwalana Efurayimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Wabula baliyiika ku butunnumba bw'Abafilisitiini ebugwanjuba, ate balyegatta ne banyagulula abantu b'ebuvanjuba, balissa omukono gwabwe ku Edomu ne Mowabu, n'Abammoni balibagondera." 
Isaiah11:15 Omukama alikaza ekikono ky'ennyanja y'e Misiri; n'ekibatu kye aliwujja ku Kiyira empewo ekaza; aligukubamu emyala musanvu, abantu basomokerewo nga bali mu ngatto." 
Isaiah11:16 Walibaawo ekkubo ku lw'abaliba basigaddewo ku bantu be, abo abaliba basigadde mu Assuri, nga bwe kyali ku Yisirayeli lwe yayambuka ng'ava mu Misiri." 
Isaiah12:1 Ku olwo muligamba nti: “Nnaakugulumizanga, ayi Mukama, kubanga ne bwe wali onsunguwalidde, obusungu bwo bwakyuka, n'onkubagiza." 
Isaiah12:2 Ddala Katonda bwe bulokofu bwange; ndi mugumu, sikyatya, kubanga Omukama ge maanyi gange, lye ttendo lyange, afuuse obulokofu bwange.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Munaasenanga amazzi mu ssanyu mu nzizi z'obulokofu. 
Isaiah12:4 Ku olwo muligamba nti: “Mugulumize Omukama, mukoowoole erinnya lye; Mumanyise mu mawanga ebikolwa bye; mulangirire erinnya lye erisukkulumye." 
Isaiah12:5 Muyimbire Omukama, kubanga akoze ebyamagero; mubimanyise mu nsi yonna." 
Isaiah12:6 Muleekaane, muyimbe olw'essanyu, abasula mu Siyoni, kubanga Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli ali mu mmwe wakati mukulu.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Obubaka ku Babiloni Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi bwe yalaba: 
Isaiah13:2 Musitule bendera ku ntikko y'olusozi enjereere, muleekaanire gye bali, mubawenyeko; bayingire mu miryango gy'abakungu." 
Isaiah13:3 Nze ndagidde abatukuvu bange, mpise abazira bange batuukirize obusungu bwange, abajaguliza mu buwanguzi bwange." 
Isaiah13:4 Wulira, okuleekaana mu nsozi, kuli ng'okw'abantu abangi. Wulira, oluyoogaano mu mawanga, luli ng'olw'amawanga ageekuŋŋaanya awamu. Omukama w'Amagye akunga eggye." 
Isaiah13:5 Bava mu nsi ey'ewala, eri ku nkingi z'eggulu, Omukama n'ebyokulwanyisa by'obusungu bwe, bazikirize ensi yonna." 
Isaiah13:6 Mukube ebiwoobe, kubanga olunaku lw'Omukama lutuuse; lujja kujja ng'okwaya okuva ew'Omuyinza wa buli kantu." 
Isaiah13:7 Olw'ekyo, emikono gyonna giriragaya, na buli mutima gwa muntu gulimutekemuka." 
Isaiah13:8 Balitekemuka; obuyinike n'obulumi biribakwata; balyenyoola ng'omukazi mu kulumwa; buli omu alitunuulira munne ng'awuniikiridde; ng'amaaso gabaaka omuliro. 
Isaiah13:9 Olunaku lw'Omukama luulwo lujja; olw'obukambwe, obukaali n'obusungu obwesera; ensi lwa kugifuula matongo, aboonoonyi abalimu bazikirizibwe." 
Isaiah13:10 Kubanga emmunyeenye n'ebibinja byazo, tebiriwa kitangaala kyabyo; enjuba evaayo erifuulwa kizikiza, n'omwezi teguliwa kitangaala kyagwo." 
Isaiah13:11 Ensi ndigibonereza olw'ebibi byayo, n'ababi olw'ebyonoono byabwe; ndikomya olunkulu lw'abeekuza, ndikakkanya amampaati g'abakambwe." 
Isaiah13:12 Omuntu ndimufuula wa kkekwa okukira zaabu omukuŋŋunte, aliba wa munyoto okukira zaabu we Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 N'olw'ekyo ndikankanya eggulu, n'ensi erinyeenya okuva mu kifo kyayo, olw'obuswandi bw'Omukama w'Amagye, ku lunaku lw'obusungu obwesera." 
Isaiah13:14 Ng'ennangaazi gye bayigga, oba endiga etaliiko musumba, balidda buli omu mu bantu be, balidda buli omu mu nsi ye." 
Isaiah13:15 Buli yenna alisangirizibwa, alifumitibwa; buli yenna alikwatibwa, alifa kitala." 
Isaiah13:16 Abaana baabwe baliseseggulwa obulere mu maaso gaabwe; amaka gaabwe galinyagibwa ne bakazi baabwe baligwagwawazibwa. 
Isaiah13:17 Laba, nzija kubasiikuulira Abamedi, abatafa ku ffeeza, yadde okusanyukira zaabu." 
Isaiah13:18 Obusaale bwabwe buliseseggula abavubuka; ezzadde ly'olubuto tebalirikwasa kisa, n'amaaso gaabwe tegalisaasira mabujje." 
Isaiah13:19 Ne Babiloni, eddulu ly'obwakabaka, ettendo ly'ekitiibwa ky'Abakaludeya, kirizikirizibwa Katonda nga bwe yakola Sodoma ne Gomorra." 
Isaiah13:20 Tekiribeeramu bantu yadde okusengebwamu omulundi omulala; tewaliba Muwarabu asimbamu weema, yadde omusumba awummulizaamu eggana lye." 
Isaiah13:21 Wabula bisolo bya mu ddungu bye birigalamira eyo; ennyumba zaamu zirijjula ebiwuugulu; maaya ze zirisulangamu, n'emisambwa gye giryebuukizanga omwo." 
Isaiah13:22 Empisi ziriwoowooleranga mu bigo byamu, n'emisege mu mbiri zaamu ezisanyusa; obudde bwakyo busemberedde ddala; ennaku zaakyo tezijja kuwanvuyirizibwa." 
Isaiah14:1 Omukama aliddiramu Yakobo, n'addamu okulonda Yisirayeli; alibatebenkeza ku ttaka lyabwe. Ab'amawanga balibeegattako ne beeyunga ku nnyumba ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Amawanga galibaddira ne gabatuusa mu kifo kyabwe; ennyumba ya Yisirayeli eribafuula baayo mu nsi y'Omukama ng'abaddu n'abazaana. Baliwamba abaali babawambye, ne bafuga abaali babanyigiriza." 
Isaiah14:3 Ku olwo Omukama bw'alikuwa akalembereza n'oweerako ku bulumi, obwegugungo n'agalimu amazito ge wali ossiddwako," 
Isaiah14:4 otontomanga ekitontome kino ng'ovumirira kabaka w'e Babiloni nti: “Omuwalanye akomye atya? Obusungu bwe buwedde butya? 
Isaiah14:5 Omukama amenye omuggo gw'abakola obubi, ddamula w'abafuzi," 
Isaiah14:6 oyo akuba abantu n'obusungu, n'emiggo egitasalawo, n'afuga amawanga n'obukambwe, n'ebiyigganyizo ebitaliiko kuweera." 
Isaiah14:7 Ensi yonna ewummudde, esiriikiridde, esaakaanya n'ennyimba." 
Isaiah14:8 N'emiti gya sipulaasi n'entolookyo za Lebanoni gikweyagalirako ne gigamba nti: ‘Omaze n'otoowazibwa, tewali anaasituka kujja kututema.’" 
Isaiah14:9 Amagombe wansi eyo gagugumuse, gajja okukusisinkana ng'otuuka; gasitudde emizimu okukulamusa, bonna abaali abakulembeze ku nsi. Gabaggya ku nnamulondo zaabwe bakabaka bonna abaali bakabaka b'ensi." 
Isaiah14:10 Bonna balyanukula, ne bakugamba nti: ‘Naawe onafuye nga ffe; ofuuse nga ffe!’" 
Isaiah14:11 Olwetumbu lwo luserengeseddwa emagombe wamu n'amaloboozi ag'entongooli zo; envunyu ze zaaliiridde wansi wo, ensiriŋŋanyi zikubisse," 
Isaiah14:12 Wawanuka otya mu ggulu, ggwe emmunyeenye y'oku makya, mutabani wa mmambya? Otemeddwa otya n'ogwa ku ttaka, ggwe eyafufuggazanga amawanga?" 
Isaiah14:13 Mu mutima gwo eyagambanga nti: ‘Nzija kulinnya mu ggulu, nnamulondo yange ngisukkulumye waggulu w'emmunyeenye za Katonda; ŋŋenda kutuula ku nnamulondo, ku lusozi olukuŋŋaanirwako, ewala eyo emambuka;" 
Isaiah14:14 nzija kutumbiira waggulu mpise n'ebire, nenkane oyo Ali waggulu ddala.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Naye oserengeseddwa wansi mu magombe, mu nnyanga y'obunnya." 
Isaiah14:16 Abakulaba bakutunuulira ne beewuunya ekikutuuseeko nti: ‘Ono si ye musajja eyakankanyanga ensi eyayuuguumya obwakabaka? 
Isaiah14:17 Eyafuula ensi amatongo, n'asaanyaawo ebibuga byayo, atakkirizanga basibe kudda ka?’" 
Isaiah14:18 “Bakabaka bonna ab'amawanga bagalamidde mu kitiibwa, buli omu mu ntaana ye;" 
Isaiah14:19 wabula ggwe okasukiddwa ebweru w'entaana yo, ng'ettabi eryenyinyalwa, ovungiddwavungiddwa wamu n'abattibwa, abaasoggwa ekitala, ne bakkirira mu mayinja g'obunnya; ng'omulambo ogulinnyiriddwa." 
Isaiah14:20 Tolibeegattako mu kuzikirizibwa, kubanga wayonoona ensi yo, watta abantu bo. “Bazzukulu b'abo abakola obubi tebagenda kukoowoolwa emirembe gyonna." 
Isaiah14:21 Abaana be mubategekere aw'okusanjagirwa, olw'ebibi bya kitaabwe, baleme kuddamu kusituka na kwefuga nsi n'okubunya enkulungo y'ensi n'ebibuga byabwe." 
Isaiah14:22 “Ndibasitukiramu,” Omukama w'Amagye bw'agamba, “ne nsangulawo mu Babiloni erinnya lye n'erinnya ly'abaliba basigaddewo, ery'abaana n'abazzukulu,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah14:23 “Ndikifuula ekisulo kya nnamunnungu, ndikifuula bidiba bya mazzi, era ndikyerawo n'olweyo olw'okuzikiriza,” Omukama w'Amagye bw'agamba." 
Isaiah14:24 Katonda w'Amagye yalayira nti: “Nga bwe nategeka, era bwe kiriba, nga bwe nateesa era bwe kirituukirizibwa," 
Isaiah14:25 nti Omwassuri ndimubetentera mu nsi yange, ndimulinnyirira ku lusozi lwange, ekikoligo kye kiriggyibwa ku bantu bange, n'eggugu lye liribaggyibwa ku kibegabega." 
Isaiah14:26 Eno ye ntegeka ekoleddwa ensi yonna, era guno gwe mukono ogugololeddwa ku mawanga gonna.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye y'akitegese, ani anaamuziyiza? Omukono gwe gugoloddwa, ani anaaguzza?" 
Isaiah14:28 Obubaka buno bwajjira mu mwaka kabaka Akazi mwe yafiira: 
Isaiah14:29 “Leka kusanyuka wenna ggwe Filisitiya, kubanga omuggo gw'oyo abadde akukuba gumenyese, kubanga ku kikolo ky'omusota kujja kusibukako enswera, ate akaana kaayo kalifuuka ebbuukizi ery'obusagwa." 
Isaiah14:30 Era abaggulanda b'abaavu balizuula amalundiro, n'abanaku baliwummula mu ddembe: naye ekikolo ekikyo ndikissa enjala, n'ababo abaliba basigaddewo ndibasanjaga." 
Isaiah14:31 Ggwe wankaaki, kuba ebiwoobe, tema emiranga, ggwe ekibuga, Buli Mufilisitiini atengere olw'okutya, kubanga omukka gufubutuse emambuka, ate mu magye ge temuli akwebera." 
Isaiah14:32 Ababaka b'eggwanga eryo balyanukulwa batya? ‘Omukama abanzeewo Siyoni; mu kyo abanaku be mwe balyewogoma.’ ” 
Isaiah15:1 Obubaka obuvumirira Mowabu: Kituufu Ari-Mowabu kizikiridde, kisaanyiziddwawo mu kiro kimu! Kiri-Mowabu kizikiridde, kisaanyiziddwawo mu kiro kimu!" 
Isaiah15:2 Diboni ayambuka ku kiggwa kye, ku kifo kye ekigulumivu akaabe; Mowabu ayaziiranira ku Nebo ne mu Medeba. Emitwe gyonna, miwalakate, na buli kirevu kimwereddwa." 
Isaiah15:3 Mu nguudo beesibye bikutiya; ku busolya waggulu ne mu mpya bonna bakuba ebiwoobe, beeziribanga mu maziga." 
Isaiah15:4 Kesuboni ne Eleyale batema emiranga, ekiwoobe kyabwe kiwulikika n'e Yawazi. Abatabaazi b'e Mowabu kye bavudde bakuba enduulu, emitima gyabwe gikubagana." 
Isaiah15:5 Omutima gwange gukaabira Mowabu; abakidduseemu batuuse n'e Zowari, ne Egulati-Selisiya. Bambuka nga bakutte ery'e Lukiti nga bwe bakaaba; ku kkubo eriraga e Koronayimu kwe batemera emiranga olw'okuzikirira." 
Isaiah15:6 Amazzi ag'e Nimirimu gakalidde ddala; omuddo gukaze, ebimera biweddewo, tewakyali kiriko kikoola." 
Isaiah15:7 Obugagga bwe bakuŋŋaanya ne batereka, kyebava babusomosa Ekiwonvu ky'Enzibaziba." 
Isaiah15:8 Anti ebiwoobe bibunye wonna mu Mowabu, okukaaba kwabwe kutuuka n'e Egulayimu; n'omulanga gwabwe gutuuka n'e Beeri-Elimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Amazzi ga Diboni gajjudde omusaayi; naye era Diboni nzija kumuleetera bingi okusingawo: empologoma eri abo abaliba badduse mu Mowabu, n'abo abaliba basigadde mu nsi." 
Isaiah16:1 Musindike akaliga eri abafuga ensi okuva e Sela mu ddungu okutuusa ku lusozi lwa muwala wa Siyoni. 
Isaiah16:2 Ng'ebinyonyi ebipaapaala nga bigobeddwa mu kisu, ne bawala ba Mowabu bwe bali ku misomoko gya Arunoni:" 
Isaiah16:3 “Tusalire ku magezi, tusalirewo. Ekisiikirize kyo kifuule ng'ekiro mu ttuntu wakati; abadduka bakweke, ababungeeta tobawaayo." 
Isaiah16:4 Abadduse mu Mowabu babudame mu ggwe; babeerere obwewogomo ku bazikiriza.” Abonyaabonya ng'awedde, n'okuzikiriza nga kukomye, n'oyo abadde alinnyirira abuzeewo mu nsi." 
Isaiah16:5 Nnamulondo erissibwawo mu kwagala, era aligituulako mu bwesigwa oyo eyava mu weema ya Dawudi, agoberera obwenkanya ng'alamula, era ayanguwa okukola ebikolwa eby'obutuukirivu." 
Isaiah16:6 Twawulira ku kwekuza kwa Mowabu, ku kwekuza kwe okungi n'olwetumbu lwe, okwekuza kwe n'amampaati ge, naye okwewaana kwe temuli." 
Isaiah16:7 N'olw'ekyo Mowabu akuba ebiwoobe; bonna bakubira Mowabu ebiwoobe. Bakaabira obugaati bw'emizabbibu emiwotose obw'omu Kiri-Kareseti. 
Isaiah16:8 Ennimiro z'e Kesuboni ziwotose era n'emizabbibu gy'e Sibuma; abafuzi b'amawanga basambiridde emizabbibu gye emimyufu, egyatuukanga n'e Yazeri, ne girandira ne mu ddungu; obulokolerwa bwagyo bwabuna wonna, ne butuuka ne ku nnyanja." 
Isaiah16:9 Kyenva ngatta amaziga ne Yazeri okukaabira emizabbibu gya Sibuma; nkutobezza n'amaziga gange, O Kesuboni! O Eleyale! kubanga ku bibala byo eby'ekyeya ne ku makungula go obuluulu bukomye." 
Isaiah16:10 Era essanyu n'okweyagala bigiddwawo mu nnimiro z'ebibala; tewakyali luyimba na kuyoogaana kwa ssanyu mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu, tekyali asogola ku ssogolero, kubanga okukuba obuluulu kukomye." 
Isaiah16:11 Omutima gwange kyeguva gulirira Mowabu ng'ennanga, enda yange n'enkaabira Kiri-Kareseti." 
Isaiah16:12 Mowabu bw'alabika ku bifo ebigulumivu yeekooyeza bwerere; bw'ayingira mu kiggwa kye okwegayirira, talina ky'agasirwa." 
Isaiah16:13 Ekyo kye kigambo Omukama kye yayogera luli ku Mowabu. 
Isaiah16:14 Kale nno Omukama agamba nti: “Mu myaka asatu, ng'omupakasi bw'agibalirira, ekitiibwa ky'e Mowabu kijja kunyoomebwa wamu ne nnamungi yenna ow'abantu be; abalisigalawo baliba batono ate nga bayenjebufu.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Obubaka ku Damasiko: “Damasiko kijja kukoma okuba ekibuga; kijja kufuuka ntuumu ya bifulukwa. 
Isaiah17:2 Ebibuga byakyo birekeddwa ttayo emirembe gyonna; birifuuka bya magana, galigalamira omwo nga tewali agaguŋŋumula." 
Isaiah17:3 Ebigo ebigumu biribulawo mu Efurayimu, n'obwakabaka buliva mu Damasiko; ebiriba bisigaddewo mu Aramu biriba ng'ekitiibwa ky'Abayisirayeli,” Omukama w'Amagye bw'agamba." 
Isaiah17:4 “Era ku olwo ekitiibwa kya Yakobo kirikendeera; n'omugejjo gw'omubiri gwe guliddirira. 
Isaiah17:5 Era kiriba ng'omukunguzi bw'akuŋŋaanya eŋŋano eri ku kikolo, n'akungula eŋŋano mu mikono gye; era nga bw'agenda alonderera ebirimba by'eŋŋano mu kiwonvu kya Refayimu." 
Isaiah17:6 Ebirimba eby'okulondalonda birisigalamu, ng'omuti gw'oliva bwe gukubwa, ensigo bbiri oba ssatu ne zisigalira ku busanso bw'ettabi erisembayo; oba ng'ensigo nnya oba ttaano bwe zisigalira ku matabi g'omuti agaabala,” Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli bw'agamba." 
Isaiah17:7 Ku olwo balifa ku Mutonzi waabwe, era amaaso gaabwe baligassa ku Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Tebaliddayo kufa ku myaliiro gye baakola n'emikono gyabwe, yadde okufa ku mpagi za Asera oba ku myaliiro okunyookezebwa obubaani ebyakolebwa n'engalo zaabwe." 
Isaiah17:9 Ku olwo ebibuga byabwe bye beesiga birirekebwa ttayo ng'ebibuga by'Abakivi n'Abaamori bye baaleka nga badduka abantu ba Yisirayeli; wonna kiriba matongo. 
Isaiah17:10 Kubanga weerabidde Katonda Mulokozi wo, tojjukidde Lwazi obuddukiro bwo; kale nno ne bw'olisimba obulimiro obusanyusa, n'osimbamu ensigo engwira," 
Isaiah17:11 ne bw'oligimeza ku lunaku lw'ogisimbye, ate enkeera y'olwo lw'ogisimbye n'ogireetera okumulisa, era ku makungula temuliba kantu, ku lunaku olw'obuyinike n'obulumi obutaliiko kuwonya." 
Isaiah17:12 Kitalo, okuwuuma kw'abantu enkumu; bawuuma ng'okuwuuma kw'ennyanja! Okuyira kw'amawanga, bayira ng'okuyira kw'amazzi amangi!" 
Isaiah17:13 Wadde abantu bayira ng'amazzi amangi bwe gayira, naye alibaboggolera ne baddukira wala, ne bakuŋŋunsibwa ng'essubi ku lusozi bwe likuŋŋunsibwa empewo, ng'enfuufu y'akazimu bw'esitulibwa kibuyaga." 
Isaiah17:14 Akawungeezi, laba, ntiisa njereere. Buba tebunnasaasaana nga tebakyaliwo. Ogwo gwe mugabo gw'abo abatunyaga, y'empeera y'abo abatwaya." 
Isaiah18:1 Zigisanze ensi ey'ebiwaawaatiro ebipaapaala, eri emitala w'emigga gy'omu Kuusi," 
Isaiah18:2 eweereza ababaka mu nnyanja, ku mazzi mu bwato obw'ebitoogo. “Mmwe ababaka abangu, mugende mu bantu abawanvu ab'omubiri omuweweevu, eri abantu ab'entiisa ab'okumpi n'ab'ewala, eri eggwanga ery'amaanyi erigenda lirinnyirira, eririna ensi egenda efukirirwa emigga.”" 
Isaiah18:3 Mmwe abantu abali ku nsi, nammwe abali ku nkulungo y'ensi, bendera bw'erisimbibwa ku lusozi, mutunule; eŋŋombe bw'erivuga, muwulire;" 
Isaiah18:4 kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Nzija kweddira mu kifo kyange neerolere mu kasirise, ng'ebbugumu ekkalangufu mu musana, oba ng'olufu mu bbugumu ery'amakungula.”"
