Isaiah18:5 Kubanga ng'amakungula tegannatuuka, ng'okwanya kuwedde, ng'ekibala ekitaddeko tekinnayengera, obuwakatirwa alibuggyako n'ebiwabyo, n'amatabi agalanda aligatema n'agaggyako." 
Isaiah18:6 Gonna galirekerwa ennyonyi enkwakkuzi ez'omu nsozi n'ebisolo eby'ettale; ennyonyi enkwakkuzi ziribirya obudde bwonna obw'ekyeya, n'ebisolo eby'ettale mu budde bwonna obw'empewo." 
Isaiah18:7 Mu budde obwo ebirabo biriweerezebwa Omukama w'Amagye nga biva mu bantu abawanvu ab'omubiri omuweweevu, mu abantu ab'entiisa ab'okumpi n'ab'ewala, mu ggwanga ery'amaanyi erigenda lirinnyirira, eririna ensi egenda efukirirwa emigga. Ebirabo birireetebwa ku lusozi Siyoni, ekifo ky'erinnya ly'Omukama w'Amagye." 
Isaiah19:1 Obubaka ku Misiri: Laba: Omukama yeebagadde ekire ekidduka emisinde, ayingira mu Misiri; Bw'anaalabika, ebifaananyi bya balubaale ba Misiri binaakankana, n'emitima gy'Abamisiri ginaabatekemuka munda." 
Isaiah19:2 “Nzija kusiikulira Omumisiri Mumisiri munne, balirwanagana buli muntu ne muganda we; omuntu ne mukwano gwe, ekibuga n'ekibuga kinnaakyo, obwakabaka n'obwakabaka bunnaabwo." 
Isaiah19:3 Abamisiri baliggwaamu omutima, n'entegeka zaabwe ndizitabula. Bagenda kwebuuza ku bifaananyi bya balubaale, ku basamize, ku mizimu ne ku ndagu." 
Isaiah19:4 Abamisiri ŋŋenda kubawaayo mu mikono gy'omufuzi omukambwe, kabaka ow'entiisa agenda kubafuga,” Omukama Katonda w'Amagye bw'agamba." 
Isaiah19:5 Amazzi g'omu mugga galikalira, era n'ekiwonvu ky'omugga kyonna kirikalira ne kikala." 
Isaiah19:6 Emyala giriwunya ekivundu, n'obugga bw'e Misiri bulitonewa ne bukalira; ebitoogo n'ebiwuuwa birikala." 
Isaiah19:7 Ebimera ku Kiyira, ku mugga we guyiira n'ebirime byonna ku lubalama lwa Kiyira birikala; birifuumuuka ne bibulawo." 
Isaiah19:8 Abavubi balikaaba ne balaajana, bonna abasuula amalobo mu Kiyira baliwooba, n'abasuula obutimba mu mazzi baliyongobera." 
Isaiah19:9 Abaluka engoye eza kitaani baliterebuka, n'abalanga engoye eza ppamba nabo bwe batyo." 
Isaiah19:10 Abatunzi b'engoye balyetamwa, n'abo bonna abakolera empeera baliwulira ennyiike." 
Isaiah19:11 Abakungu b'e Zowani nga basiru! Ababuulirizi ba Faraawo abagezi amagezi bamuwa ga kisiru. Mugamba mutya Faraawo nti: “Nze ndi mwana wa bagezi, mwana wa bakabaka ab'edda?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Kale abasajja bo abagezi kati baluwa? Kale bakubuulire bakumanyise Omukama w'Amagye by'ategekedde Misiri. 
Isaiah19:13 Abakungu b'e Zowani bafuuse basiru, abakungu b'e Memfi bawubisiddwa; abo ebikonge by'ebika byayo bawubisizza Misiri." 
Isaiah19:14 Omukama abasiyeemu omwoyo ogw'okuzunga; baleetedde Misiri okutaga mu byonna by'akola, ng'omutamiivu bw'atagira mu bisesemye bye." 
Isaiah19:15 Misiri tegenda kubaako kyesobola kukola, ye ng'omutwe, omukira, olusansa oba olumuli." 
Isaiah19:16 Ku olwo Abamisiri baliba ng'abakazi; balikankana olw'okutya nga balaba Omukama w'Amagye awanise omukono n'agubagololerako. 
Isaiah19:17 Ensi ya Yuda eriba ya ntiisa ku Bamisiri; buli gwe banaagambanga ku linnya lya Yuda, balyesisiwala nga balabye entegeka Omukama w'Amagye gy'akoze okubalwanyisa." 
Isaiah19:18 Ku olwo, mu nsi Misiri mulibaamu ebibuga bitaano ebyogera olulimi lwa Kanaani; biryeyama okukolagana n'Omukama w'Amagye; ekimu ku byo kiyitibwa Kibuga kya Njuba." 
Isaiah19:19 Ku olwo, mu makkati ga Misiri mulibaamu omwaliiro olw'Omukama, n'ejjinja ery'ekijjukizo ku nsalo." 
Isaiah19:20 bye biribeera akabonero n'obujulizi bw'Omukama w'Amagye mu nsi y'e Misiri. Bwe balitemera Omukama omulanga olw'abababonyaabonya, alibasindikira omununuzi, alibawolereza n'abanunula." 
Isaiah19:21 Omukama alyemanyisa mu Misiri. Ku olwo Abamisiri balikkiririza mu Mukama; balimusinza ne bamuweereza ebitambiro n'ebirabo eby'obuwunga. Balyeyama ew'Omukama, bye beeyamye ne babituukiriza." 
Isaiah19:22 Omukama alikuba Misiri, alibakuba ate n'abawonya. Balikyukira eri Omukama, naye n'abaanukula okwegayirira kwabwe n'abawonya." 
Isaiah19:23 Ku olwo walibaawo oluguudo olunene oluva mu Misiri okulaga mu Assuri; Abassuri balijja mu Misiri, n'Abamisiri ne bagenda mu Assuri; Abamisiri n'Abassuri banaasinzizanga wamu." 
Isaiah19:24 Ku olwo Yisirayeli y'eriba eyookusatu ku Misiri ne Assuri; kino kiriba kya mukisa wakati mu nsi. 
Isaiah19:25 Omukama w'Amagye alibawa omukisa ng'agamba nti: “Omukisa gubeere ku Misiri abantu bange, ne ku Assuri omulimu gw'omukono gwange, ne ku Yisirayeli obusika bwange.” Ku Misiri ne Kuusi olw'okuwambibwa kwa Asudodi" 
Isaiah20:1 Mu mwaka omuduumizi omukulu mwe yayingirira mu Asudodi nga Sarugoni kabaka wa Assuri amutumye, n'akizinda n'akiwamba," 
Isaiah20:2 mu budde obwo, Omukama yayogera ng'ayita mu Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi n'agamba nti: “Genda weesumulule ekikutiya mu kiwato, onaanule n'engatto mu bigere.” N'akola atyo, n'ayitanga nga yeeyambudde n'ebigere nga byereere." 
Isaiah20:3 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Ng'omuweereza wange Yisaaya bw'amaze emyaka esatu ng'atambula yeeyambudde, nga n'ebigere byereere, ng'akabonero n'ekyewuunyo eri Misiri ne Kuusi," 
Isaiah20:4 ne kabaka wa Assuri bw'alitwala atyo abasibe ba Misiri n'abawaŋŋangusibwa ba Kuusi nga bali bwereere n'ebigere nga byereere, abato n'abakulu, nga n'obutuuliro buli bweru, ekitajja eri Misiri." 
Isaiah20:5 Olwo nno abo abaateeka essuubi lyabwe mu Kuusi ne beeyagalira mu Misiri balitekemuka ne baswala. 
Isaiah20:6 Ku olwo abatuuze b'oku lubalama lw'ennyanja baliŋŋamba nti: ‘Laba, kino kye kituukiridde abo be twesiganga era gye twaddukira batuyambe okutuwonya Assuri. Leero ffe tunaasumattuka tutya?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Obubaka ku ddungu eririraanye ennyanja: Nga kibuyaga afuuwa mu nsi y'emaserengeta, ajja ng'ava mu ddungu, ng'ava mu nsi ey'entiisa." 
Isaiah21:2 Nabuulirwa okulabikirwa okuzibu: Ow'enkwe alyamu enkwe, n'azikiriza omuzikiriza. Ggwe Elamu, lumba; ggwe Mediya, zinda! Okusinda kwonna kwe yaleeta ndikukomya." 
Isaiah21:3 N'olw'ekyo obulumi bunzijudde amakendegere; okulumwa kunkutte ng'okw'omukazi ng'azaala; ennaku ennyinze teŋŋanya na kuwulira, entiisa enkutte teŋŋanya na kulaba." 
Isaiah21:4 Omutima guntaga, ensisi enkankanya; akawungeezi ke mbadde nnindirira kanfuukidde entiisa." 
Isaiah21:5 Bategese olujjuliro, banjuluzza olugoye, balya, banywa. Mmwe abagabe, musituke, musiige engabo omuzigo." 
Isaiah21:6 Kubanga kino Omukama ky'aŋŋamba: “Genda, ssaawo omukuumi, ye ategeeze kyonna ky'anaaba alabye." 
Isaiah21:7 Bw'alaba ebigaali, abeebagazi ku mbalaasi babiri babiri, abeebagadde endogoyi n'abali ku ŋŋamiya, afeeyo okutegereza, ategereze nnyo.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Awo eyali akuuma n'akoowoola nti: “Ayi Mukama, buli lunaku nnyimiridde ku munaala olunaku lwonna, era buli kiro ndi mu kifo kyange ekiro kyonna." 
Isaiah21:9 Laba, abasajja bajja mu bigaali, n'ab'oku mbalaasi babiri babiri.” Ye kwe kuddamu nti: “Agudde, Babiloni agudde! N'ebifaananyi bye byonna ebya balubaale abyasirizza ku ttaka.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Wattu bantu bange, mwe abasekuddwa mu gguuliro lyange, ekyo kye mpulidde ew'Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kye mbabuulira kati." 
Isaiah21:11 Obubaka ku Duma: Waliwo ankoowoola ng'asinziira mu Seyiri: “Ggwe omukuumi, kiki ky'ogamba ku kiro? Ggwe omukuumi, kiki ky'ogamba ku kiro?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Omukuumi n'agamba nti: “Buubuno bukya, kyokka ate n'ekiro kijja. Oba mwagala kubuuza, mubuuze, mukomeewo nate.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Obubaka ku Arabiya: Mmwe ebibinja by'abasuubuzi Abadedani, abasula mu bisaka bya Arabiya," 
Isaiah21:14 muleetere abayonta amazzi; mmwe abasula mu Teema, abadduka mubasisinkane n'akookulya." 
Isaiah21:15 Kubanga badduse kitala, badduse ekitala ekisowole, mutego oguleegeddwa, n'okunyiinyittira kw'olutalo." 
Isaiah21:16 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'aŋŋambye nti: “Mu bbanga ery'omwaka, ng'obalira ku myaka gy'omupakasi, ekitiibwa kya Kedari kyonna kiriggwaawo." 
Isaiah21:17 Abalisigalawo ku basajja abakubi b'obusaale, abazira b'omu Kedari, baliba batono.” Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli y'ayogedde." 
Isaiah22:1 Obubaka ku Kiwonvu ky'Okulabikirwa: Kiki ekibatuuseeko, mulyoke mwenna mulinnye ku busolya waggulu," 
Isaiah22:2 ggwe ekibuga ekijjudde oluyoogaano, ekibuga eky'akabuguutano, ekijjudde amasanyu? Abantu bo abafumitiddwa, tebafumitiddwa kitala, era tebafiiridde mu lutalo." 
Isaiah22:3 Abafuzi bammwe bonna baddukidde wamu, bawambiddwa awatali na kasaale kalasiddwa; mwenna abaawambibwa, mwatwalibwa wamu mu busibe newandibadde nga baali baddukidde wala." 
Isaiah22:4 Kyenvudde ŋŋamba nti: “Munveeko, mutunule eri; ka nkaabe n'ennyiike; muleke kunkubagiza olw'okuzikirira kw'abaana bange.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Kubanga Omukama Katonda w'Amagye ategeseewo olunaku olw'akasattiro, okulinnyirira n'entiisa mu Kiwonvu ky'Okulabikirwa; olunaku olw'okumenya ebigo n'okuyoogaanira ku nsozi." 
Isaiah22:6 Ate Elamu akutte omufuko gw'obusaale, ebigaali n'abeebagadde embalaasi, ne Kiri abikkudde engabo." 
Isaiah22:7 Ebiwonvu byo ebirungi ddala bijjudde ebigaali, ate abeebagadde embalaasi basimbiddwa ku miryango." 
Isaiah22:8 Aggyeewo ebitaasa Yuda. Ku olwo mwerabirako ku byokulwanyisa by'Olubiri lw'Ekibira; 
Isaiah22:9 mwalaba ebifulukwa bwe byali ebingi mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, era mwekuŋŋaanyiza amazzi mu Kidiba ky'Emmanga;" 
Isaiah22:10 mwabala amayumba g'omu Yeruzaalemu, ne mumenya amayumba okunyweza bbugwe." 
Isaiah22:11 Wakati w'ebigo ebibiri mwakolawo akayanja okukuŋŋanyizaamu amazzi g'Ekidiba Ekikadde. Kyokka temwatunuulira Oyo Eyakola ebyo, yadde okulowooza ku oyo eyabitegeka okuva ddi." 
Isaiah22:12 Ku olwo Omukama Katonda w'Amagye yakuyita okukaaba n'okukungubaga, okwemwa enviiri n'okwambala ebikutiya." 
Isaiah22:13 Naye laba, ate kati ssanyu na kujaganya, kubaaga nte na kutta ndiga, kulya nnyama na kunywa mwenge: “Ka tulye, tunywe, anti enkya tujja kufa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Omukama w'Amagye yennyini y'ambikkulidde kino mu matu gange nti: “Mazima ddala ekibi kino tekiribasonyiyibwa okutuusa lwe mulifa.” Omukama Katonda w'Amagye bw'agambye. 
Isaiah22:15 Omukama Katonda w'Amagye agamba bw'ati: “Genda ew'omuweereza ono, eri Sebuna omukulu w'olubiri, omugambe nti:" 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Oyagala ki wano? Ani yakuwa obuyinza olyoke weesimire wano entaana? Weesimira waggulu entaana nnyini, weewuukulira mu lwazi ekisulo." 
Isaiah22:17 Weetegereze, ggwe ow'amaanyi, Omukama ajja kukukwatamu olukwata, akumegguze eri." 
Isaiah22:18 Ddala ajja kukuzingazinga ng'omupiira, akukanyuge eri mu nsi eyeetadde; eyo gy'olifiira; era eyo ebigaali byo ebirungi obulala gye biribeera, ggwe ensonyi eri ennyumba ya mukama wo." 
Isaiah22:19 Nzija kukugoba ku kifo kyo, ojja kusiguukululwa ku buweereza bwo.’" 
Isaiah22:20 “Ku olwo ndiyita omuweereza wange Eliyakimu, mutabani wa Kilukiya," 
Isaiah22:21 ne mmwambika omunagiro gwo, ne mmusiba ekimyu kyo, obuyinza bwo ne mbussa mu mikono gye. Y'alibeera kitaawe w'abatuuze b'omu Yeruzaalemu n'ab'omu nnyumba ya Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Nzija kussa ku kibegabega kye ekisumuluzo ky'Ennyumba ya Dawudi; bw'aliggulawo tewaliba aggalawo; bw'aliggalawo tewaliba aggulawo. 
Isaiah22:23 Nzija kumusimba ng'enkondo mu kifo ekinywevu, aliba nnamulondo ey'ettendo eri ennyumba ya kitaawe." 
Isaiah22:24 Ekitiibwa kyonna eky'ennyumba ya kitaawe kyesigamye ku ye, abaana n'abazzukulu, buli bibumbe byayo byonna, okuva ku bikopo okutuuka ku nsumbi." 
Isaiah22:25 Ku olwo,” Omukama w'Amagye y'ayogera, “enkondo ekomereddwa mu kifo ekinywevu erisimbuka; egenda kukuulibwa egwe, n'obuzito bwonna obugiwanikiddwako bulitemwawo.” Omukama y'ayogedde." 
Isaiah23:1 Obubaka ku Tiiro: Mukube ebiwoobe, mmwe amaato ga Tarusisi, kubanga Tiiro kizikiridde, tewasigadde nnyumba oba mwalo; amawulire ago gaabatuukako nga gava e Kittimu." 
Isaiah23:2 Musiriikirire mmwe ab'omu bizinga, mmwe abasuubuzi ab'omu Sidoni; ababaka bo abawunguka ennyanja" 
Isaiah23:3 ku mazzi amangi; obugagga bw'ofuna ye ŋŋano ya Sikori n'amakungula ga Kiyira; yafuuka katale ka mawanga gonna. 
Isaiah23:4 Kwatibwa ensonyi, ggwe Sidoni, kubanga ennyanja eyogedde, ggwe ekigo ky'ennyanja nti: “Nze sirumwangako yadde okuzaala, sikuzanga baana balenzi yadde abawala.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Amawulire bwe galituuka e Misiri, balinyolwa olw'ebigambo ebiva e Tiiro." 
Isaiah23:6 Muwunguke, mugende e Tarusisi, mukube ebiwoobe mmwe abatuuze b'oku kizinga." 
Isaiah23:7 Kino kye kibuga ky'amasanyu gammwe, ekibuga eky'ennaku eza ddi na ddi, ebigere byakyo ebyakitwalanga okusenga ewala?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ani yategekera Tiiro ekintu kino, ekyo ekyatikkiranga engule, abasuubuzi baakyo nga bakungu, ekyalina abatunzi abatutumufu mu nsi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Omukama w'Amagye ye yakitegeka, okufeebya olwetumbu lwa buli kitiibwa, n'okutoowaza abo bonna abatutumufu ku nsi." 
Isaiah23:10 Ggwe muwala wa Tarusisi, lima ensi yo okufaanana ng'olubalama lwa Kiyira, kubanga tokyalina mwalo." 
Isaiah23:11 Omukama agololedde omukono gwe ku nnyanja, ayuuguumizza obwakabaka; awadde ekiragiro ku Kanaani okuzikiriza ebigo byakyo." 
Isaiah23:12 N'agamba nti: “Tokyaddayo kubinuka, ggwe embeerera muwala wa Sidoni abetenteddwa. Situka, wungukira e Kittimu; naye nayo tolisangayo buweerero.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Tunuulira ensi y'Abakaludeya; be bantu, sso si Bassuri, abafudde Sidoni ekisulo ky'ebisolo. Beezimbira eminaala egy'okulumba, ebigo byakyo ne babisuula ku ttaka, ne bakifuula bifulukwa." 
Isaiah23:14 Mmwe amaato ga Tarusisi, mukube ebiwoobe, kubanga ekigo kyammwe kizikiriziddwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Mu budde obwo Tiiro kiryerabirwa okumala emyaka nsanvu ng'ebbanga ery'omulembe gwa kabaka omu. Emyaka ensanvu nga giyise, ekirigwa ku Tiiro kiriba nga bwe bayimba mu luyimba lwa malaaya nti:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Kwata entongooli, weetooloole ekibuga, ggwe malaaya eyeerabiddwa; suna bulungi, yimba ennyimba nnyingi, olyoke ojjukirwe.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Ng'emyaka ensanvu giyise, Omukama alirambula Tiiro, olwo nno ate kiridda mu busuubuzi bwakyo, kirikola obwamalaaya n'obwakabaka bw'amawanga gonna agali ku nkulungo y'ensi." 
Isaiah23:18 Naye eby'amaguzi byakyo n'amagoba birisingirwa Katonda; tebiriterekebwa yadde okutuumibwa awamu, wabula eby'amaguzi byakyo biriweerezebwa abo ababeera mu maaso g'Omukama bafune ebyokulya bingi n'engoye amakula." 
Isaiah24:1 Laba, Omukama ajja ensi okugireka ettayo, agivunjage; aligyonoona endabika yaayo, asaasaanye abagirimu," 
Isaiah24:2 ng'abantu bwe bali, ne kabona bw'aliba; ng'omuddu bw'ali, ne mukama we bw'aliba; ng'omuzaana bw'ali, ne mugole we bw'aliba; ng'omuguzi bw'ali, n'omutunzi bw'aliba; ng'omuwozi bw'ali, n'omwewozi bw'aliba; ng'abanja bw'ali, n'abanjibwa bw'aliba." 
Isaiah24:3 Ensi erifuukira ddala matongo, eriyayibwa n'enyagibwa, kubanga Omukama y'ayogedde ekigambo ekyo." 
Isaiah24:4 Ensi ekaaba, ewotose, ensi eyongobedde, ekala; abatutumufu mu nsi bayongobedde." 
Isaiah24:5 Ensi ejaajaamiziddwa abantu baayo, kubanga bamenye amateeka, boonoonye ebiragiro, bamenye endagaano ey'olubeerera." 
Isaiah24:6 N'olw'ekyo ekikolimo ensi kigimazeewo, n'abantu baayo bazzizza omusango; n'olw'ekyo abagirimu bookeddwa, musigadde batono." 
Isaiah24:7 Evviini ensu ekalira n'omuzabbibu guwotose; bonna abaali ab'omutima omusanyufu basinda; 
Isaiah24:8 Essanyu ly'eŋŋoma lyakoma, emizira gy'ababinuka gyalekera awo; essanyu ly'entongooli lyakoma." 
Isaiah24:9 Tebanywa mwenge nga bwe bayimba; n'abanywa omwenge gubakaayirira. 
Isaiah24:10 Ekibuga ekyaseseggulwa kati matongo, buli nnyumba nzigale, tekyayingirwa." 
Isaiah24:11 Mu nguudo baleekaana olw'ebbula ly'omwenge; essanyu lyonna obudde bulizibiridde, okusanyuka kuggweeredde ddala mu nsi." 
Isaiah24:12 Ekibuga kyonna matongo, wankaaki w'ekibuga ayasiddwayasiddwa." 
Isaiah24:13 Bwe kiriba kityo mu nsi, era ne mu mawanga, kyenkana nga bwe banyeenya omuti gw'oliva, ng'okulondalonda emizabbibu ng'amakungula gaagyo gawedde." 
Isaiah24:14 Bakangula ku maloboozi gaabwe, ne bayimba n'essanyu, baliyima ebuvanjuba ne babbiramu ekitiibwa ky'Omukama." 
Isaiah24:15 Olw'ekyo, ebuvanjuba mugulumize Omukama; mutendereze erinnya ly'Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli ku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Isaiah24:16 Tuwulira ennyimba eziva mu nsonda z'ensi nti: “Ekitiibwa kibeere eri Oyo Omutuukirivu.” Naye nze ŋŋamba nti: “Nzigwekerera, nzigwekerera! Zinsanze! Abalimba balyamu nkwe; n'obulimba bwabwe beeyongedde okulyamu enkwe.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Entiisa, bunnya, na bitimba bye bitulindiridde, ggwe ali mu nsi." 
Isaiah24:18 Alidduka ng'awulidde ekyekango, aligwa mu bunnya; aliva mu bunnya, aligwa mu kitimba. Ebiyiriro by'eggulu bigguse, n'omusingi gw'ensi gukankana." 
Isaiah24:19 Ensi esesegguse, ensi eyatiseyatise ensi enyeenyezeddwa yonna." 
Isaiah24:20 Ensi etagala butagazi ng'omutamiivu, eyuuga ng'akasiisira k'omukuumi; obujeemu bwayo bugizitoowerera; bw'eneegwa, teddeyo kusituka." 
Isaiah24:21 Ku olwo Omukama alibonereza ab'obuyinza waggulu mu ggulu, ne bakabaka b'ensi ku nsi." 
Isaiah24:22 Balisibirwa wamu ng'abasibe abasibire mu nvuba, baliggalirwa mu kkomera, ate nga wayise ennaku nnyingi balibonerezebwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Omwezi guliswala n'enjuba ensonyi zirigikwata; kubanga Omukama w'Amagye aliramula ku lusozi Siyoni ne mu Yeruzaalemu, alyoleka abakadde ekitiibwa kye." 
Isaiah25:1 Ayi Mukama, ggwe Katonda wange, nnaakugulumizanga, nnaatenderezanga erinnya lyo; kubanga okoze ebyamagero. Bye wateesa okuva edda bituufu era bikakafu." 
Isaiah25:2 Kubanga ekibuga okifudde ntuumu ya mayinja, ekibuga ekigumu okifudde ekifulukwa; ekigo ky'abagwira tekikyali kibuga; tekiriddayo kuzimbibwa nate." 
Isaiah25:3 Abantu ab'amaanyi banaakugulumizanga olw'ekyo; ekibuga ky'abantu abakambwe kinaakutyanga. 
Isaiah25:4 Kubanga obadde buddukiro bwa munaku; obuddukiro bw'omunaku mu buyinike, obwewogomo mu kibuyaga akunta, ekittuluze mu bbugumu. Kubanga omukka gw'abakambwe guli nga kikuŋŋunta afuuwa ekisenge," 
Isaiah25:5 ng'ebbugumu mu nsi enkalu. Wakkakkanya oluyoogaano lw'abagwira; ng'ebbugumu mu kisiikirize ky'ekire, n'oluyimba lw'abakambwe bwe luggweerera." 
Isaiah25:6 Ku lusozi luno Omukama w'Amagye kw'alitegekera abantu bonna ekijjulo ekya ssava, embaga ey'omwenge omuka, ey'ennyama ensava n'omwenge omusengejje obulungi." 
Isaiah25:7 Ku lusozi olwo aliggyawo ekiremba ekibuutikidde abantu bonna, essuuka ebisse amawanga gonna," 
Isaiah25:8 alizikiriza olumbe emirembe gyonna. Omukama Katonda alisangula amaziga mu maaso gonna; aliggyawo obuswavu bw'abantu be mu nsi yonna, kubanga Omukama ayogedde." 
Isaiah25:9 Ku olwo baliyimba nti: “Ddala, oyo ye Katonda waffe; twassa essuubi lyaffe mu ye n'atulokola; ono ye Omukama, tumwesiga; ka tusanyuke, tujagulize mu bulokozi bwe." 
Isaiah25:10 Omukono gw'Omukama guliwaŋŋama ku lusozi luno; naye Mowabu alirinnyirirwa wansi we ng'essubi bwe lirinnyirirwa mu kinnya ky'ebisasiro. 
Isaiah25:11 Bajja kwanjalira ku kyo emikono ng'omuwuzi bw'ayanjala emikono ng'awuga. Omukama alikkakkanya okwekuza kwe, nga tafudde ku kutetenkanya kwa mikono gye." 
Isaiah25:12 Ajja kumenyawo ebigo byammwe ebiwanvu n'ebisenge byakwo; alibissa wansi, alibituusa ku ttaka mu nfuufu.”" 
Isaiah26:1 Ku olwo oluyimba luno luliyimbirwa mu nsi ya Yuda nti: “Tulina ekibuga ekigumu, ataddewo obulokofu ng'ekigo n'emiziziko gyakyo." 
Isaiah26:2 Mugguleewo emiryango, eggwanga ettuukirivu erikuuma obwesigwa liyingire." 
Isaiah26:3 Olikuuma mu ddembe ettuufu oyo ow'omutima omukakafu, kubanga yasuubira mu ggwe." 
Isaiah26:4 Mwesigenga Omukama emirembe gyonna, kubanga Omukama Katonda Lwazi olw'olubeerera." 
Isaiah26:5 Atoowazizza abasula waggulu, n'assa wansi ekibuga eky'ebigo ebiwanvu, akissizza ddala ku ttaka; n'akituusa mu nfuufu." 
Isaiah26:6 Ekigere kikisambirira, ekigere ky'omunaku, ekigere ky'omwavu." 
Isaiah26:7 “Ekkubo ly'omutuukirivu dduŋŋamu; akakubo akalungi ak'omutuufu okaluŋŋamya. 
Isaiah26:8 Tukulindiridde ayi Mukama, nga tuli mu kkubo ery'ennamula yo; okusuubirira mu ggwe n'okujjukira erinnya lyo, ekyo omwoyo gwaffe kye gwegomba." 
Isaiah26:9 Omwoyo gwange gukuyaayaanira ekiro, ku makya omutima gwange gukunoonya. Anti ennamula yo bw'eba mu nsi, abantu mu nsi bategeera obutuukirivu." 
Isaiah26:10 Ekisa ne bwe kigirirwa omubi, tategeera butuukirivu; ne mu nsi erimu obutuufu bongera kukola bubi, tebalaba bukulu bwa Mukama." 
Isaiah26:11 Ayi Mukama, omukono gwo gugoloddwa, naye bo tebagulaba. Ka balabe bw'otakabanira abantu bo, baswale; ka omuliro ogwategekerwa abalabe bo gubasenkenye." 
Isaiah26:12 “Ayi Mukama, olituwa emirembe; anti byonna bye tukoze ggwe obitukoledde." 
Isaiah26:13 Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, abafuzi abalala ng'oggyeeko ggwe batufuze, naye erinnya lyo lyokka lye tumanyi." 
Isaiah26:14 Kati bafu, tebaliddamu kubeera balamu; bisiikirize, tebalizuukira. Wababonereza n'obazikiriza, wabasangulira ddala mu bujjukizi." 
Isaiah26:15 Ayi Mukama, eggwanga waligaziya, eggwanga waligezza, ne weefunira ettendo. Ensalo zonna ez'ensi wazongerayo." 
Isaiah26:16 “Ayi Mukama, mu buyinike baakunoonya, ne beegayirira nga bamuumuunya bwe wababonereza." 
Isaiah26:17 Era kyenkana ng'omukazi ali olubuto, bwe yeenyoola n'aleekaana mu kulumwa, naffe bwe tuli mu maaso go, ayi Mukama." 
Isaiah26:18 Twafuna olubuto, ne twenyoola mu bulumi, naye twazaala mpewo; ensi tetwagireetera bulokofu, n'olw'ekyo abantu b'omu nsi tebaazaalibwa." 
Isaiah26:19 Naye abafu bo bagenda kuddamu obulamu; emibiri gyabwe girizuukira. Mmwe abali mu nfuufu, muzuukuke, mutendereze. Kubanga ssuulwe owuwo musulo gwa kitangaala; olimusuula ku nsi y'abaafa." 
Isaiah26:20 “Bantu bange, mugende, muyingire mu bisenge byammwe, mweggalire; mumale akabanga nga mwekwese, okutuusa obusungu lwe bunaayita." 
Isaiah26:21 Kubanga Omukama ajja kuvaayo mu kisulo kye, okubonereza ab'oku nsi olw'ebibi byabwe; n'ensi eryoleka omusaayi ogwagiyiirwako, tekyasobola kwongera kukisa baagittirwako.”" 
Isaiah27:1 Ku olwo Omukama n'ekiso ekigumu, ekinene ate eky'amaanyi, alibonereza Leviyatani, essota eryemulula, Leviyatani, essota erikuba amakata, alitta ssessota w'omu nnyanja." 
Isaiah27:2 Ku olwo: “Ennimiro y'emizabbibu esanyusa; mugiyimbire: 
Isaiah27:3 Nze Omukama, nze ngikuuma; ngifukirira buli kaseera; ngikuuma emisana n'ekiro, sikulwa nga wabaawo agyonoona." 
Isaiah27:4 Siriiko busungu. Singa nno nalina nkandwa na maggwa okulwanyisa! Nandyambalaganye nago; nandigateeredde gonna omuliro. 
Isaiah27:5 Singa nno baddukidde gye ndi! Bajje tuteeseganye; bajje tuteeseganye.” 
Isaiah27:6 Gye bujja Yakobo alisimba emirandira, Yisirayeli alitojjera n'ayanya, n'ajjuza ensi yonna n'ebibala." 
Isaiah27:7 Amukubye nga bwe yakuba eyamukuba, nandiki attiddwa ng'abaamutta bwe battibwa?" 
Isaiah27:8 Oyambalaganye naye n'omutabaala, n'omuwaŋŋangusa; n'olufuuwa olw'obusungu amufuuye eri, nga ku lunaku olwa kikuŋŋunta ow'ebuvanjuba." 
Isaiah27:9 N'olwa kino omusango gwa Yakobo gujja kumusonyiyibwa. Bino bye bibala byonna ebiriva mu kuggyawo ekibi kye: amayinja gonna ag'omwaliiro bw'aligaasa obulere, ng'amayinja ag'ennoni; bwe watalisigala mpagi ya Asera n'emu ng'eyimiridde, yadde emyaliiro gy'obubaani." 
Isaiah27:10 Ekibuga ekinywevu kati matongo, awabadde wasengeddwa abantu waabuliddwa, kisigadde ttayo ng'eddungu; obuyana buliira omwo, bugalamira omwo, amatabi buleka makalu." 
Isaiah27:11 Amatabi gaakyo bwe gakala, ne gamenyeka; abakazi bajja ne bagakumisa omuliro. Kubanga abantu bano tebalina kutegeera, n'Eyabakola kyaliva alema okubakwatirwa ekisa; Eyababumba talibalaga busaasizi." 
Isaiah27:12 Ku olwo okuva ku Mugga okutuuka ku Kiwonvu Misiri Omukama aliwewa eŋŋano; mulikuŋŋaanyizibwa kinnoomu, mmwe abantu ba Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah27:13 Era ku olwo eŋŋombe y'omwanguka erifuuyibwa; abo abazaayidde mu Assuri n'abaagoberwa mu Misiri, balijja ne basinza Omukama mu lusozi olutukuvu mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Zikusanze engule y'okwekuza kw'abatamiivu ba Efurayimu, n'ekimuli kyayo ekigenda kisiiwuuka eky'ekitiibwa ky'ettendo lye, ebiri waggulu w'ekiwonvu ekigimu eky'abo abameggeddwa omwenge!" 
Isaiah28:2 Omukama wuuyo alinawo omu ow'obuyinza ate ow'amaanyi; nga kibuyaga ow'omuzira oba nga kikuŋŋunta ddekabusa, ng'enkuba ey'amaanyi oba ng'enkuba ey'amataba, alibamegguza n'amaanyi wansi." 
Isaiah28:3 Engule ey'okwekuza kw'abatamiivu ba Efurayimu eririnnyirirwa n'ebigere," 
Isaiah28:4 n'ekimuli ekigenda kisiiwuuka eky'ekitiibwa eky'ettendo lye, ekiri waggulu w'ekiwonvu ekigimu, kiriba ng'ekibala ky'omukunyu ekyengera ng'ekyeya tekinnaba; omuntu olukiraba n'akikwatako mu ngalo ze, alya kirye." 
Isaiah28:5 Ku olwo Omukama w'Amagye y'aliba engule ey'ekitiibwa, omuge ogw'ettendo ogw'abaliba basigaddewo ku bantu be;" 
Isaiah28:6 y'aliba omwoyo ogw'obwenkanya mu oyo atudde okulamula, era amaanyi g'abo abazza olutalo ennyuma nga luli ku wankaaki." 
Isaiah28:7 Kituufu na bano bataga olw'evviini, abayenja olw'omwenge: bakabona n'abalanzi bataga olw'omwenge, evviini ebamazeemu, bayenja olw'omwenge, bawaba mu kulabikirwa, beesittala nga bawa ennamula." 
Isaiah28:8 Anti emmeeza zaabwe zonna zijjudde bisesemye, tewali kafo katabikkiddwa bugwenyufu." 
Isaiah28:9 “Ani gw'anaayigiriza okumanya? Ani gw'anannyonnyola obubaka?” Abaana abaakaleka okuyonka, oba abo abakaggyibwa ku mabeere?" 
Isaiah28:10 Na bino: “Kiragiro ku kiragiro, kiragiro ku kiragiro; tteeka ku tteeka, tteeka ku tteeka; akatono wano, akatono wali.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Kubanga abantu aboogera engeri n'ab'ennimi engwira Omukama mw'aliyita okwogera n'abantu bano. 
Isaiah28:12 Kino Omukama kye yali abagambye nti: “Wano wa kuwummulira, muleke akooye awummule;” era nti “Buno buwummuliro,” naye tebaayagala kuwuliriza." 
Isaiah28:13 N'olw'ekyo nno, ekigambo ky'Omukama ku bo kirifuuka: Kiragiro ku kiragiro, kiragiro ku kiragiro; tteeka ku tteeka, tteeka ku tteeka; akatono wano, akatono wali. Balyoke bagende, basirittuke ekyennyumannyuma, bamenyeke, bagwe mu mutego, bawambibwe." 
Isaiah28:14 N'olw'ekyo, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama, mmwe abaduuze, mmwe abafuga abantu bange abali mu Yeruzaalemu;" 
Isaiah28:15 anti mubadde mwetenda nti: “Twakola endagaano n'olumbe, twakkaanya n'amagombe, akabenje ddekabusa bwe kaliyita, tekalitutuukako, kubanga obulimba tubufudde obuddukiro bwaffe, n'obukuusa tubufudde obwewogomo.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Omukama Katonda agamba kino nti: “Laba, nsimbye ejjinja mu Siyoni, ejjinja eggumu, ejjinja eryakakasibwa, erinyweza ensonda, ery'omuwendo, ejjinja eggumu olw'omusingi; alikkiriza tagenda kwesittala." 
Isaiah28:17 Obutuufu ndibufuula olukoba olupima, obutuukirivu bwe ndifuula akaliiso, omuzira gw'amayinja gwe gulimalawo obuddukiro bwo obw'obulimba; n'amazzi galyanjaalira mu bwewogomo bwo." 
Isaiah28:18 Endagaano yo n'olumbe erisangulibwawo; okukkaanya kwammwe n'amagombe tekulisigalawo; akabenje ddekabusa bwe kaliyita, kalibalinnyirira." 
Isaiah28:19 Buli lwe kanajjanga, kanaabatwalanga; kanaayitanga ku makya buli lunaku, buli misana na buli kiro.” Obubaka buno bwe bulitegeerwa, kigenda kuleeta ntiisa njereere." 
Isaiah28:20 Kubanga ekitanda kiyinze obumpi okusobola okwegololerako, n'ekyebikkwa kifunze okukubikka wenna." 
Isaiah28:21 Omukama alisituka nga bwe yakola ku lusozi Perazimu, ajja kugugumuka nga bwe kyali mu kiwonvu ky'e Gibewoni; okutuukiriza ekikolwa kye, ekikolwa eky'engeri. akole omulimu gwe, omulimu ogutali gwa bulijjo." 
Isaiah28:22 Kale nno eby'okunyooma mubiveeko, sikulwa ng'envuba zammwe zinyuunyuulibwa, kubanga mpulidde ekiragiro eky'okuzikiriza eggwanga lyonna nga kiva ew'Omukama Katonda w'Amagye." 
Isaiah28:23 Mutege amatu, muwulire eddoboozi lyange; mutegereze, muwulire bye ŋŋamba:" 
Isaiah28:24 “Alima aw'okusiga, alima butamala? Abeera awo ng'akabaalirira, ng'akuubakuba amavuunike ge?" 
Isaiah28:25 Bw'amala okwanjala, tasigamu mpinnamuti, n'amansaamu ne kontamiiri, eŋŋano n'agisimba mu kifo kyayo ne sayiri awawe, ate kusemesi n'abeera ku lubibiro?" 
Isaiah28:26 Anti Katonda we amusomesa ennamula, amuyigiriza mu ngeri entuufu." 
Isaiah28:27 Empinnamuti tezisekulibwa na musekuzo, yadde ekigaali okuyisibwa ku kontamiiri; wabula empinnamuti zikubibwa na muggo, ne kontamiiri awuulibwa buwuulibwa." 
Isaiah28:28 Eŋŋano esekulibwa busekulibwa? Nedda, tewuulibwa butamala; bw'agiyisaako nnamuziga y'ekigaali kye n'embalaasi ze, tagisa." 
Isaiah28:29 Na kino nno kiva ew'Omukama w'Amagye; eyeewuunyisa mu kubuulirira, era omukulu mu magezi.”" 
Isaiah29:1 Zikusanze ggwe Ariyeli, Ariyeli, ggwe ekibuga Dawudi gye yakuba ensiisira. Ka omwaka guyite, n'omulala bwe gutyo, ka n'embaga enkulu zeetooloole." 
Isaiah29:2 Kyokka era ndirabya Ariyeli ennaku; walibaawo okukuba ebiwoobe n'okukungubaga, alimbeerera ng'ekyoto ky'omwaliiro." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndikuzinda ne nkwetooloola, ndikwebunguluza eminaala, ndikuzimbako enkomera okwetooloola." 
Isaiah29:4 Ng'omaze okussibwa wansi, olyogerera ku ttaka wansi; oliyima mu nfuufu okumuumuunya by'oyagala okwogera, eddoboozi lyo liriva wansi mu ttaka ng'ery'omuzimu, olyogera bwama ng'osinziira mu nfuufu." 
Isaiah29:5 Kyokka ebbiina ly'abalabe bo liriba ng'olufufugge lw'enfuufu, n'ebbiina ly'abakambwe liriba ng'ebisusunku ebikuŋŋunsibwa. Amangu ddala, mu kabanga bubanga," 
Isaiah29:6 Omukama w'Amagye alijjira mu kubwatuka, musisi n'eddoboozi eddene, mu kikuŋŋunta, mu kibuyaga ne mu nnimi z'omuliro ogubengeya." 
Isaiah29:7 Ebbiina ly'amawanga gonna agalwanyisa Ariyeli, n'ago agamulumba, agazinda ekigo kye n'okumulabya ennaku, galiba ng'ekirooto, ng'okwefaanaanyiriza kw'ekiro;" 
Isaiah29:8 ng'omuyala aloota ng'alya, n'azuukuka ng'enjala ye ekyamuluma, era ng'omuyonta aloota ng'anywa, n'azuukuka nga muyongobevu, ng'akyali muyonta, n'ebbiina ly'amawanga gonna agalwanyisa olusozi Siyoni bwe liriba." 
Isaiah29:9 Muwuniikirire, mwewuunye, muzibe amaaso gammwe, mubeere bamuzibe; mutamiire, sso si vviini, mutage, sso si lwa mwenge." 
Isaiah29:10 Kubanga Omukama ababundugguliddeko omwoyo gw'otulo, amaaso gammwe agazibye, mmwe abalanzi, n'emitwe gyammwe agibisse, mmwe abalabi." 
Isaiah29:11 Okulabikirwa kwa bino byonna mmwe kubafuukidde ng'ebigambo ebiri mu kitabo ekisibiddwako envumbo. Bwe bakiwa omuntu asobola okusoma, ne bamugamba nti: “Soma kino,” abagamba nti: “Sisobola, kubanga kisibiddwako envumbo.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Ate bwe bakiwa atasobola kusoma, ne bamugamba nti: “Soma kino,” agamba nti: “Simanyi kusoma.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Omukama agamba nti: “Abantu bano bansemberera na kamwa bumwa, n'ekitiibwa bampa kya ku mimwa bumwa, emitima gyabwe gindi wala, n'okuntya kwe bantyamu, biragiro by'abantu bye bayigiriza." 
Isaiah29:14 Awo nno nzija kwewuunyisa abantu bano nate n'ebyamagero eby'omuddiriŋŋanwa. Amagezi g'abagezi galizikirira, n'okutegeera kw'abategeevu kulibulawo.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Zibasanze abakka wansi ekkuzimu okukweka Omukama enteesa zaabwe, ng'ebikolwa byabwe babikola mu nzikiza, ne bagamba nti: “Ate ani atulaba? Ani alimanya?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Mmwe ebintu mubifuddefudde. Omubumbi oyinza okumuyita ebbumba? Ekintu ekikoleddwa kiyinza okugamba akikoze nti: “Si ye yankola”? Yadde entamu okugamba omubumbi nti: “Tategeera”? 
Isaiah29:17 Tesigadde akabanga katono Lebanoni efuuke ennimiro engimu, ate ennimiro engimu efaanane ng'ekibira?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ku olwo bakiggala baliwulira ebigambo eby'omu kitabo, n'amaaso ga bamuzibe galiva mu kibululu n'ekizikiza ne galaba." 
Isaiah29:19 Abeetoowaze baliddamu okusanyukira mu Mukama; n'abanaku balijaguliza mu Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli. 
Isaiah29:20 Kubanga ab'amaanyi galibaggwa abanyoomi balibulawo, n'abo bonna abatunuulidde okukola obubi, balikutulwako," 
Isaiah29:21 abo n'ebigambo byabwe abaasinzisanga abantu emisango, abatega emitego oyo ayeewozaako mu mbuga, n'obujulizi obw'obulimba abalemesa omutuufu." 
Isaiah29:22 N'olw'ekyo Omukama, Omununuzi wa Yiburayimu agamba bino ennyumba ya Yakobo nti: “Yakobo takyazzeeyo kukwatibwa nsonyi n'amaaso ge tegakyaddayo kuswala." 
Isaiah29:23 Bw'aliraba abaana be mu makkati ge, abo emirimu gy'emikono gyange, balitukuza erinnya lyange; balitukuza Omutukuvu wa Yakobo, baliwuniikirira olwa Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah29:24 N'abo abaawubwa mu mutima balituuka ku kutegeera, n'abo abeemulugunya balikkiriza okuyigirizibwa." 
Isaiah30:1 “Zibasanze, abaana abajeemu,” Omukama y'agamba, “abatuukiriza entegeka sso nga si yange, abakola emikago naye nga si ku lwa Mwoyo wange, ne mutuuma ebibi ku bibi;" 
Isaiah30:2 abatambula ne muserengeta e Misiri nga temunneebuuzizzaako, abaddukira eri Faraawo abakuume, abanoonya obwewogomo mu kittuluze kya Misiri." 
Isaiah30:3 Naye obukuumi bwa Faraawo bulibafuukira ensonyi, n'ekittuluze kya Misiri kiribafuukira obuswavu." 
Isaiah30:4 Newandibadde abakungu bo bali mu Zowani, n'ababaka bo nga batuuse e Kanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 bonna bagenda kuswazibwa olw'okubeera abantu abatayinza kubagasa, abatabayamba yadde okubaganyula, okuggyako okubaleetera ensonyi n'okuweebuuka.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Obubaka ku bisolo by'omu Negevu: Nga bayita mu nsi ey'ennaku n'obuyinike, ey'empologoma enkazi n'ensajja, ey'amasalambwa n'amabuukizi, obugagga bwabwe ababaka babutisse ku migongo gy'endogoyi, n'amakula gaabwe ku mabango g'eŋŋamiya, bagatwalira nnyini eggwanga eritabaliimu muganyulo," 
Isaiah30:7 babitwala mu Misiri obuyambi bwe omutali nsa; kyenva mmuyita 'Rakabu-Nnantaganyula'! 
Isaiah30:8 Kale nno, gendayo, okibawandiikire ku kipande, kiwandiike mu kitabo, kibeere bujulizi gye bulijja emirembe n'emirembe." 
Isaiah30:9 Kubanga bano bantu bajeemu, baana balimba, abaana abataagala kuwuliriza njigiriza ya Mukama;" 
Isaiah30:10 bagamba abalabi nti: “Mulekere awo okulabikirwa”, n'abalanzi nti: “Temutulangira bituufu; mutubuulire bisanyusa; mutubuulire bya kwefaanaanyiriza." 
Isaiah30:11 Lino ekkubo mulireke, muve mu bukubo buno; mutuggyirewo Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli.”" 
Isaiah30:12 N'Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli kyava agamba nti: “Kubanga ng'ekigambo kino mukigaye, ne musuubirira mu kukola obubi ne mu bulyake, ne mwesiga ebyo," 
Isaiah30:13 kale nno ekibi kino kiribabeerera ng'ekisenge ekiwanvu ekibomole, ekibunduukiridde, ekinaagonnomoka amangu ddala." 
Isaiah30:14 Kiryatika ng'ensumbi ne kimulungukira ddala, ne wabulawo n'akatundu kaakyo akasangibwa okukuŋŋaanyizaako amanda okuva ku kyoto, yadde akaggyo okusenesa amazzi okuva mu luzzi.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Omukama Katonda, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: “Mu kweddamu ne mu butebenkevu mwe mulirokolerwa; mu busirise ne mu bwesige mwe muliba amaanyi gammwe; naye mmwe temwakyagala.”" 
Isaiah30:16 Wabula mwagamba nti: “Nedda! Tujja kuddukira ku mbalaasi.” Kale ggwe mulidduka! Era nti: “Tugenda kwebagala mbalaasi eziwenyuka.” N'olw'ekyo n'ababagoba bagenda kubeera bawenyusi. 
Isaiah30:17 Olukumi lugenda kudduka ng'omu yekka y'ababoggoledde, ate abataano bwe balibaboggolera mugenda kudduka, okutuusa lwe mulisigala ng'omulongooti ku ntikko y'olusozi, ng'ebendera ku kasozi." 
Isaiah30:18 Sso nno Omukama abalindirira abasaasire; kyava asituka abasaasire, kubanga Omukama ye Katonda ow'obwenkanya; beesiimye bonna abamulindirira." 
Isaiah30:19 Mmwe abantu abali mu Siyoni, ababeera mu Yeruzaalemu, temukyaddayo kukaaba; tewali kubuusabuusa agenda kubasaasira bwe mulisaba okubajuna; amangu nga yaakawulira okulaajana kwammwe agenda kubaanukula." 
Isaiah30:20 Newandibadde Omukama abaleetera ennaku ng'ekyokulya, n'obuyinike ng'ekyokunywa, kyokka Omuyigiriza wammwe taliddayo kwekisa, n'amaaso gammwe mulimulaba." 
Isaiah30:21 Oba mukyukidde ku ddyo oba ku kkono, amatu gammwe galiwulira eddoboozi emabega wammwe nga ligamba nti: “Lino lye kkubo, mwe muba mutambulira.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Olwo mulijaajaamya ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebisaanuuse bye mwasiigako ffeeza wammwe n'ebyo ebimaaleko zaabu. Mugenda kubisuula eri ng'ebiwero ebijama, nga mubirangiriza nti: “Muddire eri!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Alitonnyesa enkuba ku nsigo zo z'onoobanga osize mu ttaka, n'emmere eribala mu ttaka eriba nnyingi nga ya mwero. Ku olwo amagana go galiriira mu malundiro ageetadde." 
Isaiah30:24 N'ente n'endogoyi ezikabala ettaka zinaalyanga essubi erirungemu omunnyo erimaze okwanjalibwa n'ekiwabyo n'ekkabi. 
Isaiah30:25 Ate ku buli lusozi olugulumivu ne ku buli kasozi akawanvu, kunaabangako emyala gy'amazzi egikulukuta, ku lunaku olw'okusanjaga okunene, eminaala lwe girigwa." 
Isaiah30:26 Ekitangaala eky'omwezi kiriba ng'eky'enjuba, ate eky'enjuba kirigejja emirundi musanvu okwenkana ekitangaala eky'ennaku omusanvu, ku lunaku Omukama lw'alisiba ebiwundu by'abantu be, n'awonya n'obuvune bw'abatuusizzaako." 
Isaiah30:27 Mulabe, erinnya ly'Omukama lijja nga liva ewala, n'obusungu obubuubuuka, ne mu kire ky'omukka ekikwafu; emimwa gye gijjudde obusungu, n'olulimi lwe, muliro ogusenkenya." 
Isaiah30:28 Omukka gw'assa guli ng'omugga ogubimba, ogutumbiira okutuuka ku bulago. Akuŋŋunta amawanga mu lugali olw'okuzikiriza; assa mu mba z'amawanga eddobo erigawabya." 
Isaiah30:29 Muliyimba ng'abali mu kiro omukuzibwa embaga enkulu, ng'emitima gijaganya ng'abambuka olusozi lw'Omukama nga bafuuwa endere, ku lwazi lwa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah30:30 N'Omukama aliwuliza abantu eddoboozi lye ery'obuyinza; alibalaga omukono gwe nga gukka wansi, mu busungu obukambwe n'omuliro ogusenkenya, n'eggulu eribwatuka, kikuŋŋunta n'omuzira." 
Isaiah30:31 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama liritekemula Assuri, alimukuba n'omuggo ggwe." 
Isaiah30:32 Ate buli lukuba Omukama lw'alibakubanga n'omuggo gwe ogubonereza, luligenderanga ku nvuga y'ebide n'ennanga; alirwanyisa mu ntalo ng'omukono gwe agusitudde." 
Isaiah30:33 Tofeti yategekebwa dda, yategekebwa dda olwa kabaka. Ekinnya ky'enkoomi kyongeddwako obuwanvu n'obugazi, omuliro n'enku biri mu bungi; omukka gw'Omukama oguli ng'engezi y'ekibiriiti, gwe gunaakikuma." 
Isaiah31:1 Zibasanze abo abakkirira mu Misiri okufunayo obuyambi, abassa obwesige mu mbalaasi, abeesiga ebigaali byabwe kubanga bingi n'abeebagazi baabwe kubanga ba maanyi nnyo, naye abatafa ku Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, yadde okwebuuza ku Mukama." 
Isaiah31:2 Sso nga naye mugezi, asobola okuleeta akabenje; ebigambo bye tabijjulula. Agenda kusitukira mu mayumba g'aboonoonyi, n'ag'abo abayamba abakola obubi." 
Isaiah31:3 Abamisiri bantu, sso si Katonda, n'embalaasi zaabwe mibiri, sso si myoyo. Omukama bw'agolola omukono gwe ati, oyo ayamba alisirittuka, ne gwe bayamba agenda kugwa; bombi bagenda kuzikirira lumu." 
Isaiah31:4 Omukama bw'ati bw'aŋŋambye: “Kyenkana ng'empologoma oba omwana gw'empologoma bwe guvuumira ku kye gukutte, ekibinja ky'abasumba ne bwe kikungibwa okugirumba, n'etetiisibwa kuleekaana kwabwe, yadde okutawaanyizibwa enduulu zaabwe, n'Omukama w'Amagye bw'alikkirira okulwanira ku lusozi Siyoni ne ku busozi bwalwo." 
Isaiah31:5 Era ng'ebinyonyi bwe byetooloola mu bbanga, n'Omukama w'Amagye bw'alitaasa atyo Yeruzaalemu; alikikuuma n'akinunula; alikiyitako n'akiwonya.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Mmwe abantu ba Yisirayeli, mudde eri oyo gwe mwajeemera ne muyitiriza." 
Isaiah31:7 Kubanga ku olwo, buli omu alikanyuga eri ebifaananyi bye ebya balubaale ebya ffeeza ne zaabu bye mwakozesa engalo zammwe enkozi z'ebibi." 
Isaiah31:8 “Assuri alittibwa ekitala ekitali kya musajja, ekitala ekitali kya muntu kiribakavvula; balidduka ekitala, naye abavubuka baabwe balissibwa ku kasanvu." 
Isaiah31:9 Olwazi lwabwe luligwa olw'okutya, abagabe baabwe balisattira olwa bendera y'olutalo.” Omukama y'ayogedde, nnannyini muliro oguli mu Siyoni, nnannyini kabiga akali mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Isaiah32:1 Laba, kabaka ajja kufugira mu butuukirivu, n'abakungu baliramulira mu butuufu." 
Isaiah32:2 Buli muntu aliba bwekwekero bwa mpewo, bwewogomo mu budde obw'omuyaga, aliba ng'omwala gw'amazzi mu nsi enkalu, ng'ekittuluze ky'olwazi olunene mu nsi enkalu." 
Isaiah32:3 Olwo amaaso g'abalaba tegalizibibwa, n'amatu g'abo abawulira galiwuliriza." 
Isaiah32:4 Omutima gw'abadumi gulijjamu obwegendereza, n'olulimi lw'abanaanaagize lulirasa ebigambo ate bulungi." 
Isaiah32:5 Omusiru taliddayo kuyitibwa mukungu, yadde omugobya okutwalibwa ng'oweekitiibwa." 
Isaiah32:6 Kubanga omusiru ayogera bya busiru; omutima gwe gulowooza bubi: kuyisa bya kikafiiri, kwogera bitabulatabula ku Mukama; kuleka omuyala nga taliiko k'alidde, n'omuyonta kumuleka nga talina k'anywedde." 
Isaiah32:7 Omugobya amakubo ge gaba mabi: atetenkanya kukola bibi: kuzikiriza munaku ng'awaayiriza, ensonga z'omunaku ne bwe ziba entuufu." 
Isaiah32:8 Naye ow'ekitiibwa alowoolereza bya kitiibwa; naye yennyini eby'ekitiibwa kw'anywerera. 
Isaiah32:9 Mmwe abakazi abeetuulidde entende, musituke, muwulire eddoboozi lyange; mmwe abawala abeemanyi mwekka, mutegereze bye njogera:" 
Isaiah32:10 Mu bbanga lya mwaka nga gumu, mmwe abeemanyi mwekka, mujja kutengera; anti okukungula emizabbibu kulikoma, n'okukuŋŋaanya ebibala tekulibaawo." 
Isaiah32:11 Mmwe abeetuulidde entende, muwuniikirire, mmwe abeemanyi mwekka mutengere. Mweyambule, musigale busa, mwesibe ebikutiya mu biwato." 
Isaiah32:12 Mukungubage olw'ennimiro amatendo, olw'emizabbibu egibala;" 
Isaiah32:13 olw'ensi y'abantu bange: ensi eduumye enkandwa n'amaggwa; mukaabire amayumba gonna omusanyukirwa, n'ekibuga kino eky'amasanyu," 
Isaiah32:14 kubanga olubiri lulyabulirwa, ekibuga ekifumbekedde abantu kirifuuka matongo. Ekigo n'omunaala gw'omukuumi birifuuka malungu emirembe gyonna, endogoyi ez'ettale gye zinyumirwa okubeera, birifuuka malundiro ga magana;" 
Isaiah32:15 Okutuusa Mwoyo ava mu ggulu lw'alituyiibwako, eddungu ne lifuuka ennimiro engimu, n'ennimiro engimu n'eduuma n'erabwa ng'ekibira." 
Isaiah32:16 Olwo obulungi bulibukala mu ddungu, n'obutuukirivu bulitebenkera mu nnimiro engimu." 
Isaiah32:17 Ate ekiriva mu butuukirivu kiriba ddembe, ebibala by'obutuukirivu, butebenkevu na mirembe emirembe gyonna." 
Isaiah32:18 Abantu bange balibeera mu bisulo eby'eddembe, mu mayumba ameesiifu, ne mu bifo ebisiriikirivu." 
Isaiah32:19 Newandibadde ekibira kiriseseggulwa kyonna, n'ekibuga ne kiseeteezebwa kyonna," 
Isaiah32:20 mwesiimye mmwe abasiga awali buli tuzzi, abaleka ente ezirima n'endogoyi ne birya butaala." 
Isaiah33:1 Zikusanze ggwe azikiriza sso nga tozikirizibwanga, ggwe omusazi w'enkwe sso nga tewabanga akulyamu lukwe! Bw'olimala okuzikiriza, naawe olizikirizibwa, bw'olimala okusalira enkwe, naawe balikulyamu olukwe." 
Isaiah33:2 Ayi Mukama, tusaasire; mu ggwe mwe mutuli essuubi. Beera maanyi gaffe buli makya, obulokofu bwaffe mu budde obw'ennaku." 
Isaiah33:3 Eddoboozi bwe libwatuka, abantu badduka; bw'osituka, amawanga ne geesasa." 
Isaiah33:4 Omunyago gwo gukuŋŋaanyizibwa nga lusejjera bw'akuŋŋaanyizibwa; baguyiikira ng'ekikuukuulu ky'enzige bwe kiyiika. 
Isaiah33:5 Omukama agulumiziddwa, kubanga asula waggulu; alijjuza Siyoni obulungi n'obutuukirivu." 
Isaiah33:6 Y'aliba ensibuko y'obunywevu mu budde bwo; enkuluze y'obulokofu, amagezi n'okutegeera; okutya Omukama bwe bugagga bwe." 
Isaiah33:7 Laba, abazira baabwe bakungubagira mu nguudo; ababaka b'emirembe bakaaba n'okunyolwa." 
Isaiah33:8 Amakubo gafudde, tewakyali bayita mu nguudo; endagaano emenyeddwa; abajulirwa banyoomeddwa, tewali afiibwako." 
Isaiah33:9 Ensi ekungubaga, eyongobedde; Lebanoni aswadde, awotookeredde; Saroni afuuse nga Araba; Basani ne Karumeli bawaatudde." 
Isaiah33:10 “Nzija kusituka,” Omukama bw'agamba, “kati nzija kutendebwa, kati nzija kugulumizibwa." 
Isaiah33:11 Olubuto mulifuna lwa bisusunku; mulizaala ssubi; omukka gwammwe muliro, ogubasenkenya." 
Isaiah33:12 Abantu balyokebwa okutuusa nga bafuuse nnoni; balyokebwa omuliro ng'amaggwa agatemeddwa. 
Isaiah33:13 Mmwe abali ewala, muwulire bye nkoze; nammwe abali okumpi, mukkirize amaanyi gange.”" 
Isaiah33:14 Aboonoonyi ab'omu Siyoni batidde; abataliimu ddiini encukwe ebakutte: “Ani mu ffe ayinza okubeera awali omuliro ogusenkenya? Ani mu mmwe ayinza okubeera mu kabiga ak'olubeerera? 
Isaiah33:15 Oyo atambulira mu butuukirivu n'ayogera ebituufu, agaya amagoba agavudde mu bulyake, akunkumula engalo ne zitakwata ku nguzi, azibiikiriza amatu ge n'atawulira nkwe za kuyiwa musaayi, n'azibiriza amaaso galeme kulaba bibi," 
Isaiah33:16 oyo y'alisula eyo waggulu; obuddukiro bwe kiriba kigo eky'enjazi; emmere ejja kumuweebwanga n'amazzi tegamuggwengako.” 
Isaiah33:17 Amaaso go gagenda kulaba kabaka mu bulungi bwe, galitunuulira ensi ekutte eyo n'eyo." 
Isaiah33:18 Omutima gwo gulirowoolereza ku ntiisa: “ Omuwandiisi ali ludda wa? Eyasoloozanga emisolo ali ludda wa? Eyabalanga eminaala ali ludda wa?” 
Isaiah33:19 Toliddayo kulaba ku beekuza abo, abantu ab'enjogera etategeerekeka, ab'olulimi olutali lugunjufu, olutategeerekeka." 
Isaiah33:20 Tunuulira Siyoni, ekibuga eky'enkuŋŋaana zaffe enkulu. Amaaso go galiraba Yeruzaalemu, ekisulo ekiri emirembe, ensiisira eterinyeenyezebwa; erina enkondo ezitagenda kukuulibwa, emiguwa gyayo tewaliba na gumu gulikutuka." 
Isaiah33:21 Eyo nno Omukama Katonda gy'anaabeeranga ku lwaffe, ekifo eky'emigga eminene n'emyala egy'amaanyi; obwato obw'enkasi tebuliyitako, n'amaato amanene tegaliwungukako." 
Isaiah33:22 Kubanga Omukama ye mulamuzi waffe, Omukama y'atuteekera amateeka, Omukama ye kabaka waffe, y'alitulokola." 
Isaiah33:23 Emiguwa gyo girebedde, tegiyinza kunyweza mulongooti, n'okuwanirira ettanga nga lyanjulukuse. Olwo walibaawo omunyago munene ogw'okugabana, n'abalema balyetwalira ku lwayo." 
Isaiah33:24 Era tewaliba mutuuze agamba nti: “Ndi mulwadde; n'ebibi by'abatuuze baamu birisonyiyibwa.” 
Isaiah34:1 Musembere kumpi, mmwe amawanga, mutegereze, mmwe abantu, mutege okutu. Ensi ewulire, na buli kyonna ekigijjuzizza; amawanga g'ensi, na buli kyonna ekigisibukamu." 
Isaiah34:2 Kubanga Omukama asunguwalidde amawanga gonna, anyiigidde amagye gaabwe gonna. Alayidde obutalekaawo n'omu, abawaddeyo okusanjagibwa." 
Isaiah34:3 Abantu baabwe abattiddwa balisuulibwa ebweru, emirambo gyabwe giriwunya ekivundu; ensozi ziritonnyolokoka omusaayi gwagyo." 
Isaiah34:4 Amagye g'eggulu gonna galimerenguka, n'eggulu lirizingibwako ng'omuzingo. Amagye gaabwe gonna ag'eggulu galikunkumuka ng'ebikoola bwe bikunkumuka ku muzabbibu, ng'ebikoola ebikunkumuka ku mukunyu." 
Isaiah34:5 Kubanga ekitala kyange kinywedde mu ggulu ne kikkuta; laba, kikka okusalira Edomu omusango, ku bantu be nsalidde okuzikirizibwa." 
Isaiah34:6 Ekitala ky'Omukama kibunye omusaayi, kivulubanye amasavu, omusaayi gw'obuliga n'ogw'embuzi ennume, amasavu g'ensigo z'endiga. Kubanga Omukama agenda kutambira e Bozura, alina okusanjaga okunene mu Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Sseddume z'embogo zirigwira wamu nazo, ente ennume ne zisseddume ez'amaanyi. Ettaka lyabwe lirinnyikkira omusaayi, n'enfuufu yaabwe erijeebeera amasavu." 
Isaiah34:8 Kubanga Omukama alina olunaku kw'anaawoolerera eggwanga, omwaka ogw'okusasula olw'omusango gwa Siyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Emigga gya Edomu gijja kufuuka nvumbo, enfuufu yaayo efuuke bibiriiti ebyaka, ettaka lyayo lifuuke envumbo eyaka." 
Isaiah34:10 Tegenda kuzikira ekiro n'emisana; omukka gwayo gulitumbiira emirembe n'emirembe. Okuva ku zzadde erimu okutuusa ku ddala erisigala matongo; tewaliba addamu kugiyitamu emirembe gyonna. 
Isaiah34:11 Ebiwuugulu eby'amatu ne nnamunnungu birigifuula yaabyo; amakufufu ne nnamuŋŋoona binaasulanga omwo; Omukama ajja kugikubako olukoba olupima olw'obutabanguko, n'akaliiso ak'obutabaamu nsa." 
Isaiah34:12 Abakungu baayo tebalibaayo na kantu kagiyisa bwakabaka; abaami baayo bonna balibulawo. 
Isaiah34:13 Maggwa ge galimera mu mbiri zaayo; ne kamyu n'amatovu mu bigo byayo; erifuuka nfo ya bibe na kisulo kya maaya," 
Isaiah34:14 Ensolo enkambwe mwe zinaasisinkananga n'empisi, emisambwa gye girikoowooleranga ginnaagyo, olubugabuga gye luweererako, ne lwezuulira eyo obuwummuliro." 
Isaiah34:15 Eyo ekiwuugulu gye kirizimba ekisu kyakyo ne kibiikirayo amagi; kirigaalula ne kibikkirira obwana bwakyo mu kisiikirize kyakyo; era eyo ensega gye zirikuŋŋaanira, buli emu ne ginnaayo." 
Isaiah34:16 Munoonyereze, musome mu kitabo ky'Omukama: Ku bino tewali na kimu kiribulayo, tewali kiribulwako kinnaakyo, kubanga akamwa ke ke kalagidde, era Mwoyo we y'alibikuŋŋaanya awamu." 
Isaiah34:17 Abikubidde akalulu; omukono gwe gubipimidde ebitundu byayo ku lukoba olupima; birigifuula yaabyo emirembe gyonna; biribeeranga omwo emirembe gyonna. 
Isaiah35:1 Eddungu n'olukoola birisanyuka, ensi enkalu erijaguza, n'emulisa ebimuli ng'eddanga;" 
Isaiah35:2 eryanyiza ddala; erijaganya n'esanyuka. Eriweebwa ekitiibwa kya Lebanoni, n'obuyinza bwa Karumeli ne Saroni; baliraba ekitiibwa ky'Omukama, obuyinza bwa Katonda waffe." 
Isaiah35:3 Mugumye emikono egiragaye; munyweze entegetege ezifambye; 
Isaiah35:4 ab'emitima emitiitiizi mubagambe nti: “Mugume, muleke kutya. Wuuno Katonda wammwe ajja okuwoolera eggwanga; aleeta empeera ya Katonda, ajja kujja okubawonya.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Olwo amaaso ga bamuzibe galizibuka, n'amatu ga bakiggala galigguka." 
Isaiah35:6 Olwo omulema alyebuukiza ng'akaweewo n'olulimi lwa kasiru luliyimba n'essanyu. Amazzi galifumbukula mu lukoola, n'emigga mu ddungu." 
Isaiah35:7 Omusenyu ogwokya gulifuuka kidiba, n'ettaka erirakasidde liripukula ensulo z'amazzi; awaali obuwummuliro bw'ebibe walimera muddo, biwuuwa na bitoogo." 
Isaiah35:8 Awo walibaawo oluguudo olunene, luliyitibwa: 'Oluguudo Olutukuvu'; abatali balongoofu tebalirutambulirako __ yekka y'aliba ow'okutambulira ku Luguudo luno__ n'ababuyabuya tebalirubungeeteramu." 
Isaiah35:9 Teriba mpologoma, yadde ensolo enkambwe yonna okululinnyamu; ensolo tezirisangwako, naye abanunule be balirutambulirako." 
Isaiah35:10 Abanunule b'Omukama balikomawo, baliyingira mu Siyoni nga bayimba, essanyu ery'olubeerera nga balyetisse ku mitwe gyabwe; balifuna okujaganya n'essanyu; ennaku n'okusinda biriddukira wala." 
Isaiah36:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ena ogwa kabaka Kezekiya, Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assuri yalumba ebibuga byonna ebya Yuda okuli n'ebigo, n'abiwamba." 
Isaiah36:2 Awo kabaka wa Assuri n'asindika okuva e Lakisi omusenero omukulu ng'ali n'eggye ddene ewa Kezekiya mu Yeruzaalemu. N'ayimirira okumpi n'olusalosalo lw'amazzi olw'Ekidiba eky'Engulu ekiri ku kkubo eriraga ku Nnimiro y'Omwozi. 
Isaiah36:3 Awo Eliyakimu mutabani wa Kilukiya katikkiro w'olubiri, Sebuna omuwandiisi ne Yowa akuuma ebyafaayo, mutabani wa Asafu, ne bafuluma okubasisinkana." 
Isaiah36:4 Omusenero omukulu n'abagamba nti: “Mugambe Kezekiya nti: Kabaka omukulu, kabaka wa Assuri kino ky'agamba: ‘Weesiga ki ekyo ekikuyinula?" 
Isaiah36:5 Obukodyo n'amaanyi eby'okulwana by'olowooza nti obirina, ebyo bigambo bugambo bya ku mumwa. Weesiga ani okuguma n'onjeemera?" 
Isaiah36:6 Laba kati mbu weesiga Misiri, oyo omuggo ogw'olumuli olusasambuse, olusala omukono gw'omuntu ne lumufumita singa alwesigamako. Ne Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri bw'ali ku bonna abamwesiga." 
Isaiah36:7 Bwe munaagamba nti: “Twesiga Mukama Katonda waffe,” si ye oyo Kezekiya gwe yaggyirawo ebifo ebigulumivu n'emyaliiro gye, n'alagira Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu nti: “Ku mwaliiro guno kwe munaasinzizanga?”" 
Isaiah36:8 Kale nno singawo ne mukama wange kabaka wa Assuri. Nzija kukuwa embalaasi enkumi bbiri singa ggwe oneezuulira abanaazeebagala. 
Isaiah36:9 Osobola otya okuwangula yadde omugabe asingayo obutene mu baweereza ba mukama wange abasembayo, newandibadde nga weeyinula Misiri olw'ebigaali n'abeebagazi?" 
Isaiah36:10 Olowooza nze okujja mu kifo kino nkisaanyeewo Omukama tamaze kuŋŋamba? Omukama yennyini y'aŋŋambye nnumbe ensi eno ngisaanyeewo.’ ” 
Isaiah36:11 Eliyakimu mutabani wa Kilukiya, Sebuna ne Yowa ne bagamba omusenero omukulu nti: “Tukwegayiridde, yogera n'abaweereza bo mu Lwarami, kasita tulutegeera; toyogera naffe mu Luyudaaya ng'abantu abali ku bbugwe bawulira.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Omusenero omukulu n'ayanukula nti: “Olowooza mukama wange yantumye njogere ebigambo bino eri mukama wo n'eri ggwe wekka? Teyantumye n'eri abasajja abatudde waggulu ku bbugwe, okufaanana nga ggwe aboolekedde okulya obubi bwabwe n'okunywa omusulo gwabwe?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Omusenero omukulu n'ayimirira, n'aleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene mu Luyudaaya n'agamba nti: “Muwulire ebigambo bya kabaka omukulu, kabaka wa Assuri." 
Isaiah36:14 Kabaka kino ky'agamba: ‘Kezekiya aleme kubawubisa; tasobola kubawonya. 
Isaiah36:15 Kezekiya aleme na kubakkirizisa kwesiga Mukama ng'agamba nti: “Omukama mazima anaatuwonya; ekibuga kino tekijja kuweebwayo mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri.” 
Isaiah36:16 Muleke kuwuliriza Kezekiya.’ Kabaka wa Assuri kino ky'agamba: ‘Mukkaanye, muveeyo mujje gye ndi; olwo buli omu ajja kulya ku muzabbibu gwe ne ku mukunyu gwe, anywe amazzi ng'agaggya mu nzizi ze," 
Isaiah36:17 okutuusa lwe najja ne mbaggyawo ne mbatwala mu nsi efaanana n'eyammwe; ensi ey'eŋŋano n'evviini; ensi ey'emigaati n'ennimiro z'emizabbibu. 
Isaiah36:18 Muleke kuwuliriza Kezekiya oyo abalimbalimba ng'agamba nti: “Omukama anaatulokola.” Waali wabaddewo lubaale w'eggwanga lino oba liri eyali awonyezza abantu be mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri? 
Isaiah36:19 Balubaale b'e Kamati ne Arupadi bali ludda wa? Balubaale b'e Sefaruvayimu bali ludda wa? Balubaale b'omu Samariya bali ludda wa? Samariya baakiwonya mu mikono gyange? 
Isaiah36:20 Baluwa balubaale b'ensi eno oba eri abaali baggye ensi yaabwe mu mikono gyange? Olwo nno n'Omukama lw'anaggya Yeruzaalemu mu mikono gyange?’ ” 
Isaiah36:21 Naye abantu ne basirika busirisi, tebaayanukula kantu, kubanga kabaka yali abalagidde nti: “Temumunyega.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Eliyakimu mutabani wa Kilukiya katikkiro w'olubiri wamu ne Kezekiya, Sebuna omuwandiisi ne Yowa akuuma ebyafaayo, mutabani wa Asafu, ne bagenda ewa Kezekiya ng'ebyambalo babiyuzizza, ne bamubuulira omusenero omukulu by'agambye." 
Isaiah37:1 Kabaka Kezekiya olwabiwulira, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye, n'ayambala ekikutiya n'ayingira mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Isaiah37:2 Yasindika ewa Yisaaya omulanzi mutabani wa Amozi Eliyakimu katikkiro w'olubiri, ne Sebuna omuwandiisi na bonna abakulembera mu bakabona, nga bambadde ebikutiya." 
Isaiah37:3 Ne bamugamba nti: “Kezekiya kino ky'agamba: ‘Luno olunaku lwa buyinike, lwa kugugumbulwa, lwa nsonyi ng'abaana abatuuse ku kuzaalibwa naye nga temuli twanyi tubazaala." 
Isaiah37:4 Oboolyawo ng'Omukama Katonda wo awulidde ebigambo byonna eby'omusenero omukulu, mukama we kabaka wa Assuri gw'atumye okuvuma Katonda omulamu. Oboolyawo Omukama Katonda wo anaabonereza ebigambo by'awulidde. Kale nno sabira kaawonawo akyasigaddewo.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:5 Abaweereza ba kabaka Kezekiya bwe bajja ewa Yisaaya," 
Isaiah37:6 Yisaaya n'abagamba nti: “Kino kye munaagamba mukama wammwe: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Leka kutya bigambo by'owulidde, ebyo obulenzi bwa kabaka wa Assuri bye bunvumye." 
Isaiah37:7 Laba, nzija kumussaamu omwoyo nti olunaawulira olugambo, ng'addayo mu nsi ye; eyo mu nsi gye nnaamukubira n'ekitala.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Omusenero omukulu n'addayo, kubanga yali awulidde nti kabaka wa Assuri yali avuddeyo mu Lakisi; yasanga kabaka wa Assuri alumbye Libuna." 
Isaiah37:9 Sennakeribu yali awulidde nti: “Tiruwaka kabaka w'e Kuusi asitudde, ajja okukutabaala,” n'asindika ababaka ewa Kezekiya ng'abagambye nti:" 
Isaiah37:10 “Bino mubigambe Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda nti: ‘Katonda wo gwe weesiga takuyinula ng'ogamba nti: “Yeruzaalemu tekiweebwe mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri.” 
Isaiah37:11 Ggwe wennyini weewulirira bakabaka ba Assuri bye baakola ensi zonna, nga bwe baazisaanyaawo. Ggwe onoowona?" 
Isaiah37:12 Balubaale b'amawanga bajjajjange ge baaleka amatongo baasobola okubawonya? Nga Gozani, Karani, ne Rezefi, n'abantu ba Edeni abaali mu Teli Assari?" 
Isaiah37:13 Kabaka w'e Kamati ali ludda wa? Ate ow'e Arupadi, ne kabaka w'ekibuga Sefaruvayimu, owa Ena n'ow'e Yivva?’ ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Kezekiya n'aggya ebbaluwa eyo mu mikono gy'ababaka n'agisoma, n'ayambuka mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'agyanjululiza mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Isaiah37:15 Kezekiya ne yeegayirira mu maaso g'Omukama ng'agamba nti: 
Isaiah37:16 “Ayi Mukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, awaŋŋamye wakati mu bakerubi, wekka ggwe Katonda afuga obwakabaka bwonna ku nsi. Ggwe wakola eggulu n'ensi." 
Isaiah37:17 Tega okutu kwo, ayi Mukama, owulire; zibula amaaso, ayi Mukama, olabe; wulira ebigambo byonna ebya Sennakeribu by'aweerezza okuvuma Katonda omulamu." 
Isaiah37:18 Kituufu, ayi Mukama, bakabaka ba Assuri baazikiriza amawanga n'ensi zaabwe." 
Isaiah37:19 Balubaale baabwe baabasuula mu muliro ne babengeya, kubanga anti tebaali balubaale, wabula biti na mayinja, abantu obuntu bye baakola n'emikono gyabwe." 
Isaiah37:20 Naye nno, ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, tulokole mu mikono gye, buli bwakabaka bwonna obw'ensi bumanye nti wekka, ayi Mukama, ggwe Katonda.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi n'aweereza Kezekiya obubaka ng'agamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Olw'essaala gy'osabye gye ndi ku lwa Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assuri," 
Isaiah37:22 kino kye kigambo Omukama ky'amwogeddeko: “ ‘Embeerera muwala wa Siyoni akugaye n'akusekerera; muwala wa Yeruzaalemu anyeenya mutwe emabega wo. 
Isaiah37:23 Ani gw'ojooze? Ani gw'ovumye? Ani gw'owogganidde? Ani gw'okimbye? Ye Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli! 
Isaiah37:24 Oyise mu baweereza bo n'ovuma Omukama. N'ogamba nti: “N'enkumuliitu y'ebigaali byange mpalampye entikko z'ensozi, mu masosso ga Lebanoni. Natema entolookyo zaakwo empagguufu, ne sipulaasi waakwo omulungi. Nakyesonseka okutuuka gye kikoma ekibira gye kibisse." 
Isaiah37:25 Nasima enzizi ne nnywa amazzi; n'ebigere byange ne nkaza emigga gyonna egy'e Misiri.” 
Isaiah37:26 “ ‘Towuliranga nti nakitegeka kuva dda? Obwedda n'obwedda nga nkitegeka. Kati nkituukirizza: Nti ojja kuzikiriza ebibuga okuli ebigo bifuuke ntuumu za mayinja. 
Isaiah37:27 Ababibeeramu obuyinza bubawedde; batekemuse, baswadde. Bafuuse ng'omuddo gw'ettale, ng'omuddo ogwakamera, ng'essubi ly'oku kasolya, erikala nga terinnakula." 
Isaiah37:28 Mmanyi bw'otuula, bw'ogenda ne bw'odda, ko n'obusungu bw'onninako." 
Isaiah37:29 Olw'okubeera obusungu bw'onninako, nga n'okwekuza kwo kutuuse mu matu gange, kale nno nzija kussa empeta mu nnyindo zo n'eddobo mu kamwa ko, nkuddizzeeyo mu kkubo mwe wafuluma ng'ojja.’" 
Isaiah37:30 “Kati ggwe, Kezekiya, kano ke kabonero kw'onoolabira: “Mu mwaka guno ojja kulya ebyemeza byokka; mu mwaka ogwokubiri olye ebimererezi. Naye mu gwokusatu musige, mukungule, musimbe emizabbibu, mulye ebibala byakwo." 
Isaiah37:31 Kaawonawo asumattuse mu nnyumba ya Yuda alisimba emirandira wansi, n'assaako ebibala waggulu." 
Isaiah37:32 Kubanga mu Yeruzaalemu mulivaamu abalisigalawo, ne ku lusozi Siyoni bakaawonawo abasumattuse. Okutakabana kw'Omukama w'Amagye kwe kulikola ekyo." 
Isaiah37:33 “Kale nno Omukama kino ky'ayogera ku kabaka wa Assuri: “ ‘Tajja kuyingira kibuga kino, yadde okukirasaamu akasaale. Talikisemberera ng'akutte engabo, yadde okukituumako embibiro." 
Isaiah37:34 Mu kkubo eryamuleeta mw'aliddirayo; ekibuga kino talikiyingira;’ bw'agambye Omukama," 
Isaiah37:35 ‘nzija kutaasa ekibuga kino nkiwonye ku lwange ne ku lwa Dawudi omuweereza wange.’ ” 
Isaiah37:36 Mu kiro ekyo kyennyini, malayika w'Omukama yagenda mu lusiisira lw'Abassuri n'attamu abasajja akasiriivu kamu mu emitwalo munaana mu enkumi ttaano. Abantu bwe baazuukuka ku makya, bonna nga mirambo, bafu!" 
Isaiah37:37 Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assuri n'amenya olusiisira, n'agenda. Yaddayo mu Nineve, n'abeera eyo." 
Isaiah37:38 Olumu bwe yali ng'asinza mu kiggwa kya Nisuroki lubaale we, batabani be Adurameleki ne Sareezeri ne bamutta n'ekitala, ne baddukira mu nsi y'e Ararati; Esari-Kaddoni mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
Isaiah38:1 Mu nnaku ezo Kezekiya yalwala, n'ajula okufa. Yisaaya omulanzi mutabani wa Amozi n'ajja gy'ali n'amugamba nti: “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Tereeza eby'ennyumba yo kubanga ojja kufa, tojja kulama.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:2 Kezekiya n'akyukira eri ekisenge ne yeegayirira Omukama nti: 
Isaiah38:3 “Nkwegayiridde, ayi Mukama, jjukira nga bwe natambulira mu maaso go mu butuufu n'omutima ogukwemalizza, nga nkola ekyo kyokka ekikusanyusa.” Kezekiya n'akaaba nnyo." 
Isaiah38:4 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yisaaya nga kigamba nti: 
Isaiah38:5 “Ddayo ogambe Kezekiya nti: ‘Kino ky'agamba Omukama Katonda wa jjajjaawo Dawudi: Mpulidde essaala yo, ndabye n'amaziga go; ku bulamu bwo nzija kwongerako emyaka kkumi n'etaano." 
Isaiah38:6 Ggwe n'ekibuga kino nzija kubawonya mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assuri. Nzija kutaasa ekibuga kino. 
Isaiah38:7 Kano ke kanaaba akabonero kw'onookakasiza nti Omukama anaatuusa ky'asuubizza. 
Isaiah38:8 Nzija kulagira ekisiikirize enjuba ky'ebadde ekoze ng'ekkirira kidde emabega amadaala kkumi ku madaala ga Akazi. 
Isaiah38:9 Enjuba n'edda emabega amadaala kkumi ge yali ekkiridde.’ ” 
Isaiah38:10 Kino kye kiwandiiko kya Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda bwe yassuuka mu bulwadde bwe: “Nagamba nti mu buvubuka bw'obulamu bwange ndi wa kusitula; nsibiddwa ku miryango gy'emagombe emyaka gyange gyonna egisigadde. 
Isaiah38:11 Ne ŋŋamba nti sigenda kulaba Mukama Katonda mu nsi y'abalamu, siriddayo kulaba muntu n'omu n'abo abali mu nsi." 
Isaiah38:12 Ekisulo kyange akyabizza n'akinzigyako, kyenkana nga weema y'omusumba; nzinzeeko obulamu bwange ng'omulusi, ansaze ku wuzi; okuva ku makya okutuukira ddala ekiro owumbako obulamu bwange." 
Isaiah38:13 Ndaajana okutuusa ku makya; amagumba gange gonna agabwatudde ng'empologoma; okuva ku makya okutuukira ddala ekiro owumbako obulamu bwange. 
Isaiah38:14 Nkaaba ng'akataayi oba nga ssekanyolya, nsindogoma ng'ejjiba; amaaso gange gakooye olw'okulalamira eggulu. Ayi Mukama, nnyigiriziddwa, jjangu onneeyimirire." 
Isaiah38:15 “Ye nno njogere ki? Ayogedde nange, ye yennyini kino y'akikoze. Nzija kutambulanga nga neewombeese emyaka gyange gyonna olw'okunyolwa mu mutima gwange." 
Isaiah38:16 Ayi Mukama, abantu babeera balamu olw'ebintu bino, n'omwoyo gwange gubisangamu obulamu. Mponya obulwadde, mpa mbeere mulamu nate." 
Isaiah38:17 Nagwa mu buyinike lwa bulungi bwange; wabula omwoyo gwange waguwonya obunnya obw'okuzikirira, kubanga ebibi byange byonna obikasuse enkoto." 
Isaiah38:18 Anti amagombe tegasobola kukugulumiza, n'olumbe telusobola kukutendereza; abo abakkirira mu bunnya tebakyasuubira mu bwesigwa bwo." 
Isaiah38:19 Abalamu, abalamu be bakwebaza nga nze bwe nkola ku lwa leero; bakitaabwe b'abaana baababuulira ku bwesigwa bwo." 
Isaiah38:20 Omukama alindokola, olwo tunaayimbanga ku bivuga eby'enkoba obulamu bwaffe bwonna mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama.”" 
Isaiah38:21 Yisaaya yali abalagidde nti: “Baddire ekitole ky'entontogolo z'omukunyu empotose, bakisiige ku kiwundu kiwone.”" 
Isaiah38:22 Kezekiya yali abuuzizza nti: “Kabonero ki kwe nnaategeerera nti nnaayambuka mu nnyumba y'Omukama?” 
Isaiah39:1 Mu budde obwo Merodaki-Balaadani mutabani wa Balaadani kabaka w'e Babiloni yaweereza ebbaluwa n'ekirabo ewa Kezekiya, kubanga yali awulidde ku kulwala n'okuwona kwa Kezekiya." 
Isaiah39:2 Kezekiya yayaniriza ababaka, n'abalaga byonna ebyali mu nnyumba ye ey'enkuluze: ffeeza, zaabu, ebirungo, emizigo egy'akaloosa, ennyumba y'ebyokulwanyisa, ne byonna ebyasangibwa mu nkuluze ye. Tewali na kimu mu lubiri lwe oba wonna mu bwakabaka bwe Kezekiya ky'ataabalaga." 
Isaiah39:3 Yisaaya omulanzi n'ajja ewa kabaka Kezekiya n'amubuuza nti: “Abasajja abo bagambye ki, ye bavudde wa okujja gy'oli?” Kezekiya n'amuddamu nti: “Bavudde mu nsi ya wala, bavudde Babiloni.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Yisaaya n'amubuuza nti: “Balabye ki mu lubiri lwo?” Kezekiya n'amuddamu nti: “Byonna ebiri mu lubiri lwange babirabye; mu nkuluze yange mpaamu kye sibalaze.” 
Isaiah39:5 Yisaaya kwe kugamba Kezekiya nti: “Wulira Omukama w'Amagye ky'agamba: 
Isaiah39:6 ‘Kale nno ennaku zijja kutuuka, byonna ebiri mu lubiri lwo n'ebyo bajjajjaabo bye baatereka n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero bitwalibwe e Babiloni; tewalisigalawo kantu,’ Omukama y'agamba." 
Isaiah39:7 ‘N'abamu ku zzadde lyo, bennyini abafuluma mu ggwe, be weezaalidde, balitwalibwa ne bafuuka abalaawo mu lubiri lwa kabaka w'e Babiloni.’ ”" 
Isaiah39:8 Kezekiya n'agamba Yisaaya nti: “Ekigambo ky'Omukama ky'oyogedde kirungi.” Anti muli yali agamba nti: “Mu budde bwange liriba ddembe na butebenkevu.” 
Isaiah40:1 “Mubakubagize, mubakubagize abantu bange,” Katonda wammwe bw'agamba." 
Isaiah40:2 “Mwogere na kisa eri Yeruzaalemu, mulangirire gy'ali nti obudde obw'okuweereza buwedde n'ekibi kye kisonyiyiddwa; mu mukono gw'Omukama afunyeemu ekibonerezo kya mirundi ebiri olw'ebibi bye byonna.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Eddoboozi lireekaana nti: “Mutegeke ekkubo ly'Omukama mu ddungu; muluŋŋamize Katonda waffe oluguudo olunene mu lukoola. 
Isaiah40:4 Buli kiwonvu kijjuzibwe na buli lusozi n'akasozi biseeteezebwe; awali ebisirikko watandaazibwe, awali ebifunvu waseeteere.”" 
Isaiah40:5 Olwo ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kiryeyoleka, n'abantu bonna wamu balikiraba, kubanga kamwa ka Mukama ke koogedde." 
Isaiah40:6 Eddoboozi ligamba nti: “Leekaana.” Ko nze: “Ndeekaane ki?” “Buli muntu yenna muddo, n'ekitiibwa kye kiri ng'ekimuli eky'ettale." 
Isaiah40:7 Omuddo gukala, ekimuli kiwotoka, kubanga omukka gw'Omukama gukifuuwako; mazima ddala abantu muddo buddo." 
Isaiah40:8 Omuddo gukala, ekimuli kiwotoka, naye ekigambo kya Katonda waffe kisigalawo emirembe gyonna.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Linnya ku lusozi oluwanvu, ggwe aleetera Siyoni amawulire agasanyusa; kangula eddoboozi lyo oleekaane, ggwe aleetera Yeruzaalemu amawulire agasanyusa; leekaanira waggulu, totya; gamba ebibuga bya Yuda nti: “Katonda wammwe wuuno.”" 
Isaiah40:10 Omukama Katonda wuuno ajja n'amaanyi; omukono gwe gwe gumufugira; wuuno, empeera ye ali nayo; n'ebirabo bye bimukulembedde." 
Isaiah40:11 Alunda eggana lye ng'omusumba; obuliga abukuŋŋaanyiza mu mikono gye, n'abuwambaatira ku kifuba kye; eziyonsa azikulembeza kisa." 
Isaiah40:12 Ani yali ageze amazzi mu kibatu ky'omukono gwe, oba n'oluta lw'omukono gwe n'apima eggulu? Ani yali abibidde enfuufu y'oku nsi mu kibbo, obuzito bw'ensozi n'abupima mu minzaani, n'obusozi mu kigero?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ani yali alambise Mwoyo w'Omukama, yadde eyali amuyigirizza ng'omubuulirizi we?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ani gwe yali yeebuuzizzaako okumutangaaza, era ani eyamuyigiriza ekkubo ettuufu? Ani yamugunjula mu kumanya, era ani yamulaga ekkubo ly'okutegeera?" 
Isaiah40:15 Laba, amawanga gali ng'ettondo obutondo mu kalobo; era gabalibwa ng'ekkerenda obukerenda ery'enfuufu mu minzaani; ebizinga abitwala ng'akafuufu obufuufu." 
Isaiah40:16 Lebanoni tasobola kuwa nku zimala, n'ebisolo byayo tebimala ku bitambiro ebyokye." 
Isaiah40:17 Amawanga gonna gali ng'omutali kantu mu maaso ge; agalaba nga temuli kantu, temuli nsa." 
Isaiah40:18 Kale nno Katonda munaamufaananya ani? Kifaananyi ki kye munaamugeranyaako? 
Isaiah40:19 Laba ekifaananyi omuweesi akisaanuusa; omufukusi wa zaabu n'akisiiga zaabu, omufukusi wa ffeeza n'akiweeseza emikuufu egya ffeeza." 
Isaiah40:20 Omwavu atasobola kitone ng'ekyo, anoonya omuti ogutavunda, n'anoonya omukozi omukugu, akole ekifaananyi ekiteenyeenye." 
Isaiah40:21 Temumanyi? Temuwulirangako? Tebababuulirangako okuva mu masooka? Temutegeeranga okuva ensi lwe yatandika? 
Isaiah40:22 Awaŋŋamye ku nkulungo y'ensi, abantu abagirimu bali ng'amayanzi. Abamba eggulu nga minvuuli, n'alireega ng'eweema ey'okusulamu." 
Isaiah40:23 Abakungu abafuula omutali kantu, n'abafuzi b'ensi abamalamu ensa." 
Isaiah40:24 Baba baakasimbibwa, baba baakasigibwa, nga n'emirandira teginnasimba mu ttaka, n'abafuuwa ne bawotoka; kibuyaga n'abakuŋŋunsa ng'essubi." 
Isaiah40:25 “Kale nze munanfaananya ani? Ani bwe twenkana?” Omutukuvu bw'agamba. 
Isaiah40:26 Mulalamye amaaso gammwe waggulu mulabe: Bino ani yabitonda? Oyo ayitayo nnamunkukumbo w'emmunyeenye kinneemu, n'aziwa erinnya buli emu. Olw'okubeera obuyinza bwe obunene n'amaanyi ge ag'ekitalo, tewali n'emu ebulawo." 
Isaiah40:27 Ggwe Yakobo, oyinza otya okwogera, ggwe Yisirayeli, oyinza otya okugamba nti: “Ekkubo lyange likisiddwa Omukama, ensonga zange Katonda wange tazifaako”?" 
Isaiah40:28 Tomanyi? Towulirangako? Omukama ye Katonda ataggwaawo, Omutonzi eyatonda ensalo z'ensi. Talikoowa yadde okuyongobera, entegeera ye teyeekebejjeka." 
Isaiah40:29 Akooye amuwa amaanyi, omuyongobevu amwongeramu endasi." 
Isaiah40:30 N'abavubuka bakoowa ne bayongobera, n'abato basirittuka ne bagwa," 
Isaiah40:31 naye abo abasuubira mu Mukama balifuna buggya amaanyi, baliseyeeyeza ku biwaawaatiro ng'empungu; balidduka, naye tebagenda kukoowa; balitambula, naye tebagenda kuyenjebuka." 
Isaiah41:1 “Mmwe ebizinga, we ndi musirike; ka amawanga gazze buggya amaanyi gaago, gasembere kumpi googere; tusisinkane awanaaba okulamulibwa." 
Isaiah41:2 Ani yasiikuula oyo ow'ebuvanjuba, obuwanguzi gwe bugoberera buli w'assa ekigere? Oyo gw'awa amawanga, alinnyirira bakabaka mu maaso ge. Abafuula nfuufu n'ekitala kye, n'omusaale gwe abafuula ssubi empewo ly'efuuwa." 
Isaiah41:3 Abawondera ne yeeyongerayo mirembe, mu bukubo ebigere bye mwe bitalinnyangako." 
Isaiah41:4 Ani akoze kino, ani akituukirizza, ng'ayita amazadde okuviira ddala mu kusooka? Ye nze, Omukama, omubereberye era n'asembayo; ye Nze." 
Isaiah41:5 “Ebizinga byalaba ne bitya, ensonda z'ensi ne zikankana; zisembedde kumpi, ziizino zijja." 
Isaiah41:6 Buli omu ayamba munne, n'agamba muganda we nti: ‘Guma.’" 
Isaiah41:7 Omuweesi agumya omufukusi wa zaabu, n'akubya ennyondo agumya akolera ku jjinja ly'omu ssasa, ng'agamba ayunga ebyuma nti: ‘Kirungi’, olwo ekifaananyi nga bakinywezesa emisumaali, kireme kunyeenya." 
Isaiah41:8 “Naye ggwe, Yisirayeli omuweereza wange, Yakobo, ggwe gwe neeroboza, muzzukulu wa Yiburayimu mukwano gwange," 
Isaiah41:9 ggwe gwe naggya ku nkingi z'ensi, ne nkuyita okuva ku nkuzi yaayo, ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ggwe muweereza wange; nkwerobozezza, era sikusudde’," 
Isaiah41:10 leka nno kutya, kubanga nze ndi naawe; totengera, kubanga nze Katonda wo. Ndikugumya, ndikuyamba, nzija kukuwanirira n'omukono gwange ogwa ddyo omuwanguzi." 
Isaiah41:11 “Anti laba, bonna abakusunguwalira, baliswala ne basonyiwala; abakwesimbamu baliba ng'omutali kantu, balisaanawo." 
Isaiah41:12 Olinoonya abo abakwesimbamu, tolibazuula; abo abakulwanyisa baliba ng'omutali kantu, omutali nsa." 
Isaiah41:13 Kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wo, akukwata ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo, ne nkugamba nti: ‘Leka kutya, nzija kukuyamba.’" 
Isaiah41:14 Leka kutya, ggwe Yakobo akasiriŋŋanyi, ggwe Yisirayeli olubatu obubatu. Nzija kubayamba,” Omukama bw'agamba, Omununuzi wo, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah41:15 “Anti laba, nkufudde enso esa, empya ate ey'obwogi ku njuyi zombi, okuli n'amannyo. Olisa ensozi n'ozimerengula, n'obusozi olibufuula ng'essubi;" 
Isaiah41:16 olibuwewa, empewo n'ebusitula, n'embuyaga n'ebukuŋŋunsa. Kyokka ggwe ojjanga kujaguliza mu Mukama, olyetenderanga mu Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah41:17 “Abanaku n'abawamma banoonya amazzi, naye tewali; ennimi zibakaze olw'ennyonta. Nze, Omukama, nzija kubaanukula; nze, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, siribaabulira." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndifumbukula emigga ku busozi obwereere, n'enzizi mu biwonvu wakati; eddungu ndirifuula ebidiba by'amazzi, n'ensi enkalu ne ngifuula ensulo z'amazzi." 
Isaiah41:19 Mu ddungu ndisimbamu entolookyo n'obusaana, jjambula n'oliva; nditeeka mu lukoola sipulaasi, omuyovu ne faraawo," 
Isaiah41:20 abantu balabe bamanye, beetegereze bategeere nti mukono gwa Mukama gwe gukoze kino, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli y'akitonze." 
Isaiah41:21 “Muleete ensonga zammwe,” Omukama bw'agamba, “muleete empoza yammwe.” Kabaka wa Yakobo bw'agamba." 
Isaiah41:22 “Mubireete bitubuulire byonna ebinaddirira. Mutubuulire ebyakulembera tubyetegereze tumanye ebiribivaamu. 
Isaiah41:23 Mutubuulire ebigenda okubaawo gye bujja, lwe tunaategeera nti muli bakatonda. Mubeeko ekirungi oba ekibi kye mukola, tutye, tujjule ensisi." 
Isaiah41:24 Naye mazima temuliimu nsa, ne bye mukola temuli kantu; oli okubyesiga kyenyinyalwa." 
Isaiah41:25 “Emambuka ntaakuddeyo omu, ajja; omu okuva enjuba gy'eva, akoowoola erinnya lyange. Asambirira abaami ng'obudongo, ng'omubumbi bw'asamba ebbumba." 
Isaiah41:26 Ani yalangirira kino okuva mu masooka, tumumanye, obanga obudde tebunnatuuka tulyoke tugambe nti: ‘Mutuufu’? Tewali yakirangirira, tewali yakiranga, wadde eyawulira ebigambo byammwe." 
Isaiah41:27 Nze nasooka okubuulira Siyoni nti: ‘Laba, baabo.’ Ne mpeereza Yeruzaalemu eyaleeta amawulire amalungi." 
Isaiah41:28 Natunula, naye tewaali n'omu; mu bo temuli mubuulirizi, temuli ayinza kuddamu nga mbuuzizza." 
Isaiah41:29 Laba, bonna bugwenyufu busa; bye bakola temuli kantu; ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale mpewo buwewo.”" 
Isaiah42:1 “Wuuno omuweereza wange gwe mpanirira, omulonde wange omutima gwange gwe gwesiimiramu; mmutaddeko Mwoyo wange, alitwalira amawanga obwenkanya." 
Isaiah42:2 Taliwoggana wadde okuleekaana, yadde okusitula eddoboozi lye mu nguudo." 
Isaiah42:3 Olumuli olumenyese talirukutula, n'enfuuzi enyooka taligizikiza; alissaawo obwenkanya mu mazima." 
Isaiah42:4 Talinafuwa, yadde okuterebuka, okutuusa lw'alibukaza obwenkanya ku nsi; ebizinga birindirira etteeka lye.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Kino Omukama Katonda ky'agamba, oyo eyatonda eggulu n'alibamba, eyayaliirirawo ensi na byonna ebigisibukamu, awa abantu omwoyo abo abagibeerako, n'obulamu abo abagitambulirako:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Nze Omukama nakuyita mu butuukirivu; nakukwata ku mukono ne nkukuuma, ne nkussaawo obeere endagaano eri abantu, ekitangaala eri amawanga," 
Isaiah42:7 ozibule amaaso agazibye, oggye abasibe mu kkomera, oggye mu nkomyo abatudde mu nzikiza." 
Isaiah42:8 Nze Mukama; eryo lye linnya lyange; ekitiibwa kyange sikiwa mulala; wadde ettendo lyange okuliwa ebifaananyi bya balubaale. 
Isaiah42:9 Ebyaliwo luli bye bizzeemu okubaawo, biggya bye nnangirira, nga tebinnabaawo mbibabuulirirawo.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Muyimbire Omukama oluyimba oluggya; ettendo lye muliyimbe okuva ku nkingi z'ensi, mmwe abakkirira mu nnyanja na byonna ebigijjuza, nammwe ebizinga, nammwe mwenna ababibeerako." 
Isaiah42:11 Eddungu n'ebibuga byalyo bisitule amaloboozi gaabyo, n'ebyalo Kedari mw'asula; abasula mu Sela bayimbe n'essanyu, baleekaanire ku ntikko z'ensozi." 
Isaiah42:12 Bagulumize Omukama, era balangirire ettendo lye mu bizinga." 
Isaiah42:13 Omukama alivaayo ng'omuzira nnamige, ng'omutabaazi asiikuula obusungu bwe; aleekaana n'akuba enduulu, aliwangula abalabe be." 
Isaiah42:14 “Okumala akabanga mbadde nsiriikiridde, nga sinyega, neefuze; naye kati ng'omukazi ng'azaala; mpoloma, nsinda ne mpejjawejja." 
Isaiah42:15 Ensozi n'obusozi nzija kubireka ttayo, na buli kimera ekiriko nzija kukikaza; emigga ndigifuula bizinga, n'ebidiba nzija kubikaza." 
Isaiah42:16 Bamuzibe ndibakulembera mu makubo ge batamanyi, ndibayisa mu bukubo bwe batamanyangako. Enzikiza ndigifuula kitangaala mu maaso gaabwe, ebifo eby'ebisirikko ndibiseeteeza. Bino ndibikola era siribaabulira." 
Isaiah42:17 Naye abo abeesiga ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebyole, abayita ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebisaanuuse nti: ‘Mmwe balubaale baffe’, balizzibwayo emabega nga baswadde.”" 
Isaiah42:18 “Bakiggala, muwulire, nammwe bamuzibe mutunule mulabe." 
Isaiah42:19 Ani muzibe ng'omuweereza wange, ani kiggala ng'omubaka gwe natuma? Ani muzibe ng'oyo eyanneewa, oba muzibe ng'omuweereza w'Omukama?" 
Isaiah42:20 Olabye bingi, kyokka tobyekkaanya; amatu go maggule, kyokka towulira.”" 
Isaiah42:21 Olw'obutuukirivu bwe Omukama yasiima okugulumiza etteeka lye n'okulifuula ery'ekitiibwa. 
Isaiah42:22 Naye bano be bantu ababbibwa ne banyagibwa, bonna baggaliddwa mu binnya, bakwekeddwa mu makomera; bafuuse munyago, awatali na wa kubanunula; bafuuse lwayo, awatali n'agamba nti: “Bakomyeewo.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Ani mu mmwe anaawuliriza kino, oba alifaayo n'ategereza gye bujja?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ani yawaayo Yakobo eri omunyazi, ne Yisirayeli eri abamwaya? Teyali Mukama yennyini gwe twasobya? Kubanga baagaana okutambulira mu makubo ge, tebaawulira tteeka lye." 
Isaiah42:25 Kyeyava amuyiwako olunyata lw'obusungu bwe, n'obuswandi bw'olutalo, bwamwetoolooza omuliro naye teyategeera; bwamusenkenya, naye teyakissaako mutima." 
Isaiah43:1 Kale nno bino by'agamba Omukama, oyo eyakutonda, ggwe Yakobo, oyo eyakubumba, ggwe Yisirayeli: “Totya, kubanga nkununudde; nkuyise n'erinnya lyo, oli wange." 
Isaiah43:2 Bw'onooyitanga mu mazzi, nnaabeeranga naawe; bw'onooyitanga mu migga, tegirikusaanyaawo; ne bw'olitambulira mu muliro togenda kwokebwa, n'ennimi zaagwo tezirikusenkenya." 
Isaiah43:3 Kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wo, Omutuukirivu owa Yisirayeli, Omulokozi wo; mpaayo Misiri ng'omutango, ne Kuusi ne Seba mu kifo kyo;" 
Isaiah43:4 kubanga oli wa muwendo mu maaso gange; ossibwamu ekitiibwa era nkwagala; mpaayo abantu mu kifo kyo, mpaayo amawanga olw'obulamu bwo." 
Isaiah43:5 Totya, kubanga ndi naawe; abaana bo ndibaggya ebuvanjuba, ndikukuŋŋaanya okuva ebugwanjuba." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndigamba amambuka nti: ‘Baweeyo.’ N'amaserengeta nti: ‘Tobaziyiza.’ Batabani bange baggye ewala, ne bawala bange ku nkuzi y'ensi," 
Isaiah43:7 buli yenna ayitibwa erinnya lyange, gwe natonda olw'ekitiibwa kyange, gwe nabumba ne mmukola." 
Isaiah43:8 “Fulumya abantu bamuzibe, sso ng'amaaso balina, bakiggala sso ng'amatu balina." 
Isaiah43:9 Amawanga gonna gakuŋŋaane, abantu bajje wamu. Ani mu bo ayinza okulanga kino, n'alangirira gye tuli ebyakulembera? Kale baleete abajulirwa baabwe bakakase obutuufu bwabwe, n'abalala bawulire, bagambe nti: ‘Kituufu.’" 
Isaiah43:10 Muli bajulirwa bange,” Omukama bw'agamba, “omuweereza wange gwe neeroboza, musobole okummanya n'okunzikiriza, n'okutegeera nti nze nzuuyo. Tewali lubaale yansooka kukolebwa, era teriba mulala alinzirira." 
Isaiah43:11 Nze, nze Mukama; tewali mulokozi mulala wabula nze." 
Isaiah43:12 Nabuulira ne mponya, ne nnangirira; nze, sso si lubaale w'ebweru mu mmwe; muli bajulirwa bange.” Omukama bw'agamba, “Nze Katonda," 
Isaiah43:13 okuva edda lyonna, ye Nze; tewali ayinza kuggya mu mikono gyange; bwe nkola, ani ayinza okukijjulula?”" 
Isaiah43:14 Omukama kino ky'agamba, Omununuzi wammwe, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli: “Olw'okubeera mmwe, nnaasindika mu Babiloni ne nzigyayo Abakaludeya bonna abaddukirayo mu maato mwe beewaanira; okuleekaana kw'Abakaludeya kulifuuka kukungubaga." 
Isaiah43:15 Nze Mukama, Omutuukirivu wammwe, Omutonzi wa Yisirayeli, Kabaka wammwe.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Omukama kino ky'agamba, eyakola ekkubo mu nnyanja, eyakola akakubo mu mazzi ag'amaanyi," 
Isaiah43:17 eyaggyayo ebigaali n'embalaasi n'eggye ly'abatabaazi, bonna baagwa wansi, tebalisitukawo, bafuuyiddwa, bazikidde ng'enfuuzi:" 
Isaiah43:18 “Leka kujjukira byayita, yadde obutaggya mwoyo ku by'edda." 
Isaiah43:19 Laba, nkola ekiggya, kigenda kivaayo; gwe tokiraba? Nkola oluguudo mu ddungu, n'emigga mu nkoola," 
Isaiah43:20 Ebisolo eby'ettale bingulumiza, ebibe ne maaya, kubanga ntadde amazzi mu ddungu; nkola oluguudo mu ddungu, n'emigga mu nkoola, mpe ekyokunywa abantu bange be neerondera," 
Isaiah43:21 abantu be neekolera, balangirire ettendo lyange." 
Isaiah43:22 “Naye, ggwe Yakobo, tewankoowoola; ggwe Yisirayeli, wanneetamwa bwetamwa." 
Isaiah43:23 Tewandeetera buliga bwa bitambiro ebyokye, yadde okungulumiza n'ebyonziira byo. Nze sikukaluubirizanga na bitone bya buwunga, yadde okukuzitoowereza nga nkusaba obubaani." 
Isaiah43:24 Tonguliranga na ssente zo lumuli lwa kawoowo, yadde okunzikusa amasavu ag'ebitambiro byo. Wabula onzisizza mugugu gwa bibi byo, onkooyezza na misango gyo." 
Isaiah43:25 “Nze, nze wuuyo asangulawo emisango gyo ku lwange, era sirijjukira bibi byo." 
Isaiah43:26 Nzijukiza, gira twogeranye; wa empoza yo olyoke wejjeerere." 
Isaiah43:27 Jjajjaawo eyasooka yasobya, n'abataputa bo baakola ekibi gye ndi." 
Isaiah43:28 Kyennava nnyonoona abakungu b'omu Kitukuvu kyange, Yakobo ne mmuwaayo asalirwe okuzikirizibwa, ne Yisirayeli ajolongebwe.”" 
Isaiah44:1 “Kale nno wulira, ggwe Yakobo, omuweereza wange, Yisirayeli, ggwe gwe neeroboza." 
Isaiah44:2 Omukama kino ky'agamba, eyakukola, eyakubumba munda mu lubuto: Totya, ggwe omuweereza wange Yakobo, Omwagalwa, gwe neeroboza;" 
Isaiah44:3 Kubanga ndifukirira amazzi ku nsi erakasidde, n'emigga ku ttaka ekkalu; ndiyiwa Mwoyo wange ku bazzukulu bo, n'omukisa gwange ku baana bo." 
Isaiah44:4 Balitutunuka ng'omuddo mu nnimiro, ng'enzibaziba okumpi n'emyala egikulukuta." 
Isaiah44:5 Omu aligamba nti: ‘Ndi wa Mukama.’ N'omulala alyetuuma erinnya lya Yakobo, n'omundi aliwandiika n'omukono gwe nti: ‘Wa Mukama’, ne yebbulamu erinnya lya Yisirayeli.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Omukama kino ky'agamba, Kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Omununuzi we, Omukama w'Amagye: “Nze mubereberye era nze muvannyuma; okuggyako nze teri katonda mulala." 
Isaiah44:7 Ani ali nga nze? Akyasanguze; akirangirire, akinteeke mu maaso; ebyali bibaddewo okuva lwe nassaawo abantu ab'edda n'ebirijja nabyo abirage." 
Isaiah44:8 Muleke kutya yadde okutekemuka; kino saakibabuulira era ne nkirangirira okuva edda? Mmwe bajulirwa bange. Waliwo katonda omulala atali nze? Teri Lwazi; teri lwe mmanyi.” 
Isaiah44:9 Abo bonna ababumba ebifaananyi bya balubaale, tebaliimu kantu, n'ebintu bye beeyagaliramu tebirina kye bibagasa; abandibajulidde tebalaba n'okutegeera tebategeera; ensonyi zandibakutte." 
Isaiah44:10 Muntu ki akola lubaale oba abumba ekifaananyi ebitaamuganyulemu kantu?
