Isaiah44:11 Abagoberezi be aba lubaale bonna bajja kuswala; abakola ebifaananyi bya balubaale bantu buntu. Kale bonna bakuŋŋaane, beesowoleyo; bajja kukubibwa entiisa, bonna wamu baliswaluka." 
Isaiah44:12 Omuweesi akwata ekyuma ky'ensinjo n'akyengereza ku manda; akolamu ekifaananyi n'ennyondo, n'akyola n'omukono ogw'amaanyi. Enjala emuluma, n'aggwaamu amaanyi; tanywa na ku tuzzi, n'ayenjebuka." 
Isaiah44:13 Omubazzi assaako olukoba olupima n'alamba n'ekkalaamu, n'akikomola n'omusumeeni, n'akiramba n'eddiira. Akolamu ekifaananyi ky'omuntu, nga kirungi kya kitiibwa ng'omuntu, nga kya kutuula mu nnyumba." 
Isaiah44:14 Atema entolookyo, oba sipulaasi, oba omuvule. Omuti yaguleka ne gukulira eyo mu miti mu kibira. Oba yasimba omuti gw'entolookyo enkuba n'eguliisa." 
Isaiah44:15 Olwo ne gufuuka oluku okuyamba omuntu; aggyako ekibajjo n'ayota, kw'akuma omuliro n'afumbisa n'emmere; era akolamu ne lubaale n'amusinza; ayolamu ekifaananyi n'akivunnamira." 
Isaiah44:16 Ekitundu ekimu akyokya mu muliro; ku kitundu ekirala n'afumbirako emmere, n'ayokerako ennyama, n'alya n'akkuta. Ayota n'okwota nga bw'agamba nti: “Otyo! mbugumye; ndabye ku kaliro.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ebitundu ebisigalawo n'akolamu lubaale __ ekifaananyi kye, n'akivunnamira, n'akisinza. Asaba gye kiri n'agamba nti: “Ndokola, kubanga ggwe lubaale wange.”" 
Isaiah44:18 Tebaamanya kantu, era tebategeera, kubanga yabaziba amaaso baleme kulaba; n'emitima gyabwe miggale tebasobola kutegeera." 
Isaiah44:19 Tewali yeefumiitirizaako, tewali amanyi, yadde ategeera, asobola kugamba nti: “Ekitundu kyakyo nakyokya, ate ku manda gaakyo kwe nafumba emmere yange; kwe nayokera ennyama ne ndya, ate ekisigaddewo kye mba nkolamu lubaale, ekyenyinyalwa? Nvunnamire olukukku lw'omuti?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Alya vvu, endowooza enkyamu emuwubisa; takyasobola na kwenunula yadde okugamba nti: “Ekintu kino mu mukono gwange ogwa ddyo si bulimba?”" 
Isaiah44:21 Jjukiranga ebintu bino, ggwe Yakobo, kubanga oli muweereza wange, Yisirayeli; nze nakukola, oli muweereza wange; ggwe Yisirayeli sirikwerabira." 
Isaiah44:22 Ensobi zo nzeezeewo ng'ekire, n'ebibi byo nga kalenge; dda gye ndi kubanga nkununudde." 
Isaiah44:23 Ayi ggulu, yimba n'essanyu, kubanga Omukama y'akikoze; mmwe emisingi gy'ensi muleekaane; mmwe ensozi, musaakaanye ennyimba, nammwe ebibira na buli muti ogulimu, kubanga Omukama anunudde Yakobo, alaze ekitiibwa kye mu Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah44:24 Omukama kino ky'agamba, Omununuzi wo, eyakubumba mu lubuto: “Nze Mukama, eyakola byonna, eyabamba eggulu obw'omu, ne mmamba ensi; ani yali nange?" 
Isaiah44:25 Nze afulula obubonero bw'abalanzi abalimba, abalaguzi ne mbafuula abasiru, abagezi ne mbakubya akaddannyuma, amagezi gaabwe ne ngafuula ebisassalala;" 
Isaiah44:26 nze akakasa ekigambo ky'omuweereza wange, ne ntuukiriza enteesa y'ababaka bange; nze agamba Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Balikusengamu’, n'ebibuga bya Yuda nti: ‘Birizimbibwa;’ n'ebifulukwa byabwe nti: ‘Ndikusitula buggya’;" 
Isaiah44:27 nze agamba eddubi nti: ‘Kala, emigga gyo ŋŋenda kugikaza.’" 
Isaiah44:28 Nze ayogera ku Kuuro nti: ‘Oyo musumba wange;’ agenda kutuukiriza byonna bye nteesa; agenda kugamba ku Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Olizimbibwa buto’; ne ku Kiggwa nti: ‘Kibangibwe.’ ” 
Isaiah45:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba omusiige we, oyo Kuuro, gw'ayogerako nti: “Mmukutte ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, mmegguze amawanga mu maaso ge, bakabaka mbambule ebyokulwanyisa, enzigi nzimuggulirewo, emiryango gireme kuddayo kuggalibwa”:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Nzija kukukulemberamu, nseeteeze ensozi; Nzija kumenya enzigi ez'ebikomo, ntememu emiyingo egy'ebyuma." 
Isaiah45:3 Nzija kukuwa obugagga obw'omu nzikiza, obugagga obutereke mu nkiso, olyoke omanye nti: Nze Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli akukowoola ng'akuyita erinnya lyo, ne nkulamba sso nga ggwe tomanyi." 
Isaiah45:4 Olw'okubeera omuweereza wange Yakobo, ne Yisirayeli omulondemu wange, nakukoowoola nga nkuyita erinnya lyo, ne nkulamba, sso ggwe nga tommanyi." 
Isaiah45:5 Nze Mukama, teri mulala; okuggyako nze teri katonda mulala; nzija kukusiba omusipi, sso ggwe tomanyi," 
Isaiah45:6 abantu, okuva ebuvanjuba okutuusa enjuba gy'egwa, bamanye nti teri mulala okuggyako nze; nze Mukama, era teri mulala." 
Isaiah45:7 Nkola ekitangaala ne ntonda n'enzikiza; nze nkola emirembe, ne ntonda obubenje. Nze, Mukama, akola bino byonna." 
Isaiah45:8 “Ggwe eggulu, tonnyesa enkuba okuva waggulu, n'ebire bitonnye obutuukirivu; ensi eyasame esibuse obulokofu, emeze obutuufu, nze Omukama nze nabutonda." 
Isaiah45:9 “Zimusanze oyo ayombesa Eyamukola, oyo ensuwa obusuwa mu nsuwa eziri ku ttaka! Ebbumba ligamba omubumbi nti: ‘Okola ki? Ky'okoze tekuli mikono?’" 
Isaiah45:10 Zimusanze oyo agamba kitaawe nti: ‘Ozadde ki?’ Oba agamba nnyina nti: ‘Ozadde ki kino?’ 
Isaiah45:11 Omukama kino ky'agamba, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli era eyamukola: Muyinza okumbuuza ku binajjira abaana bange, yadde okumpa amateeka ku mulimu gw'emikono gyange?" 
Isaiah45:12 Nze nakola ensi, ne ntonderako n'omuntu; mikono gyange gye gyabamba olubaale, ne nnamunkukumbo yenna aliko ne mmuwa amateeka." 
Isaiah45:13 Nze namusitusaawo mu butuukirivu, era ndimutereereza amakubo ge gonna. Alizimba buggya ekibuga kyange, n'abange abaawaŋŋangusibwa alibata, awatali kubanunuza ssente yadde ebirabo.” Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Isaiah45:14 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Obugagga bw'omu Misiri, ebyamaguzi by'omu Kuusi n'abasajja abawagguufu Abaseba, balijja gy'oli ne baba babo; balikugoberera, balijja batambulira mu mpingu, balikuvunnamira ne beegayirira naawe nga bagamba nti: ‘Katonda ali naawe, teri mulala; teri katonda mulala.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Mazima ggwe Katonda eyeekwese, ayi Katonda wa Yisirayeli, Omununuzi." 
Isaiah45:16 Bonna wamu baliswala ne basonyiwala; abakola ebifaananyi bya balubaale balivaawo nga baswadde. 
Isaiah45:17 Naye Yisirayeli aliwonyezebwa Omukama n'obulokofu obw'emirembe n'emirembe. Temugenda kuswazibwa oba okusonyiwala emirembe gyonna. 
Isaiah45:18 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba, oyo eyatonda eggulu, ye Katonda, eyabumba ensi n'agikola yennyini n'aginyweza; teyagikola ebeere njereere, wabula kusengwamu. “Nze Mukama, teriiyo mulala:" 
Isaiah45:19 Soogeranga mu nkiso, awantu mu nsi ey'enzikiza. Sigambanga bantu ba Yakobo nti: ‘Munnoonyeze busa.’ Nze, Omukama, njogera kituufu, bye ŋŋamba biba bya mazima." 
Isaiah45:20 “Mukuŋŋaane, mujje; musembere wamu bakaawonawo mu mawanga. Tebamanyi abo abagenda basitudde ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebyole mu miti, abeegayirira ewa balubaale abatayinza kubalokola." 
Isaiah45:21 Mwogere, mwanje ensonga zammwe; ka bateese wamu. Ani kino eyakirangirira okuva edda? N'akiranga mu biseera ebyayita? Si nze Mukama? Ate teri katonda mulala okuggyako nze, Katonda omutuukirivu, Omulokozi; teri mulala okuggyako nze." 
Isaiah45:22 “Mudde gye ndi, mulokoke, mwenna enkingi z'ensi, kubanga nze Katonda, teri mulala." 
Isaiah45:23 Neerayiridde nze nzennyini, akamwa kange koogedde mu butuukirivu ekigambo ekitalimenyebwawo nti: Buli vviivi lijja kunfukaamirira na buli lulimi lunandayiranga." 
Isaiah45:24 Balinjogerako nti: ‘Mu Mukama mwokka mwe muli obutuukirivu n'amaanyi.’ Bonna abanaamuwakanyanga banajjanga gy'ali ne baswazibwa. 
Isaiah45:25 Naye mu Mukama bonna abantu ba Yisirayeli mwe balisanga obutuukirivu n'ekitiibwa.” 
Isaiah46:1 Beli abunduse, Nebo akootakoota, ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale byetikkiddwa nsolo na nte; bye mwatwalanga eno n'eri bizitowa, mugugu ku nsolo ekooye." 
Isaiah46:2 Bibunduka ne bikootakoota; tebikyasobola kuwonya mugugu; anti bennyini bagenda mu busibe. 
Isaiah46:3 “Mumpulirize, mmwe ennyumba ya Yakobo, mwenna abaasigalawo mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, mmwe mbaweese okuva lwe mwagwa munda, mbasitudde okuva lwe mwazaalibwa." 
Isaiah46:4 N'okutuusa ku bukadde bwo, ye nze, n'okutuusa ng'omeze envi ndikusitula; nga bwe nakola era bwe nzija okukuwembejja, nzija kukusitulanga era nzija kukulokola." 
Isaiah46:5 “Munangeranya ku ani era munnenkanya n'ani? Munanneefaanaanyiriza ani gwe munaageranya nange? 
Isaiah46:6 Waliwo abafukumula zaabu okuva mu nsawo zaabwe, ne bapima ffeeza ku minzaani; bagenda ew'omufukusi wa zaabu abakolere lubaale; olwo nga bavunnama, nga bamusinza." 
Isaiah46:7 Ekifaananyi bakisitulira ku bibegabega byabwe ne bakyetikka; bakissa mu kifo kyakyo, ne kiyimirira awo; tekiyinza kuva mu kifo ekyo, oli ne bw'akikoowoola atya, tekiyinza kwanukula, tekiriyinza kumuwonya mu nnaku ye." 
Isaiah46:8 “Mujjukire kino, mukyefumiitirize, mukirowoozeeko mu mutima, mmwe abasobya, mweddemu mu mutima." 
Isaiah46:9 Mujjukire eby'edda, eby'ebiseera ebyayita; nze Katonda, era teri katonda mulala; nze Katonda, teri mulala amufaanana." 
Isaiah46:10 Mmanyisa enkomerero okuviira ddala mu masooka; okuva ddi na ddi nnangirira ebitannaba na kutuuka, ne ŋŋamba nti: Bye nteesa bya kubaawo, na buli kye njagala nzija kukituukiriza." 
Isaiah46:11 Mu buvanjuba mpitayo ennyonyi enkwakkuzi, n'okuva mu nsi ez'ewala, omusajja ow'enteesa yange. Kye njogedde, ekyo nzija kukituukiriza; kye ntesezza, ekyo nzija kukikola." 
Isaiah46:12 Muntegere okutu, mmwe ab'omutima omukakanyavu, mmwe abeesambye obutuukirivu:" 
Isaiah46:13 obutuukirivu bwange mbusembezza, tebuli wala; n'okulokola kwange tekujja kulwa; Obulokofu bwange nzija kubussa mu Siyoni, n'ekitiibwa kyange mu Yisirayeli.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Kka wansi, tuula mu nfuufu, ggwe embeerera, muwala wa Babiloni; tuula ku ttaka, si ku nnamulondo, ggwe muwala w'Abakaludeya. Tokyaddayo kuyitibwa kijuujulu, kabirinnage." 
Isaiah47:2 Kwata olubengo ose eŋŋano, weggyeko ekiremba ku mutwe, bina ekiteeteeyi kyo, bikkula amagulu, osomoke emigga." 
Isaiah47:3 Obwereere bwo bujja kubikkulibwa, ensonyi zo zijja kulabibwa. Nzija kuwoolera eggwanga; mpaawo gwe nnaataliza." 
Isaiah47:4 Omununuzi waffe, erinnya lye ye Mukama w'Amagye, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah47:5 Tuula ng'osirise, genda mu kizikiza, ggwe muwala w'Abakaludeya; kubanga tokyaddayo kuyitibwa nnaabakyala wa bwakabaka." 
Isaiah47:6 Nasunguwalira abantu bange, ne njaajaamya obusika bwange, ne mbuwaayo mu mikono gyo; naye ggwe tewabakwatirwa kisa, n'omukadde wamubinika ekikoligo ekizitowa ennyo." 
Isaiah47:7 Wagamba nti: “Ŋŋenda kubeera nnaabakyala emirembe gyonna.” Naye bino tewabissaako mutima, tewalowooza ku kinaabivaamu." 
Isaiah47:8 Kale nno wulira kino, ggwe omwagazi w'amasanyu, ggwe eyeetuulidde entende, ng'ogamba mu mutima gwo nti: “Nze ndiwo, era okuggyako nze teri mulala; siribeerako nnamwandu, yadde okumanya eby'okufiirwa abaana.”" 
Isaiah47:9 Ebyo byombi bijja kukujjira mu kabanga bubanga, ku lunaku lumu: okufiirwa abaana n'obwannamwandu; birikujjira mu bujjuvu, newandibadde ng'abalaguzi bo bangi, nga n'abalogo bo ba maanyi nnyo." 
Isaiah47:10 Weetuulidde ntende mu bugwenyufu bwo, n'ogamba nti: “Tewali andaba.” Amagezi n'entegeera yo bikuwubisizza, n'ogamba mu mutima nti: “Nze ndiwo; okuggyako nze teri mulala.”" 
Isaiah47:11 Naye nno akabi kajja kukujjira k'otolisobola kwerogako; akabenje kajja kukugwira k'otolisobola kuweera mutango; ennaku gy'otomanyiridde erikuzinduukiriza 
Isaiah47:12 Genda mu maaso n'abalogo bo, n'abalaguzi bo abangi, b'oteganidde okuva obuvubuka bwo. Oboolyawo olibaako ky'oganyulwamu, oboolyawo olikuba entiisa." 
Isaiah47:13 Amagezi amangi agakuweereddwa gakukooyezza bukooya; beesimbewo, bakuwonye abo abataputa eggulu, abeetegereza emmunyeenye ne balangirira buli mwezi ebirikujjira." 
Isaiah47:14 Bali ng'essubi, omuliro gulibasenkenya; tebaasobola kwewonya maanyi ga muliro. Gano si manda bwanda ga kubugumya, si muliro buliro gwa kwota." 
Isaiah47:15 Ekyo kyokka kye basobola okukukolera abo be wateganiranga n'okusuubulagana nabo okuva obuvubuka bwo; buli omu amala gagenda kkubo lye, tewali alikulokola." 
Isaiah48:1 “Muwulirize kino, ggwe ennyumba ya Yakobo, mmwe abayitibwa erinnya Yisirayeli, mmwe omusaayi gwa Yuda, abalayira mu linnya ly'Omukama, abakoowoola Katonda wa Yisirayeli__ sso si mu mazima, yadde mu butuukirivu__" 
Isaiah48:2 mmwe abeeyita ekibuga ekitukuvu, abanyweredde ku Katonda wa Yisirayeli; erinnya lye ye Mukama w'Amagye." 
Isaiah48:3 Ebintu ebyayita nabirangirira dda, akamwa kange kaabiranga dda ne mbimanyisa; ate amangu ago ne nkolerawo, ne bituukirira." 
Isaiah48:4 Kubanga mmanyi bw'oli omukakanyavu, kubanga ebikya by'ensingo yo bya kyuma, ate ekyenyi kyo kya kikomo." 
Isaiah48:5 Ebintu bino kyennava mbirangirira okuva edda, nabikubuulira nga tebinnatuuka, oleme kugamba nti: ‘Lubaale wange ye yabikola; ebifaananyi byange ebyole n'ebisaanuuse bye byabiragira.’" 
Isaiah48:6 “Bino wabiwulira, birabe byonna. Tobikkiriza? N'okuva kati nzija kukubuulira, ebintu ebyali bikisiddwa, by'otomanyanga nako." 
Isaiah48:7 Byakatondebwa kati, si bbanga ggwanvu emabega. Tobiwulirangako okuggyako olwa leero; awo nno toyinza kugamba nti: ‘Mazima nabimanya.’" 
Isaiah48:8 Towulirangako, tomanyangako, okuva edda okutu kwo tekuggukanga; kubanga nali mmanyi bw'oli ow'enkwe, era ng'okuva lwe wazaalibwa oyitibwa mujeemu." 
Isaiah48:9 Olw'okubeera erinnya lyange nfuze obusungu bwange, olw'ekitiibwa kyange mbuziyizza okukutuukirira, nneme kukukutulako." 
Isaiah48:10 Laba, nkutukuzza, sso si nga ffeeza; nkugerezza mu kabiga ak'ennaku." 
Isaiah48:11 Ku lwange, ku lwange nzija kukikola, ggwe lwaki nandirese erinnya lyange ne lyonoonebwa? Ekitiibwa kyange sirikiwa mulala." 
Isaiah48:12 “Ggwe Yakobo, mpuliriza, naawe Yisirayeli, gwe nayita: Nze wuuyo; nze mubereberye, era nze muvannyuma." 
Isaiah48:13 Omukono gwange gwe gwabangawo ensi, ddyo wange ye yabamba olubaale; bwe mbiyita, byonna biyimirira lumu." 
Isaiah48:14 “Mukuŋŋaane mwenna, muwulire. Ku abo ani yali alanze ebintu bino? Omukama amwagala; alituukiriza entegeka ye ku Babiloni; omukono gwe gulirwanyisa Abakaludeya." 
Isaiah48:15 Nze, nze kennyini, njogedde; mazima namuyita; namuleeta, amakubo ge gajja kumulamira." 
Isaiah48:16 “Musembere kumpi we ndi, muwulire kino: okuviira ddala mu masooka soogeranga nammwe mu kyama; lwe kyakolebwa, naliwo.” Kale nno Omukama antumye, wamu ne Mwoyo we." 
Isaiah48:17 Omukama kino ky'agamba, Omununuzi wo, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli: “Nze Mukama Katonda wo, nze nkuyigiriza ebinaakugasa, akukulembera mu kkubo mwe wanditambulidde." 
Isaiah48:18 Singa nno wali otegerezza ebiragiro byange! Olwo eddembe lyo lyandibadde ng'omugga, n'obutuukirivu bwo ng'amayengo g'oku nnyanja." 
Isaiah48:19 Ezzadde lyo lyandibadde ng'omusenyu, abazzukulu bo bandibadde ng'obuweke bwagwo. Erinnya lyabwe teryandikutuddwako, yadde okusangulibwawo mu maaso gange.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Mufulume Babiloni, badduke Abakaludeya; kino mukibuulire mu maloboozi ag'essanyu, mukirangirire, mukiraalaase okutuuka ku nsonda z'ensi; mugambe nti: “Omukama anunudde omuweereza we Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Tebaalumwa ku nnyonta bwe yali abayisa mu ddungu; yabakulukusiza amazzi okuva mu lwazi; yayasa olwazi amazzi ne gafumbukuka. 
Isaiah48:22 Omukama agamba nti: “Ababi tebaba na mirembe.” 
Isaiah49:1 Mmwe ebizinga, mumpulire, nammwe abantu abali ewala, mutegereze: Omukama yampita nga sinnazaalibwa, yampita erinnya lyange nga nkyali mu lubuto lwa nnyabo;" 
Isaiah49:2 akamwa kange yakafuula ng'ekitala ekyogi, n'ankweka mu kisiikirize ky'omukono gwe; yanfuula akasaale akazigule, n'ankweka mu mufuko gwe." 
Isaiah49:3 Yaŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe oli muweereza wange, Yisirayeli, mwe ndigulumizibwa.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Nze ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nateganira bwereere; amaanyi gange nagoonoonera busa, omutaava kantu. Ssonga mu mazima, omugabo gwange guli mu Mukama, era empeera yange eri ne Katonda wange.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Kati Omukama ayogedde, oyo eyankola mu lubuto lwa nnyabo mbeere muweereza we, nzize Yakobo gy'ali ne Yisirayeli mmukuŋŋaanyize w'ali__ kubanga nafuna ekitiibwa mu maaso g'Omukama, ne Katonda wange y'abadde amaanyi gange__" 
Isaiah49:6 n'agamba nti: “Kintu kitono gy'oli ggwe okubeera omuweereza wange, okuzzaawo ebika bya Yakobo, n'okubbula abaatalizibwa ba Yisirayeli. Ŋŋenda nno kukufuula kitangaala ky'amawanga, otuuse obulokozi bwange ku nkingi z'ensi.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Omukama kino ky'agamba, Omununuzi wa Yisirayeli, Omutuukirivu we, eri oyo gwe baagaya, oyo amawanga gwe geetamwa, eri omuddu w'abafuzi: “Bakabaka baliraba ne basituka, n'abalangira baliraba ne bagwa wansi; olw'okubeera Omukama omwesigwa, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, eyakulonda.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Nakwanukula mu budde obw'omukisa, nakuyamba ku lunaku olw'obulokofu; nakutaliza ne nkussaawo obeere endagaano eri abantu, obbule ensi, ogabanye obusika obufuuse amatongo;" 
Isaiah49:9 ogambe abasibe nti: ‘Muveeyo,’ n'abali mu kizikiza nti: ‘Mweyoleke.’ Banaaliiranga ku makubo, ku busozi bwonna obwereere kwe kunaabeeranga amalundiro gaabwe." 
Isaiah49:10 Tebalirumwa njala yadde ennyonta, empewo eyokya yadde enjuba tebiribakoonako, kubanga oyo abasaasira y'alibakulembera, alibatuusa ku nzizi z'amazzi." 
Isaiah49:11 Ensozi zange zonna ndizifuula makubo, n'enguudo zange zirigulumira." 
Isaiah49:12 Laba, baliva ewala; abamu baliva emambuka n'abalala ebugwanjuba, n'abandi baliva mu nsi y'e Sinimu.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Yimba n'essanyu ggwe eggulu, naawe ensi jaganya; mmwe ensozi, musaakaanye ennyimba; kubanga Omukama akubagizza abantu be, era ajja kusaasira abanaku be." 
Isaiah49:14 Naye Siyoni yagamba nti: “Omukama anjabulidde, Omukama anneerabidde.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Omukazi ayinza okwerabira omwana gw'ayonsa, oba obutasaasira mwana gwe yazaala? Ye nno yandiyinza okumwerabira, naye nze sigenda kukwerabira." 
Isaiah49:16 Laba, nakwola mu kibatu ky'omukono gwange; ebisenge byo bindi mu maaso buli kaseera." 
Isaiah49:17 Abanaakuzimba obuggya baabo banguwako, ate bo abaakuzikiriza ne bakuleka matongo bakuddukamu." 
Isaiah49:18 Situla amaaso ogeebunguluze olabe: bonna bakuŋŋaana, bajja gy'oli. Nze nga ndi mulamu,” Omukama y'agamba, “bonna ogenda kubambala ng'amajjolobera, olibeesiba ng'omugole bw'akola.”" 
Isaiah49:19 Olw'ebifulukwa byo n'amatongo go, n'ensi yo yonna yayonoonebwa, ojja kufunda olw'obungi bw'abalikusengamu, n'abo abaakuvunjaga balibeera wala." 
Isaiah49:20 Abaana abaazaalibwa ng'oli mu kufiirwa, balyogera mu matu go nti: “Ekifo kitufundiridde, twongere ekifo we tunaabeera.”" 
Isaiah49:21 Olwo oligamba mu mutima gwo nti: “Bano ani yabanzaalira? Saalina baana, nga ndi mugumba; nali muwaŋŋanguse nga nsuuliddwa, ate bano ani yaboola? Nayabulirwa ne nsigala bw'omu, ate kati bano bavudde wa?”" 
Isaiah49:22 Kino Omukama Katonda ky'agamba: “Nzija kutemya ku mawanga, nzija kusitula akabonero kange eri abantu; balikuleetera batabani bo nga babawambaatidde, ate ne bawala bo nga babakongojja ku bibegabega byabwe." 
Isaiah49:23 Bakabaka bo baliba abakuza bo, ne bakyala baabwe abambejja be balikulera; balikuvunnamira nga beevuunise ku ttaka; balikomba enfuufu y'ebigere byo. Olwo nno olitegeera nti nze Mukama; abo abasuubira mu nze, tebagenda kuswazibwa." 
Isaiah49:24 Omunyago guyinza okuggyibwa ku mutabaazi, oba abasibe okubaggya ku mukambwe?”" 
Isaiah49:25 Naye Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Mazima ddala abasibe baliggyibwa ku mutabaazi, n'omunyago gulinunulibwa ku mukambwe; ndirwanyisa abakulwanyisa, abaana bo ndibanunula." 
Isaiah49:26 Abakuyigganya ndibaliisa ennyama yaabwe; balitamiira omusaayi gwabwe ng'abatamiira evviini ensu. Olwo abantu bonna balitegeera nti nze Mukama Omulokozi wo, Omumunuzi wo, Omuyinza wa Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ebbaluwa ya nnyammwe ey'obugobe eruwa kwe namugobera? Oba ku bawozi bange ani gwe nabaguza? Olw'okubeera ebibi byammwe kyemwava mutundibwa; olw'emisango gyammwe nnyammwe kyeyava agobebwa. 
Isaiah50:2 Kale lwe najja, lwaki tewaali muntu n'omu? Bwe nakowoola, lwaki waabulawo annyanukula? Omukono gwange guyimpawadde nnyo, tegusobola kununula? Mbuliddwa maanyi gabawonya? Mulabe, bwe mboggola, ennyanja ne ngikaza; emigga ne ngifuula eddungu; ebyennyanja byamu olw'ebbula ly'amazzi bivunda ne bifa ennyonta." 
Isaiah50:3 Olubaale ndwambaza enzikiza, ne ndukolera ekikutiya nga kye kizibawo kyalwo.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Omukama yampa olulimi lw'abayigirizwa, mmanye ebigambo ebinyweza ayenjebuse; okutu kwange akuzuukusa buli makya kuwulire ng'okw'abayigirizwa." 
Isaiah50:5 Omukama Katonda yaggula amatu gange; nange saajeema, sadda mabega." 
Isaiah50:6 Amabega gange nagawa abankuba, n'emba nazikyukiza abankuunyuula ekirevu; amaaso saagakweka bivumo na kufujjirwa malusu." 
Isaiah50:7 Kubanga Omukama Katonda annyamba, kyenvudde nnema okuswala. N'olw'ekyo obwenyi bwange mbwegeseewo ng'olwazi, era mmanyi sijja kuswazibwa." 
Isaiah50:8 Oyo annejjeereza ali kumpi, ani ananvunaana? Kale tugasimbagane. Ani anvunaana omusango? Kale ansemberere." 
Isaiah50:9 Omukama Katonda wuuyo y'annyamba, ani anansingisa omusango? Anti bonna bajja kuggweerera ng'ekyambalo; ennyenje zigenda kubalya." 
Isaiah50:10 Ani mu mmwe atya Omukama, awuliriza eddoboozi ly'omuweereza we? Ani atambulira mu kizikiza, atalina kitangaala? Oyo yeesige erinnya ly'Omukama, yeesigame ku Katonda we?" 
Isaiah50:11 Naye nno mmwe mwenna abakoleeza omuliro, abenyweza n'ebitawuliro by'omuliro, mutambulire mu kitangaala ky'omuliro gwammwe ne ku bitawuliro bye mukoleezezza. Kino kye mujja okufuna okuva mu mukono gwange: mugenda kugalamira mu bibonoobono." 
Isaiah51:1 “Mumpulirize mmwe abanoonya obutuukirivu, mmwe abanoonya Omukama: Mutunuulire olwazi kwe baababajja, n'ekirombe mwe mwawuukuulwa." 
Isaiah51:2 Mwekkaanye Yiburayimu jjajjammwe ne Saara eyabazaala. Kubanga namuyita ng'ali bw'omu, ne mmuwa omukisa, ne mmuwa okwala." 
Isaiah51:3 Ddala, Omukama alikubagiza Siyoni, alikwatirwa ekisa ebifulukwa bye byonna; eddungu lyakyo alirifaananya Edeni, olukoola lwakyo, ng'ennimiro y'Omukama. Essanyu n'okujaganya birikisangibwamu, ko okwebaza n'eddoboozi ery'ennyimba." 
Isaiah51:4 “Mumpulirize mmwe abantu bange, muntegere okutu, mmwe abantu bange, kubanga etteeka lirisibuka gye ndi, n'ennamula yange ndigissaawo okumulisa amawanga." 
Isaiah51:5 Obutuukirivu bwange busembera na misinde, okulokola kwange kweyerudde; emikono gyange giriramula amawanga. Ebizinga birisuubiranga mu nze, ne birindirira omukono gwange." 
Isaiah51:6 Musitule amaaso, mutunuulire eggulu, ate mutunuulire ensi wansi; eggulu liriggwaawo ng'omukka n'ensi eriggwerera ng'ekyambalo, n'abagirimu balifa ng'ensowera, naye okulokola kwange kulibeerawo emirembe gyonna, n'obutuukirivu bwange tebugenda kukoma." 
Isaiah51:7 “Mumpulire mmwe abamanyi obutuukirivu, mmwe abantu abalina etteeka lyange mu mutima; temutyanga kujolongebwa bantu, temutekemukanga olw'ebivumo byabwe." 
Isaiah51:8 Kubanga ennyenje egenda kubalya ng'ekyambalo, envunyu egenda kubasenkenya ng'ebyoya by'endiga; kyokka obutuukirivu bwange bulibeerawo emirembe gyonna, n'okulokola kwange kulibaawo mu mazadde n'amazadde.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Situka, situka, yambala amaanyi, ayi ggwe omukono gw'Omukama. Situka nga mu nnaku ez'edda, nga mu mazadde ag'edda. Si ggwe watemaatemamu Rakabu? Si ggwe wafumita ssessota?" 
Isaiah51:10 Si ggwe wakaliza ennyanja n'amazzi ag'omu ddubi, eyatema ekkubo mu buziba bw'ennyanja be wanunula basomoke?" 
Isaiah51:11 Abanunule b'Omukama balikomawo, baliyingira mu Siyoni nga bayimba, essanyu ery'olubeerera nga balyetisse ku mitwe gyabwe; balifuna okujaganya n'essanyu; ennaku n'okusinda biriddukira wala." 
Isaiah51:12 “Nze, nze kennyini, nze mukubagiza wammwe. Oyinza otya okutya omuntu obuntu ow'okufa, omwana w'omuntu omuddo obuddo," 
Isaiah51:13 ne weerabira Omukama Eyakukola, eyabamba olubaale, eyabangawo ensi, n'odda mu kutya buli olukedde obusungu bw'oyo akulabya ennaku, agenderera okuzikiriza? Kale obusungu bw'oyo akulabya ennaku buli ludda wa?" 
Isaiah51:14 “Abasibe abeegose bajja kusumululwa mangu, tebajja kufiira mu nkomyo yadde okuggwebwako emmere." 
Isaiah51:15 Kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wo, asiikuula ennyanja n'amayengo gaayo ne gawuluguma. Omukama w'Amagye, lye linnya lye." 
Isaiah51:16 Nassa ekigambo kyange mu kamwa ko, ne nkukweka mu kisiikirize ky'omukono gwange, nze eyassaawo olubaale, eyabangawo ensi, era agamba Siyoni nti: ‘Mmwe bantu bange.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Zuukuka, zuukuka, situka, ggwe Yeruzaalemu, ggwe ayanywera mu kibatu ky'Omukama ekikompe ky'obusungu bwe, ggwe eyanywa n'okutuuka ku bbonda endeku ereetera abantu okuzunga." 
Isaiah51:18 Mu baana be yazaala temwali amukulemberamu; mu baana bonna be yakuza temwali amukwata ku mukono. 
Isaiah51:19 Obubenje bwa mirundi ebiri bukugwiridde, ani anaakunakuwalirako? Kuvunjagibwa na kuzikirira, njala na kitala; ani anaakukubagiza?" 
Isaiah51:20 nga Batabani bo bagudde eŋŋanzi, balambaalidde ku buli luguudo we lukoma, ng'engabi mu kitimba, bajjudde obusungu bw'Omukama, n'okuboggola kwa Katonda wo." 
Isaiah51:21 Awo nno wulira kino, ggwe alabye ennaku, ggwe omutamiivu, sso nga totamidde mwenge." 
Isaiah51:22 Kino Mukama Omuyinza ky'agamba, Katonda wo awolereza abantu be: “Laba, nzigye mu mikono gyo ekikompe ekyakuzunza; tokyaddayo kunywa ku ndeku eyo, ekikompe ky'obusungu bwange," 
Isaiah51:23 ŋŋenda kukissa mu ngalo z'abaakubonyaabonya, abaakugambanga nti: ‘Weeyale wansi tukubuuke,’ n'oteekawo omugongo gwo ng'ettaka, ng'oluguudo olw'okutambulirako.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Zuukuka, zuukuka, ggwe Siyoni, yambala amaanyi go, yambala ebyambalo by'ekitiibwa kyo. Ayi Yeruzaalemu, ekibuga ekitukuvu, kubanga abatali batayirire n'ababi tebakyaddayo kukuyingiramu." 
Isaiah52:2 Weekunkumuleko enfuufu, situka, waŋŋama, ayi Yeruzaalemu omusibe, weesumululemu enjegere ezikuli mu bulago, ayi omusibe, muwala wa Siyoni." 
Isaiah52:3 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Mwatundibwa awataali kufunamu kantu, era mujja kununulibwa awatali ssente.”" 
Isaiah52:4 Kubanga kino Omukama Katonda ky'agamba: “Mu kusooka abantu bange baaserengeta mu Misiri okubeera eyo; gye buvuddeko Abassuri baabanyigiriza. 
Isaiah52:5 Kati wano nninawo ki?” Omukama bw'agamba, “kubanga abantu bange batwaliddwa awatali kusasula kantu, ababafuga babavuma,” Omukama y'ayogera, “n'erinnya lyange teritadde kuvumibwa olunaku lwonna." 
Isaiah52:6 N'olw'ekyo nno abantu bange bajja kutegeera erinnya lyange; ku olwo balimanya nti nze nakiranga. Nze nzuuyo.” 
Isaiah52:7 Nga birabika bulungi ku nsozi ebigere by'oyo aleeta amawulire amalungi, oyo alangirira eddembe, aleeta amawulire amalungi n'alangirira obulokofu, agamba Siyoni nti: “Katonda wo afuga.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Wulira abakuumi bo bayoogaana; bonna bayimbira wamu olw'essanyu; anti Omukama bamulabirako ddala n'amaaso ng'akomawo mu Siyoni. 
Isaiah52:9 Musaakaanyize wamu ennyimba, mmwe ebifo ebya Yeruzaalemu amatongo, kubanga Omukama akubagizza abantu be, anunudde Yeruzaalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Omukama afungizza omukono gwe omutukuvu mu maaso g'amawanga gonna; n'enkingi zonna ez'ensi ziriraba obulokozi bwa Katonda waffe. 
Isaiah52:11 Musitule, musitule, muveeyo. Temukwata ku kitali kirongoofu, mukiveemu, mwetukuze, mmwe abakwata ebibya by'Omukama." 
Isaiah52:12 Naye temulivaayo kalaako, temuligenda ng'abadduka, wabula Omukama y'alibakulemberamu, Katonda wa Yisirayeli y'aliba eggye lyammwe eriva ennyuma." 
Isaiah52:13 Laba, omuweereza wange agenda kubeera wa mukisa, ajja kugulumizibwa, atenderezebwe, asukkulumizibwe nnyo." 
Isaiah52:14 Nga bwe yawuniikiriza abangi__ anti entunula ye yabijja n'eva ku y'obuntu, n'enfaanana ye n'eva ku y'abantu__" 
Isaiah52:15 bw'atyo bw'alyewuunyisa amawanga amangi, ne bakabaka baliziba emimwa olw'okubeera ye, kubanga kye baali batabuulirwangako balikiraba, ne kye baali batawulirangako balikitegeera." 
Isaiah53:1 Ani yakkiriza kye twawulira, n'omukono gw'Omukama ani eyagwolekebwa?" 
Isaiah53:2 Yakulira mu maaso ge ng'akalokolerwa, era ng'omulandira ogututunuka mu ttaka ekkalu; teyaliiko ntunula, yadde endabika ebitusikiriza okumutunulako, teyalina kalungi katumwegombesa." 
Isaiah53:3 Yagayibwa, n'asambajjibwa abantu; ye muntu ow'okunyolwa, amanyidde okubonaabona; omuntu abantu gwe bakyusiza eri amaaso gaabwe; yagayibwa, tetwamulabamu ka buntu." 
Isaiah53:4 nga Sso ate, ye yeetikka ennaku zaffe, yeebinika okunyolwa kwaffe; ffe twamulowoozaako ng'abonerezeddwa, ng'akubiddwa Katonda, alabisiddwa ennaku." 
Isaiah53:5 Sso yafumitibwa lwa bibi byaffe, yabetentebwa lwa misango gyaffe; ekibonerezo ekyatuleetera emirembe kyagwa ku ye, twawonyezebwa lwa biwundu bye." 
Isaiah53:6 Ffe ffenna twali tuwabye ng'endiga, buli omu ng'akutte lirye; Omukama n'amutikka ebibi byaffe ffenna." 
Isaiah53:7 Yabonyaabonyezebwa ne bamulabya ennaku naye teyayasamya kamwa ke; yali ng'akaliga akatwalibwa mu bbaagiro; era ng'endiga etenyega mu maaso g'abagisalako ebyoya, naye teyayasamya kamwa ke." 
Isaiah53:8 Yaggyibwawo ng'abonyaabonyezebwa n'okusalirwa omusango; naye ani yalowooza ku zzadde lye, nti yakutulibwa ku nsi y'abalamu, n'akubwa olw'omusango gw'abantu bange?" 
Isaiah53:9 Entaana ye baagiteeka n'ababi, ate mu kufa n'aba na mugagga, newandibadde nga teyakola bukambwe, nga ne mu kamwa ke temwali bukuusa." 
Isaiah53:10 Naye Omukama ye yayagala amubetente amulumye; naye newandibadde nga yamufuula ekitambiro olw'omusango, aliraba ku baana be n'amuwangaaza, n'Omukama ky'ayagala kiriraka mu mukono gwe." 
Isaiah53:11 Oluvannyuma lw'okutegana kwe, aliraba ekitangaala n'amatira; n'olw'okumanya kwe omuweereza wange omutuukirivu alituusa bangi ku kubalirwa mu batuufu, era ebibi byabwe alibyetikka." 
Isaiah53:12 Kyendiva mmwawulizaako ekitundu n'abazira, omunyago aligugabana wamu n'ab'amaanyi, kubanga yawaayo obulamu bwe okutuusa okufa, n'abalirwa mu bajeemu; sso ate ye yeetikka ebibi by'abangi, n'asabira abajeemu." 
Isaiah54:1 “Sanyuka, ggwe omugumba, atazaalangako; yamira, leekaana, ggwe atalumwanga, kubanga abaana b'oyo eyayabulirwa bangi okusinga ab'oyo aliko bba,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah54:2 “Ekifo ky'ensiisira yo kigaziye, yanjuluza amaliba ga weema zo, toddirira; leega emiguwa gyo, nyweza enkondo zo," 
Isaiah54:3 kubanga ojja kugaziwa ku ddyo ne ku kkono, era abazzukulu bo bagenda kwezza amawanga, basenge mu bibuga byabwe ebyali amatongo." 
Isaiah54:4 “Leka kutya, kubanga tojja kuswazibwa; teweeraliikirira, kubanga toliddamu kusonyiwazibwa, anti ensonyi z'omu buvubuka bwo ojja kuzeerabira, n'ebivumo eby'obwannamwandu toliddayo kubijjukira." 
Isaiah54:5 Kubanga Eyakutonda ye balo; erinnya lye, Mukama w'Amagye. Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli ye Mununuzi wo; aliyitibwa Katonda w'ensi yonna." 
Isaiah54:6 Omukama akuyiseeyo ng'omukazi eyali ayabuliddwa, anyoleddwa mu mutima; Omukama n'akuyita; Katonda wo akuyita ng'omukazi eyafumbirwa mu buvubuka n'akyayibwa,” Katonda wo bw'agamba." 
Isaiah54:7 “Nakwabulirako kaseera katono ddala, naye nzija kukukumaakuma n'okusaasira kungi." 
Isaiah54:8 Olw'obusungu okusituka, namala akaseera nga nkukwese amaaso gange, naye olw'okwagala okw'emirembe gyonna, nzija kukukwatirwa ekisa,” Omukama, Omununuzi wo bw'agamba." 
Isaiah54:9 “Kino nkiraba nga mu budde bwa Nowa, bwe nalayira nti amazzi g'omu budde bwa Nowa tegakyaddayo kubuutikira nsi. Bwe ntyo bwe ndayidde na kati obutaddayo kukusunguwalira, n'obutaddayo kukuboggolera." 
Isaiah54:10 Ensozi ne bwe zirinyeenyezebwa n'obusozi ne buggyibwayo, ekisa kyange tekirinyeenyezebwa, n'endagaano yange ey'eddembe teriggyibwawo,” Omukama, oyo akukwatirwa ekisa, bw'agamba." 
Isaiah54:11 “Baabuwe omunaku, kibuyaga gw'ayuuya, atakubagiziddwa! Laba, nzija kukwaliira n'amayinja go amagumu, nkubangewo n'amayinja ga saffiro," 
Isaiah54:12 ebigo byo mbizimbise n'amayinja g'akyate, emiryango gyo, n'amayinja agatemagana, n'ebisenge byo, n'amayinja ag'omuwendo." 
Isaiah54:13 Abaana bo bonna baliyigirizibwa Omukama, era eddembe ly'abaana bo liriba jjitirivu." 
Isaiah54:14 Olitebenkera mu butuukirivu, toliba na kuyigganyizibwa, toliba na ky'otya; entiisa erikuba wala, terikusemberera." 
Isaiah54:15 Bwe walibaawo akulumba, tekiriva gye ndi; buli alikulumbagana, aligwa olw'okubeera ggwe." 
Isaiah54:16 Wuuno, ntonze omuweesi, awujja omuliro gw'amanda n'akolamu ekyokukozesa okulabira ku mulimu gwakyo; era nze ntonze n'oyo azikiriza asaanyeewo." 
Isaiah54:17 Tewali kyakulwanyisa ekikuweesereddwa kiriwangula; buli lulimi olukuwawaabira olirusinga. Buno bwe busika bw'abaweereza ba Katonda, bwe buwanguzi bwabwe obuva gye ndi,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah55:1 Abayonta mwenna, mujje; mujje ku mazzi; nammwe abatalina ssente, mujje mugule, mulye! Mujje mugule evviini n'amata awatali ssente, awatali kusasula." 
Isaiah55:2 Lwaki ssente zammwe muzimalira mu bintu ebitali mmere, n'okutegana kwammwe ku bintu ebitakkusa? Mumpulirize bulungi, mulye ekirungi, n'omwoyo gwammwe gusanyukire ku masavu." 
Isaiah55:3 Muwunzike okutu kwammwe, mujje gye ndi, muwulire, omwoyo gwammwe gubeere mulamu. “Era nzija kukuba nammwe endagaano ey'olubeerera, ekisa kyange ku Dawudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Kubanga namufuula omujulirwa eri abantu, omukulembeze era omuluŋŋamya w'amawanga." 
Isaiah55:5 Laba, oliyita amawanga g'otamanyangako, n'amawanga agatakumanyangako galirinnimukira gy'oli olw'Omukama Katonda wo, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, kubanga yakugulumiza.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Munoonye Omukama ng'akyasangika, mumukoowoole ng'akyali kumpi." 
Isaiah55:7 Omubi ave mu kkubo lye ebbi, n'omuntu omubi ave mu ndowooza ye. Adde eri Omukama, ajja kumusaasira; adde eri Katonda waffe, kubanga ajja kusonyiwa mu bungi." 
Isaiah55:8 “Kubanga ebirowoozo byange si bye birowoozo byammwe, n'amakubo gammwe si ge makubo gange,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah55:9 “Anti eggulu nga bwe litumbidde ku nsi, n'amakubo gange bwe gasukkulumye ku gammwe, n'ebirowoozo byange ku birowoozo byammwe." 
Isaiah55:10 Anti ng'enkuba n'omuzira bwe biva ku ggulu ne bikka, ne bitaddayo nga tebinnyikizza ttaka, ne birireetera okubaza n'okumeza, ne liwa omusizi ensigo, n'emmere oyo alya," 
Isaiah55:11 n'ekigambo ekiva mu kamwa kange bwe kiriba: tekiridda gye ndi nga kikalu, wabula kirituukiriza kyonna kye ŋŋenderera, kiriraka mu nsonga ekinsindisizza.”" 
Isaiah55:12 Kubanga mulifuluma mu ssanyu, ne mutwalibwa mu ddembe; ensozi n'obusozi birisaakaanya ennyimba mu maaso gammwe, n'emiti gyonna egy'ettale girikuba mu ngalo." 
Isaiah55:13 Mu kifo ky'ebisaka by'amaggwa sipulaasi y'alisituka; mu kifo ky'omwennyango, jjambula y'alikulawo; ekyo kiriweesa Omukama erinnya, ke kaliba akabonero ak'olubeerera akatalikutulwawo." 
Isaiah56:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Mukuume obutuufu, mukole ebikolwa eby'obutuukirivu, kubanga okulokola kwange kuli kumpi n'obutuufu bwange buli kumpi okwolekebwa." 
Isaiah56:2 Omuntu akola kino yeesiimye, n'omwana w'omuntu akikwata, akuuma Sabbaato n'atagyonoona, atangira omukono gwe okukola ekibi.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Omugwira anyweredde ku Mukama aleme kugamba nti: “Omukama ddala agenda kunjawula ku bantu be,” n'omulaawo aleme kugamba nti: “Nzuuno ndi muti mukalu!”" 
Isaiah56:4 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Abalaawo abakuuma Sabbaato yange ne balondawo ebinsanyusa, ne banywerera ku ndagaano yange," 
Isaiah56:5 mu nnyumba yange ne mu bigo byange ndibawaamu ekijjukizo n'erinnya erisinga batabani bange ne bawala bange; ndibawa erinnya ery'olubeerera eritagenda kukutulwako. 
Isaiah56:6 Abagwira abanyweredde ku Mukama okumuweereza, okwagala erinnya ly'Omukama, okubeera abaweereza be, bonna abakwata Sabbaato ne batagyonoona, ne banywerera ddala ku ndagaano yange," 
Isaiah56:7 ndibatwala ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu, ne mbasanyusiza mu nnyumba yange ey'okwegayiririramu; ebitambiro byabwe ebyokye n'ebyonziira byabwe birikkirizibwa ku mwaliiro gwange; kubanga ennyumba yange eneeyitibwanga nnyumba ya kwegayiririramu eri amawanga gonna.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Omukama Katonda, akuŋŋaanya abawaŋŋangusibwa ba Yisirayeli, gamba nti: “Ndibakuŋŋaanyizaako n'abalala, abatali abo abaakuŋŋaanyizibwa edda.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Mmwe mwenna ebisolo eby'ettale, mujje mukavvule, mmwe mwenna ebisolo by'omu kibira." 
Isaiah56:10 Abakuumi be bazibe b'amaaso, bonna tebategeera: bonna mbwa nkolya, ezitasobola kuboggola, beebakiriza, baloota, banyumirwa kwebaka bwebasi;" 
Isaiah56:11 mbwa ez'amaddu amangi ezitakkuta, basumba tebategeera kimala; bonna beekwatidde makubo gaabwe, buli muntu okutuusa ku asembayo beenoonyeza bya kufuna." 
Isaiah56:12 Bagamba nti: “Mujje, nzija kufuna evviini! Mugire tunywe omwenge tweggweere! N'olw'enkya lunaaba ng'olwa leero, kabekasinge n'okusingawo obulungi.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Abatuukirivu bazikirira, naye tewali n'omu akissaako mutima; abantu abalungi babuzibwawo, naye tewali ategeera, nti omutuufu abuzibwawo okumuwonya akabi," 
Isaiah57:2 ayingira mu ddembe; abo abatambula obutereevu bawummula mu bitanda byabwe. 
Isaiah57:3 “Naye mmwe musembere kumpi wano, mmwe batabani b'omukazi omulaguzi, ezzadde ly'omukazi omwenzi era malaaya." 
Isaiah57:4 Ani gwe muzannyirako? Ani gwe mwasamiza mutyo akamwa ne musowolayo ennimi? Temuli zzadde jjeemu, abaana b'abalimba?" 
Isaiah57:5 Mmwe abababirirwa amaddu wansi w'emivule, wansi wa buli muti oguggumizza; abaana bammwe mubatambiririra mu biwonvu, ne mu mpampagama z'enjazi." 
Isaiah57:6 “Ebifaananyi bya balubaale mu mayinja amanyirivu mu biwonvu gwe mugabo gwo; byo kye kitundu kyo; bye muwongedde ebitone eby'okuyiwa, ne mubiweereza ebitone eby'obuwunga. Olwa bino ne nzikkakkana?" 
Isaiah57:7 Ku lusozi oluwanvu ate olugulumivu kwe wateeka ekitanda kyo; eyo gye walinnya okuweereza ebitambiro. 
Isaiah57:8 Emabega w'enzigi n'emyango eyo gy'otadde ekijjukizo kyo; wanjabulira, n'obikkula ekitanda kyo, wakiwalampa, n'okibikkulira ddala; wakuba endagaano n'abo ebitanda byabwe by'oyagala, n'otunuulira obwereere bwabwe." 
Isaiah57:9 Wagenda eri Moleki ng'otutte omuzigo, ebyakaloosa byo n'obyongera obungi; watuma ababaka bo ewala, ggwe wennyini n'okkirira emagombe." 
Isaiah57:10 Wakoowa mu lugendo lwo oluwanvu, naye tewagamba nti: ‘Bya busa!’ Wazuula amaanyi amaggya, kyewava toyenjebuka." 
Isaiah57:11 “Ani gwe watya n'akukwasa ensisi okutuusa okunnimba, nange n'otonzijukira, n'otokissaako mutima? Okumala ebbanga eggwanvu nga nsirise si kye kikuleetedde obutakyantya?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ŋŋenda kwogera obutuukirivu bwo ne bye wakola, naye tebijja kukugasa." 
Isaiah57:13 Bw'oliraajana, kale bye wakuŋŋaanya bikuwonye! Empewo ejja kubifuumuula, ekikkowe obukkowe kigenda kubikunguzza; naye oyo addukira gy'endi, alirya ensi, y'alifuna olusozi lwange olutukuvu.”" 
Isaiah57:14 Baligamba nti: “Muzimbe, muzimbe; muteeketeeke ekkubo. Muggye buli musanvu mu kkubo ly'abantu bange.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Kubanga kino ky'agamba, Oyo Oweekitiibwa, Asukkulumye, oyo Aliwo emirembe gyonna, ow'erinnya ettukuvu nti: “Nsula waggulu mu kifo ekitukuvu, naye era wamu n'eyeemenye, omwetoowaze mu mwoyo, nzize obulamu mu mwoyo gw'omwetoowaze, nzize obulamu mu mutima gw'ayeemenye." 
Isaiah57:16 Sigenda kuvunaana emirembe gyonna, era sirisunguwala kutuusa ddi na ddi, kubanga omwoyo gw'omuntu gwandiyenjebukidde we ndi, omukka gw'obulamu gwe nakola." 
Isaiah57:17 Nanyiiga olw'obubi bw'amaddu ge; namukuba ne mmukweka amaaso gange olw'obusungu, naye yayongera mu bujeemu bw'amakubo g'omutima gwe." 
Isaiah57:18 Ndabye amakubo ge, kyokka nzija kumuwonya, nzija kumukulemberamu, muzzeemu omutima, abo abamukungubagira" 
Isaiah57:19 mbateeke ettendo ku mimwa gyabwe. Ddembe, ddembe eri ab'okumpi n'ewala,” Omukama y'agamba, “era nzija kubawonya." 
Isaiah57:20 Naye ababi bali ng'ennyanja esiikuuse; teyinza kuteeka; amayengo gaayo gasiikuula ettosi n'ebitoomi. 
Isaiah57:21 Ababi tebaba na mirembe,” Katonda wange bw'agamba." 
Isaiah58:1 “Leekaana n'amaanyi, towummula; situla eddoboozi lyo ng'eŋŋombe. Buulira abantu bange emisango gyabwe, n'ennyumba ya Yakobo ebibi byabwe." 
Isaiah58:2 Sso nnyini bannoonya buli lunaku, baagala okumanya amakubo gange, bali ng'eggwanga eryayisanga mu butuukirivu, eriteesammulanga biragiro bya Katonda waalyo. Bansaba amateeka g'obutuukirivu, baagala okusemberera Katonda." 
Isaiah58:3 ‘Lwaki tusiiba, ggwe n'otolaba? Lwaki twebonereza, ggwe n'otofaayo kukimanya?’ Naye mulabe, ku lunaku lwe musiiba, mwenoonyeza bibasanyusa, abakozi bammwe bonna ne mubanyigiriza." 
Isaiah58:4 Kale, musiibirira kuyomba na kulwana, na kukubagana bikonde olw'omutima omubi. Okusiiba nga bwe mukola kaakati, tekujja kutuusa mulanga gwammwe waggulu ddala." 
Isaiah58:5 Okwo kwe kusiiba kwe nasiima: okuba n'olunaku omuntu lwe yeebonerezaako, okuweta emitwe gyammwe ng'olumuli, oba okweyalira ekikutiya n'evvu? Okwo kw'oyita okusiiba, olunaku olusanyusa Omukama?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Kuno si kwe kusiiba kwe nsiima: Okuggyawo envuba z'obwonoonefu, okusumulula enkoba z'ekikoligo, okuta abadoobezebwa, n'okumenya buli kikoligo?" 
Isaiah58:7 Si kwe kwawuliza ku muyala ku mmere yo, n'omunaku emmomboze okumuwa aw'okusula, ng'olabye ali obwereere n'omwambaza, n'abo omubiri gwo n'omusaayi gwo n'otobakuba mabega?" 
Isaiah58:8 Olwo ekitangaala kyo kirivaayo nga mmambya, n'okuwona kwo kulirabika mangu; olwo obutuukirivu bwo bulikukulemberamu, n'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kirikuvaako ennyuma." 
Isaiah58:9 Olwo olikoowoola, Omukama n'akwanukula; oliwanjaga n'akugamba nti: ‘Ndi wano.’ “Bw'oliggyawo ekikoligo mu ggwe, okusonga olunwe n'ebigambo ebibi," 
Isaiah58:10 bw'olyeresa olw'omuyala, n'omalira omunaku ekyetaago kye, ekitangaala kyo kirisituka mu nzikiza, n'obudde bwo obw'akazigizigi buliba ng'ettuntu." 
Isaiah58:11 Bulijjo Omukama y'alikukulemberamu, alikumalira ebyetaago byo mu nsi enkalu; amagumba go aligagumya. Oliba ng'ennimiro efukirirwa, ng'ensulo ey'amazzi agatakalira." 
Isaiah58:12 Abantu bo baliddamu okuzimba amatongo ag'edda, olisitula emisingi egimaze emyaka n'emyaka; balikuyita ‘Muddaabiriza w'Ebisenge ebyabomolwa’, ‘Muzzaawo w'Amakubo okuli ebisulo’." 
Isaiah58:13 “Ebigere byo bw'olibitangira okumenya Sabbaato, n'okumala geekolera bibyo ku lunaku lwange olutukuvu, naye Sabbaato n'omanya nti ssanyu, nti lunaku lwa Mukama lwa kitiibwa, n'olukuza nga teweekwatira makubo go, n'otamala geekolera bibyo, oba okudda mu kwogera olutakutuka," 
Isaiah58:14 olwo olisanyukira mu Mukama, nange ndikwebagaza ku butemyo bw'ensi; ndikuliisa ku busika bwa jjajjaawo Yakobo.” Akamwa k'Omukama ke koogedde." 
Isaiah59:1 Laba, Omukono gw'Omukama teguyimpawadde nti teguununule; n'okutu kwe tekuggadde nti tekuuwulire." 
Isaiah59:2 Naye ebyonoono byammwe bibaawukanyizza ne Katonda wammwe; ebibi byammwe bibakwesezza amaaso ge, kyava alema okubawulira." 
Isaiah59:3 Kubanga emikono gyammwe gisaabaanye omusaayi, engalo zammwe zijjudde bugwenyufu; emimwa gyammwe gyogera bulimba, n'olulimi lwammwe lumuumuunya bibi." 
Isaiah59:4 Tewali akoowoola butuufu, yadde awoza mu mazima; embuto bafuna za kutawaana, ne bazaala bugwenyufu." 
Isaiah59:5 Babiika magi g'amasalambwa, ne balanga ebitimba bya nnabbubi; alya ku magi gaabwe afa bufi, ate erimu bwe lyasibwa mwalulibwamu ssalambwa." 
Isaiah59:6 Ebitimba byabwe temuyinza kuvaamu kyambalo, bye bakola temuyinza kuvaamu kyakwebikka; bye bakola bikolwa bibi, n'ebikolwa eby'obukambwe bye bibali mu ngalo." 
Isaiah59:7 Ebigere byabwe bidduka biraga eri kibi; banguyira okuyiwa omusaayi ogutaliiko musango. Bye balowooza, birowoozo bibi; mu makubo gaabwe mulimu kwonoona na kuzikirira." 
Isaiah59:8 Tebamanyi kkubo lya ddembe; mu bukubo bwabwe temuli butuufu, amakubo gaabwe baganyoddenyodde, aligakwata talitegeera kye bayita ddembe." 
Isaiah59:9 N'olw'ekyo obulungi butuli wala, n'obutuukirivu tebututuukako. Tunoonya ekitangaala, naye yiino nzikiza; tunoonya obutangaavu, naye ate tutambulira mu kibululu." 
Isaiah59:10 Tuwammanta ku kisenge nga bamuzibe, tuwammanta ng'abatalina maaso. Twesittala mu ttuntu ng'obudde obuwungedde; mu ba maanyi tuli ng'abantu abaafa." 
Isaiah59:11 Tuwuluguma ng'eddubu, tusindogoma ng'amayiba; tunoonya obwenkanya naye teri kantu; tulindirira obulokofu, naye butuli wala." 
Isaiah59:12 Anti emisango gyaffe mingi mu maaso go, n'ebibi byaffe bitulumiriza; buli kabanga emisango gyaffe giri naffe, ebyonoono byaffe tubimanyi:" 
Isaiah59:13 Okujeemera n'okwegaana Omukama, okuva ku Katonda waffe, okusaakiriza eby'obukambwe n'obujeemu; okwogera eby'obulimba emitima gyaffe bye gifumbiridde;" 
Isaiah59:14 obulungi busendeddwa nnyuma, n'obutuukirivu buli wala; mu mpya z'ekibuga amazima gasuuliddwa n'obutuufu tebuyinza kuyingira;" 
Isaiah59:15 amazima gabuze, n'eyeesamba ekibi afuuka muyiggo. Kino Omukama yakiraba, teyasanyuka okulaba ng'obutuufu tebuliiwo;" 
Isaiah59:16 Yalaba nga teri muntu; ne yeewuunya okulaba nga tewali adduukirira; awo omukono gwe ne gumuwa obuwanguzi, obutuukirivu bwe ne bumuwanirira." 
Isaiah59:17 Yayambala obutuukirivu ng'ekizibawo eky'ekyuma ku kifuba, n'enkuufiira ey'obulokofu ku mutwe gwe; yayambala ekyambalo eky'okuwoolera eggwanga, ne yeezingirira obumalirivu ng'ekyambalo." 
Isaiah59:18 Nga bwe bakoze, naye bw'alibasasula: alisasula n'obusungu abamukyawa, n'ebibonerezo abalabe be; ebizinga nabyo alibisasula ekibigyamu." 
Isaiah59:19 Olwo ebugwanjuba abantu balitya erinnya ly'Omukama; n'abaliba ebuvanjuba balitya ekitiibwa kye; kubanga alijja ng'engezi ey'amaanyi, omwoyo gw'Omukama gye gukuluggusa." 
Isaiah59:20 “Omununuzi alijja mu Siyoni, eri ab'omu Yakobo abavudde mu bisobyo,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah59:21 “Nze ku lwange, eno ye ndagaano yange nabo,” Omukama y'ayogera, “omwoyo gwange ogukuliko n'ebigambo byange bye nkutadde mu kamwa tebigenda kuva mu kamwa ko ne mu kamwa k'abaana bo, yadde mu kamwa k'abazzukulu bo, okuva kati n'emirembe gyonna,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah60:1 “Situka, yakaayakana, kubanga ekitangaala kyo kizze, n'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kisitukidde ku ggwe." 
Isaiah60:2 Laba, newandibadde ng'enzikiza ebuutikidde ensi, nga ne kazigizigi akutte abisse abantu, Omukama alisituka ku ggwe, n'ekitiibwa kye kirirabikira ku ggwe." 
Isaiah60:3 N'amawanga galijja eri ekitangaala kyo, ne bakabaka eri okutangalijja kw'okusituka kwo." 
Isaiah60:4 “Situla amaaso ogeebunguluze: bonna bakuŋŋaana, bajja gy'oli; batabani bo bava ewala, ne bawala bo baweekeddwa." 
Isaiah60:5 Oliraba n'oyakaayakana, omutima gwo gulitujja ne gujaguza; kubanga nnamunkukumbo w'ennyanja alikuleeterwa, obugagga bw'amawanga bulijja gy'oli." 
Isaiah60:6 Nnamungi w'eŋŋamiya alikubuutikira, eŋŋamiya envubuka ez'e Midiyaani ne Efa. Bonna okuva e Saba balijja, nga baleeta zaabu n'obubaani, nga balangirira ettendo ly'Omukama." 
Isaiah60:7 Amagana gonna ag'e Kedari baligakuŋŋaanyiza w'oli, endiga z'e Nebayoti zirikuweereza; zirikkirizibwa ku mwaliiro gwange ne zitambirwa, nange ndigulumiza ennyumba yange ey'ekitiibwa." 
Isaiah60:8 “B'ani abo abaseeyeeya ng'ekire, ng'amayiba agadda mu bisu byago?" 
Isaiah60:9 Wuuno ebizinga binnindirira, amaato g'e Tarusisi ge gakulembedde, galeeta abaana bo okuva ewala wamu ne ffeeza ne zaabu waabwe, olw'okubeera erinnya ly'Omukama Katonda wo, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, kubanga abagulumizza." 
Isaiah60:10 “Abagwira, balizimba bbugwe wo, bakabaka baabwe balikuweereza; okukukuba nakukubisa busungu, naye kati olw'okukwagala nkusaasidde." 
Isaiah60:11 Emiryango gyo bulijjo ginaabanga miggule, tegiggalwenga emisana n'ekiro, abantu basobole okukuleetera obugagga bw'ensi nga bakabaka baabwe baleetebwa mu nnyiriri." 
Isaiah60:12 Kubanga eggwanga n'obwakabaka ebitalikuweereza birizikirira, birisaanirawo ddala." 
Isaiah60:13 Ekitiibwa kya Lebanoni kirikujjako, ne faraawo, omuyovu ne sipulaasi byonna wamu, okuwoomya ekifo ky'Ekitukuvu kyange; era ekifo ky'ebigere byange ndikigulumiza." 
Isaiah60:14 Abaakutulugunya balijja ne bakufukaamirira; ne bonna abaakugayanga balivunnama ku bigere byo, balikuyita Ekibuga ky'Omukama, Siyoni w'Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah60:15 “Newandibadde wayabulirwa n'okyayibwa, nga tewakyali n'omu akuyitamu, ndikufuula wa kitiibwa emirembe gyonna, ensibuko y'essanyu eri amazadde n'amazadde." 
Isaiah60:16 Oliyonka amata g'amawanga, oliyonka amabeere ga bakabaka; olwo olitegeera nti nze Omukama nze Mulokozi wo, Omununuzi wo, Omuyinza wa Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Mu kifo ky'ekikomo ndireeta zaabu; mu kifo ky'ekyuma, ffeeza; mu kifo ky'emiti, kikomo; mu kifo ky'amayinja, kyuma. Ndikussaako abalabirizi bo nga lye ddembe, abakufuga nga bwe butuukirivu." 
Isaiah60:18 Obukambwe tebuliddayo kuwulirwa ku ttaka lyo, okwonoona n'okuzikiriza tebiriba mu nsi yo; bbugwe wo olimuyita Bulokofu, n'emiryango gyo, Ttendo." 
Isaiah60:19 Enjuba yo tekyaddayo kubeera kitangaala kyo emisana, yadde ekitangaala ky'omwezi okukwakira, kubanga Omukama y'aliba ekitangaala kyo eky'olubeerera; Katonda y'alibeera ekitiibwa kyo." 
Isaiah60:20 Enjuba yo tekyaddayo kugwa, yadde omwezi gwo okukkirira, kubanga Omukama y'aliba ekitangaala kyo eky'olubeerera; n'ennaku zo ez'okukungubaga zirikoma." 
Isaiah60:21 Olwo abantu bo bonna balibeera batuukirivu, balitwala ensi emirembe gyonna; bo gwe mutunsi gwe nsimbye, gwe mulimu gw'omukono gwange, ndyoke ngulumizibwe." 
Isaiah60:22 Asembayo obutono alifuuka olukumi, asinga obutene alifuuka eggwanga ery'obuyinza; nze Mukama; kino nzija kwanguwa okukituukiriza mu budde bwakyo.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Omwoyo gw'Omukama Katonda gundiko, kubanga Omukama yansiiga omuzigo okuleetera abanaku amawulire amalungi; yantuma okugumya abamenyese emitima, okulangirira okuteebwa eri abasibe, okuteebwa eri abaggaliddwa," 
Isaiah61:2 okulangirira omwaka ogw'ekisa ky'Omukama__ olunaku Katonda waffe kw'aliwoolerera eggwanga__ okukubagiza bonna abakungubaga 
Isaiah61:3 n'okufunira abo abakaabira mu Siyoni: okuwa engule mu kifo ky'evvu, omuzigo ogw'essanyu mu kifo ky'okukaaba, n'omunagiro ogw'ettendo mu kifo ky'omutima omuterebufu; baliyitibwa mivule gya butuukirivu, nnimiro ya Mukama, alyoke agulumizibwe." 
Isaiah61:4 Balizimba buto ebifulukwa ebya ddi na ddi, balisitula amatongo agamaze emyaka n'emyaka; balizzaawo ebibuga ebyakubibwa, n'ebyayonoonebwa ebimaze amazadde n'amazadde." 
Isaiah61:5 Ab'amawanga balijja ne babalundira amagana gammwe, abagwira be banaabalimiranga n'okulabirira emizabbibu gyammwe;" 
Isaiah61:6 kyokka mmwe munaayitibwanga bakabona ba Mukama, banaaboogerangako ng'abaweereza ba Katonda waffe; munaalyanga ku bugagga bw'amawanga era muneewaaniranga mu kitiibwa kyago." 
Isaiah61:7 Mu kifo ky'ensonyi zammwe, mulifuna ekitundu kya mirundi ebiri, mu kifo ky'obuswavu, mulisanyukira mu mugabo gwammwe; n'olw'ekyo mulifuna ebitundu bibiri mu nsi yammwe n'essanyu ery'olubeerera liriba lyammwe." 
Isaiah61:8 “Kubanga nze Omukama njagala mazima; nkyawa obunyazi n'okukola obubi. Ndibawa empeera yaabwe mu mazima, era ndikuba nabo endagaano ey'olubeerera." 
Isaiah61:9 Ezzadde lyabwe lirimanyika mu mawanga, n'abaana baabwe balimanyika mu bantu; bonna abalibalaba balimanya nti be bantu Omukama be yawa omukisa.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Nnaasanyukiranga nnyo mu Mukama, omwoyo gwange gunaajagulizanga mu Katonda wange; kubanga annyambazizza ekyambalo ky'obulokofu, annyambise omunagiro ogw'obutuukirivu, ng'omugole omusajja bwe yeewoomya n'omuge, n'omugole omukazi bwe yeetona n'amajjolobera ge." 
Isaiah61:11 Ng'ettaka bwe liwa bye limezezza okututunuka, n'ennimiro n'ewa ebisigiddwamu okukula, n'Omukama Katonda bw'alitutunusa atyo obutuukirivu n'ettendo mu maaso g'amawanga gonna." 
Isaiah62:1 Olw'okubeera Siyoni sijja kusirika, olw'okubeera Yeruzaalemu sigenda kuweera, okutuusa obutuukirivu bwakyo nga buvuddeyo ng'ekitangaala, n'okulokoka kwakyo nga kuvuddeyo ng'ettawaaza." 
Isaiah62:2 Amawanga galiraba obutuukirivu bwo, ne bakabaka bonna, ekitiibwa kyo; oliyitibwa erinnya eriggya akamwa k'Omukama lye kalikutuuma." 
Isaiah62:3 Olibeera omuge ogw'ekitiibwa mu mukono gw'Omukama, n'engule y'obwakabaka mu mukono gwa Katonda wo." 
Isaiah62:4 Toliddayo kuyitibwa Ayabuliddwa, n'ensi yo kuyitibwa Matongo; wabula ogenda kuyitibwa Essanyu lyange mu ye, ate ensi yo, Nfumbo; kubanga Omukama alikusanyukiramu, n'ensi yo eriba efumbiddwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Anti ng'omuvubuka bw'awasa omuwala embeerera, n'abaana bo bwe balikuwasa; era ng'awasizza bw'asanyukira omugole, ne Katonda wo bw'alikusanyukira." 
Isaiah62:6 Ayi Yeruzaalemu, bbugwe wo mmutaddeko abakuumi; emisana wonna n'ekiro kyonna tebajjanga kusirika. Mmwe abajjukira Omukama temwewa kuwummula," 
Isaiah62:7 naye temumuweeza okutuusa lw'anazzaawo Yeruzaalemu n'akifuula ettendo mu nsi. 
Isaiah62:8 Omukama yalayira ne ddyo we, n'omukono gwe ogw'obuyinza nti: “Siriddayo kuwa ŋŋano yo balabe bo balye, n'abagwira tebaliddayo kunywa ku vviini gye wateganira." 
Isaiah62:9 Wabula abo abaliba bagikungudde, baligirya ne batendereza Omukama; n'abo abalinoga emizabbibu, balinywera mu mpya z'ekitukuvu kyange.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Muyiteewo, muyiteewo mu miryango, mutegekere abantu ekkubo. Mukole, mukole oluguudo, mulondemu amayinja. Muwanikire abantu bendera." 
Isaiah62:11 Laba, Omukama alangiridde okutuusa ku nkingi z'ensi nti: “Mugambe Muwala wa Siyoni nti: ‘Laba, Omulokozi wo ajja! Wuuyo, empeera ye ali nayo, n'ebirabo bye bimukulembedde.’" 
Isaiah62:12 Balibayita Eggwanga Ettukuvu, Abanunule b'Omukama; ate ggwe oliyitibwa Anoonyezebwa, Ekibuga Ekitaabuliddwa.”" 
Isaiah63:1 Ono ani ajja ng'ava mu Edomu? Ava mu Bozura mu byambalo ebimyufu? Ani oyo awoomye mu byambalo bye? Ajja akaga mu bungi bw'amaanyi ge? “Ye Nze alangirira obutuukirivu, alina obuyinza okulokola.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Lwaki omunagiro gwo mumyufu? N'ebyambalo byo biri ng'eby'omusambi w'essogolero ly'evviini? 
Isaiah63:3 “Nsambye bw'omu mu ssogolero; era mu bantu tewabadde n'omu annyambako. Mbasambye mu busungu bwange, mbalinnyiridde mu buswandi bwange; omusaayi gwabwe ne gusammukira ebyambalo byange, ne nzirugaza engoye zange zonna." 
Isaiah63:4 Kubanga olunaku lw'okuwoolera eggwanga lumbadde mu mutima, n'omwaka ogw'okununula kwange gutuuse." 
Isaiah63:5 Mmazemaze, kyokka tebadde n'omu ayamba. Neewuunyizza okulaba nga tewali adduukirira; awo omukono gwange ne gumpa obuwanguzi, obusungu bwange ne bumpanirira." 
Isaiah63:6 Abantu nabasambirira mu busungu bwange, mu buswandi bwange ne mbatamiiza, omusaayi gwabwe ne nguyiwa mu ttaka.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Nnaanyumyanga ekisa ky'Omukama, era n'ettendo ly'Omukama, olwa byonna Omukama by'atukoledde, ebirungi enkumu by'akoledde ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, ng'aggya mu kusaasira kwe ne mu bungi bw'ekisa kye," 
Isaiah63:8 Yagamba nti: “Mazima bano bantu bange, abaana abatalikuusa;” bw'atyo n'abeera Mulokozi waabwe." 
Isaiah63:9 Mu nnaku zaabwe zonna naye yabonaabona; malayika w'okulabika kwe n'abalokola. Yabanunula lwa kubaagala na lwa kubasaasira; yabasitula n'abakongojjanga ennaku zonna ez'edda. 
Isaiah63:10 Naye bo baamujeemera, ne banakuwaza Mwoyo we omutukuvu; kyeyava abeefuulira, ne yeefuula omulabe waabwe, yennyini n'abalwanyisa." 
Isaiah63:11 Awo n'ajjukira ebiseera eby'edda: Musa n'abantu be: Ali ludda wa oyo eyabasomosa ennyanja, ng'ali n'omusumba w'eggana lye? Ali ludda wa oyo eyabassaamu Mwoyo we omutukuvu?" 
Isaiah63:12 Eyasindika omukono gwe ogw'ekitiibwa gubeere ku ddyo wa Musa, eyatemamu amazzi mu maaso gaabwe, yeefunire erinnya ery'olubeerera," 
Isaiah63:13 eyabayisa mu ddubi? Ng'embalaasi bw'eyita mu ddungu, tebeesittalako;" 
Isaiah63:14 ng'eggana bwe likkirira mu lusenyi, ne Mwoyo w'Omukama bwe yabawa okuwummula. Bw'otyo bwe wakulembera abantu bo weefunire erinnya ery'ekitiibwa." 
Isaiah63:15 Yima mu ggulu otunule wansi; yima mu kisulo kyo ekisukkirivu, ekitukuvu era eky'ekitiibwa. Okwagala kwo n'amaanyi go biri ludda wa? Ekisa kyo n'obusaasizi obinkisizza?" 
Isaiah63:16 Sso ggwe Kitaffe! Yiburayimu tatumanyi ne Yisirayeli tatutegeera; naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, ggwe Kitaffe, erinnya lyo ggwe Mununuzi waffe okuva edda lyonna." 
Isaiah63:17 Ayi Mukama, lwaki watuleka ne tuwaba ku makubo go, n'otugugubya emitima ne tutakutya? Komawo olw'okubeera abaweereza bo, ebika by'obusika bwo." 
Isaiah63:18 Abantu bo baamala akabanga katono nga be bannannyini Kitukuvu kyo, naye kati abalabe baffe balinnyiridde ekifo kyo ekitukuvu." 
Isaiah63:19 Tufuukidde ddala ng'abantu b'otofugangako, abantu abatayitibwangako linnya lyo. Singa nno oyabizza eggulu n'okka, ensozi zandijugumidde ggwe w'oli." 
Isaiah64:1 Ng'omuliro bwe gukoleeza obutittiriri, ne guleetera amazzi okwesera, kka omanyise erinnya lyo eri abalabe bo n'amawanga ogakankanye mu maaso go." 
Isaiah64:2 Bwe wakola eby'entiisa bye twali tutalindiridde, wakka, ensozi ne zikankana mu maaso go." 
Isaiah64:3 Okuva ddi tewabanga awulira, n'okutu okuwulira yadde eriiso okulaba Katonda omulala okuggyako ggwe akolera abo abasuubira mu ye." 
Isaiah64:4 Osisinkana oyo asanyukira okukola ebikolwa eby'obutuukirivu, abo abakujjukira mu makubo go; naye wasunguwala nga twonoonye, tuludde nga tukujeemedde, tulirokolebwa?" 
Isaiah64:5 Ffenna tufuukidde ddala ng'omuntu omwonoonefu, n'ebikolwa byaffe byonna eby'obutuukirivu biri ng'ekiwero ekijama. Ffenna tuwotose ng'ekikoola, n'ebibi byaffe bitufuumuula ng'empewo." 
Isaiah64:6 Tewali n'omu akoowoola linnya lyo, yadde agezaako kukukwata, kubanga otukwese amaaso go, otuwaddeyo mu buyinza bw'ebibi byaffe." 
Isaiah64:7 Sso ate, ayi Mukama, ggwe Kitaffe; ffe tuli bbumba, ggwe mubumbi waffe; ffenna tuli mulimu gwa mikono gyo." 
Isaiah64:8 Ayi Mukama, tosunguwala kiyitiridde; leka kujjukira bibi byaffe mirembe gyonna. Tukwegayiridde tunuulira, ffenna tuli bantu bo." 
Isaiah64:9 Ebibuga byo ebitukuvu bifuuse ddungu; Siyoni kifuuse matongo, Yeruzaalemu kyabuliddwa." 
Isaiah64:10 Ekiggwa kyaffe ekitukuvu era ettendo lyaffe, bajjajjaffe mwe baakutendererezanga, kyaggya omuliro, n'ebifo byaffe byonna ebyatusanyulanga, byafuuka bifulukwa." 
Isaiah64:11 Ayi Mukama, bino byonna nga bibadde bityo, era oneefuga? Onoosirika busirisi, n'otubonereza ekiyitiridde?" 
Isaiah65:1 “Neeraga abo abatanneebuuzanga, nazuulibwa abo abatannoonyangako. Nagamba eggwanga eritakowoolanga linnya lyange nti: ‘Nzuuno wano, nzuuno wano!’" 
Isaiah65:2 Olunaku lwonna emikono gyange nagyanjululiriza abantu abajeemu, abatambulira mu kkubo eritali ttuufu, abagoberera ebirowoozo byabwe," 
Isaiah65:3 abantu abannyiiza nga ndaba bwe nti: abaweereza ebitambiro mu nnimiro, abanyookeza obubaani ku myaliiro egy'amataffaali," 
Isaiah65:4 abatuula eyo mu malaalo, ne basula mu bifo ebyekusifu, abalya ennyama y'embizzi, ne mu nsaka zaabwe omuli omucuuzi gw'ennyama eyeenyinyalwa," 
Isaiah65:5 abagamba nti: ‘Dda eri, tonsemberera, sikulwa nga nkusiiga obutukuvu.’ Abantu abo mukka mu nnyindo zange, muliro ogwaka olunaku lwonna." 
Isaiah65:6 Laba, kyawandiikibwa mu kyenyi kyange nti: Sigenda kusirika, wabula ndibaddiza mu bujjuvu, nzija kubaddiza mu kikondoolo kyabwe:" 
Isaiah65:7 ebibi byabwe wamu n'ebya bakitaabwe,” Omukama bw'agamba, “kubanga batambiririra ku nsozi ne banvumira ku busozi, nzija kubapimira mu kikondoolo kyabwe ekisasula mu bujjuvu bye baakola.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ng'omubisi bwe gusangibwa nga gukyali mu kirimba ky'emizabbibu, abantu ne bagamba nti: ‘Togwonoona, gulimu omukisa,’ bwe ntyo bwe ndikola ku lw'abaweereza bange, siribazikiriza bonna." 
Isaiah65:9 Ndisitusa ezzadde mu Yakobo, ne mu Yuda abo abalitwala ensozi zange; abantu bange be neeroboza be balizisikira; eyo abaweereza bange gye banaabeeranga." 
Isaiah65:10 Saroni kirifuuka ddundiro lya magana, ate Ekiwonvu Akori kye kiriba obuwummuliro bw'ente, ez'abantu bange abannoonya." 
Isaiah65:11 Naye mmwe abayabulira Omukama, ne mwerabira olusozi lwange olutukuvu, abategekera Gaadi olujjuliro, ne mujjuliza Meni empaawo z'omwenge omutabule," 
Isaiah65:12 mbategekedde ekitala, era mwenna mulikutamira okusanjaga, kubanga bwe nakoowoola, temwayanukula; bwe nayogera, temwawuliriza, wabula mwakola bibi mu maaso gange, ne mulondawo ebitansanyusa.”" 
Isaiah65:13 N'olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Mulabe, abaweereza bange bagenda kulya, naye mmwe muligenda njala; abaweereza bange balinywa, naye mmwe mulisigala muli bayonta; abaweereza bange bagenda kusanyuka, naye mmwe mugenda kuswazibwa." 
Isaiah65:14 Abaweereza bange bagenda kuyimba olw'essanyu mu mitima, naye mmwe mulisinda olw'obulumi mu mutima; mulikuba ebiwoobe olw'ennaku mu mwoyo." 
Isaiah65:15 Erinnya lyange mujja kulirekera abalondemu bange balyeyambise okuvumirira nti: ‘Omukama Katonda akukube akutte,’ naye abaweereza be alibayita erinnya eddala." 
Isaiah65:16 Buli alyesabira emikisa ku nsi, alyesabira mu Katonda ow'amazima; na buli yenna alayira mu nsi, alirayiranga Katonda ow'amazima; kubanga obunaku obwasooka bulyerabirwa, bulinkwekebwa amaaso gange.”" 
Isaiah65:17 “Laba, kati ntondawo eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya; ebyakulembera tebikyaddayo kujjukirwa, yadde okuddamu okulowoozebwako." 
Isaiah65:18 Kyokka sanyuka bulijjo ojagulize mu ebyo bye ntonda, kubanga nditonda Yeruzaalemu abeere Ssanyu, n'abantu baakyo Kujaguza." 
Isaiah65:19 Nnaasanyukiranga mu Yeruzaalemu ne njaguliza mu bantu bange; eddoboozi ly'ebiwoobe terikyaddayo kuwulirwamu, yadde eddoboozi ly'okukaaba." 
Isaiah65:20 Mu kyo temulisangibwamu kaana kamala nnaku bunaku, yadde omukadde atawangadde kumalako kiseera kye, kubanga oyo aliba mwana anaafiiranga mu myaka ekikumi; oyo ataawezenga kikumi aliyitibwanga muvumirire." 
Isaiah65:21 Balizimba amayumba ne bagasulamu, balisimba emizabbibu ne balya ku bibala byagyo." 
Isaiah65:22 Tebalizimba mayumba ate ne gasulwamu balala, tebalisimba ate omulala n'alya; anti ng'emiti bwe giwangaala, n'abantu bange bwe banaawangaalanga, abalondemu bange balyeyagaliranga ebbanga ggwanvu mu bibala by'emikono gyabwe." 
Isaiah65:23 Tebaliteganira bwereere, era tebalizaala baana ba kulaba bikangabwa, kubanga baliba baana ba Mukama be yawa omukisa, bo wamu n'abaana baabwe." 
Isaiah65:24 Banaabanga tebannayita, nze ne nnyanukula; banaabanga bakyayogera, nze nga nawulidde dda." 
Isaiah65:25 Omusege n'akaliga biririira wamu; empologoma erirya essubi ng'ente; naye enfuufu y'eriba emmere y'omusota. Tebirikolera bubi oba okulumya ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah66:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Eggulu ye nnamulondo yange, ate ensi ke katebe k'ebigere byange; nnyumba ki gye munanzimbira? Kifo ki mwe nnaawummulira?" 
Isaiah66:2 Bino byonna mukono gwange si gwe gwabikola, era bino byonna si byange?” Omukama bw'agamba. “Kyokka omuntu asikiriza amaaso gange y'ono: omwetoowaze ate eyeenenyezza mu mwoyo, ajugumira awali ekigambo kyange." 
Isaiah66:3 “Atambira ente ennume ali ng'oyo atta omuntu; atambira endiga, ng'oyo amenya ensingo y'embwa; aweereza ebitambiro, ng'oyo aweereza omusaayi gw'embizzi; n'anyookeza obubaani obw'ekijjukizo, ng'oyo asinza ebitaliimu. Bano beerondeddewo amakubo gaabwe, emyoyo gyabwe gisanyukira mu byenyinyalwa byabwe;" 
Isaiah66:4 nange nno ndibalonderawo kubajooga, ne mbaleetera bye basinga okutya, kubanga bwe nakoowoola, tewali yayanukula, bwe nayogera, tewali yawuliriza; wabula baakola bibi mu maaso gange, ne balondawo ebitansanyusa.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama mmwe abajugumira awali ekigambo kye: “Baganda bammwe ababakyaye, ababasosola olw'okubeera erinnya lyange, bagambye nti: ‘Ka Omukama agulumizibwe, tulabe bwe musanyuka.’ Naye bajja kuswaluka." 
Isaiah66:6 “Muwulire, oluyoogaano okuva mu kibuga. Eddoboozi okuva mu Kiggwa. Lye ddoboozi ly'Omukama ng'aweera abalabe be ekibagwanidde." 
Isaiah66:7 “Nga tannaba na kulumwa, n'azaala; nga tannakwatibwa na bulumi bwa kuzaala, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi." 
Isaiah66:8 Ani yali awulidde ekiri ng'ekyo? Ani yali alabye ekiri ng'ekyo? Ensi eyinza okuzaalibwa mu lunaku olumu, oba eggwanga okuzaalibwa mu kaseera obuseera? Kubanga Siyoni olwali okulumwa, n'azaala abaana be." 
Isaiah66:9 Ntuusa omuntu ku kuzaala ate ne simuwa kuwona?” Omukama bw'agamba. “Oba nze awa okuzaala ate nzigalira olubuto?” Katonda wammwe bw'agamba. 
Isaiah66:10 “Musanyukire wamu ne Yeruzaalemu, mumujagulizeeko mmwe abamwagala; musanyuke, mwenna ababadde bamukaabira," 
Isaiah66:11 mulyoke muyonke mukkute ku mabeere ge agakubagiza, mulyoke munywe nga bwe musanyuka ku mabeere ge agagabizza.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Anti Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Nzija kukireetera eddembe eriri ng'omugga, n'ekitiibwa ky'amawanga ekiri ng'engezi ey'amaanyi; muliyonka ne musitulirwa mu mikono gye, mulibuusibwabuusibwa ku maviivi ge." 
Isaiah66:13 Ng'oli nnyina bw'amugumya, nange bwe ndibagumya; mulikubagizibwa mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Isaiah66:14 Bwe mulikiraba, emitima gyammwe girijaganya, amagumba gammwe galiyala ng'omuddo; omukono gw'Omukama gulimanyisibwa abaweereza be, naye abalabe alibalaga obusungu bwe." 
Isaiah66:15 Laba, Omukama ajjira mu muliro, ekigaali kye kiri nga kibuyaga, alage obusungu bwe n'obukambwe, era akomeko n'ennimi z'omuliro," 
Isaiah66:16 kubanga Omukama aliwa ensala ye n'omuliro, aliramula abantu bonna n'ekitala, era bangi Omukama b'alisanjaga.”" 
Isaiah66:17 “Abo abeetukuza ne beewoomya balyoke bagende mu nnimiro, nga bagoberera oyo ali wakati, abalya ennyama y'embizzi, ebyenyinyalwa n'emmese, baliggwaawo lumu,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah66:18 “Nze, olw'ebikolwa byabwe n'ebirowoozo byabwe, nzija kujja nkuŋŋaanye amawanga n'ennimi; balijja ne balaba ekitiibwa kyange." 
Isaiah66:19 “Ndibassaamu n'akabonero, era abamu ku bakaawonawo ndibasindika mu mawanga: e Tarusisi, Puli, Ludi, Meseke, Rosi, Tubali, mu Yavani ne mu bizinga ebiri ewala ebitawuliranga ku ttutumu lyange yadde okulaba ku kitiibwa kyange. Balirangirira mu mawanga gonna ekitiibwa kyange." 
Isaiah66:20 Era baliggya baganda bammwe bonna mu mawanga gonna ne babaleeta ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu, mu Yeruzaalemu eri Omukama, ku mbalaasi, mu bigaali, ku nnyinyo, ku nnyumbu ne ku ŋŋamiya,” Omukama bw'agamba, “nga Abayisirayeli bwe batwalira mu kibya ekiyonjo ebitone byabwe eby'obuwunga mu nnyumba y'Omukama." 
Isaiah66:21 Era abamu mu bo ndibafuula bakabona n'Abaleevi,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah66:22 “Kubanga ng'eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya, bye ndikola, bwe birinywerera mu maaso gange,” Omukama bw'agamba, “n'ezzadde lyammwe awamu n'erinnya lyammwe bwe birisigalawo." 
Isaiah66:23 “Okuva ku Kuboneka kw'Omwezi okumu okutuusa ku kulala, n'okuva ku Sabbaato emu okutuusa ku ndala, buli muntu alijja avunname mu maaso gange,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Isaiah66:24 “Balifuluma ne batunula ku mirambo gy'abantu abanjeemeranga; envunyu yaabwe tegenda kufa, n'omuliro gwabwe tegulizikira, era baliba kyenyinyalwa eri abantu bonna.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Ebigambo bya Yeremiya, mutabani wa Kilukiya, ow'omu bakabona b'e Anatoti, mu nsi ya Benyamiini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja gy'ali mu mirembe gya Yosiya mutabani wa Amoni, kabaka wa Yuda, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'esatu ogw'obwakabaka bwe," 
Jeremiah1:3 era ne mu mirembe gya Yoyakimu, mutabani wa Yosiya, kabaka wa Yuda, okutuusa mu mwezi ogwokutaano ogw'omwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu ogwa Zedekiya mutabani wa Yosiya, kabaka wa Yuda, ab'e Yeruzaalemu lwe baagenda mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja gye ndi nga kigamba nti: 
Jeremiah1:5 “Nali sinnakukola mu lubuto lwa nnyoko, nga nkumanyi; wali tonnaba na kuzaalibwa, ne nkutukuza, ne nkulonda obeere mulanzi eri amawanga.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Yii, Mukama Katonda, nga simanyi kwogera, nkyali mwana bwana!”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Leka kugamba nti: ‘Ndi mwana bwana;’ kubanga buli bantu gye nnaakutuma, ojja kugendayo, na byonna bye nnaakulagira, ojja kubyogera." 
Jeremiah1:8 Tobatya, kubanga ndi naawe okukutaasa; Omukama y'agamba.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Awo Omukama n'agolola omukono gwe n'akwata ku kamwa kange; Omukama n'angamba nti: “Kati nkutadde ebigambo byange mu kamwa ko. 
Jeremiah1:10 Laba, olwa leero nkutadde ku mawanga ne ku bwakabaka, osimbule, oyabye, ozikirize, osuule eri, ozimbe, osimbe.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja gye ndi, nga kigamba nti: “Yeremiya, olaba ki?” Nze ne nziramu nti: “Ndaba omuti ogw'endoozi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Awo Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Olabye bulungi. Kubanga ntunudde ndabe ekigambo kyange nga kituukirira.” 
Jeremiah1:13 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja gye ndi omulundi ogwokubiri, ne kigamba nti: “Olaba ki?” Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ndaba entamu etokota ng'ebunduse okuva emambuka.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Awo Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Okuva emambuka akabi kanaabundulwa ku bonna abali mu nsi," 
Jeremiah1:15 ŋŋenda kukunga obwakabaka bwonna obw'emambuka,” Omukama bw'agamba, “balijja ne basimba buli omu nnamulondo ye ku mizigo gy'emiryango gya Yeruzaalemu; okwebungulula bbugwe we yenna na buli kibuga kya Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Nzija kwatula ensala yange ku bo olw'okusobya kwabwe kwonna, bwe banjabulira ne banyookeza balubaale obubaani, ne basinza emikono gyabwe bye gyakola." 
Jeremiah1:17 Ggwe nno weekindikire, situka, bagambe byonna bye nkulagira. Tebakutekemula, oba si ekyo ndikutekemula mu maaso gaabwe." 
Jeremiah1:18 Olwa leero nkufudde kibuga ekiriko bbugwe, empagi ey'ekyuma, ekigo eky'ekikomo, owakanye ensi yonna, bakabaka ba Yuda, abakungu baamu, bakabona baayo n'abantu bonna mu ggwanga." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bajja kukulwanyisa, naye tebagenda kukusobola, kubanga nze ndi naawe okukutaasa.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah2:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja gye ndi, nga kigamba nti:" 
Jeremiah2:2 “Genda oleekaanire mu matu ga Yeruzaalemu, ogambe nti: Omukama kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Nzijukira omukwano gw'omu buvubuka bwo, okwagala kw'obugole bwo, nga bwe wangobereranga mu ddungu, mu nsi omutaasigibwa kantu." 
Jeremiah2:3 Yisirayeli yali mutukuvu eri Omukama; ebibala ebisooka eby'amakungula ge; bonna abaamukavvulanga bazzizza omusango, era akabi kaabajjira,’ ” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah2:4 Muwulire ekigambo kya Mukama, mmwe ennyumba ya Yakobo, nammwe mwenna ebika eby'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah2:5 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Bajjajjammwe banzuulamu bubi ki balyoke banneesambire ewala, ne bagoberera ekitaliimu, ne bafuuka ekitagasa?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Tebaabuuza nti: ‘Omukama ali ludda wa eyatuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, eyatuyisa mu ddungu, mu nsi ey'ensenyi n'ebikonko, mu nsi enkalu n'enzikiza ekutte, mu nsi omutayita muntu, omutaali yasengamu?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Nabayingiza mu nsi ey'ennimiro z'ebibala, mulyenga ku bibala byayo n'ebirungi byamu enfaafa. Naye bwe mwajja, ne mujaajaamya ensi yange, obusika bwange ne mubufuula ekyenyinyalwa." 
Jeremiah2:8 Bakabona tebaabuuza nti: ‘Omukama aluwa?’ Abakuumi b'Etteeka tebaamanya; abakulembeze banjeemera; abalanzi ne balanga nga bajulira Babaali, ne bagoberera ekitaliimu." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Kyenva mbavunaana nate,” Omukama y'agamba, “ndivunaana n'abaana b'abaana bammwe." 
Jeremiah2:10 Kale muwunguke mulage ku bizinga bye Kittimu mulabe, oba mutume e Kedari mwekkaanye nnyo, mulabe obanga waali wabaddeyo ekintu ekifaanana kiti:" 
Jeremiah2:11 Waali wabaddewo eggwanga eryali likyusizza balubaale baalyo? So nno ate bo mu butuufu si balubaale, naye abantu bange ekitiibwa kyabwe bakiwanyisaamu n'ekitaliimu." 
Jeremiah2:12 Ggulu, wuniikirira olwa kino, tekemuka, wesisiwale nnyo,” Omukama y'agamba," 
Jeremiah2:13 “kubanga abantu bange bazzizza emisango ebiri: Banjabulidde nze oluzzi olw'amazzi amalamu, ne beesimira ebidiba, ebidiba ebyatifu ebitanyweza mazzi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Yisirayeli muweereza, muddu eyazaalibwa awaka? Lwaki bafuuse omunyago?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Empologoma zimuvuumidde, ziwulugumye. Ensi ye bagizisizza; ebibuga bye byokeddwa, bifuuse matongo." 
Jeremiah2:16 Abasajja b'e Memfi ne Takupanikesi bakubotodde akawompo. 
Jeremiah2:17 Kino si ggwe wakyereetera ng'oyabulira Mukama Katonda wo bwe yali ng'akukulembera mu kkubo? 
Jeremiah2:18 Kati okima ki e Misiri okunywa amazzi ga Sikori, Kiki ekikutwala mu Assuri okunywa amazzi g'Omugga?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Obugwenyufu bwo bulikubonereza, n'obujeemu bwo bulikuvunaana. Weetegereze olabe bwe kiri ekibi ate bwe kiruma, ggwe okwabulira Omukama Katonda wo, n'obutantyako n'akamu,” Omukama Katonda w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Dda wamenya ekikoligo kyo, wakutula emiguwa gyo; n'ogamba nti: ‘Sijja kuweereza.’ Naye ku buli kasozi akawanvu, na buli wansi wa muti oguggumizza weeyala wansi nga malaaya." 
Jeremiah2:21 Sso nze nakusimba ng'omuzabbibu ogw'embala, oguva ku kikolo namaddala; ate wajja otya okuneefuukira n'ofuuka omuzabbibu omugwira?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Newandibadde ng'onaaba n'oluvu, ne weeyamba sabbuuni mungi, ekko ly'ekibi kyo likyandi awo mu maaso,” Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Jeremiah2:23 “Oyinza otya okugamba nti: ‘Seegwagwawazza, sigobereranga Babaali’? Laba nga bwe weeyisa mu kiwonvu, tegeera kye wakola. Ggwe omwana gw'eŋŋamiya oguwenyuka, ogutabaalira mu bisinde byagwo;" 
Jeremiah2:24 endogoyi ey'ettale emanyidde eddungu, ewejjawejjera empewo ng'erunduzze; ng'esaze ani anaagitambaala? Eziginoonya tezirina kwekooya, zijja kugisanga mu biseera byayo." 
Jeremiah2:25 Ekigere kyo tokireka kubeera kyereere, n'omumiro toguganya kukala. Naye ggwe wagamba nti: ‘Bya busa! Nze neeyagalira bagwira, era be nzija okugoberera.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Ng'omubbi bw'aswala ng'akwatiddwa, n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli bw'eswadde, bo, bakabaka baabwe n'abakungu baabwe, bakabona baabwe n'abalanzi baabwe." 
Jeremiah2:27 Bagamba omuti nti: ‘Ggwe kitange,’ n'ejjinja nti: ‘Ggwe onzaala.’ Nze bankubye amabega, tebantunuulira; naye akabi bwe kabagwira, olwo nga bagamba nti: ‘Situka otuwonye!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Balubaale be mwekolera bali ludda wa? Basituke bakuwonye obanga basobola bw'oba mu kabi. Ndaba ebibuga byo bwe byenkana obungi, ne balubaale bo we benkana, Yuda." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Lwaki munvunaana? Mmwe mwenna mwanjeemera,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah2:30 “Nabonerereza bwereere abaana bammwe; tebalina kye baayiga; ekitala kyammwe kyasaanya abalanzi bammwe, ng'empologoma enkavvuzi." 
Jeremiah2:31 Mmwe ab'ezzadde lino, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama: Yisirayeli mmubeeredde ddungu, oba ensi ey'enzikiza ekutte? Lwaki abantu bange bagamba nti: ‘Ffe twebungeetera, tetukyajja gy'oli’?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Omuwala embeerera ayinza okwerabira ebyokwewoomya, oba omugole ebyambalo by'obugole? Naye bo abantu bange banneerabira n'ennaku kati tezikyabalika." 
Jeremiah2:33 “Ng'omanyi okusala amagezi ng'onoonya okwagalibwa. N'abakazi ababi bayigidde ku ngeri zo. 
Jeremiah2:34 Ne ku byambalo byammwe oli asangako enkulukuse z'omusaayi gw'abanaku abataliiko musango. Sso tewabasanga nga bamenya okuyingira. Newandibadde bwe gutyo bwe guli," 
Jeremiah2:35 ggwe wagamba nti: ‘Siriiko musango, awo nno obusungu bwe bwanvaako.’ Naye nno nzija kugukusalira, olw'okugamba nti: ‘Sikolanga kibi.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Ng'otangatanga nnyo! Ng'okyusakyusa amakubo go! Misiri ajja kukuswaza nga Assuri bwe yakukola. 
Jeremiah2:37 Nayo olivaayo ng'emikono gikuli ku mutwe, kubanga Omukama asambazze abo be weesiga; togenda kubafunamu kirungi.” Balikomawo awali Katonda" 
Jeremiah3:1 “Omusajja bw'agoba mukazi we, n'omukazi n'amuvaako n'afumbirwa omusajja omulala, aba akyasobola okuddira omukazi? Ensi eyo eba tefaafaaganidde ddala? Naye ggwe akoze obwamalaaya ne baganzi bo enkumu, kati n'odda gye ndi?” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah3:2 “Yimusa amaaso ku busozi obwereere olabe. Waliwo akafo w'otaganzikiddwa? Watuulanga ku makubo n'obalinda, nga Omuwarabu mu ddungu. Ensi wagyonoona n'obwamalaaya bwo, n'obugwagwa bwo." 
Jeremiah3:3 Oluwandaggirize kyeruvudde luziyizibwa, n'enkuba ya Ttoggo n'etajja. Naye ggwe amaaso go makalu ng'aga malaaya, towuliramu na nsonyi." 
Jeremiah3:4 Siwankakoowoola nti: ‘Kitange, mukwano gwange okuva mu buvubuka bwange," 
Jeremiah3:5 onoonyiiga ebbanga lyonna? Onoosunguwala mirembe gyonna?’ Bwe mutyo bwe mwogera, naye mwonoona nga bwe mwagala.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Mu mirembe gya kabaka Yosiya Omukama yagamba nti: “Olabye Yisirayeli omujeemu ky'akoze? Alaze ku buli kasozi akagulumivu na buli wansi wa muti oguggumizza n'akolerawo obwamalaaya. 
Jeremiah3:7 Nalowooza nti bw'anaamala okukola ebyo byonna, anadda gye ndi, naye teyakikola, ate muganda we Yuda ataali mwesigwa n'akiraba." 
Jeremiah3:8 Nawa Yisirayeli omujeemu ebbaluwa ey'obugobe ne mmugoba olw'obwenzi bwe. Kyokka nalaba nga muganda we Yuda ataali mwesigwa teyatyako n'akamu; yagenda bugenzi naye n'akola obwamalaaya. 
Jeremiah3:9 Kubanga obwamalaaya bwe ku ye tekyali kantu, ensi yagyonoona, n'akola obwenzi n'amayinja n'emiti." 
Jeremiah3:10 Newandibadde bwe gutyo bwe gwali, muganda we ataali mwesigwa teyadda gye ndi na mutima gwe gwonna, wabula na bukuusa,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah3:11 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Yisirayeli omujeemu mutuukirivu okusinga Yuda atali mwesigwa. 
Jeremiah3:12 Genda nno olangirire ebigambo bino ng'otunuulidde emambuka, ogambe nti: “ ‘Komawo, Yisirayeli omujeemu,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘sijja kukutunuuliza maaso manyiivu, kubanga ndi wa kisa.’ Omukama y'agamba. ‘Sijja kusunguwala budde bwonna." 
Jeremiah3:13 Kyokka kkiriza ekyonoono kyo: Wajeemera Omukama Katonda wo, wamala geeyisa otyo mu bagwira, wansi wa buli muti oguggumizza, n'otogondera ddoboozi lyange,’ Omukama y'agamba.”" 
Jeremiah3:14 “Mukomeewo, mmwe abaana abajeemu,” Omukama y'agamba, “kubanga nze mukama wammwe; nzija kubaggyayo, omu mu kibuga, babiri mu kika, mbaleete mu Siyoni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ndibalabira abasumba be neesiimidde, balibakulembera n'amagezi n'okutegeera." 
Jeremiah3:16 Mu nnaku ezo,” Omukama y'agamba, “bwe muliba mumaze okwala n'okuzaala ku nsi, tebaliddayo kugamba nti: ‘Ssanduuku y'Endagaano y'Omukama!’ Baliba tebakyagirowoozaako, yadde okugijjukira, newandibadde okugisaalirwa, era terikolwayo ndala." 
Jeremiah3:17 Mu budde obwo Yeruzaalemu balikiyita ‘Nnamulondo ya Katonda.’ Amawanga gonna galikuŋŋaanira mu Yeruzaalemu okugulumiza erinnya ly'Omukama. Tebaliddayo na kugoberera bukakanyavu bwa mutima gwabwe omubi. 
Jeremiah3:18 Mu nnaku ezo ennyumba ya Yuda eryegatta ku nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, era bombi baliviirayo wamu mu nsi y'emambuka ne balaga mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjammwe okuba obusika." 
Jeremiah3:19 “Nze kennyini nagamba nti: Wamma nnaakuteeka mu baana bange, ne nkuwa ensi eyeegombebwa, obusika obusinga obulungi mu mawanga. Nalowooza nti olimpita lya ‘Kitange’, nti tolirekera awo kungoberera." 
Jeremiah3:20 Naye okufaanana omukazi atali mwesigwa eri bba, nammwe bwe mutaali beesigwa gye ndi, ayi nnyumba ya Yisirayeli,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah3:21 Eddoboozi liwulirwa ku busozi obwereere, okukaaba n'okuwanjaga kw'abantu ba Yisirayeli, kubanga ekkubo lyabwe balyonoonye; beerabidde Omukama, Katonda waabwe." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Mukomeewo mmwe abaana abajeemu; nzija kubawonya obujeemu bwammwe.” “ Tuutuno tuzze gy'oli, kubanga ggwe Mukama, Katonda waffe." 
Jeremiah3:23 Mazima, obusozi bwali bulimba n'oluyoogaano lw'oku nsozi. Mazima mu Mukama Katonda waffe mwe muli obulokofu bwa Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah3:24 Okuva mu buvubuka bwaffe, bya nsonyi bye byamira emirimu gya bajjajjaffe, endiga zaabwe n'ente zaabwe, batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe." 
Jeremiah3:25 Twebake mu nsonyi zaffe, obuswavu bwaffe butubikke, kubanga twasobya ew'Omukama Katonda waffe, ffe ne bajjajjaffe; okuviira ddala mu buvubuka bwaffe n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero, tetwawuliriza ddoboozi lya Mukama Katonda waffe.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 “Oba odda, ayi Yisirayeli,” Omukama y'agamba, “dda gye ndi. Bw'oggya mu maaso gange ebyenyinyalwa byo, n'otoyongera kutangatanga," 
Jeremiah4:2 bw'onoolayiranga nti: ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu,’ mu mazima mu bwesimbu ne mu butuukirivu, olwo amawanga gonna ganaaweerwanga omukisa mu ye, era mu ye mwe ganaatenderanga.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Omukama kino ky'agamba abantu ba Yuda n'abatuuze b'omu Yeruzaalemu: “Mukabale ebisambu byammwe, muleke kusiga mu maggwa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Mwetayirire olw'Omukama, muggyeko ekikuta ky'omutima gwammwe, mmwe abantu ba Yuda n'abatuuze b'omu Yeruzaalemu, sikulwa ng'obusungu bwange butumbuka ng'omuliro, ne bwaka ne wabula n'abuzikiriza, olw'ebikolwa byammwe ebibi." 
Jeremiah4:5 “Mulangirire mu Yuda, mubuulire mu Yeruzaalemu, mugambe nti: ‘Mufuuwe eŋŋombe wonna mu nsi,’ muleekaane, muwoggane, mugambe nti: ‘Mukuŋŋaane, tuddukire mu bibuga eby'ebigo ebigumu.’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Musimbe ebendera mu Siyoni; mudduke, temuyimirira. Kubanga ndeeta akabi okuva emambuka, okuzikirira okw'amaanyi, okunene.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Empologoma esituse okuva mu nfo yaayo, omuzikiriza w'amawanga asimbudde ekigere; avuddeyo ewuwe ensi yo alyoke agifuule matongo; ebibuga byo bya kuleka bifulukwa, bya kusigala matongo." 
Jeremiah4:8 Kale nno mwesibe ebikutiya, mukungubage, mukube ebiwoobe; kubanga obusungu bw'Omukama obwesera tebutuvuddeeko." 
Jeremiah4:9 “Ku olwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “kabaka n'abakungu be emmeeme eribagwa wala, bakabona baliwuniikirira n'abalanzi be baliwunga.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Omukama Katonda, nga walimba abantu bano ne Yeruzaalemu bwe wagamba nti: ‘Mulifuna eddembe’ sso ng'ekitala kituli ku mimiro!”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Mu budde obwo baligamba eggwanga lino ne Yeruzaalemu nti: “Embuyaga eyokya ey'oku busozi bw'omu ddungu obwereere ekunta, ejja eri abantu bange; naye tejjirira kuwewa oba kukuŋŋunta." 
Jeremiah4:12 Embuyaga eyitiridde ku bino amaanyi eva gye ndi. Kati njatula ensala yange ku bo.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Laba ajja ng'ebire, n'ebigaali bye bifaanana ng'omuyaga; embalaasi ze ziwenyuka okukira empungu. Zitusanze! Tufudde!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Wattu Yeruzaalemu, omutima gwo gunaazeeko ekibi owonyezebwe; olituusa wa okwerekamu ebirowoozo by'obugwenyufu bwo?"
