Jeremiah4:15 Kubanga eddoboozi lirangirira okuva e Daani; lirangirira akabi okuva mu nsozi za Efurayimu: 
Jeremiah4:16 “Mulangirire eri amawanga, mugambe Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Eggye lizinze nga liva mu nsi ey'ewala, balayiza enduulu ku bibuga bya Yuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Bamwebunguludde ng'abakuumi b'ennimiro, kubanga kyanjeemera,’ Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah4:18 Empisa zo n'ebikolwa byo bye bikakusombedde; eno ye nnaku yo! Ng'ekaawa! Ng'esogga n'omutima!” 
Jeremiah4:19 Olubuto, olubuto! Neenyoola olw'obulumi. Ebisenge by'omutima gwange! Omutima gwange guntujja muli munda; Sisobola kusirika. Anti mpulidde eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe, enduulu y'olutalo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Kabenje ku kabenje; ensi yonna efuuse matongo; Weema zange amangu ago zisaanyiziddwawo, ensiisira zange mu kaseera buseera." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ndituusa wa okutunuulira ebendera, n'okuwulira eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe?" 
Jeremiah4:22 “Abantu bange basiru; tebamanyi. Biwowongole bya baana, tebalina ke bategeera; bakugu mu kukola obubi; tebamanyi kukola kirungi.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Natunula, ensi temwali kantu, nga njereere, n'olubaale, ekitangaala kyalwo nga kizaamye." 
Jeremiah4:24 Natunula, ensozi nga zinyeenya, n'obusozi bwonna nga buyuuga." 
Jeremiah4:25 Natunula, nga tewakyali bantu; ebinyonyi byonna eby'omu bbanga nga bidduse." 
Jeremiah4:26 Natunula, eyali ensi engimu, nga ddungu; ebibuga byamu byonna nga matongo, mu maaso g'Omukama, mu maaso g'obusungu bwe obwesera." 
Jeremiah4:27 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ensi yonna egenda kulekebwa matongo, naye era sigenda kugisaanyizaawo ddala." 
Jeremiah4:28 “N'olw'ekyo ensi erikungubaga olw'ekyo, n'eggulu waggulu lirikwata kazigizigi, kubanga njogedde, nateesa, sigenda kwejjulula; sigenda kukuba kaddannyuma.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Olw'okuwuuma kw'abeebagazi n'abalasa obusaale, buli kibuga kidduka. Beesogga ebisaka; bawalampa enjazi. Ebibuga byonna birekeddwa ttayo; temusigadde asulamu." 
Jeremiah4:30 Ggwe nno omuleke amatongo, onookola ki? Otegeeza ki okwambala ebitwakaavu, n'okwenaanika amagemu ga zaabu, n'okutona amaaso go ne langi? Weenyiririza bwereere. Baganzi bo bakunyooma; baagala kukutta." 
Jeremiah4:31 Mpulira okukaaba ng'okw'omukazi alumwa okuzaala, obubalagaze bw'azaala ogusooka; emiranga gya muwala wa Siyoni ataawa; akuba emikono ng'agamba nti: “Ndabye! Nzirika! Mpeereddwayo mu batemu”" 
Jeremiah5:1 “Muyiteeyite mu nguudo za Yeruzaalemu, mwekalirize, mwekkaanye, munoonye mu mpya zaamu; bwe musangamu omu bw'ati omwesimbu anoonya amazima, kale ekibuga ekyo nnaakisaasira." 
Jeremiah5:2 Wadde bagamba nti: ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu,’ mazima balayira bya bulimba.”" 
Jeremiah5:3 Ayi Mukama, amaaso go teganoonya mazima? Obakubye, tebalina kye bawuliddemu; obabetense, tebalina kye bayize. Bagubizza emitwe gyabwe okukira olwazi; bagaanyi okweddamu." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Bano banaku bunaku, basiru; kubanga tebamanyi kkubo lya Mukama, yadde amateeka ga Katonda waabwe.”" 
Jeremiah5:5 Nzija kugenda eri abakungu njogere nabo, kubanga bo bamanyi ekkubo ly'Omukama n'amateeka ga Katonda waabwe. Naye nabo kye kimu, bamenye ekikoligo, bakutudde emiguwa." 
Jeremiah5:6 Empologoma ey'omu kibira kyeriva ebalumba, omusege gw'omu ddungu gulibavunjaga, engo erikuumirira kumpi n'ebibuga byabwe, buli afuluma alitaagulwataagulwa, kubanga ebibi byabwe bingi, n'obujeemu bwabwe bunyinyittidde." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Lwaki nandikusaasidde? Abaana bo banvuddeko, ne balayira balubaale abatali katonda. Nabakkusa, naye bo ne bakola obwenzi, ne balinnimukira mu nnyumba za bamalaaya." 
Jeremiah5:8 Baali ng'embalaasi endiise, ezitaamye; buli omu ng'abebera mukazi wa munne." 
Jeremiah5:9 Nnyinza obutababonereza olw'ebikolwa bino?” Omukama y'agamba, “nnyinza obutawoolera ggwanga ku bantu nga bano?" 
Jeremiah5:10 “Mwambuke mu mizabbibu gye mugyonoone, naye temugisaanyizaawo ddala. Muwawaaguleeko amatabi ge, kubanga si ga Mukama." 
Jeremiah5:11 Ennyumba ya Yisirayeli n'ennyumba ya Yuda tezibeeredde ddala neesigwa gye ndi,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah5:12 Boogedde bya bulimba ku Mukama, ne bagamba nti: “Ye si kantu, tewali kabi kagenda kutujjira; tetuliraba kitala, yadde enjala." 
Jeremiah5:13 Abalanzi mpewo buwewo, n'ekigambo tekibaliimu. Kale ekyo kyennyini ka kibakolebwe.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Kale nno Omukama Katonda w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Olw'okubanga boogedde ebigambo bino, ebigambo byange nzija kubifuula muliro mu kamwa ko, bo abantu babe enku omuliro be gusenkenya." 
Jeremiah5:15 Ggwe ennyumba ya Yisirayeli,” Omukama y'agamba, “mbaleetera eggwanga ery'ewala, eggwanga eggundiivu, eggwanga ery'edda, eggwanga ery'olulimi lw'otomanyi; eryogera by'ototegeera." 
Jeremiah5:16 Omufuko gwabwe guli ng'entaana eyasamye; bonna batabaazi bazira. 
Jeremiah5:17 Balirya amakungula go n'emmere yo, balirya batabani bo ne bawala bo, balirya endiga zo n'ente zo, balirya emizabbibu gyo n'emikunyu; balizikiriza n'ekitala ebibuga bye weesiga okuli ebigo." 
Jeremiah5:18 “Naye era ne mu biro ebyo,” Omukama y'agamba, “sigenda kubazikiririza ddala." 
Jeremiah5:19 Abantu bwe balibuuza nti: ‘Lwaki Omukama Katonda waffe atukoze bino byonna?’ Obaddangamu nti: ‘Nga mmwe bwe mwandekawo ne muweereza mu nsi yammwe balubaale abagwira, bwe mutyo bwe muliweereza abagwira mu nsi eteri yammwe.’" 
Jeremiah5:20 “Kino kibuulire ennyumba ya Yakobo, mukirangirire mu Yuda nti:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Wulira ggwe eggwanga essiru eritalina mutima, abalina amaaso naye abatalaba, abalina amatu naye abatawulira." 
Jeremiah5:22 Nze temuntiirako ddala,” Omukama y'agamba, “temwandikankanye mu maaso gange? Nassa omusenyu okukomera ennyanja, omuziziko ogw'emirembe gyonna gw'eteribuuka; amayengo gaayo geesunda, naye tegasobola; gayinza okuwuluguma, naye tegagusukka." 
Jeremiah5:23 Naye abantu bano, balina omutima omuwaganyavu, era omujeemu; bawunjuse ne bagenda." 
Jeremiah5:24 Tebagambyeko mu mitima gyabwe nti: ‘Tutye ku Mukama Katonda waffe atuwa enkuba eya Ddumbi ne Ttoggo mu biseera byayo, n'atuteerawo wiiki enkakafu ez'amakungula.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Okwonoona kwammwe kwe kwabisendera eri, n'ebibi byammwe bye byabaggyissaako ebirungi." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Mu bantu bange mulimu ababi, abateega ng'abatega ennyonyi, nga batega emitego okukwasa abantu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Ng'ekiguli ekijjudde ebinyonyi, n'ennyumba zaabwe bwe zijjudde zityo enkwe; kyebavudde bafuuka bagagga, ba buyinza." 
Jeremiah5:28 Bagezze, banyiridde, ebikolwa byabwe ebibi biyitiridde; tebalamula mu bwenkanya kutaasa nsonga za mulekwa, tebataasa nsonga ya mwavu" 
Jeremiah5:29 Nnyinza obutababonereza olw'ebikolwa bino?” Omukama y'agamba, “nnyinza obutawoolera ggwanga ku bantu nga bano?" 
Jeremiah5:30 “Ebyentiisa, ebyesisiwaza, biguddewo mu nsi." 
Jeremiah5:31 Abalanzi balanga bya bulimba, bakabona bafuga nga bwe beeyagalidde; n'abantu bange ekyo kye baagala. Naye mulikola mutya mu luvannyuma?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 “Mudduke mwewonye, mmwe abantu ba Benyamiini; muve mu Yeruzaalemu. Mufuuwe eŋŋombe e Tekowa; musimbe ebendera e Beti-a-Keremu. Kubanga akabi kabindabinda okuva emambuka, akabenje ddekabusa." 
Jeremiah6:2 Omulungi Kabirinnage, Muwala wa Siyoni, nzija kumuzikiriza." 
Jeremiah6:3 Abasumba n'amagana gaabwe bamulumba, bakubye ensiisira okumwetooloola, buli omu ng'alunda zize." 
Jeremiah6:4 Mwetegeke okumulwanyisa. Musituke; tumulumbe mu ttuntu. Kyokka tulabye, olunaku luuluno luggweekerera; ebisiikirize eby'akawungeezi biwanvuyirira." 
Jeremiah6:5 Musituke, tulumbe ekiro, tuzikirize embiri ze.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Kubanga bino by'agamba Omukama w'Amagye: “Muteme emiti gye, mutuume embibiro ku Yeruzaalemu, kibuga kya kubonereza; kyonna kijjudde kunyigiriza." 
Jeremiah6:7 Ng'oluzzi bwe luzza obuggya amazzi gaalwo, bw'azza atyo obuggya obugwagwa bwe; eby'obukambwe n'okwonoona bye biwulirwamu; buli kabanga ndaba ndwadde na biwundu." 
Jeremiah6:8 Yeruzaalemu, kkiriza okulabulibwa; oba si ekyo nzija kukyukira eri mbaveeko, ensi ngifuule matongo, ensi omutali asenzeemu.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Mazima balikuŋŋaanya abaliba basigaddewo mu Yisirayeli kyenkana nga mu mizabbibu; yisaayisa omukono gwo mu matabi, ng'omunozi w'emizabbibu bw'akola.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ani gwe mba ŋŋamba mmulabule? Ani anampuliriza? Laba, amatu gaabwe si matayirire; tebayinza kutegereza. Ekigambo ky'Omukama basekerera kisekerere; tebakisanyukira." 
Jeremiah6:11 Sso nze nzijudde obuswandi bw'Omukama. Sikyasobola kubuzibiikiriza. “Bumalire ku baana mu nguudo, ne ku bavubuka abakuŋŋaanye; bombi omusajja ne mukazi we balitwalibwa, abakadde n'abo abazeeyuse." 
Jeremiah6:12 Amayumba gaabwe galigabirwa balala, wamu n'ennimiro zaabwe ne bakazi baabwe. Sirimba, nzija kugololera omukono gwange ku bantu b'ensi eno,” Omukama y'agamba," 
Jeremiah6:13 “kubanga okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu, bonna balulunkanira kufuna; abalanzi ne bakabona okwo, bonna balimbalimba." 
Jeremiah6:14 Ebiwundu by'abantu bange babinyigisa lusaago; beewoleza: ‘Ddembe, ddembe!’ sso nga tewali ddembe." 
Jeremiah6:15 Baswala olw'ebikolwa byabwe ebyenyinyalwa? Nedda, tebaliimu nsonyi. Tebamanyi na kusonyiwala; kyebaliva bagwira mu abo abaligwa; balimeggebwa ku olwo lwe ndibabonereza,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah6:16 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Muyimirire mu masaŋŋanzira mulabe; mwebuuze amakubo ag'edda; mubuuze ekkubo eddungi gye liri; lye muba nno mukwata, olwo mulyezuulira ekiwummulo. Bo ne bagamba nti: ‘Tetujja kulikwata.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Nabateekako abakuumi, ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Mutegereze eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe.’ Bo ne bagamba nti: ‘Tetuutegereze.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Kale nno muwulire, mmwe amawanga, mumanye, mmwe ekibiina, ebinaabagwira." 
Jeremiah6:19 Ggwe ensi, wulira: Nzija kuleetera abantu abo akabenje; ge magoba g'ebirowoozo byabwe; kubanga tebaategereza bigambo byange, n'etteeka lyange baalisambajja." 
Jeremiah6:20 Obubaani obuva e Saba bwakugasa ki, n'ekisubi ekya kalifuuwa ekiva mu nsi ey'ewala? Ebitambiro byammwe ebyokye sibisiima, n'ebyonziira byammwe tebinsanyusa.”" 
Jeremiah6:21 Omukama kyava ayogera bino nti: “Laba, abantu bano nzija kubateera enkonge mu kkubo: bakitaabwe b'abaana n'abaana balizeesittalako; ab'emiriraano n'ab'emikwano balizikirira.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Abantu baabo bava mu nsi ey'emambuka; eggwanga eddene likungiddwa okuva ku nkingi z'ensi. 
Jeremiah6:23 Babagalidde emitego n'obujogolo; bakambwe, tebalina kisa. Bawuuma ng'ennyanja bw'eyira, beebagadde ku mbalaasi, bajja ng'eggye eritaze, bajja okulwanyisa ggwe, muwala wa Siyoni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Amawulire g'ebyo gatutuuse; emikono gitulagaya; ennaku etukutte, n'okulumwa ng'okw'omukazi azaala." 
Jeremiah6:25 Temufuluma kugenda mu nnimiro, temutambula mu nguudo, kubanga eyo eriyo ekitala ky'omulabe n'entiisa ku njuyi zonna." 
Jeremiah6:26 Mmwe bantu bange, mwesibe ebisuna, mwevulunge mu vvu, mukungubage ng'akungubagira omutabani eyazaalibwa omu, mulage okunyolwa, kubanga azikiriza ajja kutuzinduukiriza." 
Jeremiah6:27 “Nkutaddewo ng'omugezesa w'ekyuma mu bantu bange, omanye, era ogeze amakubo gaabwe." 
Jeremiah6:28 Bonna abajeemu, ba mputtu, bagenda bakonjera, bali kikomo na kyuma; bonna babi." 
Jeremiah6:29 Emivubo gifuuwa n'amaanyi, omuliro guseebengereze essasi; naye kusaanuusa kwa bwereere, ababi tebasengejjeddwamu." 
Jeremiah6:30 Bayitibwa ffeeza omuzire, kubanga Omukama abazize.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Ekigambo ne kijjira Yeremiya nga kiva ew'Omukama, nga kigamba nti:" 
Jeremiah7:2 “Yimirira mu mulyango gw'ennyumba y'Omukama, olangiririreyo ebigambo bino nti: ‘Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama, mwenna abantu ba Yuda abayita mu miryango gino okusinza Omukama." 
Jeremiah7:3 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: Mugolole empisa zammwe n'ebikolwa byammwe, lwe ndibaleka ne mukkalira mu kifo kino." 
Jeremiah7:4 Muleke kwesiga bigambo bya bulimba nti: “Mbeera Kiggwa kya Mukama, Kiggwa kya Mukama, Kiggwa kya Mukama.”" 
Jeremiah7:5 Singa muluŋŋamiza ddala amakubo gammwe, ne mugolola empisa zammwe, buli omu n'ayisa munne n'obwenkanya," 
Jeremiah7:6 ne mutanyigiriza mugwira, mulekwa ne nnamwandu, ne mutayiwa mu kifo kino musaayi gutaliiko musango, ne mutagoberera balubaale kwesombera mitawaana," 
Jeremiah7:7 olwo ndibaleka ne musigala mu kifo kino, mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjammwe okuva ddi n'emirembe gyonna." 
Jeremiah7:8 Naye mmwe mwesiga ebigambo by'obulimba ebitagasa. 
Jeremiah7:9 Mulowooza mujja kubba, mutemule, mukole obwenzi, mulayirire obwereere, munyookeze Baali obubaani, mugoberere balubaale be mutaamanya," 
Jeremiah7:10 ate olwo mujje muyimirire we ndi mu nnyumba eno okuli erinnya lyange, mugambe nti: “Tuli bulungi.” Muli bulungi mulyoke mukole ebyenyinyalwa bino?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Kazzi ennyumba eno okuli erinnya lyange ebafuukidde nfo y'abanyazi? Naye nno mbadde ntunula, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah7:12 “ ‘Mugende mu kifo kyange mu Silo, erinnya lyange gye naliweera ekisulo mu kusooka, mulabe kye nakikola olw'obugwenyufu bw'abantu bange Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Kale nno, kubanga mukoze ebintu ebyo byonna, Omukama y'agamba, era nga ne bwe nabagamba buli olukedde temwampulira, nga ne bwe nabakoowoola, temwannyanukula," 
Jeremiah7:14 n'olw'ekyo ennyumba eno okuli erinnya lyange, ekiggwa kye mwesiga, ekifo kye nawa mmwe ne bajjajjammwe, kyennaava nkikola nga bwe nakola Silo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Nzija kubagoba mu maaso gange, nga bwe nakola baganda bammwe bonna, ezzadde lya Efurayimu lyonna.’" 
Jeremiah7:16 “Kale nno ggwe tosabira bantu bano, yadde okuwanjaga n'okuweereza essaala ku lwabwe; tonneegayirira, kubanga sijja kukuwuliriza." 
Jeremiah7:17 Ggwe tolaba bye bakola mu bibuga bya Yuda, ne mu nguudo za Yeruzaalemu?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Abaana batyaba enku, bakitaabwe ne bakuma omuliro, n'abakazi ne bagoya obutta okufumbira Nnaabakyala w'Eggulu obugaati; baweereza balubaale ebitone eby'okuyiwa, balyoke bannyiize." 
Jeremiah7:19 Nze Mwene, nze gwe banyiiza? Omukama y'agamba. Si bo bennyini abeeswaza?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Omukama Katonda kyava agamba kino nti: ‘Obusungu bwange n'obuswandi bijja kwebundula ku kifo kino, ku bantu ne ku bisolo, ku miti gy'ettale ne ku bibala by'ettaka; bugenda kubuubuuka, awataliba na kuzikirizibwa.’" 
Jeremiah7:21 “Kino Omukama w'Amagye Katonda wa Yisirayeli ky'agamba, ‘Mwongere ebitambiro ebyokye ku byonziira byammwe, n'ennyama mugirye mwennyini." 
Jeremiah7:22 Kubanga bajjajjammwe bwe nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, sibagambanga era sibalagiranga kantu ku bitambiro ebyokye ne ku bitambiro." 
Jeremiah7:23 Wazira kino kye kiragiro kye nabawa nti: “Muwulire eddoboozi lyange, lwe ndibeera Katonda wammwe, nammwe mulibeera bantu bange. Mutambulirenga mu kkubo lyonna lye ndiba mbalagidde, mulyoke mubeere bulungi.”" 
Jeremiah7:24 Naye bo tebaawulira, yadde okutega okutu, wabula mu bukakanyavu bwabwe baagoberera mutima gwabwe omubi gye gwewunzikidde; badda mabega, si mu maaso." 
Jeremiah7:25 Okuva ku lunaku bajjajjaabwe lwe baava mu nsi y'e Misiri n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero, sitadde kubatumira buli olukedde baweereza bange abalanzi." 
Jeremiah7:26 Naye tebampulira, tebaafaayo, wabula baakakanyaza ensingo zaabwe ne boonoona n'okukira bajjajjaabwe.’" 
Jeremiah7:27 Ojja kubagamba ebigambo ebyo byonna, tebagenda kukuwulira; ojja kubakoowoola, tebajja kukwanukula." 
Jeremiah7:28 Kale nno bagambe nti: ‘Lino lye ggwanga eritawulira ddoboozi lya Mukama Katonda waalyo, eritakkiriza na kugololwa. Amazima gafudde, gabuze mu kamwa kaabwe." 
Jeremiah7:29 “ ‘Sala enviiri zo ozikasuke eri, waggulu ku busozi obwereere oteme emiranga, kubanga Omukama abodde n'asuula ezzadde ly'asunguwalidde." 
Jeremiah7:30 “ ‘Mazima abantu ba Yuda bakoze ekibi mu maaso gange,’ Omukama y'agamba. ‘Batadde ebyenyinyalwa mu nnyumba okuli erinnya lyange, ne bagijaajaamya." 
Jeremiah7:31 Bazimbye ebifo ebigulumivu e Tofeti mu kiwonvu ky'e Beni-Yinnomu, balyoke bookye batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe mu muliro, ekintu nze kye siragiranga era ekitajjanga na mu mutima gwange." 
Jeremiah7:32 Kale nno ziizo ennaku zijja, Omukama y'ayogera, lwe baliba nga tebakyagamba nti Tofeti, oba nti Ekiwonvu Beni-Yinnomu, wabula nti Ekiwonvu ky'Ettambiro, kubanga mu Tofeti mwe baliziika abafu olw'okubulwa ekifo awalala." 
Jeremiah7:33 Emirambo gy'abantu girifuuka mmere ya binyonyi eby'omu bbanga n'ebisolo eby'ettale, era tebiribaako abiguŋŋumula." 
Jeremiah7:34 Ndikomya mu bibuga bya Yuda ne mu nguudo za Yeruzaalemu eddoboozi ery'essanyu n'okujaganya, n'eddoboozi ly'awasa n'ery'omugole, kubanga ensi erifuuka matongo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “ ‘Mu budde obwo, Omukama agamba, amagumba ga bakabaka n'ag'abakungu ba Yuda, aga bakabona be n'ag'abalanzi be n'ag'abaali abatuuze b'omu Yeruzaalemu, galiggyibwa mu ntaana zaabwe." 
Jeremiah8:2 Galyanikibwa mu maaso g'enjuba, ag'omwezi n'ag'eggye lyonna ery'omu ggulu, ebyo bye baayagalanga era bye baaweerezanga, bye baagobereranga n'okwebuuzangako, era bye baavunnamiranga. Tegaliddamu kukuŋŋaanyizibwa yadde okuziikibwa, wazira galisuulibwa ng'obusa awo ku ttaka kungulu." 
Jeremiah8:3 Abaliba basigaddewo mu zzadde lino ebbi balyeyagaliza olumbe okusinga obulamu yonna eyo gye ndiba mbagobedde, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba.’" 
Jeremiah8:4 “Onoobagamba nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Abantu bwe bagwa, tebasituka? Omuntu bw'awaba, takomawo?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Lwaki abantu bano bawabye? Lwaki Yeruzaalemu awabidde ddala obutadda? Banyweredde ku bulimba, bagaanyi okudda." 
Jeremiah8:6 Nategereza ne mpulira, naye teboogera kituufu; tewali yeenenya kibi kye, n'agamba nti: “Kiki kye nkoze?” Buli omu agoba kkubo lye, nga bw'olaba embalaasi eyeefubitika olutalo." 
Jeremiah8:7 Newandibadde ssekanyolya ku ggulu amanyi ebiseera bye, n'ejjiba, akataayi ne ŋŋaali, ebiseera eby'okusenguka. Naye abantu bange tebamanyi mateeka ga Mukama." 
Jeremiah8:8 “ ‘Muyinza mutya okugamba nti: “Tuli bagezi, n'Etteeka ly'Omukama tulirina?” naye, laba, mazima ekkalaamu y'omuwandiisi erifudde lya bulimba." 
Jeremiah8:9 Abagezi ensonyi ziribakwata; balitekemuka ne bakwatibwa. Baamala okusuula eri Ekigambo ky'Omukama, bakyalina magezi ki?" 
Jeremiah8:10 N'olw'ekyo bakazi baabwe nzija kubafumbiza abasajja abalala, n'ennimiro zaabwe nziwe abalala bazitwale. Kubanga okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu, bonna balulunkanira kufuna; abalanzi ne bakabona okwo, bonna balimbalimba." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ebiwundu by'abantu bange babinyigisa lusaago; beewoleza: “Ddembe, ddembe!” sso nga tewali ddembe." 
Jeremiah8:12 Baswala olw'ebikolwa byabwe ebyenyinyalwa? Nedda, tebaliimu nsonyi. Tebamanyi na kusonyiwala; kyebaliva bagwira mu abo abaligwa; balimeggebwa mu kadde ak'okubonerezebwa kwabwe, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah8:13 “ ‘Nandyagadde okubanogako, Omukama y'agamba, naye ku mizabbibu tekuli bibala, ne ku mitiini tekuli ntontogolo, n'amakoola gawotose. N'olw'ekyo kye mbadde mbawadde kiribaggyibwako.’ ”" 
Jeremiah8:14 “Lwaki tutuula obutuuzi? Mugire tukuŋŋaane tugende mu bibuga okuli ebigo, eyo gye tuba tusaanirawo; mbeera Omukama Katonda waffe atusalidde gwa kusaanawo. Atuwadde amazzi omuli obutwa tunywe, kubanga twayonoona ew'Omukama." 
Jeremiah8:15 Twasuubira mirembe, naye tewali kalungi kajja; twasuubira akaseera ak'okuwonyezebwa, laba ntiisa ye yajja." 
Jeremiah8:16 Okufugula kw'embalaasi ze kuwulirwa okuva mu Daani; embalaasi ze bwe zikaaba ensi yonna ekankana. Zizze okuvunjaga ensi na buli kirimu, ekibuga na bonna abakisulamu.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 “Nzuuno nzija kubasindikamu emisota, amasalambwa agatasobola kugulikibwa galibabojja,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ennaku etewonyezeka enkutte; omutima gunnennyise. 
Jeremiah8:19 Wulira eddoboozi ly'okulaajana kw'abantu bange, kuva mu nsi ey'ewala nti: “Ddala Omukama takyali mu Siyoni? Kabaka we takyalimu?” “Lwaki bannyiiza n'ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale, n'ebibajje byabwe ebigwira omutali kantu?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 “Amakungula gayise, ekyeya kikomye, naye ate tetuwonye!”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Olw'ekiwundu ky'abantu bange nange nfumitiddwa; nkaaba, n'entiisa enkutte." 
Jeremiah8:22 Tekyali masanda ga ddagala mu Gileyaadi? Tekyali musawo n'omu? Lwaki ekiwundu ky'abantu bange tekiwonyezebwa? 
Jeremiah8:23 Singa nno omutwe gwange gwali nsulo ya mazzi, n'amaaso gange luzzi lw'amaziga! Nandimaze emisana n'ekiro nga nkaabira abattiddwa ab'abantu bange." 
Jeremiah9:1 Singa nno mu ddungu nalinayo omugiini gw'abatambuze, nandirese abantu bange, ne mbaviira! Kubanga, bonna benzi, bbiina ly'abalimba." 
Jeremiah9:2 Olulimi lwabwe lweweta ng'omutego gw'akasaale bawandule obulimba, si mazima ge gabafudde ab'amaanyi, bulimba bwe bujjudde mu nsi, si mazima; bwe bata ekibi kino ne bakwata kiri, naye nze tebammanyi, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Buli omu yeekuume munne, teweesiga muganda wo, kubanga buli wa luganda mulimba, na buli wa mukwano agenda akonjera." 
Jeremiah9:4 Buli omu alimba munne, tewali ayogera mazima; ennimi zaabwe baazimanyiiza kulimba; beekooyezza n'okwonoona." 
Jeremiah9:5 Bavuyira mu bulimba bwereere; mu bulimba bwabwe tebeefiirayo na kummanya,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah9:6 N'olw'ekyo, Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Nzuuno, nzija kufukuta, mbageze, ggwe ate kirala ki kye nnaakola olw'ekibi ky'abantu bange?" 
Jeremiah9:7 Olulimi lwabwe, kasaale kassi, bye lwogera, bulimba busa; n'akamwa kaabwe buli omu yeeyogeza bya mirembe, sso nga mu mutima gwe amutega mitego." 
Jeremiah9:8 Nnyinza obutababonereza olw'ebikolwa bino?” Omukama y'agamba, “nnyinza obutawoolera ggwanga ku bantu nga bano?”" 
Jeremiah9:9 Nzija kukaabira ensozi, nziririre; nzija kuyimba nga nkungubagira amalundiro ag'omu ddungu; kubanga gookeddwa, tekyali ayitamu; n'okuŋŋooŋa kw'ente tekukyawulirwa, Ebinyonyi by'omu bbanga bidduse n'ebisolo bigenze." 
Jeremiah9:10 “Yeruzaalemu ŋŋenda kumufuula ntuumu ya mayinja, kisulo kya bibe; ebibuga bya Yuda ndibifuula matongo, omutali asulamu.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Ani oyo omugezi ekimala okutegeera bino? Aluwa oyo akamwa k'Omukama gwe kalagidde alangirire? Lwaki ensi ezikiridde, ebabuddwa, esiridde ng'eddungu omutakyasobola kuyita muntu?" 
Jeremiah9:12 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Kubanga balese Etteeka lyange lye nabateerawo, tebaawulira ddoboozi lyange, tebaaligoberera." 
Jeremiah9:13 Wabula baagoberera obukakanyavu bw'omutima gwabwe, baagoberera Babaali nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baabayigiriza.”" 
Jeremiah9:14 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kyava agamba nti: “Abantu bano ŋŋenda kubaliisa omususa, mbanywese n'amazzi agalimu obutwa." 
Jeremiah9:15 Ndibasaasaanyiza mu mawanga, bo ne bajjajjaabwe ge batamanyangako, ndibawondera n'ekitala okutuusa nga mbawemmense.”" 
Jeremiah9:16 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Mukirowoozeeko; muyite abakazi abayimbi b'ennyimba ez'okukungubaga, bajje. Mutumye abasingamu obukugu." 
Jeremiah9:17 Bagambe banguwe, batulirire; amaaso gaffe gakulukute amaziga; n'ebikowe byaffe bifukumule amazzi." 
Jeremiah9:18 Temanga emiranga gy'okulira giwuliddwa mu Siyoni nti: ‘Nga batuvunjaze! Nga tuswadde nnyo! Ensi eno tulina okugireka, kubanga amayumba gaffe gamenyeddwawo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:19 Abakyala, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama; amatu gammwe mugaggulire ekigambo ky'akamwa ke. Muyigirize bawala bammwe okuwanjaga, na buli omu ayigirize munne oluyimba olw'okukungubaga." 
Jeremiah9:20 Kubanga olumbe luyitidde mu madirisa gaffe, luyingidde mu bigo byaffe. Lukutuddeko abaana mu nguudo, n'abavubuka mu mpya." 
Jeremiah9:21 Gamba nti: “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Emirambo gy'abantu gisaasaanye ng'obusa ku ttale, era ng'emiganda emabega w'akesa, awatali agikuŋŋaanya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:22 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Omugezi aleme kwetenda olw'amagezi ge, ow'amaanyi aleke kwetenda olw'amaanyi ge, n'omugagga okwetenda olw'obugagga bwe." 
Jeremiah9:23 Wazira eyeetenda, yeetendere mu kino: Okutegeera n'okumanya nti nze Mukama alaga ekisa, obutuufu n'obutuukirivu ku nsi; kubanga mu ebyo mwe nsanyukira,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah9:24 “Ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “lwe nnaabonereza abo bonna abaatayirirwa mu mubiri gwokka" 
Jeremiah9:25 mu Misiri, Yuda, Edomu, Ammoni, Mowabu na bonna abakomola enviiri mu bwenyi ababeera mu ddungu. Kubanga amawanga gano gonna si matayirire, n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yonna si ntayirire mu mutima.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Muwulire ekigambo Omukama ky'abagamba, mmwe ennyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah10:2 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Muleke kuyiga makubo g'ab'amawanga, temutiisibwa bubonero bwa ggulu newandibadde nga bo ab'amawanga bubatekemula." 
Jeremiah10:3 Kubanga amateeka g'abantu temuli kantu: batema omuti mu kibira, ne guwoolwa n'ensinjo mu mikono gy'omubazzi." 
Jeremiah10:4 Bagutona ne ffeeza, ne zaabu, ne bagunyweza n'emisumaali n'ennyondo guleme kusagaasagana." 
Jeremiah10:5 Biri nga bukasajjaffuba mu nnimiro ya wujju; tebyogera, bisitulibwa busitulibwa kubanga tebisobola kutambula. Muleke kubitya, kubanga tebiyinza kukola kabi, yadde okubaako akalungi ke bikola.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Tewali akufaanana, ayi Mukama; oli mukulu, n'erinnya lyo kkulu mu buyinza." 
Jeremiah10:7 Aluwa ataakutye, ayi Kabaka w'amawanga? Ggwe wamma ekitiibwa kikugwanira. Kubanga mu bagezi bonna ab'amawanga ne mu bwakabaka bwabwe bwonna, temuli akufaanana." 
Jeremiah10:8 Bonna tebalina magezi, basiru; enjigiriza y'ebitaliimu muti buti." 
Jeremiah10:9 Ffeeza omukubeekube aggyibwa e Tarusisi, ne zaabu ow'e Wufazi, omulimu gw'omubazzi n'omufukusi wa zaabu; Olwo byambazibwa kakobe n'ebimyufu; byonna bikolwa abakozi abakugu." 
Jeremiah10:10 Naye Omukama ye Katonda yennyini, ye Katonda omulamu, Kabaka ataggwaawo. Bw'ajumba, ensi ekankana, n'amawanga tegayinza kugumira busungu bwe." 
Jeremiah10:11 “Kale nno kino ky'oba obagamba nti: ‘Balubaale abataakola ggulu na nsi baliggwaawo ku nsi ne wansi w'eggulu.’ ” 
Jeremiah10:12 Naye ye yakola enkulungo y'ensi n'amaanyi ge; yabangawo ensi n'amagezi ge; n'okutegeera kwe n'abamba olubaale. 
Jeremiah10:13 Bw'abwatuka, amazzi ku ggulu ne gayira; alinnyisa ebire okuva ku nkingi z'ensi; akola eraddu okuwa enkuba, era y'aggyayo empewo mu mawanika ge." 
Jeremiah10:14 Buli muntu mubuyabuya, talina ky'amanyi; buli musaanuusa wa zaabu aswala olw'ekifaananyi kye. Ebifaananyi bye ebisaanuuse ebya balubaale bulimba busa, mu byo temuli mukka." 
Jeremiah10:15 Temuli kantu; bikoleddwa kusekererwa; mu kadde ak'okubonerezebwa kwabyo bigenda kusaanawo. 
Jeremiah10:16 Naye oyo Omugabo gwa Yakobo tafaanana ebyo, kubanga ye yakola byonna omuli ne Yisirayeli, ekika ky'obusika bwe, Omukama w'Amagye lye linnya lye." 
Jeremiah10:17 Kuŋŋaanya ebibyo ove mu nsi, ggwe asula awazindiddwa." 
Jeremiah10:18 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ku luno abasula mu nsi ŋŋenda kubavuumuula, mbalabise ennaku, basobole okunsanga.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Zinsanze nze olw'ekiwundu kyange! Obuvune bwange tebuwona! Naye nze ŋŋamba nti: “Kituufu, buno bwe buyongobevu bwange; ka mbugumire.”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Weema yange bagyayizza, emiguwa gyayo gyonna bagikutudde. Batabani bange bandeseewo, tebakyaliwo. Tewakyali asigadde kusitula weema yange, n'okusimba ensiisira yange." 
Jeremiah10:21 Abasumba be baali ababuyabuya; tebeebuuza ku Mukama; ebintu bwe butabaamu mukisa, n'eggana lyabwe lyonna kwe kubuna emiwabo." 
Jeremiah10:22 Olugambo luvuze, luulwo lutuuse: Akagugumuko kanene okuva mu nsi ey'emambuka, ebibuga bya Yuda ka bifuuke amatongo; bifuuke nfo ya bibe." 
Jeremiah10:23 Mmanyi, ayi Mukama, nti omuntu si ye nnannyini makubo ge; ye tasobola ng'atambula okulambika amagendere ge." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ngolola, ayi Mukama, naye ng'obalira; si na busungu, sikulwa ng'onfuula akasirikitu." 
Jeremiah10:25 Bundula obusungu bwo ku mawanga agatakumanyi, ne ku bika ebitakoowoola linnya lyo; kubanga baalya Yakobo, baamulya ne bamumalawo, awaka we ne baleka nga matongo." 
Jeremiah11:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ekyajja eri Yeremiya nga kigamba nti: 
Jeremiah11:2 “Wulira ebigambo by'endagaano eno, obigambe abantu ba Yuda n'abo abasula mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah11:3 Bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: “Oyo atawulira bigambo bya ndagaano eno, avumirirwe.”" 
Jeremiah11:4 Bye bigambo bye nakuutira bajjajjammwe ku lunaku lwe nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu kabiga k'essasa. Nabagamba nti: “Muwulire eddoboozi lyange; mukole byonna bye mbalagira; olwo lwe munaabeera bantu bange, nange ndibeera Katonda wammwe." 
Jeremiah11:5 Olwo ndituukiriza ebirayiro bye nalayirira bajjajjammwe, okubawa ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, nga bwe kiri kati.” ’ ” Awo ne nziramu nti: “Amiina, ayi Mukama.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Ate Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Langirira ebigambo bino byonna mu bibuga bya Yuda ne mu mpya za Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Muwulire ebigambo by'Endagaano eno, mubituuse." 
Jeremiah11:7 Nalabula bajjajjammwe lwe nabaggya mu Misiri, ne nzija nga mbalabula buli olukedde n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero nti: “Mugondere eddoboozi lyange.”" 
Jeremiah11:8 Naye tebaawulira, yadde okufaayo, wabula buli omu yagoberera obukakanyavu n'obugwenyufu bw'omutima gwe. Kyennava ntuukiriza ku bo ebigambo byonna eby'endagaano eno, gye nali mbalagidde okugoberera ne batagigoberera.’ ”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Waliwo okwekobaana mu bantu ba Yuda, ne mu abo abali mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah11:10 Bazzeeyo mu bibi bya bajjajjaabwe abaagaana okuwulira ebigambo byange. Na bano bagoberedde balubaale ne babaweereza. Ennyumba ya Yisirayeli n'ennyumba ya Yuda bamenye endagaano yange gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe. 
Jeremiah11:11 Omukama nno kino ky'agamba nti: ‘Nzija kubasindikira akabenje ke bataliyinza kusumattuka; ne bwe banandaajanira, sijja kubawuliriza." 
Jeremiah11:12 Ebibuga bya Yuda n'abo abali mu Yeruzaalemu baliraajanira balubaale be banyookeza obubaani, naye tebalina kye balibayambamu ng'akabi katuuse." 
Jeremiah11:13 “ ‘Yuda, balubaale bo benkana n'ebibuga byo obungi, n'emyaliiro gy'ozimbye okwokerako ekyensonyi obubaani, kwe kugamba, emyaliiro gy'ozimbidde Baali, gyenkana n'enguudo z'omu Yeruzaalemu obungi.’" 
Jeremiah11:14 “Tosabira bantu bano, yadde okuwanjaga n'okuweereza essaala ku lwabwe, kubanga sigenda kubawuliriza bwe balindaajanira mu kadde kaabwe akabi." 
Jeremiah11:15 “Omwagalwa wange akola ki mu nnyumba yange, ate ng'ateesa enkwe nnyingi ate embi? Bye weetema n'ennyama emponge binaawugula akabi okuva w'oli? Osobola okusanyuka?”" 
Jeremiah11:16 'Oliva engimu, erembedde ebibala ebirungi', lye linnya Omukama lye yakuyita. Naye n'okuyira kw'omuyaga ogw'amaanyi, aligyokya omuliro, n'amatabi gaayo ne gamenyeka." 
Jeremiah11:17 “Omukama w'Amagye eyakusimba akukoowooleddeko akabenje kubanga ennyumba ya Yisirayeli n'ennyumba ya Yuda bakoze ekibi ne bannyiiza olw'okunyookeza Baali obubaani.” 
Jeremiah11:18 Omukama yanjoleka olukwe lwabwe, ne ndumanya, olwo wandaga bye banteeseza." 
Jeremiah11:19 Sso nze nali ng'endiga eŋŋonvu gye batwala mu bbaagiro, nga sitegedde nkwe ze baali bansalira, nga bagamba nti: “Omuti tugutte nga gwakabala; tumwerewo ku nsi y'abalamu, erinnya lye lireme kuddamu kujjukirwa.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Ayi Mukama w'Amagye, asala mu butuufu, eyekenneenya omutima n'emmeeme, mpa ndabe bw'owoolera eggwanga ku bo, kubanga ggwe gwe nakwasa ensonga zange." 
Jeremiah11:21 “Omukama nno kino ky'agamba abantu b'e Anatoti abanoonya okukutta nga bagamba nti: ‘Tolanganga mu linnya lya Mukama, oba si ekyo ojja kufa nga tukwettira n'emikono gyaffe.’" 
Jeremiah11:22 N'olw'ekyo Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: ‘Nze nzija kubabonereza; abavubuka baabwe balifa ekitala; batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe balifa enjala. 
Jeremiah11:23 Mu bo tewaliba asigalawo, kubanga nzija kuleetera abantu b'e Anatoti akabi mu mwaka ogw'okubonerezebwa kwabwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Oli mutuukirivu, ayi Mukama, ndeese ensonga zange mu maaso go; kyokka nandyagadde nkubuuze ku ngeri gy'olamulamu: Lwaki ekkubo ly'ababi lirama? Lwaki bonna abalimba bali mirembe?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Wabasiga mu ttaka, ne basimba emirandira; baakula ne bassaako ebibala; bulijjo tobava ku mimwa, sso ng'emitima gyabwe ogiri wala." 
Jeremiah12:3 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, ommanyi, ondaba ne wekenneenya omutima gwange kye gukulowoozaako. Basikambule ng'endiga ez'okutta, bategekere olunaku olw'okusanjagibwa." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ensi eneekungubaga kutuusa wa, n'omuddo gwonna ogw'ettale okuwotoka? Olw'okubeera obugwenyufu bw'abo abagisulamu, ensolo n'ebinyonyi bisaanyiziddwawo. Anti bagamba mbu: “Katonda taliraba nkomerero yaffe.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 “Obanga bw'odduse n'ab'ebigere, bakukooyezza, onoosobola otya okuwakana n'embalaasi? Era obanga weekengera mu nsi ey'eddembe, kale olikola otya mu mbirabira z'oku Yorudani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Kale baganda bo, ennyumba yo yennyini, bakuliddemu olukwe; bakukubidde enduulu. Tobeesiga ne bwe banaakwogerako ebirungi." 
Jeremiah12:7 “Njabulidde ennyumba yange, ndese obusika bwange. Oyo omwagalwa w'omutima gwange, mmuwaddeyo mu mikono gy'abalabe be." 
Jeremiah12:8 Obusika bwange bunfuukidde ng'empologoma mu nsiko. Envuumira kyenva ngikyawa. 
Jeremiah12:9 Obusika bwange tebunfuukidde ng'ennyonyi enkwakkuzi ey'amayenje, ennyonyi endala enkwakkuzi gye zizingizza ne zigigwira? Genda okuŋŋaanye ebisolo byonna eby'ettale, bijje bikavvule." 
Jeremiah12:10 Abasumba bangi boonoonye emizabbibu gyange, basambiridde ennimiro yange; ennimiro yange ensanyusa bagifudde ddungu, matongo." 
Jeremiah12:11 Efuuliddwa ddungu, matongo, enkaabirira. Ensi yonna efuuse matongo, kubanga mpaawo n'omu agissaako mutima." 
Jeremiah12:12 Ku busozi bwonna obwereere mu ddungu, abanyazi bagumbye, kubanga ekitala ky'Omukama kizikiriza okuva ku nsonda emu ey'ensi okutuuka ku ndala; tewaabe n'omu ali mu ddembe." 
Jeremiah12:13 Baasiga ŋŋano, naye bakungudde maggwa; beekooya, naye tebalifunamu mugaso. Amakungula gaabwe galibakwasa ensonyi, olw'okwesera kw'obusungu bw'Omukama.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ku baliraanwa bange bonna ababi abaawamba obusika bwe nawa abantu bange Yisirayeli, ŋŋenda kubasimbula mu nsi yaabwe, n'ennyumba ya Yuda ndigisimbula mu makkati gaabwe." 
Jeremiah12:15 Kyokka bwe ndimala okubasimbula, ndiddamu ne mbakwatirwa ekisa, ne mbazzaayo buli omu mu busika bwe, buli omu mu nsi yaboobwe." 
Jeremiah12:16 Ate bwe balinyiikira okukwata amakubo g'abantu bange, ne balayira mu linnya lyange nti: ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu!’ newandibadde nga baayigiriza abantu bange okulayira Baali, olwo balikkalira wakati mu bantu bange." 
Jeremiah12:17 Naye bwe walibaawo eggwanga eritaliwulira, ndirisimbulira ddala ne ndizikiriza,”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Omukama kino kye yaŋŋamba: “Genda ogule omusipi ogw'olugoye ogwesibe mu kiwato; kyokka togunnyika mu mazzi.” 
Jeremiah13:2 Bwentyo nagula omusipi, nga Omukama bwe yali andagidde, ne ngwesiba mu kiwato." 
Jeremiah13:3 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja gye ndi omulundi ogwokubiri nti: 
Jeremiah13:4 “Ddira omusipi gwe wagula gw'osibye mu kiwato kyo, ogende ku mugga Furaati ogukweke eyo mu mpampagama y'olwazi.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Ne ŋŋenda ne ngukweka ku Furaati, nga Omukama bwe yali andagidde." 
Jeremiah13:6 Nga wayise ebbanga ggwanvu, Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti “Genda ku Furaati oggyeeyo omusipi gwe nakulagira okukwekayo.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Ne ŋŋenda ku Furaati, ne nsima, ne nzigyayo omusipi mu kifo mwe nali ngukwese. Naye kati omusipi gwali guvunze, nga tegukyalina kye gugasa." 
Jeremiah13:8 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja gye ndi nti: 
Jeremiah13:9 “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Bwe ntyo bwe ndivunza olunkulu lwa Yuda n'okwekuza kwa Yeruzaalemu okungi. 
Jeremiah13:10 Abantu abo ababi abaagaana okuwulira ebigambo byange, abagoberera obukakanyavu bw'omutima gwabwe, abanoonya balubaale abagwira ne babasinza n'okubaweereza, balifaanana ng'omusipi ogwo, nga tebalina kye bagasa." 
Jeremiah13:11 Anti ng'omusipi bwe gwesibibwa mu kiwato ky'omuntu, nange bwe nali nnywerezza ntyo ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yonna n'ennyumba yonna eya Yuda ku nze, Omukama y'agamba, balyoke babeere bantu bange, linnya lyange, ttendo lyange era kitiibwa kyange. Naye tebaawulira.’" 
Jeremiah13:12 “Abantu abo bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba nti: “Buli ndyanga ya vviini ejjuzibwe evviini.” ’ Bagenda kukuddamu nti: ‘Tetumanyi nga buli ndyanga ya vviini ejjuzibwa vviini?’ 
Jeremiah13:13 Olwo bagambe nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Abantu b'omu nsi eno bonna ŋŋenda kubajjuza obutamiivu, omwo nga mw'obalidde bakabaka abawaŋŋamye ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi, bakabona, abalanzi, n'abo bonna abali mu Yeruzaalemu," 
Jeremiah13:14 ŋŋenda kubawumiza omu ku munne, abazadde n'abaana baabwe wamu,” Omukama y'agamba. Sirisaasira, sirisonyiwa, siriddiramu mbu ndeke kubazikiriza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Muwulire, mutege amatu, temwekuza, kubanga Omukama ayogedde." 
Jeremiah13:16 Mumuwe ekitiibwa Omukama, Katonda wammwe nga tannaleeta kizikiza, nga n'ebigere byammwe tebineesittala ku nsozi ezikutte enzikiza. Musuubira ekitangaala, naye agenda kukifuula nzikiza ekutte, alikifuula kazigizigi." 
Jeremiah13:17 Naye bwe mutaawulire, ŋŋenda kukaabira mu nkiso olw'olunkulu lwammwe, amaaso gange galikaaba ebitakaabika, ne gafukumula amaziga, kubanga eggana ly'Omukama litwaliddwa mu busibe." 
Jeremiah13:18 Mugambe kabaka ne nnamasole nti: “Mukke mutuule wansi, kubanga engule yammwe ey'ekitiibwa ebavudde ku mutwe." 
Jeremiah13:19 Ebibuga by'emaserengeta biggaddwawo; tewali wa kubiggula, Yuda yenna awaŋŋangusiddwa, yenna atwaliddwa ddala." 
Jeremiah13:20 “Yimusa amaaso olabe abava emambuka. Eggana eryakukwasibwa liri ludda wa, endiga ezaali ettendo lyo?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Oligamba ki bw'alikussaako nga bakama bo abo bennyini be weeyigiririza okuba mikwano gyo? Okulumwa tekulikukwata ng'okw'omukazi ng'azaala? 
Jeremiah13:22 Bw'alyebuuza nti: ‘Lwaki bino bingwiridde?’ Lwa bibi byo ebingi, kubanga emivuluya gyo gyakwambulwako n'okolebwako eby'obukambwe." 
Jeremiah13:23 Omukuusi ayinza okukyusa olususu lwe, oba engo, amabala gaayo? Nammwe temusobola kukola kalungi, mmwe abaamanyiira okukola obubi." 
Jeremiah13:24 Kyendiva nno mbasaasaanya ng'essubi bwe likolebwa empewo ey'omu ddungu. 
Jeremiah13:25 Ogwo gwe mugabo gwammwe, ekitundu ky'ekipimo kye mbageredde,” Omukama y'agamba, “kubanga nze mwanneerabira, ne weesiga obulimba." 
Jeremiah13:26 Nze kennyini ndiyimusiza emivuluya gyo ku maaso go, ensonyi zo ne zirabibwa." 
Jeremiah13:27 Nnyaabula, obwenzi bwo n'okubebera! Obwa malaaya bwo obugwenyufu! Nalaba ebyenyinyalwa by'okolera ku nsozi ne mu miseetwe. Zikusanze, Yeruzaalemu; Onoolinda kutuusa wa nga toli mulongoofu?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Kino kye kigambo ky'Omukama eri Yeremiya ku kyeya: 
Jeremiah14:2 “Yuda ali mu kukungubaga; ebibuga bye biyongobedde; balaajana olw'ensi; emiranga gyambuse mu Yeruzaalemu. 
Jeremiah14:3 Abakungu batuma abaweereza baabwe emugga; batuuka ku nzizi naye tebasangamu mazzi; bakomawo ng'ensuwa nkalu, basobeddwa, baterebuse ne beebikka emitwe gyabwe." 
Jeremiah14:4 Ettaka likaze, kubanga ku nsi tekukyali nkuba; abalimi batekemuse, ne beebikka emitwe gyabwe." 
Jeremiah14:5 N'empeewo yennyini ku ttale ereka omwana gwayo, kubanga tewali muddo." 
Jeremiah14:6 Endogoyi ez'ettale ziri waggulu ku busozi obwereere, ziwejjawejja ng'ebibe; amaaso gaziyimbadde olw'okubulwa omuddo.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 Newandibadde ebibi byaffe bitulumiriza, baako ky'okola, ayi Mukama, olw'ekitiibwa ky'erinnya lyo. Kituufu, twakujeemera nnyo, twasobya gy'oli." 
Jeremiah14:8 Ayi Mukama, essuubi lya Yisirayeli, Omulokozi we mu budde obw'akabi, lwaki obeera ng'omugwira mu nsi eno, ng'omutambuze asula ekiro ekimu?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Lwaki ofaanana ng'omuntu atangaaliridde, ng'omutabaazi atayinza kutaasa? Sso nno oli mu makkati gaffe, ayi Mukama, tuyitibwa n'erinnya lyo, leka kutwabulira." 
Jeremiah14:10 Omukama kino ky'agamba ku bantu bano: “Banyumirwa bulala okuzuŋŋana, tebakoma ku bigere byabwe. Omukama bwe butabaagala. Kaakano agenda kujjukira ensobi zaabwe ababonereze olw'ebibi byabwe.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Abantu bano tobasabira babe bulungi. 
Jeremiah14:12 Ne bwe balisiiba, sigenda kuwulira kuwanjaga kwabwe; ne bwe baliweereza ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitone eby'obuwunga, sigenda kubisiima, wazira ŋŋenda kubazikiriza n'ekitala n'enjala ne kawumpuli.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Nze kwe kuddamu nti: “Yii, Mukama Katonda, abalanzi baabagamba nti: ‘Temuliraba kitala, n'enjala tegenda kubagwira; wabula ndibawa emirembe egy'enkalakkalira mu kifo kino.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Omukama n'anziramu nti: “Abalanzi balanga bya bulimba mu linnya lyange; sibatumanga, sibalagiranga yadde soogeranga gye bali. Bye balanga gye muli kulabikirwa kwa bulimba, bulaguzi mutali, bintu bifumbirire mu mitwe gyabwe." 
Jeremiah14:15 N'olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba ku balanzi abo abalanga mu linnya lyange: Sibatumanga, ate ne bagenda nga bagamba nti: ‘Tewagenda kubeera kitala na njala mu nsi muno.’ Abalanzi bennyini abo balifa ekitala n'enjala." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ate abantu abo be babuulira nga balanga batyo, balikasukibwa ebweru mu nguudo za Yeruzaalemu olw'enjala n'ekitala; tewaliba muntu abaziika: bo, bakyala baabwe, batabani baabwe, newandibadde bawala baabwe, ŋŋenda kubabunduggulako obujeemu bwabwe." 
Jeremiah14:17 “Awo nno bagambe ekigambo kino nti: ‘Amaaso gange ka gakulukute amaziga emisana n'ekiro awatali kusalawo, kubanga embeerera muwala w'abantu bange, akubiddwa nnyo, n'assibwako obuvune obw'amaanyi." 
Jeremiah14:18 Bwe ŋŋenda mu kyalo, nsanga abattiddwa ekitala; bwe nnyingira mu kibuga, nsanga ndwadde olw'enjala. Abalanzi ne bakabona babungeeta mu nsi, tebakyategeera.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Yuda omuviiriddemu ddala? Siyoni akutamidde ddala? Lwaki otukubye bw'otyo ne wataba na ssuubi lya kuwona? Twasuubira mirembe, naye tewali kalungi kajja; twasuubira obudde obw'okuwonyezebwa, laba ntiisa ye yajja." 
Jeremiah14:20 Tukkiriza, ayi Mukama, obugwenyufu bwaffe n'okusobya kwa bajjajjaffe; kituufu, twasobya gy'oli." 
Jeremiah14:21 Olw'obulungi bw'erinnya lyo tobasuula, toweebuula linnya lyo ery'ekitiibwa. Jjukira era tomenyawo ndagaano gye wakola naffe." 
Jeremiah14:22 Mu bitaliimu by'ab'amawanga mulimu ekiyinza okutonnyesa enkuba? Yadde eggulu ku lwalyo liyinza okuleeta oluwandaggirize? Si ggwe, ayi Mukama? Ayi Katonda waffe? Awo nno tusuubira mu ggwe, kubanga ggwe okola ebyo byonna." 
Jeremiah15:1 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Musa ne Samweli ne bwe bandiyimiridde mu maaso gange, sandikwatiddwa kisa bantu bano. Bagobe mu maaso gange; bagende." 
Jeremiah15:2 Ate singa bakubuuza nti: ‘Tudde wa?’ baddemu nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Ab'okufa olumbe, badde eri olumbe; ab'okufa ekitala, badde eri ekitala; ab'okufa enjala, badde eri enjala; ab'okutwalibwa mu busibe, badde eri obusibe.’" 
Jeremiah15:3 “Ndibategekerawo engeri nnya ez'okubazikiriza, Omukama y'agamba: ekitala okubatta, embwa okubawalaawala, n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga n'ebisolo eby'ettale okubakavvula n'okubazikiriza." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndibafuula ekyesisiwaza eri buli bwakabaka mu nsi, olw'okubeera Manasse, mutabani wa Kezekiya kabaka wa Yuda, bye yakola mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Kale alikusaasira ye ani, ggwe Yeruzaalemu? Oba ani alikukungubagira? Ani alikyama okubuuza bw'oli?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Mwansuula,” Omukama y'agamba, “mwakuba akaddannyuma, kyenvudde mbagololerako omukono gwange ne mbazikiriza; okusaasira kunkooyezza." 
Jeremiah15:7 Nzija kubawewera ku miryango gy'ensi n'ekkabi eriwewa; mbamazeeko abaabwe, nzikirizza abantu bange, kubanga bagaanyi okukyusa engeri zaabwe." 
Jeremiah15:8 Bannamwandu baabwe mbongedde obungi n'okusinga omusenyu gw'ennyanja; bannyaabwe b'abavubuka abatabaazi mbaleetedde omutemu mu ttuntu wakati; mbasuddeko amangu ago entiisa n'ebikangabwa. 
Jeremiah15:9 Eyazaala abaana omusanvu ayongobedde, azirika; enjuba ye egudde nga bukyali misana; ensonyi zimutta, aswadde. N'abasigaddewo ku bo nzija kubatta n'ekitala mu maaso g'abalabe baabwe,” Omukama y'ayogera." 
Jeremiah15:10 Zinsanze! Nnyabo, wanzaalira ki, nze omuntu ali mu kuwakana, mu mpaka, n'eggwanga lyonna? Siwolanga yadde okwewola; sso bonna banvumirira." 
Jeremiah15:11 Kibeere kityo, ayi Mukama, singa saakuweereza bulungi, singa saakwegayirira ku lw'abalabe mu biseera eby'ebizibu n'ennaku." 
Jeremiah15:12 Omuntu ayinza okumenya mu kyuma, mu kyuma eky'emambuka n'ekikomo?" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Ebintu byo n'obugagga nzija kubiwaayo binyagibwe ku bwereere olw'ebibi byo byonna wonna mu nsi yo. 
Jeremiah15:14 Nzija kukufuula muweereza wa balabe bo mu nsi gy'otomanyi; kubanga obusungu bwange bukoleezezza omuliro ogunaabasiriiza.” 
Jeremiah15:15 Omanyi, ayi Mukama; nzijukira, ndabirira, ompoolerere eggwanga ku banjigganya. Mu kugumiikiriza kwo okungi tonzigyawo, lowooza ku kuvumibwa kwe nvumiddwamu olw'okubeera ggwe." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ebigambo byo bwe byajja, nabirya; ekigambo kyo kyali ssanyu na kujaganya mu mutima gwange, kubanga nayitibwa erinnya lyo, Mukama Katonda w'Amagye." 
Jeremiah15:17 Situulanga na bakozi ba binyumu, sibinukanga nabo; wabula natuulanga nzekka kubanga omukono gwo gwandiko, kubanga wali onzijuzizza okwennyamira." 
Jeremiah15:18 Lwaki obulumi bwange tebuwona, n'ekiwundu kyange tekiwona, tekivumulikika? Onfuukidde ng'engezi erimbalimba, ng'amazzi agatasimba." 
Jeremiah15:19 Olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Bw'olyeddamu, nange ndikuzzaawo; olwo olimpeereza. Bw'olyogera ebirimu ensa, sso si ebyo omutali, olibeera kamwa kange; leka abantu bano badde gy'oli, sso si ggwe okudda gye bali." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ndikufuula bbugwe omugumu ow'ekikomo eri abantu bano; balikulwanyisa naye tebalikusobola, kubanga nze ndi naawe okukuwonya n'okukutaasa, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah15:21 ŋŋenda kukutaasa mu mikono gy'ababi, ndikununula mu mikono gy'abakambwe.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja gye ndi nti: 
Jeremiah16:2 “Towasa mukazi era tozaalira mu kifo kino baana," 
Jeremiah16:3 kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba ku baana abalenzi n'abawala abazaalirwa mu kifo kino, ne ku bakazi bannyaabwe ne ku basajja bakitaabwe:" 
Jeremiah16:4 ‘Balifa endwadde ezitta; tebalikaabirwa yadde okuziikibwa, wabula baliba ng'obusa obumanse wonna ku ttaka. Balisaanyizibwawo ekitala n'enjala, n'emirambo gyabwe giribeera mmere ya binyonyi eby'omu bbanga n'ey'ebisolo ku nsi.’" 
Jeremiah16:5 “Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: Toyingira mu nnyumba mwe bakungubaga, togenda kukaaba yadde okukubagiza, kubanga abantu abo mbaggyeeko emirembe gyange, ekisa kyange n'okusaasira kwange, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abanene n'abatene balifiira mu nsi eno, awataliba kuziikibwa yadde abantu okubakungubagira; tebalibeesalira misale na kubamwera nviiri." 
Jeremiah16:7 Teriba mmere eweebwa mukungubazi okumukubagiza olw'okufiirwa; teriba amuwa kaakunywa olw'okumukubagiza, ne bw'aliba akungubagira kitaawe oba nnyina." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Toyingira mu nnyumba muli mbaga, otuule, onywe nabo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: ‘Mu kifo kino, mu budde bwo, ng'olaba bw'oti, ŋŋenda kukomya eddoboozi ly'essanyu n'okujaguza, n'eddoboozi ly'awasa n'ery'omugole.’" 
Jeremiah16:10 “Bw'oliba omaze okubuulira abantu bano ebigambo ebyo byonna, ne bakubuuza nti: ‘Lwaki Omukama atulangirira akabi akanene ako konna? Musango ki gwe twazza? Kibi ki kye twasobya Omukama Katonda waffe?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 obagambanga nti: ‘Kubanga bajjajjammwe banjabulira,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘ne bagoberera balubaale, ne babaweereza, ne babavunnamira okubasinza. Nze bandeka, ne batakwata tteeka lyange." 
Jeremiah16:12 Naye ate nammwe mukoze na bubi okusinga bajjajjammwe. Kale mulabe, buli omu mu mmwe agoberera obukakanyavu bw'omutima gwe omubi mu kifo ky'okumpulira." 
Jeremiah16:13 N'olw'ekyo ŋŋenda kubakasuka okuva mu nsi muno, mbasuule mu nsi mmwe ne bajjajjammwe gye mutamanyangako. Eyo gye muliweerereza balubaale emisana n'ekiro, kubanga sijja kubalaga busaasizi.’" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Awo nno ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “abantu nga tebakyagamba nti: ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, eyaggya abantu ba Yisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri,’" 
Jeremiah16:15 wazira nti: ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, eyaggya Abayisirayeli mu nsi y'emambuka ne mu nsi zonna gye yali abagobedde.’ Kubanga ndibakomyawo mu nsi yaabwe gye nawa bajjajjaabwe." 
Jeremiah16:16 “Naye kati ŋŋenda kusindika abavubi bangi babavube,” Omukama y'ayogera. “Ate oluvannyuma ndibasindikira abayizzi bangi; abalibayigga ku buli lusozi ne ku buli kasozi ne yonna eyo mu mpampagama z'enjazi." 
Jeremiah16:17 Amaaso gange gatunuulidde amakubo gaabwe gonna, tewali we ganeekisiza, n'ebibi byabwe tebirina we byekwese maaso gange." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ndibabonereza emirundi ebiri olw'omusango gwabwe n'ekibi kyabwe, kubanga bajaajaamizza ensi yange n'emirambo gy'ebintu byabwe ebitaliimu, n'obusika bwange ne babujjuza ebyenyinyalwa byabwe.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Ayi Mukama, amaanyi gange, ekigo kyange, obuddukiro bwange mu budde obw'akabi, ewuwo amawanga gye galijja okuva ku nkingi z'ensi, ne bagamba nti: “Bajjajjaffe bye baasikira temuli, wazira bulimba bwereere, ebitaliimu era ebitaliiko kye byabagasa." 
Jeremiah16:20 Omuntu asobola okwekolera balubaale? Yee, naye ebyo tebiba Katonda.”" 
Jeremiah16:21 Kale nno nzija kubamanyisa, ku luno nzija kubamanyisa omukono gwange n'obuyinza bwange, olwo balitegeera ng'erinnya lyange nze Mukama." 
Jeremiah17:1 “Ekibi kya Yuda kyayolebwa n'akafumu ka kyuma; kyawandiikibwa n'akalimi ka jjinja ku kipande ky'omutima gwabwe. Ne ku mayembe g'emyaliiro gyabwe 
Jeremiah17:2 N'abaana baabwe bajjukira emyaliiro gyabwe n'empagi za Asera wansi w'emiti egiggumizza ne ku nsozi empanvu. 
Jeremiah17:3 Olusozi lwange ku museetwe, ebintu byammwe n'eby'obugagga bwammwe ndibiwaayo ne binyagibwa olw'okubeera ekibi ky'ebifo byo ebigulumivu mu nsi yo yonna." 
Jeremiah17:4 Olireka awo obusika bwo bwe nakuwa; ndikufuula muweereza wa balabe b'omu nsi gy'otamanyi, kubanga okoleezezza obuswandi bwange, ate bwa kwaka emirembe gyonna.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Avumirirwe oyo eyeesiga omuntu, amaanyi ge agamuli mu muntu obuntu, omutima gwe oguva ku Mukama." 
Jeremiah17:6 Afaanana ng'akasaka akali mu ddungu; tagenda kumanya kirungi we kirituukira; alibeera eyo mu bifo ebikalu mu ddungu, mu nsi ey'olunnyo, omutali asengamu." 
Jeremiah17:7 Wabula yeesiimye omuntu eyeesiga Omukama; essuubi lye nga liri mu ye. 
Jeremiah17:8 Ali ng'omuti omusimbe okumpi n'amazzi, ogulandiza emirandira gyagwo eri omwala; ekyeya ne bwe kirijja, tegulina kye gutya, ebikoola byagwo bulijjo bya kiragala. Mu biseera eby'ekyeya tewali kigweraliikiriza, tegulirekera awo kubala.”" 
Jeremiah17:9 Mu byonna omutima gwe gusinga obulimba; mugwagwa; ani ayinza okugutegeera? 
Jeremiah17:10 “Nze Omukama nze mpenja omutima, neekebejja emmeeme; buli omu mmuwa nga ndabira ku neeyisa ye, nga ngerera ku kigya mu by'akola.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Ng'enkwale emaamira amagi g'etaabiika, n'agaggawala nga tagobye bwenkanya, bw'aba; Birimuggwaako mu makkati g'obulamu bwe, ku nkomerero aliba musiru." 
Jeremiah17:12 Nnamulondo ey'ekitiibwa, eyagulumizibwa okuva mu masooka, kye kifo ky'Ekitukuvu kyaffe." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ayi Mukama, essuubi lya Yisirayeli, bonna abakwabulira baliswala, abakuvaako baliwandiikibwa mu nfuufu, kubanga balese Omukama, ensulo y'amazzi amalamu." 
Jeremiah17:14 Mponya, ayi Mukama, nzija kuwona; ndokola, nzija kulokoka, kubanga ggwe ttendo lyange." 
Jeremiah17:15 Tebata kuŋŋamba nti: “Ekigambo ky'Omukama kiruwa? Kale kituukirire.” 
Jeremiah17:16 Sso nze sikusindiriranga oleete akabi, era seegombanga lunaku lwa kabenje; buli kye njogera kyerufu mu maaso go." 
Jeremiah17:17 Tombeerera ntiisa; ggwe buddukiro bwange mu budde obw'akabi. 
Jeremiah17:18 Abanjigganya baswale, naye nze mponya okuswala; batekemuke, sso nze nneme kutekemuka. Basindikire olunaku olw'akabi; bazikirize, obaddemu n'ogwokubiri." 
Jeremiah17:19 Omukama kino kye yaŋŋamba nti: “Genda oyimirire mu Mulyango gw'Abantu, bakabaka ba Yuda mwe bayingirira n'okufulumira, ne mu miryango gyonna egya Yeruzaalemu," 
Jeremiah17:20 ogambe nti: ‘Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama, mmwe bakabaka ba Yuda, mmwe abantu ba Yuda na mwenna abasula mu Yeruzaalemu, abayita mu miryango gino:" 
Jeremiah17:21 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Mwekuume obuteetikkanga bizito ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato, yadde okubiyingiza nga mubiyisa mu miryango gya Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah17:22 Temufulumyanga bizito mu nnyumba zammwe ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato, oba okukolerako omulimu n'ogumu, wabula mukuume Sabbaato nga ntukuvu, nga bwe nalagira bajjajjammwe." 
Jeremiah17:23 Bo tebaawulira; tebassaayo mwoyo; baakakanyaza ensingo zaabwe, tebaawulira yadde okukkiriza ebyabalagirwa." 
Jeremiah17:24 Naye bwe munaafaayo okumpulira,” Omukama y'agamba, “ne mutayingiza kintu kyonna nga mukiyisa mu miryango gy'ekibuga kino ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato, ne mutukuza olunaku lwa Sabbaato, ne mutalukolerako mulimu na gumu," 
Jeremiah17:25 olwo bakabaka abatudde ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi n'abakungu baliyingira mu miryango gy'ekibuga kino nga beebagadde ku bigaali n'embalaasi, bo, abakungu baabwe, abantu ba Yuda n'abasula mu Yeruzaalemu; era ekibuga kino kirisengwamu nate emirembe gyonna." 
Jeremiah17:26 Abantu baliva mu bibuga bya Yuda ne mu byalo ebyetoolodde Yeruzaalemu, n'okuva mu nsi ya Benyamiini, ne mu Sefela, ne mu nsozi, ne mu Negevu, nga baleeta ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebyonziira, n'ebitone eby'obuwunga, obubaani, n'ebitambiro eby'okwebaza mu nnyumba y'Omukama." 
Jeremiah17:27 Naye bwe mutampulire kukuuma Sabbaato nga ntukuvu, ne muyingira mu miryango gya Yeruzaalemu ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato nga musitudde ebizito, olwo ndikoleeza omuliro mu miryango gyakyo ogulyokya embiri z'omu Yeruzaalemu, era tegugenda kuzikirizibwa.” ’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ekyajja eri Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah18:2 “Situka, oserengete ew'omubumbi, eyo gye nnaakubuulirira kye njagala okwogera.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Ne nserengeta ew'omubumbi. Nnamusanga akola ku lubumbiro. 
Jeremiah18:4 Ensumbi gye yali akola n'etavaamu bulungi nga bwe kitera okuba ku bbumba mu mikono gy'omubumbi. N'akolamu ensumbi endala mu ngeri ye gye yayagala. 
Jeremiah18:5 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja gye ndi nti: 
Jeremiah18:6 “Nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, kazzi nze sisobola kubakola ng'omubumbi oyo bw'akola? Omukama y'agamba. Ng'ebbumba bwe liba mu ngalo z'omubumbi, nammwe bwe muli mu ngalo zange, mmwe ennyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah18:7 Singa olumu ŋŋamba eggwanga, oba obwakabaka, nti nzija kulisimbulawo, ndimenyewo, ndisaanyeewo," 
Jeremiah18:8 naye eggwanga eryo lye nalabula limala liva mu bugwenyufu bwalyo, olwo ndyeddamu ku kabi ke mbadde nditegekera." 
Jeremiah18:9 Naye ate olulala singa ŋŋamba eggwanga, oba obwakabaka, nti nzija kubuzimba mbusimbe," 
Jeremiah18:10 naye ate ne bukola ekibi mu maaso gange, ne butawulira ddoboozi lyange, olwo ndyeddamu ku kirungi kye mbadde ndowooza okubukolera." 
Jeremiah18:11 Kale nno gamba abantu ba Yuda n'abasula mu Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Ndiko akabi ke mbategekera, ndiko kye ndowooza okubakola. Awo nno buli omu ave mu kkubo lye ebbi; mutereeze amakubo gammwe n'ebikolwa byammwe.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 Naye baliddamu nti: ‘Bya busa! Tujja kukola nga bwe tulowooza; tujja kugoberera buli omu bukakanyavu bwa mutima gwe omubi.’ ” 
Jeremiah18:13 N'olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Mubuulirize mu mawanga; eriyo eyali awulidde ekiri nga kino? Embeerera wa Yisirayeli akoze ekyesisiwaza ennyo. 
Jeremiah18:14 Omuzira gwe Lebanoni guggwa ku njazi z'obuyiringito bwalwo? Oba amazzi amannyogovu gayinza okukalira, ago ag'emigga egisimbuka mu nsi ez'ewala?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Sso bo abantu bange banneerabidde; banyookeza ebitaliimu obubaani. Basinzittuse mu makubo gaabwe, mu bukubo bwabwe obw'edda. Babatambulizza mu bukubokubo, mu makubo agatannakolebwa." 
Jeremiah18:16 Ensi yaabwe bagifudde eky'entiisa, ekintu ekinyoomebwa emirembe gyonna; buli muyise aliwuniikirira; alinyeenya mutwe." 
Jeremiah18:17 Nga kikuŋŋunta ow'ebuvanjuba ndibasaasaanya mu maaso g'omulabe; ndibakuba nkoona, siribatunuulira ku lunaku olw'okuzikirira kwabwe.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Ne bagamba nti: “Mujje, twekobere Yeremiya; kubanga etteeka teririggwa ku bakabona, ebibuuliro tebiriggwa ku bagezi n'ekigambo tekiriggwa ku balanzi. Mujje tumulwanyise n'olulimi, byonna by'ayogera tuleme kubiwuliriza.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Mpuliriza, ayi Mukama, wulira abalabe bange kye bagamba." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ekirungi yandikisasuddwamu na kibi? Kubanga nze bansimidde obuya. Jjukira nga bwe nayimiriranga mu maaso go ne mbawolereza gy'oli okubataasa obusungu bwo. 
Jeremiah18:21 Kale nno, abaana baabwe balekere enjala, bagabule eri amaanyi g'ekitala; bakazi baabwe bafiise abaana, era bafuuke na bannamwandu; babbaabwe bafe kawumpuli, ne batabani baabwe battibwe ekitala mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah18:22 Emiranga giwulirwe mu maka gaabwe, ng'obaleetedde omutemu amangu ago, kubanga bansimidde obuya okunkwata, ne bategera ebigere byange ebitimba." 
Jeremiah18:23 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, omanyi enkwe zaabwe zonna okunzita. Tobasonyiwa musango gwabwe, n'ekibi kyabwe tokisangula mu maaso go. Balindiggulwe awo mu maaso go; bakoleko mu bbanga ly'obusungu bwo." 
Jeremiah19:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Genda ogule ensumbi ey'ebbumba ew'omubumbi. Ddira abamu ku bakadde b'abantu n'abamu ku bakabona abakulu," 
Jeremiah19:2 olage mu kiwonvu kya Beni-Yinnomu ekiri okumpi n'omuzigo oguyitibwa Omulyango gw'Oluggyo, olangiririre eyo ebigambo bye nnaakugamba." 
Jeremiah19:3 Onoogamba nti: ‘Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama, mmwe bakabaka ba Yuda, nammwe abasula mu Yeruzaalemu. Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Nzija kuleeta akabi mu kifo kino; yenna alikawulirako, amatu galimuwaawaala." 
Jeremiah19:4 Kubanga banjabulira, n'ekifo kino ne bakifuula kirala; baatambirira balubaale mu kifo kino, bo, bajjajjaabwe ne bakabaka ba Yuda be batamanyangako; ekifo kino ne bakijjuza omusaayi gw'abataliiko musango." 
Jeremiah19:5 Baazimbira Baali ebifo ebigulumivu okwokerako abaana baabwe omuliro nga batambiririra Baali. Ekyo nze sikiragiranga n'akatono yadde okukyogera, era tekinzijiranga mu birowoozo." 
Jeremiah19:6 Kale nno ennaku zijja, Omukama y'agamba, ekifo kino nga tekikyayitibwa Tofeti, oba nti Kiwonvu kya Beni-Yinnomu, wazira nti Ekiwonvu ky'Ettambiro" 
Jeremiah19:7 Mu kifo kino mwe ndifululira entegeka za Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu, ndibaleka ne battibwa ekitala mu maaso g'abalabe baabwe n'emikono gy'abo abanoonya obulamu bwabwe; emirambo gyabwe ndigiwa ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga n'ebisolo eby'oku nsi." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ekibuga kino ndikifuula ekifo eky'entiisa, ekinyoomebwa, buli muyise aliwuniikirira n'afuuwa ekiwa okulaba engeri gye kikubiddwamu." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ndibaliisa ennyama y'abaana baabwe n'eya bawala baabwe, na buli omu alirya ennyama ya munne mu biseera eby'ennaku n'obuyinike abalabe baabwe abanoonya obulamu bwabwe bye balibalabya.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Awo n'olyoka oyasa ensumbi eyo, abantu b'oliba ogenze nabo nga balaba," 
Jeremiah19:11 n'obagamba nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Nzija kubetenta eggwanga lino n'ekibuga kino ng'ensumbi y'omubumbi bw'eyatiseyatise obulere nga tekyayinza na kuddaabirizika. Baliziika abafu mu Tofeti olw'okubulwa ekifo awalala. 
Jeremiah19:12 Kino kye ndikola ekifo kino n'abo abakisulamu, Omukama y'agamba. Ekibuga kino ndikifaananya nga Tofeti." 
Jeremiah19:13 Ennyumba za Yeruzaalemu n'ezo eza bakabaka ba Yuda zirifaafaagana ng'ekifo kino ekya Tofeti: amayumba gonna ku busolya bwago kwe baaweerereza ebitambiro nnamunkukumbo yenna ow'eggulu ne bawongera balubaale ebitone eby'okuyiwa.’ ” 
Jeremiah19:14 Awo Yeremiya n'ava e Tofeti, Omukama gye yali amutumye okulaga, n'ajja ayimirira mu luggya lw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, n'ayogera eri abantu bonna nti:" 
Jeremiah19:15 “Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: ‘ŋŋenda okuleeta ku kibuga kino ne ku byalo ebikyetoolodde byonna obubenje bwonna bwe nabiwerera, kubanga baakakanyaza ensingo zaabwe, tebaawulira bigambo byange.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Awo kabona Pasukuru mutabani wa Yimmeri, omukulu w'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, bwe yawulira Yeremiya ng'alanga ebintu ebyo," 
Jeremiah20:2 n'ajja n'akuba Yeremiya omulanzi, n'amussa mu nvuba ku Mulyango ogw'Engulu ogwa Benyamiini ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah20:3 Bwe bwakya, Pasukuru n'aggya Yeremiya mu nvuba. Yeremiya n'amugamba nti: “Omukama takyakuyita Pasukuru, wabula 'Ntiisa ku Njuyi Zonna'." 
Jeremiah20:4 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Ŋŋenda kukufuula ntiisa eri ggwe kennyini n'eri mikwano gyo; n'amaaso go oliraba nga basanjagibwa ekitala ky'abalabe baabwe. Ne Yuda yenna ŋŋenda kumuwaayo mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni, alitwala abantu e Babiloni, n'abatta n'ekitala." 
Jeremiah20:5 Obugagga bwonna obw'omu kibuga kino n'ebirimu byonna, buli kya kufuna kyonna, n'enkuluze yonna eya bakabaka ba Yuda, ndibiwaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe. Balibizingako ng'omunyago ne babitwala mu Babiloni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Ate ggwe Pasukuru na bonna abali mu maka go, muligenda mu buwaŋŋanguse. Oligenda e Babiloni; eyo gy'olifiira ne bakuziika eyo, ggwe ne mikwano gyo bonna be wagambanga eby'obulimba ng'olanga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Wansendasenda, ayi Mukama, nange ne nsendebwasendebwa; wansinza amaanyi n'ompangula. Nsekererwa olunaku lwonna; bonna banjerega." 
Jeremiah20:8 Buli lwe njogera kubeera kuleekaana nga nnangirira: “Kunyaga! Kuzikiriza!” Ekigambo ky'Omukama kindeetedde kuvumibwa, Kinnyoomesa bunyoomesa olunaku lwonna." 
Jeremiah20:9 Naye bwe ŋŋamba nti: “Siimwogereko, sikyaddamu kwogera mu linnya lye,” mu mutima gwange mpuliramu ng'omuliro ogwaka, omuliro oguggaliddwa munda mu magumba gange. Nkooye okugugumiikiriza, mazima sikyasobola." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mpulira bangi boogera obwama: “Ntiisa ku njuyi zonna. Muwaabire, tumuwaabire.” Bonna mikwano gyange balinda bulinzi ngwe. “Osanga anaawubisibwa, olwo nga tumulina, nga tumuwoolererako eggwanga.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Naye Omukama ali nange ng'omuzira nnamige; awo nno abanjigganya balisinzittuka, tebalisobola. Baliswala nnyo kubanga tebaliwangula; ensonyi zaabwe za lubeerera, teziryerabirwa." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ayi Mukama w'Amagye, ggwe ageza omutuukirivu, eyeekenneenya omutima n'emmeeme, mpa ndabe bw'owoolera eggwanga ku bo; kubanga ggwe nnyanjulidde ensonga yange." 
Jeremiah20:13 Muyimbire Omukama; mutende Omukama. Kubanga awonyezza obulamu bw'omunaku okuva mu mikono gy'ababi. 
Jeremiah20:14 Olunaku lwe nazaalirwako luvumirirwe! Olunaku mmange lwe yanzaalirako lummibwe omukisa! 
Jeremiah20:15 Avumirirwe omusajja eyatuusa ku kitange amawulire, eyamusanyusa nti: “Omulenzi akuzaaliddwa, omutabani!”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Omusajja oyo abeere ng'ebibuga Omukama by'asindula nga talina kisa. Awulire emiranga mu makya, n'enduulu z'olutalo mu ttuntu," 
Jeremiah20:17 kubanga teyanzitira mu nda, nnyabo n'aba entaana yange, olubuto lwe nga lwereeze emirembe gyonna." 
Jeremiah20:18 Mu lubuto naviiramu ki? Kulaba nnaku na kubonaabona, n'ennaku zange kuzimala mu buswavu?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Ekigambo ekyajja eri Yeremiya okuva ew'Omukama kabaka Zedekiya lwe yamutumira Pasukuru mutabani wa Malukiya ne kabona Zefaniya mutabani wa Maaseeya. Baamugamba nti: 
Jeremiah21:2 “Tubuulize ew'Omukama, kubanga Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni atutabadde. Oboolyawo Omukama anaatukolera ebimu ku byewuunyisa bye n'asobola okutuleka.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Naye Yeremiya n'abagamba nti: “Mugambe Zedekiya nti: 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: ŋŋenda kukyusa ebyokulwanyisa bye mukutte mu ngalo mbiboolekeze, ebyo bye mulumbisa kabaka w'e Babiloni n'Abakaludeya ababazingizza ebweru wa bbugwe. Nzija kubikuŋŋaanyiza mu kibuga kino." 
Jeremiah21:5 Nze kennyini nzija kubalwanyisa n'omukono omugolole, n'omukono ogw'amaanyi, mu buswandi, mu kunyiiga, ne mu busungu obungi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Nzija kutta abasula mu kibuga kino, abantu n'ebisolo; balifa kawumpuli nnamuzisa." 
Jeremiah21:7 Ebyo nga biwedde, Omukama y'agamba, Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, abaweereza be n'abantu be ab'omu kibuga kino kawumpuli, ekitala n'enjala be biriba bitalizza, ndibawaayo mu mikono gya Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, ne mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe ne mu gy'abo abanoonya obulamu bwabwe. Alibassa ekitala; talibasonyiwa yadde okubalaga ekisa oba obusaasizi.’" 
Jeremiah21:8 “Abantu bano era bagambe nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Kati nteeka mu maaso gammwe ekkubo ery'obulamu n'ekkubo ery'okufa. 
Jeremiah21:9 Buli alisigala mu kibuga kino, alifa ekitala, enjala oba kawumpuli. Naye buli alikifuluma ne yeewaayo mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya ababazinze, alirama, aliwonya obulamu bwe ng'omunyago." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ekibuga kino mmaliridde kukikola kabi sso si kirungi, Omukama y'agamba. Kiriweebwayo mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni n'akyokya omuliro." 
Jeremiah21:11 “Gamba ennyumba ya kabaka wa Yuda nti: ‘Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama. 
Jeremiah21:12 Ggwe nnyumba ya Dawudi, Omukama kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Ku makya muwenga ennamula yammwe; gwe banyaze mumuwonye mu mikono gy'abamunyigiriza, sikulwa ng'obusungu bwange butumbuka ne bukoleera ng'omuliro ogutaliiko ayinza kuzikiriza, olw'okubeera ebikolwa byammwe ebibi." 
Jeremiah21:13 Nkuli bukiika, ggwe asula mu kiwonvu, ggwe olwazi lw'oku museetwe, Omukama y'agamba; mmwe abagamba nti: “Ani alitulumba? Ani aliyingira amayumba gaffe?”" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ndibabonereza ng'ebikolwa byammwe bwe bisaanira, Omukama y'agamba; ndiyokya omuliro ebibira bye ogulisenkenya byonna ebibeetoolodde.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Serengeta ku lubiri lwa kabaka wa Yuda oyogerereyo ekigambo kino," 
Jeremiah22:2 ogambe nti: ‘Wulira ekigambo ky'Omukama, ggwe Kabaka wa Yuda atudde ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi, ggwe, abakungu bo n'abantu bo abayingirira mu miryango gino." 
Jeremiah22:3 Omukama kino ky'agamba: Mukole ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu; muwonye gwe banyaze mu mikono gy'amunyigiriza. Omugwira temumuyisanga bubi oba na bukambwe, kye kimu ne ku mulekwa ne nnamwandu; temuyiwanga mu kifo kino musaayi gutaliiko musango." 
Jeremiah22:4 Kubanga singa munaafaayo okutuukiriza ekigambo ekyo, olwo bakabaka abatudde ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi baliyita mu miryango gy'olubiri luno nga bali ku bigaali n'embalaasi, bo, abaweereza baabwe n'abantu baabwe." 
Jeremiah22:5 Naye bwe mutakkirize kuwulira bigambo bino, Omukama y'agamba, neerayidde nzennyini, olubiri luno lulifuuka matongo.’" 
Jeremiah22:6 “Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba ku lubiri lwa kabaka wa Yuda: “Wambeerera nga Gileyaadi, ng'entikko ya Lebanoni; kyokka ddala ŋŋenda kukufuula ddungu, ng'ebibuga omutali kantu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndikutegekera abantu okukuzikiriza, buli omu n'ebyokulwanyisa bye; balitema entolookyo zo ennungi ne bazisuula mu muliro." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Amawanga mangi galiyita mu kibuga kino, buli omu n'abuuza munne nti: ‘Lwaki Omukama yayisa bw'ati ekibuga kino ekikulu?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Balibaddamu nti: ‘Kubanga baayabulira endagaano y'Omukama Katonda waabwe, ne bavunnamira balubaale, ne babaweereza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Muleke kukaabira mufu, temumutemera miranga; wazira mukungubagire nnyo oyo agenze, kubanga si wa kudda; yennyini taliddamu kulaba nsi ya boobwe." 
Jeremiah22:11 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba ku Sallumu, mutabani wa Yosiya, kabaka wa Yuda, eyasikira kitaawe Yosiya ku bwakabaka, eyagenda okuva mu kifo kino: “Tagenda kudda wano." 
Jeremiah22:12 Alifiira mu kifo gye baamuwaŋŋangusiriza; taliddayo kulaba nsi eno.” 
Jeremiah22:13 “Zimusanze azimba ennyumba ye nga tagobye butuukirivu, n'ebisenge bye ebya waggulu nga tagobye bwenkanya; munne n'amukozeseza obwereere, n'atamusasula mulimu gwe.”" 
Jeremiah22:14 Agamba nti: “Nzija kwezimbira ennyumba engazi, erimu ebisenge gaggadde ebya waggulu.” Awo n'ateekako amadirisa, n'atindiza n'entolookyo, n'agisiiga langi emmyufu." 
Jeremiah22:15 “Olowooza kikufuula kabaka okuba n'obungi bw'entolookyo? Kitaawo ye teyalyanga, teyanywanga? Yatusanga obutuufu n'obutuukirivu; byonna kyebyava bimugendera bulungi." 
Jeremiah22:16 Yamalanga ensonga z'omwavu n'omunaku, olwo byonna kwe kugenda obulungi. Okummanya, ekyo si kye kitegeeza?” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah22:17 “Sso ggwe amaaso n'omutima bikuli ku kukumpanya bintu, ku kuyiwa musaayi gutaliiko musango, ku kunyigiriza na bukambwe.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Kale nno Omukama kino ky'agamba ku Yoyakimu, mutabani wa Yosiya, kabaka wa Yuda: “Tebalimukungubagira nti: ‘Kitalo, muganda wange! Kitalo, mwannyinaze!’ Tebalimukungubagira nti: ‘Kitalo, mukama wange! Kitalo, oweekitiibwa!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Aliziikibwa nga ndogoyi; alikululibwa n'akanyugibwa ebweru w'emiryango gya Yeruzaalemu.” 
Jeremiah22:20 “Linnya ku Lebanoni oleekaane; kaalaamya eddoboozi mu Basani; leekaanira ku Abarimu, kubanga baganzi bo bonna babetenteddwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Nakugambanga bwe wali mu ddembe, naye ggwe ng'owoza: ‘Sijja kuwuliriza.’ Eyo yali mpisa yo okuva mu buvubuka bwo; towuliriza ddoboozi lyange." 
Jeremiah22:22 Embuyaga erigobera eri abasumba bo bonna, ne baganzi bo bonna baligenda mu buwaŋŋanguse. Olwo ensonyi zirikukwata n'oswala olw'okubeera obugwenyufu bwo bwonna." 
Jeremiah22:23 Mmwe nno abasula mu Lebanoni, abakoleddwa ebisu mu nnyumba ez'entolookyo, muliwoloma mutya ng'obulumi bubatuukiridde, okulumwa ng'okw'omukazi azaala?" 
Jeremiah22:24 “Nze nga ndi mulamu,” Omukama y'agamba, “Koniya, mutabani wa Yoyakimu, kabaka wa Yuda, ne bwe wandibadde empeta ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, nandikunaanuddeko." 
Jeremiah22:25 Nzija kukuwaayo mu mikono gy'abo abanoonya obulamu bwo, mu mikono gy'abo b'otya, mu mikono gya Nebukadurezzari, kabaka w'e Babiloni, ne mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ggwe ne nnyoko eyakuzaala ndibakanyuga mu nsi endala gye mutaazaalirwa; eyo mwembi gye mulifiira. 
Jeremiah22:27 Yo ensi gye mwegomba okudda, temuliddayo.”" 
Jeremiah22:28 Ono Koniya nsumbi njatifu, egayibwa, ekibya ekitagasa? Lwaki ye n'ezzadde lye baakasukibwa ebweru, ne bakanyugibwa mu nsi gye baali batamanyi?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Owange ensi, nsi, nsi! Wulira ekigambo ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah22:30 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Muwandiike omusajja ono ng'atalizaala ku mwana, omusajja tebirimulamira mu biro bye; kubanga tewali wa musaayi gwe gwe biriramira, tewali alituula ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi, tewali aliddayo n'afuga mu Yuda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 “Zibasanze abasumba abazikiriza n'okusaasaanya eggana ly'omu ddundiro lyange!” Omukama y'agamba. 
Jeremiah23:2 N'olw'ekyo, Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba ku basumba abalunda eggana lyange: “Eggana lyange mulibunyizza emiwabo endiga ne muzigobera eyo, temufuddeeyo kuzirabirira. Nange nno nzija kubeekwatiramu olw'ebikolwa byammwe ebibi,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah23:3 “Nze kennyini nzija kwekuŋŋaanyiza zikaawonawo mu ndiga zange, nziggye eyo yonna mu nsi, gye nazigobera, nzizze mu malundiro gaazo; zirizaala ne zaala." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndizissaako abasumba ne bazirunda; teziriddamu kutya na kutekemuka; tekulibulako n'emu,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Laba, ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “lwe nnaasibusiza Dawudi Ettabi ettuufu; kabaka alifuga, aliramuza magezi, alikola ebikolwa eby'obutuukirivu n'obutuufu mu nsi." 
Jeremiah23:6 Mu bbanga lye Yuda alirokolebwa, ne Yisirayeli alituula ntende. Lino lye linnya lye balimuyita: 'Mukama bwe Butuukirivu bwaffe'." 
Jeremiah23:7 Awo nno ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “abantu nga tebakyagamba nti: ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, eyaggya abantu ba Yisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 wazira nti ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, eyaggya Abayisirayeli mu nsi y'emambuka, ne mu nsi zonna gye yali abagobedde.’ Olwo balibeera mu nsi yaabwe.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Ku balanzi: Omutima gwange gummenyese muli munda; amagumba gange gonna gankubagana; nfuuse ng'omutamiivu, ng'ow'omwenge gwe gugoyezza, olw'okubeera Omukama n'olw'ebigambo bye ebitukuvu." 
Jeremiah23:10 Kubanga ensi ejjudde abenzi; olw'okuvumirirwa, ensi ekungubaga; n'amalundiro mu malungu gakaze. Bakutte ekkubo ebbi, n'obuyinza bwabwe tebugoba bwenkanya." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Abalanzi ne bakabona temukyali ddiini, ne mu Kiggwa kyange nsangamu bwonoonefu bwabwe,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah23:12 “N'olw'ekyo ekkubo lyabwe liriseerera; bajja kugobebwa mu nzikiza, eyo gye baligwira. Ŋŋenda kubaleetera akabi mu mwaka mwe balibonerezebwa.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Mu balanzi b'e Samariya nalabamu obukopi: baalanganga ku lwa Baali, ne bawubisa abantu bange Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Mu balanzi ab'omu Yeruzaalemu nalabamu ekyesisiwaza: bakola obwenzi era batambulira mu bulimba. Bawagira abakola obubi, bwe kityo ne wataba n'omu ava mu nsobi ze. Bonna bandabikira nga Sodoma, abantu baamu, nga Gomorra.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 N'olw'ekyo, Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba ku balanzi: “Nange abantu bano ŋŋenda kubaliisa omususa, mbanywese n'amazzi agalimu obutwa, kubanga mu balanzi ab'omu Yeruzaalemu, obugwenyufu mwe buvudde okusaasaanira ensi eno yonna.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Temuwuliriza bya balanzi bye balanga gye muli; babagumaaza bugumaaza. Boogera bye bafumbiridde mu mitima gyabwe, tebiva mu kamwa ka Mukama." 
Jeremiah23:17 Bagamba lunye abo abannyooma nti: ‘Omukama agambye nti: “Muliba n'emirembe.” ’ Na buli agoberera obukakanyavu bw'omutima gwe omubi bamugamba nti: ‘Tewali kabi kalikugwira.’ ” 
Jeremiah23:18 Naye nno, ani ku abo eyali atudde mu lukiiko lw'Omukama n'alaba era n'awulira ekigambo kye? Ani yali ategerezza n'awulira ekigambo kye?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Mwegendereze! Omuyaga gw'Omukama! Obusungu bwe busituse, kikuŋŋunta ow'akazimu ajja kwebongera ku mitwe gy'ababi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Obusungu bw'Omukama tebuddirire okutuusa ng'amalirizza, ng'atuukirizza omutima gwe bye gutegese. Gye bujja ky'aliko mulikitegeera bulungi." 
Jeremiah23:21 Situmanga balanzi bo, naye bo badduka; soogeranga gye bali, naye bo balanga." 
Jeremiah23:22 Singa baaliko mu lukiiko lwange, bandirangiridde ebigambo byange eri abantu bange ne babaggya mu kkubo lyabwe ebbi ne mu bikolwa byabwe ebibi." 
Jeremiah23:23 Ndi Katonda nga ndi kumpi kyokka, Omukama y'agamba, nga ndi ewala siri Katonda?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Oli ayinza okwekweka gye weekukuma nze ne simulaba? Si nze ajjuza eggulu n'ensi? 
Jeremiah23:25 “Nawulira abalanzi bye balanga, abo abalanga eby'obulimba mu linnya lyange, nga bagamba mbu: ‘Naloose, naloose!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Obulimba bunaatuusa wa obubeera mu mitima gy'abalanzi abalanga eby'obulimba, abalanga bye bamaze gafumbirira mu mitima gyabwe?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Balowooza nti ebirooto bye banyumizagana bineerabiza abantu erinnya lyange, nga bajjajjaabwe bwe beerabira erinnya lyange olwa Baali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Omulanzi alina ekirooto anyumye ekirooto kye, naye oyo alina ekigambo kyange ayogere ekigambo kyange mu mazima. Abaffe, ebisusunku bifaanana ng'eŋŋano, Omukama y'agamba," 
Jeremiah23:29 ekigambo kyange tekiri nga muliro, Omukama y'agamba, tekiri nga nnyondo eyasaayasa olwazi obulere?" 
Jeremiah23:30 “Awo nno, nnwanyisa abalanzi,” Omukama y'agamba, “ababbaŋŋana ebigambo byange." 
Jeremiah23:31 Era nnwanyisa abalanzi,” Omukama y'agamba, “abatolobya ennimi zaabwe ne bagenda nga balangirira mbu: ‘Omukama agambye.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Nnwanyisa abalanzi abalanga ebirooto eby'obulimba;” Omukama y'agamba, “babinyumya ne bawubisa abantu bange n'obulimba bwabwe nga bwe beetenda nnyini. Sibatumanga yadde okubalonda; sibalina na kye baali bagasizzaamu bantu bano n'akatono,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Abantu bano, oba omulanzi, oba kabona, singa bakubuuza nti: ‘Omugugu gw'Omukama guluwa?’ ggwe obaddangamu nti: ‘Mmwe mugugu era nzija kubeetikkula, Omukama y'agamba.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 “Singa omulanzi, oba kabona, oba omuntu omulala yenna alyogera nti: ‘Mugugu gwa Mukama’, ŋŋenda kubonereza omuntu oyo n'ennyumba ye." 
Jeremiah23:35 Kino nno kye muba mugambagana, buli omu agambe munne oba muganda we nti: ‘Omukama azzeemu ki?’ oba nti: ‘Omukama ayogedde ki?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Naye ekya ‘Mugugu gwa Mukama’ temukijjukizanga nate, kubanga buli kigambo oli ky'ayogera gwe guliba omugugu gwe. Bwe mutyo bwe mukyusakyusa ebigambo bya Katonda omulamu, Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda waffe." 
Jeremiah23:37 Bw'oti nno bw'onoogamba omulanzi nti: ‘Omukama akuzzeemu ki?’ oba nti: ‘Omukama ayogedde ki?’ 
Jeremiah23:38 Kubanga mugamba nti ‘Mugugu gwa Mukama’, Omukama kino nno ky'agamba: kubanga mukozesezza enjogera nti: ‘Mugugu gwa Mukama’, sso nga nabalabula nti temuddayo ne mwogera nti: ‘Mugugu gwa Mukama’," 
Jeremiah23:39 nzija kubasitula, mbakanyuge eri okuva mu maaso gange, wamu n'ekibuga kye nali mpadde mmwe ne bajjajjammwe." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ndibaleetera okusonyiwala okw'emirembe gyonna, n'obuswavu obutalikoma era obutalyerabirwa.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Oluvannyuma nga Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni amaze okuggya mu Yeruzaalemu Yekoniya, mutabani wa Yoyakimu kabaka wa Yuda n'amutwala mu buwaŋŋanguse e Babiloni, wamu n'abakungu, abafundi n'abaweesi ba Yuda, Omukama yanjoleka ebisero bibiri ebijjudde entontogolo z'emikunyu nga bitegekeddwa mu maaso g'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama," 
Jeremiah24:2 Ekisero ekimu kyalimu entontogolo ennungi ennyo, ng'ezo ezisooka okwengera; ekirala kyalimu entontogolo embi, nga mbi nnyo tezisobola na kuliika." 
Jeremiah24:3 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Olaba ki, Yeremiya?” Ne nziramu nti: “Ntontogolo; ennungi nnungi nnyo; embi mbi nnyo tezisobola na kuliika.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja gye ndi nti: 
Jeremiah24:5 “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Ng'entontogolo zino ennungi bwe ziri, bwe ntyo bwe ndaba obulungi bw'abasibe ba Yuda be naggya kuno ne mbatwala mu nsi y'Abakaludeya," 
Jeremiah24:6 ŋŋenda kubassaako amaaso gange ku lw'obulungi bwabwe; ndibazza mu nsi eno. ŋŋenda kubazimba buggya, sso si kubazimbulula; nzija kubasimba, sso si kubasimbula." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndibawa omutima bantegeere nti nze Mukama. Balibeera bantu bange, nange ndibeera Katonda waabwe, kubanga balidda gye ndi n'omutima gwabwe gwonna." 
Jeremiah24:8 “ ‘Naye ng'entontogolo embi bwe ziba, embi ennyo ezitasobola na kuliika,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘nange bwe ntyo bwe ndikola Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, abakungu be, n'abalala ab'omu Yeruzaalemu, babe nga baasigala mu nsi muno oba nga bali mu Misiri." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndibafuula ekyesisiwaza, ekibi mu bwakabaka bwonna mu nsi, ekivumo, eky'okwogerako, eky'okusekerera n'ekikolimo yonna gye ndibagobera." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ndibasindikira ekitala n'enjala ne kawumpuli, okutuusa nga basaanyiziddwaawo ddala okuva mu nsi gye nali mbawadde, bo ne bajjajjaabwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Ekigambo kyajja eri Yeremiya ku bantu bonna aba Yuda, mu mwaka ogwokuna ogwa Yoyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya, kabaka wa Yuda, gwe mwaka omubereberye ogwa Nebukadurezzari, kabaka w'e Babiloni." 
Jeremiah25:2 Ekigambo Yeremiya omulanzi kye yabuulira abantu bonna aba Yuda, na bonna abasula mu Yeruzaalemu ng'agamba nti:" 
Jeremiah25:3 “Okuva mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'esatu ogwa Yosiya, mutabani wa Amoni, kabaka wa Yuda, n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero, gye myaka abiri mu esatu, ekigambo ky'Omukama kijja gye ndi, nange nkibabuulidde buli olukedde, naye temuwulirizza." 
Jeremiah25:4 Omukama atumye buli olukedde gye muli abaweereza be bonna abalanzi, naye temwawuliriza, newandibadde okumutegera amatu gammwe." 
Jeremiah25:5 Baagambanga nti: ‘Mukomeewo, buli omu, muve mu makubo gammwe amabi ne mu bikolwa byammwe ebibi, lwe munaasobola okusigala mu nsi Omukama gye yabawa, mmwe ne bajjajjammwe emirembe n'emirembe." 
Jeremiah25:6 Muleke kugoberera balubaale kubaweereza na kubasinza. Muleke kunnyiiza n'ebyo emikono gyammwe bye gyakola, olwo nange sigenda kubakola kabi.’" 
Jeremiah25:7 ‘Naye temwampulira,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘bwe mutyo ne munnyiiza n'ebyo emikono gyammwe bye gyakola, ne mwesombera akabi.’" 
Jeremiah25:8 “N'olw'ekyo Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: ‘Mumaze ne mutawulira bigambo byange," 
Jeremiah25:9 nzija kukunga abantu bonna ab'emambuka,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘n'omuweereza wange Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, mbaleete balumbe ensi eno n'abalimu, n'amawanga gonna ageetooloddewo. Ndibazikiririza ddala ne mbafuula ekintu eky'entiisa, ekinyoomebwa era amatongo ag'emirembe gyonna." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ndikomya mu bo eddoboozi ery'okusanyuka n'ery'okujaguza, n'eddoboozi ly'awasizza n'ery'omugole, era n'eddoboozi ly'olubengo olusa n'ekitangaala ky'ettawaaza." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ensi eno yonna eribeera ddungu, matongo masa; amawanga gano gonna galiweereza kabaka w'e Babiloni ebbanga lya myaka nsanvu." 
Jeremiah25:12 Emyaka ensanvu bwe giriyita, ndibonereza kabaka w'e Babiloni n'eggwanga eryo olw'okubeera obugwenyufu bwabwe,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘era n'ensi y'Abakaludeya; ensi ndigifuula matongo ag'emirembe gyonna." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ebigambo byange byonna bye nawerera ensi eno, ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kino, byonna Yeremiya bye yalanga eby'okugwira amawanga gonna, nzija kubikola." 
Jeremiah25:14 Bo baliweereza ng'abaddu amawanga nkumu ne bakabaka ab'amaanyi; ndibasasula nga ngerera ku bikolwa byabwe ne ku mikono gyabwe bye gyakola.’ ” 
Jeremiah25:15 Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino kye yaŋŋamba: “Nzigya mu ngalo ekikompe kino eky'evviini ey'obusungu oginywese amawanga gonna gye ŋŋenda okukutuma. 
Jeremiah25:16 Bwe baliginywako, bagenda kutagala bagwe eddalu olw'ekitala kye nnaasindika mu bo.”"
