Jeremiah25:17 Awo ne nzigya ekikompe ky'evviini mu mikono gy'Omukama, ne nginywesa amawanga gonna Omukama gye yali antumye:" 
Jeremiah25:18 Yeruzaalemu n'ebibuga bya Yuda, bakabaka baakyo n'abakungu, ndyoke mbifuule amatongo, ebyesisiwaza, ebinyoomebwa era ekikolimo nga bwe kiri olwa leero;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri, n'abaweereza be, n'abakungu be n'abantu be bonna;" 
Jeremiah25:20 n'ab'amawanga bonna abaliyo; bakabaka bonna ab'e Wuzi; bakabaka bonna ab'Abafilisitiini (Asukeloni, Gaza, Ekuroni, n'abantu abaasigala mu Asudodi);" 
Jeremiah25:21 ab'e Edomu, Mowabu, n'Abammoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 bakabaka bonna ab'e Tiiro; bakabaka bonna ab'e Sidoni; bakabaka bonna ab'oku mbalama eziri emitala w'ennyanja; 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedani, Teema, Buuzi na bonna abakomola enviiri mu bwenyi;" 
Jeremiah25:24 bakabaka bonna ab'omu Arabiya ne bakabaka bonna ab'amawanga ababeera mu ddungu; 
Jeremiah25:25 bakabaka bonna ab'e Zimuri, bakabaka bonna ab'e Elamu, bakabaka bonna ab'e Mediya;" 
Jeremiah25:26 bakabaka bonna ab'emambuka, ab'okumpi n'ab'ewala, okuva ku omu okudda ku mulala, ne bakabaka bonna ku nkulungo y'ensi. Bonna abo nga baweddeyo, olwo ne kabaka w'e Sesaki naye alinywa." 
Jeremiah25:27 “Era obagambe nti ‘Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Munywe, mutamiire, museseme, mugwe eri nga temukyaddayo kusituka olw'ekitala kye nzija okusindika mu mmwe.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Bwe baligaana okuggya ekikompe mu mikono gyo banywe, bagambe nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Mulina okukinywa." 
Jeremiah25:29 Laba, nzuuno ntandise okuleetera akabi ekibuga okuli erinnya lyange, mmwe mutaabonerezebwe? Temujja kusumattuka kubonerezebwa, kubanga nkoowooledde ekitala kyange ku bonna abali ku nsi, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Ggwe nno ebigambo bino byonna ebivumirira birange gye bali, obagambe nti: “ ‘Omukama ajja kuwuluguma ng'ayima waggulu, ajja kuta eddoboozi ng'ayima mu kisulo kye ekitukuvu; ajja kuwulugumira n'amaanyi ekisibo kye. Ajja kuleekaana ng'abasogozi b'emizabbibu; eri abo bonna abali ku nsi." 
Jeremiah25:31 Eddoboozi lya kutuusa ku nkingi z'ensi, kubanga Omukama alina ky'avunaana amawanga; ajja kulamula buli muntu, ababi abawe eri ekitala, Omukama y'agamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Akabenje kaakano kalanda okuva ku ggwanga erimu okudda ku ddala; kikuŋŋunta asituse okuva ku nsonda z'ensi.” 
Jeremiah25:33 Omukama b'alitta ku olwo balibikka okuva ku nsonda emu ey'ensi okutuuka ku ndala; tebalikaabirwa, tebalikuŋŋaanyizibwa yadde okuziikibwa, wabula balisaasaana ng'obusa ku ttaka." 
Jeremiah25:34 Mukube ebiwoobe, mmwe abasumba, mulaajane; mwevulunge mu nfuufu, mmwe abakulu b'eggana; kubanga ennaku zammwe zituuse ez'okusanjagibwa n'ez'okusesegguka ng'ebibya eby'omuwendo." 
Jeremiah25:35 Abasumba tebalibaako buddukiro, n'abakulu b'eggana tebalibeerako buwonero." 
Jeremiah25:36 Wulira okuleekaana kw'abasumba, n'okwaziirana kw'abakulu b'eggana, kubanga Omukama ayayizza amalundiro gaabwe." 
Jeremiah25:37 Amagana g'eddembe bagabunizza, mu maaso g'obusungu bw'Omukama obwesera." 
Jeremiah25:38 Alese enfo ye ng'empologoma; kubanga ensi yaabwe efuuse matongo mu maaso g'obusungu obwesera; mu maaso g'obusungu bw'Omukama obukambwe. 
Jeremiah26:1 Mu masooka g'obwakabaka bwa Yoyakimu, mutabani wa Yosiya, kabaka wa Yuda, ekigambo kyajja okuva ew'Omukama nti:" 
Jeremiah26:2 “Omukama kino ky'agamba: Yimirira mu luggya lw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama oyogere eri abantu bonna ab'omu bibuga ebya Yuda abajja okusinza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama; bagambe ebigambo byonna bye nkugambye; tolekaayo na kimu. 
Jeremiah26:3 Osanga bawulira ne bakyuka, buli omu n'ava mu kkubo lye ebbi. Olwo nange nzija kweddamu ku kabi ke mbadde ndowooza okubakola olw'ebikolwa byabwe ebibi." 
Jeremiah26:4 Bagambe nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Bwe mutampulire ne mukwata etteeka lyange lye nabawa," 
Jeremiah26:5 era bwe mutaawulirize bigambo bya baweereza bange abalanzi be mbatumidde buli olukedde, newandibadde nga mmwe temuwuliriza," 
Jeremiah26:6 olwo Ekiggwa kino ndikifuula nga Silo, n'ekibuga kino ndikifuula ekikolimo mu mawanga gonna ag'ensi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Bakabona n'abalanzi n'abantu bonna, ne bawulira Yeremiya ng'ayogera ebigambo ebyo mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah26:8 Yeremiya bwe yamaliriza okwogera byonna Omukama bye yali amulagidde okubuulira abantu bonna, bakabona, abalanzi n'abantu bonna wamu ne bamukwata, nga bagamba nti: “Oli wa kufa." 
Jeremiah26:9 Oyinza otya okulanga mu linnya ly'Omukama nti Ekiggwa kino kiribeera nga Silo n'ekibuga kino kirifuuka matongo omutali asulamu?” Abantu bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira ku Yeremiya mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama. 
Jeremiah26:10 Abakungu ba Yuda bwe baawulira ebyo, ne bava mu lubiri lwa kabaka, ne bambuka ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama, ne batuula ku muzigo gw'Omulyango Omuggya ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah26:11 Bakabona n'abalanzi ne bagamba abakungu n'abantu bonna nti: “Omuntu ono asaana kufa, kubanga avumiridde ekibuga kino, nammwe mwewuliriddeko mwennyini n'amatu gammwe.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Naye Yeremiya n'addamu abakungu n'abantu bonna nti: “Omukama y'antumye okulanga ku Kiggwa kino ne ku kibuga kino ebigambo ebyo byonna bye muwulidde. 
Jeremiah26:13 Kale nno mugolole amakubo gammwe n'ebikolwa byammwe, muwulire eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda wammwe, n'Omukama lw'aneddamu ku kabenje ke yali abaweredde." 
Jeremiah26:14 Nze nga bwendi mu mikono gyammwe; munkole kyonna mmwe kye mulaba nga kye kirungi era ekituufu. 
Jeremiah26:15 Kyokka mumanye bulungi nti bwe munzita, munaaba mutadde ku mmwe, ku kibuga kino ne ku bakisulamu ekibi ky'okuyiwa omusaayi ogutaliiko musango, kubanga, mu mazima, Omukama y'antumidde ddala gye muli okulangirira ebigambo ebyo byonna mu matu gammwe.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Awo abakungu n'ekibiina kyonna ne bagamba bakabona n'abalanzi nti: “Omuntu ono teyandittiddwa, kubanga ayogedde naffe mu linnya lya Mukama, Katonda waffe.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Awo ne weesowolayo abamu ku bakadde b'eggwanga ne bagamba ekibiina kyonna nti: 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mika ow'e Moreseti, eyalanganga mu mirembe gya Kezekiya, kabaka wa Yuda, yagamba abantu ba Yuda bonna nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Siyoni alikabalwa ng'ennimiro, Yeruzaalemu alifuuka kifulukwa, n'olusozi lw'Ekiggwa, ntuumu okumeze ekibira.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Olwo Kezekiya, kabaka wa Yuda oba omuntu omulala yenna mu Yuda yamutta? Teyatya buti Mukama n'amusaba kusaasirwa? N'Omukama teyeddamu ku kabi ke yali abaweredde? Naye ffe kati tugenda okwereetera akabi akanene.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Era waaliwo n'omusajja eyalanga mu linnya ly'Omukama, yali Wuriya mutabani wa Semaaya ow'e Kiriyati-Yewarimu. Yalanga ebinagwira ekibuga kino n'ensi eno yonna nga Yeremiya bwe yakola." 
Jeremiah26:21 Kabaka Yoyakimu, abagabe be bonna n'abakungu baawulira ebigambo ebyo; kabaka n'amunoonya amutte. Wuriya n'akimanya, n'atya, n'adduka, n'alaga mu Misiri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Naye kabaka Yoyakimu n'atuma abasajja mu Misiri ko ne Elunatani, mutabani wa Akubori." 
Jeremiah26:23 Ne baggya Wuriya mu Misiri, ne bamuleeta ewa kabaka Yoyakimu, n'alagira ne bamutta n'ekitala, omulambo gwe ne gukasukibwa mu biggya eby'olukale." 
Jeremiah26:24 Naye Akikamu mutabani wa Safani yataasa Yeremiya, bw'atyo n'ataweebwayo mu mikono gy'abantu kuttibwa." 
Jeremiah27:1 Mu masooka g'obwakabaka bwa Zedekiya, mutabani wa Yosiya kabaka wa Yuda, ekigambo kino kyajja eri Yeremiya okuva ew'Omukama nti:" 
Jeremiah27:2 Omukama kino kye yaŋŋamba, nti: “Weekolere emiguwa n'ebikoligo obyeyambike mu bulago." 
Jeremiah27:3 Olwo weereza obubaka eri kabaka w'e Edomu, kabaka w'e Mowabu, kabaka w'Abammoni, kabaka w'e Tiiro ne kabaka w'e Sidoni ng'obuyisa mu babaka abazze eri Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah27:4 Bawe obubaka buno babutwale eri bakama baabwe nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Bakama bammwe kino kye muba mubagamba nti:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Nze nakola ensi n'abantu baayo n'ebisolo ebiriko n'omukono gwange omugolole, n'omukono gwange ogw'amaanyi, era ngiwa oyo gwe mba njagadde." 
Jeremiah27:6 Kaakano nno mpadde ensi ezo zonna mu mikono gya Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, omuweereza wange; n'ebisolo eby'ettale mbimuwadde bimuweereze." 
Jeremiah27:7 Amawanga gonna galimuweereza, ye, mutabani we ne muzzukulu we, okutuusa ate obudde bw'abantu be lwe bulituuka; olwo amawanga mangi ne bakabaka ab'obuyinza balimufuula muweereza." 
Jeremiah27:8 Eggwanga oba obwakabaka ebitaligondera Nebukadunezzari, kabaka w'e Babiloni, ensingo yaabwe ne batagikutamiza kikoligo kya kabaka w'e Babiloni, eggwanga eryo ndiribonereza n'ekitala n'enjala ko ne kawumpuli okutuusa lwe ndibawaayo mu mikono gye, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah27:9 Mmwe nno temuwuliriza balanzi bammwe, balaguzi, baloosi ba birooto, mmandwa na balogo bammwe abagenda bagamba nti: “Temugenda kufugibwa kabaka wa Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah27:10 Bye balanga gye muli bya bulimba, ekirivaamu muliggyirwa ddala mu nsi yammwe; ndibagoba ne muzikirira." 
Jeremiah27:11 Naye eggwanga bwe liriwetera ensingo yaalyo ekikoligo kya kabaka w'e Babiloni, ne limuweereza, ndirireka mu nsi yaalyo okugirima n'okugibeeramu, Omukama y'agamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Nagamba Zedekiya, kabaka wa Yuda ebigambo bye bimu nti: “Ensingo zammwe muzikutamize ekikoligo kya kabaka w'e Babiloni; mumuweereze, ye n'abantu be, olwo munaalama." 
Jeremiah27:13 Lwaki ggwe n'abantu bo mwagala okufa ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli Omukama by'aweredde eggwanga eritalikkiriza kuweereza kabaka w'e Babiloni?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Muleke kuwuliriza bigambo by'abalanzi abagenda babagamba nti: ‘Temugenda kufugibwa kabaka w'e Babiloni,’ kubanga bye balanga gye muli bulimba bwereere." 
Jeremiah27:15 Kubanga nze sibatumanga, Omukama y'agamba; balanga bya bulimba mu linnya lyange. Nzija kubagoba, muzikirire, mmwe n'abalanzi abalanga gye muli.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Awo ne ŋŋamba bakabona n'abantu bonna nti: “Omukama kino ky'agamba: Muleke kuwuliriza bigambo bya balanzi bammwe abagenda balanga nti: ‘Mu bbanga ttono ebibya by'omu Kiggwa ky'Omukama bijja kuzzibwa okuva mu Babiloni.’ Ebyo bye balanga gye muli bya bulimba bwereere. 
Jeremiah27:17 Temubawuliriza; muweereze kabaka w'e Babiloni, olwo munaalama. Lwaki ekibuga kino kyandifuuse matongo?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Obanga balanzi, obanga balina n'ekigambo ky'Omukama mu bo, beegayirire Omukama w'Amagye, ebintu ebisigadde mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama ne mu lubiri lwa kabaka wa Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu, bireme kutwalibwa mu Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'ayogera ku mpagi, ku Nnyanja, ku butandaalo ne ku bintu ebirala ebisigadde mu kibuga kino," 
Jeremiah27:20 Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni by'ataatwala lwe yawaŋŋangusa Yekoniya mutabani wa Yoyakimu kabaka wa Yuda n'abakungu bonna aba Yuda n'ab'e Yeruzaalemu n'abatwala e Babiloni ng'abaggya mu Yeruzaalemu. 
Jeremiah27:21 Ddala Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba ku bintu ebyalekebwa awo mu nnyumba y'Omukama, mu lubiri lwa kabaka wa Yuda ne mu Yeruzaalemu nti:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Bigenda kutwalibwa e Babiloni, gye biribeera okutuusa olunaku lwe ndibirowoozaako nate,’ Omukama y'agamba. ‘Olwo ndibiggyayo ne mbizza mu kifo kino.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Mu mwaka ogwo gwennyini, mu masooka g'obwakabaka bwa Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, mu mwaka ogwokuna, mu mwezi ogwokutaano, omulanzi Ananiya, mutabani wa Azzuri, ow'e Gibewoni, yagamba Yeremiya mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, mu maaso ga bakabona n'abantu bonna nti:" 
Jeremiah28:2 “Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Ekikoligo kya kabaka w'e Babiloni nkimenye." 
Jeremiah28:3 Mu bbanga lya myaka ebiri nzija kuzza mu kifo kino ebibya byonna eby'omu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni bye yaggya mu kifo kino n'abitwala e Babiloni." 
Jeremiah28:4 Ndikomyawo mu kifo kino ne Yekoniya mutabani wa Yoyakimu kabaka wa Yuda n'abasibe bonna aba Yuda abaagenda e Babiloni,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘kuba nzija kumenya ekikoligo kya kabaka w'e Babiloni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Awo Yeremiya omulanzi n'ayanukula Ananiya omulanzi mu maaso ga bakabona n'abantu bonna abaali bayimiridde mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama. 
Jeremiah28:6 Yeremiya omulanzi n'agamba nti: “Amiina, Omukama akole bw'atyo! Atuukirize ebigambo by'ova okulanga, akomyewo mu kifo kino okuva e Babiloni ebibya by'omu Kiggwa ky'Omukama n'abawaŋŋangusibwa bonna." 
Jeremiah28:7 Kyokka, wulira bulungi ekigambo kye ŋŋenda okwogera mu matu go ne mu matu g'abantu bonna:" 
Jeremiah28:8 ‘Abalanzi abaatusooka, okuva edda, baalanganga ku nsi nnyingi n'obwakabaka bungi entalo, enjala ne kawumpuli." 
Jeremiah28:9 Kyokka omulanzi alanga emirembe, ekigambo kye bwe kiraka, kw'ategeererwa ng'Omukama mu mazima ye yamutuma.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Awo Ananiya omulanzi n'asika ekikoligo mu bulago bwa Yeremiya omulanzi, n'akimenyamu." 
Jeremiah28:11 Ananiya n'ayogera mu maaso g'abantu bonna nti: “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Bwe ndimenya bwe ntyo nga wayise emyaka ebiri ekikoligo kya Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni ne nkyambula mu bulago bw'amawanga gonna.’ ” Awo Yeremiya omulanzi n'akwata agage n'agenda. 
Jeremiah28:12 Oluvannyuma nga Ananiya omulanzi amaze okumenya ekikoligo n'akyambula mu bulago bwa Yeremiya omulanzi, ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja eri Yeremiya nti:" 
Jeremiah28:13 “Genda ogambe Ananiya nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Omenye ekikoligo ky'omuti, naye nzija kubakolera mu kifo kyakyo ebikoligo eby'ekyuma." 
Jeremiah28:14 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: Nzija kwambika ekikoligo ky'ekyuma ku nsingo z'amawanga gano gonna, gaweereze Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni. Kwo okumuweereza mugenda kumuweereza, n'ebisolo eby'ettale mbitadde mu buyinza bwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Awo Yeremiya omulanzi n'alyoka agamba Ananiya omulanzi nti: “Ananiya, wulira bulungi: Omukama takutumanga, ate ggwe n'okkirizisa abantu bano eby'obulimba." 
Jeremiah28:16 Omukama kyava agamba nti: ‘ŋŋenda kukuggya ku nsi; ojja kufa mu mwaka guno, kubanga by'oyogedde bireeta okujeemera Omukama.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Mu mwaka ogwo gwennyini, mu mwezi ogwomusanvu, Ananiya omulanzi n'afa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Bino bye bigambo by'ebbaluwa Yeremiya omulanzi gye yaweereza okuva e Yeruzaalemu eri abaali bakyawonyeewo mu bakadde abaali mu buwaŋŋanguse, n'eri bakabona, abalanzi n'abantu abalala bonna Nebukadunezzari be yali aggye e Yeruzaalemu n'abatwala e Babiloni." 
Jeremiah29:2 Kino kyaliwo nga kabaka Yekoniya, nnamasole, abakungu, abakulembeze ba Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu, abafundi n'abaweesi bamaze okuva mu Yeruzaalemu okugenda mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Jeremiah29:3 Ebbaluwa yakwasibwa Eleyasa mutabani wa Safani, ne Gemariya mutabani wa Kilukiya, Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda be yatuma e Babiloni eri Nebukadunezzari, kabaka w'e Babiloni. Yali esoma bw'eti:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba abasibe bonna be naggya mu Yeruzaalemu ne batwalibwa e Babiloni:" 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Muzimbe amayumba; mukkalire; musimbe ennimiro, mulye bye zibazizza." 
Jeremiah29:6 Muwase abakazi muzaale abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. Muwasize batabani bammwe abakazi; mufumbize ne bawala bammwe bazaale abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala; mwale bwazi nga muli eyo, temukendeera." 
Jeremiah29:7 Mukolerere obulungi bw'ekibuga gye nabawaŋŋangusiza. Mukisabirenga ew'Omukama, kubanga bwe kibeera obulungi, nammwe muliba bulungi." 
Jeremiah29:8 Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Temukkiriza balanzi bammwe abali mu mmwe kubawubisa, yadde abalaguzi bammwe; temuwuliriza birooto byammwe bye mubaloosa." 
Jeremiah29:9 Balanga bya bulimba gye muli mu linnya lyange. Nze sibatumanga n'akamu, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah29:10 Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: Emyaka ensanvu bwe girimala okujjula ku lwa Babiloni, ndibalambula, ne ntuukiriza ekisuubizo kyange ekirungi eky'okubakomyawo wano." 
Jeremiah29:11 Anti nze mmanyi ebirowoozo bye mbalinako, Omukama bw'agamba: birowoozo bya ddembe, si bya kubabonyaabonya, bya kubawa bulamu na ssuubi." 
Jeremiah29:12 Munankoowoolanga, ne mujja ne musaba ewange, nange ŋŋendanga kubawulira." 
Jeremiah29:13 Munannoonyanga ne munsanga, bwe muliba munnoonyezza n'omutima gwammwe gwonna." 
Jeremiah29:14 Mulinsanga, Omukama bw'agamba, nange ndibaggya mu busibe bwammwe; ndibakuŋŋaanyaayo eyo yonna mu mawanga, ne mu bifo byonna gye nabagobera, Omukama y'agamba, ne mbakomyawo mu kifo kino mwe nabaggya okubawaŋŋangusa.’" 
Jeremiah29:15 “Mwandigamba nti: ‘Omukama yatusibusiza abalanzi e Babiloni.’ 
Jeremiah29:16 Naye Omukama kino ky'agamba kabaka atudde ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi n'abantu bonna abasula mu kibuga kino, baganda bammwe be mutaagenda nabo mu buwaŋŋanguse:" 
Jeremiah29:17 ‘Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Nzija kubasindikira ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli; nzija kubafaananya ng'entontogolo z'emikunyu embi, embi ennyo ezitasobola na kuliika." 
Jeremiah29:18 Nzija kubawondera n'ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli. Ndibafuula abantu abeesisiwaza eri buli bwakabaka bwonna obw'ensi, ekikolimo, eky'entiisa, ekinyoomebwa n'okuvuma mu mawanga gonna gye nabagobera," 
Jeremiah29:19 kubanga tebaawuliriza bigambo byange, Omukama y'agamba, ebyo bye nabatuusangako buli olukedde nga mbiyisa mu baweereza bange abalanzi; naye era temwawulira, Omukama bw'agamba." 
Jeremiah29:20 Kale nno mwenna be nawaŋŋangusa okuva mu Yeruzaalemu, ne mbaweereza e Babiloni, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah29:21 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba ku Akabu mutabani wa Kolaaya, ne ku Zedekiya mutabani wa Maaseeya, abalanga gye muli eby'obulimba mu linnya lyange: Nzija kubawaayo mu mikono gya Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, abatte nga nammwe mulaba." 
Jeremiah29:22 Olw'okubeera bo, abasibe bonna aba Yuda abali e Babiloni, banaagambanga bwe banaabanga bavumirira nti: “Omukama akufuule nga Zedekiya ne Akabu kabaka w'e Babiloni be yayokya mu muliro!”" 
Jeremiah29:23 Kubanga baakola ebikolobero mu Yisirayeli: bayenda ne bakabannaabwe, ate ne boogera eby'obusiru mu linnya lyange, ekintu kye sibalagiranga. Mbimanyi, era ndi mujulirwa, Omukama y'agamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Ne Semaaya ow'e Nekelamu mugambe nti: 
Jeremiah29:25 “Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: ‘Kubanga waweereza mu linnya lyo ebbaluwa eri abantu bonna abali mu Yeruzaalemu, n'eri Zefaniya mutabani wa Maaseeya kabona, n'eri bakabona bonna, ng'egamba nti:" 
Jeremiah29:26 “Omukama yakufuula kabona mu kifo kya Yoyada, obeere omukulu w'Omukama. Buli yenna eyeerogozza n'alanga, omusibe mu nvuba ne mu kikoligo.” ’" 
Jeremiah29:27 Kale lwaki tokoma ku Yeremiya ow'e Anatoti eyeeyita omulanzi eyo ewammwe? 
Jeremiah29:28 Aweerezza ebbaluwa eno ewaffe e Babiloni ng'agamba nti: ‘Ebbanga likyaliyo. Muzimbe amayumba, mukkalire, musimbe ennimiro, mulye bye zibazizza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Zefaniya kabona ebbaluwa eyo yagisomera Yeremiya omulanzi. 
Jeremiah29:30 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah29:31 “Weereza obubaka buno eri abawaŋŋangusibwa bonna, obagambe nti ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba ku Semaaya ow'e Nekelamu: Kubanga Semaaya yalanga gye muli, sso nga nze simutumanga, n'abakkirizisa eby'obulimba," 
Jeremiah29:32 kale Omukama kino ky'agamba: Nzija kubonereza Semaaya ow'e Nekelamu n'ezzadde lye; talisigaza muntu n'omu mu bantu bano, era taliraba ku birungi bye ndikolera abantu bange, Omukama bw'agamba; kubanga by'ayogedde bya kujeemera Mukama.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Kino kye kigambo ekyajja eri Yeremiya okuva ew'Omukama nti: 
Jeremiah30:2 “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Wandiika mu kitabo ebigambo byonna bye nkugambye." 
Jeremiah30:3 Ennaku zijja, Omukama y'agamba, nzigye mu busibe abantu bange Yisirayeli ne Yuda, mbazze mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjaabwe ebeere yaabwe, Omukama y'ayogera.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Bino bye bigambo Omukama bye yagamba Yisirayeli ne Yuda: 
Jeremiah30:5 “ ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Twawulira enduulu ez'akasattiro; za ntiisa, si za ddembe." 
Jeremiah30:6 Mwebuuze nno mwetegereze: Omusajja ayinza okuzaala omwana? Lwaki ate ndaba nga buli musajja emikono gimuli ku lubuto ng'omukazi alumwa? Lwaki amaaso gabapeeruuse? 
Jeremiah30:7 Kitalo, olunaku olwo nga luliba lwa kikuuno! Tewali lulirwenkana; luliba budde bwa kabi ku Yakobo; kyokka aliwonyezebwa." 
Jeremiah30:8 “ ‘Ku olwo, Omukama w'Amagye y'ayogera, ndikutula ekikoligo ekibali mu bulago, ndikutula enjegere zaabwe; abagwira tebalibafuula baddu nate;" 
Jeremiah30:9 wazira baliweerezanga Omukama Katonda waabwe ne Dawudi kabaka waabwe gwe ndibasitusiza. 
Jeremiah30:10 “ ‘Awo nno, Yakobo omuweereza wange, leka kutya; Yisirayeli, totekemuka,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘ŋŋenda kukununula mu nsi ey'ewala, n'ezzadde lyo ndiggye mu nsi gye lyasibirwa. Yakobo agenda kudda, atebenkere, abeere mu ddembe; tewaliba amukanga." 
Jeremiah30:11 Kubanga ndi naawe okukuwonya,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘ndisaanyizaawo ddala amawanga gonna, gye nakusaasaanyiza; wazira ggwe sirikusaanyizaawo ddala. Ndikubonereza ekisaanidde, kyokka sirikulekera awo nga sikubonerezza.’" 
Jeremiah30:12 “Omukama agamba nti: Obuvune obubwo si bwa kuwona; ekiwundu kyo kikookodde. 
Jeremiah30:13 Tewali wa kuwuliriza nsonga zo; ekiwundu kyo tekiriiko kuvumula; ku ggwe teri kuwona. 
Jeremiah30:14 Abaali baganzi bo bonna bakwerabidde, tebakufaako. Nakukuba ng'omulabe bwe yandikukubye, ng'omukambwe bwe yandikubonerezza. Kubanga omusango gwo munene bulala, n'ebibi byo byayitirira obungi." 
Jeremiah30:15 Lwaki olaajana olw'ekiwundu kyo, olw'obulumi bwo obutali bwa kuwona? Olw'omusango omunene n'ebibi byo ebingi, kyennava nkukola ekyo." 
Jeremiah30:16 Kyokka abo bonna abaakukavvula, balikavvulibwa; n'abalabe bo bonna baliwaŋŋangusibwa, buli omu; abo abaakunyaga, balinyagibwa; na bonna abaakwaya, nabo baliyaayibwa." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ndikuwonya ne nkuzzaawo, ndiwonya ekiwundu kyo,” Omukama y'agamba, “kubanga bakuyita ‘Omuboole, Siyoni, atalina amufaako’." 
Jeremiah30:18 “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Nzija kuzzaawo weema za Yakobo, ndiddiramu ebisulo bye. Ekibuga kirizzibwawo we kibadde entuumu, n'olubiri lulizzibwa mu kifo kyalwo." 
Jeremiah30:19 Mu bo mulivaamu ennyimba ez'ettendo, n'amaloboozi g'abajaguza. Ndibafuula bangi, tebalikendeera; ndibagulumiza, tebalinyoomebwa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abaana baabwe baliba nga bwe gwalinga edda; n'ekibiina kyabwe kirikakata mu maaso gange; ndibonereza bonna ababatulugunya. 
Jeremiah30:21 Omukungu waabwe aliva mu bo, alibafuga alisituka mu bo, nzija kumusembeza, naye alinsemberera. Anti ani alyewaayo okunsemberera?’ Omukama y'ayogera." 
Jeremiah30:22 “ ‘Olwo mulibeera bantu bange, nange ne mba Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Mwegendereze! Omuyaga gw'Omukama! Obusungu bwe busituse, kikuŋŋunta ow'akazimu ajja kwebongera ku mitwe gy'ababi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Obusungu bw'Omukama obwesera tebuulekere awo okutuusa ng'amalirizza, ng'atuukirizza omutima gwe bye gutegese. Gye bujja ky'aliko mulikitegeera." 
Jeremiah31:1 “Mu budde obwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “ndibeera Katonda w'ebika byonna ebya Yisirayeli, nabo balibeera bantu bange.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Abantu abaawona ekitala, basanze omukisa mu ddungu; Yisirayeli alaze mu kiwummulo kye.”" 
Jeremiah31:3 Omukama yayima wala n'andabikira ng'agamba nti: “Nakwagala n'okwagala okw'emirembe gyonna, era nkyakwagala n'okwagala okujjudde ekisa." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndikuzimba buto; ddala oliddamu okuzimbibwa, ayi Embeerera Yisirayeli; oliddamu okwambalira obugoma bwo, n'ogenda okuzina n'abayimba." 
Jeremiah31:5 Oliddamu okusimba emizabbibu ku nsozi z'e Samariya; abalimi balisimba ne beeriira ku bibala. 
Jeremiah31:6 Olunaku lulituuka abakuumi lwe balikoowoolera ku nsozi za Efurayimu nti: ‘Musituke, twambuke ku Siyoni eri Omukama Katonda waffe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Muyimbire waggulu n'essanyu olwa Yakobo, mumukubire emizira oyo omutwe gw'amawanga. Mulangirire, muyimbe, mugambe nti: ‘Ayi Mukama, lokola abantu bo, kaawonawo wa Yisirayeli.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Nzija kubaggya mu nsi ey'emambuka, mbakuŋŋaanye okuva ewala ku nkingi z'ensi. Mwe muliba bamuzibe n'abalema, ab'embuto n'abatuuse okuzaala; ekibiina kinene eky'abalikomawo." 
Jeremiah31:9 Balidda nga bakaaba, ndibazza nga bawanjaga; ndibayisa ku migga egy'amazzi, mu kkubo esseeteevu mwe batalyesittalira. Kubanga ndi kitaawe wa Yisirayeli, ate Efurayimu ye muggulanda wange.”" 
Jeremiah31:10 Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama, mmwe amawanga, mukirangirire ku bizinga eby'ewala nti: “Oyo eyasaasaanya Yisirayeli alimukuŋŋaanya, alimukuuma ng'omusumba bw'akuuma eggana." 
Jeremiah31:11 Kubanga Omukama alinunula Yakobo, alimuwonya mu mikono gy'oyo amusinga amaanyi." 
Jeremiah31:12 Balikomawo ne bayimba n'essanyu ku kasozi ka Siyoni; balijaguliza mu birungi by'Omukama: eŋŋano, evviini ensu, omuzigo, amagana g'endiga n'ente. Baliba ng'ennimiro efukirirwa obulungi: tebaliddayo kuyenjebuka." 
Jeremiah31:13 Abawala embeerera balisanyuka ne bayimba, abavubuka n'abakadde okwo. Okukungubaga kwabwe ndikufuula essanyu, ndibakubagiza, mu kifo ky'ennaku yaabwe ndibawaamu okujaguza." 
Jeremiah31:14 Bakabona ndibakkusa n'omwero gw'emmere; n'abantu bange balijjula ebirungi byange,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah31:15 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Eddoboozi lyawulirwa mu Rama: okukaaba n'emiranga egy'okunyolwa, Rakeli ng'akaabira abaana be. Tayagala kukubagizibwa olw'abaana be, kubanga tewakyali n'omu.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Ggya eddoboozi lyo ku kukaaba, n'amaaso go gakaze amaziga, kubanga olifuna empeera y'omulimu gwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “kubanga balidda okuva mu nsi y'omulabe." 
Jeremiah31:17 Waliwo essuubi gye bulijja,” y'agamba Omukama, “abaana bo bagenda kudda mu nsi yaboobwe." 
Jeremiah31:18 Kwo okuwulira nawulira emiranga gya Efurayimu: ‘Ommonerezza ng'akayana akalalu, nange ne nzikiriza okubonerezebwa; nkomyawo, nange nzija kudda, kubanga ggwe Mukama Katonda wange." 
Jeremiah31:19 Bwe nawaba, neenenya; bwe nategeera, neenenya. Naswala, ne nswaluka, kubanga naliko ensonyi z'omu buvubuka bwange.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Kazzi Efurayimu si mwana wange omwagalwa, omwana ansanyusa? Newandibadde mmunenya ntakera, nkyamujjukira. Omutima gwange gumunnumira; ankwasa ekisaasaazi kingi,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Simba obubonero bw'oku luguudo; weeteerewo endagiriro; omutima gusse ku kkubo, ku luguudo lw'okutte. Komawo, ayi Embeerera Yisirayeli, komawo mu bibuga byo." 
Jeremiah31:22 Olitangatanga kutuusa wa, ggwe omuwala omujeemu? Laba Omukama akoze ekiggya ku nsi: omukazi alyebungulula omusajja.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: “Bwe ndibazza okuva mu busibe, baliddamu okwogera ebigambo bino mu nsi ya Yuda ne mu bibuga byayo nti: “ ‘Omukama akuwe omukisa, ggwe ekisulo ky'obutuukirivu, ggwe olusozi olutukuvu.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 “Abantu balibeera wamu mu Yuda n'ebibuga byayo byonna: abalimi n'abagenda batambula n'amagana. 
Jeremiah31:25 Ndikkusa abakoowu; ndizzaamu otwanyi abayenjebuse.” 
Jeremiah31:26 Awo ne nzuukuka mu tulo, ne ndaba; otulo twange twali tuwoomu." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Kale nno ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “lwe ndisiga abantu n'ebisolo mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli ne Yuda." 
Jeremiah31:28 Nga bwe nabalabirira ku kusimbula, ku kwabya, ku kusuula, okuzikirira n'okuleeta akabi, bwe ntyo bwe ndibalabirira ku kuzimba n'okusimba,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah31:29 “Mu nnaku ezo tebaliddayo kugamba nti: “ ‘Bakitaabwe baalya emizabbibu emibisi, amannyo g'abaana ne ganyenyeera.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 “Wazira buli muntu alifa lwa kibi kye; aliba alidde emizabbibu emibisi, amannyo gwe galinyenyeera." 
Jeremiah31:31 “Laba, ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “lwe ndikola endagaano empya n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, n'ennyumba ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Teriba ng'endagaano gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe ku lunaku lwe nabakwata ku mukono okubaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, kubanga baamenya endagaano yange, sso nga nali bbaabwe,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah31:33 “Naye eno ye ndagaano gye ndikola n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ezo,” Omukama y'agamba, “etteeka lyange ŋŋenda kulissa munda mu mmeeme yaabwe, ndiwandiike ku mitima gyabwe. Ndibeera Katonda waabwe, nabo balibeera bantu bange." 
Jeremiah31:34 Buli omu talyetaaga kuyigiriza munne, oba buli omu okugamba muganda we nti: ‘Manya Omukama,’ kubanga bagenda kummanya bonna, okuva ku asembayo obuto okutuuka kw'asinga obukulu,” Omukama y'agamba, “kubanga ndibasonyiwa emisango gyabwe, n'ebibi byabwe siriddayo kubijjukira.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Omukama kino ky'agamba, oyo assaawo enjuba eyake emisana, omwezi n'emmunyeenye n'abiragira bimulise ekiro; asiikuula ennyanja amayengo gaayo ne gawuuma; erinnya lye ye Mukama w'Amagye:" 
Jeremiah31:36 “Amateeka gano bwe galivaawo mu maaso gange Omukama y'agamba, olwo n'ezzadde lya Yisirayeli lwe liriggwa ne likoma okuba eggwanga mu maaso gange ennaku zonna.”" 
Jeremiah31:37 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olubaale waggulu awo bwe lulisobola okupimibwa, n'omwaliiro gw'ensi ne gufeffettebwa wansi eyo, olwo nange ndisuula eri ezzadde lya Yisirayeli lyonna olwa byonna bye baakola,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah31:38 “Kale nno ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “ekibuga kino lwe kiriddamu okuzimbirwa Omukama, okuva ku Munaala gwa Kananeli okutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Ensonda." 
Jeremiah31:39 Olukoba olupima luliva awo butereevu okutuuka ku ntikko za Garebu, ate ne ludda ku Gowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 N'ekiwonvu kyonna eky'emirambo n'evvu ly'amasavu, ensalosalo zonna okutuukira ddala ku kagga Kiduroni, n'okudda ebugwanjuba okutuuka ku mulyango gw'Embalaasi waliyitibwa watukuvu ku lw'Omukama; ekibuga tekirisimbulwa oba okuddamu okuzikirizibwa emirembe gyonna.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Kino kye kigambo ekyajja eri Yeremiya okuva ew'Omukama, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi ogwa Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, gwe gwali omwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana ogwa Nebukadurezzari." 
Jeremiah32:2 Mu budde obwo eggye lya kabaka w'e Babiloni lyali lizinze Yeruzaalemu; Yeremiya omulanzi yali musibe mu luggya lw'abakuumi olw'omu nnyumba ya kabaka wa Yuda. 
Jeremiah32:3 Zedekiya, kabaka wa Yuda yali amusibidde awo ng'amuvunaana nti: “Lwaki olanga ebyo by'olanga? Ogenda ogamba nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Ekibuga kino ŋŋenda kukiwaayo mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni akikwate." 
Jeremiah32:4 Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda taliwona mikono gya Bakaludeya, naye aliweebwa mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni; alyogera naye maaso ku maaso era alimwerabirako ddala n'agage." 
Jeremiah32:5 Alitwala Zedekiya e Babiloni, gy'alisigala okutuusa lwe ndimujjukira, Omukama y'agamba. Bwe muligeza okulwanyisa Abakaludeya, temuliwangula.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Awo Yeremiya n'agamba nti: “Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja gye ndi nti: 
Jeremiah32:7 ‘Kanameli mutabani wa kojjaawo Sallumu ajja kujja gy'oli akugambe nti: “Gula ennimiro yange eri mu Anatoti, kubanga nga bw'oli owooluganda alina obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okununula, ggwe osaana okugigula.” ’" 
Jeremiah32:8 Awo Kanameli omwana wa kojjange n'ajja gye ndi mu luggya lw'ekkomera nga Omukama bwe yali ayogedde, n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Gula ennimiro yange mu Anatoti mu nsi ya Benyamiini, kubanga ggwe olina obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okugitwala n'obw'okuginunula; gyegulire.’ Nategeera nti kino kigambo kya Mukama;" 
Jeremiah32:9 kwe kugula ku Kanameli omwana wa kojja ennimiro y'e Anatoti, ne mupimira ssente, sekeli za ffeeza kkumi na musanvu." 
Jeremiah32:10 Nassa omukono ku ndagaano ne ngisiba, ne nzisaawo abajulirwa, ne ndyoka mmupimira ffeeza ku minzaani." 
Jeremiah32:11 Awo ne ntwala endagaano ensibe ey'obuguzi omwali byonna ebikkaanyiziddwako, n'endala eyali ekoppoloddwako etaali nsibe." 
Jeremiah32:12 Endagaano y'obuguzi ne ngikwasa Baruku mutabani wa Neriya, mutabani wa Makuseeya, mu maaso ga Kanameli omwana wa kojjange n'ag'abajulirwa abassa omukono ku ndagaano yaffe ey'obuguzi, n'ag'Abayudaaya bonna abaali mu luggya lw'abakuumi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Awo mu maaso gaabwe, ne ndagira Baruku nti:" 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: “Kwata ebiwandiiko bino, endagaano eno ey'obuguzi ensibe n'eno eteri nsibe, obiteeke mu nsumbi ey'ebbumba mwe bisobola okumala ebbanga eggwanvu." 
Jeremiah32:15 Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: Amayumba, ennimiro n'emizabbibu bijja kuddamu okugulibwa mu nsi muno.” ’" 
Jeremiah32:16 “Bwe namala okukwasa Baruku, mutabani wa Neriya endagaano, ne yeegayirira Omukama nti:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Yii! Ayi Mukama, Katonda, watonda eggulu n'ensi n'omukono gwo omugolole, n'omukono gwo ogw'amaanyi; tewali kikulema." 
Jeremiah32:18 Ogirira ekisa enkumi n'enkumi, emisango gya bakitaabwe n'ogiwoolera ku baana baabwe ababaddirira. Ayi Katonda omukulu, ow'obuyinza, erinnya lyo ggwe Mukama w'Amagye." 
Jeremiah32:19 Oli mukulu mu nnamula yo; oli wa buyinza mu by'okola. Amaaso go gatunuulidde abantu nga bwe beeyisa, buli omu n'omuddiza ng'olabira ku makubo ge n'ebyo ebiva mu bikolwa bye." 
Jeremiah32:20 Wakola obubonero obwewuunyisa n'ebikuuno mu nsi y'e Misiri, na kati okyabikola, mu Yisirayeli ne mu bantu bonna, ne weekolera erinnya nga bwe likyali n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Jeremiah32:21 Waggya abantu bo Yisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri n'obubonero obwewuunyisa n'ebikuuno n'omukono omugolole, n'omukono ogw'amaanyi mu ntiisa ennene." 
Jeremiah32:22 N'obawa ensi eno gye walayira okuwa bajjajjaabwe, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Jeremiah32:23 Nabo baayingira ne bagitwala naye tebaagondera ddoboozi lyo, tebaatambulira mu tteeka lyo; bye wabalagira okukola, tebaabikola. Kyewava oleka akabi kano konna kabagwire." 
Jeremiah32:24 Laba embibiro bwe zituumiddwa okuzingiza ekibuga, ate olw'okubeera ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli, ekibuga kiweereddwayo mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya abakirwanyisa. Bye wayogera biibyo bituukiridde nga naawe wennyini bw'okiraba." 
Jeremiah32:25 Naye ate ggwe, ayi Mukama Katonda, oŋŋamba nti ‘Gula ennimiro ne ffeeza, osseewo n'abajulirwa,’ sso ng'ekibuga kiweereddwayo mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah32:27 “Nze Mukama, Katonda w'ebiramu byonna. Waliwo ekintu n'ekimu ekinnema?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Olw'ekyo nno Omukama kino ky'agamba: Ekibuga kino ŋŋenda kukiwaayo mu mikono gya Abakaludeya ne mu mikono gya Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, akikwate." 
Jeremiah32:29 Abakaludeya abalumbye ekibuga kino bajja kukyokya omuliro, bakyokye wamu n'amayumba abantu gye bannyiiriza nga banyookeza Baali obubaani ku busolya bwago, n'okuyiyira balubaale ebitambiro." 
Jeremiah32:30 Abantu ba Yisirayeli n'aba Yuda okuva mu buvubuka bwabwe bulijjo tebalina kirala kye bakola wabula okukola obubi mu maaso gange; ddala abantu ba Yisirayeli, tebalina kirala kya kukola wabula okunnyiiza ne bye bakola n'emikono gyabwe, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah32:31 Ekibuga kino okuva ku lunaku lwe baakizimba n'okutuusa ku lwa leero, kinnyiiza n'okunsunguwaza, kyennaava nkiggya mu maaso gange," 
Jeremiah32:32 olw'okubeera obugwenyufu bwonna abantu ba Yisirayeli n'aba Yuda bwe baakola okunnyiiza, bo ne bakabaka baabwe, abakungu, bakabona n'abalanzi baabwe, abasajja ba Yuda n'abantu ba Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Bankuba amabega tebantunuulira newandibadde nga nabayigirizanga buli olukedde; tebawuliranga basobole okugunjulwa. 
Jeremiah32:34 Bassa ebyenyinyalwa byabwe mu Kiggwa okuli erinnya lyange ne balyonoona. 
Jeremiah32:35 Baazimbira Baali ebifo ebigulumivu mu Kiwonvu Beni-Yinnomu bawongerere eyo Moleki batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe mu muliro, nze kye sibalagiranga, era ekitanzijanga mu birowoozo okukola ekyenyinyalwa ekyo, baleetere Yuda okugwa mu kibi." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Kale nno Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba ekibuga kino mmwe kye mugamba nti olw'okubeera ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli kya kuweebwayo mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni:" 
Jeremiah32:37 ŋŋenda kubakuŋŋaanyaayo eyo mu nsi zonna gye nabagobera olw'obusungu n'obuswandi bwange obungi; ŋŋenda kubazza mu kifo kino, era mbatuuze ntende." 
Jeremiah32:38 Olwo balibeera bantu bange, nange ndibeera Katonda waabwe." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndibawa omutima gumu, n'ekkubo limu, bantye ennaku zonna, balyoke babeere bulungi, bo n'abaana baabwe abalibaddirira." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndikola nabo endagaano ey'olubeerera; sirirekayo kubakolera bulungi; era mu mutima gwabwe ndibateekamu okuntya baleme kuddayo kunneebengulako. 
Jeremiah32:41 Nnaasanyukiranga mu kubakolera obulungi, era ndibasimbira ddala mu nsi muno n'omutima gwange gwonna n'omwoyo gwange gwonna." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Omukama kino ky'agamba: Nga bwe naleetera abantu bano akabi akanene, bwe ntyo era bwe ndibawa ebirungi byonna bye nabagamba." 
Jeremiah32:43 Ennimiro zijja kuddamu okugulibwa mu nsi eno mmwe gye mugamba nti matongo, temuli muntu yadde ekisolo, eweereddwa mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya." 
Jeremiah32:44 Ennimiro zijja kugulibwa ne ffeeza, n'endagaano zissibweko emikono, zisibibwe, n'abajulirwa bassibwewo mu nsi ya Benyamiini ne mu byalo okwetooloola Yeruzaalemu, mu bibuga bya Yuda ne mu bibuga eby'omu nsozi ne mu Sefela, ne mu bibuga ebiri mu Negevu, kubanga nzija kuzza abasibe, Omukama y'agamba.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Yeremiya yali akyassiddwako ekkomo, mu luggya lw'abakuumi, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kimujjira omulundi ogwokubiri nti:" 
Jeremiah33:2 “Omukama kino ky'agamba, Omukama eyakola ensi, eyagitetenkanya n'agissaawo, Omukama lye linnya lye, nti:" 
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Nkoowoola, nzija kukwanukula; nzija kukubuulira ebintu ebikulu, ebikusike, by'otomanyiiko.’" 
Jeremiah33:4 Kubanga Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba ku nnyumba ez'omu kibuga kino, ne ku mbiri za kabaka wa Yuda ezaamenyebwa olw'okwetaasa embibiro z'okuzingiza n'ekitala" 
Jeremiah33:5 mu kulwanyisa Abakaludeya, nti: ‘Zinajjula emirambo gy'abantu be natta mu busungu bwange ne mu buswandi. Nzija kuggya amaaso gange ku kibuga kino, olw'obugwenyufu bwabwe bwonna." 
Jeremiah33:6 Naye nzija kukiwonya nkissuuse. Nzija kubawonya, mbooleke eddembe n'obutebenkevu eby'ekitalo." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndikomyawo abasibe ba Yuda n'aba Yisirayeli; ndibazimba buggya nga bwe baali mu kusooka. 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndibatukuza ne baggwaako ebibi byabwe byonna bye baayonoonamu gye ndi; ndibaddiramu ebibi byabwe byonna eby'okunjeemera. 
Jeremiah33:9 Olwo ekibuga kino kirimpeesa erinnya, ne kindeetera essanyu, ettendo n'ekitiibwa mu maaso g'amawanga gonna ag'ensi agaliba gawulidde ebirungi byonna bye nkikolera. Balitya ne bakankana olw'ebirungi enkumu n'eddembe bye ndikikolera.’" 
Jeremiah33:10 “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Mwogera ku kifo kino nti: “Matongo masa, temuli muntu yadde ekisolo,” naye mu bibuga bya Yuda ne mu mpya za Yeruzaalemu, ebiri amatongo, omutali yadde omuntu oba ekisolo, muliddamu okuwulirwa" 
Jeremiah33:11 eddoboozi ery'essanyu n'ery'okujaguza, eddoboozi ly'awasa n'ery'omugole n'amaloboozi g'abo abaleeta mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama ebitambiro eby'okwebaza nga bayimba nti: “ ‘ “Mwebaze Omukama w'Amagye, kubanga Omukama mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” Kubanga nzija kuzza abasibe b'ensi eno nga bwe baali mu kusooka.’ Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah33:12 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: ‘Mu kifo kino amatongo, omutali muntu yadde ekisolo, ne mu bibuga bino byonna, mujja kuddamu okubeeramu amalundiro abasumba mwe banaawummulizanga endiga." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mu bibuga eby'omu nsozi ne mu bibuga by'omu Sefela, mu bibuga by'omu Negevu, ne mu nsi ya Benyamiini, mu byalo ebyetoolodde Yeruzaalemu ne mu bibuga bya Yuda, amagana galiyitanga wansi w'omukono gw'oyo agabala,’ Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah33:14 ‘Ebbanga lijja,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘lwe ndituukiriza ekigambo ekirungi kye nayogera eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli n'eri ennyumba ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 “ ‘Mu nnaku ezo ne mu bbanga eryo, ndisibusiza Dawudi Ettabi ettuukirivu, erikola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu mu nsi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Mu bbanga eryo Yuda alirokolebwa, ne Yeruzaalemu alituulanga ntende. Lino lye linnya lye balikiyita: 'Mukama bwe Butuukirivu bwaffe'.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 “Kubanga Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Dawudi talibulwa muntu atuula ku nnamulondo ya nnyumba ya Yisirayeli; 
Jeremiah33:18 era mu bakabona Abaleevi temulibula musajja ayimirira mu maaso gange kuweereza bitambiro ebyokye, okwokya ebitone eby'obuwunga n'okuweereza ebitambiro bulijjo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja eri Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah33:20 “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Oba osobola okumenya endagaano yange gye nalagaana n'olunaku, n'endagaano gye nalagaana n'ekiro, emisana n'ekiro ne bitatuukira mu budde bwabwo bukakafu," 
Jeremiah33:21 olwo endagaano yange ne Dawudi omuweereza wange eriyinza okumenyebwa ne wataba mwana addamu kutuula ku nnamulondo ye; kye kimu n'endagaano ne bakabona Abaleevi, abaweereza bange." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ng'emmunyeenye ez'eggulu bwe zitasoboka kubalika, n'omusenyu gw'ennyanja bwe gutayinza kupimika, bwe ntyo bwe ndyaza ezzadde lya Dawudi omuweereza wange n'Abaleevi abaweereza bange.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja eri Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah33:24 “Tolabye bantu bano kye bagamba nti: ‘Ennyumba zombi Omukama ze yali alonze azisudde’? Bwe batyo bagaya abantu bange, tebakyabamanyi ng'eggwanga." 
Jeremiah33:25 Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Obanga mazima saakola ndagaano na misana na kiro, nga n'olubaale n'ensi sibiwanga mateeka," 
Jeremiah33:26 olwo kale ndisuula abantu ba Yakobo n'aba Dawudi omuweereza wange, era sirironda n'omu ku bazzukulu be kufuga zzadde lya Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo. Kubanga ndikomyawo abasibe baabwe era ndibagirira ekisa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Mu bbanga Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, eggye lye lyonna, bakabaka bonna ab'oku nsi be yali afuga n'abantu bonna we baali balumbidde Yeruzaalemu n'ebibuga byonna ebikyetoolodde, ekigambo kino kyava ew'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya nga kigamba nti:" 
Jeremiah34:2 “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Genda ewa Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, omugambe nti: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Ekibuga kino nzija kukiwaayo mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni, akyokye omuliro." 
Jeremiah34:3 Togenda kumusumattuka mu ngalo ze, olikwatibwa n'oweebwayo mu mikono gye. Kabaka w'e Babiloni olimulabira ddala n'amaaso go n'ayogera naawe maaso ku maaso. Ojja kugenda e Babiloni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Kyokka, ggwe Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, wulira ekigambo ky'Omukama: Omukama kino ky'akugamba: togenda kuttibwa kitala." 
Jeremiah34:5 Ogenda kufa mu ddembe. Ng'abantu bwe baakumira bajjajjaabo ekkoomi, abo bakabaka ab'edda abaakukulembera, bwe balirikukumira, ne bakukungubagira nga bagamba nti: “Kitalo, mukama waffe!” Nze kennyini nze njogedde, Omukama y'agamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Ne Yeremiya omulanzi n'atuusa ebigambo byonna ku Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, e Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah34:7 Olwo nno eggye lya kabaka w'e Babiloni lyali lirwanyisa Yeruzaalemu n'ebibuga bya Yuda ebyali bikyanywedde, bye bi-Lakisi ne Azeka, anti bino bye byali ebibuga bya Yuda okuli ebigo ebyali bikyasigaddewo." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja eri Yeremiya nga kabaka Zedekiya amaze okukkaanya n'abantu bonna ab'omu Yeruzaalemu okulangirira okuteebwa mu buddu. 
Jeremiah34:9 Buli omu yali wa kuta omuddu we Omwebureeyi oba omuzaana we Omwebureeyi, nga tewakyali n'omu kukozesa Muyudaaya munne ng'omuddu." 
Jeremiah34:10 Abakungu bonna n'abantu bonna abaali bakoze endagaano ne bateesa okuta abaddu baabwe n'abazaana n'obutaddayo kubakozesa nga baddu; bakkiriza ne babata. 
Jeremiah34:11 Naye oluvannyuma beekyusa ne bakomyaawo abaddu n'abazaana be baali batadde, ne baddamu okubakozesa ng'abaddu n'abazaana." 
Jeremiah34:12 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah34:13 “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba nti: Bajjajjammwe, bwe nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri gye baali mu buddu, nakola nabo endagaano, ne ŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Omwaka ogwomusanvu nga guweddeko, buli omu mu mmwe anaatanga muganda we Omwebureeyi eyakweguza. Ng'amaze okumuweereza emyaka mukaaga, anaamutanga n'agenda.’ Naye bajjajjammwe tebampulira, era tebanfaako." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ennaku zino mwenenya ne mukola ekituufu mu maaso gange bwe mwalangirira okuta baganda bammwe, ne mukola n'endagaano mu maaso gange, mu nnyumba okuli erinnya lyange." 
Jeremiah34:16 Naye ate kati mwekyusizza ne mwonoona erinnya lyange buli omu bw'azzizza omuddu we oba omuzaana we be mwali mutadde bagende gye baagala; mubawalirizza okubeera abaddu bammwe n'abazaana bammwe nate. 
Jeremiah34:17 “N'olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba: Mwagaana okumpulira, mwagaana okuta bannansi bannammwe. Kale nze mbalangiriridde okuteebwa, okuteebwa okw'okufa ekitala, kawumpuli n'enjala; nzija kubafuula ekyesisiwaza eri buli bwakabaka obw'oku nsi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Abasajja abo abaamenye endagaano yange, ne batakuuma bigambo bya ndagaano gye bakkaanyaako mu maaso gange, ndibafuula ng'akayana ke balyebulamu ne bayita wakati w'ebiwayi byako." 
Jeremiah34:19 Abakulu ba Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu, abakungu, bakabona n'abantu bonna mu ggwanga abaayita wakati w'ebiwayi by'akayana," 
Jeremiah34:20 nzija kubawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe, ne mu gy'abo abanoonya obulamu bwabwe. Emirambo gyabwe girifuuka mmere ya binyonyi eby'omu bbanga n'ebisolo eby'oku nsi." 
Jeremiah34:21 Ne Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda n'abakungu be nabo ndibawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe ne mu gy'abo abanoonya obulamu bwabwe, ne mu gy'eggye ly'e Babiloni abaakabavaako kati." 
Jeremiah34:22 Nzija kuwa ekiragiro, Omukama y'agamba, mbakomyewo mu kibuga kino. Bajja kukirwanyisa, bakiwambe, bakyokye omuliro. Ebibuga bya Yuda ŋŋenda kubifuula matongo nga tewakyali abisulamu.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Ekigambo kyajja eri Yeremiya okuva ew'Omukama, mu mirembe gya Yoyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya kabaka wa Yuda, nga kigamba nti:" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Genda eri ab'ennyumba y'Abarekabu, obayite bajje, obayingize mu kisenge ekimu mu nnyumba y'Omukama, obawe omwenge banywe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Awo ne nzirira Yaazaniya mutabani wa Yeremiya mutabani wa Kabazziniya, wamu ne baganda be n'abaana be bonna, be b'ennyumba yonna ey'Abarekabu;" 
Jeremiah35:4 ne mbayingiza mu nnyumba y'Omukama, mu kisenge kya batabani ba Kanani mutabani wa Yigudaliya, omuntu wa Katonda. Kyali kiriraanye ekisenge ky'abakungu, ekyali waggulu w'ekyo ekya Maaseeya, mutabani wa Sallumu, omukuumi w'oku mulyango." 
Jeremiah35:5 Awo ne ndeeta ebibya ebijjudde evviini n'ebikopo, ne mbissa mu maaso g'ab'ennyumba y'Abarekabu, ne mbagamba nti: “Munywe omwenge.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Bo ne baddamu nti: “Tetujja kunywa mwenge: kubanga jjajjaffe Yonadabu mutabani wa Rekabu yatukomereza nti: ‘Temunywanga omwenge emirembe gyonna, mmwe newandibadde batabani bammwe." 
Jeremiah35:7 Era temuzimbanga amayumba, yadde okusiga oba okusimba emizabbibu; temubeeranga nabyo; naye munaasulanga mu weema obulamu bwammwe bwonna. Olwo muliwangaala ebbanga ggwanvu mu nsi mwe mubungeetera.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Twagondera bulungi buli ekiri mu kiragiro kya jjajjaffe Yonadabu mutabani wa Rekabu, ffe, bakazi baffe, batabani baffe ne bawala baffe tetunywera ddala ku mwenge n'akamu." 
Jeremiah35:9 Tetwezimbira nnyumba za kusulamu, yadde okuba n'emizabbibu yadde ennimiro era tetusiga." 
Jeremiah35:10 Tusula mu weema, era tukuumye bulungi ekiragiro kya jjajjaffe Yonadabu." 
Jeremiah35:11 Naye Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni bwe yalumba ensi eno, ffe kwe kugamba nti: ‘Mugire tugende e Yeruzaalemu, tusobola okuwona eggye ly'Abakaludeya n'ery'Abaaramu,’ bwe tutyo ne tusigala mu Yeruzaalemu.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah35:13 “Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Genda ogambe abantu ba Yuda n'abasula mu Yeruzaalemu nti: ‘Temuliyiga ne mukwata ebigambo byange?’ Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah35:14 ‘Ekiragiro kya Yonadabu mutabani wa Rekabu, bwe yagaana abaana be okunywa omwenge kyakuumibwa. N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero tebanywa mwenge olw'okugondera ekiragiro kya jjajjaabwe. Sso nze njogedde nammwe buli olukedde, naye temumpuliriza." 
Jeremiah35:15 Nabatumira buli olukedde abaweereza bange abalanzi, ne babagambanga nti: “Buli omu aleke ekkubo lye ebbi, mutereeze ebikolwa byammwe; temugoberera balubaale na kubaweereza. Olwo mulisobola okusigala mu nsi gye nabawa, mmwe ne bajjajjammwe.” Naye temwampuliriza, temwanfaako." 
Jeremiah35:16 Bazzukulu ba Yonadabu mutabani wa Rekabu bakuumye ekiragiro kya jjajjaabwe kye yabawa, naye abantu bano tebampulidde." 
Jeremiah35:17 N'olw'ekyo, Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: ŋŋenda kusombera ku Yuda ne ku bantu bonna ab'omu Yeruzaalemu buli kabi ke nabawerera, kubanga nabagambanga naye nga tebampulira; nabayita, tebannyanukula.’ ”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Awo Yeremiya n'agamba ab'ennyumba y'Abarekabu nti: “Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Kubanga mwawulira ekiragiro kya jjajjammwe Yonadabu, ne mukwata byonna bye yayogera, ne mutuukiriza byonna bye yakuutira," 
Jeremiah35:19 kale n'Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: Yonadabu mutabani wa Rekabu tagenda kubulwa musajja ennaku zonna alimuweereza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna ogwa Yoyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya kabaka wa Yuda, ekigambo kyajja eri Yeremiya nga kiva ew'Omukama nti:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Kwata omuzingo gw'ekitabo, owandiike ebigambo byonna bye nakubuulira ku Yisirayeli, ku Yuda ne ku mawanga gonna, okuva ku lunaku lwe natandikirako okwogera naawe mu mirembe gya Yosiya n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Jeremiah36:3 Mpozzi ennyumba ya Yuda, bwe banaawulira buli kabi ke nteesa okubakola, buli omu anaakyuka n'ava mu kkubo ebbi; olwo nzija kubasonyiwa emisango gyabwe n'ebibi byabwe.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Yeremiya n'ayita Baruku, mutabani wa Neriya; Yeremiya bwe yalinga ayogera ebigambo Omukama bye yali amugambye, eno nga Baruku abiwandiika ku muzingo gw'ekitabo." 
Jeremiah36:5 Awo Yeremiya n'agamba Baruku nti: “Nze nkyassiddwako ekkomo, sisobola kugenda ku nnyumba ya Mukama." 
Jeremiah36:6 Ggwe gendayo ku lunaku olw'okusiiba, awo abantu nga bawulira, obasomere ng'oggya ku muzingo ebigambo by'Omukama by'owandiise eno bwe mbadde nga njogera. Bisomere abantu ba Yuda yenna abavudde mu bibuga byabwe." 
Jeremiah36:7 Oboolyawo okuwanjaga kwabwe kunaatuuka ew'Omukama, buli omu n'aleka empisa ze embi, anti obusungu n'obuswandi eby'Omukama by'ayogeredde abantu bano binene.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Baruku mutabani wa Neriya n'atuukiriza byonna omulanzi Yeremiya bye yamulagira, n'asoma mu kitabo ebigambo bya Yeremiya ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah36:9 Mu mwaka ogwokutaano ogwa Yoyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya kabaka wa Yuda, mu mwezi ogwomwenda, abantu bonna mu Yeruzaalemu n'abalala bonna abaali bazze mu Yeruzaalemu nga bava mu bibuga bya Yuda, baalangirira ekisiibo mu maaso g'Omukama." 
Jeremiah36:10 Baruku n'asoma mu kitabo ebigambo bya Yeremiya ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama, abantu bonna nga bawulira, ng'asinziira mu kisenge kya Gemariya mutabani wa Safani omuwandiisi, mu luggya olw'engulu ku muzigo gw'Omulyango Omuggya ogw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah36:11 Naye Mikaaya mutabani wa Gemariya, mutabani wa Safani, bwe yawulira ebigambo by'Omukama byonna okuva mu kitabo," 
Jeremiah36:12 n'aserengeta mu lubiri lwa kabaka n'agenda mu kisenge ky'omuwandiisi. Abakungu bonna baali batudde omwo: Elisama omuwandiisi, Delaaya mutabani wa Semaaya, Elunatani mutabani wa Akubori, Gemariya mutabani wa Safani, Zedekiya mutabani wa Ananiya n'abakungu abalala bonna." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaaya n'ababuulira ebigambo byonna bye yali awulidde nga Baruku asomera abantu mu kitabo. 
Jeremiah36:14 Abakungu bonna wamu ne batuma Yudi mutabani wa Nataniya, mutabani wa Selemiya, mutabani wa Kuusi, ewa Baruku okumugamba nti: “Omuzingo ogwo gw'osomedde abantu gukwate, ojje.” Ne Baruku mutabani wa Neriya n'akwata omuzingo, n'ajja gye bali." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ne bamugamba nti: “Tuula, obitusomere nga tuwulira.” Ne Baruku n'abibasomera nga bawulira." 
Jeremiah36:16 Bwe baawulira ebigambo bino byonna, ne batya, buli omu n'atunula ku munne, ne bagamba nti: “Tuteekwa bino byonna okubibuulira ku kabaka.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Ne babuuza Baruku nti: “Tutegeeze, ebigambo bino byonna wabiwandiika otya? Byava mu kamwa ke?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku n'abaddamu nti: “Ebigambo bino yabiŋŋamba nze eno nga mbiwandiika ne bwino mu kitabo.” 
Jeremiah36:19 Awo abakungu ne bagamba Baruku nti: “Ggwe ne Yeremiya mugende mwekweke wabulewo amanya gye muli.” 
Jeremiah36:20 Nga bamaze okutereka omuzingo mu kisenge kya Elisama omuwandiisi, baagenda ewa kabaka, mu luggya lw'olubiri lwa kabaka ne bategeeza kabaka ebyo byonna ye ng'awuliriza." 
Jeremiah36:21 Kabaka n'atuma Yudi anone omuzingo, ne Yudi n'aguleeta okuva mu kisenge kya Elisama omuwandiisi, n'agusomera kabaka ng'eno n'abakungu bamuyimiridde ku lusegere." 
Jeremiah36:22 Gwali mwezi gwa mwenda, Kabaka yali mu lubiri lwe olw'obudde obw'empewo, n'omuliro nga gwaka mu kyoto awo mu maaso ge." 
Jeremiah36:23 Yudi buli lwe yamalanga okusomako ebitundu bisatu oba bina, nga kabaka abisalako n'akambe k'omuwandiisi ng'abisuula mu muliro mu kyoto, okutuusa omuzingo gwonna lwe gwasirikkira mu muliro ogwali mu kyoto." 
Jeremiah36:24 Kyokka kabaka, yadde abaweereza be, tekwali n'omu yeekanga ng'awulidde ebigambo ebyo, yadde okuyuza ebyambalo bye." 
Jeremiah36:25 Sso nno Elunatani, Delaaya ne Gemariya beegayirira kabaka aleme kwokya muzingo, naye teyabawuliriza." 
Jeremiah36:26 Wabula kabaka yalagira omulangira Yerukumeeli mutabani wa kabaka, Seraaya mutabani wa Azuryeli, ne Selemiya mutabani wa Abudeeli, bakwate Baruku omuwandiisi ne Yeremiya omulanzi. Kyokka Omukama yali abakwese." 
Jeremiah36:27 Kabaka bwe yamala okwokya omuzingo gw'ebigambo Baruku bye yali awandiise nga Yeremiya abyogera, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya nti:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Kwata omuzingo omulala, owandiikeko ebigambo byonna, ebyali ku muzingo omubereberye Yoyakimu kabaka wa Yuda gwe yayokya." 
Jeremiah36:29 Ate gamba Yoyakimu kabaka wa Yuda nti: ‘Oyokezza omuzingo guno ng'ogamba nti: “Lwaki owandiiseeko nti kabaka w'e Babiloni alijja n'azikiriza ensi eno, n'amaliramu ddala abantu n'ensolo?”" 
Jeremiah36:30 N'olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba ku Yoyakimu kabaka wa Yuda: Mu ye temuliva alituula ku nnamulondo ya Dawudi; ate omulambo gwe gulikasukirwa ebweru omusana emisana n'obutiti ekiro. 
Jeremiah36:31 Ŋŋenda kubabonereza, ye, ezzadde lye n'abaweereza be, olw'ensobi zaabwe; nzija kubaleetera, bo, abantu abasula mu Yeruzaalemu n'abantu ba Yuda, buli kabi ke nabawerera kubanga tebawulira.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Awo Yeremiya n'akwata omuzingo omulala, n'agukwasa Baruku omuwandiisi mutabani wa Neriya, ye n'awandiikako eno nga Yeremiya amugamba ebigambo byonna eby'omu kitabo Yoyakimu kabaka wa Yuda kye yali ayokezza. N'ebigambo ebirala bingi ebifaanana nga biri byayongerwako." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zedekiya mutabani wa Yosiya, yasikira Koniya mutabani wa Yoyakimu; Nebukadurezzari ye yamusikiza ku bwakabaka bwa Yuda." 
Jeremiah37:2 Naye ye, abakungu be, yadde abantu b'omu nsi tewaali yassa mwoyo ku bigambo Omukama bye yayogerera mu muweereza we Yeremiya omulanzi." 
Jeremiah37:3 Kabaka Zedekiya n'atuma Yukali mutabani wa Selemiya ne kabona Zefaniya mutabani wa Maaseeya eri Yeremiya omulanzi bamugambe nti: “Tukwegayiridde tusabire ew'Omukama Katonda waffe.” 
Jeremiah37:4 Mu bbanga eryo Yeremiya yasobolanga okugendanga mu bantu n'okudda mu ddembe; baali tebannamussa mu kkomera. 
Jeremiah37:5 Eggye lya Faraawo lyali lisitudde okuva mu Misiri; Abakaludeya abaali bazinze Yeruzaalemu olwakiwulira, ne bagumbulukuka ku Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah37:6 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya omulanzi, nga kigamba nti:" 
Jeremiah37:7 “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Kabaka wa Yuda akutumye gye ndi okunneebuuzaako mugambe nti: ‘Eggye lya Faraawo eribadde lijja okubayamba, lijja kuddayo mu nsi yaalyo Misiri." 
Jeremiah37:8 Ate olwo Abakaludeya bagenda kukomawo, balumbe ekibuga kino, bakiwangule era bakiteekere omuliro.’" 
Jeremiah37:9 Omukama kino ky'agamba: Muleke kwerimba nga mugamba nti: ‘Abakaludeya bagenda kutuviirako ddala.’ Bwereere, si ba kuddayo." 
Jeremiah37:10 Ne bwe mwandibadde nga muvunjaze Abakaludeya bonna ababalwanyisa, abaafumitibwa bokka abasigaddewo, bandisituse buli kinnoomu okuva mu weema zaabwe ne bookya ekibuga kino.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Eggye ly'Abakaludeya bwe lyamala okugumbulukuka e Yeruzaalemu olw'okutya eggye lya Faraawo," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremiya n'asituka okuva mu Yeruzaalemu agende mu nsi ya Benyamiini agabane ekitundu kye mu bantu baayo. 
Jeremiah37:13 Naye bwe yatuuka ku mulyango gwa Benyamiini, omukulu w'abakuumi ayitibwa Yiriya mutabani wa Selemiya, mutabani wa Ananiya, n'akwata Yeremiya omulanzi nga bw'agamba nti: “Oddukira mu Bakaludeya.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya n'addamu nti “Si kituufu. Siddukira mu Bakaludeya.” Naye Yiriya teyawuliriza, yakwata bukwasi Yeremiya n'amutwala eri abakungu." 
Jeremiah37:15 Ne basunguwalira Yeremiya, ne bamukuba, ne bamussa mu kkomera, mu nnyumba ya Yonatani omuwandiisi, kubanga eyo gye baali bafudde ekkomera." 
Jeremiah37:16 Yeremiya bw'atyo n'asuulibwa mu bunnya obw'obuduukulu. Yamalamu ebbanga ggwanvu. 
Jeremiah37:17 Oluvannyuma kabaka Zedekiya yamutumya n'amuleeta ewuwe mu lubiri, n'amubuuza mu kyama nti: “Waliwo ekigambo kyonna okuva ew'Omukama?” Yeremiya n'addamu nti: “Weekiri.” Ate era n'ayongerako nti: “Ogenda kuweebwayo mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Awo Yeremiya n'abuuza kabaka Zedekiya nti: “Nabakola kabi ki ggwe n'abaweereza bo, oba abantu bano, mulyoke munsuule mu kkomera?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Kati abalanzi bammwe bali ludda wa abaabagambanga nti: ‘Kabaka w'e Babiloni tagenda kujja kubalumba, yadde okulumba ensi eno’?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Kaakano, Mukama wange kabaka, kkiriza owulirize, kkiriza okuwanjaga kwange, tonsindika nate mu nnyumba ya Yonatani omuwandiisi, sikulwa nga nfiirayo.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Awo kabaka Zedekiya n'alagira okuteeka Yeremiya mu luggya lw'abakuumi, n'okumuleeteranga buli lunaku omugaati omuvumbike ogw'oluwewere nga guva mu kyalo ky'abafumbiro, okutuusa ng'emmere ebulidde ddala mu kibuga. Yeremiya bw'atyo n'asigala mu luggya lw'abakuumi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Naye Sefatiya mutabani wa Mattani ne Gedaliya mutabani wa Pasukuru, ne Yukali mutabani wa Selemiya, ne Pasukuru mutabani wa Malukiya, ne bawulira ebigambo Yeremiya bye yabuulira abantu bonna ng'agamba nti:" 
Jeremiah38:2 “Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Buli alisigala mu kibuga kino, alifa ekitala, enjala oba kawumpuli. Naye buli alikifuluma ne yeewaayo mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya ababazinze, alisumattukayo nga mulamu; aliba mulamu." 
Jeremiah38:3 Omukama kino ky'agamba: Tewali kubuusabuusa, ekibuga kino kigenda kuweebwayo mu mikono gy'eggye lya kabaka w'e Babiloni; alikiwamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Abakungu ne bagamba kabaka nti: “Omuntu ono attibwe. Aterebula buterebuzi batabaazi abaasigala mu kibuga kino n'abantu bonna awamu ng'ababuulira ebifaanana bityo. Ekituufu omusajja ono takolerera bulungi bwa bantu bano, wabula kabi.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Kabaka Zedekiya n'abaddamu nti: “Wuuyo, ali mu mikono gyammwe; kabaka talina ky'ayinza kukola kubaziyiza.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Awo ne bakwata Yeremiya, ne bamusuula mu luzzi lwa Malukiya mutabani wa kabaka olwali mu luggya lw'abakuumi ne bamukkiriza mu luzzi n'emiguwa; mu luzzi temwali mazzi wabula ettosi, Yeremiya n'akkirira bw'atyo mu ttosi." 
Jeremiah38:7 Naye Ebedi-Meleki Omukuusi, omulaawo, eyali mu lubiri lwa kabaka, n'awulira bwe basudde Yeremiya mu luzzi. Kabaka yali atudde mu mulyango gwa Benyamiini." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi-Meleki n'afuluma okuva mu lubiri lwa kabaka, n'agamba kabaka nti:" 
Jeremiah38:9 “Mukama wange, kabaka, abasajja abo bakoze bya mbyone mu byonna bye bakoze Yeremiya omulanzi; bamusudde mu luzzi; ajja kufiira omwo enjala kubanga mu kibuga temukyali mmere.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Awo kabaka n'alagira Ebedi-Meleki Omukuusi nti: “Laba wano abasajja amakumi asatu, oggye Yeremiya omulanzi mu luzzi nga tannafa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedi-Meleki n'atwala abasajja abo, n'ayingira mu nnyumba ya kabaka wansi mu ggwanika, n'aggyamu ebiziina n'ebigoye ebikadde, n'abisuulira Yeremiya mu luzzi ku miguwa." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi-Meleki Omukuusi n'agamba Yeremiya nti: “Ebiziina ebyo n'ebigoye ebikadde biteeke mu nkwawa weyambikireko omuguwa.” Ne Yeremiya bwe yakola. 
Jeremiah38:13 Awo ne basikayo Yeremiya n'emiguwa, ne bamuggya mu luzzi. Yeremiya n'asigala mu luggya lw'abakuumi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Kabaka Zedekiya yatumya Yeremiya omulanzi, n'agamba atwalibwe ku mulyango ogwokusatu ogw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. Kabaka n'agamba Yeremiya nti: “Nnina kye nkubuuza. Tonkisa kantu.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya n'agamba Zedekiya nti: “Bwe nnaakikubuulira, tonzite? Wuuno ne bwe nandikuwadde amagezi, tewandimpulirizza.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Kabaka Zedekiya n'alayirira Yeremiya mu kyama nti: “Mazima Omukama nga mulamu, eyatuwa omwoyo, sijja kukutta, era sijja kukuwa mu mikono gya basajja bano abanoonya obulamu bwo.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Awo Yeremiya kwe kugamba Zedekiya nti: “Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: Bw'onoofuluma ne weewaayo eri abagabe ba kabaka w'e Babiloni, obulamu bwo bujja kuwona n'ekibuga kino tekigenda kuteekerwa muliro; ggwe n'ab'omu maka go mujja kulama." 
Jeremiah38:18 Naye bw'otokkirize kwewaayo eri bagabe ba kabaka w'e Babiloni, ekibuga kino kijja kuweebwa mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya bakiteekere omuliro, ate naawe togenda kubasumattuka.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Awo kabaka Zedekiya n'agamba Yeremiya nti: “Ntya Abayudaaya abeegatta ku Bakaludeya, kubanga Abakaludeya bayinza okumpaayo mu mikono gyabwe ne banjolonga.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya n'addamu nti: “Tebagenda kukuwaayo. Nkwegayiridde, wuliriza eddoboozi ly'Omukama, okole kye nkugamba, olwo onooba bulungi, obulamu bwo bujja kuwona." 
Jeremiah38:21 Naye bw'onogaana okwewaayo, kino kye kigambo Omukama ky'andaze:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Laba, abakazi bonna abaali basigadde mu lubiri lwa kabaka wa Yuda, baabo bafulumizibwa nga batwalibwa eri abagabe ba kabaka w'e Babiloni; baagenda bayimba nti: “ ‘Baakusendasenda ne bakuwangula abo mikwano gyo be weesiga; ebigere byo bitubidde mu ttosi, mikwano gyo bakwabulidde.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 Bakazi bo bonna n'abaana bagenda kufulumizibwa batwalirwe Abakaludeya; naawe tolibasumattuka, wabula oliwambibwa kabaka w'e Babiloni n'ekibuga kino ne kyokebwa omuliro.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Zedekiya n'agamba Yeremiya nti: “Tewaba n'omu amanya ku bigambo bino, sikulwa ng'ofa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Abakungu bwe banaawulira nga njogedde naawe, ne bajja bakugamba nti: ‘Tubuulire bye wagambye kabaka naawe kabaka bye yakugambye; tobitukisa oba si ekyo tukutta,’" 
Jeremiah38:26 obaddamu nti: ‘Nabadde mpanjagira kabaka butanziza wa Yonatani kufiira eyo.’ ” 
Jeremiah38:27 N'abakungu tebaalwa, ne bajja bonna eri Yeremiya, ne bamubuuza. Yabaddamu kimu ddala nga kabaka bwe yali amulagidde; nabo ne bamuvaako, kubanga tewaali awulidde mboozi ye na kabaka." 
Jeremiah38:28 Yeremiya n'asigala mu luggya lw'abakuumi okutuusa ku lunaku Yeruzaalemu lwe kyawambibwa. Yeruzaalemu bwe kiti bwe kyawambibwa: 
Jeremiah39:1 Mu mwaka ogwomwenda ogwa Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi, Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni n'eggye lye lyonna baalumba Yeruzaalemu ne bakizinda." 
Jeremiah39:2 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu ogwa Zedekiya, mu mwezi ogwokuna, ng'ennaku ttaano, ekisenge ky'ekibuga ne bakibomola." 
Jeremiah39:3 Abakungu ba kabaka w'e Babiloni bonna ne bajja ne batuula ku Mulyango gwa Wakati: Nerugali-Sarezeri, Samugari-Nebo, Serusekimu omukungu omukulu, Nerugali-Sarezeri akulira abalaguzi n'abakungu abalala bonna aba kabaka w'e Babiloni." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda n'abatabaazi be bonna bwe baalaba, ne badduka. Ekibuga baakifuluma kiro nga bayitira mu nnimiro ya kabaka ne mu mulyango oguli wakati w'ebisenge ebibiri, ne bakwata ekkubo eriraga mu Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Naye eggye ly'Abakaludeya ne libawondera, ne likwatira Zedekiya mu lusenyi lwa Yeriko, ne bamuwamba, ne bamutwala ewa Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni e Ribula mu nsi ya Kamati, n'amusalira omusango." 
Jeremiah39:6 Eyo e Ribula kabaka w'e Babiloni gye yasanjagira batabani ba Zedekiya awo mu maaso ge; kabaka w'e Babiloni n'atta n'abakungu ba Yuda bonna. 
Jeremiah39:7 Amaaso ga Zedekiya n'agatungulamu, n'amusiba n'enjegere ez'ekikomo okumutwala e Babiloni." 
Jeremiah39:8 Abakaludeya ne bookya olubiri lwa kabaka n'amayumba g'abantu abalala, ne bamenya bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Awo Nabuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka n'atwala e Babiloni abantu bonna abaali basigadde mu kibuga n'abo abaali bamwegasseeko n'abantu abalala. 
Jeremiah39:10 Naye Nabuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka abantu abanaku abaali batalina kantu yabaleka mu nsi ya Yuda; ku olwo n'abagabira ennimiro z'emizabbibu n'ennimiro endala. 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni yali alagidde bw'ati Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ku Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah39:12 “Mutwale, omulabirire, tomukola kabi; muyise nga ye bw'aba akusabye.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Awo Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka, Nebusazibani omugabe omukulu, Nerugali-Sarezeri akulira abalaguzi n'abakungu bonna aba kabaka w'e Babiloni," 
Jeremiah39:14 ne batumya okuggya Yeremiya mu luggya lw'abakuumi, ne bamukwasa Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu mutabani wa Safani, amuzzeeyo eka ewuwe. Bw'atyo n'asigala mu bantu be." 
Jeremiah39:15 Yeremiya bwe yali ng'akyassiddwako ekkomo mu luggya lw'abakuumi, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja gy'ali nga kigamba nti:" 
Jeremiah39:16 “Genda obuulire Ebedi-Meleki Omukuusi nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: Ŋŋenda okutuukiriza ebigambo byange ku kibuga kino olw'akabi, sso si olw'obulungi. Ku olwo bigenda kutuukirira mu maaso go, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah39:17 Naye ŋŋenda kukuwonya ku olwo, togenda kugwa mu mikono gy'abantu naawe b'otya." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ŋŋenda kukuwonya; togenda kufa kitala, wabula olisumattuka ng'oli mulamu, kubanga wanneesiga, Omukama y'agamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Ekigambo ne kiva ew'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya oluvannyuma lwa Nabuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi okumuteera e Rama, gye yamusanga nga musibe mu njegere mu bantu bonna abaali bawaŋŋangusiriziddwa e Babiloni okuva mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu Yuda." 
Jeremiah40:2 Awo omukulu w'abakuumi n'akwata Yeremiya n'amugamba nti: “Omukama Katonda wo yalangirira ekifo kino akabenje kano. 
Jeremiah40:3 Kati akaleese nga bwe yali agambye okukola. Ebyayogerwa bino kyebyava bibatuukirira, kubanga Omukama mwamusobya, mwagaana okuwulira eddoboozi lye." 
Jeremiah40:4 Laba nno, olwa leero nkusumuludde enjegere ezikubadde ku mikono; bw'oba oyagala jjangu tugende e Babiloni; nzija kukulabirira. Bw'oba nga tokisiimye, tojja nange; laba, ensi yonna yiiyo ekuli awo mu maaso, laga yonna gy'olaba nga ye walungi oba awatuufu okulaga.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Naye Yeremiya aba tannakyusa kuddayo, n'amugamba nti: “Ddayo eri Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu, mutabani wa Safani, kabaka w'e Babiloni gwe yawa okufuga ebibuga bya Yuda, obeere naye eyo mu bantu. Oba genda awalala wonna w'olaba nga we watuufu okulaga.” Omukulu w'abakuumi n'awa Yeremiya emmere n'ekirabo, n'amusiibula." 
Jeremiah40:6 Awo Yeremiya n'alaga e Mizupa, eri Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu, n'asigala naye wamu n'abantu abaalekebwa mu nsi." 
Jeremiah40:7 Abagabe bonna ab'eggye ne basajja baabwe abaali basaasaanye eyo mu byalo, bwe baawulira nga kabaka w'e Babiloni ataddewo Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu y'aba afuga ensi, ng'amukwasizza abasajja, abakazi, abaana abato, be bantu abankuseere mu nsi eyo abaali batawaŋŋangusiriziddwa Babiloni," 
Jeremiah40:8 ne bajja ewa Gedaliya e Mizupa; baali Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya, Yokanani ne Yonatani batabani ba Kareya, Seraaya mutabani wa Tanukumeti, ne batabani ba Efayi Abanetofati, Yezaniya mutabani w'Abamakati, abo n'abantu baabwe." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu, mutabani wa Safani, n'abalayirira, bo n'abantu baabwe bwe baali, nti: “Temutya kuweereza Bakaludeya; mukkalire mu nsi, muweereze kabaka w'e Babiloni, olwo mugenda kubeera bulungi." 
Jeremiah40:10 Nze ŋŋenda kubeera Mizupa ng'omutabaganya n'Abakaludeya abanajjanga gye tuli. Naye mmwe munoge emizabbibu, mukungule ebibala eby'ekyeya, mukole omuzigo mujjuze ensumbi zammwe, mwebeerere mu bibuga byammwe bye muwambye.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Abayudaaya bonna abaali baddukidde e Mowabu, mu Bammoni, mu Edomu ne mu nsi endala zonna, bwe baawulira nga kabaka w'e Babiloni alese abasigaddewo mu Yuda, era ng'alonze Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu, mutabani wa Safani, afuge," 
Jeremiah40:12 ne bakomawo nga bava mu bifo byonna gye baali basaasaanidde, ne bajja mu nsi ya Yuda eri Gedaliya e Mizupa; ne bakuŋŋaanya evviini n'ebibala eby'ekyeya bingi nnyo." 
Jeremiah40:13 Olumu Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa n'abagabe bonna mu ggye abaali bakyali eyo mu byalo bajja eri Gedaliya mu Mizupa," 
Jeremiah40:14 ne bamugamba nti “Tomanyi nti Baalisi kabaka w'Abammoni atumye Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya akutte?” Naye Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu teyabakkiriza. 
Jeremiah40:15 Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa n'agamba Gedaliya mu kyama e Mizupa nti: “Ka ŋŋende nzite Yisimayeli mutabani wa Nekaniya, tewali ajja na kukimanyaako. Lwaki yandikusse n'Abayudaaya bonna ababadde bakukuŋŋaaniddeko n'abaleetera okusaasaana, ababadde basigaddewo mu Yuda ne bazikirira?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Naye Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu n'ayanukula Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa nti: “Tokola kigambo ekyo; ebyo by'oyogera ku Yisimayeli bya bulimba.” 
Jeremiah41:1 Olumu mu mwezi ogwomusanvu, Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya, mutabani wa Elisama, asibuka mu kabaka, eyali omu ku bagabe ba kabaka, yajja n'abasajja kkumi ewa Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu e Mizupa. Bwe baali balya emmere awo e Mizupa," 
Jeremiah41:2 Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya n'abasajja be ekkumi ne basituka ne batta n'ekitala Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu, mutabani wa Safani; ne batta bwe batyo oyo kabaka w'e Babiloni gwe yali awadde okufuga ensi." 
Jeremiah41:3 Yisimayeli era n'atta Abayudaaya bonna abaali ne Gedaliya e Mizupa n'abatabaazi Abakaludeya abaasangibwayo. 
Jeremiah41:4 Ku lunaku olwaddirira okutemulibwa kwa Gedaliya, era nga tewannaba n'omu akimanyiiko," 
Jeremiah41:5 abasajja kinaana nga bamwedde ebirevu, ebyambalo byabwe nga biyulifuyulifu, nga beesaze emisale, baava e Sekemu, Silo ne Samariya nga baleese ebitone eby'obuwunga n'obubaani okubiweereza mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah41:6 Awo Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya n'afuluma e Mizupa okugenda okubasisinkana eno nga bw'agenda akaaba. Bwe yabatuukako n'abagamba nti: “Mujje eri Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu.” 
Jeremiah41:7 Bwe baatuuka mu kibuga, Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya n'abasajja be yali nabo ne baddira abantu bali ne babatta, ne babasuula mu luzzi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kyokka kkumi ku bo ne bagamba Yisimayeli nti: “Totutta kubanga tulina ebitereke by'eŋŋano, sayiri, omuzigo n'omubisi gw'enjuki ebikwekeddwa mu nnimiro.” Abo n'abaleka n'atabatta wamu ne bannaabwe." 
Jeremiah41:9 Oluzzi Yisimayeli mwe yasuula emirambo gyonna egy'abasajja be yali asse lwali luwanvu; lwe luulwo kabaka Asa lwe yali asimye okwetaasa Basa kabaka wa Yisirayeli; omwo Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya mwe yajjuza abattibwa. 
Jeremiah41:10 Oluvannyuma Yisimayeli abantu bonna abaali basigadde mu bantu b'e Mizupa, bawala ba kabaka n'abantu abalala e Mizupa Nabuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi be yali akwasizza Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu okubalabirira, Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya yabakwata n'agenda, n'asomoka okulaga mu Bammoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa n'abatabaazi bonna abaali naye, bwe baawulira eby'ettemu byonna Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya bye yali akoze," 
Jeremiah41:12 ne bakuŋŋaanya basajja baabwe bonna, ne bagenda okulwanyisa Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya. Baamusanga mu lutobazzi olunene olw'e Gibewoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Abantu bonna abaali ne Yisimayeli bwe baalaba Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa n'abatabaazi abaali naye, ne basanyuka." 
Jeremiah41:14 Abantu bonna abaali ne Yisimayeli be yali akutte ne bakyuka ne badda ewa Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa. 
Jeremiah41:15 Kyokka Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya n'abatabaazi be omunaana badduka Yokanani, ne baddukira mu Bammoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Awo Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa n'abatabaazi bonna abaali naye, ne bakuŋŋaanya abantu bonna abaali basigaddewo Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya be yali anyaze okuva e Mizupa ng'amaze okutta Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu: abasajja, abakazi, abaana n'abakungu be yali aggye e Gibewoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Ne bagenda nga batambula, ne bayimirirako e Geruti-Kimuwamu okuliraana e Beteleemu, nga basenvula balaga mu Misiri," 
Jeremiah41:18 nga badduka Abakaludeya. Baali babatya, kubanga Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya yali asse Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu, kabaka w'e Babiloni gwe yali awadde okufuga ensi." 
Jeremiah42:1 Awo abagabe bonna ab'eggye omwali ne Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa, ne Yezaniya mutabani wa Osaaya wamu n'abantu bonna okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu ne batuukirira" 
Jeremiah42:2 Yeremiya omulanzi nga bagamba nti: “Tukwegayiridde, wuliriza bulungi okuwanjaga kwaffe, otusabire ew'Omukama Katonda wo olw'abasigaddewo bano bonna, kubanga, nga naawe bw'olaba, tusigadde batono ffe abaali abangi." 
Jeremiah42:3 Omukama Katonda wo atulage ekkubo lye tuba tukwata ne kye tuba tukola.” 
Jeremiah42:4 Yeremiya omulanzi n'abaddamu nti: “Mpulidde; kale nzija kubasabira eri Omukama Katonda wammwe nga bwe musabye; Omukama ky'anaaba ayanukudde, nzija kukibategeeza; sijja kubakisa kantu na kamu.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Nabo ne bagamba Yeremiya nti: “Omukama y'aba abeera omujulirwa waffe ow'amazima era omwesigwa era atulumirize singa tetuukole nga Omukama Katonda wo bw'anaaba akutumye gye tuli. 
Jeremiah42:6 Oba kirungi, oba kibi, tujja kuwulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda waffe gye tukutumye, tulyoke tubeere bulungi, olw'okuwulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda waffe.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Nga wayise ennaku kkumi, ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja eri Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Awo n'ayita Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa, n'abagabe b'eggye bonna okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu," 
Jeremiah42:9 n'abagamba nti: “Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, gye mwantuma okumwanjulira okuwanjaga kwammwe, kino ky'agamba:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Bwe mukkiriza okusigala mu nsi muno, ŋŋenda kubazimba, siribazimbulula; ŋŋenda kubasimba, sigenda kubasimbula, kubanga nejjusa akabi ke nabakola." 
Jeremiah42:11 Muleke kutya kabaka w'e Babiloni, oyo kati gwe mutya; temumutya, Omukama y'agamba, kubanga ndi nammwe; nzija kubawonya mbaggye mu mikono gye." 
Jeremiah42:12 Nzija kubagirira ekisa abasaasire, abakkirize okudda mu nsi yammwe." 
Jeremiah42:13 Naye bwe munaagamba nti “Tetujja kusigala mu nsi eno,” ne mutawulira ddoboozi lya Mukama Katonda wammwe," 
Jeremiah42:14 oba ne mugamba nti: “Nedda, tujja kugenda mu nsi y'e Misiri, gye tutagenda kulaba ku lutalo na kuwulira ku ddoboozi lya ŋŋombe yadde okulumirwa emmere enjala,”" 
Jeremiah42:15 awo nno, mmwe abasigaddewo mu Yuda, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama. Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: “Bwe mumalirira okugenda mu Misiri, ne mugenda ne mubeera eyo," 
Jeremiah42:16 ekitala kye mutya kigenda kubasangayo eyo mu Misiri, n'enjala ebeeraliikiriza egenda kubalondoolayo eyo mu Misiri; gye mulifiira." 
Jeremiah42:17 Abantu bonna abagugubidde ku kugenda e Misiri n'okubeerayo, gye balifiira ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli; tewaliba asumattuka, aliwona kabenje ke ndibaleetera.”" 
Jeremiah42:18 Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: “Ng'obusungu n'obuswandi bwange bwe bwebunduggula ku baali mu Yeruzaalemu, bwe butyo obusungu bwange bwe bulibeebunduggulako bwe muligenda e Misiri. Mulibeera ekikolimo, ekintu eky'entiisa, ekivumo era eky'okusekerera; era temuliddayo kukuba liiso ku kifo kino.” ’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Wattu abaasigalawo mu Yuda, Omukama abagambye nti: “Temugenda mu Misiri.” Mumanyire ddala, mbalabula olwa leero," 
Jeremiah42:20 nti mwawaba mu mitima gyammwe bwe mwantuma eri Omukama Katonda wammwe nga muŋŋamba nti: “Tusabire ew'Omukama, Katonda waffe; tubuulire kyonna Omukama, Katonda waffe ky'anaaba alagidde, tujja kukituukiriza.”" 
Jeremiah42:21 Ate bwe nkibabuulidde olwa leero, temuwulirizza ddoboozi lya Mukama, Katonda wammwe ku ebyo byonna by'antumye gye muli." 
Jeremiah42:22 Kale nno mumanyire ddala nga muli ba kufiirayo ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli, eyo gye mwesiimidde okugenda okubeera." 
Jeremiah43:1 Yeremiya bwe yasirissa okubuulira abantu ebigambo byonna eby'Omukama Katonda waabwe, ebyo Omukama Katonda waabwe bye yali amutumye okubabuulira," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya mutabani wa Osaaya, Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa n'abantu bonna ab'olunkulu ne bagamba Yeremiya nti: “Oyogera bya bulimba. Omukama tannakutuma kutugamba mbu: ‘Temugenda Misiri kubeera eyo.’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Wazira Baruku mutabani wa Neriya y'akututankuulidde, ayagala atuweeyo mu mikono gy'Abakaludeya batutte oba batutwale mu buwaŋŋanguse e Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa n'abagabe bonna ab'eggye n'abantu bonna ne bagaana okuwulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama okusigala mu nsi ya Yuda. 
Jeremiah43:5 Awo Yokanani mutabani wa Karewa abagabe bonna ab'eggye ne batwala abaali basigaddewo mu Yuda yenna abaali bakomyeewo okubeera mu nsi ya Yuda nga bava mu mawanga abantu gye baali basaasaanidde. 
Jeremiah43:6 Baatwala abasajja, abakazi, abaana, bawala ba kabaka n'abantu bonna Nebuzaradani omugabe w'abakuumi be yali alese ne Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu mutabani wa Safani, ko ne Yeremiya omulanzi ne Baruku mutabani wa Neriya." 
Jeremiah43:7 Ne balaga bwe batyo mu nsi y'e Misiri, kubanga tebaawulira ddoboozi lya Mukama. Ne batuuka e Takupanikesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yeremiya e Takupanikesi nti: 
Jeremiah43:9 “Mu maaso g'Abayudaaya kwata amayinja amanene ogaziike mu budongo mu luggya lw'amataffaali awayingirirwa mu lubiri lwa Faraawo e Takupanikesi," 
Jeremiah43:10 olwo obagambe nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: “Nzija kutumya omuweereza wange Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni; alissa nnamulondo ye ku mayinja gano ge nziise wano; ku go alyanjululizaako manvuuli ye.” ’" 
Jeremiah43:11 Ajja kujja akube ensi y'e Misiri: Ab'okufa olumbe, badde eri olumbe; ab'okutwalibwa mu busibe, badde eri obusibe; ab'okufa ekitala, badde eri ekitala." 
Jeremiah43:12 Agenda kwokya omuliro amasabo ga balubaale b'e Misiri; alyokya ebiggya byabwe balubaale n'abasiba. Ng'omusumba bwe yeezingira omunagiro gwe, naye bw'alyezingira Misiri n'akumba, n'agenda mu ddembe." 
Jeremiah43:13 Alimenyaamenya empagi mu Kiggwa ky'Enjuba mu nsi y'e Misiri, n'ebiggwa bya balubaale b'e Misiri alibyokya omuliro.”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Ekigambo ekyajja eri Yeremiya ku Bayudaaya bonna abaali mu nsi y'e Misiri, e Migudoli, Takupanikesi, Nofa ne mu nsi y'e Paturosi nga kigamba nti:" 
Jeremiah44:2 “Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Mwalaba akabi konna ke naleetera Yeruzaalemu n'ebibuga byonna ebya Yuda; kati byonna, matongo, temukyali asulamu," 
Jeremiah44:3 lwa kubeera bikolwa byabwe ebibi bye baakola. Bannyiiza olw'okunyookeza obubaani balubaale be batamanyangako n'okubasinza, bo, mmwe ne bajjajjammwe." 
Jeremiah44:4 Nabatumiranga buli olukedde abaweereza bange abalanzi abaabagambanga nti: “Temukola kyenyinyalwa kyenkana awo kye nkyawa.” 
Jeremiah44:5 Naye bo tebaawuliriza yadde okussaayo omwoyo; tebaava mu bibi byabwe era tebaalekera awo kunyookeza balubaale bubaani. 
Jeremiah44:6 Obusungu n'obuswandi bwange kwe kufumbukuka, ne bukoleerera ebibuga bya Yuda ne mu nguudo za Yeruzaalemu, ne bubifuula malungu na matongo, kye biri olwa leero.’" 
Jeremiah44:7 Kale nno Omukama, Katonda w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: ‘Lwaki mwesombera akabi akenkana awo ne mukutulwako mu mmwe abasajja n'abakazi, abato n'abayonka, ne muteerekerawo baasigalawo?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Lwaki munnyiiza n'ebyo emikono gyammwe bye gyakola, nga munyookeza balubaale obubaani mu nsi y'e Misiri gye muzze okubeera? Mujja kwezikiriza, mwefuule ekikolimo n'ekivumo mu mawanga gonna ag'oku nsi." 
Jeremiah44:9 Mwerabidde ebibi bya bakadde bammwe, n'ebya bakabaka ba Yuda ne bakazi baabwe, n'ebyammwe mwennyini n'ebya bakazi bammwe, bye baakola mu nsi ya Yuda ne mu makubo ga Yeruzaalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero tebannaba kwenenya yadde okutya, era tebatambulira mu tteeka lyange ne mu biragiro byange bye nalangirira gye muli mwenna n'eri bajjajjammwe.’" 
Jeremiah44:11 Kale nno, Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kino ky'agamba: ‘Mbataddeko eriiso lwa kabi n'olw'okusaanyaawo Yuda yenna." 
Jeremiah44:12 Nzija kutwala abaasigalawo mu Yuda, abantu abaasalawo okujja mu nsi y'e Misiri babeere eyo; bonna balisaanirawo eyo mu nsi y'e Misiri; balifa ekitala oba enjala.
