Okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu balifa ekitala oba enjala ne bafuuka ekikolimo, ekintu eky'entiisa, ekivumo era ekintu eky'okusekerera." 
Jeremiah44:13 Nzija kubonereza ab'omu nsi y'e Misiri n'ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli nga bwe nabonereza ab'omu Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah44:14 Ku baasigalawo mu Yuda abajja okubeera mu Misiri temuliba bakaawonawo wadde abalisumattuka abalisobola okudda mu nsi ya Yuda gye balumirwa okudda n'okubeera; si ba kuddayo, mpozzi ababudami abatono.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Awo abantu bonna abaamanya nga bakazi baabwe baanyookezanga balubaale obubaani, n'ebbiina ly'abakazi abalala abaaliwo, n'abantu bonna abaali babeera mu Misiri ne mu Paturosi, ne baanukula ne bagamba nti:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Tetujja kuwuliriza bigambo ebyo by'otugambye mu linnya ly'Omukama. 
Jeremiah44:17 Tujja kukola byonna bye twagamba okukola: okunyookeza Nnaabakyala w'Eggulu obubaani n'okumuyiira ebitambiro nga ffe ne bajjajjaffe bwe twakolanga, era nga bakabaka baffe n'abakungu baffe bwe baakolanga mu bibuga bya Yuda ne mu nguudo za Yeruzaalemu. Mu bbanga eryo twalina emmere nnyingi, nga tuli bulungi era nga tetugwirwa kabi na kamu." 
Jeremiah44:18 Naye okuva lwe twakoma okunyookeza Nnaabakyala w'Eggulu obubaani n'okumuweereza ebitone eby'okuyiwa, tetukyalina kantu na kamu, era tufa ekitala n'enjala.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 N'abakazi ne bongerako nti: “Bwe twanyookeza Nnaabakyala w'Eggulu obubaani ne tumuweereza n'ebitone eby'okuyiwa, babbaffe baali tebakimanyi nti tumufumbira obugaati mu kifaananyi kye era nga tumuweereza ebitone eby'okuyiwa?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Yeremiya n'agamba abantu bonna, abasajja n'abakazi, bonna abaali bamwanukudde batyo nti:" 
Jeremiah44:21 “Ebitambiro bye mwatambirira mu bibuga bya Yuda ne mu nguudo z'omu Yeruzaalemu, mmwe, bajjajjammwe, bakabaka bammwe, abakungu bammwe ne bannansi baayo, ebyo Omukama teyabijjukira?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Kwe kulaba nti Omukama yali takyasobola kugumiikiriza bubi bwa bikolwa byammwe n'ebyenyinyalwa bye mwakola; ensi yammwe n'efuuka eddungu, amatongo, ekikolimo, omutali asulamu nga bw'eri olwa leero." 
Jeremiah44:23 Kubanga mwanyookeza obubaani ne musobya eri Omukama, ne mutawulira ddoboozi lya Mukama, ne mutatambulira mu tteeka lye, mu biragiro bye, ne mutagoberera by'ayigiriza, akabi kano kyekavudde kabagwira, nga bwe kiri olwa leero.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Yeremiya n'agamba abantu bonna n'abakazi bonna nti: “Yuda wenna ali mu nsi y'e Misiri, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama:" 
Jeremiah44:25 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: ‘Mmwe ne bakazi bammwe mwayogera n'akamwa kammwe, ne mutuukiriza n'emikono gyammwe kye mwagamba nti: “Tujja kutuukiriza obweyamo bwe twakola obw'okunyookeza Nnaabakyala w'Eggulu obubaani n'okumuweereza ebitone eby'okuyiwa.” Mukale, mukole bye mwetema, mutuukirize bye mweyama.’" 
Jeremiah44:26 Kyokka muwulire Omukama ky'agamba, ggwe Yuda wenna ali mu nsi y'e Misiri: ‘Ndayidde erinnya lyange ekkulu,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘erinnya lyange teririddayo kwatulibwa mu kamwa ka muntu yenna owa Yuda mu Misiri yonna nti: “Mazima Omukama Katonda nga mulamu.”" 
Jeremiah44:27 Kubanga mbakuumirira lwa kabi sso si lwa bulungi. Abantu bonna aba Yuda abali mu nsi y'e Misiri, bagenda kufa ekitala n'enjala, okutuusa nga bonna bazikiridde." 
Jeremiah44:28 Abaliba bawonye ekitala, ne bava mu nsi y'e Misiri ne baddayo mu nsi ya Yuda baliba ba muswaba. Abaliba basigaddewo mu Yuda abajja okubeera mu nsi y'e Misiri balimanya ky'ani ekigambo ekirituukirira, ekyange oba ekyabwe?" 
Jeremiah44:29 “ ‘Kano ke kaliba akabonero,’ Omukama y'agamba, ‘kwe munaakakasiza nga bwe ndibabonereza mu kifo kino, olwo mulitegeera nti ebigambo byange ebibawerera akabi bya kutuukirira ddala.’" 
Jeremiah44:30 Omukama kino ky'agamba: ‘Nzija kuwaayo Faraawo Kofura kabaka w'e Misiri mu mikono gy'abalabe be abanoonya obulamu bwe, nga bwe nawaayo Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda mu mikono gya Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, omulabe we eyali anoonya obulamu bwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Ekigambo Yeremiya omulanzi kye yagamba Baruku mutabani wa Neriya, mu mwaka ogwokuna ogwa Yoyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya kabaka wa Yuda, nga Baruku amaze okuwandiika mu kitabo ebigambo Yeremiya bye yamugambanga:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “Baruku, Omukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, bino by'akugamba:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Wagamba nti: ‘Zinsanze! kubanga Omukama ku nnaku zange agasseeko obulumi; mpweddemu otwanyi olw'okuwoloma; sirina buweerero.’ 
Jeremiah45:4 Bino by'oba omugamba: ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Nzija kuzimbulula kye nazimba; nzija kusimbula kye nasimba mu nsi eno yonna. 
Jeremiah45:5 Weenoonyeza bikulu? Tobinoonya, kubanga nzija kuleetera abantu bonna akabi, Omukama y'agamba, naye ggwe yonna gy'onoolaga ojja kusumattukayo ng'oli mulamu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ekyajja eri Yeremiya omulanzi nga kikwata ku mawanga: 
Jeremiah46:2 Ku Misiri: Ebikwata ku ggye lya Faraawo Neko kabaka w'e Misiri eryali okumpi n'olubalama lw'omugga Furaati, e Karucemisi, Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni lye yawangula mu mwaka ogwokuna ogwa Yoyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya kabaka wa Yuda:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Mutegeke engabo empaala n'entono, mutalire olutalo!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Mutandiike embalaasi, muzeebagale, mmwe abeebagazi! Mutale, enkufiira zibadde ku mitwe! Muzigule amafumu; mwambale ebizibawo eby'ekyuma!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Kiki ekyo kye ndaba? Batekemuse; bazze ennyuma. Abatabaazi baabwe bakubiddwa; badduse misinde, tebatunudde na mabega. Ntiisa ku njuyi zonna. Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Omuwenyusi talisobola kudduka; n'omuzira talisumattuka; emambuka, ku mugga Furaati, basirittuka ne bagwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ani oyo atumbiira nga Kiyira, ng'emigga egy'amazzi agabimba?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Misiri atumbiira nga Kiyira; ng'emigga egy'amazzi agabimba. Agamba nti: ‘Ka nnyambuke mbuutikire ensi; nzija kuzikiriza ebibuga n'abantu baamu.’ 
Jeremiah46:9 Mmwe embalaasi, mutale! Mmwe ebigaali, mutomere! Abatabaazi, mulumbe, abasajja b'e Kuusi ne Puti abakutte engabo, abasajja b'e Ludi, abalasi b'obusaale." 
Jeremiah46:10 Naye nno olunaku olwo lwa Mukama, Katonda w'Amagye, olunaku olw'okuwoolera eggwanga, okuwoolera eggwanga ku balabe be. Ekitala kirirya ne kikkuta, kirinywa omusaayi gwabwe ne kyekkya; anti Omukama Katonda w'Amagye atambidde, mu nsi y'emambuka, ku lubalama lw'omugga Furaati." 
Jeremiah46:11 “Yambuka Gileyaadi onoonye amasanda g'eddagala, ayi embeerera, muwala wa Misiri. Naye weepiikira bwereere omulagala; Ku ggwe teri kuwona!" 
Jeremiah46:12 Amawanga galiwulira bw'oswadde; emiranga gyo girijjula ensi, kubanga omuzira yeesittadde ku muzira munne, bombi bagudde maliri.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Ekigambo Omukama kye yagamba Yeremiya omulanzi nga kikwata ku kujja kwa Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni okulwanyisa ensi y'e Misiri: 
Jeremiah46:14 “Mukirangirire mu Misiri; mukiraalaase mu Migudoli; mukiraalaase mu Memfi n'e Takupanikesi nti: ‘Muyimirire butengerera, mwetegeke, kubanga ekitala kikavvula ababeetoolodde.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Lwaki Api adduse? Lwaki sseddume wo teyatala? Kubanga Omukama yamulindiggula wansi. 
Jeremiah46:16 Balyesittala emirundi n'emirundi, bangi ne bagwaŋŋanako; ne bagamba nti: ‘Musituke mugire tuddeyo, eri abantu baffe ne mu nsi yaboobwe; tudduke ekitala ky'omulumbaganyi.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Eyo Faraawo kabaka wa Misiri balimutuuma: ‘Aleekaana n'aleka emikisa ne giyita’. 
Jeremiah46:18 “Nze nga ndi mulamu,” kabaka y'agamba, erinnya lye ye Mukama w'Amagye, “nga Tabori bw'ali mu nsozi ne Karumeli ku nnyanja, naye bw'alijja." 
Jeremiah46:19 Ggwe asula mu Misiri, siba engugu y'okuwaŋŋanguka, kubanga Noofu alisigala matongo, eddungu, omutasula muntu." 
Jeremiah46:20 “Misiri, nnyana ennungi ekitalo, naye ekivu kivudde emambuka ne kigigwako;" 
Jeremiah46:21 N'abapangise mu ggye lye bali ng'obuyana obusavuwaze, balikuba enkyukira ne badduka kitole; tebalisobola kutala, kubanga olunaku lw'okuzikirira kwabwe lubajjidde, akadde ak'okubonerezebwa kwabwe." 
Jeremiah46:22 Asiiya ng'omusota ogudduka, ng'abalabe bajja n'amaanyi; balijja n'embazzi okumulumba, ng'abasajja abatema enku." 
Jeremiah46:23 Balitema ekibira kye, Omukama y'agamba, newandibadde nga kikwafu, kubanga bangi okukira enzige; abatabalika muwendo." 
Jeremiah46:24 Muwala wa Misiri aliswazibwa; aliweebwayo mu mikono gy'abantu b'emambuka.” 
Jeremiah46:25 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, agambye nti: “Nzija kubonereza Amoni ow'e No, ne Faraawo, ne Misiri ne balubaale be, na bonna abamwesiga." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ndibawaayo mu mikono gy'abo abanoonya obulamu bwabwe, ne mu mikono gya Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, ne mu mikono gy'abagabe be. Kyokka oluvannyuma Misiri aliddamu abantu nga bwe kyabanga mu mirembe egy'edda,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Naye ggwe, omuweereza wange Yakobo, leka kutya; toterebuka, ayi Yisirayeli; nzija kukulokola nkuggye ewala eyo, n'abaana bo mbaggye mu nsi y'obuwaŋŋanguse. Yakobo agenda kudda, atebenkere, abeere mu ddembe; tewaliba amukanga." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ggwe Yakobo omuweereza wange, leka kutya, kubanga ndi naawe; Omukama y'agamba, ndizikiririza ddala amawanga gonna, gye nakusaasaanyiza, naye ggwe sirikusaanyizaawo ddala. Ndikubonereza ekisaanidde, kyokka sirikulekera awo nga sikubonerezza.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ekyajja eri Yeremiya omulanzi nga kikwata ku Bafilisitiini, Faraawo bwe yali nga tannalumba Gaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Amazzi gaago gabimba okuva emambuka; galiba ng'engezi ey'omujjuzi. Galibuutikira ensi yonna na buli kirimu, n'ebibuga n'abantu ababirimu. Abantu balikuba ebiwoobe, bonna abali mu nsi balitema emiranga," 
Jeremiah47:3 ku musinde gw'ebinuulo ebiguluka, ku kududuma kw'ebigaali by'omulabe, ne ku kuwuluguma kwa nnamuziga ze. Bakitaabwe b'abaana tebarikyukira gye bali, emikono nga gibalagaye." 
Jeremiah47:4 Kubanga olunaku olwo luzze, okuzikiriza Abafilisitiini bonna; n'okukutulako buli yenna awonyeewo, eyandidduukiridde Tiiro ne Sidoni. Anti Omukama azikiriza Abafilisitiini, abawonyeewo mu bizinga by'e Kafutori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Ekiwalaata kiridde Gaza; Asukeloni bamusirisizza; mmwe abawonyeewo mu Akimu, onootuusa wa okwesala emisale?" 
Jeremiah47:6 “ ‘Mwattu kitala kya Mukama, ggwe onooweerako ddi? Ddayo mu kiraato kyo; wummula, osirike.’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Naye nno kiyinza kitya okuweera ng'Omukama akiragidde, ng'akitumye okulumba Asukeloni n'olubalama lw'ennyanja?”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Ku Mowabu: Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: “Zimusanze Nebo, kubanga bakyayizza! Kiriyatayimu kiswaziddwa, ne kiwambibwa; ekigo kiswadde, kimenyeddwa;" 
Jeremiah48:2 Ettutumu ly'e Mowabu terikyaliwo. Mu Kesuboni gye bateesereza akabi ak'okumukola nti: ‘Mujje tukisaanyeewo ng'eggwanga.’ Era naawe Madumeni balikubuniza; ekitala kya kukugoberera. 
Jeremiah48:3 Wulira oluyoogaano lufulumye e Koronayimu: ‘Okuzikiriza! Akabenje ddekabusa," 
Jeremiah48:4 Mowabu amenyeddwa!’ abaana baakyo bayoogaana. 
Jeremiah48:5 Bambuka bakutte ery'e Lukiti, bakaaba, balira nga bwe bagenda; nga bakkirira e Koronayimu, emiranga gy'okuzikirizibwa giwulirwa." 
Jeremiah48:6 Mudduke, mwewonye, mubeere ng'endogoyi ey'ettale mu ddungu." 
Jeremiah48:7 Nga bwe weesiga bye wakola n'obugagga bwo, naawe ojja kukwatibwa, ne Cemosi aligenda mu buwaŋŋanguse, ko ne bakabona be n'abakungu be." 
Jeremiah48:8 Omunyazi alituuka ku buli kibuga, tewali kibuga kinaatalizibwa. Ekiwonvu kya kuvunjaga n'emiseetwe gya kwayiibwa, kubanga Omukama ayogedde." 
Jeremiah48:9 Mowabu muwe ebiwaawatiro kubanga alibuuka n'agenda, n'ebibuga bye bya kufuula matongo, nga temukyali asulamu." 
Jeremiah48:10 “Avumirirwe alagajjalira omulimu gw'Omukama; avumirirwe atiisa ekitala kye omusaayi. 
Jeremiah48:11 “Mowabu abadde mu ddembe okuva obuvubuka, ateekedde ku bbonda lye; tafukwangako kuva mu kita kimu kudda mu kirala, tagendangako mu buwaŋŋanguse; akyasigazizza okuwooma kwe, n'akawoowo ke tekakyukangako." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Naye nno ennaku zijja, Omukama y'agamba, lwe nzija okusindika abafukumula ebita bamufukumulemu; balikaliza ebita bye, baaseeyase n'ensumbi ze." 
Jeremiah48:13 Olwo Mowabu alikwatibwa ensonyi olwa Cemosi, ng'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli bwe yakwatibwa ensonyi olwa Beteli mwe baali batadde obwesige bwabwe." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Muguma mutya okugamba nti: ‘Tuli bazira, tuli ba maanyi mu ntalo’?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Mowabu asaanyeewo, ebibuga bye birizindibwa; abavubuka be abasinga obulungi bafiiridde mu kusanjagibwa, Omukama y'agamba, Omukama w'Amagye lye linnya lye." 
Jeremiah48:16 Okuzikirira kwa Mowabu kusembedde; akabenje ke kajja kujja mangu nnyo. 
Jeremiah48:17 Mumukaabire, mmwe abamwetoolodde, mwenna abamanyi ettutumu lye; mugambe nti: ‘Ddamula ow'obuyinza amenyese atya, omuggo ogw'ekitiibwa?’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Wanukayo mu kitiibwa kyo, otuule ku ttaka ekkalu, ggwe muwala wa Diboni! Kubanga azikiriza Mowabu akujjiridde; amenye ebigo byo." 
Jeremiah48:19 Muyimirire ku kkubo mutunule, mmwe abasula mu Aroweri. Mubuuze omusajja adduka n'omukazi eyeewonya nti: ‘Ate ogubadde?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Mowabu afa ensonyi, kubanga asesegguddwa. Mukube ebiwoobe, muleekaane! Mulangirire mu Arunoni nti Mowabu azikiriziddwa.”" 
Jeremiah48:21 “Omusango era gusaliddwa ensi ey'oku museetwe: Koloni, Yakuza ne Mefaati," 
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni, Nebo ne Beti-Dibulatayimu;" 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriyatayimu, Beti-Gamuli ne Beti-Mewoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 Kiriyoti, Bozura n'ebibuga byonna eby'ensi y'e Mowabu, ebiri ewala n'ebiri okumpi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Ejjembe lya Mowabu balitemyeeko, n'omukono gwe gukutuse, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Mumutamiize, kubanga yeewanika ku Mukama. Mowabu ayavulire mu bisesemye bye, afuuke eky'okusekerera." 
Jeremiah48:27 Ggwe tewasekerera Yisirayeli? Yali asangiddwa mu babbi olyoke omunyeenyeze omutwe buli lwe wamwogerangako? 
Jeremiah48:28 “Mudduke ebibuga, mmwe ab'omu Mowabu; mubeere ng'ejjuba erizimba ekisu mu mpampagama z'oku mumwa gw'empuku." 
Jeremiah48:29 Twawulira ku kwekuza kwa Mowabu - kwekuza kusuffu - ku lunkulu lwe! ku kwekuluntaza kwe! ku kwewanika kwe! ne ku kwegulumiza kw'omutima gwe! 
Jeremiah48:30 Mmanyi bulungi olwetumbu lwe, Omukama y'agamba, Amampaati ge temuli kantu, by'akola temuva kantu." 
Jeremiah48:31 Kyenva nkubira Mowabu ebiwoobe; olwa Mowabu yenna ndeekaana; nkaabira abantu b'e Kiri-Kareseti. 
Jeremiah48:32 Nkukaabira n'okusinga Yazeri, ggwe omuzabbibu gw'e Sibuna! Amatabi go gaayagaagala ne gasukka n'ennyanja; gatuuka ne ku nnyanja y'e Yazeri. Omunyazi agwiridde ebibala byo eby'ekyeya n'amakungula go ag'emizabbibu." 
Jeremiah48:33 Essanyu n'okujaguza bikomye mu nnimiro okuva mu nsi y'e Mowabu. Nkomezza evviini mu masogolero; omusogozi takyakuba buluulu, obuluulu tebukyali buluulu bwa ssanyu." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Ebiwoobe byabwe bisituse okuva e Kesuboni okutuuka e Elewale n'e Yawazi, n'okuva e Zowari okutuuka e Koronayimu, Egulati-Selisiya, n'amazzi g'e Nimirimu gakalidde ddala." 
Jeremiah48:35 Mu Mowabu nzija kumalamu buli yenna atambirira ku bifo ebigulumivu n'abanyookeza balubaale obubaani, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah48:36 “N'olw'ekyo omutima gwange gukungubagira Mowabu ng'endere; omutima gwange gukaabira abasajja b'e Kiri-Kareseti ng'endere, n'olw'ekyo obugagga bwe baafuna buzikiridde." 
Jeremiah48:37 “Anti buli mutwe mumwe, ba buli kirevu kimwereddwa, emikono gyonna gijjudde emisale, ne mu kiwato beesibye ebikutiya." 
Jeremiah48:38 Ku busolya bw'ennyumba zonna mu Mowabu, ne mu mpya zaayo biwoobe byokka by'owulira, kubanga Mowabu mmwasizzayasizza; ali ng'ensumbi etakyaliko gw'egasa, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah48:39 Ng'asesegguddwa! Nga bakuba ebiwoobe! Nga Mowabu adduse olw'ensonyi! Bw'atyo Mowabu afuuse eky'okusekerera, ekyesisiwaza eri bonna abamwetoolodde.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Laba, empungu ekkirira okukwakkula eyanjululizza ebiwaawaatiro byayo ku Mowabu." 
Jeremiah48:41 Ebibuga birikwatibwa, n'ebigo biriwambibwa, ku olwo emitima gy'abatabaazi ba Mowabu giriba ng'omutima gw'omukazi mu bulumi bw'okuzaala." 
Jeremiah48:42 Mowabu alizikirira ng'eggwanga, kubanga yeewanika ku Mukama." 
Jeremiah48:43 Ntiisa, bunnya, kitimba bye bikutuukiridde, bantu ba Mowabu, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah48:44 Alidduka entiisa aligwa mu bunnya; aliba avudde mu bunnya aligwa mu kitimba, kubanga Mowabu nzija kumutuusa mu mwaka ogw'okubonerezebwa kwabwe, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Abadduka bayimiriddeko mu kittuluze kya Kesuboni nga bakoowu; anti omuliro guwamatuse mu Kesuboni, ekitawuliro kiva wakati mu Sikoni; gwokya obwenyi bwa Mowabu, obuwompo bw'abaana abataaluufu." 
Jeremiah48:46 Zikusanze, Mowabu! Abantu b'e Cemosi bazikiridde; batabani bo batwaliddwa mu buwaŋŋanguse, ne bawala bo mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Jeremiah48:47 Sso ndikomyawo abasibe ba Mowabu gye bujja, Omukama y'agamba.” Okulamulibwa kwa Mowabu wano we kukoma." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ku Bammoni: Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Kazzi Yisirayeli talina baana ba bulenzi? Kazzi talinaawo basika? Lwaki kale Milukomu yatwala Gaadi? Lwaki abantu be be basenze mu bibuga byayo? 
Jeremiah49:2 Kale nno ennaku zijja, Omukama y'agamba, lwe ndirawira Rabba ow'Abammoni enduulu y'olutalo; kirifuuka ntuumu y'amafunfugu n'ebyalo byakyo biriteekerwa omuliro. Olwo Yisirayeli aligobawo abaamugobawo, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah49:3 Kesuboni kuba ebiwoobe, kubanga Ayi azikiriziddwa. Bawala ba Rabba, muteme emiranga; mwesibe ebikutiya, mukungubage; mutagire munda mu bigo, kubanga Milukomu wa kugenda mu buwaŋŋanguse wamu ne bakabona be n'abakungu be." 
Jeremiah49:4 Lwaki ebiwonvu byo bikwegulumya, ebiwonvu byo ebittulukuka, ggwe omuwala omujeemu? Ggwe eyali yeesiga obugagga bwo ng'ogamba nti: ‘Ani anannumba?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Kale nno ŋŋenda kukuteera entiisa eriva mu bonna abakwetoolodde, Omukama Katonda w'Amagye y'agamba; mulifubutuka buli omu n'akwata lirye; tewaliba kukumiriza badduka." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Kyokka oluvannyuma ndikomyawo abasibe b'Ammoni, Omukama y'agamba.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Ku Edomu: Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Ddala mu Temani temukyali mugezi? Okubuulirira kuwedde mu balabalaba? Amagezi gaabwe goonoonese? 
Jeremiah49:8 Mudduke, muddeeyo, mwevumbe empampagama, mmwe ababeera mu Dedani, kubanga Ezawu nzija kumuleetera obuyinike mu budde we ndimubonerereza." 
Jeremiah49:9 Singa abanozi b'emizabbibu bajja gy'oli, tebandirese ebirimba bitono? Singa abanyazi bakuyingirira ekiro, tebandikubbye ne bennyula?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Naye nze Ezawu mmubikkudde, njolese obufo gye yeekukuma; takyayinza kwekweka. Abaana be bazikiridde, ko n'eŋŋanda ze ne baliraanwa be; takyaliwo." 
Jeremiah49:11 Bamulekwa bo baleke, nze nzija kubakuuma nga balamu, ne bannamwandu bo basuubirire mu nze.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Obanga abo abataali ba kunywa kikompe baakinywa, ggwe onoosigala nga tobonerezeddwa? Ojja kukinywa" 
Jeremiah49:13 Ndayidde obulamu bwange, Omukama y'agamba, Bozura kijja kufuuka matongo, ekintu ekyesisiwaza, ekivumo era ekikolimo, n'ebibuga byakyo byonna biriba malungu emirembe gyonna." 
Jeremiah49:14 “Nfunye obubaka okuva ew'Omukama, omubaka abusindise eri amawanga nti: ‘Mwekuŋŋaanye mumulumbe, musituke mulwane.’" 
Jeremiah49:15 Laba, nzija kukutoowaza mu mawanga, onyoomebwe mu bantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Entiisa gy'okuba n'amalala g'omutima gwo bikulimbye, ggwe asula mu mpampagama z'olwazi, ggwe eyawamba entikko z'obusozi, ekisu kyo ne bw'olikiwanika waggulu ng'empungu, era ndikuwanulayo, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edomu alifuuka matongo, ekintu ekyesisiwaza; buli muyise aliwuniikirira n'afuuwa ekiwa bw'aliraba ebiwundu bye byonna." 
Jeremiah49:18 Nga Sodoma ne Gomorra n'emiriraano gyabyo bwe byazikirizibwa, Omukama bw'ayogera, teriba muntu asulamu, teriba n'omu asengamu." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Ng'empologoma efubutuka mu bisaka by'oku Yorudani okulaga mu ddundiro eddungi, bwe ndibagobawo mu kabanga bubanga. Ani mulondobe gwe ndissaawo ku lwa kino? Ani kale annenkana? Ani alimpawaabira? Era musumba ki asobola okuŋŋumira?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Kale nno muwulire Omukama ky'ateeserezza Edomu, ne by'alowooleza abasula mu Temani: ebijuujulu mu ggana balibiwalaawala; amalundiro gaabwe aligazikiririza ddala olw'okubeera bo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ku ddoboozi ly'okugwa kwabwe ensi erikankana, Eddoboozi ly'omulanga gwe liriwulirwa ne ku nnyanja ey'Ebiwuuwa." 
Jeremiah49:22 Laba, ajja kwambuka akwakkule ng'empungu, ayanjululize ebiwaawaatiro bye ku Bozura. Ku olwo emitima gy'abatabaazi ba Edomu giriba ng'omutima gw'omukazi mu bulumi bw'okuzaala.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Ku Damasiko: “Kamati ne Arupadi biwuniikiridde, kubanga bafunye amawulire amabi; omutima gubaweddemu, bafuukuuse ng'ennyanja etesobola kuteeka." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasiko ayenjebuse, adduse, entiisa emukutte; ennaku n'obulumi bimukutte ng'omukazi ng'azaala." 
Jeremiah49:25 Ekibuga eky'ettutumu kyabuliddwa kitya, ekibuga eky'essanyu?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Abavubuka baamu baligwa mu nguudo zaakyo, n'abatabaazi baakyo bonna balizikirizibwa lu lunaku olwo, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ndikoleeza omuliro mu bbugwe wa Damasiko, ne gusenkenya ebigo bya Beni-Adadi.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Ku Kedari n'obwakabaka bw'e Kazori Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni bwe yawangula: “Musituke, mulumbe Kedari; muzikirize abantu b'ebuvanjuba." 
Jeremiah49:29 Weema zaabwe n'amagana gaabwe biriwambibwa, amatundubaali gaabwe n'ebyabwe byonna, ko n'eŋŋamiya zaabwe biritwalibwa. Balibaleekaanira nti: ‘Ntiisa ku njuyi zonna.’" 
Jeremiah49:30 Mudduke, mudume nnyo, mwevumbe empampagama, mmwe ababeera mu Kazori, Omukama y'agamba, kubanga Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni abateeserezza ekintu, alowoozezza eky'okubakola." 
Jeremiah49:31 Musituke, mulumbe eggwanga eriri emirembe, eritalina kweraliikirira,” Omukama y'agamba, “mpaawo nzigi yadde emiyingo; abantu abali eyo bokka." 
Jeremiah49:32 Eŋŋamiya zaabwe zirifuuka omunyago, n'amagana gaabwe galifuuka olwayo. Ndibasaasaanyiza mu buli nsonda, abo abakomola enviiri mu bwenyi; ndibaleetera obuyinike okuva ku buli ludda, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah49:33 Kazori kirifuuka nfo ya bibe, matongo ag'emirembe gyonna; teri muntu alisulayo, teri alisengayo.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ekyajja eri Yeremiya omulanzi mu masooka g'obwakabaka bwa Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda nga kifa ku Elamu nga kigamba nti: 
Jeremiah49:35 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Ŋŋenda okumenya omutego gwa Elamu, luwaga w'amaanyi gaabwe." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndisindikira Elamu empewo ennya, okuva mu nsonda ennya ez'eggulu; ndibasaasaanyiza mu mpewo ennya, tewalibaawo ggwanga abasibe b'e Elamu gye batalituuka." 
Jeremiah49:37 Nditekemula Elamu mu maaso g'abalabe baabwe, mu maaso g'abo abanoonya obulamu bwabwe; ŋŋenda kubaleetera akabi n'obusungu bwange obwesera, Omukama y'agamba. Ndibawondera n'ekitala, okutuusa nga mbawemmentedde ddala." 
Jeremiah49:38 Nnamulondo yange nzija kugisimba mu Elamu, nzikirize kabaka n'abakungu be, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Kyokka ng'ennaku ziyiseewo ndikomyawo abasibe ba Elamu, Omukama y'agamba.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Ekigambo Omukama kye yayogera ku Babiloni ne ku nsi y'Abakaludeya, ng'akiyisa mu Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah50:2 “Mulaalaase mu mawanga, mulangirire; musitule bendera, mulangirire; temukisa kantu, mugambe nti: ‘Babiloni kiwambiddwa, Beeli kiswaziddwa; Maruduku atekemuse, ebifaananyi bye ebya balubaale biswadde, ebifaananyi bye ebya balubaale bitekemuse." 
Jeremiah50:3 Emambuka evuddeyo eggwanga erimulumba, eririfuula ensi ye amatongo. Tewali aligisulamu, abantu baligidduka era n'ensolo nazo okwo.’" 
Jeremiah50:4 “Mu nnaku ezo, mu budde obwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “abantu ba Yisirayeli balidda wamu n'abantu ba Yuda, balijja eno nga bakaaba bwe batambula, nga banoonya Omukama Katonda waabwe." 
Jeremiah50:5 Balibuuza ekkubo erigenda ku Siyoni ne bakyukira gye liri. Balijja ne beesiba ku Mukama mu ndagaano ey'olubeerera eteryerabirwa. 
Jeremiah50:6 “Abantu bange, ndiga ezibuze; abasumba baazo baziwabizza, ne bazireka okutangatangira mu nsozi. Zitagidde ku nsozi ne ku busozi, ne zeerabira we ziwummulira." 
Jeremiah50:7 Bonna abaazisanganga nga beeriira; abalabe baabwe nga bagamba nti: ‘Ffe tetuzzanga musango; mbeera be baakola ekibi eri Omukama, Ekisulo ky'obutuufu, essuubi lya bakitaabwe.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 Mudduke, muve mu Babiloni wakati, muleke ensi y'Abakaludeya; mubeere ng'embuzi ennume ezikulembera eggana." 
Jeremiah50:9 Kubanga ŋŋenda okusiikuula ndeetere Babiloni ekibinja ky'amawanga amangi okuva mu nsi y'emambuka. Galitala okumulwanyisa; balifuluma eyo ne bamukwata; obusaale bwabwe buli ng'omutabaazi omuzira atadda ngalo nsa. 
Jeremiah50:10 Kaludeya ya kunyagibwa; bonna abalimunyaga balimatira, Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Mujaganya, musanyuka, mmwe abanyagulula obusika bwange, muligita ng'ennyana enteere omuddo, mukaaba ng'embalaasi ennume." 
Jeremiah50:12 Naye nnyammwe aliswala nnyo; oyo eyabazaala ng'alisonyiwala! Y'alisembayo mu mawanga, amatongo, ensi enkalu, eddungu essa!" 
Jeremiah50:13 Olw'obusungu bw'Omukama talisengwamu, aliba ddungu jjereere. Buli aliyita ku Babiloni aliwuniikirira n'afuuwa ekiwa olw'ebiwundu bye byonna." 
Jeremiah50:14 Mutale okwetooloola Babiloni, mwenna abawesi b'omusaale. Mukirase, temusaasira busaale, kubanga kyakola ekibi ew'Omukama." 
Jeremiah50:15 Mukileekaanire ku njuyi zonna. Kijeemulukuse, emisingi gyakyo gigudde; bbugwe waakyo ayabiziddwa. Kubanga kuno kwe kuwoolera eggwanga olw'Omukama, mukiwoolereko eggwanga; mukikole nga bwe kyakola abalala." 
Jeremiah50:16 Mukutule ku Babiloni oyo asiga, n'oyo akutte najjolo mu budde obw'amakungula. Olw'ekitala ky'omunyazi buli omu adde mu bantu be; buli omu adduke ng'adda mu nsi yaaboobwe." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Yisirayeli, ndiga ezibaamye, ezigobeddwa empologoma.” Kabaka w'e Assuri ye yasooka okumulya, oluvannyuma ne Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni amubwebwenye amagumba." 
Jeremiah50:18 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kyava agamba nti: “Nzuuno, ŋŋenda okubonereza kabaka w'e Babiloni n'ensi ye nga bwe nabonereza kabaka w'e Assuri." 
Jeremiah50:19 “Ŋŋenda kuzza Yisirayeli mu ddundiro lye, aliire ku Karumeli ne mu Basani; okwoya kwe kulimatira, ku nsozi za Efurayimu ne Gileyaadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Mu nnaku ezo ne mu budde obwo, Omukama y'agamba, balinoonya ensobi ya Yisirayeli, naye teribaawo, n'ekibi kya Yuda, nakyo tekirizuuka, kubanga bakaawonawo be ndiba ntalizza ndibasaasira." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Lumba ensi y'e Meratayimu, n'abasula e Pekodi; wondera, tta, obasaanyizeewo ddala, Omukama y'agamba; byonna bikole nga bwe nkulagidde." 
Jeremiah50:22 Eddoboozi ly'olutalo liri mu nsi, okuzikiriza okunene!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Emenyese etya, n'esesegguka ennyondo y'ensi yonna? Babiloni afuuse atya ekintu eky'entiisa?" 
Jeremiah50:24 Nakutega omutego, Babiloni, ne gukukwasa nga tonnagumanya. Wasangibwa n'okwatibwa, kubanga wasoomooza Omukama." 
Jeremiah50:25 Omukama yaggulawo etterekero lye, n'aggyayo ebyokulwanyisa by'obusungu bwe. Kubanga Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, alinayo eky'okukola mu nsi y'Abakaludeya." 
Jeremiah50:26 Mumulumbe okuva mu buli nsonda, mwabye amawanika ge; mumutuume ntuumu ng'ez'eŋŋano, mumusaanyeewo obutamulekerawo basigalawo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Ente ze zonna ennume ento muzitte; ziserengete mu bbaagiro. Zirabye! Olunaku luzikeeredde: olunaku lwe ziribonerezebwa lutuuse.” 
Jeremiah50:28 Wulira: Abadduse ne bakaawonawo okuva mu nsi y'e Babiloni balangirira mu Siyoni, okuwoolera eggwanga olw'Omukama Katonda waffe ng'awoolera eggwanga olw'Ekiggwa kye." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Kungira Babiloni abalasi b'obusaale, na bonna abamanyi okuweta omusaale. Mumuzingize, temuleka n'omu kutoloka; Mumusasule olw'ebikolwa bye; mumukole nga ye bwe yakola. Kubanga yeekuliza ku Mukama, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Abavubuka baamu baligwa mu nguudo zaakyo, n'abatabaazi baakyo bonna balibakomya ku olwo,” Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Ggwe omwekuza, nkuli bukiika,” Omukama Katonda w'Amagye y'agamba. “Olunaku lukukeereredde, obudde obw'okubonerezebwa kwo." 
Jeremiah50:32 Omwekuza alisirittuka n'agwa, tewaliba amusitulawo. Mu bibuga bye nzija kukoleezaamu omuliro, gusenkenye byonna ebyetooloddewo." 
Jeremiah50:33 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Abantu ba Yisirayeli banyigirizibwa, n'abantu ba Yuda nabo bwe batyo. Bonna abaabawamba babanywezezza, bagaanye okubata." 
Jeremiah50:34 Naye nno Omununuzi waabwe wa maanyi, Omukama w'Amagye lye linnya lye. Aliwolereza ensonga zaabwe n'amaanyi, ensi agiwe obuweerero, naye bo abali mu Babiloni abatabangule." 
Jeremiah50:35 “Ekitala kiri ku Bakaludeya, Omukama y'agamba, kiri ku basula mu Babiloni, ne ku bakungu n'abagezi be." 
Jeremiah50:36 Ekitala kiri ku balaguzi be, bafuuke basiru; ekitala kiri ku batabaazi be, bajjule entiisa!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Ekitala kiri ku mbalaasi ze n'ebigaali bye, ne ku bagwira mu ggye lye, bafuuke bakazi! Ekitala kiri ku mawanika ge, ganyagululwe!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Ekyeya ku mazzi ge, gakalire! Kubanga eno ensi ya bifaananyi bya balubaale, ebifaananyi bya balubaale babigwiriddeko eddalu." 
Jeremiah50:39 Emisambwa n'emisege bye binaabeerangayo, ne maaya gye zinaasulanga; tekiriddayo kusengwamu nnaku zonna." 
Jeremiah50:40 Nga Katonda bwe yazikiriza Sodoma ne Gomorra n'emiriraano gyabyo, Omukama y'ayogera, teriba muntu asulamu, teriba n'omu asengamu." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Abantu baabo bava emambuka, eggwanga eddene ne bakabaka abangi, bakungiddwa okuva ku nkingi z'ensi." 
Jeremiah50:42 Babagalidde emisaale n'obujogolo; bakambwe, tebalina kisa. Okuwuuma kwabwe kuli ng'okuyira kw'ennyanja. Beebagadde ku mbalaasi, bajja ng'eggye eritaze okulwanyisa ggwe, muwala wa Babiloni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Kabaka w'e Babiloni amawulire gaabwe gamutuuse, emikono ne gimulagaya, ennaku n'emukwata, okulumwa ng'okw'omukazi azaala." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Ng'empologoma efubutuka mu bisaka by'oku Yorudani okulaga mu ddundiro eddungi, bwe ndibagobawo mu kabanga bubanga. Ani mulondobe gwe ndissaawo ku lwa kino? Ani kale annenkana? Ani alimpawaabira? Era musumba ki asobola okuŋŋumira?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Kale nno muwulire Omukama ky'ateeserezza Babiloni, ne by'alowooleza ensi y'Abakaludeya: ebijuujulu mu ggana balibiwalaawala; amalundiro gaabwe aligazikiririza ddala olw'okubeera bo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ensi erikankana bwe baliwulira nga Babiloni awambiddwa, Eddoboozi ly'omulanga gwe liriwulirwa mu mawanga.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Babiloni n'abantu b'omu Lebu-Kamayi nzija kubasiikuulira omuyaga ddekabusa. 
Jeremiah51:2 Babiloni nzija kumusindikira abagwira; bagenda kumuwewa, bavunjage ensi ye; bagenda kumuzingiza ku njuyi zonna ku lunaku olw'akabi." 
Jeremiah51:3 Omulasi tomukkiriza kuweta musaale gwe, na kussaako kizibawo kye eky'ekyuma, n'abavubuka be temubataliza, wabula eggye lyonna mulizikirize." 
Jeremiah51:4 Abattiddwa baligwa mu nsi ya Kaludeya; n'abafumite mu nguudo ze. 
Jeremiah51:5 Kubanga Yisirayeli ne Yuda sibaabuliddwa Katonda waabwe, Omukama w'Amagye; newandibadde nga yo ensi yaabwe ejjudde bisobyo mu maaso g'Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Mudduke, muve mu Babiloni; buli omu awonye obulamu bwe, muleme kuzikirira mu kibonerezo kye. Buno bwe budde bw'Omukama obw'okuwoolera eggwanga; ajja kumuddiza ekimusaanidde." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni kyali kikompe kya zaabu mu mikono gy'Omukama; kyatamiizanga ensi yonna; amawanga gaanywa ku viini yaakyo, kwe kulaluka." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babiloni agudde mangu n'abetenteka; Mumukubire ebiwoobe! Munoonye amasanda g'eddagala olw'ekiwundu kye, oboolyawo n'awona." 
Jeremiah51:9 ‘Twandiwonyezza Babiloni, naye yagaana okuwona; tumuleke, buli omu yeddire mu nsi ye, kubanga omusango gwe gutuuse ne ku ggulu, gutumbidde okutuuka ku bire." 
Jeremiah51:10 Omukama alaze nga bwe tuli abatuufu. Mujje tulombojjere mu Siyoni Omukama Katonda waffe by'akoze.’ 
Jeremiah51:11 “Musongole obusaale, mukwate engabo; Omukama asiikudde omutima gwa bakabaka b'Abamedi, kubanga ky'ateesezza ku Babiloni kya kuzikiriza; kubanga Omukama ajja kuwoolera eggwanga, okuwoolera eggwanga olw'Ekiggwa kye." 
Jeremiah51:12 Musimbe bendera okwolekeza bbugwe wa Babiloni; mwongere ku bakuumi, musseewo abalabirira; mutegeke okuzinda. Kubanga Omukama aliko kye yateesa era akituukirizza, kye yalangirira ku bantu b'omu Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Ggwe asula ku mazzi amangi, ggwe afumbekedde eby'obugagga, entuuko zo zituuse; akaseera ko ak'okukutulwako." 
Jeremiah51:14 Omukama w'Amagye alayidde obulamu bwe nti: ‘Ndikujjuza abantu akeesedde ng'enzige, balikukubira obuluulu olw'obuwanguzi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:15 Yakola enkulungo y'ensi n'amaanyi ge; yabangawo ensi n'amagezi ge; n'okutegeera kwe n'abamba olubaale. 
Jeremiah51:16 Bw'abwatuka, amazzi ku ggulu ne gayira; alinnyisa ebire okuva ku nkingi z'ensi; akola eraddu okuwa enkuba, era y'aggyayo empewo mu mawanika ge." 
Jeremiah51:17 Buli muntu mubuyabuya, talina ky'amanyi; buli musaanuusa wa zaabu aswala olw'ekifaananyi kye. Ebifaananyi bye ebisaanuuse ebya balubaale bulimba busa, mu byo temuli mukka." 
Jeremiah51:18 Temuli kantu; bikoleddwa kusekererwa; mu kadde ak'okubonerezebwa kwabyo bigenda kusaanawo. 
Jeremiah51:19 Naye oyo Omugabo gwa Yakobo tafaanana ebyo, kubanga ye yakola byonna omuli ne Yisirayeli, ekika ky'obusika bwe, Omukama w'Amagye lye linnya lye." 
Jeremiah51:20 Ggwe ennyondo yange, ekyokulwanyisa kyange mu lutalo: nga ndi naawe nsanyaawo amawanga, nga ndi naawe nseseggula obwakabaka;" 
Jeremiah51:21 nga ndi naawe nseseggula embalaasi n'omwebagazi, nga ndi naawe nseseggula ekigaali n'omugoba waakyo;" 
Jeremiah51:22 nga ndi naawe nseseggula omusajja n'omukazi; nga ndi naawe nseseggula omukadde n'omuvubuka; nga ndi naawe nseseggula omulenzi n'omuwala; 
Jeremiah51:23 nga ndi naawe nseseggula omusumba n'eggana lye; nga ndi naawe nseseggula omulimi ne byalimisa; nga ndi naawe nseseggula abaamasaza n'abaami. 
Jeremiah51:24 “Kyokka ndisasuza Babiloni n'abantu bonna ab'e Kaludeya awo mu maaso gammwe olw'obugwenyufu bwonna bwe baalaga e Siyoni,” Omukama bw'agamba." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Nkuli bukiika, ggwe olusozi olusaanyaawo, ggwe azikiriza ensi yonna,” Omukama y'agamba, “nzija kukugololerako omukono gwange, nkuyiringise wansi okuva ku bbanga, nkufuule olusozi olusirisse omuliro." 
Jeremiah51:26 Tebalikuggyamu jjinja lya mu nsonda, wadde ejjinja ery'okussa mu musingi; wabula oliba matongo ag'emirembe gyonna,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah51:27 Musitule ebendera mu nsi, mufuuwe eŋŋombe mu mawanga. Mutegeke amawanga gakirumbe, mukunge obwakabaka buno bumulumbe: obwa Ararati, obwa Minni ne Asukenazi; musseewo omugabe amulwanyise, muleete embalaasi eziri ng'enzige ez'egginirizi." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mutegeke amawanga gakirumbe: bakabaka b'Abamedi, abaamasaza n'abaami baabwe n'ensi zonna ze bafuga." 
Jeremiah51:29 Ensi ekankana, yeenyoola olw'obulumi, kubanga entegeka y'Omukama ku Babiloni ekyatuukirira: ensi y'e Babiloni okugifuula amatongo nga temuli n'asulamu." 
Jeremiah51:30 Abatabaazi b'omu Babiloni bakomye okulwana; beekuumidde mu bigo byabwe; amaanyi gabawedde, bafuuse ng'abakazi; amayumba ge gakutte omuliro, emiyingo gyabwe gimenyeddwa." 
Jeremiah51:31 Bamatalisi bagobagana bugobaganyi, ababaka bagobagana bugobaganyi, okuleetera kabaka w'e Babiloni amawulire nti ekibuga kikwatiddwa ku njuyi zonna," 
Jeremiah51:32 nti emisomoko giwambiddwa; nti ebisaalu biteekeddwa omuliro; nti abasajja abatabaazi bakubiddwa encukwe. 
Jeremiah51:33 Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kino ky'agamba: “Muwala wa Babiloni ali ng'egguuliro ku lunaku lwe balirinnyirira; ebbanga lisigadde ttono obudde bwe obw'okukungulibwa butuuke.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni anvaabidde, ankavvudde; anfudde ng'ensumbi enkalu; ammize nga ssessota; ajjuzza olubuto lwe n'ebicepere byange, olwo nze n'ampandula eri." 
Jeremiah51:35 Obukambwe obwankolwako ne ku baana bange buli ku Babiloni,” abantu b'omu Babiloni bwe bagamba; “Omusaayi gwaffe gubeere ku abo abasula mu Kaludeya,” n'ab'omu Yeruzaalemu bwe bagamba." 
Jeremiah51:36 N'olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Nzija kulondoola ensonga zo, nkuwoolerere eggwanga. Ennyanja nzija kugikaza, ensulo ze nzikalize." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babiloni kirifuuka ntuumu ya mayinja, nfo ya bibe, ekintu ekyesisiwaza era ekinyoomebwa, ekifo omutasula muntu n'omu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Bonna baliwuluguma wamu ng'empologoma, balivuuma ng'obuwologoma obuto." 
Jeremiah51:39 Nga bakyabuguumiridde, ndibakolera embaga, ne mbatamiiza okutuusa nga babongoose, olwo beebake emirembe gyonna, tebalizuukuka." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndibaserengesa ng'obuliga mu bbaagiro, ng'endiga ennume n'embuzi ennume." 
Jeremiah51:41 Sesaki ddala kiwambiddwa! Ettendo ly'ensi yonna liwambibwa litya! Nga kyekango Babiloni ky'afuuse mu mawanga! 
Jeremiah51:42 Ennyanja eyambuse ku Babiloni; abuutikiddwa amayengo gaayo agevvujjuula. 
Jeremiah51:43 Ebibuga byayo bifuuse matongo; ensi enkalu, eddungu, ensi omutali muntu asulamu, omutali n'ayitamu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Nzija kubonereza Beeli mu Babiloni, mmuwanze ekyo kye yamira. Okuva kati amawanga tegakyamukuluggukirako, ne bbugwe wa Babiloni yagudde dda." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Mukiddukemu, bantu bange. Buli omu awonye obulamu bwe, mudduke obusungu bw'Omukama obwesera." 
Jeremiah51:46 Omutima gwammwe guleme kutengera, nammwe temutya; olw'eŋŋambo eziwulirwa mu nsi, anti olugambo olumu lujja mu mwaka ogumu, n'olulala ne lujja mu mwaka omulala; obukambwe buli mu nsi, n'omufuzi omu aggyako omulala." 
Jeremiah51:47 Kyo kituufu, ennaku zijja lwe nnaabonereza ebifaananyi bya balubaale eby'e Babiloni. Ensi ye yonna erikubwa ensonyi, n'abattiddwa baligaŋŋalama mu makkati ge." 
Jeremiah51:48 Olwo eggulu n'ensi na byonna ebirimu biriyimba n'essanyu ku Babiloni, kubanga okuva emambuka abazikiriza bamujjira,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babiloni kiteekwa okugwa olw'abattibwa mu Yisirayeli, ng'abattibwa wonna mu nsi bwe baagwa olwa Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:50 Mmwe abawonye ekitala mugende, temwesiisa! Mujjukire Omukama nga muyima ewala, ne Yeruzaalemu abajje ku mutima." 
Jeremiah51:51 Twaswadde, kubanga twawulira ebivumo; amaaso gaffe gajjudde okuswala, kubanga abagwira baayingira mu bifo ebitukuvu eby'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Jeremiah51:52 “Kale nno, ennaku zijja, Omukama y'agamba, lwe nnaabonereza ebifaananyi bye ebya balubaale; era mu nsi ye yonna abaafumitibwa balisinda." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babiloni ne bw'anaatumbiira n'atuuka eggulu, n'anyweza eminaala gye emitumbiivu, abalimuzikiriza baliva gye ndi,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Jeremiah51:54 Eddoboozi ly'emiranga lifuluma mu Babiloni, eddoboozi ly'okuzikiriza okunene liva mu nsi y'Abakaludeya." 
Jeremiah51:55 Omukama azikirizza Babiloni; eddoboozi lye eddene alisirisizza. Amayengo gaabwe gayira ng'amazzi amangi; eddoboozi ly'okuvvujjuula kwagwo liyira. 
Jeremiah51:56 Kubanga abazikiriza batuuse e Babiloni; abazira abaliyo bawambiddwa, emisaale gyabwe gimenyeddwa, kubanga Omukama Katonda awoolera eggwanga, talema kuddiza." 
Jeremiah51:57 “Nzija kutamiiza abakungu n'abagezi be, era n'abaamasaza be, abaami n'abazira; balyebaka otulo twa mirembe gyonna, tebalizuukuka,” y'agamba Kabaka, Omukama w'Amagye lye linnya lye." 
Jeremiah51:58 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: “Bbugwe wa Babiloni omugazi wa kusendawo, n'emiryango gye emiwanvu gyokebwe omuliro. Abantu bateganira bwereere, n'amawanga geekooyeza si kirala, wabula omuliro.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Obubaka Yeremiya omulanzi bwe yawa Seraaya mutabani wa Neriya, mutabani wa Makuseeya, bwe yali agenda e Babiloni wamu ne Zedekiya kabaka wa Yuda, mu mwaka ogwokuna ogw'obwakabaka bwe. Seraaya ye yali omukulu eyakuliranga kabaka w'awummulira." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya yali awandiise mu kitabo kimu obubenje bwonna obwali bugenda okugwira Babiloni - ebigambo bino byonna ebyawandiikibwa ku Babiloni. 
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremiya yali agambye Seraaya nti: “Bw'otuukanga e Babiloni, laba nti ebigambo bino obisoma mu lwatu." 
Jeremiah51:62 Olwo n'ogamba nti: ‘Ayi Mukama, ogambye nti ojja kuzikiriza ekifo kino wabulewo ensolo esulamu oba omuntu asulamu, lisigale matongo ag'emirembe gyonna.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Bw'omalanga okusoma ekitabo kino, ng'okisibako ejjinja, ng'okikasuka mu Furaati" 
Jeremiah51:64 eno nga bw'olaamiriza nti: ‘Babiloni bwe kirisaanawo kityo; tekiriddamu kusituka olw'akabi nze ke nnaakireetera.’ ” Ebigambo bya Yeremiya wano we bikoma. 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya yafuuka kabaka nga wa myaka abiri mu gumu; mu Yeruzaalemu yafugiramu emyaka kkumi na gumu. Nnyina ye yali Kamutali muwala wa Yeremiya ow'e Libuna. 
Jeremiah52:2 Yakola ekibi mu maaso g'Omukama nga Yoyakimu bwe yakola. 
Jeremiah52:3 Bino byonna byagwira Yeruzaalemu ne Yuda olw'obusungu bwa Katonda, obwamuleetera okubagoba mu maaso ge. Kati nno Zedekiya yagenda n'ajeemera kabaka w'e Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Awo mu mwaka ogwomwenda ogw'obwakabaka bwe, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni n'eggye lye lyonna yalumba Yeruzaalemu, ne basiisira ebweru wakyo ne bazimba ekikomera okukyetooloola." 
Jeremiah52:5 Ekibuga ne bakizingiza okutuusa mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu ogw'obwakabaka bwa Zedekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ku lwomwenda olw'omwezi ogwokuna enjala mu kibuga n'ekanya, abantu mu nsi nga tebakyalina kaakulya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Bbugwe w'ekibuga ne bamubomola, abasajja bonna abatabaazi ne batoloka mu kibuga ekiro nga bayitira mu muzigo oguli wakati w'ebisenge ebibiri ng'olaga ku nnimiro ya kabaka, newandibadde nga Abakaludeya baali bakitaayizza, ne bakwata ekkubo eriraga mu Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Eggye ly'Abakaludeya ne liwondera kabaka ne limukwatira mu lusenyi lwa Yeriko, eggye lye lyonna ne limwabulira, ne libuna emiwabo." 
Jeremiah52:9 Kabaka ne bamuwamba, ne bamutwala ewa kabaka w'e Babiloni e Ribula mu nsi y'e Kamati, n'amusalira omusango." 
Jeremiah52:10 Eyo e Ribula kabaka w'e Babiloni n'attira batabani ba Zedekiya awo mu maaso ge, era n'atta n'abakungu ba Yuda bonna." 
Jeremiah52:11 Amaaso ga Zedekiya n'agatungulamu, n'amusiba n'enjegere ez'ekikomo, n'amutwala e Babiloni, n'amusuula mu kkomera okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yafa." 
Jeremiah52:12 Mu mwezi ogwokutaano, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omwenda ogwa Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka w'e Babiloni yajja e Yeruzaalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 N'ayokya Ekiggwa ky'Omukama n'olubiri lwa kabaka n'ennyumba zonna mu Yeruzaalemu; buli kizimbe ekyegasa n'akyokya omuliro. 
Jeremiah52:14 Eggye lyonna ery'Abakaludeya eryali n'omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka ne limenyawo bbugwe wa Yeruzaalemu ku njuyi zonna. 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka n'atwala abaali basinga obwavu mu bantu n'abalala abaali bakyasigadde mu kibuga, n'abaali beegasse ku kabaka w'e Babiloni, n'abantu abalala abafundi." 
Jeremiah52:16 Naye Nebuzaradani Omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka yalekamu mu abasinga obwavu mu ggwanga ng'abakozi mu mizabbibu n'ennimiro. 
Jeremiah52:17 Abakaludeya baamenya empagi ez'ekikomo ezaali mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, obutandaalo n'Ennyanja ey'ekikomo ebyali mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama, n'ekikomo kyabyo kyonna ne bakitwala mu Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Baatwala n'entamu, ebitiiyo, makansi, ebijiiko n'ebintu byonna eby'ekikomo ebyeyambisibwanga mu kuweereza mu Kiggwa." 
Jeremiah52:19 Omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka era yatwala ebinaabirwamu, ebyoterezo n'ebibya eby'okumansira, entamu, ebikondo by'ettawaaza, ebibya n'essowaani ebikozesebwa ku bitone eby'okuyiwa, na byonna ebyali ebya zaabu omulungi n'ebya ffeeza." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ekikomo ekyava mu mpagi ebbiri, Ennyanja n'obutandaalo Solomoni bye yali akoledde e Kiggwa ky'Omukama, ekikomo ekyava mu bintu bino byonna, kyalema empima." 
Jeremiah52:21 Empagi emu ng'eriko emikono kkumi na munaana mu buwanvu, ng'obwetooloovu ya mikono kkumi n'ebiri; omubiri gwayo nga guweza engalo nnya obunene; yalimu omuwulungwa wakati." 
Jeremiah52:22 Enkata ey'ekikomo ku mutwe gw'empagi emu nga ya mikono etaano obuwanvu; yali etoneddwa n'akatimba n'amakomamawanga okwetooloola entwe nga byonna bya kikomo; n'empagi eyookubiri n'amakomamawanga gaakwo yali ewundiddwa mu ngeri ye emu. 
Jeremiah52:23 Amakomamawanga gaali kyenda mu mukaaga ku njuyi zonna. Amakomamawanga gonna awamu gaali kikumi agaali mu butimba okwetooloola. 
Jeremiah52:24 Omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka yatwala Seraaya kabona omukulu, Zefaniya kabona owookubiri n'abakuumi b'oku mulyango abasatu." 
Jeremiah52:25 Mu kibuga yatwalamu omugabe omu eyali omukulu w'abatabaazi, abasajja musanvu mikwano gya kabaka be yasangiriza mu kibuga, n'omuwandiisi w'omukulu w'eggye eyawandiisanga abayingira eggye ly'eggwanga, n'abasajja nkaaga ab'eggye ly'eggwanga abaali basangiddwa mu kibuga." 
Jeremiah52:26 Bonna abo Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka yabatwala eri kabaka w'e Babiloni mu Ribula. 
Jeremiah52:27 Kabaka w'e Babiloni n'abakuba n'abattira mu Ribula mu nsi y'e Kamati. Bw'atyo Yuda n'aggyibwa mu nsi ye n'awaŋŋangusibwa. 
Jeremiah52:28 Bano be bantu Nebukadurezzari be yawaŋŋangusa: mu mwaka ogwomusanvu Abayudaaya enkumi ssatu mu abiri mu basatu; 
Jeremiah52:29 mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana ogwa Nebukadurezzari abantu abaggyibwa mu Yeruzaalemu baali lunaana mu asatu mu babiri; 
Jeremiah52:30 mu mwaka ogw'abiri mu esatu ogwa Nebukadurezzari, Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka yatwala Abayudaaya lusanvu mu ana mu bataano. Bonna wamu be bantu enkumi nnya mu lukaaga. Yoyakini addirwamu" 
Jeremiah52:31 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu omusanvu ogw'okuwaŋŋangusibwa kwa Yoyakini kabaka wa Yuda, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, ku lunaku olwabiri mu olumu, Evili-Merodaki kabaka w'e Babiloni, mu mwaka ogusooka ogw'obwakabaka bwe, yakwatirwa ekisa Yoyakini kabaka wa Yuda n'amusumulula mu kkomera." 
Jeremiah52:32 Yayogeranga naye bulungi; n'amuwa entebe ey'ekitiibwa eyali esukkulumye ku ntebe za bakabaka banne abaali naye mu Babiloni. 
Jeremiah52:33 Yoyakini n'akyusa ebyambalo by'obusibe, era yaliiranga bulijjo ku mmeeza ya kabaka ebbanga lyonna ery'obulamu bwe." 
Jeremiah52:34 Ku kulabirirwa, yabwewanga ensako ye bulijjo okuva ewa kabaka wa Babiloni buli lunaku ebbanga lyonna ery'obulamu bwe okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yafa." 
Lamentations1:1 Kisigadde kitya ettayo ekibuga ekyali kijjudde abantu? Kifuuse kitya nga nnamwandu olumu ekyali ekitutumufu mu mawanga? Ekyali omumbejja mu matwale, kati kissiddwa ku kasanvu." 
Lamentations1:2 Akaaba obutasiriikirira ekiro kyonna, amaziga gamukulukutira ku matama. Mu baganzi be bonna temuli amukubagiza; mikwano gye bonna bamusalidde enkwe, bamufuukidde balabe." 
Lamentations1:3 Yuda yagenda mu buwaŋŋanguse oluvannyuma lw'ennaku n'okutuntuzibwa. Asula eyo mu mawanga, naye tasanga buweerero. Abamukijjanya bonna bamukutte wakati mu nnaku ze." 
Lamentations1:4 Amakubo ga Siyoni gakungubaga kubanga tewali bajja ku mbaga ze enkulu eziragiddwa. Emiryango gye gyonna mikalu, ne bakabona be basinda; bawala be embeerera badooba, naye yennyini ennaku emuyinze." 
Lamentations1:5 Abalabe be kati be bakama be; bo abalabe be bali mirembe. Omukama amulabizza ennaku olw'okubeera emisango gye emingi. Abaana be bagenze mu busibe, be bakulembeddemu omulabe." 
Lamentations1:6 Muwala wa Siyoni ekitiibwa kimuwedde, abakungu be bali ng'ennangaazi ezibuliddwako eddundiro; badduka nga tebaliimu twanyi mu maaso g'ababagoba." 
Lamentations1:7 Yeruzaalemu ajjukira ennaku z'okubonaabona kwe n'okubungabunga n'eby'obugagga bwe byonna mu nnaku ez'edda; abantu be lwe baagwa mu mikono gy'abalabe, waabula adduukirira; abalabe be bamutunuulira ne baseka okulaba ng'azikirira." 
Lamentations1:8 Yeruzaalemu yayonoonera ddala, kyavudde afuuka ekintu ekyenyinyalwa, bonna abaamugulumizanga bamugaya, kubanga baalaba obwereere bwe; ye yennyini asinda n'akyukira eri." 
Lamentations1:9 Obujama bwe bukwatidde ku mivuluya gye, teyalowooza ku binaamujjira. Engwa ye kyeyava yeewuunyisa, nga talina n'amukubagiza. “Ayi Mukama, laba bwe mbonaabona, kubanga omulabe wange awangudde!”" 
Lamentations1:10 Omulabe yakuba amagalo ku byobugagga bwe byonna. Yalaba ab'amawanga bwe bayingira mu kitukuvu kye, abo be wali ogaanyi okuyingira mu lukuŋŋaana lwo." 
Lamentations1:11 Abantu be bonna basinda, banoonya akookulya; eby'omuwendo byabwe baabiwaayo bagule emmere bezzeemu ku twanyi. “Ayi Mukama, tunula, naawe olabe, kubanga nnyoomeddwa.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Kino tekibakwatako, mwenna abayita wano? Mutunule, mulabe: waliyo ennaku eri ng'ennaku yange gye bandabisa, Omukama gye yantegekera ku lunaku olw'okwesera kw'obusungu bwe?" 
Lamentations1:13 “Yansindikira omuliro okuva waggulu, n'agusenseza mu magumba gange; ebigere byange n'abitaayiza n'ekitimba; anzizizza ennyuma, andese matongo, olunaku lwonna ndi awo nnyenjebuse." 
Lamentations1:14 “Emisango gyange yagisibamu ekikoligo, n'engalo ze ati n'agitugga wamu; ginnyambaziddwa mu bulago; amaanyi gange aganafuyizza. Omukama ampaddeyo mu mikono gy'abo be siyinza kuziyiza." 
Lamentations1:15 “Omukama azize abatabaazi bange bonna abali ewange; ayise eggye linnwanyise, libetente abavubuka bange. Omukama asogola mu ssogolero ly'evviini, asambiridde embeerera muwala wa Yuda." 
Lamentations1:16 “Kyenva nkaaba olwa bino byonna; amaaso gange gattulukuka amaziga, kubanga eyandinkubagizza andi wala, oyo eyandinzizizzaamu amaanyi. Abaana bange balekeddwa awo ttayo, kubanga omulabe asinzizza amaanyi." 
Lamentations1:17 “Siyoni akubiira emikono, naye tewali amukubagiza. Omukama alagidde ku Yakobo nti baliraanwa be bafuuke balabe be. Yeruzaalemu afuuse ng'ekyenyinyalwa mu makkati gaabwe." 
Lamentations1:18 “Omukama mutuukirivu, kubanga najeemera ekiragiro kye. Ayi amawanga mwenna, muwulire, era mulabe ennaku zange: bawala bange embeerera n'abavubuka bagenze mu busibe." 
Lamentations1:19 “Nayita mikwano gyange, naye bandese mu bbanga; bakabona bange n'abakadde bazikiriridde mu kibuga nga banoonya akamere bezzeemu ku ndasi." 
Lamentations1:20 “Ayi Mukama, laba bwe ndi mu nnaku, munda mumbabuukirira; omutima gunfuukuuse muli, kubanga ddala nali mujeemu. Ebweru ekitala kiwemmenta, ate ekiri mu nyumba kiri ng'olumbe." 
Lamentations1:21 “Wulira bwe nsinda, naye tewali ankubagiza. Abalabe bange bonna bawulidde ku kabi ke ndimu, ne basanyukira kye wakola. Leeta olunaku lwe walangirira, nabo bafaanane nga nze." 
Lamentations1:22 “Okwonoona kwabwe kwonna kujje mu maaso go; nabo bakole nga bwe wankola olw'emisango gyange gyonna. Okusinda kwange kungi, n'omutima gwange muyenjebufu.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Nga Omukama mu busungu bwe abisse muwala wa Siyoni ne kazigizigi! Ekitiibwa kya Yisirayeli akiwanudde okuva mu ggulu n'akikuba ku nsi; mu lunaku lw'obusungu bwe, tajjukidde na muziziko gwa bigere bye." 
Lamentations2:2 Omukama asaanyizzaawo awatali kusaasira ebisulo bya Yakobo byonna; mu busungu bwe azikirizza ebigo bya muwala wa Yuda; asudde ku ttaka n'aswaza obwakabaka n'abakungu baabwo. 
Lamentations2:3 Mu busungu bwe obwesera akutuddeko obuyinza bwa Yisirayeli bwonna. Yakisa ddyo we ataasa omulabe bwe yasembera; ayaka mu Yakobo ng'omuliro ogubuubuuka, ogwokya buli kigwetoolodde." 
Lamentations2:4 Omusaale gwe aguwese ng'omulabe, ddyo we mwetegefu; ng'omulabe asanjaze bonna abaali basanyusa okulaba; ku weema y'omuwala wa Siyoni abunduguddeko essungu lye ng'omuliro." 
Lamentations2:5 Omukama afuuse ng'omulabe, Yisirayeli amumize bugobo; amize bugobo embiri ze zonna, ebigo bye byonna abisaanyizzaawo, ayongedde obungi eri muwala wa Yuda okukuba ebiwoobe n'okukungubaga." 
Lamentations2:6 Amenyeewo ekisulo kye ng'ennimiro, azikirizza ekifo kye eky'ensisinkano. Omukama yeerabizza Siyoni embaga ze enkulu eziragiddwa ne Sabbaato; mu busungu bwe anyoomye kabaka ne kabona." 
Lamentations2:7 Omukama azize omwaliiro gwe, yeenyiye ekitukuvu kye; awaddeyo mu mikono gy'omulabe ebisenge by'amayumba ge. Basitudde oluyoogaano mu nnyumba y'Omukama nga ku mbaga enkulu eziragiddwa." 
Lamentations2:8 Omukama yamalirira okumenyawo bbugwe abugiriza muwala wa Siyoni; yamupimako n'olukoba olupima, omukono gwe teyaguziyiza kuzikiriza, n'aleka bbugwe n'ekigo okukaaba, byombi ne biyenjebuka." 
Lamentations2:9 Emiryango gye gisse mu ttaka, emiyingo gye yagyonoona n'agimenya. Kabaka we n'abakungu be bawaŋŋangusiddwa mu mawanga; etteeka tewakyali n'abalanzi be tebakyafuna kulabikirwa kuva wa Mukama." 
Lamentations2:10 Abakadde ba muwala wa Siyoni batudde ku ttaka mu kasirise; beeyiiridde evvu ku mitwe gyabwe, beesibye ebikutiya; bawala ba Yeruzaalemu embeerera, bakotekedde emitwe gyabwe ku ttaka." 
Lamentations2:11 Amaaso gange gayimbadde olw'okukaaba; munda mumbabuukirira. Omutima gwange guyiise ku ttaka olw'okuzikirira kw'omuwala w'abantu bange; kubanga omuto n'omuwere bagudde eŋŋanzi mu nguudo z'ekibuga. 
Lamentations2:12 Bakaabirira bannyaabwe nti: “Eŋŋano n'evviini biruwa?” bwe baabanga bayenjebuse ng'abafumite ku nguudo z'ekibuga, bwe baabanga batondokera ku mibiri gya bannyaabwe." 
Lamentations2:13 Nnaakwogerako ki, nnaakugeranya ku ki, ayi muwala wa Yeruzaalemu? Nnaakufaananya ki ndyoke nkukubagize, ayi embeerera, muwala wa Siyoni? Ekiwundu kye kyenkana ennyanja obuwanvu; ani anaakuwonya?" 
Lamentations2:14 Abalanzi bo bye baalabikirwa, byali bya bulimba na kuguya; tebaayerula kibi kyo ozze emikisa gyo. Bye baalabikirwanga ku ggwe bwali bulimba na kubuzaabuza." 
Lamentations2:15 Bonna ababa bayise ekkubo eryo, engalo bazikubamu okubeera ggwe, bafuuwa ekiwa ne bakunyeenyeza omutwe ku lwa muwala wa Yeruzaalemu nti: “Kino kye kibuga kye baayitanga Entikko y'Obulungi, essanyu ly'ensi yonna?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Abalabe bo bakwasamiza akamwa, bonna wamu okukuvuma; bafuuwa ekiwa ne baluma obujiji, ne bagamba nti: “Tumumize bugobo; luno lwe lunaku lwe twalindanga, tutuuse ne tulwerabirako.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Omukama akoze bye yateesa; atuukirizza kye yagamba, kye yalagira okuva edda. Azikirizza awatali kusaasira; alese omulabe n'akweyagalirako, amaanyi g'abalabe bo n'agasukkulumya." 
Lamentations2:18 Omutima gwabwe guwanjagira Omukama, Ggwe bbugwe w'omuwala wa Siyoni. Leka amaziga go gakulukute ng'omugga emisana n'ekiro; toweera, eriiso lyo tolireka kuwummula." 
Lamentations2:19 Situka, tema omulanga ekiro, mu masooka g'ebisisimuka; omutima gwo guyiwe ng'amazzi mu maaso g'Omukama; situlira gy'ali emikono gyo, olw'obulamu bw'abaana bo abayenjebuse olw'enjala mu buli masaŋŋanzira ga luguudo." 
Lamentations2:20 “Ayi Mukama, tunula, wekkaanye: Ani gwe wali oyisizza otyo? Bwe batyo abakazi balye ezzadde lyabwe, abaana be balabiridde n'okwagala? Bakabona n'abalanzi bandittiddwa mu kitukuvu ky'Omukama?" 
Lamentations2:21 “Omwana n'omukadde beebaka wamu mu nfuufu ku luguudo; bawala bange embeerera n'abavubuka bange baafa ekitala; wabatta mu lunaku lw'obusungu bwo, wabasanjaga nga tosaasira." 
Lamentations2:22 “Wankoowoolera, nga ku lunaku olukulu, ebyentiisa okuva ku njuyi zonna. Ku lunaku lw'obusungu bw'Omukama tewaali kaawonawo, tewaali yasumattuka; be nalera ne nkuza omulabe wange abamazeewo.”" 
Lamentations3:1 Nze muntu eyalaba ennaku olw'omuggo gw'obusungu bwe. 
Lamentations3:2 Angobye n'antwala mu nzikiza, si mu kitangaala;" 
Lamentations3:3 mazima ankyusirizza omukono gwe emirundi n'emirundi olunaku lwonna. 
Lamentations3:4 Olususu lwange n'ennyama abikozzezza, amagumba gange agabwebwetudde." 
Lamentations3:5 Anzingizza n'anneetoolooza n'obukaawu n'ebizibu. 
Lamentations3:6 Antadde mu nzikiza mbeere omwo ng'abafu abaafa edda. 
Lamentations3:7 Anzimbyeko olugo sisobola kutoloka; enjegere zange azongedde obuzito. 
Lamentations3:8 Ne bwe ndeekaana ne mpanjaga essaala zange azizibiikiriza. 
Lamentations3:9 Amakubo gange agazibye n'agayinja amabajje, obukubo bwange abunyoddenyodde." 
Lamentations3:10 Ambeeredde ng'eddubu eriteeze, ng'empologoma mu bukukumo." 
Lamentations3:11 Ampugudde mu makubo gange n'antaagulataagula, andese ttayo." 
Lamentations3:12 Awese omusaale gwe n'anzisaawo ng'entomo y'obusaale bwe. 
Lamentations3:13 Alasizza mu mutima gwange obusaale bw'omufuko gwe. 
Lamentations3:14 Nfuuse eky'okusekererwa mu bantu bange, era oluyimba lwe bayeeya olunaku lwonna." 
Lamentations3:15 Anzijuzizza n'obukaawu, antamiizizza n'omususa." 
Lamentations3:16 Amannyo gange agamenyedde ku nkokoto, antoowazizza mu vvu." 
Lamentations3:17 Anzigyeeko eddembe, neerabidde n'ekiyitibwa essanyu." 
Lamentations3:18 Kyenva ŋŋamba nti: “Ettendo lyange lizaamye, n'essuubi lyange mu Mukama.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Jjukira obunaku bwange n'okubungabunga, obukaawu n'endulwe." 
Lamentations3:20 Omutima gwange gukirowoozaako butamala, omwoyo gwange gunnebbise." 
Lamentations3:21 Naye bino bye nzijukira, bwe ntyo ne nfuna essuubi:" 
Lamentations3:22 Olw'ekisa ky'Omukama tetuggweekerera, obusaasizi bwe tebukoma." 
Lamentations3:23 Buli makya bidda buggya; “Oli mwesigwa nnyo!” 
Lamentations3:24 ŋŋamba nti: “Omukama gwe mugabo gwange; kyennaava mmulindirira.” 
Lamentations3:25 Omukama mulungi eri abo abasuubira mu ye, eri abo abamunoonya." 
Lamentations3:26 Kirungi okulindirira mu kasirise okulokola kw'Omukama. 
Lamentations3:27 Kirungi omuntu okwetikka ekikoligo ng'akyali muto. 
Lamentations3:28 Atuule yekka mu kasirise, kubanga amuzitoowerezza." 
Lamentations3:29 Obwenyi bwe abuziike mu nfuufu, osanga mwe muli essuubi." 
Lamentations3:30 Ateerawo ettama oyo amukuba, ajjule ebivumo." 
Lamentations3:31 Kubanga Omukama teyeesammula muntu mirembe gyonna. 
Lamentations3:32 Newandibadde alabya ennaku, naye asaasira, kubanga ekisa kye kiyitirivu obungi." 
Lamentations3:33 Kubanga tasanyukira mu kunakuwaza n'okubonyaabonya abaana b'abantu. 
Lamentations3:34 Okulinnyirira n'ebigere abasibe bonna mu ggwanga," 
Lamentations3:35 okusendera eri eddembe ly'omuntu mu maaso g'Ali Waggulu Ddala," 
Lamentations3:36 omuntu obutalamulibwa mu bwenkanya, ebyo Omukama tabiraba?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ani oyo eyayogera ne kikolebwa Omukama nga si y'alagidde? 
Lamentations3:38 Mu kamwa k'Ali Waggulu Ddala si mwe muva ebibi n'ebirungi? 
Lamentations3:39 Lwaki omuntu omulamu yandyemulugunyizza, omuntu ng'abonerezeddwa olw'ebibi bye?" 
Lamentations3:40 Twekenneenye amakubo gaffe, tugeetegereze, tukomewo eri Omukama." 
Lamentations3:41 Tusitule emitima n'emikono gyaffe eri Katonda ali mu ggulu, tugambe nti:" 
Lamentations3:42 “Twasobya ne tujeema, naawe tosonyiye." 
Lamentations3:43 “Weebikka obusungu n'otuwondera, n'otusanjaga awatali kusaasira." 
Lamentations3:44 Weezingiridde ekire essaala kyeteesobole kuyitamu. 
Lamentations3:45 Otufudde bisejja na bisasiro mu mawanga. 
Lamentations3:46 “Abalabe baffe bonna batwasamizza akamwa. 
Lamentations3:47 Ebitugwiridde ntiisa na kugwa mu bunnya, kuvujagibwa na kusaanyizibwawo." 
Lamentations3:48 Amaaso gange gakulukuta emyala gy'amaziga olw'abantu bange okuzikirizibwa.” 
Lamentations3:49 Eriiso lyange liyiwa amaziga obutasalako, awatali kuweerako," 
Lamentations3:50 okutuusa Omukama mu ggulu lw'anaatunula wansi n'alaba. 
Lamentations3:51 Amaaso gange gandeetera okunakuwala, olw'ekigudde ku bawala b'ekibuga kyange bonna." 
Lamentations3:52 Banjigganya ng'akanyonyi abo abankyawa awatali nsonga. 
Lamentations3:53 Baageza okusaanyaawo obulamu bwange mu kinnya, ne bankasuukirira amayinja." 
Lamentations3:54 Amazzi gambikka nzenna omutwe, ne ndowooza nti: “Nfudde!”" 
Lamentations3:55 “Nakowoola erinnya lyo, ayi Mukama, nga nnyima ku ntobo y'ekinnya." 
Lamentations3:56 Wawulira okuwanjaga kwange: ‘Toggala matu go nga mpanjaga onnyambe.’ 
Lamentations3:57 Bwe nakukoowoola, wasembera, n'oŋŋamba nti: ‘Totya.’" 
Lamentations3:58 “Ayi Mukama, otadde omwoyo ku nsonga yange, owonyezza obulamu bwange." 
Lamentations3:59 Ayi Mukama, olabye akabi ke bankola, lamula ensonga yange." 
Lamentations3:60 Olabye ekkonda lyabwe bwe lyenkana, byonna bye banneewereddemu." 
Lamentations3:61 “Ayi Mukama, owulidde okuvuma kwabwe, byonna bye banneewereddemu:" 
Lamentations3:62 obwama n'okumuumuunya kw'abansitukiddemu nga bandiko olunaku lwonna. 
Lamentations3:63 Laba, babe nga batudde oba nga bayimiridde, nze luyimba lwe bayeeya." 
Lamentations3:64 “Ayi Mukama, basasule ng'ogerera ku mikono gyabwe bye gyakola." 
Lamentations3:65 Bawe okuguguba mu mutima, n'ebikolimo byo bibabeereko." 
Lamentations3:66 Mu busungu bwo bawondere obasaanyeewo wansi w'eggulu lyo, ayi Mukama.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Zaabu afumye atya, zaabu omulungi atalazze atya? Amayinja amatukuvu gasaasaanye mu nsonda ya buli luguudo." 
Lamentations4:2 Batabani ba Siyoni abaali ab'omuwendo ab'ebbeeyi okwenkana zaabu omukuŋŋunte, batwalibwa batya ng'ensumbi ez'ebbumba, omulimu gw'emikono gy'omubumbi?" 
Lamentations4:3 N'ebibe biggyayo amabeere gaabyo ne biyonsa obwana bwabyo; naye muwala w'abantu bange akambuwadde nga maaya mu ddungu. 
Lamentations4:4 Olulimi lw'omuwere ayonka lumukwatidde ku kibuno olw'ennyonta; amabujje gaasaba emmere, naye tewaali agigawa." 
Lamentations4:5 Abaalyanga ebicepere bataayira mu nguudo; abaakulira mu ngoye entwakaavu baavulira mu lubungo. 
Lamentations4:6 Ekibi ky'omuwala w'abantu bange kinene n'okusinga ekya Sodoma, ekyazikirizibwa mu kaseera obuseera nga tewali na mukono gukikutteko." 
Lamentations4:7 Abakungu baakyo baali basinga omuzira okutukula, nga beeru okusinga amata, emibiri gyabwe nga mimyufu okukira eddulu, mu ndabika baali ng'ejjinja lya saffiro." 
Lamentations4:8 Naye kati mu ndabika baddugala okusinga enziro, ku nguudo tebakyategeerekeka, ensusu zaabwe zetuggidde ku magumba gaabwe, zikaze okwenkana oluku." 
Lamentations4:9 Abattibwa ekitala baali kale kale okusinga abaafa enjala; abo abaafumitibwa bakenena olw'okubulwa akookulya okuva mu nnimiro. 
Lamentations4:10 N'emikono gyabwe abakazi ab'omutima omusaasizi baafumba abaana baabwe; abo ye yali emmere yaabwe nga muwala w'abantu bange azikiriziddwa. 
Lamentations4:11 Omukama alaze obuswandi bwe bwonna, afukumudde obusungu bwe obwesera, ateekedde omuliro mu Siyoni, oguwemmense emisingi gyakyo." 
Lamentations4:12 Bakabaka b'ensi tebakkiriza, wadde bonna abasula mu nkulungo y'ensi, nti omulabe n'omuzigu baliyingira mu miryango gya Yeruzaalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Naye ekyo kyabaawo olw'ebibi by'abalanzi be n'olw'obugwenyufu bwa bakabona be abaayiwa mu makkati ge omusaayi gw'abatuukirivu. 
Lamentations4:14 Baatangatanga mu nguudo nga bamuzibe, nga basaabaanye omusaayi, ne wataba n'omu asobola kukwata ku byambalo byabwe." 
Lamentations4:15 “Mugende, temuli balongoofu,” bwe batyo bwe baabawereekerezanga, “mugende, mugende, temubaako kye mukwatako!” Bwe badduka, baatangatanga, ab'amawanga ne bagamba nti: “Na wano tebajja kusengawo.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Omukama yennyini abasaasaanyizza, takyaddamu kubatunuulira; bakabona tebassibwamu kitiibwa, n'abakadde tebaalagwa kisa." 
Lamentations4:17 Amaaso gaffe gayimbadde olw'okutunula nga tulinda obuyambi obutajja; twayima mu minaala gyaffe ne tulindirira, eggwanga eritaasobola kutulokola." 
Lamentations4:18 Basuula enkessi buli we tuyita, tuleme kuyita mu makubo gaffe; entuuko zaffe zisembedde; ennaku zaffe zisigadde mbale, kubanga enkomerero yaffe etuuse." 
Lamentations4:19 Abaali batuwondera baali bawenyuka okusinga empungu ez'oku ggulu; baatugoba okutuyisa mu nsozi, ne batuteegera mu ddungu." 
Lamentations4:20 Omukka gw'emivumbo gyaffe, omusiige w'Omukama, yakwatirwa mu mutego gwabwe, oyo gwe twayogerangako nti: “Mu kisiikirize kyo mwe tunaabeeranga nga tuli eyo mu mawanga.”" 
Lamentations4:21 Sanyuka ojaganye, muwala wa Edomu ggwe asula mu nsi y'e Wuuzi; naye n'ewuwo ekikompe kiriweerezebwayo; olitamiira ne weereka bukunya." 
Lamentations4:22 Ekibonerezo ky'obugwenyufu bwo kiwedde, ayi muwala wa Siyoni, takyakukuumidde mu buwaŋŋanguse nate; naye ggwe, muwala wa Edomu, ajja kubonereza obugwenyufu bwo, ayanike ebibi byo." 
Lamentations5:1 Ayi Katonda, jjukira ekitugwiridde; tunula, olabe obuswavu bwaffe." 
Lamentations5:2 Obusika bwaffe buweereddwayo mu bagwira, n'amaka gaffe mu b'amawanga." 
Lamentations5:3 Tufuuse bamulekwa, abataliiko kitaabwe, bannyaffe bali nga bannamwandu." 
Lamentations5:4 Amazzi gaffe tunywa ga ssente, n'enku zaffe zijjirako omuwendo." 
Lamentations5:5 Tusindikirizibwa n'ekikoligo ku nsingo, tukooye, naye tetuweebwa kuwummula." 
Lamentations5:6 Twayanjalira Misiri ne Assuri engalo tufuneyo ku mmere emala. 
Lamentations5:7 Bajjajjaffe baayonoona; tebakyaliwo, kati ffe twetisse obuzito bw'ebibi byabwe." 
Lamentations5:8 Abaddu be batufuga, ate tewali atununula mu mikono gyabwe." 
Lamentations5:9 Okufuna ekyokulya tutunda mwoyo, olw'okubeera ekitala mu ddungu." 
Lamentations5:10 Olususu lwaffe lwokya ng'akabiga olw'olubabu lw'enjala. 
Lamentations5:11 Abakazi mu Siyoni bagwagwawaziddwa, n'abawala embeerera mu bibuga bya Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Abakungu baasibwa emikono ne baleebesebwa ku kalabba, n'abakadde tebassibwamu kitiibwa." 
Lamentations5:13 Abavubuka babbinkana n'emmengo, obulenzi bugwirana n'ebinywa by'enku." 
Lamentations5:14 Abakadde bavudde ku nzigi z'ekibuga, n'abavubuka basirissa ennyimba zaabwe." 
Lamentations5:15 Essanyu lituwedde ku mutima, amazina gaffe gafuuse miranga." 
Lamentations5:16 Engule ewanuse ku mitwe gyaffe. Zitusanze, kubanga twayonoona!" 
Lamentations5:17 Olw'ekyo emitima gyaffe gyennyise; olw'ebyo amaaso gaffe gayimbadde," 
Lamentations5:18 olw'olusozi Siyoni olwabuliddwa, ebibe nga bye bitaayaaya wonna." 
Lamentations5:19 Sso ggwe, ayi Mukama, ofuga emirembe gyonna; nnamulondo yo ya kubeerawo mu mazadde n'amazadde." 
Lamentations5:20 Lwaki okutwerabira bulijjo? Lwaki otwabulira ebbanga eggwanvu lityo? 
Lamentations5:21 Tuzze gy'oli, Ayi Mukama, tudde, ennaku zaffe zizze buggya nga luli edda." 
Lamentations5:22 Wabula mpozzi ng'otusuulidde ddala, ng'otusunguwalidde nnyo." 
Ezekiel1:1 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu, mu mwezi ogwokuna, ku lunaku olwookutaano olw'omwezi, bwe nali mu bawaŋŋangusibwa okumpi n'omugga Kebari, eggulu ne libikkuka, ne ndaba okulabikirwa kwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ku lunaku olwookutaano olw'omwezi, gwe gwali omwaka ogwokutaano ogw'okuwaŋŋangusibwa kwa kabaka Yoyakini," 
Ezekiel1:3 ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja eri Ezekyeli kabona, mutabani wa Buzi, mu nsi y'Abakaludeya, okumpi n'omugga Kebari; omukono gw'Omukama gwamuliko eyo." 
Ezekiel1:4 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba kikuŋŋunta ng'afulumye emambuka, n'ekire ekinene ekyetooloddwa ekitangaala eky'amaanyi nga kivaamu ebimyanso by'omuliro; mu muliro wakati mwali mwaka ng'ekyuma ekyengeredde." 
Ezekiel1:5 Ate mu makkati gaagwo nga mulimu ebifaanana ng'ebiramu ebina. Byali bifaanana bwe biti: Byalina endabika ng'ey'omuntu. 
Ezekiel1:6 Buli kimu nga kirina ebyenyi bina n'ebiwaawaatiro bina. 
Ezekiel1:7 Amagulu gaabyo nga matereevu; ebigere byabyo nga biri ng'eby'akayana, nga bimyamyansa ng'ekikomo ekizigule." 
Ezekiel1:8 Wansi mu biwaawaatiro byabyo ku njuyi zaabyo ennya ng'eriyo emikono gy'omuntu. Byonna ebina byalina ebyenyi n'ebiwaawaatiro; 
Ezekiel1:9 ebiwaawaatiro byabyo nga buli kimu kikoona ku kinne waakyo. Buli kiramu kyatambulanga butereevu, tebyakyukanga nga bitambula." 
Ezekiel1:10 Amaaso gaabyo nga gafaanana bwe gati: buli kimu kyalina ekyenyi ng'eky'omuntu, n'ekyenyi ng'eky'empologoma ku luuyi olwa ddyo, n'ekyenyi ng'eky'ente ennume ku luuyi olwa kkono; ebina era byalina ekyenyi ng'eky'empungu." 
Ezekiel1:11 Amaaso gaabyo bwe gatyo bwe gaali. Ebiwaawaatiro byabyo nga byegololedde waggulu; buli kiramu kyalina ebiwaawaatiro bibiri, ng'ekimu kikoma ku kiwaawaatiro ky'ekirala ku njuyi zombi, ate ebibiri nga bibikka omubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Buli kimu kyatambulanga butereevu, omwoyo gye gwagendanga nga gye biraga, tebyakyukanga nga bitambula." 
Ezekiel1:13 Mu ndabika ebiramu bino nga bifaanana ng'amanda g'omuliro agengeredde oba ng'ebitawuliro ebyatawukanga nga biva eno bidda eri mu biramu. Omuliro nga guvaamu ekitangaala eky'amaanyi n'ebimyanso nga biva mu muliro. 
Ezekiel1:14 Ebisolo byagendanga ne bidda okufaanana ebimyanso by'eraddu. 
Ezekiel1:15 Mba ntunuulira ebiramu, ne ndaba nnamuziga emu ng'ekutte ku ttaka okumpi na buli kiramu eky'ebyenyi ebina." 
Ezekiel1:16 Enfaanana yaazo n'enkola byali bwe biti: nga zitemagana ng'ejjinja erya kirusolito, ate nga zonna ennya zifaanagana; ate mu nkola yaazo nga ziri nga namuziga omukiikiddwa nnamuziga ginnaayo." 
Ezekiel1:17 Bwe zaatambulanga, nga zigenda ku njuyi ennya ebiramu gye byabanga bitunudde; nnamuziga tezaawetanga ebiramu bwe byatambulanga." 
Ezekiel1:18 Emigo gyazo gyali miwanvu nga gyewuunyisa; emigo gyonna ena nga gijjudde amaaso okwetooloola. 
Ezekiel1:19 Ebiramu bwe byatambulanga, nga ne nnamuziga zitambulira kumpi nabyo; ebiramu bwe byesitulanga okuva ku ttaka, nga ne nnamuziga zisituka;" 
Ezekiel1:20 Yonna omwoyo gye gwagendanga nga gye biraga, ne nnamuziga nga zisitukirako, kubanga omwoyo gw'ebiramu gwabanga mu nnamuziga." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ebiramu bwe byatambulanga, nga nazo zitambula, bwe byayimiriranga, nga nazo ziyimirira; bwe byasitukanga okuva ku ttaka, nga ne nnamuziga zisitukirako, kubanga omwoyo gw'ebiramu gwabeeranga mu nnamuziga." 
Ezekiel1:22 Waggulu ku mitwe gy'ebiramu nga kubambiddwako ekyali ng'olubaale, nga kitangalijja ng'ejjinja ery'omuwendo, nga kitiisa." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ate wansi w'olubaale nga waliyo ebiwaawaatiro byabyo ebyegolodde, ng'ekimu kyegololeredde eri kinne waakyo; buli kimu kyalina ebiwaawaatiro bibiri ebibisse omubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ebiramu bwe byatambulanga, ne mpulira okuwuuma kw'ebiwaawaatiro okuli ng'okuyira okw'amazzi amangi, ng'eddoboozi ly'Omuyinza wa buli kantu, ng'eddoboozi ery'okuyira, ng'okuwuuma kw'eggye. Bwe byayimiriranga, nga bissa ebiwaawaatiro byabyo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Awo ne wabaawo eddoboozi eriva waggulu w'olubaale olwali waggulu ku mitwe gyabyo; ne biyimirira ne bissa ebiwaawaatiro byabyo. 
Ezekiel1:26 waggulu ku lubaale olwali waggulu ku mitwe gyabyo nga waliyo engeri ya nnamulondo mu jjinja erya saffiro, ate waggulu ku kiri nga nnamulondo nga kutuddeko ekifaanana ng'omuntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Nalaba ng'okuva mu kyali ng'ekiwato kye okwambuka waggulu ng'ali ng'ekyuma ekyengeredde nga kifaanana ng'omuliro ogukyetoolodde, ate okuva mu kiwato okukka nalaba ng'ekyali ng'omuliro; ekitangaala ekyakaayakana kyali kimwetoolodde." 
Ezekiel1:28 Nga musoke abeera mu bire mu budde obw'enkuba, n'okutangalijja okwamwetooloolanga bwe kwali. Okwo kwe kwali okulabika kw'enfaanana y'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama. Bwe nakiraba ne ngwa ku ttaka nga neevuunise ku maaso gange, ne mpulira eddoboozi ly'omuntu ayogera." 
Ezekiel2:1 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, yimirira ku magulu go, njogere naawe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Bwe yayogera, omwoyo ne gunzijako ne gunsimba ku magulu gange, ne mmuwulira ng'ayogera nange." 
Ezekiel2:3 N'agamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, nze nkutuma eri Abayisirayeli, eri eggwanga ejjeemu eryanjeemera; bo ne bajjajjaabwe banjeemera n'okutuusa ku lunaku luno lwennyini." 
Ezekiel2:4 Abantu gye nkutuma ba mutwe mugumu era ba mutima ogugubye; bagambe nti ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba.’ 
Ezekiel2:5 Oba bawulira oba tebawulira, anti bali nnyumba njeemu, kiryose bamanye nti omulanzi yaliko mu bo." 
Ezekiel2:6 Kale nno ggwe mwana w'omuntu, leka kubatya yadde okutya ebigambo byabwe. Totya newandibadde nga weetooloddwa amatovu n'amaggwa era ng'osula wakati mu njaba. Totya bye bagamba, n'entunula yaabwe tekutekemula, kubanga abo nnyumba njeemu." 
Ezekiel2:7 Awo nno ojja kwogera ebigambo byange gye bali, ne bwe banaawulira ne bwe bataawulire, kubanga bajeemu." 
Ezekiel2:8 Naye ggwe nno, mwana w'omuntu, wulira buli kye nnaayogera gy'oli, tojeema nga bali ennyumba enjeemu; yasamya akamwa ko olye kye ŋŋenda okukuwa.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Bwe natunula ne ndaba omukono nga gugololeddwa gye ndi; gwalimu omuzingo gw'ekitabo; 
Ezekiel2:10 n'aguzingululira mu maaso gange; gwali guwandiikiddwako munda ne kungulu oluyimba olw'okukungubaga, ebiwoobe n'ebikolimo." 
Ezekiel3:1 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, lya ky'olaba; lya, lya omuzingo guno ogende oyogere eri Abayisirayeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ne njasamya akamwa kange, n'ampa omuzingo ngulye." 
Ezekiel3:3 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, lya omuzingo gwe nkuwa ogujjuze olubuto lwo.” Ne ngulya; mu kamwa kange ne guwoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Ezekiel3:4 N'aŋŋamba era nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, genda eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli oyogere ebigambo byange gye bali." 
Ezekiel3:5 Totumibwa eri bantu ab'enjogera enkusike oba ab'olulimi oluzibu, wabula eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli;" 
Ezekiel3:6 si eri amawanga ag'enjogera enkusike oba ag'olulimi oluzibu, ab'ebigambo by'otosobola kutegeera. Singa obadde otumiddwa eri abo, bo bandikuwulidde." 
Ezekiel3:7 Yo ennyumba ya Yisirayeli teyagala kuwulira, kubanga tebaagala kumpulira, kubanga ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yonna ba mutwe mugumu, ba mutima ogugubye." 
Ezekiel3:8 Naye nze nzija kukugugubya nga bo bwe bagugubye, nzija kukufuula mukalubo nga bo bwe bakalubye." 
Ezekiel3:9 Obwenyi bwo nzija kubugumya okwenkana ejjinja erisinga obugumu businge n'olwazi obugumu. Tobatya, totekemuka mu maaso gaabwe, newandibadde nga bo nnyumba njeemu.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, wuliriza bulungi era osse mu mutima ebigambo byange byonna bye nkugamba." 
Ezekiel3:11 Genda eri abawaŋŋangusibwa, eri abaana b'eggwanga lyo, oyogere gye bali. Bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba,’ ne bwe banaawuliriza ne bwe bataawulirize.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Awo omwoyo ne gunsitula, ne mpulira emabega wange okukubagana okw'ekitalo - “Ekitiibwa ky'Omukama kitenderezebwe mu kifo kyakyo!”-" 
Ezekiel3:13 n'okuwuuma kw'ebiwaawatiro by'ebiramu ebyali nga bikubagana, n'eddoboozi lya nnamuziga mu mbiriizi zaabyo, okukubagana nga kunene." 
Ezekiel3:14 Nange omwoyo ne gunsitula ne guntwala; ne ŋŋenda nga neekyaye n'omwoyo gwange nga mwennyamivu, kubanga omukono gw'Omukama gwandiko n'amaanyi." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ne nzija eri abawaŋŋangusibwa abaali e Teli Abibu okumpi n'omugga Kebari, ne ntuula awo mu bo okumala ennaku musanvu naye nga nzenna mpuniikiridde." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ennaku omusanvu bwe zaayita, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel3:17 “Mwana w'omuntu, nkutaddewo ng'omukuumi w'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli; wuliriza nno ekigambo kye njogera obalabule ng'okiggya ku nze." 
Ezekiel3:18 Bwe ŋŋamba omubi nti: ‘Oli wa kufa,’ naye ggwe n'otomulabula, n'otoyogera kumukomako ave mu makubo ge amabi awonye obulamu bwe, omuntu oyo omubi alifiira mu kibi kye, kyokka omusaayi gwe ndigubanja ggwe." 
Ezekiel3:19 Naye bw'oba olabudde ku mubi, n'atava mu bugwenyufu bwe oba mu makubo ge amabi, alifiira mu kibi kye, kyokka ggwe oliba owonyezza obulamu bwo." 
Ezekiel3:20 N'omutuukirivu bw'alireka obutuukirivu bwe, n'ayonoona, ne nteeka mu maaso ge ekyesittazo, alifa. Kubanga tewamulabula, alifiira mu kibi kye. Eby'obutuukirivu by'aliba akoze, tebirijjukirwa, kyokka omusaayi gwe ndigubanja ggwe." 
Ezekiel3:21 Naye ggwe bw'oliba olabudde omutuukirivu, omutuukirivu oyo aleme kukola kibi, naye n'atakikola, alirama kubanga yakkiriza okubuulirirwa, naawe oliba owonyezza obulamu bwo.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Awo omukono gw'Omukama ne gunzijako awo, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Situka, ogende mu lusenyi, eyo gye nzija okwogerera naawe.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Ne nsituka, ne ŋŋenda mu lusenyi; ekitiibwa kya Katonda kyali eyo nga kiyimiridde, ng'ekitiibwa kiri kye nalaba ku mugga Kebari; ne ngwa wansi ku maaso gange." 
Ezekiel3:24 Mwoyo n'annyingiramu, n'ansimba ku magulu gange, ne nnyimirira, n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yingira, weggalire mu nnyumba yo." 
Ezekiel3:25 Naawe, omwana w'omuntu, laba, bagenda kukusiba emiguwa; ogenda kusibibwa nga tosobola kugenda mu bantu." 
Ezekiel3:26 Olulimi lwo nzija kulukwatiza ku kibuno kyo ofuuke kasiru nga tosobola kubakomako; kubanga abo nnyumba njeemu. 
Ezekiel3:27 Bwe ndyogeranga gy'oli, ng'akamwa ko nkaggula ng'obagamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba.’ Aliwulira, aliwulira; aligaana okuwulira aligaana, kubanga abo nnyumba njeemu.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Kale nno ggwe, mwana w'omuntu, kwata ekipande eky'ebbumba okisse awo mu maaso go, okubeko ekibuga Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Kizinde, kizimbeko eby'okukirwanyisa, kituumeko embibiro, kyetoolooze olusiisira, kyetoolooze endoddo ez'okukibomola." 
Ezekiel4:3 Ddira olusaniya olw'ekyuma olusse nga bbugwe ow'ekyuma wakati wo n'ekibuga; kyuka okitunuulire kibeere nga kizindiddwa, okizingize. Kano kabonero eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Ate weebakire ku mukono ggwo ogwa kkono, weetikke omusango gw'ekibi ky'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli; ojja kwetikka omusango gw'ekibi kyabwe, ennaku zonna z'onoomala nga weebakidde ku kkono." 
Ezekiel4:5 Nkusalidde ennaku ebikumi bisatu mu kyenda okwenkana n'omuwendo gw'ennaku z'ekibi kyabwe. Bw'otyo bw'ojja okwetikka omusango gw'ekibi ky'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel4:6 Bw'olimala ebyo, ne weebaka ogwokubiri, ku mulundi guno weebakire ku ddyo, weetikke omusango gw'ekibi ky'ennyumba ya Yuda. Nkusalidde ennaku amakumi ana; olunaku gwe mwaka." 
Ezekiel4:7 Olwo n'okyukira eri Yeruzaalemu ekizindiddwa, n'olanga ebinajjira Yeruzaalemu omukono gwo ogutaliiko kagoye ng'ogugolodde." 
Ezekiel4:8 Nzija kukusiba oleme kwekyusa kuva ku luuyi lumu kudda ku lulala okutuusa ng'omalirizza ennaku ez'okuzindibwa kwo. 
Ezekiel4:9 “Ddira eŋŋano, sayiri, ebijanjaalo, empokya, obulo ne kusemesi, obisse mu nsumbi emu weefumbiremu omugaati. Kw'onoolyanga mu nnaku ebikumi ebisatu mu ekyenda z'onoomala nga weebakidde ku lubiriizi." 
Ezekiel4:10 Emmere yo gy'onoolyanga buli lunaku eneezitowanga sekeli abiri; onoogiryanga mu kadde akagereddwa; 
Ezekiel4:11 n'ekipimo ky'amazzi g'onoonywanga kinenkananga ekyomukaaga kya yini; ojja kuganywanga mu kadde akagereddwa. 
Ezekiel4:12 Omugaati gwo ojja kugulyanga ng'alya obundaazi obwa sayiri; ojja kugufumbiranga awo mu maaso g'abantu nga weeyamba obubi bw'abantu.” 
Ezekiel4:13 Omukama n'agamba nti “Abayisirayeli bwe balirya batyo emmere enjama mu mawanga gye nabagobera.” 
Ezekiel4:14 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Yii! Mukama Katonda, seejaajaamyangako; okuva obuto bwange n'okutuusa kati siryanga nnyama ya kalannamye oba ebitaaguju; ennyama eyeenyinyalwa teyitangako mu kamwa kange.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Kale, mu kifo ky'obubi bw'abantu nzija kukuwa obusa bw'ente, bw'onoofumbisanga omugaati gwo.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Ate n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, nze nzija kusalako ekisakirira emmere mu Yeruzaalemu; emmere banaagiryanga ngereke nga beeraliikirivu, n'amazzi banaanywanga mu bipimo nga batekemuse," 
Ezekiel4:17 kubanga olw'emmere n'amazzi okubula, buli omu wa kukenena; baliyenjebuka olw'ebibi byabwe.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 “Kale nno, mwana w'omuntu, ddira ekitala ekyogi okikozese ng'akamwano ka kinyoozi omwe omutwe gwo n'ekirevu kyo. Ddira minzaani oyawuleyawule mu nviiri n'ebirevu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ennaku z'okuzindwa kwo nga ziwedde, yokya ekyokusatu kyabyo, okyokere mu kibuga wakati. Ddira ekitundu ekyokusatu ogende ng'okikuba n'ekiso nga weetooloola ekibuga; ate ekitundu ekyokusatu ekirala kisaasaanye mu mpewo; kubanga ndibagoba n'ekitala ekisowole." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ku nviiri ne ku birevu ojja kuggyako obutonotono obusibe ku mukugiro gw'omunagiro gwo; 
Ezekiel5:4 ate otooleko obumu, obukasuke mu muliro wakati, obwokye n'omuliro. Omwo mujja kusitukamu omuliro gubune ennyumba yonna eya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ono ye Yeruzaalemu gwe nateeka mu mawanga wakati n'ensi ne zimwetooloola wonna. 
Ezekiel5:6 Naye yajeemera ebiragiro byange n'asinga n'amawanga mu bugwenyufu, n'amateeka gange okukira ensi zonna ezimwetoolodde; yasambajja ebiragiro byange, teyagoberera mateeka gange." 
Ezekiel5:7 “Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga mwevvujjuula n'okukira amawanga agabeetoolodde, ne mutatambulira mu biragiro byange, ne mutafa ku mateeka gange, ne muteefaananya nako ku mpisa z'amawanga agabeetoolodde," 
Ezekiel5:8 n'olw'ekyo Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nange kennyini nkuli bukiika, nze nzennyini nzija kukuwa ekibonerezo mu maaso g'amawanga." 
Ezekiel5:9 Olw'okubeera ebyenyinyalwa byo byonna bye wakola, nzija kukola mu ggwe bye sikolanga era ebiringa ebyo siriddayo kubikola." 
Ezekiel5:10 Kale nno mu ggwe bakitaabwe b'abaana balirya abaana baabwe, n'abaana balirya bakitaabwe. Ndikubonereza, ne nsaasaanya mu mpewo bonna ababo abaliba basigaddewo." 
Ezekiel5:11 Awo nno, mazima nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, kubanga ojaajaamizza ekitukuvu kyange olw'ebibi byo byonna ne bye wakola ebyenyinyalwa, nange nzija kubavaamu; eriiso eryange terijja kusonyiwa; sijja kusaasira." 
Ezekiel5:12 Mu ggwe, ekitundu ekyokusatu kirifa kawumpuli oba balizikirira enjala wakati mu ggwe, ekyokusatu ekyokubiri kirifa ekitala ku njuyi zonna, ate ekyokusatu ekyokusatu nkisaasaanye mu mpewo wonna; ndibawondera n'ekitala ekisowole." 
Ezekiel5:13 Olwo obusungu bwange bulikoma n'obuswandi bwange ku bo buliweerako, ne nkubagizibwa; bwe ndimala okubamalirako obusungu bwange, balimanya nga nze Omukama nze njogedde nga zigya mu bbuba lyange." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ndikufuula matongo, eky'okusekerera mu mawanga ne mu maaso ga buli yenna ayitawo."
