Ezekiel5:15 Oliba ekivumo era eky'okusekerera, akabonero akalabula, entiisa eri amawanga agakwetoolodde bwe ndikubonereza n'obusungu n'obuswandi n'ebibonerezo ebikambwe. Nze Omukama nze njogedde." 
Ezekiel5:16 Nzija kubasindikira obusaale bwange obubi obw'enjala, obw'okubatta, bwe ndisindika mbazikirize; ndibasindikira enjala ku njala, ne mbakutula ne nkomya ekibasakirira emmere." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndibasindikira enjala n'ebisolo eby'ettale, nzija kubamalako abaana. Kawumpuli n'okuyiwa omusaayi birikuyitamu, ndikwolekeza n'ekitala, nze Omukama nze njogedde.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nga kigamba nti: 
Ezekiel6:2 “Omwana w'omuntu, amaaso go gatunuulize ensozi za Yeruzaalemu olange ng'ozoogerera." 
Ezekiel6:3 Zigambe nti: ‘Nsozi za Yisirayeli, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama Katonda. Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba ensozi n'obusozi, enkonko n'ebiwonvu: Nzija kubaleetera ekitala, era nzija kuzikiriza ebifo byammwe ebigulumivu." 
Ezekiel6:4 Nzija kusaanyaawo emyaliiro, nzija kumenyawo n'emyaliiro kwe munyookereza obubaani. Abantu bammwe abattiddwa ndibasuula awo mu maaso g'ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale." 
Ezekiel6:5 Emirambo gy'Abayisirayeli ndigisuula awo mu maaso g'ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale, n'amagumba gammwe ndigasaasaanya okwetooloola emyaliiro gyammwe." 
Ezekiel6:6 Yonna gye muli ebibuga birirekebwa matongo, ebifo ebigulumivu birisaanyizibwawo, emyaliiro gyammwe girekebwe ttayo, gisaanyizibwewo, ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale bimenyebwemenyebwe, bisaanyizibwewo, emyaliiro kwe munyookereza obubaani gimenyebwewo, ne bye mwakola bizikirizibwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Abattiddwa baligaŋŋalama awo mu makkati gammwe; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel6:8 “ ‘Ndirekawo abamu kubanga bwe mulisaasaana mu nsi ne mu mawanga abamu mu mmwe baliwona ekitala. 
Ezekiel6:9 Bakaawonawo bwe baliba eyo mu mawanga gye baatwalibwa nga basibe, balinzijukira ng'omutima gwange bwe gwannennyika olw'emitima gyabwe emyenzi egyanvaako, n'olw'amaaso gaabwe amenzi agakwatirwa ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale amaddu. Balyekyawa bennyini olw'ebibi byabwe bye baakola n'ebikolwa byabwe ebyenyinyalwa." 
Ezekiel6:10 Balimanya nti nze Mukama, nga saayogerera bwereere nti ndibakola ekibi ekyo." 
Ezekiel6:11 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mukube mu ngalo, musambagale, mugambe nti: “Kitalo!” olw'ebibi ebyenyinyalwa eby'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, kubanga bajja kusaanyizibwawo ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ali ewala alifa kawumpuli, ate ali okumpi alifa ekitala; aliba asigaddewo, oyo aliba ataliziddwa, alifa enjala; obusungu bwange ndibumumalirako bwe ntyo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Mulimanya nti nze Mukama, abantu baabwe abattiddwa bwe baliba bagudde awo mu bifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale n'okwetooloola emyaliiro gyabwe ku buli kasozi ne ku buli ntikko za nsozi, na buli wansi w'omuti oguggumizza, ne wansi wa buli muvule oguggumizza, gye baaweererezanga obubaani obuwunya obulungi ebifaananyi byabwe byonna ebya balubaale." 
Ezekiel6:14 Nzija kubagololerako omukono gwange ensi ngifuule matongo, omutali kantu, okuva ku ddungu lye Dibula na yonna gye babeera. Olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel7:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba ensi ya Yisirayeli: Enkomerero! Enkomerero etuukiridde ensonda ennya ez'ensi." 
Ezekiel7:3 Enkomerero ekutuukiridde; ŋŋenda kukuteera obusungu bwange era nkulamule nga ngerera ku makubo go, nkuvunaane n'ebyenyinyalwa byonna bye wakola." 
Ezekiel7:4 Sijja kukuttira ku liiso, sijja kukusaasira, wabula nzija kukuvunaana amakubo go n'ebikolwa byo ebyenyinyalwa ebiri mu ggwe. Olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel7:5 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Akabenje! Akabenje akatabangawo kaakano kajja. 
Ezekiel7:6 Enkomerero etuuse! Enkomerero etuuse! Ekutuukiridde; etuuse! 
Ezekiel7:7 Kazigizigi abatuukiridde, mmwe abali mu nsi; obudde butuuse, olunaku lusembedde, olunaku olw'akasattiro, sso si olw'essanyu ku nsozi." 
Ezekiel7:8 Ndi kumpi okukuteera obusungu bwange, nkumalireko obuswandi bwange; ndikulamula nga ngerera ku makubo go, ndikuvunaana ebyenyinyalwa byonna bye wakola." 
Ezekiel7:9 Sijja kukutunuuliza kisa, sijja kukusaasira, wabula nzija kukuvunaana amakubo go n'ebikolwa byo ebyenyinyalwa ebiri mu ggwe; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama akuba." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Olunaku luuluno! Lutuuse! Kazigizigi atuuse! Ddamula ayanyizza, olunkulu lutumbudde." 
Ezekiel7:11 Obukambwe bukuze ne bufuuka omuggo ogw'okubonereza obugwenyufu; tewali mu bo anaasigalawo, mpaawo n'omu mu bbiina lyabwe, yadde akantu okuva mu bugagga bwamu, yadde eky'omuwendo kyonna." 
Ezekiel7:12 “Obudde butuuse, olunaku lusembedde: omuguzi tasanyuka, n'omutunzi tanakuwala, kubanga obusungu buli ku kibiina kyonna;" 
Ezekiel7:13 kubanga atunda talinunula ky'atunze bwe baliba bakyali balamu, anti okulabikirwa kuli ku kibiina kyonna, tekujja kusazibwamu. Olw'okubeera ebibi byabwe, tewali aliwonya bulamu bwe." 
Ezekiel7:14 Bafuuye ekkondeere, bategese byonna, naye tewali agenda ku lutalo, kubanga obusungu bwange buli ku kibiina kyonna." 
Ezekiel7:15 Ebweru kitala, ate munda kawumpuli na njala; abali mu byalo balifa kitala, abali mu kibuga kawumpuli n'enjala biribakavvula." 
Ezekiel7:16 Bakaawonawo abaliba basumattuse, balibeera mu nsozi nga basindogoma ng'amayiba g'omu biwonvu, buli omu olw'ebibi bye." 
Ezekiel7:17 Emikono gyonna giriragaya, n'entegetege zirinafuwa ng'amazzi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Balyesiba ebikutiya, okutya ne kubabikka; ensonyi ziribajjula ku maaso, n'emitwe gyonna girimwebwa." 
Ezekiel7:19 Ffeeza waabwe balimukasuka mu nguudo, zaabu aliba afuuse ekintu ekijama. Ffeeza ne zaabu waabwe tebirisobola kubawonya ku lunaku lw'obusungu bw'Omukama. Tebiribawonya njala era tebalijjuza mbuto zaabwe nabyo, kubanga bye byali ekyesittazo ekyabaleetera okwonoona." 
Ezekiel7:20 Beetenderanga mu mayinja gaabwe ag'omuwendo ag'ettendo; baageeyambanga okukola ebifaananyi byabwe ebyenyinyalwa n'ebibumbe byabwe omutali nsa. N'olw'ekyo nzija kugabafuuliramu ekintu ekitali kirongoofu. 
Ezekiel7:21 Ndigawaayo ng'omunyago mu mikono gy'abagwira, ng'olwayo mu mikono gy'ababi mu nsi, bagajaajaamye." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndyetunuulira eri, siribatunuulira nga bajaajaamya ekifo kyange ekitukuvu; abanyazi balikiyingiramu ne bakijaajaamya." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Mukole enjegere kubanga ensi ejjudde okuyiwa omusaayi n'ekibuga kijjudde obukambwe. 
Ezekiel7:24 Ndireeta eggwanga erisinga gonna obubi ne litwala amayumba gaabwe; ndikomya okwekuza kw'ab'amaanyi n'ebifo byabwe ebitukuvu bijja kujaajaamizibwa. 
Ezekiel7:25 Entiisa bw'erijja, balinoonya eddembe naye teriba kantu." 
Ezekiel7:26 Akabi kaliddirira akabi, n'olugambo luliddirirwa olugambo; balinoonya okulabikirwa okuva ew'omulanzi; okuyigiriza kwa bakabona ku tteeka kulibula, era kye kimu ne ku bibuuliriro by'abakadde." 
Ezekiel7:27 Kabaka alikungubaga, n'omulangira alyebungululwa entiisa, n'emikono gy'abantu b'omu nsi girikankana. Ndibayisa ng'amakubo gaabwe bwe gali; ndibalamula ng'empisa zaabwe bwe ziri. Olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Awo mu mwaka ogwomukaaga, mu mwezi ogwomukaaga ng'ennaku ttaano, nali ntudde mu nnyumba yange, nga n'abakadde mu Yuda bantudde awo mu maaso, omukono gw'Omukama Katonda ne gunzijako awo." 
Ezekiel8:2 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba ekintu ekifaanana ng'omuntu: okuva ku kyali ng'ekiwato okukka yali ng'omuliro, ate okuva awo okwambuka, endabika ye ng'eyakaayakana ng'ekyuma ekyengeredde." 
Ezekiel8:3 Yagolola ekyali ng'omukono n'ansitulira ku mivumbo gy'enviiri z'omutwe gwange. Omwoyo ne gunsitula, ne nnengejjera wakati w'ensi n'eggulu, mu kulabikirwa kwa Katonda, n'antwala mu Yeruzaalemu ku muzigo gw'omulyango ogw'emambuka ogw'omu luggya olw'omunda awaali wateekeddwa ekifaananyi kya lubaale eky'obuggya, ekyasiikuula obuggya." 
Ezekiel8:4 Laba, ng'ekitiibwa kya Katonda kiri awo nga luli mu kulabikirwa mu lusenyi." 
Ezekiel8:5 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, situlira amaaso go eri emambuka.” Ne nsitulira amaaso gange eri emambuka; bwe natunula, ne ndaba mu mulyango emambuka w'omwaliiro nga waliyo ekifaananyi kya lubaale eky'obuggya." 
Ezekiel8:6 N'aŋŋamba nti “Mwana w'omuntu, kye bakola okiraba, ebyenyinyalwa ebinene ennyumba ya Yisirayeli by'ekola wano, bangobere ewala okuva mu kitukuvu kyange? Ojja kulaba ebyenyinyalwa ebisingawo n'obunene.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 N'antwala mu mulyango gw'oluggya, bwe natunula, ne ndaba ekituli mu kisenge." 
Ezekiel8:8 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti “Mwana w'omuntu, sima mu kisenge.” Ne nsima mu kisenge, ne ndabayo omulyango." 
Ezekiel8:9 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Yingira, olabe ebyenyinyalwa ebibi bano bye bakola eyo.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Ne nnyingira, ne ndaba: ku kisenge okwetooloola wonna kwali kwoleddwako ebifaananyi bya buli kika kya byewalula n'ebisolo ebyenyinyalwa n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale byonna eby'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel8:11 Mu maaso gaabyo nga wayimiriddeyo abakadde nsanvu ab'omu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli ne Yaazaniya mutabani wa Safani yali ayimiridde mu makkati gaabwe, buli omu yali alina ekyoterezo mu mukono gwe, nga muttunka ekire ky'omukka oguwunya akawoowo." 
Ezekiel8:12 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, olabye abakadde b'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli kye bakola mu nzikiza, buli omu mu ssabo ly'ekifaananyi kye ekya lubaale? Kubanga bagamba nti: ‘Omukama tatulaba; Omukama ensi yagyabulira.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 N'aŋŋamba era nti: “Ojja kulaba n'ebyenyinyalwa ebisingawo obunene bye bakola.” 
Ezekiel8:14 Awo n'antwala ku muzigo gw'omulyango gw'emambuka ogw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama; abakazi baali batudde eyo nga bakaabira Tammuzi. 
Ezekiel8:15 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, kino okirabye? Ojja kulaba ebyenyinyalwa ebinene n'okusinga ku bino.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Ate n'annyingiza mu luggya lw'ennyumba y'Omukama olw'omunda; awo mu mulyango gw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, wakati w'ekisasi n'omwaliiro, waaliwo abasajja ng'amakumi abiri mu bataano, omugongo nga bagukubye eri Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, batunuulidde ebuvanjuba; baali bavunnamira enjuba ebuvanjuba." 
Ezekiel8:17 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, okirabye ekyo? Kintu kya lusaago eri ennyumba ya Yuda okukola ebyenyinyalwa bino bye bakola wano? Lwaki ensi bandigijjuzizza ebikolwa eby'obukambwe ne batata kunnyiiza? Laba baabo ettabi baliteeka ku nnyindo zaabwe." 
Ezekiel8:18 Kale nange nzija kweyisa n'obusungu; sijja kulaga kisa, sijja kusonyiwa. Ne bwe banaleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene mu matu gange, sijja kubawuliriza.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 N'aleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene mu matu gange ng'agamba nti: “Mmwe ab'okubonereza ekibuga, musembere, buli omu n'ekissi mu mukono gwe.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Awo ne wabaawo abasajja mukaaga, ne bajja nga bava ku ludda olw'omulyango ogw'engulu ogutunuulidde emambuka, buli omu n'ekissi mu mukono gwe. Baalimu omusajja ng'ayambadde engoye eza kitaani, ng'alina mu kiwato akakopo ka bwino, ne bayingira, ne bayimirira kumpi n'omwaliiro ogw'ekikomo." 
Ezekiel9:3 Awo ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli ne kisituka nga kiva waggulu ku bakerubi kwe kyali ne kigenda ku mulyango gw'Ekiggwa; Omukama n'ayita omusajja eyali ayambadde engoye eza kitaani ng'alina mu kiwato akakopo ka bwino. 
Ezekiel9:4 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Yita wonna mu kibuga kya Yeruzaalemu, ogende ng'olamba akabonero ku byenyi by'abantu abasinda n'abanakuwadde olw'ebyenyinyalwa byonna ebikolerwamu.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Ate ne mpulira ng'agamba abalala nti “Muyiteeyite mu kibuga nga mumugoberera, nga mugenda mutta awatali kutunuuliza kisa oba kusaasira." 
Ezekiel9:6 Mutte abasajja n'abavubuka, embeerera, abakazi n'abaana; naye temukwata ku yenna gwe munaalabako akabonero. Mutandikire awali ekitukuvu kyange.” Ne basookera ku basajja abakadde abaali mu maaso g'Ekiggwa." 
Ezekiel9:7 N'abagamba nti: “Ekiggwa mukijaajaamye, empya zaakyo muzijjuze abattiddwa. Mufulume.” Ne bafuluma ne bagenda nga batta wonna mu kibuga." 
Ezekiel9:8 Bwe baali batta, nze nga nsigadde nzekka, ne ngwa wansi ku maaso gange ku ttaka nga bwe ndeekaana nti: “Yii! ayi Mukama Katonda, ogenda kuzikiriza bonna abaasigalawo mu Yisirayeli ng'omalira obuswandi bwo ku Yeruzaalemu?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 N'anziramu nti “Ekibi ky'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli n'eya Yuda kinene nnyo nnyo: ensi ejjudde okuyiwa omusaayi n'ekibuga kijjudde obulyake. Anti baagamba nti ‘Omukama ayabulidde ensi! Omukama talaba!’ 
Ezekiel9:10 Awo nno nange sijja kubatunuuliza kisa, sijja kubasaasira, wabula nzija kussa ku mitwe gyabwe byonna bye baakola.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Awo omusajja eyali ayambadde engoye eza kitaani, eyalina mu kiwato akakopo ka bwino, n'azza obubaka, n'agamba nti: “Nkoze nga bwe wandagidde.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba nga waggulu ku lubaale, olwali waggulu ku mitwe gya bakerubi, waliyo ekiri ng'ejjinja lya saffiro, nga kyefaanaanyiriza nnamulondo." 
Ezekiel10:2 Omukama n'agamba omusajja eyali ayambadde engoye eza kitaani nti: “Yingira mu makkati ga nnamuziga eziri wansi wa bakerubi, emikono gyo ogijjuze amanda ag'omuliro agali wansi wa bakerubi, ogamanse ku kibuga.” N'ayingira nange nga ntunula bwe nti." 
Ezekiel10:3 Omusajja bwe yali ayingira, ekire ne kijjula oluggya olw'omunda, bakerubi baali bayimiridde ku ludda olw'emaserengeta olw'Ekiggwa." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kisituka okuva waggulu w'abakerubi ne kidda ku mulyango gw'Ekiggwa. Ekiggwa ne kijjula ekire, n'oluggya ne lujjula okwakaayakana kw'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama." 
Ezekiel10:5 Okupaapaala kw'ebiwaawaatiro by'abakerubi kwali kuwulirwa n'eri mu luggya olw'ebweru, ng'eddoboozi lya Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu bw'aba ayogera." 
Ezekiel10:6 Bwe yalagira omusajja eyali ayambadde engoye eza kitaani nti: “Ggya omuliro mu makkati ga nnamuziga wakati mu bakerubi,” oli n'ayingira, n'ayimirira okumpi ne nnamuziga." 
Ezekiel10:7 Omukerubi omu n'agolola omukono n'atuuka ku muliro ogwali wakati w'abakerubi, n'agussa mu mikono gy'oli eyali ayambadde engoye eza kitaani, ye n'agukwata, n'afuluma." 
Ezekiel10:8 Ku bakerubi nga walabikayo ekifaanana ng'omukono gw'omuntu wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro byabwe. 
Ezekiel10:9 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba nnamuziga nnya okumpi ne bakerubi, nnamuziga emu ng'eri kumpi n'omukerubi omu, ne namuziga endala kumpi n'omulala; mu nfaanana namuziga nga zitemagana ng'ejjinja lya kirusolito." 
Ezekiel10:10 Mu nfaanana yaazo, zonna ennya zaali zifaanagana; buli nnamuziga yali ng'omukiikiddwa nnamuziga ginnaayo." 
Ezekiel10:11 Bwe zaatambulanga, nga zigenda ku njuyi ennya bakerubi gye baabanga batunudde; nnamuziga tezaawetanga bakerubi bwe baatambulanga. Bakerubi bagendanga ku ludda emitwe gyabwe gye gyabanga gitunudde, nga tebamala kukyuka nga bagenda." 
Ezekiel10:12 Omubiri gwabwe gwonna n'omugongo n'emikono n'ebiwaawaatiro ne nnamuziga zonna ez'abana byali bijjudde maaso wonna. 
Ezekiel10:13 Nawulira nga nnamuziga ezo baziyita “Namuziga ezeetooloola.” 
Ezekiel10:14 Buli mukerubi yalina ebyenyi bina: ekyenyi ekisooka nga kyenyi ng'ekya kerubi, ekyokubiri nga kyenyi ng'eky'omuntu, ekyokusatu nga kyenyi ng'eky'empologoma, n'ekyokuna nga kyenyi ng'eky'empungu." 
Ezekiel10:15 Abakerubi ne basituka, bano be baali ebiramu biri bye nali ndabye ku mugga Kebari." 
Ezekiel10:16 Bakerubi bwe baatambulanga, nga ne nnamuziga eziri okumpi nabo zitambula; bakerubi bwe baasitulanga ebiwaawaatiro byabwe, basitule okuva ku ttaka, nnamuziga zo nga tezikyuka awo okumpi nabo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Bwe baayimiriranga, nga ziyimirira; bwe baasitukanga, nga zisituka wamu nabo, kubanga omwoyo gw'ebiramu gwabeeranga mu zo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Awo ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kiva ku mulyango gw'Ekiggwa ne kiyimirira waggulu ku bakerubi. 
Ezekiel10:19 Nali nkyatunuulidde, bakerubi ne basitula ebiwaawaatiro byabwe ne bava ku ttaka. Bwe baagenda, ne nnamuziga ne zibagoberera. Ne bayimirira mu muzigo gw'omulyango ogw'ebuvanjuba ogw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama; ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli kyali waggulu waabwe." 
Ezekiel10:20 Bano be baali ebiramu bye nali ndabye wansi wa Katonda wa Yisirayeli ku mugga Kebari, olwo ne ntegeera nti byali bakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Buli kimu kyalina ebyenyi bina n'ebiwaawaatiro bina, ate wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro byabyo nga waliyo ekifaanana ng'omukono gw'omuntu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Enfaanana yaabyo mu maaso ng'eri ng'eya biri bye nalaba ku mugga Kebari. Ate buli kimu kyatambulanga butereevu. 
Ezekiel11:1 Awo omwoyo ne gunsitula, ne guntwala ku mulyango gw'ennyumba y'Omukama ogutunudde ebuvanjuba; awo ku muzigo gw'omulyango waaliwo abasajja amakumi abiri mu bataano. Mu bo ne ndabamu Yaazaniya mutabani wa Azzuri ne Pelatiya mutabani wa Benaaya, abakulembeze mu ggwanga." 
Ezekiel11:2 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, bano be basajja abateesa eby'akabi era abawa amagezi amabi mu kibuga kino." 
Ezekiel11:3 Bagamba nti ‘Buno si bwe budde obw'okuzimba amayumba; Kino kye kitamu, ffe nnyama.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Kale nno langa oboogerere, langa, mwana w'omuntu.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Omwoyo gw'Omukama ne gunzijako, ne guŋŋamba ŋŋambe nti: “Omukama kino ky'agamba: Bwe mutyo bwe mulowooza, mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli! Mmanyi bye mulowooza mu mitima gyammwe." 
Ezekiel11:6 Musse abantu bangi mu kibuga kino; amakubo gaamu mwagajjuzizza abattiddwa. 
Ezekiel11:7 Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Abantu mmwe be mwatta ne mumansa mu kibuga wakati ye nnyama ate ekibuga kye kitamu; naye nzija kukibagobamu. 
Ezekiel11:8 Mutya ekitala, naye ekitala kye nzija okubaleetera, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel11:9 Nzija kubagoba mu kibuga, mbaweeyo mu mikono gy'abagwira, bo balibabonereza." 
Ezekiel11:10 Mulifa kitala, era nzija kubalamulira ku nsalo ya Yisirayeli; mulimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel11:11 Kino ekibuga tekiribabeerera kitamu, nammwe mu kyo wakati temuliba nnyama; wabula ndibalamulira ku nsalo ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel11:12 Mulimanya nti nze Mukama, kubanga ebiragiro byange temwabigoberera n'amateeka gange temwagakwata, wabula empisa z'amawanga agabeetoolodde ze mwatwala ng'ekyokulabirako.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Mba nkyalanga, Pelatiya mutabani wa Benaaya n'afa; ne ngwa nga neevuunise ku maaso gange, ne ndeekaana nti: “Yii, ayi Mukama Katonda, onoomalirawo ddala bonna abaasigalawo mu Yisirayeli?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mwana w'omuntu, baganda bo, abo ab'oluganda lwo, ab'omusaayi gwo, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yonna, be bo abasula mu Yeruzaalemu, be boogera nti: ‘Beesuubye Omukama; ffe ensi eyo yatuweebwa ng'eyaffe.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: ‘Newandibadde nabatwala wala mu mawanga ne mbasaasaanya mu nsi, naye okumala akabanga nze mbadde ekitukuvu kyabwe mu mawanga gye baalaga.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 Kale nno gamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kubakuŋŋaanya mbaggyeyo eyo yonna mu mawanga gye mwasaasaanira, ndiddamu okubawa ensi ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Baligiddamu, ne baggyamu byonna ebigwagwa n'ebyenyinyalwa." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndibawa omutima gumu, ndibassaamu omwoyo omuggya; ndibaggyamu omutima ogw'ejjinja ne mbawa omutima ogw'ennyama." 
Ezekiel11:20 Olwo baligoberera amateeka gange ne bakwata ebiragiro byange; balibituusa. Balibeera bantu bange nange ndibeera Katonda waabwe. 
Ezekiel11:21 Naye abo ab'omutima ogutambulira mu bigwagwa byabwe n'ebyenyinyalwa, ndissa ku mitwe gyabwe ebyo bye baakola, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Abakerubi ne basitula ebiwaawaatiro byabwe ne nnamuziga nga ziri mu mbiriizi zaabwe, ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli kyali waggulu ku bo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kyambuka nga kiva mu kibuga wakati, ne kiyimirira ku lusozi oluli mu buvanjuba bw'ekibuga." 
Ezekiel11:24 Mwoyo w'Omukama n'ansitula, mu kulabikirwa okwo okwampeebwa mwoyo w'Omukama, n'antwala mu Kaludeya eri abawaŋŋangusibwa; awo n'okulabikirwa kwe nali ndabye ne kuva we ndi." 
Ezekiel11:25 Abawaŋŋangusibwa ne mbagamba Omukama bye yali andaze. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, osula mu nnyumba enjeemu, abalina amaaso ag'okulaba naye abatalaba, n'amatu ag'okuwulira naye abatawulira, kubanga bo nnyumba njeemu." 
Ezekiel12:3 Kale nno ggwe, mwana w'omuntu, siba engugu egenda mu buwaŋŋanguse; awo emisana nga balaba, situla ove mu kifo kyo olage awalala; mpozzi banaateegera, kubanga bo nnyumba njeemu." 
Ezekiel12:4 Engugu yo gye wasibidde obuwaŋŋanguse ojja kugifulumya misana nga balaba; ate era akawungeezi nga balaba ogende ng'abo abagenda mu buwaŋŋanguse bwe bakola. 
Ezekiel12:5 Era nga balaba, sima ekituli mu kisenge oyite omwo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Gyetikke ku kibegabega nga balaba ogifulumye nga bukutte. Weebikke mu maaso oleme kulaba nsi, kubanga ggwe nkutaddewo ng'akabonero eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Ne nkola nga Omukama bwe yandagira: emisana ne nfulumya engugu gye nali nsibidde obuwaŋŋanguse, ate akawungeezi ne nsima n'emikono ekituli mu kisenge, ate nga bukutte ne ngifulumya nga ngyetisse ku kibegabega nga bonna balaba." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ku makya ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mwana w'omuntu, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, ennyumba enjeemu, tebakubuuzizza nti: ‘Owange, okola ki?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Bino bikwata ku mulangira ali mu Yeruzaalemu ne ku nnyumba yonna eya Yisirayeli abali eyo’ 
Ezekiel12:11 Bagambe nti ‘Nze ndi kabonero gye muli.’ Kye nkoze kye kiribakolebwa; bagenda kuwaŋŋangusibwa ng'abasibe. 
Ezekiel12:12 Omulangira ali mu makkati gaabwe alyetikka ku kibegabega engugu ye enjuba ng'egwa, n'afuluma; balimusimira ekituli mu kisenge mw'aliyita; alyebikka mu maaso aleme kulaba nsi." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndimutaayiza n'ekitimba kyange, era alikwatibwa mu mutego gwange; ndimutwala e Babiloni, mu nsi y'Abakaludeya; nayo yennyini taligiraba; eyo gy'alifiira." 
Ezekiel12:14 Na bonna abamubugiriza: abagabe be n'eggye lye, ŋŋenda kubasaasaanya mu buli nsonda; ndibawondera n'ekitala ekisowole." 
Ezekiel12:15 Balimanya nti nze Mukama, bwe ndimala okubasaasaanya mu mawanga, n'okubamansamansa mu nsi." 
Ezekiel12:16 Naye mu bo nditalizaamu abatono ekitala, enjala ne kawumpuli, balyoke babuulire mu mawanga gye baagenda ebyenyinyalwa bye baakola, n'abo bamanye nga nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Era ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mwana w'omuntu emmere yo girye ng'okankana, n'amazzi go ganywe ng'ojugumira, ng'otidde." 
Ezekiel12:19 Bannansi bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba ku abo abasula mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu nsi ya Yisirayeli: Balirya emmere yaabwe nga beeraliikirivu, n'amazzi gaabwe baliganywera mu kutya, kubanga ensi yaabwe egenda kuggyibwako kyonna ky'erina, olw'ebikolobero by'abo bonna abagisulamu." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ebibuga kati omuli abantu birirekebwa ttayo, n'ensi erifuuka matongo; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Era ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mwana w'omuntu, lugero ki olwo lwe mugera mu nsi ya Yisirayeli nti: ‘Ennaku zo zeeyerawo, naye buli kulabikirwa temuva kantu’?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Kale nno bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Olwo olugero nzija kulusirissa, teruddemu kugerebwa mu Yisirayeli.’ Bagambe nti: ‘Ennaku zisembedde buli kulabikirwa lwe kulituukirizibwa." 
Ezekiel12:24 Teriddayo kubaawo kulabikirwa kwa bulimba oba okulagula okuguya mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel12:25 Naye nze Omukama ndyogeranga ekigambo kye ndiba njogedde, era kirituukiriranga; kubanga mu budde bwammwe, mmwe nnyumba enjeemu, ndyogeranga ekigambo ne nkituukiriza, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Era Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mwana w'omuntu, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yiino bagamba nti: ‘Ono by'alabikirwa bya nnaku nnyingi mu maaso; alanga bya budde obukyali ewala.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 Kale nno bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Tewali bigambo byange bijja kulwanga; buli kye nnaayogeranga kijjanga kutuukirizibwanga, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, langa ovumirire abalanzi ba Yisirayeli abalanga; gamba abo abalanga nga baggya mu birowoozo byabwe nti: ‘Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama." 
Ezekiel13:3 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Zibasanze abalanzi abasiru abagoberera ebirowoozo byabwe, nga tebalabikiddwa na kulabikirwa!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Yisirayeli, abalanzi bo bali ng'ebibe mu bifulukwa by'amayumba." 
Ezekiel13:5 Awaabomolwa temwambuseeyo, n'ekisenge ky'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli temukiddaabirizza kisangibwe nga kinywevu mu lutalo ku lunaku lw'Omukama." 
Ezekiel13:6 Bye balabikirwa bya sswakaba ne bye balagula bya bulimba. Bagamba nti “Omukama agamba,” sso ng'Omukama tabatumanga; ne balowooza nti anaatuukiriza bye boogera." 
Ezekiel13:7 Bye mwalabikirwa tebyali bya sswakaba ne bye mwalagula tebyali bya bulimba bwe mwagamba nti: “Omukama y'agamba,” sso nga nze soogeranga?" 
Ezekiel13:8 “ ‘Kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Olw'okubeera ebigambo byammwe ebya sswakaba n'okulagula kwammwe okw'obulimba, mbali bukiika, Omukama y'agamba." 
Ezekiel13:9 Omukono gwange gujja kubeera ku balanzi abalabikirwa ebya sswakaba, ne balagula eby'obulimba; tebalibeera mu lukiiko lwa bantu bange, ne mu kitabo ky'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli tebaliwandiikibwamu, ne mu nsi ya Yisirayeli tebaliyingirayo; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda." 
Ezekiel13:10 Kubanga baalimba abantu bange nga bagamba nti “Ddembe,” sso ng'eddembe teryaliyo, era kubanga abantu bwe baazimba ekisenge, bo ne bakimaalako ennoni." 
Ezekiel13:11 Gamba abo abakimaalako ennoni nti: “Kya kugwa; enkuba nnamuttikwa eritonnya, ndiwanula amayinja g'omuzira ne gagwa, n'omuyaga ogw'amaanyi gulikunta.”" 
Ezekiel13:12 Ekisenge bwe kirigwa, tebalibabuuza nti: “Ennoni gye mwamaalako eruwa?”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mu busungu bwange nzija kuleeta omuyaga ogw'amaanyi, n'enkuba nnamuttikwa mu buswandi bwange, n'amayinja ag'omuzira mu busungu bwange, nkisaanyeewo." 
Ezekiel13:14 Nzija kumenya ekisenge kwe mwamaala ennoni, nkituusize ddala ku ttaka, n'omusingi gwakyo gulabike; mulitokomokera omwo; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel13:15 Obusungu bwange nzija kubumalira ku kisenge ne ku abo abaakimaala ennoni, ndibagamba mmwe nti: “Ekisenge tewakyali era n'abo abaakimaala ennoni tebakyaliwo," 
Ezekiel13:16 abo abalanzi ba Yisirayeli abaalanga eri Yeruzaalemu, abaafuna ku lulwe okulabikirwa okw'eddembe sso nga tewaali ddembe.” ’" 
Ezekiel13:17 “Kale nno, mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go gakanulire bawala b'abantu bo abalanga nga baggya mu birowoozo byabwe; langa oboogerere." 
Ezekiel13:18 Bagambe nti: Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: ‘Zibasanze abakazi abo abatunga enzinga mu biseke byabwe, abakolera emitwe gyabwe ebitambaala ebya buli buwanvu okukwasa abantu! Mugamba munaakwasa emyoyo gy'abantu bange egyammwe ne mugireka nga miramu?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Mumpeebudde mu bantu bange olw'olubatu lwa sayiri n'olw'obukunkumuka bw'omugaati; musse abantu abatandifudde ne muwonya abandifudde bwe mulimba abantu bange abakkiriza eby'obulimba. 
Ezekiel13:20 Olw'ekyo nno, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: saagala nzinga ezo ze mweyamba okukwasa abantu ng'abatega ennyonyi, nzija kuzikutula ku mikono gyammwe; abantu be mukwasa ku mutego ng'ennyonyi nzija kubata beetaaye." 
Ezekiel13:21 Nzija kubayuzaako ebitambaala ku mitwe abantu bange mbanunule mu mikono gyammwe; tebaliddayo kubeera munyago gwa buyinza bwammwe; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel13:22 Kubanga mwaterebula n'obulimba bwammwe emitima gy'abatuukirivu, nze be nali sinakuwazizza, era kubanga mwawa ababi amaanyi baleme kuva mu makubo gaabwe amabi bawonye batyo obulamu bwabwe," 
Ezekiel13:23 kale nno temukyaddayo kulabikirwa bya sswakaba na kulagula; abantu bange nzija kubanunula mu mikono gyammwe; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ” 
Ezekiel14:1 Abamu ku bakadde mu Yisirayeli bajja we ndi, ne batuula awo mu maaso gange." 
Ezekiel14:2 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mwana w'omuntu, abasajja bano batadde ebifaananyi bya balubaale mu mitima gyabwe, ne beeteekera n'emiziziko emibi mu maaso gaabwe, mbaleke ddala banneebuzeeko?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Awo nno yogera gye bali obagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Omuntu yenna mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli addidde ekifaananyi kya lubaale n'akissa mu mutima gwe, ne yeeteera n'omuziziko mu maaso ge, ate n'ajja ew'omulanzi, nze Mukama mwene ŋŋenda okumweddiramu nga ngerera ku bifaananyi bya balubaale bo ebingi," 
Ezekiel14:5 bwe ntyo ndyoke nkwate emitima gy'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli egyanneebengulako olw'ebifaananyi bya balubaale.’ 
Ezekiel14:6 “Kale nno gamba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mwenenye! Muve ku bifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale, muggye amaaso gammwe ku bikolwa byammwe ebyenyinyalwa." 
Ezekiel14:7 Buli muntu yenna mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, oba omugwira, anneebengulako n'assa mu mutima gwe ebifaananyi bya balubaale, ne yeeteera omuziziko mu maaso ge, ate n'ajja eri omulanzi okunneebuuzaako, nze Mukama mwene ndimweddiramu." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ndimukanulira amaaso gange ne mmufuula ekyokulabirako n'eky'okwogerako. Ndimukutula ku bantu bange; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel14:9 N'omulanzi bw'alisendebwasendebwa, n'ayogera ekigambo, nze Omukama nze ndiba nsenzesenze omulanzi oyo, ŋŋenda kumugololerako omukono gwange mmuzikirize mu bantu bange Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Bombi balyetikka omusango gw'ekibi kyabwe; omulanzi aliba n'omusango kyenkana ng'oyo azze okumwebuuzaako. 
Ezekiel14:11 Olwo ennyumba ya Yisirayeli teriddayo kunneeyawulako na kweyonoona na bisobyo byayo byonna, wabula balibeera bantu bange, nange ndibeera Katonda waabwe, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Ate ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mwana w'omuntu, singa ensi emu esobya gye ndi, n'eteeyisa mu bwesigwa, ndigigololerako omukono gwange ne ngikutulako ekigisakirira emmere, ndigisindikira enjala ne ngittamu abantu n'ensolo." 
Ezekiel14:14 Mu nsi eyo singa mubaddemu abasajja bano abasatu: Nowa, Danyeli ne Yobu, be bokka abandiwonyezza obulamu bwabwe olw'obutuukirivu bwabwe, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel14:15 Singa nsindikira ensi ebisolo ebikambwe ne bigimalamu abaana, n'efuuka matongo, nga tewakyali agiyitamu olw'ebisolo," 
Ezekiel14:16 mazima nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama y'agamba, ne bwe bandibadde mu nsi eyo, tebandisobodde kuwonya batabani baabwe na bawala baabwe, wabula bo bokka be bandiwonyeewo; ensi yo yandisigadde matongo." 
Ezekiel14:17 Oba singa ndeetera ensi eyo ekitala, ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ekitala kiyiteeyite mu nsi,’ ne nzitamu abantu n'ensolo," 
Ezekiel14:18 mazima nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama y'agamba, ne bwe mwandibaddemu abasajja abo abasatu, tebandiwonyezza batabani baabwe na bawala baabwe, wabula bo bokka be bandiwonyeewo." 
Ezekiel14:19 Oba singa nsindika kawumpuli mu nsi eyo, ne ngimalirako obusungu bwange nga njiwa omusaayi mmalemu abantu n'ebisolo," 
Ezekiel14:20 mazima nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, Nowa, Danyeli ne Yobu ne bwe bandibadde mu nsi eyo, tebandiwonyezzaawo n'omu ku batabani oba bawala baabwe, wabula bo, olw'obutuukirivu bwabwe, be bandiwonyezza obulamu bwabwe." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kiriba kitya bwe ndisindikira Yeruzaalemu ebibonerezo byange ebina ddekabusa: ekitala, enjala, ebisolo ebikambwe ne kawumpuli, okutta abantu baamu n'ebisolo?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Naye mulibaamu abaliwonawo, okufulumya batabani ne bawala bammwe. Bwe balibaleeterwa, muliraba amakubo gaabwe n'ebikolwa byabwe. Mulikubagizibwa olw'akabi ke ndiba ndeetedde Yeruzaalemu, olw'ebyo byonna bye ndiba mmuleetedde." 
Ezekiel14:23 Mulikubagizibwa bwe muliraba amakubo gaabwe n'ebikolwa byabwe, kubanga mulimanya nti byonna bye ndiba nkoze mu ye, ndiba sibikoze watali nsonga, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel15:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, omuti gw'omuzabbibu ki kye gusinza ettabi ly'omuti mu kibira?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Kulivaako omuti omukolebwa akantu? Bagukolamu enkondo okuwanikako ekintu? 
Ezekiel15:4 Bwe gumala okusuulibwa mu muliro, omuliro ne gwokya obusanso bwombi, n'eky'omu makkati ne gukisiriiza, olwo gulibaako ne kye gugasa?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Oba tegugasa nga gukyali mulambirira, kati nga guyidde, gusiridde, lwe gunaabaako omugaso?" 
Ezekiel15:6 “Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nga bwe nawa omuti gw'omuzabbibu mu miti gy'ekibira gukole ng'oluku mu muliro, bwe ntyo bwe ndiwaayo abasula mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Amaaso gange nzija kugabakanulira. Bavudde mu muliro, naye omuliro gujja kubasenkenya nate. Mulimanya nti nze Mukama, bwe ndibakanulira amaaso gange." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ensi ndigifuula matongo, kubanga tebaali beesigwa, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mwana w'omuntu yatulira Yeruzaalemu ebyenyinyalwa bye. 
Ezekiel16:3 Bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba ku Yeruzaalemu: Ensibuko n'obuzaale bwo bya mu nsi y'e Kanaani; kitaawo yali Mwamori ne nnyoko Mukitti. 
Ezekiel16:4 Ku lunaku lwe wazaalibwa, akalira ko tekaasalibwa, era tewanaazibwa mu mazzi otukule, tewasiigibwa na munnyo era tewazingibwa mu ngozi." 
Ezekiel16:5 Tewali yakutunuulira n'akukwatirwa ekisa, oba ekisaasaazi waakiri ekitono kiti, n'akukolera ebyo, wabula wasuulibwa awo otyo ebweru, kubanga weenyinyalwa okuva ku lunaku lwe wazaalirwako." 
Ezekiel16:6 “ ‘Mba mpitawo, ne nkulaba ng'ovuyira mu musaayi gwo, ne nkugamba ng'oli awo nti: “Ba mulamu.”" 
Ezekiel16:7 Ne nkuwa okukula ng'ekimera eky'omu nnimiro. Wakula n'ovubuka, n'ofuuka ejjinja ery'omuwendo. Wasuna amabeere n'enviiri zo ne zikula; kyokka ng'oli bwereere, oli busa." 
Ezekiel16:8 Nayitawo ne nkulaba; bwe nalaba nga wali otuuse okuganza, ne nkwanjululizaako ekiwenge ky'omunagiro gwange ne mbikka obwereere bwo. Nakulayirira, ne nkola endagaano naawe, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, n'ofuuka wange." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ne nkunaaza n'amazzi, ne nkunaazaako omusaayi, ne nkusiiga omuzigo." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ne nkwambaza ekyambalo ekya langi entobeke, ne nkunaanika engatto ez'eddiba, ne nkwambaza olugoye olwa bafuta, ne nkwambaza n'engoye eza siliki." 
Ezekiel16:11 Nakuwoomya n'eby'okwetona, ne nkwambaza obukomo ku mikono n'omukuufu mu bulago bwo." 
Ezekiel16:12 Nakutungako empeta mu nnyindo n'endala ku matu go, ne nkutikkira omuge omulungi ku mutwe gwo." 
Ezekiel16:13 N'otonebwatonebwa ne zaabu ne ffeeza; engoye zo nga za bafuta, eza kitaani, eza siliki n'eza langi entobeke. Walyanga butta obulungi, omubisi gw'enjuki n'omuzigo gw'oliva. Wafuuka mubalagavu nnyo nnyo n'osaanira obwannaabakyala." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ettutumu lyo ne lisaasaana mu mawanga olw'obulungi bwo, kubanga wali oteredde bulungi olw'ekitangaala kyange kye nali nkozesezza okukuwunda, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel16:15 “ ‘Naye weeyinula obulungi bwo, ne weeyamba ettutumu lyo okukola obwamalaaya, obwenzi bwo n'obugabulira buli eyayitangawo." 
Ezekiel16:16 Waddira ku byambalo byo ne weekolera ebifo ebigulumivu ebitimbe, eyo gye wakoleranga obwamalaaya. Ekifaanana kityo tekyandiguddewo era tekibangawo." 
Ezekiel16:17 Waddira n'amagemu ag'omuwendo ge nakuwa, aga zaabu wange ne ffeeza wange, ne weekolera ebifaananyi bya balubaale abasajja n'okola nabyo obwamalaaya." 
Ezekiel16:18 Waddira engoye eza langi entobeke n'obyambaza, n'obiwongera omuzigo n'obubaani." 
Ezekiel16:19 Waddira n'emmere gye nakuwa ey'obutta obulungi, omuzigo gw'oliva n'omubisi gw'enjuki n'obiwongera ng'obubaani obuwunya akawoowo. Ekyo kye kyakolebwa, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel16:20 “ ‘Waddira batabani bo ne bawala bo be wanzaalira n'obabitambirira bibalye. Awo obwenzi bwo bwali tebumala? 
Ezekiel16:21 Wasanjaga abaana bange n'obawongera ebifaananyi mu muliro. 
Ezekiel16:22 Bwe walinga okola ebyenyinyalwa ebyo byonna mu bwenzi bwo, tewajjukira nnaku za buvubuka bwo lwe wali obwereere, oli busa, oli awo ovuyira mu musaayi gwo." 
Ezekiel16:23 “ ‘Okwongereza ku buseegu bwo (zikusanze, zikusanze! Omukama Katonda y'agamba)," 
Ezekiel16:24 weezimbira ekituuti, ne weekolera ekifo ekigulumivu mu buli luggya." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ku buli masaŋŋanzira weezimbirayo ekifo ekigulumivu, obubalagavu bwo n'obufuula ekyenyinyalwa, ne weegabulira buli ayitawo, obwenzi bwo n'obwongera obungi." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wakola obwamalaaya n'Abamisiri, baliraanwa bo ab'amaddu amayitirivu, obwenzi bwo n'obwongera obungi onnyiize." 
Ezekiel16:27 Kyennava nkugololerako omukono gwange, ne nkendeeza ku mugabo gwo, ne nkuwaayo mu buluvu bw'abalabe bo, bawala b'Abafilisitiini, abaakwatibwa ensonyi olw'enneeyisa yo eŋŋwenyufu." 
Ezekiel16:28 Era wakola obwamalaaya n'Abassuri kubanga ggwe tomatira; ne bwe wakola obwamalaaya era tewamatira," 
Ezekiel16:29 obwenzi bwo n'obwongera obungi okutuusa ne mu nsi y'abasuubuzi eya Kaludeya, naye era ne ku luno tewamatira." 
Ezekiel16:30 “ ‘Omutima gwo nga munafu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, n'okola bino byonna ng'omukazi malaaya lukulwe!" 
Ezekiel16:31 Bwe wessiza ekituuti mu buli masaŋŋanzira, n'ekifo ekigulumivu mu buli luggya, tewakola nga malaaya, kubanga okusasulibwa wakunyooma." 
Ezekiel16:32 Wattu omukazi omwenzi, akwana abasajja ab'ebweru mu kifo ky'owuwe!" 
Ezekiel16:33 Bamalaaya bonna basasulwa, naye ate ggwe ebirabo byo wabigabira baganzi bo bonna, okubaseemyaseemya okuva wonna bayingire gy'oli eri obwenzi bwo." 
Ezekiel16:34 Mu bwenzi bwo oli wa ngeri ku bakazi abalala; teri ajja akunoonyaako bwamalaaya bwo; ggwe oli wa ngeri, ggwe osasula, teri kikusasulibwa." 
Ezekiel16:35 “ ‘Kale nno, ggwe malaaya, wulira ekigambo ky'Omukama." 
Ezekiel16:36 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga wayiwaayiwa obugagga bwo ne weereka bwereere mu bwenzi bwo ne baganzi bo, n'olw'ebifaananyi byo byonna ebya balubaale ebyenyinyalwa n'olw'omusaayi gw'abaana bo gwe wabawa," 
Ezekiel16:37 nzija kukuŋŋaanya baganzi bo bonna, be weesanyusizangako, bonna be wayagala wamu n'abo bonna be wakyawa. Nzija kubaggya yonna mbakukuŋŋaanyizeeko, nkuleke bwereere mu maaso gaabwe, balabe obwereere bwo bwonna." 
Ezekiel16:38 Nzija kukulamula n'ennamula eweebwa abakazi abakola obwenzi n'abakazi abayiwa omusaayi; nzija kukumalirako omusaayi gw'obusungu n'obuggya bwange. 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndikuwaayo mu mikono gy'abaganzi bo; balizikiriza akatunnumba ko ne bamenyawo ebifo byo ebigulumivu; balikwambulamu ebyambalo byo ne batwala amagemu go ag'omuwendo, ne bakuleka bwereere, busa." 
Ezekiel16:40 Balikukuŋŋaanyizaako eggye ne bakukuba amayinja, ne bakusanjaga n'ebitala byabwe." 
Ezekiel16:41 Ennyumba zo balizookya omuliro, ne bakubonereza mu maaso g'abakazi abangi. Obwamalaaya bwo ndibukomya, era toliddayo kusasula baganzi bo." 
Ezekiel16:42 Olwo obusungu bwange ku ggwe bulikkakkana, n'obuggya bwange buligenda ne bukuvaako, nditeeka nga sikyasunguwala." 
Ezekiel16:43 Kubanga tewajjukira nnaku za buvubuka bwo, onsunguwazza na bino byonna; by'okoze bino byonna nzija kubissa ku mutwe gwo, Omukama Katonda y'agamba. Ku bikolwa byo byonna ebyenyinyalwa tewagattako n'obugwenyufu bwo?" 
Ezekiel16:44 “ ‘Buli yenna aligera olugero, alirugerera ku ggwe nti: “Omwana yafaanana nnyina.”" 
Ezekiel16:45 Oli muwala wa nnyoko ddala akuzaala, oyo eyanyooma bba n'abaana be; era oli ddala muganda wa bawala banno, abo abaanyooma babbaabwe n'abaana baabwe. Nnyoko yali Mukitti, ate kitaawo Mwamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Muganda wo omukulu ye Samariya ne bawala be, eyabeeranga ku luuyi lwo olw'emambuka; ate muganda wo omuto ye Sodoma ne bawala be, eyabeeranga ku luuyi lwo olw'emaserengeta." 
Ezekiel16:47 Tewakoma ku kya kugoberera makubo gaabwe mabi n'okola n'ebyenyinyalwa byabwe kyokka, naye wayisa nawo empisa zo ne ziba mbi n'okubasinga." 
Ezekiel16:48 Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, muganda wo Sodoma ne bawala be tebakolanga ggwe ne baganda bo kye mwakola." 
Ezekiel16:49 Kino kye kibi kya muganda wo Sodoma: Ye ne bawala be baali beekuza, abekkusa bokka, abeetuulidde entende; bw'atyo bwe yali ne bawala be. Yali omunaku n'omwavu tabasuula mukono." 
Ezekiel16:50 Beewanika, era ne bakola ebyenyinyalwa mu maaso gange, kyennava mbaggyawo, nga bwe mwalaba." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samariya ebibi bye yakola tebituuka kyakubiri kya bibi byo; wakola ebyenyinyalwa bingi okumusinga; okulabira ku byenyinyalwa byonna bye wakola, baganda bo obafudde abatuukirivu." 
Ezekiel16:52 Kale nno fa ensonyi, ggwe eyejjeereza baganda bo olw'okubeera nga mu kwonoona kwo weeyisa mu ngeri eyeenyinyalwa n'okubasinga. Awo nno swala, ofe ensonyi, kubanga baganda bo wabawa okuba abatuukirivu." 
Ezekiel16:53 “ ‘Ndikomyawo abasibe ba Sodoma ne bawala be, n'abasibe ba Samariya ne bawala be, n'abasibe bo wamu n'abaabwe," 
Ezekiel16:54 olyoke ofe ensonyi, oswale olwa byonna bye wakola bwe wababeerera ekikubagizo." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ne muganda wo Sodoma ne bawala be baliddamu okuba nga bwe baabanga mu kusooka, ne Samariya ne bawala be baliddamu okuba nga bwe baabanga mu kusooka, naawe ne bawala bo muliddamu okuba nga bwe mwabanga mu kusooka." 
Ezekiel16:56 Bwe wali okyewanise, Sodoma muganda wo nga tosobola kumwatula" 
Ezekiel16:57 obugwenyufu bwo bwe bwali tebunneeyerula. Kati mufaanana; osekererwa bawala ba Edomu n'emiriraano gye, n'abawala b'Abafilisitiini, na bonna abakwetoolodde abakunyooma." 
Ezekiel16:58 Kati osasulira obugwenyufu bwo n'ebyenyinyalwa byo, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel16:59 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kukuyisa nga ggwe bwe wakola, kubanga wagaya ekirayiro ng'omenya endagaano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Naye nzija kujjukira endagaano yange gye nakola naawe mu nnaku ez'obuvubuka bwo, ndissaawo endagaano naawe ey'olubeerera." 
Ezekiel16:61 Olijjukira amakubo go ensonyi ne zikukwata bw'oliddamu okufuna baganda bo, bakulu bo ne bato bo. Ndibakuwa babe bawala bo, naye si lwa ndagaano yo gye nakola naawe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Nzija kukola endagaano yange naawe; olimanya nti nze Mukama," 
Ezekiel16:63 olwo ojjukire, ensonyi zikukwate, olwo toliddamu kwasamya kamwa ko olw'ensonyi bwe ndimala okukusonyiwa byonna bye wakola, y'agamba Omukama Katonda.’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel17:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, yisa olugero, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli ginyumize olufumo;" 
Ezekiel17:3 bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Empungu ennene, ey'ebiwaawaatiro eby'amaanyi, ey'ebyoya ebyegoogodde, ey'omwoya ogwa langi entobeke, yajja ku Lebanoni, n'ewamba essanso ly'entolookyo." 
Ezekiel17:4 Yanojjolako akasanso n'ekatwala mu nsi y'abasuubuzi, n'ekateeka mu kibuga ky'abatunzi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Era yatwala ku nsigo z'ensi, n'egiteeka mu ttaka eggimu; yagisimba ng'enzibaziba ku mazzi amangi, n'egissa awo." 
Ezekiel17:6 Yaleeta omutunsi n'efuuka omuzabbibu ogulandira wansi; amatabi gaagwo ne gagitunuulira, gyo emirandira gyagwo ne gisigala we gwali. Gweyongera amatabi, ne gufuuka omuzabbibu, ne gussaako amakoola." 
Ezekiel17:7 “ ‘Ne wabaawo n'empungu endala ennene, ey'ebiwaawaatiro eby'amaanyi, ebukadde omwoya. Omuzabbibu emirandira gyagwo ne gugitunuuliza empungu, n'amatabi ne gugagisitulira egufukirirenga, nga gusinziira mu kalimiro we gwali gusimbiddwa." 
Ezekiel17:8 Gwasimbibwa mu ttaka ddungi, ku mazzi mangi, guleete amatabi, gubale, gufuuke muzabbibu ogw'ekitiibwa.’" 
Ezekiel17:9 “Bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Gulirama? Terigukuula n'ebibala n'ebikunkumula, n'amakoola agatojjedde ne gawotoka? Okugukuulirawo ddala tekiryetaagisa mukono gwa maanyi, oba bantu bangi?" 
Ezekiel17:10 Laba, ne bwe gunaasimbulizibwa, gulirama? Empewo y'ebuvanjuba bw'erigukwatako, tegulikala bukazi, awo mu kalimiro we gwamera?’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel17:12 “Gamba ennyumba eno enjeemu nti: ‘Mumanyi ebyo kye bitegeeza?’ Bagambe nti: ‘Kabaka w'e Babiloni wuuyo yajja e Yeruzaalemu n'akwata bakabaka n'abakungu be, n'abaleeta ewuwe e Babiloni." 
Ezekiel17:13 N'addira omu ku b'omu nnyumba ya kabaka n'akola naye endagaano, n'amulayiza, naye abakungu mu nsi n'abatwala," 
Ezekiel17:14 obwakabaka abuserebye buleme kuddamu kusituka, wabula buyimirirewo ku lw'okukuuma endagaano ye." 
Ezekiel17:15 Naye kabaka n'amujeemera bwe yatuma ababaka e Misiri bamuwe embalaasi n'eggye eddene. Naye anaawangula? Akola ebintu ng'ebyo awona? Anaamenya endagaano n'aluwona? 
Ezekiel17:16 Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba, alifiira mu Babiloni, mu nsi ya kabaka oyo eyamufuula kabaka, ow'ekirayiro kye yanyooma, olw'endagaano gye yamenya gye yali akubye naye." 
Ezekiel17:17 Faraawo newandibadde ng'alina ebbiina ddene n'abatabaazi nkumu, talimuyamba mu lutalo, embibiro ne bwe zinaatuumwa n'ekikomera ne kizimbibwa okutta abantu enkumu." 
Ezekiel17:18 Kubanga yagaya ekirayiro n'amenya endagaano, n'olw'okubeera nga yali yeeyamye n'omukono gwe ate n'akola ebyo byonna, si wa kuluwona." 
Ezekiel17:19 “ ‘Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nze nga ndi mulamu, ekirayiro kyange kye yagaya n'endagaano yange gye yamenya nzija kubissa ku mutwe gwe." 
Ezekiel17:20 Nzija kumutaayiza n'ekitimba kyange, alikwatibwa mu mutego gwange, ndimutwala e Babiloni, eyo gye ndimusalira omusango olw'obutabeera mwesigwa gye ndi." 
Ezekiel17:21 Bonna abalondobe ab'omu ggye lye balifa ekitala, ate abaliwonawo balisaasaanyizibwa mu nsonda zonna; olwo mulimanya nti nze Omukama njogedde." 
Ezekiel17:22 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Nange kennyini ndinojjola akasanso okuva ku ssanso ly'entolookyo, ne nkasimba. Ndinokola akatabi okuva mu busanso ku mutwe ne nkasimba ku lusozi oluwanvu, olutumbiivu." 
Ezekiel17:23 Nzija kukasimba ku katemyo k'olusozi lwa Yisirayeli; kalisuuliza amatabi ne kabala ebibala; kalifuuka ntolookyo ey'ekitiibwa. Buli kinyonyi kirisula wansi waayo; buli kibuuka kiribudama mu kittuluze kyayo. 
Ezekiel17:24 Emiti gyonna egy'ettale girimanya nti nze Omukama omuti omuwanvu nguyimpawaza, omumpi ne nguwanvuya; nkaza omuti omubisi, ate omukalu ne nguwa okutojjera. Nze Omukama nze njogedde, ate nzija kukikola.’ ”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel18:2 “Kiki kye mutegeeza bwe mugera olugero ku nsi ya Yisirayeli nti: “ ‘Bakitaabwe baalya emizabbibu emibisi, amannyo g'abaana ne ganyenyeera’?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama y'agamba, temuliddayo kugera lugero olwo mu Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Kubanga buli muntu wange; omuzadde n'omwana bombi bange; anaakolanga ekibi y'anaafanga. 
Ezekiel18:5 “Omuntu bw'aliba omutuukirivu, ng'akola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu," 
Ezekiel18:6 taliira ku nsozi, amaaso ge tagatunuuliza bifaananyi bya balubaale eby'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, tagwagwawaza muka munne, tasemberera mukazi ali mu biseera bye eby'omwezi," 
Ezekiel18:7 tanyigiriza muntu, azza omusingo gwe yatwala olw'okwewolwako, takola bunyazi, emmere ye agigabirako ku muyala, ayita obusa amuwaayo ku kagoye;" 
Ezekiel18:8 tawola na buliika, tatwala magoba gayitiridde, omukono gwe agutangira obutabeera mwenkanya, asala mu mazima wakati w'ono n'oli," 
Ezekiel18:9 agoberera amateeka gange, n'ebiragiro byange abikwata obutiribiri, oyo ye mutuukirivu, aliba mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Singa alizaala omwana nga munyazi, ayiwa omusaayi, oba akola ekimu ku biri," 
Ezekiel18:11 sso nga ye kitaawe ebyo byonna tabikolanga: ng'omwana aliira ku nsozi, agwagwawaza muka munne," 
Ezekiel18:12 anyigiriza omunaku n'omwavu, anyakula ebya bandi, omusingo taguzzaayo, asitulira amaaso ebifaananyi bya balubaale, akola ebyenyinyalwa," 
Ezekiel18:13 awola n'obuliika n'atwala amagoba agayitiridde, oyo alirama? Talirama. Nga bwe yamala n'akola ebyo byonna ebyenyinyalwa, wa kuttibwa, n'omusaayi gwe gulibeera ku mutwe gwe." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Naye singa azaala omwana, n'alaba ebibi byonna ebya kitaawe by'akola, naye ye n'atya, n'atakola kye kimu," 
Ezekiel18:15 n'ataliira ku nsozi, n'atasitulira maaso ge bifaananyi bya balubaale eby'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, n'atagwagwawaza muka munne," 
Ezekiel18:16 n'atanyigiriza muntu, n'atasaba musingo, n'atanyakula bintu, emmere ye n'agigabirako ku muyala, n'ayita obusa n'amuwaayo ku kagoye," 
Ezekiel18:17 n'ataganya mukono gwe kukola bubi, n'atawola na buliika yadde okutwala amagoba agayitiridde, n'akwata amateeka gange, n'atambulira mu biragiro byange, oyo talifa olw'ebibi bya kitaawe, oyo alirama." 
Ezekiel18:18 Naye kitaawe kubanga yakumpanya, yanyakula munne, n'atakola kalungi mu bantu banne, oyo y'alifa olw'ebibi bye." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Mugamba nti: ‘Lwaki omwana teyeetikka musango gwa kibi kya kitaawe?’ Lwa kubeera ng'omwana yakola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu, amateeka gange gonna n'agakwata butiribiri, aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:20 Omuntu aliba akoze ekibi y'alifa; omwana talyetikka musango gwa kibi kya kitaawe, ne kitaawe talyetikka musango gwa kibi kya mutabani we. Obutuukirivu bw'omutuukirivu buliba ku ye, n'ekibi ky'omubi kiriba ku ye." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Naye omubi bw'akyuka n'ava ku bibi bye byonna bye yali akoze, n'akwata amateeka gange gonna, n'akola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu, oyo alirama, talifa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Emisango gye gyonna gye yazza tegirijjukirwa kumuvuunaanibwa; olw'obutuukirivu bwe yakola alibeera mulamu. 
Ezekiel18:23 Kazzi nsanyukira okufa kw'omubi, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, oba nsinga kusanyukira eky'omubi okuva mu makubo ge abeere mulamu?" 
Ezekiel18:24 “Naye omutuukirivu bw'aliwaba n'ava mu butuukirivu bwe, n'akola obubi, n'akola ebyenyinyalwa byonna omubi by'akola, alirama? Ebikolwa byonna eby'obutuukirivu by'aliba akoze tebirijjukirwa. Olw'okubeera obulyake bwe obumuvunaanibwa olw'ebibi bye yakola, alifa." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Kati mugamba nti: ‘Ekkubo ly'Omukama si ttuufu.’ Kale, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, wulira: Ekkubo eryange lye litali ttuufu, sso si gammwe ge gatali matuufu?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Singa omutuukirivu awaba n'ava mu butuukirivu bwe, n'akola obubi, alifa olw'ekyo; olw'obubi bw'akoze, alifa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Naye omubi akyuka n'aleka obugwenyufu bwe, n'akola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu, aliwonya obulamu bwe." 
Ezekiel18:28 Kubanga yalowooza ku nsobi ze zonna ze yakola n'azireka, aliba mulamu, talifa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Naye ennyumba ya Yisirayeli egamba nti: ‘Ekkubo ly'Omukama si ttuufu.’ Amakubo agange ge gatali matuufu, nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, sso si gammwe ge gatali matuufu?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Awo nno, nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, buli omu ndimulamula nga ngerera ku makubo ge, Omukama Katonda y'agamba. Mwenenye, muve mu bisobyo byammwe byonna, ekibi kireme kubeera nsonga ya kuzikirira kwammwe." 
Ezekiel18:31 Mweggyeko emisango gyammwe gyonna gye mwazza, mufune omutima omuggya n'omwoyo omuggya. Lwaki mwandifudde, mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Kubanga nze sisanyukira kufa kwa muntu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba. Mwenenye mubeere balamu.”" 
Ezekiel19:1 Yimba oluyimba olukungubagira abakungu ba Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel19:2 Gamba nti: “Nnyoko nga yali mpologoma enkazi mu mpologoma! Yagalamiranga mu buwologoma wakati; n'egabirira obwana bwayo. 
Ezekiel19:3 Yakuza akamu mu buwologoma bwayo, ne kavubukamu empologoma. N'eyiga okutaagula omuyiggo; n'ekavvula abantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Amawanga gaawulira ne gajja okugirumba, n'ekwatirwa mu buya bwabwe; ne bagitwalira ku malobo mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Ezekiel19:5 “Enkazi bwe yalaba nga kye yali egoba tekituukiridde, ng'essuubi lyayo ligenze, n'eddira akalala ku buwologoma bwayo, n'ekafuulamu empologoma ey'amaanyi." 
Ezekiel19:6 Keekandagganga kati mu buwologoma bunnaako, ne kavubukamu empologoma. Yayiga okutaagula omuyiggo, n'ekavvula abantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Yamenya ebigo byabwe, n'ereka ttayo ebibuga byabwe. Ensi yonna n'abagirimu baawuniikirira olw'eddoboozi ly'okuwuluguma kwayo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Amawanga ne gavaayo okugirumba, okuva wonna mu masaza ku njuyi zonna, baagitaayiza n'ekitimba kyabwe, n'ekwatirwa mu buya bwabwe." 
Ezekiel19:9 N'amalobo baagissa mu kiguli, ne bagitwala ewa kabaka w'e Babiloni, Yagissa mu nkomyo, eddoboozi lyayo lireme kuddamu kuwulirwa ku nsozi za Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 “Nnyoko ali ng'omuzabbibu mu nnimiro ogwasimbibwa awali amazzi, gwassaako ebibala n'amatabi mangi olw'amazzi amangi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Amatabi gaagwo amagumu gaavaamu ddamula w'omufuzi. Gwalangajja ne guwanvuwa mu buggumivu bw'amakoola gaagwo, nga gulengererwa wala olw'obutumbiivu n'obungi bw'amatabi gaagwo." 
Ezekiel19:12 Naye gwasimbulibwa mu busungu, ne gusuulibwa ku ttaka; empewo y'ebuvanjuba yagukaza, ebibala byagwo ne bikunkumukako; amatabi gaagwo amagumu gaakala, omuliro ne gugasenkenya." 
Ezekiel19:13 Kati gwasimbulizibwa guli mu ddungu, mu nsi enkalu, erakasidde." 
Ezekiel19:14 Omuliro gwatumbuka okuva mu nduli yaagwo, ne gusenkenya ebibala byagwo; tegwasigazaako ttabi ggumu muyinza kuva ddamula wa mufuzi.” Luno luyimba lwa kukungubaga era lwa kweyambisibwanga mu kukungubaga." 
Ezekiel20:1 Mu mwaka ogwomusanvu, mu mwezi ogwokutaano, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, abamu ku bakadde ba Yisirayeli bajja okwebuuza ku Mukama, ne batuula awo mu maaso gange." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mwana w'omuntu, yogera eri abakadde ba Yisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kazzi muzze kunneebuuzaako? Nze nga ndi mulamu, sijja kubakkiriza kunneebuuzaako, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 “Onoobalamula? Mwana w'omuntu, onoobalamula? Awo nno balage ebyenyinyalwa bya bajjajjaabwe." 
Ezekiel20:5 Ojja kubagamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ku lunaku lwe nalonda Yisirayeli, nalayira eri ezzadde ly'ennyumba ya Yakobo, ne mbalabikira mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nagolola omukono ne ndayira, ne mbagamba nti: “Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Ezekiel20:6 Ku olwo nabalayirira nti ndibaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri mbatwale mu nsi gye nali mbalabidde, ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, etejjika bulungi mu mawanga gonna." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ne mbagamba nti: “Buli omu asuule eri ebyenyinyalwa kw'asimbye amaaso ge, temwegwagwawaza na bifaananyi bya balubaale eby'e Misiri, nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Ezekiel20:8 Naye banjeemera bujeemezi, tebampulira, tebaggyawo byenyinyalwa kwe baali basimbye amaaso gaabwe, n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale b'e Misiri tebaabireka. Ne ŋŋamba nti nzija kubamalirako obusungu bwange, obuswandi bwange nzija kububamalirako eyo gye bali mu Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Naye ku lw'obulungi bw'erinnya lyange nabaggya mu Misiri, kino nakikola okuziyiza erinnya lyange okwonoonebwa mu mawanga gye baali, era agaali gandabye nga mbeeyoleka mu Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:10 Nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne mbaleeta mu ddungu," 
Ezekiel20:11 ne mbawa amateeka gange, ne mbamanyisa ebiragiro byange, alibikwata alibeera mulamu olw'okubeera byo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ne mbaweerako ne Sabbaato zange, kabeere akabonero wakati wange nabo, bamanye nti nze Mukama abatukuza." 
Ezekiel20:13 Naye ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yanjeemera mu ddungu: sibaatambulira mu biragiro byange, n'amateeka gange ne bagasambajja, sso ng'omuntu abikwata aliba mulamu olw'okubeera byo; Sabbaato zange ne bazoonoona nnyo. Kyennava ŋŋamba nti nzija kubamalirako obusungu bwange, mbawemmentere mu ddungu." 
Ezekiel20:14 Naye ku lw'obulungi bw'erinnya lyange nabaggya mu Misiri, kino nakikola okuziyiza erinnya lyange okwonoonebwa mu mawanga gye nabaggya nga bali balaba." 
Ezekiel20:15 Nalayira gye bali nga bali mu ddungu nti siribayingiza mu nsi gye nabawa, ensi ekulukuta amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, etejjika bulungi mu mawanga gonna," 
Ezekiel20:16 kubanga baasambajja ebiragiro byange, tebaagoberera mateeka gange, ne boonoona Sabbaato zange; anti omutima gwabwe gwali gwesibidde ku bifaananyi bya balubaale." 
Ezekiel20:17 Naye nabatunuulira n'ekisa, ne sibatta, ne sibawemmentera mu ddungu." 
Ezekiel20:18 “Nagamba abaana baabwe mu ddungu nti: ‘Temugobereranga biragiro bya bajjajjammwe, temukwatanga mpisa zaabwe, era temwegwagwawazanga na bifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale." 
Ezekiel20:19 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe; mugobererenga amateeka gange, mukwatenga butiribiri ebiragiro byange." 
Ezekiel20:20 Sabbaato zange muzitukuzenga, ke kaba kaba akabonero wakati wange nammwe. Olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’" 
Ezekiel20:21 Naye abaana banjeemera; tebaatambulira mu mateeka gange; tebaakuuma biragiro byange, sso ng'omuntu abikwata n'abituusa aba mulamu olw'okubeera byo; ne Sabbaato zange ne bazoonoona. Ne ŋŋamba nti nzija kubamalirako obusungu bwange, mbafukumulireko obuswandi bwange mu ddungu." 
Ezekiel20:22 Naye neekomako, olw'obulungi bw'erinnya lyange nakola ekyo ekyandiriziyizza okwonooneka mu maaso g'amawanga gye nali mbaggye." 
Ezekiel20:23 Era nalayira gye bali nga bali mu ddungu nga bwe nali ŋŋenda okubasaasaanya mu mawanga, mbasanse mu nsi," 
Ezekiel20:24 kubanga tebaatuusa biragiro byange, amateeka gange ne bagasambajja, Sabbaato zange ne bazoonoona n'amaaso gaabwe ne gakwatirwa ebifaananyi bya bajjajjaabwe ebya balubaale amaddu." 
Ezekiel20:25 Nange kyennava mbawaayo eri ebiragiro ebitali birungi n'amateeka mwe bataasange bulamu. 
Ezekiel20:26 Nabaleka ne beejaajaamya n'ebirabo byabwe – nga bawonga buli muggulanda w'olubuto mu muliro - ndyoke mbaleetere okwetamwa, bamanye nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Olw'ekyo nno, mwana w'omuntu, yogera eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ne mu kino bajjajjammwe banvuma, bwe banjabulira." 
Ezekiel20:28 Anti bwe nabayingiza mu nsi gye nabalayirira okubawa, bwe baalaba buli kasozi akagulumivu na buli muti oguggumiza, nga batambirirayo ebitambiro, nga baweereza eby'okunnyiiza, nga bassa eyo obuwoowo obulungi n'ebitone byabwe eby'okuyiwa." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ne mbagamba nti: “Kigulumivu ki ekyo gye mugenda?” N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero kiyitibwa Bama.’ 
Ezekiel20:30 “Kale nno, gamba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mwegwagwawaza nga bajjajjammwe bwe baakola, ne mukwatirwa ebyenyinyalwa byabwe amaddu?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Bwe muweereza ebirabo byammwe nga muwonga abaana bammwe mu muliro, mwegwagwawaza n'ebifaananyi byammwe byonna ebya balubaale n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. Awo nno nze mbakkirize okunneebuuzaako, mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli? Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, sigenda kubakkiriza kunneebuzaako." 
Ezekiel20:32 “ ‘Kye mulowooza mu mitima gyammwe si bwe kiriba, bwe mugamba nti: “Tube ng'abantu abalala, ng'amawanga ag'omu nsi, tusinze emiti n'amayinja.”" 
Ezekiel20:33 “ ‘Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, nzija kubafuga n'omukono ogw'amaanyi, n'omukono omugolole, ko n'obuswandi bwonna." 
Ezekiel20:34 Nzija kubaggyayo mu mawanga, mbakuŋŋaanye eyo yonna mu nsi gye musaasaanidde n'omukono ogw'amaanyi, ko n'omukono omugolole, n'obuyinza ko n'obuswandi obufukumule." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndibaleeta mu ddungu ly'abantu, eyo, maaso ku maaso, mbalamule." 
Ezekiel20:36 Nga bwe nalamula bajjajjammwe mu ddungu ly'omu Misiri, bwe ntyo bwe ndibalamula, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndibayisa wansi w'omuggo gwange, ne mbaleeta ne mukola endagaano." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndibagogolamu abo abajeemu, abamenyi b'amateeka gange. Newandibadde ndibaggya mu nsi kati mwe bali, naye tebaliyingira mu nsi ya Yisirayeli; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda." 
Ezekiel20:39 “ ‘Nammwe ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Buli omu mu mmwe agende agoberere ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale, abiweereze. Naye oluvannyuma mulimpulira, ne mulekera awo okwonoona erinnya lyange n'ebirabo byammwe n'ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale." 
Ezekiel20:40 Kubanga ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu, ku katemyo k'olusozi lwa Yisirayeli, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, eyo ennyumba yonna eya Yisirayeli, bonna mu nsi, balimpeereza, nange ndibasanyukira; eyo gye ndibasabira ebitambiro byammwe, n'ebibala ebisooka bye muweereza n'ebyonziira byammwe byonna ebitukuvu." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ndibasanyukira ng'obubaani obw'akawoowo, bwe ndimala okubaggya mu mawanga n'okubakuŋŋaanya okuva mu mawanga gye mwasaasaanyizibwa; awo mu maaso g'amawanga gonna ndyeraga nga bwendi omutukuvu mu mmwe." 
Ezekiel20:42 Olwo mulimanya anti nze Mukama, bwe ndibayingiza mu nsi ya Yisirayeli, ensi gye nalayira okuwa bajjajjammwe." 
Ezekiel20:43 Eyo mulijjukira amakubo gammwe n'ebibi byammwe byonna bye mweyonoonamu; olwo mulyekyawa mwennyini olw'ebibi byammwe byonna bye mwakola. 
Ezekiel20:44 Mulimanya nti nze Mukama, mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, bwe ndibakolako olw'obulungi bw'erinnya lyange, naye nga sisinziira ku makubo gammwe amabi n'ebikolwa byammwe ebikyamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go goolekeze emaserengeta olange ng'oyogerera amaserengeta, oyogerere ebibira by'omu Negevu." 
Ezekiel21:3 Gamba ekibira ky'e Negevu nti: ‘Wulira ekigambo ky'Omukama: Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kukuteekera omuliro, gwokye mu ggwe buli muti, omubisi n'omukalu. Omuliro ogulituntumuka tegulizikira; wonna kungulu wagenda kuggya, okuva emaserengeta okutuuka emambuka." 
Ezekiel21:4 Buli muntu yenna aliraba nti nze Mukama nze nguteekedde; tegulizikizibwa.’ ” 
Ezekiel21:5 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Yii! Ayi Mukama Katonda! Banjogerako nti: ‘Oyo ayisa buyisa ngero!’ ” 
Ezekiel21:6 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel21:7 “Mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go gatunuulize Yeruzaalemu, oyogerere Ekitukuvu, langa ng'oyogerera ensi ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel21:8 Gamba ensi ya Yisirayeli nti ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: Nkuli bukiika; nzija kusowola ekitala kyange mu kiraato kyakyo, nkuttemu omutuukirivu n'omubi;" 
Ezekiel21:9 Kubanga ŋŋenda kutta omutuukirivu n'omubi, ekitala kyange kijja kusowolerwayo buli muntu, okuva emaserengeta okutuuka emambuka." 
Ezekiel21:10 Olwo buli muntu alimanya nti: nze Omukama nze nsowodde ekitala kyange mu kiraato kyakyo, ate si kya kuzzaamu.’" 
Ezekiel21:11 “Mwana w'omuntu, mu maaso gaabwe sinda olw'obwennyifu bw'omutima, sinda olw'ennaku." 
Ezekiel21:12 Bwe banaakubuuza nti: ‘Lwaki osinda?’ bagambe nti: ‘Olw'ebyo bye mpulidde; buli mutima gujja kutenguka na buli mukono gujja kulagaya; buli mutima gujja kutekemuka, n'entegetege zirinafuwa ng'amazzi. Kijja! Kijja kubaawo, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:13 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel21:14 “Mwana w'omuntu, langa ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba.’ Gamba nti: “ ‘Ekitala, ekitala kiwagaddwa, kiwawuddwa;" 
Ezekiel21:15 Kiwagaddwa okusanjaga; kiwawuddwa kimyanse nga laddu… 
Ezekiel21:16 Yakiwaayo kiwawulwe kikwatike mu mukono; kiwagaddwa, kiwawuddwa, kissibwe mu mukono gw'omusanjazi.’" 
Ezekiel21:17 Mwana w'omuntu, leekaana, kuba ebiwoobe, kubanga kijjidde abantu bange; kijjidde bonna abakungu ba Yisirayeli, bagabuddwa eri ekitala, bo wamu n'abantu bange. Awo nno weesansabage." 
Ezekiel21:18 Kubanga kino kijja kubeera kigezo… Omukama Katonda y'agamba.” 
Ezekiel21:19 “Kale nno, Mwana w'omuntu, langa; kuba mu ngalo. Ekitala kikube emirundi ebiri, kikube esatu. Kino kitala kya kusanjaga, kya kusanjaga okunene okubeetoolodde wonna." 
Ezekiel21:20 Emitima gimerenguke, abattibwa beeyongere obungi; ntadde ekitala ekisanjaga ku buli mulyango, kimyansa nga laddu, kiwawuddwa okusanjaga." 
Ezekiel21:21 Saawa ku ddyo, bw'otyo ne ku kkono wonna obwogi gye butunuziddwa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Nange nzija kukuba mu ngalo, n'obuswandi bwange bulikkakkana, nze Omukama nze njogedde.”" 
Ezekiel21:23 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel21:24 “Mwana w'omuntu lamba enguudo bbiri ekitala kya kabaka w'e Babiloni ze kinaakwata; zombi nga zitandikira mu nsi emu; teeka ekipande mu masaŋŋanzira oluguudo we lugendera mu kibuga. 
Ezekiel21:25 Oluguudo olumu lulambire ekitala ekinaalaga e Rabba eky'Abammoni, n'olulala olulambire ekitala ekinaalaga mu Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu okuli bbugwe omugumu." 
Ezekiel21:26 Kubanga kabaka w'e Babiloni ayimiridde mu masaŋŋanzira enguudo ebbiri we zaawukanira ng'ayagala okulagulwa: akyanga obusaale, yeebuuza ku bulubaale bwe obw'awaka, yeekebejja ekibumbe." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ebigwa mu gwa ddyo bya Yeruzaalemu: wa w'anassa endoddo ezikoona, aw'okuduumirira okusanjaga, ow'okulayiriza enduulu, ow'okussa endoddo z'okukoona enzigi, aw'okutuuma embibiro n'okuzimba ekikomera." 
Ezekiel21:28 Mu maaso gaabwe ali ng'alaguuliriza obwereere, balayira n'ebirayiro, naye alibajjukiza ekibi kyabwe n'abawamba." 
Ezekiel21:29 Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga muleetedde ebibi byammwe okujjukirwa nga mwoleka emisango gyammwe, n'ebibi byammwe ne birabika mu byonna bye mukola, mugidde ne mukola mutyo mujjukirwe, mujja kuwambibwa." 
Ezekiel21:30 Naye ggwe, omulangira wa Yisirayeli, omubi kalibugwagwa, ennaku gwe zikeereredde, obw'okulamulibwa gwe butuukiridde," 
Ezekiel21:31 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ettambaala liggye ku mutwe, n'engule gyetikkule. Ebintu tebijja kusigala nga bwe byali; ekitene kijja kugulumizibwa, n'ekigulumivu kissibwe wansi." 
Ezekiel21:32 Kifulukwa! Kifulukwa! Kifulukwa bwe nzija okukifuula; tekiridda buggya okutuusa lw'anajja oyo nnannyini kyo mu butuufu, oyo gwe ndikiwa." 
Ezekiel21:33 “Naawe, mwana w'omuntu, langa, ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba ku Bammoni ne ku bivumo byabwe.’ Olibagamba nti: “ ‘Ekitala, ekitala, kisowoddwa kusanjaga, kiwawuddwa kuzikiriza, kumyansa nga laddu!’" 
Ezekiel21:34 Newandibadde baalabikirwa bya bulimba ku lulwo, nga n'ebyalagulwa ku lulwo byali bya sswakaba, birissibwa ku nsingo z'ababi, olunaku be lukeereredde, obw'okulamulibwa kwabwe be lutuukiridde." 
Ezekiel21:35 Kizzeeyo mu kiraato kyakyo. Mu kifo mwe watonderwa, mu nsi y'obuzaale bwo, mwe nzija okukulamulira." 
Ezekiel21:36 Nzija kukumalirako obusungu bwange, ndikufuuyira omuliro gw'obuswandi bwange; ndikuwaayo mu mikono gy'abantu abakambwe, abamanyirivu mu kuzikiriza." 
Ezekiel21:37 Oliba nku za muliro, omusaayi gwo guliyiibwa mu nsi yo; toliddayo kujjukirwa, kubanga nze Omukama nze njogedde.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel22:2 “Naawe mwana w'omuntu, onoolamula, onoolamula ekibuga eky'omusaayi? Awo nno mulage ebyenyinyalwa bye byonna," 
Ezekiel22:3 mugambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Wattu ekibuga ekiyiwa omusaayi mu kyo wakati, okwezimbiriza obudde, ekikola ebifaananyi bya balubaale okwegwagwawaza." 
Ezekiel22:4 Ozzizza omusango olw'omusaayi gwo gwe wayiwa n'olw'ebifaananyi byo ebya balubaale bye wakola ebyakwonoona; ennaku zo ozisembezezza n'enkomerero y'emyaka gyo etuuse. Kyennava nkufuula ekisekererwa mu mawanga n'eky'okunyooma mu nsi yonna. 
Ezekiel22:5 Abakuli okumpi n'abakuli ewala balikunyooma, ggwe ow'erinnya ebbi, ajjudde obutabanguko." 
Ezekiel22:6 “ ‘Laba, abakungu ba Yisirayeli abali mu ggwe buli omu yeeyamba obuyinza bwe okuyiwa omusaayi." 
Ezekiel22:7 Mu makkati go omuzadde omusajja n'omuzadde omukazi baanyoomebwa, mu ggwe omugwira n'anyigirizibwa; mulekwa ne nnamwandu baabonyaabonyezebwa." 
Ezekiel22:8 Mugayizza ebintu byange ebitukuvu ne Sabbaato zange ne muzoonoona. 
Ezekiel22:9 Mu ggwe mulimu abantu abakonjera, abagenderera okuyiwa omusaayi; mu ggwe mulimu abaliira ku nsozi, n'abakola eby'obugwenyufu." 
Ezekiel22:10 Mu ggwe mulimu abeebaka ne baka bakitaabwe, mu ggwe mulimu abatoowaza abakazi nga bakyali boonoonefu mu biseera byabwe eby'omwezi." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mu ggwe omu akola eby'obugwenyufu ne muka munne, omulala n'agwagwawaza mukaamwana; omulala mu ggwe n'ayonoona mwannyina, muwala wa kitaawe ddala." 
Ezekiel22:12 Mu ggwe abantu bakkiriza okulya enguzi bayiwe omusaayi; okkiriza okuwola n'obuliika n'okutwala amagoba agayitiridde n'ofunira ku munno ng'omulyazaamaanyi; nange onneerabidde, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel22:13 “ ‘Engalo zange nzija kuzikubamu olw'amagoba agayitiridde ge wakola ne ku lw'omusaayi gwe wayiwa mu makkati go. 
Ezekiel22:14 Omutima gwo guliguma n'emikono gyo giribaamu otwanyi ku lunaku lwe ndikukwatamu? Nze Omukama njogedde era nzija kukikola. 
Ezekiel22:15 Nzija kukusaasaanya mu mawanga, nkusanse mu nsi; ndikomya obwonoonefu bwo." 
Ezekiel22:16 Olw'ensobi zo zennyini olyeyonoona mu maaso g'amawanga, olwo olimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Ate ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mwana w'omuntu, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli enfuukidde ssengere; bino byonna: ekikomo, ebbaati, essasi ne ffeeza bifuuse ssengere mu kabiga wakati." 
Ezekiel22:19 N'olw'ekyo Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga mwenna mufuuse ssengere, nzija kubakuŋŋaanyiza mu Yeruzaalemu wakati." 
Ezekiel22:20 Ng'abantu bwe bakuŋŋaanyiza ffeeza n'ekikomo, ekyuma, essasi n'ebbaati mu kabiga, omuliro ne gukumwa wansi ne bisaanuuka, bwe ntyo mu buswandi ne mu busungu bwange bwe ndibakuŋŋaanya ne mbassaamu musaanuuke." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ndibakuŋŋaanya ne mbateekera n'omuliro ogw'obuswandi bwange; mulisaanuukira omwo munda. 
Ezekiel22:22 Nga ffeeza bw'asaanuukira mu kabiga, nammwe bwe mulisaanuuka mutyo mu ye. Mulimanya nti nze Omukama mbamaliddeko obusungu bwange.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Era ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mwana w'omuntu, mugambe nti: ‘Ggwe oli ttaka okutatonnye nkuba yadde oluwandaggirize ku lunaku olw'obusungu." 
Ezekiel22:25 Abakungu mu ye bali ng'empologoma ewuluguma, egajambula omuyiggo; bakavvula abantu, batwala n'eby'obugagga, ne bannamwandu babongedde obungi mu ye." 
Ezekiel22:26 Bakabona batyobodde etteeka lyange ne bajaajaamya ebintu byange ebitukuvu; tebaawula kitukuvu na kitali kitukuvu; tebayigiriza njawulo wakati w'ekitali kirongoofu n'ekirongoofu; eky'okutuukiriza Sabbaato zange bakizibira amaaso, ne mpeebuuka mu bo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abakungu baabwe mu ye, bali ng'emisege egigajambula omuyiggo gwagyo; bayiwa omusaayi n'okuzikiriza obulamu olw'okufuna mu bulyazaamaanyi." 
Ezekiel22:28 Abalanzi be byonna ebyo babimaalako ennoni n'okulabikirwa omutaali butuufu n'okulanga ebya sswakaba nga bagamba nti: “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba,” sso ng'Omukama tannayogera." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abantu b'ensi eno balyazaamaanya, banyaga n'eryanyi, babonyaabonya omunkuseere n'omunaku, banyigiriza omugwira awatali kubalira." 
Ezekiel22:30 Mu bo nanoonyaamu omusajja eyandizimbye bbugwe, eyandiyimiriddewo n'obuzira mu maaso gange ataase ensi nneme kugisaanyaawo, naye saamusanga." 
Ezekiel22:31 Awo nno nzija kubamalirako obusungu bwange, mbasenkenye n'omuliro gw'obuswandi bwange, nzise ku mitwe gyabwe bye baakola, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, waaliwo abawala babiri, nga bazaalibwa nnyabwe omu." 
Ezekiel23:3 Baakolera obwamalaaya mu Misiri, nga bamalaaya okuva mu buvubuka bwabwe; eyo ennywanto zaabwe gye zaanyigirwanyigirwa n'amabeere g'obuwala bwabwe gye gaatogererwa." 
Ezekiel23:4 Amannya gaabwe, omukulu ye Ola, ate muganda we ye Oliba. Baali bange ne bazaala abaana abalenzi n'abawala. Amannya, Ola ye Samariya, ne Oliba ye Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ola yatandika obwamalaaya ng'akyali wange, n'akwatirwa baganzi be amaddu, Abassuri abatabaazi," 
Ezekiel23:6 abambala kakobe, abaamasaza n'abaami, bonna nga bavubuka abeegombebwa, abeebagazi b'embalaasi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Yakola obwenzi n'Abassuri ab'ebika ebya waggulu, ne yeegwagwawaza n'ebifaananyi byabwe byonna ebya balubaale, eby'abo bonna be yakwatirwa amaddu." 
Ezekiel23:8 Teyaleka bwenzi bwe yaliko mu Misiri, abasajja gye beebakanga naye mu buvubuka bwe, ne bakwatirira amabeere g'obuwala bwe, ne bamumalirako obwenzi bwabwe." 
Ezekiel23:9 “Kyennava mmuwaayo mu mikono gya baganzi be, mu mikono gy'Abassuri be yakwatirwa amaddu." 
Ezekiel23:10 Bano baamuleka bwereere, batabani be ne bawala be ne babatwala, naye yennyini ne bamutta n'ekitala. Yafuuka mboozi mu bakazi olw'ekibonerezo ekyamussibwako." 
Ezekiel23:11 Muganda we Oliba kino yakiraba, naye ye n'alaluka n'okumusinga mu bugwenyufu ne mu bwenzi bwe, n'akola obwamalaaya n'okukira muganda we." 
Ezekiel23:12 Naye yakwatirwa Abassuri amaddu: be baamasaza, abaami n'abatabaazi abambadde ne baggumira, abeebagazi b'embalaasi, n'abavubuka bonna abeegombebwa." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ne ndaba nga naye yeegwagwawazza; bombi ekkubo baakwata limu. 
Ezekiel23:14 Obwenzi bwe yabwongera mu maaso; bwe yalaba abasajja aboole ku kisenge, ebifaananyi by'Abakaludeya, abooleko mu langi emmyufu," 
Ezekiel23:15 nga beesibye ebimyu mu biwato, ku mitwe gyabwe ng'ebitambaala biweeba, bonna nga bafaanana ng'abagabe ab'oku bigaali Abakaludeya abazaaliranwa b'omu Kaludeya," 
Ezekiel23:16 olwabalaba ati, n'abakwatirwa amaddu, nabatumira ababaka mu Kaludeya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Abakaludeya ne bajja gy'ali ku kitanda eky'omukwano, ne bamugwagwawaza mu bwenzi bwabwe. Bwe baamala okumwonoona, n'akyukira eri ng'abeetamiddwa." 
Ezekiel23:18 Bwe yayongera mu maaso obwenzi bwe mu kyeere, ne yeereka bwereere, nze ne nkyukira eri nga mmwetamiddwa, nga bwe nakyukira eri nga neetamiddwa muganda we." 
Ezekiel23:19 Obwenzi bwe yabwongera bwongezi obungi, ng'ajjukira ebbanga ery'obuvubuka bwe lwe yakolanga obwamalaaya mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Ezekiel23:20 Eyo gye yakwatirwa baganzi be amaddu, ab'obusolo obwali ng'obw'endogoyi, n'amazzi gaabwe agaali ng'ag'embalaasi." 
Ezekiel23:21 “Weegomba obugwenyufu bw'omu buvubuka bwo, mu Misiri ennywanto zo gye baazinyigiranyigira n'amabeere g'omu buvubuka bwo gye baagakwatirira." 
Ezekiel23:22 Kati nno, Oliba, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Baganzi bo nzija kubagira bakwefuulire, abo be wakuba amabega ng'obeeetamiddwa, nzija kubakuwendulira ku njuyi zonna." 
Ezekiel23:23 Ab'e Babiloni, Abakaludeya bonna, abantu b'e Pekodi, Sowa ne Kowa. Bonna Abassuri nga bali nabo, abavubuka bonna abeegombebwa, abaamasaza, abagabe ab'oku bigaali, na bonna abayitibwa abeebitiibwa abeebagala embalaasi" 
Ezekiel23:24 balikujjira nga bava emambuka n'ebigaali n'amagaali n'abantu nfaafa; balikuzinda ku njuyi zonna nga babagalidde engabo ennene n'entono n'enkufiira. Ndibawa ne balamula, balikulamula okusinziira ku nnamula yaabwe." 
Ezekiel23:25 Nzija kukumalirako ekiruyi kyange; balikuyisa na bukambwe. Balikusalako ennyindo n'amatu; abaliba basigaddewo mu mmwe balifa ekitala. Batabani bo ne bawala bo balibatwala; abaliba basigadde mu mmwe omuliro gulibasenkenya. 
Ezekiel23:26 Balikwambula ebyambalo byo ne batwala n'amagemu go ag'omuwendo. 
Ezekiel23:27 ndikomya obugwenyufu bwo n'obwamalaaya bwo bye watandikira mu Misiri. Amaaso go toliddamu kugatunuuliza bintu ebyo, ne Misiri toliddamu kumujjukira." 
Ezekiel23:28 Kubanga Omukama Katonda kino ky'ayogera: Nzija kukuwaayo mu mikono gy'abo b'okyawa ne mu gy'abo be wakuba amabega ng'obeetamiddwa. 
Ezekiel23:29 Balikuyisa na bukambwe, era balitwala buli kye wateganira, balikuleka bwereere, busa, n'ensonyi z'obwamalaaya bwo ziryanikibwa; obugwenyufu bwo n'obwenzi bwo" 
Ezekiel23:30 bwe bukuleetedde bino, kubanga wakwatirwa amawanga amaddu, ne weegwagwawaza n'ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wakwata ekkubo lya muganda wo, nange nno ekikompe kye nzija kukikussa mu ngalo." 
Ezekiel23:32 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Ojja kunywa ekikompe kya muganda wo, ekinene ate ekiwanvu; - kirikuleetera okusekererwa, kirikunyoomeesa - anti kijjuddemu bingi." 
Ezekiel23:33 Olijjula obutamiivu n'ennaku, ekikompe eky'entiisa n'okuzikirira, ekikompe kya muganda wo Samariya." 
Ezekiel23:34 Olikinywa n'okikaliza kyonna; olikyasaayasa obulere, n'otaagulataagula amabeere go; kubanga nze njogedde,’ Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel23:35 “Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga nze wanneerabira, n'onkasuka emabega wo, naawe ojja kuvunaanibwa obugwenyufu bwo n'obwenzi bwo.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, onoolamula Ola ne Oliba? Kale balage ebyenyinyalwa byabwe," 
Ezekiel23:37 kubanga baakola obwenzi, n'omusaayi guli ku mikono gyabwe; baakola obwenzi n'ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale; ne batabani baabwe be banzaalira baabawongera ebifaananyi bya balubaale mu muliro ng'ekyokulya." 
Ezekiel23:38 Na kino baakinkola: baajaajaamya Ekitukuvu kyange, ate mu kaseera ke kamu nga boonoona Ekitukuvu kyange, baayonoona ne Sabbaato zange." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ku lunaku olwo lwennyini lwe baatambiranga batabani baabwe eri ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale, bayingira Ekitukuvu kyange ne bakijaajaamya. By'ebyo bye baakolanga mu nnyumba yange." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Baatumiranga n'abasajja abava ewala obubaka; bwe bajjanga, ng'obeeyonjeza, amaaso ng'ogaziga, nga weewoomya n'amayinja ag'omuwendo." 
Ezekiel23:41 Olwo n'otuula ku kitanda eky'omuwendo, awo mu maaso nga wategekeddwawo emmeeza, n'ossa okwo obubaani n'omuzigo ebyali ebyange." 
Ezekiel23:42 Oluyoogaano lw'ebbiina eriri emirembe nga lumwetoolodde; abasajja abatamiivu abaggyibwa okuva mu ddungu, n'abasajja batyo batyo, ne bambaza obukomo ku mikono gy'abakazi, ne babassa n'emige ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Ezekiel23:43 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Omukazi ono obwenzi bwe bumumazeewo, kati na bano bagenda kwebaka naye?’" 
Ezekiel23:44 Ne beebaka. Ng'abasajja bwe beebaka n'omukazi malaaya, bwe batyo bwe beebakanga n'abakazi ababiri abo, Ola ne Oliba, abagwenyufu." 
Ezekiel23:45 Kyokka abasajja abatuukirivu balibalamula n'ennamula eweebwa abakazi abakola obwenzi n'abakazi abayiwa omusaayi, kubanga bakola obwenzi n'omusaayi gubali ku mikono gyabwe." 
Ezekiel23:46 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mubakuŋŋaanyizeeko ekibiina, obaleke mu buyinza bw'entiisa n'okunyagibwa." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ekibiina kiribakuba amayinja, ne babatemaatema n'ebitala byabwe; batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe balibatta bonna n'ennyumba zaabwe ne bazookya omuliro." 
Ezekiel23:48 Bwe ntyo nzija kukomya obugwenyufu bwonna mu nsi, abakazi bayige; baleme kukola bugwenyufu ng'obubwo" 
Ezekiel23:49 Ojja kukola ekibonerezo ky'obugwenyufu bwo, olivunaanibwa n'ebibi by'obukafiiri bwo. Olwo olimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Mu mwaka ogwomwenda, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mwana w'omuntu olunaku luno lutonnyeze, olunaku luno lwennyini, olwa leero kabaka w'e Babiloni azinze Yeruzaalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ojja kuyisiza ennyumba eno enjeemu olugero obagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Ssaako entamu, gisseeko; gifukeemu amazzi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Suulamu ebifi by'ennyama, buli kitundu ekirungi: ekisambi n'omukono; kijjuze n'amagumba amalungi." 
Ezekiel24:5 Labayo endiga esinga mu kisibo. Wansi waayo tuumayo enku; tokoseza ddala ebifi ebirimu, fumba amagumba agali muli.’" 
Ezekiel24:6 “Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Zikusanze, ggwe ekibuga ekiyiwa omusaayi, entamu omuli obutalagge, ate obutalagge bwayo obutaliggwaamu! Ggyamu kifi ku kifi awatali kulobozaamu." 
Ezekiel24:7 “ ‘Kubanga omusaayi gwe kyayiwa gukirimu wakati; kyaguyiwa ku lwazi olwereere; tekyaguyiwa ku ttaka enfuufu we yandigubikkidde. 
Ezekiel24:8 Olw'okusiikuula obusungu bwange, mpoolere eggwanga, omusaayi kwe kugussa ku lwazi olwereere, guleme kubikkibwa.’" 
Ezekiel24:9 “ Olw'ekyo Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Zikusanze, ekibuga eky'omusaayi! Nange enku nzija kuzituuma." 
Ezekiel24:10 Naawe tuuma enku, koleeza omuliro; fumba bulungi ennyama, tabulamu ebirungo, n'amagumba gaggyiire ddala." 
Ezekiel24:11 “ ‘Entamu ŋŋenda kugissa ku manda nga nkalu okutuusa ng'ekikomo kyayo kyengeredde, kisiridde, obujama obubaddemu busiriire, n'obutalagge buggweemu." 
Ezekiel24:12 Naye kutuuyanira bwereere, obutalagge bwayo obungi bugaanyi okugenda n'omuliro." 
Ezekiel24:13 Obujama bwo bwe bugwenyufu bwo; kubanga nayagala okukutukuza nga tokkiriza kutukuzibwako bujama bwo; tolitukula okutuusa ng'obusungu bwange ku ggwe bukkakkanye. 
Ezekiel24:14 Nze Omukama nze njogedde; kijja kutuukirira, nzija kukikola. Sijja kwejjulula, sijja kusonyiwa, sijja kweddamu. Balikulamula nga basinziira ku makubo go n'ebikolwa byo nga bwe biri, y'agamba Omukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Ate ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mwana w'omuntu, n'olukuba lumu luti ŋŋenda okukuggyako byonna ebisanyusa amaaso go, sso ate totemanga emiranga yadde okukaaba yadde okuttulukusa amaziga." 
Ezekiel24:17 Osindiranga muli, tokuma lumbe lwa mufu; ettambaala lyo ery'oku mutwe lyesibe, ne mu bigere naanikamu engatto, n'amaaso togabikka kiremba, tolya mmere ya bakungubazi.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Ku makya nayogera eri abantu, ate akawungeezi mukazi wange n'afa. Enkeera nakolera ddala nga bwe nalagirwa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Abantu ne bambuuza nti: “Lwaki okola bw'otyo? Tootubuulire bino kye bigenderera kututegeeza?” 
Ezekiel24:20 Ne mbaddamu nti: “Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nga kigamba nti: 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Gamba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli nti Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kujaajaamya Ekitukuvu kyange, okwekuza kw'amaanyi gaabwe, essanyu ly'amaaso gammwe, kye musuuta okuzaama. Batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe be mwaleka emabega bajja kufa ekitala." 
Ezekiel24:22 Nammwe mulikola nga bwe nkoze: amaaso temuligabikka na kiremba, temulirya mmere ya bakungubazi," 
Ezekiel24:23 mulirekako ebitambala byammwe ku mitwe, mulinaanika engatto mu bigere; temulitema miranga yadde okukaaba, muliyenjebuka olw'ebibi byammwe, buli omu ng'asindira muganda we." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ezekyeli y'anaabeera akabonero gye muli. Mukolanga nga bw'akoze. Kino bwe kirigwawo, olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda.’"
