Ezekiel24:25 “Naawe, mwana w'omuntu, ku olwo lwe ndibaggyako ettendo ly'amaanyi gaabwe, essanyu n'ekitiibwa kyabwe, ekisanyusa amaaso gaabwe, omutima gwabwe kye gusuuta, ne batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe;" 
Ezekiel24:26 ku olwo aliba awonyeewo alijja akubuulire ebifuddeyo. 
Ezekiel24:27 Ku olwo akamwa ko kaligguka eri aliba awonyeewo, olyogera era toliddayo kubeera kasiru. Bw'otyo bw'olibeera akabonero gye bali, nabo balimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go gatunuulize Abammoni olange ng'oboogerera." 
Ezekiel25:3 Gamba Abammoni nti: ‘Muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama Katonda. Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nga bw'omaze n'ogamba ku kitukuvu kyange nti: “Ka alabe!” nga kijaajaamiziddwa, ne ku nsi ya Yisirayeli ng'efuuse matongo, ne ku nnyumba ya Yuda bwe baagenda mu buwaŋŋanguse," 
Ezekiel25:4 nange nzija kubawaayo mu bantu b'ebuvanjuba babezze ng'ekyabwe. Balizimba ensiisira zaabwe mu ggwe n'ebisulo byabwe ne babikuba mu ggwe; balirya ebibala byo ne banywa amata go. 
Ezekiel25:5 Rabba ndikifuula ddundiro lya ŋŋamiya, n'ebibuga by'Ammoni, kiwummuliro kya ndiga. Olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel25:6 “ ‘Kubanga Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga wakuba mu ngalo n'osambagala n'okusambagala, ng'osagambiza olw'obunyoomi bwo bwonna mu mutima bwe walina ku nsi ya Yisirayeli," 
Ezekiel25:7 nange nno nzija kukugololerako omukono gwange nkuweeyo ng'omunyago mu mawanga; nzija kukukutula ku mawanga, nkuzikirize ku nsi; nzija kukusaanyaawo, olwo olimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:8 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga Mowabu ne Seyiri baagamba nti: ‘Ennyumba ya Yuda efuuse ng'amawanga amalala,’" 
Ezekiel25:9 kale nno nzija kwerula olusozi lwa Mowabu nga ntandikira ku bibuga eby'oku nsalo, ettendo ly'ensi ye: Beti-Yesimoti, Baali-Mewoni ne Kariyatayimu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Nzija kuwaayo Mowabu wamu ne Ammoni eri abantu b'ebuvanjuba babezze ng'ekyabwe, Abammoni baleme kuddayo kujjukirwa mu mawanga." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ne Mowabu ŋŋenda kumubonereza; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel25:12 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga Edomu yawoolera eggwanga ku nnyumba ya Yuda, n'azza omusango munene mu kumwesasulizaako," 
Ezekiel25:13 kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba nti: Nzija kugololera omukono gwange ku Edomu mmumalemu abantu n'ensolo. Nzija kumufuula matongo; okuva e Temani okutuuka e Dedani, balifa kitala." 
Ezekiel25:14 Nzija kuwoolera eggwanga ku Edomu n'omukono gw'abantu bange Yisirayeli. Edomu balimukola ng'obusungu bwange n'obuswandi bwe byagala; balitegeera nga nze mpooledde eggwanga, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel25:15 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga Abafilisitiini baawoolera eggwanga ne beesasuza n'omutima ogulimu obunyoomi, ne baagala okusaanyaawo Yuda olw'obukyayi obw'edda," 
Ezekiel25:16 Omukama Katonda kyava agamba kino nti: Nzija kugololera ku Bafilisitiini omukono gwange; nzija kumalawo Abakereti, nzikirize n'abo abasigadde ku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Ezekiel25:17 Nzija kuwoolera eggwanga ku bo n'amaanyi, mbabonereze mu busungu bwange. Bwe ndimala okuwoolera eggwanga ku bo, balimanya nti nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu, ku lusooka mu mwezi, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, kubanga Tiiro yayogera ku Yeruzaalemu nti: “ ‘Ka alabe, omulyango gw'amawanga gumenyeddwa, enzigi bazimmanduliddewo, kati ng'afuuse matongo, nzija kugaggawala!’" 
Ezekiel26:3 Omukama Katonda kyava agamba nti: ‘Owange Tiiro, nkuli bukiika! Nzija kukuwendulira amawanga mangi okwenkana ng'ennyanja bw'esunda amayengo gaayo.’" 
Ezekiel26:4 Balisaanyaawo bbugwe wa Tiiro, ne basuula eminaala gyakyo, n'amafunfugu gaakyo ndigeerawo, ne nkirekera ddala olwazi olwereere." 
Ezekiel26:5 Mu makkati g'ennyanja kirifuuka wa kwanika butimba, kubanga nze njogedde, y'agamba Omukama Katonda; kirifuuka kya kwenyagira eri amawanga," 
Ezekiel26:6 n'ebyalo byakyo ku lukalu birivunjagwa ekitala, olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel26:7 “Kubanga Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nze nzija kusindikira Tiiro okuva emambuka Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, kabaka wa bakabaka, ng'ali n'embalaasi n'ebigaali n'abeebagazi n'eggye ddene." 
Ezekiel26:8 “Alivunjaga ebyalo byo ku lukalu n'ekitala; alituuma embibiro ez'okukuzindirako, alikuzimbako ekikomera, n'akwolekeza engabo okukulwanyisa." 
Ezekiel26:9 Alyolekeza n'akoona bbuggwe n'endoddo ez'entwe ezibomola, eminaala gyo n'agisuula n'ebyokulwanyisa bye." 
Ezekiel26:10 Akeesedde k'embalaasi ze kalikubikka enfuufu, bbugwe wo alikankana olw'omusinde gw'embalaasi, n'encaako y'amagaali n'ebigaali, bw'aliyingira emiryango gyo, ng'ayingira mu kibuga ekyabiziddwa." 
Ezekiel26:11 Ebiganja by'embalaasi ze biririnnyirira amakubo go gonna; alitta abantu bo n'ekitala, n'empagi zo ez'amaanyi ziryeyirimula ku ttaka." 
Ezekiel26:12 Balinyaga obugagga bwo bwonna, by'olina ne babyaya; bbugwe wo balimwabya n'ennyumba zo amakula ne bazimenya; amayinja go n'emiti, n'amafunfugu balibikasuka mu nnyanja." 
Ezekiel26:13 Nzija kukomya oluyoogaano lw'ennyimba zo, n'amaloboozi g'entongooli zo tegaliddayo kuwulirwa." 
Ezekiel26:14 Nzija kukufuula olwazi olwereere, ofuuke ekifo aw'okwanika obutimba; toliddayo kuzimbibwa, kubanga nze njogedde, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel26:15 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba Tiiro: Embalama teziriyuuguuma nga ziwulidde bw'ogudde, abafumitiddwa nga basindogoma n'okusanjaga nga kugenda mu maaso mu makkati go?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Abakungu bonna ab'oku lubalama baliva ku ntebe zaabwe ne bakka, ne beeyambula eminagiro gyabwe n'ebyambalo byabwe ebya langi entobeke, ne babisuula eri. Nga bajjudde okuwuniikirira, balituula mu ttaka ne babeera awo nga bakankana butamala, beewuunya ekikutuuseeko." 
Ezekiel26:17 Olwo balikuyimbira oluyimba olw'okukungubaga nga bagamba nti: “ ‘Ozikiridde otya ggwe asula ku nnyanja, ekibuga ekitutumufu, ekyali eky'amaanyi ku nnyanja, ggwe na bonna abakusulamu abaakubanga entiisa abatuuze b'eyo!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Kati ebizinga bijugumira ku lunaku lw'okugwa kwo, ebizinga mu nnyanja biwuniikiridde olw'enkomerero yo.’" 
Ezekiel26:19 “Kubanga Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Bwe ndikufuula ekibuga amatongo, ng'ebibuga omutabanga asulamu, era bwe ndikusitulirako eddubi, amazzi enkumu ne gakubikka," 
Ezekiel26:20 ndikukkiriza n'abo abakkirira mu bunnya eri abantu abaasooka; ndikuteeka n'osula mu nnyanga y'ensi, nga mu matongo ag'emirembe n'emirembe, awamu n'abo abakkirira mu bunnya, oleme kudda na kuddamu kufuna kifo mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Ezekiel26:21 Nzija kukusaanyaawo mu ngeri ey'entiisa; toliddamu kubaawo. Balikunoonya naye tebalikuzuula emirembe gyonna, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel27:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, yimba oluyimba olukungubagira Tiiro;" 
Ezekiel27:3 gamba Tiiro asula ku mugguukiriro gw'ennyanja, asuubula n'abantu ku mbalama ennyingi nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Ggwe Tiiro, wagamba nti: “Ndi mulungi ggero!”" 
Ezekiel27:4 Ekisulo kyo kyali mu buziba bw'ennyanja; abazimbi bo ne bakutuusa ku bulungi ggero. 
Ezekiel27:5 Embaawo zo zonna baazikola mu miti gya faraawo egy'e Seniri, baggya entolookyo ku Lebanoni ne bakukolera omulongooti." 
Ezekiel27:6 Emivule okuva e Basani gye gyakola enkasi zo; emmanga zo za mu sipulaasi ow'e Kittimu okubembekeddwa essanga. 
Ezekiel27:7 Mu ngoye za bafuta owa langi entobeke ow'e Misiri mwe baakola ettanga lyo, ne likola bendera yo; engoye eza kakobe ne kasaayi okuva mu bizinga by'e Elisa, ze zaakola ekisasi kyo." 
Ezekiel27:8 Abasajja b'omu Sidoni n'e Aruvadi be baakukubiranga enkasi, bakagezimunnyo bo, ggwe Tiiro, be balunnyanja bo mu ggwe." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abakadde n'ababazzi be Gebali baalinga mu ggwe okuddaabiriza ennyaafa. Amaato gonna ag'ennyanja n'abagoba baago baalinga mu ggwe, basuubule ebyamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:10 “ ‘Abasajja Abaperusi ab'e Ludi ne Puti be baali abatabaazi mu ggye lyo. Engabo n'enkufiira ez'ekyuma baabiwanikanga mu ggwe; ne bakufuula omulungi ggero. 
Ezekiel27:11 Abasajja b'e Aruvadi ne Keleki be baakuumanga bbugwe wo ku njuyi zonna. N'ab'e Gammadi baalinga mu minaala gyo, engabo zaabwe nga baziwanika ku bisenge byo ku njuyi zonna; be baakufuula omulungi ggero." 
Ezekiel27:12 “ ‘Tarusisi yasuubulagananga naawe olw'ebintu byo ebingi bye walina; ffeeza, ekyuma, ekikomo, ebbaati n'essasi bye baakusasulanga mu byamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:13 Yavani, Tubali ne Meseki bwe mwasuubulagananga; baakusasulanga na baddu n'ebintu eby'ekikomo mu byamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:14 Abasajja b'e Beti-Togaruma baakusasulanga n'embalaasi ezikola emirimu, embalaasi ennwanyi n'ennyumbu mu byamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:15 Abasajja b'e Dedani mwasuubulagananga; ebizinga nkumu ebyakugulangako; baakusasulanga omusolo mu masanga n'emiti gy'emitoogo. 
Ezekiel27:16 Edomu naye mwasuubulagananga olw'ebyo ebingi bye wakolanga; baaleetanga: amayinja karubunkulo, engoye eza kakobe, engoye eza langi entobeke, engoye ez'obufumbo, amasonko n'obuyinja obutwakaavu okugula ebyamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda n'ensi ya Yisirayeli nabo mwasuubulagananga nga baleeta okuva e Minniti eŋŋano, pannagi, omubisi gw'enjuki, omuzigo gw'oliva, n'omuzigo gw'eddagala okugula ebyamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ne Damasiko naye yasuubulagananga naawe olw'okubeera ebingi by'okola n'ebintu byo eby'engeri ezitali zimu; yaleetanga evviini ey'e Keluboni n'ebyoya by'endiga eby'e Zakari. 
Ezekiel27:19 Daani ne Yavani olw'ebyamaguzi byo baaleetanga ekyuma ekikolere ddala, embaawo za kassiya n'emmuli okugula ebibyo." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ne Dedani mwasuubulagananga mu ngoye ez'oku matandiiko. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabiya n'abakungu b'e Kedari yenna nabo baali baguzi bo; baasuubulanga gy'oli endiga ennume n'embuzi ennume. 
Ezekiel27:22 Abatunzi b'e Saba ne Raama, nabo baasuubulagananga naawe; baaleetanga ebika byonna eby'obuwoowo obulungi, amayinja ag'omuwendo ne zaabu okugula ebyamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:23 Karani, Kanne ne Edeni, abasuubuzi b'e Saba, Assuri ne Kilumadi baasuubulagananga naawe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Baakusuubuzanga mu butale bwo ebyambalo amakula, ebizibawo ebya bbululu, engoye eza langi entobeke n'emiguwa emirange n'egy'ebifundikwa ebigumu." 
Ezekiel27:25 “ ‘Amaato g'e Tarusisi ge gaakutwaliranga ebyamaguzi byo; ojjudde era ozitoye nnyo eyo mu buziba bw'ennyanja. 
Ezekiel27:26 Abakubi bo ab'enkasi bakutuusa mu mazzi amangi; na naye kibuyaga ow'e maserengeta ajja kukuseseggulira eyo mu buziba bw'ennyanja. 
Ezekiel27:27 Obugagga bwo, ebyamaguzi n'entwala yo, abalunnyanja bo, abagoba, abakonja amaato, abaguzi bo, abatabaazi bo na buli omu ku lyato, balikkirira eyo mu buziba bw'ennyanja, ku lunaku lw'olitokomoka." 
Ezekiel27:28 Embalama ziriyuuguuma olw'okuleekaana kw'abalunnyanja bo. 
Ezekiel27:29 Bonna abakubi b'enkasi balyabulira amaato gaabwe. Abagoba b'amaato n'abalunnyanja bonna baliyimirira ku lukalu. 
Ezekiel27:30 Balikukubira emiranga egy'omwanguka, baliraajana mu kunyolwa ku lulwo. Balyeyiwa evvu mu mitwe, ne beevulungula mu vvu." 
Ezekiel27:31 Balyewalakata emitwe olw'okubeera ggwe, ne beesiba ebikutiya. Balikukaabira n'okunyolwa mu mitima, balikungubaga n'ennyiike." 
Ezekiel27:32 Nga bakukaabira, bakukungubagira, balikuyimbira oluyimba olw'okukungubaga nti: “Ani yali asirisiddwa nga Tiiro wakati mu nnyanja?”" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ebyamaguzi byo bwe byagobanga okuva mu nnyanja, wakkusanga amawanga mangi; n'obugagga bwo n'ebyettunzi byo wagaggawaza bakabaka b'ensi." 
Ezekiel27:34 Naye kati osesegguddwa ennyanja mu mazzi g'omu ddubi; ebyamaguzi byo n'abalunnyanja batokomose naawe. 
Ezekiel27:35 Bonna abasula mu bizinga obawuniikirizza, ne bakabaka bakankana ne batya, n'amaaso gabeekapye." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abasuubuzi mu mawanga bakufuuyira ekiwa; otuuse ku nkomerero eyennyamiza! Tolibaawo nate emirembe gyonna!’ ” 
Ezekiel28:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, gamba omukulembeze wa Tiiro nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Mu kwewanika kw'omutima gwo ogamba nti: “Nze ndi Katonda, ntuula mu ntebe ya balubaale mu buziba bw'ennyanja,” sso oli muntu buntu, toli Katonda, newandibadde ng'olowooza nti mu bugezi wenkana Katonda." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ggwe osinga Danyeli amagezi? Teri kyama kikukisiddwa? 
Ezekiel28:4 Mu magezi ne mu bukugu bwo weekolera obugagga, ne weefunira zaabu ne ffeeza mu mawanika go." 
Ezekiel28:5 Mu bukujjukujju bwo obungi mu kusuubula weeyongera obugagga; olw'obugagga bwo omutima gwo ne gwewanika. 
Ezekiel28:6 “ ‘Kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Kubanga weetwala ng'omugezi okwenkana Katonda," 
Ezekiel28:7 nange nno nzija kukuwendulira abagwira abasingira ddala obukambwe mu mawanga; obulungi bw'amagezi go balibusowolerayo ebitala byabwe, ne bafumita ekitiibwa kyo." 
Ezekiel28:8 Balikuserengesa mu bunnya, n'ofa enfa ey'obukambwe mu buziba bw'ennyanja." 
Ezekiel28:9 Era oligamba nti: “Ndi Katonda,” awo mu maaso g'abakutta? Nedda, oliba muntu buntu, sso si Katonda, mu mikono gy'abakutta." 
Ezekiel28:10 Olifa enfa y'abatali batayirire mu mikono gy'abagwira. Kubanga nze njogedde, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mwana w'omuntu, yimba oluyimba olukungubagira kabaka w'e Tiiro, omugambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Wali lugero lwa bulungi ng'ojjudde amagezi, oli mulungi ggero." 
Ezekiel28:13 Wali mu Edeni mu nnimiro ya Katonda ng'obikkiddwa buli jjinja lya muwendo: sarudiyo, topaziyo, berullo, kirusolito, oniki, yasipi, saffiro, karubunkulo ne simaragido; ebinyere byo n'empeta nga byakolebwa mu zaabu; ku lunaku kwe wazaalibwa lwe byategekebwa." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nakussaawo ng'omukerubi ow'okukuuma; wali ku lusozi lwa Katonda olutukuvu, ng'otambulira mu mayinja ag'omuliro." 
Ezekiel28:15 Wali toliiko musango mu makubo go okuva ku lunaku lwe watondebwa okutuusa obugwenyufu lwe bwazuuka mu ggwe. 
Ezekiel28:16 Mu kusuubula kwo bwe wagaziwa, wajjula obukambwe n'oyonoona. Kyennava nkugoba ku lusozi lwa Katonda olw'obwonoonefu bwo, ne nkuzikiriza, gwe omukerubi omukuumi, eyakuumiranga wakati mu mayinja ag'omuliro." 
Ezekiel28:17 Omutima gwo gwegulumiza olw'obulungi bwo; wafaafaganya amagezi go ku lw'ettendo lyo; nze kwe kukusuula ku ttaka, ne nkufuula eky'okwerolera mu maaso ga bakabaka." 
Ezekiel28:18 Olw'okuyitiriza ennyo mu butaba mwenkanya n'olw'ensuubulagana yo embi, wajaajaamya ebifo byo ebitukuvu. Nze kwe kutumbula omuliro mu makkati go ne gukusenkenya; nzija kukufuula vvu ku nsi, mu maaso ga bonna abaakulaba." 
Ezekiel28:19 Bonna abaali bakumanyi mu mawanga obawuniikirizza; otuuse ku nkomerero eyennyamiza, okomye emirembe gyonna!’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Ate ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go gatunuulize Sidoni; langa ng'omwogerera," 
Ezekiel28:22 ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Nkuli bukiika, Sidoni; nzija kugulumizibwa mu makkati go. Balimanya nti nze Mukama, bwe ndimala okukubonereza, ne njoleka obutuukirivu bwange mu ye." 
Ezekiel28:23 Kubanga ndimusindikira kawumpuli n'okuyiwa omusaayi mu nguudo ze. Abattiddwa baligwa wakati mu ye olw'ekitala ku njuyi zonna; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel28:24 “ ‘Ennyumba ya Yisirayeli teriddayo kubeera na maggwa gagifumita na malobo gagirumya mu mawanga ag'omuliraano agaabanyoomanga; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda. 
Ezekiel28:25 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Bwe ndimala okukuŋŋaanya ennyumba ya Yisirayeli okuva mu mawanga gye baasaasaanira, ndiraga mu bo obutuukirivu bwange mu maaso g'amawanga. Olwo balisula mu nsi yaabwe, gye nawa omuweereza wange Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Baligibeeramu mu ddembe, ne bazimba amayumba, ne basimba emizabbibu, ne babeeramu mu ddembe, bwe ndimala okubonereza amawanga gonna agabeetoolodde agaabanyoomanga; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda waabwe.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ebbiri, ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go goolekeze Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri, olange ng'omwogerera era yogerera ne Misiri yonna." 
Ezekiel29:3 Yogera ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Nkuli bukiika, Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri, ggwe ssessota omunene eyeebase mu migga gyo; ggwe agamba nti: “Kiyira wange, nze namwekolera.”" 
Ezekiel29:4 Nzija kuteeka amalobo mu mba zo, ebyennyanja by'omu migga gyo mbirippe ku magamba go, nkusike nkuggye mu migga gyo, ebyennyanja byo byonna nga byerippye ku magamba go." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ŋŋenda kukukanyuga mu ddungu, ko n'ebyennyanja by'omu migga gyo byonna. Oligwa awo mu kyererezi ku ttale, tolirondwawo yadde okuziikibwa. Ndikuwaayo ng'eky'okweliira eri ebisolo by'ensi n'ebinyonyi by'omu bbanga." 
Ezekiel29:6 Olwo bonna abasula mu Misiri balitegeera nga nze Mukama; kubanga wali muggo gwa lumuli eri ennyumba ya Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel29:7 Bwe baakukwata mu ngalo, wasasambuka, ebibegabega byabwe byonna n'obiryebula; ate bwe baakwesigamako, wamenyeka, emigongo gyabwe ne gikutuka." 
Ezekiel29:8 “ ‘Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nze nzija kukuleetera ekitala, nkuttemu abantu n'ensolo." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ensi y'e Misiri erifuuka ddungu, matongo; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama. Kubanga wagamba nti: “Kiyira wange; nze namukola,”" 
Ezekiel29:10 kale nno nkuli bukiika, ggwe n'emigga gyo; n'ensi y'e Misiri ndigifuula ddungu effu, amatongo, okuva e Migudoli okutuuka ku Siyene n'okutuukira ddala ku nsalo za Kuusi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Temulirinnyamu kigere kya muntu, yadde eky'ensolo tekiritambuliramu; temuliba asulamu okumala emyaka amakumi ana." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ensi y'e Misiri ndigifuula matongo ng'emenyerwa mu nsi zonna ezaazikirizibwa; n'ebibuga byayo birimala emyaka amakumi ana nga matongo, nga bimenyerwa mu bibuga ebyazikirizibwa. Abamisiri ndibasaasaanya mu mawanga, ndibamansa mu nsi." 
Ezekiel29:13 Kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Emyaka amakumi ana bwe giriggwaako, ndikuŋŋaanya Abamisiri okuva mu mawanga gye baasaasaanira." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndibaggya mu buwaŋŋanguse ne mbakomyawo mu Paturosi, mu nsi y'obuzaale bwabwe. Eyo gye balibeera ng'obwakabaka obunaku." 
Ezekiel29:15 Mu bwakabaka bwonna obwo bwe bulisembayo obunaku; ndibufuula bunafu nga tebukyaddayo kukajjala ku mawanga malala. 
Ezekiel29:16 Misiri taliddayo kuwa maanyi nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, wabula alimujjukizanga bujjukiza ebibi bye yakola bwe yamugobereranga; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Mu mwaka ogw'abiri mu omusanvu, ku lusooka olw'omwezi omubereberye, ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mwana w'omuntu, Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni eggye lye yalikuluusanya ng'alitutte okuzinda Tiiro; buli mutwe gwamera ekiwalaata na buli kibegabega kyaggwaako olususu; naye ye n'eggye lye tebaggya mugaso mu mulimu gwe baakola mu kulwanyisa Tiiro." 
Ezekiel29:19 Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Misiri ŋŋenda kumuwa Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni, obugagga bwamu abutwale; alinyaga obugagga bw'ensi n'agyaya okusasula eggye lye." 
Ezekiel29:20 Mmuwadde ensi y'e Misiri ng'empeera olw'ebyo bye yakola, kubanga bankolera omulimu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel29:21 “ ‘Ku olwo ndisibusiza ennyumba ya Yisirayeli amaanyi, naawe ndikuggula akamwa mu makkati gaabwe; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, langa ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Mukube ebiwoobe nti: “Olunaku olwo zirusanze!”" 
Ezekiel30:3 Kubanga olunaku luli kumpi, olunaku lw'Omukama lusembedde; olunaku olwa kalenge; akadde akakeereredde amawanga." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ekitala kirijjira Misiri, n'ennaku eriba mu Kuusi, abattiddwa lwe baligwa mu Misiri, obugagga bwe ne butwalibwa, n'emisingi gye ne gimenyebwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kuusi, Puti, Ludi, Arabiya yenna, Kubu n'abantu b'ensi ey'endagaano balifa ekitala wamu nabo." 
Ezekiel30:6 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Abawagira Misiri baligwa; n'okwewanika kw'amaanyi ge kulifeeba. Okuva e Migudoli okutuuka e Siyene battibwa n'ekitala mu makkati go, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel30:7 Baliba matongo mu mawanga agafuuse amatongo, n'ebibuga byabwe ebizikiridde biriba mu bibuga ebyazikirizibwa." 
Ezekiel30:8 Olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama, bwe nditeekera Misiri omuliro; na bonna abamuyamba nga babetenteddwa." 
Ezekiel30:9 “ ‘Ku olwo ababaka ndibasindika mu maato bagende bakube entiisa Kuusi aliba teyeefiirayo; ennaku eribakwata ku lunaku Misiri lwe zirimusanga, kubanga lwo okujja lujja." 
Ezekiel30:10 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “ ‘N'omukono gwa Nebukadurezzari kabaka w'e Babiloni ndikomya ebbiina ly'omu Misiri. 
Ezekiel30:11 Ye n'abantu be, eggwanga erisinga mu gonna obukambwe, bajja kuleetebwa bazikirize ensi. Balisowolera Misiri ebitala, ensi ne bagijjuza abattiddwa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Emmangamanga za Kiyira ndizifuula nkalu, ensi ne ngitunda mu mikono gy'ababi; ensi nzija kugifuula matongo na buli kigijjuzizza n'omukono gw'abagwira, nze Omukama njogedde." 
Ezekiel30:13 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ebifaananyi bya balubaale nzija kubizikiriza, nzija kukomya ebifaananyi bya balubaale eby'e Memfi, mu Misiri temuliddayo kubaamu mulangira; n'ensi ya Misiri nzija kugibunya entiisa," 
Ezekiel30:14 nzija kuleka matongo ensi Paturosi, nzija kuteekera omuliro Zowani, nzija kubonereza No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Obusungu bwange nzija kubumalira ku Sini, empagi luwaga eya Misiri; nzija kutta ebbiina lya No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Misiri nzija kumuteekera omuliro; Sini alyenyoola olw'obulumi, No alyabizibwa ne Memfi aliba mu nnaku buli lukya." 
Ezekiel30:17 Abavubuka b'e Aveni ne Pi-Beseti balifa ekitala; n'ebibuga byennyini birigenda mu busibe. 
Ezekiel30:18 Mu Takupanikesi olunaku luliddugala, lwe ndimenya ebikoligo bya Misiri, okwepanka kw'amaanyi ge lwe kulikoma. Ekire kirimubuutikira, n'ebibuga bye birigenda mu busibe." 
Ezekiel30:19 Bwe ntyo bwe ndibonereza Misiri, olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu, mu mwezi ogusooka ku lunaku olwomusanvu, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mwana w'omuntu, mmenye omukono gwa Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri, tegusibiddwa kiwero guwone yadde okusibibwa akannyo guddemu amaanyi gusobole okukwata ekitala." 
Ezekiel30:22 Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri mmuli bukiika. Emikono gye gyombi nzija kugimenya, omukono omulamu n'omukono ogwamenyeka, mmusuuze ekitala mu mukono gwe." 
Ezekiel30:23 Nzija kusaasaanya Abamisiri mu mawanga, mbasanse mu nsi." 
Ezekiel30:24 Omukono gwa kabaka w'e Babiloni nzija kugufuula gwa maanyi, mmenyeemenye emikono gya Faraawo, alisindira mu maaso ge ng'afumitiddwa obubi bw'asinda." 
Ezekiel30:25 Nzija kussa amaanyi mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Babiloni, naye emikono gya kabaka w'e Misiri gijja kulagaya. Bwe ndissa ekitala kyange mu mukono gwa kabaka w'e Babiloni, n'akigalulira ku Misiri, olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel30:26 Abamisiri nzija kubasaasaanya mu mawanga, nzija kubamansa mu nsi; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu, mu mwezi ogwokusatu, ku lunaku olusooka, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, gamba Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri n'ebbiina lye nti: “ ‘Weefaanaanyirizibwe ku ani mu bukulu bwo?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Nzija kukugeranya ku muti gw'entolookyo y'omu Lebanoni, ogw'amatabi amalungi, oguggumizza, omulangavvu, obusanso bwagwo buli eyo mu bire." 
Ezekiel31:4 Amazzi gaaguliikiriza, eddubi lyagufuula mulangavvu, emyala gyalyo gyakulukutanga wonna mu mirandira gyagwo, ne lisindika obugga bwalyo eri emiti gyonna egy'omu ttale." 
Ezekiel31:5 Kyegwava guwanvuwa okukira emiti gyonna egy'omu ttale, amatabi gaagwo ne geeyongera obungi n'obutabi gwagwo ne buwanvuwa, ne gwagaagala olw'amazzi obungi." 
Ezekiel31:6 Ebinyonyi byonna eby'omu bbanga ne bizimba ebisu mu matabi gaagwo, ensolo zonna ez'ettale ne zizaalira wansi w'amatabi gaagwo, n'amawanga mangi ne gasula mu kisiikirize kyagwo." 
Ezekiel31:7 Gwali magero mu bunene bwagwo n'obwagaagavu bw'amatabi gaagwo, kubanga emirandira gyagwo gyakka mu mazzi amangi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Entolookyo mu nnimiro ya Katonda tezaagutuuka, n'emiti gya faraawo tegyagwenkanya matabi, n'egy'arumoni nga tegigwenkana mu buggumivu. Tewaali muti mu nnimiro ya Katonda ogwali gugwenkana mu bulungi." 
Ezekiel31:9 Nagukola nga mulungi: n'amatabi amaggumivu; emiti gyonna egy'omu Edeni, egyali mu nnimiro ya Katonda, ne gigukwatirwa obuggya." 
Ezekiel31:10 “ ‘Kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga gwalangajja, obusanso bwagwo ne buba eyo mu bire, ne gwewanika olw'obulangavvu bwago," 
Ezekiel31:11 nzija kuguwaayo mu mikono gy'ow'obuyinza afuga amawanga, aguyise nga bwe gusaanira olw'obugwenyufu bwagwo. Ngumansudde eri." 
Ezekiel31:12 Abagwira abasinga obukambwe mu mawanga baligutema ne baguleka eyo. Amatabi gaagwo galigwa ku lusozi ne mu biwonvu yonna; obusanso bwagwo bulimenyekeramenyekera mu nkonko zonna ez'ensi. Abantu bonna ab'oku nsi baliva mu kisiikirize kyagwo ne baguleka. 
Ezekiel31:13 Ebinyonyi byonna eby'eggulu birigusulako gye gugaŋŋalamye, n'ebisolo eby'ettale byonna birisula mu matabi gaagwo." 
Ezekiel31:14 “ ‘Tewali muti gwa ku mazzi guliguvuganya mu bulangavvu, nagwo obusanso bwagwo ne buba eyo mu bire. Teri muti gufukirirwa mazzi guliwanvuwa kutuusa awo, kubanga emiti gyonna gya kufa, gya kukkirira wansi mu ttaka mu baana b'abantu, wamu n'abo abakkirira mu bunnya." 
Ezekiel31:15 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ku lunaku lwe gulikkirira emagombe, eddubi ndiribikka n'okukungubaga, ne nziyiza emigga gyalyo, ne ntangira amazzi gaalyo amangi; olw'okubeera gwo Lebanoni ndimubikka ekizikiza, n'emiti gy'omu ttale gyonna giriwotoka olw'okubeera gwo." 
Ezekiel31:16 Amawanga ndigaleetera okuyuuguuma olw'omusinde gw'okugwa kwagwo, bwe ndiguserengesa emagombe wamu n'abo abagenda mu bunnya. Awo emiti gyonna egy'e Edeni, emirondobe era egisinga obulungi ku Lebanoni, gyonna amazzi gye gafukirira, girikubagizibwa mu nsi wansi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Era abalikkirira nagwo emagombe eri abattibwa ekitala be bo abaatuulanga mu kisiikirize kyagwo, banywanyi be mu mawanga." 
Ezekiel31:18 “ ‘Muti ki ogw'omu Edeni oguyinza okukwefaanaanyiriza mu kitiibwa ne mu bukulu? Naye naawe olisuulibwa mu nnyanga y'ensi wamu n'emiti gy'omu Edeni; oligalamira wamu n'abatali batayirire, olyebaka mu abo abattibwa n'ekitala. Oyo ye Faraawo n'ebbiina lye lyonna, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri ku lusooka mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, yimba oluyimba olukungubagira Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri, omugambe nti: “ ‘Oli ng'empologoma mu mawanga; oli ssessota mu nnyanja, ng'ofubutukayo mu migga, ng'osambattula amazzi n'ebigere byo, emigga n'ogisiikuula." 
Ezekiel32:3 “ ‘Omukama kino ky'agamba: “ ‘Nzija kukusuulako ekitimba kyange, nga ndi n'ebbiina ly'abantu; balikusika ne bakuleeta mu kiragala kyange." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndikukuba ettale ne nkusuula mu kyererezi ku lukalu; ndikusuzaako ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga, n'ebisolo byonna eby'ensi ku ggwe kwe ndibikkusiza." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ennyama yo nzija kugisuulasuula ku nsozi, ebiwonvu ndibijjuza n'ebisigala byo." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ensi nzija kugijonjobaza n'omusaayi gwo ogutiiriika, okutuukira ddala ku nsozi, n'enkonko zirikujjula." 
Ezekiel32:7 Bwe ndikuzikiza, eggulu ŋŋenda kulibikka, n'emmunyeenye zaakwo ndiziddugaza; enjuba ndigibikka ekire n'omwezi teguliwa kitangaala kyagwo." 
Ezekiel32:8 Byonna ebyaka eby'eggulu ndibiddugaza waggulu ku ggwe, ku nsi yo ndireetako enzikiza, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel32:9 “ ‘Ndinyiigombya emitima gy'abantu bangi, bwe ndituusa okuzikirizibwa kwo mu mawanga, mu nsi z'otomanyi." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndireetera abantu bangi okuwuniikirira ku ggwe, ne bakabaka baabwe ne beekanga; balikankana ne batya olw'ekikutuuseeko, bwe ndigalula ekitala kyange mu maaso gaabwe; ku olwo lw'olizikirira, buli omu alijugumira buli kaseera ng'atiiririra obulamu bwe." 
Ezekiel32:11 Kubanga Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ekitala kya kabaka w'e Babiloni kirikujjira. 
Ezekiel32:12 Ebbiina lyo lyonna nzija kulimalawo n'ebitala by'abatabaazi ab'amaanyi, abo abasinga obukambwe mu mawanga gonna. “ ‘Balimenya amampaati ga Misiri, ne nnasiisi w'abantu be bonna alisaanyizibwawo." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndizikiriza amagana ge gonna okuva ku mazzi amangi; ekigere ky'omuntu tekiriddayo kugasiikuula, yadde ekiganja ky'ensolo okugasambattula." 
Ezekiel32:14 Olwo amazzi gaabwe ndigateesa, emigga gyabwe ne gikulukuta ng'omuzigo, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ensi y'e Misiri bwe ndimala okugifuula eddungu, ebirimu byonna nga bimaliddwamu, bwe ndikuba bonna abasulamu, olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.’" 
Ezekiel32:16 “Olwo lwe luyimba lw'okukungubaga lwe balimuyimbira; bawala b'amawanga balimukungubagira; balikungubagira Misiri n'ebbiina lye lyonna, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Ate mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, ku lw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mwana w'omuntu, kungubagira ebbiina lya Misiri, ye ne bawala b'amawanga ag'amaanyi, obakkirize eyo mu nnyanga y'ensi wamu n'abo abakkirira mu bunnya." 
Ezekiel32:19 “Gamba nti: ‘Ani gw'okira mu bulungi? Serengeta ogalamire n'abo abatali batayirire.’ 
Ezekiel32:20 Baligwa wakati mu battiddwa n'ekitala; ekitala kisowoddwa, awalwewalwe n'ebbiina lye lyonna." 
Ezekiel32:21 Abafuzi ab'amaanyi, banywanyi be, baliyima emagombe ne bamugamba nti: ‘Bakkiridde, bagalamidde, abatali batayirire, abattibwa n'ekitala!’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Assuri ali eyo ne nnasiisi yenna ow'abantu be, yeebunguluddwa amalaalo gaabwe. Bonna bano battibwa, baafa ekitala." 
Ezekiel32:23 Entaana zaabwe ziri ku ntobo y'obunnya, eggye lye lyonna lyebunguludde amalaalo ge; abo abaabunya entiisa wonna mu nsi y'abalamu battibwa, baafa ekitala." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elamu ali eyo n'ebbiina lye lyonna, beebunguludde amalaalo ge; bonna bano battibwa, baafa kitala. Bonna abaabunya entiisa wonna mu nsi y'abalamu. Bakkirira si batayirire wansi mu ttaka, abo abaabunya entiisa wonna mu nsi y'abalamu. Basonyiwadde wamu n'abo abakkirira mu bunnya." 
Ezekiel32:25 Ekitanda kimutegekeddwa wakati mu battibwa, n'ebbiina lye lyonna nga beebunguludde amalaalo ge, bonna si batayirire, battibwa n'ekitala, kubanga baabunya entiisa wonna mu nsi y'abalamu, kati basonyiwadde wamu n'abo abakkirira mu bunnya; bateereddwa wakati mu battibwa." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Meseke ne Tubali bali eyo n'ebbiina lye lyonna beebunguludde amalaalo gaabwe; bonna si batayirire, battibwa n'ekitala kubanga baabunya entiisa wonna mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Ezekiel32:27 Tebagalamidde n'abatabaazi ab'edda, abakkirira emagombe n'ebyokulwanyisa byabwe, ebitala byabwe ebyassibwa wansi w'emitwe gyabwe n'engabo zaabwe ezassibwa ku bisigala byabwe, kubanga abatabaazi bano baabunya wonna entiisa mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Ezekiel32:28 Naawe nno olimenyebwamu wamu n'abatali batayirire, n'ogalamira wamu n'abattibwa n'ekitala." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Ne Edomu ali eyo wamu ne bakabaka n'abalangira be bonna; si ka maanyi gaabwe, beebase mu abo abattibwa n'ekitala, era abagalamidde n'abatali batayirire, era wamu n'abo abaaserengeta mu bunnya." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Abakungu ab'emambuka bonna na bonna Abasidoni bali eyo; bakkirira mu nsonyi, ne battibwa olw'entiisa gye baleeta olw'amaanyi gaabwe. Bagalamidde eyo nga si batayirire wamu n'abattibwa n'ekitala, era basonyiwadde wamu n'abo abaaserengeta mu bunnya." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Faraawo alibalaba ne yeekubagiza olw'ebbiina lye lyonna – Faraawo n'eggye lye lyonna, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel32:32 Kubanga yabunya entiisa mu nsi yonna ey'abalamu, aligalamizibwa mu abo abatali batayirire, wamu n'abo abattibwa n'ekitala – Faraawo n'ebbiina lye lyonna, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, yogera eri abantu b'eggwanga lyo obagambe nti: ‘Singa nsindika ekitala mu nsi, abantu mu nsi bamala balonda omusajja omu mu nsi yaabwe abeere omukuumi waabwe," 
Ezekiel33:3 ye n'alaba ekitala nga kijjira ensi, n'afuuwa eŋŋombe okulabula abantu," 
Ezekiel33:4 ne wabaawo awulidde eŋŋombe naye n'atafaayo, ekitala kimala kijja ne kimutwala, omusaayi gwe guliba ku mutwe gwe." 
Ezekiel33:5 Kubanga yawulira eŋŋombe n'atafaayo, omusaayi gwe guliba ku mutwe gwe. Naye bw'aliba afuddeyo, oyo aliba awonyezza obulamu bwe." 
Ezekiel33:6 Naye omukuumi bw'aliba alabye ekitala nga kijja, n'atafuuwa ŋŋombe kulabula bantu, ekitala ne kijja ne kibatwalako omu ku bo, oyo aliba atwaliddwa lwa kibi kya mukuumi, era omukuumi ndimubanja omusaayi gwe.’" 
Ezekiel33:7 “Mwana w'omuntu, ggwe ntaddewo ng'omukuumi w'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli; bw'owuliranga ekigambo okuva mu kamwe kange, kibabuulire ku lwange." 
Ezekiel33:8 Bwe ŋŋamba omubi nti: ‘Owange mubi ggwe, oli wa kufa,’ ggwe n'otoyogera kukoma ku mubi oyo ave mu makubo ge, n'amala afiira mu kibi kye, omusaayi gwe ndigubanja ggwe." 
Ezekiel33:9 Naye singa olabula omubi ave mu makubo ge, n'atagavaamu, alifa olw'ekibi kye, naye ggwe oliba owonyezza obulamu bwo." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Mwana w'omuntu, gamba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli nti: ‘Kino kye mugamba nti: “Emisango gyaffe gituzitooweredde, tukenena olw'okubeera gyo, tunaasobola tutya okuba abalamu?” ’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Bagambe nti: ‘Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, sisanyukira kufa kwa mubi, wabula njagala yeddemu ave mu makubo ge amabi abeere mulamu. Mweddemu! Mweddemu muve mu makubo gammwe amabi, lwaki mwandifudde, mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Mwana w'omuntu, yogera eri abantu b'eggwanga lyo nti: ‘Obutuukirivu bw'omutuukirivu tebulimuwonya bw'alikola ekisobyo, n'obubi bw'omubi tebulimuleetera kugwa kasita alyeddamu n'ava mu bugwenyufu bwe. Omutuukirivu kasita alikola ekibi, tagenda kulama olw'obutuukirivu bwe yalina.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Bwe ndiba ŋŋambye omutuukirivu nti ojja kubeera mulamu, ye amala yeeyinula obutuukirivu bwe, n'akola obubi, byonna eby'obutuukirivu bye yakola bigenda kwerabirwa, alifa olw'obubi bw'aliba akoze." 
Ezekiel33:14 Sso bwe ndiba ŋŋambye omubi nti: ‘Oli wa kufa,’ amala yeenenya ekibi kye n'akola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu," 
Ezekiel33:15 n'azzaayo omusingo gwe yatwala olw'okwewolwako, ne bye yanyaga n'abizzaayo, n'atambulira mu mateeka agawa obulamu, n'atakola bubi, aliba mulamu, tagenda kufa;" 
Ezekiel33:16 Ebibi bye byonna by'aliba akoze, tebigenda kujjukirwa ku ye; yakola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu, oyo aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Naye abantu b'eggwanga lyo bagamba nti: ‘Amakubo g'Omukama si matuufu.’ Sso eryabwe lyennyini lye litali ttuufu. 
Ezekiel33:18 Omutuukirivu bw'alireka obutuukirivu bwe, n'akola obubi, alifa olw'okubeera kyo;" 
Ezekiel33:19 naye omubi singa alireka obugwenyufu bwe, n'akola ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu, aliba mulamu okubeera kyo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ate mmwe, nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, mugamba nti: ‘Amakubo g'Omukama si matuufu.’ Naye buli omu ŋŋenda kumulamula nga ngerera ku makubo ge.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri ogw'okuwaŋŋangusibwa kwaffe, mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi, ku lunaku olwookutaano olw'omwezi, eyali atolose e Yeruzaalemu yajja gye ndi ng'agamba nti: “Ekibuga kiwambiddwa.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Kyokka akawungeezi akaakulembera okujja kw'eyatoloka, omukono gw'Omukama gwali gunzizeeko, n'anzigula akamwa ng'eyatoloka tannajja wange enkeera. Olwo akamwa kange ne kagguka, saddayo kusirika." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mwana w'omuntu, abasula mu matongo gano ag'omu nsi ya Yisirayeli bagamba nti: ‘Yiburayimu yali bw'omu naye ensi n'emuweebwa ebeere yiye; ffe tuli bangi, awo nno ensi yatuweebwa ebeere yaffe.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Kale nno bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mmwe abalya ennyama omuli omusaayi n'amaaso gammwe ne mugasitulira ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale, ne muyiwa omusaayi, mmwe mwandifunye ensi ebeere yammwe?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Mmwe abeesiga ebitala byammwe, abakola ebyenyinyalwa, buli omu mu mmwe agwagwawaza muka munne, mmwe mwandifunye ensi ebeere yammwe?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 Bagambe kino nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nze nga ndi mulamu, abo abasigadde mu matongo balifa ekitala; ate abali mu byalo nzija kubawa ebisolo bibalye; abali mu bwekwekero ne mu mpuku balifa kawumpuli." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ensi nzija kugireka matongo, ddungu ssa; okwekuza kw'amaanyi ge kujja kukkakkana; ensozi za Yisirayeli zirisigala matongo omutali n'omu ayitamu." 
Ezekiel33:29 Olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama, ensi bwe ndimala okugifuula amatongo, eddungu essa, olw'ebyenyinyalwa bonna bye baakola.’" 
Ezekiel33:30 “Naawe ggwe, mwana w'omuntu, abantu b'eggwanga lyo bakwogerako eyo ku bisenge ne ku miryango gy'amayumba gaabwe nga bagambagana nti: ‘Mujje muwulire ekigambo ekivudde ew'Omukama.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Abantu bange bajja gy'oli nga bwe batera okukola, ne batuula awo w'oli, ne bawulira by'oyogera, naye tebabissa mu nkola. N'akamwa kaabwe balaga nga baagala, naye emitima gyabwe girulunkanira kufuna na bulyazaamaanyi." 
Ezekiel33:32 Obafaananira bufaanaanyirizi ng'oli ayimba oluyimba olw'omukwano n'eddoboozi eddungi, ng'okubirako bulungi ekivuga, kubanga bawulira ebigambo byo naye tebabissa mu nkola." 
Ezekiel33:33 Kino bwe kirituukirira, ate ddala kya kutuukirira, olwo lwe balimanya nti omulanzi yaliko mu bo.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, langa oyogerere abasumba ba Yisirayeli; langa ogambe abasumba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Zibasanze mmwe abasumba ba Yisirayeli, mmwe abeefaako mwekka. Abasumba endiga si ze bandirunze?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Amata ye mmere yammwe, engoye mwambala za byoya bya ndiga, muttamu ensolo ensavuwaze, sso lyo eggana nga temulirabirira." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ennyongobevu temugizizzaamu ndasi, endwadde temugiwonyezza, emmenyefu temugisibye, ebaamye temugikomezzaawo, ebuze temuginoonyezza; muzifuzizza maanyi na bukambwe." 
Ezekiel34:5 Endiga kwe kubuna emiwabo, kubanga tezaalina musumba; bwe zasaasaana ebisolo byonna eby'omu nsiko ne bizirya." 
Ezekiel34:6 Endiga zange zaabungirabungira mu nsozi zonna na ku buli kasozi akawanvu, ne zisaasaanira wonna mu nsi, ne wataba anoonyaako, yadde aziwondera." 
Ezekiel34:7 “ ‘Kale nno, abasumba, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, kubanga eggana lyange linyagibwa, endiga zange ebisolo byonna eby'omu nsiko ne bizeeriira olw'obutabaawo musumba; era kubanga abasumba bange tebanoonya ndiga zange, wabula beefaako bokka mu kifo ky'okulabirira endiga zange," 
Ezekiel34:9 kale nno, mmwe abasumba, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nze nzennyini nnyiigidde abasumba; nzija kubaggyako obuvunaanyizibwa ku ndiga zange; nzija kubaggyako ogw'okulunda endiga zange, nabo bennyini tebaddeyo kwerabirira. Endiga zange nzija kuziwonya mu kamwa kaabwe, teziddeyo kubeera kyabwe kya kweliira." 
Ezekiel34:11 “ ‘Kubanga Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nze nzennyini nzija kunoonya endiga zange, nzija kuzirabirira." 
Ezekiel34:12 Ng'omusumba bw'alabirira endiga ze, lw'abeera nazo nga zisaasaanye, nange bwe ntyo bwe ndirabirira endiga zange; ndiziwonyaayo eyo mu bifo wonna gye zaasaasaanira ku lunaku lw'ekire n'enzikiza." 
Ezekiel34:13 Nzija kuziggyayo mu mawanga, nzikuŋŋaanye okuva eyo mu nsi, nzikomyewo mu nsi yaazo. Nzija kuzirundira mu nsozi za Yisirayeli, mu biwonvu ne wonna mu nsi awaasengwa abantu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Nzija kuziriisiza mu malundiro amalungi, ne ku katemyo k'olusozi lwa Yisirayeli y'eribeera amalundiro gaazo, eyo gye zirigalamiranga mu malundiro amalungi, eyo gye ziririiranga mu malundiro agaddugazizza ku nsozi za Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Nze nzennyini ndyerundira endiga zange, ne nzigalamiza, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel34:16 Eyali ebuze nzija kuginoonya, nkomyeewo eyali ebaamye, emmenyefu nzija kugisiba, ennyongobevu ngizzeemu endasi, engevvu n'ey'amaanyi nzija kuzissaako eriiso; nzija kuzirunda mu bwenkanya." 
Ezekiel34:17 “ ‘Nammwe, endiga zange, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kulamula wakati w'endiga n'endiga, ne wakati w'endiga ennume n'embuzi ennume." 
Ezekiel34:18 Okuliira mu malundiro amalungi tekibamalira? Lwaki ate mwandirinnyiridde eddundiro lyammwe lyonna n'ebigere? Tekibamalira okunywa amazzi amayonjo? Lwaki ate mwandigasiikudde n'ebigere byammwe? 
Ezekiel34:19 Endiga zange zandiriiridde mmwe mwe mumaze okulinnyirira, era zandinywedde amazzi ge mumaze okusiikuula?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Kale nno kino Omukama Katonda ky'agamba: Nzuuno nze nzija kwelamulira wakati w'engevvu n'enkovvu. 
Ezekiel34:21 Kubanga endiga mwaziwumiranga embiriizi n'enkwakwa, ennyongobevu ne muzitomera n'amayembe gammwe okutuusa lwe mwazigobera ebweru," 
Ezekiel34:22 nzija kudduukirira endiga zange, teziriddayo kunyagibwa; nzija kulamula wakati w'endiga n'endiga." 
Ezekiel34:23 “ ‘Nzija kuzissaako omusumba omu anaazirunda, omuweereza wange Dawudi; y'anaazirunda, y'aliba omusumba waazo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Nze Omukama nze ndiba Katonda waazo, ate omuweereza wange Dawudi nga ye mulangira mu zo wakati, nze Omukama njogedde." 
Ezekiel34:25 Era nzija kukola nazo endagaano ey'eddembe, ensi ngimaleko ebisolo ebikambwe byonna, zibeerenga eyo mu ddungu mu ddembe, ne mu bibira zeebakenga." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ndiziwa omukisa, era na byonna ebyetoolodde akasozi kange; nditonnyesanga enkuba mu budde bwayo; walibaawo enkuba ey'omukisa." 
Ezekiel34:27 Emiti mu nnimiro giribala ebibala byagyo, n'ettaka lirimeza ebimera byalyo; balituula ntende mu nsi yaabwe. Olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama bwe ndimenya ebiti by'ekikoligo kyabwe, ne mbaggya mu mikono gy'abaabafuula abaddu." 
Ezekiel34:28 Amawanga tegaliddayo kubanyagulula n'ebisolo ebikambwe tebiribakavvula; wabula balibeera mu ddembe nga tewali abakanga. 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndibasibusiza ebimera eby'erinnya, tebaliddayo kudooba lwa njala mu nsi, yadde okubeera ekisekererwa mu mawanga." 
Ezekiel34:30 Olwo balimanya nti nze Omukama Katonda ndi nabo, nti nabo, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, bantu bange, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel34:31 Mmwe endiga zange, muli ggana, abantu b'omu ddundiro lyange, nange ndi Katonda wammwe, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go goolekeze olusozi Seyiri olange ng'olwogerera, olugambe nti:" 
Ezekiel35:3 ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzuuno nkuli bukiika, ggwe olusozi Seyiri; nzija kukugololera omukono gwange, nkuleke ttayo, matongo." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ebibuga byo nzija kubireka ttayo, bifulukwa; ojja kulekebwa ttayo, olwo olitegeera nga nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel35:5 “ ‘Kubanga obukyayi wabufuula bwa lubeerera, abantu ba Yisirayeli n'obawaayo mu maanyi g'ekitala mu budde bw'obuyinike bwabwe, mu budde ekibonerezo kyabwe we kyatuukira ku ntikko," 
Ezekiel35:6 awo nno, mazima nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, nzija kukuwaayo eri okuyiwa omusaayi, okuyiwa omusaayi kunaakuyigganga; nga bw'otokyawa kuyiwa musaayi, okuyiwa omusaayi kunaakuyigganga." 
Ezekiel35:7 Olusozi Seyiri nzija kululeka ttayo, matongo; ndirukutulako yenna agenda n'adda." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ensozi ze ndizijjuza abattiddwa be; abattiddwa n'ekitala baligwa ku lusozi lwe ne mu biwonvu ne mu nkonko zonna. 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndikufuula matongo ag'emirembe gyonna, n'ebibuga byo temuliba asulamu; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel35:10 “ ‘Kubanga wagamba nti: “Amawanga gano abiri n'ensi zombi biriba byaffe, tulibyezza,” newandibadde ng'Omukama yaliyo," 
Ezekiel35:11 kale nno, mazima nze nga ndi mulamu, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, nzija kukuyisa okwenkana n'obusungu n'obuggya bye mwalaga mu kubakyawa; olwo ndibawa okummanya mu bo bwe ndibalamula." 
Ezekiel35:12 Olwo olimanya nti nze Mukama nawulira byonna ebivumo bye wavumamu olusozi lwa Yisirayeli, bwe wagamba nti: “Bavunjagiddwa; batuweereddwa tubakavvule.”" 
Ezekiel35:13 Mwanneewaanirako n'akamwa kammwe, ne mwongera obungi bye munjogerera; nze nawulira." 
Ezekiel35:14 Awo nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Olw'okusanyusa ensi yonna, ggwe nzija kukufuula matongo." 
Ezekiel35:15 Nga bwe wasanyuka ng'obusika bw'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli bulekeddwa matongo, naawe bwe nnaakukola. Ojja kusigala matongo, ggwe olusozi Seyiri ne Edomu yenna; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:1 “Mwana w'omuntu, langa eri ensozi za Yisirayeli, ogambe nti: ‘Wattu ensozi za Yisirayeli, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama." 
Ezekiel36:2 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Omulabe yagamba ku ggwe nti: “Otyo, ensozi ez'edda zifuuse zaffe.” ’" 
Ezekiel36:3 Kale nno langa, ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga baabavunjaga, ne babawemmenta ku njuyi zonna, ne mufuuka eky'okufuna eky'amawanga amalala, emboozi n'olugambo lw'abantu," 
Ezekiel36:4 kale nno, mmwe nsozi za Yisirayeli, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama Katonda: Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba ensozi n'obusozi, enkonko n'ebiwonvu, amatongo g'ebifulukwa n'ebibuga ebyasigala ettayo, ebyanyagululwa ne bifuuka eky'okusekerera eri amawanga amalala ageetooloddewo;" 
Ezekiel36:5 kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mu kubabirirwa kw'obuggya bwange nayogerera amawanga amalala ne Edomu abezza ensi yange mu kusanyuka okw'ekitalo n'obunyoomi mu mutima obuyitirivu, ne baaya amalundiro gaayo.’" 
Ezekiel36:6 “Awo nno langa ku nsi ya Yisirayeli, ogambe ensozi n'obusozi, enkonko n'ebiwonvu nti:" 
Ezekiel36:7 ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ndayira nti: amawanga agabeetoolodde nago gajja kuswazibwa. 
Ezekiel36:8 Naye mmwe, nsozi za Yisirayeli, mujja kutojjeza buto amatabi, mubale n'ebibala olw'abantu bange Yisirayeli, kubanga bajja kudda mu bbanga ttono." 
Ezekiel36:9 Anti nzuuno nzija gye muli, nzija kukyukira gye muli, mujja kulimibwa, musigibwe." 
Ezekiel36:10 Nzija kwaza abantu mu mmwe, ennyumba yonna eya Yisirayeli; ebibuga birisengwamu n'amatongo galiddawo." 
Ezekiel36:11 Nzija kwaza ku mmwe abantu n'ebisolo; biryeyongera obungi ne bizaala. Ndibasenzaako abantu nga bwe gwali mu kusooka, ndibaaliza ebintu n'okusinga nga bwe gwali edda; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel36:12 Nzija kuwa abantu, abantu bange Yisirayeli, batambulire ku mmwe; bajja kubafuna ng'abaabwe, mulifuuka busika bwabwe, temuliddayo kubamalako baana baabwe." 
Ezekiel36:13 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Kubanga baboogerako nti: “Olya abantu, n'eggwanga lyo n'olimalako abaana.”" 
Ezekiel36:14 Kale nno tojja kuddayo kulya bantu, n'eggwanga lyo toddeyo kulimalako baana, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel36:15 Sirikuleka kuwulira nate kujolongebwa kw'amawanga n'okuvumibwa abantu, yadde okuleka eggwanga lyo okuddamu okumalawo abaana baalyo, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mwana w'omuntu, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli bwe baasulanga mu nsi yaabwe, bagijaajaamya olw'amakubo gaabwe n'ebikolwa byabwe." 
Ezekiel36:18 Amakubo gaabwe ganfaananira ng'obwonoonefu bw'omukazi mu biseera bye eby'omwezi. Kwe kubamalirako obusungu bwange olw'omusaayi gwe baayiwa ku nsi, n'olw'okugyonoona n'ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale." 
Ezekiel36:19 Nabasaasaanya mu mawanga, ne bamansibwa mu nsi; nabalamula nga nsinziira ku makubo gaabwe ne ku bye baakola." 
Ezekiel36:20 Bwe baagenda eyo mu mawanga, buli gye baalaganga nga boonoona erinnya lyange, kubanga baaboogerangako nti: ‘Bano bantu ba Mukama, naye ate baalina okuleka ensi ye.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Nalumirwa erinnya lyange ettukuvu, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli lye yali eyonoonye mu mawanga gye baagenda." 
Ezekiel36:22 Awo nno gamba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, kye nnaakola siikikole lwa kubeera mmwe, wabula lwa kubeera linnya lyange lye mwayonoona mu mawanga gye mwagenda." 
Ezekiel36:23 Nzija kwoleka obutukuvu bw'erinnya lyange ekkulu eryayonoonebwa mu mawanga, lye mwayonoona mu makkati gaabwe; olwo amawanga galimanya nti nze Mukama,’ Omukama Katonda y'agamba, ‘bwe ndiraga obutukuvu bwange mu mmwe mu maaso gaabwe." 
Ezekiel36:24 “ ‘Anti nzija kubaggyayo mu mawanga, mbakuŋŋaanye okuva yonna mu nsi, mbakomyewo mu nsi yaabommwe." 
Ezekiel36:25 Nzija kubamansirako amazzi agatukula era mulitukula; ndibatukuzaako obujama bwammwe bwonna n'ebifaananyi byammwe ebya balubaale. 
Ezekiel36:26 Nzija kubawa omutima omuggya, mbateekemu omwoyo omuggya; mu mubiri gwammwe nzija kuggyamu omutima ogw'ejjinja mbawe omutima ogw'ennyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Nzija kubassaamu omwoyo gwange, mbatambulize mu biragiro byange era mukwatenga bulungi amateeka gange." 
Ezekiel36:28 Mulibeera mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjammwe; mulibeera bantu bange nange ndibeera Katonda wammwe. 
Ezekiel36:29 Nzija kubawonya mu bwonoonefu bwammwe bwonna; ndiyita eŋŋano, ndigiwa okwala; siribaleetera njala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ebibala ku miti ndibiwa okwala, bwe ntyo era ne ku birime by'omu nnimiro, muleme kuddayo kuswala mu mawanga olw'enjala." 
Ezekiel36:31 Mulijjukira amakubo gammwe amabi n'ebikolwa byammwe ebitali birungi; mulyekyawa mwennyini olw'ebibi byamwe n'olw'ebikolwa byammwe ebyeenyinyalwa. 
Ezekiel36:32 Kino mukimanye nti bino sijja kubikola lwa kubeera mmwe, Omukama Katonda y'agamba. Muswale, ensonyi zibakwate olw'enneeyisa yammwe, mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel36:33 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ku lunaku lwe ndibatukuzaako ebibi byammwe byonna, ebibuga byammwe ndibisenzaamu abantu, ebifulukwa ne mbizimba buggya." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ensi ebadde amatongo eririmibwa, mu kifo ky'okulabika ng'erekeddwa awo ettayo mu maaso ga buli muyise." 
Ezekiel36:35 Baligamba nti: “Ensi eno eyali efuuse amatongo kati eri ng'ennimiro ya Edeni; ebibuga ebyali bifuuse ebifulukwa, ebyalekebwa awo ettayo ne byonooneka, kati kuliko ne bbugwe era bisulwamu.”" 
Ezekiel36:36 Amawanga gonna agaali gasigaddewo okwetooloola awo wonna galimanya nti nze Omukama nze nzimbye ebyali bizikiridde, nze nnima n'ebyali amatongo; nze Omukama njogedde, ate nzija kukikola.’" 
Ezekiel36:37 “Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Na kino nakyo nzija kuleka ennyumba ya Yisirayeli esabe nkibakolere: okwongera abantu babe ng'endiga obungi. 
Ezekiel36:38 Ng'endiga emponge, ng'endiga mu Yeruzaalemu mu nnaku enkulu, bwe bityo ebibuga ebibadde ebifulukwa bwe birijjula amagana g'abantu; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Omukono gw'Omukama gwandiko, mu Mwoyo w'Omukama n'anfulumya, n'anzisa wakati mu kiwonvu ekyali kijjudde amagumba." 
Ezekiel37:2 Yampisaayisaamu okuganneetoolooza wonna; gaali mangi nnyo ku ntobo y'ekiwonvu; gaali magumba makalu nnyo. 
Ezekiel37:3 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, olowooza gano amagumba gayinza okulamuka?” Ne nziramu nti: “Mukama wange, ggwe wekka gw'omanyi.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Langa eri amagumba gano ogagambe nti: ‘Mmwe amagumba amakalu, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama." 
Ezekiel37:5 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba amagumba gano: Ŋŋenda okubayingizaamu omukka mulamuke 
Ezekiel37:6 Nzija kubassaako ebinywa; mbamezeeko ennyama, mbabikke n'olususu; nzija kussa mu mmwe omukka mulamuke, olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Ne nnanga nga bwe nali ndagiddwa. Mba nnanga, ne wabaawo eddoboozi, eddoboozi ery'okugolongotana, amagumba ne gayungagana, ggumba ku ggumba linnaalyo." 
Ezekiel37:8 Mba nkyatunudde, ne kujjako ebinywa n'ennyama, n'olususu ne lubibikka; naye mu byo temwali mukka." 
Ezekiel37:9 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Langa eri omukka; langa, mwana w'omuntu nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Owange mukka, vva mu nsonda ennya, ofuuwe ku battibwa bano balamuke.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Ne nnanga nga bwe yali andagidde, omukka ne gubayingiramu, ne balamuka, ne bayimirira ku bigere byange, eggye eddene ennyo." 
Ezekiel37:11 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, amagumba gano gonna ye nnyumba ya Yisirayeli. Bo bagamba nti: ‘Amagumba gaffe gaakala; tekyali ssuubi; twakutulwako.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Kale nno, langa obagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kwasamya amalaalo gammwe, mbaggyeyo mu ntaana zammwe, mmwe bantu bange; ndibakomyawo mu nsi ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Olwo mmwe mulimanya nti nze Mukama, mmwe bantu bange, bwe ndyasamya amalaalo gammwe, ne mbaggya mu ntaana zammwe." 
Ezekiel37:14 Nzija kubassaamu Mwoyo wange mulamuke; nzija kubateeka mu nsi yammwe; olwo mulimanya nti nze Mukama nze njogedde, ate nkikoze, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel37:16 “Mwana w'omuntu, ddira omuggo ogw'omuti oguwandiikeko nti ‘gwa Yuda n'abantu ba Yisirayeli mikwano gye’. Oddire n'omuggo omulala ogw'omuti owandiikeko nti ‘omuggo gwa Efurayimu: gwa Yozefu n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli mikwano gye’." 
Ezekiel37:17 Emiggo gyombi giyunge ogumu ku gunnaagwo gifuuke omuggo gumu mu mikono gyo, olwo gibeere omuggo gumu." 
Ezekiel37:18 Abantu b'eggwanga lyo bwe banaakubuuza nti: ‘Tootubuulire ky'oyagala kutegeeza na bino?’ 
Ezekiel37:19 Onoobagamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kuddira omuggo gwa Yozefu, gwe muggo gwa Efurayimu n'abantu ba Yisirayeli mikwano gye, nguyunge ku muggo gwa Yuda, ngifuulemu omuggo gumu; girifuuka omuggo gumu mu mikono gyange.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 “Emiggo gy'oliba owandiiseeko ng'ogikutte mu mikono gyo mu maaso gaabwe," 
Ezekiel37:21 bagambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Abayisirayeli nzija kubakwata mbaggye mu mawanga gye baalaga. Nzija kubakuŋŋaanya eyo yonna, mbaleete mu nsi yaaboobwe." 
Ezekiel37:22 Nzija kubafuulamu eggwanga limu mu nsi yaabwe ku nsozi za Yisirayeli; kabaka omu y'aliba afuga bonna; tebaliddayo kubeera mawanga abiri, yadde okwawulwamu obwakabaka obubiri." 
Ezekiel37:23 Tebaliddayo kwegwagwawaza na bifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale n'ebyenyinyalwa byabwe n'emisango gyabwe gyonna; nzija kubawonyaayo mu kuddirira kwabwe kwonna kwe baagwamu; nzija kubatukuza; balibeera bantu bange nange ndibeera Katonda waabwe. 
Ezekiel37:24 Omuweereza wange Dawudi y'aliba kabaka waabwe; baliba n'omusumba omu bonna. Baligobereranga ebiragiro byange, n'amateeka gange baligakwatanga ne bagatuusa." 
Ezekiel37:25 Balisula mu nsi gye nawa omuweereza wange Yakobo, ensi bajjajjammwe mwe baasulanga; baligisulamu bo n'abaana baabwe ne bazzukulu baabwe emirembe gyonna, ne Dawudi omuweereza wange nga ye mulangira waabwe emirembe gyonna." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ndikola nabo endagaano ey'eddembe; endagaano ey'olubeerera. Ndibatebenkeza ne mbawa okwala; ekifo kyange ekitukuvu nzija kukissa mu makkati gaabwe emirembe gyonna. 
Ezekiel37:27 Ekisulo kyange kiribeera mu bo; ndibeera Katonda waabwe nabo balibeera bantu bange. 
Ezekiel37:28 Olwo amawanga galimanya nti nze Mukama atukuza Yisirayeli, ekitukuvu kyange bwe kiribeera mu makkati gaabwe emirembe gyonna.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mwana w'omuntu, amaaso go goolekeze Gogi ow'omu nsi y'e Magogi, omulangira ow'oku ntikko mu Meseki ne Tubali, olange ng'omwogerera." 
Ezekiel38:3 Mugambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nkuli bukiika, ggwe Gogi, omulangira ow'oku ntikko ow'e Meseki ne Tubali." 
Ezekiel38:4 Nzija kukukyusa otunule ennyuma, nkusse amalobo mu mba zo, nkuleete n'eggye lyo lyonna: embalaasi, abeebagazi nga bambadde ne baggumira, ebbiina eddene eririna engabo entono n'engabo empaala, bonna nga bakutte ebitala byabwe." 
Ezekiel38:5 Buperusi, Kuusi ne Puti nga bali nabo, bonna balina engabo n'enkufiira ez'ebyuma," 
Ezekiel38:6 era ne Gomeri n'amagye ge gonna, ne Beti-Togaruma okuva emambuka ddala n'eggye lye lyonna, n'akeesedde k'abantu bangi nga kali naawe." 
Ezekiel38:7 “ ‘Weetegeke, weekembe, ggwe n'ebbiina lyonna erikukuŋŋaaniddeko, oliduumire." 
Ezekiel38:8 Nga wayise ennaku nnyingi ojja kukungibwa, mu myaka egijja ojja kuzinda ensi eyaakava mu lutalo, abantu baayo abaakuŋŋaanyizibwa nga bava mu nsi nnyingi ku nsozi za Yisirayeli, eyali erekeddwa awo ettayo. Abantu baggyibwa mu mawanga, kati bonna batebenkedde." 
Ezekiel38:9 Ggwe n'amagye go gonna n'amawanga mangi agali naawe olyambuka n'ozinda ng'omuyaga, oliba ng'ekire ekibisse ensi." 
Ezekiel38:10 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ku olwo ebirowoozo birikujjira mu mutima, n'oteesa ekintu ekibi," 
Ezekiel38:11 n'ogamba nti: “Nzija kulumba ensi ey'ebyalo okutali bbugwe; nzija kuzinda abantu abeetuulidde entende abatakirindiridde, bonna abasula awatali bbugwe, nzigi na miyingo." 
Ezekiel38:12 Nzija kwaya, ntwale omunyago n'omukono gwange ngusse ku bifo amatongo ebizzeemu okusulibwamu ne ku bantu abakuŋŋaanyiziddwa okuva mu mawanga, abagagga b'amagana n'ebintu, abasula mu makkati g'ensi.”" 
Ezekiel38:13 Saba ne Dedani n'abasuubuzi b'e Tarusisi n'ebyalo bye byonna balikugamba nti: “Ozze kunyagulula? Okuŋŋaanyizza ebbiina lyo lyonna okunyaga, otwale ffeeza ne zaabu, otwale amagana, oweze nnyo olwayo?” ’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Kale nno mwana w'omuntu, langa, ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mu budde obwo abantu bange Yisirayeli bwe baliba batebenkedde, ggwe oliba tokimanyi?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Olinaawuuka eyo ewuwo ewala emambuka, ggwe n'amawanga mangi agali naawe, bonna nga beebagadde ku mbalaasi, ebbiina eddene, eggye eddene." 
Ezekiel38:16 Olirumba abantu bange Yisirayeli ng'ekire ekibisse ensi. Gye bujja, ggwe Gogi, nzija kukuwendulira eri ensi yange, amawanga gammanye bwe ndiyita mu ggwe okulaga mu maaso gaabwe nga bw'endi omutukuvu.’" 
Ezekiel38:17 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Si ggwe nayogerako mu mirembe giri nga mpita mu baweereza bange abalanzi ba Yisirayeli abaalanga mu mirembe egyo okumala emyaka nti ndibakuwendulira? 
Ezekiel38:18 Kino kye kiribaawo ku olwo: Gogi bw'alirumba ensi ya Yisirayeli, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, omuliro gw'obusungu bwange gulitumbuka." 
Ezekiel38:19 Mu kulumwa mu mutima ne mu busungu bwange obubuubuuka ne ŋŋamba nti mu lunaku olwo walibaawo akayuuguumo akanene mu nsi ya Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel38:20 Ebyennyanja mu nnyanja n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga birikankana nga ndabise, ko n'ebisolo eby'ettale na buli kitonde ekyewalula ku ttaka, n'abantu bonna abali ku nsi. Ensozi zirisiguukulukuka, enjazi zirisebbuuka, na buli kisenge kirigwa ku ttaka." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndisindikira Gogi ekitala ku nsozi zange zonna, Omukama Katonda y'agamba. Buli omu ekitala kye kiryolekera munne." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndimubonereza ne kawumpuli, n'okuyiwa omusaayi. Nditonnyesa ku ye ne ku ggye lye ne ku mawanga gonna agali naye enkuba nnamuttikwa n'amayinja g'omuzira n'ebibiriiti ebyokya." 
Ezekiel38:23 Bwentyo ndiraga obukulu bwange n'obutukuvu, ne neemanyisa mu maaso g'amawanga amangi. Olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Mwana w'omuntu, langa ng'oyogerera Gogi ogambe nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nkuli bukiika, ggwe Gogi omulangira ow'oku ntikko ow'e Meseki ne Tubali." 
Ezekiel39:2 Nzija kukukyusa otunule ennyuma nkuwaleewale. Ndikuggya ewala eyo emambuka ne nkuleeta ku nsozi za Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel39:3 Ndikuba omusaale gwo okuva mu mukono gwo ogwa kkono, n'obusaale bwo ndibukusuuza mu gwa ddyo." 
Ezekiel39:4 Oligwa ku nsozi za Yisirayeli: ggwe, eggye lyo n'amawanga agali naawe; ndikugabula ennyonyi enkwakkuzi eza buli kika n'ebisolo eby'ettale." 
Ezekiel39:5 Oligwa eyo ku ttale, kubanga nze njogedde, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel39:6 Nditeekera Magogi omuliro n'abo abeetuulidde entende; olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel39:7 N'erinnya lyange ettukuvu ndirimanyisa mu bantu bange Yisirayeli; siriddayo kuleka linnya lyange ettukuvu kwonoonebwa, n'amawanga galimanya nti nze Mukama, Omutukuvu wa Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Kijja; kijja kugwaawo, Omukama Katonda y'agamba; luno lwe lunaku lwe nayogerako." 
Ezekiel39:9 “ ‘Olwo abasula mu bibuga bya Yisirayeli balibifuluma ne bateekera omuliro ne bookya ebyokulwanyisa: engabo empaala n'engabo entono, emisaale, obusaale, embuukuuli n'amafumu; balibyokera emyaka musanvu." 
Ezekiel39:10 Tebalisennya nku mu ttale oba okuzitema mu kibira, kubanga ebyokulwanyisa bye balyokya ng'enku. Balinyagulula abo abaabanyagululanga, ne baaya abo abaabaayanga, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel39:11 “ ‘Ku olwo Gogi ndimuwa ekifo eky'erinnya mu Yisirayeli w'aliziikibwa, kye Kiwonvu Obarimu mu buvanjuba bw'ennyanja, ekiyimiriza n'abatambuze; eyo gye baliziika Gogi n'ebbiina lye lyonna; ekiwonvu kyekiriva kiyitibwa Amoni-Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ennyumba ya Yisirayeli erimala emyezi musanvu nga baziika balyoke batukuze ensi. 
Ezekiel39:13 N'abantu bonna ab'ensi balibaziika; luliba lunaku lwa ttendo gye bali lwe ndigulumizibwako, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel39:14 Waliteekebwawo abantu ab'olubeerera abaligenda nga bayitaayita wonna mu nsi nga baziika abo abaliba bakyasigadde ku ngulu, ensi bagitukuze. Oluvannyuma lw'emyezi omusanvu balitandika ogw'okunoonya." 
Ezekiel39:15 Baliyitaayita wonna mu nsi; omu bw'aligwikirizanga eggumba ly'omuntu, ng'assaawo akabonero we liri okutuusa abaziisi nga baliziise mu Kiwonvu kya Amoni-Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Walibaawo n'ekibuga Amona, bwe batyo balitukuza ensi." 
Ezekiel39:17 “ ‘Mwana w'omuntu, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Yita buli kinyonyi kya buli kika na buli kisolo kya ttale nti: “Mujje okuva wonna, mukuŋŋaanire awali ekitambiro kyange kye mbategekedde, ekitambiro ekinene ku nsozi za Yisirayeli, mulye ennyama, munywe n'omusaayi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Munaalya ennyama y'abazira ne munywa n'omusaayi gw'abafuzi b'ensi nga bwe bandibadde endiga ennume, obuliga, embuzi ennume n'ente ennume, zonna ensolo ensava ez'omu Basani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ku kitambiro kye mbategekedde mujja kulya amasavu mwekkye, munywe n'omusaayi mutamiire." 
Ezekiel39:20 Ate ku lujjuliro lwange mujja kulya mwekkye embalaasi, abeebagazi, abazira, na buli kika kya mutabaazi, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel39:21 “ ‘Ekitiibwa kyange nzija kukyolesa mu mawanga, n'amawanga gonna galiraba engeri gye mbonerezaamu n'omukono gwe mbagololeddeko." 
Ezekiel39:22 Okuva ku olwo ne gye bulijja ennyumba ya Yisirayeli erimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda waabwe," 
Ezekiel39:23 n'amawanga galimanya nti ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yagenda mu buwaŋŋanguse lwa bibi byabwe, tebaali beesigwa gye ndi; nange kwe kubakweka amaaso gange ne mbawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe, bonna ne bafa ekitala." 
Ezekiel39:24 Nabayisa bwe ntyo nga ngerera ku kwejaajaamya kwabwe ne ku misango gyabwe, ne mbakweka amaaso gange." 
Ezekiel39:25 “ ‘Kale nno Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Nzija kukomyawo abasibe ba Yakobo, nzija kusaasira ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, ndikwatirwanga obuggya erinnya lyange ettukuvu." 
Ezekiel39:26 Balyerabira okuswala kwe baaswalamu n'obutali bwesigwa bwe bandaga bwe balimala okutuula entende mu nsi awatali n'omu abakanga. 
Ezekiel39:27 Bwe ndimala okubaggyayo mu mawanga ne mbakuŋŋaanya wamu okuva mu nsi y'abalabe baabwe, mu bo ndiragiramu obutukuvu bwange mu maaso g'amawanga amangi." 
Ezekiel39:28 Olwo balimanya nti nze Mukama Katonda waabwe, nti newandibadde nga nabawaŋŋangusiza mu mawanga, naye ndibakuŋŋaanyiza mu nsi yaaboobwe, era sirirekayo yadde omu ku bo." 
Ezekiel39:29 Sigenda kuddayo kubakweka maaso gange, kubanga ndiyiwa Mwoyo wange ku nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Mu mwaka ogw'abiri mu etaano ogw'okuwaŋŋangusibwa kwaffe, mu masooka g'omwaka, ku lw'ekkumi olw'omwezi, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ena bukya kibuga kizikirizibwa, mu lunaku luno lwennyini omukono gw'Omukama ne gunzijako, ne guntwala eyo." 
Ezekiel40:2 Mu kulabikirwa Katonda, yantwala mu nsi ya Yisirayeli, n'anteeka ku lusozi oluwanvu ennyo okwali ekizimbe ng'eky'ekibuga ku ludda olw'emaserengeta." 
Ezekiel40:3 Yantwala eyo, ne ndaba omusajja, endabika ye ng'eri ng'ey'ekikomo; yali ayimiridde mu mulyango, ng'alina mu mikono gye omuguwa omulange mu wuzi eza kitaani n'olumuli olupima mu mikono gye." 
Ezekiel40:4 Omusajja n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, tunuulira n'amaaso go, wulira n'amatu go, byonna bye ŋŋenda okukwoleka bisseeko omutima, ye nsonga ekuleesezza wano. Byonna by'onoolaba bibuulire ennyumba ya Yisirayeli.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Laba, bbugwe ebweru nga yeebunguludde ekizimbe wonna; olumuli mu mukono gw'omusajja lwaliko emikono mukaaga obuwanvu, omukono nga gupima omukono gumu n'oluta. N'apima bbugwe; yali wa lumuli lumu obunene n'olumuli lumu obugulumivu." 
Ezekiel40:6 N'agenda ku mulyango ogutunudde ebuvanjuba, n'ayambuka ku madaala gaagwo, n'apima omwango gwagwo; gwali gwa lumuli lumu obugazi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Obuzigo bw'abakuumi bwali bwa lumuli lumu obuwanvu, n'olumuli lumu obugazi; ekisenge ekiyitamu wakati w'obuzigo bw'abakuumi kyali kya mikono etaano obunene, ate omwango gw'omulyango gw'ekisasi ekitunudde mu Kiggwa nga gwa lumuli lumu obunene." 
Ezekiel40:8 N'apima ekisasi ky'omulyango, kyali kya mikono munaana obugazi." 
Ezekiel40:9 Emyango gyakyo nga gya mikono ebiri obunene. Ekisasi ky'omulyango nga kitunudde mu Kiggwa. 
Ezekiel40:10 Munda w'omulyango gw'ebuvanjuba waaliyo obuzigo busatu ku buli luuyi, bwonsatule nga bwa bipimo bye bimu, n'ebisenge ebiyiseemu ku njuyi zombi nga bya bunene bwe bumu." 
Ezekiel40:11 N'apima obugazi bw'oluggi lw'omulyango, emikono kkumi, n'obuwanvu emikono kkumi n'esatu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Mu maaso ga buli kazigo waaliwo ekisenge nga kya mukono gumu obuwanvu; obuzigo bwali bwa njuyi ezenkanankana, emikono mukaaga ku mukaaga." 
Ezekiel40:13 N'apima omulyango okuva ku kasolya k'ekisenge ky'akamu ku buzigo okutuusa ku kasolya k'ekisenge ekikitunuddemu, obuwanvu emikono abiri mu etaano okuva ku mulyango ogumu okutuusa ku gugutunuddemu." 
Ezekiel40:14 Yapima n'ebisenge ebiyitamu, emikono nkaaga, n'okwetooloola wonna w'ekisasi ky'omulyango gw'oluggya." 
Ezekiel40:15 Okuva mu maaso g'omulyango okutuusa eri ekisasi kyagwo gye kiggweerako waaliwo emikono amakumi ataano. 
Ezekiel40:16 Obuzigo n'ebisenge ebiyitamu munda w'omulyango kwaliko amadirisa amafunda okwetooloola wonna, era n'ekisasi kyali bwe kityo; amadirisa gaali gatunuulidde munda. Ebisenge ebiyitamu byali byoleddwako enkindu." 
Ezekiel40:17 N'antwala mu luggya olw'ebweru, eyo ng'eriyo ebigango, ne wansi awo nga waaliriddwa amayinja okwetooloola wonna oluggya; ebigango byali amakumi asatu okwetooloola omwaliiro ogw'amayinja." 
Ezekiel40:18 Omwaliiro ogw'amayinja gwagendanga gugoba emiryango era nga mugazi okwenkana obuwanvu bwagyo; guno gwe gwali omwaliiro gw'amayinja ogw'emmanga. 
Ezekiel40:19 N'apima obuwanvu okuva munda mu mulyango ogw'emmanga okutuuka ku luggya olw'omunda we lukoma. Waaliwo emikono kikumi, ebuvanjuba n'emambuka nga kye kimu." 
Ezekiel40:20 Awo n'apima obuwanvu n'obugazi bw'omulyango ogwali gutunudde emambuka ogutwala ebweru w'oluggya olw'omunda. 
Ezekiel40:21 Obuzigo bwagwo, obusatu ku buli luuyi, empagi n'ekisasi byonna byali bya bipimo bye bimu n'omulyango ogusooka. Gwali gwa mikono amakumi ataano obuwanvu, ate n'obugazi emikono abiri mu etaano." 
Ezekiel40:22 Amadirisa, ekisasi, n'enkindu ezooleddwako byalina ebipimo bye bimu n'eby'omulyango ogutunudde ebuvanjuba; amadaala musanvu nga ge gambukayo, ekisasi nga kitunudde munda." 
Ezekiel40:23 Waaliyo omulyango ogw'oluggya olw'omunda olutunuulidde omulyango ogw'emambuka era nga bwe kyali n'ebuvanjuba; n'apima okuva ku mulyango ogumu okutuuka ku mulyango omulala, waaliwo emikono kikumi." 
Ezekiel40:24 N'antwala ku ludda olw'emaserengeta, waaliyo omulyango ogutunudde emaserengeta. N'apima emyango gyagwo n'ekisasi kyagwo; byali bya bipimo bye bimu na giri." 
Ezekiel40:25 Omulyango n'ekisasi byalina amadirisa okwetooloola wonna okufaanana amadirisa amalala gali. Gwali gwa mikono amakumi ataano obuwanvu, ate obugazi emikono abiri mu etaano." 
Ezekiel40:26 Amadaala musanvu nga ge gambukayo, ekisasi kyali eno munda; ku mpagi ku buli luuyi nga kwoleddwako enkindu." 
Ezekiel40:27 Oluggya olw'omunda kwaliko omulyango ogutunudde emaserengeta, n'apima okuva ku mulyango guno okutuuka ku mulyango ogw'oku luuyi olw'emaserengeta, waaliwo emikono kikumi." 
Ezekiel40:28 N'annyingiza mu luggya olw'omunda ng'ampisa mu mulyango ogw'emaserengeta, n'apima omulyango ogw'emaserengeta. Gwalina ebipimo bye bimu na giri emirala." 
Ezekiel40:29 Obuzigo bwagwo, empagi zaagwo n'ekisasi kyagwo, by'alina ebipimo bye bimu n'ebya biri. Omulyango n'ekisasi kyagwo by'alina amadirisa okwetooloola wonna. Byali bya mikono amakumi ataano obuwanvu n'obugazi emikono amakumi abiri mu etaano." 
Ezekiel40:30 Waaliwo ebisasi okwetooloola wonna oluggya nga bya mikono abiri mu etaano obuwanvu n'obugazi emikono abiri mu etaano. 
Ezekiel40:31 Ekisasi kyalwo kyali kitunudde mu luggya olw'ebweru; emyango gyakyo gyali gyoleddwako enkindu, amadaala munaana nga ge gambukayo." 
Ezekiel40:32 Ate n'annyingiza mu luggya olw'omunda ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, n'apima omulyango; gwalina ebipimo bye bimu na giri emirala." 
Ezekiel40:33 Obuzigo bwagwo, empagi zaagwo, n'ekisasi byalina ebipimo bye bimu ng'ebirala. Omuzigo n'ekisasi byalina amadirisa okwetooloola wonna. Gwali gwa mikono ataano obuwanvu n'emikono abiri mu etaano obugazi." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ekisasi kyagwo nga kitunudde mu luggya olw'ebweru, enkindu nga zooleddwa ku myango gyagwo ku njuyi zombi, amadaala munaana nga ge gambukayo." 
Ezekiel40:35 N'antwala ku mulyango ogutunudde emambuka n'agupima. Gwalina ebipimo bye bimu n'emirala. 
Ezekiel40:36 Era n'obuzigo bwagwo, n'empagi zaagwo, n'ekisasi kyagwo. Gwalina amadirisa okwetooloola wonna. Gwali gwa mikono amakumi ataano obuwanvu, ate obugazi emikono amakumi abiri mu etaano." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ekisasi kyagwo nga kitunudde mu luggya olw'ebweru; enkindu nga zooleddwa ku myango gyakwo ku njuyi zombi; amadaala munaana nga ge gambukayo. 
Ezekiel40:38 Waaliwo ekigango ng'omuzigo gwakyo guli ku kisasi ky'omulyango, eyo ebitone by'ebitambiro ebyokye nga gye byolezebwa." 
Ezekiel40:39 Mu kisasi ky'omulyango nga waliwo emmeeza bbiri ku njuyi zombi okwattirwanga ebitone eby'ekitambiro ekyokye, ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'ekitambiro olw'omusango." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ku kisenge ky'ekisasi ky'omulyango, okumpi n'amadaala agambuka ku muzigo gw'omulyango ogw'emambuka, waaliyo emmeeza bbiri, ate ne ku luuyi olulala olw'ekisasi ng'eriyo era emmeeza bbiri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Kwe kugamba nti waaliwo emmeeza nnya ku luuyi olumu olw'omulyango n'endala nnya ku luuyi olulala, ze mmeeza munaana okwattirwanga ebyonziira." 
Ezekiel40:42 Waaliwo era emmeeza ennya ez'amayinja amabajje olw'ebitambiro ebyokye, buli emu nga ya mukono gumu n'ekitundu obuwanvu, obugazi omukono gumu n'ekitundu n'obusimba omukono gumu; okwo kwe baatekanga eby'okukola ku bitone by'ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebyonziira." 
Ezekiel40:43 N'amalobo, nga ga luta lumu obuwanvu, gaali gakomereddwa wonna okwetooloola wonna. Emmeeza zaali za nnyama y'ebitambiro." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ate ebweru w'omulyango ogw'omunda, mu luggya olw'omunda, ng'eriyo ebigango bibiri: ekimu kyalinga ku luuyi lw'omulyango ogutunudde emambuka nga kitunudde emaserengeta, ekirala nga kiri ku luuyi olw'omulyango nga kitunudde emambuka." 
Ezekiel40:45 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Ekigango ekitunudde emaserengeta kya bakabona abalabirira Ekiggwa. 
Ezekiel40:46 Ate ekigango ekitunudde emambuka kya bakabona abalabirira omwaliiro, be bo bazzukulu ba Zadoki, bazzukulu ba Leevi bokka abasobola okusemberera Omukama okumuweereza.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 N'apima oluggya, lwali lwa njuyi ezenkanankana, obuwanvu emikono kikumi n'obugazi emikono kikumi; omwaliiro gwo gwabeeranga mu maaso ga Kiggwa." 
Ezekiel40:48 Yandeeta ku Kisasi ky'Ekiggwa n'apima emyango gy'Ekisasi; gyali gya mikono etaano obugazi ku buli luuyi; ate obugazi bw'omulyango bwali emikono kkumi n'ena, ate ebisenge ebiyitamu nga bya mikono esatu obugazi erudda n'erudda." 
Ezekiel40:49 Ekisasi kyali kya mikono amakumi abiri obuwanvu, ate obugazi emikono kkumi n'ebiri; amadaala kkumi nga ge gambukayo; ku buli ludda lw'omwango nga waliyo empagi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Awo omusajja n'andeeta ku Ddiiro n'apima emyango; obugazi bw'emyango buli gumu ku njuyi zombi nga bwa mikono mukaaga. 
Ezekiel41:2 Omuzigo gw'omulyango gwali gwa mikono kkumi obugazi, ate ekisenge ekiyitamu ku buli luuyi lwagwo kyali kya mikono etaano obugazi buli kisenge. Yapima Eddiiro, lyali lya mikono amakumi ana obuwanvu, ate obugazi emikono amakumi abiri." 
Ezekiel41:3 N'ayingira mu Kisenge eky'Omunda n'apima emyango gy'omulyango ku njuyi zombi, buli gumu gwali gwa mikono ebiri obugazi. Omulyango gwennyini gwali gwa mikono mukaaga obugazi, ate ekisenge ekiyitamu ku buli luuyi nga kya mikono musanvu obugazi." 
Ezekiel41:4 N'apima obuwanvu bwakyo, kyali kya mikono amakumi abiri obugazi n'emikono amakumi abiri eri gye kisembera ku Ddiiro. N'aŋŋamba nti: “Wano we Watukuvu Ennyo.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 N'apima ekisenge ky'Ekiggwa, kyali kya mikono mukaaga obunene, n'obusenge obw'oku mabbali okwetooloola wonna Ekiggwa bwali bwa mikono ena obugazi." 
Ezekiel41:6 Obusenge obw'oku mabbali bwali bwa myaliiro esatu, akamu waggulu wa kanne waako, nga buli mwaliiro gulinako obusenge amakumi asatu okwetooloola wonna. Ku kisenge ky'Ekiggwa okwetooloola kwaliko enzizi eziwaniridde obusenge obw'oku mabbali; naye ng'enzizi ezo tezisonsekeddwa munda mu kisenge kya Kiggwa." 
Ezekiel41:7 Obugazi bw'obusenge obw'oku mabbali bwagendanga bweyongera obugazi ku buli mwaliiro okusinziira ku nzizi nga bwezaagendanga zigaziwa ku buli mwaliiro okwetooloola wonna Ekiggwa. Amadaala gaayambukanga okuva ku mwaliiro ogwa wansi okutuuka ku mwaliiro ogwa waggulu nga gayitira mu mwaliiro ogwa wakati. 
Ezekiel41:8 Ne ndaba ng'Ekiggwa kyalina ebbalaza enzimbe okwetooloola wonna era ng'ekola ng'omusingi gw'obusenge. Yali ya lumuli lumu obugulumivu, gye mikono mukaaga." 
Ezekiel41:9 Ekisenge eky'ebweru eky'obusenge bw'oku mabbali kyali kya mikono etaano obunene. Waaliwo ekkuubo wakati w'obusenge obw'oku mabbali 
Ezekiel41:10 n'ebigango; kyali kya mikono amakumi abiri obugazi okwetooloola wonna Ekiggwa. 
Ezekiel41:11 Obusenge obw'oku mabbali bwalina emiryango awayingirirwa okuva mu kkuubo, ogumu emambuka n'omulala emaserengeta. Olubalaza olwali lugatta ku kkuubo nga lwa mikono etaano obugazi okwetooloola wonna." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ekizimbe ekyali kitunudde mu luggya ku luuyi olw'ebugwanjuba kyali kya mikono nsanvu obugazi; ekisenge ky'ekizimbe ng'obugazi kya mikono etaano okwetooloola wonna, obuwanvu bwakyo, emikono kyenda." 
Ezekiel41:13 Ate n'apima Ekiggwa; kyali kya mikono kikumi obuwanvu. Oluggya n'ekizimbe n'ebisenge byakyo nga bya mikono kikumi obuwanvu. 
Ezekiel41:14 Obugazi mu maaso g'Ekiggwa n'oluggya lu ludda olw'ebuvanjuba bwali bwa mikono kikumi. 
Ezekiel41:15 N'apima obuwanvu bw'ekizimbe ekitunudde mu luggya olw'emmanju, n'ebbalaza yaakyo ku njuyi zombi, byali bya mikono kikumi. Eddiiro, Ekisenge eky'Omunda n'Ekisasi ekitunudde mu luggya," 
Ezekiel41:16 emiryango, amadirisa amafunda, ebbalaza zonsatule okwetooloola wonna, na buli kintu obusukka mulyango n'omulyango gwennyini nga bibembekeddwako embaawo okuva ku ttaka okutuuka ku madirisa, n'amadirisa gaali mabikke." 
Ezekiel41:17 Waggulu ebweru w'omulyango oguyingira mu Kisenge eky'Omunda ne ku kisenge wano na wali okwetooloola wonna mu Ekisenge eky'Omunda n'Eddiiro 
Ezekiel41:18 kwaliko ebifaananyi ebyole eby'abakerubi n'eby'enkindu, nga bitobekeddwa wano olukindu wali omukerubi. Buli mukerubi yalina ebyenyi bibiri:" 
Ezekiel41:19 ekyenyi ng'eky'omuntu nga kitunuulidde olukindu ku luuyi luno, n'ekyenyi ng'eky'empologoma nga kitunuulidde olukindu ku luuyi olulala; nga byoleddwa ku Kiggwa okwetooloola wonna." 
Ezekiel41:20 Okuva ku ttaka okutuuka ku bitundu waggulu w'omulyango nga kwoleddwako abakerubi n'enkindu ku kisenge ky'Eddiiro. 
Ezekiel41:21 Emyango gy'enzigi z'Eddiiro gyali gya njuyi nnya ezenkanankana. Mu maaso g'Awatukuvu Ennyo nga waliwo ekifaanana 
Ezekiel41:22 omwaliiro ogw'embaawo, obugulumivu emikono esatu ate obwagaagavu emikono ebiri; ensonda zaayo, entobo yaayo n'embiriizi nga bya mbaawo. N'aŋŋamba nti: “Eno ye mmeeza ebeera mu maaso g'Omukama.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Eddiiro n'Awatukuvu Ennyo byaliko enzigi za nabansasaana. 
Ezekiel41:24 Buli luggi nga lwa nabansasaana, ebiwero bibiri ebiyungiddwa ne ppata ku buli luggi." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ku nzigi z'Eddiiro kwali kwoleddwako bakerubi n'enkindu, ng'era bwe byali byoleddwa ne ku bisenge. Mu maaso g'Ekisasi kwaliko akasasi ak'embaawo." 
Ezekiel41:26 Ku mabbali ekisenge ky'Ekisasi kwaliko amadirisa amafunda nga kwoleddwako ebifaananyi by'enkindu ku buli luuyi. Obusenge obw'oku mabbali ku Kiggwa nabwo bwaliko obusasi. 
Ezekiel42:1 Omusajja n'anfulumya n'antwala mu luggya olw'ebweru ku luuyi olw'emambuka, n'antuusa ku kigango ekitunudde mu luggya lw'Ekiggwa, era ekitunudde mu kisenge eky'ebweru ku luuyi olw'emambuka." 
Ezekiel42:2 Mu maaso gaakyo ku luuyi olw'emambuka kyali kya mikono kikumi obuwanvu, n'emikono amakumi ataano obugazi." 
Ezekiel42:3 Awo we kitunuuliridde mu miryango gy'oluggya olw'omunda era ne we kitunuuliridde mu mwaliro gw'amayinja ogw'oluggya olw'ebweru, nga waliwo ebbalaza etunudde mu bbalaza ku buli myaliiro esatu." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ate mu maaso g'ebigango nga waliwo ekkuubo ery'omunda lya mikono kkumi obugazi n'emikono kikumi obuwanvu; emiryango gy'ebigango nga giri ku luuyi olw'emambuka. 
Ezekiel42:5 Ebigango ebya waggulu byali bifundafunda kubanga ebbalaza zabifunzanga, nga bifunda okusinga eby'oku mwaliiro ogwa wansi ne mu makkati g'ekizimbe." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ebigango byo byali bya myaliiro esatu; temwali mpagi ng'oluggya olw'ebweru ze lwalina. Ebigango ebya waggulu byali bifunda okusinga ebigango eby'oku ttaka ne ku mwaliiro ogwokubiri. 
Ezekiel42:7 Waaliwo ekisenge eky'ebweru ekyagendanga obutereevu nga kigoba ebigango n'oluggya olw'ebweru. Kyagendanga kityo mu maaso g'ebigango emikono amakumi ataano. 
Ezekiel42:8 Olukalala lw'ebigango ku luuyi olw'oluggya olw'ebweru nga lwa mikono amakumi ataano, ate olulala ku luuyi oluliraanye Ekiggwa lwali lwa mikono kikumi." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ebigango ebya wansi byalina emiryango ebuvanjuba ng'ofulumidde mu luggya olw'ebweru. 
Ezekiel42:10 Ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta ng'ekisenge eky'oluggya olw'ebweru bwe kigenda, mu maaso g'ekizimbe n'oluggya, waaliwo ebigango," 
Ezekiel42:11 n'ekkuubo mu maaso gaabyo. Byali bifaanagana n'ebigango eby'emambuka. Byalina obuwanvu bwe bumu n'obugazi; nga birina emiryango egifuluma n'ebipimo ebifaanagana," 
Ezekiel42:12 n'emiryango egy'emambuka gyali gifaanagana n'emiryango gy'ebigango by'emaserengeta. Waaliwo omulyango ekkuubo we litandikira, eryali ligenda ligoba obutereevu ekisenge ekidda ebugwanjuba. Mu guno we waayingirirwanga mu bigango." 
Ezekiel42:13 Awo n'agamba nti: “Ebigango eby'emambuka n'ebigango eby'emaserengeta ebiri mu maaso g'oluggya lw'Ekiggwa, ebyo bigango bya bakabona, abo abasemberera Omukama, gye banaaliiranga ebiweerezebwa ebitukuvu ennyo; eyo gye banaateekanga ebitone ebitukuvu ennyo: ebitone eby'obuwunga, ebitone eby'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'olw'ekitambiro olw'omusango, kubanga ekifo kitukuvu." 
Ezekiel42:14 Bakabona bwe banaayingiranga mu kifo ekitukuvu, tebaafulumenga kujja mu luggya lw'ebweru, wabula nga bamaze okuggyako ebyambalo byabwe mwe baweerereza, kubanga bitukuvu; banaayambalanga ebyambalo ebirala, olwo ne balyoka balaga mu bifo awabeera abantu.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Bwe yamala ebipimo by'oluggya olw'omunda w'Ekiggwa, n'anfulumya ng'ampisa mu kkubo ery'omulyango ogw'ebuvanjuba; nayo n'apimayo okwetooloola wonna." 
Ezekiel42:16 N'apima oluuyi olw'ebuvanjuba n'olumuli, lwali lwa mikono ebikumi bitaano egy'olumuli." 
Ezekiel42:17 N'apima n'oluuyi olw'emambuka, lwali lwa mikono ebikumi bitaano egy'olumuli." 
Ezekiel42:18 N'apima oluuyi olw'emaserengeta, lwali lwa mikono ebikumi bitaano egy'olumuli." 
Ezekiel42:19 N'apima oluuyi olw'ebugwanjuba, lwali lwa mikono ebikumi bitaano egy'olumuli." 
Ezekiel42:20 Bw'atyo n'akipima ku njuyi zonna ennya; kwaliko bbugwe okwetooloola wonna, obuwanvu emikono ebikumi bitaano n'obugazi emikono ebikumi bitaano, ng'ayawula ekitukuvu ku kitali kitukuvu." 
Ezekiel43:1 Omusajja n'antwala ku mulyango ogutunudde ebuvanjuba," 
Ezekiel43:2 ne ndaba ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli nga kijja kiva ebuvanjuba. Eddoboozi lye nga liri ng'okuyira okw'amazzi amangi, n'ensi ng'eyakaayakana olw'ekitiibwa kye." 
Ezekiel43:3 Okulabikirwa kwe nafuna nga kuli ng'okulabikirwa kwe nafuna lwe yajja okuzikiriza ekibuga, n'okulabikirwa nga kuli okw'oku mugga Kebari; ne ngwa wansi ku maaso gange." 
Ezekiel43:4 Ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kiyingira mu Kiggwa nga kiyita mu mulyango ogutunudde ebuvanjuba. 
Ezekiel43:5 Mwoyo n'ansitula n'annyingiza mu luggya olw'omunda; ekitiibwa ky'Omukama ne kijjula Ekiggwa. 
Ezekiel43:6 Awo ng'omusajja ayimiridde kumpi nange, ne mpulira ayogera nange ng'ayima mu Kiggwa." 
Ezekiel43:7 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, kino kye kifo kya nnamulondo yange era kye kifo ky'ebigere byange. Wano we nnaasula mu Bayisirayeli wakati emirembe gyonna.
