Ennyumba ya Yisirayeli teliddayo kwonoona linnya lyange ettukuvu; bo ne bakabaka baabwe tebaliddayo kulyonoona n'obwamalaaya bwabwe n'emirambo gya bakabaka baabwe ku bifo ebigulumivu." 
Ezekiel43:8 Bwe baazimba emiryango gyabwe okumpi n'emiryango gyange n'emyango gyabwe okumpi n'emyango gyange, nga kisenge kyokka kye kyawula nze ku bo, baayonoona erinnya lyange ettukuvu n'ebyenyinyalwa bye baakola; kyennava nsunguwala ne mbawemmenta mu busungu bwange." 
Ezekiel43:9 Kale nno kati banzigyirewo obwamalaaya bwabwe n'emirambo gya bakabaka baabwe, olwo nnaasula mu bo emirembe gyonna." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Naye ggwe, mwana w'omuntu, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli ginnyonnyole Ekiggwa, bekkaanye ekifaananyi byakyo, baswale olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ensonyi bwe ziriba zibakutte olw'ebyo byonna bye baakola, babuulire enfaanana y'Ekiggwa: entereeza yaakyo, emiryango gyakyo egifuluma, emiryango gyakyo egiyingira; bamanyise enfaanana yaakyo yonna n'amateeka gaakyo gonna, n'entereeza zaakyo zonna n'ebikiragiddwako byonna. Biwandiike nga balaba, balyoke bakuume enfaanana yaakyo n'amateeka gaakyo gonna; bino babituusenga." 
Ezekiel43:12 Eryo lye tteeka ly'Ekiggwa; entikko y'olusozi n'okwetooloola wonna wanaabanga watukuvu nnyo. Lino lye tteeka ly'Ekiggwa. 
Ezekiel43:13 “Bino bye bipimo by'omwaliiro mu mikono, omukono ogumu nga gwenkana omukono gumu n'oluta, n'omufulejje ogugwetooloola nga gwa mukono gumu okukka wansi n'omukono gumu obugazi, n'omugo ogwetooloola ku mumwa gw'omufulejje nga gwa luta lumu. Buno bwe bugulumivu bw'omwaliiro:" 
Ezekiel43:14 okuva ku mufulejje ku ttaka okutuuka ku luzizi olwa wansi emikono ebiri obusimba n'omukono gumu obugazi; ate okuva ku luzizi olwa wansi okutuuka ku luzizi olunene, emikono ena obusimba n'omukono gumu obugazi." 
Ezekiel43:15 Ekyoto kya mikono ena obusimba, ate okuva ku kyoto okutuuka waggulu ku mayembe ana agayimireddeko waliwo emikono ena." 
Ezekiel43:16 Ekyoto kya njuyi nnya ezenkanankana: emikono kkumi n'ebiri obuwanvu ne kkumi n'ebiri obugazi. 
Ezekiel43:17 Oluzizi olwa waggulu nalwo lwa njuyi ezenkanankana: emikono kkumi n'ena obuwanvu n'emikono kkumi n'ena obugazi, nga lwetooloddwa omugo gwa kitundu kya mukono n'omufulejje gwa mukono gumu. Amadaala agambuka ku mwaliiro gatunudde buvanjuba.”" 
Ezekiel43:18 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Gano ge mateeka ku mwaliiro bwe guliba guwedde okuzimbibwa okuweererezaako ekitambiro ekyokye n'okumansirako omusaayi:" 
Ezekiel43:19 Bakabona Abaleevi abasibuka mu Zadoki abansemberera okumpeereza, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, olibawa ente ennume ento olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi." 
Ezekiel43:20 Oliddira ku musaayi gwayo n'oguteeka ku mayembe ana ag'omwaliiro ku nsonda ennya ez'oluzizi olwa waggulu n'okwetoolooza omugo gwonna, otukuze bw'otyo omwaliiro era oddaabirize olw'okubeera gwo." 
Ezekiel43:21 Oliddira ente ennume olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'ogyokera mu kifo ekirondeddwa mu Kiggwa ebweru w'ekitukuvu. 
Ezekiel43:22 Ate ku lunaku olwokubiri oliweereza embuzi ennume eteriiko kamogo ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi; omwaliiro gulitukuzibwa nga bwe gwatukuzibwa ku nte ennume. 
Ezekiel43:23 Bw'olimala okugutukuza, oliweereza ente ennume ento n'endiga ennume okuva mu kisibo, byombi nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Ezekiel43:24 Olibiweereza mu maaso g'Omukama, ne bakabona balibimamirirako omunnyo ne babiweereza Omukama ng'ekitambiro ekyokye." 
Ezekiel43:25 Olimala ennaku musanvu nga buli lunaku oweereza embuzi ennume ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, era oliweereza n'ente ennume ento n'endiga ennume okuva mu kisibo, zonna nga teziriiko kamogo." 
Ezekiel43:26 Balimala ennaku musanvu nga baddaabiriza olw'omwaliiro ne bagutukuza, bwe batyo ne bagusiiga." 
Ezekiel43:27 Ennaku ezo nga bazimalirizza, ku lunaku olwomunaana n'okweyongerayo bakabona baliweereza ku mwaliiro ebitambiro byammwe ebyokye, n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu. Olwo ndibasiima, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Omusajja n'ankomyawo ku mulyango ogw'ebweru ogw'Ekiggwa ogutunudde ebuvanjuba; gwali muggale. 
Ezekiel44:2 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Omulyango guno gujja kusigalanga nga muggale, si gwa kuggulibwanga, era tewali muntu wa kuguyingirirangamu, kubanga Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli mw'ayise okuyingira; gwa kusigalanga nga muggale." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ye omulangira akyayinza okugutuulamu n'aliira mu maaso g'Omukama. Ajja kuyingiriranga awali ekisasi ky'omulyango era afulumire eyo.” 
Ezekiel44:4 Ate n'ampisa mu mulyango ogw'emambuka, n'andeeta mu maaso g'Ekiggwa. Bwe natunula, ne ndaba ekitiibwa ky'Omukama nga kijjuzizza Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, ne ngwa wansi ku maaso gange." 
Ezekiel44:5 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mwana w'omuntu, weetegereze, laba bulungi era wulira n'obwegendereza byonna bye nkunnyonnyola ebifa ku ntereeza y'omu Kiggwa ky'Omukama n'amateeka gaakyo gonna; weetegereze ennyingira y'omu Kiggwa n'enfuluma okuva mu Kitukuvu." 
Ezekiel44:6 Gamba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli enjeemu nti: ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Ebyenyinyalwa byammwe byonna mubimale, mmwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel44:7 Kubanga mwaleeta ab'amawanga abatali batayirire mu mutima ne mu mubiri ne mubayingiza mu kifo kyange ekitukuvu, Ekiggwa kyange ne mukijaajaamya ate eno nga bwe mumpeereza emmere, amasavu n'omusaayi; ne mumemya endagaano yange." 
Ezekiel44:8 Temwatuukiriza mirimu gyammwe ku bitukuvu byange, wabula ate ne mussaawo abagwira balabirire Ekitukuvu kyange." 
Ezekiel44:9 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Tewabanga mugwira atali mutayirire mu mutima ne mu mubiri ayingiranga mu Kitukuvu kyange, newandibadde omugwira yenna abeera mu Bayisirayeli." 
Ezekiel44:10 “ ‘Abaleevi abaneesuuba, luli Abayisirayeli lwe banjawukanako ne bagoberera ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale, balyetikka omusango gw'ekibi kyabwe." 
Ezekiel44:11 Banaabanga baweereza mu Kiggwa kyange; banaakolanga ogw'obuggazi ku miryango gyakyo; banaaweerezanga mu Kiggwa. Banattanga ebitone eby'ekitambiro ekyokye, ne batambira ku lw'abantu, era banaayimiriranga mu maaso gaabwe babaweereze." 
Ezekiel44:12 Naye kubanga baabaweerezanga mu maaso g'ebifaananyi byabwe ebya balubaale, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli ne bagifuukira kyesittazo eky'ekibi, nange ndayira, Omukama Katonda y'agamba, bajja kwetikka omusango gw'ekibi kyabwe." 
Ezekiel44:13 Awo nno tebalinsemberera kumpeereza nga bakabona, yadde okusemberera ebintu byange n'ebitone byange ebitukuvu ennyo; basaanye bafe ensonyi olw'ebyenyinyalwa byabwe bye baakola." 
Ezekiel44:14 Naye nzija kubawa obuvunaanyizibwa ku mirimu gy'omu Kiggwa, ne ku kuweereza kwonna ne ku byonna ebikolebwamu." 
Ezekiel44:15 “ ‘Bakabona Abaleevi, bazzukulu ba Zadoki, abaakola n'obwesigwa emirimu gy'omu Kitukuvu kyange luli Abayisirayeli lwe banjawukanako, bo ba kusembera bampeerezenga; bajja kuyimiriranga mu maaso gange, bampeereze ebitambiro eby'amasavu n'omusaayi, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel44:16 Bokka be baliyingiranga mu Kitukuvu kyange; bokka be banaasembereranga emmeeza yange, baweerezenga mu maaso gange, bakole bye nkuutidde." 
Ezekiel44:17 Bwe banaayingiranga mu miryango egy'omu luggya olw'omunda, bambalanga ebyambalo mu ngoye eza kitaani; tebassangako ngoye nkole mu byoya bya ndiga bwe banaabanga baweereza ku miryango egy'omu luggya olw'omunda ne munda mu Kiggwa." 
Ezekiel44:18 Beesibanga ebitambaala ebya kitaani ku mitwe gyabwe, era n'empale eza kitaani mu biwato byabwe, tebambalanga kintu kibatuuyanya." 
Ezekiel44:19 Bwe banaafulumanga okugenda mu luggya olw'ebweru abantu gye bali, beeyambulanga ebyambalo byabwe bye babadde baweererezaamu, era ba kubirekanga mu bigango ebitukuvu, ne bambala ebyambalo ebirala, ne batatukuza bantu na byambalo byabwe." 
Ezekiel44:20 Emitwe gyabwe tebagimwanga, naye ate tebalekanga mivumbo gyabwe kuwanvuwa, wabula bagikendeezangako." 
Ezekiel44:21 Tebanga kabona yenna anywa mwenge ng'agenda okuyingira mu luggya olw'omunda. 
Ezekiel44:22 Tebawasanga bannamwandu oba abakazi abagobeddwa; wabula bawasanga bawala mbeerera abasibuka mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli oba bannamwandu ba bakabona. 
Ezekiel44:23 Ba kuyigirizanga abantu bange enjawulo wakati w'ekitukuvu n'ekya bulijjo, ne babalaga enjawulo wakati w'ekitali kirongoofu n'ekirongoofu." 
Ezekiel44:24 “ ‘Bwe wabangawo empaka, bakabona be banaalamulanga nga bagoberera amateeka gange. Bakwatanga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange ku mbaga zange zonna enkulu eziragiddwa, era batukuzanga Sabbaato zange." 
Ezekiel44:25 Kabona teyeeyonoonanga ng'agenda eri omulambo, naye singa abadde kitaawe oba nnyina, mutabani we oba muwala we, muganda we oba mwannyina atannafumbirwa, kabona ayinza okuleka ne yeeyonoona olw'okubeera bo." 
Ezekiel44:26 Bw'amalanga okulongoosebwa, abalirwangayo ennaku musanvu." 
Ezekiel44:27 Ku lunaku lw'aliyingira mu luggya olw'omunda olw'Ekitukuvu, ampeereze mu Kitukuvu, aweerezanga ekitambiro olw'ekibi kye, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel44:28 “ ‘Nze ndiba obusika bwabwe bwokka bwe balina; tobawanga busika mu Yisirayeli, kubanga nze ndiba ekyabwe ekyabowo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Banaalyanga ebiweerezebwa olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga n'ebitambiro olw'ekibi n'olw'omusango, na buli kyonna mu Yisirayeli ekisingiddwayo enkomeredde nakyo kinaabanga kyabwe." 
Ezekiel44:30 Byonna ebisinga mu bibala ebisooka byonna, ne mu byammwe eby'empooza n'ebya buli bitambiro byammwe, binaabanga bya bakabona. Era mubawanga n'ekitundu ekisooka eky'obutta omukisa gulyoke gubeere ku nnyumba yo." 
Ezekiel44:31 Bakabona si ba kulyanga ku buli kintu oba kalannamye oba ebitaaguju by'ekinyonyi oba ensolo.’ ” 
Ezekiel45:1 “ ‘Bwe mugabanyangamu ensi ng'obusika, mwawulizangako Omukama ekibanja ku nsi ng'ekitundu ekitukuvu, nga kya mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu n'emikono emitwalo ebiri obugazi; kiriba kitukuvu okwetooloola eyo yonna gye kikoma." 
Ezekiel45:2 Ku ekyo, ettaka lya mikono bitaano ku bitaano liriba lya Kitukuvu n'ekibangirizi ekyereere kya mikono ataano obugazi okwetooloola." 
Ezekiel45:3 Ku kitundu ekyo ekipimiddwako ojja kupimako ekitundu kya mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu n'emikono omutwalo gumu obugazi; omwo mwe muliba Ekiggwa, ekifo ekitukuvu ennyo." 
Ezekiel45:4 Bwe buliba obutaka obutukuvu obwa bakabona, abo abaweereza mu Kitukuvu, abasembera okuweereza Omukama, kye kiriba ekifo ky'amayumba gaabwe era ekifo ekitukuvu eky'Ekitukuvu." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ettaka lya mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano mu buwanvu n'omutwalo gumu obugazi bwe buliba obutaka bw'Abaleevi abaweereza mu Kiggwa; era ng'ettaka lyabwe olw'ebibuga mwe banaasulanga. 
Ezekiel45:6 “ ‘Ekibuga munaakiwa ekibanja kyakyo kya mikono enkumi ttaano obugazi n'emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu; nga kisalagana n'ekitundu ekitukuvu; kiriba kya nnyumba yonna eya Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel45:7 “ ‘Omulangira wa kufuna ekibanja ekiri ku njuyi zombi ez'ekitundu ekitukuvu n'ekibanja ky'ekibuga, nga kisalagana n'ekitundu ekitukuvu era n'ekibanja ky'ekibuga. Kirigaziwanga kidda ebugwanjuba ku luuyi olw'ebugwanjuba, ate n'ebuvanjuba ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba, nga kigenda kikiiba ku nsalo z'ebitundu by'ebika ebugwanjuba n'ebuvanjuba." 
Ezekiel45:8 Ekibanja ekyo kye kiriba obutaka bwe mu Yisirayeli; abalangira bange tebaliddayo kunyigiriza bantu bange, wabula balireka ennyumba ya Yisirayeli abantu ne baba n'ettaka nga bagoberera ebika byabwe." 
Ezekiel45:9 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Abalangira ba Yisirayeli, ekyo kimala. Mulekere awo obukambwe n'okunyaga; mukole ebikolwa eby'obutuufu n'obutuukirivu, mulekere awo okwaya abantu bange, Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel45:10 Mweyambise ebipimo ebituufu; efa entuufu ne bati entuufu. 
Ezekiel45:11 Efa ne bati bya kubanga bya kipimo kimu, bati ng'eweramu ekyekkumi ekya komeri, n'efa ekyekkumi ekya komeri. Komeri kye kinaabanga ekipimo kwe bigererwa." 
Ezekiel45:12 Sekeli eneebeerangamu gera amakumi abiri; sekeli amakumi abiri ne sekeli abiri mu ttaano ne sekeli kkumi na ttaano byenkana mina emu. 
Ezekiel45:13 “ ‘Ebitambiro bye munaawerezanga binaabeeranga bwe biti: Ekyomukaaga ekya efa okuva ku buli komeri ya ŋŋano, n'ekyomukaaga eky'efa okuva ku buli komeri ya sayiri." 
Ezekiel45:14 N'omuzigo ogugerekeddwa omupimire mu bati gunaabanga kyakkumi kya bati okuva ku buli kori, kori emu ewezaamu bati kkumi oba komeri emu kubanga bati kkumi ze ziweza komeri emu." 
Ezekiel45:15 Era endiga emu ejja kuggyibwanga ku buli ggana ly'endiga ebikumi bibiri okuva mu malundiro ga Yisirayeli. Zino ze ziweerezebwa olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga, ekitambiro ekyokye n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu olw'okuddaabiriza olw'abantu, y'agamba Omukama Katonda." 
Ezekiel45:16 Abantu bonna mu ggwanga baneetabanga mu kuweereza ekitone ekyo olw'omulangira mu Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel45:17 Omulangira anaateekwanga okuleeta ebitone eby'ekitambiro ekyokye, n'ebitone eby'obuwunga, n'ebitone eby'okuyiwa, n'ebitambiro eby'okussa ekimu ku mbaga enkulu, ku lw'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ku Sabbaato ne ku mbaga enkulu zonna eziragiddwa ez'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli. Ajja kuleetanga ebitone olw'ekibi n'olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga n'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu olw'okuddaabiriza olw'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel45:18 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Mu mwezi ogusooka, ku lusooka omwezi, okwatanga ente ennume ento eteriiko kamogo n'otukuza Ekitukuvu." 
Ezekiel45:19 Kabona anaddiranga ku musaayi gw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'agussa ku myango gy'Ekiggwa ku nsonda ennya ez'oluzizi lw'Omwaliiro, ne ku myango gy'omulyango ogw'oluggya olw'omunda." 
Ezekiel45:20 Bw'otyo bw'onookolanga ne ku lunaku olwomusanvu olw'omwezi olw'okubeera buli yenna asobya mu kuwubwa oba mu butamanya; bwe mutyo ne muddaabirizanga olw'Ekiggwa. 
Ezekiel45:21 Mu mwezi ogusooka ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya ye Pasika yammwe. Embaga ya kumalanga ennaku musanvu, emigaati egitazimbulukuse gye ginaaliibwanga." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ku olwo omulangira anaaleetanga ente ennume olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi ku lulwe ne ku lw'abantu bonna mu ggwanga. 
Ezekiel45:23 Ate buli lunaku mu nnaku omusanvu ez'embaga anaaleetanga ente ennume musanvu n'endiga ennume musanvu ezitaliiko kamogo olw'ekitambiro ekyokye, ate n'embuzi ennume olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi buli lunaku." 
Ezekiel45:24 Ate olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga anaaleetanga efa ku buli nte nnume n'efa ku buli ndiga nnume, n'assaako ne yini y'omuzigo ku buli efa." 
Ezekiel45:25 “ ‘Ku mbaga ebeerawo mu mwezi ogwomusanvu ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano, anaakolanga kye kimu okumala ennaku musanvu, ng'aleeta ebitone olw'ekitambiro olw'ekibi n'olw'ekitambiro ekyokye n'ekitone eky'obuwunga, era n'omuzigo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel46:1 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Omulyango gw'oluggya olw'omunda ogutunudde ebuvanjuba, gunaabeeranga muggale ennaku omukaaga ez'okukola, naye ku lwa Sabbaato gunaggulibwangawo, era ne ku lunaku olw'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi gunaggulibwangawo." 
Ezekiel46:2 Omulangira anaayingiranga okuva ebweru ng'ayita mu kisasi ky'omulyango, n'ayimirira ku mwango gw'omulyango, bakabona ne baweereza ekitambiro kye ekyokye n'ekitambiro eky'okussa ekimu. Anaavunnamanga awo ku kifugi ky'omulyango, oluvannyuma n'afuluma; gwo omulyango teguggulibwenga okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Ezekiel46:3 Bo abantu b'omu nsi banaasinzizanga mu maaso g'Omukama awo ku muzigo gw'omulyango ku nnaku za Sabbaato ne ku lw'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi. 
Ezekiel46:4 Ebitone omulangira by'aleeta ew'Omukama ku lwa Sabbaato binaabeeranga obuliga mukaaga n'endiga ennume emu, byonna nga tebiriiko kamogo." 
Ezekiel46:5 Ekitone eky'obuwunga eky'okuleeteranga ku ndiga kinaabanga kya efa emu, ate ekitone eky'obuwunga ku buli kaliga kiryenkana nga bw'aliba asobodde, ssaako yini y'omuzigo ku buli efa." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ku lunaku olw'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi anaaleetanga ente ennume ento, obuliga mukaaga n'endiga ennume emu, zonna nga teziriiko kamogo." 
Ezekiel46:7 Anaaletanga olw'ekitone eky'obuwunga efa emu ku buli nte nnume, efa emu ku buli ndiga, ate ku buli kaliga anaaleetanga obuwunga obwenkana nga bw'aliba asobodde, ssaako ne yini y'omuzigo ku buli efa." 
Ezekiel46:8 “ ‘Omulangira bw'anaabanga ayingira, anaayitiranga mu kisasi ky'omulyango ogw'emiryango, era mw'anaafulumiranga." 
Ezekiel46:9 Ate abantu b'omu nsi bwe banajjanga mu maaso g'Omukama ku mbaga enkulu eziragiddwa, abayingirira mu mulyango gw'emambuka okusinza banaafulumiranga mu gw'emaserengeta, ate abayingirira mu gw'emaserengeta, banaafulumiranga mu gw'emambuka; tewaabenga addirayo mu mulyango mwe yayingiridde, wabula buli omu wa kufulumiranga mu mulyango ogumutunuddemu." 
Ezekiel46:10 Omulangira ajja kubanga mu bo, ng'ayingira nga bayingira, era ng'afuluma nga bafuluma." 
Ezekiel46:11 “ ‘Ku nnaku ez'embaga n'ezo enkulu eziragiddwa, ekitone eky'obuwunga kya kubanga ky'efa emu ku buli nte nte nnume, n'efa emu ku buli ndiga nnume, ate ku buli kaliga obuwunga bunaabanga ng'oli bw'aliba asobodde, ssaako yini y'omuzigo ku buli efa." 
Ezekiel46:12 Omulangira bw'anaaleetanga ekitone olw'ekitambiro ekyeyagalire eri Omukama, kibeere kitambiro ekyokye oba eky'okussa ekimu, omulyango ogutunudde ebuvanjuba gunaamuggulirwangawo. Aliweerezanga ekitambiro kye ekyokye oba eky'okussa ekimu nga bw'akola ku Sabbaato. Olwo n'afuluma, bw'alimalanga okufuluma, omulyango ne guggalibwa." 
Ezekiel46:13 “ ‘Buli lunaku ojja kuleetanga akaliga ka mwaka gumu, akataliiko bbala, olw'ekitambiro ekyokye eri Omukama. Ojja kukaleetanga ku makya buli lunaku." 
Ezekiel46:14 Ku makya buli lunaku ojja kukaleeterangako ekitone eky'obuwunga ekiweza ekyomukaaga kya efa nga kuliko n'ekyokusatu kya yini y'omuzigo okunnyuukiriza obuwunga, ng'ekitone eky'obuwunga eri Omukama. Lino tteeka lya lubeerera." 
Ezekiel46:15 Awo nno akaliga n'ebitone eby'obuwunga n'omuzigo bya kuleetebwanga ku makya buli lunaku olw'ekitambiro ekyokye eky'olubeerera. 
Ezekiel46:16 “ ‘Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: Omulangira bw'anaabangako ky'awadde omu ku baana be ku ebyo bye yasikira, kinaabanga kya baana be; kinaabanga kyabwe eky'obusika." 
Ezekiel46:17 Naye bw'anaabanga aliko ky'awadde omu ku baweereza be ku by'obusika bwe, kinaabanga ky'oyo okutuusa omwaka ogw'okuteebwa, olwo ne kiryoka kiddira omulangira; batabani be bokka be basobola okwesigaliza ku by'obusika bwe." 
Ezekiel46:18 Omulangira taatwalenga kantu ku busika bw'abantu, n'abagoba bw'atyo mu butaka bwabwe; wabula ku by'obusika bwe kw'anaawanga abaana be, wabulewo ku bantu bange aggyibwa mu butaka bwabwe.’ ”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Omusajja n'ampisa mu mulyango mu mbiriizi z'omulyango ogutwala mu bigango ebitukuvu ebya bakabona ebitunudde emambuka, eyo waaliyo ekifo eri ku nkingi ey'ebugwanjuba." 
Ezekiel46:20 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Kino kye kifo bakabona we banaafumbiranga ekitambiro olw'omusango n'ekitambiro olw'ekibi, n'okusiikira ebitone eby'obuwunga baleme kubireeta mu luggya lw'ebweru batukuze abantu.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Ate n'anfulumya n'antwala mu luggya olw'ebweru n'anneetoolooza ng'ampisa mu nsonda zonna ennya ez'oluggya; ku buli nsonda ne ndabayo oluggya. 
Ezekiel46:22 Mu nsonda ennya ez'oluggya waaliyo empya emikono amakumi ana obuwanvu, n'emikono amakumi asatu obugazi; empya zonna ku nsonda z'oluggya ennya zaali za bipimo bye bimu." 
Ezekiel46:23 Munda, ku njuyi zonna mu buli luggya mwalimu oluzizi olw'amayinja nga wansi walwo wazimbiddwayo amasiga okwetooloola." 
Ezekiel46:24 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Gano ge mafumbiro abo abaweereza b'omu Kiggwa ky'Omukama mwe banaafumbiranga ebitambiro by'abantu.” 
Ezekiel47:1 Omusajja n'ankomyawo ku mulyango gw'Ekiggwa, ne ndaba amazzi nga gava wansi w'omwango gw'Ekiggwa nga gadda ebuvanjuba kubanga Ekiggwa kyali kitunudde buvanjuba. Amazzi gaakulukutanga nga gava wansi w'oluuyi olw'emaserengeta olw'Ekiggwa ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta olw'omwaliiro." 
Ezekiel47:2 Ate n'anfulumya ng'ampisa mu mulyango ogw'emambuka, n'aneetoolooza ebweru okutuukira ddala ku mulyango ogw'ebweru ogutunudde ebuvanjuba; awo amazzi gaali gafulumira ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta." 
Ezekiel47:3 Omusajja n'agenda ebuvanjuba ng'akutte olukoba olupima mu ngalo ze, n'apimayo emikono lukumi, n'ansomosa amazzi; gaali gankoma mu bukongovvule." 
Ezekiel47:4 Ate n'apimayo emikono emirala lukumi, n'ansomosa amazzi; olwo gaali gakoma mu maviivi. Ate n'apimayo emikono emirala lukumi, n'ansomosa amazzi; olwo nga gakoma mu kiwato." 
Ezekiel47:5 Ate n'apimayo emirala lukumi; kati gaali gafuuse mugga gwe saasobola kusomoka, kubanga amazzi gaali geetuumye nga ga kuwuga buwuzi, omugga oli gw'atayinza kusomoka." 
Ezekiel47:6 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Okirabye kino, mwana w'omuntu?” Ate n'anzizaayo ku lubalama lw'omugga." 
Ezekiel47:7 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba emiti emingi ennyo wonna mu lubalama lw'omugga." 
Ezekiel47:8 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Amazzi gano gakulukuta nga galaga mu nsi y'ebuvanjuba ne gakkirira mu Araba, eyo gye gayiira mu nnyanja; bwe gayiwa mu nnyanja, amazzi gaayo ne galongooka." 
Ezekiel47:9 Yonna omugga gye gugenda ebiramu byonna ebibunyemu biriba biramu. Ebyennyanja biriba bingi nnyo, kubanga amazzi gano bwe gakulukutirayo, amazzi ag'omunnyo galongooka; awo nno omugga gye gukulukutira buli kintu kiriba kiramu." 
Ezekiel47:10 Abavubi baliyimiriranga ku lubalama; okuva e Engedi okutuuka e Eni-Egulayimu waliba ekifo aw'okwanika obutimba. Ebika by'ebyennyanja biriba kye kimu n'eby'omu Nnyanja Ennene, biriba bingi nnyo." 
Ezekiel47:11 Naye ebidiba byayo n'entobazzi tebirirongooka, birisigala bya munnyo." 
Ezekiel47:12 Buli kika kya muti gwa bibala gulimera ku mbalama zombi ez'omugga. Ebikoola byagyo tebiriwotoka, n'ebibala byagyo tebiggwengako; buli mwezi gijja kubalanga kubanga amazzi gaagyo gakulukuta nga gava mu Kitukuvu. Ebibala byagwo biriba mmere n'ebikoola byagwo biriba ddagala.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “Zino ze nsalo ze munaagoberera okugabanyaamu ensi okuwa obusika ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri ebya Yisirayeli; ye Yozefu anaafuna ebitundu bibiri. 
Ezekiel47:14 Mujja kugibagabanyizaamu kyenkanyi. Nalayira okugiwa bajjajjammwe, ensi eno ejja kubeera busika bwammwe." 
Ezekiel47:15 Zino ze nsalo zaayo: “Ku ludda olw'emambuka ensalo zijja kuva ku Nnyanja Ennene ziyitire ku kkubo ly'e Ketuloni ziyite e Lebo-Kamati zidde e Zedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 Berota, Siburayimu ekiri wakati wa Damasiko ne Kamati, okutuukira ddala ku Kazeri-Attikoni ekiriraanye ensalo ya Kawurani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Ensalo ziriva ku nnyanja okutuuka ku Kazari-Enani ekiri ku nsalo za Damasiko ez'emambuka ng'ensalo za Kamati ziri emambuka. Ezo ze nsalo ez'emambuka. 
Ezekiel47:18 “Oludda olw'ebuvanjuba ensalo zigobera wakati wa Kawurani ne Damasiko, ne zigoba Yorudani mu makkati ga Gileyaadi n'ensi ya Yisirayeli, ne zituuka ku nnyanja ey'ebuvanjuba okutuukira ddala e Tamari; ezo ze nsalo ez'ebuvanjuba." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Oludda olw'emaserengeta zirigenda okuva e Tamari okutuuka ku mazzi g'e Meriba-Kadesi, olwo ne zikoota Ekiwonvu Misiri okutuuka ku Nnyanja Ennene; ezo ze nsalo ez'emaserengeta." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Ate ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba Ennyanja Ennene y'eriba ensalo okutuuka mu kafo akatunudde mu Lebo-Kamati. Ezo ze nsalo ez'ebuvanjuba. 
Ezekiel47:21 “Ensi eyo mugigabane ng'ebika bya Yisirayeli bwe biri. 
Ezekiel47:22 Mugigabanyeemu ng'obusika bwammwe n'obw'abagwira abasenze mu mmwe, abazadde n'abaana. Mubabalanga nga bannansi mu Yisirayeli; banaagabananga wamu nammwe ku busika mu Bayisirayeli." 
Ezekiel47:23 Mu kika yonna omugwira gy'aliba asenze, eyo gye mumuweeranga obusika bwe, Omukama Katonda y'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel48:1 “Gano ge mannya g'ebika: “Ku nsalo emambuka ku kkubo ly'e Ketuloni okutuuka e Lebo-Kamati ne Kazari-Enani ku nsalo za Damasiko emambuka okuliraana Kamati, okuva ku nkingi ey'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku y'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kimu, ye Daani." 
Ezekiel48:2 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Daani, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kimu, ye Aseeri." 
Ezekiel48:3 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Aseeri, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kimu, ye Nafutali." 
Ezekiel48:4 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Nafutali, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kimu, ye Manasse." 
Ezekiel48:5 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Manasse, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kimu, ye Efurayimu." 
Ezekiel48:6 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Efurayimu, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kimu, ye Rubeni." 
Ezekiel48:7 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Rubeni, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kimu, ye Yuda." 
Ezekiel48:8 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Yuda, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba, kye kitundu kye mulyawulako, nga kya mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano mu bugazi, ate mu buwanvu okuva ebuvanjuba okutuuka ebugwanjuba nga kyenkana buli kimu ku bitundu by'ebika; Ekitukuvu kiriba mu kyo wakati." 
Ezekiel48:9 “Ekitundu kye mulyawulirako Omukama kiriba kya mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu, ate obugazi omutwalo gumu." 
Ezekiel48:10 Kino kye kiriba ekitundu ekitukuvu, ekya bakabona: ku luuyi olw'emambuka kiriba kya mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu, ate ku luuyi olw'ebugwanjuba kiriba kya mikono omutwalo gumu obugazi; ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba emikono omutwalo gumu obugazi; ate ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta, emikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu; mu kyo wakati we waliba Ekitukuvu ky'Omukama." 
Ezekiel48:11 Kiriba kya bakabona abasiige, bazzukulu ba Zadoki abampeereza n'obwesigwa, abatanjabulira ng'Abaleevi bwe bannesuuba luli Abayisirayeli lwe banjawukanako." 
Ezekiel48:12 Kiriba kitundu kyabwe ekivudde ku kitundu ekisinga obutukuvu eky'ensi nga kisalagana n'ekitundu ky'Abaleevi. 
Ezekiel48:13 “N'Abaleevi baliweebwa ekitundu ekisalagana n'obutaka bwa bakabona, nga kya mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu, ate obugazi omutwalo gumu. Obuwanvu bwonna awamu buliba emikono ebiri n'ekitundu, n'obugazi emikono omutwalo gumu." 
Ezekiel48:14 Tebakitundangako yadde okukiwaanyisamu; lino lye ttaka erisinga obulungi era si lya kuweebwa mulala, kubanga ttukuvu eri Omukama." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Ekitundu ekisigadde eky'emikono enkumi ttaano obugazi n'emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano obuwanvu, kiriba kya kweyambisibwa kibuga mu ngeri eya bulijjo, ne ku lw'okusengamu n'olw'amalundiro. Ekibuga kiribeera mu kyo wakati;" 
Ezekiel48:16 Era bino bye bipimo byakyo: ku luuyi olw'emambuka, emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano; ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba, emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano; ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta, emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano, ne ku luuyi olw'ebugwanjuba emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano." 
Ezekiel48:17 Amalundiro g'ekibuga ga kubeera n'emikono, emambuka ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, emaserengeta ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, ebuvanjuba ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, n'ebugwanjuba ebikumi bibiri mu ataano." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ekitundu ekiriba kisigaddewo, ekisalagana n'obutaka obutukuvu, nga kigenda kisalagana nakyo, kiriba kya mikono omutwalo gumu ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba n'omutwalo ku luuyi olw'ebugwanjuba. Ebirimibwamu bye birisakirira abatuuze b'omu kibuga emmere." 
Ezekiel48:19 Abakozi b'omu kibuga, abaggyibwa mu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli, be balikirimanga." 
Ezekiel48:20 Ekitundu kyonna kye mwawulangako kya kubeera n'enjuyi ezenkanankana: emikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano ku buli luuyi. Kye ky'okubaamu ekitundu ekitukuvu n'ekibanja ky'ekibuga. 
Ezekiel48:21 “Ekiriba kifisseewo ku njuyi zombi olw'ekitundu ekitukuvu n'olw'ekibanja ky'ekibuga, kiriba kya mulangira. Kirigenda ebuvanjuba ku mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano egy'ekitundu ekitukuvu ne kikwata ku nsalo ez'ebuvanjuba; ate ne kigenda ebugwanjuba okuva ku mikono emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano okutuuka ku nsalo ey'ebugwanjuba. Ebitundu bino byombi birigenda bisalagana n'ebitundu by'ebika; biriba bya mulangira; ate byo, ekitundu ekitukuvu n'Ekiggwa, biriba mu kyo wakati." 
Ezekiel48:22 Awo nno obutaka bw'Abaleevi n'ettaka ly'ekibuga biriba mu makkati g'ekitundu ky'omulangira. Ekitundu ky'omulangira kiriba mu makkati g'ensalo ya Yuda n'eya Benyamiini. 
Ezekiel48:23 “Ebika ebirala: Okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba kye kitundu kimu, ye Benyamiini." 
Ezekiel48:24 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Benyamiini, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba kye kitundu kimu, ye Simewoni." 
Ezekiel48:25 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Simewoni, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba kye kitundu kimu, ye Yissakari." 
Ezekiel48:26 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Yissakari, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba kye kitundu kimu, ye Zebuluni." 
Ezekiel48:27 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Zebuluni, okuva ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba okutuuka ku lw'ebugwanjuba kye kitundu kimu, ye Gaadi." 
Ezekiel48:28 “Okusalagana n'ekitundu kya Gaadi, ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta, ensalo zirigenda okuva e Tamari okutuuka ku mazzi ge Meriba-Kadesi n'okukoota Ekiwonvu Misiri okutuukira ddala ku Nnyanja Ennene." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Eyo ye nsi gye munaagabira ebika bya Yisirayeli ng'obusika, era ebyo bye binaaba ebitundu byabwe,” Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Gino gye miryango gy'ekibuga egifuluma: ku luuyi olw'emambuka, oluweza emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano obuwanvu," 
Ezekiel48:31 emiryango gy'ekibuga girituumibwa amannya g'ebika bya Yisirayeli, kuliko emiryango esatu: omulyango gwa Rubeni, omulyango gwa Yuda n'omulyango gwa Leevi." 
Ezekiel48:32 Ku luuyi olw'ebuvanjuba, oluweza emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano obuwanvu, kuliko emiryango esatu: omulyango gwa Yozefu, omulyango gwa Benyamiini n'omulyango gwa Daani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Ku luuyi olw'emaserengeta, oluweza emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano obuwanvu, kuliko emiryango esatu: omulyango gwa Simewoni, omulyango gwa Yissakari n'omulyango gwa Zebuluni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Ate ku luuyi olw'ebugwanjuba oluweza emikono enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bitaano obuwanvu kuliko emiryango esatu: omulyango gwa Gaadi, omulyango gwa Aseeri n'omulyango gwa Nafutali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Obwetooloovu bwonna buliba bwa mikono omutwalo gumu mu kanaana. “Erinnya ly'ekibuga okuva ku olwo liriba 'Omukama Ali Eyo'.” 
Hosea1:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Ozeya mutabani wa Beeri mu mirembe gya Wuzziya, Yotamu, Akazi ne Kezekiya bakabaka ba Yuda, ne mu mirembe gya Yerobowamu mutabani wa Yowasi kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
Hosea1:2 Omukama bwe yasooka okwogera ne Ozeya, yamugamba nti: “Genda, owase omukazi malaaya, azaale n'abaana mu bwamalaaya, kubanga ensi ekoze obwamalaaya bw'etebadde neesigwa eri Omukama.”" 
Hosea1:3 N'agenda n'awasa Gomeri muwala wa Dibulayimu, n'aba olubuto n'amuzaalira omwana mulenzi." 
Hosea1:4 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Mutuume erinnya lye Yezureeli, kubanga wanaayita akabanga katono ne mbonereza ennyumba ya Yewu olw'okusanjaga okwali e Yezureeli, nkomye n'obwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli." 
Hosea1:5 Ate mu lunaku olwo ndimenya omutego gwa Yisirayeli ogw'akasaale mu kiwonvu kya Yezureeli.” 
Hosea1:6 Gomeri yaddamu n'aba olubuto, n'azaala omwana muwala; Omukama n'agamba Ozeya nti: “Mutuume erinnya lye Lo-Rukama kubanga sikyaddayo kusaasira nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, mbu mbaddiremu." 
Hosea1:7 Naye ndiraga ekisa ennyumba ya Yuda; ndibalokola, naye si na musaale, oba na kitala, oba na lutalo, oba na mbalaasi yadde beebagazi, wabula na Mukama Katonda waabwe.”" 
Hosea1:8 Bwe yaggya Lo-Rukama ku mabeere, era n'aba olubuto, n'azaala omwana mulenzi." 
Hosea1:9 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Mutuume erinnya lye Lo-Ammi, kubanga mmwe temuli bantu bange, nange mundaba ng'atali wammwe." 
Hosea2:1 “Kyokka abantu ba Yisirayeli mu bungi baliba ng'omusenyu gw'ennyanja, ogutalina kipimo, ogutagenda kubalibwa. Mu kifo we baagambirwanga nti: ‘Temuli bantu bange’, we balibagambira nti: ‘Baana ba Katonda omulamu.’" 
Hosea2:2 Abantu ba Yuda n'abantu ba Yisirayeli baliddamu okwegatta; balyessizaawo omukulembeze omu, ne bava mu nsi eyo, kubanga olunaku lwa Yezureeli luliba lukulu." 
Hosea2:3 “Mugambe baganda bammwe nti: ‘Bantu bange’, ne bannyinammwe nti: ‘Asaasiddwa’." 
Hosea2:4 “Muvunaane nnyammwe, mumuvunaane, kubanga ye si mukazi wange, nange siri bba; aggye entunula ye ey'obwamalaaya ku maaso ge, n'obutambuze abuggye mu makkati g'amabeere ge." 
Hosea2:5 Sikulwa nga mmwambula ne mmuleka bwereere nga bwe yazaalibwa; ndimufuula ng'eddungu, ndimufuula ng'ensi enkalu, ndimussa ennyonta." 
Hosea2:6 N'abaana be sijja kubasaasira, kubanga baana ba bwamalaaya." 
Hosea2:7 Kuba nnyabwe yakola obwamalaaya, oyo eyabafuna mu lubuto yakola kya nsonyi. Yagamba nti: ‘Nzija kugenda eri baganzi bange, abampa kye endya ne kye nnywa, ebyoya byange eby'endiga n'engoye eza kitaani, omuzigo gwange n'ekyokunywa kyange.’" 
Hosea2:8 Kale nno ekkubo lye nzija kulisuulamu emisanvu egy'amaggwa, nzija kumwetoolooza olukomera abulweko w'ayita." 
Hosea2:9 Aliwondera baganzi be, naye tagenda kubatuuka; alibanoonya, naye talibazuula; awo aligamba nti: ‘Ka nzireyo eri musajja wange eyasooka, kubanga olwo nali bulungi okusinga bwe ndi kati.’" 
Hosea2:10 Teyamanya nti nze namuwanga eŋŋano, evviini n'omuzigo; eyamugabuliranga ffeeza ne zaabu, gwe baamalira ku Baali." 
Hosea2:11 “Awo nno nzija kwedddiza eŋŋano yange ng'etuuse, n'evviini ensu obudde bwayo nga butuuse; nzija kuggyayo ebyoya by'endiga n'engoye za kitaani ebyange, ebibadde bibikka ku bwereere bwe." 
Hosea2:12 Nzija kwanika obugwagwa bwe mu maaso ga baganzi be; tewali alimunzigya mu mikono gyange. 
Hosea2:13 Nzija kukomya okujaguza kwe: okw'embaga enkulu, Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, Sabbaato n'embaga ze enkulu eziragiddwa." 
Hosea2:14 Nzija kwonoona emizabbibu gye n'emikunyu gye, egyo gye yayogerako nti ‘Eno ye mpeera yange gye bampa’; nzija kubizisa bifuuke nsiko, ensolo z'ettale zibirye." 
Hosea2:15 Nzija kumubonereza nga mmulanga ennaku za Baali, lwe yanyookezanga obubaani, ne yeewoomya n'empeta n'amagemo, olwo n'awondera baganzi be, nze ng'anneerabidde,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Hosea2:16 “N'olw'ekyo, nzija kumuseemyaseemya, mmutwale mu ddungu, njogere eri omutima gwe." 
Hosea2:17 Eyo gye nzija okumuweera emizabbibu gye, n'ekiwonvu kye Akori ndikifuula mulyango ogw'essuubi; eyo gy'alyanukulira nga bwe yayanukulanga mu buvubuka, na luli lwe yava mu Misiri." 
Hosea2:18 Ku olwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “olimpita nti: ‘Baze.’ Toliddamu kumpita nti: ‘Baali wange.’" 
Hosea2:19 Amannya ga Babaali nzija kugaggya ku mumwa gwe; era amannya gaabwe tegaliddamu kukoowoolwa nate. 
Hosea2:20 Ku olwo ndikuba endagaano ku lwabwe n'ebisolo by'omu nsiko, n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga n'ebyewalula eby'oku ttaka; omutego gw'akasaale, ekitala n'olutalo ndibimala mu nsi; ndibawa ne batuula ntende." 
Hosea2:21 Nzija kukwogereza obeere wange emirembe gyonna; nzija kukwogereza mu butuukirivu ne mu bulungi, mu kisa era mu kusaasira." 
Hosea2:22 Nzija kukwogereza mu bwesigwa, olimanya Omukama." 
Hosea2:23 “Ku olwo, ndyanukula eggulu,” Omukama y'agamba, “nalyo ne lyanukula ensi;" 
Hosea2:24 n'ensi eryanukula eŋŋano, evviini ensu n'omuzigo, nabyo biryanukula Yezureeli." 
Hosea2:25 Nzija kumwesimbira mu nsi; ŋŋenda kumusaasira oyo gwe natuuma Lo-Rukama; Lo-Ammi ŋŋenda kumutuuma 'Muli bantu bange', naye aliŋŋamba nti 'Oli Katonda wange'.”" 
Hosea3:1 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ddamu oyagale mukazi wo, newandibadde ng'ayagalibwa muganzi we era nga mukazi mwenzi. Mwagale ng'Omukama bw'ayagala Abayisirayeli, newandibadde nga baakyukira eri balubaale, ne baagala ebitole by'emizabbibu emiwotose.”" 
Hosea3:2 Namugula sekeri za ffeeza kkumi na ttaano, ne komeri ne leteki ya sayiri." 
Hosea3:3 Ne mmugamba nti: “Ojja kubeera nange ennaku nnyingi; tokolanga obwamalaaya, tobeeranga na musajja mulala, nange nzija kubeera naawe.”" 
Hosea3:4 Kubanga Abayisirayeli balimala ennaku nnyingi nga tebalina kabaka oba omufuzi yenna, nga tebalina kitambiro, oba ejjinja ettukuvu, oba efodi oba bulubaale obw'awaka." 
Hosea3:5 Oluvannyuma Abayisirayeli balidda ne banoonya Omukama Katonda waabwe, ne Dawudi kabaka waabwe. Balijja nga bakankana eri Omukama n'eri ebirungi bye mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma." 
Hosea4:1 Ayi bantu ba Yisirayeli, muwulire ekigambo ky'Omukama, kubanga Omukama abavunaana, mmwe abasula mu nsi; tekyali bwesigwa, teri kisa, mu nsi temukyali na kumanya Katonda;" 
Hosea4:2 mujjuddemu kuvumirira, bulimba na butemu, bubbi na bwamalaaya, n'okuyiwa omusaayi okw'omudiriŋŋanwa." 
Hosea4:3 Olw'okubeera ebyo ensi ewooba, n'abagirimu kwe kuyongobera; ebisolo eby'ettale, ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga, ssaako ebyennyanja, byonna bifa." 
Hosea4:4 “Kyokka tewabaawo muntu avunaana, tewabaawo muntu awaaba; wabula, mmwe bakabona, nze mmwe nvunaana." 
Hosea4:5 Osirittuka emisana ttuku, n'abalanzi balisirittuka naawe ekiro, ne nnyoko nzija kumuzikiriza." 
Hosea4:6 Abantu bange bazikirira kubanga tebamanyi; kubanga weesammula okumanya, nange nzija kubeemansula nga bakabona bange; kubanga weerabidde etteeka lya Katonda wo, nange nzija kwerabira abaana bo." 
Hosea4:7 Gye bakomya okweyongera, gye bakomya okusobya gye ndi; ekitiibwa kyabwe nzija kukifuula ensonyi." 
Hosea4:8 Balya ku bibi by'abantu bange, basanyukira mu byonoono byabwe." 
Hosea4:9 Bakabona nga bwe baliba, n'abantu bwe baliba; nzija kubabonereza olw'amakubo gaabwe, mbawe ekigya mu bikolwa byabwe." 
Hosea4:10 Balirya naye tebalikkuta; balikola obwamalaaya naye tebagenda kwala, kubanga baava ku Mukama, ne beewaayo mu" 
Hosea4:11 bwamalaaya, n'eri evviini enkulu n'ensu ebimalamu okutegeera." 
Hosea4:12 “Abantu bange beebuuza ku balubaale ab'ebiti, era ne baanukulwa ekiti mwe baakolebwa, kubanga omwoyo omwenzi gubawubisizza; ne basuula eri Katonda waabwe okudda mu bwamalaaya." 
Hosea4:13 Batambirira ku ntikko z'ensozi, ne bookera obubaani ku busozi, wansi w'emivule, enzibaziba n'emyeramannyo awali ekisiikirize ekirungi. Bwe batyo bawala bammwe bwe bakola obwamalaaya, ne bakaabaana bammwe bwe bakola obwenzi." 
Hosea4:14 Naye sijja kubonereza bawala bammwe nga bakoze obwamalaaya, ne bakaabaana bammwe nga bakoze obwenzi, kubanga abasajja bennyini beeseebulula ne bamalaaya, ne batambira wamu ne bamalaaya b'omu biggwa; abantu abatategeera ba kuzikirira." 
Hosea4:15 “Oba ggwe, Yisirayeli, okoze obwamalaaya, ka Yuda ye aleme kubeera na musango. Temugenda Gilugali, Temwambuka Beti-Aveni; tolayira nti ‘Mazima Omukama nga mulamu,’" 
Hosea4:16 Ng'ennyana ey'emputtu, ne Yisirayeli bw'akola emputtu, Omukama anaabalunda atya ng'endiga mu malundiro amagazi?" 
Hosea4:17 Efurayimu asibye ekinywi n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale; muleke ggwe! 
Hosea4:18 Ekinyumu kyabwe eky'okunywa ne bwe kiggwa, bongera bwamalaaya bwabwe mu maaso; ddala abafuzi baabwe basanyukira eby'obugwenyufu." 
Hosea4:19 Empewo eribakunguzza n'ebiwaawaatiro byayo, n'ebitambiro byabwe biribaleetera nsonyi nsa." 
Hosea5:1 “Bakabona, muwulire kino! Mmwe ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, mutegereze! Nammwe ennyumba ya Kabaka, muwulirize! Kino nkivunaana mmwe: E Mizupa mwafuuka kitimba, n'olutuula olwanjuluziddwa ku Tabori." 
Hosea5:2 Basimye obunnya obuwanvu e Sittimu, bonna nzija kubabonereza." 
Hosea5:3 Nze Efurayimu mmumanyi, ne Yisirayeli tankwekeddwa; Efurayimu, okoze obwamalaaya; Yisirayeli yeegwagwawazza." 
Hosea5:4 Ebikolwa byabwe tebibaganya kudda eri Katonda waabwe; omwoyo omwenzi guli mu mitima gyabwe, n'Omukama tebamumanyi." 
Hosea5:5 Okwekuza kwa Yisirayeli kumulumiriza; Yisirayeli ne Efurayimu balisirittuka mu bibi byabwe, ne Yuda alisirittuka wamu nabo." 
Hosea5:6 Bwe baligenda okunoonya Omukama n'amagana gaabwe, tebalimuzuula, aliba abeetegudde." 
Hosea5:7 Tebaali beesigwa eri Omukama, kubanga baazaala abaana ab'ensonga; kale nno embaga zaabwe ez'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi zijja kubakavvula ko n'ennimiro zaabwe." 
Hosea5:8 “Mufuuwe eŋŋombe mu Gibewa n'ekkondeere mu Rama, Mukube enduulu mu Beti-Aveni, mutiisetiise Benyamiini." 
Hosea5:9 Ku lunaku olw'ekibonerezo Efurayimu alisigala matongo, mu bika bya Yisirayeli nnangirira ekikakafu." 
Hosea5:10 Abakungu ba Yuda bali ng'abo abajjulula ensalo z'ettaka; nzija kubamalirako obusungu bwange ng'omujjuzo gw'amazzi. 
Hosea5:11 Efurayimu anyigiriziddwa, abetenteddwa n'ekibonerezo, kubanga yasiima okugoberera obulimba." 
Hosea5:12 Efurayimu mmufaananira ng'ennyenje, ennyumba ya Yuda ngifaananira ng'ekintu ekivundu." 
Hosea5:13 “Efurayimu bwe yalaba obulwadde bwe, ne Yuda ebbwa lye, Efurayimu n'addukira e Assuri, n'atumira kabaka omukulu; naye nno n'oyo talisobola kubawonya, talisobola kubaggyako bbwa." 
Hosea5:14 Kubanga Efurayimu ndimubeerera ng'empologoma, Yuda, ng'omwana gw'empologoma. Nzija kutaagulataagula neetambulire; nzija kukwakkula ntwale, ate tewaliba awonya." 
Hosea5:15 “Nzija kweddirayo mu kifo kyange okutuusa lwe balikkiriza omusango gwabwe, ne banoonya amaaso gange; mu buyinike bwabwe balinnoonya buteddiza.”" 
Hosea6:1 “Mujje tudde eri Omukama, ye yatuyuzaayuza era y'anaatuwonya; yatulumya, era y'anaatusiba ebiwundu byaffe." 
Hosea6:2 Mu nnaku bbiri ajja kutuzzaamu obulamu; ku lunaku olwokusatu alitusitula tubeerewo mu maaso ge. 
Hosea6:3 Tumanye, tunyiikirire okumanya Omukama; ng'okusala kwa mmambya bwe kutalimba, n'okujja kwe kituufu bwe kuliba; alijja gye tuli ng'enkuba, ng'enkuba ya Ttoggo efukirira ensi.”" 
Hosea6:4 “Nkukolere ki, Efurayimu? Nkukolere ki Yuda? Okwagala kwammwe kuli ng'olufu lw'oku makya, oba ng'omusulo ogukeera okuggwaawo." 
Hosea6:5 Kyennava mbatemaatema obulere nga mpita mu balanzi, ne mbatta n'ebigambo by'akamwa kange, anti ennamula yange yavaayo ng'ekimyanso." 
Hosea6:6 Kubanga njagala kisa sso si kitambiro, kumanya Katonda, naye si bitambiro byokye." 
Hosea6:7 Baamenya endagaano e Adamu, eyo gye baamenyera obwesigwa gye ndi." 
Hosea6:8 “Gileyaadi kibuga ky'abakola obubi, kirinnyiriddwa n'omusaayi." 
Hosea6:9 Ng'abatemu abateegeredde omuntu, n'ekikwanga kya bakabona bwe kiri, batemula abantu ku kkubo eriraga e Sekemu; nga bakola ekintu kya bugwenyufu!" 
Hosea6:10 Mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli nalabamu ekyesisiwaza: eyo Efurayimu yessa mu bwamalaaya, ne Yisirayeli yeegwagwawazza." 
Hosea6:11 Naye naawe Yuda, amakungula gakutegekerwa, bwe ndimala okuzza abasibe b'abantu bange.”" 
Hosea7:1 Buli lwe mponya Yisirayeli, ebibi bya Efurayimu bye byeyoleka, n'ekyejo kya Samariya nga kirabika. Bali mu kulimba, ababbi bamenya amayumba, n'ebweru abanyazi babba." 
Hosea7:2 Naye tebalikirowoozaako nti nzijukira ebibi byabwe byonna. Ebyonoono byabwe bibeebunguludde, bulijjo biri mu maaso gange." 
Hosea7:3 Baasanyusa kabaka n'obugwagwa bwabwe, n'abakungu baabwe ne babasanyusa n'obulimba bwabwe." 
Hosea7:4 Bonna bali mu bwenzi, bali ng'akabiga akakume omuliro, omukuumi w'omuliro k'ateetaaga na kuseesamu okuva lw'agoya obutta okutuusa lwe buzimba." 
Hosea7:5 Ku lunaku lw'ekijaguzo kya kabaka waffe, abakungu bacamulwa omwenge, n'akwatagana n'abanyoomi emikono." 
Hosea7:6 Emitima gyabwe giri ng'akabiga nga bakola enkwe; Obusungu bwabwe bunyooka ekiro kyonna, ku makya ne bubuubuuka ng'ennimi z'omuliro." 
Hosea7:7 Bonna bookya ng'akabiga, bakavvula bakabaka baabwe; bonna bakabaka baabwe baagwa, mu bo temuli akoowoola gye ndi." 
Hosea7:8 “Efurayimu yeetabika mu b'amawanga; Efurayimu mugaati muvumbike ogutakyusibwa. 
Hosea7:9 Abagwira banyuunyunta amaanyi ge, naye ye tamanyi; envi zibamezeemezeeko, naye tamanyi." 
Hosea7:10 Okwekuza kwa Yisirayeli kumulumiriza, naye tebadda eri Mukama Katonda waabwe, tebamunoonya olwa bino byonna." 
Hosea7:11 Efurayimu ali ng'eggiba ebbuyabuya, eritategeera; olumu bakoowoola Misiri, olulala bakyukira eri Assuri." 
Hosea7:12 Bwe baligenda, ŋŋenda kubakasukirako ekitimba kyange; ndibawanulayo ng'ekinyonyi ky'omu bbanga, ndibavunaana olw'obwonoonefu bwabwe." 
Hosea7:13 “Zibasanze, kubanga banvaako! Bazikirire, kubanga banjeemera. Nandibanunudde, naye bo bannimba bulimbi." 
Hosea7:14 Tebandaajanira nga kibava ku mitima, wabula bawolomera mu bitanda byabwe, beesalaasala olw'eŋŋano n'evviini ensu, naye ku nze bakyukira eri." 
Hosea7:15 Nabagunjula, ne ŋŋumya emikono gyabwe, naye nze bandowooleza bibi." 
Hosea7:16 Tebakyukira eri Ali Waggulu Ddala; bali ng'omutego gw'akasaale omukyamu; abakugu baabwe balifa kitala, olw'olwetumbu lw'olulimi lwabwe; kino kiribasekereza mu Misiri.”" 
Hosea8:1 “Muteeke eŋŋombe ku mimwa. Anti empungu eri waggulu ku nnyumba y'Omukama, kubanga abantu bajeemedde endagaano yange; bamenye etteeka lyange." 
Hosea8:2 Bandaajanira nti: ‘Ayi Katonda waffe, ffe Yisirayeli tukumanyi!’" 
Hosea8:3 “Naye Yisirayeli yakasuka eri ekirungi; omulabe agenda kumuwondera. 
Hosea8:4 Bassaawo bakabaka nga tekivudde mu nze; balonda abaami nga simanyi; mu ffeeza waabwe ne zaabu bakolamu bifaananyi bya balubaale, ekinaabaleetera okuzikirira." 
Hosea8:5 Mwattu Samariya, akayana ko kakasuke eri; obusungu bwange bubeesererako. Banaatuusa wa okwejaajaamya?" 
Hosea8:6 Kubanga kaava mu Yisirayeli. Mubazzi bubazzi ye yakakola, sso si Katonda; akayana ka Samariya ka kumenyebwamenyebwa." 
Hosea8:7 Kubanga baasiga mpewo, balikungula muyaga; ku kati tekuli kirimba, tekuliva buwunga; kaba kuteekako ŋŋano, abagwira bandigimize." 
Hosea8:8 “Yisirayeli bamumize, kati ali mu mawanga ng'ekintu omutali nsa." 
Hosea8:9 Kubanga bambuse mu Assuri, bali ng'endogoyi ey'ettale eri yokka; ye Efurayimu yeetunze mu baganzi be." 
Hosea8:10 Ne bwe baneetunda mu mawanga, nzija kubakuŋŋaanya; bajja kukogga olw'omugugu gwa kabaka omukulu." 
Hosea8:11 Efurayimu ne bw'ayongedde obungi emyaliiro olw'ebibi bye, naye emyaliiro gyennyini gifuuse kyonoono." 
Hosea8:12 Ne bwe nandimuwandiikidde amateeka gange ne genkana wa obungi, yandigatunuulidde ng'ekintu ekigwira." 
Hosea8:13 Bantambirira ebitambiro, ennyama ne bagirya, naye Omukama tabasanyukira. Kati ajja kujjukira ebyonoono byabwe: bagenda kuddayo mu Misiri." 
Hosea8:14 Yisirayeli yeerabidde Eyamukola, n'azimba embiri; ye Yuda ayongera bungi bwa bibuga okuli ebigo. Naye nzija kuteekera ebibuga bye omuliro, ogulisenkenya ebigo bye.”" 
Hosea9:1 Yisirayeli, tosanyuka; tosagambiza nga mawanga malala, kubanga olese awo Katonda wo n'okola obwamalaaya; osiimye empeera y'obwamalaaya ku buli gguuliro lya ŋŋano." 
Hosea9:2 Egguuliro n'essogolero tebijja kuliisa bantu, n'evviini ensu teribaganyula." 
Hosea9:3 Tebalisigala mu nsi ya Mukama, Efurayimu aliddayo mu Misiri ne balya ennyama eteri nnongoofu mu Assuri." 
Hosea9:4 Tebaliyiira Mukama kitambiro kya vviini, n'ebitambiro byabwe tebirimusanyusa; biribafuukira ng'emmere y'abakungubaga, bonna abagirya balyejaajaamya; emmere eyo erikoma ku bo bokka, teriyingira mu nnyumba ya Mukama." 
Hosea9:5 Ku lunaku lw'embaga eziragiddwa mulikola ki, ku lunaku olw'embaga y'Omukama?" 
Hosea9:6 Baabo badduka okuzikirira, Misiri eribakuŋŋaanya, Memfi n'abaziika; kamyu alyefuga eby'obugagga byabwe ebya ffeeza n'amatovu galimera mu weema zaabwe." 
Hosea9:7 Ennaku ez'okubonereza zituuse; ennaku ez'okuwa empeera zisembedde; Yisirayeli ategeere. Omulanzi ayitibwa musiru, abuulirwa Mwoyo atwalibwa ng'omulalu, kubanga ebyonoono byammwe bingi, n'obukyayi bwammwe buyitiridde." 
Hosea9:8 Omulanzi ye kalabaalaba wa Efurayimu, abantu ba Katonda wange, naye ebitimba bimulindiridde mu makubo ge gonna, n'obulabe mu nnyumba y'Omukama mwennyini." 
Hosea9:9 Boonoonese kutuusa wala, nga mu budde bwa Gibewa; Katonda alijjukira obugwenyufu bwabwe n'ababonereza olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Hosea9:10 Lwe nasanga Yisirayeli, kwali ng'okusanga emizabbibu mu ddungu; lwe nalaba bajjajjammwe, kwali ng'okulaba entontogolo z'omukunyu ezisooka; naye bwe bajja ewa Baali ku Pewori, beewonga eri eky'obuswavu, ne bafuuka kyenyinyalwa nga kiri kye baayagala." 
Hosea9:11 Ekitiibwa kya Efurayimu kibuuka ne kigenda ng'ekinyonyi, teriba kuzaalibwa, oba okuba olubuto yadde okulufuna." 
Hosea9:12 Ne bwe balikuza abaana baabwe, bonna ndibabamalako; Ziribasanga nga mbavuddeko!" 
Hosea9:13 Efurayimu yanfaananira nga Tiiro, ekisimbiddwa mu kalimiro, naye Efurayimu alireeta abaana be eri asanjaga." 
Hosea9:14 Ayi Mukama, bawe. Naye onoobawa ki? Bawe embuto ezivaamu n'amabeere amakalu." 
Hosea9:15 “Olw'ebibi byabwe byonna mu Gilugali, eyo nabakyayirayo; olw'ebikolwa byabwe ebibi, nzija kubagoba mu nnyumba yange. Siriddayo kubaagala, byonna bye bakola bya bujeemu." 
Hosea9:16 Efurayimu yababuka, ekikolo kyabwe kyakala, tebaabala bibala; ne bwe balizaala abaana, nditta ezzadde lyabwe eribeeyagaza.”" 
Hosea9:17 Katonda wange alibakasuka eri, kubanga tebamuwulidde, baliba babungeese mu mawanga." 
Hosea10:1 Yisirayeli yali muzabbibu oguggumizza, nga gubala ebibala byagwo; ebibala bye gye byakomya okweyongera, gye yakomya okuzimba emyaliiro; ensi gye yakomya obugagga, naye gye yakomya okuyonja empagi za balubaale." 
Hosea10:2 Omutima gwabwe mulimba, kati balina okubonerezebwa olw'omusango gwabwe; Omukama alimenyawo emyaliiro gyabwe, alizikiriza empagi za balubaale." 
Hosea10:3 Aligamba nti: “Tetukyalina kabaka kubanga tetutya Mukama; ye kabaka anaatukolera ki?” 
Hosea10:4 Boogera bwogezi, balayirira bwereere, bakola ndagaano; emisango kwe kwanya ng'omuddo ogw'obutwa mu mpangi y'ennimiro." 
Hosea10:5 Ab'e Samariya baliba mu kutya olw'akayana k'e Beti-Aveni; bwe kalibaggyibwako, abantu baayo balikakaabira, wamu ne bakabona baako abakasinza, abajaguliza mu kitiibwa kyako," 
Hosea10:6 Kalitwalibwa mu Assuri ng'ekirabo kya kabaka omukulu; Efurayimu aliswala, ne Yisirayeli alisonyiwala olw'ebigendererwa bye." 
Hosea10:7 Samariya ne kabaka we balikuluggusibwa ng'akati ku mazzi. 
Hosea10:8 Ebifo bya Aveni ebigulumivu, ekibi kya Yisirayeli, birisaanyizibwawo; amaggwa n'amatovu biriduuma ne bibikka emyaliiro; awo baligamba ensozi nti: “Mutubuutikire,” n'obusozi nti: “Mutugwire.”" 
Hosea10:9 “Okuva mu nnaku za Gibewa, Yisirayeli, okola bibi, era eyo gye wasigala. Olutalo ku baana b'obugwenyufu terulibakwatira mu Gibewa?" 
Hosea10:10 Nzija kubabonereza; abantu balikuŋŋaana okubalwanyisa, okubabonereza olw'ebibi byabwe eby'emirundi ebiri." 
Hosea10:11 “Efurayimu, nnyana ntendeke, eyagala okuwuula; nzija kumwambaza ekikoligo mu nsigo ye ennungi. Efurayimu nzija kumwambaza amatandiiko, Yuda ajja kukabala, Yakobo akube amavuunike." 
Hosea10:12 Mwesigire obutuukirivu, mukungule ebibala eby'ekisa n'okwagala; mukabale ebisambu byammwe, kubanga obw'okunoonya Omukama butuuse, okutuusa Omukama lw'anajja abatonnyeseze obutuufu." 
Hosea10:13 Naye mmwe mwasiga bugwenyufu, mukungudde bwonoonefu, mulidde ebibala eby'obulimba, kubanga mwesiga ebigaali byammwe n'obungi bw'abatabaazi bammwe." 
Hosea10:14 Awo nno akatabanguko k'olutalo kajja kusitukira abantu bo, n'ebigo byo byonna bya kuzikiriza nga Salumani bwe yazikiriza Beti-Arubeli ku lunaku olw'olutalo, bannyina b'abaana lwe baaseseggulwa ku ttaka n'abaana baabwe." 
Hosea10:15 Naawe Beteli bwe kirikutuukirira, kubanga obugwenyufu bwo buyitirivu; ku mmambya kabaka wa Yisirayeli alisaanyizibwawo." 
Hosea11:1 “Yisirayeli ng'akyali mwana, namwagalanga, nayita mutabani wange okuva mu Misiri." 
Hosea11:2 Naye gye nakomya okubakoowoola, gye baakomya okunneesamba; baatambiriranga Baali, ne banyookeza ebifaananyi bya balubaale obubaani." 
Hosea11:3 Nze nayigiriza Efurayimu okutambula, nga mmukutte ku mukono, naye tebaamanya nti nze nabawonya." 
Hosea11:4 Nabasikiranga ku miguwa gy'okusaasira okw'obuntu, n'enkoba ez'okwagala; ku bo nali ng'oli ayambula ekikoligo mu nsingo yaabwe, ne nkutama gye bali ne mbaliisa." 
Hosea11:5 “Tebaliddayo mu Misiri, ne Assuri y'aliba kabaka waabwe, kubanga baagaana okweddamu?" 
Hosea11:6 Ekitala kiritala mu bibuga byabwe, ne kisaanyaawo ebisiba emiryango gyabwe, ne kibavunjaga olw'enteesa zaabwe." 
Hosea11:7 “Abantu bange bamaliridde okunjabulira. Ne bwe balikoowoolera awamu Ali Waggulu Ddala, talibasitula." 
Hosea11:8 “Ndikwabulira ntya, ggwe Efurayimu? Ndikuwaayo ntya, Yisirayeli? Nkuyisa ntya nga Aduma? Nkufuula ntya nga Zeboyimu? Omutima gwange gunfuukuuse munda, n'okusaasira kwange kubuguumiridde." 
Hosea11:9 Sijja kuta busungu bwange obwesera, sijja kukyuka nzikirize Efurayimu, kubanga nze ndi Katonda, siri muntu, Omutuukirivu mu makkati go. Sijja kujjira mu busungu." 
Hosea11:10 “Baligoberera Omukama, aliwuluguma ng'empologoma; bw'aliwuluguma, abaana balijja bakankana okuva ebugwanjuba;" 
Hosea11:11 bajja kujugumira ng'ebinyonyi okuva mu Misiri, ng'amayiba okuva mu Assuri; ndibatuuza mu nnyumba zaabwe, Omukama y'agamba." 
Hosea12:1 “Efurayimu anneetoolozza obulimba, n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli obukuusa. Naye ye Yuda akyamayiddwa Katonda, mwesigwa eri Omutuukirivu." 
Hosea12:2 Efurayimu alunda mpewo, awondera mpewo y'ebuvanjuba olunaku lwonna, obulimba n'ettemu abyongera bungi. Akola endagaano ne Assuri, n'aweereza omuzigo e Misiri.”" 
Hosea12:3 Omukama alina ky'avunaana Yuda; ajja kubonereza Yakobo ng'agerera ku makubo ge; amusasule ng'asinziira ku bikolwa bye. 
Hosea12:4 Mu lubuto yakwata ekisinziiro kya muganda we, ng'asajjakudde yameggana ne Katonda." 
Hosea12:5 Yameggana ne Malayika n'amuwangula; yakaaba n'amuwanjagira amusaasire. Yamusanga e Beteli n'ayogerera naye eyo__ 
Hosea12:6 oyo Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, ajjukirwa bulijjo nga ye Mukama." 
Hosea12:7 Ggwe nno, dda eri Katonda wo n'obuyambi bwe; kuuma okwagala n'obutuufu, era suubira mu Katonda wo bulijjo." 
Hosea12:8 Abasuubuzi bakozesa minzaani embi, baagala bulyake;" 
Hosea12:9 Efurayimu agamba nti: “Nfuuse mugagga, neefunidde ebintu.” Newandibadde ku bugagga obwo bwonna, tasobola kuggyawo kibi kye yakola." 
Hosea12:10 “Nze Mukama Katonda wo okuva lwe wali mu nsi y'e Misiri; nzija kuddamu okukusuza mu weema nga ku lw'Ensisinkano. 
Hosea12:11 Nayogera eri abalanzi, okulabikirwa ne nkwongera obungi, ne mpita mu bo okwogera engero." 
Hosea12:12 Oba Gileyaadi ajjudde obugwenyufu, awo nno temuliva kantu. Oba batambira ente ennume mu Gilugali, emyaliiro gyabwe gya kusigala ng'entuumu y'amayinja mu mpangi y'ennimiro.”" 
Hosea12:13 Yakobo yaddukira mu nsi y'e Aramu; Yisirayeli yaweereza alyoke afune omukazi, okuwasa omukazi, yalunda ndiga." 
Hosea12:14 Nga yeeyamba omulanzi Omukama yaggya Yisirayeli mu Misiri, ng'ayita mu mulanzi yamulabirira." 
Hosea12:15 Naye Efurayimu yamuleetera okunyiiga ekiyitiridde, Mukama we kyaliva amulekako omusango gw'okuyiwa omusaayi, era agenda kumubonereza olw'obunyoomi bwe." 
Hosea13:1 Efurayimu bwe yayogeranga, abantu nga bakankana; yagulumizibwanga mu Yisirayeli; naye yazza omusango ng'asinza Baali n'afa." 
Hosea13:2 Ate kati bongera kukola bibi, beekolera ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebisaanuuse mu ffeeza waabwe, ebifaananyi bya balubaale bye bakoze n'obukugu; byonna wamu omukozi y'abikoze. Bagamba nti: “Bino bye muba mutambirira!” Abantu ne banywegera obuyana." 
Hosea13:3 N'olw'ekyo baliba ng'olufu lw'oku makya, ng'omusulo ogukeera okuggwaawo, ng'ebisusunku ebikuŋŋunsibwa okuva mu gguuliro, ng'omukka ogufulumira mu ddirisa." 
Hosea13:4 “Nze Mukama Katonda wo okuva lwe wali mu nsi y'e Misiri, tewamanyaayo Katonda mulala okuggyako nze; tewaali abawonya mulala okuggyako nze." 
Hosea13:5 Nze nakuliisa mu ddungu, mu nsi ey'ekyeya ekyokya." 
Hosea13:6 Bwe nabaliisa mu malundiro, bakkuta, bwe bakkuta ne beewanika, olwo ne banneerabira." 
Hosea13:7 Nange nzija kubabeerera ng'empologoma, nzija kubateega ku kkubo ng'engo;" 
Hosea13:8 nzija kubabuukira ng'eddubu erinyagiddwako obwana bwalyo, nzija kubataagula ebifuba byabwe, nzija kubakavvula ng'empologoma, ensolo ey'ettale ejja kubayuzaamu wabiri." 
Hosea13:9 “Yisirayeli, ozikiridde! Sso nno nze nandikuyambye." 
Hosea13:10 Kabaka wo aluwa akuwonye? Abakungu bo baluwa mu bibuga byo byonna, abo be wayogerako nti: ‘Mpa kabaka n'abakungu’?" 
Hosea13:11 Mu busungu nakuwa kabaka, mu bunyiivu ne mmuggyawo." 
Hosea13:12 “Omusango gwa Efurayimu guzingiddwa wamu, ekibi kye kiterekeddwa." 
Hosea13:13 Okulumwa kw'omukazi ng'azaala kumujjira, naye mwana omutali magezi; akaseera nga katuuse, talisembera ku mulyango gwa lubuto." 
Hosea13:14 Ndibanunula mu mikono gy'emagombe. Walumbe, ekikato kyo kiruwa? Magombe, okuzikiriza kwo kuluwa? Ekisa kya kukisibwa amaaso gange." 
Hosea13:15 Efurayimu ne bw'aliyala mu baganda be, empewo y'ebuvanjuba erifuuwa, omukka gw'Omukama gulifuuwa okuva mu ddungu, ne gukaza ensulo ze, ne gukaliza enzizi ze; gulireka eggwanika lye nga gulinyazeemu buli kya bugagga." 
Hosea14:1 “Samariya wa kubonerezebwa olw'omusango gwe, kubanga baajeemera Katonda waabwe. Balifa ekitala, amabujje gaabwe galiseseggulibwa ku ttaka, ne bakazi baabwe abali embuto balibaagibwa.”" 
Hosea14:2 Ayi Yisirayeli, dda eri Omukama Katonda wo; ebibi byo byakuleetera okugwa." 
Hosea14:3 Mugende n'eby'okwogera eri Omukama; mumugambe nti: “Ggyawo ebibi byaffe byonna; kkiriza ekirungi; tunaakuweereza ebibala by'emimwa gyaffe. 
Hosea14:4 Assuri tajja kutulokola, tetujja kwebagala mbalaasi. Tetujja kugamba gwa kubiri nti: ‘balubaale baffe’ ku ebyo emikono gyaffe bye gikoze; kubanga enfuuzi mu ggwe mw'esanga okusaasirwa.”" 
Hosea14:5 “Nzija kuwonya obujeemu bwabwe; nzija kubaagala nga bwe njagala, kubanga obukambwe bwange bubavuddeko." 
Hosea14:6 Yisirayeli nzija kumubeerera nga ssuulwe; alyanya ng'ekimuli ky'eddanga, alisimba emirandira ng'entolookyo z'oku Lebanoni," 
Hosea14:7 obutabi bwe obuto bulitojjera. Ekitiibwa kye kiriba ng'eky'omuti gw'oliva, n'akawoowo ng'ak'entolookyo z'oku Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Abantu balidda ne batuula mu kittuluze kye; balibala ng'eŋŋano, balyanya ng'emizabbibu, ettutumu lye liriba ng'ery'evviini ya Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:9 Efurayimu, ebifaananyi bya balubaale okyabyagaza ki? Nze nkwanukula era nze nkulabirira. Nninga sipulaasi bulijjo aba addugazza, okubala kwo kuva ku nze.”" 
Hosea14:10 Oyo omugezi, ategeere bino, oyo omulabalaba, abikwate. Kubanga amakubo g'Omukama maluŋŋamu; abatuukirivu be bagatambuliramu, naye abasobya bageesittaliramu." 
Joel1:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ekyajja eri Yoweli mutabani wa Petuweli. 
Joel1:2 Abakadde, muwulire kino, nammwe mwenna abasula mu nsi mutege amatu; ekiri nga kino kyali kiguddewo mu budde bwammwe, oba mu bbanga lya bajjajjammwe?" 
Joel1:3 Mukinyumize abaana bammwe, n'abaana bammwe bakinyumize abaana baabwe, ate n'abaana baabwe bakinyumize ezzadde eririddirira." 
Joel1:4 Akaacaaka kye kaalekawo enzige enkulu yakyirya, enzige enkulu kye yalekawo lusejjera yakirya, ne lusejjera kye yalekawo ejjanzi ly'akirya." 
Joel1:5 Abatamiivu, muzuukuke, mukaabe; mukube ebiwoobe mwenna abanywi b'omwenge, olw'evviini ensu, anti bagibaggye mu kamwa." 
Joel1:6 Anti eggwanga lizinze ensi yange, ery'amaanyi, eritabalika, lirina amannyo ng'ag'empologoma, amagego gaalyo ga mpologoma nkazi." 
Joel1:7 Ennimiro yange ey'emizabbibu ligifudde matongo, n'emiti gyange egy'emikunyu ligiwawaagudde. Lisusumbuddeko ekikuta ne likisuula eri, amatabi ne ligaleka nga meeru." 
Joel1:8 Kaaba ng'omuwala embeerera eyeesibye ekikutiya, akaabira musajja we gwe yafumbirwa mu buto." 
Joel1:9 Ebitone by'obuwunga n'eby'okuyiwa bikutuddwako mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama; bakabona abaweereza b'Omukama bakaaba. 
Joel1:10 Ennimiro zisigadde matongo; ettaka likaaba kubanga eŋŋano ezikiridde, evviini ensu tekyali, n'omuzigo gukeeye." 
Joel1:11 Abalimi muwuniikirire; abakozi mu mizabbibu mukube ebiwoobe; mukaabire eŋŋano ne sayiri; kubanga amakungula mu nnimiro gazikiridde. 
Joel1:12 Emizabbibu gikaze n'oliva ziwotose; enkomamawanga, enkindu n'amapeera; emiti gyonna mu nnimiro gikaze, ddala essanyu likomye mu baana b'abantu." 
Joel1:13 Mwesibe ebikutiya, mukaabe, mmwe bakabona; mukube ebiwoobe, mmwe abaweereza ku mwaliiro. Muyingire, musule mu bikutiya, mmwe abaweereza ba Katonda wange, kubanga ebitone eby'obuwunga n'ebitone eby'okuyiwa bikomezeddwa mu Kiggwa kya Katonda wammwe." 
Joel1:14 Mulangirire ekisiibo ekitukuvu, muyite olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa, mukunge abakadde, na bonna abasula mu nsi, mubakuŋŋaanyize mu nnyumba y'Omukama, mulaajanire Omukama." 
Joel1:15 Kitalo eky'olunaku olwo! Kubanga olunaku lw'Omukama luli kumpi; lulijja ng'okuzikirira okuva eri Ow'obuyinza. 
Joel1:16 Emmere tetuggyiddwa mu maaso, n'essanyu n'okujaguza okuva mu nnyumba ya Katonda waffe?" 
Joel1:17 Entontogolo z'emikunyu ziwotokedde mu mafunfugu, amawanika gaayabizibwa, ebyagi ne bimenyebwawo, kubanga eŋŋano eweddewo." 
Joel1:18 Ensolo nga zikaaba! Amagana g'ente gatangatanga kubanga tegakyalina malundiro, n'amagana g'endiga gabonaabona." 
Joel1:19 Ayi Mukama, ggwe nkubira omulanga, kubanga omuliro gulidde amalundiro mu lukoola, n'oluyiira ne lwokya emiti gyonna mu ttale." 
Joel1:20 N'ebisolo eby'ettale birookeeralookera ggwe, kubanga emyala gy'amazzi gikalidde, n'omuliro gumazeewo amalundiro mu lukoola." 
Joel2:1 Mufuuwe eŋŋombe mu Siyoni, mukube enduulu ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu; bonna abasula mu nsi batekemuke kubanga olunaku lw'Omukama lujja, kubanga lusembedde:" 
Joel2:2 olunaku olw'enzikiza ne kalenge, olunaku olw'ebire n'olufu; nga mmambya agenda abuna ku nsozi, eggye eddene ery'amaanyi lijja, ekiri ng'ekyo tekibangawo okuva edda n'edda, n'oluvannyuma lwakyo tekiribaawo mu mazadde n'amazadde." 
Joel2:3 Mu maaso gaalyo omuliro gugenda gusenkenya, emabega waalyo oluyiira lujja lwaka. Gye zigenda ensi eri ng'ennimiro y'e Edeni, naye gye ziva eri ng'eddungu evvunjage; mpaawo kiziwona." 
Joel2:4 Mu ndabika yaazo zifaanana embalaasi, ziguluka ng'eggye ly'abeebagazi." 
Joel2:5 N'okuyoogaana kw'ebigaali zigenda zibuuka entikko z'ensozi, ng'okutuliikirira kw'omuliro ogwokya essubi, ng'eggye ery'amaanyi eritaze okulwana." 
Joel2:6 Gye ziraga abantu bawooba, amaaso gonna gabapeeruuse." 
Joel2:7 Zirumba ng'abazira, ekigo zikiwalampa ng'abasajja abatabaazi; buli emu mu mugendo gwayo, teziwunjawunja." 
Joel2:8 Tezisindikagana, buli emu egoba kkubo lyayo. Ziwaguza mu busaale, teziyimirira." 
Joel2:9 Ziyiikira ekibuga, zisanjaala ku kisenge, zeefubitika amayumba nga ziyita mu madirisa ng'ababbi." 
Joel2:10 Mu maaso gaazo ensi ekankana, n'eggulu lijugumira, enjuba n'omwezi bifuuka nzikiza, n'emmunyeenye ne zikomya okwaka kwazo." 
Joel2:11 Omukama aduumira emabega w'eggye lye; eggye lye ddene nnyo; ba maanyi abatuukiriza by'agambye. Olunaku lw'Omukama lukulu, lwa ntiisa nnyo; ani alirugumira?" 
Joel2:12 “Kaakati,” Omukama yagamba, “mukyukire gye ndi n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, nga musiiba, nga mukaaba n'okukuba ebiwoobe.”" 
Joel2:13 Muyuze mitima gyammwe, si byambalo byammwe; mudde eri Omukama Katonda wammwe, kubanga musaasizi, ayagala, tasunguwala mangu, ajjudde ekisa, yeddamu n'atakola kabi." 
Joel2:14 Ani amanyi, oboolyawo yeddamu n'asonyiwa, n'aleka emabega omukisa gw'ebitone eby'obuwunga n'eby'okuyiwa olw'Omukama Katonda wammwe?" 
Joel2:15 Mufuuwe eŋŋombe mu Siyoni, mulangirire ekisiibo; muyite olukuŋŋaana olw'ekitiibwa." 
Joel2:16 Mukunge abantu, mutukuze olukuŋŋaana, mukuŋŋaanye abakadde, muleete wamu abato abakyayonka; omusajja awasizza aveeyo gy'asula, n'omugole aleke ekisenge kye." 
Joel2:17 Bakabona, abaweereza b'Omukama, bawanjagire wakati w'ekisasi n'omwaliiro; bagambe nti: “Saasira abantu bo, ayi Mukama, obusika bwo tobuleka kusekererwa, kufuuka mboozi mu b'amawanga. Lwaki bandigambye eyo mu mawanga nti: ‘Katonda waabwe ali ludda wa?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Olwo Omukama ensi ye egenda kumukwasa ensaalwa, asaasire abantu be." 
Joel2:19 Omukama alyanukula nti: “Nzija kubasindikira eŋŋano n'evviini n'omuzigo, okutuusa nga mukkuse; siriddayo kubafuula kya kusekererwa mu mawanga." 
Joel2:20 N'oyo ow'emambuka nzija kumubassa wala, nzija kumugobera mu nsi enkalu ey'eddungu, obwanga ng'abwolekezza ennyanja ey'ebuvanjuba, ekyensuti ng'akitunuulizza ennyanja ey'ebugwanjuba. Olusu lwe lulisituka, ekivundu kye kiryetikka.” Mazima akoze binene!" 
Joel2:21 Ggwe nsi, leka kutya; sagambiza osanyuke. Mazima Omukama akoze binene!" 
Joel2:22 Ebisolo eby'ettale, muleke kutya, kubanga amalundiro mu ddungu gasibuse; emiti gissizzaako ebibala byagyo, omukunyu n'omuzabbibu bireese obugagga bwagyo." 
Joel2:23 N'abantu ba Siyoni, musagambize, musanyukire mu Mukama Katonda wammwe, kubanga abawadde enkuba ya Ddumbi mu butuukirivu, atonnyesezza enkuba ku lwammwe, eya Ddumbi n'eya Ttoggo nga luli mu masooka." 
Joel2:24 Buli gguuliro lirijjula eŋŋano, n'amatogero ne gabooga evviini ensu n'omuzigo." 
Joel2:25 Nzija kubaddizaawo olw'emyaka gye zaamala nga zirya: enzige enkulu ne lusejjera, amayanzi n'obucaaka; eggye lyange eddene lye nabasindikira." 
Joel2:26 Muliba n'ebyokulya bingi ne mukkuta; mulitendereza erinnya ly'Omukama Katonda wammwe eyabakolera ebikulu; abantu bange tebaliddayo kuswazibwa n'akamu. 
Joel2:27 Mulitegeera nti ndi mu Yisirayeli, nti nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, era teriiyo mulala; abantu bange tebaliddayo kuswazibwa n'akamu." 
Joel3:1 “Ebyo nga biwedde, ndiyiwa Mwoyo wange ku bantu bonna. Batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe baliranga; abakadde bammwe baliroota ebirooto, n'abavubuka bammwe balirabikirwa." 
Joel3:2 N'abaddu bammwe n'abazaana bammwe mu nnaku ezo ndibayiwako Mwoyo wange. 
Joel3:3 Ndiraga ebikuuno ku ggulu ne ku nsi: omusaayi, omuliro n'empagi z'omukka.”" 
Joel3:4 Enjuba erifuuka nzikiza, n'omwezi gulifuuka musaayi ng'olunaku lw'Omukama olukulu olw'entiisa terunnatuuka." 
Joel3:5 Buli alikoowoola erinnya ly'Omukama aliwonyezebwa; kubanga ku lusozi Siyoni kwe kuliba abanunuddwa, era ne mu Yeruzaalemu, ng'Omukama bwe yagamba, mu abo abawonyeewo mwe muliba Omukama b'ayita." 
Amos1:1 Ebigambo bya Amosi, omu ku basumba b'e Tekowa, bye yalaba ku Yisirayeli mu mirembe gya Wuzziya, kabaka wa Yuda n'egya Yerobowamu, mutabani wa Yowasi, kabaka wa Yisirayeli, nga wasigadde emyaka ebiri musisi okuyita." 
Amos1:2 N'agamba nti: “Omukama awuluguma ng'ayima mu Siyoni, abwatuka ng'ayima mu Yeruzaalemu; amalundiro g'abalunzi gakungubaga, n'entikko za Karumeli ziwotose.”" 
Amos1:3 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egya Damasiko, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga bawuula Gileyaadi n'empuuzo ez'ebyuma." 
Amos1:4 Nzija kusindika omuliro mu nnyumba ya Kazayeli, ogunaasenkenyeza ddala embiri za Beni-Adadi." 
Amos1:5 Nzija kumenya emiyingo gya Damasiko, nzikirize abatuuze b'omu Kiwonvu kya Aveni, n'oyo akutte ddamula e Beti-Edeni; abantu ba Aramu bajja kutwalibwa mu busibe e Kiri.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos1:6 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egya Gaza, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga baasiba abantu bonna ne babatunda mu Edomu." 
Amos1:7 Nzija kusindika omuliro ku bbugwe wa Gaza ogunaasenkenyeza ddala embiri zaayo. 
Amos1:8 Nzija kusaanyaawo abatuuze b'omu Asudodi, n'oyo akutte ddamula e Asukeloni. Omukono gwange nzija kugukyusiza ku Ekuroni; N'abasigaddewo mu Bafilisitiini balizikirira.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos1:9 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egya Tiiro, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga baddira ebibinja by'abasibe byonna ne babitunda mu Edomu, ne batajjukira mukago gwa bwaluganda." 
Amos1:10 Nzija kusindika omuliro ku bbugwe wa Tiiro ogunaasenkenyeza ddala embiri zaakyo.” 
Amos1:11 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egya Edomu, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga yawondera muganda we n'ekitala, ekisa yakissa ebbali, obusungu bwe ne bwongera okutumbuka, obuswandi bwe ne butaamuuka." 
Amos1:12 Nzija kusindika omuliro mu Temani, ogunaasenkenyeza ddala embiri za Bozura.”" 
Amos1:13 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egy'Abammoni, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga baabaaga abakazi b'e Gileyaadi abaali embuto, basobole bwe batyo okugaziya ensalo zaabwe." 
Amos1:14 Nzija kuteekera omuliro bbugwe wa Rabba ogunaasenkenyeza ddala embiri zaakyo, eno enduulu nga zitakira ku lunaku olw'olutalo, ne mu muyaga omungi ku lunaku olwa kikuŋŋunta;" 
Amos1:15 Kabaka waabwe aligenda mu busibe, ye wamu n'abakungu be.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos2:1 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egy'e Mowabu, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga yayokya amagumba ga kabaka wa Edomu ne gafuuka ennoni." 
Amos2:2 Nzija kusindika omuliro mu Mowabu ogunaasenkenyeza ddala embiri za Kiriyoti; Mowabu alifiira mu kagugumuko, eno enduulu nga zirawa n'eŋŋombe ng'evuga." 
Amos2:3 Ndisaanyaawo omufuzi waakyo, ne nzitirako n'abakungu be bonna.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos2:4 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egya Yuda, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga baasambajja etteeka ly'Omukama n'ebiragiro bye ne batabikwata; kubanga balubaale ab'obulimba baabawubisa, abo bajjajjaabwe be baali bagoberedde." 
Amos2:5 Nzija kusindika omuliro mu Yuda ogunaasenkenyeza ddala embiri za Yeruzaalemu.” 
Amos2:6 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Olw'emisango esatu egya Yisirayeli, n'olw'emisango ena, kye nateesa sijja kukijjulula, kubanga omuntu omutuukirivu bamutunzeemu ffeeza, n'omwavu ne bamutundamu omugogo gw'engatto;" 
Amos2:7 emitwe gy'abaavu bagisambiridde mu ttaka, abanaku ne babasindiikiriza eri; omwana ne kitaawe bagenda ku muwala omu, ne boonoona batyo erinnya lyange ettukuvu." 
Amos2:8 Beeyala buli awali omwaliiro mu byambalo ebyaweebwa ng'omusingo; banywera mu nnyumba y'Omukama omwenge ogwasingwa ng'engassi. 
Amos2:9 Sso nze nazikiriza Omwamori mu maaso gaabwe, eyali omulangavvu ng'entolookyo, ow'amaanyi ng'omuvule; nazikiriza ebibala bye waggulu n'emirandira gye wansi." 
Amos2:10 Nze nabaggya mu Misiri, ne mbakulemberera emyaka ana mu ddungu, musobole okulya ensi y'Abaamori." 
Amos2:11 Nasitusa abalanzi mu baana bammwe n'abanazireewo mu bavubuka bammwe. Si bwe gutyo bwe gwali, bantu ba Yisirayeli?” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos2:12 “Naye mmwe mwawaliriza abanazireewo okunywa evviini, ne mulagira abalanzi balekere awo okulanga." 
Amos2:13 Kale nno ndibabetenta ng'ekigaali ekyetisse emiganda gy'eŋŋano bwe kibetenta; 
Amos2:14 embiro ziribula omuwenyusi, ow'amaanyi talyongeramu ku maanyi, n'omutabaazi talisobola kwewonya." 
Amos2:15 Omulasi w'obusaale taligumirawo, ow'emisinde mu bigere talisumattuka, n'omwebagazi w'embalaasi talitaakiriza bulamu bwe." 
Amos2:16 Ku olwo n'asinga obuzira mu batabaazi alidduka bukunya.” Omukama y'agamba. 
Amos3:1 Ayi bantu ba Yisirayeli, muwulire Omukama ky'abavunaana, ne ky'avunaana ekika kyonna kye naggya mu Misiri." 
Amos3:2 “Mu bika byonna ebiri ku nsi, mmwe mwekka mmwe namanya, n'olw'ekyo mwenna nzija kubabonereza olw'ebibi byammwe.”" 
Amos3:3 Ababiri basobola okugatta ekkubo wabula nga bamaze kutegeeragana? 
Amos3:4 Empologoma ewulugumira mu kisaka wabula ng'erinawo ekyokulya? Omwana gw'empologoma guvuumira mu nfo yaagwo nga teguliiko kye gukutte? 
Amos3:5 Ekinyonyi kiyinza okugwa ku ttaka mu kitimba okuggyako nga waliwo akatego akakitegeddwa? Omutego gumasuka ne guva ku ttaka okuggyako nga gukwasizza? 
Amos3:6 Eŋŋombe efuuyirwa mu kibuga abantu ne batatya? Akabi kagwa mu kibuga, wabula ng'Omukama y'akaleese?" 
Amos3:7 Mazima ddala, Omukama Katonda tabaako ky'akola ng'ekyama kye tasoose kukibikkulira baweereza be abalanzi." 
Amos3:8 Empologoma ewulugumye, ani ataajugumire? Omukama Katonda ayogedde, ani ataalange?" 
Amos3:9 Mulangirire mu mbiri z'omu Asudodi ne mu mbiri z'omu nsi y'e Misiri nti: “Mukuŋŋaanire mu nsozi za Samariya, mulabe obutabanguko enkumu obukirimu, n'okunyigirizibwa kw'abakirimu.”" 
Amos3:10 “Tebamanyi na kukola kiruŋŋamu,” Omukama bw'agamba, “mu mbiri zaabwe batuumamu bukambwe na bunyazi.”" 
Amos3:11 N'olw'ekyo Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Omulabe ajja kuzingiza ensi, ebigo byo ajja kubisuula wansi, n'embiri zo zijja kunyagibwa.”" 
Amos3:12 Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Omusumba nga bw'awonya mu kamwa k'empologoma amagulu abiri oba akasammambiro k'okutu, bwe batyo n'Abayisirayeli bwe baliwona, abasula mu Samariya ku lubuubuuto lw'ekitanda, ne mu Damasiko ku kiriri kyabwe." 
Amos3:13 “Muwulire, mulumirize ennyumba ya Yakobo,” Omukama Katonda w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Amos3:14 “Ku lunaku lwe ndibonereza Yisirayeli olw'emisango gye, ndibonereza n'emyaliiro gya Beteli; amayembe g'emyaliiro galitemebwako ne gagwa ku ttaka." 
Amos3:15 Ndimenyawo ennyumba y'obudde bw'empewo n'ennyumba ey'ekyeya; ennyumba ez'amasanga zirizikirizibwa, embiri ennene zirisaanyizibwawo.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos4:1 Muwulire ekigambo kino, mmwe ente z'e Basani, bakazi mmwe, mu nsozi za Samariya, abanyigiriza abankuseere ne mubonyaabonya abanaku; abagamba babbammwe nti: “Mutuleetere tunywe.”" 
Amos4:2 Omukama Katonda alayidde obutuukirivu bwe nti: “Ennaku zijja kubajjira lwe muliwalaawalirwa ku malobo, n'abasembayo mu mmwe balitwalibwa ku malobo agavuba;" 
Amos4:3 buli omu alifuluma butereevu, ng'ayita mu bituli mu bisenge, ne mukasukibwa mu Arumoni.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos4:4 “Mugende e Beteli, musobye; mugende e Gilugali ebisobyo byammwe mubyongere obungi; muweereze ebitambiro byammwe buli lukya; muleete ebyekkumi byammwe buli nnaku ssatu." 
Amos4:5 Mutambire n'ekizimbulukusa ekitambiro eky'okwebaza; mulaalaase wonna ebitambiro byammwe ebyeyagalire; mulangirire, anti ekyo kye mwagala, bantu ba Yisirayeli!” Omukama Katonda y'agamba." 
Amos4:6 “Nabawa amannyo amayonjo mu bibuga byammwe byonna, n'okubulwa omugaati mu byalo byammwe byonna, naye temwadda gye ndi.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos4:7 “Era nabamma n'enkuba, nga wakyasigadde emyezi esatu okukungula, ne ngitonnyesa ku kibuga kimu, ne sigitonnyesa ku kirala; mu nnimiro emu enkuba n'etonnya, mu ndala n'etetonnya." 
Amos4:8 Ebibuga bibiri oba bisatu byabundabundanga okulaga mu kibuga ekimu banyweyo ku tuzzi, naye tebakkutanga; naye temwadda gye ndi.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos4:9 “Nabakuba ne nnabbambula n'okugengewala kw'ebimera; emirundi mingi nakuba ennimiro zammwe n'emizabbibu gyammwe, obwacaaka ne bulya emikunyu gyammwe n'oliva zammwe; naye temwadda gye ndi.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos4:10 “Nabasindikira ebibonerezo ng'eby'omu Misiri, ne nzita abavubuka bammwe n'ekitala, embalaasi zammwe ne zinyagibwa, najjuza ekivundu mu nsiisira zammwe ne kisaanikira ennyindo zammwe; naye temwadda gye ndi.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos4:11 “Nabazikiriza nga Katonda bwe yazikiriza Sodoma ne Gomorra, mmwe ne mubeera ng'ekitawuliro ekiggyiddwa ku luyiira; naye temwadda gye ndi.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos4:12 “Olwekyo nange kino kye nzija okukukola, ggwe Yisirayeli; ate kubanga kino nzija kukikukola, Yisirayeli, weeteeketeeke okusisinkana Katonda wo.”" 
Amos4:13 Eyakola ensozi, n'atonda empewo, abikkulira omuntu ebirowoozo bye, oyo afuula mmambya ekizikiza, atambula ku ntikko z'ensi, Omukama Katonda w'Amagye lye linnya lye." 
Amos5:1 Muwulire ekigambo kino kye ntanudde ku mmwe, n'oluyimba olw'okukungubaga lwe ntanudde, ggwe nnyumba ya Yisirayeli:" 
Amos5:2 Agudde, taddeyo kusituka omubeererevu wa Yisirayeli; ayabuliddwa mu nsi ye, tewali anaamuyimusa." 
Amos5:3 Kino ky'agamba Omukama Katonda: 2 “Ekibuga ekyafulumyanga abantu olukumi mulisigalamu kikumi; ekyafulumyanga ekikumi mulisigalamu kkumi ku lw'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli.” 
Amos5:4 Omukama kino ky'agamba ennyumba ya Yisirayeli: “Munnoonye, olwo munaalama." 
Amos5:5 Muleke kunoonya Beteli; muleke kugenda Gilugali, wadde okuseyeggera olw'e Beeriseba, kubanga Gilugali kya kutwalibwa mu busibe, ne Beteli alifuuka omutali nsa." 
Amos5:6 Munoonye Omukama, olwo munaalama; oba si ekyo nzija kuyita mu nnyumba ya Yozefu ng'omuliro, gulisenkenya, era ku Beteli teriba azikiriza." 
Amos5:7 Mmwe, obulungi ababufudde omususa, obutuukirivu ne babusuula mu ttaka.”" 
Amos5:8 Eyakola Emmunyeenye Omusanvu ne Oriyoni, enzikiza ekutte agifuula amakya, omusana n'aguddugaza ne gufuuka ekiro, ayita amazzi g'omu nnyanja n'agayiwa ku lukalu, Omukama lye linnya lye." 
Amos5:9 Aleetera ekigo okuzikirira, n'ekibuga ekibugirize n'akireka matongo" 
Amos5:10 Beenyinyala oyo ayigiriza obwenkanya mu mbuga, ne banyooma ayogera amazima." 
Amos5:11 Kubanga mulinnyirira omwavu, ne mumubinika omusolo gw'eŋŋano, bwe muneezimbira ennyumba n'amayinja amabajje, temujja kuzisulamu; bwe nunaasimba emizabbibu egyegombebwa, temujja kuginywako vviini." 
Amos5:12 Kubanga mmanyi emisango gyammwe bwe gyenkana obungi, n'ebibi byammwe bwe byenkana obunene. Mmwe, abanyigiriza omutuukirivu, ne mulya enguzi, abaavu ne mubasindiikiriza eri ku miryango gy'ekibuga." 
Amos5:13 Omwegendereza mu budde ng'obwo asirika, kubanga obudde bubi." 
Amos5:14 Munoonye ekirungi, sso si ekibi, mulyoke mubeere balamu, n'Omukama Katonda w'Amagye lw'anaabeera nammwe, nga bwe mugambye nti bw'ali." 
Amos5:15 Mukyawe ekibi, mwagale ekirungi; mulamule mu bwenkanya ku mulyango, oboolyawo Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, anaddiramu abasigaddewo mu Yozefu." 
Amos5:16 N'olw'ekyo kino ky'agamba Omukama Katonda w'Amagye: “Walibaawo okukuba ebiwoobe mu nguudo wonna, nga bakaaba mu mpya zonna nti: ‘Woowe! Woowe!’ Baliyita abalimi bajje bakube ebiwoobe, n'abakungubazi bajje balire." 
Amos5:17 Mu nnimiro z'emizabbibu zonna mulibaamu ebiwoobe, kubanga ŋŋenda kukuyitamu wakati.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos5:18 Zibasanze mmwe abayaayaanira Olunaku lw'Omukama! Olunaku lw'Omukama lulibagasa ki? Luliba lwa nzikiza, si lwa kitangaala." 
Amos5:19 Luliba ng'omuntu adduka empologoma ate n'asanga eddubu, ng'ayingira mu nnyumba ne yeekwata ku kisenge, omusota ne gumubojja." 
Amos5:20 Olunaku lw'Omukama teruliba lunaku lwa kizikiza sso si lwa kitangaala? Teruliba lwa kazigizigi awatali na kitangaala? 
Amos5:21 “Nkyawa embaga zammwe enkulu, era nzinyooma; sisanyukira nkuŋŋaana zammwe ez'ekitiibwa." 
Amos5:22 Ne bwe munampeereza ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitone eby'obuwunga, sijja kubikkiriza, n'ebitambiro byammwe eby'okussa ekimu eby'ensolo ensavuwaze, sijja kubitunuulira." 
Amos5:23 Mutwale eri omujogoolikano gw'ennyimba zammwe. Sijja kuwuliriza nnyimba za ntongooli zammwe. 
Amos5:24 Naye muleke obulungi bukulukute ng'amazzi, obutuufu, ng'engezi etekalira." 
Amos5:25 Si mwampeereza ebitambiro n'ebitone, emyaka amakumi ana mu ddungu, nnyumba ya Yisirayeli?" 
Amos5:26 Mukongozze Sakkuti kabaka wammwe, ne Kayiwani lubaale wammwe ow'emmunyeenye, ebifaananyi byammwe bye mwekolera mmwe mwennyini." 
Amos5:27 Nzija kubawaŋŋangusa n'okuyisa Damasiko.” Omukama y'agamba, erinnya lye Katonda w'Amagye." 
Amos6:1 Zibasanze mmwe abeegandalidde mu Siyoni! Nammwe abeetuulidde entende ku lusozi lwa Samariya; abeebitiibwa mu ggwanga lino erisooka mu malala, ennyumba ya Yisirayeli gy'ejja." 
Amos6:2 Mujje e Kalune mulabe; muveeyo mulage e Kamati ekikulu, mulyoke muserengete e Gati eky'Abafilisitiini Bali bulungi okusinga obwakabaka buno? Yadde ensi yaabwe ngazi okusinga eyammwe?" 
Amos6:3 Bwe mugenda nga mwongezaayo olunaku olw'akabi, mwanguyaako nnamulondo y'obukambwe." 
Amos6:4 Mwebaka ku bitanda eby'amasanga, ne mwegololera ku buliri bwammwe; mulya obuliga bwe mulondobye mu ggana, n'obuyana okuva mu kisibo." 
Amos6:5 Muyoogaanira ku ddoboozi ery'entongooli, ne muyiiyayiiya ebivuga nga Dawudi." 
Amos6:6 Munywa empaawo n'empaawo z'omwenge, ne mwesiiga omuzigo ogusingira ddala obulungi, naye mmwe tekibaluma Yozefu okuzikirizibwa." 
Amos6:7 Olwekyo nno mujja kubeera mu banaasooka okuwaŋŋangusibwa; okucakala kw'abeebaka ne beegolola kujja kukoma. 
Amos6:8 Omukama Katonda yeerayiridde; agamba Omukama Katonda w'Amagye nti: “Nkyawa amalala ga Yakobo, neenyinyala embiri ze; ekibuga nzija kukiwaayo na byonna ebikirimu.”" 
Amos6:9 Abantu ekkumi bwe balisigala mu nnyumba emu, nabo balifa." 
Amos6:10 Ow'oluganda alijja okwokya emirambo, aggyewo amagumba mu nnyumba, bw'alibuuza yenna aliba akyali mu nnyumba eyo ebuziizi nti: “Waliyo abalala?” alimuddamu nti: “Teriiyo.” Olwo ono alimugamba nti: “Sirika! Erinnya ly'Omukama tetuteekwa kulyatula.”" 
Amos6:11 Kubanga Omukama awadde ekiragiro: “Ennyumba ennene egenda kukoonakoonebwa esigale mafunfugu, n'akayumba akatono kalisigala kifulukwa." 
Amos6:12 Embalaasi ziddukira mu njazi? Ennyanja bagirimisaamu nte? Naye mmwe lwaki nno obutuufu mubufudde obutwa, n'ekibala ky'obutuukirivu ne mukifuula omususa?" 
Amos6:13 Mmwe abasanyuka olwa Lo-Dabari, abagamba nti: ‘Tetwawamba Karunayimu n'amaanyi gaffe?’ ”" 
Amos6:14 Anti Omukama Katonda w'Amagye agamba nti: “Nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, nzija kukusiikulira eggwanga, likunyigirize okuviira ddala e Lebo-Kamati okutuusa ku Kiwonvu Araba.”" 
Amos7:1 Kino Omukama kye yandaga: Yali ategeka ebikuukuulu by'enzige birumbe awo ng'eby'amasiga agookubiri bisooka okumera, awo nga n'essubi lya kabaka lyakasalibwa." 
Amos7:2 Enzige nga zimaze okusenkenya omuddo ku nsi, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Katonda, nkwegayiridde, nsaasira! Yakobo anaasigalawo, oyo omutono bw'atyo?”" 
Amos7:3 Omukama ne yeddamu; Omukama n'agamba nti: “Tekibeewo!” 
Amos7:4 Kino Omukama Katonda kye yandaga: Omukama yali ayita omuliro agweyambise okulamula; gwakaliza eddubi eggwanvu ne gutandika n'okulya olukalu. 
Amos7:5 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Katonda, nkwegayiridde, koma awo; Yakobo anaasigalawo, oyo omutene bw'atyo?”" 
Amos7:6 Omukama ne yeddamu; Omukama Katonda n'agamba nti: “Na kino tekiibeewo.” 
Amos7:7 Kino Omukama Katonda kye yandaga: Omukama yali ayimiridde kumpi n'ekisenge ekyazimbirwa ku bbirigi, yali akutte bbirigi mu ngalo."
