Amos7:8 Omukama n'ambuuza nti: “Amosi, kiki ky'olaba?” Ne mmwanukula nti: “Bbirigi.” Awo Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Laba, nzija kussa bbirigi mu bantu bange wakati; sijja kwongera nate kubaleka bulesi." 
Amos7:9 Ebifo bya Yizaake ebigulumivu bijja kuzikirizibwa; ebifo ebitukuvu ebya Yisirayeli birifuuka matongo; ennyumba ya Yerobowamu nzija kugisitukiramu n'ekitala.” 
Amos7:10 Awo Amaziya, kabona w'e Beteli n'atuma ewa Yerobowamu kabaka wa Yisirayeli, n'amugamba nti: “Amosi akujeemedde wano mu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli wakati; ensi tekyasobola kugumiikiriza bigambo bye byonna." 
Amos7:11 Anti bino Amosi by'agamba: “ ‘Yerobowamu ajja kufa kitala, ne Yisirayeli ajja kuwaŋŋangusibwa ewala okuva mu nsi yaboobwe.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Amaziya n'agamba Amosi nti: “Genda, ggwe omulabi, ddukira mu nsi ya Yuda, eyo gy'oba olya emmere era gy'oba okolera obulanzi;" 
Amos7:13 naye toddamu kulangira mu Beteli, kubanga kye kitukuvu kya kabaka era kye kiggwa ky'eggwanga.”" 
Amos7:14 Awo Amosi n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Nze siri mulanzi, yadde omu ku baana b'abalanzi, wabula ndi mulunzi, ndabirira miti gya mikunyu." 
Amos7:15 Naye Omukama ye yanzigya ku gw'okulunda, n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Genda olange eri abantu bange Yisirayeli.’" 
Amos7:16 Kale nno wulira ekigambo ky'Omukama: “Ggwe ogamba nti: ‘Tobaako ky'olanga ku nnyumba ya Yisirayeli, era tobaako ky'osiinya ku nnyumba ya Yizaake.’ ”" 
Amos7:17 N'olw'ekyo nno Omukama kino ky'agamba: “Mukazi wo ajja kufuuka malaaya mu kibuga, batabani bo ne bawala bo bajja kufa ekitala; ensi yo ejja kukubibwa olukoba olupima egabanyizibwemu, ate naawe olifiira mu nsi eteri nnongoofu, ne Yisirayeli ajja kuwaŋŋangusibwa ewala okuva mu nsi yaaboobwe.”" 
Amos8:1 Kino Omukama Katonda kye yandaga: Yandaga ekibbo ekijjudde ebibala eby'omu kyeya; 
Amos8:2 n'ambuuza nti: “Amosi, olaba ki?” Ne nziramu nti: “Ekibbo ekijjudde ebibala eby'ekyeya.” Omukama Katonda n'aŋŋamba nti: “Akadde katuuse olw'abantu bange Yisirayeli, sijja kwongera nate kubaleka bulesi.”" 
Amos8:3 Omukama Katonda agamba nti: “Ennyimba z'omu Kiggwa ku olwo zirifuuka biwoobe; emirambo giriba mingi nga gigaŋŋalamye wonna. Sirika!” 
Amos8:4 Muwulire kino mmwe abalinnyirira abaavu, mmwe abasaanyaawo abanaku mu nsi," 
Amos8:5 nga mugamba nti: “Omwezi gunaggwaako ddi tutunde obuwunga bwaffe, Sabbaato eyita ddi tutwale eŋŋano yaffe mu katale, tukendeeze ku efa, ne sekeli tugyongereko, tuseere nga tweyambisa amayinja amakyamu," 
Amos8:6 tugule abankuseere ne zaabu, abanaku tubagule n'omugogo gw'engatto, era tutunde ebisusunku by'eŋŋano?”" 
Amos8:7 Omukama alayidde okwekuza kwa Yakobo: “Emirembe gyonna siryerabira byonna bye baakola.” 
Amos8:8 Ensi terikaankana olwa kino, ne buli yenna agisulamu taliwooba? Ensi erituumbiira nga Kiyira; eribimba n'ekka ng'omugga gw'e Misiri." 
Amos8:9 “Ku olwo,” Omukama Katonda y'agamba, “ndigira enjuba n'egwa mu ttuntu, n'ensi ndigiteeka mu nzikiza emisana ttuku." 
Amos8:10 Embaga zammwe enkulu ndizifuula za kukaaba, n'ennyimba zammwe zonna ndizifuula za kukungubaga; buli omu mu mmwe ndimwambaza ekikutiya, era ndimumwa enviiri. Ndirufuula ng'olunaku olw'okukungubagira omutabani eyazaalibwa omu, luliggwa ng'olunaku olw'ennyiike." 
Amos8:11 “Ennaku zijja,” Omukama y'agamba, “lwe nnaasindika enjala mu ggwanga lyonna; kyokka si njala ey'emmere oba ennyonta ey'amazzi, naye enjala ey'okuwulira ekigambo ky'Omukama." 
Amos8:12 Abantu balizuŋŋana okuva ku nnyanja emu okutuuka ku ndala, okuva emambuka okutuusa ebuvanjuba, nga banoonya ekigambo ky'Omukama, kyokka tebalikizuula." 
Amos8:13 “Ku olwo abawala abalungi n'abalenzi ab'amaanyi baliyenjebuka olw'ennyonta. 
Amos8:14 Abo bonna abalayira omusango gwa Samariya, ne bagamba nti: ‘Mazima lubaale wo nga mulamu, ggwe Daani!’ Oba nti: ‘Ndayidde ekkubo ly'e Beeriseba!’ Baligwa, tebaliddamu kusituka mulundi mulala.”" 
Amos9:1 Nalaba Omukama ng'ayimiridde kumpi n'omwaliiro, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kuba ku mitwe gy'empagi emyango ginyeenye, ogyasize ku mitwe gyabwe bonna, buli anaaba asigaddewo mu bo nzija kumutta n'ekitala; mu bo tewaabe anadduka; mu bo temuube anaawonawo." 
Amos9:2 Ne bwe balisima ne bakka emagombe, omukono gwange gulibaggyayo; ne bwe balyambuka mu ggulu, nayo ndibawanulayo;" 
Amos9:3 ne bwe balyekukuma ku ntikko ya Karumeli, ndibanoonyaayo ne mbakwatirayo; ne bwe balinneekweka ku ntobo y'ennyanja, ndiragira ssessota n'ababojjerayo." 
Amos9:4 Ne bwe baliwaŋŋangusibwa abalabe baabwe, ndiragira ekitala ne kibattirayo. Ndibasimbako amaaso gange lwa bubi, si lwa bulungi.”" 
Amos9:5 Omukama Katonda w'Amagye, akwata ku nsi n'esaanuuka, bonna abasulamu ne bakuba ebiwoobe, ensi yonna n'etumbiira nga Kiyira, ate n'ekka nga Kiyira w'e Misiri," 
Amos9:6 oyo azimba olubiri lwe eyo mu ggulu, emisingi gyalwo n'agisimba ku nsi, ayitayo amazzi g'ennyanja n'agayiwa ku lukalu, Omukama lye linnya lye." 
Amos9:7 “Abayisirayeli, ku nze temuli ng'Abakuusi?” Omukama y'agamba, “Si nze naggya Yisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri, n'Abafilisitiini ne mbaggya e Kafutori, n'Abasiriya ne mbaggya e Kiri?" 
Amos9:8 Kati amaaso g'Omukama Katonda gali ku bwakabaka obwonoonyi; nzija kubumalawo ku nsi, naye sijja kusaanyizaawo ddala nnyumba ya Yakobo.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Amos9:9 “Nzija kulagira ennyumba ya Yisirayeli ngikunkumule mu mawanga gonna, ng'eŋŋano bw'ewewerwa mu lugali; tewaliba kayinja kagwa ku ttaka." 
Amos9:10 Aboonoonyi bonna mu bantu bange balittibwa n'ekitala, abo bonna abagamba nti: ‘Akacwano tekalitusemberera yadde okututuukirira.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 “Ku olwo ndiyimusa ensiisira ya Dawudi eyagwa, ndiziba awaabomolwa, era ndiddaabiriza ebifulukwa byayo; ndigizimba n'eddawo nga bwe yali edda," 
Amos9:12 basobole okutwala abasigaddewo mu Edomu n'amawanga gonna agayitibwa erinnya lyange.” Omukama y'agamba akola kino. 
Amos9:13 “Ennaku zituuse,” Omukama y'agamba, “akabala asangibwe akesa, n'asiga asangibwe omusogozi w'emizabbibu. Ensozi zijja kukulukuta omubisi gw'emizabbibu, n'obusozi bwonna butonnyolokoke evviini." 
Amos9:14 Ndikomyawo abasibe b'abantu bange Yisirayeli, balizimba buto ebibuga byabwe ebyayonoonebwa, era balibibeeramu; balisimba emizabbibu ne baginywako omwenge, balirima ennimiro ne balya ebibala byazo." 
Amos9:15 Nzija kubasimba ku ttaka lyabwe; tebaliddayo kusimbulibwa mu nsi yaabwe gye nabawa.” Omukama Katonda wo y'agamba. 
Obadiah1:1 Okulabikirwa kwa Obadiya: Tufunye obubaka okuva ew'Omukama, omubaka abusindise eri amawanga nti: “Musituke, tulumbe, tumulwanyise.” Kino Omukama Katonda ky'agamba ku Edomu:" 
Obadiah1:2 “Laba, nzija kukutoowaza mu mawanga, ojja kunyoomebwa nnyo." 
Obadiah1:3 Amalala g'omutima gwo gakulimbye, ggwe asula mu mpampagama z'olwazi, ekisulo kyo ekiwanike waggulu, agamba mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Ani alimpanulayo n'ankuba ku ttaka?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Ne bw'otumbiira ng'empungu, n'ozimba ekisu kyo mu mmunyeenye, era ndikuwanulayo.” Omukama y'agamba." 
Obadiah1:5 “Singa ababbi baakuyingirira, oba abanyazi ekiro, nga wandisaanyiziddwawo! Tebandibbye ne bennyula? Singa abanozi b'emizabbibu bajja gy'oli, tebandirese ebirimba bitono?" 
Obadiah1:6 Ezawu nga bamwayizza! Obugagga bwe obukusike nga babunyaze! 
Obadiah1:7 Banno bwe mukkaanya balikusindikiriza okutuuka ku nsalo; bagenda kukulimba bakumale amaanyi; mikwano gyo be weesiga bakuteze omutego, ate ggwe tonnakitegeera." 
Obadiah1:8 “Ku olwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “sirisaanyaawo abagezi b'omu Edomu, n'abategeevu ku lusozi lwa Ezawu?" 
Obadiah1:9 Abatabaazi bo balitekemuka, wattu Temani; abantu bonna obutasigalawo n'omu balisanjagibwa ku lusozi lwa Ezawu." 
Obadiah1:10 Olw'ettemu lye wakolera muganda wo Yakobo, ensonyi kyeziriva zikubikka; olizikirizibwa emirembe gyonna." 
Obadiah1:11 “Ku luli lwe weerimba ku bbali ng'abagwira banyaga obugagga bwe, abagwira ne bayingira mu miryango gye, Yeruzaalemu ne bamukubako akalulu, wali ng'omu ku bo." 
Obadiah1:12 Tewanditunuulidde butunuulizi otyo muganda wo ku lunaku lw'obulemu bwe; tewandisanyuse lwa bantu ba Yuda ku lunaku lw'okuzikirira kwabwe; tewandyenyumirizza mu lunaku lw'obuyinike bwabwe. 
Obadiah1:13 Tewandiyingidde mu miryango gya bantu bange, ku lunaku lw'obuyinike bwe; era tewanditunudde butunuzi otyo ku lunaku lwe yali mu kacwano ku lunaku lw'obuyinike bwabwe; tewandinyaze bintu byabwe ku lunaku lw'obuyinike bwabwe." 
Obadiah1:14 Tewanditeeze mu masaŋŋanzira kutta bantu baabwe abaasigalawo; tewandiwaddeyo bakaawonawo mu bo ku lunaku lwabwe olw'obuyinike. 
Obadiah1:15 “Olunaku lw'Omukama luli kumpi ku lw'amawanga gonna. Nga bwe wakola, naawe bwe kirikukolerwa; ebikolwa byo birikuddira ku mutwe gwo." 
Obadiah1:16 Nga bwe mwanywera ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu, n'amawanga gonna bwe galinywa obutasalako. Balinywa ne bamira bugobo, ne baba ng'abatabeerangawo." 
Obadiah1:17 “Naye ku lusozi Siyoni walibeera abasumattuse; olusozi lulibeera lutukuvu, n'ennyumba ya Yakobo erifuna ebyayo." 
Obadiah1:18 Ennyumba ya Yakobo eriba muliro, n'eya Yozefu, lulimi lwa muliro, yo ennyumba ya Ezawu eriba ssubi; baligiteekera omuliro ne gugisenkenya. Mu nnyumba ya Ezawu temuliba awona.” Omukama y'ayogera." 
Obadiah1:19 Ab'omu Negevu balitwala olusozi lwa Ezawu; abantu b'omu Sefela baliwamba ensi y'Abafilisitiini, balyetwalira ensi ya Efurayimu n'ensi ya Samariya; Benyamiini alitwala Gileyaadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Eggye ly'Abayisirayeli abawaŋŋangusibwa eriri mu Kanaani lirirya ensi okutuukira ddala e Zarefati; n'abawaŋŋangusibwa b'omu Yeruzaalemu abali e Sefaradi balitwala ebibuga by'omu Negevu. 
Obadiah1:21 Abanunuzi balyambuka ku lusozi Siyoni okufuga olusozi lwa Ezawu. Obwakabaka buliba bwa Mukama. 
Jonah1:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yona mutabani wa Amittayi nti: 
Jonah1:2 “Situka ogende mu kibuga ekikulu Nineve, oyigirize ng'okinenya, kubanga obugwenyufu bwakyo butuuse mu maaso gange.”" 
Jonah1:3 Naye Yona n'asituka agende e Tarusisi adduke Omukama. N'aserengeta e Yoppa, gye yasanga eryato eryali liraga e Tarusisi; n'asasula ebisale, n'alinnya eryato asaabale nabo agende e Tarusisi adduke Omukama." 
Jonah1:4 Naye Omukama n'akunsa empewo nnyingi omuyaga ogw'amaanyi ne gusituka ku nnyanja, eryato ne libula okumenyekamu." 
Jonah1:5 Abavuzi baalyo ne batya, buli omu n'alaajanira lubaale we; ne basuula mu nnyanja emigugu bawewule ku lyato. Ye Yona yali aserengese wansi mu lyato, bwe yagalamira ne yeebakira ddala." 
Jonah1:6 Omugoba w'eryato n'ajja gy'ali n'amugamba nti: “Oli mu kwebaka bwebasi? Golokoka okowoole lubaale wo, oboolyawo anaatufaako ne tutasaanawo.”" 
Jonah1:7 Awo ne bagambagana nti: “Mujje tukube akalulu, tutegeere ani atuviiriddeko akabi kano.” Ne bakuba akalulu ne kagwa ku Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Ne bamugamba nti: “Okola mulimu ki? Ova wa? Ova mu nsi ki? Oli wa ggwanga ki?” 
Jonah1:9 N'abaddamu nti: “Ndi Mwebureeyi, nsinza Mukama, Katonda w'eggulu, eyakola ennyanja n'olukalu.”" 
Jonah1:10 Abasajja ne batya nnyo, ne bamubuuza nti: “Kiki ky'okoze?” Kubanga baali bategedde ng'adduka Mukama, kubanga yali ababuuliddeko." 
Jonah1:11 Ennyanja yali yeeyongera kusiikuuka; ne bamubuuza nti: “Tukukole ki ennyanja etuyambe eraale?” 
Jonah1:12 N'abagamba nti: “Munsitule, munsuule mu nnyanja, ennyanja ejja kulaala; mmanyi ng'omuyaga omungi guti gubajjidde lwa kubeera nze.”" 
Jonah1:13 Naye abagoba ne banyiikira okuvuga nga badda ku ttale, kyokka ne balemwa, kubanga ennyanja yali yeeyongera bweyongezi kubeesikuulira." 
Jonah1:14 Awo ne bakoowoola Katonda, ne bagamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, tukwegayiridde, totuzikiriza olw'okubeera omuntu ono, totuvunaana musaayi gw'ataliiko musango, kubanga ggwe, ayi Katonda, okoze nga bw'osiimye.”" 
Jonah1:15 Awo ne bakwata Yona ne bamukasuka mu nnyanja; ennyanja n'ekomya obusungu bwayo. 
Jonah1:16 Abasajja ne batya nnyo Omukama, ne bamutambirira ebitambiro, ne bakuba n'obweyamo." 
Jonah2:1 Omukama n'ategeka ekyennyanja ekinene kimire Yona. Yona n'amala mu lubuto lw'ekyennyanja ennaku ssatu n'ebiro bisatu. 
Jonah2:2 Awo Yona ne yeegayirira Omukama Katonda we ng'ayima mu lubuto lw'ekyennyanja, n'agamba nti:" 
Jonah2:3 “Mu nnaku zange nakoowoola Omukama, n'annyanukula. Nayima mu lubuto lw'emagombe ne mpanjaga, n'owulira eddoboozi lyange." 
Jonah2:4 Wankasuka mu ddubi, mu buziba bw'ennyanja; engezi n'enneebungulula, amayengo go n'amasingiisira go ne gambikka." 
Jonah2:5 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ngobeddwa mu maaso go, ndiddamu ntya okulaba Ekiggwa kyo ekitukuvu?’" 
Jonah2:6 Amazzi ganneebungulula ne gantuukira ddala mu bulago; eddubi lyanneetooloola, endago zanneezingirira ku mutwe." 
Jonah2:7 Nakkirira ku ntobo z'ensozi, emiyingo gy'ensi ne ginzigalira emirembe gyonna. Naye obulamu bwange n'obuggya mu bunnya, ayi Mukama Katonda wange." 
Jonah2:8 Omwoyo gwange bwe gwali gunnyenjebuse, ne nkujjukira, ayi Mukama; essaala yange n'eyambuka gy'oli, mu Kiggwa kyo ekitukuvu." 
Jonah2:9 “Abo abeesiba ku bitaliimu, balekerera ekisa ekyandibagiriddwa." 
Jonah2:10 Naye nze nzija kutambira ekitambiro n'oluyimba olw'okwebaza; bye neetemye nzija kubituusa. Okulokola kuva eri Mukama.” 
Jonah2:11 Awo Omukama n'alagira ekyennyanja, ne kisesema Yona ku lukalu." 
Jonah3:1 Ate ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yona ogwokubiri nti: 
Jonah3:2 “Situka ogende mu kibuga ekikulu Nineve olangirireyo obubaka bwe nkugamba.” 
Jonah3:3 Yona n'asituka n'alaga e Nineve ng'Omukama bwe yali amugambye. Nineve nno kyali kibuga kinene, nga kitwala ennaku ssatu okukiyitamu." 
Jonah3:4 Yona n'atandika okuyingira mu kibuga, n'atambulako olugendo lwa lunaku lumu. N'alangirira nti: “Esigadde ennaku ana zokka, olwo Nineve kizikirire.”" 
Jonah3:5 Abantu b'e Nineve ne bakkiriza Katonda; ne balangirira ekisiibo; bonna, okuva ku asinga ekitiibwa okutuuka ku asembayo, ne bambala ebikutiya." 
Jonah3:6 Amawulire bwe gaatuuka ku kabaka w'e Nineve, n'ava ku nnamulondo ye, n'aggyako omunagiro gwe ogw'ekitiibwa, n'ayambala ekikutiya, n'atuula mu vvu." 
Jonah3:7 Awo n'alangirira, n'agamba wonna mu Nineve nti: “Okusinziira ku kiragiro kya kabaka n'abakungu: Temukkiriza muntu yenna oba ensolo, ente oba endiga kukomba ku kantu; tebirya yadde okunywa." 
Jonah3:8 Wabula abantu bambazibwe n'ensolo zibikkibwe ebikutiya. Buli muntu awanjagire Katonda n'amaanyi ge gonna. Buli omu ave mu makubo ge amabi, yeemansule n'ebikolwa bye eby'obukambwe." 
Jonah3:9 Ani amanyi? Katonda yandyeddamu n'atusonyiwa, n'aleka obusungu bwe obwesera, ne tuwona ne tutazikirira!”" 
Jonah3:10 Katonda bwe y'alaba bwe baakola, nga bavudde mu makubo gaabwe amabi, ne yeddamu ku kabi ke yali agambye okubakola, n'atakakola." 
Jonah4:1 Naye Yona n'anyiiga nnyo, n'asunguwala." 
Jonah4:2 Ne yeegayirira Omukama nti: “Ayi Mukama, ekyo si kye nagamba nga nkyali eka? Kyennava nnyanguwa okuddukira e Tarusisi. Namanya nga ggwe oli Katonda omusaasizi era ow'ekisa, atasunguwala mangu, ajjudde okwagala, ayeddamu n'atakola kabi." 
Jonah4:3 Kale nno, ayi Mukama, obulamu bwange butwale; waakiri nfe okusinga okuba omulamu.”" 
Jonah4:4 Omukama n'amuddamu nti: “Olowooza ng'oli mutuufu okusunguwala?” 
Jonah4:5 Awo Yona n'afuluma n'agenda atuula ku luuyi lw'ekibuga olw'ebuvanjuba. Ne yeekolera awo akasiisira, n'atuula omwo mu kisiikirize kyakyo, n'atunula alabe ekinaatuukirira ekibuga." 
Jonah4:6 Omukama Katonda n'asibusa omusogasoga, ne guwanvuwa waggulu ku Yona gusiikirize omutwe gwe, gumuwonye muli obuteeyagala. Yona n'asanyukira nnyo omusogasoga ogwo." 
Jonah4:7 Naye enkeera mmambya ng'asala, Katonda n'ategeka envunyu, n'erya omusogasoga ne guwotoka." 
Jonah4:8 Enjuba bwe yavaayo, Katonda n'asindika empewo ey'ebuvanjuba eyokya; enjuba n'eyokya Yona omutwe, n'ayenjebuka. Ne yeesabira okufa, n'agamba nti: “Waakiri nfe okusinga okuba omulamu.”" 
Jonah4:9 Katonda n'agamba Yona nti: “Olowooza oli mutuufu okusunguwalira omusogasoga?” N'ayanukula nti: “Ndi mutuufu okusunguwala n'okutuusa okufa.” 
Jonah4:10 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Ggwe olumirwa omusogasoga gw'otaateganira n'akamu yadde okukuza. Gwalokera mu kiro kimu ne gufiira mu kiro kimu. 
Jonah4:11 Naye nze sandirumiriddwa Nineve ekibuga kino ekikulu, omusula abantu abasukka mu kasiriivu mu emitwalo ebiri, abatasobola kwawula mukono gwabwe ogwa ddyo ku gwa kkono, nga kw'ogasse n'ebisolo enkumu?”" 
Micah1:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Mika ow'e Moreseti mu mirembe gya bakabaka ba Yuda: Yotamu, Akazi ne Kezekiya, kye yawulira bwe yalabikirwa ku Samariya ne ku Yeruzaalemu." 
Micah1:2 Muwulire, mmwe amawanga mwenna, mutegereze, ggwe ensi na bonna abagirimu, Omukama Katonda y'aba abalumiriza, Omukama ng'ayima mu Kiggwa kye ekitukuvu." 
Micah1:3 Wuuyo Omukama ajja ng'ava mu kifo kye, akkirira, alinnyirira ebifo ebigulumivu eby'ensi." 
Micah1:4 Ensozi wansi we zisaanuuka, ebiwonvu biryebukamu ng'envumbo awali omuliro, ng'amazzi agakkirira akaserengeto." 
Micah1:5 Ebyo byonna bya kubaawo olw'omusango gwa Yakobo n'ebibi by'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli. Omusango gwa Yakobo guluwa? Si Samariya? Ate omusango gwa Yuda guluwa? Si Yeruzaalemu? 
Micah1:6 “Samariya ndikifuula kifulukwa, nnimiro awasimbibwa emizabbibu. Amayinja gaakyo ndigayiringisiza mu kiwonvu, emisingi gyakyo ne ngireka nga myereere." 
Micah1:7 Ebifaananyi byakyo byonna ebya balubaale biriseseggulwa, empeera yaakyo yonna eryokebwa omuliro, ebifaananyi byakyo byonna ebya balubaale ndibizikiriza; kubanga kyekuŋŋaanyizanga empeera mu bwamalaaya, empeera gye baggya mu bwamalaaya gye bajja okubeera.”" 
Micah1:8 Kyendiva nkungubaga ne nkuba ebiwoobe, ne ntambuza bigere bikalu nga ndi bwereere, ne mpowoola ng'ekibe, ne mpunuuna ng'ekiwuugulu." 
Micah1:9 Kubanga ekiwundu kye si kya kuwona, kituuse ne ku Yuda, kituukidde ddala ku mulyango gw'abantu bange, ku Yeruzaalemu kwennyini." 
Micah1:10 Temukirangirira mu Gati, temukaaba maziga; mu Beti-Ofura mwevulunge mu nfuufu." 
Micah1:11 Abatuuze b'omu Safiri, muyiteewo nga muli busa nga n'ensonyi zibatta; abasula mu Zaanani, tebafulumanga; Beti-Yezeli ali mu kukuba biwoobe, akuggyeko obukuumi bwe." 
Micah1:12 Abasula mu Meroti bakabirirwa nga beesunga ekirungi, kubanga akabi kakkiridde nga kava ew'Omukama ne katuuka ne ku mulyango gwa Yeruzaalemu." 
Micah1:13 Abasula mu Lakisi, embalaasi muzisibe ku bigaali. Mmwe mwali entandikwa y'ekibi kya muwala wa Siyoni, kubanga emisango gya Yisirayeli gyasangibwa mu ggwe." 
Micah1:14 Kyoliva owaayo omutwalo olwa Moreseti-Gati. Ennyumba ya Akuzibu eriba kiguumaaza eri bakabaka ba Yisirayeli. 
Micah1:15 Mmwe abasula mu Maresa, ndibawendulira anaabawangula, oyo ekitiibwa kya Yisirayeli alijja e Adullamu." 
Micah1:16 Muwalakate emitwe gyammwe, musale enviiri; olw'abaana abaali essanyu lyammwe; mwemwe ebiwalaata ng'ensega, kubanga bajja kubavaako bagende mu busibe." 
Micah2:1 Zibasanze abalowoolereza obubi, abateesa eby'obukambwe nga bali mu bitanda byabwe! Bwe bukya ne bakikola, kubanga balina obuyinza okukituukiriza." 
Micah2:2 Beegomba ennimiro, ne baziwamba; beegomba amayumba ne bagatwala; banyakulako omuntu ennyumba ye, ne bantu bannaabwe, obusika bwabwe." 
Micah2:3 Omukama kyava agamba nti: “Nteesa okukolera ennyumba eno akabi, ke mutaasobole kununulamu nsingo zammwe. Temulitambuza malala, kubanga obudde buliba bwa kacwano." 
Micah2:4 Ku olwo balibayisaako olugero, balibakiina mu nnyimba zaabwe ezikungubaga nti: ‘Tusigalidde ddala ttayo, omugabo gw'abantu bange agugabanyizzaamu, laba bw'agunzigyeeko! Ennimiro zaffe laba bw'azigabudde abajeemu.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Mu lukuŋŋaana lw'Omukama kyoliva obulwamu akuwa akalulu osalirweko ennimiro. 
Micah2:6 “Temuyigiriza,” bwe batyo bwe bayigiriza, “temuyigiriza ku bino, okuswala tekulitugwira.”" 
Micah2:7 Kino kyandyogeddwa, wattu nnyumba ya Yakobo: nti: “Mwoyo w'Omukama takyagumiikiriza? Y'akola bino?” “Ebigambo byange tebikolera bulungi oyo atambula obutereevu?" 
Micah2:8 Mmwe mulumba abantu bange kyenkana ng'omulabe wammwe; aba yeetambulira agage mumukwakkulako omunagiro gwe, aba mu ddembe lye mumuyisa ng'omusibe w'omu lutalo." 
Micah2:9 Abakazi b'abantu bange mubagoba mu nnyumba ze beesiimiramu, n'abaana baabwe ne mubaggyako ekitiibwa kyabwe emirembe gyonna." 
Micah2:10 Musituke, mugende! Wano tewali buwummuliro, kubanga kyayonooneka, kyafaafaagana; kyazikirizibwa obutazzikawo." 
Micah2:11 Singa omuntu ajja ng'ayogera bya mpewo na bulimba nti: ‘Nzija kulanga gye muli evviini n'omwenge,’ oyo ye yandibadde omulanzi w'abantu bano." 
Micah2:12 “Nzija kukukuŋŋaanya wenna, ggwe Yakobo; nzija kuleeta wamu abasigaddewo mu Yisirayeli; nzija kubaleeta wamu ng'endiga mu kisibo, ng'eggana mu ddundiro lyalyo; ebbiina eriwuuma olw'obungi bw'abantu." 
Micah2:13 Abaggulirawo ekkubo n'ayambuka ng'abakulembedde, balifubutuka ne bayita mu mulyango, balifulumira mu gwo. Kabaka waabwe aliyitawo ng'abakulembeddemu, Omukama nga y'abali mu maaso.”" 
Micah3:1 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Muwulire mmwe, abafuzi b'ennyumba ya Yakobo, mmwe abakungu b'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli. Si mmwe mwandimanye ennunula entuufu," 
Micah3:2 mmwe abakyawa ekirungi ne mwagala ekibi, mmwe abasusumbula ensusu ku bantu bange, n'ennyama yaabwe ne mugiryako ku magumba gaabwe;" 
Micah3:3 mmwe abalya ennyama y'abantu bange, ne mubabaagako enkuta, n'amagumba gaabwe ne mugamenyaamenya; mmwe abatemaatema ebifi ng'ennyama ey'omu ntamu, ng'ennyama ey'omu nsaka?”" 
Micah3:4 Omukama balimulaajanira, naye talibaanukula. Ku olwo alibakweka amaaso ge, olw'okubeera ebibi byabwe bye baakola." 
Micah3:5 Omukama kino ky'agamba ku balanzi abawubisa abantu bange: “Bwe babaako n'ekyokulya, bagamba nti ‘Mirembe,’ naye oli bw'atabassa kantu mu kamwa, bamuggulako lutalo." 
Micah3:6 Awo nno ekiro kiribakwatiriza nga temulabikiddwa, n'ekizikiza, nga temulaguddwa. Enjuba erizaamira abalanzi, n'olunaku lulibafuukira enzikiza." 
Micah3:7 Olwo abalabi balikwatibwa ensonyi, n'abalaguzi baliswala; bonna balyebikka ku maaso gaabwe, kubanga Katonda takyayanukula.”" 
Micah3:8 Naye nze nzijudde amaanyi, nzijudde Mwoyo wa Katonda, n'obutuufu n'amaanyi, okubuulira Yakobo omusango gwe ne Yisirayeli ekibi kye." 
Micah3:9 Kale nno mmwe abakungu ab'omu nnyumba ya Yakobo, mmwe abafuzi ab'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, muwulire kino: mmwe abeenyinyala obutuufu ne mukyamya buli kituufu;" 
Micah3:10 mmwe abazimbira Siyoni ku kuyiwa omusaayi, ne Yeruzaalemu ku kukola obubi." 
Micah3:11 Abakungu baakyo balamulira nguzi: bakabona baakyo bayigiriza lwa mpeera; n'abalanzi balagulira ssente. Sso ate beeyinula Omukama ne bagamba nti: “Omukama tali mu makkati gaffe? Akabi tekasobola kututuukako.” 
Micah3:12 Kale nno olw'okubeera mmwe, Siyoni alikabalwa ng'ennimiro, Yeruzaalemu alifuuka kifulukwa, n'olusozi lw'Ekiggwa, ntuumu okumeze ekibira." 
Micah4:1 Mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma, olusozi lw'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama lulissibwawo nga lutikko mu nsozi zonna; luligulumizibwa ne lulengezza obusozi; abantu balikuluggukira gye luli." 
Micah4:2 Amawanga mangi galijja, ne bagamba nti: “Mujje twambuke ku lusozi lw'Omukama, eri Ekiggwa kya Katonda wa Yakobo, atuyigirize amakubo ge, tutambulire mu bukubo bwe. Kubanga etteeka liriva mu Siyoni, n'ekigambo ky'Omukama kiriva mu Yeruzaalemu.”" 
Micah4:3 Aliramula abantu bangi; alisalirawo amawanga ag'amaanyi ag'ewala eyo; ebitala byabwe balibiweesaamu enkumbi, n'amafumu baligawesaamu ebiwabyo. Eggwanga teririgalulira ggwanga linnaalyo kitala, era tebaliddayo kuyiga bya ntalo." 
Micah4:4 Buli omu alituula wansi w'omuzabbibu gwe ne wansi w'omukunyu gwe; tewalibaawo abakanga, kubanga akamwa k'Omukama w'Amagye koogedde." 
Micah4:5 Buli ggwanga liritambulira mu linnya lya lubaale waalyo, naye ffe tulitambulira mu linnya lya Mukama Katonda waffe emirembe n'emirembe." 
Micah4:6 “Ku olwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “ndikuŋŋaanya ennema, eziwabye ndizizza, ne ze nali ndabizza ennaku." 
Micah4:7 Ennema ndizifuulamu abaasigalawo, n'ezo ezaagobwa, eggwanga ery'amaanyi. Omukama alibafuga ng'ayima ku lusozi Siyoni, okuva ku olwo n'emirembe gyonna." 
Micah4:8 Kati ggwe, munaala gw'eggana, akasozi ka muwala wa Siyoni, obuyinza obwasooka bulikuddizibwa, obwakabaka buliddira muwala wa Yeruzaalemu.”" 
Micah4:9 Kati lwaki okuba ebiwoobe bityo? Mu ggwe temuli kabaka? Akuwa ku magezi yazaawa. Okulumwa kyekuvudde kukukwata ng'omukazi azaala? 
Micah4:10 Weenyoole mu bulumi, muwala wa Siyoni, ng'obw'omukazi azaala, kubanga kati otuuse okuva mu kibuga, ogende osule ku ttale; ojja kugenda e Babiloni; eyo gy'oliwonyezebwa, eyo Omukama gy'alikununulira okuva mu mikono gy'abalabe bo." 
Micah4:11 Gaago nno amawanga mangi gakukuŋŋaaniddeko, gagamba nti: “Agwagwawaziddwa, amaaso gaffe geerolere Siyoni.”" 
Micah4:12 Kubanga bo bennyini tebaamanya birowoozo bya Mukama, tebaategeera ntegeka ze, oyo abakuŋŋaanya ng'emiganda gy'eŋŋano mu gguuliro." 
Micah4:13 “Situka, muwala wa Siyoni, wuula! Kubanga ejjembe lyo nzija kulifuula lya kyuma, n'ebinuulo byo, bya kikomo, ojja kubetenta amawanga mangi. Bye baanyaga olibiwongera Omukama, n'eby'obugagga bwabwe, Omukama w'ensi yonna.”" 
Micah4:14 Nnyweza bbugwe wo, wattu ekibuga ekibugirize, kubanga tuzindiddwa. Balikuba omufuzi wa Yisirayeli ku ttama n'oluga." 
Micah5:1 “Naawe Beteleemu Efurata, asembayo obutono mu bika bya Yuda, mu ggwe mwe mulinviira ow'okufuga mu Yisirayeli. Ensibuko ye eri eyo mu mirembe egy'edda, mu nnaku eza ddi na ddi.”" 
Micah5:2 Olw'okubeera ekyo Omukama alibaabuliramu akabanga, okutuusa oyo ali olubuto lw'alizaala. Olwo abasigaddewo mu baganda be balidda eri Abayisirayeli." 
Micah5:3 Aliyimirira n'alunda eggana lye mu maanyi g'Omukama, mu bukulu bw'erinnya ly'Omukama Katonda we; olwo balituula ntende, kubanga olwo aliba mukulu okutuuka ku nkingi z'ensi." 
Micah5:4 Y'aliba eddembe. Assuri bw'alizinda ensi yaffe, bw'alisambirira embiri zaffe, tulimusitulira abasumba musanvu okumulwanyisa, n'abaami munaana ab'abantu." 
Micah5:5 Balifuga ensi ya Assuri n'ekitala, ensi ya Nimurodi n'ekitala ekisowole. Alitununula mu Bassuri, bw'alijja mu nsi yaffe, bwalirinnya ekigere kye mu kitundu kyaffe." 
Micah5:6 Abaasigalawo mu Yakobo baliba wakati w'abantu enkumu, ng'omusulo oguva ew'Omukama, ng'oluwandaggirize ku bimera ebitalinda muntu, ebitalwa lwa baana ba bantu." 
Micah5:7 Abaasigalawo mu Yakobo baliba wakati mu mawanga, wakati mu bantu abangi; baliba ng'empologoma wakati mu bisolo by'omu bibira, ng'omwana gw'empologoma mu ggana ly'endiga, ogulinnyirira nga bwe gugenda, oguyuzaayuza obulere nga tewakyali asobola kutaasa." 
Micah5:8 Omukono guliwanikibwa ku balabe bo, abakukyawa bonna balikutulwako." 
Micah5:9 “Ku olwo,” Omukama y'agamba, “embalaasi zo ndizizikiriza mu ggwe, n'ensaanyaawo ebigaali byo." 
Micah5:10 Ndizikiriza ebibuga by'ensi yo, ndimenyawo ebigo byo byonna." 
Micah5:11 Eby'obulogo ndibiggya mu mikono gyo, toliddamu kubeera na balaguzi." 
Micah5:12 Ndizikiriza ebifaananyi byo ebya balubaale n'empagi zo emponge ndizikusimbulamu; toliddayo kuvunnamira mikono gyo bye gikoze. 
Micah5:13 Empagi za Asera nzija kuzikuulamu n'ebibuga byo mbizikirize. 
Micah5:14 Ndiwoolera eggwanga mu busungu n'obukambwe ku mawanga agaagaana okuwulira.” 
Micah6:1 Muwulire Omukama ky'agamba; situka owe empoza yo mu maaso g'ensozi, ka obusozi buwulire eddoboozi lyo." 
Micah6:2 Mmwe ensozi, muwulire Omukama ky'avunaana; tega okutu, ggwe omusingi gw'ensi ogw'edda n'edda, kubanga Omukama alina ky'avunaana abantu be, ajja kuwoza ne Yisirayeli:" 
Micah6:3 “Bantu bange, kiki kye nabakola? Nabakooya mu ki? Munnyanukule." 
Micah6:4 Nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne mbanunula mu nnyumba y'obuddu. Ne mbatumira Musa abakulembere, ne Aroni ne Miriyamu." 
Micah6:5 Bantu bange, mujjukire Balaki kabaka wa Mowabu bye yateesa, ne Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori bye yayanukula, n'ebyagwawo okuva e Sittimu okutuuka e Gilugali, mulyoke mutegeere ebikolwa by'Omukama eby'obutuukirivu bwe.”" 
Micah6:6 Najja na ki mu maaso g'Omukama, ne nvunnama mu maaso ga Katonda Asukkulumye? Ŋŋende mu maaso ge n'ebitambiro ebyokye? Na buyana bwa mwaka gumu?" 
Micah6:7 Omukama anaasiima olukumi lw'endiga ennume, oba akakumi k'emigga gy'omuzigo? Ntambire omuggulanda wange olw'ebibi byange, omwana gwe neezaalidde, olw'emisango gyange?" 
Micah6:8 Muntu ggwe, akulaze ekirungi bwe kiba; Omukama kino ky'akusaba, kino kyokka: Okubeera abatuufu, Okwagala ekisa, n'okutambula n'Omukama mu bwetoowaze." 
Micah6:9 Eddoboozi ly'Omukama likoowoola ekibuga, - kya mukisa mulungi okutya erinnya lyo – nti: “Muwulire, mmwe ebika n'ekibiina ky'omu kibuga." 
Micah6:10 Mulowooza nsobola okwerabira obugagga obunyage obuli mu nnyumba embi, n'efa enkendeezeko envumirire?" 
Micah6:11 Nsonyiwe omuntu owa minzaani enkyamu, ow'ensawo ejjudde ebipimo eby'obulimba?" 
Micah6:12 Kubanga abagagga baamu balyakuzi, n'abantu baayo balimba, ne mu kamwa kaabwe ennimi zaabwe zisalaganya." 
Micah6:13 N'olw'ekyo nno ntandise okukukuba n'okukuzikiriza olw'ebibi byo. 
Micah6:14 Olirya, naye tolikkuta; olubuto lwo lunaasigalanga nga luyala; oliterekanga, naye tolibaako ky'owonyaawo, kubanga ky'oliba owonyezzaawo ndikiwaayo eri ekitala." 
Micah6:15 Olisiga, naye tolikungula; olikamula oliva, naye omuzigo toligusaaba; olisogola emizabbibu, naye tolinywa ku vviini." 
Micah6:16 Mukutte amateeka ga Omuri, n'enkola yonna ey'ennyumba ya Akabu; mugoberedde enteesa zaabwe, kyennaava nkuleka n'ofuuka amatongo, n'abantu bo ne bafuuka ekinyoomebwa; ojja kwetikka ejjoogo ly'amawanga.”" 
Micah7:1 Zinsanze! Anti nfuuse ng'akungula ebibala eby'ekyeya, ng'omunozi w'emizabbibu. Teri kirimba kya kulyako, yadde entontogolo z'emikunyu ezisooka ze njoya." 
Micah7:2 Mu nsi mubuzeemu abalungi; temukyali mutuufu n'omu. Bonna bateegeredde kuyiwa musaayi; buli omu ayigga munne n'ekitimba. 
Micah7:3 Emikono gyabwe gyombi gyetegekedde kukola kabi; omufuzi aliko ky'asabayo, n'omulamuzi akkiriza enguzi, n'ali mu buyinza alagira nga bw'ayagala; bonna beekobaanidde wamu." 
Micah7:4 Abasingamu obulungi ali nga kirobo, abasingamu obutuufu ali ng'olukomera olw'amaggwa. Lwe lunaku lw'abakuumi baabwe, olunaku lw'okubonerezebwa kwo lutuuse; ke kadde batabuketabuke." 
Micah7:5 Teweesiganga muliraanwawo; tossanga bwesige mu mukwano gwo; ne bw'aba mukazi eyeebaka mu mikono gyo, weegenderezanga ebigambo by'akamwa ko." 
Micah7:6 Kubanga omwana ow'obulenzi anyooma kitaawe, n'ow'obuwala asitukira mu nnyina, mukaamwana ayimukira mu nnyazaala we; abalabe b'omuntu be bantu ab'ennyumba ye." 
Micah7:7 Naye nze nnindirira n'essuubi Omukama, nnindirira Katonda Omulokozi wange, Katonda wange anampulira." 
Micah7:8 Ggwe omulabe wange, tosanyukira nnaku yange; lwa kugwa, naye ndiddawo; lwa kutuula mu nzikiza, naye Omukama y'aliba ekitangaala kyange." 
Micah7:9 Nzija kugumiikiriza obusungu bw'Omukama, kubanga namusobya, okutuusa lw'aliramula ensonga zange, n'annejjeereza. Alinfulumya mu kitangaala, ndiraba obutuukirivu bwe." 
Micah7:10 Olwo omulabe wange aliraba, alijjula ensonyi, oyo eyankiinanga nti: “Omukama Katonda wo ali ludda wa?” Amaaso gange galimutunuulira, ku luno nga bw'alirinnyirirwa ng'ebitoomi by'omu nguudo." 
Micah7:11 Olunaku olw'okuzimba bbugwe wo. Ku olwo ensalo zo zirigaziyizibwa. 
Micah7:12 Ku olwo balijja gy'oli okuva mu Assuri okutuuka e Misiri, n'okuva mu Misiri okutuuka ku Mugga, n'okuva ku nnyanja okutuuka ku nnyanja, n'okuva ku lusozi okutuuka ku lusozi." 
Micah7:13 Ensi erifuuka eddungu olw'okubeera abagisulamu, nga kye kibala ky'ebikolwa byabwe." 
Micah7:14 Abantu bo balunde n'omuggo gwo, eggana ly'obusika bwo, abali eyo bokka mu kibira, wakati mu nsi ey'ennimiro; balundire e Basani n'e Gileyaadi nga mu nnaku ez'edda." 
Micah7:15 Nga luli lwe wava e Misiri, tulage ebyewuunyisa byo." 
Micah7:16 Amawanga galiraba ne gaswala yadde ne ku maanyi gaabwe ago gonna; balikwata ku mumwa, amatu gaabwe galiziba." 
Micah7:17 Balikomba enfuufu ng'omusota, ng'ebyewalula ku ttaka. Baliva mu mikwesese gyabwe nga bakankana; balidda eri Omukama Katonda waffe mu kutya; balikutya." 
Micah7:18 Katonda, ani akwenkana, ggwe asonyiwa ekibi, ab'obusika bwo abaasigalawo n'obasonyiwa emisango? Tosunguwala bbanga lyonna, naye osanyukira mu kulaga ekisa." 
Micah7:19 Oliddamu n'otusaasira, olirinnyirira ebibi byaffe, ebyonoono byaffe byonna olibikanyuga mu ddubi mu nnyanja." 
Micah7:20 Oliba mwesigwa eri Yakobo, ne Yiburayimu n'omulaga ekisa nga bwe walayirira bajjajjaffe okuva edda n'edda." 
Nahum1:1 Obubaka ku Nineve. Ekitabo ky'okulabikirwa kwa Nakumu ow'e Elukosi. 
Nahum1:2 Omukama Katonda wa buggya, awoolera eggwanga; Omukama awoolera eggwanga, wa busungu; Omukama awoolera eggwanga ku bamukyawa, asibira obusungu abalabe be." 
Nahum1:3 Omukama tasunguwala mangu, wa buyinza bungi; Omukama talireka mubi nga tabonerezeddwa. Ekkubo lye liri mu kibuyaga ne mu kikunta, ebire ye nfuufu y'ebigere bye." 
Nahum1:4 Aboggolera ennyanja n'agikaliza, n'emigga gyonna agikaza. Basani ne Karumeli biyongobedde, n'ebimuli bya Lebanoni biwotose." 
Nahum1:5 Ensozi ziyuuguuma w'ali, n'obusozi buseebengerera; enkulungo y'ensi ekankana mu maaso ge, ensi na bonna abagisulamu." 
Nahum1:6 Ani aligumira obuswandi bwe, alyaŋŋanga obusungu bwe obwesera? Obusungu bwe buyiiyiddwa ng'omuliro; enjazi zisesegguka mu maaso ge." 
Nahum1:7 Omukama mulungi, obuddukiro ku lunaku olw'akabi; afaayo ku abo abasuubira mu ye." 
Nahum1:8 N'omujjuzi ogwaladde alisaanyaawo ababi, aliwondera abalabe be okubatuusiza ddala mu nzikiza." 
Nahum1:9 Nkwe ki ze musalira Omukama? Ajja kutuusa ku nkomerero. Ennaku teesituke buto. 
Nahum1:10 Balyegombeza mu maggwa, ng'abatamiivu abatamidde omwenge gwabwe, balisenkenyezebwa ne baggwaawo ng'essubi ekkalu." 
Nahum1:11 Mu ggwe mwavaamu eyali asalira Omukama enkwe, eyali alowooleza Omukama akabi, eyali ateesa ebibi." 
Nahum1:12 Omukama Katonda kino ky'agamba: “Ne bwe baliba ba maanyi era nga bangi, balikutulwako ne babulawo. Nakulabya ennaku, kyokka siriddamu kuzikulabya." 
Nahum1:13 Kale nno nzija kumenya ekikoligo kyabwe nkikwambule, n'enjegere zo nzikukutuleko.”" 
Nahum1:14 Omukama awadde ku ggwe ekiragiro nti: “Toliba na zadde lya kusikira linnya lyo; nzija kuzikiriza ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebyole n'ebisaanuuse ebiri mu kiggwa kya lubaale wo; nzija kusima entaana yo, kubanga oweebuuse.”" 
Nahum2:1 Ebigere biibyo ku nsozi eby'oyo alangirira amawulire ag'essanyu, alangirira eddembe. Yuda, kuza embaga zo enkulu, bye weetema bituukirize, kubanga ababi tebaliddayo kukulumba, baasaanyiziddwawo ddala." 
Nahum2:2 Anaakuseseggula wuuyo ajja okulumba; kuuma ekigo, weekalirize ekkubo, weesibe onywere, weekembe n'amaanyi gonna." 
Nahum2:3 Omukama ajja kuzzaawo ettendo lya Yakobo libeere ng'erya Yisirayeli, newandibadde ng'abanyazi baabinyagulula, ne boonoona n'emizabbibu gyabwe." 
Nahum2:4 Engabo z'abazira be mmyufu, abatabaazi beekapise mu kasaayi. Ebyuma ku bigaali bye bimyamyansa; ku lunaku lwe bitegekerwa olutalo, n'abeebagazi beetala." 
Nahum2:5 Mu nguudo ebigaali biyirimuka, bidduka bidda eno bidda eri mu makubo; bifaanana ng'ebitawuliro by'omuliro, biyitiŋŋana ng'ebimyanso." 
Nahum2:6 Ayitayo abagabe be, basirittuka nga bagenda; bafubutuka balaga eri bbugwe; manvuuli ey'okubasiikiriza n'essibwawo." 
Nahum2:7 Emiryango gy'emigga gigguddwa; olubiri lutekemuse. 
Nahum2:8 Eyassibwawo ayambuddwa, atwaliddwa; abazaana be basindogoma ng'amayiba, beekuba mu bifuba." 
Nahum2:9 Nineve ali ng'ekidiba ky'amazzi, amazzi gaakyo gakulukuta gagenda; “Muyimirire! Muyimirire!” Naye teri akomawo." 
Nahum2:10 Munyage zaabu, munyage ffeeza; obugagga tebuliiko kkomo, eby'obugagga okuva mu mawanika ge gonna." 
Nahum2:11 Kirekeddwa matongo, kyayiddwa, kizikiriziddwa! Omutima gutekemuse; entegetege zifambye; ebyenda bikankana; amaaso gonna gabapeeruuse." 
Nahum2:12 Enfo y'empologoma eri ludda wa, n'empuku y'ebyana by'empologoma, ensajja n'enkazi n'ebyana byazo gye ziraga awatali azikangako?" 
Nahum2:13 Empologoma yakwata ebinaamala obwana bwayo, n'etugira ne ginnaayo enkazi, n'ejjuza empuku yaazo n'omuyiggo, n'enfo yaazo n'ebitaaguju." 
Nahum2:14 “Nkuli bukiika,” y'agamba Omukama w'Amagye, “ebigaali byo nzija kubyokya bittunke omuliro; n'ekitala kijja kukavvula obuwologoma bwo. Nzija kukusalako omuyiggo gwo ku nsi; eddoboozi ly'ababaka bo terikyaddayo kuwulirwa.”" 
Nahum3:1 Zikusanze ggwe ekibuga eky'omusaayi, ekijjudde obulimba, ekijjudde obunyazi, eky'okwaya okutaliiko kkomo." 
Nahum3:2 Okwesooza kw'obuswanyu, okugolongotana kwa nnamuziga, embalaasi eziguluka n'okupaapiira kw'ebigaali." 
Nahum3:3 Abeebagazi abatala, ebitala ebimyamyansa, amafumu agatemagana! Obuvune bungi n'entuumu z'abafudde; emirambo okutali kkomo, bagenda beesittala ku mirambo!" 
Nahum3:4 Byonna ebyo lwa bwenzi obuyitirivu obw'obwamalaaya, mulungi, asikiriza, naye ow'eddogo ekkambwe, eyazingako amawanga n'obwamalaaya bwe, n'ebika by'abantu n'eddogo lye." 
Nahum3:5 “Nkuli bukiika,” Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, “ndisitulira emivuluya gyo ku maaso go, ndeke amawanga geerolere obwereere bwo, n'obwakabaka mbulage ensonyi zo." 
Nahum3:6 Nzija kukukasukira ebijama, nkuyise na bunyoomi, ofuuke eky'okwerolera." 
Nahum3:7 Buli alikulaba alikudduka, n'agamba nti: ‘Nineve azikiridde! Ani anaamukaabira? Mmunoonyeze wa anaamukubagiza?’ ”" 
Nahum3:8 Ggwe mulungi okukira No-Amoni, atudde ku Kiyira, amazzi nga gamwebunguludde, bbugwe we nga ye nnyanja, n'amazzi nga kye kisenge kye?" 
Nahum3:9 Kuusi ne Misiri be baali amaanyi ge, agataliiko kkomo; Puti ne Libya be bamu ku baali banywanyi be." 
Nahum3:10 Kyokka naye yagenda mu busibe, yatwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse. Amabujje ge baagaseseggulira mu buli masaŋŋanzira. Abakungu be baabakubako akalulu, n'abaami be bonna baasibibwa ku mpingu." 
Nahum3:11 Naawe nno ojja kutamiira; olyekweka, olinoonya obwewogomo okudduka omulabe." 
Nahum3:12 Ebigo byo byonna biri nga mikunyu, okuli ebibala ebisooka okutuuka, oluginyeenyaako ne bigwa mu kamwa k'abirya." 
Nahum3:13 Tunuulira eggye lyo, bonna bakazi! Emiryango gy'ensi yo gyonna miggulire abalabe bo; omuliro gusenkenyezza emiyingo gyayo." 
Nahum3:14 Weekimire amazzi olw'okuzindibwa, nyweza ebigo byo; kkirira mu ttosi, samba ebbumba, kwata akatiba." 
Nahum3:15 Eyo omuliro gulikusenkenyezaayo, ekitala kirikutemerayo, kirikuvunjaga ng'enzige. Yala ng'enzige! Yala ng'enseenene!" 
Nahum3:16 Wayongera obungi bwa b'osuubulagana nabo n'obasinza n'emmunyeenye ez'eggulu. Enzige zanjuluza ebiwaawaatiro byazo ne zibuuka. 
Nahum3:17 Abakuumi bo bali ng'enseenene, abakungu bo bali ng'ebikuukuulu by'enzige, ezigwa ku lukomera ku lunaku olunnyogovu, enjuba bw'evaayo, ne zibuuka; tewali amanyi gye ziraga." 
Nahum3:18 Kabaka wa Assuri, abasumba bo beebase, abaami bo bagandadde. Abantu bo babunye emiwabo ku nsozi, tewali abakuŋŋaanya." 
Nahum3:19 Obuvune bwo tebuliiko kuddirira, ekiwundu kyo kya maanyi. Buli awulira ebikufaako, akuba mu ngalo ku ggwe; ggwe ate ani atatuukibwangako bukambwe bwo obutaliiko kigero?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Obubaka Abakkuku bwe yafuna. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ayi Mukama, nnaatuusa wa okuwanjaga onnyambe, naye ggwe nga towulira, oba okuleekaana gy'oli nti: “Obukambwe!” naye ggwe nga tolokola?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Lwaki ondeka okulaba ebikyamu, lwaki ogumiikiriza obugwenyufu? Okwonoona n'obukambwe bye ndaba, Empaka ze ziriwo, n'ennyombo zisituse." 
Habakkuk1:4 Etteeka kyeriva liggwa amaanyi, n'obwenkanya tebuvaayo. Anti ababi babuutikidde abatuukirivu, obwenkanya bwe butyo ne butyoboolwa." 
Habakkuk1:5 “Mutunuulire amawanga mulabe, mwewuunye, muwuniikirire. Kubanga nkola ekikolwa mu budde bwammwe kye mutandikkirizza nga kibanyumiziddwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Kuba ŋŋenda okusitula Abakaludeya, eggwanga eribuubuuka, ekkambwe, eriyita wonna ku nsi, litwale ebisulo ebitali byalyo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Lya ntiisa, likuba encukwe, be beewa etteeka n'obuyinza." 
Habakkuk1:8 Embalaasi zaabwe ziwenyuka okukira engo; bakambwe okukira emisege gy'ekiro; abeebagazi baabwe bajja buteesagga; abeebagazi baabwe bava bunaayira; babuuka ng'empungu ng'ekwakkula okulya. 
Habakkuk1:9 Bonna bajjirira bukambwe; amaaso gaabwe gali ng'empewo ey'ebuvanjuba, bakuŋŋaanya abasibe ng'omusenyu." 
Habakkuk1:10 Banyooma bakabaka, bakongoola abakungu, basekerera buli kigo; batuuma embibiro ne babikwata." 
Habakkuk1:11 Bayitawo luwunguko nga mpewo ne beeyongerayo. Bazzi ba misango, amaanyi gaabwe ye lubaale waabwe.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 Kazzi, ayi Mukama, toli wa mirembe na mirembe, ayi Katonda wange, Omutuukirivu, atafa? Ayi Mukama, wabateekawo balamule; ayi Lwazi, wabassaawo babonereze." 
Habakkuk1:13 Amaaso go matukuvu nnyo okugatunuza ku kibi, togumiikiriza kikyamu. Lwaki ate otunuulira ab'enkwe? Lwaki osirika ng'ababi bamira bugobo ababasinga obutuukirivu?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Abantu wabakola ng'ebyennyanja mu nnyanja, ng'ebyewalula ebitalina abikulira." 
Habakkuk1:15 Bonna abasikayo n'eddobo, abakwasa mu kiragala kye, n'abakuŋŋaanya mu katimba ke; awo n'asanyuka n'asagambiza." 
Habakkuk1:16 N'olw'ekyo atambirira ekiragala kye, n'anyookeza akatimba ke obubaani, kubanga mu byo mw'aggya obulamu obw'ekigagga, n'ekyokulya kye ekyassava." 
Habakkuk1:17 Kyanaavanga afukumula akatimba ke bulijjo, n'azikiriza amawanga awatali kusaasira ennaku zonna?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Nzija kuyimirira we nkuumira, nzija kwesimba waggulu ku kigo, neetegereze ndabe ky'aŋŋamba ne ky'anaddamu okwemulugunya kwange." 
Habakkuk2:2 Awo Omukama n'annyanukula: “Wandiika ky'olabye mu kulabikirwa, kirage bulungi ku kayinja, anaaba akisomye adduke nakyo." 
Habakkuk2:3 Kubanga ky'olabye mu kulabikirwa kirinda kadde kaakyo; kyanguwa okutuuka ku nkomerero era tekiibe kya bulimba. Ne bwe kirinzalinza, ggwe kirinde; kwo okujja kijja kujja, tekiirwe." 
Habakkuk2:4 Laba, atali wa mwoyo mutereevu aligwa, sso omutuukirivu aliba mulamu olw'okukkiriza kwe.”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Mazima, omwenge gwa nkwe; omwekuza atiiratiira buli kaseera. Oyo mu mululu mugazi ng'amagombe; tamatira ng'olumbe, yeekuŋŋaanyiza amawanga gonna, yeewundulira abantu bonna." 
Habakkuk2:6 Bonna bano tebaasituke, ne bamukiina nga bayisa engero nti: “Zimusanze atuuma ebitali bibye, ne yeegaggawaza ng'atwala emisingo!” Kino anaakikola kutuusa wa?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Abakubanja tebaasituke nno mangu, tebaazuukuke ne bakukuba entengero? Olwo ojja kufuuka munyago gwabwe." 
Habakkuk2:8 Kubanga wanyagulula amawanga nkumu, n'abantu bonna abasigaddewo balikunyagulula; kubanga wayiwa omusaayi gw'abantu, n'okola obulabe ku nsi n'ebibuga na bonna ababisulamu." 
Habakkuk2:9 Zimusanze atuumira ennyumba ye obugagga obulyakule, awanike waggulu ekisu kye, yeewonye okutuukibwako akabenje." 
Habakkuk2:10 Wateesa ebiswaza ennyumba yo, bwe watta abantu abangi, n'ossa obulamu bwo mu kabi." 
Habakkuk2:11 Kubanga n'amayinja galiyima ku kisenge ne galeekaana, n'emikiikiro giriyima mu musekese ne gyanukula." 
Habakkuk2:12 Zimusanze azimbira ekibuga ku kuyiwa omusaayi, n'akuba ekibuga ng'ayita mu kukola obubi." 
Habakkuk2:13 Laba, ekyo tekivudde wa Mukama w'Amagye, nti abantu kye beekooyeza si kirala wabula muliro, nti n'amawanga gateganira bwereere?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Kubanga ensi egenda kujjula okumanya ekitiibwa kya Katonda, ng'amazzi bwe gajjuza ennyanja." 
Habakkuk2:15 Zimusanze oyo awa mikwano gye ekyokunywa, n'abafukiramu obusungu bwe okutuusa nga batamidde, alyoke atunuulire obwereere bwabwe." 
Habakkuk2:16 Mulijjula nsonyi sso si kitiibwa. Kati naawe nywa otagale! Ekikompe mu ddyo w'Omukama kijja kukutuukako, olwo ensonyi ziribikka ekitiibwa kyo." 
Habakkuk2:17 Kubanga obukambwe bw'olaze Lebanoni bulikubuutikira, n'okuzikirira kw'ebisolo kulikutiisa. Kubanga oyiye omusaayi gw'abantu, okoze n'obulabe ku nsi n'ebibuga na bonna ababisulamu." 
Habakkuk2:18 Ekifaananyi ekyole kigasa ki ng'omukozi waakyo akikoze, oba ekifaananyi ekisaanuuse eri omuyigisa w'obulimba? Lwaki akikola asuubirira mu ky'akoze, lwaki akola ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebitayinza kwogera?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Zimusanze oyo agamba ekiti nti: “Zuukuka!” n'ejjinja likasiru nti: “Vva mu tulo.” Lisobola okuyigiriza? Liiryo likwatiridde zaabu ne ffeeza, naye mu lyo temuli mukka gwa bulamu." 
Habakkuk2:20 Ye Omukama ali mu Kiggwa kye ekitukuvu; ensi yonna esiriikirire mu maaso ge. 
Habakkuk3:1 Essaala ya Abakkuku omulanzi. Mu ddoboozi lya kukungubaga. 
Habakkuk3:2 Ayi Mukama, nawulira ku ttutumu lyo, Mpuniikirira, ayi Mukama, olw'ebyo by'okola; biddemu ne mu nnaku zaffe; bimanyise ne mu budde bwaffe; ng'osunguwadde, jjukira okusaasira." 
Habakkuk3:3 Omukama yajja ng'ava e Temani, Omutuukirivu ng'ava ku lusozi Parani. Ekitiibwa kye kyabikka eggulu, n'ettendo lye ne lijjuza ensi." 
Habakkuk3:4 Okutangalijja kwe kwali ng'okw'emisana, ebimyanso nga bimyansa mu mikono gye, omwo nga mwe mukwekeddwa obuyinza bwe." 
Habakkuk3:5 Olumbe lumukulembeddemu, kawumpuli ng'ajja agoberera mu bigere bye." 
Habakkuk3:6 Yayimirira, n'ayuuguumya ensi; yatunula, n'akankanya amawanga. Ensozi ez'edda ne zimulunguka, obusozi obwa ddi na ddi ne bubutama. Amakubo ge ga mirembe gyonna." 
Habakkuk3:7 Nalaba weema za Kusani nga ziri mu nnaku, ebisulo by'e Midiyaani nga bijugumira." 
Habakkuk3:8 Ayi Mukama, wali osunguwalidde migga? Wali onyiigidde ngezi? Wali okambuwalidde nnyanja, lwe weebagala ku mbalaasi zo, ku bigaali byo eby'obuwanguzi?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Wabikkula omusaale gwo, n'ossa obusaale bungi ku kaguwa Ettaka walyasaamu emigga," 
Habakkuk3:10 ensozi zaakulaba ne zenyoola olw'obulumi; amazzi ag'omujjuzi ne gayitawo, eddubi ne liyira, ne lisitula amayengo gaalyo." 
Habakkuk3:11 Enjuba n'omwezi byasigala mu bisulo byabyo, byadduka nga birabye okutemagana kw'obusaale bwo, n'okutangalijja kw'effumu lyo erimyamyansa." 
Habakkuk3:12 Mu busungu watambula wonna mu nsi, mu buswandi walinnyirira amawanga." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wavaayo okuwonya abantu bo, okulokola omusiige wo. Wakuba omutwe gw'ennyumba y'omubi, n'omwambula okuva ku mutwe okutuuka ku bigere." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wafumita n'effumu lyo omukulu w'abatabaazi be, abajja nga kibuyaga okutubunya emiwabo, nga basanyuka ng'abakavvulira omunaku gye yeewogomedde." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wasambirira ennyanja n'embalaasi zo; n'osiikuula eddubi ery'amazzi amangi. 
Habakkuk3:16 Nawulira, omutima gwange ne gunkuba, emimwa ne ginkankana ku lw'eddoboozi; amagumba gange ne gavunda, n'entegetege ne zinfamba. Naye nzija kulinda n'obugumiikiriza olunaku olw'obuyinike olulijjira eggwanga eryo eritulumba." 
Habakkuk3:17 Newandibadde ng'omukunyu tegutojjedde, ne ku mizabbibu nga tekuli bibala, n'oliva nazo nga tezibaze, n'ennimiro nga teziwadde mmere, ne mu kisibo ne bwe mutaliba ndiga, ne mu magana nga temuli nte," 
Habakkuk3:18 era nze ndisanyukira mu Mukama, ndijaguliza mu Katonda mulokozi wange." 
Habakkuk3:19 Omukama Katonda ge maanyi gange, ebigere byange abifuula ng'eby'ennangaazi, ansobozesa okwambuka mu nsozi. Eri omuyimbisa: lwa ku bivuga eby'enkoba." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Zefaniya mutabani wa Kuusi, mutabani wa Gedaliya, mutabani wa Amariya, mutabani wa Kezekiya, mu mirembe gya Yosiya mutabani wa Amoni kabaka wa Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Nzija kwerawo buli kintu okuva ku nsi,” Omukama y'agamba," 
Zephaniah1:3 “nzija kwerawo abantu n'ebisolo; nzija kwerawo ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga n'ebyennyanja mu nnyanja. Ababi ndibazikiriza; nzija kusaanyaawo abantu bonna wonna ku nsi,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Omukono gwange nzija kugugololera ku Yuda ne ku bonna abasula mu Yeruzaalemu; mu kifo kino nzija kukutulako buli baasigalawo aba Baali, n'amannya g'emmandwa ne bakabona be," 
Zephaniah1:5 n'abo abayima ku busolya ne basinza eggye ly'eggulu, n'abo abasinza ne balayira Omukama, n'abo abalayira Milukomu," 
Zephaniah1:6 n'abo abaakuba Omukama amabega; n'abatanoonya Mukama, n'abo abatamwebuuzaako." 
Zephaniah1:7 Musirike awali Omukama Katonda, kubanga olunaku lw'Omukama luli kumpi; Omukama ategese ekitambiro, atukuzizza b'ayise." 
Zephaniah1:8 “Ku lunaku lw'Omukama olw'ekitambiro ky'Omukama, nzija kubonereza abafuzi, ne batabani ba kabaka, ne bonna abambadde ebyambalo ebigwira." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ku olwo nzija kubonereza ababuuka omwango, abajjuzizza ekiggwa kya mukama waabwe n'obukambwe n'enkwe." 
Zephaniah1:10 “Ku olwo,” y'agamba Omukama, “enduulu eriwulirwa ku Mulyango gw'Ebyennyanja, ebiwoobe okuva mu Kibuga Ekiggya, n'okubwatuka okunene okuva mu busozi." 
Zephaniah1:11 Mukube ebiwoobe, mmwe abasula mu Kiwonvu, kubanga abasuubuzi bonna baweddewo, bonna abasuubula ffeeza bazaaye." 
Zephaniah1:12 Ku olwo Yeruzaalemu ndimunoonya n'ettawaaza, ndibonereza abasajja abagejjedde ku bisejja by'omwenge gwabwe, abalowooza mu mitima gyabwe nti: ‘Omukama talina ky'anaakola, kirungi oba kibi.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Ebyabwe birinyagululwa, n'ennyumba zaabwe balizaaya; balizimba amayumba, naye tebaligasulamu; balisimba emizabbibu, naye tebaliginywako mwenge.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Olunaku lw'Omukama olukulu luli kumpi, luli kumpi, ate lujja mangu. Eddoboozi ly'olunaku lw'Omukama nga kkaawu, omutabaazi aleekaanira eyo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Olunaku olwo lunaku lwa busungu, lunaku lwa buyinike na nnaku, lunaku lwa kuzikirira na kufa, lunaku lwa lufu na kazigizigi, lunaku lwa bire na kalenge." 
Zephaniah1:16 Lunaku lwa ŋŋombe na nduulu ku bibuga ebiriko bbugwe, ne ku minaala waggulu ku nsonda." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ndirabya abantu ennaku, balitambula nga bamuzibe, kubanga baakola ekibi eri Omukama. Omusaayi gwabwe guliyiika ng'enfuufu, n'ebyenda byabwe ng'obusa." 
Zephaniah1:18 Ne ffeeza waabwe ne zaabu tebirisobola kubawonya, ku lunaku lw'obusungu bw'Omukama; mu muliro gw'ebbuba lye ensi yonna eriwemmentebwa, kubanga ajja kumalirawo ddala, ate mbagirawo, bonna abasula ku nsi." 
Zephaniah2:1 Mwekuŋŋaanye, mwekuŋŋaanye, mmwe eggwanga eritaswala," 
Zephaniah2:2 nga temunnagoberwa eri ng'ebisusunku ebikuŋŋunsibwa, ng'obusungu bw'Omukama obwesera tebunnabajjira, ng'olunaku lw'obusungu bw'Omukama terunnabajjira." 
Zephaniah2:3 Mwenna abateefu ab'omu nsi, munoonye Omukama, mmwe abakola ky'alagira. Munoonye obutuukirivu, munoonye obwetoowaze; oboolyawo mulifuna we mwewogoma ku lunaku lw'obusungu bw'Omukama." 
Zephaniah2:4 Kubanga Gaza alyabulirwa, ne Asukeloni kirirekebwa ttayo; Asudodi balimuleka mukalu mu ttuntu; Ekuroni kirisimbulwawo." 
Zephaniah2:5 Zibasanze mmwe abasula ku lubalama lw'ennyanja, mmwe eggwanga ly'Abakereti! Ekigambo ky'Omukama kiri ku mmwe, mmwe Kanaani ensi y'Abafilisitiini nti: “Nzija kukuzikiriza okutuusa nga tewasigadde akusulamu.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Ggwe olubalama lw'ennyanja, olifuuka malundiro, bisaawe bya balunzi na bisibo bya ndiga." 
Zephaniah2:7 Olubalama lulifuuka lwa baasigalawo mu nnyumba ya Yuda; eyo gye balisanga amalundiro. Akawungeezi baligalamiranga mu nnyumba z'omu Asukeloni; Omukama Katonda waabwe agenda kubalabirira; alikomyawo abasibe baabwe. 
Zephaniah2:8 “Nawulira okujolonga kwa Mowabu, n'okuvuma kw'Abammoni, abaavuma abantu bange ne beewaanira ku nsi yaabwe." 
Zephaniah2:9 Kale nno, mazima nze nga ndi mulamu,” Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, y'agamba: “Mowabu aliba nga Sodoma, n'Abammoni nga Gomorra; ensi ey'omwennyango n'entuumu z'omusenyu, ey'eddungu emirembe gyonna. Abaasigalawo mu bantu bange baliginyagulula; abaasigalira mu bantu bange balibezza." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ekyo kye kiribatuukirira olw'okwekuza kwabwe, kubanga baavuma n'okwewaanira ku bantu b'Omukama w'Amagye." 
Zephaniah2:11 Omukama alibabeerera ntiisa, kubanga alitoowaza balubaale bonna ab'ensi; balimusinza buli omu mu kifo kye, byonna ebizinga by'amawanga." 
Zephaniah2:12 “Nammwe Abakuusi, mulittibwa n'ekitala kyange.”" 
Zephaniah2:13 Aligololera omukono gwe ku mambuka n'azikiriza Assuri; Nineve alikireka matongo, nga kikalu ng'eddungu." 
Zephaniah2:14 Amagana galigalamira omwo mu kyo, na buli kisolo kyonna; ekiwuugulu eky'amatu ne nnamunnungu birisulanga ku mpagi zaakyo, ekiwuugulu kiriwulugumiranga mu ddirisa, ne nnamuŋŋoona alikaabiranga mu mulyango, kubanga enzizi z'entolookyo ziribikkulibwa." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ky'ekyo ekibuga eky'amasanyu, ekyetuuliranga entende, ekyerowoozangako nti: “Nze ndiwo, era teri mulala.” Laba bwe kifuuse amatongo, enfo y'ebisolo! Buli ayitawo afuuwa kiwa, n'akuba mu ngalo." 
Zephaniah3:1 Zikusanze, ggwe omujeemu, omwonoonefu, ekibuga ekirumbaganyi!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Tekiwuliriza ayogera, tekikkiriza kukomwako. Tekyesiga Mukama, tekisembera eri Katonda waakyo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abaami baakyo, mpologoma eziwuluguma, abafuzi baakyo, misege gya kiro, ku magumba ezitaterekako ka ku makya." 
Zephaniah3:4 Abalanzi baakyo bantu batyo, bantu balimba; bakabona baakyo bajaajaamya Ekitukuvu, bamenya etteeka." 
Zephaniah3:5 Sso Omukama ali mu kyo mutuukirivu, takola bitali bya butuukirivu; ku makya buli lunaku awa ennamula ye, bulijjo ku maliiri talemererwa; naye omubi tafa ku kuswala." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Nkutaddeko amawanga, ebigo byabwe byamenyebwawo. Enguudo zaabwe nazireka ttayo, nga temukyali ayitamu; ebibuga byabwe matongo, temukyali muntu, mpaawo n'omu bw'ati asulamu." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Kati banantya, ne bakkiriza okukomwako. Olwo byonna bye mbagambye tebiibave ku maaso.’ Kyokka beeyongera kwagala kukola ebikolwa byabwe byonna ebibi." 
Zephaniah3:8 “Olw'ekyo, nnindirira”, Omukama y'agamba, “olunaku lwe nnaasituka okuwa obujulizi. Kubanga ntegese okukuŋŋaanya amawanga, okuleeta awamu obwakabaka, ndyoke mbamalireko obuswandi bwange, obusungu bwange obwesera, anti ensi yonna erisenkenyezebwa omuliro gw'ebbuba ly'obusungu bwange." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Olwo nditukuza emimwa gy'amawanga, bonna balyoke bakoowoole erinnya ly'Omukama, bamuweereze ng'omuntu omu." 
Zephaniah3:10 Okuva emitala w'emigga gya Kuusi, abeegayirizi bange, abantu bange abaabuna emiwabo, balindeetera ebitone." 
Zephaniah3:11 “Ku olwo temuliwulira nsonyi olw'ebisobyo byonna bye mwakola, kubanga ndibaggyamu abajaganyiza mu lunkulu lwabwe. Toliddayo kwekuliza ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu." 
Zephaniah3:12 Naye ndikulekamu abaavu n'abanaku; abo balisuubira mu linnya ly'Omukama. 
Zephaniah3:13 Abaasigalawo mu Yisirayeli tebalikola bubi, tebalyogera bya bulimba, ne mu kamwa kaabwe temulisangibwamu lulimi lukuusa. Balirya ne bagalamira, tewaliba abakanga.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Yimba, wattu muwala wa Siyoni, Yisirayeli, leekaana. Sanyuka, sagambiza n'omutima gwonna, ayi muwala wa Yeruzaalemu." 
Zephaniah3:15 Omukama aggyeewo ekibonerezo kyo, abalabe bo abazzizzaayo emabega; Omukama, Kabaka wa Yisirayeli, ali mu makkati go, tokyaddayo kubeera na kabi k'otya." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ku olwo Yeruzaalemu balimugamba nti: “Wattu Siyoni, leka kutya; emikono gyo togireka kulagaya." 
Zephaniah3:17 Omukama Katonda wo ali mu makkati go, omuzira alokola; alijaguza ku lulwo n'essanyu, alikuzza buggya n'okwagala kwe, alisanyuka ku lulwo mu nnyimba," 
Zephaniah3:18 nga ku mbaga enkulu. “Nzija kukuggyako ennaku, nga tokyaddayo kunyoomebwa olw'okubeera yo." 
Zephaniah3:19 Mu budde obwo ndikola ku bonna abaakulabya ennaku, ŋŋenda kuwonya omulema, ndikuŋŋaanya abaagobwa; ndibawa ettendo n'ekitiibwa mu buli nsi gye baali baswalidde." 
Zephaniah3:20 Mu budde obwo ndibakomyawo eka; mu budde obwo ndibakuŋŋaanya. Ndibawa ettendo n'okugulumizibwa mu mawanga gonna ag'ensi, bwe ndikomyawo abasibe bammwe mu maaso gammwe,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Haggai1:1 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogwa kabaka Dariyo, ku lusooka mu mwezi ogwomukaaga ekigambo ky'Omukama kyajja nga kiyita mu Aggayi omulanzi eri Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli owessaza mu Yuda, n'eri Yoswa mutabani wa Yozadaki kabona omukulu, nga kibagamba nti:" 
Haggai1:2 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Abantu bano bagamba nti: ‘Obudde tebunnatuuka kuzimba Kiggwa kya Mukama.’ ” 
Haggai1:3 Awo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja nga kiyita mu Aggayi omulanzi nti: 
Haggai1:4 “Kano ke kadde mmwe okusula mu mayumba amatindire kyo Ekiggwa ky'Omukama nga kikyali matongo? 
Haggai1:5 Kale nno Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Mwekkaanye amakubo gammwe. 
Haggai1:6 Mwasiga bingi naye mukungudde katono; mulya naye temukkuta; munywa naye temumatira; mwambala engoye naye temubuguma; musasulibwa empeera naye mugissa mu nsawo za bituli. 
Haggai1:7 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Mwekkaanye amakubo gammwe. 
Haggai1:8 Mwambuke mu nsozi, muleete emiti, muzimbe Ekiggwa kinsanyuse ate nange ngulumizibwe, Omukama y'agamba." 
Haggai1:9 Mwalindirira bingi, naye ekizze kitono; kye mwaleeta eka nakifuuwa eri. Lwaki? Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba. Kubanga Ekiggwa kyange kikyali matongo, sso nga mmwe buli omu yeefunyiridde ku nnyumba ye." 
Haggai1:10 Olw'okubeera mmwe, eggulu kyerivudde lisiba omusulo gwalyo n'ettaka ekibala kyalyo." 
Haggai1:11 Ne mpita ekyeya kijje ku ttaka, ku nsozi, ku ŋŋano, ku vviini ensu, ku muzigo, ku buli kyonna ettaka kye libaza, ku bantu, ku nsolo na ku byonna emikono gyammwe bye gikola.”" 
Haggai1:12 Awo Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli ne Yoswa mutabani wa Yozadaki kabona omukulu n'abaasigalawo bonna mu bantu ne bawulira eddoboozi ly'Omukama Katonda waabwe n'ebigambo bya Aggayi Omulanzi ng'Omukama Katonda waabwe bwe yali amubatumidde; abantu ne batya Omukama. 
Haggai1:13 Aggayi omubaka w'Omukama n'agamba abantu obubaka bw'Omukama nti: “Ndi nammwe, Omukama y'agamba.”" 
Haggai1:14 Omukama n'asiikuula omwoyo gwa Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli owessaza mu Yuda n'omwoyo gwa Yoswa mutabani wa Yozadaki kabona omukulu n'omwoyo gw'abaasigalawo bonna mu bantu, ne bajja ne batandika okukola ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama w'Amagye, Katonda waabwe," 
Haggai1:15 ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya olw'omwezi ogwomukaaga, mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogwa Kabaka Dariyo." 
Haggai2:1 Mu mwezi ogwomusanvu, ku lunaku olwabiri mu olumu, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijja nga kiyita mu Aggayi omulanzi nti:" 
Haggai2:2 “Yogera eri Zerubabbeli mutabani wa Seyalutyeli owessaza mu Yuda n'eri Yoswa mutabani wa Yozadaki kabona omukulu n'eri abaasigalawo mu bantu obabuuze nti: 
Haggai2:3 ‘Mu mmwe ani akyasigaddewo eyalaba ku Kiggwa kino mu kitiibwa kyakyo ekyasooka? Ate kati mukiraba mutya? Tekibafaananira ng'omutali kantu? 
Haggai2:4 Naye nno kati guma, Zerubabbeli, Omukama y'agamba. Guma, Yoswa mutabani wa Yozadaki kabona omukulu. Mugume nammwe abantu ab'omu ggwanga, Omukama w'amagye y'agamba. Mukole, kubanga ndi nammwe, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Haggai2:5 Kino kye nalagaana nammwe lwe mwali mu nsi y'e Misiri; Mwoyo wange ali mu mmwe; muleke kutya. 
Haggai2:6 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Mu kabanga katono nzija kuyuuguumya eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja n'olukalu. 
Haggai2:7 Nzija kunyeenya amawanga gonna, awo obugagga bw'amawanga gonna bujja kujja, nzija kujjuza Ekiggwa kino n'ekitiibwa, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Haggai2:8 Ffeeza wange ne zaabu wange, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Haggai2:9 Ekitiibwa eky'oluvannyuma eky'Ekiggwa kino kirikira wala ekyasooka, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba. Mu kifo kino nzija kuweerangamu emirembe, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba.’ ”" 
Haggai2:10 Ku lunaku olwabiri mu ennya olw'omwezi ogwomwenda, mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogwa kabaka Dariyo ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Aggayi omulanzi nti:" 
Haggai2:11 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Buuza bakabona etteeka kye ligamba nti: 
Haggai2:12 ‘Singa omuntu atwala ennyama emponge mu kikondoolo ky'ekyambalo kye, ne kimala kikoona ku mugaati oba ku nva, oba ku vviini oba ku muzigo oba ku mmere endala yonna, kye kikoonyeeko kifuuka kiwonge?’ ” Bakabona ne baddamu nti: “Nedda.”" 
Haggai2:13 Aggayi n'agamba nti “Oli atali mulongoofu olw'okukwata ku mulambo, bw'akwata ku kimu ku ebyo nakyo kifuuka kitali kirongoofu?” Bakabona ne baanukula nti: “Kiba si kirongoofu.”" 
Haggai2:14 Aggayi n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Bwe kityo nno n'abantu bano, eggwanga lino, bwe bali mu maaso gange, Omukama y'agamba. Buli kyonna kye bakola n'emikono gyabwe na byonna bye baweerereza wano si birongoofu!" 
Haggai2:15 “Okuva n'olwa leero n'okweyongerayo kino mukyekkaanye: Ejjinja bwe lyali terinnassibwa ku linnaalyo ku Kiggwa ky'Omukama," 
Haggai2:16 mwali muli mutya? Oli bwe yajjanga ku ntuumu y'ebipimo amakumi abiri, kwalingako kkumi. Bwe yagendanga ku ttogero ly'omwenge aseneko ebipimo amakumi ataano, mwabangamu amakumi abiri." 
Haggai2:17 Byonna bye mwakola nabikuba ne nnabbambula, okugengewala, n'omuzira, naye era temwakomawo gye ndi, Omukama y'agamba." 
Haggai2:18 Okuva n'olwa leero n'okweyongerayo, okuva ku lw'abiri mu ennya olw'omwezi ogwomwenda, mwekkaanye olunaku Ekiggwa ky'Omukama lwe kyabangibwa. Mwekkaanye." 
Haggai2:19 Ensigo ekyalimu mu kyagi? N'okutuusa kati omuzabbibu, omukunyu, ekkomamawanga n'oliva tebinnaleeta kibala? Okuva n'olwa leero n'okweyongerayo nzija kubawanga omukisa.”" 
Haggai2:20 Ate ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Aggayi omulundi ogwokubiri, ku lunaku olwabiri mu ennya olw'omwezi nti:" 
Haggai2:21 “Gamba Zerubabbeli owessaza mu Yuda nti: ‘Nzija kuyuuguumya eggulu n'ensi. 
Haggai2:22 Nzija kusuula nnamulondo za bakabaka, nseseggule amaanyi g'obwakabaka mu mawanga; nzija kuvuunika ebigaali n'abagoba baabyo; embalaasi zijja kugwa n'abeebagazi baakwo, buli omu attibwe ekitala kya munne." 
Haggai2:23 Ku olwo, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, nzija kuddira ggwe Zerubabbeli omuweereza wange mutabani wa Seyalutyeli, Omukama y'agamba, nkuteekewo ng'akabonero k'empeta yange, kubanga nkulonze, y'agamba Omukama w'Amagye.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:1 Mu mwezi ogwomunaana, mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogwa Dariyo, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Zakariya omulanzi mutabani wa Berekiya, mutabani wa Yiddo, nga kigamba nti:" 
Zechariah1:2 “Omukama asunguwalidde bajjajjammwe. 
Zechariah1:3 Bagambe nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Mudde gye ndi, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, nange nzija kudda gye muli, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Zechariah1:4 Muleme kubeera nga bajjajjammwe, abalanzi abaakulembera be baagambanga nti: “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Muve ku bibi byammwe n'ebirowoozo byammwe ebibi,” naye bo ne batawulira, ne batategereza, Omukama y'agamba." 
Zechariah1:5 Kati bajjajjammwe bali ludda wa? Bo abalanzi babeerawo emirembe gyonna? 
Zechariah1:6 Ddala ddala ebigambo byange n'amateeka gange bye nalagira abaweereza bange abalanzi tebyatuukirira ku bajjajjammwe? Beenenya ne bagamba nti: “Omukama w'Amagye atukoze nga bwe yateesa okutukola nga bwe kyali kitugwanidde ng'agerera ku makubo gaffe n'endowooza yaffe.” ’ ” 
Zechariah1:7 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu, nga gwe mwezi ogwa Sebati, mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogwa Dariyo, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Zakariya mutabani wa Berekiya, mutabani wa Yiddo, nga kigamba nti:" 
Zechariah1:8 “Mu kiro nalabikirwa: omusajja yali atudde ku mbalaasi emmyufu. Yali ayimiridde mu miti gya jjambula mu luwonko, emabega we ng'eriyo embalaasi emmyufu, eya kikuusi n'enjeru." 
Zechariah1:9 Ne mbuuza nti: ‘Mukama, bano baki?’ Malayika eyali ayogera nange n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Nzija kukulaga kye bali.’" 
Zechariah1:10 Omusajja eyali ayimiridde mu miti gya jjambula n'agamba nti: ‘Bano be baabo Omukama b'atumye okuyitaayita mu nsi.’ 
Zechariah1:11 Ne baanukula malayika w'Omukama eyali ayimiridde mu miti gya jjambula, ne bamugamba nti: ‘Tuyiseeyise mu nsi, ensi yonna etebenkedde, eri mu ddembe.’" 
Zechariah1:12 Malayika w'Omukama n'ayanukula nti: ‘Ayi Mukama w'Amagye, onootuusa wa obutasaasira Yeruzaalemu n'ebibuga bya Yuda, bye wasunguwalira kati gino emyaka nsanvu?’" 
Zechariah1:13 Omukama n'addamu n'ebigambo ebirungi ebikubagiza malayika eyali ayogera nange. 
Zechariah1:14 Malayika eyali ayogera nange n'aŋŋamba nti ‘Langirira nti: “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Yeruzaalemu ne Siyoni bankwasa nnyo ensaalwa," 
Zechariah1:15 naye nnyiigidde nnyo amawanga ageetuulidde entende; nali nsunguwaddemu katono naye bo akabi ne bakabiggyisa.” 
Zechariah1:16 “ ‘N'olw'ekyo Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Nzija kudda eri Yeruzaalemu mmusaasire, n'eyo Ekiggwa kyange gye kinaazimbibwa, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, n'olukoba olupima lulikubibwa ku Yeruzaalemu.’" 
Zechariah1:17 Era langirira nti: ‘Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Ebibuga binaddamu ne bibooga ebirungi, n'Omukama ajja kukubagiza Siyoni, alonde Yeruzaalemu.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ne nsitula amaaso, ne ndaba: awo waaliwo amayembe ana." 
Zechariah2:2 Ne mbuuza malayika eyali ayogera nange nti: “Bino biki?” N'aŋŋamba nti: “Gano ge mayembe agaasaasaanya Yuda, Yisirayeli ne Yeruzaalemu.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Ate Omukama n'andaga abaweesi bana. 
Zechariah2:4 Ne mbuuza nti: “Ate bano bazze kukola ki?” N'anziramu nti: “Gano ge mayembe agaasaasaanya Yuda, wabulewo mu bo ayimusa omutwe; bano bazze kubatiisa basuule eri amayembe g'amawanga agaayimusiriza ensi ya Yuda amayembe gaago ne gamusaasaanya.”" 
Zechariah2:5 Ne nsitula amaaso gange ne ndaba: awo waaliwo omusajja ng'akutte mu ngalo ze olukoba olupima. 
Zechariah2:6 Ne mbuuza nti: “Ate ggwe ogenda wa?” N'aŋŋamba nti: “Kupima Yeruzaalemu ndabe obugazi bwakyo n'obuwanvu.” 
Zechariah2:7 Awo Malayika eyali ayogera nange n'afuluma, ate malayika omulala n'afuluma okumusisinkana," 
Zechariah2:8 n'amugamba nti: “Dduka, gamba omuvubuka oyo nti: ‘Yeruzaalemu kya kubeera kibuga okutali bbugwe olw'obungi bw'abantu abakirimu n'ebisolo ebikirimu." 
Zechariah2:9 Ate nze nnaababeerera bbugwe ow'omuliro okukyetooloola, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, nze nnaaba Ekitiibwa mu makkati gaakyo.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:10 “Abange, abange! Mudduke okuva mu nsi y'emambuka, Omukama y'agamba, kubanga nabasaasaanya mu nsonda ennya ez'eggulu, Omukama y'agamba." 
Zechariah2:11 Owange Siyoni, dduka, ggwe asula ewa muwala wa Babiloni." 
Zechariah2:12 Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Oluvannyuma lw'Ekitiibwa okuntuma, ne kinsindika mu mawanga agaabanyagulula, anti abakwatako aba amukutte mu mmunye:" 
Zechariah2:13 Nzija kubagololerako omukono gwange bafuuke munyago gw'ababadde abaddu baabwe, olwo mulimanya nti Omukama w'Amagye y'antumye." 
Zechariah2:14 Yimba, jaganya, muwala wa Siyoni, kubanga nzuuno nzija, ate nzija kusula mu ggwe, Omukama y'agamba." 
Zechariah2:15 Amawanga mangi galyeyunga ku Mukama ku olwo ne babeera bantu be. Nzija kusula mu makkati go, olimanya nti Omukama w'Amagye y'antumye gy'oli." 
Zechariah2:16 Omukama alisikira Yuda nga gwe mugabo gwe mu nsi entukuvu, aliddamu n'alonda Yeruzaalemu." 
Zechariah2:17 Mwenna abantu, musirike awali Omukama, kubanga asituse ng'ava mu kisulo kye ekitukuvu.”" 
Zechariah3:1 Awo n'andaga Yoswa kabona omukulu ng'ayimiridde mu maaso ga malayika wa Katonda, ne Sitaani ng'ayimiridde ku ddyo we okumuwawaabira." 
Zechariah3:2 Omukama n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Omukama akukomeko, ggwe Sitaani! Omukama eyalonda Yeruzaalemu akukomeko! Ono si kye kiti ekyaka ekiggyiddwa mu muliro?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yoswa yali ayambadde ebigoye ebijama ng'ayimiridde mu maaso ga malayika. 
Zechariah3:4 Malayika n'agamba abaali bamuyimiridde mu maaso nti: “Mumwambulemu ebigoye ebijama.” N'agamba Yoswa nti: “Nzuuno kati nkuggyeko ebibi byo, ŋŋenda okukwambaza emivuluya.”" 
Zechariah3:5 N'agamba nti: “Mumuteekeko ettambaala eritukula.” Ne bamutikkira ettambaala eritukula, ne bamwambaza n'ebyambalo, ne malayika w'Omukama ng'ayimiridde awo." 
Zechariah3:6 Malayika w'Omukama n'akomereza Yoswa nti: 
Zechariah3:7 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: ‘Bw'olitambulira mu makubo gange n'otuukiriza bye nkuutira, olwo oliramula ennyumba yange, n'okuuma empya zange; ndikuwa ebifo mu abo abayimiridde awo." 
Zechariah3:8 Wulira ggwe Yoswa kabona omukulu ne banno abakutudde awo mu maaso, abo akabonero k'ebinajja, ŋŋenda kuleeta omuweereza wange 'Ttabi'." 
Zechariah3:9 Laba ejjinja liirino nditadde awo mu maaso ga Yoswa. Ku jjinja eryo erimu kuliko amaaso musanvu; nzija kwolako ekiwandiiko, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, era nzija kuggyawo ekibi ky'ensi eno mu lunaku lumu." 
Zechariah3:10 Ku lunaku olwo, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, omu aliyita munne ne batuula wansi w'omuzabbibu ne wansi w'omukunyu.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:1 Awo malayika eyali ayogera nange n'akomawo, n'anzuukusa ng'omuntu bw'azuukusibwa mu tulo." 
Zechariah4:2 N'ambuuza nti: “Olaba ki?” Ne mmuddamu nti: “Ndaba ekikondo ky'ettawaaza, kyonna nga kya zaabu, waggulu ku kyo nga kuliko ekibya, n'ettawaaza zaakyo omusanvu nga ziri kuli, n'emikonda musanvu ku ttawaaza eziri ku mutwe gw'ekikondo." 
Zechariah4:3 Era waliwo kumpi nakyo emiti gy'oliva ebiri, ogumu ku ddyo w'ekibya n'omulala ku kkono.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Ne mbuuza malayika eyali ayogera nange nti: “Ssebo, bino biki?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Malayika eyali ayogera nange n'annyanukula nti: “Bino tobimanyi?” Ne mugamba nti: “Nedda, mukama wange.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kino kye kigambo ky'Omukama eri Zerubabbeli, si na maanyi, si na buyinza, wabula na Mwoyo wange.”" 
Zechariah4:7 “Ggwe ani, ggwe olusozi olunene? Mu maaso ga Zerubabbeli ojja kufuuka museetwe. Aliggyayo ejjinja ery'oku ntikko eno nga bayogaana nti: ‘Aliwe omukisa, aliwe omukisa!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kinzijira nti: 
Zechariah4:9 “Emikono gya Zerubabbeli gibanze omusingi gw'Ekiggwa kino, era emikono gye gye girikimaliriza. Olwo mulimanya nti Omukama w'Amagye ye yantuma gye muli." 
Zechariah4:10 Ani anyooma olunaku olw'ekintu ekitono? Abantu balisanyuka, bwe baliraba bbirigi ey'essasi mu ngalo za Zerubabbeli. Amaaso ago omusanvu, ge maaso g'Omukama agayitaayita mu nsi wonna.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Ne mbuuza malayika nti: “Emiti gy'oliva gino ebiri egiri ku ddyo ne ku kkono w'ekikondo ky'ettawaaza gyaki?” 
Zechariah4:12 Ne mmubuuza ogwokubiri nti: “Amatabi gano abiri ag'oliva gaaki agaliraanye emidumu ebiri egya zaabu omuyita omuzigo?” 
Zechariah4:13 N'addamu nti: “Egyo togimanyi?” Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nedda, mukama wange.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Kwe kuŋŋamba nti: “Abo be basiige ababiri abaliwo okuweereza Omukama w'ensi yonna.” 
Zechariah5:1 Bwe natunula era ne ndaba: waaliwo omuzingo ogubuuka mu bbanga. 
Zechariah5:2 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Olaba ki?” Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ndaba omuzingo ogubuuka mu bbanga, nga gwa mikono amakumi abiri obuwanvu n'emikono kkumi obugazi.”" 
Zechariah5:3 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Ekyo kye kikolimo ekigenda kibuna mu nsi yonna; kuba, nga bwe kigambye, buli mubbi wa kwerawo, era nga bwe kigambye, buli alayira eby'obulimba naye wa kwerawo." 
Zechariah5:4 Nzija kukisindika, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, kijja kuyingira mu nnyumba y'omubbi ne mu y'oyo alayira mu linnya lyange eby'obulimba. Kijja kusigala mu nnyumba ye kigizikirize, na byombi embaawo zaakyo n'amayinja gaakyo.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Awo malayika eyali ayogera nange n'afuluma, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yimusa amaaso go olabe. Kiki ekyo ekiyitawo?”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Kiki ekyo?” N'aŋŋamba nti: “Kisero kye kiyitawo.” N'agamba nti: “Kino kye kibi kyabwe mu nsi yonna.” 
Zechariah5:7 Awo ekisaanikirako eky'essasi ne kibikkulibwa; munda mu kisero mwalimu omukazi ng'atudde. 
Zechariah5:8 N'agamba nti: “Ono bwe buseegu!” N'amusindika n'addayo munda, n'asaanikira n'amaanyi ekiyinja eky'essasi ku kamwa kaakyo." 
Zechariah5:9 Ne nsitula amaaso ne ndaba: waaliwo abakazi babiri nga bafuluma, ebiwaawaatiro byabwe nga bisitulwa empewo. Ebiwaawaatiro byabwe nga bifaanana ng'ebya ssekanyolya, ne basitula ekisero wakati w'ensi n'eggulu." 
Zechariah5:10 Ne mbuuza malayika eyali ayogera nange nti: “Bano ekisero bakitwala wa?” 
Zechariah5:11 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Mu nsi ya Sinari bakizimbire ennyumba. Bw'eriba emaliriziddwa, ekisero balikitereeza eyo mu kifo kyakyo.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Ne nnyimusa amaaso gange nate, ne ndaba: awo waaliwo ebigaali bina nga bifuluma biva wakati w'ensozi bbiri, ensozi nno nga za kikomo!" 
Zechariah6:2 Ekigaali ekisooka kyalina embalaasi mmyufu, ez'ekigaali ekyokubiri nga nzirugavu," 
Zechariah6:3 ez'ekyokusatu nga njeru, n'ez'ekigaali ekyokuna nga za magondogondo; zonna nga za maanyi." 
Zechariah6:4 Ne mbuuza malayika eyali ayogera nange nti: “Mukama wange, bino biki?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Malayika n'ayanukula nti: “Ezo ze mpewo ennya ez'eggulu ezifuluma, nga zimaze okuyimirira mu maaso g'Omukama w'ensi yonna.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Embalaasi enzirugavu ne zigenda mu mambuka, ate enjeru ne zizivaako emabega, zo ez'amagondogondo ne zigenda mu maserengeta." 
Zechariah6:7 Embalaasi ez'amaanyi ne zivaayo nga zifuba okulaga wonna mu nsi. N'agamba nti: “Mugende muyite wonna mu nsi.” Ne ziyita wonna mu nsi. 
Zechariah6:8 N'ampita n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ezo ezigenze mu nsi y'emambuka ziwadde Mwoyo wange ekiwummulo mu nsi y'emambuka.” 
Zechariah6:9 Ekigambo ky'Omukama kyanzijira nti: 
Zechariah6:10 “Ggya ku bano abavudde mu buwaŋŋanguse, Keludayi, Tobiya, ne Yedaaya, abakomyewo okuva e Babiloni, ojje ku lunaku olwo mu nnyumba ya Yosiya mutabani wa Zefaniya." 
Zechariah6:11 Ddira ffeeza ne zaabu okole engule, ogisse ku mutwe gwa Yoswa mutabani wa Yozadaki, kabona omukulu." 
Zechariah6:12 Mugambe nti: Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: ‘Wuuno omusajja, erinnya lye ye 'Ttabi'; alimeruka okuva mu kifo kye n'azimba Ekiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Zechariah6:13 Y'oyo alizimba Ekiggwa ky'Omukama, oyo alijjula ekitiibwa; alituula n'afuga ku nnamulondo ye. Walibaawo ne kabona ku ddyo we, ate bombi balitegeeragana." 
Zechariah6:14 Era engule eriba ne ku Kelemu, ku Tobiya ne ku Keni mutabani wa Zefaniya, nga kye kijjukizo mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama." 
Zechariah6:15 N'abali ewala balijja ne bayamba ku kuzimba Ekiggwa ky'Omukama. Olwo mulimanya nti Omukama w'Amagye y'ansindise gye muli. Kino kirituukirira singa muliba mutaddeyo omwoyo okuwulira Omukama.’ ” 
Zechariah7:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna ogwa kabaka Dariyo, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Zakariya ku lwokuna olw'omwezi ogwomwenda, gwe mwezi Kisulevu." 
Zechariah7:2 Abantu b'e Beteli baali batumye Sareezeri, Regemu-Meleki ne basajja baabwe okuwanjagira Omukama," 
Zechariah7:3 babuuze ne bakabona b'Ekiggwa ky'Omukama w'Amagye n'abalanzi nti: “Nkungubage ko n'okusiiba mu mwezi ogwokutaano nga bwe nzize nkola emyaka mingi egiyise?” 
Zechariah7:4 Ekigambo ky'Omukama w'Amagye ne kinzijira nti: 
Zechariah7:5 “Buuza abantu bonna ab'omu ggwanga ne bakabona nti: ‘Bwe mwasiibanga ne mukaaba mu mwezi ogwokutaano n'ogwomusanvu emyaka gino gyonna ensanvu, mwasiibanga ku lwange?" 
Zechariah7:6 Bwe mwalyanga ne munywa, temwalyanga ne munywa ku lwammwe?" 
Zechariah7:7 Ebyo si bye bigambo Omukama bye yayogera ng'ayita mu balanzi abaakulembera, luli nga Yeruzaalemu n'ebibuga byakyo ebikyetoolodde bitebenkedde biri mirembe, ne Negevu ne Sefela nga bikyasengeddwamu?’ ”" 
Zechariah7:8 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Zakariya nti: 
Zechariah7:9 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: ‘Mulamule mu butuufu, buli omu abeere wa kisa eri munne, amuddiremu." 
Zechariah7:10 Temunyigiriza nnamwandu, mulekwa, omugwira n'omwavu; mu mitima gyammwe buli muntu aleme kulowooleza munne bubi.’ ”" 
Zechariah7:11 Naye tebaategereza, wabula ate baamukuba mabega nga bakola emputtu, ne baggala amatu gaabwe." 
Zechariah7:12 Emitima gyabwe ne bagigumya ng'ejjinja baleme kuwulira tteeka na bigambo Omukama w'Amagye bye yabasindikira mu Mwoyo we nga yeeyamba abalanzi abaasooka. Omukama w'Amagye n'anyiiga nnyo. 
Zechariah7:13 “Bwe nakoowoola, tebaawuliriza, nange nno bwe baakoowoola, saabawuliriza, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Zechariah7:14 Nabasaasaanya ne kibuyaga mu mawanga wonna ge baali batamanyi. Ensi n'esigala matongo nga bagenze, nga tewakyali ajjamu na kuvaamu, bwe batyo ensi eyeegombebwa ne bagifuula ddungu.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Ekigambo ky'Omukama w'Amagye kyanzijira nga kigamba nti: 
Zechariah8:2 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Siyoni ankwasa ensaalwa; mbabirirwa muli olw'okumusaalirwa. 
Zechariah8:3 Omukama kino ky'agamba: Nzija kukomawo mu Siyoni, wakati mu Yeruzaalemu. Olwo Yeruzaalemu kiriyitibwa Kibuga kya Mazima, n'olusozi lw'Omukama w'Amagye luliyitibwa Olusozi Olutukuvu." 
Zechariah8:4 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Abakadde abasajja n'abakazi baliddamu okutuula ku makubo mu Yeruzaalemu, buli omu ng'alina omuggo mu ngalo ze olw'obukadde bwe." 
Zechariah8:5 Amakubo mu kibuga galijjula abaana abalenzi n'abawala abazannyiramu. 
Zechariah8:6 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Kino kirabika ng'ekyewuunyo eri abaasigalawo mu bantu bano mu nnaku ezo, naye ne mu maaso gange bwe kirindabikira? Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Zechariah8:7 Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Nze nzija kuwonya abantu bange okuva mu nsi y'ebuvanjuba n'ey'ebugwanjuba. 
Zechariah8:8 Nzija kubaleeta era balisula mu Yeruzaalemu; balibeera bantu bange nange ndibeera Katonda waabwe omwesigwa era omutuukirivu gye bali. 
Zechariah8:9 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Mmwe abawulira mu nnaku zino ebigambo bino ebiva mu kamwa k'abalanzi abaaliwo ku lunaku Ekiggwa ky'Omukama w'Amagye lwe ky'abangibwawo, emikono gyammwe gigume Ekiggwa kisobole okuzimbibwa." 
Zechariah8:10 Mu bbanga eryakulembera ennaku ezo tewaaliwo mpeera eri muntu oba ekisolo; omuntu yagendanga ku mirimu gye naye nga talina buweerero ku mulabe, kubanga buli muntu nali mukyawaganyizza ne munne." 
Zechariah8:11 Naye kati abaasigalawo mu bantu bano sijja kubayisa nga bwe nakola mu biseera ebiyise, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Zechariah8:12 Ensigo erikula mu ddembe, omuzabbibu gulireeta ebibala byagwo n'ettaka liribaza ekibala kyalyo. Bino byonna ndibiwa abaasigalawo mu bantu bano bibeere byabwe." 
Zechariah8:13 Mmwe ennyumba ya Yuda n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, nga bwe mwali ekivumo mu mawanga, kale nno nzija kubawonya, mubeere omukisa. Muleke kutya, emikono gyammwe gigume." 
Zechariah8:14 “Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Nga bwe nali nteesezza okubakola akabi naye ne mbasaasira, luli bajjajjammwe lwe bannyiiza, y'agamba Omukama w'Amagye," 
Zechariah8:15 kale nno nteesezza mu nnaku zino, nkolere bulungi Yeruzaalemu n'ennyumba ya Yuda; muleke kutya." 
Zechariah8:16 Bino bye muba mukola: buli omu abuulire munne amazima, mu mbuga mulamule mu bwenkanya mwereetere emirembe;" 
Zechariah8:17 temuteesa kukoleragana bubi mu mitima gyammwe, n'okulayira eby'obulimba temukyagalanga, kubanga ebyo byonna mbikyawa, Omukama y'agamba.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Naye ekigambo ky'Omukama w'Amagye kyanzijira nti: 
Zechariah8:19 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Ekisiibo ky'omwezi ogwokuna, eky'ogwokutaano, eky'ogwomusanvu n'eky'ogw'ekkumi kirireetera ennyumba ya Yuda essanyu n'okusagambiza n'embaga ennungi; awo nno mwagale amazima n'eddembe.”" 
Zechariah8:20 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Abantu bangi ko n'abasula mu bibuga ebinene balijja," 
Zechariah8:21 n'ab'omu kibuga ekimu baligenda mu kirala ne bagamba nti: ‘Tugende, tuwanjagire mu maaso g'Omukama, tunoonye Omukama w'Amagye; nze ŋŋenda.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Abantu bangi balijja, n'amawanga ag'amaanyi galijja okunoonya Omukama w'Amagye mu Yeruzaalemu n'okuwanjagira Omukama." 
Zechariah8:23 “Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Mu nnaku ezo, abantu kkumi okuva mu nnimi zonna n'amawanga balikwata omukugiro gw'omusajja Omuyudaaya ne bamugamba nti: ‘Tujja kugenda nammwe, kubanga twawulira nti Katonda ali nammwe.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Obubaka: Ekigambo ky'Omukama kirwanyisa ensi y'e Kaduraki, kijja kuwummulira ku Damasiko. Amaaso g'abantu gali ku Mukama, era nga n'ebika bya Yisirayeli byonna bwe bikoze," 
Zechariah9:2 ne ku Kamati ayawula naye ensalo, ne ku Tiiro ne Sidoni, newandibadde nga bagezi nnyo." 
Zechariah9:3 Tiiro yeezimbira ekigo, ne yeetuumira ffeeza eyenkana enfuufu, ne zaabu ali ng'ebitoomi by'oku nguudo." 
Zechariah9:4 Naye Omukama alimuggyako byonna by'alina, n'azikiriza n'amaanyi ge ku nnyanja, n'omuliro gulimusenkenya." 
Zechariah9:5 Asukeloni aliraba n'atya, ne Gaza alyenyoola mu bulumi obungi, ne Ekuroni bw'atyo, kubanga essuubi lye lizikiridde; Gaza alifiirwa kabaka, ne Asukeloni alibulwa asulamu." 
Zechariah9:6 Abazaaliddwa mu nsonga balisenga mu Asudodi, n'okwekuza kw'Abafilisitiini ndikukomya." 
Zechariah9:7 Omusaayi gwe ndiguggya mu kamwa ke, n'ebyenyinyalwa bye okuva mu mannyo ge. Naye alisigalawo ku lwa Katonda, alifuuka mukulembeze mu Yuda, ne Ekuroni aliba ng'Abayebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ndyekuumira ennyumba yange eri amagye agagisaalimbiramu. Teri anyigiriza aliddamu kubafuga, kubanga kati ntunula nkaliriza." 
Zechariah9:9 Sagambiza nnyo, muwala wa Siyoni! Lekaanira waggulu, muwala wa Yeruzaalemu! Wuuyo kabaka wo ajja gy'oli, Asinze, muwanguzi; muteefu, yeebagadde endogoyi, akalogoyi, omwana gw'endogoyi." 
Zechariah9:10 Nzija kuggya ebigaali mu Efurayimu, n'embalaasi mu Yeruzaalemu; n'omusaale ogw'olutalo gulimenyebwa. Alirangirira eddembe eri amawanga; obwakabaka bwe buliva ku nnyanja okutuuka ku nnyanja, n'okuva ku mugga okutuuka ku nkingi z'ensi." 
Zechariah9:11 Naawe, olw'okubeera omusaayi gw'endagaano naawe, ndiyimbula abasibe bo okuva mu kizzi ekikalu." 
Zechariah9:12 Muddeeyo mu kigo kyammwe, mmwe abasibe ab'essuubi; n'olwa leero nnangirira nti ndikuddizaawo bya mirundi ebiri." 
Zechariah9:13 Kubanga Yuda mmuwese ng'omutego gw'akasaale, ne Efurayimu ne mmussaako ng'akasaale; Siyoni, nzija kusiikuula batabani bo, balwanyise abaana bo, ggwe Yavani, nkufuule ng'ekitala ky'omutabaazi." 
Zechariah9:14 Awo Omukama alirabikira waggulu ku bo, n'akasaale ke kalivaayo ng'ekimyanso; Omukama Katonda alifuuwa eŋŋombe, n'avaayo mu kikuŋŋunta ow'emaserengeta." 
Zechariah9:15 Omukama w'Amagye alibataasa; balikavvula ne balinnyirira ab'envuumuulo; balinywa ne bawuluguma ng'abaliko omwenge; balijjula ng'ekibya, balitoba ng'ensonda z'omwaliiro."
