Zechariah9:16 Ku olwo Omukama Katonda waabwe alibalokola ng'eggana ly'abantu be; balitemagana ku nsi ye ng'amayinja ag'engule ag'omuwendo. 
Zechariah9:17 Nga kiriba kirungi, nga kiriba makula! Eŋŋano eriginnyimusa abalenzi, n'evviini ensu abawala." 
Zechariah10:1 Musabe Omukama enkuba mu budde obwa Ttoggo; Omukama y'aleeta ebire ebya kibuyaga; awa abantu ebire by'enkuba, na buli omu n'amuwa ebimera mu nnimiro ye." 
Zechariah10:2 Bulubaale bwammwe obw'awaka bwogera bitaliimu, n'abalaguzi balabikirwa bya bulimba; ebirooto byabwe temuli kantu, okukubagiza kwabyo kuguya buguyaaguya. Abantu kyebava batangatanga ng'endiga, nga banyiikaavu kubanga tebalina musumba." 
Zechariah10:3 “Obusungu bwange bweseredde ku basumba, nzija kubonereza abakulembeze. Kubanga Omukama w'Amagye alabirira eggana lye, ennyumba ya Yuda; alibafuula ng'embalaasi ze ennwanyi ze yeewaaniramu." 
Zechariah10:4 Mu ye mwe muliva ejjinja ery'entabiro, mwe muliva n'enkondo ya weema; mwe muliva omusaale gw'olutalo, mwe muliva buli mufuzi." 
Zechariah10:5 Bonna wamu baliba ng'abatabaazi abazira, nga basambirira ebitoomi by'omu nguudo mu lutalo; balitabaala kubanga Omukama aliba nabo; baliswaza abeebagazi." 
Zechariah10:6 “Nzija kugumya ennyumba ya Yuda, ndirokola ennyumba ya Yozefu; ŋŋenda kubakomyawo kubanga ndi wa kisa gye bali. Balibeera nga be sigobangako, anti nze Mukama Katonda waabwe, ŋŋenda kubaanukula." 
Zechariah10:7 Ab'omu Efurayimu baliba ng'abatabaazi abazira, n'emitima gyabwe giricamuka ng'egy'abanywedde evviini. Abaana baabwe baliraba ne basanyuka; emitima gyabwe girijaguliza mu Mukama," 
Zechariah10:8 ŋŋenda kubatemyako mbakuŋŋaanye. Mazima ndibanunula; balibeera bangi nga bwe baali mu kusooka. 
Zechariah10:9 Nabasaasaanya mu mawanga, naye baliyima ewala eyo ne banzijukira, bo n'abaana baabwe balirama era balikomawo." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndibakomyawo okuva mu nsi y'e Misiri, ndibakuŋŋaanyaayo mu Assuri; ndibazza mu Gileyaadi ne Lebanoni, n'ekifo ekibamala kiribula." 
Zechariah10:11 Baliyita mu nnyanja y'ennaku, amayengo g'ennyanja galikubwa, n'eddubi lya Kiyira lirifuulibwa kkalu; olwetumbu lwa Assuri lulikkakkanyizibwa, ne ddamula wa Misiri alivaawo." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndibagumya mu Mukama, balitambulira mu linnya lye,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Zechariah11:1 Lebanoni, ggulawo emiryango gyo, omuliro gulye entolookyo zo." 
Zechariah11:2 Mukube ebiwoobe, mmwe sipulaasi, kubanga entolookyo egudde; kubanga emiti egy'ekitiibwa ginyaguluddwa; mukube ebiwoobe, mmwe emivule gy'e Basani, kubanga ekibira ekikwafu kigudde." 
Zechariah11:3 Wulira okuwoloma kw'abalunzi, kubanga ekitiibwa kyabwe kyonna kivunjagiddwa. Wulira okuwuluguma kw'empologoma, kubanga embirabira za Yorudani zizikiriziddwa." 
Zechariah11:4 Omukama Katonda wange kino ky'agamba: “Mulunde endiga ez'okutta. 
Zechariah11:5 Abo abazigula bazitta ne batazza musango, n'abazitunda beegambira nti: ‘Omukama agulumizibwe, ngaggawadde!’ N'abasumba baazo bennyini tebazisaasira." 
Zechariah11:6 Nze sijja kuddamu kusaasira bantu ba mu nsi muno, Omukama y'agamba. Abantu nzija kubawaayo, buli omu mu mikono gya munne, ne mu gya kabaka we. Balinyigiriza ensi, naye sigenda kubawonyaawo mu mikono gya bali.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Bwe ntyo ne nnunda endiga ez'okutta ez'abasuubuzi ba kabaka. Ne nzirira emiggo ebiri, ogumu ne ngutuuma 'Kisa' n'omulala ne ngutuuma Mukago, ne nnunda endiga." 
Zechariah11:8 Mu mwezi gumu ne nzigyawo abasumba abasatu. Endiga zanneenyiwa nange ne nzeetamwa. 
Zechariah11:9 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Sijja kubalunda mmwe; ez'okufa ka zife, n'ez'okuzikirira ka zizikirire, ate ezisigadde buli emu erye ennyama ya ginnaayo.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Awo ne nzirira omuggo gwange oguyitibwa 'Kisa' ne ngumenyamu, bwe ntyo endagaano yange ne ngimenyawo gye nali nkubye n'amawanga gonna." 
Zechariah11:11 N'emenyebwawo ku olwo; abasuubuzi b'endiga abaali bantunuulidde ne bamanya nti ekyo kigambo kya Mukama. 
Zechariah11:12 Ne mbagamba nti: “Oba mulaba nti kirungi, munsasule empeera yange, oba si ky'ekyo, mwerekere.” Ne bampimira empeera yange: ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu" 
Zechariah11:13 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Bikasukire omubumbi” omuwendo ogw'ettendo bo gwe bannamulamu. Ne nkwata ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu ne mbikasukira omubumbi mu nnyumba y'Omukama. 
Zechariah11:14 Awo ne mmenya omuggo gwange ogwokubiri oguyitibwa 'Mukago', ne mmenyawo bwe ntyo oluganda wakati wa Yuda ne Yisirayeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Omukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Era ddira otwale ebikola eby'omusumba omubuyabuya," 
Zechariah11:16 kubanga ŋŋenda kussaawo omusumba mu nsi atalyefiirayo ku ndiga ezibuze oba okunoonya eziwabye, okuwonya ezifunye obuvune n'okuliisa ennamu, wabula alirya ennyama y'ensava, n'anuulako ebinuulo byazo." 
Zechariah11:17 “Zimusanze omulunzi omubuyabuya aleka awo eggana! Ekitala kikube omukono gwe n'eriiso lye erya ddyo! Omukono gwe gukalire ddala, n'eriiso lye erya ddyo lizibire ddala!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Obubaka: Ekigambo ky'Omukama ku Yisirayeli ne ku Yuda. Omukama abamba eggulu, abangawo ensi n'akola omwoyo gw'omuntu mu muntu, agamba nti:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Yeruzaalemu ŋŋenda kumukolamu ekikompe ekinaatamiiza abantu bonna abeetooloddewo. Kiribaawo mu kulumbibwa kwa Yuda ne mu kuzindibwa kwa Yeruzaalemu. 
Zechariah12:3 Ku olwo ndifuula Yeruzaalemu ejjinja ezzito eririrema abantu okusitula; abalirisitula balyetuusaako ebinuubule. Amawanga gonna ag'ensi galyekuŋŋaanya okumulwanyisa. 
Zechariah12:4 Ku olwo, Omukama y'agamba, buli mbalaasi ndigireetera okusattira, n'omwebagazi waayo ndimusuula eddalu. Eriiso lyange ndirissa ku Yuda, naye embalaasi zonna ez'amawanga ndiziziba amaaso." 
Zechariah12:5 Olwo abafuzi bonna mu Yuda baligamba mu mitima gyabwe nti: ‘Abantu b'omu Yeruzaalemu ba maanyi kubanga Omukama w'Amagye ye Katonda waabwe.’ 
Zechariah12:6 “Ku lunaku olwo ndifuula abafuzi ba Yuda ng'entamu eyengeredde ku nku, ng'ekitawuliro mu binywa by'essubi; balivaabira abantu bonna abeetooloddewo ku ddyo ne ku kkono, naye Yeruzaalemu kirisigala kikkalidde mu kifo kyakyo mu Yeruzaalemu." 
Zechariah12:7 Omukama alisooka kuwonya weema za Yuda, ekitiibwa ky'ennyumba ya Dawudi n'ekitiibwa ky'abasula mu Yeruzaalemu bireme kuyisa Yuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Ku olwo Omukama alitaasa abasula mu Yeruzaalemu, asinga obunafu mu bo ku olwo aliba nga Dawudi, n'ennyumba ya Dawudi eriba nga Katonda, nga malayika w'Omukama abakulembeddemu." 
Zechariah12:9 “Ku olwo ndivaayo okuzikiriza amawanga gonna agajja okulumba Yeruzaalemu. 
Zechariah12:10 “Ndiyiwa ku nnyumba ya Dawudi ne ku bantu b'e Yeruzaalemu omwoyo omusaasizi n'ogw'okwegayirira. Balitunula kw'oyo gwe baafumita; balimukaabira ng'akaabira omwana omuzaale omu; balyaziirana ku lulwe ng'abaaziiranira omwana omuggulanda. 
Zechariah12:11 Ku olwo ebiwoobe biriba binene mu Yeruzaalemu, ng'ebiwoobe by'e Adadi-Rimmoni mu museetwe gw'e Megiddo." 
Zechariah12:12 Ensi eriwooba, buli maka gokka: amaka g'ennyumba ya Dawudi gokka, ne bakazi baabwe bokka; amaka g'ennyumba ya Natani gokka, ne bakazi baabwe bokka;" 
Zechariah12:13 amaka g'ennyumba ya Leevi gokka, ne bakazi baabwe bokka; amaka ga Simeyi gokka, ne bakazi baabwe bokka;" 
Zechariah12:14 amaka gonna agasigaddewo, buli maka gokka ne bakazi baabwe bokka.”" 
Zechariah13:1 “Ku olwo walibaawo oluzzi oluliggulibwa olw'ennyumba ya Dawudi ne bonna abasula mu Yeruzaalemu okubanaazaako ebibi byabwe n'obujama. 
Zechariah13:2 “Ku olwo, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, ndikomya amannya g'ebifaananyi bya balubaale okuva mu nsi, era tegagenda kuddayo kujjukirwa n'akamu. Era mu nsi ndimalamu abalanzi n'omwoyo omugwagwa." 
Zechariah13:3 Bwe walibaawo akyalanga, kitaawe ne nnyina abaamuzaala balimugamba nti: ‘Ojja kufa, kubanga oyogera bya bulimba mu linnya ly'Omukama.’ Bw'aliranga, kitaawe ne nnyina abaamuzaala balimufumita." 
Zechariah13:4 Ku olwo, buli mulanzi aliswala olw'eby'alabikirwa; talyessaako munagiro gwa byoya abalimberimbe," 
Zechariah13:5 wabula aligamba nti ‘Nze siri mulanzi, ndi musajja mulimi, kubanga ettaka kye kyampeebwa okuva mu buvubuka bwange.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Bwe balimubuuza nti: ‘Ate bino ebiwundu mu kifuba kyo?’ agenda kubaddamu nti: ‘Bino ebiwundu nabifunira eyo mu nnyumba ya mikwano gyange.’ ” 
Zechariah13:7 “Zuukuka, ggwe ekitala, situkira mu musumba wange, ne mu musajja anninaanye!” Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba. “Kuba omusumba endiga zibune emiwabo, nange omukono gwange nzija kugukyukiza ku bato." 
Zechariah13:8 Mu nsi yonna,” Omukama y'agamba, “ebyokusatu bibiri birikubwa ne bizikirira, naye ekitundu ekyokusatu kye kirisigalamu." 
Zechariah13:9 Ekyokusatu kino ndikiyisa mu muliro, ndibatukuza nga ffeeza bw'atukuzibwa, ndibageza nga zaabu bw'agezebwa. Balikoowoola erinnya lyange, nange ndibaanukula. Ndigamba nti: ‘Bano bantu bange,’ nabo baligamba nti: ‘Omukama ye Katonda wange.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Olunaku lw'Omukama luulwo lujja, ebikunyagiddwako lwe birigabanirwa mu makkati go." 
Zechariah14:2 Nzija kukuŋŋaanyiza amawanga gonna mu Yeruzaalemu mu lutalo, ekibuga kirikwatibwa, ennyumba ne zinyagululwa, n'abakazi baligwagwawazibwa. Ekyokubiri eky'ekibuga kirigenda mu buwaŋŋanguse, kyokka abantu abalala abasigaddewo tebaliggyibwa mu kibuga." 
Zechariah14:3 Awo Omukama agenda kuvaayo alwanyise amawanga ago, nga bw'alwana ku lunaku olw'olutalo." 
Zechariah14:4 Ku olwo ebigere bye biriyimirira ku Lusozi lwa Oliva olutunuulidde Yeruzaalemu ebuvanjuba; olwo Olusozi lwa Oliva lulikutukamu ebitundu bibiri okuva ebuvanjuba okutuuka ebugwanjuba, wakati ne weesimawo olukonko olunene ennyo, ekitundu ky'olusozi ekimu ne kidda emambuka ate ekirala emaserengeta." 
Zechariah14:5 Ekiwonvu ky'ensozi kirijjula, kubanga ekiwonvu ky'ensozi kiriziba okutuukira ddala ku Azeli. Kiriziba nga bwe kyaziba olwa musisi mu mirembe gya Wuzziya kabaka wa Yuda. Awo Omukama Katonda wange alijja n'abatuukirivu bonna nga bali naye." 
Zechariah14:6 Ku olwo tewaliba kitangaala, wabula butiti na muzira." 
Zechariah14:7 Luliba lunaku lumu, Omukama kino akimanyi; tewaliba misana, tewaliba kiro, ne mu budde obw'akawungeezi ekitangaala kiribaayo." 
Zechariah14:8 Ku olwo amazzi amalamu galikulukuta nga gava mu Yeruzaalemu, ekitundu ekimu nga kiraga mu nnyanja ey'ebuvanjuba ate ekitundu ekirala mu nnyanja ey'ebugwanjuba, mu kyeya ne mu bw'empewo." 
Zechariah14:9 Omukama y'aliba kabaka ku nsi yonna. Ku olwo Omukama aliba omu, n'erinnya lye nga lye lyokka." 
Zechariah14:10 Ensi yonna erifuuka lusenyi okuva e Geba okutuuka e Rimmoni mu maserengeta ga Yeruzaalemu. Naye kyo Yeruzaalemu kirisigala waggulu mu kifo kye okuva mu Mulyango gwa Benyamiini okutuuka ku kifo awali Omulyango Ogusooka, n'okutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Ensonda, n'okuva ku Munaala gwa Kananeli okutuuka ku masogolero ga kabaka." 
Zechariah14:11 Abantu balisengamu, tekiriddayo kuwongebwa okuzikirizibwa; Yeruzaalemu kirituula ntende." 
Zechariah14:12 Kino kye kibonerezo Omukama ky'alissa ku mawanga gonna agaalwanyisa Yeruzaalemu: Emibiri gyabwe girivunda ng'eno bakyayimiridde ku magulu gaabwe, n'amaaso gaabwe galivundira mu nkompe, n'ennimi zaabwe zirivundira mu kamwa kaabwe." 
Zechariah14:13 Ku olwo Omukama alireeta akatabanguko kanene mu bantu, buli omu alibaka omukono gwa munne ne balwanagana." 
Zechariah14:14 Ne Yuda alirwanira e Yeruzaalemu; obugagga bw'amawanga gonna ageetoolodde awo bulikuŋŋaanyizibwa: zaabu, ffeeza n'engoye ebingi ennyo." 
Zechariah14:15 Ekibonerezo ekifaanana nga kino era kirigwira embalaasi, ennyumbu, eŋŋamiya, endogoyi n'ebisolo byonna ebiriba mu nsiisira." 
Zechariah14:16 Ate abaliba bawonyeewo mu mawanga gonna agaalumba Yeruzaalemu, balyambukanga buli mwaka basinze Kabaka, Omukama w'Amagye, bakuze Embaga y'Ensiisira." 
Zechariah14:17 Singa walibulayo mu bika by'ensi ayambuka e Yeruzaalemu okusinza Kabaka Omukama w'Amagye, tebaliba na nkuba." 
Zechariah14:18 Singa ebika by'omu Misiri tebiryambuka ne bijja, tebaliba na nkuba. Omukama alibaleetera ekibonerezo ky'atadde ku mawanga ago agatayambuka kukuza Mbaga ya Nsiisira." 
Zechariah14:19 Ekyo kye kiriba ekibonerezo kya Misiri n'ekibonerezo ky'amawanga gonna agatayambuka kukuza Mbaga ya Nsiisira. 
Zechariah14:20 Ku olwo ku bide by'embalaasi kuliwandiikibwako nti 'Kitukuvu ku lw'Omukama'; n'entamu mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama ziriba ng'ebibya ebitukuvu ebiri mu maaso g'omwaliiro. 
Zechariah14:21 Buli ntamu mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu Yuda eriba ntukuvu ku lw'Omukama w'Amagye. Bonna abalijja okutambira baliziddiranga ne bafumbira omwo. Ku olwo mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama temuliddamu kubeeramu musuubuzi. 
Malachi1:1 Obubaka: Ekigambo ky'Omukama eri Yisirayeli ekyayita mu Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 “Nabaagala, Omukama y'agamba, naye mmwe mubuuza nti ‘Watwagala otya?’ Ezawu teyali muganda wa Yakobo? Omukama y'agamba. Naye Yakobo namwagala," 
Malachi1:3 kyokka Ezawu ne mmukyawa, n'ensozi ze nazireka matongo, n'obusika bwe ne mbufuula nfo ya bibe eby'omu ddungu." 
Malachi1:4 Edomu bw'agamba nti: ‘Tukubiddwa, naye tunaakomawo ne tuzimba ebyazikirizibwa,’ naye ye Omukama w'Amagye kino ky'agamba: Baleke bazimbe naye nze nzija kumenyawo. Banaayitibwanga 'Nsi Mbi', 'Eggwanga Omukama ly'Asunguwalidde Emirembe gyonna'." 
Malachi1:5 Mujja kukyerabirako ddala mmwennyini, mugambe nti: ‘Omukama mukulu n'emitala w'ensalo za Yisirayeli.’" 
Malachi1:6 “Omwana assaamu kitaawe ekitiibwa, n'omuweereza akissaamu mukama we. Oba nze kitammwe, ekitiibwa kyange kiruwa? Oba ndi mukama, obukulu bwange buluwa? Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba. Mmwe bakabona mmwe munyooma erinnya lyange. Naye mubuuza nti: ‘Erinnya lyo tulinyoomye tutya?’" 
Malachi1:7 Bwe muweereza ku mwaliiro gwange emmere ennyonoonefu. Era mubuuza nti: ‘Twakwonoona tutya?’ Bwe mugamba nti ‘Emmeeza y'Omukama enyoomebwa.’ 
Malachi1:8 Bwe muleeta ebisolo ebizibe by'amaaso bitambirwe, ekyo si kikyamu? Bwe muweereza ebisolo ebirema n'ebirwadde, ekyo si kikyamu? Mubiweereze owessaza wammwe mulabe! Anaabasiima? Anaabasanyukira? Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi1:9 ‘Kale nno muwanjagire Katonda ow'ekisa atusaasire!’ N'ebyo ebitone ebifaanana bityo mu ngalo zammwe anaabaako n'omu mu mmwe gw'asanyukira? Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba. 
Malachi1:10 Singa nno wabaawo omu mu mmwe n'aggala emiryango gy'Ekiggwa muleme kumala gakoleeza muliro ku mwaliiro gwange. Simunsanyusa, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, era sijja kukkiriza bitone biva mu ngalo zammwe." 
Malachi1:11 Okuva enjuba lw'evaayo okutuusa lw'egwa erinnya lyange kkulu mu mawanga, ne mu buli kifo obubaani n'ebitone ebitukuvu biweerezebwa erinnya lyange, kubanga erinnya lyange kkulu mu mawanga, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi1:12 “Naye mmwe mulyonoona nga mugamba nti: ‘Emmeeza y'Omukama nnyonoonefu, n'emmere yaakwo enyoomebwa.’" 
Malachi1:13 Ne mugamba nti: ‘Kuno kukabiriza!’ Ne mugyenyinyimbwa, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba. Muddira ensolo ennyage, ennema n'endwadde ne muzireeta ng'ebitone. Nze nsiime ezo okuva mu ngalo zammwe? Omukama y'agamba." 
Malachi1:14 Avumirirwe oyo omukumpanya, alina mu ggana lye ennume ekkirizibwa, eyeeyama okugiwa, naye n'atambiriramu Omukama eriko ebbala. Kubanga nze ndi kabaka mukulu, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, n'erinnya lyange lya ntiisa mu mawanga." 
Malachi2:1 “Kaakati nno kino ekiragiro kyammwe, bakabona." 
Malachi2:2 Bwe mutawulira, bwe mutassa mutima ku kuwa kitiibwa linnya lyange, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, nzija kubasindikira ekikolimo, n'emikisa gyammwe nzija kugivumirira; n'okugivumirira nagivumirira dda, kubanga temulissaako mutima." 
Malachi2:3 Mulabe eno: nzija kukoma ku bitone byammwe, mmette amaaso gammwe n'obusa, obusa bw'ebitone byammwe, mbaggye mu maaso gange." 
Malachi2:4 Olwo mulimanya nti mbawadde ekiragiro ekyo, endagaano yange ne Leevi esigalewo, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi2:5 Endagaano yange yali naye, endagaano y'obulamu n'eddembe; ebyo nabimuwa alyoke anziseemu ekitiibwa. Yampa ekitiibwa n'erinnya lyange n'alitya." 
Malachi2:6 Etteeka ery'amazima lyamuli mu kamwa era tewali bugwenyufu bwasangibwa ku mimwa gye; yatambulanga nange mu ddembe ne mu butuufu, bangi yabaggya mu bugwenyufu." 
Malachi2:7 Kubanga emimwa gya kabona gyandikuumye okumanya, n'etteeka abantu bandirinoonyerezza mu kamwe ke, kubanga ye mubaka w'Omukama w'Amagye." 
Malachi2:8 Naye mmwe muvudde mu kkubo, muleetedde bangi okwesittala n'etteeka lyammwe; mwonoonye endagaano ya Leevi, bw'agamba Omukama w'amagye." 
Malachi2:9 Nange kyennava mbafuula ekitagasa ne mbatoowaza mu maaso g'abantu bonna, kubanga temwakwata makubo gange, ne mwekubiira mu ngeri gye mwakwatamu etteeka.”" 
Malachi2:10 Ffenna kitaffe si ye omu? Katonda si ye omu eyatutonda? Lwaki tumenya endagaano ya bajjajjaffe nga buli omu amenya obwesigwa eri munne? 
Malachi2:11 Yuda tabadde mwesigwa; ekyenyinyalwa kyakolebwa mu Yisirayeli ne mu Yeruzaalemu, kubanga Yuda yayonoona Ekiggwa ky'Omukama ky'ayagala, bwe yawasa muwala wa lubaale omugwira." 
Malachi2:12 Omukama akutule ku weema za Yakobo ne ku abo abaweereza ebitone Omukama w'Amagye buli muntu yenna awa obujulizi obusemba oyo akoze kino. 
Malachi2:13 Na kino mukikola: Omwaliiro gw'Omukama mugujjuzizza amaziga; mukaaba ne mukuba ebiwoobe kubanga takyafaayo ku bitambiro byammwe, yadde okubikkiriza n'essanyu okuva mu ngalo zammwe." 
Malachi2:14 Mubuuza nti: “Lwaki?” Kubanga Omukama ye yali omujulirwa wakati wo ne mukazi wo ow'obuvubuka bwo, naye gw'otaalaga bwesigwa, sso nga ye munno, ye mukazi wo ow'endagaano." 
Malachi2:15 Teyakola omubiri gumu n'aguwa n'omwoyo gwagwo? Omu oyo anoonya ki? Ezzadde okuva ewa Katonda. Kale nno weekuume; leka kumenya bwesigwa na mukazi ow'obuvubuka bwo. 
Malachi2:16 “Nkyayira ddala abafumbo okwawukana, Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli y'agamba, n'omuntu okubikka ekyambalo kye n'obukambwe, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba.” Kale nno weekuume oleme kumenya bwesigwa." 
Malachi2:17 Omukama mumukooyezza n'ebigambo byammwe. Mubuuza nti: “Tumukooyezza tutya?” Bwe mugamba nti: “Bonna abakola ekibi balungi mu maaso g'Omukama, era naye abasanyukira,” oba nti: “Katonda alamuza obwenkanya aluwa?”" 
Malachi3:1 “Laba, ntuma omubaka wange ategeke ekkubo mu maaso gange; amangu ago Omukama gwe munoonya ajja kujja mu Kiggwa, omubaka ow'endagaano gwe mwesunga ajja kujja, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi3:2 Naye ani aligumira olunaku lw'amatuuka ge? Bw'alirabika ani aliyimirirawo? Anti aliba ng'omuliro gw'omukenenuzi oba nga ssabbuuni w'omwozi. 
Malachi3:3 Alituula ng'omukenenuzi oba ng'atukuza ffeeza, alitukuza bazzukulu ba Leevi, n'abasengejja nga zaabu ne ffeeza, balyoke baweereze Omukama ebitambiro mu butuukirivu." 
Malachi3:4 Olwo ekitambiro kya Yuda ne Yeruzaalemu kirisanyusa Omukama nga mu nnaku ziri, nga mu myaka egy'edda." 
Malachi3:5 Olwo ndisembera gye muli okubalamula. Ndiba mwangu okuwa obujulizi ku balogo, abenzi, abalayira obulimba, abalyazaamaanya empeera y'abapakasi, abanyigiriza bannamwandu ne bamulekwa, abatayisa mugwira na bwenkanya, n'abatantya, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi3:6 “Nze Omukama, sifuuka; awo nno, mmwe abantu ba Yakobo, temunnasaanawo." 
Malachi3:7 Okuviira ddala mu budde bwa bajjajjammwe mwava ku mateeka gange, ne mutagakwata. Mukomeewo gye ndi, nange nzija kukomawo gye muli, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba. Naye mubuuza nti: ‘Tunaakomawo tutya?’" 
Malachi3:8 Omuntu asobola okulyakula Katonda? Naye mmwe mundyakula. Mubuuza nti: ‘Tukulyakula tutya?’ Mu kyekkumi ne mu bitone. 
Malachi3:9 Muli bavumirire, mwenna eggwanga lyonna, kubanga mundyakula." 
Malachi3:10 Ekyekkumi kyonna mukireete mu ggwanika mu nnyumba yange mubeeremu emmere. Mungeze mu kino, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, mulabe oba siibasumululire ebiyiriro by'eggulu mbayiire emikisa gibooge n'okubooga." 
Malachi3:11 Ndibakomerako ku mukkavvuzi ne zitayonoona kibala kya ttaka, ne mu nnimiro emizabbibu gyammwe tegirikunkumuka, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi3:12 Olwo amawanga gonna galibeesiimisa, kubanga mulibeera nsi ejjudde ebisanyusa, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi3:13 “Munjogeddeko ebigambo ebizito, Omukama y'agamba." 
Malachi3:14 Ate mubuuza nti: ‘Biki bye tukwogeddeko?’ Anti mwagamba nti: ‘Okuweereza Katonda temuli kantu! Mugaso ki gwe tuggya mu kukwata by'akuutira ne mu kukunkuna ng'abakungubaga mu maaso g'Omukama? 
Malachi3:15 Kati twesiimisa abeekuza; abakozi b'obubi bibagendera bulungi, ate ne bwe bageza Katonda tebabaako kantu.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Awo abatya Omukama ne boogeraganya, Omukama n'ategereza, n'awulira; ekitabo eky'ekijjukizo ne kiwandiikibwa mu maaso ge ku abo abatya Omukama n'abalowooza ku linnya lye." 
Malachi3:17 “Baliba bange, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, ekkula lyange, ku lunaku lwe ndikola. Ndibasaasira ng'omusajja bw'asaasira mutabani we amuweereza." 
Malachi3:18 Olwo muliddamu okulaba enjawulo wakati w'omutuukirivu n'omubi, ne wakati w'aweereza Katonda n'atamuweereza." 
Malachi3:19 “Olunaku lwo lujja kujja; lulyaka ng'akabiga; bonna abeekuza n'abakozi b'obubi baliba ng'essubi; olunaku olujja lulibakoleeza omuliro, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba, tebalirekerwa yadde kikolo yadde ettabi." 
Malachi3:20 Naye mmwe abatya erinnya lyange enjuba y'obutuukirivu eribaviirayo n'okuvumula mu biwaawaatiro byayo; mulifuluma ne muligita ng'obuyana obuyimbuddwa mu kisibo. 
Malachi3:21 Mulirinnyirira ababi; balifuuka ng'evvu ku mala g'ebigere byammwe, mu lunaku lwe ndikola, Omukama w'Amagye y'agamba." 
Malachi3:22 “Mujjukire etteeka lya Musa omuweereza wange, lye nalagira ku Korebu ng'ebiragiro n'ennamula ku Yisirayeli yenna." 
Malachi3:23 “Mulabe, nzija kubatumira Eliya omulanzi ng'olunaku lw'Omukama olukulu olw'entiisa terunnatuuka." 
Malachi3:24 Alizza emitima gy'abazadde abasajja eri abaana baabwe, n'emitima gy'abaana eri bakitaabwe, nneme kujja ensi ngisalire okuzikirizibwa.”" 
Matthew1:10 Kezekiya n'azaala Manasse, Manasse n'azaala Amosi, Amosi n'azaala Yosiya." 
Luke3:25 mutabani wa Mattatiya, mutabani wa Amosi, mutabani wa Nakumu, mutabani wa Esuli, mutabani wa Naggayi,"
